Genesis1:1 Dũni wã sɩngrẽ Wẽnd naana yĩngr la tẽnga. 
Genesis1:2 Tẽnga da yaa vɩʋʋgo, bũmb da ka a pʋgẽ ye, lik n da yãmb zĩig zãnga. Wẽnd pãng la b maasem n da buiid kooma." 
Genesis1:3 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ vẽenem zĩndi. La vẽenem zĩndame. 
Genesis1:4 Wẽnnaam yãeeme tɩ vẽenem yaa sõmbo, tɩ b na n welg vẽenem la lika." 
Genesis1:5 B pʋda vẽenema tɩ wĩndga, n pʋd lika tɩ yʋngo. Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: dẽ la pipi daare." 
Genesis1:6 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ gãong yɛdg kooma sʋka n welg kooma sags a yiibu. La yɩɩ boto. 
Genesis1:7 Wẽnnaam naana saaga n welg kooma sẽn be yĩngrã ne koom ninga sẽn bɛ-a tẽngre," 
Genesis1:8 Wẽnnaam pʋda yĩngra tɩ saaga. Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: daar a yiib soaba. 
Genesis1:9 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ kooma sẽn be saaga tẽngr tigim zĩig a ye, tɩ zĩ-koɛɛng puki. La yɩɩ boto." 
Genesis1:10 Wẽnnaam pʋda Zĩ-koɛɛnga tɩ tẽnga, n bool kooma sẽn tigim zĩig ninga tɩ mogre. Wẽnnaam yãeeme tɩ rẽ yaa sõmbo." 
Genesis1:11 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ tẽnga sob ne vãado, ne mood buud toɛ-toɛ sẽn womd biisi, ne tɩɩs buud toɛ-toɛ sẽn womd b biisi. La yɩɩ boto." 
Genesis1:12 Tẽnga sɩd soba ne vãado; ne mood toɛ-toɛ yã ne b biisi, ne tɩɩs toɛ-toɛ ne b biisi, la Wẽnnaam yãeeme tɩ rẽ yaa sõmbo." 
Genesis1:13 Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: daar a tãab soaba. 
Genesis1:14 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ bũmb sẽn kõt vẽenem zĩnd saaga zugu n welg yʋng ne beoogo, n yals kibs rãmba, n yals daare la yʋʋmde;" 
Genesis1:15 b na n zĩnda yĩngri n yɩ vẽenem n vẽnegd tẽnga. La yɩɩ boto. 
Genesis1:16 Wẽnnaam naana bug-bɛd a yiibu, a yembr yaa bed-kẽenga, yẽ n so beoogo; a yembr sẽn ka ta pipi soabã, yẽ n so yʋngo. B naana ãds me." 
Genesis1:17 Wẽnnaam ning-b-la yĩngr tɩ b vẽneg dũniyã," 
Genesis1:18 tɩ b soog beoog la yʋngo, vẽenem la lika la Wẽnnaam yãeeme tɩ rẽ yaa sõmbo." 
Genesis1:19 Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: daar a naas soaba. 
Genesis1:20 Wẽnnaam yeelame tɩ kooma pid ne bõn-vɩɩli sẽn dugd la sẽn nugd a pʋgẽ. Tẽnga me pid ne luiili sẽn yɩgd sa-gãonga tẽngre. La yɩɩ boto. 
Genesis1:21 Wẽnnaam naana mogr pʋgẽ dũm-bɛda ne bõn-vɩɩli sẽn dugd la sẽn nugd koomẽ, ned kam fãa ne-a buudu, n le paas bõn-yɩgdi, ned kam ne-a buudu. La Wẽnnaam yãeeme tɩ yaa sõmbo." 
Genesis1:22 B ning-b-la bark woto: Bɩ y rog la y wek n pid mogra koom zãnga, bɩ luiili wã me wek n pid tẽnga." 
Genesis1:23 Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: daar a nu soaba. 
Genesis1:24 Wẽnnaam le yeelame tɩ tẽnga rog bõn-vɩɩli, ned kam fãa ne a buudu: dũm-bɛda, dũm-bõonego, weoog rũmsi, ned kam fãa ne a buudu. La yɩɩ boto." 
Genesis1:25 Wẽnnaam naana rũmsi, ned kam fãa ne a buudu: rũm-bɛda, rũm-bõonego, ned kam fãa ne a buudu, rũm-kɩdse sẽn be tomẽ, ned kam fãa ne-a buudu. La b yãeeme tɩ rẽ yaa sõmbo." 
Genesis1:26 Wẽnnaam yeelame: D naan ninsaala n mamsa wa tõndo, wa tõnd wẽnego, t'a soog mogra zĩma, yĩngr luiili, yir dũmsi, weoog rũmsi la bõn-vuudr fãa." 
Genesis1:27 Wẽnnaam naana ninsaala n mams b menga, b mams-a-la b meng wẽnego; yɩɩ pag la raoa la b naan yã." 
Genesis1:28 Wẽnnaam ning-b-la barka, n yeel-ba: Rog-y la y wek n pid dũniya la y soog-a. Soog-y mogr zĩma, yĩngr luiili la bõn-vuudr fãa." 
Genesis1:29 Wẽnnaam yeelame: M kõt-y-la mooda buud toɛ-toɛ sẽn yit tẽng zugu, n paas tɩɩs sẽn womd biisi la sẽn tar bula." 
Genesis1:30 Sã n ya we-rũmsã, luiili sẽn yɩgd yĩngri, bõn-vuudr fãa sẽn vɩ tẽng zugu, mo-maasa la m kõt bãmba t'a yɩ b rɩɩbo. La sɩd yɩɩ boto." 
Genesis1:31 Naaba-Wẽnd gesa b sẽn naana fãa: fãa ra yaa sõmbo. Zĩig sobgame n le yẽege: daar a yoob soaba. 
Genesis2:1 Yɩɩ woto la yĩngr la tẽnga ne b teed fãa naan yã. 
Genesis2:2 Daar a yopoe soaba, Wẽnd tʋʋmna yãenda a tɛka tɩ B na n vʋʋse tɩ b sɛ-la b tʋʋmde." 
Genesis2:3 B ninga daar a yopoe soaba barka n welg-a toore, tɩ yɩɩ baraare la b vʋʋs ne b naanega tʋʋmde." 
Genesis2:4 Ad-y Sɩngrẽ wã, yɩɩ woto la yĩngr la tẽng naan yã. Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn naan yĩngr la tẽng raarã," 
Genesis2:5 dẽ tɩ tɩɩg la moog ra nan pa yi pʋʋgẽ ye; b ra nan ka bas tɩ saag ni tẽng zug ye, ninsaal me rag n nan ka be sẽn na n yɩ tẽnga koaad ye." 
Genesis2:6 La ade, ko-nifu n da pusgi n zãgsd tẽnga zãnga." 
Genesis2:7 Soaala-Wẽnd wa n yaga ninsaala ne tẽng yagdo. Vɩɩm pemsem la b fʋʋs a yõe bogdẽ t'a tũ rẽ n paam vɩɩm. 
Genesis2:8 Soaala-Wẽnd sela zẽedo Eden, yaang sẽnẽ, be la b kẽes ninsaala, b sẽn naan-a n sɛ." 
Genesis2:9 B Kɩtame tɩ tɩɩs buud fãa yi zĩ kanga, tɩɩs sẽn be neere, n sakd gesgo tɩ b biis me rɩɩb noom noorẽ. B gesa zẽeda tẽnsʋka n sel vɩɩm tɩɩga. N paas neer la wẽng bãngr tɩɩga." 
Genesis2:10 Kʋɩlg n dag n yit Eden n zãgsd zẽedã. Kʋɩlga welga nao a naase. 
Genesis2:11 Pipi naoora boondame tɩ Pizõ, yẽ n gũbg Avila, sãnem tẽnga." 
Genesis2:12 Tẽn-kãng sãnema ka naag ne rẽok buug ye; beelẽ tɩɩsa yoosda sũm sẽn tar yũ-noogo; beelẽ kuga me saasa b toore, n pɩnda, n maneg n gʋl-gʋle, miid la kẽese." 
Genesis2:13 Kʋɩlga naoor a ye me boondame tɩ Giõ, yẽ n karg Kus tẽnga gilli." 
Genesis2:14 Kʋɩlga naoor a to boondame tɩ Tɩgr, a zoeta Asʋr yaanga. Naoor a naas soaba yaa Efrat." 
Genesis2:15 Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ zĩndga ninsaal Eden zẽeda tẽnsʋka t'a yɩ zẽeda koaad la a gũuda. 
Genesis2:16 B kõ-a-la no-kãnga: «Tɩɩsa fãa sẽn be zẽeda pʋga, fo tõe n dɩ-la b biisi." 
Genesis2:17 Sã n ya Neer la Wẽng bãngr tɩɩgã, da rɩ a biis ye tɩ fo sẽn na n dɩ a biig raare, sɩd ne sɩda, f na ki.»" 
Genesis2:18 Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Ka segd tɩ ninsaal zĩ a yembr ye, dẽnd m kõ-a sõangd sẽn wẽnd-a.»" 
Genesis2:19 Soaala-Wẽnd le rɩka yagdo n yag we-rũmsã la luiili wã fãa, n tigim-b ninsaal taoore, n na n ges yaa yʋ-bʋg la a na n pʋd-ba. Ad-y yaa rũms vɩɩsa fãa la ninsaal bao yʋʋr n pʋde." 
Genesis2:20 Ninsaal pʋda rũmsa fãa b yʋʋre, n pʋd luiili wã fãa, n pʋd we-rũmsã; ninsaal yaool n pa yãend sẽn wẽnd yẽ sõangd ye." 
Genesis2:21 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ gõeem sẽn ya gõeem yõk ninsaala. B yãka a sĩif a ye n lebs nemdã n bɛ. 
Genesis2:22 B rɩka sĩifã b sẽn yãkã n naan paga n kõ raoã. 
Genesis2:23 Raoã sẽn yãend pagã, a yeelame: «Marsa sẽ, m paama kõbre sẽn yi m kõabẽ la m yĩng neongẽ. Raoã bool-a lame t'a bogre t'a lʋgrẽ la b bok n yii-sa.»" 
Genesis2:24 Rẽ n so tɩ rao basda a ba ne a ma n zĩ ne a paga n lebgd yĩng a yembre. 
Genesis2:25 B yiib fãa ra yaa b zaala, paga ne raoã, la yãnd da ka tar-b ye." 
Genesis3:1 Rũmsa sẽn yi Soaala-Wẽnd nugẽ sʋka, Waaf n da yɩɩd ne sɩlem. Yẽ n yeel pagã: «Sɩd bɩ, Wẽnd n yeel yãmba tɩ tɩɩsa sẽn be zẽeda pʋga, bɩ y da saag-y n dɩ tɩɩg ba a ye biisi?»" 
Genesis3:2 Tɩ paga leoke: «D tõe n dɩɩ zẽeda tɩɩs biisi. 
Genesis3:3 Yaa tɩɩg ninga sẽn bɛ-a zẽeda tẽnsʋk poorẽ la b yeel tɩ d da saag n dɩ tɩ-kãng biig ye, tɩ d da sak n sɩɩs-a ye, ka rẽ d na ki.»" 
Genesis3:4 Waafa leoka pagã: «Pa sɩd ye, kũum kõn ki ye!" 
Genesis3:5 Ad-y Wẽnnaam miime bala tɩ y sẽn na n dɩ-a raare, y nin na n pukame tɩ y lebg wa wẽn-bi, n mi neer la wẽnga.»" 
Genesis3:6 Paga mikame tɩ tɩɩga biig wẽnda a na yɩ noogo, t'a bee neere, n sakd gesgo, t'a wata ne rɩ n paam bãngre. Dẽ la a fãsg n dɩ la a fãsg n kõ a sɩd sẽn da yɛs ne-a, tɩ yẽ me rɩ." 
Genesis3:7 La b yiiba fãa nin pukame tɩ b bãng tɩ b yaa b zaala n bao kankang vãad n zap-zap n sẽgne. 
Genesis3:8 A Adem ne a paga wʋma Soaala-Wẽnd kẽnda rãamde, zẽeda pʋga. B ra kokda zaabr pemsem. A Adem ne a paga zoe n soonda tɩɩsa sʋka tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd nif ra yãend-b ye." 
Genesis3:9 Soaala-Wẽnd boola a Adem: «F bɛɛ?» 
Genesis3:10 T'a yeel: «M wʋma y rãamd zẽeda pʋga, tɩ rabeem yõk-ma, tɩ m zoe n soond, tɩ m yaa m zaala.»" 
Genesis3:11 Dẽ la b leok-a: «Ãnda n togs foom tɩ f yaa f zaala? Woto fo rɩɩ tɩɩg ning mam sẽn da rig foom a rɩɩbã!» 
Genesis3:12 Raoã yeelame: «Ad-y yaa pag ning y sẽn kõ maamã n fãsg tɩɩga biig tɩ m deeg n dɩ!» 
Genesis3:13 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeel pagã: «Bõe la f maan woto?» T'a yeele: «Yaa waaf n belg-m tɩ m dɩ.» 
Genesis3:14 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela waafã: «Ad-f sẽn maan woto wã, m yãkda f bark we-rũms la yir-dũms sʋka. Fo na n yẽra ne f pʋga la f mog tom n ta f yõor tɛka." 
Genesis3:15 M na n ninga beem, foo ne paga sʋka, f kamb la paga kamb sʋka. Fo na n dũma paga nao-kãsenkãare la a na bedsa f zugu.»" 
Genesis3:16 B lɛɛg n yeela pagã: «Fo sã n wa tʋtẽ, f naong na n yɩɩ wʋsg-wʋsgo, yaa toog pʋgẽ la f na n dog f kamba, f na n tʋlga f sɩda ne tʋlsem kãsenga la yẽ n na n dɩ naam la a soog fo.»" 
Genesis3:17 B yeela raoã: «Fo sẽn kelg f paga koɛɛg n dɩ tɩɩg ning mam sẽn da yet tɩ f ra rɩ wã, bɩ tẽnga da zĩnd bark f yĩng ye. F vɩɩma pʋgẽ, dɩll f yãe toogo n paam n dɩ." 
Genesis3:18 Tẽnga na n woma gõos la yõens-tabdo f yĩnga la pʋt-mood n na n yɩ f rɩɩbo. 
Genesis3:19 F na n kaaga f rĩir tʋʋlgo n paam n dɩ la na n yɩɩ woto n tãag daar ning f sẽn na n leb tẽng tomẽ tɩ f yii tomẽ. Fo yaa tãndo n na n leb tãndẽ.» 
Genesis3:20 A Adem boola a paga tɩ Awa, yẽ la ninsaal fãa sẽn na n vɩɩnd tẽng zug ma. Boaalẽ wã Awa ne nin-vɩɩg yekda taaba." 
Genesis3:21 Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka gãndo n maan futu n yeelg a Adem ne a pagã," 
Genesis3:22 n yaool n yeel: «Marsã ninsaal lebga wa tõnd nin-yend n mi neer la wẽnga; d da bas-a t'a tẽeg a nug n fãsg vɩɩm tɩɩga biiga n dɩ, n wa ka bãng kũum ye!»" 
Genesis3:23 B riga a Adem n yiis Eden zẽedẽ la a sẽn yi tẽnga tomẽ, a lebga tẽnga koaada." 
Genesis3:24 B sẽn yiis a Adem, b yalsa gũudba zẽeda yaang noorẽ. Yaa malɛgs, la b zãada sʋʋs sẽn yãgd bugum, n gũud vɩɩm tɩɩga tɩ ned da ta-a ye." 
Genesis4:1 A Adem bãnga a paga, a Awa, t'a Awa rɩk pʋga, n dog biiga, t'a yet tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd maasem yĩnga, a paam n doga ninsaala, n pʋd a yʋʋr a Kayẽ." 
Genesis4:2 A roga a Kayẽ yẽer, a Abɛl. A Abɛl da kɩɩmda rũm-bõonese. A Kayẽ da koodame." 
Genesis4:3 Sẽn wa n beẽ, a Kayẽ yãka a kood n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd." 
Genesis4:4 La a Abɛl me baoo rũmsa kom-dẽems n kõ Soaalã. A naaga rũmsa kaam n kõ-ba. A Abɛl ne a kũuna n ta bãmb yam. 
Genesis4:5 A Kayẽ ne a kũuna pa ta b yam ye. A Kayẽ sũur puuga wʋsgo, t'a neng gãnem." 
Genesis4:6 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd sok a Kayẽ: «Bõe tɩ f sũur puug tɩ f neng gãneme? 
Genesis4:7 Tuubg sã n kẽ f sũurẽ, f neng kõn doog sɩda? La tuubg sã n ka f sũurẽ, ka wẽng n yɛs f rignoorẽ wa bõn-ninda n gũud foo, tɩ na n lebg pakr ne foo tɩ f wɩsg f meng n tõog-a bɩ?»" 
Genesis4:8 A Kayẽ baas n yeela a yao, a Abɛl: «Wa tɩ d yi kɛɛnga.» B sẽn paam n zãage, a Kayẽ wudg n kẽe a Abɛl n kʋ-a." 
Genesis4:9 Soaala-Wẽnd soka a Kayẽ: «F yao, a Abɛl, bɛɛ?» T'a na n leoke: «M mi-la, m ya-la m yao wã gũud la?»" 
Genesis4:10 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeele: «Yaa bõe la f maan yã? M wʋmda f yao wã zɩɩma koɛɛga; koɛɛga kelemd-m-la tẽngẽ tɩ sãt yɩnga. 
Genesis4:11 Woto wã m yãkda f barka la m yiisd-f-la tẽng ning sẽn sakd koodã, t'a yaaga a noor n yũ f yao wã zɩɩma f meng nug sẽn daage." 
Genesis4:12 F ko tẽnga me, a kõn wom f yĩng ye; fo na n saadame n gõod n pɩkd moogo.»" 
Genesis4:13 T'a Kayẽ na n leoke: «M sɩbgra zɩsame n yɩɩd m pãnga. 
Genesis4:14 Ade! Y sã n dig-m rũnna n zãag ne tẽn-kãnga, d neng kõn le tees taab ye. M na n lebga sãan n saad n pɩkd moogo la sẽn sega maam fãa na n kʋ-m lame!»" 
Genesis4:15 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a: «Bãng tɩ sẽn na n kʋ a Kayẽ, na n deega sɩbgr naoor a yopoe.» La Soaala-Wẽnd maka a Kayẽ ne makre sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ sẽn na n seg-a fãa da lebg a kʋʋd ye." 
Genesis4:16 A Kayẽ yii Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, n sɩng n gilgd yaare, Eden yaanga, Nod tẽnga." 
Genesis4:17 Sẽn waa n beẽ, a Kayẽ bãnga a paga t'a rɩk pʋg n dog a Enok. A Kayẽ lebga tẽn-meta la a sẽn me tẽng ningã, a pʋd-a-la Enok, wala a biigã." 
Genesis4:18 A Enok doga a Irad, t'a Irad dog a Mewuyaɛl, t'a Mewuyaɛl dog a Lemɛk." 
Genesis4:19 A Lemɛk pagb yɩ-la b yiibu: pipi paga la Ada, a yiib soab la Sila." 
Genesis4:20 A Ada biig la a Yabal, yẽ la sẽn be-b wetẽ n kɩɩmd dũmsa yaaba." 
Genesis4:21 A yao la a Yubal; yẽ la sẽn wẽed-b pɛndga la sẽn peebd-b mɛɛnem yaaba. 
Genesis4:22 A Sila me biig la a Tubal-Kayẽ; a Tubal-Kayẽ la sẽeb sẽn tʋmd-b kut bɩ yõgs sẽn tʋmd-b zũud yaaba. A Tubal-Kayẽ tão yɩ-la a Naama. 
Genesis4:23 A Lemɛk yeela a pagb a yiibã: «Kelg-y m koɛɛga, Ada la Sila, Lemɛk pagba, kelg-y m koɛɛga: m sẽn paam sãmpogr ned a ye nengẽ, m kʋ-a lame la bi-bilfr sẽn kãdg-ma, m yãka a yõore." 
Genesis4:24 Bãng-y t'a Kayẽ kʋʋd sã n sɩbgd naoor a yopoe, a Lemɛk kʋʋd yaa pisopoe la a yopoe.»" 
Genesis4:25 A Adem sẽn bãng a paga, a doga biig a to n pʋd a yʋʋr a Sɛt t'a goma ne a meng woto: «Wẽnd kõ-m-la biiga n ledg a Abɛl.» A Abɛl la rao ning a Kayẽ sẽn dag n kʋ wã." 
Genesis4:26 A Sɛt me waa n doga biiga n pʋd-a t'a Enos. Wakat kãng la b sɩng n na n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Genesis5:1 A Adem dooga neb la woto: Wẽnd sẽn naan ninsaal daare, b kõ-a-la bãmb meng wẽnego." 
Genesis5:2 B naana raoa, n naan paga; b ning-b-la barka, n bool-ba, b naanega raare, tɩ ninsaalba." 
Genesis5:3 A Adem yʋʋm sẽn waa n pid koabg la pis-tã, a roga biig sẽn wẽnd a menga, sẽn tar a wẽnego la a pʋda a yʋʋr t'a Sɛt." 
Genesis5:4 A Sɛt dogem poore, a Adem le vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-nii la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:5 A Adem pʋlemd zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-wɛ la pis-tã, t'a yaool n ki." 
Genesis5:6 A Sɛt yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta koabg la a nu, a roga a Enos." 
Genesis5:7 A Enos dogem poore, a Sɛt paama yʋʋm kobs-nii la a yopoe, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:8 A Sɛt sẽn waa n na n ki t'a yʋʋm yaa kobs-wɛ la piig la a yiibu. 
Genesis5:9 A Enos yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-wɛ, a doga a Kena." 
Genesis5:10 A Kena dogem poore, a Enos paama yʋʋm kobs-nii la piig la a nu la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:11 A sẽn waa n na n ki t'a yʋʋm yaa kobs-wɛ la a nu. 
Genesis5:12 A Kena yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pisopoe, a doga a Maalaleyɛl." 
Genesis5:13 A Maalaleyɛl dogem poore, a paama yʋʋm kobs-nii la pis-naase, t'a na n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:14 A sẽn waa n na n ki t'a yʋʋm yaa kobs-wɛ la piiga. 
Genesis5:15 A Maalaleyɛl yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pisoob la a nu, a doga a Yerɛd." 
Genesis5:16 A Yerɛd dogem poore, a Maalaleyɛl paama yʋʋm kobs-nii la pis-tã la a doga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:17 A yʋʋma fãa zãng yɩɩ kobs-nii la pis-wɛ la a nu t'a yaool n ki. 
Genesis5:18 A Yerɛd yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta koabg la pisoob la a yiibu, a roga a Enok." 
Genesis5:19 A Enok dogem poore, a Yerɛd paama yʋʋm kobs-nii la a doga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:20 A yʋʋma zãng fãa yɩɩ kobs-wɛ la pisoob la a yiibu t'a yaool n ki. 
Genesis5:21 A Enok yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pisoob la a nu, a doga a Metusela." 
Genesis5:22 A Enok yɩɩ wẽn-tũuda. A Metusela dogem poore, a paama yʋʋm kobs-tã la a doga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:23 A Enok yʋʋm fãa yɩɩ kobs-tã la pisoob la a nu. 
Genesis5:24 A tũu sor ning Wẽnd sẽn date la a waa menema dũniya la yɩɩ Wẽnd n loog ne-a. 
Genesis5:25 A Metusela yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta koabg la pis-nii la a yopoe, a doga a Lemɛk." 
Genesis5:26 A Lemɛk rogem poore, a Metusela paama yʋʋm kobs-yopoe la pis-nii la a yiibu la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:27 A Metusela yʋʋma fãa zãng yɩɩ kobs-wɛ la pisoob la a wɛ t'a yaool n ki. 
Genesis5:28 A Lemɛk yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta koabg la pis-nii la a yiibu, a doga biiga." 
Genesis5:29 A pʋda a yʋʋr tɩ Nowe n yet a sũuri: «Bi-kãnga n na n yols-do, d naong la d tʋʋm tood pʋgẽ, tẽng sẽn ka le be bark pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis5:30 A Nowe dogem poore, a Lemɛk paama yʋʋm kobs-nu la pis-wɛ la a nu la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis5:31 A Lemɛk yʋʋma zãng yɩɩ kobs-yopoe la pisopoe la a yopoe t'a yaool n ki. 
Genesis5:32 A Nowe yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta kobs-nu, a doga a Sɛm, a Kam la a Zafɛt." 
Genesis6:1 Ninsaalb buud waa n sɩnga paasg tẽng zugu; b waa n doga wʋsgo: kom-dibli wʋsgo, kom-pugli me wʋsgo." 
Genesis6:2 Na-komsã, pãn-dãmba, waa n yãeeme tɩ nin-zaalsa kom-pugli yaa neeba tɩ b na n bao b sẽn nong b rãmbã n maan b pagba." 
Genesis6:3 Soaala-Wẽnd waa n yeelame: «M pa tẽed tɩ yaa daar fãa la m na n bas ninsaal t'a kell n vɩɩnd moog ye. Ninsaal sẽn ya neong yĩnga, a yaa bõn-kiidga. Dũnna tɛka a pʋlemd kõn yɩɩg yʋʋm koabg la pisi ye.»" 
Genesis6:4 Bãng-y tɩ sasa kãng tɩ nin-wobd n da be tẽngã. Bãmb n da pid tẽngã; pãn-dãmba sẽn waa n kẽed ne nin-zaalsa kom-pugli wã la b rog bãmba. Bãmb la tẽn-kʋdem-wẽnnẽ gãndaado; b yʋʋr da yii wʋsgo. 
Genesis6:5 Soaala-Wẽnd yãeeme tɩ tẽng zugu, ninsaalb wẽnema tara paasg tɩ b sũura pʋgd wẽng bala, wakat buud fãa." 
Genesis6:6 Dẽ me la Soaala-Wẽnd zab ne b menga, b sẽn naan ninsaal n ning-a tẽng zug yĩnga; b sũur sãama wʋsgo," 
Genesis6:7 tɩ b yeele: M na n menesa ninsaal m sẽn naana tẽng zugu ka, la m na n naaga yẽ ne rũm-bɛda, rũm-bõonesã la yĩngr luiili n menese; m sũur ka le noom m sẽn naan-ba ye." 
Genesis6:8 Sã n ya a Nowe, yẽ paamame tɩ b yals ne b nimbãan-zoeerã tɩ b ka na n maan-a bũmb ye." 
Genesis6:9 A Nowe buuda kibar la woto: A Nowe yɩɩ nin-sõngo la nin-tɩrga, a taaba fãa sʋka, a zamaana rãmb fãa sʋka, la a ra pʋgda Wẽnd, wala b sẽn date." 
Genesis6:10 A kamb yɩ-la a tãabo: a Sɛm, a Kam la a Zafɛt." 
Genesis6:11 A Nowe wakatẽ, Wẽnd mikame tɩ tẽnga sãamame, tɩ zamaana lebg pãn-tõog zamaana." 
Genesis6:12 Wẽnd gesame la b yãeeme tɩ tẽnga sãamame, ned ba a ye ra ka le tũud so-sõng tẽng zug ye." 
Genesis6:13 Woto la Wẽnd yeel a Nowe: «M yalsa dũni wãab m yamẽ tɩ ninsaal pids-a-la ne wẽnem la pãn-tõogo; m na n naaga ninsaal ne tẽngã n wã zãnga.» 
Genesis6:14 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Nowe: «Bao ra-pegd sẽn tõe n gõd n maan koglg. Kẽ a pʋgẽ n maan do-bõonego, n gãneg sũud b pʋgẽ la yɩnga." 
Genesis6:15 Ad koglga sẽn na n maan to-to: woglma na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs kobs-tã, yalma kãntɩɩs pis-nu, zãndlma kãntɩɩs pis-tã." 
Genesis6:16 B le yeela a Nowe: Ka yĩngrã n mumdgi, la f ning kʋɩleng kɩreng a ye; rota rogenda taab naoor a tã." 
Genesis6:17 Ko-kẽeng la m na n sik tẽnga zugu, n sãam bõn-vɩɩl fãa; tẽng zug bõn-yooda fãa tog n kiime." 
Genesis6:18 M na n yõga zood ne foom. Kẽ koglga pʋga, foo ne f paga la f kamb ne b pagba." 
Genesis6:19 Bõn-vɩɩl la bũmb fãa sẽn ya neongo, rũmsa fãa sʋka tũus-ba, a yiib-yiibu, raoog la yãanga, n kẽes-b koglga pʋga, tɩ b naag foom n põse." 
Genesis6:20 Luiil buud fãa, rũng buud fãa, tẽnga rũm-kɩdsa buud fãa, raoog la yãang la f na n yãke tɩ b naag foom n paam n põse." 
Genesis6:21 Ning pãng n paam dɩɩb n bĩng foom ne bãmb yĩnga.» 
Genesis6:22 A Nowe sɩd maana Wẽnd sẽn yeel-a wã fãa. 
Genesis7:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Nowe: «Kẽ koglga pʋga, foo ne f zaka fãa tɩ m yãeeme tɩ foo bal la nin-tɩrga zamaana pʋga." 
Genesis7:2 Yãk rũms sõma buud fãa a yopoepoe, raad la yãanse. Sã n ya rũms niyns sẽn pa sõmb m nifẽ, yãk bãmb b yiib bal, buud fãa pʋgẽ, raoog la yãanga." 
Genesis7:3 Yĩngr luiili wã na n yɩɩ a yopoepoe, buud fãa pʋgẽ, raad la yãanse, tɩ b buud da wa menem moog ye." 
Genesis7:4 Keta rasem a yopoe tɩ m tak saag sẽn na n ni rasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo, la woto m na menes moogo m sẽn naana fãa.»" 
Genesis7:5 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel a Nowe t'a maan bũmb ninga fãa, a maan-a lame." 
Genesis7:6 Sa kẽengã la ko-kẽengã sẽn na n wa moog raare, dẽ t'a Nowe tara yʋʋm kobs-yoobe." 
Genesis7:7 A Nowe kẽe koglga pʋga ne a kamba, a paga ne a bi-pagba n paam n põs ko-kẽengã." 
Genesis7:8 Rũmsa fãa, sẽn ya-b sõmbo wala sẽn ka-b sõmbo, bõn-yɩgdi la bõn-vuudi," 
Genesis7:9 kẽe koglga pʋga, a yiib yiibu, raoog la yãang, wala b sẽn wilg a Nowe." 
Genesis7:10 Dasem a yopoe sẽn pidi, ko-kẽenga reega tẽngã." 
Genesis7:11 A Nowe dogem yʋʋm kobs-yoobe, kiuug a yiib soaba, kiuuga piig la a yopoe daare, yĩngr mogra ko-nina yoosa zãnga," 
Genesis7:12 tɩ sa-koom na n kiig tẽng dasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo." 
Genesis7:13 Badaare, a Nowe kẽe koglga pʋga ne a Sɛm la a Kam la a Zafɛt; a kẽe ne a paga la a kamba pagb a tã," 
Genesis7:14 ne rũmsa buud fãa, bɛd la bõonego sẽn vɩ tẽng zugu, ne luiili wã fãa, bɛd la bõonego, sẽn tar b pɩgs buud fãa." 
Genesis7:15 Sẽn naag-ba a Nowe n kẽ koglgã yɩɩ bũmb fãa sẽn ya neongo, n vʋʋsd ne yõore la b kẽ-la b yiibu yiibu," 
Genesis7:16 raoog la yãang, wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg b toore. A Nowe sẽn kẽ koglgã, Soaala-Wẽnd lɛɛg n pag-a-la pʋgẽ." 
Genesis7:17 Dasem pis-naas pʋgẽ, ko-kẽenga sɩnga tẽnga saagre; kooma wa n lebga wʋsgo la a zẽka koglgã n dʋʋs yĩngri." 
Genesis7:18 Kooma paasa wʋsgo, n wa reeg tẽnga zãnga tɩ koglga na n sɩng n kẽnd a zugu." 
Genesis7:19 Kooma tara rʋʋbo al n wa lim mooga tãms fãa. 
Genesis7:20 Kooma sẽn lim tãmsã n zʋʋg-ba, taa kãntɩɩs piig la a nu." 
Genesis7:21 Wakat kãnga bũmb ning fãa sẽn da vɩ tẽng zug kiime: luiili, yir-dũmsi, we-rũmsi, bõn-nagse la ninsaalb fãa." 
Genesis7:22 Sẽn vɩ-a ne yõor fãa, saaga tẽngr, tẽng zug, fãa kiime." 
Genesis7:23 Soaala-Wẽnd sãama sẽn da be tẽng zug zãng fãa, sẽn yɩ ninsaala n tat rũnga, bõn-vuudri, luiila, fãa kiime; sẽn põs bala yɩ-la a Nowe la sẽn da naag-b yẽnda koglga pʋga." 
Genesis7:24 Kooma paa tẽnga zugu dasem koabg la pis-nu. 
Genesis8:1 Wẽnd wa n tẽega a Nowe yelle, yẽ ne rũmsa sẽn da naag koglga pʋga, bɛd la bõonego. B kɩtame tɩ sob-raoog kaoog n fẽbg kooma tẽnga zugu." 
Genesis8:2 Yĩngr ko-nina pagame la sa-koom ka le rʋʋg ye. 
Genesis8:3 Woto, bilf-bilfu, kooma sɩnga fẽbgre; Dasem sẽn waa n ta koabg la pis-nu t'a yõbgame," 
Genesis8:4 la kiuug a yopoe soaba, kiuuga piig la a yopoe raare, koglga yalsa Ararat tãnga zugu." 
Genesis8:5 Kooma kell n talla sigbu n ta kiuug piig soaba la kiuug piiga sẽn ta, tãmsa zut sɩnga pukri." 
Genesis8:6 A Nowe basame tɩ dasem pis-naas le looge t'a lak koglga võore," 
Genesis8:7 n basd gãoobg t'a yit la a watẽ n tãag tẽnga sẽn waa n kʋɩ zãnga. 
Genesis8:8 Dẽ poore yaa wall la a Nowe yiis yã n na n bãng kooma sã n wooga tẽng zugu. 
Genesis8:9 Walla sẽn mik tɩ tẽnga ket n dɩga ne koom tɩ zĩ-koɛɛng ka n zaoondedẽ, a lɛɛg n waame. A Nowe tuda a nug n yõk-a n kẽes pʋgẽ." 
Genesis8:10 A Nowe basame tɩ rasem a yopoe loog t'a le yiis wallã. 
Genesis8:11 Zĩig sẽn maage, walla lɛɛg n waame la oliviye tɩɩg vã-maasr la a ra zãad a noorẽ la woto a Nowe bãngame tɩ kooma fẽbgame." 
Genesis8:12 A le gũu rasem a yopoe n yaool n le yiis wallã t'a yi n ka lɛɛg n wa lɛ-lɛ. 
Genesis8:13 Dɩlla a Nowe, yʋʋma sẽn pid kobs-yoobe la a ye raare la kooma fõog zãng tẽng zugu. A sẽn lak sugrã, a Nowe yãeeme tɩ tẽnga fãa kʋɩɩme." 
Genesis8:14 Yɩɩ kiuug a yiib soaba pisi la a yopoe raare la tẽnga kʋɩ zãnga. 
Genesis8:15 Wẽnd goma ne a Nowe woto: 
Genesis8:16 «Yi koglga pʋga, foo ne f paga, f kamb ne b pagba." 
Genesis8:17 Yiis rũmsa fãa sẽn be ne foo, sẽn ya neong buud fãa, luiili, we-rũmsi, bõn-vuudi. B reeg tẽng n yãmb, b piuugi, b wek n pid moogo.»" 
Genesis8:18 A Nowe yii ne a kamba, a paga la a bi-pagba." 
Genesis8:19 Bãmb poore yɩɩ we-rũmsi, yir-dũmsi, luiili, bõn-vuudi, tẽnga bõn-vɩɩli wã fãa. B yii bal-balle." 
Genesis8:20 A Nowe maana maan-kugri la maan-kugra zugu a yõka rũng buud fãa sẽn ya sõngo, luiil buud fãa sẽn ya sõngo, n kʋ maoongo. Yɩɩ rũng a ye, buud fãa pʋgẽ." 
Genesis8:21 Soaala-Wẽnd koka maanda yũ-noogo n sigs b sũuri la b yeela b sũurẽ: «M kõn le saag n yãk tẽnga bark ninsaal yĩng ye tɩ ninsaal yam la a sũur togla wẽng t'a nan paooda. M kõn le saag n sɩbg bõn-vɩɩli wã wa m sẽn sɩbg-ba ye. 
Genesis8:22 Tẽnga sã n ket a zĩigẽ, bũmb ba a ye wakat kõn ta tɩ b pa yãend-a ye: bʋdbo bɩ tigsgu, waood bɩ tʋʋlgo, sẽoog bɩ sɩpalgo, wĩndg bɩ yʋngo.»" 
Genesis9:1 Wẽnd ninga a Nowe ne a kamba barka n yeel-ba: «Dog-y la y wek n pid tẽnga. 
Genesis9:2 Bɩ rũmsa buud fãa rig rabeem y taoore: yĩngr luiili la tẽng bõn-yood fãa, mogr zĩm fãa. M dɩka b fãa n sagl y nugẽ." 
Genesis9:3 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn vɩ la a kẽnd tẽng zugu na n lebga yãmb dɩɩbo; m kõt-b-la yãmb wala m sẽn kõ-y vã-maasã. 
Genesis9:4 Y sẽn pa tõe n dɩ bala yaa nemd sẽn ket ne zɩɩm, ne vɩɩm." 
Genesis9:5 Ninsaal zɩɩm pa raagde tɩ m pa sok ye. M na sok rũnga, m na sok ninsaal fãa sẽn daag zɩɩm. Ninsaal yõor sã n yãke, m na soke." 
Genesis9:6 Ned ninga fãa sẽn daaga ninsaal zɩɩm bɩ b raag yẽ me zɩɩm. Ninsaal yaa naande sẽn tar Wẽnnaam wẽnego. 
Genesis9:7 Dog-y la y wek n pid tẽnga. Lebg-y wʋsgo n pid-a n saage.» 
Genesis9:8 Dẽ poore Wẽnnaam goma ne a Nowe la a kamba woto: 
Genesis9:9 «M yõgda zood ne yãmb la y yagens sẽn na n dog y poorẽ," 
Genesis9:10 ne bõn-vɩɩli wã fãa sẽn be-b ne yãmba: luiili, rũmsi, we-rũmsi, sẽn naag b yãmb n yi koglga pʋg fãa, tẽnga rũms fãa." 
Genesis9:11 M yõgda zood ne yãmba. Sa-kẽeng kõn le ni n kʋ bõn-vɩɩl ba a ye, sa-kẽeng kõn le ni n wã dũni zãng ye.»" 
Genesis9:12 Wẽnnaam le paasame: «Ad makr sẽn ka na n tol n le viig, makr tɩ zood n be sʋka, maam ne yãmb la bõn-vɩɩli wã fãa sẽn be ne yãmba sʋka;" 
Genesis9:13 m ningda saag-gomtɩʋʋg yĩngri t'a yɩ tõnd zooda makre, maam ne tẽnga zooda makre." 
Genesis9:14 M sã n wa tigim sawatã tɩ b na n ni, saag-gomtɩʋʋg na puki," 
Genesis9:15 la m na tẽeg zoodã m sẽn yõg ne yãmb la bõn-vɩɩl buud fãa, la kooma kõn le yɩ ko-kẽeng n yãk yõor abada." 
Genesis9:16 Saag-gomtɩʋʋga sã n puk yĩngri, m na yãend-a la m na tẽeg zood ning maam a Wẽnd sẽn yõg ne bõn-vɩɩl fãa sẽn be tẽng zugu.»" 
Genesis9:17 Wẽnnaam le yeela a Nowe: «M zood ne sẽn vɩ-a tẽng zug fãa makr la saag-gomtɩʋʋgã.» 
Genesis9:18 A Nowe kamb sẽn naag b yẽnda n yi koglga pʋg yɩ-la a Sɛm, a Kam la Zafɛt. A Kam la a Kanaã ba." 
Genesis9:19 Bãmb b tãabã n yɩ a Nowe kamba la yaa bãmb n wek zulum wekre n pid moogo. 
Genesis9:20 A Nowe n yɩ pipi n sɩng tẽnga koobo. A waa n sela bugsuntungu. 
Genesis9:21 A waa n yũu bugsuntunga rãama n lʋɩ, n gãe a zaal a roogẽ." 
Genesis9:22 Kanaã rãmb yaab a Kam kẽe n mika a ba a zaala t'a yi n wilg a ba-biisã. 
Genesis9:23 A Sɛm ne a Zafɛt rɩka a Nowe fu-yorgã n palg b bãko n tar po-tula n wa lud b ba; b sẽn kẽn po-tulã b pa yãend b ba sẽn yaa a zaal ye. 
Genesis9:24 A Nowe sẽn neke, a bãnga a kamba yao zʋʋga sẽn maane." 
Genesis9:25 A yeelame: «Wẽnd na yãk a Kanaã barka, Wẽnd na kɩt t'a lebg sõgne a kẽema la a yao wã sõgen-kamba sõgne.»" 
Genesis9:26 A le paasame: «Soaala, a Sɛm Wẽnda paam pẽgre! Wẽnd na kɩt t'a Kanaã yɩ a sõgne!" 
Genesis9:27 Wẽnd na kɩt t'a Zafɛt ne a Sɛm zems taaba, Wẽnd na kɩt t'a Kanaã yɩ a Zafɛt yem-daogo!»" 
Genesis9:28 Ko-kẽenga poore, a Nowe vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-tã la pis-nu." 
Genesis9:29 A Nowe yʋʋma zãng yɩɩ kobs-wɛ la pis-nu t'a yaool n ki. 
Genesis10:1 A Nowe kambã: a Sɛm, a Kam, a Zafɛt doga wʋsgo. B weka balbo, ko-kẽenga poore." 
Genesis10:2 A Zafɛt kamba: a Gomɛr, a Magog, a Mɛd, a Yavã, a Tubal, a Mosɛk, a Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 A Gomɛr kamba: a Askenaz, a Rifat, a Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 A Yavã kamba: a Elisa, a Tarsis, Kitim la Rodanim." 
Genesis10:5 Yaa bãmb zamaanẽ la neba sɩng n sẽeg taaba n kẽ mogra noorẽ tẽnse la tẽns sẽn puk mogr sʋka, ned kam fãa ne a weoogo, a goama, a sagse, a tẽn-peelem." 
Genesis10:6 A Kam kamba la woto: a Kus, a Misrayim, a Ypt, a Kanaã." 
Genesis10:7 A Kus kamba: a Seba, a Abila, a Sabta, a Rama, a Sabteka. A Rama kamba: a Seba, a Dedã." 
Genesis10:8 A Kus n dog a Nemrod, yẽ la tẽng zug pipi gãndaoogo." 
Genesis10:9 Da yaa tãoos sẽn yi ne pãng Wẽnnaam nugẽ, la b maana yelbũn a poorẽ: Tãoos ne pãng Wẽnnaam taoore, wala a Nemrod." 
Genesis10:10 A soolma na-tẽns yɩ-la a Babɛl, a Erɛk la Akad la Kalne; fãa yaa Sinear tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Genesis10:11 A Nemrod waa n yii be n dig Asʋr n tɩ me Niniv, tẽng ne so-raad sẽn kõog yalens-yalense, Reobot-Ir, n paas Kela tẽnga," 
Genesis10:12 tẽn-kãseng menga, n le paas Resen, la yẽnda bee Niniv la Kela sʋka." 
Genesis10:13 A Misrayim kamb yaa Lud tẽng rãmba, n paas Anam, Leab, Naftu," 
Genesis10:14 n paas Ezipt nug rɩtg rãmba wala Kaslu, be la Filisti rãmb yita, n pas Krɛt rãmba." 
Genesis10:15 A Kanaã n dog a Sidõ, a pipi biiga. A Ɛt n pʋgda." 
Genesis10:16 A buud yɛsa la Zebuzitse, Amoritse, Zirgazitse," 
Genesis10:17 Ivitse, Arkitse, Sinitse," 
Genesis10:18 Arvaditse, Sɛmaritse la Amatitse. A Kanaã buuda waa n sɩnga sẽegre." 
Genesis10:19 B tẽnga toaag sɩngda Sidõ n digd Gerar, n tat Gaza n teesd Sodom, Gomor, Adma, Seboyim n tat Leza." 
Genesis10:20 A Kam kamb la woto, ne b sagse la b buuda goama ne b tẽnse la b tẽn-peelem." 
Genesis10:21 A Zafɛt kẽem a Sɛm me n dog a Ebɛr yaaba. 
Genesis10:22 A Sɛm kamb yɩ-la a Elam, a Asʋr, a Arpaksad, a Lud, a Aram." 
Genesis10:23 A Aram kamb yɩ-la a Uk, a Ul, a Getɛr la a Mas." 
Genesis10:24 A Arpaksad n dog a Sela t'a Sela dog a Ebɛr. 
Genesis10:25 A Ebɛr kamb yɩ-la a yiibu: pipi soaba a Pelɛg tɩ yɩɩ yẽ wakatẽ la neba sɩng taab welgre; a yao wã yʋʋr la a Yoktã. 
Genesis10:26 A Yoktã kamb la a Almodad, a Selɛf, a Asar-mavɛt, a Yera," 
Genesis10:27 a Adoram, a Uzal, a Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 a Obal, a Abimayɛl, a Seba," 
Genesis10:29 a Ofir, a Avila, a Zobab, bãmb fãa yɩ-la a Yoktã kamba." 
Genesis10:30 B tẽnga ra sɩngda Mesa n digd Sefar, tãng ninga sẽn bɛ-a yaangã." 
Genesis10:31 A Sɛm kamba la woto, ne b sagse la buuda goama, ne b tẽnse la b tẽn-peelem" 
Genesis10:32 Boto me la a Nowe kamb kibare, ned kam fãa ne a doogo la a buud goama, la a tẽn-peelem. Yaa wakat kãnga, ko-kẽenga poore, la ninsaalb sɩng sẽegr tẽng zugu." 
Genesis11:1 Neba fãa da yaa zelem yɛnga tɩ b goama ya goam yɛnga. 
Genesis11:2 La yaang sẽnegã neba gõome n wa yãe tẽn-nabre n tɩ n kẽ, yaa Sinear tẽn-nabre." 
Genesis11:3 B yeela taaba: «Wa-y tɩ d wẽ tãn-koɛɛm n wʋme.» La tãn-koɛɛm n yɩ b kug tɩ tãn-sũud yɩ tãn-fãoodem. 
Genesis11:4 B yeelame: «D me tẽng a ye la d yals gaosg a pʋgẽ. Yaa gaosg sẽn na n lug n tãag saaga. D tʋm n bao yʋʋre la d kell n pa zĩ yɛng la d da sẽeg moog ye.» 
Genesis11:5 Soaala-Wẽnd sigame n ges tẽngã la gaosgã b sẽn me wã. 
Genesis11:6 B yeelame: «Ade, b lagma taab n ya buud a ye tɩ b zelemd me yaa a ye; la nan yaa b tʋʋma sɩngre; d nee tagsg ning sẽn be b sũurẽ, bũmb ka le tõe n yɩ toog ne b ye." 
Genesis11:7 Wa-y tɩ d sig n kalem b goama tɩ b da le wʋm taab ye.» 
Genesis11:8 La Soaala-Wẽnd sẽega ninsaalb zĩis fãa, dũni pʋgẽ la tẽnga ka tõog n me n baas ye." 
Genesis11:9 Yaa rẽ yĩng la b boond tẽn-kãng tɩ Babɛl tɩ yaa zĩ-kãng la Soaala kalem zɛlma la b sẽeg ninsaalba zĩis fãa tẽng zugu. 
Genesis11:10 A Sɛm doog la woto: a Sɛm yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta koabga, a roga a Arpaksad, ko-kẽenga sẽn loog tɩ yʋʋm a yi." 
Genesis11:11 A Arpaksad rogem poore, a Sɛm vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-nu, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:12 A Arpaksad yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-tã la a nu, a roga a Sela." 
Genesis11:13 A Sela rogem poore, a Arpaksad vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-naase la a tãabo, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:14 A Sela yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-tã, a roga a Ebɛr." 
Genesis11:15 A Ebɛr rogem poore, a Sela vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-naase la a tãabo, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:16 A Ebɛr yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-tã la a naase, a roga a Pelɛg." 
Genesis11:17 A Pelɛg dogem poore, a Ebɛr vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-naase la pis-tã, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:18 A Pelɛg yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã, a roga a Rewu." 
Genesis11:19 A Rewu dogem poore, a Pelɛg vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-yi la a wɛ, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:20 A Rewu yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-tã la a yiibu, a roga a Serug." 
Genesis11:21 A Serug rogem poore, a Rewu vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-yi la a yopoe, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:22 A Serug yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-tã, a roga a Nawor." 
Genesis11:23 A Nawor dogem poore, a Serug vɩɩnda yʋʋm kobs-yi, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:24 A Nawor yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pisi la a wɛ, a roga a Tera." 
Genesis11:25 A Tera rogem poore, a Nawor vɩɩnda yʋʋm koabg la piig la a wɛ, n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
Genesis11:26 A Tera yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pisopoe, a roga a Abram, a Nawor la a Arã." 
Genesis11:27 A Tera roog la woto: a Tera n dog a Abram, a Nawor la a Arã; a Arã n dog a Lot." 
Genesis11:28 A Arã ki-la a ba, a Tera, nugẽ, Kalde rãmb tẽng sẽn boond tɩ Ur." 
Genesis11:29 A Abram ne a Nawor paama pagba. A Abram pag yʋʋr la a Sarayi t'a Nawor rẽnd boond tɩ Milka. A Milka ne a Yiska ba la a Arã. 
Genesis11:30 Bãng-y t'a Sarayi da yaa pʋg-kiiri n ka tar biig ye. 
Genesis11:31 A Tera peega a biiga Abram la a yao, a Arã, biig a Lot, n paas a Abram pag a Sarayi n tall-ba n yi Ur, Kalde rãmb tẽnga tɩ b na n dɩk Kanaã tẽng sor. B sẽn ta tẽng a ye b sẽn pʋd tɩ Arã, b ti-la b rot be." 
Genesis11:32 A Tera pʋlemd zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm kobs-yi la a nu t'a yaool n ki Arã tẽnga. 
Genesis12:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Abram: «Bas f tẽnga la f buudu la f zaka, n kẽng tẽng ning m sẽn na n wilg foom." 
Genesis12:2 M na n kɩtame tɩ f buud lebg kãsenga, m na n ning-f-la barka, m na n zẽka f yʋʋre, m na n kɩtame t'a lebg bark yʋʋre." 
Genesis12:3 Sẽn kãabda foom noogo, m na ning a soab barka, sẽn kãabda foom beedo, m na kãab a soab me beedo; dũni ninsaalba fãa na n tũu fo maasem n paam barka.»" 
Genesis12:4 A Abram yiime wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a noore. A Lot tũ-a lame. A Abram sẽn waa n na yi Arã tẽng t'a yʋʋm da zoe n taa pisopoe la a nu. 
Genesis12:5 A Abram peega a pag a Sarayi ne a yao biiga, a Lot; b wʋka b sẽn da tar laog ning fãa Arã tẽnga la b rɩka Kanaã sor ne b yemse la b rakõapa. B waa n taa Kanaã tẽnga." 
Genesis12:6 A Abram sãagame n ta zĩ-sõng ning sẽn boond tɩ Sikɛm; b siga More tɩɩg tẽngre, tɩ-bedr wa kʋka. Wakat kãng tɩ Kanaã rãmb n da kẽed tẽng-kãnga." 
Genesis12:7 Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Abram n yeel-a: «M na n dɩka tẽn-kãngã n kõ foo ne f buudu.» Dẽ la a Abram me maan-kugr zĩ-kãnga, tɩ Soaala lik-a-la be." 
Genesis12:8 A sẽn yi be, a dʋʋ tãng zugu, Betɛl tẽng yaanga; a tilga a roog be n get Betɛl nin-taoore, n get Ayi yaanga; a le mee maan-kugr a to Soaala waoogr yĩnga, b sɛɛg yõkr yĩnga." 
Genesis12:9 A Abram le sɩnga kẽnde. Yaa ta ka, n ka n vʋʋse, n le yik n tar kẽnde, n teesd Negɛb weoogo." 
Genesis12:10 Kom waa n lʋɩɩ tẽngã t'a Abram kong n ta Ezipt; koma sɩd yɩɩ kãsenga. 
Genesis12:11 B sẽn waa n kolg Ezipt tẽnga, a Abram yeela a paga, a Sarayi: «Gese, mam miime tɩ fo yaa pʋg-neere." 
Genesis12:12 Bãng tɩ Ezipt rãmba sã n wa yãe foom ne maam, b na n yeelame: ‹Paga yaa rao kãnga paga.› La b na n kʋʋ maam n paam n soog foom." 
Genesis12:13 Dɩlla m kot-f lame tɩ f yeele: ‹Ya m tão.› Woto b na maan m neere fo yĩnga la fo maasem yĩnga, b na bas-m ne yõore.»" 
Genesis12:14 A Abram sẽn sɩd ta Ezipt tẽnga, Ezipt rãmb yãeeme t'a paga ra sɩd yaa neere al wʋsgo." 
Genesis12:15 Ezipt naaba neba pẽga a Sarayi neerem la b tall-a lame n kẽng na-yiri. 
Genesis12:16 Naaba talla a Abram neere, paga yĩnga la a kõ-a-la piisi, niisi, bõn-daado, bõn-yãanse, yʋgma, yem-daado la yem-pogse." 
Genesis12:17 La a Sarayi yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbga Ezipt dĩma la a zak rãmb ne sɩbgr sẽn yɩ toogo." 
Genesis12:18 Dẽ la dĩma bool a Abram n yeel-a: «Yaa bõe la fo sẽn maana? Bõe yĩng la fo pa togs tɩ paga yaa fo paga? 
Genesis12:19 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo yeel tɩ ya f tão tɩ mam deeg a n na n maan m paga. Deeg f pagã n yik n menem!» 
Genesis12:20 Dĩma bas-a-la a neba nusẽ la b tall-a lame n tɩ bas Ezipt tẽn-toaagẽ, yẽ ne a paga la a sẽn so fãa." 
Genesis13:1 A Abram yii Ezipt tẽng ne a paga, ne a Lot, ne a sẽn tar fãa la b teesa Negɛb." 
Genesis13:2 A ra yaa rakãagre n tar bãga la wuba la wanzurf la sãnem. 
Genesis13:3 A sẽn tar kẽnde, bilf-bilfu, a waa n yii Negɛb n ta Betɛl; n ta a sẽn deng n sig zĩig ninga, Betɛl ne Ayi tẽnsʋka," 
Genesis13:4 n ta a sẽn da me maan-kugrã zĩig ningã. Beene, a yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga." 
Genesis13:5 A Lot da tũuda a Abram. Yẽ me ra tara rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego n paas pɛɛl la gãnd sẽn tar n tiid so-toak roto." 
Genesis13:6 Tẽnga ra pa tar tɩ sek a rɩlg bãmb b yiib ye tɩ b paoong ra yaa wʋsgo. 
Genesis13:7 Woto zabr n waa n yik a Abram ne a Lot rũm-kɩɩmba sʋka. Tẽnga ra yaa Kanaã rãmb la Perizitsa tẽnga. 
Genesis13:8 Dẽ la a Abram yeel a Lot: «Zabr bɩ beem da zĩnd maam ne foom tẽnsʋk ye, a ra zĩnd mam dũm-kɩɩmbã la fo rũm-kɩɩmba sʋk ye, tɩ d yaa saam-biisi." 
Genesis13:9 Tẽnga yɛdgame n dɩg d taoore. Wa tɩ d welg taab, fo sã n digd goabga bɩ mam kẽng dɩtgo, fo sã n digd dɩtgo bɩ mam tees goabga.»" 
Genesis13:10 A Lot zẽka a neng n kaag Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga foolle la a yãeeme t'a gãee ne yamdo. Wakat kãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da nan pa sãam Sodom la Gomor ye. Al n ta Soar, zĩiga ra yaa waa Soaala zẽedo, wa Ezipt tẽnga." 
Genesis13:11 A Lot yãka Zʋrdẽ bãooga foolle, n tees yaanga. Yaa woto la b welg taaba." 
Genesis13:12 A Abram zĩnda Kanaã tẽnga, t'a Lot pa bãg-faasẽ, n tol n tilg a zak Sodom tẽnga." 
Genesis13:13 Sodom neba da yaool n yaa nin-wẽnse, b da beegda Soaala beegr kãsenga." 
Genesis13:14 A Lot sẽn welg ne a Abram bala la Soaala sẽn yeel-a: «Abram, bɩ f zẽk f neng marsã la f yaas f sẽn be zĩig ningã n ges goabg la rɩtgo, yaang la taoore." 
Genesis13:15 Tẽnga fo sẽn ne wã, m na n kõ-a-la foo ne f buudu, tɩ f soog-a wakat buud fãa." 
Genesis13:16 F buuda sõor na n paasa wʋsgo wala tẽng bĩisri. Ned ninga sẽn tõe n sõd tẽnga bĩisri, yẽ bal n wat n tõog n sõd f yagense." 
Genesis13:17 Aya, yik n saag tẽngã, a woglem la a yalem tɩ m dɩk-a lame n kõ foom!»" 
Genesis13:18 A Abram yikame n dɩk a teedo n tɩ ti Mambre googo. Tɩ-bɛd wa kʋgs n da be be. Googa pẽe ne Ebrõ. Beene a vigla maan-kugri Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga. 
Genesis14:1 Sinear dĩm, a Amrafɛl, zamaanẽ, Elasar dĩm, a Ariok, Elam dĩm, a Kedor-Laomɛr, n paas Goyim dĩm, a Tideal," 
Genesis14:2 waa n yika zabre ne Sodom dĩm, a Bera, ne Gomor dĩm, a Birsa ne Adma dĩm, a Sineab, ne Segoyim dĩm, a Semebɛr, n paas Bela tẽng dĩma. Tẽn-kãng boondame yɛs tɩ Soar." 
Genesis14:3 Dĩm bãmb ra tog n sega taaba Sidim, yamsem mogra bãg-faagẽ." 
Genesis14:4 A Kedor-Laomɛr dɩ naam b zug yʋʋm piig la a yiibu. Piig la a tãaba yʋʋmde, b zãensame n yi a soolmẽ." 
Genesis14:5 Dẽ me yĩnga, la piig la a naas yʋʋmde, a Kedor-Laomɛr wa ne dĩm niyns sẽn da ket n deegd a noorã. B naaga taab n tõog Refayitsã Astarot-Karnayim, n tõog Zuzitsa Am tẽnga, n tõog Emitsa Kiriyatayim tẽn-nabrẽ," 
Genesis14:6 n tõog Oritsa b tãmsa zut, al Seyir n ta Ɛl Parã sẽn pẽ ne we-raoogo." 
Genesis14:7 B yii be marsã n lɛɛg n wa Mispat bãka, n lɛɛg n wa Kadɛs. B tõoga Amalesitse la Amoritse sẽn da be Asasõ-Tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Dẽ me la Sodom, Gomor, Adma, Seboyim, la Bela dĩm dãmb yik n sũ tãpo n na tak zabre, Sidim bãg-faagẽ," 
Genesis14:9 ne Elam dĩm, a Kedor-Laomɛr, ne Goyim dĩm, a Tideal, ne Sinear dĩm, a Amrafɛl la Elasar dĩm, a Aryok. Dɩlla yɩɩ dĩm dãmb a naas n yik zabr ne dĩm dãmb a nu." 
Genesis14:10 Sidim noorẽ, b ra tuu tãn-sũud buls wʋsgo la Sodom ne Gomor dĩma sẽn da tard tula lʋɩ b pʋsẽ; sẽn paam-b n põsa zoe n dʋʋ tãnga." 
Genesis14:11 Tɩ b na n wʋk Sodom la Gomor dãmb paoong la b koodo n looge. 
Genesis14:12 B looga ne a Abram yao biiga, a Lot, ne a teeda fãa; a Lot ra tɩ kẽeda Sodom." 
Genesis14:13 Ned a ye n zoe n põse, n wa togs a Abram, Ebrayitgã; wakat kãng t'a Abram da ti a yir a Mambre kʋgsẽ; a Mambre da yaa Amoritga, t'a Eskol la a Anɛr yaa a yaop; bãmb ne a Abram da yaa zoodo." 
Genesis14:14 A Abram sẽn wʋm tɩ b looga ne a saam-biig, a Lot, a tigma a rakõap kobs-tã la piig la a nii sẽn dog yẽ zakẽ la sẽn tar sũ-keelem. B boba b zab-teedo n pʋg bɛɛbã n ta Dã tẽnga." 
Genesis14:15 B maana yam n na n ling-b ne yʋngo, n tõog-ba, n dig-ba n ta Oba, al Damas nug goabga." 
Genesis14:16 A Abram lɛɛg n waa ne a saam-biig a Lot, ne pagbã la rakõapã la laoga fãa." 
Genesis14:17 A Abram sẽn tõog a Kedor-Laomɛr ne dĩm dãmb a taabã n lɛɛg n watẽ, Sodom dĩma yii n seg-a-la Save bãoogẽ; b ra boonda zĩ-kãng me tɩ dĩm bãoogo." 
Genesis14:18 Salem dĩm, a Mɛlkisedɛk talla buri la rãam n wa; yẽnda n da ya Yĩngr Soaala maan-kʋʋda." 
Genesis14:19 A ninga a Abram bark woto: «Yĩngr Soaala-Wẽnde sẽn naana yĩngr la tẽngã, ning a Abram barka." 
Genesis14:20 Yĩngr Soaala paam barka, tɩ bãmb n sagl f nugẽ, f bɛɛba gilli!» A Abram weela a paoongã fãa piig-piiga n dok a ye piig fãa zug n kõ a Mɛlkisedɛk." 
Genesis14:21 Sodom dĩma yeela a Abram: «Kõ maam m nebã la f wʋk sẽn ketã n looge.» 
Genesis14:22 T'a Abram leok Sodom dĩma: «M zẽkda m nugu la m wẽenda ne Soaala-Wẽnde, sẽn naana yĩngr la tẽngã, m wẽendame tɩ f sẽn so bũmb ning fãa mam kõn yãk fɩ, a pʋgẽ ye," 
Genesis14:23 ba gaarga, ba neoodr gĩsga; woto f kõn tõog yeel bada tɩ foo n kɩt t'a Abram lebg arzɛk soab ye." 
Genesis14:24 Mam kõn deeg fɩ, sã n ka m rakõapa rɩɩbo. M zo-rãmba sẽn yãag-b maama na reeg b pʋɩɩre; a Anɛr, a Eskol, a Mambre, bãmb na yãk b keoore.»" 
Genesis15:1 Dẽ loogr poore, a Abram paama Soaala-Wẽnd likri. B yeel-a lame: «Abram, da maan dabeem ye, mam ya f gũuda la f na n paama dolb wʋsg m nengẽ.»" 
Genesis15:2 T'a Abram soke: «Bõe la y na n kõ-ma, Soaala-Wẽnnaam, tɩ m kʋʋndẽ n dabda n ket n nan ka rog biiga?" 
Genesis15:3 Ade, yãmb ka kõ-m dogem ye la yaa m yir dakõore, Damas tẽng Eliezer, n na n wa soog m sẽn tara fãa.»" 
Genesis15:4 Soaala-Wẽnd leok-a lame: «Ka yẽ n na n soog f roog ye, na n yɩɩ f meng bi-roaka.»" 
Genesis15:5 Soaala-Wẽnd talla a Abram n yi yɩnga n yeel-a: «Ges yĩngri, la f sã n tõe bɩ f sõd ãdsã; ade, f buuda neb na n yɩɩ kõn bãng n sõde.»" 
Genesis15:6 A Abram tẽe Soaala la bãmb me tõog n ges-a-la wa nin-sõngo. 
Genesis15:7 B lɛɛg n yeel-a lame: «Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yiis foo Ur, Kalde tẽnga, n wa kẽes f tẽn-kãnga tɩ f soog-a.»" 
Genesis15:8 A Abram kʋʋga koɛɛga: «M Soaala, bõe n wilgd-ma tɩ tẽnga na n yɩɩ m soolem?»" 
Genesis15:9 Dẽ la Soaala yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ wa ne yʋʋm a tã nag-sɛdga, n paas yʋʋm a tã bʋʋga, yʋʋm a tã pe-raoogo, pɩgdre la wall bila.»" 
Genesis15:10 T'a Abram tɩ wa ne rẽ fãa, n bog-ba, a yiib yiibu, n dɩk boagã n yegl taaba. Pɩgdra la walla bal la a ka boke." 
Genesis15:11 Yɩbrend yãee nemdã n sigi t'a Abram laas-ba. 
Genesis15:12 Wĩndig sẽn waa n dabd lʋɩɩse, gõeem kãseng la rabeem yõka a Abram." 
Genesis15:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a lame: «Bãng neer tɩ f yagensã na n tɩ siga sãando tẽng a ye sẽn ka b tẽnga la b na n lebga yem-daado la b na n namsa yʋʋm kobs-naase. 
Genesis15:14 Buud ninga sẽn na n kẽesa bãmb yembdã, m na n wa kao-la a bʋʋdo la f yagensa na n yii be ne arzɛk kãsenga." 
Genesis15:15 Sã n ya foo, fo na n looga ne laafi n tɩ sak f saam-dãmba, f na n bãnga kʋʋlem noogo tɩ b yaool n maan f kʋʋre." 
Genesis15:16 Kaoosg sã wa beẽ, yagensa na n lɛɛg n waa kaanẽ; rũnna-rũnna, Amoritsa wẽnem ket n dabda taoore. M gũuda b wẽnema wa pid zãnga, tɩ m dig-ba.»" 
Genesis15:17 Wĩndig sẽn waa n lʋɩ zãnga tɩ zĩig fãa lebg lika, bug-kãseng wa wʋng bugum, n tar zɛlma, looga nemda sʋka." 
Genesis15:18 Badaare Soaala-Wẽnd yõga zood ne a Abram woto: «M kõta f buuda tẽn-kãnga, sẽn sɩng Ezipt kʋɩlga n digd Efrat kʋɩl-kãsenga." 
Genesis15:19 Soog Kenitse, Kenizitse, Kadmonitse," 
Genesis15:20 Ititse, Perizitse, Refayitse," 
Genesis15:21 Amoritse, Kanaã rãmba, Zirgazitse la Zebuzitse.»" 
Genesis16:1 A Abram paga, a Sarayi, da nan pa rog biig ye, a ra tara roog-biiga sẽn yit Ezipt tẽnga la sẽn boond tɩ Agar." 
Genesis16:2 Dẽ la a Sarayi yeel a Abram: «F ne-la, Soaala-Wẽnd ka kõ-m dogem ye; m kot-f-la bũmbu: kẽ ne mam doog-biigã tɩ daare m na paam kamba.» A Abram kelga a Sarayi koɛɛga." 
Genesis16:3 Woto a Abram sẽn waa n paam yʋʋm piig Kanaã tẽnga, a Sarayi rɩka a roog-biig, a Agar, Ezipt bi-pugla, n kõ a Abram t'a maan a paga." 
Genesis16:4 A Abram kẽesa a Agar; a Agar rɩka pʋga la a sẽn bãng t'a rɩka pʋga, a pa le ges a roog-ma wa ned ye." 
Genesis16:5 A Sarayi waa n kong n yeela a Abram: «Paoogr ning a Agar sẽn paoogd maama leb foo. Mam dɩka m doog-biig n kõ foo, la a sẽn bãng t'a rɩka pʋg tɛka, a pa le nand maam ye, bɩ Wẽnnaam bʋ d bʋʋdo.»" 
Genesis16:6 Dẽ la a Abram leok a Sarayi: «Yaa foo ne f roog-biiga, maan ne-a wa f sẽn date.» A Sarayi namsa a roog-biigã al t'a wa kong n zoe." 
Genesis16:7 Ned la Soaala tʋm yã la a sega a Agar bãk a ye noor, Sur sorẽ bãkã," 
Genesis16:8 n yeel a Agar: «Sarayi doog-biiga, f yita yɛ la f dabda yɛ?» T'a leoke: «M yi-la a Sarayi nengẽ n zoetẽ.»" 
Genesis16:9 Soaala sẽn tʋm a soaba yeelame: «Leb f zu-soaba nengẽ; tɩ sulg f meng a taoore. 
Genesis16:10 Soaala na n kõ-f-la kamb wʋsg-wʋsgo; b kõn waa n tõog n sõd n sɛ ye. 
Genesis16:11 Gese, fo tʋtame, f na n doga bi-ribla; f na n pʋda a yʋʋr a Ismayɛl, tɩ f pɛta pʋgẽ, Soaala wʋma f kɛlenga." 
Genesis16:12 F biiga na n yɩɩ wa burgumdi, a na yika zabr ne neb fãa, tɩ neb fãa me yik zabr ne-a, la a na n welga ne a saam-biisi n ti a zaka.»" 
Genesis16:13 A Agar da sokda a meng woto: «M sɩd yãenda sẽn ne-a maama bɩ?» La yʋ-kãnga la a pʋd Soaala sẽn gom ne-a wã: Ɛl-Royi, Wẽnd sẽn ne-ma." 
Genesis16:14 Yaa rẽ yĩng me la a bool bãka sẽn da pẽ be wã t'a Layi-Royi, sẽn vɩ la sẽn ne-a Soaba bãka, la a bee Kadɛs la Berɛd sʋka." 
Genesis16:15 A Agar doga bi-ribla la a Abram boola biiga t'a Ismayɛl. 
Genesis16:16 A Agar sẽn waa n na n dog a Ismayɛl t'a Abram tara yʋʋm pis-nii la a yoobe. 
Genesis17:1 A Abram yʋʋm sẽn waa n dabd pis-wɛ la a wɛ, Soaala lik-a lame n yeel-a: «Yaa maam la Pãng-Soaba, Wẽnde, kẽn m taoore, yɩ sõng zãnga." 
Genesis17:2 M na n yõga zood ne foo, m na n kɩtame tɩ f buud lebg zembala.»" 
Genesis17:3 A Abram lʋɩ-la a yãvabga Soaala taoore tɩ b gom ne-a woto: 
Genesis17:4 «Ade, m na n yõga zood ne foom, f na n yɩɩ buud ka tɛk yaaba." 
Genesis17:5 B kõn le bool-f tɩ Abram ye, yaa Abraam la b na n bool-fo, tɩ rũnna tɛka, m kɩtame tɩ f lebg buud ka tɛk ba." 
Genesis17:6 M na n kɩtame tɩ f buud wek al wʋsgo, m na n kɩtame tɩ f buuda yɩ sags ka tɛka, m na n yiisa dĩm dãmb a pʋgẽ." 
Genesis17:7 Maam ne foo na n yɩɩ zoodo, la fo loogr poore, m zooda na n paa ne f buudã n ka tol n yãe sɛɛb ye, tɩ m datame n yɩ fo Wẽnde la fo kamba Wẽnde, fo loogr poore." 
Genesis17:8 M na n kõo foo ne f kamba tẽnga tõre t'a yɩ f soolem daar fãa, la mam na n yɩɩ yãmb Wẽnde.»" 
Genesis17:9 La Soaala yeela a Abraam: «Tall m zooda neere, foo ne f buudu, zamaan woo zamaan." 
Genesis17:10 Zood ninga sẽn ka tog n sɛ, maam ne foom la f kamba tẽnsʋkã, zood kãng kaset la woto: kẽes bi-ribl fãa bãongo." 
Genesis17:11 Bãonga kõom n na n yɩ maam ne yãmb zooda kaseto. 
Genesis17:12 Bi-ribl fãa sẽn dog tɩ dasem maan a nii, bɩ y kẽes-a bãongo; dɩlla, a yaa fo meng biiga, f yamb biiga, sãan biiga, kẽes-a bãongo." 
Genesis17:13 Mam zooda kaset na n zĩnda yãmb yĩngẽ wala bũmb sẽn ka tõe n menem ye. 
Genesis17:14 Woto wã, bi-ribl ning fãa sẽn ka kẽ bãongo, b na n yiis-a-la buudẽ t'a zãgsa zooda kaseto.»" 
Genesis17:15 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Abraam: «Da le bool f pagã a Sarayi ye, a yʋʋr lebga Sara." 
Genesis17:16 M na n ning-a-la barka, a na doga biig n kõ fo tɩ m ning bi-kãng me barka; a na n doga bu-yalengo, mooga dĩm dãmb na n yi-la a pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis17:17 A Abraam lʋɩɩ-la a yãvabga, n pusg laado t'a yeela a sũurẽ: Yʋʋm koabg rao na rog biiga, yʋʋm pis-wɛ pag na le kũm dogem?" 
Genesis17:18 Ad-a sẽn le yeele: «A Ismayɛl we n kell n zĩnd ne laafi.» 
Genesis17:19 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd leok a Abraam: «F paga, a Sara, na n doga biiga tɩ f bool-a t'a Izaak la m na n yõga zood ne yẽndã la a kamba la yaa zood sẽn ka na n zĩnd sɛɛbo." 
Genesis17:20 Fo sẽn kos bũmb ning a Ismayɛl yĩnga, m deegame, ade, m ningd-a-la barka, yẽ me na n paasame, a na n weka zembala, a na n doga dĩm dãmb piig la a yiibu, a buuda na n yɩɩ bu-kãsenga." 
Genesis17:21 La m zooda yẽ, yaa ne a Izaak la m na n yõge, bi-kãng la f paga na n dog n kõ foo, vẽer wakat kãnga.»" 
Genesis17:22 La Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn togs b koɛɛg n sɛ, b leba yĩngri n bas a Abraam," 
Genesis17:23 t'a Abraam bool a biig a Ismayɛl la kom-dibli fãa sẽn dog a zakẽ bɩ a sẽn da ra b rãmba, la badaar bala a kẽesa rapa fãa bãongo, wala Soaal sẽn da kõ noore." 
Genesis17:24 A Abraam sẽn waa n kẽ bãong t'a tara yʋʋm pis-wɛ la a wɛ. 
Genesis17:25 Dẽ t'a Ismayɛl yʋʋm yaa piig la a tãabo. 
Genesis17:26 A Abraam ne a biig a Ismayɛl kẽe bãong daar a ye. 
Genesis17:27 Sẽn naag-ba n kẽ bãongã yaa yẽ zak kom-dibli gilli, b ka bak sẽn dog-b zaka pʋga bɩ sãamba sẽn da ne ligd ye." 
Genesis18:1 Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Abraam a Mambre kʋgsẽ; a ra zĩ-la a doog noor n kokd pemsem. Zĩiga ra wɩngame. 
Genesis18:2 A waa n zẽka a nenga, la ade, rap a tãab n da yɛs a taoore. A sẽn yãend-ba, a wudg n kolgame n wõgemd tẽnga" 
Genesis18:3 n yeel-ba: «M Zu-soaba, m kotame tɩ ning-taab sã n beẽ, bɩ y ra loog n pa yaas bilfr ye." 
Genesis18:4 Bas-y tɩ m tall koom bilf n wa tɩ y waas y nao la y zĩnd maasmẽ n vʋʋse. 
Genesis18:5 Yaas-y ka tɩ m wa ne dɩɩb bilfu, tɩ y na le paam pãng n kẽng taoore; m tẽedame tɩ y raab la boto la y sẽn tũ y yamba nengẽ wã!» Tɩ b leok-a: «Be neere, maan wala f sẽn yeelã.»" 
Genesis18:6 A Abraam zoe tao-tao n tɩ yeel a Sara: «Yãk zom nug a tã n nage n dõos miisd var-vare.» 
Genesis18:7 A Abraam meng wudg n kẽnga a bãgrẽ n tɩ bao nag-bil poll sẽn ya sõmbo n kɩs a rakõore t'a reeg n dʋg tao. 
Genesis18:8 A rɩka bĩisim sẽn gũsi, n paas bĩs-naare la nag-bil a sẽn seglã n wa tẽgen sãamba taoore, tɩɩga maasmẽ, la yẽ meng yalsa be." 
Genesis18:9 B sẽn dɩ n sɛ, b sok-a lame: «F pag a Sara bɛɛ?» T'a leoke: «A be-la a roogẽ.»" 
Genesis18:10 Sãan a ye yeelame: «M na n lɛɛg n waa vẽer zĩ-lik paalle la ade, f pag a Sara na n paama biiga.» Mik a Sara ra bee yẽ poorẽ bala, a roog noore." 
Genesis18:11 A Abraam ne a Sara ra kʋʋla wʋsgo; a Sara ra pa le tẽr kiuug pukda taoor bɩ yaang ye; 
Genesis18:12 Dẽ la a Sara laa a sũurẽ n yetẽ: «M sẽn kʋʋl woto wã m na le tõog n bãng dogem sũ-noogo? M sɩd yẽ sẽ n ka lebg nin-kẽem kʋdre.» 
Genesis18:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Abraam: «Bõe yĩng la a Sara laa a sũurẽ n yetẽ: ‹M sẽn kʋʋl woto wã m na n yɩɩ wãn n le rog biiga?› 
Genesis18:14 Bõe n be n ya toog ne Wẽnnaam? Vẽere, zĩ-lik paalle, m na le sig f yiri la a Sara na n doga biiga.»" 
Genesis18:15 A Sara kɩɩsa woto: «Ad-y mam pa la ye.» Rabeem da yõk-a lame. Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeele: «Da kɩɩs ye, f laame sẽ.»" 
Genesis18:16 Rapa yikame tɩ b na n looge t'a Abraam yãag-b bilfu n tees Sodom sẽnẽ. 
Genesis18:17 Soaala yeelame: «M sẽn na n maan bũmb ningã, m tõe n solg-a-la a Abraam bɩ?" 
Genesis18:18 A Abraam buuda tog n lebga bu-kãsenga, buud sẽn tar pãnga, tɩ tẽng zug buud a taaba tũ yẽ maasem n paam barka." 
Genesis18:19 Yẽnda la m yama kẽ yã tɩ m kos-a t'a wilg a kamba la a roogo, tɩ yẽ loogr poore, bɩ b tũ Soaala raabo n maan sẽn zems la sẽn toge tɩ Soaala me tõog n pids b sẽn kãab-a bũmb ningã fãa.»" 
Genesis18:20 Soaala-Wẽnd waa n yeelame: «Ad koɛɛg ning sẽn ningd Sodom la Gomor taala sãta zĩig zãnga; b yel-wẽna labsa. 
Genesis18:21 Togame tɩ m ta n gese b sã n sɩd maana wala m sẽn wʋmd tɩ b gomdã. Sã n pa boto me, m na bãnge.»" 
Genesis18:22 Neba dɩka Sodom sore. A Abraam da nan ka zãag ne Soaala ye. 
Genesis18:23 A pʋs n kolg-b lame n yeel-ba: «Yãmb na sak n naag nin-wẽng ne nin-sõng n kʋ? 
Genesis18:24 Daar bɩ nin-sõma pis-nu be tẽnga pʋga, yãmb na wã tẽngã? Y ka na n kõ-a sugri neb pis-nu wã sẽn ket a pʋgẽ wã yĩnga?" 
Genesis18:25 Y yam zãr ne tʋʋmd a woto, y yam zãr ne kʋ nin-sõngo n naag ne nin-wẽnga. Bõe tɩ nin-sõng la nin-wẽng zãab ka na n welg taaba? Y yam zãr ne y fãoog-b taaba. Dũni wã fãa Bʋ-kaooda maanda wãn n bʋ kegre?»" 
Genesis18:26 Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Abraam: «M sã n yãe Sodom pʋga neb pis-nu sẽn ya nin-tɩrse, m na bas-a taal bãmb yɩnga.»" 
Genesis18:27 A Abraam yeelame: «Ad-y m tɩtaam waooga, mam sẽn ya tãnd la tom bala, maam n dat n le gom ne yãmba." 
Genesis18:28 Sẽn yet tɩ pis-nu wã, daare neb a nu bal n wat n paooge, a nu wã bal yĩnga, yãmb na sak n wã tẽnga zãnga?» Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leoke: «Tẽnga kõn wã, m sã n yãe neb pis-naas la a nu a pʋgẽ ye.»" 
Genesis18:29 A Abraam le paasame: «La sã n ya pis-naas bal n be, y na n maana wãna?» Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leoke: «Pis-naasa yĩnga, m kõn wã tẽnga ye.»" 
Genesis18:30 A Abraam le kabsame: «Soaala, m kot-y lame tɩ m sã n le gome bɩ y ra puug y sũur ye; y na n maana bõe, sã n ya pis-tã bal n be?» Soaala leokame: «M sã n yãe neb pis-tã, m kõn maan fɩ.»" 
Genesis18:31 M na n kosa m Soaala n le leok gomde: «La sã n ya pisi?» Tɩ Soaala yeele: «Pisi wã yĩnga, m kõn kʋ ye.»" 
Genesis18:32 A Abraam le paasame: Bɩ Soaala ra puug a sũur ye, tɩ m na n le yiisa gomd a ye bala: «Sã n ya neb piig bala?» Tɩ b leoke: «Piiga yĩnga m kõn wã tẽnga ye.»" 
Genesis18:33 Soaala sẽn gom n sɛ, b loog n basa a Abraam tɩ yẽ me leb a zakẽ." 
Genesis19:1 Malɛgs a yiibã kẽe Sodom ne zafare, dẽ t'a Lot zĩi tẽnga noore, la a sẽn yãend-ba a yik n tɩ seg-b lame, n wõgemd b taoore." 
Genesis19:2 A yeel-b lame: «M Zu-soaben-dãmba, sak-y n sig yãmb yamba yiri, n waas y nao la y gãand tɩ beoog yibeoogo, y na le rɩk y sore.» B yeelame: «Ayo! D na n gãanda yɩnga, tẽnga pʋga.»" 
Genesis19:3 A Lot dɩdgr yĩnga b sak n siga a zakẽ. A Lot kõ-b-la rɩɩbo, bur sẽn pa ning bɩlle, la b rɩɩme." 
Genesis19:4 B sẽn yet tɩ b na n kẽe gãaga la tẽnga rãmb sẽn gũbg yirã: dapa, kom-bõonego, nin-kẽemse, tẽnga gill kaoog n waame." 
Genesis19:5 B boola a Lot n yeel-a: «Rapa sẽn kẽ ka yʋngã bɛɛ? Tall-ba n wa tɩ d sõs ne-ba.» 
Genesis19:6 A Lot yiime n lɛɛg n pag kʋɩlenga a poorẽ. A bʋʋga neba dignoorẽ, la a yeel-b lame:" 
Genesis19:7 «Da saag-y yell a woto ye, m saam-biisi, m kota sugri!" 
Genesis19:8 Mam tara m kom-pugli a yiibu sẽn nan ka kul sɩdb ye, bãmb la m na n tall n wa kõ yã tɩ y pids y raabo. Da maan-y nin-bãmba bũmb ye tɩ b siga sãand m yiri.»" 
Genesis19:9 B leok-a lame: «Serg ka!» N le paase: «Fo yaa tẽnga sãan n yaool n dat n kao tõnd bʋʋdo la tõnd na tʋm foo wẽnga.» B ra veooda a Lot ne pãnga la bilf bal tɩ b kaoogẽ kʋɩlengã. 
Genesis19:10 Neb a yiiba tuda b nug n tak a Lot n kẽes a zakẽ, n lebs n pag kʋɩlenga." 
Genesis19:11 B fẽega sẽn da be-b yɩnga zondo, sẽn sɩng bi-bilfu n ta nin-kẽema al tɩ b babendẽ n baood kʋɩlengã n kongdẽ." 
Genesis19:12 Neb a yiibã yeela a Lot: «F sã n le tar ned ka wala rɛɛmba, bi-ribla, bi-pugla, sẽn yaa a soab fãa, t'a be tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, bɩ f tall-b tɩ y yi." 
Genesis19:13 Tõnd na n sãama tẽngã tɩ koɛ kãseng n sãt la a ningd-a-la taale, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore; yaa rẽnna la b tʋm tõnd tɩ d wa wã tẽngã.»" 
Genesis19:14 A Lot bʋʋga a reem dãmba n yeel-ba: «Yik-y n loog-y ka tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n wãa tẽnga.» A reem dãmba yõkame t'a maanda dakɩɩr ne bãmba. 
Genesis19:15 Zĩig sẽn waa n yẽege, sẽn tʋm b rãmba pẽdga a Lot, b ra yet-a lame: «Yiki, peeg f paga la f kom-pugli tɩ y yi n looge tɩ tẽnga na n paama sɩbgre la ka tog tɩ y rɩ a beegra taal ye.»" 
Genesis19:16 A Lot da maasame, tɩ b kong n gãd a nugu, n gãd a paga la a kamb a yiiba nusi, Soaala sẽn da rat b fãagr yĩnga." 
Genesis19:17 B tall-b lame n yiis kɛɛnga n yeel-ba: «Aya! Ned kam fãa zoe n fãag a yõore, ned da wẽneg n ges a poorẽ ye; da yals-y tẽn nabrẽ ye, zoe-y n kẽng-y tãng zug n paam n põse la y ra naag n ki ye.»" 
Genesis19:18 A Lot leokame: «Yãmb sẽn makd bũmb ninga pa noom-m ye. 
Genesis19:19 Soaala, mam paama bark yãmb nengẽ, yãmb nimbãan-zoeer kãseng siga m zugu tɩ y rat tɩ m põse, la m pa tẽeda tɩ m na tõog n zoe n ta tãngã tɩ yella pa maan ye, tɩ m me baas n ki." 
Genesis19:20 Tẽn-bil a ye n pẽ ka, m tõe n zoe n kẽe be, a paooda la m we n tõog zoe n ta be n paam n põse.»" 
Genesis19:21 B leoka a Lot: «Bas tɩ m zoe n deega f kosgo la fo sẽn gomd tẽn-bil ningã, m kõn maan-a fɩ." 
Genesis19:22 Aya! Nadg pãnga, zoe n tɩ kẽ be tɩ m pa na m maan fɩ tɩ f ket sor zug ye.» Ya rẽ yĩng la tẽnga yʋʋr lebg Soar, a pa zem bũmbu." 
Genesis19:23 Yaa sõor sẽn waa n pukdẽ la a Lot ta Soar. 
Genesis19:24 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ kidbri la yĩngr bugum sig Sodom la Gomor. 
Genesis19:25 B sãama tẽn-bãmba zãng fãa, b pʋto, b tɩɩs fãa, tẽnga ninsaalb fãa." 
Genesis19:26 Sã n yaa a Lot pagã, yẽ wẽneg n gesa a poorẽ, a paa zĩ-kãnga, n lebg yamsem nin-naande." 
Genesis19:27 A Abraam tõda beoogo n leb Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da lik a zĩig ningã," 
Genesis19:28 a gesa Sodom la Gomor, la ade, a yãee bug-zõos sẽn nukdi, wa bug-kẽeng rẽnna." 
Genesis19:29 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn waa n na n sãam tẽns a yiibã, b tẽega a Abraam yelle, dẽ la a Lot põs yã." 
Genesis19:30 A Lot yii Soar, yẽ ne a kom-pugli a yiibã tɩ rabeem ra tar-a-la wʋsgo. A tɩ yãee tãng boko n kẽ, yẽ ne a kamba." 
Genesis19:31 Kãsma yeela yao wã: «Ade, tõnd ba lebga nin-kẽema la rao a ye meng ka le ket tẽng zug sẽn na n kẽes tõnd kãadem wala b sẽn maand zĩis fãa ye." 
Genesis19:32 Wa tɩ d yũnug d ba rãam n paam n gãand ne-a n paam n dog biiga.» 
Genesis19:33 Badaar yʋngo, b kõ-la b ba rãam t'a yũ. Kãsma n deng n gãand ne a ba, a ba wã yaool n ka bãng a waoongo, a ka bãng a loogr ye." 
Genesis19:34 Vẽkẽmbeoogo, kãsma yeela a yao wã: «Zaame mam kẽe ne m ba, d le kõ-a rãam t'a yũ rũnna yɛsa tɩ fo kẽ ne-a tɩ d paam kamba, t'a buud da sɛ ye.»" 
Genesis19:35 Yʋng kãnga yɛsa, b le kõ b ba rãam t'a yũ, tɩ yao wã kẽ n gãand ne a ba t'a pa tol n bãng a waoong la a loogr ye." 
Genesis19:36 B yiib fãa waa n dɩka pʋga. 
Genesis19:37 Kãsma sẽn dog a biiga, a pʋd-a-la Moab. Yẽ la rũnna Moabitsa yaaba." 
Genesis19:38 Yao wã sẽn dog a biiga, a pʋd-a-la a Amon, yẽnd la rũnna Amonitsa yaaba." 
Genesis20:1 A Abraam yii Mambre n tees Negɛb sẽnẽ; a ti-la a yir Sur la Kadɛs sʋka, n wa yi be n tɩ kẽ Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 A Abraam yeela a paga poorẽ: «A Sara yaa mam tão.» Wa n segame tɩ Gerar dĩma, a Abimelɛk, tʋmame tɩ b wa peeg a Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Woto wã Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Abimelɛk yʋngo, a gõeemẽ, n yeel-a: «Fo sẽn dɩk pʋg-kãnga wã, ad-f na n kiime, a tara sɩda.»" 
Genesis20:4 A Abimelɛk da nan pa sɩɩs paga ye, dẽ la a yeel yã: «Soaala, m sok n gese yãmb na kʋ maam ne b m soolem dãmba tɩ d ka mi d beegr tiiri?" 
Genesis20:5 Yaa a Abraam meng n yeele: ‹Yaa mam tão la a Sara.› A Sara me yeelame: ‹Yaa mam kẽema.› M sẽn maan bũmb ninga ne-a, m maan-a-la ne sũur sẽn ka rat wẽnga, ne pʋ-peelem zãnga.»" 
Genesis20:6 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a, a zãmsdẽ: «Ya m sẽn mi tɩ f yaa pʋ-peen-neda la m pa sak tɩ f tʋm wẽng ne-a, tɩ f pa sɩɩs-a ye." 
Genesis20:7 Marsã, lebs pagã a sɩda; ad yaa mam neda, a na n pʋʋs n kõ-f lame la f na n vɩɩndame. F sã n zãgs a lebsgo, mars-marsã bala f na n kiime la f sẽn so fãa na n wãame.»" 
Genesis20:8 Tao-tao bala, a Abimelɛk yika ne yʋngo n bool a rakõapa fãa n togs a sẽn wʋma, tɩ rabeem kãseng yõk-ba." 
Genesis20:9 A kɩtame tɩ b bool a Abraam la a yeel-a lame: «Bõe la f maan tõndo, ãnna n beeg foo tõnd sʋka, tɩ f rat n wã-d zãng-zãnga? Ad yaa sẽn ka tog la f sẽn maan tõndã." 
Genesis20:10 Yaa bõe yĩng la fo maan woto?» 
Genesis20:11 T'a Abraam yeele: «M tagsa m sũurẽ, daare ned ka be ka n zoet Wẽnd ye, la b na n kʋ maam n soog m paga." 
Genesis20:12 Baad-y tɩ m sẽn yeela ka zirẽ zãng ye, a yaa m tão, a yaa m ba-biiga, la ka m ma-biig ye, pagẽ wã yẽ, a yaa mam paga." 
Genesis20:13 Wẽnd sẽn waa n yiis maam m ba zakẽ, m kos-a-la m toore t'a zoe m nimbãanega la a yeele, d sẽn ta zĩig ning fãa, t'a yaa m tão.»" 
Genesis20:14 A Abimelɛk bao piisi, niisi, yem-daad la yem-pogse n kõ a Abraam; a lebs-a-la a paga Sara." 
Genesis20:15 A yeel-a lame: «Ad tẽnga sẽn yɛdg n dɩg f taoore, ti f zak f sẽn dat zĩig ninga.»" 
Genesis20:16 A Abimelɛk yaool n yeela a Sara: «Deeg wakɩ koeems tusri n kɩs f kẽema, dẽ na n yɩɩ kaseto tɩ f tara sɩda la f zãag d fãa ne pĩnd tudgrã.»" 
Genesis20:17 A Abraam sẽn pʋʋse, Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la a Abimelɛk laafi; a paga la a yem-pogsã fãa paama laafi n tõog n le rogd kamba." 
Genesis20:18 Bãng-y t'a Abimelɛk sẽn bao a Abraam paga Sara tɛka, Soaala da gɩdga a pagba rogem." 
Genesis21:1 Soaala-Wẽnd tẽega b sẽn da pʋlem a Sara bũmb ninga, la b pidsa b pʋlemde." 
Genesis21:2 Pʋg-yãanga, a Sara, rɩka pʋga la a roga biig Wẽnd sẽn yals wakat niingã, n kõ nin-kẽem a Abraam." 
Genesis21:3 A Abraam pʋda biig ning a Sara sẽn dogã t'a Izaak, a Laadwɛɛnda." 
Genesis21:4 Dasem a nii daare, a Abraam kẽesa a biiga bãongo wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-a noore." 
Genesis21:5 A Izaak dogma wakato t'a Abraam tara yʋʋm koabga. 
Genesis21:6 A Sara goma woto: «Wẽnd waa ne laado, ned ninga fãa sẽn na n wʋma kibarã na n pusga laado.»" 
Genesis21:7 A le yeelame yɛsa: «Ãnda n na n saagẽ n yeel t'a Sara na le yẽsem biiga, mik m kʋʋlem pʋgẽ m doga biiga.»" 
Genesis21:8 Biiga bɩɩme n tol n sigi. Biiga sẽn bas a ma bĩisr daare, a ba maana kibs kãsenga." 
Genesis21:9 Daar a ye, a Sara yãenda a biig, a Izaak, t'a reemd ne a Ismayɛl, Ezipt poaka, a Agar, biigã." 
Genesis21:10 A tɩ yeela a Abraam: «Dig yem-poaka ne a biigã tɩ pa segd tɩ yem-poak biig wa naag m biig, a Izaak, n welg a ba raboog ye.»" 
Genesis21:11 Paga leokre, a Ismayɛl poorẽ, pa yɩ a Abraam noog ye." 
Genesis21:12 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Abraam: «Da sãam f sũuri, yem-poaka ne a biiga poorẽ ye, ade, a Sara sẽn na n kos-f bũmb ning fãa, bɩ f maan boto, tɩ m na n tũ-la a Izaak maasem n kõ-f buudu tɩ f yʋʋra ra menem ye." 
Genesis21:13 La yem-poaka biig sẽn ya fo buudã, m na kɩt tɩ yẽnda me yɩ bu-kãsenga.»" 
Genesis21:14 A Abraam tõda beoogo n bao buri la ko-waooga n kõ a Agar. A Agar zombga biiga gʋbla, t'a Abraam na n yiis-ba. A Agar sẽn yi, a tɩ sɩnga saab Beerseba zĩ-pɛɛlẽ." 
Genesis21:15 Kooma waa n sɛɛme t'a bao tɩɩg a ye maasem n bas a biiga be. 
Genesis21:16 A loogame n tɩ bao zĩig n gãande. Biiga ne a ma da zãra ne taaba wala pĩim sẽn tõe n tão n ta zĩig ninga. A da yeta a sũurẽ: Woto m kõn yãend m biiga kũum ye; a yaool n da wẽnega a neng n tees be la a tar yãbre la wiisgu. 
Genesis21:17 Soaala-Wẽnd me wʋma biiga kɛlenga; dẽ la b tʋm ned yĩngri t'a sig n bool a Agar: «Agar, bõe la f maanda, bas rabeem, Soaala wʋma f biiga koɛɛga." 
Genesis21:18 Yik n tɩ rɩk-a n sagl f naoẽ, m na n kɩtame t'a buud yɩ bu-kãsenga.»" 
Genesis21:19 Soaala-Wẽnd puka a nina la a yãee bãk ne koom t'a kẽng n tɩ toog n pids a waooga n kõ a biiga t'a yũ. 
Genesis21:20 Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda ne biigã, a paa weoogẽ n lebg tãoosa." 
Genesis21:21 A paa Parã weoogo. A ma tɩ bao Ezipt tẽng biig n kõ-a t'a maan a paga. 
Genesis21:22 Wakat kãnga, a Abimelɛk ne a tãnsoaba Pikol waa n yeela a Abraam: «Ade, Soaala bee fo poorẽ wakat fãa." 
Genesis21:23 Dɩlla wẽen ne f Wẽnde tɩ f kõ maan-m bũmb ye, maam ne m kambã la m yagensã, wẽen tɩ f na n zoe m nimbãanega, wala mam sẽn zoe f nimbãanega, n deeg-f sãand ka. D zooda ra sãam ye.»" 
Genesis21:24 T'a Abraam yeele: «M wẽendame.» 
Genesis21:25 Zabr n waa n baas n yik a Abraam ne a Abimelɛk sʋka, t'a Abimelɛk neb n wa n dig a Abraam rakõapa n deeg b bulg a ye." 
Genesis21:26 Woto la a Abimelɛk leok yã: «Mam ka mi ned ninga sẽn tʋm tʋʋmda ye; fo zɩ n gom ne m ye, sã n ka rũnna, koɛɛg nan ka lʋɩ m tʋbrẽ ye.»" 
Genesis21:27 A Abraam bao piisi la niis n kõ a Abimelɛk la b lebga zoodo. 
Genesis21:28 A Abraam sʋka pe-yãans a yopoe n loe kɛɛnga. 
Genesis21:29 T'a Abimelɛk na n sok-a: «Fo sʋka pe-yãans a yopoe wã n n na n maan bõe?» 
Genesis21:30 T'a Abraam yeele: «M kotame tɩ f reeg piisã tɩ rẽ yɩ kaseto tɩ yaa maam n sɩd tuk bulgã.» 
Genesis21:31 Ad-y yaa rẽ yĩng la b bool zĩ-kãnga tɩ Beerseba, wẽeneg bulga, b yiiba fãa sẽn wẽena yĩnga." 
Genesis21:32 Zooda sẽn yõg Beerseba n sɛ, a Abimelɛk ne a tãnsoab a Pikol yii n leba Filisti rãmba soolmẽ." 
Genesis21:33 A Abraam sela tɩɩg Beerseba la tɩ-kãng tẽngr la a waoog Soaala, ka-sɩng-ka-sɛɛb Wẽnde." 
Genesis21:34 A Abraam kaoosa wʋsg Filisti rãmba soolmẽ. 
Genesis22:1 Dẽ loogr poore, Wẽnnaam fɛɛsa a Abraam n na n bãng a pʋga. B bool-a lame: «Abraam!» T'a sake: «Naaba!»" 
Genesis22:2 Tɩ b yeel-a: «Dɩk f bi-yendã, a Izaak, fo sẽn nong a soab wʋsgã, n kẽng Moriya tẽnga, tãnga a ye zugu, m sẽn na n wilg-fu n tɩ kʋ-a maoong n yõog bugum.»" 
Genesis22:3 A Abraam yika tõd-beoogo n loe a bõang gaare, n nek a rakõap a yiibu ne a biiga Izaak. A wɩɩsa raada sẽn na n tall n yõog maoongã la a rɩka sor ning Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg-a." 
Genesis22:4 Da-tãten-daarã, a Abraam zẽka a neng n yãe zĩigã al yɩɩg-yɩɩga." 
Genesis22:5 A yeela a rakõapã: «Yas-y ka ne bõangã tɩ maam ne m biiga ta taoor n pʋʋs la d lɛɛg n wa paam-y ka.» 
Genesis22:6 A Abraam rɩka maoonga raado n tʋk a Izaak, yẽ meng ra zãada bugum la sʋʋga tɩ b tũud taab n dabda." 
Genesis22:7 A Izaak waa n yeela a ba: «M ba!» T'a leoke: «Yaa wãna, m biiga?» Tɩ biiga yeele: «M nee bugum ne raado la maoonga pe-bila bɛɛ?»" 
Genesis22:8 T'a Abraam na n yeel-a: «Sã n ya maoonga pe-bilã, Wẽnd n na n ges rẽnna.» La b kell n talla kẽnde." 
Genesis22:9 B sẽn ta Wẽnd sẽn wilg zĩig ningã, a Abraam sama kuga, a mee maan-kugri, a sigla raadã a zugu la a sẽba a biig a Izaak n gãnege." 
Genesis22:10 A Abraam tẽega a nug n na n dɩk sʋʋgã n kodg a biiga. 
Genesis22:11 Soaala malɛka bool-a lame: «Abraam, Abraam!» T'a sak: «Naaba!»" 
Genesis22:12 La koɛɛg n yeel-a: «Sõng tɩ f nug ra sɩɩs biiga ye la ra maan-a bũmb ye. Marsã m miime tɩ fo zoeta Wẽnde, fo ka mong-ma f bi-yenda ye.»" 
Genesis22:13 A Abraam zẽka a nenga, a yãee pe-raoogo; kãgr n da gãd a yɩɩlã la a Abraam yõk-a lame n kʋ a biiga zĩigẽ:" 
Genesis22:14 A Abraam pʋda zĩ-kãng tɩ Wẽnd-na-ges ne b maoonga rũnga: tãn-kãng ket n boondame tɩ Wẽnd-na-ges tãnga. 
Genesis22:15 Koɛɛg n le bool a Abraam la a yeel-a lame: 
Genesis22:16 «M wẽend ne m menga, fo sẽn maan woto wã yĩnga, fo sẽn pa mong maam f bi-yendã," 
Genesis22:17 m na sudg f barka, m na kɩt tɩ f buud lebg wʋsgo, b sõor na ta ãds sẽn be yĩngri la bĩisr sẽn dɩg mogr noore, fo yagensã n na n soog b bɛɛba na-tẽnga." 
Genesis22:18 La buud a taaba na n tũ fo maasem n paam barka, fo sẽn deeg m noora yĩnga.»" 
Genesis22:19 A Abraam sigame n babs a rakõapã tɩ b leb Beerseba n tɩ zĩnd be. 
Genesis22:20 A Abraam zĩnda be n wʋm t'a yao a Nawor pag, a Milka, me roga kamba, bãmb la woto:" 
Genesis22:21 a pipi biiga, a Uk; sẽn pʋgde, a Buz, a Kemuwɛl, a Aram ba," 
Genesis22:22 sẽn pʋgd yɛsa, a Kesɛd, a Azo, a Pildas, a Yildaf, a Betuwɛl." 
Genesis22:23 A Betuwɛl n dog a Rebeka; yɩɩ kamb a nii la a Milka kõ a Nawor, a Abraam yao." 
Genesis22:24 A Nawor pag a to me sẽn boond tɩ Rewuma n dog kom-bãmbã: a Teba, a Gaam, a Taas la a Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 A Sara pʋlemd zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm koabg la pisi la a yopoe. 
Genesis23:2 A maana kaalem Kiriyat-Arba, yaa Ebrõ, Kanaã tẽn-peelmẽ. A Abraam waa be, n yãb a Sara kʋʋre." 
Genesis23:3 A Abraam yalsa kũuma zug n yeel a Ɛt kamba: 
Genesis23:4 «Mam siga yãmb wala bu-zẽnd neda la sãana, m kota yaad zĩiga n mum m kũuma.»" 
Genesis23:5 A Ɛt kamba leok-a lame: 
Genesis23:6 «Kelg-y neere, d zu-soaba, ad yãmb yaa wala dĩma Wẽnd sẽn kõ tõndo, dɩlla yãmb tõe n muma y kũuma tõnd yaadẽ, ned ka be n tõe n gɩdg-y tɩ y ra mum y kũuma tõnd yaadẽ ye.»" 
Genesis23:7 A Abraam yikame n sulg a zug a Ɛt kamba taoore," 
Genesis23:8 n yeel-ba: «Yãmb sã n dat tɩ m mum m kũuma, kelg-y-m neere la y yõk a Soar biig, a Efrõ, sɛɛg n kõ-ma." 
Genesis23:9 Kos-y t'a kõ-m Makpela tãn-bokã sẽn yaa a soolem la sẽn be a pʋʋga satmẽ. A kõ-a maam tɩ m na yao a sẽn saag-a tɛka, la m paam n soog-a zãnga n maan yaad zĩiga.»" 
Genesis23:10 A Efrõ da bee a Ɛt kamba sʋka la a meng leoka a Abraam, t'a Ɛt kamba ne tẽnga rãmb zĩi n kelgdẽ:" 
Genesis23:11 «M zu-soaba, kõn yɩ boto ye, la kelg-y m gomda neere, m na n kõ-y-la pʋʋgã ne tãn-bokã, m buuda kamb taoore; yik-y n tɩ mum y kũuma.»" 
Genesis23:12 A Abraam me yikame n sulg a neng tẽnga, bãmb taoore." 
Genesis23:13 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Efrõ la sẽn da gũbg-b yẽnda wã: «M kotame tɩ yãmb me kelg ma: yaa ligd la m na n kɩse, m kotame tɩ f reege tɩ m tõog n mum m kũuma.»" 
Genesis23:14 A Efrõ leokame: 
Genesis23:15 «M zu-soaba kelge, zĩigã y sẽn datã, sõta wakɩ koeems kobs-naase n deege, la rẽ me zema bõe maam ne yãmb tẽnsʋka? Sẽn ya woto wã, tɩ mum y kũuma bala.»" 
Genesis23:16 Ne rẽ fãa a Abraam baas n sõda ligdã wala a Efrõ sẽn wilgã n kõ-a, a Ɛt kamba taoore, la yɩɩ wakɩ koeems kobs-naase wala lɛɛbdba sẽn tar n leebdẽ." 
Genesis23:17 Yɩɩ woto la Abraam paam n sooge a Efrõ pʋʋgã sẽn be Makpela n tot Mambre, pʋʋga la tãn-bokã, pʋʋga la tɩɩsã sẽn be a pʋgẽ." 
Genesis23:18 B lebga a Abraam soolem, t'a Ɛt kamba la sẽn kẽed b tẽnga fãa mi tiiri." 
Genesis23:19 Woto me la a Abraam tõog n mum a Sara Makpela tãng bokẽ, Makpela tota ne Mambre, tɩ kẽer boond tɩ Ebrõ la yaa Kanaã rãmb tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Genesis23:20 Yɩɩ woto yɛsa, la pʋʋga ne tãn-bokã yi a Ɛt kamb nugẽ n lebg a Abraam soolem la yaad zĩiga." 
Genesis24:1 A Abraam da kʋʋlame, a yʋʋma da lebga wʋsgo la a da paama Soaala-Wẽnd barka a tʋʋma fãa pʋgẽ." 
Genesis24:2 Dẽ la a waa n yeel a sõgen-kãsenga: «Dɩk f nug n sɩɩs m gerã," 
Genesis24:3 la f wẽen ne Wẽnnaam, yĩngr la tẽng Soaala, tɩ f kõn bao pag kaalẽ, Kanaã rãmb sʋka, n kõ a Izaak ye." 
Genesis24:4 Yaa m ba-yir la m buudẽ la f na n kẽng n tɩ bao pag n wa kõ m biig a Izaak.» 
Genesis24:5 Sõgna leokame: «Daare paga wat n yeelame t'a kõn tũ maam n wa ka ye, yãmb biiga sã n tũ maam n leb y ba-yira ka sãoo?»" 
Genesis24:6 A Abraam leokame: «Da saag bada n tall m biigã n leb be ye. 
Genesis24:7 Wẽnd la dũni fãa Soaala yiisa maam m ba zakẽ la m yaab rãmb tẽngẽ, la b kãab-m lame tɩ b na kõ-m kamb la yagens kaanẽ. Dẽ yĩnga b na lʋɩɩs b ned f taoore tɩ f tɩ bao pag beenẽ n wa kõ m biigã." 
Genesis24:8 Paga sã n zãgs t'a kõn tũ n wa, taal yi-la f zugu, la bada ne bada-bila, da tall m biigã n kẽng be ye.»" 
Genesis24:9 Sõgna sɩɩsa a Abraam gere la a wẽename. 
Genesis24:10 Sõgna kẽe a zu-soaba bãgrẽ n yiis yʋgma piiga n paas a zu-soaba arzɛka la a looga Mezopotami, a Nawor tẽnga." 
Genesis24:11 A sẽn ta a Nawor tẽnga, a yalsa yʋgma wã tẽnga noore, zafare, pagba sẽn wat n yõngd kooma wakato." 
Genesis24:12 A yeelame: «Soaala, m zu-soaba Abraam Wẽnnaam, zĩnd-y ne maam dũnna n wilg-m tɩ y sɩd nonga m zu-soab a Abraam." 
Genesis24:13 Ade, mam yɛsa bulga sɛɛga, la tẽnga kom-pugli na n wa yõnga koom." 
Genesis24:14 Dɩlla m sẽn na n yeel bi-pugl ninga: ‹Pʋdg f yʋʋra koom n kõ ma,› t'a yeele: ‹Yũ la f bas tɩ m yũnug y yʋgma,› bɩ bi-kãng yɩ yãmb sẽn segl a soab a Izaak yĩnga, la woto m na bãng yãmb nonglem ne m zu-soaba.»" 
Genesis24:15 A pa yãe n gom n sɛ, la a Rebeka sẽn wa ne a yʋʋre. A ra yaa a Betuwɛl biiga la a Betuwɛl ma la a Milka, a Milka sɩd la a Nawor, a Nawor ne a Abraam yaa ba-biisi." 
Genesis24:16 Bi-pugla neng da yaa neere al wʋsgo; a ra nan yaa pʋg-sɛda. A taa bulgã n pids a yʋʋre n na n looge. 
Genesis24:17 Sõgna zoe n taame n yeel-a: «Bas tɩ m yũ f yʋʋra koom.» 
Genesis24:18 T'a yeele: «M zu-soaba, yũ-y!» La tao-tao bala a kɩlla a yʋʋrã n kõ-a t'a yũ." 
Genesis24:19 A sẽn yũ n sɛ la bi-pugla sẽn yeele: «M na n tooga kooma n kõ y yʋgma tɩ b fãa yũ n tɩge.» 
Genesis24:20 A budga a yʋʋrã gaolga pʋga n leb bulgẽ wã n tɩ toog la a maana woto tɩ koom wa sek yʋgma wã fãa. 
Genesis24:21 Rakõora ra sĩnda a noor n yɛs n getẽ la a sokd a menga: Soaala-Wẽnd na n manega m sorã bɩ b ka na n manege? 
Genesis24:22 Yʋgma wã sẽn yũ n tɩge, dao wã yiisa sãnem kalem-bãng sẽn zɩse n sog bi-pugla yõore la a rɩka kags a yiibu zɩslem me sẽn pa paoode n pid a kamse," 
Genesis24:23 la a yeel-a: «M kotame tɩ fo togs maam fo sẽn ya ned ning biiga la f wilg-ma m sã n tõe n yõga gãag-sobendo f ba wã zakẽ?» 
Genesis24:24 Tɩ biiga leok: «M yaa a Betuwɛl biiga; a Betuwɛl yaa a Milka biiga la a Milka sɩd la a Nawor.» 
Genesis24:25 A le paasame: «Mood la yamd bee wʋsgo la zĩig sẽn na n yõg gãag-sobend ka tõe n kong ye.» 
Genesis24:26 Rakõora sulga a neng n pʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnde," 
Genesis24:27 n yetẽ: «M zu-soaba, a Abraam Wẽnnaam, paam barka; b pa solg b zood la b nonglem ne m zu-soaba ye. B talla maam tɩrga n tɩ kẽes m zu-soaba ba-biig zakẽ.»" 
Genesis24:28 Bi-pugla wudg n leba yiri, a sẽn ta zakẽ a togsa a ma fãa." 
Genesis24:29 A ra tara kẽema sẽn boond tɩ Labã la a Labã zoe tao-tao n tees bulga sẽnẽ n na n tɩ seg a Abraam dakõorã. 
Genesis24:30 A sẽn yãe kalem-bãngã la kagsã, a sẽn tẽeg a tão wã sẽn togs tɩ rao wã goma woto la woto, a tɩ seg-a-la ne a yʋgma, bulga sɛɛga." 
Genesis24:31 A yeel-a lame: «Waa-y yã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn ning a soab barka. Bõe tɩ yãmb yɛs yɩnga? M pɩɩga m zaka la m segla zĩig yʋgma wã yĩnga.»" 
Genesis24:32 Rao wã ta-la a Labã zakẽ, a looda yʋgma n bao yamd la rɩɩb n kõ-ba, n bao koom n kõ dakõorã ne a tũud-n-taas tɩ b waas b nao." 
Genesis24:33 B waa n tẽgna rɩɩb a taoore t'a yet t'a kõn dɩ t'a ka reng n togs a sẽn tar n na n togsa ye. Dẽ la a Labã yeel-a: «Gome!» 
Genesis24:34 T'a na n yeele «Mam yaa a Abraam dakõore. 
Genesis24:35 Soaala-Wẽnd ninga m zu-soaba barka la a lebga arzɛk kãseng soaba, a tara rũms wʋsgo, bɛd la bõonego, a tara wanzurf la sãnem, yem-daado la yem-pogse, yʋgma la bõeense." 
Genesis24:36 M zu-soaba sẽn waa n kʋʋle, a pag a Sara doga biiga la a ratame tɩ bi-kãng soog a paoong fãa." 
Genesis24:37 M zu-soaba kɩtame tɩ m wẽene tɩ m kõn bao pag Kanaã kom-pugli wã sʋk n kõ a biiga ye; 
Genesis24:38 a tol n paasame: ‹Yell na pak-fo, f sã n ka leb m buudẽ, m saam-dãmba tẽngẽ, n bao pag n kõ m biigã!›" 
Genesis24:39 Wakat kãnga, m yeelame: ‹Daare paga ka na n sak n tũu n wa ye,›" 
Genesis24:40 t'a leok ma: ‹Wẽnd ninga m sẽn kẽn a soab taoor n ta rũnna wã na lʋɩɩs a ned f taoore, a na tall foom n taas f sorã, la ya m ba zakẽ biiga la f na n tall n wa kõ a Izaak." 
Genesis24:41 Taal sẽn na n yi f zug daare, yaa f sẽn na n ta mam buudẽ. Le yaa f sẽn na n ta buudẽ wã tɩ buuda zãgse.›" 
Genesis24:42 M sẽn ta bulga sɛɛg dũnna, m pʋʋsa m sũurẽ: ‹M Soaala, m zu-soaba Abraam Wẽnnaam, m kotame tɩ y wilg ma, m sora sã n zemsame," 
Genesis24:43 m na n yalsa bulga sɛɛga, la sõng-y tɩ biig ning sẽn na n wa yõng koom tɩ m yeel-a: Kõ maam f yʋʋra koom bilf tɩ m yũ," 
Genesis24:44 t'a leoke: Yũ-y la y bas tɩ m bao koom n kõ y yʋgma wã, sõng-y tɩ bi-kãng yɩ pag ning yamb sẽn tũusi n na n kõ m zu-soaba biiga.›" 
Genesis24:45 M pa yãe n pʋʋs n sɛ la a Rebeka sẽn yi ne yʋʋre, a waa bulgẽ wã n toog koom tɩ m yeel-a: ‹Sã n ta f yam, m kot-f-la koom n yũ.›" 
Genesis24:46 Tao-tao bala, a sika a yʋʋrã n yeel-ma: ‹Yũ-y la y bas tɩ m toog koom n kõ y yʋgma.› Mam yũume la m rũmsa me paamame n yũ." 
Genesis24:47 Tɩ m na n sok bi-puglã: ‹Fo ya ãnda biiga?› T'a yet t'a yaa a Betuwɛl biiga la a Betuwɛl yaa a Nawor pag a Milka biiga. M yiisa sãnem kalem-bãnga n sog a yõore la m n ninga kagse a kamsẽ. 
Genesis24:48 M sẽn yĩgimdi, m waooga Soaala, m zu-soaba Abraam Wẽnnaam tɩ b kɩtame tɩ m sor yɩ sõngo, tɩ m paam pag sẽn ya m zu-soaba yagenga." 
Genesis24:49 La marsã yãmb sã n dat n maan m zu-soaba neere bɩ y togs-ma. Y sã n ka rat me bɩ y togs-ma tɩ m bãng m sẽn lebdẽ, goabg bɩ rɩtgo.»" 
Genesis24:50 A Labã ne a Betuwɛl yeelame: «Woto bee ne Soaala-Wẽnde, tõnd yẽ ka tar sẽn na leok tɩ n-yẽe bɩ ayoo!" 
Genesis24:51 Ad-a Rebeka sẽn yẽs f taoore, peeg-a tɩ y kuli t'a tɩ lebg f zu-soaba bi-paga, wala Soaala sẽn date.»" 
Genesis24:52 A Abraam dakõorã sẽn wʋm b leokrã a wõgemda Soaal Wẽnd taoore. 
Genesis24:53 A yiisa sãnem la wanzurf teedo n paas futu n kõ a Rebeka, a bao kũun sõma n kõ a ma la a kẽema." 
Genesis24:54 Zaka rãmb me kõo sõgna ne a tũud-n-taasa rɩɩb tɩ b rɩ n yaool n kẽ gãaga. B sẽn vẽeg beoogo, dakõora yeelame: «M kotame n leb m zu-soaba nengẽ.»" 
Genesis24:55 T'a Rebeka ma la a tão yeele: «Bas-y bi-pugla t'a kell n yaas dasem a yiibu bɩ dasem piig t'a na yaool n kuli.» 
Genesis24:56 Dẽ la dakõora leok yã: «Da tadg-y-m ka ye, Soaala togl-m-la so-sõngo, bas-y tɩ m leb m zu-soaba nengẽ.»" 
Genesis24:57 Tɩ b leok-a: «Sã n ya woto d na n boola bi-puglã n bãng a raabo.» 
Genesis24:58 B boola a Rebeka n sok-a: «Fo rat n tũ n loogame?» T'a leoke: «N-yẽe!» 
Genesis24:59 La b basa a Rebeka ne a ma-wubdga, tɩ b loog ne a Abraam dakõorã la a tũud-n-taasã." 
Genesis24:60 B kãaba a Rebeka kãab noodo: «D tão sõngo, Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f wek n lebg bu-yalengo, Wẽnd na kõ f yagensã b bɛɛba na-tẽng tɩ b sooge.»" 
Genesis24:61 A Rebeka ne a yem-pogsã zomba yʋgma n pʋg a Abraam dakõorã; a Rebeka tũ-a lame n looge. 
Genesis24:62 A Izaak da yii Layi-Royi bãka sẽn beẽ wã n wa Negɛb zĩ-peen-daagẽ. 
Genesis24:63 Zĩig sẽn maage, a Izaak yiime n na n pemse la a sẽn zẽk a nenga, a yãee yʋgma sẽn wate." 
Genesis24:64 A Rebeka me sẽn doog a nenga, a yãee a Izaak la a yɩk n tiimda tẽnga." 
Genesis24:65 A soka dakõorã: «M ba bõe n segd tõnd weoogẽ ka?» Tɩ rakõora yeele: «Yaa mam zu-soabã.» A sẽn wʋm woto a bao peende n lud a nenga. 
Genesis24:66 Rakõora togsa a Izaak bũmb ning fãa sẽn maane. 
Genesis24:67 A Izaak talla a Rebeka n kẽes a roogẽ; a reeg-a lame n maan a paga la b ra nonga taaba; yaa woto la a Izaak sũur maag bilfu t'a ra ket n yãbda a ma kaalem. 
Genesis25:1 A Abraam le rɩka pag a to sẽn boond tɩ Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Yẽ kamba la woto: a Zĩmrã, a Yoksã, a Medã, a Madiã, a Yisbak la a Suwa." 
Genesis25:3 A Yoksã n dog a Seba la a Dedã; A Dedã kamb la Asuritse, Letuzitse la Lewumimitse." 
Genesis25:4 A Madiã kamba: a Eyifa, a Efɛr, a Anok, a Abida, a Elda; b zãng fãa yaa a Ketura kamba." 
Genesis25:5 A Abraam rɩka a paoongã n kõ a Izaak. 
Genesis25:6 Sã n ya pagb a taaba kamba, a Abraam yãee kũuni n kõ-ba. A ka bas-b tɩ b lagem ne a Izaak ye, a zãag-b lame, b teesa yaanga." 
Genesis25:7 A Abraam yʋʋma yɩɩ koabg la pisopoe la a nu 
Genesis25:8 t'a yaool n maan kaalem. A tɩga raar la yʋʋma, a kʋʋlem yɩ-a-la noogo. A waa n tɩ saka a saam-dãmba." 
Genesis25:9 A kamba, a Izaak ne a Ismayɛl tɩ mum-a-la Makpela tãnga bokẽ, Ititga a Soar biig, a Efrõ, pʋʋgẽ, Mambre taoore." 
Genesis25:10 Pʋʋga yaa pʋʋg ning a Abraam sẽn da a Ɛt kamba nengẽ; yaa be la b mum a Abraam ne a Sara. 
Genesis25:11 A Abraam kũuma poore, a Izaak kell n paama Soaala-Wẽnd barka; a ti-la a zak Layi-Royi bulga sɛɛga." 
Genesis25:12 A Ismayɛl doog la woto: a ba yaa a Abraam, t'a ma yaa a Agar, Ezipt tẽng paga, a Sara doog-biiga." 
Genesis25:13 A Ismayɛl kamba ne a buuda sagsa yʋy la woto: pipi soaba la a Nebayot, a yiib soaba, a Kedar; dẽ poore, a Adbeyɛl, a Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 a Misma, a Duma, a Masa," 
Genesis25:15 a Adad, a Tema, a Yetur, a Nafis la a Kedma." 
Genesis25:16 Woto la a Ismayɛl kamba. Ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre. Ned kam fãa ra tara a weoog la a sik n kẽedẽ. Buuda kãsem-dãmb da yaa piig la a yiibu. 
Genesis25:17 A Ismayɛl yʋʋm yɩɩ koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe t'a yaool n ki. A sẽn ki, b mum-a-la ne a saam-dãmba." 
Genesis25:18 Yẽnda buud n da kẽed Avila weoogo n tãag Sur sẽn be Ezipt yaanga, f sã n dabd Asiri. A soolma da tota a yaopa soolem. B ra ya yagse la b moora ra ka zemsd taab ye." 
Genesis25:19 A Izaak kibar la woto: a Abraam n dog a Izaak. 
Genesis25:20 A Izaak yʋʋm da ta pis-naase a sẽn waa n na n peeg a Rebeka. A Rebeka ba la a Betuwɛl, ya Padã-Aram neda; a Rebeka kẽem la a Labã, Aram tẽnga." 
Genesis25:21 A Izaak pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd n kos sõngre, a paga yĩnga, t'a da ka rogd ye. Soaala-Wẽnd deega a kosgo la a Rebeka rɩka pʋga." 
Genesis25:22 A Rebeka waa n mikame tɩ kamb n maood a pʋgẽ, t'a kelem: «Sã n ya woto, m sẽn dɩk pʋga yõod la bʋgo?» A yikame n tɩ gom ne Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Genesis25:23 Tɩ b yeel-a: «Ad yaa buud sags a yiib n be f pʋgẽ, kamb a yiib la f na n doge la b na n welga taaba, biig a ye n na n tõog a to, kãsma n na n lebg yao wã sõgne.»" 
Genesis25:24 A Rogma sẽn waa n ta, a Rebeka bãngame tɩ na n yɩɩ kinkirsi." 
Genesis25:25 Sẽn yi-a pipi soaba da yaa moɛɛga la yĩn-kõabneng soaba; b pʋda yẽ tɩ Ezayu. 
Genesis25:26 A to wã n pʋgl dogem la a nuga ra gãda a Ezayu nao-kãsenkãare; b boola yẽ t'a Zakoob. B rogma wakat t'a Izaak yʋʋm yaa pisoobe. 
Genesis25:27 Kamba waa n bɩɩme t'a Ezayu lebg tãoosa la we-gõaada; a Zakoob yẽ da zĩ-la a zĩ-yɛnga n pa zãagd ne yir ye. 
Genesis25:28 A Izaak ra nong a Ezayu tɩ we-nemda ra tata a yam; a Rebeka yẽ ra nonga a Zakoob. 
Genesis25:29 Daar a ye, a Zakoob rʋga a rɩɩbo; a Ezayu yii weoogẽ n wa ne yaamse la a yeela a Zakoob:" 
Genesis25:30 «Kom n tar maam, yãk f rɩɩba sẽn moog ne rʋkã n kõ-ma.» Dẽ me la b pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ Edom." 
Genesis25:31 A Zakoob yeelame: «Bɩ f reng n koos f kãsenga ne maam.» 
Genesis25:32 T'a Ezayu yeele: «M kiidame tɩ m kãsengã paas m bõe?» 
Genesis25:33 A Zakoob yeelame: «Bɩ f reng n wẽen!» La a wẽename n koos a kãsengo. 
Genesis25:34 A Zakoob yaoola marsã n kõ-a buri la bɛnga; a rɩɩme la a yũ, la a yik n looge. A Ezayu pa pẽg a kãsengo wala a zema bũmb ye." 
Genesis26:1 Kom n waa n lʋɩ tẽngã, la rẽ n tõkd a yiib soaba, t'a ye me n zoe n zĩnd pĩnda, a Abraam wakato. A Izaak yi n kẽnga Gerar, Filisti dĩm, a Abimelɛk, nengẽ." 
Genesis26:2 Soaala lika a Izaak n yeel-a: «Da ta Ezipt tẽng ye, tek n pa tẽng ning m sẽn na n wilg-fo." 
Genesis26:3 Pa tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ tɩ m na n zĩnda ne foo la f na n paama m barka, m na n dɩka tẽngã n kõ foo ne f buudu. M na n pidsa m pʋlengo, pʋleng ning sẽn pʋlem a Abraam, fo ba-roakã." 
Genesis26:4 M na kɩt tɩ f yagensã sõor yɩ wala yĩngr ãdse, m na n kõ-b-la tẽns zembala la dũni wã zãng na n tũu bãmb maasem n paam barka." 
Genesis26:5 M na n maan-f-la woto t'a Abraam yɩɩ sakda, a reega m goam la m sẽn yals fãa, a maana m sẽn yeel-a t'a maan.»" 
Genesis26:6 Yɩɩ gomd kãng yĩnga la a Izaak pa Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Tẽnga rãmb waa n leok-a-la a paga poorẽ tɩ yẽ yeele: «Yaa m tão.» A zoe rabeem t'a sã n yeele: «Yaa m paga,» b na n kʋ-a lame. A Rebeka ra yaa neer wʋsgo." 
Genesis26:8 A Izaak sẽn kẽ Gerar n maan dasem a wãna la a Abimelɛk sẽn ges a roog võorẽ n yãend a Izaak ne a Rebeka tɩ b sõsd ne taaba. 
Genesis26:9 A Abimelɛk kɩtame tɩ b bool a Izaak la a yeel-a lame: «M tara kaseto tɩ paga yaa fo paga! Fo yɩɩ wãn n leoke: ‹Yaa m tão?› » A Izaak yeelame: «Ade, mam da tagsame tɩ b tõe n kʋ-m lame, paga poorẽ.»" 
Genesis26:10 A Abimelɛk le sok-a lame: «Yaa bõe la f maan woto? Kellẽ la bilfu tɩ tẽnga nin-yend yõgẽ f pagã n tak yell kãseng d fãa zugu.» 
Genesis26:11 A Abimelɛk kõ-la a soolma rãmb no-kãnga: «Ned ninga fãa sẽn sɩɩsa nin-kãnga ne a paga, bɩ b kʋ-a!»" 
Genesis26:12 A Izaak bʋda a pʋʋgo la a sẽn paam kood yʋʋm kãng yɩɩga a sẽn paam yʋʋm a taaba naoor koabga. Wẽnnaam bark sɩd sig-a lame.
