Genesis26:13 A arzɛka paasame n paase, t'a wa lebg rakãagre. A waa n lʋɩ-la a taaba fãa taoore. A yʋʋr waa n yiime." 
Genesis26:14 A waa n paama rũms ka tɛka, bɛd la bõonego la sõgen-kamb wʋsgo. Dẽ la Filisti rãmb waa n yik n maand sũ-kiir ne-a." 
Genesis26:15 Buls niyns a Abraam dakõap sẽn tu a Abraam wakatẽ, Filisti rãmb da lɛɛg n yẽd-b-la ne tãndo." 
Genesis26:16 A Abimelɛk yeela a Izaak: «Yi d tẽngẽ tɩ marsã fo pãng yɩɩda tõndo!» 
Genesis26:17 A Izaak sak n yiime n tɩ ti a zak Gerar bãoogẽ. 
Genesis26:18 A Izaak kɩtame tɩ b yẽeg buls niyns sẽn da tu a ba wakatẽ tɩ Filisti rãmba lɛɛg n yẽdã. Bulg fãa le reega yʋʋr ninga a Abraam sẽn da kõ-a. 
Genesis26:19 A Izaak rakõapa waa n tɩ tuka zĩig a ye n paam koom sẽn bun n pa sɛtẽ ye. 
Genesis26:20 La Gerar dũm-kɩɩmba yika zabr ne a Izaak rakõapa n yet tɩ bulga yaa bãmb bulga. A Izaak pʋda bul-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Esɛk, tɩ zabr n zĩnd a poorẽ." 
Genesis26:21 B le tuka bulg a to tɩ rẽ me le yɩ zabre t'a pʋd-a tɩ Sitna. 
Genesis26:22 B zãaga zĩig n tuk bulg a to la zabr pa zĩnd a poorẽ ye t'a pʋd-a tɩ Reobot, n yetẽ: «Marsã Wẽnd kõ-d-la ween-vɩʋʋgo tɩ d paoong tõog n paase.»" 
Genesis26:23 A waa n yii be n dig Beerseba. 
Genesis26:24 Ba raar yʋngo, Soaala-Wẽnd lik-a lame n yeel-a: «Maam la f ba, a Abraam, Wẽnnaam. Da maan dabeem baa bilfu tɩ m bee ne foom. M na n ninga foo barka, m na n kɩtame tɩ f buud lebg wʋsgo, a Abraam maasem yĩnga.»" 
Genesis26:25 Zĩ-kãnga, a Izaak mee maan-kugri n waoog Soaala-Wẽnd, a tii roog be t'a rakõapa tuk bulga." 
Genesis26:26 A Abimelɛk yii Gerar n wa ges a Izaak; a zoa Awuzat n paas a tãnsoaba Pikol tũ-a lame n wa. 
Genesis26:27 A Izaak yeel-b lame: «Y wata m nengẽ bõe yĩnga, yãmb ka kisg maam n dig maam n yiis y tẽngẽ bɩ?»" 
Genesis26:28 Tɩ b leoke: «Tõnd bãnga neer marsã tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd bee ne foom tɩ d yet tɩ f wa tɩ d yõg zoodo. 
Genesis26:29 Wẽen tɩ f kõn maan-d bũmb ye, tɩ tõnd ka zab ne foom ye, d maan-f-la neere, d bas-f lame tɩ f yi ne laafi la ade, rũnna, fo lebga ned sẽn tar Soaala-Wẽnd barka.»" 
Genesis26:30 A Izaak segla rɩɩbo la sɩda, b rɩ yã, b yũ yã." 
Genesis26:31 B vẽega beoog n yõg zood ne taaba t'a Izaak bas-b tɩ b kuli, la b sɩd looga ne laafi." 
Genesis26:32 Yaool n yɩɩ baraare la a Izaak rakõapa waa n togs b sẽn da tuud bulg a ye kibare: b pooga koom. 
Genesis26:33 Dẽ la b pʋd bulgã tɩ Sibea, wẽenego, la yaa rẽ la b ket n boond tẽnga rũnna tɩ Beerseba, wẽeneg bulga." 
Genesis26:34 A Ezayu yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta pis-naase, a kẽe kãadem ne pagb a yiibu: a ye la a Yewudit, Ititga Beeri biiga, a to: a Baasmat, Ititga Elon biiga." 
Genesis26:35 A Izaak ne a Rebeka yãee naong wʋsgo pʋg-kãens poorẽ. 
Genesis27:1 A Izaak waa n kʋʋlame, a nina waa n pa le ne bũmb ye; a boola a bi-kẽeng a Ezayu: «M biiga!» T'a leok: «Naaba!»" 
Genesis27:2 A Izaak paasame: «Fo ne-la, m kʋʋlame, m ka mi m loogr daar ye." 
Genesis27:3 Rẽ yĩnga, rɩk f teedo, f lok ne f tãpo, kẽ weoogã n wa ne rũnga;" 
Genesis27:4 segl-a wala mam sẽn datã n tall n wa tɩ m dɩ la m paam n ning f bark tɩ m nan ket ne yõore.» 
Genesis27:5 Mik a Izaak sẽn waa n gomdã t'a Rebeka zĩi n kelgdame. A Ezayu yik n kẽe weoogo n na n bao rũng n wa kõ a ba. 
Genesis27:6 A Rebeka soos n yeela a biiga Zakoob: «Mars-marsa bala, m wʋma f ba sẽn yeel a Ezayu:" 
Genesis27:7 ‹Wa ne weoog rũnga, segl dɩ-noog n kõ-ma, tɩ m dɩ la m ning-f barka, Soaala-Wẽnd maasmẽ, n yaool n ki.›" 
Genesis27:8 Sẽn ya woto wã, m biiga, kelg la f maan m sẽn na n yeel-f fãa." 
Genesis27:9 Babs rũmsã, tɩ wa ne bʋ-poal a yiibu tɩ m na segl dɩɩbo wala f ba sẽn datã." 
Genesis27:10 Fo na yaool marsã n tɩ kɩs f ba t'a rɩ la a ning f barka la a looge.» 
Genesis27:11 Dẽ la a Zakoob yeel a ma: «Gese, a Ezayu yaa yĩn-kõabneng soaba la mam yĩnga yaa saalle." 
Genesis27:12 M zoeta m ba na n wa babl n bãng tɩ m tudg-a lame t'a bas kãab noogo n kãab-m wẽnga.» 
Genesis27:13 T'a Rebeka leoke: «Bas tɩ kãab wẽnga lʋɩta mam zugu, fo wee n kelg-m bala la f tɩ wa ne bʋʋsã.»" 
Genesis27:14 A Zakoob tɩ waa ne bʋ-poal a yiibu t'a ma reeg n segl dɩɩbo wala a Izaak sẽn da rata. 
Genesis27:15 A Rebeka tũusa a bi-kẽenga, a Ezayu, fu neeba sẽn dag n be a roogẽ, n yeelg a Zakoob." 
Genesis27:16 A rɩka bʋʋsa gãnd n lud a kamse la a yubla sẽn da ya saalgã. 
Genesis27:17 A rɩka rɩɩbã sẽn seglã n kɩs-a. 
Genesis27:18 A Zakoob sẽn ta a ba taoore, a yeelame: «M ba!» T'a leoke: «M sakame! La foo la m biig a bõe?»" 
Genesis27:19 Tao-tao t'a Zakoob yeelame: «Mam yaa yãmb bi-kẽenga, a Ezayu, m maana wala y sẽn yeelã, yik-y n zĩnd-y n dɩ tãoosga rɩɩbo, la y sik y bark m zugu.»" 
Genesis27:20 T'a Izaak na n yeel a Zakoob: «Ad-f maana tao-tao wɛ, m biiga!» T'a leoke: «Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n sõng-ma.»" 
Genesis27:21 A Izaak kos-a lame: «Kolg tɩ babl-fo. Fo sɩd yaa m biig a Ezayu bɩ ned a to?» 
Genesis27:22 A Zakoob kolgame la a ba, a Izayi, sẽn babl-a a yeelame: «Koɛɛga yaa a Zakoob koɛɛga la kamsa yaa a Ezayu kamse!»" 
Genesis27:23 Woto wã a pa tõog n bãng vẽenega, t'a Zakoob kamsa da yaa kõbdo wala a biig a Ezayu dẽnna, la a ning-a-la barka." 
Genesis27:24 A baas n le sok-a lame: «Fo sɩd ya m biiga Ezayu?» Tɩ yẽ yeele: «N-yẽe!» 
Genesis27:25 A Izaak yeelame: «Bɩ f wa ne f tãoosga rɩɩbo, m bi-sõngo, tɩ m dɩ la m kãab-f noogo.» A kõ-la a ba wã rɩɩbã t'a rɩ n le paas rãam t'a yũ." 
Genesis27:26 A Izaak yeel-a lame: «Kolg wɛ, m biiga, n mobg ma.»" 
Genesis27:27 T'a sɩd kolg n mobg a ba. A ba wã wʋma a futa yũugu; a ninga a biiga bark woto: «M biiga yũugu yaa wa pʋʋg yũugu, pʋʋg sẽn womd wʋsgo, sẽn paam Soaal barka." 
Genesis27:28 Wẽnd na kõ foo yĩngr meenem n kõ-f pʋt sẽn sakd koodo, n kõ-f kood la rãam." 
Genesis27:29 Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ buud ka tɛka wa wõgemd f taoore. Lebg f ba-biisa zu-soaba, la f ma kamb wõgemd f taoore. Sẽn na n kãab-a foom wẽnga, bɩ wẽnga pa ne yẽ soaba; sẽn na n kãab foom kãab noogo, bɩ nooga pa ne yẽ soaba.»" 
Genesis27:30 A Izaak sẽn ning a Zakoob bark n sɛ, t'a me nan yit a ba roogẽ, la a kẽema Ezayu sẽn yi weoogẽ n wa." 
Genesis27:31 Yẽ me segla rɩɩbo n tɩ kɩs a ba n yeel a ba: «M gõo weoogo n wa ne rɩɩbo, yik n dɩ m tãoosga rɩɩbo la f ning m barka.»" 
Genesis27:32 T'a Izaak na n soke: «Foom la ãnna?» T'a yeele: «M yaa m ba bi-kẽenga, a Ezayu.»" 
Genesis27:33 A Izaak yɛɛsa wʋsgo la a yeelame: «Dɩlla m ba bõe n wa ne weoog rɩɩb ka tɩ m dɩ wã? Mam dɩɩme tɩ fo nan pa wa ye la m zoe n ninga barka la barka na n kell n paa yẽ soaba zugu.» 
Genesis27:34 A Ezayu sẽn wʋm a ba leokre, a kelma ne sũ-sãanga la a kot a ba: «M ba, ning-y maam me barka!»" 
Genesis27:35 T'a leoke: «Ad-f yao wã soos n waame n deeg f barka.» 
Genesis27:36 A Ezayu yeelame: «B ka be bʋʋm n boond-a t'a Yõk-n-dɛɛs sɩda? Pĩnda yɩ m kãsengo la a reeg yã la rũnna ya m barka; la m ba sõngo, yãmb pa kees bark bilf mam yĩng laa?»" 
Genesis27:37 T'a Izaak leoke: «M yeel-a lame t'a yɩ f zu-soaba, t'a saam-biisa fãa lebg a sõgen-kamba; mam kãab-a-la kood la rãam, bõe la m tõe n le maan f yĩng marsã, m biiga?»" 
Genesis27:38 A Ezayu yeela a ba: «Woto la fo kãabga tɛka, m ba? Bao kãab nood a taab n kãab maam me!» A Izaak ka tõog n leok tɩ bũmb ye, t'a Ezayu na n sɩng yãbre." 
Genesis27:39 A ba wã kong n yeel-a lame: «F yira na zãag ne pʋt sẽn sakd koodo, n zãag ne yĩngr sa-koom." 
Genesis27:40 Fo na n dɩ-la f pãngẽ, f na n yɩɩ f yao wã sõgne n tãag wakat ninga f sẽn na n zãens n yi a soolmẽ.»" 
Genesis27:41 A Zakoob sẽn deeg a Ezayu barka tẽka, b lebga beem ne taaba; a Ezayu yeela a sũurẽ: «Kõn leb n zãag tɩ m maan m ba kʋʋr ye, la yaa wakat kãng la m na n kʋ a Zakoob.»" 
Genesis27:42 B rɩka a Ezayu goama n taas a Rebeka, dẽ la a bool a Zakoob n yeel-a: «F kẽema Ezayu dat n kʋ-f lame n dok a sũuri." 
Genesis27:43 Dɩlla, m biiga, reeg m noore, yik n zoe n bʋʋg m kẽema, a Labã, Aram tẽnga." 
Genesis27:44 Be la f na n tɩ zĩnd bilfu t'a Ezayu sũur maage," 
Genesis27:45 t'a yĩm fo sẽn maan-a bũmb ning la a bas taale; wakat kãnga m na tʋm tɩ b tɩ bool fo; ka rẽnna yaa yãmb y yiib kʋʋre la b na n naag n yãb daar a yembre.» 
Genesis27:46 A Rebeka le yeela a Izaak: «A Ɛt kom-pugli wã kɩtame tɩ m yam yi ne vɩɩm. M biiga Zakoob sã n bao tẽn-kãnga biig n maan a paga, pag sẽn yit a Ɛt buudẽ, ad-y m vɩɩma ka le be yamleoog ye. M kõn le tõog n vɩɩnd tẽng zug ye.»" 
Genesis28:1 A Izaak boola a Zakoob n le ning a barka la a yeel-a: «Da saag n bao pag Kanaã tẽng ye. 
Genesis28:2 Yik n kẽng Padã-Aram, f yaab a Betuwɛl nengẽ n tɩ bao biig be n maan f paga, Bao biig f ma-kẽema a Labã kamb sʋka." 
Genesis28:3 Bɩ Wẽnd pãng soab ning f barka, tɩ f rog la f wek n lebg bu-yalengo." 
Genesis28:4 Bɩ Wẽnd Pãng soab kõ foom ne f yagensã bark ning a Abraam sẽn paam a soabã, n soog tẽng ning f sẽn na n zĩnd a soab pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis28:5 A Izaak basa a Zakoob t'a loog Padã-Aram tẽnga, a Labã nengẽ. A Labã da yaa Aram tẽng a Betuwɛl biiga la a Rebeka kẽema; a Rebeka yaa Ezayu la a Zakoob ma." 
Genesis28:6 A Izaak sẽn ning a Zakoob barka la a tʋm-a Padã-Aram t'a tɩ bao pag beelẽ, a Ezayu tẽegame t'a Izaak ra kõ-a-la noor kãnga: «Da saag n yi kãadem ne Kanaã bi-pugl ye.»" 
Genesis28:7 A Zakoob deega a ba ne a ma noore n kẽng Padã-Aram. 
Genesis28:8 Woto la a Ezayu bãng t'a ba wã ka nong Kanaã rãmb ye. 
Genesis28:9 Yẽ me kẽnga a Ismayɛl buudẽ n tɩ rɩk pag n paase. A yʋʋr la a Maalat; yaa a Ismayɛl bi-pugla la a Ismayɛl ba la a Abraam; a Maalat le yaa a Nebayot tão. 
Genesis28:10 A Zakoob yii Beerseba n dɩk Aram tẽng sore. 
Genesis28:11 Zĩ-sobdo, a waa n yãenda zĩig n gãand be. A yãee kugr n dɩk-a n kʋgl a zugu n gũsi." 
Genesis28:12 A zãmsame, la ade, raodg n da sel tẽnga n yaool n lug n kul yĩngri, tɩ Wẽnd malɛk rãmb tũud-a n dʋʋd la b sigda." 
Genesis28:13 A yãee Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b yɛs a taoore la b goma woto: «Maam la Soaala, f yaab, a Abraam, Wẽnnaam la f ba, a Izaak, Wẽnnaam, fo sẽn gãe tẽng ningã, m dɩkd-a lame n kõt foo ne f yagense." 
Genesis28:14 F yagensa sõor na n yɩɩ wʋsgo, wa tẽng bĩisri; yaang la taoore, goabg la rɩtgo, mooga tõr fãa na n tũu foo ne f kamba maasem, n paam barka." 
Genesis28:15 M bee ne foom, f sẽn dabd zĩig ning fãa m na yɩ f gũuda la f na le lɛɛg n wa. M na n pidsa m kãabg fãa la m kõn yi f poorẽ abada!»" 
Genesis28:16 A Zakoob sẽn neke, a goma ne a meng la a yeelame: «Sɩd sɩda Soaala-Wẽnd bee zĩ-kãnga la m da ka mi ye!»" 
Genesis28:17 Rabeem yõk-a lame t'a yeele: «Zĩ-kãnga kẽesd-m-la rabeem wʋsgo; a ka bũmb a to, a yaa Soaala-Wẽnd zaka la b Arzãna dignoore.»" 
Genesis28:18 A Zakoob sãda beoog n dɩk a sẽn kʋgl kugr ningã n yals wa tãn-kugri, n dɩk kaam n daag a zugu." 
Genesis28:19 A pʋda zĩ-kãng tɩ Betɛl, Soaala-Wẽnd zaka. Tẽnga yʋʋr yaool n da yaa Luz." 
Genesis28:20 A Zakoob pʋlmame: «Soaala-Wẽnnaam sã n bee ne maam, n gũud m sorã, n kõt-m dɩɩb m sẽn na n dɩ la b kõt-m fuug sẽn na n yeelge," 
Genesis28:21 m sã n lɛɛg n wa m ba wã zakẽ ne laafi, b na lebg mam Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis28:22 La kugrã m sẽn yalsã na lebg Wẽnnaam doogo la m sẽn na n paam bũmb ning fãa yãmb nengẽ, m na kẽ be n yãk yãmb pʋɩɩre: pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugu.»" 
Genesis29:1 A Zakoob le sɩnga kẽnd n tees yaang sẽnẽ. 
Genesis29:2 A waa n yãee bulga, la bulga sɛɛga a yãee dũms bõones bãg a tã; rũmsa ra paamda koom be n yũuda; kugr ninga sẽn tar n pagd bulga noorã yaool n da yaa kug bedre." 
Genesis29:3 Yaa rũmsa sẽn wat n tigim taaba la b lakd kugrã n yũnug-ba n le lebs-a n page. 
Genesis29:4 A Zakoob soka rũm-kɩɩmbã: «Yãmb yita yɛ?» Tɩ b yeele: «Tõnd yita Aram.» 
Genesis29:5 T'a sok-ba «Yãmb mi-la a Nawor biig a Labã bɩ?» Tɩ b yet tɩ: «N-yẽe!» 
Genesis29:6 T'a sok-ba: «A bee laafi?» Tɩ b yeele: «Laafi be! La ad-a biig a Rasɛl sẽn wat ne rũmsi.» 
Genesis29:7 T'a Zakoob yeele: «Wĩndig ketame la rũmsa kõom nan pa ta ye. Yũnug-y-ba la y leb n wãben-ba.» 
Genesis29:8 Dẽ la b leok-a: «B ka tõe n yũ nand ye, rẽnd b fãa tigim taaba tɩ b yaool n lak kugrã n paam n kõ-b tɩ b yũ.»" 
Genesis29:9 A Zakoob ra ket n sõsda ne rũm-kɩɩmbã, la a Rasɛl taa bulgã ne a ba wã rũmsi; yẽ n da gũud rũmsã." 
Genesis29:10 A Zakoob sẽn yãee a Rasɛl, a yɛsb a Labã biiga, a sẽn yãe rũmsã, a kolgame n lak kugrã n kõ-b koom." 
Genesis29:11 A Zakoob mobga a Rasɛl, n lɛɛg n sɩng yãbre." 
Genesis29:12 A wilga a Rasɛl t'a ba wã ne yẽ yaa rogem, t'a yaa a Rebeka biiga la a Rasɛl wudg n tɩ togsa a ba." 
Genesis29:13 A Labã me sẽn wʋm t'a Zakoob yaa a tão biiga, a zoe n tɩ seg-a lame, tɩ b pʋʋs taab wa neb sẽn nong taaba la b rɩk yir sore. A da kelgda a Zakoob sẽn da kõt-a kibɛ niynsã." 
Genesis29:14 A Labã yeelame: «F yĩng yi-la m yĩngẽ la f kõbr yi-la m kõabẽ.» A Zakoob paa ne-a kiuug tõre. 
Genesis29:15 A Labã yeela a Zakoob: «Tõnd yaa buudu, la ka rẽ yĩng la f na n tʋm m zaka tʋʋma n ka reeg yaood ye; wilg maam f yaood sẽn tog n yɩ a soaba.»" 
Genesis29:16 A Labã kom-pugli wã ra ya-la b yiibu: a Lea, kãsma, a Rasɛl, yao wã." 
Genesis29:17 A Lea nina ra yaa nin-bʋgsg soab nini; a Rasɛl yagd da pida zãnga t'a neng ya neere. 
Genesis29:18 A Zakoob sẽn da nong a soaba yaa a Rasɛl; dẽ la a yeel a Labã: «M na n tʋma f zakẽ yʋʋm a yopoe, tɩ f kõ maam yao wã, a Rasɛl.»" 
Genesis29:19 T'a Labã na n yeele: «M menga neeme tɩ m sã n dɩk-a n kõ foo n são m sã n dɩk-a n kõ sãana, woto wã pa ne maam.»" 
Genesis29:20 A Zakoob tʋma yʋʋm a yopoe, a Rasɛl daab yĩnga. La a sẽn da nong-a wʋsga yĩnga, yʋʋm a yopoe wã yɩ wa rasem a yopoe." 
Genesis29:21 A Zakoob waa n yeela a Labã: «M tẽed tɩ wakata taame la m datame t'a Rasɛl lebg m paga.» 
Genesis29:22 A Labã tigsa tẽnga neba fãa n segl dɩɩb n kõ-ba. 
Genesis29:23 Zĩig sẽn sobge, a rɩka a Lea n kõ a Zakoob t'a kẽ ne-a." 
Genesis29:24 A Labã rɩka a Zilpa n kõ a Lea t'a maan a roog-biiga. 
Genesis29:25 Zĩig sẽn yẽege, a Zakoob yãeeme tɩ yaa a Lea la a paam yã, t'a yeel a Labã: «Kato! Yaa bõe la f maan-ma, ka a Rasɛl yĩng la m da tʋmd la? Bõe yĩng tɩ f maan-m zãmbo?»" 
Genesis29:26 T'a Labã na n leoke: «Ad tõnd zamaanẽ wã yẽer pa rengd a kẽem n kul sɩd ye. 
Genesis29:27 Vʋʋs ne tʋʋma rasem a yopoe, f kãadma ne a Lea yĩnga. Dẽ poore, m na rɩk a Rasɛl n paas-fo la fo na le tʋm m yĩnga, yʋʋm a yopoe yɛsa.»" 
Genesis29:28 A Zakoob maana boto, a rɩ-la a yikãadma kibs rasem a yopoe, dẽ poore a Labã rɩka a Rasɛl n paas-a." 
Genesis29:29 A Labã rɩka a Bila n kõ a Rasɛl t'a maan a roog biiga. 
Genesis29:30 A Zakoob kẽe ne a Rasɛl. A ra nonga yẽ n yɩɩd a Lea. A Zakoob paasa yʋʋm a yopoe, a yɛsba yiri." 
Genesis29:31 Soaala yãeeme t'a Zakoob pa get a Lea yell neer ye, tɩ b yeel tɩ yẽnda la b na n kõ kamba n yaool n mong a Rasɛl." 
Genesis29:32 A Lea rɩka pʋga n dog a biiga n pʋda yʋʋr a Rubẽ; la rẽ yaa a sẽn da yeel a sũurẽ: «Soaala-Wẽnd yãenda m nimbãanega la rũnda tɛka m sɩda na nong-m n yɩɩd pĩnda.» 
Genesis29:33 A Lea sẽn le rɩk pʋga a dogame n pʋd bi-kãng t'a Simeõ: tɩ biig la a le paam yɛsa n kõ a sɩda la raare nonglma na paase. 
Genesis29:34 A Lea le rɩka pʋga n dog biiga la a yeelame tɩ marsã wã yẽ, nonglem na zĩndi tɩ yaa kamb a tãab la a kõ a sɩda. Biiga pʋdame tɩ Levi." 
Genesis29:35 A Lea le rɩka pʋg n le rog biiga n yetẽ: «Marsã m na pẽg Soaala-Wẽnd.» Rẽ la a pʋd a biiga Zɩɩda, la a pa le paam dogem ye." 
Genesis30:1 A Rasɛl yãeeme t'a meng ka rogd ye t'a na n zab pʋg-taare ne a Lea, n yeel a Zakoob: «Kõ-m kamba, ka rẽ m na n kiime!»" 
Genesis30:2 Dẽ la a Zakoob sũur puug ne a Rasɛl t'a leok-a: «M yaa Wẽnd-Pãng-Soab la, ka bãmb n mong foom dogma bɩ?»" 
Genesis30:3 T'a yeele: «Ad-m doog-biiga, a Bila, kẽ ne-a t'a rog biig n kõ ma.»" 
Genesis30:4 A rɩka a roog-biig n kõ a Zakoob t'a kẽes-a. 
Genesis30:5 A Bila rɩka pʋg n dog biig n kõ a Rasɛl. 
Genesis30:6 T'a Rasɛl yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd bʋ-la m bʋʋdo, b reega m kosgo n kõ maam biiga.» Yaa rẽ yĩng la a pʋd biiga t'a Dã." 
Genesis30:7 A Bila, a Rasɛl doog-biiga, waa n le rɩka pʋga n dog a Zakoob biig a to." 
Genesis30:8 A Rasɛl yeelame: «M zaba Wẽnd zabr ne m kẽema Lea la maam n tõoge.» La a pʋda biiga t'a Neftali. 
Genesis30:9 A Lea me sẽn yãende t'a pa le paamd dogem, a rɩka a doog biig a Zilpa n kõ a Zakoob." 
Genesis30:10 A Zilpa roga a Zakoob biiga," 
Genesis30:11 t'a Lea yeele: «Wã la Zu-noogo!» La a pʋda biiga tɩ Gad. 
Genesis30:12 A Zilpa, a Lea roog-biiga, le roga biig a to n kõ a Zakoob." 
Genesis30:13 T'a Lea yeele: «Wã la Sũ-noogo tɩ kom-pugli wã fãa na n pẽg-m lame.» Dẽ la a pʋd biiga tɩ Asɛr. 
Genesis30:14 Ka-kɛɛr wẽnde, a Rubẽ kẽnga pʋʋgẽ n tɩ tʋ a yẽgen-tɩto. A tɩ paamame n tuk n wa kõ a Lea. A Rasɛl yãeeme n yeel a Lea: «Yãk f biiga yẽgen-tɩɩma n kõ ma!»" 
Genesis30:15 T'a Lea na n leok: «Fo sẽn deeg m sɩdã n bas-ma pa sek-fo tɩ f baood n na n deeg m biig tɩ-yẽgend n paase?» Dẽ la a Rasɛl yeel-a: «Sã n ya woto, bɩ f kõ-m f biiga tɩ-yẽgna la f tɩ pɩɩg a Zakoob roog yʋngã.»" 
Genesis30:16 A Zakoob yii pʋʋgẽ n wat ne zĩ-sobdo t'a Lea yi n seg-a n n yeele: «Ad-a Rasɛl deega m biig tɩ-yẽgende la a saka rooga me pɩɩgd tekre.» Yʋng kãnga, b kẽe ne taaba." 
Genesis30:17 Wẽnd deega a Lea kosgo t'a rɩk pʋg n dog biiga la rẽ n tõkd a rogem a nu. 
Genesis30:18 Dẽ me la a yeel yã: «M dɩka m doog-biig n kõ m sɩda la Wẽnd dola m tekre.» La a pʋda biiga tɩ Isakar. 
Genesis30:19 A Lea waa n le rɩka pʋga n dog a biig a yoob soaba. 
Genesis30:20 A yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-m-la kũun-kãsenga, marsa yẽ m na paam waoogr m sɩda nengẽ tɩ m kõ-a-la kamb a yoobe.» La a pʋda biiga tɩ Zabulõ." 
Genesis30:21 A waa n doga bi-pugla n bool a t'a Dina. 
Genesis30:22 Wẽnnaam me tẽega a Rasɛl yelle n kõ a rogem. 
Genesis30:23 A sẽn dɩk pʋg n dog a biiga, a yeelame: «Wẽnd yiis-m-la yãnd pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis30:24 A pʋda biiga yʋʋr tɩ Zozɛf n yetẽ: «Wẽnd na kõ-m a to n paase!» 
Genesis30:25 A Zozɛf dogem poore, a Zakoob yeela a Labã: «Bas-m tɩ m leb m ba-yiri." 
Genesis30:26 Kõ-m m pagba tɩ yaa bãmb yĩng la m tʋm f tʋʋma. Kõ-m kamba tɩ m looge, fo sẽ n ka ne m sẽn maan fãa f yɩnga?»" 
Genesis30:27 A Labã leok-a lame: «Tõnd sẽn lebg zooda bɩ f kelg-ma. M bagra wilg-m lame tɩ yaa fo yĩng la m paam Soaala-Wẽnd barka. 
Genesis30:28 Dẽ yĩnga wilg maam m sẽn tog n yao-f to-to bala tɩ m na yao.» 
Genesis30:29 A Zakoob yeelame: «Fo mi m tʋʋmna sẽn yɩ a soaba la f paoongã sẽn paas seem ninga. 
Genesis30:30 F paoonga da paooda, la ad-a sẽn paas wʋsg-wʋsgo, la Soaala-Wẽnd tũu mam maasem n ning f barka. Marsã ka segd tɩ ma me tʋm m meng yĩng sɩda?»" 
Genesis30:31 A Labã yeelame: «Bõe la f rat tɩ m yao-fo?» T'a Zakoob leok: «Ka bũmb la f na n yao ye, fo sã n maan wala m sẽn datã, m na le sak n gũ la m legl f piisã." 
Genesis30:32 Rũnna, m na n kẽ-la f rũms bõonega sʋka la m na n yiisa pe-bil fãa kõbg sẽn ya sablga bɩ sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla. M na n yiisa piisa sʋka pe-yãang fãa sẽn ya sablga, bʋ-yãang fãa kõbg sẽn ya sablga bɩ sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla, la rẽ n na n yɩ m soolem." 
Genesis30:33 F sã n wa beoogo n na n ges m sẽn so wã, n yãend bʋʋg kõbg sẽn ka sablga bɩ sẽn ka lob sabl la pɛɛla, n yãend pe-yãang sẽn ka sablga, dẽ na puk m zãmbo, la ges rẽ wala wagdem.»" 
Genesis30:34 T'a Labã yeele: «M saka boto, maan wa fo sẽn togsã.»" 
Genesis30:35 Badaare, a Labã welga toore boɛɛg fãa kõbg sẽn ya sablga, bɩ sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla, bʋ-yãang fãa sẽn ya sablga bɩ sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla, a welga a sẽn tõog n yõke, n paas pe-yãang fãa sẽn ya sablga, la a rɩk-b lame n gũnug a kamba." 
Genesis30:36 B yaool n looga taoore la b zãaga ne a Zakoob sẽn ta da-yɩten-daar kẽnde. A Zakoob yii ne a Labã rũmsã sẽn kellã n na tɩ gũ-ba. 
Genesis30:37 A Zakoob gesame n kɛɛg wa yɩlga, noabga, la gãak ribli, n bẽeg paoka bilfu n gilgi, tɩ b raada tõndẽ, sabla, sabl la pɛɛla." 
Genesis30:38 A Zakoob rɩk-b lame n gãneg gaolga pʋga, rũmsa sẽn wat n yũud zĩig ningã. Kooma yũub wakato la rũms yãamsa da baood boeesa zĩiga." 
Genesis30:39 Yaa kooma yũub wakato la rũmsa da rʋʋda, la ribli wã sẽn dɩg b taoor tɩ b getẽ la b rʋʋd taabã, rũms yãansa me da rogda kamb ne kõbg sẽn sobe, sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla." 
Genesis30:40 Sã n ya ne pe-raadã, a Zakoob welg-b-la toore la a rig-b lame n tees a Labã rũms niyns sẽn sobe, bɩ sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛla, n tees rũms niyns sẽn sakd dogem a Labã bãgrẽ wã, la woto a paama a toorẽ dũms sẽn welg ne a Labã dẽnna." 
Genesis30:41 Dabaar a to me: sã n ya rũm-sõma n dʋʋde, a sagenda dasaba gaolgẽ wã tɩ rũmsa ne-ba." 
Genesis30:42 Sã n ya rũm budumse n dʋʋde, a pa sagend daada ye; woto me rũm sõma wã ra yaa yẽ soolem tɩ rũms budumsã yaa a Labã rẽnna." 
Genesis30:43 A Zakoob waa n lebga dakãagre n tar rũms zembala, n tar yem-daado la yem-pogse, yʋgma la bõeense." 
Genesis31:1 A Zakoob wʋma a Labã kom-dibli wã tɩ b gomda: «A Zakoob wʋka d ba sẽn da so fãa, a paoonga fãa yita tõnd ba wã nengẽ.»" 
Genesis31:2 A Zakoob sẽn ges a Labã nenga, a mikame tɩ nenga ka zaamẽ neng ye." 
Genesis31:3 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zakoob: «Leb f buudẽ, f ba yiri, la m na n zĩnda ne foo.»" 
Genesis31:4 A kɩtame tɩ b bool a Lea ne a Rasɛl sẽn da be bãoogẽ 
Genesis31:5 la a yeel-b lame: «M gesa y ba nenga la a ka le ya wa pĩnd ye; m ba rãmba Wẽnnaam yaool n ket n dat-m-la ne neere. 
Genesis31:6 Yãmb miime tɩ yaa ne m sũur fãa la m tʋm y ba tʋʋmde. 
Genesis31:7 Yãmb ba zãmba maam, a sẽn da sede t'a na n yaoo maam bũmb ningã, a teem-a-la naoor piiga. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd bala n pa sak kegre." 
Genesis31:8 A sã n da yeel fãa: ‹Sẽn lob sabl la pɛɛl na n yɩɩ fo yaoodo,› la rũmsa fãa sẽn dogd kamb sẽn lobd sabl la pɛɛla; a sã n da yeele: ‹Sẽn bẽes fãa n na n yɩ fo rẽnna, la rũmsa fãa sẽn dogd kamb sẽn bẽese.›" 
Genesis31:9 Yaa woto la Wẽnd deeg a paoongo n kõ maam. 
Genesis31:10 Ade, pe-yãansa sẽn mi n sakd pe-raada wakato, mam zẽka m nenga yĩngri, m zãmsdẽ, la b yãeeme tɩ pe-raada kõbg da loba sabl la pɛɛla bɩ b gʋlgʋlame." 
Genesis31:11 La Soaala yeela maam: ‹Zakoob!› Tɩ m leoke: ‹Ad-ma!› Tɩ b paase: 
Genesis31:12 ‹Zẽk f neng n gese, pe-raada fãa sẽn dʋʋdã, b kõbga loba sabl la pɛɛla la b gʋlgʋlame, la bãng tɩ yaa m sẽn mi a Labã wẽnema sẽn yɩ a soaba ne fooma." 
Genesis31:13 Mam la Wẽnd ninga sẽn lika foo Betɛl. Yaa mam yĩng la fo sẽn dɩk kaam n daag kugra zugã la f kãab maam f kãabgo. Marsã yik n yi tẽn-kãnga, n leb f ba-yiri.› »" 
Genesis31:14 A Rasɛl ne a Lea leoka woto: «Bũmb ka le ket d ba zakẽ sẽn na n yɩ tõnd pʋɩɩr ye. 
Genesis31:15 D ba wã geta tõnd wala sãamba la sɩda a koosa tõndo; d ligd meng tol n pala a nengẽ. 
Genesis31:16 Dɩlla arzɛk ning fãa Wẽnd sẽn yiis d ba nengẽ lebga tõnd ne d kamb soolem; maan Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ f maan bũmb ninga fãa.» 
Genesis31:17 A Zakoob yik n baoo yʋgma n zombg a pagb la a kamba. 
Genesis31:18 A yiisa a sẽn da so rũms niynsã la a sẽn paam b rãmb Padã-Aram tẽnga; a rɩka a sẽn tar fãa n leb a ba, a Izaak, nengẽ, Kanaã tẽnga." 
Genesis31:19 A Labã ra yii n na n tɩ wõrsa a piisa kõbdo, t'a Rasɛl paam dẽ n kẽ n wʋk wẽn-naands niyns a ba sẽn tar n gũud a menga." 
Genesis31:20 A Zakoob manesma pa wẽneg ned sẽn zoet manesem ye, a maana woto t'a Labã ka bãng tɩ zoees n zoet ye." 
Genesis31:21 A zoe ne a sẽn da tar fãa; a sẽn dʋʋg Efrat, a teesa Galaad tãnga." 
Genesis31:22 Sẽn waa n maan da-yɩten-daare, a Labã wʋmame t'a Zakoob zoeeme." 
Genesis31:23 Dẽ la a yi ne a yaopa tɩ b na n pʋg a Zakoob la dasem a yopoe poore, b paam-a-la Galaad tãnga." 
Genesis31:24 Yʋng a ye, Soaala-Wẽnd lika Aram dao, a Labã, a zãmsdẽ la b yeel-a lame: «Da saag n yeel a Zakoob tɩ bũmb ye.»" 
Genesis31:25 A Labã paama a Zakoob Galaad tãnga zugu, be la a ra wẽe a sika. A Labã me wẽ-la a sik be." 
Genesis31:26 A Labã yeela a Zakoob: «Bõe yĩng la f tudg-ma, n zoe ne m kamba, wala f wẽ tãpo n paam-ba?" 
Genesis31:27 Bõe yĩng la fo tudg maam n soos n zoe; m sã n da bãngẽ m na yãagẽ foo ne sũ-noogo, ne yɩɩla, ne gãngão-gilsi la pɛndga." 
Genesis31:28 Fo ka bas tɩ m mobg m kom-dibli la m kom-pugli wã ye. Sɩda, fo maana wala gãeenga." 
Genesis31:29 M da tõe n tʋm-f-la wẽnga, la yʋngẽ, f ba wã Wẽnnaama yeel-m lame: ‹Gũus n da yeel a Zakoob tɩ bũmb ye.›" 
Genesis31:30 La ade, f ba wã nonglem yĩnga fo zoet n lebda f ba-yiri, bõe yĩng marsã tɩ f zuud m sẽn tar n gũud m menga?»" 
Genesis31:31 A Zakoob leoka a Labã: «Ad yaa rabeem n yõk-ma, m tagsame tɩ f na n deega f kamba." 
Genesis31:32 Sã n kella teed niyns fo sẽn tar n gũud f menga, ad fo sẽn yãend-b a soab nengẽ kõn pa ne yõor ye. M yet-f-la d saam-biisa taoore, kẽe n bao sẽn ya f rẽnna la f rɩk-a n looge.» A Zakoob dag n ka bãng tɩ yaa a Rasɛl n da zu-b ye." 
Genesis31:33 A Labã kẽe a Zakoob sẽokẽ n paas a Lea la a roog-kamba rẽnnẽ, n bao sõma la a pa yãend fɩ. A yii be n tɩ vɛɛs a Rasɛl dẽnna." 
Genesis31:34 Mik a Rasɛl da rɩk-b lame n solg yʋgemda gaar tẽngre n yaool n dʋ n zaoẽ; a Labã vɛɛsa a dooga zãnga la a pa yãend fɩ. 
Genesis31:35 A Rasɛl yeela a ba: «Bɩ m ba da puug a sũuri a sẽn wa m taoor tɩ m ket n zĩi wã ye, ad-y yaa m yĩinsã n pa noom dũnna.» A Labã bao a sẽn tar n gũud a mengã la a pa yãend-b ye." 
Genesis31:36 A Zakoob puuga a sũuri tɩ yẽ ne a Labã lebg zabre: «M kongr la bʋgo, m beegre la bʋgo tɩ f yik n pʋgd-m woto?" 
Genesis31:37 Fo sẽn zũndg mam teedã, bõe la f yãend sẽn wẽnd f yir bũmbu. F sẽn yãe bũmb ninga fãa yiis-a ka, m yaopa la fo yaopa taoore, tɩ b kao tõnd d yiiba bʋʋdo!" 
Genesis31:38 Yaa yʋʋm pisi rõanna la m be f zakẽ, f piis la f bʋʋs paama rogem, m ka wãb f bãgr pe-raoog ba a ye." 
Genesis31:39 Gigma sẽn yõg b rãmbã tɩ m ka tall-ba n wa wilg fooma ka maam n kong n bao n lebs-f wɛ? Yaa yʋngo, yaa wĩntoog la wagdba waa n yõg f rũmsã, fo kɩtame tɩ m yao fãa." 
Genesis31:40 M namsa tʋʋlg wĩntoogo, n nams waood yʋngo, m zɩ n tɩg gõeem ye." 
Genesis31:41 Yaa yʋʋm pisi la m be f zakẽ. M tʋma yʋʋm piig la a naase n paam f kamba yiibã; m kɩɩma f rũms yʋʋm a yoobe la f teema m yaood naoor piiga. 
Genesis31:42 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba, m ba Izaak la m yaaba Abraam Wẽnnaamã sã n da da ka zĩnnẽ ne maam m kõn yiẽ f zakẽ wã ne bũmb ye. La Wẽnnaam gesa m yaamse, m yãooga tʋʋma, n kao bʋʋd yʋngẽ nand bala.»" 
Genesis31:43 A Labã leoka a Zakoob woto: «Kom-pugli wã yaa mam kom-pugli, f kamba yaa mam kamba, rũmsa yaa mam rũmsi, fo sẽn ne wã fãa yaa maam n so la m na deega kom-pugli wã ne b kambã n maan bõe?" 
Genesis31:44 Dɩlla wa tɩ d yõg zoodo, wa tɩ d yals zooda kaseto.»" 
Genesis31:45 A Zakoob dɩka kugr n sele," 
Genesis31:46 n yeel a nebã: «Wa-y ne kuga!» B wʋka kug n sam zĩ-yɛnga la b rʋʋ kuga zug n dɩ. 
Genesis31:47 A Labã pʋdã zĩ-kãng: Yegar-Saaduta, kaset kug saongo, t'a Zakoob pʋd-a Galeed, gũus-to zĩiga." 
Genesis31:48 A Labã yeelame: «Bɩ rũnna tɛka kug-saongã yɩ kaseto maam ne foo tẽnsʋka.» Yaa rẽ yĩng la zĩiga pʋd tɩ Galeed 
Genesis31:49 la Mispa: t'a le paas: «D sã n wa ka le ne taaba, bi Wẽnd nif kell teeg-do." 
Genesis31:50 Fo sã n ka zã m kamba ne waoogre, fo sã n dɩk pagb a taab n paas bãmba, ba tõnd sã n zãr ne taab me, Wẽnd neeme.»" 
Genesis31:51 A Labã le paasame: «Ges kuga saongã sẽn lob tõnd d yiiba tẽnsʋka la kugra sẽn selã. 
Genesis31:52 Ad kugra sẽn selã, ad kugra saong yaa toaaga. M wẽendame tɩ m kõn yõsg-ba n dig fo sẽneg ye la fo me wẽendame tɩ f kõn yõsg-ba n dig mam sẽneg tɩ yel-beed ka maan ye." 
Genesis31:53 La Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ d yaab rãmba Wẽnnaam, a Abraam la a Nawor Wẽnnaam yɩ d bʋʋda.» La a Zakoob wẽena ne a ba, a Izaak Wẽnde, Wẽnd ning sẽn kẽesda rabeema." 
Genesis31:54 A Zakoob kʋʋ maoong tãnga zugu la a boola a neba tɩ b wa rɩ. B rɩɩme la b gãanda tãnga zugu. 
Genesis32:1 Sã n yaa a Labã, a sãda beoog n mobg a kom-dibli la a kom-pugli, n ning-b barka la a leba a tẽngẽ." 
Genesis32:2 A Zakoob ra kẽndame la Soaala-Wẽnd tʋma neb tɩ b wa seg-a. 
Genesis32:3 A Zakoob yãend-b lame n yeele: «Wẽnd ti-la b yir ka.» Dẽ la a pʋd zĩiga tɩ Maanayim. 
Genesis32:4 A Zakoob tʋma neba a kẽem, a Ezayu, nengẽ, Seyir tẽnga. Pẽe ne Edom tẽn-peelem." 
Genesis32:5 A kõ-b-la no-kãnga: «Gom-y woto ne m kẽem a Ezayu: ‹F yao a Zakoob koɛɛg la woto: m kẽnga a Labã nengẽ n tɩ pa be n ta rũnna. 
Genesis32:6 M tɩ paama niisi, bõeense, piisi, bʋʋse, yem-daad la yem-pogse tɩ m yet tɩ nin-bãmba reng taoore n wilg kibarã m zu-soaba, a Ezayu, la b kos tɩ y maan-d yardo.› »" 
Genesis32:7 Sẽn tʋm b rãmba lɛɛg n waa a Zakoob nengẽ n yeele: «Tõnd tɩ yãee f kẽem a Ezayu la yẽ meng wata f segbo ne neb kobs-naase.» 
Genesis32:8 Dabeem la sũ-sãang kãseng yõka a Zakoob t'a welg sags a yiibu a neba, a rũmsã, bɛd la bõonese, la a yʋgma." 
Genesis32:9 A ra yeta a sũurẽ: «Woto a Ezayu sã n seg bogr a ye n maan zabre, bogr a to wã na zoe n põse.»" 
Genesis32:10 A Zakoob goma ne Wẽnde: «M yaab a Abraam Wẽnnaam, m ba a Izaak Wẽnnaam, Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb n yeel maam: ‹Leb f tẽngẽ, leb f ba wã zakẽ tɩ m ningd-f-la barka.›" 
Genesis32:11 Yãmb sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa mam yĩnga, yãmb sẽn pʋg maam ne nonglem ningã, m da ka tog ne rẽ fãa ye. M sẽn waa n dabda, m dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga ne m dasaar bala la ad-m sẽn wa ne neb la rũmsi sẽn sek sags a yiib welgre." 
Genesis32:12 Bɩ y sõng-ma tɩ m põs a Ezayu nugu. Rabeem tar-m lame, m zoeta a na n wa kʋ maam, n kʋ m pagb la m kamba." 
Genesis32:13 M ket n tẽra yãmb sẽn yeele: ‹M na n zam-f-la kũuni, m na n kɩtame tɩ f buuda yɩ wa mogr bĩisri sẽn ka tõe n sõd ye t'a ka be tẽk ye!› »" 
Genesis32:14 A Zakoob gãanda zĩ-kãnga. A yãka a sẽn da tar fãa n na n segl kũun n bĩng a Ezayu. 
Genesis32:15 Yɩɩ bʋ-yãans kobs-yi la boees pisi, pe-yãans kobs-yi, pe-raad pisi." 
Genesis32:16 Yʋgem yãans pis-tã, sẽn tar kamb la bĩisim, nag-yãans pis-naase, lols piiga, bõn-yãans pisi, bõan-daad piiga." 
Genesis32:17 A welga rũmsa sak-saka; sak fãa ne a rũm-kɩɩma la ad-a sẽn yeele: «Lʋɩ-y mam taoore la vɩʋʋg zĩnd rũmsa ne taab sʋka.» 
Genesis32:18 A Zakoob yeela sõgen ning sẽn na n lʋɩ a taoorã: «M kẽem a Ezayu sã n seg foo n sok fo: ‹F zu-soab la ãnda, a rabda yɛ, ãnna n so rũmsã sẽn kẽnd f taoorã?›" 
Genesis32:19 Bɩ f leoke: ‹Yaa a Zakoob n tʋm maam ne a kũuni tɩ m wa kõ m zu-soab a Ezayu la a meng bee poorẽ.› » 
Genesis32:20 Sak a yiib soaba, wala a tãab soaba, la neb niyns fãa sẽn da pʋgd rũmsã, a kõ-b-la noor kãnga: «Ad-y sẽn na n gom to-to ne a Ezayu, y sã n wa seg-a." 
Genesis32:21 Y na yeel-a: ‹F yao a Zakoob bee poorẽ watẽ.› » A Zakoob da tagsa a sũurẽ: Kũun sã n deng taoore n tak zood tɩ mam meng yaool n pʋgda, daare a na maan sugri." 
Genesis32:22 Kũuna lʋɩɩ taoore; a meng kell n paa sikẽ wã n gãand. 
Genesis32:23 A Zakoob yika ne yʋngo n yi ne a pagb a yiibã la roog-kamb a yiibã, a kamb piig la a ye wã, n dʋʋg Yabok kʋɩlgã, a ko-kɩdgẽ." 
Genesis32:24 Yẽ meng n gãd-ba n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, ned kam fãa ne a teedo." 
Genesis32:25 B fãa loogame n bas a Zakoob a yembre. La ned n waa n sog a maoore la b maoome tɩ beoog vẽeg. 
Genesis32:26 Neda sẽn mik t'a pa na n lub a Zakoobã, a sɩɩsa a kɩʋʋlgo t'a gĩina maage." 
Genesis32:27 Maod-n-taaga waa n yeelame: «Bas-m marsã tɩ zĩig yẽegame.» T'a Zakoob yeel-a: «M kõn bas-f tɩ f ka reng n ning m bark ye.» 
Genesis32:28 T'a soke: «F yʋʋr la a bõe?» T'a Zakoob leoke: «A Zakoob.» 
Genesis32:29 T'a yeele: «Ade, b ka na n le bool foo tɩ Zakoob ye, b na n bool-f lame tɩ Israyɛl tɩ f maoo ne Wẽnd la ninsaalba la fo n tõoge.»" 
Genesis32:30 A Zakoob paasame: «M kot-y lame tɩ y togs y yʋʋre.» T'a soke: «Yaa bõe tɩ f baood m yʋʋre?» La a wẽneg n ninga a Zakoob barka. 
Genesis32:31 A Zakoob pʋda zĩ-kãng tɩ Penuwɛl, n yetẽ: «M yãee Wẽnnaam nenga n yaool n pa ki ye.»" 
Genesis32:32 Sõor sẽn waa n pukdẽ, a yii Penuwɛl la ra kẽnda kɩʋʋlgo." 
Genesis32:33 Yaa rẽ yĩng la ba ne rũnna, Israyɛl kamb pa wãbd kɩʋʋlg gĩindi, a Zakoob kɩʋʋlga sẽn da pogla tẽegr yĩnga." 
Genesis33:1 A Zakoob dooga a neng la a yãe-la a Ezayu, t'a wat ne neb kobs-naase. A weela a kambã n kõ a Lea, a Rasɛl la a roog-kamba." 
Genesis33:2 A lʋɩɩsa a Bila la a Zilpa ne b kamba taoore, t'a Lea pʋgd ne a kamba, t'a Rasɛl ne a Zozɛf pa poorẽ." 
Genesis33:3 Yẽ meng waa n lʋɩɩ taoore, n wõgemd tẽng naoor a yopoe n yaool n ta a kẽema." 
Genesis33:4 A Ezayu wudgame n seg-a n mobg-a, n mok-a-la b sɩnga yãbre." 
Genesis33:5 A Ezayu sẽn yãe pagbã la kambã a sokame: «Yaa yɛ rãmb n be ne foo ka?» T'a leoke: «Yaa kamb niyns Wẽnd sẽn kõ maama.» 
Genesis33:6 Doog-kamba me kolga ne b rẽnna la b me wõgemda tẽnga. 
Genesis33:7 A Lea kolga ne a kamba n wõgemd tẽnga, t'a Rasɛl ne a Zozɛf me ta, b me wõgend tẽnga." 
Genesis33:8 A Ezayu sokame: «Yaa bõe la f rat n maan ne rũmsa m sẽn segã?» T'a leoke: «Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ n paam yãmb nimbãan-zoeere.» 
Genesis33:9 T'a Ezayu yeele: «Mam sẽn tara zoe n labsa, m yao sõngo, tall f rẽnna.»" 
Genesis33:10 Dẽ la a Zakoob yeel yã: «Ka na n yɩ boto ye, y sã n kõ-m-la sugri, bɩ y nug reeg m kũuna. Sɩda mam sẽn saag n seg yãmbã, yaa wa ninsaal sẽn seg Naaba-Wẽnde, la yãmb reeg-m-la neere." 
Genesis33:11 Bɩ y reeg m kũuna tɩ Wẽnd maan-m-la neere tɩ bũmb fãa be m nugẽ.» A Zakoob dɩdgra yĩnga, a Ezayu sakame n deege." 
Genesis33:12 A Ezayu yeelame: «D sɩng kẽnde la maam n na n lʋɩ taoore!» 
Genesis33:13 T'a Zakoob yeele: «M zu-soaba miime tɩ kamba ka tar pãnga, la m tog n maana gũusgu ne pe-yãansã sẽn tar kom-peendo. Kẽna sã n yɩ wʋsgo, b fãa na n kiime." 
Genesis33:14 Sẽn ya woto wã bɩ yãmb deng taoore. Mam na n kẽna bãanem-bãanem, n tũ rũmsã la m tũ kambã n ta Seyir, m zu-soaba zakẽ.»" 
Genesis33:15 A Ezayu yeelame: «Sã n ya woto, m na n yãka m neba kẽer n bas ne foom.» T'a Zakoob leok: «Rẽ võor la bõe, m sẽn dat bũmb ningã, yaa yãmb maan yard ne m bala.»" 
Genesis33:16 A Ezayu rɩka Seyir sore badaare," 
Genesis33:17 t'a Zakoob wẽnemd n tees Sukot; a mee zak a meng yĩnga la a tii sõg-zags a rũmsa yĩnga; yaa rẽ yĩng la a pʋd zĩ-kãnga tɩ Sukot, sõg-zakẽ." 
Genesis33:18 A Zakoob taa ne laafi Sikɛm, Kanaã tẽnga, a sẽn yi Padã-Aram n leeg n watẽ, a siga tẽnga noore." 
Genesis33:19 A kosa a Amor, a Sikɛm ba, t'a kõ a zĩig ning a sẽn sigã la a reeg wanzurf koeems koabga." 
Genesis33:20 A mee maan-kugr zĩ-kãnga, n pʋd a yʋʋra ƐL, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis34:1 A Lea bi-pugl a Dina yiime n na n tɩ sõs ne tẽnga kom-pugli. 
Genesis34:2 Ivitga Amor biig, a Sikɛm, tẽnga na-bi-kẽenga, yãenda a Dina n yõg-a ne pãnga." 
Genesis34:3 A yam da kẽe a Zakoob bi-puglã, a Dina; a da nonga bi-pugla wʋsgo, bi-pugla ra taa a yam zãnga." 
Genesis34:4 A Sikɛm yeela a ba, a Amor: «Kos biigã n kõ-ma tɩ m maan m paga!»" 
Genesis34:5 A Zakoob yaool n da bãngame t'a bi-pugl a Dina ra sãamame la a rũm-kɩɩmba sẽn da ket weoogã, a sĩnda a noor n tãag b waoongo." 
Genesis34:6 A Sikɛm ba, a Amor, waa a Zakoob nengẽ ne a koɛɛga." 
Genesis34:7 A Zakoob kamba wẽneg n yii bãoogẽ n wa la b wʋma yellã tɩ b sũur puug wʋsgo; b wʋmame t'a Sikɛm tʋma wẽnga n sãam a Zakoob bi-pugla la b fãa yeelame tɩ rẽ ka segd ye. 
Genesis34:8 A Amor leoka woto: «Mam biig a Sikɛm yãee yãmb bi-pugla t'a yam kẽe-a wʋsgo. Bɩ y rɩk-a n kõ-a t'a maan a paga. 
Genesis34:9 D yõg zoodo ne taaba tɩ yãmb kõ tõnd y kamba tɩ tõnd me kõ yãmb d rẽnna. 
Genesis34:10 Y na n paa ne tõndo, d tẽnga na n lebga y soolem, y na tõog n kẽ a weta fãa, y na tõog n ti y roto.»" 
Genesis34:11 A Sikɛm yeela biiga ba la a kẽem dãmba: «Maan-y yardo tɩ m na kõ-y y sẽn na n kos bũmb ning fãa. 
Genesis34:12 Saag-y maam yaoodo sẽn ya kãsenga tɩ m na yao fãa gilli la y kõ maam y bi-pugla tɩ m maan m paga.» 
Genesis34:13 A Amor biig a Sikɛm sẽn da sãam a Dina yĩngã, a Zakoob kamba leok-a-la ne zãmbo:" 
Genesis34:14 «Tõnd sẽn ka tõe n maan la woto: n dɩk d tão n kõ dao sẽn ka kẽ bãongo; tõnd nengẽ a yaa yãnd wʋsgo. 
Genesis34:15 Yãmb sã n dat tɩ d sake bɩ yãmb me lebg wa tõndo, bɩ yãmb me sak n kẽes y rapa bãongo." 
Genesis34:16 Rẽ poor marsã tõnd na rɩk d kom-pugli wã n kõ yãmba tɩ yãmb me rɩk y rẽnd n kõ tõndo, woto d na pa ne yãmba n lebg buud a ye." 
Genesis34:17 La yãmb sã n pa kelg d sẽn leokd-y bũmb ning bãonga poorẽ, tõnd na n looga ne d biiga.»" 
Genesis34:18 B goama ta-la a Amor la a Sikɛm yam. 
Genesis34:19 Bi-ribla pa kaoos n maan b sẽn kos a bũmb ninga ye t'a yama da kẽe a Zakoob bi-pugla zãnga. La bãng-y tɩ buuda fãa da ne-la a Sikɛm wala b nin-kãsenga. 
Genesis34:20 A Amor ne a biiga Sikɛm tigma buuda, tẽnga noore, la b yeel-b lame:" 
Genesis34:21 «Ad-y nin-bãmba raab yaa sõngo; bɩ d tẽng lebg b tẽnga, tɩ b tõe n gõ d wetẽ wala b sẽn date, tɩ b rɩk b kamb n kõ tõndo, tɩ tõnd me rɩk d kamb n kõ bãmba." 
Genesis34:22 Ad-y b yaool n pa na n sak n zĩnd ne tõndo tɩ d lebg buud a yembre, tõnd rapa fãa sã n ka kẽ bãongo wala bãmb ye." 
Genesis34:23 N paas me, tõnd sã n sake, b rũmsã, b paoongã fãa na n lebga tõnd dẽnna la b na n paa ne tõndo.»" 
Genesis34:24 Tẽnga kẽedba fãa kelga a Amor la a Sikɛm neere, la rapa fãa gill sak n kẽe bãongo." 
Genesis34:25 Sẽn maan dasem a tã tɩ Sikɛm dãmb ket n zĩ ne toogo la a Zakoob kamb a yiibu, a Dina kẽem dãmba, a Simeõ ne a Levi, sẽn yi ne b sʋʋse n tɩ kẽ tẽngã; dabeem buug da ka tar-b ye; b kʋʋ tẽnga rapa fãa gilli." 
Genesis34:26 B kʋ-la a Amor ne a Sikɛm la b yiisa a Dina a Sikɛm zakẽ n tall-a n looge. 
Genesis34:27 B baasa sẽn da pogl-bã la b zɛɛ tẽngã, b tão wã sẽn sãama yĩnga." 
Genesis34:28 B zɛ-la b rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego, b bõeense, b rũmsa fãa, sẽn pa-b yir wala sẽn da be-b bãoogẽ." 
Genesis34:29 B looga ne b arzɛka fãa, ne b kom-bõonego, ne b pagba, ne sẽn da be rota pʋs fãa." 
Genesis34:30 A Zakoob yeela a Simeõ ne a Levi: «Yãmb kẽes-m-la yellẽ, y maaname tɩ Kanaã rãmb la Perizitse na n kisg tõndo. Mam neba paooda, b na n sũu tãpo n zab ne maam, n tõog-ma, n wã maam ne m roog zãnga.»" 
Genesis34:31 Tɩ b leoke: «Da segdame tɩ b rɩk tõnd tão wã n maan b pʋg-yoodr bi?» 
Genesis35:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Zakoob «Yik n dʋ Betɛl n tɩ zĩnd be; beenẽ f na n mee maan-kugr n kõ Wẽnnaam ning sẽn lika foo f sẽn waa n zoet n na n põs f kẽem a Ezayu.» 
Genesis35:2 A Zakoob yeela a zak rãmba: «Menes-y tẽn-kug la tɩta fãa sẽn be y nengẽ, pek-y y mense la y teed y futu." 
Genesis35:3 Yik-y tɩ d dʋ Betɛl. M na n tɩ mee maan-kugri n kõ Naaba-Wẽnd tɩ b reega m kosgo, m pɛta wakato, la b sõnga maam tɩ m sor loke.»" 
Genesis35:4 B rɩka bũmb ning fãa b sẽn dõoge n tar n tẽegd b wẽn-naandsa yelle la b tʋb-londa fãa n kɩs a Zakoob t'a tuk bok tɩɩg tẽngr, Sikɛm, n bus-b be." 
Genesis35:5 B yikame n looge. Naaba-Wẽnd kẽesa tẽns niyns fãa sẽn pẽ-b be wã rabeem. Woto b pa pʋg a Zakoob ne a neba ye. 
Genesis35:6 A Zakoob taa Luz, Kanaã tẽnga, be yẽnẽ la Betɛl, a taa ne a neba fãa." 
Genesis35:7 A mee maan-kugri n pʋd zĩ-kãng tɩ Betɛl, tɩ Wẽnnaam da zoe n lik-a-la be, a sẽn waa n zoet n na n põs a kẽema." 
Genesis35:8 A Rebeka ma-wubdga, a Debora, kii be tɩ b mum-a Betɛl tɩ-bedr wa kʋk tẽngre, la b pʋda tɩ-kãng tɩ nintãm kʋka." 
Genesis35:9 Wẽnnaam lika a Zakoob Padã-Aram sor zugu, la b ning-a-la barka." 
Genesis35:10 Wẽnnaam yeel-a lame: «Fo yʋʋr la a Zakoob la b kõn le bool-f boto ye, na n yɩɩ Israyɛl, la Israyɛl n sɩd lebg a yʋʋre.»" 
Genesis35:11 Wẽnnaam le paasame: «Maam la Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba. Rog la f weke. Ad bu-kẽengo, dĩm dãmb buudu, na n yi-la f pennẽ." 
Genesis35:12 Tẽng ning m sẽn kõ a Abraam la a Izaak, m kõt-a-la foom me, la fo loogr poore, m kõt-a-la f kamba.»" 
Genesis35:13 B sẽn gom woto b leba yĩngri n zãag ne segba zĩigã. 
Genesis35:14 La Wẽnd sẽn gom ne-a zĩig ningã, a Zakoob lugla kugri, n dɩk kaam n daag a zugu." 
Genesis35:15 La a Zakoob pʋda Wẽnd sẽn lik a zĩig ningã tɩ Betɛl. 
Genesis35:16 B yika Betɛl; da keta bilf bal tɩ b ta Efrata la a Rasɛl sɩng n na n kũma rogem la rogma ka yɩ naana ye. 
Genesis35:17 Rogma sẽn da ya toogã, pʋg-roagsa yeel-a lame: «Da maan dabeem tɩ yaa bi-ribl la f paam yã.»" 
Genesis35:18 A Rasɛl mikame t'a pãng sɛɛme t'a na n ki t'a pʋd biigã tɩ Ben-Oni, Kʋrɩta, la biiga ba zãgsame n pʋd-a a Bẽnzame, tom-pag biiga." 
Genesis35:19 A Rasɛl kiime la b mum-a-la Efrata sor zugu, yaa Bɛtelyɛɛm la be." 
Genesis35:20 A Zakoob sela kugri yaoga zugu la kug kãng keta ne rũnna. 
Genesis35:21 A Israyɛl yii be n tɩ yals Migdal-Edɛr poore. 
Genesis35:22 Yaa beenẽ la a Rubẽ yõg a Bila, a ba paga, la a ba wã bãngame la a sũur pa yɩ noog ye. A Zakoob kamba yɩɩ piig la a yiibu." 
Genesis35:23 Ad-a Lea kamba: a Rubẽ, yẽ la a Zakoob bi-kẽenga; a Simeõ, a Levi, a Zɩɩda, a Isakar, a Zabulõ." 
Genesis35:24 Ad-a Rasɛl kamba: a Zozɛf ne a Bẽnzame. 
Genesis35:25 Ad-a Rasɛl doog-biig a Bila kamba: a Dã, a Neftali." 
Genesis35:26 Ad-a Lea doog-biig a Zilpa kamba: a Gad, a Asɛr. Woto la a Zakoob kamba sẽn dog Padã-Aram tẽnga." 
Genesis35:27 A Zakoob taa a ba a Izaak zakẽ, yaa Mambre, Kiriyat-Arba, b boond-a lame yɛs tɩ Ebrõ, yaa be la Abraam la a Izaak kaoos yã." 
Genesis35:28 A Izaak pʋlemd zãng yɩɩ yʋʋm koabg la pis-nii," 
Genesis35:29 a paam n kʋʋla wʋsgo n yaool n ki, n yaool n sak a saam-dãmba, t'a kamb a Ezayu la a Zakoob na n solg-a." 
Genesis36:1 A Ezayu boondame tɩ Edom la ad yẽ me roogo. 
Genesis36:2 Yaa Kanaã kom-pugli la a Ezayu kẽes yã, yaa Ada, Ititga Elon biiga; yaa Oolibama: yẽ ba la a Ana, la Ana ba la a Sibeõ, a Sibeõ yaa Ivitsa buud neda." 
Genesis36:3 Sẽn leb n paas yaa Basmat: yẽ yaa a Ismayɛl bi-pugla la a Nebayot tão; 
Genesis36:4 a Ada biig la a Elifaz; a Baasmat biig la a Reowɛl; 
Genesis36:5 a Oolibama kamb la a Yewus, a Yalam la a Kora. Woto la kamb niyns a Ezayu sẽn dog Kanaã tẽnga." 
Genesis36:6 A Ezayu waa n yika ne a pagba, a kom-dibli, a kom-pugli, a yir dãmb fãa, a rũmsa fãa la a sẽn da paam bũmb ning fãa Kanaã tẽnga, n kẽng Seyir, n zãag ne a yao, a Zakoob." 
Genesis36:7 Sɩda, b rũmsa da yaa wʋsgo ne b tõog n naag taab zĩ-yɛnga; tẽnga ra ka tõe n sek-b ye." 
Genesis36:8 Yaa rẽ yĩng la a Edom dʋ Seyir tãnga zugu. Edom ne Ezayu yaa nin-yende. 
Genesis36:9 Woto la Edomitsa ba, a Ezayu, kibare, a sẽn waa n ta Seyir tãngẽ." 
Genesis36:10 Ad-a Ezayu kamba yʋya: a Elifaz, yẽ ma la a Ada, a Ezayu paga, a Reowɛl, yẽ ma la a Basmat, a Ezayu paga." 
Genesis36:11 Ad-a Elifaz kamba: a Teman, a Omar, a Sefõ, a Gatam, a Kenaz." 
Genesis36:12 A Ezayu biig a Elifaz rɩka a Timna n paas a pipi paga la a Timna doga a Amalɛk. Bãmb la a Ezayu ne a Ada bãmba. 
Genesis36:13 Sã n yaa a Reowɛl, yẽ kamb la a Naat, a Zera, a Sama, a Miza. A Ezayu ne a paga Basmat kamb la bãmba." 
Genesis36:14 A Ezayu paga, a Oolibama, sẽn yaa a Ana biiga, a Sibeõ yagenga, doga a Yewus, a Yalam, a Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ad sẽn yɩ-b b ba a Ezayu rooga nanamse, Edom tẽn-peelmẽ: a Tema, a Omar, a Sefõ, a Kenaz," 
Genesis36:16 a Gatam, a Amalɛk. A Ezayu bi-kẽeng a Elifaz kamb la bãmba. B ma la a Ezayu pag a Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Roog nanams a Naat, a Zera, a Sama, a Miza; Bãmb yaa a Ezayu biig a Reowɛl kamba; b yaab poak la a Basmat, a Ezayu paga. B vɩɩnda Edom tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Genesis36:18 Roog nanams a Yewus, a Yalam, a Kora. Bãmb yɩ-la a Ezayu ne a paga a Oolibama kamb; a Ana la a Oolibama ma." 
Genesis36:19 Edom nanamsa la bãmba, fãa ya-la a Ezayu kamba." 
Genesis36:20 Sẽn zĩnd-b Edom tẽn-peelmẽ pipi yɩɩ Oritga a Seyir yagense. La Oritsa nanams yi-la a Lotã, a Sobal, a Sibeõ, a Ana," 
Genesis36:21 a Disõ, a Esɛr, a Disã, a Seyir kamba." 
Genesis36:22 A Lotã kamb yɩ-la a Ori la a Emam; a Lotã da yaa a Timna tão. 
Genesis36:23 A Sobal kamb yɩ-la a Alwã, a Manaat, a Ebal, a Sefõ, a Onam." 
Genesis36:24 A Sibeõ kamb yɩ-la a Aya, a Ana, yaa Ana kãng n da kẽng we-raoogẽ n na n tɩ wãbneg a ba a Sibeõ bõeense n tɩ yãend koom sẽn ya tʋʋlga." 
Genesis36:25 A Ana kamb yɩ-la a Disõ, a bi-ribla la a Oolibama, a bi-pugla." 
Genesis36:26 A Disõ kamb yɩ-la a Emdã, a Esbã, a Yitrã a Kerã." 
Genesis36:27 A Esɛr kamba yɩ-la a Bilã, a Zaawã, a Akã." 
Genesis36:28 A Disã kamb yɩ-la a Us, a Arã." 
Genesis36:29 Oritsa nanamse la woto: a Lotã, a Sobal, a Sibeõ, a Ana," 
Genesis36:30 a Disõ, a Esɛr a Disã. Bãmb n yɩɩ b roog nanams Seyir tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Genesis36:31 Ad neb niyns sẽn dɩ-b naam Edom tẽnga, tɩ Israyɛl dĩm dãmba yaool n na n wa soog-a." 
Genesis36:32 Pipi dĩma yɩ-la a Bela, a ba yʋʋr a Beor la a na-tẽnga ra boondame tɩ Dinaba" 
Genesis36:33 A Bela sẽn ki, a Zobab n ledg a zĩiga, yẽ ba la a Zera, t'a na-tẽnga ya Bosra." 
Genesis36:34 A Zobab sẽn ki, a Usam n dɩ naam a zĩigẽ, Temanitsa tẽngẽ." 
Genesis36:35 A Usam sẽn ki, a Bedad biig a Adad n deeg a zĩiga. Yaa yẽ n zab ne Madianitse, n tõog-ba, Moab weoogẽ. A na-tẽng yɩɩ Awit." 
Genesis36:36 A Adad sẽn ki, a Samla n led a zĩiga. Masreka la a na-tẽnga." 
Genesis36:37 A Samla poore, Reobot-An-Naar rao, a Sol, n dɩ naam." 
Genesis36:38 Sẽn pʋg a Sol yɩ-la a Akbor biig, a Baal-Anã." 
Genesis36:39 A Akbor biig, a Baal-Anã, kiime t'a Adar ledg a zĩiga, a na-tẽnga ra boondame tɩ Pawu; a pag ra boondame tɩ Metabeyɛl, a Matrɛd bi-pugla, a Me-Zaad yagenga." 
Genesis36:40 Ad neb niyns sẽn yɩɩ dĩm dãmb a Ezayu roogẽ, ned kam fãa ne a saka, a tẽnga: a Timna, a Alvã, a Yetɛt," 
Genesis36:41 a Oolibama, a Ela, a Pinõ," 
Genesis36:42 a Kenaz, a Tema, a Mibsar," 
Genesis36:43 a Magdiyɛl, a Iram. Bãmb n yɩ Edom dĩm dãmba, tẽns niyns b sẽn da ya b soolem. A Ezayu la Edomitsa yaaba." 
Genesis37:1 A Zakoob ba wã sẽn zĩnd tẽng ning Kanaã, beenẽ la yẽ me ti a yiri." 
Genesis37:2 Wã marsã yaa a Zakoob doog kibare. A Zozɛf yʋʋm sẽn waa n ta piig la a yopoe, a da naagda a kẽem-dãmb n kɩɩmd rũmsi. A ra ket n yaa yãaga; a Bila la a Zilpa kamba la a rogd-n-taase; a Bila ne a Zilpa yaa a ba pagba. A sã n mii n wʋm tɩ b gomd wẽng a kẽem dãmba poorẽ, a wat n togsa a ba." 
Genesis37:3 A Israyɛl da nonga a Zozɛf n yɩɩd a kamb a taabã, a da yaa a kʋʋlem biiga; a kɩtame tɩ b sẽ na-biig fuug n kõ-a." 
Genesis37:4 A kẽem dãmba sẽn yãe t'a ba wã nong-a-la wʋsgo n yɩɩd bãmbã, b tuga beem ne-a, tɩ ya mo-beed bala n dag n be b noorẽ." 
Genesis37:5 A Zozɛf zãmsame n yi n togs a kẽem dãmbã, tɩ b na n maneg n kisg-a." 
Genesis37:6 A yeelame: «Kelg-y m sẽn zãmse: 
Genesis37:7 Tõnd dag n bee pʋʋgẽ n kalsd koodo; mam kalga yikame n yaas yĩngri tɩ yãmb dẽnna na n gũbg-a n wõgemd a taoore.» 
Genesis37:8 Dẽ la a kẽem dãmba leok-a: «Sãnd f ka rat n wa yɩ tõnd dĩma bɩ d soaala!» Zãmsdã la goama kɩtame tɩ b sũ-kiira la b beema yãng n paas. 
Genesis37:9 A Zozɛf le paama zãmsd a to, t'a le wilg a kẽem dãmba: «M le zãmsame la m yãee wĩntoog la kiuug la ãds piig la a ye tɩ b wõg mam taoore.»" 
Genesis37:10 A togsa a ba la a kẽem dãmbã la ba wã zab-a lame: «Ad fo zãmsdã kɛɛma, maam ne f ma la f kẽem-dãmbã na n wa wõgemda fo taoor la?»" 
Genesis37:11 Rẽ paasa a kẽem dãmba sũ-kiiri. A ba wã yẽ da sĩnda a noore n bilgd yɛlã a sũurẽ. 
Genesis37:12 A Zozɛf kẽem dãmba kẽnga Sikɛm n na n tɩ gũ b ba rũms bõonese. 
Genesis37:13 A Israyɛl yeela a Zozɛf: «Fo kẽem dãmba bee Sikɛm bãoogo, wa tɩ m tʋm-f b nengẽ.» T'a yeele: «M na kẽng!»" 
Genesis37:14 T'a ba wã yeel-a: «Bʋʋg-f kẽem dãmbã n ges b keta laafi la f ges rũmsa me keta laafi n wa togs-ma.» La a Zozɛf yii Ebrõ n ta Sikɛm. 
Genesis37:15 Ned n seg-a bãoogẽ t'a kẽnd la a sok-a lame: «Biiga, bõe la f baooda?»" 
Genesis37:16 T'a leoke: «M baooda m kẽem dãmba la wilg maam b sẽn be zĩig ninga n kɩɩmd rũmsã!» 
Genesis37:17 Tɩ raoã yeele: «B yikame la m da wʋmdame tɩ b goamda: d kẽng Dotã.» A Zozɛf gẽesa a kẽem dãmba la a tɩ yãend-b-la Dotã. 
Genesis37:18 A Zozɛf kẽem dãmba yãend-a lame t'a nan ket yɩɩg n watẽ tɩ b sed ne taab n na n kʋ-a. 
Genesis37:19 B ra yeta taaba: «Ad zãmsda naab sẽn wate! 
Genesis37:20 Wa-y tɩ d kʋ-a n lob bul kɩdgẽ la d yeel tɩ rũng n yõk-a n wãbe la woto d na bãng a zãmsdã sẽn na kẽ zĩig ninga!» 
Genesis37:21 A Rubẽ wʋmame la a fãag-a-la b nusẽ n yeel-b tɩ b wa tɩ b ra kʋ-a ye. 
Genesis37:22 A Rubẽ yeelame: «Wa-y tɩ d da kʋ-a ye, d da sɩɩs-a ne d nug ye, d bas a bul-kɩdgẽ bala, weoogẽ ka.» A da ratame n soos n yiis-a n tɩ lebs a ba." 
Genesis37:23 Woto a Zozɛf sẽn ta b sʋka, tao-tao bal tɩ b yeega a fu-yorgo t'a ra yera na-biig fuugu." 
Genesis37:24 B gãd-a lame n lob bul-kɩdgẽ; bulga da yaa vɩʋʋgo, koom da ka be a pʋgẽ ye," 
Genesis37:25 n yaool n leb b zĩigẽ n na n tɩ rɩ. B sẽn doog b nenga, b yãee Ismayɛl toandba sẽn yi Galaad n kuiisẽ. B yʋgma wã ra zɩta tɩdare, tɩ-kaam sẽn na n ning kũum tɩ ra sãam ye, la sẽn tar yũ-noogo. B ra teesda Ezipt tẽnga." 
Genesis37:26 A Zɩɩda yeela a ba-biisi: «Yõod bʋg la d na n paam, d sã n kʋ d yao wã la d bus a zɩɩma?" 
Genesis37:27 Wa-y tɩ d koos-a ne Ismayɛlitsã la d da kʋ-a ye tɩ ya d yao, d fãa yaa zɩɩm a ye.» A sẽn gom woto, b kelg-a lame." 
Genesis37:28 Madiã toandba taame tɩ b yiis a Zozɛf bulgẽ wã n soos n koos a wakɩ koeems pisi ne bãmba tɩ b tall-a n loog Ezipt tẽnga. 
Genesis37:29 A Rubẽ leba bulgẽ wã n mik t'a Zozɛf ka le ket be ye t'a na n kẽes a fut," 
Genesis37:30 la a lɛɛg n wa yeel a ba-biisi: «Ad-y biiga ka le ket ye, la m na n kẽe yɛ?»" 
Genesis37:31 Dẽ la b rɩk a Zozɛf fuugã n kodg boɛɛg a ye, n bilim fuuga zɩɩmẽ." 
Genesis37:32 B toolame tɩ b tɩ kɩs fu-yorgã b ba la b yeel-a: «Wã bala la tõnd sẽn yãende, ges-y sãnd ka y biiga fuugã?»" 
Genesis37:33 A Zakoob gesame n yeele: «Yaa m biiga fu-yorgo, bõn-nind n wãb a Zozɛf n zerem-a wa rũnga.»" 
Genesis37:34 A Zakoob kẽega a fuug n bao sũ-pa-noang fuugu n yeelge la a yãba a Zozɛf n kaoose. 
Genesis37:35 A kom-dibli la a kom-pugli waame n na n bels-a-la a zãgsa belsgo n yetẽ: «Bas-y-ma tɩ m sig bʋg-tẽng ne nintãm n paam m biiga.» La a kell n yõka yãbre. 
Genesis37:36 Madianitsa koosa a Zozɛf. B koos-a-la ne Ezipt tẽng rao a ye, a Potifar. Da yaa nin-kãsenga Ezipt naaba zakẽ la zaka rãmb dɩlgr ra paka yẽnda." 
Genesis38:1 Ade, a Zɩɩda waa n basa a ba-biisã n kẽng Adulam nin-yend nengẽ la nin-kãng yʋʋr la a Ira." 
Genesis38:2 A waa n yãenda Kanaã bi-pugl sẽn boond tɩ Suwa la a rɩk-a lame n maan a paga. 
Genesis38:3 Paga waa n dɩka pʋga n dog a biiga n bool tɩ Er. 
Genesis38:4 A sẽn le rog biig a to, a pʋd-a lame tɩ Ona." 
Genesis38:5 A le roga biig a to, n pʋd yẽ soab t'a Sela. Yɩɩ Kezib tẽng la a kũm yẽ rogem." 
Genesis38:6 A Zɩɩda bao pag n kõ a bi-kẽeng a Er, paga da boondame tɩ Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 La a Zɩɩda bi-kẽeng a Ɛr maana sẽn ka ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam tɩ b yãk a yõore. 
Genesis38:8 Dẽ la a Zɩɩda yeel a Ona: «Maan sẽn tog ne f kẽema paga n dog biig n kõ-a.» 
Genesis38:9 A Ona da mime tɩ biiga na n yɩ-la a kẽema biig n yaool ka yẽ biig ye. A sã n da kẽ ne pagã a da raagda zɩɩma tẽnga n mi tɩ woto a kõn dog biig n kõ a kẽem ye. 
Genesis38:10 Dẽ me pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam ye tɩ b sɩbg-a ne kũum. 
Genesis38:11 A Zɩɩda kong n yeela a bi-pag a Tamar: «Leb f ba-yiri wa pʋg-kõore t'a Sela paam n bɩ.» A sẽn gom woto wã yaa a sẽn da rat tɩ bi-kãng põse, n da ki wala a kẽem dãmba; a Tamar sakame n leb a ba-yiri." 
Genesis38:12 Sẽn waa n kaoos bilfu, a Zɩɩda pag a Suwa kiime. A Zɩɩda sẽn yãb a pag n sɛ, a kẽnga Timna n na n tɩ wõrs a piisi, yẽ ne a zoa, a Ira, Adulam neda." 
Genesis38:13 B yeela a Tamar: «Ad-a Ɛr ba wã wata Timna n na n wõrs a piisi.» 
Genesis38:14 A Tamar yeesa fut niyns sẽn da wilgd t'a yaa pʋg-kõorã n bao peend n murs-mursi, n zĩ Enayim tẽnga kʋɩleng sɛɛga; Enayim da bee Timna sor zugu. A Tamar neeme t'a Sela lebga raoa tɩ b pa rɩk-a n kõ-a ye." 
Genesis38:15 A Zɩɩda yãenda a Tamar la a mams-a-la ne pʋg-yoodre; a nenga ra ludame. 
Genesis38:16 A bʋʋg-a lame n yeel-a: «Bas tɩ m kẽ ne fo!» A ra ka mi tɩ yaa a bi-pag ye. Dẽ la a Tamar sok-a: «Bõe la f na n kõ-m tɩ m sak-fo?» 
Genesis38:17 T'a leoke: «M na tool-f bulla, m sã n ta yiri.» La paga yeelame: «M na sake, f sã n dɩk f bũmb n bas m nugẽ, tɩ bulla sã n wa bɩ f le reege.»" 
Genesis38:18 Dẽ la a Zɩɩda sok yã: «F ratame tɩ m bas bõe?» T'a yeele: «Fo sẽn tar bũmb ning n kõt kaset tɩ sẽn gʋlsa yaa foom n gʋlse, bõn-kãng ne a boabdga, n paas f rasaarã.» A sak n kɩs-a-la rẽ fãa; b bãnga taaba. A Tamar tol n wa mikame t'a tedgame." 
Genesis38:19 Paga sẽn kul a yiri, a yãka peenna n lebs a pʋg-kõt fut n yeelge." 
Genesis38:20 A Zɩɩda tʋma a zoa, Adulam daoa, t'a tɩ kɩs bullã la a reeg a teed n wa. A sẽn kẽnge, a pa yãend paga ye." 
Genesis38:21 A soka tẽnga rãmba: «Pʋg-yoodrã sẽn da be Enayim sora noorã bee ye?» Tɩ b leok-a: «Pʋg-yoodr zɩ n zĩnd ka ye.» 
Genesis38:22 A lɛɛg n waa a Zɩɩda nengẽ n yeel t'a pa yãend-a ye, tɩ la tẽnga rãmb me kõo kaseto tɩ b zɩ n yãe pʋg-yoodr be ye." 
Genesis38:23 A Zɩɩda leokame: «A tall gilli; pa tog tɩ b wa laad tõnd ye; m tʋma foo ne bullã la f pa tɩ yãend-a ye.» 
Genesis38:24 Sẽn maan kiis a tã, b togsa a Zɩɩda: «Ad-f bi-paga Tamar maana yoob n tol n dɩk pʋga.» A Zɩɩda kõo noor tɩ b yiis-a tẽnga pʋga n yõog-a bugum." 
Genesis38:25 B sẽn waa n tar-a n yita, a tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zɩɩda: «Yaa sẽn so a woto wã fãa soab biig la m tʋta. Ges-y neere n bãng ãnnã n so gʋlsg kaset kãngã, ne a boabdgã la dasaarã?»" 
Genesis38:26 A Zɩɩda gesa neere la a yeelame: «Paga bʋʋm yɩɩda maam sɩda, tɩ m da pa sak n dɩk-a n kõ m biig a Sela ye.» Dẽ tɛka b ka le bãng taab ye." 
Genesis38:27 A Tamar sẽn waa n kũmd dogem, a mikame tɩ yaa kinkirsi." 
Genesis38:28 Dogma wakato biig a yembr tuda a nug yɩnga tɩ pʋg-roagsa gãd-a n loe gĩs-miuugu n yeele: «Yãoo la pipi.» 
Genesis38:29 Yẽ soaba le kẽesa a nug la yaa yao wã n yi, tɩ pʋg-roagsa yeele: «Yaa bõe n na n maan-f tɩ f fãod n yita?» Tɩ b bool-a t'a Perɛk, a Fãooda." 
Genesis38:30 A ye wã yaool n yiime tɩ gĩs miuuga loe a nugu, tɩ b bool-a tɩ Zera, a Yõadi." 
Genesis39:1 Yaa Ezipt tẽng la b taas a Zozɛf. A Potifar da raa-a-la Ismayɛl yagensa nengẽ. Ezipt dĩma yam da kẽ-la a Potifar la yẽ la dĩma gũudba tãnsoaba. 
Genesis39:2 Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda ne a Zozɛf, bũmb fãa sak-a lame, a pa-la a Potifar zakẽ." 
Genesis39:3 Nin-kãnga yãendame t'a Zozɛf yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd da bee ne-a tɩ bũmba fãa sakd-a," 
Genesis39:4 a ra nong-a lame, a rɩka a zak naam la a sẽn tar fãa n bas ne-a." 
Genesis39:5 Ezipt raoã sẽn dɩk a zak naam la a sẽn tar fãa n bas ne a Zozɛf tɛka, Soaala-Wẽnd ninga a zak barka. Barka siga a sẽn da tar fãa, a zak wala a pʋto." 
Genesis39:6 A sẽn dɩk fãa n bas ne a Zozɛf, a ka le bʋ bũmb ba a ye poorẽ ye, tʋʋmd ning a sẽn da kell a meng yĩnga, da yaa a menga rɩlgre bala. A Zozɛf ra yaa rao sẽn pidi la a neng ra sakda gesgo." 
Genesis39:7 Sẽn waa n beẽ, a Zozɛf zu-soaba pag yam waa n sog-a lame. Paga yeelame: «Zefo, kẽ ne maam!»" 
Genesis39:8 A Zozɛf zãgsame la a yeel-a lame: «M zu-soaba maana yard ne maam, n pa le bʋʋd bũmb ba a ye, n dɩk fãa n gũnug-ma." 
Genesis39:9 A zaka pʋga a ka tar waoor n yɩɩd maam ye, a ka yet tɩ m maan a ni ne bũmb ba a ye sã n ka ne foo, a paga. Sẽn ya woto wã, m na n yɩɩ wãn n tũ fo raab wẽnga la m beeg Wẽnde?»" 
Genesis39:10 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, paga ra ket n gomda ne a Zozɛf la a kell n zãgsame, a pa sak n gãand ne-a ye." 
Genesis39:11 Daar a ye, a Zozɛf kẽe a Potifar zakẽ n tʋmd a tʋʋma. Dakõor ba a ye da ka pa zaka pʋg ye." 
Genesis39:12 Paga gãda a fuug n yeel-a: «Gãand ne maam!» La a Zozɛf basa fuugã a nugẽ n zoe n yi. 
Genesis39:13 A sẽn mik t'a Zozɛf basa a fuug a nugẽ n zoe n yi," 
Genesis39:14 a boola a sõgen-kamba n yeel-ba: «Ges-y, m sɩda waa ne Ebre kãnga, t'a rat n yog ne maam; a tol n kolgame t'a na n yõg-ma la mam kelmame tɩ sãde." 
Genesis39:15 A sẽn mik tɩ m zẽka m koɛɛg n boondẽ, a bas a fuug m nugẽ la a zoeeme n yi.»" 
Genesis39:16 Paga rɩka fuugã n dɩgl a sɛɛgẽ n gũud a zu-soaba waoongo. 
Genesis39:17 La a sɩda sẽn wa, a goma woto: «Fo sẽn tall Ebre ning n wa ka wã kolgame n na yog ne maam." 
Genesis39:18 M zẽka m koɛɛg n boole t'a bas a fuug m nugẽ n zoe n yi.» 
Genesis39:19 A Potifar sẽn wʋm pagã sẽn yeelã: «Ges f yem-daoogã sẽn tʋlg bũmb ning ne maam,» a sũur yikame." 
Genesis39:20 A kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Zozɛf n kẽes roogo. 
Genesis39:21 Soaala-Wẽnd sõnga a Zozɛf, b nonglma paa ne-a, ro-gũuda ka yɩ toaag ne-a ye." 
Genesis39:22 Gũudba naab tol n yeela a Zozɛf t'a ges bi-bees a taaba yelle la bũmb sɩd da ka maand t'a ka bãng tiir ye. 
Genesis39:23 Tʋʋmd buud da ka le ket gũdba naab sẽn na n tʋm ye, tɩ Wẽnd da sõngda a Zozɛf t'a sẽn maand fãa baasd neere." 
Genesis40:1 Sẽn yɩ bilfu, neb a yiib n beeg dĩma beegr kãsenga; yaa sẽn geta rãama yelle la sẽn geta rɩɩba yelle." 
Genesis40:2 Dĩma sũur puuga ne bãmb b yiibã al wʋsgo. 
Genesis40:3 A sui-b-la roogo; ro-kãng pʋg me la b ra kẽes a Zozɛf. Gũudba kãsem n da so ro-kãng gesgo. 
Genesis40:4 Gũudba naab kosa a Zozɛf t'a ges neb a yiiba me yelle. B kaoosa roogẽ wã bilfu," 
Genesis40:5 Yʋng a ye, sẽn wata ne dĩma rãama la sẽn wata ne dĩma rɩɩbã b sẽn yõk n sui roogã paama zãmsdo. Zãmsda da wilgda ned kam yell sẽn na n yɩ a soaba." 
Genesis40:6 A Zozɛf taa b nengẽ yibeoogo la a mik-b-la ne sũ-sãanga. 
Genesis40:7 T'a sok-ba: «Yaa bõe tɩ y nens gãnem dũnna?» 
Genesis40:8 Tɩ b yeele: «Tõnd zãmsame la d ka tar ned sẽn na n togs tõnd d zãmsda võor ye.» A Zozɛf yeel-b lame: «Bãng-y tɩ sɩda, yaa Wẽnd n tar bũmb fãa võore, la yãmb ye n togs maam y zãmsdã.»" 
Genesis40:9 Rãama kɩtã n sɩnge, a yeelame: «Mam zãmsame tɩ tɩɩg sẽn womd biisi tɩ b tõsd n maand dãam n yɛs mam taoore." 
Genesis40:10 Will a tã n tão tɩɩga sɛɛga, n tob vãado, n ning puudu, n ning sib gĩin la gĩna wẽneg n moogame." 
Genesis40:11 M da zãada Ezipt dĩma rãam wamd m nugẽ, m fãsga tɩɩga biis n wẽk wamdẽ wã n dɩk wamna n sagl dĩma nugẽ.»" 
Genesis40:12 A Zozɛf yeel-a lame: «Ad-f zãmsda võore: will a tã makda dasem a tã. 
Genesis40:13 Keta rasem a tã tɩ dĩma yiis foom roogo tɩ f le rɩk f pĩnd tʋʋmde; foom n na n dɩk rãama wamd n le sagl dĩma nugẽ wala f sẽn da maande. 
Genesis40:14 La f zug sã n yɩ noogo, bɩ f ra yĩm m yell ye, tẽeg n gom m yelle ne f zu-soabã t'a yiis m doogo." 
Genesis40:15 Mam yita Ebre rãmb tẽnga la m sẽn wa ka wã, m ka maan bũmb sẽn sek roog ye.»" 
Genesis40:16 Rɩɩba kɩta sẽn mik t'a Zozɛf leokra wẽnda gom noogo, yẽ me waa ne a sẽn zãmse. A yeelame: «Mam me zãmsa woto: M da tʋka rɩɩb pet a tã." 
Genesis40:17 Peoog ninga sẽn da roga zugẽ wã da pida ne dĩma rɩɩb buud fãa la luiili waa n dɩt-b-la m zugẽ.» 
Genesis40:18 A Zozɛf yeel-a lame: «Fo zãmsda võor la woto: pet a tãaba makda dasem a tã. 
Genesis40:19 Dɩlla keta rasem a tã tɩ dĩma zẽk foo n zʋʋg f sẽn date. A na n yiisa foo n tɩ luul tɩ luiili tõs f nemdo.» 
Genesis40:20 Sɩda, dasem sẽn maan a tã, dĩma moona kibsa a rogem tẽegr yĩnga, a segla rɩɩbo n bool nin-bɛda fãa, n bool rãama kɩta la rɩɩba me kɩta." 
Genesis40:21 A lebsa rãama naab a pĩnd zĩigẽ la yɩɩ yẽnda n pʋdg rãama n kõ-a. 
Genesis40:22 A kɩtame tɩ b yõk rɩɩba kɩta n luuli, wala a Zozɛf sẽn da togsã." 
Genesis40:23 Bãng-y tɩ rãama kɩta ka maan tẽegr ye, a yĩma a Zozɛf yell fasi." 
Genesis41:1 Sẽn maam yʋʋm a yi, dĩma me zãmsame: a ra yɛsa Nil kʋɩlga noore." 
Genesis41:2 A yãee nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn yi kʋɩlgẽ wã n wãbd yamdo, b ra nobame n ya yɩlma." 
Genesis41:3 Nag-yãans a yopoe le yii kʋɩlgẽ wã; b waglmame n ka le tar neerem ye la b wa n yegla pipi rãmbã. 
Genesis41:4 La sẽn wagl-bã, n ka tar neerma wãba a yopoe wã sẽn nob n ya yɩlma. La dĩma wẽneg n nekame." 
Genesis41:5 A waa n le gũsame, n le zãmse: kaf a ye n da ning zut a yopoe; a ye fãa yaa bedre, n pɛ neere." 
Genesis41:6 La bãmb poore, zut a yopoe a taaba, war sẽn wãke la sẽn ya bõonese, n tão n yi." 
Genesis41:7 Ka-zut niyns sẽn ya b bõonesã dɩɩ sẽn sĩd bã, n ya bɛdã. Dĩma sẽn neke, a bãngame tɩ yɩɩ zãmsdo." 
Genesis41:8 Beoog sẽn vẽege, Ezipt dĩma yama da gõodame. Dẽ la a kɩt tɩ b bool Ezipt sɛb mitbã la yam zulung rãmba fãa, n togs a zãmsgã la ned ba a ye ka tõog n wilg a võor ye." 
Genesis41:9 Dẽ la sẽn kɩta dĩma rãama yik n yeele: «M data rũnna n wilg m kongre. 
Genesis41:10 Wakat n waa n zĩndi tɩ dĩma sũur puug ne maam la rɩɩba kɩta la a kɩtame tɩ b pag tõnd d yiiba roogo. 
Genesis41:11 Yʋng a ye, tõnd naaga taab n zãms zãmsdo; zãmsda da wẽnda taaba tɩ b võor yaool n ya toore." 
Genesis41:12 Ro-gũuda naab da tara yem-daoogo sẽn naag tõnd doogẽ la sẽn ya Ebrayitga; tõnd wilg-a-la d zãmsdo la a tõog n bilga b võore, a wilga ned kam fãa yell sẽn na n yɩ-la." 
Genesis41:13 Sɩd yɩɩ wala a sẽn da togsã, mam leba m pĩnd zĩigẽ la b luula m tũud-n-taagã.»" 
Genesis41:14 Ezipt dĩma kɩtame tɩ b bool a Zozɛf; tao-tao bal tɩ b yiis-a-la roogo. A põnga a zug, n teem futu, n wa yals dĩma taoore." 
Genesis41:15 Tɩ dĩma na n yeel a Zozɛf: «M zãmsa m zãmsdo la ned ba a ye ka tõog n wilg a võor ye. M yaool n wʋmame tɩ zãmsd sẽn lʋɩ f tʋbrẽ bal la f sẽn wa ne a võore.» 
Genesis41:16 A Zozɛf yeela dĩma: «Da teeg-y maam ye, teeg-y Naaba-Wẽnd tɩ bãmb n tõe n leok tɩ yõod zĩndi.»" 
Genesis41:17 Dĩma yeela a Zozɛf: «M zãmsda pʋgẽ, m da yɛsa Nil kʋɩlg noore," 
Genesis41:18 la nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn nobe, n ya yɩlma n yi kʋɩlgã n wãbd yamdo." 
Genesis41:19 La nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn waglme n ka le tar neerem ba bilfu, n yi n yegl pipi rãmbã, la Ezipt tẽng zɩ n yãe niis sẽn waglme n pa sakd gesgo wala nag-kãens ye." 
Genesis41:20 Sẽn wagl-bã, n ka tar neerma, wãba a yopoe wã sẽn da nobe n ya yɩlma." 
Genesis41:21 B sẽn vel-b n sɛ, ka yɩɩ wa b vela bũmb ye, b pa tedg ba bilfu; mam wẽneg n nekame." 
Genesis41:22 M waa n le zãmsame, n yãe kaaf a ye sẽn ning zut a yopoe t'a ye fãa ya bedre, n pɛ neere," 
Genesis41:23 la zut a yopoe a taab, war sẽn wãke la sẽn pa bõonese, tão n yii bãmb sɛɛgẽ," 
Genesis41:24 la sẽn ya-b bõonesã rɩɩ sẽn ya-b bẽdã la neebã. M togsa m zãmsdã mitbã la yam zulung rãmbã, la ned ba a ye pa tõog n wilg maam b võor nand ye.»" 
Genesis41:25 A Zozɛf yeela Ezipt dĩma: «Yãmb zãmsdã yaa zãms yɛnga, Wẽnd wilga dĩma bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ beoogo." 
Genesis41:26 Nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn ya yɩlma makda yʋʋm a yopoe; la ka-zut a yopoe sẽn pɛ neerã me makda yʋʋm a yopoe; zãmsga yaa zãms yɛnga. 
Genesis41:27 Nag-yãans a yopoe sẽn waglme n ka sakd gesgã sẽn pʋgã makda yʋʋm a yopoe, tɩ ka-zut a yopoe wara sẽn wãkã la sẽn pa bõonesã, bãmb me yaa yʋʋm a yopoe. Dɩlla yʋʋm a yopoe kom n na n zĩndi." 
Genesis41:28 Yaa wala m sẽn yeelã, Wẽnd wilga dĩma bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ beoogo." 
Genesis41:29 Yʋʋm a yopoe n wate tɩ Ezipt tẽng na n gal ne bũmb fãa. 
Genesis41:30 Yʋʋm a yopoe n na n pʋge la na n yɩɩ kom, bũmb ka na n le zĩndi, koma na n zaba tẽnga gilli." 
Genesis41:31 Koma sẽn na n pʋgã, la a na n zab wʋsgã na n kɩtame tɩ b yĩm tɩ Ezipt yɩɩ tɩgr tẽnga." 
Genesis41:32 Zãmsda sẽn yɩ a yiibã wilgdame tɩ Wẽnd nengẽ bũmba fãa yals n sɛɛme la wakat yaoome. 
Genesis41:33 Sẽn ket marsã, yaa dĩma bao ned sẽn tar yam la sɩlem t'a ges Ezipt yelle." 
Genesis41:34 Bɩ dĩma bao neb n zĩndig tẽng fãa pʋgẽ tɩ yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, bɩ ned kam fãa rok a kood yõod a nu soaba n tall n wa bãmb nengẽ." 
Genesis41:35 Yʋʋm a yopoe tɩgra pʋgẽ, b sõng n me bao tẽng fãa la b pids-b ne kood n bĩngi." 
Genesis41:36 Woto, koma yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, b na paam n dɩ n põse.»" 
Genesis41:37 Goama ta-la dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba yam. 
Genesis41:38 Dĩma pʋs n yeel-b lame: «Yɛɛnẽ la d na n yãe Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn pids ninsaal ne yam wala nin-kãnga?» 
Genesis41:39 Dẽ la a yeel a Zozɛf: «Wẽnd sẽn sõng foo tɩ f mi woto wã fãa, tõnd ka le ne ned a to sẽn tar yam la sɩlem wa foo ye." 
Genesis41:40 Dɩlla foom la m na n lʋɩɩs taoore, na n yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne tẽnga rãmb tɩ b tũ fo sẽn yeela fãa. Bũmb ninga sẽn na n welg maam ne foom na n yɩɩ naama zaoor bala.»" 
Genesis41:41 Dĩma le paasame: «Yɩ Ezipt tẽng soaala.» 
Genesis41:42 A pidga a nug-bĩng n pid a Zozɛf, n bao fu neeba n yelg-a, n bao sãnem yãndo n pid a yubla." 
Genesis41:43 A zombg-a-la a meng bilim-bilm a yiib soaba tɩ ned be a taoore n moonẽ: «Yĩgimd-y yã!» Yaa woto la a Zozɛf lebg Ezipt tẽng fãa soaala, ne Ezipt dĩma raabo." 
Genesis41:44 Dĩma yeela a Zozɛf: «Maam la dĩma menga, la sã n ka foom n kõ noore ned ka tõe n le zẽk a nug-bil meng Ezipt tẽng ye.»" 
Genesis41:45 A teema a Zozɛf yʋʋr la ne Ezipt rãmb goama a lebga Safnat-Panea, tɩ Wẽnd n so vɩɩm. A kõ-a-la paga sẽn boond tɩ Asmat; a Asmat yaa On maan-kʋʋd, a Potifera biiga. A Zozɛf yiime n kaag Ezipt tẽnga." 
Genesis41:46 B sẽn waa n tall a Zozɛf n wa Ezipt dĩma taoore t'a yʋʋm yaa pis-tã. A Zozɛf basa dĩma zaka n sɩng Ezipt tẽng gilgri. 
Genesis41:47 Tẽnga sɩd woma ne a sũur fãa yʋʋm a yopoe wã pʋgẽ. 
Genesis41:48 La yʋʋm a yopoe wã sẽn yɩ tɩgr yʋʋma, a kɩtame tɩ b tigs koodo; wetẽ dãmba koodã da watame n tigsd tẽn-bɛdẽ." 
Genesis41:49 A Zozɛf tigsa kood zembala, wa bĩisr sẽn be mogr noore, tɩ gɛɛndb bas taale ne b geelse, la sɩda, kooda da ka tõe n mag ye." 
Genesis41:50 Koma sẽn waa n nan ka lʋɩ tẽngã, a Zozɛf paama kamb a yiibu ne a Asmat, On maan-kʋʋd, a Potifera, bi-puglã." 
Genesis41:51 A Zozɛf pʋda a bi-kẽengã tɩ Manase, tɩ Wẽnd kɩtame t'a yĩm a naong la a buudu." 
Genesis41:52 A boola a to wã, a Efrayim, tɩ Wẽnd kɩtame t'a rog kamb a yembd tẽngẽ." 
Genesis41:53 Yʋʋm a yopoe tɩgrã wala Ezipt dãmb sẽn zɩ n yãend a taarã waa n loogame," 
Genesis41:54 tɩ yʋʋm a yopoe kom wala a Zozɛf sẽn da wilgã, ledg a zĩiga. Tẽnga zãgsa wombo, ne rẽ fãa, rɩɩb ka tol n kong Ezipt tẽng ye." 
Genesis41:55 Wara lʋɩɩme tɩ Ezipt rãmb bʋʋg dĩma n yãbd n kot rɩɩbo la a da yet-b lame: «Kẽng-y fãa a Zozɛf nengẽ, la a sẽn yet tɩ y maan bũmb ninga bɩ y maan.»" 
Genesis41:56 Yaool n da yaa dũni wã zãnga la koma lʋɩ yã; a Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b pags bao wã tɩ Ezipt rãmb paam kood n da. Koma waa n lebga toog Ezipt tẽnga. 
Genesis41:57 Dũni wã tõr da wata Ezipt tẽng n daad kood a Zozɛf nengẽ. Bãng-y tɩ koma da saaga dũni wã zãnga. 
Genesis42:1 A Zakoob wʋmame tɩ kood bee Ezipt tẽng n koosdẽ t'a yeel a kamba: «Y sẽn zĩi n get taaba yõod la bʋgo? 
Genesis42:2 M wʋmame tɩ kood bee Ezipt tẽng n koosdẽ, kẽng-y be n tɩ ra tɩ d rɩ n paam n põse.»" 
Genesis42:3 A Zozɛf kẽem dãmb piiga kẽnga Ezipt tẽnga n na n da koodo. 
Genesis42:4 A Zakoob pa sak t'a Bẽnzame tũ a kẽem dãmba ye. A Zozɛf ne a Bẽnzame yaa ma-biisi. A Zakoob ra yetame tɩ ka tog tɩ yell wa pak a me ye. 
Genesis42:5 A Israyɛl kamba tũu neb a taab n na n tɩ ra koodã tɩ koma ra bee Kanaã tẽnga. 
Genesis42:6 A Zozɛf da yaa na-kãsenga, da yaa yẽ nengẽ la raadba fãa da wat n daadẽ. Woto a Zozɛf kẽem dãmba sẽn taa a taoore b wõgemdame n waoog-a." 
Genesis42:7 A Zozɛf sẽn yãe a kẽem dãmbã, a bãng-b lame la a maana waa a ka mi-b ye, n tol gomd ne b yãas-yãasa. A sok-b lame: «Yãmb yita yɛ?» B leokame: «Tõnd yii Kanaã tẽng n wa n na n da koodo!»" 
Genesis42:8 A Zozɛf bãnga a kẽem dãmbã la bãmb yaool n ka bãng a Zozɛf ye. 
Genesis42:9 A Zozɛf tẽega a sẽn da zãms b poorẽ, a yeel-b lame: «Yãmb yaa lɩɩsdba, yãmb dat n bãnga zĩig ning tõnd pãnga sẽn paoodẽ, yaa rẽ la y wa ka.»" 
Genesis42:10 B naaga taab n yeele: «Ayo! Naaba, y yemsa waame bal n na n da koodo." 
Genesis42:11 D gill fãa yaa ned a ye kamba, la d togsda sɩda, y yemsa ka lɩɩsdb ye.»" 
Genesis42:12 T'a yeel-ba: «Ka sɩd ye, yaa tõnd pãng sẽn paood zĩig ning la yãmb baood n na n bãnge.»" 
Genesis42:13 B leoka a Zozɛf: «Yãmb yemsã da yaa piig la a yiibu, ba a ye kamba, d tẽng la Kanaã. Yao-zʋʋga paa ne d ba, tõnd nin-yend bal n ka le kete.»" 
Genesis42:14 A Zozɛf yeel-b lame: «Yaa wala m sẽn zoe n togsã, yãmb yaa lɩɩsdba." 
Genesis42:15 Ad sɩbgr ning m sẽn na n sɩbg yã: m wẽen ne Ezipt dĩma, yãmb kõn yi ka tɩ y ka reng n wa ne y yao-zʋʋga ye." 
Genesis42:16 Tʋm-y yãmb nin-yende t'a tɩ boaal-a t'a wa la yãmb meng pa roogẽ ka; d na ges y toagsga sã n yaa sɩda bɩ y sã n yagda zirẽ. D sẽn nan ka tar y pʋgã, m ket n wẽenda ne Ezipt dĩma tɩ yãmb yaa lɩɩsdba.»" 
Genesis42:17 A kẽes-b-la roogo dasem a tãab yĩnga. 
Genesis42:18 Da-tãten-daarã, a Zozɛf yeel-b lame: «M zoeta Wẽnde la ad-y sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n pam n põse:" 
Genesis42:19 sã n ya sɩd la yãmb sẽn togsã bɩ nin-yend pa ka, bi-beesa roogẽ, sẽn kell-ba na leb ne koodã n tɩ fãag y zak rãmba." 
Genesis42:20 Y yao-zʋʋga na tũ yãmb n wa, woto m na bãng tɩ y togsa sɩda la y kõn ki ye.» Yɩɩ woto la a nams-ba." 
Genesis42:21 B ra yeta taaba: Sɩda, yaa tõnd sẽn maan d yao wã bũmb ninga n leb tõndo, tõnd yãee sũ-sãang ning sẽn da be a sũurẽ a sẽn waa n yet tɩ d maan-a sugri tɩ tõnd pa kelgã, yaa rẽ la tõnd me zĩ rũnna ne yɩɩre." 
Genesis42:22 T'a Rubẽ yeel-ba: «M da ka yeel-y tɩ d da saag n maan d yao wã bũmb tɩ y zãgse, ad-b sẽn sokd tõnd a zɩɩm dũnna!»" 
Genesis42:23 B da ka mi t'a Zozɛf wʋmda b moora ye, woto no-rɛɛs n da be sʋk n deesd b goama n taasdẽ." 
Genesis42:24 A Zozɛf zãaga ne a kẽem dãmbã n tɩ yãbe la a lɛɛg n wa b sʋka n le gom ne-ba. A yõka a Simeõ n loe wĩir bãmb fãa nifẽ. 
Genesis42:25 A Zozɛf kõo noor tɩ b pids a kẽem dãmba yondo ne koodo n yaool n lebs ned kam fãa ligd n sui la b kõ-b sor zug dɩɩbo la b maana waa a sẽn wilgi. 
Genesis42:26 B rɩka b koodã n zɩlg b bõeense la b loogame. 
Genesis42:27 B sẽn ta b sikẽ, yʋngo, tɩ bãmb nin-yend lok a yolgo n na n yãk kood n kõ a bõanga, a yãee ligd a yolga pʋga." 
Genesis42:28 T'a na n yeel a ba-biisã: «B lebsa maam m ligdi, b sui-a-la m yolgẽ wã.» B pɛleng yɩka wʋsgo tɩ b get taaba la b rigda la b yetẽ: «Yaa bõe la Wẽnd maan tõnd woto?»" 
Genesis42:29 B ta-la b ba-yiri, Kanaã tẽnga la b togsa b ba bũmb ning fãa sẽn maane." 
Genesis42:30 B yeelame: «Tẽnga dĩma maana mo-beed ne tõndo, a mamsa tõnd ne lɩɩsdba." 
Genesis42:31 Tɩ tõnd yeel: ‹Tõnd yaa neb sẽn togsd sɩda, tõnd ka lɩɩsdb ye." 
Genesis42:32 Tõnd yaa piig la a yiibu, ba a ye kamba; a ye n ka be la yao-zʋʋga paa yiri, Kanaã tẽnga, ne d ba.›" 
Genesis42:33 Sẽn dɩta naam tẽnga pʋgẽ da ratame n bãng tõnd sã n togsda sɩda la a yeelame: ‹Bas-y yãmb nin-yend ka n kul ne kood n tɩ kõ y yir dãmba tɩ b tara a tʋʋmde; 
Genesis42:34 la lɛɛg n wa-y ne yãmb yao-zʋʋgã tɩ m na bãng tɩ y ka lɩɩsdb ye la y togsa sɩda; dẽ poor marsã m na lebs y nedã la y na tõog n da y sẽn dat bũmb ninga fãa tẽnga pʋgẽ.› » 
Genesis42:35 B zuka b yondo la b yãeeme tɩ ned kam fãa ligd da bee pʋgẽ, tɩ rabeem na n yõk-ba, bãmb ne b ba, a Zakoob" 
Genesis42:36 B ba a Zakoob yeel-b lame: «M kamb a yiib n ka ye, a Zozɛf ka ye, a Simeõ me ka ye, tɩ yãmb le rat a Bẽnzame n paase, yaa mam zug la yɛla fãa lʋɩta, dẽ fãa yaa mam zu-beedo!»" 
Genesis42:37 Dẽ la a Rubẽ leok a ba: «F na kʋ m kamb a yiibã, m sã n ka lɛɛg n wa ne a Bẽnzame, gũnug maam a Bẽnzame tɩ m na tall-a n wa lebs-fo.»" 
Genesis42:38 A Zakoob baas n yeelame: «Mam biiga kõn tũ yãmb ye. A kẽema kiime n bas yẽnda a ye, y sã n dɩk y sorã tɩ yell tek n pak-a, ad-y m kʋʋlma la sũ-sãang kãsenga na n kʋ-m lame.»" 
Genesis43:1 Koma da ket n zabda ne tẽnga rãmba. 
Genesis43:2 B sẽn yi Ezipt n wa ne kood ninga sɛɛme la b ba yeel-b lame: «Leb-y n tɩ ra kood n wa!» 
Genesis43:3 A Zɩɩda leokame: «Dao wã wilga tõnd neere t'a kõn le sak tɩ d wa a taoore, d yao-zʋʋga sã n ka be ne tõnd ye." 
Genesis43:4 Fo sã n sak t'a tũ, bãng tɩ tõnd na leb Ezipt tẽng n tɩ ra koodo." 
Genesis43:5 F sã n ka na n sak t'a tũ, tõnd me kõn leb ye; raoã togsame: ‹M ka rat n le yãend-y m taoore tɩ y yao wã ka be ne y ye.› »" 
Genesis43:6 A Zakoob yeelame: «La ãnda n yeel tɩ y wɩbg-ma n tãag n togs raoã tɩ y yao-zʋʋg a ye n kete?» 
Genesis43:7 Tɩ b leoke: «Yaa a sẽn sok tõnd d buuda poorẽ: ‹Y ba ket n vɩɩme, y tara yao a to?› Yaa rẽ yĩng la tõnd me togs yã; ãnna n da tõe n bãng t'a na yeele: ‹Wa-y ne y yao wa?› »" 
Genesis43:8 A Zɩɩda yeela a Israyɛl: «Bas tɩ m loog ne biigã, d yik n dɩk sor n paam n põse, tõnd ne d sẽn get b rãmb yelle." 
Genesis43:9 A Bẽnzame yell doga m zugu, m sã n ka lɛɛg n wa ne-a, bɩ f sok-ma, m sã n ka lɛɛg n wa ne-a tɩ f yãend-a ne f nifu, bɩ m dɩ rẽ taal m vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ." 
Genesis43:10 Tõnd sã n da ka ka kaoosẽ yiibu, marsa sekẽ la d ta la d lɛɛg n waẽ.»" 
Genesis43:11 La kamba ba, a Israyɛl, yeelame: «Kẽnda sẽn ya tɩlɛ wã, bɩ y maan woto: bao-y tẽnga bõn-sõma buud fãa n zɩ n tɩ kõ raoã; kaam sẽn tar n sõod nenga, seem buud toor-toore la sɩɩdo." 
Genesis43:12 Zɩ-y ligd y kordẽ la y rɩk pĩnd ligdã n paase tɩ daare yɩɩ tudgri. 
Genesis43:13 Deeg-y y yao wã la yik-y n leb raoã nengẽ. 
Genesis43:14 La Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba na kɩt t'a maan y yardo la a bas-y tɩ y lɛɛg n wa ne y yao, a Bẽnzame; m sã n na n dɩ m kamba bõne bɩ m dɩ.»" 
Genesis43:15 B sɩd yii ne b kũuna, ne b bõeensã, ne b ligdã, n tɩ sig Ezipt tẽnga la b ta-la a Zozɛf taoore." 
Genesis43:16 A Zozɛf sẽn yãe a kẽem dãmba ne a Bẽnzame, a yeela a sõgen kãsenga: «Tall-y-ba n kẽ zakẽ; kʋ-y rũng n segl, tɩ wĩntoogã b na n dɩɩ ne maam.»" 
Genesis43:17 Sõgna maana wala a Zozɛf sẽn yeele n tall-ba n kẽes zakẽ. 
Genesis43:18 B sẽn waa n tar-b n dabdã, dabeem yõk-b lame; la b ra yeta taaba: Ad-y yaa ligdã sẽn pa tõnd yonnẽ wã yĩnga la b tar tõnd n dabd a Zozɛf yiri, b na n kãaga tõnd n kẽes yembdo la b reeg d bõeense." 
Genesis43:19 B sẽn kolg zaka noore b yeela a Zozɛf sõgen kãsengã: 
Genesis43:20 «Y kabre, d zu-soaba! Tõnd zoe n waa ka vugri n da koodo." 
Genesis43:21 Tõnd sẽn lɛɛg n kuisẽ, d sẽn ta d sik zĩigẽ, n pak d yondo, ned kam fãa yãeeme tɩ ligda keta a zĩigẽ tɩ tõnd le tar-a n watẽ." 
Genesis43:22 D waa ne ligd me n na n le ra koodo tɩ sɩda tõnd ka bãng sẽn ya ned ning n lebs ligda yonnẽ wã ye.» 
Genesis43:23 Sõgen-kãsenga leok-b lame: «Gãneg-y y yam, da maan-y rabeem ye tɩ yãmb Wẽnd la y ba Wẽnd n ning arzɛk y yonnẽ, sã n ya maam, m da reega m ligdi.» A kẽe n waa ne a Simeõ." 
Genesis43:24 Sõgna tɩ kẽes-b-la a Zozɛf zakẽ n tall koom n wa tɩ b waas b nao, n tall yamd n wa tɩ b kõ b bõeense." 
Genesis43:25 B yiisa b kũuna n dɩgl n gũud a Zozɛf waoongo, wĩnto-sʋka, tɩ b waa n bãngame tɩ b na n dɩɩ ne yẽnda." 
Genesis43:26 A Zozɛf waa yiri tɩ b yiis b kũuna n kõ-a la b wõgemda tẽng n waoog-a. 
Genesis43:27 A reega b pʋʋsem neere la a sok-b lame: «La nin-kẽema, yãmb sẽn gom mam a soab yellã, a ket n vɩɩme?»" 
Genesis43:28 Tɩ b leoke: «Tõnd ba, yãmb yamba, bee ne laafi, a ket n vɩɩme.» La b le yĩgimdame, b le wõgemdame." 
Genesis43:29 A Zozɛf zẽka a nin n yãe a yao, a Bẽnzame, a ma biiga, la a sokame: «Woto la yãmb yao-zʋʋga bɩ, yaa yẽ yell la y sẽn da leok maama bɩ?» Dẽ poore a yeela a Bẽnzame: «Wẽnd na sõng fo, m biiga!»" 
Genesis43:30 A Zozɛf zoe n yiime, a sẽn yãee a Bẽnzame t'a sũur rigimd t'a nin kalsd nintãm, a kẽ-la a roogẽ, la be, a yãbame." 
Genesis43:31 A peka a neng n lɛɛg n yi la a tõoga a meng n yeele: «Wa-y ne rɩɩba.» 
Genesis43:32 B waa ne a Zozɛf rẽnd toore la Ezipt rãmba rẽnd me toore tɩ Ezipt rãmb ka sakd n dɩ ne Ebre rãmb ye, dẽ yaa b kisgu." 
Genesis43:33 A Zakoob kamba ra zĩ-la a Zozɛf taoore la a Zozɛf ra zĩndig-b-la kãseng-kãsengo, n sɩng kẽema n ta yao-zʋʋgã la rẽ yɛɛs-b lame." 
Genesis43:34 A Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b yãk rɩɩb yẽ meng laagẽ n kõ-ba la a Bẽnzame pʋɩɩrã yɩɩga a taab naoor a nu. B naaga a Zozɛf n yũ la lebga laa-n-kaase. 
Genesis44:1 A Zozɛf kõ a sõgen-kãsenga noore: «Pids-b yonda ne koodo wala b sẽn tõe n zɩ tɛka, la lebs ned kam fãa ligd n sui pʋgẽ.»" 
Genesis44:2 A rɩka wanzurf wũmbla n naag ne a Bẽnzame ligdã n sui yolgẽ. Sõgna maana wala a Zozɛf sẽn yeelã. 
Genesis44:3 Beoog sẽn vẽege, b bas-b lame tɩ b looge ne b bõeense." 
Genesis44:4 B ka paam n zãag ye, t'a Zozɛf yeela a sõgna: «Yik n zoe n pʋg-ba la f gom ne b woto: bõe tɩ b maan yãmb neere tɩ yãmb lebsd wẽnga?" 
Genesis44:5 Bõe tɩ yãmb dɩk m zu-soaba sẽn tar wũmbl ning n yũud a rãama la a lɩkd be n bʋgd a bagrã? Y sẽn maana sɩd yaa wẽnga.» 
Genesis44:6 Sõgna wudg n paam-b lame la a taas-b-la a zu-soaba koɛɛga. 
Genesis44:7 Dẽ la b leok yã: «Yaa bõe la d zu-soaba gomd woto? F yemsã yɩta a wãn n maan yell a woto fãa? 
Genesis44:8 Ade, ligda meng tõnd sẽn tees n yãend d yonnẽ, tõnd tall-a lame n wa, d na n yɩɩ wãn n wa zuud f soaala sãnem bɩ a wanzurfu?" 
Genesis44:9 B sẽn na n yãend b bũmba ned ninga yolgẽ bɩ b kʋ yẽ soaba la b kẽes tõnd fãa yembdo.» 
Genesis44:10 Sõgna leok-b lame: «Bɩ y maan wala yãmb sẽn yeelã, d sẽn na n yãend bũmbã ned ninga yolgẽ, yẽ soab na lebg mam yamba la sẽn ket-ba na loog ne laafi.»" 
Genesis44:11 Tao-tao bal tɩ ned kam fãa sika a yolgo n lok-a. 
Genesis44:12 Sõgna sɩnga kẽem dãmba vɛɛsgo n wat yao-zʋʋgã la a yãenda bũmbã a Bẽnzame yolgẽ. 
Genesis44:13 B kẽesa b futu la b zɩlga b bõeense n le rɩk na-tẽnga sore. 
Genesis44:14 A Zɩɩda ne a ba-biisã kẽe a Zozɛf zakẽ; a Zozɛf da ket n bee be la b wõgemda a taoore. 
Genesis44:15 T'a Zozɛf sok-ba: «Yaa bõe la y sẽn maana? Yãmb ka mi tɩ ned wa maama bagr neeme la?» 
Genesis44:16 A Zɩɩda leokame: «Tõnd na n yeela d zu-soaba tɩ bõe? Gomd bʋg la d na n togs n paam bʋʋm, ad-y yaa Wẽnd meng b toor n luk y yemsã bãongo; woto wã d fãa na n lebga yãmb yem-daado, tõnd ne sẽn maana yellã.»" 
Genesis44:17 A Zozɛf leok-b lame: «M ka tõe n maan boto ye, sẽn ket-ba na n leba b ba nengẽ ne laafi.»" 
Genesis44:18 Dẽ la a Zɩɩda yik n kolg a Zozɛf n yeel-a: «M naaba, y kabre! Kelg-y mam koɛɛg, kelg-y ne sũ-maasem, yãmb sẽn tar Ezipt dĩma meng naama." 
Genesis44:19 Yaa woto la m naaba ra sok tõndo: ‹Yãmb ba ketame? Yãmb tara yao?› 
Genesis44:20 Tɩ tõnd yeel d zu-soaba: ‹D tara ba sẽn kʋʋle la yao-zʋʋga, a kʋʋlem biiga; a kẽem n ka be, t'a lebg a ma-bi-yende la a ba wã nong-a-la wʋsgo!›" 
Genesis44:21 Yãmb yeela y yemsã: ‹Tall-y yẽnda n wa tɩ m yãee ne m nifu.› 
Genesis44:22 Wakat kãnga tõnd leok-y lame: ‹Yao wã ka tõe n loog n bas nin-kẽema ye, a sã n zãag ne-a, ba wã na n kiime.›" 
Genesis44:23 La yãmb leoka tõndo: ‹Y yao-zʋʋga sã n ka tũ n wa, m ka rat n le yãend-y m taoor ye.›" 
Genesis44:24 Yaa woto la tõnd kul n tɩ togs d ba, yãmb yamba." 
Genesis44:25 Yaa woto me la a waa n baas n yeel tõndo: ‹Tɩ ra-y kood n wa,›" 
Genesis44:26 tõnd leokame: ‹Tõnd ka tõe n leb be ye, d sã n lebe, dẽnd d yao-zʋʋga tũ, tɩ tõnd kõn tõog n ta neda taoore, yao-zʋʋga sã n ka tũ ye.›" 
Genesis44:27 Tõnd ba wã, yãmb yamba, paasame: ‹Yãmb miime tɩ b yɩ-la b yiib bala b ma pʋgẽ," 
Genesis44:28 a ye menemame la m tẽedame tɩ bõn-nind n sɩɩg-a wa rũnga, la sẽn ta marsã, m nif ka le teeg-a ye." 
Genesis44:29 Yãmb sã n loog ne ada tɩ yell pak-a, y na kɩt tɩ kʋʋlem la sũ-sãang kãseng kʋ-ma, la rẽ me yɩta y yelle.›" 
Genesis44:30 Dɩlla mam sã n leb m ba wã nengẽ tɩ biig ninga a sẽn nong wʋsgã yaool n pa ka," 
Genesis44:31 ad-a sã n bao-a n konge, yaa yãmb yemsã b toore n na n kɩt tɩ d ba wã zug sẽn pelgã sig bʋg-tẽnga ne sũ-sãang kãsenga." 
Genesis44:32 Yaa rẽ la m yeel yã: ‹Yao wã yell doga m zugu, m sã n ka lɛɛg n wa ne-a, bɩ m dɩ rẽ taale, m vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ.›" 
Genesis44:33 Sẽn ket marsã, yaa mam pa ka bala, n lebg yamba tɩ yao wã loog ne a kẽem dãmba." 
Genesis44:34 M yɩta a wãn n leb m ba nengẽ, biiga sã n ka tũ? M pa rat tɩ m nif yãend yell ning sẽn na n pak m ba wã ye.»" 
Genesis45:1 A Zozɛf ka tõog n le yõk a meng a neba taoor ye, a yeelame: «Y fãa yi yɩnga!» Sɩda, a Zozɛf sẽn waa n na n vẽneg a meng a ba-biisã, sãan ba a ye ka zĩnd sʋk ye." 
Genesis45:2 A Zozɛf da yãbdame tɩ yita, tɩ Ezipt rãmb tol n wʋme, t'a yãbra kibar tol n ta Ezipt dĩma menga." 
Genesis45:3 A Zozɛf yeela a kẽem dãmba: «Maam la a Zozɛf. M ba wã ket n vɩɩme?» La a ba-biisã ka tõog n leok ye tɩ b pɛleng yɩkame. 
Genesis45:4 T'a Zozɛf yeel-ba: «Kolg-y!» La b kolgame, t'a paase: «Maam la a Zozɛf, y yao ninga y sẽn koos ne Ezipt rãmbã." 
Genesis45:5 Marsã, da sãam-y y sũur ye, da ges-y yãmb sẽn koos maama wa wẽng tɩ loog ye, tɩ yaa yãmb fãagr yĩnga la Wẽnd kɩt tɩ m deng yãmb taoor ka." 
Genesis45:6 Yaa yʋʋm a yi rõanna la kom lʋɩ tẽngã la yʋʋm na n kell m maana a nu tɩ koob pa na n ko ye, tɩ tigsgu pa na n tigs ye." 
Genesis45:7 Wẽnnaam tʋm-m-la yãmb taoore, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ d buuda kɩ yẽgende la wʋsg paam n põse." 
Genesis45:8 Dɩlla ka yãmb n tʋm maam ka ye, yaa Wẽnnaam, la b kɩtame tɩ m lebg nin-kãsenga, dĩma zakẽ, la m get Ezipt tẽng fãa yelle." 
Genesis45:9 Leb-y y ba nengẽ tao-tao la y yeel-a: ‹F biiga Zozɛf koɛɛg la woto: Wẽnd kõo maam naam Ezipt tẽnga, wa m nengẽ tao-tao." 
Genesis45:10 M na n kẽes-f-la Gosen tẽnga la f na n zĩnda be foo ne f kamba, la f yagense, la f rũmsi, la f sẽn so fãa." 
Genesis45:11 Beene m na sõng-y ne rɩɩbo, m na sõng tɩ foo ne f zaka la f sẽn so fãa da wʋm far ye. Koma na n kell n kaoosa yʋʋm a nu.› »" 
Genesis45:12 A Zozɛf paasame: «Yãmb meng nin neeme la m yao a Bẽnzame nee ne a nin tɩ yaa mam meng m toore n gomd ne-yã. 
Genesis45:13 Tɩ togs-y m ba t'a bãng naam ning m sẽn dɩt Ezipt tẽnga, la y sẽn yãe bũmb ning fãa. Sõng-y tɩ m ba wã wa tao.»" 
Genesis45:14 A wudg n mobga a Bẽnzame la a tar yãbre; a Bẽnzame me mobg-a lame la a yãbame. 
Genesis45:15 A mobga a kẽem dãmba fãa ne nintãm la b waa n zĩndame n sõse. 
Genesis45:16 Dĩma me wʋmame t'a Zozɛf kẽem-dãmbã n wa, la rẽ yɩ-la a sũ-noogo, yẽ ne a poorẽ dãmba." 
Genesis45:17 A goma ne a Zozɛf woto: «Yeel f kẽem-dãmbã: ‹Zɩlg-y bõeensã n leb Kanaã 
Genesis45:18 n peeg y ba la buuda zãng n wa ka, m na bao zĩ-sõng Ezipt tẽng n kõ yã tɩ tẽnga sɩɩlma n na n yɩ y rɩɩbo.›" 
Genesis45:19 La foom, Zozɛf, kõ b no-kãnga: ‹Zɩ-y bilim-bilm ka, n tɩ sagl y pagba, y kamba la y ba, n wa.›" 
Genesis45:20 Yãmb sẽn na n bas bũmb ning fãa Kanaã da ges-y rẽ wa bõne koe; sẽn ya neer la sõng fãa Ezipt tẽnga, na n yɩɩ yãmb soolem.»" 
Genesis45:21 Ad-a Zakoob kamba sẽn maane: a Zozɛf bao bilim-bilm n kõ-ba wala dĩma meng sẽn wilgã. A kõ-b-la sor dɩɩb me. 
Genesis45:22 A kõo ned kam fãa kibs fuugu. Sã n yaa a Bẽnzame, yẽ reega wakɩ koeems kobs-tã la kibs fut a nu." 
Genesis45:23 A kɩtame tɩ b bao Ezipt te-sõma n zɩlg bõeens piiga la bõn-yãans piig sẽn na n tʋk koodo la buri la bãmb ne b ba wã sor zug rɩɩbo. 
Genesis45:24 A basa a kẽem dãmbã tɩ b looge la a yeel-b-la woto: «Sor zugu, da wẽ-y no-koɛɛm ye!»" 
Genesis45:25 B yii Ezipt tẽnga n lɛɛg n wa Kanaã, b ba, a Zakoob, nengẽ." 
Genesis45:26 B yeel-a lame: «A Zozɛf ket n vɩɩme, pʋs n yaa yẽ n so Ezipt tẽnga.» A sũur pa kiuus ye, t'a pa tẽ b goama ye." 
Genesis45:27 B sẽn wa n togs a Zozɛf sẽn yeel bũmb ninga fãa, a sẽn waa n yãe bilim-bilm a Zozɛf sẽn toole, yẽnda rɩkr yĩngã, raood le waame." 
Genesis45:28 T'a yeele: «A Zozɛf sã n ket vɩ, rẽ seka maam, m na kẽng n tɩ yãend-a ne m nifu la m yaool n ki!»"
