Genesis46:1 A Israyɛl yii ne a sẽn tar fãa. A taa Beerseba n kʋ maand n waoog a ba, a Izaak, Wẽnnaam." 
Genesis46:2 Wẽnnaam lik-a-la yʋngo n yeel-a: «Zakoob, Zakoob!» T'a leoke: «M bee ka!»" 
Genesis46:3 Tɩ Wẽnd yeele: «Maam la Wẽnnaam, mam la f ba, a Izaak Wẽnnaam da maan dabeem ne Ezipt kẽnd ye, yaa be la m na n kɩt tɩ f buud lebg bu-kãsenga." 
Genesis46:4 Maam n na n yãag foom Ezipt tẽnga, maam n na n leb n tɩ yiis-f be la a Zozɛf n na n mum f nini.»" 
Genesis46:5 A Zakoob yii Beerseba; a kamba kɩtame tɩ b ba, b kom-bõonego la b pagb kẽ bilim-bilm dĩma sẽn da tool so-toaka yĩnga." 
Genesis46:6 B zɩ-la b rũmsi la b sẽn da tar fãa Kanaã tẽnga n tɩ kẽ Ezipt. 
Genesis46:7 A Zakoob ne a kamba, a yagense, a kom-pugli, a kom-dibli, b buuda fãa tɩ kẽe Ezipt tẽnga." 
Genesis46:8 Ad-a Israyɛl (a Zakoob) kamb sẽn tũ-a n wa Ezipt tẽnga: a Rubẽ, yẽ la kãsma;" 
Genesis46:9 Ad-a Rubẽ kamba: a Enok, a Palu, a Ekrõ, a Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 A Simeõ kamba: a Yemuwɛl, a Yamin, a Oad, a Yakẽ, a Sowar la a Sol (yẽ ma yɩɩ Kanaã biiga)" 
Genesis46:11 A Levi kamba: a Zersõ, a Keyat, a Merari." 
Genesis46:12 A Zɩɩda kamba: a Ɛr, a Ona, a Sela, a Perɛk, a Zera. A Ɛr ne a Ona da maana yõor Kanaã tẽnga la a Perɛk kamba yɩ-la a Esrõ la a Amul." 
Genesis46:13 A Isakar kamba: a Tola, a Ypva, a Yasub la a Simrõ." 
Genesis46:14 A Zabulõ kamba: a Serɛd, a Elon, a Yaleyɛl." 
Genesis46:15 A Zakoob doga bãmb fãa Padã-Aram, b ma yɩ-la a Lea. Sẽn paase, yaa a Dina; b zãng fãa, yaa pis-tã la a tã." 
Genesis46:16 A Gad kamba: a Sefõ, a Agi, a Suni, a Esbõ, a Eri, a Arodi, a Areli." 
Genesis46:17 A Asɛr kamba: a Yimnã, a Yiswa, a Yiswi, a Beria ne b tão a Sera. A Beria kamba: a Ebɛr la a Malkiyɛl." 
Genesis46:18 Bãmb fãa ma yɩ-la a Zilpa, pag ninga a Labã sẽn kõ a Lea t'a Lea rɩk n kõ a Zakoob. B fãa sõor yaa piig la a yoobe." 
Genesis46:19 A Zakoob pag, a Rasɛl kamba: a Zozɛf ne a Bẽnzame." 
Genesis46:20 Ezipt tẽnga, a Zozɛf roga a Manase la a Efrayim; bãmb ma la a Asnat, On maan-kʋʋd, a Potifera, biiga." 
Genesis46:21 A Bẽnzame kamba: a Bela, a Bekɛr, a Azbɛl, a Gera, a Naama, a Eyi, a Ros, a Mupin, a Upim la Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Bãmb ba la a Zakoob la a Rasɛl yagense. B yaa piig la a naase. 
Genesis46:23 A Dã biiga: a Usim. 
Genesis46:24 A Neftali kamba: a Yasiyɛl, a Guni, a Yesɛr, a Silem." 
Genesis46:25 Bãmb fãa ma la a Bila, pag ning a Labã sẽn dɩk n kõ a Rasɛl, t'a Rasɛl dɩk n kõ a Zakoob. B sõor yaa a yopoe." 
Genesis46:26 Neb niyns fãa sẽn yaa a Zakoob kamb bɩ a yagense n tũ n wa Ezipt tẽng yaa pisoob la a yoobe; la a kamba pagb ka naag n sõd ye. 
Genesis46:27 Yaa kamb a yiib bala la a Zozɛf dog Ezipt tẽnga. A Zakoob kamb fãa sẽn wa Ezipt tẽng yaa pisopoe. 
Genesis46:28 A Israyɛl tʋma a Zɩɩda taoore t'a tɩ yeel a Zozɛf tɩ b seg taab Gosen; sɩda yaa Gosen la b ta yã. 
Genesis46:29 A Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ b sog a bilim-bilma wiidi t'a zomb n tɩ seg a ba Gosen; b sẽn yãe taaba, b mogba taaba, n tar yãbre." 
Genesis46:30 T'a Israyɛl wa yeel a Zozɛf: «Marsã m tõe n loogame tɩ f keta ne yõore la m le paam n yãenda f nenga.» 
Genesis46:31 A Zozɛf yeela a buuda zãnga: «M na n lʋɩɩ taoore n tɩ togs dĩma woto: ‹Ade, m kẽem-dãmb la m buudã sẽn da be Kanaã tẽng n wa m nengẽ." 
Genesis46:32 M na wilg-a tɩ b yaa rũm-kɩɩmba, b talla fãa n wa ka, b rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego, la b sẽn so fãa.›" 
Genesis46:33 Dĩma sã n wa bool yãmb n sok yãmba: ‹Yãmb tʋʋmd la bʋgo?› 
Genesis46:34 Bɩ y yeele: ‹Y yemsa gũu rũmsi b yãadmẽ n tãag dũnna. B ba rãmb me kɩɩma rũmsi.› Bãng-y tɩ sã n ya woto, y na tõog n pa Gosen.» Bãng-y tɩ Ezipt tẽng rãmb pa nong rũm-kɩɩm ba sẽn paoode." 
Genesis47:1 A Zozɛf tɩ yeela Ezipt dĩma woto: «M ba la m kẽem dãmb yii Kanaã tẽng n wa. B waa ne b rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego, b waa ne b sẽn tar fãa la b siga Gosen.»" 
Genesis47:2 A kẽem dãmb a nu n yãag-a dĩma nengẽ. 
Genesis47:3 Dĩma soka a kẽem dãmbã: «Bõe n ya yãmb tʋʋmde?» Tɩ b leoke: «Yãmb yemsã gũuda rũmsi. D tʋmda d ba rãmb tʋʋmde.» 
Genesis47:4 B yeela dĩma yɛsa: «Tõnd waa n kẽe tẽngã tɩ yamd ka le ket Kanaã tẽnga y yemsa sẽn na n paam n kõ b piis ye; koma zabda wʋsg ne Kanaã rãmba; d kotame tɩ y kẽes-d Gosen.» 
Genesis47:5 Dĩma yeela a Zozɛf: «F ba ne f kẽem dãmba wa-la f nengẽ. 
Genesis47:6 Ad Ezipt tẽn-peelem sẽn dɩg f taoore. Kẽes f ba la f kẽem dãmba zĩig ning sẽn tar bʋgsem n yɩɩda. B tɩ kẽ Gosen. Fo sã n mi tɩ neb bee bãmb sʋka n tar yam n yɩɩda, yãk bãmb dãmb tɩ b gũ mam meng rũmsi.»" 
Genesis47:7 A Zozɛf talla a ba, a Zakoob, n wa dĩma taoore. A Zakoob ninga dĩma barka," 
Genesis47:8 tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Y yʋʋm taa wãna?» 
Genesis47:9 A Zakoob leokame: «M yʋʋm tẽng zug ka, yaa koabg la pis-tã, m ka paam vɩɩm noog la yõ-wok waa m saam-dãmb sẽn paam a soabã ye.»" 
Genesis47:10 A Zakoob pʋʋsa dĩma la a paama sor n looge. 
Genesis47:11 A Zozɛf bao tẽng n kẽes a ba la a kẽem dãmba; a kẽes-b la zĩig ning sẽn da ya sõng n yɩɩda, wala dĩma sẽn da wilgã: yɩɩ Ramsɛs." 
Genesis47:12 A Zozɛf baoo rɩɩb n kõ a ba la a kẽem dãmba, a buuda gilli; a kõo sẽn sek zak fãa ne a neba." 
Genesis47:13 Rɩɩb waa n sɛɛ zãng Ezipt tẽnga; koma da bee wʋsgo n namsd Ezipt ne Kanaã rãmba. 
Genesis47:14 Ezipt la Kanaã rãmb sẽn tar pʋlb n tar pʋlbo, b ligda fãa waa n yii bãmb nugẽ n tɩ tigs a Zozɛf nengẽ. A Zozɛf rɩka ligd kãng n kɩs dĩma t'a bĩng a zakẽ." 
Genesis47:15 Ligd sẽn waa n yi Ezipt la Kanaã zãnga, b bʋʋga a Zozɛf n yeel-a: «D data rɩɩbo, yãmb na sake n bas tɩ kom kʋʋd tõnd tɩ y getẽ? Tõnd ka le tar ligd ye.»" 
Genesis47:16 T'a Zozɛf yeele: «Ligd sã n ka be bɩ y wa ne y rũmsi tɩ m na kõ y koodo.» 
Genesis47:17 Tɩ b tall b rũms n wa, b wiidi, b bʋʋse, b piisi, b bõeense. T'a Zozɛf kõ-b koodo. Dɩlla yʋʋmd kãnga, yaa b rũmsa la a reeg yã la a kõ-b koodo." 
Genesis47:18 Yʋʋmda sẽn vẽke, b le lɛɛg n waa a Zozɛf nengẽ, n yeel-a: «D ka na n solg-y ye, ligda da zoe n sɛɛme la rũmsa me sɛɛme, sẽn ket marsã, yaa d mens la d pʋto." 
Genesis47:19 La d yɩta a wãn n sak n bas d mens la pʋto tɩ kom kʋ tõnd yãmb nifẽ? Deeg-y d mense la d pʋto la y kõ-d dɩɩbo, woto tõnd na lebg y dĩma yem-daado. Kõ-d bõn-buud tɩ d bʋde n tõog n vɩɩnde la d da ki ye, tɩ tẽnga ra le sãam n paas ye.»" 
Genesis47:20 Yaa woto la Ezipt tẽng pʋtã lʋɩ dĩma soolmẽ: ned kam fãa da rɩka a pʋʋg n koos n na n põs kom la yaa woto la dĩma waa n soog-b zãnga. 
Genesis47:21 Ezipt tẽng tõr neba lebga yem-daado. 
Genesis47:22 Yaa maan-kʋʋdba pʋt bala n ka kẽ dĩma soolmẽ; dĩma da kõt-b-la ligdi tɩ b tar n dɩlgd b mense; bãmb sẽn tar n dɩtẽ wã yĩnga, b pa koos b pʋt ye." 
Genesis47:23 A Zozɛf yeela neba marsã: «Yãmb ne y pʋtã lebga dĩma soolem, woto wã deeg-y ka-buud n tɩ bʋd y pʋtã." 
Genesis47:24 Y sã n wa tigs y koodã, y na welg-a pʋɩɩr a nu n yãk a ye n kõ dĩma, n tall a naase; ka-buud na n yii be, yãmb dɩɩb na n yii be, yãmb sẽn get b rãmb fãa yell dɩɩb na n yii be.»" 
Genesis47:25 B leokame: «Yãmb fãaga tõndo la Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ y kell n pʋg-d ne y sõngre tɩ d yɩ dĩma tʋʋm-tʋmdba.» 
Genesis47:26 A Zozɛf yalsa noor b sẽn ket n deegd Ezipt tẽng rũnna: pʋɩɩr a nu soaba yaa a dĩma n so. Maan-kʋʋdba pʋt bal la dĩma ka sooge. 
Genesis47:27 A Israyɛl kamba paa Ezipt, Gosen tẽnga, beenẽ b paama pʋto, b roga kamb wʋsgo tɩ b buuda piuugi." 
Genesis47:28 A Zakoob paama yʋʋm piig la a yopoe Ezipt tẽnga, a yʋʋma sõor yɩɩ koabg la pis-naase la a yopoe." 
Genesis47:29 A Israyɛl sẽn waa mik t'a pãnga sɛɛ zãnga, a boola a Zozɛf n yeel-a: «Fo sã n ket n nong maam bɩ f kell n wilg-m tɩ f rat-m-la ne neere la f rɩk f nug n sɩɩs m gerã la f wẽen tɩ f kõn mum maam Ezipt tẽng ye." 
Genesis47:30 M sã n kaẽ bɩ y tall m yĩngã n tɩ mum m ba rãmb yaoogẽ.» Dẽ la a Zozɛf leok a ba: «M na maan wala y sẽn date.» 
Genesis47:31 A ba wã paasame: «Wẽene!» La a wẽename, la dẽ t'a Israyɛl sulga a neng a gãag zugu n na n pʋʋs a Zozɛf barka." 
Genesis48:1 B waa n yeela a Zozɛf: «Y ba wã ka keem ye.» A Zozɛf kẽnga ne a kamb a yiibã: a Manase la a Efrayim. 
Genesis48:2 B sẽn waa n yeel a Zakoob woto: «Ad-f biig a Zozɛf n wa n na n ges fo»," 
Genesis48:3 a yeela a Zozɛf: «Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba lik-m-la Luz, Kanaã tẽnga la b ning-m-la barka." 
Genesis48:4 B yeela maam: ‹M na kɩt tɩ f rog kamba, n lebg wʋsgo n kẽ tẽns ka tɛka la m kõt-f-la tẽn-kãnga; foom ne f kamba n na n soog-a daar fãa.› »" 
Genesis48:5 A Zakoob paasame: «Fo kamb a yiib sẽn dog Ezipt tẽnga dẽ tɩ m nan ka babs foom, bãmb na m yii mam soolem. A Efrayim ne a Manase na n yɩɩ mam kamb wala a Rubẽ la a Simeõ sẽn ya mam kamba." 
Genesis48:6 Kamb niyns sẽn pʋg b bãmbã, bãmb na n yɩɩ fo soolem. B sã n bool-b tɩ b wa reeg b pʋɩɩr buuda sʋka, yɩta b kẽem dãmba maasem yĩnga." 
Genesis48:7 F ma a Rasɛl tees n ki sor zugu, m sẽn yi Padã, Kanaã tẽnga, sẽn waa n ket bilf bala tɩ d ta Efrata, la b mum-a-la Efrata sor zugu: Efrata yaa Bɛtelyɛɛm.»" 
Genesis48:8 A Israyɛl yãee a Zozɛf kamb a yiibã n soke: «Woto yaa ãnd dãmba?» 
Genesis48:9 T'a Zozɛf leok-a: «Yaa Wẽnd sẽn kõ-m kamb nins Ezipt tẽng ka.» T'a Zakoob na n yeele: «Kolg ne-ba tɩ m ning-b barka.» 
Genesis48:10 A sẽn da kʋʋl wʋsg yĩngã, a Israyɛl nina da ka le ne neer ye. A Zozɛf kɩtame tɩ kamba kolg b yaaba t'a na n mobg-ba la a mok-ba." 
Genesis48:11 A Israyɛl yeela a Zozɛf: «M da pa tẽed tɩ m na le yãend foom, mik Wẽnd maaname tɩ m na n tol n yãend f kamba.»" 
Genesis48:12 A Zozɛf veooga kambã n leb poorẽ, n paam n wõgemd n kɩ a neng tẽnga." 
Genesis48:13 A Zozɛf le gãda kambã, a gãda a Efrayim ne a dɩtgo n yals a Zakoob goabga, n gãd a Manase ne a goabga n yals a Zakoob dɩtgo la a kɩtame tɩ b kolge." 
Genesis48:14 A Zakoob tẽega a dɩtgo n tik a Efrayim zugu; a Efrayim la yao, n yaool n tẽeg a goabg a Manase zugu, la yẽnda la kãsma. Yɩɩ modgr t'a Israyɛl nus kalemd taaba." 
Genesis48:15 A ninga a Zozɛf roog bark woto: «M ba a Abraam la a Izaak sẽn tũ Wẽnd ningã, Wẽnd ninga sẽn yɩ a mam gũuda, m dogem tɛka" 
Genesis48:16 n paas malɛk ninga sẽn fãaga maam yel-pakr buud fãa pʋgẽ, ning kom-kãensa barka! B yɩ maam la a Abraam la a Izaak yʋʋr tẽegre, b wek balbo n pid tẽnga!»" 
Genesis48:17 A Zozɛf yãeeme t'a ba rɩka a rɩtgo n tik a Efrayim zugu t'a sũur ka yɩ noog ye. Dẽ la a gãd a ba nug, t'a ra tik a Efrayim la a tik a Manase." 
Genesis48:18 A Zozɛf yeelame: «Ka woto ye, m ba, yaa a Manase la kãsma, dɩlla tik a zug ne f rɩtgo.»" 
Genesis48:19 A ba wã zãgsame n yeele: «M miime, m biiga, m miime. Yẽ me buud na n yɩɩ yalengo, a me na a yɩɩ nin-kãsenga, baasgo a yao wã na n yɩɩg-a lame, a yao wã buuda na n yɩɩ zãma ka tɛka.»" 
Genesis48:20 Badaare a ning-b-la bark woto: Israyɛl kamb sã n dat n kãab ned noogo, yãmb yʋʋra la a na n pʋd n yeel woto: «Wẽnd puk b nonglma ne foo wala b sẽn puk-a ne a Efrayim la a Manase!» A Efrayim yʋʋrã n deng taoore." 
Genesis48:21 A Zakoob yeela a Zozɛf: «Mam na n kiime la Wẽnd bee ne yãmba la b na n wa lebs-y-la y ba rãmb tẽngẽ. 
Genesis48:22 M paasda f pʋɩɩre, woto f na yɩɩg f kẽem-dãmbã. M sẽn paas f pʋɩɩr ningã, yaa m sẽn zab ne sʋʋga la tãpo n deeg Amoritsa nusẽ.»" 
Genesis49:1 A Zakoob boola a kamba fãa n yeel-ba: «Tigim-y taab tɩ m wilg-y yɛl niyns sẽn wate. 
Genesis49:2 Zakoob kamba, kolg-y n kelge, n kelg y ba koɛɛga!" 
Genesis49:3 Rubẽ, foom la m bi-kẽenga, m doga foom m sẽn waa n ya bi-bɩɩga, n wɩɩd ne pãnga. Foom n pid ne gãndalsem, foo n pid ne gãbe." 
Genesis49:4 F zoeta ne pãnga wa kʋɩl-kẽeng koom, la fo kõn soog kãseng ye, tɩ fo beega f ba n dʋʋ a gãaga n dẽgem-a." 
Genesis49:5 A Simeõ ne a Levi, sɩd yaa ma-biisi; bãmb nengẽ, yell fãa welgda ne pãng la sʋʋga," 
Genesis49:6 m yam kõn yals ne b sẽn sed bũmb ning ye, b yẽsgo zĩigẽ m kõn zĩnd sʋk ye; tɩ b yika b sũuri n kood ninsaalba, n yik ne pʋ-toogo n pãs lols gĩini." 
Genesis49:7 Wẽnd loog ne b sũ-puurã t'a yõsga nugu la b sũ-kãbrã t'a ka be taar ye. M na n pʋɩ-b-la a Zakoob buud sak woo saka, mam na n sẽeg-b-la a Israyɛl vẽenemẽ." 
Genesis49:8 Zɩɩda, foo la f ba-biis na n pẽge f nug na wẽoog f bɛɛba yubla, f ba-biis na wõgemd f taoore." 
Genesis49:9 Zɩɩda fo yaa Gɩgemd bila. M biiga kẽnga zabre n lɛɛg n watẽ, A põda a rũmdi, n gãand wa bõnyẽega, wala bõnyẽ-yãanga, ãnda n na n pĩng-a t'a yiki?" 
Genesis49:10 Naam dasaar kõn serg a Zɩɩda sɛɛgẽ ye. Naam dasaar kõn yi a toaagẽ ye, al n tol n ta a zu-soaba waoongo; n ta tẽnsa sẽn tog n deeg a soab noora waoongo." 
Genesis49:11 Bugsuntung la a loet a bõn-bila, tɩ-womdg will la a loet a bõn-yaanga biiga. A pekda a fuug sib rãamẽ, a sogemda a fu-bila sib zɩɩmẽ." 
Genesis49:12 A nin mooga ne sib rãam, a yẽna pelga ne bĩisim." 
Genesis49:13 A Zabulõ zĩi mogr noore n so koom-kogendã sẽn tedgã, n yɛdga a toaag n tat Sidõ." 
Genesis49:14 A Isakar yaa bõn-daoog sẽn be gãbe; lals a yiib n me n gũbg a roogo. 
Genesis49:15 A mikame t'a gãag noom-a. A mikame tɩ tẽng bʋgsa, a zõondame t'a po-raoog reeg zɩɩbo, t'a na n tʋm yem-daad tʋʋma." 
Genesis49:16 A Dã na n dɩɩ naam a buudẽ a na n ges-a-la wa sẽn tog ne a Israyɛl saka. 
Genesis49:17 A na n yɩɩ wa waaf sẽn dɩg sor zugu, wa põeer sẽn dɩg so-bukẽ, yẽ n na kɛ weefa karga, tɩ wed-dʋʋda na n bidg n lʋɩɩ zãmbɛɛla." 
Genesis49:18 Yãmb sõngr la m teeg yã, Soaala-Wẽnde!" 
Genesis49:19 Sã n yaa a Gad, fãadb n waa n fã-a tɩ yẽ me yik n digdẽ n na n deeg a teedo." 
Genesis49:20 A Asɛr sũur noom ne a rɩ-kaam t'a rõosd a miisd dĩm dãmb yĩnga. 
Genesis49:21 A Neftali yaa yĩsr sẽn gõod weoog a yam, n dogd a kom neeba." 
Genesis49:22 A Zozɛf yaa lʋlle, Lʋll sẽn be koom noore; b sã n kẽesa yãgrẽ la a sẽn gãndgde n yi." 
Genesis49:23 B bao-la a noore, n maan zabr ne-a. Tãb-biis n yik n tak zabr ne-a," 
Genesis49:24 la a tãpa pa fãag a nugẽ a sẽn waa n ligind a bɛɛba ye, A Zakoob Wẽnnaam nug n tʋm dẽnna, a Israyɛl Gũuda, a Pĩiga, a Israyɛl Lillã n tõog rẽnna." 
Genesis49:25 Bɩ f saam-dãmba Wẽnnaam, bɩ f Soaala, wa sõng fo! Bɩ bark tũ Wẽnnaam-Pãng-Soaba nug n sigi! B ning yĩngr saaga barka, n ning vɩʋʋga sẽn yɛdg tẽnga barka, n ning roagseng barka, n ning bĩisr barka." 
Genesis49:26 F kood paam bark b puudẽ la b biisẽ; biisa pelg ne tãms sẽn kʋʋl b gãagẽ, sẽn kõn sirg abada! Barka sig a Zozɛf zugu, tɩ Wẽnd welga yẽ toore!" 
Genesis49:27 A Bẽnzame yaa digd-n-yĩidga, yibeoogo a wãbda a sẽn bri, zaabre a pʋɩta a te zɛɛdem.»" 
Genesis49:28 Israyɛl buud sags piig la a yi wã sɩngr la woto. Yaa woto me la b ba gom yã, a sẽn waa n ningd barka. Ned kam fãa reega bark ninga a sẽn tog ne a soaba." 
Genesis49:29 A Zakoob yaool n kõ a kamba noor kãnga: «Mam na n tɩ saka m saam-dãmba; y na n mum-m-la tãng bokẽ la boka bee Ititga a Efrõ pʋ-wɛɛgẽ; 
Genesis49:30 yaa Mambre sɛɛgẽ, Kanaã tẽngẽ. A Abraam da raa pʋʋgã ne a ligdi, Ititga a Efrõ nengẽ." 
Genesis49:31 Yaa be la b mum a Abraam ne a Sara, be la b mum a Izaak ne a paga, a Rebeka, la yaa be la m mum a Lea." 
Genesis49:32 Yaa pʋʋga ne tãn-bokã la a Ɛt kamba da koos yã.» 
Genesis49:33 A Zakoob sẽn togs a koeesa fãa n sɛ, a kolemda a nao a gãagẽ la a kiime la a saka a saam-dãmba." 
Genesis50:1 A Zozɛf dĩ-la a ba, n tar-a mogsgo la yãbre." 
Genesis50:2 A Zozɛf kõo sẽn tɩpdba noore tɩ b segl a Zakoob yĩnga la b waa ne b kaam. 
Genesis50:3 Seglga kaoosa dasem pis-naase, yaa boto la b ra maanda. Ezipt rãmb yãba a Zakoob kʋʋr dasem pisopoe." 
Genesis50:4 La kʋʋra sẽn waa n yãb n sɛ, a Zozɛf goma woto ne na-yira dãmba: «Yãmb sã n dat n maan-m neere, m kotame tɩ y taas dĩma m kõe-kãnga:" 
Genesis50:5 ‹A sẽn waa n na n ki, m ba kɩtame tɩ m wẽene tɩ yaa Kanaã tẽnga, yaoog ning a sẽn da segla pʋga, la m na n mum-a.› Sẽn ya woto wã, m kota sor n tɩ mum m ba beenẽ la m lɛɛg n wa.»" 
Genesis50:6 Dĩma leokame: «Kẽng-y n tɩ mum-a be wala a sẽn kɩt tɩ y kãabe.» 
Genesis50:7 A Zozɛf looga a ba wã mumbu la na-yir dãmba ne b poorẽ dãmba, Ezipt kombɛɛmba fãa tũume." 
Genesis50:8 A Zozɛf yira rãmb fãa, a kẽem dãmba, a ba wã zaka fãa, yãag-a lame. Kom-bõoneg la rũmsa bal n pa Gosen." 
Genesis50:9 A Zozɛf kẽe bilim-bilm pʋga. Sẽn maan-b wa yẽnda me yɩɩ wʋsgo. Sɩd yɩɩ nedgo. 
Genesis50:10 B sẽn ta zɛɛg sẽn boond tɩ Gõaag zɛɛgẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg rʋʋnde, b le kelma kʋʋre la b yãba dasem a yopoe." 
Genesis50:11 Kanaã tẽng rãmb wʋma kʋʋra rãamd Atad sɛɛgẽ, la b yeelame: «Woto yaa Ezipt rãmb kʋʋr meng-menga!» La b pʋda zĩ-kãng Abɛl-Misrayim, Ezipt rãmb kʋʋre; yaa Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd la be." 
Genesis50:12 A Zakoob kamba maana a kʋʋr wala a sẽn da kõ-b noore. 
Genesis50:13 B tall-a lame n kẽng Kanaã tẽnga n tɩ mum-a Makpela tãnga bokẽ, a be Ititga a Efrõ pʋ-wɛɛgẽ la yaa pʋ-kãng la a Abraam da ra yaad yĩnga, Mambre sɛɛgẽ." 
Genesis50:14 A Zozɛf sẽn mum a ba, a lɛɛg n waa Ezipt tẽnga ne a ba-biisa fãa la sẽn yãag-b yẽnda wã fãa." 
Genesis50:15 A Zakoob kũuma poore, a Zozɛf kẽem dãmba yeela taaba: «Sãnd marsã a Zozɛf ka na n tug beem n dol wẽng ning d sẽn maan-a wã?»" 
Genesis50:16 B tʋmame tɩ b yeel a Zozɛf: «Yãmb ba sẽn waa n na ki a yeel-d-la woto: 
Genesis50:17 ‹Tɩ yeel-y yã a Zozɛf: Maan yardo, kõ f kẽem dãmbã b yel-wẽndã la b beegra sugri.› Yĩm b sẽn maan-f bũmb ning fãa, tɩ b tũuda Wẽnd ning sẽn yɩ f yaab rãmb Wẽnde.» A Zozɛf sẽn wʋm b goama, a yãbame." 
Genesis50:18 A kẽem dãmba kolgame n wõgemd a taoore n yeel-a: «Tõnd yaa fo yem-daado!» 
Genesis50:19 T'a Zozɛf na n yeel-ba: «Bas-y rabeem tɩ Wẽnd la Bʋ-kaooda la m kõn deeg b zĩiga n kao y bʋʋd ye. 
Genesis50:20 Yãmb sẽn da tʋlg maam ne wẽng ningã, Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ neer yi a pʋgẽ wala d fãa sẽn ne rũnna; yaa bu-yaleng n tũ rẽnna n paam fãagre." 
Genesis50:21 Dɩlla bas-y rabeem, m na ges yãmb ne y zak rãmb yelle.» A Zozɛf maasa b sũur ne gom-nood kãensa." 
Genesis50:22 Yɩɩ woto la a Zozɛf ne buuda zãng pa Ezipt tẽnga. A Zozɛf kaoosa yʋʋm koabg la piig tẽng zugu. 
Genesis50:23 A Efrayim yagensa doga a nifẽ, a paam n deega a naoẽ, a Makir kambã, a Manase yagense." 
Genesis50:24 A Zozɛf yeelame: «M na n loogame, la daar a ye, Wẽnnaam na n wa ges-y lame, la b na n yiis-y-la tẽn-kãnga n lebs y tẽng ning b sẽn kãab y yaab rãmba, a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob.»" 
Genesis50:25 A Zozɛf kɩtame t'a ba-biisa wẽene: «Ezipt yiib wakato y kõn loog n bas m kõaba ka ye.» 
Genesis50:26 A Zozɛf ki-la a yʋʋm koabg la piiga. B segla a mumbu ne kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, n sagl-a a kug koglgẽ, n mum-a." 
Exodus1:1 Ad-a Israyɛl kamb ne b zak rãmb sẽn tũ a Zakoob n wa Ezipt tẽnga: 
Exodus1:2 A Rubẽ, a Simeõ, a Levi, a Zɩɩda," 
Exodus1:3 a Isakar, a Zabulõ, a Bẽnzame," 
Exodus1:4 a Dã, a Neftali, a Gad la a Asɛr." 
Exodus1:5 Sã n naag ne b zak rãmba, b fãa gill sõor yaa pisopoe. Sã n yaa a Zozɛf, yẽ ra reng n bee Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus1:6 A Zozɛf ne a saam-biisa fãa waa n maana kaalem. 
Exodus1:7 B ra roga kamb wʋsgo, n wa lebg ka tɛka; b waa n pida tẽngã, b waa n kẽe pãafo." 
Exodus1:8 Dĩm a ye n wa n deeg Ezipt tẽng naam. Yẽ ka bãng a Zozɛf ye. 
Exodus1:9 Yẽe n wa n yeel a soolem dãmba: «Dẽnd d gũus ne a Israyɛl kamba, b lebga wʋsgo, b tara pãnga; tõe n wa yɩɩ yelle." 
Exodus1:10 D bao yam n kõ d menga, n sõng tɩ b sõora ra le paas ye; ka rẽ zabr tõe n yikame tɩ b bas tõnd sõngre n sõng d bɛɛba, n yaool marsã n paam n looge.»" 
Exodus1:11 Woto wã b yãka neb sẽn na n ges Israyɛl kamba tʋʋma, neb sẽn na n mao tɩ b yãend far ne tʋʋm-toodo. Ezipt dĩma kɩtame tɩ b me tẽn-bɛd a yi: Pitom la Ramsɛs. Be la b ra bĩngd b te-koosem buud fãa." 
Exodus1:12 Israyɛl kamba far da paasdame, la b sõora ra ka woogd ye, b tol n paasa wʋsgo, tɩ Ezipt tẽng-rãmb wa maand dabeem." 
Exodus1:13 Israyɛl kamb deega tʋʋm toodo. 
Exodus1:14 Yɩɩ tʋʋm sẽn sɩd nams-b wʋsgo: Tãnd tagbo, tãn-koɛɛm wẽebo, koobo; yɩɩ ne tʋʋm buud fãa la b modg-ba." 
Exodus1:15 Ezipt dĩma boola pʋg-roagsdb a yiibu sẽn da rogsd Ebre pogsã, a Sifara ne a Ypwa, n yeel-ba:" 
Exodus1:16 «Y sã n dogsd Israyɛl pagbã bɩ y maan gũusgu. Ges-y biiga yaa pag bɩ raoa. Kʋ-y kom-dibli la bas-y kom-pugli wã.» 
Exodus1:17 Pʋg-roagsdba da zoeta Wẽnde, woto b pa sak n deeg dĩma noor ye. B pa sak n kʋ kom-dibli wã ye." 
Exodus1:18 Dẽ la dĩma bool-ba n yeel-ba: «Yaa bõe yĩng la yãmb bas kom-dibli wã n pa kʋʋda?» 
Exodus1:19 Tɩ b na n leoke: «Ad-y Israyɛl pagba ne Ezipt pagba ka wẽnd taab ye; b tara pãnga, woto, pʋg-roagsa ne a na n ta tɩ b rog n sɛɛme.»" 
Exodus1:20 Wẽnd ninga pʋg-roagsdba barka. A Israyɛl kamba tõog n lebga wʋsgo, b tõog n kɩɩ yẽgna." 
Exodus1:21 Pʋg-roagsdba sẽn zoe Wẽnnaam nifa yĩnga, Wẽnd yalga b buudu." 
Exodus1:22 Dĩma waa n yeela a nebã: «Lob-y koomẽ a Israyɛl sẽn na n dog kom-dibli niyns fãa; bas-y kom-pugli wã bala.» 
Exodus2:1 A Levi sakẽ, ned n da tɩ bao a pag a buuda kamb sʋka." 
Exodus2:2 Paga waa n dɩka pʋg n dog bi-ribla. Biiga da yaa neere la a ma tõog n solg-a-la kiis a tãabo. 
Exodus2:3 Biiga solgr waa n lebga toogo. A bao mo-kãdre n wʋg peoogo, n maneg n bol a pʋga ne tãn-sũudu n yaool n dɩk biigã n sagl-a pʋgẽ, n tʋk n tɩ bas kʋɩlg noor, rudum sʋka." 
Exodus2:4 Biiga tão soosame n lamdeg yɩɩga n na n ges yella sẽn na n baas to-to. 
Exodus2:5 La ade, dĩma bi-pugl waa kʋɩlgẽ n na n so koom. Kom-pugli n yãag-a, la bãmb paa kʋɩlga noore. Dĩma bi-pugla yãee peoogã, rudma sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b rɩk-a n yiis." 
Exodus2:6 A laka peoogã n yãe biig sẽn yãbda. Biiga weoog kẽ-a lame la a yeelame: «Wã yaa Ebre bila.» 
Exodus2:7 Biiga tão kolgame n yeel dĩma biiga: «Sãnd y ka rat pag Ebre pogsa sʋk sẽn na n kõt-a bĩisim?» 
Exodus2:8 Tɩ dĩma bi-pugla leok-a: «N-ye! M datame!» La yaa biiga ma menga la a tɩ tall n wa. 
Exodus2:9 Dĩma bi-pugla yeelame: «Tall-y biigã, n tɩ wub-a, n kõ-ma. M meng m toor na yao-fo.» Paga talla biigã n tɩ wubi." 
Exodus2:10 Biiga sẽn bɩ, b tall-a lame n wa kɩs rĩma bi-puglã la a ges-a-la wa a meng biiga n pʋd a yʋʋr a Moyiiz, t'a ra yetame: «M yiis-a-la koomẽ.»" 
Exodus2:11 Sẽn waa n beẽ, n beẽ, a Moyiiz yiime na n kaaga a saam-biisã. A yãee tʋʋm tood niyns b sẽn da tʋmna; a yãee Ezipt dao a ye sẽn pãbd a saam-biiga." 
Exodus2:12 A Moyiiz sẽn ges goabg la rɩtgo, a pa yãe tɩ ned pẽ be ye, t'a kʋ Ezipt nedã n bus bĩisrẽ." 
Exodus2:13 Vẽkẽmbeoogo a le yiime; a yãee a saam-biis a yiib sẽn tar taaba t'a sok nin-yend: «Bõe tɩ f pãbd f tũud-n-taaga?» 
Exodus2:14 Saam-biiga leokame: «Ãnda n yeel foo tɩ f yɩ d naaba la d bʋ-kaooda? Fo rat n kʋʋ maam wala Eziptga laa?» Dabeem yõka a Moyiiz la a yeela a sũurẽ: «Daare yella vẽnegame.» 
Exodus2:15 Yella sɩd da taa dĩma t'a baood a Moyiiz n na n kʋ, dẽ la a zoe n zãag al Madiã tẽnga. A waa n yãee bulga la a zaonda a noore." 
Exodus2:16 Madiã maan-kʋʋda yaool da tara kom-pugli a yopoe. Bãmb n wa bulgẽ wã, n na n yõng koom, n pids gaolg, n yũnug b ba piisi." 
Exodus2:17 Rũm-kɩɩm n waa n tuk-b be n sɩng b rigbu, t'a Moyiiz na n sõng-ba tɩ b paam n yũnug b rũmsã." 
Exodus2:18 B sẽn leb yiri, b ba Reowɛl nengẽ, b ba wã yeel-b lame: «Ade, dũnna y lɛɛg n waa tao-tao wɛ, m kamba!»" 
Exodus2:19 Tɩ b yeele: «Ad-y yaa Ezipt ned n fãag tõnd pe-kɩɩmba nugẽ, a reega tõnd zĩig n toog koom n kõ rũmsã.»" 
Exodus2:20 Dẽ la b ba sok yã: «La nin-kãng bɛɛ? Bõe yĩng la a pa beelẽ? Bool-y daoã t'a wa rɩ.» 
Exodus2:21 A Moyiiz wa n noka a Reowɛl tɩ yẽ rɩk a bi-pugl a ye n kõ-a; bi-pugla yʋʋr la Sefora. 
Exodus2:22 A Sefora roga a Moyiiz biiga la biiga pʋdame t'a Gersõ, a Sãana. A Moyiiz ra yetame: «M waa n noka tẽn-zẽnga.»" 
Exodus2:23 Sẽn waa n beẽ, Ezipt dĩma kiime. A Israyɛl kamb waa n yɛɛ ne b yembdã la b kelmame, la b koɛɛg taa Naaba-Wẽnd." 
Exodus2:24 Wẽnd kelga b waasgo la b tẽega b zood ne a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob." 
Exodus2:25 B gesa Israyɛl kamba ne nimbãan-zoeere la b weoog yõk-b lame, b bãnga b yɩɩre." 
Exodus3:1 A Moyiiz da kɩɩmda a rɛɛm piisi, a rɛɛmba boondame tɩ Zetro, n ya Madiã maan-kʋʋd. A Moyiiz waa n talla piisã n zãage, a waa n taa Oreb, Wẽnd tãnga zugu." 
Exodus3:2 Wẽnnaam malɛka waa lik-a-la be bugum sʋka. Yɩɩ tuug sẽn dɩt bugum pʋgẽ. A Moyiiz gesame la ade: tuuga da wita bugum la bugma yaool n da pa rɩt tuuga meng ye. 
Exodus3:3 Dẽ la a yeel yã: «M na n gilgame n ges bõn-bãnde, n bãng sẽn ya bũmb ninga la tuuga wit bugum n yaool n pa rɩtẽ ye.»" 
Exodus3:4 Wẽnnaam yãeeme t'a sɩd kolgda n na n paam n ges neere la b zĩnda tuugẽ wa n bool-a: «Moyiiz, Moyiiz!» T'a yeele: «Ad ma!»" 
Exodus3:5 Tɩ b yeel-a: «Da kolg ye la piid f neooda wã tɩ fo sẽn tabd zĩig ninga yaa zĩ-sõngo.» 
Exodus3:6 Wẽnnaam le paasame: «Ad yaa maam la f ba rãmb Wẽnnaam, a Abraam Wẽnnaam, a Izaak Wẽnnaam la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam.» A Moyiiz sẽn wʋm dẽ, a pĩ-la a nenga n zoet t'a nif na n wa teeg Wẽnde." 
Exodus3:7 Wẽnnaam yeelame: «M yãee neer-neere, m neba sẽn be Ezipt tẽnga nimbãanega. Sẽn get-b tʋʋma kɩtame tɩ b waasdẽ la m tʋbr wʋma b kɛlenga." 
Exodus3:8 M mi-la b yɩɩre la m datame n fãag b Ezipt rãmb nugẽ, n yaool n tall-ba n kẽes tẽn-yalengẽ la tẽn-sõngẽ; tẽn-kãng kʋɩlse: bĩisim la sɩɩdo. Yaa Kanaã rãmb tẽnga, n paas Ititse, Amoritse, Perizitse, Ivitse, la Zebuzits tẽnga." 
Exodus3:9 M wʋma Israyɛl kamba waasgo la m yãee namsg ning Ezipt rãmba sẽn namsd-b. 
Exodus3:10 Dẽ yĩnga m tʋmd-f-la dĩma nengẽ tɩ f tɩ yiis a Israyɛl kamba, mam nebã.»" 
Exodus3:11 A Moyiiz yeelame: «Maam la a bõe n na n ta dĩma nengẽ n kɩt t'a yiis Israyɛl kamb Ezipt tẽnga?» 
Exodus3:12 Tɩ Wẽnnaam yeele: «M na n zĩnda ne foo la ad kaset ning m sẽn kõt-f tɩ f bãng tɩ yaa maam n tʋmd foo: f sã n wa yiis m neba Ezipt tẽnga, y na rʋ tãn-kãnga zug n waoog-ma.»" 
Exodus3:13 A Moyiiz yeela Wẽnnaam: «Ade, m na n tɩ yeela Israyɛl kamba woto: ‹Yãmb yaab rãmb Wẽnnaam n tʋm maam y nengẽ.› B sã n sok maam tɩ y yʋʋr la a bõe, m leokda wãna?»" 
Exodus3:14 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Maam la a Beẽ-n-Beẽ! La f na n goma ne Israyɛl kamba woto: ‹A Beẽ-n-Beẽ n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ.› 
Exodus3:15 La f na n paasame: ‹Yaa Soaala n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ, yaa yãmb yaab rãmb Wẽnnaam, a Abraam Wẽnnaam, a Izaak Wẽnnaam, a Zakoob Wẽnnaam.› Yaa yʋ-kãnga n na n yɩ m yʋʋre zamaan sẽn wate, yaa yʋ-kãnga la y na n ning y pʋ-tẽerẽ, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Exodus3:16 Marsã kẽng n tigim Israyɛl nin-kẽemba la f yeel-ba: ‹Soaala, yãmb yaab rãmb Wẽnnaam, a Abraam Wẽnnaam, a Izaak Wẽnnaam, a Zakoob Wẽnnaam, n lik maam la b yeel-m lame: M wa y sʋka n na n fãag yãmba, tɩ m yãee Ezipt rãmba sẽn zãad yãmb zãab ninga." 
Exodus3:17 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m dat tɩ y yi n kẽ Kanaã rãmb tẽngẽ n paas Ititse, Amoritse, Perizitse, Ivitse la Zebuzitse, m datame n tɩ kẽes-y tẽng a ye, la tẽng kãng kʋɩls koom yaa bĩisim la sɩɩdo.›" 
Exodus3:18 B na n kelga f koɛɛga, la foo ne nin-kẽemba, yãmb na n tɩ yãee Ezipt dĩma la y na n yeel-a-la woto: ‹Naaba-Wẽnde, Ebre rãmba Wẽnnaam, n sig d sʋka. D Kotame tɩ y bas-d tɩ d kẽn dasem a tãab kẽnde, we-raoogẽ, n tɩ kʋ maoong bãmb yĩnga.›" 
Exodus3:19 M miime tɩ sã n ka tũ ne pãnga, Ezipt rĩma kõn bas-y tɩ y yi ye." 
Exodus3:20 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m na n tẽeg m nugu, dẽ la m na n moadg-a ne bõn-bãn ka tɛka, m sẽn na n maan. Dẽ poor marsã a na yaool n bas-y tɩ y looge." 
Exodus3:21 M na kɩt tɩ m kamba ne Ezipt neba moor zems taaba. Woto y sẽn wat n na n yi n looge, y kõn loog zaalem ye." 
Exodus3:22 Pag na n kosa a yaka, n kos a zĩnd-n-taase, sãnem teedo, wanzurf teedo, futu. Dẽ n na n lebg yãmb kom-dibli bɩ yãmb kom-pugli faongo, tɩ Ezipt rãmb na n yaool n dɩ bõne.»" 
Exodus4:1 A Moyiiz yeelame: «M maanda a wãna? B sã n zãgs m tẽebo, n zãgs m kelegre, b sã n yeele: Bada, Soaala-Wẽnd pa lik foo ye!»" 
Exodus4:2 Dẽ la Soaala sok-a: «Yaa bõe la f zãada?» T'a yeele: «Yaa dasaare!» 
Exodus4:3 Tɩ Soaala kõ-a noor t'a lob dasaara tẽnga. A sẽn lobe, lebga waafo, t'a tare." 
Exodus4:4 Tɩ Soaala yeel-a: «Tẽeg f nugu n gãd a zʋʋrã!» T'a Moyiiz tud a nugu n gãde, la waafa sẽn ta a nugẽ, a lebga dasaare." 
Exodus4:5 Wẽnd yeelame: «Woto b na reeg tɩ sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam n lik b menga, b yaab rãmb Wẽnnaama, a Abraam Wẽnnaama, a Izaak Wẽnnaama, a Zakoob Wẽnnaama.»" 
Exodus4:6 Soaala le yeela a Moyiiz: «Kẽes f nugã f fuugẽ n sɩɩs f yãoogo.» T'a kẽes a nugu, n sɩɩs a yãoogo n lɛɛg n yiis n mik t'a yĩn-gãong bẽedame n pelg wa laongo." 
Exodus4:7 Tɩ Soaala ko-a noore: «Lebs n sɩɩs f yãoogo.» A sẽn kẽes a nug n lɛɛg n yiisi, a mikame t'a leba a pĩnd zĩigẽ." 
Exodus4:8 Soaala yeel-a lame: «Woto, pipi bõn-bãnda sã n ka tõog tɩ b reege, a yiib soaba na tõoge." 
Exodus4:9 La b sã n ket n ka tẽeda, b sã n ket n ka rat n kelge, bõn-bãn a yiiba poore, bɩ f toog kʋɩlga koom n daag tẽnga; kooma fo sẽn toog kʋɩlgẽ wã na lebg zɩɩm, f sã n daag-a tẽnga.»" 
Exodus4:10 A Moyiiz yeela Soaala-Wẽnde: «Y kabre, m Soaala! Sẽn ta marsã, mam zɩ n yɩ goam-goamd ye. Ne yãmb sẽn lik maam n gom ne maama, bũmb ka teem ye. Goama ka sakd m noorẽ ye la m zelemd yaa pabrgo.»" 
Exodus4:11 Soaala-Wẽnd leokame: «Ãn n kɩbg ninsaal noore? Ãnna n naan muka, n naan wʋnga, sẽn ne-a la sẽn ka ne-a? Ka maam laa!" 
Exodus4:12 Dɩlla, kẽng tao, m na yaag f noore, m na wilg f sẽn na n togse.»" 
Exodus4:13 A Moyiiz le yeelame: «Y kabre, m Soaala, bao-y y sẽn dat a soaba n tʋm!»" 
Exodus4:14 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puug tɩ b yeele: «Fo saam-biig a Aarõ, Levitga, ka be la? Mam miime t'a gomda neere. Ad-a sẽn pʋs n wat f nengẽ. A sã n ta f taoore, a sũur na yɩ noogo." 
Exodus4:15 Foo n na gome la yẽ noor n na deeg goama n taase. Mam meng na sõng yãmb y yiibu, n wilg y sẽn na n togse." 
Exodus4:16 A Aarõ n na n gom ne neba fo zĩigẽ. A noora na n yɩɩ fo noore, fo yaa wa a wẽnde, n vẽnegd-a." 
Exodus4:17 Sã n ya f dasaarã, dɩk-a n zã. F na n maana bõn-bãn wʋsgo ne-a.»" 
Exodus4:18 A Moyiiz yi-la a sẽn da be zĩig ningã n lɛɛg n wa a rɛɛmba, a Zetro, nengẽ la a yeel-a lame: «M kota sor n leb Ezipt tẽnga, m saam-biisa sẽn be zĩig ningã, n ges b sã n ketame.» T'a Zetro na n yeel-a: «Kẽng ne laafi!»" 
Exodus4:19 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gom ne a Moyiiz Madiã tẽnga: «Yik n leb Ezipt tẽnga tɩ sẽn baood-b foom n na n kʋ wã, kii zãnga.»" 
Exodus4:20 A Moyiiz yii ne a paga la a biiga, a zombg-b-la bõanga n le rɩk Ezipt sore. A Moyiiz da zãada Wẽnd sẽn kõ-a dasaar ningã, a nugẽ." 
Exodus4:21 La Soaala le yeel-a lame: «Fo sẽn lebd Ezipt tẽngã bɩ f sak n maan bõn-bãna dĩma taoore. M kõ-f-la tõog rẽ yĩnga. M na n gesame n kidb a sũuri, la a ka na n bas m neba tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus4:22 Dẽ marsã la f na n yeel dĩma: Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: mam bi-kẽeng la a Israyɛl. 
Exodus4:23 M yet-f lame; bas m biiga t'a kẽng n tɩ waoog-ma; la f sẽn zãgs t'a kõn yi wã, ma me na n kʋʋ fo bi-kẽenga.»" 
Exodus4:24 A Moyiiz waa n yalsa b sikẽ yʋngo tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kolg-a, la yaa waa b ra baood n na n yiisa a yõore." 
Exodus4:25 A Sefora rɩka kugr sẽn dɩt wa barga n kẽes a biiga bãongo. A rɩka zɩɩma n taag a sɩda kur-wĩir n yetẽ: Fo yaa m sɩd m sẽn fãag ne zɩɩm. 
Exodus4:26 Soaala-Wẽnd loog n bas-a a Moyiiz t'a Sefora sẽn gom tɩ zɩɩm n fãag a sɩdã, yaa bãonga kẽesg yell la a tẽeg-a." 
Exodus4:27 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Aarõ: «Yi we-raooga sẽnẽ n seg a Moyiiz.» A Yikame la a seg-a-la Wẽnd tãnga zugu la b mobga taaba. 
Exodus4:28 A Moyiiz wilga a Aarõ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ-a tʋʋmd ningã la bõn-bãn niyns b sẽn kõ-a noor t'a maana. 
Exodus4:29 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ dɩka sore la b sẽn ta, b tigma tẽnga nin-kẽemba sẽn ya Israyɛl kamba." 
Exodus4:30 A Aarõ togs-b-la bũmb ning fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Moyiiz la buuda taoore, a wẽneg n maana bõn-bãna." 
Exodus4:31 B deegame tɩ Wẽnd bee ne-ba, tɩ b yãenda b nimbãanega la b watame n na n fãag-ba. Woto b wõgemda tẽnga n waoog Soaalã." 
Exodus5:1 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ waa n tɩ yãenda Ezipt tẽng dĩma n yeel-a: «Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, n yet woto: Bas m neba tɩ b yi n tɩ maan kibs mam yĩng we-raoogẽ.»" 
Exodus5:2 Tɩ dĩma yeele: «Fo Wẽnda la ãnna tɩ m tog n deeg a noor n bas a Israyɛl t'a looge? M ka mi, ba sẽn paoode, fo Wẽnda sẽn ya a soab ye, m kõn sak t'a Israyɛl loog ye.»" 
Exodus5:3 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ yeel-a lame: «Yaa Ebre rãmb Wẽnnaam n lik tõndo. Woto wã, kõ-y tõnd sor tɩ d kẽn da-yɩten-daar kẽnde, n ta we-raoogẽ wã n kʋ maoong n waoog bãmba. Sã n ka rẽ b na n kʋ-d-la ne sʋʋga bɩ ne nod-tãoodre.»" 
Exodus5:4 Dẽ la Ezipt dĩma leok yã: «Yaa bõe la yãmb baooda, Moyiiz ne a Aarõ, n na n sãam neba tʋʋma? Leb-y y tʋʋmnẽ!»" 
Exodus5:5 Dĩma le paasame: «Neba sẽn lebg wʋsga la yãmb na n kẽ sʋk n sãam tʋʋma?» 
Exodus5:6 Badaare bala, dĩma kõo sẽn get-b tʋʋma la sẽn gʋlsd-b sɛba noor kãngã:" 
Exodus5:7 «Da le bao-y moodo n kõ nin-bãmba tɩ b wẽed tãn-koɛɛma wala y sẽn da maand pĩnda ye. B kẽng b toore n tɩ bao moodo. 
Exodus5:8 La modg-y-ba tɩ b paam tãn-koɛɛm wala zaamẽ la rabɩtẽ. Tãn-koɛɛma sõor pa tog n woog ye. Israyɛl kamba yaa kʋɩɩm dãmba, yaa rẽ la b sẽn yetã: d kẽng n tɩ kʋ maand Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Exodus5:9 Paas-y b tʋʋmna tɩ b da le paam n vʋʋs ye la b ra le paam vɩʋʋg n gomd zirẽ-be-goam ye.» 
Exodus5:10 Sẽn da get-b tʋʋma la sẽn gʋlsd-b sɛba tɩ yeela zãma wã: «Dĩma noor la woto: M ka na n le kõ-y mood ye. 
Exodus5:11 Kẽng-y y toore n tɩ bao moodã y sẽn tõe n paam zĩig ning fãa. La tʋʋmd ka be y sẽn da tʋmd pĩnda, y sẽn ka na n kell n tʋm ye.»" 
Exodus5:12 Zãma wã sẽega zãnga n na n bao moodo n wa wẽ tãn-koɛɛma. 
Exodus5:13 Sẽn get-b tʋʋma da tãsd-b lame: Y tog n paama y sẽn paamd daar fãa wala b sẽn waa n baood moodã n kõt yãmbã. 
Exodus5:14 B kɩtame tɩ b pãb sɛb gʋlsdba, dĩma sẽn da tũus Israyɛl kamba sʋka; b ra pãbd-b lame la b sokdẽ: Bõe tɩ zaame la rũnna y tãn-koɛɛma sõor pa ta y sẽn da paamd dasem kam?" 
Exodus5:15 Israyɛl kamb sẽn gʋlsd-b sɛba waa n guglma ne dĩma: «Bõe tɩ y tar y yemsa woto? 
Exodus5:16 Tõnd ka le paamd mood sẽn kʋʋs ye la b pʋgda tõnd wakat buud fãa, tɩ yaa: wɩng-y ne tãn-koɛɛma, wɩng-y ne tãn-koɛɛma! Tõnd meng n le paamd pãbre. Dẽ ka segd ye!»" 
Exodus5:17 Dĩma leok-b lame: «Yãmb yaa kʋɩɩm dãmba, kʋɩɩm dãmb menga, yaa rẽ la y sẽn yete: tõnd dat n tɩ kʋʋ maoong n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Exodus5:18 Yik-y tao n leb y tʋʋmnẽ! Moodã, y kõn paam-a, la sõng-y tɩ tãn-koɛɛma sõor taase.»" 
Exodus5:19 Seb gʋlsdba yika ne yɩɩre b sẽn wʋm tɩ b yet-ba: Tãn-koɛɛma y sẽn tog n paam daar fãa wã, da sak-y tɩ b sõora paoog ye." 
Exodus5:20 B yi-la dĩma nengẽ n zoe n ta a Moyiiz la a Aarõ nengẽ. Bãmb me ra gũud-b lame. 
Exodus5:21 La b yeel-b lame: «Bɩ Soaala ges y sẽn maana la b ning-y taale. Yãmb kɩtame tɩ dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmb maand beem ne tõndo; yaa wa y rɩka sʋʋg n ning b nugẽ tɩ b kʋ tõndo.» 
Exodus5:22 A Moyiiz lɛɛg n waa Soaala-Wẽnd taoor n yeele: «Soaala, bõe tɩ yãmb namsd y nebã, bõe tɩ y kõ maam tʋʋm kãnga?" 
Exodus5:23 Mam sẽn wa Ezipt dĩma nengẽ tɛka, m sẽn wilg yãmb daabã, a namsda y nebã la yãmb ka maand fɩ n na n fãag-b ye.»" 
Exodus6:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Yɩ bilfu, f na yãend m sẽn na n maan Ezipt dĩma bũmb ninga! M na modg-a t'a bas Israyɛl kamb tɩ b looge. M meng m toore n na n kɩt tɩ b yi ne rugdu.»" 
Exodus6:2 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «Maam la Soaala. 
Exodus6:3 Mam lika m meng a Abraam, a Izaak, a Zakoob wala Wẽnd ning sẽn yɛs a zĩigẽ daar fãa; m wilg-b-la neere tɩ maam la Soaala sẽn bɛ-a bãmb poorẽ dũnna la beoogã." 
Exodus6:4 Mam yõga zood ne bãmba la m maana kaseto tɩ m na n kõ-b-la Kanaã tẽnga, tẽng ning b sẽn yi b ba-yir n wa kẽ sãandã." 
Exodus6:5 Ezipt sẽn tar b rãmb wa yem-daadã kɛleng lʋɩ m tʋbrẽ, dẽ la m tẽeg m kãabgã." 
Exodus6:6 Dɩlla f na tɩ yeel Israyɛl kamba: Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, m na kɩt tɩ y tɩlg ne Ezipt tʋʋm toodã. M na yiis-y yembd pʋgẽ, m na wilg Ezipt tɩ, pipi, yaa mam soolmẽ la a Israyɛl deng n lʋɩ la m na le reeg-a-la ne pãng la rugdu." 
Exodus6:7 Y na lebg mam buud neba la ma me na lebg yãmb Wẽnde la y na bãng tɩ yaa maam, yãmb Wẽnnaam, n kɩt tɩ y tɩlg ne Ezipt tʋʋm toodo." 
Exodus6:8 Dẽ poore, m na n kẽes-y-la tẽng ning m sẽn kãab a Abraam, a Izaak, a Zakoob, la tẽnga na waa n lebg y soolem, tɩ maam, y Wẽndã, n kãab-y rẽnna.»" 
Exodus6:9 A Moyiiz taasa Israyɛl kambã Soaala-Wẽnd gomdã la Israyɛl kamb pa sak n kelg ye; b da yɛɛ fas ne b yembdã. 
Exodus6:10 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus6:11 «Kẽng Ezipt dĩma nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a t'a bas Israyɛl kamba tɩ b yi a tẽngẽ wã n looge.» 
Exodus6:12 A Moyiiz guglma Wẽnd taoore n yeele: «M sẽn ka tõog tɩ Israyɛl kamba kelg m koɛɛga, m yɩta a wãn marsã n tõog tɩ dĩma reeg m koɛɛga? Maam la sẽn ka mi goam la.»" 
Exodus6:13 Soaala-Wẽnd zaba ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ, n kõ-b noor tɩ b bʋʋg Ezipt dĩma n kɩt t'a bas Israyɛl kamb tɩ b yi Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus6:14 Ad Israyɛl buuda kãsem-dãmba: Pipi, a Rubẽ, a Israyɛl bi-kẽenga, yẽ kamb la woto: a Anok, a Palu, a Esrõ, la a Karmi. Bãmb la a Rubẽ rooga kãsem-dãmba." 
Exodus6:15 A Simeõ kamba: a Yemuwɛl, a Yamin, a Oad, a Yakim, a Soar la a Sol, yẽ ma yɩɩ Kanaã bi-pugla. B zãng kẽeda a Simeõ." 
Exodus6:16 Ad-a Levi kamb la a yagense: a Gersõ, a Keyat, a Merari. A Levi yʋʋma yɩɩ koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe." 
Exodus6:17 A Gersõ kamba: a Libni, a Simeyi; bãmb me yɩɩ roog kãsem dãmba." 
Exodus6:18 A Keyat kamba: a Amram, a Isar, a Ebrõ la a Uziyɛl. A Keyat yʋʋm yɩɩ koabg la pis-tã la a tã." 
Exodus6:19 A Merari kamba: a Mali, a Musi, b zãng yaa a Levi kamba la a yagense." 
Exodus6:20 A Amram dɩka a pʋgdba a Zokbɛd n maan a paga, n dog kamb a yiibu, a Aarõ la a Moyiiz. A Amram yʋʋm yɩɩ koabg la pis-tã la a yopoe." 
Exodus6:21 A Isar kamba: a Kore, a Nefɛg la a Zikri." 
Exodus6:22 A Uziyɛl kamba: a Mikayɛl, a Elisafã la a Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 A Aarõ pag yɩ-la a Eliseba. Yẽnd ba la a Aminadab, a tão la a Nasõ; yẽ n dog a Nadab, a Abiyu, a Elazar la a Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 A Kore kamb la a Asir, a Elkana la a Abiasaf. Bãmb la a Kore doogo." 
Exodus6:25 A Aarõ biig a Elazar yii kãadem ne a Yptiyɛl bi-pugl a ye n dog a Pinas. A Levi buudu, a kamb la a yagens la bãmba." 
Exodus6:26 Yaa a Aarõ la a Moyiiz la Soaala-Wẽnd da kõ noore: Kɩt-y tɩ Israyɛl kamba bob tãpo n yi Ezipt tẽnga. 
Exodus6:27 Yaa bãmb n tɩ gom ne Ezipt dĩma, n yeel-a t'a bas Israyɛl kamba tɩ b looge. N-ye! Yɩ-la a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ." 
Exodus6:28 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz Ezipt tẽnga," 
Exodus6:29 n yeel-a: «Maam la Soaala. M sẽn na n yeel-f bũmb ning fãa bɩ f sõng n taas-a Ezipt dĩma.» 
Exodus6:30 T'a Moyiiz leok woto: «M pa tõe n gom naana ye; dĩma na sak n kelg sɩda?» 
Exodus7:1 Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Moyiiz: «Ade, m na n kõ-f-la Wẽnd tõog, Ezipt dĩma taoore la f kẽem, a Aarõ, n na n yɩ f no-rɛɛsa." 
Exodus7:2 Mam sẽn yet tɩ f togs bũmb ninga la f na n togse la f kẽem, a Aarõ, na reeg-a n taas dĩma la a na bas Israyɛl kamba tɩ b yi a tẽngẽ." 
Exodus7:3 M na n kɩtame tɩ dĩma yɩ zãgsda tɩ m maan bõn-bãna la yɛl-soalma ka tɛk, Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus7:4 M miime tɩ Ezipt naaba ka na n sak n kelg-y ye la m na maan Ezipt pãnga n yiis m buudã ne a tãb-biisã la na n yɩɩ pakre tɩ m sɩbg Ezipt rãmb wʋsgo. 
Exodus7:5 Na n yɩɩ tɩlɛ ne Ezipt rãmba fãa tɩ b reeg tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ m na n zẽka m nug n sɩbg-ba n paam n yiis Israyɛl kamb b tẽngẽ.»" 
Exodus7:6 A Moyiiz la a Aarõ sakame n tũ Soaala-Wẽnd noora zãnga. 
Exodus7:7 A Moyiiz yʋʋm da yaa pis-nii t'a Aarõ dẽnd ya pis-nii la a tãabo, b sẽn waa n tɩ yãend Ezipt dĩma." 
Exodus7:8 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus7:9 «Dĩma sã n yeel-y tɩ y maan bõn-bãnde, bɩ f yeel a Aarõ t'a rɩk a dasaarã n lob a taoore t'a na lebg wag-bãnde.»" 
Exodus7:10 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kẽnga dĩma taoore la b maana wala b sẽn da yeel-bã. A Aarõ loba a dasaarã dĩma taoore, a neba taoore, la dasaara lebga wag-bãnde." 
Exodus7:11 Naaba me boola neb sẽn tar yam zulunga, a bagba la a tɩt rãmba. Bãmb me tõogame n maan bõn-bãnd kãnga." 
Exodus7:12 Ned kam fãa loba a dasaare tɩ dasaar fãa tedg n legb wag-bãnde la a Aarõ dasaara vel-b-la zãnga. 
Exodus7:13 Ne rẽ fãa dĩma kidba a sũuri, a ka kelg a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ ye." 
Exodus7:14 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Dĩma yaa zug koɛɛng soaba, a zãgsame tɩ m neba kõn loog ye." 
Exodus7:15 Kẽng, beoog yibeoogo, n tɩ yãend-a, a sẽn wat n dabd kʋɩlgẽ; gũ-a kʋɩlga noore, zã dasaar ning sẽn tedg n legb waafã, f nugẽ." 
Exodus7:16 Gom ne dĩma woto: Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽndã tʋma maam f nengẽ tɩ m wa yeel-fo: bas m neba tɩ b yi n tɩ waoog-m we-raoogẽ. Sẽn ta marsã, fo yẽda f tʋba." 
Exodus7:17 Ad-m sẽn yet-fo: ges bũmb ning sẽn na n wilg tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde: m na n dɩka dasaarã m sẽn zãadã n wẽ kʋɩlga koom la a na n lebga zɩɩm. 
Exodus7:18 Kʋɩlga zĩma fãa na n kiime, b na n põogame, kooma na n lebga yũugu la Ezipt rãmb na n maka a yũub n konge.»" 
Exodus7:19 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Gom ne a Aarõ: dɩk f dasaarã, tẽeg f nug Ezipt kʋɩlga zugu: A ko-soy wã, a ko-ralma, a ko-bao wã, a bãtã, a bulsã, koom sẽn tõe n tẽgnẽ fãa, tɩ fãa na lebg zɩɩm; laoka peesa ne kugri, bɩ a peesa ne raoogo, koom sẽn tẽgen a pʋgẽ fãa na lebg zɩɩm.»" 
Exodus7:20 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ maana wala Soaala sẽn togs-bã. A Aarõ zẽka a dasaare, dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmb nifẽ, n wẽ kʋɩlga koom la a lebga zɩɩm zãnga." 
Exodus7:21 Kʋɩlga zĩma kiime, kʋɩlga lebga yũugu, a kooma ra ka le tõe n yũ ye. Ezipt tõr lebga zɩɩm." 
Exodus7:22 Ezipt bagba la b tɩt-rãmb me tõog n maana boto tɩ dĩma na n kidb a sũur n paase; wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeelã, a zãgsa a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kelgre." 
Exodus7:23 Dĩma gesa rẽ fãa wa zaalem la a leba a zakẽ. 
Exodus7:24 Tẽnga rãmb kong n tuu buls kʋɩlga noore, tɩ kʋɩlga meng koom da ka le tõe n yũ ye." 
Exodus7:25 Sẽn maan dasem a yopoe, bõn-bãnd a to n le maane." 
Exodus7:26 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Ta dĩma nengẽ la f yeel-a: Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: bas m neba tɩ b loog n tɩ kʋ maoong n waoog-ma. 
Exodus7:27 F sã n ka sake m na kɩt tɩ loms deeg tẽnga fãa n yãmbe. 
Exodus7:28 Kʋɩlga na n pida ne lomse. B na n yiime n kẽ f zakẽ, n kẽ f do gãagẽ, n dʋ f gãag zugu. Na n yɩɩ boto me ne f poorẽ dãmba, ne f neba fãa. Bur wʋnga, bura sẽn bĩngd zĩig ninga, fãa na pida ne lomse." 
Exodus7:29 Lomsa na n lolma foo, f poorẽ dãmba, f sõgen-kambã.»" 
Exodus8:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Kõ a Aarõ no kanga: tẽeg f nug la f dasaarã, kʋɩlga zugu, ko-soy wã la tãnagda zugu, n kɩt tɩ loms kẽ Ezipt tẽnga.»" 
Exodus8:2 A Aarõ tẽega a nug Ezipt kʋɩlga zugu la loms yiime n deeg Ezipt tẽng n yãmbe. 
Exodus8:3 La ne b rabaar la b tɩto, Ezipt rãmb me tõogame tɩ lomsa yi n pid tẽngã." 
Exodus8:4 Dẽ la dĩma bool a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ n yeel-ba: «Pʋʋs-y Soaala-Wẽnd t'a zãag lomsã ne maam la m poorẽ dãmba tɩ woto m na bas-y tɩ y tɩ kʋ y maoongã n waoog y Wẽnnaam.» 
Exodus8:5 T'a Moyiiz leoke: «Wilg maam sẽn ya wakat ning la m na n pʋʋs f yĩnga, f zak rãmb yĩnga, f neba fãa yĩnga, tɩ lomsa zãage ne foom ne f zaka, ne f poorẽ dãmba, ne f neba fãa, n pa kʋɩlga pʋgẽ bala.»" 
Exodus8:6 Tɩ dĩma leoke: «Beoog bala.» A Moyiiz yeelame: «M na maan wala f sẽn datã la woto f na bãng tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaam ka be taar ye. 
Exodus8:7 Lomsa na n zãaga ne foom, ne f yirã, ne f poorẽ dãmba, ne f soolma fãa; kʋɩlga pʋgẽ bal la b na n kelle.»" 
Exodus8:8 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ loogame n bas dĩma la b pʋʋsa Wẽnde tɩ lomsa zãage. 
Exodus8:9 Wẽnnaam deega a Moyiiz kosgo, lomsa kii rotẽ, zagsẽ, pʋtẽ." 
Exodus8:10 B wʋk-b lame n sam la tẽnga fãa lebga yũugu. 
Exodus8:11 Dĩma sẽn paam laafi, a le kidba a sũuri, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilgi, n zãgs a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kelgre." 
Exodus8:12 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Kõ a Aarõ no-kãnga: tẽeg f nug n wẽ tẽnga tom ne f dasaarã tɩ lebg rũm-pigli, n pid Ezipt tẽnga.»" 
Exodus8:13 A Aarõ zẽka a nug n wẽ tẽnga ne a dasaare. Rũms yiime n na n wãb bũmb fãa. Tẽnga tom gill tedgame n legb rũm-pigli. 
Exodus8:14 Bagbã la tɩt rãmb makame n na n bool dũm-pigli la b pa tõog ye. Rũmsa wãba ninsaalba la bõn-vɩɩli wã fãa. 
Exodus8:15 Dẽ la tɩta rãmb leok dĩma: «Woto yaa Wẽnd tõogo.» La wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da togsã, Ezipt dĩma le kidba a sũur n paase, a zãgsa a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kelgre." 
Exodus8:16 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Sãd beoog pĩnd n tɩ yaas dĩma sora zugu, a sã n wa rabd kʋɩlgẽ. F na yeel-a: Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: bas m neba tɩ b loog n tɩ waoog-ma." 
Exodus8:17 F sã n zãgse, yaa keooda la m na n tʋm tɩ b wa kẽ f zakẽ, f rotẽ, f neba zagsẽ la b rotẽ. B na n pida Ezipt rota fãa la tẽnga fãa." 
Exodus8:18 Yaa Gosen tẽng bal la m na n welg toore tɩ be yaa m neba tẽnga la keoodr kõn ta be ye. Woto f na bãng tɩ maam a Naaba-Wẽnde n be f soolma tẽnsʋka. 
Exodus8:19 M na n welga m buud ne fo rẽnna la yaa beoog bala la keooda wã wata.» 
Exodus8:20 Soaala-Wẽnd maana wala b sẽn yeele la keooda ka tɛk kẽe dĩma zakẽ, n kẽ a meng rotẽ, n kẽe a neba rotẽ n kẽ Ezipt tẽnsa fãa n yaal-b zãnga." 
Exodus8:21 Dĩma boola a Moyiiz la a Aarõ n yeel-ba: «Bao-y zĩig tẽnga pʋgẽ n kʋ y maoongã n waoog y Wẽnde.» 
Exodus8:22 T'a Moyiiz leoke: «Tõnd pa tõe rẽ ye. Tõnd sẽn koot dũms niynsã, Ezipt rãmb get-b-la wa wɩɩbdo; tõnd sã n kʋʋd b nifẽ bũmb b sẽn kisi, b kõn lab tõnd ne kug sɩda?" 
Exodus8:23 Dẽn tõnd kẽn da-yɩten-daar kẽnde n ta we-raoogẽ, n kʋ d maoong n waoog Naaba-Wẽnde, n kʋ maand niyns b sẽn na n wilg-du.»" 
Exodus8:24 Dẽ la dĩma yeel yã: «M na bas-y tɩ y yi n ta we-raoogẽ n kʋ maoong n waoog y Soaala-Wẽnde, la rẽnd yamb me kãabe tɩ y kõn zãag zĩig ye, tɩ y na tẽeg m yelle.»" 
Exodus8:25 A Moyiiz yeelame: «M sã n yi ka bala m na n sɩnga Soaala pʋʋsgo la beoog yibeoog tɩ keooda wã basa dĩma laafi yẽ ne a poorẽ dãmb la a soolem dãmba. La naaba me maan sugri n da le belg-d ye la a bas d buudã t'a tɩ maan a maoongã.» 
Exodus8:26 A Moyiiz yii dĩma zakẽ la a yõka Soaala sɛɛga," 
Exodus8:27 la b deega a kosgo la keooda wã zãaga ne dĩma, ne a poorẽ dãmba, ne a soolma rãmba, a ye meng ka kell ye." 
Exodus8:28 La Dĩma baas n le kidba a sũur, n zãgs tɩ b kõn loog ye." 
Exodus9:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Kẽng dĩma nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a woto: Ad Soaala-Wẽnd, Ebre rãmb Wẽndã, sẽn yete: bas m neba tɩ b loog n tɩ waoog-ma." 
Exodus9:2 F sã n zãgse, tɩ b le kaoos ka, n pa looge," 
Exodus9:3 Soaala nug na n sɩɩsa f rũmsã sẽn be bãoogẽ: wiidi, bõeense, yʋgma, niisi, rũm-bõonese; bã-toaag n na n loog ne b fãa gilli." 
Exodus9:4 Soaala-Wẽnd na n welga a Israyɛl rũmsa toore la b rũng ba a ye kõn ki ye.» 
Exodus9:5 Soaala-Wẽnd yãka raare, b yeelame tɩ yaa beoog la b na n yãe yel-bãnda Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus9:6 Beoog sẽn vẽege, Soaala-Wẽnd sɩd pidsa b kãabgo, Ezipt rãmb rũmsa fãa kii gill kasi. A Israyɛl rũng ba a ye ka ki ye." 
Exodus9:7 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b saag n ges la yɩɩ sɩda, a Israyɛl rũng ba a ye ka ki ye. Ne rẽ fãa dĩma pa sak tɩ b loog ye." 
Exodus9:8 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: «Kõdg-y rʋk vũundu n pids y nugu la y sã n ta dĩma taoore bɩ a Moyiiz lob a rẽnd yĩngri. 
Exodus9:9 Bug-vũunda na n yɛdga wala wubs-bãanega, n kẽ Ezipt tõre tɩ rũmsa ne neba yĩns pus yũya.»" 
Exodus9:10 B taa rĩma nengẽ ne rʋk vũundu t'a Moyiiz lob vũunda yĩngri tɩ rũmsa la neba yĩns pus yũya. 
Exodus9:11 Tɩta rãmb ka tõog n wa a Moyiiz taoore ye, tɩ yũya ra pusa bãmb me wala Ezipt rãmb fãa." 
Exodus9:12 Soaala-Wẽnd kidba dĩma sũuri la wala b sẽn da pĩnd n togsã, a zãgsa a Moyiiz la a Aarõ kelgre." 
Exodus9:13 Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la a Moyiiz no-kãnga: «Sãd beoog pĩnd n kẽng dĩma nengẽ. Yeel-a tɩ Ebre rãmb Wẽnnaama goma woto: bas m neba tɩ b yi n tɩ waoog-ma. 
Exodus9:14 Yeel dĩma tɩ marsã wã yẽ, m datame tɩ yel-beed buud fãa lʋɩ a zugu, n lʋɩ a poorẽ dãmba zugu t'a yaa n bãng tɩ m ka tar m to moog ye." 
Exodus9:15 M sã n da kɩtẽ tɩ bãag ninga sẽn kʋ a rũmsa yõkẽ yẽnda me ne a poorẽ dãmba, marsã tɩ d zĩig zãrẽ." 
Exodus9:16 M bas-a lame n ka kʋ ye t'a bãng m pãnga la a pẽg m yʋʋr tɩ ta tẽnga satmẽ. 
Exodus9:17 A ket n maanda tɩtaam ne m kambã n pa rat n bas-b tɩ b loog ye. 
Exodus9:18 La ade, beoog yibeoog pĩnd-pĩnda, sapɩlem n na n wa ne pãnga, wala b sẽn zɩ n yãend a taar Ezipt tẽng ye." 
Exodus9:19 Yeel-a t'a bao zĩig n solg a rũmsi la bũmb ning fãa a sẽn so, tɩ kẽnd yɩnga. Bũmb ning fãa sẽn be yɩnga, ninsaal bɩ rũnga, tɩ b pa tall-a n wa yiri, sapɩlem n na n kʋ.»" 
Exodus9:20 Dĩma poorẽ dãmba wʋma Wẽnd sẽn dat bũmb ningã la b yɛɛsame la b bao zĩig b zakẽ n ning b yem-daad la b rũmsi. 
Exodus9:21 Kẽer n yaool n tẽ tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd gomd yaa belgre la b basa b yem-daado la b rũms tɩ pa yɩnga. 
Exodus9:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Zẽk f nug n tees yĩngri tɩ sapɩlem dʋʋg Ezipt tẽng tõre, n pãb neba, n pãb rũmsi la sẽn be pʋtẽ, Ezipt tẽn-peelmẽ.»" 
Exodus9:23 A Moyiiz zẽka a dasaar n tees yĩngri la saag tãsame, tɩ sapɩlem dʋʋg zĩig zãnga." 
Exodus9:24 Saaga yãgdame tɩ sapɩlma dʋʋgdẽ la sapɩlma da fõta ne pãnga wa b sẽn zɩ n yãend a taar Ezipt tẽnga, a sẽn sɩng n yet t'a yaa tẽnga." 
Exodus9:25 Ezipt tẽn-peelma zãnga, sapɩlma sãama sẽn da be yɩng fãa. A kʋʋ neb la rũmsi, a kʋʋsa tẽnga mood fãa la tɩɩse." 
Exodus9:26 Yaa Gosen tẽng bal n põse, yaa be la Israyɛl kamb da kẽeda." 
Exodus9:27 Dĩma tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ la a yeel-b lame: «Marsã m deega m kongre. Wẽnd n so bʋʋm la maam ne m nebã n konge. 
Exodus9:28 Pʋʋs-y tɩ sa-tãsa la sapɩlma yaas tɩ m na bas-y tɩ y looge la kõn kaoos ye.» 
Exodus9:29 T'a Moyiiz yeel-a: «M sã n yɩ tẽngã, m na pʋʋs Soaala tɩ sa-tãsa la sapɩlma yalse tɩ f bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n so tẽngã." 
Exodus9:30 La ka foo bɩ f poorẽ dãmba n na n zoe Wẽnd nif ye, dẽ yaa vẽenega.»" 
Exodus9:31 Beren-dɩga la alkam pugsgu sãama zãnga; alkam pugsga da zoe n wekame, la beren-dɩga da zoe n yaa puudu." 
Exodus9:32 Alkam pɛɛlga la alkam gilsã n põse tɩ bãmb yaa yaoose. 
Exodus9:33 A Moyiiz yii Ezipt dĩma nengẽ, n yi tẽnga zãnga, n tẽeg a nus n tees Naaba-Wẽnde tɩ sa-tãsa la sapɩlma yaase. Saaga sɩd ka le ni ye." 
Exodus9:34 A sẽn mik tɩ saaga pa le niida, tɩ sapɩlem pa le rʋʋgdẽ, tɩ sa-tãsa ka le tãsdẽ, dĩma le rɩka a pĩnd zʋgo." 
Exodus9:35 A kidba a sũuri, yẽnda ne a poorẽ dãmba, n pa sak tɩ Israyɛl kamb loog ye, wala Wẽnd sẽn da zoe n wilgi." 
Exodus10:1 Soaala-Wẽnd le yeela a Moyiiz: «Kẽng dĩma nengẽ tɩ yaa maam n kɩt t'a gir a zugu, yẽnda ne a poorẽ dãmba, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam n maan bõn-bãna a nifẽ." 
Exodus10:2 Sẽn na n yɩlẽ me tɩ fo tõog n togs f kamb la f yagense m sẽn yaal Ezipt rãmb ne bõn-bãn niynsi, la woto y na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Exodus10:3 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kẽng n tɩ yãee Ezipt dĩma n yeel-a woto: «Ad Ebre rãmba Wẽnnaam sẽn togsd-f bũmb ninga: F na n kell n yɩɩ tõata, f na n zãgsa f sulg f meng mam taoor n ta da-bʋre? Bas m neba tɩ b loog n tɩ waoog-ma." 
Exodus10:4 F sã n zãgse, yaa sʋy la m na n kẽes f tẽngẽ la na n yɩɩ beoog yibeoog bala." 
Exodus10:5 B na n dʋʋgame n lud tẽnga zãnga, tẽn-gãong kõn le yãend ye, la sapɩlma sẽn kees bũmb ningã, b na loog ne rẽ fãa, b na rɩ pʋta tɩɩs fãa gilli." 
Exodus10:6 F zaka, f poorẽ dãmb zagse, Ezipt dãmb fãa gill zagse na n pida ne sʋya. Fo yaab rãmb, fo yaab rãmb-yaab rãmb zɩ n yãe woto buud Ezipt tẽnga, a sẽn yet t'a yaa tẽng ye.» A Moyiiz lɛɛgame n yi." 
Exodus10:7 Dẽ la dĩma poorẽ dãmba yeel b zu-soaba: «Nin kãnga na n kell n yɩ bẽdg tõnd yĩng n ta da-bʋre? Bas-y tɩ b loog n tɩ waoog b Naaba-Wẽnde. Fo ka ne tɩ Ezipt rabda a wãab zĩigẽ?» 
Exodus10:8 Woto b kɩtame t'a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ lɛɛg n wa tɩ dĩma yeel-ba: «Y tõe n kẽng n tɩ waooga y Wẽndã, la ãnd-dãmb n na n looge?»" 
Exodus10:9 A Moyiiz yeelame: «D na n looga ne d kom-bɩɩba, d nin-kẽemba, d kom-dibli la d kom-pugli, d rũmsi, bẽd la bõonego, tɩ yaa kibs la d na n maan Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga.»" 
Exodus10:10 Tɩ dĩma leok-a: «Woo! M bas-y tɩ y looge, yãmb ne y kamba, m nong-y la kɛɛma! Yãmb sẽ n pa ne tɩ y raabã yaa goalenga?" 
Exodus10:11 Ad-y rẽ ka tõe ye, bɩ rapa bal kẽnge n tɩ waoog Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ yaa rẽ la y sẽn baoodã.» La a sẽn gom woto, a rig-b-la a taoore." 
Exodus10:12 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel a Moyiiz: «Zẽk f nug Ezipt zug n bool sʋya tɩ b sig Ezipt tẽng n dɩ a koodã la a tɩɩsa zãnga. B loog ne sapɩlma sẽn keesã.» 
Exodus10:13 A Moyiiz zẽka a dasaare la yaang sobg fugame, wĩndig la yʋngo. Beoog sẽn vẽege, b mikame tɩ sobga waa ne sʋya." 
Exodus10:14 Sʋya dʋʋga Ezipt ween-vɩʋʋga tõre. Sʋya sõore: ad-y b zɩ n yãe la b kõn le yãend a taar ye. 
Exodus10:15 B luda tẽnga gãong t'a moog zãnga. B rɩɩ tẽnga moodo la tɩɩsa biis sẽn põs sapɩlma. Vãoog buug ka kell tɩɩg zug ye, ka kell pʋʋgẽ ye, la yɩɩ Ezipt tẽnga la b sãam woto." 
Exodus10:16 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b bool a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tɩ b wa tao-tao t'a yeel-ba: «Ad-y m beega Soaala la m beega yãmb me. 
Exodus10:17 M kotame tɩ y kõ-m sugri tɩ rũnna la tɛk-tɛka la pʋʋs-y Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama, t'a zãag-m ne yel-beedã.»" 
Exodus10:18 A Moyiiz yiime n tɩ yõk Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga. 
Exodus10:19 Soaala waa ne sob-lebende, nin-taoor sobgo, la sobga looga ne sʋya n tees Rudum Mogre. Ezipt tẽn-peelma tõre, sʋʋr ba a ye ka pa ye." 
Exodus10:20 Soaala-Wẽnd kidba naaba sũuri t'a ka sak Israyɛl kamba loogre ye. 
Exodus10:21 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Tees f nuga yĩngri; ad lik sẽn ya taoko n tõe n sɩɩs ne nug na n dɩɩ Ezipt tẽng zãnga.» 
Exodus10:22 A Moyiiz teesa a nug yĩngri la lik sẽn ya lik meng n lud Ezipt tẽnga, dasem a tãab tõre." 
Exodus10:23 Dasem a tãab pʋgẽ, Ezipt ned ba a ye ka le tõog n yãend a to ye, ned ba a ye ka le tõog n luk a zĩigẽ ye; Israyɛl kamba sẽn da kẽed tẽng ninga bal n da tar vẽenem." 
Exodus10:24 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b bool a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «Kẽng-y n tɩ waoog y Wẽnnaama; y rũmsa bala, bɛd la bõonego, n na n pa ka. Y pagba ne y kamba tõe n tũume n looge.»" 
Exodus10:25 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yeel yã: «Fo meng tog n baoo rũms n kõ-d tɩ d tɩ maan laafi kosg maoong la yũ-nood maando, tõnd Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Exodus10:26 Sã n ya d rũmsã, bãmb me na n tũume, ba a ye ka na n pa ye; yaa tõnd dũms la d na n yãk n kʋ maoongo n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde. D pʋs n ka mi d sẽn na n waoog d Wẽnnaama seem ninga, sã n ka d taa d maoonga zĩigẽ.»" 
Exodus10:27 Wẽnnaam kidba dĩma sũuri t'a zãgs tɩ b kõn loog ye. 
Exodus10:28 A leoka a Moyiiz woto: «Menem ka! Gũus tɩ m da le yãend-f m taoor ye tɩ baraare yaa f kũum daare.» 
Exodus10:29 T'a Moyiiz na n yeele: «Na yɩ wala f sẽn datã, m kõn le wa f taoor bada!»" 
Exodus11:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Yel-beed a ye n kete, a ye tãa, m sẽn na n tool Ezipt dĩma ne a soolem dãmba. Dẽ poore, a na bas-y tɩ y looge, a pʋs n na n dig-y lame menga." 
Exodus11:2 Wilg m neba tɩ ned kam fãa kos a yaka, rao bɩ paga, wanzurf la sãnem teedo.»" 
Exodus11:3 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ b nebã ne Ezipt rãmba moor zems taaba. A Moyiiz meng da yaa nin-kãseng Ezipt tẽnga, dĩma sõsd-n-taasã la a soolma rãmb fãa nifẽ." 
Exodus11:4 A Moyiiz yeela dĩma: «Ad Soaala-Wẽnnaam koɛɛga: Yʋn-sʋka, m na n pɩʋʋga Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus11:5 Sẽn ya-a a ma pipi bi-ribl fãa, Ezipt tẽnga tõre, na n kiime: biig ning sẽn tog n ledg dĩma, a zaoorẽ, na n kiime, wala yem-pogsa sẽn werd neerẽ wã kom-dẽemse, la rũmsa me pipi kamba sẽn ya raado." 
Exodus11:6 La kɛleng n na n kelem Ezipt tẽng tõre, wala b sẽn zɩɩ n wʋm la b kõn le wʋm a taar ye." 
Exodus11:7 Sã n ya ne mam kambã, kɛleng kõn kelem ye, baag meng kõn wes ninsaal bɩ rũng ye. La woto f na bãng tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd baka a Israyɛl toore, m welg-a-la ne Ezipt rãmba." 
Exodus11:8 Wakat kãng marsã, f poorẽ dãmb na wa n wõgemd m taoore n yeel-ma: ‹Looge, foom ne f nebã.› La m sɩd na n looga wakat kãnga.» A Moyiiz yii Ezipt dĩma zakẽ n loog ne sũ-puuri." 
Exodus11:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Dĩma ka na n sak y kelgr ye; rẽ fãa yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ m pids Ezipt tẽng ne m bõn-bãna.» 
Exodus11:10 Yel-beeda fãa sẽn sõdgã, a Aarõ ne a Moyiiz kɩtame tɩ b pids dĩma taoore. La Wẽnnaam kidba a sũuri t'a zãgs tɩ Israyɛl kamb kõn yi a tẽngẽ ye." 
Exodus12:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ Ezipt tẽnga: 
Exodus12:2 «Kiuug kãnga n na n lʋɩ kiis a taaba taoore: yẽnda n na n yɩ yʋʋmda pipi kiuugu. 
Exodus12:3 Yeel-y Israyɛl zãma wã woto: kiuug kãnga dasem piig daare, bɩ ned kam fãa bao rũm-bila. Zak fãa ya rũng a ye, roog fãa yaa rũng a ye." 
Exodus12:4 Zak sã n paood n ka tõe n sɛ rũng tõre bɩ a tɩ fãoog a yaka, a tɩ fãoog ne sẽn pẽ-a yẽnda n yɩɩda t'a neba me zemse. Ges-y ned kam fãa sẽn tõe n dɩ tɛka n bãng n yãk rũngã tɩ wa zemse." 
Exodus12:5 Rũnga kõbg ka na n lɩʋʋs ye, rũnga na n yɩɩ raoogo, na n yɩɩ yʋʋmd a ye rũnga; tõe n yɩɩ pesg bɩ bʋʋga." 
Exodus12:6 Rũnga na n basame n tãag kiuuga piig la a naas raare; baraar zĩ-sobdo, b na kodg-a, neba fãa taoore." 
Exodus12:7 B na yãk a zɩɩm n taag roog ning rɩɩba sẽn na dɩẽ wã. Rũnga zɩɩm yãkdame n taag kʋɩlenga ne a ra-lugs a yiibã la a rignoorã rĩiri. 
Exodus12:8 Yʋn-kãnga yaa nem-sẽedgo la y na n wãbe la b na n wãb-a-la ne bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle la ne vã-tɩɩsense. 
Exodus12:9 Da saag-y n dɩ sẽn ya kãad bɩ sẽn dʋg ye, sẽn sẽ bugmẽ bal la y na n wãbe; naag-y zugã ne karsã la yãadã." 
Exodus12:10 Da kell-y bũmb beoog yĩng ye. Zĩig sã n yẽege, rɩk-y sẽn ketã n yõog bugum." 
Exodus12:11 Yaa woto la y na n wãb rũngã: y sẽbgda y sɛɛga, n pid neooda, n zãad dasaare. Y na n dɩɩ ne yãgbo. Soaala pɩʋʋga y sʋk baraare." 
Exodus12:12 Yʋn-kãnga m na n pɩʋʋga Ezipt tẽnga, m na n kʋʋ bõn-dẽemsa fãa sẽn be Ezipt tẽnga: ninsaalba wala rũmsi. Woto m na rok m sũuri ne Ezipt wẽn-naandsa fãa. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gome." 
Exodus12:13 Zɩɩma n na wilg yãmb sẽn kẽed dot niynsi. M sẽn yãe zɩɩma zĩig ning fãa, m na n londga yi-kãnga, woto tẽn-kũuma daare, m sẽn na n sɩbg Ezipt raare, y na põse." 
Exodus12:14 Daara na n yɩɩ y Wẽnda sẽn tẽeg y yella raara. Y na n yiime n tong taaba n maan kibs Soaala yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Exodus12:15 Dasem a yopoe tõre, ket n yaa Soaala n gomde, y na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle. Y na n sɩnga pipi daarã n menes bɩll y zagsẽ, tɩ ned ninga fãa sẽn na n dɩ bur sẽn wẽ ne bɩlle pipi raarã n tãag a yopoe raarã, a soab na n kiime." 
Exodus12:16 Y na n maana tigẽng kãsenga pipi raarã. A yopoe raarã me yɩ boto. Badaare tʋʋmd buug pa tʋmd ye, sã n ka rɩɩb seglgo bala." 
Exodus12:17 Y na n deega bur pa lobd bɩlla noore. Y na n maana kibs n tẽeg tɩ badaare m yiisa y buuda Ezipt tẽnga. Yals-y kibs kãnga zamaan woo zamaana. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd meng noore y sẽn tog n deege. 
Exodus12:18 Dɩlla pipi kiuugã, a piig la a naas daar zĩ-sobdo, n tãag a pisi la a ye daare, zĩ-sobdo, y na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle." 
Exodus12:19 Dasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ bɩ m da yãe bɩll y zagsẽ ye, tɩ ned ninga sẽn na n wãba bur sẽn ning bɩlle, m na n yiis a soab Israyɛl buudẽ. A yaa tẽnga ned bɩ sãana, b na n yiis-a-la buudẽ." 
Exodus12:20 Da rɩɩ-y bur sẽn ning bɩlle ye; y sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, dɩɩ-y bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle.»" 
Exodus12:21 A Moyiiz tigma a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba fãa n yeel-ba: «Tɩ bao-y rũm-bõonego, pe-bil bɩ bulla, zak woo zaka, n kʋ paka, tẽegra, yĩnga." 
Exodus12:22 Y na kao vãado n tʋm zɩɩma sĩngẽ, n yãk zɩɩma n bol dignora rĩiri la ra-lugs a yiibã. Sã n ka beoog n vẽege, bɩ ned ba a ye da saag n yi yɩng ye." 
Exodus12:23 Wotone Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa saagd Ezipt tẽng n na n kʋ, b sã n yãe zaka t'a rignoora la ra-lugsã bola ne zɩɩm, b na looge n ka kẽ yi-kãng pʋg ye, la kũum kõn ki y zagsẽ ye." 
Exodus12:24 Woto me na n yɩɩ noor y sẽn na n deeg, yãmb ne y kamba, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Exodus12:25 Y sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning Soaala sẽn na n kõ yãmbã, y na kell n maan boto." 
Exodus12:26 Y kamb sã n wa sok yãmba: ‹Yaa bõe la y maand woto.› 
Exodus12:27 Y na leok-ba: ‹Yaa pak maoong la d kʋʋda, Wẽnnaam waoogr yĩnga, tɩ Ezipt tẽnga b londga Israyɛl kamb zagse n tɩ kʋ Ezipt rãmba n yaool n bas tõndo.› » A Moyiiz yaool n kɩtame tɩ neba yĩgimd n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Exodus12:28 Israyɛl kamb sẽegame. B reega noora zãnga. B maana bũmb ning fãa Wẽnnaam sẽn wilg a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ. 
Exodus12:29 Yʋn-sʋka, Soaala-Wẽnd kʋʋ sẽn yaa bi-rẽeng fãa Ezipt tẽnga: dĩma bi-rẽeng sẽn da na n led a ba a zaoorẽ, wala yem-daada kom-dẽems. Yɩɩ woto me ne rũmsã." 
Exodus12:30 Ezipt dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba la Ezipt buuda neb fãa nekame. Kɛleng kãseng n kelme, tɩ b zak ba a ye pa zĩnd tɩ kũum pa ki a pʋgẽ ye." 
Exodus12:31 Dĩma boola a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tɩ zĩig nan pa yẽeg ye. A yeel-b lame: «Kẽng-y n tɩ waoog y Soaala-Wẽndã wala y sẽn kosã. 
Exodus12:32 La wala y sẽn kosã, loog-y ne y rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego la y tak y Wẽnda bark m zugu.»" 
Exodus12:33 Ezipt nebã, b toore, n da tusd Israyɛl kamba tɩ b ning pãng n yi b tẽngẽ tɩ b ra ki ye." 
Exodus12:34 Neba yiime; b baoo lagd niyns sẽn tar n wẽed burã n wʋk b zoma sẽn nan ka paam n mikã n sẽb ne futu n tʋk n looge. 
Exodus12:35 Israyɛl kamb maana wala a Moyiiz sẽn da yeele, n kos Ezipt rãmba fan teedo, sẽn dõog ne sãnem bɩ ne wanzurf la b kos-b-la fut n paase." 
Exodus12:36 Wẽnnaam kõ Ezipt rãmb yam sõngo la b sak n penga b teedã. Woto me la Israyɛl paam n loog ne Ezipt rãmb paoongo. 
Exodus12:37 Israyɛl kamba yii Ramsɛs n tees Sukot. B da taa neb tus kobs-yoobe. Sõda rapa bala, ka paas b zak rãmb ye." 
Exodus12:38 Yɩɩ zãma kãseng n pʋg-ba, n paas rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego, ka tɛka." 
Exodus12:39 B yãka zoma sẽn wer Ezipt tẽngã n dõos miisdu. Zoma ka paam n wuk ye. B sẽn dig-b tɩ b yi ne yãgbo b ka paam n bao sor dɩɩb ye. 
Exodus12:40 Israyɛl kamb zĩnda Ezipt tẽng yʋʋm kobs-naas la pis-tã, n na n yaool n wa looge." 
Exodus12:41 Yɩɩ kobs-naas la pis-tã wã baasg raare, ra-kãseng raare, la Soaala yiis b neba bal-bal Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus12:42 La Wẽnnaam nif sẽn pa mum yʋn-kãng tɩ Israyɛl kamba paam n loogã, togame tɩ Israyɛl kamba me bas gõeem yʋn-kãng tẽegr yĩnga, n waoog Soaala-Wẽnd la na n yɩɩ woto zamaan sẽn wate." 
Exodus12:43 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: «Noy-niyns sẽn get tẽegra raare la woto: Sãan ba a ye ka tog n naag-y ye. 
Exodus12:44 Sã n ya ned f sẽn da ne ligdi, yẽ soab tõe n naagame, a yee n kẽe bãongo." 
Exodus12:45 Ned sã n nok foom bɩ a sã n tʋmdame n deegd ligdi, yẽ soab ka tõe n naag n dɩ kibsa ye." 
Exodus12:46 Zak fãa pʋgẽ, yaa roog a ye tãa pʋgẽ la b na n dɩ tẽegra rɩɩbo. Nem-võr meng ka tõe n yi ro-kãng pʋg ye. Kõbr ba a ye me ka wekd ye." 
Exodus12:47 Yaa Israyɛl zãma wã fãa n tog n maan tẽegra raare. 
Exodus12:48 Sãan sã n be y tẽngẽ t'a me rat n tẽeg raarã, n waoog Wẽnnaam, bɩ rao fãa sẽn be a zakẽ, deng n kẽ bãongo. Wakat kãnga a tõeeme t'a lebga wa tẽnga biiga. La sẽn ka kẽ-a bãong ka tõe n naag ye." 
Exodus12:49 Noora yaa no-yɛnga, sãamba la tẽnga dãmba yĩnga.»" 
Exodus12:50 Israyɛl kamb sak n maana wa Wẽnnaam sẽn togs a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ. 
Exodus12:51 Yaa baraar meng la Soaala-Wẽnd yiis Israyɛl kamba, b tãb-biis la b rũms Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus13:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz woto: 
Exodus13:2 «Kõ maam pag pipi biig fãa sẽn ya raoa, n dog Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, tɩ m sooge. Kom-dibli wã, maam n na n sooge; na n yɩɩ boto me ne rũmsã kom-dẽemse.»" 
Exodus13:3 A Moyiiz yeela nebã: «Tẽeg-y daar ninga yãmb sẽn yi Ezipt, y yembd tẽnga. Wẽnd pãng n sõng-y tɩ y paam n yi; daara tẽegr daare, bɩ y da rɩ bur sẽn ning bɩll ye." 
Exodus13:4 Y yita Ezipt tẽng rũnna, Abib kiuugu, bõn-bɩʋng kiuugu." 
Exodus13:5 Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa kẽes yãmb Kanaã rãmba, Ititse, Amoritse, Ivitse la Zebuzitsa tẽngẽ, tẽng ning b sẽn kãab y ba rãmba, tẽng sẽn zoet bĩisim la sɩɩdo, y na vẽ ne bur sẽn ning bɩll rɩɩbo, kiuug kãnga pʋgẽ." 
Exodus13:6 Dasem a yopoe tõre, y kõn sɩɩs bur sẽn ning bɩll ye la a yopoe daarã, y na maan kibs n waoog Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Exodus13:7 Dɩlla yaa dasem a yopoe tõre la y ka na n dɩ bur sẽn ning bɩlle. Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, b kõn yãend-a f zakẽ, b kõn yãend-a tẽnga pʋgẽ ye." 
Exodus13:8 Badaare y na togs y kamba woto: ‹Wẽnd sẽn maan tõnd neere n yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga la d tẽegda.› 
Exodus13:9 Yeel-y-b tɩ bura sẽn ka ning bɩllã yaa tẽegre wa wiifu sẽn kɩ kanga bɩ rĩiri. A na tẽeg-y tɩ y kils Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ yaa bãmb n yiis-y ne pãng Ezipt tẽnga. 
Exodus13:10 F na reeg no-kãnga yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa, a wakato." 
Exodus13:11 Wẽnnaam sã n wa kẽes foo Kanaã tẽnga wala b sẽn kãab foo ne f yaab rãmba, b sã n wa pids b kãabgã," 
Exodus13:12 f na kõ Soaala-Wẽnd, pag fãa pipi bi-ribla la rũng fãa pipi bi-raoogo; Sẽn ya raoogo la pipi biig fãa, yaa Wẽnd n so." 
Exodus13:13 Sã n ya bõn-dibla, f na bao pe-bil n teke. F sã n ka rat n teke bɩ f wẽ a kãarã n wãag. F tog n bao bũmb n ledg bi-ribl fãa zĩigẽ. F ka teke, Wẽnd n so." 
Exodus13:14 La beoog raarã, f biiga sã n wa sok fo: ‹Rog-n-mik kãnga võor yaa bõe?› F na yeel-a: ‹Yaa Wẽnnaam pãnga sẽn tõe bũmb fãa wã n yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga yembdẽ." 
Exodus13:15 Dĩma sẽn da ka rat tɩ tõnd loogã, Soaala-Wẽnd kʋʋ Ezipt kom-dẽemsa fãa: yɩɩ ninsaalba la rũmsa kom-dẽemse. Yaa rẽ yĩng la sã m ya rũnga, m kʋʋda a pipi biig sẽn ya raoogo; sã n ya ninsaala, rũng la m baood n ledg a zĩigẽ n kʋ.›" 
Exodus13:16 Soaala n tʋm b pãng tʋʋma n yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga, la rẽ na n yɩɩ tẽegr wa wiifu sẽn kɩ f kang bɩ f rĩirẽ.»" 
Exodus13:17 Ezipt dĩma basa Israyɛl kamb tɩ b looge. Wẽnd yaool n ka sak tɩ b rɩk Kanaã tẽnga sor ye; yẽnda n yaool n da ya tɩrga. Wẽnnaam da yeela b menga: B sã n yãg n sɩng zaba ne b bɛɛbã sẽn ka tɛkã, b wat n basa raood n leb Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus13:18 Yaa rẽ yĩng la b kɩt tɩ b rɩk soe gõdem-gõdem n tees we-raoogã la Rudum Mogre. Israyɛl kamba sẽn yi Ezipt da pa kẽnd yaar ye, b tonga wa tãb-biis sẽn dabd zabre." 
Exodus13:19 A Moyiiz tẽeg n wʋka a Zozɛf kõaba; a Zozɛf sɩd da yeela a saam-biisã: «Wẽnnaam na n wa ges-y lame la wẽen-y tɩ y na zɩ m kõabã.» 
Exodus13:20 Israyɛl kamba yika Sukot n wa yals Etam, we-raooga noore." 
Exodus13:21 Naaba-Wẽnd ra lʋɩta b taoore. Wĩntoogo, da yaa sawadgo, n wilgd-b sore, la yʋngo yaa vẽenem n tilgdi, n vẽnegd b sore la woto, wĩntoog bɩ yʋngo, yaa kẽnd bala." 
Exodus13:22 Sawadga ka viigd wĩntoog bada, la yʋngo vẽenema n deegd a zĩiga. Wĩntoog wala yʋngo, sora ra vẽnega b taoore n dɩga." 
Exodus14:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz woto: 
Exodus14:2 «Yeel Israyɛl kamba tɩ b lɛɛg n wa wẽ b sika Pi-Ayirot, Migdol la mogra sʋka, n get Baal-Sefõ b taoore. Yaa be, mogra noorẽ, la y na n yaas." 
Exodus14:3 Ezipt dĩma na n yeela a sũurẽ: ‹Israyɛl kamba taa we-raoogẽ n ka le mi b goabg la b rɩtg ye, tɩ we-raooga na n dɩ-ba.›" 
Exodus14:4 M na n kidba dĩma sũuri t'a yik n pʋg yãmba la m na tʋm tʋʋmd sẽn na n wa ne m yʋʋra kilsgu. Dĩma ne a tãb-biisa na bãng tɩ maam la y Wẽnde.» Israyɛl deega Soaala-Wẽnd noore. 
Exodus14:5 B sẽn wa n wilg Ezipt dĩma tɩ Israyɛl kamba loogame, yẽ ne a poorẽ dãmba sũur ka yɩ noog ye. B yeelame: «Tõnd maana a wãna n ka na n zã Israyɛl kamba wa yem-daado n bas-b tɩ b looge?»" 
Exodus14:6 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b sog a bilim-bilma wiidi, t'a yi ne a tãb-biisi." 
Exodus14:7 A yii ne bilim-bilm kobs-yoob sẽn da ya sõma n yɩɩd b taaba, a yii ne Ezipt tẽng bilim-bilm fãa la yaa neb sẽn mi weoofo n da zãad-ba." 
Exodus14:8 Wẽnnaam kidba dĩma sũuri t'a yik n na n babs a Israyɛl sẽn da loog ne yẽesem. 
Exodus14:9 Ezipt rãmbã, dĩma wiidi, bilim-bilm, wed-dʋʋdba, tãb-biisi, fãa pʋg-b lame n ta b sikã, mogra noorẽ, be la Pi-Ayirot ne Baal-Sefõ tot taaba." 
Exodus14:10 Israyɛl kamba gesame la b yãee Ezipt rãmba sẽn zoet n pʋgd-ba tɩ rabeem kãseng yõk-ba, tɩ b sɩng n kaasd ne Soaala." 
Exodus14:11 B yeela a Moyiiz: «Yaad n sɛ Ezipt tẽng bɩ bõe tɩ f tall-d tɩ d wa ki we-raoogẽ? Ezipt tẽng yiiba yõoda la bʋgo? 
Exodus14:12 Tõnd da ka pĩnd n yeel foom Ezipt tẽng bɩ: Bas-d tɩ d tʋm Ezipt rãmba yĩnga tɩ rẽ n são d sẽn na n ki we-raoogẽ!» 
Exodus14:13 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yeel-ba: «Yiis-y rabeem buud fãa y sũurẽ, da bas-y raood ye, y na n yãee Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga n fãag yãmb dũnna raarã. Bãng-y tɩ y sẽn ne Ezipt rãmba dũnna, y kõn le yãend-b bada." 
Exodus14:14 Soaala-Wẽnd na n zaba yãmb zĩigẽ, yãmb tek yaa gesg bala, y kõn maan bũmb n paas ye.»" 
Exodus14:15 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Bõe yĩng tɩ f kelemd-m woto? Yeel Israyɛl kamba tɩ b le dɩk sore. 
Exodus14:16 Fo yee n zẽk f dasaarã, zẽk f nug mogra zug, wẽ-a ne rasaarã t'a welg a yiibu, tɩ Israyɛl kamba loog sʋka tɩ b naoor meng ka madg ye." 
Exodus14:17 M na n kidba Ezipt neba sũuri la b na n kẽeme n pʋg yãmba la m na n tʋma raood ne dĩma, ne a tãb-biisã, ne a bilim-bilm, ne a wed-dʋʋdbã." 
Exodus14:18 Woto Ezipt rãmb na bãng tɩ maam la y Wẽnnaam, m sã n maan daood n tõog dĩma ne a tãb-biisã, ne a bilim-bilma, ne a wed-dʋʋdbã.»" 
Exodus14:19 Wẽnd malɛka sẽn da kẽnd Israyɛl kamba taoor teema zĩig n wa poorẽ. Sawadga me leba poorẽ n yaase. 
Exodus14:20 A tɩ yalsa Ezipt la Israyɛl tãb-biisa sʋka n maan lik sẽn ya lik menga. Zĩig sẽn waa n yẽege, b yãendame tɩ b pa tol n kolg taab yʋnga tõr ye." 
Exodus14:21 A Moyiiz tẽega a nug mogra zugu. Yʋnga tõre Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ yaang sob-raoog fʋʋs mogrã n kʋɩɩs a kooma; kooma yalsa goabg la rɩtgo, n bas sʋka koɛɛnga." 
Exodus14:22 Israyɛl kamba dʋʋga mogra nao-koɛɛnga, b kẽna sʋka, tɩ koom yɛs wa lalga, b rɩtgo la b goabga." 
Exodus14:23 Ezipt sɩnga pʋgbo; dĩma, a bilim-bilma, a wed-dʋʋdba, fãa kẽeme n pʋgda, n wa ta sʋka." 
Exodus14:24 Beoog sẽn waa n kolg vẽegre Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda sawatẽ wã n ges Ezipt tãb-biisã n kɩt tɩ bũmb fãa lebg zũngu. 
Exodus14:25 B gɩmba b bilim-bilma karse tɩ kẽnd lebg nimbãanega; Ezipt rãmb kelmame: «D zoe la d bas Israyɛl kamba tɩ Soaala sõngd-b lame n bas Ezipt rãmba.» 
Exodus14:26 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Tẽeg f nug mogra zugu tɩ kooma lɛɛg n wa seg Ezipt rãmba ne b bilim-bilma la b wed-dʋʋdbã.» 
Exodus14:27 A Moyiiz tẽega a nugu, la zĩig sẽn waa n yẽegdẽ, kooma leba a zĩigẽ. A sega Ezipt kamba sẽn da lɛɛg n zoetẽ n menes-b zãnga." 
Exodus14:28 Kooma waa n dɩɩ bilim-bilma, wed-dʋʋdbã. Dĩma tãb-biisa sẽn da pʋgdã, ba a ye ka tõog n põs ye." 
Exodus14:29 Sa n ya a Israyɛl kambã, bãmb paamame n dʋʋg nao-koɛɛnga, tɩ koom yɛs wa lalg b goabg la rɩtgo." 
Exodus14:30 Badaare Wẽnd fãag-b-la Ezipt rãmb nusẽ. A Israyɛl yãee Ezipt rãmba sẽn ki n dʋr mogra noore. 
Exodus14:31 A Israyɛl yãee ne a nifu, bõn-bãnd ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maane n wã Ezipt rãmb zãnga. A Israyɛl zoe Soaala-Wẽnde, a tẽe Naaba-Wẽnd la b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz." 
Exodus15:1 A Moyiiz ne Israyɛl kamba naaga taab n yɩɩl yɩɩn kãnga n na n pẽg Soaala-Wẽnd. Ad-b sẽn yeele: M kilsda Naaba-Wẽnde tɩ b tʋma tʋʋm bãnde. B sẽn tus wed-dʋʋd ne a weefo yɩɩ koomẽ, faoo!" 
Exodus15:2 M pãnga la m ziirã, yaa yãmba, m Soaala. Yãmb n yɩ m Fãagda, yãmb la Wẽnd tɩ m na n pẽg yã, yãmb la m yaab rãmb Wẽnde tɩ m na kils yã." 
Exodus15:3 Soaala yaa Tãnsoaba, Naaba-Wẽnd la b yʋʋre." 
Exodus15:4 Dĩma bilim-bilm ne a tãb-biisi, fãa loba koomẽ, faoo! Wed-kɩɩm mitba gilli Rudum Mogr pa kees ba zoobgo." 
Exodus15:5 Kooma lim-b-la zãnga, B lisa bõra, wala kug-sĩdma." 
Exodus15:6 Soaala, y nug rɩtgã ka solg a pãng ye, y nug rɩtgã, Soaala n fẽd bɛɛba zutu wa noaba." 
Exodus15:7 Y sẽn yik n yals y naoor zugu y fabsa bɛɛba tẽnga, y sẽn puug y sũuri, a bugma rɩ-b-la wa moogo." 
Exodus15:8 Wẽnd sẽn tĩs b tĩsga, koom sũu taaba, koom yalsa a meng wa lalga, Kooma taa ko-sʋka, n ka wa baafo." 
Exodus15:9 Bɛ wã ra yetame: M sẽn digi, m pa yõke, la m sẽn yõk na lebg m pʋɩɩre! Ka rɩɩb la m na n dɩ m yam? Ya m ta n wõog m sʋʋga ya m nug tʋk n looge!" 
Exodus15:10 Mik sobg la Soaala na n fʋʋse tɩ mogra lɛɛg n pil-b wa rebre, Mik b na n lisa wa namdo la ko-vɛlga ka na n kees bũmb ye." 
Exodus15:11 Yãmb ka be taar ye, Soaala! Ãnda n zem yãmb ne sõmblem? Ãnda n tõe tʋʋm-bãn wa yãmba? Ãnda n tõe n pẽg wa sẽn segde, sẽn ka vʋʋsda ne tʋm tɩ ninsaal yãend n pĩ a noorã?" 
Exodus15:12 Yãmb sẽn tees bɛɛba ne y nugu, la tẽnga sẽn sɩng b velbo." 
Exodus15:13 Y pidsa y kãoobgo y sẽn da kãab y buudu; y tall-a-la ne pãnga n tɩ kẽes y zag sõngẽ. 
Exodus15:14 Dũni rãmb wʋmame n lɛɛg n zĩ ne yɩɩre. Ad-y Filisti rãmb digimda waoodo," 
Exodus15:15 tɩ Edom dĩm dãmb saood kalwaare. Moab na-komse la Kanaã zãng fãa gilli lebga rigbu la yɩɩre. 
Exodus15:16 B yɛɛsa b rabeem yɛɛsgo n tiig n lebg mugsi n tiig n lebg wa kugri, tɩ yãmb neba lood b loogre, Soaala, tɩ zooda kamb kẽnd ka mi tadgre." 
Exodus15:17 Y soolma rãmba, Soaala, ya y tãnga zug la y rʋʋs-ba, be la b rʋ n na n zĩnd n kaoose Yaa zĩ-kãng la y segl y meng yĩnga, Be la y yãk y waoogr zĩiga tɩ b na n ti b rot be. Ro-sõng la y nuga ti n kõ-b be Ro-kãng pʋgẽ la b na n waoog yã." 
Exodus15:18 Soaala soog naam zamaan ne zamaana! 
Exodus15:19 Ezipt dĩma weef kẽe mogrã ne a bilim-bilm, ne a wed-dʋʋdba, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd kɩt tɩ kooma seg-ba. Sã n yaa Israyɛl kambã, bãmb yaool n taba tẽn-koɛɛng n looge." 
Exodus15:20 Bãngd poaka, a Miriyam, a Aarõ tão, yika ne a gãngão-gilga. Pagb a taaba me yika ne b rẽnda n sigl saooga," 
Exodus15:21 t'a Miriyam na n pʋd yɩɩn kãnga: D yɩɩl n kils Wẽnnaam tɩ b tʋma raoodo, weefã ne a wed-dʋʋdã, b tusa fãa n lub koomẽ!" 
Exodus15:22 A Moyiiz kɩtame t'a neba yik mogra noor n dig Sur zĩ-peen-daagẽ; b kẽna dasem a tã n pa tol n tuk koom ye. 
Exodus15:23 B sẽn ta zĩig a ye, b pa tõog n yũ be kooma ye t'a da yaa toog lig-ligi: pʋs n yaa rẽ yĩng la b boond tẽnga tɩ Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Neba guglma ne a Moyiiz la b yeelame: «Bõe la d na n yũ?» 
Exodus15:25 A Moyiiz yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga la b wilg-a-la tɩɩg buud a ye t'a na n kʋʋg a raoogo. A sẽn dɩk-a n los koomẽ, kooma lebga noogo. Be la Soaala-Wẽnd wilg a Israyɛl sẽn kis la sẽn gɩdge, be la b kõ-a noore, beene me la b fɛɛs a sũuri. B yeela woto:" 
Exodus15:26 «Fo sã n kelg Wẽnd gomde, fo sã n maan sẽn ya neer b nifẽ, fo sã n deeg b noya, fo sã n maan b raabo, m kõn sak tɩ yel-beed niyns sẽn nams Ezipt rãmba ta foo ye, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la bãag fãa tɩɩm.»" 
Exodus15:27 B taa Elim. Buls piig la a yi, n paas koms pisopoe, n da be be, tɩ b sig n gãand be, kooma noore." 
Exodus16:1 A Israyɛl kamba yii Elim n ta Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ. Sin bee Elim ne Sinayi tẽnsʋka. B taa be b sẽn yi Ezipt tẽng tɩ kiuug la rasem piig la a nu. 
Exodus16:2 Israyɛl kamb yika we-raoogẽ wã n guglem ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ. 
Exodus16:3 B yeel-b lame: «Bõe tɩ y ka bas tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kʋ tõnd Ezipt tẽnga, nemda rʋgd sẽn da waa n dɩg d taoore tɩ d kaood burã d yam? Bõe tɩ yamb tall zãma a woto fãa n wa zĩ-peen-daagẽ tɩ kom na n kʋ-ba?»" 
Exodus16:4 Dẽ la Wẽnnaam yeel a Moyiiz: «M na n kɩtame tɩ rɩɩb yi yĩngr n dʋʋg wa saaga tɩ y rɩ. Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa neba na yi n wʋk sẽn sekd-b daar a ye dɩɩbo. M na n maana woto n ges b sã n na n sakame bɩ b sã n pa na n sak n deeg m noore. 
Exodus16:5 Daar a yoob soabã b na n le wʋkame n segl b dɩɩbo la badaare a na n yɩɩga dasem kam dẽnna naoor a yiibu.» 
Exodus16:6 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ goma ne zãma wã woto: «Zaabrã y na bãng tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga. 
Exodus16:7 Beoog yibeoogo Soaala-Wẽnd na n puk-y-la b ziiri. B wʋma y sẽn tar gugleng ne bãmba. Sã n ya tõndo, d neeme tɩ y sẽn tar gugleng ne tõnda ka be zĩig ye.»" 
Exodus16:8 A Moyiiz da rat n yeelame: «Y na yãend Soaala ziiri, b sã n wa kõ yãmb nemd zaabre, n kõ-y rɩɩb yibeoog tɩ y rɩ n tɩge, tɩ y guglma ne Soaala la b wʋmame. Tõnd yaa bõe tɩ y na n guglem ne tõndo, yaa ne bãmb la y guglemda.»" 
Exodus16:9 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ: «Kõ Israyɛl zãma wã no-kãnga: Wa-y Wẽnnaam taoore tɩ b wʋma y guglengã.» 
Exodus16:10 A Aarõ sẽn waa n gomd ne-bã, b wẽnemda b nens n tees zĩ-peen-daagã la b yãee Wẽnd ziirã sẽn puk yĩngri, sawadgẽ." 
Exodus16:11 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz la ad-b sẽn yeel-a: 
Exodus16:12 «M wʋma Israyɛl kamba guglengu. Dẽ yĩnga yeel-ba: Zĩig sã n wa sobge y na wãb nemdo la yibeoogo y na tɩg rɩɩbo la woto y na bãng tɩ maam a Naaba-Wẽnd la yãmb Wẽnnaam.» 
Exodus16:13 Zĩig sẽn sɩd sobge pitr-lʋɩɩs dʋʋgame n pid a Israyɛl sẽn da wẽ a sika zĩig ningã la vẽkẽmbeoogo meenem n dʋʋg n gilgi. 
Exodus16:14 Meenema sẽn waa n mesge, b yãee bõn-bõonego sẽn ya bɛɛl-bɛɛla, sẽn pelg weooga wa zom, wa fʋl-fʋl-bi." 
Exodus16:15 Israyɛl kamb yãee-a lame la b sogsa taaba: Woto yaa bõe? B da ka mi sẽn ya bũmb ning ye. T'a Moyiiz leok-ba: «Wã la rɩɩb ning Wẽnd sẽn kõt yãmbã. 
Exodus16:16 La ad noor ning b sẽn kõt-y rɩ-kãnga poorẽ: Ned kam fãa wʋk sẽn tog n sek-a. Ned fãa wamde. F roog ned ba a ye ra kong a rẽnd ye. Bɩ ned kam fãa wʋk sẽn na n sek a roog rãmb fãa.» 
Exodus16:17 A Israyɛl vẽega beoogo n maan wa Wẽnd sẽn yeelã. Kẽer dẽnd da yaa wʋsgo, tɩ kẽer dẽn ya bilfu." 
Exodus16:18 B sã n yaool n dɩk magba wamde n na n mage, fãa zengda taaba. Sẽn wʋk-b wʋsga dẽnd boogdame, sẽn wʋk-b bilfa dẽnd fɩɩgdame. Ned kam fãa ra paamda sẽn sekd a rɩɩbo." 
Exodus16:19 A Moyiiz yeel-b lame: «Ned ba a ye da saag n bĩng beoog yĩng ye.» 
Exodus16:20 Kẽer ka kelg ye la b yãkame n bĩng beoog yĩnga. Bãng-y tɩ sẽn keesã, zũnzũy kẽe-a lame la a põogame n lebg yũug zãng t'a Moyiiz sũur puug." 
Exodus16:21 Dɩlla beoog-beoog fãa ned kam da wʋkda wala a sẽn tõe n dɩ tɛka; wĩndg sã n zẽke a boogdame. 
Exodus16:22 Daar a yoob soabã b wʋka dasem kam fãa dẽnna naoor a yi: ned kam fãa wam a yi. Sagsa kãsem-dãmb waa n togsa a Moyiiz. 
Exodus16:23 T'a na n yeel-ba: «Soaala-Wẽnd n sɩd yeel woto: Beoog yaa vʋʋsg daare. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd daare. Ning-y wʋngẽ y sẽn dat n ning be, la rʋg-y y sẽn dat n dʋge. Bas-y sẽn kella fãa beoog yĩnga.»" 
Exodus16:24 B bĩnga sẽn keesã beoog yĩnga, wala a Moyiiz sẽn yeelã la bũmb ka põog n lebg yũug ye, bũmb ka kẽ zũnzũy ye." 
Exodus16:25 A Moyiiz yeel-b-la baraare: «Yãmb dɩɩb la woto rũnna, yaa vʋʋsg daare, yaa Wẽnnaam daare. Rũnna bũmb ka na dʋʋg pʋʋgẽ ye." 
Exodus16:26 Dasem a yoobã, y tõe n wʋk-a lame la raar a yopoe soaba, vʋʋsga raarã, a kõn dʋʋg ye.»" 
Exodus16:27 Daar a yopoe soaba, neb kẽer baas n yiime n na n tɩ wʋke, la b pa yãend bũmb ye." 
Exodus16:28 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Yãmb na n zãgsa m noora reegr n ta da-bʋre? 
Exodus16:29 Ade, m kõo yãmb vʋʋsg noore. M kɩtame tɩ daar a yoob soaba bɩ y paamd sẽn sekd dasem a yiib dɩɩbo. Dẽ yĩng bɩ ned kam fãa pa a zĩigẽ; a yopoe daarã bɩ ned da yi ye.»" 
Exodus16:30 Dẽ tɛka b pa le saag n tʋm vʋʋsga daar ye. 
Exodus16:31 Rɩɩba sẽn da yit yĩngr n dʋʋgd tẽngã, Israyɛl kamba ra sokda taaba: «Bõe la wã, bõe la woto?» B ra ka mi a sẽn ya-la. A ra wẽnda siili, n ya pɛɛlga, n noom wa miisd sẽn dõos ne sɩɩdo." 
Exodus16:32 A Moyiiz yeelame: «Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yals bũmb ninga: Bao-y wamde n wʋk rɩɩbã n pids-a, n bao zĩig n bĩng-a y kamb yĩnga, woto b na yãe rɩɩb ning m sẽn tall n dɩlg yãmb we-raoogẽ wã, m sẽn waa n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga.»" 
Exodus16:33 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ: «Bao rubla n pids-a ne rɩɩbã n tɩ rɩgl-a Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, y yagensa yĩnga.»" 
Exodus16:34 A Aarõ baoo rubla, n pids ne rɩɩbã, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeelã la b bĩng-a-la ne kuga walsã." 
Exodus16:35 Yɩɩ yʋʋm pis-naas pʋgẽ la Israyɛl kamba paam dɩ-kãnga n tãag b sẽn na n yi we-raoogẽ n kẽ tẽngẽ. B da rɩtame la b sokd b mens tɩ bõe la wã, n tãag Kanaã rãmb toaagẽ." 
Exodus16:36 Wamda sẽn da magd ned kam fãa pʋɩɩrã, yaa bãmb piig n da pit peoogo." 
Exodus17:1 Israyɛl kamba deega Soaala-Wẽnd noore, b yii Sin weoogã n dig taoore. B taa Refidim n yaas be, la b pa yãend koom n na n yũ ye." 
Exodus17:2 Dẽ la b yik zabr ne a Moyiiz: «Kõ-d koom tɩ d yũ!» T'a Moyiiz leok-ba: «Bõe yĩng la y zabd ne maam? Bõe yĩng tɩ y baood Soaala-Wẽnd noore?» 
Exodus17:3 Ko-yũuda sẽn da zabd-b yĩnga, b kell n guglma ne a Moyiiz n yetẽ: «Bõe tɩ f yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga? F ratame tɩ ko-yũud kʋ tõnd ne d kamb la d rũms laa?»" 
Exodus17:4 A Moyiiz yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛg woto: «Bõe la m na n maan nin-bãmba yĩnga? Kellẽ la bilf bal tɩ b labẽ maam ne kuga.» 
Exodus17:5 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeel a Moyiiz: «Yi ne f nebã, lʋɩ b taoore, foo ne zagsa kãsem-dãmb kẽere; rɩk rasaar ning fo sẽn tall n wẽ kʋɩlgã, rɩk-a n zã f nugẽ la kẽnge." 
Exodus17:6 M na n yalsa f taoore, pĩiga zugu, Oreb tãnga. F na n wẽe pĩiga t'a pusg koom tɩ neba paam n yũ.» La yaa boto la a Moyiiz maan kãsem-dãmba taoore." 
Exodus17:7 B boola zĩ-kãng tɩ Masa la Meriba, fɛɛsgo la no-baoore, la rẽ yaa b sẽn bao Wẽnd noor zĩ-kãnga la b sẽn fɛɛs Soaala-Wẽnd n na n bãng b sã n beeme bɩ b sã n ka be ne bãmba." 
Exodus17:8 Amalɛk waa Refidim n tak zabr ne a Israyɛl. 
Exodus17:9 A Moyiiz yeela a Zozuwe: «Bao neb tɩ y yik beoog n tɩ zab ne a Amalɛk. M na dʋʋ n yalsa tãnga zugu la Wẽnd dasaara la m na n zã m nugẽ.» 
Exodus17:10 A Zozuwe maana wala a Moyiiz sẽn togs-a; a yi n sega a Amalɛk la rẽ t'a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ la a Ur dʋʋ tãnga zugu. 
Exodus17:11 A Moyiiz nusa sã n da zẽk yĩngr fãa, a Israyɛl n da tõe. Nusa sã n sigi yaa a Amalɛk n da tõe." 
Exodus17:12 A Moyiiz nusa waa n kiime t'a Aarõ ne a Ur bilim kugr n kõ-a t'a zaond tɩ bãmb yaool n zẽkd a nusã, la woto wĩndig kẽeme tɩ b ket n zãnd yĩngri." 
Exodus17:13 A Zozuwe sʋʋga varga a Amalɛk. 
Exodus17:14 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Bao sebr n gʋls yel-kãnga tɩ b ra wa yĩm-a ye la f togs a Zozuwe woto: m na n yẽesa Amalɛk rãmb buud saaga tẽngre.» 
Exodus17:15 A Moyiiz mee maan-kugr n pʋd a yʋʋra woto: Soaala-Wẽnd la m tãb-kaoore. 
Exodus17:16 La rẽ yaa a sẽn tʋlg n wilgi: «A Amalɛk bao zabre ne Naaba-Wẽnde, bɩ Naaba-Wẽnd kao zabr ne a Amalɛk, zamaan woo zamaana.»" 
Exodus18:1 Madiã maan-kʋʋd la a Moyiiz rɛɛmba, a Zetro, wʋma Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maan bũmb ning ne a Moyiiz la b buudu, a Israyɛl. A wʋmame tɩ Wẽnd yiis-b-la Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus18:2 Dẽ la a babs-a la a waa ne a paga Sefora sẽn da pa Madiã," 
Exodus18:3 n paas a kamb a yiibu. Biig a ye yʋʋr la Gersõ, a Sãana, t'a ra yeelame: Yaa tẽn-zẽngẽ la m zoe n tɩ kẽ." 
Exodus18:4 Biig a to wã pʋdame tɩ Eliezer, Wẽnd la m sõangda, t'a ra yeelame: M ba rãmb Wẽnd yɩ-la m sõangda la b fãag-m-la ne Ezipt dĩma sʋʋga." 
Exodus18:5 Dɩlla a Moyiiz rɛɛmba Zetro ne a kamba la a pag waa n paam-a-la we-raoogẽ wã, b sikẽ, Wẽnd tãnga zugu." 
Exodus18:6 A kɩtame tɩ b yeel a Moyiiz: «Ad yaa maam, f rɛɛmba Zetro, n wa n na n ges-fo la m waa ne f pagã la f kamb a yiibã.»" 
Exodus18:7 A Moyiiz yi n sega a rɛɛmba, n wõgemd a taoore, n mobg-a, n sok taab keelem tɩ b yaool n tũ taab n kẽ roogẽ." 
Exodus18:8 A Moyiiz wilga a rɛɛmba Wẽnd sẽn maan ne Ezipt dĩma la a nebã. B sẽn sõng a Israyɛl to-to. A wilga yel-pakr toɛ-toɛ b sẽn seg sor zugu tɩ Wẽnd fãag-ba. 
Exodus18:9 A Zetro nooga a sũuri ne Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa a Israyɛl yĩnga tɩ b põs Ezipt rãmba.
