Exodus18:10 A zẽka a koɛɛga n yeele: «Wẽnnaam paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn yiis yãmb Ezipt naaba la Ezipt dãmb nugẽ, bãmb sẽn yiis yãmb Ezipt yembdẽ." 
Exodus18:11 Marsã m miime tɩ Israyɛl Wẽnnaam n yɩɩd Ezipt wẽn-naandsã ne pãnga, ba wẽn-naandsa sũra sẽn waa n puug zãng ne a Israyɛl.»" 
Exodus18:12 A Zetro, a Moyiiz rɛɛmba, kʋ yũ-noog maoongo la maand a taaba. A Aarõ la a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba waa n naaga ne a Zetro tɩ b rɩ, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Exodus18:13 Beoog sẽn vẽege, a Moyiiz zĩndame n na n kao Israyɛl kamba bʋʋdo. Neba yaasa yĩngr, yibeoogo n ta zaabre, tɩ pa sɛ ye." 
Exodus18:14 A Moyiiz rɛɛmba yãee namsg ninga a Moyiiz sẽn namsd ne a nebã la a sok-a lame: «Fo welgda f neba koees wãn-wãna? Bõe tɩ fo ya f ye? Neba ka labsa? Yaa bõe tɩ bʋʋda bʋʋd yibeoog n tat zaabre?» 
Exodus18:15 T'a Moyiiz leoke: «Nebã n wat m nengẽ n dat Soaala-Wẽnd leokre. 
Exodus18:16 B sã n yik no-koeemd ne taaba, yaa mam nengẽ la b wata tɩ m na n wilg ned kam fãa a bʋʋm bɩ a kongre la m wilg-b Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn date, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yalse.»" 
Exodus18:17 A Moyiiz rɛɛmba leok-a lame: «Fo sẽn maand woto wã ka tog ye! 
Exodus18:18 Fo sɛɛsda f pãnga la f lakda neba yam. Tʋʋmda yɩɩda f pãnga, f ka tõe n tʋm f yembre tɩ yɩ sõmb ye." 
Exodus18:19 Kelg saglg ning m sẽn na n sagend-fã, tɩ woto Soaala-Wẽnd na sõng-fo. Fo meng f toore n na n ges sẽn lam neba ne Wẽnde, n taas-b Soaala koɛɛga." 
Exodus18:20 Zãms-b Soaala-Wẽnd noya, wilg-b sor ning b sẽn na n dɩke, wilg-b b sẽn na n maan to-to." 
Exodus18:21 Ges zãma wã sʋka n bao neba, neb sẽn tar dabaare, neb sẽn zoet Wẽnde, neb sẽn ya pʋ-peen-dãmb n kõ b naam. Kẽer na n dɩɩ naam neb tusr zugu, kẽer neb koabga, kẽer neb pis-nu, kẽer piiga." 
Exodus18:22 Bãmb na n zĩnda neba sʋka wakat fãa, n kao bʋʋdo; b na n taasa foom koe-bɛdã; sã n ya koe-bõonesã, bãmb na welg rẽnd b toore. B na naag foom n zɩ zɩɩbã t'a tiig n lebg faasga." 
Exodus18:23 F sã n maan woto, la sã n sega ne Soaala-Wẽnd daabo, f na tõog n tʋm f tʋʋma la neba me na leb b zagsẽ ne sũ-noogo la laafi.»" 
Exodus18:24 A Moyiiz tũ-la a rɛɛmba saglse n maan wala a sẽn togsã. 
Exodus18:25 A tũusa Israyɛl kamb sʋka neb sẽn tar dabaare la a kõ-b-la naam, naam sẽn dɩt neb tusri zugu, bɩ neb koabga, bɩ neb pis-nu, bɩ neb piig zugu." 
Exodus18:26 Wakat buud fãa b ra bee neba sʋk n kaood bʋʋdo. Koe-bɛda bal la b ra wat ne a Moyiiz taoore; bãmb mens n da welgd koe-bõonesã. 
Exodus18:27 A Moyiiz basa a rɛɛmba t'a lebe; a sɩd le rɩka a tẽng sore. 
Exodus19:1 Israyɛl kamba sẽn waa n ta Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ dẽ tɩ yaa kiis a tã la b yi Ezipt tẽnga. 
Exodus19:2 B yii Refidim n dɩk b sore la b sẽn ta Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ, b yalsa be. A Israyɛl sika da tii tãngã pennẽ." 
Exodus19:3 A Moyiiz dʋʋ tãnga zug n bʋʋg Soaala-Wẽnde. Tãnga zugu, Soaala boola a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «Ad-f sẽn na n gom to-to ne a Zakoob kamba, ad-f sẽn na togs bũmb ning a Zakoob roogo." 
Exodus19:4 Y meng y toor yãenda m sẽn maan Ezipt rãmba bũmb ninga. Y yãeeme tɩ m dɩka yãmb wala sɩlg, n kolg m menga." 
Exodus19:5 Marsã, yãmb sã n deeg m noore, y sa n sak m zoodã, m na ges-y wala m kamba, dũni wã pʋgẽ, la dũni wã, maam n so-a zãnga." 
Exodus19:6 M na ges-y wa maan-kʋʋdb buudu, wala buud sẽn welg toor mam yĩnga. Yaa woto la f na n togs Israyɛl kamba.»" 
Exodus19:7 A Moyiiz lɛɛg n sigame; a tigsa nin-kẽembã n taas Wẽnd koɛɛga. 
Exodus19:8 Zãma wã naaga taab n yɩ sũur a ye, n yeele: «Soaala sẽn togs bũmb ninga fãa, tõnd deegame.» A Moyiiz taasa Naaba-Wẽnd b leokrã." 
Exodus19:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «M na n zomba sawadg sẽn tagme n wa f nengẽ tɩ m sã n gomd ne foo, bɩ neba wʋmd m koɛɛga, tɩ b yama kẽ fo me zãnga.» A Moyiiz n da reesd zãma wã koɛɛg n taas Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Exodus19:10 Soaala-Wẽnd le yeela a Moyiiz: «Kos neba tɩ b yɩlg b mense rũnna la beoog yĩnga, yeel-b tɩ b pek b futu." 
Exodus19:11 Yeel-b tɩ b gũ-m da-yɩta tɩ da-yɩta m na n siga tãnga zugu la b fãa nif na n yãend-m lame. 
Exodus19:12 Bao bũmb n pɩk n gũbg tãngã la f yeele: ned ba a ye da saag n dʋ tãnga ye, ned ba a ye da saag n sɩɩs tãnga sɛɛg ye. Ned ninga sẽn sɩɩsa tãnga bɩ b kʋ-a." 
Exodus19:13 Bãng tɩ pa nug n na n sɩɩs a soab ye, na n yɩɩ kug bɩ pɛɛma. Yaa rũnga, yaa ninsaala, a pa tog n le vɩɩnd ye. Baorga sã n peebe, neb kẽer bala n na n dʋ tãngã.»" 
Exodus19:14 A Moyiiz sigame n tɩ yeel neba tɩ b segl b mense. 
Exodus19:15 A yeela nebã tɩ b gũ da-yɩten-daare la b ra kolg b pagb ye. 
Exodus19:16 Da-yɩten-daar yibeoogo, b yãee sawad sableg tãnga zugu. B yãee saag sẽn yãge la b wʋma a sẽn tãse. B wʋma bʋʋr sẽn sãt wʋsgo, tõntõog peebgo, tɩ ned kam fãa sɩng rigbu." 
Exodus19:17 A Moyiiz yiisa nebã tɩ b seg Soaala-Wẽnde la b kolga tãnga sɛɛga. 
Exodus19:18 Sinayi tãnga ra nukda bug-zõose tɩ yaa bugum pʋga la Soaala da sig yã. Bug-zõosa da nukda wala wʋng dẽnna la tãnga da rimda wʋsgo. 
Exodus19:19 Tõntõoga bʋʋra ra yãngdame n paasdẽ; a Moyiiz ra gomdame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leokd-a ne sa-tãse. 
Exodus19:20 Sinayi tãnga zug-tẽnsʋka la b sig yã. B yeela a Moyiiz t'a me rʋ tãnga zug-tẽnsʋka, la a rʋʋme." 
Exodus19:21 Soaala Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Lɛɛg n sig n yeel nebã tɩ b ra gãndg toaagã n wa ges Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ b sã n gãndge, wʋsg na kiime." 
Exodus19:22 Ba maan-kʋʋdba sẽn minim Soaala-Wẽnd pẽnegrã, b modg n yɩlg b mense n da wa tak Soaala-Wẽnd beem b zug ye.»" 
Exodus19:23 Dẽ la a Moyiiz leok Soaala: «Neba kõn saag n dʋ Sinayi tãnga ye. Yãmb da reng n wilg-b lame tɩ b da pẽneg tãnga ye la yãmb kɩtame tɩ b ning toaag n welg-a toore.» 
Exodus19:24 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Lɛɛg n sigi n tɩ wa ne a Aarõ la yeel nebã la maan-kʋʋdbã tɩ b gũus n da long toaaga n wa paam n pẽneg Soaala-Wẽnd, tɩ b wa yik zabr ne b ye.»" 
Exodus19:25 A Moyiiz sigame la a kosa nebã tɩ b maan gũusgu. 
Exodus20:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Israyɛl woto: 
Exodus20:2 «Yaa maam, f Soaala, n yiis foo Ezipt tẽnga, f yembd tẽnga." 
Exodus20:3 Da lʋɩɩs wẽnd ba a ye m taoor ye, da waoog wẽnd a to." 
Exodus20:4 Da mams bũmb ba a ye wẽneg n waoog-a ye: a ra yɩ yĩngri, saag zug bũmb ye, a ra yɩ tẽng zug ka bũmb ye, a ra yɩ koomẽ, mogra pʋgẽ bũmb ye." 
Exodus20:5 Ra wõgemd bũmb sẽn dõog bɩ sẽn pees taoor ye, da waoog-a ye, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd la f Soaala. F Wẽnda yaa sũ-ki-neda, b pa rat tɩ b nong bũmb n yɩɩg bãmb ye. B sɩbgda kamb b ba rãmb beegr yĩnga, n sɩbgd yageng a yaab rãmb beegr yĩnga, n sɩbgd yagen-tʋbra-kẽega a yaab rãmb sẽn tugd beem ne maam yĩnga." 
Exodus20:6 M nonglma yaool n pʋgda neb ka tɛka sẽn nong-m la sẽn deegd m noya. 
Exodus20:7 Da pʋd Soaala, f Wẽnnaama, yʋʋr yaar ye, tɩ b yʋʋra sã n pʋd yaare, b ka tõe n ka sɩbg ye." 
Exodus20:8 Tẽeg vʋʋsg daar noor n deeg-a wa noor sẽn ka tõe n kɩɩs ye. 
Exodus20:9 Dasem a yoob pʋgẽ, tʋm f tʋʋmde." 
Exodus20:10 La daar a yopoe daarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare, Wẽnnaam yĩnga. Badaare ned ba a ye ka tʋmd ye, f menga wala f f bi-ribla, f bi-pugla, f dakõore, f zak bi-pugla, f rũmsi, sãan sẽn waa n nok-fo." 
Exodus20:11 Yɩɩ dasem a yoob pʋgẽ la Wẽnnaam naan yĩngr la tẽnga, la mogre la bũmb niyns fãa sẽn be b pʋgẽ. B vʋʋsa daar a yopoe soaba, yaa rẽ yĩng la Wẽnnaam ning ra-kãng barka, n welg-a toore t'a ya vʋʋsg daare." 
Exodus20:12 Waoog f ba la f ma, tɩ Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, paas raarã b sẽn kõ-f, tẽng zugu ka." 
Exodus20:13 Da kʋ ned ye. 
Exodus20:14 Da yo ye. 
Exodus20:15 Da zuk ye. 
Exodus20:16 Da rõd f to ye. 
Exodus20:17 Da tʋlg f to yir ye, da tʋlg f to pag ye, da tʋlg a dakõor ye, a zak bi-pugl ye, a naafo, a bõanga, da tʋlg bũmb ba a ye a sẽn so ye.»" 
Exodus20:18 Sa-tãsã, sa-yãgbã, baorga bʋʋrã la tãngã sẽn nukd bug-zõosã kẽesa neba rabeem tɩ b na n leb poorẽ." 
Exodus20:19 La b yeela a Moyiiz: «Fo gom ne do tɩ d na wʋme la Wẽnd da gom ne d ye, tɩ ka rẽ d na n kiime.»" 
Exodus20:20 A Moyiiz leok-b lame: «Bas-y rabeem buud fãa, Wẽnnaam waame n na n bãng bũmb ning sẽn be y sũurẽ; b waa n kẽes-y la rabeem tɩ rabeema zãag-y ne wẽnga.»" 
Exodus20:21 Neba paa yɩɩga. A Moyiiz bal n da kolg sawadg taokã, Wẽnnaam sẽn da beẽ wã." 
Exodus20:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Togs Israyɛl kamba woto: Y mens yãeeme tɩ m zĩnda yĩngr n gom ne yãmba. 
Exodus20:23 Ad-y m pa rat tɩ y ges-m wa wẽnd sẽn dõog ne wanzurf bɩ ne sãnem ye. M da yãend b buud y nengẽ ye. 
Exodus20:24 F na n dɩka tãndo n me maan-kugri, la yaa yẽ zug la f na n yãk rũms kẽere, bɛd bɩ bõonese, n kʋ yũ-noog maando n yãk kẽere, bɛd bɩ bõonese, n kʋʋ n dɩ, f zak rãmba laafi yĩnga. Zĩig ning fãa m sẽn na n yãk tɩ yɩ m waoogr zĩiga, m na sig be la m na ning-f barka." 
Exodus20:25 Sã n ya kug la f rɩkd n na n me maan-kugrã, da pees-b ye tɩ fo sã n pees b ne kutu, peesga yãkda b barka." 
Exodus20:26 Da ning maan-kugra teeds ye tɩ f sã n zẽkd f nao n na n dʋ, bɩ f fuuga me ra wa zẽk tɩ loog ye.»" 
Exodus21:1 Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «Ad noya a taaba f sẽn na n kõ Israyɛl kambã: 
Exodus21:2 Fo sã n da yamba, sẽn ya Ebre buudu, a na n tʋma f yĩng yʋʋm a yoob bala. Yʋʋmd a yopoe soabã, a tõe n loogame, a so-la a menga tɩ ka tũ ne ligd yaoob ye." 
Exodus21:3 A sã n wa-la a ye, a kuiisa a ye. A sã n waa ne paga, paga me naagd-a lame n looge." 
Exodus21:4 Sã n yaa a zu-soab n kõ a pagã, tɩ paga rog kamba, kom-dibli bɩ kom-pugli, paga ne kamba ya a zu-soaba soolem, a sã n yita, a yita a ye." 
Exodus21:5 Yem-daooga sã n yeele: ‹M nonga m zu-soabã ne m pagã la m kambã, m pa na n loog ye,›" 
Exodus21:6 a zu-soaba leokdame t'a basa yella ne Wẽnde, a na n yalsa yambã n pẽneg a roog kʋɩlenga bɩ a lugri. A na n dɩka pĩim n vʋdg yem-daoogã tʋbre la a na n pa-la a zu-soaba soolmẽ wakat buud fãa." 
Exodus21:7 Ned sã n koos a bi-pugla t'a lebg yem-poaka, bi-kãng ka fãagd a meng wa yems a taab ye." 
Exodus21:8 A sã n ka ta a zu-soaba yam, t'a zu-soaba yeel t'a pa le rat-a, bɩ b yao n deeg-a. La b ka tõe n zãmb-a n dɩk n koos ne bu-zẽn ye." 
Exodus21:9 A sã n da raa bi-puglã a biig yĩnga, a na tũ noora sẽn wilg zak kom-pugli poorẽ." 
Exodus21:10 Yem-poaka zu-soaba sã n dɩk pag a to n paase, bũmb ka tog n woog pipi paga nengẽ, wala dɩɩbo, futu la roog pɩɩgr ye." 
Exodus21:11 B sã m mong-a bũmb a tãabã, a tõe n loogame tɩ ka tũ ne ligd yaood ye." 
Exodus21:12 Ned ning fãa sẽn wẽe a to n kʋ, yẽ soab me tog n kiime." 
Exodus21:13 A sã n pa gẽes a bɛ wã n wa paam-a n kʋ, b sã n da ka mi taab tiiri n seg taaba tɩ yõor yãke, b na wilg yẽ soaba zĩig a ye t'a zoe n tɩ solg be." 
Exodus21:14 Ned sã n gẽeg a tũud-n-taag bɩ a sã n bẽd-a n paam n kʋ, ba yẽ soab waa n gãd maan-kugrã, bɩ b yõk-a n kʋ." 
Exodus21:15 Ned ninga fãa sẽn wẽe a ba bɩ a ma toga ne kũum. 
Exodus21:16 Ned sã n yõk a to, n na n soog tɩ b wa bãnge, a koos-a lame bɩ a nan ka paam n koos-a, yẽ soab toga ne kũum." 
Exodus21:17 Ned sã n tʋʋs a ba bɩ a ma, bɩ b kʋ yẽ me soaba." 
Exodus21:18 Neb sã n yik zabr ne taaba tɩ nin-yend wẽ a to ne kugri bɩ ne nugu, n ka kʋ-a ye, la a pogl-a lame t'a ka tõe n le yi yɩnga," 
Exodus21:19 bɩ a tõe n tika rasaar n paam yɩnga, b pa na n kʋ sẽn waa ne sãmpogra ye. La yaa pakre t'a yao bãada bũmbu, a sẽn ka le tõe n bao n kõ a noora yĩnga la a tɩbs-a t'a wa sãoog zãnga." 
Exodus21:20 Ned sã n wẽ a yem-daogo bɩ a yem-poaka, ne guugu, tɩ yõor yãke, b tog n kʋʋ yẽ soab me." 
Exodus21:21 Sẽn deega wẽeda sã n põse, ba ya daar a ye bɩ dasem a yi, b kõn kʋ a zu-soaba ye, t'a sõda ligd n da-a." 
Exodus21:22 Rap a yiib sã n zab taaba, n wa tus tʋtre-pʋg n lub la pʋga ka sãam ye, b na n yaoo paga sɩd sẽn yet tɩ b yao bũmb ninga, kaset dãmba taoore." 
Exodus21:23 Kũum sã n ki, yõor n don yõore," 
Exodus21:24 tɩ nif don nifu, tɩ yẽnd don yẽnde, tɩ nug don nugu, tɩ naoor don naoore." 
Exodus21:25 Sã n yõog bugum, yõogdame n lebse. Yũur n don yũuri, tɩ toog don toogo." 
Exodus21:26 Ned sã n wẽ a yem-daoog bɩ a yem-poak n feoog a nifu bɩ a bas-a t'a yembda sɛɛme, a nifa sẽn feooga yĩnga." 
Exodus21:27 Yem-daooga bɩ yem-poaka yẽnd sã fɩrge, yembda sɛɛme, zu-soaba sẽn fɩrg a yẽnda yĩnga." 
Exodus21:28 Loalg sã n tãag rao bɩ pag n kʋ, b labda loalga ne kuga. B kõn wãb a nemd ye la b ka maand a zu-soaba bũmb ye." 
Exodus21:29 Naafa sã n da tãadame t'a soaala mi tiiri n yaool n ka maand gũusgu, a sã n tã n kʋ pag bɩ raoa, b labd-a-la ne kug la b kʋʋda a soaala me." 
Exodus21:30 B sã n bas naafa soaalã n ka kʋ, n yeel-a t'a yao, a tog n yao b sẽn saag-a bũmb ning fãa n paam n põse." 
Exodus21:31 Sã n ya bi-ribla bɩ bi-pugla la naafa kʋ yã, bɩ b maan wala sẽn zoe n togsã." 
Exodus21:32 Sã n yaa yem-daoogo bɩ yem-poaka la naafa kʋ yã, a soaala tog n yaoo zu-soaba kiuug a ye tõr yaoodo. Naafa na n laba ne kuga." 
Exodus21:33 Ned sã n tuk bok bɩ bulga n bas-a n ka page, tɩ naf bɩ bõang lʋɩ a pʋgẽ," 
Exodus21:34 sẽn tuka bokã bɩ bulgã na n yaoome; a na bao ligd n kɩs rũnga soaala la a soog rũnga sẽn ki wã. 
Exodus21:35 Niis sã n zab taab t'a ye ki, b na n koosa nag-vɩɩgã n pʋɩ taab a ligdi. B pʋɩta taab nag-kɩɩnga me." 
Exodus21:36 Nag-vɩɩgã soaal sã n da mi t'a naafa yõgdame la a ka gũ-a neere, yaa nag-vɩɩg la a na n dole la a soog rũm-kɩɩngã." 
Exodus21:37 Ned sã n zuk loalg bɩ pesgo n tɩ kʋ bɩ n tɩ koose, yaa niis a nu la a na n yao n dol loalgã, la yaa piis a naas la a na n yao n dol pesgã." 
Exodus22:1 Ned sã n poog roogo n na n zu, tɩ b paam-a n kʋ, b ka raagd zɩɩm n dol ye." 
Exodus22:2 Sã n yaa zĩig sẽn yẽege la b wẽ-a n kʋ, b kʋʋdame n dole. Wagdr buud fãa tog n yao a sẽn zuki, a sã n ka tõe n yao, yẽ meng la b koosd n yao." 
Exodus22:3 A sã n ket n tar a sẽn zukã, naafo bɩ bõanga, bɩ rũm-bila, yaa niis a yi bɩ bõeens a yi, bɩ rũm-bõones a yi la a na n yao." 
Exodus22:4 Ned sã n tar wãbneg zĩiga n yaool n bas a rũms tɩ b tɩ kẽ ned a to pʋʋgẽ, a na yao wa pʋʋga soab sẽn da saagd yõod ningã ne a pʋʋga bɩ ne a tɩɩsã, yʋʋmd kãnga." 
Exodus22:5 Ned sã n yõog moogo tɩ bugma rɩ tuudã n wa long n dɩ kood sẽn wʋr n same, kood sẽn nan ka kẽebe, kood sẽn nan ka bɩ, mo-yõaada tog n yao bugma sẽn sãama." 
Exodus22:6 B sã n bobl ned bũmbu, ligd bɩ bũmb a to, tɩ b wa zuki, b sã n yõk wagdrã, b kɩtdame t'a yao a sẽn zukã naoor a yi." 
Exodus22:7 B sã n ka paam wagdrã n yõke, sẽn deega bobellã na n taa Wẽnd taoore n wẽen tɩ ka yẽ n dɩk ye." 
Exodus22:8 Zãmb sã n maan naaf poorẽ, bɩ bõanga, bɩ rũm-bila, bɩ fuugu, bɩ bũmb a to sẽn meneme poorẽ, tɩ b wa yeele: foo la zãmba soaba, ad bʋʋda kaooda Wẽnd taoore. Sẽn konga bʋʋm Wẽnd taoora yaooda naoor a yi." 
Exodus22:9 Ned sã n dɩk a rũng n gũnug ned a to, wala bõanga, naafo, rũm-bila, rũng buud fãa, tɩ rũnga wa ki, bɩ a poglame, bɩ b soos n zuk-a lame," 
Exodus22:10 neb a yiibã tata Wẽnd taoore n wẽen ne Wẽnde. Woto b bãngda rũnga gũudã sã n dɩkame, bɩ a sã n ka rɩk a to bũmbu. Rũnga soab sã n deeg t'a yeela sɩda, gũuda ka na n yao bũmb ye." 
Exodus22:11 Rũnga sã n zukame t'a pa zãr ne zakã, b tog n yaoo rũnga soaba." 
Exodus22:12 Sã n ya we-rũng n yõk-a n zerme, a wat n wilga a sẽn paam n deege la samd ka le ket a zug ye." 
Exodus22:13 Ned sã n peng a to rũnga, tɩ rũnga naoor bɩ a karg kaoog, bɩ a kiime, la ka yɩ a soaala nifẽ ye, sẽn penga rũnga tog n yaoome." 
Exodus22:14 Rũmga sã n ki a zu-soaba nifẽ, samd ka le ket sẽn peng a soaba zug ye. Rũnga soab sã n da yeele: deeg rũng n tʋmnẽ la f yaood-ma, yaa yaood ning sẽn da sedã la a na kell n deege." 
Exodus22:15 Ned sã n belg pa-kuli n yo ne-a, a yaooda ligd la a reegda bi-puglã n maan a paga." 
Exodus22:16 Bi-pugla ba sã n zãgs t'a ka na n kõ a bi-pugla, rao wã yaooda ligd ning b sẽn geend pʋg-sɛdba kulsg yĩnga." 
Exodus22:17 Da bas-y t'a vɩɩnd yãmb sʋka, pag sẽn dɩ tɩt n maand bõn-bãn ye." 
Exodus22:18 Ned sã n wɩɩb ne rũnga, bɩ b kʋ a soaba." 
Exodus22:19 Ned sã n kʋ maoong n waoog wẽn-naands bɩ b kʋ-a. Naaba-Wẽnd bal la b waoogd ne maoongo. 
Exodus22:20 Da yaal sãana la f ra yɩ nin-toaag ne-a ye tɩ fo me yɩɩ sãan Ezipt tẽnga. 
Exodus22:21 Da nams pʋg-kõor la kɩɩb ye. 
Exodus22:22 Fo sã n nams-ba tɩ b wa yãb m taoore, m na n kelga b koɛɛg." 
Exodus22:23 M sũura na n puugame tɩ m bas tɩ sʋʋg kood yã, tɩ y pagb lebg pʋg-kõapa, tɩ y kamb lebg kɩɩ-bi." 
Exodus22:24 Fo sã n peng tẽnga biig ligdi, fo sã n peng naong soab sẽn be f zakẽ, da bao n na n dok yõod ye, da kɩt t'a yao n yɩɩg a sẽn deeg ye." 
Exodus22:25 Ned sã n ka tar bũmb n na n yao tɩ fo reeg a fu-yorgo, tɩ lebs-a a fu-yorgã, zĩig sã n sobge." 
Exodus22:26 Rẽ bal la a tar n lut a menga, yaa rẽ la a tar n yerẽ la yaa rẽ la a tar n pinnẽ. A sã n yãb m taoore, m na n kelg-a lame tɩ m yaa nimbãan-zoeta." 
Exodus22:27 F kõn tʋʋs Wẽnd ye, f kõn kãab buud kãsem wẽng ye." 
Exodus22:28 Da kaoos n kõ Wẽnnaam f kood paalga sẽn yɛs ne bao tɩ f rã paalga pid ne rʋgd ye. Rɩk f bi-kẽeng fãa n kõ maam. 
Exodus22:29 Maan boto me ne f rũmsi, bɛd la bõonego. Rũnga bi-rẽeng paada ne a ma dasem a yopoe, la dasem a nii daarã fo wat n kõ-a-la maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Exodus22:30 M datame tɩ y yɩ nin-sõma. Y kõn wãb nemd, we-rũng sẽn yõk ye, rɩk-y nemd kãnga n kõ baase." 
Exodus23:1 Da wɩd f to ye; da sõng yel-maand ne f kaset zirẽ ye. 
Exodus23:2 Da kẽ sẽn baood-b wẽnga, b sõor yaa wʋsg yĩng ye. Da tũ sõor yaa wʋsg rãmba n togs sẽn pa sɩd n paalg ned bʋʋdo, a sẽn yaa a ye wã yĩng ye." 
Exodus23:3 Da lʋɩɩs taoore t'a zagl yaa nin-bila n wa gãndg sɩda n sõng-a tɩ loog, bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye." 
Exodus23:4 F sã n yãend f bɛ bõang bɩ a naaf sẽn meneme, bɩ f yõk-a n wa lebs a soaala." 
Exodus23:5 F bɛ bõang sã n ka tõe a zɩɩbo n pãsd n lʋɩtẽ bɩ f ra yɛs kɛɛng n getẽ ye. Kolg tɩ y naag taab n yik-a. 
Exodus23:6 B sã n bool naong soab bʋʋdo bɩ f ra sõng n kedb a bʋʋda ye. 
Exodus23:7 Zirẽ-beed sã n be sʋka, bɩ f ra lʋɩɩs f toog ye. Da sõng tɩ b b kʋ nin-tɩrga la ned sẽn ka beeg ye. Ad-y m ka tõe n kõ yel-maand bʋʋm ye." 
Exodus23:8 Da reeg kũun ye, tɩ kũun pagda nini n kedbd nin-tɩrs bʋʋdo." 
Exodus23:9 Da tall sãan toog ye, y mii sãan yɛl sẽn yaa a soaba, tɩ y me yɩɩ sãamb Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus23:10 F na n bʋda f pʋta yʋʋm a yoob n tong taaba la f na n tigsa f koodã f baoorẽ. 
Exodus23:11 Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, fo basda f pʋtã n ka ko ye la f ka rɩkd bũmb ba a ye f pʋʋgẽ ye. Yaa naong rãmb n na n dɩ b yõodo, tɩ rũmsa me soog naong rãmba sẽn na n keesã. Na n yɩɩ boto me ne tɩ-sendsã, bugsuntund la kakamse." 
Exodus23:12 Dasem a yoob pʋgẽ, f na n tʋmame la a yopoe raarã f na n vʋʋsame, f naaf la f bõang na n vʋʋsame. F yem-poak biiga, f noak na n vʋʋsame." 
Exodus23:13 Maan-y gũusgu ne m sẽn togs-y bũmb niynsa fãa; da pʋd-y wẽn-naandsa yʋʋr ye. Da sak-y tɩ b yʋʋra yi y noorẽ ye. 
Exodus23:14 Yʋʋmd pʋgẽ yaa naoor a tã la y na n maan kibs m yĩnga. Pipi kibsa yaa bur sẽn pa ning bɩll kibsa. 
Exodus23:15 Dasem a yopoe tõre y na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle la rẽ na n yɩɩ bõn-bɩʋng kiuug, wa sẽn zoe n wilgã, tɩ yaa bõn-bɩʋng kiuug la yãmb yi Ezipt tẽnga. Ra wa-y mam taoore ne nus-vɩɩd ye." 
Exodus23:16 Ad kibs a to: f kood rɩkre, f tʋʋmda pipi biis f pʋʋg sẽn wom n kõ-f rɩkre. Ad kibs a to: zĩig sẽn wat n kolg likri tɩ f kẽesd f sẽn tʋm n paam fãa." 
Exodus23:17 Dɩlla yʋʋmd pʋgẽ yaa naoor a tã la Wẽnnaam na n paam waoogr rapa fãa nengẽ. 
Exodus23:18 Baraare m pa rat tɩ b kõ-m maand n naag ne bur sẽn lob bɩll ye. Nem-kaama y sẽn na n kõ maam kibsa raarã, da bĩng-y tɩ beoog vẽeg ye." 
Exodus23:19 Yaa tẽnga sẽn wom bũmb ninga pipi tɩ ya sõmbo la f na n wa kõ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala. Da saag n dʋg bull ne a ma bĩisim ye." 
Exodus23:20 M na n tʋma m malɛk t'a lʋɩ f taoore n gũ f sora zugu la a tall-fo n taas m sẽn kãab-f tẽng ningã. 
Exodus23:21 Waoog-a la f kelg a koɛɛga, da yɩ tõat ye. F sã n yɩ tõata, f kõn paam f beegra sugr ye, t'a gomda m zĩigẽ." 
Exodus23:22 Fo sã n sak-a neere, la f sã n maam bũmb ning fãa m sẽn yet tɩ f maana, m na yɩ f bɛɛba bɛyã, la sẽn zabda ne fooma pat-n-taaga." 
Exodus23:23 M malɛka m sẽn lʋɩɩs f taoora sã n wa tall-f n taas Amoritse, Ititse, Perizitse, Ivitse, Zebuzitse la Kanaã rãmb tẽnga tɩ f paam n kʋ-b zãnga," 
Exodus23:24 da saag n wõgemd b wẽn-naandsa taoor ye, da saag n waoog-b, wala tẽnga rãmb sẽn da maand ye, da tũ b sora ye, pãb-ba n wã, n wã b tẽn-kugã." 
Exodus23:25 Yaa f Soaala la f Wẽndã la f na n waoog wa sẽn segde. Sã n yɩ woto, f sẽn dɩt la f sẽn yũud na paam barka la m na zãag-f ne bãaga." 
Exodus23:26 F tẽngẽ, f pag ba a ye pʋg kõn sãam ye, pag ba a ye kõn pa n ka rog ye. F na kʋʋl tẽng zug n tãag f pʋlemd daare." 
Exodus23:27 Yɛɛsgo la m na n lʋɩɩs f taoore; f sẽn na n ta zĩig ning fãa, m na n zũndga tẽn-kãnga la m na n kɩtame tɩ f bɛɛba ning tĩiga, b zãkudg bal la f na n yãende." 
Exodus23:28 M na n lʋɩɩsa kãnenkãas f taoore tɩ b rig Ivitse, Kanaã rãmba la Ititse." 
Exodus23:29 Ka na n yɩ yʋʋm-yɛng pʋgẽ bal la m na n dɩg bãmb f taoor ye, tɩ tẽnga ka tog n tiig n lebg we-raoogo, bõn-nindi tẽnga, tɩ yɩ naana ne foom ye." 
Exodus23:30 M na n dig-b-la f taoor bilf-bilfu, n tãag wakat ning m sẽn wat n ges tɩ f kamba lebga wʋsgo n tõe n soog tẽng ning m sẽn na n kõ-b t'a yɩ b soolem." 
Exodus23:31 Toaag ning m sẽn na n toog f tẽnga la woto: Rudum Mogrã n tãag Filisti rãmb mogre, Efrat kʋɩlga n ta zĩ-peen-daaga. M na n basa tẽnga rãmb fãa f nugẽ tɩ f sẽeg-b zãnga." 
Exodus23:32 Da maan zood ne b ye, da maan zood ne b wẽn-naandsa ye." 
Exodus23:33 Da bas-b fo tẽngẽ ye, ka rẽ b wat n kɩtame tɩ f beeg maam, f wat n tʋlgame n waoog b wẽn-faadã la rẽ yaa b bẽdgo, b sẽn na n bẽd n yõk foo.»" 
Exodus24:1 Soaala-Wẽnd da yeela a Moyiiz: «Dʋ tãngã n kolg maam, kɩt t'a Aarõ, a Nadab, a Abiyu la a Israyɛl nin-kẽems pisopoe yãag foom. Y na n wõgemda tẽng tɩ y nan ket yɩɩga." 
Exodus24:2 Foom a Moyiiz bala n na n kolge; sẽn yãag b fooma ra kolg ye la zãma wã kell n paa a zĩigẽ.» 
Exodus24:3 A Moyiiz waa n lɛɛg n sigame, n wilg neba Soaala-Wẽnd koeesã la bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n lebg modgre tɩ b tũ; neba naaga taab n leoke: «Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yiis noy niyns fãa tõnd na reege.»" 
Exodus24:4 A Moyiiz gʋlsa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg-a bũmb ning fãa la vẽkẽmbeoogo, sõor sẽn waa n pukdẽ, a mee maan-kugri tẽn-nabrẽ la a sela kug piig la a yiibu, a Israyɛl sags piig la a yiiba yĩnga." 
Exodus24:5 A tʋma Israyɛl kom-bɩɩba tɩ b kʋ yũ-noog maand Soaala yĩnga la b kood lol-bõonese tɩ b lagem taab n dɩ Soaala taoore. 
Exodus24:6 A Moyiiz yãka zɩɩma pʋɩ-sʋka n ning laasẽ la a rɩka sẽn kellã n daal maan-kugrã. 
Exodus24:7 A rɩka zooda sebr n karem tɩ neba fãa naag taab n yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yals bũmb ning fãa tõnd na tũ; tõnd na reege.» 
Exodus24:8 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yãk zɩɩma n mes nebã n yetẽ: «Zɩɩm kãnga yaa zood kaseto, zood ning Soaala sẽn yõg ne yãmba n kõ yãmb b noya.»" 
Exodus24:9 A Moyiiz kɩtame t'a Aarõ la a Nadab la a Abiyu la nin-kẽems pisopoe yãag-a tɩ b leb tãnga zugu. 
Exodus24:10 B yãee Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, b yãee b naoẽ wã, kug sẽn ya kẽeg lima sẽn gãneg la sẽn pɩn wa saag menga." 
Exodus24:11 Soaala-Wẽnd pa sɩɩs neb niyns sẽn paam-ba n kolg bãmba ye. Nin-bãmb yãend-b-la ne b nifu. B yaoolame marsã n dɩ la b yũ. 
Exodus24:12 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Dʋ n babs maam tãnga zugu la yals be tɩ m kõ-f kug-paklse: bãmb zug la m gʋls m sẽn na n zãms-y noy niynsã.» 
Exodus24:13 A Moyiiz yika ne a sõgen a Zozuwe tɩ b rʋ Wẽnd tãngã. 
Exodus24:14 A reng n yeela nin-kẽembã: «Yaas-y n gũu-y-du, tɩ d dʋ la d lɛɛg n wa. A Aarõ ne a Ur na n paa ne yãmba. Ned sã n tar koɛɛga bɩ a ta bãmb taoore.»" 
Exodus24:15 A Moyiiz rʋʋ tãngã la sawadg luda tãngã. 
Exodus24:16 Soaala-Wẽnd ziira paa Sinayi tãnga zug la rasem a yoob pʋgẽ sawadga lud-a lame. Daar a yopoe soabã, Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda sawadgẽ n bool a Moyiiz." 
Exodus24:17 Israyɛl kamba ra bee tẽng n ne Soaala-Wẽnd ziira sẽn yãng tãnga zug wa bug-witem. 
Exodus24:18 A Moyiiz kẽe sawadgẽ wa, a rʋʋ tãngã la a paa be dasem pis-naase, wĩndig la yʋngo." 
Exodus25:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus25:2 «Wilg a Israyɛl kamba tɩ b sa neba nengẽ n dees bũmb m yĩnga. B reeg-a neb niyns sẽn ka mi beeda nengẽ, kõt yaara rãmb nengẽ." 
Exodus25:3 Ad-y y sẽn na n deege: sãnem, wanzurfu, zũudu," 
Exodus25:4 peen-mismiuugu, peen-moomde, peen-miuug yʋs, peend sẽn wʋg ne gĩs peelse la gĩs bãanese, peend sẽn wʋg ne bʋ-kõbdo," 
Exodus25:5 pe-gãnd sẽn los monem, gãn sẽn ka yũnd koom, ra-neeba," 
Exodus25:6 kaam sẽn na n ning fitila, kaam sẽn tar n zɛɛdẽ, tɩdar sẽn tar yũ-noogo," 
Exodus25:7 kug sẽn moog wa rulg lɛlma, kug neeb sẽn na n tall n zap sãnem-pɛ-m-poore la sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogo." 
Exodus25:8 Dẽ fãa la b na n tall n ti gãnd ro-sõngo n kõ-ma tɩ m tõog n pa y sʋka. 
Exodus25:9 M na n wilg-f-la rooga sẽn na n ti to-to la bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n kẽ a pʋgẽ. Maan-y fãa wa m sẽn na n wilgã. 
Exodus25:10 B na n peesa gõ-miiga n maan koglgo. Koglga woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs a yi la pʋɩ-sʋka, a yalma kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka, a zãndlem kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus25:11 B gãneg sãnem, koglga pʋg la a yɩnga. B kʋk a noorã ne sãnem maabre." 
Exodus25:12 B maan sãnem kags a naase n sog-a, a yiib goabga, a yiib rɩtgo." 
Exodus25:13 B pees ra-gils a yi, n bolg-b ne sãnem." 
Exodus25:14 Bãmb na n tuii kagsã, koglga lʋgrẽ, koglga zẽkr yĩnga." 
Exodus25:15 La b na n paa be daar fãa. 
Exodus25:16 Yaa koglga pʋg la f na n bĩng kuga walsã m sẽn na n gʋls f yĩnga. 
Exodus25:17 B na n maana ling koglga yĩnga. A na n yɩɩ sãnem zãnga; a woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yi la pʋɩ-sʋka; a yalma yaa kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka. 
Exodus25:18 F na n dɩka sãnem n toos n maan malɛgs a yi, n zaoolg lingã, a ye taoore, a ye poorẽ." 
Exodus25:19 Naag malɛgs a yiibã n tableg ne lingã tɩ b lebg bũmb a ye ne-a. 
Exodus25:20 Malɛgs a yiiba neng na n togla taaba, n tees lingã, tɩ b pɩgsa na n zẽk n yɛdg a zugu n lilld-a." 
Exodus25:21 B na n dɩka lingã n fõgneg koglgã. Koglga pʋga f na n bĩnga noya walsã m sẽn na n gʋls n kõ-fã. 
Exodus25:22 Yaa linga zug la m na n likd m meng foom a Moyiiz, malɛgs a yiiba sʋka, yẽ zug la m na n yiis koees niyns f sẽn na n deeg n taas a Israyɛl kamba." 
Exodus25:23 B na n baoo gõ-miig raado n maan bũmb sẽn tar n dogend teedo. A woglma yaa kãntɩɩs a yi, a yalma kãntɩɩga, a zãndlema kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus25:24 B gãneg sãnem a zugu. B bao sãnem maabre n kʋk-a n gilgi. 
Exodus25:25 B kok-a, a kɩrems a naasã, ne raad yalem sẽn ta nus-bi a naase. B bao sãnem n gãneg ra bãmb me zugu." 
Exodus25:26 B kud sãnem kags a naase n ning kɩrems a naasã. 
Exodus25:27 Kagsa ningdame n pẽneg te-roagendga noore. Raad la b na n tuii kagsã, te-roagendga zẽkr yĩnga." 
Exodus25:28 Raada na n yɩɩ ra-sõma la f na bolg-b-la ne sãnem. Ra-bãmb tuiida te-roagendga tʋkr yĩnga. 
Exodus25:29 B rɩgl a zugu yõg-laase, ko-teese, la-bõonese, bãmb pʋg la b ningd rãama. Teeda fãa na n yɩɩ sãnem zãnga." 
Exodus25:30 Yaa te-roagendga zugu, la b na n dɩgl burã b sẽn kõt maam wala m pʋɩɩrã. Bur ka tõe n vaal a zug abada." 
Exodus25:31 B na n dɩka sãnem zãnga n dõog-dõog fitilsa roagendg kãsengã. Fãa na n naagame n dõog rõog yɛnga: sɛɛgã, wilã, maabrã, pu-yoaalã la puuda menga." 
Exodus25:32 Fitilsa sẽn na n wa rogl bũmb ning zugã tara sɛɛga, n tar sʋk willi, la wil a yoobe sẽn keg taab tẽnsʋk willã, n dʋʋd a yiib-yiibu, zĩis a tã." 
Exodus25:33 Wila sẽn keg taab a yiib-yiibã tara puud a tã la puug fãa rõoga wa lɩɩn puugu ne a pu-yoolle la a puuga menga. Wil a yooba fãa wẽnda taaba. 
Exodus25:34 Tẽnsʋk willã tara puud a naase sẽn dõog wa lɩɩn puugu ne a pu-yoolle la a puuga menga. 
Exodus25:35 Will a yooba fãa sẽn tão sɛɛgã la sẽn keg taab n dʋʋd a yiib-yiib, zĩis a tã wã, dõoga maabre, n gilgi." 
Exodus25:36 Maabrã ne willã na naagame n dõog rõog yɛnga. Fãa na n yɩɩ sãnem yɩlemde sẽn toos ne zãare. 
Exodus25:37 Roagendga puuda pʋsẽ la f na n sagl fitils a yopoe. Fitilsa sã n widgi b vẽenema tʋʋsda b taoore. 
Exodus25:38 Bug-rɩɩna sẽn dʋʋgd laok ninga pʋgã la laonga wõrsdgã, bãmb me tog n yɩɩ sãnem zãnga." 
Exodus25:39 Yaa sãnem gilgu sẽn ta nin-tɩɩg zɩɩbo la f na n dɩk n dõog fitilsa ne b roagendgã la teed a taabã. 
Exodus25:40 Ges neere, Moyiiz, tɩ fãa tũ wa m sẽn wilgd foom tãnga zugã.»" 
Exodus26:1 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «Sã n ya sɛka roogo, wʋg a yĩnga, pɛɛl piiga. Pɛɛla wʋgda ne beren-dɩgr gĩsi sẽn maneg n dĩngi. Pɛɛl kẽer yaa mismiuugu, kẽer yaa moam wa saag paga Nina-nina. F sã n wa wʋgd pɛɛlã bɩ f ges n buk ne minim la bãngre, rũms sẽn naag n tar nao a naase, pɩgsa la ninsaal nenga." 
Exodus26:2 Peend a ye fãa tara kãntɩɩs pisi la a nii, a yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a naase la pɛɛl piiga fãa zema taaba." 
Exodus26:3 Pɛɛl a nu la f rɩkd n bogl taaba, n le rɩk a nu sẽn kellã n bogl taaba." 
Exodus26:4 Rĩng wĩ ne pe-kõbdo, wĩ sẽn ya mismiidu, n tall n loe pipi satem peen-boagla noore. Maan boto ne bogl a to wã me." 
Exodus26:5 Wĩ wã na n yɩɩ pis-nu, pipi bogla yĩnga la pis-nu me bogl a yiib soaba yĩnga. Wĩ wã loeesa zĩig na n togla taaba." 
Exodus26:6 Yaa sãnem sogdse pis-nu la f na n kud tɩ b wa tõog n loe peen-bɛd a yiiba ne taaba. Woto yaa wa peen-yɛng la b rɩk n ti roogã. 
Exodus26:7 Maan pɛɛl a taab sẽn ya tagd-tagdo ne bʋ-kõbdo sẽn na n palg pipi pɛɛla zugu. Peen-kãens na n yɩɩ piig la a ye. 
Exodus26:8 Peend a ye fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pis-tã, a yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a naase. Bãmb piig la a ye wã fãa zema taaba." 
Exodus26:9 Dɩk a nu n bogl taaba la rɩk a yoobã sẽn ketã n bogl taaba. Peend a yoob soaba na n lɛɛg n lʋɩɩ dooga kɩrenga. 
Exodus26:10 Kud zũud sogds pis-nu n ning pɛɛl a nu wã sẽn bogl taaba kɩreng a ye, la ning sogds pis-nu pɛɛl a yooba sẽn bogl taaba me kɩreng a to wã. Ning wĩ pis-nu pɛɛl a nu wã sẽn bogl taaba kɩreng a ye wã. Ning wĩ pis-nu me pɛɛl a yoobã sẽn bogl taaba kɩreng a to wã." 
Exodus26:11 Kud zũud sogds pis-nu, wĩ wã sẽn na n wa tui zĩig ninga n gãd pɛɛla tɩ rooga lebg wa peen-yɛng roogo." 
Exodus26:12 Pɛɛla sõor sẽn ka zem taabã, peend ning sẽn luga wã pʋɩ-sʋk na n lɛɛg n siga rooga kudga." 
Exodus26:13 Pɛɛla sẽn tʋʋg kãntɩɩgã, kãntɩ-kãng na n lɛɛg n lʋɩɩ rooga kɩrenga n lud-a." 
Exodus26:14 Rooga yĩng yɛsa, zap pe-raad gãnd sẽn ning monem la gãn sẽn ka yũnd koom n wa yɛdg rooga zugu." 
Exodus26:15 Rooga yĩnga bao gõ-miig n pees ra-pegdo sẽn na n ka taab a naas-naase, n bas võ-yaleng tẽnsʋka, n yik-ba n yals yĩngri. Yaa ra-lug-yalemse." 
Exodus26:16 B zãndlma yaa kãntɩɩs piiga tɩ yalma ya kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka. 
Exodus26:17 Basda ra-pegdã tɩ tʋʋg zĩis a yiibu tɩ bũmb wa tõog n sel zĩ-kãnga. B zãnga fãa kaab na n wẽnega taaba. Kaadame n bas vɩʋʋg sʋka. 
Exodus26:18 Raada sẽn ka woto wã na n tonga bãmb pisi, dooga rɩtg kɩrenga." 
Exodus26:19 F na n dɩka wanzurf n dõog te-sendse, bãmb pis-naase. Ra-pegda sẽn tʋʋg zĩig ninga na n wa sela bãmb zutu. Ra-lug-yaleng fãa yaa te-sends a yiibu." 
Exodus26:20 Rooga kɩreng a to wã, goabg soaba, me tara ra-lug-yalens pisi." 
Exodus26:21 Bãmb me senda wanzurf te-sends pis-naas zutu: Ra-lug-yaleng fãa yaa te-sends a yiibu. 
Exodus26:22 Sã n ya rooga nin-taoore, ra-lug-yalensa sõta bãmb b yoobe." 
Exodus26:23 Rooga satmẽ pẽgsã reegda ra-lug-yalens a yiibu, a ye goabga, a ye rɩtgo. Bãmb teegda roogã n na n paas a pãnga." 
Exodus26:24 Rɩgend-b lame tɩ tẽngrã bɩ ra-pegda zãr ne taaba n yaool n na n tɩ sɩɩs taab yĩngri. B sẽn ya woto wã, rooga teega bãmb n yɛsẽ." 
Exodus26:25 Dɩlla, rooga nin-taoore, ra-lug-yalensa sõta bãmb b nii. Ra-lug-yaleng fãa sela wanzurf te-sends zutu, bãmb piig la a yoobe: ra-lug-yaleng fãa yaa te-sends a yi." 
Exodus26:26 Bao gõ-miig n pees ra-paadse, bãmb b nu rɩtg kɩrenga yĩnga." 
Exodus26:27 Bãmb b nu me goabg kɩrenga yĩnga, a nu poorẽ kɩrenga sẽn tees nin-taoora yĩnga." 
Exodus26:28 Ra-lugsa zãndlma tẽnsʋka, la raad na n pɩʋʋge n sog ra-lugsa fãa ne taaba, b sɩngrẽ n tãag b baasgo." 
Exodus26:29 Bolg ra-lugsa sãnem, kud sãnem kags sẽn na n wa tui ra-paadsã la bolg ra-paadsa me sãnem." 
Exodus26:30 Yaa wala m sẽn wilg-f tãnga zugã la f na n tũ n ti roogã. 
Exodus26:31 Wʋg peen-lilli ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs moama, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peelse sẽn maneg n dĩng kẽnkẽ. Wʋgba wakato, bɩ f ges n buk ne minim la bãngre, rũms sẽn naag n tar nao a naase la pɩgsa la ninsaal nenga." 
Exodus26:32 F na n yagla peenda gõ-miuug ra-lugs a naas sẽn bolg sãnem, sẽn tar sãnem kaad-gõdse, la sẽn sel wanzurf te-sends a naas zutu." 
Exodus26:33 Peen-lilla loeta kaad-gõdsã. Yaa peen-lilla poore la f na n dɩgl kuga walsa sẽn be koglg ning pʋgã la peen-lillã a na welga sõmblem sẽn pid ne sõmblem zĩiga ne zĩis a taaba. 
Exodus26:34 Kuga walse sẽn be koglg ninga pʋgã, dɩk a lingã n fõgneg-a a zĩigẽ: sõmblem sẽn pid ne sõmblema zĩigẽ." 
Exodus26:35 Dɩgl bur sõma piig la a yiiba te-roagendgã, peen-lilla taoore, rooga nug goabga, dɩgl sãnem fitil kãsenga rooga nug rɩtgo t'a tot te-roagendgã." 
Exodus26:36 Sã n yaa rooga noor bɩ f ning peend sẽn wʋg ne gĩs miidu, gĩs mismiidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peelse. Sʋlg sẽn mi a tʋʋmde n na n wʋg-a." 
Exodus26:37 Peen kãng yĩng bɩ f pees raad a nu n bolg-b sãnem, ning-b sãnem kaad-gõdse. Ra-bãmb na n wa sela zũud te-sends a nu zutu.»" 
Exodus27:1 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «Maan-kugra na n kaa ne gõ-miig raado. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, a yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, dɩlla a kɩrems a naasa fãa zema taaba. A zãndlma yaa kãntɩɩs a tã." 
Exodus27:2 Ning yɩdb a naas, kɩrems a naasã. Maan-kugrã ne a yɩdba naagdame n ka wakat yɛnga. Gãneg zũud a zugu." 
Exodus27:3 F na n yõga laas n tar n kokd tompɛglma, n paas kardo, sĩmbi sẽn na n kokd zɩɩm, kõse la tɩdar laase. Te-bãmb fãa na n kuda ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:4 Ka bũmb n mobg maan-kugrã. Ka wa zũud gãmbre n gilg-a la ning zũud kags a naas, gãmbra kɩrems a naasã." 
Exodus27:5 Gãmbra ningda tẽngre la a zẽkdame n ta maan-kugra pʋɩ-sʋka. 
Exodus27:6 Maan-kugra tʋkr yĩnga, pees raad a naas n mobg ne zũudu." 
Exodus27:7 Raada tuiida kagsã tɩ b sãd n be maan-kugra taoor la poorẽ. 
Exodus27:8 Maan-kugra kaada ne ra-pegdo, a pʋga na n yɩɩ vɩʋʋgo la fãa na n tũu wala m sẽn togs bũmb ning tãnga zugã." 
Exodus27:9 Rooga na n paama a zaka n gilg-a. Yaa pɛɛl sẽn wʋg ne gĩs sẽn maneg n dĩngi la b na n yagle. Rooga nug rɩtgo, yaa pɛɛl woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs koabga." 
Exodus27:10 B ra-lugs pisi wã na n yalsa zũud te-sends pisi zutu la b tara kaad-gõdse la wanzurf ribli, fãa yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ n wa tõog n sog taaba." 
Exodus27:11 Goabg kɩrengã me yaa kãntɩɩs koabga, la a na n luda ne pɛɛla. Ra-lugsa yaa pisi la b na n yalsa zũud te-sends pisi zutu la b tara kaad-gõdse la wanzurfu ribli." 
Exodus27:12 Sã n ya nin-taoore, yaa sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pis-nu la zaka yalem la a luta ne pɛɛl sẽn loe ra-lugs piig sẽn sel zũud te-sends piig zutu." 
Exodus27:13 Sã n ya yaanga a yalma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu yɛsa. 
Exodus27:14 Kɩreng a ye yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nu la f magd pɛɛlã. B ra-lugsa ya b tã, la b te-sendsa me ya b tã." 
Exodus27:15 Kɩreng a to wã le yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nu la f magd pɛɛlã. B ra-lugs ya b tã la b te-sendsa me yaa b tã. 
Exodus27:16 Dɩlla dignoora meng yalem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi. Pɛɛla wʋga ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs bãanese, sʋlg-mit tʋʋmde. Ra-lugsa yaa b naase, n sel te-sends a naas zutu." 
Exodus27:17 Yaa ne wanzurf ribli la zaka ra-lugs fãa na n loe n gãd taaba. Ka na n loe kaad-gõdsa ne kut ribli ye, na n yɩɩ ne wanzurf; b te-sendsã n ya zũudu." 
Exodus27:18 Zaka woglem: kãntɩɩs koabga. A yalem: kãntɩɩs pis-nu. A zãndlem: kãntɩɩs a nu; te-sendsa yaa zũudu. 
Exodus27:19 Teeda fãa sẽn be rooga tʋʋm yĩnga, a biili wã, ne kaadsã, fãa na n yɩɩ zũudu." 
Exodus27:20 Kos Israyɛl kamba tɩ b kõ-f oliviye kaam sẽn ya yɩlenga, roga bugum yĩnga, tɩ zaabr bɩ sãnem fitil kãsenga tõog n widi." 
Exodus27:21 A Aarõ ne a kamba na n ninga sãnem fitil kãsenga sɛka roog pʋga, roog ninga sẽn ti ne gãndã. Dɩgend-a-la peenda taoore, peend ning sẽn lilla kuga walsa koglgã. Sãnem Fitila na n wida zaabr n ta yibeoogo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore. Dẽ yaa noor sẽn ka tõe n teem zamaan sẽn wate, a Israyɛl kamba yĩnga.»" 
Exodus28:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Bool f kẽem a Aarõ ne a kamba, a Nadab, a Abiyu, a Elazar la a Itamar. Fo na n welg-b-la ne Israyɛl kamb a taaba la maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd la b na n tʋm m zakẽ." 
Exodus28:2 F kẽem, a Aarõ, yĩnga, sẽ wẽnd doog fu sõma sẽn na n pids-a ne faong la ziiri." 
Exodus28:3 Bʋʋg sʋls niyns sẽn tʋmd b sõma n yɩɩdã, m sẽn kõ b rãmb yam sɩlengã, tɩ b wʋg a Aarõ yĩnga, fut a sẽn na n yeelg a maan-kʋʋra tõoga reegr daare la a sẽn na n yeelg n tʋm maan-kʋʋra tʋʋmde." 
Exodus28:4 Ad b sẽn na n wʋge: sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogo, bag korgo. N paas sãnem-pɛ-m-poore. N paas fu-yorg kãsenga. N paas fu-yorg-bil sẽn maneg n buki ne gĩs neeba. N paas zu-vindga la sẽbdga. F kẽema, a Aarõ, n na n yeelg fu-bãmba. Maan-kʋʋra yĩng me, bɩ b sẽ fut a Aarõ kamba yĩnga." 
Exodus28:5 B sẽn na n dɩk bũmb ning n wʋg-ba: yaa sãnem, yaa peen-mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs bãanese." 
Exodus28:6 Yaa sʋls sẽn mi b tʋʋmde n na n wʋg sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã. Wʋgd-a-la ne sãnem, ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, ne beren-dɩgr gĩs peels sẽn dĩng tɩ kẽ. Yɩta tʋʋmd mit n na n tʋm-a." 
Exodus28:7 Peenda noya a yiibã na n ninga peen-dis a yiibu sẽn naag n sẽ ne fuugã t'a wa tõog n loe maan-kʋʋda sɛɛga. 
Exodus28:8 Peen-disa sẽn tar n loet sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã wʋgda ne gĩs miidu, gĩs mismiidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peels sẽn dĩng tɩ kẽ, la sẽn naag n sẽ ne-a." 
Exodus28:9 B na n dɩka kug sĩdma a yi sẽn yãgd wa nin-gɛtga la sẽn ya kẽeg-kẽega la b na n gʋlsa a Israyɛl kamba yʋy b zugu. 
Exodus28:10 Pipi kugra zugu yaa Israyɛl kamba yʋy a yoob la b na n gʋlse. Kugra a yiib soaba zug la b na n gʋls a yooba sẽn kellã, la yaa yʋʋr fãa ne a pʋgdga, wala kamba sẽn pʋg taab rogmẽ." 
Exodus28:11 Yaa ned sẽn minim n gʋlsd kugr zugu ne kɩtga n na n gʋls Israyɛl kamba yʋy. Ka bũmb sẽn na n wẽneg n yẽes ye. Sãnem paklg pʋg la b na n lɛɛg n gãneg kuga ne yʋy wã sẽn gʋls b zugã. 
Exodus28:12 Kug a yiibã na n wa tablga ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã. Kug bãmb yaa Israyɛl kamba tẽegr bũmbu la a Aarõ zɩt-b la a bãgd zugu, Soaala taoore." 
Exodus28:13 Dõog sãnem nug-bĩnsi. 
Exodus28:14 Maan sãnem yãndo, bãmb b yiibu; maan-b wa pãnenga. Pãneng fãa na n wa soga ne sãnem nug-bĩnga." 
Exodus28:15 Sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga na n wʋga ne sãnem, ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peels sẽn maneg n dĩng tɩ kẽ, wala sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã." 
Exodus28:16 Yaa gɩf yalem la woglem sẽn zems kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka. 
Exodus28:17 F na n bao kug neeba n zap n tong rũns a naase. Pipi rũnuga na n yɩɩ kug zẽego, kõodr pespele la toenɛɛga." 
Exodus28:18 Rũnug a yiib soaba: moomde, kẽega la kõodre." 
Exodus28:19 Rũnug a tãab soaba: kugr sẽn bẽes miuug la sabla, kõodr sẽn lɩʋʋs miidu la mismiuugu." 
Exodus28:20 Rũnug a naas soaba: yirg gelle, rulg lɛlma la bɩrba. Kug bãmb fãa na n zapa ne sãnem." 
Exodus28:21 Kugr a ye fãa tara a Israyɛl biig yʋʋre la b sõora yaa piig la a yiibu: Yʋʋra na n gʋlsame tɩ kẽ kugrã wala bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yẽese. Buuda sak fãa tara a kugri. 
Exodus28:22 F na n dɩka sãnem gĩs n pãnem wa wĩiri n loe sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogã. 
Exodus28:23 F na n kuda sãnem kags a yi. Yaa sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga yĩngr kɩrems a yiibã la b na n soge. 
Exodus28:24 Sãnem pãneng fãa loeta ne sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga kagsã. 
Exodus28:25 Sãnem pãnenga noor fãa wat n soga ne sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga gaagdse la woto a luunda neer maan-kʋʋda taoore. 
Exodus28:26 F na n le rõoga sãnem kalem-bãense n ning sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga tẽngr kɩrems a yiibã, la be la a na n wa loe ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã." 
Exodus28:27 F na n le rõoga sãnem kalem-bãens a yiibu n loe-b ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poora peen-disgã. B wat n soga ne sãnem pãnenga la kagsã. 
Exodus28:28 Yaa peen mismiuugu n loet sãnem-pɛ-m-poor ne sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogã, la bũmb fãa yɛsa a zĩigẽ." 
Exodus28:29 Woto a Aarõ sã n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ Israyɛl kamba yʋy gʋlsa a yãoogẽ la woto, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, kõn yĩm y yell abada." 
Exodus28:30 Foom, Moyiiz, fo na n suii sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga sẽn yaa korga pʋga bũmb a yiibã sẽn tar n sokdẽ la b tar n bãngd Wẽnd leokra yaa n-yẽe, bɩ ayoo wã. A Aarõ tar-b-la a yãoogẽ, a sã n wat Soaala-Wẽnd taoore; la woto me a tara Wẽnd leokrã a sẽn na n taasd Israyɛl kamba wakat buud fãa." 
Exodus28:31 Maan fuug a to sãnem-pɛ-m-poora sẽn na n buug a soabã. Yẽ yaa mismiuugu zãnga. 
Exodus28:32 Ning loor a tẽnsʋkã tɩ yaa fu-yorgo. Loora na n yɩɩ tʋʋmd mit tʋʋmde. A na n yɩɩ gilga, la a na n kãda wala gãmbre sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a ra tõog n kẽeg lɛ-lɛ." 
Exodus28:33 Fuuga tẽngre, n gilgi, gʋle ne gĩs mismiidu, ne gĩs moam yʋs, ne gĩs peelse tɩ-biis wa pooloomse. F na n soga loamba sẽn dõog ne sãnem." 
Exodus28:34 Tɩ-biis wa pooloomsa ne sãnem loamba wã na n lɩʋʋs-lɩʋʋsa taaba n gilgi. 
Exodus28:35 Fu-kãng la a Aarõ na n yeelg a tʋʋmda yĩnga. A sã n wa kẽedẽ bɩ a sã n wa yit wẽnd doogẽ, b wʋmda loamba wã bʋʋre la woto a kõn ki ye." 
Exodus28:36 F na n dõoga ne sãnem yɩlenga bũmb sẽn tar neerem la sẽn wẽnd puugu. Gʋls a zugu ne kut tɩ kẽ, wala kaset gʋlsem la gʋls woto: Welga toor Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Exodus28:37 F na n sog-a-la ne peen mismiuugu n loe zu-vindgã tɩ gʋlsma be taoore. 
Exodus28:38 A Aarõ sẽbgda bõn-neerã a rĩirẽ a sẽn wat wakat ning fãa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, taoore la woto m na reeg kũun niyns fãa a Israyɛl kamba sẽn na n kõ-ma, ba b sã n ket n be tudgr la zɩɩlem pʋgẽ." 
Exodus28:39 F na n wʋga fu-wok pɛɛlgã. F na n sẽe zu-vindga sẽn ya pɛɛlga, n paas sẽbdga — la rẽ fãa na n yɩɩ tʋʋm mit tʋʋmde." 
Exodus28:40 A Aarõ kamba yĩnga, maan fu-yordo la sẽbdse. Paas pugli tɩ pugl n wat ne naam la ziiri." 
Exodus28:41 Kɩt tɩ f kẽema, a Aarõ ne a kamba ning-ba. Taag kaam b dĩiri tɩ b paam n sɩng b tʋʋmde. Welg-b toore n kõ maam tɩ b yɩ m maan-kʋʋdba." 
Exodus28:42 Sẽ kur koees n kõ-b tɩ b sẽgne. Bãmb me na n wʋga ne gĩ bãanese la b na n sigame n ta gɛ wã. 
Exodus28:43 A Aarõ ne a kamb na n yeelga boto b tʋʋmda wakato, woto me b kõn kolg b zaal maan-kugra ye; ka rẽ b na maan bũmb sẽn ya wẽnga n sek b kũum. Woto yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada, a Aarõ ne a yagensa yĩnga.»" 
Exodus29:1 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «Ad-f sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, n kõ a Aarõ ne a kamba b maan-kʋʋr tõogo. Bao lʋll a ye la pe-raad a yi sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Exodus29:2 Dɩk bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle, samsa, miisd me sẽn ka lob bɩlle, sẽn dʋg ne kaam la sẽn wẽ ne alkam zom sẽn ka kalem bũmb a to." 
Exodus29:3 F na n ning-b-la peoog a ye pʋgẽ la f na n naaga peoogã ne lʋllã la piis a yiibã n kõ Wẽnde. 
Exodus29:4 Kɩt t'a Aarõ ne a kamba wa rooga noor n so koom. 
Exodus29:5 Yeelg a Aarõ fu-bilã, fu-kãsengã ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poore la sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogo. Maneg-ba n sog taaba." 
Exodus29:6 Fõgneg-a a pugla la loe gʋlsma a rĩirẽ. 
Exodus29:7 Dɩk kaama marsã n daag a zugu n maneg n sõoge. 
Exodus29:8 Kɩt t'a Aarõ kamba me kolg tɩ f yeelg-b b fu-yordã. 
Exodus29:9 Ning sẽbdsã b sɛɛsẽ, a Aarõ wala a kamba, fõgneg b pugli wã b rĩirẽ la woto b na reeg maan-kʋʋr tõog zamaan sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga. Yaa woto la f na n kõ a Aarõ ne a kamb maan-kʋʋr naam." 
Exodus29:10 Kɩt tɩ b wa ne lʋllã, sɛka roog noore. A Aarõ ne a kamba nus na n sɩɩsa naafa zugu." 
Exodus29:11 Kʋ naafã m taoore, sɛka roog noor." 
Exodus29:12 Tẽk a zɩɩma ne nug-bila n taag maan-kugra yɩdb a naasã, dɩk zɩɩma n daag maan-kugra sɛɛga." 
Exodus29:13 Wobg yãooda kaam, tõsg sãoora vã-minima, yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama, n yõog maan-kugra bugmẽ." 
Exodus29:14 Yaa sugr-kosg maoongo, maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga. Zãag ne rotã n yõog naafa nemdo, a gãongo, a bĩndã." 
Exodus29:15 Kɩt tɩ b kolg ne pesg a ye t'a Aarõ ne a kamba le sɩɩs a zugu ne b nusi. 
Exodus29:16 Kʋ pesgã, dɩk a zɩɩma n mes maan-kugrã n gilgi." 
Exodus29:17 Pas pesgã, pek a yãadã ne a karsã, dɩk nemda ne zugã n dogl taaba." 
Exodus29:18 Yõog-b zãng maan-kugra zugu tɩ yaa yũ-noog maoongo sẽn na n sigs Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. Yaa maoong sẽn yõog bãmb waoogr yĩnga. 
Exodus29:19 Kɩt tɩ b wa ne pe-raoog a to wã t'a Aarõ ne a kamba le tẽeg b nus n sɩɩs a zugu. 
Exodus29:20 Kodg-a, rɩk a zɩɩma n taag a Aarõ rɩtg tʋbre, a kamba me boto, b rɩtg nug-raado, b rɩtg nao-raado. Dɩk zɩɩma sẽn kellã n daal maan-kugrã n gilgi." 
Exodus29:21 Yãk zɩɩma maan-kugra zugu, yãk kaam sõnga me n paas n mes a Aarõ ne a futu, a Aarõ kamba ne b futu. Yẽ ne a futã na n lebga bõn-sõma, a kamba me ne b futã na n lebga bõn-sõma sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:22 Maan-kʋʋra tõoga reegre tʋɩsda ne pe-raoog a yiib soaba maoongã. Dɩk pe-raooga kaam, a zʋ-kɛɛgã, kaam sẽn mobg yãadã, tõsg sãoora vã-leg-legã, yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama la rɩtg gerã." 
Exodus29:23 Dɩk bur sẽn ya gilga, samsa, miisgu sẽn be peooga pʋga peoog ning sẽn dɩg m taoorã." 
Exodus29:24 Dɩk rẽ fãa n sagl a Aarõ ne a kamba nugẽ, la f yeel-b tɩ b dɩkd-ba n tees maam." 
Exodus29:25 Lebs n deeg-ba n yõog m taoore, wala pipi rũngã. Na n yɩɩ maoong sẽn yõog tɩ rɩ zãnga, tɩ m na n kok a yũ-noogã." 
Exodus29:26 Pesg kãng sẽn kʋ, a Aarõ tõoga deegr yĩnga, dɩk a yãoogã n mak kũun makre, m taoore, la foom n na n soog rẽnna." 
Exodus29:27 F na yeele tɩ pesga yãooga ne a gerã sẽn dɩk n tees maama lebga bũmb sẽn ya sõngo, sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:28 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Israyɛl kamba na n yãk wakat buud fãa, yãoog la gere, b sã n kʋ rũng maoongo tɩ rẽ n lebg a Aarõ ne a kamb pʋɩɩre." 
Exodus29:29 A Aarõ sã n wa kaẽ, yaa a kambã n na n yeelg a futã n deeg maan-kʋʋr tõogo la b lebg neb sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:30 A biig ning sẽn na n deeg a zĩig n kẽ sɛka roogẽ n tʋm maan-kʋʋd tʋʋmd na n yeelga futã rasem a yopoe. 
Exodus29:31 Rɩk pesgã sẽn kʋ tõoga reegr yĩngã n bao zĩ-sõng n dʋg a nemdã. 
Exodus29:32 A Aarõ ne a kamba na n wãba pesgã ne burã sẽn be peooga pʋga, sɛka roog noore." 
Exodus29:33 B na n wãba b sẽn tall bũmb ning fãa n kos Wẽnd sugri, b naama deegre daare, b sẽn lebg neb sẽn welg toora raare, la ned a to ka tõe n wãb-b ye, tɩ yaa rɩɩb sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:34 Beoog sã n vẽege, sẽn kellã, bura la nemdã, ningda bugmẽ. Ned a to ka tõe n dɩ ye, tɩ yaa rɩɩb sẽn welg toore." 
Exodus29:35 Maan ne a Aarõ la a kambã wala m sẽn togsã. B maan-kʋʋra tõog reegr na n kaoosa rasem a yopoe. 
Exodus29:36 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, lʋll maoong la b na n kʋ n kos yel-wẽna sugri. B na n yɩlga maan-kugra woto, b na n taag-a-la kaam n welg a toor Soaala yĩnga." 
Exodus29:37 Yaa dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ la f tog n kʋ beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoong, maan-kugra zugu, n le rɩk a n kõ Wẽnde t'a wa lebg sõng zãnga. Dẽ poore nin zaalg bɩ rũng sã n sɩɩs-a, yaa yell la a na n bao n kõ a menga." 
Exodus29:38 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa n tãag dũni wã yikri, ad-b sẽn na n kʋ bũmb ning maan-kugra zugu: pe-bi a yi, sẽn zems yʋʋmd a ye rũmsi." 
Exodus29:39 A ye kʋʋda yibeoogo, t'a ye kʋ zaabre." 
Exodus29:40 Tũnug pipi rũnga maoong ne alkam zom wamd pogbre sẽn nag ne kaam sẽn ya yɩlgemde, la sẽn pit lengre, n paas yubl rãam." 
Exodus29:41 Pesg a ye n na n kʋ zĩ-sobdo, n tũnug zom, kaam la rãam, wa yibeoogẽ wã. Na n yɩɩ yũ-noog maoong sẽn na n maag Wẽnd sũuri, yaa maoong sẽn yõogd zãng Wẽnd taoore." 
Exodus29:42 Dẽ yaa bũmb sẽn tog n maan beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa Wẽnd taoore, sɛka roog noore, zĩig ning b sẽn na n seg foom n kõ b koeese." 
Exodus29:43 Be la m na n seg Israyɛl kamba la m na n welga zĩ-kãng t'a lebg m ziir zĩiga. 
Exodus29:44 M na n welga rooga la maan-kugra toore, m na n welga a Aarõ ne a kamba toore, maan-kʋʋr yĩnga." 
Exodus29:45 M na n zĩnda Israyɛl kamba sʋk n yɩ b Wẽnnaam. 
Exodus29:46 B na bãng marsã tɩ yaa maam la bãmb Wẽnde, sẽn yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga, n na n pa ne bãmba. Maam la Soaala, bãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Exodus30:1 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «F na n maana maan-kugri la yaa yẽ zug la f na n yõog tɩdarã. F na n maan-a-la ne gõ-miig ra-pegdo. 
Exodus30:2 A woglma yaa kãntɩɩga, a yalma me boto; dɩlla a kɩremsa fãa zema taaba. A zãndlma yaa kãntɩɩs a yi: Ning-a yɩdb a naase sẽn naag n ya bũmb a ye ne-a." 
Exodus30:3 Bao sãnem meng n bolg a zugã, a kɩremsã la a yɩdbã. Bao sãnem n mobg-a zãnga." 
Exodus30:4 Ning a kɩrems a yiibã sãnem kags a naase. Yaa raad a yi la b na n wa tui kagsã n tõog n zẽkd maan-kugrã. 
Exodus30:5 F na n peesa gõ-miig raado n maan dasaba f sẽn na n bolg ne sãnem. 
Exodus30:6 Maan-kugra na n dɩgla peend ning sẽn luta kuga walsa koglga taoore, tɩ koglg kãng zug la m na n kõ-y sɛka." 
Exodus30:7 Yibeoog fãa a Aarõ na n yõoga tɩdar zom sẽn tar yũ-noogo, a sã n wa manegd dooga bugma." 
Exodus30:8 Zaabre me a sã n wa ne kaam n na n ning fitilsã, a na n le yõoga tɩdarã. Tɩdara sẽn yõogd Wẽnnaam taoorã yaa bũmb sẽn na n maan zamaan woo zamaana." 
Exodus30:9 Maan-kugr kãnga zugu y kõn yõog tɩdar zaalg ye, y kõn yõog yũ-noog maoong ye, y kõn dɩgl kũun a zug ye, y kõn kɩrg rãam bɩ kaam ye." 
Exodus30:10 Yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa, a Aarõ na n kosame tɩ Wẽnd zãag-a ne rẽgdo. A na n taaga yɩdba ne zɩɩm. Yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa, na n yɩɩ sugr kosg kibs kãsenga raare la a Aarõ na n dɩk rũnga zɩɩm n taag maan-kugra yɩdba, a pekr yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ woto zamaan sẽn wate tɩ maan-kugra pa a sõmblema zĩigẽ zãnga.»" 
Exodus30:11 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Exodus30:12 «F sã n wa sõd Israyɛl kamba sẽn ta sõadga, n bãng b sẽn zem to-to, kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa kɩs Wẽnd a yaoodo. Woto sõadga wakato tẽn-kũum kõn zĩnd ye." 
Exodus30:13 Sẽn sõd a soab fãa kɩta ligdi. Neb a yi yaa wakɩ koɛɛnga, wala b sẽn dɩt a soab Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ." 
Exodus30:14 Yaa ned ninga yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bal la b sõta la yaa sẽn be-a sõadgẽ n kɩt yaoodã. 
Exodus30:15 Arzɛk rãmba, naong rãmba, b fãa kɩta bũmb a ye: wakɩr koɛɛng pʋɩ-sʋka. Yaooda reegda Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga n na n fãag f yõore." 
Exodus30:16 Ligd kãnga me n yãkd sɛka roog tʋʋma yĩnga. Woto maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na tẽeg Israyɛl dãmba yelle, n fãag b yõore.»" 
Exodus30:17 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Exodus30:18 «Maan sĩnga, koom waasg yĩnga. A menga yaa zũudu, a sẽn na n dogl bũmb ninga zuga me yaa zũudu. Ning-a zaka pʋga, maan-kugrã ne sɛka roog tẽnsʋka. Pids-a ne koom." 
Exodus30:19 Be la a Aarõ na n toog n waas a nus la a nao. 
Exodus30:20 B sã n na n kẽ rooga pʋg bɩ b reng n waas n da wa ki ye. B maan boto me b sã n kolgd maan-kugrã n na tʋme, n na n yõog yũ-noog maoong, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Exodus30:21 B na n peka b nus la b nao n da wa ki ye. A Aarõ ne a kamba yĩnga, dẽ yaa noor sẽn ka tõe n teem abada.»" 
Exodus30:22 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus30:23 «Bao bõn-yood sẽn tar yũ-noog wʋsgo wala: gondre-yẽoog sũm koaaga: wakɩ-koeems kobs-nu; wala yulun-yuuga: wakɩ-koeems kobs-yi la pis-nu; wala wal tʋko: wakɩ koeems kobs-yi la pis-nu; 
Exodus30:24 wala barkudga: wakɩ koeems kobs-nu, wakɩr wala b sẽn dɩt a soab Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ, n paas la-pogbr ne oliviye kaam; lens a nu n pit laagã." 
Exodus30:25 Dɩk-ba n kalem taaba n maan ka-sõngo; sõng t'a yũuga yɩɩ noog wa mitba rẽnna. Yẽ n na n yɩ ka-sõngo. 
Exodus30:26 F na n yãk-a-la me n taag roogã la kuga walsa koglgã," 
Exodus30:27 te-roagendga ne a teedã, sãnema fitil kãsenga la tɩdara maan-kugrã;" 
Exodus30:28 yũ-nood maanda Maan-kugra ne a teedã, sĩnga ne a sẽn dogl bũmb ning zugã." 
Exodus30:29 Welg-b toore, Wẽnd yĩnga, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn na n sɩɩs-b na n lebga bõn-sõngo." 
Exodus30:30 F na n yãka ka-sõngã n taag a Aarõ ne a kamba, n welg-b toore maan-kʋʋra yĩnga." 
Exodus30:31 F na n yeela Israyɛl kamba woto: Bãng-y tɩ ka-kãnga yaa ka-sõng zamaan woo zamaana, mam yĩnga." 
Exodus30:32 Ka-kãnga ka taagd ned yaare ye; da maan kaam sẽn wẽnd-a ye, yaa bũmb sẽn ya bõn-sõngo n na n kell n yɩ sõngo." 
Exodus30:33 Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n mams a buudu n dɩk n taag nin-zaalga, b na kʋ a soaba.»" 
Exodus30:34 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Ning pãng n paam bõn-yood sẽn tar yũ-noodo wala naglɛng, wala soompiiga, wala wisao, la tɩdar menga. Bao tɩ b zeng taaba." 
Exodus30:35 Kalem b taaba n wa yãkd n lobd bugmẽ. Kalem b wala mitba sẽn maandã, tɩ yɩ sõmbo la tog ne pẽgre." 
Exodus30:36 To-b tɩ b lebg zom tɩ f yõgen-b rooga pʋga, sɛka roogẽ. Y na n ges-b-la wala bũmb sẽn ya sõngo." 
Exodus30:37 Da maan-y bũmb sẽn wẽnd-a y meng yĩng ye, ges-y tɩdarã wa bõn-sõngo, bũmb sẽn welg toor Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Exodus30:38 Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n togs n maan a buudu n tar a yũugã n kokdẽ, b na n kʋ-a lame.»" 
Exodus31:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus31:2 «Ade, m yãka a Besalɛl, a Uri biiga, a Ur yagenga, a Zɩɩda sak neda." 
Exodus31:3 M kõ-a-la sɩlem, bãngre, minim la tʋm-tɩ-b-pẽg tõogo, bũmb wʋsg yĩnga." 
Exodus31:4 A tõe n yãenda a yamẽ la a maan ne a nugu sãnem teedo, wanzurf teedo, zũud teedo." 
Exodus31:5 A tõe n peesa kug sẽn yãgd b toore n maan fan teedo, n maneg n ning ned kam a zĩigẽ tɩ sakd gesgo; a tõe n peesa raado; d yeel vugr bala t'a tõe n maana fãa." 
Exodus31:6 M na n kõ-a-la ned sẽn na n sõng-a: yaa a Ayisamak biig a Ooliab, a Dã sakẽ neda. M kõo neb a taab me yam la sɩlem sẽn tõe maan m sẽn dat tɩ b maane." 
Exodus31:7 Bãmb n na n maan roogã, koglg ning sẽn na n pag kuga walsã, koglga ne a lingã, sɛka roog teedo;" 
Exodus31:8 te-roagendga ne a teedã, fitila sẽn ya bõn-neer mengã, tɩdar maan-kugrã," 
Exodus31:9 maan-kugrã ne a teeda fãa, ko-sĩnga ne a sẽn dogl bũmb ning zugã," 
Exodus31:10 fu-sõma wã, maan-kʋʋra futu, a Aarõ ne a kamba sẽn yeelgdã," 
Exodus31:11 ka-sõngã, tɩdar bãanegã. B sã n sɩng b tʋʋmna, bɩ b tũ m sẽn wilgã.»" 
Exodus31:12 Soaala-Wẽnd kosa a Moyiiz 
Exodus31:13 t'a yeel Israyɛl kamba: «Deeg-y vʋʋsga noor neere tɩ vʋʋsga daar m sẽn yalsã yaa kaset sẽn ya sõmbo, kaset tɩ yãmb ne y kamba miime tɩ maam y Wẽndã n welg y toore." 
Exodus31:14 Reeg-y vʋʋsga noore tɩ yaa daar sẽn tog ne waoogre, sẽn tõdga noor kãnga n tʋm tʋʋmd baraare toga ne kũum." 
Exodus31:15 Tʋʋmda tʋmda dasem a yoobe, la a yopoe daarã zãnga b vʋʋsdame, sẽn tʋma badaare, b kʋʋd-a lame." 
Exodus31:16 Israyɛl kamba na n deega vʋʋsga noore zamaan woo zamaana. Yaa zood sẽn ka tog n sãam kaseto. 
Exodus31:17 Maam ne a Israyɛl kamba yĩnga, a yaa tẽegre, wakat buud fãa tẽegre tɩ m tʋma dasem a yoobe, n naan yĩngr la tẽnga, la daar a yopoe soaba b vʋʋsame n ka tʋm ye.»" 
Exodus31:18 Wẽnd sẽn gom ne a Moyiiz n sɛ, b kɩs-a-la kug wals a yi, yaa kug walse la Wẽnd meng b toore n gʋls-b ne b nugu." 
Exodus32:1 Neba sẽn mik t'a Moyiiz kaoosda tãnga zugu, n pa sigd tao-tao, b gũbga a Aarõ n yeel-a: «Ade, yiki! Maan wẽnd-dãmb n kõ-do, tɩ b lʋɩ d taoore. Tõnd ka mi bũmb ning sẽn maan a Moyiiz, rao ning sẽn yiisa tõnd Ezipt tẽnga ye.»" 
Exodus32:2 A Aarõ yeel-b lame: «Wa-y ne sãnem tʋb-londã y pagbã, y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli sẽn sog b tʋba. Tall-y-ba n wa kõ-ma.»" 
Exodus32:3 La b fãa yãgsa b sãnem tʋb-lond n wa kõ a Aarõ. 
Exodus32:4 T'a Aarõ deeg-ba n bao boaaga n yẽneg-ba, n maan nag-bila; tɩ b naag taab n moone: «Woto la tõnd wẽnda sẽn yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga.»" 
Exodus32:5 A Aarõ yãend-a lame la a mee maan-kugr n yals nag-bila taoore n yeel Israyɛl kamba: «Beoog yaa tig-raaga, Soaala yĩnga.»" 
Exodus32:6 Vẽkẽmbeoog pĩnda b kʋʋ maando, yũ-noog maand, maan-dɩtga la b zĩndame n yũ, b zĩndame n dɩ n yik n deem." 
Exodus32:7 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Ges n sigi tɩ f sẽn yiis neb niyns Ezipt tẽnga maana wɩɩbdo. 
Exodus32:8 Ka yãee n kaoos tɩ b zoe n zãag ne sor ning m sẽn wilg-ba ye. B yẽnega bũmb n maan nag-bila n yĩgimd a taoore. B kʋʋ maand n kõ-a la b yeelame: ‹Ad-d wẽnde, ad sẽn yiisa tõnd Ezipt tẽnga.› »" 
Exodus32:9 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «M nee nebã, m neeme tɩ nin-bãmba yaa tõatba!" 
Exodus32:10 Bas-m tɩ m yik ne-ba; bas tɩ m yik m sũur ne-ba, m na n menes-b lame la yaa fo roogo n na n lebg bu-kãsenga.»" 
Exodus32:11 A Moyiiz makame n na n sigs Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri, ad-a sẽn yeele: «Yaa bõe, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ y na n bas y sũur t'a fõd ne kamb niyns yãmb meng sẽn yiis Ezipt tẽnga ne y kang la y nug pãnga?" 
Exodus32:12 Bõe tɩ Ezipt dãmb na n wa tõog n yeele: ‹A yiis-b-la pʋ-toog tõnd tẽnga, n na n tɩ kʋ-b tãms zutu tɩ b buuda yẽes tẽng zugu.› Sigs-y y sũuri, da bao-y y neba wãab ye." 
Exodus32:13 Tẽeg-y yã a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob yelle. B yɩɩ yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmdba la yãmb wẽename n kãab-ba n yeele: ‹M na n kɩtame tɩ f buuda kamb zeng ãdsa ne sõore, m na n kõ-b-la tẽns ka tɛka tɩ yɩ b kamb la b yagens pʋɩɩre zamaana fãa sẽn wate.› »" 
Exodus32:14 La bãng-y tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame tɩ b kõn le sɩbg b kamba ne yel-beed ning b sẽn da rat n sɩbg-ba ye. 
Exodus32:15 A Moyiiz dɩka sika sore, n sigd tãngã la a zãad kuga walsã a nugẽ. Yaa kug bãmb zug la zooda sẽn dat tɩ b tũ bũmb ninga fãa gʋls yã. Walsa kɩrems a yiiba fãa gʋlsame." 
Exodus32:16 Walsa yaa Wẽnd tʋʋmde, gʋlsga yaa Wẽnd gʋlsgo." 
Exodus32:17 A Zozuwe sẽn wʋm dãamd sẽn yit sikã a yeela a Moyiiz: «Kelg-y zabr bʋʋre, sika pʋga!»" 
Exodus32:18 T'a Moyiiz leok-a: «Ka neb sẽn tõog b bɛɛb n lɛɛg n watẽ bʋʋr ye, ka neb sẽn lʋɩ bɛɛb nugẽ yãbr me ye, yaa kibs yɩɩl sẽn yɩɩn n deesd taab la m wʋmda.»" 
Exodus32:19 A Moyiiz sẽn kolge, a yãee sãnem nag-bila, la a yãee neb sẽn saoode, t'a sũur puug wʋsgo t'a lob kuga walsã a sẽn da zãadã, a lob-b-la tãnga sɛɛg tɩ b wã." 
Exodus32:20 A sẽn ta, a losa b sẽn dõog nag-bil ninga bugmẽ n yẽneg-a, n to-a t'a lebg zom bãanega t'a rɩk-a n lob koomẽ n kõ a Israyɛl kamba tɩ b yũ." 
Exodus32:21 A Moyiiz yaool n yeela a Aarõ: «Neba maan-f-la bõe tɩ f tʋk b zugu yel-beed sẽn ta woto fãa?» 
Exodus32:22 T'a Aarõ yeele: «Bɩ f ra puug f sũur ye, fo meng mi tɩ nin-bãmba tʋʋla ne wẽng maanego." 
Exodus32:23 Ad-y yaa bãmb meng n waa n yeel-ma: ‹Maan wẽnd dãmb n kõ-do tɩ b lʋɩ d taoore, tɩ Moyiiz ning sẽn yiisa tõnd Ezipt tẽnga, d ka mi bũmb ning sẽn maan-a ye.›" 
Exodus32:24 Ya rẽnda la m sok-ba: ‹Ãnda n tar sãnem?› La b fãa rɩka b sẽn tar n kõ-ma la m sẽn los rẽ fãa bugmẽ, nag-bil kãnga la m dõog-ya.»" 
Exodus32:25 A Moyiiz yãeeme tɩ neba da ka le tar lɛkd ye. A Aarõ ra bas-b lame tɩ b pʋʋs belgr wẽnde la b lebga bɛɛb laado. 
Exodus32:26 A yalsa sika noor n yeele: «Sẽn ket n bɛ-a Naaba-Wẽnd poorẽ bɩ a wa ne maam!» Tao-tao t'a Levi kamba gũbg-a lame. 
Exodus32:27 T'a yeel-ba: «Ad-y Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, daab la woto: ‹Ned kam fãa rɩk a sʋʋga, n kẽ sika pʋga, n yi zaka n kẽ zaka, la a kʋ, nina a ba-biiga, nina a zoa, nina a roagda!› »" 
Exodus32:28 A Levi kamba reega a Moyiiz noore, la badaare neb sẽn ta tus a tã n ki." 
Exodus32:29 A Moyiiz yeel-b lame: «Reeg-y dũnna y maan-kʋʋr tõogo tɩ Wẽnd n kõt-a yãmba la ka zaalem ye. Yaa b kamb zɩɩm la kẽer daag yã, kẽer yaa b yaop rẽnna, la rũnna yaa y maan-kʋʋr tõog reegr daare la bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ning-y barka.»" 
Exodus32:30 Beoog sẽn vẽege, a Moyiiz yeela zãma wã: «Yãmb maana sẽn ka neer ba bilfu, dẽ la m na n le rʋ tãngã, Soaala taoore, tɩ daare y samda na tõog n yao.»" 
Exodus32:31 La sɩda a Moyiiz leba Wẽnd nengẽ n yeel-ba: «Kato! Neba maana yell kãsenga, b maana sãnem wẽnde." 
Exodus32:32 M kot-y lame tɩ y kõ-b sugri, ka rẽ bɩ y yẽes m yʋʋra sẽn gʋls vɩɩm sebra pʋga.»" 
Exodus32:33 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Yaa sẽn maana wẽng la m na n yẽes m sebrẽ. 
Exodus32:34 Leb n tɩ tall nebã n kẽng m sẽn wilg zĩig ningã. M malɛk na n lʋɩ-la f taoore la m sẽn na n wa ges-b raare, m na sɩbg b beegrã.»" 
Exodus32:35 Wẽnd sɩbga neba b sẽn maan nag-bila yĩnga, b sẽn kos a Aarõ t'a maan nag-bilã n kõ-ba yĩnga." 
Exodus33:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Loog ne f neba f sẽn yiis Ezipt tẽngã, dɩk sore, yaa tẽnga sore, tẽng ning m sẽn kãab a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob tɩ m na reeg-a n kõ m kamba." 
Exodus33:2 M na n tʋma malɛk f taoore t'a pĩng Kanaã rãmba, Amoritsã, Ititsã, Perizitsã la Zebuzitsã f taoore. Tɩ kẽe-y tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Exodus33:3 Mam ka na n yãag-y ye tɩ yãmb ka reegd noor ye la m sã n belg m meng n yãag yã, m na n kʋ-y-la zãng sor zugu.»" 
Exodus33:4 Neba sẽn bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd zabdame, b maana wa kʋ-biisi, fuug sẽn wẽnd kibs fuug ka yeelg baraar ye." 
Exodus33:5 Wẽnnaam wilga a Moyiiz t'a yeel a Israyɛl kambã: «Yãmb tara tõatb zʋgo. M sã n yãag yã n kẽn bilfr bala, m na n kʋ-y-la zãnga. Yãgs-y y fan-teedã tɩ m bãng m sẽn na zã-y zãab ninga.»" 
Exodus33:6 Yaa rẽ la Oreb tɛka, Israyɛl kamba ka le ning fan-teed ye." 
Exodus33:7 A Moyiiz zãaga wʋsgo n ti roogã. A bool-a lame tɩ sɛk roogo. Ned ninga fãa sẽn da tara koɛɛg n dat n sok Wẽnde, a ra yit n taa sɛka roog sẽn da ti n zãag ne sikã." 
Exodus33:8 A Moyiiz sã n da yi n digd dooga sẽnẽ, ned kam fãa da yikdame n yaas a roog noore n get a Moyiiz t'a wa ta sɛk roogã." 
Exodus33:9 A Moyiiz sã n wa kẽed doogã, sawadg me n sigd n yaas dooga noore la koɛɛg n da yit be t'a Moyiiz kelgdẽ." 
Exodus33:10 Sawadga sã n wa yaas rooga noore, ned kam fãa zĩndida a doog noor n wõgemd tẽnga." 
Exodus33:11 Soaala-Wẽnd ne a Moyiiz ra sõsda ne taaba wa ned ne a zoa. A Moyiiz mi n lɛɛgd n wa neba sʋka, a rakõorã, a Zozuwe, a Nun biiga bal n da paad do-sõnga pʋga." 
Exodus33:12 A Moyiiz yeela Soaala-Wẽnde: «Yãmb meng n yeel maam tɩ m kɩt tɩ neba rɩk sore la y ka wilg ned ning sẽn na n paas maam ye. Yãmb da yeelame tɩ y mi-la m tiiri la y sɩd zoe-la m nimbãanega. 
Exodus33:13 Sã n ya sɩd tɩ y ka yi m poorẽ, bɩ y wilg maam y raabo tɩ m bãng la m deeg tɩ y ket n be-la m poorẽ. Bãng-y tɩ nin-bãmba yaa yãmb neba.»" 
Exodus33:14 Soaala-Wẽnd leokame: «M na n lʋɩ-la f taoore tɩ f paam n kẽ vʋʋsga tẽngẽ?» 
Exodus33:15 T'a Moyiiz paas: «Y meng y toor sã n ka na n tũ bɩ y ra sak tɩ d yi ka ye. 
Exodus33:16 Kaset bʋg la m tar n na n bãng tɩ zood n be tõnd sʋka, maam ne yãmb la yãmb ne y neba sʋka? Kaset n le bee n yɩɩd d sã n tũud taab bɩ? Y sã n tũud tõndo, neba kõn bãng tɩ yãmb n welg maam ne y neba toore, dũni wã pʋgẽ sɩda?»" 
Exodus33:17 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «M na n maan wala fo sẽn kos maama tɩ m nong-f lame la m maam n welg-f toore.» 
Exodus33:18 A Moyiiz kos-b lame: «Wilg-y maam y ziirã!» 
Exodus33:19 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeele: «M na n looda f taoore, n wilgd-f m nonglma sẽn ta zĩig ninga la m togsd m yʋʋre: Naaba-Wẽnde. M zoeta m sẽn dat a soab nimbãanega la m kõta m sẽn dat a soab sugri." 
Exodus33:20 La ade, fo ka tõe n yãe mam neng ye, tɩ ned ka yãet mam neng n le vɩɩnd ye." 
Exodus33:21 Soaala le yeelame: Ad vɩʋʋg m sɛɛgẽ, ad pĩigã." 
Exodus33:22 M sã n wa lood ne m ziira, m na kẽes f pĩiga bokẽ, m na solg f ne m nug, m loogra wakato." 
Exodus33:23 M na yaool n yãk m nugã tɩ f yãend m zãkudga; sã n ya m nengã, ad nenga ka tõe n yãend ye.»" 
Exodus34:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Pees kug a yi sẽn wẽnd pipi rãmbã, dʋ tãnga zug tɩ m gʋls goam niyns sẽn da be pipi kuga walsa zutu, kug niyns fo sẽn lob n wãagã." 
Exodus34:2 Beoog yibeoog tɩ segl n sɛɛme, rʋ tãnga zugu, sõor pukri n gũ-ma." 
Exodus34:3 Ned ba a ye ra tũ n dʋ ye, ned ba a ye pʋs n da lɩk tãnga sẽnẽ meng ye. Dũmsã, bɛd la bõonego, da kolg tãngã n wãb yamd ye.»" 
Exodus34:4 A Moyiiz peesa kug a yi sẽn wẽnd pipi rãmbã la yibeoog pĩnda a rʋ-la a ye Sinayi tãnga. Wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg-a wã. A ra zãada wals a yiibã a nugẽ. 
Exodus34:5 Naaba-Wẽnd tũu sawadg n sigi n yals, la a Moyiiz pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Exodus34:6 Soaala-Wẽnd looga a Moyiiz taoor n tãsdẽ: «Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, maam la Naaba-Wẽnde! M yaa nin-bʋgsgo la nimbãan-zoeta, m sũur ka yikd tao-tao ye, m kũun ka belgr ye, m ka yõgd zood sẽn ya daar a ye zood ye." 
Exodus34:7 M maanda neb ka tɛk sugri, m sĩndame wa m ka ne beegr ye, wa m ka ne tõdgr la yel-wẽnd ye, m yaool n bakda sẽn ka beega ne sẽn beega tɩ bũmb ka beẽ n ka na n deeg a dolb ye. Kamb paamda b ba rãmb beegr sɩbgre, tɩ yagenga, yagen-tʋbra-kẽeg meng deegd a yaab rãmb beegr sɩbgre.»" 
Exodus34:8 A Moyiiz sẽn wʋme, a lʋɩɩ yãvabg Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Exodus34:9 A yeelame: «Sã n ya sɩda, tɩ y yam ket n bee ne maam, bɩ y yãag-do. D zug sã n ka gird n le gõms me bɩ y maan sugr tɩ d lebga yãmb pʋɩɩr kamba.»" 
Exodus34:10 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «M na n yõga zood ne foom, n maan bõn-bãn neba taoore wala tẽng ba a ye la buud ba a ye sẽn zɩɩ n yãend ye. Neba sẽn gũbga fãa na n yãee tʋʋmd ning m sẽn na n tʋm ne foo, la na n yɩɩ tʋʋmd bãnde." 
Exodus34:11 Kelg m sẽn yet tɩ f maan dũnna wã. Ade, m na n digame n zãag f taoore, Amoritse, Kanaã rãmba, Ititse, Perizitse, Ivitse la Zebuzitse." 
Exodus34:12 Da maan no-noom ne neb niyns f sẽn na n kẽ b rãmb tẽngẽ wã ye. Ka rẽ b na n lebga bẽdg f yĩnga. 
Exodus34:13 Wã b maan-kugã, wã b sẽn sel kug niynsã, kao b sẽn pees raad niynsã." 
Exodus34:14 Dẽnd yĩnga: Da yĩgimd wẽn-sãang taoore ye, tɩ m yaa Wẽnd sẽn nong m buuda ne m sũur fãa la m pa sak tɩ buuda nong bũmb a to n yɩɩg-m ye." 
Exodus34:15 Da maan no-noom ne tẽnga rãmb ye, woto b sã n wa wɩɩb n kõ b wẽnd dãmba maando, b kõn bool foo tɩ f wa wãb b maanda nemd ye." 
Exodus34:16 Da maan no-noom ne-ba, n saag n bao f kamb pagb bãmb kom-pugli wã sʋk ye, ka rẽ kom-pugli wã wat n dabda b wẽnd dãmba waoogre tɩ fo kamba yik n pʋgda." 
Exodus34:17 Da yẽneg kut buud n maan wẽnd ye. 
Exodus34:18 Deeg noor ning sẽn yet tɩ b ra rɩ bur sẽn ning bɩlle. Yaa bõn-bɩʋng kiuug pʋgẽ, tɩ yaa sasa kãng la m yiis-f Ezipt tẽnga." 
Exodus34:19 Maan n so bũmb ning fãa sẽn yaa a ma pipi biiga: bõn-daoog fãa sẽn dog pipi a ma pʋgẽ, rũm-bedr wala rũm-bila." 
Exodus34:20 Bao rũm-bil n tek ne bõang pipi biiga; f sã ka na n bao rũng n tek-a, bɩ f wãa a kãarã. Bao bũmb n kɩs n deeg f meng bi-kẽenga n sooge. Naaba-Wẽnd taoor ka wat ne nug vɩʋʋg ye." 
Exodus34:21 F na n tʋma dasem a yoobe la a yopoe daarã, f na n vʋʋsame, ba sã n ya koob bɩ tigsg wakato." 
Exodus34:22 Yʋʋmd sã n vẽeg fãa, maan dasem pis-nu kibsa, y sẽn wat n dɩkd y kood-rẽemsã. La kooda fãa sã n wa bɩ, maan-y tigsgu kibsa." 
Exodus34:23 Yʋʋmd pʋgẽ yaa naoor a tã la neba tog n wa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda, taoore." 
Exodus34:24 Maam n na n wa reeg nanams a taaba tẽns n kõ-fo, Israyɛl, n yalg f toaaga, ned ba a ye kõn mak n deeg f tẽngã yʋʋmda kiis niyns y sẽn na n wa m waoogra zĩigẽ, naoor a tã yʋʋmda pʋgẽ wã ye." 
Exodus34:25 Da saag n tũnug miisd sẽn lob bɩlle ne maoong ye. Rũng ninga sẽn kʋ pak yĩnga nemd ka tog n vẽeg beoog ye. 
Exodus34:26 Yãk f kood rẽemsã n kõ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala. Da saag n dʋg bull ne a ma bĩisim ye.»" 
Exodus34:27 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Gʋls noy-kãensã tɩ yaa bãmb deegre n na n yals zoodã mam sẽn yõgd ne foom, a Israyɛl.»" 
Exodus34:28 A Moyiiz paa ne Soaala-Wẽnd, Sinayi tãnga zugu, dasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo, n ka rɩ la a ka yũ ye. A gʋlsa zooda noya kuga wals a yiib zutu. Noya yaa bãmb piiga." 
Exodus34:29 A Moyiiz siga tãngã, a ra zãada wals a yiibu. A ra ka mi t'a sẽn sõs ne Naaba-Wẽndã poore, a nenga da tʋʋsda vẽenem ye." 
Exodus34:30 A Aarõ ne a Israyɛl kamba fãa yãenda a Moyiiz, b mikame t'a nenga yãgda la b pa saag n kolg-a ye." 
Exodus34:31 Dẽ la a Moyiiz bool-b, la a Aarõ ne kãsem-dãmba lɛɛg n waame la a Moyiiz goma ne-ba." 
Exodus34:32 Dẽ poore yaa a Israyɛl kamba fãa n kolge la a taas-b-la noy-niyns fãa Wẽnd sẽn kõ-b Sinayi tãng zugu. 
Exodus34:33 A Moyiiz sẽn gom n sɛ, a baoo peende n lud a nenga." 
Exodus34:34 A Moyiiz sã n da rabd n na n tɩ sõs ne Soaala-Wẽnde a ra yãkda peennã. A sã n wa yita, a lɛɛgd n ning-a lame. A sã n lɛɛg n wa, a wilgda a Israyɛl kamb Soaala-Wẽnd koeese." 
Exodus34:35 Israyɛl kamba ne-la a Moyiiz nenga sẽn tar yãgbo. A Moyiiz lebd n luda a nengã ne peennã n gũud wakat ning a sẽn na n leb n tɩ sõs ne Naab Wẽnde. 
Exodus35:1 A Moyiiz tigma Israyɛl kamba, n yeel-ba: «Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel tɩ y maan bũmb ninga." 
Exodus35:2 Dasem a yoob pʋgẽ b tʋmdame la daar a yopoe soaba yaa ra-sõngo, vʋʋsg daare, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga. Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n tʋm-a baraare, b na n kʋ-a lame." 
Exodus35:3 Da widg-y bugum vʋʋsga daare, zĩig ba a ye, y zakẽ ye.»" 
Exodus35:4 A Moyiiz taasa Israyɛl kambã Soaala-Wẽnd noor kãnga: 
Exodus35:5 «Yãk-y y sẽn tare n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. Sẽn nonga n bao n kõ Wẽnde, bɩ a wa ne woto: sãnem, wanzurfu, zũudu," 
Exodus35:6 gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs sẽn maneg n dĩngi, bʋ-kõbdo," 
Exodus35:7 pe-raad gãndo sẽn los monem, gãnd sẽn ka yũnd koom, raado," 
Exodus35:8 kaam sẽn na n ning fitila, kaam sẽn tar n zɛɛdẽ, tɩdar sẽn tar yũ-noogo;" 
Exodus35:9 kug sẽn moog wa rulg lɛlma, kug neeb sẽn na n tall n zap sãnem-pɛ-m-poore la sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogo." 
Exodus35:10 Neb niyns fãa sẽn be yãmb sʋk n tõe n maan bõn-neer fãa, bɩ b wa sõng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn data tõog n pidsi." 
Exodus35:11 Yaa sɛka roog ne a pɛɛla, a kɩremsã la zug tẽnsʋk peen-tagdã, loetsã, ra-lugsã, ra-lug gilsã, ra-paadsã, b sẽn send bũmb niyns zutã." 
Exodus35:12 Yaa koglgã ne a ra-tuiidsã, la a lingã, yaa peen-lillã;" 
Exodus35:13 te-roagendgã ne a ra-tuiidsã la a te-neebã, bura sẽn ya Wẽnd pʋɩɩrã." 
Exodus35:14 N paas fitilsa ne b kaama. 
Exodus35:15 N paas tɩdara maan-kugrã ne a ra-tuiidsã, kaam sõngã, tɩdar bãanegã, rooga noor peen-kãsengã." 
Exodus35:16 N paas yũ-noog maan-kugrã ne a kut gãmbrã, ko-sĩngã, ne a sẽn dog bũmb ning zugã." 
Exodus35:17 N paas zaka pɛɛla, a ra-lugsã ne raada sẽn send zĩig ningã, zaka noor peendã." 
Exodus35:18 N paas rooga ne zaka raado la wĩya. 
Exodus35:19 N paas fu-bɛdã, maan-kʋʋr futã, a Aarõ ne a kamba rẽnna.»" 
Exodus35:20 Israyɛl kamba fãa basa a Moyiiz n leb b zagsẽ. 
Exodus35:21 Yamleoog tʋʋm-tʋmdba fãa waame. Neer baoodba fãa talla b kũuni n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, sɛka roog tiib yĩnga, fu-sõma wã wʋgb yĩnga." 
Exodus35:22 Rap ne pagb waame, ne yamleoogo, b waa ne b fan-teedo: zũya, nug-bĩnsi, fan-teed buud fãa sẽn dõog ne sãnem, la b rɩk-b-la fãa n tees la b kõ Soaala-Wẽnde wa b sẽn maan ne sãnema." 
Exodus35:23 Ned ning fãa sẽn da tara gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs bãanese, bʋ-kõbdo, pe-raad gãndo sẽn los monem, gãnd sẽn ka madgd koom, a tall-b lame n wa." 
Exodus35:24 B waa ne b wanzurf bɩ zũudu n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. B waa ne ra-sõma tʋʋmda yĩnga. 
Exodus35:25 Pagb niyns sẽn da mi-b lamd wĩib sõmb-sõmbo, wĩi gĩ-bãanese, gĩs moam yʋs gĩs miidu, gĩs mismiidu." 
Exodus35:26 Sẽn da rat-ba la sẽn da mi-b bʋ-kõbd gĩs wĩib waame. 
Exodus35:27 Kãsem-dãmba waa ne kug moama, ne kug neeb a taab sẽn na n zap sãnem-pɛ-m-poore la sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogo," 
Exodus35:28 b waa ne bõn-yood sẽn tar yũ-noodo, fitila kaama la ka-sõnga yĩnga, b waa ne tɩdar bãanegã." 
Exodus35:29 Rapã la pagbã sẽn da rat ne sũuri n maan tʋʋma wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilgã, fãa tẽegame tɩ b yaa Israyɛl kamba la b waa ne b kũuni n kõ Soaalã." 
Exodus35:30 A Moyiiz yeela Israyɛl kambã: «Ade, yaa a Besalɛl, a Uri biiga, a Ur yagenga, a Zɩɩda sakẽ neda, la Soaala-Wẽnd yãk yã." 
Exodus35:31 B kõ-a-la sɩlem gongo, dabar la bãngr kãsenga t'a tõe tʋʋm buud ka tɛka." 
Exodus35:32 A tõe n yãenda a yamẽ la a maan ne a nugu sãnem teedo wanzurfu, zũud teedo;" 
Exodus35:33 a tõe n peesa kug-bõonego tɩ b yãgd b toore; a tõe n peesa raado, a tõe bũmb fãa." 
Exodus35:34 Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-a lame wala b sẽn kõ a Ooliab, a Dã sakẽ nedã, yam sẽn na n zãms b taab tʋʋma." 
Exodus35:35 B kõ-b-la yam la sɩlem tɩ b tõe tʋʋm buud fãa wala kug neeb peesgo, peen-neeb bukri, ne gĩs bãanese, sʋlg meng tʋʋmde; b tõe n yãenda b yamẽ tʋʋm buud toɛ-toɛ yã la b maan-b ne b nugu.»" 
Exodus36:1 Yɩɩ wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg-bã la a Besalɛl, a Ooliab la neb a taaba sẽn da paam sɩlem la bãngr n na tʋm dooga tʋʋmna, wẽneg n sɩng b tʋʋmde." 
Exodus36:2 A Moyiiz boola a Besalɛl, a Ooliab la neb a taabã sẽn da paam sɩlem la bãngre n paas sẽn da tar-b tʋʋmda sũuri n yet tɩ b na n tʋm-a lame wã." 
Exodus36:3 B waa n deega a Moyiiz nengẽ bũmb ning fãa a Israyɛl kamba sẽn wa ne, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr ro-sõnga yĩnga. La beoog sã n vẽege a Israyɛl kamba da ket n tara waoongo ne b kũuni." 
Exodus36:4 Woto tʋʋm mitbã sẽn da sɩng-b tʋʋmna n na n ti roogã, kong n yalsame." 
Exodus36:5 B waa n yeela a Moyiiz: «Neba sẽn ket n wat ne kũuna yaa n yɩɩda Wẽnd daabo.» 
Exodus36:6 Dẽ la a Moyiiz kɩt tɩ b moon tẽnga pʋga: «Marsã tɛka bɩ ned ba a ye, pag bɩ rao, da le wa ne bũmb Wẽnd waoogr ro-sõnga yĩng ye.» B gɩdga neba tɩ b ra le wa ne kũun ye." 
Exodus36:7 Teeda sẽn wa wã da sekda roogã n mabge. 
Exodus36:8 Yaa tʋʋm-mitb gill la b yãk rooga tiib yĩnga. B wʋga pɛɛl piig ne gĩs bãanese, gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, b buka peenda zugu, rũmsi sẽn naag n tar nao a naase la pɩgsa la ninsaal nenga." 
Exodus36:9 Peend a ye fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi la a nii t'a yalma ya kãntɩɩs a naase. Pɛɛla fãa ra zema taaba. 
Exodus36:10 B deng n dɩka pɛɛl a nu n bogl taaba, n le rɩk a nu n bogl taaba." 
Exodus36:11 B rɩka pe-kõbd gĩs mismiidu n wʋg wĩ n loe peen-satga noore; b le maana boto me ne a to wã. 
Exodus36:12 Peend satg a ye fãa noore yaa wĩ pis-nu la b loe yã; peend satsa a yiiba fãa wĩ loeme tɩ b tot taaba. 
Exodus36:13 B kuda sãnem sogds pis-nu, peela loees yĩnga, la b sã n sɩd loe, lebga wa peend yɛnga." 
Exodus36:14 B wʋga peen-tagdo me ne bʋ-kõbdo, bãmb piig la a ye sẽn na n wa gãneg rooga zugu." 
Exodus36:15 Peend fãa woglem yɩɩ kãntɩɩs pis-tã, t'a yalem tat kãntɩɩs a naase. Pɛɛla fãa ra zema taaba." 
Exodus36:16 B rɩka pɛɛl a nu n bogl taaba la b rɩk a yoobã sẽn kellã n bogl taaba. 
Exodus36:17 Peen satga noorẽ, b ninga wĩ pis-nu, a to wã me wĩ pis-nu." 
Exodus36:18 B kuda sãnem sogds pis-nu n na n wa loe pɛɛla tɩ yɩ wa peen-yɛng. 
Exodus36:19 Rooga yĩnga b le sẽe pɛɛla, n sẽ pe-raad gãn sẽn los monem la b sẽ gãnd sẽn ka yũnd koom, dooga sugr pilb yĩnga." 
Exodus36:20 Rooga yĩnga b rɩka gõ-miig ra-pegdo n ka-b taab a naas-naase, n bas võ yaleng tẽnsʋka, n yik-b n yals yĩngri. Bãmb boondame tɩ ra-lug-yalemse." 
Exodus36:21 B zãndlem yɩɩ kãntɩɩs piiga, tɩ b yalem yaa kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus36:22 B kaa ra-pegda tɩ tʋʋgd zĩis a yi, b selb yĩnga, la b sel-b lame n pẽneg taaba." 
Exodus36:23 B tonga bãmb pisi, nug rɩtgo." 
Exodus36:24 B maana wanzurf te sends pis-naase la yaa bãmb zut la b sel ra-lug-yalensã, ra-lug-yaleng fãa yaa te-sends a yiibu, la yɩɩ woto n tonge." 
Exodus36:25 Nug goabg ra-lug-yalensa me na n tonga pisi. 
Exodus36:26 B wanzurf te-sendsa yaa pis-naase, a yiib ra-lug-yaleng fãa tẽngre. La yɩɩ woto n tonge." 
Exodus36:27 Rooga nin-taoor yɩɩ ra-lug-yalens a yoobe. 
Exodus36:28 Rooga nin-taoor pẽgsa reega ra-lug-yalens a yiibu sẽn na n paas tiiba pãnga. 
Exodus36:29 Tẽngrã b ra yaagame, la yĩngrã b tɩ naag n sogda ne pipi kakã. Ra-lug-yalensa sẽn na n paas pãnga sogame n wẽneg taaba." 
Exodus36:30 Dɩlla nin-taoorã yɩɩ ra-lug-yalens a nii la wanzurf te-sends piig la a yoobe, ra-lug-yaleng fãa te-sends a yi." 
Exodus36:31 B peesa ra-paadse ne gõ-miiga, bãmb b nu kɩreng a ye fãa yĩnga." 
Exodus36:32 Rooga kɩreng a to wã me yɩɩ bãmb b nu. Sẽn lebd mogra sẽnẽ kɩrenga le yaa bãmb b nu. 
Exodus36:33 Tʋʋm-mitba gesame n bog raado n pɩk ra-lug-yalemsã b zãndlem pʋɩ-sʋka, rooga sɩngre, n ta a sɛɛbo." 
Exodus36:34 B bolga raada sãnem. B kuda sãnem kagse n tui ra-paadsã la bãmb me bolga sãnem. 
Exodus36:35 B wʋga peen-lilli ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs bãanese la b buka peenda zugu rũms sẽn naag n tar nao a naase la pɩgsa la ninsaal nenga. Sɩd yɩɩ tʋʋm-mit tʋʋmde." 
Exodus36:36 B yagl-a-la ra gils a naas sẽn bolg sãnem la sẽn ka sãnem kaadse. B maana wanzurf te-sendse a naas b yĩnga. B sẽn na n dogl bũmb niyns zutã yaa wanzurf, bãmb b naase." 
Exodus36:37 Rooga noore b ninga peend sẽn wʋg ne gĩs miidu, gĩs mismiidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peelse wa mitba sẽn wʋgdã." 
Exodus36:38 Peen-kãng yagla raad a nu sẽn bolg sãnem la sẽn tar sãnem kaadse. B bolga ra-lugsã ne b bãn-sogdsã ne sãnem la b dõoga zũud te-sends a nu b yĩnga. 
Exodus37:1 A Besalɛl dɩka gõ-miig n pees raad n maan koglgã. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yi la pʋɩ-sʋka, a yalem kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka, a zãndlem kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:2 A gãnega sãnem yulli koglga pʋg la a yɩnga. A kʋgla a noorã ne sãnem maabre. 
Exodus37:3 A maana sãnem kags a naas n sog koglga tẽngre, a yiib kɩreng a ye, a yiib kɩreng a to." 
Exodus37:4 A peesa gõ-miig raad gils-gilsi n bolg sãnem. 
Exodus37:5 A rɩk-b lame n tui kagsã la yaa ne ra bãmb la b ra tar n zɩt koglgã. 
Exodus37:6 A maana koglga linga ne sãnem yɩlemde; a woglma yaa kãntɩɩs a yi la pʋɩ-sʋka, a yalma kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:7 A rɩka zãar n kud rũms a yi sẽn naag n tar nao a naase la pɩgsa la ninsaal nenga. A yals-b-la koglga linga sɛtmẽ. 
Exodus37:8 A ye ninga rɩtgo, t'a ye ning goabga la b naag-b lame n ka ne lingã." 
Exodus37:9 Rũmsa sẽn da yɛsa pɩgs ra zẽkame n yɛdg linga zugu. B nensa ra teesa taaba la b ra geta koglga lingã. 
Exodus37:10 B peesa gõ-miig raad n maan te-roagendga. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yi, a yalem kãntɩɩga, a zãndlem kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus37:11 B gãnega sãnem yɩlemde a zugã la b mobga a noora ne sãnem maabre. 
Exodus37:12 Raad yalem sẽn ta nus-bi a naase n ka n pɩke n maan kogsre la b bolga bãmb me sãnem. 
Exodus37:13 B maana sãnem kags a naas n ning te-roagendga kɩrems a naasã. 
Exodus37:14 Kagsa ra pẽnega te-roagendga noore la b ra tuiid-b-la raado n na n tõog n zẽk-a n teem zĩiga. 
Exodus37:15 Ra-kãens peesame n bolg sãnem, b pees-b-la te-roagendga tʋkr yĩnga." 
Exodus37:16 B kuda ne sãnem, teeda sẽn na n dogl a zugã: laase, ko-teese, la gilsi, wũmbli, bãmb pʋg la b na n ningd rãam bɩ kaama sẽn na n bas ne maandã. Yaa sãnem yɩlemde la b rɩk n maan-ba." 
Exodus37:17 B rɩka sãnem meng menga n kud fitil kãsenga. Zãar n toos sɛɛgã wala willã, maabrã, pu-yoaalã la puuga menga. Fãa naagame n kud kud-yɛnga." 
Exodus37:18 Fitila welga a sɛɛgẽ wã wil a yoobe: wil a yoob sẽn keg taab tẽnsʋk willã n dʋʋd a yiib-yiibu, zĩis a tã." 
Exodus37:19 Wil a yooba fãa sẽn keg taab tẽnsʋk willã n dʋʋd a yiib-yiib, zĩis a tã wã tara puud a tã sẽn dõog wa lɩɩn-puugu, ne a pu-yoolle la a puug menga." 
Exodus37:20 Sʋk wila tara puud a naase, sẽn dõog wa lɩɩn-puugu, ne a pu-yoolle la a puug menga." 
Exodus37:21 Maabre n da tʋʋg n gilg zĩis a tãabã wil a yooba sẽn keg taab tẽnsʋk willã n duudã. 
Exodus37:22 Maabra ne wila naagame n kud kud yɛnga. Fãa yaa sãnem meng sẽn toos ne zãare. 
Exodus37:23 Fitilsa a yopoe wã n paas teed a taaba, wa wõrsdgã la bug-rɩɩnda sẽn dʋʋgd zĩig ningã, dẽ me yõga ne sãnem yulli." 
Exodus37:24 B rɩka sãnem gilgu sẽn sek nin-tɩɩg tʋkre n kud rẽ fãa. 
Exodus37:25 B peesa gõ-miig raad n ka tɩdar maan-kugrã. A woglma yaa kãntɩɩga, a yalma yaa kãntɩɩga. A yalma la a woglma ra zema taaba. A zãndlma n da ya kãntɩɩs a yi, la a yɩdba naagame n ya bũmb a ye ne-a." 
Exodus37:26 B baoo sãnem meng n bolg a zugã la a kɩremsã la a yɩdbã, n bao sãnem maabre n mobg-a zãnga." 
Exodus37:27 B ninga a kɩrems a yiibã, poorẽ la taoore, sãnem kagse, bãmb b naase. Raad a yi n tuiid kagsã, maan-kugra tʋkr yĩnga." 
Exodus37:28 Daada maneg n peesa ne gõ-miiga, n bolg sãnem." 
Exodus37:29 B segla ka-sõngã la tɩdarã sẽn na n yõogã, wala mitba sẽn maandã." 
Exodus38:1 B Kaa yũ-noog maan-kugrã ne gõ-miig ra-pegdo. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, a yalem kãntɩɩs a nu, dɩlla a kɩrems a naasa fãa zema taaba; a zãndlma yaa kãntɩɩs a tã." 
Exodus38:2 B ninga yɩdba a kɩrems a naasa fãa n bolg zũud a zugu. 
Exodus38:3 B yõga maan-kugra teed fãa: bug-rɩɩnda laase, kardo, zɩɩm sĩmbi, kõsã la wisda laase. Te-bãmb fãa yõga ne zũudu." 
Exodus38:4 B maana kut gãmbre n gilg maan-kugrã, b ning-a-la tẽngre la a zẽkame n ta a pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Exodus38:5 B ninga zũud kags a naase, kɩremsã, ra tuiidsa yĩnga." 
Exodus38:6 B peesa ra tuiidsã n maneg n bolg ne zũudu. 
Exodus38:7 B tuii b kagsã maan-kugra zẽkr yĩnga. Maan-kugra pʋg ra yaa vɩʋʋgo. 
Exodus38:8 B maana zũud ko-sĩngã. A sẽn dog bũmb ning zuga me yaa zũudu. Pagba sẽn da gãe sɛka rooga noora zũuda nin-gɛtsã la b reeg n kud dẽnd fãa. 
Exodus38:9 B maana zaka. Yaa pɛɛl sẽn wʋg ne gĩs kegemse la b tak n gilgi. Nug rɩtgo b woglma yaa kãntɩɩs koabga. 
Exodus38:10 Pɛɛla ra sogda wanzurf ribli sẽn ning gaagdse la sẽn tɩ gaagd zũud ra-lug gils sẽn tong taab pisi la sẽn sel te-sends pisi zutu. 
Exodus38:11 Nug goabga, le yaa kãntɩɩs koabga la peenda tak yã. Ra-lugsa sẽn ya gilsa me yaa pisi, b te-sendsa me boto." 
Exodus38:12 Sẽn lebd nin-taoore, yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu la zaka yalem, la pɛɛla ra loe ra-lugs gils piiga sẽn sel zũud te-sends piig zutu." 
Exodus38:13 Sã n ya yaangã yalma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu. 
Exodus38:14 Yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nu la pɛɛla reng n loe ra-lugs gils a tã sẽn sel te-sends a tãab zutu. 
Exodus38:15 Yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nu la pɛɛla leb n tɩ loe ra-lugs gils a tã sẽn sel te-sends a tãab zutu. Woto b basa noor sʋka sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pisi. 
Exodus38:16 Rooga pɛɛla wʋga ne gĩs peelse sẽn maneg n dĩngi tɩ ya kẽnkẽ. 
Exodus38:17 Ra-lug gilsa sẽn sel bũmb niyns zuta rõoga ne zũudu, tɩ ribli wã ne b gaagdsa ya wanzurfu. Ra-lug gilsa zuta ra bolga ne wanzurfu; ra-lug gilsa ra soga taab ne wanzurf ribli la gaagdse." 
Exodus38:18 Dooga noor peendã da maneg n bukame la b wʋg-a-la ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩ bãanese. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi, t'a zãndlma yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, wala pɛɛl a taabã." 
Exodus38:19 A ra-lug gils a naasã ne b te-sendsã da yaa zũudu. Yaa wanzurf ribli la gaagdse n da sog-b ne taaba. Ra-lug gilsa zuta bolga ne wanzurfu. 
Exodus38:20 Sɛka roog biili ne zaka rẽnna, fãa ra yaa zũudu." 
Exodus38:21 Ad kutã, sãnema, wanzurfã sẽn tall n maan doogã, la kuga walsa koglgã geelse. A Moyiiz sẽn yeel b rãmb tɩ b maan geelsã yɩɩ Levitse; maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biiga, a Itamar, n deeg kãsengo." 
Exodus38:22 A Uri biig a Besalɛl, a Ur yagengã, Zɩɩda sak nedã, n tʋm tʋʋma wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilgã." 
Exodus38:23 Sẽn yɩ-a a sõangda, yɩɩ Dã sak ned, a Ayisamak biiga Ooliab: yẽ ra mii kug peesgo, raad peesgo, peend bukri, peen yũnugri, n yũnug tɩ lebg mismiigu, miigu, moomd yʋs." 
Exodus38:24 Sãnema zãng sẽn tall n wa kõ Naaba-Wẽnd rooga tʋʋm yĩng zɩslem taa neb pis-naas la a tã zɩɩbo. Sãnem gila maga wa b sẽn minim n magd-a Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ. 
Exodus38:25 Israyɛl kamba sõadga wakato, b da reega wanzurf gil sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo. (Magba tũu Wẽnd waoogr do-sõngẽ dẽnna.)"
