Exodus38:26 Dẽ wilgdame tɩ ned kam fãa kɩsa wakɩ koɛɛng pʋɩ-sʋka. Yaool n yɩɩ rap bal la b sõd yã. Yaa neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn da ta pisi bala. Yɩɩ neb tus kobs-yoobe la a tã la kobs-nu la pis-nu. 
Exodus38:27 B rɩka wanzurf zɩslem sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo n yẽneg n maan teeda sẽn na n sel zĩig ningã, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr ro-sõnga ra-lugsi la peen-lilla raad yĩnga. Te-sendsã yɩɩ koabga, la wanzurf sẽn ta nin-tɩɩg zɩɩbo la b rɩk n dõog te-sendg a ye." 
Exodus38:28 B rɩka wanzurf sẽn ta nin-yend zɩɩbo n dõog ra-lugsa bãn-sogse la b kell n bolga zũuda ra-lugsa zutu la b kud bãn-tuiidsã sẽn tuiid ra-lugsã. 
Exodus38:29 B sẽn wa ne zũuda taa neb koabg la a yoob zɩɩbo. 
Exodus38:30 Dẽ la b rɩk n kud sɛka rooga noor ra-lugsa te-sendse, yũ-nood maanda maan-kugri ne a gãmbrã la a teed a taabã." 
Exodus38:31 Zaka ra-lugsa te-sendse, dooga noorẽ dẽnna, sɛk rooga rẽnna, bãn-kaadsã, fãa yɩɩ zũudu." 
Exodus39:1 Wẽnd dooga maanda kʋʋb yĩnga, b maana futu ne gĩs peelse, gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs; b wʋga fut sẽn ya sõmbo a Aarõ yĩnga, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilgã." 
Exodus39:2 B maana sãnem-pɛ-m-poore ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs bãanese, n kõog-a ne sãnem gĩsi." 
Exodus39:3 B kuda sãnem t'a lebg paklga tɩ b bẽes a bõonego n kalem ne gĩs mismiidã, gĩs miidã, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peelse wala bukd mitba sẽn maandã." 
Exodus39:4 Sãnem-pɛ-m-poora yĩnga b wʋga peen-dis a yi: Peen-disa ninga sãnem-pɛ-m-poora kɩrems a yi. 
Exodus39:5 Sãnem-pɛ-m-poora peen-disa wʋga wala a mengã la ra yaa bõn-yɛng ne-a, wala Soaala sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:6 B peesa kug miid a yiibã tɩ b yãgd b toore, n maneg n mobg-b ne sãnem. Kug miida zug ra gʋlsa a Zakoob kamba yʋy; gʋlsame tɩ kẽ sõma." 
Exodus39:7 B ra loeta Israyɛl kamba yʋy fu-bãg-vɩɩda poore n na wilg tɩ Soaala tẽra b yelle, wa b sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:8 B mana sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogã. B maneg n buk-a-la wa sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs, gĩs peelse, n kõog-a ne sãnem wa sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã." 
Exodus39:9 Da yaa gɩfo; a yalma me a woglma ra zema taaba, da yaa nug-yakemde." 
Exodus39:10 Gɩfa manegame n zape n tong a zugu kug neeb rũnus a naase: Pipi rũnuga yɩɩ kug zẽoogo, kõodr-pespele, toenɛɛga." 
Exodus39:11 Rũnug a yiib soaba: moomde, kẽega la kõodre." 
Exodus39:12 Rũnug a tãab soaba: miuug la sabla, kõodr sẽn lɩʋʋs miuugu, la mismiuugu." 
Exodus39:13 Rũnug a naas soaba: yirg gelle, rulg-lɛlma la bɩrba. Kug bãmb fãa zapame n kok ne sãnem." 
Exodus39:14 Kugr a ye fãa tara a Israyɛl biig yʋʋre la b sõora yaa piig la a yiibu. Yʋʋra gʋlsame tɩ kẽ kugrã wala kaset gʋlsem. Buuda sak fãa tara a kugri. 
Exodus39:15 B dɩka sãnem gĩs n pãnem wa wĩir, sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga sẽbgr yĩnga." 
Exodus39:16 B rõoga sãnem nug-bĩns a yi, n gãneg sãnem paklga n bʋʋg-ba tɩ b luund sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga yĩngr kɩrems a yiibã." 
Exodus39:17 Sãnem pãnems a yiibã dɩka b noor a ye n loe sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga nug-bĩns a yiibã. 
Exodus39:18 Sãnem pãnemsa noor a to dɩk n loe ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poora peen-disã la woto gɩfa ka lebd goabg la rɩtg ye. 
Exodus39:19 B kuda sãnem kags a yi n loe-b sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga tẽngr kɩrems a yiibã. 
Exodus39:20 B le kuda sãnem kags a yi n loe-b sãnem-pɛ-m-poor peen-dis a yiibã tẽngre, b sẽnesma zĩigẽ. Kagsa ra be yĩngr tɩ peen-disa be bãmb tẽngre." 
Exodus39:21 B rɩka peend mismiigu n gaag sãnem-pɛ-m-yãoogã la sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã kagse la woto b naaga taab n sog n ka le tõe n n lak ne fu-bãg-vɩɩda ye, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:22 B wʋga fu-kãseng ning sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã la sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga sẽn na n wa yeelg n bʋʋgã. B wʋg-a-la zãng ne pe-kõbd gĩs mismiidu. Yɩɩ mit tʋʋmde. 
Exodus39:23 B ninga loor fu-yorga tẽnsʋka la loora ra kãda wala gãmbre, n ka tõe n kẽeg ye." 
Exodus39:24 Fuuga tẽngre b gʋla tɩ-biis wa pooloomse ne gĩs mismiigu, gĩs miuugu, gĩs moomd yʋs, gĩs-pɛɛlga." 
Exodus39:25 B kuda sãnem loamba n lɩʋʋs-b fuuga tẽngr ne tɩ-biisã. 
Exodus39:26 Sɩda loamba wã ne tɩ-biisa ra lɩʋʋsa taab fuuga tẽngre: tɩɩg biiga, lombre; tɩɩg biiga lombre. La fuuga ra yeelgda maanda kʋʋb yĩnga, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:27 A Aarõ ne a kamba yĩnga b sẽe fu-peelse. Dẽ me yɩɩ sʋlg mit tʋʋmde. 
Exodus39:28 Sẽn-le paase, b wʋga zu-viindse, pugli la kur koeese ne gĩs peelse." 
Exodus39:29 Sã n ya sẽbdsã, bãmb wʋga ne gĩs mismiidu, gĩs miidu, gĩs moam yʋs; b maneg n buk-b-la sõmb sõmbo, wala Wẽnd sẽn da togs a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:30 B kuda sãnem paklgã sẽn na n mobg rĩirã. B kuda-a-la ne sãnem yɩlenga la b gʋlsame tɩ kẽ neere, wa kaset gʋlsem: Welga toor Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Exodus39:31 B sog-a-la ne peen mismiigu sẽn na n yɩlẽ n loe-a ne puglã, wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus39:32 Woto la b baas rooga tʋʋma, sɛka roog tʋʋma. Israyɛl kamba modga ne tʋʋmna la b tʋmame tɩ tũ, wala a Moyiiz sẽn yeela zãnga." 
Exodus39:33 B waa n kɩsa a Moyiiz sɛka roog ne a zaka teedo; b waa ne sogdsã, ra-kaadsã, ra-paadsã, ra-lug gilimsã ne b te-sendsã," 
Exodus39:34 B waa ne pe-raada gãn-moama, sugra gãn sẽn ka tõe n yũn kooma, tẽnsʋk peen-lutgã." 
Exodus39:35 B waa ne kuga walsa koglgo la a ra-tuiidsã n paas a lingã. 
Exodus39:36 B waa ne te-roagendgã ne a teedã la Soaala-Wẽnd burã. 
Exodus39:37 B waa ne sãnem fitil kãsengã, teed nins sẽn naag wa wõrsdgã, bug-rɩɩnda laaga n paas bugma kaam." 
Exodus39:38 B waa ne sãnem maan-kugrã, ka-sõngã, tɩdar bãanegã, rooga noor peen-lillã." 
Exodus39:39 B waa ne zũud maan-kugrã ne a kut gãmbrã, a ra-tuiidsã la a teed a taaba n paas ko-sĩnga ne a sẽn dɩg bũmb ninga zugã." 
Exodus39:40 B waa ne zaka pɛɛla, ra-lugsã, te-sendsã, zaka noor peenna, wĩya, bãn-kaadsã la bũmb ning fãa sẽn tar a tʋʋmd dooga pʋga, sɛka roogã." 
Exodus39:41 B waa ne futã, maan-kʋʋra futã, a Aarõ ne a kamba sẽn da tog n yeelg b rãmbã, b tʋʋmda wakatã." 
Exodus39:42 Teeda fãa ra maaname n tũ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Exodus39:43 A Moyiiz ges-b-la a yembr-yembre, a yãeeme tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn datã la a ning-b-la barka." 
Exodus40:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Exodus40:2 «Ti ro-sõnga pipi kiuuga pipi raare. 
Exodus40:3 Ning kuga walsa koglg a pʋgẽ, peen-lilla poore." 
Exodus40:4 Wa ne te-roagendgã ne a teedã, n ning bũmb fãa a zĩigẽ. Wa ne fitil kãsenga la f widg a bugma." 
Exodus40:5 Dɩgl yũ-noog maan-kugra kuga walsa koglgo taoore, yagl peen-lillã." 
Exodus40:6 Dɩgl tɩdara maan-kugrã dooga noore, sɛka rooga noore." 
Exodus40:7 Dɩgl ko-sĩnga sɛka roog ne maan-kugra tẽnsʋka la pids-a ne koom. 
Exodus40:8 Ka zaka pɛɛla la yagl zaka noor peennã. 
Exodus40:9 Dɩk kaama n taag roogã la bũmb ning fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ. Dɩk-ba n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b lebg bũmb sẽn ya sõng zãng-zãnga. 
Exodus40:10 Taag yũ-noog maanda maan-kugr, ne a teeda fãa, ne ka-sõngo n dɩk-ba n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ b lebg bũmb sẽn ya sõng zãnga." 
Exodus40:11 Taag ko-sĩnga ne a sãngrã tɩ b lebg bõn-sõma. 
Exodus40:12 Kɩt t'a Aarõ ne a kamba kolg roogã n so koom. 
Exodus40:13 Dẽ poore yeelg a Aarõ a tʋʋmna futu la f taag-a kaam n dɩk-a n kõ Wẽnde t'a tʋm maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde. 
Exodus40:14 Kɩt t'a kamba me kolg tɩ f yeelg-b futu. 
Exodus40:15 Taag-b kaam tɩ b tʋm maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde. Kaama na n kõ-b-la maan-kʋʋr naam yʋʋm sẽn tong taab n ka be sɛɛbo.» 
Exodus40:16 A Moyiiz deega Wẽnd noor n maan fãa wa b sẽn da wilgã. 
Exodus40:17 Yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, pipi kiuugã pipi daare, b tii roogã." 
Exodus40:18 A Moyiiz kɩtame tɩ b reng n dɩgl te-sendsã n yaool n ning ra-lug-yalemsã, ra-paadsã, ra-lug-gilsã." 
Exodus40:19 B yɛdga sugra pɛɛl, wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilgã." 
Exodus40:20 B rɩka kuga wals koglgo n kẽes rooga pʋga; b ninga a ra tuiidsã la b rɩka a lingã n dogl a zugu. 
Exodus40:21 B kẽesa kuga walsa koglga rooga pʋga la b yagla peen-lillã n na n solg-a wala Soaala sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Exodus40:22 B kẽesa te-roagendgã sɛka roogẽ, nug goabga, peen-lilla taoore." 
Exodus40:23 B tẽgna burã Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, wala b sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus40:24 B ninga sãnem fitil kãsenga sɛka roogẽ, dooga rɩtgo, t'a tot te-roagendgã." 
Exodus40:25 B yõgna bugma, wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Exodus40:26 B rɩgla sãnem maan-kugrã sɛka roog pʋga, peen lilla taoore." 
Exodus40:27 B yõoga a zugu tɩdar bãaneg sẽn tar yũ-noogo, wala b sẽn da togs a Moyiiz." 
Exodus40:28 B yagla peenna sɛka roog noore. 
Exodus40:29 B yalsa yũ-nood maan-kugrã sɛka roog noore n kʋ maand a zugu, yũ-noog maoongo la b kõo bõn-koodi kũuni, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da togs a Moyiiz." 
Exodus40:30 B rɩgla ko-sĩngã maan-kugrã ne sɛka roog tẽnsʋka la b pids-a-la koom, waasg yĩnga." 
Exodus40:31 Yaa ko-kãng la a Aarõ ne a kamba da tar n pegd b nusi la b nao. 
Exodus40:32 B sã n da kẽed sɛka roogẽ bɩ b sã n da kolgda maan-kugrã, b da rengd n peka b mense, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da togs a Moyiiz." 
Exodus40:33 A Moyiiz yagla zaka pɛɛla n gilgi sɛka roogã la maan-kugrã. A yagla zaka noor peenda me. Yaa woto la a Moyiiz baas rooga tʋʋma. 
Exodus40:34 Sawadga luda sɛka roogo la Soaala-Wẽnd pids-a-la ne b ziiri. 
Exodus40:35 A Moyiiz ka tõog n kẽ rooga pʋg ye tɩ sawadga ra lud-a lame la Wẽnnaam da pids-a-la ne b ziiri. 
Exodus40:36 B sẽn da ta zĩig ning fãa n yalse b paada zĩ-kãnga tɩ sawadga wa zẽk n loog n bas sɛka roogo tɩ bãmb me yaool n sɩng kẽnde. 
Exodus40:37 Sawadga sã n ka yiki, bãmb me yɛs n gũud-a lame." 
Exodus40:38 Wĩntoogo, sawadga ra yɛsa sɛka roog zugu la yʋngo a widigda bugum tɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa be b zagsẽ n ne-a. La b sẽn yals zĩig ning fãa yɩɩ boto." 
Leviticus1:1 Wẽnnaam zĩnda sɛka roogẽ n bool a Moyiiz n yeel-a 
Leviticus1:2 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Yãmb nin-yend sã n wat ne bũmb n na kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, a tõe n waa ne rũm-bil bɩ rũm-bedre." 
Leviticus1:3 Sã yaa yũ-noog maoong la yãmb nin-yend dat n kʋ ne rũng sẽn ya kãsenga, bɩ rũnga yɩ raoogo la a bũmb ba a ye da kedb ye. B talld-a lame n wa sɛka roog noor n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus1:4 Kõata tikda a nug rũnga zug la Soaala-Wẽnd deegd-a lame wala kũun a sẽn kɩs n na n paam a yel-wẽna sugri. 
Leviticus1:5 B yaond n kʋʋ rũngã Soaala-Wẽnd taoore la maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, kõta Soaala-Wẽnd zɩɩma. B mesda zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã sẽn be sɛka rooga noore." 
Leviticus1:6 B sɩɩgda rũngã n bees-a. 
Leviticus1:7 Tɩ maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, tugl bugum maan-kugra zugu n ning raado." 
Leviticus1:8 La maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, rɩkda nemdã, zugã la kaama n dogl daada sẽn dɩt bugma, maan-kugra zugu." 
Leviticus1:9 B pekda yãada la karsã ne koom, tɩ maan-kʋʋdba reeg n los bugmẽ. Bugum n na n dɩ maoong kãnga zãnga, t'a ruk yũ-noogo sẽn tat Soaala yam." 
Leviticus1:10 Sã n yaa yũ-noog maoongo, la yaa rũm-bil la b rat n kʋ, pe-bila, bulla, rũnga na n yɩɩ raoogo, n ka tar bãnd ye." 
Leviticus1:11 B kʋʋd-a-la maan-kugra goabga, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, la maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, mesda zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus1:12 B sɩɩgda rũngã n bees-a la maan-kʋʋdba dɩkda nemdã n paas zugã ne kaama n dogl bugma sẽn be maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus1:13 B pekda yãada la karsã ne koom, tɩ maan-kʋʋda yõog-b maan-kugra zugu. Bugum n na n dɩ maoong kãnga zãnga t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus1:14 Sã n ya yũ-noog maoong la yaa bõn-yɩgdr buudu, la b rat n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, wall bɩ malwall, la b na n kʋ." 
Leviticus1:15 Maan-kʋʋda rɩkd-a lame n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, maan-kugra zugu la a tõsgda a zugã, n dɩk-a n los bugmẽ t'a rɩ; la a basdame tɩ zɩɩma sĩin maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus1:16 Dẽ poore a yãkda yoosengã ne bũmb ninga sẽn be a pʋgẽ n lob maan-kugra sɛɛga, zĩig ning tompɛglma sẽn dʋʋgdã, yaang sẽnẽ." 
Leviticus1:17 B na n wesg-a lame n dɩk-a zãnga n los bugmẽ, t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus2:1 Ned sã n dat n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd kũuni, kũun sẽn ka rũnga, wala zom, zoma na n kalma ne kaam la tɩdare." 
Leviticus2:2 B talld-a lame n kẽng maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, taoore. Yõngda zoma nug koore, n paas kaama la tɩdara zãnga. Maan-kʋʋda ningda rẽ fãa bugmẽ, maan-kugra zug, wala Soaala-Wẽnd pʋ-tẽer nekr bũmbu, la bugma rɩt-a lame t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus2:3 Sẽn kellã, yaa a Aarõ ne a kamba soolem. Yaa pʋɩɩr sẽn ya sõng wʋsg la b reegda t'a yãka Soaala-Wẽnd meng rẽnnẽ." 
Leviticus2:4 Kũuna sã n yaa bũmb sẽn ningd wʋngẽ, a tog n yɩɩ zom sẽn nag ne kaam n yaool n ka ning bɩlle, n dõos wala miis-zũuri bɩ miis-paklga sẽn sõ kaam n lebg bugmẽ, n ka ning bɩll ye." 
Leviticus2:5 Sã n ya bõn-kɩʋʋngo la f kõt Soaala-Wẽnde, dẽ me yɩta zom sẽn nag ne kaam, n ka ning bɩlle." 
Leviticus2:6 Kũuna wesdame n dɩk kaam n pʋdg-a. Yaa kũuni sẽn ka rũnga la f kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus2:7 Sã n ya bũmb sẽn dõosd laag pʋga, zoma naagda ne kaam." 
Leviticus2:8 F sẽn segl bũmb ning Soaala-Wẽnd yĩngã, f talld-a lame n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdã t'a reeg-a n kolg maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus2:9 Maan-kʋʋda na n yãka pʋ-tẽer nekr pʋɩɩrã n yõog-a maan-kugra zugu t'a yɩ yũ-noog n noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Leviticus2:10 Sẽn kellã, yaa Aarõ ne a kamba soolem: yaa pʋɩɩr sẽn ya sõmb wʋsgo t'a yãka Soaala-Wẽnd meng rẽnnẽ." 
Leviticus2:11 Zom sẽn tũnug kũun ning fãa tɩ y rat n dɩk-a n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ b ra saag n lob-a bɩll ye. Y kõn saag bada n yõog bugmẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, rɩɩb sẽn ning bɩll bɩ sɩɩd ye." 
Leviticus2:12 Y tõe n dɩk-a lame n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd wala kood dẽeng kũuni la ka tõe n yõog bugum, maan-kugr zugu, b yũ-noog yĩng ye." 
Leviticus2:13 F sã n tall bõn-koodr kũun n wa, tẽeg n wa ne yamsem; da yĩm n ning Soaala-Wẽnd kũuna yamsem ye, t'a yaa zood bũmbu. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la bõn-koodr kũun fãa naagda ne yamsem." 
Leviticus2:14 Sã n ya kood dẽeng la f wat n na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, kũuna na n yɩɩ ka-zut sẽn sẽ bugmẽ, bɩ kood paal zom pãrga." 
Leviticus2:15 Paas kaam la tɩdare, tɩ yaa kũuni." 
Leviticus2:16 La maan-kʋʋda na n yãka pʋ-tẽer nekr pʋɩɩre, zoma bilfu, kaama bilfu, tɩdara zãnga, n yõog bugum Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus3:1 Ned sã n dat n kʋ Lagem-n-dɩ maoongo, la rũnga yaa bedre, raoog bɩ yãanga, a bãng tɩ yaa rũng sẽn ka tar bãnde la a na n tall n wa Soaala taoore." 
Leviticus3:2 B tikda nug rũnga zug la b kodgd-a-la sɛka roog noore. Maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, yãkda a zɩɩma n mes maan-kugrã n gilgi." 
Leviticus3:3 B yãkda maoonga bũmb n yõog bugum tɩ rɩ zãng Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. B sẽn na n yãkã, yaa kaama sẽn mobg yãada zãnga, bɩ sẽn be zĩig a to;" 
Leviticus3:4 n paas yɩɩma a yiibã ne b kaama. Sã n ya sãoorã, b naagdame n yãk-a ne yɩɩma yiibã." 
Leviticus3:5 A Aarõ kamba yõogda rẽ fãa maan-kugra zugu, wa yibeoog fãa maoongã. Bugum n na n dɩ-b zãnga tɩ b yũ-nooga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus3:6 Lagem-n-dɩ maoonga sã yaa rũm-bil la b kʋʋda, rũnga tõe n yii raoog bɩ yãanga, a ye n ka tar bãnde." 
Leviticus3:7 Sã n ya pe-bila b talld-a lame n wa maanda kʋʋb zĩigẽ. 
Leviticus3:8 B tikda nug rũnga zugu la b kʋʋd-a-la sɛka roog noore; t'a Aarõ kamba mes a zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã. 
Leviticus3:9 Bũmb la b na n yãk n yõog tɩ rɩ zãnga t'a yũ-nooga kẽ Soaala-Wẽnde: yaa zʋʋra tõre, ne zʋ-kɛɛgã, kaama sẽn mobg yãada zãnga," 
Leviticus3:10 yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama. Sã n ya sãoorã, naagd n yãk-a la ne yɩɩma." 
Leviticus3:11 Maan-kʋʋda, na n basame tɩ bugma rɩ-b zãng maan-kugra zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus3:12 Sã n ya bʋʋg la b na n kʋ n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde," 
Leviticus3:13 b rɩkda nug n tik a zugu, n kodg-a sɛka roog noore t'a Aarõ kamba mes a zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus3:14 Ad-b sẽn na n yãk bũmb ning n yõog bugum Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga: kaama sẽn mobg yãada zãnga, zĩis a taaba kaama," 
Leviticus3:15 yɩɩm a yiiba ne b kaama, zʋ-kɛɛgã kaam. Sã n ya sãoorã, naagd-a lame n yãk ne yɩɩm a yiibã." 
Leviticus3:16 Maan-kʋʋda yõogd-b-la bugum tɩ b rɩ maan-kugra zugu wala yũ-noog sẽn noogd Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. Soaala-Wẽnd n so kaama fãa. 
Leviticus3:17 La rẽ yaa noore mam sẽn kõt yãmb yagense la b sẽn na n deege, b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa; noora la woto: da rɩ-y kaam la zɩɩm ye." 
Leviticus4:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz n yeel-a t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: 
Leviticus4:2 Ned sã n yĩd n maan wẽnga, n tõdg noor ning fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ, n maan bũmb sẽn kisi, bɩ a wa ne bũmbu tɩ b kʋ maoongo." 
Leviticus4:3 Sã n ya maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, b sẽn taag a soab ka-sõngã, sã n yaa yẽ n maan wẽnga, n kɩt tɩ buuda fãa naag n dẽgme, yaa lʋlle sẽn ya sõng zãnga la a na n kʋ, a yel-wẽna sugr paoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus4:4 A tallda lʋllã n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, sɛka roog noore, n tik a zuga ne a nugu la a kodg-a Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus4:5 Maan-kʋʋdã, b sẽn taag a soab ka-sõngã, yãkda naafa zɩɩm bilfu n tall n kẽ sɛka roogẽ." 
Leviticus4:6 A tẽkda zɩɩma ne a nug-bila n mes Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr rooga peen-lillã, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus4:7 A yaond n yãka zɩɩma bilfu n taag tɩdara maan-kugra yɩdbã, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, sɛka roogẽ. Dẽ poore a raagda zɩɩma fãa n gilg maan-kugrã sẽn dɩg sɛka rooga noorã." 
Leviticus4:8 La naafa sẽn kʋ yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga, a yãkda a kaama fãa. Yaa kaam ning sẽn mobg yãadã, sẽn gãneg yãada zugã," 
Leviticus4:9 yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama, zʋ-kɛɛga kaam. Sã n ya sãoorã, a naagdame n yãk-a ne yɩɩma." 
Leviticus4:10 Yãkda wala b sẽn yãkd lagem-n-dɩ maoongã la maan-kʋʋda yõogd-b-la bugum, yũ-noog maanda maan-kugr zugu, sɛka roog noore." 
Leviticus4:11 Naafa gãongo, a nemdã, a zugã, a karsã, a yãadã, a bĩndã," 
Leviticus4:12 naafa tõre, b na n talla rẽ fãa n zãag ne sikã, zĩig sẽn welg toore tɩ b lobd tompɛglma. B Na tugla bugum n yõog-b be. Yaa tãmpʋʋra zug la b na n dɩ bugum zãnga." 
Leviticus4:13 Sã n ya Israyɛl kamba zãng n yĩdi n maan wẽnga, n maan Soaala-Wẽnd noor sẽn digdi, b rogenda yell b zugu, ba b sã n ka mi." 
Leviticus4:14 Yell a woto buud sã n maane, b na bao lʋlle n tall n wa sɛka roog noore." 
Leviticus4:15 Soaala-Wẽnd taoore kãsem-dãmba tikda naafa zugu ne b nusi la Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, b kʋʋd-a lame." 
Leviticus4:16 Maan-kʋʋdã, b sẽn taag a soab ne ka-sõngã, tallda naafa zɩɩm n kẽ sɛka roogẽ." 
Leviticus4:17 A na n tẽka zɩɩma ne a nug-bil n mes peen-lillã, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus4:18 A na n taaga maan-kugra yɩdba, maan-kugr ning sẽn vigl Soaala-Wẽnd taoorã, la a raagda zɩɩma yũ-noog maan-kugra sɛɛgẽ, sɛka rooga noorẽ." 
Leviticus4:19 A na n yãka loalga kaam zãng n yõog bugum maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus4:20 B na n maana ne nag kãng wala b sẽn maand ne naaf ning b sẽn kʋ yel-wẽn sugr kosg yĩngã. Maan-kʋʋda sã n maan b sẽn yet t'a maan bũmb ning n paam Soaala-Wẽnd sugrã, zãma wã sɩd paamda sugri." 
Leviticus4:21 A na n kɩtame tɩ b tall nemda zãng n zãag ne sikã n tɩ yõoge. Yaa woto la b maanda, a Israyɛl kamba yel-wẽna dolb yĩnga." 
Leviticus4:22 Sã n ya buud kãsma n yĩdi n maan wẽnga, n maan bũmb ning Soaala-Wẽnd noor sẽn gɩdge, tɩ samd be a zugu," 
Leviticus4:23 a wata ne boɛɛg sẽn ya sõmbo. 
Leviticus4:24 A rɩkda a nug n tik boɛɛga zugu la b kʋʋd-a-la Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, zĩig ning b sẽn kʋʋd yũ-noog maoongã, tɩ yaa yel-wẽnd dolb maoongo." 
Leviticus4:25 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda zɩɩma ne a nug-bila n taag maan-kugra yɩdbã, n yaool n dɩk zɩɩma sẽn kellã n daag maan-kugra sɛɛga." 
Leviticus4:26 B yõogda kaama fãa wala lagem-n-dɩ maoongo. Maan-kʋʋda sã n maan a sẽn tog n maana fãa, buuda kãsem paamda sugri." 
Leviticus4:27 Sã n ya nin-zaalg n yĩdi n kɩɩs Soaalã, n tʋk yell a zugu," 
Leviticus4:28 b sã n wa wilg-a a sẽn tudg zĩig ninga, a tallda bʋ-yãanga sẽn ya sõmb n wa, a yel-wẽnda sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Leviticus4:29 A rɩkda a nug n tik rũnga zugu tɩ b kʋ-a b sẽn kʋʋd yũ-noog maanda zĩigẽ. 
Leviticus4:30 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda zɩɩma ne a nug-bila n taag yũ-noog maan-kugrã yɩdbã. A rɩkda zɩɩma sẽn kellã n daag maan-kugra sɛɛga. 
Leviticus4:31 A yãkda kaama zãng wala b sẽn maand ne lagem-n-dɩ maoongo. Maan-kʋʋda yõogda rẽ fãa bugum, Soaala-Wẽnd sũur maagr yĩnga. La a sã n maan a sẽn tog n maana fãa tɩ sẽn beega soaba paam sugri, a sɩd rokda a beegr taale." 
Leviticus4:32 Neda sã n wat ne rũnga n na n kʋ maoongo, yell a woto yĩnga, bɩ a wa ne pe-yãanga sẽn ya sõmb zãnga." 
Leviticus4:33 A rɩkda a nug n tik rũnga zugu tɩ b kʋ-a, a yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga, zĩig ning b sẽn kʋʋd yũ-noog maandã." 
Leviticus4:34 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda zɩɩma ne a nug-bila n taag yũ-noog maan-kugra yɩdbã. A rɩkda zɩɩma sẽn kellã n daag maan-kugra tẽngre. 
Leviticus4:35 A yãkda a kaama zãng wala b sẽn yãkd pesg sẽn kʋ laafi kosg yĩnga. Maan-kʋʋda yõogd-a-la bugum maan-kugra zugu Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Maan-kʋʋda sã n maan a sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga fãa, beegda paamda sugri." 
Leviticus5:1 Fo yãenda bũmb ne f nifu bɩ bũmb n lʋɩ f tʋbrẽ la b kosa foo Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋr yĩnga la b naag n kãab-f kãab wẽnga tɩ f wa togs sɩda, bãng tɩ f maana yel-wẽnde la f tʋka taale f zugu, fo sã n pa sak n togs sɩdã." 
Leviticus5:2 Ned sã n ka bãnge n sɩɩs bũmb ning fãa sɩɩsg sẽn kisi, wala we-rũnga, wala yir-dũnga, wala rũm-kɩdse sẽn ki, la yaa rũms sɩɩsg sẽn kisi, nin kãng rat t'a pa rata, a rẽgmame n dogl yell a zugu." 
Leviticus5:3 Ned sã n ka bãnge n sɩɩs ninsaal rẽgdo, sẽn ya rẽok ninga sɩɩsg sẽn kis fãa, a sã n wa bãng t'a sɩɩs-a lame, wakat kãng tɛka a lebgda rẽgdo la yell doga a zugu." 
Leviticus5:4 Ned sã n ka maan gũusgu n yaag a noor n wẽen yaare, wẽeneg sẽn na n lɛɛg n wã-a, bɩ sẽn na n wã a taaba, bɩ ned sẽn minim n wẽen yaar bũmb fãa poorẽ, yẽ soab sẽn bãng t'a wẽena yaar wakat ning fãa, a lebga rẽgdo tɩ yell be a zugu." 
Leviticus5:5 Ned ninga sẽn dogl yell a woto a zug tog n wilga neba fãa a kongre. 
Leviticus5:6 A yel-wẽnda dolb yĩnga, a na n kõo Soaala-Wẽnd rũng sɛdga, bʋ-sɛdg bɩ pe-sɛdga. Maan-kʋʋda na n maana a sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga tɩ beegda paam sugri." 
Leviticus5:7 Ned sã n ka tõe n paam pe-yãanga bɩ bʋ-yãanga, yaa wal a yiibu bɩ malwal a yiibu la a na n tall n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde n dol a yel-wẽna. Wall a ye bɩ malwall a ye kʋʋda yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga, a to wã kʋʋda yũ-noog maoongo." 
Leviticus5:8 A rengd n kɩsa maan-kʋʋdã a sẽn na n kʋ a soab yel-wẽna dolb yĩnga. Maan-kʋʋda gãta walla yublã n take la a pa tõsgd-a ye. 
Leviticus5:9 La a yãkda zɩɩma n mes maan-kugra zugu la a tãoos walla zɩɩm maan-kugra sɛɛga: yaa yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo. 
Leviticus5:10 Wallã bɩ malwallã a to wã, maan-kʋʋda regd-a lame n maan yũ-noog maoongo wala sẽn zoe n wilgã. Maan-kʋʋda sã n maan a sẽn tog n maan bũmb ning fãa n kos sugrã la sugra paamda." 
Leviticus5:11 Ned sã n ka tõe n paam wal a yi bɩ malwal a yi, a sẽn na n wa ne bũmb ninga, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, a yel-wẽnda sugr kosg yĩnga: yaa zom wũmbla. B basda kaama ne tɩdara taale, tɩ yaa yel-wẽnd dolb maoongo." 
Leviticus5:12 A na n talla zoma n wa maan-kʋʋda nengẽ tɩ yẽ yãk pʋ-tẽer nekr pʋɩɩr ne nug koore la a na n ning-a-la bugmẽ tɩ bugma naag-a ne kũuna taabã n dɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Yaa sugr kosg maoongo. 
Leviticus5:13 Maan-kʋʋda maanda a sẽn tog n maan bũmb ning fãa n kos sugri tɩ beegda sɩd paam sugri. Maan-kʋʋda meng sẽn deegd bũmb ning wala a pʋɩɩre, wẽnda a sẽn deegde, sã n ya kood la b wa ne." 
Leviticus5:14 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz t'a wilg woto: 
Leviticus5:15 Ba ned sã n yĩd n maan wẽnga, n kʋ rũnga, Soaala-Wẽnd noor sẽn gɩd rũms niyns maanda kʋʋbo, yẽ soab rẽgma a menga. Ad-a sẽn na n maane: a wa maneg a yellã Soaala-Wẽnd taoore ne pesgo sẽn ya sõmb zãnga, t'a ligda me zem bũmbu, sã n na n da-a ne ligd ning sẽn sõt wẽnd doogẽ wã. Maoonga na n yɩɩ sugr kosg maoong la b na n kʋ." 
Leviticus5:16 A sã n wa ne rũng sẽn ka zem bũmbu, yaa bõne la wẽnd dooga rɩ yã. A na n yaoo woto: ligd ning maan-kʋʋdba sẽn saagd pesgã, pʋɩta a nu la pʋɩɩr a nu soaba la a lebd n bao n paas n kɩse. Maan-kʋʋda kʋʋda rũnga maoongo la a maanda a sẽn tog n maan n kos sugri neda yĩnga, tɩ sugra yaool n paam, Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ." 
Leviticus5:17 Neda sã n maama yel-wẽnde t'a maana bũmb Wẽnnaam noora sẽn gɩdge, yell be-la a zugu, ba sã n tũu ne yĩdgu." 
Leviticus5:18 A na n baoo a wubrẽ, pe-raoog sẽn ya sõmb zãnga la sẽn sek yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo. Maan-kʋʋda sã n maan a sẽn tog n maan fãa n kos sugri, beegda paamda a beegra sugri, beegra sã n sɩd tũu ne yĩdgu la bãngr kaoolgo." 
Leviticus5:19 Dẽ yaa yell manegr maoongo t'a sɩd da tʋka Soaala-Wẽnd beegr a zugu. 
Leviticus5:20 Soaala-Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz t'a taas woto: 
Leviticus5:21 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd beegra sẽn tõe n beeg to-to yɛsa: f maana bũmb sẽn wa ne f tũud-n-taaga bõne. Yaa waa f sã n ka togs f tũud-n-taaga sɩda bobell poorẽ, bɩ a sẽn peng foo bũmb poorẽ, bɩ f sẽn zuk bũmb poorẽ, bɩ f sẽn zãmb f to poorẽ." 
Leviticus5:22 Leb n yaa f sã n yagd zirẽ, bũmb sẽn menem tɩ f lɛɛg n yãende n ket n wẽenẽ tɩ f pa yãend ye. Yaa paas zirẽ wã yagb wẽnem ne wẽenego." 
Leviticus5:23 Sẽn maana woto maana wẽng n tʋkd yell a zugu la a tog n lebsa a sẽn zukã, a sẽn deeg tɩ yɩɩd a sẽn da tog n deegã, bobellã bɩ bõn-menemdgã a sẽn lɛɛg n yãendã." 
Leviticus5:24 Ad-b sẽn na maan kast zirẽ soabã: bũmba na n saaga ligdi la b na n yaoolg-a-la ligda pʋɩɩr a nu soaba n paase t'a kɩse n ka kees bũmbu, b sẽn na n wilg-a a kongra raare." 
Leviticus5:25 A na n wa kõo Soaala-Wẽnde, a yel-wẽnda dolb yĩnga, pe-raoogo sẽn ka tar bãnde, a sẽn yiis a wubrẽ, la sẽn ta yel-wẽnd dolb maoong rũnga." 
Leviticus5:26 Maan-kʋʋda na n kosa sugr beegda yĩnga, la a yella sẽn yɩ a soab fãa na paama sugri." 
Leviticus6:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus6:2 t'a togs a Aarõ ne a kamba woto: Ad yũ-noog maoong sẽn sẽed to-to. B sẽn boond maoong ning tɩ yũ-noog maoongã, yaa maoong sẽn ningd bugmẽ yʋngo, maan-kugra zugu la b modgdame tɩ raada ra tẽes ye." 
Leviticus6:3 Maan-kʋʋda tãooda kur-koɛɛga la a yeelgda fu pɛɛlga. A vaagda bug-rɩɩna sẽn be maan-kugra zugu n ning maan-kugra sɛɛgẽ. 
Leviticus6:4 Dẽ poor marsã a yeesda a futã n le ning a taaba la a tʋkda tompɛglma n yi we-kɛɛnga, zĩig ning b sẽn yãk toore." 
Leviticus6:5 Bugum ninga sẽn wit maan-kugra zugã ka tog n ki ye. Yibeoog fãa maan-kʋʋda wata ne raado. Raada zugu a rogenda nemdã bɩ kaama sẽn na n dɩ bugma," 
Leviticus6:6 Bugum sẽn ka kiid abada n wit maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus6:7 Ad kũuna sẽn kõt to-to: a Aarõ kamb n talld-a n wa maan-kugra zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus6:8 B yãkda zoma ne nugu n paas kaama bilfu, la tɩdara zãnga, n yõog bugum t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri la a yɩ tẽegre." 
Leviticus6:9 A Aarõ ne a kamba yaondame marsã n dɩ sẽn ketã la b gũusdame tɩ ra-bɩll da pẽneg be ye. B baooda zĩig sẽn ya zĩ-sõng, zaka pʋga, sɛka doog noor, n zĩnd n dɩ b rɩɩbã." 
Leviticus6:10 Ka lobd ra-bɩll n wẽ zoma n yaool n kɩɩm ye. B sẽn kõ Soaala-Wẽnd kũun ninga la m yãkd n kõ a Aarõ kamba. Yaa rɩ-sõngo, wala b sẽn keesd yãmb rɩɩb ningã, y sã n kʋʋd yũ-noog bɩ yell manegr maoongo." 
Leviticus6:11 Sẽn ya-a rao fãa, a Aarõ kamba sʋka, n tõe n dɩɩ rɩ-kãngã. Yaa bãmb pʋɩɩr sẽn ka na tedg zamaan woo zamaana, pʋɩɩr sẽn yãk Soaala rẽnnẽ. Woto wã fo sã n ka kĩ ne a Aarõ n kɩɩs n dɩ, f na bool yel-beed n kõ-f menga." 
Leviticus6:12 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz t'a gom woto: 
Leviticus6:13 Ad kũun ninga a Aarõ ne a kamba sẽn na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, b kaama taagr daare: zom wamde, wamda pʋɩ-sʋk yibeoogo, a pʋɩ-sʋk zaabre, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Leviticus6:14 Zoma nagda ne kaam n dõos kud-pakleg zugu la b kõt-a-la Soaala-Wẽnd wala yũ-noog sẽn noogd sũuri. 
Leviticus6:15 A Aarõ biig ning sẽn na n deeg a ba wã maan-kʋʋra naam, yẽ me na n maana boto tɩ yaa noor sẽn ka tõe n teem ye. Kũuna na n dɩɩ bugmẽ zãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus6:16 Kũun ninga fãa sẽn ya maan-kʋʋd n wa ne, na n yɩɩ bũmb sẽn yõogd zãnga, b ka na n dɩ-a ye." 
Leviticus6:17 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus6:18 t'a taas a Aarõ ne a kambã woto: Ad yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo sẽn kʋʋd to-to. Rũnga kʋʋda Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, zĩig ning b sẽn kʋʋd yũ-noog maoongã. Yaa bũmb sẽn ya sõng zãnga." 
Leviticus6:19 Maan-kʋʋd ninga sẽn kʋ-a maoongã n tõe n wãb-a la yaa zĩ-sõngẽ la a na n wãb-a: sɛka zakẽ. 
Leviticus6:20 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn sɩɩs nemdã na n lebga bõn-sõngo. Rũnga zɩɩm sã n madg fuugu, b baooda zĩ-sõng n pek zɩɩma sẽn madg zĩig ningã." 
Leviticus6:21 Rʋk ninga sẽn dʋga nemdã na n wãame, a sã n ya tãnd rʋko. Sã n ya kut rʋko, b ruud-a lame la b pekd-a lame n yɩlem." 
Leviticus6:22 Sẽn ya-a rao fãa, n be maan-kʋʋdba sʋka, tõe n dɩ maoongã. Yaa bũmb sẽn ya bõn-sõng zãnga." 
Leviticus6:23 B ra saag n wãb rũng sẽn kõ Wẽnnaam yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, tɩ b rɩk a zɩɩma n kẽ sɛka roogẽ n mes-a la yaa sugra kosg n wa ne rẽnna ye, yõogd-a-la bugum." 
Leviticus7:1 Yaa woto la yell manegr maoonga kʋʋda: yaa bũmb sẽn ya bõn-sõngo. 
Leviticus7:2 B kʋʋda rũnga zĩig ning b sẽn kʋʋd yũ-noog maoongã tɩ maan-kʋʋda raag zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã. 
Leviticus7:3 A na n dɩka kaama fãa n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde: zʋʋrã, kaama sẽn mobg yãadã," 
Leviticus7:4 yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama, zʋ-kɛɛga kaam, kaam ninga sẽn pɛ lʋgã. Naagda sãoora vã-minim la yɩɩma." 
Leviticus7:5 Maan-kʋʋda na n yõog-b lame tɩ b rɩ bugum zãnga Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, yaa yell manegr maoongo." 
Leviticus7:6 Sẽn ya-a rao fãa, n ya maan-kʋʋda tõe n dɩ-a lame. B rɩt-a-la zĩ-sõngẽ tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn ya sõmb wʋsgo." 
Leviticus7:7 Yel-wẽnd dolb maoongo ne yell manegr maoong tũuda sor a ye, b manesma yaa bõn-yɛnga. Kũun ning maan-kʋʋda sẽn dɩk n kos sugrã lebgda maan-kʋʋda pʋɩɩre." 
Leviticus7:8 Maan-kʋʋda sẽn deeg rũng ning fãa n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, yẽ n so a gãongã, maoonga sã n ya yũ-noog maoongo." 
Leviticus7:9 Kũun ninga fãa sẽn kɩɩme, sẽn wʋme, sẽn dõos laagẽ bɩ sẽn dɩgl kud paklga zug, yaa maan-kʋʋd ninga sẽn dɩk-a n kõ Soaala-Wẽnda soolem." 
Leviticus7:10 Kũun fãa sẽn nag ne kaam bɩ sẽn ka ning kaam, n yaool n ka rʋge yaa a Aarõ kamba n so la pʋɩta taab tɩ zemse." 
Leviticus7:11 Ad lagem-n-dɩ maoong sẽn na n maan to-to: 
Leviticus7:12 B sã n naag-a ne maoong a to, wala pẽgr maoongo, maoonga paasda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam n yaool n pa ning bɩll ye, bɩ bur sẽn sõog kaam n yaool n pa ning bɩll ye, bɩ miisdu." 
Leviticus7:13 B Naagdame n wa ne bur sõngo pẽgr maoonga yĩnga. 
Leviticus7:14 B yãkda dɩɩba buud toɛ-toɛ wã n tees Soaala-Wẽnde, wala bãmb pʋɩɩre. Sẽn maan-a maoongã la a rɩk zɩɩma n mesã n so rẽ." 
Leviticus7:15 Nemda dɩta maoonga raar bala, ka keesd bũmb beoog yĩng ye." 
Leviticus7:16 Sã n ya pʋleng pidsgu maoong bɩ yamleoog maoong la b kʋ yã, nemda dɩta maoonga raare la sã n keese, a rɩɩb pa tõt vẽkẽmbeoog ye." 
Leviticus7:17 Nemda sã n maan da-yɩten-daare, b yõogd-a-la bugum zãnga." 
Leviticus7:18 Maoonga sã n kʋ tɩ ra-bitẽ, tɩ fo ket n wãbd a nemd dũnna, fo rẽgemda f menga, fo sãamda f maoonga yel-sõmde, la fo sẽn wãb nemd sẽn sãama, fo tʋka yell f zugu." 
Leviticus7:19 Neong fãa sẽn sɩɩs-a bõn-dẽgdo ka tõe n le wãb ye, b lobd-a-la bugmẽ. Yell sẽn ka be ned ninga zug bal n tõe n wãb maoong nemdo." 
Leviticus7:20 Yell sã n be ned zug t'a wãb maoong neongo, lagem-n-dɩ maoongo, b yiisda a soab buudẽ." 
Leviticus7:21 Ned sã n sɩɩs bõn-dẽgdo, rẽgda yaa ninsaal rẽgd bɩ rũnga, bɩ bũmb a to, n yaool n wãb lagem-n-dɩ maoong nemdo, b yiisda yẽ soab me buudẽ." 
Leviticus7:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus7:23 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Da rɩ-y naafo, pesgo bɩ bʋʋg kaam ye." 
Leviticus7:24 Rũng sã n ki a toore bɩ yaa we-rũng n yõk-a, rũng kãng kaam tõeeme n dɩk n tʋm tʋʋmde la ka tõe n dɩ-a ye." 
Leviticus7:25 Rũng ka kʋʋd yũ-noog maoongo tɩ b le tõog n dɩ a kaama ye. B yiisda sẽn kɩɩs-a n dɩ fãa buudẽ. 
Leviticus7:26 Y sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, y ka tõe n dɩ zɩɩm ye. Yaa rũng rẽnna, yaa luiil rẽnna, y ka tõe n dɩ zɩɩm ye." 
Leviticus7:27 Ned ninga fãa sẽn dɩ-a zɩɩm, b yiisd-a-la Israyɛl buudẽ." 
Leviticus7:28 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus7:29 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n kʋ-a lagem-n-dɩ maoong bɩ a wa ne Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩre. 
Leviticus7:30 Yaa yẽ meng a toore n na n wa ne kũun niyns sẽn na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde: nem-kaama. A naagda ne yãoogã, tɩ yãooga la b reegd n tees Soaala-Wẽnde, maan-kugra zug, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus7:31 Maan-kʋʋda yãkda kaama n yõog maan-kugra zugu la yãooga menga, a Aarõ ne a kamba n so rẽ." 
Leviticus7:32 Y na n paasa maan-kʋʋda rũnga rɩtg gere, wa pʋɩɩr sẽn yãk Soaala-Wẽnd dẽnnẽ." 
Leviticus7:33 Sẽn ya-a rɩtg ger kãng soaala, yaa maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn dɩka zɩɩma la kaama n kõ Soaala-Wẽndã." 
Leviticus7:34 Israyɛl kamba sã n kʋ rũng lagem-n-dɩ yĩnga, mam a Naaba-Wẽnd n so yãoogã ne gerã la mam dɩkd-b lame n kõt a Aarõ ne a kamba, la rẽ yaa noor a Israyɛl sẽn na n deeg zamaan woo zamaana." 
Leviticus7:35 Woto n yɩt pʋɩɩr ning a Aarõ ne a kamba sẽn na n deeg Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩrẽ, b sã n paam maan-kʋʋra tõog fãa." 
Leviticus7:36 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd modgd Israyɛl kamba tɩ b kõ b maan-kʋʋdba b sẽn taag-b kaam daare tɩ b reeg maan-kʋʋr naam la rẽ yaa noor a Israyɛl kamb sẽn na n gãd zamaan woo zamaana. 
Leviticus7:37 Yaa woto me la b kõt kũuni la b kʋʋd yũ-noog maoongo, yel-wẽnd dolb maoongo, yell manegr maoongo, naam deegr maoongo la laafi kosgo bɩ lagem-n-dɩ maoongo." 
Leviticus7:38 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd wilg a Moyiiz Sinayi tãnga zugu b sẽn waa n yeel Israyɛl kamba we-raoogẽ tɩ b wa ne kũuni n kõ bãmba. 
Leviticus8:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Leviticus8:2 «Bool a Aarõ ne a kamba sɛka roog noore. Kɩt tɩ b wa ne fu-sõma wã, ne kaam-sõngã, ne loalg ning sẽn na n kʋ yel-wẽnd sugr paoong yɩngã, ne pe-raad a yi la bura sẽn ka ning bɩlle n tẽg ne peoogã." 
Leviticus8:3 Tigim a Israyɛl kamba fãa sɛka roog noore.» 
Leviticus8:4 A Moyiiz deega Soaala-Wẽnd noore, la neba tigma taab sɛka roog noor." 
Leviticus8:5 A Moyiiz yeel-b lame t'a na n maana Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet t'a maan bũmb ninga. 
Leviticus8:6 A kɩtame t'a Aarõ ne a kamba kolg t'a so-b koom. 
Leviticus8:7 A Moyiiz yeelga a Aarõ fu-wokã, n sẽbg a sɛɛga, n yeelg-a fu-mismiuugã ne fu-bãg-vɩɩdã la a loe-la a poorẽ wã sãnem-pɛ-m-poorã." 
Leviticus8:8 A rɩka sãnem-pɛ-m-yãooga me n sog-a la a suii b sẽn tar n bʋgd b mens Soaala-Wẽnd taoorã, n mi Soaala leokr yaa n-yẽe bɩ ayoo." 
Leviticus8:9 A vila a zuga peende n mobg-a ne sãnem paklgã. Yẽ la pugl sõng buud Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Leviticus8:10 A Moyiiz rɩka ka-sõng n taag roogã la bũmb ninga fãa sẽn da be a pʋgẽ. 
Leviticus8:11 A mesa maan-kugra naoor a yopoe n yaool n taag-a kaam ne a teeda fãa tɩ b na n lebg bõn-sõma, n paas ko-sĩnga ne a roaglga." 
Leviticus8:12 A kɩrga kaam a Aarõ zugu n dɩk-a n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus8:13 A Moyiiz yaool n kɩtame t'a Aarõ kamba kolge t'a yeelg-b futu, n sẽbg-b seese, n ning-b pugli, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg-a." 
Leviticus8:14 A kɩtame tɩ b wa ne lʋllã, yel-wẽn sugr kosg maoonga rũngã. A Aarõ ne a kamba tika a zug ne b nusi," 
Leviticus8:15 t'a Moyiiz kodg-a. A tẽka a nug-bil zɩɩmẽ wã n taag maan-kugra yɩdba, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pek a rẽgd buud fãa la a raaga zɩɩma maan-kugra sɛɛga. Yɩɩ woto la maan-kugra welg toore n lebg bõn-sõngo tɩ b na n wat n kʋʋd a zugu sugr kosg maandã." 
Leviticus8:16 A Moyiiz yãka kaama fãa sẽn gãneg yãada zugẽ, n yãk sãoora, yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama la a yõog-b-la bugum maan-kugra zugu." 
Leviticus8:17 Lʋlla menga, a gãongo, a nemdã, a bĩndã, b zãaga sikã n yõog-ba, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Leviticus8:18 A Moyiiz kɩtame tɩ b kolg ne yũ-noog maoonga pe-raoogo. A Aarõ ne a kamba tika pesga zug ne b nusi 
Leviticus8:19 t'a Moyiiz kodg-a. A raaga a zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã. 
Leviticus8:20 A sɩɩga rũngã n bees-a n kɩt tɩ b yõog zugã, wilsã la kaama." 
Leviticus8:21 A peka koomẽ yãadã, karsã, la a yõoga pesgã tõre maan-kugra zugu. Bugum n na n dɩ maoong kãnga zãnga t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus8:22 A kɩtame tɩ b wa ne pesg a to wã, naam deegr maoonga pesgo. A Aarõ ne a kamba rɩka b nus n tik a zugu," 
Leviticus8:23 a Moyiiz kʋ-a lame n yãk a zɩɩma bilfu n taag a Aarõ rɩtg tʋbre, n taag a rɩtg nug-raoogo, a rɩtg nao-raoogo." 
Leviticus8:24 A kɩtame marsã t'a Aarõ kamba kolge t'a yãk zɩɩma n taag b rɩtg tʋba, b rɩtg nug-raado, b rɩtg nao-raado. Dẽ poore a Moyiiz daaga zɩɩma n gilg maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus8:25 A rɩka kaama, zʋʋrã, kaama sẽn gãneg yãada zugã, sãoorã, yɩɩm a yiibã ne b kaama la rɩtg gerã." 
Leviticus8:26 Peoog ning sẽn dɩg Soaala-Wẽnd taoora pʋga a yãka bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle, n paas samsa, miisdu, la a rogl-b-la kaama la rɩtg gera zugu." 
Leviticus8:27 N dɩk rẽ fãa n ning a Aarõ ne a kamba nusẽ tɩ b naag taaba n tees Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus8:28 A Moyiiz le reeg-b lame n yõog bugum. Dẽ yɩɩ naam deegr maoong, yũ-noog maoongo, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus8:29 A Moyiiz dɩka yãoogã n tees Soaala-Wẽnde la rẽ yɩɩ yẽ pʋɩɩre, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg-a." 
Leviticus8:30 A Moyiiz yaool n dɩka kaama la zɩɩma sẽn da be maan-kugra zugu n mes a Aarõ ne a kambã, a fut la a kamba futu. Woto a rɩka a Aarõ ne a futã n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. N dɩk a kamba ne b futã n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus8:31 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ ne a kamba: «Rʋgl-y nemdã sɛka roog noore. Yaa beenẽ la y na n wãb nemdã n naag ne burã sẽn be peooga pʋga, tɩ yaa woto la m da yeel yã: ‹A Aarõ ne a kamba n na n dɩ ba.›" 
Leviticus8:32 Sẽn kellã, nemdã la burã, los-y-b bugmẽ." 
Leviticus8:33 Dasem a yopoe tõre y ka na n zãag ne sɛka dignoor ye tɩ y naam deegr kibsa wa baase, la a kaoosda dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus8:34 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele tɩ m maan wa m sẽn maan dũnna wã n kos sugr y yĩnga," 
Leviticus8:35 la dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, wĩndig la yʋngo, y na n paa sɛka rignoorẽ. Dẽ poor marsã la y na tõog n sɩng y maan-kʋʋra tʋʋmde la y kõn ki ye. Yaa woto la b wilg-ma.»" 
Leviticus8:36 A Aarõ ne a kamba maana Wẽnnaam sẽn togs-b bũmb ning fãa ne a Moyiiz noore. 
Leviticus9:1 A nii daarã, a Moyiiz boola a Aarõ, a kambã la kãsem-dãmbã." 
Leviticus9:2 A yeela a Aarõ: «Yõk nag-bil n kʋ maoong yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la f yõk pe-raoogo n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo. Nag-bilã wala pesgã tog n yɩɩ sõmb zãnga, tɩ f tall-ba n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus9:3 Dẽ poore yeel Israyɛl kamba: ‹Wa-y ne boɛɛg n kʋ yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo; wa-y ne nag-bila la pe-bila sẽn zems yʋʋmd a ye la sẽn ya sõng zãnga n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo; 
Leviticus9:4 wa-y ne loalga la pe-raoogo n kʋ Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, tɩ y wa lagem-n-dɩ. Wa-y ne kũuni, zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Rũnna, Soaala-Wẽnd na n lika b menga.› »" 
Leviticus9:5 B talla a Moyiiz sẽn yeela fãa n wa sɛka roog noor tɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa kolg Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. 
Leviticus9:6 T'a Moyiiz yeel-ba: «Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ y maan bũmb ninga n paam n yãend b ziirã.» 
Leviticus9:7 A yeela a Aarõ: «Kolg maan-kugrã, kʋ maandã f sẽn tog n kʋ f meng yĩngã, sugr kosgo la yũ-noog maoongã. Maan Soaala taoore sugr kosga sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa. Yaool marsã n kʋ buuda maoong la f kos sugr a yĩnga la maan fãa tɩ tũ wala m sẽn wilg fooma.»" 
Leviticus9:8 A Aarõ kolga maan-kugrã n kʋ nag-bila a meng yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga. 
Leviticus9:9 A kamba kolga ne zɩɩma t'a tẽk a nug-bil n taag maan-kugra yɩdba n yaool n daag sẽn ketã maan-kugra sɛɛgẽ. 
Leviticus9:10 Rũng ninga sẽn kʋ yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, yẽ kaama, a yɩɩma ne b kaama la sãoorã, a Aarõ yõog-b-la bugum maan-kugra zugu, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Leviticus9:11 Nemda la gãongã, a yõog-b-la we-kɛɛnga." 
Leviticus9:12 A kʋʋ yũ-noog maoongã t'a Aarõ kamba wa ne zɩɩma t'a raag-a n gilg maan-kugrã. 
Leviticus9:13 B kɩs-a-la rũnga nemd b sẽn beesã n paas zugã t'a yõog-b maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus9:14 B peka yãada la karsã n yõog bãmb me maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus9:15 B waa ne zãma wã kũuni. A reega boɛɛga n kʋ-a yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga wala a sẽn zoe n maane. 
Leviticus9:16 A kɩtame tɩ b kolg ne yũ-noog maoongã la a maana wa sẽn segde. 
Leviticus9:17 B waa ne zoma t'a yõng ne a nug n lob bugmẽ, maan-kugra zugu, t'a rɩ bugum wala yibeoog maoongo." 
Leviticus9:18 A kʋʋ loalga la pe-raoogã, yɩɩ maan-dɩtga zãma wã yĩnga. A Aarõ kamba kɩs-a-la zɩɩma t'a raag-a n gilg maan-kugrã." 
Leviticus9:19 Loalga la pe-raooga kaama, a zʋʋrã ne a kaama, yɩɩma, sãoorã," 
Leviticus9:20 b yõog-b-la maan-kugra zugu. 
Leviticus9:21 A Aarõ rɩka rɩtg gerã la rũms a yiiba yãoog n tees Soaala-Wẽnde, wala sugr kosga sẽn dat t'a maan la wala b sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Leviticus9:22 A Aarõ yaool n zẽka a nug marsa n ning neba barka. A sẽn kʋ maandã n sɛ, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo, yũ-noog maoongo, laafi kosg maoongo, a sigame." 
Leviticus9:23 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ kẽe sɛka roogẽ n lɛɛg n yi n ning zãma wã barka. Soaala-Wẽnd puka b ziir neba fãa gill nifẽ. 
Leviticus9:24 Bugum n yi Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n dɩ maoongã la kaama sẽn dɩgl maan-kugra zugã. Zãma wã kelma sũ-noogo la a wõgemda tẽnga. 
Leviticus10:1 A Aarõ kamba, a Nadab la a Abiyu, rɩka b tɩdar laase. Bugum la tɩdar zom la b ning b pʋsẽ. B taa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n na n n wis-ba, la Soaala-Wẽnd yaool n da ka kos b rẽ ye." 
Leviticus10:2 Dẽ la bugum me yi Naaba-Wẽnd taoore n zomb-ba la b kiime. 
Leviticus10:3 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ: «Soaala-Wẽnd da ka pĩnd n yeele: M datame tɩ sẽn kolgd-b maama bãng m waoogre, m datame tɩ m yʋʋra paam pẽgre buuda fãa taoore.» A Aarõ pa tõog n leok tɩ bũmb ye." 
Leviticus10:4 A Moyiiz boola a Mikayɛl ne a Elisafã, a Uziyɛl kamba, a Aarõ ba bil kamba, la a yeel-b lame: «Wa-y n dɩk-y y saam-biisã n zãag ne Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr do-sõngã, tall-y-ba n dig we-kɛɛnga.»" 
Leviticus10:5 B kolgame n pil-b futu n tall-b n yi we-kɛɛnga, wala a Moyiiz sẽn da yeele." 
Leviticus10:6 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ ne a kambã, a Elazar la Itamar: «Da yidg-y y zoobdo la ra kẽes-y y fut n wilg tɩ y rɩta kʋʋr ye tɩ pa rẽ y na ki la y na tak Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puur zãma wã zugu. Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd bugma sẽn dɩ b rãmba kʋʋre, yaa neba taabã n na n kelem-a, ka yãmb ye." 
Leviticus10:7 Da zãag-y ne sɛka roog ye, ka rẽ y na ki, b zɛ yãmb ne naam kaam, ne Soaala-Wẽnd kaam.» La b maana wala a Moyiiz sẽn yeelã." 
Leviticus10:8 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Aarõ: 
Leviticus10:9 «Yãmb sã n wat sɛka roogẽ, foom ne f kambã, da yũ-y rãam buud ye tɩ woto y kõn ki ye. Yaa noor f kambã sẽn na n deeg wakat buud fãa." 
Leviticus10:10 Da yũ-y rãam y sã n tog n wilg sẽn ya sõmbo n bak ne sẽn ka sõmbo, n wilg n bak Wẽnd bũmbu la bõn-zaalle, n wilg bũmb sẽn dẽgemd ninsaala la sẽn ka rẽgemd-a." 
Leviticus10:11 Da yũ-y rãam y sã n tog n zãms Israyɛl kamba m sẽn taas-y noy niynsã ne a Moyiiz noor ye.» 
Leviticus10:12 A Moyiiz yeela a Aarõ ne a kamba sẽn keesã, a Elazar la a Itamar: «Rɩk-y zoma b sẽn tall n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde n keesã n maan bur sẽn ka ning bɩll ye la y rɩ-ba, maan-kugra sɛɛga tɩ yaa rɩɩb sẽn ya sõmbo," 
Leviticus10:13 la rɩɩba zĩig ka tog n yɩ yaar ye, ya zĩ sõngẽ bala, tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yãk b meng pʋɩɩrẽ n kõt foo ne f kamba la rẽ yaa bãmb meng noore b sẽn kõ maam." 
Leviticus10:14 Rũng fãa a Israyɛl kamba sẽn kõ laafi kosg yĩnga tɩ b reeg a yãoogã la a ger n tees Soaala-Wẽnde, bãng-y tɩ y tõe n wãba nemd kãnga. Bao-y zĩig sẽn ya sõngo n wãb-a, foo ne f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli. Yaa pʋɩɩr sẽn yãk Soaala-Wẽnd dẽnnẽ yãmb yĩnga." 
Leviticus10:15 Gera b sẽn yãkã la yãoogã b sẽn naag ne kaama n tees Soaala-Wẽndã, bãmb me yaa foo ne f kamba soolem, b sã n dɩk ba n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd n sɛ. La rẽ yaa noor sẽn ka tõe n viigi, m sẽn paam Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ.»" 
Leviticus10:16 A Moyiiz waa n sokame n na n bãng b sẽn maan bũmb ning ne boɛɛgã b sẽn kʋ zãma wã yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩngã. A waa n bãngame tɩ b yõog-a-la bugum. Woto a sũur puuga ne a Elazar la a Itamar, a Aarõ kamba sẽn kellã." 
Leviticus10:17 A sok-b lame tɩ yaa bõe yĩng la b pa rɩ-a Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra zĩ-sõngẽ? Yaa bõn-sõng la b kõ yãmb n na n pek zãma wã rẽgdo, la b kos Soaala-Wẽnd sugri zãma wã yĩnga." 
Leviticus10:18 Bʋ-kãnga zɩɩma sẽn pa tall n kẽ rooga pʋga, yãmb da tog n dɩ-a-la Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngẽ, wala m sẽn da yeelã." 
Leviticus10:19 Ad-a Aarõ sẽn leoke: «Yaa yũ-noog la sugr kosg maoong la tõnd kõ Soaala-Wẽnd dũnna, la fo nee yell ning sẽn baas n pak-ma. M sũ-sãanga pʋgẽ, m na le tõog n noog m sũur Soaala-Wẽnd taoor ne maanda dɩɩb sɩda?»" 
Leviticus10:20 A Moyiiz wʋmame la a gesame tɩ leokra wẽnda sõmbo, la a reegame." 
Leviticus11:1 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ 
Leviticus11:2 tɩ b yeel a Israyɛl kamba woto: Ad tẽng zug rũmsa sʋka, yãmb sẽn tõe n wãb b rãmba." 
Leviticus11:3 Rũng ninga fãa sẽn tara nao-beong sẽn welg a yi, la sẽn wãbd yamdo n bʋgsdẽ, yãmb tõe n wãba rũng kãnga." 
Leviticus11:4 Y pa tõe n wãb rũng nao-beong sẽn welg a yi bala bɩ sẽn bʋgsda yamd bal ye. Bũmb a yiiba yaa tɩlɛ. Woto wã y na gesa wa rũng sẽn ya rẽgdo: yʋgemde, a bʋgsda yamdo la a nao-beong ka welg a yiib ye." 
Leviticus11:5 Marawa me ya boto, a bʋgsda yamdo la a ka tar nao-beong ye." 
Leviticus11:6 Ges-y soaamba wala rũng y sẽn pa tõe n wãb ye. A bʋgsda yamdo la a nao-beong ka welg a yi ye. 
Leviticus11:7 Ges-y kurkuri wala rẽgdo; a nao-beong welga a yi, yaa sɩda, la a ka bʋgsd yamd ye." 
Leviticus11:8 Ges-y-ba wa rũms y sẽn ka tõe n sɩɩs ye; da wãb-y b nemd ye n tʋk yelle y zug ye; b sã n ki bɩ y ra sɩɩs-b ye. 
Leviticus11:9 Ad koomẽ bõn-vɩɩli y sẽn tõe n wãbe: yaa sẽn be-b koomẽ, mogrẽ bɩ kʋɩlsẽ, n tar legbre la pagdo." 
Leviticus11:10 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn ka tar legbre, bɩ pagdo, n yaool n vɩ koomẽ, mogrẽ bɩ kʋɩlsẽ, ges-y b fãa gill wa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:11 Ges-y-b wa bõn-dẽgdo la y ra wãb-b ye la y ra pẽneg b kũum ye. 
Leviticus11:12 Bũmb ninga fãa sẽn vɩ-a koomẽ n ka tar pagdo bɩ legbre, ges-y bãmb fãa wala rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:13 Ad luiili wã sʋka y sẽn na n ges b rãmb wala rẽgdo, n ka na n wãb-ba, b sẽn ya rẽgda yĩnga: pa-nand-tugri, wɩbga, sɩl-faoogo," 
Leviticus11:14 bõn-poag-wɩbga, kosenkonde," 
Leviticus11:15 gãoobg buud fãa," 
Leviticus11:16 na-neoongo, viuugu, ka-ra-la-m-zomda, sɩls buud toor toore," 
Leviticus11:17 viuug-luiila, koom-daoogo, kos-ki," 
Leviticus11:18 faoogo, salsanga, yɩbrgo" 
Leviticus11:19 nok-naaba, raong buud toor-toore, bulwãoogo la zanga." 
Leviticus11:20 Rũm-bõonesa sẽn tar pɩgs la sẽn kẽnd ne nao a naase: ges-y-b wala bõn-dẽgdo. 
Leviticus11:21 Bãmb sʋka, yãmb sẽn tõe n wãb b rãmba yaa: sẽn tar b gɛ, n tõe n tão n yɩke." 
Leviticus11:22 Y sẽn tõe n wãb b rãmba yaa sʋʋr buudu, sʋ-warõngo, kalwaare, mogdr-zẽenga." 
Leviticus11:23 Bõn-yɩgdi a taaba sẽn kẽnd ne nao a naase, ges-y-b wa bõn-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:24 Y sã n sɩɩs rũms kẽere, y tʋkda yell y zugu, y rẽgemda y mens n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:25 B sã n ki, tɩ fo tʋk-ba, yaa modgr tɩ f pek f futã la f na n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:26 Ges-y rũms niyns sẽn tar-b nao-beong sẽn ka welg a yi la sẽn ka bʋgsd yamdo wala rũng sẽn ya rẽgdo; fo sã n sɩɩs-ba, fo tʋkda yell f zugu." 
Leviticus11:27 Rũng ninga fãa sẽn tara nao a naase n yaool n ka tar nao-beongo, ges-y rũng kãng wala rũng sẽn ya rẽgdo; a ki tɩ f sɩɩs-a, f lebgda rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:28 B sã n ki tɩ f tʋk-ba, f tog n peka f futã la f na n kell n paa ne rẽgdo n ta zaabre. B yaa rũms yãmb sẽn ka tõe n sɩɩse." 
Leviticus11:29 Ad tẽng zug rũms a taab sɩɩsg sẽn kisi: sãbtõaasga, dũm-tula, wʋʋga, wiuugu la sẽn wẽnd b bãmba," 
Leviticus11:30 kõskõogo, bãngenlegsre, sẽnemde, gomtɩʋʋgo, weoogẽ-dao-a-kõbre." 
Leviticus11:31 Yaa rũms bãmba buud fãa la y tog n ges wala rẽgdo. B sã n ki n sɛ, tɩ fo sɩɩs-ba fo rẽgemda f meng n tãag zaabre." 
Leviticus11:32 B sã n ki bũmb pʋgẽ, bõn-kãng me lebga rẽgdo: raoog laoko, fuugu, gãongo, yolgo, sẽn ya teoog ning fãa. Bõn-kãng losda koomẽ la a na n kell n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre; zaabr sã n ta, a lebga te-sõngo." 
Leviticus11:33 Sã n yaa tãnd laok pʋga la a lʋɩ yã, laok kãng wãadame la bũmb ning fãa sẽn da be a pʋgẽ lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:34 Sã n dɩk koom sẽn da be laok kãng pʋga n kiig rɩɩb sẽn ka kis rɩɩbo, rɩɩba lebgda kisgu. Sã n kiig-a bõn-yũudr sẽn da ka kis yũubu, bõn-kãng yũub lebga kisgu, ba a be sãnem laokẽ." 
Leviticus11:35 Bõn-kɩɩnga sẽn sɩɩs bũmb ning fãa lebgda rẽgdo; wʋnga, bug-rʋko, tog n wãame tɩ b lebga rẽgdo la b na n dẽgma yãmba." 
Leviticus11:36 Sã n ya bãkẽ, bulgẽ bɩ kʋɩlg pʋg la bõn-kɩɩng lʋɩ yã, a ka rẽgemd-b ye. Sã n ya ned n sɩɩs-ba, a soab rẽgemdame." 
Leviticus11:37 Bõn-kɩɩng sã n sɩɩs ka-buudu, a ka rẽgemd-a ye," 
Leviticus11:38 kood sã n madg koom n na n dɩ bɩ n na n dʋge tɩ bõn-kɩɩng lʋɩ a zugu, ges-y kooda wa bõn-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:39 La yãmb sẽn dɩt rũms niynsa sã n wa ki tɩ yãmb sɩɩs-ba, y paada ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:40 Fo sã n wãb a nemdo, fo na n peka f futã la fo na n kell n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre. Sẽn tʋka bõn-kɩɩnga tog n peka a futu la a me paada ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus11:41 Rũms kɩdsa fãa sẽn kẽnd tẽng zugu, yaa bõn-dẽgdo, da wãb-y-b ye." 
Leviticus11:42 Bõn-kɩdsa la bõn-yooda fãa sẽn kẽnd tẽng zugu, yaa ne nao a naas bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, da wãb-y-b ye tɩ b yaa bõn-dẽgdo." 
Leviticus11:43 Da rẽgem-y y mens ne-b ye, da bas-y tɩ b sɩɩs-y ye." 
Leviticus11:44 Yaa maam la yãmb Soaala-Wẽnde rũnda la beoogo; yãmb na n yɩlga y mense n legb sõma tɩ mam yaa sõngo, da leb-y n dẽgem y mense ne bõn-yaals sẽn vuud tẽng ye." 
Leviticus11:45 Yaa maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga n lebg yãmb Soaala. Dɩlla yɩɩ-y sõma tɩ mam yaa sõngo. 
Leviticus11:46 Woto la noorã m sẽn kõt yãmb rũmsa poorẽ, luiili wã poorẽ, koomẽ dũmsi la tẽng zug rũms poorẽ." 
Leviticus11:47 Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ y bãng n welg bõn-dẽgd la bõn-sõngo. Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ n welg sẽn tõe n wãb la sẽn ka tõe n wãbe. 
Leviticus12:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus12:2 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Pag sã n dɩk pʋg n dog bi-ribla, a ges a meng wa rẽgdo dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, wala a kiuug yãeeb wakato." 
Leviticus12:3 Dasem a nii daare, b kẽesda bi-pɛɛlga bãongo." 
Leviticus12:4 La paga na n gũu dasem pis-tã la a tã n paam n peke. A ra sɩɩs bũmb sẽn ya sõng ye, a ra kẽ Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngẽ, n taa a pekra daare." 
Leviticus12:5 A sã n dog bi-pugla, a yaa rẽgd wala a kiuug yãeebo la rasma na n tonga piig la a naase; paga na n gũu dasem pisoob la a yoobe n paam n peke." 
Leviticus12:6 A pekra raar sã n pidi, a biiga yaa rao bɩ paga, a talld-a lame n wa maan-kʋʋd taoore, sɛka roog noore, ne yʋʋm yɛng pesgo, yũ-noog maoong yĩnga, la malwall a ye bɩ wall a ye, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus12:7 Maan-kʋʋda deegda kũuna n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde la a kos sugri t'a tɩlg ne a rẽgdo. Woto yaa noore, pag sẽn tog n deeg, a biig rogem poore, a biiga ya bi-ribl bɩ bi-pugla." 
Leviticus12:8 A sã n ka tõe n paam ligd n da pesgo, bɩ a wa ne wal a yiibu bɩ malwal a yiibu tɩ b kʋ a ye, yũ-noog maoongo, n kʋ a to wã yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo. Maan-kʋʋda na n kosa sugri t'a tɩlg ne a rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: 
Leviticus13:2 «Ned sã n wa mik t'a yĩng lobg yũuri, bɩ dasempʋɩɩga, bɩ a yãka zĩig n pɩnda, a soab yĩnga tara bãaga. Woto b talld-a lame n kẽng maan-kʋʋda Aarõ nengẽ bɩ a biig a ye nengẽ." 
Leviticus13:3 Maan-kʋʋda geta a yĩnga gãongo. A sã n mik tɩ kõbgã pelgame, la zĩ-kãng võtame, a bãngdame tɩ bãag n pukdi. Maan-kʋʋda sã n ges-a n sɛ, a wilgd-a lame t'a lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:4 Gãonga sã n yãk zĩig n pɩnda, n ya pɛɛlga, la zĩiga yaool n ka võd tɩ b neẽ, la kõbga me ka peel boto ye, maan-kʋʋda baooda zĩiga n kẽes nedã t'a pa be dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:5 Daar a yopoe soabã, a lebd n ges-a lame. A sã n yãenda ne a meng nini tɩ bũmb ka paase, a kelld n bas-a-la be dasem a yopoe yɛsa." 
Leviticus13:6 Sã n maan dasem a yopoe, a lebd n ges-a lame. A sã n mik tɩ bãaga leba poorẽ, tɩ gãonga ka le pɩnda, maan-kʋʋda yet-a lame t'a ka le ya rẽgd ye: yaa rasempʋɩɩg bala. Bãada pekda a fut n lebg yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:7 A sã n wa mik tɩ maan-kʋʋda gesg poore bãaga baas n dabda taoore, a lebda a nengẽ yɛsa." 
Leviticus13:8 Maan-kʋʋda get-a lame la a sã n sɩd yãe tɩ bãaga paasame, a wilgda bãada t'a bẽeda yĩnga la a yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:9 Ned sã n yãe tɩ bũmb pukd a yĩnga, bɩ a kẽng maan-kʋʋda nengẽ." 
Leviticus13:10 Maan-kʋʋda get-a lame la a sã n ne tɩ gãonga wukame, n ya pɛɛlga, tɩ kõbga me ya pɛɛlga, la yĩnga yãka zĩig n maan nodre," 
Leviticus13:11 a bãng t'a bãaga kẽe pãafo. A ka baood zĩig n ning-a ye, tɩ sãmbg ka ye, a yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:12 Bãaga sã n gãneg yũya, yĩnga tõre, n yi zug n sig nao, f sẽn ges zĩig ning fãa, yaa kud-kuda," 
Leviticus13:13 maan-kʋʋda geta bãadã la a sẽn ne tɩ bãaga sãaga a yĩnga tõrã, a wilgd-a lame t'a ka rẽgd ye, a yĩnga fãa sẽn pelga yĩnga." 
Leviticus13:14 Yaa gãonga sẽn mɛdg raare tɩ nemsa tonnẽ la a lebgd rẽgdo. 
Leviticus13:15 Maan-kʋʋda sã n yãe nodrã, a wilgda bãada t'a yaa rẽgdo, tɩ nodr yaa rẽgdo: yaa yĩng bãaga." 
Leviticus13:16 A yĩnga sã n le lɛɛg n pelg bɩ bãada ta maan-kʋʋda nengẽ. 
Leviticus13:17 Maan-kʋʋda lebd n ges-a lame la a sã n mik tɩ gãonga tabendame n lebg pɛɛlga bɩ a wilg bãada t'a ka le ya rẽgd ye. 
Leviticus13:18 Ned yĩng sã n lob yũuri, la yũura waa n maagame," 
Leviticus13:19 la a soaba gesame n mik tɩ yũura zĩigẽ gãonga wukame n ya pɛɛl-pɛɛl bɩ miid-miidu, a soaba babs maan-kʋʋda." 
Leviticus13:20 La yẽ na n ges-a lame la a sã n mik tɩ gãonga võdame, tɩ kõbda pelge, a wilgd-a lame t'a yaa rẽgdo. Bãaga kẽe pãaf n lobg yũuri pipi soaba zĩigẽ." 
Leviticus13:21 Maan-kʋʋda sã n ka yãe kõb-peendo, a sã n ka yãe tɩ gãonga võtame, a yãeeme bal t'a sobdame, a baooda zĩig n ning bãadã t'a pa be dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:22 A sã n mik tɩ bãaga kẽnga taoore, a wilgda bãadã t'a yaa rẽgdo, t'a tara yĩng bãaga." 
Leviticus13:23 Yũura sẽn da pɩnna sã n ka paase, a yaa nod dãoongo bala. Maan-kʋʋda wilgda a soab t'a pa le ya rẽgd ye." 
Leviticus13:24 Bugum sã n yõog ned tɩ lebg nodre, tɩ zĩig yãk n pɩnda, n ya pɛɛlg bɩ pɛɛlg la moomde," 
Leviticus13:25 a soab kẽng tɩ maan-kʋʋda gese. A sã n mik tɩ kõbda pelgame, a sã n ne vẽenega tɩ yĩnga võtame, a bãng tɩ yaa bãaga n tũ bugma n yẽege, maan-kʋʋda na n wilg-a lame t'a yaa rẽgdo tɩ yaa yĩng bãag la a bẽeda." 
Leviticus13:26 Maan-kʋʋda sã n ges la a pa yãe kõbd sẽn ya pɛɛl ye, a ka yãe tɩ yĩnga võtame ye, a neeme bal t'a soba bilfu, a baooda zĩig n paalg bãada be, a ye, dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:27 A yopoe raarã, a lebd n ges-a lame la a sã n mik tɩ bãaga kẽnga taoore, a wilgd-a lame t'a yaa rẽgdo, yaa yĩn-gãong bãaga la a bẽeda." 
Leviticus13:28 A sã n mik tɩ bãaga ka kẽng taoore, gãonga sã n lɛɛg n sobda, nodra yaa bugma n wa ne yĩnga wukri. Maan-kʋʋda wilgd-a bãada t'a ka rẽgem ye, yaa bugum n dɩ tɩ maan nod-dãong bala." 
Leviticus13:29 Rao bɩ pag sã n tar nodre a zugẽ bɩ a lemdẽ," 
Leviticus13:30 maan-kʋʋda geta bãadã la a sã n mik tɩ gãonga võdame, tɩ kõbda lebg kar-kare la kõodr-kõodre, a wilgda nedã t'a yaa rẽgdo. Yaa rasempʋɩɩga, yaa zug bɩ lemd rasempʋɩɩga." 
Leviticus13:31 Maan-kʋʋda sã n ges n ka yãe tɩ gãonga võdame, n pa yãe kõbd sẽn ya sabl me ye, a baooda zĩig n ning bãadã dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:32 A yopoe daarã, a geta bãadã la a sã n mik tɩ rasempʋɩɩga ka yɛdg n paase la kõbda ka kõodr-kõodre la gãonga me ka võde," 
Leviticus13:33 a kɩtdame t'a põng a zugu; a põngdame n gilg rasempʋɩɩgã la a le basd-a-la rasem a yopoe. 
Leviticus13:34 A yopoe daarã a wat n gesame la a sã n mik tɩ dasempʋɩɩga ka paase, tɩ yĩnga gãong ka võde, maan-kʋʋda wilgd-a lame t'a ka rẽgem ye. A sã n pek a futã, a lebgda yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:35 Tõeeme tɩ rẽ poore bɩ rasempʋɩɩga le yãnge. 
Leviticus13:36 Maan-kʋʋda get-a lame la a sã n mik tɩ dasempʋɩɩga yãngame, a yeta bãada t'a yaa rẽgdo la a ka le yɛs n get kõbga sã n ya kõodr ye." 
Leviticus13:37 Dasempʋɩɩga sã n ka yɛdge, tɩ kõbda lebg n yit sabla, rẽ wilgdame tɩ bãaga sãoogame, bãada ka tar rẽgd ye la maan-kʋʋda na n wilg-a lame t'a yaa yɩlemde." 
Leviticus13:38 Pag bɩ rao yĩng sã n yãk zĩig n lobd pɛɛl-pɛɛla," 
Leviticus13:39 bɩ maan-kʋʋda ges-a. A sã n mik tɩ gãonga peelma ka looge, a bãng tɩ yaa yĩn-firsendu. Bãada pa rẽgem ye." 
Leviticus13:40 Ned zug zoobd sã n dʋʋgdẽ, yaa zu-kõogo, a soaba ka rẽgem ye." 
Leviticus13:41 Sã n ya dĩira zoobd n dʋʋge, yaa dĩir zoob-kõogo, a ka rẽgem ye." 
Leviticus13:42 La zugã bɩ dĩirã sã n lobd pɛɛlg la moomde, a bãng tɩ yaa bãag n dɩt a zugã bɩ a dĩirã." 
Leviticus13:43 Maan-kʋʋda get-a lame, la a sã n mik tɩ zuga loba kõbd pɛɛla la mooma," 
Leviticus13:44 a bãng tɩ neda yaa bãada la a yaa rẽgdo, a tara zug noad bãaga." 
Leviticus13:45 Sẽn bẽeda yĩng bãaga yeelgda fu-kʋɩdse la a ka ningd pugl ye. A na n luda a noore n kẽnd la a kelemdẽ: M yaa rẽgdo, m yaa rẽgdo!" 
Leviticus13:46 A sẽn ket n bẽed a bãaga wakat ning fãa, a yaa rẽgdo la rẽ yĩnga a welgda toore. A tiida a yir we-kɛɛnga." 
Leviticus13:47 Ad-y yaa bugd bãaga la fuug me bẽeda, fuuga sã n wa lobd kẽega, n lobd miuugu. Tõe n yɩɩ pe-kõbd bɩ beren-dɩgr fuugu," 
Leviticus13:48 peend sẽn wʋg niirẽ bɩ ne bãn-gõdse, gãong fuug bɩ fuug sẽn zap ne gãongo." 
Leviticus13:49 Peenda bɩ gãongã sã n wa lebgd kẽeg bɩ moomde, yaa peend sẽn wʋg niirẽ bɩ ne bãn-gõdse, ad-y yaa bugd bãaga la a bẽeda. Maan-kʋʋd la b na n bool t'a wa gese." 
Leviticus13:50 Maan-kʋʋda na n gesa põogrã la a bao zĩig n bĩng fuugã tɩ maan dasem a yopoe. 
Leviticus13:51 A yopoe daarã, a sã n mik tɩ fuuga põogra paasame, yaa peen sẽn wʋg niirẽ bɩ ne bãn-gõdse, fuug sẽn zap ne gãongo, sẽn ya fuug buud fãa, a bãng tɩ yaa bãag sẽn tõe n longe; fuuga lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus13:52 B na n loba fuuga bugmẽ, a yaa peend sẽn wʋg niirẽ bɩ ne bãn-gõdse bɩ yaa gãongo, tɩ b bẽeda bã-longdem la b tog n yõoga bugum." 
Leviticus13:53 Maan-kʋʋda sã n ges n mik tɩ bãaga pa kẽng taoore," 
Leviticus13:54 a kɩtdame tɩ b pek fuugã, a sẽn ya-a a soab fãa, la b bao zĩig n bĩng tɩ ta dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus13:55 Fuuga sã n pek tɩ b ges n mik tɩ bũmb ka teem ye, wẽng ka paas ye, fuuga baas n yaa rẽgdo. F na lob-a bugmẽ, tɩ bãaga rɩ-la a nen-sõngã la a nen-wẽngã." 
Leviticus13:56 Maan-kʋʋda sã n ges n mik tɩ pekra poore põogra zĩig lobda sabla, peenda bɩ gãongã, a wolgd-a lame." 
Leviticus13:57 Bũmb sã n le lɛɛg n puk fuuga zugu, fuuga peend yaa peend sẽn wʋg niirẽ bɩ ne bãn-gõdse, bɩ yaa gãongo, a sẽn wʋg ne bũmb ning fãa, yaa bugdã n dɩt-a n dabda. Dẽnd b yõog fuugã." 
Leviticus13:58 Sã n pek fuugã, peena, gãongã, n mik tɩ bugda sɛɛme, b lebd n pek-a lame n paase, t'a lebg sõng zãnga.»" 
Leviticus13:59 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd noore sẽn get fuugu, peende sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdo bɩ lamdo, n paas bũmb sẽn zap ne gãongo, a sẽn ya-a a soab fãa, f sã n dat n bãng tɩ b yaa rẽgdo bɩ b pa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus14:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Leviticus14:2 «Ad noor ning yĩng soab sẽn tog n tũ a pekr daare. B talld-a lame n kẽng maan-kʋʋd nengẽ. 
Leviticus14:3 Maan-kʋʋda na n seg-a lame t'a nan ket we-kɛɛnga. A sã n ges n mik tɩ bãaga sãoogame," 
Leviticus14:4 a kɩtdame tɩ b bao, a yĩnga, luiili a yiibu sẽn ket n vɩ la sɩɩsg sẽn pa kisi. B na n paasa kʋk raoogo, monem, la tɩɩg a ye sẽn tar yũ-noog vão-killi." 
Leviticus14:5 A kɩtdame tɩ b kʋ luiil a ye tãnd rʋkẽ, rʋk sẽn pid ne koom sẽn yõng kʋɩlgẽ." 
Leviticus14:6 A na n yaool n dɩka luiil a to wã ne kʋka raoogo, la monema, la vão-killã, n los b sẽn kodg luiil ninga zɩɩmẽ." 
Leviticus14:7 A mesda bãada naoor a yopoe n yaool n wilg-a t'a pekame la a basda luiila t'a yɩk n looge. 
Leviticus14:8 Sẽn yɩlgd a meng ne a bãaga, pekda a futa fãa, n bao barg n põng a meng zãnga, n bao koom n so n lebg sõmbo. Dẽ poor marsã a kẽeda tẽnga pʋga la a pa tõe n yãg n kẽ a meng zakẽ ye, rẽnd dasem maan a yopoe." 
Leviticus14:9 A yopoe daarã, a kõogda a zoobdo, a toɛɛnga, a nin-kʋɩgdga, a tog n põnga a kõbd fãa. A sã n pek a futã la a pek a menga, a lebga yɩlemde." 
Leviticus14:10 A nii daare, a wata ne pe-bi raad a yiibu sẽn ka tar bãnde, n paas yʋʋmd yɛng pe-sɛdg sẽn ka tar bãnde, la zom wamde sẽn nag ne kaam n paas kaam lengre." 
Leviticus14:11 Maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn na n pek bãada kɩtdame t'a yals sɛka roog noore, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, yẽ ne a kũuna." 
Leviticus14:12 A yãkda pe-bil a ye n kʋ yell manegr maoongo la a paasda kaama ne lengrã. A rɩkd-b lame n tees Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus14:13 A kʋʋda pesgã zĩ-sõng ning b sẽn kʋʋd rũmsã, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩngã, la yũ-noog maoongo. La yell manegr ne sugr kosg maoong sẽn wẽnd taabã, ad-y rũnga sẽn kʋ yell manegr yĩngã na n yɩɩ maan-kʋʋda soolem. Yaa bũmb sẽn ya sõng wʋsgo." 
Leviticus14:14 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda maoonga zɩɩm n taag bãada rɩtg tʋbre, a rɩtg nug-raoogo, a rɩtg nao-raoogo;" 
Leviticus14:15 maan-kʋʋda reegda kaama lengre n pʋdg a goabg nugu. 
Leviticus14:16 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda a rɩtg nug-bila kaama sẽn be a goabg nugã. A tẽkda kaama ne a rɩtg nug-bila n mes yĩnga soab naoor a yopoe Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. 
Leviticus14:17 A yãkda kaama sẽn ket a nugẽ n taag bãada rɩtg tʋbre, a rɩtg nug-raoogo, a rɩtg nao-raoogo, zɩɩma taagr poore." 
Leviticus14:18 Kaama sẽn ket a nugẽ wã, a rɩkd-a lame n tẽg bãada zugu. La Soaala-Wẽnd taoore a le maanda sugr kosga sẽn dat bũmb ninga fãa." 
Leviticus14:19 Dẽ poore maan-kʋʋda maanda yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo bãada yĩnga t'a paam n peke. A baasda ne yũ-noog maoongo. 
Leviticus14:20 Maan-kugra zugu, a rʋʋsda yũ-noog maoongã la kũuna, n maan sugr kosgo. Rẽ fãa sã n sɛ, bãada me peka zãnga." 
Leviticus14:21 Bãada sã n ya naong soaba n ka tar ligd tɩ seke, a wata ne pe-bil a ye bala, yell manegr pesgo. B rɩkd-a lame n tees Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ b maan sugr kosg sẽn dat tɩ b maana. A wata ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam n paas kaam lengre." 
Leviticus14:22 A le paasda wal a yiibu bɩ malwal a yiibu, a sẽn tõe n paam. Wall a ye bɩ malwall a ye yɩta yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga, a to wã yũ-noog maoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus14:23 Yaa a nii daarã, a pekra raare, la a wat ne rẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, sɛka roog noore." 
Leviticus14:24 Maan-kʋʋda reegda pesgã sẽn na n kʋ yell manegr yĩngã, n paas kaama, a rɩkd-b lame n tees Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus14:25 La a kʋʋda pesgã, a yãkda pe-bila sẽn kʋ yell manegr yĩnga zɩɩma n taag bãada rɩtg tʋbre, a rɩtg nug-raoogo, a rɩtg nao-raoogo." 
Leviticus14:26 A pʋdgda kaama a nug goabga," 
Leviticus14:27 la ne ka-kãnga a mesda ne a rɩtg nug-bila naoor a yopoe, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus14:28 A tẽkda kaama n taag bãada rɩtg tʋbre, a rɩtg nug-raoogo la a rɩtg nao-raoogo, a sẽn zoe n taag zɩɩma zĩig ninga." 
Leviticus14:29 A rɩkda kaama sẽn ket a nugẽ wã n bil bãada zugu la a kota Soaala-Wẽnd sugr a yĩnga. 
Leviticus14:30 A na n yãka wall a ye bɩ malwall a ye, dẽ tũuda ne bãada sẽn tõog n wa ne a soaba," 
Leviticus14:31 n maan maoong yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, n dɩk a ye wã n maan yũ-noog maoongo, n naag ne kũun ning a sẽn tog n wa ne. Maan-kʋʋda kota sugr a yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore.»" 
Leviticus14:32 Woto la ned ning sẽn bẽed yĩng bãag tog n maane, a sã n ka tar fɩ n na n kɩse n paam pekre." 
Leviticus14:33 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz la Aarõ: 
Leviticus14:34 «Y sã n wa ta Kanaã, tẽng ning m sẽn na n kõ-y tɩ y soogã, y sã n yãe beelẽ tɩ roog a ye lebga yĩid-yĩidu," 
Leviticus14:35 bɩ rooga soab wa wilg maan-kʋʋda la a yeele: M yãeeme tɩ yaa wa m dooga tara bãaga. 
Leviticus14:36 Maan-kʋʋda kɩtdame tɩ b yiis rooga teed fãa t'a yaool n wa sɩng rooga gesgo. Woto a kõn tõog n yeele tɩ sẽn ket a pʋgẽ wã yaa rẽgd ye. Dẽ poor marsã la maan-kʋʋda kẽed n gese. 
Leviticus14:37 A rengd n gesa rooga sẽn tu bogdã, la a bãng b sã n yaa kẽeg-kẽega bɩ miuug-miuugu, n bãng b sã n tu n zulgame." 
Leviticus14:38 Maan-kʋʋda lɛɛgd n yiime la kʋɩlenga noore, a wilgdame tɩ b ra le kẽ rooga pʋg ye." 
Leviticus14:39 A lɛɛgd n waa a yopoe daarã n le gese la a sã n mik tɩ yaa wa lalsa wẽnema paasame," 
Leviticus14:40 a kɩtdame tɩ b yãgs kug niyns piisma sẽn yĩ wã n tɩ lob we-kɛɛnga, rẽgda sẽn lobd zĩig ningã." 
Leviticus14:41 A kɩtdame tɩ b kõrs rooga pʋg lalsã n wʋk toma n tɩ lob tãmpʋʋrẽ we-kɛɛnga. 
Leviticus14:42 B baooda kug paala n lebs kʋda zĩigẽ la b maneg roogã n bolg zãnga. 
Leviticus14:43 B sã n ning kug paalã n lebs n bolge, tɩ yaa wa bãaga ket n dabda taoore," 
Leviticus14:44 maan-kʋʋda lebd n wa gesame la a sã n mik tɩ wẽnema sɩd paasame, a wilgdame tɩ yaa yĩid sẽn tõe n longe, la rooga lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus14:45 Sẽn kete, ya b lub roogã, n wʋk a kugã, a toma, a raadã n tɩ lob tãmpʋʋrẽ, we-kɛɛnga." 
Leviticus14:46 Rooga pʋgẽ kõoma sẽn waa n kisã, ned ninga fãa sẽn saag n kẽ, rẽgma a menga n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus14:47 Sẽn kẽ-a be n gãande, tog n peka a futu. Sẽn kẽ-a be n dɩ, yẽ me tog n peka a futu." 
Leviticus14:48 Rooga bolgr poore, maan-kʋʋda sã n lɛɛg n wa la a yãeeme tɩ bũmb ka paase, a wilgdame tɩ rooga ka le ya rẽgd ye t'a yĩida sɛɛme." 
Leviticus14:49 Rooga pekr yĩnga, maan-kʋʋda na bao luiili a yi, kʋk raoogo, monem, tɩɩg a ye sẽn tar yũ-noog vão-killi." 
Leviticus14:50 A kodgda luiil a ye tãnd laagẽ, sẽn pid ne kʋɩlg koom." 
Leviticus14:51 A rɩkda kʋka raoogo, tɩɩg a ye vão-killi, monema la luiil ning sẽn keta wã, n los pipi luiila zɩɩmẽ la koomẽ. A Mesda rooga naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus14:52 Yaa woto la rooga na n yɩlg ne a yĩidu; yɩlgd-a-la ne luiila zɩɩm, ne kooma, ne luin-vɩɩgã, ne kʋka raoogo, ne tɩɩg a ye vão-killã, ne monema." 
Leviticus14:53 Dẽ poore a basda luin-vɩɩga t'a yɩk n leb weoogẽ. A maanda sugr kosgo. La rẽ sẽn maan n sɛ, rooga ka le ya rẽgd ye.»" 
Leviticus14:54 Soaala-Wẽnd noora la woto, yĩng bãag poorẽ, rasempʋɩɩg poorẽ," 
Leviticus14:55 fut bugd poorẽ la rot yĩid poorẽ," 
Leviticus14:56 yũya, noada la yĩn-firseng poorẽ." 
Leviticus14:57 Yaa noy-bãmba n wilgd sẽn tog n maan n pa yɩlemde, n ka rẽgem ye. Woto la noya sẽn get yĩng bãaga la a pekre." 
Leviticus15:1 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ 
Leviticus15:2 tɩ b wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Rao sã n bẽed a taoorẽ, a bãng t'a menga zãng n ya rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:3 Bũmb yit bɩ pa yit be, a lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:4 Raoã sẽn gãand bũmb ning zugu, a sẽn zĩnd bũmb ning zugu, lebgda rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:5 Ned sã n sɩɩs a gãagã, a tog n peka a futu, n so koom, la ne rẽ fãa, a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:6 Ned sã n zaoonda a goeelã, a tog n peka a futu, n so koom, la ne rẽ fãa a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgdo n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:7 Ned ninga sẽn sɩɩsa nin kãng tog n peka a futu, n so koom, la ne rẽ fãa a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgdo n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:8 A sã n sẽnes ned kolkoodo, ned sẽn ya yɩlemde, nin-kãng tog n peka a futu, n so koom, la ne rẽ fãa a na n lebga rẽgdo n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:9 A sẽn zaond gaar ning n tog sore, gaar kãng lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:10 F sã n sɩɩs a sẽn zaoond n bʋʋg bũmb ning fãa, f me lebga rẽgdo n ta zaabre la f sã n dɩk bũmb a sẽn zaond n bʋʋge, f tog n peka f futã, n so koom, la ne rẽ fãa, f paada ne rẽgdo n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:11 A sẽn na n sɩɩs ned ninga fãa n ka reng n pek a nusã ne koom, a soab tog n peka a futã, la a so koom la ne rẽ fãa, a kelld n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:12 B wãada tãnd laok fãa a sẽn sɩɩse, laoka sã n ya raoog laoko, b pekd-a lame." 
Leviticus15:13 Neda sã n dat t'a rẽgda peke, a sõta rasem a yopoe. Rasem a yopoe wã poore a pekda a futu. Dẽ poore a sooda koom kʋɩlgẽ n yaool n yɩlge." 
Leviticus15:14 Dasem a nii soaba, a wat n kɩsa maan-kʋʋda wal a yiibu bɩ malwal a yiibu, sɛka roog noore." 
Leviticus15:15 Maan-kʋʋda reegda a ye n maan yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo la a reeg a ye n maan yũ-noog maoongo, la woto, maan-kʋʋda kota sugr a yĩnga la a pekdame." 
Leviticus15:16 Rao zɩɩm sã n mad-a, bɩ a pek a yĩnga tõr ne koom la ne rẽ fãa a paada ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:17 Zɩɩma sẽn sɩɩs bũmb ninga, fuug bɩ gãongo, tog n peka ne koom la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:18 Pag ne rao sã n zĩnd ne taaba, b tog n soo koom la b na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:19 Pag me sã n kiuudẽ, yaa dasem a yopoe tõre la a paad a rẽgdẽ; ned sã n sɩɩs-a, a soab me rẽgemdame n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:20 Gãag ning a sẽn gãe a soab zugã, goeel ning a sẽn zao a soab zugã, lebga rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:21 Ned ninga sẽn sɩɩs a gãaga tog n peka a futu, n so koom la a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:22 Ned ninga fãa sẽn sɩɩs a sẽn zaonde, tog n peka a futu la a so koom la ne rẽ fãa a na n kell n yɩɩ rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:23 Bũmb sã n be a gãagã bɩ a goeela zugu, tɩ fo wa sɩɩs bõn-kãnga, fo lebgda rẽgdo n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:24 Ned sã n gãand ne-a, a me lebgda rẽgdo, a na n yɩɩ rẽgd dasem a yopoe la a sẽn na n gãand zĩig ning fãa, zĩ-kãng me lebgda rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:25 Pag sã n ne a kiuug t'a pukr yaool n nan pa ta, bɩ kiuuga sã n loogame t'a ket ne-a, a bãng t'a yaa rẽgd wakat kãnga. Daara sẽn paasã le paasa a rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:26 Daara sẽn paasã, a gãagã, a goeela kelld n paa ne rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:27 Ned ninga sẽn na n sɩɩs-ba, a soab tog n peka a futu, n so koom la a na n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Leviticus15:28 A kiuuga sã n kẽ, paga sõta rasem a yopoe n paam n yɩlge." 
Leviticus15:29 Daar a nii soaba, a wata ne wal a yi bɩ malwal a yi, sɛka roog noore n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋda." 
Leviticus15:30 Maan-kʋʋda yãkda a ye n maan yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoongo, n yãk a ye n maan yũ-noog maoongo; maan-kʋʋda kota sugr a yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, t'a tɩlg ne a rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:31 Wilg-y Israyɛl kamba tɩ b bãng tɩ b sẽn ya rẽgd wakat ning fãa, bɩ b leb kɛɛnga la woto b kõn ki, b sẽn dẽgma yĩng ye, b sẽn kɩt tɩ m dooga lebg rẽgda yĩng ye." 
Leviticus15:32 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd wilg, rao poorẽ, bũmb ning sẽn wat ne a rẽgdo, wakat ning a sẽn paad ne rẽgdo." 
Leviticus15:33 Woto me la b wilgd, pag poorẽ, bũmb ning sẽn wat ne a rẽgdo la bũmb ning sẽn kis ne-a, a kiuug sã n puki." 
Leviticus16:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn yeel a Moyiiz, wakat ning a Aarõ kamb a yiiba sẽn beeg Wẽnd n yõog b yamleoog wisdu, bãmb taoorã, tɩ b kʋ-bã:" 
Leviticus16:2 «Yeel f kẽem a Aarõ t'a ra saag n kẽ sɛka roogẽ a sẽn dat wakat ning ye. A ra lɩk peen lilla poore, a ra kẽ Sõmblem pid sõmblema roogẽ, kuga walsa koglga ne a linga sẽn dɩg zĩig ninga ye. A sã n kẽed yaare, a tõe n wa kiime, m sã n tũ sawadgã n wa lik m meng ne m ziir, koglga linga zugu." 
Leviticus16:3 Ad-a Aarõ sẽn na n kẽ sɛka roog to-to: a wata ne loalga, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoong yĩnga la pe-raoogo, yũ-noog maoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:4 A yeelgda a Maan-kʋʋr fu-pɛɛlga, n ning kur-pɛɛlga, n sẽbg a sɛɛga, n bao peen-pɛɛlga n vil a zugu. Yaa bũmb sẽn ya sõng zãnga. A sooda koom n yaool n yeelg fu-bãmba." 
Leviticus16:5 A na n deega a Israyɛl kamba nengẽ boees a yiibu, yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, la pe-raoog a ye yũ-noog maoong yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:6 Maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ kɩta loalgã a meng yel-wẽna yĩnga, a zak yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, n yõk Wẽnd sɛɛga." 
Leviticus16:7 A Aarõ yalsda boees a yiibã Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, sɛka roog noore." 
Leviticus16:8 A na n bʋgame n bãng boees a yiiba sʋka boɛɛg ning sẽn na n yɩ Wẽnd dẽnna la a Azazɛl dẽnna. 
Leviticus16:9 A Aarõ kʋʋda boɛɛg ning sẽn ya-a Wẽnd dẽnna yel-wẽna dolb yĩnga. 
Leviticus16:10 Boɛɛg ning sẽn ya-a a Azazɛl dẽnna, b wata ne a vɩɩga, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, la b dogenda yel-wẽna fãa a zugu n yaool n diga n kẽes weoogo." 
Leviticus16:11 A Aarõ kʋʋda naafã, a meng yel-wẽna dolb yĩnga n kos sugri, a meng ne a zak yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:12 A rɩkda laag n pids ne bug-saala sẽn yãk maan-kugra zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, a yãkda tɩdar zom, nug koor a yi, n tall rẽ fãa n kẽ peen lilla poore." 
Leviticus16:13 A na n ninga tɩdarã bugmẽ wã, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, tɩ bug-zõosa lud kuga walsa koglga linga. Woto a kõn ki ye." 
Leviticus16:14 A na n yaool n yãka naafa zɩɩm ne a nug-bila m mes koglga lingã. A na n mes-a-la naoor a yopoe. 
Leviticus16:15 Dẽ poore a kʋʋda boɛɛga zãma wã yel-wẽn dolb yĩnga la a tallda zɩɩma n leb peen lilla poore n maan ne boɛɛga zɩɩm wala a sẽn maan ne loalga rẽnna, n yi n yaas, n mes zɩɩma koglga lingã, la koglga taoore." 
Leviticus16:16 A maanda woto n yõk Wẽnd sɛɛga Israyɛl tõdgre la a yel-wẽna zãng fãa yĩnga. A na maan woto me ne sɛka roogo tɩ Wẽnd paalga b meng yel-wẽn-maandb sʋka. 
Leviticus16:17 Dɩlla maan-kʋʋda sã n wa kẽed sẽka roogẽ n na n kos sugrã ned ba a ye da zĩnd be n tãag a yiib ye. A na n kosa a meng yel-wẽna sugri, n kos a zaka rãmb yel-wẽn sugri, n kos a Israyɛl kamba fãa yel-wẽna sugri." 
Leviticus16:18 A yitame n kolg maan-kugrã sẽn be Soaala-Wẽnd taoorã n kos a yɩlgre. A rɩkda loalga la boɛɛga zɩɩm n taag maan-kugra yɩdbã. 
Leviticus16:19 A tẽkda a nug-bil zɩɩmẽ n mes maan-kugrã naoor a yopoe, n pek-a ne Israyɛl kamba rẽgdo, t'a yɩlge, n lebg sõngo." 
Leviticus16:20 Maan-kʋʋda sã n sɛ ne ro-sõngã, ne sɛka roogo, ne maan-kugrã, a kɩtdame tɩ b kolg ne boɛɛga a to wã." 
Leviticus16:21 A Aarõ dɩkda a nus a yiibã n tik a zugu n togs Israyɛl kamba fãa yel-wẽna, b tõdgra fãa, b beegra fãa. A sã n zɩlg boɛɛga ne neba yel-wẽna n sɛ, a baooda ned t'a pʋgd n digd-a n tees we-raoogo." 
Leviticus16:22 Yaa we-raoogẽ wã la boɛɛga na n tɩ menem ne a zɩɩbã. Boɛɛga sã n dɩg we-raoogẽ wã n sɛ," 
Leviticus16:23 a Aarõ lɛɛgd n kẽe sɛka roogẽ, n yees futã a sẽn da yer sɛka roogẽ wã la a rɩgend-b-la be." 
Leviticus16:24 Yaa ro-sõng pʋg la a na n so koom. Dẽ poore a lebd n yeelga a futã la a yitame n kʋ maoongo, yũ-noog maoong a meng yĩnga la neba yĩnga. A kota sugr a meng la buuda yĩnga." 
Leviticus16:25 Maan-kugra zugu, a yõogda yel-wẽnd sugr kosga maoonga kaam." 
Leviticus16:26 Sẽn dig a Azazɛl boɛɛg n kẽes weoogã sã n lɛɛg n wa, a rengd n peka a futu la a so koom n yaool n paam n kẽ a zakẽ." 
Leviticus16:27 B sẽn kʋ boɛɛga la naafã yel-wẽn sugr kosg yĩnga n tall b zɩɩma n kẽ n mes ro-sõngẽ wã, b tald-b lame n yi we-kɛɛnga la b naagda b gãongã, b nemdã la b bĩndã n yõog bugum." 
Leviticus16:28 Sẽn yõoga rũnga soab tog n peka a futu la a so koom n yaool n tõog n kẽ a zakẽ. 
Leviticus16:29 Woto yaa noor sẽn ka tõe n teeme, yãmb yĩnga. Kiuug a yopoe soaba, raar piig soaba, y na n loe noore la y ka na n tʋm tʋʋmd ye, tẽnga biig wala sãana." 
Leviticus16:30 Yaa baraar la b na n kos sugri tɩ y paam n yɩlge; Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, y ka le tar yel-wẽnd ba a ye." 
Leviticus16:31 Badaar na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare la no-loeere. Yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada. 
Leviticus16:32 Maan-kʋʋd ning b sẽn taag a soab kaam la b kõ-a maan-kʋʋr naama t'a na n wa reeg a ba zĩiga, yaa yẽ n maand sugr kosg maoongã. A na n yeelga fu-peelse, fu-sõma." 
Leviticus16:33 A na n yɩlga Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngã, sɛka roogo la maan-kugrã. Dẽ poore a yɩlgda maan-kʋʋdba la zãma wã.»" 
Leviticus16:34 Dẽ me yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada. Yʋʋmd pʋgẽ, b yãkda daar a ye tɩ yaa a Israyɛl kamba fãa yel-wẽna sugr kosg daare. La a Aarõ maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn togs a Moyiiz." 
Leviticus17:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus17:2 t'a taas a Aarõ ne a kamba, la Israyɛl kamba gilli koe-bãmba:" 
Leviticus17:3 A Israyɛl buud ned ning sẽn na n saag n kʋ naafo, pesgo bɩ bʋʋga, sika pʋg bɩ we-kɛɛnga," 
Leviticus17:4 n ka wa sɛka roog noore n dɩk-a n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, b na sok a soab zɩɩma a sẽn daagã: b yiisd-a-la buudẽ." 
Leviticus17:5 Dẽ yĩnga, a Israyɛl kamb wata ne rũms niyns b sẽn na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, sɛka roog noore: Yaa laafi kosg maoong la b na n kʋ, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus17:6 Maan-kʋʋda tẽkda zɩɩma n mes maan-kugra, sɛka roog noore la a yõogda kaama t'a yũuga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Leviticus17:7 Woto b kõn le kʋ wẽn-yaalsa maoong n dẽgem b mens ye. La rẽ me la noor m sẽn kõt-b yʋʋm sẽn kõn sɛ yĩnga. 
Leviticus17:8 Yeel-b yɛsa: A Israyɛl buud ned bɩ sãan ninga fãa sẽn be ne yãmba n dat n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo, bɩ maoong a to," 
Leviticus17:9 n yaool n ka reng n tall rũnga n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnd sɛka roog noore, yeel-y-b tɩ b yiis-a buudẽ." 
Leviticus17:10 A Israyɛl buud ned la ned ninga fãa sẽn bɛ-a ne yãmba n dɩt zɩɩm, sẽn ya zɩɩm ning fãa, mam na yik zabr ne-a la m na yiis-a-la buudẽ." 
Leviticus17:11 Bõn-vɩɩg vɩɩm be-la a zɩɩmẽ. Y paama m nengẽ tɩ maan-kugra zug zɩɩm wat ne y sugri, la rẽ yaa zɩɩma sẽn ya vɩɩma." 
Leviticus17:12 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m yeel a Israyɛl kamba: Ned da saag n dɩ zɩɩm ye; sãan sẽn vɩ-a ne yãmba kõn dɩ zɩɩm ye. 
Leviticus17:13 Ned ning fãa sẽn ya-a a Israyɛl biiga, bɩ sãan sẽn vɩ ne Israyɛl kamba, a sã n kẽng soom-saar n paam rũnga, bɩ luiila, b sẽn tõe n wãbe, bɩ a kodga n kedg n bao tom n bus zɩɩma." 
Leviticus17:14 Nin vɩɩg fãa vɩɩm be-la a zɩɩmẽ. Dẽ me la m yeel a Israyɛl kamba: Da rɩ-y bũmb ba a ye ne a zɩɩm ye tɩ zɩɩm yaa vɩɩm la sẽn kɩɩsa n dɩ bɩ b yiis-a buudẽ. 
Leviticus17:15 Ned ning fãa, tẽngen-ned bɩ sãana, sẽn wãb rũng sẽn ki, rũng a to sẽn yõke, tog n peka a futu la a so koom ne rẽ fãa a na n kell n paa ne rẽgdo n ta zaabre. Zaabr sã n ta a lebgda yɩlemde." 
Leviticus17:16 A sã n ka pek a futã, a sã n ka pek a yĩnga, a tʋka yell a zugu." 
Leviticus18:1 Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz 
Leviticus18:2 n yeel-a t'a wilg a Israyɛl kamba woto: «Maam la Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus18:3 Da maan-y wala y sẽn zĩnd ne b rãmb Ezipt tẽnga sẽn da maanda ye. Da maan-y wala b sẽn maand Kanaã tẽnga, tẽng ning m sẽn tar-y n dabdẽ wã ye. Y ka na n tũ b manesma ye." 
Leviticus18:4 Yaa mam daab la y na n tũ. Yaa maam noya la y na n deege, y vɩɩma na n tũu noya m sẽn wilgi. Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde!" 
Leviticus18:5 Deeg-y m noya, maan-y m daabo. Sẽn tũud-a na paam vɩɩm. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam rũnda la beoogo." 
Leviticus18:6 Ned ba a ye da kolg a roagda n yo ne-a ye. Maam la y Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus18:7 Da lodg f ba kur-wĩir ye. Da sẽk f ma fuugu ye, ya f ma, da sẽk a fuug ye." 
Leviticus18:8 Da sẽk f ba pag fuug ye tɩ yaa f ba meng la f ningd yãnde. 
Leviticus18:9 Da sẽk f tão fuug ye, a yaa f ba biiga bɩ f ma biiga, sẽn dog f ba zakẽ bɩ tẽng a to, da sẽk a fuug ye." 
Leviticus18:10 Da sẽk f yageng fuug ye, a yaa f bi-ribl biiga, a yaa f bi-pugl biiga, bɩ f da saag ye. F ning-b yãnde, f ninga f meng yãnde." 
Leviticus18:11 Da sẽk f ba pag biig fuug ye. Y ma wã sã n ka a ye me, y ba wã yaa a ye, dɩlla yaa f tão, da sẽk a fuug ye." 
Leviticus18:12 Da sẽk f pʋgdb fuug ye t'a zɩɩma yaa f ba zɩɩm. 
Leviticus18:13 Da sẽk f ma yao bɩ f ma kẽem fuug ye t'a yĩnga yaa f ma yĩnga. 
Leviticus18:14 Da ning f ba kẽema bɩ a yao yãnde, n kolg a pag ye, tɩ yaa f ba yao bɩ f ba kẽem paga." 
Leviticus18:15 Da sẽk f bi-pag fuug ye, tɩ yaa f biig paga, da sẽk a fuug ye." 
Leviticus18:16 Da sẽk f kẽem bɩ f yao pag fuug ye tɩ yaa f kẽem bɩ f yao la f ningd yãnde. 
Leviticus18:17 Da sẽk pag fuug n le lɛɛg n sẽk a biig fuug ye, da sẽk a yageng fuug ye: tɩ b yĩnga yaa yĩng a ye la yaa bũmb sẽn ka toge." 
Leviticus18:18 F pag yao da kul-f ye, pʋg-taar yĩnga. Da kẽes-a, f paga sã n ket n vɩ ye." 
Leviticus18:19 Da kẽ ne f paga a sã n ne a kiuug ye, tɩ wakat kãnga a yaa rẽgdo." 
Leviticus18:20 Da kẽ ne tẽngen-paga n dẽgem f meng ye. 
Leviticus18:21 Da rɩk f biig n kɩs tɩ b kʋ a Molɛk maoong ye. Y sã n maan dẽ y paoogda maam, yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus18:22 Da kẽ ne rao wala f kẽe ne pag ye: yaa wɩɩbdo. 
Leviticus18:23 Da lagem ne rũng ye tɩ f na n dẽgma f menga, pag me ra lagem ne rũng ye, dẽ me yaa wɩɩbdo." 
Leviticus18:24 Da rẽgem-y y meng ne manesem a woto buud ye. Yaa rẽ n dẽgem buud niyns m sẽn menes yãmb taoorã. 
Leviticus18:25 Tẽnga lebga rẽgdo tɩ m yẽeg-a, a beegra yĩnga, t'a kong n wʋb a nebã wa bõn-beedo." 
Leviticus18:26 Sã n ya yãmba, tũ-y m daabo, da sak-y wɩɩbd ye, f yaa a Israyɛl buud ned, bɩ f nok-a lame." 
Leviticus18:27 Yaa wɩɩbd a woto buud n dẽgem neb niyns sẽn da kẽed-b tẽn-kãensã. 
Leviticus18:28 Yãmb sã n lebg rẽgdo, tẽnga ko wʋb yãmb wala a sẽn wʋb pipi rãmba sɩda?" 
Leviticus18:29 Sɩda, ned ninga sẽn sak n wɩɩb woto a yaa ninsaal bɩ rũnga, bãmb fãa na n yiisa buudẽ." 
Leviticus18:30 Vɩɩnd-y wala m sẽn wilg yã, da tũ-y pĩnd dãmba soy yooda ye, woto b manes yooda kõn dẽgem-y ye. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Leviticus19:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus19:2 t'a yeel a Israyɛl kamba fãa woto: «Yɩ-y sõma tɩ maam, y Wẽnda, yaa sõngo." 
Leviticus19:3 Bɩ ned kam fãa zoe a ba la a ma nifu la a reeg vʋʋsga noore. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam rũnda la beoogo. 
Leviticus19:4 Da teeg-y wẽn-yaalsa ye, da bʋʋg-y yõak bɩ sẽyã t'a kud bɩ a zug wẽn-naand n kõ-y ye. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus19:5 Yãmb sã n dat n kʋ laafi kosg maoongo bɩ y tũ m sẽn wilgã tɩ m na reeg y maoong. 
Leviticus19:6 Maoonga dɩɩb rɩta a raare, bɩ a vẽkẽmbeoogo. Sẽn ket da-yɩten-daarã fãa tog n yõoga bugmẽ." 
Leviticus19:7 Y sã n dɩ-a da-yɩten-daarã, bãng-y tɩ yaa rɩɩb sẽn sãame, a rẽgemda a rɩta bala." 
Leviticus19:8 Sẽn kɩɩsa n dɩ, tʋka yell a zugu, a paooga Soaala-Wẽnd ne b sõmblem. Nin kãng tog n yiisa buudẽ." 
Leviticus19:9 Y sã n wa ta y tẽngẽ wã, y sã n wa na n tigs y koodo, bɩ y ra saag pʋʋga zãng ye, da wʋk-y sẽn lʋɩ tẽnga ye." 
Leviticus19:10 Da pʋg-y n tõs y bugsuntundu biisi sẽn kees b willẽ bɩ sẽn dʋʋg tẽng ye. Bas-y-b tɩ b yɩ naong-rãmb la sãamb dɩɩbo. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam! 
Leviticus19:11 Ned da saag n zuk a to bũmb ye, n yag zirẽ ye, n wẽd a to ye." 
Leviticus19:12 Da wẽen mam yʋʋr n togs sẽn ka sɩd ye, ka rẽ f sãamda Wẽnnaam yʋʋre. Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde!" 
Leviticus19:13 Da rɩ f to paoong zaalem ye, da zu-a ye. Tʋʋm-tʋmd yaood da pa f nengẽ n vẽeg beoog ye." 
Leviticus19:14 Da kãab wʋng beed ye, da gãneg bẽdg zoang taoor ye; zoe Naaba-Wẽnd nifu. Yaa maam la Soaala, y Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:15 Da bʋ-y kegre, da yɩ-y bʋgsg tɩ loog ne nin-bõones ye la ra zoe-y nin-bɛda nif ye. Bʋ f saam-biig ne zemsgo." 
Leviticus19:16 Da rõd f saam-biig ye, da rogl f to zug bũmb sẽn sek a kʋʋb ye. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:17 Da kisg f to, f sũurẽ ye. Wilg f saam-biig a kongre n da wa rɩ a yel-wẽnd taal ye." 
Leviticus19:18 Da rok f sũur ye, da tug beem ne f buuda kamb ye. Nong f to wala f menga. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam!"
