Leviticus19:19 Deeg-y m noya. Rũms a yi sã n ka buud a ye, bɩ f ra bas b tɩ b rʋ ye. Pʋʋg a ye pʋgẽ, bɩ f ra bʋd kood buud toɛ-toɛ ye. Da yeelg fuug sẽn sẽ ne pɛɛl buud sẽn ya toor ye." 
Leviticus19:20 F sã n yo ne paga sẽn ya roog biiga a zu-soaba sẽn nan ka yao bɩ a nan ka yiis-a a soolmẽ, sɩbgr tog n sɩbgame. B ka na n yiis yõor ye, tɩ paga yaa roog biiga." 
Leviticus19:21 Raoa na n waa ne yell manegre maoong, sɛka roog noore. Rũnga na n yɩɩ pe-raoogo." 
Leviticus19:22 Maan-kʋʋda sã n deeg rũngã n kos sugri, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, wakat kãng la a soab na n tɩlg ne a rẽgdo." 
Leviticus19:23 Yãmb sã n wa kẽ m sẽn kãab y tẽng ninga n sel y tɩ-rɩts buud fãa, ges-y-b wa rẽgdo. Yʋʋm a tãab pʋgẽ, b sẽn ya rẽgda yĩnga, yãmb ka na n dɩ-b ye." 
Leviticus19:24 Yʋʋmd a naas soaba marsã, b maanda Wẽnd pẽgr pʋʋsg kibsa n dɩk-b n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus19:25 Yʋʋmd a nu soaba tɛka y tõe n dɩ-b lame, y tõe n tigsa b biisi tɩ y paoong fɩɩge. Maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:26 Da rɩ-y bũmb ne a zɩɩm ye, da bʋg-y bagr ye, da sok-y kɩɩms ye." 
Leviticus19:27 Da kok-y y zug ye, da kok-y y toɛɛng ye." 
Leviticus19:28 Ned sã n ki bɩ y ra bog y meng n wilg y sũ-sãang ye. Da kɩɩs-y y yĩng ye. Yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam! 
Leviticus19:29 Da paoog f bi-pugl n bas-a ne yoaadb ye; woto tẽnga tõr kõn zãag ne Naaba-Wẽnd ye. 
Leviticus19:30 Reeg-y m vʋʋsga noore, waoog-y m waoogra do-sõngã. Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde!" 
Leviticus19:31 Da sogs-y kɩɩms ye, da pʋg-y yam dãmb ye. Da pʋg-y bagb ye, tɩ b na n dẽgem-y lame. Maam la y Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:32 Ned zug sã n pelge, bɩ f waoog-a; ned sã n kʋʋle, ning-a sʋka. Yɩ ned sẽn zoet Wẽnd nifu. Yaa maam la Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:33 Sãan sã n nok yãmba, bɩ y ra tall-a toog ye." 
Leviticus19:34 Sãan sa n nok yãmba, bɩ ges-a wa tẽnga biiga n nong-a wala y menga, tɩ yãmb me yɩɩ sãamb Ezipt tẽnga. Yaa maan la yãmb Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus19:35 Da bʋ-y bʋ-kɛg ye, da mag-y mag yoodo n woog bũmb zɩslem, a woglem, a zulum ye." 
Leviticus19:36 Mag-y ne bõn-magdi sẽn ya sõma n paam tɩ zɩslem zemse, tɩ peoog yɩ peoogo, la yʋʋr yɩ yʋʋre. Yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga!" 
Leviticus19:37 Reeg-y m noya la m dog-n-mikã; tũ-y-b neere. Maam la a yãmb Wẽnnaam!» 
Leviticus20:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus20:2 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: «B na n kʋʋ Israyɛl biiga bɩ Israyɛl noak fãa sẽn na n dɩk a biig n kõ a Molɛk. Tẽnga rãmb na n lab-a-la ne kuga. 
Leviticus20:3 Mam meng na n yika ne yẽ soaba la m na n yiis-a-la Israyɛl buudẽ, t'a rɩka a biig n kõ a Molɛk, n yaool n na n lɛɛg n wa m waoogr do-sõnga pʋg ne rẽgdo n paoog a Soaala yʋʋre." 
Leviticus20:4 Tẽnga rãmb sã n ka rat kʋ ned ninga sẽn dɩk a biig n kõ a Molɛk n maand wa b ka yãend bũmbu," 
Leviticus20:5 yaa maam n na n yik ne nin kãnga, ne a zak rãmba, n yiis-a Israyɛl buudẽ, yẽ la neb nins fãa sẽn naag-a n waoogd wẽn-naand a Molɛk." 
Leviticus20:6 Ned ninga sẽn na n pʋg kɩɩmse, la yam dãmba n bas maam, m na yik zabr ne yẽ soaba n yiis-a m buudẽ." 
Leviticus20:7 Dɩk-y sõmblem sore n yɩlg zãnga tɩ y rũnda la y beoog Wẽnda la maam bala. 
Leviticus20:8 Reeg-y m noya, vɩɩnd-y wala m sẽn wilg-y tɩ y sõmblema yita maam y Wẽnda nengẽ." 
Leviticus20:9 Dɩlla ned ning fãa sẽn na n kãab a ba bɩ a ma beedo, tog n kiime. A sẽn kãab a ba bɩ a ma wã, yaa a meng n bao a kũum." 
Leviticus20:10 Rao ninga sẽn maana yoob ne tẽngen-pag sẽn tar sɩda, bãmb b yiiba fãa tog n kiime." 
Leviticus20:11 Rao fãa sẽn maana yoob ne a ba paga, ninga a ba yãnde. B yiiba fãa, raoa ne paga, tog n kiime; bãmb n bao b zɩɩm daagre." 
Leviticus20:12 Ned sã n yo ne a bi-paga, yaa bãmb b yiiba fãa la b tog n kʋ. B maana wɩɩbdo n bao b kʋʋbo." 
Leviticus20:13 Rap a yiib sã n maan wɩɩbd ne taaba b yiiba fãa tog n kiime, b wɩɩbda yĩnga, la yaa bãmb n bao b zɩɩm daagre." 
Leviticus20:14 Ned sã n kẽes pag ne a ma, a maana yel-beedo. Yẽ ne pagb a yiiba fãa yõogda bugum la woto, ned sẽn sãamd y tẽnga yʋʋr kõn vɩɩnd yãmb sʋk ye." 
Leviticus20:15 Ned sã n wɩɩb ne rũnga, b kʋʋda bãmb b yiib fãa." 
Leviticus20:16 Pag me sã n wɩɩb ne rũnga, b kʋʋda bãmb b yiiba me, la bãmb n bao b kũum." 
Leviticus20:17 Ned sã n dɩk a tão n maan a paga, la b yaa ba a ye bɩ ma a ye, b maana wɩɩbdo la neb a yiiba fãa tog n yiisa buudẽ, buuda fãa taoore, tɩ b sẽn maan woto wã b tʋka yell b zugu." 
Leviticus20:18 Rao sã n kẽ pag roogẽ a kiuug wakato, la b yiiba fãa tara kiuuga pukr kaseto, b tog n yiisa b fãa buudẽ." 
Leviticus20:19 Sẽn kẽe-a ne a ma-bila bɩ ne a ma-kãsenga, sẽn kẽe-a ne a pʋgdba, yaa neb a yiibã n tʋk yell b zugu, b sẽn ya buud a ye wã yĩnga." 
Leviticus20:20 Rao ning sẽn kẽeda ne paga, a ba kẽem bɩ a ba yao paga, luka a ba bãongo, a tʋka yell a zugu la b yiiba na ki n ka rog biig ye." 
Leviticus20:21 Ned ninga sẽn dɩka a kẽem paga bɩ a yao paga, maana sẽn kisi, a luka a kẽem bɩ a yao bãongo la b na n kiime n ka rog biig ye." 
Leviticus20:22 Reeg-y m noya, m dog-n-mikã, tũ-y-ba. Woto tẽng ning m sẽn na n kõ yãmba kõn maan waa a ka mi yãmba, n wʋk-y n lob ye." 
Leviticus20:23 Da tũ-y neb niyns m sẽn digd yãmb taoora dog-n-mik ye. Yaa b sẽn maan wɩɩbd ka tɛka la m sũura sẽn yaal ne-bã. 
Leviticus20:24 Yaa rẽ la m sẽn kãabe tɩ yãmb n na n soog b tẽnga; mam meng m toor n na n kẽes yãmb bĩisim la sɩɩd sẽn zoet zĩig ninga. Yaa maam, n welg yãmb toore la maam la y rũnda la y beoog Wẽnde." 
Leviticus20:25 Bãng-y n welg rũms niyns bɩ luiili niyns maoong sẽn tat m yam, n welg-b ne rũms niyns bɩ luiili niyns maoong sẽn pa tat m yam. Woto mam me yam kõn lak ne yãmb wala a sẽn lak ne rũms kãensa ye." 
Leviticus20:26 Bas-y tɩ m soog y zãnga la yɩ-y sõma wala mam sẽn ya sõngã tɩ maam la y rũnda la y beoog Soaala la m welg-y-la toore tɩ y yɩ m neba. 
Leviticus20:27 Rao bɩ pag sã n be yãmb sʋka n sõsd ne kɩɩmse la zĩn dãmba, bɩ b kʋ-a. B lob-b ne kuga, bãmb n bao b zɩɩm daagre.»" 
Leviticus21:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz t'a taas maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, woto: «Kisa ne maan-kʋʋda t'a sɩɩs a buuda ned sẽn ki," 
Leviticus21:2 sã ka b pẽe taab ne rogem. Rogma me sẽn pẽneg maan-kʋʋd ne ned ning yaa a ba, a ma, a bi-ribla, a bi-pugla, a kẽem bɩ a yao." 
Leviticus21:3 Sã n yaa a tão sẽn nan ka kul sɩda, a tõe n sɩɩs-a lame, a sẽn ka lʋɩ ned a to soolmẽ yĩnga. A pa tõe n sɩɩs-a, a sã n kul sɩd ye, yaa kisgu." 
Leviticus21:4 A ra yeel t'a yaa buud kãsma n saag n sɩɩs yaar ye: kisame. 
Leviticus21:5 Maan-kʋʋd ra põng a zug tẽnsʋk ye, a ra kok a toɛɛng ye, a ra bog a meng ye." 
Leviticus21:6 Maan-kʋʋd welga toore n ya Wẽnd pʋɩɩre, a ra sãam Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋr ye. Yaa bãmb n wat ne kũuni, n wat ne rɩɩbo n kõt Soaala-Wẽnde la b tog n yɩɩ sõma." 
Leviticus21:7 A ra kẽ ne pʋg-yoodr ye, a ra kẽ ne pag yʋʋr sẽn sãam ye, a ra kẽ ne pag a sɩd sẽn yiis ye, tɩ maan-kʋʋd dɩka a meng n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus21:8 Ges maan-kʋʋd wa nin-sõngo tɩ yẽ n wat ne Naaba-Wẽnd dɩɩbo. Ges-a wa ned sẽn welg toore la yaa maam n welg-a toore la maam la a Wẽnde, rũnna la beoogo." 
Leviticus21:9 Maan-kʋʋd bi-pugl sã n sãam a yʋʋr ne yoobo, yaa maan-kʋʋda yʋʋr la a sãam yã; b tog n yõog-a-la bugum." 
Leviticus21:10 Sã n ya maan-kʋʋd kãseng b sẽn daag kaam sõng a soab zugu, sẽn yeelga fu-sõma n deeg maan-kʋʋr naama, bɩ a ra yidg a zoobd ye, a ra kẽes a fut ye." 
Leviticus21:11 A ra pẽneg kũum, yaa a ba bɩ a ma n ki, n sãam a sõmblem ye." 
Leviticus21:12 A ra yi Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngẽ wã n lɛɛg n wa ne rẽgdo n paoog Wẽnnaam doogo, tɩ b sẽn taag-a ne kaam sõngã, b welg-a-la toore. Yaa maam la a Soaala-Wẽnde, rũnda la beoogo!" 
Leviticus21:13 A sã n na n kẽ kãadem bɩ a yi ne pa-kuli. 
Leviticus21:14 A ra saag n dɩk pʋg-kõore, a da rɩk pag a sɩd sẽn dig bɩ sẽn rẽgem a meng ne yoob ye. Yaa a buudẽ bi-pugla n kuiis-a." 
Leviticus21:15 Woto a buuda kõn waa n kalem ne bu-zẽnd ye la yaa maam b Wẽnnaam n welg-b toore.» 
Leviticus21:16 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus21:17 t'a wilg a Aarõ woto: «Ad noor f sẽn nan deeg zamaan woo zamaana: f kamba la f yagensa sʋka, ned da saag n kolg ne Wẽnd kũuni, a yĩnga sã n tar bãnd ye." 
Leviticus21:18 Ad neb niyns yĩng sẽn tar bãnde tɩ b pa tõe n pids maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde: m nin pa ne ye, m yaa woabga, m yõe-rot wãame, m tʋb fiusame, m kams bɩ m nao yaa lɛbla," 
Leviticus21:19 m nus bɩ m nao kiime," 
Leviticus21:20 m yaa kũnd soaba, m yaa ned sẽn butme; m nif bẽeda yẽbga; m tara dasempʋɩɩga, m tara nod kʋdre la m yaa zu-soaba." 
Leviticus21:21 Maan-kʋʋd, a Aarõ, yagenga yĩng sã n tar bãnde, a kõn tõog abada n tall kũuni n wa kõ Wẽnd ye. A sẽn ya koamsa yĩnga, a ra kolg ne Wẽnd dɩɩb ye." 
Leviticus21:22 A tõe n dɩɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩɩbo, wala sugr la laafi kosg maando." 
Leviticus21:23 A ka tõe n kolg peen-lilla ne maan-kugra ye; a wat n paooga m dooga ne a te-sõma wã la maam n welg-a toore.» 
Leviticus21:24 A Moyiiz taasa Wẽnd koeesa fãa a Aarõ ne a kambã la a Israyɛl zãma. 
Leviticus22:1 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus22:2 t'a wilg a Aarõ ne a kamba tɩ b sã n pa rat n paoog-ma, bɩ b lak b mens wakat kẽere ne maanda rɩɩbo, maand niyns Israyɛl kamba sẽn wat n kõt-ma, maam b Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus22:3 Yeel-b woto: Zamaan woo zamaana, yãmb buuda ned da saag n dɩ kũun niynsi a Israyɛl kamba sẽn kõt Wẽnnaama, a sã n ne tɩ b rɩɩb wata ne m paoogre. Sẽn saaga n dɩ, bɩ b kʋ a soaba. Yaa maam n gome, maam, yãmb Wẽnnaam!" 
Leviticus22:4 A Aarõ yageng sẽn bẽed yĩng bãaga bɩ sẽn kɩrsd a yĩng rẽgdo, da saag n dɩ rɩɩb ning Israyɛl kamba sẽn wat n kõt Wẽndã t'a ka reng n pek a meng ye. Boto me ne ned ning fãa sẽn lebg rẽgdo, a sẽn sɩɩs kũum yĩnga, bɩ yell a to sẽn be a zug yĩnga t'a mi tiiri." 
Leviticus22:5 Le yaa a sẽn sɩɩs-a rũng ning Wẽnd sẽn ka reegd a soab maoongo; le yaa a sẽn sɩɩs nin dẽgdo, a rẽgda sẽn ya-a a soab fãa." 
Leviticus22:6 Ned ning sẽn rẽgem a meng woto paada ne a rẽgd n ta zaabre la sã ka wĩndg n lʋɩ la a soo koom, a ka tõe n dɩ rɩ-sõma wã ye." 
Leviticus22:7 Zĩig sã n sobge t'a paam n peke, a tõe n dɩɩme tɩ yaa a rɩɩb la rẽ." 
Leviticus22:8 A ra wãb rũng sẽn ki bɩ rũng a to sẽn yõke, n wa rẽgem a meng ye. Maam la yãmb Wẽnde, rũnda la beoogo." 
Leviticus22:9 B reeg rɩɩba noy kãensã n da wa tʋk yel-wẽnd b zug ye tɩ ka rẽ b na kɩ, tɩ yaa maam b Wẽndã n welg b toore." 
Leviticus22:10 Sẽn ka-a maan-kʋʋd ka tõe n sɩɩs rɩ-sõng ye; sãan sã n sig maan-kʋʋda, a pa tõe n sɩɩs rɩ-sõng ye. Sẽn be-a maan-kʋʋd zakẽ n tʋmd n deegd yaood, yẽ me ka tõe n dɩ ye." 
Leviticus22:11 Maan-kʋʋda sẽn da a soab ne ligdi, yẽ soab toe n dɩɩme; wala rakõor sẽn dog a zakẽ: yaa b zu-soab rɩɩbo." 
Leviticus22:12 Maan-kʋʋd bi-pugl sã n yi kãadem ne ned sẽn ka maan-kʋʋda, a ka tõe n le rɩ wẽnd doog rɩɩb maan-kʋʋdba bal sẽn tõe n dɩ wã ye." 
Leviticus22:13 A sã n lebg pʋg-kõore, bɩ b sã dig-a lame, la a sẽn ka tar kamb yĩnga, a lɛɛg n wa be-la a ba zakẽ, wala a yãadmẽ, a tõe n dɩ-la a ba rɩɩbo, ne a sẽn ka maan-kʋʋdã." 
Leviticus22:14 Ned sã yĩd n dɩ maan-kʋʋd dɩɩbo, b saagd-a-la yaoodo, la a lebd n paasa yaooda pʋɩɩr a nu soaba." 
Leviticus22:15 B da saag n dɩ yaare dɩ-sõma niyns a Israyɛl sẽn yãk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye. 
Leviticus22:16 B sã n dɩ yaare, yaa yelle la b rogend b zugu, la yaa bũmb sẽn tog ne rolbo tɩ yaa maam a Wẽnde n welg dɩ-kãens toore. B yaa rɩ sõma." 
Leviticus22:17 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus22:18 t'a wilg a Aarõ ne a kamba la a Israyɛl dooga zãng woto: «A Israyɛl biig bɩ sãan sẽn nok-a, sã n dat n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo, yaa pʋleng bɩ yamleoog maoongo," 
Leviticus22:19 a sõng tɩ rũnga yɩ raoogo, n ya sõmbo, loalga, pesgo, bɩ bʋʋga." 
Leviticus22:20 Da wa-y ne rũng sẽn tar bãnd ye tɩ maoonga ka na n deeg ye. 
Leviticus22:21 Ned sã n wat ne rũnga, bedr bɩ bilfu, n na n kʋ yamleoog lagem-n-dɩ maoongo, bɩ tũu ne pʋlengo, Wẽnd ka tõe n deeg maoongã, rũnga sã n tar bãnd ye." 
Leviticus22:22 Da kõ Soaala-Wẽnd rũng sẽn ya zoang ye, kar-keok ye, kar-fiung ye, sẽn tar ãbr ye, sẽn tar dasempʋɩɩg ye, sẽn tar nodr sẽn kaood mɛt ye. B ra saag n dɩgl rũng a woto buud neong maan-kugra zug ye tɩ ka tõe n yɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩɩb ye." 
Leviticus22:23 Sã n ya rũng sẽn ya rɩgre bɩ sẽn ka sõma zãnga, f tõe n yõk-a lame n kʋ yamleoogo maoongo, a ya bedr bɩ bilfu; sã n ya pʋleng pidsgu yĩnga, ka tõe ye." 
Leviticus22:24 Da kõ-y Soaala-Wẽnd rũng sẽn toose bɩ sẽn kɩsge, ba sã n ka tũ ne ninsaal daab ye. Y meng da wa ne kũun a woto buud y tẽngẽ ye." 
Leviticus22:25 Da sak-y tɩ sãan wa ne kũun a woto buud n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye. Rũng sẽn kɩsg tara bãnde la Soaala-Wẽnd ka reegd b maoong ye. 
Leviticus22:26 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Leviticus22:27 Naafo bɩ pesgo, bɩ bʋʋg sã n doge, b kamba paada ne b ma dasem a yopoe. Daar a nii daarã, Soaala-Wẽnd tõe n deega b maoongo." 
Leviticus22:28 Da naag-y n kʋ nag-yãanga, pe-yãanga, bɩ bʋ-yãang ne b biig, raar a ye ye." 
Leviticus22:29 Y sã n kʋʋd pẽgr maoong maam, Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, bɩ y modg tɩ maoonga yɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tõe n deege." 
Leviticus22:30 B wãbda rũnga zãnga, maoonga raare, beoog ka vẽegd-a ye. Maam la yãmb Wẽnde, rũnna la beoogo!" 
Leviticus22:31 Deeg-y m noya la y tũ ba tɩ maam la y Wẽnnaam! 
Leviticus22:32 Da sãam-y m yʋʋr ye, modg-y tɩ m paam pẽgr Israyɛl kamba sʋka. Maam n welg yãmb sõmblem welegre." 
Leviticus22:33 Yaa maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga n na n yɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam, rũnna la beoogo.»" 
Leviticus23:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus23:2 t'a taas Israyɛl kamba noy kãensa: «Naaba-Wẽnd tara b kibs bɛda la b ra-sõma. Ad-m ra-moonesã, d sẽn na n seg taaba raare." 
Leviticus23:3 Yãmb na n tʋma rasem a yoobe, a yopoe raarã, y na n vʋʋsa zãnga. Ra-kãng yaa m segb ra-sõngo, y ka tõe n tʋm fɩ. Y sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:4 Ad dasem niyns a Israyɛl kamb sẽn na n tigim taab yʋʋmd pʋgẽ tɩ yɩ kibsa la Soaala-Wẽnd daare. 
Leviticus23:5 Pipi kiuugã piig la a naas daare, zĩ-sobdo, yaa Pak sɩngre, m waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:6 Kiu-kãng piig la a nu daarã na n yɩɩ kibs Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, bur sẽn ka ning bɩll kibsa. Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, y na n wãba bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle." 
Leviticus23:7 Pipi raarã yaa ra-sõngo, y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye." 
Leviticus23:8 Dasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, beoog sẽn vẽege, y na n kõo Soaala-Wẽnd b rɩɩbo. Daar a yopoe soaba yaa kibsa, y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye.»" 
Leviticus23:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus23:10 t'a togs Israyɛl kamba woto: «Y sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kõt yã, tigsgu sã n ta, bɩ y tall y pipi ka-gĩndã n wa kõ maan-kʋʋda." 
Leviticus23:11 Maan-kʋʋda reegd-a lame n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, n kos tɩ b me reeg-a." 
Leviticus23:12 Ka-gĩnda kũun daare, y na n paasa pe-bil sẽn ta yʋʋmde la sẽn ka tar bãnde, n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Leviticus23:13 Sẽn ket yɛsa, yaa zom moena a yi sẽn nag ne kaam tɩ b na n yãk n yõog bugum n noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri; wa-y ne rãam me bilfu." 
Leviticus23:14 Da rɩ-y buri, da wãb-y ka-sẽedem; da rɩ-y kood rẽenga, y sã n ka reng n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye. La rẽ yaa noor y kamb sẽn na n deeg, b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Leviticus23:15 Kibsa poore, yãmb sẽn tall y ka-gĩnda n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽndã poore, a yɩ tɩ zaame, sõd-y dasem pis-naas la a wɛ." 
Leviticus23:16 Dɩlla dasem pis-nu daare, yẽ me le yaa kibs tɩ y na n tall kũun a taaba n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus23:17 Y sẽn kẽed tẽng ning fãa, ad-y sẽn na n wa ne kũun ning n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, na n yɩɩ bur a yiibu sẽn wẽ ne zom moen a yiibu, bur sẽn ning bɩlle. Dẽ la y kood rẽeng bũmbu y sẽn na n tall n wa kõ Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus23:18 Y sẽn na n paas bũmb ninga, yaa pe-bi a yopoe sẽn ta yʋʋmde la sẽn ka tar bãnde. Sẽn pʋgde yaa loalga la pe-raad a yɩ, yũ-noog maoong yĩnga. Rãam la kũun a taab me naagdame. Y yõogd-b lame tɩ b yũ-noogã dʋ n ta Soaala-Wẽnde n noog b sũuri." 
Leviticus23:19 Y na n kʋʋ boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga; pe-bi wã sẽn ta yʋʋmdã kʋʋda lagem-n-dɩ maoongo. 
Leviticus23:20 Maan-kʋʋda tata Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n tees b kũuna: pe-bi a yiibã la kood rẽemsa burã. Yaa rɩ-sõma sẽn kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, la maan-kʋʋdbã n na n dɩ-ba." 
Leviticus23:21 Badaar na n yɩɩ tigsga, tigsg sẽn na n yɩ sõngo; y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd badaar ye, woto me yaa noor y kamba yĩnga, b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa." 
Leviticus23:22 Y sã n wa ta y tẽngẽ wã, y sã n wa na n tigs y koodo bɩ y ra saag y pʋʋga zãng ye; da wʋk-y sẽn lʋɩ wã ye, bas-y rẽ tɩ naong rãmb la sãamb wa tõog n yiisi. Yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam rũnda la beoogo!»" 
Leviticus23:23 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus23:24 t'a togs Israyɛl kamba woto: «Kiuug a yopoe soaba, a pipi daarã na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare, y yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ tẽeg n kils Soaala-Wẽnd daare, n kils-b ne noor la tõntõodo. Y na n boola taaba, n tigim taaba." 
Leviticus23:25 Badaare y ka na n tʋm tʋʋmd ye la y na n waa ne yũ-noog maand n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde.» 
Leviticus23:26 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz t'a taas woto: 
Leviticus23:27 «Kiuug a yopoe soaba, daar piig soaba, na n yɩɩ sugr kosg da-kãsenga. Y na n tigma taab badaare, y na n loe y noore la y na kʋʋ yũ-noog maoong n kõ Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Leviticus23:28 Badaare y ka na n tʋm ye, badaar yaa sugr kosg da-kãsenga, tɩ y na n ta n kudg kãntɩɩga n paam pekre, y Wẽnnaama taoore." 
Leviticus23:29 Sɩda, ned ning fãa sẽn zãgsa a noor loees badaare, b yiisd-a-la buudẽ." 
Leviticus23:30 Ned ning sẽn tʋma tʋʋmd badaare, mam meng m toore n yiisd-a a buud sʋka." 
Leviticus23:31 Da tʋm-y tʋʋmd ye; dẽ yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada, y kamb yĩnga, b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa." 
Leviticus23:32 Na n yɩɩ vʋʋsg daare wala raar a yopoe raarã. Loe-y noore, la kiuuga daar a wɛ soaba zaabre, n ta a vẽkẽmbeoogo zaabre, da tʋm-y ba fɩ.»" 
Leviticus23:33 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus23:34 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: «Kiuug a yopoe soaba, a piig la a nu daare, bɩ y sɩng Sẽgd kibsa. Y na n maana kibs Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga la a na n kaoosa dasem a yopoe." 
Leviticus23:35 Pipi daarã, kibsa mooneg daarã, yaa ra-sõngo, y ka tõe n tʋm tʋʋmd ye." 
Leviticus23:36 Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, y kõta Soaala-Wẽnd b yũ-noog maoongo, la a nii daarã, yẽ me le yaa tig-raaga tɩ y na n wa ne y kũun Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. La sẽn ya tigsg daarã, y ka tõe n tʋm ye. Kibsa na n baasa baraare, yaa vʋʋsg daare." 
Leviticus23:37 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd kibs bɛda, b ra-moonesã. Badaare y wat n kõo Soaala-Wẽnd y yũ-nood maando, y yamleoog kũuni, y laafi kosg maando, y maand sẽn tũnug ne zom la rãam la wala sẽn wilgã, raar fãa ne a rẽnna." 
Leviticus23:38 La ra yĩm-y a yopoe raarã, vʋʋsga raarã kũuni, y yamleoog kũuni bɩ y pʋleng pidsgu kũuni y sẽn tog n wa kõ Soaala ye." 
Leviticus23:39 Kiuug a yopoe soaba, a piig la a nu daare, y sã n wa tigs y koodo, bɩ y sɩng kibs Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ. Pipi daarã la daar a nii soaba yaa vʋʋsg daare." 
Leviticus23:40 Pipi daarã, y na n baoo tɩ-sõma biisi, koms vãado, tɩɩs sẽn tar vãad wʋsgo, kʋɩlg noor yɩlse, n naag taab n yɩɩnd y sũ-noog yɩɩla la y kilsd Soaala-Wẽnde. Na n yɩɩ woto dasem a yopoe tõre." 
Leviticus23:41 Yʋʋmd pʋgẽ yaa rasem a yopoe la y na n kɩdem woto Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Dẽ yaa noor sẽn kõn tedg abada. Ya kiuug a yopoe soaba pʋgẽ la y na n kɩdem y sũ-noogo. 
Leviticus23:42 Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, y na n gãanda sẽgdẽ." 
Leviticus23:43 Woto y yagensa na bãnge tɩ m sẽn wa n yiis Israyɛl kamb Ezipt tẽnga, sẽgd n yɩ b roto. Woto la yãmb Wẽnda raabo.»" 
Leviticus23:44 La a Moyiiz wilga Israyɛl kamba b sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga Soaala-Wẽnd kibs bɛda raare. 
Leviticus24:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus24:2 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba tɩ b wa ne oliviye kaam sẽn ya yɩlemd menga. Yẽ la b na n tall n yõgend zaabr fãa sãnem fitila Soaala-Wẽnd doogẽ. 
Leviticus24:3 A Aarõ na n ninga sãnem fitil kãsenga sɛka roogẽ, peenda sẽn lill kuga walsa koglga taoore. Fitila na n wida m taoor zaabr n ta yibeoogo. La rẽ yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada f yagensa yĩnga." 
Leviticus24:4 A Aarõ na n yõgna sãnem fitila t'a wit yʋng fãa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. 
Leviticus24:5 Dɩk alkam zom n wẽ bur gils piig la a yiibu. Bur fãa yaa zom wamde. 
Leviticus24:6 Fo na dogl-b-la a yoob-yoobe, zĩis a yiibu, sãnem roagendga zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Leviticus24:7 Rɩgl tɩdare meng menga bura zugu n paase. Tɩdar kãng la b na n wa yõog m yĩnga, bura zĩigẽ wala tẽegr bũmbu." 
Leviticus24:8 Yaa vʋʋsga raar fãa la bur kãens na n wa rɩgl m taoore. Israyɛl kamba na n waa ne ba wala zood sẽn kõn sãam kaseto. 
Leviticus24:9 B na n yɩ-la Aarõ ne a kamba soolem la yaa zĩ-sõngẽ la b na n dɩ-ba, wala kũun sõngo b sẽn paam Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩrẽ. Yaa noor sẽn kõn teem abada." 
Leviticus24:10 Daar a ye zabr n zĩnd sika pʋga. Yaa Israyɛl biig menga n zab ne Ezipt tẽng rao biiga. Ezipt tẽng neda rog-a-la ne Israyɛl bi-pugla sẽn boond tɩ Selomit. A Selomit ba la a Dibri, Dã sakẽ neda." 
Leviticus24:11 A Selomit biiga waa n wẽename n pʋd Soaala yʋʋr ne paoogre. B tall-a lame n wa a Moyiiz taoore. 
Leviticus24:12 B bao zĩig n paalg-a n gũud Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga. 
Leviticus24:13 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel a Moyiiz: 
Leviticus24:14 «Kɩt tɩ b yiis sẽn sãama Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋrã we-kɛɛnga. Yeel neb niyns fãa sẽn wʋm a gomdã tɩ b rɩk b nus n tik a zugu la rẽ poor bɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa laba ne kuga. 
Leviticus24:15 La gom ne Israyɛl kamba n kõ-b noor kãnga: Ned ninga fãa sẽn tʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnde, a tʋka yell a zugu." 
Leviticus24:16 Ned ninga sẽn sãama Wẽnnaam yʋʋre, toga ne kũum la yaa Israyɛl zãma wã n na n laba ne kuga. Sẽn tʋʋs-a Soaala-Wẽnde, a yaa tẽnga biig bɩ sãana, b kʋʋd-a lame." 
Leviticus24:17 Ned sã n kʋ a to, sẽn ya ned ninga fãa la a kʋ yã, yẽ me tog n kiime." 
Leviticus24:18 Ned sã n wẽ rũng n kʋ, a tog n yaoo rũng sẽn vɩ. Yaooda sẽn ki wã ne rũng sẽn vɩ." 
Leviticus24:19 Ned sã n pogl a saam-biiga, bɩ b pogl-a n lebse." 
Leviticus24:20 Kaoogdame n dol sẽn kaooge. Nif ronda nifu tɩ yẽnd dond yẽnde. Wẽng ninga fo sẽn maan f to wã, wẽng kãng me la b lebsd foo." 
Leviticus24:21 Ned sã n wẽ rũng n kʋ, a yaoodame n dole; sã n ya ninsaal la a kʋ yã, b tog n kʋʋ yẽ me." 
Leviticus24:22 Yaa sãana, yaa tẽngen-neda, yõor zema yõore la maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam, rũnda la beoogo.»" 
Leviticus24:23 A Moyiiz deng n wilga Israyɛl kamba woto, dẽ poore, b yiisa we-kɛɛnga sẽn da sãama Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋrã n lab-a ne kuga. La woto b maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Leviticus25:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz Sinayi tãnga zugu 
Leviticus25:2 t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: «Y sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kõt yãmbã, tẽnga na n vʋʋsa wakat kẽere, m waoogr yĩnga." 
Leviticus25:3 Yʋʋm a yoob pʋgẽ, bʋd f pʋʋgo, yolem f bugsuntundu, tigs b sẽn kõt-fo." 
Leviticus25:4 Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, tẽnga na n vʋʋsame, a na n vʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Da bʋd f pʋʋgo, da yolem f bugsuntund ye." 
Leviticus25:5 Tigsg kibs ka na n zĩndi tɩ alkama ka na bʋde la bugsuntunda me wil ka na n yolem ye. Yaa tẽnga vʋʋsg yʋʋmde. 
Leviticus25:6 Yaa tẽnga sẽn na n wom a toore, a vʋʋsga yʋʋmde la fo na n dɩ, foo ne f rakõore, f roog-biiga, f tʋʋmd-tʋmda, sãan sẽn nok foo, neb niyns fãa sẽn be-b ne foo." 
Leviticus25:7 Sã n ya rũmsã, yir la weoog rũmsi, b rɩ b sẽn paam fãa." 
Leviticus25:8 Sõd yʋʋm a yopoe naoor a yopoe, dat n yeelame tɩ yʋʋm pis-naas la a wɛ." 
Leviticus25:9 Kiuug a yopoe soaba, daar piig soaba, bɩ y kɩt tɩ b peeb baorgo, tɩ y tigim n kils Soaala-Wẽnde. Na n yɩɩ sugra kosg da-kãsenga daare la baorga na n peeb tẽnga fãa pʋgẽ." 
Leviticus25:10 Y na n mooname tɩ pis-nu yʋʋmda yaa yʋʋm-sõngo la yaa tẽnga kamba fãa fãagr yʋʋmde. Na n yɩɩ tigri yãmb yĩnga. Ned kam fãa lebd n deega a ba vẽenem, ned kam fãa lebda a buuda sakẽ." 
Leviticus25:11 Pis-nu yʋʋmda na n yɩɩ sũ-noog yʋʋmde; rẽ yĩnga y kõn bʋde, y kõn tigsi, la y sẽn ka yolem y bugsuntundã, y kõn fãs b biis ye." 
Leviticus25:12 Pis-nu yʋʋmdã na n yɩɩ yʋʋmd sõngo la ka y tʋʋmna n na n dɩlg-y ye, yaa pʋtã sẽn wom b toorã, yaa pʋta sẽn wom yaarã n na n dɩlg yã." 
Leviticus25:13 Yʋʋmd kãng pʋgẽ ned kam fãa reegda a sẽn da so. 
Leviticus25:14 F sã n koosd bũmbu, bɩ f sã n daad bũmbu, wẽdg ka tog n zĩnd ye, yʋʋmd sõnga yaa bũmb sẽn tog n naag n geelge." 
Leviticus25:15 F sã n dat n da pʋʋg f to nengẽ, sõd n bãng yaa yʋʋm a wãn la pis-nu yʋʋmda loog yã. Sẽn koosda wã sõtame n bãng yaa yʋʋm a wãn la a na n kell n soog pʋʋgã tɩ yʋʋmd sõnga yaool n ta." 
Leviticus25:16 Yʋʋmd sõnga sã n ket n zãra, pʋʋga ligda me paasdame; yʋʋmd sõnga sã n pẽ, pʋʋga ligd woogdame. Geenda f sẽn na n tigs bũmb ning pʋʋgẽ wã n yaool n saag a ligdi." 
Leviticus25:17 Ned ba a ye da wẽd a to ye, la y fãa zoe Soaala-Wẽnd nifu, tɩ yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam, rũnda la beoogo." 
Leviticus25:18 Deeg-y m noya, tũ-y m dog-n-mikã tɩ woto y na zĩnd tẽnga pʋgẽ ne laafi." 
Leviticus25:19 Tẽnga na n woma a biisi tɩ y rɩ n tɩge, tɩ y vɩɩnd ne bãane." 
Leviticus25:20 Y na n wa yeelame: ‹Yaa bõe la d na n dɩ yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, bʋdb sẽn ka na n bʋde tɩ tigsg ka na n tigsi?›" 
Leviticus25:21 M pʋlemd-y lame tɩ yʋʋmd a yoob soab na yɩ bark yʋʋmde, la yʋʋmd kãnga y na tigs sẽn sek yʋʋm a tãab dɩɩbo." 
Leviticus25:22 Yʋʋmd a nii soaba y na n bʋdame la yaa kood kʋdga la y na dɩ la y na n le rɩ kood kʋdg yʋʋmd a wɛ soaba, n tãag tigsgu." 
Leviticus25:23 Ned ka koosd a pʋʋgo, y tẽngẽ wã, t'a yi a soolmẽ zãng ye, tɩ tẽnga yaa mam tẽnga la yãmb yaa mam sãamba la m noakense." 
Leviticus25:24 Sẽn koos-a a pʋʋg tõe n le wa raa-a lame. 
Leviticus25:25 F saam-biig a ye n dɩ ned samde, la samda yaoob yĩnga a kong n koosa a pʋʋg n na n paam ligdã, ad-y yaa sẽn pẽ-a yẽnda ne rogem n yɩɩdã, n wat n da pʋʋga sẽn koosã, t'a leb buuda soolmẽ." 
Leviticus25:26 Fo yaa naong soaba n koos f pʋʋg la f ka tar ned sẽn pẽ foo ne rogem sẽn tõe n wa ra pʋʋga t'a kell n pa buuda soolmẽ ye, ad yaa fo meng n na n maane f sẽn tõe n le soog pʋʋgã." 
Leviticus25:27 F na n sõda yʋʋma sẽn loog pʋʋga koosg tɛka n yao yʋʋm kãens ligdi la f soog f pʋʋgo. 
Leviticus25:28 Fo sã n ka tar sẽn na n yao n deeg pʋʋgã, sẽn daa pʋʋgã n na n kell n soog-a n tãag yʋʋmd sõngã. Yaa yʋʋm sõnga pʋgẽ la pʋʋga lebd a pipi soaala nugẽ." 
Leviticus25:29 Ned sã n koos roogo sẽn be tẽng lal-gũbri pʋgẽ, yaa a koosga yʋʋmd pʋgẽ la a tõe n yao n le reeg-a. Yaa yʋʋmda pʋgẽ bal la roogo tõe n leb a soaba." 
Leviticus25:30 Dɩlla sã n maan yʋʋmde t'a pa le wa, rooga lebgda sẽn da-a wã ne a kamb soolem. Ba yʋʋmd sõnga sã n ta, yẽ n ket n so-a." 
Leviticus25:31 Sã n yaa roog sẽn ka be tẽnga lal-gũbr pʋgẽ, roog sẽn be tẽn-bõonesẽ, b tõe n le ra-a lame, la sã n ta yʋʋm sõngã, a lebda b pipi soaala." 
Leviticus25:32 Sã n ya tẽns niyns a Levi kamba sẽn kẽedã, yaa wakat buud fãa la b tõe n yao n le reeg b roogo." 
Leviticus25:33 Sã n yaa a Levi biiga n da yirã n kẽ, yʋʋm sõnga sã n ta, yẽ me lebs yirã a soaba la a leb a zakẽ, a leb a tẽngẽ, a me soolmẽ. A Levi kamba tẽnse yaa a Levi kamba soolem, ba b sã n tɩ naag ne Israyɛl kamb a taaba." 
Leviticus25:34 Pʋta sẽn pẽ ne a Levi kamba tẽns ka tõe n koos ye tɩ bãmb n so-b wakat buud fãa. 
Leviticus25:35 F saam-biig n be ne foo la naong waa n kẽ-a lame t'a lebg f sam-dɩta, da bas-a ye. Ba a yaa sãana, ba a noka tẽng a to, kell n sõng-a." 
Leviticus25:36 Da bao n dɩ a yõod ye. Zoe Wẽnnaam nif n bas-a t'a vɩɩnd ne foo. 
Leviticus25:37 Da peng-a ligdi, n dat t'a wa yao ne roagl ye; da kõ-a rɩɩb n yet t'a wa lebs tɩ yɩɩg a sẽn deeg ye." 
Leviticus25:38 Yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam. Maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga n na n kẽes y Kanaã tẽnga, n na n lebg yãmb Wẽnnaam rũnna la beoogo." 
Leviticus25:39 F saam-biig sã n be ne foom n wa lʋɩ nimbãaneg pʋgẽ, t'a yet t'a na n koosa a meng ne foo n lebg f rakõore, da zã-a wa a lebga f yamb ye." 
Leviticus25:40 A na n yɩɩ wala f tʋʋm-tʋmd bala, ned sẽn tʋmd n deegd yaood bala, bɩ f noaka la a na n tʋma ne foo n tãag yʋʋmd sõngã." 
Leviticus25:41 Rẽ marsã la f na n bas-a t'a loog ne a kamba. A leb a buudẽ n tɩ soog a ba rãmb sẽn bas ne-a pʋɩɩr ninga. 
Leviticus25:42 Mam sẽn yiis b rãmb Ezipt tẽnga, lebga mam tʋʋm-tʋmdba, b pa tog n koos-b wala yem-daad ye." 
Leviticus25:43 Da zã-y bãmb toog ye, zã-y-ba la y zoe maam y Wẽnda nifu." 
Leviticus25:44 F rakõapa, f zak kom-pugli na n yɩɩ tẽn-zẽng rãmba sẽn gũbg yãmba kamba. Yaa bu-zẽng ned bala n tõe n yɩ yãmb sõgne." 
Leviticus25:45 Sẽn tõe n yɩ-b yãmb sõgen-kamba, yaa sãamba sẽn be-b ne yãmb kamba, bɩ bãmb sẽn so b rãmba kamba, sẽn dog la b vɩ yãmb sʋka, bãmb n tõe yɩ yãmb soolem." 
Leviticus25:46 Yãmb loogr poore, yãmb kamb n na n soog-ba, daar fãa. Nin-bãmb buud n tõe n yɩ yãmb yem-daado. Sã n ya ne Israyɛl kamba, ka boto ye, ned kõn wẽoog a saam-biig ye." 
Leviticus25:47 Sãan bɩ noak nug sã n tarẽ tɩ fo saam-biig sẽn be ne yẽnda yaool n tar a samde n kong n dɩk a meng n koos ne yẽnda, bɩ ne sãamb buudu," 
Leviticus25:48 fo tõe n yaoome n deeg tẽnga biigã. A saam-biig fãa tõe n yaoome n deeg-a. 
Leviticus25:49 Sẽn tõe n yao-b n deeg-a, yaa a ba kẽema bɩ a ba yao, a ba kẽem biiga bɩ a ba yao biiga, a buuda neda, bɩ a menga, a sã n tõe." 
Leviticus25:50 A na n yẽsa ne sẽn daa yẽ wã, n ges yaa yʋʋm a wãna n be, a raaba tẽka n tãag yʋʋmd sõngã; ligda geels na n tũu yʋʋma sõore; b na geela wala a sã n da rɩkdẽ la yaood beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Leviticus25:51 Sã n ket wʋsg tɩ yʋʋmd sõnga yaool n ta, a yao n fãag a menga me na n tũu yʋʋm kãens sõore." 
Leviticus25:52 Sã n ka le ket wʋsg tɩ yʋʋmd sõnga ta, a geta sẽn keta sõore, n yao n fãag a menga." 
Leviticus25:53 Na n geelame wala a sã n da tʋmd n deegda ligd beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa. B ra zã-a a yaar ye, b ra namsd-a tɩ fo sĩnd n getẽ ye." 
Leviticus25:54 Yãmb saam-biiga sã n ka paam tɩ b yao n deeg-a, a gũ yʋʋmd sõngã n paam a menga, yẽ ne a kamba." 
Leviticus25:55 Israyɛl kamb sẽn tõe n yɩ ned ninga sõgne, yaa maam bala. Yaa maam n yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga. Yaa maam bal la bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus26:1 Da naan-y wẽn-faad n kõ y meng ye, da pees-y nin-naande, daoog bɩ kugri n waoog-a wa y wẽnd ye, da lugl-y kuga n yĩgimd b taoor ye tɩ maam bal la yãmb Wẽnnaam rũnna la beoogo." 
Leviticus26:2 Deeg-y vʋʋsga noya la y waoog Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra do-sõngẽ: maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Leviticus26:3 Y sa n vɩ wala m sẽn wilg yã, n deeg m noya y pʋ-tẽerẽ la y manesem pʋgẽ," 
Leviticus26:4 m na kɩt tɩ saaga sek yã, tẽnga na wom a biisi, tɩɩsa na ning biisi," 
Leviticus26:5 al tɩ kooda pãbe n tãag tɩɩsa wobre, tɩ tɩɩsa me wob n tãag bʋdbo. Y na rɩ n tɩge la tẽnga me na zĩnd ne laafi." 
Leviticus26:6 M na n gãnega tẽnga laafi, bũmb kõn yɛɛs-y y gãagẽ ye. M na n zãaga y tẽnga ne bõn-nindi wã fãa; sʋʋg kõn leb n pɩʋʋg y tẽng ye." 
Leviticus26:7 Y na n diga y bɛɛbã la y sʋʋsa na gãneg-b zãnga. 
Leviticus26:8 Neb a nu digda bɛɛb koabga, tɩ koabg rigd tus piiga. Y sʋʋs n na n dɩ-b zãnga." 
Leviticus26:9 M na n gesa yãmb yelle, y na n wekame n lebg zembala la m zooda na n paa ne yãmba." 
Leviticus26:10 Dɩẽ kooda na n vaagame n yiisi n paam n bĩng rõanda rẽnna. 
Leviticus26:11 M na n tila m zak yãmb sʋka la m kõn bas-y abada. 
Leviticus26:12 M na n vɩɩnda ne yãmba, n ya yãmb Wẽnnaam tɩ yãmb ya m neba." 
Leviticus26:13 Yaa maam la yãmb Wẽnnaam; maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga tɩ y ra yɩ be yem-daad ye. M kɩtame tɩ y lub y zɩɩbã n kẽnd marsã ne yẽesem. 
Leviticus26:14 Yãmb sã n ka kelg maam la y sã n ka reeg m noya," 
Leviticus26:15 yãmb sã n tusd m noya la m dog-n-mikã n lebsd kɛɛnga, yãmb sã n ka tũud m sẽn wilgi, n sãam zoodã," 
Leviticus26:16 ma me na n tusa yãmb n lebs kɛɛnga. M na zĩndig-y rabeem la yɩɩr pʋgẽ, y na bẽ bãase, tɩ y nin lebg kõaada, tɩ y vʋʋsg lebg toogo. Y na n namsa y mens n bʋd y pʋt la na n yɩɩ bɛɛb rɩɩbo." 
Leviticus26:17 M na n bas-y lame la y bɛɛba na n tõog-y lame; yãmb na n kʋɩɩ tĩig tɩ ned yaool n pa rigd-y ye. 
Leviticus26:18 La y sã n baas n ka kelgdẽ, m na sɩbg y beegrã naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus26:19 M na n sika y wilg-m-menga n kɩt tɩ y saag lebg kutu, n kɩt tɩ y tẽnga lebg zũudu." 
Leviticus26:20 Y na n sɛ-la y pãng zaalem, tɩɩsa wala pʋtã kõn le wom biig ye." 
Leviticus26:21 Y sã n zẽk y zug ne maam n ka kelg-ma, m na sik yel-beed y zugu tɩ y beegrã paam sɩbgr naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus26:22 Yaa we-rũms la m na n bas tɩ b kẽ tẽngã n yõg y kamba fãa, n sɛ y rũmsã, n yãgs-y wa b sẽn yãgsd daaga, tɩ y soy lebg so-vɩɩdo." 
Leviticus26:23 La rẽ sã n ka wilg y yam, tɩ y ket n zẽkd y zug ne maam," 
Leviticus26:24 mam me na yik ne yãmba n sɩbg y beegra naoor a yopoe. 
Leviticus26:25 Y sã n sãam zoodã, m na yiis m sʋʋg n dok m sũuri. Y na n tɩ sũu taab y tẽn-bɛda pʋga la m na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-kũum babs-y be, m na n kẽesa y bɛɛba be tɩ b yõg yãmba." 
Leviticus26:26 Koma sã n wa lʋɩ y tẽngẽ, pagb piig na tõog n wʋm zak piig bur, wʋng a ye pʋgẽ. Y na rɩ la kõn ta ni, tɩ moenda na n yɩɩ bilfu." 
Leviticus26:27 La rẽ sã n ka wilg y yam tɩ y ket n zẽkd y zug ne maam," 
Leviticus26:28 mam me na yik ne yãmba, m sũur na n puugame, tɩ m sɩbg y beegrã naoor a yopoe." 
Leviticus26:29 Y na n wãba y kom-dibli nemdo, n wãb y kom-pugli nemdo." 
Leviticus26:30 M na n menesa y pʋʋsga zĩiga, m na n wã-la y tɩdara maan-kugr. Y wẽn-faada sẽn wã n dɩga zutu la m na n sam y ned woo ned woo sẽn ki. M yam na n laka ne yãmba." 
Leviticus26:31 M na n kɩtame tɩ y tẽnsa lebg raboodo, m na n zũndga y wẽnd dotã, m kõn le kok y maanda yũug ye." 
Leviticus26:32 M na n pidsa tẽnga ne sũ-sãanga al tɩ y bɛɛba sẽn na n wa reeg yãmb zĩiga na n yɛɛse. 
Leviticus26:33 M na n sẽeg-y-la nin-zẽmba sʋka, m na n tʋma bɛɛba tɩ b wa tak zabr ne-yã. Y tẽnga na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga tɩ y rot lebg raboodo." 
Leviticus26:34 Y sẽn wat n be y bɛɛba sʋka n ka mi y sẽn lebdẽ wã, wakat kãng la tẽnga na n sɩng vʋʋsgo. A ka na n le paam koob ye." 
Leviticus26:35 Yãmb nimbãanega wakat la a na n vʋʋse tɩ yãmb sẽn waa n be a pʋgẽ wã, a ka paam vɩʋʋg n vʋʋs ye." 
Leviticus26:36 Sẽn na n kell n pa-b tẽngẽ wã, m na n kɩt tɩ b vɩɩnd ne yɩɩre, y bɛɛba sʋka. Tɩɩg wã koɛɛng meng sẽn lʋɩt bʋʋre na n yɛɛs-b lame tɩ b kʋɩ tĩig wala b zoet n na n põsa sʋʋga, mik ned ba a ye ka pʋgd-b ye." 
Leviticus26:37 B na n lagsame n lʋɩ n bʋʋg taaba wala sʋʋg n pʋgd ba, mik ned ka pʋgd-b ye. B ka na n tõog b bɛ ba a ye." 
Leviticus26:38 Y bɛɛba tẽngẽ la y na n pa gilli; bɛɛba tẽng n na n dɩ-y zãnga. 
Leviticus26:39 Sẽn põs-b bɛɛba, b yel-wẽna wẽnem n na n lɛɛg n kʋ-ba. La ka na n yɩ bãmb mens yel-wẽna yĩng bal ye, na n naaga ne b ba-rãmb yel-wẽna." 
Leviticus26:40 Daare b na n waa n baas n deeg b kongre la b ba-rãmb kongre, b na n wa n deeg tɩ b paooga maam, tɩ b zẽka b zug ne maam," 
Leviticus26:41 la rẽ la mam me yik zabre ne ba n tall ba n kẽes b bɛɛba tẽngẽ. Daar bɩ b wa yik n boog b zẽk-m-menga la b reeg b yel-wẽna sɩbgre. 
Leviticus26:42 M na yaool marsã n tẽeg zood ning m sẽn yõg ne a Zakoob, ne a Izaak, ne a Abraam. M kõn yĩm m tẽnga yell ye." 
Leviticus26:43 Rũnda wã m nongame tɩ b yi n bas tẽnga t'a vʋʋse, m nongame tɩ b nams n yao b beegre. Sɩda bãmb n zãgs tɩ b kõn tũ m dog-n-miki, bãmb n yeel tɩ m noya yaanda b sũuri." 
Leviticus26:44 La ba b sã n wa be b bɛɛba tẽngẽ, m ka na n yi b poorẽ ye, m kõn yeel tɩ m sũur yaanda ne ba n kʋ-b zãng ye; m kõn sãam m zooda ne b ye, tɩ maam la b Wẽnnaam." 
Leviticus26:45 M na n tẽegame tɩ Ezipt yiib wakato m yõga zood ne-ba tɩ b bɛɛba getẽ la b kũmd sũuri. M maana woto tɩ b bãng tɩ maam la bãmb Wẽnde, rũnda la beoogo.»" 
Leviticus26:46 Woto la Naaba-Wẽnd gom ne a Moyiiz noore, Sinayi tãnga zugu, n wilg b sẽn yals bãmb ne Israyɛl kamba sʋka, n wilg b sẽn tog n dɩk sor ninga, n wilg b noya la b rog-n-miki." 
Leviticus27:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Leviticus27:2 t'a togs Israyɛl kamba woto: «Ned sã n pʋlem Naaba-Wẽnd t'a na n kõ-b-la ninsaala, a tõe n pidsa a pʋlemdã ne ligdi yaoobo." 
Leviticus27:3 Ligda yaooda woto: Sã n ya rao yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi n digd pisoobe, yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-nu. Wanzurf wakɩr wa b sẽn dɩt a soab Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr do-sõngẽ wã." 
Leviticus27:4 Sã n ya paga, yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-tã." 
Leviticus27:5 Sã n ya bi-ribl sẽn ta yʋʋm a nu n digd pisi, yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems pisi, sã n ya bi-pugla yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems piiga." 
Leviticus27:6 Sã n ya bi-ribl sẽn ta kiuug n digd yʋʋm a nu, yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems a nu. Sã n ya bi-pugla yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems a tãabo." 
Leviticus27:7 Rao sã n ta yʋʋm pisoobe bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, a yaood yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems piig la a nu. Sã n ya paga, yaa wakɩ koeems piiga." 
Leviticus27:8 Ned sã n pʋlem ninsaal Soaala-Wẽnde n yaool n ya naong soaba n ka tar a sẽn tog n kɩsã, b tallda nedã n wa maan-kʋʋda nengẽ t'a ges a sẽn na n yaoolg-a to-to; maan-kʋʋda geta a naongã n geelg n zemse." 
Leviticus27:9 Sã n ya rũng b sẽn tõe n dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, b sã n pʋlem n sɛ, lebga bũmb sẽn ya sõngo," 
Leviticus27:10 ka tõe n tedg rũng a to, ka tõe n tedg buud a to tɩ bõn-sõng ledg bõn-yoog zĩigẽ, bɩ bõn-wẽng ledg bõn-sõng zĩig ye. B sã n dɩk rũng n tedg ne rũng a to, b yiiba fãa lebga Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩre." 
Leviticus27:11 Sã n ya rũng sẽn ka tõe n dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd la b pʋlem yã, b sẽn pʋlma yĩnga, b talld-a lame n wa maan-kʋʋda taoore." 
Leviticus27:12 Yẽ n na n ges rũngã n bãng a sõng la a goalenga n saag a ligdi la yẽ sẽn wilgã n yɛse. 
Leviticus27:13 B sã n dat n yao n deeg-a bɩ b paas a ligda bilfu. 
Leviticus27:14 Ned sã n pʋlem a yir Soaala-Wẽnde, maan-kʋʋdã n get n bãng a sã n bee yõod wʋsgo bɩ a sã n ka be yõodo, la yẽ sẽn yeel n be." 
Leviticus27:15 Raoã sã n dat n yao n deeg a yiri bɩ a paas ligd bilfu n yao n deege. 
Leviticus27:16 Ned sã n pʋlem a pʋʋg Soaala-Wẽnde, b geta ka buud pet a wãn la b toe n bʋd a pʋgẽ. Alkam pugsgu pet piig fãa yaa wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-nu la f kɩta." 
Leviticus27:17 Sã n ya yʋʋm sõnga pʋgẽ la a pʋlem yã, ka geend n paas bɩ n woog bũmb ye." 
Leviticus27:18 Sã n ya yʋʋm sõng poore, b sõta yʋʋma sẽn ket tɩ yʋʋmd sõnga ta wã. Yʋʋmda sã n ket n zãra, gɛɛlga woogda bilfu." 
Leviticus27:19 Sẽn pʋlm-a a pʋʋga sã n dat n le soog a pʋʋgo, a paasda ligda sẽn da geelgã pʋɩɩr a nu soaba." 
Leviticus27:20 A sã n yak n koos pʋʋgã ne ned a to n yaool n ka reng n yao tɩ pʋʋga sẽn zoe n ya Wẽnd soolma le lebg a rẽnna, yaoolem daadã n so puugã marsã; fo ka tõe n le yao n deeg-a dẽ poor ye." 
Leviticus27:21 Woto, yʋʋmd sõnga sã n vẽke, sẽn daa-a wã me ka le so-a ye, a lʋɩta Soaala-Wẽnd soolmẽ; ned a to ka le tõe n dɩ a yõodo, a lebgda maan-kʋʋda soolem bala." 
Leviticus27:22 Fo sã n pʋlem pʋʋg f sẽn da, ka f ba rẽnd ye," 
Leviticus27:23 maan-kʋʋda geta yʋʋma sẽn kete tɩ yʋʋm sõnga ta, n tõog n geelg pʋʋga ligdi la ligda sẽn geelgã, b yaood-a-la baraar bala tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd bõn-sõngo." 
Leviticus27:24 Yʋʋm sõnga sã n ta, pʋʋga lebda a pipi soaal nugẽ tɩ yaa a saam-dãmb bũmbu." 
Leviticus27:25 Geelsã geenda wa b sẽn geend Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra do-sõngẽ. Koeeng a ye wãada bõones pisi. 
Leviticus27:26 Ned ka tõe n dɩk a rũng bi-rẽeng, rũm-bedr bɩ rũm-bila: nag-bila, bulla, pe-bila, n pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnd ye, a zoe n yaa bãmb soolem." 
Leviticus27:27 Sã n ya rũng sẽn ka tõe n dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, la a ka rat n tek ne rũng a to, b tõe n geelga a ligdã n paas pʋɩɩr a nu soaba t'a yao n deege. B sã n ka yao n deeg-a, b koosda rũnga wala a sẽn tõe n da tɛka." 
Leviticus27:28 Ned sã dɩk bũmb n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd zãnga, bõn-kãng yii koosgo la raab pʋgẽ. Tõe n yɩɩ ned bɩ rũng la b pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnd zãnga. Bũmb sẽn kõ Soaala-Wẽnd zãng lebga bũmb sẽn ya sõng zãnga, lebga Soaala-Wẽnd b ye soolem." 
Leviticus27:29 Ninsaal b sẽn pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnd zãnga ka tõe n le yao n deeg ye, dẽnd b kʋ-a bala." 
Leviticus27:30 Tẽnga biisi, tɩɩsa biisi, na dʋʋga dʋr piig-piiga, n yãk dʋr a ye, pʋɩɩr a ye, n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, rẽ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩre." 
Leviticus27:31 Fo sã n yãk Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩrã n kõ-ba, n yaool n dat n yao n deege, dẽnd f paas bũmb bilfu: Sã n saag a nu fo paasda a ye tɩ lebg a yoobe la f kɩta." 
Leviticus27:32 Rũmsã, bɛd la bõonego me pʋɩta piig piiga n yãk pʋɩɩr a ye n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. Wẽnd so-la a ye tɩ fo so a wɛ." 
Leviticus27:33 B ra kẽ n welg sẽn ya sõmb la sẽn ka sõmb ye; b ra tedg ye, b sã n tedge, rũng a to wã me naag n lebga Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩre; ka tõe n yao n le reeg ye.»" 
Leviticus27:34 Yaa woto la Wẽnnaam noya. B togs-b-la a Moyiiz Sinayi tãng zugu, Israyɛl kamb yĩnga." 
Numbers1:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ, sɛka roog pʋga, kiuug a yiib soaba pipi raare, b yi Ezipt tẽng tɩ yʋʋm-bɩtẽ la b yeel-a lame:" 
Numbers1:2 «Sõd-y yã a Israyɛl kamba fãa sak-saka, roog-roogo; sõd-y rapa fãa a yembr-yembre." 
Numbers1:3 Foo ne a Aarõ, sõd-y Israyɛl kamb yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi la sẽn loog pisi, neb niyns fãa sẽn ya a Israyɛl tãb-biisi, sõd-y-ba, ned kam fãa ne a tãnsoaben-doogo." 
Numbers1:4 Buud fãa na n yãka kãsem a ye n kõ-y tɩ b sõng yã. 
Numbers1:5 Ad neb niyns sẽn na n sõng yãmba: A Rubẽ roogẽ, a Sedewur biig a Elisur." 
Numbers1:6 A Simeõ roogẽ, a Surisadayi biig a Selumiyɛl" 
Numbers1:7 A Zɩɩda roogẽ, a Aminadab biig a Nasõ." 
Numbers1:8 A Isakar doogẽ, a Suwar biig a Nataneyɛl." 
Numbers1:9 A Zabulõ roogẽ, a Elon biig a Eliyab." 
Numbers1:10 A Zozɛf biig a Efrayim roogẽ, a Amiyud biig a Elisama; a Manase roogẽ, a Pedasur biig a Gameliyɛl." 
Numbers1:11 A Bẽnzame roogẽ, a Gideoni biig a Abidã." 
Numbers1:12 A Dã roogẽ, a Amisadayi biig a Ayiyezɛr." 
Numbers1:13 A Asɛr roogẽ, a Okrã biig a Paziyɛl." 
Numbers1:14 A Gad roogẽ, a Deowɛl biig a Eliyasaf." 
Numbers1:15 A Neftali roogẽ, a Eyinã biig a Ayira.»" 
Numbers1:16 Bãmb la b tũus yã tɩ b lʋɩ b ba rooga kamb taoore, bãmb ned kam fãa da soo neb tus wɛɛla." 
Numbers1:17 Nin-bãmb me la a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ bool tɩ b wa sõngd-ba. 
Numbers1:18 B kɩtame tɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa tigim taab kiuug a yiib soaba pipi raare. Ned kam fãa bao-la a ba-biisi, zak-zaka, roog-roogo, la b ra gʋlsda rao fãa sẽn ta yʋʋm pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna." 
Numbers1:19 A Moyiiz sõd-b-la Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da togs-a." 
Numbers1:20 A Israyɛl pipi biig a Rubẽ doogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo," 
Numbers1:21 B paama tus pis-naase la a yoobe la kobs-nu. (46 500) 
Numbers1:22 A Simeõ roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo," 
Numbers1:23 b paama tus pis-nu la a wɛ la kobs-tã. (59 300) 
Numbers1:24 A Gad roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:25 B Paama tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-yoob la pis-nu. (45 650) 
Numbers1:26 A Zɩɩda roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:27 B paama tus pisopoe la a naase la kobs-yoobe. (74 600) 
Numbers1:28 A Isakar roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:29 B paama tus pis-nu la a naase la kobs-naase. (54 400) 
Numbers1:30 A Zabulõ roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:31 B paama tus pis-nu la a yopoe la kobs-naase. (57 400) 
Numbers1:32 Sã n yaa a Zozɛf kamba, a Efrayim doogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:33 B paama tus pis-naase la kobs-nu. (40 500) 
Numbers1:34 A Manase roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:35 B paama tus pis-tã la a yi la kobs-yi. (32 200) 
Numbers1:36 A Bẽnzame roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:37 B paama tus pis-tã la a nu la kobs-naase. (35 400) 
Numbers1:38 A Dã roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:39 B paama tus pisoob la a yiibu la kobs-yopoe. (62 700) 
Numbers1:40 A Asɛr roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:41 B paama tus pis-naas la a ye la kobs-nu. (41 500) 
Numbers1:42 A Neftali roogẽ, b sõda a yembr-yembre, rap niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biisi. B saaga zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers1:43 B paama tus pis-nu la a tãabo la kobs-naase. (53 400) 
Numbers1:44 Woto n yɩ neba sõore sõadga rãmb sẽn paame. Sõadga rãmb la a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ la bãmb sẽn kos b rãmb sõngre. Roog fãa yɩɩ nin-yende. 
Numbers1:45 B sõda rao fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna, n ya tãb-biiga." 
Numbers1:46 B paama tus kobs-yoob la a tã la kobs-nu la pis-nu. (603 550) 
Numbers1:47 A Levi buuda kamb bala la b pa sõde. 
Numbers1:48 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers1:49 «A Israyɛl kamba sʋka, yaa a Levi rooga bal la f ka na n saag n sõde." 
Numbers1:50 Bãmb la f na n kos tɩ b ges sɛka roog yelle. B ges rooga la teed niyns fãa sẽn be a pʋgẽ. Bãmb n na n tʋk a teedã, n ges tɩ bũmb fãa wa a zĩigẽ. B na n ti b rotã n gũbg-a." 
Numbers1:51 Yikr sã n ta, Levitsa n baasd teedã n tʋk n looge. Sã n le ta sikã, bãmb n lebd n ti-a. Nin-zaalg sã n saag n kolge, b kʋʋd-a lame." 
Numbers1:52 Israyɛl kamb a taaba tiida roog-roogo, b tiidame n yegl b tãb-kaoore." 
Numbers1:53 Sã n yaa a Levi kambã, bãmb tiidame n gũbg sɛka roogo la woto buuda gill na tɩlg ne Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puuri. Levitsa bal n na n ges sɛka roog yelle.»" 
Numbers1:54 Israyɛl kamba maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tʋlge, wala b sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers2:1 Naaba-Wẽnd goma woto ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ: 
Numbers2:2 «Bɩ Israyɛl kamba ti b roto n gũbg b tãb-kaoore. Tiidame n zãag bilfu ne sɛka roogo. 
Numbers2:3 Yaanga la tãb-biisã sẽn fãoog-b ne a Zɩɩda na n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoore. A Zɩɩda rooga kãsem la a Aminadab biig a Nasõ. 
Numbers2:4 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pisopoe la a naase la kobs-yoobe. (74 600) 
Numbers2:5 Sẽn na n fãoog-b ne yẽnda, yaa Isakar la a Zabulõ. A Isakar rooga kãsem la a Suwar biig a Netanɛl." 
Numbers2:6 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-nu la a naase la kobs-naase. (54 400) 
Numbers2:7 A Zabulõ roog kãsem la a Elon biig a Eliyab. 
Numbers2:8 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-nu la a yopoe la kobs-naase. (57 400) 
Numbers2:9 Dɩlla rota sẽn fãoog ne a Zɩɩda n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã tara tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii la a yoobe la kobs-naase. (186 400) Bãmb n dengd yikri. 
Numbers2:10 Sẽn na n ti-b nug rɩtgo n gũbg b tãb-kaoore, yaa tãb-biis niyns sẽn na n fãoog-b ne a Rubẽ. A Rubẽ rooga kãsem la a Sedewur biig a Elisur." 
Numbers2:11 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-naas la a yoobe la kobs-nu. (46 500) 
Numbers2:12 Sẽn na n fãoog-b ne yẽnda yaa a Simeõ la a Gad doogo. A Simeõ rooga kãsem la a Surisadayi biig a Selumiyɛl. 
Numbers2:13 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-nu la a wɛ la kobs-tã. (59 300) 
Numbers2:14 A Gad rooga kãsem la a Reuwɛl biig, a Eliyasaf." 
Numbers2:15 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-yoob la pis-nu. (45 650) 
Numbers2:16 Rota sẽn fãoog ne a Rubẽ n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã paama tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nu la a ye la kobs-naas la pis-nu. (151 450) Bãmb n pʋgd ne yikri. 
Numbers2:17 Bãmb poore, yaa Levitsa n yikd ne sɛka roogo. Bãmb n be sʋk zãnga. Yikra yikda pʋgdg-pʋgdga, yalsga me yaa boto." 
Numbers2:18 Nin-taoorã, sẽn na n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã yaa sẽn na n fãoog-b ne a Efrayim. A Efrayim roog kãsem la a Amiyud biig a Elisama." 
Numbers2:19 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-naas la kobs-nu. (40 500) 
Numbers2:20 Sẽn na n fãoog-b ne yẽnda yaa a Manase la a Bẽnzame roogo. A Manase roog kãsem la a Pedasur biig a Gameliyɛl. 
Numbers2:21 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-tã la a yi la kobs-yi. (32 200) 
Numbers2:22 A Bẽnzame roog kãsem la a Gideoni biig a Abidã. 
Numbers2:23 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-tã la a nu la kobs-naase. (35 400) 
Numbers2:24 Rota sẽn fãoog ne a Efrayim n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã paama tãb-biis tus koabg la a nii la koabga. (108 100) Bãmb la yikr a tãab rãmba. 
Numbers2:25 Sẽn na n ti-b nug goabga n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã, yaa sẽn fãoog-b ne a Dã. A Dã roog kãsem la a Amisadayi biig a Ayiyezɛr." 
Numbers2:26 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pisoob la a yi la kobs-yopoe. (62 700) 
Numbers2:27 Sẽn na n fãoog-b ne yẽnda yaa Asɛr la Neftali roogo. A Asɛr roog kãsem yaa Okrã biig a Pagiyɛl. 
Numbers2:28 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-naas la a ye la kobs-nu. (41 500) 
Numbers2:29 A Neftali roog kãsem la Eyinan biig a Ayira. 
Numbers2:30 A tãb-biisa sõor yaa tus pis-nu la a tã la kobs-naase. (53 400) 
Numbers2:31 Rota sẽn fãoog-b ne a Dã n ti n gũbg b tãb-kaoorã paama tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nu la a yopoe la kobs-yoobe (157 600) Bãmb n na n yaool yikri, pʋgdg-pʋgdga. Fãa na n dɩka sore n pʋgd b tãb-kaoorã.»" 
Numbers2:32 Ad Israyɛl kamba sõore: sõda roog-roogo, sõda tãb-sik-tãb-sika la b gill yaa tus kobs-yoob la a tã la kobs-nu la pis-nu. (603 550)" 
Numbers2:33 B ka naag a Levi kamba n sõd ne a Israyɛl ye. La noor kãng me la Soaala-Wẽnd da kõ a Moyiiz. 
Numbers2:34 Israyɛl kamba reega noorã. Sɩd me, b kẽnd bɩ b yalsda, da yaa zak-zaka, roog-roogo, b ra pa kẽnd yaar ye." 
Numbers3:1 Ad-a Aarõ ne a Moyiiz kamba la b yagense, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn waa n gomd wakat ning Sinayi tãnga zugu." 
Numbers3:2 A Aarõ kamba yʋy la woto: bi-kẽenga la a Nadab, t'a Abiyu, a Elazar la Itamar pʋgda." 
Numbers3:3 Bãmb n yɩ a Aarõ kamba; b taag-b-la kaam sõngo tɩ b reeg maan-kʋʋr naam, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Numbers3:4 Sã n yaa a Nadab ne a Abiyu, bãmb kii Soaala-Wẽnd taoore la rẽ yaa b sẽn saag n yõog wisdu b sẽn da ka kõ-b sor tɩ b yõoge. B kii Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ; b ka rog kamb ye. Yaa a Elazar la a Itamar n da tʋmd maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd b ba a Aarõ sɛɛgẽ." 
Numbers3:5 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers3:6 «Bool a Levi rooga t'a wa reeg tʋʋmde maan-kʋʋd, a Aarõ, nengẽ. Bãmb n na n sõng-a." 
Numbers3:7 B na n pẽnega sɛka roogo n tʋm a tʋʋma n sõng a Aarõ ne rooga gilli. 
Numbers3:8 Bãmb n na n ges sɛka roog teeda yelle, bãmb n na n deeg Israyɛl kamba zĩig n tʋm tʋʋm niyns sẽn tʋmd a pʋgẽ." 
Numbers3:9 Woto wã, f na n dɩka Levitsa n kõ a Aarõ ne a kamba, Wẽnd waoogr tʋʋma yĩnga." 
Numbers3:10 Da tol n kees tʋʋmd sɛka roogẽ sak a to yĩng ye. A Aarõ ne a kambã n na n soog maan-kʋʋr naam. Nin-zaalg da saag n kolg n wa bao a yõor yãkr ye.» 
Numbers3:11 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz yɛsa: 
Numbers3:12 «Mam meng m toore n tũus Levitsa Israyɛl kamba sʋka. B lebga m soolem tɩ bãmb la m deeg yã wala a Israyɛl bi-rẽenga. 
Numbers3:13 Bi-rẽeng fãa yaa mam soolem. M sẽn kʋ Ezipt kom-dẽemsa raare, m dɩka Israyɛl kom-dẽemsã n kõ m menga. Ninsaal bi-rẽenga, rũng bi-rẽenga, maam n so. Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Numbers3:14 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ: 
Numbers3:15 «Sõd a Levi kamba, zak-zaka, roog-roogo. Sõd bi-ribl fãa sẽn ta kiuugu.»" 
Numbers3:16 A Moyiiz maana Levitsa sõadg wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-a noore. 
Numbers3:17 Ad-b sẽn sõd b rãmba wa Levitse: a Gersõ, a Keyat, a Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ad-a Gersõ roogo la a kamba: a Libni, a Simeyi." 
Numbers3:19 A Keyat roogo: a Amram, a Yisear, a Ebrõ la a Uziyɛl." 
Numbers3:20 A Merari roogo: a Mali la a Musi. Woto n yɩ a Levi kamba b sẽn sõd roog-roogo. 
Numbers3:21 B welga a Gersõ yagensa sags a yiibu: a Libni sak, la a Simeyi saka." 
Numbers3:22 Sõadga wakato b sõda kom-dibli sẽn ta kiuugu la sẽn yɩɩd rẽnna; b paama tus a yopoe la kobs-nu. 
Numbers3:23 A Gersõ yagens da tida b zak sɛka roog kudga, n tees nin-taoore." 
Numbers3:24 A Layɛl biig a Elyasaf n da ya kãsma. 
Numbers3:25 Ad-b sẽn da get bũmb ning sɛka roogẽ: yaa rooga menga, a pɛɛla sẽn na n lud-a, rignoora peen-lillã." 
Numbers3:26 B le geta zaka pɛɛla la zaka rignoora peendã, zak ning sẽn gũbg rooga la maan-kugrã, n paas wĩ wã sẽn na n tall n ti roogã." 
Numbers3:27 A Keyat yagensã, b welga bãmb sags a naase: a Amram la a Yisear kamba, a Ebrõ la Uziyɛl kamba." 
Numbers3:28 B sõda kom-dibli sẽn ta kiuugu la sẽn yɩɩd rẽnna la b paama tus a nii la kobs-yoobe. Bãmb n na n ges sɛk roog lagdã, te-sõma wã." 
Numbers3:29 A Keyat yagensa ra ti-la b rot sɛka rooga nug rɩtgo. 
Numbers3:30 Bãmb kãsem da yaa a Uziyɛl biig a Elisafã. 
Numbers3:31 Bãmb tʋʋmd sɛka roogẽ: b ra geta kuga walsa koglgo, te-roagendgã, sãnem fitil kãsengã, yũ-noog maan-kugrã, tɩdara maan-kugri la b sẽn tar bũmb ning fãa tʋʋmd, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngẽ. Sẽn le paas yɛsa yaa sɛka rooga peen-lillã. Bãmb n da get rẽ fãa yelle." 
Numbers3:32 B fãa gill kãsem la a Elazar, a Aarõ biiga. Yẽ n da get neb niyns fãa sẽn tʋmd b Soaala-Wẽnd waoogra ro-sõngẽ." 
Numbers3:33 A Merari yagense: a Mali la a Musi kamba. 
Numbers3:34 B sõda kom-dibli sẽn ta kiuugu la sẽn yɩɩd rẽ la b paama tus a yoob la kobs-yi. 
Numbers3:35 Bãmb kãsem da yaa a Abiayil biig, a Suriyɛl. A Merari yagensa da ti b rot sɛka roog nug goabga." 
Numbers3:36 Bãmb tʋʋmda ra geta raad niyns sẽn tar n tiid sɛka roogo, a ra-lugsã, a ra paadsã, ra gilsã, b te-sendsã la bũmb niyns fãa sẽn tar n tiid roogã." 
Numbers3:37 Le paasa zaka ra-lug gilsã ne b te-sendsã la biili wã ne wĩ wã. 
Numbers3:38 Yaa a Moyiiz, a Aarõ ne a kambã n da ti sɛka roog noore, yaang sẽnẽ. Bãmb n da tʋmd Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr ro-sõngẽ, buuda zĩigẽ. Nin-zaalg sã n da saag n ges te-bãmb yelle n yaool n ka maan-kʋʋda, b kʋʋd-a lame." 
Numbers3:39 Levitsa kamb sẽn ta kiuug bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna n ya rapa, ad-y b sõora yɩɩ tus pisi la a yiibu. A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ n da maan sõadgã, sak-saka, roog-roogo, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-a noore." 
Numbers3:40 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Sõd la f gʋls Israyɛl bi-rẽeng fãa sẽn ya raoa la sẽn ta kiuugu. 
Numbers3:41 Levitsa na n yɩɩ mam soolem, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. A Levi kamba n na n deeg a Israyɛl kom-dẽemsa zĩigẽ, wala b rũmsa kom-dẽems sẽn na n deeg Israyɛl rũmsa kom-dẽemsa zĩigẽ.»" 
Numbers3:42 Wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kose, a Moyiiz sõda Israyɛl kom-dẽemsa fãa." 
Numbers3:43 B sẽn sõd kom-dibli sẽn ta kiuugu la sẽn ya b ma pipi kamba, b paama tus pisi la a yi la kobs-yi la pisopoe la a tã. (22 273)" 
Numbers3:44 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers3:45 «Deeg Levitsã a Israyɛl kom-dẽemsa zĩigẽ; reeg Levitsa rũm-dẽemsã a Israyɛl rũm-dẽemsa zĩigẽ. Levitsa yaa m soolem tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Numbers3:46 Israyɛl kom-dẽemsã kobs-yi la pisopoe la a tã sẽn zʋʋg Levitsa kamba sõorã," 
Numbers3:47 fo na n deega wakɩ koeems a nu bãmb ned kam fãa yĩnga, la yaa wakɩr ning sẽn dɩt wẽnd doogẽ wã. Wakɩr kãng tekda bõones pisi." 
Numbers3:48 Ligd kãng kɩta a Aarõ ne a kamba, kamb niyns sõor sẽn zʋʋga yĩnga.»" 
Numbers3:49 A Moyiiz reega kamb niyns sõor sẽn da zʋʋga yĩnga," 
Numbers3:50 wakɩ koeems sẽn tõe n dɩ wẽnd doogẽ, bãmb tusr la kobs-tã la pisoob la a nu." 
Numbers3:51 A Moyiiz kɩsa ligd kãng a Aarõ ne a kamba wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a noore. 
Numbers4:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: 
Numbers4:2 «Ges a Levi kamba sʋka n welg a Keyat roogẽ," 
Numbers4:3 neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu tɩ b wa tʋm sɛka roogẽ. 
Numbers4:4 Ad-b tʋʋmd sẽn na yɩ a soaba sɛka roogẽ: te-sõma wã gesgo. 
Numbers4:5 B sã n na n viig sɛka roogo, a Aarõ ne a kamb n na n wa yak peen-lillã la b na n dɩk-a lame n pil kuga walsa koglgo." 
Numbers4:6 B lut-a lame n paas ne gãong sẽn ka madgd koom. B lebd n pila fãa ne peend mismiuugu n yaool n tui ra-tuiidsã, koglga zẽkr yĩnga." 
Numbers4:7 Te-roagendga zugu b yɛdgda peend mismiuugu, n dɩgl yõg-laasã, laasã, wũmlsã, ko-teesã la bura sẽn ka tõe n vaalã." 
Numbers4:8 Dẽ fãa luta ne peen moomd yʋs, n sẽbg ne gãong sẽn ka madgd koom, n yaool n tui ra-tuiidsã te-roagendga zẽkr yĩnga." 
Numbers4:9 B baooda peend mismiuugu n lud sãnem fitil kãsengã n paas bug-rɩɩnda sẽn dʋʋgd zĩig ningã, ne yɩʋʋdã, wõrsdgã la kaama tʋgdã." 
Numbers4:10 B lut-b-la ne gãnd sẽn ka madgd koom n loe pãndare. 
Numbers4:11 Yũ-noog maan-kugra zugu, b tʋɩta peend mismiuugu, n mobg-a ne gãnd sẽn ka tõe n madg koom la b tui a raadã a tʋkr yĩnga." 
Numbers4:12 B rɩkda teed niyns fãa b sẽn tar b rãmb tʋʋmde sɛka roogẽ, n lud ne peend mismiuugu, n pil ne gãnd sẽn ka madgd koom, n loe pãndare, n tʋke" 
Numbers4:13 Bãmb n wʋkd tompɛglma maan-kugra zugu n lɛɛg n gãneg peend miuugu," 
Numbers4:14 n wʋk teeda b sẽn tar b rãmb tʋʋmdã maanda yĩnga: yɩʋʋda sẽn na n wʋk bug-saala, kut roɛ sẽn tar n tusd bugum, tompɛglma kardo, tompɛglma laase, nemda kõse, zɩ-mesdma laase la maan-kugra teed a taaba. B luta rẽ fãa ne gãnd sẽn ka madgd koom. B tuiida raadã maan-kugra tʋkr yĩnga." 
Numbers4:15 Yikr sã n ta, a Aarõ ne a kamba pinda teeda fãa t'a Keyat kamba wa tʋk n looge. Rooga sã n ket n yɛs a zĩigẽ b pa saagd n sɩɩs bũmb ye. Yɩta b kũum. Sɛka roog teed niyns a Keyat kamba sẽn tõe n sɩɩs la sẽn wilgã." 
Numbers4:16 Maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ biig a Elazar, n da get fitilsa kaama yelle, tɩdara sẽn na n yõogã, kũuna burã, kaama sẽn taagd maan-kʋʋdbã. Yẽ n get sɛka roog ne a pʋgẽ teeda fãa.»" 
Numbers4:17 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers4:18 «Da bas-y t'a Keyat yagensa kolg roogã n bao b kũum ye. 
Numbers4:19 Ad-y sẽn na n maan bũmb ning tɩ b ra ki ye b sã n kolgd zĩ-sõngã: a Aarõ ne a kamba wat n yals ned kam fãa a tʋʋmd zĩigẽ, a sẽn tog n tʋka taoore." 
Numbers4:20 B ra saag n kẽ, gesg yĩng bal ye, ba ya nif kamseg pʋgẽ. B na n kiime.»" 
Numbers4:21 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers4:22 «Sõd a Gersõ kamba zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers4:23 Sõd neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu sẽn deeg tʋʋmd sɛka roogẽ. 
Numbers4:24 Ad-a Gersõ kamba tʋʋmde, ad-b sẽn na n tʋke." 
Numbers4:25 Bãmb n zɩt sɛka zaka pɛɛla, sɛka roog menga ne a pɛɛlã la gãn niyns sẽn ka madgd kooma, sɛka rooga noor peen-lillã," 
Numbers4:26 zaka pɛɛla, wĩ wã la teed a taaba fãa, b sẽn deeg bũmb ning fãa b tʋʋmda yĩnga." 
Numbers4:27 Yaa a Aarõ ne a kamba noor la a Gersõ yagensa na n tũ, yaa zɩɩb la b yet tɩ b tʋk bɩ yaa tʋʋmd a to la b yet tɩ b maan. Teeda tʋkr n na n yɩ b tʋʋmde." 
Numbers4:28 A Gersõ yagensa tʋʋmd la woto sɛka roogẽ; yaa zɩɩba tʋkr tʋʋmde la maan-kʋʋd a Itamar na n kõ-ba. A Itamar yaa a Aarõ biiga.» 
Numbers4:29 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Sã n ya a Merari yagensã, sõd bãmb me zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers4:30 Sõd neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu n kõ-b tʋʋmde, sɛka roogẽ." 
Numbers4:31 Teeda tʋkr n na n yɩ b tʋʋmde. B sẽn na n tʋk la woto: rooga ra-lug paklsã, ra paadsã, ra-lug gilsã ne b te sendsã." 
Numbers4:32 Le yaa ra-lug gilsã sẽn gũbg zakã ne b te-sendsã, biili wã ne wĩ wã la tʋʋma teedo. Y na n wilga ned kam fãa a sẽn tog n tʋke." 
Numbers4:33 Woto la a Merari kamba tʋʋmde sɛka roogẽ la a Aarõ biig a Itamar n na n ges b yelle.» 
Numbers4:34 A Moyiiz, a Aarõ ne kãsem-dãmba sõda a Keyat yagensã zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers4:35 B sõda neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu la sẽn da tʋmd sɛka roogẽ," 
Numbers4:36 b paama neb tus a yi la kobs-yopoe la pis-nu. 
Numbers4:37 Ad-y b sẽn waa n na n sõd a Keyat kamba sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ, a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tũu Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-b noor ningã." 
Numbers4:38 Ad-a Gersõ kamba sẽn sõd zak-zaka, roog-roogo," 
Numbers4:39 kamb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu la sẽn da tʋmd sɛka roogẽ," 
Numbers4:40 yɩɩ neb tus a yi la kobs-yoob la pis-tã. 
Numbers4:41 Ad-y b sẽn waa n na n sõd a Gersõ kamba sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ, a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tũu Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-b noor ningã." 
Numbers4:42 Ad-a Merari kamba sõore. Sõd-b-la zak-zaka, roog-roogo." 
Numbers4:43 Sõda neb niyns yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu la sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ," 
Numbers4:44 la b paama tus a tã la kobs-yi. 
Numbers4:45 Ad-y b sẽn waa n na n sõd a Merari kamba sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ, a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tũ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ-b noor ningã." 
Numbers4:46 Sã n ya Levitsa a Moyiiz la Aarõ ne kãsem-dãmb sẽn sõd zak-zaka, roog-roogã," 
Numbers4:47 b sẽn sõd neb niyns fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pis-tã n digd pis-nu la sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ, rooga baasg bɩ a tʋkr sã n wa ta," 
Numbers4:48 b paama neb tus a nii la kobs-nu la pis-nii. 
Numbers4:49 Wala a Moyiiz sẽn paam Soaala-Wẽnd noor la a sẽn wilgi, ned kamb fãa ra mi-la a sẽn maande la zɩɩb ninga a sẽn tog n tʋke." 
Numbers5:1 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers5:2 «Kõ Israyɛl kamba noore tɩ b yiis sikẽ wã ned ning fãa sẽn bẽed yĩng bãag sẽn dẽgemd-a, sẽn zĩ-a ne a yĩng rẽgdẽ bɩ sẽn sɩɩs-a kũum." 
Numbers5:3 B yaa pagb bɩ rapa, yiis-b sikẽ wã; la woto b kõn dẽgem a Israyɛl kamba sika, tɩ m me naag n be-la a pʋgẽ.»" 
Numbers5:4 A Israyɛl kamb deega noore. B riga nin-bãmb n yiisi, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da togs a Moyiiz." 
Numbers5:5 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers5:6 «Yeel Israyɛl kamba woto: ‹Pag bɩ rao sã n tõdg Soaala noore n maan sẽn kisi, n bõn a to, a bãng tɩ yell n be a zugu." 
Numbers5:7 B wat n togsa b kongrã. Sẽn bõna a to wã lebsda a sẽn dɩka gilli n le paas b sẽn saagd bũmba ligda pʋɩɩr a nu soaba. 
Numbers5:8 B sẽn bõn a soaba kiime la a roagd ka sẽn na n deeg a sẽn tog n deega ye, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd la b lebsda, dat n yeelame tɩ yaa maan-kʋʋda la b lebsda. La b leb n paasda pe-raoogo sẽn na n kʋ yel-wẽnd dolb yĩnga, sẽn na n kʋ beegda sugr paoong yĩnga." 
Numbers5:9 Israyɛl kambã n so pʋɩɩr ning b sẽn dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Numbers5:10 Bõn-sõma wã fãa sẽn dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd yaa maan-kʋʋda n so.› » 
Numbers5:11 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers5:12 «Gom ne Israyɛl kambã n wilg-b woto: Ned tõeeme n wa tags t'a pag ka vɩ neere, t'a maanda yoobo," 
Numbers5:13 n wa tags t'a yoodame t'a sɩda ka miẽ ye, tɩ neda to me ka miẽ ye, tɩ ned zɩɩ n ling-a yoob pʋgẽ ye." 
Numbers5:14 Baasgo sɩda tagsdame t'a yaa pʋg-yoaada. Yaool n tõeeme me tɩ paga ka pʋg-yoaad ye. 
Numbers5:15 Sɩda na n talla a pagã n ta maan-kʋʋd taoore ne kũun ninga a sẽn tog n wa ne. Yaa alkam kɛgeng zom wamd pogbre. Zoma ka naagd ne kaam ye, la tɩdar me ka paasd ye, tɩ yaa bãong lukr kũuni." 
Numbers5:16 Maan-kʋʋda kɩtdame tɩ b wa ne paga Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. 
Numbers5:17 Maan-kʋʋda ningda ko-sõng tãnd laagẽ la a yõngda sɛka roog tom n yugl-a. 
Numbers5:18 Maan-kʋʋda kɩtdame tɩ paga kolg t'a lodg a zug peende. Paga yaagda a nus t'a sagl zom wamdã, bãn-lukr kũuna. Dẽ tɩ maan-kʋʋda meng zãada a nugẽ kãab beed koom, ko-tɩɩsenga." 
Numbers5:19 A na n kosa pagã t'a naag yẽ n wẽen n togs a sẽn togsdã la a yetame: ‹Sã n yaa sɩda tɩ f ka yo ne raoa, sã n yaa sɩda tɩ f talla f meng neere, tɩ f ka zãmb f sɩda n faool f menga, bɩ kãab beeda koom da maan f bũmb ye." 
Numbers5:20 La sã yaa sɩda tɩ f maana wẽng ne rao a to n faool f menga, sã n yaa sɩd tɩ f kẽ ne raoa to," 
Numbers5:21 bɩ Soaala wa ne f sɩbgre. Bɩ Soaala sɛɛs f rogem la f kẽn ne pʋ-wuka. Bɩ b kɩt tɩ f buuda neb wa tẽegd fo yelle b sã n wa kãabd b mens beedo. 
Numbers5:22 Bɩ ko-kãnga sẽn ya kãab beed kooma sig f yãadẽ n wuk f pʋga la a sɛɛs f rogem.› La paga na n leokame: ‹Ami, ami! Bɩ sɩd yɩ boto!›" 
Numbers5:23 Maan-kʋʋda na n gʋlsa a kãab beeda sebr zugu la a na n losa sebra koomẽ tɩ kooma yẽes gʋlsma. 
Numbers5:24 A ka na n yãg n kɩt tɩ paga yũ kãab beed kooma ye. 
Numbers5:25 Maan-kʋʋda rengdame n deeg paga nugẽ bãn-lukr kũuna n tees Soaala-Wẽnd wala a sẽn tog n maane la a rɩgl-a maan-kugra zugu. 
Numbers5:26 Maan-kʋʋda na n yõnga zoma nug koore wala Soaala-Wẽnd pʋ-tẽer nekr bũmbu la a na n yõog-a-la maan-kugra zugu. Dẽ poore, a kõta paga koom t'a yũ." 
Numbers5:27 Paga yũuda kooma la sã n mik t'a dẽgmame, t'a sɩd yõka rao a to nugu, kãab beed kooma na n kẽ-la a pʋgẽ n lebg tɩɩsga t'a pʋg wuki, t'a rogem sɛ. Paga na n lebga a buuda sʋka wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk a soab barka." 
Numbers5:28 Sã n mikame tɩ paga ka yaale, a ka sãam ye, taal yi-la a zugu la a na yɩ roagda.»" 
Numbers5:29 Ya noor a woto la Soaala-Wẽnd yiis yã, pag bɩ a sɩd poorẽ. B sã n wa yet tɩ b tara kaset tɩ paga yoodame n paoogd a sɩda," 
Numbers5:30 bɩ sã n yaa a sɩdã n maand sãmbse t'a yoodame. Wakat kãnga sɩda tallda pagã n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, tɩ maan-kʋʋda maan wa b sẽn wilgã." 
Numbers5:31 Dẽ poore, bãonga sã n luki, yell ka le be sɩda zug ye. Pagã n deegd a sɩbgre a sã n sɩd kongame." 
Numbers6:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers6:2 Gom ne Israyɛl kambã n togs-ba: «Pag bɩ rao sã n pʋlem a meng Soaala-Wẽnde," 
Numbers6:3 bɩ a bas rãam la toose. Rãam sẽn wẽnemd menga, toos sẽn wẽnemd menga, bɩ a ra sɩɩs ye. A ra wẽk bugsuntung biis koom n yũ ye, a ra wãb a biisa meng sẽn ket n ya maas bɩ sẽn kʋɩ ye." 
Numbers6:4 Tãag a pʋlenga pidsgu, a kõn dɩ bũmb sẽn maan ne bugsuntung biisi, bɩ a biisa pagd ye." 
Numbers6:5 Tãag a pʋlenga pidsgu, barg ka sɩɩsd a zug ye. A na n welga toore, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, n tãag a pʋlenga pidsg raare. A zuga zobd basdame tɩ yi." 
Numbers6:6 Sã n ka a pʋlengã n pids zãnga, a ka tõe n pẽneg kũum ye." 
Numbers6:7 Ya-la a ba, a ma, a kẽem bɩ a tão n ki, a kõn pẽneg b kũum n rẽgem a meng ye. A welga toor Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Numbers6:8 A sẽn pʋlem a meng Soaala-Wẽnd tɛka, a welga sõmblem welegre, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Numbers6:9 Kũum sã n ling ned t'a lʋɩ a sɛɛgẽ n wẽneg n be kaalem, a rẽgmame; a wõrsda a zoobdo, a pekr yĩnga, n gũ tɩ dasem a yopoe wa pidi." 
Numbers6:10 Daar a nii soaba a na n waa sɛka roogẽ ne wal a yi bɩ manwal bõones a yi n wa kɩs maan-kʋʋdã," 
Numbers6:11 t'a kʋ a ye, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga, n kʋ a to wã, yũ-noog maoongo, la a bõsda sẽn pʋlma wã yel-wẽnd yẽesgo, kũuma sẽn ki a sɛɛgẽ n dẽgem-a wã yĩnga. Badaare, a lebd n pʋlmame tɩ barg kõn sɩɩs a zoobd ye." 
Numbers6:12 A lebd n pʋlma a meng Soaala-Wẽnd wala a sẽn da yals pipi raarã, la a wata ne yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bila, yel-wẽnd dolb maoong yĩnga. Pʋlenga sẽn sãama, dɩll a le maneg n sɩng zãnga.»" 
Numbers6:13 Sẽn pʋlma a meng Wẽndã na n waa sɛka roog noore, a pʋlenga rasma sõor sã n pidi." 
Numbers6:14 A wata ne kũuni n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde: yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bil sẽn ka tar bãnde. Dẽ yaa yũ-noog maoong yĩnga. N paas yʋʋm yɛng pe-sɛdg sẽn ka tar bãnde, dẽ yaa yel-wẽnd dolbo maoong yĩnga. A le wata ne pe-raoog sẽn ka tar bãnde, laafi kosg yĩnga." 
Numbers6:15 A wata ne peoog sẽn pid ne bur sẽn ka lob bɩlle, bur sẽn wẽ ne alkam zom pɛɛlga, ne miisdu sẽn ya tagdo, la miisd sẽn ya faase, n ka ning bɩlle, n paas kaama la rãama b sẽn tog n tũnugã." 
Numbers6:16 Maan-kʋʋda taasd-b-la Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n maan sugr kosg la yũ-noog maando. 
Numbers6:17 Maan-kʋʋda kodgda pe-raooga laafi kosg yĩnga; a paasda bur peoogo, bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle. A kõta Soaala-Wẽnd kaama la rãama a sẽn tog n tũnugã." 
Numbers6:18 Sẽn pʋlma a meng Wẽndã põngda a zuga sɛka roog noore, n wʋk zoobdã n lob laafi kosga maoonga bugmẽ." 
Numbers6:19 Pesga bãok sã n bɩ, maan-kʋʋda yãkd-a lame n paas peooga pʋg bur a ye sẽn ka lob bɩlle la miisg faasg a ye sẽn ka lob bɩlle la a sagend-b-la pʋlemda nugẽ, a zuga sã n põnge." 
Numbers6:20 Maan-kʋʋda maanda a sẽn tog n maane tɩ b lebg Wẽnd rũuni. Bũmb me sẽn lebgd kũun sõng maan-kʋʋda yĩnga, yaa rũnga yãoogo a sẽn dɩk tees Wẽndã la gerã a sẽn yãkã. Ya rẽ poore marsã la sẽn pʋlma meng Wẽndã tõogd n le yũ rãam." 
Numbers6:21 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd noor b sẽn kõ ned sẽn pʋlem a meng poorẽ. Woto me la kũun niyns a sẽn tog n wa ne la ka yet t'a ka tõe n paas bũmb a to ye. Sẽn maana pʋlenga modg n tũ a meng sẽn yalse. 
Numbers6:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers6:23 «Wilg a Aarõ ne a kamba b sẽn tog n ning a Israyɛl bark to-to. B yeel woto: 
Numbers6:24 Bɩ Wẽnd ning-f bark la a gũ fu! 
Numbers6:25 Bɩ Wẽnd kõ-f laafi la b sudg foom b kũuna! 
Numbers6:26 Bɩ Wẽnd seg-f ne zoodo la b kõ-f f laafi! 
Numbers6:27 Yaa woto la b na n ning m yʋʋra sʋka tɩ m ning-b barka.» 
Numbers7:1 Sɛka roog sẽn ti n sɛ raare, a Moyiiz taag-a-la ne kaam sõngo la a rɩka sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã fãa n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. A maana boto me ne maan-kugrã ne a teedo." 
Numbers7:2 A Israyɛl kãsem-dãmb waa ne b kũuni. Kãsem-dãmba yaa sẽn ges b sõadga yelle. 
Numbers7:3 B talla b kũuna n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. Yɩɩ bilim-bilm a yoob sẽn ning maasem tɩɩga, la niis piig la a yi n da tat-ba. Kãsem-dãmb a yi waa ne bilim-bilm a ye la kãsem fãa yɩɩ naafo. B kɩtame tɩ b kolg sɛka roogo." 
Numbers7:4 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers7:5 «Reeg kũuna b sẽn wat ne wã, reeg-ba sɛka roog tʋʋma yĩnga. Bilim-bilma la niisã, Levitsa na n deeg-b lame sɛka rooga tʋʋma yĩnga. Ned kam fãa paam a tʋʋmda sẽn dat t'a paam bũmb ninga.»" 
Numbers7:6 T'a Moyiiz na n deeg bilim-bilm la niisã n kɩs Levitsã. 
Numbers7:7 Bilim-bilm a yi la niis a naase la a kõ a Gersõ kamba b tʋʋmda yĩnga. 
Numbers7:8 A Aarõ biig a Merari kamba deega a Itamar nengẽ, b tʋʋmda yĩnga, bilim-bilm a naase la niis a nii." 
Numbers7:9 A Keyat kamba ka reeg bũmb ye tɩ yaa b bãgdẽ la b ra tog n zɩ te-sõma wã. 
Numbers7:10 Kãsem-dãmba talla kũuna n wa maan-kugra bark ningr daare, a kaam taagr daare. Yɩɩ maan-kugra taoore la b wa ne-ba." 
Numbers7:11 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Yaa ned kam fãa ne a daare la kãsem-dãmba na n tall b kũuna n wa tɩ b rɩk maan-kugrã n ning Soaala-Wẽnd soolmẽ.» 
Numbers8:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers8:2 «Yeela Aarõ woto: ‹F sã n na n widig fitil kãsenga, sõng t'a vẽenema tʋʋs taoore.› »" 
Numbers8:3 A Aarõ tũ Soaala-Wẽnd daabo: a widiga sãnem fitil kãsengã t'a vẽenema tʋʋsd taoore, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers8:4 Ad-b sẽn da maan sãnem fitil kãsenga to-to: Sãnem la b rɩkd n kud-a, a sɛɛgã n tãag a puugã. A kudba tũu wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers8:5 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers8:6 «Yiis Levitsã a Israyɛl kamba sʋka n yɩlg-ba. 
Numbers8:7 La ad-f sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: F na n mes-b-la ne ko-sõngo, tɩ b bao barga n saag b yĩnga fãa la b pek b futu n lebg yɩlma." 
Numbers8:8 Dẽ poore b rengd n waa ne loalga la zom sẽn nag ne kaam. N wa ne loalg a to yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoong yĩnga. 
Numbers8:9 A Israyɛl rooga zãng na n tigmame la Levitsa na n kolga sɛka roogo. 
Numbers8:10 Levitsa na n yalsa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore tɩ Israyɛl kamba tẽeg b nus b zutu. 
Numbers8:11 A Aarõ na n deeg-b lame wala a Israyɛl kũuni n dɩk-b n tees Soaala-Wẽnd wala b pʋɩɩre, la b tʋʋmd na n lebga sɛka roog tʋʋmde." 
Numbers8:12 Levitsa na n tẽega b nus lols a yiiba zutu tɩ fo reeg-ba n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. A ye na n kʋʋ sugr kosg maoongo, t'a ye kʋ yũ-noog maoong. Dẽ poor marsã la a Aarõ maand a sẽn tog n maan tɩ Levitsa yɩlge." 
Numbers8:13 Foom a Moyiiz na n yalsa Levitsa a Aarõ ne a kamb a yiiba taoore la f na n tees-b-la Soaala-Wẽnd wala b pʋɩɩre. 
Numbers8:14 F na n welga Levitsa toore ne Israyɛl kambã la b na n yɩ-la m soolem. 
Numbers8:15 B tʋʋmd marsã na n lebga sɛka roog tʋʋmde. Yɩlg ba n dɩk-ba n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde wala b pʋɩɩre. 
Numbers8:16 B rɩkd-b lame n kõ maam tɩ m sɩd so-b zãnga rot a taaba kamb zĩigẽ. Bãmb la m deeg n tek ne buuda taab kom-dẽemse, n tek ne bi-ribl fãa sẽn yaa a ma pipi biiga." 
Numbers8:17 A Israyɛl kom-dẽemse, b rũmsa kom-dẽemse, yaa maam n so. M sẽn kʋ Ezipt kom-dẽemsa raare, bi-rẽeng fãa lebga m soolem." 
Numbers8:18 Rot a taaba kom-dẽemsa zĩigẽ, yaa Levitsa la m deegda." 
Numbers8:19 M dɩk-b lame n kõt a Aarõ ne a kamba. N-ye! Ka buud a to, yaa Levitsa buudu n na deeg b zĩiga n tʋm sɛka roog tʋʋma la b kos Soaala-Wẽnd sugr b yĩnga. La woto bũmb kõn le maan-ba b sẽn kolg zĩ-sõnga yĩng ye.»" 
Numbers8:20 A Moyiiz, a Aarõ la Israyɛl kamba fãa maana ne Levitsa wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilgi." 
Numbers8:21 Levitsa yɩlga b mense, n pek b futu. A Aarõ rɩk-b lame n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd wala b pʋɩɩre la a kosa b pekre." 
Numbers8:22 Dẽ poor marsã la Levitsa sɩng b tʋʋmde sɛka roogẽ. A Aarõ ne a kambã n da wilgd-b b sẽn tog n tʋme. Bũmba fãa maana ne Levitsa wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Numbers8:23 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers8:24 «M noor la woto Levitsa poorẽ: lebga pakr ne Levitg fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi la a nu t'a reeg tʋʋmde, sɛka roogẽ." 
Numbers8:25 A yʋʋm sã n ta pis-nu la Levitga basd tʋʋmde. 
Numbers8:26 A tõe n kell n wilgda tʋʋmna a saam-biisi la a meng ka le tʋkd bũmb ye. Yaa woto la f na n wilg Levitsa b tʋʋmdã.» 
Numbers9:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ, b sẽn yi Ezipt tẽng tɩ yʋʋm-bɩtẽ, yʋʋm vẽkra pipi kiuugu:" 
Numbers9:2 «Israyɛl kamba modg n maan paka kibsã, a raare." 
Numbers9:3 Yaa kiu-kãng piig la a naas raare, zĩ-sobdo la y na n maan-a. Y na n maana y sẽn minim n maan paka raar fãa.»" 
Numbers9:4 A Moyiiz kõo Israyɛl kamba noor tɩ b maan pak kibsa. 
Numbers9:5 B maan-a-la Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ, zĩ-sobdo, pipi kiuuga piig la a naas raare. Israyɛl kamba tũ zãnga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers9:6 Paka yaool n wa sega neb kẽer sẽn da rẽgme, tɩ b ra sɩɩsa kũum. B sẽn da ka tõe n maan pak baraare, b tɩ yãenda a Moyiiz la a Aarõ," 
Numbers9:7 n yeel-ba: «Tõnd sɩɩsa kũum n dẽgme la bõe yĩng la d ka tõe n wa ne d kũuni paka raare, wala Israyɛl kamb a taaba, n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde?»" 
Numbers9:8 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yeel-ba: «Yaas-y tɩ m sok Soaala-Wẽnd n bãng d sẽn na n maanega.» 
Numbers9:9 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers9:10 «Wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: ‹Ad dũnna bɩ beoogo, ned sã n sɩɩs kũum n dẽgme bɩ a sã n toga so woko, paka kibs wakato, a tõe n maana pak kibsa n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Numbers9:11 Bũmb sẽn na n teeme, yaa raarã: Na n yɩɩ zĩ-sobdo la na n yɩɩ kiuug ninga sẽn pʋgdã piig la a naas raare. B na n wãba pe-bila ne bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle la vã-tɩɩsense." 
Numbers9:12 B kõn kees bũmb beoog yibeoog yĩng ye, la kõbr ba a ye kõn wek ye. B maanda pakã wala a noya sẽn siglã." 
Numbers9:13 La yell sã n ka be ned zugu la a ka tog sore, t'a tõdg pak kibsa maanego, b yiisd-a-la buudẽ, a sẽn ka tall Soaala-Wẽnd kũuna n wa a wakatã. A na rɩ a yel-wẽnda taale." 
Numbers9:14 Ned sẽn nok yãmb buuda sã n dat n maan paka, a tũ b sẽn yeel fãa pak kibsa poorẽ. Pak kibsa noor yaa a ye, sãan wala tẽnga biig yĩnga.› »" 
Numbers9:15 Sɛka rooga tiib raare, sawadg sablga n waa n lud-a. Zĩig sã n sobge, a ra bee sɛka roog zugu n tãoosd vẽenem tɩ beoog vẽege." 
Numbers9:16 Da yaa boto daar fãa: Sawadga ra yɛsa sɛka roog zugu la yʋngo a ra maanda vẽenem wa bugum dẽnna. 
Numbers9:17 Sawadga sã n ka le ne rooga zugu, Israyɛl kamba sɩngda kẽnde. Sawadgã sã n le wa yaas a zugu, zĩ-kãng la b tiid b sikã." 
Numbers9:18 Israyɛl kamba sã n na n yiki dẽnd b paam Soaala-Wẽnd noore. B sã n na n yalse, dẽnd b le paam Soaala-Wẽnd noore. Sawadga sã n ket sɛka roog zugu, bãmb me keta b sikẽ." 
Numbers9:19 Sawadga sã n kaoosd sɛka roog zugu, a Israyɛl da pa loogd ye la sɛka rooga tʋʋm n da pak-a." 
Numbers9:20 Wakat kẽere, yaa rasma wãn bala la sawadga paad sɛka rooga zugu. Ad-y sika pa wẽede tɩ b ka paam Soaala-Wẽnd noore, yikra me pa yikd tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pa kõ sor ye." 
Numbers9:21 Wakat kẽere sawadga paada zaabre n ta yibeoogo. Zĩiga sã n yẽeg t'a looda, Israyɛl kamba me loogdame." 
Numbers9:22 Ba sawadga kaoosd sɛka roog zugu, dasem a yiibu, kiuug a ye bɩ yɩɩd rẽ, Israyɛl kamba me ra pa loogd ye, b ra paada b sikẽ; a sã n loog bal la bãmb me loagda." 
Numbers9:23 Sika pa wẽede tɩ b ka paam Soaala-Wẽnd noore, yikra me pa yikd tɩ b ka paam Soaala-Wẽnd sor ye. Yaa sɛka rooga tʋʋm la b ra tʋmda wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yalse." 
Numbers10:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers10:2 «Kɩt tɩ b maan wanzurf tõntõod a yiibu. Yaa yõgsa n na n dõog-ba. Bãmb la b na n peebe tɩ zãma wã tigim, bãmb la b na n peebe tɩ b sɩng kẽnde." 
Numbers10:3 Tõntõod a yiiba sã n naag taaba n peebe bɩ neba fãa wa tigim f taoore, sɛka rooga noore." 
Numbers10:4 Sã n ya tõntõog a ye bala n peebe, ya b sẽn yãk b rãmb tɩ b lʋɩ tãb-biis tusr taoorã n tigimd fo sɛɛgẽ." 
Numbers10:5 Tõntõoga bʋʋr sã n sigd la rʋʋda, sẽn ti-b yaangã n dengd yikri." 
Numbers10:6 Tõntõoga sã n le peeb yãang la raaga, sẽn ti-b nug rɩtgã n yikdi. Yikr tõntõog fãa peebda yãang la raaga." 
Numbers10:7 Tõntõoga sã n kell n kũmd raaga, yaa zãma wã gilli n tigimdi." 
Numbers10:8 Yaa maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kambã, n na n peeb tõntõodã, la na n yɩɩ woto zamaan woo zamaana." 
Numbers10:9 Y sã n wa be y tẽngẽ wã, tɩ y bɛɛba wa kaoog zabr ne-yã, y na kɩt tɩ tõntõoda peeb yãang la raaga. Woto y na nek Wẽnnaam y Soaala pʋ-tẽere tɩ b wa zãag-y ne y bɛɛba." 
Numbers10:10 Y sã n wa tar y sũ-noog raare, y kibsa, y tig-raase, y kʋʋda y yũ-noog la y laafi kosg maanda tɩ tõntõoda naag n peebdẽ. B na n neka Wẽnnaam y Soaala pʋ-tẽer. Maam la y Wẽnnaam dũnna la beoogo.»" 
Numbers10:11 Yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug a yiib soaba pisi raare, sawadga loogame n bas sɛka roogo." 
Numbers10:12 Israyɛl kamba yii Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ n sɩng kẽnd bal-balle la Parã weoogẽ la b wa n yaase ne sawadgã. 
Numbers10:13 Woto n yɩ Israyɛl kamba pipi yikri wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Numbers10:14 Ya neb niyns sẽn dɩk n fãoog ne a Zɩɩda kamb la a tãb-biisã n sɩng yikri. A Aminadab biig, a Nasõ, n da yaa a Zɩɩda tãb-biisa tãnsoaba." 
Numbers10:15 A Isakar tãb-biisa tãnsoab da yaa a Suar biig, a Netanɛl," 
Numbers10:16 t'a Elon biig a Eliyab, ya a Zabulõ tãb-biisa tãnsoaba." 
Numbers10:17 B baasa sɛka roogo t'a Gersõ ne a Merari kamba na n loog ne-a. 
Numbers10:18 B sẽn dɩk neb niyns n fãoog ne a Rubẽ kamba la a tãb-biisã n yiki. A Sedewur biig a Elisur, n da yaa a Rubẽ tãb-biisa tãnsoaba," 
Numbers10:19 t'a Simeõ tãb-biisa tãnsoab yaa a Surisadayi biig a Selumiyɛl," 
Numbers10:20 t'a Deowɛl biig a Elyasaf, yaa a Gad tãb-biisa tãnsoaba." 
Numbers10:21 Bãmb poore, a Keyat kambã n tʋk zaka teed n loog. Bãmb sẽn wat n ta tɩ sɛka roog zoe ti n yalsame." 
Numbers10:22 B sẽn dɩk b rãmb n fãoog ne a Efrayim kamb la a tãb-biisã n yaoond n yiki. A Amiyud biig a Elisama, n da yaa Efrayim tãb-biisa tãnsoaba," 
Numbers10:23 t'a Manase tãb-biisa tãnsoab yaa a Pedasur biig a Gameliyɛl," 
Numbers10:24 t'a Gideoni biig a Abidã, yaa a Manase tãb-biisa tãnsoaba." 
Numbers10:25 Sẽn yaool b yikra fãa-fãa yaa neb niyns b sẽn dɩk n fãoog ne a Dã kamba la a tãb-biisi. A Dã tãb-biisa tãnsoab yaa a Amisadayi biig a Ayiyezɛr," 
Numbers10:26 t'a Okrã biig a Paziyɛl, yaa a Asɛr tãb-biisa tãnsoaba," 
Numbers10:27 t'a Neftali tãb-biisa tãnsoab yaa a Eyinam biig a Ayira. 
Numbers10:28 B sẽn na n sɩng b kẽna, yaa woto la Israyɛl kamba pʋg taaba. Yaa woto la b rɩk b sore." 
Numbers10:29 A Moyiiz yeela Madiã raoa la a rɛɛmba a Reowɛl biig a Obab: «D sẽn dabd tẽng ninga yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg tɩ b na n dɩka a soaba n kõ tõndã. Wa yãag-do! F na naag tõnd n dɩ yõod ning Soaala sẽn kãab a Israyɛl.» 
Numbers10:30 La ad-a Obab sẽn leoke: «M ka na n tũ ye, yaa m ba-yira la m dat n lebẽ.»" 
Numbers10:31 Dẽ me la a Moyiiz yeel-a: «Da bas-d ye. Fo mi d sẽn tõe n wẽ sik zĩig ning zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã, wa yɩ d sɩleto." 
Numbers10:32 F sã n tũ tõndo bãng tɩ f na naag n dɩ yõod ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n kõ-dã.» 
Numbers10:33 Dɩlla b siga Soaala-Wẽnd tãngã n kẽn dasem a tãab kẽnde. Kuga walsa sẽn da be koglg ning pʋgã da renga taoore tɩ b da rat n bãnga sika sẽn na n wẽ zĩig ninga. 
Numbers10:34 Wĩntoogo sawadga ra buiid-b-la ne a maasem b sã n wa yik n sɩng kẽnde. 
Numbers10:35 B sã n wa yikd ne kuga walsa sẽn da be koglg ning pʋgã a Moyiiz ra yetame: «Yiki yã, Soaala, tɩ y bɛɛba na sẽege, tɩ sẽn maand b zabra ne yãmba na kʋɩ tĩiga!»" 
Numbers10:36 A sã n wa yalsdẽ, a Moyiiz le yetame: «Le waa-y yã, Soaala, a Israyɛl sʋka! A Israyɛl kamba la a tãb-biisa ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye!»" 
Numbers11:1 Daar a ye Israyɛl kamba waa n yik n guglma wʋsgo ne Naaba-Wẽnde. La Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wʋme, pa ta b yam ye. Soaala-Wẽnd sũura puugame tɩ bugum sig tẽnga n yõog neba la a rɩ sika kɩrenga." 
Numbers11:2 Neba kelma a Moyiiz tɩ yẽ yõk Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga, tɩ bugma ka le kẽng taoor ye." 
Numbers11:3 B pʋda zĩ-kãng tɩ Tabera, tɩ bugum, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kɩt tɩ bugma rɩ Israyɛl kamba yĩnga." 
Numbers11:4 Daar a ye, sãamba sẽn da kalem Israyɛl kamba waa n yik n yãbda velem. Israyɛl kamba meng naag n sɩnga waasgo n yetẽ: «Ãnda n na n kõ tõnd nemd tɩ d wãbe?" 
Numbers11:5 D ket n tẽrame tɩ d da rɩta d yam, Ezipt tẽnga, kʋɩl-zẽedo, niiri, yoaga, kʋmba, gãmdo, albasle la zẽ-nood buud fãa." 
Numbers11:6 Dũnna d zĩime tɩ d vɩɩma ka le wẽnd ye, d ka le tar bũmb ye. D nin sẽn ne bala yaa man, ka-mi-sẽn-ya-lã.»" 
Numbers11:7 Man ra wẽnda kẽnebd biisi, n ya peels wa siili." 
Numbers11:8 Neba ra yit n saad n wʋkd-a lame; b ra werd-a-la neerẽ bɩ b ra tood-a-la teoogẽ, n dʋgl-a rʋkẽ, n wa lebg-a wa samsa, t'a ya noosẽnde wa miisdu." 
Numbers11:9 Meenema sã n wa rʋʋgd yʋngo, man me rʋʋgdame." 
Numbers11:10 A Moyiiz wʋma a neba sẽn tigim roog-roogo, sɛka rignoorẽ, n zabd ne Soaala-Wẽnde. Soaala sũur puuga wʋsgo la a Moyiiz me zaba ne-ba," 
Numbers11:11 n yeel-ba: «Bõe tɩ y rat wẽnga ne y sõgna? Bõe tɩ zooda sãame, bõe tɩ y zɩlg-m y buuda tõr zɩɩbo?" 
Numbers11:12 Maam n dog-b bɩ tɩ y yet-m tɩ m deeg ba m naoẽ wala ma-wubdg sẽn deegd a biiga? La ka yam-yam ka meng ye, yaa y sẽn kãab b ba rãmb tẽng ninga la m na n tall-b n taase." 
Numbers11:13 Yɛɛlẽ la m na n yãe nemdo n kõ zãma sẽn ta woto fãa la sẽn pʋgd-m ne nintãm la a maanẽ: Kõ-d nemd tɩ d wãbe? 
Numbers11:14 Ad-y m pa tõe, m yembre, n zɩ zɩɩb a woto fãa ye, looga m pãnga." 
Numbers11:15 Y sã n na n zã m vɩɩma woto, ad-y m sẽn kiid n são. Y sã n maan-m-la yardo bɩ yell a woto buud da le lʋɩ m zug ye.»" 
Numbers11:16 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Tigim nin-kẽems pisopoe, a Israyɛl buuda sʋka, nin-kẽems sẽn wilg tɩ b tõe n zãa neba. Tall-ba n wa sɛka roog noore, tũ-y taab n wa." 
Numbers11:17 Be la m na n wa gom ne foo. M na yãk kũun ning f sẽn paama bilfu n kõ-ba la b na naag foom n tʋk zɩɩbã, fo kõn le zɩ-a f ye ye."
