Numbers11:18 Yeel zãma wã: ‹Yɩlg f meng beoog yĩnga n tõog n wãb nemdo. Ka yãmb n kelem tɩ Soaala wʋm bɩ: Ãnda n na n kõ-d nemd tɩ d wãbe? Bõe n da paoogd-d Ezipt tẽnga! Ade, Soaala na n kõ-y-la nemd tɩ y wãbe," 
Numbers11:19 la ka na n yɩ daar a ye bɩ rasem a yiib bala, ka na n yɩ rasem a nu, rasem piig bɩ pisi," 
Numbers11:20 na n yɩɩ kiuug tõre t'a wa yit y yõe bogdẽ, t'a yʋʋr sã n pʋde bɩ y rat n wʋbe. Na n yɩɩ boto tɩ y basa Soaala kɛɛnga la bãmb yaool n be-la y sʋka. Na n yɩɩ boto tɩ y saag n yeelame: Bõe yĩng tɩ y pʋs n yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga?› »" 
Numbers11:21 Dẽ me la a Moyiiz leok yã: «M sẽn vɩ ne b rãmba taa neb tus kobs-yoobe. Yãmb na n yɩɩ wãn n yeele: ‹M na n kõ-b-la nemdo tɩ b wãb kiuug tõre?› 
Numbers11:22 B kood b rũmsa gilli, bɛd la bõonego, na tõog n sek sɩda? Sã n da tõe n vaagẽ mogra zĩm zãnga n kõ-ba, na sekẽ?»" 
Numbers11:23 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n leok a Moyiiz: «Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga menem n kẽe yɛ? Marsã la f na n bãng m sẽn togsã sã n na n yɩɩme bɩ sã n pa na n yɩ.» 
Numbers11:24 A Moyiiz yii sɛka roogẽ n taas zãma wã Soaala-Wẽnd leokrã. A yãka nin-kẽems pisopoe n yals-ba n gilg sɛka roogo. 
Numbers11:25 Soaala-Wẽnd tũu sawadgã n sig n gom ne a Moyiiz. A Moyiiz yama la b yãk n pʋdg bãmb pisopoe wã. B sẽn paam kũuna b vẽneg n sɩngame n gomd bãngr goama, la ka yãe n kaoos ye." 
Numbers11:26 Ad-y neb a yiibu n da pa sikẽ wã: yaa a Eldad la a Medad. Kũuna taa bãmb me, tɩ b ra yãka bãmba la b ra pa yi n ta sɛka roog ye. Bãmb me ra gomda bãngr goama la yaa sikẽ wã." 
Numbers11:27 Biig n wudg n wa yeel a Moyiiz: «Mik waa, a Eldad la a Medad be sika pʋg n gomd bãngr goama!»" 
Numbers11:28 A Nun biig a Zozuwe, da sõngda a Moyiiz al t'a nan paooda Yẽ n kolg n yeele: «Moyiiz, m zu-soaba, da bas-y-b tɩ b gom ye!»" 
Numbers11:29 T'a Moyiiz na n leok-a: «Bõe tɩ f maand wa rẽ wata ne mam bõne? M nongẽ lame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd buuda zãng paamẽ Soaala-Wẽnd vẽnegre, n gomnẽ bãngr goama!»" 
Numbers11:30 Dẽ poore, a Moyiiz ne nin-kẽemsã leba sika pʋgẽ." 
Numbers11:31 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ sobg kaooge; sobga yii mogra noorẽ n wa fabg pitr-lʋɩɩse n gil sikã la a yɛdg-b-la wʋsg-wʋsgo. A yɛdg-b-la taoko, na ta kãntɩɩs a yiibu." 
Numbers11:32 Neba talla b wʋkre wĩntoogo, yʋngo la vẽkẽmbeoogo. Sẽn paam-a bilf paama sẽn ta bõeens a yiib zɩlgre. B yɛdg-b lame tɩ kʋɩ, b yɛdg-b-la zĩig zãnga n gilg sikã." 
Numbers11:33 La neba sẽn waa n da ket n sakemd nemdã b noore, n nan ka paam n vel-a, Soaala-Wẽnd sũur yika ne zãma wã la b nug yɩɩ toaaga." 
Numbers11:34 Dẽ yĩng la b pʋd zĩiga tɩ Kibrot Taava, tɩ vels yaoogo, tɩ yaa zĩ-kãng la b mum velma sẽn da yõk b rãmbã." 
Numbers11:35 Neba yii Kibrot Taava n dig Aserot. Be la b wẽ b sika. 
Numbers12:1 A Miriyam ne a Aarõ guglma ne a Moyiiz, a paga sẽn da ka Israyɛl poaka yĩnga. A Moyiiz ra kẽe kãadem ne Kusitga." 
Numbers12:2 B ra yeta woto: «Yaa ne a Moyiiz bal la Soaala-Wẽnd gom yã, bɩ b goma ne tõnd me.» Wɩdga lʋɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tʋbrẽ." 
Numbers12:3 A Moyiiz ra yaa sulg-m-meng soaba, tẽng zug ka, ned sulg-m-meng ka yɩɩg a rẽnd ye." 
Numbers12:4 Soaala-Wẽnd lɛɛg n yeela a Moyiiz, a Aarõ, a Miriyam: «Kẽng-y, yãmb y tãaba fãa, sɛka roogẽ.»" 
Numbers12:5 La Soaala-Wẽnd siga ne sawadgo n yals sɛka roog noore. B boola a Aarõ la a Miriyam tɩ b kolge," 
Numbers12:6 tɩ b yeel-ba: «Kelg-y m goama. Ned sã n be yãmb sʋka n ya bãngda, ad-y yaa maam n likd m meng a soaba, yaa a zãmsdẽ la m gomd ne a soaba." 
Numbers12:7 Yaool n ka boto ne m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz ye, t'a yaa m sũurẽ neda la m teeg-a-la m zaka zãab yĩnga." 
Numbers12:8 D gomda ne taab tɩ solgr kaẽ ye, d nee taaba, goama me ka goam bɩnem ye, tɩ m ne-la a Moyiiz tɩ yẽ me ne maam. Dɩlla yãmb yɩta a wãn n wɩt m tʋʋm-tʋmda Moyiiz?»" 
Numbers12:9 Wẽnnaam zabame n bas n looge. 
Numbers12:10 Sawadga menema sɛka roog zugu, la a Miriyam tiig n bẽeda yĩng bãaga, n pelg wa goore. A Aarõ sẽn wẽnemd n ges-a, a mikame t'a bẽeda yĩnga," 
Numbers12:11 t'a na n yeel a Moyiiz: «D beegame, d zu-soaba, d maana gãeemdo, d maana wẽnga la ra sak-y tɩ d dɩ a taal ye." 
Numbers12:12 Bɩ a Miriyam yĩnga ra yɩ wa pa-tar sẽn wat moogo t'a yĩnga zoe n yaa a soaba ye!» 
Numbers12:13 A Moyiiz pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd woto: «Soaala, kõ-y yã a Miriyam laafi!»" 
Numbers12:14 La Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Moyiiz: «Bãng t'a ba sã n da tʋbs a nenga kolkoodo a na n paẽ la ne yãnde rasem a yopoe. Bɩ a Miriyam zãag ne sika rasem a yopoe n yaool n le wa a zĩigẽ.» 
Numbers12:15 B zãaga a Miriyam ne sika rasem a yopoe la yikr pa yiki t'a ka lɛɛg n wa a zakẽ ye. 
Numbers12:16 Dẽ poor marsã la neba yaool n yi Aserot n tɩ wẽ b sik Parã zĩ-peen-daagẽ. 
Numbers13:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Numbers13:2 «Tʋm neb tɩ b reng taoore n bãng Kanaã tẽnga nenga tɩ yaa tẽn-kãng la m dɩk n kõ Israyɛl kamba. Y na n yãka ned a ye sak fãa pʋgẽ, ned faa ne a ba-biisi. Y na n tũus-b-la Israyɛl nin-tɩɩsa sʋka.»" 
Numbers13:3 Yaa Parã zĩ-peen-daaga sɩngrẽ la a Moyiiz paam noore n na n tʋm-ba la b fãa sɩd da yaa Israyɛl sak kãsem-dãmba. 
Numbers13:4 Bãmb yʋy wã la woto: A Zakur biig a Sama, a Rubẽ roogẽ." 
Numbers13:5 A Ori biig, a Safat, a Simeõ roogẽ." 
Numbers13:6 A Yefune biig a Kalɛb, a Zɩɩda roogẽ." 
Numbers13:7 A Zozɛf biig a Yigyal, a Isakar roogẽ." 
Numbers13:8 A Nun biig a Osea, a Efrayim roogẽ." 
Numbers13:9 A Rafu biig a Palti, a Bẽnzame roogẽ." 
Numbers13:10 A Sodi biig a Gadi, a Zabulõ roogẽ." 
Numbers13:11 A Zozɛf biig a Manase roogẽ yɩ-la a Susi biig a Gadi. 
Numbers13:12 A Gemali biig a Amiyɛl, a Dã roogẽ." 
Numbers13:13 A Mikayɛl biig a Setur, a Asɛr roogẽ." 
Numbers13:14 A Wofsi biig a Nabi, a Neftali roogẽ." 
Numbers13:15 A Maki biig a Geowɛl, a Gad roogẽ." 
Numbers13:16 Yaa nin-bãmba la a Moyiiz yãk yã tɩ b reng taoore n bãng tẽnga nenga. A Moyiiz teema a Nun biig a Osea, yʋʋrã tɩ lebg Zozuwe." 
Numbers13:17 Bãmb la a Moyiiz tʋm yã tɩ b na n karg Kanaã tẽn-peelma. A yeel-b lame: «Reng-y n dʋ Negɛb tɩ b sã zao tãnga zugu," 
Numbers13:18 b nee tẽngã sẽn yɛdge, b nee neb niyns sẽn kẽed-a wã sã n tara pãng bɩ b sã n ka tare, neba sã n yaa wʋsg bi-bilfu." 
Numbers13:19 Y na bãng neb niyns sẽn kẽed b tẽnga sã n yaa nin-sõma bɩ nin-wẽnse. Y na bãng b tẽnsa sã n me n gũbga ne lalse bɩ b sã n ka gũbgi. 
Numbers13:20 Y na bãng tẽnga sã n ket n tara sɩɩlem bɩ a sã n sãbgame; a sã n tara tɩɩse bɩ a sã n ka tare. Modg-y n wa ne b tɩɩsa biisi.» Da yaa Tamuz kiuugu, kiuug a naas soaba, sib moama kiuugu." 
Numbers13:21 B dʋʋme la b saaga tẽngã, sẽn sɩng Sin we-raoogo n wat Reob, Lebo-Amat sẽnẽ." 
Numbers13:22 B saaga Negɛb n ta Ebrõ, be la a Ayiman, a Sesayi la a Talmayi yagensa da kẽeda. Bãmb la Anakitsa yagense. Yaa nin-wogd buudu. Ebrõ sẽn ya bãmb tẽngã meeme tɩ yʋʋm maana a yopoe, tɩ b yaool n me Tanis, Ezipt tẽnga." 
Numbers13:23 B wa n pooga Eskol bãg-faaga la b kɛɛga bugsuntung willi ne a sib gĩndi. B kɛɛga raoog n palg gĩnda tɩ neb a yiib tʋk-a. B fãsa kankama la tɩ-biis sẽn wẽnd pooloomse. 
Numbers13:24 B pʋda zĩ-kãng yʋʋr tɩ Eskol bãg-faaga, bugsuntung bãoogo, la rẽ yaa sib gĩndã b sẽn kɛɛg beelẽ wã yĩnga." 
Numbers13:25 Dasem sẽn maan pis-naase, sẽn tʋm b rãmba lɛɛg n waame." 
Numbers13:26 B waa n yãenda a Moyiiz, a Aarõ, la Israyɛl kamba, Parã zĩ-peen-daagẽ, Kadɛs tẽnga. B wilga b fãa gilli b kẽnda sẽn yɩ a soaba la b wilg-b-la tẽnga tɩɩs biisi." 
Numbers13:27 B yeel-b-la woto: «Fo sẽn tʋm tõnd zĩig ningã, d kẽngame la sɩd yaa tẽng sẽn bund sɩɩd la bĩisim. Ges-y b tɩɩsa biisi!" 
Numbers13:28 Bũmb sẽn be, ad-y b neba tara pãnga la b tẽnsa mee lals n gũbgi la d tol n yãenda Anakitsa yagense." 
Numbers13:29 Amalesitsa bee Negɛb, tɩ Ititsa, Zebuzitsa la Amoritsa tiid tãms zutu, tɩ Kanaã rãmb yedg mogra noore la Zʋrdẽ foolle.»" 
Numbers13:30 Neba da rat n kɩɩsa a Moyiiz, la a Kalɛb kɩtame tɩ b sĩndi la ad-a sẽn yeele: «Yik-y tɩ d looge, n tɩ reeg tẽmsã tɩ daar a ye d na waa n tõog n wõr-ba.»" 
Numbers13:31 La sẽn tũ-b yẽ n kẽngã leokame: «Tõnd kõn tõog bada n tak zabr ne nin-bãmba ye, b pãng yɩɩda tõndo.»" 
Numbers13:32 La b sɩngame n na n sãbs b sẽn yãendã n yetẽ: «D sẽn gilg n yãend tẽng ninga yaa tẽng sẽn dɩt a kamba. Tõnd sẽn yãend b rãmba fãa yaa nin-wogdo. 
Numbers13:33 D tol n sega nin-daado, a Anak yagense, nin-wobd buudu; d da nee d mens wa pakenlagma, bãmb taoore, la yaa boto la b sɩd da ne tõndo.»" 
Numbers14:1 Zãma wã gill naaga taab n kelme; b talla yãbr tɩ beoog vẽege. 
Numbers14:2 Israyɛl kamba fãa yeelame tɩ b kõn deeg a Moyiiz la Aarõ noor ye. Ad-b sẽn yeele: «D sã da paamẽ n kiẽ Ezipt tẽnga! Ka rẽnd bɩ zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã! 
Numbers14:3 Bõe tɩ Soaala kẽes-d sʋʋs sẽn koot tẽngẽ? D pagb la d kamb na n yõg n kẽesa yembdo, d kõn maan d meng neere n leb Ezipt tẽng sɩda?»" 
Numbers14:4 B walma taaba: «D bao naaba n kõ d menga n leb Ezipt tẽnga!» 
Numbers14:5 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ lʋɩ b yãvabga Israyɛl kamba fãa taoore. 
Numbers14:6 A Nun biig, a Zozuwe, la a Yefune biig, a Kalɛb, kẽesa b futu." 
Numbers14:7 B yeela buuda fãa: «D kaagame n ges tẽngã la a yaa tẽn-sõngo. 
Numbers14:8 Soaala-Wẽnd sõngra sã n pʋgd tõndo, d na n kẽe tẽngã, b na n dɩk-a lame n kõ tõndo; ad-y yaa tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Numbers14:9 Da zẽk-y y zug ne Naaba-Wẽnd ye; da maan-y rabeem ne tẽnga rãmb ye. B pa na n sek d velb ye! B wẽn-faada maasem meng ka buiid-b ye, tɩ tõnd Soaala-Wẽnda yaool n be d sʋka, da zoe-y nin-bãmba ye.»" 
Numbers14:10 Buuda zãng sẽn waa n yɛs n gomd tɩ b na n laba a Moyiiz la a Aarõ ne kugã, la Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sig ne ziiri, b fãa nifẽ, sɛka roog zugu." 
Numbers14:11 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «Nin-bãmba na n kell n maana wa b toog ka be ne maam n ta da-bʋre? B na n zãgsa m tẽeb n ta da-bʋre tɩ yɛl-bãna m sẽn maan b sʋka yaool n ka be sõore? 
Numbers14:12 M na n waa ne tẽn-kũum, n menes-b zãnga. La m na n yiisa f pennẽ, buud sẽn tar sõor la pãnga n yɩɩd a Israyɛl.»" 
Numbers14:13 A Moyiiz leoka Soaala: «Ezipt rãmba bãngame tɩ yãmb n yiis bu-kãnga b tẽngẽ," 
Numbers14:14 la b togsa kaalẽ dãmbã, la bãmb me miime tɩ yãmba, Naaba-Wẽnd, be-la b sʋka, tɩ yãmba, Wẽnnaam, sẽn zãr ne ba, yaa nif la yõore bala. Y sawadga yɛsa b zugẽ. Wĩntoogo y lʋɩta b taoor sawadgẽ la yʋngo yaa bug-witmẽ." 
Numbers14:15 Bõe marsã tɩ y na n menes buuda gill wa nin-yende! Y yʋʋra sẽn zẽk neb niyns taoorã na n wa yeelame: 
Numbers14:16 ‹Soaala-Wẽnd mikame tɩ b pa tõe n kẽes-b tẽng ning b sẽn da kãab-bã tɩ b na n kood-b zĩ-peen-daagẽ.› 
Numbers14:17 Sẽn ya woto wã bɩ m Soaala wilg b pãnga. 
Numbers14:18 Yãmb meng n yeele: ‹Maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, m ka yãgd ne sɩbgr ye, m ka kãabd tɩ vaal ye, n maand wa m sakame tɩ ned zẽk a zug ne ma, tɩ ned beeg-ma, mik m ka na n pa n ka sɩbg ye. M na n tol n sɩbga biig a ba rãmb beegr yĩnga, n sɩbg-a a yaaba la a yaab tʋbra-kẽeg beegr yĩnga.›" 
Numbers14:19 Kõ-y nin-bãmba b beegra sugri, ges-y y nonglma sẽn puk n ta zĩig ninga, la tẽeg-y tɩ y kʋmsa y sũur ne ba al Ezipt tẽng n ta zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka.»" 
Numbers14:20 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn leok a Moyiiz: «M basa fãa taale wala f sẽn kot-ma. 
Numbers14:21 La m togsda sɩda wala sẽn ya sɩd tɩ m vɩɩme, wala sẽn ya sɩd tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ziira pida dũniya," 
Numbers14:22 m togsda sɩda tɩ nin-bãmba sẽn yãend m ziirã, n yãend bõn-bãna m sẽn maan Ezipt tẽnga la zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka, la b zãgs m kelegrã, n bao m noora naoor piigã," 
Numbers14:23 m wẽendame tɩ bãmb ned ba a ye kõn kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kãab b yaab rãmba ye; sẽn paoog-b maama ned ba a ye kõn yãend-a ye. 
Numbers14:24 M sẽn na n bas ned ninga t'a kẽ, yaa m bi-sõng a Kalɛb. Yẽ tara yam sõngo la yẽ pʋga maam ne yẽesem, yẽ la m na n kẽes tẽng ning a sẽn zoe n tabã. A yagensa n na n soog-a." 
Numbers14:25 Amalesitsã la Kanaã rãmba na n paa tẽn-nabrẽ wã. Beoog bala bɩ y wẽnemd y neng n tees zĩ-peen-daagẽ, n tees Rudum mogre.»" 
Numbers14:26 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ: 
Numbers14:27 «Nin-bãmba sẽn ka vʋʋsd ne mam kɩɩsgã na n kell n pa-la m taoore n ta da-bʋre? Sɩda m wʋma a Israyɛl kamba sẽn tar zabre ne maam. 
Numbers14:28 Yeel-b woto: ‹M wẽenda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m na n zã-y-la wala y sẽn gom tɩ m wʋma." 
Numbers14:29 Yaa zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka la y fãa na n pa, yãmb fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi tɩ b sõd-y zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka; zĩ-peen-daagã n na n dɩ yãmb fãa gill sẽn kɩɩs b maama." 
Numbers14:30 M wẽend tɩ y kõn kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn da kãab yãmba ye. Sẽn na n kẽ-ba, yaa a Yefune biig, a Kalɛb, la a Nun biig, a Zozuwe." 
Numbers14:31 Y sẽn zoet tɩ b na n wa yõg y kamb niynsi n kẽes yembdã, ad-y bãmb la m na n kẽes be, bãmb n na dɩ yõod ning y sẽn zãgsã." 
Numbers14:32 Sã n ya yãmba y kõaba na n weela zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka. 
Numbers14:33 Y kamba na n paa zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã yʋʋm pis-naase wa rũm-kɩɩmba, b na n dɩ-la y zãgsga taale n tãag y kõaba sẽn wat n sẽeg zãnga." 
Numbers14:34 Wala y sẽn kaag tẽnga rasem pis-naasã, na n yɩɩ yʋʋm pis-naas marsã la y na n le karg-a. Daar donda yʋʋmde, la yʋʋm pis-naas la y na n dɩ y beegra taale la woto y na bãng ned yell sẽn lebgd to-to, a sã n yik n zẽkd a zug ne maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Numbers14:35 Maam n gomde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, maam n wẽende, yaa woto la m na n maan ne nin-bãmba sẽn sũ taab n na n tak zabr ne maama; b fãa gill paada zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka, b fãa gilli.› »" 
Numbers14:36 A Moyiiz sẽn tʋm b rãmba tɩ b gilg n ges tẽngã, tɩ b sɩd gilg n lɛɛg n wa yeel tɩ ka tẽn-sõngã, tɩ neba na n yik zabr ne-a wã," 
Numbers14:37 sẽn yeel-b tɩ tẽnga ka tẽngã, ad-y bãmb fãa sɩd kii kũ-miiga Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Numbers14:38 Sẽn tɩ karg-b tẽngã n lɛɛg n wa n yaool n pa ki kũ-miiga, yɩ-la a Nun biig a Zozuwe la a Yefune biig a Kalɛb, bala." 
Numbers14:39 A Moyiiz taasa Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛgã a Israyɛl kamba, tɩ b na n kelem kʋʋre." 
Numbers14:40 La vẽkẽmbeoog yibeoog pĩnda b rʋ tãmsa zutu la b maanẽ: «D na n kẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ d kẽng zĩig ningã tɩ d sɩda, tõnd kongame.»" 
Numbers14:41 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yeel-b: «Yaa bõe la y maanda? Y tõdgda Soaala-Wẽnd noore la y raaba ka na n pids ye. 
Numbers14:42 Da rʋ-y tãmsa zaalem tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ka be y poorẽ ye, da tɩ rɩk-y y meng n kõ y bɛɛb ye." 
Numbers14:43 Amalesitsa la Kanaã rãmb yɛs n gũud-y lame n na n kood ne b sʋʋse; yãmb sẽn bas n ka le tũud Soaala-Wẽndã, Soaala me yi-la y poorẽ.»" 
Numbers14:44 Ne rẽ fãa b zãgsame n dʋ tãmsã tɩ kuga wals sẽn be koglg ning pʋga la a Moyiiz meng nan ket sikẽ. 
Numbers14:45 Amalesitsa la Kanaã rãmba sẽn da zao tãmsã sig n seg-b lame la b kʋ-b lame n tãag Orma. 
Numbers15:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers15:2 «Gom ne Israyɛl kamba n wilg-b woto: ‹Y sã n wa ta tẽng ning m sẽn na n kõ-y tɩ y soogã, y sã n wa ta y zagsẽ," 
Numbers15:3 n dat n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd y yũ-noog maoongo, n dat n kõ-b rũnga, bedr bɩ bilfu, pʋleng pidsgu yĩnga, y kibs rãmba wakat bɩ y yamleoog raare, n dat n kõ-b maoong sẽn na sigs b sũuri," 
Numbers15:4 bɩ y naag n wa ne zom wamde sẽn nag ne kaam wũmbla. 
Numbers15:5 Wa-y ne rãam me n naag ne yũ-noog maoongã la sugr kosg maoongo, sã n ya pe-bil la b kʋʋda." 
Numbers15:6 Maoonga sã n ya pe-raoogo la b kʋ yã, b wata ne zom wam a yi sẽn nag ne kaam wũmbl la pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Numbers15:7 Tũnugda ne rãam wamde la yaa kũun a woto buud n sigsd Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Numbers15:8 F sã n kõt Soaala-Wẽnd loalga la maoonga yaa yũ-noog maoong bɩ pʋleng pidsgu maoong bɩ laafi kosg maoongo," 
Numbers15:9 maoonga tũnugda ne zom wam a tã sẽn nag ne kaam wũmbli a yi," 
Numbers15:10 n paas rãam wamde, la kũun a woto n tar yũ-noog n sigsd Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Numbers15:11 Maanda woto daar fãa sã n kʋ loalga, pe-raoogo, pe-bila bɩ bʋʋga." 
Numbers15:12 Ba rũmsa sõor sẽn yaa a soaba, maanda woto ne rũng fãa." 
Numbers15:13 Woto la tẽnga biig fãa na n maane, a sã n wat ne kũun n na n sigs Wẽnnaam sũuri." 
Numbers15:14 Sãan sã n wa yãmb sʋka bɩ a sã n bee yãmb sʋk daar zãra, la a me rat n waa ne kũuni n sigs Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri, bɩ yẽ me maan boto." 
Numbers15:15 Buuda zãng fãa sã n na n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ a manesma yɩ manes yɛnga, tẽnga dãmba wala sãamba yĩnga, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Numbers15:16 Noor a ye bal n be, noor a ye tãa, yãmb ne sãamba yĩnga.› »" 
Numbers15:17 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers15:18 «Gom ne Israyɛl kamba n wilg b woto: ‹Y sã n wa kẽ m sẽn tar-y n dabd tẽng ningã," 
Numbers15:19 y sã n wa rɩt tẽnga buri, y na yãk lɛnga n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Numbers15:20 Y sẽn na n wẽ bur daar fãa, y na yãk a ye n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd wala b pʋɩɩr dẽenga. Kũun kãng wẽnda kood rẽemsa kũuni." 
Numbers15:21 Bura sẽn yãkd wa Soaala-Wẽnd pʋɩɩr dẽenga, y na n kɩs-a-la zamaan woo zamaana.› »" 
Numbers15:22 Ad-y noy la Soaala-Wẽnd kõ a Moyiiz la noy kãens yiisg raare n tar n digd zamaan ne zamaana, yaa noy d sẽn tog n tũ zãnga." 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24 Buuda zãng yaool n tõe n yĩdame n tõdg noorã n ka bãng tiir ye. La buuda sã n wa bãng a kongre, yaa buuda zãng n na n wa ne loalga tɩ b kʋ n yõog bugum tɩ yũ-nooga sigs Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. Maoonga tũnugda ne a rasem kam bõn-tũnugdi; lebd n paasa boɛɛg sẽn na n kʋ yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Numbers15:25 Maan-kʋʋda na n kosa sugri buuda fãa beegr yĩnga la a na n paama sugri. Yella maana ne yĩdgu la buuda waa ne a kũuni la a maoong, a sẽn yĩdi n beeg yĩnga. Taal sɛɛme." 
Numbers15:26 Yaa Israyɛl kamba fãa n na n paam sugrã n paas sãamba me, tɩ taala yaa kʋʋnga fãa taale." 
Numbers15:27 Sã n ya ned a ye n yĩd n tõdg noore, nin-kãng wata ne yʋʋmd yɛng bʋʋga." 
Numbers15:28 Soaala-Wẽnd taoore maan-kʋʋda maanda a sẽn tog n maan tɩ neda paam a yĩdga sugri; a kota sugr a yĩnga la a na n paamame. 
Numbers15:29 A yaa sãan bɩ tẽnga biiga, sugra kosga tũuda so yɛnga." 
Numbers15:30 Noora tõdgr sã n ka yĩdgu, n ya pʋ-toogo, f yaa sãana bɩ tẽnga biiga, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd la f paoog yã. B yiisda beegda buudẽ." 
Numbers15:31 Yẽ soab sãbsa Soaala-Wẽnd gomde, n tõdg b noore, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ b yiis a soab buudẽ t'a yella ket n doga a zugu." 
Numbers15:32 Israyɛl kamba sẽn waa n ket zĩ-peen-daagẽ, b linga ned sẽn wɩɩsd daad vʋʋsga daare." 
Numbers15:33 Neb niyns sẽn ling-a t'a wɩɩsd daada tall-a lame n wa a Moyiiz, a Aarõ la buuda taoore." 
Numbers15:34 B gũnug-a-la ne neba, tɩ b ra nan ka yiis noor yell a woto poorẽ ye, n mi a sẽn tog ne sɩbgr ning ye." 
Numbers15:35 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeel a Moyiiz: «Bɩ b kʋ nin-kãnga, la yaa buuda zãng n na n laba ne kuga, sika kudgẽ.»" 
Numbers15:36 B tall-a lame n yi sika kudgẽ n lab-a n kʋ, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers15:37 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz 
Numbers15:38 t'a gom ne Israyɛl kamba la f wilg-ba tɩ b ning b futa zerdo, bãmb la b yagense. B ning gĩs mismiigu n gilgi." 
Numbers15:39 Gĩs kãng tẽngr la zerda na n luuli. Gĩs kãng n na tẽeg-y Soaala noya, woto y na reeg-ba la y kõn bas tɩ y sũur la y nin kẽes-y moog ye." 
Numbers15:40 Woto y na tẽeg n deeg m noya gilli n yɩ sõma y Wẽnnaam taoore. 
Numbers15:41 Maam la yãmb Wẽndã, maam n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga n na n yɩ y Wẽnnaam. Maam la y Wẽnd dũnna la beoogo." 
Numbers16:1 A Kore yaa a Yisear biiga, t'a Yisear yaa a Keyat biiga, t'a Keyat yaa a Levi biiga. Yẽ n tõg-tõg a Datã ne a Abiram, a Eliyab kamba, n paas a On, a Pelɛt biiga, a Rubẽ yagenga." 
Numbers16:2 B naaga ne Israyɛl kamb kobs-yi la pis-nu n yik zabr ne a Moyiiz. Nin-bãmba da yaa buud kãsem-dãmba la b yʋʋr da yii b taaba sʋka. 
Numbers16:3 B sɩnga gugleng ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ n yetẽ: «Ya n sekame! Zãma wã ka tʋk yell bilfr meng a zug ye la Soaala-Wẽnd be-la d sʋka. Bõe tɩ yãmb dat n maan wala y yɩɩda y taaba?» 
Numbers16:4 B goama sẽn lʋɩ a Moyiiz tʋbrẽ la a sẽn lʋɩ a yãvabga. 
Numbers16:5 A yeela a Kore ne a nebã: «Beoog yibeoogo Soaala-Wẽnd meng n na n welg b welgre n wilg sẽn ya-a sõngo la a tõe n kolg bãmba. B sẽn welg a soab toorã n na n tõog n kolg-ba. 
Numbers16:6 Ad-y sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: bao-y wisd laase, yãmba la a Kore ne a nebã." 
Numbers16:7 Beoog yibeoogo y na ning wisdu, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, la nin-sõnga na n yɩɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n wilg a soaba. Ad-y yaa n seka woto, Levi kamba!»" 
Numbers16:8 A Moyiiz le yeela a Kore: «Kelg-y yã, Levi kamba!" 
Numbers16:9 Ad-y y sẽn paam a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama nengẽ ka paood ye. Bãmb welga yãmb toor Israyɛl kamba sʋka tɩ y tõe n kolg Soaala n tʋm b sɛka roog tʋʋma la y reeg zãma wã zĩiga n waoog-ba. 
Numbers16:10 B sakame tɩ yãmb ne y saam-biisã, a Levi kamba, tõe n kolg-ba tɩ y yet tɩ rẽ ka sek-y n baood maan-kʋʋr naam." 
Numbers16:11 Yaa raab kãnga n be y yamẽ la y yik n na n kɩɩs Soaala-Wẽnde. A Aarõ lebga bõe tɩ y yik n maand beem ne-a?» 
Numbers16:12 A Moyiiz kɩtame tɩ b bool a Datã ne a Abiram, a Eliyab kambã la b yeelame: «D ka na n wa ye!" 
Numbers16:13 Pa sek foo tɩ f zãag-d ne tẽng sẽn da lengd ne bĩisim la sɩɩdo n na n tɩ kʋ-d we-raoogẽ? Bõe tɩ f rat n yɩ d taoor soaba? 
Numbers16:14 Sɩda ka tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩd pʋgẽ la f waa n kẽes-d ye, d pa reeg f nengẽ pʋt la bugsuntund ye. Fo tẽedame tɩ d nin ka puk laa? D ka na n dɩk sor ye!»" 
Numbers16:15 A Moyiiz sũur puuga wʋsgo t'a yeel Wẽnnaam: «Da reeg-y b kũuna ye. M ka reeg ned ba a ye bõanga, m ka wẽg bãmb ned ba a ye.»" 
Numbers16:16 A Moyiiz yeela a Kore: «Foo ne f nebã, wa-y ka beoogo, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. A Aarõ me na n waame." 
Numbers16:17 Fo nebã, bãmb kobs-yi la pis-nu wã na n dɩka b wisd laase n ning wisdu n tall n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. Foo ne a Aarõ me na n maana wa bãmba.»" 
Numbers16:18 A Kore ne a poorẽ dãmba reega a noore: ned kam fãa dɩka a wisd laaga, n ning wisdu, n ning tɩdar sẽn tar yũ-noogo, n wa yals sɛka roog noore. A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ me waame." 
Numbers16:19 A Kore tigma a neba sɛka roog noore. Wakat kãng la Soaala-Wẽnd puk b ziir zãma wã nifẽ. 
Numbers16:20 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz la a Aarõ: 
Numbers16:21 «Welg-y y mens ne neb a woto buudu tɩ m bugma na n dɩ-b-la marsã bala.» 
Numbers16:22 B kɩ b neng tẽng n yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnde sẽn zãad naand fãa vɩɩm, bõe tɩ nin-yend beeg tɩ y sũura puugd ne zãma wã fãa?»" 
Numbers16:23 Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Moyiiz: 
Numbers16:24 «Wilg neba tɩ b zãag ne a Kore, a Datã la a Abiram dooga, sikẽ wã.»" 
Numbers16:25 A Moyiiz yik n bʋʋga a Datã la a Abiram la buuda kãsem-dãmba pʋg-b lame. 
Numbers16:26 A Moyiiz goma woto ne zãma wã: «Zãag-y y mens ne nin-wẽnsa roto, da sɩɩs-y bũmb ba a ye b sẽn so ye tɩ b yel-wẽna wa kɩt tɩ y naag-ba n ki ye.»" 
Numbers16:27 Neba fãa sɩd zãaga ne a Kore, a Datã la a Abiram roto. A Datã, ne a Abiram da yiime n yɛs b roog noore ne b pagb la b kamba la sẽn be-b ne bãmba." 
Numbers16:28 A Moyiiz yeelame: «Ad bũmb ning sẽn na n wilg yã tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n tʋm maam la m ka maand m sẽn dat ye. 
Numbers16:29 Ad-y nin-bãmba sã n ki wa neba fãa sẽn kiidã, b loogra sã n wẽneg neb a taaba fãa rẽnna, dẽnd ka Soaala-Wẽnd n tʋm-m ye." 
Numbers16:30 La Soaala sã n maan bõn-bãnde, tẽnga sã n yaag a noor n vel bãmba ne b sẽn so fãa tɩ b sig vɩɩs bʋg-tẽngẽ, y na bãng tɩ b ra paooga Soaala-Wẽnde.»" 
Numbers16:31 A Moyiiz pa yãe n gom n baase la tẽnga sẽn wurg b taoore. 
Numbers16:32 Tẽnga noor yaagame n vel-ba, bãmb ne b zak rãmba. Yɩɩ boto me ne neb nins sẽn da kẽed a Kore wã." 
Numbers16:33 Bãmb ne b sẽn so fãa siga vɩɩse bʋg-tẽnga tɩ tẽnga lɛɛg n bus-ba. La woto b yẽesa buuda sʋka. 
Numbers16:34 Israyɛl gill sɩnga zoeese la b maanẽ: «D zoe tɩ tẽnga ra wa vel-d ye!» 
Numbers16:35 Soaala-Wẽnd bugum n sigi n dɩ neb kobs-yi la pis-nu wã sẽn da yõog wisdã b laasẽ. 
Numbers17:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Numbers17:2 «Wilg maan-kʋʋd a Elazar, a Aarõ biiga, t'a yiis wisda laas bugmẽ tɩ yaa te sõma la b zãag zĩig n kiis b bugma." 
Numbers17:3 B rɩk nin-bãmba sẽn yao b beegra ne b yõorã, b rɩk b wisda laase n kud-b tɩ b lebg paklse n tableg maan-kugrã; yaa kũun sẽn ta Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n lebg bõn-sõma. B na yɩ wa bũmb sẽn nekd Israyɛl kamba pʋ-tẽere.»" 
Numbers17:4 Maan-kʋʋda Elazar reesa bugma sẽn dɩ b rãmb wisda laase la b kud-b lame tɩ b lebg paklse tɩ b tableg maan-kugrã. 
Numbers17:5 Yaa bũmb sẽn nekd a Israyɛl kamba pʋ-tẽere tɩ nin-zaalga, ned ning fãa sẽn ka a Aarõ buudu, da saag n kolg Soaala-Wẽnd taoor ne wisdu n wa ki wala a Kore ne a nebã, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers17:6 Beoog sẽn vẽege, a Israyɛl zãng yika ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ. B ra yetame: «Yãmb kʋʋ Soaala-Wẽnd neba!»" 
Numbers17:7 Mik neba sẽn waa n sɩng zabr ne-bã, a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ wẽnemda b neng n tees sɛka roogo. Sawadgo n waa n lud-a la Soaala-Wẽnd ziir pukame," 
Numbers17:8 t'a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ na n bʋʋg-b sɛka roogẽ. 
Numbers17:9 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers17:10 «Yi-y nin-bãmba sʋka tɩ m na n menes-b-la vugr bala!» La b yiiba wõgemdame n kɩ b neng tẽnga," 
Numbers17:11 t'a Moyiiz yeel a Aarõ: «Dɩk wisd laaga n yãk maan-kugra bugum n ning tɩdare la f ta neba sʋka. Maan f sẽn tog n maan bũmb ning t'a paama a yel-wẽnda sugri, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũura puuga wʋsgo la tẽn-kũuma zoe n sɩngame.»" 
Numbers17:12 A Aarõ dɩka wisda laaga wala a Moyiiz sẽn yeel-a la a wudg n ta zãma wã sʋka la a mikame tɩ tẽn-kũuma zoe n sɩngame. A ninga tɩdarã n maan sugr kosgo neba yĩnga. 
Numbers17:13 A tɩ yalsa sẽn ki-ba la sẽn vɩ-ba sʋka la tẽn-kũuma yalsame. 
Numbers17:14 Tẽn-kũuma sẽn loog ne b rãmba taa tus piig la a naase la kobs-yopoe. Ka naag n sõd sẽn deng n ki-b ne a Kore wã ye. 
Numbers17:15 A Aarõ leba a Moyiiz sɛɛgẽ, sɛka roogẽ, tɩ tẽn-kũuma ra yalsame." 
Numbers17:16 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers17:17 «Wilg Israyɛl kamba tɩ roog fãa wa ne rasaare: rasab piig la a yiibu. Kãsem-dãmba tall-b lame n wa. B na n gʋlsa roog fãa yʋʋr a rasaara zugu. 
Numbers17:18 A Levi rooga rasaar zugu b na n gʋlsa a Aarõ yʋʋre, tɩ roog fãa tara rasaar a ye bala." 
Numbers17:19 Tedg rasaba sɛka roogẽ, kuga walsa sẽn be koglg ninga pʋgẽ wã taoore, zĩig ning m sẽn likd m meng yãmbã." 
Numbers17:20 Ned ninga rasaar sẽn na n tobe, bãng-y tɩ yaa yẽ soab la m tũus n yãke la wotome la m na n zãag-y ne Israyɛl kamba wɩdsã, b kõn le yaag b noor ye.»" 
Numbers17:21 A Moyiiz taasa koɛɛga Israyɛl kamba. Kãsem-dãmba waa n kɩs-a-la rasaare, roog fãa waa ne a ye. Dɩlla yaa bãmb piig la a yiib la a reeg yã, a Aarõ rẽnna sã n naage." 
Numbers17:22 A Moyiiz rɩgl-b-la sɛka roogẽ, kuga walsa koglga taoore." 
Numbers17:23 Vẽkẽmbeoogo, a Moyiiz sẽn kẽ sõmblem dooga pʋga, a mikame t'a Levi yagenga, a Aarõ, rasaara tobame; a ninga vãoogo, a ninga puugu n tol n bɩɩs a biisi." 
Numbers17:24 A Moyiiz yiisa rasaba Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n tɩ wilg a Israyɛl kamba fãa. B yãeeme la ned kam fãa le reega a rẽnda. 
Numbers17:25 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n yeel a Moyiiz: «Lebs a Aarõ rasaara kuga walsa koglga sɛɛga. A na n paa be n kõ Israyɛl kamba kaseto tɩ b b yaa tõatb buudu. Woto wɩdsa sẽn wɩt maama na n sɛɛme la kũum kõn le ki ye.» 
Numbers17:26 A Moyiiz maana fãa wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg-a. 
Numbers17:27 Israyɛl kamba waa n yeela a Moyiiz: «Ade, tõnd kiidame, tõnd tara loogre, n tar loogre." 
Numbers17:28 Sẽn kolga Soaala-Wẽnd ne b rooga fãa, kũum n dɩkd-a; d na n looga a yeyn-ye n wa sɛ gilli?»" 
Numbers18:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Aarõ: «M na n soka foom, n sok f roogã, n sok Levitsã f saam-biisã, y sã n bas tɩ bũmb kedb n ka tũ tɩrga sɛka roogẽ. Taal bee foo ne f kamba zugu bala, sã n ya yãmb n ka modg tɩ y tʋʋma fãa tũ sore." 
Numbers18:2 F na n boola f sɛɛgẽ Levitsa, f saam-biisã. Foo ne f yagensa, y sã n wat kuga walsa sẽn bĩngd roog ninga noorẽ, bãmb n na n yɩ y sõangdba la y sõgen-kamba" 
Numbers18:3 B na n maana fo sẽn yet tɩ b maan fãa, b na n sõng-f la ne sɛka rooga tʋʋma; b sẽn pa na n sɩɩs yaa te-sõma wã, yaa maan-kugrã; woto b kõn bao yell n kõ b menga, la b kõ yãmb ye." 
Numbers18:4 Bãmb n na n sõng foo, sɛka roog tʋʋma yĩnga la nin-zaalg da wa naag-y ye." 
Numbers18:5 Yãmb n so zakã la sɛka rooga tʋʋma la Israyɛl kamba sũur kõn le kãb ne y ye. 
Numbers18:6 Ade, mam meng m toore n dɩk Levitsã, y saam-biisã, n kõt yãmba. M kɩs-b lame tɩ b reeg yãmb zĩiga n tʋm Wẽnd sɛka rooga tʋʋma." 
Numbers18:7 Foo ne f kamba n na n tʋm maan-kʋʋra tʋʋma, sẽn get maan-kugrã la sẽn be peen-lilla poore. Maan-y y tʋʋma neere, yɩ-y maan-kʋʋdba, tʋʋmd kãng la m kõt yã. Nin-zaalg fãa sã n kolg be bɩ b yãk a yõore.»" 
Numbers18:8 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Aarõ: «Ade, yaa foo n na deesd neba sẽn wat ne kũun niyns mam yĩngã, Israyɛl kamba sẽn tog n dɩk bũmb ning fãa n kõ maama. Bãmb na n yɩɩ foo ne f kamba soolem, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Numbers18:9 Kũun sõma niyns sẽn ka na n yõog bugum la sẽn na n yɩ fo rẽnna yaa zoma, yaa rũms niyns sẽn kʋ sugr kosg la yell manegr yĩnga, Israyɛl kamba sẽn kõt-ma. Bãmb la kũun sõma wã foo ne f kamba sẽn na n sooge." 
Numbers18:10 Y na n zĩnda zĩ-sõngẽ n dɩ-ba. Rao fãa tõe n dɩ-b lame, yaa rɩɩb sẽn ya rɩ-sõma." 
Numbers18:11 Kũun sẽn le ya fo rẽnna, yaa b sẽn kẽ Israyɛl kũuna pʋgẽ n yãk pʋɩɩr ning toorã. M dɩk-b lame n kõt yãmb ne y kamba, y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli, zamaan sẽn wate. Sẽn be-b fo zakẽ fãa n ka rẽgem tõe n dɩ-b lame." 
Numbers18:12 M le kõt-f-la kood paalsã, ka-neema, yʋʋmda rãama; b sẽn kõt Soaala-Wẽndã, yaa foom n so." 
Numbers18:13 F na n le sooga kood rẽemsa fãa biisi, tɩɩsa bi-rẽemsa fãa b sẽn tall n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoorã. Neb niyns fãa sẽn be f zakẽ n ka rẽgem tõe n dɩ-b lame." 
Numbers18:14 Foo n so bũmb ning fãa a Israyɛl sẽn le ka tõe n sooge. 
Numbers18:15 Foo n so kom-dẽemsa fãa rondi b sẽn wat n kɩt Soaala-Wẽnde, ninsaalba kom-dẽems rondi wala rũm dẽgda kom-dẽems rondi." 
Numbers18:16 Bi-ribl ning fãa f sẽn kɩt rondi a yĩnga t'a le wa f soolmẽ, ka tog n loog kiuug biig ye. Rondi wã na n yɩɩ wakɩ koeems a nu, wakɩ koeems wa b sẽn dɩt a soab Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ. Woto wã yaa bõones pis-nu la b kɩta." 
Numbers18:17 Sã n ya nag-yãanga, pe-yãanga, bʋʋga, rondi ka tõe n kɩs n tõog n soog bãmb pipi biig ye. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd bala n so. Bãmb kʋʋdame, b zɩɩma raagda maan-kugrã sɛɛga la b kaama rɩta bugum tɩ maoonga yũ-nooga noog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Numbers18:18 Foo n so nemdã, foo n so yãooga sẽn dɩk n tees Soaala-Wẽndã la rɩtg gerã." 
Numbers18:19 Woto m kõt-y-la Israyɛl kamba sẽn kõt maam bũmb ning wala b kũun sõma. La rẽ n na n yɩ yãmb me pʋɩɩre, foo ne f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli, zamaan woo zamaana, zooda yĩnga, zood ning sẽn kõn sãame, m sẽn yõg ne foo la f yagense. Yaa zood yõgb rɩɩbo sẽn ning yamsem.»" 
Numbers18:20 Wẽnnaam yeela a Aarõ: «F ka tar buud pʋɩɩr Israyɛl kamba raboogẽ ye, Israyɛl kamba tẽngẽ ye, yaa maam la f buuda pʋɩɩre.»" 
Numbers18:21 Soaala paasame: «A Levi kamba pʋɩɩr la woto: B tʋʋmda keoor yĩnga, b sẽn tʋmd sɛka roog tʋʋma yĩnga, bãmb na n sooga Israyɛl kamba sẽn yãkd b paoong pʋgẽ, pʋɩɩr a ye piig fãa zugu n kõt Soaala-Wẽndã." 
Numbers18:22 Bãmb n deeg Israyɛl kamba zĩiga tɩ b pa tõe n le kolg sɛka roogo n bao yell n kõ b mengã. 
Numbers18:23 A Levi kambã n na n ges sɛka roog tʋʋma; b ka tʋmd neere, taal be-la b zugu. Tʋʋmd kãng la b yagensa me na n tʋm zamaan woo zamaana. B ka tar b buud pʋɩɩr Israyɛl kamba sʋk ye." 
Numbers18:24 M sẽn kõt-b yaa Israyɛl kamba sẽn yãkd b paoong pʋgẽ pʋɩɩr a ye piig fãa zug n kõt Soaala-Wẽndã. Yaa rẽ yĩng la m yet tɩ b kõn paam pʋɩɩr a to Israyɛl kamba nengẽ ye.» 
Numbers18:25 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers18:26 «Ad-f sẽn na n wilg a Levi kambã: Yãmb me sã n wa reeg pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugã Israyɛl kamba nengẽ, y me na n kẽe be n yãk pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugu n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Numbers18:27 Dẽ la yãmb na n kɩse wala neb a taaba sẽn kɩt alkam b sẽn pãb b zɛɛgẽ, bɩ rãam b bugsuntund sẽn kõt-ba." 
Numbers18:28 Yãmb me na n yãka bũmb n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde y sẽn paamd Israyɛl kamba kũuna pʋgẽ. 
Numbers18:29 B sẽn na n kõ-y bũmb ning fãa, y na kẽ be, wakat buud fãa, n yãk m pʋɩɩr sõngã n kõ-ma." 
Numbers18:30 Le togs-b woto n paase: Y sã n kẽ kũun sõma wã pʋgẽ n yãk m dẽnna n kõ-ma, sẽn keta yaa yãmb n so, wala y saam-biis a taaba sẽn kelld b mens yĩnga, b pʋt la b tɩɩs sẽn kõt-ba: alkam, rãam la kaam." 
Numbers18:31 Yaa rẽ la y na n dɩ ne y zak rãmba, y sẽn dat zĩig ning fãa, tɩ woto la yãmb me yaood y sẽn deegd y tʋʋma yĩnga, sɛka roog tʋʋma yĩnga." 
Numbers18:32 Y sẽn deng n kõ maam sẽn ya sõmbã m bas taal ne sẽn keta rɩɩbo, bũmb fãa be-la a zĩigẽ, y kõn tʋk y zugu bũmb sẽn tõe n wa ne y kũum ye.»" 
Numbers19:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: 
Numbers19:2 «Woto yaa noor m sẽn kõt yãmba: Wilg-y Israyɛl kamba tɩ b wa ne nag-zẽeg sẽn ka tar bãnde, naf sẽn ka tak wãka." 
Numbers19:3 Maan-kʋʋd a Elazar nengẽ la b na n tall-a n taase. B talld-a lame n yi sikã la yaa a Elazar nifẽ la b na n kodg-a. 
Numbers19:4 Maan-kʋʋd a Elazar yãkda naafa zɩɩm ne a nug-bila la a na n teesa sɛka roogo n mes zɩɩma, naoor a yopoe." 
Numbers19:5 B na n yõoga naafã a nifẽ; b na n yõoga gãongã, nemdã, zɩɩma la bĩndã." 
Numbers19:6 Maan-kʋʋda na n yãka kʋk raado, tɩɩg a ye sẽn tar yũ-noog vão-killi, n yãk monem n lob bugma sẽn dɩt naafã." 
Numbers19:7 Maan-kʋʋda pekda a futu la a so koom n yaool n leb sika pʋga la a na n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre. 
Numbers19:8 Sẽn yõoga naafa me pekda a futu, n so koom la a paada ne rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Numbers19:9 Yaa yell sẽn ka be ned ninga zugu n na n wolg naafa tompɛglem la a na n zãaga sikã n bao zĩ-sõngo n bĩng-a be. B na n bĩng-a lame tɩ Israyɛl kamba kẽnd n yãkd n maand b ko-sõngo. Yaa sugr kosg maoong rũnga. 
Numbers19:10 Sẽn wolga naafa tompɛglma me pekda a futu, la a na n paa ne rẽgd n ta zaabre. Woto yaa noor a Israyɛl kamba sẽn na n deeg zamaan woo zamaana, f yaa tẽnga biig bɩ sãana.»" 
Numbers19:11 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Ned ning fãa sẽn sɩɩs kũum, kũum buud fãa, dogla yell a zug, dasem a yopoe yĩnga." 
Numbers19:12 A na n yɩlga a meng ne ko-sõngã, daar a tãab soaba, la a na n lebga yɩlemde, daar a yopoe soaba. Yɩlgra sã n ka yɩlg daar a tãab soabã, a soab ket n zĩi ne a rẽgdo, daar a yopoe soaba me." 
Numbers19:13 Sẽn na n sɩɩs-a kũum, sẽn na n sɩɩs-a ninsaal sẽn ki paalem, la a zãgs yɩlgre, yẽ soab rẽgemda Soaala roogo la b na n yiisa a soab Israyɛl buudẽ. B sã n ka mes-a ne ko-sõng fãa, a paada ne a rẽgdo, a ka yɩlg ye." 
Numbers19:14 Noora la woto: Ned sã n ki a roogẽ, sẽn kẽ-a rooga pʋg fãa, sẽn be-a rooga pʋg fãa, yaa rẽgd, dasem a yopoe yĩnga." 
Numbers19:15 Laok buud fãa noor sẽn ka page, sẽn ka loe ne gĩsga, lebgda rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:16 Ned sã n kood a pʋʋgo n lak kũum, n lak ned sẽn kodg ne sʋʋga, n lak ninsaal sẽn ki tɩ pa tũ ne sʋʋga, n lak a rɩgre, bɩ n sɩɩs yaoogo, yaa rasem a yopoe la a paad ne rẽgd." 
Numbers19:17 Nin kãng yɩlgr yĩnga b yãkda tompɛglem zĩig ning b sẽn yõog yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoonga rũngã, tompɛglma ningda laok pʋga la b wat n saam-a-la ne kʋɩlg koom." 
Numbers19:18 Ned sẽn ka rẽgem n dɩkd tɩɩg a ye sẽn tar yũ-noog vão-killi n tʋm ko-sõngã n mes rooga la a lagdã, n mes neb niyns sẽn be a pʋgẽ, n mes ned ninga sẽn sɩɩs-a kõaba, ned b sẽn kʋ, ned sẽn ki a meng yĩnga, bɩ yaoogo." 
Numbers19:19 Ned ninga sẽn ka rẽgma n mesd sẽn dẽgma wã ne ko-sõngo, daar a tãab soaba la daar a yopoe soaba. A yopoe daara marsã la a lebgd yɩlemde. A na n peka a futu la a so koom, la zaabre yell doka a zugu." 
Numbers19:20 La ned sã n dẽgem a menga, n yaool n ka yɩlge, b kʋʋda yẽ soaba, ka rẽ, a na n dẽgma Soaala roogo; b sã n ka mes-a ne ko-sõng fãa a yaa rẽgdo." 
Numbers19:21 No-kãnga yaa noor b sẽn na n tũ zamaan woo zamaana. Ned ninga sẽn dɩk-a ko-sõngã n mesã, yẽ soab me pekda a futu. Ko-sõnga sẽn sɩɩs a soab paada ne a rẽgd n ta zaabre." 
Numbers19:22 Ned sã n dẽgme, a sẽn sɩɩs bũmb ning fãa lebgda rẽgdo, la bõn-kãng me rẽgda rẽgemda a sɩɩsda n ta zĩ-sobdo.»" 
Numbers20:1 Yaa pipi kiuugã la a Israyɛl kamba ta Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ. B wẽ b sika Kadɛs. Be la a Miriyam maan kaalem la be me la b mum-a. 
Numbers20:2 Koom da ka be sẽn yũud ye tɩ Israyɛl kamba yik zabr ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ. 
Numbers20:3 Neba ra baooda a Moyiiz noore: b ra yetame: «Kato! Bõe tɩ d ka naag d saam-biisã n ki Soaala-Wẽnd taoore? 
Numbers20:4 Bõe tɩ yãmb tall Soaala-Wẽnd kamba n wa zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka tɩ d na n ki, tõnd ne d rũmsi!" 
Numbers20:5 Bõe tɩ y yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga n tall n wa zĩ wẽngẽ ka? Ka zĩig sẽn tõe n bʋd kood ye, ka tõe n sel kankanga bɩ bugsuntungu, bɩ tɩɩg ninga sẽn womd wa poaloanga ye. Ko yũudem meng ka ye.»" 
Numbers20:6 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ basa nebã n dig sɛka roogẽ. B wõgemdame n kɩ b neng tẽnga la Soaala-Wẽnd ziira bui-b lame. 
Numbers20:7 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers20:8 «Dɩk f rasaarã, la yi ne a Aarõ, n tigim nebã. Gom ne pĩiga bãmb fãa gill taoore la pĩiga na kõ-y koom tɩ y yũ. F na n kɩtame tɩ pĩiga pusg koom tɩ f kõ neba tɩ b yũ, bãmb ne b rũmsi.»" 
Numbers20:9 A Moyiiz rɩka a rasaara sẽn da rɩg Soaala-Wẽnd taoorã la a maana b sẽn yeel-a t'a maan bũmb ningã. 
Numbers20:10 A Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tigma neba pĩig sɛɛgẽ n yeel-ba: «Kelg-y wɛ, tõatbã! D tõeeme tɩ pĩiga pusg koom bɩ?»" 
Numbers20:11 A Moyiiz zẽka a nugu, la ne a rasaarã a wẽe pĩiga naoor a yiibu. Kooma pusgame la neba ne b rũmsa paamame n yũ." 
Numbers20:12 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ: «Yãmb pa tẽ maam ye, y ka maan tɩ Israyɛl kils m yʋʋra t'a sãd moog ye. Rẽ yĩngã ka yãmb n na n tall buudã n kẽes m sẽn kãab-a tẽng ninga pʋg ye.»" 
Numbers20:13 Dẽ me yĩng la kooma sẽn pusg zĩig ninga pʋd tɩ Meriba, tɩ zabr koom, tɩ zĩ-kãnga a Israyɛl bao zabr ne Soaala-Wẽnde la Soaala-Wẽnd tũ rẽ n puk b sõmblem." 
Numbers20:14 A Moyiiz zĩnda Kadɛs n tʋm neb Edom dĩma nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-a: «F saam-biig, a Israyɛl, koɛɛg la woto: Fo mii yell woo yelle d buuda sẽn sege." 
Numbers20:15 D yaab rãmb waa n kẽe Ezipt tɩ d pa be n kaoose. Ezipt rãmb ka zã-d neer ye, tõnd la d yaab rãmba." 
Numbers20:16 D sẽn kelem Soaala-Wẽnde, b wʋma d koɛɛga la b tʋma b malɛk t'a wa yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga. Rũnna wã yaa Kadɛs la d be, fo toaagẽ." 
Numbers20:17 Bas-d tɩ d tũ f tẽngã n looge! D kõn bʋdg f pʋtẽ, d kõn bʋdg f bugsuntundẽ ye. D kõn yũ f bulsa kom ye. So-kõodra la d na n tũ n ka bʋdg goabga, n ka bʋdg rɩtgo, al n wa yi f soolmẽ.»" 
Numbers20:18 La ad-a Edom sẽn leoke: «Da saag n kẽ m soolma pʋg ye, ka rẽ m na yiis m tãb-biisa tɩ b seg foo.»" 
Numbers20:19 Israyɛl kamba taas-a-la gomd kãnga: «Yaa so-kõodra bal la d na n dɩke, la d sã n sɩɩs f koom menga, d na bao ligdi n yao-fo. D sẽn kot bũmb ning bala, yaa d paam sor n loog ne nao.»" 
Numbers20:20 T'a Edom yeele: «F kõn loog ka ye.» A Edom yi n sega a Israyɛl ne neb ka tɛka la a wilga a nug pãnga. 
Numbers20:21 A Edom zãgsame tɩ b kõn tũ a tẽngẽ ye t'a Israyɛl na n kong n zãag. 
Numbers20:22 Israyɛl kamba sẽn yi Kadɛs, yaa a Or tãms la b rʋ yã." 
Numbers20:23 Yaa a Edom toaagẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel a Moyiiz la a Aarõ: 
Numbers20:24 «A Aarõ na n loogame n tɩ sak a saam-dãmba. A pa na n paam n kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kõt a Israyɛl kamba ye, la rẽ yaa y sẽn pa reeg m gomdã Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Tall a Aarõ ne a biiga, a Elazar, tɩ y rʋ Or tãnga." 
Numbers20:26 Yees a Aarõ futã n yeelg a Elazar. Rẽ poore, a na n loogame, be la a na n ki.»" 
Numbers20:27 A Moyiiz reega Soaala-Wẽnd noore la Israyɛl kamba fãa nifẽ a rʋʋ Or tãnga. 
Numbers20:28 A Moyiiz rɩka a Aarõ futã n yeelg a Elazar. Yaa tãnga zug la a Aarõ tɩ sak a saam-dãmba, t'a Moyiiz ne a Elazar na n lɛɛg n sig tãngã." 
Numbers20:29 Israyɛl kamba bãngame t'a Aarõ kiime la b yãba a kʋʋr kiuug tõre. 
Numbers21:1 Kanaã rãmba da tara b dĩm sẽn kẽed Negɛb la sẽn boond tɩ Arad. Bãmb wʋmame tɩ Israyɛl kamba dɩka Atarim dãmba sor n watẽ. B taka zabr ne a Israyɛl kamba, n yõg wʋsg n kẽes roogo." 
Numbers21:2 Dẽ me la a Israyɛl pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnd woto: «Yãmb sã n dɩk buud kãnga n sagl d nugẽ, m na pʋlem b tẽnga beedo, n sãam-a zãnga.»" 
Numbers21:3 Soaala-Wẽnd deega a Israyɛl kosgo la a tõoga Kanaã rãmba n kãab b tẽnga beedo. Tẽn-kãng pʋdame tɩ Orma, raboogo." 
Numbers21:4 Israyɛl kamba yi Or tãnga n dɩk sor ning sẽn tees Rudum mogre, sẽn na yɩlẽ n gil Edom. Sor zugu, neba le waa n konga raoodo." 
Numbers21:5 B sɩngame n na n wɩd Soaala-Wẽnd la a Moyiiz. B ra gomda woto: «Pʋs n yaa bõe yĩng la y yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga? Ka y sẽn dat tɩ d pa zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã bal laa! Bur ka be ka, koom ka be ka la d yam yaa n yii ne nimbãan-dɩɩbã!»" 
Numbers21:6 Soaala-Wẽnd tʋma wag-toose sẽn sɩng neba kɛɛbo la wʋsg sɩd kiime. 
Numbers21:7 Dẽ me la Israyɛl kamb waa n yãend a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «D maana wẽnga n wɩd foo la d wɩd Soaala-Wẽnde. Yõk sɛɛg d yĩnga tɩ wiisa zãag ne do.» T'a Moyiiz na n yõk sɛɛga," 
Numbers21:8 tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n yeele: «Naan wag-toaag ne zũudu n dɩk-a n yagl raoogo; waaf sẽn kɛ a soab t'a roog n ges zũud waafã, yẽ soab põsdame.»" 
Numbers21:9 A Moyiiz kuda waaf ne zũudu n yaglg-a raoogo la waaf sã n da kɛ ned t'a roog n ges zũud waafã, a ra põsdame." 
Numbers21:10 Israyɛl kamba le sɩnga b kẽna n wa wẽ b sik Obot. 
Numbers21:11 B sẽn yi Obot b waa n yalsa Iye-Abarim, tẽn-kãng tota ne Moab, yaang sẽnẽ." 
Numbers21:12 B le yii be n tɩ yals Zerɛd kʋɩl-bɛɛga noor. 
Numbers21:13 B sẽn yi be b tɩ wẽe sik Arno kʋɩlga rʋʋnde. Kʋɩl-kãng yita Amoritsa tẽnga n pãrgd we-raoogã la yẽ la Moabitsa ne Amoritsa toaaga. 
Numbers21:14 Dẽ la b sẽn wilg Soaala-Wẽnd zaba sebrẽ: Waeb sẽn be Sufa ne a kʋɩlsa sẽn zoet ne bʋʋrã," 
Numbers21:15 Arno ne a gõnegõtã sẽn sigd Ar be la a yegd Moab toaaga. 
Numbers21:16 Israyɛl kamb yii be n ta Beɛr. Beɛr yaa koom zĩiga. Yaa be la Soaala-Wẽnd da yeel a Moyiiz: «Tigim neba tɩ m kõ-b koom.» 
Numbers21:17 Yɩɩn-kãnga la a Israyɛl da pʋd yã: Bulga, tãoos f koom! Kils-y bõn-bãnde, neba!" 
Numbers21:18 Buuda kãsem-dãmba, buuda na-komse tuka b bulga. La b tuk-a-la ne b rasaba, ne b naam doɛ. Israyɛl kamba waa n yii be n tees Matana," 
Numbers21:19 n yi Matana n dig Naaliyɛl, n yi be n dig Bamot" 
Numbers21:20 n yi Bamot n ta Moab bãg-faaga. Zĩ-kãnga la Pisga tãnga zao a naam zaoore n get we-raooga zãnga. 
Numbers21:21 A Israyɛl tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Siyõ, Amoritsa dĩma:" 
Numbers21:22 «Kõ-m sor tɩ m tũ f tẽngã n looge. D kõn bʋdg f pʋtẽ, d kõn bʋdg f bugsuntundẽ ye, d kõn yũ f buls koom ye. F soolma pʋga, d sor yaa so yɛnga, yaa so kõodrã.»" 
Numbers21:23 A Siyõ pa sak tɩ b pãrg a soolma ye. A tigma a neba tɩ b yii n seg a Israyɛl zĩ-peen-daagẽ. Yaa Yasa la b seg taaba. 
Numbers21:24 A Israyɛl zẽk a sʋʋga la a wẽe n deega tẽngã, sẽn sɩng Arno kʋɩlga n tãag Yabok, n tãag Amonitsa toaaga sẽn tong ne tãnsoaben-doto." 
Numbers21:25 A Israyɛl wẽ b tẽnsa fãa n deeg n kẽedẽ. B kẽe Esbõ ne a tẽn-toosã. 
Numbers21:26 A Esbõ da yaa a Siyõ, Amoritsa dĩma na-tẽnga. A Siyõ me n da zab ne Moab dĩma n deeg a soolma zãnga n tãag Arno kʋɩlga." 
Numbers21:27 Ad-d sẽn karemd yʋʋmba sɛbẽ: Wa-y tɩ d leb Esbõ! D leb n tɩ yik a raboodo d sõng tɩ Esbõ leb n yɩ tẽnga! 
Numbers21:28 Bugum n widig Esbõ, Bug-walem n zomb dĩma Siyõ, bug kãng n dɩ Ar sẽn ti Moab tẽn-peelmẽ, sẽn zao a naam zaoor Arno tãms zutu." 
Numbers21:29 Bʋk woo Moab, bʋko! Y yell sãama zãnga, yãmb fãa sẽn waoogd a Kemos! Kom-bɩɩb lebga rabɛɛmba n tõe zoeese. Kom-pugli lebga yem-pogse, Amoritsa dĩm a Siyõ yem-pogse." 
Numbers21:30 D pɛɛma po-la b gãndo, D kʋ-b-la zãnga, Esbõ n tãag Dibõ, tõnd varga fãa n ta Nofa, tõnd pɩɩga fãa n ta Madaba." 
Numbers21:31 A Israyɛl tɩ kẽe Amoritsa tẽnga. 
Numbers21:32 A Moyiiz yiisa neb tɩ b kaag Yasɛr tẽnga la a tãb-biisa pãba a tẽn-toosã n deeg la b riga Amoritsa sẽn da kẽed be wã. 
Numbers21:33 Israyɛl kamb waa n teema sore; Bazã sor la b rɩk yã la Bazã rãmb dĩm a Og, yẽ ne a neba gilli, yii n seg-b lame n kaoog zabr Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Da zoe rabeem ye, m dɩk-a lame n sagl f nugẽ, yẽ ne a neba la a tẽngã. Maan ne ba wala f sẽn maan ne a Siyõ, Amoritsa dĩm sẽn da kẽed Esbõ.»" 
Numbers21:35 A Israyɛl tõog-b lame, yẽ ne a kamba la a soolem. Nin-vɩɩg ka kees ye, tẽnga fãa lʋɩ-la b nugẽ." 
Numbers22:1 Israyɛl kamba le rɩka sore, b waa n yalsa Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zeriko yegende, Zʋrdẽ noor. Zʋrdẽ zoet n teesda yamsem mogrã n basd Zeriko a nug rɩtgo." 
Numbers22:2 A Sipor biig a Balak wʋma a Israyɛl sẽn maan Amoritsa bũmb ninga. 
Numbers22:3 A Moab yãendame tɩ Israyɛl kamba sõor yaa wʋsg tɩ looge. B sõora yɛɛs-a lame. 
Numbers22:4 Dẽ la a yeel Madiã nin-kẽemsã: «Zãma kãnga na n sɛɛsa rɩɩba fãa tõnd sɛɛgẽ, wala niis sẽn sɛɛsd yamd bãoogẽ.» Wakat kãng t'a Sipor biig a Balak n ya Moab dĩma." 
Numbers22:5 A Balak tʋma neb a Balaam nengẽ. Yẽ yaa a Beor biiga la a ra bee Petor, Efrat kʋɩlga noore, Amavitsa tẽn-peelmẽ. A tʋmame tɩ b yeel-a woto: «Ad-y neb n yi Ezipt tẽnga la b sẽega mooga tõre la bãmb n wa n kẽed m tẽngẽ." 
Numbers22:6 M kot-f lame tɩ f wa kãab-b beedo tɩ b pãng yɩɩda maam. Daare m na tõog-a, n dig-a n yiis. M paam n bãngame tɩ fo sẽn ningd a soab bark paamda barka la fo sẽn kãab a soab beedo, kãabga tũudame.»" 
Numbers22:7 Moab la Madiã nin-kẽemsa bobame la b talla bũmb n na n tɩ yao baga a Balaam. B sẽn ta a Balaam nengẽ, b togs-a-la a Balak goama." 
Numbers22:8 A Balaam yeel-b lame: «Gãand-y ka yʋngã, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg-ma la m na n togs yã.» Nin-kẽemsa gãanda a Balaam yiri." 
Numbers22:9 Wẽnd kolga a Balaam n yeel-a: «Yaa yɛ rãmb n wa f nengẽ wã?» 
Numbers22:10 La a Balaam leokame: «Yaa a Sipor biig a Balak, Moab dĩma n tʋm a neb tɩ b wa yeel-ma:" 
Numbers22:11 ‹Ad-y neb niyns sẽn yi b Ezipta wa n pida m tẽnga. Wa kãab-b beedo n kõ-ma tɩ daare m na zab n tõog-ba, n dig-ba.› »" 
Numbers22:12 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Balaam: «Da tũ-b ye, da tɩ kãab beed ye, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, zoe n ninga buud kãnga barka.»" 
Numbers22:13 Beoog sẽn vẽege, a Balaam yika yibeoogo n wilg a Balak nin-kẽemsã: «Leb-y y tẽnsẽ, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pa rat tɩ m tũ-y ye.»" 
Numbers22:14 Moab nin-kẽemsa lɛɛg n kul n tɩ yeela a Balak: «A Balaam pa tʋlg n tũ-d ye.» 
Numbers22:15 Woto a Balak tʋma kãsem-dãmb a taaba. Yaa neb sẽn ya sʋk neba la b sõora yɩɩga pipi rãmbã. 
Numbers22:16 B taa n yeela a Balaam: «A Sipor biig a Balak koɛɛg la woto: ‹Maam a Sipor biig a Balak, maam n kot-f tɩ f ra zãgs waoong ye!" 
Numbers22:17 Bãng tɩ m na n zam-f-la kũuni la m na n maana f sẽn yeel fãa. Wa tao n sõng-ma, n kãab buud kãnga beedo.› »" 
Numbers22:18 A Balaam leoka a Balak neba woto: «Ba yaa sãnema la wanzurfa gill sẽn be a Balak zakẽ wã la a rat n kõ-ma, m ka tõe n maan bõn-bedr bɩ bõn-bila sẽn ka Wẽnnaam m Soaala sẽn wilg-m ye." 
Numbers22:19 Ne rẽ fãa m kot-y lame tɩ y gãand ka yʋngã tɩ m paam n bãng Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n wilg-m yɛsa.» 
Numbers22:20 Yʋngo Soaala-Wẽnd wala a Balaam nengẽ n yeel-a: «Nin-bãmba sã n waame bal n na n bool fo tɩ f wa yãag-ba, kẽnge. Fo yee n maan m sẽn na n yeel-fa bala.»" 
Numbers22:21 Vẽkẽmbeoog yibeoogo a Balaam yikame n ning a bõan-yãang gaare la yẽ ne Moab nin-bɛdã dɩka sore. 
Numbers22:22 A Balaam loogra puuga Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri tɩ Soaala malɛk na n tɩ yaas sorẽ n gɩdg-a. A ra zomba bõan-yãanga t'a sõgen-kamb a yiib yãagd-a. 
Numbers22:23 Bõanga yãee malɛk sẽn yɛs sora noor ne sʋ-bɛɛga t'a bas sorã n kẽed pʋto. T'a Balaam tãag bõangã n tar a pãbr t'a na le rɩk sore. 
Numbers22:24 Soaala-Wẽnd malɛka tɩ yalsa sor sẽn ya longo la sẽn bʋdg n kẽed bugsuntungu tɩ lalg be goabg la rɩtgo. 
Numbers22:25 Bõanga nif teega Soaala malɛkã t'a na n dɩdg lalgã. A tol dɩdga a Balaam karga t'a le sɩng a pãbre. 
Numbers22:26 Soaala malɛk le loog-b lame n tɩ yals zĩ sẽkẽ, ka tõe n kɩll goabga, ka tõe n kɩll rɩtg ye." 
Numbers22:27 Bõanga yãenda Soaala malɛka yɛsa la a bur n lʋɩɩme t'a Balaam sũur puug t'a tar a pãbr ne rasaare. 
Numbers22:28 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ bõanga gome la a yeela a Balaam: «M maan-f-la bõe tɩ f pãbd-m al naoor a tã?» 
Numbers22:29 T'a Balaam na n leok-a: «Yaa f sẽn yik rũnna n maand f yama. M sã n da tarẽ sʋʋga m naan n kodgẽ foo zĩig pʋgẽ!» 
Numbers22:30 Bõanga me paasame: «Fo ka m zu-soab laa? Ka maam la f zao daar fãa laa? M sɩng n maanda wa m sẽn maan rũnna wã bɩ?» T'a leok tɩ ayoo! 
Numbers22:31 Wẽnnaam puka a Balaam nini la a yãee malɛka sẽn yɛs ne sʋʋg sora noore. A rõbendame n kɩ a neng tẽnga. 
Numbers22:32 Tɩ Soaala malɛk na n yeel-a: «Bõe yĩng la bõanga paam pãbr al naoor a tãabo? Wala f sẽn ne, maam n waa n gɩdg a kẽnde. M pa tẽed tɩ f tagsame tɩ sek n yaool n dɩk f sora ye." 
Numbers22:33 Sã n ya bõangã, a yãenda maam naoor a tãab n keke. La a sã n da pa kekẽ m da na kodgẽ foo zĩig pʋgẽ bala n yaool n basẽ bõangã.»" 
Numbers22:34 A Balaam yeela Soaala malɛka: «M kongame, m sẽn pa bãng tɩ yãmb n da yɛs m taoor sora zugu. La ade, m so-toaka sã n pa noom-y, m na n lebame.»" 
Numbers22:35 Malɛka yeelame: «Tũ nin-bãmba n looge, la m sẽn yet tɩ f togs bũmb ninga la f na n togse.» A Balaam tũume n loog a Balak nengẽ." 
Numbers22:36 A Balak wʋma a Balaam waoongo. A tɩ seg-a-la Ir-Moab, zĩig ning Arno kʋɩlga sẽn bẽeg a soolma toaaga." 
Numbers22:37 A Balak yeela a Balaam: «M deng n bool-f-la pipi tɩ f pa wa ye. M sok n gese: sẽn tʋm b rãmb tɩ b wa bool-fã sõor n ka sek bɩ bõe? Yaa m ka tõe n waoog-f lame tɩ ta f raab bɩ bõe?» 
Numbers22:38 T'a Balaam na n leoke: «M sẽn ta f nengẽ wã, f tẽedame tɩ koɛ bʋg la m tar n na n kõ-fo? Ad yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ m togs bal la m na n togse.»" 
Numbers22:39 A Balaam tũ-la a Balak n looge la yaa Kiriyat-Usot la b ta yã. 
Numbers22:40 A Balak kʋʋ maando, rũm-bɛd la rũm-bõonego; a yãka a Balaam pʋɩɩre, n yãk a tũud-n-taasa pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers22:41 Vẽkẽmbeoog yibeoogo, a Balak ne a Balaam dʋʋ Bamot-Baal. B sẽn be tãnga zugã, b ra nee Israyɛl bogr bala." 
Numbers23:1 A Balaam yeela a Balak: «Me maan-kug a yopoe kaalẽ la f wa ne lols a yopoe la pe-raad a yopoe.» 
Numbers23:2 A Balak maana wa b sẽn yeel-a. La bãmb b yiiba gilga maan-kugã, n kodg maan-kugr fãa zugu, loalg la pe-raoogo." 
Numbers23:3 A Balaam le paasame: «Yals f maanda sɛɛgẽ tɩ m zãag bilfu. Daare Soaala na seg-m la m sẽn na n wʋm bũmb ning b nengẽ, m na wilg-fo, ba koɛɛga sẽn yaa a soaba.» A sẽn gome, a sɩd zãagame n ta sorã." 
Numbers23:4 Soaala-Wẽnd seg-a lame la a Balaam yeelame: «M kɩtame tɩ b me maan-kug a yopoe, la a ye fãa zugu, b maana loalg la pe-raoog maoongo.»" 
Numbers23:5 Soaala-Wẽnd wilga a Balaam a sẽn na n togse, la a yeel-a lame: «Leb a Balak nengẽ la f gom ne-a wa m sẽn wilg-fã.»" 
Numbers23:6 A Balaam sẽn leb a Balak nengẽ, a mikame t'a ket n yɛsa maan-kuga sɛɛga, yẽ ne Moab nin-bɛdã." 
Numbers23:7 A Balaam goma a bãngr goama: A Balak bool-m-la Aram tɩ m yi be n wa; Moab dĩma bool-m-la yaang tãmsẽ: Wudg n wa kãab a Zakoob wẽnga n kõ-ma! Wudg n wa pʋlem a Israyɛl beedo n kõ-ma! 
Numbers23:8 M yɩta a wãn n kãab wẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn pa yãk a soab barka? M yɩta a wãn n pʋlem beedo Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn ka yi a soab poorẽ?" 
Numbers23:9 M sẽn zao pĩisa zut n getẽ, m sẽn karg tãmsã n neẽ, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn bĩng b menga, b toorẽ pʋɩɩre, yaa pʋɩɩr sẽn bĩng kɛɛnga, pʋɩɩr sẽn welg ne buud a taaba." 
Numbers23:10 Ãnda n tõe n sõd a Zakoob n kong bĩisra sõadga? Ãnda n tõe n sõd a Israyɛl tus lagem tusã? Soaala-Wẽnd sõng-m tɩ m yi dũniya wa nin-sõma wã sẽn yiti! Soaala-Wẽnd na sõnge tɩ m baasg yɩ bark baasg wa Israyɛl kamba! 
Numbers23:11 A Balak yeela a Balaam: «Yaa bõe la f maan-m woto? M tall-f lame n wa tɩ f kãab m bɛɛb beedo tɩ f lɛɛg zam-b kãab noodo!» 
Numbers23:12 T'a Balaam yeele: «M sã n gomda, m noora tõe n yiisa gomd Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn ka kõ sor tɩ m yiis bɩ?»" 
Numbers23:13 A Balak bool-a lame: «Wa tũ ma, wa tɩ d yals zĩig a to tɩ f paam n yãend a Israyɛl zãma wã. Ya bogr bala la f sẽn da ne wã, f ra ka ne-b zãng ye. Wa yals zĩ-kãnga n kãab beed n kõ-ma!»" 
Numbers23:14 A Balak tall-a lame n dʋ Pisga tãnga zugu n le me maan-kug a yopoe n kʋ loalg la pe-raoog maan-kugr fãa zugu. 
Numbers23:15 A Balaam yeel-a lame: «Yaas ka, maan-kugra sɛɛga tɩ m zãag bilfu n gũ Soaala leokre.»" 
Numbers23:16 Soaala-Wẽnd waa n sega a Balaam n wilg-a b koɛɛga la b yeel-a woto: «Leb a Balak nengẽ la tɩ gom ne-a wala m sẽn togs-fã.» 
Numbers23:17 A Balaam leba a Balak nengẽ la a mikame t'a ket n yɛsa maan-kugra sɛɛga, yẽ ne Moab nin-bɛdã. A Balak sok-a lame: «Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-f lame tɩ bõe?»" 
Numbers23:18 T'a Balaam na n le gom a bãngr goama: Yiki Balak, yik n kelge! Kelg-m neere, Sipor biiga!" 
Numbers23:19 Soaala-Wẽnd ka ninsaala n mi zirẽ yagb ye, B ka ninsaal n bool n le yet tɩ b vẽ ye; Soaala-Wẽnd pa yiisd gomd tɩ gomda pa faoog ye. Goama pa gomd n ka pidsdẽ ye." 
Numbers23:20 M yeelame tɩ bark la m na n ningi, dɩlla m kõn lebs m zelemd ye." 
Numbers23:21 Tẽn-kũum kõn lʋɩ a Zakoob buudẽ, namsg kõn nams a Israyɛl tẽngẽ ye, Wẽnnaam a Soaala bee ne-a, Wẽnnaam pẽgra sãta a tẽngẽ." 
Numbers23:22 Bãmb n yiis-a Ezipt tẽnga. B kõ-a-la we-naaf pãnga. 
Numbers23:23 Bagb korg ka bobd a Zakoob tẽng ye bagr ka bʋgd Israyɛl ye. Wakat sã n ta bala a Zakoob paamda vẽnegre, Soaala-Wẽnd pukda a Israyɛl b tʋʋma." 
Numbers23:24 Ges-y buud sẽn yik wa we-rũnga, Ges-y rũng sẽn yɛs wa gɩgemde a ka bri n wãbe, a kõn leb a gãagẽ ye, a ka bri n yũ zɩɩm, a kõn vʋʋs ye." 
Numbers23:25 A Balak yeela a Balaam: «F sã n ka tõe n kãab nin-bãmba beed me, bɩ f ra ning-b bark wɛ.»" 
Numbers23:26 T'a Balaam leok-a: «M da pĩnd n yeel-f lame: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ m togs bũmb ninga la m na n togse.› » 
Numbers23:27 A Balak lɛɛg n yeela a Balaam: «Fo yee n wa tɩ m wilg-f zĩig a to; daare Soaala-Wẽnd na sak tɩ f zĩnd be n kãab neba beedo n kõ-ma.» 
Numbers23:28 A Balak rʋʋsa a Balaam Peor tãnga zug tẽnsʋka tɩ we-raooga yɛdg n dɩg a taoore. 
Numbers23:29 A Balaam yeelame: «Me maan-kug a yopoe, wa ne lols a yopoe la pe-raad a yopoe.»" 
Numbers23:30 A Balak maana wala a Balaam sẽn yeel-a la a kʋʋ maan-kugr fãa zugu loalg la pe-raoogo. 
Numbers24:1 A Balaam yãeeme tɩ sẽn noom Soaala-Wẽnde yaa a ning a Israyɛl barka. A ka le nams a meng n maan wa rasem kam n gũ Soaala-Wẽnd leokr ye. A wẽnemda a neng bal n tees we-raoogã. 
Numbers24:2 A sẽn zẽk a nenga, a Balaam yãenda a Israyɛl sẽn wẽ a sik roog-roogo. Soaala-Wẽnd vẽnega a Balaam" 
Numbers24:3 t'a na n gom a bãngr goama: Woto la a Beor biig, a Balaam, koɛɛga, bãngd ninga sẽn ne yɩɩg-yɩɩga koɛɛga," 
Numbers24:4 bãngd ninga sẽn wʋmda Soaala-Wẽndã n gomda, Pãng Soaba sẽn kõt a soab t'a nee wã n gomda, Sẽn waoogd-a Soaala t'a nin pukdẽ wã n gomda." 
Numbers24:5 Ad-f rota be neere, Zakoob, F zagsa tar yamleoogo, Israyɛl!" 
Numbers24:6 B yɛdg n dɩga wa kʋɩls koom, b tõnda wa tɩɩs sẽn sel kʋɩlg noore, wa pu-neeb Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sele, wala kʋgs sẽn tãood koom noore." 
Numbers24:7 A buls koom ka fẽbgd ye a kood tɩgda koom. A rĩma n tõog a Agag, a naama pãng paasdame n dabda." 
Numbers24:8 Soaala-Wẽnd n yiis-a Ezipt tẽnga, a pãng yaa we-naaf pãnga. Yẽ n sɛt a bɛɛba. Yẽ n fõosd b kõaba sɩɩlem, a pɛɛma n lubd-b zãnga." 
Numbers24:9 A gãe wa gɩgemde. Ãnda n na n yik-a a gãagẽ? Sẽn kãabda foo noog paam barka! Soaala-Wẽnd na sãam sẽn kãabda foom beedo! 
Numbers24:10 A Balak sũur puuga ne a Balaam; a kabsame n yeel-a: «M boola foom tɩ f wa kãab m bɛɛb beedo, la yaa naoor a tãab marsã la f pids-b ne kãab noodo!" 
Numbers24:11 Sẽn ya woto wã, leb f tẽngẽ. M da yeelame tɩ ma waoog-f sõmb-sõmbo, ad ya Soaala-Wẽnd meng n mongd-f rẽ.»" 
Numbers24:12 A Balaam leok-a lame: «Fo sẽn tʋm b rãmba, m da togs-b la vẽenega:" 
Numbers24:13 ‹Ba a Balak kõt maam wanzurf la sãnema fãa sẽn be a zakẽ, m kõn tõog n kɩɩs Soaala-Wẽnd n sik noog bɩ beed wala m sẽn dat ye. Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ m togs la m na n togse.›" 
Numbers24:14 Ade, marsã m lebda m tẽngẽ la bas tɩ m wilg-f buud kãnga sẽn na n maan f buudã, sã n wa be n beẽ.»" 
Numbers24:15 A yiisa a bãngr gomde, a wilga woto: A Beor biig a Balaam koɛɛga, bãngd ninga sẽn ne yɩɩg-yɩɩga koɛɛga," 
Numbers24:16 bãngd ninga sẽn wʋmda Soaala-Wẽndã n gomda, Yĩngr Naaba sẽn kõt a soab bãngra n gomda, Pãng Soaba sẽn kõt a soab bãngrã n gomda. Sẽn waoogd-a Soaala t'a nin pukdẽ wã n gomda." 
Numbers24:17 M neeme la yaa beoog bũmbu. M neeme la yaa bũmb sẽn ket n zãre. M nee a Zakoob ãdg sẽn puk yĩngri. M nee naam dasaar a Israyɛl nugẽ, dasaar sẽn wurd a Moab zugu, la a vargd a Sɛt kamba." 
Numbers24:18 A Edom na n lebga ned a to soolem A Seyir na n lebga a bɛɛb soolem. Yaa Israyɛl n tʋmd a pãng tʋʋma. 
Numbers24:19 A Zakoob yagens n wõrd a bɛɛba, a karga b tẽngã n sɛɛs-a zãnga." 
Numbers24:20 A Balaam yãenda a Amalɛk me la a goma woto a poorẽ: A Amalɛk la fãa taoor soaba la a wãab beoog vẽegdame. 
Numbers24:21 A Balaam yãenda Kenitsa la ad-a bãngr gomd bãmb me poorẽ: F roog yɛsa ne pãnga, f tʋɩla f tʋk pĩig zugu." 
Numbers24:22 Ne rẽ fãa bugum n na n dɩ a Kaẽ t'a Asʋr na n kẽes-a roogo. 
Numbers24:23 A baasa a bãngr goama woto: Bʋk woo, bʋko! Ãnd n na põs Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbgre?" 
Numbers24:24 Ad Kitim koom kogendo. B na namsa Asʋr, b na n yeega Ebɛr nenga: yẽ me rigda a wãab zĩigẽ." 
Numbers24:25 A Balaam loogame n dig a tẽngẽ t'a Balak me rɩk a sor. 
Numbers25:1 A Israyɛl wẽe sik Sitim. Neba yika yoob ne Moab kom-pugli. 
Numbers25:2 Moab kom-pugli wã boola Israyɛl kambã b wẽn-naandsa maanda kʋʋb zĩigẽ. Neba kẽngame, b tɩ rɩɩme la b kɩɩ rũmdi wẽn-faada taoore." 
Numbers25:3 A Israyɛl sakame n tɩ kẽ Baal ning b sẽn waoogd Peor la b yika Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Numbers25:4 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: «Yõg buuda taoor dãmba la luul-b Wẽnd taoor zĩig sã n yẽege la woto Soaala sũ-puura na zãag ne b nebã.» 
Numbers25:5 A Moyiiz yeela bʋ-kaoodba: «Bɩ ned kam fãa kʋ a saka neb niyns fãa sẽn tɩ waoog a Baal, Peor tẽnga!»" 
Numbers25:6 Sak a ye ned n waa n tall Madiã pag n wa a saam-biisa sʋka. A waa ne-a, a Moyiiz la Israyɛl kamba fãa nifẽ. Dẽ tɩ b ra ket n zĩi n yãbda, sɛka rooga noore." 
Numbers25:7 A sẽn yãend paga ne raoã, maan-kʋʋda Pinas, a Elazar biig la a Aarõ yagenga, yika neba sʋka. A rɩka a kãnde," 
Numbers25:8 n bʋʋg-ba b sẽn tɩ kẽ zĩig ningã n wẽneg n be raoã ne Madiã poaka kõsb ne kãndã, tɩ tẽn-kũuma me wẽneg n yaase." 
Numbers25:9 Tẽn-kũuma sẽn loog ne b rãmba sõor ta tus pisi la a naase. 
Numbers25:10 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Numbers25:11 «A Elazar biig a Pinas, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, sigsa m sũura ne a Israyɛl. A pa sak tɩ ned a to reeg m zĩig bãmb sʋk ye. Yaa rẽ yĩng la m pa sak tɩ m sũura fudg tɩ m kʋ-b zãng ye." 
Numbers25:12 Yaa rẽ me yĩng la m yõg laafi zood ne-a. 
Numbers25:13 M yõga zood ne yẽ la a yagense. Bãmb n na n soog maan-kʋʋr naam yʋʋm tõt sɛɛbo. A pa sak tɩ ned a to reeg a Wẽnda zĩig ye la a maana a sẽn tog n maan tɩ Israyɛl kamb paam sugri.» 
Numbers25:14 Israyɛl biigã b sẽn naag n kʋ ne Madiã pagã, ra boondame tɩ Zimri. A ba ra boondame tɩ Salu, a Simeõ roog kãsem a ye." 
Numbers25:15 Sã n ya pagã, Madiã pagã, a ra boondame t'a Kozbi. A ba la a Sur, zak a ye kãsma, a Madiã buudẽ." 
Numbers25:16 Wẽnd waa n yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers25:17 «Kaoog-y zabr ne Madiã rãmba n dig-ba. 
Numbers25:18 Dig-y-b tɩ b bao-la y noore la b zãmb-y-la sẽn pa paoode ne Peor wẽn-naanda waoogre la b sãama y yʋʋr ne b taoor soab a ye bi-pugl a Kozbi sẽn ki baraare.» 
Numbers25:19 Tẽn-kũuma looga a loogre. 
Numbers26:1 Tẽn-kũuma loogr poore, Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ biig a Elazar:" 
Numbers26:2 «Sõd-y roog-roogo, a Israyɛl kamba zãnga. Sõd-y neb niyns fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna n tõe n yɩ tãb-biisi.»" 
Numbers26:3 A Moyiiz ne a Elazar kõo Israyɛl kamba koɛɛg Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ noorẽ, sã n be be n get yamsem mogrã Zeriko bee nug-rɩtgo. B yeel-b lame:" 
Numbers26:4 «Wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ noore, d na n sõda neb niyns fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽ.» Ad Israyɛl kamba sẽn paam n yi Ezipt tẽnga:" 
Numbers26:5 A Israyɛl bi-kẽeng a Rubẽ roogẽ: Anokitse, a Anok yagense; Paluwitse, a Palu yagense;" 
Numbers26:6 Esronitse, a Esrõ yagense; Karmitse, a Karmi yagense." 
Numbers26:7 Bãmb la a Rubẽ roogo. B sõor yɩɩ tus pis-naas la a tãabo la kobs-yopoe la pis-tã. (43 730) 
Numbers26:8 A Palu biig a ye, a Eliyab," 
Numbers26:9 n dog a Nemuwɛl, a Datã la a Abiram. A Datã la a Abiram da yaa taoor dãmba, la bãmb n da yik n guglem ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ. Bãmb n naag a Kore neba n zab ne Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Numbers26:10 Tẽnga noor yaagame n vel-ba, bãmb ne a Kore la a poorẽ dãmba, tɩ bugum me rɩ neb na ta kobs-yi la pis-nu, n puk sẽn põs-ba yam." 
Numbers26:11 A Kore meng kamba ra põsa wakat kãnga. 
Numbers26:12 B sõda a Simeõ roogẽ: Nemuwɛlitse, a Nemuwɛl yagense; Yaminitse, a Yamin yagense; Yakinitse, a Yakẽ yagense;" 
Numbers26:13 Zaritse, a Zera yagense; Sawulitse, a Sawul yagense." 
Numbers26:14 Bãmb la a Simeõ roogo. B zãng yɩɩ tus pisi la a yi la kobs-yi. (22 200) 
Numbers26:15 B sõda a Gad doogẽ: Sefonitse, a Sefõ yagense. Agitse, a Agi yagense; Sunitse, a Suni yagense;" 
Numbers26:16 Oznitse, a Ozni yagense; Eritse, a Eri yagense;" 
Numbers26:17 Aroditse, a Arod yagense; Arelitse, a Areli yagense." 
Numbers26:18 Bãmb la a Gad doogo. B zãng yɩɩ tus pis-naase la kobs-nu. (40 500) 
Numbers26:19 A Zɩɩda roogẽ: a Ɛr la Ona. B yiiba fãa ki Kanaã tẽnga. 
Numbers26:20 Ad-a Zɩɩda rooga kamba: Selanitse, a Sela yagense; Perizitse, a Perɛs yagense; Zerayitse, a Zera yagense;" 
Numbers26:21 A Perɛs roog la woto: Esronitse, a Esrõ yagense; Amulitse, a Amul yagense." 
Numbers26:22 Bãmb me la a Zɩɩda roogo. B zãng yaa tus pisopoe la a yoobe la kobs-nu. (76 500) 
Numbers26:23 B sõda a Isakar doogẽ: Tolayitse, a Tola yagense. Ypvitse, a Ypva yagense;" 
Numbers26:24 Yasubitse, a Yasub yagense; Simronitse, a Simrõ yagense." 
Numbers26:25 Bãmb la a Isakar roogo. B zãng yaa tus pisoob la a naase la kobs-tã. (64 300) 
Numbers26:26 B sõda a Zabulõ roogẽ: Sereditse, a Serɛd yagense. Elonitse, a Elon yagense; Yaleyelitse, a Yaleyɛl yagense." 
Numbers26:27 Bãmb la a Zabulõ roogo. B zãng fãa yaa tus pisoobe la kobs-nu. (60 500) 
Numbers26:28 B sõda a Zozɛf roogẽ: a Manase la Efrayim kamba. 
Numbers26:29 A Manase zakẽ: Makiritse, a Makir yagense. Le yaa Galaaditse, a Galaad yagense." 
Numbers26:30 Le paasa Yezeritse, a Yezɛr yagense; Elekitse, a Elɛk yagense." 
Numbers26:31 Asriyɛlitse, a Asriyɛl yagense; Sekemitse, a Sekem yagense;" 
Numbers26:32 Semidayitse, a Semida yagense; Eferitse, a Efɛr yagense." 
Numbers26:33 A Efɛr biig a Selofead ka rog bi-ribl ye, yɩɩ kom-pugli bala: a Mala, a Noa, a Ogla, a Milka la a Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Bãmb la a Manase roogo. B zãng fãa yaa tus pis-nu la a yiibu la kobs-yopoe. (52 700) 
Numbers26:35 B sõda a Efrayim doogẽ: Sutelayitse, a Sutela yagense; Bekeritse, a Bekɛr yagense; Tanitse, a Tan yagense." 
Numbers26:36 A Sutela roogẽ: Eranitse, a Eran yagense;" 
Numbers26:37 Bãmb la Efrayim roogo. B zãng fãa yaa tus pis-tã la a yiibu la kobs-nu. (32 500) B zãng fãa yaa a Zozɛf roogo. 
Numbers26:38 B sõda a Bẽnzame roogẽ: Beleyitse, a Bela yagense; Asebɛlitse, a Asebɛl yagense; Ayiramitse, a Ayiram yagense." 
Numbers26:39 Sufamitse, a Sufam yagense; Ufamitse, a Ufam yagense." 
Numbers26:40 B sõda a Bela roogẽ: Arditse, a Ard yagense; Naamanitse, a Naaman yagense." 
Numbers26:41 A Bẽnzame roog la bãmba. B zãng fãa yaa tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-yoobe. (45 600) 
Numbers26:42 B sõda a Dã roogẽ: Suamitse, a Suam yagense; a rooga ka weel sags ye." 
Numbers26:43 Suamitsa zãng yɩɩ tus pisoob la a naase la kobs-naase. (64 400) 
Numbers26:44 B sõda a Asɛr roogẽ: Imnayitse, a Imna yagense; Isevitse, a Isevi yagense; Beriayitse, a Beriya yagense." 
Numbers26:45 A Beria roogẽ: Eberitse, a Ebɛr yagense; Malkiyɛlitse, a Malkiyɛl yagense." 
Numbers26:46 A Asɛr bi-pugla yʋʋr la a Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Bãmb la a Asɛr roogo. B zãng fãa yaa tus pis-nu la a tã la kobs-naase. (53 400) 
Numbers26:48 B sõda a Neftali roogẽ: Yasiyɛlitse, a Yasiyɛl yagense; Gunitse, a Guni yagense." 
Numbers26:49 Yeseritse, a Yesɛr yagense; Silemitse, a Silem yagense." 
Numbers26:50 Bãmb la a Neftali roogo. B zãng fãa yaa tus pis-naas la a nu la kobs-naase. (45 400) 
Numbers26:51 Dɩlla Israyɛl kamba zãng fãa yɩɩ tus kobs-yoob la a ye la kobs-yopoe la pis-tã. (601 730) 
Numbers26:52 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers26:53 «F na n tũu sagsa sõor n pʋɩ tẽngã. 
Numbers26:54 Saka neb sõor sã n ya wʋsgo, a soolma me yɩta wʋsgo. Ned kam fãa reegda pʋɩɩr sẽn zems ne a neba sõor. Sak ninga neb sẽn ya wʋsgo vẽenem yɩɩda sẽn pa taa yẽnda." 
Numbers26:55 Ne rẽ fãa, tẽnga pʋɩɩb na tũu poeere." 
Numbers26:56 B na n poeesame n bãng tẽns niyns sẽn na n yɩ sags bɛda la sags bõonesa rẽnna.» 
Numbers26:57 B sõda a Levi roogẽ: Gersonitse, a Gersõ yagense. Keyatitse, a Keyat yagense; Meraritse, a Merari yagense;" 
Numbers26:58 B sõda a Levi roogẽ yɛsa: Libnitse, Ebronitse, Malitse, Musitse, Koreyitse. A Keyat n dog a Amram." 
Numbers26:59 A Amram paga ra boondame tɩ Zokbɛd; a yaa a Levi bi-pugla a sẽn dog Ezipt. Yaa ne a paga a Zokbɛd, la a Amram doga a Aarõ, a Moyiiz la b tão a Miriyam." 
Numbers26:60 A Aarõ kamb la a Nadab, a Abiyu, a Elazar la Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Kũum looga ne a Nadab la a Abiyu tɩ b yõgna Wẽnd taoore wisdu b sẽn da ka tar sor n yõgne. 
Numbers26:62 Levitsa sõda tus pisi la a tã. B sõda kom-dibli sẽn ta kiuugu. B ra ka naag bãmb n sõd ne buuda taaba tɩ b ra pa tog n paam tẽn-kẽedg wa Israyɛl kamb a taab ye. 
Numbers26:63 A Moyiiz ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar n sõd Israyɛl kambã a Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noor, Zeriko yegende." 
Numbers26:64 Bãmb sʋka ned pa zĩnd a Moyiiz ne maan-kʋʋda Aarõ sõadga sẽn maan Sinayi zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã ye. 
Numbers26:65 Wẽnd meng n da yeela bãmb dãmbã tɩ b fãa na n paa zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã. Neb a yiib bala n põse: a Yefune biig a Kalɛb la a Nun biig a Zozuwe. 
Numbers27:1 A Selofead kom-pugli n kolg ne b sokre. A Selofead yaa a Efɛr biiga, a Galaad biiga, a Makir biiga, a Manase biiga; b ra sõta a Zozɛf biig a Manase sakẽ. B yʋy wã: a Mala, a Noa, a Ogla, a Milka la a Tirsa." 
Numbers27:2 B wa-la a Moyiiz la maan-kʋʋd a Elazar la buuda kãsem-dãmb taoore, sɛka roog noore." 
Numbers27:3 B yeela woto: «Tõnd ba maana kaalem zĩ-peen-daagẽ. A ra ka naag ne a Kore neba sẽn yik zabr ne Soaala zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã ye. A ka rɩ ned a to yel-wẽnd taal n ki ye. A yaool n ka rog bi-ribl ye. 
Numbers27:4 D ba wã yʋʋr tõe n wa kell n menema woto a buudẽ, a sẽn ka rog bi-ribla yĩng bɩ? Kõ tõnd me soolem wala d ba wã saam-biisã.»" 
Numbers27:5 A Moyiiz taasa Naaba-Wẽnd b koɛɛgã. 
Numbers27:6 La b yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers27:7 «A Selofead kom-pugli wã tara bʋʋm. Dɩlla kõ-b soolem wala b ba wã saam-biisã, kõ-ba b raboog pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers27:8 La yeel Israyɛl kamba: ‹Rao sã n wa ki n ka bas bi-ribla, a bi-pugl n deegd a raboog pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers27:9 A sã n pa tar bi-pugla bɩ a ba-biig reeg a pʋɩɩre. 
Numbers27:10 A sã n ka tar ba-biiga, bɩ y kõ a ba wã kẽem dãmb bɩ a yaopa." 
Numbers27:11 A ba wã sã n ka tar kẽem, n ka tar yao, ya rogma sẽn wat n pẽ ne ned ning n yɩɩd, a buudẽ wã, n deegd a pʋɩɩre.› La rẽ na n yɩɩ noor y sẽn na n deeg tɩ woto la noor m sẽn kõt a Moyiiz.»" 
Numbers27:12 Wẽnnaam yeela a Moyiiz: «Dʋ Abarim tãnga n ges tẽng ning m sẽn kõt Israyɛl kamba. 
Numbers27:13 Dẽ poore fo me na loog n tɩ sak f saam-dãmba wala f kẽema, a Aarõ." 
Numbers27:14 Na n yɩɩ boto tɩ Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ, neba sẽn waa n yik n baood m noorã, fo zãgsame tɩ f kõn wẽ pĩigã n pusg koom tɩ m sõmblema me puk b nifẽ ye.» Gomda zabr ning y sẽn zab ne m koom poorẽ Meriba, Kadɛs pĩisẽ, Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ." 
Numbers27:15 Dẽ la a Moyiiz yeel Soaala-Wẽnde: 
Numbers27:16 «Bɩ m Soaalã, bɩ m Wẽnd ninga sẽn zãad b yemsa fãa yõorã bao ned n lʋɩɩs buuda taoore," 
Numbers27:17 ned sẽn na n kẽedẽ la a yit bãmb taoore, ned sẽn na n yiisd-b la a kẽesd-b, la woto Wẽnd kamba kõn pa wa piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩm ye.»" 
Numbers27:18 Ad Wẽnd sẽn leok a Moyiiz: «Yãk a Nun biig a Zozuwe, yaa ned yam sẽn bɩ. Yẽ zug la f na n tẽeg f nugu, n kõ-a tõogo," 
Numbers27:19 yẽ la f na n tall n kẽng a Elazar la buuda fãa taoore t'a reeg a tʋʋmna b nifẽ. 
Numbers27:20 Yãk f pãngã n kõ-a tɩ Israyɛl kamba reeg a noor. 
Numbers27:21 A na n bʋʋga a Elazar Wẽnd taoore t'a kos-b tɩ b wilg b raabo. La yaa wala Wẽnd sẽn datã la b na tũ, n yit la b kẽedẽ, yẽ ne Israyɛl buuda zãnga.»" 
Numbers27:22 A Moyiiz maana wala Wẽnd sẽn wilg-a. A yãka a Zozuwe la a tall-a lame n wa a Elazar la buuda fãa taoore. 
Numbers27:23 A tẽega a nus a zugu n kẽes-a a tʋʋmnẽ, wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers28:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Numbers28:2 t'a yeel Israyɛl kamba woto: «Modg-y la y ra bas tɩ wakata looge, tɩ y ka wa ne m kũuna ye. Ma me rɩɩb la bãmba la b yũ-nooga noogda m sũuri." 
Numbers28:3 Yeel-ba: ad kũun niyns y sẽn na kõ Soaala-Wẽnd beoog fãa: yaa yʋʋmd yend pe-bi a yiibu sẽn ka tar bãnde, yũ-noog maoong yĩnga." 
Numbers28:4 Kõta pe-bil a ye yibeoogo, a to zĩ-sobdo." 
Numbers28:5 Tũnugda ne zom wamde sẽn nag ne kaam lengre, oliv sẽn toos kaam lengre." 
Numbers28:6 Yaa yũ-noog maoong kãnga la b sẽn da kʋʋd Sinayi tãnga zugu beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, rɩɩb ne yũ-noog sẽn maagd Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Numbers28:7 Yibeoog pe-bila sẽn tũnugd ne rãam ninga Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, sɛka roogẽ, yaa rã-toos wamde." 
Numbers28:8 Pe-bil a yiib soaba kʋʋda zĩ-sobdo. Zoma ne rãama sẽn tũnugdã ka teemd ye. Rɩɩb kãng n tar yũ-noogo n sigsd Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Numbers28:9 Vʋʋsg daare b wata ne yʋʋmd yend pe-bi a yiibu sẽn ka tar bãnde. Maoonga tũnugda ne zom wam a yi sẽn nag ne kaam leens a yi n paas rãama. 
Numbers28:10 Dẽ la vʋʋsg daar yũ-noog maoongã la a wat n paasda beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a bõn-tũnugdsã. 
Numbers28:11 Kiuug fãa sɩngrẽ, yaa yũ-noog maoong la y na n kʋ ne lols a yiibu, pe-raoog a ye la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe la fãa yɩta rũms sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Numbers28:12 Loalg fãa tũnugda ne zom wam a tã sẽn nag ne kaam. Pe-raooga tũnugda ne zom wam a yi sẽn nag ne kaam. 
Numbers28:13 Pe-bil fãa tũnugda ne zom wamde sẽn nag ne kaam. Yaa maoong sẽn tar yũ-noog n sigsd Wẽnd sũuri, rɩɩb sẽn noom-ba." 
Numbers28:14 Maanda sẽn na n tũnug ne bũmb niynsã la woto: loalga yaa rãam wamd pogbre, pe-raooga yaa wũmbli a yiibu, pe-bil yaa wũmbla. Woto la ki-paal fãa ne a kũuni tɩ zĩig liki." 
Numbers28:15 Ka yĩmd yel-wẽnd sugr kosg maoonga boɛɛg ye; yẽ yaa beoog-beoog fãa bũmbu, la tũnugda ne rãam." 
Numbers28:16 Pak kibsa maanda Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga, pipi kiuugã, piig la a naas raare." 
Numbers28:17 Kiu-kãng piig la a nu raare yaa kibsa. Rasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, b na n dɩ bur sẽn ka lob bɩll ye." 
Numbers28:18 Pipi raara na n yɩɩ tig-raag Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Baraare tʋʋmd ka tʋmd ye. 
Numbers28:19 Ad-y sẽn na n wa ne bũmb ninga, yũ-noog maoong yĩnga: lols a yiibu, pe-raoogo, la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe. Fãa yɩta rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers28:20 Tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Loalg yaa zom wam a tã, pe-raoog yaa zom wam a yi." 
Numbers28:21 Pe-bi a yopoe wã tũnugda ne zom wũmbl rũng fãa. 
Numbers28:22 Paasda boɛɛg y yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga. 
Numbers28:23 Dẽ fãa wat n paasa ne yibeoog fãa maoonga sẽn ka tõe n viigã. 
Numbers28:24 Beoog fãa, rasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, y na n waa ne Soaala-Wẽnd dɩɩbo, rɩɩb sẽn tar yũ-noog n sigsd b sũuri. Y na n naaga ne beoog fãa maoongã la a rãama." 
Numbers28:25 Daar a yopoe soaba y na tigim taab Soaala-Wẽnd taoore; baraare y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye. 
Numbers28:26 Kooda rɩgsg kibsa raare, y sã n na n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnd y kood rẽemsã, y na n le tigma taab Wẽnd taoore. Baraare y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye." 
Numbers28:27 Y na kʋ yũ-noog maoongo n sigs Wẽnd sũuri: lols a yi, pe-raoogo la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe." 
Numbers28:28 Maanda tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam. Loalg fãa yaa zom wam a tã, pe-raooga yaa zom wam a yi," 
Numbers28:29 pe-bil fãa yaa zom wũmbla. 
Numbers28:30 Paasda boɛɛg sẽn na n kʋ y yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga. 
Numbers28:31 Rẽ fãa wat n paasa beoog-beoog fãa maoonga la a bõn-tũnugdsã. Rũng fãa yaa rũng sẽn ka tar bãnde. 
Numbers29:1 Kiuug a yopoe soaba, a pipi raare, y na n maana tigsg Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. Baraare y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye." 
Numbers29:2 Y na n kõo Wẽnd yũ-noog maoongo: loalg a ye, pe-raoog a ye la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe. Yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Numbers29:3 Tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam: loalga yaa zom wam a tã, pe-raooga yaa zom wam a yi;" 
Numbers29:4 sã n ya pe-bi wã, pe-bil fãa yaa wũmbla." 
Numbers29:5 N le paas boɛɛg, y yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga," 
Numbers29:6 tɩ b pa gomd ki-paalg fãa maoongã la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne b sẽn tũnugd ne rasem kam bũmb ningã. Dẽ la rɩɩb sẽn tar yũ-noogo n sigsd Wẽnd sũuri. 
Numbers29:7 Kiuug a yopoe soaba piig raare, y na n maana tig-raaga. Y na n loe y noor la y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd ye." 
Numbers29:8 Y na n kʋʋ yũ-noog maoong Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga: loalg a ye, pe-raoog a ye la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe. Na n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:9 Tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam: loalga yaa zom wam a tã, pe-raooga yaa zom wam a yi," 
Numbers29:10 pe-bil fãa yaa zom wũmbla. 
Numbers29:11 Le paasda boɛɛg sẽn na n kʋ yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga, n le paas a Azazɛl boɛɛgã, sugr kosg ra kãsengã boɛɛg, n le paas beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama." 
Numbers29:12 Kiuug a yopoe soaba piig la a nu raare, y na n maana tig-raag Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Baraare tʋʋmd ka tʋmd ye. Na n yɩɩ gilgr la y na n gilg Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga rasem a yopoe tõre." 
Numbers29:13 Y sẽn na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd baraare n sigs b sũuri na n yɩɩ lols piig la a tãabo, pe-raad a yiibu, la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Na n yɩɩ rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:14 Tũnugda ne zom sẽn nag ne kaam: loalg fãa yaa zom wam a tã, pe-raoog fãa yaa zom wam a yi," 
Numbers29:15 pe-bil fãa, la yaa bãmb piig la a naase, pe-bil fãa yaa zom wũmbla." 
Numbers29:16 Le paasda yel-wẽnd sugr kosg boɛɛgã la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:17 Daar a yiib soaba sẽn na n pʋgã, lols piig la a yiibu, pe-raad a yiibu, yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:18 Tũnugda rũng fãa ne a zom la rãam wa sẽn maan dasem kam. 
Numbers29:19 Paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga ne beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:20 Daar a tãab soaba sẽn na n pʋgã: Lols piig la a ye, pe-raad a yi, yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Numbers29:21 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la a rãam. 
Numbers29:22 Le paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:23 Daar a naas soaba sẽn na n pʋgã: lols piiga, pe-raad a yi, yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:24 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la rãam. 
Numbers29:25 Le paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:26 Daar a nu soaba sẽn na n pʋgã: lols a wɛ, pe-raad a yi la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:27 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la rãam 
Numbers29:28 Le paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:29 Daar a yoob soaba sẽn na n pʋgã: lols a nii, pe-raad a yiibu la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:30 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la rãam. 
Numbers29:31 Le paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:32 Daar a yopoe soaba sẽn na n pʋgã: lols a yopoe, pe-raad a yiibu la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi piig la a naase. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnd ye." 
Numbers29:33 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la a rãam. 
Numbers29:34 Le paasda boɛɛg yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama. 
Numbers29:35 Daar a nii soaba sẽn na n pʋgã na n yɩɩ kibsa baasgo. Tʋʋmd kõn tʋm baraar ye. 
Numbers29:36 Y na n kõo Soaala rɩɩb sẽn tar yũ-noog n sigsd b sũuri: loalga, pe-raoogo la yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi a yopoe. Fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnde ye." 
Numbers29:37 Rũng fãa tũnugda ne a rasem kam zom la rãam. 
Numbers29:38 Le paasda boɛɛg, yel-wẽnd sugr kosg yĩnga la beoog-beoog fãa maoongã ne a zoma la a rãama." 
Numbers29:39 Yaa woto la y na n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd b sẽn wilg yãmb dasem niynsã. B pa gomd da-zaan-daar maanda ye: pʋleng maand, yamleoog maand, yũ-noog maand, zom la rãam kũuni, laafi kosg maand.»" 
Numbers30:1 A Moyiiz taasa Israyɛl kambã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-a t'a wilg-b bũmb ning fãa." 
Numbers30:2 A Moyiiz yeela Israyɛl kãsem-dãmba: 
Numbers30:3 «Rao sã n pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ a sã n wẽene t'a na maan woto la woto, a modg n tũ a noor sẽn yiis bũmb ninga." 
Numbers30:4 Bi-pugl yʋʋm sẽn nan ka sɩlge la a ket a ba zakẽ, sã n pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnde bɩ a sã n wẽen t'a na maan woto la woto," 
Numbers30:5 t'a ba wã yaool n wa wʋm marsã t'a pʋlmame bɩ a wẽename t'a na maan woto la woto, la a ka yeel-a tɩ bũmb ye, bi-pugla pʋleng yɛsame, a tog n pidsa a pʋlengo." 
Numbers30:6 La a ba wã sã n yeel, a sẽn bãng pʋlenga raare, t'a ka sake, bi-pugla sẽn pʋlem bũmb ninga, a sẽn wẽen t'a na man bũmb ninga lebga bõn-faoogo. Soaala-Wẽnd kõn ning-a taal ye t'a ba wã ka sak ye." 
Numbers30:7 Sã n mikame tɩ pag sẽn waa n kẽ kãadem wakato, a ra zoe n loe-la a meng ne pʋlengo bɩ ne wẽenego sẽn yi a noorẽ," 
Numbers30:8 la a sɩda sẽn waa n bãng raare, a ka yeel tɩ bũmb ye, paga tog n kell n pidsa a noora gomde; a pʋlenga yɛsame." 
Numbers30:9 La a sɩda sẽn waa n bãng raare n yeel tɩ rẽ pa tõe ye, paga me bãng t'a sẽn pʋlem bũmb ningã, a sẽn wẽen t'a na n maana woto la woto wã lebga bõn-faoogo la Soaala-Wẽnd taoore taal yi-la a zugu." 
Numbers30:10 Paga sã n ya pʋg-kõore, bɩ a sɩd n yiis-a, a sẽn pʋlem bũmb ning fãa yɛsame." 
Numbers30:11 Sã n yaa a sɩd zakẽ la paga pʋlem Soaala-Wẽnde, la a sɩd zakẽ la a wẽen t'a na n maana woto la woto," 
Numbers30:12 t'a sɩda wa bãng n yaool n ka yeel-a tɩ bũmb ye, n ka yeel-a tɩ rẽ pa tõe ye, a pʋlenga yɛsame, a tog n kell n pidsa a noor gomde." 
Numbers30:13 La sɩda sẽn bãng raare n yeel t'a pa sake, paga pʋlenga lebga bõn-faoogo, a sɩda sẽn pa saka yĩnga, Wẽnd taoore taal yi-la a zugu." 
Numbers30:14 Sẽn ya wẽeneg ninga, sẽn ya pʋleng ning la pag pʋlem yã n yet t'a na n loe-la a noore, a sɩda sẽn yeel n yɛse." 
Numbers30:15 A sɩda sã n ka yeel-a tɩ bũmb tɩ beoog vẽege, a tog n pidsa a sẽn yiis a noorẽ. Sɩda rata pʋlenga pidsgu la a ka yeel tɩ bũmbu, a sẽn bãng raara tɛka." 
Numbers30:16 A sã n kaoos n yaool n wa wilg paga t'a ka sake, taala fãa bee sɩda zugu.»" 
Numbers30:17 Woto la noy niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Moyiiz, pag ne a sɩd poorẽ, ba ne a bi-pugl poorẽ, a bi-pugl sẽn ket n be a zakẽ." 
Numbers31:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers31:2 «Rok Israyɛl kamba sũuri ne b bɛɛba, ne Madianitsã. Dẽ poore f na loog n tɩ sak f saam-dãmba,»" 
Numbers31:3 Dẽ me la a Moyiiz yeel zãma wã: «Bɩ yãmb neb kẽer bob zabre. B tak zabr ne a Madiã n dok Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Numbers31:4 A Israyɛl sak fãa pʋgẽ, yaa neb tusr n na n bob zabre.»" 
Numbers31:5 Woto wã b yãka tãb-biis tusr sak fãa pʋgẽ. Yaa tus piig la a yiibu n bob zabre. 
Numbers31:6 A Moyiiz yiisa tãb-biis tusr sak fãa pʋgẽ n tʋm-b zabre, bãmb ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar biig, a Pinas. Yẽ n da zãad a nusẽ, sɛka roog teed kẽere la tõntõodã sẽn peebd kẽn la yalsg wakatã." 
Numbers31:7 B boba zabr ne a Madiã wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz la b kʋʋ Madiã tãb-biisa fãa. 
Numbers31:8 B naaga Madianitsa dĩm dãmb n kʋ: a Evi, a Rekem, a Sur, a Ur la a Reva. Bãmb la Madiã dĩm dãmb a nu wã. B kʋʋ ne sʋʋga a Beor biig a Balaam." 
Numbers31:9 Israyɛl kamba yõga Madiã pagba ne b kamba n sui roogo. B looga ne b rũmsa gilli, b looga ne b laogo." 
Numbers31:10 B yõoga Madianitsa tẽns fãa la b pʋt-rot fãa bugum. 
Numbers31:11 B looga ne b laoga fãa, ne neba la rũmsã b sẽn yõgã." 
Numbers31:12 B waa ne pagba la kamba, ne rũmsã la b sẽn wʋka fãa. B waa ne-ba a Moyiiz taoore, maan-kʋʋd a Elazar la zãma wã fãa taoore. Yaa a Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noore, Zeriko yegende la b tall fãa n kuli." 
Numbers31:13 A Moyiiz ne a Elazar la buuda kãsem dãmba yi sikã n seg-ba. 
Numbers31:14 A Moyiiz sũur puuga ne tãb-biisa taoor dãmba, ne neb tusr tãnsoaben-dãmba, ne neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba, b sẽn yi zabrã n wa." 
Numbers31:15 A yeel-b lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ y bas pagba vɩɩse n pa kʋ-ba? 
Numbers31:16 Yaool n yaa bãmb n kelg a Balaam saglgo n yik n tus Israyɛl kamba tɩ b tõdg Soaala-Wẽnd, Peor wɩbda wakat, tɩ tẽn-kũum na n loog ne-bã." 
Numbers31:17 Dẽ yĩngã, kʋ-y bi-ribl fãa, kʋ-y pag fãa sẽn mi raoa." 
Numbers31:18 Y sẽn na n kees y yĩnga, y sẽn na n bas vɩɩse, yaa kom-pugli niyns sẽn ka mi b rapa." 
Numbers31:19 Yãmb mens na n paa sika kudgẽ rasem a yopoe. Neb niyns fãa sẽn kʋ, neb niyns fãa sẽn sɩɩs kũum, y na yɩlg y mens ra-yɩta la a yopoe raare. Pagb nins y sẽn pag rooga me na n yɩlga boto." 
Numbers31:20 Y na n pegsa y futu, y gãndo, bũmb ning fãa sẽn maan ne bʋ-kõbdo, sẽn pees ne raoogo.»" 
Numbers31:21 Maan-kʋʋd a Elazar yeela tãb-biisa sẽn tɩ zab-bã: «Ad noy-niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a Moyiiz: 
Numbers31:22 Sãnem, wanzurfu, zũudu, kutu, waasdo la namdo yaa bũmb sẽn tõe n los bugmẽ." 
Numbers31:23 Dɩlla yaa bãmb la y tõe n los bugmẽ tɩ b yɩlge. Tõe n yɩlga ne ko-sõng me. Sẽn ka tõe n yɩlg ne bugum fãa pekda ne koom. 
Numbers31:24 Y pegsda y fut daar a yopoe soaba n lebg yɩlma. Dẽ poor marsã y tõe n kẽe y sikẽ.» 
Numbers31:25 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers31:26 «Foo ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar la kãsem-dãmba, sõd-y y sẽn paame, ninsaalba wala rũmsi." 
Numbers31:27 Pʋɩɩra na n pʋɩɩme tɩ sẽn kẽng-b zabrã la sẽn ka kẽng-b zabrã paam bũmbu. 
Numbers31:28 Y na reeg yaood Wẽnd yĩnga tãb-biisa pʋɩɩrẽ: ned a ye neb kobs-nu zugu, rũng a ye, rũms kobs-nu zugu, sã n ya niisi, bõeense la rũm-bõonese." 
Numbers31:29 Yaa tãb-biisa pʋɩɩrẽ la b na n yãke la b na n dɩk-b lame n kɩs maan-kʋʋd a Elazar wala Wẽnd pʋɩɩr. 
Numbers31:30 F na n kẽe neb a taaba pʋɩɩrẽ n yãk n kõ Levitsa sẽn tʋmd Soaala sɛka roogẽ: ned a ye, neb pis-nu zugu, rũng a ye rũms pis-nu zugu, rũmb bɛd wala rũm-bõonese.»"
