Numbers31:31 A Moyiiz ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar maana wa Wẽnd sẽn wilg-ba. 
Numbers31:32 Sẽn bob-b zabrã lɛɛg n wa ne rũmsi b sẽn paam n yõge, la rũmsa sẽn kell sõor la woto: rũm-bõonese wa piis la bʋʋse, tus kobs-yoob la pisopoe la a nu. (675 000)" 
Numbers31:33 Rũm-bɛda, niisa yaa tus pisopoe la a yi (72 000)" 
Numbers31:34 Bõeensa yaa tus pisoob la a ye. (61 000) 
Numbers31:35 Sã n ya ne kom-pugli sẽn ka mi b rapã, yaa bãmb tus pis-tã la a yi. (32 000)" 
Numbers31:36 Tãb-biisa reega rũm-bõonese, piis la bʋʋse tus kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu. (337 500)" 
Numbers31:37 La b kẽe be n yãk Soaala pʋɩɩre: kobs-yoob la pisopoe la a nu. 
Numbers31:38 Tãb-biisa le reega niis tus pis-tã la a yoobe; sẽn yãk Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga yaa niis pisopoe la a yiibu. 
Numbers31:39 B reega bõeens tus pis-tã la kobs-nu. (30 500) Sẽn yãk Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga yaa bõeens pisoob la a ye. 
Numbers31:40 B reega ninsaalb tus piig la a yoobe; sẽn yãk Soaala-Wẽnd yĩng yaa neb pis-tã la a yiibu. 
Numbers31:41 Sẽn yãk Wẽnd yĩngã, a Moyiiz reega fãa n kɩs a Elazar wala Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a noore." 
Numbers31:42 A Moyiiz sẽn kees Israyɛl kamb a taaba yĩnga ta-la a sẽn yãk n pʋɩ sẽn bob-b zabrã. 
Numbers31:43 Dẽnda bãmb me reega piis la bʋʋs tus kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu. (337 500) 
Numbers31:44 Niis yɩɩ tus pis-tã la a yoobe," 
Numbers31:45 bõeens tus pis-tã la kobs-nu," 
Numbers31:46 ninsaalb tus piig la a yoobe. 
Numbers31:47 A Moyiiz kẽe sẽn yãk n kõ Israyɛl kamba pʋga n le wãdg nin-yend neb pis-nu zugu, rũng a ye rũms pis-nu zugu n kõ Levitsa sẽn tʋmd sɛka roogẽ. Rẽ tũu wala b sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Numbers31:48 Sẽn lʋɩ-b tãb-biisa taoore n ya neb tusr bɩ neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba kolga a Moyiiz 
Numbers31:49 n yeel-a: «Y yemsa sõda b tãb-biisa fãa la ned ba a ye ka pa zabrẽ ye. 
Numbers31:50 Yaa rẽ yĩng la d wat Wẽnd taoore tɩ maan-kʋʋdba reeg d kũuna n tees Wẽnd la b kos-b tɩ b bas b kamba beegr fãa taale. Yaa rẽ la d wat ne d sẽn dees bɛɛba nengẽ sãnem teedo: zũya, kagse, nug-bĩnsi, tʋb-londo, te bobdi.»" 
Numbers31:51 A Moyiiz ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar reega b sãnema kũuna. Da yaa teed sẽn maneg n dõoge. 
Numbers31:52 Sãnema sẽn deeg Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga taa neb a nii zɩɩbo; yaa sẽn lʋɩ-b tãb-biisa taoore n ya neb tusr bɩ koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba n wa ne kũun kãense. 
Numbers31:53 Tãb-biig fãa ra zɛ a sẽn paame la a ra zɛ a meng yĩnga. 
Numbers31:54 A Moyiiz ne maan-kʋʋd a Elazar n deeg b kũuna. B tall-b lame wa sɛka roogẽ la b paa be n na n yɩ Wẽnd pʋ-tẽer nekr bũmbu. 
Numbers32:1 A Rubẽ la a Gad kamba rũms la b wuba ra yaa wʋsgo. B gesa Yasɛr la Galaad tẽnsã la b yãeeme tɩ yaa zĩis sẽn tog ne gʋʋlgo. 
Numbers32:2 A Rubẽ la a Gad kamba waa n yãenda a Moyiiz la maan-kʋʋd a Elazar la taoor dãmbã. 
Numbers32:3 B yeel-b lame: «Ges-y Atarot tẽnga, Dibõ, Yasɛr, Nimra, Esbõ, Eleale, Sevam, Nebo la Bal-Meõ." 
Numbers32:4 Yaa tẽns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wẽ n kõ a Israyɛl la sẽn tog ne rũms gʋʋlgo la y yemsa tara rũms wʋsgo. 
Numbers32:5 Y sã n dat tõnd ne neere bɩ y rɩk-ba n kõ y yemsã wala b zu-noog pʋɩɩre. Da kos tõnd tɩ d rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg ye.» 
Numbers32:6 A Moyiiz yeela a Gad la Rubẽ kamba: «Wao! Y saam-biisa na n boba zabre tɩ yãmb yaool n paad ka wɛ! 
Numbers32:7 Bõe tɩ y na n woog Israyɛl kamba raoodo, n woog b raood tɩ b zãgs tẽnga kõom, n zãgs tɩ b kõn kẽ tẽng ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãabd bãmbã?" 
Numbers32:8 Yaa woto la y ba rãmba maan yã, m sẽn waa n tʋm-b Kadɛs-Barnea tɩ b tɩ kaag tẽngã n bãng a nengã." 
Numbers32:9 B kẽn n ta Eskol bãg-faaga n kaag tẽngã la b ka gom n kõ Israyɛl kamba raood ye, b ka pirs-b ye; wa-y tɩ d zoe n deng taab kãabga tẽngẽ wã, ka zĩnd ye." 
Numbers32:10 Dẽ me la Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puug baraare 
Numbers32:11 la b kãaba neb niyns fãa yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽnna Ezipt yiiba wakatã, tɩ bãmb nin-yend meng naoor kõn tabg tẽnga ye, tẽng ning b sẽn da yaool n kãab a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob. B kãab-b-la boto b sẽn zãgs tẽeba yĩnga." 
Numbers32:12 Sẽn na n tõog n yãend-b kãabg tẽngã na n yɩ-la a Yefune biig a Kalɛb, Kenizitga, la a Nun biig a Zozuwe, tɩ bãmb pʋga Soaalã n ka sãmb ye." 
Numbers32:13 Wẽnd sũur puuga ne a Israyɛl tɩ b kɩt t'a gilim zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã yʋʋm pis-naase al tɩ sẽn ka tũ b Soaala raaba fãa wa looge. 
Numbers32:14 La yãmba, kɩɩsdb buudu, y reega y ba rãmb zĩiga n na n maan tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur yik ne a Israyɛl." 
Numbers32:15 Y sã n zãgs kẽnde, yaa a Israyɛl tõr n na n kaoos zĩ-peen-daagẽ ka la yaa buuda zãng wãab la y segenda.»" 
Numbers32:16 A Gad la a Rubẽ kamba le kolga a Moyiiz n yeel-a: «D na n mee wuba d piisa yĩnga, n me rot d kamb yĩnga." 
Numbers32:17 La tõnd n na n dɩka d zab-teedo n lʋɩ Israyɛl kamba taoore, al tɩ b wa kẽ b soolmẽ. D kamba na n paa ka, tãnsoaben-dot pʋsẽ n tɩlg bɛɛbã sẽn gũbgã." 
Numbers32:18 D ka na n leb n lɛɛg n wa d rotẽ tɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa ka kẽ b soolmẽ ye. 
Numbers32:19 Tõnd pʋɩɩr kõn naag ne bãmb rẽnna, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd ye tɩ tõnd buud pʋɩɩr yaa ka, ka Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd ye.»" 
Numbers32:20 A Moyiiz leok-b lame: «Y sã n maan wa y sẽn togsã, y sã n bob zabre Wẽnd taoore," 
Numbers32:21 y tãb-biisa fãa sã n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga n dig bɛɛba zãnga y taoore," 
Numbers32:22 y sã n yaas tɩ bɛɛba fãa kong pãnga tɩ y yaool n leb y tẽngẽ, y kõn dɩ Wẽnd la Israyɛl taal ye, la y sẽn dat n kẽ tẽng ninga na yɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ yãmba." 
Numbers32:23 La y sã n ka maan boto, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd la y na n beege, yaa bãmb taal la y na n paame." 
Numbers32:24 Me-y tẽns n kẽes y kamba, me-y wuba y piis yĩnga, la pids-y pʋleng ning y sẽn pʋlma.»" 
Numbers32:25 A Gad la a Rubẽ kamba yeela a Moyiiz: «D na n tũu yãmb noore. 
Numbers32:26 D pagb la d kamb la d rũmsa na n paa ka, Galaad tẽnsẽ," 
Numbers32:27 la tõnd fãa na n boba zabre ne Wẽnd sõngre, wala y sẽn date.»" 
Numbers32:28 A Moyiiz yãenda koɛɛg n leok maan-kʋʋd a Elazar la a Nun biig a Zozuwe la a Israyɛl kãsem-dãmbã. 
Numbers32:29 A yeel-b lame: «A Gad la a Rubẽ kamba sã n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga ne yãmba, b sã n bob Soaala taoore n na n tɩ zabe, tẽnga sã n wa lebg y soolem, y na kõ-b Galaad tẽng wala b buud pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers32:30 La b sã n ka bob zabr ne yãmba, yɩta Kanaã tẽng la bãmb me na n paam b buud pʋɩɩr yãmb sʋka.»" 
Numbers32:31 A Gad la a Rubẽ kamba leokame: «D na n maana Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-d tɩ d maan bũmb ningã. 
Numbers32:32 Tõnd na n boba Wẽnd taoore. D na n saaga Kanaã tẽnga n zabe, la d buuda pʋɩɩr yẽ bee Zʋrdẽ fool ka.»" 
Numbers32:33 A Moyiiz kõ-la a Gad la Rubẽ kamba, n paas a Zozɛf biig a Manase bogr a ye wã, Amoritsa dĩma, a Siyõ, soolem, la Bazã dĩma, a Og, soolem. A kõ-b-la vẽenema, dota la pʋtã la tẽn-toosã." 
Numbers32:34 A Gad kamba le maneg n mee Dibõ, Atarot, Arowɛr," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-Sofã, Yasɛr, Zogbaa," 
Numbers32:36 Bɛt-Nimra la Bɛt-Arã. B mee tẽns sẽn tõe n zab n fãag b mense, b mee wuba b piisa yĩnga." 
Numbers32:37 A Rubẽ kamba le maneg n mee Esbõ, Eleale, Kiriyatayim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal-Meõ, la tẽn bãmb yʋy tekame. B mee Sibma me. Yʋ paal la b bao n kõ tẽns niyns b sẽn le maneg n me wã." 
Numbers32:39 A Manase biig a Makir kẽnga Galaad n dig Amoritsã n deeg b tẽnse. 
Numbers32:40 A Moyiiz kõ-la a Makir, a Manase biiga, Galaad tẽn-peelem t'a me n kẽ." 
Numbers32:41 A Yayir, a Manase biig a to, tɩ zab n deega b pʋt-rotã la a bool-b lame t'a Yayir pʋt-roto." 
Numbers32:42 A Nova tɩ zab n deega Kenat la a pʋd-a-la a meng yʋʋre: Nova. 
Numbers33:1 Ad tẽns niyns a Israyɛl kamba sẽn tɩ kẽ b sẽn yi Ezipt tẽnga ne b tãb-biisi t'a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ be b taoore. 
Numbers33:2 A Moyiiz rɩka b sẽn yals tẽng ning fãa yʋʋre, a sã n wa yit be ne Soaala-Wẽnd noor n na n looge. Tẽn-bãmb la woto:" 
Numbers33:3 B yii Ramsɛs pipi kiuugã, kiuuga piig la a nu raare. Pak yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, la Israyɛl kamba paam sore n loog b loogre, Ezipt rãmba nifẽ," 
Numbers33:4 Ezipt rãmba ra mumda b pagba pipi biig woo sẽn ki. Soaala-Wẽnd n da wa ne b kũum. B kʋ-b lame n dok b sũuri ne Ezipt wẽn-yaalsã. 
Numbers33:5 Israyɛl kamba yii Ramsɛs n tɩ yals Sukot. 
Numbers33:6 N yi be n tɩ yals Etam, we-raooga sɩngrẽ," 
Numbers33:7 n lɛɛg n wa Pi-Ayirot sẽn tot ne Baal-Sefõ, n wẽ b sik Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 B yii Ayirot n dʋʋg mogrã n ta zĩ-peen-daagẽ. B kẽna Etam zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã ra-yɩten-daare, n wa wẽ b sik Mara." 
Numbers33:9 B sẽn yi Mara b taa Elim n yãend buls piig la a yi la koms tɩɩs pisopoe, tɩ b wẽ b sika be." 
Numbers33:10 B yii Elim n wa yals Rudum Mogre. 
Numbers33:11 N yi be n wa yals Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ. 
Numbers33:12 B yii be n wa yals Dofka. 
Numbers33:13 B sẽn yi Dofka b waa n yalsa Alus. 
Numbers33:14 N yi Alus n wa yals Refidim, la be b pa paam koom n yũ ye." 
Numbers33:15 B yii Refidim n wa wẽ b sik Sinayi. 
Numbers33:16 B yii be n wa yals Kibrot-Taava. 
Numbers33:17 N yi be n wa yals Aserot. 
Numbers33:18 N yi be n wa yals Ritma. 
Numbers33:19 N yi Ritma n wa Rimon-Perɛk. 
Numbers33:20 B yii Rimon-Perɛk n wa Libna. 
Numbers33:21 N yi be n wa Risa. 
Numbers33:22 B yii Risa n wa Keelata. 
Numbers33:23 N yi Keelata n dʋ Sefɛr tãnga. 
Numbers33:24 B yii be n wa Arada. 
Numbers33:25 N yi be n wa Makelot. 
Numbers33:26 N yi be n wa Taat. 
Numbers33:27 N yi Taat n wa Tera. 
Numbers33:28 N yi Tera n wa Mitka. 
Numbers33:29 N yi be n wa Asmona. 
Numbers33:30 N yi be n wa Moserot. 
Numbers33:31 N yi be n wa Bene-Yakã. 
Numbers33:32 N yi be n wa Or-Gidgad. 
Numbers33:33 N yi be n wa Zotbata. 
Numbers33:34 N yi be n wa Abrona. 
Numbers33:35 N yi be n wa Esiõ-Gebɛr. 
Numbers33:36 N yi be n wa Sin zĩ-peen-daagẽ, n wa Kadɛs" 
Numbers33:37 N yi be n wa Or Tãnga, Edom dãmb toaagẽ." 
Numbers33:38 Wẽnd kõo maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ noor t'a rʋ Or Tãnga la yaa be la a maan kaalem. Da yaa yʋʋm pis-naase la Israyɛl kamba ra yi Ezipt tẽnga. Yɩɩ kiuug a nu soaba pipi raare. 
Numbers33:39 A Aarõ sẽn waa n ki Or Tãnga t'a yʋʋm yaa koabg la pisi la a tã. 
Numbers33:40 Sasa kãnga la Arad dĩma sẽn da kẽed Negɛb, wʋm Israyɛl kamba waoongo." 
Numbers33:41 Israyɛl kamba yii Or Tãnga n wa Salmona. 
Numbers33:42 N yi be n wa Ypmo. 
Numbers33:43 N yi be n wa Obot. 
Numbers33:44 N yi be n wa Iye-Abarim, Moab rãmb toaagẽ." 
Numbers33:45 B yii be n wa Dibõ-Gad. 
Numbers33:46 B yii be n wa Almon-Diblatayim. 
Numbers33:47 N yi be n wa Abarim tãmsẽ, be tota Nebo tãnga." 
Numbers33:48 B siga Abarim tãmse n wa Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noore, Zeriko yegende." 
Numbers33:49 B wẽ b sik Zʋrdẽ noore, Bɛt-Yesimot la Abɛl-Sitim tẽnsʋka." 
Numbers33:50 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto ne a Moyiiz Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noor, Zeriko yegende:" 
Numbers33:51 «Togs Israyɛl kamba: y sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n digd Kanaã tẽnga," 
Numbers33:52 bɩ y menes y taoore tẽnga rãmb fãa, n menes b sẽn pees ne kuga, b sẽn dõog ne zũudu, n sãam zĩis niyns b sẽn dʋ n me b maan-kugã." 
Numbers33:53 Yãmb na n deega tẽngã n sooge tɩ m dɩk-a lame n kõ yãmb tɩ y sooge. 
Numbers33:54 Y na n poeesame n pʋɩ tẽngã, sak-saka. Saka neb sã n ya wʋsgo, a tẽn-peelma me na n yɩɩ wʋsgo; saka sã n ya bilfu a soolma me zemsdame bala. Ned kam fãa paada poeera sẽn kẽes-a; ned kam fãa paada a buuda pʋɩɩrẽ." 
Numbers33:55 Y sã n pa menes tẽnga rãmb fãa y taoore, bãng-y tɩ y sẽn na n kees b rãmbã na n lebga gõos n leo y nini, n lebg gõos n po y lʋga. Bãmb n na n tak zabr ne yãmb beoog sẽn vẽege y meng tẽngẽ." 
Numbers33:56 La yãmb n na n deeg sɩbgr ning m sẽn da rat n sɩbg bã.» 
Numbers34:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Moyiiz woto: 
Numbers34:2 «Kõ Israyɛl kamba noy-kãensã: Y sã n kẽ Kanaã tẽnga, ad-y sẽn na n sooge, ad-y y tẽnga ne a toose." 
Numbers34:3 Nug rɩtg toaaga yaa Sin we-raoogo, n yegd Edom. Yaanga toaaga sɩngda Yamsem mogrã sɛtmẽ." 
Numbers34:4 Toaaga na n gõdga Akrabim kunkubrã, namsa kunkubrã n tees Sin, n tũud Kadɛs-Barnea nug rɩtgo n tɩ yi be n tees Asar-Adar n ta Asmo." 
Numbers34:5 Sã n ta Asmo toaaga kɩllda bilfu n tees Ezipt kʋɩlga, n wat Tẽnsʋk mogrã." 
Numbers34:6 Nin-taoore toaaga yaa Tẽnsʋk mogrã. 
Numbers34:7 Nug goabga toaaga sɩngda Tẽnsʋk mogrã n tees Or Tãnga. 
Numbers34:8 N yi Or Tãnga n digd Lebo-Amat, n tat Sedad." 
Numbers34:9 N yi be n tees Zifrõ, n tat Asar-Eyinan. Nug goabg toaaga la rẽ." 
Numbers34:10 Yaang toaaga yita Asar-Eyinan n tees Sefã. 
Numbers34:11 N tɩ yi be n sig Ribla, Ayin yaanga, n ket n sigd n wa tãag Kineret yaanga." 
Numbers34:12 N ket n sigd n wa tãag Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga n digd Yamsem mogre. Woto n na yɩɩ y tẽnga ne a toose.» 
Numbers34:13 A Moyiiz le yeela Israyɛl kamba woto: «Tẽngã y sẽn na n poees n pʋɩ wã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ b pʋɩ ne buuda wɛ wã la a Manase bogr a ye wã me la woto." 
Numbers34:14 Y tẽrame t'a Rubẽ ne a kamba, a Gad ne a kamba la a Manase bogr a to wã zoe n deega b pʋɩɩre." 
Numbers34:15 Sɩda, a Gad la a Rubẽ la a Manase bogra reega b pʋɩɩr Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga noor, Zeriko yegende. Bãmb pa rʋʋgd Zʋrdẽ ye.»" 
Numbers34:16 Wẽnnaam goma ne a Moyiiz: 
Numbers34:17 «Ad neb niyns sẽn na n sõng-y tɩ y pʋɩ tẽnga ne taaba: Maan-kʋʋd a Elazar, la a Nun biig a Zozuwe." 
Numbers34:18 Y na n paasa sak fãa kãsem a ye t'a sõng yã. 
Numbers34:19 Ad nin-bãmb yʋy: A Zɩɩda roogẽ, a Yefune biig a Kalɛb." 
Numbers34:20 A Simeõ roogẽ, a Amiyud biig a Semuwɛl." 
Numbers34:21 A Bẽnzame roogẽ, a Kislõ biig a Elidad." 
Numbers34:22 A Dã roogẽ, a Zogli biig a Buki." 
Numbers34:23 A Zozɛf biig a Manase roogẽ, a Efod biig a Aniyɛl." 
Numbers34:24 A Zozɛf biig a Efrayim roogẽ, a Siftã biig a Kemuwɛl." 
Numbers34:25 A Zabulõ roogẽ, a Parnak biig a Elisafã." 
Numbers34:26 A Isakar roogẽ, a Azã biig a Paltiyɛl." 
Numbers34:27 A Asɛr roogẽ, a Selomi biig a Ayiwud;" 
Numbers34:28 A Neftali roogẽ, a Amiyud biig a Pedayɛl.»" 
Numbers34:29 Yaa nin-bãmba la Soaala-Wẽnd kõ noor tɩ b sõng n pʋɩ Kanaã tẽnga ne a Israyɛl kambã. 
Numbers35:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto ne a Moyiiz Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noore, Zeriko yegende:" 
Numbers35:2 «Togs Israyɛl kamba tɩ b kẽ b pʋɩɩrẽ n yãk vẽenem n kõ Levitsa tɩ b me n kẽ. Y na n kõ-b-la pʋt me n yegle. 
Numbers35:3 B na n tii rot n kẽedẽ; pʋta yaa b rũmsa wãbneg yĩnga, b rũm-bɛd la rũm-bõones yĩnga." 
Numbers35:4 Vẽenema Levitsa sẽn na n deeg b pʋt yĩnga la rũmsa wãbneg yĩnga na n taka kãntɩɩs tusri n gilg tẽngã. 
Numbers35:5 Woto tẽnga la vẽenema sẽn bas n gilgã magda kãntɩɩs tus a yi goabg la rɩtgo, kãntɩɩs tus a yi yaang la taoore." 
Numbers35:6 Yaa tẽns a yoob la y na n kõ Levitsã tɩ b lebg soondg tẽnse. Na n yalsame tɩ nin-kʋʋd tõe n wa kẽe be n põse. Y wat n wa paasa tẽns pis-naas la a yiibu, Levitsa mens yĩnga." 
Numbers35:7 Dɩlla sã n sõd b tẽnsa zãnga yaa pis-naas la a nii. 
Numbers35:8 Tẽnsã Israyɛl kamba sẽn na n yãk n kõ Levitsa sõor tũuda ne bãmb meng rooga pʋɩɩr bedrem. Yãkda wʋsg bi-bilfu, n kõ Levitsã f meng pʋɩɩr sã n yaa wʋsg bɩ bilfu.»" 
Numbers35:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Moyiiz: 
Numbers35:10 «Wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: Y sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n na kẽ Kanaã," 
Numbers35:11 y na yãk tẽnse sẽn na n yɩ soondg tẽnse. Ned sã n yĩd n kʋ a to, a tõe n wa soonda be." 
Numbers35:12 Be la y na n kẽ n tɩlg sẽn baooda n na n kʋ yãmb n dok a sũuri. Nin-kʋʋd pa kʋʋd n lebse tɩ b pa reng n bʋ a bʋʋdo buuda taoor ye. 
Numbers35:13 Tẽnsa sẽn na n yãk wa soondg tẽnsã na n yɩɩ bãmb b yoobe," 
Numbers35:14 a tãab Kanaã tẽnga, a tãab sẽn ka rʋʋg-b Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga yĩnga." 
Numbers35:15 Tẽn-bãmb yaa tẽnga dãmba, bɩ sẽn noka a Israyɛl buudu bɩ sãan loagdga yĩnga. Ned ninga fãa sẽn kʋ a to ne yĩdgu tõe n wa soonda be." 
Numbers35:16 Ned sã n wẽ a to ne kut n kʋ, a soab yaa nin-kʋʋda. La b na n kʋʋ yẽnda me." 
Numbers35:17 Sã n yaa kugr sẽn tõe n kʋ ned la a soaba lobgre tɩ tũ ne yõore, yẽ soab yaa nin-kʋʋda la b na n kʋʋ yẽnda me." 
Numbers35:18 Sã n yaa raoog sẽn tõe n kʋ ned la a soab lobgre tɩ tũ ne yõore, yẽ soab yaa nin-kʋʋda la b na n kʋʋ yẽnda me." 
Numbers35:19 B sẽn kʋ a soaba sã n tar ned sẽn tõe n daag zɩɩm n lebs zɩɩma sẽn daagã, nin-kãng n kʋʋd nin-kʋʋdã." 
Numbers35:20 Ned sã n wẽ a sẽn kis a soaba, bɩ a sã n lobg-a-la ne bũmb n kʋ pʋ-toogo," 
Numbers35:21 a sã n maand beem ne a, n wẽ-a ne nug gilgu n kʋ, b kʋʋda yẽnd soaba t'a yaa nin-kʋʋda. Ned ninga sẽn tõe n daag zɩɩm n dol zɩɩma sã n seg-a fãa, a kʋʋd-a lame." 
Numbers35:22 La sã n yaa wa yell n date tɩ beem kaẽ, tɩ pʋ-toog kaẽ, tɩ wẽeda bɩ lobgrã wa ne kũum," 
Numbers35:23 wala f tusa doog zug kugr t'a lʋɩ n kʋ ned f sẽn da ka ne la beem me ka be sʋka, pʋ-tooga sẽn ka zĩndã," 
Numbers35:24 buuda zãng na n tũ noy-niyns sẽn yals yell a woto poorẽ n paam koɛɛg n leok nin-kʋʋda la sẽn tõe n daaga zɩɩm n lebsã. 
Numbers35:25 Buudã n fãagd nin-kʋʋdã n lebs-a a soondga tẽngẽ. La sẽn maana yella paada be n tãag maan-kʋʋd kãsenga kaalem. 
Numbers35:26 Nin-kʋʋda sã n belg a menga n yi soondga tẽngẽ," 
Numbers35:27 tɩ sẽn tõe n daag zɩɩm n dol zɩɩma soab yãend-a n kʋ, taal ka be a zug ye." 
Numbers35:28 Dɩlla nin-kʋʋda paada a soondga zĩigẽ n tãag maan-kʋʋd kãsenga kũum. Maan-kʋʋd kãsenga loogr poore, a tõe n leba a tẽngẽ." 
Numbers35:29 Y sẽn be tẽng ning fãa y na n tũu no-kãnga zamaan woo zamaana. 
Numbers35:30 Ned sã n kʋ a to, b pa yãkd nin-kʋʋda yõore tɩ b ka paam neb wʋsg kaset ye. B pa kʋʋd ned nin-yend kaset yĩng ye." 
Numbers35:31 Nin-kʋʋd sã n tog ne kũum b ka tõe n deeg yaood n bas-a vɩɩg ye. B kʋʋd-a lame bala. 
Numbers35:32 B ka tõe n deeg yaood me n bas nin-kʋʋd t'a kẽ soondg tẽngẽ ye; b ka tõe n bas-a t'a leb a tẽngẽ tɩ maan-kʋʋd kãsenga ket n vɩ ye. 
Numbers35:33 Da rẽgem-y y tẽnga ye. Zɩɩm yaa bũmb sẽn dẽgemd tẽnga. La yaa sẽn daaga zɩɩma soab zɩɩm n pekd tẽngã. 
Numbers35:34 Da rẽgem-y tẽng ning y sẽn kẽeda ye, tɩ m be y sʋka. Maam la Israyɛl kamba Wẽnde, la m be-la b sʋka.»" 
Numbers36:1 Neb n waa n yãend a Moyiiz. Yaa a Galaad rooga kãsem-dãmba. A Galaad yaa a Makir biiga, a Manase biiga, a Zozɛf roogẽ. B goma ne a Moyiiz la Israyɛl taoor dãmba:" 
Numbers36:2 B goma woto: «Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn waa n yeel-foo tɩ f maan poeere n pʋɩ tẽnga n kõ Israyɛl sak fãa a tẽn-peelem, b yeelame me tɩ f yãk f saam-biig a Selofead vẽenem n kõ a kom-pugli wã." 
Numbers36:3 La Ade, kom-pugli wã sã n yi kãadem ne roog a to kom-dibli, yaa d ba wã pʋɩɩr, b sẽn da poees n kõ-dã n na n wooge." 
Numbers36:4 Yʋʋmd pis-nu wã beoog sã n wa vẽege, d rabooga pʋɩɩr na n tɩ paasa d sɩdb rãmba rẽnna.»" 
Numbers36:5 La Soaala yeela a Moyiiz t'a wilg Israyɛl kamba woto: «A Zozɛf rooga kamb tara bʋʋm. 
Numbers36:6 Ad Wẽnd sẽn kõt-b noor ninga a Selofead kamb poorẽ. B na n yii kãadem ne b sẽn dat a soaba, buuda rooga ye n da teem ye." 
Numbers36:7 Woto rooga pʋɩɩra kõn yi roog a ye n kẽ roog a to ye. Israyɛl biig fãa na n pala a ba raboogẽ. 
Numbers36:8 Bi-pugl fãa sẽn na n dɩ a ba faado, kõn le tõog n yi kãadem ne ned tɩ ka a ba wã sakẽ ye. Woto Israyɛl roog fãa pʋɩɩr na n kell n paa ne-a." 
Numbers36:9 Pʋɩɩr ka yit roog a ye n kẽ roog a to rẽnnẽ ye. Israyɛl biig ba a ye kõn bas t'a ba pʋɩɩr woog ba bilfr ye.» 
Numbers36:10 A Selofead kamba maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel a Moyiiz. 
Numbers36:11 A Selofead kom-pugli wã bao sɩdba b ba wã saam-biisa sʋka. Kom-pugli wã yʋy: a Mala, a Tirsa, a Ogla, a Milka la a Noa." 
Numbers36:12 B sɩdb rãmba yɩ-la a Zozɛf yagense, a Manase kamba la woto b pʋɩɩra ka long roog ye." 
Numbers36:13 Woto la noy-niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tũ a Moyiiz n taas Israyɛl kamba, Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga noor, Zeriko yegende." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Seb kãnga togsda sagls niyns a Moyiiz sẽn sagl Israyɛl kamba fãa b sẽn waa n nan ka rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n be Suf pʋ-weesẽ, Parã we-raoogẽ. B ra bee tẽn-bãmba sʋka: Tofɛl, Labã, Aserot la Di-Zaab." 
Deuteronomy1:2 F sã n be Oreb n dat Kadɛs-Barnea la yaa Seyir tãnga sor la f dɩk yã, f na n kẽna rasem piig la a ye." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ade, yʋʋm sẽn pid pis-naase Ezipt yiiba poore, kiuug piig la a ye wã, kiuuga pipi raare, a Moyiiz le tẽega Israyɛl kambã Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel-a t'a taas-b bũmb ningã." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Yɩ-la a sẽn waa n zab n tõog Amoritsa dĩma a Siyõ sẽn da kẽed Esbõ tẽnga, la a zab n tõog, Edreyi tẽnga, Bazã dĩm a Og, sẽn da kẽed Astarot." 
Deuteronomy1:5 A Moyiiz talla Wẽnnaam noora zãmsgo Moab tẽn-peelmẽ. Wakat kãng t'a Israyɛl nan pa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga ye. A Moyiiz saglsa la woto: 
Deuteronomy1:6 «Wẽnnaam d Soaala goma ne tõnd woto Oreb tãng zugu: ‹Y sẽn be tãn-kãnga sɛɛga yaa n kaoosame. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Le sɩng-y kẽn marsã; dʋ-y tãmsã, Amoritsa sẽn zao zĩig ningã, saag-y tẽns niyns sẽn yeg-b bãmbã. Tũ-y Zʋrdẽ foollã n digd Yamsem mogrã, n dʋʋd tãmsã, n sigd kunkubã, n yegd Negɛb la Tẽnsʋk Mogrã, n tees Kanaã la Libã, n tees Efrat kʋɩl-kãsengã." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ade, m kõt-y-la tẽngã. Tɩ reeg-y tẽn-kãng n kẽ tɩ yaa tẽn- kãng la m sẽn wẽen tɩ m na kõ-la y ba-rãmbã, a Abraam, a Izaak, a Zakoob, la bãmb loogr poore, b yagensã.›" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Dẽ me la m yeel yã: ‹M ka tõe n zɩ yãmb m ye ye. 
Deuteronomy1:10 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, kɩtame tɩ y fɩɩge, la rũnna wã y sõora taa yĩngr ãdse." 
Deuteronomy1:11 M datẽ lame tɩ Soaala, y yaab rãmba Wẽnda, le paas y sõora naoor tusri la b ning-y bark wala b sẽn kãabe." 
Deuteronomy1:12 La yãmb meng neeme tɩ maam m ye ka tõe n welg y yɛla ye, m ka tõe n tʋk y mo-beedã, y zabã, y no-koɛɛma ye." 
Deuteronomy1:13 Bɩ sak fãa wa ne a neba, neb yam sẽn weke, sẽn vẽene, sẽn tar bãngr zulunga, tɩ m dɩk-ba n lʋɩɩs y taoore.›" 
Deuteronomy1:14 M sẽn gom-y woto wã, y leok-m lame: ‹Y sẽn yet tɩ d maan bũmb ninga yaa sõmbo.›" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Dẽ me la m tũus y sagsẽ wã neb sẽn da zoe n ya kãsem-dãmba, neb sẽn ka mi pirpir ye, neb bãngr sẽn pidi, la m kõ-b-la naam: bãmb kẽer n lebg neb tusr nanamse, kẽer pis-nu nanamse, kẽer piig nanamse, n le paas-b sõangdb buud toor-toore." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Dẽ sẽn maane, ad-m sẽn yeel y bʋ-kaoodbã: ‹Yãmb n na n kelg y saam-biisa koeese la y welg ned kam fãa yell ne zemsgo, ned ne a saam-biiga, ned ne sãan sẽn vɩ ne-a." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Da bʋ-y m mi-a-zagl bʋʋd ye. Kelg-y nin-bõonesa wa nin-bɛda. Da zoe-y ned nif ye, tɩ Wẽnd la yãmb bʋ-kaooda. Yell sã n beẽ t'a welgr ya toogo bɩ y bas-a ne maam.›" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Wakat kãnga m wilg-y-la y sẽn tog maan fãa. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Dẽ poore d paama Soaala noore la d yii Oreb n pãrg zĩ-peen-daag sẽn yalem la sẽn dɩt neba wala y sẽn tẽrã. D teesa Amoritsa tãnga. D sẽn ta Kadɛs-Barnea," 
Deuteronomy1:20 m yeel-y-la be: ‹Y taa tãnga, Amoritsa tãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõt tõndã." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ade, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, rɩka tẽngã n kõ yã. Dʋ-y, soog-y tẽngã tɩ Wẽnnaam, y yaab rãmba Wẽnda, da kãab-a-la yãmba. Da maan-y dabeem ye! Da bas-y tɩ bũmb woog y raood ye!›" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Wakat kãnga y kolg n yeel-m lame: ‹D tʋm neb tɩ b reng taoore n kaag weooga zãng n kõ-do la b lɛɛg n wa wilg-d sor ning d sẽn tog n dɩke, la tẽns niyns d sẽn na n tãage.›" 
Deuteronomy1:23 M gesame tɩ rẽ segdame la yãmb sʋka m yãka neb piig la a yiibu, sak fãa ne a neda." 
Deuteronomy1:24 B sẽn wẽnemd n dʋ tãngã b taa Eskol gõnegõtã, n gilg n sege." 
Deuteronomy1:25 B bao tẽnga tɩɩs biisi n zã n wa la b togsa b sẽn yãende. B yeelame: ‹Wẽnnaam, d Wẽnda, sẽn kõt tõnd tẽng ninga yaa tẽn-sõngo!›" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Ne rẽ fãa yãmb zãgsa Soaala-Wẽnd noor n yeel tɩ y kõn kẽng ye. 
Deuteronomy1:27 La y kẽ-la y gãagẽ n yõk b wɩdga n yetẽ: ‹Yaa b sẽn dɩt beem ne tõnda yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga! B rat n dɩka tõnd n kõ Amoritsã tɩ b kʋ-d zãngã. 
Deuteronomy1:28 Pʋs n yaa bõe yĩng la d na n kẽng be? D saam-biisa wooga d raoodo tɩ yaa woto la b gomyã: Tẽnga neb pãng la b sõor yɩɩda tõndo. B kẽeda tẽn-bɛda, tẽns sẽn me n gũbg ne lalse la sẽn zao yĩngri. B tol n yãenda Anakitsa be!›" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Dẽ la m yeel yã: ‹Da rig-y rabeem ye, da rig-y b taoor ye!" 
Deuteronomy1:30 Wẽnnaam y Soaala lʋɩ-la y taoor n kẽnda, bãmb n na n zab y zĩigẽ wala b sẽn maan Ezipt tẽnga, y fãa nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy1:31 B na n maana wala zĩ-peen-daagẽ, n buk-y wala ned sẽn buk a biiga, n wa tãag y sora baasgo, kaalẽ.›" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ne rẽ fãa y kell n pa tẽ Soaala, y Wẽnnaama ye." 
Deuteronomy1:33 Yaool n ya bãmb n da kẽnd y taoore, sora zugu, n na n bao y sik zĩiga, bãmb vẽenem n da kẽnd y taoor yʋngo n wilgd-y sore, bãmb sawadga maasmẽ la y ra kẽnd wĩntoogo." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Soaala-Wẽnd wʋma y sẽn da gomdã, b sũur puugame tɩ b wẽen woto:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‹Tẽn-noog ning m sẽn kãab y ba-rãmbã, yãmb ned ba a ye, zamaan yoog kãnga ned ba a ye kõn yãend-a ye." 
Deuteronomy1:36 Nin-yend bal n na n yãend-a, yaa a Yefune biig a Kalɛb. Yẽ na n yãend-a lame, yẽnda ne a kamba la m na n dɩk-a n kõ, tɩ yẽ tũ Wẽnd n pa tol n bʋdg ye.›" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yãmb yĩnga Soaala-Wẽnd sũur tol n puuga ne maam menga, tɩ b yeel-ma: ‹Fo menga kõn kẽ tẽnga ye!" 
Deuteronomy1:38 Sã n yaa a Nun biig a Zozuwe, sẽn sõngda fooma, yẽ na kẽ. Bɩ f keng a raoodo tɩ yẽ n na n kẽes budã a tẽngẽ.›" 
Deuteronomy1:39 Dẽ poore Soaala goma ne yãmb gill woto: ‹Y sẽn da gomd tɩ b na n yõga y kambã n kẽes yembdã, kamb niyns sẽn nan ka mi b nensã, yaa bãmb n na n kẽ tẽngã ne a Zozuwe. Yaa bãmb la m na n dɩk tẽngã n kõ tɩ b soog-a." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Sã n ya yãmba, wẽnemd-y n tees zĩ-peen-daagã, dɩk-y Rudum Mogr sore.›" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Yaa woto la y leok maam: ‹Tõnd beega Soaala! D na n bobame n tak zabre, wala d Soaala sẽn kõ-d noorã.› La sɩda, y fãa bobame n tẽed tɩ y na n dʋʋ tãnga naana-naana." 
Deuteronomy1:42 La Wẽnd yeel-m lame: ‹Wilg-b tɩ b pa na n dʋ ye! Tɩ zabr pa na n zab ye, tɩ m yi-la y poorẽ! Da bao-y tɩ y bɛɛba wa tõog-y ye.›" 
Deuteronomy1:43 M gomame la y pa kelg-m ye, y pa kelgd Wẽnnaam gomd ye, y rʋʋ tãnga ne wʋglem." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Amoritsa yii n seg-y-la b tãnga zugu la b pʋga yãmb wala sĩ-lolle, b varga yãmb Seyir n ta Orma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Y lɛɛg n waa Soaala-Wẽnd taoor ne nintãm, la b pa kelg-y koɛɛg ye, b tʋbr pa wʋm y gomd ye." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Yaa rẽ la y kaoos Kadɛs wala y sẽn kaoosã. 
Deuteronomy2:1 D wẽnemda d nens n tees we-raoogo, d dɩka Rudum Mogr sore, wala d Wẽnda sẽn da wilg-ma, la d yõka Seyir tãnga gilgri, n tar gilgri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Soaala-Wẽnd waa n yeel-m-la raar a ye: 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‹Yaa raar zãr la y sẽn tar tãnga gilgri, tees-y nug goabg marsã!" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Yeel-y neba woto: Pãrg-y y saam-biis a Ezayu kamba tẽnse tɩ yaa Seyir la b kẽeda. B na n yãee yãmb n dig rabeem, la maan-y gũusgu." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Da maan-y zabr ne b ye, tɩ y ka na n paam fɩ b tẽn-peelmẽ ye. Y kõn paam sẽn sek y nao pʋg tabgr ye, tɩ m dɩka Seyir tãng n kõ a Ezayu." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Y na n daa rɩɩbã y sẽn na n dɩ wã, n da kooma y sẽn na n yũ wã." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, ninga y tʋʋma fãa barka, b yãenda y kẽn we-raoogẽ ka. Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas tõre la y Soaala be ne yãmba la bũmb ka paoog-y ye.›" 
Deuteronomy2:8 D yeelame tɩ d kõn tũ Seyir, d saam-biis a Ezayu kamba sẽn kẽed tẽng ningã. D basa bãg-faaga sora rɩkre, d gila Elat la Esiõ-Gebɛr. D teema sore, d wẽnemdame n tees Moab zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: ‹Da saag n zab ne a Moab ye, da bob tãp ye, f kõn paam bũmb n soog a tẽn-peelmẽ ye, tɩ yaa Ar la m dɩk n kõ a Lot kamba.›" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Emitsa n da kẽed tẽn-kãnga. Yaa neb yʋʋr sẽn da yi, tɩ b sõor ya ka tɛka, n leb n ya nin-daad wa Anakitse." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Kẽer da naagd-b-la ne Refayitse, tɩ kẽer me mams-b ne Anakitsẽ la Moab rãmb ra boond-b lame tɩ Emitse." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Yaa wa Oritsa sẽn da kẽed Seyir, la a Ezayu kamba ra waa n dig-b lame n yiisi, n sɛɛs-b zãnga, n deeg-b tẽngã, wala a Israyɛl me sẽn maan ne tẽng ning Wẽnd sẽn kõ-a t'a sooge.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Marsã yik-y n dɩk y sore, gãndg-y Zerɛd kʋɩl-bɛɛgã. Tɩ tõnd na n sɩd gãndg Zerɛd kʋɩlgã." 
Deuteronomy2:14 D sẽn da yi Kadɛs-Barnea n sɩng kẽna, yaa yʋʋm pis-tã la a nii la d maan yã n yaool n dʋʋg Zerɛd kʋɩl-bɛɛga. Dẽ tɩ sẽn da tõe n tak-b zabr wakat kãng fãa da loogame. Soaala-Wẽnd meng ra pʋs n kãab-b-la rẽnna." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Soaala-Wẽnd meng ra tusd-b-la ne b nug n yiisd-b n togend b bɛɛba n wa sɛɛs-b zãnga. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Sẽn zĩnd b zaba sɩngrẽ sẽn waa n loog zãnga," 
Deuteronomy2:17 la Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-m: 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‹Dũnna f na n gãndga Moab toaaga, n kẽ Ar tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Deuteronomy2:19 F na n kẽe Amon toaagẽ. Da sɩng zabr ne a neba ye, da zẽk zab teoog b zug ye. F kõn paam bũmb Amonitsa tẽn-peelmẽ ye tɩ m dɩk-a lame n kõ a Lot t'a sooge.›" 
Deuteronomy2:20 B ra geta tẽn-bãmb me wa Refayits tẽnse. Sɩda Refayitsã n deng n zĩnd be la Amonitsa ra boond-b lame tɩ Zamzumitse. 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bãmb me yʋʋr da yiime, tɩ b sõor ya ka tɛka, n ya nin-daad wa Anakitse, la Wẽnd basame tɩ Amonitsa sɛɛs-b zãnga n deeg b zĩiga." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Yɩɩ boto yɛs la Soaala-Wẽnd maan ne a Edom, a Ezayu kamba sẽn da kẽed Seyir. B menesa Oritsa bãmb taoore, n deeg b zĩig n kẽedẽ n tãag rũnna." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Yɩɩ boto me ne Avitsa sẽn da kẽed Gaza tẽn-bõonese. Yaa neb sẽn yi Kaftor n waa sɛɛs bãmb n deeg b zĩig n kẽedẽ. 
Deuteronomy2:24 Soaala waa n yeelame: ‹Yik-y n dɩk sore, gãndg-y Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga, yãmb nugẽ la m na n dɩk n sagl Amoritga Siyõ, Esbõ dĩma, yẽ ne a soolma zãnga. Tɩ sɩng-y zabr ne-a, tɩ reeg-y yã a soolma." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Rũnda tɛka m na kɩtame tɩ dũni wã neba fãa rigd la b yɛɛsd y taoore. Y yʋʋra sã n pʋd bala, b na n saoo kalwaare.›" 
Deuteronomy2:26 M zĩnda Kedemot n tʋm neb Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ nengẽ, m tʋm-b-la ne laafi koeese:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‹Bas-y tɩ m tũ y tẽnga so-raoogã n looge! Dĩma so-raooga la m na n tũ, n ka bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Dɩɩba m sẽn na n dɩ wã, wa ne tɩ m da; kooma m sẽn na n yũ wã, wa ne tɩ m da. Bas bala tɩ m tũ f tẽnga ne nao n looge." 
Deuteronomy2:29 A Ezayu kamba sẽn kẽed Seyir, Moabitsa sẽn kẽed Ar, bãmb fãa kõ-d-la sor tɩ d looge. D datame n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tãag tẽng ning d Wẽnda sẽn kõt-d tɩ d sooge.›" 
Deuteronomy2:30 La Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ ka sak tɩ d loog ye, tɩ Soaala, y Wẽnnaama ra kidba a sũuri, sẽn na yɩlẽ n dɩk-a n sagl y nugẽ naana naana, tẽng ning y sẽn be a soab pʋgẽ rũnna." 
Deuteronomy2:31 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: ‹Ade, m zoe n dɩkda a Siyõ ne a tẽngã n kõt-fo, sɩng tẽnsa soogre sɩng ne a Siyõ rẽnna.›" 
Deuteronomy2:32 A Siyõ yii ne a neba n na seg-d la a tak zabr ne-do, Yaas tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy2:33 La Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, rɩk-a lame n kõ-do; d zabame n tõog-a, yẽ ne a kamba la a tãb-biisa fãa." 
Deuteronomy2:34 D kẽ-la a tẽnsã, n pʋlem tɩ d kõn kees bũmb b pʋgẽ ye: pagba, rapa la kom-bõonego. Bũmb ba a ye ka kees ye." 
Deuteronomy2:35 D sẽn kees yaa b rũmsã la b laogã, wala d sẽn maan tẽns a taabã d sẽn pãb n deegã." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Sẽn sɩng Arowɛr sẽn be Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga noore, n ta tẽng ning sẽn be bogda pʋga, n ta Galaad, tẽng ka zĩnd t'a soogr yɩ toog ne-d ye. Wẽnnaam d Soaala dɩka fãa n bas d nugẽ." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Yaa Amon kamba tẽng bala la d ka pẽnege. D pa sɩɩs tẽns nins sẽn be Yabok yaanga ye, d pa pẽneg tẽns niyns sẽn be tãmsa zuta ye. Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ d da sɩɩs b rãmbã, d pa sɩɩs ye." 
Deuteronomy3:1 D wẽnemdame n tees Bazã tãmse, tɩ Bazã dĩm a Og yi n seg-d Edreyi, n na zab ne-do, yẽnda ne a tãb-biisa gilli." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: ‹Da maan dabeem ne-a ye, tɩ m dɩk-a lame n sagl f nusẽ, yẽ ne a tãb-biisã la a tẽngã. Maan ne yẽnd me wala f sẽn maan ne Amoritsa dĩm a Siyõ, sẽn da kẽed Esbõ.›" 
Deuteronomy3:3 La Naaba-Wẽnd le rɩka a Og, Bazã dĩma ne a neba la a tẽn-peelma, n sagl d nusẽ, la d tõog-b-la zãnga n pa tol n kees bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tõnd deega b tẽnsã n pa londg tẽng ba a ye. Tẽnsa taa pisoobe, yaa sẽn be-b Argob, Bazã tẽn-peelmẽ, a Og soolmẽ." 
Deuteronomy3:5 B tẽnsa gill mee n gũbga lals sẽn ya wogd-wogdo, tɩ b kʋɩlensa ya yalemse la b pagd neere, tɩ tẽn-bõones karg n gũbg-ba." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tõnd pʋlmame tɩ d kõn kees bũmb b pʋsẽ, wala d sẽn maan ne Esbõ dĩm, a Siyõ, tẽnse. Rapa, pagba la kamba, fãa kiime." 
Deuteronomy3:7 D sooga b laoga la b rũmsã zãnga. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Woto wã yaa Amoritsa dĩm dãmb a yiib soolmẽ la d da kẽ yã. Yaa Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga la Ermo tãnga sʋka, Zʋrdẽ foolle." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Sidõ rãmba da boonda Ermo tãnga tɩ Siriõ, tɩ Amoritsa boond-a tɩ Senir.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 D pãb n deega tẽnsa sẽn da zao tãn-bi wã, Galaad tõre, Bazã tõre n ta Salka la Edreyi, Bazã dĩm a Og soolem." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Bazã dĩm, a Og, yaool n da yaa Refayitsa sẽn keesa nin-yende. Kug la b pees wa koglg a mumb yĩnga, Raba, Amonitsa na-tẽnga. Koglga woglma yaa kãntɩɩs a wɛ, a yalma yaa kãntɩɩs a naase, kãntɩɩs wa d fãa rẽnna." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Dɩlla Tẽns niyns d sẽn wẽ n deege wakat kãnga yɩɩ tẽn-peelma fãa sẽn yɛdg Arowɛr nug goabg, Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga foolle. M kõ-la a Rubẽ la a Gad yagense Galaad tãmsa pʋɩ-sʋka ne b tẽnsã." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Galaad bogr a to wã la Bazã tõre, a Og tẽn-kʋda, m dɩk-b lame n kõ a Manase bogrã. Tẽnsa sẽn yɛdg Argob n ta Bazã ra boondame tɩ Refayitsa tẽn-peelem." 
Deuteronomy3:14 A Manase biig a Yayir n soog Argob tẽnsã n ta Gesuritsa la Maakaritsa tẽnse. A menga yʋʋr la a rɩk n kõ Bazã tẽns kãense la rũnda menga b ket n boond-b lame t'a Yayir pʋ-weese. 
Deuteronomy3:15 M dɩka Galaad n kõ a Makir, a Manase biiga." 
Deuteronomy3:16 A Rubẽ la a Gad yagensa reega tẽns niyns sẽn be Galaad ne Arno sʋka. Toaag yẽne la Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga, nug rɩtgo. Yabok n ya toaag ne Amonitsã." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Nin-taoor toaaga rɩka Zʋrdẽ foolle, Zenezarɛt mogre n ta Yamsem mogre, n tat Pisga tãng sẽn zao yaanga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Wakat kãnga m taasa sẽn paam-b tẽnsa Zʋrdẽ yegendã no-kãnga: ‹Yaa yãmb rũnda la y beoog Wẽndã n dɩk Zʋrdẽ yegend tẽnsã n kõ yã. Woto wã y tãb-biisa fãa na n boba zabre n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ, n lʋɩ y saam-biisa taoore." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Y pagba la y kamba la y rũmsã sẽn labsã, bãmb bala n na n pa m sẽn kõ-y tẽns niynsa pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Y mens na n paa ne y saam-biisa n tãag bãmb me sẽn wat n kẽ b soolmẽ, n kẽ tẽns niyns Wẽnnaam y Soaala sẽn na n kõ bãmb me Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde. Dẽ poor la y na n lɛɛg n wa m sẽn kõ-y tẽns niynsã pʋgẽ.›" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Wakat kãng me la m yeel a Zozuwe: ‹Fo yãenda ne f meng nifu bũmb ning fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maan ne dĩm dãmb a yiibã. Bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n kell n maana boto ne dĩm niyns fãa b sẽn na n seg Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Da zoe-y rabeem ye: yaa Naaba-Wẽnd meng n zabd n sõngd-y.› 
Deuteronomy3:23 Dẽ me la maam a Moyiiz yõk Wẽnd sɛɛga. M goma woto: 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‹Soaala-Wẽnnaam, yãmb sɩng n pukda y sõgna nifẽ, y ziir la y pãnga. D yãeta wẽnd a to yɛ, tẽng bɩ saag zugu, sẽn tar y pãnga la a tõe n tʋm y sẽn tʋma?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 M kotame n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, tɩ m nif teeg tẽng ning sẽn be Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, n yãend Libã tãnga!›" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Bãng-y tɩ yãmb yĩnga, Wẽnd sũur yika ne maam wʋsgo, tɩ b pa kelg-m ye. B waa n leokame bala: ‹Sekame, da le gom dẽ yell ye!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Dʋ Pisga tãnga zugu, wẽnemd n ges nin-taoore la goabga, n ges rɩtg la yaanga, ges ne f nin pãnga: ad-f kõn dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga sẽn dɩg tɩ f neẽ wã ye!" 
Deuteronomy3:28 Wilg a Zozuwe f sẽn dat t'a maane, pids-a ne raood la pãnga tɩ yẽnda n na n lʋɩ neba taoor n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ la yẽ n na n sõng-b tɩ b soog tẽngã f sẽn ne wã.›" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Dẽ tɛka, tõnd paa tãnga sɛɛga tɩ Bɛt-Peor yɛs d taoore." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Kelg marsã, Israyɛl, noy niyns y sẽn na tũ zamaan ne zamaana. M meng m toor n na zãms-y tɩ y reeg-ba, la woto y na vɩɩnd la y tɩ kẽ tẽng ning y yaab rãmb Wẽnda sẽn kõt-y." 
Deuteronomy4:2 M sẽn kõt-y noy-niynsã, gũus-y tɩ gomd da paas ye. Gũus-y me tɩ bũmb da yiis ye tɩ woto la y na n tũ d Soaala-Wẽnnaama raabo." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Y nif yãenda Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn maan bũmb ning Baal-Peor. Neb niyns fãa sẽn pʋg-b Peor Baal, ad-y Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, yiisa b fãa nin-vɩɩs sʋka." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Y sẽn ket n vɩ rũnna wã, yaa y fãa sẽn tũ tõnd Wẽndã." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Noy niyns y sẽn na n deeg zamaan woo zamaana, m wilgd-b-la yãmb wala Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, sẽn yet tɩ m wilg yã. Reeg-y la y tũ-ba tẽng ning y sẽn dabd n na n tɩ sooga pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Reeg-y noya, tũ-y-ba. Woto buud a taaba sã n wa bãng y sẽn tũud noy niynsã b na ges-y wa neb sẽn tar yam la sẽn mi vɩɩm, b na yeele: ‹Sɩlem la yam bala la buud kãseng kãnga pidi n yɛsẽ!›" 
Deuteronomy4:7 La sɩda, baobg bʋg la bu-kãseng a woto buud be, n tar a wẽnd dãmb sẽn pẽnegd-a wala tõnd Wẽnnaam sẽn pẽnegd tõnd wakat ning fãa d sẽn boond-ba?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 D yãeta bu-kãseng yɛ t'a noya la a rog-n-mik tũud soy tɩrse wala m sẽn kõt yãmb b rãmb rũnda wã? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Maan-y gũusgu ne y mense, gũus-y n da yĩm y sẽn yãend y vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ ye, bũmb da yi y pʋ-tẽerẽ ye, togs-y-ba y kamb la y yagense." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Israyɛl, fo ra yɛsa yĩngri, Wẽnnaam y Soaala taoore, Oreb tãnga sɛɛga, raar ning Soaala sẽn yeel-ma: ‹Tigim nebã m taoore tɩ m gom ne-ba n zãms-b tɩ b zoe m nifu, b vɩɩm tɛka, la b me zãms-a b kamba.›" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Baraare y sɩd kolgame, y yalsa yĩngr, tãnga sɛɛga. Tãnga ra wita bugum. Bugma ra pãrga sawad tagdã la yʋnga likã, n tãoos n kul yĩngri." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda bugma sʋka n gom ne yã. Koɛɛg n da sãte, y ra wʋmda koɛɛgã la y ra ka mi a sẽn yitẽ ye. Koɛɛga bal la y ra wʋmda." 
Deuteronomy4:13 B taas-y-la b zooda koeese, yaa noya piigã b sẽn yet tɩ y reeg la y tũ la b gʋls-b-la kug wals a yiib zugu." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Sã n ya maam, Soaala yeel-m lame tɩ m zãms-y noya y sẽn na n tũ wakat buud fãa tẽng ning y sẽn dabd n na tɩ reeg n soogã." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Maan-y gũusgu! Tẽeg-y tɩ Oreb tãnga zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda bugum pʋgẽ n gom ne yãmba la badaare y ka yãend bũmb sẽn tar wẽnd yalẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Da sak-y yel-beedã n kõ y meng wẽn-naands ye. Da mams-y bũmb wẽnego n lɛɛg n yeel tɩ bõn-kãng la yãmb wẽnd ye. Da yɩ paga, da yɩ rao wẽneg ye." 
Deuteronomy4:17 Da yɩ tẽng zug rũng ba a ye wẽneg ye, da yɩ yĩngr luiil ba a ye wẽneg ye." 
Deuteronomy4:18 Da yɩ rũng kɩdg sẽn vuud tẽng buud ba a ye wẽneg ye, da yɩ zĩif sẽn dugd koomẽ buud ba a ye wẽneg ye." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Da saag-y n ges yĩngri, n ges wĩntoogo, kiuugu, ãdse, bũmb ning fãa sẽn yãgd yĩngri la y lɛɛg n bas tɩ b belg yã tɩ y wõgemd b taoore n yɩ b sõgen ye. Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, basa manes kãens ne dũni wã ninsaalb a taaba." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Sã n ya yãmba, y Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, kɩtame tɩ y yi Ezipt tẽnga, b yiisa yãmb bug-toalgẽ, bug-toagl sẽn yẽnegd kut menga, n dɩk-y n maan b buudu la b pʋɩɩre, wala y sẽn yaa a soab rũnna wã." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Yãmb yĩnga, Wẽnnaam puuga b sũur ne maam n tol n kãab-m tɩ m kõn dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã la m kõn kẽ tẽn-noog ning y Soaala sẽn kõt-y t'a yɩ y soolma ye." 
Deuteronomy4:22 M na kii ka, n ka rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ ye. Yãmb yẽ na rʋʋg kʋɩlgã n tɩ reeg y tẽn-noogã n kẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Gũus-y n da yĩm tɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, yõga zood ne yãmb ye. Gũus-y n da maan sẽn kis wa fãa fãa n bao wẽneg n kõ bũmbu n yet tɩ yẽ la y wẽnd ye." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Bãng-y tɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, yaa bug vɛlga sẽn ka mi rɩ n kees ye la bãmb b ye tãa la yãmb Wẽnnaam la b kõn sak paoogre ye." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Y sã n wa paam n kaoos y tẽngẽ wã bilfu, y sã n wa rog kamba, n dog yagense, y sã n wa kʋʋl tẽnga pʋga, y sã n wa yaale n bao bũmb wẽneg n pees, bɩ n dõoge, n yet tɩ yẽ la y wẽnde, y wẽnd y sẽn pees bɩ y sẽn dõoge, a sẽn yaa a soab fãa, ad-y y maana bũmb sẽn ya wẽng, Wẽnnaam y Soaala nifẽ, n paoog-ba." 
Deuteronomy4:26 La ad-m boonda tẽnga la saagã tɩ b yɩ m kaseto tɩ b na n menes-y-la zãnga la kõn kaoose, y sẽn dabd tẽng ning n na n tɩ reeg n soog, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã. Sɩda y kõn kaoos be ye, b na n sɛɛs-y-la zãnga." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Soaala-Wẽnd na n sẽeg-y-la buud a taaba sʋka, buuda wat n keesa bilfr bala Wẽnd sẽn na n kẽes-y tẽng ninga pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Beelẽ, yaa ninsaal sẽn naan la y na n waooge, bũmb sẽn pees ne raoogo, ne kugri, bũmb sẽn ka ne, n ka wʋmde, n ka rɩte, n ka kokd yũug ye." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Y wat n yikame marsã n baood Wẽnnaam, y Soaala. Y na yãend-ba y sã n sɩd baood-b-la ne y sũuri, ne y yalẽ wã fãa." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Yell sã n wa pak-fo, Israyɛl, yel-beeda sã n wa lʋɩ f zugu, f na lɛɛg n wa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, nengẽ, la f na kelg b koɛɛga." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Wẽnnaam f Soaala pida ne nimbãan-zoeere, b kõn yiis-f kɛɛng ye, b kõn sãam-f ye, b kõn yĩm zooda kãabgã b sẽn kãab f ba-rãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Sok pĩnd zamaanẽ dãmba, Israyɛl, sok sẽn deng-b foo moogo, sok n ges ninsaal sẽn wa tẽng zug tɛka, sok n ges yaa yaang bɩ taoore la b yãend bõn-bãnd a woto taare? Yɛɛlẽ la b wʋm woto taare?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Tẽn-bʋg rãmb n paam n wʋm wala foo, Israyɛl, tɩ b wẽnda koɛɛg yit bugum sʋka n gomd ne ba tɩ b pa ki?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 M sok n gese wẽnd bʋgo n yiki ne yɛl-bãna, ne tẽn-kũum, ne zaba, ne moadga, ne yɛɛsgo n na n kẽ buud a taab sʋka n tũus buudu, sẽn na n yɩ a rẽnna wala Wẽnnaam f Soaala sẽn maan f yĩnga tɩ y nif rɩ kasto Ezipt tẽngã?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Fo paamame n yãende, Israyɛl, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ f bãnge tɩ Soaala la Wẽnde. Wẽnd a to ka be n zʋʋg bãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy4:36 B zĩnda yĩngri n yiis b koɛɛg n na n zãms-fo, tɩ fo zĩnd tẽngre n yãend bug-kãsenga, la b zĩnda bugmẽ wã n taas foom b koeese." 
Deuteronomy4:37 B nonglma sẽn da kẽ yaab rãmbã n kell n pʋg kambã, yaab rãmba loogr poore, yaa foo la Soaala pʋg yã, la b yiis-f-la ne pãnga, Ezipt tẽnga," 
Deuteronomy4:38 n wa reeg buud a taab soolem n kõ-fo, buud sẽn yɩɩd f ne sõor la pãnga, la rẽ la d sẽn ne rũnna wã." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Dɩlla ges f yamẽ la f bilg f sũurẽ: ad Soaala bal la Wẽnde. Yĩngri, saag zugu, bɩ kaalẽ, tẽng zugu, Wẽnd a to ka be ye." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Reeg b sẽn wilgã, reeg b noya m sẽn yet tɩ m taas-f rũnna, f yell manegr yĩnga la f kamba me yell manegr yĩnga, fo loogr poore. Woto la f na n paam yõ-woko tẽng ningẽ f Soaala sẽn kõt fooma.»" 
Deuteronomy4:41 A Moyiiz waa n welga tẽns a tãabo, Zʋrdẽ yaanga." 
Deuteronomy4:42 Tẽn-bãmb lebga soondg tẽnse. Ned sã n kʋ a to la tũu ne yĩdgu, la beem da ka be sʋk ye, nin-kʋʋda tõe n kẽe be n põse." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Besɛr la b welg toore, a Rubẽ kamba yĩnga; tẽn-kãng taoor la we-raooga yɛdg n dɩg. A Gad kamba yĩnga b yãka Ramot, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ. Bazã tẽn-peelmẽ yɩɩ Golan la b yãk a Manase kamba yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy4:44 A Moyiiz n deeg Wẽnd koeesã n taas Israyɛl kamba. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ad-a Moyiiz sẽn wilg Israyɛl kamba: Wẽnd daabo, wẽnd noya la sẽn na n wa lebg a Israyɛl rog-n-miki. Yɩɩ Ezipt tẽng yiib wakato," 
Deuteronomy4:46 b sẽn waa n be bãg-faagẽ, Zʋrdẽ yegende, Peor sɛɛgẽ, Amoritsa dĩm a Siyõ soolmẽ. Wakat kãng t'a Siyõ ra kẽeda Esbõ la a Moyiiz ne a neba ra zabame n tõog-a." 
Deuteronomy4:47 B deega a tẽngã la Bazã dĩm, a Og, me tẽngã. Bãmb b yiibu n sɩd da ya Amoritsa soaalba, yaanga, Zʋrdẽ yegende." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Israyɛl kamba reega tẽnsa sẽn yɛdg Arowɛr, Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga foolle al n wa ta Ermo tãnga. Tãn-kãng me le boondame tɩ Siyõ." 
Deuteronomy4:49 Naaga tẽnsa sẽn yɛdg Zʋrdẽ foolle n ta Yamsem Mogre, Pisga tãnga sɛɛga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 A Moyiiz tigma a Israyɛl gilli n yeel-a: «Israyɛl kelge, ad sẽn lʋɩ f tʋbrẽ dũnna wã yaa noya la rog-n-mik f sẽn na n tũ. Y na n zãms-b lame la y modg n tũ-ba." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Oreb tãnga zugu, Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, yõga zood ne tõndo." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Zood kãng ka zood ning sẽn yõg ne d yaab rãmb ye. Zooda yõga ne tõnd sẽn be ka rũnna, n vɩ ne yõore." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Wẽnnaam yalsa y taoore, tãnga zug la bugma sʋka, n gome," 
Deuteronomy5:5 dẽ tɩ m yɛsa sʋka n deegd Soaala goama n taasd-y tɩ rabeem n da tar-y tɩ y pa tãnga sɛɛga n pa rʋ ye. Ad-b sẽn yeele: 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‹Maam la f Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, yaa maam n yiis-f Ezipt tẽnga, f yembd tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy5:7 F ka tar Wẽnd a to n zʋʋg maam ye. 
Deuteronomy5:8 F kõn bao wẽnego n kõ bũmbu, bũmb sẽn be yĩngr saag zug bɩ tẽng zug bɩ koomẽ, n lɛɛg n yeel tɩ yẽ la f wẽnd ye." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Da wõgemd bũmb a to taoor ye, da waoog bũmb a to ye, tɩ maam la f Wẽnnaam. M yaa Wẽnd sẽn ka sakd paoogre; m sɩbgda biiga, yagenga la yagen-tʋbra-kẽeg a ba beegr yĩnga, beem sã n ket n be d sʋka." 
Deuteronomy5:10 M yaool n yaa Wẽnd sẽn ka lakd ne sẽn nong-b maam la b reegd m noya, tɩ yʋʋm tong taab n tõt sɛɛbo." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Da pʋd yaare Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yʋʋr ye. Sẽn pʋda Wẽnnaam yʋʋr yaare, Wẽnd ka basd a soab taal ye." 
Deuteronomy5:12 B ges vʋʋsga daar wala ra-sõngo la b ra tʋm tʋʋmde wala Soaala sẽn kõ noore. 
Deuteronomy5:13 F na n tʋma rasem a yoobe," 
Deuteronomy5:14 la rasem a yopoe daarã yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, vʋʋsg raare. Fo kõn tʋm fɩ. Boto me ne f bi-ribla, f bi-pugla, f yamba, f roog biiga, f naafo, f bõanga, f rũng fãa, f noaka sẽn be ne foo. F rakõore, f roog biiga, fãa na vʋʋsa wa foom." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Tẽeg tɩ fo me yɩɩ yamba Ezipt tẽnga la Wẽnd n yaoog-fo n yiis-f ne b nug pãnga. Dẽ me yĩng la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kõt-f noor tɩ f vʋʋs badaare." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Waoog f ba la f ma, wala Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn wilgi la woto f na paam yõ-woko la f pid ne sũ-noogo, Wẽnnaam f Soaala sẽn kõt-f tẽng ninga pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Da kʋ ned ye. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Da yo ye. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Da zuk ye. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Da rõd f to ye. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Da tʋlg f to pag ye. Da tʋlg a zaka, a pʋʋgo, a yamba, a roog biiga, a naafo, a bõanga la a sẽn so bũmb ning fãa ye.›" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto buuda zãng yĩnga, tãnga zugu, tɩ b sa-tãsa pãrgd sawad tagda la likã, tɩ koɛɛga sãt ne pãnga. B goma vugri la tɛkem-tɛkem, b gʋlsa b noya kug wals a yiibu zug n dɩk n kõ-ma." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Y sẽn wʋm koɛɛga sẽn sãt tɩ y yaool n pa ne a soaba, tɩ tãnga yaool n yãng ne vẽenem, y buuda kãsem-dãmb la nin-kẽemsã kolg-m lame," 
Deuteronomy5:24 la ad-y sẽn yeel-b tɩ b togs-ma: ‹D Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, wilga tõnd b ziir la b pãnga, d wʋma b koɛɛga sẽn da tãsd bugma sʋka. Dũnna d bãngame tɩ Wẽnd tõe n goma ne ninsaala t'a ka ki ye." 
Deuteronomy5:25 La ne rẽ fãa, bõe yĩng la d na n bas tɩ bug-kãnga rɩ-do? D sã n kell n tar koɛɛga kelgre, d na n kiime." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Zĩ-bʋgo la ninsaal wʋm Wẽnd vɩɩga koɛɛg sẽn tãsd bugum sʋka wala tõnd sẽn wʋma, n ket n vɩ ne yõore?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Woto wã fo bal n na n kolg n kelg b koeesã. Fo na yaool n taas-b tõndo la d na reeg la d tũ zãnga.› 
Deuteronomy5:28 Soaala-Wẽnd wʋma y sẽn leok maama zãnga la b yeel-m lame: ‹M wʋma nin-bãmba sẽn yeel fooma. B maana neere. 
Deuteronomy5:29 Na yɩẽ neer n yɩɩda b sã n da tõe n pa m noya reegre pʋgẽ, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa. B naan n yãeẽ sũ-noog dar fãa, bãmb ne b kamba!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Dɩlla sig n yeel-ba: ‹Leb-y y rotẽ!› 
Deuteronomy5:31 Sã n ya foo, fo na n paa ne maam tɩ m zãms-f noya la rog-n-mikã. Dẽ poore f na wilg-b tɩ b reeg la b tũ-ba, b tẽngẽ, tẽng ning m sẽn kõt-b tɩ b soogã.›" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Modg-y yã, Israyɛl kamba, n vɩɩnd wa Soaala, y Wẽnnaam, sẽn datã, n da kɩll goabga, n da kɩll rɩtg ye." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Y na n tũu, daar fãa, sor ning y Wẽnnaama sẽn wilgã la woto y na paam vɩɩm la sũ-noogo la yõ-woko tẽng ning pʋgẽ y sẽn dabd n na n tɩ reeg n soogã." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ad-y yaa woto la noya la rog-n-mikã Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn yet tɩ m wilg yã tɩ y reeg la y tũ y sẽn dabd tẽng ning n na n tɩ soogã." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Rẽ yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ y zoe rabeem, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, rabeem. Yãmb ne y kamba la y yagens na n deega y vɩɩma pʋgẽ Soaala noya la b raabã, n paam yõ-woko." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Foo, Israyɛl, f na reeg Soaala noya n tũ zãnga la woto f sũur na yɩ noogo la f na fɩɩg tẽn-noogẽ, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo wala f Soaala, f yaab rãmba Wẽnnaam sẽn da kãab-f." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Kelge, Israyɛl: d Soaala bal la Wẽnnaam, bãmb b ye tãa." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Bɩ f nong f Soaala, f Wẽnnaama, ne f sũur fãa, ne f yalẽ fãa, ne f pãng fãa." 
Deuteronomy6:6 M sẽn kõt-f noor ninga rũnna wã pa f sũurẽ. 
Deuteronomy6:7 F na taas-a f kamba, f zĩ f zakẽ bɩ f togda sore, f gãe bɩ f kẽnda." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Gʋls-a n loe f kanga, n tabend f rĩirẽ, f nina yiiba sʋka." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Gʋls-a f rignoorẽ la f tẽnga noorẽ kʋɩlensẽ. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sã n wa kẽes-f tẽng ning b sẽn kãab f yaab rãmbã, a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob, tẽns sẽn pid ne ro-bɛd la ro-neeba f sẽn ka nams n me," 
Deuteronomy6:11 tɩ rot pid ne te-sõma fo sẽn ka bao n bĩngi, tɩ buls pid ne koom tɩ f nug yaool n ka tuk bũmbu, tɩ pʋt pid ne bugsuntund la oliviye tɩɩse f sẽn pa sele. F sã n wa tɩg bũmb fãa zãnga," 
Deuteronomy6:12 f na n maana tẽegre n da yĩm f Soaala sẽn yiis-f Ezipt, f yembd tẽngẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Modg n dig rabeem, n dig Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, rabeem; bãmb bal la f na n waoog, bãmb yʋʋr yĩng bal la f na n kãabe." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Da pʋg-f f yagsa wẽn-naandsa ba a ye. 
Deuteronomy6:15 F Soaala-Wẽnnaama be-la f sʋka wa Wẽnd sẽn mi sũ-kiiri. Gũus tɩ f Soaala, f Wẽnnaama, sũur da yik ne-fo, tɩ b wa yiis-f saaga tẽngr ye." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Da fɛɛs Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, wala f sẽn maan Masa wã ye." 
Deuteronomy6:17 F na tũ-la a yembr-yembre, raabã, gɩdgrã, rog-n-mikã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõt yãmba." 
Deuteronomy6:18 F na maan sẽn zemse la sẽn ya tɩrga Wẽnnaam nifẽ la f na paam n kẽ la f vɩɩnd ne sũ-noogo tẽng ning b sẽn kãab f yaab rãmbã," 
Deuteronomy6:19 la b na zãag-f ne f bɛɛba wala b sẽn le kãab yɛsa. 
Deuteronomy6:20 F biig sã n wa sokd-f beoogo: ‹Yaa bõe yĩng la Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, yiis noya, saglse, la rog-n-mik kãensã?›" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Wakat kãnga f na leok f biigã: ‹Tõnd da yaa Ezipt dĩma yemse, la Wẽnnaam tẽega b kanga n wilg b pãnga n yiis-d Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Wẽnnaam maana d nifẽ bõn-bãna la yɛl bɛd sẽn yɩkd pɛlense, sẽn wa ne Ezipt rãmb bõne, b dĩma la a roog bõne." 
Deuteronomy6:23 B yaool n yiisa tõnd be n kẽes-d tẽng ning b sẽn da kãab d yaab rãmba tɩ b na rɩk tẽn-kãens n kõ-dã. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Soaala yeel-d lame tɩ d deeg noya zãng fãa la d zoe b rabeem, tɩ woto d na paam sũ-noogo daar fãa la d na kell n pa ne yõore wala y sẽn ne rũnna." 
Deuteronomy6:25 D vɩɩma na n yɩɩ wala Wẽnd sẽn date, d sã n modg n deeg noy kãensa fãa, bãmb taoore, wala b sẽn wilg-dã.›" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n wa kẽesa foo tẽng ning f sẽn na n deeg n soogã. Y sã n poog b tẽnsẽ, Soaala na rig n yiis y taoore Ititse, Girgazitse, Amoritse, Kanaã rãmba, Perizitse, Ivitse la Zebuzitse, buud a yopoe neb sẽn yɩɩd foo ne sõor la pãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:2 F Soaala, f Wẽnnaama, sẽn wat n dɩk-ba n sagl f nusẽ tɩ f zab n tõog-ba, f na kãab b tẽnsa beedo. F kõn yõg zood ne b ye, f kõn bas n ka kʋ ye." 
Deuteronomy7:3 F kõn sar yikãadem sard ne b ye, f kõn dɩk f bi-pugla n kõ b bi-ribl ye, f kõn deeg b bi-pugla n kõ f bi-ribl ye." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Ka rẽ, b na gɩdg f bi-ribla t'a ka le tũ-m ye. A wat n bas-m lame n na waoog wẽn-naandsa tɩ m sũura wẽneg n fudg, tɩ me yiis-b moog zãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ad-y sẽn na n maan buud kãensa bũmb ninga: Wã-y b maan-kuga zãnga, wã-y b kug peesma, kʋʋs-y b raad niyns b sẽn peesd n sennẽ wã, yõog-y b wẽn-naandsã." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Fo buuda yaa buud sẽn dɩk n kõ Wẽnde, f Soaalã. Yaa foo la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, welg toore, dũni wã buud a taaba sʋka tɩ f na n lebg b pʋɩɩre." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Soaala yam kẽ yãmba, Israyɛl kamba, tɩ b welg yãmb toore, ka yet tɩ yãmb buuda la bu kãseng dũni wã pʋgẽ ye, tɩ sã n ya sɩda yãmb n paood n yɩɩd fãa." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Soaala wilga b kang pãng n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽng la b yiis-y Ezipt dĩma yembdẽ, yaa b sẽn nong yãmba bala la pids kãabg ning b sẽn kãab y yaab rãmba." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Reeg, Israyɛl, tɩ yaa Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, bal la Wẽnde, Wẽnd sɩda. B zooda paada ne b sẽn nong b rãmba la sẽn deegd b noya, tɩ yʋʋma tong taab koabg-koabg n ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Ned sã n yaool kis-ba, yaa zĩig pʋgẽ bal la b menesd-a. B pa basd tɩ kaoos ye, yaa zĩig pʋgẽ bal la a soab reegd a kisga rolbo." 
Deuteronomy7:11 M yet-f lame, Israyɛl, tɩ f reeg la f tũ rũnna, noya, gɩdgrã la rog-n-mikã." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Y sã n zãms neere n tũ rog-n-mikã, Israyɛl kamba, y Soaala-Wẽnnaam zooda paada ne yã, la wala b sẽn kãab y yaab rãmbã, b kõn lak n bas yãmb ye." 
Deuteronomy7:13 B sẽn kãab y yaab rãmb tɩ b na n kõ-y-la tẽng ningã, tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ, b na n nong-y lame, n ning-y barka, n kɩt tɩ y buuda fɩɩge, tɩ rogma yalge, tɩ pʋta wom biisi, n kõ koodo, tɩ tɩɩsa wa ne rãam la kaam paalga, tɩ y niis dog y bãgẽ, tɩ y piis rog y wubẽ." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Yãmb sẽn na n paam bark ninga na n yɩɩga buud a taaba sẽn paamde. Y nengẽ rao tõogd n lebga ba, tɩ pag lebg ma. Y rũmsa me kõn pa n ka rog ye." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Y Wẽnnaama na n zãag-y-la ne bãas buud fãa, ne bã-toos niyns y sẽn da bẽed Ezipt tẽng n ket n tẽrẽ. Y kõn bẽ bã-kãens ye, tɩ b na n yaool fẽeg-b sẽn kis-b yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sagl buud niyns fãa y nusẽ, bus nimbãan-zoeere la y menes-ba. Da lʋɩ-y b bẽdgẽ n waoog b wẽn-naandsa ye." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Y sã n yeel y sũurẽ: ‹Buud kãensa neba sõor yɩɩda tõndo, d maanda a wãn n deeg b tẽngã n sooge?›" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ade, da zoe-y rabeem ye. Tẽeg-y bal Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn maan ne Ezipt dĩma la ne Ezipt tõre." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Tẽeg-y yɛl toodã y meng nif sẽn yãende, tẽeg-y yɛl-bãna sẽn yɩkd pɛlensã, tẽeg-y pãng tʋʋm niyns Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, nus sẽn tʋme, b sẽn waa n na n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga. Bãng-y tɩ yaa tʋʋm kãens la Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na n kell n tʋm ne buud niyns yãmb sẽn tẽed tɩ b rabeem tõe n yõk-y lame wã." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ad Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, meng n na yiis kãnenkãaga t'a wa menes f bɛɛba, n menes sẽn kell-bã la sẽn solg-b yãmb nifẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Da rig-y rabeem ye tɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, bee ne yãmba la bãmb n tar pãng sẽn tõe n yɛɛse." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na n diga buud kãens bilf-bilfu, y taoore. Ka vugr bal la y na n dig-ba n yiis ye, ka rẽ we-rũmsa tiigd n lebga wʋsgo tɩ y yãe fare." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Wẽnnaam yaool n na n dɩk-b lame n sagl y nugẽ. B na n yɛɛsa wa b sẽn zɩ n yɛɛse, n menem zãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Y na n tõoga b dĩm dãmba, n menes b yʋʋra saaga tẽngre. Dĩm ba a ye kõn yaas y taoore, tɩ y wa sɛɛs-b zãnga." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Y na yõog bugum b wẽn-naandsa. Gũus-y n da lʋɩ bẽdgẽ n wa rat n soog wanzurfa la sãnema sẽn kud n tablg-ba ye. Dẽ yaa wɩɩbdo, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, nengẽ." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Da saag-y n kẽes y zakẽ bũmb sẽn yaand Wẽnnaam sũur ye, ka rẽ b wat n naaga yãmb ne wẽn-naandã n yõog bugum. Zãag-y y meng ne sãnema la wanzurfã, tɩ yaa wɩɩbdo, yaa bũmb sẽn ka tõe n lʋɩ y soolmẽ." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Modge, Israyɛl, n deeg noor ning m sẽn kõt-f rũnna wã la tũ neere n paam n vɩɩnd la f fɩɩg zembala, n tɩ soog tẽng ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãab f ba rãmba." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Modg n da yĩm Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kɩt tɩ f tũ sor ninga al yʋʋm pis-naas rũnna, we-raoogẽ ka. Yaa naong sore. B fɛɛs-f-la woto n bãng bũmb ning sẽn be f sũurẽ, f sã n na n zãgsame bɩ f sã n na n deega b noya." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Soaala-Wẽnd kẽes-f-la naongo, n gãneg-f kom, n dɩlg-f ne man, rɩɩb foo ne f ba-rãmb sẽn da zɩ n dɩ ye. B tʋlgame tɩ f bãng tɩ ninsaal ka rɩlgd a meng vɩɩm ne bur bal ye, a rɩlgd-a la ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn yit Wẽnnaam noorẽ." 
Deuteronomy8:4 F fuug pa kʋdg ye, yʋʋm pis-naas kẽna ka mod f karg ye," 
Deuteronomy8:5 la f sẽn tags n gese f bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, gʋʋl-f-la wa ba sẽn gʋʋnd a biiga." 
Deuteronomy8:6 F na n deega Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, noya n tũ b sore la f zoe b nifu." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kẽesd-f-la tẽn-noogẽ, kʋɩls sẽn zoet tɩ b koom fõt tẽngẽ, buls zĩisi, koom sẽn pusgd a toore pʋtẽ la tãms zutu," 
Deuteronomy8:8 tẽng sẽn womd alkam pɛɛlga, alkam kɛgenga. Bugsuntung bee be n paas kankanga la tɩɩg sẽn womd a biis wa poaloanga. Seem gãe be. Tẽnga pida ne oliv kaam la sɩɩdo," 
Deuteronomy8:9 tẽn-kãng bur dɩta f yam, ka kẽgsd ye, bũmb kõn paoog-f be ye. F yẽneg b kugri, ad-f kutu; f yẽneg b tãmse, ad-f zũudu." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Beelẽ f na rɩ f yam la f na pẽg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, b sẽn kõ-f tẽn-nooga yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Gũus n da yĩm Wẽnnaam, f Soaala ye. Gũus n deeg b noya, n tũ rog-n-mikã la f zãag f meng ne sẽn gɩdge, tɩ m togs-f fãa rũnna wã." 
Deuteronomy8:12 F sã n dɩt n tɩgda, n met f ro neeba n kẽedẽ," 
Deuteronomy8:13 tɩ f rũmsi, bɛd la bõones, ya ka tɛka, f sã n tar sãnem, wanzurf la laog buud fãa," 
Deuteronomy8:14 da maan wakre n wa yĩm f Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, sẽn yiis-f Ezipt tẽnga, f yembd tẽnga ye." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Yaa bãmb n kẽes-f we-rao-kãnga sẽn dɩt neba pʋgẽ, weoog sẽn pid ne wag-toose, ne namse, koom sẽn ka n kiisd ko-yũud weoogo. Fo yĩnga b kɩtame tɩ pĩig sẽn ya pĩig meng bul koom." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Yaa bãmb n dɩlg foo we-raoogẽ wã ne man, rɩɩb f yaab rãmb sẽn zɩ n dɩ ye. La b maana woto n kẽes f naongẽ n na n fɛɛs-fo la b togl f beoog so-sõngo." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Da wa saag n yeele: ‹Yaa m yãoog pãng n kẽes-m tɩgr kãnga pʋga.› 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tẽeg bal tɩ tũu ne Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, la f paam pãng n ta zĩ-noogẽ ka la rẽ yaa Soaala sẽn dat n le paas b zooda pãnga, zood ning b sẽn da yõg ne f yaab rãmba la sẽn ket n yɛs rũnna wã." 
Deuteronomy8:19 F sã n saag n yĩm Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, yelle, f sã n pʋgd wẽn-naandse, n wõgemd b taoore n waoogd-ba, m wẽend tɩ Israyɛl ne a kamba na menem zãnga." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Y na menem wala buud niyns Wẽnd sẽn yiis yãmb taoore. B na menes-y moogo tɩ y pa kelg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala koɛɛg ye." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Kelge, Israyɛl! Dũnna f na n dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga n dig n yiis b tẽngẽ, buud sẽn yɩɩd foo ne sõor la pãnga. B tẽns yaa bɛda, n me n gũbg ne lalse, n zao tãms zutu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Buuda yaa bu-kãsenga, nin-daad buudu, Anakitse. La ade, wala f sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomdã: ‹Ãnna n tõe n yals nin-bãmba taore?›" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Dũnna f na bãng tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, meng n lʋɩ f taoore n na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ. B na n dʋʋg-a-la wa bugum sẽn zom moogo. Bãmb meng b toore n na n varg bɛɛbã. Bãmb meng b toore n na n gãneg-b fo taoore, tɩ fo yaool marsã n kẽ b tẽngã n menes-b wala Wẽnd sẽn kãab-fo." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Soaala-Wẽnd sã n tus-ba n yiis f taoore da yeel f sũurẽ: ‹Yaa m sẽn tar sõmblema yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd sõng-m tɩ m deeg tẽngã n sooge.› Bãng tɩ yaa tẽnga rãmb n ya nin-yoodo la Soaala-Wẽnd menes-b fo taoore. 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ka foo n tar sõmblem ye, ka fo sũurã n ya tɩrga la f sẽn paam n na n soog b tẽnga ye. Yaa tẽnga rãmb n ya nin-yoodo la f paam b tẽng n sooge. La Wẽnnaam maana woto tɩ b ratame n wilg tɩ b ra kãab-a-la y yaab rãmba, a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Bãng tɩ ka fo sẽn tar sõmblema la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kõt-f tẽn-noog kãnga tɩ f soog ye, tɩ Israyɛl kamba zug ka mi gõmsg ye." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Da yĩm ye, Israyɛl, tẽeg tɩ f yika Wẽnnaam f Soaala sũur zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã, f Ezipt tẽng yiib raare n tãag f sẽn poog ka. F talla gugleng ne bãmba." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Oreb tãng zugu f puuga Soaala sũuri la Soaala sũur me yika ne foo tɩ b da rat n menes-f zãnga. 
Deuteronomy9:9 M sẽn dʋ tãnga zug n na n deeg kuga walse, zood ning Wẽnd sẽn yõg ne yãmba kaseto, m paa tãnga zug rasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo, n pa tol n dɩ buri, n pa tol n yũ koom ye." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Wẽnnaam kɩs-m-la wals a yiibã. Bãmb meng n da gʋls b zugu, ne b nug-bila, noy niyns b sẽn da kõ foo tãnga zugã, f sẽn tigim b sɛɛgẽ wã raare, sa-tãsa raare." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Yaa rasem pis-naasa sẽn waa n pidi la Wẽnnaam kõ-m wals a yiibã, zooda kaset sẽn gʋls b rãmb zugã." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Wakat kãng la b yeel maam: ‹Yiki la f sig tao-tao tɩ fo sẽn yiis b rãmb Ezipt tẽngã wɩɩbame. Ka kaoos la b bʋdg sor ning m sẽn da kõ-ba ye. B yẽnega kut n maan b bõn-naande!› 
Deuteronomy9:13 B le paasame: ‹M mii nin-bãmba, ka neb sẽn deegd yell ye!" 
Deuteronomy9:14 La bas-y tɩ m wa, m na n wã-b-la zãnga, n yẽes b yʋʋr saaga tẽngre. Foo, Moyiiz, fo kamba n na n fɩɩg n lebg bu kãsenga, bu yalengo.›" 
Deuteronomy9:15 M lɛɛg n siga tãngã n zãad ne m nus a yiibu zooda kaset wals a yiibã. 
Deuteronomy9:16 M sigame la m yãeeme. Israyɛl kamba, y beega Soaala, yãmb Wẽndã, n yẽneg sãnem n maan nag-bila. Ka yãee n kaoos tɩ y wẽneg n lak ne sor ning Soaala sẽn da wilg-y wã ye." 
Deuteronomy9:17 M wudg n tebla wals a yiibã ne m nus a yi la m fabg-b la me tɩ b wã y nifẽ. 
Deuteronomy9:18 M lʋɩɩ tẽng Soaala taoore; wala pipi raarã, m paa rasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo, m ka rɩ buri, m ka yũ koom, la rẽ yaa y sẽn da beeg Soaala-Wẽnda yĩnga, n maan sẽn ya wẽng b nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy9:19 M da maanda rabeem tɩ b sũura ra yika ne yãmba, b sũura ra fõta ne yãmba tɩ b rat n menes yãmb gilli. La wala pĩndã Soaala-Wẽnd le kelga m pʋʋsgo." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Wẽnd sũura ra fõta ne a Aarõ me, al n dat a kũum, tɩ m na n pʋʋs a Aarõ me yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy9:21 La y sẽn da maan wɩɩbd ningã, y nag-bilã, m dɩk-a lame n los bugmẽ, n yẽneg-a, n wer-a zom-bʋka, n dɩk n lob koom sẽn da fõt n sigd tãngã." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Yãmb puuga Wẽnnaam sũur Tabera, Masa, Kibrot-Taava." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Y sẽn waa n ta Kadɛs-Barnea, Soaala-Wẽnd tʋm-y lame: ‹Dʋ-y n deeg tẽngã n sooge tɩ maam n kõt-a yãmba.› Y ka reeg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, koɛɛg ye, y pa maan b teegr ye, y zãgsame." 
Deuteronomy9:24 M sẽn bãng-y tɛka, m bãng-y-la wa neb sẽn kɩɩsd Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Deuteronomy9:25 M lʋɩɩ tẽng Soaala taoor dasem pis-naase, wĩndig la yʋngo, tɩ Wẽnd da gomdame tɩ b na sɛɛs-y-la zãnga." 
Deuteronomy9:26 M pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnd la m yeelame: ‹Soaala-Wẽnnaam da wã-y y buuda ye, da sãam-y y pʋɩɩra ye, yãmb n yik ne y nimbãan-zoeere sẽn ka be tɛkã n wogl a yõore, n yiis-a Ezipt tẽnga ne y kang pãnga." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Tẽeg-y y tʋʋm-tʋmdba a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob yelle. Yĩm-y nin-bãmba sẽn ka teemd zʋgã, sẽn ka mi Wẽnd waoogrã, yĩm-y b yel-wẽndã." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Da bas-y tɩ b wa yeel Ezipt tẽnga, y sẽn yiis-d tẽng ningã: Wẽnd mikame tɩ b pa na n tõog n kẽes-b tẽng ning b sẽn kãab bã, tɩ zooda ra sãamame, la rẽ la b yiis-b n na n wa kʋ we-raoogẽ." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Yaool n yaa yẽ la y buudu, y pʋɩɩre, y sẽn yiis ne y nug pãnga!›" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Wẽnnaam yeel-m lame: ‹Pees wals a yiibu ne kuga. Pees-b tɩ b wẽneg pipi rãmbã la f rʋ tãnga zug ka n kolg-ma. Kɩt tɩ b maan koglg ne raad me. 
Deuteronomy10:2 Walsa zugu m na le gʋlsa m sẽn da gʋls pipi rãmba zugã tɩ fo lob n sẽegã la f na n sagla wals paala koglga pʋga.› 
Deuteronomy10:3 M sɩd kaa koglg ne gõ-miig raado, n pees kuga wals a yiib sẽn wẽnd pipi rãmba la m zã-b-la m nugẽ n dʋ tãngã." 
Deuteronomy10:4 La Soaala gʋlsa ne pĩnd gʋlsma noya piiga b sẽn da yiis yãmb yĩng tãnga zugã, y tigsga raare, sa-tãsa raare. B lebs-m-la walsã." 
Deuteronomy10:5 M sẽn lɛɛg n sigda, m sagl-b-la m koglga pʋga wala m sẽn da paam Soaala noore." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Israyɛl kamba yii Bene-Yaakã bulsã, n tees Mosera. Yaa zĩ-kãng la a Aarõ ki yã tɩ b mum-a, t'a biig a Elazar led-a maan-kʋʋra zĩigẽ." 
Deuteronomy10:7 B sẽn yi be, b teesa Gudgoda, n yi be n tees Zotbata, kʋɩl-fõts tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Wakat kãng la Soaala welg Levitsa toore tɩ b na n tʋkd kuga walsa koglgã, n yɛs Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, n kʋʋd maando la b ningd barka wala b sẽn ket n maand dũnna." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Yaa rẽ me yĩng la a Levi buuda ka reegd buud pʋɩɩr wala a taaba. Yaa Soaala la a pʋɩɩre, wala b sẽn da kãab-a.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Ad-y m sẽn le pa tãnga zug wa pĩndã, rasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo, Soaala kelg-m lame. B pa tʋlg f sãoong ye. Israyɛl." 
Deuteronomy10:11 B yeel-m lame: ‹Yiki, sig n wilg zãma wã tɩ b looge, b loog n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kãab b yaab rãmb tɩ m na kõ bã.›" 
Deuteronomy10:12 Yaa bõe marsã, Israyɛl, la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, baood f nengẽ? B sẽn dat bala, yaa f zoe b nifu, n tũ b soya, n waoogd-b la f nong-b ne f sũur fãa, ne f yalẽ fãa." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Yaa ra maan Soaala sẽn gɩdge, yaa reeg b noya m sẽn kõt-f rũnna, f yell manegr yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy10:14 N-ye! Soaala-Wẽnnaam n so yĩngr ne a teeda fãa. Bãmb n so tẽnga ne a teeda fãa. 
Deuteronomy10:15 Yaool n yɩɩ yãmb ba-rãmb, Israyɛl kamba, la Wẽnd pʋg yã, n wilg-b b nonglem, la y ba rãmba poore, yaa yãmb b kamba, yaa yãmb buuda la b welg toore, wala d fãa sẽn ne rũnna." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kʋms-y sũuri, da le yɩɩ tõatb ye." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n ya wẽnd dãmba Wẽnde la soaalba fãa Soaala. Bãmb n so kãsengo, n so pãnga; bũmb fãa rigda b taoore, bãmb la zemsg soaba, bʋʋd tɩrg soaba." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Bãmb n yaoogd kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore, n kõt sãan dɩɩb la fuugu." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Nong-y sãamba tɩ yãmb me yɩɩ sãamb Ezipt tẽnga. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Yãmb na n zoe Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, rabeem n deeg b noore, n nong-ba, n ka wẽen ne ned a to yʋʋr sã n ka bãmb dẽnna." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Bãmb yʋʋr la y na pẽge, bãmb la y Wẽnde, bãmb n maan y nifẽ, bõn-bɛd sẽn kẽesd dabeem." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Y yaab rãmba sẽn waa n dabd Ezipt tẽng tɩ b yaa pisopoe bala la marsã y sõora taa yĩngr ãdse. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Bɩ y nong Soaala y Wẽnnaam la y reeg la y tũ beoog sẽn vẽege, b noya la rog-n-miki la b sẽn gɩdg bũmb ninga bɩ yãmb me gɩdg y menga." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Y kamba toog sẽn yãke, tɩ bãmb ka yãend y sẽn yãend ye, m tẽedame tɩ yãmb mii rũnna, vẽenega, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn zãms-y. Y mi-la b ziiri, y mi-la b nug la b kang pãnga." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Y mii wẽnd makr dãmb la tʋʋm-bãn niyns b sẽn tʋm Ezipt tẽnga ne Ezipt dĩma la a soolem dãmba la a tẽnga gilli. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Y mii b sẽn maan bũmb ninga ne Ezipt tãb-biisi, ne a bilim-bilm, n kɩt tɩ Rudum Mogra koom dɩ-ba, b sẽn waa n yik y pʋgbo, la Soaala-Wẽnd menes-b-la zãnga n tãag rũnna." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Y mii b sẽn maan-y bũmb ninga zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã n tãag y waoong tẽn-kãnga pʋga. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Y mii b sẽn maan bũmb ning ne a Datã la a Abiram, a Rubẽ biig a Eliyab kamba. Tẽnga yaaga a noor n vel-ba, a Israyɛl sikẽ, bãmb ne b roto, ne b zak rãmba la neb niyns fãa sẽn da tar b zʋg wẽnga, n pʋgd-ba." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Y yãenda y toore Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm bãna la tʋʋm bɛdã. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Y na reeg zãnga noor ning m sẽn kõt-y rũnna wã, n paam daoodo n kẽ n deeg la y soog tẽngã," 
Deuteronomy11:9 n paam yõ-wok zu-noogo, n vɩɩnd tẽng ning Soaala sẽn kãab tɩ b na rɩk-a n kõ y yaab rãmba ne b yagense, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Y sẽn dabd n na n tɩ reeg tẽng ning n soogã, ka wẽnd y sẽn yi tẽng ningã, ka wẽnd Ezipt tẽng ye. Beelẽ bʋdb bʋtame n lɛɛg n kẽesd sẽbda koom, n kẽesd ko-sor-ko-sore, wala zẽed tɩɩse." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Y sẽn dabd n na n tɩ soog tẽng ninga pɩʋʋma ne tãms la bãado sẽn paamd tɩ saag zãgsd-b," 
Deuteronomy11:12 tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd meng n get b yelle. Wakat buud fãa Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, nina pukame n get-a, yʋʋmda sɩngre n tãag a baasgo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Y sã sɩd deegd noya yãmb Wẽnnaama sẽn kõt yãmb rũnna wã, y sã n nong Wẽnnaam la y tũud-b ne y sũur fãa, ne y yalẽ fãa," 
Deuteronomy11:14 m na sik, Bul kiuugã, kiuug a nii soaba, saag wala y pʋta sẽn date. A na n nii sẽoogo n ta sɩpalgo, tɩ kood zĩndi, tɩ rãam la kaam da paoog ye." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Y rũms na tɩg yamd bãoogẽ, y mens na rɩ n tɩge, y zagsẽ." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Da bas-y tɩ bũmb yamleoog wa yõk-y tɩ y bʋdg sore, n pʋgd wẽn-naands la y saag n wõgemd b taoor ye." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Y maan dẽ, Wẽnnaam na puug b sũur ne yã tɩ b pag saaga ko-nini tɩ koom da le tosg ye, tɩ tẽnga me ra le wom biig ye, tɩ y menem tao-tao Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõt-y tẽn-noog ninga pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy11:18 M sẽn kõt-y koees niynsã y na ning-b y sũurẽ, y na gʋls bũmb n loe y nugẽ la y tabendg y rĩirẽ, y nina yiiba sʋka." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Zãms-y-ba y kamba, y zĩ y zakẽ, bɩ y togd sore, y gãe tẽng bɩ y kẽnd yĩngri." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Gʋls-y-ba y rignoorẽ, y tẽns kʋɩlens rĩirẽ." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Sã n ya boto, tẽnga sã n ket saaga tẽngr fãa, yãmb me ne y kamba na kaoos tẽnga pʋga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãab-y tẽng ninga pʋga." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Y sã n sɩd deeg m sẽn kõt-y noor ningã, y sã n nong Wẽnnaam y Soaala n tũud b sore, n dɩk y yɛlã n bas ne bãmba," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Wẽnnaam na n deega tẽns n kõ yãmba la tẽn-bãmb neba yɩɩda yãmb ne sõor la pãnga. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Y naoor sẽn tabg zĩig ning fãa yaa yãmb soolem. Zĩ-peen-daaga la Libã, Efrat kʋɩlg n tãag Tẽnsʋk mogre, dẽ fãa na n yɩ-la y soolem." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Buud ba a ye kõn yaas y taoor ye. Soaala na n kẽesa rabeem la rigbu tẽng ning fãa y naoor sẽn na n tabge, wala b sẽn kãabã." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Ade, bũmb a yiib la m yals y taoor tɩ y yãke: kãab-nood la kãab-beedo." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Y sã n deeg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, noor m sẽn wilg yãmb dũnna wã, yaa bark la y na n paame." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Yaa kãab beedo la m kãabd-y, y sã n pa reeg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, noore n bʋdg sor ning m sẽn wilgd yãmb dũnna la y pʋg wẽnd-dãmb y sẽn da ka mi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Y Soaala-Wẽnnaam sã n wa kẽes-y tẽng ning b sẽn na n kõ-y tɩ y sooga pʋgẽ, y na n zĩnda Garizim tãnga zug n kãab kãab-noodo, la y zĩnd Ebal tãnga zug n kãab kãab-beedo." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Ad-y tãms kãens pɩʋʋgda so-kõodrã, n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ, n tat Kanaã rãmb tẽnga, nin-taoore, More kʋgsa taoore, Gilgal yegende.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga la y na n dʋʋg n yaool n ta tẽng ning y Wẽnnaama sẽn kõt-y tɩ y soogã. A na n sɩd lebga y soolem la y na n tila y zags be. 
Deuteronomy11:32 Modg-y n tũ noya la rog-n-mikã m sẽn kõt-y rũnna wã. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ad noya la rog-n-mik niyns y sẽn na n tũ y vɩɩma zãnga, tẽng ning y Soaala, y yaab rãmba Wẽnd, sẽn kõt yãmb tɩ y soogã." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Sãam-y zĩis niyns fãa buud niyns y sẽn dig n yiisa sẽn da waoogd b wẽn-naandsã, tãmsa zutu, tãn-bi wã zutu, tɩɩsa sẽn tob n yɛsẽ wã tẽngre." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Y na pãb b maan-kugã n sẽege, n wã b kug peesdi wã, n yõog b ra-lug-bɛda bugum, n to n bõgs b wẽn-naandsã, n menes b yʋʋra menga." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Tẽnga rãmb sẽn da maand bũmb ningã, da maan-y boto ne Wẽnnaam, y Soaala ye." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk zĩig ning n maan b belem la b waoogr zĩigã na n yɩɩ sags a taaba fãa zĩiga, na n yɩɩ zĩ yɛng la b na n tigim. Be la y na n kẽng n tɩ waoog-ba." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Be bal la y na n wa ne y yũ-nood maando, laafi la sugr kosg maando, pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugã, yamleoog kũuna, kũun niyns y sẽn pʋlme, y rũms bɛda la y rũms bõonesa kom-dẽemse." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Be la y na n dɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taoore la y yik n kɩdem sũ-noogo ne y zak rãmba, y mens la y tʋʋma sẽn paam bark wakat ning fãa y Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, nengẽ." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Y ka na n kell n maan wala d sẽn maand dũnna, tɩ ned kam fãa maanda wala a sẽn tags tɩ rẽ la neere." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Y nan ka kẽ y vʋʋsga tẽng ye, y nan ka reeg y buuda pʋɩɩr y Soaala nengẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy12:10 La y na n dʋʋga kʋɩlgã n deeg pʋɩɩrã y Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn kõt yãmbã. B na n kõ-y-la vʋʋsgo, n zãag-y ne y bɛɛba rɩdgre tɩ y be y zagsẽ n ka mi yɩɩr ye." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Zĩig a ye la Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na n yãk t'a yɩ b waoogr zĩiga, yaa zĩ-kãng la y na n wa ne m sẽn yet tɩ y wa ne bũmb ningã: y yũ-nood maando, y laafi la sugr kosg maando, y yamleoog kũuni, y sẽn wat ne bũmb ning fãa n na n pids y sẽn pʋlem Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Y na n kɩdma sũ-noog y Soaala taoore, yãmb ne y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli, y yemse la y yem-pogse la Levitsa sẽn naag n kẽed ne yãmba n yaool n ka tar b buud pʋɩɩr wa yãmbã." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Da saag-y n yãend zĩ-yaare n yet tɩ be la y na kʋ y maanda ye. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n yãk zĩig ning y buud a ye rãmb pʋɩɩrẽ la y na n kʋ y yũ-nood maandã. Yaa be la fãa na n maan wa m sẽn wilgã. 
Deuteronomy12:15 Bũmb sẽn be, yaa tɩ y tõe n kʋ rũmsi n wãb b nemdo tẽns niyns y sẽn dat pʋgẽ, la wala y sẽn dat tɛka, la wala Wẽnd sẽn kõ-y ne b nonglem. Ka get f yɩlgame bɩ yell ket n be f zug ye, rũms kãens nemd wãbda wa yĩsr bɩ walga." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Bũmb sẽn le be yɛsa, y ka na n dɩ zɩɩm ye. Raagd-a-la tẽng wala koom." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Da lɛɛg-y n dɩ, tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ, kooda sẽn yãk peoog a ye piig zugu n kõ Wẽnnaama ye; da lɛɛg-y n yũ rãama wamd a ye piig zugu sẽn yãk n kõ Wẽnnaama ye la kaama me lengr a ye piig zugu sẽn yãk n kõ Wẽnnaama ye. Da wãb-y y rũms bɛdã la y rũms bõonesa kom-dẽemsa ye. Da lɛɛg-y n dɩ y sẽn pʋlem n dɩk n kõ Wẽnd ye, y meng y toor sẽn kõ ne yamleoog ye." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd taoor bal la rɩ kãens rɩta la zĩig ning bal Wẽnnaam y Soaala sẽn na wilg yã. Rɩ-y ne y kom-dibli, y kom-pugli, y yembse, y roog kamba, la Levitg sẽn naag yãmb n kẽed tẽng a ye. Kɩdem-y sũ-noog Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taore, y tʋʋma sẽn dabd taoora yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Modg-y n da zẽng Levitg n tãag y kũum ye. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Naaba-Wẽnd sã n wa yalg f tẽngã, Israyɛl, wala b sẽn kãab fã, tɩ f wa yeel f sũurẽ: ‹M data nemd n wãbe.› Ad-f na wãb nemd wala f sẽn date." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogra zĩig sã n zãr ne f tẽngã, f tõe n kʋ-la f rũm-bɛd la f rũm-bõonego Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n kõ-fo, wala m sẽn zoe n wilg fo, f tõe n wãb-b-la f tẽngẽ wã wala f sẽn dat tɛka." 
Deuteronomy12:22 F tõe n wãb-b lame wala f sẽn wãbd yĩsr bɩ walga. Sẽn yɩlga woo, sẽn yaa rẽgd woo, fãa tõe n naaga taab n dɩ." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Fo ye n da saag n dɩ zɩɩm, tɩ zɩɩma la vɩɩm la f kõn naag n dɩ vɩɩm ne f nemd ye." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Da rɩ zɩɩm ye, daag-a tẽnga wala koom." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Da rɩ zɩɩm ye, woto f sũur na yɩ noogo, foo la f kamba, fo loogr poore, la rẽ yaa f sã n tũud so tɩrg Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Deuteronomy12:26 F sẽn na n tall bũmb ning n wa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, b waoogra zĩigẽ, yaa f sẽn dɩk n kõ bãmbã, n paas f sẽn pʋlem bãmba." 
Deuteronomy12:27 F na wa ne f yũ-noog maand, nemd la zɩɩm, Wẽnd maan-kugra zugu. Maanda zɩɩma raagda Soaala-Wẽnnaama, maan-kugra zugu, la nemdã, wãb-a!" 
Deuteronomy12:28 Kelg la f reeg m sẽn kõt-f noy niynsa fãa. Woto f na paam sũ-noogo daar fãa. F kamba me na paam sũ-noogo, fo loogr poore, f sẽn maan neere la f kẽn tɩrg f Soaala taoora yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sã n wa menes f taoore neb niyns fo sẽn na n tɩ reeg b rãmb tẽns n kẽ wã, f sã n wa tõog-b zãnga n led b zĩiga," 
Deuteronomy12:30 gũus n da lʋɩ b bẽdga pʋgẽ, b loogr poore, n yik n maand wa bãmb ye. Gũus n da pʋg b wẽn-naandsa ye, da sok f meng f sũurẽ: ‹Bãmba ra waoogda b wẽnd dãmba wãna tɩ m me maan wa bãmba?›" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yĩnga, da saag n maan boto ye. Bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kis bũmb ning wa fãa-fãa wã, bõn-kãng la b maan b wẽn-naandsa yĩnga, n tol n yõ maand b yĩnga, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli maando." 
Deuteronomy13:1 M sẽn yet tɩ y maan bũmb ningã, reeg-y la y tũ fãa. Gũus-y tɩ bũmb da yiisi, gũus-y tɩ bũmb da paas me ye." 
Deuteronomy13:2 Tõeeme tɩ daar a ye bãngd bɩ ned sẽn paamd likri poog yãmb sʋka n gomd tɩ yel-bãnd n na n maane. 
Deuteronomy13:3 Ad-y yel-bãnd sã n sɩd maan wa a sẽn yeelã, tɩ nin-kãng kos yãmb tɩ y wa waoog la y pʋg wẽn-sãamse, wẽnd-dãmb f sẽn ka mi," 
Deuteronomy13:4 da saag n kelg a sẽn yet ye. Ya y Soaala-Wẽnnaam n tʋlg n fɛɛs yãmba n bãng y sã n yaa neb sẽn nong Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, ne y sũur fãa, ne y yalẽ wã fãa." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Y Soaala-Wẽnnaama bal la y na n tũ, bãmb nif la y na n zoe, bãmb noya la y na n deege, b koɛɛga bal la y na n kelge, bãmb bal la y na n waooge, y na n dɩka y mens n kõ bãmb bala." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Bãngdã, sẽn paamda likrã, y kʋʋd-a lame t'a tʋlgame tɩ y yi Wẽnnaam la y Soaala poorẽ, la yaool n yaa bãmb n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga, bãmb n fãag yãmb yembdo. Nin-kãng da ratame n tak yãmb n yiis sor ning Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn wilg yãmb tɩ y tũ wã. Y na menes rat-wẽng soabã y sʋka." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Y ba-biiga, y ma biiga, y bi-ribl bɩ y bi-pugla, y pʋg-nongre, y tũud-n-taaga sẽn zems wa yãmb, sã n soos n wa yeel yãmba: ‹Wa-y tɩ d pʋg wẽnd-dãmb a taaba,› wẽnd-dãmb y menga la y ba rãmb sẽn ka bãnge," 
Deuteronomy13:8 wẽnd-dãmb sẽn paamd waoogr buud niyns sẽn zãr-b ne yãmba nengẽ, bɩ sẽn pẽ-b yãmb n gilgã nengẽ," 
Deuteronomy13:9 y kõn sak ye, y kõn kelg-a ye, da yeel-y tɩ y nong-a lame ye, da zoe-y nin-kãng nimbãaneg ye, da zab-y n sõng-a ye." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Y tog n kʋ-a lame. Y meng nug n dengd n sɩɩs-a tɩ neb a taaba yaool n wa baas. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Y labd-a-la ne kuga t'a ki, t'a baoome n na n zãag yãmb ne Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga, y yembd tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy13:12 A Israyɛl kamba na wʋm yellã, b na rig rabeem, la b kõn saag n maan wẽng a woto buud y sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy13:13 Ade, Israyɛl, fo sã n zĩnd f tẽngẽ, tẽng ning Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt yãmba pʋgẽ, n wʋm tɩ b gomd" 
Deuteronomy13:14 tɩ nin-yaals n yik n kẽesd b taab weoogo la b yet-b: ‹Wa-y tɩ d tɩ waoog wẽnd-dãmb a taaba, wẽnd-dãmb y sẽn pa mi,›" 
Deuteronomy13:15 f na maan gẽesgo, sogsgo, vɛɛsgo, la f sã n wa bãng tɩ wɩɩbd a woto sɩd maana y sʋka," 
Deuteronomy13:16 f koota tẽnga rãmb fãa ne sʋʋse la f kãab tẽnga beedo, la f kood a rũmsa fãa." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Wʋk b laoga fãa n zam b tẽnga sʋka la f naag-b ne tẽngã n yõog bugum, Wẽnd yĩnga. Tẽnga lebgda raboogo, zamaan sẽn wate la b kõn le yik a raboog ye." 
Deuteronomy13:18 F nug ra sɩɩs fɩ: b kãaba tẽnga beedo. Woto la Soaala sũur na n maage, tɩ f rɩ b nonglma kaseto la f lebg tẽn-kãsenga, wala Wẽnd sẽn kãab f yaab rãmba." 
Deuteronomy13:19 La rẽ yaa f sẽn kelg m koɛɛgã la f reeg noya m sẽn wilgd dũnna wã, n maand sẽn ya tɩrg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, nifẽ." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Yãmb yaa y Soaala-Wẽnda kamba. Dɩlla da bog-y y yĩns ye, da kõog-y y rĩiri, y ned sã n ki ye." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Yãmb buuda yaa Wẽnd soolem, ya yãmb la Soaala yãk yã tɩ y na n yɩ buudu sẽn lebg b meng pʋɩɩr sõngo buud a taaba fãa sẽn be tẽng zuga sʋka." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Da rɩ sẽn kis ye. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ad-y sẽn tõe n wãb rũms niynsi: naafo, pe-bila, bulla," 
Deuteronomy14:5 yãka, yĩsri, walga, beoko, wilpeoolgo, sɩbga, monfo." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Y tõe n wãba rũng ning fãa nao-beong sẽn welg a yi la sẽn bʋgsd yamdo. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Rũms kẽer n be n tar nao-beond sẽn welg a yi la rẽ ka sek ye, dẽnd b naag n bʋgsd yamdo tɩ y yaool marsã n ges-b wa rũng y sẽn tõe n wãbe. Woto d tog n gesa wa rũng d sẽn ka tõe n wãbe: yʋgemde, soaamba, marwara; bãmb bʋgsda yamdo, yaa sɩda, la b nao-beong ka welg a yi ye." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Sã n ya kurkuri, a nao-beong welga a yi la a ka bʋgsd yamd ye. Ges-y rũms a woto buud wa rũm-dẽgdo; b nemd pa wãbde, b kɩɩng me pa sɩɩsde." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Sã n ya koomẽ dũmsã, ad-y sẽn tõe n wãb b rãmba: yaa rũng fãa sẽn tar legbre la pagdo. Y tõe n dɩɩ bãmba." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Sẽn ka tar b legbre la pagdo, y kõn dɩ bãmb ye, b yaa rẽgdo." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Y tõe n wãba luiil fãa wãbr sẽn ka tar yelle. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ad-y sẽn ka na n wãb b rãmba: pa-nand-tugri, sɩlga, mayaalle," 
Deuteronomy14:13 wɩbga, yɩbrgo, bõan-pog-wɩbg buud fãa," 
Deuteronomy14:14 gãabd buud fãa," 
Deuteronomy14:15 na-neoongo, viuugu, ka-ra-la-m-zomda, kosenkond buud fãa," 
Deuteronomy14:16 viuug-luiila, kos-ki, faoogo," 
Deuteronomy14:17 salsanga, yɩbr-pɛɛlga, koom-daoogo," 
Deuteronomy14:18 nok-naaba, raong buud fãa, bulwãoogo, zãnga." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Bõn-yɩgd bõonesa buud fãa yaa bõn-dẽgdo, da wãb-y-b ye." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Luiil fãa sẽn tar pɩgsa t'a wãbr ka kɩsa, y tõe n wãb-a lame." 
Deuteronomy14:21 Rũng sẽn ki woto wãbr kisame, dɩk-a n kõ sãan sẽn naag foom n kẽed f tẽngẽ, yẽ tõee n wãb-a lame bɩ a tõee n dɩk-a lame n koose ne sẽn ya-b sãamb wa yẽ, la fo ka tõe ye, tɩ Wẽnd welga fo buuda toore. Da rʋg bull ne a ma bĩisim ye." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa f na pʋɩ f sẽn bʋde la sẽn ko n paam, zĩis piig-piiga." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Piig zugu, f tallda pʋɩɩr a ye n wa rɩ Wẽnnaam f Soaala taoore tẽng ning b sẽn yãk tɩ yaa b belem la b waoogr zĩigã. F wata ne alkam, ne f yʋʋmda rãam la kaam, ne rũng fãa pipi biiga, rũms bɛda wala rũms bõonese. Woto la f na n zãms Wẽnnaam nif zoeere, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Sora sã n ya wok wʋsgo tɩ kũuna zã n kẽnga ya toogo, f sã n zãr ne tẽng ning f Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn yãk tɩ ya b waoogr zĩigã, la Soaala kũuna yaool n ka zem-zem ye," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ad-f tekda ne ligdi la yaa ligda la f na n tall n wa f Soaala-Wẽnnaama waoogr zĩigẽ. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Beelẽ f rɩkda ligdã n da f sẽn dat bũmb ninga: rũm-bɛd bɩ rũms bõonese, rãam, toose, f yam sẽn kẽ bũmb ning fãa. Foo ne f zak-rãmb rɩtame la y yũ, la y noog y sũur, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taoore." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Da rɩ n bas Levitga sẽn be f tẽngẽ n yaool n ka tar pʋɩɩr a ba raboogẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Yʋʋmd a tãab-tãabo, f piig-piig pʋɩɩra, f yãkda yʋʋmd kãng rẽnna n paalg f tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Woto Levitga sẽn ka tar pʋɩɩr a ba raboogẽ, sãana, kɩɩba, pʋg-kõore sẽn be f tẽngẽ, na yũ la b rɩ n tɩge la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, me na tũ rẽ n ning f tʋʋm buud fãa barka." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Yʋʋm a yopoepoe, yaa sama kiisgu. Ned ka le tar y samd ye." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ad sama sẽn na n kiis to-to: B sã n moon Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga tɩ yʋʋmda yaa sam kiisg yʋʋmde, ned ning fãa sẽn peng a to bũmbu, ka le so a sẽn peng-a ye. A ka tõe n modg tɩ b lebsa a bũmba ye, a kõn modg a ba-biiga bɩ a saam-biiga, tɩ b mooname, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, bɩ b ra sok samd yʋʋmd kãng ye." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Sã n ya sãana b tõe n modga yẽ. Sã n ya f saam-biiga, kell n bas taale." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Modge, Israyɛl biiga, tɩ naong soab ra zĩnd f tẽngẽ ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kũuna ka na n paoog-f tẽng ning b sẽn dɩk n kõ-f tɩ f sooga pʋgẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy15:5 Fo yee n modg bala n deeg Wẽnnaam noya fãa b sẽn kõt maam tɩ m deege n wilg-f rũnna wã. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kõn pa n ka ning f bark wala b sẽn kãab fooma ye. Woto wã, fo na n deega bobelle buud wʋsg nengẽ n yaool n dɩk f bũmb n peng-ba la buud ba a ye kõn deng n deeg fo bũmb n yaool n peng-f ye. Fo na n sooga buud wʋsgo la buud ba a ye kõn soog foo ye."
