Deuteronomy15:7 F saam-biig a ye sã n be ne foo, tẽng a ye pʋgẽ, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn na n deeg n kõ fooma, la f saam-biiga yaa naong soaba, fo kõn kʋɩɩs f sũur ne-a ye." 
Deuteronomy15:8 F na yaag f nugu yalengo, f na reeg bũmb a nengẽ n yaool n kõ-a a sẽn tar bũmb ning fãa tʋʋmde." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Da bas tɩ tags yaals wa f sũurẽ tɩ f yeele: ‹Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba zoe n taame, bas sama taal yʋʋmda zoe n vẽkame,› tɩ f na n kʋɩɩs f sũur ne naong soaba n bas-a n ka kõ-a bũmb ye. F maan boto, f na maan wẽnga la naonga soab na kãab-f beed ne Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Bao wʋsg n kõ-a la kõ-a ne sũ-noogo, la Naaba-Wẽnd me na ning f tʋʋma fãa bark la yõodo." 
Deuteronomy15:11 La m sẽn mi tɩ naong soab ka tõe n ka zĩnd f tẽngẽ, m kõt-f-la no-kãnga: Ypk f nug yalengo f saam-biig yĩnga. Nimbãan-ned la naong soab sẽn naag-b foom n kẽed tẽng a ye wã, puk f nug b yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Israyɛl kamba sʋka, pag bɩ rao sã n kẽes a meng yembd f zakẽ, la a sã n tʋma wala yamba, yʋʋm a yoobe, yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba f na bas-a t'a yi n looge." 
Deuteronomy15:13 F sã n wa yet t'a yi n looge, f ka basd-a t'a loog ne nug vɩʋʋg ye." 
Deuteronomy15:14 F na bao kũun n zam-a, kũun sẽn yi f wubrẽ, f zɛɛgẽ, f bugsuntungẽ. F sẽn kõtã ka yit zĩig a to tɩ ka Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, nengẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy15:15 F na tẽeg tɩ f meng yɩɩ yamb Ezipt tẽnga la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, n yiis-f yembdẽ. Dẽnd me yĩng la m kõt-f no-kãnga rũnna." 
Deuteronomy15:16 La f yem-daooga sã n yeel foo: ‹M pa rat n yi n loog ye,› a sẽn nong foo yĩnga, a sẽn nong foo ne f zaka, la a gomd tɩ bũmb k a paoog-a," 
Deuteronomy15:17 fo na n baoo pĩim n dɩdg a tʋbra ne f roog lugri n vʋdge la a na lebg f yamba, daar fãa yĩnga. Sã n ya yem-poaka, le yaa boto la f maanda." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Bas yamba t'a loog n soog a mengã, da ges rẽ wa bũmb sẽn ya toog ne-f ye t'a sẽn tʋm f zakẽ yʋʋm a yoobã, a kẽes-f-la yõodo naoor a yi, n yɩɩd tʋʋm-tʋmd sẽn deegd yaoodo. Bas-a t'a soog a menga, la bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na ning f tʋʋmd fãa yõodo." 
Deuteronomy15:19 F na n dɩkame n kõ Wẽnde f rũng fãa pipi biig sẽn ya raoogo, yaa rũng sẽn ya bedr bɩ rũm-bila. Da tʋm ne rũm-bedr pipi biig ye. Da wõrs f pesg bɩ f bʋʋg pipi biig sẽn ya raoog kõbd ye." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, taoor la f na n wãb a nemdo, foo ne f zak rãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogr zĩigẽ." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Rũnga sã n yaool n tar bãnde, n ya woabg bɩ zoanga, bɩ kɩsre, b pa kʋʋd rũng kãng maoong Soaala-Wẽnd taoor ye." 
Deuteronomy15:22 B kʋʋd-a-la tẽnga pʋgẽ. Ned ning sẽn ya rẽgdo la ned ning sẽn ka rẽgdo naagda taab n wãb-a wala yĩsr bɩ walga. 
Deuteronomy15:23 F kõn sɩɩs a zɩɩma yẽ ye. Zɩɩma raagda tẽng wa koom. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Gũ Kara-moosga kiuugu n maan Pak kibsa, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yĩnga. Yaa kara-moosga kiuug la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yiis foo Ezipt tẽng ne yʋngo." 
Deuteronomy16:2 F Soaala-Wẽnnaam yĩnga, f na n kʋʋ maoongo. Na n yɩɩ ne rũm-bedre, bɩ ne rũm-bila, la yaa zĩig ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogr zĩigẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:3 F ka rɩt bur sẽn lob bɩll ye. Dasem a yopoe tõre f na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka lob bɩlle. Yaa nimbãaneg rɩɩbo, tɩ yaa ne yãgbo la f yi Ezipt tẽnga. Woto me la f tẽegd f vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ tɩ Wẽnd n yiis-f Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, b kõn yãend ra-bɩll f tẽngẽ ye. Rũmsa sẽn kʋ zĩ-sobd, pipi raarã, ad-y b nemda ka tõe n bas n dɩ vẽkẽmbeoog ye." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Ka tẽns niyns fãa f Soaala-Wẽnnaama sẽn kõ foo la f tõe n kʋ Paka maoong ye," 
Deuteronomy16:6 yaa tẽns niyns Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn yãk b waoogr yĩnga pʋgẽ bala. Paka kʋʋda zaabre, wĩndg sẽn lʋɩ n zems ne wakat ning f sẽn yi Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy16:7 F na n segla rũngã, n wãb a nemdã zĩig ning Soaala sẽn yãk b waoogr yĩngã; vẽkẽmbeoogo f lebda f tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Dasem a yoob tõre f na n dɩɩ bur sẽn ka lob bɩlle. Daar a yopoe soaba yɩta paka kibs baasgo. Baraare f ka tʋmd tʋʋmd ye. 
Deuteronomy16:9 F na sõda rasem a yopoepoe naoor a yopoe; daara sõadga sɩngda kooda wʋrba sɩngr daare. 
Deuteronomy16:10 F maanda Tigsg kibsa, f Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yĩnga, f wata ne yamleoog kũuni, wala f Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, bark sẽn sig-f tɛka." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Yaa Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk tẽng ning b waoogr yĩnga la f na n kɩdem bãmb taoore, foo ne f bi-ribla, f bi-pugla, f yamba, f roog-biiga, Levitg sẽn naag foom n kẽed f tẽngẽ, sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore sẽn vɩ f tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:12 F na tẽeg tɩ f me yɩɩ yem-daoog Ezipt tẽnga. Reeg noorã n tũ zãnga. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Maan sẽgda kibs rasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, f sã n kẽes koodã f sẽn pãb f zɛɛgẽ la f sã n kẽes f rãama f bugsuntund sẽn kõ-fo." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Kɩdem sũ-noog ne f bi-ribla, f bi-pugla, f yamba, f roog-biiga, Levitg sẽn naag foom n kẽed f tẽngẽ, sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore sẽn vɩ f tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ f na n dɩka sore n tɩ gilg tẽng ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogr yĩngã. La rẽ yaa f sẽn dat tɩ b rɩ kaseto tɩ b ninga f kood la f tʋʋma fãa barka, tɩ f zĩ ne sũ-noog sẽn pidi." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Naoor a tãabo, yʋʋmd pʋgẽ, rapa fãa tog n tɩ kaaga tẽng ning Wẽnd sẽn yãk n maan b waoogr zĩigã. Yaa dasem a yopoe niyns bura sẽn ka le lobd bɩllã, n paas tigsg kibsã la sẽgda rota kibsã. La Soaala-Wẽnd taoor pa kẽnd n pa zãad bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Ned kam fãa baooda a nug bũmb n kõ Soaala wa Soaala nuga sẽn puk yaleng tɛk a yĩnga. 
Deuteronomy16:18 Tẽng ning fãa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn deeg n kõ foo pʋgẽ, ning bʋ-kaooda la neb sẽn na n welgd yɛla. B modg tɩ b bʋʋda kao ne zemsgo." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Bʋʋda kaooda tɩrga, ka sõngd a zagla n bas a zagl ye, ka reegd bũmb n sui n kedb bʋʋda ye. Kũuna na kɩtame tɩ f nina mum n pa le ne sɩda, tɩ bʋʋda me pa le tũ tɩrg ye." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Pʋg sɩda la sɩd bala. Woto me la f na vɩɩnd tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt fooma pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy16:21 F sã n me maan-kugr Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yĩnga, da saag n sel n yegl-a bũmb sẽn pees ne raoogo n na n waoog ye." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Da saag n pees bũmb ne kugri n sel-a n yegl ye, tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn yaand Wẽnnaam sũuri." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Da saag n wa ne Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, taoore, naaf bɩ pesg sẽn tar bãnd ye. Yaa bũmb Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn ka reegde." 
Deuteronomy17:2 B sã n yãend tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõ fooma pʋgẽ, pag bɩ rao sẽn maand Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kisi, bũmb sẽn sãamd b zoodã," 
Deuteronomy17:3 b sã n yãend pag bɩ raoa sẽn waoogd wẽnd-dãmb a taaba la a wõgemd b taoore, n wõgemd wĩntoog taoore la kiuugu la yĩngr ãdsa fãa taoore, rẽ yaa bũmb m sẽn pa kose." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Sã n yaa ned n wa n togse, bɩ f wʋma woto tɩ b gomda, modg n pʋg yella nao la f sã n sɩd tara kaset tɩ wɩɩbd a woto buud maana Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ," 
Deuteronomy17:5 f kɩtdame tɩ b tall n wa tẽnga noor, paga bɩ raoã sẽn maan yellã, tɩ y lab-a n kʋ." 
Deuteronomy17:6 La tog n paama neb a yiib bɩ a tãab kaseto n yaool n kʋ beegdã. Kaseta sã n ya nin-yend kaseto, b pa kʋʋd a soab ye." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Kaseta rãmb n lobgd pipi tɩ sẽn ket-ba yaool n pʋge. Da bas yel-maand f sʋk ye! 
Deuteronomy17:8 Zɩɩm sã n daage, bɩ sãmpogre n pogle, bɩ kɩɩs-taab n yiki, la f gesame tɩ yella welgr yaa toogo, f kẽngda tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn yãk tɩ ya b waoogr zĩigã." 
Deuteronomy17:9 F tʋgd n yãenda Levits niyns sẽn ya maan-kʋʋdbã la sẽn so-b bʋʋda wakat kãnga. Bãmb la f na n sok tɩ b wilg-f fo sẽn na n maanega. 
Deuteronomy17:10 Fo tũuda b sẽn wilg foom, Wẽnnaam sẽn yãk b waoogr tẽngẽ wã, n da bas tɩ bũmb ba a ye pa ye." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Tũ n da kɩll goabg bɩ rɩtgo, tũ b sẽn yet tɩ f maan bũmb ningã." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Bãng tɩ ned ninga sẽn na n maan waa a sẽn tagse, n pa kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, maan-kʋʋdã la bʋ-kaoodã, b yiisda yẽ soab nin-vɩɩs sʋka. Zãag a Israyɛl tẽn-peelem ne wẽng buud fãa." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Neba fãa na wʋme n dig rabeem la ned kõn le saag n welg yell a meng a toor ye. 
Deuteronomy17:14 Israyɛl, ad-f sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning f Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt-f tɩ f soogã, f sã n paam n me f roto, la f sɩng n gomd f sũurẽ: ‹M data dĩm n kõ m menga n wẽneg buud niyns fãa sẽn gũbg-b maama,›" 
Deuteronomy17:15 bãng tɩ f sẽn na n bao a soaba tog n yɩɩ neda f Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn zoe n yãke. Kẽ f buuda pʋgẽ n bao f dĩma. A ra yɩ sãana la bu-zẽn ye." 
Deuteronomy17:16 A wiidi wã ka tog n yɩ wʋsg tɩ loog ye. A ra saag n tall buudã n leb Ezipt tẽng tɩ be n be wiidi wʋsg ye. Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-f lame: ‹Da le gõdg n dɩk so-kãng ye.› 
Deuteronomy17:17 Dĩma pagba me ka tog n yɩ wʋsg ye. A sũura wat n tedgame. A wanzurf la a sãnema me ka tog n yɩ wʋsg tɩ loog ye. 
Deuteronomy17:18 A sã n wa rʋ a naama goeele, a na kɩt tɩ b gʋls a yĩnga, bũmb ning fãa sẽn be noora sebrẽ. Yaa maan-kʋʋdba sẽn ya Levitsa nengẽ la a na n deeg sebrã." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Noora sebr paada a sɛɛgẽ t'a karemda beoog-beoog fãa. Woto a na zãms n zoe Wẽnnaam a Soaala nifu n deeg la a tũ bũmb ning fãa sẽn gʋls a pʋgẽ," 
Deuteronomy17:20 n da wa lebg zẽk-m-meng soaba, a soolma rãmb nifẽ, la a bas noorã n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg ye. Woto me la yẽ ne a kamb na n kaoos Israyɛl naama goeela zugu." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Levitsa sẽn kʋʋd maandã, a Levi buuda fãa, ka tar a buud pʋɩɩr Israyɛl kamba sʋk ye. B sẽn na n dɩlg b mens ne bũmb ninga yaa rɩɩb niyns b sẽn kõt Wẽndã, sẽn yãk Wẽnd pʋɩɩrẽ wã." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Sẽn sõngda maan-kʋʋdba ka tar pʋɩɩr a buudẽ ye. Soaala bal n na n yɩ a buud pʋɩɩre, wala b sẽn kãab-a." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Ad-b sẽn na n deeg bũmb ninga buuda nengẽ, la sẽn kos-b maoonga ne naafo bɩ pesga nengẽ. Yaa rũnga bãoko, a yɛga la a pʋʋrã." 
Deuteronomy18:4 F sẽn na n kõ-ba n paase, yaa pipi ka-gĩndã, yaa rãama la ka-paalgã, piisa la bʋʋsa kõbdo, pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugu." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Yaa Levitga ne a kamba la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, tũus buuda sʋka t'a na n kʋ maand Soaala yĩng beog-beoog fãa." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Levitg tõe n yi-la a tẽngẽ, a tẽnga sẽn be zĩig ning fãa Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, n kẽng a sẽn dat wakat ning fãa, tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn yãk wala b waoogra zĩiga." 
Deuteronomy18:7 A na n kʋʋ maandã Wẽnnaam, a Soaala, yĩnga, wala Levits a taaba sẽn zoe n be be wã." 
Deuteronomy18:8 B rɩlgr yĩnga, b fãa pʋɩɩr na n zenga taaba, b sẽn paam b ba rãmba nengẽ n koosã toog sẽn yãke." 
Deuteronomy18:9 F sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-fã, da saag n tũ b manesma sẽn ya wɩɩbd zãnga ye." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Ned da saag, yãmb sʋka, n los bugmẽ, a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugl ye. A ra sok wẽn-naandsa ye, a ra pʋg a kõn-togs tɩ vaal dãmb ye. A ra pẽneg sẽn yet-b tɩ b mi b beoog sẽn na n yɩ a soaba ye. A ra kẽ tɩ-rɩtb ye. A ra saag n bõs pãn-wẽns rãmb pãnga n tʋm beed ye." 
Deuteronomy18:11 B ra yɩ neb sẽn daagd b taab yam, neb sẽn sokd kɩɩms ye." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ned ning fãa sẽn maan boto maana wɩbd Wẽnnaam nifẽ la yaa rẽnd me yĩng la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n dig-ba n yiis y taoore, y sã n poog b tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Dɩk f meng zãng n loe ne Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, tɩ bũmb da kedb foo ne bãmb sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Fo sẽn na n dig b rãmb n yiis n soog b tẽngã, ad bãmb dãmb pʋgda neb niyns sẽn yet tɩ b pa wilgd tɩ bũmb na yɩ tɩ pa yɩ ye. Ad bãmb dãmb sokda wẽn-naandse. Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, pa rat tɩ f maan a boto buud ye." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n yiisa f sʋka, bãngd wa maam. Nin-kãng la yãmb na n kelge." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Pʋs n yaa rẽ la f ra kos bãmb, Oreb tãnga zugu, tigsg kãsenga raare, f sẽn waa n yeele: ‹M ka rat n le wʋm Wẽnd menga, m Soaala menga, tɩ b gomd ne m ye. M pa rat n le yãend b bugma tɩ m na n wa kiime.›" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Dẽ marsã la Soaala-Wẽnd leok-m: ‹Y sẽn gom woto wã yaa neere. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Sɩd yaa bãngd wala fooma la m na n yiis buuda sʋk n kõ-ba, m na n ninga m goama a noorẽ, la yaa m sẽn yet t'a togs bũmb ninga la a na n togse." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ned ning fãa sẽn ka kelg m gomdã bãngda sẽn yiis a noorẽ, mam meng n na n sok-a marsã." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Sã n ya bãngda meng n saag a toore n yiis gomd n yet t'a reeg-a-la mam nengẽ, tɩ m yaool n pa yeel-a bũmbu, bɩ a sã n gomda wẽnd dãmb a taab yʋʋr yĩnga, ya yẽ meng n na n ki.›" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Tõeeme tɩ f wa sok f menga: ‹M yɩta a wãn n bãng tɩ gomda pa yi Wẽnnaam nengẽ?› 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ade, bãngda sẽn togs bũmb ning m yʋʋr yĩnga sã n pa pidsi, sã n ka taase, dẽnd ka Soaala n yeel ye, ya bãngda meng a toor n saag n yeele. Da zoe rabeem ye!" 
Deuteronomy19:1 F Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sã n wa wã bu-zẽmbã f taoore, n deeg b tẽnsã n kõ-fo, f sã n wa kẽed b tẽnsã la b rotã," 
Deuteronomy19:2 f na n yãka tẽns a tãabo n welg-b toore, f soolmẽ, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala sẽn na n kõ-fã," 
Deuteronomy19:3 f na sõog kug a tãab zugu vẽenem ning f buuda sẽn paam Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, nengẽ wã la soya sẽn digd tẽns a tãabã sẽn yãkã la woto nin-kʋʋd fãa paamda a soondg zĩiga." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ad sẽn na n tũ ne bũmb ninga tɩ nin-kʋʋda wa kẽ tẽn-bãmb pʋsẽ n paam n põse. Yaa a sã n kʋʋ ne yĩdgu, beem da ka be sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Yaa wa ned sẽn tũ a to n kẽng weoogo n na n tɩ kɛ tɩɩse. La kɛɛba sẽn waa n kɛɛdẽ wã, ned a ye lar baagame n tɩ wẽ ned a to t'a ki, nin-kʋʋda tõe n zoe n tɩ soond tẽn-kãens pʋsẽ n põse." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ned ninga sẽn tõe n daag zɩɩm n dol zɩɩma da yik ne sũ-puuri n pʋg nin-kʋʋdã, n yet tɩ sora sẽn wogma a na paam n kʋ-a t'a nan ka ta soondga tẽng ye. B ka tog n kʋ-a ye tɩ yaa yĩdgu, beem da ka be sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Yaa rẽ me yĩng la m kõt f noor kãngã: ‹Welg tẽns a tãab toore.› 
Deuteronomy19:8 La Wẽnnaam f Soaala sã n yãend tɩ f reegame la f tũu noy niyns m sẽn kõt-f rũnna, n nong Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, beoog sẽn vẽege, n ka bʋdg sore," 
Deuteronomy19:9 b na yalg f soolma, wala b sẽn pʋlem f yaab rãmbã n dɩk tẽnga zãng n kõ bãmbã. Dẽ marsã la f lebd n paas soondg tẽns a tãabo." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Woto, yell sã n ka rog a zugu, b kõn daag ned zɩɩm y tẽngẽ, zĩig ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn yãk pʋɩɩr f yĩngã. Zɩɩm sã n daage, taal be-la f zugu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Ned sã n kis a to, n gũusd-a, n wudg n yẽeg-a n pãb n kʋ, n yaool marsã n zoe n kẽ soondg tẽng a ye," 
Deuteronomy19:12 tẽnga nin-kẽemsã na n tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yõk-a la b na bas-a-la sẽn tõe n daag zɩɩm n dol zɩɩma soab nugẽ, t'a yãk a yõore." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Da bas t'a weoog kẽ-f ye, da bas tɩ b raag f tẽngẽ, ned sẽn ka beeg zɩɩm ye, tɩ woto la f na n paam sũ-noogo." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Da teem f yak toaag kugr ye. Toaaga pa, wa pipi kẽedba sẽn deege, wa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõ-b tɩ b sooge." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Ned sã n kʋ, ned sã maan wẽnga, a sẽn maan a soab fãa, yella kaset soab ka yikd, yẽnd a ye, n tɩ kõ kaset ye. Yella tog n welga ne kaset dãmb a yiib bɩ a tãabo." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ned sã n wa ne kaset zirẽ n yet t'a zagl sʋgda a taab tɩ b kɩɩs noore," 
Deuteronomy19:17 neb a yiiba sẽn tar kasetã, tata maan-kʋʋdba la bʋ-kaoodba taoore, bʋ-kaoodb niyns sẽn so-b tʋʋmd wakat kãngã taoore," 
Deuteronomy19:18 bʋ-kaoodba na n vɛɛsa yella neere, la b sã n mik tɩ yaa rõadga, tɩ yaa zirẽ-beedo," 
Deuteronomy19:19 b maanda ne yẽ soaba wala a sẽn da rat tɩ b maan a tũud-n-taagã. F yiisda wẽng f tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Neb a taaba na wʋme, rabeem na yõk-ba, la b na vẽ ne yell a woto maaneg f tẽngẽ." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Da bas tɩ nimbãaneg yõk-f ye: vɩɩm donda vɩɩm, nif ronda nifu, yẽnd donda yẽnde, nug ronda nugu, naoor donda naoore." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Y sã n yi n na n tak zabr ne y bɛɛba, Israyɛl kamba, y sã n yãend wiidi, bɩ bilim-bilm, bɩ tãb-biis sõor sẽn tagme, da saag-y n maan dabeem ye tɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, bee ne yãmba, la yaa bãmb n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Y sẽn wat n na n sɩng zabrã, maan-kʋʋda wata taoore n gom ne nebã." 
Deuteronomy20:3 Ad-a sẽn yet-ba: ‹Kelg-y yã, Israyɛl tãb-biisi, y yika rũnna n na n zab ne y bɛɛba. Da bas-y y raooda tɩ boog ye, da zoe-y rabeem ye, y pɛleng ra yɩk ye, la da rig-y b taoor ye." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Yaa Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, n be y sʋka. Bãmb n wa y sõngre n na n zab y bɛɛba n kõ yã.›" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Taoor dãmba na n yeela neba woto: ‹Ned sã n be yãmb sʋka n me ro-paalle la a nan ka kẽ a roogã, a leb a zakẽ n da wa pa zabrẽ tɩ ned a to yõdg n kẽ a zĩigẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ned sã n be yãmb sʋka n sel a bugsuntungu n yaool n nan ka rɩ a pipi biisi, a leb a zakẽ n da wa pa zabrẽ tɩ ned a to yaool n wa tõsd bi-kãens ye." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ned sã n pʋlem bi-pugla t'a na yi kãadem ne-a, a leb a tẽngẽ n da wa pa zabrẽ tɩ ned a to wa kẽ kãadem ne bi-kãng ye.›" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Taoor dãmba wat n le sokame: ‹Ned sã n be yãmb sʋkã, t'a sũur kiuusdẽ, t'a raood boogdẽ, a leb a zakẽ la a ra wa boog a taab raood wa a meng ye.›" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Taoor dãmba sã n gom n sɛ, b lʋɩsda tãnsoaben-dãmba taoore." 
Deuteronomy20:10 F sã n ta tẽnga n na n tak zabr ne-a, f na reng n gom ne-a laafi goama, n yeel-a t'a sak n pak a kʋɩlense." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Tẽnga rãmb sã n leoke: ‹D sakame, d basa zabre,› b sã n pak foom b tẽnga kʋɩlense, neba fãa sẽn be tẽnga pʋg na n lebga f zak-tʋʋm-tʋmdba la f sõgen-kamba." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Tẽnga sã n zãgs laafi goama kelegre, n kaoog zabre, fo gũbgd-a lame." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, rɩkd-a lame n sagl f nugẽ la f sʋʋg koota rapa fãa." 
Deuteronomy20:14 F na n sooga pagbã, kom-bõonegã, rũmsã la laog fãa sẽn pa tẽnga pʋga. F na n dɩlga f meng ne b laogã tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, n kõ-fo." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Yaa woto la f na n maan ne tẽns niyns fãa toaag sẽn zãr ne fo tẽnsã, ne tẽns niyns fãa sẽn ya toore, ne b sẽn na n sõdg b rãmb marsã wã." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Tẽns niyns Wẽnnaam f Soaala sẽn deegd n na n kõ fooma da kees bõn-vɩɩs b pʋgẽ ye. 
Deuteronomy20:17 F na ges wa kisgu Ititga, Amoritga, Kanaã rãmba, Perizitga, Ivitga la Zebuzitga, wala Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõ-f noore tɩ f kʋ." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Woto b kõn zãms-y tɩ y wɩɩb wala b sẽn wɩɩb ne b wẽn-naandsa ye. Y waoog wẽn-naandsã, bãng-y tɩ y beega Wẽnnaam, y Soaala." 
Deuteronomy20:19 F sã n wa gũbg tẽng n na n wẽ-a n sooge, tɩ zabra wa tadgdẽ, da zẽk f zende n kɛɛg tɩɩg ye, tɩ yaa tɩɩsã n na n dɩlg-fo. Dẽnd yĩnga da kɛɛg-b ye. Pʋʋg tɩɩg ka ninsaal tɩ f na n gõdg n zab ne-a ye." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Yaa tɩɩs niyns sẽn ka womd-b biisa bala la f tõe n kɛɛg n wʋk n pag tẽngã n wa tõog-a zãnga. 
Deuteronomy21:1 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn dɩk tẽng ning n kõ-f tɩ f sooga pʋgẽ, fo sã n kẽnd n wa mik tɩ ned ki n dɩg pʋʋgẽ la f ka mi sẽn ya ned ninga n wẽ-a n kʋ," 
Deuteronomy21:2 yiis nin-kẽemsã la bʋ-kaoodba tɩ b mag tẽnsa sẽn gũbgã zãrem ne kũuma. 
Deuteronomy21:3 B na bãng sẽn ya tẽng ning n pẽ ne kũuma rɩgr n yɩɩda. Dẽ marsã la tẽng ninga sẽn pẽ-a wã nin-kẽems na n yi ne nag-sɛdg sẽn nan ka mi tʋʋmde, sẽn nan ka sog wãk ye." 
Deuteronomy21:4 B talda nag-sɛdgã n dig koom sẽn zoetẽ, la be ka bʋde, ka ko n yegl ye. B kẽeda kooma ne nag-sɛdgã n wẽ a kãarã n weke." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Dẽ poore, maan-kʋʋdba, a Levi kamba, kolgdame tɩ yaa bãmb la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, yãk tɩ b kʋ maand la b ning bark b zĩigẽ, la b welg yɛla la b sɛɛs no-koɛɛm, sãmpogr poorẽ." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Tẽnga nin-kẽems sẽn kolg-b kũuma lebda kʋɩlga sẽn zoet n watẽ wã, naafa zugẽ, n zãag bilf ne naafã, n pek b nusi." 
Deuteronomy21:7 Dẽ poore b yeta woto: ‹D nug ka raag zɩɩm ye, d nif ka yãend zɩɩma raagd ye," 
Deuteronomy21:8 Soaala, kõ-y y buuda Israyɛl sugri la zãag-y tẽnga ne nin-sõng zɩɩm bolbo.› Yaa woto la buuda paamd zɩɩma raagra sugri." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Bɩ y gũus ne ned sẽn ka beeg zɩɩm daagre, modg-y n kẽn tɩrga Soaala taoore." 
Deuteronomy21:10 F sã n kẽng zabre tɩ Soaala rɩk f bɛɛbã n sagl f nugẽ tɩ f yõg-b n pag roogo," 
Deuteronomy21:11 la fo yãenda bãmb sʋka bi-pugl sẽn ta f yam tɩ f rat n kẽ kãadem ne-a," 
Deuteronomy21:12 f boond-a-la f zakẽ. A põngda a zugu, n wõrs a nug-yẽese," 
Deuteronomy21:13 a yeegda tãb-biisa sẽn yiis-a a ba zakẽ ne fut niynsã, la a paada f zakẽ. Kiuug tõre, a yãbda a ba la a ma. Dẽ poor marsã la f peegd-a t'a lebg f kãadem paga." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Sã n seg tɩ y yama yii ne taaba f basd-a lame t'a loog a yam. F ka tõe n koos-a n paam ligd ye, f ka tõe n zã-a toog ye, t'a yɩ-la f paga." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Rao sã n tar pagb a yiibu, n nong a ye n kis a ye, la b yiiba fãa roga a biiga, la yaa a sẽn ka nong pag ninga biiga n ya kẽema," 
Deuteronomy21:16 a sã n yet t'a na n welga a raboogo, a ka tõe n dɩk kãsengã n kõ a sẽn nong pag ninga biiga la yaool n ya a sẽn ka nong pag ning biiga la kãsem ye." 
Deuteronomy21:17 A tog n gesa a sẽn pa nong pag ninga biiga wa kãsma t'a pʋɩɩr yɩɩg a to wã rẽnd naoor a yiibu. Yẽ la pipi biiga, a reegda a kãsengã sẽn tog ne pʋɩɩr ninga." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Ned sã n tar a biiga t'a wa lebg kɩɩsa la tõtre, yẽ n ka kelgd a ba, n ka kelgd a ma, b sã n sagend-a," 
Deuteronomy21:19 bɩ a ba la a ma tall-a n wa tẽnga nin-kẽems taoor, tẽnga noore." 
Deuteronomy21:20 B na n yeela nin-kẽemsã: ‹Woto yaa tõnd biiga, a yaa kɩɩsa la tõtre, a ka kelgd tõndo, la a yaa rɩ-rɩt la rã-yũuda.›" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Tẽnga rãmb labd-a-la ne kug n kʋ. Woto f kõn bas wẽng f tẽngẽ n ka yiis-a ye. Israyɛl zãng na n wʋmame tɩ rabeem yõk-a. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Ned sã n maan wẽnga tɩ b tog n kʋ-a la yaa tɩɩg la b luul-a n kʋ," 
Deuteronomy21:23 b ka basd-a tɩɩga zug tɩ beoog vẽeg ye, b mumd-a la baraare; Wẽnd yãka sẽn luul-a fãa barka. Da saag n dẽgem tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-f tɩ f sooga ye." 
Deuteronomy22:1 F sã n yãend f to naaf bɩ a pesg sẽn meneme, da maan wa f ka yãend-a ye, legl-a n kɩs a soaba." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Rũnga soab sã n zãr, bɩ f sã n ka mi-a, kẽes rũngã f zakẽ t'a pa be n tãag a soaba sẽn wat n bolg-a. F na lebs-a a rũnga." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Maan boto ne a bõanga, ne a fuugu, ne a sẽn menes bũmb ning fãa, tɩ f yãende. Da maan wa f ka yãend ye." 
Deuteronomy22:4 F sã n yãend f to naaf bɩ a bõang sẽn pãs n lʋɩ sorẽ, da maan wa f ka yãend ye; tɩ sõng-a t'a yik-a." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Bɩ pag ra yeelg rao fuug ye, rao me ra yeelg pag fuug ye. Ned ning fãa sẽn maan woto maanda Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kisi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 F sã n kẽnd f sore n tees n yãend tɩɩg zug bɩ tẽnga, luiil tʋko, tɩ luiin-bi be a pʋgẽ, bɩ yaa luiil n wũg a gɛlẽ, bɩ a põgna a kamba, da saag n dɩk luiili wã ne b ma ye." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Fo basdame tɩ luiila loog tɩ f wʋk a kambã. Dẽ na n waa ne f sũ-noogo la f yõ-woko. 
Deuteronomy22:8 F sã n me ro-paalga, f na ning bɛonga zuga kogre: woto ned kõn yi yĩngr n lʋɩ n daag a zɩɩm n tʋk taal f zug ye." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Da kẽ f bugsuntung pʋgẽ n le bʋd bũmb a to ye, tɩ naag n dɩ f sẽn bʋde la f sẽn sel zĩ yɛng yaa kisgu." 
Deuteronomy22:10 F sã n kooda, da naag n sog wãg yɛnga naaf la bõang ye." 
Deuteronomy22:11 Da yeelg fuug sẽn wʋg ne rũng kõbdo la beren-dɩgr gĩs ye. 
Deuteronomy22:12 F sẽn tar fu-goabg ning n pinnẽ wã, da saag n ning zʋmba a noorẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy22:13 Rao sã n kẽ kãadem ne paga n wa yik n yet t'a pa le nong-a ye," 
Deuteronomy22:14 n wa yik n zabd ne-a t'a ka tar a meng neere, la a sãamd a yʋʋr n yetẽ: ‹Maam n dɩk pʋg kãnga n maan m paga la d sẽn waa n na n bãng taabã, m tẽed t'a ra zoe n sãamame.›" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Paga ba ne a ma wata tẽnga noore, la b kõta nin-kẽemsã kaseto, bʋʋda zĩigẽ, tɩ b biiga ra ka sãam ye." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Paga ba yeta nin-kẽemsa: ‹Yaa m biiga, m dɩk-a lame n kõ nin-kãnga t'a maan a paga la a pa le nong-a ye." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Dẽ marsã la a yik n sãbsd a vɩɩma n tãag n wilg-ma t'a mikame tɩ m biiga ra zoe n sãamame. La ad-m kaseto tɩ m biiga ra pa sãam pĩnd ye.› La b yɛdgda biiga kãadma fuugu tẽnga nin-kẽemsa nifẽ. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Dẽ wã nin-kẽemsa na n yõka paga sɩda n sɩbg-a. 
Deuteronomy22:19 B na n kɩtame t'a yao paga ba wanzurf wakɩ koeems koabga, t'a sãama Israyɛl bi-pugl yʋʋre. Paga na n yɩ-la a paga la a kõn tõog n dig-a n yiis abada." 
Deuteronomy22:20 La sã n sɩd mik tɩ yaa vẽenega tɩ paga ra sãamame," 
Deuteronomy22:21 b talld-a lame n taas a ba zak noore. Tẽnga rãmb labd-a-la ne kuga n kʋ, t'a sẽn maan yoob a ba zakẽ, a maana bũmb sẽn kis Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. Yiis wɩɩbd a woto buud f sʋka!" 
Deuteronomy22:22 B sã n ling yoaad ne pag sẽn tar sɩda, b kʋʋda b yiiba fãa, paga ne raoã. Yiis wɩɩbd a woto buud Israyɛl sʋka." 
Deuteronomy22:23 B sã n zoe n kãaba pa-kul sɩda tɩ ned a to seg-a tẽnga pʋg n sãam-a," 
Deuteronomy22:24 y talld-b la b yiib fãa n yiis tẽnga noore la y labd-b lame n kʋ. Y kʋʋda bi-puglã tɩ yella maama tẽnga sʋka la a pa kelem ye. Y kʋʋda raoã t'a kẽe ne a to paga. Yiis wẽng f sʋka. 
Deuteronomy22:25 Sã n yaa pʋtẽ la raoã seg pa-kul b sẽn pʋlem sɩda, n sãam-a, raoã bal la b kʋʋda." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Da maan pa-kula bũmb, t'a ka maan yel-wẽnd sẽn sek a kʋʋb ye. A ka bãng tiir ye. Yaa wa nin-kʋʋd sẽn yẽeg a soab n kʋ wã sẽn ka bãng tiirã." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Sẽn ya pʋtẽ wã la b seg taabã, tõe t'a sã n kelem me bɩ ned ka wa ye." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Rao sã n seg pa-kul sẽn nan ka rɩk n kõ sɩda t'a yõg-a tɩ b ling-ba," 
Deuteronomy22:29 raoã kɩta pa-kula ba wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-nu. A sẽn sãam-a wã, a na n lebga a paga la a ka tõe, abada, n wa rig-a n yiis ye." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Ned ka kẽed ne a ba pag ye. Ba sẽn so toore, biig rẽnd me toore." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Sẽn ka tõe n naag b taab Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ yaa zu-soaba. Ka get a zu-soabenda sã n tũu ne toosg bɩ ne barg ye. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Le paasa tãmpĩiri. Bãmb yagen-tʋbra-kẽes yagens kamba n wat n tõog n lagem b taab waoogra zĩigẽ. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Amonitga la Moabitga kõn tõog bada n poog Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ ye. Bãmb yagen-tʋbra-kẽes yagens kamb mens ka wat n tõog ye. 
Deuteronomy23:5 La rẽ ya b sẽn zãgs tɩ b kõn yi n seg-y sorẽ ne bur la koom y sẽn wa n yi Ezipt tẽnga. Sẽn ka tõe n naag b taaba Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ leb n yaa Moab neda, tɩ Moab tẽnga naab tɩ bõsa kãab beedo f yĩnga, baga, a Balaam, a Beor biiga. Nin-kãng ra kẽeda Petor sẽn be Aram kʋɩls a yiiba noorẽ." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Wẽnnaam f Soaala zãgsa a Balaam kelgre. Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, tedga a kãab beeda tɩ lebg kãab noodo, tɩ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, nong-f lame." 
Deuteronomy23:7 A bada ne a bada-bila, f kõn bao buud kãensa yell manegre la b sũ-noog ye." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Da rig Edomitg ye, yaa f saam-biiga; da rig Ezipt ned ye tɩ f yɩɩ sãan Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy23:9 B yagen-tʋbra-kẽes tõe n lagma yãmb waoogra zĩigẽ. 
Deuteronomy23:10 F sã n yi zabr ne f bɛɛba n wa vẽ f sika bɛɛba tẽngẽ, f na zãag f meng ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn tõe dẽgem-fo." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Wala yãmb tãb-biig a ye sã n dẽgem a meng a gãagẽ, a tog n yii sika poore, n pa be tɩ zĩig sobg-a." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Zaabre, a kẽngda kʋɩlgẽ n so koom; wĩndig sã n kẽ, yẽ tõeeme marsã n le wa sika pʋga." 
Deuteronomy23:13 F na bao zĩig kɛɛnga n kẽnd be n yolsd f menga. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Zɩ rao sɩlenga tɩ f sã n dõbend n yiki bɩ f tu n busi. 
Deuteronomy23:15 Bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam f Soaala meng n kẽnd n gilg f sikã n na n fãag-f ne f bɛɛba. F sika yaa sõngo, la Soaala ka tog n yãend bũmb be sẽn ningd-b yãnd ye. B kõn le pʋg f poor ye." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Yem-daoog sã n yi a zu-soab yiri n zoe n wa fo nengẽ, da tɩ lebs-a ye." 
Deuteronomy23:17 A na n paa ne foo, Israyɛl tẽng ning a sẽn yãk n na n zĩndi. Da rɩ a tʋʋm yõod zaalem n pa kõ-a bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy23:18 D da yãend Israyɛl kom-pugli wã sʋka yoob sẽn yood wẽn-naand yĩng ye. Boto me ne b kom-dibli. 
Deuteronomy23:19 Da saag n wa Wẽnd, f Soaala, roogẽ ne yamleoog kũuni sẽn ya pʋg-yoaad la ba-raoog ligd ye tɩ b yiiba fãa yaa Wẽnd sẽn kis wa fãa fãa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Da peng f saam-biiga n wa reeg roaglg n paas ye. Ligdi, rɩɩbo, sẽn yaa a soab fãa, da reeg bũmb n zʋʋg f sẽn kɩsa ye." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Sã n ya sãana, f tõe n peng-a lame n wa reeg roaglga. Sã n ya f saam-biiga, kisame. Woto la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n ning f tʋʋma fãa barka, tẽng ning f sẽn dabd n na n tɩ sooge." 
Deuteronomy23:22 F sã n pʋlem Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, bũmbu, da kaoos n pids f pʋleng ye. Ka rẽnna Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, wat n sok-f lame la rẽ ka tog ye." 
Deuteronomy23:23 F sã n yet tɩ f kõn pʋlem Wẽnd bũmb me, ka yel-wẽnd ye." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Modg bal n pids f sẽn yiis f noorẽ. Ka tũ ne moadg ye, pids-a wala f noora sẽn pʋlem Wẽnnaam, f Soaala." 
Deuteronomy23:25 F sã n kẽ f to bugsuntungẽ, f tõe n dɩɩ biisã, wala f sẽn dat tɛka. Fo ye n da zɩ n loog ye." 
Deuteronomy23:26 F sã n kẽ ned pʋʋgẽ, f tõe n kaoo ka-zuta ne nugu la ra saag n wʋr ne goeeg ye." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Rao sã n kẽ kãadem ne paga n wa yik n yeel t'a manesma ningd-a-la yãnde, t'a ka le get-a ne yamleoog ye, n tol n gʋls sebre n kõ-a t'a looge," 
Deuteronomy24:2 la paga loogame, n tɩ lebg ned a to paga." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Nin-kãng me sã n yik n yet t'a pa le nong-a, n gʋls welgr sebr n kɩs-a t'a looge, bɩ nin-kãng maana kaalem," 
Deuteronomy24:4 a pipi sɩda bãng t'a ka tõe n le reeg-a n maan a pag ye, t'a tʋka yell a zugu. Yaa bũmb Wẽnd sẽn kis wa fãa fãa. Gũus n da kẽes wẽng tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-fa ye." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Rao sã n kẽ kãadem paalem, a ka bobd zabr ye. B ka wat n kos-a tʋʋmd ye. A basda fãa n be a zakẽ, yʋʋmd tõre, n noog a pag sũuri." 
Deuteronomy24:6 F sã n ka tar ligd n na yao samde, samda soab ka tõe n deeg wa bobelle, f zom wɛrdga la f neer ye. Ka rẽ yaa f vɩɩma meng la a fãsg n looge." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Ned sã n yõk a saam-biig Israyɛl kamba sʋka n tall n looge, n tɩ nams-a bɩ n tɩ koos-a, nin-kãng toga ne kũum. Yiis wẽng a woto buud f sʋka." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Maan-y gũusgu, Israyɛl kamba, ne bãas niyns sẽn wẽnd yĩng bãaga. Reeg-y la y tũ maan-kʋʋdba, a Levi kamba, sẽn na n wilg yã. Deeg-y noy niyns fãa m sẽn kõ-bã." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Tẽeg-y Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn maan ne a Miriyam, y sora zug, Ezipt yiib wakato." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Fo sã n peng f to bũmbu, da kẽ a zakẽ n dɩk a bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Yaa yɩng la f yaasda, tɩ fo sẽn peng a soaba tall bũmbã n wa kõ-fo." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Fo sẽn peng a soaba sã n ya nimbãan-neda, da kẽ gãag ne a bũmb a sẽn bobl-f ye." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Wĩndig sã n wa kẽedẽ, wa lebs-a a bũmbu. A na gãand ne a fuugu la a na kãab-f noogo, la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, taoore fo me sõmblem na puki." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Naong soaba, ka neng soab, sã n tʋmd n deegd ligdi, a yaa f saam-biig bɩ sãan sẽn naag foo n kẽed tẽng a ye, da yao-a nimbãan-yaood ye." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Daar fãa ne a yaoodo, wĩndig ra kẽ tɩ f pa yao-a ye. A yaa naong soaba la yaa rẽ la a teeg yã. Da bas t'a kelem-f Wẽnd ye. A kelem yã, a ning-f-la taale." 
Deuteronomy24:16 B pa kʋʋd ba rãmb b kamb yĩng ye, b pa kʋʋd kamba b ba rãmb yĩng ye. B sã n kʋ neda, b kʋ-a-la a meng beegr yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Da wẽg sãan bɩ kɩɩb bil ye. Da reeg pʋg-kõor fuug ye. 
Deuteronomy24:18 F na tẽeg tɩ fo me yɩɩ yamb Ezipt tẽnga la yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, n fãag-fo. Rẽ me yĩng la m yet tɩ f reeg la f tũ noorã." 
Deuteronomy24:19 F sã tigsd f koodo, tɩ ka-zut kẽer dʋʋg n pa f pʋʋgẽ da lɛɛg n wʋgs-b ye. Bãmb la sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõor pʋɩɩre, la Soaala-Wẽnd na n tũ rẽ n ning f tʋʋma fãa barka." 
Deuteronomy24:20 F sã n pãb n sʋʋg f oliv, da le lɛɛg n wa yiis sẽn pa tɩɩga zug ye. Sẽn pa wã yaa sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõor dẽnna." 
Deuteronomy24:21 F sã n tõs f bugsuntungu, ra lɛɛg n wa yiis biisa ye. Sẽn pa wã yaa sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõor dẽnna." 
Deuteronomy24:22 F na tẽeg tɩ f me yɩɩ sãan Ezipt tẽnga. Dẽ me la m yet tɩ y reeg noor kãngã. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Neb sã n wẽed no-koeemd ne taaba, b kẽng bʋʋdo. Sẽn ka a bʋʋm kongda bʋʋm, sẽn tara bʋʋm deegda a bʋʋm." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Sẽn ka tara bʋʋma sã n tog ne pãbre, bʋ-kaooda kɩtdame tɩ b gãneg-a, yẽ taoore, n pãb-a n zems a beegra sẽn tog ne." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Pãbra yaa kaas pis-naase la ka loogd dẽ ye. Ka rẽ b tõe n wa pogl-a lame bɩ n wa mams-a ne rũnga. 
Deuteronomy25:4 Naaf sẽn tabd ki zɛɛgẽ noor ka ningd yʋk ye. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Ba-biis a yiib sã n kẽed zak a ye, t'a ye wa ki n ka rog biig ye, sẽn ki-a wã paga ka tõe n yɩ ned a to paga, sã n ka a sɩda rooga ned ye. A sɩda ba-biiga n peegd-a n maan a paga." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Pipi biigã, paga sẽn na n dogã, na n lebga kiida biiga t'a yʋʋr da menem Israyɛl ye." 
Deuteronomy25:7 La raoã sã n pa rat n kẽ ne a ba-biig paga, paga babsda nin-kẽemsã tẽnga noor n yeel-ba: ‹M sɩda ba-biiga zãgsame t'a kõn peeg maam n dog-biig n kõ m pipi sɩdã t'a yʋʋr da wa menem Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ ye.›" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Nin-kẽemsa boonda ba-biigã n sagl-a. Ba-biiga sã n yeele: ‹M ka rat n kẽ kãadem ne a ye,›" 
Deuteronomy25:9 nin-kẽemsa taoore, paga kolgda a sɩda ba-biiga, n zõond n pidg a neodr a ye la a tʋbs a nenga kolkoodo n yetẽ: ‹Yaa woto la b maan ne rao ninga sẽn pa rat n le yik a ba-biig raboogo!›" 
Deuteronomy25:10 A Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ marsã, b na n boola yẽ zaka t'a neood-yɛng zaka." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Ned ne a saam-biig sã n sog taaba tɩ bãmb nin-yend pag kolg n na n sõng a sɩda n gãd zabd-n-taaga kur-wĩiri," 
Deuteronomy25:12 b fiuugda paga nugu. B kõn zoe a nimbãaneg ye. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Da sui f korgẽ zɩslem magds a yiibu, bedre la bilfri n yaool n tar-ba n magd wa b zema taab ye." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Peta sẽn tar n magda me ra yɩ b yiib f zakẽ, bedre la bilfr ye." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Zɩslma magdsa ka paasde, ka woogde, petã me yalem la b zulum ka woogde, ka paasde. Woto me la f yõor na n yɩ wok Wẽnnaam f Soaala sẽn kẽesd-f tẽng ninga pʋgẽ." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ned ning fãa magb sẽn ka zemse, ned ning fãa sẽn maand zãmbo, yaa yẽ la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kis wa fãa fãa." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Tẽeg, Israyɛl, a Amalɛk sẽn maan-f bũmb ninga f sora zugu, f sẽn waa n yi Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Tẽeg tɩ yẽ n yi n yek-f sorẽ, f sẽn waa n yɛ zãng fas la f kiid kom, n kʋ f neb niyns fãa sẽn da pa poorẽ. Sɩda a ka zoe Soaala-Wẽnd nif ye." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Woto wã, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sã n wa kɩt tɩ f tɩlg ne f bɛɛba sɩ-lakre, n kõ-f vʋʋsem, f tẽngẽ, tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-f tɩ f soogã, f na yẽes Amalɛk rãmb yʋʋr saaga tẽngre. Da yĩm ye!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 F sã n wa kẽ tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-f tɩ f sooge, f sã n wa me be n kẽedẽ," 
Deuteronomy26:2 la tẽnga sã n wa wom a biisã, f na yãk Soaala pʋɩɩr f kood rẽemsa fãa pʋgẽ. F ningd-b-la peoog pʋga n tall n kẽng tẽng ning Wẽnnaam f Soaala sẽn yãk b waoogr zĩigã." 
Deuteronomy26:3 F tʋgd n yãenda maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn so-a tʋʋmda wakat kãngã la f na n yeel-a lame: ‹Dũnna m wilgda Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, tɩ m kẽe tẽng ning b sẽn da kãab d yaab rãmba tɩ b na n kõ-a-la tõndã.›" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Maan-kʋʋda reegda peoogã a nugẽ n dɩgl-a Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, maan-kugra taoore." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, taoore, f na n yeela woto: ‹M ba sɩnga gilung Aram tẽnga, n wa sig Ezipt tẽnga, beelẽ a vɩɩnda wa sãana ne a kamba sẽn da ya neb a wãn bala. Yaool n yaa be la a wa n lebg bu-yalengo la buud sẽn tar pãnga," 
Deuteronomy26:6 la Ezipt rãmba nams-d lame, n kẽes-d naongo, n kẽes-d yembd sẽn yɩ toaaga." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Dẽ me la tõnd kelem Wẽnde, d yaab rãmba Wẽnde la b wʋma d koɛɛga, b yãendame tɩ d lebga naong rãmba, nimbãan-dãmba la yemse." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Soaala wilga b nug pãnga, n wilg b kang keglem, n maan bõn-bãna, n tʋm tʋʋm bɛd sẽn wa ne yɛɛsgo n paam n yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy26:9 B sõng-d lame tɩ d ta ka, tɩ b kõ-d tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Deuteronomy26:10 La ade, Soaala, m wata ne y sẽn kõ-m tẽng ninga kood rẽemse.› F rɩgenda peoogã Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, taoore, la f wõgemde." 
Deuteronomy26:11 La Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn pids sũ-noogo, foo la f zak rãmba, f na kɩdem n lang ne Levitga la sãan sẽn be ne foo." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Yʋʋmd a tãab-tãab fãa yaa kooda la paoonga yãgsg yʋʋmde. F na pʋɩ f kooda fãa n yãk pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugu n kõ tẽnga Levitga, sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore tɩ b rɩ n tɩge," 
Deuteronomy26:13 ad-f sẽn na yeel bũmb ning f Soaala la f Wẽnnaam: ‹M pʋɩ-la m paoongo n yãk pʋɩɩr sõngã n kõ Levitga, sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore wala y sẽn wilg-ma zãnga, m deegame la m tũume." 
Deuteronomy26:14 M sẽn waa n dɩt m ned sẽn ki kʋʋre n pa yãk fɩ be ye, m sẽn wa n ya rẽgdo, ka paoong kãng pʋg la m kẽ n yãk n tũnug m kosg ye, ka be la m yãk wẽn-kosgo, ned sẽn ki yĩng ye. M kelga Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, koɛɛga, m deega b noora gilli." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Zĩnd-y yĩngr do-sõnga pʋga, zĩnd-y saasa zut n sudg y barka y biig a Israyɛl zugu la y sudg-a tẽng ning y sẽn kãab d yaab rãmba, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo.›" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Dũnna, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, kot-f lame tɩ f reeg la f tũ noorã la rog-n-mikã. Reeg-b la f tũ ne f sũur fãa, ne f yalẽ fãa." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Fo paama rũnna, Israyɛl, tɩ Soaala meng pʋlem tɩ b na yɩɩ f Wẽnde, f sã n maand b sẽn date, f sã n deegd b noya, n tũud sora la rog-n-mikã." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Soaala me kɩtame tɩ fo yiis f noorẽ dũnna tɩ fo lebga b buudu, b meng pʋɩɩre, wala b sẽn kãab-fo, la f na n deega b noya fãa." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Bãng tɩ sẽn ya woto wã, foo n na n zʋʋg buud a taaba fãa b sẽn naana, ne waoore, la yʋ-noogo la ziiri, foo n na n lebg buud b sẽn welg toore, b meng yĩnga, wala b sẽn kãabe.»" 
Deuteronomy27:1 A Moyiiz ne Israyɛl nin-kẽemsa kõo neba noor kãnga: «Reeg-y noy niyns fãa m sẽn wilgd-y rũnna wã. 
Deuteronomy27:2 Y sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga raare, n dʋʋg-a n tees tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn kõt yãmbã, y na wʋk kug bɛda n sel, n fẽ goore." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Gʋls-y b zutu, y sẽn dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga raare, noy niyns fãa m sẽn taas yãmbã. Woto y na tõog n kẽ tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn kõt yãmba, yaa tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo wala y ba rãmba Wẽnda sẽn kãab yãmba." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Y sã n wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, y na n sela kugã wala m sẽn wilg-y rũnna wã, Ebal tãng zugu. Fẽ-y kuga goore." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Me-y maan-kugr Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, yĩnga. Maan-kugra na n mee ne kug sẽn ka pees ne kut ye." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Yaa kug sẽn ka pees la y na n dɩk n me Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, maan-kugrã. Yaa maan-kugr kãng zug la y na n kʋ yũ-nooda maando, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy27:7 F na kʋʋ laafi kosg maando. F na rɩ ne sũ-noog Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taoore." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Gʋls-y noy kãensa goama kuga zutu. Rɩgl-y-b tɩ b karenga yɩ naana.» 
Deuteronomy27:9 A Moyiiz ne Levitsa sẽn ya maan-kʋʋdba le yeela a Israyɛl: «Sĩnd n kelge, Israyɛl, dũnna, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, welg-f-la toore b meng yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Bɩ f kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛga, n tũ b noya la f lak f meng ne b sẽn gɩdge, wala f sẽn le tẽeg rũnna wã.»" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Baraare, a Moyiiz yeela neba woto:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 «Ad neb niyns sẽn na n yaas Garizim tãnga zug n kãab neba kãab-noodo, b sã wa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ: a Simeõ, a Levi, a Zɩɩda, a Isakar, a Zozɛf la a Bẽnzame." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ad neb niyns sẽn na n yaas Ebal tãnga zug n kãab kãab-beedã: a Rubẽ, a Gad, a Asɛr, a Zabulõ, a Dã la a Neftali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Levitsa na n tãsa woto Israyɛl kambã: 
Deuteronomy27:15 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn na n pees wẽn-naand bɩ nin-naande n na n soos n waoog-a. Ninsaal nug tʋʋmde Wẽnnaam sẽn kis wa fãa fãa la rẽnda.› La neba fãa na n leokame: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:16 ‹Wẽnd na sãam sẽn sãbsd a ba la a ma!› La neba fãa leokdame: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:17 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn teemd a yak toaaga!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:18 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn kẽesda zoang moogo!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:19 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ninga fãa sẽn wẽgd sãana, kɩɩba la pʋg-kõore!› Tɩ neba fãa na n leoke: ‹Ami!›" 
Deuteronomy27:20 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn kẽ ne a ba paga t'a kẽeda a ba soolmẽ!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:21 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn wɩɩbda ne rũnga!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:22 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn kẽeda ne a tão, a ba biiga bɩ a ma biiga!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!›" 
Deuteronomy27:23 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ninga sẽn kẽeda ne a pag ma!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:24 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ninga sẽn soosd n pãbd a taaba!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:25 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning sẽn na n deega ligdi n tɩ wẽ n kʋ ned sẽn ka maan wẽnga!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!› 
Deuteronomy27:26 ‹Wẽnd na sãam ned ning sẽn na n kɩɩsa noy kãensa goama, sẽn na n tõdg b tũubu!› Tɩ neba fãa leoke: ‹Ami!›" 
Deuteronomy28:1 Fo sã n sɩd kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛga, n tũud noya m sẽn kõt foo rũnna wã, ad Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n kɩtame tɩ f yɩɩg buud a taaba fãa." 
Deuteronomy28:2 La ad bark ning sẽn na n sig f zugu, f sẽn kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛga yĩnga:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 Wẽnd bark na sig neb nins sẽn be b tẽngẽ bɩ b pʋt rotẽ! 
Deuteronomy28:4 Wẽnd na kõ-y kamba wʋsgo, n kõ-y kood zembala, Wẽnd bark na sig y pʋtẽ, y bãgrẽ, tɩ y niis la y piis ne y bʋʋs rogdẽ." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Wẽnd bark na pids y pet ne tɩɩs biisi, n pids y bur koglg ne buri," 
Deuteronomy28:6 Wẽnd ning f yiib la f kõom barka. 
Deuteronomy28:7 F bɛɛba sã n yik n teeg ne foo, bɩ Wẽnd yõg-b n sagl f nusẽ. B tũu so yɛng n na n wa tak zabr ne foo, la yaa soy a yopoe la b na n tũ n menem f taoore." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Wẽnd na n paalga b barka ne foo, ne f baoa la f tʋʋmd ning fãa f sẽn na n tʋme. Barka na pa ne foo, tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-fo." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Soaala na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg buud sẽn welg toor b yĩnga, wala b meng sẽn kãabe, la rẽ yaa f sã n deeg noya Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõt-fo, la f sã n tũ b soy wã." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Tẽnsa fãa na bãng tɩ Wẽnd barka sig-f lame la b na rig rabeem f taoore. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Bãng tɩ f na n paama sũ-noogo, f na n paama rogem wʋsgo, tẽng ninga pʋgẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãab f ba-rãmb tɩ b na kõ-fã. F rũms na n weka balbo, f pʋt na n pelga ne koodo." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Wẽnd na n yooga f yĩnga, b saasa ko-nina tɩ saaga rʋʋg f tẽngẽ wakat sẽn ta, tɩ f tʋʋm fãa zĩnd yõodo. F na paam tɩ sek f wa yãk n peng tẽns a taab sõor sẽn pa paood ye, la f kõn bõs tɩ b peng-f bũmb ye." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Soaala-Wẽnd na n lʋɩs-f-la taoore, f kõn pa poorẽ ye. B na n zẽka f yʋʋre, f kõn yãend paoor ye. La rẽ yaa f sã n kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, noya m sẽn yet tɩ f reeg rũnna la f tũ wã." 
Deuteronomy28:14 La rẽ yaa f sã n tũ soy niyns m sẽn wilgd-f rũnna n ka kɩll goabga, n ka kɩll rɩtgo la f ka yãend wẽn-faado n zoe n pʋg-b ye." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Fo sã n pa kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛga, n tũ b noya la f zãag f meng ne b sẽn gɩdge tɩ m wilgd-f rũnna, ad kãab beed niyns sẽn na n lʋɩ f zugu:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Wẽnd na sãam f zak la f pʋto! 
Deuteronomy28:17 Wẽnd na wõr f peoogo la bur koglgo! 
Deuteronomy28:18 Wẽnd na gɩdg f buud yalgre la f pʋta wombo! Wẽnd na sãam f niis la f piisi! 
Deuteronomy28:19 Wẽnd na sãam f yiib la f lebgre! 
Deuteronomy28:20 F sẽn na n sɩng tʋʋmd ning fãa Wẽnd na n yãag-f-la ne bʋko, ne yɛɛsgo tɩ far wa baas-fo, tɩ f wẽneg n menem. La rẽ yaa f sẽn tʋm wẽnga, n lak n bas maama yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Soaala na kɩt tɩ f bẽ bãaga, bãag sẽn na n yiis-f tẽng ning f sẽn dabd n na n tɩ kẽ n soogã." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Ad bãas niyns Soaala sẽn na n lobg-fo tɩ b wa sɛɛs-f zãngã: kɩbga, zu-zabre, pʋ-zabre, zãnkãda la solenkẽense. Sã n yaa f pʋtã na n yɩɩ wãoong la gãnem." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Yĩngri, saaga gãnema a neng wa wãre, tɩ tẽnga kʋɩɩs a meng wa kutu." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Sa-kooma zĩigẽ, yaa tompɛglem la wubsgu n na n dʋʋge. B na n tara rʋʋgre, tɩ fo wa menem zãnga." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Soaala na dɩk-f lame n sagl f bɛɛba nusẽ. So-yɛng la f neba na n yi n tɩ seg bɛɛbã, soy a yopoe n na n yɩ b zoees soy. Tẽns a taaba rãmb sã n yãend-fo b sũur na n yaalame." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Yĩngr luiili la we-rũms na n dɩ-la f yĩnga nemsã la b kõn yãend ned sẽn na n dig-b ye. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Ezipt yũya la a nod-tãodsã la y na n bẽ, n paas gɛnda la zagengo sẽn ka tõe n tɩp ye." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Soaala na n lob-f-la gãeemdo, zondo la zʋbsgo." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Wĩnto-sʋka f na n kẽnd n babendame wala yʋn-sʋk zoanga, f kõn yãend f sor ye. Neb n na n belg foom n sɛ f paoong zãnga la f kõn tol n yãend sõangd ye." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Fo sẽn bao bi-pugl ning n na n maan f pagã, ned a to n dengd foom a roogẽ. F sẽn me roog ning n na n kẽ wã, f kõn kẽe ye. F sẽn na n sel bugsuntung ningã, f kõn tõs b pipi biisa meng ye." 
Deuteronomy28:31 B na n kʋ-la f naaf f nifẽ la f kõn wãb a nemd ye. B na n looga ne f bõanga la f kõn le yãend-a ye. B na n wʋka f piisã n kõ bɛɛba la ned kõn waa n sõng-f ye. 
Deuteronomy28:32 Tẽns a taab rãmb n na n loog ne f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli, tɩ f nin wa raag ne b gẽegre, beoog sẽn vẽege, la f kõn le yãend-b ye." 
Deuteronomy28:33 F pʋta yõodo, f tʋʋma fãa yõodo, yaa neb n na n dɩ-a, neb fo sẽn ka mi n na n dɩ-a. Fo lebga ned b sẽn zɛɛde la sẽn zĩ ne sũ-toog bala." 
Deuteronomy28:34 F na yika gãeemdo: f sẽn tar sẽn dɩg f taoora gesgo la f sẽn tare. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ yũy sẽn zabd pus y rũma la y gɛ, yũy sẽn ka tõe n sãoog ye. B na n pusa y nao-sɩlpama n tãag y zug tẽnsʋka." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Yaa tẽn-zãoorgẽ, Israyɛl, tẽns foo ne f ba-rãmb sẽn zɩ n bãnge, la Soaala na tʋm foo ne dĩm ning f sẽn na n bao n kõ f mengã. F na tɩ waoog wẽn-naandse: raad la kug-peesem!" 
Deuteronomy28:37 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn na n tall-f n taas zĩig ning fãa, b na wẽ siri f poorẽ, f na lebg f bɛɛb baobgo la b laado." 
Deuteronomy28:38 F na n bʋda pʋt zembala la f kõn yãend kood ye tɩ sʋʋr na n looga ne zãnga. 
Deuteronomy28:39 F na n sela bugsuntundu n maneg-b tɩ ya sõmbo la f kõn tol n yũ b rãam, f kõn tol n yãend b biis meng n tõse, tɩ zũnzũur n na n dɩ zãnga." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Oliviye tɩɩs na n pida f tẽngã la f kõn paam kaam meng n zɛ f yĩng ye, tɩ b na n sʋʋga kãse." 
Deuteronomy28:41 F na n doga kom-dibli la kom-pugli la b kõn pa ne foo ye, tɩ b na n tall-b lame n kẽng yembdo." 
Deuteronomy28:42 F tɩɩsa la tẽnga sẽn wom fãa na n yɩɩ sʋ-warõng soolem. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Sãana sẽn naag foo n kẽed tẽn-yɛngã na n lʋɩ-la f taoore, tɩ fo tar poorẽ lebre." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Yẽ n na n yãe n peng foo, fo kõn tõog n peng-a bũmb ye. Yẽ zĩi taoore tɩ fo paad poorẽ zĩiga." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Kãab beed kãensa fãa na n lʋɩ-la f zugu, b na n pʋg-f lame tɩ f wa menem zãnga. La rẽ yaa f sẽn pa kelg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛga n gɩdg f meng ne b sẽn kisi la f reeg b noya b sẽn wilgi." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Dẽ n na yɩɩ wa saglgo, yãmb ne y kamba yĩnga, beoog sẽn wate." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Fo sẽn ka pʋg Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, ne sũ-noog la kɩdengo, f sẽn waa n tar f sẽn date," 
Deuteronomy28:48 f na yɩ sõgne, Wẽnd sẽn na n tʋm-f bɛɛb niynsa sõgne, la f na tɩg kom, ko-yũud, naong la far buud fãa. Wala nag koodre, f yubl na reeg toogo n tãag f loogre." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Wẽnd na n yiisa buud t'a wa zab ne fo. Yaa buud sẽn yi tẽn-zãoorgẽ, dũni wã sɛtmẽ, n tar pa-nand-tugr tʋʋlem la a pãnga, buud f sẽn pa wʋmd a goam ye," 
Deuteronomy28:50 buud sẽn ya toaaga, n ka mi nin-kẽem waoogre, n ka zoet bi-bilf nimbãaneg ye." 
Deuteronomy28:51 A na n dɩ-la f rũmsã, f koodã al tɩ f wa menem zãnga. A kõn kees bũmb f zɛɛgẽ ye, f rã-paalg rʋgdẽ ye, la f kaama sĩmbiẽ ye. A kõn kees nag-bil la pe-bil ye, n wa tãag f loogr zãnga." 
Deuteronomy28:52 A na n yẽd-f lame n pag-f f tẽngẽ, al tɩ lalsa wa rʋʋg zãnga, lals niyns sẽn gũbg f tẽngã n ya wogd-wogd, tɩ f sũur kegmẽ wã. Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõ-f tẽng ning tɩ f soogã la bɛɛba na n gũbg zãnga." 
Deuteronomy28:53 F bɛɛba sẽn wat n gũbg tẽngã n kẽes-f nimbãaneg ninga pʋgẽ, f na n wãba f sẽn doge, f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, sẽn kõ fooma." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Rao fãa sẽn vɩ f tẽn-peelmẽ, n yet t'a yãee gʋʋlgo sẽn pid gʋʋlgo, n yet t'a sɩlsa a ning-taaba wa pĩim al tɩ rat n kẽke, rao kãng na n mooga a nif ne a ba-biisi, ne a paga a sẽn nonge, ne a kamba sẽn keese," 
Deuteronomy28:55 a na n mooga a nif ne ba t'a pa rat n yãk n kõ, ba bilf menga, a kamba nemdã a sẽn na n wãb n pa kees bũmbã, bɛɛba sẽn gũbg tẽngã n kẽes-a nimbãaneg sẽn pid nimbãanega yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Pag fãa sẽn vɩ f tẽn-peelmẽ n yet t'a yãee gʋʋlgo sẽn gʋʋl n taase, n yet t'a mii ning-taaba sẽn dat bũmb ninga, pag sẽn ka saagd n bas a naoor tɩ sɩɩs tẽnga, a sẽn yet t'a yãee wubr sẽn pid wubri, t'a sɩlsa a ning-taaba wa pĩim al tɩ rat n kẽke, pʋg kãng na n mooga a nif ne a sɩda a sẽn nonge, ne a bi-ribl la a bi-pugla," 
Deuteronomy28:57 a na n mooga a nif ne a biig a sẽn doge, ne a kamb a sẽn yiis dũniya, tɩ bɛɛba sẽn gũbg tẽngã n kẽes-a nimbãaneg sẽn pid nimbãanegã, rɩɩb buud pa kees ye, t'a na n soos n wãb a kamba." 
Deuteronomy28:58 F sã n ka modg n tũ noorã wala a sẽn gʋls sebr kãnga pʋga, la f zoe Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, n zoe b yʋʋra sẽn yɛɛsd la sẽn kẽesd dabeem," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Soaala meng n na n sɩbg-fo, foo ne f buudu. B na n sɩbg-f-la ne sãmpoaga sẽn ka tẽng zug sãmpoag ye, sãmpoag sẽn kẽ pãafo, bãas sẽn zabd n ka maagdẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy28:60 B sẽn na n le wa buk f poor bãas niynsã, yaa Ezipt bã-wendã." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Bãas niynsi, sãmpoag niyns sẽn pa sõdg noor sebr kãnga pʋga, Soaala na n fẽeg-b-la yãmb gilli tɩ y wa menem moogo." 
Deuteronomy28:62 La yãmb sõora sẽn da ta yĩngr ãdsã, y na n keesa fĩyãayõo bala. La rẽ yaa y sẽn pa kelg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, koɛɛga." 
Deuteronomy28:63 La wala Soaala sẽn da nong n koll yã n dat tɩ y yɩ zembala la y pid ne sũ-noogo, b nongame marsã n sõng tɩ y menem, tɩ y sɛ zãnga, tɩ b võ-y wa tɩɩse tẽng ning y sẽn na n tɩ kẽ n soogã." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Soaala na n sẽeg-y-la tẽns a taaba pʋgẽ, dũni wã yaang n ta a taoore. Yaa wẽn-naands la y na n waooge: wẽn-naands foo ne f ba-rãmb sẽn ka mi, Israyɛl, bũmb sẽn pees ne raad la kuga." 
Deuteronomy28:65 B tẽnsa pʋga f kõn paam vʋʋsem ye, f kõn paam vẽenem sẽn sek f nao-pʋg tabgr ye. Soaala na n kõ-f-la sũur sẽn kiuusdi, nin sẽn suusdi, vɩɩm sẽn maage." 
Deuteronomy28:66 F vɩɩ wa f kiime, n digd rabeem wĩndig la yʋngo, n sãmbd f na ki, f na vɩɩnde." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Yibeoogo f na n yeela f menga: ‹M nongẽ lame tɩ zĩiga zoe n sobgẽ!› La f tata zaabr n maanẽ: ‹M nongẽ lame tɩ zĩiga zoe n yẽegẽ!› F sẽn ne bũmb ning n tar gesgã n na n kiuus f sũurã. 
Deuteronomy28:68 Soaala na n kẽes-f-la kogend pʋgẽ tɩ f leb Ezipt tẽnga la m da yeel-f lame: ‹F kõn le yãend tẽn-kãng bada?› Beelẽ fo meng f toore n na n koos f meng wa yem-daago la yem-poaka la f kõn paam daad ye!» 
Deuteronomy28:69 Yɩɩ woto la a Moyiiz yals a Israyɛl zĩigẽ tɩ zooda ne Wẽnda yõge, wala Soaala sẽn da rata. Zooda yõga Moab tẽn-peelmẽ la a yaa toor ne Oreb tãnga zug soabã. Gom bãmba la a Moyiiz yiis yã, a sẽn waa n deeg Wẽnd noor n yõg zood ne Israyɛl kamba, Moab tẽnga. Zood kãng yõg n paasa Oreb tãnga zug soabã." 
Deuteronomy29:1 A Moyiiz tigma Israyɛl kamba fãa n yeel-ba: «Y mens yãenda ne y nini Soaala sẽn maan Ezipt tẽng ne a dĩma la a sõgen-kamba la a tẽn-peelma gilli. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Y sɩd yãenda ne y nini bõn-bãna la makr-dãmb sẽn wa ne tẽn-kũum menga. 
Deuteronomy29:3 La sẽn tãag rũnna, Soaala ra nan pa kõ-y yam tɩ y reege, n ko-y nin tɩ y yãende, n kõ-y tʋb tɩ y kelg ye." 
Deuteronomy29:4 B kɩtame tɩ y gilim yʋʋm pis-naas zĩ-peen-daagẽ. Y fut pa ki ye, y neooda ka wur ye." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ka bur la y rɩ ye, ka rãam la rã-toos la y yũ ye; la yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ y yama puki tɩ y bãng tɩ bãmb la y Soaala la y Wẽnde." 
Deuteronomy29:6 D sẽn ta ka, Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ la Bazã dĩm a Og yi n segd-d lame n na n tak zabr ne-do, la d tõog-b lame." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Tõnd deega b tẽnsã n kõ a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase rooga bogre." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Tũ-y zooda noora sẽn sigl bũmb ningã tɩ y sẽn sɩng fãa na baas neere. 
Deuteronomy29:9 Yaa Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taoor la y fãa yɛs rũnna, yãmb ne y taoor dãmba, ne y sagsã, ne y nin-kẽemsã, ne bʋ-kaoodbã, ne y tãnsoaben-dãmbã," 
Deuteronomy29:10 ne y kamba, y pagba la sãamba sẽn nok yãmb n wesd y raad la b yõngd y kooma." 
Deuteronomy29:11 Y tigma ka n na yõg zoodã, ne Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, n na n wẽen n pidsi n paam n tɩlg kãab beeda sẽn naag n kãabã, la y rɩ b kãab noodã yõodo," 
Deuteronomy29:12 n lebg b buudu, tɩ b lebg y Wẽnd, wala b sẽn pʋlme la wala b sẽn kãab a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Zooda sẽn yõg tɩ kãab beed naag n kãabã, ka yõg ne yãmb bal ye," 
Deuteronomy29:14 a yõga ne ned ning fãa sẽn yɛs ka rũnna n vʋʋsd ne yõore, Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, taoore. Zooda yõgda ne d yagens niyns fãa sẽn nan wat beoogo." 
Deuteronomy29:15 Yãmb yẽ mii d vɩɩma sẽn yɩ a soab Ezipt tẽnga, la y yãenda y sẽn pɩʋʋg tẽns niynsã." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Y yãenda b yel-yoodã la b wẽn-naandsã b sẽn tarã: raado, kuga, wanzurf la sãnem." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Bɩ m da wʋm tɩ yãmb sʋka, raoa bɩ paga bɩ saka a ye neba n lak b yam ne Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, n na n tɩ waoog tẽn-bãmba wẽn-naandsa ye. Bɩ y ra bas tɩ yẽgend toaag wa tão y sʋka n tob a wila, zẽnem la a tɩɩsem wila." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ned sã n wʋm kãabdã n yet tɩ yẽ paama zu-noogo, t'a yɛla fãa na n baasa neere n yaool n ka lak ne a tʋʋm wẽna," 
Deuteronomy29:19 nin kãng bãng tɩ Wẽnd ka na n kõ-a sugr ye. B sẽn ka sak paoorã b sũura na wɩdga bugum n dɩ-a. Kãab beeda fãa sẽn gʋlsa na n mobg-a-la vugri tɩ Wẽnd yẽes a yʋʋr saaga tẽngre. 
Deuteronomy29:20 Soaala na n welg-a-la toore, Israyɛl kamba sʋka, la na n yɩ-la a bõne tɩ noora naaga ne kãab beed n gʋls n sele." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ad-y zamaan ning sẽn pʋgdã, ad-y yãmb kambã ne sãambã sẽn yi tẽn-zãoorgẽ, sã n wa yãend Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn pogl tẽnga to-to la b fẽeg-a bãase, b na n yeelame:" 
Deuteronomy29:22 ‹Ad-y tẽnga gill yaa kidibri, yamsem la bugum. Bʋdb ka bʋt ye, tɩɩg ka tobd ye, tɩɩg ka bund n yi ye. Yaa wala Sodom la Gomor, Adma la Seboyim, Wẽnd sũura sẽn fõd wa sob-raoogo n zũndug zãnga.›" 
Deuteronomy29:23 Tẽnsa taaba fãa na n naaga taaba n yeele: ‹Yaa bõe la Soaala maan tẽn-kãnga woto? Bõe tɩ b sũura puug woto fãa?› 
Deuteronomy29:24 La b na n yeelame: ‹Yaa b sẽn daag zoodã n bas tɩ sãama, Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, sẽn yõg zoodo ninga ne b yaab rãmba n sõng-b tɩ b yi Ezipt tẽnga." 
Deuteronomy29:25 B pʋga wẽnd-dãmb a taaba, n wõgemd n waoog-ba, wẽnd-dãmb b sẽn dag n ka mi ye; wẽnd-dãmb sẽn da ka b pʋɩɩr ye." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Yaa rẽ yĩng la Wẽnd puug b sũur ne tẽngã n bool a zugu kãab beed niyns fãa sẽn gʋls noora sebrẽ. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Wẽnd sũur puugame, Wẽnd sũur fõdame tɩ b yiis-b b tẽngẽ n lob-b tẽng a to wa d sẽn ne rũnna.›" 
Deuteronomy29:28 Soaala-Wẽnd bala n mi sẽn solge. La b sẽn ka solg tõnd me la woto: b sẽn puk tõnd ne d kamba yĩnga, zamaan tõt sɛɛb yĩnga, yaa b noya d sẽn tog n tũ wã." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Yɛl kãensa fãa m sẽn gom n wilg-y wã, kãab nooda la kãab beedã, fãa na n pidsame. La y Soaala, y Wẽnnaama, sã n wa sẽeg-y tẽn-zẽngẽ y yama na neke." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Y na lɛɛg n wa Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, nengẽ la y na kelg b koɛɛga, yãmb ne y kamba, y na n kelg-b ne y sũur fãa, ne y yalẽ fãa, y na n tũ m sẽn wilg rũnna wã fãa." 
Deuteronomy30:3 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na n teema b manesem, b na n wilga b nonglem, b sẽn sẽeg-y tẽns niynsa fãa, b na n kams-y lame n le tigim zĩ-yɛnga." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ba sã n da ya tẽnga sɛtme la b ra tall yãmb n looge, Soaala na le tɩ tall-y n wa naag y taaba." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na n tall-y lame n kẽes y ba-rãmb tẽngẽ tɩ y soog-a. B na kɩt tɩ y sũ-noog la y sõor yɩɩg y ba rãmb rẽnna." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Israyɛl, Soaala-Wẽnd na n kõo-foo ne f kamba sũ-paale tɩ f tõog n nong Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, ne f pãng fãa, ne f yalẽ fãa n paam yõ-woko." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Wẽnnaam na n pidsa b kãab beeda fãa ne bɛɛb niyns fãa sẽn na n yik n pʋg-b foo ne beema. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Fo yẽ na n maneg n le kelga Soaala koɛɛga la f na n tũu noy niyns fãa m sẽn kõt-f rũnna wã. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n kɩtame tɩ f yãend sũ-noog f tʋʋma fãa pʋgẽ. F rogem na n fɩɩgame, f rũms na n weka balbo, f pʋt na n zõonda ne koodo, tɩ f sũ-noogã n lebg bãmb rẽnna, wa f yaab rãmba wakatẽ." 
Deuteronomy30:10 La rẽ na n tõogame tɩ f na n kelga Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, koɛɛg la f reeg b noya, la f tũ b raabã sẽn gʋls noora sebrẽ, la f lɛɛg n wa pʋg-b ne f sũur fãa la f yalẽ wã fãa." 
Deuteronomy30:11 N-ye! M sẽn kõt foo noor ninga ka toog wʋsg ne foo ye, a ka loog f yaadma tɛk ye." 
Deuteronomy30:12 A ka be yĩngri tɩ f na n yeele: ‹Ãnda n na n dʋ yĩngr tõnd yĩnga n sik-a n kõ-do, n sõng tɩ d wʋm-a n tõog n tũ?›" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ka rʋʋgd mogr n tɩ seg-a, tɩ f na n wa yeele: ‹Ãnda n na n dʋʋg mogra tõnd yĩnga n gẽes-a n yãend la a wilg-d tɩ d tũ?›" 
Deuteronomy30:14 N-ye! Koɛɛga pẽe ne foo, a bee f noorẽ, a be f sũurẽ, tɩ f tõe n tũ." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Ade, dũnna m yalsda f taoore, vɩɩm la sũ-noogo, kũum la yel-beedo." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Maam n kõt-f noor dũnna, tɩ f nong f Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, tɩ f tũ b sore, n gɩdg f meng ne sẽn kisi la f reeg b noya la b rog-n-miki tɩ woto la d na vɩɩnd, n lebg zembala, tɩ Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, ning f barka tẽng ning f sẽn dabd n na n tɩ kẽ n soogã." 
Deuteronomy30:17 La f sũura sã n lak n bas maam, f sã n pa kelgde, f sã n bas tɩ b ta foo n dig wẽn-naands rotẽ tɩ f tɩ wõgemd b taoore n waoog-ba," 
Deuteronomy30:18 m wilgd-f-la rũnda bala, tɩ f na menem zãnga; f rasma na sõd koees-koeese, tẽng ninga pʋgẽ f sẽn dabd n na n tɩ soog Zʋrdẽ rʋʋndã." 
Deuteronomy30:19 M kaset dãmb a yiib taoore, saaga la tẽnga, la m kot-y tɩ y yãke, Israyɛl kamba: vɩɩm bɩ kũum, kãab noog bɩ kãab beedo. Yãk-y vɩɩm, yãmb ne y kamb yĩnga," 
Deuteronomy30:20 n nong Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, n kelgd b koɛɛg, n pʋgd-ba. Yaa woto la y na n vɩɩnd n kaoos tẽng ning Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn kãab tɩ b na n dɩk-a lame n kõ y yaab rãmba, a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob.»" 
Deuteronomy31:1 A Moyiiz goma ne Israyɛl kamba," 
Deuteronomy31:2 a yeel-b-la woto: «M tara yʋʋm koabg la pisi rũnna. M ka tõe n le tʋm m tʋʋmda ye la Soaala yeel-m lame: Fo kõn dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga sẽn tõnda ye. 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yaa Wẽnnaam y Soaala n na n lʋɩ y taoore la yaa bãmb n na n sɛɛs bɛɛba y taoore n deeg b tẽngã. Yaa a Zozuwe n na n yɩ y sɩleto, wala Wẽnd meng sẽn wilg yã." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Soaala na n maana ne Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd dãmbã, wala b sẽn maan ne a Siyõ la a Og, Amoritsa dĩm dãmba ne b tẽngã. B na n wã-b-la zãnga." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Soaala na dɩka Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd dãmba n sagl y nusẽ la y na n maana ne-ba wala m sẽn wilg-y. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Keng-y y sũuri, da bas-y raood ye, da rig-y b taoor ye. Yaa Wẽnnaam y Soaala n kẽnd y taoore. B ka na n bas-y ye, b ka na n zãag ne y ye.»" 
Deuteronomy31:7 A Moyiiz boola a Zozuwe n yeel-a, Israyɛl kamba fãa taoore: «Keng f sũuri, ra bas raood ye, tɩ yaa foo n na n kẽ tẽnga ne nin-bãmba, tẽng ning b sẽn kãab y yaab rãmba. Fo n na sõng tɩ b reeg tẽng sẽn ya b pʋɩɩre." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Yaa Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, n kẽnd f taoore, bãmb n na n pa ne foo, b pa na n bas-f ye; da zoe rabeem, da bas raood ye.»" 
Deuteronomy31:9 A Moyiiz gʋlsa noora sebrã n kõ maan-kʋʋdba, a Levi kamba sẽn tʋkd-b kuga walsa koglgã, n kõ Israyɛl nin-kẽembã." 
Deuteronomy31:10 A Moyiiz wilg-b-la woto: «Yʋʋm a yopoe sã n pidi, sama kiisga yʋʋmde, sẽgda kibs raare," 
Deuteronomy31:11 a Israyɛl zãng sẽn wat n tigim Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, taoore, b sẽn yãk tẽng ning tɩ ya b waoogr zĩigã, f na karem noorã a Israyɛl t'a kelge." 
Deuteronomy31:12 F na n tigma nebã, pagb la rapa, kom-bõonego, sãamb la sẽn nok-b yãmba. B na n wʋma Noorã, n zãms-a, n bãng n zoe Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, nifu, la b tũ sẽn gʋls fãa noora sebrẽ." 
Deuteronomy31:13 B kamba ka mi noorã la b na wʋm-a la b bãng n zoe Wẽnnaam nifu, b sẽn na n vɩɩnd wakat buud fãa tẽng ning b sẽn dabd n na n tɩ kẽ wã pʋgẽ, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde.»" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «Ad-f loogra raar kolgame. Bool a Zozuwe tɩ y kẽ sɛka roogẽ tɩ m kõ-y koɛɛga.» A Moyiiz ne a Zozuwe tɩ saka boolã, sɛka roogẽ." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Soaala-Wẽnd lika b meng sɛka roogẽ, sawad-taok pʋgẽ. Sawad-taoka da yɛsa sɛka roog noor." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «F na n tɩ saka f saam-dãmba tɩ f neba yõdg n maan wɩɩbdo n pʋg tẽns niyns b sẽn dabd n na n tɩ kẽ wã wẽn-naandse. B na n bas-m lame, zooda sẽn yõg ne bãmba na n sɛɛme." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Baraare m sũura na n wɩdga bugum. M me na n bas-b lame, m me na n solg-b-la m nenga, la bũmb na loog ne ba, yel-beed la yel-toodo. Baraar la b na n yeel-ma: ‹Yel-beed a woto sã n lʋɩ d zugu, ka d Wẽnda sẽn ka le be ne tõnda bɩ?›" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Baraare m na n kell n solga m nenga, b sẽn wɩɩb n bas maam la b pʋg wẽn-naandsa yĩnga." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Gʋls-y y mens yĩnga yɩɩn kãnga. Zãms-y yɩɩllã a Israyɛl kamba, b meng yiis b noorẽ tɩ taala bee bãmb zugu." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Sɩda m na n kẽesa nin-bãmba tẽn-noogẽ, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo wala m sẽn kãab b yaab rãmba. B na rɩ n tɩge, n nobe, la b wẽnemd n pʋg wẽn-naands, n waoog-ba, n paoog maam, n sãam m zoodã." 
Deuteronomy31:21 La yel-beeda la yel-tooda sã n wa pak-ba, yɩɩlla na wilg-b b kongra sẽn yɛsẽ, la yɩɩlla me kõn tol n yi b kamba pʋ-tẽerẽ ye. M zoe n ne b sẽn bilgd bũmb ning b yamẽ, ne b sẽn nan ka kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn kãab bã.»" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Yaa ra-kãng la a Moyiiz gʋls yɩɩn kãnga tɩ Israyɛl kamba wẽneg n zãms-a. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Soaala-Wẽnnaam kõ-la b noya a Nun biig a Zozuwe la b yeel-a-la woto: «Keng f sũuri, da bas raood ye, tɩ foom n na n kẽes Israyɛl kambã m sẽn kãab-b tẽng ningã la m na n zĩnda ne foo.»" 
Deuteronomy31:24 A Moyiiz sẽn gʋls noy bãmba zãng sebr pʋg n baase," 
Deuteronomy31:25 a yeela Levitsa sẽn tʋkd kuga walsa koglgo: 
Deuteronomy31:26 «Deeg-y noor sebr kãnga la y sagl-a kuga walsa koglg pʋga, kaset yĩnga. A na n sɩd yɩ y paalgr kaseto." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Mam mii y kɩɩsgã, n mi y zuga sẽn pa gõmsdã. Y sã n yɩ tõatb tɩ m ket n vɩ y sʋk ne yõore, bõe la y ka na n maan m loogr poore?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Tigim-y m taoore y kãsem-dãmba la y bʋ-kaoodba tɩ m tãs noora b tʋbẽ. M na n bõsa saaga la tẽnga tɩ b yɩ m kaseto. 
Deuteronomy31:29 M miime tɩ m loogr poore, y na n wegma zãnga n bas sor ning m sẽn wilgã n kẽ weoogo. Dẽ me la yel-beeda na n lʋɩ y zugu, tɩ y na n maana Soaala sẽn kisi n beeg-b ne y tʋʋm yoodã.»" 
Deuteronomy31:30 A Moyiiz tãsa yɩɩn kãnga Israyɛl kamba tʋbẽ. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Yĩngr dãmb yoog b tʋba tɩ m na n gomame, Tẽng zug rãmb kelg m sẽn na n togse" 
Deuteronomy32:2 M saglsa na n toka wa saaga, m goama na n dʋʋga wa meenem n madg wa sa-luk sẽn madgd pʋʋgo wa sa mina-mina sẽn bʋkd moogo." 
Deuteronomy32:3 M na n moona Soaala yʋʋre. Bãng-y tɩ bãmb n yɩɩd bũmb fãa. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Bãmb yaa Pĩiga, tɩ bɛɛb pɛɛm na n tĩni, b tʋʋma fãa tũuda sore. B noya ka yiis yaar ye. B sẽn kãab fãa na pidsi, la zãmb buud ka b nengẽ ye. B mii zemsgo, b bʋʋd kaooda tɩrse." 
Deuteronomy32:5 B sã n get yã, Israyɛl kamba, b neeme tɩ y sãama zãnga, y sẽn tar zʋg wẽng ningã y ka le wẽnd b kamb ye. Y sãamame n kẽ moogo." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Yaa bõe la y maan ne Soaala, zu-kaoolgo la yam ka yẽeg rãmba? Ka bãmb la y ba, n kõ-y vɩɩm laa? Bãmb n naan yãmba, bãmb n zĩndig-y tẽng zugu." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Tẽeg sẽn zĩnd pĩnda, tẽeg sẽn loog al yʋʋm ka tɛka, kos-y y ba, t'a le tẽeg yã, kos-y nin-kẽemsa tɩ b na togse:" 
Deuteronomy32:8 Sẽn dɩt-a naam yĩngrã sẽn waa n pʋɩt tẽnga Adem biisi, b kõo buud fãa a toaaga. B sẽn waa n welg Adem biisa toor toore, b yãka gũud yĩngr n kõ buud fãa," 
Deuteronomy32:9 b waa n keesa a Israyɛl b meng yĩnga, n kees a Zakoob wala b meng pʋɩɩre." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Yaa zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã la b seg taaba, zĩig sẽn pid ne we-rũms bʋʋre tɩ b sɩng n na n koll-a, n na wek a yam, n na n gũ-a wa nin-paok sẽn gũud nin-beelle." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Soaala wẽnega pa-nand-tugri sẽn yet a kamb tɩ b vẽ ne rabeem t'a meng yɛdga a pɩgsa zãnga n laand b zugu, n mii n wa põgend-ba a pɩgsẽ." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Soaala b yembr bal n wilgd-b sore wẽn-naand ka paas bãmb ye. 
Deuteronomy32:13 Soaala zombga a nebã tãmsa zutu, tɩ pʋta na n kõ-b b rɩɩbo, tɩ b nus na n leo sɩɩdo, pĩisa bogdẽ, tɩ oliv tɩɩg zao pĩiga n womd a biis sẽn na n wa lebg kaam." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Soaala n dɩlg-b ne niis bĩs-kaam, n dɩlg-b ne piis bĩisim, n dɩlg-b ne pe-bi wã nem-bʋgsa ne Bazã pe-raado la ne boees kaam, n dɩlg-b ne alkam zom bãanega, n yũnug-b ne bugsuntung rãam sẽn kũmi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Woto la a Yesurun, a tog ne kãsengo, paam n dɩ n nobe n yik n lebg tõata. - Fo sɩd nobame, n lebg bedre, n lebg taoko. A tog ne kãsengo basa a Wẽnd la a Naanda, a paooga a Teegda la a Fãagda." 
Deuteronomy32:16 B sẽn yãend sãamba wẽn-naandsã b mams-b la wa Soaala tũud-n-taase la b sãama Soaala sũur ne b manes yoodã. 
Deuteronomy32:17 B kʋʋ maand n kõ sẽn pa wẽnde, n kʋ maand n kõ sʋtãamba, n kõ wẽn-sãamse b sẽn pa mi, wẽnd dãmb sẽn yaool waoongo, tɩ b ba rãmb zɩ n dig rabeem b taoore." 
Deuteronomy32:18 F Pĩigã, f teegdã sẽn yiisa foo moogã, Israyɛl, fo pa tẽeg b yell ye; fo yĩma f Wẽnde, sẽn yiisa foo moogo." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Soaala sẽn yãend bũmb ninga yika b sũuri; f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli n yik n paoog-ba. 
Deuteronomy32:20 Dẽ la Soaala yeel yã: «M na n solg-b-la m nenga n ges-b sẽn na n lebg bũmb ninga. Yaa zamaan yoog kamba, ya kamb sẽn ka tar pʋga." 
Deuteronomy32:21 B yãenda sẽn pa wẽnde n baas n mams-a ne m tũud-n-taase; b beeg-m-la ne b wẽn-naandsã. Mam me na mams-b ne buud sẽn ka buudu. M na kɩt tɩ b bɛ yɩ buud sẽn yik gãeemdo. 
Deuteronomy32:22 M sũura waa n wɩdga bugum, bugum sẽn dɩ-ba n tãag bʋg-tẽng noore. Bug-kãng n dɩ tẽnga ne a koodo, bug-kãng n dɩ tãmsã n ka kees ye." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ad-y yaa yel-beed la m na n wʋk n sam-ba; bãmb la m na n yãag m tãpã n teese. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Koma sã n wa loog ne b pãnga zãnga, tɩ m sa-tãsa la m pɛɛma zẽnem pogl n baase, m na soos rũms toose tɩ b yĩ-ba, tɩ bõn-vuudi wã zẽnema sɛɛs-ba." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Yɩnga yaa sʋʋga n na n loog ne b kamb zãnga, roogẽ na n yɩɩ yɛɛsgo; bi-ribl ka põsd tɩ bi-pugla, bi-pɛɛlg na n naaga nin-kẽem n looge." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Maam n yeele, maam a Wẽnde: M datẽ lame n tõos-b wa fuugu, m datẽ lame n yẽes b yʋʋr moogo." 
Deuteronomy32:27 La bũmb n be, m zoeta b bɛɛba paoore, m zoeta b na n wa tudg n yeele: ‹Tõnd n tʋm daoodo, Soaala ka maan fɩ.›" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Bɛɛba geelsa fãa na n paa vɩɩdo, tɩ bãmb me pa tags ye." 
Deuteronomy32:29 B sã n da tagsẽ, b na bãngẽ vẽenega; b na maanẽ gũusg ne sẽn wat beoogo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Nin-yend yɩta a wãn n wa rigd neb tusri tɩ neb a yiib bal na n sẽeg tus piiga, sã n ka b Teegdã n lɛɛg n koos-b ne b bɛɛba, sã n ka Soaala meng n dɩk-b n sagl b nusẽ?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 B yaool n ka na n yɩ bɛɛba Sõangda wa b sẽn ya tõnd Sõangda ye. La b mens mi rẽnna. La rẽ yɩɩ vẽenega b fãa nifẽ. 
Deuteronomy32:32 A Israyɛl bɛɛba miime tɩ b ka são Sodom dãmba, la b ka são Gomor dãmb ye, fãa yaa bugsuntund sẽn ka tar noosem, b bugsuntunga biis sẽn ya zẽnem, b sib-gĩna yaa tɩsense." 
Deuteronomy32:33 B rãama yaa zẽnem, põeer zẽnem, rãama yaa wag-bãnd dẽnna." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Ad maam b Wẽnnaam soos n segenda bũmb b yĩnga," 
Deuteronomy32:35 M na n zab n doka sũuri, ned kam fãa na n paama a rolbo. B naoor sẽn na n lak raare, (la b zu-bʋka raar zoe n pẽnegame,) b lʋɩɩsa raar kõn le kaoos n wa ye.»" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Soaala na n yalsa b buuda poore, b na n yãba b kambã tɩ b lebga wa neb sẽn koms n dɩga n ka le tar teegda, n ka le tar sõangda." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Wakat kãng la b na n sok-ba: «Y wẽn-naandsa bɛɛ, y pĩigã, y soondga zĩig bɛɛ?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Sẽn da yʋbd-b y maanda kaama bɛɛ? Sẽn da yũud-b y rãama bɛɛ? Bãmb kõn yik n n wa sõng yã, bãmb kõn yãend zĩig n kõ-y tɩ b soonde." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Ges-y la y reege, ad-y yaa maam bal n tõe n fãage. Wẽnd a to ka paas ye, yaa maam la maam m ye tãa, wẽnd sãang ka wa naag ye, maam n kʋʋd la m vʋʋgdẽ, sẽn kaooge, maam n lebd n tonge, b kõn fãsg bũmb m nugẽ ye." 
Deuteronomy32:40 M zẽka m nug n tees saaga la ad-m sẽn yete: maam la Wẽnd rũnna la beoogo! 
Deuteronomy32:41 M sã n saas m sʋʋga t'a yãgda, m sã n moon m bʋʋda raare, m na rok m sũur ne m bɛɛba; sẽn kis b maama na reeg b sɩbgre." 
Deuteronomy32:42 M na n yũnuga m pɛɛma, n yũnug-b ne zɩɩm tɩ b gãeeme, m na n tɩgsa m sʋʋga ne nemdo. Bɛɛba tãb-biig ba a ye kõn põs ye, sẽn yõg b rãmba wa sẽn pogl b rãmba.»" 
Deuteronomy32:43 Adem biisi, pẽg-y Wẽnd buudã Wẽnd sɩbga sẽn daag b kamba zɩɩm, Wẽnd doka b sũur ne b bɛɛba; B buuda na n paama sugri b buuda na n zĩnda b tẽngẽ ne bãane." 
Deuteronomy32:44 A Nun biig a Osea yãaga a Moyiiz t'a wa wilg zãma wã yɩɩn kãnga goama fãa. 
Deuteronomy32:45 A Moyiiz sẽn togs a Israyɛl goam kãensa n sɛ," 
Deuteronomy32:46 a yeel-b lame: «Deeg-y ne y sũuri m goama fãa. M goma woto n yiis taal m zugu. Zãms-y y kamba tɩ b modg n tũ noora gilli. 
Deuteronomy32:47 Goama ka goam sẽn ka tar yõod y yĩng ye. Yaa y vɩɩm goama, bãmb bal n tõe tɩ y yõor yɩ wok tẽng ning y sẽn na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n soogã.»" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Baraar bala Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: 
Deuteronomy32:49 «Dʋ Abarim tãmsa sẽn tong n dabdã, dʋ Nebo tãnga sẽn be Moab, Zeriko yegende la ges Kanaã tẽng m sẽn kõt a Israyɛl t'a sooge." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Tãnga zug la f na n maan kaalem, be la f na n sak f ba rãmba, wala f kẽema Aarõ sẽn maan kaalem Or tãnga, n tɩ sak a ba rãmba." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Y ka kõ-m kaset ning m sẽn da rat tɩ y kõ-ma, Israyɛl kamba sʋk ye. Kadɛs Meriba kʋɩlsẽ, Sin we-raoogẽ, y ka puk m sõmblema zãng Israyɛl kamba sʋk ye." 
Deuteronomy32:52 F na n yãenda tẽng ning m sẽn na n kõ a Israyɛl sẽn yɛdg f taoore la f kõn kẽ a pʋgẽ ye.» 
Deuteronomy33:1 Woto la a Moyiiz, Wẽnnaam neda, ning Israyɛl kamba barka n yaool n na n tɩ sak a saam-dãmba." 
Deuteronomy33:2 A yeelame: Soaala yii Sinayi, wala wĩndga, b puka Seyir sẽnẽ, Parã tãnga zugu, b yãnga b vẽenem n tees b buudu b waa n siga b neba sʋka, sẽn yãagd-b yaa kõn-bãng-n-sõde; b Noora sebr la b ra zãada, sebra ra yãgda ne neerem." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Soaala nonga a Israyɛl, Soaala kogenda b buudu, la b buuda me tigma b sɛɛgẽ n na n deeg b saglse." 
Deuteronomy33:4 A Moyiiz sẽn kõ noor ningã, a Zakoob yagensa sãnem la rẽnna, a Israyɛl arzɛk la rẽnna." 
Deuteronomy33:5 A-tog-ne-kãsengo reega a Soaala, bãmb la a neba yi n na n sege, a rĩm-biis wala a talse." 
Deuteronomy33:6 A Moyiiz barka yɩɩ woto: Wẽnd na kaoos a Rubẽ, a kõn ki ye; Wẽnd na yalg a rooga sẽn ka zem fɩ wã." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Zɩɩda yĩnga: Soaala, kelg yã a Zɩɩda koɛɛga, sõng-y t'a kamba le wʋm taaba. B yikame la b wɩsga b menga, Sõng-y-b tɩ rig b bɛɛba." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Levi yĩnga: Soaala, a Levi kamba zãada b nusẽ y sẽn dat tɩ b sok-y ne tentees ninsã n bãng y leokra yaa n-yẽ bɩ ayoo, la yaa bãmb la y sẽn fɛɛs Masa, bãmb yɛs la y sẽn fɛɛs Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ad-y b wilgame tɩ b nonga yãmba n yɩɩd b pagb la b kamba, n yɩɩd b saam-biisi, n yɩɩd b roagdba; dẽ me la b reeg y noore, n ka sak zooda sãoong ye." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bãmb n zãmsd a Zakoob y rog-n-mikã n zãmsd y noya a Israyɛl, bãmb n kʋʋd yũ-nooga maoong bãmb n wat ne kũuna maan-kugra zugu." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Soaala, paas-y a Levi sũ-keelma, ning-y bark a nus tʋʋma fãa, kao-y yã a zabd-n-taasa sĩ, zõneg-y yã a bɛɛba po-raoogo." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ad-a Moyiiz sẽn yeel a Bẽnzame poorẽ: Yẽ la Soaala bi-nongre n zĩ n pemsd ne laafi t'a sẽn teeg a soaba gũud-a-la raar fãa, la a vʋʋsda a bãgd zugu." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Zozɛf: Wẽnd na ning a soolma barka! A paam saase, Wẽnd kũun sõngã, n paam ko-bunem," 
Deuteronomy33:14 n paam wĩndga sẽn bɩɩsd bũmb fãa, n paam kiuug fãa sẽn wat ne a soaba, a wakato;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 n paam tãmsa sẽn kõt bũmb ningã, n paam kunkuba sẽn pʋɩt bũmb ningã," 
Deuteronomy33:16 n paam bõn-sõng fãa tẽnga sẽn womde, n paam tuuga sẽn wit bugma soab zoodo. Dẽ fãa yɩ a naam zug-peoogo, dẽ fãa yɩ a rĩir fan teedo, Soaala sẽn welg a soab toorã fan teedo." 
Deuteronomy33:17 A paam barka t'a yaa loalg sẽn tar pãnga a yɩɩla yaa we-naaf yɩɩla, bãmb la a tar n tãada, n tãad yaang la nin-taoore, goabg la rɩtg rãmba. Ad-a Efrayim tãb-biis sẽn tonge ad-a Manase rẽnd sẽn ka tõe n sõde." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ad-a Moyiiz sẽn yeel a Zabulõ poorẽ, n yeel a Isakar poorẽ: Noog f sũuri Zabulõ, f sã n tond f tolbo, la foo, Isakar noog f sũur f gãagẽ." 
Deuteronomy33:19 B tigimda buuda tãnga zugu n na n kʋ b waoogr maando. Bãmb n vuud mogra yõodo bãmb n so laoga sẽn bus bĩisrẽ. 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Gad poorẽ: Sẽn sõnga a Gad t'a zãad fãa wã paam barka! A wũunda wa bõnyẽega, n yĩid a rũng bãoko, n wekd a rũng zugu." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yẽ n yɩ pipi n deeg a pʋɩɩre, la yaa pʋɩɩr sẽn tog ne dĩma la a ra rata. A lʋɩ buuda taoore n zab wa Wẽnd sẽn sagl-a la Wẽnd pidsa b sẽn kaool fãa ne a Israyɛl." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ad-a Moyiiz sẽn yeel a Dã poorẽ: A Dã yaa bõnyẽ-bila, la yaa Bazã la a sigd n watẽ." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Neftali poorẽ: B pidsa a Neftali ne kũuni, Wẽnnaam pids-a-la ne bark buud fãa; a soog nin-taoore la nug rɩtgo." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Asɛr poorẽ: Bɩ a Asɛr paam barka n yɩɩg a taaba, a pʋɩɩr zʋʋg a taab rẽnna, bɩ a nao mad ne tɩgr kaam;" 
Deuteronomy33:25 t'a kʋɩlens sog ne kutu, t'a pa a zakẽ ne laafi n tãag a loogre!" 
Deuteronomy33:26 Ad-a Moyiiz sẽn le paase: Ned ka be n wẽnd Wẽnnaam ye, n sõngd foo wa bãmb ye, Tog-ne-kãsengo. B zao saasa la sawatã n wat f sõngre ne b pãnga." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Sẽn yaa Wẽnd dũnna la beoogã la f na n soonde, b nug tara b tʋʋm n ka mi vʋʋsg ye, f bɛɛba la b rigd f taoore la b yetame: ki-y zãnga!" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Dẽ me la a Israyɛl zĩ t'a sũur pa kiuusdẽ ye. A Zakoob kʋɩlga naoor teesa toore, a teesa alkam la rã-paalg tẽnga, yĩngr meenema sẽn da zoe n bʋkd tẽng ningã." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Foo la zu-noog soaba, Israyɛl! Soaala sẽn sõngd b buudã, ãnda n wẽnd foo? Bãmb gãong n ligind f bɛɛba pɛɛm, bãmb sʋʋg n kõt foom f pãnga. F bɛɛba rat bɩ b wags taab ne sudum f naoor na tabg b tẽnsa sẽn zao yĩngrã." 
Deuteronomy34:1 A Moyiiz yii Moab pʋ-weesẽ n tees Nebo tãnga, n ta Pisga zug tẽnsʋka. Tãn-kãng tota ne Zeriko la Soaala-Wẽnd wilg-a-la tẽnga zãnga, n sɩng Galaad n ta Dã." 
Deuteronomy34:2 B wilg-a-la Neftali, n wilg-a Efrayim la a Manase tẽnse, a Zɩɩda soolma fãa n ta Tẽnsʋk mogre." 
Deuteronomy34:3 B wilg-a la Negɛb ne a sagsã, Zeriko bãg-faaga ne a komsã n ta Soar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Soaala yeela a Moyiiz: «Yaa woto la tẽng ning m sẽn kãab a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob. Tẽn-kãnga poorẽ la m da yeel-ba tɩ b loogr poore, b kamb n na n sooge. Tẽn-kãng la m wilg-f tɩ f ges ne f nini, la f naoor yaool n kõn tab-a ye.»" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Yaa be la Wẽnd sõgen, a Moyiiz, ki yã, Moab tẽn-peelmẽ wala Wẽnd sẽn da yeele." 
Deuteronomy34:6 B mum-a-la Moab bãg-faagẽ, Bɛt-Peor yegende, la ba ne rũnna b ka bãng a yaooga zĩig meng taki ye." 
Deuteronomy34:7 A kũuma wakat t'a Moyiiz tara yʋʋm koabg la pisi. A nina ra ket n neeme, a pãng ra ka woog ye." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Dasem pis-tã tõre, Israyɛl kamba yãba a Moyiiz Moab pʋ-weesẽ." 
Deuteronomy34:9 A Nun biig a Zozuwe ra pida ne yam sõngo. A Moyiiz ra tẽega a nus a zugu. Woto Israyɛl kamba kelg-a lame la b tũu Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. 
Deuteronomy34:10 Israyɛl ka leb n yãend a kamba sʋka, bãngd wala a Moyiiz ye; yẽ ne Wẽnd ra sõsda ne taaba, n ne taaba." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Ya yẽnda la Soaala ra tʋm Ezipt tẽnga t'a tɩ berg bõn-bãna la yel-beed sẽn yɩkd pɛlẽnse, dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmb taoore." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Yaa a Israyɛl nifẽ la a Moyiiz da wilgd a nug pãnga, la a bõn-bãna ra yɛɛsda wʋsgo." 
Joshua1:1 Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz loogr poore, Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne a rakõor a ye, a Nun biiga, a Zozuwe, n yeel-a:" 
Joshua1:2 «M tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz loogame, yik marsã tɩ wakat yaa n taame n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ, foo ne nin-bãmba, n paam n ta tẽng ninga m sẽn kõt a Israyɛl buudu." 
Joshua1:3 Y nao sẽn na n tabg zĩig ning fãa lebgda yãmb soolem wa m sẽn da kãab a Moyiiz. 
Joshua1:4 Y tẽnga toaag yaa We-raoogã la Libã sẽn dɩg y taoorã n digd Efrat kʋɩl-kãsenga, yaang sẽnẽ, n tãagd Mog Kãsengã, wĩndga sẽn lʋɩtẽ." 
Joshua1:5 F na tol n ki tɩ ned pa tõog-f ye. Wala m sẽn pa ne a Moyiiz, m na maan boto me ne foom, m kõn zãag m meng ne foom ye. M kõn bas-f ye." 
Joshua1:6 Keng f sũuri, wɩsg f menga. Yaa foo n na n pʋɩ m nebã tẽng ning m sẽn kãab b yaab rãmbã." 
Joshua1:7 N-ye! Wɩsg-f menga, keng f sũuri, la tũ neere Noor ning m sẽn kõ m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz. Da kɩll goabga, da kɩll dɩtgo, tɩ woto f sẽn sɩng fãa na baas neere." 
Joshua1:8 Bɩ m Noora sebr da zãag ne f ye, a goama biis pa f no-gãnnẽ. Walem-a f noorẽ, wĩndig la yʋngo, n wa tõog n tũ-a zãnga. F sã n maan boto la f tʋʋma na tũ rẽ n baas neere." 
Joshua1:9 Ka maam n yeel foom: wɩsg f meng la f keng f sũuri bɩ? Dẽ yĩnga da bʋ ye, da zoe rabeem ye, tɩ f sẽn dabd zĩig ning fãa, Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na zĩnd f sɛɛgẽ.»" 
Joshua1:10 A Zozuwe yeela taoor dãmba woto: 
Joshua1:11 «Saag-y sika tõre n wilg nebã tɩ b segl dɩɩbo tɩ ka ne rasem a tã y na n dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga sẽn tõndã n tɩ soog tẽng ning y Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn kõt yã.» 
Joshua1:12 A Zozuwe yaool n yeela a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase bogrã:" 
Joshua1:13 «Tẽeg-y Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz sẽn kõ yãmb noor ningã: ade Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, taas-y-la y vʋʋsg zĩigẽ. B kõo yãmb tẽn-kãngã." 
Joshua1:14 Y pagba, y kom-bõonego; y rũmsa na n paa tẽng ning a Moyiiz sẽn kõ yãmb Zʋrdẽ kɩrẽng kãnga. Sã n ya rapa sẽn tõe n tak zabrã, bãmb fãa na n lʋɩɩ b saam-biisa taoore, b me sõng-ba." 
Joshua1:15 Y na n maana woto n ta wakat ning Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn na n kõ y saam-biisa a taaba vʋʋsg tẽnga wala y sẽn paama. Yãmb me na yaool marsã n lɛɛg n wa y soolmẽ. Y na lɛɛg n wa Zʋrdẽ kɩrẽng kãnga wala a Moyiiz sẽn kõ yãmbã.» 
Joshua1:16 B leoka a Zozuwe: «D na maan f sẽn yet tɩ d maan fãa, fo sẽn yet tɩ d kẽng zĩig ning fãa, d na kẽnge." 
Joshua1:17 Wala d sẽn sak a Moyiiz, bũmba fãa pʋgẽ, woto d na sak foom me. N-ye! Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, na n zĩnda ne foo wala b sẽn zĩnd ne a Moyiiz." 
Joshua1:18 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n kɩɩs f gomde, ned ning fãa sẽn na n tõdg f noore, sẽn ya noor ning fãa la f kõ yã, a soab bãng t'a na ki. Fo ye n wɩsg f menga la f keng f sũuri.»" 
Joshua2:1 A Nun biig, a Zozuwe, yiisa neb a yi Sitim tẽnga n tʋm-ba tɩ b tɩ soos n bãng tẽnga pʋg la a yɩnga. Woto la a yeel-ba: «Kẽng-y n tɩ kaag-y Zeriko tẽnga n wa togs ma a sẽn ya-la.» B kẽngame la yaa pʋg-yoodr a ye yir la b sig yã. Paga ra boondame t'a Raab. A Raab zakẽ la b yõg gãag-soabendo." 
Joshua2:2 La neb n bʋʋg Zeriko dĩma n togs-a woto: «Ad-y Israyɛl dãmb n wa ka yʋngẽ n dat n tɩg tẽnga yalẽ.» 
Joshua2:3 Dẽ la dĩma tʋm tɩ b yeel a Raab: «Yiis neb niyns sẽn sig-b fooma. Neb niyns sẽn wa-b fo yirã, ad-b waame n na n bãng d tẽnga sẽn ya-la.»" 
Joshua2:4 Bãng-y tɩ paga bao zĩiga n solg neb a yiibã n yaool n yeele: «Yaa sɩda, neb a yiib n sɩd wa ka la m ka mi b sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Joshua2:5 La zĩig sẽn waa n sobgdẽ tɩ b pagd tẽnga noor kʋɩlensã, neba yiime la m ka ges b sẽn teesẽ ye. Zoe-y n pʋg-y-b tao-tao, tɩ y ket n tõe n paam-b lame.»" 
Joshua2:6 Mik a ra kɩtame tɩ b rʋ gaosga zugu t'a wʋk a beren-dɩga sẽn da tigim be n lud-ba, gaosga zugu." 
Joshua2:7 Dĩma neba yi-la b pʋgbo, Zʋrdẽ sẽnega, kooma sẽn tõe n dʋʋg zĩig ningã, la b sẽn yi, kʋɩlensã wẽneg n pagame." 
Joshua2:8 Neb a yiiba ka paam n sɩng gãag ye; la a Raab bʋʋg-b-la gaosga zugu," 
Joshua2:9 n yeel-ba: «M miime tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka tẽng kãnga n sagl y nusẽ, m miime tɩ d fãa yɛɛsame la tẽnga fãa rigda y taoore." 
Joshua2:10 D bãngame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kʋɩɩsa Rudum Mogrã y sẽn wa n yit Ezipt tẽnga. D wʋma y sẽn maan bũmb ning, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde ne Amoritsa dĩm dãmb a yiibã, a Siyõ la a Og, n kãab-b beedo." 
Joshua2:11 D wʋma rẽ fãa tɩ d pɛlẽng yɩke, ned kam fãa vʋʋsem tulugda a yãoogẽ, tɩ Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama, n ya Wẽnd, yĩngr, saag zugu, la kaalẽ, tẽng zugu." 
Joshua2:12 La mam sẽn deeg yãmb neerã, wẽen-y ne y Wẽnnaama la y kõ-m kaseto tɩ y me na maan neere, maam ne m ba wã zak rãmba." 
Joshua2:13 Kõ-y-m kaset vẽenega tɩ y na bas ne yõore, m ba la m ma, m yaop la m kẽem dãmba; bãmb ne b sẽn so fãa na paam n põs kũum.»" 
Joshua2:14 Dẽ la neb a yiibã leok-a: «Ad-d toga ne kũum d sã n ka yao foom f yel-sõmdã, la dẽn tɩ yãmb me tõog y noore n da wɩdg d sẽn waa n na n maan a soaba ye. Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa bas tẽngã d nugẽ, d na maan pʋ-peelem ne foo la d kõn zã foo ne f buuda toog ye.»" 
Joshua2:15 A Raab bao wĩir tɩ neb a yiibã tũ võore n looge, t'a rooga ra mee n dogla lal-gũbrã." 
Joshua2:16 A reng n yeel-b lame: «Yaa tãmsa sẽnẽ la y tog kẽng n paam n põs y bɛɛbã. Pa-y be rasem a tã tɩ sẽn yi-b yãmb baobã paam n lɛɛg n wa tɩ y yaool n le rɩk y sore.» 
Joshua2:17 Neba leok-a lame: «Fo kɩtame tɩ tõnd wẽene n kãab f bũmbu. Bãng tɩ tõnd kãabga na n pidsame la ad-fo me sẽn na n maanega: 
Joshua2:18 Fo sã n wa yãe tɩ d poogd tẽngã, ad makr ning d sẽn tog n yãende: Ad gĩs miuugu, dɩka n yagle tõnd sẽn tũud võor ning n sigdã la tigim do-kãng pʋga f ba, f ma, f tãopa la f buuda fãa." 
Joshua2:19 Ned ninga fãa sẽn ka paa rooga pʋga, sẽn saaga n yi yɩnga, na rɩ a zɩɩm daagr taale, dẽ ka pak tõnd ye. Ned sã n pa roogẽ wã ne foom tɩ b baas n sɩɩs-a, ad-a zɩɩma sã n daage tõnd n deegd a taale n dogl d zugu." 
Joshua2:20 Fo sã n wɩdg ned a to bũmb ning sẽn wa ne tõnd ka wã, ad tõnd sẽn kãaba fãa me kõn le yals ye.»" 
Joshua2:21 Paga leokame: «Bɩ yɩ boto!» La a bas-b lame tɩ b yi n looge. A loe gĩs miuugã a rooga võore. 
Joshua2:22 Lɩɩsdba tũ tãnga sẽnẽ b paa be rasem a tãabo tɩ sẽn yi-b bãmb baobã wa lɛɛg n kẽ. Baoodba vɛɛsa sora zãnga n pa yãend-b ye. 
Joshua2:23 Lɩɩsdba yaool n sigame n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã n leb a Nun biig, a Zozuwe, nengẽ. B togsa a Zozuwe b sẽn yãend fãa."
