Joshua2:24 B yeela a Zozuwe: «Soaala-Wẽnd basa tẽnsa fãa d nugẽ la ad-a Israyɛl poorẽ, neba rigda rabeem wʋsgo.»" 
Joshua3:1 Yaa tõd-beoog la a Zozuwe yik ne Israyɛl kamba n yi Sitim n ta Zʋrdẽ la yaa kʋɩlga noor la b wẽ b sikã n gãand n gũ beoog vẽegre, n yaool n dʋʋg-a." 
Joshua3:2 Da-yɩten-daar pʋgẽ, taoor dãmba saaga sikã," 
Joshua3:3 n yeel nebã: «Y sã n wa yãend maan-kʋʋdbã, a Levi kamba, tɩ b tʋk b bãgdẽ, kuga walsa koglgã, bɩ y me yik n pʋg-ba." 
Joshua3:4 Gũus-y bal n bas yãmb ne koglga sʋka, vɩʋʋg sẽn ta kãntɩɩs tus a yiibu. Da pẽneg-y tɩ yɩɩg rẽ ye. Woto me la y bãngd sor ning, y sẽn na n tũ tɩ y zɩ n dɩk sora ye.»" 
Joshua3:5 A Zozuwe yeela nebã: «Yɩlg-y mens beoog yĩnga, tɩ beoogo Naaba-Wẽnd na n maana bõn-bãna y nifẽ.»" 
Joshua3:6 A yaool n yeela maan-kʋʋdbã: «Tʋk-y kuga walsa koglgã, n lʋɩ y neba taoore.» La b sɩd tʋka kuga walsa koglgã n lʋɩ neba taoore." 
Joshua3:7 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Dũnna bala m na kɩt tɩ f yʋʋra sɩng yiibu Israyɛl sʋka tɩ b bãng tɩ m bee ne foo wala m sẽn zĩnd ne a Moyiiz. 
Joshua3:8 Ad noor ning f sẽn na n kõ maan-kʋʋdba sẽn tʋk kuga walsa koglgã: ‹Y sã n wa ta Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga bɩ y yaase.› » 
Joshua3:9 A Zozuwe yeela Israyɛl kambã: «Kolg-y n kelg Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, koɛɛga." 
Joshua3:10 Ad bũmb ning sẽn na n kɩt tɩ y bãng tɩ Wẽnnaam, y Soaalã, n be yãmb sʋka n na n pĩng y taoore Kanaã rãmba, Ititse, Ivitse, Perizitse, Zirgazitse, Amoritse la Zebuzitse." 
Joshua3:11 Dũni Soaala zooda kaseto, kuga walsa koglg, n na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga yãmb taoore." 
Joshua3:12 Bao-y neb piig la a yiibu: sak fãa pʋgẽ yaa nin-yend la y yãkda. 
Joshua3:13 Yaa maan-kʋʋdb n zɩt kuga wala koglgo; ad-y bãmb naoor sã n tabg Zʋrdẽ kooma, kooma na n welga a yiibu. Kooma sẽn zoet n watẽ wã na n yaasa wa lalga.»" 
Joshua3:14 Neba sɩd yikame n na n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã la maan-kʋʋdba n da be taoore n zɩt kuga walsa koglgã. 
Joshua3:15 Tigsg wakato Zʋrdẽ kooma da gãndgda a koagsã. Kuga walsa koglga zɩtba sẽn ta kʋɩlgã, b nao sẽn sɩɩs kooma," 
Joshua3:16 ad-y kooma sẽn da zoetã yalsa zĩig pʋgẽ n lebg wa bõn-taoko, n lebg wa lalg woto, n zãag zĩiga, n ta al Adam tẽnga sẽn yegd Sartã. Koom ninga sẽn digd Yamsem Mogrã pasgame n yals tɩ neba rʋʋg, Zeriko yegende." 
Joshua3:17 Kuga walsa koglga zɩtba yalsa soa, kʋɩlga sẽn kʋɩ wã sʋka, tɩ Israyɛl kamb fãa looge. Bãmb me dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã tɩ koom ka tol n madg b nao ye." 
Joshua4:1 Neba fãa sẽn dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, n sɛ, Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe:" 
Joshua4:2 «Yãk neb piig la a yiibu, sak fãa yaa nin-yemde," 
Joshua4:3 n yeel-ba: ‹Yiis-y Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga pʋga, maan-kʋʋdba nao sẽn yals zĩig ningã, yiis-y kug piig la a yiibu n tall-ba n ta y sẽn na n sig zĩig ning yʋngã.› »" 
Joshua4:4 A Zozuwe yeela neb piig la a yiibã b sẽn da yãke, sak fãa nin-yendã:" 
Joshua4:5 «Loog-y kuga walsa koglga taoore n ta kʋɩlga sʋka la ned kam fãa tʋk kugr a bãokẽ, kug piig la a yi n zems a Israyɛl sagsa sõore." 
Joshua4:6 Kuga na n yɩɩ tẽegre y yĩnga. Daar a ye y kamba wat n sok-y lame: ‹Kug bãmba makda bõe yãmb yĩnga?› 
Joshua4:7 Y na yeel-ba: ‹Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga koom pasga a yi, kuga walsa koglg sẽn ta Zʋrdẽ. Kug bãmba n kõt a Israyɛl kaseto sẽn ka tõe n menem abada.› »" 
Joshua4:8 Neba tũu a Zozuwe noore. B sẽn teeb kug piig la a yiibã, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga pʋga, sak fãa ne a kugri, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Zozuwe, b tall-b lame n ta b gãaga zĩigẽ n dɩgl-b be." 
Joshua4:9 A Zozuwe meng kɩtame tɩ b bao kug piig la a yiibu n ges kʋɩlga tẽnsʋka, koglga zɩtba sẽn yals zĩig ningã, n sel-ba la b keta ne rũnna." 
Joshua4:10 Maan-kʋʋdba yalsa kʋɩlga tẽnsʋka ne kuga walsa koglgo. B yalsa boto tɩ bũmba fãa wa pids, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel a Zozuwe t'a togs neba, wala a Moyiiz meng sẽn da zoe n wilg a Zozuwe. Yɩɩ ne yãgbo marsã la neba rʋʋg kʋɩlgã." 
Joshua4:11 Nebã n dʋʋg zãnga tɩ koglga zɩtba yaool n dʋʋge. Maan-kʋʋdba n da le kẽnd neba taoore. 
Joshua4:12 Yɩ-la a Rubẽ kamba, a Gad la a Manase bogre sẽn da bob zabre wala a Moyiiz sẽn da kõ-b noorã, n deng kʋɩlga rʋʋgre tɩ sẽn ket-ba yaool n pʋge." 
Joshua4:13 Tãb-biisa sõor da taa tus pis-naase. B boba zabr Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n tees Zeriko pʋ-weese. 
Joshua4:14 Baraare Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame t'a Zozuwe yʋʋr yi Israyɛl kamb sʋka la b zoe-la a rabeem wala sẽn yɩ ne a Moyiiz a vɩɩma pʋgẽ. 
Joshua4:15 Dẽ marsã la Naaba-Wẽnd yeel a Zozuwe: 
Joshua4:16 «Kõ maan-kʋʋdba sẽn zɩt-b kuga walsa koglgã tɩ b me rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã.» 
Joshua4:17 T'a Zozuwe sɩd yeel maan-kʋʋdbã: «Rʋʋg-y kʋɩlgã.» 
Joshua4:18 Sẽn zɩt-b kuga walsa koglg sẽn sɩng rʋʋgre, b naoor sẽn gãndg kʋɩlga kogrã la kooma sẽn wẽneg n pid kʋɩl-waokã n daannẽ wala pĩnda." 
Joshua4:19 Yɩɩ pipi kiuugã piig raare la Israyɛl dʋʋg kʋɩlgã. A ti-la a sik Gilgal, Zeriko yaanga." 
Joshua4:20 Yaa Gilgal la a Zozuwe kɩt tɩ b sel kug piig la a yiibã b sẽn da yiis kʋɩlga pʋga. 
Joshua4:21 A yaool n yeela Israyɛl kamba: «Y kamba sã n wa yik beoog raar n sok b ba rãmba: ‹Kug bãmba yaa bõe kuga?› 
Joshua4:22 Y na wilg-b woto: ‹A Israyɛl dʋʋga kʋɩlgã t'a nao ka mad ye," 
Joshua4:23 tɩ Soaala-Wẽnnaam, kʋɩɩsa kʋɩlga koom yãmb taoore, tɩ y fãa tõog n looge wala b sẽn da maan ne Rudum Mogre, b ra Kʋɩɩsa yẽnda me tɩ tõnd paam n loog zãnga." 
Joshua4:24 Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ dũni ninsaalba reege tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd nug zɩsa la yãmb me zoe-y Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama, nifu, beoog sẽn vẽege.› »" 
Joshua5:1 Amoritsa dĩm dãmba sẽn be b Zʋrdẽ nin-taoore la Kanaã dĩm dãmb sẽn be Mog Kãsenga noore wʋmame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kʋɩɩsa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga Israyɛl kamba taoore n tãag b fãa gill sẽn waa n dʋʋge. Ad-y b sũura digemdame la b vʋʋsma tulgame. 
Joshua5:2 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe wakat kãnga: «Saas kug-peel paklse tɩ b noora rɩt wa sʋʋga n le sɩng Israyɛl kamba bãong kẽesgo.» 
Joshua5:3 A Zozuwe sɩd saasa kug paklse wa sʋʋse n kẽes Israyɛl kamba bãongo, tãn-bil a ye zugu sẽn boond marsã tɩ keoog tãnga." 
Joshua5:4 Ad sẽn tũ ne bũmb ninga t'a Zozuwe wa kẽesd bãongo: Ezipt yiib poore, dapa fãa sẽn da sek-b zabr takre da kẽe bãongo la bãmb fãa ra kii we-raoogẽ." 
Joshua5:5 Yaool n yaa bãmb bala n da paam n kẽ bãongo. Kamb niyns fãa sẽn dog we-raoogẽ wã, Ezipt yiiba poore, n sɩng kẽna, da ka paam n kẽ bãong ye." 
Joshua5:6 Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas tõre la a Israyɛl ra kẽn we-raoogẽ la neb niyns sẽn da tõe n tak zabra fãa ra kiime. B sẽn ki wã, yaa b sẽn pa kelg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga. Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd kãab-b tɩ b nif kõn teeg tẽng ninga b sẽn da kãab b ba-rãmbã, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo." 
Joshua5:7 Yaa bãmb kamba n deeg b zĩiga. Yaa kom-bãmb la a Zozuwe kẽes bãongo. Kẽna sẽn da sɩng tɛka b ra ka le yãend vɩʋʋgo n kõog keoog ye. 
Joshua5:8 Bãongã sẽn kẽ n sɛ, buuda paa sika pʋgẽ n vʋʋse n tãag b ko-noog soobo." 
Joshua5:9 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Dũnna m dɩka Ezipt rẽgdã n gil-gil-a n lob yɩɩga.» Yaa rẽ yĩng la tẽnga boond tɩ Gilgal n tol n tãag rũnna. 
Joshua5:10 Israyɛl kamba paa Gilgal la b maana tẽegra kibsa, kiuuga piig la a naas raare, zĩ-sobdo, Zeriko tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Joshua5:11 Kibsa yɩ tɩ zaamẽ, bur sẽn ka lob bɩlle la ka-sẽedma wãbr daare, b naagame n dɩ tẽnga koodo." 
Joshua5:12 Dɩɩb ninga sẽn da yita yĩngrã ka le rʋʋg ye tɩ b paama tẽnga kood n dɩtẽ. Yĩngr dɩɩbã me sẽn ka le rʋʋgã, Israyɛl kamba me sɩnga, yʋʋmd kãnga, n dɩt Kanaã tẽnga sẽn da womd bũmb ninga." 
Joshua5:13 A Zozuwe da paam n pẽnega Zeriko tẽnga. A sẽn zẽk a neng yĩngri, a yãee Soaala-Wẽnd na-yir dao sẽn yɛs a taoore ne sʋ-sẽenga. A Zozuwe kolgame n sok-a: «Fo kẽeda tõnd bɩ f kẽeda d bɛɛbã?»" 
Joshua5:14 Neda leokame: «M pa kẽed y bɛɛba ye, m yaa Soaala-Wẽnd Tãnsoaba, dẽ la m waoonga võore.» A Zozuwe lʋɩ-la a yãvabga n pʋʋse la a soke: «Yaa koe-bʋg la m zu-soaba wat n na n kõ-ma?»" 
Joshua5:15 Soaala-Wẽnd Tãnsoaba yeelame: «Pidg f neooda tɩ zĩig ninga fo sẽn yɛsa yaa zĩ-sõngo.» T'a Zozuwe na n piid a neooda. 
Joshua6:1 Israyɛl kamba yĩnga, Zeriko kʋɩlensa sẽn da pag la b sẽn page. Ned da ka le kẽede, ned da ka le yita." 
Joshua6:2 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Gese, m basda f nugẽ, Zeriko ne a dĩma la a gãndaadã." 
Joshua6:3 Yãmb zab-zabdba fãa, sẽn tar b zabr sũur fãa, y na n gilga tẽngã n sege la beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, y na n maana boto n ta rasem a yoobe." 
Joshua6:4 Maan-kʋʋdba a yopoe n na n lʋɩ zood kasetã, kuga walsa koglga, taoore ne bard a yopoe. Daar a yopoe soaba, y na n gilga tẽnga naoor a yopoe la wakat kãnga, maan-kʋʋdba na n peeba b bardã sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla." 
Joshua6:5 Baorga sã n peeb raaga n kaoose, tɩ y wʋme, bɩ neba fãa naag taaba n wẽ b zabr nobɩnga. Tẽnga lal-gũbrã na n wẽneg n lʋɩɩme. Ned kam fãa teesda a taoore n tak zabre.»" 
Joshua6:6 A Nun biig a Zozuwe, boola maan-kʋʋdbã n yeel-ba: «Tʋk-y kuga walsa koglgo la neb a yopoe lʋɩ taoor ne bard sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla.»" 
Joshua6:7 A Zozuwe yeela zãma wã: «Sɩng-y tẽnga gilgri. Tãb-biis niyns sẽn tog n lʋɩ taoora n na n lʋɩ kuga walsa koglga taoore.» 
Joshua6:8 Neba tũ-la a Zozuwe noore. Maan-kʋʋdba a yopoe wã n lʋɩ kuga walsa koglgo, zood kaseta, taoore, ne b bardo sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla; b kẽndame la b peebdẽ. Bãmb la zood kasetã, kuga walsa koglga, zɩtba ra pʋgda." 
Joshua6:9 Tãb-biis la b ra ning bard pɛɛdba taoore. La tãb-biis me n da pʋgd kuga walsa koglga zɩtba, la fãa ra tara kẽna, tɩ barda tar peebgo." 
Joshua6:10 Yaa woto la a Zozuwe ra togs zãma wã: «Sã n ya nebã, bas-y bʋʋre, ra sak-y tɩ b wʋm y rãamd ye: gom beel meng da yi y noorẽ n ta daar ninga m sẽn na n yeel yã: ‹Tãs-y y zabr tãsga.› Wakat kãnga y na maan bʋʋre.»" 
Joshua6:11 A Zozuwe kɩtame tɩ b yi ne zood kasetã, kuga walsa koglgã, n gilg tẽnga vugri n le lɛɛg n kẽ sikã n gũud beoogo." 
Joshua6:12 Tõd-beoog pĩnda, a Zozuwe kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋdba tʋk kuga walsa koglgã." 
Joshua6:13 Maan-kʋʋdb a yopoe wã sẽn da kẽnd ne bard a yopoe kuga walsa koglga taoorã, le sɩnga kẽn la b peebd b bardo sẽn maan ne pe-raad yɩɩla. B ra ninga tãb-biis kãens taoore, n ning tãb-biis me kaseta zɩtba poore, la fãa ra tongame n kẽnd tɩ barda peebdẽ." 
Joshua6:14 Daar a yiib soaba b le gilga tẽnga vugri n le lɛɛg n kẽ sikã, la b maana woto dasem a yoob tõre." 
Joshua6:15 Dasem a yopoe soaba, b yika pĩnda n sɩng gilgri wa rasem-kam la b gilga naoor a yopoe. Yaool n yɩɩ ba raar bal la b gilg naoor a yopoe." 
Joshua6:16 Gilgr a yopoe soaba sẽn gilg n sɛ, la barda rãmb sẽn peebe t'a Zozuwe yeel b fãa: «Tãs-y y zabr tãsga tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd basa tẽngã y nugẽ." 
Joshua6:17 Y na n dɩka tẽnga ne a pʋgẽ teed fãa n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. Pʋg-yoodr a Raab ne a zaka rãmb bala n na n põse, t'a Raab solga d sẽn da tʋm b rãmbã." 
Joshua6:18 Maan-y gũusg ne kisgã; da belg-y y menga n sɩɩs sẽn dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye, ka rẽ kãab wẽnga na n leb-y lame, yãmb ne y sikã, n tak wẽng n kõ a Israyɛl gilli." 
Joshua6:19 Wanzurf, sãnem, zũudu la kutu, fãa lebga Soaala-Wẽnd soolem, fãa rɩkdame n paas Soaala-Wẽnd arzɛka.»" 
Joshua6:20 Zãma wã kelmame, bardã peebame. Zãma wã wʋma bardã n kelem b zabr kɛlenga sẽn yɩ kɛleng menga al tɩ tẽnga lal-gũbri lʋɩ a menga toore. Ned kam fãa teesa a taoore n kẽ tẽnga la bũmb ka põs ye." 
Joshua6:21 B reega Wẽnd n so-zãnga noore, la woto, sẽn da be-b tẽnga pʋgẽ fãa, b kood-b la gilli: rapa, pagba, nin-kẽemse, kom-bõonego, niisi, piisi, bõeense." 
Joshua6:22 A Zozuwe reng n yeela lɩɩsdb a yiibã: «Kẽng-y yã a Raab yira, n tɩ yiis-a ne a nebã wala y sẽn da kãabe.»" 
Joshua6:23 Bi-bɩɩs a yiiba kẽngame n yiis a Raab ne a a ba la a ma, a tãopa la sẽn da be zaka pʋg fãa. B yiisa a Raab buuda neba n bao zĩ-sõng sika noorẽ n bĩng-b be." 
Joshua6:24 Tẽnga ne a teed fãa dɩɩ bugum, sã n ka wanzurf, sãnem, zũudu la kutu b sẽn tall n tɩ ning Soaala-Wẽnd doogẽ." 
Joshua6:25 A Zozuwe basa a Raab, pʋ-yoodrã, ne a ba wã zaka la a sẽn so fãa. A buud kell n paa Israyɛl sʋka n ta rũnna. La rẽ yɩ-la a sẽn solg a Zozuwe sẽn tʋm b rãmb tɩ b wa kaag Zeriko wã." 
Joshua6:26 A Zozuwe wa n kɩtame tɩ neba wẽen woto Soaala-Wẽnd taoore: «Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn na n tʋlga n le yik tẽn-kãnga lalse. Meeba sɩngr daare a bi-kẽeng yaoog la b na n tuki, a kʋɩlensa pagb daare nugẽ biiga yaoog la b na n page.»" 
Joshua6:27 Soaala-Wẽnd paa ne a Zozuwe la a yʋʋra sãda beelẽ baobga fãa. 
Joshua7:1 Israyɛl kamba tõdgame n dɩk bũmb dɩkr sẽn lebg kisgu. A Akã n dɩk sẽn kisã tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puugi ne Israyɛl kamba. A Akã yaa a Karmi biiga, t'a Karmi ba yaa a Zabdi, t'a Zabdi yaa a Zera biiga, a Zɩɩda roogẽ." 
Joshua7:2 A Zozuwe zĩnda Zeriko n tʋm neb Ayi tẽnga sẽn be Betɛl yaanga. A yeel-b lame: «Kẽng-y n tɩ bãng tẽngã.» B kẽngame n tɩ bãng Ayi. 
Joshua7:3 B sẽn lɛɛg n wa b yeela a Zozuwe: «Ka modgre tɩ neba fãa kẽng n tɩ tak zabr ye. Neb tus a tã bɩ a naas bal tõe n sekame. Ka modgre tɩ neba fãa nams n kẽng ye, Ayi rãmb sõora paooda wʋsgo.»" 
Joshua7:4 Dɩlla yɩɩ sẽn zems neb tus a tã n kẽng Ayi la b zoe Ayi neba taoore n lɛɛg n wa. 
Joshua7:5 Ayi rãmba tol n paama neb pis-tã la a yoobe n kʋ, n dig sẽn kell-bã, al tẽnga noorẽ kʋɩlense, n ta Sebarim. Yaa b sẽn wa n lɛɛg n sigdã la Ayi rãmb kʋ-ba. Israyɛl kamba wʋmame tɩ b sũur bondg zãnga." 
Joshua7:6 Sũ-sãang kɩtame t'a Zozuwe kẽes a futu la a lʋɩ-la a yãvabg, kuga walsa koglga taoore, n pa be tɩ wĩndig wa kẽ. Nin-kẽemba me maana wa yẽnda; b fãa wʋka tom n yug b zutu." 
Joshua7:7 A Zozuwe ra yetame: «Kato, Soaala-Wẽnde, bõe yĩng la yãmb bas y nebã tɩ b rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n na n lʋɩ Amoritsa nugẽ, n ki? Tõnd n kos n na n kẽe Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd bɩ?" 
Joshua7:8 Maan-y sugri, Soaala-Wẽnde, m yetame tɩ bõe marsã, t'a Israyɛl ning tĩig a bɛɛba taoore?" 
Joshua7:9 Kanaã rãmba la b yagse na wʋmame, b na n sũu taaba n tak zabr ne do la b na n menesa d yʋʋr tẽng zugu. Bõe la y na n maan n le maneg y yʋʋra sẽn tog ne pẽgr kãsengã, Soaala?»" 
Joshua7:10 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel a Zozuwe: «Yiki, bõe tɩ f kɩ f neng tẽng woto?" 
Joshua7:11 Ad-a Israyɛl n maan wẽnga n sãam m zoodã. N-ye! Bũmb rɩkr sẽn kis la b rɩk yã, bũmb la b zuk yã n solg b teedẽ wã." 
Joshua7:12 A Israyɛl kõn tõog a bɛɛba ye, a na n lɛɛg n zoeeme tɩ yẽ meng rɩka sẽn kis rɩkre, la m kõn le zĩnd ne yã, y meng sã n ka yiis kisga sẽn be y sʋka ye." 
Joshua7:13 Yiki, Zozuwe, yɩlg f neba. F na n yeelame: ‹Yɩlg-y mens beoog yĩnga tɩ Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽndã, gomda woto: Tʋʋmd wẽng n tʋm y sʋka, Israyɛl kamba, la y kõn tõog n yals y bɛɛba taoore y sã n ka reng n yiis kisgã y sʋk ye.›" 
Joshua7:14 Dɩlla beoog yibeoogo bɩ y wa roog-roogo. Roog ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n paalg a soaba na n waa sak-saka. Sak ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n paalg a soaba na n waa zak-zaka. Zak ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na paalg a soaba na n waa nin-yend, nin-yende." 
Joshua7:15 B sẽn na n mik bũmb ning rɩkr sẽn kisa ned ning teedẽ, b yõogda a soab bugmẽ, yẽnda ne a sẽn so fãa, t'a sãama Soaala-Wẽnd zoodo, n maan wɩɩbdo, Israyɛl tẽmpeelmẽ.»" 
Joshua7:16 A Zozuwe sãda beoogo n kɩt tɩ neba kolg roog-roogo la yɩ-la a Zɩɩda rooga zugu la yella lʋɩ yã. 
Joshua7:17 A Kɩtame t'a Zɩɩda rooga kolg la yaa a Zera saka n pa yellẽ wã. A Zera sak kolgame la yella paa a Zabdi zaka," 
Joshua7:18 A Zabdi zaka kolgame, nin-yend, nin-yende, la lʋɩ-la a Akã zugu; a Akã yaa a Zera biiga, a Zɩɩda yagenga." 
Joshua7:19 Dẽ la a Zozuwe yeel a Akã: «M ned sõngo, pẽg a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, waoog-ba la togs maam f sẽn maane, da solg bũmb ye.»" 
Joshua7:20 A Akã leokame: «Yaa sɩda, maam n beeg Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, la ad-m sẽn maane:" 
Joshua7:21 M yãenda bɛɛba laog sʋka, Sinear fu yorg neer gɩfẽ, wanzurf zɩslem sẽn ta wakɩ koeems kobs-yi rẽnna la sãnem gilgu zɩslem sẽn ta wakɩ keems pis-nu rẽnna. Raab wẽng wala m yamẽ tɩ m dɩk-ba. M solga fãa bokẽ, m doog tẽnsʋka.»" 
Joshua7:22 A Zozuwe tʋma neb a yirã la b tɩ yãenda me tɩ fãa busa bokẽ, a roogẽ." 
Joshua7:23 B yãee fãa a rooga tẽnsʋka n dɩk n wa. A Zozuwe ne nin-kẽembã yãeeme la b reeg-b lame n dɩgl Naaba-Wẽnd taoore. 
Joshua7:24 B talla a Zera biig a Akã n looge, yẽ ne wanzurfã, ne fu-yorgã la sãnem gilgã, n paas a kom-dibli la a kom-pugli, a loalga, a bõanga, a rũm bõonese, a rooga raad la pɛɛla la a sẽn da so fãa. Israyɛl zãma wã fãa yãag-a lame n tees Akor weoogo." 
Joshua7:25 A Zozuwe yeelame: «Yaa bõe la f tak yel-beed d zugu? Bɩ yel-beeda lɛɛg n dɩ-f rũnna!» Neba fãa wẽneg n lab-a-la ne kuga. 
Joshua7:26 B wʋka kug zembala n sam a zugu la kuga saongã keta ne rũnna. Yaa rẽ yĩng me la b pʋd zĩigã tɩ Akor, zu-beed tẽnga, la b ket n boond-a-la boto al ne rũnna. Dẽ marsã la Soaala-Wẽnd sũura maag yã." 
Joshua8:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Da zoe rabeem ye, da yɛɛs ye. Yi ne tãb-biisa fãa n tak zabre ne Ayi rãmba. Ade, m sagenda f nugẽ Ayi dĩma, a nebã, a tẽngã, a soolma." 
Joshua8:2 Maan Ayi ne a dĩma wala f sẽn maan Zeriko ne a dĩma. Da bas-y neba ye, pʋɩ-y taab teedã la rũmsa bala. Maan yam n deng n solg tãb-biis kẽer tẽnga kudgẽ.»" 
Joshua8:3 A Zozuwe yiisa a zab-zabdba fãa n tɩ wẽ tẽngã. A tũusa neb tus pis-tã sẽn mi zabr sõmb-sõmbo n kɩt tɩ b yi ne yʋngo," 
Joshua8:4 la a reng n yeel-b-la woto: «Ade, solg-y y mens neer tẽnga kudgẽ, da zãag-y ne tẽnga ye la ned kam fãa wɩng ne gũusgu." 
Joshua8:5 Maam ne neba sẽn kellã tõnd na n kolga tẽngã. Ayi rãmb sã n wa yi n na n seg tõndo, tõnd na n lɛɛg n zoeeme, wala pipi wã." 
Joshua8:6 B na n pʋga tõndo n wa zãag ne b tẽngã. B na n tagsa woto: ‹Ges-y b sẽn lɛɛg n zoet wala pĩndã.› Tɩ tõnd sɩd tar zoeese. 
Joshua8:7 Yaa wakat kãng la yãmb na n yi y sẽn da solg zĩig ningã n kẽ b tẽngã, la Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, na rɩk-ba n ning y nugẽ." 
Joshua8:8 Y sã n kẽ tẽngã bɩ y ning-a bugum. Yaa woto la y na n maan. Gũus-y tɩ yaa mam meng noore.» 
Joshua8:9 A Zozuwe basa neba tɩ b loog n tɩ soond Betɛl ne Ayi tẽnsʋka, Ayi nin-taoore. Yʋn kãnga a Zozuwe paa ne zãma wã." 
Joshua8:10 Vẽkẽmbeoogo a yika pĩnda n ges a nebã, n dɩk Ayi sore tɩ nin-kẽemb be a taoore." 
Joshua8:11 Tãb-biisã sẽn da ketã pʋg-b lame n ta Ayi tẽnga nug goabga n wẽ b sika. Bok n da be sʋka. 
Joshua8:12 A Zozuwe yãka tãb-biis na ta tus a nu n solg-b Betɛl ne Ayi tẽnsʋka, Ayi nin-taoore." 
Joshua8:13 Zãma wã wẽe a sik tẽnga nug goabga, n yaool ning tãb-biis niyns sẽn tog n pa poorẽ wã tẽnga nin-taoore. Yʋn kãnga a Zozuwe paa bãg-faagẽ wã." 
Joshua8:14 Ayi dĩma sẽn yãe a Israyɛl sẽn segende a yika zãnd-zãnd n na n tak zabr ne-a. A siga ne a nebã n tees Yamsem Mogre. A ra ka mi tɩ tãb-biis n soond a tẽnga kudgẽ ye. 
Joshua8:15 A Zozuwe ne a neba pa yaas b taoor ye, b zoeeme n tees weoogo." 
Joshua8:16 B tigma tẽnga rãmb fãa tɩ b yi n dig-ba, tɩ b sɩd yi n na n dig a Zozuwe. Mik bãmb sẽn pʋgd a Zozuwe wã b zãaga ne b tẽnga." 
Joshua8:17 B fãa yiime. Rao ba a ye ka pa tẽngã n ka yi n pʋg a Israyɛl ye. B yii pʋgbo, n tar pʋgbo, n pa lebs n pag tẽnga kʋɩlens ye." 
Joshua8:18 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Zẽk f kãndã f sẽn zãadã n tees Ayi tɩ m na n ning-a-la f nugẽ.» A Zozuwe zẽka kãndã a sẽn da zãadã n tees Ayi. 
Joshua8:19 Nuga sẽn zẽke la sẽn da solg-ba sẽn yi n tar zoeese n tɩ kẽ tẽngã. Tẽnga pa-la b nugẽ, la tao-tao bal tɩ b ning-a-la bugum." 
Joshua8:20 Ayi rãmb sẽn wẽnemd b poorẽ, bõe la b yãend yã? Bug-zõos sẽn nukd ne b tẽnga n kuiis yĩngri. Ned ba a ye ka le paam gãbe n na n wudg n leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye. Woto bãmb sẽn da pʋgd neb niyns n tees we-raoogã, nin-bãmb n lɛɛg n digd-ba." 
Joshua8:21 B sẽn bãng tɩ sẽn da soond-ba kẽe tẽngã, b sẽn yãe tɩ tẽnga bug-zõos nukd n kuiis yĩngri, a Zozuwe ne zãma wã wẽnemda b neng n tak zabr ne Ayi rãmba." 
Joshua8:22 Wakat kãng me tɩ sẽn kẽ-b tẽnga sãagame n yi n pẽoog Ayi rãmba sʋka. Ayi rãmb kii zãnga, ned ba a ye ka põs ye." 
Joshua8:23 Dĩma bal la b yõk vɩɩga n wa kis a Zozuwe. 
Joshua8:24 A Israyɛl kʋʋ Ayi tãb-biisa gilli, sẽn da pʋg-b we-raoogẽ wã, wala tẽnga noorẽ. Sʋʋga sẽn wa n dɩ b fãa n sɛ, a lɛɛg n kẽ Ayi, n kood sẽn kell-bã." 
Joshua8:25 Sẽn ki-b baraare, pagb la rapa, yɩɩ tus piig la a yiibu." 
Joshua8:26 A Zozuwe nuga sẽn da zẽk ne kãndã kell n zẽkame tɩ kãab wẽnga wa rɩ Ayi rãmb n sɛ. 
Joshua8:27 A Israyɛl sẽn sooge yɩɩ Ayi laogo la a rũms bala tɩ boto la Soaala-Wẽnd ra yeel a Zozuwe. 
Joshua8:28 A Zozuwe kɩtame tɩ b yõog Ayi tẽngã; a lebga yi wãando la raboogo n ta rũnna. 
Joshua8:29 A bao tɩɩga n luul Ayi dĩma t'a pa be n ta zaabre. Wĩndg sẽn lʋɩ, a kɩtame tɩ b sik-a. B loba a yĩnga tẽnga noore n wʋk kug n zam-a, la kuga saong ket n bee ne rũnna." 
Joshua8:30 A Zozuwe mee maan-kugr a Israyɛl Wẽnd la a Soaala yĩnga, Ebal tãng zugu," 
Joshua8:31 wala Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz sẽn da wilg Israyɛl kamba la a sẽn da gʋls a noora sebrẽ. Maan-kugra mee ne kug sẽn ka pees ne lar ye. Yũ-noog maand la b kʋ yã, n paas laafi kosg maand, maand sẽn na n dɩ ne sũ-noog Wẽnd taoore." 
Joshua8:32 A Israyɛl yĩnga, a Zozuwe gʋlsa Noorã kug zugu. Yaa noor ninga a Moyiiz sẽn da gʋls Israyɛl kamba fãa taoorã." 
Joshua8:33 Israyɛl neba gilli ne nin-kẽembã, ne taoor dãmbã, ne bʋ-kaoodbã, fãa ra yɛsa yĩngri, kuga walsa koglg goabg la rɩtgo. B ra yɛsa Levitsa sẽn ya maan-kʋʋdba la sẽn zɩt-b kuga walsa koglg taoore ne sãamba la tẽnga dãmba, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk tees Garizim tãnga, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk tees Ebal. Soaala-Wẽnnaam tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz da yeelame tɩ b maan boto, n kãab a Israyɛl kãab noodo." 
Joshua8:34 Dẽ poore a Zozuwe karma sẽn be sebra pʋgẽ zãnga, kãab noodã wala kãab beedã, n tũ sẽn gʋlsa zãnga." 
Joshua8:35 A Zozuwe ka karem n long gom pɛdg meng ye. Neba fãa gill kelg-b lame, pagba la kom-bõonego, sãamba sẽn da nok Israyɛl." 
Joshua9:1 Ayi kibara zẽkame n ta dĩm dãmba sẽn da be Zʋrdẽ Dʋʋre, tãng zug rãmba, sẽn da ti-b tẽn-nabrẽ, Mog Kãsenga noorẽ dãmba, n ta Libã. Da yaa Ititse, Amoritse, Kanaã rãmba, Perizitse, Ivitse, Zebuzitse." 
Joshua9:2 B sũu taaba n na n tak zabre ne a Zozuwe la a Israyɛl. 
Joshua9:3 Gabaõ rãmb me sẽn wʋm a Zozuwe kibare, b sẽn wʋm sẽn yɩ bũmb ning ne Zeriko la Ayi rãmba," 
Joshua9:4 b bao yam sɩlenga n kõ b menga. B maana b mens wa so-toagdba, n zɩlg b bõeens ne yond la rãam waoos sẽn po tɩ b zap-zape." 
Joshua9:5 B wida neooda sẽn po tɩ b maneg n sẽ, b yeelga fu kʋdse. B sor zug rɩɩb da yaa bur sẽn kʋɩ n kaood zeremse." 
Joshua9:6 B kolga a Zozuwe ne Israyɛl kamba Gilgal sika, n yeele: «Tõnd yii tẽn-zãoorgẽ tɩrga n wa ka. Ges-y n yõg zood ne tõndo.»" 
Joshua9:7 Israyɛl leoka Ivitsã: «Tõe tɩ y wẽneg n be-la d sʋka. D na n yɩɩ wãn n yõg zood ne yãmba.» 
Joshua9:8 B yeela a Zozuwe: «Tõnd yaa yãmb yemse.» T'a sok-ba: «Yãmb la m ba bõe rãmba, yãmb yita yɛ?»" 
Joshua9:9 B leokame: «Tõnd yii tẽn-zãoorgẽ la yaa yãmb Wẽnda waoogr yĩnga, tɩ d wʋma b sẽn maan Ezipt tẽnga." 
Joshua9:10 D wʋma b sẽn maan ne Amoritsa dĩm dãmb a yiib sẽn da be Zʋrdẽ rʋʋre, Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ la Bazã dĩm a Og sẽn da be Astarot." 
Joshua9:11 Tõnd nin-kẽemse la d tẽnga rãmb yeel-d lame: ‹Bao-y sor dɩɩbo la y yi n tɩ seg-ba la y gom ne b woto: tõnd yaa yãmb yemse.› Wa-y tɩ d yõg zoodo. 
Joshua9:12 Ges-y tõnd buri, a ra ket n yaa tʋʋlga d sẽn wa n yitã la marsã a kʋɩɩme n kaood zeremse." 
Joshua9:13 Tõnd waoosa ra ket n yaa paala tɩ d sui d rãam la marsã b wurame. D neooda la d fut lebga kʋdse, d sora yɩɩ wok tɩ looge.»" 
Joshua9:14 Israyɛl taoor dãmba reega rɩɩb bilfu b nengẽ n pa reng n sok Soaala-Wẽnd ye. 
Joshua9:15 A Zozuwe saka b zoodã tɩ b paam n põse. Taoor dãmba tol n wẽename tɩ bũmb kõn maan-b ye. 
Joshua9:16 La rasem ka yãe n maan a tã zooda yõgb poore, la b sẽn bãnge tɩ b pa yi tẽn-zãoorgẽ ye, b ra yaa a Israyɛl yagse, b ra kẽeda a Israyɛl sʋka." 
Joshua9:17 A Israyɛl sẽn yiki, a wẽneg n kẽe b tẽngẽ. B soolem da yaa Gabaõ, Kefira, Beerot la Kiriyat-Yearim." 
Joshua9:18 A Israyɛl ka tak zabr ne b ye, a sẽn da wẽen ne Soaala-Wẽnda yĩnga. La zãma wã sɩnga guglengu ne taoor dãmbã." 
Joshua9:19 Taoor dãmba tigma taaba la ad-b sẽn yẽse: «Tõnd ka tõe n le sɩɩs-b ye tɩ d wẽena ne Israyɛl Wẽnde. 
Joshua9:20 La ad-d sẽn na n maan ne-ba. D na n bas-b lame tɩ b vɩɩnde, ka rẽ d wat n taka Soaala-Wẽnd beem d zugu, tɩ tõnd n wẽene." 
Joshua9:21 B pa ne tõndo la b lebg da-wesdba la ko-toadba, zãma wã fãa yĩnga.» La b maana wa nin-kẽembã sẽn togsã." 
Joshua9:22 A Zozuwe boola Gabaõ rãmbã la a yeel-b lame: «Bõe tɩ yãmb tudg tõndo? Bõe tɩ y togs-d woto: ‹Tõnd yii tẽn-zãoorgẽ!› Tɩ y tẽng yaool n be tõnd sɛɛgẽ? 
Joshua9:23 Dũnna Soaala-Wẽnd yãka y barka la y kõn yi yembdẽ abada ye. Y kõn vʋʋs ne raad wesbo la koom yõngr, Soaala-Wẽnd buuda sʋk ye.»" 
Joshua9:24 Gabaõ rãmba leokame: «Ade, y yemsa paam n wʋma neere Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ noor ning b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz. B ra kãab-a lame tɩ b na n dɩka tẽnsã n ning a nugẽ. Bãmb n kõ y noore tɩ y kʋ n da kees ned ye. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la y waoonga kẽes-d dabeem kãsenga tɩ d kong n maan wa y sẽn mi wã." 
Joshua9:25 Ade, d bee y nusẽ, y sẽn dat n maan d bũmb ninga sã n togame la zemsame bɩ y maan.»" 
Joshua9:26 Ad-a Zozuwe me sẽn maan bũmb ninga n fãag-ba a Israyɛl nugẽ tɩ b pa ki ye. 
Joshua9:27 Ba raar tɛka a rɩk-b lame n kõ zãma wã tɩ b wesd daado la b yõngd koom, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogr tẽngẽ, la rẽ n ket n be rũnna." 
Joshua10:1 Zerizalɛɛm dĩm, a Adoni-Sedɛk, wa n wʋmame t'a Zozuwe wẽe Ayi n tõog-a, n dɩk-a zãnga n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde la a maana ne a dĩma wala a sẽn maan ne Zeriko soaba. A wʋmame yɛsa tɩ Gabaõ rãmb yõga zood ne a Israyɛl n tɩ kẽe n naag-a." 
Joshua10:2 Dẽ waa ne a yɛɛsgo tɩ Gabaõ ra yaa tẽn-bedre, da yaa na-tẽnga n da yɩɩd Ayi tẽnga. Yaa tẽng sẽn pid ne zabr mitba." 
Joshua10:3 Dẽ la Zerizalɛɛm dĩm, a Adoni-Sedɛk, tʋm tɩ b tɩ yeel Ebrõ dĩm, a Oam, Yarmut dĩm, a Piream, Lakis dĩm, a Yafia la Eglõ dĩm, a Devir:" 
Joshua10:4 «Wa-y naag-y taab n sõng-ma tɩ m wẽ Gabaõ tɩ tẽng kãng rãmb yõga zood ne a Zozuwe la a Israyɛl.» 
Joshua10:5 Amoritsa dĩm dãmb a nu wã sɩd sega taaba n na n sõng taab n zabe. Yɩɩ Zerizalɛɛm ne Ebrõ, Yarmut, Lakis la Eglõ dĩm bãmb ne b tãb-biisi. Bãmb n gũbg Gabaõ n na n tak zabre." 
Joshua10:6 Gabaõ rãmb me tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zozuwe, dẽ t'a ket Gilgal: «Da bas f yemsa ye, wa tao-tao n sõng-do n fãag-do tɩ Amoritsa tãmsa zug dĩm dãmba yik n sũu taaba n na n tak zabre ne do.»" 
Joshua10:7 A Zozuwe wẽneg n yii Gilgal ne a tãb-biisi, ne a zab mitba fãa." 
Joshua10:8 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Da maan dabeem ye, bãng tɩ m dɩk-b lame n sagl f nugẽ, ba a ye kõn yals f taoor ye.»" 
Joshua10:9 A Zozuwe paam n linga bɛɛbã t'a yii Gilgal n kẽn ne yʋngo. 
Joshua10:10 Soaala-Wẽnd meng n kɩt tɩ bɛɛba ning tĩiga b sẽn yãee a Israyɛl. A Israyɛl tõog-b-la sõmbo, n dig-b Gabaõ n tees Bɛt-Orõ la yii vargre, Azeka n ta Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 A Israyɛl sẽn wa n tõog bɛɛba tɩ b zoet n sigd Bɛt-Orõ, Soaala-Wẽnd yãag-b-la ne sapɩlem kuga n ta Azeka la kuga pãb-b lame n kʋ. Sapɩlma sẽn kʋ neba yɩɩga Israyɛl kamba sẽn kʋ ne b sʋʋse." 
Joshua10:12 Amoritsa sẽn lʋɩ Israyɛl nugẽ daare, a Zozuwe goma ne Soaala-Wẽnd, Israyɛl kamba taoore n yeele: «Bɩ wĩndga yals Gabaõ tɩ kiuug pa Ayalõ bãg-faagẽ.»" 
Joshua10:13 La wĩndig yaasame la kiuug pa luk a zĩigẽ ye al t'a Israyɛl wa rok a sũur ne a bɛɛba. La ka rẽ n da pĩnd n gʋls Wẽnd nin-sõng sebra pʋgẽ bɩ? Wĩndig yalsa zug tẽnsʋka, n pa raara a ye tõre n pa lʋɩ ye." 
Joshua10:14 Raar ka reng n zĩndi la raar ka le pʋgl sẽn wẽneg daar kãng ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd meng deega ninsaal noore, n zab n sõng Israyɛl." 
Joshua10:15 Dẽ poore a Zozuwe ne a neba lɛɛg n kẽe Gilgal tẽnga. 
Joshua10:16 Dĩm dãmb a nu wã zoe n tɩ soonda Makeda tãng bokẽ. 
Joshua10:17 B Wa n togsa a Zozuwe: «Ad-y b yãee dĩm dãmb a nu wã tɩ b sor Makeda tãng bokẽ.» 
Joshua10:18 T'a leoke: «Bilim-y kug bɛd n pag boka noore la y ning neb boka noor n gũ-ba. 
Joshua10:19 Sã n ya yãmba, da bao-y vʋʋsg ye. Pʋg-y bɛɛba n gõdg-ba tɩ b ra paam n ta b tẽnsẽ ye tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka b tẽnsã n sagl y nusẽ.»" 
Joshua10:20 Ade, a Zozuwe ne Israyɛl kamba sẽn waa n na n tõog bɛɛba la b menes-b zãnga, kẽer me paamame n põse n zoe n tɩ kẽ zabr-kõn-ling-m tẽnsẽ." 
Joshua10:21 Sã n yaa a Israyɛl, nin-yend meng ka pa moog ye, b lɛɛga zãnga n kẽ Makeda ne a Zozuwe. Ned ba a ye ka le saag n bao b noor ye." 
Joshua10:22 A Zozuwe yeelame: «Lak-y kuga tãn-boka noore la y yiis dĩm dãmb a nu wã n kõ ma.» 
Joshua10:23 B maana wala a sẽn yeelã n tall dĩm dãmba n wa, yaa Zerizalɛɛm, Ebrõ, Yarmut, Lakis la Eglõ dĩm dãmba." 
Joshua10:24 B wa ne ba t'a Zozuwe yaool n bool Israyɛl tõre la a yeel tãnsoaben-damba sẽn yãag-b yẽ wã: «Kolg-y la ned kam fãa teeg dĩm dãmba yubl ne a naoore.» B maama boto. 
Joshua10:25 T'a paase: «Keng-y y sũuri la ra maan-y rabeem ye tɩ yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd na n maan ne bɛɛb niyns sẽn na n seg yãmb zabrẽ.» 
Joshua10:26 Dẽ poore a Zozuwe kʋʋ dĩm dãmbã n kɩt tɩ b yagl-b tɩɩs a nu tɩ b pa be n ta zaabre. 
Joshua10:27 Zĩig sẽn wa n sobgdẽ a Zozuwe kõo noore tɩ b sik-ba n lob tãnga bokẽ, b sẽn da solg b mens zĩig ningã. B wʋka kug bɛd n zam boka noore la b keta ne rũnna." 
Joshua10:28 Baraare a Zozuwe wẽe Makeda n tõog-a la a kɩtame tɩ b kood a neba la a dĩma. Bõn-vɩɩl fãa soogr da lebga kisgu. Ba a ye ka põs ye. Sẽn maan ne Zeriko dĩma n maan ne Makeda Naaba. 
Joshua10:29 A Zozuwe ne a Israyɛl neba yii Makeda n kẽng Libna. B tɩ wẽe Libna tẽnga. 
Joshua10:30 Naaba-Wẽnd dɩka Libna ne a dĩma n sagl a Israyɛl nugẽ la a Israyɛl kooda bõn-vɩɩl fãa. Ba a ye ka põs ye. Sẽn maan ne Zeriko dĩma n maan ne Libna rẽnda. 
Joshua10:31 A Zozuwe ne a neba yii Libna n wa Lakis. A gũbg-a lame n tak zabr ne-a. 
Joshua10:32 Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka Lakis n sagl a Israyɛl nugẽ, a tõog-a-la daar a yiib soaba la a kooda bõn-vɩɩl fãa, wala a sẽn maan Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Gezɛr dĩma, a Oram, da yii wakat kãnga n na n sõng Lakis la a Zozuwe wẽ-a lame la a kʋ-la a neba zãnga." 
Joshua10:34 A Zozuwe ne zãma wã sẽn yi Lakis, b taa Eglõ. B sẽn gũbg Eglõ, b zaba ne-a." 
Joshua10:35 B tõog-a-la baraare la sʋʋg n kood bɛɛba zãnga. Bõn-vɩɩl fãa soogr lebga kisgu baraare wala b sẽn maan ne Lakis. 
Joshua10:36 A Zozuwe ne Israyɛl tõre yii Eglõ n ta Ebrõ n tak zabre. 
Joshua10:37 B sẽn tõog-a, b kooda dĩma la a soolma neba fãa la bõn-vɩɩl fãa. Ba a ye ka põs ye, wala Eglõ tẽnga, bõn-vɩɩl fãa soogr da lebga kisgu." 
Joshua10:38 A Zozuwe ne a Israyɛl wẽneg n teesa Debir n tak zabre ne-a. 
Joshua10:39 A dĩma ne a soolem dãmba fãa, a kood-b lame. Bõn-vɩɩl fãa soogr da lebga kisgu la woto, ba a ye ka põs ye. A Zozuwe sẽn maan bũmb ning ne Ebrõ, bõn-kãng la a maan ne Debir la bõn-kãng me la a reng n maan ne Libna la a dĩma." 
Joshua10:40 A Zozuwe sẽn tõog tẽns niynsa yɩɩ woto: tãng zug rãmba, Negɛb rãmba, bãadẽ dãmba, kunkubẽ dãmba: Dĩm bi talga, ned ba a ye ka pa vɩɩg ye. Bõn-vɩɩl fãa soogr da lebga kisgu, wala Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sẽn da kõ-a noore." 
Joshua10:41 A Zozuwe tõog-b-la fãa gilli: Kadɛs-Barnea n ta Gaza, n ta Gosen, n ta Gabaõ." 
Joshua10:42 A Zozuwe tõoga tẽnsa ne b dĩm dãmba, zab-vuk bala. Israyɛl Wẽnnaam n da zabd n sõngd-a." 
Joshua10:43 A Zozuwe ne a neba gilli lɛɛg n wa b sikẽ, Gilgal." 
Joshua11:1 Asor dĩm, a Yabin, sẽn wʋm a Zozuwe kibare, a tʋlga sõngre n tʋm neb Madõ dĩm a Zobab nengẽ, n tʋm neb Simrõ ne Akesaf dĩm dãmba nengẽ." 
Joshua11:2 A le tʋma dĩm dãmb a taab nengẽ: dĩm niyns sẽn be nug goabga, tãnga zug, Zenezarɛt rɩtgo, dĩm niyns sẽn be bãg-faagẽ la Dor tãn-sɩlemsa zut, nin-taoore." 
Joshua11:3 Kanaã rãmbã da bee yaang la nin-taoore, tɩ Amoritsã, Ivitsã, Perizitsã la Zebuzitsã be tãnga zugu; tɩ Ivitsã be Ermo tãnga tẽngre, Mispa tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Joshua11:4 Bãmb fãa yiime ne b tãb-biisi, zãma kõn bãng-n-sõde, wala mogr noorẽ bĩisrẽ. B yii ne wiidi la bilim-bilm ka tɛka." 
Joshua11:5 Dĩm bãmba fãa sũu taab n wa Merõ kʋɩlsẽ n na n tak zabr ne a Israyɛl. 
Joshua11:6 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: «Da zoe nin-bãmba ye, tɩ beoog wakat kãnga, tɩ m dɩk-b-la kɩɩms zãnga n sagl a Israyɛl nugẽ. Fo na n pasa b wiidi wã nao gĩin la f yõog b bilim-bilm.»" 
Joshua11:7 A Zozuwe ne a tãb-biisa ling-b-la Merõ kʋɩlse n pãb-ba. 
Joshua11:8 Soaala-Wẽnd sagl-b-la a Israyɛl nugẽ t'a tõog-ba n dig kẽer n ta Sidõ Na-tẽnga la Misrefot-Mayim, la Mispa bãg-fool sẽn be yaanga. Pãbra yɩɩ pãbr menga al tɩ nin-yend meng ka paam n zoe n põs ye." 
Joshua11:9 A Zozuwe maana ne bãmb wala Soaala-Wẽnd meng sẽn da wilgi, n pas b wiida nao gĩin la a yõog b bilim-bilm." 
Joshua11:10 A Zozuwe lɛɛg n wa wẽe Asor, n kʋ a dĩma ne sʋʋga. Tẽnsa sẽn gũbg n gilgã, a Asor n da ya na-tẽnga." 
Joshua11:11 Israyɛl kamba sẽn da wẽen tɩ b kõn kees bũmb b mens yĩngã, b kʋʋ bõn-vɩɩg fãa sẽn da be tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ. Bõn-vɩɩg ka põs ye, la b waa n baas n ninga tẽnga bugum." 
Joshua11:12 A Zozuwe tõoga dĩm dãmba fãa ne b tẽnsã. A kood-b-la gilli, tɩ b ra wẽename tɩ b kõn kees bũmb b mens yĩng ye, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz." 
Joshua11:13 Tẽnsa fãa sẽn da zao tãmsa zutã, a Zozuwe ka yõog tẽng a to n paas Asor ye. Tẽn-kãng bal la a yõog yã." 
Joshua11:14 A Israyɛl sẽn kees a meng yĩng tẽn-kãens pʋgẽ yɩɩ b laogã la b rũmsã. Sã n ya ninsaalba, b kood-b la fãa gill ne sʋʋse, b pa kell ned ba a ye ye." 
Joshua11:15 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz bũmb ningã, a Moyiiz me ra taas-a-la a Zozuwe; la rẽ me la a Zozuwe tũ yã. A ka tol n bas noor a yembr meng a sẽn deeg a Moyiiz nengẽ n ka tũ-a zãng ye." 
Joshua11:16 Woto wã, yɩɩ tẽnga zãng la a Zozuwe wẽe n deege: Tãnga zug rãmba, Negɛb, Gosen, Bãoogã, Yamsem Mogre, Israyɛl tãn-bɛd la a bãg-faase." 
Joshua11:17 Sẽn sɩng Alak tãnga sẽn tõnd Seyir sẽnẽ n ta Baal-Gad, Libã bãg-faagẽ, Ermo tãng sɛɛgẽ, tẽn-bãmb fãa lʋɩ-la a Zozuwe nugẽ. A yõga dĩm dãmbã n pãb n kʋ." 
Joshua11:18 B zabra ne taab kaoosa wʋsgo. 
Joshua11:19 Sã n ka Ivitsã sẽn kẽed Gabaõ, tẽng ba a ye ka tʋlg laafi ne a Israyɛl ye. A zaba ne tẽns a taabã n tõog-ba n sooge." 
Joshua11:20 Soaala-Wẽnd sɩd da tʋlgame tɩ b kɩʋʋlem b sũuri n tak zabr ne a Israyɛl, t'a Israyɛl me wẽen t'a kõn zoe b nimbãanega n sɩd sɛɛs-b zãnga, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a Moyiiz noore." 
Joshua11:21 A Zozuwe sẽn ta bala la a sẽn kʋ Anakitsã. A kʋʋ tãnga zug rãmba, Ebrõ rãmba, Debir la Anab rãmba, sẽn zao-b Zɩɩda bɩ Israyɛl tãmsã. Bãmb ne b tẽnsa lebga kisgu." 
Joshua11:22 Anakitsa ka le zĩnd a Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ ye, sã ka Gaza, Gat la Asdod." 
Joshua11:23 Tẽnga fãa lʋɩ-la a Zozuwe nugẽ, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz. A weel-a lame n pʋɩ Israyɛl, roog fãa ne a rẽnna. Wakat kãng la tẽnga yaa n paam laafi." 
Joshua12:1 Ad dĩm niyns a Israyɛl sẽn tõog n dees b tẽnsã, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd sẽn tees yaanga, Arno kʋɩl bɛɛga tɛk n digd Ermo tãnga la Yamsem Mogra yaang foolle." 
Joshua12:2 Ad Amoritsa dĩm a Siyõ; a da kẽeda Esbõ, a na-tẽngẽ. A ra soo Aroɛr sẽn be Arno noore, n paas Galaad bogre, n ta Yabok kʋɩl-bɛɛga sẽn ya toaag ne Amonitsã." 
Joshua12:3 A ra soo Zʋrdẽ bãooga bogr ning sẽn tees yaanga, n paas Zenezarɛt Mogrã, nug goabg sẽnẽ, n ta Yamsem Mogre, Bɛt-Yesimot yegende la Pisga tãng weoogo, nug rɩtg sẽnẽ." 
Joshua12:4 Ad Bazã dĩm a Og, Refayitsa buuda nin-yend sẽn kell moogo, a da kẽeda Astarot la Edreyi." 
Joshua12:5 Yẽ me ra soo Ermo tãnga ne Salka la Bazã tẽn-peelma zãng n ta Gesuritsa la Maakatitsa toaaga, n paas Galaad bogra sẽn kelle, n tekd Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ toaagẽ." 
Joshua12:6 A Moyiiz ne Israyɛl tãb-biisa da reng n tõoga dĩm bãmb b yiibu. Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz da rɩka b soolma n kõ a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase bogrã." 
Joshua12:7 Ad tẽns niyns a Zozuwe ne Israyɛl kamba sẽn pãb n deeg Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, nin-taoore, Baal-Gad sẽn be Libã bãg-faagẽ n ta Alak Tãng sẽn lug Seyir sẽnẽ. A Zozuwe pʋɩ-la b tẽnsã n kõ a Israyɛl buud fãa a rẽnna." 
Joshua12:8 Tẽn-bãmb ra luga ne tãmse bɩ n yɛdg bãado. Le yaa Zʋrdẽ bãg-faaga, ne kunkubã, we-raoogã sẽn kõsd nug rɩtgã. Ra yaa Ititse, Amoritse, Kanaã rãmba, Perizitse, Ivitse la Zebuzits tẽnse." 
Joshua12:9 Dĩm niyns a Zozuwe sẽn tõog la woto: Ad Zeriko dĩm la Ayi dĩma. Ayi pẽe Betɛl. 
Joshua12:10 Ad Zerizalɛɛm dĩma, ad Ebrõ dĩma" 
Joshua12:11 Ad Yarmut dĩma, ad Lakis dĩm." 
Joshua12:12 Ad Eglõ dĩm, ad Gesɛr dĩma" 
Joshua12:13 Ad Debir dĩma, ad Gedɛr dĩma." 
Joshua12:14 Ad Orma dĩm, ad Arad dĩma." 
Joshua12:15 Ad Libna dĩm, ad Adulam dĩma." 
Joshua12:16 Ad Makeda dĩm, ad Betɛl dĩma." 
Joshua12:17 Ad Tapua dĩm, ad Efɛr dĩma" 
Joshua12:18 Ad Afɛk dĩm, ad Lasarõ dĩma" 
Joshua12:19 Ad Madõ dĩma, ad Asor dĩma." 
Joshua12:20 Ad Simrõ-Merõ dĩma, ad Akesaf dĩma" 
Joshua12:21 Ad Taanak dĩma, ad Megido dĩma." 
Joshua12:22 Ad Kedɛs dĩma, ad Karmɛl tãng zug dĩm a Yokneam." 
Joshua12:23 Ad Dor tãn-sɩlẽnga dĩma, Goyim dĩma, Galile yegende" 
Joshua12:24 Ad Tirsa dĩm: b zãng fãa yaa pis-tã la a ye. 
Joshua13:1 A Zozuwe waa n kʋʋla wʋsgo. Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a lame: «Ade, fo kʋʋlame, fo kaoosa moogo, la tẽnsa sẽn ket n nan ka kẽ f soolmẽ labsa." 
Joshua13:2 Tẽnsa sẽn ketã, yaa sẽn be-b Filisti rãmb la Gesuritsa soolmẽ." 
Joshua13:3 Sɩngda Sior sẽn tot ne Ezipt n ta Ekrõ sẽn be nug goabga la b sẽn tog n ges wa Kanaã rãmb soolem. Sẽn ket yɛsa, yaa dĩm dãmb a nu wã sẽn da namsd Filisti rãmbã: Gaza dĩm, Asdod dĩma, Askelõ dĩm, Gat la Ekrõ dĩm dãmba; le paasa Avitsã." 
Joshua13:4 Bãmb soolma sɩngda nug rɩtgo ne Kanaã rãmba la Ara sẽn ya Sidõ rãmb soolem n ta Afɛka n digd Amoritsa toaagẽ. 
Joshua13:5 Sẽn ket yɛsa: Gebal weoogo ne Libã bogr ning sẽn tees wĩndiga sẽn pukdẽ; sɩngda Baal-Gad sẽn be Ermo tãnga tẽngr n tat Lebo-Amat noorẽ. 
Joshua13:6 Ade, tẽns niyns sẽn zao tãmsa zutã, sẽn sɩng Libã n digd Misrefot-Mayim sẽn be nin-taoore, n paas Sidõ rãmbã, maam n na n dig-b fãa Israyɛl kamb taoore. Fo tʋʋmd yaa f reeg tẽnsã n poees Israyɛl kamb wala Naaba-Wẽnd n kõt-ba la wala m sẽn zoe n wilgã." 
Joshua13:7 Wakat taame tɩ f na n kõ buudã b pʋɩɩre. Yaa buud a wẽ wã sẽn nan ka paam b rẽnna, n paas a Manase bogrã.»" 
Joshua13:8 A Rubẽ ne a Gad roogo da naaga a Manase bogrã n deeg b pʋɩɩr a Moyiiz nugẽ Zʋrdẽ yaanga. 
Joshua13:9 B sẽn da reegã, yaa Aroɛr sẽn be Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga noore, yaa Medeba kunkubã n ta Dibõ." 
Joshua13:10 Yaa dĩm a Siyõ tẽnsã; la a Siyõ la Amoritsa dĩm ning sẽn da kẽed Esbõ. Yaa yẽ soolma n ta Amonitsa toaaga. 
Joshua13:11 Yaa Galaad la Gesuritse la Maakatits soolem, Ermo tãngã, Bazã ne Salka tõre." 
Joshua13:12 Yaa Bazã, a Og soolma zãnga. A Og yaa Refayitsa nin-yend sẽn kell moogo; yẽ n da rɩt naam Astarot la Edreyi Bazã tẽn-peelmẽ. A Moyiiz n da pãb dĩm bãmba b yiibã n deeg b soolem." 
Joshua13:13 Israyɛl kamba yaool n pa reeg Gesuritsa la Maakatitsa soolem ye. Yaa rẽ la b sẽn ket n be Israyɛl sʋk ne rũnna. 
Joshua13:14 A Levi roogo bal la b ka kõ bũmb. Yaa kũuna b sẽn da kõt Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, yaa kũun bãmb pʋgẽ la b ra paamd b pʋɩɩre, wala a Moyiiz sẽn da wilgi." 
Joshua13:15 A Moyiiz ra kõ-la a Rubẽ kambã b pʋɩɩre wala b sõora sẽn da tog ne. 
Joshua13:16 Ad-b pʋɩɩra yalem: sɩngda Aroɛr sẽn be Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga noore, la tẽng ning sẽn da be bãg-faaga pʋga, n ta tãnga sẽn da gilg Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Le paasa Esbõ ne tẽns a taaba sẽn zao tãngã: Dibõ, Bamot-Baal, Bɛt-Baal-Meõ." 
Joshua13:18 Le paasa Yaak, Kedemot, Mefaat," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriyatayim, Sibna, Gor tãnga zug tẽnse: Seret-Saar," 
Joshua13:20 Bɛt-Peor, Pisga kunkubã, Bɛt-Yesimot," 
Joshua13:21 tãnga pennẽ tẽnsã, a Siyõ soolma zãnga. Yaa Amoritga n da rɩt naam Esbõ. A Moyiiz ra tõoga yẽ ne Madiã rĩm biisi, a Evi, a Rekem, a Sur, a Ur, a Reba: Bãmb da sakda a Siyõ." 
Joshua13:22 Sã n yaa a Beor biigã, bag a Balaam, b ra naaga yẽ ne neb a taab n kood ne sʋʋga." 
Joshua13:23 A Rubẽ kamb pʋɩɩr da tata Zʋrdẽ. D sẽn wilgã la a rooga pʋɩɩre ne a tẽn-bɛd la a tẽn-bõonego. 
Joshua13:24 A Moyiiz kõ-la a Gad kambã b pʋɩɩr wala b sõora sẽn da tog ne. 
Joshua13:25 B sooga Yaser, Galaad tẽnse, Amonitsa soolem pʋɩ-sʋka n ta Aroɛr sẽn tot ne Raba." 
Joshua13:26 Esbõ n ta Ramat-Mispe la Bertonim, Maanayim n ta Debir toaaga," 
Joshua13:27 n paas Zʋrdẽ bãg-faagẽ tẽnsã: Bɛt-Aram, Bɛt-Nimra, Sukot, Safõ, sẽn yaa Esbõ dĩm, a Siyõ, soolma kelle. Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n da ya toaaga n ta Kinerɛt mogra satmẽ la a leb n yaa toaag yaanga." 
Joshua13:28 D sẽn wilga me la a Gad roog pʋɩɩre ne a tẽn-bɛd la a tẽn-bõonego. 
Joshua13:29 A Moyiiz ra kõ-la a Manase bogrã a pʋɩɩr wala a sõora sẽn da tog ne. 
Joshua13:30 B sooga sẽn sɩng Maanayim, Bazã dĩma, a Og soolem zãnga, a Yayir pʋt rot sẽn be Bazã tẽn-peelmẽ, tẽns pisoobe." 
Joshua13:31 Galaad bogra sẽn kellã n paas Astarot la Edreyi, a Bazã dĩm, a Og, soolem, bãmb dɩkame n paas a Manase biig a Makir kamba bogre, wala b sõora sẽn tog ne." 
Joshua13:32 Yaa woto la a Moyiiz pʋɩ tẽngã, a Moab pʋ-weesẽ, Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, Zeriko yaanga." 
Joshua13:33 A Moyiiz ka kõ a Levi buuda bũmb ye. A Israyɛl Wẽndã, la a Levi pʋɩɩr, wala bãmb meng sẽn da wilgi." 
Joshua14:1 Ad Israyɛl kamb sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ning Kanaã tẽnga. Pʋɩtba yɩɩ maan-kʋʋd a Elazar, la a Nun biiga, a Zozuwe, la Israyɛl buuda kãsem-dãmbã." 
Joshua14:2 B poeesame n bãng rot a wɛ wã la a Manase bogrã sẽn na n soog tẽns niynsi, wala Soaala-Wẽnd meng sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz." 
Joshua14:3 A Moyiiz ra kõ-la a Rubẽ, a Gad ne a Manase bogr a ye wã b pʋɩɩr, Zʋrdẽ yaanga, la a pa kõ a Levi kambã b pʋɩɩr bãmb sʋk ye." 
Joshua14:4 A Zozɛf buuda ra yaa rot a yiibu: a Manase roog la a Efrayim roogo. La Levitsa ka paam soolem sã n ka tẽns kẽer bala b sẽn na n kẽedẽ, bãmb ne b rũmsi n paas pʋt la rũmsa wãbneg zĩisi." 
Joshua14:5 Tẽnsa pʋɩɩra tũ-la a Moyiiz sẽn deeg noor ning Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ. 
Joshua14:6 A Zɩɩda neb n waa n yãend a Zozuwe Gilgal. Kenitg a Yefune biig a Kalɛb, yeel-a lame: «Fo mii Soaala sẽn wilg a Moyiiz, Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmda, mam poorẽ la fo me poorẽ, Kadɛs-Barnea." 
Joshua14:7 M da tara yʋʋm pis-naase, Soaala-Wẽnd sõgna, a Moyiiz, sẽn waa n tʋm-m Kadɛs-Barnea tɩ m wa bãng tẽnga nenga. M lebgre m pelga m pʋg n togs m sẽn yãende." 
Joshua14:8 Mam tũud-n-taasa gomame n boog saam-biisa raood zãnga la mam tũ-la m Wẽnnaama daabo. 
Joshua14:9 Yaa baraar la a Moyiiz wẽen woto: ‹Tẽng ning f sẽn tabg ne f naoorã na n yɩɩ foo ne f kamba soolem, yʋʋm sẽn ka be sɛɛbo, tɩ fo tũu Wẽnnaam, f Soaala zãnga.›" 
Joshua14:10 Dẽ tɛka Soaala-Wẽnd wogla m yõore wala b sẽn kãabe. Yaa yʋʋm pis-naas la a nu rõanna la Soaala pʋlem-m dẽ, dẽ t'a Israyɛl nan keta we-raoogẽ, la m yʋʋm yaa pis-nii la a nu marsã." 
Joshua14:11 M sẽn zĩ ne pãng ning rũnna wã yaa waa a Moyiiz sẽn tʋm maama raare. M ket n tara m pĩnd pãngã, n tõe n zabe, n tõe n tʋm m tʋʋmde." 
Joshua14:12 Kõ-m tãms tẽns niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãab-m, baraare, tɩ b na n kõ-m lame wã, tɩ baraare f wʋmame tɩ Anakits n da kẽed be la b tẽnsa da yaa tẽn-bɛd n tar pãnga. Daare Naaba-Wẽnd na zĩnd ne ma la m na reeg-b n sooge tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n pʋlme.»" 
Joshua14:13 A Zozuwe ninga a Yefune biig a Kalɛb barka n dɩk Ebrõ n kõ-a t'a sooge. 
Joshua14:14 Rẽ me yĩng la ba ne rũnna, Ebrõ yaa a Kalɛb soolem tɩ Kenitga a Yefune biig a Kalɛb tũu Soaala-Wẽnd daabo, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam daabo." 
Joshua14:15 Ebrõ ra boonda pĩnd tɩ Kiriyat-Araba. Arba wã n da yɩ Anakitg sẽn yɩɩg a taaba. Tẽnga yaa n vʋʋsa ne zaba. 
Joshua15:1 Ad pʋɩɩr ning a Zɩɩda sagsa sẽn deege. Sɩngda Edom toaagẽ, Sin we-raoogẽ wã, Negɛb rɩtg-rɩtgo." 
Joshua15:2 B toaag kãng da sɩngda Yamsem mogrã, zĩig ning tẽnga sẽn maan wa a yiisa a zelemd Negɛb n na n leg kooma," 
Joshua15:3 n tees Akrabim kunkubri, n pɩʋʋgd Sin, n digd Kadɛs-Barnea rɩtgo, n tagd Esrõ, n dʋʋd Adar, n gõdg be n tees Karka," 
Joshua15:4 n tũud Asmo, n tat Ezipt kʋɩl bɛɛga, n tekd Mog Kãsenga. Dẽ n na n yɩ y nug rɩtg toaaga." 
Joshua15:5 Yaanga, yaa Zʋrdẽ sɩngre n ta a sẽn wat n kẽed yamsem mogrã n da ya toaaga. Nug goabgã, toaaga sɩngda Yamsem Mogra sẽn yõbg a meng zĩig ningã n ta Zʋrdẽ sẽn kẽed-a zĩig ningã." 
Joshua15:6 Toaaga da rʋʋda Bɛt-Ogla, n basd Bɛt-Araba goabga n digd pĩig a ye sẽn boond t'a Boã pĩiga; a Rubẽ biig la a Boã." 
Joshua15:7 Toaaga sẽn yi be a le rʋʋ Debir n yegd Akor bãg-faagã n gõdg nug goabg n tees Gilgal sẽn tot Adumim kunkubrã, kʋɩl-bɛɛga rɩtgo. A sẽn yi be a tũuda Eyin-Semɛs bãgse n tat Eyin-Rogɛl." 
Joshua15:8 A sẽn le yi be a yegda Ben-Inom bog zulungã n basd Zebuze rãmb tẽnga rɩtgo, dat n yeelame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm, n kul yĩngri n gõdg Inom bokã n tat Refayitsa tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Joshua15:9 Toaaga sẽn ta tãnga zug tẽnsʋka a gõdg n teesa Neftoa bãgse, n tees Efrõ tãnga n le gõdg n tees Baala, yẽ la Kiriyat-Yearim." 
Joshua15:10 A sẽn yi Baala a gõdga nin-taoore n tees Seyir tãnga n yegd Yearim googã, tãnga goabga, sẽn ya Kesalõ, n sigd Bɛt-Semɛs, n pɩʋʋgd Timna," 
Joshua15:11 n tat Ekrõ goabga n lɛɛg n tees Sikarõ, n dʋʋd Baala tãnga la Yabneyɛl, n tekd mog Kãsengã." 
Joshua15:12 Mog Kãsenga la toaag nin-taoore. A Zɩɩda rooga la a sagsa sẽn paam tẽng ninga toaag la woto. 
Joshua15:13 A Yefune biig, a Kalɛb, paama vẽenem a Zɩɩda tẽnsa sʋka wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Zozuwe. A Zozuwe kõ-a-la Kiriyat-Araba, Anakits na-tẽng sẽn lebg Ebrõ rũnna. A Arba n yɩ a Anak ba." 
Joshua15:14 A Kalɛb dig n yiisa a Anak kamb a tãabã: a Sesayi, a Ayiman la a Talmayi. Bãmb yaa a Anak yagense." 
Joshua15:15 Dẽ poore a taka zabre ne Debir dãmba. Debir la b sẽn da boond pɩnd tɩ Kiriyat-Sefɛr. 
Joshua15:16 Yaa wakat kãng la a Kalɛb yeel yã: «Ned ninga sẽn tõoga Kiriyat-Sefɛr t'a lebg a soolem m na kõ-a m biig a Aksa t'a maan a paga.» 
Joshua15:17 Yɩ-la a Otniyɛl, a Kalɛb ba a Yefune yao, a Kenaz, biiga n maan raoodo. A Kalɛb rɩka a bi-pugl a Aksa, n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
Joshua15:18 A sẽn ta a sɩda nengẽ la a sẽn sagl-a t'a kos a ba pʋʋgo. Dẽ la a ta a ba taoore n sig a bõang zugu t'a Kalɛb sok-a: «Bõe la f rata?» 
Joshua15:19 T'a leoke: «Bũmb la m kota: Yãmb sẽn dɩk maam n tɩ lob Negɛb we-raoogẽ wã, bɩ y kõ-m koom zĩisi.» T'a na n kõ-a bulsi sẽn be tãms zutu la buls sẽn be tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Joshua15:20 A Zɩɩda rooga pʋɩɩr la woto: 
Joshua15:21 Tẽns niyns sẽn be a tẽnga sɛtme, Edom toaagẽ, Negɛb we-raoogẽ: Kabsyɛl, Eder, Yagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adeada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedɛs, Asor, Yitnã," 
Joshua15:24 Zif, Telem, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 Asor-Adata, Keryot, Esrõ, bɩ Asor," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Asar-Gada, Esmo, Bɛt-Pelet," 
Joshua15:28 Asar-Sual, Beerseba, Bizyotea," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iyim, Esem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Kesil, Orma," 
Joshua15:31 Siklag, Madmana, Sanesanna," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Silim, Ayin-Rimo. Fãa zãng yaa tẽns pisi la a wɛ n paas b tẽn-kogse." 
Joshua15:33 Tẽns niyns sẽn be bãada noorẽ: Estaol, Sora, Asna," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, Eyin-Ganim, Tapua, Enam" 
Joshua15:35 Yarmut, Adulam, Soko, Azɛka," 
Joshua15:36 Saarayim, Aditayim: Gedera, Gederotayim: tẽns piig la a naase ne b tẽn-kogse." 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Adasa, Migdal-Gad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilan, Mispe, Yokteyɛl," 
Joshua15:39 Lakis, Boskat, Eglõ," 
Joshua15:40 Kabõ, Lamas, Kitlis," 
Joshua15:41 Gederot, Bɛt-Dagõ, Naama, Makeda: tẽns piig la a yoob ne b tẽn-kogse." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Eter, Asã." 
Joshua15:43 Yifta, Asna, Nesib" 
Joshua15:44 Keyila, Akzib, Maresa: tẽn-toose, bɛd la bõonego, bãmb b wɛ." 
Joshua15:45 Ekrõ ne a tẽn-toose, bɛd la bõonego." 
Joshua15:46 Sẽn yɩ Ekrõ n tees nin-taoore, sẽn be Asdod sẽnẽ fãa," 
Joshua15:47 n paas Asdod ne a tẽn-toose, Gaza ne a tẽn-toose n ta Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛga la Mog kãsenga ne a noorẽ tẽnse." 
Joshua15:48 Ad tãmsa zut tẽnse: Samir, Yatir, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriyat-Sanna, yẽ boondame tɩ Debir dũnna," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Estemoa, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gosen, Olõ, Gilo: tẽns piig la a ye ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Ruma, Esã," 
Joshua15:53 Yanum, Bɛt-Tapua, Afɛka," 
Joshua15:54 Umeta, Kiriyat-Araba, yẽ boonda rũnna tɩ Ebrõ, la Sior: tẽns a wɛ ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:55 Maõ, Karmɛl, Zif, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Zizreyɛl, Yokdeam, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kayim, Gibea, Timna: tẽns piig ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:58 Alul, Bɛt-Sur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Bɛt-Anat, Eltekon: tẽns a yoob ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyat-Baal, yaa Kiriyat-Yearim; Raba: tẽns a yiib ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:61 We-raoogẽ: Bɛt-Araba, Midin, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsã, Ir-Mela, Eyin-Gedi: tẽns a yoob ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua15:63 A Zɩɩda kamb ka tõog n dig Zebuzitsa sẽn da be Zerizalɛɛm ye. Yaa rẽ yĩng la ba ne rũnna, Zebuzitsa ket n naag a Zɩɩda kamb n kẽed Zerizalɛɛm." 
Joshua16:1 Tẽng ning poeera sẽn poees n kõ a Zozɛf kamba da sɩngda Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, Zeriko sɛɛgẽ, Zeriko ko-bundma yaanga; We-raooga ra sɩngda be n tees Betɛl." 
Joshua16:2 Toaaga ra taka Betɛl n ta Luz, n yi be n digd Atarot, Arkitsa toaagẽ," 
Joshua16:3 n lɛɛg n sigd, nin-taoore, Yafletitsa tẽnga n digd Bɛt-Orõ sẽn be tẽngre, n digd Gezɛr, n tekd mog kãsengã." 
Joshua16:4 Woto n yɩ a Zozɛf kamba, a Manase la a Efrayim, pʋɩɩre." 
Joshua16:5 Sã n yaa a Efrayim kamba, bãmb soolma ra sɩnga Atrot-Adar sẽn be yaanga n tat Bɛt-Orõ ning sẽn zao tãnga zugu." 
Joshua16:6 Nin-taoore, toaaga bẽeg n teesa Mikmetat sẽn be nug goabga n lɛɛgd n gõdgd yaanga n tees Tanaat-Silo, n loog be n digd Yanoa," 
Joshua16:7 n yi be n digd Atarot la Naara, n tãagd Zeriko la Zʋrdẽ." 
Joshua16:8 Mikmetat nin-taoore, toaaga yita Tapua n tat Kana kʋɩl-bɛɛga, n tat Tẽnsʋk Mogre. Woto me la a Efrayim pʋɩɩrã." 
Joshua16:9 Lebd n paasa tẽns niyns sẽn be a Manase soolem tɩ b bas a Efrayim kamb yĩnga, bãmb ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua16:10 Kanaã rãmb sẽn da kẽed-b Gezɛr kell n paa be ne a Efrayim n ta rũnna la bãmb n so zagsa tʋʋma. 
Joshua17:1 Tẽng ning poeera sẽn poees n kõ a Zozɛf bi-kẽeng a Manase, la woto. B da reng n kõo vẽenem gãndaoog a Makir yagensã. A Makir n yɩɩ a Galaad ba. Bãmb la b ra kõ Galaad la Bazã, Zʋrdẽ yaanga." 
Joshua17:2 A Manase kamb a taaba me paama b rẽnna wala b rooga sõor sẽn da tog ne. Sẽn le paam-b pʋɩɩr yɛsa: a Abiezɛr kamba, a Elɛk, a Asriyɛl, a Sekem, a Efɛr la a Semida kamba. Bãmb yaa a Zozɛf biig a Manase kom-dibli kamba, ned kam fãa ne a roogo." 
Joshua17:3 Sã n yaa a Selofead, a Efɛr biiga, t'a Efɛr ba yaa a Galaad, t'a Galaad ba yaa a Makir, t'a Makir ba yaa a Manase, yẽ ka rog kom-dibli ye. Kom-pugli bal la a rog yã: a Mala, a Noa, a Ogla, a Milka la a Tirsa." 
Joshua17:4 Bãmb n bʋʋg maan-kʋʋd, a Elazar, a Zozuwe la kãsem-dãmba taoore, n yeele: «Wẽnd kõ-la a Moyiiz noore t'a kõ tõnd d pʋɩɩr d saam-biisa sʋka.» Woto wã, sẽn tũ ne Wẽnd noora, b reega b pʋɩɩr b ba wã saam-biis sʋka." 
Joshua17:5 Dɩlla Galaad la Bazã sẽn be Zʋrdẽ yaang toog sẽn ka, yaa tẽns piig la a Manase paam yã." 
Joshua17:6 A Manase kom-pugli wã paama pʋɩɩr b saam-biis sʋka. Galaad tẽn-peelma yɩ-la a Manase kamb a taaba soolem. 
Joshua17:7 Ad-a Manase toaaga: a yegda Asɛr; yaa Mikmetat sẽn tot ne Sikɛm. N yi be n teesd Yamin; be yaa sẽn kẽed-b Eyin-Tapua rãmb soolem. 
Joshua17:8 Tapua ra yaa a Manase soolem la zĩig a ye, a yãka toaag ne a Efrayim." 
Joshua17:9 Toaaga ra sigda Kana kʋɩl-bɛɛga, kʋɩlga rɩtgo. Yaa a Efrayim kamba tẽnse, la b ra be a Manase soolmẽ. A Manase meng soolem ra bee kʋɩlga goabga. Sã n yi be yaa mogra la f tat." 
Joshua17:10 A Efrayim n da so nug rɩtgo, t'a Manase so nug goabga. Mogrã n da yaa b toaaga. B ra basda a Asɛr goabga, n basd a Isakar yaanga." 
Joshua17:11 B kẽe a Asɛr la a Isakar soolma pʋg n bẽeg n kõ a Manase. Yaa woto la a ra so Bɛt-Seã ne a tẽn-toose, Yibleam ne a tẽn-toose, Dor ne a tẽn-toose, Eyin-Dor, Taanak, Megido ne b tẽn-toose n paas tẽnsa tãabã." 
Joshua17:12 A Manase kamba sẽn pa tõog n kẽ tẽn-bãmba yĩnga, Kanaã rãmba kell n paa be." 
Joshua17:13 A Israyɛl sẽn wa n mik t'a pãng paasame, a pa rig Kanaã rãmbã n yiis ye la bãmb n deeg zaka tʋʋm n tʋmnẽ." 
Joshua17:14 A Zozɛf rooga waa n yik n yeela a Zozuwe: «Bõe tɩ tõnd pʋɩɩr yaa a ye tãa tɩ d sõor yaool n ya wʋsgo, d sẽn paam Wẽnd bark zembal yĩnga?»" 
Joshua17:15 A Zozuwe leokame: «Efrayim tãnga sã n paood fo yĩnga, tɩ f sõor yaa wʋsgo, kẽng n tɩ kɛ la f soog Perizitsã la Refayitsa googo.»" 
Joshua17:16 Tɩ b le yeele: «Tãnga ka na n sekd d ye; Kanaã rãmba fãa sẽn be-b tẽn-nabra tara kut bilim-bilm. Bɛt-Seã ne a tẽn-toosa rãmba fãa me yaa boto, Zizreyɛl dãmba me boto.»" 
Joshua17:17 Dẽ la a Zozuwe yeel a Zozɛf roogo, a Efrayim la a Manase: «Y rooga roga wʋsgo la y tara pãnga. Y soolma ka na n yɩ tẽn-yend bal ye." 
Joshua17:18 Y na n sooga tãnga ne a sẽn ya googã. Y na n kʋʋsa tɩɩsã la y pesm-a zãng n maan y soolem. Y na n diga Kanaã rãmbã ne b sẽn ya wʋsgã, ne b bilim-bilma sẽn ya kutã.»" 
Joshua18:1 Israyɛl kamba fãa tigma taab Silo tɩ b ti Sɛka Roog be. B ra tõoga tẽnsa fãa n maand b sẽn dat ne-ba. 
Joshua18:2 Sags a yopoe n yaool n da nan ka paam b pʋɩɩr ye. 
Joshua18:3 A Zozuwe yeel-b lame: «Y na n taa wakat bʋgo n yaool sẽbg kalle n tɩ reeg vẽenem ning Soaala, y yaab rãmba Wẽnd, sẽn kõ yãmba?" 
Joshua18:4 Yãk-y neb a tã, sak fãa pʋgẽ, tɩ m tʋm-b tɩ b tɩ kaag tẽngã la b ges n gʋls sebr zugu, tẽnga sẽn na n pʋɩ seem ninga tɩ ta sagsa sẽn ketã, la y lɛɛg n wa." 
Joshua18:5 B na pas-a a yopoe n pʋɩ. A Zɩɩda na n paa a soolmẽ, rɩtgo, t'a Zozɛf paa a rẽnnẽ, goabga." 
Joshua18:6 Bɩ yãmb tɩ ges la y pʋɩ tẽnga tɩ zems pʋɩɩr a yopoe wã la y lɛɛg n wa wilg-ma. M na n maana poeere ka, Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, taoore." 
Joshua18:7 Sã n ya Levitsã, b ka na n tall pʋɩɩr yãmb sʋk ye. Bãmb pʋɩɩr na n yɩɩ Soaala maan-kʋʋrã. Sã n yaa a Gad, a Rubẽ la a Manase bogrã, bãmb zoe n deega b pʋɩɩr Zʋrdẽ yaanga, wala Wẽnd sõgna a Moyiiz sẽn da kõ-ba.»" 
Joshua18:8 Neba rɩka sore n na n tɩ kaag tẽngã t'a Zozuwe yeel-ba: «Kẽng-y n tɩ saag tẽngã n bãng a sẽn yaa a soaba la y lɛɛg n wa ka. M na sok Wẽnd n kõ yã, Silo ka.»" 
Joshua18:9 Neba loogame, b saaga tẽngã la sebr zugu b pʋɩ-a-la sags a yopoe n wa kɩs a Zozuwe, Silo sikẽ." 
Joshua18:10 Silo sikẽ, a Zozuwe soka Naaba-Wẽnd n bãng a Israyɛl sak kam fãa pʋɩɩre, n gʋls sebr zugu n wilg buud fãa a rẽnna." 
Joshua18:11 Poeera sẽn poeese, pipi pʋɩɩra yɩ-la a Bẽnzame roog rẽnna. Yẽ rẽnda da bee a Zɩɩda la a Zozɛf kamba rẽnd sʋka." 
Joshua18:12 Goabga, sɩngda Zʋrdẽ, n dʋʋd Zeriko goabga, n teesd nin-taoor tãmsã n tat Bɛt-Aven we-raoogo." 
Joshua18:13 Yita be n kẽed Luz yegende, nug rɩtgo. Luz boonda dũnna tɩ Betɛl. Beelẽ toaaga sigda Atrot-Adar, n dʋʋd tãng ning sẽn be Bɛt-Orõ rɩtgo." 
Joshua18:14 Bɛt-Orõ tɛka, a teesda nin-taoore n gõdg n wat Kiriyat-Baal, yẽ boondame tɩ Kiriyat-Yearim, a Zɩɩda kamba na-tẽnga. Toaaga la woto nin-taoore." 
Joshua18:15 Rɩtgã, toaaga sɩngda Kiriyat-Yearim. A teesda nin-taoore Neftoa bulsã." 
Joshua18:16 A sigdame n teesd tãnga sɛtmẽ, tãng ning sẽn tot ne Ben-Inom sudgã sẽn be Refayitsa goabga. Toaaga ra sigda Inom sudga, Zebuzitsa goabga, n sigd Eyin-Rogɛl." 
Joshua18:17 A le gõdgda be n digd Eyin-Semɛs la Gelilot sẽn tot ne Adumim. N yi be n sigd a Rubẽ biig, a Boã, pĩiga." 
Joshua18:18 Dẽ poore toaaga yegda nug goabga, n sigd Yamsem Mogra sẽn tõnd a taoore." 
Joshua18:19 Toaaga ra yegda Bɛt-Ogla goabga, n tat Yamsem mogrã sẽn yõbg a meng zĩig ningã, nug rɩtgo, Zʋrdẽ sẽn kẽed Yamsem Mogr nug rɩtgo. Rɩtg toaaga la woto." 
Joshua18:20 Yaangã yaa Zʋrdẽ la toaagã. Woto me la a Bẽnzame pʋɩɩr la a toaaga sẽn yãk n gilgi. 
Joshua18:21 Tẽns niyns a Bẽnzame kamb sẽn paam la woto: Zeriko, Bɛt-Ogla, Emɛk-Kesis," 
Joshua18:22 Bɛt-Araba, Semarayim, Betɛl," 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Para, Ofra," 
Joshua18:24 Kefar-Amona, Ofni, Geva: tẽns piig la a yi ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua18:25 Gabaõ, Rama, Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 Mispe, Kefira, Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Yirpeyɛl, Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 Sela, Elef, Zerizalɛɛm, Zebuze rãmb na-tẽnga, Gibea, Kiriyat: tẽns piig la a naase ne b tẽn-toose. Woto n yɩ a Bẽnzame rooga pʋɩɩre." 
Joshua19:1 Poeera sẽn poeese, pʋɩɩr a yiib soaba yɩ-la a Simeõ roog rẽnna. A Simeõ rooga pʋɩɩra ra bee a Zɩɩda rẽnda sʋka." 
Joshua19:2 Ad tẽns niyns sẽn lʋɩ b pʋɩɩrẽ: Beerseba, Seva, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Asar-Sual, Baala, Esem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Betul, Orma;" 
Joshua19:5 Siklag, Bɛt-Markabot, Asar-Susa;" 
Joshua19:6 Bɛt-Lebaot, Sarwen: tẽns piig la a tã ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:7 Ayin, Rimõ, Eter, Asã: tẽns a naas ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:8 Paasda tẽn-bõonesa fãa sẽn yegd-bã n ta Baalat-Bɛr la Ramat-Negɛb. Dẽ n yɩ a Simeõ roog pʋɩɩre. 
Joshua19:9 B sẽn kẽe a Zɩɩda soolmẽ n bẽeg n kõ a Simeõ kambã, yaa a sẽn da ya yaleng wʋsga yĩnga. Yaa rẽnd me yĩng la a Simeõ kamba pʋɩɩr waa n tɩ be a Zɩɩda soolma sʋka." 
Joshua19:10 Poeera sẽn poeese, pʋɩɩr a tãab soaba yɩ-la a Zabulõ roog rẽnna. B soolma ra tẽeg n taa Sarid." 
Joshua19:11 Nin-taoore b toaaga teesa Marala n digd Dabesɛt la kʋɩlga sẽn zoet Yokneam taoore. 
Joshua19:12 Yaanga a yita Sarid n tat Kislot-Tabor, n teesd Daverat n dʋʋd Yafia." 
Joshua19:13 A yita be n ket n digd yaanga, n digd Gat-Efɛr la Et-Kasin, n yi be n tees Rimõ n gõdgd Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Nug goabga a gilgda Annatõ n tekd Yifta-Ɛl. 
Joshua19:15 Sã n paas Katat, Naalal, Simrõ, Yidala, Bɛtelyɛɛm, yaa tẽns piig la a yiib ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:16 Woto n yɩ a Zabulõ roog pʋɩɩre, a tẽns la b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:17 Poeera sẽn poeesã, pʋɩɩr a naas soaba yɩ-la a Isakar rooga rẽnna." 
Joshua19:18 B soolma tẽeg n taa Zizreyɛl la ad-b tẽnse: Kesulot, Sunem;" 
Joshua19:19 Afarayim, Siyõ, Anaarat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Kisyõ, Ebes," 
Joshua19:21 Remet, Eyin-Ganim, Eyin-Ada, Bɛt-Pasɛs" 
Joshua19:22 Toaaga ra sɩɩsda Tabor, Sasayim, Bɛt-Semɛs la Zʋrdẽ: tẽns piig la a yoobe ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:23 Woto n yɩ a Isakar pʋɩɩr, a tẽns ne a tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:24 Poeera sẽn poeese, pʋɩɩr a nu soaba yɩ-la a Asɛr rooga rẽnna." 
Joshua19:25 Ad-b soolma tẽnse: Elkat, Ali, Beten, Akesaf," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelɛk, Amad, Misal, nin-taoore a yegda Karmɛl la Sior-Libnat." 
Joshua19:27 Yaanga a rigda Bɛt-Dagõ n tãagd Zabulõ la Ifta-Ɛl sudga, nug goabga, n paas Bɛt-Emɛk, Neyɛl la Kabul." 
Joshua19:28 A ra tak n digda Abdõ, Reob, Amo, Kana, n tat Sidõ tẽn-kãsenga." 
Joshua19:29 Toaaga gõdgda be n tees Rama n tat Tir tãnsoben-doogo, n tat Osa, Maalab, Akzib," 
Joshua19:30 Um, Afɛk, Reob n tat Tẽnsʋk Mogrã. Yaa tẽns pisi la a yi ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:31 Woto n yɩ a Asɛr roog pʋɩɩre, a tẽns ne a tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:32 Poeera sẽn poeese, pʋɩɩr a yoob soaba yɩ-la a Neftali roog rẽnna." 
Joshua19:33 Nug rɩtgo b toaaga yita Elef, n yegd Saananim kʋka n tees Adami-Nekɛb la Yabneyɛl n tat Lakum la Zʋrdẽ." 
Joshua19:34 Nin-taoore toaaga pɩʋʋga Aznot-Tabor, n sɩɩsd Ukok la a Zabulõ soolem, dɩtgo, n basd Asɛr nin-taoore, n basd Zʋrdẽ, yaang sẽnẽ." 
Joshua19:35 Tãnsoben-tẽnsa ra yaa Sidim, Ser, Amat, Rakat, Kinerɛt," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Asor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedɛs, Edreyi, Eyin-Asor," 
Joshua19:38 Yirõ, Migdal-Ɛl, Orem, Bɛt-Anat, Bɛt-Semɛs, tẽns piig la a wɛ ne b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:39 Woto n yɩ a Neftali roog pʋɩɩre, b tẽns la b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:40 Poeera sẽn poeese, pʋɩɩr a yoob soaba yɩ-la a Dã roogo rẽnna. Ad-b soolma:" 
Joshua19:41 Sora, Estaol, Ir-Semes," 
Joshua19:42 Salabim, Ayalõ, Yitla," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timna, Ekrõ," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Gibetõ, Baalat" 
Joshua19:45 Yeud, Bene-Berak, Gat-Rimo;" 
Joshua19:46 Yarkõ kʋɩlga, Rakõ la Zafa tẽn-peelem." 
Joshua19:47 A Dã kamba soolem ka leb-b zãng ye. Dẽ la b tɩ tak zabr ne Lesem la b sẽn tõog-ba b kooda b neba fãa. B kẽe tẽngã. La b teka a yʋʋrã tɩ lebg Dã, b yaaba yʋʋre." 
Joshua19:48 Woto n yɩ a Dã roog pʋɩɩre, b tẽns la b tẽn-toose." 
Joshua19:49 Tẽnga pʋɩɩb sɛɛ woto. Israyɛl kamba kõ-la a Nun biig, a Zozuwe, a pʋɩɩr, bãmb sʋka." 
Joshua19:50 B tũu Naaba-Wẽnd daabo n kõ a Zozuwe a sẽn da kos tẽng ningã, Timnat-Sera, Efrayim tãnga zugu. A Zozuwe le maneg m mee tẽngã n kẽ." 
Joshua19:51 Yaa woto la Silo tẽnga, sɛka Roog noore, Wẽnnaam taoore, maan-kʋʋd a Elazar, a Nun biig, a Zozuwe, la kãsem-dãmbã sok Naaba-Wẽnd n bãng buud fãa ne a pʋɩɩre. Yaa woto la pʋɩɩra sɛ yã." 
Joshua20:1 Wẽnd yeela a Zozuwe: 
Joshua20:2 «Gom ne Israyɛl kamba la f yeel-ba: kõ-y mens soondg tẽnse m sẽn gom b rãmb yell ne a Moyiiz. 
Joshua20:3 Ned sã n yĩd n kʋ neda, tɩ raab wẽng ka lʋɩ sʋk bada, a tõe n zoe n tɩ soonda be n põs sẽn ki a soaba roagda sẽn dat n daag zɩɩm n dole." 
Joshua20:4 Yaa tẽn-bãmb pʋga la sẽn kʋ-a ned tog n zoe n kẽnge. A sã n ta tẽnga noore, a yaasdame n wilg nin-kẽemba a sẽn maan bũmb ninga. Bãmb n kẽesd-a tẽnga pʋga, n bao zĩig n kõ-a t'a zĩnd." 
Joshua20:5 Sẽn kʋ a soaba roagda sã n wa, n dat n dok a sũuri b ka yiisd-a n kõ-a ye. Tɩ pʋ-toog ka zĩnd ye, yɩɩ yĩdgu, ka tũ ne beem kʋdg ye." 
Joshua20:6 Sẽn kʋ-a neda tog n paa tẽnga pʋga n ta wakat ning b sẽn na n kao a bʋʋdo, n ta maan-kʋʋd kãseng ning sẽn so-a tʋʋmna wakat kãnga, kũum. Dẽ poor bal la a na n tõog n leb a tẽngẽ la a zakẽ.»" 
Joshua20:7 Ad tẽns niyns b sẽn yãk tɩ na n yɩ soondg zĩiga: Kedɛs, Galile tẽn-peelmẽ, Neftali tãng zugu. Le paasa Sikɛm, a Efrayim tãnga zugu. Le paasa, a Zɩɩda tãnga zugu, Kiriyat-Araba, sẽn boond dũnna tɩ Ebrõ." 
Joshua20:8 Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, Zeriko yaanga, a Rubẽ tẽn-peelmẽ la weooga noorẽ, b yãka Besɛr. N yãk a Rubẽ soolmẽ, Ramot-Galaad, a Gad tẽn-peelmẽ. N yãk Golan, Bazã tãng zugu, a Manase tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Joshua20:9 Woto n yɩ tẽns niyns b sẽn yãk tẽnga kamba la sãamba yĩnga tɩ b na n yɩ soondg zĩisi ned ning fãa sẽn na n yĩd n kʋ a to yĩnga. La woto a tõogdame n põs sẽn ki-a wã roagda sẽn dat n daag a zɩɩm, n ta a bʋʋda wakato." 
Joshua21:1 Levitsa sags kãsem-dãmb waa n yãenda maan-kʋʋd, a Elazar, la a Nun biig a Zozuwe, la a Israyɛl buud kãsem-dãmbã," 
Joshua21:2 dẽ tɩ b be Silo, Kanaã tẽnga, la b yeelame: «Wẽnd togsa a Moyiiz tɩ b kõ d tẽns d sẽn na n kẽ, la zĩis d sẽn na n wãben d dũmsi.»" 
Joshua21:3 Yaa woto la Israyɛl kamba tũ Wẽnd daabo n kẽ b soolmẽ n yãk tẽns kẽere la rũms wãbneg zĩisi n kõ Levitsã. 
Joshua21:4 Ad tẽng ning poeera sẽn kõ Keyatitsa roogo. Levitsa kẽere, maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ kamba, paama tẽns piig la a tãabo a Zɩɩda, a Simeõ la a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Joshua21:5 A Keyat kamb a taaba paama tẽns piig a Efrayim, a Dã la a Manase bogra soolmẽ." 
Joshua21:6 B kẽ-la a Isakar, a Asɛr, a Neftali la a Manase bogr a to wã soolmẽ n yãk tẽns piig la a tãabo n kõ a Gersõ kambã." 
Joshua21:7 B kẽ-la a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Zabulõ soolmẽ n yãk tẽns piig la a yi a Merari kamba yĩnga, wala b sõora sẽn da tog ne." 
Joshua21:8 Wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz, Israyɛl kamba kõo Levitsã tẽns la rũms wãbneg zĩisi, ned kam fãa wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn leok a yĩnga." 
Joshua21:9 Tẽns niyns b sẽn yãk a Zɩɩda la a Simeõ soolmẽ tɩ na n yɩ tẽn-kẽedse la wãbneg zĩisi, la woto:" 
Joshua21:10 B kõ-b-la Keyatitsã, a Levi kamba, a Aarõ yagense, tɩ poeera sɩnga ne bãmba." 
Joshua21:11 Ad-b sẽn paame: Kiriyat-Araba, ne a wãbneg zĩisi, Zɩɩda tãnga zugu. Kiriyat-Araba yaa Ebrõ. A Araba yɩ-la a Anak ba." 
Joshua21:12 A Yefune biig, a Kalɛb, n paam pʋtã la tẽn-bõonesã," 
Joshua21:13 tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Aarõ kamba deeg n na n maan nin-kʋʋdsa soondg tẽnse la rũmsa wãbneg zĩisi, Ebrõ, Libna," 
Joshua21:14 n paas Yatir, Estemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Olõ, Debir," 
Joshua21:16 Asã, Yuta, Bɛt-Semɛs. Yaa tẽns a wɛ la b paam buud a yiiba soolmẽ." 
Joshua21:17 A Bẽnzame soolmẽ b paama Gabaõ, Geba, ne b wãbneg zĩisi," 
Joshua21:18 Anatot, Alemet: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:19 Zãng fãa yaa tẽns pĩig la a tãabo la a Aarõ yagens paam yã. Naaga ne wãbneg zĩisi. 
Joshua21:20 Yɩ-la a Efrayim soolmẽ la b yãk tẽns n kõ a Keyat yagense. Poeesame n kõ bãmb tẽns sẽn be a Efrayim tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Joshua21:21 B kõ-b-la Sikɛm ne a wãbneg zĩiga, Efrayim tãnga zugu n paas Gezɛr," 
Joshua21:22 Kibsayim, Bɛt-Orõ ne b wãneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:23 A Dã soolmẽ yɩɩ Elteke, Gibetõ, tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:24 Ayalõ, Gat-Rimo ne b wãbneg zĩisi." 
Joshua21:25 A Manase bogr a ye soolmẽ, Taanak, Yibleam ne b wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a yiibu." 
Joshua21:26 Fãa gill yaa tẽns piig ne b wãbneg zĩis la b kõ a Keyat kamba sẽn da kelle. 
Joshua21:27 A Manase bogr a to wã soolmẽ, b kõ-la a Gersõ kamba, Levitsã, Golan sẽn be Bazã n paas Besetera, ne b wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a yiibu." 
Joshua21:28 A Isakar soolmẽ b kõo Kisyõ, Dabrat," 
Joshua21:29 Yarmut, Eyin-Ganim, ne b wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:30 A Asɛr Soolmẽ, Misal, Abdõ:" 
Joshua21:31 Elkat, Reob, ne b wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:32 A Neftali soolmẽ, Galile Kedɛs sẽn ya soondg tẽnga, ne Amot-Dor, Kartã ne b wãbneg zĩisi; tẽns a tã." 
Joshua21:33 A Gersõ kamb tẽnsa zãng yaa Piig la a tã ne b wãbneg zĩisi. 
Joshua21:34 Levitsa sẽn kellã, a Merari kamba, b kẽ-la a Zabulõ soolmẽ n yãk Yokneam, Karta," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna, Naalal ne wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:36 Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnd yaanga, a Rubẽ buud soolmẽ b kõ Besɛr n paas Yaas," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot, Mefaat ne b wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:38 Gad dãmb soolmẽ, Ramot-Galaad sẽn ya soondg tẽnga, Maanayim," 
Joshua21:39 Esbõ, Yazɛr ne wãbneg zĩisi: tẽns a naase." 
Joshua21:40 A Merari yagens kamb a taaba zu-nooga pʋɩɩr zãnga yɩɩ tẽns piig la a yiibu. 
Joshua21:41 Dɩlla Levitsa sẽn paam tẽns a Israyɛl kamb a taaba sʋk yaa pis-naas la a nii ne b wãbneg zĩisi. 
Joshua21:42 Sã n gom tẽng yell fãa naagdame n gom wãbnega zĩig sẽn da gũbga wã. Yɩɩ boto ne tẽng fãa. 
Joshua21:43 Yɩɩ woto la Wẽnd pids b sẽn da kãab a Israyɛl. B kõ-b-la tẽnga zãnga. B sɩd deeg-a lame n kẽ. 
Joshua21:44 Wẽnd kõ-b-la laafi b tẽn-peelmẽ wala b sẽn da kãab b yaab rãmba la bɛ ba a ye ka yals b taoore ye. Wẽnnaam dɩka b bɛɛba fãa n sagl b nusẽ. 
Joshua21:45 Kãobg noog ning fãa Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da kãab a Israyɛl doogo, ba a ye ka pa n ka pids ye. Fãa taasame." 
Joshua22:1 A Zozuwe boola a Rubẽ nebã n paas a Gad la a Manase bogrã 
Joshua22:2 n yeel-ba: «Wẽnd sõgne, a Moyiiz, sẽn kõ yãmb noor ningã y reeg-a lame; y le kelga mam meng sẽn yet tɩ y maan bũmb ning fãa." 
Joshua22:3 Al n ta rũnna, yãmb pa leb poorẽ n bas y saam-biisã, zabra ne a kaoosda, tɩ y tʋlgame n deeg zãnga, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn wilg-y bũmb ninga fãa." 
Joshua22:4 Marsã, Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, kõ-la y saam-biisã laafi ninga b sẽn da kãab-bã. Dẽ yĩngã yãmb me leb y rotẽ, Wẽnd sõgen a Moyiiz sẽn kõ yãmb tẽng ninga pʋgẽ, Zʋrdẽ yaanga." 
Joshua22:5 Gũus-y neere n tũ saglsã la noya Wẽnd sõgen, a Moyiiz, sẽn wilg-y, n nong Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, ne y sũur fãa, n tũud b soy, n deeg b noya, n bas tɩ y yam kẽ-b zãnga, n waoog-b ne y sũur fãa la y yalẽ fãa.»" 
Joshua22:6 A Zozuwe ning-b-la barka, n pʋʋs b Wẽnd na taase. Ned kam fãa leba a tẽngẽ." 
Joshua22:7 Yaa Bazã tẽn-peelmẽ la a Moyiiz ra kẽes a Manase bogr a ye. Bogra a to wã deega a pʋɩɩr b saam-biisa sʋk Zʋrdẽ nin-taoore. A sẽn waa n kulsd-b, a Zozuwe ning-b-la barka. A yeela woto:" 
Joshua22:8 «Leb-y y tẽnsẽ ne arzɛk sẽn ka paoode, ne rũms wʋsgo, ne wanzurfu, sãnem, zũudu, kutu la fut sẽn ka tar sõor ye. Bɩ y pʋɩ ne y saam-biisã y bɛɛba laogo.»" 
Joshua22:9 A Rubẽ kamba, a Gad kamba, la a Manase bogrã leba b tẽnsẽ. Yaa Silo, Kanaã tẽng la b bas Israyɛl kamba a taabã n leb Galaad, b pʋɩɩr tẽnga, wala Wẽnd sẽn da wilg a Moyiiz t'a kõ-ba." 
Joshua22:10 B sẽn ta Gelilot, Zʋrdẽ noor, Kanaã tẽn-peelmẽ, a Rubẽ ne a Gad la a Manase bogrã mee maan-kugr kãsenga." 
Joshua22:11 Israyɛl kamb a taaba wʋma yellã. B wʋmame t'a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase kamba mee maan-kugr kãsenga, Kanaã tẽn-peelem, Gelilot, Zʋrdẽ noorẽ, b sẽn gãndg Israyɛl kamba toaaga." 
Joshua22:12 La bãmb sẽn wʋme, b sũu taab n na n wa tak zabr ne-ba." 
Joshua22:13 Yaa maan-kʋʋd a Elazar biig, a Pinas, la b reng n tʋm a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase bogrã nengẽ." 
Joshua22:14 N paas buud kãsem-dãmb piiga, nin-yend sẽn tũus tus-wɛɛl sʋka;" 
Joshua22:15 B ta-la b nengẽ, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ n yeel-b woto:" 
Joshua22:16 «Ad Israyɛl Soaala kamb sẽn yet-y: Yaa bõe tɩ y maan sẽn ya wẽng a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam nifẽ? Bõe tɩ yãmb bas Soaala, y Wẽnnaam, dũnna, n me maan-kugri? Tɩ d mi tɩ maan-kugra meeb yaa y sẽn dat n yi Wẽnd soolmẽ wã tʋʋmde." 
Joshua22:17 Peor wɩɩbdã n ka sek bɩ? Al n ta rũnna menga, al ne sɩbgr ning Wẽnd sẽn sɩbg b buudã, d ket n nan ka pek ne Peor rẽgda ye!" 
Joshua22:18 Yãmb sẽn yik rũnna n bas b pʋgbã, yãmb sẽn zẽkd y zug ne bãmbã, ad-y beoogo, b me na n yika b sũura ne b buud a Israyɛl." 
Joshua22:19 Y sã n mikame tɩ tẽng ning b sẽn kõ yãmba ka tẽn-sõngo, bɩ y wa Wẽnd soolmẽ, b rooga sẽn ti zĩig ningã, wa n kẽ-y tõnd sʋka la y ra zẽk y zug ne Naaba-Wẽnd ye, ra zẽk-y y zug ne tõnd me n yik n met maan-kugr a to, Wẽnnaam, tõnd Soaala, maan-kugr sɛɛgẽ ye." 
Joshua22:20 M sok n gese, a Zera biig, a Akã, sẽn waa n wɩɩbã, a sẽn waa n dɩk sẽn kisã, ka buuda zãng la Wẽnd sũ-puura rɩr wɛɛ? A ka yɩ a ye n maan kaalem a yel-wẽnda yĩng ye.»" 
Joshua22:21 A Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase bogra kamb leoka kãsem-dãmbã." 
Joshua22:22 «Bɩ Soaala sẽn ya Wẽndã yɩ d kaseto, a Israyɛl Soaala sẽn ya Wẽnnaama yɩ d kaseto, la a Israyɛl meng yɩ kaseto! Sã n yaa zẽk-m-menga, sã n yaa Wẽnd la d zãgsda bɩ d fãa ki rũnna!" 
Joshua22:23 D sã n mee maan-kugr n na n yi d Soaala maasmẽ, n na kʋʋd d yũ-nood maand, la d kõt d kũuni, n na n kʋʋd laafi kosg maand, bɩ Wẽnd sok-do!" 
Joshua22:24 Ayo! Ad-y d sẽn me maan-kugrã yaa wala d sẽn sãmbd d yamẽ tɩ yãmb kamba na n wa yik beoog n sok tõnd kambã: ‹Bõe n be yãmb ne Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sʋka? 
Joshua22:25 Tõnd ne yãmb sʋka, Rubẽ la a Gad kamba, Wẽnd yãka toaaga, yaa Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga. Dɩlla yãmb pʋɩɩr ka le be ne Wẽnd ye!› D zoee yãmb kamba goama na n wa kɩt tɩ tõnd kamba ka le zoe Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, nif ye." 
Joshua22:26 Yaa rẽ yĩng la d yeel d mense: ‹D me maan-kugr kãnga.› A pa na n yɩ yũ-nood bɩ maand a taab kʋʋb zĩig ye. 
Joshua22:27 A na n yɩɩ kaset bala, tõnd ne yamb sʋka, d kamb ne yãmb kamb sʋka, tõnd loogr poore, tɩ yaa Naaba-Wẽnd la d waoogd ne d yũ-nood maando, d sugr kosg maando, d maan-dɩtse. Woto yãmb kamba kõn tõog n yeel d kambã: ‹Yãmb ka tar pʋɩɩr bilfr meng Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, nengẽ ye.›" 
Joshua22:28 D yeela d mense: ‹B sã n yik beoogo n gomd woto ne tõnd bɩ ne d kamba, d na yeele: Ges-y Soaala-Wẽnd maan-kugra sẽn da yaa a soab akɩka. D ba rãmba ka mee-a yũ-nood maand bɩ maand a taab kʋʋb yĩng ye, b mee-a-la tõnd ne yãmb kaset yĩnga.›" 
Joshua22:29 Bũmb sẽn zãr ne tõndo yaa d zẽk d zug ne Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, yaa d wẽnemd d kãare n tees bãmba, n yik n met maan-kugr sẽn ya toore ne sẽn be-a Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, sɛka roogẽ, d yũ-nood maand bɩ d kũuni, bɩ d maand a taab yĩnga.»" 
Joshua22:30 Maan-kʋʋd a Pinas, nin-kẽembã la buuda kãsem-dãmb sẽn wʋm a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase kamba sẽn leoke, b yeelame tɩ zemsame." 
Joshua22:31 Dẽ la maan-kʋʋd a Elazar biig, a Pinas, leok-ba: «D mii marsã tɩ Soaala bee ne do y sẽn pa saag n wɩɩb yĩngã la woto y zãaga a Israyɛl ne Wẽnd sɩbgre.»" 
Joshua22:32 Maan-kʋʋd a Elazar biig, a Pinas, n paas nin-kẽembã basa a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase kambã. B yii Galaad tẽng n leb Kanaã, b saam-biisa nengẽ, la b taas-b-la leokrã." 
Joshua22:33 Israyɛl kamb sũur yɩɩ noogo. B pʋʋsa Wẽnd barka la b pa le gom b na tak zabre la b sãam a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Manase rãmb tẽng ye." 
Joshua22:34 A Rubẽ ne a Gad kamba bao yʋʋr n pʋd maan-kugra. B ra yetame: «Yɩ kaset tõnd ne taab sʋka tɩ Soaala yaa Wẽnnaam.» 
Joshua23:1 Wẽnd sẽn kõ a Israyɛl t'a vʋʋs ne a bɛɛba n ka tak zabr, paam n kaoos a wʋsgo. A Zozuwe waa n kʋʋlame, a waa n lebga nin-kẽema." 
Joshua23:2 A Zozuwe tigma a Israyɛl, a nin-kẽemba, a taoor dãmba, a bʋ-kaoodba n yeel-ba: «Sã n ya maam, m kʋʋlame, m yʋʋm lebga wʋsgo." 
Joshua23:3 Yãmb mens yãee ne y nini, Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, sẽn maan bũmb ning ne sẽn da so-b tẽnga pĩndã. Yaa Wẽnnaam, y Soaalã, n sõng yãmba." 
Joshua23:4 Ade, m kõ-y-la wala y zu-noog pʋɩɩre, tẽns niyns y sẽn bas n pa wã wã, wala tẽns niyns m sẽn menes b nebã zãnga, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg n ta Mog kãsenga, wĩndga sẽn lʋɩtẽ." 
Joshua23:5 Wẽnnaam, y Soaala, n na n dig sẽn ket-bã y taoore. B na n pĩng-b-la yãmb taoore, y na n deega b tẽnsã n sooge wala b sẽn da kãab-y." 
Joshua23:6 Dɩlla, maan-y raoodo n deeg la y pids sẽn be a Moyiiz noora pʋgẽ n ka bʋdg goabga, n ka bʋdg rɩtgo." 
Joshua23:7 Da saag-y n fãoog y mense ne buud a taba sẽn ket n vɩ-b yãmb sɛɛgẽ wã ye. Da pʋd-y b wẽn-naandsa yʋʋre, da wẽen-y ne bãmba, da pʋg-y-ba, da wõgemd-y b taoor ye." 
Joshua23:8 Modg-y n tabend Soaala, yãmb Wẽnde, wala y sẽn maan n tãag rũnna." 
Joshua23:9 Na n tũu boto tɩ Wẽnd dig y taoore, buud sẽn labsa la sẽn tar pãng n yɩɩd yãmba, la ba a ye ka tõog-y, n ta rũnna ye." 
Joshua23:10 Yãmb nin-yend tõe n diga neb tusri, tɩ yaa Wẽnnaam meng b toore, n da zabd y yĩnga, wala b sẽn da kãabe." 
Joshua23:11 Y sã n dat n põse bɩ y modg n nong Soaala, y Wẽnnaam." 
Joshua23:12 Y sã n sak wɩɩbdo n tɩ fãoog ne buud niyns sẽn yeg b yãmbã, n kẽ b buudẽ, tɩ b lebg y reem dãmba, tɩ y kẽed b tẽnsẽ tɩ bãmb me kẽed y tẽnsẽ," 
Joshua23:13 bãng-y tɩ wakat kãng tɛka Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, kõn le rig-b yãmb taoor ye. La yãmb yĩnga b na lebga tãooga, n lebg bẽdgo, n lebg sãbsga y lugẽ, n lebg gõaag y nini al tɩ y wa tol n menem zãng, tẽn-sõng ning Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ yãmba." 
Joshua23:14 M ka na n kaoos la m yi moog ye. Na n yɩɩ rũnna bala. Deeg-y y sũurẽ la y yamẽ tɩ kãab nood niyns Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, sẽn kãab yãmba, ka pa vɩɩd ye. Ba a ye ka pa n ka pids ye." 
Joshua23:15 Bãng-y tɩ kãab nooda fãa sẽn pidsã, Soaala, y Wẽnnaama, tõeeme n pids kãab wẽnsa me. B tõeeme n menes yãmb tẽng ning b sẽn kõ yãmba pʋga." 
Joshua23:16 Sɩda, yãmb sã n sãam zood ning b sẽn yõg ne yãmbã, y sã n pʋg wẽn-naandsã, y sã n wõgemd b taoore, Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, sũur na n puuga ne yã la y kõn kaoos n menem n zãag ne tẽn-sõng ning b sẽn kõ yãmba ye.»" 
Joshua24:1 A Zozuwe tigma Israyɛl buuda Sikɛm. Yɩɩ Wẽnd taoore la a bool nin-kẽemba, taoor dãmba, bʋ-kaoodba la tʋʋmda zu-raado." 
Joshua24:2 A yeela b fãa: «Ad Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛga: ‹A Tera, y yaab a Abraam la a Nawor ba, da kẽeda Efrat kʋɩlga rʋʋnde. A ra waoogda wẽnd dãmb a taaba." 
Joshua24:3 M dʋʋga Efrat kʋɩlgã n tɩ bool y ba, a Abraam, n kɩt t'a wa Kanaã tẽnga. M kõ-a-la rogem, m kõ-a-la a Izaak." 
Joshua24:4 M kõ-la a Izaak, a Zakoob la a Ezayu. M kõ-la a Ezayu Seyir tãnga. A Zakoob ne a kamba wa n siga Ezipt." 
Joshua24:5 M waa n tʋma a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ la m sɩbga Ezipt ne bõn-bãn m sẽn maan be. M waa n yiis-y-la be. 
Joshua24:6 M yiisa y ba-rãmb Ezipt tẽnga. Y teesa mogrã. Ezipt rãmb yii ne wed-dʋʋdba la bilim-bilm, n pʋg y ba rãmba n ta Rudum Mogre." 
Joshua24:7 B kelma Wẽnde tɩ b yals lik sẽn tagme yãmb ne Ezipt rãmba sʋka. B kɩtame tɩ mogra lɛɛg n wa rɩ-ba. Y yãenda ne y nin m sẽn maan Ezipt tẽnga. Y kẽna we-raoogẽ wã n kaoose. 
Joshua24:8 M waa n kẽes-y-la Amoritsa tẽnga sẽn be Zʋrdẽ yaanga. B sẽn tak zabr ne yãmba, m dɩk-b lame n sagl y nusẽ. M sẽn menes-b yãmb taoore, y paama b tẽngã n sooge." 
Joshua24:9 La a Balak, a Sipor biig la Moab dãmb dĩm, waa n yikame n na n tak zabr ne Israyɛl. A tɩ boola a Beor biig, a Balaam, t'a wa kãab-y beedo." 
Joshua24:10 M pa sak n kelg a Balaam ye. Menga, a kong ning-y-la barka la m fãag-y-la a Balak nugẽ." 
Joshua24:11 Y rʋʋga Zʋrdẽ n ta Zeriko la Zeriko soaalba yik n teega ne yãmba. Amoritse, Perizitse, Kanaã rãmba, Ititse, Girgazitse, Ivitse la Zebuzitse me yika ne yãmba. M dɩk-b lame n sagl y nusẽ." 
Joshua24:12 M lʋɩɩsa kãnenkãas y taoore tɩ b rig Amoritsa dĩm dãmb a yiibu, ka tũ ne sʋʋg wõogre bɩ tãp yãagr ye." 
Joshua24:13 M kõ-y-la tẽng sẽn dɩlgd a neb tɩ b tʋʋlg ka kaoog ye, tẽns yãmb sẽn ka nams n me, n yaool n kẽ ye, bugsuntund la oliv tɩɩse y sẽn pa sel n yaool n dɩt b biis rũnna.› »" 
Joshua24:14 A Zozuwe paasame: «Zoe-y Soaala marsã, tũ-y-b zãng ne pʋ-peelem. Zãag-y y mense ne wẽn-naandsã y yaab rãmba sẽn waoog Efrat yaang, la Ezipt tẽnga. Pʋg-y Soaala." 
Joshua24:15 Yãmb sã n ka rat n pʋg Soaala bɩ y yãk rũnna wẽnd niyns y sẽn na n pʋgã: y ba-rãmb sẽn pʋg b rãmb kʋɩlga rʋʋnde, bɩ wẽn-naandse, b sẽn ket n waoogd Amoritsa tẽns niyns y sẽn kẽed rũnna. Sã n ya maam ne m roogo, yaa Wẽnnaam, d Soaala, la tõnd na n tũ.»" 
Joshua24:16 Zãma wã leokame: «Wẽnd na laas d ne Soaala basgo la wẽn-naandsa pʋgbo! 
Joshua24:17 Ka Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam, n yiis tõnd ne d ba-rãmb Ezipt, d yembd tẽnga, n maan bõn-bãn d nifẽ, n wogl d yõor d so woka zugu la tẽns niyns d sẽn pɩʋʋga laa?" 
Joshua24:18 Soaala riga tẽnsa rãmb d taoore la Amoritsa tẽn-peelmẽ dãmba n yɩɩda. Tõnd me ratame n kẽ d Soaala tɩ bãmb la tõnd Wẽnde.» 
Joshua24:19 Dẽ la a Zozuwe yeel-ba: «Y pa na n tõog n pʋg Soaala ye tɩ b yaa Wẽnd sẽn pid ne sõmblem. Yaa Wẽnd sẽn pa rat tɩ b waoog bũmb a to n paas bãmb ye. B kõ pa n ka sɩbg y tõdgre la y beegr ye. 
Joshua24:20 Y sã n bas bãmb pʋgbo n pʋg wẽn-naandsã, bãmb me na nams yã, b na menes yã la bãmb n yaool n sɩng n maan y neere.»" 
Joshua24:21 Zãma wã leoka a Zozuwe: «Yaa Soaala la tõnd na n pʋge, ka na n yɩ wẽn-naandsa ye.»" 
Joshua24:22 T'a Zozuwe lɛɛg n yeele: «Yãmb meng kaseto n na n paalg yã la y kõta kaseto tɩ yaa yãmb meng n yãk Soaala la yaa Soaala la y na n tũ bala.» Tɩ b leoke: «N-ye! D meng kõta kaseto.» 
Joshua24:23 T'a Zozuwe me yeele: «Sã n ya woto yiis-y bu-zẽmba wẽn-naandsa sẽn be yãmb sʋka la kɩll-y sũuri n tees Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam.»" 
Joshua24:24 Zãma wã yeela a Zozuwe: «Yaa d Soaala, d Wẽnnaam, la d dat n pʋge, bãmb noor sẽn togs la d na n deege.»" 
Joshua24:25 Ba daare, yɩɩ woto la a Zozuwe ne zãma wã kaool ne taaba. Sikɛm tẽnga; a Zozuwe kõo Israyɛl kamba b rog-n-mik la noy-niyns b sẽn na n deege." 
Joshua24:26 A Zozuwe gʋlsa rẽ fãa Wẽnnaam noor sebra pʋga. A Rɩka kug bedre n sel kʋk tẽngre, la kʋk kãng bee Wẽnd sẽn yãk b waoogr zĩigẽ wã." 
Joshua24:27 A Zozuwe yeela nebã: «Ade, kug kãnga n na n yɩ d paalgr kaseto t'a wʋma Wẽnd sẽn togsd bũmb ninga fãa; a na n yɩ kaseto n gɩgd-y tɩ y da bas Wẽnnaam, y Soaala ye.»" 
Joshua24:28 A Zozuwe bas-b lame la ned kam fãa leba a tẽngẽ. 
Joshua24:29 Dẽ poore a Zozuwe, a Nun biig la Wẽnd sõgna, ki-la a yʋʋm koabg la piiga." 
Joshua24:30 B mum-a-la a pʋɩɩr tẽngẽ, Timnat-Sera sẽn be Efrayim tãnga zugu, Gaas tãng goabga." 
Joshua24:31 A Israyɛl pʋga Wẽnd n tãag a Zozuwe kũum la nin-kẽemsa fãa sẽn kell n vɩɩnd, yẽ loogr poore. A Israyɛl pʋga Wẽnd n tãag sẽn da yãend-b tʋʋm sõma niyns Wẽnd sẽn tʋm a Israyɛl yĩnga loogre." 
Joshua24:32 Israyɛl kamba da yii Ezipt ne a Zozɛf kõaba la b mum-b-la pʋʋg ninga a Zakoob sẽn da ra a Sikɛm ba, a Amor, kamb nengẽ. A da raa-a-la wanzurf wakɩ koeems koabga la pʋ-kãng ra lebga a Zozɛf kamb pʋɩɩre." 
Joshua24:33 A Aarõ biig, a Elazar, me waa n kiime. B mum-a-la Gibea, a biig, a Pinas, tẽnga. Yaa Efrayim tãmsa tãn-bila la b da rɩk n kõ a Pinas." 
Judges1:1 A Zozuwe kũum poore a Israyɛl soka Soaala-Wẽnde: «Ãnda n na n babs Kanaã rãmb pipi n tak zabr ne ba?» 
Judges1:2 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leok: «Na n yɩ-la a Zɩɩda; m na rɩk tẽngã n sagl a nugẽ.» 
Judges1:3 Dẽ n so t'a Zɩɩda me yeel a Simeõ: «Yãag maam m pʋɩɩr tẽngẽ tɩ d zab ne Kanaã rãmba. Dẽ poore m me na yãag foom f soolmẽ n zab n sõng-fo.» A Simeõ sakame. 
Judges1:4 A Zɩɩda dʋʋ n paama a bɛɛbã la Naaba-Wẽnd dɩk-b lame n sagl a nugẽ, yɩɩ Kanaã rãmba n paas Perizitse. Bezɛk tẽnga b kʋʋ neb tus piiga." 
Judges1:5 Sɩd yaa Bezɛk la b seg dĩm a Adoni-Bezɛk. B taka zabre la b tõoga Kanaã rãmb la Perizitse. 
Judges1:6 Dĩma Adoni-Bezɛk loba nao, la b sẽn dig-a n yõke, b fiuusa a nug-raado la a nao-raado." 
Judges1:7 Dẽ la a Adoni-Bezɛk yeel yã: «Dĩm dãmb pisopoe n ka le tar nug-raad la nao-raad n vũnumd, m dɩɩba roagendga tẽngre, n wʋkd dɩ zeremse. M sẽn maan m taaba la Wẽnd dol-ma.» B tall a lame n kẽng Zerizalɛɛm la a tɩ kii be." 
Judges1:8 A Zɩɩda neba taka zabr ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmba. Bãmb n tõoge la b kooda tẽnga rãmb ne sʋʋse n lɛɛg n yõog tẽnga bugum. 
Judges1:9 Zɩɩda neba yaool n sigame n zab ne Kanaã rãmba; kẽer da ti b rot tãnga zugu, tɩ kẽer be Negɛb, tɩ kẽer be tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Judges1:10 Dẽ poore yɩɩ zabre ne Kanaã rãmba sẽn da kẽed Ebrõ. Yaa Ebrõ la b sẽn da boond pĩnd tɩ Kiriyat-Araba. B tõoga dĩm dãmba, a Sesayi, a Ayiman la a Talmayi." 
Judges1:11 B yii be n tɩ zab ne Debir dãmba. Debir da boondame tɩ Kiriyat-Sefɛr. 
Judges1:12 A Kalɛb yeelame: «Ned ninga sẽn na n tõog Sefɛr, m na rɩk m bi-pugla, a Aksa, n kõ-a t'a maan a paga.»" 
Judges1:13 A Otniyɛl n tõog Sefɛr tẽnga. Yẽ yaool n da yaa a Kenaz biiga la a Kenaz yaa a Kalɛb yẽere. A Kalɛb sɩd dɩka a Aksa n kõ-a. 
Judges1:14 A Aska sẽn ta a Otniyɛl zakẽ, a sagl-a lame t'a kos a Kalɛb pʋʋgo. Paga ra zomba bõanga la a sẽn sigi, a Kalɛb sok-a lame: «Yaa bõe la f rata?»" 
Judges1:15 T'a leoke: «M kot-y-la kũuni, y sẽn kõ-m vẽenem Negɛb bɩ y kõ-m koom zĩisi.» A Kalɛb kõ-a-la zĩis sẽn tar koom, tãnga zug la tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Judges1:16 A Moyiiz rɛɛmba yagense, Kenitsa, yãaga a Zɩɩda kamba. B yii komsa tẽnga n dig Zɩɩda we-raoogẽ sẽn be Arad nug rɩtgo. B waa n fãooga ne Israyɛl." 
Judges1:17 A Zɩɩda yãaga a Simeõ, a saam-biiga. B tõoga Kanaã rãmb sẽn da kẽed Sefat la b kãaba tẽnga beedo. Yaa rẽ yĩng la tẽnga boond tɩ Orma, raboogo." 
Judges1:18 Gaza ne a tẽn-peelma lʋɩ-la a Zɩɩda nugẽ, n paas Askelõ ne a vẽenema, Ekrõ me ne a vẽenema." 
Judges1:19 Soaala zĩnda ne a Zɩɩda t'a tɩ wẽ tãnga zug rãmba. Sã n ya bãoogẽ dãmba, a pa tõog bãmb ye, tɩ b ra zaoo kut bilim-bilm." 
Judges1:20 B rɩka Ebrõ n kõ a Kalɛb wala a Moyiiz sẽn pĩnd n togse, yẽ n tõog a Anak kamb a tãabã." 
Judges1:21 A Bẽnzame kamba ka rig Zebuzitsa sẽn da kẽed Zerizalɛɛma ye, la al ne rũnna, Zebuze rãmb ket n bee Zerizalɛɛm ne a Bẽnzame kamba." 
Judges1:22 A Zozɛf kamba dʋʋ Betɛl la Soaala-Wẽnd pʋga b poore. 
Judges1:23 A Zozɛf kamba tʋma lɩɩsdba, Betɛl tẽnga. Betɛl da boondame tɩ Luz." 
Judges1:24 Lɩɩsdba yãee ned sẽn yit tẽnga pʋga, tɩ b yeel-a: «Daoa, wilg d zĩig ninga d sẽn tõe n paam n kẽ tẽngã tɩ d na bas f ne yõore.»" 
Judges1:25 La a wilg-b-la b sẽn tõe n tũ zĩig ninga n paam n kẽ tẽnga pʋga. B kẽe n kooda tẽnga rãmb ne b sʋʋse; sẽn põs yaa raoã ne a zaka la a ba-biisi.
