Judges1:26 Nin-kãng n kẽ Ititsa tẽn-peelmẽ n me a tẽnga n pʋd-a t'a Luz. Yʋ-kãng la b ket n boonda ne rũnna. 
Judges1:27 A Manase pa zab n tõog Bɛt-Seã la a tẽn-toos ye. A pa tõog Taanak ne tẽns niyns sẽn kẽed-b yẽ ye. A pa tõog Dor ne a tẽn-toos ye. A pa tõog Yibleam ne a tẽn-toos ye. A pa tõog Megido ne a tẽn-toos ye. Kanaã rãmba kell n pa b tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Judges1:28 A Israyɛl sẽn wa n mik t'a pãnga paasame, dẽ marsã la a yaool n modg-b ne tʋʋma la a pa rig-b n yiis ye." 
Judges1:29 A Efrayim me ka tõog n yiis Kanaã rãmba sẽn da be Gezer ye. Kanaã rãmba naaga a Efrayim n kẽed Gezɛr. 
Judges1:30 A Zabulõ ka tõog n dig Kitrõ la Naalal dãmb ye. Kanaã rãmb paa ne a Zabulõ la yaa bãmb n da so kooma yõngre la raada wesbo. 
Judges1:31 A Asɛr pa tõog Ako, Sidõ, Alab, Akzig, Elba, Afik la Reob dãmb ye." 
Judges1:32 A Asɛr kamba kong n naaga Kanaã rãmb sẽn da vɩ bãmb sʋka la sẽn yɩ-b tẽnga pipi soaalba. 
Judges1:33 A Neftali kamb ka rig Bɛt-Semɛs la Bɛt-Anat rãmb ye. A tɩ kẽe n naaga Kanaã rãmba sẽn da so tẽngã, b kɩtame bala tɩ Bɛt-Semɛs la Bɛt-Anat rãmb soog tʋʋma n tʋmnẽ." 
Judges1:34 Amoritsa ka bas a Dã kamba tɩ b sig tẽn-nabrẽ ye, b paalg-b-la tãnga zugu." 
Judges1:35 Amoritsa paa Ar-Eres, Ayalõ, Salabim tẽnga. A Zozɛf sẽn wa n mik t'a pãng paasame a kẽes-b-la tʋʋmde." 
Judges1:36 Edomitsa toaaga sɩngda Akrabim tãng pennẽ, sɩngda pĩigã sẽn pukẽ wã n kuiis yĩngri, tãnga zugu." 
Judges2:1 Naaba-Wẽnd malɛk n yi Gilgal n wa Bokim n yeel a Israyɛl: «M yiis-y-la Ezipt n tɩ kẽes-y tẽng ning m sẽn da kãab y yaab rãmba. M da yeelame tɩ m kõn sãam m zooda ne yãmb, abada." 
Judges2:2 Yãmb me ra reegame tɩ y kõn yõg zood ne tẽnga rãmb ye. Y yeelame tɩ y na n wãa b tẽn-kuga zãnga. Y yaool n pa kelg m koɛɛg ye. Ges-y y sẽn maan bũmb ninga! 
Judges2:3 Ad-m sẽn leok wakat kãnga: M kõn dig nin-bãmba y taoore ye. Bãmb n na n wa ne yãmb pɛta la b wẽn-naandsa na n yɩɩ bẽdgo, y yĩnga.»" 
Judges2:4 Soaala-Wẽnd Malɛka sẽn gom n sɛ, neba fãa naaga taab n yãbda la b kaasdẽ." 
Judges2:5 Dẽ la b pʋd zĩ-kãng tɩ Bokim: B kʋʋ maando n sigs Naaba-Wẽnd sũuri. 
Judges2:6 A Zozuwe sẽega Israyɛl kambã n kɩt tɩ ned kamb fãa tɩ kẽe a tẽngẽ n deeg-a n soog zãnga. 
Judges2:7 A Israyɛl tũu Soaala-Wẽnd neere n tãag a Zozuwe loogre, n tãag nin-kẽemsa loogre, neb niyns sẽn paam n dɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ne a Israyɛl zooda kaset kãsengã." 
Judges2:8 A Nun biiga la Naaba-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmd, a Zozuwe, ki-la a yʋʋm koabg la piiga." 
Judges2:9 Yaa a sẽn paam a pʋɩɩr zĩig ningã la b mum-a. Yɩɩ Timnat-Eres, a Efrayim tãng zugu, Gaas tãng nug goabga." 
Judges2:10 Sẽn zĩnd-ba a Zozuwe zamaanẽ wã me waa n loogame. Bãmb poore yɩɩ Zamaan sẽn ka paam n bãng Soaala-Wẽnde, n ka paam n bãng b sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
Judges2:11 Israyɛl kamb tʋma sẽn pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam, n pʋg Baal dãmba." 
Judges2:12 B basa Soaala-Wẽnde, b yaab rãmb Wẽnd, sẽn sõng-b tɩ b yi Ezipt tẽnga la b pʋga tẽnga rãmb sẽn da waoogd wẽnd niynsã. B wõgemda b taoore la rẽ wã, b beega Soaala-Wẽnd." 
Judges2:13 B basa Naaba-Wẽnd n na n waoog a Baal, n waoog Astarte rãmba, b wẽn-pogse." 
Judges2:14 Dẽ puuga Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri tɩ b bas a Israyɛl fãadb nusẽ, fãadb sẽn loog ne b laogo. Naaba-Wẽnd koos-b-la ne b bɛɛba sẽn da gũbg-bã. B pa le tõog n yaas b taoor ye." 
Judges2:15 B sã n yi zabr fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd basda bãmbã la b rɩɩ bõne, wa b meng sẽn da togs-b la b ra kãab-ba. A Israyɛl nimbãanega sɩd wa n yɩɩ wʋsgo." 
Judges2:16 Dẽ me la Soaala-Wẽnd kõ a Israyɛl bʋ-kaoodba, taoor dãmba, sẽn fãag-b fãadba nusẽ." 
Judges2:17 B pa kelg b sẽn yãk b rãmb tɩ b ges b yella ye. B tɩ kẽe wẽnd dãmb a taaba, n wõgemd b taoore, n bas sor ning b ba-rãmb sẽn sulg b mens n tũ a soabã. B pa wẽneg b ba-rãmb ye." 
Judges2:18 La Soaala-Wẽnd sã n da lʋɩɩs ned b taoore, b ra paada ne b nedã la a vɩɩma tɛka Soaala-Wẽnd da fãagda a Israyɛl ne a bɛɛba. Bɛɛba sẽn mii n wa sɩbgd-b tɩ b waasdẽ wã, Naaba-Wẽnd zoeta b nimbãanega." 
Judges2:19 Bʋ-kaooda sã n ki b le yikda wẽnem sẽn zʋʋg b ba rãmb rẽnna la yaa wẽn-naands la b ra pʋgda n waoogd-ba, n yĩgimd b taoore. B tʋʋm yooda la b minim wẽnsa pa tol n woog ye." 
Judges2:20 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd sũur wa n pʋʋg ne a Israyɛl tɩ b yeele: «Nin-bãmba sãama zoodã m sẽn da yõg ne b yaab rãmba, b pa kelg m koɛɛg ye." 
Judges2:21 Mam me kõn le sẽeg b taoore, bɛɛb niyns a Zozuwe sẽn loog n ka rig b rãmba ye.»" 
Judges2:22 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd fɛɛs a Israyɛl n ges a sã n na n tũume bɩ a sã n ka na n tũ a yaab rãmb sore. 
Judges2:23 Ad-y yaa rẽ yĩnga la Naaba-Wẽnd kees bɛɛbã. B pa yãg ne b rigb ye, b pa rɩk-b zãnga n sagl a Zozuwe nugẽ ye." 
Judges3:1 Ad buud niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn keese n na n fɛɛs neb niyns sẽn ka zĩnd-b Kanaã zabra wakato. 
Judges3:2 Naaba-Wẽnd da ratame bala tɩ sẽn ka bãng-b pĩnd zabã tõog n zãms zabre. 
Judges3:3 Buuda sẽn keesã yɩɩ Filisti dĩm dãmb a nu wã n paas Kanaã rãmba, Sidõ rãmba la Ivitse sẽn da zao Libã tãmsã, sẽn sɩng Baal-Ermõ tãngã n tãag Lebo-Amat." 
Judges3:4 Bãmb la Soaala-Wẽnd bas yã n na n fɛɛs a Israyɛl n ges a sã n na n deega noy-niyns a Moyiiz sẽn wilg b yaab rãmba. 
Judges3:5 Yaa woto la a Israyɛl pa Kanaã rãmb sʋka, n paas, Ititse, Amoritse, Perizitse, Ivitse, la Zebuzits sʋka." 
Judges3:6 A Israyɛl kẽe kãadem ne bãmb kom-pugli, n dɩk a kom-pugli n kõ-ba, n pʋg b wẽn-naandsã." 
Judges3:7 A Israyɛl manesem ka ta Naaba-Wẽnd yam ye. B basa Naaba-Wẽnde, n pʋg Baal dãmba la Asera rãmba." 
Judges3:8 Yaa rẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puug ne a Israyɛl tɩ b bas-a a Edom dĩm a Kusãn-Risatayim nugẽ t'a soog-a yʋʋm a nii. 
Judges3:9 A Israyɛl kamb kelma Soaala-Wẽnde la Wẽnd kõ-b-la ned sẽn na n fãag-ba. Yɩ-la a Otniyɛl, a Kenaz biiga la a Kalɛb yẽere." 
Judges3:10 A paama Naaba-Wẽnd vẽnegre n lebg a Israyɛl bʋ-kaooda la a sɩngame n na n zab n fãag a saam-biisi. Naab a Wẽnd dɩka Edom dĩm a Kusãn-Risatayim n sagl a nugẽ. A tõog-a-la zãnga. 
Judges3:11 Yʋʋm pis-naas pʋgẽ, tẽnga ka le rãmbe n wa tãag a Otniyɛl kaalem." 
Judges3:12 A Kenaz biiga Otniyɛl kaalem poore, a Israyɛl le yik n tʋma sẽn pa noom Soaala-Wẽnde, la Wẽnd tõg-tõga Moab dĩm a Eglõ t'a yik zabr ne a Israyɛl, a sẽn da ka le maan sẽn tat Naaba-Wẽnd yama yĩnga." 
Judges3:13 A Eglõ tɩ kosa a Amon kamba la a Amalɛk kamb sõngre. B sẽn bob zabre, b tõoga a Israyɛl, n deeg Zeriko, koms tenga." 
Judges3:14 A Israyɛl paa a Eglõ, Moab dĩma soolmẽ, yʋʋm piig la a nii." 
Judges3:15 A Israyɛl kelma Naaba-Wẽnde la Wẽnd kõ-a-la fãagda, a Ewud, Bẽnzame roog dao, a Gera, biiga. A Ewud da yaa gob-tɩɩsenga. Israyɛl kamba wa n yeel-a lame t'a tɩ kɩs fadg a Eglõ, Moab dĩma." 
Judges3:16 A Ewud kuda sʋʋg sẽn dɩt a noya a yiibu. Yaa sʋʋg sẽn ta kãntɩɩga. A loe sʋʋgã a rɩtgo gere, la a fuuga ra luda sʋʋgã." 
Judges3:17 A sɩd kẽnga ne ligdã n tɩ kɩs Moab dĩma, a Eglõ. A Eglõ da yaa ned sẽn nob wʋsgo." 
Judges3:18 B sẽn kɩs ligdã n sɛ b lɛɛg n yiime, yẽ ne sẽn yãag-b ne ligdã." 
Judges3:19 B taa Gilgal tẽn-kuga zĩigẽ t'a Ewud lɛɛg n wa yeele: «Dĩma, ad-y m tara koɛɛg ne yãmba, la yaa maam ne yãmb koɛɛg bala.» Dĩma kɩtame tɩ sẽn da be-b ne yẽ wã fãa yi." 
Judges3:20 A Ewud kẽeme, dẽ tɩ dĩma zao-la a yĩngr doogã n kokd pemsem. A Ewud yeelame: «Yaa Wẽnd koɛɛg la m wat n na n taas yã, dĩm sõngo.» Dĩma yika tao-tao bala a goeela zugu." 
Judges3:21 A Ewud wõoga ne a gobrã, sʋʋga sẽn da sẽbg a rɩtg gerã la a kõsa dĩma pʋga." 
Judges3:22 Sʋʋga rɛɛng meng naag n kẽeme tɩ kaama lɛɛg n bus. A Ewud basa sʋʋga dĩma pʋʋrẽ n ka lɛɛg n feoog ye. A tũu võor n yi n looge. 
Judges3:23 A reng n maneg n paga yĩngr dooga noor ne a pʋgẽ pagdgã, n bas n tũ võor n yi n looge." 
Judges3:24 A paam n loogame tɩ sõgen-kamba yaool n lɛɛg n wa la b mikame tɩ yĩngr dooga kʋɩleng pagame. Dẽ la b walem taaba: «Daare a fẽegda a yõore rooga pẽg-maasgẽ.» 
Judges3:25 B yalsame al tɩ b yam wa yooda, b sẽn yãe tɩ yĩngr dooga kʋɩlenga kaoosda pakrã. B sẽn kẽes kʋɩlem-bil n pake, b yãee b zu-soaba sẽn ki n dɩga." 
Judges3:26 B sẽn wa n yɛs rooga noor n gũudẽ wã, a Ewud paam n loogame. A ra zoe n looga tẽn-kuga zĩigẽ n tees Seyira sẽnẽ." 
Judges3:27 A sẽn paam n ta Israyɛl tẽnga a peeba baorgo Efrayim tãnga zugu. A lʋɩɩ taoore tɩ Israyɛl kamba pʋg-a n sig tãngã. 
Judges3:28 A yeel-b lame: «Pʋg-y maam tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka y bɛɛbã, Moabitsã, n sagl y nusẽ.» B pʋg-a lame, b zoeeme n wãag kʋɩlga sẽn tõe n dʋʋg zĩig ningã la ned ba a ye ka paam n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ ye." 
Judges3:29 B tõoga Moab rãmba. Moab rãmba neb ra ta tus-piiga. Da yaa neb sẽn tar yagd sẽn pidi la zabr sũuri la ba a ye ka põs ye. 
Judges3:30 Badaar tɛka a Moab lebga a Israyɛl sõgne la tẽnga paama laafi yʋʋm pis-nii. 
Judges3:31 A Ewud poore yɩ-la a Anat biig, a Samgar. A tõoga Filisti rãmba bãmb na ta kobs-yoobe ne pĩim sẽn tar n kõsd nag-koodse. Yẽ me fãaga a Israyɛl." 
Judges4:1 A Ewud kũum poore, Israyɛl kamb le sɩngame n maan sẽn pa tat Soaala-Wẽnd yam." 
Judges4:2 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Wẽnd dɩk-ba n sagl Kanaã rĩm, a Yabin nugẽ. A Yabin n da rɩt naam Asor tẽnga. A Sisera n da yaa a tãnsoaba la a ra kẽeda Arosɛt-Goyim." 
Judges4:3 A Israyɛl kelma Soaala-Wẽnde t'a Sisera da tara kut bilim-bilm kobs-wɛ. Yʋʋm pisi pʋgẽ Israyɛl yãee pɛta. 
Judges4:4 Wakat kãng tɩ bãngd poak, a Debora, a Lapidot paga n da so Israyɛl kãsengo." 
Judges4:5 A ra kaooda a bʋʋdã koang a ye tẽngre, a Debora koanga. Yaa Rama ne Betɛl tẽnsʋka, a Efrayim tãnga zugu; a Israyɛl kamba ra kẽnda a nengẽ n welgd b yɛla." 
Judges4:6 Daar a ye a Debora kɩtame tɩ b bool a Barak, a Abinoam biiga, Kedɛs tẽng raoa, Neftali tẽn-peelmẽ la a yeel-a lame: «Ad Naaba-Wẽnde, ad Israyɛl Wẽnda, n sɩd kõo noore. Yi n tees Tabor, yi ne a Neftali la a Zabulõ kamba tus piiga." 
Judges4:7 Yaa Kisõ kʋɩl-bɛɛga la m na n tus n togl foo, a Yabin tãnsoab, a Sisera, yẽ ne a bilim-bilm la tãb-biisã, la m na n dɩk-b lame n sagl f nugẽ.»" 
Judges4:8 T'a Barak leoke: «Fo sã n na n yãag maam, m na kẽnge, la fo sã n pa tũudi m pa na n kẽng ye tɩ m pa mi sẽn ya daar ning la Soaala Malɛk na n kɩt tɩ m tõog bɛɛba ye.»" 
Judges4:9 Dẽ la a Debora leok yã: «M na tũ-f n kẽnge la so-kãnga yẽ, ad-f zug ka na n zẽk wʋsg ye, tɩ yaa pag nugẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd na n dɩk bɛɛbã n sagle.» A Debora sɩd yii ne a Barak n kẽng Kedɛs." 
Judges4:10 Yaa be la a Barak tigim a Neftali la a Zabulõ kamba. B sõor taa tus piiga. A Debora yãag-b lame. 
Judges4:11 Ned a ye n da boond t'a Ebɛr, n ya Kenitga, a ra zãaga a Kaẽ buudẽ n ti a zaka, a zãaga ne a Moyiiz rɛɛmba, a Obab yagense, a ra zãaga wʋsgo ne Kananim kʋkã, Kedɛs yegende." 
Judges4:12 A Sisera wʋmame t'a Abinoam biig a Barak wẽ a sik Tabor tãng zugu. 
Judges4:13 Dẽ la a yiis a kut bilim-bilm kobs-wɛ la a tãb-biisa gilli, sẽn sɩng Arosɛt-Goyim n ta Kisõ kʋɩlga." 
Judges4:14 A Debora yeela a Barak: «Yik tɩ yaa rũnna la Naaba-Wẽnd dɩk a Sisera n sagl f nugẽ. N-ye! Naaba-Wẽnd lʋɩ-la f taoore.» A Barak siga Tabor tãnga ne tãb-biis tus piiga. 
Judges4:15 Yaa ne sʋʋs sẽn dɩte la a Barak taoore, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽeg a Sisera bilim-bilm la a tãb-biisi. A Sisera tol n basa a bilim-bilm n na n zoe ne a nao." 
Judges4:16 A Barak riga tãb-biisã la bilim-bilma n ta Arosɛt-Goyim. Sʋʋg n kood a Sisera tãb-biisa fãa, ba a ye ka põs ye." 
Judges4:17 A Sisera ninga tĩiga n tees Kenitga, a Ebɛr paga, a Yaɛl doogo. Wakat kãng tɩ Asor dĩm a Yabin la Kenitga a Ebɛr doog da yaa zoodo." 
Judges4:18 A Yaɛl yaool yi n sega a Sisera n yeel a: «Dĩm sõngo, pa-y ka, pa-y mam zakẽ, da maan-y rabeem ye.» A sɩd pa-la a Yaɛl doogẽ, t'a bao fu taoko n lud-a." 
Judges4:19 A Sisera wa n yeela pagã: «F tõe n kõ-m-la koom bilfu tɩ m yũ tɩ ko-yũud tar-m lame!» A rɩka waoog ne bĩisim n kõ-a t'a yũ n le lɛɛg n pil-a neere. 
Judges4:20 A Sisera le paasame: «Yaas rignoorẽ ka, la ned sã n wa sok-fo: ‹Ned ka wa ka?› Bɩ f leok tɩ ayoo!»" 
Judges4:21 Bãng-y t'a Ebɛr pag a Yaɛl feooga a rooga baaf a ye n dɩk zãar n kolg bãanem-bãanem, n ges a Sisera kɩgdga n ka ne baafã t'a sãag n kẽ tẽnga. Yaamsã yĩnga a Sisera gõeema sɩd yɩɩ gõeem yãanga. Dẽ me la a Yaɛl paam-a n kʋ." 
Judges4:22 A Barak sẽn da pʋgda wẽneg n taame t'a Yaɛl yi n seg-a n yeel a: «Wa-y tɩ m wilg-y y sẽn baood a soabã.» A Barak sẽn kẽ, a yãeeme t'a Sisera ki n dɩga, t'a kɩgdga ka ne baafo." 
Judges4:23 Yɩɩ baraare la Naaba-Wẽnd ning Kanaã rĩm, a Yabin, yãnde, Israyɛl dãmb taoore." 
Judges4:24 Dẽ me la a Israyɛl sɩng n zɩsgd a nugu Kanaã rãmba dĩm, a Yabin, zugu, n wa tõog-a zãnga." 
Judges5:1 Badaare a Debora la a Abinoam biig, a Barak, yɩɩla woto:" 
Judges5:2 A Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ zabr kõn ling ned ba a ye zabre la buuda bob-n-dõbẽ. Bɩ Soaala paam barka! 
Judges5:3 Dĩm dãmba, kelg-y, na-rɩtba, yoog-y y tʋba! M na n pʋda yɩɩle, la Wẽnd la m na n pẽge, Israyɛl Wẽnda la m na n pẽge." 
Judges5:4 Soaala, yãmb sẽn wa n yi Seyir, y sẽn wa n pãrg Edom weoogo, tẽnga miimame la saaga tuumame, sawata dʋʋga koom." 
Judges5:5 Tãmsa miimame, Sinayi Wẽnda taoore, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama taoore, b miimame." 
Judges5:6 A Anat biig a Samgar wẽnnẽ, a Ebɛr pag a Yaɛl wẽnnẽ soy ra ka le yãet toand ye. So-toagdba soe ra lebga gõtem-gõtem." 
Judges5:7 Israyɛl tẽnsa ra ka le tar naab ye, n tãag m waoongo, n tãag a Israyɛl ma a Debora waoongo." 
Judges5:8 Wẽn-paals la neba ra yik n pʋgda, dẽ me la tẽnga ra pid ne zaba; la tẽns a nu pʋgẽ b ra pa tar gãong a ye, kãnd a ye meng ra pa kete a Israyɛl tãb-biis tus pis-naasa yĩng ye." 
Judges5:9 M nonga a Israyɛl tãnsoaben-dãmbã, m nonga sẽn bob-b tãpa ne yamleoogã. Bɩ d fãa gill pẽg Soaala-Wẽnde!" 
Judges5:10 Yãmb fãa sẽn zao-b bõn-yãan-peelse, sẽn tʋɩ-b fu-tagdo n zĩ b rotẽ, la yãmb sẽn kẽnd-b sor zugu, pʋd-y yɩɩlle!" 
Judges5:11 Naag-y y koees n kaas sũ-noog kaasgo ne sẽn pidsd-b gaolga kooma, naag-y taab n pẽg Soaala yel-sõmde, b yel-sõmda ne a Israyɛl nanamsã b sã n yi fãa n na n tak zabre." 
Judges5:12 Yiki, Debora, yik n lʋɩɩs f toogo yik n pʋd f zabr kaoogr yɩɩlle. Yiki, Barak, a Abinoam gãndaoogo, yik n bao roog n pag f sẽn yõg b rãmba," 
Judges5:13 la zabra sẽn ka loog ne b rãmbã bãmb me wa tong ne b tãnsoaba, b tong b zug-zẽkr tongre, b sẽn maan raood tongre." 
Judges5:14 Sẽn tõog a Amalɛka yii Efrayim, a Bẽnzame pʋgame n wa kẽ b sʋka. Tãnsoaba yi-la a Makir doogẽ, zab mitba yita a Zabulõ tãpẽ." 
Judges5:15 A Isakar tãnsoaba bee ne a Debora, a Isakar zood pa sãam ne a Barak ye, dẽ me la a yik n pʋga a pʋ-weesẽ. Sã n yaa a Rubẽ sakẽ, b pa vʋʋs ne no-koɛɛm ye." 
Judges5:16 Bõe tɩ f pa yãgrẽ, f rũmsa sɛɛga n kelgd nag-kɩɩmba sẽn boond b rũmsi? N-ye, a Rubẽ sakẽ, yɩɩ no-koɛɛm ne no-koɛɛma." 
Judges5:17 A Galaad paa Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, la bõe t'a Dã kogenda lengd kooma zugu? A Asɛr paa mogra noore, a vɩɩ be ne laafi, a koom-kogenda soondg zĩisẽ." 
Judges5:18 Sã n yaa a Zabulõ nebã wala a Neftali rãmba bãmb saka a yii n seg kũum, zabra sẽn na n zab zĩig ning fãa." 
Judges5:19 Bɛɛba nanamse, Kanaã rãmba taka zabre ne a Taanak Megido ko-bundem zĩigẽ. La b zaba zab faado, yõod pa tol n zĩnd ye. B pa lɛɛg n kul ne lagfr ye." 
Judges5:20 Ãdsa zĩnda yĩngr n zab b zabrã, b rɩka sor n wa zab ne a Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Kisõ kʋɩl-bɛɛga pɩɩg-b-la ne a saaga Kisõ kʋɩlga lɛɛg n vel-b lame. Pids-ma, m sɩɩga, pids-m ne raoodo!" 
Judges5:22 Wiidi wã nao ninga b rãamde. Wed daada sẽn tar zoees la b sẽn tare! 
Judges5:23 Soaala malɛk yeelame: Wẽnd na sãam a Meroz, Wẽnd na sãam a nebã! B pa zab n sõng Soaala-Wẽnd ye, b ned pa zĩnd gãndaada sʋk ye." 
Judges5:24 Wẽnd na ning a Yaɛl bark pagba fãa sʋka, (Kenitg, a Ebɛr, pag a Yaɛl). A paam barka tẽnga pagba fãa sʋka!" 
Judges5:25 Bɛ wã bõs-a koom, t'a kõ-a bĩisim, a bao wam-neere n kõ a bĩisim sẽn põeed kaam." 
Judges5:26 Paga sẽn tẽeg a goabga, baaf la a feoog yã, a sẽn tẽeg a rɩtgo, tʋʋm mitb zãar la a tebg yã. A sẽn wẽ a Sisera a zuga la a wek yã, a kɩgdga la a wurg yã." 
Judges5:27 A Sisera põd n lʋɩɩme, a lʋɩ, pag taoore, la lʋɩɩsa pa lʋɩ n tẽed yikr ye, a sẽn põd n lʋɩ, a kiime." 
Judges5:28 A Sisera ma ra lɩkda võorẽ, võorẽ la a sulgd n getẽ. Võẽ la a Sisera ma ra lɩgsda, la a sokd a menga: «Bõe t'a lebgra kaoosdẽ, bõe tɩ bilim-bilma kẽnd lebg maasga?»" 
Judges5:29 Dĩma bi-pugl a ye sẽn pid ne yẽesem n leok-a, t'a reeg n walemd a menga:" 
Judges5:30 «Daare b zĩi n sõtame, daare b zĩi n pʋɩta b laogo: bi-pugla, kom-pugli a yi, tãb-biig a ye yĩnga peen gʋmd a ye, sẽn maneg n gʋle, a Sisera yĩnga, a sẽn tõog a bɛɛb yĩnga peen-neer sẽn na n vil a yubla.»" 
Judges5:31 Y bɛɛba fãa na ki boto, Soaala-Wẽnde! La neb niyns sẽn nong-b yãmbã yɩ wa wĩntoogo sẽn tãoosd a vẽenem ne pãnga! Tẽnga paa yʋʋm pis-naase n ka le rãmb ye." 
Judges6:1 Israyɛl kamb maana sẽn pa ta Naaba-Wẽnd yam. Dẽ yĩnga Wẽnd dɩk-b lame n sagl Madiã rãmb nugẽ, yʋʋm a yopoe." 
Judges6:2 La a Madiã nug tʋma a Israyɛl beedo. Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ n põs a Madiã la Israyɛl kamba ra tiid b rot tãmsa pẽgsẽ, b bogdẽ bɩ b rĩ sɩlemsẽ." 
Judges6:3 A Madiã ra basdame t'a Israyɛl bʋd n sɛ la yẽ ne a Amalɛk la yaang rãmb da watame n kẽ a tẽnga zãnga. 
Judges6:4 B ra tiidame n pẽneg a Israyɛl la b ra wʋkda tẽnga kooda fãa n wa tãag Gaza. B ra ka keesd bũmb a Israyɛl yĩng ye. Pesgo, tɩ b loog ne, naafo bɩ bõanga, tɩ b loog ne." 
Judges6:5 B ra wata ne pɛɛla n tid b roto, n wat ne b rũmsi, n wat zembal wa kalwaare. Sɩda bãmb ne b rũmsa yaa kõn bãng n sõde la ra pɩɩsda tẽnga yululul!" 
Judges6:6 Woto me, a Madiã yĩnga, a Israyɛl vɩɩm waa n lebga pɛta t'a na n kelem Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Judges6:7 A Madiã sẽn nams a Israyɛl t'a kelem n bool Wẽndã," 
Judges6:8 Soaala-Wẽnd tʋma no-rɛɛs a yĩnga. Wẽnd neda wa n yeel-b lame: «Ad Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Soaala, sẽn yete: Yaa maam n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga, yaa maam n zãag-y ne yembd tẽnga." 
Judges6:9 M fãaga yãmb Ezipt rãmba la y bɛɛba fãa nugẽ. M dig-b lame, m dɩka b tẽngã n kõ yã." 
Judges6:10 M yeel-y lame: ‹Maam la y Wẽnd rũnna la beoogo. Da maan-y rabeem ne y sẽn be ne b rãmbã, ne Amoritsa wẽn-naandsa ye.› Yãmb pa kelg m koɛɛg ye.»" 
Judges6:11 Soaala-Wẽnd malɛk n wa n zĩnd Ofra kʋka tẽngre. Kʋka da bee a Abiezɛr biig, a Zoas, pʋʋgẽ. Wakat kãng t'a Zoas biig a Zedeõ da bee zɛɛgẽ n pãbd a ki tɩ Madiã rãmba ra wa wʋk n loog n bas-a ye." 
Judges6:12 Malɛka buug-a lame n yeel-a: «Wẽnd zĩnd ne fo, tãb-biig sẽn pid ne sũ-keelem!»" 
Judges6:13 T'a Zedeõ leok: «Y sugri, m Zu-soaba! Wẽnd yɩta a wãna n be ne tõndo tɩ yɛla a woto fãa ket n paam-do? Bõn-bãna sẽn maan pĩnd tɩ d ba rãmba tar n gomda bɛɛ? B ra gomdame la b ra nong n kʋ-la b goama woto: ‹Y ka ne tɩ sɩd yaa bãmb n yiisd-d Ezipt tẽnga?› Rũnna b bas-d lame, b rɩka tõnd n sagl Madiã rãmb nugẽ.»" 
Judges6:14 Wẽnd ges-a lame n yeel-a: «Kẽng ne pãng ning f sẽn tar a soabã, kẽng n tɩ fãag a Israyɛl Madiã nugẽ. Ka maam n tʋmd-f laa?»" 
Judges6:15 A Zedeõ leokame: «Y sugri, m Soaala, m ba rooga la ro-yaalg a Manase buudẽ, la m ba zakẽ, maam la yao-zʋʋga! M maanda a wãn n fãag a Israyɛl?»" 
Judges6:16 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a: «M na zĩnd f sɛɛgẽ la f na tõog Madiã rãmba gilli.» 
Judges6:17 A Zedeõ leokame: «Sã n yaa sɩda tɩ yãmb n tʋmd maam, bɩ y kõ-m makr a ye tɩ m bãng tɩ yaa yãmb n gomd ne-ma." 
Judges6:18 Ade, m yõkda y sɛɛga, pa-y ka tɩ m kẽng la m wa. Na n zemsa m tɩ bao m kũuni n wa rɩgl-a y taoore.» Naaba-Wẽnd leokame: «M na yaas n gũ fu.»" 
Judges6:19 A Zedeõ sɩd loogame, a tɩ kʋʋ bulla n maneg-a la a bao zom peoogo n wẽ bur sẽn ka ning bɩlle. A baoo peoog n ning nemdã, n ning bɩɩma rʋkẽ, n tall fãa n wa kʋka tẽngre n wa kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Judges6:20 A sẽn wa n kolgdẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd malɛka yeel-a lame: «Dɩk nemdã la burã sẽn ka ning bɩllã n dogl pĩiga zugu la f rɩk bɩɩma n daage!» A Zedeõ maana wala sẽn togsã." 
Judges6:21 Malɛka dɩka a sẽn da zãad dasaar ningã n sɩɩs nemdã la burã. Bugum n yi pĩigã n dɩ nemdã la burã sẽn ka ning bɩllã. Malɛka loog n menemame. 
Judges6:22 Woto a Zedeõ bãngame tɩ sɩd ya Naaba-Wẽnd n tʋm-a. Dẽ la a yeel yã: «Wii! M yãee Soaala-Wẽnd malɛk ne m nini.» 
Judges6:23 La Naaba-Wẽnd yeel-a lame: «Da sãam f sũur ye.» 
Judges6:24 Zĩ-kãnga a Zedeõ mee maan-kugri n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd la laafi Wẽnde la a ket n bee ne rũnna Ofra, a Abiezɛr, tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges6:25 Yʋng kãnga Naab a Wẽnd yeela a Zedeõ: «Yõk f ba nag-bil wubdgã n le paas yʋʋm a yopoe naafo. Kẽng n tɩ wã maan-kugr ning f ba sẽn me a Baal yĩngã. Kẽng n tɩ kʋʋg raoog ning a sẽn pees n sel n yegl n boond tɩ bõn-sõngã. 
Judges6:26 Dẽ poore dʋ tãnga sẽn lugẽ wã n maneg n me maan-kugr Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga. Maneg n me maan-kugrã tɩ zemse, la rɩk nag-bil a ye n yõog-a t'a rɩ bugum zãnga raooga sẽn kʋʋga zugu.»" 
Judges6:27 A Zedeõ kɩtame t'a rakõap piig yãag-a la a tɩ maana wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg-a. La yɩɩ yʋngo, pa yɩ wĩntoog ye t'a ra zoeta a buudã neba la tẽnga rãmba." 
Judges6:28 Tẽnga rãmb sẽn yik pĩnda, b mikame t'a Baal maan-kugrã wãame la raoogã sẽn da sel n yegla me kʋʋgame. B bãngame tɩ loalg a yiib soaba maoong la b yõog maan-kug paala zugu." 
Judges6:29 B soka taab: «Ãnda n maan woto?» B sogsame, b kelgame la b yeelame: «Woto yaa a Zowas biig a Zedeõ tʋʋmde.»" 
Judges6:30 Tẽnga rãmb yeela a Zowas: «Yiis f biigã n tɩ kʋ a t'a wãa a Baal maan-kugri la a kɛɛga raoogã sẽn da sel a sɛɛgẽ.» 
Judges6:31 Dẽ la a Zowas leok sẽn da be-b be wã: «Yãmb n tog n zab a Baal zabr laa? A sõngr tog n yii yãmb nengẽ bɩ? A Baal sõangd fãa togẽ lame n kʋ tɩ wĩndig nan ka bɩ ye. A Baal sã n ya wẽnde bɩ a zab n kõ a menga, a zab ne a Zedeõ, a maan-kugra wãada.»" 
Judges6:32 Badaare b pʋda a Zedeõ ta Yerubaal: a Baal kao bʋʋdo ne a maan-kugra wãada. 
Judges6:33 A Madiã gilli, a Amalɛk la yaang rãmba sũu taaba n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n wa wẽ b sik Israyɛl tẽn-nabrẽ." 
Judges6:34 Soaala-Wẽnd pãng me kẽe a Zedeõ, a sẽn peeb baorgo a boola a Abiezɛr la a waa n sakame." 
Judges6:35 A tʋma neb a Manase tẽn-peelmẽ n bool-b tɩ b wa. A le tʋma neb a Asɛr, a Zabulõ la a Neftali la b fãa bobame n yi n wa a sõngre." 
Judges6:36 A Zedeõ yeela Naaba-Wẽnde: «Sã n ya sɩda tɩ yãmb datame tɩ m nug fãag a Israyɛl wala y sẽn togs-ma," 
Judges6:37 ade, m na n yɛdga pe-kõbd zɛɛgẽ: meenema sã n dʋʋg n madg pe-kõbdã tɩ tẽnga yaool n ya koɛɛnga, m na bãng tɩ y ratame tɩ m nug fãag a Israyɛl, wala y sẽn yeelã.»" 
Judges6:38 Soaala-Wẽnd tõoga rẽnna. A Zedeõ sẽn sãd beoogo a wẽka pe-kõbdã la meenema pida laaga. 
Judges6:39 T'a Zedeõ na n le yeel: «M kos tɩ y ra puug y sũur ne m ye tɩ m le bõs makr a to ne pe-kõbdã: m kotame tɩ zĩiga fãa yʋgʋmd ne meenem la pe-kõbda bal pa koɛɛnga!» 
Judges6:40 Zĩig sẽn sobge, Soaala-Wẽnd maana wala a sẽn kose. Pe-kõbda bala n pa koɛɛnga tɩ zĩiga yaool n madg n gilg-a." 
Judges7:1 A Yerubaal (yaa a Zedeõ) sãda beoogo ne a nebã n tɩ wẽ b sik Eyin-Arod. A Madiã sika ra bee yẽ rẽnda goabg bilfu, More tãnga pennẽ." 
Judges7:2 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela a Zedeõ: «Ade, sẽn be-b ne fooma waoogame tɩ looge, la m pa na n dɩk Madiã rãmbã n sagl b nugẽ ye. Ka rẽ b wat n basa mam pẽgre n pẽg b menga, b wat yeelame: ‹Yaa tõnd meng nug n fãag do!›" 
Judges7:3 Dẽ yĩngã, yeel neba woto: ‹Rabeem sẽn tar a soab fãa t'a yɛs n digda n pa rat n zãag ne Galaad tãnga, bɩ a leb a zakẽ.› » A Zedeõ fɛɛs-b lame n bãng b raoodo la neb tus pisi la a yi n leb b tẽngẽ, n kell tus piiga." 
Judges7:4 La Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Zedeõ: «Ad neba ket n yaa wʋsgo. Tall-ba n kẽng kʋɩlga noore tɩ m meng na fɛɛs-ba m toore n kõ-fo. M sẽn na n yeel ned ninga t'a pa ne foo, yẽ soab n na n pa. M sẽn na n yeel ned ning t'a ra tũ foo, bɩ a soab ra tũ ye.»" 
Judges7:5 A Zedeõ talla a nebã n kẽng kʋɩlga noore la Naaba-Wẽnd yeel-a lame: «Bak toore ned ning fãa sẽn na n lega kooma wa baag sẽn legdã, bɩ f ning yẽ toore. Welg toor me ned ning sẽn na n yĩgimda n yaool n yũ.»" 
Judges7:6 Neb niyns sẽn leg b kooma taa kobs-tã. Sẽn ket ba fãa yĩgimdame n yũ. 
Judges7:7 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zedeõ: «Yaa ne kobs-tã wã sẽn leg-b kooma, yaa bãmb nugẽ la m na n sagl Madiã rãmba. Bɩ sẽn ket-ba fãa leb b yiri.»" 
Judges7:8 A Zedeõ kɩtame tɩ b rees rɩɩbã b sẽn zɩtã la bardã la a lebs-ba b zagsẽ. Sẽn pa-b ne yẽ yɩɩ kobs-tã wã bala. A Madiã sika ra bee tẽngre, pʋtẽ wã." 
Judges7:9 A Zedeõ sẽn kẽ gõeem, Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a lame: «Yik n sig Madiã sikẽ tɩ m dɩk-a lame n ning f nugẽ." 
Judges7:10 La ade, dabeem sã n tar foo, bɩ f reng n ta b sikẽ wã foo ne f sõgna, a Ypra." 
Judges7:11 Kelg b sẽn gomd bũmb ninga tɩ f pɛlg na legb kẽnkẽ la woto f na sak n tak zabre.» A Zedeõ siga ne a rakõor a Ypra; b kolga bɛɛba sika wʋsgo. 
Judges7:12 Madiã, Amalɛk la Yaang neba da yɛdgame n pid pʋtã, b ra yaa wʋsgo wa sʋya. Wala bĩisrẽ sẽn be mogr noorẽ, b yʋgma wã ra ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye." 
Judges7:13 A Zedeõ sẽn kolgã, a wʋma ned a ye sẽn da togsd a sõsd-n-taaga a sẽn zãms bũmb ninga. A ra togsda woto: «Mam zãmsame la ade: miusgu n da bilimd a Madiã sikẽ wã la a sẽn wẽ roog a ye, a lub-a lame n zũndg zãnga.»" 
Judges7:14 A sõsd-n-taaga leokame: «Baad tɩ rẽ ka bũmb a to, n zʋʋg Israyɛl daoa, a Zowas biig a Zedeõ, sʋʋga ye. Wẽnd dɩka Madiã sikã n sagl a nugẽ.»" 
Judges7:15 A Zedeõ wʋma zãmsdã ne a võore, a yĩgimdame n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde la a sẽn lɛɛg n wa a neba sʋka a tãsame: «Yik-y tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka Madiã n sagl y nugẽ.»" 
Judges7:16 A Zedeõ pʋɩ-la a neba sags a tã. A kõo ned kam fãa baorgo, yubl vɩʋʋgo ne bug-vɩleng sẽn da solg a pʋgẽ." 
Judges7:17 A yeel-b lame: «Ges-y maam la maan-y wa maam! M sẽn kolg bɛɛba sikã n maan bũmb ningã bɩ yãmb me maan boto! 
Judges7:18 Maam ne m sẽn be ne b rãmba na n peeba bardo, yãmb me maan boto y kɩrengẽ la tãs-y tɩ sãde: ‹Wẽnd la a Zedeõ yĩnga!› »" 
Judges7:19 A Zedeõ la neb koabga sẽn da be b ne yẽ wã kolga bɛɛba sik yʋn-sʋka, dẽ tɩ sika gũudb reega taab paalem-paalem. B peeba bardo la b wãa yʋy wã b sẽn da zãadã." 
Judges7:20 Neb a taaba me peeba bardo la b wã b yʋy wã. B ra zãadã bug-vɩlensã ne b goabga tɩ bardã ra be b rɩtgo la b kelmame: «Wẽnd la a Zedeõ yĩnga ned kam fãa yiis a sʋʋga!» 
Judges7:21 Ned kam fãa ra yɛsa a zĩigẽ la b ra gũbga sikã. La ade, sika pʋga ned kam fãa ninga tĩiga la a tar kaasgo." 
Judges7:22 Bardã sẽn waa n peebdẽ wã, Soaala-Wẽnd zablga bɛɛba ne taab tɩ b lɛɛg n kẽ taab ne sʋʋse. B zoe gilli n ta Bɛt-Sita, Sereda sẽnẽ, n ta Avɛl-Meola kʋɩlg noore, Tabat sɛɛgẽ." 
Judges7:23 B boola a Israyɛl neba, a Asɛr, a Neftali la a Manase tẽn-peelmẽ dãmbã la b waame n pʋga a Madiã." 
Judges7:24 A Zedeõ tʋma neb tɩ b rʋ tãmsã, n yeele: «Efrayim dãmba sig-y n seg a Madiã, ning-y pãnga n deng b bulsẽ wã, sẽn yɩ Bɛt Bara n digd Zʋrdẽ.» Efrayim dãmb maana boto n gɩdg bulsã n ta Bɛt-Bara la Zʋrdẽ." 
Judges7:25 B yõga Madiã taoor dãmb a yi n pag roogo: a Oreb la Zeeb. B waa n kʋ-la a Oreb zĩig ninga sẽn boond t'a Oreb Pĩiga, n kʋ a Zeeb zĩig ning sẽn boond t'a Zeeb bugsuntung rãam kõgb zĩiga. B pʋga a Madiã n tees a tẽnga la yaa Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde la b tall a Oreb la a Zeeb zut n wa kis a Zedeõ." 
Judges8:1 Efrayim dãmb leoka a Zedeõ: «Yaa bõe la f maan woto ne tõndo. Bõe yĩng tɩ f pa wɩɩg-do, f sẽn waa n dabd n na n tak zabr ne Madiã rãmbã?» Sɩd pa yɩ naana ne a Zedeõ ye." 
Judges8:2 A Zedeõ leok-b lame: «Bõe la m maan sẽn kolg yãmb dẽnna? A Efrayim sib yiisgu ka são a Abiezɛr sib gĩin kaoob sɩda? 
Judges8:3 Yaa yãmb nugẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd sagl a Oreb la a Zeeb, a Madiã na-komsã. La bõe la m maan sẽn tõe n dɩk n mak ne yãmb rẽnna?» A Zedeõ goama maaga b sũuri." 
Judges8:4 A Zedeõ taa Zʋrdẽ n dʋʋg a kooma, yẽ ne neb kobs-tã wã sẽn da be ne-a wã. Ne b sẽn da yɛ wã, b kell n talla bɛɛba rigbu." 
Judges8:5 A Zedeõ yeela Sukot dãmba: «M kotame tɩ y bao bur-maas n kõ m tũud-n-taasã. B yɛɛme la yaa Madiã dĩm dãmb a Zeba la a Salmuna la m pʋgda.» 
Judges8:6 Sukot taoor dãmba yeelame: «A Zeba ne a Salmuna zoe n saga fo nugẽ laa tɩ f yet tɩ d bao bur-maas n wa tɩ f kõ f tãb-biisi?» 
Judges8:7 Dẽ la Zedeõ leok-ba: «Naaba-Wẽnd sã n wa rɩk a Zeba la a Salmuna n ning m nugẽ, m na sɩ y yĩnga ne we-raooga gõos la sɩlg-nao-yẽese!»" 
Judges8:8 A Zedeõ sẽn yi Sukot a kẽnga Penuwɛl n tɩ kos bãmb rɩɩbo la bãmb me leoka wa Sukot dãmba. 
Judges8:9 Dẽ la a Zedeõ yeel Penuwɛl dãmba: «M sã n tõog m bɛɛbã n lɛɛg n wa ne laafi, m na tus y ro lug-lug kãnga n lubi.»" 
Judges8:10 A Zeba la a Salmuna da bee Karkor ne b tãb-biisa sẽn da kellã, tus piig la a nu. Bãmb bala n da põs yaang rãmba tãb-biis sʋka, tɩ sẽn ki-ba yɩɩ tãb-biis tus koabg la pisi." 
Judges8:11 A Zedeõ tũu we-gõaadba sore, Noba la Yogboa yaanga. A Zedeõ linga bɛɛbã n tõog-ba." 
Judges8:12 A Zeba ne a Salmuna paam n zoeeme. A Zedeõ pʋga Madiã dĩm dãmbã n yõg-ba. Tãb-biisa yẽ pa zabrẽ wã zãnga. 
Judges8:13 Zabr sẽn sɛ, a Zowas biig, a Zedeõ, tũu Erɛs sorã n lɛɛg n wa." 
Judges8:14 A Zedeõ boola Sukot bi-bɩɩg a ye n sok la a kos-a t'a gʋls Sukot taoor dãmba yʋy n paas nin-kẽemsã, bãmb pisopoe la a yopoe." 
Judges8:15 A Zedeõ taa Sukot dãmb sʋk n yeel-ba: «Ad-a Zeba la a Salmuna. Bãmb poorẽ, yãmb laa maam n tol n sok-ma: ‹Fo zoe n paam n sẽba a Zeba la a Salmuna laa, n yet tɩ b bao bur-maas n kõ f tãb-biisi sẽn kẽnd ne yaamse la kom?› »" 
Judges8:16 A yõga tẽnga nin-kẽemsã la b waa ne we-raooga gõos la sɩlg-nao-yẽese la b yora Sukot dãmba. 
Judges8:17 A Zedeõ tɩ wãa Penuwɛl ro-wokã la a kʋ tẽnga rãmba. 
Judges8:18 A yeela a Zeba ne a Salmuna: «Neb niyns yãmb sẽn kʋ Tabor tãnga zugã da wẽnda ãnna?» Tɩ b leoke: «B ra wẽnda foom. Ned kam fãa neng ra yaa na-biig nenga.» 
Judges8:19 A Zedeõ leokame: «Ad-y yaa m kẽem dãmba, m ma-biisi! Ne Naaba-Wẽnde, m wẽend tɩ y sã dag n pa kʋẽ-ba, ma me kõn kʋ yãmb ye.»" 
Judges8:20 A yeela a Yetɛr, a bi-kẽenga: «Yik n kʋ ba!» La a Yetɛr ka sak n wõog a sʋʋg ye, rabeem yõk-a lame t'a ra paooda wʋsgo." 
Judges8:21 A Zeba ne a Salmuna yeelame: «Fo yik f toore n kʋ-do tɩ ned pãng zemsa ne a yagdo.» A Zedeõ yikame n kʋ a Zeba la a Salmuna la a looda te-neeba sẽn da loe b yʋgma wã kokore. 
Judges8:22 A Israyɛl yeela a Zedeõ: «Fo fãaga tõnd a Madiã nugẽ, bɩ f rɩ naam d zugu, foo, f biiga la f yagenga.»" 
Judges8:23 A Zedeõ leokame: «Ka maam n na n yɩ yãmb dĩm ye, ka m biiga me ye, yaa Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ yaa bãmb n tog n yɩɩ y dĩm." 
Judges8:24 Bas-y tɩ m kos y bũmbu, bɩ ned kam fãa kõ maam nug-bĩnga a sẽn paam bɛɛba laogẽ.» Bɛɛba sɩd da yaa Ismayɛlitse n tar sãnem nug-bĩnsi." 
Judges8:25 B naaga taab n leok tɩ rẽ ka tũud toog ye la a Zedeõ sẽn yɛdg a fuugu, ned kam fãa kolg n loba nug-bĩng a sẽn da paam bɛɛba laogẽ." 
Judges8:26 Nug-bĩnsã a sẽn paam zɩslem taa wakɩ koeems tusr la kobs-yopoe rẽnna, fan teeda a taaba sẽn pa naag ye: wala sẽn sogd kokoɛ, tʋb-londo, peen-mismiidu Madiã rãmb sẽn tar n sẽt b futu, la bobdse sẽn ningd yʋgma." 
Judges8:27 A Zedeõ rɩka sãnema n dõog nin-naande la a ning-a-la a tẽngẽ, Ofra. A lebga bũmb Israyɛl dãmb sẽn da waoogde. A lebga wa bẽdgo a Zedeõ ne a zak rãmb yĩnga." 
Judges8:28 Yɩɩ woto la a Madiã zug sulg Israyɛl dãmb taoore n pa le tõog n doog ye la tẽnga paama vʋʋsgo yʋʋm pis-naase n ta a Zedeõ yõor tɛka. 
Judges8:29 A Zowas biig, a Yerubaal lɛɛg n tɩ kẽ-la a zakẽ" 
Judges8:30 A Zedeõ meng kamb yɩɩ pisopoe. A pagba sõor da yaa wʋsgo. 
Judges8:31 A yem-poak a ye sẽn da be Sikɛm roga biiga t'a pʋd a yʋʋr a Abimelɛk. 
Judges8:32 A Zowas biig a Zedeõ kʋʋla sũ-noog kʋʋlem n yaool n ki. B mum-a-la ne a Zowas, a ba-roaka, Ofra, a Abiezɛr Tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges8:33 A Zedeõ loogr poore, Israyɛl kamba sɩngame n le pʋgd a Baal dãmba. A Baal-Berit n waa n lebg bãmb wẽnde." 
Judges8:34 A Israyɛl waa n yĩma Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn fãag-a a bɛɛba nusẽ. 
Judges8:35 La sõngr ninga fãa a Yerubaal-Zedeõ roog sẽn sõng bãmbã, b waa n yĩma rẽ zãnga." 
Judges9:1 A Yerubaal biig a Abimelɛk waa Sikɛm a yɛs-rãmb sʋka n yeel a ma wã roog rãmba: 
Judges9:2 «Gom-y woto ne Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmbã: Bõe n são y yĩnga, a Yerubaal kamb pisopoe sẽn na n dɩt naam y zugu bɩ nin-yend bal sẽn na n ya y soaala? Pʋs n tẽeg-y tɩ maam ne yãmb yaa zɩɩma ye.»" 
Judges9:3 A Abimelɛk yɛs-rãmba taasa koɛɛga Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmbã la b yam ra kẽ-la a Abimelɛk tɩ b ra yetame: «A yaa tõnd zɩɩm.» 
Judges9:4 Dẽ la b kõ-a wanzurf wakɩ koeems pisopoe wala b sẽn geend wakɩr to-to a Baal-Berit wẽnd doogẽ. A Abimelɛk rɩka ligdã n na n yao nin-yaals la bi-beese sẽn na n pʋg a poore. 
Judges9:5 A sẽn leb a ba-yiri, Ofra, a kʋ-la a ba-biis la a kẽem dãmba, bãmb pisopoe. Nin-yend n yaool n põse: yaa a Zotam, nugẽ-biigã sẽn da zoe n soonde." 
Judges9:6 Sikɛm la Bɛt-Milo rãmb tigma taaba la b kaasa a Abimelɛk wala b naab, Sikɛm tẽnga, tẽn-kugra kʋka tẽngre." 
Judges9:7 Rẽ waa n lʋɩ-la a Zotam tʋbrẽ, t'a rʋ Garizim tãnga. A zẽka a koɛɛg n tãs neba woto: «Kelg-y-ma, Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmba, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd me na kelg-y." 
Judges9:8 Tɩɩsa yika raar a ye n dɩk sore n na n tɩ yug ned ninga sẽn na n dɩ-a naam b zugu. B yeela oliviye: ‹Yɩ tõnd dĩma!› 
Judges9:9 Oliv tiig leokame: ‹M yɩta wãna n bas m kaama sẽn tar n waoogd wẽnd-dãmb la ninsaalba n tɩ lengd tɩɩsa a taab zugu?› 
Judges9:10 Tɩɩsa lɛɛg n yeela kankanga: ‹Bɩ fo wa yɩ d dĩma!› 
Judges9:11 Kankanga leok-b lame: ‹M yɩta a wãna n bas m kamba ne b noosma n tɩ lengd tɩɩs a taab zugu?› 
Judges9:12 Tɩɩsa bʋʋga bugsuntungu n yeel-a: ‹Bɩ fo wa yɩ d dĩma!› 
Judges9:13 Bugsuntung yeel-b lame: ‹M maanda a wãna n bas m rãama sẽn noogd wẽnd dãmba la ninsaalb sũuri n kẽng n tɩ lengd tɩɩs a taab zutu?› 
Judges9:14 Tɩɩsa kong n babsa gõaaga n yeel-a: ‹Bɩ fo wa yɩ d rĩma!› 
Judges9:15 Tɩ gõaag leok-ba: ‹Sã n yaa ne yamleoogo la y taagd-m kaam tɩ m yɩɩ y dĩma bɩ y wa soond m maasmẽ. Y ka maan boto me, bugum n na n yi gõ-tuugã la Libã tɩ bɛda na n dɩɩ zãnga!›" 
Judges9:16 Dɩlla, m saam-biisi, a Zotam n gomde, sã n yaa ne yamleoogo la pʋ-peelem la yãmb yãk a Abimelɛk, ges-y yãmb sã n ka maan sõm-zɩtem ne a Yerubaal doogo, ges-y y sã n maana ne-a wala a sẽn da tog ne bũmb ninga." 
Judges9:17 La m ba n yaool n zab yãmb yĩnga, a koosa a yõor n na n fãag yãmb Madiã nugẽ," 
Judges9:18 la rũnna yãmb yika zabr ne m ba-roogo, yãmb kooda a kamba la tẽnsoaben-dãmb pisopoe, wakat a ye. La yãmb basa Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmba, n yug wala y dĩma, yem-poak biig, a Abimelɛk, a sẽn yaa y yagenga yĩnga." 
Judges9:19 Sã n yaa ne yamleoogo la pʋ-peelem la y maand dũnna ne a Yerubaal doogo, bɩ a Abimelɛk noog y sũuri la yãmb me yɩɩ a sũ-noogo." 
Judges9:20 Dẽ sã n ka be bɩ bugum yi a Abimelɛk nengẽ n dɩ Sikɛm la Bɛt-Milo taoor dãmba, bɩ bugum yi Sikɛm la Bɛt-Millo taoor dãmba nengẽ n dɩ a Abimelɛk!»" 
Judges9:21 A Zotam sẽn gom n sɛ, a zoeeme; a tɩ kẽe Beer; a tɩ kẽe be n paam n zãag ne a saam-biig a Abimelɛk." 
Judges9:22 A Abimelɛk dɩɩ naam yʋʋm a tã a Israyɛl zugu. 
Judges9:23 Wẽnd wa n zablga a Abimelɛk ne Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmbã tɩ bãmb me yik n sɩng a Abimelɛk tõdgre. 
Judges9:24 Ade, yell ning sẽn maane ne a Yerubaal kamb pisopoe wã, da togame tɩ b bãng tɩ yaa a Abimelɛk n na n dɩ zɩɩma raagr taale, tɩ yẽnda n kʋ a ba-biisi, la yaa Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmba me, tɩ bãmb n tus-a t'a kʋ a saam-biisi." 
Judges9:25 Sikɛm taoor dãmba solga neba tãmsa zutu tɩ b gũusd so-loaadbã n fãad-ba. Waa n lʋɩ-la a Abimelɛk, tʋbrẽ." 
Judges9:26 Daar a ye, a Ebɛd biig, a Gaal, ne a yaopa waa Sikɛm la a goama kẽe Sikɛm taoor dãmb sũurẽ." 
Judges9:27 B sak n yi b pʋtẽ n tõs b sib biisi, n kõg b rãam, n maan kibsa la b waoog b wẽnde. B rɩɩme, b yũume la b kãaba a Abimelɛk beedo." 
Judges9:28 A Ebɛd biig, a Gaal, yeel-b lame: «A Abimelɛk yaa bõe. Sikɛm ka labs ne d wa sulg d zug a Abimelɛk taoore? A yaa bõe? A yaa a Yerubaal biiga la yẽ n kõ a tãnsoab, a Zebul, tẽnga soolem. Da maan-y yel-sõm-zɩtem ne a Amor, tɩ yaa yẽ maasem yĩng la Sikɛm be. Bõe yĩng la d na n sulg d zugu a Abimelɛk taoore?" 
Judges9:29 Ade, b sã n da rɩkẽ tẽnga gesg n kõ maam, m naan n n tus a Abimelɛk n leb kɛɛnga! M naan n yeel-a: ‹Paas f tãb-biisa sõor la f wa tɩ d seg taaba.› »" 
Judges9:30 Kombere a Zebul bãnga goam nins a Ebɛd biig, a Gaal, sẽn yiis a noorẽ la a sũur puugame." 
Judges9:31 A maana zãmbo n tʋm neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Abimelɛk: «Ad a Ebɛd biig, a Gaal, waa Sikɛm ne a yaopa la b zẽkda tẽnga rãmb zutu tɩ b yi fo poorẽ." 
Judges9:32 Dẽ yĩnga, yi yʋngo, foo ne f nebã n tek n wũund pʋtẽ wã." 
Judges9:33 Yibeoogo, sõor sã n yẽege, f na n yik n tak zabre. A Gaal ne a neba sã n yi n na n seg foo, f na maan ne-a wa f sẽn date.»" 
Judges9:34 A Abimelɛk yii yʋngo ne a nebã la b waa n soonda Sikɛm noorẽ. A welga a neba sags a naase. 
Judges9:35 A Ebɛd biig, a Gaal, sẽn waa n yi n tek n yaas tẽnga noorẽ, a Abimelɛk ne a neba me pusga vugri n yi." 
Judges9:36 A Gaal sẽn yãe neba a yeela a Zebul: «Ges-y neb sẽn sigd tãngã.» T'a leok: 
Judges9:37 «Ad yaa tãmsa maasem la fo sẽn mamsd ne nebã.» T'a Gaal le yeele: «Ges-y neb sẽn sigd tãnga yũugẽ, tɩ kẽer yit bagba kʋk sẽnẽ.»" 
Judges9:38 Dẽ la a Zebul yeela: «Yaa bõe la f zelemd da togsda? Ka foo n da sokd t'a Abimelɛk yaa bõe tɩ f zug na n sulg a taoore? Ka fo sẽn da sãbsd b rãmba la f sẽn ne wã? Yi marsã n tak zabr ne ba.» 
Judges9:39 A Gaal lʋɩ Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmba taoore n tak zabre ne a Abimelɛk. 
Judges9:40 A Abimelɛk riga a Gaal t'a wudg, a neba wʋsg kiime, b pa paam n kẽ tẽnga pʋg ye." 
Judges9:41 A Abimelɛk waa n kẽe Aruma la a Gaal diga a Zebul ne a ba-biisã tɩ b ra zĩnd Sikɛm ye. 
Judges9:42 Vẽkẽmbeoogo Sikɛm dãmba yii b tẽngẽ tɩ b wa yeel a Abimelɛk tɩ b rabda b pʋtẽ. 
Judges9:43 Woto a welga a neba sags a tã n bao zĩig n solg b pʋtẽ. Neba sẽn waa n yita a bʋʋg-b lame n pãb-ba. 
Judges9:44 A Abimelɛk ne a neba yɛdgame n pag tẽnga noore, tãb-biis a taaba riga Sikɛm dãmba sẽn da sẽeg pʋtẽ wã n kʋ." 
Judges9:45 Raara tõre a Abimelɛk zaba ne tẽnga pʋgẽ dãmba. Tẽnga lʋɩ-la a nugẽ t'a kood nebã, n wã rotã, n bao yamsem n fẽrg tẽngã." 
Judges9:46 B sẽn wʋm dẽ, Migdal-Sikɛm tẽnsoaben-dãmba zoeeme n tɩ soond tãng bokẽ, El-Berit wẽnd doog pʋga." 
Judges9:47 B wilga a Abimelɛk tɩ Migdal-Sikɛm nin-bɛdã tɩ soonda be. 
Judges9:48 A rʋʋ Salmon tãng zug, yẽ ne a nebã. A reeg-a lare n kɛɛg tɩɩg willi n tʋk-a n palg a bãoko, la a yet a nebã: «Yãmb sẽn yãe tɩ m maan bũmb ningã, maan-y boto tao-tao.»" 
Judges9:49 Ned kam fãa kɛɛga a willi n tʋk n pʋgd a Abimelɛk, b tɩ sam-b-la tãnga boko la b ning-a-la bugum tɩ bokẽ dãmba paa a pʋgẽ. Migdal-Sikɛm neba kii zãnga, pagb la rap na ta tusri." 
Judges9:50 A Abimelɛk teesa Tebɛk, a sẽn pag tẽnga noya, a tõog-a lame." 
Judges9:51 Do lug-lug a ye n da be tẽnga sʋka tɩ pagba la rapa fãa zoe n tɩ soond be. Tẽnga nin-bɛda me ra bee be. B ra maneg n paga tẽnga noore n yaool dʋ gaosgã. 
Judges9:52 A Abimelɛk paam n taa ro-lug-lugã n tak zabre. A sẽn waa n ta ro lug-luga noorã, a kolg n na n ning-a-la bugum" 
Judges9:53 Pag a ye lobga a zug ne neer t'a zuga wã. 
Judges9:54 Tao-tao t'a boola a wed-kɩɩma n yeel-a: «Wõog f sʋʋg n kõs-ma tɩ b ra wa yeele: ‹Yaa pag n kʋ-a.› » Wed-kɩɩma sɩd kõs-a lame n kʋ. 
Judges9:55 Israyɛl kamb sẽn wʋm a Abimelɛk kũum, b fãa leba b tẽnsẽ." 
Judges9:56 Wẽng ning a Abimelɛk sẽn maana lɛɛg n lʋɩ-la a zugu. A ra tʋma a ba wẽnga n kʋ a kamb pisopoe. 
Judges9:57 Yaa boto me la b kɩt tɩ Sikɛm dãmb dɩ b wẽnema taale. A Yerubaal biig, a Zotam, kãab wẽnsa pidsame." 
Judges10:1 Sẽn fãaga a Israyɛl a Abimelɛk poor yɩ-la a Tola, a ba la a Ypa, a yaab la a Dodo. A ra yaa a Isakar sakẽ neda la a ra kẽeda Samir sẽn zao Efrayim tãng zugu." 
Judges10:2 A Tola kaoo Israyɛl bʋʋd yʋʋm pisi la a tã n yaool n ki la b mum-a-la Samir. 
Judges10:3 A Tola poore a Yayir n kao Israyɛl bʋʋd yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu. 
Judges10:4 A Kamb yɩɩ pis-tã, n zombd bõeens pis-tã, n kẽed tẽns pis-tã sẽn ket n boond dũnna t'a Yayir tẽnse, a Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges10:5 A Yayir kiime tɩ b mum a Kamo. 
Judges10:6 Israyɛl kamb le sɩng n maana sẽn ka noom Soaala-Wẽnde. B waooga Baal dãmba la Astarte dãmba n paas Aram, Sidõ, Moab wẽnd dãmba, Filisti la Amonitsa wẽnd dãmba. B Basame n ka le waoogd Naaba-Wẽnd ye." 
Judges10:7 Yaa rẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puug ne a Israyɛl tɩ b rɩk-a n sagl Filisti rãmba la Amonitsa nusẽ. 
Judges10:8 A Israyɛl yãee naong la pɛta yʋʋm piig la a nii pʋgẽ. Sẽn nams-ba n yɩɩg, yɩɩ Israyɛl kamb niyns sẽn da be-b Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges10:9 Amonitsa me yikame n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n tak zabr ne a Zɩɩda, a Bẽnzame la a Efrayim. A Israyɛl nimbãaneg waa n sɩd lebga wʋsgo." 
Judges10:10 Wakat kãng marsã la b yaool n kelem Wẽnde, n yetẽ: «Tõnd beega yãmba tɩ tõnd basa yãmb, d Wẽnnaam, n pʋgd Baal dãmba.»" 
Judges10:11 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd leok-ba: «Ezipt rãmba, Amoritse, Amonitse, Filisti rãmba," 
Judges10:12 Sidõ, Amalɛk la Madiã rãmb sẽn waa n tar yãmb toogo tɩ yãmb kelem n bool-ma, m zãgsame tɩ m kõn fãag yãmb b nusẽ bɩ?" 
Judges10:13 Yaa yãmb n bas maam n pʋg wẽnd dãmb a taaba. Ma me toog ka le be ye, m kõn fãag-y ye." 
Judges10:14 Tɩ waas-y ne wẽnd dãmb nins sẽn ta y yam. Bool-y tɩ b fãag yã y yel-pakr pʋgẽ.» 
Judges10:15 A Israyɛl leokame: «Tõnd kongame, maan-y ne tõnd wala y sẽn date, yãmb yee n fãagd dũnna bala!»" 
Judges10:16 B tɩ yiisa wẽn-sãamsã b zagsẽ n le pʋg Naaba-Wẽnde. Naaba-Wẽnd ka le tõog n bas a Israyɛl t'a nams ye. 
Judges10:17 Amonitsa tigima taaba la b wẽ-la sik Galaad. Israyɛl me tigsa a nebã n wẽ a sik Mispa. 
Judges10:18 Galaad neba la a taoor dãmb yeela taaba: «Nin-bʋg n na n wa zab ne a Amon doogã n kõ-do? Nin-kãng na lebg d naab Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ.» 
Judges11:1 Galaad daoa, a Zɛfte, da yaa tãnsoab sẽn pid ne sũuri. A ba sẽn da boond tɩ Galaad rog-a-la ne pʋg-yoodre." 
Judges11:2 Galaad kãng tom-paga roga kamb a taaba, kom-dibli la kom-pugli. La b sẽn waa n bɩ b riga a Zɛfte. B yeel-a lame: «Fo kõn naag tõnd n dɩ d ba paoong ye tɩ f yaa pag a to biiga.»" 
Judges11:3 A Zɛfte zoe n zãaga ne a ba-biisi n tɩ kẽ Tob tẽnga. Be a ra wʋka nin-yaalse n saad n takd zaba. 
Judges11:4 Sẽn wa n kaoos bilfu, tɩ Amonitsa yik zabr ne a Israyɛl," 
Judges11:5 Galaad nin-kẽemsã tʋmame tɩ b bool a Zɛfte Tob tẽnga. 
Judges11:6 B yeel-a lame: «Wa, n yɩ d tãnsoaba tɩ d zab ne Amonitsã.»" 
Judges11:7 Dẽ la a Zɛfte leok-ba: «Ka yãmb n dɩ beem ne maam n dig-m n yiis m ba zakẽ laa? Bõe tɩ toog tar-y marsã, tɩ y baood m zĩiga?»" 
Judges11:8 Nin-kẽemba yeela a Zɛfte: «D sã n lɛɛg n baood foo rũnna, d datame tɩ fo wa kẽ-do, n zab ne Amonitsã, n lebg d naaba, n lebg Galaad tõr naaba.»" 
Judges11:9 T'a Zɛfte yeele: «Y sã n bas-m tɩ m lɛɛg n wa tak zabre ne Amonitsã n tõog-ba, ne Naaba-Wẽnd sõngre, m na sak n lebg y naaba.»" 
Judges11:10 Tɩ nin-kẽemba paas: «Bɩ Wẽnd yɩ d kaset soaba, d sã n ka maan wala d sẽn yeelã.»" 
Judges11:11 A Zɛfte kẽnga zabre ne Galaad nin-kẽemsã la neba sakame t'a lʋɩ b taoore. A Zɛfte le togsa b goama fãa, Mispa, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
Judges11:12 A Zɛfte tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Amonitsa dĩma: «Bõe n be maam ne foom tẽnsʋka n sek zabre tɩ f wat n na n tak zabr ne m tẽnga?» 
Judges11:13 Amonitsa dĩma leoka a Zɛfte sẽn tʋm b rãmbã: «Ade, a Israyɛl sẽn yi Ezipt tẽnga, a waa n deega m soolem. Yɩɩ Arno kʋɩlga n ta Yabok la Zʋrdẽ. Lebs maam m soolem tɩ ket n maasa.»" 
Judges11:14 A Zɛfte le tʋma neb Amonitsa mengẽ," 
Judges11:15 tɩ b tɩ yeel dĩma: «Woto la a Zɛfte koɛɛga: A Israyɛl ka reeg fɩ a Moab la Amon tẽn-peelmẽ ye. 
Judges11:16 A Israyɛl sẽn yi Ezipt a pãrga we-raoogo n ta Rudum Mogrã n yaool n dig Kadɛs. 
Judges11:17 B A Israyɛl zĩnda be n tʋm tɩ b yeel Edom dĩma: ‹Kabr tɩ m bʋdg f soolma n looge.› La Edom dĩma pa kelg-a ye. A toola Moab dĩma nengẽ la yẽ me ka sak ye. Dẽ la a Israyɛl kong n pa Kadɛs. 
Judges11:18 Dẽ poore b pãrga we-raoogã n gil Edom ne Moab tẽn-peelem n wa Moab yaanga. B wẽ-la b sika Arno kʋɩlga rʋʋre, la b pa kẽ Moabitsa tẽngẽ tɩ Arno kʋɩlga la a toaaga." 
Judges11:19 A Israyɛl zĩnda be n tʋm neb Amoritsa dĩm a Siyõ nengẽ, Esbõ tẽnga. A tʋmame tɩ b yeel dĩma: ‹Kabr tɩ m bʋdg f soolma n ta m sẽn dabdẽ.›" 
Judges11:20 La a Siyõ zãgsame, a tigma a zab-zabdba Yaas tẽnga la a sɩnga zabre ne a Israyɛl." 
Judges11:21 A Israyɛl Wẽndã dɩka a Siyõ ne a nebã n sagl a Israyɛl nugẽ, t'a Israyɛl tõog-ba. A Israyɛl sẽn deege yɩɩ Amoritsa soolem zãnga," 
Judges11:22 sẽn sɩng Arno bãg-faaga n ta Yabok kʋɩl-bɛɛga, sẽn sɩng yaang we-raoogã n tat Zʋrdẽ." 
Judges11:23 Soaala-Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽndã, n sõng tõnd tɩ d deeg Amoritsa soolem. Bõe tɩ fo rat marsã n dig-d n yiisi?" 
Judges11:24 Fo sẽn kẽed tẽng ningã ka fo wẽnd a Kemos n kõ-f-la? Bãng tɩ tõnd me tara sore n kẽ tẽng ning d Soaala sẽn kõ-d tɩ d sooge. 
Judges11:25 Fo yɩɩda Moab dĩm a Balak, a Sipor biiga laa? Fo pa ne t'a Balak pa yaas n maan nokoeemd ne a Israyɛl? Fo pa ne t'a Balak pa saag n tak zabr ne a bɩ?" 
Judges11:26 Ya yʋʋm kobs-tã marsã la Israyɛl kamba kẽed Esbõ la Aroɛr ne b tẽn-toose, n paas tẽns nins sẽn be Arno kʋɩlga noorã, bõe tɩ ta rũnna tɩ y ka rig-ba n yiisi?" 
Judges11:27 Mam ka maan kegr ne foom ye la fo maana wẽng ne maam n tak zabr ne ma. Bɩ Wẽnd sẽn ya Bʋ-kaoodã, kao Israyɛl ne Amoritsa bʋʋdo.»" 
Judges11:28 Amoritsa dĩm baas n ka kelg a Zɛfte sẽn taas-a koees niynsa ye. 
Judges11:29 Soaala-Wẽnd vẽnega a Zɛfte yam. A tũ Galaad la Manase n sãag n ta Mispa-Galaad soolem n yi be n dʋʋg Amonitsa toaaga. 
Judges11:30 A Zɛfte pʋlma Naaba-Wẽnd a pʋlengo n yeele: «Y sã n sõng tɩ m tõog Amoritsa," 
Judges11:31 ned ninga fãa sẽn na n yi pipi m zakẽ wã n seg-ma, yẽ soab lebga Wẽnd pʋɩɩre la a na lebga yũ-noog maoong bũmbu.»" 
Judges11:32 A Zɛfte tɩ kẽe Amonitsa tẽn-peelmẽ n zab ne ba la Naaba-Wẽnd dɩk-b lame n sagl a nugẽ. 
Judges11:33 A rig-b-la Aroɛr n kolg Minit (tẽns pisi la a reeg yã); n dig-b n ta Abɛl-Keramim. A tõog-b-la sõma; Amonitsa sulga b zug a Israyɛl taoore. 
Judges11:34 A Zɛfte sẽn wa n lɛɛg n wat Mispa, a tẽngẽ, yaa yẽ meng bi-pugl n yi n seg-a ne gãngãoog bila la a saoodẽ. Da yaa a bi-yende, a ka paam biig a to, pag bɩ raoa sã ka yẽnda a ye tãa." 
Judges11:35 A Zɛfte sẽn yãend-a, a kẽesa a fut n yetẽ: «M biiga, f kẽes-m-la yell sẽn ka be tɩɩm, fo waa n tʋʋg-m-la zu-beedo! M goma wʋsg Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, m pʋlma Wẽnd la m ka le tõe n lebs m zelemd ye.»" 
Judges11:36 La bi-pugla yeel-a lame: «M ba sõngo, yãmb pʋlma Wẽnde, yãmb goma wʋsg Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, bɩ y maan wa y sẽn yeele. Soaala sõng-y lame tɩ y rok y sũur ne y bɛɛba, ne Amoritsã.»" 
Judges11:37 A le paasame: «Ad-m sẽn kot y bũmb ninga: Bas-y-m ne m meng kiis a yiibu. M na rʋ n yeeb tãmsã zut ne m tũud-n-taase n yãb m sẽn na n kong rogem sũ-noogã.» 
Judges11:38 A Zɛfte yeel-a lame: «Kẽnge, m biiga!» La a bas-a-la kiis a yiibu. A yii ne a tũud-n-taase la a rʋʋ tãng zugu la a yãba a menga." 
Judges11:39 Kiis a yiiba poore a lɛɛg n waa a ba zakẽ la ba pidsa a pʋlemde. A ka paam n yi kãadem ye. Ad-y yaa rẽ n wa ne rog-n-mik kãngã: 
Judges11:40 Yʋʋmd yʋʋmd fãa, Israyɛl kom-pugli kẽnd n yãbda Galaad dao a Zɛfte bi-pugla, dasem a naas tõre." 
Judges12:1 Efrayim neb n tigim taaba n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ, n tees Safõ n tɩ yeel a Zɛfte: «Yaa bõe yĩnga la f yi n tɩ tak zab ne Amonitsã n ka bool tõndo tɩ d wa yãag-fo? Tõnd na n yõog-f la bugum, foo ne f zaka!»" 
Judges12:2 Dẽ la a Zɛfte leok yã: «Maam ne m neba ra zĩi ne yɩɩre la Amonitsa da tar-d lame n namsdẽ. M bool-y lame tɩ y wa sõng-ma la y ka wa fãag-m ye. 
Judges12:3 M sẽn yãe tɩ ned ba a ye ka wat m sõngre, m ka zoe kũum ye, m boba zabr ne Amonitsã la Soaala-Wẽnd sõng-m lame tɩ m tõog-ba. Y sẽn tigim taab n na n wa zab ne ma võor la bõe?»" 
Judges12:4 A Zɛfte me boola a saam-biisi tɩ b tak zabr ne Efrayim dãmba la a tõog-b lame. Efrayim dãmb da yetame: yãmba, Galaad rãmbã, yãmb yaa a Efrayim neb sẽn zoe n wa nok a Manase bala." 
Judges12:5 Woto Galaad dãmb tɩ yalsa neb zĩis nins Efrayim neba sẽn tõe n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ, n paam n gɩdg-ba. B sã n yãend ned sẽn wat n na n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, b sokd-a lame: «Fo yaa Efrayim ned bi?» A sã n yet tɩ ayoo," 
Judges12:6 b kot-a lame t'a yeel: Sibolɛt, la yẽ yetame: fibolɛt, b zelemda lakr da ka a ye ye. B wẽnegd n yõka sẽn luk a meng bãongã la b kodgd-a-la kʋɩlga noore. Yaa woto la Efrayim dãmb ki yã, bãmb na ta tus pis-naas la a yiibu." 
Judges12:7 A Zɛfte sooga taoor Israyɛl yʋʋm a yoobe n yaool n ki la yaa a tẽngẽ la b mum-a, yaa Galaad tẽng Mispa." 
Judges12:8 A Zɛfte poore a Ibsã n soog taoor Israyɛl. A ra kẽeda Bɛtelyɛɛm. 
Judges12:9 A kom-dibli yɩɩ pis-tã, a kom-pugli me pis-tã. A kẽnga tẽng a to n bao kom-pugli n kõ a kom-dibli la a yiisa a kom-pugli wã me ne buud a to rãmba. A rɩɩ kãseng yʋʋm a yopoe." 
Judges12:10 A kiime tɩ b mum-a Bɛtelyɛɛm. 
Judges12:11 A Zabulõ ned n led a zĩiga: a Elon. A rɩɩ kãsengo yʋʋm piiga. 
Judges12:12 A kiime la b mum-a-la Ayalõ, Zabulõ tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges12:13 A Elon poore yɩɩ Piratõ daoa, a Illɛl biig a Abdõ, n soog taoor Israyɛl." 
Judges12:14 A kamb da yɩɩ pis-naase, a yagens pis-tã, n da zombd bõeens pisopoe sẽn ya poala. A sooga kãsengo yʋʋm a nii." 
Judges12:15 Piratõ daoa, a Illɛl biig a Abdõ, sẽn ki, b mum-a la Efrayim tẽn-peelmẽ, a Amalɛk tãng zugu." 
Judges13:1 Israyɛl kamb le sɩngame n maan sẽn ka tat Naaba-Wẽnd yam tɩ Wẽnd bas-b Filisti rãmb nugẽ, yʋʋm pis-naase." 
Judges13:2 Ned n da be Sorea t'a yʋʋr boond tɩ Manoa, a Dã sakẽ. A paga ra yaa pʋg-kiiri n da ka tar biig ye." 
Judges13:3 Soaala-Wẽnd lika pagã n yeel-a: «Fo yaa pʋg-kiiri n ka rog biig ye. 
Judges13:4 La marsã tɛka, maan gũusgu! Da yũ rãam la sẽn wẽnd rãam buud ye. Da wãb rũn-dẽgd ye." 
Judges13:5 F na n dɩka pʋga n dog biiga. Barg da sɩɩs a zug ye, tɩ b na n dɩk-a lame n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde t'a nan ket a ma pʋgẽ. Yẽ n na n fãag a Israyɛl, Filisti rãmb nugẽ.»" 
Judges13:6 Paga bʋʋga a sɩda n yeel-a: «Wẽnd nin-sõng n gom ne maam la f sã n yãee a sẽn yaa a soaba, bãng malɛka. A yãeeb wata ne yɛɛsgo. M pa sok-a a sẽn yitẽ ye, la yẽ me ka togs maam a yʋʋr ye." 
Judges13:7 La ad-a sẽn yeel-ma: ‹F na n dɩka pʋga la f na n doga biiga. Marsã tɛka da le yũ rãam la rãam buud ye, da wãb rũn-dẽgd ye, tɩ biiga na n yɩɩ Wẽnd pʋɩɩr a ma pʋgẽ n tãag a kũum.› »" 
Judges13:8 A Manoa goma woto ne Wẽnde: «Soaala, m kot-y lame tɩ y sẽn tʋm ned ninga le lɛɛg n wa n wilg d sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ne biigã, a rogem poore.»" 
Judges13:9 Naab a Wẽnd deega a Manoa kosgo la malɛka le waame dẽ tɩ paga ra zĩi a pʋʋgẽ a ye. A sɩda ra ka be ne-a ye. 
Judges13:10 Paga yika tao-tao n bʋʋg a sɩda n yeel-a: «Ad ned ninga sẽn lika maam nin-daarẽ wã le waame.» 
Judges13:11 A Manoa yikame n pʋg a pagã n ta raoa nengẽ n yeel-a: «Yaa yãmb n gom nin-dãarẽ ne pʋg kãnga bɩ?» La a leokame: «Yaa maam!» 
Judges13:12 T'a Manoa le sok n paase: «La y sẽn yeela sã n wa pidsi bõe la d na n maan biiga poorẽ?» 
Judges13:13 Soaala-Wẽnd malɛka yeela a Manoa: «Bũmb ning fãa sẽn ya kisgu paga yĩnga, a yɩ kisgu ne biiga me." 
Judges13:14 Bugsuntungu, rãam, rãam buud fãa, rũn-dẽgd buud fãa, paga ra sɩɩs ye, a reeg noy-niyns fã m sẽn kõ-a.»" 
Judges13:15 Dẽ la a Manoa leok malɛka: «M kotame tɩ y pa ne tõnd tɩ d yõk d bullã n maan zẽed bilfu n kõ yã.» 
Judges13:16 A Manoa ra ket n ka mi tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd malɛk ye. Tɩ malɛka na n leok-a: «Ba m sã n sak gõogrã m kõn sak n dɩ bũmb ye. Sã n ya maoong la f rat n kʋ bɩ f kʋ-a Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga.» 
Judges13:17 A Manoa yeelame: «La yãmb yʋʋr la a bõe tɩ d tõog n pʋʋs d zaamẽ, yɛla sã n taase?»" 
Judges13:18 Malɛka yeelame: «Bõe yĩng la f rat n bãng m yʋʋre? Ad yaa yʋ-bãnde.» 
Judges13:19 A Manoa rɩka bullã n paas kũun a taaba la a yõog-b-la pĩig zugu tɩ b rɩ bugum zãnga, Wẽnd ning tʋʋm sẽn ya tʋʋm bãna yĩnga." 
Judges13:20 Maan-kugra bugum dʋʋ yĩngri t'a Manoa ne a paga yãe malɛka sẽn tũud-a n dʋʋda. Dẽ la b wõgemd b neng tẽnga. 
Judges13:21 Malɛka ka le lik a Manoa ne a paga ye la woto b bãngame tɩ sɩd yɩɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n da tʋm-a. 
Judges13:22 A Manoa yeela a pagã: «Tõnd na n sɩd kiime tɩ d yãee Wẽnde.» 
Judges13:23 La paga leokame: «Wẽnd sã n da ratẽ tõnd kũum b kõn deegẽ d maoonga la d kũuna la d kõn paamẽ n bãng d sẽn wʋma ye.» 
Judges13:24 Paga wa n doga biiga n pʋda a yʋʋr Sãmsõ. Biiga bɩɩme, ne Naaba-Wẽnd barka," 
Judges13:25 la yaa a Dã sikẽ, Sorea ne Estaol tẽnsʋka, la Wẽnd sɩng n pids-a ne b pãng la b yam." 
Judges14:1 A Sãmsõ kẽe Timna, dar a ye, la a yãee bi-pugl Filisti kom-pugli wã sʋka." 
Judges14:2 A sẽn leb yiri a tɩ togsa a ba la a ma la a yeelame: «Bi-pugl la m yãe Timna, Filisti kom-pugli wã sʋka, bao yã n kõ-m tɩ m maan m paga.»" 
Judges14:3 La a ba ne a ma naag a taab n yeel-a: «Pagb n ka be f saam-biisa kom-pugli wã sʋka la f buudẽ wã bɩ? Yaa bõe tɩ f na n bao nin-dẽgd kamba? La a kell n yeela a ba: Yaa yẽ la m dat tɩ y bao kõ-ma tɩ yẽ n ta mam yam.» 
Judges14:4 A ba ne a ma ka bãng tɩ ra yaa Soaala-Wẽnd daab ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da baooda Filisti rãmba noore, tɩ wakat kãnga yaa Filisti rãmba n da rɩt naam a Israyɛl zugu." 
Judges14:5 A Sãmsõ rɩka Timna sore la a sẽn wa n kolg Timna rãmb pʋto a yãee bõnyẽ-pol sẽn segd-a la a ningd rãamde. 
Judges14:6 Naaba-Wẽnd pãng kẽe-a lame, a ra ka zãad bũmb ye la a sẽn sog bõnyẽegã a yaang-a lame, wala bulla. A yaool n ka saag n togs a ba bɩ a ma ye." 
Judges14:7 A kell n tũ a sore n tɩ sõs ne pagã Timna la a yam kẽe-a lame. 
Judges14:8 Sẽn maan dasem a wãna a Sãmsõ lɛɛg n waame tɩ b yi kãadem. A sẽn tek n bʋdge n na n ges bõnyẽega rɩgre, a mikame tɩ sĩ n kẽe-a n maan b sɩɩdo." 
Judges14:9 A yãka sɩ-vaka n ta taoore n lemb-a, n kees n tɩ kõ a ma la a ba tɩ b rɩ la a pa saag n wilg a sẽn paam sɩɩda zĩig ninga ye, bõnyẽega rɩgrẽ." 
Judges14:10 A Sãmsõ sẽn ta a paga ba-yiri b maana kibs kãsenga ne rɩ-noodo. Bãmb me rog-n-mik la rẽ. 
Judges14:11 B sẽn yãend-a, tẽnga rãmb baoo kom-bɩɩs pis-tã tɩ b na n pa ne-a." 
Judges14:12 A Sãmsõ yeel-b lame: «M na n wẽe-y-la yelbũndi. Y sã n tõog n wegs-a n wilg maam a võore, rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, m na kõ-y fut pis-tã la m na le paas pis-tã tɩ y yeelgdẽ n tedgdẽ." 
Judges14:13 La y sã n pa tõog n wilg a võore, yaa yãmb n na n kõ fut pis-tã n le paas pis-tã sẽn na n yeelgdẽ n tekdẽ.» B wẽneg n yeel-a lame: «Tão f yelbũndã, d kelgdame.»" 
Judges14:14 A yeelame: «Dɩɩb yii rɩ-rɩt noorẽ, tɩ bõn bʋgsgo yi pãnga-nar-soab nengẽ.» Rasem maana a tã, b pa tõog n wa ne baobga võor ye." 
Judges14:15 Daar a nu soaba, b yeela a Sãmsõ pagã: «Belg f sɩdã n bãng kibara võore n wilg-du, ka rẽ d na yõog-f bugum, foo ne f ba wã yiri. Yãmb boola tõnd ka n na n fã d sẽn tar la?»" 
Judges14:16 Yaa woto la a Sãmsõ paga sɩng a pʋgb ne nintãm la a yetẽ: «Fo ka nong maam ye. Fo tãoo yelbũnd m saam-biisã la fo pa wilg maam a võor ye.» Dẽ la a Sãmsõ leok yã: «Awa! M sẽn ka wilg a võore m ba la m ma, m yɩta a wãn n wilg-a foom?»" 
Judges14:17 Bãng-y tɩ paga yõka yãbre la rasem a yopoe raarã, a Sãmsõ kong n wilga yelbũndã võore t'a ra yɛɛ ne a pagã la paga rɩkame n tɩ togs a saam-biisi." 
Judges14:18 Dɩlla, dasem a yopoe daarã, a sẽn waa n nan ka kẽ gõeem, tẽnga kom-bɩɩba yeela a Sãmsõ. «Bõe n ya noog n yɩɩd sɩɩdo, la bõe n tar pãnga n yɩɩd bõnyẽega?» Dẽ me la a Sãmsõ leok-ba: «Yãmb sã n da ka sogẽ mam nag-sadgã n ko y koobo, y kõn wekẽ m yelbũnda ye.»" 
Judges14:19 A Sãmsõ yika ne Naaba-Wẽnd pãnga, n kẽ Askelõ n kʋ neb pis-tã n yees b futã n kõ neb niyns sẽn wilg b yelbũnda võore la a lɛɛga ne sũ-puuri n kul a ba zakẽ." 
Judges14:20 Timna rãmb yõdg n dɩka a pagã n kõ pʋg-reema rãmb nin-yende. 
Judges15:1 Sẽn yɩ bilfu, a Sãmsõ kẽng n na n tɩ gesa a pagã la ra yaa tigsg wakato. A Sẽn waa n na n ges a pagã, a talla bulla, n wa. La a sẽn yeele: m dat n kẽe m paga roogẽ, a rɛɛmba zãgsame." 
Judges15:2 Ad-a sẽn yeel a Sãmsõ: «Sɩda m wa n yeela m sũurẽ tɩ fo sɩnga beem ne f pagã la m dɩk-a lame n kõ pʋg-reema rãmb nin-yende, la m tẽedame t'a yẽerã são-a lame. Bɩ yẽ lebg f paga a zĩigẽ.»" 
Judges15:3 A Sãmsõ leokame: «Marsã wã Filisti rãmba da le gũ bũmb m nengẽ, m na n lebs-b-la wẽng bala.»" 
Judges15:4 A Sãmsõ loogame, a kẽngame n tɩ yõg waas kobs-tã, n bao vilemse n loe-ba, a yiib-yiibu, zʋʋr-zʋʋre, n yaool n ning bugum." 
Judges15:5 A yaool n basa waasa ne bugma tɩ b kẽ Filisti rãmba pʋto, la sẽn kẽeb n tigs woo, sẽn nan ka kẽeb woo, bugsuntund la oliv tɩɩs woo, fãa rɩɩ bugum." 
Judges15:6 Filisti rãmb soka taaba: «Ãnda n maan woto?» La b yeel-b lame tɩ yaa a Sãmsõ, la yaa a rɛɛmba sẽn be Timna wã n deeg a paga n kõ pʋg-reema rãmb nin-yende. Bãng-y tɩ Filisti rãmb kẽngame n tɩ yõk paga ne a ba n yõog bãmb me bugum." 
Judges15:7 A Sãmsõ yeela Filisti rãmbã: «Yãmb manesma sẽn ya to-to wã kɩtame tɩ m me kõn vʋʋs ne m rẽnna, al n wa rok m sũuri.»" 
Judges15:8 A Sãmsõ zaba ne ba la a tõog-b-la sõma. A tɩ kẽe tãng bokẽ, Etam sẽnẽ, la a paa be." 
Judges15:9 Filisti rãmba wa n wẽe b sik Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ n tol n sãag n ta Leyi. 
Judges15:10 Zɩɩda rãmb sok-b lame tɩ yaa wãna tɩ b wa kẽed b tẽngẽ: La b leokame tɩ b waame n na n sẽb a Sãmsõ, tɩ b datame n lebs-a a sẽn maan-d bũmb ningã." 
Judges15:11 Neb tus a tã n kẽng Etam tãnga bokẽ n tɩ yeel a Sãmsõ: «Fo ka mi tɩ yaa Filisti rãmb n so tõnd laa? Yaa bõe la f sẽn maana?» T'a na n leoke: «Yaa b sẽn maan-ma la m maan n lebs.» 
Judges15:12 Dẽ la b wilg a Sãmsõ tɩ b sẽn wa wã, b waame n na n sẽb-a n tɩ kõ Filisti rãmba. T'a Sãmsõ na n yeel-ba: «Kãab-y tɩ ka yãmb meng n na n kʋ m ye.»" 
Judges15:13 B yeela woto: «Ayo, d ka na n kʋ-f ye, d datame bala n yõk-fo n kõ Filisti rãmba.» B sẽb-a-la ne wĩ sẽn rĩng paalem, wĩ a yiibu, la b yiis-a-la bokẽ wã n wa Leyi." 
Judges15:14 B kolga Leyi tɩ Filisti rãmba yi n seg-ba la b kilsdẽ tɩ b maana raoodo. Naaba-Wẽnd pãng le kẽe a Sãmsõ. Wĩ wã lebga wa gaars sẽn dɩ bugum, b sʋʋga a nusẽ n dʋʋge." 
Judges15:15 Bõang yeer sẽn nan pees paalem la a yãe yã. A sẽn tẽeg a nugu n dɩk-a, a tall-a lame n kʋ neb tusri." 
Judges15:16 N bas n yeele: «M kʋ-b lame n sam ka la ka, ne bõang yeere, m yeega neb tusr nenga.»" 
Judges15:17 A sẽn gom n sɛ, a loba bõanga yeer yɩɩga. B boola tẽnga tɩ Ramat-Leyi, yeera kunkubri." 
Judges15:18 Ko-yũud n da tar-a t'a pʋʋs Soaala woto: «Yaa yãmb n kõ y sõgna nug pãng t'a tõog a bɛɛbã, la marsã y na n bas tɩ ko-yũud kʋ mam n kõ nin-dẽgdo?»" 
Judges15:19 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ koom pusg Leyi t'a Sãmsõ yũ t'a pãng le wa. Yaa rẽ yĩng la b pʋd zĩ-kãng tɩ Eyin-Kore, la konifa keta rũnna Leyi tẽnga." 
Judges15:20 A Sãmsõ dɩɩ kãseng Israyɛl tẽng yʋʋm pis-tã dẽ tɩ Filisti rãmba n da so-a. 
Judges16:1 A Sãmsõ yii be n dig Gaza. A yãee pʋg-yoodr zak n kẽ. 
Judges16:2 Ned n togs Gaza rãmbã: «Ad-a Sãmsõ waa ka.» Dẽ la b pag tẽnga noore n gũusd-a. B ka maan bũmb a to n paas ye. B ra yetame bala: «Sẽn ya yʋngã, d yaas tɩ beoog vẽeg tɩ d na paam-a n kʋ.»" 
Judges16:3 Mik a Sãmsõ me basame tɩ zĩig zʋʋge la yʋn sʋka a tɩ gãda tẽnga noor kʋɩlensã n võog-ba ne b sogdsa fãa n palg a bãoko n tɩ lob-b tãng ning sẽn tot ne Ebrõ wã zugu. 
Judges16:4 Dẽ poore, a Sãmsõ le yãee Sorɛk kʋɩl-bɛɛga noorẽ, paga a ye n bao. Paga ra boondame tɩ Dalila." 
Judges16:5 Filisti rãmba soaalba sẽn da ya nin-wẽnsa tɩ yãenda a Dalila n yeel-a: «Belg a Sãmsõ n bãng a pãnga sẽn yitẽ la d sẽn tõe n maan bũmb ninga n tõog n yõk-a n sẽbe t'a ka le be vɩg-vɩg ye. Tõnd ned kam fãa na kõ-f wanzurf wakɩ koeems tusr la koabga.» 
Judges16:6 A Dalila tɩ yeela a Sãmsõ: «Wilg maam sẽn tũ ne bũmb ninga tɩ f tar pãng woto fãa, wilg maam d sẽn na n loe-f ne wĩir ninga tɩ f ka tõog n maan vɩg vɩg meng ye.»" 
Judges16:7 A Sãmsõ yeelame: «Sã n ya tãp wĩ a yopoe sẽn ket n ya maas n nan ka paam n kʋɩ la y rɩk n loe-ma, m pãnga na sɛ tɩ m lebg wa neb a taaba.»" 
Judges16:8 Filisti rãmba soaalba waa ne tãp wĩ a yopoe sẽn ket n ya maasa t'a Dalila reeg n loe a Sãmsõ. 
Judges16:9 A Dalila ra baoo tãb-biis n solg a roogẽ wã. A tãsame: «Sãmsõ, ad Filisti rãmba ta-f lame.» La a Sãmsõ kaoo wĩ wã wala pãnd sẽn kaoode, bugum sã n kolg-a. B ka bãng a pãnga sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Judges16:10 A Dalila yeela a Sãmsõ: «Fo belga maam n togs sẽn pa sɩda. M kotame tɩ f pelg f pʋga n wilg maam b sẽn tog n loe-f ne bũmb ninga.» 
Judges16:11 Dẽ la a leok yã: «B sã n loe-m ne wĩ paal sẽn nan ka rɩk n sẽb bũmbu, m pãng menemdame tɩ m lebg wa neb a taaba.»" 
Judges16:12 A Dalila sɩd baoo wĩ paal n loe-a n yaool n tãs: «Sãmsõ, ad Filisti rãmba ta-f lame.» A deng n baoo neb n solg a rooga pẽkẽ; la a Sãmsõ kao wĩ wã sẽn da loe a kamsã wala b sẽn kaoogd gaarga." 
Judges16:13 A Dalila yeel-a lame: «Fo ket n laada maam n yagd zirẽ la wilg maam b sẽn tõe n loe-f ne bũmb ninga.» T'a na n leoke: «B sã n yidg m gɛm a yopoe wã n wʋg-b ne sʋlg niiri wa peende, m pãnga menemdame tɩ m legb wa neb a taaba.»" 
Judges16:14 A Sãmsõ gũsame t'a Dalila yidg a gɛma n tui niir n wʋge ne koera. A wa n yaool n tãsame: «Sãmsõ, ad Filisti rãmba n tat-fo.» A Sãmsõ, nekame n bagemd a zug n kao koer-bõangã. B kell n ka bãng a pãnga sẽn yitẽ ye." 
Judges16:15 A Dalila kong n yeela a Sãmsõ: «Fo yɩta a wãn n wẽendẽ tɩ f nonga maam tɩ f sũur yaool n zãr ne maam. Yaa naoor a tãab marsã la fo belg maam, m ket n pa mi f pãn-kãsenga sẽn be f zĩig ning ye.»" 
Judges16:16 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa a ra tara dɩdgre la sogsgo t'a Sãmsõ yama wa lak zãnga. 
Judges16:17 A Sãmsõ pelga a pʋga n yeel-a: «Ad barg zɩ n sɩɩs m zobd ye tɩ b pʋlem-b-la Naaba-Wẽnde tɩ m nan ket m ma pʋgẽ. M zoobda sã n põnge, m pãnga na n sɛɛme, a na n menemame tɩ m lebg wa neb a taaba.»" 
Judges16:18 A Dalila bãngame marsã t'a sɩd pelga a pʋga la a sẽn bool Filisti rãmba soaalba, a yeel-b lame: «Wa-y marsã t'a pelga a pʋg n wilg-ma.» Filisti rãmba waa a nengẽ la b tẽegame n zɩ ligdã." 
Judges16:19 A Dalila gãnega a Sãmsõ a noẽ t'a gũsi t'a bool dao t'a wa põng a zuga gɛma a yopoe wã. A Sãmsõ pãnga sɩnga woogre n wa tol n menem zãnga. 
Judges16:20 A Dalila tãsame: «Sãmsõ, yik tɩ Filisti rãmba waame!» A nekame la a tagsame: «Sẽn ka pak pĩndã kõn pak rũnna ye, m na põs wa rasem kam.» A ra nan ka mi tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd bas-a lame ye." 
Judges16:21 Filisti rãmba paam n yõk-a lame n pẽs a nini, n tall-a n kẽng Gaza. Bee b tɩ baoo bãeens a yi n sog-a la b kɩt t'a bilgd werd-m-toore, n werd zom. Dẽ tɩ b pag-a la bi-bees roogẽ." 
Judges16:22 Zoobda sẽn põngã waa n sɩnga tobre. 
Judges16:23 Filisti taoor dãmba me waa n tigma taaba n na n maan maoong sẽn ya maoong menga b wẽnd a Dagõ yĩnga la b noog b sũuri. B ra yetame: «Tõnd wẽnda dɩka d bɛ, a Sãmsõ, n sagl d nugẽ.»" 
Judges16:24 Zãma wã sẽn ta wẽnda taoore a kils-a lame la a yeelame: «Tõnd wẽnda dɩka d bɛ, a Sãmsõ, n sagl d nugẽ, yẽ n da ya fãad la kʋʋda.»" 
Judges16:25 B sũ-nooga ra pida zãnga tɩ b yeel tɩ b wa ne a Sãmsõ t'a maan baobgo tɩ b la. B yiisa a Sãmsõ bi-bees roogẽ n tall-a n wa la a reemame tɩ b gese. B tɩ yalsa a Sãmsõ lals a yiib sẽn zɩt dooga sugr tẽnsʋka. 
Judges16:26 Yaa a Sãmsõ meng n yeel biig ninga sẽn da tat-a wã: «Tall-ma tɩ m paam n sɩɩs lals a yiibã sẽn zɩt dooga sugrã.» 
Judges16:27 Rooga yaool n da pida ne Filisti nin-bɛdã. Rooga zugu, pagb la rap na ta tus a tã n da be be n get a Sãmsõ reema." 
Judges16:28 A Sãmsõ pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnde n yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnde, m kos tɩ y tẽeg m yelle. Kõ-y maam dũnna yɛsa yãmb pãngã tɩ m dok m sũur ne Filisti rãmba n dol m nin a yiibã b sẽn pẽsã.»" 
Judges16:29 A Sãmsõ bablame n sɩɩs lals a yiibã sẽn da zɩt roogã. A rɩka a goabga n teeg lalg a ye, n dɩk a rɩtgo n teeg a to wã la a wɩka a menga." 
Judges16:30 A tãsame: «Bɩ m ki la Filisti rãmba me ra põs ye.» A sẽn tus lalsã ne a pãnga fãa, rooga bur n lʋɩɩme. A bʋʋga nin-bɛdã la zãma wã fãa sẽn da tigma. A Sãmsõ sẽn kʋ neba a kũuma daare, yɩɩga a sẽn kʋ a vɩɩma tõre." 
Judges16:31 A yaopa la a buuda waa n dɩka a yĩngã n tɩ mum Sorea ne Estaol tẽnsʋka, a ba a Manoa yaoogẽ. A Sãmsõ dɩ kãsengo yʋʋm pisi, Israyɛl." 
Judges17:1 Ned n da kẽed Efrayim tãmsã t'a yʋʋr boond tɩ Mika. 
Judges17:2 A Mika wa n yeela a ma: «Wanzurf wakɩ koeems tusr la koabga n wa n menem f roogẽ la fo kãaba b rɩkda beedo tɩ tol n lʋɩ m tʋbrẽ, ade, yaa maam n da rɩk-ba.» A ma wã leokame: «Bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ning-f barka, m biiga.»" 
Judges17:3 A Mika lebsa a ma wanzurf wakɩ koeems tusr la koabgã. Ad-a ma wã sẽn yeele: «Mam meng n da rɩk ligd kãnga n kõ Naaba-Wẽnde, n gũudẽ tɩ foom, m biiga, wa rɩk-ba n dõog nin-naand n kõ-ma. Woto wã m le lebsd-b-la foom.»" 
Judges17:4 Dɩlla paga sẽn wa n lebs a biiga ligdã, a keesa wanzurf wakɩ koeems kobs-yi n kɩs yõaka. Yõaka yẽneg-b lame n mams nin-naande t'a Mika tol n baoo zĩig a roogẽ n ning-a be." 
Judges17:5 A Mika zakẽ wã b ra zoe n sela kug peesem bũmbu. A kɩtame tɩ b tol n maam wẽn-naande la nin-naands sẽn paamd waoogre. A yãka a biig a ye n kõ maan-kʋʋr naam. 
Judges17:6 Sasa kãng tɩ Israyɛl da nan pa tar dĩm ye, tɩ ned kam fã da maand a sẽn date, a sẽn tẽed tɩ sõmbame." 
Judges17:7 Bi-bɩɩg a ye n da be tẽngã. A ra yita Bɛtelyɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ; a rooga sak da yaa a Zɩɩda saka, a ra tʋmda Levit tʋʋmde, a ra yaa tẽnga sãana." 
Judges17:8 A ra yii Bɛtelyɛɛm n na n bao tẽng sẽn sakd-a n kẽ. A sẽn kẽne a waa n ta a Mika zaka, Efrayim tãmsa zutu." 
Judges17:9 A Mika sok-a lame: «Fo yita yɛ?» T'a leoke: «M ya Levitga, m yii Bɛtelyɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ; m saad n baooda zĩig sẽn sakd-m n na n kẽ.»" 
Judges17:10 A Mika leok-a lame: «Sã n ya boto, bɩ f wa mam zakẽ n lebg m ba la m maan-kʋʋda tɩ m na kõ-f wanzurf wakɩ koeems piig yʋʋmde, m paas rɩɩb la futu.» A Mika goma woto n dɩdg Levitgã," 
Judges17:11 t'a sak n na n zĩnd, n lebg wa zaka biiga." 
Judges17:12 A Mika kõo Levitgã maan-kʋʋr naam. A paa zakẽ be n lebg maan-kʋʋda. 
Judges17:13 Dẽ la a Mika yeel yã: «M sẽn paam tɩ Levit kãnga lebg m maan-kʋʋdã, m miime tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na ges m yell neere.»" 
Judges18:1 Sasa kãng tɩ Israyɛl nan ka tar dĩm ye. Dẽ t'a Dã roog da baooda zĩig n na n kẽ t'a ra ka paam vẽenem a Israyɛl kamb a taaba sʋk ye. 
Judges18:2 Dẽ me la a Dã kamba yiis neb a nu, tãb-biis sẽn tar sũuri. B yiis-b-la Sorea la Estaol tɩ b gilg n bãng tẽnga nenga. B ra yeel-b lame: «Saag-y n gese.» B waa n dʋ Efrayim tãmsã n kẽ a Mika zakẽ n yõg gãag-soabendo." 
Judges18:3 B sẽn wa n kolg a Mika yirã, b wʋma Levitga koɛɛga. Dẽ la b waa n sok-a: «Ãnda n tall foom n wa ka? Fo maanda bõe ka? F paoong zema bõe ka?»" 
Judges18:4 A yeel-b lame: «A Mika maan-m-la woto, n paas woto; a yaood-m-la ligdi tɩ m tʋmd maan-kʋʋd tʋʋmde.»" 
Judges18:5 Tɩ b yeel-a: «Sã n ya boto, bɩ f sok Wẽnd n gese sorã d sẽn togdã na n baasa neere.» Levitga leok-b lame:" 
Judges18:6 «Kẽng-y ne laafi tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd meng n yãagd yãmb y sora zugu.» 
Judges18:7 Neb a nu wã rɩka b sore n tɩ kẽ Layis. B mikame tɩ Layis rãmb da zĩi ne laafi, wala Sidõ rãmba, b ra ka nong zabr ye la b sũur da zãra ne yɩɩre. Nanambg a to ra ka rɩt naam b zug ye la ned ba a ye ra ka kẽed tẽngã n dat n dɩ naam ye. Layis rãmba da zãra ne Sidõ rãmba la b ra ka kẽ ned ba a ye soolmẽ ye." 
Judges18:8 Neb a nu wã leba b tẽngẽ la Sorea ne Estaol dãmb sok-b lame: «Yãmb tagsdame tɩ bõe?» 
Judges18:9 Tɩ b leoke: «Yik yã! D tɩ tak zabr ne-ba. D saaga tẽngã la yaa tẽn-sõngo. La yaa bõe tɩ y zĩ sɩɩ n ka leokdẽ? Da kao-y woto n zĩi n wa pa bob ye, n wa pa kẽng n deeg tẽng sẽn ya tẽn-sõng n maan y soolem ye." 
Judges18:10 Y sã n wa kẽ tẽngã y na mik tɩ tẽnga rãmb ka zĩi n yɩɩdẽ ye. Gɩdgr buud kõn gɩdg-y tẽnga kõom ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dɩk-a lame n sagl y nugẽ. Tẽn-kãng gãe ne kood buud fãa.»" 
Judges18:11 Woto wã, Dã rãmba yii Sorea la Estaol ne tãb-biis kobs-yoobe sẽn bob b zab-teedo." 
Judges18:12 B rʋʋ n tɩ wẽ-la b sik Kiriyat-Yearim, a Zɩɩda soolmẽ. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la boond zĩ-kãng tɩ Maane-Dã, a Dã sika, n tãag rũnna. A bee Kiriyat-Yearim nin-taoore." 
Judges18:13 B sẽn dʋ Efrayim tãmsã, b taa a Mika yiri." 
Judges18:14 Neb a nu wã sẽn da zoe n wa tẽngã, Layis tẽngã, yeela b saam-biisã: «Yãmb ka mi tɩ yi-kãnga rãmb tara b wẽn-naande la nin-naands b sẽn waoogde, n paas wẽn-naand a to sẽn bolg ne wanzurfu? Marsã wã bãng-y y sẽn na n maanega.»" 
Judges18:15 B teesa a Mika yirã, n kẽ Levitga sẽn da nok zak ningã; b pʋʋsame n sok zaka rãmb keelem." 
Judges18:16 Tao tao tɩ tãb-biis kobs-yoobã gũbga zaka noore. 
Judges18:17 Neb a nu wã, b sẽn da tʋm b rãmb pipi wã, dʋʋ yĩngr doogã n kẽ n dɩk wẽn-naandsã la nin-naandsã la bũmb ning sẽn da bolg ne wanzurfã. Wakat kãng tɩ maan-kʋʋda ra yɛsa rignoorẽ ne tãb-biisa kobs-yoob sẽn bob zabrã." 
Judges18:18 Maan-kʋʋda sẽn yãe tɩ b kẽeda a Milka zakẽ la b loogd ne bõn-sõma wã, soka woto: «Yaa bõe la y maanda?»" 
Judges18:19 B leok-a lame: «Sĩndi, pĩ f noore, la tũ tõndo. Foo n na n yɩ tõnd maan-kʋʋda la d ba. Ges bʋg n são: fo sẽn ya nin-yend maan-kʋʋda bɩ f sẽn na n lebg sak a ye tõre, a Israyɛl doog a ye, maan-kʋʋda?»" 
Judges18:20 Leokra taa maan-kʋʋda yam. A reega wẽn-naandsã la nin-naandsã la a tũu Dã rãmb n looge. 
Judges18:21 B le rɩka sore n tees Layis. B lʋɩɩsa kom-bõonesa taoore, rũmsã la teedã." 
Judges18:22 Dã rãmba da paam n zãaga ne a Mika yirã la a Mika yagsa tigma taaba n sɩng Dã rãmba pʋgbo. 
Judges18:23 B kelmame, b kaasa a Dã nebã tɩ bãmb me lɛɛg n teedg n gũud-b la b yet a Mika: «Bõe tɩ f rãmb neba woto?»" 
Judges18:24 A Mika leokame: «Ka yãmb n loogd ne m wẽnd-dãmb m sẽn da pees la m sẽn da rõog m yĩng laa, ka yãmb n loogd ne m maan-kʋʋd la? Y kees-m-la bõe? La y yɩta a wãn n le sokd ma: ‹Bõe n tar foo?› »" 
Judges18:25 Tɩ Dã rãmb yeele: «D da le wʋm ye, ka rẽ f sẽn lak b rãmb sɩɩga na lɛɛg n yẽeg-f lame n yãk f yõore la b wã f zaka.»" 
Judges18:26 Dã neba loogame. A Mika sẽn yãe t'a pãng ka ta bãmba a leba a yiri. 
Judges18:27 Dɩlla Dã rãmb looga ne a Milka wẽn-naandã la a maan-kʋʋdã. B taa Layis la b kẽe n kooda zãng ne b sʋʋse neb sẽn da zĩ sɩɩ n pa tẽed yeele. B tol n yõoga b tẽnga bugum. 
Judges18:28 Ned ba a ye ka wa a sõngr ye t'a ra zãra ne Sidõ la a ra ka lʋɩ ned ba a ye soolmẽ ye. Layis ra bee Bɛt-Reob tãng pennẽ. Dã rãmb le maneg n me-a lame n kẽ. 
Judges18:29 B bool-a lame tɩ Dã, b yaab a Israyɛl biig a ye yʋʋre. Tẽnga pipi yʋra la Layis." 
Judges18:30 Dã rãmb mee waoogr zĩiga n ning a Mika sẽn kɩt tɩ b maana. A Moyiiz yagenga la a Zersom biig, a Yeonatã, ne a meng kamba n yɩ a Dã maan-kʋʋdba n ta wakat ninga b sẽn tall-b n loog yembdo." 
Judges18:31 B baoo zĩig n ning a Mika wẽn-naandã la a paa Silo n tãag wẽnd dooga lʋɩɩse. 
Judges19:1 Wẽnd kãng t'a Israyɛl da nan pa tar dĩm ye. Levit a ye n da kẽed Efrayim tãmsa sʋka. A waa n dɩka pag n paase, a waa n dɩka Bɛtelyɛɛm bi-pugla n maan a paga. Bɛtelyɛɛm bee Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges19:2 B moora waa n yõsga taaba tɩ paga leb a ba zakẽ, Zɩɩda Bɛtelyɛɛm tẽnga. A paa be sẽn ta kiis a naase." 
Judges19:3 A sɩda bʋʋga-a lame n wilg-a sẽn segd la a paam t'a le rɩk yir sore. Sɩda ra yii ne a yamba la a bõeens a yiibu. Paga tall-a lame n kẽes a ba zakẽ. Paga baaba yãend-a lame t'a yik ne sũ-noogo n wa seg-a. 
Judges19:4 Rɛɛmba kos-a lame t'a pa da-yɩten-daare. B rɩɩme, b yũume, b gãanda ra-yɩten-daare." 
Judges19:5 Daara a naas soaba Levitga ne a neba yika pĩnda n na n loog la a rɛɛmba yeelame: «Dɩ-y bilfu, n yẽeg y gĩini ne buri tɩ y na yaool n dɩk sore.»" 
Judges19:6 Tɩ b zĩnd n dɩ la b yũ, bãmb b yiibu, tɩ rɛɛmbã, paga ba, yeele: «M kot-f lame tɩ f sak n gãand yɛsa tɩ yɩ f sũ-noogo!»" 
Judges19:7 Raoa sẽn yik t'a na n looge, a rɛɛm le rɩdg-a lame t'a le gãand be." 
Judges19:8 Daar a nu soaba, Levitga sãda beoogo n na n looge la paga ba le yeel-a lame: «M kot-f lame tɩ f reng n dɩ la y paa n ta zaabre.» La b yiiba naaga taab n dɩ." 
Judges19:9 A sẽn bob n na n loog ne a pag la a yamba, la rɛɛmba sẽn le yeele: «Gese, wĩndig lʋɩɩme, zĩig zoe sobgame, gãand yʋngã yɛsa n noog d sũuri. Beoogo y na yik pĩnd n loog y tẽngẽ.»" 
Judges19:10 Raoa zãgsame n yik n dɩk a sor ne yʋngo n ta Zebuze rãmb tẽnga. (B boond-a lame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm yɛsa.) Da yaa yẽ ne a paga la a yamba la a yaanwaoor bõeens a yiibu. 
Judges19:11 B sẽn waa n kẽed Zebuzitsa tẽng tɩ zĩig sobgame. Dẽ la yamba yeela a zu-soaba: «Wa-y tɩ d kʋʋg d sorã n yõg gãag-soabendo n gũ beoogo.» 
Judges19:12 Tɩ zu-soaba leok: «D pa na n kẽ bu-zẽn-dãmb tẽngẽ ye, neb sẽn ka kĩ ne a Israyɛl ye, d na n taa Gibea." 
Judges19:13 A yeela a yambã: d mogd n paam Gibea bɩ Rama n gãand.» 
Judges19:14 B le rɩka sore n digd taoore. B sẽn paam n kolg Gibea sẽn be a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ la wĩndg sẽn lʋɩ," 
Judges19:15 tɩ b bʋdg n tũ Gibea n yõg gãag-soabendo n na n gũ beoogo. B sẽn kẽ tẽngã b paa raagẽ wã. Ned ba a ye ka bool-ba a zakẽ n kõ-b roog ye. 
Judges19:16 Zĩiga sẽn sobge, nin-kẽem a ye yi a pʋʋgẽ n watẽ. Da yaa Efrayim tãmsa ned sẽn wa n kẽed Gibea. Gibea rãmba yaa a Bẽnzame yagense." 
Judges19:17 A rooga a neng n yãe Levitgã sẽn zĩ raagẽ wã ta sok-a: «F yii yɛ, f rabda yɛ?»" 
Judges19:18 T'a yeele: «D yii Bɛtelyɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ la yaa Efrayim tãmsa poor tẽnsa la d data. Yaa be la m da be. M da taa Bɛtelyɛɛm, a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ n lɛɛgdẽ la kaanẽ m ka paam gãag-soab ye." 
Judges19:19 M yaool n ket n tara yamdo m bõeensa yĩnga, dɩɩb la rãam me keta maam ne m pagã la m yamba yĩnga. Bũmb ka paoog ye.»" 
Judges19:20 Dẽ la Nin-kẽema yeel yã: «Ne y kẽnd-kẽnde! Bas-y tɩ m deeg y sãando la y ra pa raagẽ wã ye.» 
Judges19:21 A tall-b lame n kul a yiri n bao yamdo n kõ bõeensã, n bao koom n kõ neba tɩ b so, n bao rɩɩb n kõ-b tɩ b rɩ la rãam n kõ-b tɩ b yũ." 
Judges19:22 B sẽn waa n ket n dɩtẽ la tẽnga nin-yaals sẽn sũ taaba n wa yɛs n tar ne zaka soaba: «Yiis raoã sẽn sig fooma n kõ-do tɩ d sõs ne a.» 
Judges19:23 Zaka soab yiime n gom ne bãmb woto: «M saam-biisi, pa segd ye, da maan-y bi-beelem ye. Daoã yaa mam gãag-soaba, da maan y sẽn ya wɩɩbd ye." 
Judges19:24 M tara bi-pugla, sẽn nan pa kul sɩd ye, m na rɩk-a n kõ yã. Maan-y y sẽn data ne yẽndã la y sẽn baood ne raoã yaa wɩɩbdo sẽn pa segd ye.»" 
Judges19:25 B pa sak n kelg ye, tɩ raoã kong n yiis a pagã n kõ-ba. B yõg-a lame, n yaal-a tɩ beoog vẽeg. Sõor sẽn wa n pukdẽ la b bas-a." 
Judges19:26 Beoog sẽn vẽeg tɩ paga lɛɛg n kẽed zakẽ la a sẽn lʋɩ a sɩda sẽn da be roog ninga noore n kell n pa be tɩ sõor puk zãnga. 
Judges19:27 Sõor sẽn puki, a sɩda yiime n na n le rɩk a sore la a sẽn lak rignoore, a yãee a paga sẽn tẽeg n gãe." 
Judges19:28 A sɩda yeel-a lame: «Yik tɩ d looge!» A pa wʋm kʋrkʋr ye. A rɩk-a lame n palg a bõanga n ta a yiri. 
Judges19:29 A sẽn ta yiri, a rɩka a sʋʋga n ges a pagã n pase, n pase, zĩis piig la a yiibu. Dẽ poore a toola paga neong Israyɛl tẽn-peelma fãa." 
Judges19:30 La ned ning fãa sẽn yãend yellã ra yeta a sũurẽ: «Israyɛl kamb sẽn yi Ezipt tɛka n ta rũnna zĩ n yãend yell a woto buud ye.» Levitga ra kõo noor kãngã a sẽn tʋm b rãmbã: «Gom-y woto ne Israyɛl kamba: Zĩ bug la b yãe yell a woto buudu, a Israyɛl sẽn yi Ezipt tẽng tɛk n tãag rũnna? Dɩlla tags-y, yẽs-y ne taaba la y leoke.»" 
Judges20:1 Israyɛl kamba fãa yika wa nin-yɛnga, al Dã n ta Beerseba, la al Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ, n wa tigim Mispa, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk tẽng ning tɩ ya b waoogr zĩiga." 
Judges20:2 Buuda kãsem-dãmba, Israyɛl sagsa fãa, zĩnda be: neb tus kobs-naase sẽn tõe n bob zabre." 
Judges20:3 A Bẽnzame kamba bãngame tɩ yaa Israyɛl tõr n wa Mispa. Koɛɛg n wa n yi Israyɛl kamba sʋka: «Wilg-y yel-beeda sẽn sɩng to-to?» 
Judges20:4 Tɩ paga sɩda, Levitga, na n yeele: «M da taa Gibea sẽn be a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ, ne m paga, n na n yõg gãag-soabend tɩ beoog vẽege tɩ m le rɩk m sore." 
Judges20:5 Gibea rãmb yika yʋngo n gũbg m sẽn sig yir ningã. B da rat n kʋʋ maam. Sã n ya ne pagã b maan-a-la pãnga tɩ wa tol n tũ ne a yõore. 
Judges20:6 M yaool n dɩka m pagã n beese, n tool Israyɛl sagsa fãa tɩ yaa wɩɩbdo n maane, bũmb sẽn wat ne buuda yʋ-sãanga." 
Judges20:7 Dɩlla, yãmb fãa Israyɛl kamba, sẽn tigim ka Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, yẽs-y ne taaba la wilg y sẽn na n maanega.»" 
Judges20:8 Neba fãa yika wa nin-yɛng n yeele: «Tõnd ned ba a ye kõn le kẽ a zakẽ, ned ba a ye kõn le kẽ a roogẽ!" 
Judges20:9 Ad-d sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ne Gibea rãmba. D na n poeesame n sʋk tãb-biis nins sẽn na n tak zabrã. 
Judges20:10 Israyɛl sak fãa pʋgẽ, neb piig koabg zugu, neb koabg neb tusr zugu, neb tusr neb tus piig zugu tɩ b tɩ wa ne rɩɩbo tãb-biisa sẽn na n tɩ zab ne Gibea rãmb yĩnga. B na zabame n wa tol n yẽes wɩɩbda sẽn wɩɩb a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ.»" 
Judges20:11 Yɩɩ woto la Israyɛl kamb sũ taab wa nin-yɛnga n na n zab ne tẽngã. 
Judges20:12 Israyɛl sagsa tʋma neb a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ. B tɩ sok-b lame: «Yaa bõe tʋʋm wẽns n tʋm y nengẽ? 
Judges20:13 Woto wã, yiis-y nin-yaalsa fãa sẽn be Gibea n kõ-d tɩ d kʋ n yẽes rẽgda sẽn bol a Israyɛl gillã.» A Bẽnzame rooga pa tʋlg n kelg Israyɛl kamb a taaba, b saam-biisa ye." 
Judges20:14 A Bẽnzame kamb yii b tẽnsẽ n wa tigim taab Gibea n na n tak zabr ne a Israyɛl. 
Judges20:15 B sõda a Bẽnzame kamba sẽn yi b tẽnsẽ n wa Gibea wã, la b paama neb tus pisi la a yoobe sẽn tõe n wõog sʋʋga. Gibea rãmba pa sõd n naag ye. Gibea rãmba da yaa neb kobs-yopoe sẽn mi zabr sõmb sõmbo." 
Judges20:16 Bãmb sʋka neb koobs-yopoe n da be tɩ b goabg vɩ wa b rɩtgo. Bãmb la zab mitba meng-menga. B sã n ning b loobsa kuga n gẽeg zoob beelle, b lobgd n yõk-a lame." 
Judges20:17 Israyɛl kamb me sõda taaba. A Bẽnzame toog sẽn kae, b ra yaa tus kobs-naase, n ya zab mitba, al tɩ sʋʋg tʋmd beed b nugẽ." 
Judges20:18 B rʋʋ Betɛl n na n tɩ sok Wẽnde. Israyɛl kamba yeelame: «Tõnd sʋkã, sak bʋgo n na n yɩ pipi n tak zabr ne a Bẽnzame?» La Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Yaa a Zɩɩda n na n yɩ pipi.»" 
Judges20:19 Vẽkẽmbeoogo, a Israyɛl bobame la yaa Gibea noorẽ la a wẽe a sika." 
Judges20:20 B sẽn yi n na n tak zabr ne a Bẽnzame, Israyɛl kamba fãa tongame n tees Gibea." 
Judges20:21 A Bẽnzame yii Gibea la badaare, a kʋʋ zĩig pʋgẽ, Israyɛl kamb tus pisi la a yi." 
Judges20:22 A Israyɛl zãma wã le kenga a sũuri n le tɩ yals pipi raara zĩigẽ. 
Judges20:23 Israyɛl kamba waa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n yãb n ta zaabre la b soka Soaala-Wẽnde: «Ket n yaa tɩlɛ tɩ m zab ne m saam-biig a Bẽnzame bi?» Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd leoke: «Tak-y zabr ne-a.» 
Judges20:24 Daar a yiib soabã, a Israyɛl yiime n le kolg n na n tak zabr ne a Bẽnzame." 
Judges20:25 Badaare, a Bẽnzame sẽn le yi Gibea, zĩig pʋgẽ bala, a kʋʋ Israyɛl kamb tus piig la a nii. B fãa yaool n da yaa tãb-biis sẽn mi zabre ne sʋʋga." 
Judges20:26 A Israyɛl tãb-biisa la a zãma wã waa Betɛl. B zĩnda Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n sɩng yãbre, n loe b noor tɩ wĩndig kẽ, n kʋ yũ-nood maand la laafi kosg maand." 
Judges20:27 Israyɛl kamba soka Soaala-Wẽnde. Segame tɩ wẽnd kãnga, zood kasetã, kuga walsa koglgã, ra bee Betɛl." 
Judges20:28 A Elazar biig a Pinas, a Aarõ yagenga, da yɛsa a sɛɛgẽ baraare. A Israyɛl sokra yɩɩ woto: «M na n basa zabra t'a sɛ ne m saam-biig a Bẽnzame bɩ m tog n kell n paa ne-a?» Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd yeele: «Kẽng-y, tɩ beoogo m na rɩk-a n sagl y nusẽ.»" 
Judges20:29 A Israyɛl solga tãb-biisi n gilg Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Dasem a tãab daarã, Israyɛl le bobame n na n tak zabr ne a Bẽnzame la b le wa tedga ne Gibea rãmb wa rasem kam." 
Judges20:31 A Bẽnzame kamba yi Israyɛl kamba segbo, b sakame n zãag ne b tẽngã la b le sɩnga wa rasem kam n kʋʋd Israyɛl kamba. B kʋʋ tẽn-nabrẽ wã neb pis-tã, Betɛl la Gibea soya zutu." 
Judges20:32 A Bẽnzame kamba yeelame: «Bãmba le lʋɩ d nugẽ wala pipi raarã.» Sã n ya Israyɛl kamba, bãmb da yetame: «D na n zoeeme tɩ b pʋg tõnd n paam n zãag ne b tẽngã, n dɩk soya.»" 
Judges20:33 A Israyɛl neba fãa yika vugri n tong zabr tongre Baal-Tamar. Wakat kãng me la Israyɛl tãb-biis sẽn da solge, pusg wa laoose, Gibea, nin-taoore." 
Judges20:34 Neb tus piig sẽn tũus sõmb-sõmb n wa Gibea noorẽ. Zabra yɩɩ zabre. A Bẽnzame da ka mi tɩ yell n na n pak-a ye. 
Judges20:35 La Soaala-Wẽnd dɩka a Bẽnzame n sagl a Israyɛl nugẽ. Badaare a Israyɛl sẽn kʋ taa tus pisi la a nu la koabga. B fãa gill yaool n da yaa tãb-biis sẽn minim n zab ne sʋʋga. 
Judges20:36 A Bẽnzame mikame t'a konga pãnga. A Israyɛl da basame t'a Bẽnzame kolgdẽ t'a ra teega a sẽn solg b rãmbã Gibea noorẽ. 
Judges20:37 Sẽn solg-ba lɛɛg n kẽe Gibea pʋgẽ n kʋ a neba gilli ne sʋʋse. 
Judges20:38 Yella sẽn waa n da nan ka maana, tãb-biis nins sẽn lik b mense la sẽn da solg-bã da reng n seda ne taab woto: d sã n paam n kẽ tẽngã, bugum la d na n maan t'a bug-zõosa ruk n kul yĩngri," 
Judges20:39 tɩ bãmb sẽn da maan wa b zoetame wã lɛɛg n teeg ne a Bẽnzame. A Bẽnzame sẽn paam n kʋ neb pis-tã a yeelame: «Sɩda bãmba na n le paa tõnd nugẽ wa pipi raarã.» 
Judges20:40 Wala b sẽn da sedã, bug zõos ruka yĩngri, tẽnga pʋga, t'a Bẽnzame wẽnemd n mik tɩ ya tẽnga tõre n tilg bugum sẽn kuiis sagãna." 
Judges20:41 A Israyɛl lɛɛg n teega ne a Bẽnzame. A Bẽnzame yɛɛsame t'a pa sãmb yell ning sẽn lʋɩ a zug ye. 
Judges20:42 B zoeeme n kẽ weoogo, a Israyɛl taoore. Pʋgba ra yaa tʋʋlga. Mik sẽn pa yãe n zãage, b wẽneg n lʋɩ sẽn da zoe n kẽ-b tẽnga rãmba nugẽ." 
Judges20:43 Israyɛl kamba gũbga a Bẽnzame, b ka le vʋʋs ne a rigb ye. B tõog-b la Gibea noorẽ, yaang sẽnẽ." 
Judges20:44 Yɩɩ neb tus piig la a nii n lʋɩ a Bẽnzame sakẽ. Fãa yɩɩ sẽn da tar b zabr sũuri. 
Judges20:45 Sẽn põs-ba wẽnemd n teesa we-raoogo, Rimõ tãnga. Neb tus a nu n pa sor zugu. A Israyɛl pʋga a Bẽnzame n zãag zĩiga, n ta al Gidom, n le kʋ neb tus a yi." 
Judges20:46 B zãng fãa sẽn ki baraar yaa tus pisi la a nu, a Bẽnzame sakẽ. B fãa ra mii zabre, b fãa da tara zabr sũuri." 
Judges20:47 Neb kobs-yoob bala n paam n ta Rimõ tãnga la b paa be kiis a naase. 
Judges20:48 A Israyɛl lebg kẽe a Bẽnzame nebã, n kʋ-ba, ne sʋʋga. Baasda tẽng a ye, n kẽ tẽng a to, baasa nebã, n kẽ rũmsã la sẽn vɩ ne yõor fãa. B sẽn yãe tẽng ning fãa, a Bẽnzame soolmẽ, b ning-a-la bugum." 
Judges21:1 Kãabg ning a Israyɛl sẽn da kãab Mispa la woto: «Ned ba a ye kõn dɩk a bi-pugl n kõ a Bẽnzame ye.» 
Judges21:2 Woto wã zãma wã waa Betɛl, n zĩnd Soaala-Wẽnd taoore tɩ wĩndig wa kẽ la b tar yãbr la waasgo." 
Judges21:3 B ra yetame: «Soaala-Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽnde, bõe t'a Israyɛl tak yel-beed a zugu, n zĩ rũnna t'a buuda sak a ye ka le ketẽ?»" 
Judges21:4 Vẽkẽmbeoogo b yika pĩnda n me maan-kugri beenẽ, b kʋʋ yũ-noog maand la laafi kosg maando."
