Judges21:5 Dẽ poore b yeelame: «Ya buuda sak bʋgo n pa rũnna tigsga n pa wa?» B ra le wẽename tɩ b na n kʋʋ ned ninga sẽn pa na n wa Mispa, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
Judges21:6 Sɩda a Israyɛl da lɛɛg n yãbda a Bẽnzame n yetẽ: «Rũnna-rũnna, sak a ye n menem Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges21:7 D na n yãee pagb yɛ n kõ sẽn põs-bã? Tõnd ka wẽen ne Wẽnd tɩ d kõn dɩk d kom-pugli n kõ-b bɩ?» 
Judges21:8 Dɩlla a Israyɛl sokame: «Yaa sak a bõe n ka wa Mispa tigsgã?» Mik segame tɩ Yasbe sẽn be Galaad ned ba a ye ka wa Mispa tigsga ye. 
Judges21:9 B sɩd sõda taaba la b pa yãe Galaad Yasbe ned ba a ye ye. 
Judges21:10 Dẽ la b tʋm Yasbe tãb-biis tus piig la a yiibu la b kõ-b-la no-kãnga: «Tɩ kẽ-y Galaad Yasbe tẽnga n kʋ Yasbe rapa n paas pagb la kamba. 
Judges21:11 Ad-y sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga. Y na n kãaba beedo rapa gilli la pagb niyns fãa sẽn tar-b sɩdba. Y ka na n kʋ bi-pugl sẽn nan pa kul sɩd ye.» B sɩd maana boto. 
Judges21:12 Pʋg-sɛdba sõor yɩɩ kobs-naase; yaa kom-pugli sẽn nan ka kul sɩdba. B tall-b lame n dig Silo, Kanaã tẽnga." 
Judges21:13 Dẽ poore b tʋma neb Rimõ tãngẽ tɩ b tɩ gom bas-y-tɩ-sɛ goam ne Bẽnzame rãmba. 
Judges21:14 A Bẽnzame sak n waame. B rɩka Galaad Yasbe pabg nins sẽn da kellã n kõ-ba la pa ta b fãa ye. 
Judges21:15 A Bẽnzame nimbãaneg yõk-b lame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da sakame tɩ sak a ye boog Israyɛl buudẽ. 
Judges21:16 Buuda kãsem-dãmb waa n yeelame: «Bõe la d na n maane tɩ sẽn kell-bã paam pagba, a Bẽnzame pagb la sẽn ki zãng la." 
Judges21:17 Bũmb tõe n keesa a Bẽnzame yĩnga, t'a rooga ra menem Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ?" 
Judges21:18 Tõnd la sẽn ka le tõe n dɩk d kamb n kõ bãmb la!» Israyɛl kamba ra waa n kãaba woto: «Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn na n kõ pag a Bẽnzame neda!» 
Judges21:19 B yeela taaba: «Ade, kibs a ye la b maand yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩng, Silo. Silo bee Betɛl goabga, sor ning sẽn dʋʋd Betɛl n tat Sikɛm, n yaool be Lebona rɩtgo.»" 
Judges21:20 Ad-b sẽn yeel Bẽnzame kamba: «Kẽe-y bugsuntundã n soonde! 
Judges21:21 Maan-y gũusgu la y sã n wa yãe Silo kom-pugli tɩ b yit n na n sao, bɩ y yi, y sẽn solgẽ wã. Ned kam fãa yõk a paga n leb Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Judges21:22 B ba-rãmb bɩ b kẽem-dãmb sã n wa n na n zab ne yã, d na yeel-b woto: ‹Maan-y-b sugri, tɩ zabra wakato, b ka tõog n paam pag bãmb ned kam fãa yĩng ye. Yãmb meng pʋs n ka tõe n kõ-b pagb ne yamleoogo, n ka beeg Naaba-Wẽnd, y wẽenega poor ye.› »" 
Judges21:23 A Bẽnzame maana wala b sẽn wilgã, b kẽe saoodba sʋka la ned kam fãa yõka a paga n looge, n lɛɛg n wa b tẽngẽ n le maneg-a n me n kẽ." 
Judges21:24 A Israyɛl me sẽegame; ned kam fãa leba a tẽngẽ la a sakẽ. 
Judges21:25 Wakat kãng tɩ Israyɛl nan ka tar dĩm ye la ned kam fãa ra maanda a sẽn date, a sẽn tẽed tɩ yaa sõmbo." 
Ruth1:1 Bʋ-kaoodba wakato la kom lʋɩ tẽngã, tɩ Zɩɩda Bɛtelyɛɛm ned a ye yi ne a paga la a kamb a yiibu n tees Moab dãmb wetẽ." 
Ruth1:2 Daoã da boondame t'a Elimelɛk, a paga, a Nowemi, a kamba: a Malõ la a Kilyõ. B ra yita Efrata sakẽ, Bɛtelyɛɛm tẽnga, Zɩɩda soolmẽ. B sẽn ta Moab rãmb wetẽ, b paama zĩig n kẽ." 
Ruth1:3 A Elimelɛk, a Nowemi sɩda, kiime n bas-a ne a kamba a yiibu." 
Ruth1:4 Kamba yii kãadem ne Moab kom-pugli: a Orpa la a Rut. Yaa yʋʋm piig la b pa be. 
Ruth1:5 Kamb a yiibã, a Malõ la a Kilyõ waa n kiime t'a Nowemi lebg a ye, yẽ n ka sɩda, yẽ n ka biiga." 
Ruth1:6 T'a na n kong n yi a Moab weoogẽ n leb a tẽngẽ tɩ Wẽnd nimbãan-zoeer da leb n waa ne tɩgr be, b neba yĩnga." 
Ruth1:7 A Nowemi yi-la a sẽn da beẽ wã, yẽ ne a bi-pagb a yiibã. B rɩka sore n na n le wa Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ruth1:8 A Nowemi tees n yeela a bi-pagbã: «Lebg-y, ned kam fãa leb a ma roogẽ la Wẽnd na zã-y b nugẽ, daar fãa, wala y sẽn zã y sɩdb rãmba sẽn ka wã la mam menga." 
Ruth1:9 Wẽnd na zĩndg-y zĩ-sõngẽ, sɩd-sõng zakẽ.» A sẽn gom n sɛ, a mobg-b lame la bi-pagba sɩngame n zẽk b koɛɛg n tar wiisgu." 
Ruth1:10 B naaga taab n yeel a Nowemi: «Tõnd ka na n leb d ma roogẽ ye. D na n tũu-foo n leb f buudẽ.» 
Ruth1:11 T'a Nowemi me na n yeele: «Bõe yĩng la y na n tũ-maam, m kamba, kul-y, m tõe n le roga sɩdb-rãmb n kõ-y bɩ?" 
Ruth1:12 Kuli yã, m kamba, leb-y y tẽnsẽ tɩ m lebga pʋg-yãanga, m ka tõe n le yi kãadem ye. Ba m sã n yeel tɩ tẽeb ket n bee me, m sã n yeel tɩ yʋnga bala m na n paama sɩda n dog kamba," 
Ruth1:13 y na yaas n gũ tɩ b lebg bɛda? Y na mong-y mens sɩda? Ayey! M kamba, m sũ-sãanga looga toogo, a zʋʋga yãmb rẽnna, yaa mam zug la Wẽnd zɩsg b nugã n yɩɩda.»" 
Ruth1:14 Kamba le maneg n ninga nintãm. A Orpa mobg-a lame la a leba a ma roogẽ. A Rut zãgs n paa ne-a. 
Ruth1:15 Dẽ la a Nowemi yeel-a: «Ges f tũud-n-taagã, yẽ leba a ba-yiri, a lɛɛg n na n tɩ tũ a saam-dãmb wẽnde. Fo me maan wa yẽ, pʋg-a!»" 
Ruth1:16 T'a Rut na n yeele: «Da mak tɩ m na bas-foo, tɩ m na zãag ne foom ye. Fo sẽn dabdẽ, be la m na n kẽnge, fo buuda la m buudu, fo Wẽnd la mam Wẽndã." 
Ruth1:17 Fo sẽn na n ki zĩig ningã be la m kiida tɩ b mum-ma. Sã n ka kũum n welg-d ne taaba, sã n ya m zʋgã n wa ne welgre, bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbg-m naoor a yi.»" 
Ruth1:18 A Nowemi mikame t'a Rut zãgsa loogre t'a sĩnd n bas-a. 
Ruth1:19 B tũu taaba n dig Bɛtelyɛɛm. B taame, tɩ Bɛtelyɛɛm na n yɛɛse, tɩ pagb na n sogs taaba: «Yaa a Nowemi bɩ?»" 
Ruth1:20 La a yeelame: «Da le bool-y-m t'a Nowemi ye, m lebga a Mara, tɩ Naab a Wẽnd pidsa m yama ne tɩɩsem." 
Ruth1:21 M da tara fãa m sẽn waa n dabda la Wẽnd ka sak tɩ m lɛɛg n wa ne bũmb ye. Bõe yĩng la y na n kell n bool m t'a Nowemi? Ka Wẽnd nimbãan-zoeer kaset la m dɩ ye, yaa pɛt la m dɩ yã.»" 
Ruth1:22 Yaa woto la a Nowemi lɛɛg n wa ne a bi-pag, a Rut, Moab bi-pugla. Yaa alkam kɛgenga tigsg wakato la b ta Bɛtelyɛɛm." 
Ruth2:1 Roagd a ye, saam-biig a ye, n da kell a Elimelɛk, a Nowemi sɩdã. A nug ra tarame, a ra boondame tɩ Booz." 
Ruth2:2 Moab bi-pugl, a Rut, yeela a Nowemi: «M kota sore n tɩ yiis sẽn na n sak a soab pʋʋgẽ.» T'a leok-a: «Kẽng wɛ, m biiga!»" 
Ruth2:3 A Rut pʋga tigsdba la yaa bãmb sẽn da basd tɩ rʋʋgdẽ wã la a ra wʋkda. A zug sẽn ya noogo, yɩ-la a Elimelɛk roagda, a Booz pʋʋgẽ, la a kẽng yã." 
Ruth2:4 Segame t'a Booz yii Bɛtelyɛɛm n nan ta n pʋʋsd tigsdbã: «Wẽnd na ning y barka!» Tɩ bãmb leoke: «Wẽnd na zĩnd ne foo!» 
Ruth2:5 A Booz soka sõgen ning sẽn da so-a tʋʋma gesgã: «M ba bõe pag la pʋg kãngã?» 
Ruth2:6 Sõgna leokame: «Ad-y yaa pag ninga sẽn tũ a Nowemi Moab weoogẽ n wa wã.» 
Ruth2:7 A taa n yeel-m lame: «M kota sore n pa tigsdba poorẽ n yiis. Yaa rẽ la a wa ka, la al yibeoogẽ a sẽn tar yiisgu la a sẽn tare.»" 
Ruth2:8 T'a Booz na n yeel a Rut: «Kelg neere, m biiga, da kẽng ned a to pʋʋgẽ ye, pʋs n pa ka n pʋg m nebã." 
Ruth2:9 Modg n pʋg-b neere tɩ m yeela kom-bɩɩba tɩ b ra sɩɩs-f ye. N paase, m togs-b-la woto: Ko-yũud sã n tar-fo bɩ f tɩ yũ b sẽn sui b yʋyã.»" 
Ruth2:10 A Rut wõgemdame n kɩ a neng tẽnga n yeele: «M bee yɛ tɩ y get-m ne nimbãan-zoeere, ne m sẽn ya tẽn-zẽng paga?»" 
Ruth2:11 Dẽ la a Booz me leokre: «Ad-b togs-m lame, n le togs-ma f sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa ne f sɩda ma, f sɩda loogr poore. B wilg-m lame tɩ f basa f ba, la f ma, la f ba-yiri n na n wa kẽ tẽng f sẽn zɩɩ n kẽ zaamẽ la rabɩtẽ ye." 
Ruth2:12 Wẽnd na rol f yel-sõmd fãa. Israyɛl Wẽnd na yao-f zãnga, tɩ fo waa n soonda bãmb maasmẽ.»" 
Ruth2:13 A Rut me leokame: «Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ y kell n tʋlg-m ne neere, m zu-soaba, yãmb nooga m sũuri, n gom bʋgsg-bʋgsgo, ne y yem-poakã, ne ned sẽn zãr tɩ y ges-a wa y yem-poak menga.»" 
Ruth2:14 Dɩɩb wakat sẽn ta, a Booz yeela a Rut t'a kolge n yãk buri n suk zẽ-miisgã. T'a Rut na n zĩnd n yegl tigsdbã, t'a Booz kɩt tɩ b bao ka sẽedem n kõ-a. A rɩɩme n tɩge tɩ tol n keese." 
Ruth2:15 A sẽn le yik n na n yiisi, a Booz yeela nebã: «Bas-y t'a yiis n yeg kalsã la y ra yaal-a bada." 
Ruth2:16 Y tõeeme meng n bas y nugẽ tɩ rʋʋge t'a pʋgd n wʋkdẽ la ra y ra yeel-a tɩ bũmb ye.» 
Ruth2:17 A Rut rɩgsame tɩ zĩig sobge t'a pãb a sẽn wʋkã n paam alkam kɛgeng peoogo. 
Ruth2:18 A tʋkame n kul n tɩ wilg a ma. A wilg-a-la a sẽn dɩ n kellã, n tol n dɩk n kõ-a." 
Ruth2:19 Dẽ la a ma sok-a: «Yaa yɛ la f tɩ yiisi? Yaa yɛ la f tɩ tʋme? Bɩ Wẽnd ning sẽn maan-f neer a woto barka!» Dẽ la a Rut wilg a ma a sẽn tʋm ned ninga pʋʋgẽ. A yeelame: «Dũnna m tɩ yiisa a Booz pʋʋgẽ.» 
Ruth2:20 A Nowemi yeela a bi-paga: «Wẽnd ninga kɩɩms la nin-vɩɩs sẽn dɩt a soab sõma, paam barka!» N le paase: «A Booz yaa tõnd doagda. Sã n baood ned ninga sẽn tõe n dɩ a Elimelɛk raboog bũmbu, a bee sʋka.»" 
Ruth2:21 Moabitga, a Rut, kʋʋga a Nowemi: «Ad-a sẽn yeel-m yɛsa: pa ne m neba tɩ tigsga wa sɛ zãnga.»" 
Ruth2:22 T'a Nowemi na n yeel a bi-pag, a Rut: «Dẽ yaa sõmbo, woto pʋʋg a to rãmb kõn yaal f ye.»" 
Ruth2:23 A Rut sɩd paa ne a Booz tʋʋm-tʋmdba tɩ alkam kɛgenga la alkam pɛɛlga tigsga wa tol n sɛ. Sasa kãng t'a Rut da ket n bee ne a ma, a Nowemi." 
Ruth3:1 A Nowemi wa n yeela a bi-pag, a Rut: «M biiga, ka segd tɩ m pids f sũ-noogo n bao zĩig n kõ-f bɩ?" 
Ruth3:2 Mik a Booz ne tõnd yaa rogem la yẽ n bas foo tɩ f pʋg a rakõapa. Bãng tɩ rũnna zaabrã a na n tɩ yelga a ki zɛɛgẽ. 
Ruth3:3 So koom, bao ka-noog n zɛ, bao fu sõma n yeelg, dɩk zɛɛga sore la ra sak t'a bãng tɩ yaa foo tɩ ka a rɩɩba poor ye." 
Ruth3:4 A sã n wa na n gãande, f na bãng a gãaga zĩiga. Wa marsã, n pilg a naoẽ wã n gãande. Yẽ n na wilg foom marsã yɛla sẽn na n yɩ-la.»" 
Ruth3:5 A Rut leokame: «M na maan wala f sẽn togs-ma fãa.» 
Ruth3:6 A Rut sẽn kẽng zɛɛgẽ wã a maana wala a ma sẽn togs-a. 
Ruth3:7 A Booz dɩɩme la a yũ, n yik ne sũ-noogo n tɩ gãand n yegl a ka-rʋrã. A Rut kolgame n bao zĩig a naoẽ n gãande." 
Ruth3:8 Zĩig wa n zʋʋgame t'a Booz rigemd n nek n ges n mik tɩ yaa pag n gãe a naoẽ," 
Ruth3:9 t'a na n sok: «Foo la a bõe?» T'a yeele: «Maam la y yem-poak, a Rut. M kos tɩ y tẽeg y fuuga noor n pil-ma tɩ yãmb me tõe n dɩ-la a Elimelɛk yõodo.»" 
Ruth3:10 A Booz yeelame: «Wẽnd na ning f bark, m biiga, fo sẽn maand marsã wã yaa neer n yɩɩd waoogr ning f sẽn waoog buuda pĩnda tɩ f ra tõe n baoẽ la arzɛk rãmba bɩ naong rãmba sẽn ya kom-bɩɩba n yi kãadem ne bãmba." 
Ruth3:11 Da maan dabeem ye, m na maan f sẽn dat fãa. Ade Bɛtelyɛɛm tẽn-tõra miime tɩ f yaa pag sẽn be yõodo." 
Ruth3:12 La m sã n tõe n welg m roagda raboogo, bãng tɩ m ka m ye ye. Ned a to n le pẽ ne rogma n yɩɩd maam." 
Ruth3:13 Dɩlla pa ka yʋngã la beoog yibeoogo m na wilg roagdã t'a sã n dat-fo, a na yao a sẽn tog n yao bũmb ningã tɩ f yaool n kul-a. A sã n yeel t'a yam ka foo, m wẽend ne Wẽnd tɩ m na reeg-fo, la pa ka n ta beoogo.»" 
Ruth3:14 A Rut paa a gãagẽ wã. A Booz yika zĩiga sẽn wa n ket n ya pʋlʋm-pʋlʋm tɩ ned ka tõe n bãng a to n bake. A ra yeta a meng tɩ ka tog tɩ b bãng tɩ pʋg kãnga n wa zɛɛgẽ wã ye. 
Ruth3:15 A neka a Rut n yeel-a: «Tẽeg f fuugu.» T'a tẽege, t'a ning ka beel wam a yoobe t'a tʋk n lɛɛg n wa yiri." 
Ruth3:16 A Rut sẽn poog la a Nowemi sẽn yeele: «Tɩ yɩɩ wãna, m biiga?» La a Rut togsa fãa." 
Ruth3:17 A le paasame: «A Booz n kõ maam koodã n yet tɩ pa segd tɩ m lɛɛg n wa zaalem ye.» 
Ruth3:18 A Nowemi yeelame: «M biiga, zĩnd ne laafi tɩ d wa bãng yɛla sẽn na n baas to-to. Nin-kãnga kõn bao vʋʋsem tɩ baas neera ka baas rũnda bal ye.»" 
Ruth4:1 A Booz tɩ zĩnda noor ninga tẽnga rãmb sẽn kaood b bʋʋdã la a waa n yãee raoa a ye sẽn tõe n welg a roagda a Elimelɛk raboogo, la a bool-a lame n yeel-a: «Zagla, yaas ka! Wa zĩnd ka bilfu!» A waa n zĩndame." 
Ruth4:2 A Booz tũusa tẽnga nin-kẽems piiga n yeel bãmb me tɩ b zĩnd la b zĩndame. 
Ruth4:3 A yaool n yeela a roagdã: «Ad-a Nowemi, pag ninga sẽn da kẽeda Moab tẽnga lɛɛg n waame la a rat n koosa d kẽem a Elimelɛk pʋʋgã bogre." 
Ruth4:4 Dẽ la m tʋlg n wilg-fu, tɩ f bãnge, la m yet tɩ f ra pʋʋgã tɩ tẽnga rãmb la tẽnga nin-kẽemba yɩ d kaseto. F rat n yaoo pʋʋga bɩ f yao, f pa rat bɩ f wilg-ma. Foo n so koɛɛga pipi tɩ sã n ya rogmẽ wã foo n pẽ n yɩɩd maam.» La raoã yeelame t'a na n daa pʋʋgã." 
Ruth4:5 T'a Booz na n paase: «Bãng tɩ f sẽn deeg pʋʋga raare, baraar me f reegda a Rut, Moab biigã, a Nowemi bi-pagã, n tong a Elimelɛk rogem yũuga, a Elimelɛk meng soolmẽ.»" 
Ruth4:6 Raoã leokame: «Sã n ya boto m pa tõe n da pʋʋga ye tɩ m na n bõna m menga. Bɩ fo ra pʋʋgã tɩ mam ka tõe ye.» 
Ruth4:7 Yaool n da yaa Israyɛl rãmb dog-n-miki tɩ f sã n da bũmbu, bɩ f sã n tek bũmbu n dat n pids kaseto, bɩ f yãk f neodr n kɩse. Yaa boto la Israyɛl kamba da pidsd b kaseto." 
Ruth4:8 Daoã yeela a Booz: «Fo ra pʋʋgã!» A sẽn yeele a pidga a neodr n kɩs kaset yĩnga. 
Ruth4:9 A Booz yeela nin-kẽemsã la tẽnga rãmba: «Ya y fãa taoore la m deegd a Nowemi nugẽ, a Elimelɛk, ne a kamba a Kilyõ la a Malõ sẽn da so fãa." 
Ruth4:10 Yaa y nifẽ la m deegd a Rut, Moab biiga, a Malõ pʋg-kõorã, n na n tong m kẽema rogem yũuga, a meng soolmẽ t'a yʋʋr da menem a buudẽ la a tẽngẽ ye. Dẽ fãa yaa y nifẽ.»" 
Ruth4:11 Sẽn da zĩ-b tẽnga bʋʋd sẽn kaood noor ningã, fãa yeelame: «Yaa d nifẽ.» La b paasame: «Bɩ Wẽnd kɩt tɩ pag ning f sẽn na n peegã wẽneg a Rasɛl ne a Lea. Tɩ bãmb b yiib n mee Israyɛl doogo. Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f kɩ yẽgen Efrata, Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f yʋʋr yi Bɛtelyɛɛm!" 
Ruth4:12 Wẽnd na yalg f buudu ne pʋg kãngã, tɩ f buuda wẽneg a Perɛs buudu, a Zɩɩda ne a Tamar biigã buudu!»" 
Ruth4:13 A Booz peega a Rut n maan a paga. B sẽn bãng taaba, Wẽnd sõngame t'a Rut rɩk pʋga n dog biiga." 
Ruth4:14 Tɩ pagb naag taab n yeel a Nowemi: «Wẽnd paam barka b sẽn sõng tɩ roagd kees sẽn na n tong a Elimelɛk rogem yũug a Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Ruth4:15 Biiga na le pids f vɩɩma ne sũ-noogo la a na bʋk f sũur f kʋʋlem pʋgẽ. F bi-paga sẽn nong-fa roga biig n kõ-fo la f nanda pʋg kãnga n yɩɩd kamb a yopoe.» 
Ruth4:16 A Nowemi reega biigã n sagl a naoẽ. Yẽ n ges a yelle. 
Ruth4:17 A Nowemi yagsã kõo biiga yʋʋre. B yeelame: «A Nowemi paama biiga!» B pʋd-a-la Obɛd. A Obɛd n dog a Zese, a Zese n dog a Daviid." 
Ruth4:18 A Perɛk kamb la woto: A Perɛk n dog a Esrõ. 
Ruth4:19 A Esrõ n dog a Ram, a Ram n dog a Aminadab." 
Ruth4:20 A Aminadab n dog a Nasõ, t'a Nasõ dog a Salma." 
Ruth4:21 A Salma n dog a Booz t'a Booz dog a Obɛd. 
Ruth4:22 A Obɛd n dog a Zese la a Zese n dog a Daviid. 
1Samuel1:1 Ned n da be Rama, Efrayim tãnga zugu, n boond t'a Elkana. Da yaa a Yeroam biiga, t'a Yeroam yaa a Eliyu biiga, t'a Eliyu yaa a Towu biiga, a Suf biiga, a Efrayim tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Samuel1:2 A Elkana da tara pagba a yi: a yembr yʋʋr la a An, a yembr yʋʋr a Penina. A Penina da tara kamba, la a An yẽ da pa tar biig ye." 
1Samuel1:3 Yʋʋmd fãa, daoã da yita a tẽngẽ, n kẽnd Silo n waoogd Tãnsoaba-Wẽnde la a kʋʋd-b maoongo. A Eli kamba a yiibã n da be be, n tʋmd maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde. Yaa a Ofni la a Pinas." 
1Samuel1:4 Daar ning a Elkana sẽn kʋ a maoongã, a yãka pʋɩɩre n kõ a paga a Penina, ne a kom-dibli la a kom-pugli wa a sẽn yib n maandẽ." 
1Samuel1:5 A Elkana ra nonga a pag a An n yɩɩda, ne Soaala sẽn da mong-a rogma, woto a pʋɩɩra yɩɩ waoor pʋɩɩre." 
1Samuel1:6 A An pʋg-to wã ra zabda pʋg-taar ne-a, la a paoogd-a, Wẽnd sẽn da mong a rogma yĩnga." 
1Samuel1:7 La yʋʋmd fãa a Penina da maanda boto, a sã n wa Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr zĩigẽ fãa, dẽnd a maan bũmb n yik a An sũuri. Dẽ la a An wa n yik yʋʋmd a ye n tar yãbr la a zãgsd rɩɩbo." 
1Samuel1:8 A sɩda, a Elkana, yeel-a lame: «Yaa bõe yĩnga la fo yãbda, n zãgsd rɩɩbo, la f sãamd f sũuri? Mam ka be yõod f yĩnga, n yɩɩd kamb piig bɩ?»" 
1Samuel1:9 B sẽn dɩ la b yũ n sɛ, a An tɩ yalsa Silo pʋʋsga rooga noorẽ. Maan-kʋʋd a Eli da zao a goeel zugu, rignoorẽ be." 
1Samuel1:10 A An sũur da sãama al wʋsgo; la a ra pʋʋsdame, la a kiigd nintãm. A pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd woto:" 
1Samuel1:11 «Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, ges-y y yem-poaka sũ-sãangã, da yĩm-y m yell ye, zoe-y m nimbãanega, kõ-y-m bi-ribla, mam na rɩk-a n kõ yãmba, a vɩɩm zãnga, la barg kõn tol n põng a zug ye.»" 
1Samuel1:12 A An kaoosame n tar pʋʋsgo. A Eli maaga a meng n get paga noore. 
1Samuel1:13 A An da gomda ne a menga. A no-gãndã n da yaagde la a koɛɛga ra pa yit ye. A Eli tagsame t'a tɩga rãam. 
1Samuel1:14 Rẽ la a sok-a: «Rãama na n yɩlma f nengã n ta wakat bʋgo? Bɩ f tɩ gãand tɩ f rãamã yi wɛ!» 
1Samuel1:15 A An leok-a lame: «Ka boto ye, m naaba, m ka no-koeem ned ye, mam ka yũ rãam bɩ toose sẽn tõe n lub ned ye; mam sũura koees la m da zukd Wẽnd taoore, n wilgd m sũ-sãanga." 
1Samuel1:16 Bɩ y ra tẽ tɩ yãmb yem-poakã yaa pʋg-yaalg ye; yaa sũ-sãanga la toog n wʋm maam, n kɩt tɩ m yõk goama n ta marsã.»" 
1Samuel1:17 T'a Eli na n leok-a: «Kẽng ne laafi! La Israyɛl Wẽnnaam reeg kosg ninga fo sẽn kos bãmbã!» 
1Samuel1:18 T'a An yeele: «La Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ m paam bark yãmb nifẽ!» Paga kulame. A rɩɩme, la a neng pa le gãnem wa pĩnd ye." 
1Samuel1:19 Zaka rãmb yika yibeoogo pĩnda, la b sẽn wõgemd n pʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnd n sɛ, b leba b yiri, Rama." 
1Samuel1:20 Dẽ loogr poore, a Elkana bãnga a paga, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd me tẽeg a An yelle. Yʋʋmda pʋgẽ, a An dɩka pʋga, n wa rog bi-ribla, n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Samwɛl, tɩ yaa Soaala la a ra kos-a." 
1Samuel1:21 A sɩda, a Elkana tʋlgẽ lame n le kẽne, ne a zak rãmba fãa, n tɩ kʋ yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd maoong, la a pids a pʋlengo." 
1Samuel1:22 A An barsame n pa kẽng ye, a yeela a sɩdã: «Biiga sã n wa sigi, m na tall-a n kẽng n tɩ wilg-a Wẽnde, t'a kell n pa b roogẽ daar fãa.»" 
1Samuel1:23 A sɩda, a Elkana, yeel-a lame: «Maan wa f sẽn dat, gũ f biiga sigbu. Soaala-Wẽnd ye n sak bala n pids b kãabgo!» La paga paame: a yẽsma a biiga al t'a wa sigi." 
1Samuel1:24 A sẽn sik a biigã, a tall-a lame n kẽng Silo, la a yãka yʋʋm a tã naafo la zom peoogo, la rãam ne ko-waooga. A talla a biigã n kẽng Wẽnd waoogra zĩigẽ, Silo: la biiga paa be n tʋmnẽ" 
1Samuel1:25 B kʋʋ loalgã, la b talla biigã n tɩ kɩs a Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 A An yeelame: «M naaba, y kabre! Sɩd ne sɩda, wala yãmb meng sẽn vɩ wã, ad-y yaa maam la pag ninga sẽn yalsa yãmb sɛɛgẽ ka n da pʋʋsd Naaba-Wẽndã." 
1Samuel1:27 Yaa bi-kãnga yĩnga, la m da pʋʋsda, la Soaala-Wẽnd reega kosgo ninga mam sẽn kos bãmbã." 
1Samuel1:28 Dẽ n so tɩ mam dɩkd-a n kõtẽ; a vɩɩm zãnga, a na yɩɩ Wẽnd soolem.» B fãa wõgemda Soaala taoore." 
1Samuel2:1 A An pʋʋsa woto: «M sũur kɩdemda sũ-noogo, Naaba-Wẽnd maasmẽ. Bãmb n le zẽk m zugu. M noor yaagame n kãab m bɛɛba wẽnga, m sũur nooma, m sẽn tõog m bɛɛba yĩnga." 
1Samuel2:2 Soaala yaa sõngo. Bãmb bal la Pĩiga. Bãmb bal la Wẽnde. 
1Samuel2:3 Bas-y zẽk-m-meng goama, wilg-m-meng goama da le yi y noorẽ ye! Soaala-Wẽnnaam tara bãngre, bãmb m mi sẽn ya sĩdimdi la faoogo." 
1Samuel2:4 Pãn-dãmba tãbd kaoome, tɩ koms rãmba rɩk pãng n sẽbg b sɛɛga." 
1Samuel2:5 Sẽn da rɩt b rɩɩb n tɩgdã, koosa b menga n deeg rɩɩbo, tɩ kom sẽn tar b rãmba rɩt tɩ b pʋg pitẽ. Sẽn zĩ-a n kũm rogem, rogda naoor a yopoe; tɩ sẽn da dogda kamb lebg pʋg-kiiri" 
1Samuel2:6 Soaala n kʋʋde, bãmb n vʋʋgde. Bãmb n sikd bʋg-tẽngẽ. Bãmb n yiisd kɩɩmsẽ." 
1Samuel2:7 Bãmb n kẽesd naongo, bãmb n samd arzɛgse, bãmb n zẽkd neda, bãmb n sulgd-a." 
1Samuel2:8 Bãmb n takd naong soaba t'a yit tomẽ, la b takd nimbãan-ned n yiisd-a tãmpʋʋrẽ, n zĩndigd-a ne pãng rãmbã, n kõt-a naam zaoore tɩ yaa a pʋɩɩre. Tẽnga sẽn zao bũmb ning zugã bee Naaba-Wẽnd nugẽ, bãmb n zaoolg dũni wã a zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel2:9 Bãmb n gũud b zo-rãmba nao kẽndre: tɩ lik na n loog ne nin-wẽnga. Ka ne a yãoog pãnga la ninsaal tõe bũmb ye. 
1Samuel2:10 Naaba-Wẽnd n na n kao b bɛɛba zãnga, b na n zĩnda yĩngr n tool b sa-tãse. Naaba-Wẽnd na n kao ãndũni rãmba bʋʋdo. Bãmb n na n kõ b dĩma tõogo, b sẽn taag a soab kaama zug na n zẽkame.»" 
1Samuel2:11 A Elkana leba a yir, Rama, la biiga kell n paame n tʋmd Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋmd ne maan-kʋʋd a Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 A Eli kamba da yaa bi-beese. B toog ra ka be ne Naaba-Wẽnd ye. 
1Samuel2:13 B manesem ne b saam-biisa ra yaa woto: Ned sã n da kʋ maoongo, nemda rʋgb wakato, b ra tʋmda neda. Nin-kãng ra wata ne kõse." 
1Samuel2:14 A da rɩkda kõsã n tʋm kut rʋka pʋga bɩ kut rubla, bɩ tãnd rubla pʋga, la kõsa sẽn da kõs neong ninga, b ra yaagd-a lame n sooge. Yaa woto la b ra maand ne Israyɛl kamba fãa sẽn da wat ne b kũun Silo tẽnga." 
1Samuel2:15 N yɩɩd rẽnna, b ra ka maagd b meng tɩ b reng n yõog nem-kaama bugum meng ye, sõgna da watame n yeel ned ninga sẽn maana maoongã: «Yãk nemd ninga sẽn nan ka kɩɩm, maan-kʋʋda yĩngã, n wa, t'a kõn deeg nemd sẽn dʋg ye, yaa nemd kãad bal la a rata.»" 
1Samuel2:16 Ned sã n da yeel-a: «Yaas tɩ b reng n yõog nem-kaama bugum, tɩ f na yãk f sẽn date,» a da leokdame: «Ayo! Kɩs mars-mars noogã, tɩ sã n pa rẽ, m na n yãka ne pãnga.»" 
1Samuel2:17 A Eli kamba sẽn da maanda da yaa wẽng wʋsg Wẽnnaam nifẽ. B ra ka get maanda wa yaa bũmb sẽn dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye. 
1Samuel2:18 A Samwɛl da maanda a tʋʋmde, Wẽnd waoogra doogẽ. A da yeelgda a tʋʋmd fuug sẽn wʋg toore ne gĩs peelse." 
1Samuel2:19 Yʋʋmd fãa, a ma ra sẽta fu-yorg bila, t'a sã n tũud a sɩdã n wat n na n kʋ yʋʋmd maoongã, bɩ a wa kõ-a a Samwɛl." 
1Samuel2:20 A Eli ra ningda a Elkana ne a paga barka. A ra yeta a Elkana: «Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ pʋg kãnga le rog kamba a taaba n kõ-fo, n lebs biig ning a sẽn dɩk n kõ Soaala-Wẽndã!» Dẽ poore a Elkana ne a zaka rãmb da lebda b yiri." 
1Samuel2:21 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tẽeg a An yelle, a waa n doga kom-dibli a tã, la kom-pugli a yiibu. La sã n yaa a Samwɛl, yẽ ra bɩta Soaala maasmẽ." 
1Samuel2:22 A Eli da kʋʋla wʋsgo, la a waa n wʋma a kamba sẽn da maan seem ninga ne a Israyɛl zãng fãa, a wʋmame tɩ b da tol n gãee ne pagba sẽn da tigimd sɛka roog noor, b tʋʋmd yĩnga." 
1Samuel2:23 A Eli yeela a kambã: «Bõe yĩnga la yãmb tʋmd tʋʋm kɛg woto? Mam wʋma neba fãa sẽn gomd y tʋʋm wẽnã yelle. 
1Samuel2:24 Ayo! M kamba, bɩ y da maan woto ye! Mam sẽn wʋmd b sẽn yet bũmb ning y poorẽ wã pa neer ye." 
1Samuel2:25 Ned sã n beeg a to, Wẽnnaam n na n yals sʋka la a sã n beeg Wẽnnaam ãnd n na n yɩ wɛɛmba?» La kamba pa kelg b ba koɛɛg ye tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd da rat n yãka b yõore." 
1Samuel2:26 La sã n yaa a Samwɛl, a da ket n paasda ne yagdo la rasãndlem, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore la a saam-biisa me taoore." 
1Samuel2:27 Wẽnnaam bãngd a ye n wa a Eli nengẽ la a yeel-a lame: «Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Mam vẽnega m meng ne f yaaba zak rãmba, b sẽn da waa n be Ezipt rãmb soolmẽ, Ezipt tẽnga." 
1Samuel2:28 Ad-f yaabã, a Aarõ, maam n tũus-a, a Israyɛl sagsa kamb sʋka, t'a yɩ m maan-kʋʋda, n dʋʋd m maan-kugrã n yõogd wisdu la a bobd b sẽn tar bũmb ning n sokd Wẽnde. Mam kõo f ba zakã tõog, t'a rɩlg a menga ne pʋɩɩr ninga a Israyɛl kamba fãa sẽn kõt Soaala-Wẽndã." 
1Samuel2:29 Yaa bõe yĩnga la y maand wala maanda la kũuna, m sẽn yet tɩ b wa kõ-m m doogẽ wã ka bõn-sõma? Bõe tɩ ya nem-sõma wã, m buuda sẽn kõt-ma, n lebg yãmb soolem tɩ y rɩt n nobda? La bõe n maan tɩ fo waoogd f kambã n yɩɩd maam." 
1Samuel2:30 La sẽn ya woto wã, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama n gomda, m na n leoka koɛɛg kãngã: M da yeelame tɩ foo ne f ba wã zakẽ la m na n yiis m maan-kʋʋdba, daar fãa yĩnga. La marsã, maam n yete: rẽ sɛɛme. Sẽn waoogda maam, mam na waoog a soaba; la sẽn paoogda maam, mam me na paoog-a!" 
1Samuel2:31 Ade! Kõn le kaoose tɩ m kẽ f roogã la f sakã n yiis kʋdr fãa tɩ nin-kẽem da le kees be ye. 
1Samuel2:32 Ned a to n na n wa reeg f zĩiga, wẽnd doogẽ wã. F na n yãenda a sẽn na n maan a Israyɛl neer ningã. Sã n ya fo zakã, nin-kẽem kõn le zĩnd a pʋgẽ bada." 
1Samuel2:33 F roagd a ye la m na n yaool n bas, m maan-kugra sɛɛgẽ; yẽ n na n ges t'a nin wa yiigi, n ges la a kũmd sũuri, la rẽ t'a taaba fãa kiime." 
1Samuel2:34 F na rɩ m sẽn togsd bũmb ninga kaseto ne yell ning sẽn na n pak f kamb a yiibã: daar a ye la b na n naag taab n ki. 
1Samuel2:35 Dẽ poore, m na yiisa m maan-kʋʋd a yembre, ned sẽn ka bʋt moogo, ned sẽn na n maan sẽn noom m sũuri. M na n kõ-a-la kamba la bãmb n na n soog maan-kʋʋra naam daar fãa, dĩm ning m sẽn na n tũusa sɛɛgẽ." 
1Samuel2:36 La ned ninga sẽn na n kella fo zaka pʋga, na n tɩ wõgemd a taoore, n bõs lagfo la miisgu n yetẽ: ‹M yõkda y sɛɛga, sõng-y tɩ m paam tʋʋmd bila a yembre, maan-kʋʋdba nengẽ, n tõog n paam dɩ-võre n ning m noorẽ.› »" 
1Samuel3:1 Biiga a Samwɛl da tʋnda Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋmde, maan-kʋʋd a Eli sɛɛgẽ. Wakat kãng tɩ b da ka leb n paamd Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg tao-tao ye; Soaala da pa le likd b meng naoor wʋsg ye." 
1Samuel3:2 Yʋng a ye, a Eli da gãe a gãagẽ; a nina pãng ra woogame, a da ka le ne neer ye." 
1Samuel3:3 A Samwɛl me ra gõeeme. A ra bee sɛka roogẽ. A gãaga ra pa zãr ne Wẽnd zooda kaseta ye. Zĩig ra nan ka sɩng yẽegr ye. Dooga bugum da ket n witame. 
1Samuel3:4 La Naaba-Wẽnd bool-a lame: «Samwɛl, Samwɛl!» T'a sak: «Naaba!» A wudg n kẽnga a Eli nengẽ n yeele: «Yãmb n bool-ma, ad-ma!»" 
1Samuel3:5 T'a Eli yeele: «Ayo! Mam pa bool-f ye, lebg n tɩ gãande.» La a lebg n tɩ gãandame." 
1Samuel3:6 Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd le bool-a: «Samwɛl!» T'a Samwɛl le yik n kẽng a Eli nengẽ n yeel-a: «Ad-ma, tɩ yãmb n bool-m!» T'a Eli leok-a: «M biiga, mam pa bool-f ye, lebg n tɩ gãande.»" 
1Samuel3:7 Mik a Samwɛl da nan pa mi Soaala-Wẽnd ye, la Wẽnnaam koɛɛga me dag n nan pa lʋɩ a tʋbrẽ ye." 
1Samuel3:8 La Soaala le bool a Samwɛl naoor a tãab soaba, t'a yik n le kẽng a Eli nengẽ n yeele: «Ad-ma tɩ yãmb n boole!» Dẽ marsã la a Eli yaool n bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n da boond biigã." 
1Samuel3:9 T'a yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ gãnde; la b sã n le bool-fo bɩ f leok: ‹Gom-y wɛ, Soaala, tɩ yãmb rakõora kelgdame.› » La a Samwɛl leb n tɩ gãanda a zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel3:10 Naaba-Wẽnd le waame n yals wa pĩnda, n bool a Samwɛl: «Samwɛl! Samwɛl!» T'a Samwɛl na n leoke: «Gom-y wɛ, Soaala, tɩ m kelgdame.»" 
1Samuel3:11 Wakat kãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Samwɛl: «Ade, mam na n maana bũmb a yembre, a Israyɛl pʋga, la sẽn na n wʋm-a fãa, a tʋb na kʋre." 
1Samuel3:12 Badaare, mam na pids goam niynsa fãa mam sẽn yeel a Eli ne a zaka poorẽ, bũmb kõn pa n ka pids ye." 
1Samuel3:13 Maam n wilgd-a tɩ m dat n sɩbga a zaka vugr la tɛka, la a mi-la a beegr tiiri. A dag n miime t'a kamb paoogda Soaala, la a kell n pa sɩbg-b ye." 
1Samuel3:14 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, la m yet a Eli tɩ bũmb kõn tõog n yẽes a yel-wẽndã, kõn yɩ maoongo, kõn yɩ kũun ye.»" 
1Samuel3:15 A Samwɛl kell n gãandame tɩ beoog vẽege. A paka Wẽnd dooga kʋɩlense. Dabeem da tara a Samwɛl: a maanda a wãna n togs a Eli, a sẽn wʋm bũmb ningã." 
1Samuel3:16 La a Eli bool a Samwɛl n yeel-a: «Samwɛl, m biig sõngo!» T'a sak: «Naaba!» T'a Eli sok-a:" 
1Samuel3:17 «Yaa bõe koɛɛga, la Soaala-Wẽnd togs foom! Da solg maam bũmb ye. Bɩ Wẽnd sɩbg-fo, la b le sɩbg-fo n bãge, fo sã n solg bũmbu n pa togs maam b sẽn yeel-fa zãnga!»" 
1Samuel3:18 A Samwɛl togs-a-la fãa, n pa solg bũmb ye. La a Eli yeelame: «Bãmb la Soaala-Wẽnde, b maan bũmb ning fãa sẽn ta b yam!»" 
1Samuel3:19 A Samwɛl da bɩtame. Naaba-Wẽnd dag n bee ne-a. A Samwɛl gomd ba a ye ra ka lʋɩt vɩʋʋgẽ ye. 
1Samuel3:20 Al Dã, n tɩ tãag Beerseba, a Israyɛl bãngame t'a Samwɛl lebga Soaala no-rɛɛsa." 
1Samuel3:21 Soaala-Wẽnd da kell n likda b meng Silo. B da vẽnegda b meng ne a Samwɛl, Silo; Naaba-Wẽnd da gomda ne-a." 
1Samuel4:1 A Samwɛl da taasda Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛgã a Israyɛl gill fãa. Dasem kãense, a Israyɛl yiime n na n tɩ seg Filisti rãmba n zab ne-ba. B wẽ-la b sik Eben-Ezɛr, tɩ Filisti rãmba wẽ b sik Afɛk." 
1Samuel4:2 Filisti rãmba gãnega tãpo n na zab ne a Israyɛl, la zabrã yɩɩ kãsenga. Filisti rãmba tõoga a Israyɛl, tẽn-nabrẽ, n kʋ b neb na ta tus a naase." 
1Samuel4:3 Nebã leba b tãb-sikẽ, t'a Israyɛl nin-kẽemsa yeele: «Bõe yĩng la Soaala bas tɩ Filisti rãmba tõog tõnd dũnna? D kẽng Silo n tɩ rɩk zood kasetã n wa, t'a zĩnd tõnd sʋka, n fãag-do d bɛɛb nusẽ.»" 
1Samuel4:4 B tʋma neb Silo, tɩ b tɩ wa ne koglgã, Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba sẽn zao a soab zugã. A Eli kamb a yiibã, a Ofni la a Pinas, da bee be, koglga sɛɛga." 
1Samuel4:5 Zood kaseta sẽn waa n kẽ b tãb-sikã, a Israyɛl kamba fãa zẽka koɛɛg n kaas ne sũ-noogo, tɩ tẽnga fãa rĩmda." 
1Samuel4:6 Filisti rãmb sẽn wʋm b kelemsa rãamde, b sokame: «Kaasgo ning b sẽn kaasd Ebre rãmba tãb-sikẽ wã võor yaa bõe?» La b wʋmame tɩ zooda kaset koglga n wa b tãb-sikẽ." 
1Samuel4:7 Filisti rãmba yɛɛsame tɩ b ra yetame: «Ade, wẽnd a ye n sig Ebre rãmba tãb-sikẽ la yell n paam tõndo, tɩ daar sẽn zãag bilf marsã, dag n ka le ya woto ye!" 
1Samuel4:8 Na wʋm tõndo! Tõe tɩ yaa Tãnsoaba-Wẽnde. Ãnd n na fãag tõndo bãmb nusẽ? Tõe tɩ yaa Wẽnd ninga sẽn sɩbg Ezipt rãmba ne bãas buud fãa, we-raoogẽ!" 
1Samuel4:9 Baasg zãnga, keng-y y pɛlga, la y wilg tɩ yãmb yaa rapa, la y maan zabre!»" 
1Samuel4:10 Filisti rãmb kaooga zabre la b tõoga Ebre rãmbã, tɩ ned kam fãa zoe. B pogla a Israyɛl tɩ looge; sẽn ki-b tãpẽ yɩɩ neb tus pis-tã." 
1Samuel4:11 Filisti rãmb reega zooda kaset la a Eli kamb a yiibã, a Ofni la a Pinas kiime." 
1Samuel4:12 A Bẽnzame doog daoa a yembre, n yi zabra zĩigẽ n zoe n wa Silo, badaar bala; a futã ra pãrsame, t'a zuga ra yug tom." 
1Samuel4:13 A sẽn ta wã, rẽ t'a Eli da zao a goeel zugu, sora noore, n gũud kibare; a sũur da rigda rabeem, kaseta koglga yĩnga. Daoã sẽn kẽ tẽnga pʋga, a togsa kibarã tɩ tẽnga fãa wẽ no-bɩnga." 
1Samuel4:14 A Eli sẽn wʋm yãbrã, a sokame: «Bʋʋra võor la bõe?» Tao-tao bala, daoã waa togs-a-la kibarã." 
1Samuel4:15 A Eli da tara yʋʋm pis-wɛ la a nii; a nina da menemame, t'a ra ka le ne bũmb ye." 
1Samuel4:16 Daoã yeela a Eli: «Mam sẽn wa wã, ad-m da bee zabra zĩigẽ; yaa zabrã zĩigẽ la m yii n zoe dũnna.» A Eli sokame: «M biig sõngo, bõe n maane?»" 
1Samuel4:17 Sẽn wa-a ne kibarã leokame: «A Israyɛl zoee Filisti rãmba taoore, la neba paama ko-yũud meng-menga, la yãmb kamba a yiibã, a Ofni la a Pinas kiime; la b tol n deega zooda kasetã.»" 
1Samuel4:18 Daoã sẽn gom zood kaseta yell bala, a Eli lʋɩ-la a goeel zug tulumdi, dagnoora sɛɛga, n kaoog a yubla, n ki. A ra kʋʋlame, n ya zɩsgo. A yɩ-la a Israyɛl bʋ-kaood yʋʋm pis-naase." 
1Samuel4:19 A bi-paga a yembre, a Pinas paga, da tara pʋga n kolg rogem. La a sẽn wʋm tɩ b tol n deega koglgã, la a wʋm t'a sɩda la a sɩda ba wã kiime, a lɛɛg n yĩgimdame; a sẽn da kũumd rogem yĩnga, a rogame." 
1Samuel4:20 A sẽn da sobg yĩnga, sẽn da be-b a sɛɛgẽ wã yeel-a lame: «Da maan dabeem ye, yaa bi-ribla la f rog yã.» La a pa leok ye, n tol n maan wa a pa wʋm ye." 
1Samuel4:21 A waa n pʋda a biiga yʋʋre t'a Ikabod, n yetẽ: «Zu-zẽkr sɛɛ Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ.» A ra goma woto b sẽn deeg zood kaseta yĩnga, n paas a sɩda ne a sɩda ba wã kaalem yĩnga." 
1Samuel4:22 Paga ra yeelame: «Zu-zẽkr-sɛɛ Israyɛl» tɩ b reega Wẽnd zooda kaseto. 
1Samuel5:1 Filisti rãmb reega koglgã. B tʋk-a-la Eben-Ezɛr n tall-a n kẽng Asdod. 
1Samuel5:2 Filisti rãmba sẽn deeg koglgã, b tall-a lame n tɩ kẽes b wẽnd, a Dagõ, doogẽ; la b rɩgl-a-la a Dagõ sɛɛgẽ." 
1Samuel5:3 Vẽkembeoogo, Asdod dãmb sẽn yi tõd-beoogo, b mikame, t'a Dagõ lʋɩɩme, t'a neng fõgneg tẽnga, Soaala zood kaseta taoore. Tɩ b rɩk a Dagõ n lebs a zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel5:4 Vẽkembeoog yɛsa, bãmb sẽn le yi tõd-beoogo, b mikame t'a Dagõ le lʋɩɩme, zood kaseta taoore: da keesa yĩnga bala, zuga la nusa ra wãame n dɩg dooga noorẽ." 
1Samuel5:5 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, la ba ne rũnna, a Dagõ maan-kʋʋdba la sẽn kẽed-ba a Dagõ doogẽ, Asdod tẽnga, pa tabd dignoora ye." 
1Samuel5:6 Soaala-Wẽnd nug sɩbga Asdod dãmba, n wa ne sũ-sãang kãsenga b sʋka; b lobg-b-la yũya, Asdod ne a tẽn-kɩremsa fãa." 
1Samuel5:7 Asdod dãmba sẽn mik tɩ yaa woto, b yeelame: «Wẽnd zooda kaset koglga kõn pa tõnd nengẽ ye, tɩ d yãeta toog wʋsg a sɛɛgẽ, tõnd ne d wẽnd a Dagõ.»" 
1Samuel5:8 Asdod dãmba kɩtame tɩ b bool la b tigim Filisti nanamsã n yeel-ba: «Bõe la d na n maan ne Israyɛl Wẽnda zood kaseta koglgã?» Tɩ b leoke: «D tʋk-a n kẽng Gat.» B sɩd tʋk-a lame. 
1Samuel5:9 La b sẽn tʋk-a n ta Gat, la Soaala-Wẽnd nug sẽn le sɩbg tẽngã, la yɩɩ rabeem kãsenga. Soaala sɩbga tẽnga rãmba, sẽn sɩng kom-bõonego n ta nin-kẽemba, b fãa yĩnga pusa yũya." 
1Samuel5:10 Woto bãmb tʋma koglga Ekrõ, tɩ Ekrõ rãmb na n wẽ no-bɩnga n yetẽ: «B tʋka koglgã n wa rɩgl-a tõnd tẽnga, n na n kʋ tõndo ne d buudu.»" 
1Samuel5:11 Bãmb me kɩtame tɩ b bool la b tigim Filisti rãmb nanamse n yeel-ba: «Lebs-y Israyɛl Wẽnda zood kasetã t'a leb a zĩigẽ, la a ra kʋ tõnd ne d buud ye!» Kũum dabeem kãsenga da tara tẽnga rãmba, fãa da rigda dabeem kãseng menga; Soaala-Wẽnd da zɩsga b nugu." 
1Samuel5:12 Nin-vɩɩg pa kell tẽngã n ka pus yũur ye la tẽnga rãmba kelemsã sãdame n kul yĩngri. 
1Samuel6:1 Soaala zooda kaset paa Filisti rãmba tẽngẽ, kiis a yopoe." 
1Samuel6:2 Filisti rãmba boola b maan-kʋʋdba la b bagba n sok-ba: «D maanda bõe ne koglgã? Wilg-y tõnd d sẽn na n maanega n lebs koglgã a zĩigẽ.» 
1Samuel6:3 B leokame: «Y sã n na n lebs koglgã bɩ y ra lebs-a zaalem ye. Bao-y yaoodo n deng n yao a Israyɛl Wẽndã. Woto yãmb na sãooge, la y na bãng bũmb ninga sẽn da zɩsgd Wẽnda nug y zugã.»" 
1Samuel6:4 B sokame: «Yaa bõe yaoodo la tõnd tog n yao?» Tɩ maan-kʋʋdba la bagba yeele: «Tũuda ne Filisti nanamsa sõore; dɩlla na n yɩɩ sãnem gil a nu sẽn dõog wa yũuri n paas rayʋʋs sẽn dõog ne sãnem, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd sɩbga tẽns a nu wã la b nanams a nu wã, ne sɩbgr yɛnga." 
1Samuel6:5 Dõog-y yũya la rayʋʋsã, sẽn sãamd y tẽngã, la y pẽg Israyɛl Wẽnnaam. Daare tõe tɩ b nuga sɩbgre yɩ faasga yãmb yĩnga, y wẽnd dãmba la y tẽng yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:6 Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb kengd y sũuri wala Ezipt rãmba ne b dĩma sẽn keng b sũuri? Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn leng-b n sɛ, b ka bas Israyɛl kamba tɩ b loog sɩda?" 
1Samuel6:7 Marsã, bɩ y maan bilim-bilm paalga, n wa ne nag-yãans a yiibu sẽn yẽsemd kamba, la sẽn nan ka sog wãk ye; loe-y nag-yãansa ne bilim-bilma la y tall nag-bi wã n tɩ pag yiri!" 
1Samuel6:8 Yãmb na n dɩka zooda kaset n sagl bilim-bilma pʋga. Y na yaool marsã n dɩgl a sɛɛgẽ, koglg bila ne sãnema teedo, yaoodã y sẽn na yao wã, la yãmb na n basa niisa tɩ b looge." 
1Samuel6:9 Bɩ y pʋg n ges; y sã n mik tɩ b rɩka Bɛt-Semɛs sore, n dabd Israyɛl tẽnga, y na bãng tɩ yaa Israyɛl Wẽndã n maan tõnd wẽngã la sã n pa yɩ boto, d na bãng tɩ pa bãmb nug n sɩbg tõnd ye, dɩlla yaa wa yɛl sẽn seg taab bala.»" 
1Samuel6:10 Neba maana boto: B baoo nag-yãans a yiibu sẽn da yẽsemd kamba, n sẽb-ba ne bilim-bilma. B basa nag-bi wã bãgra pʋga." 
1Samuel6:11 B rɩka koglgã n sagl bilim-bilma pʋga, n paas sãnema teed sẽn makd rayʋʋsã la yũya." 
1Samuel6:12 Niigã kell n dɩka Bɛt-Semɛs sor tɩrga; b tũu so-kãng bala la b kũmdẽ, b ka bʋdg goabga, b ka bʋdg rɩtgo. Filisti rãmb nanamse pʋg-b lame al n tɩ ta Bɛt-Semɛs toaaga." 
1Samuel6:13 Bɛt-Semɛs rãmba da wʋrda alkam tãnga pennẽ; bãmb sẽn zẽk b nenga, b yãee kaseta koglga la b sũur yɩɩ noog b sẽn yãend-a wã yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:14 Koglga taa Bɛt-Semɛs daoa, a Zozuwe, pʋʋgẽ, n yals be. Kug bedr n dag n be be, b wesa bilim bilma raado n tugl bugum a zugu, n kʋ niisã n yõog n kõ Soaalã." 
1Samuel6:15 Levitsã sika zood kasetã ne koglg bilã sẽn da rɩg a sɛɛgẽ ne sãnem teedã; la b dogla rẽ fãa kugra zugu. Badaare, Bɛt-Semɛs rãmba kʋʋ yũ-noog maando la maan-dɩtse." 
1Samuel6:16 Filisti nanams a nu wã sẽn yãe rẽnda, b leba Ekrõ, badaar bala." 
1Samuel6:17 La ad sãnem gilã sõore, sãnem gila sẽn togsd yũurã, Filisti rãmba sẽn kɩse n na n yao Soaala-Wẽnde: Asdod yaa a yembre; Gaza: a yembre; Askalõ: a yembre; Gat: a yembre; Ekrõ: a yembre." 
1Samuel6:18 Sã n ya sãnem rayʋʋsã, b ta Filisti nanams a nu wã tẽnsa sõore, b tẽn-bɛd la b tẽn-bõonese. Yell kãensã fãa kaseto, yaa kugr bedre ning b sẽn dogle koglga a zugã, t'a ket n be rũnna, Bɛt-Semɛs, a Zozuwe pʋʋgẽ wã." 
1Samuel6:19 Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbga Bɛt-Semɛs rãmba b sẽn ges b zooda kasetã. Neb pisopoe n deeg sɩbgrã. Sẽn põs-ba kelma kʋʋre, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sɩbg bãmba tɩ yɩ toog wʋsga yĩnga." 
1Samuel6:20 Bɛt-Semɛs rãmba yeelame: «Ãnd n tõe n tɩlg Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, bãmb sẽn pid ne sõmblema? La zood kaseta koglga sã n yi tõnd nengẽ d na n tees-a-la yɛ?»" 
1Samuel6:21 B tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng n tɩ yeel Kiriyat-Yeyarim rãmba: «Bɩ y wa rɩk koglgã n ta y tẽngẽ, tɩ Filisti rãmba lebs-a lame.»" 
1Samuel7:1 Kiriyat-Yeyarim neb waame, n deeg zood kasetã, n tall-a n kẽng a Abinadab yiri, tãn-bila zugu, la b yãka a biiga a Elazar t'a soog zood kaseta gũudem." 
1Samuel7:2 B sẽn tɩ bĩng kuga walsa koglg Kiriyat-Yeyarim, a kaoosa be wʋsgo: taa yʋʋm pisi. Dẽ marsã la a Israyɛl waa n yik n yãbd n dat Soaala-Wẽnde." 
1Samuel7:3 A Samwɛl yeela a Israyɛl rooga gilli: «Sã n yaa ne y sũur fãa, la y lɛɛg n baood Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ y yiis y sʋkã wẽn-sãamsã: a Baal la a Astarte rãmba. Rɩk-y y sũur n togl Naaba-Wẽnde, sak-y bãmb b yembr bala; la b na n fãag yãmb, Filisti rãmb nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel7:4 A Israyɛl kamba sɩd yiisa Baal la Astarte rãmba, la b tũ Naaba-Wẽnd b yembr bala." 
1Samuel7:5 A Samwɛl yeelame: «Bɩ Israyɛl kamba fãa tigim taaba, Mispa, tɩ m pʋʋs Soaala b yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel7:6 B tigma taab Mispa. La b yõnga koom n bas Wẽnd taoore; b loe noor badaare n yetẽ: «Tõnd beega Wẽnnaam!» Yaa Mispa la a Samwɛl sɩd lebg a Israyɛl naaba la a bʋ-kaooda. 
1Samuel7:7 Filisti rãmba wʋmame t'a Israyɛl kamba tigma Mispa, tɩ nanamsa yik n na n wa zab ne a Israyɛl. B sẽn wʋm woto, a Israyɛl kamba diga Filisti rãmb rabeem," 
1Samuel7:8 la b yeel a Samwɛl: «Kelem Naaba-Wẽnd n kõ-do, la da zĩ sɩɩ woto ye. Bool-b tɩ b wa fãag-d Filisti rãmba nusẽ.»" 
1Samuel7:9 A Samwɛl rɩka pe-bila sẽn ka bas bĩisim, n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo, n yõog-a bugum zãnga n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. La a kelma ne Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl yĩnga; la b reega a kosgo." 
1Samuel7:10 A Samwɛl sẽn da waa n kõt maoongã la Filisti rãmb kolg n na n kaoog zabre ne a Israyɛl. Badaare, Naaba-Wẽnd tʋma sa-tãse, n yɛɛs Filisti rãmba al wʋsgo. A Israyɛl tõog-b lame." 
1Samuel7:11 A Israyɛl yii Mispa n dig Filisti rãmba, n tar b kʋʋbo al n tɩ yõsg Bɛt-Kar." 
1Samuel7:12 A Samwɛl tãsa ne pãnga: «Sẽn ta marsã Soaala sõngr ka paoog-d ye.» Dẽ la a rɩk kugri n lugl Mispa ne tẽng a ye sʋka, n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ Eben-Ezɛr, Wẽnd sõngr kugri. A ra yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnd sõnga tõndo n ta marsã.»" 
1Samuel7:13 Woto Filisti rãmb pa maam daood ye. B pa le saag n kẽe a Israyɛl soolem pʋgẽ, n ta a Samwɛl loogr ye." 
1Samuel7:14 Filisti rãmba sẽn dag n deeg a Israyɛl tẽns niynsã le leba a Israyɛl, sẽn sɩng Ekrõ n tɩ tãag Gat. Yɩɩ woto la a Israyɛl bogr kãng tɩlg ne Filisti rãmbã. Laafi zĩnda Israyɛl ne Amoritsa sʋk marsã." 
1Samuel7:15 A Samwɛl yɩ-la a Israyɛl taoor soab la a bʋ-kaooda, a vɩɩm tɛka." 
1Samuel7:16 Yʋʋmd fãa, a ra kẽnda Betɛl, la Gilgal la Mispa, n kaood a Israyɛl bʋʋd be," 
1Samuel7:17 n yaool n lɛɛg n wa Rama, t'a yir da bee be, a ra kaooda a Israyɛl bʋʋd be me, la a mee maan-kugr beene, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga." 
1Samuel8:1 A Samwɛl sẽn waa n kʋʋle, a kɩtame t'a kambã lebg bʋ-kaoodba, a Israyɛl tẽnga." 
1Samuel8:2 A bi-kãsenga yʋʋr da boondame t'a Zowɛl, t'a yiib soaba boond t'a Abiya; b ra kaooda bʋʋda Beerseba." 
1Samuel8:3 A Samwɛl kambã pa rɩk b ba nao ye. B ra nonga arzɛgs tɩ looge, bãmb da reegda neb kũuni, n pa kaood bʋʋd ne sɩd ye." 
1Samuel8:4 A Israyɛl nin-kẽemsã fãa tigma taaba, n kẽng a Samwɛl nengẽ, Rama." 
1Samuel8:5 B yeel-a lame: «Ade, fo kʋʋlame, la f kamba pa rɩkd fo nao ye. Marsã, maan wala buud a taaba sẽn maande, la f bao dĩm n kõ-do t'a soog-do.»" 
1Samuel8:6 A Samwɛl sũur pa yɩ noog ne b sẽn yeele: «Kõ-d dĩma t'a soog-do!» La a Samwɛl pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnde," 
1Samuel8:7 la Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Samwɛl: «Kelg neba koɛɛga, kelg b sẽn na n yeel-f bũmb ninga fãa. Ad ka foom la b pa rat ye, yaa maam la b pa tʋl tɩ m le rɩ naam b zugu." 
1Samuel8:8 La rẽ ka sɩng rũnna ye, sɩnga al Ezipt yiib n tãag rũnna. Woto la b basd maam n pʋgd wẽn-naands toɛ-toɛ yã. Boto me la b maand dũnna ne foom." 
1Samuel8:9 Kelg b koɛɛgã, la deng n wilg-ba, dĩma sẽn na n tall-b seem ninga.»" 
1Samuel8:10 Nebã sẽn da kot dĩma, a Samwɛl tɩ togs-b la Naaba-Wẽnd goama fãa." 
1Samuel8:11 A Samwɛl yeel-b lame: «Ad dĩma sẽn na n dɩ naam yãmb zugã, sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga. A na n deega yãmb kamba n kɩt tɩ b get a bilim-bilma yelle, a wiidi wã yelle, bãmb n na n zoet a bilim-bilma taoore." 
1Samuel8:12 A na n yãk-b lame tɩ b yɩ neb tusri, neb pis-nu nanamse, tɩ b ko a pʋʋgã, n tigs a tigsgã, n kud a zab teedã la b zap a wiida fan-teedã." 
1Samuel8:13 A na n deega yãmb kom-pugli tɩ b zɛɛd-a kaam sẽn tar yũ-noodo, tɩ b segend a rɩɩbo la b wẽed a buri." 
1Samuel8:14 A na n deega y pʋtã, y bugsuntundã, y oliviye sõma wã. A na n dɩk-b lame n kõ a tãnsoaben-dãmba." 
1Samuel8:15 A na n deega yãmb kood-biisi la y bugsuntund biisi, pʋɩɩr a ye piig zugu, n kõ na-pagba gũudba la a sõgen-kamba." 
1Samuel8:16 A na n deega yãmb dakõapa la y roog kamba, la y niis la y bõeens sẽn ya-b sõma n yɩɩda, n tʋm a tʋʋma." 
1Samuel8:17 A na n deega y rũmsã, rũng a ye piig zugu. Yãmb mens na n yɩ-la a yemse." 
1Samuel8:18 Baraar la y na n yãb ne Naaba-Wẽnde, y dĩma manesma poorẽ, dĩm ning, y meng sẽn tũusi, la Soaala-Wẽnd kõn kelg-y ye.»" 
1Samuel8:19 Neba zãgsa a Samwɛl kelgre. B yeelame: «Ayo, d kõn deeg f goama ye, dĩm n na n dɩ naam tõnd zugu bala!" 
1Samuel8:20 Tõnd me na n wẽnega wala buud a taaba fãa: tõnd dĩma n na kao d bʋʋdo n kõ-do, a na n lʋɩ tõnd taoore, n tall-do, tɩ d kẽng zabre.»" 
1Samuel8:21 A Samwɛl kelga neba sẽn leoka fãa n tɩ togs Soaala-Wẽnde. 
1Samuel8:22 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Samwɛl: «Kelg b koɛɛga, la f kõ-b dĩma.» T'a Samwɛl yeel a Israyɛl dapã: «Be neere, ned kam fãa kul a tẽngẽ.»" 
1Samuel9:1 Ned a ye n da be, n yaa a Bẽnzame sakẽ daoa, n boond t'a Kis. A nug ra zãadame. A Kis ba la a Abiyɛl, a Abiyɛl ba la a Seror. A Seror ba la a Bekorat, t'a Bekorat ba yaa a Afiya." 
1Samuel9:2 La a Kis da tara biig sẽn boond t'a Sol, dasãn-beel menga, Israyɛl biig sẽn da ta-a ka ye; a Sol da yaa wok sololl, a zuga woglem da yɩɩda a taaba." 
1Samuel9:3 A Sol ba, a Kis, bõn-yãans n waa n menem, t'a Kis yeel a biiga a Sol: «Yãk ned a ye t'a yãag fo, tɩ y karg n bao bõeensã.»" 
1Samuel9:4 A dʋʋ Efrayim tãnga zug, n pɩʋʋg Salisa tẽnga, n pa yãend-b ye. B tũu Saalim tẽng me la b ra ka be be ye. B saaga a Bẽnzame soolem, la b pa yãend-b ye." 
1Samuel9:5 B waa n taa Suf tẽnga, t'a Sol na n yeel a tũud-n-taagã: «Wa tɩ d lebge, tɩ sã n pa rẽ, m ba na n yĩma bõeensã yelle, n wa maand yɩɩre tõnd poorẽ.»" 
1Samuel9:6 Sõgna yeel-a lame: «Ade, dao a yembre n be tẽngã, n ya bãngda, tɩ neba fãa waoogd-a. A sẽn togs bũmb ning fãa pa kongd ye. D kẽng be, daar ninga a na wilg tõnd d sẽn na n bao-b zĩig ninga.»" 
1Samuel9:7 A Sol leoka-a lame: «D na n kẽngame, la bõe la d na n tɩ kõ bãngdã? Bur ka le ket tõnd korgẽ ye, la ka so-toaka rɩ-yaals a taaba la d na n kõ-a ye.»" 
1Samuel9:8 Tɩ sõgna leok a Sol: «Ade, m tara m wakɩ koɛɛnga, m na tɩ rɩk-a n kõ bãngdã t'a wilg tõnd d sora sẽn na n yɩ-la.»" 
1Samuel9:9 Pĩnda Israyɛl rãmb sã n da rabd Soaala-Wẽnd sokre, b ra yetame: «Wa-y tɩ d tɩ yãend sẽn ne-a soabã.» — B sẽn boond b rãmb tɩ bãngdb rũnna wã, pĩnda b ra boond-b lame tɩ sẽn ne-ba, sẽn paamd-b likri." 
1Samuel9:10 A Sol yeela sõgna: «F bee bʋʋm, wa tɩ d kẽnge!» La b kẽnga bãngda nengẽ, tẽnga pʋga." 
1Samuel9:11 B sẽn waa n dabdã, b sega kom-pugli sẽn yi n na n toog koom, tɩ b sok-ba: «Sẽn ne a soaba bee ka bɩ?»" 
1Samuel9:12 Tɩ b leok-ba: «N-yẽe! A be y taoore. La kẽng-y tao-tao. A waa tẽnga pʋg rũnna tɩ neb n wa maanda sẽn kʋʋd zĩis niynsã n na n kʋ b maoongo. Ning-y pãnga! 
1Samuel9:13 Yãmb sã n kẽ tẽnga pʋga, yãmb na seg-a t'a nan pa sɩng rɩɩb ye, tɩ nebã kõn dɩ t'a nan pa wa ye, tɩ yẽ n tog n ning barka la dẽ poor la nebã na n yaool n dɩ. Bɩ y kẽng tɩ marsã y na yãend-a.»" 
1Samuel9:14 B kẽnga tẽnga pʋgẽ. Bãmb sẽn ta tẽnga tẽnsʋk la a Samwɛl sẽn seg-ba: wakat kãng t'a da yit n dabda kunkubra zugu. 
1Samuel9:15 A Samwɛl waoong ket tɩ beoogo, Soaala-Wẽnd da pĩnd n togs-a lame, t'a bãng tiiri, b yeel-a lame:" 
1Samuel9:16 «Beoogo, wakat kãngã, mam na n tʋma foom a Bẽnzame tẽng dao a yembre, la fo na pʋdga a zug naam kaam t'a yɩ mam buud, a Israyɛl, naaba. A na n fãaga m nebã Filisti rãmba nusẽ; tɩ mam gesa m nebã, la b yãbrã sãta yĩngri tɩ m wʋmnẽ.»" 
1Samuel9:17 A Samwɛl sẽn yãe a Sol, la Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel a: «Ad dao ninga mam sẽn da gom ne foomã, yẽ n na n dɩ naam m neba zugu.»" 
1Samuel9:18 Woto wã a Sol kolga a Samwɛl tẽnga noor n yeel-a: «M kotame tɩ y wilg-m sẽn ne a soaba yiri.» 
1Samuel9:19 A Samwɛl leoka a Sol: «Yaa maam la sẽn ne a soabã. Lʋɩ m taoore tɩ d rʋ kunkubra zugu. Yãmb na n naaga maam n dɩ rũnna. Beoogo, m sã n wa leok f sẽn sokd f menga marsã wã, m na kõ-y sore tɩ y kuli." 
1Samuel9:20 Da le bʋ bõn-yãansa sẽn menema poorẽ ye, yaa dasma a tã dũnna: b le yãend-b lame, Dẽ pʋgẽ me, sẽn be yõod a Israyɛl yĩnga bĩnga yɛ sẽ? M yet yaa foo ne f ba wã zakẽ!»" 
1Samuel9:21 A Sol leokame: «Mam ka a Bẽnzame ned bɩ, a Bẽnzame rooga ka roog sẽn paood bɩ? Ka mam ba wã zaka n paood n yɩɩd bɩ? Ad-y goama ka sakd reegr ye.»" 
1Samuel9:22 A Samwɛl peega a Sol ne a tũud-n-taagã tɩ b kẽ rɩɩba roogẽ, n kõ bãmb pipi zĩiga neba sʋka, b ra zemsa neb pis-tã." 
1Samuel9:23 A Samwɛl yeela sẽn segenda dɩɩbã: «Wa ne pʋɩɩr ninga mam sẽn dag n kɩs foom, n yet tɩ f bĩng-a toorã.»" 
1Samuel9:24 Sẽn segend-a rɩɩbã waa ne bãoko la zʋ-kɛɛga n tẽgen a Sol taoore; t'a Samwɛl yeel-a: «Ad dɩɩb sẽn tẽgen f taoore, dɩ tɩ rẽ la b ra bĩng-fu, naag m sẽn bool b rãmba tɩ y rɩ.» Baraare a Sol ne a Samwɛl naaga taab n dɩ." 
1Samuel9:25 B siga kunkubrã n kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ, la a Samwɛl sõsa ne a Sol bɛonga zugu." 
1Samuel9:26 B yika vẽkembeoogo, yibeoog pĩnda. La zĩig sẽn yeege, a Samwɛl bool a Sol bɛonga zugu n yeel-a: «D dɩk sore, m na n yãag-f lame.» La Sol yikame, tɩ yẽ ne a Samwɛl tũ taab n yi." 
1Samuel9:27 B sẽn ta tẽnga noore, a Samwɛl yeela a Sol: «Yeel f sõgna, t'a loog n lʋɩ tõnd taoore la fo meng yals marsã tɩ m togs Soaala-Wẽnd gomde tɩ f kelge!»" 
1Samuel10:1 A Samwɛl rɩka kaam tʋko, n pʋdg a Sol zugu, n mobg-a, n yeele: «Ka Naaba-Wẽnd n taag foom ne naam kaam, tɩ f yɩ a Israyɛl naab bɩ? Yaa foo n na n fãag Soaala pʋɩɩrã a bɛɛba sẽn gũbg-a wã nusẽ." 
1Samuel10:2 Dũnna, fo sã n bas maam n looge, fo na n sega dapa a yiibu, a Rasɛl yaooga sɛɛga, a Bẽnzame soolma toaagẽ, b na n yeel-f lame: ‹Bõeensã fo sẽn da kẽnge n na n tɩ bao wã, yãeeme la ade, marsã, f ba ka le tagsd bõeensã yell ye, b bʋʋda fo poorẽ n yetẽ: m biiga yelle na n yɩɩ wãna?›" 
1Samuel10:3 Fo na n yii be, n yõsg n ta taoore, Tabor tɩɩg ning sẽn wẽnd kʋka tẽngre, bee, fo na n sega dapa a tã sẽn dabd Betɛl, n na n tɩ pʋʋs Wẽnd, t'a yembre tʋk bulli a tã, a yembre bur a tã, a yembr rãam ne ko-waooga." 
1Samuel10:4 B na n soka foom f keelem, n yãk bur a yiib n kõ-fo, tɩ fo reeg-ba f nusẽ." 
1Samuel10:5 F sã n yõsg be, f na n taa Wẽnd tãnga, Filisti rãmba sẽn ning b toaaga kugra zĩig ningã. Tẽnga pʋgẽ fo na n sega bãngdba sẽn yit maoonga zĩigẽ n watẽ, tɩ neb lʋɩ b taoore ne kʋnde la gãngãoog, la wɩɩs la pɛndga, tɩ bãmb meng wɩlemd bãngr goama." 
1Samuel10:6 Wẽnd Pãng na n siga f zugu, tɩ fo lagem bãmba, n wɩlem bãngr goama la fo na n teemame, n paam zʋg a to." 
1Samuel10:7 Fo sã wa yãe tɩ makr kãens fãa taasame, bɩ f maan f sẽn tog n maan bũmb ningã, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd bee ne foom. Dẽ poore fo na n denga maam n kẽng Gilgal," 
1Samuel10:8 la ade mam na n wa bʋʋga foom, n kʋ bark pʋʋsg la yũ-nood maando. Fo na n yalsa dasma a yopoe tɩ m yaool n wa f nengẽ n wilg-f f sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga.»" 
1Samuel10:9 A Sol sẽn wẽnemd bala, t'a na n loog n bas a Samwɛl, Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-a-la zʋg a to. Yɛla fãa pidsa badaare." 
1Samuel10:10 A Sol sẽn ta Gibea, la bãngdb kʋʋngo sẽn sũ taaba n wa seg-a; la Naaba-Wẽnd pãng sig-a lame, a yama fʋsga a yĩngã t'a sɩng bãngr goam wɩlengo, bãmb sʋka." 
1Samuel10:11 Sẽn da mi-b yẽnda al daar zãrã sẽn mik t'a bee bãngdb sʋka n gomd bãngr goama, ra yetame: «Yaa bõe n paam a Kis biigã? A Sol me lebga bãngd laa?»" 
1Samuel10:12 Ned a ye n zĩnd be n sãbse: «Bãmba tara ba meng bɩ?» Yaa rẽ me tɛk la neba sɩng n wẽed baobg n sogsd taaba: «A Sol me lebga bãngd laa?» 
1Samuel10:13 A sẽn wa n paam t'a yama leb a yĩnsẽ, a Sol kẽnga maoonga zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel10:14 A ba-bila soka yẽnda ne a sõgna: «Yãmb da kẽnga ye?» Tɩ b leoke: «D ra kẽnga bõeens baoobo. Tõnd ka yãe bũmb ye, yaa rẽ la d kẽng a Samwɛl nengẽ.»" 
1Samuel10:15 A Sol ba-bila yeel-a lame: «Togs maam a Samwɛl sẽn yeel yãmb bũmb ninga.» 
1Samuel10:16 A Sol leoka a ba-bilã: «A wilga tõnd bala tɩ bõeensã yãeeme.» A pa saag n togs a Samwɛl sẽn yeel bũmb ning naama poorẽ ye. 
1Samuel10:17 A Samwɛl boola neba fãa tɩ b tigim taaba, Mispa, la a yeela Israyɛl kambã:" 
1Samuel10:18 «A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛga: ‹Maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga, n fãag yãmb Ezipt rãmb nusẽ, la dĩm dãmb fãa sẽn da wẽoogd yãmba nusẽ.›" 
1Samuel10:19 La rũnna yãmb zãgsda y Wẽnnaama, sẽn yols yãmb ne bãas buud fãa, la namsgã buud fãa, la yãmb yet-b lame: ‹Ning dĩm d sʋka.› Marsã, wa-y Soaala-Wẽnd taoor ka, roogo fãa ne a neba, sak fãa ne a neba.»" 
1Samuel10:20 A Samwɛl kɩtame t'a Israyɛl sagsa kolge, la a sẽn sok Soaala-Wẽnde, b teesa a Bẽnzame saka." 
1Samuel10:21 A Samwɛl kɩtame t'a Bẽnzame sak kolge, yir woo yiri, la yaa a Matri yiri la b tees yã. Dẽ poore, yaa a Kis biiga a Sol la b yãk yã. B bao-a lame, la b pa yãend-a ye." 
1Samuel10:22 Tɩ b le sok Soaala-Wẽnde: «Ned a to waa ka bɩ?» Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leoke: «Ad-a Sol, a soonda teeda zĩigẽ!»" 
1Samuel10:23 Tɩ b zoe n tɩ yiis-a be, t'a wa yals neba sʋka. A ra yɩɩda bãmb fãa ne zug woglem. Sẽn da taa a bãok ka ye." 
1Samuel10:24 A Samwɛl yeela neba fãa: «Yãmb yãee Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn tũus a soaba bɩ? Nebã fãa sʋka, a ka tar a to ye.» La neba fãa zẽka b koɛɛg n kaase n yetẽ: «Wẽnd na wogl dĩma yõore!»" 
1Samuel10:25 A Samwɛl wilga neba, naama dɩɩb sẽn na n yɩ a soaba; la a gʋlsa rẽnda sebr a ye pʋgẽ n tɩ rɩgl Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
1Samuel10:26 A Sol me kula a yiri Gibea: la gãndaado, Wẽnnaam sẽn segl b rãmb sũya, yãag-a lame." 
1Samuel10:27 La nin-yaals me yaool n zĩnda be n yeele: «Bõe? Yão n na n fãag tõnd bɩ?» La b paoog-a lame: b ka wa ne b kũun n pʋʋs-a ye, la a Sol maana wala pa zab-a ye." 
1Samuel11:1 Amonitsa dĩm, a Naas, yiisa tãpo, n wa gũbg Yabɛs, Galaad tẽnga. Yabɛs rãmba yeela a Naas: «Yõg zood ne tõndo, tɩ d na sak foom.»" 
1Samuel11:2 La a Naas, Amonitga, leok-b lame: «Mam na yõg zood ne yãmb, la rẽnd tɩ m deng n leo yãmb ned kamb fãa rɩtg nifu. M data woto n ning a Israyɛl zãng fãa yãnde.»" 
1Samuel11:3 Yabɛs nin-kẽemba leok-a lame: «Kõ-d dasem a yopoe, tɩ d tʋm neb Israyɛl soolma fãa pʋgẽ, la ned ba ye sã n ka wa sõng-do, d na rɩk d mens n kɩs foom.»" 
1Samuel11:4 Sẽn tʋʋm b rãmba taa Gibea, a Sol sẽn da be tẽng ningã, n togs tɩ neba wʋm. La neba fãa sɩnga yãbre." 
1Samuel11:5 La ade, a Sol da yi-la a pʋʋgẽ n pʋgd a niis n watẽ, la a sokame: «Bõe n tar nebã tɩ b yãbda?» Tɩ b togs-a Yabɛs rãmba sẽn yeel koɛɛg ningã. A Sol sẽn wʋm rẽndã," 
1Samuel11:6 Soaala-Wẽnd pids-a-la ne raoodo, t'a sũura sɩng kɛɛbo." 
1Samuel11:7 A yãka niis a yiibu, n bees ba, n tʋm neb Israyɛl tẽnsa fãa tɩ b tɩ yeele: «Sẽn pa boba zabre ne a Sol la a Samwɛl, yaa woto la b na n bees a soab niisi!» Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ rabeem kãseng yõk nebã, tɩ b fãa gill yi wa nin-yende." 
1Samuel11:8 A Sol sõda neba Bezɛk: a Israyɛl kamba sõor da yaa tus kobs-tã, a Zɩɩda rapã, tus pis-tã." 
1Samuel11:9 La a yeela b sẽn da tʋm b rãmbã: «Yeel-y Galaad Yabɛs tẽng rãmba: beoogo, wĩndga sã n wa zẽke n zabdẽ, y na n paama sõngre.» B sẽn leb b yiri, b taasa koɛɛgã Yabɛs rãmba, tɩ b sũur yɩ noogo." 
1Samuel11:10 Yabɛs rãmba yeela a Naas: «Beoogo, tõnd na n yi n sega yãmba, la y na n maana y sẽn dat bũmb ninga ne-do.»" 
1Samuel11:11 Vẽkembeoogo, a Sol welga nebã zĩis a tã. Yibeoog pĩnda, b tɩ kẽe Amonitsã tãb-sikã, n zab ne-ba, al tɩ ta wĩnto-sʋka. Sẽn põs-ba sẽegame. Neb a yiib meng pa tõog n pa ne taab ye." 
1Samuel11:12 Nebã yeela a Samwɛl: «Ãnd n da yet t'a Sol kõn dɩ naam tõnd zugu? Bɩ y yõg nin-bãmb n kõ-d ka, tɩ d kʋ-ba!»" 
1Samuel11:13 La a Sol yeelame: «B kõn kʋ ned ba a ye dũnna daara ye, tɩ rũnna Soaala-Wẽnd fãaga a Israyɛl.»" 
1Samuel11:14 A Samwɛl yeela nebã: «Wa-y tɩ kẽng Gilgal, n tɩ yug naama n paase.»" 
1Samuel11:15 A Israyɛl kamba fãa kẽnga Gilgal, b zaondga a Sol a naam goeel zug, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, n yet t'a yɩ b dĩma. Beene, b kʋʋ maando, laafi yĩnga la be me, a Sol ne Israyɛl gill maana kibs kãsenga." 
1Samuel12:1 A Samwɛl yeela a Israyɛl kamba fãa: «Ade, mam kelga yãmb koɛɛga, m maana y sẽn yeel-m bũmb ning fãa la m ninga dĩm yãmb sʋka." 
1Samuel12:2 Marsã, ad-y yaa dĩm ninga sẽn na n lʋɩ-a yãmb taoora la woto! Sã n ya maam yẽ, mam lebga nin-kẽema, m zug pelgame, la m kamba bee ne yãmba." 
1Samuel12:3 Mam kẽna yãmb taoore, al m yãadmẽ n ta rũnna. Ad ma! Togs-y-ma, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, la b sẽn sõog a soab naam kaama taoore: ãnda la m yẽeg n deeg a naafo, n deeg a bõanga? Ãnda la m weoog yã, la ãnd soab la m tall toogo? Ãnda nengẽ la m deeg ligdi n mum m nini n kedb bʋʋdo? M na lebs-y y ligdi.»" 
1Samuel12:4 Neba leokame: «Ayo! Fo ka maan-d pãng ye, fo ka tall tõnd toog ye, fo ka reeg kũun ned ba a ye nugẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel12:5 T'a Samwɛl le yeel-ba: «Bɩ y wẽen, dũnna daarã, Soaala taoore la kaama sẽn pʋdg a soab zuga taoore, tɩ yãmb ka yãend baa fɩ m nugẽ ye.» Tɩ neba leoke: «D wẽendame!»" 
1Samuel12:6 A Samwɛl yeela nebã: «Ad-y y wẽena ne Naaba-Wẽnd ning sẽn wilg b pãng ne a Moyiiz la a Aarõ la sẽn yiis y yaab rãmb Ezipt tẽnga! 
1Samuel12:7 Marsã kolg-y ka tɩ m paalg-y bʋʋdo, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, ne yel-sõma niynsa fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maan yãmb ne y saam-dãmba yĩnga." 
1Samuel12:8 A Zakoob sẽn wa Ezipt tẽnga, Ezipt rãmb namsa y ba rãmba la b kelma Naaba-Wẽnde. B tʋma a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ tɩ b tɩ yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga, n tall-ba n wa zĩndig zĩ-kãnga." 
1Samuel12:9 La bãmb yĩma Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, tɩ b na n bas ba tɩ b lʋɩ, Asor zabrẽ, dĩm a Sisera nugẽ, la b lʋɩ Filisti rãmba la Moab dĩma sẽn kaoog zabre ne bãmb nusẽ." 
1Samuel12:10 B kelma Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n yetẽ: ‹Tõnd beegame, tõnd basa Soaala-Wẽnd n nok a Baal la Astarte rãmba. Marsã, fãag-y tõndo d bɛɛb nusẽ tɩ tõnd na waoog yãmba.›" 
1Samuel12:11 La b tʋma a Yerubaal, a Bedã, a Zɛfte la a Samwɛl n paam n fãag yãmb y bɛɛba sẽn da gũbg yãmba nusẽ, tɩ y zĩnd b sẽn kõ-y tẽng ninga pʋg ne laafi." 
1Samuel12:12 La yãmb sẽn yãe t'a Naas, Amonitsa dĩma, yiisa tãpo, n wat n na n zab ne yãmba, yãmb yeela maam: ‹Ad-y tõnd me rata dĩma sẽn na n dɩ naam d zugu.› Naaba-Wẽnd n yaool n ya yãmb dĩma." 
1Samuel12:13 Ad-y dĩm ninga yãmb sẽn tũusi, y sẽn kose, ad-y dĩm ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ yã." 
1Samuel12:14 Yãmb sã n zoet Soaalã, n sakd bãmba, la y reegd b koɛɛga," 
1Samuel12:15 yãmb sã n pa kɩɩsd b gomde, n kell n mobg bãmba, yãmb ne y dĩma yam na kẽ Wẽnnaam. La yãmb sã n pa sakd b koɛɛga, yãmb sã n kɩɩsd b gomde, b nug na n sɩbga yãmba, wala b sẽn sɩbg y saam-dãmbã." 
1Samuel12:16 Le yals-y ka n ges bõn-bãnd ninga Soaala sẽn na n maan tɩ y nif yãende. 
1Samuel12:17 Marsã ka saas wẽnd ye, yaa alkam kẽebg wakato. Mam na n pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnde, la b na tʋma sa-tãse la saaga. Bɩ y bãnge la y gese, tɩ y konga wʋsgo, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, y sẽn kos tɩ b kõ yãmb dĩma.»" 
1Samuel12:18 A Samwɛl pʋʋsame la badaar bala, Soaala-Wẽnd tʋma sa-tãse, la saaga. Naaba-Wẽnd ne a Samwɛl rabeem kãseng kẽe neba fãa." 
1Samuel12:19 La b fãa yeela a Samwɛl: «Pʋʋs Naaba-Wẽnd n kõ f yemsã, tɩ b ra ki ye, tɩ tõnd sẽn kos tɩ b kõ-d dĩma, d maana yel-wẽnde, n paas yel-wẽn a taaba.» A Samwɛl yeela neba fãa:" 
1Samuel12:20 «Da zoe-y rabeem ye! Yãmb sɩd maana yel-wẽnde; la da bʋdg-y moog n bas Naaba-Wẽnd ye, la sak-y-ba ne y sũur fãa." 
1Samuel12:21 Da bas-y bãmb tũudem ye, tɩ sã n pa rẽ, yãmb na n zoe n pʋga bõn-yood sẽn ka võore, sẽn kõn zĩnd yõod yãmb yĩnga, la sẽn kõn fãag yãmba, tɩ b yaa wẽn-faado." 
1Samuel12:22 Naaba-Wẽnd kõn daag b buud n bas tɩ rẽ wa ne b yʋ-sãang ye. Bãmb n tũus yãmb b sũurẽ, n maan b buudu." 
1Samuel12:23 La Soaala-Wẽnd na gũ maam, tɩ m da beeg-ba n bas pʋʋsgo yãmb yĩng ye, mam na n zãmsa yãmb sor sẽn ya neere la tɩrga." 
1Samuel12:24 Yãmb yee n zoe Soaala bala, sak-y bãmb daar fãa ne y sũur fãa; la ges-y b pãngã sẽn maand bũmb ninga fãa yãmb sʋka." 
1Samuel12:25 La yãmb sã n maan wẽnga, yãmb na n kiime yãmba ne y dĩmã.»" 
1Samuel13:1 A Sol wa n lebga dĩm n sɩng a naam dɩɩb Israyɛl kamb zugu; a naama yʋʋmd a yiib soaba," 
1Samuel13:2 a tũusa tãb-biis tus a tã, Israyɛl neba sʋka: tus a yiibu n da be ne-a, Mikmas tẽnga la Betɛl tãng zugu; neb tusri n da be ne a Zonatã, Gibea tẽnga, Bẽnzame soolmẽ. A Sol basa sẽn ketã, tɩ ned kam fãa leb a yiri." 
1Samuel13:3 Daar a ye, a Zonatã luba Filisti rãmba sẽn da ning komber ning Gibea wã. Neba waa n bãnga yellã. A Sol kɩtame tɩ b peeb bargo a soolma fãa pʋgẽ, n yet tɩ b sõng tɩ tẽnga kẽedba, Ebre rãmba fãa wʋm a bʋʋrã." 
1Samuel13:4 Sɩda, kibarã taa Israyɛl gilli. B bãngame t'a Sol kʋʋ Filisti rãmb kombere, tɩ b yik n maand beem ne a Israyɛl. Woto wã neba fãa sũ taaba a Sol poorẽ, Gilgal tẽnga." 
1Samuel13:5 Filisti rãmba me sũu taaba n na n tak zab ne a Israyɛl. B da tara bilim-bilm tus pis-tã, wed-dʋʋdb tus a yoobe; tãb-biisa sõor da zema mogra noor bĩisri. B waa n siga Mikmas, Bɛt-Aven yaanga." 
1Samuel13:6 A Israyɛl mikame tɩ na n yɩɩ yell ne-a. Bɛɛba da rɩdgda wʋsgo tɩ b zoe n tɩ soond tãmsẽ, bogdẽ, pĩisẽ, gasd pʋgẽ solgr zĩisẽ la ko-bao pʋsẽ." 
1Samuel13:7 Neb kẽer me rʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n kẽng Gad la Galaad soolmẽ. A Sol da ket n bee Gilgal, la neba fãa sẽn da be ne-a wã da rigdame." 
1Samuel13:8 A gũu rasma a yopoe, n zems a Samwɛl sẽn bas-a daarã; a Samwɛl ka wa Gilgal ye tɩ neba fãa sẽeg n basd a Sol." 
1Samuel13:9 T'a Sol yeele: «Wa-y ne yũ-noog maoongã la maan-dɩtgã.» A kʋʋ maandã. 
1Samuel13:10 A Sol sẽn kʋ yũ-noog maoongo n sɛ, la a Samwɛl sẽn wẽneg n wa. A Sol yi n seg-a lame n na n pʋʋs-a." 
1Samuel13:11 A Samwɛl sokame: «Fo maana bõe?» A Sol leokame: «Mam sẽn wa n yãe tɩ neba sẽegdame, n basd maama, tɩ yãmb me pa watã, tɩ wakata yaool n loogã, tɩ Filisti rãmba me sũ taab Mikmasã," 
1Samuel13:12 mam yeelame: ‹Filisti rãmba na n wa paam-m-la Gilgal tɩ m nan pa sigs Naaba-Wẽnd sũur ye.› Wakat kãng la mam me keng m pelga, n kʋ maoongo.»" 
1Samuel13:13 A Samwɛl yeela a Sol: «Fo maana gãeemdo! Fo ka tũ Soaala-Wẽnnaam, sẽn da kõ-f noor ninga ye. Soaala-Wẽnd da na n paasa f naam pãng tɩ f soogẽ Israyɛl daar fãa." 
1Samuel13:14 Marsã, f kõn kaoos f naama zaoorẽ ye. Naaba-Wẽnd bao-la b sũur neda, n tũus-a, t'a na n yɩ b buuda naaba, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kõo foo noore, la fo ka reeg ye.»" 
1Samuel13:15 La a Samwɛl yika Gilgal n kẽng Gibea, a Bẽnzame soolmẽ. A Sol sõda neba sẽn kell ne-a wã: neb kobs-yoobe." 
1Samuel13:16 A Sol ne a biiga Zonatã la a neba da bee Gibea, a Bẽnzame soolmẽ, tɩ Filisti rãmba ra be Mikmas." 
1Samuel13:17 Daar a ye, tãb-biis sẽn pid ne raoodo, yii Filisti rãmba sikẽ n welg sags a tãabo. Sak a ye rɩka Ofra sore, Sual tẽnga." 
1Samuel13:18 A yiib soaba rɩka Bɛt-Orõ sore, t'a tãab soaba tũud tãng ning sẽn luga Kata bãooga noorẽ, sẽn dabd zĩ pɛɛlẽ." 
1Samuel13:19 Sẽeb da ka le ket Israyɛl tẽn-tõra ye, tɩ Filisti rãmba ra kõ b meng yam n yeele: «D tog n maoome tɩ Israyɛl kamba ra tõog n kud sʋʋs la kãn ye.»" 
1Samuel13:20 Woto Israyɛl neba gilli ra kẽnda Filisti rãmba nengẽ, n na n saas wãka, lare, kutoaaga bɩ kãnde." 
1Samuel13:21 F wata ne wakɩ koeems a yiibu f sã n dat saas wãgs a tã, bɩ kutoos a tã, bɩ kõs a tã, bɩ lay a tã, bɩ pɛɛm niyns sẽn tar n tikd nag-koodsã a tãabo." 
1Samuel13:22 Woto wã Mikmas zabra daar taame, tɩ tãb-biisa fãa sẽn da be-b ne a Sol la a Zonatã ra pa tar sʋʋga bɩ kãnd ye. A Sol ne a biiga Zonatã bala la b da paam n kõ." 
1Samuel13:23 Filisti rãmba tãb-biis sull a ye wa n yiime n tees Mikmas. 
1Samuel14:1 Daar a ye, a Sol biiga, a Zonatã, yeela a sõgen ninga sẽn da tʋkda yẽ zab-teedã: «Wa tɩ d loog n ta Filisti rãmba sẽn wẽ b tãb-sika zĩig ningã.» A yaool n ka togs a ba ye." 
1Samuel14:2 A Sol da yɛsa Migrõ, tẽng sẽn ya toaag ne Gibea, tɩɩg a ye sẽn womd a biis wa poaloanga tẽngre. Neba da tigma taab beene ne-a, b da taa dap kobs-yoobe." 
1Samuel14:3 Yaa a Ayitub biiga a Ayiya, a Yikabod ba-biiga, a Pinas biiga, la Soaala maan-kʋʋd a Eli sẽn da be Silo wã yagenga, yaa yẽ n da bob bag-teedã n sokd Soaalã. Neba ka bãng t'a Zonatã kẽnga ni ye." 
1Samuel14:4 A Zonatã da rɩka so sẽkã n na n ta bɛɛba sikã. A tũu pĩ-sɩlens a yiib sʋka. Pĩig a ye yʋʋr da boondame t'a Bosɛs t'a to wã boond tɩ Sene. 
1Samuel14:5 Pĩig a ye wã da bee goabga n teesd Mikmas, tɩ pĩig a to wã be dɩtgo n teesd Gibea." 
1Samuel14:6 A Zonatã yeela a sõgna sẽn da tʋkd a zab-teedã: «Wa tɩ d loog n ta nin-dẽgda nengẽ, daare, Soaala na maan bũmb n sõng-do, tɩ bũmb pa tõe n gɩdg Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b maan daood ne neb wʋsgo bɩ ne neb a yiib bal ye.»" 
1Samuel14:7 Sõgna sẽn tʋkd a zab-teedã leokame: «Maan-y wa y sẽn date. Kẽng-y, m tũuda y sẽn yeele.»" 
1Samuel14:8 A Zonatã yeelame: «Ade, d kẽnd n teesda bɛɛbã marsã la d sẽn lik d mensã, b na n yãend-d lame." 
1Samuel14:9 B sã n yeel tõndo: ‹Yaas-y be tɩ d wa!› D yalsda zĩ yɛnga n gũ-ba. 
1Samuel14:10 La b sã n yeele: ‹Kolg-y!› D bʋʋgd-b lame, wala d tara kaset tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd dɩk-b lame n sagl d nusẽ.»" 
1Samuel14:11 Woto wã b lika b mense tɩ Filisti rãmba tõog n yãend-ba. Filisti rãmba yeelame: «Ges-y Ebre rãmb sẽn pusd bogdẽ n yit b sẽn da solgẽ.» 
1Samuel14:12 Filisti rãmba yeela a Zonatã ne a zab-teeda tʋkda: «Kolg-y tɩ d tara bũmb n na n wilg yã.» T'a Zonatã na n yeel sẽn zɩta a teedã: «Pʋg maam, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ning-b la a Israyɛl nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel14:13 A Zonatã vũname n dʋ, t'a sõgna pʋgd a poore. Filisti rãmba da rʋʋgda a Zonatã taoore, t'a sõgna pʋgd n baasd-b." 
1Samuel14:14 Zĩig pʋgẽ bala, tɩ vɩʋʋga ka yɩɩd nag-koods a yi sẽn tõe n ko daar a ye pʋɩ-sʋk ye, a Zonatã ne a sõgna kʋʋ neb pisi." 
1Samuel14:15 Dabeem kẽe tãb-sikã, n kẽ tãb-biisa la neba fãa sẽn da pẽ-b be. Filisti neba sẽn da ya-b gũudba, b sẽn da teeg neb niyns n na n maan raooda, bãmb fãa sɩnga rigbu. N paas me tẽnga meng sɩnga miuungu, la rẽ kẽes-b-la rabeem kãsenga, lebga zũnd-zãnde." 
1Samuel14:16 A Sol da ninga gũudba Gibea, sẽn be a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ. Gũudba yãeeme tɩ Filisti tãb-sika yaa zũnd-zãnde. Ned kam fãa zoet n teesa a sẽn datẽ." 
1Samuel14:17 Dẽ la a Sol yeel sẽn da be-b ne-a wã: «Bool-y yʋya n bãng neb niyns sẽn ka be-b tõnd sʋka.» B boola yʋya la b mikame t'a Zonatã ne a sõgna n ka be. 
1Samuel14:18 Rẽ la a Sol yeel a Aya: «Kolg ne kuga walsa koglgã.» Baraare, koglga ra be-la a Israyɛl tãb-sikẽ." 
1Samuel14:19 A Sol da ket n gomda ne maan-kʋʋdã, la bʋrgã ra yãngd n paasda Filisti rãmba sikẽ. A Sol yeela maan-kʋʋdã: «Da le nams n sok Soaala-Wẽnd ye!»" 
1Samuel14:20 A Sol ne tãb-biisa fãa sẽn da be ne yẽnda wã tigma taaba, la b taa zabra zĩigẽ. Filisti rãmba ra lɛɛg n kẽe taaba tɩ yaa sʋʋg pa yɩɩd m sʋʋga, yaa ka mi sẽn ya-la." 
1Samuel14:21 Ebre rãmba sẽn da sõngd Filisti rãmb la sẽn da yãag-b bãmb zabrẽ wã, b fãa bas-b lame, n wa naag Israyɛl rãmbã, n naag ne a Sol la a Zonatã." 
1Samuel14:22 Israyɛl kamb niyns fãa sẽn da solg-b Efrayim tãnga zugu, bãmb me sẽn wʋm tɩ Filisti rãmba ra zoetame, pʋg-b lame tɩ ya zabr ne zabr bala." 
1Samuel14:23 Badaare, Naaba-Wẽnd sõnga a Israyɛl t'a tõog a bɛɛbã, Zabra sãag n ta Bɛt-Orõ la sẽn loog be fãa." 
1Samuel14:24 Badaare toog wʋma a Israyɛl, t'a Sol da kãaba woto: «Wẽnd na sãam ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a dɩɩbo tɩ zĩig nan pa sobge, tɩ m nan pa zab ne bɛɛbã n sɛ ye.» La ned ba a ye ra pa tol n dɩ rɩɩb buud ye." 
1Samuel14:25 Neba ra waa n paam n kẽe tʋgrã. Mik tɩɩs n da bas b sũm tɩ rʋʋge la sũma ra yaa sɩɩd-sɩɩdo. 
1Samuel14:26 Dɩlla neba sẽn kẽ tʋgrã b tuka bõn-sɩɩdã. Neba pa sak n yãk n lemb ye; b ra zoeta kãabga na n wa tũ-ba. 
1Samuel14:27 La a Zonatã da pa wʋm a ba wã sẽn da kos a nebã no-loeera ye. A rɩka rasaar ning sẽn da be a nugẽ n tẽk sɩɩdã n lembe la a nenga vẽnegame. 
1Samuel14:28 La ned n waa n yeel-a: «F ba wẽename n kãab tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a bũmb rũnna daarã, bɩ Wẽnd yãk a soab barka.» Kom n yaool n da kʋʋd nebã." 
1Samuel14:29 A Zonatã leokame: «M ba waa ne tẽng wãabo. Ad-m sẽn lemb sɩɩd bilf bala tɩ m neng zoe n yẽege. 
1Samuel14:30 Neba sã n da dɩ b sẽn fã b bɛɛba nusẽ wã, Filisti rãmba tõogr kõn yɩẽ kãsenga n yɩɩge?»" 
1Samuel14:31 Badaare, b tõoga Filisti rãmba, al Mikmas n ta Ayalõ. Neba ra yɛɛ zãng fas." 
1Samuel14:32 Neba zɛɛ bɛɛba sẽn da so wã, rũm-bõonego, lolse, nag-bi. B kood-b-la tẽng bala, la b yalsa zɩɩma sẽn daaga zug n wãb nemdã." 
1Samuel14:33 La kibarã taa a Sol: «Neba bɛɛga Naaba-Wẽnde, b dɩta bũmb ne a zɩɩm, n pa kodg ye.» La a yeelame: «Yãmb beegame! Tall-y kug bedre n wa ka!»" 
1Samuel14:34 A Sol paasame: «Gilg-y n wilg neba tɩ ned fãa tall a naafo bɩ a pesgo n wa mam nengẽ. Y na n kʋ-b lame n wãb ka la y ka na n dɩ zɩɩm sɛɛgẽ n sãam Soaala-Wẽnd sũur ye.» Ned kam fãa talla a sẽn tare n wa badaar yʋngo tɩ b kʋ zĩ-kãnga, kugra zugu." 
1Samuel14:35 Yaa woto la a Sol me maan-kugr Soaala yĩnga. Dẽ n yɩɩ a pipi maan-kugri. 
1Samuel14:36 A Sol yeelame: «D na n yika yʋngo n dig Filisti rãmba, n zɛ b teedã n tãag zĩig yẽegre; d kõn bas ned ba a ye t'a põs ye.» Neba leok-a lame: «Maan sẽn ta fo yam.» La maan-kʋʋda yeelame: «D kolg n sok Wẽnde, kaalẽ bala.»" 
1Samuel14:37 A Sol soka Wẽnde: «M tõe n diga Filisti rãmba bɩ? Y na n ning-b la Israyɛl kamba nugẽ bɩ?» La Soaala-Wẽnd pa leok-a badaar ye. 
1Samuel14:38 La a Sol yeelame: «Kolg-y ka, yãmb fãa, Israyɛl kãsem-dãmba! Tags-y neere, la y wilg rũnna beegrã sẽn yɩ bũmb ning taki." 
1Samuel14:39 Ne Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn vɩ la b fãagd a Israyɛl, ba sã yaa m biiga a Zonatã, n maan yellã, sɩda, a na ki!» Buuda sʋka, ned ba a ye pa tõog n leok-a ye." 
1Samuel14:40 Dẽ la a Sol yeel a Israyɛl gilli: «Yãmb ye n yalse kɩrẽng a ye, tɩ maam me ne m biig, a Zonatã, yalsa kɩrẽng a to.» La neba leoka a Sol: «Maan sẽn ta fo yam bala.»" 
1Samuel14:41 A Sol yaool n yeelame: «Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, togs-y d vẽenega la zãnga.» Poeera lʋɩ-la a Sol ne a Zonatã zugu, neb a taaba põsame." 
1Samuel14:42 A Sol yeelame: «Poees-y maam ne m biig a Zonatã.» Poeera lʋɩ-la a Zonatã zugu. 
1Samuel14:43 A Sol yeela a Zonatã: «Togs maam fo sẽn maane.» A Zonatã leokame: «Mam dɩka dasaar ning sẽn da be m nugẽ, n tẽk sɩɩdo n lembe, sã n ya kũum me, m sakame.»" 
1Samuel14:44 A Sol yeelame: «Wẽnd na sɩbg-m, la b le sɩbg-m n bãge fo sã n pa ki, Zonatã!»" 
1Samuel14:45 La neba yeela a Sol: «A Zonatã na ki sɩda, yẽnda sẽn kɩt tɩ Israyɛl tõog a bɛɛbã ne tõogr kãsengã? Kõn yɩ yel-beedo? Ne Wẽnde, a Zonatã zoobg a ye meng kõn lʋɩ tẽng ye, t'a sẽn maan fãa rũnna, tũu ne Soaala-Wẽnd sõngre. La yɩɩ woto la neba fãag a Zonatã, tɩ b pa kʋ-a ye.»" 
1Samuel14:46 A Sol basa Filisti rãmba pʋgbo, tɩ Filisti rãmba me leb b tẽngẽ." 
1Samuel14:47 A Sol rɩɩ naam Israyɛl, la a zaba zĩig zãnga ne a bɛɛba: Moabitse, Amonitse, Edomitse, Soba dĩma, la ne Filisti rãmba. A sẽn da tudẽ fãa, a ra tõogda a bɛɛbã." 
1Samuel14:48 A tʋma raood tʋʋma, n zab n tõog Amalesitse la a fãaga a Israyɛl ne bɛɛb niyns sẽn da fãad-b yẽnda." 
1Samuel14:49 A Sol kamba la a Zonatã, a Yiswi, la a Malkisuwa. A kom-pugli a yiibã yɩ-la a Merab, kãsma la a Mikal, yao wã." 
1Samuel14:50 A Sol paga yʋʋr da ya Ayinoam, a Ayimaas biiga. A tãnsoaba yʋʋr da boondame t'a Abnɛr, a Nɛr biiga, a Sol ba-bila." 
1Samuel14:51 A Sol ba, a Kis, la a Nɛr ba, a Abnɛr, da yaa a Abiyɛl kamba." 
1Samuel14:52 A Sol talla zabre woo zabre ne Filisti rãmba. A Sol sã n da yãe nin-tɩrg la sũur soaba, a ra maanda zood ne-a, t'a lebg a tãb-biiga." 
1Samuel15:1 Wẽnd kãnga, a Samwɛl yeela a Sol: «Yaa maam la Naaba-Wẽnd tʋm yã tɩ m wa pʋdg f zugu naam kaam, tɩ f yɩ b buud a Israyɛl dĩma, kelg Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet bũmb ning marsã." 
1Samuel15:2 Ad Soaala sẽn gomde, a Israyɛl tãb-biisa Wẽnd sẽn yete: ‹Mam na n soka a Amalɛk sẽn sɩng tɩ bũmb ninga t'a gɩdg a Israyɛl sore a sẽn waa n yi Ezipt tẽnga n wat ka." 
1Samuel15:3 Marsã, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ tak zabr ne a Amalɛk. F tog n wẽename tɩ f kõn deeg a bũmb ba a ye n soog ye. Da bas-a ye! F na n kʋʋ fãa, pagba, rapa, kom-peels la kom-kɩdse, niis la la piisi, yʋgma la bõeense.› »" 
1Samuel15:4 A Sol boola neba fãa, n sõd-b Telɛm tẽnga. Tãb-biisa yɩɩ tus bobs-yi. A Zɩɩda neba yɩɩ tus piiga." 
1Samuel15:5 A Sol sẽn ta Amalɛk rãmb tẽngẽ, a soos n gãnega tãpo kʋɩl bɛɛg noorẽ." 
1Samuel15:6 A yeela Kenitsã: «Bɩ y loog n yi a Amalɛk sʋka, bɩ y serg n bas-a, tɩ m da wa lagem yãmb ne bãmb n sãam ye, tɩ yãmb maana a Israyɛl kamb fãa neere, b sẽn wa n yit Ezipt n watẽ.» La Kenitsa serg n basa a Amalɛk." 
1Samuel15:7 A Sol zaba ne a Amalɛk, sẽn sɩng Avila, n tãag Sur sẽn tot ne Ezipt, yaanga." 
1Samuel15:8 B yõka Amalesitsa dĩma, a Agag, vɩɩga. B kãabame tɩ ned ba a ye kõn põs ye la b kood-b la fãa ne sʋʋse." 
1Samuel15:9 A Sol ne a neba yaool n basa vɩɩse a Agag, n paas rũms niyns sẽn ya-b sõma, bɛd la bõonese, yʋʋmd yɛng pe-bi. B pa sak tɩ kãab beeda rɩ bãmb ye. Yɩɩ sẽn ka sõmb la sẽn ka yõodã bala la b yõog bugum." 
1Samuel15:10 Wẽnd kãnga Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne a Samwɛl, b yeel-a lame:" 
1Samuel15:11 «M sẽn kɩt t'a Sol lebg dĩma ka le noom maam ye, t'a wẽnemdame n bas maam, la a pa sakd n deeg m noor ye.» A Samwɛl sũura sãama ali t'a yãbe ne Soaala-Wẽnd, yʋng kãnga." 
1Samuel15:12 A Samwɛl sãda beoogo n na n tɩ seg a Sol. La b waa n yeel-a lame: «A Sol sẽn ta Karmɛl, a maana yʋ-baoore, n me bũmb be, la a sãag n diga taoore, a taa Gilgal.»" 
1Samuel15:13 A Samwɛl babsa a Sol. La a sẽn ta a nengẽ, a Sol yeel-a lame: «Wẽnd sudg y zug barka! M sakame n deeg Soaala gomde.»" 
1Samuel15:14 A Samwɛl wẽneg n sok-a lame: «La yaa bõe rũmsi, wa piis la niis, n tar yãbre tɩ lʋɩt m tʋbrẽ?»" 
1Samuel15:15 A Sol yeelame: «B tall-b-la Amalɛk rãmba tẽngẽ n wa ka, tɩ neba keesa pe-sõma wã la nag-sõma wã n na n kʋ maoongo n kõ Soaala, fo Wẽnnaama; sẽn keta fãa, tõnd kʋ-b lame.»" 
1Samuel15:16 Dẽ la a Samwɛl yeel a Sol: «Yals ka tɩ m togs-f Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-m bũmb ninga yʋngẽ.» T'a Sol yeele: «Bɩ y togse!» 
1Samuel15:17 A Samwɛl yeelame: «Fo sẽn dag n ya wa zaalem f meng nifẽ, fo ka lebg a Israyɛl sagsã naab bɩ? Soaala-Wẽnd ka pʋdg f zug naam kaam, tɩ f yɩ a Israyɛl dĩm bɩ?" 
1Samuel15:18 B tʋma foom, n yeel-fo: ‹Aya! Wẽen tɩ f kõn kees Amalɛk buud ye, zab ne-a n wa menes-a zãnga.›" 
1Samuel15:19 La bõe yĩnga, tɩ fo pa kelg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga? La bõe yĩng tɩ fo kẽng tao-tao n tɩ wʋk te zɛɛdma, n maan yel-wẽnde, Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ?»" 
1Samuel15:20 A Sol leoka a Samwɛl: «Mam yẽ sẽ, m kelga Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg neere, mam tũu sor ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg maama, m waa ne a Amalɛk dĩma, a Agag; la mam sãama Amalesitsã." 
1Samuel15:21 Yaa nebã n yãk te zɛɛdma pʋgẽ, rũm-bɛd la rũm-bõonego, piis la niis, sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩd-b taaba la sẽn lebg kãab beed bũmbu, n na n tɩ kõ Soaalã, fo Wẽnnaama, Gilgal tẽnga.»" 
1Samuel15:22 A Samwɛl leokame: «Soaala nonga yũ-nood maando, n nong sugr kosg maand wa b sẽn nong b noora deegra bɩ? Ayo! Sakre n são maoongo sulg-m-meng n são pe-raada kaam." 
1Samuel15:23 Zẽk f meng ne Soaala, wẽen tɩ fo sẽn gãdã, n yɛse dẽ wẽnem yɩɩda kabl Wẽnde, dẽ wẽnem yɩɩda bagr ne a zirẽ-beedã. Fo sẽn zãgs Soaala gomd kelgrã, bãmb me basda foom, f ka le ya rĩm ye.»" 
1Samuel15:24 A Sol yeela a Samwɛl: «Mam maana yel-wẽnde! M zãgsa Wẽnd noore la m pa sak fo goam ye; mam zoe neba nifu, n kelg bãmb koɛɛga." 
1Samuel15:25 Marsã, m yõkd y sɛɛga; kõ-y maam m yel-wẽnda sugri, la leb-y n wa-y ne maam tɩ m tɩ wõgemd Soaala-Wẽnd taoore n waoog ba.»" 
1Samuel15:26 T'a Samwɛl na n leok a Sol: «Mam kõn leb n tũ-f ye, tɩ fo zãgsa Wẽnd noore, la Soaala-Wẽnd me zãgsa foom, f kõn le yɩ a Israyɛl dĩm ye.»" 
1Samuel15:27 A Samwɛl sẽn wẽnemd t'a na n looge, a Sol gãda a fuug noor tɩ kẽege." 
1Samuel15:28 T'a Samwɛl yeele: «Dũnna Soaala-Wẽnd gʋsga a Israyɛl rĩung f nugẽ; b na n dɩk-a lame n kõ ned a to sẽn ya sõng n yɩɩd foom.» 
1Samuel15:29 A tol n le paasame: «Soaala sẽn ya a Israyɛl pãngã, pa gird n le gõms wa ninsaal ye.»" 
1Samuel15:30 A Sol le yeelame: «M maana yel-wẽnde la marsã m kota yãmba, tɩ y ra ning-m yãnde, m nin-kẽembã la a Israyɛl fãa taoore, la y lebg n wa mam nengẽ, tɩ m paam n pʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnnaam.»" 
1Samuel15:31 A Samwɛl lebg n tũ-a lame, la a Sol tɩ wõgemd n pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnde." 
1Samuel15:32 La a Samwɛl yeelame: «Tall-y Amalesitsa dĩma, a Agag, n wa m taoore.» A Agag kolga ne yẽesem. A ra yeta a sũurẽ: «M tẽed tɩ m kõn le lemb kũum ne a tɩɩsma ye.»" 
1Samuel15:33 Mik a Samwɛl na n yeelame: «Wala fo sʋʋg sẽn kɩt tɩ pagba pa na n le yãend b kamba, woto me pagba sʋka, fo ma kõ le yãend a biig ye!» La a Samwɛl kʋ-la a Agag, Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr zĩigẽ, Gilgal tẽnga." 
1Samuel15:34 Rẽ poore, a Samwɛl leba Rama, t'a Sol me kul a yiri, Gibea." 
1Samuel15:35 Badaar tɛka, n ta a kũum, a Samwɛl pa leb n yãend a Sol ye. A Samwɛl da yãbda a Sol, tɩ b sẽn bas-a t'a rɩ Israyɛl naama ra pa le noom Naaba-Wẽnd ye." 
1Samuel16:1 Daar a yembre, Soaala yeela a Samwɛl: «Fo na n kell n yõka yãbre, a Sol poorẽ, n ta da-bʋre? Fo zɩ tɩ m bas-a lame. A kõn le rɩ naam Israyɛl ye. Sui f yɩɩlla kaam tɩ pidi, la yiki! Mam tʋmd-f-la a Zese, Bɛtelyɛɛm neda, yiri, tɩ m yãenda a kamba sʋka dĩm ning m sẽn datã.»" 
1Samuel16:2 La a Samwɛl leokame: «Mam maanda a wãn n ta be? A Sol sã n bãnge, a na n kʋ-m lame.» Soaala yeelame: «Fo na n talla nag-sadg n kẽnge la f na n tɩ yeelame: ‹M wat n na n kʋʋ maoongo n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd.›" 
1Samuel16:3 Fo na n boola a Zese t'a wa maoonga kʋʋbã. M meng m toor na wilg-f f sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga. Mam sẽn na wilg foom a soaba zug la f na n pʋdg naama kaam.» 
1Samuel16:4 A Samwɛl maana soaala sẽn togs-a bũmb ning fãa, la a taa Bɛtelyɛɛm. La tẽnga nin-kẽemba seg-a-la ne yɛɛsgo. B sok-a lame: «Yaa noogo, tɩ yãmb wat ka?»" 
1Samuel16:5 T'a Samwɛl leoke: «Yaa noog bala; m wat n na n kʋʋ maoongo, bɩ y segl y mens n yɩ sõma, la y wa tũ maan tɩ d kẽng maoongã kʋʋb zĩigẽ.» La yẽ meng yɩlga a Zese ne a kamba, la a bool-b-la maoonga kʋʋb zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel16:6 B sẽn ta maoonga zĩigẽ, a Samwɛl yãenda a Eliyab, n yeel a sũurẽ: «M mi tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tũus a soabã bee ka m taoore.»" 
1Samuel16:7 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Samwɛl: «Da ges a neng neerem ye, da ges a woglem ye, tɩ ka yẽnda la m yãkd ye; ninsaal geta nin sẽn ne, Soaala-Wẽnd geta sũurẽ.»" 
1Samuel16:8 A Zese boola a Abinadab a Samwɛl taoore la a Samwɛl yeelame: «Ka yẽnda me la Soaala-Wẽnd tũus ye!» 
1Samuel16:9 A Zese kɩtame t'a Sama wa: t'a Samwɛl yeele: «Ka yẽnda me la b tũus ye!» 
1Samuel16:10 La a Zese kɩtame t'a kamb a yopoe wã wa bãngda taoore. A Samwɛl yeela a Zese: «Soaala-Wẽnd pa yãk ned ba a ye bãmbã sʋk ye.» 
1Samuel16:11 La a le yeelame: «Fo kamba tɛk la woto bɩ?» T'a Zese yeele: «B yao n kete, n ya rũm-kɩɩma.» A Samwɛl yeela a Zese: «Tʋm tɩ b tɩ bool-a t'a wa tɩ tõnd kõn sɩng rɩɩbo t'a nan pa wa ye.»" 
1Samuel16:12 La a Zese tʋmame tɩ b babs-a t'a wa; a Daviid nenga da yaa yãag nenga; a neng ra yaa neere n sakd gesgo. La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Samwɛl: «Yik n pʋdg a zug naama kaam, tɩ yaa yẽ!»" 
1Samuel16:13 A Samwɛl rɩka kaama ne yɩɩllã, n pʋdg a Daviid zugu, a kẽem dãmba nifẽ. La badaar tɛka, la sẽn pʋge, Naaba-Wẽnd pãng kẽe a Daviid. A Samwɛl dɩka sore la Rama la a leb yã." 
1Samuel16:14 Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga yi n bas a Sol t'a zʋga tek n lebg yoogo, n tar-a n namsdẽ." 
1Samuel16:15 A Sol sõgen-kamba yeelame: «Ad-y Naaba-Wẽnd basame tɩ yam yoogo kẽ yãmba n tar-y n namsdẽ. 
1Samuel16:16 Sẽn be yaa y kõ noor bala tɩ d be-la y yĩnga. D na yãend ned sẽn mi bɛɛl wẽebo, la yam yoogã sã n wa namsd yãmba, nin-kãng na wẽ bɛɛlã tɩ yãmb paam yolsgo.»" 
1Samuel16:17 A Sol leoka a poorẽ dãmba: «Bao-y ned sẽn tõe n maan noog ne bɛɛl, n kõ-ma!»" 
1Samuel16:18 Na-yir dãmba nin-yend yeelame: «Ade, mam yãee Bɛtelyɛɛm daoa a Zese biiga, a mii bɛɛla, n paas me, a yaa gãndaoogo n tar pãnga, n ya zab-zabda, a noor mii goama, la yaa dasãnga, la Soaala-Wẽnd bee ne-a.»" 
1Samuel16:19 A Sol tʋma a Zese nengẽ, tɩ b tɩ yeel-a: «Tʋm maam f biig a Daviid, sẽn gũuda piisã.»" 
1Samuel16:20 A Zese yãka bõang a ye la rãam ne waoog la bulla la a tʋma rẽ fãa, ne a biiga a Daviid tɩ b tɩ kõ a Sol." 
1Samuel16:21 A Daviid taa a Sol nengẽ, n yals a taoore; la a taa a Sol yam al wʋsgo, t'a yãk-a t'a tʋkd a zab-teedo." 
1Samuel16:22 La a Sol kɩtame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zese: «M kotame tɩ f bas f biiga a Daviid, t'a yɩ mam dakõore, t'a taa mam yam.»" 
1Samuel16:23 La yam wẽngã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn bas-a ne a soaba, sã n da kẽe a Sol fãa, a Daviid da rɩkda bɛɛl n wẽ. La a Sol da paamda laafi la yolsgo; la yam wẽngã da zoet n basd-a lame." 
1Samuel17:1 Dasem-kãense, Filisti rãmba da tigma b tãb-biisi n na n maan zabre. B sũu taab Soko, a Zɩɩda soolmẽ la b gãnega tãpo, Efes-Damim, Soko la Azeka sʋka." 
1Samuel17:2 A Sol ne a Israyɛl kamb me tigma taaba, bãmb me gãnega tãpo, bãoogẽ, la b tonga taab rũnug-rũnuga n na n zab ne Filisti rãmba." 
1Samuel17:3 Filisti rãmb dag n bee tãng a ye pennẽ; t'a Israyɛl kamba me be tãng a to pennẽ. Bãg-faag n da be sʋka. 
1Samuel17:4 Gat dao a ye n yɩ Filisti rãmba tãb-sikã, a yʋʋr da boondame t'a Goliyat. A woglem da yaa kãntɩɩs a yoobe la nug-yakemde." 
1Samuel17:5 A da fõgna kut zug-peoogo, n yeelg kut fuug sẽn wẽnd piryãong poore. Fuuga zɩslem taa neb a yiib zɩɩbo." 
1Samuel17:6 A ra vila a nao wã ne kut gãmbre, n zãad zũud kãnde." 
1Samuel17:7 A kãnd-daooga da yaa wa sʋnd koeer-bõanga; kãnda meng zɩslem taa yubl sẽn pid koom. Ned n da tʋk a gãongã n kẽnd a taoore. 
1Samuel17:8 Filisti rao wã yalsame n gom ne a Israyɛl sẽn da tong taab rũnug-rũnugã, zabra yĩngã, a zẽka a koɛɛg n kelme: «Bõe tɩ y na n yi n tong taaba zabre yĩnga? Mam ka Filisti tãb-biig tɩ yãmb yaa a Sol yem-daada bɩ? Tũus-y nin-yend t'a wa zab ne maam." 
1Samuel17:9 A sã n tõog n zab ne maam n kʋ-ma, tõnd na lebg yãmb yemse la sã n ya maam n tõoge, n kʋ yãmb nedã, yãmb n na n yɩ tõnd yemse la d tʋʋm-tʋmdba.»" 
1Samuel17:10 Filisti rao wã le yeelame: «Maam n baood a Israyɛl tãb-biisa noor dũnna; kõ-y maam ned a ye, tɩ d zab taab n gese!»" 
1Samuel17:11 A Sol ne a Israyɛl kamba fãa wʋma Filisti rao wã goama, la b yɛɛsame, rabeem kãseng yõk-b lame." 
1Samuel17:12 A Daviid da yaa Efrata sakẽ daoa, Bɛtelyɛɛm tẽnga, a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. A ba wã la a Zese la a Zese kamb yɩɩ bãmb b nii. A Sol wakata t'a Zese da paam n kʋʋlame la a me ra yɩɩ zab-zabda." 
1Samuel17:13 A Zese kom-bɛd a tãabã da tũ-la a Sol n kẽng tãpo. Kamba a tãabã sẽn kẽng tãpã yʋy la woto: kãsma, a Eliyab, sẽn pʋgda soaba, a Abinadab, a tãab soaba, a Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 A Daviid n da ya yao-zʋʋga. Yẽ kẽem-dãmb da tũ-la a Sol, zabrẽ." 
1Samuel17:15 La a Daviid da kẽnda a Sol nengẽ la a lɛɛgd n wat Bɛtelyɛɛm n kɩɩmd a ba rũmsi. 
1Samuel17:16 Filisti gãndaoogã da wata yibeoog la zaabr fãa, la a tãoosa raooda woto dasem pis-naase." 
1Samuel17:17 La a Zese waa n yeela a biiga, a Daviid: «Deeg ki sẽn kɩɩm wamd a ye, la bur piiga, n zoe n kẽng n tɩ kɩs f kẽem dãmba sẽn be tãb-sika pʋga." 
1Samuel17:18 Deeg bĩs kaam gil piiga n tɩ kõ tãb-biis tusr tãnsoabã. F na sok n bãng f kẽem dãmba sã n tara laafi, la reeg b nengẽ bũmb sẽn kõt kaseto tɩ b keta ne yõore." 
1Samuel17:19 B bee ne a Sol la a Israyɛl tãb-biisã, tɩ-wogda bãoogẽ wã n zabd ne Filisti rãmbã.»" 
1Samuel17:20 A Daviid yika yibeoog pĩnda, n bas a piisã ne rũm-kɩɩma, n tʋk toaalã, n maan wa a ba sẽn yeele. A taa tãb-sikã. Segame tɩ tãb-biis ra yita tãb-sikã n tees zabra sẽn zabdẽ, n kelemd b kɛlenga." 
1Samuel17:21 Israyɛl kamba ne Filisti rãmba tedgame n tees taaba. 
1Samuel17:22 A Daviid sika a sẽn da zɩtã n bas ne sẽn get-b teedã. A zoe n taa zabra zĩigẽ, n pʋʋs a kẽem-dãmbã." 
1Samuel17:23 A sẽn waa gomd ne bãmba, Gat gãndaoog ning sẽn da boond t'a Goliyatã, le yi n yalsa Filisti rãmba ne a Israyɛl kamba sʋka. A le goma wala a sẽn zoe n gom pɩnda, t'a Daviid wʋme." 
1Samuel17:24 A Israyɛl sẽn yãe neda bala, b fãa zoeeme, tɩ rabeem kãseng yõk-b lame." 
1Samuel17:25 Israyɛl kamba ra yetame: «Way! Yãmb yãee dao wã sẽn wata bɩ? A kolgdame n na n bao a Israyɛl noore. Ned ninga sẽn na n kʋ-a, dĩma na kõ a soab arzɛgs wʋsgo, b na kõ-a a bi-pugla t'a maan a paga, la b na bas a ba ne a zak rãmba yõor yaood la tʋʋma taale.»" 
1Samuel17:26 A Daviid soka sẽn da be a sɛɛgẽ wã: «Sẽn kʋʋda Filisti rao kãnga, n dok a Israyɛl yãnde, b na n maana a soab bõe? Filisti kãnga, nin-dẽgdã, yaa ãnna, n wat n tʋʋsd Vɩɩm Naaba-Wẽnde tãb-biisi?»" 
1Samuel17:27 Neba le togs-a lame: «Yaa wa d sẽn yeelã la b na n maan ne sẽn na n kʋ-a Filisti rao wã.» 
1Samuel17:28 A kẽema a Eliyab sẽn wʋm t'a Daviid gomd ne nebã, a sũur puuga ne-a, t'a yeele: «F waa ka n na n maan bõe? F basa rũm-bõonesa gũub ne ãnna we-raoogẽ wã? Mam mi-la f ka tõe n zĩnd f zĩ yɛngã la f raab yoodã. F waame bala n na n ges zabrã.»" 
1Samuel17:29 A Daviid leokame: «Mam maana bõe, ka m sẽn goma bal laa?»" 
1Samuel17:30 A basa yẽnda la a goma ne ned a to, a soka wala pĩnda, la b leok-a la wala b sẽn zoe n leok-a wã." 
1Samuel17:31 B sẽn wʋm a Daviid goama, b taas-b la a Sol, la a Sol kɩtame tɩ b bool-a." 
1Samuel17:32 A Daviid tɩ yeela a Sol: «Bɩ ned ba a ye da bas raood, Filisti rao kãngã yĩng ye! Ad-y mam na n zaba ne-a.»" 
1Samuel17:33 A Sol yeela a Daviid: «Fo pa tõe kẽng n tɩ zab ne Filisti rao kãnga ye, fo yaa yãaga, la Filisti raoã yaa zab-zabda al a yãadmẽ.»" 
1Samuel17:34 A Daviid leoka a Sol: «Mam da gũuda m ba rũmsi, m naaba, gɩgemde bɩ rũng sẽn ya toaaga n yɩɩd gɩgemde, sã n da wa n na n yõk rũnga," 
1Samuel17:35 m da wudgdame, n pʋg-a; m da pãbd-a lame; m da gʋsgda rũngã, a noorẽ. A sã n da baood zabre ne mam menga, m da gãta a gɛdã n tar a pãbre t'a wa ki." 
1Samuel17:36 Yaa woto la mam kʋ bõnyẽega la gɩgem-padre. La ade, na n yɩɩ boto me ne Filisti rao kãnga, ne nin-dẽgdã, t'a baoo Vɩɩm Naaba-Wẽnd tãb-biisa noore.»"
