1Samuel17:37 A Daviid le yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn fãag maam, tɩ m tɩlg ne gɩgemde la gɩgem-padre, bãmb n na n fãag maam Filisti rao kãnga nugẽ.» A Sol yeela a Daviid: «Kẽnge! La Wẽnd na zĩnd ne-fo!»" 
1Samuel17:38 A Sol yeelga a Daviid a meng futu, n fõgneg-a kut zug-peoogo, n sog kut fuugu a yãoogẽ." 
1Samuel17:39 A Daviid boba a Sol sʋʋgã n paas futã, n mak t'a na n kẽnge, n pa tõog ye. A ra zɩ n tʋk zɩɩb a woto ye. Woto a yeela a Sol: «Mam pa na n tõog n kẽne ne woto fãa tɩ m ka minim ye.» A piida rẽ fãa n dʋʋge." 
1Samuel17:40 A rɩka a dasaar a nugẽ, n tũus kʋɩlga kug saal a nu n sui a pe-kɩɩm korgẽ, gɩf a ye pʋgẽ; loaabg bala n da paase la a looga woto n na n tɩ zab ne Filisti raoã." 
1Samuel17:41 Filisti nin-daooga lʋɩɩsa a taoore sõgna sẽn zɩt a gãongã n segd a Daviid. 
1Samuel17:42 A nif sẽn pẽnega a Daviid, a yõka a tʋʋre, t'a yãeeme tɩ nan yaa bi-bilf bala, bi-moomde, n tar neerem." 
1Samuel17:43 Filisti raoã yeela a Daviid: «M yaa baag laa? Tɩ f wat m segbo ne dasaare?» La a kãab-a-la beedo, n bas-a ne a wẽnd dãmba." 
1Samuel17:44 A le yeel-a lame: «Zoe n wa, tɩ m dɩk f nemdã n kõ yĩngri luiili la we-rũmsi tɩ b rɩ.»" 
1Samuel17:45 A Daviid leoka Filisti raoã: «Fo wat n na n zaba ne maam, ne sʋʋga la kãnde la kãnd bila, mam yẽ wat n na mao ne foo, Pãens rãmba Wẽnda yaa m zab-teedo, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam n pids-m ne raoodo, f sẽn sãbs b tãb-biisa yĩnga." 
1Samuel17:46 Dũnna menga Naaba-Wẽnd na n dɩka foom n ning m nugẽ; m na n kʋʋ foom, n fiuug f zugu; dũnna, m na n dɩka Filisti rãmba yĩnsi n kõ yĩngr luiili la we-rũmsi. Dũni zãng fãa na bãng t'a Israyɛl Wẽnda la Wẽnd." 
1Samuel17:47 La zãma wã na bãnge, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ka fãagd ne sʋʋga bɩ ne kãnde, tɩ Wẽnd la Tãnsoaba la b na n dɩka yãmb n ning tõnd nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel17:48 Filisti rao wã yikame, n yãosdẽ, n wat a Daviid segbo. A Daviid wudgame n tɩ seg Filisti rao wã n na n zab ne-a." 
1Samuel17:49 Tao tao bala a Daviid tʋma a nug a korgẽ, n sak kugr a yembre, n lobg-a ne a loaabgã, la a yõka Filisti rao wã dĩiri la kugrã suda Filisti rao wã dĩiri, t'a lʋɩ, t'a neng fõgneg tẽnga." 
1Samuel17:50 Yɩɩ woto! Ne loaabga la kugri, a Daviid pãng yɩɩga Filisti rao wã, a lub-a lame, n kʋ-a, t'a nug yaool n pa zãad sʋʋg ye." 
1Samuel17:51 A Daviid wudgame, n tɩ yals Filisti rao wã sɛɛgẽ, n gãd a sʋʋgã n wõog-a a wʋʋgẽ, n kʋ a Goliyat, n fiuug a zugu. Filisti rãmba sẽn yãe tɩ b gãndaoog kiime, b zoeeme." 
1Samuel17:52 La a Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda rapã zẽka b koees n kelme, n zoet n pʋgd Filisti rãmba bãooga pʋga, n dig ba, n tɩ tãag Ekrõ. Filisti rãmba sẽn paam sãmpogrã rʋʋga sora zugu, sẽn sɩng Saarayim, n tɩ tãag Gat, la Ekrõ." 
1Samuel17:53 Israyɛl kamba sẽn dig Filisti rãmba n zãage, b lɛɛg n wa zɛ b tãb-sikã." 
1Samuel17:54 A Daviid rɩka Filisti rao wã zugu, n tɩ bas Zerizalɛɛm, la a bĩnga a zab-teedã a roogẽ." 
1Samuel17:55 A Sol sẽn da reng n yãe a Daviid t'a kẽnd n segd Filisti rao wã, a ra soka a Abnɛr, a tãnsoabã: «Bi-bɩɩg kãnga ba yaa ãnda, Abnɛr?» T'a Abnɛr ra leoke: «Ne yãmb sẽn vɩ wã, dĩma, m ka mi ye.»" 
1Samuel17:56 Dĩma yeelame: «Sok f toore n bãng bi-kãnga ba sẽn yaa a soaba.» 
1Samuel17:57 Yɩɩ woto la a Daviid kʋ Filisti raoa n lɛɛg n wa, tãnsoaba Abnɛr peega a Daviid n kẽng dĩma nengẽ. A ra zãada Filisti raoa zug a nugẽ." 
1Samuel17:58 A Sol sok-a lame: «M biiga, fo ba la ãnda?» A Daviid leokame: «Mam ba yaa yãmb sõgen a Zese, Bɛtelyɛɛm neda.»" 
1Samuel18:1 A Daviid sẽn gom n sɛ ne a Sol, a Zonatã sũur tabenda a Daviid, t'a na n nong-a ne nonglem kãsenga." 
1Samuel18:2 Badaare me la a Sol reeg a Daviid, a zakẽ n pa le bas-a t'a leb a ba nengẽ ye." 
1Samuel18:3 A Zonatã yõga zood ne a Daviid, n da nong-a wala a menga." 
1Samuel18:4 A tol n yeega a sẽn da yer fu-taok ningã n kõ a Daviid, n paas fut a taaba, n paas a sʋʋga ne a tãpa menga la a sɛɛga sẽbdga." 
1Samuel18:5 A Daviid da kẽngda a Sol sẽn da tʋmd-a zĩig ning fãa, la zĩig fãa, a ra tõogda bɛɛbã. A Sol kɩtame t'a lebg a tãnsoaba. A Daviid ra tata neba fãa yam. Ba na-yir dãmba da nong-a lame." 
1Samuel18:6 A Daviid sẽn wa n kʋ Filisti rãmba nin-daoogã n lɛɛg n wa, pagba fãa yii Israyɛl tẽnsa fãa n wa seg a Sol, n zodgd yɩɩla, n pãbd gãngãado, la b wẽed kɛma n saoodẽ la b kilsdẽ." 
1Samuel18:7 Pagba da zodgda yɩɩla n deesd taab n yetẽ: «A Sol kʋʋ tusri! A Daviid kʋʋ tus piiga!» 
1Samuel18:8 A Sol sũur puugame. Tus piiga pa ta a yam ba bilfu, t'a yeele: «B yetame t'a Daviid kʋʋ tus piiga tɩ mam kʋ tusr bala. Woto wã ka naama bal n paoog a Daviid marsã!»" 
1Samuel18:9 Badaar tɛka la sẽn pʋge, a Sol gesa a Daviid kegr-kegre." 
1Samuel18:10 Vẽkembeoogo, Naaba-Wẽnd le basame t'a Sol zʋg yooga le yiki t'a gãeemd a zak pʋga. A Daviid da wẽeda bɛɛl wa dasem kam fãa; a Sol da zãada kãnde, a nugẽ." 
1Samuel18:11 A Sol zẽka kãndã, n yeel a sũurẽ: «M na n tão a Daviid n ka-a ne lalgã.» La a Daviid ligla tãooba naoor a yi." 
1Samuel18:12 A Sol da zoeta a Daviid. Soaala-Wẽnd da be ne a Daviid, n yaool n da yi n bas a Sol." 
1Samuel18:13 A Sol zãaga a Daviid ne a menga, n kɩt t'a lebg tãb-biis tusr tãnsoaba. A Daviid da lʋɩta a neba taoore, tɩ b yit n kẽnd zabr la b watẽ." 
1Samuel18:14 A sã n da bob zabr fãa, a lɛɛgd n waa ne zu-zẽkre tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd dag n be ne-a." 
1Samuel18:15 A Sol sẽn mik tɩ bũmba fãa sakda a Daviid, a zoe-la a rabeem." 
1Samuel18:16 A Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda zãng da nonga a Daviid, a sẽn da lʋɩt bãmb taoor yĩnga tɩ b yit n kẽnd zabre la b lebgdẽ." 
1Samuel18:17 Daar a yembre, a Sol yeela a Daviid: «Ad-m kom-pugli wã kãsma, a Merab. Yẽ la m na n kõ-f tɩ f maan f paga. Fo ye n modg bala n keng f sũuri la f zab Wẽnd zabre.» Mik a Sol da yeta a sũurẽ: «Bɩ m nug ra sɩɩs-a, la Filisti rãmba nug maan-a bũmbu!»" 
1Samuel18:18 A Daviid leokame: «M yaa ãnda, m dogma yũug tonga ne ãnda rẽnna, Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ tɩ mam na n lebg rĩma rɛɛmba?»" 
1Samuel18:19 La wakat sẽn wa n ta, tɩ b ra tog n kõ a Daviid a Sol bi-pugla, a Merab, a rɩk-a lame n kõ a Adriyɛl, Meola rao, t'a maan a paga." 
1Samuel18:20 A Sol bi-pugla a Mikal yam waa n kẽ-la a Daviid: tɩ b togs a Sol, la rẽ me ta-la a yam." 
1Samuel18:21 A ra yeta a sũurẽ: «M na n kõ-a-la a Mikal tɩ yɩ bẽdg a yĩnga n lub-a Filisti rãmba nusẽ.» Dɩlla, paam n taa naoor a yi la a Sol yeel a Daviid: «Dũnna fo na n lebga mam dɛɛmba.»" 
1Samuel18:22 A Sol kõo na-yir dãmba noor kãnga: «Sõs-y ne a Daviid noogo, la soos-y n yeel-y yã: Ade, dĩma dat n maana foom neere; a poorẽ dãmba fãa nonga foo. Yɩ dĩma rɛɛmba!»" 
1Samuel18:23 A Sol na-yir dãmba togsa a Daviid gom bãmba. La a Daviid leokame: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ lebg dĩma rɛɛmb yaa naana wɛ? Mam yaa naong soaba, la talg sẽn ka võore.»" 
1Samuel18:24 A Sol sõgen-kamba lɛɛg n tɩ taasa dĩma a Daviid sẽn yeel-b bũmb ningã. 
1Samuel18:25 A Sol yeelame: «Tɩ gom-y ne a Daviid woto: Dĩma ka rat bũmb a to reemda yĩnga, sã n ka Filisti rãmba koabg la f kʋʋ n dok m sũuri. Kʋ-ba, n kẽes-b bõngo, n wa ne b waoosã.» A Sol da tʋllame bala n sagl a Daviid Filisti rãmba nusẽ." 
1Samuel18:26 A Sol na-yir dãmba tɩ togsa a Daviid dĩma goama. A Daviid gesame tɩ b sẽn yet t'a maan bũmb ning n paam n lebg a Sol rɛɛmbã, da ka wẽnd bõn-toog ye." 
1Samuel18:27 B sẽn bas daar ningã da nan pa ta ye, la a Daviid yik n looga ne a neba. A Daviid tɩ kʋʋ Filisti rãmb kobs-yi. A waa ne b sẽn kos bũmb ningã n sõd n dɩgl dĩma taoore, n na n tõog marsã n lebg rĩma rɛɛmba. A Sol sɩd dɩka a biig, a Mikal, n kõ-a t'a maan a paga." 
1Samuel18:28 Dẽ marsã la a Sol yaool n bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da bee ne a Daviid, la a bãng me t'a biig a Mikal me ra nong-a lame." 
1Samuel18:29 A Sol zoe a Daviid n yɩɩd pĩnda; a vɩɩm tɛka, a rɩɩ beem ne a Daviid." 
1Samuel18:30 Filisti rãmba nanamse le yiime n na n tak zabre. Wakat fãa, a Daviid n da maan daoodo n yɩɩd a Sol tãb-biis a taabã. Dẽ me la a yʋʋra paam n yi wʋsgo." 
1Samuel19:1 A Sol waa n goma ne a biiga, a Zonatã, la a poorẽ dãmba, t'a rat n kʋ-la a Daviid. La a Sol biig, a Zonatã, da yaa zood meng ne a Daviid." 
1Samuel19:2 Woto a tɩ togsa a Daviid. A yeelame: «M ba, a Sol, baood n na n kʋ-f lame. Bɩ f maan gũusgu, beoog yibeoogo, bao zĩig n soonde." 
1Samuel19:3 M na n yiime, la m na n yalsa m ba sɛɛgẽ, fo sẽn na n soond zĩig ningã. M na n goma f yelle ne m ba, n ges a sẽn na n leok bũmb ninga, n wa togs fo.»" 
1Samuel19:4 A Zonatã goma a Daviid yell ne a ba, a Sol, n pẽg a Daviid. A yeel-a lame: «M naaba, bɩ y ra saag n maan a Daviid wẽng ye, t'a Daviid ka beeg yãmb ye. A sẽn tʋm daooda ka bũmb sẽn wa ne bõn y yĩng ye." 
1Samuel19:5 A ka zoe a yõor bõne, n kẽng n tɩ kʋ Filisti gãndaooga ye. La yẽ yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd fãaga a Israyɛl zãnga fãa ne fãagr kãsenga. Yãmb meng yãeeme: la y sũur yɩɩ noogo. Bõe tɩ y na n maan yel-wẽnde, n yiis nin-sõngo, ned sẽn pa tar a toor yell, zɩɩm? Bõe tɩ y na n kʋ a Daviid zaalem?»" 
1Samuel19:6 A Sol kelga a Zonatã goama, la a kãabame n yetẽ: «M wẽen ne Wẽnd, t'a Daviid kõn ki ye!»" 
1Samuel19:7 A Zonatã boola a Daviid n togs-a a ba wã gomdã; la a tall-a lame n kẽng a Sol nengẽ, t'a Daviid leb n zĩnd ne-a wa pĩnd n tʋmd a sõgen-tʋʋma." 
1Samuel19:8 Zabra ra le yikame t'a Daviid kẽng n na tɩ pãb Filisti rãmbã. A pãb-b-la sõma tɩ b zoe. 
1Samuel19:9 La yam wẽngã, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn bas-a ne a soabã, le yẽega a Sol. A ra zĩ-la a zakẽ t'a kãnd be a nugẽ, t'a Daviid zĩ a sɛɛgẽ n wẽed bɛɛla." 
1Samuel19:10 A A Sol da ratame n kõs a Daviid n ka ne lalgã ne a kãnde, la a Daviid liglame tɩ kãnda yõsg n tɩ sel lalgã. A Daviid yi n zoe n põsa yʋng kãnga." 
1Samuel19:11 A Sol tʋma neba, a Daviid yiri, tɩ b tɩ gũ-a tɩ beoog vẽeg t'a paam-a n kʋ. Mik a pag a Mikal wɩdg-a lame: «F sã n ka zoe yʋngã n fãag f yõore, zĩig sã n yẽege, b na n kʋ-f lame.»" 
1Samuel19:12 A kɩtame, t'a Daviid tũ roog võor n yi n zoe, woto la a paam n põse." 
1Samuel19:13 A Mikal yaool n dɩka bõn-naande n ning a Daviid gãaga zugu, n pil zuga ne bʋ-gãongo sẽn ka pẽeg ye, n pil a menga ne gãmbre." 
1Samuel19:14 A Sol tʋma neba tɩ b wa yõk a Daviid. A pagã yeel-b lame: «A pa keem ye.» 
1Samuel19:15 T'a Sol le tʋm neb yɛsa tɩ b tɩ ges a Daviid, la a soos n gomd woto: «Tɩ tall-y yẽe ne a gãagã n wa kõ-m ka, tɩ m kʋ-a!»" 
1Samuel19:16 Neba kẽe roogẽ la bõn-naanda bal la b yãend yã, gãaga zugu, n paas puglã." 
1Samuel19:17 A Sol yeela a Mikal: «Bõe tɩ f belg maam woto n bas m bɛyã, t'a zoe n põse?» A Mikal leokame: «A meng m yeel-m: bas-m tɩ m loog, tɩ m da kʋ-f ye!»" 
1Samuel19:18 Yaa woto, la a Daviid zoe n põse. A kẽnga a Samwɛl nengẽ, Rama, n tɩ togsa a Sol sẽn maan-a bũmb ning fãa. La a yaool n tũ-la a Samwɛl n tɩ zĩnd a karen-bokẽ." 
1Samuel19:19 B tɩ togsa a Sol: «Ade, a Daviid bee a Samwɛl karen-bokẽ, Rama sɛɛgẽ.»" 
1Samuel19:20 A Sol tʋma neba, tɩ b tɩ yõk a Daviid. B taa n mika bãngdba sẽn tigim taaba, n gomd bãngre goama, t'a Samwɛl ya b taoor soaba. Naaba-Wẽnd pãnga yẽega a Sol sẽn tʋm b rãmbã, tɩ bãmb me yɛs n digd wa dindibdu." 
1Samuel19:21 B tɩ togsa a Sol t'a le tʋm neb a taaba, tɩ bãmb me ta, n yik rigbu la sobgre. T'a Sol le tʋm neba, naoor a tãab soaba, tɩ bãmb me tɩ yik rigbu la sobgre." 
1Samuel19:22 Wakat kãng marsã, a Sol yika a toore n kẽng Rama. A sẽn ta Seku ko-bao-kãsengã, a sokame: «A Samwɛl ne a Daviid bee yɛ?» Tɩ b leok-a: «B bee Nayot, Rama karen-bokẽ wã!»" 
1Samuel19:23 A Sol teesa be; Wẽnd pãnga siga yẽ me, t'a yik rigb la a kẽnda n wa ta Rama karen-bokã." 
1Samuel19:24 Yẽ me yeesa a futu, n sɩng rigbu, a Samwɛl taoore. A waa n lʋɩɩme n kel n pa be wĩndga la yʋngo. Dẽ me yĩng la b sok yã: «A Sol lebga bãngd laa?»" 
1Samuel20:1 Dẽ loogre poore, a Daviid yii Rama karen-bokẽ wã n wudg n wa yeel a Zonatã: «M maana bõe? M beegre la bʋgo? Yel-wẽnd bʋgo la m maan n bõn f ba t'a rat n dok m yõore?»" 
1Samuel20:2 A Zonatã yeelame: «Ayɛ! Kõn yɩ boto ye! M ba pa maand bũmbu, tɩ b pa reng n wilg maam ye. M ba na n solga maam yell kãnga bõe yĩnga? Rẽ ka tõe ye.»" 
1Samuel20:3 La a Daviid wẽename n yeel: «F ba mii vẽenega tɩ tõnd moor zemsda taaba, la woto wã a yeela a menga: ‹M modg t'a Zonatã ra wʋm bũmb t'a sũur wa sãam ye.› La yaa sɩda, tɩ maam ne kũum sẽn zãr taaba, yaa nif la yõore bala wala sẽn ya sɩda tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd vɩɩme la fo me vɩɩme.»" 
1Samuel20:4 T'a Zonatã yeel a Daviid: «Fo sẽn dat bũmb ningã, m na maane.»" 
1Samuel20:5 T'a Daviid leok a Zonatã: «Beoog yaa kiu-paalga, la m da tog n naaga naabã n dɩ, la bas tɩ m zoe n tɩ solg m meng weoogẽ n tãag dayɩt zaabre." 
1Samuel20:6 F ba sã n yãe n sok m kaalma võore, f na n wilg a woto: ‹A Daviid kosa ne dɩdgre tɩ b kõ-a sor t'a kẽng a tẽngẽ, Bɛtelyɛɛm, buuda maoong sẽn kʋʋd yʋʋmd-yʋʋmda yĩnga.›" 
1Samuel20:7 Dĩma sã n yeele: ‹Be neere,› ad-m tɩlgame. La a sã n puug a sũuri, bãng t'a rata m menesgo." 
1Samuel20:8 Wilg-a tɩ f sẽn yõg zood ne-m, Soaala yʋʋr yĩngã, f kõn bas tɩ zooda sãam ye. La sã n wẽnda m sɩd beegame, bɩ fo meng f toor kʋ-ma. Bõe tɩ b na n tall-m ta f ba taoore?»" 
1Samuel20:9 A Zonatã yeelame: «Dẽ kõn yɩ yel-beedo? M sã n bãng bal tɩ m ba rat n yiisa f yõore, m wẽend tɩ m na wilg-fu.»" 
1Samuel20:10 A Daviid soka a Zonatã: «Ãnd soab n na n wilg maam fo ba sã n leoka ne sũ-puuri?» 
1Samuel20:11 A Zonatã yeela a Daviid: «Wa tɩ d kẽng we-kɛɛnga!» B sɩd tũu taab n yi we-kɛɛnga. 
1Samuel20:12 A Zonatã yeela a Daviid: «Ne Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽndã, m na n fɛɛsa m ba beoogo bɩ ra-yɩta, woto wẽnde, n bãng a raabo. Koɛɛg buug sã n ka be a Daviid poorẽ, m kõn yeel tɩ bũmb ye." 
1Samuel20:13 Marsã, bɩ Soaala tʋm-m beedo, m ba sã n dat f yõor yãkre, tɩ m pa wilg-fu. Bãng tɩ m na kɩt tɩ f loog ne laafi. Bɩ Soaala zĩnd ne foo wala a sẽn zĩnd ne m ba!" 
1Samuel20:14 Dẽ wã, Naaba-Wẽnd sã n tong m yõore, foom, a Daviid, na wẽen tɩ d zooda kõn sãame, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ka rat sãoong ye. M sã n ki," 
1Samuel20:15 bɩ f ra bas f nimbãan-zoeerã t'a teem ne m zak rãmba, ba Naaba-Wẽnd sã n wa yiis a Daviid bɛɛbã, b yembr yembre, tẽng zugu.»" 
1Samuel20:16 La a Zonatã yõga zoodo ne a Daviid doogo la a kosame tɩ Wẽnd sok zooda sãamda, n sok a Daviid bɛɛba." 
1Samuel20:17 A Zonatã le kɩtame t'a Daviid wẽene, a sẽn da nong-a yĩnga la a sẽn da nong-a wala a menga yĩnga." 
1Samuel20:18 A Zonatã yeel-a lame: «Yaa beoogo la kiuuga pukda. F sã n pa zĩnd kibsã, b na n bãngame, tɩ f goeela na n paa vɩʋʋgo." 
1Samuel20:19 Gũ ra-yɩta. Leb we-kɛɛnga, zĩig ning f sẽn tɩ soond nin-daarẽ wã. Tɩ lill Ezɛl pĩigã." 
1Samuel20:20 M na n kolga be n tão m pɛɛm a tãabã. 
1Samuel20:21 M na n yeela m dakõorã: ‹Kẽng n tɩ gẽes pɛɛma!› La a sã n kẽng tɩ m yeel-a: ‹Fo yõsgame! Leb f poorẽ n wʋk-ba!› Dẽ wã fo wata kibsã, tɩ rabeem kaẽ ye. Ne Soaala sẽn ya Wẽndã, bũmb kõn maan ye!" 
1Samuel20:22 La m sã n yeel sõgna: ‹Kẽng taoore!› Da yaas ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd meng n kõt-f sore." 
1Samuel20:23 La sã n ya koɛɛgã, maam ne foom sẽn leok taabã, bɩ Wẽnd yɩ d yiiba kaset daar fãa.»" 
1Samuel20:24 A Daviid tɩ soonda we-kɛɛnga. Kiu-paalga taame, dĩma me waame tɩ kibsa rɩɩb na n sɩnge." 
1Samuel20:25 Dĩma zĩnda a goeel zugu la goeela ra dɩdga rooga lalga, wala dasem kam. A Zonatã zĩnd n tees-a lame. A Abnɛr n zĩnd n yegl a Sol. A Daviid goeela paa vɩʋʋgo." 
1Samuel20:26 A Sol ka yeel tɩ bũmb, baraar ye, n tagsd a sũurẽ tɩ raare yell bilfu n be a Daviid zugu, tɩ raare a rẽgmame n nan ka paam n yɩlg a meng ye." 
1Samuel20:27 Vẽkembeoogo, kiu-paalgã daar a yiib soaba, a Daviid zĩiga le paa vɩʋʋgo. La a Sol soka a biig, a Zonatã: «Bõe n maan t'a Zese biiga ka wa rɩɩb zaamẽ, n ka wa rũnna?»" 
1Samuel20:28 A Zonatã leoka a Sol: «A Daviid kosa maam sore n na n kẽng Bɛtelyɛɛm. 
1Samuel20:29 A yeelame: ‹Mam kotame tɩ y kõ-m sore, tɩ tõnd yira rãmb tara b maoong tẽnga pʋgẽ, tɩ m kẽem a ye wa togs tɩ m wa. Dɩlla, fo sã n dat-m ne neere, bɩ f bas-m tɩ m ta yir.› Ad-y yaa rẽ yĩnga la a Daviid ka wa rɩɩba rũnna.»" 
1Samuel20:30 A Sol sũur puuga ne a Zonatã, la a yeel-a lame: «Bi-yoogo, pʋg-kõb-wẽnga la tõat biiga, mam ka mi tɩ fo zoa la a Zese biiga tɩ rẽ ningd f meng yãnde la a ningd f ma yãnd bɩ?" 
1Samuel20:31 Bãng t'a Zese biiga ket ne yõor fãa, fo kõn deeg naam ye! La marsã tʋm tɩ b tɩ bao a Daviid, la b tall-a n wa kõ maam, t'a toga ne kũum.»" 
1Samuel20:32 A Zonatã leoka a ba, a Sol; a sok-a lame: «B na n kʋ-a-la bõe yĩnga? A maana bõe?»" 
1Samuel20:33 A Sol zẽka a kãnde n tees a Zonatã, t'a na n tão-a. A Zonatã bãngame, t'a ba sɩd gãda, a sũurẽ, a Daviid kũum." 
1Samuel20:34 A yika rɩɩba zĩigẽ, t'a sũur kɛɛda, la a pa naag n dɩ kiu-paalg daar a yiib soaba ye, a sũur da sãama fãa, a Daviid yĩnga, t'a ba ra tʋʋs-a lame." 
1Samuel20:35 Vẽkembeoogo yibeoogo, a Zonatã kẽnga we-kɛɛnga n bʋʋg a Daviid, wala b sẽn da sed ne taaba, la bi-bilfu n da yãagd-a." 
1Samuel20:36 A yeela a sõgna: «Wudg n bao pɛɛma mam sẽn na n tão wã.» Sõgna wudgame la a Zonatã maana dabaare n tão pɛɛma tɩ zʋʋg-a. 
1Samuel20:37 La sõgna kolga a sẽn tão pĩima zĩig ningã t'a Zonatã tãse: «Pĩima ka zʋʋg foo sɩda?» 
1Samuel20:38 A Zonatã le tãsa sõgna: «Tao tao, maan tao, da yals ye!» Sõgna rɩka pĩima n wa kɩs a zu-soaba." 
1Samuel20:39 Sõgna da ka wʋmd võor ye; a Zonatã ne a Daviid bala n da mi sẽn zem tɛka. 
1Samuel20:40 A Zonatã kɩsa biigã a zab-teed n yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ lebs-b tẽnga pʋgẽ.» 
1Samuel20:41 Biiga sẽn looge, a Daviid yii rɩtgo, n wa vabende, n fõgneg a neng tẽnga, n wõgemd naoor a tã. Zo-rãmba mobga taaba, n lagem taab n ning nintãm, la a Daviid n yãb n yɩɩge." 
1Samuel20:42 A Zonatã yeela a Daviid: «Kẽng n loog ne laafi, tɩ tõnd naaga taab n wẽene ne Wẽnde, tɩ bũmb kõn tol n zĩnd maam ne foo sʋka, fo ba wã la mam ba wã roog sʋk ye.»" 
1Samuel21:1 A Daviid yik n loogame t'a Zonatã me leb tẽnga pʋgẽ. 
1Samuel21:2 A Daviid zoe n kẽnga Nob, maan-kʋʋd a Ayimelɛk nengẽ. Maan-kʋʋda yɛɛsame, t'a zoe n seg a Daviid n sok-a: «Yaa wãna tɩ yãmb ya y yembre tɩ ned ka tũud yãmba?»" 
1Samuel21:3 A Daviid leoka maan-kʋʋda, a Ayimelɛk: «Naabã n kõ m noore, n yeel-ma: ‹Sõng tɩ ned da bãng yell ninga sẽn kɩt tɩ mam tʋmd fooma ye.› Sã n yaa m poorẽ dãmbã, m yãka zĩiga tɩ b na n seg-m be." 
1Samuel21:4 La bõe n be y nugẽ? Kõ-y maam bur a nu, bɩ bũmb ning yãmb sẽn tar bala.»" 
1Samuel21:5 Maan-kʋʋda leokame: «Mam ka tar bur zaalga m nugẽ ye; yaa bur sẽn kõ Naaba-Wẽnd bala n be, la y nebã yee n yaa yɩlma n ka pẽneg pagba.»" 
1Samuel21:6 A Daviid leokame: «Sã n ya pagbẽ wã, b gɩdg-d lame, wala rasem kam, d sã n bob zabre. Neba yĩns yaa yɩlma. D da pa yi rũnna n na n tɩ zab ye la baasgo, d pa rẽgem ye.»" 
1Samuel21:7 Maan-kʋʋda kɩs-b la burã sẽn kõ Soaalã, tɩ bur a taab da ka be sã n pa wẽnd doogẽ rẽnda bala; sã n da yiis-ba, b lebsda bur sẽn nan ket n ya tʋʋlga." 
1Samuel21:8 Segame tɩ dao a ye, a Sol sõgne, n da yɛs Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, a ra yaa Edomitga, n boond t'a Doeg; a dag n yaa a Sol dũm-kɩɩma." 
1Samuel21:9 A Daviid soka a Ayimelɛk: «Yãmb pa tar kãnde bɩ sʋʋg yam-yam ka? M ka rɩk m sʋʋg bɩ zab-teoog ye, naaba sẽn da yãgd yĩnga.»" 
1Samuel21:10 Maan-kʋʋda leokame: «Ad sʋʋga! Yaa a Goliyat, yaa Filisti rao ning yãmb sẽn kʋ tɩ-wogda bãoogẽ wã, sʋʋgã; b vil-a-la ne peende, a be ne teed niyns sẽn tar n bʋgd bagr ne Wẽndã. B bĩnga zĩ-yɛnga. Yãmb sã n dat n dɩk-a, bɩ y rɩk, tɩ sʋʋg a to ka be ka ye.» A Daviid yeelame: «N-faa! Sʋʋg a to ka be sẽn ta-a ye, bɩ y kõ-m yẽnda.»" 
1Samuel21:11 A Daviid yika badaar n zoe n zãag ne a Sol, a ta a Akis, Gat dĩma, nengẽ." 
1Samuel21:12 A Akis poorẽ dãmba yeel-a lame: «Ka Daviid ninga sẽn yaa tẽnga dĩma la woto bɩ? Ka yẽnda yẽnẽ yĩng la b da yɩɩnda: ‹A Sol kʋʋ tusri! A Daviid kʋʋ tus piiga.› » 
1Samuel21:13 Gom bãmba kẽ a Daviid sũurẽ, la a zoe rabeem wʋsgo, a zoe Gat dĩm, a Akis, rabeem." 
1Samuel21:14 Bãmb nifẽ a Daviid maana wala a yika gãeemdo, a sɩngame n tuumnẽ la latemdẽ, n gʋlsd gʋlsem sẽn ka tõe n karem kʋɩlenga zugu la a basd kolkood tɩ rʋʋgd n mat a toɛɛnga." 
1Samuel21:15 A Akis yeela nebã: «Yãmb sẽ n pa ne tɩ daoã zug lebgame; bõe tɩ yãmb peeg-a n wa m nengẽ? 
1Samuel21:16 Yaa gãeems la m kongd bɩ, tɩ y le tall yãoa n wa ka tɩ m ges a zu-lɛbg tʋʋma? Y tẽed tɩ m na bas ned a woto t'a kẽ m zakẽ bɩ?»" 
1Samuel22:1 A Daviid yii a Akis, Gat dĩma, nengẽ, n zoe n kẽng Adulam tãn-bokẽ wã. A kẽem dãmba la a zaka rãmb fãa wʋma rẽnda, n babs-a beene." 
1Samuel22:2 Neb niyns fãa sẽn dɩt-b pɛta, la sẽn da tar-b sama bɩ sẽn da namsd-ba la sũ-pa-noang rãmba, fãa tigma taab a Daviid nengẽ la a lebga bãmb naaba. Woto sẽn babs-ba a Daviid da ta kobs-naase." 
1Samuel22:3 A Daviid yii be n kẽng Mispa, Moab tẽn-peelmẽ. A tɩ yeela Moab dĩma: «Kõ-y m ba ne m ma sore, tɩ b wa zĩnd ne yãmba, n gũud m sẽn na n wa bãng Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn dat-m ne bũmb ninga.»" 
1Samuel22:4 La a Daviid talla nebã n kẽng Moab dĩma nengẽ tɩ b kell n zĩnd ne dĩma, la yẽ meng yaool n pa-la a sẽn soondẽ, tãn-bokẽ wã." 
1Samuel22:5 Bãngda a Gad wa n yeela a Daviid: «Da pa-y y soondga zĩigẽ ye, yi-y be n tɩ kẽ Zɩɩda soolmẽ.» T'a Daviid na n yik n tɩ kẽ Erɛt googo." 
1Samuel22:6 A Sol wʋma a Daviid ne a neba kibare. A Sol da zĩi pusg tẽngre, Gibea tãn-bila zugu, a ra zãada kãnde, a nugẽ, t'a sõgen-kamba da be ne-a." 
1Samuel22:7 A Sol yeel-b lame: «Bẽnzame yagense, kelg-y ka! A Zese biigã na n pʋɩ yãmb fãa pʋt la bugsuntund wala m sẽn maand ne yãmba laa? Yaa Yãmb la a na n kõ tãnsobend tɩ y soog a tãb-biisa laa? M pa tẽed ye." 
1Samuel22:8 Bõe yĩng marsã la yãmb maand sudum, n dat n zab ne maam? Ned ba a ye ka saag n wilg-m tɩ m biiga Zonatã yõga zood ne a Daviid ye. Ned ba a ye ka wa yeel-m tɩ m gũus t'a tusda a Daviid t'a gãneg-m bẽdgo, wala m sẽn ne rũnna wã ye.»" 
1Samuel22:9 A Doeg, Edomitga, ra yɛsa yĩngri, a Sol sõgen-kamba sɛɛgẽ la yẽ n yeele: «Mam yãee a Zese biiga t'a wa Nob, a Ayitub biiga, a Ayimelɛk nengẽ." 
1Samuel22:10 La a Ayimelɛk tol n soka Soaala-Wẽnd a yĩnga, la a kõ-a sor dɩɩb fãa, la a kɩs-a-la a Goliyat, Filisti raoã, sʋʋga.»" 
1Samuel22:11 Dĩma a Sol sẽn wʋme, a tʋmame tɩ b tall a Ayitub biiga, maan-kʋʋd a Ayimelɛk, n wa, ne a ba roog rãmba fãa la maan-kʋʋdba sẽn da be-b Nob. Bãmb fãa yik n wa saka naaba." 
1Samuel22:12 A Sol yeelame: «Kelge, Ayitub biiga!» T'a yeele: «Ad-ma, m zu-soaba!»" 
1Samuel22:13 A Sol yeelame: «Bõe tɩ foo ne a Zese biiga naag taab n baood m yõore? Fo kõ-a-la rɩɩbo la sʋʋga, la f sok Naaba-Wẽnd a yĩnga, t'a yik marsã n na n zẽk a zug ne maam la a gãneg-m bẽdgo, wala sẽn maand dũnna wã.»" 
1Samuel22:14 A Ayimelɛk leoka dĩma: «Yãmb sõgen-kamba fãa sʋka, ãnd n tõe n mak a meng ne a Daviid, pʋ-peelem soaba, naab rɛɛmba, sẽn ligind-b fo yõorã, tãnsoaba, la sẽn paamd waoor f meng zakẽ." 
1Samuel22:15 Ka rũnda bal la m sɩng n sokd Wẽnd a yĩng ye. Ade! M yam zãr ne m maan sudum ne yãmba. M naaba da rɩk yell ba a ye n dogl m zug la m ba roog zug ye, tɩ sɩda, m da ka tar yella buk ba bilf ye.»" 
1Samuel22:16 Dĩma yeela a Ayimelɛk: «Fo na n kiime, Ayimelɛk, foo ne f ba roog gilli!»" 
1Samuel22:17 La dĩma yeela a sõgen-kamba sẽn da yɛs a sɛɛgẽ: «Kʋ-y maan-kʋʋdbã, tɩ bãmb me sõngda a Daviid. B bãngame t'a Daviid da zoetame, la bãmb pa togs maam ye.» La naaba sõgen-kamba pa sak n zẽk b nug n kʋ maan-kʋʋdba ye." 
1Samuel22:18 Dẽ la dĩma yeel a Doeg: «Bɩ fo wẽnemde! Kʋ-ba!» La a Doeg, Edomitga, wẽnemdame la yaa yẽ n kʋ-ba. Badaare, a kʋʋ dap pis-nii la a nu, bãmb fãa da bobda Wẽnd bagra bag-teedã." 
1Samuel22:19 A Sol kʋ maan-kʋʋdba, Nob, bãmb tẽngẽ. A kʋʋ dapa, pagba, kom-bõonego, kom-peels sẽn yẽsemde, niis la bõeens la piisi. A kɛɛ-b fãa ne sʋʋga." 
1Samuel22:20 A Ayitub biig, a Ayimelɛk roagd a ye, n zoe n põse, a yʋʋr da boondame t'a Abiyatar." 
1Samuel22:21 A zoe n kẽnga a Daviid nengẽ n tɩ togs t'a Sol kʋʋ Soaala maan-kʋʋdbã. 
1Samuel22:22 A Daviid yeela a Abiyatar: «Nin-daarẽ wã m da miime tɩ Edomitga, a Doeg, da bee d sʋka la a kõn pa n ka wilg a Sol ye. Maam n wẽnemd yellã n tees f ba roogo." 
1Samuel22:23 Pa ne maam, la f ra zoe rabeem ye, tɩ sẽn baooda n yiis fo vɩɩm, baood n na n yiisa mam rẽnna. F pa ne maam, f tɩlga f bɛɛba zãnga.»" 
1Samuel23:1 Kibar la a Daviid waa n wʋme: «Filisti rãmba gũbga Keyila la b saad n wʋgsda ki zɛɛsẽ.» 
1Samuel23:2 A Daviid soka Wẽnnaam. «M kẽng n tɩ zab ne Filisti rãmbã, m na tõog ba?» La Soaala-Wẽnd leokame: «Kẽnge! F na tõog Filisti rãmbã, la f na fãag Keyila.»" 
1Samuel23:3 T'a Daviid neba na n yeel-a: «Zɩɩda kaane menga tõnd zoe n maanda rabeem. Yɩta a wãna sã n ya Keyila la d kẽng n na n tɩ zab ne Filisti rãmbã?» 
1Samuel23:4 A Daviid le soka Naaba-Wẽnd n paase la Wẽnd le leokame: «Dɩk sore, sig Keyila, tɩ m na n ninga Filisti rãmba fo nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel23:5 A Daviid kẽnga Keyila ne neba, a zaba ne Filisti rãmba, n tõog-ba la a reeg b rũmsa. Yɩɩ woto la a Daviid fãag Keyila rãmba." 
1Samuel23:6 Segame t'a Ayimelɛk biiga, a Abiyatar, sẽn wa n nok a Daviid, Keyila wã, segame t'a ra looga ne sãnem-pɛ-m-poore a ye." 
1Samuel23:7 A Sol sẽn wʋm t'a Daviid kẽe Keyila, a yeelame: «Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yõk-a n kõ-ma tɩ yẽ n kẽng a toore n tɩ pag a meng tẽng sẽn tar kʋɩlense, la kʋɩlens sẽn sogd ne bãeense.»" 
1Samuel23:8 A Sol boola a neba fãa tɩ b wa yẽda a Daviid ne a neba, Keyila." 
1Samuel23:9 A Daviid sẽn bãng t'a Sol mamsda wẽng ne yẽnda, a yeela maan-kʋʋd, a Abiyatar: «Wa tɩ m na n soka Wẽnde.»" 
1Samuel23:10 A Daviid yeelame: «Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, yãmb yamba wʋmame t'a Sol segendame n na n wa Keyila la a wã tẽngã, mam yĩnga." 
1Samuel23:11 La a Sol sã n wa, tẽnga nin-tɩɩsã na yõk-m n kɩs-a? A Sol na n sɩd waame, wala m sẽn wʋma bɩ? Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sõng-y tɩ yãmb yamba bãnge!» Soaala-Wẽnd leokame: «A Sol na n waame.»" 
1Samuel23:12 A Daviid le sokame: «Keyila nin-tɩɩsa na n dɩka maam ne m neba n bas a Sol nugẽ sɩda?» Naaba-Wẽnd leokame: «B na n bas-y-la a nugẽ.» 
1Samuel23:13 Rẽ n so t'a Daviid yik ne a neb sẽn da tõe n ta kobs-yoobe, b yii Keyila, la b sɩnga yeebgo. Kibarã t'a a Sol t'a Daviid yii Keyila la a Sol me basame tɩ sɛ." 
1Samuel23:14 A Daviid solga a meng tãmsẽ, Zif we-raoogẽ. La a Sol talla a baoobo, la Wẽnnaam pa bas t'a lʋɩ a nugẽ ye." 
1Samuel23:15 A Daviid bãngame t'a Sol saa wetã n baood-a n na n kʋ. A Daviid yaool n da bee Zif weoogẽ wã, Oresa tẽnga." 
1Samuel23:16 A Zonatã, a Sol biigã, rɩka sore n wa a Daviid nengẽ Oresa tẽnga, a waa n kenga a Daviid raoodo, Wẽnd maasem yĩnga." 
1Samuel23:17 A yeel-a lame: «Da zoe rabeem ye. M ba nug kõn sɩɩs-f ye. Fo n na n dɩ naam Israyɛl tẽnga la maam n na n yɩ f pipi sõangda. M ba, a Sol meng mii rẽnna.»" 
1Samuel23:18 B yiiba pʋlma taab zood Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. A Daviid paa Oresa la a Zonatã leba a yiri. 
1Samuel23:19 Zif neba kẽnga a Sol nengẽ Gibea. B tɩ wilga a Sol: «Ad-y yã a Daviid solgda a meng tõnd sɛɛgẽ, Oresa, Akila tãnga zugu, nug rɩtg pʋ-weesẽ wã." 
1Samuel23:20 Marsã, y sã dat n waame, dĩma, bɩ y wa! Yaa tõnd n na n yõk-a n ning dĩma nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel23:21 A Sol leokame: «Wẽnd na ning y barka, y sẽn zoe mam nimbãanega." 
1Samuel23:22 Leb-y n dɩɩ-y kaset n paase, la y bãng zĩig ninga a sẽn kẽne n teesẽ. Modg-y n dɩ y nif kaseto tɩ m wʋmame t'a yaa sɩlem soaba." 
1Samuel23:23 Mao-y n bãng a sẽn soond zĩis niynsa fãa la y sã n bãng vẽenega, bɩ y lebg n wa wilg maam. D na tũ taab n bao-a. A sã sɩd ket yam-yam, d na vɛɛs a Zɩɩda sagsa fãa, al n wa yãend-a.»" 
1Samuel23:24 B sẽn dɩk sore, b kẽnga Zif, n deng a Sol. A Daviid ne a neba ra be Maõ we-raoogẽ wã, weooga noorẽ pʋtã." 
1Samuel23:25 A Sol ne a nebã yi-la a baoobo. Kibarã taa a Daviid t'a tees tãng ning sẽn be a Maõ we-raoogẽ wã. A Sol bãnga yellã, la a pʋga a Daviid Maõ we-raoogẽ." 
1Samuel23:26 A Sol ne a nebã ra tũuda tãnga neng a yembre, t'a Daviid ne a nebã tũud neng a to wã. A Daviid da zoeta a Sol taoore ne a sũur fãa, la a Sol ne a neb ra wẽeda gũbri n na n yõk-a." 
1Samuel23:27 La ned n wa n yeela a Sol: «Wa tao tao tɩ Filisti rãmba kẽ f tẽngẽ n na n tak zabre.» 
1Samuel23:28 A Sol basa a Daviid pʋgbo n na n lɛɛg n zab ne Filisti rãmba. Yaa rẽ yĩnga, la b bool zĩ-kãnga tɩ Zab-vaal Pĩiga." 
1Samuel24:1 Wẽnd kãnga a Daviid dʋʋ Eyin-Gedi tãmse, n tɩ kẽ be." 
1Samuel24:2 A Sol tɩ zaba ne Filisti rãmba n lɛɛg n watẽ; b yeel-a lame: «Ade, a Daviid be Eyin-Gedi weoogo.»" 
1Samuel24:3 A Sol yãka neb tus a tã, gãndaad sẽn yi a Israyɛl sagsa zãnga, tɩ b na n bao a Daviid ne a nebã, zĩig ninga sẽn boond tɩ Yãgs Pĩisẽ." 
1Samuel24:4 B wa n yãee piis bãgre sẽn da be sor noore. Tãn-bok n da pẽ be, t'a Sol kẽe n na n dõbende. Mik a Daviid ne a nebã da bee tãn-boka yaanga." 
1Samuel24:5 T'a Daviid neba yeele: «Ad daar ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet fo: M yõka f bɛyã n sagl f nugẽ, bɩ f maan ne-a wa f sẽn date.» La a Daviid soosame n wõrg a Sol kobra noore." 
1Samuel24:6 Dẽ poore, a Daviid sũura kiuusame, a sẽn wõrg a Sol kobra yĩnga." 
1Samuel24:7 La a yeela a nebã: «Wẽnd na gũ maam, tɩ m da maan wẽnga la m nug ra sɩɩs m zu-soabã, Soaala sẽn kõ a soab naama ye!»" 
1Samuel24:8 A Daviid goma ne a nebã woto, tɩ b tõog b menga, tɩ b ra yõk a Sol ye. La a Sol yik n yii tãn-bokã n dɩk a sore." 
1Samuel24:9 Dẽ poore, a Daviid yik n yiime la a kelma a Sol poorẽ: «M zu-soab la m dĩma!» T'a Sol wẽneg n ges a poorẽ. La a Daviid wõgemdame n fõgneg a neng tẽnga." 
1Samuel24:10 A Daviid yeela a Sol: «Bõe tɩ yãmb kelgd neb goama, neba sẽn tar t'a Daviid dat n sãama yãmb yellã?" 
1Samuel24:11 Ade! Yãmb meng nif yãenda rũnna. Soaala-Wẽnd da bas-y-la m nugẽ, rũnna, tãn-boka pʋga. M neba ra bilgda y kũum la m zoe-la y nimbãanega n yeel tɩ m nug kõn sɩɩs m zu-soaba ye, tɩ yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n kõ-a naam." 
1Samuel24:12 M dĩma, bɩ y gese! Ges-y yãmb kobra noore, m sẽn zãad m nugẽ! M wõrga yãmb kobra noore, n yaool n pa kʋ-y ye. Bɩ y bãng la y tags tɩ m ka tar pʋ-toog la beem ne y ye la m ka beeg-y ye. Yãmb yẽ, yãmb gũusda maam bala n na n dok m yõore." 
1Samuel24:13 La Wẽnd na kao d yiiba bʋʋdo! Wẽnd n na rok m sũurã n kõ-ma. Maam yẽ nug kõn sɩɩs yãmb ye. 
1Samuel24:14 Kʋdem dãmba maana b yelbũndi: ‹Wẽnem n dogd wẽnem.› Rẽ n so tɩ mam nug ka na n tol n sɩɩs yãmba. 
1Samuel24:15 Yaa ãnna la a Israyɛl dĩma zoet n pʋgda? Ba kɩɩnga! Karenga! 
1Samuel24:16 Wẽnd kao d yiiba bʋʋdo! B gese! B bʋ n sõng maam la b kõ-m bʋʋm, n fãag maam y nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel24:17 A Daviid sẽn gom woto n sɛ, a Sol yeelame: «M biiga, a Daviid, sɩd yaa fo koɛɛg bɩ?» La a Sol kelmame t'a nintãma sodgdẽ." 
1Samuel24:18 A yeela a Daviid: «Fo pʋ-peelem yɩɩda maam al wʋsgo. Fo maana maam neere, la mam yẽ maana foom wẽnga." 
1Samuel24:19 Sũ-maasem ninga fo sẽn maan-m dũnna wã, wilgda f sũ-bʋgsem ne maam; tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd yõka maam n ning fo nugẽ la fo ka kʋ-m ye." 
1Samuel24:20 Ned tukda a bɛ sor zugu, n bas-a t'a loog ne laafi sɩda? Wẽnd na rol f sẽn maan maam neer ning rũnna wã!" 
1Samuel24:21 Mam miime marsã, tɩ fo na n wa rɩɩ naam, ka leb n ya sãmbg ye, la a Israyɛl rĩung na n yɩ-la f soolem." 
1Samuel24:22 Wẽen ne Wẽnd, tɩ mam sã n loog n sɛ, fo kõn sãam m buuda ye, la fo kõn kɩt tɩ m buuda yʋʋr menem ye.»" 
1Samuel24:23 A Daviid wẽena ne a Sol. A Sol leba a yiri, t'a Daviid me ne a nebã leb b sẽn da soondẽ wã." 
1Samuel25:1 Wẽnd kãnga, a Samwɛl kiime, t'a Israyɛl kamba fãa tigim taab n maan a kʋʋre; b mum-a-la a yiri, Rama. Rẽ poore, a Daviid yik n tɩ kẽe Parã weoogo." 
1Samuel25:2 Dakãagr a ye n da be Maõ, n tar arzɛk wʋsgo, Karmɛl tẽnga. A da tara pe-yãans tus a tã, la bʋʋs tusri la a da waa Karmɛl n na n kɩt tɩ b wõrs a piisa kõbdo." 
1Samuel25:3 Dao wã yʋʋr da boondame t'a Nabal t'a pag yʋʋr da boond t'a Abigayil. Yaa pag sẽn da tar yẽesem, la pag sẽn da yaa neere. La dao wã yẽ da yaa nin-wẽnga la nin-toaaga, a rag n yaa a Kalɛb yagenga." 
1Samuel25:4 A Daviid zĩnda Parã weoogẽ n wʋm t'a Nabal da wõrsda a piis kõbdo," 
1Samuel25:5 t'a bao kom-bɩɩb piig n tʋm a nengẽ, n yeel-ba: «Kẽng-y Karmɛl, a Nabal nengẽ, n tɩ pʋʋs a mam yʋʋr yĩnga," 
1Samuel25:6 la y yeel-a woto: ‹Laafi zĩnd ne yãmba! Laafi zĩnd ne y zak rãmba la ne y sẽn tar fãa› 
1Samuel25:7 La marsã mam wʋmame, tɩ y wõrsda y piis kõbdo. Bala yãmb dũm-kɩɩmbã zĩnda ne tõndo, d ka yɩ toos ne b ye, la b sẽn pa ne tõnd tɛk Karmɛl, b rũng ba a ye pa menem ye." 
1Samuel25:8 Sok-y y tʋʋm-tʋmdba, tɩ b na togs yãmba. La Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ m kom-bɩɩbã paam bark yãmb taoore, tɩ b waame n na n pʋʋs yãmb ne y zu-noogo, y sũ-noog daare, Marsã mam bõsd-y lame, tɩ y sak n kõ y yemsã la a Daviid, bũmb ning sẽn be y nugẽ.»" 
1Samuel25:9 A Daviid sẽn tʋm b rãmba taa n togsa a Nabal a Daviid goama n gũud a leokre. 
1Samuel25:10 La a Nabal leoka a Daviid nebã: «A Daviid yaa ãnna? La a Zese biigã zema bõe sẽ? Yembs wʋsgo bee rũnna sẽn zoet n basd b zu-soaben-dãmba. 
1Samuel25:11 La m na rɩk m dɩɩbo, la m niis m sẽn kʋ m tʋʋm-tʋmdba yĩnga, n kõ neba, n yaool n ka mi b sẽn yitẽ?»" 
1Samuel25:12 A Daviid neba le rɩka b sore, n ta n togs a Daviid daoã goama fãa. La a Daviid yeela a nebã:" 
1Samuel25:13 «Bɩ ned kam fãa sẽbg a sʋʋga a sɛɛgẽ.» A Daviid sẽbga a sʋʋga a sɛɛgẽ, la yaa neb kobs-naase n tũ-a, tɩ b na n kẽng Karmɛl, tɩ neb kobs-yi pa teeda zĩigẽ." 
1Samuel25:14 A Nabal dakõor a yembre n waa n yeel a Nabal paga, a Abigayil: «Ade, a Daviid zĩnda weoogẽ n tʋm neb tɩ b wa pʋʋs d zu-soabã, la a waag-b la no-beedo." 
1Samuel25:15 Nin-bãmba yaool n talla tõnd neere, b pa tol n zẽng tõnd sẽn zĩnd ne bãmb tɛk ye. D bũmb pa tol n menem, d sẽn zĩnd ne bãmb weoogẽ wã tɛk ye." 
1Samuel25:16 Wĩntoogo, yʋngo bãmb yɩɩ d ba n gũ tõndo la b ra gũuda tõnd rũmsi." 
1Samuel25:17 Bãng-y tiiri la ges-y y sẽn na n maan a soaba, tɩ tõnd zu-soaba ne a roog zãng fãa sãoong basa daare. Bãmb yaa nin-toaag tɩ looge al tɩ ned pa tõe n gom ne b ye.»" 
1Samuel25:18 Zĩig pʋg bala, a Abigayil rɩka bur kobs-yi, la ko-waoos a yiib ne rãam, ne rũms a nu sẽn segle, n paas ki sẽn kɩɩm pet a nu, ne bugsuntung bi-koeems gĩn koabga, la kankam miisdu kobs-yi. A rɩka rẽ fãa n zɩlg bõeense," 
1Samuel25:19 n yeel a sõgen-kamba: «Lʋɩ-y mam taoore, tɩ m pʋg yã!» A pa wilg a sɩda ye." 
1Samuel25:20 A zomba bõanga, n tũ so-buka n sig tãngã la ade, a Daviid ne a nebã dag n sigdame la a seg-b lame." 
1Samuel25:21 A Daviid da yetame: «Yaa zaalem bala, la m gũ dao kãnga sẽn da tar fãa weoogẽ, tɩ fɩ pa tol n meneme. M maan-a-la yel-sõmde t'a rol maam beed bala!" 
1Samuel25:22 Naaba-Wẽnd na sɩbg a Daviid bɛɛba ne b toolma fãa, la b ra bas tɩ ka ne beoogo bɩ bũmb kell a Nabal ye, rao ra kees a zakẽ ye.»" 
1Samuel25:23 A Abigayil sẽn yãe a Daviid, a siga a bõanga zug tao-tao, n vabend a Daviid taoore, n fõgneg a neng tẽnga." 
1Samuel25:24 A wõgemda a Daviid taoore n yeele: «M naaba! Ad-y yaa maam n konge, m zu-soaba! Bɩ y sak n kõ y yem-poaka sor t'a gom tɩ y kelge." 
1Samuel25:25 M naaba, nin-wẽng a Nabal sẽn maan bũmb ningã bɩ y ra ning-a y sũurẽ ye, t'a yaa wa a yʋʋra sẽn togsã, nabd bala, tɩ yẽnda nengẽ wã, sɩd yaa yalemdo. La m naaba, ad-y m pa yãend neba yãmb sẽn tʋm b rãmba ye." 
1Samuel25:26 La marsã, m naaba, sɩd menga, wala m Soabã sẽn ya Wẽndã, tɩ yãmb me vɩ wã, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n kokd yãmb nug, tɩ y da raag zɩɩm ye. Bɩ yãmb bɛɛbã, m naaba, la sẽn dat-b yamb ne wẽngã fãa, yɩ wala a Nabal!" 
1Samuel25:27 Bɩ y sak kũuna, m sẽn tall n wa kõ yãmbã la y reeg m pʋɩ nebã sẽn pʋgb-b yãmba, m Naaba." 
1Samuel25:28 M kotame tɩ y kõ y yem-poakã a kongra sugri, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd bala, m naaba, bãmb na tilg roog a ye sẽn kõn lʋɩ n kõ yãmba. Maan-y sugri, m naaba, tɩ yãmb zabda Wẽnd zabre; la b kõ tol n yãend pʋ-toogo yãmb nengẽ ye." 
1Samuel25:29 Neb n yik n digd yãmba, n baood y yõore, mik yãmb vɩɩma waa, m naaba, b na n bĩng-a-la Wẽnd nengẽ, Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, nengẽ; la Wẽnnaam na n loba yãmb bɛɛba, wala ned sẽn ning kugri a loaabgẽ n lobge." 
1Samuel25:30 M naaba, Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa maan yãmb yel-sõmd ningã b sẽn da pĩnd n yeele, n kõ yãmb naam tɩ yɩ a Israyɛl dĩma, yãmb kõn tol n bʋ ne y menga, la y yam kõn tol n bondg tɩ y daaga zɩɩm zaalem la y tuga ned beem y toor ye." 
1Samuel25:31 La Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa maan yãmb neere, m naaba, bɩ y tẽeg m yelle.»" 
1Samuel25:32 A Daviid yeela a Abigayil: «D Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn tʋm foom dũnna tɩ fo wa seg maama yĩnga!" 
1Samuel25:33 Wẽnd na ning-f barka, f yẽesem yĩnga! Wẽnd na ning-f barka, fo sẽn sagl maam dũnna tɩ m da yiis zɩɩm, la fo sẽn kok m nug yĩnga." 
1Samuel25:34 M Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, sẽn gɩdg maam tɩ m da maan wẽngã, m wẽend ne bãmb sẽn so vɩɩm, tɩ fo sã n da pa zoe tao tao n wa seg maam, ka la beoog tɛka m na menesẽ yẽe a Nabal ne rao fãa sẽn be a zakẽ.»" 
1Samuel25:35 A Daviid reega a Abigayil nugẽ a sẽn wa ne kũun ninga fãa, la a yeel-a lame: «Wẽnd na n kuls-f f yir ne laafi! Gese! Mam kelga f koɛɛga, la m deeg f kosgã neere.»" 
1Samuel25:36 A Abigayil sẽn ta yiri, a mikame t'a Nabal da segla dɩɩbo, dĩm dɩɩb menga, a sũur da yaa noogo, al t'a yũ rãam n tɩge, a Abigayil pa togs fɩ, yell kãsenga bɩ yell bil ye, al tɩ beoogo vẽege." 
1Samuel25:37 La yibeoogo, a Nabal dãama yiime, t'a pagã na n togs-a yɛla fãa. La a Nabal sũurã yalsa a yãoogẽ, n lebg wa kugri." 
1Samuel25:38 Sẽn maan wa dasem piiga, a Nabal tɩ saka Naaba-Wẽnde." 
1Samuel25:39 A Daviid sẽn wʋm a Nabal kũumã, a yeelame: «Wẽnd paam pẽgre! Tɩ bãmb gesa m yelle ne a Nabal sẽn da zẽng maamã, la bãmb n gɩdg maam tɩ m pa maan wẽng ye. Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame t'a Nabal pʋ-toogã leb a menga.» A Daviid tʋmame tɩ b kos a Abigayil t'a sak n legb a paga." 
1Samuel25:40 A Daviid tʋʋm-tʋmdba ta-la a Abigayil nengẽ, Karmɛl, n gom ne a woto: «A Daviid tʋma tõnd yãmb nengẽ, tɩ d wa peeg yãmb n wa t'a maan a paga.»" 
1Samuel25:41 A Abigayil yikame n wõgemd n fõgneg a neng tẽng n yetẽ: «M naaba! Sẽn zems ne maam bala, yaa m waasd y tʋʋm-tʋmdba nao!»" 
1Samuel25:42 La tao-tao bala, a Abigayil zomba bõanga, n yik n looge, tɩ kom-pugli a nu na n yãag-a. A tũ a Daviid tʋʋm-tʋmdba. A tɩ lebg a Daviid paga." 
1Samuel25:43 A Daviid da zoe n peega Zizreyɛl bi-pugla a ye, a Ayinoam, n maan a paga. Bãmb b yiibã n yɩ a Daviid pagba." 
1Samuel25:44 A Sol da pĩnd n deega a bi-pugla, a Mikal, a Daviid pagã, n kõ a Palti, Galim dao, a Layis, biiga." 
1Samuel26:1 Zif tẽngẽ dãmba waa n yeela a Sol, Gibea: «A Daviid pa kẽng n tɩ soond Akila weoog tãn-bila zugu laa?»" 
1Samuel26:2 A Sol yikame n kẽng Zif weoogo, ne rap tus a tã, gãndaad menga, a Israyɛl sʋka, n na n babs a Daviid." 
1Samuel26:3 A maana tãb-sika Akila tãn-bila zugu, sor noore, n tees weoogo. A Daviid da bee weo-kãnga la a bãngame t'a Sol waa n na n pʋg-a-la be." 
1Samuel26:4 A tʋma lɩɩsdba, sẽn na yɩ-la n bãng vẽenega, a Sol sã n sɩd waame." 
1Samuel26:5 Woto wã, a Daviid yikame n ta a Sol sẽn da sig zĩig ningã. La a yãee a Sol sẽn dag n gãe zĩig ningã, yẽ ne a Abnɛr, a Nɛr biigã, a tãnsoaba. A Sol da gãee tãb-sika tẽnsʋka tɩ neba da gũbg-a." 
1Samuel26:6 A Daviid goma ne a Ayimelɛk, a Ɛt yagenga, ne a Abisayi, a Seruya biiga la a Zoab ba-biiga, a yeel-b lame: «Ãnd dat n tũ maam, tɩ d sig n kẽ tãb-sikã n ta a Sol.» T'a Abisayi yeele: «Maam n na n tũ yãmb n sigi!»" 
1Samuel26:7 A Daviid ne a Abisayi kẽnga neba nengẽ yʋngo. La ade, a Sol dag n gãeeme n gõe tãb-sika tẽnsʋka, a kãnd da sela tẽnga, a zugẽ. A Abnɛr ne a neba fãa da gũbg-a lame n gãe." 
1Samuel26:8 A Abisayi yeela a Daviid: «Soaala-Wẽnd yõka y bɛyã n sagl y nugẽ; m kotame tɩ y kõ-m sore, tɩ m kõs-a ne kãndã, n ka a ne tẽngã, vugri bala, la na seke, m kõn le kõs n paas ye!»" 
1Samuel26:9 La a Daviid yeela a Abisayi: «Da maan-a bũmb koe, ãnd n na n kʋ Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naama n kong sɩbgre?" 
1Samuel26:10 Ayo! Ne Wẽnd sẽn vɩ wã, yaa bãmb bala n na n kʋ-a; a kũum daar sã n ta, bɩ a kẽnga zabre, n tɩ ki." 
1Samuel26:11 Wẽnd dɩ beem ne-ma, m sã n zẽk m nug Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naama zugu. Bɩ f rɩk kãndã sẽn sel a zugã la lɩnga ne kooma tɩ d looge.»" 
1Samuel26:12 Woto, a Daviid rɩka kãndã ne lɩnga ne koomã sẽn da be a Sol zugẽ wã tɩ b looge. Ned pa yãe bãmba, ned pa bãng bũmbu, ned ba a ye pa tol n neke, tɩ bãmb fãa da gõee gõeem kãseng ning Wẽnd sẽn da lub-ba a soaba pʋgẽ." 
1Samuel26:13 A Daviid sẽn yi tãb-sikã, a yalsa al yɩɩga, tãnga zugu. B sɩd da paam n vẽsga taaba." 
1Samuel26:14 A Daviid teesa a Nɛr biig, a Abnɛr, nebã n tãse: «Abnɛr, f ka na n leok-m laa?» A Abnɛr sokame: «Foo la a bõe n wekd dĩma tʋba?»" 
1Samuel26:15 T'a Daviid yeel a Abnɛr: «Fo ka yet tɩ f yaa raoa la f to ka Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ bɩ. Bõe tɩ f pa gũ dĩma, f zu-soaba, tɩ ned a yembre yi kɛɛnga n wa n na n kʋ dĩma, fo zu-soabã?" 
1Samuel26:16 Ade, fo sẽn maana ka neer ye! M wẽend ne Wẽnde, tɩ fo toga ne kũum, fo sẽn pa gũ f zu-soaba, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naama. Bɩ f ges marsã naab kãnde, la b lɩnga ne koomã sẽn da be b zugẽ wã, ges-y b sẽn be zĩig ning marsã.»" 
1Samuel26:17 A Sol bãnga a Daviid koɛɛgã n yeele: «Sɩd yaa fo koɛɛg bɩ, m biiga a Daviid?» T'a Daviid leoke: «Yaa mam koɛɛga, m zu-soab la m dĩma!»" 
1Samuel26:18 La a yeelame: «Yaa bõe tɩ m naaba pʋgd a sõgne? M maana bõe? Yell bʋg n be m zugu? 
1Samuel26:19 M zu-soaba la m dĩma sak bala n kelg y sõgna koɛɛga. Sã n yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n ning yãmb yamẽ tɩ y zab ne maam, bɩ b kok m vɩɩma sẽn tees bãmb wa yũ-noog kũuni! Sã n ya ninsaalba n dat m vɩɩma, bɩ Wẽnd yãk b bark zãnga. Ade, dũnna b digd-m lame, b digd-m lame n zãagd ne tẽng ning Soaala sẽn kõ b buudu la yaa wala b yet-m lame: ‹Zãag n tɩ waoog wẽn-naandse!›" 
1Samuel26:20 Bɩ m zɩɩm da raag tẽnga tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd nenga zãr ne m ye. Yaa bõe tɩ Israyɛl dĩma bob zabr ne maam? M sãoo kareng ne bõe? Yaa bõe tɩ y rigd-m wala tãms zut koadenga?» 
1Samuel26:21 A Sol yeelame: «M maana yel-wẽnde; m biiga a Daviid, lebg n wa tɩ m kõn le maan-f wẽng ye, tɩ dũnna daarã fo gesame tɩ mam vɩɩm bee yõodo. Mam maana wa yalma: m tudga wʋsgo.»" 
1Samuel26:22 A Daviid leokame: «Ad dĩma kãnde, bɩ ned a ye wa reeg-a!" 
1Samuel26:23 Wẽnd na rol ned kam fãa ne b zemsgo la b sɩda, tɩ rũnna, bãmb da ninga yãmb mam nugẽ, la m pa sak tɩ m nug sɩɩs dĩma Wẽnd sẽn taag a soab kaama ye." 
1Samuel26:24 La wala yãmb vɩɩm sẽn be yõod mam nifẽ wã, woto me, mam vɩɩm bee yõodo, Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ, la bãmb na zãag-m ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn tõe n yãk yõore.»" 
1Samuel26:25 A Sol yeela a Daviid: «M biiga Daviid, Wẽnd na ning f barka! F na tʋm tʋʋm bɛda, f tʋʋma na zĩnd yõod wakat fãa!» A Daviid le rɩka a sore, t'a Sol me leb a yiri." 
1Samuel27:1 A Daviid kõ-la a meng yam n yeele: «Daar a ye bala, a Sol nug na kʋʋ maam; mam sẽn na n zoe n kẽng Filisti rãmba tẽng na sãoog m yĩnga. Daare, a Sol na yaa n bas m pʋgbo a Israyɛl soolmẽ, tɩ m paam n tɩlge.»" 
1Samuel27:2 Woto a Daviid rɩka sore ne a neb kobs-yoobã, la b kẽnga a Akis nengẽ, a Maok biiga, Gat dĩma." 
1Samuel27:3 A Daviid tilga a yiri n pẽnega a Akis, Gat tẽnga, yẽnda ne a neba, ned fãa ne a zaka, a Daviid ne a pagba a yiibu, a Zizreyɛl biig, a Ayinoam, la a Abigayil, Karmɛl dao a Nabal pʋg-kõore." 
1Samuel27:4 Kibara taa a Sol t'a Daviid zoeeme n kẽng Gat la a basame n le ka baood-a ye. 
1Samuel27:5 A Daviid yeela a Akis: «Y sa n sɩd zoeta m nimbãanega, m yõkd-y sɛɛga tɩ y kõ-m zĩiga y tẽnga a ye pʋgẽ, tɩ m zĩndi. Yãmb yamba yɩta wãna n zĩnd y sɛɛgẽ, y na-tẽnga pʋgẽ.»" 
1Samuel27:6 Badaar bala, a Akis kõ-a-la Siklag tẽnga, yaa rẽ yĩnga, la Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba so Siklag n tãag rũnnã." 
1Samuel27:7 A Daviid zĩnda Filisti rãmba tẽnga yʋʋmd la kiis a naase. 
1Samuel27:8 A Daviid ne a neba kẽng n tɩ taka zabre ne Gesuritse, Girgazitse la Amalesitse, tɩ yaa bãmb buudã n da kẽed tẽnga al daar zãra, sẽn sɩng Sur, n tãag Ezipt tẽnga." 
1Samuel27:9 A Daviid ra kʋʋda rapa la pagba, ba a ye ra ka põsd ye. A ra loogda ne rũm-bɛda la rũm-bõonego, bõeense la yʋgma la futu; la a sã n lɛɛg n wa, a ra tallda fãa n kɩt a Akis." 
1Samuel27:10 A Akis sã n da soke: «Y tɩ zaba yɛɛne rũnna?» A Daviid da leokdame tɩ yaa ne Zɩɩda Nug-rɩtg rãmba, bɩ ne Yerameyɛl Nug-rɩtgo bɩ ne Kenitsa Nug-rɩtg rãmba." 
1Samuel27:11 A Daviid da pa sakde tɩ rao bɩ pag põse n tũ n wa Gat ye. A ra zoeta rabeem tɩ b na n wa gome n luk a bãongo. Tɩ b na n wa gome n yet t'a maana woto la woto. Woto n sɩd yɩ a manesem a sẽn waa n be Filisti rãmba tẽngẽ. 
1Samuel27:12 Dẽ me la a Akis da pelga a pʋg ne a Daviid; a ra gomda a yamẽ: «A Daviid manesma kɩtame t'a buuda a Israyɛl kis-a, woto a na n yɩɩ m sõgen wakat buud fãa.»" 
1Samuel28:1 Wẽnd kãnga Filisti rãmba tigsa b tãb-biisi n na n zab ne Israyɛl; la a Akis yeela a Daviid: «Bãng tɩ foom ne f neba na n tũu maam n kẽng zabrã.» 
1Samuel28:2 T'a Daviid leoke: «Yaa woto marsã la f na n bãng f yamba sẽn na n tʋm tʋʋmd ninga.» T'a Akis yeela a Daviid: «Fo na n yɩɩ mam gũuda, daar fãa.»" 
1Samuel28:3 A Samwɛl da kiime, t'a Israyɛl da yãb-a, n mum-a a tẽngẽ, Rama. A Sol da gɩdg a soolma fãa pʋgẽ, wa bũmb sẽn kisi, kɩɩms boolgo, kũum sokre. A waa n kong n kɩɩsa a meng noore. Ad sẽn tũ ne bũmb ninga." 
1Samuel28:4 Filisti rãmba da tigma taaba n wa gãneg tãp Sunem. A Sol tigma a Israyɛl zãng fãa la yaa Gilboa la a tɩ gãneg tãpo. 
1Samuel28:5 A Sol yãee Filisti rãmba tãb-sikã n yɛɛse, a sũur kiuusame t'a rigd wa rindibgu." 
1Samuel28:6 A Sol makame n na n sok Naaba-Wẽnde la bãmb pa leok-a ye. B pa leok-a ne bag-teedã n-yẽe bɩ Ayoo, b pa leok a zãmsd pʋgẽ, b pa leok-a ne bãngd noor ye." 
1Samuel28:7 Dẽ la a yeela a neba: «Wilg-y m pag a ye sẽn sokd kɩɩmse sẽn be zĩig ninga tɩ m tɩ sok-a bũmbu.» A poorẽ dãmba yeel-a lame: «Pag a ye n be Eyin-Dor, n boond kɩɩmse.»" 
1Samuel28:8 La a Sol yeesa a fut n dɩk fut a taaba n yelge tɩ b ra bãng tɩ yaa yẽ ye, n loog ne neb a yi. B taa paga nengẽ ne yʋngo. A Sol yeel-a lame: «Bũmb la m dat tɩ f togs-ma, ned a ye sẽn ki la m dat tɩ f bool-a n kõ-ma. M na n pʋd a soab yʋʋre.»" 
1Samuel28:9 Paga leokame: «Ade, fo mii a Sol sẽn maan bũmb ninga; a soolma fãa pʋgẽ a gɩdga kɩɩms boolgo la b sokre. Yaa bõe marsã la y gãnegd-m bẽdgo sẽn tõe n wa ne m kũum?»" 
1Samuel28:10 A Sol wẽename n yeele: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd tɩ bũmb kõn maan-f yell kãnga yĩng ye!» 
1Samuel28:11 Paga yeelame: «F ratame tɩ m bool ãnna?» T'a Sol leoke: «Bool a Samwɛl n kõ-ma!» 
1Samuel28:12 Paga yãenda a Samwɛl n kelme. A lɛɛg n yeela a Sol: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb belg maam? Yaa yãmb la a Sol!» 
1Samuel28:13 Dĩma yeel-a lame: «Da zoe rabeem ye! La togs maam f sẽn yãende.» Tɩ paga na n leoke: «Mam nee kɩɩm a ye sẽn yit kɩɩmsẽ n watẽ!» 
1Samuel28:14 A Sol sokame: «A wẽnda ãnna?» Tɩ pagã leoke: «Yaa nin-kẽem n wate, a pila fuugu!» A Sol bãngame tɩ yaa a Samwɛl la a sulgame, n fõgneg a neng tẽnga, n wõgemde." 
1Samuel28:15 A Samwɛl yeela a Sol: «Bõe tɩ f sãamd m vʋʋsgo, Bõe tɩ f boond-m ka?» A Sol leokame: «Yaa yell n pak maam la wʋm-m lame: Filisti rãmba kaooga zabre ne maam la Soaala-Wẽnd loogame n bas-ma. Bãmb pa le leokd-m ne bãngdba noore, bɩ ne zãmsd ye. La mam boola yãmb, tɩ y wilg maam, bũmb ning m sẽn tog n maane.»" 
1Samuel28:16 A Samwɛl yeelame: «Bõe yĩnga tɩ fo sokd maam. Fo meng neeme tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd zãagame n bas foom, n dɩt beem ne foo." 
1Samuel28:17 B maana foom wala m sẽn da pĩnd n togs foo bãmb yʋʋr yĩngã. B reega naama f nusẽ n kõ a Daviid. 
1Samuel28:18 Fo pa reeg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg ye, fo pa kɩt tɩ b rok b sũur ne Amalesitsa kʋʋb ye. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la yɛla sẽn ya woto wã." 
1Samuel28:19 La rẽ pʋgẽ me, Naaba-Wẽnd na n naaga foom ne a Israyɛl kamba n sagl Filisti rãmba nusẽ. Beoogo foom ne f kamba, yãmb na n looga ne maam kɩɩmsa zĩigẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd na n basa Israyɛl ne a tãb-sikã Filisti rãmba nusẽ.»" 
1Samuel28:20 Wakat kãng bala, a Sol lʋɩɩ tẽng sara, ne a woglma fãa; a Samwɛl goama da kẽes-a-la waood kãsenga, n paas me, a pãng da pa waoog ye, t'a noor da pa tol n lemb dɩɩb daara tõr ye." 
1Samuel28:21 Paga wa n bʋʋga a Sol, n mik t'a yɛɛsa al wʋsgo; a yeel-a lame: «Ade, yãmb yem-poaka reega yãmb noore; m saka yãmb goama. M pa zoe m vɩɩma bõn ye." 
1Samuel28:22 Marsã bɩ yãmb me kelg m koɛɛga, la y sak tɩ m kõ-y bur girga tɩ y rɩ n paam pãng n le rɩk y sore.»" 
1Samuel28:23 A Sol zãgsame n yetẽ: «Mam pa na n dɩ ye!» A poorẽ dãmba ne paga modg-a lame, t'a sak n kelg-ba. A yikame n zaoond goeele." 
1Samuel28:24 Paga da tara nag-bil wubdga a zakẽ, t'a kʋ-a tao-tao, n yãk zom n nage, n wẽ bur sẽn pa ning bɩlle." 
1Samuel28:25 Paga rɩka fãa n wa tẽgen a Sol ne a poorẽ dãmba, tɩ b rɩ n yaool n yik n kul yʋng kãng bala." 
1Samuel29:1 Filisti rãmba tigma b tãb-biisa fãa Afɛk; la Israyɛl kamba ra siga kʋɩls niyns sẽn be Zizreyɛl tẽnga sɛɛga. 
1Samuel29:2 Filisti tãnsoaben-dãmba ra lʋɩ b tãb-biisa taoore. A Daviid ne a poorẽ dãmba la a Akis n da baasd kẽndã. 
1Samuel29:3 Filisti nanamsã sokame: «Ebre kãensa yita yɛ?» La a Akis leoka Filisti nanamsã: «Yaa a Daviid, Israyɛl dĩm, a Sol, sõgne! A yʋʋmde bɩ a yʋʋm a yiib marsã a sẽn be ne maam, la a sẽn waa n nok maama tɛka n tãag rũnna daare, m pa yãe a kɛk la a goaleng ye.»" 
1Samuel29:4 Filisti nanamsã puuga b sũur ne a Akis, n yeel-a: «Rig nin-kãnga t'a leb tẽng ning fo sẽn kõ-a wã, a ra yi zabre ne tõnd ye, n da wa ta zabr zĩigẽ n tulg n zab-d ye! Yõa na n yɩ wãna n paam a zu-soab yel-sõmde, tɩ pa tũ ne tõnd neba zut fiuusgu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ka Daviid kãnga la b sẽn yɩɩnd woto wã laa: ‹A Sol kʋʋ neb tusri, la a Daviid kʋʋ tus piiga.› »" 
1Samuel29:6 A Akis boola a Daviid n yeel-a: «Ne Wẽnd sẽn vɩ wã, fo ya pʋ-peelem soaba la m sũur da yaa noogo d sẽn waa n tũud taab n zabdẽ, n kẽnd la d lebgdẽ. M pa yãe sẽn yɩ wẽng f nengẽ ye, al daar ning fo sẽn wa m nengẽ n tãag rũnna. La nanamsã tugda beem ne foom." 
1Samuel29:7 Woto yĩnga, bɩ f leb ne laafi, n da sãam Filisti nanamsã sũur ye.»" 
1Samuel29:8 A Daviid yeela a Akis: «Mam maana bõe? Mam sẽn sɩng n kẽ yãmb tãpa tɛka, m maana bõe tɩ y sũur puug ne maam tɩ sek m kõn le tõog n tɩ zab ne m zu-soaba bɛɛba?»" 
1Samuel29:9 A Akis leoka a Daviid: «Fo meng miime tɩ m sũur nooma ne foom wala Soaala malɛka, la yaa Filisti nanamsã n yeele: ‹Pa tog t'a kẽng zabrã ne tõnd ye.›" 
1Samuel29:10 Rẽ yĩnga yik-y yibeoog pĩnda, foo ne f zu-soaba neb sẽn tũ foom n wa ka wã, la y leb zĩig ning mam sẽn kõ yãmba. Da sãam f sũur ye, tɩ mam nong-f lame. Yik-y tõd-beoogo, tɩ zĩig sã n yẽege, bɩ y sɩng kẽnde.»" 
1Samuel29:11 A Daviid ne a neba yika tõd-beoog pĩnda n loog n leb Filisti rãmb tẽngẽ. Sã n ya Filisti rãmba, bãmb teesa Zizreyɛl." 
1Samuel30:1 Da-yɩten-daare, a Daviid ne a neba taa Siklag. B mikame tɩ Amalesitsa ra zaba ne Negɛb rãmba, ne Siklag: b ra sãama Siklag n tol n yõog-a bugum." 
1Samuel30:2 B ra yõga pagba ne neb niyns fãa sẽn da be tẽnga pʋga, bɛda la bõonego. B ra pa kʋ ned ba a ye ye, la b ra talla b sẽn yõg b rãmba, n kell n dɩk b sore n looge." 
1Samuel30:3 A Daviid ne a neba sẽn ta b tẽngẽ, b mikame tɩ b yõog-a lame la b looga ne b pagba, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli." 
1Samuel30:4 Woto, a Daviid ne a neba sẽn da pʋgda sɩnga kelemse la b kũmame al tɩ b pãnga fãa sɛ." 
1Samuel30:5 B ra yõga a Daviid pabga a yiiba me n looge. Yaa Zizreyɛl tẽng paga, a Ayinoam ne a Abigayil, Karmɛl Nabal pʋg-kõorã." 
1Samuel30:6 A Daviid sũur da sãama al wʋsgo, neba ra gomdame tɩ b na n lab-a-la ne kuga, tɩ ned kam fãa da zĩi ne sũ-sãanga la a yãbd a bi-ribl bɩ a bi-pugla. La a Daviid sũur le kengame, Wẽnnaam, a Soaala yĩnga." 
1Samuel30:7 A Daviid yeela maan-kʋʋda, a Abiyatar, a Ayimelɛk biiga: «Tall sãnem-pɛ-m-poore n wa.» La a Abiyatar talla sãnem-pɛ-m-poore n wa." 
1Samuel30:8 A Daviid soka Wẽnnaam: «M tõe pʋga zab-zabdbã la m na paam-b sɩda?» La leokrã yɩɩ woto: «Pʋge, tɩ f na paame, la f na n fãag b sẽn yõg b rãmba.»" 
1Samuel30:9 A Daviid kẽna ne a neb kobs-yooba sẽn da be ne yẽnda, la b ta Besor kʋɩlgã." 
1Samuel30:10 Neb kobs-yi n pa tɩ b ra yɛɛ wʋsgo n pa tõe n gãndg Besor kʋɩlga ye: woto a Daviid kell n kẽnga ne neb kobs-naase. 
1Samuel30:11 B yãee Ezipt ned a yembre weoogẽ wã, la b tall-a lame n wa a Daviid taoore. B kõ-a-la buri t'a wãbe, la b kõ-a-la koom t'a yũ." 
1Samuel30:12 B leb n kõ-a-la kankama la bugsuntung biis sẽn kʋɩɩse, gĩin a yiibu. A rɩɩme t'a pãng le wa; sɩd me a ra ka tol n dɩ la a yũ bũmbu al sẽn ta dasem a tã, wĩntoog la yʋngo." 
1Samuel30:13 A Daviid sok-a lame: «Ãnd n so foom, la fo yita yɛ?» A leokame: «M yaa Ezipt bi-bɩɩga, Amalesitg a yembre yem-daoogo. Ad dasem a tãab rũnna, mam zu-soaba sẽn bas maam, m sẽn ka laafi yĩnga." 
1Samuel30:14 Tõnd zaba ne Krɛt Nug-rɩtg rãmba, ne a Zɩɩda la a Kalɛb Nug-rɩtg rãmba la d yõoga Siklag bugum.»" 
1Samuel30:15 A Daviid sok-a lame: «F tõe n yãag-m-la zab-zabdb kãens nengẽ?» La a leokame: «Wẽen ne f Wẽnnaamã tɩ f pa na n kʋ-m ye, la f pa na n dɩk maam n kõ m zu-soaba ye. F sã n sak boto, m na tall foom n kẽng zab-zabdba nengẽ.»" 
1Samuel30:16 La a yãag-a lame, la b mikame tɩ b ra sẽeg n pida ne tẽnga, n dɩtẽ la b yũuda, la b maand b kibsa, tɩ sɩda, teed wʋsgo la b wʋk Filisti rãmba tẽnga la Zɩɩda tẽnga." 
1Samuel30:17 A Daviid kʋ-b lame al yibeoogo n tãag zaabre n kãab-b ne Wẽnde. Ned ba a ye ka põs ye, sã n ka kom-bɩɩb kobs-naase sẽn zomb yʋgma n zoe n põse." 
1Samuel30:18 A Daviid reega Amalesitsã sẽn dɩk bũmb niynsa fãa. A Daviid fãaga a pagb a yiibã. 
1Samuel30:19 Bũmb ba a ye ka menem ye, al ba teedo n tɩ tãag kom-dibli la kom-pugli, bũmb ning fãa b sẽn da zɛ n loog ne wã, a Daviid le talla fãa n wa." 
1Samuel30:20 B riga rũm-bõonego la rũm-bɛda n taas a Daviid taoore n yetẽ: «A Daviid zabr pʋɩɩr la woto.» 
1Samuel30:21 A Daviid babsa neb kobs-yi wã sẽn da yɛ n le pa tõe n kẽna, t'a bas-b Besor kʋɩlga rʋʋre. B yik n sega a Daviid ne a neba sẽn da pʋgdã: a Daviid ne a neba me seg-b lame n pʋʋs-ba." 
1Samuel30:22 Neb kẽer n da be a Daviid neba sʋka n ya nin-toose la nin-yaalse, b zẽka b koeese n yeel: «Nin-bãmba sẽn ka rʋʋg kʋɩlga wa tõndã, bɩ b ra kõ-b bũmb ba a ye tõnd sẽn deega pʋgẽ, sã ka b toorẽ pagba la b kamba; b reeg-ba n zoe.»" 
1Samuel30:23 La a Daviid yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn maan bũmb ning n kõ tõndã, pa tog tɩ y tʋm woto ye, d saam-biisi. Soaala-Wẽnd yalsa tõnd sɛɛgẽ, la bãmb n ning tõnd nusẽ zab-zabdba sẽn wa n zab ne tõndã." 
1Samuel30:24 Ãnd n na n kelg y gomdã? Sẽn kẽnga zabrã sẽn deegd bũmb ninga, boto me la b kõt sẽn yaas-b n gũ teedã. B naagda fãa n pʋɩ taaba.»" 
1Samuel30:25 La badaar tɛka, a Daviid kɩtame tɩ rẽnda lebg noor a Israyɛl yĩnga, la rog-n-miki sẽn ket n yɛs ne rũnna." 
1Samuel30:26 A sẽn ta Siklag, a Daviid tʋma Zɩɩda nin-kẽemba pʋɩɩr, tẽng-tẽnga, ne koe-kãnga: «Yãmb yĩnga, baad-y kũuni sẽn yãk Wẽnd bɛɛb teedẽ, tõnd sẽn zab n paame.»" 
1Samuel30:27 Kũuna sẽn ta b rãmb la woto: Betɛl rãmba, Negɛb-Ramot rãmba, Yatir rãmba," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroɛr dãmba, Sifmot rãmba, Estemoa rãmba." 
1Samuel30:29 Rakal rãmba, Yerameyɛl dãmba, Kenitsa tẽns rãmba," 
1Samuel30:30 Orma rãmba, Bor-Asã rãmba, Atak rãmba," 
1Samuel30:31 Ebrõ rãmba n paas tẽns niyns fãa a Daviid sẽn zĩnd ne a nebã. 
1Samuel31:1 Filisti rãmba zaba ne a Israyɛl la a Israyɛl dapa fãa zoe Filisti rãmba taoore, la b kʋ kẽer n gãneg Gilboa tãnga zugu." 
1Samuel31:2 Filisti rãmba diga a Sol ne a kamba, n kʋ a Zonatã, a Abinadab, la a Malkisuwa, a Sol kamba." 
1Samuel31:3 Zabra tooga fãa lʋɩ-la a Sol zugu; tãbda rãmb n yãend-a. Yẽ me nif sẽn teeg-ba, a yɛɛsame." 
1Samuel31:4 A Sol yeela sõgen ninga sẽn da tʋkda a zab-teedã: «Wõog-f sʋʋga n kõs-ma, tɩ nin-dẽgd bãmba na n wa tão-ma, la b yaal-m, n ning-m yãnde.» La sõgna sẽn da tʋk a zab-teedã pa sak ye, tɩ rabeem da tar-a lame, la a Sol lʋɩ n bʋʋga a sʋʋgã n kõs a menga." 
1Samuel31:5 Sõgna sẽn yãe t'a Sol kiime, yẽ me lʋɩɩ n bʋʋga a sʋʋga la a naaga a Sol n ki." 
1Samuel31:6 Yɩɩ woto la b ki daar a ye, a Sol ne a kom-dibli a tã la sõgna sẽn da tʋkd a zab-teedã." 
1Samuel31:7 B sẽn yãend b neba sẽegre, n wʋm a Sol ne a kamba kũum, Israyɛl kamba sẽn be-b bãg-faaga rʋʋnde la sẽn be-b Zʋrdẽ rʋʋnde, b fãa yi-la b tẽnsẽ n zoe la Filisti rãmba tɩ reega b tẽnsã n kẽedẽ." 
1Samuel31:8 Vẽkembeoogo, Filisti rãmba wa n zɛɛ teedã. B yãenda a Sol ne a kamba a tãabã sẽn gãe Gilboa tãnga zugu." 
1Samuel31:9 B fiuuga a Sol zugu, n wʋk a zab-teedo. B kɩtame tɩ b sa n togs kibarã b wẽn-naandsa dotẽ la zĩis fãa." 
1Samuel31:10 B bĩnga a Sol zab-teedã a Astarte rãmb doogẽ, la b yagla a Sol Bɛt-Seã lalga zugu." 
1Samuel31:11 Galaad soolem, Yabɛs tẽng neba wʋma Filisti rãmba sẽn maan a Sol bũmb ninga." 
1Samuel31:12 La gãndaada fãa kẽna yʋng a ye tõre, n wa rok a Sol yĩnga Bɛt-Seã lalga zugu la b rɩka a kamba me. La b lebg n waa Yabɛs n yõog kũuma bugum." 
1Samuel31:13 B wʋka b kõaba n tɩ bus Yabɛs, tɩɩg sẽn wẽnd pusg tẽngre; b loe b noor dasem a yopoe." 
2Samuel1:1 A Sol kũuma poore, a Daviid tõoga Amalesitsã, n lɛɛg n wa Siklag. A paa be rasem a yiibu." 
2Samuel1:2 Da-yɩten-daara la rao a ye n yii a Sol tãb-sikã n wa. A futã ra kẽesame, t'a zug ra yug tom. A sẽn ta a Daviid taoore, a lʋɩɩ tẽnga n wõgemde." 
2Samuel1:3 T'a Daviid sok-a: «Fo yita yɛ?» T'a leoke: «M yi-la a Israyɛl tãb-sikã n zoe n põse.» 
2Samuel1:4 T'a Daviid sok-a: «Bõe n maam be? Bɩ f togs ma!» Daoã leokame: «Neba kong n zoeeme, neb wʋsg paa tãpẽ. A Sol meng ne a Zonatã maana yõore.»" 
2Samuel1:5 A Daviid soka bi-bɩɩga sẽn waa ne kibarã: «F yɩɩ wãn n bãng t'a Sol la a biig a Zonatã maana yõore?» 
2Samuel1:6 Daoã sẽn waa ne kibarã leokame: «Segame tɩ m da bee Gilboa tãnga zugu; la m yãee a Sol sẽn tik a kãnde, n yɛsẽ, tɩ bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdb gũbg-a n sege." 
2Samuel1:7 Dĩma sẽn wẽnemd n yãend-ma, b bool-m lame tɩ m leoke: ‹M Naaba!›" 
2Samuel1:8 Tɩ b soke: ‹Fo yaa ãnna?› Tɩ m yeele: ‹M yaa Amalesitga.› 
2Samuel1:9 Tɩ b yeel maam: ‹Kolg-la f kʋ-ma. M ket n mi m nenga, la m gãba paooda.›" 
2Samuel1:10 La mam kolgame, n kʋ-ba tɩ m da miime tɩ b kõn põs bɛɛba ye. M fõka b naam pugla b zugu, n pidg zũurã b sẽn da ning b kanga. M waa ne-ba n na n kõ yãmba, m dĩma.»" 
2Samuel1:11 A sẽn wʋm woto, a Daviid taka a futu n kẽese, la neba fãa sẽn da be-b ne-yẽ wã me kẽesa b futu." 
2Samuel1:12 B pogla kʋʋre, n yãb n yãbe, n zãgs rɩɩbo al tɩ ta zĩ-sobdo. B maana rẽ a Sol ne a biiga, a Zonatã, yĩnga, la Wẽnd buudu, a Israyɛl kamba, sʋʋga sẽn kooda yĩnga." 
2Samuel1:13 A Daviid yeela bi-bɩɩga sẽn wa ne kibarã: «Fo yita yɛ?» T'a leoke: «M ba yaa noaka, a yaa Amalesitga.»" 
2Samuel1:14 A Daviid yeel-a lame: «Fo yɩɩ wãna n pa zoe rabeem n sak n zẽk f nugu n kʋ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naama?» 
2Samuel1:15 La a Daviid boola ned a yembre n yeel-a: «Kolg n wẽ-a!» T'a sɩd wẽ-a n lubi. 
2Samuel1:16 A Daviid yeelame: «Yaa fo meng n bao f kũum n saag n yiis f noorẽ tɩ foo n kʋ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naama.» 
2Samuel1:17 Yɩɩn-kãnga la a Daviid pʋd yã n na n yãb a Sol ne a biiga, a Zonatã, kʋʋre." 
2Samuel1:18 Tãp yɩɩlle, Zɩɩda kamba sẽn tog n zãmse, la sẽn gʋls Nin-sõngã sebr pʋga. A Daviid yɩɩla woto:" 
2Samuel1:19 A Israyɛl zu-zẽkra paa tãng zugu, gãndaada lʋɩ-la b lʋɩɩse!" 
2Samuel1:20 Da togs-y rẽ Gat tẽng ye, da moon-y kibarã Askalõ tɩ Filisti kom-pugli wã wa noogd b sũur ye, tɩ nin-dẽgda kamb wa kɩdemd n langdẽ ye." 
2Samuel1:21 Gilboa tãmse! Bɩ meenem la sa-koom da le rʋʋg y zug ye! Bɩ pʋt da le pelg kood y pennẽ ye! Yaa yãmb zutu la rẽgd bol gãndaada gãndo. Be la a Sol gãonga rẽgem yã; a Sol gãonga kõn le sõ kaam ye 
2Samuel1:22 A Zonatã tãpa yaool n zɩ n tare tɩ bɛɛbã n pid ne pãng ye. A Sol sʋʋga sẽn da tar vargr la a sẽn tare. 
2Samuel1:23 A Sol ne a Zonatã yam kẽe taaba b vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ, la ka kũuma n waa n welg-b ne taab ye. B tʋʋlem da yɩɩda sɩls tʋʋlem, b sũ-keelem yɩɩga bõnyẽes sũ-keelem!" 
2Samuel1:24 Israyɛl kom-pugli, ning-y nintãm n yãb a Sol! A ra yeelgda yãmb ne nufa, a ra zam-y-la ne fan teedo. Y futa ra tisa ne sãnem n tar yãgbo." 
2Samuel1:25 Zabra sẽn waa n kɛɛd wa bẽere, wakat kãng la gãndaada lʋɩ yã, tãmsa zut la a Zonatã gãand yã! Zonatã, m yao sõngo, ges m sũ-sãanga!" 
2Samuel1:26 Ges m sẽn da nong-f ne nonglem ninga! Fo nonglma la m da pẽgd n yɩɩd fãa, n pẽgd-a n yɩɩd rao ne pag nonglem." 
2Samuel1:27 Bõe tɩ gãndaada lʋɩ b lʋɩɩse? Bõe tɩ bãmb ne b zab teeda pa tãpẽ? 
2Samuel2:1 Dẽ loogr poore, a Daviid soka Soaala-Wẽnde; a goma woto: «M tõe n kẽng n tɩ zĩnda Zɩɩda soolmẽ bɩ?» Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leok a: «Kẽnge!» La a Daviid le sokame: «M na kẽnga tẽn-bʋgo?» Tɩ b leok-a: «Ebrõ!»" 
2Samuel2:2 A Daviid kẽnga be ne a pagb a yiibã: a Ayinoam, Zizreyɛl tẽng biigã la a Abigayil, sẽn yɩ Karmɛl dao, a Nabal, paga." 
2Samuel2:3 A Daviid kɩtame tɩ sẽn da be-b ne-yẽ wã kẽng, ned kam fãa ne a zaka, n tɩ zĩnd Ebrõ ne a tẽn-toose." 
2Samuel2:4 A Zɩɩda neba waa Ebrõ, n pʋdg a Daviid zug naam kaam, t'a yɩ a Zɩɩda dĩma. La b waa n yeela a Daviid: «Yaa Galaad Yabɛs rãmb n solg a Sol yaoogẽ.»" 
2Samuel2:5 A Daviid tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ yeel Yabɛs-Galaad dãmba: «Wẽnd na ning y barka! Yãmb sẽn puk y pʋ-peelem ne y dĩm a Sol, n bao zĩig n mum-a." 
2Samuel2:6 Bɩ Wẽnd kell n pʋg-y daar fãa ne b nonglem! La yãmb sẽn maan sõm ninga ne a Sol, mam me na maan-y neere." 
2Samuel2:7 La marsã, bɩ y keng y pɛlga la y maan daoodo. Yãmb zu-soaba a Sol maana yõore, la a Zɩɩda rooga rãmb pʋdga m zug naam kaam, tɩ m led a Sol zĩiga.»" 
2Samuel2:8 A Nɛr biiga, a Abnɛr, a Sol tãnsoaba, da peega a Sol biiga, a Isbaal la a tall-a lame n kẽng Maanayim." 
2Samuel2:9 A kitame t'a lebg dĩm Galaad, Asʋr, Zizreyɛl, Efrayim, Bẽnzame la Israyɛl tõre." 
2Samuel2:10 A Sol biiga, a Isbaal, yʋʋm da taa pis-naase, a sẽn wa n lebg Israyɛl dĩma; la a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a yiibu. Yaa a Zɩɩda roog bala n da kẽed a Daviid." 
2Samuel2:11 A Daviid sẽn pa Ebrõ wala a Zɩɩda rĩm, yɩɩ yʋʋm a yopoe la kiis a yoobe." 
2Samuel2:12 A Nɛr biiga, a Abnɛr, la a Sol biig, a Isbaal gũudba yii Maanayim n tees Gabaõ." 
2Samuel2:13 A Seruya biiga, a Zoab, ne a Daviid gũudba me boba zabre. Yaa Gabaõ ko-baoora sɛɛg la b seg taaba tɩ bãmb dãmb be ko baoora kɩreng a ye, tɩ bãmb dãmb be kɩreng a to." 
2Samuel2:14 A Abnɛr yeela a Zoab: «Bɩ neba yik n mao taab tõnd taoore!» A Zoab leokame: «B yiki!» 
2Samuel2:15 B yikame. B sõda a Bẽnzame roogẽ, a Sol biig a Isbaal neba bãmb piig la a yiibu, n sõd a Daviid neba, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
2Samuel2:16 Ned kam fãa gãda a zabd-n-taag yubla, la a rɩk a sʋʋga n kõs a lʋgre, tɩ b fãa naag taaba n lʋɩ. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la b sẽn bool zĩ-kãng tɩ sʋʋs pĩisẽ, la a bee Gabaõ." 
2Samuel2:17 Badaare zab toaag n zĩndi la a Daviid tãb-biisa tõoga a Abnɛr ne a Israyɛl neba. 
2Samuel2:18 A Seruya kamb a tãaba zĩnda be: a Zoab, a Abisayi la a Asayɛl. A Asayɛl da tʋʋla ne zoeese wala yãka." 
2Samuel2:19 A Asayɛl wudgame n pʋgd a Abnɛr, la a pa tol n bʋdg goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
2Samuel2:20 A Abnɛr wẽnegame n yeele: «Yaa foom bɩ, Asayɛl.» La a leokame: «N-yẽe!»" 
2Samuel2:21 A Abnɛr yeelame: «Kek goabg bɩ rɩtgo, yõk tãb-bi-pol a ye n deeg a sẽn so fãa.» La Asayɛl pa tʋlg n bas pʋgbo la a pa kek ye." 
2Samuel2:22 A Abnɛr le yeela a Asayɛl: «Kek la f bas m pʋgbo, ka rẽ m na n wẽ-f lame n lubi. La f sã n lʋɩ, m na le tõog yals f ba-biig a Zoab taoore?»" 
2Samuel2:23 A Asayɛl tõdgame t'a kõn serg ye. Woto wã a Abnɛr kõsa a pʋga ne a kãndã, la kãnda sãag n yi-la a poorẽ t'a lʋɩ n ki zĩig pʋgẽ. Ned ning fãa sẽn da ta a Asayɛl sẽn lʋɩẽ wã da yalsdame." 
2Samuel2:24 A Zoab ne a Abisayi zoe n pʋga a Abnɛr, la wĩndg lʋɩɩs sasa, b taa Gibea-Ama, sẽn be Gia yaanga, Gabaõ we-raooga sor zugu." 
2Samuel2:25 A Bẽnzame kamba sũu taaba, a Abnɛr poorẽ, la b yalsa tãn-bil a ye zugu." 
2Samuel2:26 A Abnɛr zĩnda tãn-bila zug n bool n tees a Zoab n yetẽ: «Sʋʋgã na n kell n tara varg bala? Fo ka mi tɩ sã n ya woto kõn baas neere? Wakat bʋg la f na n yaa n kabs f neba tɩ b vẽ ne saam-biisa zab-taasma?» 
2Samuel2:27 A Zoab leokame: «Ne Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn vɩ wã, ad-fo sã n da pa gomẽ, neba kõn basẽ taab pʋgbo, tɩ beoog raara ka vẽeg ye.»" 
2Samuel2:28 A Zoab kɩtame tɩ b peeb tõntõogo, tɩ tãb-biisã fãa yalse. B basa a Israyɛl pʋgbo, tɩ zabra sɛ." 
2Samuel2:29 A Abnɛr ne a neba kẽname n tees Araba, yʋng kãng tõre. B rʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã; b kaaga Gesur n wa kẽ Maanayim." 
2Samuel2:30 A Zoab basa a Annɛr pʋgbo, n tigim a tãb-biisã fãa. A Daviid tãb-biis piig la a wɛ n ki, n paas a Asayɛl." 
2Samuel2:31 La a Daviid neba da kʋ a Bẽnzame la Abnɛr nebã, neb kobs-tã la pisoobe." 
2Samuel2:32 B talla a Asayɛl n tɩ solg a ba yaoogẽ, Bɛtelyɛɛm. A Zoab ne a neba kẽna yʋnga tõre, la zĩig sẽn waa n yẽegdẽ la b yaool n ta Ebrõ." 
2Samuel3:1 Zabra kaoosa a Daviid ne a Sol rooga sʋka, la a Daviid roogã pãng ra paasdame t'a Sol rooga rẽnd ra woogdẽ." 
2Samuel3:2 A Daviid roga kamb Ebrõ tẽnga: a pipi biiga yʋʋr da boondame tɩ Amnon. A ma la Zizreyɛl pag, a Ayinoam." 
2Samuel3:3 Yẽ yao wã la a Kilab, a ma a Abigayil, Karmɛl Nabal paga; a tãab soaba la a Absalom, a ma la a Maaka, Gesur dĩma, a Talmayi, bi-pugla." 
2Samuel3:4 A naas soaba la a Adoniyas, a Agit biiga: a nu soaba la a Sefatiya, a Abital biiga," 
2Samuel3:5 a yoob soaba la a Itreyam, a Daviid paga Egla biiga. Kom kãens la a Daviid paam Ebrõ tẽnga." 
2Samuel3:6 A Sol ne a Daviid rooga sẽn da waa n ket n zabd taaba, a Abnɛr maana yam n dʋʋs a meng a Sol neba taoore." 
2Samuel3:7 A Sol ra tara paga t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Rispa, n yaa a Aya bi-pugla. A Isbaal yeela a Abnɛr: «Ya bõe tɩ fo kolg m ba wã paga?»" 
2Samuel3:8 A Isbaal goama puuga a Abnɛr sũur wʋsgo t'a yeele, «Mam yaa baag sẽn dɩt a Zɩɩda rãmb nugẽ laa? M ka zãmb f saamba a Sol roog ye, m ka zãmb a saam-biisi, a zo-rãmb ye; m pa bas foom a Daviid nugẽ ye, la f yik n zabda ne maam pag poorẽ, dũnna!" 
2Samuel3:9 Wẽnd na sik yel-beed a Abnɛr zugu, n sik-a n bãge, mam sã n pa pids Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kãab a Daviid," 
2Samuel3:10 la m yiis naama a Sol roogẽ, n sõng a Daviid t'a rɩ naam Israyɛl la Zɩɩda zãnga, n sɩng Dã n ta Beerseba.»" 
2Samuel3:11 A Isbaal pa saag n le paas gomd ye, t'a ra zoeta a Abnɛr." 
2Samuel3:12 A Abnɛr meng a toore tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Daviid: «Ãn n so tẽn-peelma?» N le paas woto: «Wa yõg zood ne maam tɩ m na sõng tɩ f paam tɩ Israyɛl neba fãa wa kẽ-fo.» 
2Samuel3:13 A Daviid leokame: «Be neere! M sakdame n na n yõg zood ne foom. La bũmb a ye bal n be tɩ m na kos foom: f ka na n wa mam taoore, tɩ f ka reng n wa ne a Mikal, a Sol bi-puglã.»" 
2Samuel3:14 La a Daviid tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Sol biiga, a Isbaal: «Kõ-m paga, a Mikal, tɩ m paam-a-la ne Filisti rãmb koabg waoose.»" 
2Samuel3:15 A Isbaal tʋmame tɩ b tɩ reeg-a a sɩda, a Paltiyɛl nengẽ. A Paltiyɛl yaa a Layis biiga." 
2Samuel3:16 A sɩda yik n yãag-a lame. A pʋg-a-la ne nintãm n ta Bawurim, t'a Abnɛr yeel-a be: «Lebge!» La a Paltiyɛl sakame, a lebgame n kuli." 
2Samuel3:17 A Abnɛr sɩnga yẽsgo ne a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba n yeel-ba: «Yaa al daar zãra la yãmb dat t'a Daviid yɩ y dĩma. 
2Samuel3:18 Bɩ y mao tɩ yɩ marsã, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ra pĩnd n yeela woto a Daviid poorẽ: ‹Na n tũu ne m yamba, a Daviid, tɩ m fãag m buudu, a Israyɛl, Filisti rãmba la b bɛɛba fãa nugẽ.› »" 
2Samuel3:19 A Abnɛr goama lʋɩ-la a Bẽnzame tʋbrẽ. A taa Ebrõ, n wilg a Daviid, Israyɛl rãmba ne a Bẽnzame sẽn sakd bũmb ninga." 
2Samuel3:20 A Abnɛr taa a Daviid nengẽ Ebrõ ne neb pisi. A Daviid maana a Abnɛr ne a poorẽ dãmba sãando. 
2Samuel3:21 B sẽn waa n dɩ n sɛ, a Abnɛr yeela a Daviid: «Ade, m naaba, m tõe n tigma a Israyɛl tõre m dĩma taoore, m tõe tɩ tẽnga neba fãa yõg zoodo ne yãmba tɩ y rɩ naam b fãa zugu wa y sẽn date.» A Daviid kõ-la Abnɛr sore, t'a kul ne laafi." 
2Samuel3:22 Mik a Zoab ne a Daviid tãb-biisa ra tɩ zabame la b fã n lebg n watẽ; b ra paama rɩɩb sõma. Dẽ t'a Abnɛr ra ka le ket a Daviid nengẽ, Ebrõ tẽng ye, tɩ bala a Daviid ra kõ-a-la sore t'a kuli, t'a sɩd da kul ne laafi." 
2Samuel3:23 La a Zoab ne a tãb-biisa fãa sẽn wa n ta yiri, b togs-b la woto: «A Nɛr biiga, a Abnɛr, yõsg n waa dĩma nengẽ, la b bas-a lame t'a leb n kuli ne laafi.»" 
2Samuel3:24 Rẽ la a Zoab kẽ dĩma nengẽ n yeele: «Yaa bõe la yãmb yõdg n maan ka? A Abnɛr waa yãmb nengẽ, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb bas-a t'a looge?" 
2Samuel3:25 Yãmb mi-la a Nɛr biiga, a Abnɛr, bɩ? A ratame bala n tudg yãmba. A waame bala n na n bãng y sẽn gõod zĩis niynsi, n bãng y sẽn maand fãa.»" 
2Samuel3:26 A Zoab yi-la a Daviid nengẽ n tʋm neb tɩ pʋg a Abnɛr. B tɩ paam-a-la Sira ko-baoora sẽnẽ la b le tall-a lame n wa t'a Daviid zɩ tiiri. 
2Samuel3:27 A Abnɛr sẽn ta Ebrõ, a Zoab peeg-a lame n kẽ tẽnga pʋga, n bool-a kɛɛnga, wala a tara koɛɛg n na n walem-a, mik a sɩlmame n paam-a n kõs a pʋga t'a ki. Woto me la a rok a sũur ne a Abnɛr, t'a ra kʋ-la a saam-biig a Asayɛl." 
2Samuel3:28 A Daviid wa n bãnga yellã, la a yeelame: «Beoogo, ra-yɩta, bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da ning m meng la m soolma taale a Nɛr biiga, a Abnɛr, zɩɩma daagr poorẽ ye." 
2Samuel3:29 Taalã roga a Zoab la a zaka rãmb fãa zugu. Bɩ a Zoab rooga rãmb bẽ mende la wãoodo! B ra tõog n kẽn b nao a yiiba zug ye, la zabr sʋʋg sẽn base, bɩ tẽn-kũum loog ne!»" 
2Samuel3:30 A Zoab ne a yao a Abisayi kʋ-la a Abnɛr tɩ yẽ n da yiis b yao, a Asayɛl, yõore, Gabaõ zabrẽ." 
2Samuel3:31 A Daviid yeela a Zoab ne tãb-biisã sẽn da yãagd-a wã: «Kẽes-y y futu, la y yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu, tɩ d yãb a Abnɛr kʋʋre.» B tʋka kũuma pãndare t'a Daviid pʋgd poorẽ." 
2Samuel3:32 B muma a Abnɛr Ebrõ. Dĩma sɩnga kũmkũma a Abnɛr yaoogã zug tɩ zãma wã fãa kiigd nintãm. 
2Samuel3:33 Dĩma yãba a Abnɛr woto: «A Abnɛr ra tog n kii wa nin-yaalg woto sɩda? 
2Samuel3:34 F nus ra pa loe, f kars ra pa sog ne bãeense, f lʋɩ wa ned sẽn lʋɩ yel-wẽn-maandb nusẽ!» Tɩ zãma wã fãa nintãm na n sodg n paase." 
2Samuel3:35 Neba waa n kosa a Daviid t'a rɩ tɩ wĩndg nan pa lʋɩ ye, la a Daviid wẽena woto: «Wẽnd na sik yel-beedo m zugu la b le sik-a n bãge, m sã n ning bur m noorẽ, bɩ bũmblem buug a to tɩ wĩndga nan pa kẽ!»" 
2Samuel3:36 Zãma wã wʋmame la b mikame tɩ rẽ yaa sõmbo, tɩ bala dĩma sẽn da maand fãa neba ra pẽgdame." 
2Samuel3:37 Badaare, zãma wã fãa ne Israyɛl tõre bãngame t'a Nɛr biiga a Abnɛr sẽn ki wã da ka dĩma yell ba bilfu." 
2Samuel3:38 Dĩma yeela a tãnsoaben-dãmba: «Y ka mi tɩ Israyɛl na-biiga, tɩ Israyɛl nin-kãseng n ka rũnna laa?" 
2Samuel3:39 Sã n ya ne maam, m pãng paooda rũnna ne b sẽn taag m naam kaama; a Seruya kom-kãensã sũur kegmame tɩ looge. La Soaala-Wẽnd na lebs wẽnem soab a wẽnem.»" 
2Samuel4:1 A Sol biiga a Isbaal wʋmame t'a Abnɛr ki Ebrõ, t'a yɛɛse, tɩ Israyɛl tõr sũur sãame." 
2Samuel4:2 A Sol kamba zakẽ, nin-daad la bi-bees a yiibu n da be be. A ye yʋʋr a Baana, a yiib soaba a Rekab. B ra ya Beerot rao a Rimõ kamba, a Bẽnzame roogẽ, tɩ bala b geta Beerot me wala a Bẽnzame soolem." 
2Samuel4:3 Beerot neba ra zoeeme n wa kẽ Gitayim, la b keta be n ta rũnna n lebg be noakense." 
2Samuel4:4 A Sol biig a Zonatã da tara a biig a yembre, la a karsa ra fabame. A ra tara yʋʋm a nu, a Sol ne a Zonatã kʋʋra sẽn yɩ Zizreyɛl n wa, a ma wubdga põk-a lame n na n zoe, la zoeesa sẽn yɩ ne yãgb bala, biiga fʋrg n lʋɩɩme t'a kars sãame." 
2Samuel4:5 Beerot rao, a Rimõ, kamb a yiibã, a Rekab ne a Baana, waa n yika wĩnto-sʋka n kẽng a Isbaal yiri wa b na n tɩ sika koodo. B kẽeme n mik t'a kẽe vʋʋsgo." 
2Samuel4:6 B sẽn ta woto n mik t'a gãe a gãag zugu, a ro-gãagẽ b kõs a pʋʋrã." 
2Samuel4:7 B sẽn kʋ-a woto, a Rekab ne a Baana fiuuga a zugã n zoe n looge. B teesa Zʋrdẽ bãg-faaga la b kẽna yʋnga tõre." 
2Samuel4:8 B talla a Isbaal zugã n wa a Daviid taoore, Ebrõ, la b yeela dĩma: «Ad-a Sol biiga a Isbaal zugu, yãmb bɛyã sẽn da rat y yõore. Soaala-Wẽnd saka rũnna tɩ d soaala la d dĩma paam n dok a sũur ne a Sol la a buudu.»" 
2Samuel4:9 La a Daviid goma ne Beerot Rimõ kambã, a Rekab ne a yao a Baana, n yeel-ba: «Bas-y tɩ m wẽen ne Wẽnd sẽn vɩ la sẽn yiisd maam toog buud fãa pʋgẽ wã la m yeel-y woto:" 
2Samuel4:10 Sẽn da wa-a n togs maam a Sol kũuma, ra tẽeme t'a waa ne koe noogo, la mam kɩtame tɩ b yõk-a n kʋ Siklag, n yao a koe noogã." 
2Samuel4:11 M maanda wãn marsã ne bi-bees sẽn kʋ nin-tɩrga a zak pʋgẽ, rẽ yẽne me a gãag zugu! M pa tog n sok sẽn daag-b zɩɩma la m kɩt tɩ b menem dũniya sɩda?»" 
2Samuel4:12 A Daviid kõ-la a neba noor tɩ b kʋ-ba. B kʋʋsa b nus la b nao n lul-b Ebrõ ko-baoora sɛɛga. La b rɩka a Isbaal zugã, n tɩ mum a Abnɛr yaoogẽ, Ebrõ tẽnga." 
2Samuel5:1 Wẽnd kãnga Israyɛl sagsã fãa wa a Daviid nengẽ Ebrõ. B yeel-a lame: «Ade, tõnd yaa f buudu la f rooga neba." 
2Samuel5:2 Pĩnda, a Sol sẽn da waa n ya tõnd dĩma, yaa foom n da talld Israyɛl kamba n kẽnd tãpo la f le talld-ba n watẽ. Soaala-Wẽnd yeela foom: ‹Foom n na n yɩ m buud a Israyɛl ba-wubdga, foom n na n yɩ a Israyɛl dĩma.› »" 
2Samuel5:3 La woto, a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba waa dĩma a Daviid nengẽ Ebrõ. La dĩma a Daviid yõga zood ne bãmba, Ebrõ, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. B pʋdga a Daviid zug naam kaam, t'a lebg a Israyɛl dĩma." 
2Samuel5:4 A Daviid da tara yʋʋm pis-tã, a sẽn waa n na dɩ naam. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-naase." 
2Samuel5:5 A rɩɩ Zɩɩda naam, Ebrõ, yʋʋm a yopoe la kiis a yoobe n dɩ Zɩɩda la a Israyɛl fãa naam Zerizalɛɛm, yʋʋm pis-tã la a tã." 
2Samuel5:6 La Dĩma ne a tãb-biisa waa n taka zabr Zerizalɛɛm ne Zebuzitsa sẽn da be tẽn-kãnga. Sɩda tẽnga rãmb yeela a Daviid: «Yãmb naoor sẽn wat n na n tabg ka tɩ ya zoeense la wobs la y na n pĩngd goabg la rɩtgo.» Bãmb da rat n yeelame t'a Daviid kõn tol n kẽ be lɛ-lɛ. 
2Samuel5:7 La a Daviid zabame n deeg Siõ tãnsoaben-doogo; dẽ n lebg a Daviid na-tẽnga. 
2Samuel5:8 Baraare a Daviid yeelame: «Ned sã n dat n kẽ Zebuzitsa tẽnga a maanda sɩlem b bas zoeensa la wobsa pĩngr yɩnga n tũ bok ning b sẽn wedg n na n wa ne kooma tẽnga pʋga.» A Daviid sẽn kis wa fãa-la woabg la zoanga. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la b yeta: «Wobs la zoeense pa tar zĩig Wẽnd zakẽ ye.» 
2Samuel5:9 A Daviid kẽe tãnsoben-dooga pʋga, n bool-a t'a Daviid na-tẽnga. La a mee lalg n gilgi, n sɩng Milo n digd pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel5:10 A Daviid pãng da tara paasgo daar fãa tɩ Tãnsoaba-Wẽnd ra bee ne yẽnda. 
2Samuel5:11 A Iram, Tir dĩma tʋma a Daviid tʋʋm-tʋmdba ne ra sĩdma la da-wãadba la kug-peesdba, tɩ b me roogo n kõ a Daviid." 
2Samuel5:12 A Daviid bãngame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n da paasd a naama keelem, t'a yɩ a Israyɛl dĩma, la b zẽk a rĩungu, bãmb buud a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
2Samuel5:13 A Daviid sẽn yi Ebrõ, n ta Zerizalɛɛm, a le kẽesa pagba. A le roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
2Samuel5:14 Ad kamb niyns sẽn dog Zerizalɛɛma yʋya: a Samua, a Sobab, a Natã, a Salomo." 
2Samuel5:15 A Yivar, a Elisuwa, a Nefɛg, a Yafiya." 
2Samuel5:16 A Elisama, a Elyada, a Elifelɛt." 
2Samuel5:17 Filisti rãmba sẽn wʋm tɩ b taaga a Daviid kaam t'a yɩ Israyɛl dĩma, b rʋʋsa tãpo n na n yõk-a. A Daviid sẽn wʋm boto, a zoeeme n tɩ kẽ tãnsoaben-doogã." 
2Samuel5:18 Filisti rãmba, taa Refayitsa tãnnaokã, n tong b tãb-biisã." 
2Samuel5:19 A Daviid soka Wẽnde: «M tõe n zaba ne Filisti rãmbã la y na n ning-b-la mam nugẽ bɩ?» La Soaala-Wẽnd leoka a Daviid: «Zab ne-ba! Vẽenega m na n ninga Filisti rãmbã f nugẽ!» 
2Samuel5:20 Dẽ la a Daviid tees Baal-Perasim, la zĩ-kãnga a tõoga Filisti rãmba; la a yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnd bɛɛga m bɛɛba lalga, wala koom sẽn kaoog bɛongo.» Yaa rẽ la b boond zĩ-kãnga tɩ Baal-Perasim." 
2Samuel5:21 Filisti rãmba ra zoe n basa b wẽnd dãmba, la a Daviid ne a neba wʋk-b lame." 
2Samuel5:22 Filisti rãmb le rʋʋsa tãpo Refayim tãnnaokẽ wã. 
2Samuel5:23 A Daviid soka Soaala-Wẽnde la b leok-a lame: «Da tees b taoore n sɩng zabr ye. Gilg b poorẽ pargen-tuudẽ wã. 
2Samuel5:24 Fo sã n wa wʋm nao rãamde, pargensa zutu, maan gũusgu, tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n lʋɩt f taoore n na pãb Filisti rãmba.»" 
2Samuel5:25 A Daviid maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a noore, la a tõoga Filisti rãmba, Gezɛr tẽnga noorẽ." 
2Samuel6:1 Dẽ loogr poore, dĩma a Daviid tigma a Israyɛl nanams bɛdã la a nin-kẽemba fãa, na ta neb tus pis-tã." 
2Samuel6:2 A Daviid ne neb niyns fãa sẽn da be ne-a wã teesa Zɩɩda-Baala n na n tɩ tall zooda kasetã n wa; yaa yẽ linga zugu, la Tãnsoaba-Wẽnde da sigda, malɛgs a yiiba pɩgsa maasmẽ." 
2Samuel6:3 B rogla koglga bilim-bilm paalg zugu; b tɩ rɩk-a-la a Abinadab yiri. A Uza ne a Ayio, a Abinadab kamba, n da tat bilim-bilm paalgã." 
2Samuel6:4 B yiis-a koglgã a Abinadab yiri, tãnga zugu, la a Ayio n da kẽnd taoore." 
2Samuel6:5 A Daviid ne a Israyɛl roog rãmba fãa da reemda koglga taoore ne yʋʋm teed buud fãa: duudsi, koala, pendse, gãngãado, kɛma." 
2Samuel6:6 B waa n ta-la a Nakõ zɛɛgẽ wã, t'a Uza tẽega a nugu, n na n kok koglgã tɩ niiga ra maaname t'a kɩlle." 
2Samuel6:7 La Naaba-Wẽnd sũur puuga ne a Uza; la b wẽ-a-la zĩ-kãng bala, a kongr yĩnga. A Uza kii be, koglga sɛɛga." 
2Samuel6:8 A Daviid yɛɛsame tɩ yɩɩ wa lalg la b wurg yã t'a Uza sãd n yi. Ne rũnna zĩ-kãng ket n boondame tɩ Uza lalg bɛɛga. 
2Samuel6:9 Badaare, a Daviid zoe Soaala-Wẽnd rabeem; a yeelame: «Kuga walsa koglg yɩta a wãna n kẽ mam yiri?»" 
2Samuel6:10 Woto, a Daviid pa sak n bĩng zood kasetã a yiri, a na-tẽng pʋgẽ ye. A tall-a lame, n tɩ bas a Obɛd-Edom, Gat daoa, yiri." 
2Samuel6:11 Koglgã paa a Obɛd-Edom, Gat daoã, yir na maan kiis a tã. La Soaala-Wẽnd ninga a Obɛd-Edom ne a zak fãa barka." 
2Samuel6:12 B waa n yeela a Daviid: «Naaba-Wẽnd ninga a Obɛd-Edom ne a zak la a sẽn tar fãa barka, kuga walsa koglg yĩnga.» Woto, a Daviid kẽngame n tɩ kɩt tɩ b rɩk-a a Obɛd-Edom yiri, n tall-a n wa ne kɩdengo, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ." 
2Samuel6:13 La koglga tʋkdba sẽn maan nao yakem a yoobe a Daviid kʋʋ loalga ne nag-bil noabdg maoongo. 
2Samuel6:14 Dĩma a Daviid da saooda ne a pãng tɛka, Soaala taoore, a ra yera maan-kʋʋdba fu-bil-pɛɛlgã." 
2Samuel6:15 A Daviid ne a Israyɛl kamba fãa waa ne koglgã n kaasdẽ la b peebd bardo. 
2Samuel6:16 Kuga walsa koglg sẽn ya Wẽnd zood kasetã sẽn waa n kẽed a Daviid na-tẽnga, a Sol bi-puglã, a Mikal, lɩka võorẽ n getẽ: la a yãee dĩma a Daviid sẽn yɩgd la a wẽnegd Soaala-Wẽnd taoore; la a sãbs-a-la a sũurẽ." 
2Samuel6:17 B kẽesa koglgã, n dɩgl-a a zĩigẽ, pɛɛl roogẽ, a Daviid sẽn kɩt tɩ b ti a yĩnga. A Daviid kʋʋ, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, yũ-noog la laafi kosg maando." 
2Samuel6:18 Maanda sẽn kʋ n sɛ, a ninga neba barka Tãnsoaba-Wẽnd yʋʋr yĩnga." 
2Samuel6:19 A kɩtame tɩ b pʋɩ, a Israyɛl zãma wã fãa, dapa la pagba, rɩɩbo; ned kam fãa reega bur gilga, la miisd sẽn dõos ne bugsuntung la tɩɩs a taab bi-koeemse, tɩ b fãa yaool n kuli." 
2Samuel6:20 Dẽ poore, a Daviid kulame n na n tɩ ning a zak rãmb barka, t'a Mikal, a Sol biigã yii n seg-a n yeele: «Ad-y Israyɛl dĩma paama waoogr dũnna koe! A pidga a futu n sao bɩlgemd la bala, a yems yem-pogs taoore, wa talga!»" 
2Samuel6:21 A Daviid leoka a Mikal: «M saoo Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, bãmb sẽn nong maam n yɩɩg f ba, la f ba roog gilli, n tũus maam, tɩ m yɩ b buud, a Israyɛl naaba." 
2Samuel6:22 M da nongẽ lame n yɩẽ nin yaalga n yɩɩd woto, la m sulgẽ m menga, m meng nifẽ n paase, la ad-m kõn kong waoogre fo sẽn gomd yem-pogs niynsa taoore ye.»" 
2Samuel6:23 Woto wã, a Mikal, a Sol bi-puglã, ka le rog biig ye." 
2Samuel7:1 Dĩma waa n kẽ-la a yi-paalẽ n na n zĩndi, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-a-la vʋʋsgo la b fãag-a-la a bɛɛba fãa sẽn da gũbg-a wã nusẽ." 
2Samuel7:2 Dẽ la a yeel bãngd a Natã: «Gese, mam kẽeda roogo sẽn maan ne ra-sĩdma, tɩ kuga walsa koglg yaool n be zãnd sẽn ti ne pɛɛl tẽngre.»" 
2Samuel7:3 T'a Natã leok dĩma: «Aya! Bɩ y maan y sũur sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa, tɩ b bee ne yãmba.»" 
2Samuel7:4 Badaar yʋngo, Naaba-Wẽnd leoka bãngda a Natã gomd kãngã:" 
2Samuel7:5 «Kẽng n tɩ togs m tʋʋm-tʋmda a Daviid tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Yaa foom n na n me roogo n kõ-m tɩ m kẽ bɩ? 
2Samuel7:6 M pa bao roogo m sẽn yiis Israyɛl kamba Ezipt tẽnga n tãag rũnna. Kẽna kẽname tɩ m be sɛk roogẽ, zãnd tẽngre." 
2Samuel7:7 Mam sẽn tũ a Israyɛl kamba zĩig ning fãa, m yeel-b tɩ bũmbu? M goma ne a Israyɛl naaba a bõe, nanams niyns m sẽn kõ noor tɩ kɩɩm m bãgre, a Israyɛlã? Dĩm bʋg la m yeel yã: Bõe tɩ y pa kẽes-m doog pʋg sẽn maneg n ka ne kʋgs ra-sidma?›" 
2Samuel7:8 Marsã, tɩ yeel m tʋʋm-tʋmda a Daviid: Ad Tãnsoaba-Wẽnd sẽn yet bũmb ninga. Yaa maam n tɩ yiis foom pʋ-weesẽ, f sẽn waa n pʋgd f rũmsi, n bool-f tɩ f wa yɩ m buud a Israyɛl dĩma." 
2Samuel7:9 Fo sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa, mam da bee ne foom; mam kʋ-la f bɛɛba fãa f taoore. Mam kɩtame tɩ fo yʋʋr yi n zʋʋg tẽng zug nanams bɛda fãa yʋʋr sẽn yitã." 
2Samuel7:10 Mam kõ-la m buud a Israyɛl zĩig t'a zĩndi; m na n vigla yẽnda be, t'a kɩ yẽgna, n kell n pa a zĩigẽ la nin-wẽnsã kõn le yaal-a wa pĩnd ye," 
2Samuel7:11 wala m sẽn waa n kõ m buud a Israyɛl bʋ-kaoodb tɩ b ges a yelle. Mam kõ-f-la vʋʋsgo, n fãag-f ne f bɛɛbã. La mam meng n togsd foo tɩ m na n yalga f buudu." 
2Samuel7:12 F yõor sã n wa ta a tɛka, tɩ fo sak f saam-dãmba, mam na zẽk f kamb, fo poorẽ, m na zẽk biig f sẽn doge. M na n zaoolg-a-la naam goeel sẽn vigl kẽnkẽ zugu." 
2Samuel7:13 La yaa yẽ n na n me roogo, mam yʋʋr pẽgr yĩnga. La mam na viglg a naam zaoore t'a ra le vik ye." 
2Samuel7:14 Mam na n yɩ-la a ba, la a na n yɩɩ mam biiga. A sã n maan wẽnga, mam na sɩbg-a ne gʋlgo la gʋlga na n yɩɩ ninsaalba." 
2Samuel7:15 La m kõn yiis m barka a zug, wala m sẽn yãk a Sol barka, la dig-a n yiis fo taoora ye." 
2Samuel7:16 Fo roogo la f rĩunga na kaoose, a kõn sɛ ye; f zaoorã na n viglame la a kõn vik abada.»" 
2Samuel7:17 Bãngda a Natã n tɩ togsa dĩma a Daviid Soaala-Wẽnd likrã la b koeesa fãa. 
2Samuel7:18 La a Daviid kẽng n tɩ pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd la a yeela b taoore: «Mam yaa ãnna, Soaala-Wẽnde? La mam buud zema bõe, tɩ yãmb zẽk mam n ta zĩig ninga m sẽn beẽ wã?" 
2Samuel7:19 La yãmb gesa rẽnda n yet tɩ paooda, Soaala-Wẽnde; yãmb kãaba m roog neer la neere, n pʋlem-a noog ti nan ket n zãra." 
2Samuel7:20 Bõe la a Daviid tõe n togs yãmb n paase? Yãmb mi-m lame, Soaala," 
2Samuel7:21 yãmb gomd yĩnga, la y sũur daab yĩnga, yãmb maana yel-kãsense la y sak n wilga y tʋʋm-tʋmdã." 
2Samuel7:22 Yãmb waooga, Soaala-Wẽnde! Sẽn wẽnda yãmb ka be ye! La Wẽnnaam a to me ka be, sã n pa yãmba, wala d tʋb sẽn wʋmde."
