2Samuel7:23 Buud a ye bee tẽng zugu, sẽn wẽnd yãmb buudu, sẽn wẽnd a Israyɛl bɩ? Wẽnnaam sẽn wa n fãag a Israyɛl, n kɩt t'a lebg bãmb pʋɩɩre, n kɩt t'a yʋʋr yi, b maana a yĩnga, a tẽnga yĩnga, wẽnd-makr dãmba la bõn-bãna, n dig nin-zẽmba ne b wẽn-naandse n yiis a Israyɛl taoore." 
2Samuel7:24 Yãmb vigla y buudu, a Israyɛl, t'a yɩ yãmb soolem daar fãa; la yãmba, Soaala, yãmb lebga a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
2Samuel7:25 Marsã yãmb sẽn kãab y tʋʋm-tʋmda bũmb ningã, y sẽn pʋlem a rooga bũmb ningã, bɩ y sõng tɩ y gomda pids daar fãa, la y sak n maan wala y sẽn yeele." 
2Samuel7:26 Bɩ yãmb yʋʋr paam pẽgre daar fãa! Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ b yeele: Dũni fãa Soaala, la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam! Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda roog paam pãng yãmb taoore!" 
2Samuel7:27 Sɩd yaa yãmb menga, la dũni fãa Soaala la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam. Yaa yãmb n vẽneg y meng ne yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda a Daviid, n yeele: Mam na n mee roogo n kõ-fo! Yaa gom kãnga n keng mam pɛlga, tɩ mam saag n pʋʋs yãmb woto." 
2Samuel7:28 La marsã, Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb la Wẽnde, la yãmb goama fãa yaa sɩd bala, la yaa yãmb n wilgd yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda kiba noogã." 
2Samuel7:29 Bɩ y sak n ning yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda yir barka, t'a kell n kaoos yãmb taoor daar fãa! Tɩ yaa yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnde, n gome, la y kãabg yĩnga, yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda roog na n paama bark zamaan fãa.»" 
2Samuel8:1 Rẽ poore a Daviid tõoga Filisti rãmba. A ning-b-la yãnde n deeg b sẽn da so tẽns niynsã. 
2Samuel8:2 A le tõoga Moabitsã, n gãneg-b tẽnga, n kʋ bãmb neba a yi neb a tãab zugu. Woto Moabitsa kẽ-la a Daviid soolmẽ n yaood fadgo." 
2Samuel8:3 A Daviid tõoga a Adadezɛr, a Reob biiga, sẽn ya Soba dĩma, a sẽn wa n tʋlg n yalg a soolem n tãag Efrat kʋɩl-kẽengã." 
2Samuel8:4 A Daviid yõga wed-dʋʋdb tusri la kobs-yopoe, n yõg sẽn ka zao b wiidã bãmb tus pisi. A wõrsa wiidi niyns sẽn tat-b bilim-bilma kars gĩini. A keesa bilim-bilm koabg bala a meng yĩnga." 
2Samuel8:5 Aram neb sẽn da kẽed Damas waame n na n sõng a Adadezɛr, Soba dĩma, t'a Daviid kʋ bãmb neb tus pisi la a yiibu." 
2Samuel8:6 Dẽ poore a Daviid zĩndga komber Damas, Aram dãmba yĩnga. Bãmb lebga a Daviid yemse n kɩt-a yõor yaood. A Daviid sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa n tak zabre, a tõoga a bɛɛba." 
2Samuel8:7 A Daviid reega sãnem gãnda fãa, a Adadezɛr tãb-biisa sẽn da zãadã la a tall-b lame n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel8:8 A Adadezɛr tẽnsẽ, Beta ne Berotayi, a Daviid wʋka zũud teed wʋsgo." 
2Samuel8:9 A Towu, Amat dĩma, wʋmame t'a Daviid tõoga a Adadezɛr tãb-biisã fãa." 
2Samuel8:10 A tʋma a biiga, a Zoram, tao-tao, a Daviid nengẽ n na n pʋʋs-a la a pẽg-a, a sẽn zab n tõog a Adadezɛr yĩnga. A Adadezɛr da rɩta beem ne a Towu. A Zoram waa ne wanzurf, sãnem la zũud teedo n kõ a Daviid." 
2Samuel8:11 Dĩma a Daviid rɩka rẽ fãa n naag ne tẽns a taaba a sẽn da wõra wanzurf la sãnem n kõ Naaba-Wẽnde. 
2Samuel8:12 Kũuna yii Edomitse, Moabitse, Amonitse, Filisti rãmba la Amalesits tẽnsẽ, n paas a sẽn deeg a Adadezɛr nengẽ. A Adadezɛr la a Soba biiga la Soba dĩma." 
2Samuel8:13 A Daviid yʋʋra yii wʋsgo a sẽn tɩ pãb Aram nebã n lɛɛg n wa. Zabra zaba yamsem bãg-faagẽ, la neb tus piig la a nii la a tõog yã." 
2Samuel8:14 A ninga komber Edom tɩ Edom neba fãa lebg a Daviid soolem. A Daviid sẽn da kẽndẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd da sõngd-a lame t'a tõog a bɛɛba." 
2Samuel8:15 A Daviid rɩɩ naam Israyɛl fãa zugu. A ra zãada neba ne pʋ-peelem la zemsgo. 
2Samuel8:16 A Seruya biiga, a Zoab, n da yaa a tãnsoaba, t'a Zozafat, a Ayilud biiga, yaa a koe-moanda." 
2Samuel8:17 A Ayitub biiga, a Sadok, a Abiyatar biig a Ayimelɛk n da ya maan-kʋʋdba; a Seraya n da ya a sɛb gʋlsda." 
2Samuel8:18 A Zoyada biig, a Benaya, n da ya Krɛt la Pelɛt dãmba sẽn da gũud dĩma tãnsoaba. A Daviid kamba da yaa maan-kʋʋdba." 
2Samuel9:1 A Daviid waa n yeelame: «Ned keta a Sol roogẽ tɩ m tõog n maan-a neere, m zooda ne a Zonatã yĩng bɩ?»" 
2Samuel9:2 A Sol sõgen a ye n da be, n boond t'a Siba; b tall-a lame n wa a Daviid nengẽ. Dĩma sok-a lame: «Yaa foom la a Siba bɩ?» T'a leoke: «M naaba, yaa maam, y sõgna!»" 
2Samuel9:3 Tɩ dĩma soke: «Ned pa ket a Sol doogẽ tɩ m pids m sẽn kãab ne Wẽnde?» T'a Siba leok: «A Zonatã biig a ye n kete, la a yaa põore.»" 
2Samuel9:4 Dĩma sokame: «A bee yɛ?» T'a Siba leoke: «A bee Lo-Debar rao, a Amiyɛl biig, a Makir, yiri.»" 
2Samuel9:5 Dĩma a Daviid tʋmame tɩ b kẽng a Makir, a Amiyɛl biiga, yiri, Lo-Debar tẽnga, n tɩ tall-a n wa." 
2Samuel9:6 A Mefibaal, a Sol yagenga, la a Zonatã biiga, waa a Daviid nengẽ n wõgemd a taoore, n fõgneg a neng tẽnga. A Daviid yeelame: «Mefibaal!» T'a sake: «Ad-y y sõgna!»" 
2Samuel9:7 T'a Daviid paase: «Da zoe rabeem ye, tɩ mam dat n maan-f la yel-sõmde, f ba a Zonatã yĩnga. Mam na n lebsa foom, f yaaba a Sol pʋtã fãa, la fo na n dɩɩ daar fãa ne maam laag a ye pʋga.»" 
2Samuel9:8 A Mefibaal wõgemdame n yeele: «Yãmb yamba zema bõe, tɩ y wẽnemd y neng n tees ba-kɩɩng wala mam to wã?»" 
2Samuel9:9 Dĩma boola a Siba, a Sol sõgnã, n yeel-a: «Mam kõta f zu-soaba biiga, a yaab ne a buuda sẽn da so bũmb ning fãa." 
2Samuel9:10 Ko pʋtã a yĩnga, foom ne f kamba la f tʋʋm-tʋmdba; la fo na n tɩgsda bõn-koadi wã tɩ f zu-soaba biig paam dɩɩb n dɩ. La f zu-soaba biiga, a Mefibaal, na n dɩ ne maam daar fãa laag a ye pʋga.» A Siba da tara kom-dibli piig la a nu la tʋʋm-tʋmdb pisi;" 
2Samuel9:11 a yeela dĩma: «Yãmb yamba na maan dĩma, a zu-soabã, sẽn kõ noor ningã. Sã n ya ne a Mefibaal, a minim n dɩta ne maam, a sẽn yaa a Sol yagenga yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel9:12 A Mefibaal da tara bi-ribla a yembre sẽn da boond t'a Mika. Sã n ya yẽ menga yell gesgo, dẽ ra paka a Siba ne sẽn naag-b yẽ a zakẽ wã." 
2Samuel9:13 A Mefibaal sẽn da ya põora yĩnga a tɩ kẽe Zerizalɛɛm, n na n paam n dɩt daar fãa marsã ne dĩma laag a yembr pʋga." 
2Samuel10:1 Dẽ poore, Amonitsa naaba kiime t'a biiga, a Anun, led a zĩigẽ n dɩt naam." 
2Samuel10:2 A Daviid yeelame: «Mam na n lebsa a Naas biiga a Anun yel-sõm niyns a ba sẽn maan maama.» A Daviid tʋma sõgen-kamba tɩ b tɩ pʋʋs a ba wã kʋʋre. A Daviid sõgen-kamba sẽn ta Amonitsa tẽngẽ," 
2Samuel10:3 Amonitsa na-biis yeela b zu-soaba, a Anun: «Yãmb tẽedame tɩ yaa a sẽn dat y saamba waoogre la a Daviid sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa pʋʋs a kʋʋra bɩ? Pa sẽn na n yɩ bala n tõog n bãng d tẽngã, n bãng a pãnga sẽn be zĩig ninga, n wa lub-a, ka rẽ la a Daviid tʋm a sõgen-kamba sɩda?»" 
2Samuel10:4 T'a Anun na n yõg a Daviid sõgen-kamba n kɩt tɩ b wõrs b toeemsã bogre la b wõrs b futã n zems b kɩgba, n yaool n kõ-b sor tɩ b kuli." 
2Samuel10:5 A Daviid sẽn wʋm yellã a tʋma neb tɩ b seg-ba, tɩ bala yãnde n da tar nebã; dĩma kɩtame tɩ b yeel-ba: «Pa-y Zeriko al tɩ y toeemsa wa yi sõma tɩ y yaool n wa.»" 
2Samuel10:6 Amonitsã mikame tɩ b sẽn maan woto wã b rɩɩ beem ne a Daviid. Woto wã b tʋma neba sẽn na n tɩ yao Aramsã ligdi tɩ b wa sõng-ba. Bɛt-Reob la Soba Aramsã yɩɩ tãb-biis tus pisi, n paas Maaka dĩma tãb-biis tusri. Tob dĩma yɩɩ tus piig la a yi la yẽ wa ne." 
2Samuel10:7 A Daviid wʋma rẽ n yiis a Zoab ne tãb-biis niyns sẽn ya-b zabra gãndaado. 
2Samuel10:8 Amonitsa yiime n tong zabre tẽnga noore. Sã n ya Soba, Reob, Tob la Maaka Aramsã, bãmb ra yɛdga toore n pid pʋ-weesã." 
2Samuel10:9 A Zoab mikame t'a taoore la a poorẽ yaa bɛɛba, t'a na n tũus Israyɛl rap meng-menga n tong-b Aramsa taoore." 
2Samuel10:10 Yaa a yao, a Abisayi la a kõ tãb-biisa sẽn kellã tɩ bãmb me tong Amonitsa taoore." 
2Samuel10:11 A yeel-a lame: «F sã n yãe tɩ Aramsa na n tõog-ma bɩ f zoe n wa sõng-ma. Sã n ya foo la Amonitsa tõogda, m na zoe n wa sõng-fo." 
2Samuel10:12 Keng f sũuri tɩ d zab ne raoodo, d buuda la Wẽnd tẽnsa yĩnga. La Soaala maan b sẽn date.»" 
2Samuel10:13 A Zoab ne a neba sɩnga zabre ne Aramsã, la Aramsa zoeeme." 
2Samuel10:14 Amonitsa sẽn yãe tɩ Aramsa zoeeme, bãmb me wẽnemda b nao a Abisayi taoore n zoe n kẽ tẽnga pʋga. A Zoab sẽn yi a zabrã ne Amonitsã, a lɛɛg n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel10:15 Aramsa yãeeme t'a Israyɛl n tõog bãmba tɩ b na n tigs b nebã. 
2Samuel10:16 A Adadezɛr tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ yiis kʋɩlga rʋʋnd dãmb fãa tɩ b bob zabre. B waa Elam; a Adadezɛr tãnsoab a Sobak n da be b taoore. 
2Samuel10:17 A Daviid wʋmame, a me tigim Israyɛl zãnga tɩ b rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ n ta Elam. Aramsa tongame n tak zabr ne a Daviid." 
2Samuel10:18 Aramsa le konga pãng n zoe a Israyɛl taoore. A Daviid kʋʋ wiidi kobs-yopoe sẽn sog bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdb tus pis-naase. B tol n pogla tãnsoab a Sobak menga, la a waa n konga pãng be." 
2Samuel10:19 Nanams niyns sẽn da kẽed a Adadezɛr yãeeme t'a Israyɛl n tõoge tɩ b gom laafi goam ne a Israyɛl, n sulg b mense. Dẽ tɛka Aramsa maana rabeem ne Amonitsa sõngre." 
2Samuel11:1 Yʋʋmd sẽn vẽke tɩ dĩm dãmb le sɩng b zaba, a Daviid tʋma a tãnsoaba a Zoab ne a neba, ne a Israyɛl fãa, tɩ b tɩ sãam a Amon yagense la b tɩ gãneg tãpo n gũbg Raba, b na-tẽngã. Dĩma a Daviid paa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel11:2 Daar a ye, zĩ-sobdo, dĩma a Daviid yika a gãagẽ, n gõod na-yir bɛonga zugu la a zĩnda bɛonga zugu n yãe pag a ye sẽn sood koom: la pagã da yaa neer al wʋsgo." 
2Samuel11:3 La a Daviid kɩtame tɩ b sok n bãng sẽn yaa a soaba. B waa n leokame: «Yaa a Batseba, a Eliyam biiga, la Ititga, a Uri, paga.»" 
2Samuel11:4 A Daviid tʋma neda tɩ b tɩ wa ne pagã. La dĩma gãanda ne-a. Paga ra nan yɩlga paalem. Paga leba a yiri. 
2Samuel11:5 Paga rɩka pʋga, n tʋm tɩ b tɩ yeel a Daviid: «Mam tara pʋga!»" 
2Samuel11:6 A Daviid toola sebre a tãnsoaba a Zoab n yeel-a: «Tʋm Ititga Uri t'a wa sak maam.» A Zoab tʋma a Uri a Daviid nengẽ. 
2Samuel11:7 A Uri sẽn ta a Daviid nengẽ, a sok-a-la a Zoab ne a tãb-biisã la zabrã sẽn yaa a soaba." 
2Samuel11:8 A Daviid yaool n yeela a Uri: «Bɩ f kul yir n tɩ waas f nao.» La a Uri yii na-yirã ne dĩma kũuni. 
2Samuel11:9 La a Uri zãgsa kulbu, n gãand dĩma sɩmandẽ, ne a zu-soaba sõgen-kamba." 
2Samuel11:10 B tɩ yeela a Daviid: «A Uri pa kul a yir ye.» T'a Daviid sok a Uri: «Fo pa yi so-toak n wa laa? Bõe yĩnga tɩ fo pa kul f yiri?» 
2Samuel11:11 A Uri leoka a Daviid: «Kuga walsa koglga, a Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda tãb-biisa gãee zãnd tẽngre; y tãnsoaben-kãseng a Zoab la a tãnsoaben-taasa gãee tãb-sikẽ. Woto wã marsã, m maanda a wãna n tɩ kẽ m zakẽ, n dɩtẽ, n yũuda la m gãe ne m paga? M kõ maan yell a woto buud ye, m wẽenda!»" 
2Samuel11:12 A Daviid yeela a Uri: «Bɩ f yaas ka rũnna, tɩ beoogo m na bas-f tɩ f lebe.» La a Uri paa Zerizalɛɛm badaare." 
2Samuel11:13 La dĩma bool-a lame t'a wa rɩ ne bãmba, n kõ a rãam ali t'a yũ n gãeeme. La zĩ-sobdo a Uri sẽn yi naaba zakẽ, a pa kul a meng yir ye, a kell n paa ne tãb-biis niyns sẽn gũud-b dĩma." 
2Samuel11:14 Vẽkembeoogo, a Daviid gʋlsa a Zoab sebre, t'a Uri tall n tɩ kɩs-a." 
2Samuel11:15 A gʋlsa woto sebra zugu: «Bɩ f ning a Uri zĩig ning zabrã sẽn ya toogã, la y yi a poorẽ, n bas tɩ b tão-a n kʋ.»" 
2Samuel11:16 A Zoab sẽn da gũbg tẽngã n mi zabra nengã, tɩ ninga a Uri, n togl bɛɛba gãndaada sẽn da ya wʋsg zĩig ningã." 
2Samuel11:17 Tẽnga rãmba yiime n sɩng zabre, la b kʋ-la a Daviid tãb-biisa la a tãnsoaben-dãmba kẽere. Ititga a Uri me kiime." 
2Samuel11:18 A Zoab tʋma neda t'a wa togs a Daviid zabra kibar fãa. 
2Samuel11:19 A kõ-la a sẽn tʋm a soaba noor kãnga: «Fo sã n togs dĩma zabra yelle n sɛ," 
2Samuel11:20 tõe tɩ dĩma puug a sũur n sok-fo: ‹Yaa bõe yĩnga, la yãmb pẽneg tẽngã n kaoog zabre? Yãmb ka mi tɩ b tõe n yalsa lalsa zut n tão yãmb pɛɛm laa?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ãnna n kʋ a Abimelɛk, a Yerubaal biigã? Ka pag n yals lalg zugu n lobg-a ne neer laa? La a ka ki Tebɛs bɩ? Bõe n maan tɩ yãmb pẽneg lalgã?› Dĩma sã n gom-f boto bɩ f yeel-ba: ‹Yãmb tãnsoaba, Ititga a Uri, me kiime.› »" 
2Samuel11:22 Sẽn tʋm a soaba loogame, la a sẽn ta, a goma ne a Daviid wala a Zoab sẽn da ratã." 
2Samuel11:23 A yeela a Daviid: «Neba tõoga tõndo; b yii n zaba ne tõnd pʋtẽ, tɩ tõnd lɛɛg dig ba n tɩ ta tẽnga noorẽ." 
2Samuel11:24 Tãoodba zĩnda lalga zugu n tão yãmb tãb-biisã, m naaba, la b kʋʋ yãmb neb wʋsgo, la yãmb sõgna, Ititga Uri, me kiime.»" 
2Samuel11:25 A Daviid yeela raoã: «Tɩ yeel a Zoab woto: ‹Da sãam f sũur tɩ loog, yell kãnga yĩng ye, tɩ sʋʋg rɩta yaare, rũnna yaa ka, beoog ka sẽnẽ. Aya! Ning pãng n zab ne tẽngã n lub-a. Modg n keng f pɛlga!› »" 
2Samuel11:26 A Uri paga wʋmame t'a sɩd kiime; la a yãba a sɩda. 
2Samuel11:27 A Batseba sẽn dɩ a sɩd kʋʋr n sɛ, a Daviid tʋmame tɩ b tɩ peeg-a n wa t'a reeg-a a yiri. A Batseba lebga a Daviid paga, n dog a biiga. A Daviid sẽn maan bũmb ningã pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam ba bilfu." 
2Samuel12:1 Naaba-Wẽnd tʋma a Natã a Daviid nengẽ, t'a tɩ yãend-a n yeel-a: «Neb a yiibu n da be tẽng a yembre, a ye dakãagre, a yembrã naong soaba." 
2Samuel12:2 Dakãagrã da tara piisi la niis ka tɛka. 
2Samuel12:3 Naong soaba da ka tar fɩ, sã n ka a pe-sɛdga a sẽn da ra. Yẽ meng n da kõt pesga rɩɩbo, t'a bɩt a zakẽ ne a meng kamba. A da rɩta a meng sẽn dɩte, n yũud a wamnẽ, n gãe a sɛɛgẽ. A ra get-a lame bal wala a bi-pugla." 
2Samuel12:4 Sãan n wa n sig dakãagrã yiri, la rakãagra pa sak n bao a meng pesgo bɩ a meng naafo n segl dɩɩb n kõ sãana ye. Yɩɩ naonga soab pe-sɛdga la a kʋ n segl sãana.»" 
2Samuel12:5 Dĩma a Daviid sũur puuga al wʋsgo ne dakãagrã, t'a yeel a Natã: «M wẽen ne Wẽnde tɩ daoã sẽn maan woto wã toga ne kũum." 
2Samuel12:6 B reeg rakãagra sẽn pa tar sũura nengẽ piis a naas n dol pe-sɛdgã zĩigẽ.» 
2Samuel12:7 A Natã yeela a Daviid: «M naaba, yaa yãmb la nin-kãnga! A Israyɛl Wẽnnaam koɛɛg la woto: ‹Maam n pʋdg f zug kaam, tɩ f yɩ a Israyɛl dĩma; la maam n fãag foom a Sol nugẽ." 
2Samuel12:8 Mam kɩtame tɩ fo soog f zu-soaba roogo, la m dɩk f zu-soaba pagba n ning f zakẽ; la m kõo foom a Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda roogo. F sã n yet tɩ paooda, m na le paas sẽn ta rẽ." 
2Samuel12:9 La bõe yĩnga marsã, tɩ fo sãbs Soaala-Wẽnd goama, n maan sẽn yaa wẽng bãmb nifẽ. Fo kʋ-la a Uri, Ititga. Fo maana f sẽn na maane tɩ Amonitsa sʋʋg yãk a yõore tɩ fo reeg a pag n maan f paga." 
2Samuel12:10 Marsã tɛka, sʋʋg kõn le zãag ne f zak ye; tɩ fo nif sãaga maam, tɩ fo yẽeg a Uri, Ititga, n deeg a paga, n maan f rẽnna." 
2Samuel12:11 M koɛɛg la woto: Ade! Mam na kɩtame tɩ yel-beed yi f meng zakẽ n lɛɛg n lʋɩ f zugu. Mam na n deega f meng pagba n kõ f roagda t'a gãand ne-ba. Dẽ yaa bũmb sẽn na n yɩ vẽenega wa wĩndga. 
2Samuel12:12 Fo maana f yɛla ne soosgo, la mam dẽnd na n yɩ-la a Israyɛl zãng nifẽ, wĩndga vẽenemẽ.› »" 
2Samuel12:13 Dĩma a Daviid leoka a Natã: «M beega Soaala-Wẽnde!» T'a Natã yeel-a: «Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la y yel-wẽnda sugri. Y ka na n ki ye. 
2Samuel12:14 La yãmb sẽn beeg Soaala wʋsgo ne y yel-wẽndã, la y kõ bɛɛba bũmb b sẽn na n lʋɩɩs taoor n paoog Soaalã, ad f sẽn dog biig ninga na n kiime.»" 
2Samuel12:15 La a Natã leba a yiri. Bãag n yõk biig ning a Uri pagã sẽn dog n kõ a Daviidã. A yika bã-toogo. 
2Samuel12:16 La a Daviid pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd biiga yĩnga, la a loe noore, la a sã n da kẽed a roogẽ, yʋngo, a ra gãe tẽnga." 
2Samuel12:17 Dĩma kug-zĩidba modg-a lame t'a yiki, la a zãgsame, a pa naag bãmb n dɩ bũmb ye." 
2Samuel12:18 Sẽn maan dasem a yopoe biiga kiime. A Daviid sõgen-kamba da zoeta rabeem n pa rat n wilg-a tɩ biiga maana yõor ye. B ra gomda woto: «Biigã sẽn da wa n ket n vɩ wã b goma ne bãmba la b pa reeg ye. D na maana wãna n yeele: ‹Biiga kiime!› Dĩma ka na n tʋm beedo?» 
2Samuel12:19 La a Daviid yãeeme t'a sõgen-kamba da bʋkda b koɛɛg n gomd ne taaba, woto a bãngame tɩ biiga konga pãnga. A soka sõgen-kambã: «Biiga maana yõor laa?» Tɩ b leok: «N-ye! M naaba!»" 
2Samuel12:20 A Daviid yikame n so koom, n zɛ a meng yũ-noog kaam, n tek futu, n yaool n yi n kẽng wẽnd doogẽ n tɩ wõgemde. A sẽn lebg n wa yiri, a kosame tɩ b wa ne rɩɩbo la a rɩɩme." 
2Samuel12:21 Tɩ sõgen-kamba sok-a: «Yãmb sẽn maanda võor yaa bõe? Biigã sẽn da waa n ket n vɩ, yãmb da tõdgda rɩɩbo n tar yãbre; la marsã biiga sẽn maan yõore, yãmb yik n dɩtame.»" 
2Samuel12:22 A Daviid leok-b lame: «Biiga sẽn da waa n ket ne yõorã, mam da loeta m noore la m kiigd nintãm n tagsd m sũurẽ: ‹Daare Soaala-Wẽnd na zoe m nimbãanega tɩ biiga tɩlge.›" 
2Samuel12:23 La marsã biiga sẽn maan yõore, mam na n le zãgsa dɩɩb bõe yĩnga? Mam tõe t'a le vʋʋg bɩ? Yaa maam n na wa babs yẽ, la ka yẽnda n na n lɛɛg n wa mam nengẽ ye.»" 
2Samuel12:24 A Daviid belsa a paga, a Batseba, la b kẽe ne taaba. La a Batseba waa n doga biiga, t'a Daviid pʋda yʋʋr a Salomo. Soaala-Wẽnd yam kẽe biigã la b tũnuga a Natã maasem n wilg a Daviid." 
2Samuel12:25 Nonglem kãng yĩng me la a Natã pʋd a yʋʋra woto: Yedidiya, Wẽnd Noanga." 
2Samuel12:26 A Zoab zaba ne Raba, Amonitsa na-tẽnga, n tõog-a." 
2Samuel12:27 A Zoab tʋma neb tɩ b tɩ yeel a Daviid: «Mam zaba ne Raba; m tol n deega b ko-yũudma sẽn be sak ningã. 
2Samuel12:28 Marsã, bɩ y tigim tãb-biisã, n wa reeg sẽn kellã n soog zãnga, ka rẽ yaa maam n na n lub tẽngã la m na n pʋd-a-la m meng yʋʋre.»" 
2Samuel12:29 A Daviid tigma tãb-biisã fãa n kẽng Raba, n tɩ wẽ tẽnga n tõog-a." 
2Samuel12:30 A fõka b wẽnda Milkom zugẽ, sãnem pugl sẽn da ta nin-tɩɩg a ye zɩɩbo. Kug neer sẽn saas a toore n pɩnda la b da rɩk n tablg-a. A Daviid tall-a lame n tɩ maneg a meng pugla. Pʋs n yɩɩ teed wʋsgo la sẽn tar yõodo la a tall n looge." 
2Samuel12:31 La sã n ya ne tẽnga nebã, a Daviid tall-b lame n wa Zerizalɛɛm. B zãmsa raad wãabo, kug peesgo, tãn-koɛɛm wẽebo. A ra maanda woto Amonitsa tẽnsẽ. A Daviid ne a tãb-biisã lɛɛg n waa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel13:1 Ad yɛl-niyns sẽn pʋge. A Daviid biig a Absalom da tara tão, ba a ye, ma a ye. Bi-pugla da yaa neere, n boond t'a Tamar. A Daviid biig a to, a Amnon, da nonga a Tamar." 
2Samuel13:2 La a Amnon sũur da pa gãe ye. A tol n wa lʋɩɩ bãaga, a ba bi-poaka a Tamar yẽnẽ yĩnga. Bi-pugla ra nan pa kẽ kãadem ye. A Amnon da pa ne sɩlem baaf ning a sẽn na n sɩlem tɩ b zems taab ye." 
2Samuel13:3 A Amnon da tara a zoa a ye sẽn boond t'a Zonadab, a Daviid ba-biig, a Simea biiga, la a Zonadab da yaa sɩlem soaba." 
2Samuel13:4 A waa n soka a Amnon: «Bõe n be tɩ dĩma biig neng ka lebd a zĩigẽ beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa? Fo ka na n togs maam?» A Amnon leok-a lame: «Yaa a Absalom tão, a Tamar, poorẽ, m nong-a lame.»" 
2Samuel13:5 A Zonadab yeel-a lame: «Kẽ n gãand n maan wa f ka laafi ye. F ba sã n wa ges fo, bɩ f yeel-a: ‹Bɩ y kõ a Tamar sore, t'a wa kõ-m dɩɩb tɩ m dɩ. A wa segle dɩɩbã mam nifẽ, tɩ m yãe la m deeg a nugẽ n dɩ.› »" 
2Samuel13:6 La Amnon gãandame n maan wa a pa keem ye tɩ dĩma wa ges-a, t'a yeel-ba: «M kotame tɩ m tão, a Tamar, wa rõos miisd a yi m nifẽ tɩ m deeg a nugẽ n dɩ.»" 
2Samuel13:7 A Daviid tʋmame tɩ b kẽ na-zakẽ n yeel a Tamar: «Kẽng f tão, a Amnon, yiri n tɩ segl rɩɩbo n kõ a.»" 
2Samuel13:8 A Tamar kẽnga a tão, a Amnon, yiri, n tɩ mik t'a gãe t'a rɩk zom sẽn nage, n wẽ, n dõos miisd a yiibu a Amnon nifẽ." 
2Samuel13:9 A yiisa miisda laagẽ, a taoore, la Amnon zãgsa rɩɩbo, n yeele: «Neba fãa yi ka!» La neba fãa yi-la a roogẽ." 
2Samuel13:10 T'a Amnon yaool n yeel a Tamar: «Bɩ f tall rɩɩbã n ta m gãaga roogẽ tɩ m deegd-a f nugẽ n dɩtẽ.» A Tamar rɩka miisdã a sẽn dõosã n wa kɩs a tão a Amnon, a gãag roogẽ." 
2Samuel13:11 A Tamar sẽn tud a nug t'a reeg n dɩ, a Amnon yõk-a lame n yetẽ: «M tão, wa gãand ne maam!» A Tamar leokame:" 
2Samuel13:12 «Ayo, m ba-biiga! Da maan-m pãng ye tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn kis Israyɛl. Da maan wɩɩbd ye!" 
2Samuel13:13 Mam na n deega yãnd a woto n kẽ ye? La yãmb na n lebga nin-yaalg Israyɛl pʋgẽ. Marsã m kotame tɩ y gom ne dĩma, tɩ b kõn gɩdg d kãadem ye.»" 
2Samuel13:14 La a Amnon zãgsame t'a kõn kelg ye; a maana a Tamar pãnga, n gãand ne-a." 
2Samuel13:15 La rẽ poore, a kisg-a lame, al t'a beema yɩɩd a sẽn da nong-a ne nonglem ningã. A yeel-a lame: «Yɩk n menem!»" 
2Samuel13:16 T'a Tamar leoke: «Bɩ y ra rig-m marsã, n paas wẽng ning y sẽn zoe n maana ye.» A Amnon pa sak n kelg a Tamar ye;" 
2Samuel13:17 a boola a sõgne n yeele: «Zãag bi-pugla ne maam ka! Yiis-a yɩnga la f lebs n pag kʋɩlengã a poorẽ!» 
2Samuel13:18 Tɩ sõgna sɩd yiis-a n lɛɛg n pag kʋɩlengã. A Tamar da yeelga fuug, sẽn tar nus wogdo tɩ dĩma kom-pugli da yeelgda fu-kãng buudu b sã n nan ka mi raoa. A Amnon sõgna yiis a Tamar n lebs n pag kʋɩlengã a poorẽ." 
2Samuel13:19 A Tamar yugla a zug tompɛglem, n kẽeg a fuug n dɩk a nug n tik a zugu, n kuiisẽ la a yãbda." 
2Samuel13:20 La a kẽem, a Absalom, seg-a lame n sok-a: «Sãnd f ba-biig a Amnon ka zĩnd ne foom? Marsã, m tão sõngo, bɩ f sĩnd tɩ ya f ba-biiga, la ra ning yell kãnga f sũurẽ ye.» La badaar tɛka, a Tamar pa-la a ye, a tão, a Absalom, yiri." 
2Samuel13:21 Dĩm a Daviid dɩɩ yellã n tɩge la a sũur yika wʋsgo. A yaool n ka yeel a Amnon tɩ bũmb ye. Ra yaa a bi-kẽenga, la a ra nong-a-la wusgo." 
2Samuel13:22 Dẽ tɛka a Absalom pa le gom ne a Amnon ye la a kisg-a lame, a sẽn maan a tão, a Tamar, pãng yĩnga." 
2Samuel13:23 Sẽn maan yʋʋm a yi, rẽ loogre poore, a Absalom waa n pʋʋsa neb tɩ b wa wõrs a piis kõbdo, Baal-Asor tẽnga, Efrayim yegende. A boola dĩma kamb fãa." 
2Samuel13:24 A Absalom tɩ yeela dĩma: «Ade, yãmb sõgna pʋʋsame tɩ b wõrs a piis kõbdo n kõ-a; la m kotame tɩ dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmb sak n wa a sõgna yiri.»" 
2Samuel13:25 Tɩ dĩma yeel a Absalom: «Ayoo! M biiga, d fãa pa na n wa ye, tɩ na yɩɩ zɩɩb f yĩnga.» A Absalom pẽdga dĩma; la dĩma pa sak n kẽng ye. Dĩma ning-a-la bark bala." 
2Samuel13:26 A Absalom yeelame: «Sã n ya woto, bɩ y kõ sore, t'a Amnon tũ tõndo.» Tɩ dĩma leoke: «A na tũu bõe yĩnga? A na n kẽnga f yiri n tɩ maan bõe?»" 
2Samuel13:27 La a Absalom pẽdgr yĩnga, dĩma sakame t'a Amnon ne a kamb a taaba tũ-a n kẽnge." 
2Samuel13:28 A Absalom da kõ-la a sõgen-kamba noor kãnga: «Bɩ y gũus neere, yãmb sã n wa mik t'a Amnon yũu rãam t'a sũur yaa noogo, tɩ mam yeel yãmba: ‹Aya! Bɩ y wẽ a Amnon.› Wakat kãng bɩ y kʋ-a! Da maan-y dabeem ye! Ka maam n kõt yãmb noora laa? Keng-y pɛlga la y maan sũ-keelem!»" 
2Samuel13:29 A Absalom sõgen-kamba maana ne a Amnon wala a Absalom sẽn yeel bãmbã. La dẽ poore, dĩma kom-dibli wã yikame, tɩ ned kam fãa zomb a bõn-wɛɛg tɩ b zoe." 
2Samuel13:30 La b sẽn da waa n ket sor zugu, koɛɛg n taa a Daviid t'a Absalom kʋʋ dĩma kom-dibli wã fãa, tɩ ba a ye pa kell ye." 
2Samuel13:31 La dĩma yik n kẽesa a futu, n gãand tẽnga, t'a kug-zĩidba fãa sẽn da be-b be me kẽes b futu." 
2Samuel13:32 A Zonadab, a Daviid kẽema, a Sama, biiga, leoka koɛɛga; a yeela dĩma:" 
2Samuel13:33 «M naaba, bɩ y ra saag n tags tɩ b kʋʋ y kom-dibli wã fãa ye. Ad-y yaa a Amnon bal a ye n ki. A Amnon sẽn sãam a tão wã tɛka, a Absalom da gãda a sũurẽ la a noor ra tol n gomdame t'a na tʋm dẽ. M naaba! Bɩ y ra sãam y sũur n tagsdẽ tɩ na-biisa fãa kiime ye, tɩ yaa a Amnon bal n ki.»" 
2Samuel13:34 A Absalom zoeese. Bi-bɩɩg ninga sẽn da gũud dĩma zaka noorã nak n gesame, la a yãee neb kʋʋng tɩ b tũud Oronayim sor n watẽ, tãnga pennẽ. Gũuda yeela dĩma: «M nee neb ka tɛk sẽn yit Oronayim tãnga pennẽ n watẽ!»" 
2Samuel13:35 T'a Zonadab yeel dĩma, «Ad dĩma kamb sẽn wate, yaa wala y sõgen sẽn yeel yãmba bala.»" 
2Samuel13:36 A sẽn da ket n gomda, dĩma kamb taame. B zẽka b koees n kelem tɩ dĩma ne a na-yir dãmba me ning nintãm n yãb n yãbe." 
2Samuel13:37 La rẽ t'a Absalom da zoeeme la a ra kẽnga Gesur dĩma, a Amiyud biig, a Talmayi, mengẽ. A Daviid da yãbda a biiga a Amnon kʋʋr daar fãa." 
2Samuel13:38 A Absalom da zoeeme n kẽng Gesur la a paa be yʋʋm a tã. 
2Samuel13:39 Dĩm a Daviid waa n basa a zaba ne a Absalom. A sũura waa n maaga ne a biiga Absalom, sẽn da kʋ a yao, a Amnon." 
2Samuel14:1 A Seruya biiga, a Zoab, wa n yãeeme tɩ dɩma le rata a Absalom." 
2Samuel14:2 Woto, a tʋmame tɩ b kẽng Tekoa n tɩ bao pag a ye sẽn tar yam n yeel-a: «Maan wa f sũur sãamame la yeelg kʋʋr futu, da sõog f neng kaam ye, maan wa pag sẽn kũmd al daar zãra a ned sẽn ki." 
2Samuel14:3 Kẽng dĩma nengẽ n tɩ gom ne b woto la woto.» A Zoab ninga paga noorẽ a sẽn na n tɩ yeel bũmb ninga. 
2Samuel14:4 Tekoa paga tɩ goma ne dĩma. A fõgnega a neng tẽnga, n vabend b taoore n yeele: «M naaba! Fãag-y-ma!»" 
2Samuel14:5 Tɩ dĩma sok-a: «Bõe n tar foom?» Tɩ paga leoke: «M yaa pʋg-kõore; m sɩda kiime. 
2Samuel14:6 La m da tara m kom-dibli a yiibu. Bãmb b yiiba yika ne taab zabre we-kɛɛnga la ned da ka be ne b ye, tɩ ned a ye wẽ a ba-biiga n kʋ." 
2Samuel14:7 La buuda yikame ne maam n yetẽ: ‹Wa ne sẽn kʋ-a a ba-biigã! Tõnd dat n kʋ-a lame n lebse! Woto ned kõn kees sẽn na n dɩ a ba raboog ye.› Woto b na n kiisa m bug-saallã sẽn kellã, tɩ m sɩda yʋʋr tũ rẽ n menem, t'a roog lebg ro-vɩʋʋgo, nin-vɩɩsa tẽngẽ.»" 
2Samuel14:8 Dẽ la dĩma yeel pagã: «Leb yiri, tɩ m na togs b sẽn na n maan bũmb ning fo yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel14:9 Tɩ Tekoa paga le yeel dĩma: «M naaba! Sẽn na yɩ bɩ yɩ, la maam ne m buudã, tõnd saka a na rɩ yell kãnga taale. Bũmb da kẽ sʋka n bõn yãmb ne y rĩunga ye.»" 
2Samuel14:10 Dĩma yeelame: «Ned gom ne foom wẽnga, bɩ f tall a soab n wa mam nengẽ t'a kõn le saag n maan-f bũmb ye.»" 
2Samuel14:11 Tɩ pagã yeel-a: «Bɩ m naaba wẽen ne Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, tɩ ned ninga sẽn tõe n daaga zɩɩm n dol zɩɩm sẽn daagã, kõn wã m yirã n baase, n wã m yirã n kʋ m biiga ye.» Tɩ dĩma leok-a: «M wẽend tɩ fo biiga zoobg meng kõn lʋɩ tẽng ye!»" 
2Samuel14:12 Wakat kãnga, pagã yeela dĩma: «Bas-y yãmb yem-poakã, t'a leok a naaba la a zu-soaba gomd a ye.» Tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Gome!»" 
2Samuel14:13 Tɩ paga yeele: «Yaa bõe yĩnga la yãmb bõn Soaala-Wẽnd buudã? M naaba goama meng wilgdame tɩ y pa tar bʋʋm, y sẽn pa basd b sẽn dig a soabã t'a lɛɛg n wa wã." 
2Samuel14:14 Sã n yaa sɩda, d na kiime, rẽ yaa tɩlɛ. La d na yɩɩ wala b sẽn daag koom tẽnga n ka le tõe n wʋk-a ye. La Wẽnd ka mi zab-taasem ye, la b maana b sẽn na maanega tɩ b sẽn dig a soaba ra kell n pa moog ye." 
2Samuel14:15 La mam sã n wa togsd m naaba la m zu-soaba yell kãngã, yaa tɩ neba yɛɛsa maam. Rẽ n so tɩ m yeel m menga: m na n goma ne m naaba n gese; daar ninga m naaba na maan wa m sẽn sagend-b bũmb ningã." 
2Samuel14:16 Daare dĩma na sake n zãag-m ne ned ninga sẽn dat n kʋ-a tõndã. 
2Samuel14:17 Mam da tagsda woto: ‹Bɩ m naaba gomd kɩt tɩ m yam gãande; tɩ m naaba la m zu-soaba yaa wa Wẽnnaam malɛka, n mi neere la wẽnga.› Bɩ Soaala, y Wẽnnaama, zĩnd ne yãmba!»" 
2Samuel14:18 Dĩma yeela pagã: «M sẽn na n sok-f bũmb ningã bɩ f da solg-m ye!» Tɩ paga yeele: «M naaba la m zu-soaba, bɩ y gome!»" 
2Samuel14:19 La dĩma sok-a lame: «A Zoab ka lob a toog yell kãnga pʋgẽ bɩ?» Tɩ pagã leoke: «Sɩd menga wala yãmb sẽn vɩ ne yõorã, m naaba la m zu-soaba sẽn yeel bũmb ninga fãa, bũmb ba a ye pa kedb rɩtgo bɩ goabg ye. Sɩd yaa y sõgna a Zoab n kõ maam yam kãnga, la yẽ n ning goam kãensa m noorẽ." 
2Samuel14:20 La yaa sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ yellã teem sore, la a Zoab maan woto. La sɩd-sɩda, m naaba la m zu-soaba tara yam wa Wẽnnaam malɛka, n mi bũmb ning fãa sẽn maand tẽng zugu.»" 
2Samuel14:21 Dĩma yeela a Zoab: «M sakame, m na maan boto, bɩ f kẽng n tɩ peeg m biiga a Absalom n wa.»" 
2Samuel14:22 A Zoab wõgemdame n fõgneg a neng tẽnga, n pẽg dĩma n yaool n yeel-a: «Yãmb sõgna bãnga rũnna tɩ m paama bark yãmb nifẽ, m naaba la m zu-soaba, tɩ dĩma maana wala m sẽn yeele.»" 
2Samuel14:23 La Zoab yikame n kẽng Gesur n tɩ peeg a Absalom n wa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Samuel14:24 La ne rẽ fãa dĩma yeelame: «Bɩ a leb a yiri, la a ra wa m taoor ye.» A Absalom leba a zakẽ, la dĩma sɩd pa sak t'a wa a taoor ye." 
2Samuel14:25 Israyɛl soolma fãa pʋgẽ, ned ba a ye ra pa kolg a Absalom ne rasãndlem ye. Neba fãa ra pẽgda a neerma wʋsgo: a ra yaa rasãn-beelle, a ra pa tar bãnd ye." 
2Samuel14:26 Yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa, a zug sã n kẽ, a põngdame. La a sã n põng a zugu, a makda a zoobda zɩslem; la sã n ya ne na-yir magdga, a zoobda zɩslem da taa yubl koom zɩslem." 
2Samuel14:27 A Absalom doga kom-dibl a tãabo la bi-pugl a yembre, yẽ da boondame tɩ Tamar, a da yaa pʋg-neere." 
2Samuel14:28 A Absalom zĩnda yʋʋm a yiibu Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ dĩma pa tol deeg-a a zakẽ ye." 
2Samuel14:29 A Absalom boola a Zoab t'a wa t'a tʋm-a dĩma nengẽ, la a Zoab pa sak n wa ye; ta le bool a yɛsa, la a pa sak n wa ye." 
2Samuel14:30 A Absalom yeela a sõgen-kamba: «Y mi a Zoab pʋʋg ning sẽ yeg-a mam dẽnna la, bɩ y ning-a bugum.» A Absalom sõgen-kamba ninga pʋʋga bugum." 
2Samuel14:31 A Zoab wa n yãee a Absalom, a zakẽ, n yeel-a: «Yaa bõe tɩ f sõgen-kamba tɩ ning m pʋʋga bugum?»" 
2Samuel14:32 A Absalom leoka a Zoab: «Ad-m da kos-f lame tɩ f wa ka tɩ m tʋm-f dĩma nengẽ ne koe-kãnga: ‹Bõe yĩng la m yi Gesur n wa ka? M sã n da ketẽ be ka são. Marsã m dat n taa dĩma taoore. Yell sã n ket m zugu bɩ a kʋ-ma.› » 
2Samuel14:33 A Zoab kẽnga naaba nengẽ n taas koɛɛgã. A Absalom sẽn ta dĩma nengẽ, a wõgemda b taoore, n lʋɩ n fõgneg a neng tẽnga. La dĩma mobga-a lame." 
2Samuel15:1 Sẽn maan yʋʋm a yi rẽ loogr poore; a Absalom daa bilim-bilm a ye ne wiidi a meng yĩnga; a baoo tãb-biis pis-nu sẽn na n gũud a meng yõore. 
2Samuel15:2 A Absalom da yikda tõd-beoogo, n tɩ yals sor ning sẽn dabda dĩma zãongẽ wã; la neba sã n da wat bʋʋd dĩma nengẽ fãa, a Absalom da boond-b lame n sok-ba: «Yãmb yita yɛ tẽnga?»" 
2Samuel15:3 B sã n leoke: «Tõnd yita Israyɛl tẽng a ye,» a Absalom da yet-b lame: «Ges-y! Yãmb koɛɛgã yaa sɩd menga yãmb n so bʋʋm, la yãmb kõn paam tɩ dĩma ned ba a ye maag a meng n kelg yãmb ye.»" 
2Samuel15:4 La a Absalom da le paasdame: «Ges-y wɛ! M sã n da soẽ-la bʋʋda kaoobo, zamaan kãnga, sẽn tar-a bʋʋd fãa watẽ la mam taoore tɩ m kao bʋ-tɩrse.»" 
2Samuel15:5 Ned sã n da kolg a Absalom t'a na n vabend n kud kãntɩɩse, a Absalom da tuta a nugu, n zẽk-a, n mobg-a." 
2Samuel15:6 A Absalom da maanda woto ne a Israyɛl kamba sẽn da wat-b ne bʋʋdo, dĩma nengẽ, n da kɩt t'a Israyɛl neba sũur la b yam da lɛɛg n kẽed yẽnda." 
2Samuel15:7 Sẽn waa n ta yʋʋm a naase, a Absalom tɩ yeela dĩm a Daviid: «Kõ-y-m sore, tɩ m kẽng Ebrõ n tɩ pids m pʋleng a ye m sẽn pʋlem Soaala;" 
2Samuel15:8 tɩ mam sẽn waa n be Gesur, Aramsa soolmẽ, m da pʋlma woto: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd sã n le tall maam tɩ m leb Zerizalɛɛm, m na kẽng Ebrõ n tɩ pʋʋs-ba.› »" 
2Samuel15:9 Tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Kẽng ne laafi!» T'a Absalom yik n dɩk sore, n kẽng Ebrõ." 
2Samuel15:10 Mik a Absalom tʋma neb a Israyɛl sagsa fãa pʋgẽ tɩ b tɩ yeele: «Yãmb sã n wʋm baorg rãamde, bɩ y yeele t'a Absalom lebga dĩma, Ebrõ tẽnga.»" 
2Samuel15:11 Neb kobs-yi n yik Zerizalɛɛm n yãag a Absalom. B da bool-b lame, tɩ bãmb me yi ne b pʋ-peelem n ka mi bũmb ning sẽn be tẽngr ye." 
2Samuel15:12 A Absalom sẽn da waa n kʋʋd maandã, a tʋma Gilo tẽnga tɩ b tɩ wa ne a Ayitofɛl, a Daviid sagenda. Woto suduma paama pãnga, a Absalom poorẽ lebga taoko." 
2Samuel15:13 Nina n wa n togs a Daviid: «M naaba, a Israyɛl kamba yam wẽnemdame tɩ b tũuda a Absalom.»" 
2Samuel15:14 A Daviid yeela a poorẽ dãmba fãa sẽn da be-b ne-a Zerizalɛɛm: «Yik-y kaane tɩ d zoe, t'a Absalom bʋʋg tõndo, tõnd kõn põs ye. Aya! Nadg-y pãng tɩ d loog, tɩ pa rẽnda, a na n wa paam-d lame n tʋm beedo la a kood tẽnga gill ne sʋʋga.»" 
2Samuel15:15 Dĩma poorẽ dãmba leok-a lame: «D naaba la d zu-soaba sẽn dat fãa, d na maane.»" 
2Samuel15:16 Dĩma yii ne nao, yẽ ne a zak rãmba. Pagb piig bal la a bas tɩ b yõdg n gũ zakã." 
2Samuel15:17 Dĩma yii ne nao, tɩ neba fãa pʋgda la a tek n yalsa satem dooga sɛɛga." 
2Samuel15:18 A Daviid poorẽ dãmba fãa: Krɛt dãmba, ne Pelɛt dãmba n paas Gat tãb-biisi, bãmb kobs-yoobe, sẽn da tũ a Daviid, bãmb fãa tonga zabre, a taoore." 
2Samuel15:19 Dĩma yeela a Itayi, Gat tãb-biisa tãnsoaba: «Fo na n tũu tõnd n tɩ maan bõe? Lebg n tɩ pa ne dĩm paalga Zerizalɛɛm tɩ fo yaa sãan ka, la f yaa bu-zẽna." 
2Samuel15:20 Fo nan wa zaamẽ bala, la ad-f kõn yi rũnna n sɩng m pʋgbo, tɩ mam meng ka mi m sẽn dabdẽ taki ye. Lebe! Peeg f ba-biisã. La Soaala-Wẽnd na pʋg-f ne b kũuna, f pʋ-peelma yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel15:21 La a Itayi leoka dĩma: «M wẽen ne Soaala la ne m naaba la m zu-soaba, tɩ y sẽn na n zĩndẽ fãa, yãmb sõgna me na n zĩnda be, vɩɩg bɩ kɩɩnga.»" 
2Samuel15:22 Dẽ la a Daviid yeel a Itayi: «Bɩ f wa loog!» Woto Gititga, a Itayi, looga taoore ne a tãb-biisa la b zak rãmba." 
2Samuel15:23 Tẽnga fãa da wulumda ne yãbre, ne kɛlenga; tẽnga fãa ra loogdame. Dĩma da tũuda Sedrõ kʋɩlgã tɩ neba dɩk sor ning sẽn yegd zĩ-peen-daagã." 
2Samuel15:24 Maan-kʋʋd a Sadok me ra bee be ne Levitsã la b ra tʋka Soaala zooda kasetã. B sika koglgã, la maan-kʋʋd, a Abiyatar, gũume tɩ sẽn yi-b tẽnga fãa wa rʋʋg kʋɩlgã." 
2Samuel15:25 Dẽ poor marsã la dĩma yeela a Sadok: «Tɩ lebs koglga tẽnga pʋgẽ. M sã n paam tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd maan-m nimbãan-zoeere, bãmb na le tall maam n wa la m nif na le yãe b zood kasetã la b waoogra zĩiga." 
2Samuel15:26 La b sã n yeele: ‹M yam yii foom!› Ad ma, bɩ b maan bũmb ning fãa sẽn noom bãmba!»" 
2Samuel15:27 Dĩma le yeela maan-kʋʋd, a Sadok: «Gese! Leb tẽnga pʋgẽ ne laafi, ne f biiga a Ayimaas la a Abiyatar ne a biiga a Zonatã." 
2Samuel15:28 Ade, sã n ya maam, m na n tɩ yalsa weoogẽ, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga sẽn tõe n dʋʋg zĩig ningã n gũud y kibare.»" 
2Samuel15:29 Woto, a Sadok ne a Abiyatar tɩ lebsa zood kaseta Zerizalɛɛm la b kell n paa be." 
2Samuel15:30 A Daviid da rʋʋda Oliviye tãngã la a yãbda. A ra baoo peende n lud a nenga la a kẽnd a nao zaala. Neba fãa sẽn da pʋgd dĩma me da luda b nense, la b me da rʋʋda tãngã la b tar yãbre." 
2Samuel15:31 B wa yeela a Daviid: «A Ayitofɛl lagma ne suduma rãmba n be a Absalom poorẽ.» T'a Daviid na n yeele: «Kɩt-y wɛ Soaala, t'a Ayitofɛl saglsa yɩ gãeen-saglse!»" 
2Samuel15:32 La ade, a Daviid sẽn ta tãnga zugu, b sẽn waoogd Naaba-Wẽnd zĩig ningã, Arkitga, a Usayi wa-la a taoore; a futa ra pãrsame, a zug ra kõda ne tom." 
2Samuel15:33 A Daviid yeel-a lame: «Da wa ne maam ye; f na n yɩɩ zɩɩb m yĩng bala. 
2Samuel15:34 Fo na n leba tẽnga pʋgẽ n tɩ yeel a Absalom: ‹M yɩ-la y ba sõgne, la marsã m na n yɩɩ yãmb sõgne.› Woto f na sagl a Absalom t'a Ayitofɛl saglsa lebg vɩɩdo. La Woto f na naf maam." 
2Samuel15:35 Dẽ yẽnẽ me f na n paama sõngre maan-kʋʋdba, a Sadok ne a Abiyatar nengẽ, n wilgd bãmb b sẽn gomd na-yira tɩ f wʋmnẽ." 
2Samuel15:36 B tara b kamb a yiib sẽn be ne bãmbã, a Ayimaas, a Sadok biiga, la a Zonatã, a Abiyatar biiga; bãmb na taas maam fo sẽn na n wʋma fãa.»" 
2Samuel15:37 A Usayi, a Daviid zoa la a sagenda leba tẽnga pʋgẽ. Segame t'a Absalom me kẽed Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel16:1 A Daviid sẽn wa n loog tãnga zug tẽnsʋk bilfu, a Mefibaal dakõor a Siba wa n seg-b-la ne bõeens a yiibu, sẽn zɩlg bur kobs-yi, sib koeems gĩin koabga, zĩ-lik paalg tɩɩs bi-moaama n paas lɩng sẽn pid ne rãam." 
2Samuel16:2 Dĩma soka a Siba: «Fo rat n maana bõe?» T'a Siba leoke: «Dĩma zak rãmba n na n zomb bõeensã, burã ne tɩɩsa biis na n yɩɩ kom-bõonega rɩɩbo, la rãama na yɩ-la b bõn-yũudla, b sã n wa yɛ we-raoogẽ wã!»" 
2Samuel16:3 La dĩma sokame: «Fo zu-soaba a Sol biiga bee yɛɛlẽ?» La a Siba leoka dĩma: «A paa Zerizalɛɛm, t'a tagsame: ‹Rũnnã Israyɛl na n lebs-m la m ba naam.› »" 
2Samuel16:4 Dẽ la dĩma yeel a Siba: «A Mefibaal sẽn tar bũmb ning fãa, rũnna tɛka yaa foom n so.» T'a Siba fõgneg a neng tẽnga n yeele: «Y barka, m naaba, y yama sẽn kẽ-m yĩnga!»" 
2Samuel16:5 A Daviid waa n ta Bawurim. La ade, daoa a yembre n yi be, a ra yaa a Sol buudu la a boondame t'a Simeyi, a ba yʋʋr la Gera. A ra yita tẽngã la a kãabd kãab wẽnse," 
2Samuel16:6 la a wʋkd kug n lobd a Daviid ne a poorẽ dãmba. Neba fãa, gãndaada fãa yaool n da be-la a Daviid goabg la rɩtgo." 
2Samuel16:7 A Simeyi da kãabda dĩma woto: «Aya! Kẽng n menem! Kẽng n menem! Nin-wẽng menga la zɩ-yũuda! 
2Samuel16:8 N-faa! Soaala-Wẽnd lɛɛg n sudg f zugu, a Sol rooga fãa zɩɩm, f sẽn daage n paam n gʋsg a naama n deege. La gese, Wẽnd le reega f naama n ning f biiga, a Absalom, nugẽ. Ad fo sẽn lebg nin-yaalga, la foom n bao, tɩ fo yũu neb zɩɩm.»" 
2Samuel16:9 A Abisayi, a Seruya biigã, yeela dĩma: «Bõe n maan tɩ baagã, ba-kɩɩngã, wa tʋʋd m naaba la m zu-soaba? M naaba, y kabre! Bas-y-m tɩ m kẽng n tɩ rok a zugu!»" 
2Samuel16:10 Tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Maana a wãn tɩ m weoog kẽed foom, Seruya biiga? A sã n tʋʋd maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sã n yeel-a: ‹Kẽng n tɩ kãab a Daviid beedo,› ãnna n be noor n sokd-a: ‹Bõe yĩng la a maand woto?› »" 
2Samuel16:11 Dĩma le yeela a Abisayi ne a poorẽ dãmbã: «Mam meng bi-roak sẽn tʋlg n dok m yõore, tõnd na le gom dao kãnga sẽn yaa a Bẽnzame sakẽ neda? Bɩ y bas-a t'a kãab beedo, Soaala-Wẽnd sã n yeel-a t'a kãab beedo." 
2Samuel16:12 Daare Naaba-Wẽnd na n gesa m sũ-toogã n maan-m neer n lebs dũnna tʋʋra zĩigẽ.» 
2Samuel16:13 A Daviid ne a neba kell n tuda b sore. La a Simeyi da kẽnda tãnga pennẽ n yegd a Daviid; a ra kẽndame la a kãabd dĩma la a lobd-a kuga la a wʋkd tom n fẽed-a. 
2Samuel16:14 Dĩma ne zãma wã taa tẽng a ye; la b vʋʋsa be. 
2Samuel16:15 A Absalom ne a zãma wa, a Israyɛl neba, dag n kẽe Zerizalɛɛm, la a Ayitofɛl da bee ne a Absalom." 
2Samuel16:16 A Usayi, a Daviid zoa wã, sẽn ta a Absalom nengẽ a yeel-a lame: «Wẽnd na kaoos dĩma! Wẽnd na kaoos dĩma!»" 
2Samuel16:17 T'a Absalom yeel a Usayi: «Nonglem ninga fo sẽn tar f zoa wã yĩng la woto bɩ? Bõe yĩng la fo ka tũ f zoa?» T'a Usayi leok a Absalom: 
2Samuel16:18 «M sẽn pa tũ-a wã, yaa m sẽn dat n pa ne ned ninga Soaala-Wẽnd la Israyɛl sẽn yãk a soab wa b dĩma. Woto wã yaa ne foom la m na n pa." 
2Samuel16:19 Pʋs n bãng tɩ mam sẽn kẽed fooma ka zaalem ye. Fo ka m zoa wã biig laa? Wala m sẽn pʋg f ba wã n ta rũnna wã, ya foom marsã la m na n pʋge.»" 
2Samuel16:20 A Absalom yeela a Ayitofɛl: «Maan-y yẽsgo ne taaba n gese d na n maana wãna?» 
2Samuel16:21 A Ayitofɛl yeela a Absalom: «Kẽ-y ne y ba sẽn bas pagb niyns tɩ b gũ zakã, la woto, a Israyɛl zãng fãa na bãnge tɩ y kɩtame, tɩ y ba wã pa tõe n pa rɩ beem ne y ye, la y na keng sẽn be-b yãmb poorẽ wã fãa sũuri.»" 
2Samuel16:22 B tilga pɛɛl roogo a Absalom yĩnga, bɛonga zugu, t'a Absalom gãand ne a ba pagba, a Israyɛl zãng fãa nifẽ." 
2Samuel16:23 Wakat kãnga, a Ayitofɛl sẽn da sagend sagls niynsã fãa, b da reegd-b lame, wala sagls sẽn yi Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ. A Ayitofɛl saglsa fãa da tara pãnga a Daviid wala a Absalom yĩnga." 
2Samuel17:1 Dẽ poore, a Ayitofɛl yeela a Absalom: «Bas-y tɩ m tũus tãb-biis tus piig la a yi n yik n babs a Daviid yʋnga bala." 
2Samuel17:2 Mam na n tɩ ling-a-la ne yaamse la nug sẽn komse, mam na n yɛɛs-a lame, tɩ neba fãa sẽn pʋgd a wã sẽege. Mam na n wẽe dĩma a sã n wa lebg a yembre bala," 
2Samuel17:3 la m na tall neba fãa n wa kõ yãmba. M sã n paam yãmb sẽn baood ned ningã, m paama sẽn ket-ba fãa. Neba fãa na paam laafi.»" 
2Samuel17:4 Gomda taa a Absalom ne a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba fãa yam. 
2Samuel17:5 La baasgo a Absalom yeelame: «Bɩ y le bool a Usayi, Arkitgã tɩ d kelg yẽ me koɛɛga.»" 
2Samuel17:6 A Usayi waa a Absalom nengẽ, t'a Absalom sok-a: «A Ayitofɛl yeela woto la woto, d tog n maana a sẽn yeelã bɩ d pa toge? Fo me gome!»" 
2Samuel17:7 La a Usayi leokame: «Sor kãnga yẽ, a Ayitofɛl sẽn wa ne saglg ninga ka sõmb ye.»" 
2Samuel17:8 La a yeelame: «M naaba, yãmb mi y ba wã ne a neba sũ-keelem sẽn zem bũmb ninga; marsã tɩ b sũur yikame, wala gɩgemd padr biig sẽn menem t'a yik n zabd ne weoog tõre. Yãmb ba wã yaa dao sẽn mi zaba, la a kõn pa ne a nebã yʋng ye." 
2Samuel17:9 Marsã t'a soonda bokẽ, bɩ zĩig a to. La neb sã n ki tɩ zabra pa yãe n sɩnge, kõn kaoos tɩ neba bãng la b yeele: ‹B tõoga sẽn be-b a Absalom poorẽ.›" 
2Samuel17:10 La woto marsã, ba sẽn tara sũ-keelem wa gɩgemde, yẽ soab na yɛɛse, t'a Israyɛl zãng fãa miime tɩ yãmb ba yaa gãndaoogo, la sẽn be-b ne-a wã me yaa gãndaado." 
2Samuel17:11 Mam yẽ sagendame t'a Israyɛl kamb fãa tigim taaba yãmb nengẽ, sẽn sɩng Dã n tɩ baas Beerseba; neba na n tigma taab kʋʋngo, wala bĩisri sẽn dɩg mogr noore, tɩ yãmb meng y toor bob zabre." 
2Samuel17:12 Tõnd na n paam-a-la a sẽn be zĩig ning fãa la d na n lʋɩ-la a zug sɩɩ, wala meenem sẽn dʋʋgd tẽnga, la ned ba a ye kõn põse: yẽnda ne neba fãa sẽn be-b ne-a wã." 
2Samuel17:13 La a sã n zoe n tɩ kẽ tẽng a ye, a Israyɛl gill na bao wĩya, n kẽng tẽn-kãnga, la d na n vuu tẽn-kãnga n tɩ lub-a a sẽn be kʋɩlg ninga noore; kugr meng kõn pa, tɩ b pa gomd ninsaal ye.»" 
2Samuel17:14 A Absalom ne a neba fãa yeelame: «Arkitga, a Usayi, saglgã la sõmbo n yɩɩd a Ayitofɛl dẽnna.» Mik yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n da tʋlg t'a Ayitofɛl dẽnna sẽn da ya sõmb n yɩɩdã lʋɩ vɩʋʋgẽ, n tak yel-beed a Absalom zugu." 
2Samuel17:15 Dẽ poore, a Usayi tɩ yeela maan-kʋʋdba a Sadok la a Abiyatar woto: «A Ayitofɛl kõ a Absalom la a Israyɛl nin-kẽemba saglg kãnga, n le paas saglg kãnga, la mam me sagl-b-la woto la woto." 
2Samuel17:16 Marsã bɩ y tʋm tao-tao tɩ b tɩ wilg a Daviid. Yeel-y dĩma woto: ‹Da pa pʋ-weesẽ wã yʋng kãnga ye; modg n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, ka rẽ b na wa n vel-f wa rɩ-võre n naag ne f poorẽ dãmbã.› »" 
2Samuel17:17 A Abiyatar biig a Zonatã ne a Sadok biig a Ayimaas da solga Eyin-Rogɛl. Ko-bunem n da be be tɩ fu-pɛgdba wat n pekd b futu. Be la roog bi-pugl a ye ra tog n wa wilg-b yɛlã tɩ bãmb deeg n taas dĩm a Daviid. Bãmb da solgame, b ra pa tog n kẽ tẽnga pʋga tɩ ned wa yãend-b ye." 
2Samuel17:18 La bi-bɩɩga a yembre n baas n yãend-ba n tall kibarã n taas a Absalom. Dẽ la a Zonatã ne a Ayimaas yɩ tao tao n ta Bawurim, raoa a yembre zakẽ. Bulg n da be zaka pʋgẽ la b kẽe be." 
2Samuel17:19 Rao wã pag rɩka fuugu n pil bulga noore n lɛɛg n yɛdg kood a zugu, al tɩ ned pa tõe tags tɩ b luda bũmb ye." 
2Samuel17:20 Woto wã a Absalom neba kẽe zaka pʋga, n soke: «A Ayimaas ne a Zonatã bee yɛ?» Tɩ paga leok-ba: «B tuda ko-baoora sẽnẽ.» B baoome la b sẽn pa yãend-bã, b leba Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel17:21 Bãmb loogr poore, a Ayimaas ne a Zonatã yi bulgẽ wã n tɩ bʋʋg a Daviid n wilg-a. B yeel-a lame: «Aya! Yik-y tao-tao n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, t'a Ayitofɛl goma woto la woto yãmb poorẽ.»" 
2Samuel17:22 La a Daviid ne a neba sẽn da tũud-a wã yik n dʋʋga kʋɩlgã la sõor sẽn waa n pukdẽ, ned ba a ye ra ka be, sẽn pa rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga ye." 
2Samuel17:23 A Ayitofɛl sẽn mik tɩ b pa tũ yẽ saglsã, a loe a bõang gaare n yik n loog a yiri, a tẽngẽ. La a basa a koees ne a yira rãmba la a tɩ luulame. A sẽn ki, b mum-a-la a ba yaoogẽ." 
2Samuel17:24 A Daviid taa Maanayim, a Absalom sẽn waa n dʋʋgd Zʋrdẽ, yẽ ne a Israyɛl tãb-biisã." 
2Samuel17:25 A Absalom yãka a Amasa t'a led a Zoab zĩig n yaa a tãnsoaba. A Amasa yaool n da yaa Israyɛl neda, a Yetɛr, biiga. A Yetɛr pag yɩ-la a Abigayil, a Naas bi-pugla, a Seruya tão la a Zoab ma." 
2Samuel17:26 A Israyɛl ne a Absalom wẽe b sika Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ. 
2Samuel17:27 A Daviid sẽn ta Maanayim, a Naas biiga a Sobi, sẽn yit Raba, Amonitsa na-tẽnga, n paas a Amiyɛl biiga a Makir, Lo-Debar tẽng raoa la Galaad Rogelim tẽng rao, a Barzilayi," 
2Samuel17:28 waa ne gãase, fu tagdo, laase, n paas alkam pɛɛlga, alkam kɛgenga, zom, bɛnga, sũma, ka-kɩɩmnem," 
2Samuel17:29 sɩɩdo, bĩs-gõeem, ne bĩs kaam, piis la niis nemdo, n wa kõ a Daviid ne a neba sẽn da yãagd-a wã, tɩ b na n dɩlg n mense. Sɩd me, b ra tagsame tɩ kom, yaamse la ko-yũudu namsa tãb-biisa we-raoogẽ wã." 
2Samuel18:1 A Daviid gilg n gesa neba sẽn da be ne-a wã, a kõ-b-la nanamse, kẽer soo neb tusri, tɩ kẽer so koabga." 
2Samuel18:2 A welga a tãb-biisã sags a tã, n yãk a ye n kõ a Zoab t'a yɩ b naaba, n kõ a Abisayi a ye, n kõ a Itayi, Gat daoã, a ye." 
2Samuel18:3 La dĩma yeela neba: «Mam dat n tũu yãmb n kẽng zabrã.» Tɩ neba yeele: «Ayo! Yãmb kõn tũ tõnd n kẽng ye! Tɩ b sã n tɩ rigd-d tɩ d zoe, rẽ ka yell ye; la ba b lubd tõnd neba pʋɩ-sʋka, rẽ ket n ka yell ye, la sã n yaa yãmba, ad yãmb zema tõnd neb tus piiga; la sãoome tɩ yãmb kell n pa tẽnga pʋgẽ n yaool n wa sõng-do, d sã n tar sõngr tʋʋmde.»" 
2Samuel18:4 La dĩma leokame: «Mam na n maana yãmb sẽn tẽed tɩ bũmb ninga la neerã.» La dĩma yalsa tẽnga noor kɩrenga, tɩ neb tong koabg-kaobga, tusr-tusri n yita." 
2Samuel18:5 Dĩma kõ-la a Zoab ne a Abisayi la a Itayi noor kãngã: «Mam nonglem yĩnga, bɩ y zoe m biiga a Absalom nimbãanega.» La neba fãa wʋma dĩma sẽn kõ nanamsa fãa noor ninga a Absalom poorẽ." 
2Samuel18:6 B yiime, n na n tɩ seg a Israyɛl, la zabrã kaooga Efrayim googẽ wã." 
2Samuel18:7 A Daviid neba tõoga a Israyɛl la badaare yɩɩ neb tus pisi n pa zabrẽ. Zabra yɩɩ tẽn-kũum menga. 
2Samuel18:8 Zabrã wulumdame n yɛdg zĩig zãnga, la googa rɩɩ neb n yɩɩg sʋʋga." 
2Samuel18:9 Zabra zĩigẽ, yaa a Daviid gãndaada la Absalom seg yã. A ra zomba bõn-wɛɛga. Bõn-wɛɛga zoe n tɩ kẽe tɩɩg a ye tẽngre, t'a Absalom zuga tɩ sẽgdg wila t'a yag n luund tɩɩga tẽngre, tɩ bõn-wɛɛga foog a meng n looge." 
2Samuel18:10 La ned a yembre yãee rẽnda n tɩ togs a Zoab: «Ade! Mam yãee a Absalom sẽn luund tɩɩg a ye tẽngre.» 
2Samuel18:11 La a Zoab leoka sẽn togsa yẽnda kibarã: «Fo yãe-a lame! Bõe n maan tɩ fo ka tão-a n lub zĩig pʋgẽ? Woto mam da na kõẽ foom wanzurf wakɩ koeems piiga n paas sẽbdga.» 
2Samuel18:12 La daoa leoka a Zoab: «Ba sã da yaẽ la wanzurf wakɩ-koeems tusri la m zãadẽ m nugẽ menga, m nug kõn tol n sɩɩs dĩma biig ye, tɩ tõnd fãa wʋma noorã dĩma sẽn kõ yãmb ne a Abisayi, la a Itayi. A yeelame: ‹Bɩ ned da maan m biiga, a Absalom, bũmb ye.›" 
2Samuel18:13 M sã dag n wɩɩb n kʋ-a, b kõn pa n ka togs dĩma ye, y meng na n foosẽ la y nus la y kõn gom kũun yell ye.»" 
2Samuel18:14 T'a Zoab na n kong n yeel-a: «Mam ka na n sãam m vɩʋʋgo n yals ne foom ye!» La a Zoab rɩka ra sɩlems a tã la a tão-la a Absalom sũurã. A ra ket n vɩɩme, n luund tɩɩga tẽngre." 
2Samuel18:15 Kom-bɩɩb piigã sẽn da tʋkd a Zoab teedo gũbga a Absalom n wẽ-a n baase. 
2Samuel18:16 A Zoab kɩtame tɩ b peeb baorgo tɩ neba fãa lebg n wa n pa le rig a Israyɛl n kẽng taoor ye. A Zoab n yals zabrã. 
2Samuel18:17 B sika a Absalom yĩnga n lob bok kãsenga a ye pʋga sẽn da be weoogẽ be, la b wʋka kug n sam n bʋʋg-a. A Israyɛl zoeeme, ned kam fãa leba a roogẽ." 
2Samuel18:18 A Absalom, ra wa n kɩtame tɩ b pees la b sel kugr kãseng naaba bãoogẽ. A ra tagsa woto a sũurẽ: «Mam pa tar biig sẽn na n tall m yʋʋra t'a ra menem ye.» Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la a pʋd kugrã a meng yʋʋre. B ket n boonda kugra rũnna t'a Absalom kugri." 
2Samuel18:19 A Sadok biiga, a Ayimaas yeelame: «Bas-y tɩ m wudg n tɩ togs dĩma kibar noogã tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd kõ-b-la bʋʋm n fãag-ba b bɛɛb nusẽ.»" 
2Samuel18:20 La a Zoab yeel-a lame: «Dũnna ka kibar noog la f na n paam n tɩ kõ dĩma ye. Na n yɩɩ nin-daare. Dũnna kibara ka noom ye tɩ dĩma biig kiime.» 
2Samuel18:21 A Zoab boola Kusitga n tʋm-a: «Zoe n kẽng n tɩ togs dĩma f sẽn yãende.» Kusitga wõgemda a Zoab taoore n yik n tar zoeese. 
2Samuel18:22 A Sadok biiga, a Ayimaas, gomame n paase n yeel a Zoab: «Sẽn na yɩ bɩ yɩ, mam me rat n zoe n pʋga Kusitgã.» A Zoab yeelame: «M biiga, yaa bõe la f na n zoe n tɩ togse tɩ kibar noog sẽn na n wa ne f rolb yaool n ka beẽ?»" 
2Samuel18:23 T'a leoke: «Sẽn na yɩ bɩ yɩ! M na n zoeeme.» T'a Zoab yeel-a: «Bɩ f zoe!» T'a Ayimaas sɩng zoeese, n dɩk Zʋrdẽ bãooga sore, la a looga Kusitgã." 
2Samuel18:24 Wakat kãnga tɩ dĩm a Daviid da zĩi tẽnga noor kʋɩlens a yiiba sʋka. Yell sẽn ka lingd tãb-biig ninga rʋʋ bɛonga zugu n tees n gese. La ade! A yãenda rao sẽn da zoet a yembre, la a zẽka a koɛɛg n togs dĩma t'a bãng tiiri." 
2Samuel18:25 La dĩma yeel-a lame: «A sã yaa a yembre, rẽnd a tara kibar noogo, n na n togse.» La raoa sẽn wa n kolgdẽ," 
2Samuel18:26 gũusda yãee ned a to sẽn da zoete, la a le zẽka a koɛɛg n togse: «Ad-y ned a to n le zoet n watẽ!» La a Daviid yeelame: «Yẽnda me yaa kibar noog soaba.»" 
2Samuel18:27 La yɛla gũusdã yeelame: «M mii pipi soaba a zoeesẽ wã bala, a zoeta wa a Ayimaas, a Sadok biigã.» Tɩ dĩma yeele: «Yaa nin-sõngo, yaa kibar noogo menga n wat ne-a ka.»" 
2Samuel18:28 A Ayimaas sẽn ta, a zẽka a koɛɛg n yeel dĩma: «Ayoo! Yell ka ye!» La a wõgemdame n pʋʋs naaba, n yaool n yeel: «Soaala-Wẽnnaam, paam pẽgre! Tɩ bãmb kɩtame tɩ b yõg neb niyns sẽn zẽk b nug n na n wẽ naaba, m zu-soabã.»" 
2Samuel18:29 La dĩma sokame: «La m biiga, a Absalom, bee laafi bɩ?» T'a Ayimaas yeele: «M yãeeme tɩ neba sɩng n sogsd taab goabg la rɩtgo la wakat kãng la a Zoab tʋm dĩma sõgen a ye n paas maam, y yamba, la m ka paam n bãng sẽn ya bũmb ning taki ye.»" 
2Samuel18:30 La dĩma yeelame: «Bɩ f serg bilfu n wa yals ka.» A Ayimaas sɩd sergame n bas vɩʋʋgo. 
2Samuel18:31 La Kusitga taame n yeele: «M naaba la m zu-soaba, kelg-y kibar noogo: Soaala-Wẽnd kõo yãmb bʋʋm, n fãag yãmb, n yiis-y sẽn da zabd-b ne yãmba nusẽ.»" 
2Samuel18:32 Tɩ dĩma soke: «La m biiga Absalom bee laafi?» La daoã yeelame: «Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ m naab la m zu-soaba bɛɛba fãa dɩ bõne wa bi-kãnga, la yɩ boto me ne sẽn kis b yãmba la b rat yãmb ne wẽngã!»" 
2Samuel19:1 Toog wẽnemda rĩma sũur a yãoogẽ, t'a rʋ yĩngr doogã, tẽnga kʋɩlensã sẽn lugl zĩig ningã, n tar yãbre. A ra kẽndame la a yetẽ: «Kato! M biiga Absalom! M biiga Absalom! Bõe tɩ mam pa reeg fo zĩig n ki? M biiga Absalom! M biiga Absalom!»" 
2Samuel19:2 B tɩ wilga a Zoab: «Ad-y dĩma kũmdame, b yãbda b biiga, a Absalom.»" 
2Samuel19:3 La badaare, tãb-biisa sẽn tõog b bɛɛba n da zĩ ne sũ-noog ninga tekame n lebg kʋʋr sũ-sãanga, b fãa gill sẽn waa n wʋm woto: «Dĩma sũur sãama wʋsgo, b biiga kaalma yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel19:4 Badaare, neba soos n kẽe tẽnga pʋga, wala neb sẽn kẽng zabre n zoe n lɛɛg n wa tɩ yãnd tar-ba." 
2Samuel19:5 Dĩma ra pĩ-la a neng ne a nugu la a ra tara yãb-toose: «M biiga Absalom! M bi-nongr a Absalom! M bi-nongre!» 
2Samuel19:6 A Zoab kẽnga dĩma nengẽ, a roogẽ, n yeel-a: «Rũndã, y ningda y neba fãa yãnde, bãmb fãa sẽn fãag y vɩɩm, y kom-dibli la y kom-gugli vɩɩm, y pagba ne b pʋg-taaba vɩɩm." 
2Samuel19:7 Yãmb nonga sẽn kis-b yãmba, la y kis sẽn nong-b yãmba. Yaa sɩda, yãmb wilga rũnna tɩ tãnsoaben-dãmba la tãb-biisa, fãa yaa zaalem yãmb yĩnga. Ade, mam miime marsã t'a Absalom sã n da vɩẽ tɩ tõnd fãa yaẽ kɩɩms rũnna, y yetẽ lame tɩ rẽ n zemsẽ." 
2Samuel19:8 Aya! M bõsd-y lame, yi-y n keng-y tãb-biisã pɛlga la m wẽend ne Wẽnde tɩ y sã n pa yi, ned ba a ye kõn pak yãmb yʋng kãnga ye, la rẽnda na yɩ yel-beedo n zʋʋg yel-beed niyns fãa yãmb sẽn seg al y yãadmẽ n tãag rũndã.»" 
2Samuel19:9 Dĩma yikame n wa zĩnd tẽnga kʋɩlensa noore. B taasa kibarã tãb-biisã fãa gilli: «Ade, naab yiime n zĩ dignoorẽ.» La tãb-biisã fãa waa dĩma taoore. Wẽnd kãng t'a Israyɛl da zoeeme, tɩ ned kam fãa da leb a roogẽ." 
2Samuel19:10 A Israyɛl sagsa fãa pʋgẽ, neba da gomdame n yetẽ: «Dĩma yiisa tõnd d bɛɛb nusẽ; yaa bãmb n fãag tõnd Filisti rãmba nusẽ; la b kong n zãaga tẽngã n na n põs a Absalom." 
2Samuel19:11 Tõnd da pʋdga a Absalom zuga kaam t'a rɩ naam n soog-do, la a kii zabrẽ, bõe la d gũud marsã n na n kɩt tɩ dĩma le wa?»" 
2Samuel19:12 A Daviid me zĩnda a zĩigẽ n tʋm tɩ b yeel maan-kʋʋdba a Sadok la a Abiyatar: «Gom-y ne a Zɩɩda nin-kẽemba, la sok-y-ba: ‹Bõe yĩnga tɩ yãmb na n pa poorẽ, n kɩt tɩ rĩma le lɛɛg n wa a yiri; a Israyɛl zãng raab zoe n lʋɩɩ dĩma tʋbrẽ." 
2Samuel19:13 Yãmb yaa m saam-biisi, yãmb yaa m buudu, bõe yĩnga tɩ b na n deng yãmba n tɩ tall dĩma n wa?›" 
2Samuel19:14 Y na yeela a Amasa: ‹Fo ka m buud laa? Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbg-ma la b sɩbg-m n bãge, f sã n ka reeg a Zoab zĩiga, n lebg m tãnsoaben-dãmba kãsma.› »" 
2Samuel19:15 A Daviid tõogame tɩ Zɩɩda rãmb fãa yama lebg yam yɛnga. Woto Zɩɩda rãmb tʋmame tɩ b wa yeel dĩma: «Leb-y n wa yã, yãmb ne y sõgen-kamba fãa!»" 
2Samuel19:16 Zɩɩda rãmba ra waa Gilgal n na n seg a Daviid la b sõng-a t'a rʋʋg kʋɩlgã. 
2Samuel19:17 La a Simeyi, a Gera biigã, a Bẽnzame roogẽ, Bawurim tẽnga, da siga ne yãgbo n tũ nebã n na n wa seg a Daviid." 
2Samuel19:18 A peega a Bẽnzame saka neb tusri tɩ b tũ-a. N paas a Siba, a Sol sõgen ne a zak rãmba, bãmb piig la a nu la a rakõap pisi. Bãmb n da tog n sõng dĩma t'a rʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã." 
2Samuel19:19 Koom koglga sẽn zɩt dĩma zaka neb sã n wa n na n dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, bãmb n da na n kelg la b maan dĩma sẽn date. La dĩma sẽn dʋʋg kʋɩlgã, a Simeyi, a Gera biigã, wõgemda naab taoore." 
2Samuel19:20 A yeela dĩma: «Bɩ m naaba da ning-m taale m beegra yĩng ye; b ra le tẽeg m sẽn paoog m dĩma la m zu-soaba, a sẽn wa n yit Zerizalɛɛma ye. M naaba da gãd rẽ a sũurẽ ye." 
2Samuel19:21 M bãngame tɩ m maana yel-wẽnde. La ade! A Zozɛf roogẽ wã, maam n yi n deng taoore n na n seg m dĩma la m zu-soaba, m denga nug goabg rãmba fãa n wa.»" 
2Samuel19:22 A Seruya biiga, a Abisayi goma ne dĩma woto: «A Simeyi ka tog ne kũum bɩ? Ka yẽ n kãab kãab beedo Soaala sẽn kõ ned ninga naama laa?»" 
2Samuel19:23 A Daviid leoka a Abisayi: «Mam tara koɛɛg ne yãmb bɩ, Seruya kamba? La yaa bõe yĩng la yãmb wilgd dũnna tɩ yãmb yaa mam bɛɛba? Dũnna, b na kʋ ned Israyɛl pʋgẽ sɩda? Maam n ka mi tɩ rũnna mam dɩta naam a Israyɛl zug bɩ?»" 
2Samuel19:24 La dĩma yeela a Simeyi: «Fo kõn ki ye!» La dĩma wẽena rẽ. 
2Samuel19:25 A Sol yagenga, a Mefibaal, da waame n na n seg dĩma, a ra pa tol n ges a nao wã yelle, a ra pa tol n põng a no-kõbdo, a ra pa tol n pek a futu, al dĩma yiib daare n tãag a sẽn lebg n wa ne laafi daar ye." 
2Samuel19:26 A sẽn yi Zerizalɛɛm n ta dĩma taoore, dĩma sok-a lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ f pa tũ maam, Mefibaal?»" 
2Samuel19:27 A leokame: «M naab la m zu-soaba, yaa m sõgne n tudg maam. Yãmb yamba da yeel-a lame: ‹Ning m bõn-yãanga gaare, m na n zomb-a lame n paam dĩma.› Y mi tɩ y yamba yaa koamsa." 
2Samuel19:28 M sõgna wa-la y nengẽ n rõd maam. La ade, m naaba, yãmb yaa wa Wẽnd malɛk m yĩnga, la b tõe n maana wala b sẽn date." 
2Samuel19:29 M saamba zak gilli ra toga ne kũum bala, la ne rẽ fãa, yãmb sak n deega y yamba neb niyns sẽn dɩt-b ne yãmba sʋka. Bõe la m tõe n le saag n kos m dĩma?»" 
2Samuel19:30 Dĩma yeel-a lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ f ket n tar goama? Maam n dat tɩ foo ne a Siba pʋɩ taab pʋtã.» 
2Samuel19:31 A Mefibaal yeela dĩma: «A Siba tõe n deega fãa n sooge, sẽn noom maam n yɩɩd yaa dĩma le kẽ a zakẽ ne laafi la bãane.»" 
2Samuel19:32 Galaad raoa, a Barzilayi, ra yii Rogelim. A rʋʋga kʋɩlga ne dĩma n yaool n lɛɛge." 
2Samuel19:33 A Barzilayi da lebga nin-kẽema, a yʋʋm da taa pis-nii. Yẽnda n da ges naaba yelle b sẽn da wa n zĩnd Maanayim, t'a ra yaa arzɛk soaba." 
2Samuel19:34 Dĩma yeela a Barzilayi: «Bɩ f kell n tũ maam tɩ m na ges f yelle, f kʋʋlem pʋgẽ, Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga.»" 
2Samuel19:35 La Barzilayi leoka dĩma: «Yʋʋm a wãna la m na n le paam n vɩɩnde, tɩ m na n tũ m dĩma n kẽng Zerizalɛɛm?" 
2Samuel19:36 Mam yʋʋm yaa pis-nii marsã: mam tõe n le bãnga sẽn be neere la sẽn ka neer sɩda? Yãmb yamba noor le mi noog la beedo n bak sɩda? Mam tõe n le wʋma yɩɩn-yɩɩndb koeese. Bõe tɩ y yamba na n le yɩ zɩɩbo, a soaala la a dĩma yĩnga?" 
2Samuel19:37 Y yamba yãaga dĩma n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, la rẽ n waa n sekd yaoodo?" 
2Samuel19:38 Kõ-y yamba sore t'a leb a poorẽ; m na n kii m ba yiri, m ba la m ma yaoog sɛɛgẽ. La ad-m biiga a Kimam, bɩ yẽ tũ d zu-soaba la d dĩma, la y maan ne-a y sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa.»" 
2Samuel19:39 La dĩma yeelame: «Bɩ a Kimam tũ maam, m na maan ne yẽnda fo sẽn date; fo sẽn na n kos maam bũmb ning fãa, m na maana a yĩnga.»" 
2Samuel19:40 Neba fãa gilli dʋʋga Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga n looge, dĩma me loogame; a moka a Barzilayi n ning a barka. A paama sore n leb a yiri." 
2Samuel19:41 Dĩma teesa Gilgal la a Kimam tũ-a lame n kẽnge. Zɩɩda neba fãa gilli la Israyɛl neba pʋɩ-sʋka ra yãagda dĩma. 
2Samuel19:42 Israyɛl nug goabg rãmbã waa n yeela dĩma: «Yaa bõe yĩnga, tɩ tõnd saam-biisã, a Zɩɩda nebã, maan wa tõnd ka naag n ya yãmb neba n kaoog zãng n wa peeg yãmb tɩ y rʋʋg kʋɩlgã, yãmb ne y zak gilli, ne y tãb-biisa gilli? Y tãb-biisa gill da ka zoe n yãagd-y laa?»" 
2Samuel19:43 T'a Zɩɩda neba na n leok-ba: «Dĩma yaa rogem ne tõnd n yɩɩd yãmba! Yaa bõe tɩ y sũur pa noom ne d sẽn maana? Tõnd soola naaba maasem n paam dɩɩbo, bɩ tõnd deega a kũuni?»" 
2Samuel19:44 Israyɛl neba leoka Zɩɩda rãmba: «Tõnd tara bʋʋm naoor piiga, dĩma poorẽ, n tar bʋʋm naoor piig a Daviid meng poorẽ. Bõe tɩ y rat n bas-d kɛɛnga? Ka tõnd n deng n kos dĩma t'a leb a naama zaoorẽ laa?» La Zɩɩda leoka a Israyɛl ne gãgs la gãgse." 
2Samuel20:1 Nin-yaalg a ye n da be n yaa a Bẽnzame roog neda. Yaa a Bikri biiga, a Seba. A waa n peeba baorgo n yeele: «Tõnd pa tar pʋɩɩr ne a Daviid ye, tõnd ka tar bũmbu a Zese biiga nengẽ ye! Bɩ Israyɛl biig fãa leba a roogẽ!»" 
2Samuel20:2 Israyɛl neba fãa basa a Daviid, n pʋg a Bikri biiga, a Seba. Zɩɩda neba bala n pʋg b dĩma, a Daviid, n yãag-a Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga n tãag Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Samuel20:3 A Daviid lebg n kula a yir, Zerizalɛɛm. Dĩma ra basa b pagb piig tɩ b gũ na-yirã. A kɩtame tɩ b peeg-ba n tɩ ning zak sẽn tar gũuda. A kɩtame tɩ b ges b yelle, la a pa tol n le kolg-b ye. N tãag b yõor tɛka, b paa wala pʋg-kõapa, tɩ b sɩd yaool n ket n vɩ." 
2Samuel20:4 Dĩma yeela a Amasa: «Bool Zɩɩda tãb-biisa fãa; la m gũud-y-la ka ne ra-tãta.» 
2Samuel20:5 A Amasa rɩka sore n na n saa n bool Zɩɩda tãb-biisã la a kaoosame n loog a Daviid sẽn da kõ-a daar ningã. 
2Samuel20:6 Dẽ la a Daviid yeel a Abisayi: «Marsã wã a Bikri biiga a Seba wẽnem ne tõnd yɩɩda a Absalom. Bɩ f yiis tãb-biis niyns sẽn gũud f zu-soaba yõorã tɩ y gɩdg-a t'a ra wa paam n ta tẽn-bɛdã sẽn me lals n gũbgã, n paam n põs ye.»" 
2Samuel20:7 A Zoab ne Krɛt rãmba, Pelɛt rãmba ne gãndaada fãa yik n pʋga a Abisayi n na n kẽng zabrã. B yii Zerizalɛɛm n na n babs a Bikri biiga, a Seba." 
2Samuel20:8 B sẽn wa n kolg Gabaõ pĩ-kẽengã, la a Amasa paam n naag bãmba. A Zoab da yera a tãnsoben-futu, n sẽbg sʋʋga a sɛɛgẽ. Sʋʋga wõog n lʋɩɩme, t'a sulg n dɩk-a ne a goabga." 
2Samuel20:9 A Zoab soka a Amasa: «F keemame, m saam-biiga!» La ne a rɩtgo, a gãda a Amasa toɛɛnga n na n mok-a." 
2Samuel20:10 A Amasa pa maan gũusgu ne sʋʋgã a Zoab sẽn da zãad a nugẽ wã ye. A Zoab kõsa a Amasa pʋgã, t'a yãada yʋʋl tẽnga. A pa yãee n kõs n yɩlme la a Amasa kiime. Dẽ poore a Zoab ne a yao, a Abisayi, kell n diga a Bikri biiga a Seba." 
2Samuel20:11 A Zoab tãb-biig a ye ra yɛsa a Amasa sɛɛgẽ la a yetẽ: «Ned ning sẽn nonga a Zoab la a be a Daviid poorẽ fãa, bɩ a pʋg a Zoab.»" 
2Samuel20:12 A Amasa ra bilma a meng a zɩɩmẽ sora pʋga. Daoa sẽn yãe tɩ neba fãa sã n ta a sɛɛgẽ, b ra yalsdame wã, vuug-a lame n kẽes pʋʋgẽ n bas sorã la pil-a-la fuugu." 
2Samuel20:13 A sẽn yiis a Amasa sora zugu n sɛ tɛka, neba pʋga a Zoab n na n dig a Bikri biiga, a Seba." 
2Samuel20:14 A Zoab zoe n saaga Israyɛl rooga sak-saka al n ta Abɛl Bɛt-Maaka ne a tẽn-toose. Berit dãmba sũu taaba n kẽ a Zoab tãpẽ. 
2Samuel20:15 A Zoab ne a tãb-biisa yẽda a Seba tẽn-kãng pʋga. B wa n zãma tãnd wa lalga n gũbg Abɛl Bɛt-Maaka tẽnga n paam n kolg lalgã n paam n sʋg-a n tus n lubi. 
2Samuel20:16 Pʋg-yẽesenga a yembre zĩnda tẽnga pʋgẽ lalga sɛɛgẽ, n zẽk a koɛɛga n yeele: «Kelg-y yã, kelg-y yã! Bɩ y yeel a Zoab: Kolg ka tɩ m dat n goma ne foo.»" 
2Samuel20:17 A kolgame tɩ paga sok-a: «Yaa foo la a Zoab bɩ?» T'a yeele: «Yaa maam!» Tɩ paga yeele: «Kelg-y m gomde.» T'a leoke: «M kelgdame!» 
2Samuel20:18 Paga goma woto: «Pĩnd rãmb ra mi n yetame: ‹Koɛɛg ta Abɛl a ta-la a tɛka!› 
2Samuel20:19 Israyɛl ka, ned ka be n pʋgd laafi la sɩd wa maam ye. Fo yẽ sẽn baoode yaa tẽn-tõr wãabo, Israyɛl na-tẽng wãabo. Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb rat n menes Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ tõnd d pʋɩɩre?»" 
2Samuel20:20 A Zoab leokame: «Abada ne abada bila! M pa rat n menese bɩ n sarem ye. 
2Samuel20:21 Pa rẽ gomd ye, yaa Efrayim tẽng daoa a Bikri biiga, a Seba, n yik n yet tɩ yẽ pa le pʋgd dĩma ye, t'a pa le pʋgd a Daviid ye. Yãmb sã n kõ tõnd yẽnda bala mam kɩtdame tɩ d yik n bas y tẽnga wãabo.» Paga yeela a Zoab: «Sã ya rẽ, d na gãndg lalgã n lobg foom a zugu.»" 
2Samuel20:22 Pagã kẽnga tẽnga pʋgẽ n tɩ gom ne buuda fãa wala sẽn zemsde: b fiuuga a Bikri biiga, a Seba, zug n lob a Zoab. A Zoab kɩtame tɩ b peeb baorgo, tɩ b zãag ne tẽngã, ned fãa rɩka a yir sore. Sã n yaa ne a Zoab, a kell n leba Zerizalɛɛm, dĩma mengẽ." 
2Samuel20:23 A Zoab n da yaa Israyɛl gill tãnsoaba, a Yeoyada biiga, a Benaya, n da ya Krɛt la Pelɛt rãmba tãnsoaba." 
2Samuel20:24 A Adoram n da ya tʋʋma pʋɩta. A Ayilud biiga, a Zozafat n da so dĩma koeesa moonego." 
2Samuel20:25 A Seva n da ya sɛba gʋlsda, t'a Sadok ne a Abiyatar ya maan-kʋʋdba." 
2Samuel20:26 N paas a Ira, Yayir neda, yẽ n da yaa a Daviid maan-kʋʋda." 
2Samuel21:1 A Daviid zamaanẽ, kom n zĩndi, n kaoos yʋʋma a tã. T'a Daviid ta Naaba-Wẽnd taoore n soke. Tɩ b leok-a: «Yaa a Sol ne a roog rãmba n wa ne yellã, bãmb sẽn kɩt tɩ b kʋ Gabaõ neba n dɩt b zɩɩma raagr taale.»" 
2Samuel21:2 Dĩma boola Gabaõ rãmba n gom ne-ba. Gabaõ rãmba da ka a Israyɛl buud ye, bãmb da yaa Amoritsa yagense. A Israyɛl ra kãabame t'a na maan zood ne bãmba. Ne rẽ fãa, a Sol wa n yik n dat n menes-b-la Israyɛl la Zɩɩda sʋka." 
2Samuel21:3 A Daviid soka Gabaõ rãmba, «Bõe la d tõe n maan yãmb yĩnga? La bõe la d dɩkd n kos sugri, n paam tɩ yel-beeda zãag ne Soaala-Wẽnd buudã?»" 
2Samuel21:4 Gabaõ rãmb leokame: «Tõnd ne a Sol sʋka, la a buuda sʋka, ka ligdi, ka sãnem bɩ wanzurf yell ye; ka yõor yiisg Israyɛl pʋgẽ yell ye.»" 
2Samuel21:5 La dĩma sok-b lame: «Bõe la y rata tɩ m maan yãmb yĩnga?» Tɩ b leok dĩma: «A Sol yũu tõnd zɩɩm la a da ratame n sãam la a menes tõnd, a Israyɛl soolma fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Samuel21:6 Woto wã bɩ y yãk neb a yopoe, a kamba sʋka n kõ-do, tɩ d luul-b Soaala-Wẽnd taoore Gibea, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da tũus a soaba tẽngẽ.» Tɩ dĩma yeel ba: «M na bao-ba n ning y nugẽ.»" 
2Samuel21:7 Dĩma pa kɩs a Sol yagenga, a Zonatã biiga a Mefibaal ye, a Daviid ne a Zonatã sẽn da yõg zood ne taaba yĩnga." 
2Samuel21:8 La dĩma reega a Sol kamb a yiibu, a Armoni la a Mefibosɛt. Bãmb ma la a Sol pag a Rispa, a Aya biiga. Le paasa a Mikal kamb a nu. A Mikal yaa a Sol bi-pugla, la kamb a nu wã ba yaa a Adriyɛl, a Barzilayi biiga, Abɛl-Meola raoa." 
2Samuel21:9 A Daviid ning-b-la Gabaõ kamba nugẽ, tɩ b reeg-ba, n tɩ luul-b tãnga zugu, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. B naaga taab bãmb b yopoe wã fãa n ki. Yɩɩ alkam kɛgenga wʋrb sɩngr daare, a pipi raare, la b kʋ-ba." 
2Samuel21:10 A Rispa, a Aya bi-pugla, rɩka sũ-pa-noang fuugu, n lud-b pĩiga zugu, tigsgu sɩngre wakato al tɩ ta saag niibu la a riga yĩngri luiili wĩntoogo, tɩ b ra pẽneg kũuma ye; a diga we-rũmsã me yʋngo." 
2Samuel21:11 B tɩ togsa a Daviid a Sol paga a Rispa, a Aya biiga, sẽn maan bũmb ningã." 
2Samuel21:12 A Daviid tɩ reega a Sol ne a biiga a Zonatã kõaba, Yabɛs-Galaad neba nengẽ, tɩ bãmb n da tɩ zu-ba, Bɛt-Seã tẽnga, Filisti rãmba sẽn da tall-ba n tɩ luul zĩig ningã, bãmb sẽn wa n tõog a Sol ne a Zonatã, Gilboa tãmsẽ." 
2Samuel21:13 Dĩma tɩ rɩka a Sol kõaba beenẽ, n paas a Zonatã kõaba, la b wʋka sẽn da luul b rãmba me yĩnsi." 
2Samuel21:14 B muma a Sol ne a biiga a Zonatã kõaba, Sela tẽnga, a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ. Yɩ-la a Sol ba, a Kis, yaoogẽ. La b maana dĩma sẽn da kõ noor tɩ b maana fãa. Dẽ poore, Soaala-Wẽnd sũur maaga ne tẽngã." 
2Samuel21:15 Zabra a yembre n le yiki Filisti rãmba ne Israyɛl sʋka. A Daviid tik n yika ne a tãb-biisi n tɩ zab ne Filisti rãmba. A Daviid waa n yɛɛme. 
2Samuel21:16 La wakat kãng la a Isebi-Benob, a Arafa yagenga, yik n baood n na n kʋ a Daviid. A zab-teeda fãa ra yaa paala. A kãnda zũuda zɩslma taa tor-bila." 
2Samuel21:17 La a Seruya biiga, a Abisayi wudg n wa-la a Daviid sõngre. A wẽe Filisti raoã n kʋ. La a Daviid neba zemsa taaba n na n yeele: «Daviid, fo pa na n le tũ tõnd n kẽng zabr ye, t'a Israyɛl fitila bugum na n wa kii zãnga.»" 
2Samuel21:18 Rẽnda loogre poore, zabr n le yik Gob tẽng ne Filisti rãmba la yaa be me la Usa rao a Sibkayi kʋ a Saf, a Arafa yagenga." 
2Samuel21:19 Zabre le yika Gob tẽng yɛsa ne Filisti rãmba, la be, Bɛtelyɛɛm dao a Yari biig a Elana kʋʋ Gat dao a Goliyat. Nin-kãng kãnda raoog da zema koeer-bõanga." 
2Samuel21:20 Zabra a to n le zĩnd Gat tẽnga, tɩ nin-wobg a ye zĩnd be, t'a nug fãa ra yaa nus-bi a yoobe la a naoor fãa da tara nao-bi a yoobe. Sẽn naag taaba, nus-bi la nao-bi yaa pisi la a naase. Yẽnda me ra yaa a Arafa yagenga." 
2Samuel21:21 A sẽn da baood Israyɛl noor yĩnga, a Zonatã, kʋ-a lame. A Zonatã ba la a Sama la a Sama yaa a Daviid ba-biiga." 
2Samuel21:22 Nin-daad a naasa fãa yaa a Arafa yagens sẽn dog Gat, la b fãa ki-la a Daviid ne a tãb-biisa nugẽ." 
2Samuel22:1 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn fãag a Daviid a Sol la bɛɛb a taab nusẽ, a yɩɩla yɩɩn kãnga:" 
2Samuel22:2 Soaala la m pĩiga, m soondg zĩiga, bãmb la m fãagda." 
2Samuel22:3 B yaa pĩig n ligind maam, bãmb la m gãongo, m raood zab teoogo, bãmb la m põasg zĩiga, m soondg roogo, bãmb n fãagd-m nin-toosa nusẽ." 
2Samuel22:4 Bɩ b soog pẽgre! M Sẽn bool Soaalã, m tõoga m bɛɛba." 
2Samuel22:5 Kũuma kʋɩl-bɛɛga tigsa a ko-beedo la maam la a da rat n dɩ bala. Wẽnem-naaba sũu tãpo, la a ling-m lame." 
2Samuel22:6 Sẽn dat-b maam ne kɩɩm-kulga naaga taaba n wẽ-m gũbri, b gãnega bẽdgo m taoore." 
2Samuel22:7 M boola m Soaala m yɩɩra pʋgẽ, m Soaala la m tees n kelem. B zĩnda b ro-sõnga pʋga n wʋm m koɛɛga. M kɛlenga lʋɩ-la b tʋbrẽ." 
2Samuel22:8 Tẽnga yɛɛsame n sɩng miuungu; Soaala basa b sũura t'a yiki la ba yĩngr teeda kẽna lɛbla. 
2Samuel22:9 Bug-zõos n yi b yõorẽ tɩ bug-walem yi b noorẽ, n paas bug-saan-moama." 
2Samuel22:10 B laka yĩngri n ges b sẽn na n sigẽ. B sẽn tabg sawadg taoko," 
2Samuel22:11 malɛk la b zomb n yɩke, bãmb yĩnga sobga yɛdga a pɩgsa." 
2Samuel22:12 Lik la b rɩk n gũbg b menga, wa roogo, n yit sawadgo n kẽed sawadg taokẽ." 
2Samuel22:13 Vẽenem n yãg b taoore, bug-saala bugum yãngame." 
2Samuel22:14 Yĩngr-Soaala zĩnda b zĩigẽ n tãse, yaa al yĩngri la b koɛɛga sãd yã." 
2Samuel22:15 B pɛɛma tãooda wɛɛla, saaga yãgdame n sẽegd-b." 
2Samuel22:16 Mogra gãag pukdame n dɩga, dũni wã sẽn zao bũmb ninga zuga likda vẽenemẽ, Soaala sã n tãs b tãsgã, b sã n tĩs tɩ pemsma yi b yõorẽ." 
2Samuel22:17 Bãmb n zĩnd yĩngri n tʋm tɩ b yaag-ma, n yaag-m ko fõtmẽ wã." 
2Samuel22:18 B fãag-m-la m bɛ-gãndaooga nusẽ, b fãag-m-la pãng sẽn yɩɩd maama soab nusẽ." 
2Samuel22:19 Bɛɛba pʋg-m-la m zu-beed daare, la Soaala yɩ-la m teegre." 
2Samuel22:20 B wa n gaag-m lame n yiis tɩ pemsem wẽed-m; b fãag-m lame tɩ b nong-m lame. 
2Samuel22:21 Soaala geta m sõmblem, b geta m pʋ-peelma n dond-ma." 
2Samuel22:22 M pa zãag ne m Soaala sor ye, m ka yɛ ne Soaala pʋgb ye." 
2Samuel22:23 B noya ka yi m pʋtẽerẽ ye, m pa kẽn n kẽ moog ye." 
2Samuel22:24 M wa-la b taoor ne m pʋ-peelma zãnga, m zãaga m meng ne wẽng la beegr buud fãa." 
2Samuel22:25 Soaala dol-m-la m sõmblem wala b nif sẽn yãende. 
2Samuel22:26 Ned sã n ka bas Soaala, bãmb me ka basd a soab ye. Taal sã n ka f zugu, bãmb me kõn ning-f taal ye." 
2Samuel22:27 Bãmb n dond pʋ-peelem, la b demsd sẽn kedbe." 
2Samuel22:28 Buud ning sẽn da kong pãngã n maand raoodo. Yãmb getame la y sãbsd zẽk-m-meng soaba. 
2Samuel22:29 Yãmb la m fitila, Soaala, yãmb n vẽnegd m lika." 
2Samuel22:30 Y sõng-m lame tɩ m gãndg bog zulunga, n sõng-m tɩ m kal lalg sẽn zãnde." 
2Samuel22:31 Soaala sor ka tar goaleng ye, Soaala ka gomd tɩ ka pids ye, sẽn teega bãmb paama a gãongo." 
2Samuel22:32 Ãnda la Wẽnde, sã n ka Soaala, ãnda la pĩiga, sã n ka tõnd Wẽndã?" 
2Samuel22:33 Bãmb la m tãnsoaben-doogo bãmb n kɩt tɩ m vɩɩm ka tar kegre ye. 
2Samuel22:34 B kõ-m-la wals karse b kõ-m-la nao sẽn gãensd pĩisi. 
2Samuel22:35 Bãmb n wilg m nuga sʋʋg zãabo, bãmb n kõ m kang pãnga t'a rõosd kut tãpo." 
2Samuel22:36 Bãmb n kõ maam b fãagre gãongo, b nonglma ne maam zẽkda m zugu." 
2Samuel22:37 M kẽnd pa tadgd ye, m nao ka mi yaams ye." 
2Samuel22:38 M pʋga m bɛɛba n kʋ-ba a yeyn-ye, m pa lebd m poorẽ tɩ m ka baas-b zãng ye." 
2Samuel22:39 M baas-b lame, m beds-b lame la b kõn le yik ye, b fãa gill lʋɩɩ sasa, ba a ye kõn le yiki tɩ m naoor tabga b sʋka." 
2Samuel22:40 Y kõ-m-la zabr pãnga, m zabd-n-taasa fãa sura m taoore." 
2Samuel22:41 Y tẽega m nug tɩ m gãd b kãare, m menes-b-la zãnga." 
2Samuel22:42 B kelemdame, la fãagd ka ye. B bõsda Soaala la leokr ka ye," 
2Samuel22:43 tɩ m na neem-ba wala tom, m fẽt-b-la wala b sẽn fẽt begdo." 
2Samuel22:44 Y fãag-m-la ne m tẽnga rãmb zaba, y lʋɩɩs-m-la bu-zẽmba taoore, m sẽn da ka mi buud ninga lebga m yamba." 
2Samuel22:45 Sãamb wat n baooda m yel-sõmde. M sẽn yaag m noor bal la b sẽn gõmsde. 
2Samuel22:46 Bu-zẽna konga pãng n dʋʋgdẽ; b yi-la b roogẽ tɩ b wẽneg n dig-b n yõge. 
2Samuel22:47 Bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kell n soog pẽgre! B yʋʋr paam pẽgre! M pĩiga sõng-m lame tɩ m maan raoodo. 
2Samuel22:48 Bãmb n sõngd-m tɩ m dokd m sũuri, bãmb n sulgd m bɛɛba m taoore." 
2Samuel22:49 Bãmb n fãagd-m m bɛɛba nusẽ, bãmb n kõt-m pãnga, tɩ m maand daood ne m bɛɛba bãmb n deegd-m nin-toosa nusẽ." 
2Samuel22:50 Dẽ me la m pẽgd Soaala, Adem biisa sʋka! Ad-m sẽn yɩɩn n pẽgd b yʋʋre." 
2Samuel22:51 Bãmb maasem yĩnga, dĩma tara a bɛɛba nombo, Soaala pa yi b sẽn kõ a soab naama poorẽ ye, b bee ne a Daviid, ne a yagensã, zamaan ne zamaana!" 
2Samuel23:1 Ad-a Daviid yaoolem koeese: A Zese biiga, a Daviid n na n gome, yaa nin-kãsenga n na n gome, a Zakoob Wẽnda sẽn kõ a soab naama koɛɛga la y na n kelge, a Israyɛl yɩɩn-nooda soab koɛɛga, la y na n kelge," 
2Samuel23:2 Wẽnd sẽn pʋdg a soab bãngrã n na n gome bãmb zĩigẽ la a noor na n gome. 
2Samuel23:3 A Zakoob Wẽnnaam yeel-m lame, a Israyɛl Pĩiga togs-m lame: Ned ning sẽn dɩta naam ne zemsgo, sẽn dɩta naam la a zoet Wẽnd nifu," 
2Samuel23:4 wẽnda yibeoog vẽenem, sõor pukr wakato, sawat sẽn ka be raare. Saag niime n yooge, tɩ wĩndga yãngd ne moodã, mood sẽn nan yit paalem." 
2Samuel23:5 N-ye! M zaka yɛsa wɩla Wẽnd taoore, la rẽ yaa b sẽn yõg zood ne maama, b zood sẽn ka be sɛɛbã, b zood sẽn yals neere, n ka mi kɩllgã. Sẽn ya wakat ning fãa, maam n maand raoodo, m daaba pita wakat buud fãa." 
2Samuel23:6 Wẽnem-naaba tãb-biisi wẽnda we-raoogẽ gõaaga, ka bũmb sẽn na wʋk n pĩ yãoog ye," 
2Samuel23:7 kãasda ne kutu la kãn-tʋbre, koondame n gil n wẽneg n yõoge." 
2Samuel23:8 Ad-a Daviid gãndaado: A Isbaal, Akmonitga la gãnda-bɛd a tãaba tãnsoaba. B ra boond-a-la yɛsa: Adino Esnitga. A dɩka a kãnde n kʋ neb kobs-nii, zĩig pʋgẽ bala." 
2Samuel23:9 Sẽn pʋgda, yaa a Dodo biig, a Elazar. A Elazar yaa Aoyitga. A yɩɩ tãb-biis a tãaba nin-yende, tãb-biis niyns sẽn da yãagd a Daviid a sẽn waa n baood Filisti rãmba noorã, Filisti rãmba sẽn waa n tong zabre, n yɛs-b taoorã. A Israyɛl tãb-biisa basa raoodo, n kong n zoe." 
2Samuel23:10 A Elazar tedga ne Filisti rãmbã n tar kɛɛbo al t'a nuga sẽn sog sʋʋga wa ki n ka le tõe n puk ye. Baraare, ne Soaala-Wẽnd sõngre, yɩɩ kʋʋb tɛka. Tãb-biisa lɛɛg n waame n na n zɛ teeda bala." 
2Samuel23:11 Gãndaoog ning sẽn le pʋgdã, yɩ-la a Sama; yẽ yaa Araritga, a Age biiga. Filisti rãmba da tigma taab Leyi tẽnga. B ra bee bɛng pʋʋgẽ; a Israyɛl zoe-la b taoore." 
2Samuel23:12 La yẽ tɩ yalsa pʋʋga tẽnsʋka, n dig bɛɛbã n deeg pʋʋgã. Yɩɩ tõogr kãseng la a Israyɛl tõog a bɛɛba ne Soaala sõngre." 
2Samuel23:13 Daar a ye, tigsg wakato, neb a tãabo n yi gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka n wa yãend a Daviid, Adulam tãn-bokẽ wã. Dẽ tɩ Filisti rãmba wẽe b sik Refayim dãmba tãnga sigdgẽ." 
2Samuel23:14 A Daviid da be-la a zabr kõn-ling-m doogẽ, tɩ Filisti rãmba be Bɛtelyɛɛm." 
2Samuel23:15 A Daviid waa n yik n yãbda ko-yũudu la a sokame: «Ãnda n na n wa kõm-m koom tɩ m yũ, ko-baoor ning sẽn be Bɛtelyɛɛm noorã kooma?»" 
2Samuel23:16 Dẽ la gãndaad a tãabã wẽdg n kẽ Filisti rãmba sika, n tɩ toog kooma n wa kɩs a Daviid. A Daviid pa tʋlg n yũ ye. A rɩk-a lame n bas Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
2Samuel23:17 A yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnd na laas-m ne ko-kãnga yũubu. M sã n yũ, yaa zɩɩm la m yũ yã, sẽn bas-b vɩɩma taale n kẽng n tɩ bao kooma zɩɩm la m yũyã.» A sɩd zãgsa yũubu. Gãndaad a tãab kãensa me sẽn tʋm la woto." 
2Samuel23:18 Sẽn ket n pʋgd yaa a Abisayi, a Seruya biiga, la a Zoab saam-biiga. Yẽ me ra yaa gãndaad pis-tã wã nin-yende. Yẽ me zẽka a kãn-dibg raar a ye, neb kobs-tã zugu la a kʋ-b lame. A yʋʋr yii gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka," 
2Samuel23:19 a yʋʋr yiime, n yɩɩg a taaba. A tol n wa lebga b naaba. A gãndalsma sẽn pa yɩɩg yaa tãnsoaben-dãmb bɛd a tãaba rẽnda." 
2Samuel23:20 Sẽn le tʋma gãndalsem tʋʋm ka tɛka, yaa a Benaya. A ba yaa a Zoyada; a yaa tãb-biig a ye sẽn pid ne sũ-keelem yagenga. A tẽng yaa Kabseyɛl. Yẽ n kʋ Moab Ariyɛl dãmb a yiibã. Yẽ n sig loangẽ, saag sẽn yɛdg a zom maas daare, n kʋ bõnyẽega." 
2Samuel23:21 A le kʋʋ nin-daoog a ye sẽn ya Ezipt neda. Ezipt daoã da tara kãnde; yẽ seg-a-la ne dasaar bala, n deeg a kãndã n wẽneg n kʋ-a ne rẽ." 
2Samuel23:22 A Zoyada biig a Benaya me sẽn tʋm la woto. Dẽ me la a yʋʋr yi tãb-biis pis-tã wã sʋka. 
2Samuel23:23 La a yʋʋr yii wʋsgo gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka. Yẽ me gãndalsem sẽn pa kolge yaa tãnsoaben-dãmb bɛda a tãaba rẽnda. A Daviid kɩtame t'a lebg a meng gũudba taoor soaba. 
2Samuel23:24 A Asayɛl, a Zoab saam-biiga, a Elana, Bɛtelyɛɛm Dodo biiga," 
2Samuel23:25 a Sama, Arod tẽnga, a Elika, Arod tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:26 a Eles, Pelɛt tẽnga, a Ira, Tekoa rao a Ikɛs biiga," 
2Samuel23:27 a Abiyezer, Anatot tẽnga, a Mebunayi, Usa tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:28 a Salmon, Aoya tẽnga, a Marayi, Netofa tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:29 a Eleb, Netofa Baana biiga, a Itayi, a Ribayi biiga, Gibea sẽn be Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ," 
2Samuel23:30 a Benaya, Piratõ tẽnga, a Idayi, Gaas kʋɩl-beesẽ," 
2Samuel23:31 a Abiyalbõ, Bɛt-Araba tẽnga, a Azmavɛt, Bawurim tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:32 a Eliyaba, Saalbõ rao a Yasen biig a ye, a Zonatã," 
2Samuel23:33 a Sama, Arar tẽnga, a Ayiyam, a Sarar biiga, Arar tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:34 a Elifelɛt, a Aasbayi biiga, Maaka rao a ye yagenga, a Eliyam, a Ayitofɛl biiga, Gilo tẽnga," 
2Samuel23:35 a Esrayi, Karmɛl tẽnga a Paarayi, Arabga," 
2Samuel23:36 a Igal, a Natã biiga, Soba raoa, a Bani, a Gad roogẽ," 
2Samuel23:37 a Selɛk, Amonitga, a Narayi, Beerot tẽnga, a Seruya biig. a Zoab zab-teeda tʋkda," 
2Samuel23:38 a Ira, a Yetɛr sakẽ, a Gareb, a Yetɛr sakẽ," 
2Samuel23:39 a Uri n baasde. Yẽ yaa Ititga. B fãa gill yaa pis-tã la a yopoe. 
2Samuel24:1 Soaala-Wẽnd sũur le puuga ne Israyɛl dãmba, tɩ b na n tus a Daviid t'a maan bũmb sẽn na n wa ne b bõne. Soaala ninga a Daviid yamẽ t'a sõd Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda." 
2Samuel24:2 Dẽ la dĩma yeel a tãnsoab a Zoab sẽn da be ne-a wã: «Saag Israyɛl tẽnsa fãa, n sɩng Dã n ta Beerseba, la sõd neba tɩ m bãng b sõore.»" 
2Samuel24:3 A Zoab leoka dĩma: «Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ y neba sõor paas naoor koabga, tɩ y ket n vɩ ne yõore, la bõe la m zu-soaba dat ne sõadga woto?»" 
2Samuel24:4 A Zoab ne tãnsoaben-dãmba yãeeme tɩ dĩma raab ka tõe n ka pids ye, la b loogame n na n tɩ sõd Israyɛl nebã." 
2Samuel24:5 B rʋʋga Zʋrdẽ n wẽ b sik Aroɛr, tẽng ning sẽn be Gad kʋɩl-bɛɛga sudga nug rɩtgo, Yazɛr sẽnẽ." 
2Samuel24:6 B kẽname n wa ta Galaad la b kẽe Ititsa tẽnga sẽn boond tɩ Kadɛs, n yi be n ta Dã, n gõdg n tees Sidõ." 
2Samuel24:7 B taa Tir tãnsoaben-doogã, n kẽ Ivitsa ne Kanaã rãmba soolem, n wa ta Zɩɩda Negɛb, Beerseba." 
2Samuel24:8 B sẽn saag tẽn-peelma n sɛ b leba Zerizalɛɛm, b kiis a wɛ la rasem pisi yĩnga." 
2Samuel24:9 A Zoab wilga dĩma b sẽn sõd nebã n paam sõor ninga: Israyɛl neba ra yaa tãb-biis tus kobs-nii sẽn tõe n bob sʋʋga. Zɩɩda yaa tus kobs-nu. 
2Samuel24:10 Dẽ poore a Daviid sũur kiuusame, a sẽn maan sõadga yĩnga la a yeela Soaala: «M beega wʋsgo! Sak-y n kõ-m sugri tɩ y yamba maana gãeemd mengã.»" 
2Samuel24:11 Beoog ne a na n vẽeg tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da zoe n wilga b koe-kãnga a Gad, bãngd a ye sẽn da be a Daviid sɛɛgẽ n taasd-a Soaala-Wẽnd koeesã:" 
2Samuel24:12 «Tɩ yeel a Daviid: Yaa woto la m gomd ne foo: sɩbgr buud a tã la m tõe n sɩbg-fo. Yãk f sẽn date, tɩ m na tũ f raabo.» Vẽkembeoogo, a Daviid sẽn neke," 
2Samuel24:13 a Gad kẽnga a nengẽ, n tɩ toags-a. A yeela woto: «F ratame n yãend kom f tẽnga pʋgẽ yʋʋm a tã, bɩ f ratame n zoe f bɛ taoor kiis a tã, bɩ f ratame tɩ tẽn-kũum lʋɩ tẽnga rasem a tãabo? Marsã, tagse la f kõ-m koɛɛg ning m sẽn na n tɩ leok sẽn tʋm-a maama.»" 
2Samuel24:14 A Daviid leoka a Gad: «M ka mi m sẽn na n leok bũmb ninga tɩ m zĩi ne yɩɩre. La ade, d lʋɩ Naaba-Wẽnd nugẽ tɩ b nimbãan-zoeer waooga. D da lʋɩ ninsaalb nugẽ ye!»" 
2Samuel24:15 Woto wã yaa bãag sẽn wat ne kũum la Soaala-Wẽnd fẽeg tẽnga, yibeoog kãng n ta ra-yɩten-daare, la neba sẽn ki Dã n ta Beerseba, yɩɩ tus pisopoe." 
2Samuel24:16 Malɛka zẽka a nug n na n wã Zerizalɛɛm, la Naaba-Wẽnd lebsa b noore, n yeel tẽn-kũuma malɛkã: «Sekame. Yõbg f nugu.» Malɛkã ra bee Zebuze rao a Aravna zɛɛgẽ." 
2Samuel24:17 A Daviid sẽn yãe tɩ malɛk n wa ne bã-longdma a yeela Naaba-Wẽnde: «Yaa maam n beege, yaa maam n maan wẽnga, la nin-bãmba, zãma wã, b maana bõe? Bɩ y sɩbg maam ne m zaka bala.»" 
2Samuel24:18 Badaare a Gad taa a Daviid nengẽ n yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ me maan-kugr Zebuze raoa, a Aravna zɛɛgẽ wã.»" 
2Samuel24:19 A Daviid kẽnga wala a Gad sẽn wilg-a, la wala yẽ me sẽn deeg Soaala nengẽ." 
2Samuel24:20 A Aravna yãee dĩma ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba tɩ b wat a nengẽ. A Aravna waa n yĩgimda dĩma taoore, n kɩ a neng tẽnga." 
2Samuel24:21 N yeele: «Yaa bõe tɩ m dĩma, m zu-soaba wat a yamba nengẽ?» T'a Daviid yeele: «M dat n daa f zɛɛgã n me maan-kugr m Soaala yĩnga. Woto bãaga na zãag ne tẽngã.»" 
2Samuel24:22 A Aravna leoka a Daviid: «Bɩ m zu-soaba deeg zɛɛgã n kʋ b sẽn date. Ad-m niisã, maoonga yĩnga. Ad-m kũura raado n paas raoogo ning sẽn palgd nag koodsa yublã." 
2Samuel24:23 Y yamba dɩkda rẽ fãa n kõt a dĩma.» La a paasame: «Wẽnd na reeg y kosgo!» 
2Samuel24:24 Dĩma leokame: «Bada! M dat n daame. M pa rat n kõ Soaala maoongo n pa tol n yiis m toorẽ bũmb ye.» A Daviid daa zɛɛga la niisã, wakɩ koeems pis-nu." 
2Samuel24:25 Zĩ-kãnga a Daviid mee maan-kugri Soaala yĩnga. A kʋʋ yũ-nood la laafi kosg maando. Soaala-Wẽnd kũma tẽnga rãmb nimbãanega la bãaga zãaga ne a Israyɛl. 
1Kings1:1 A Daviid waa n lebga nin-kẽem kʋdre. B ra pind-a-la fu-gobse la baasg fãa a ra ket n digda waoodo. 
1Kings1:2 Dẽ la a sõgen-kamba yeel-a: «Dĩma, d na n bao-la y yĩnga pa-kuli sẽn na n get y yelle, la y sẽn na n kʋgl n paam n wɩng y yĩnga.»" 
1Kings1:3 B saaga Israyɛl vẽenema n bao bi-pugl sẽn ya neere. Bi-pugl a ye la b yãend yã, Sunamitga sẽn boond tɩ Abisag, la b tall-a lame n wa." 
1Kings1:4 Bi-pugla ra yaa neer wʋsgo. A gesa dĩma yelle, n tɩp-a la dĩma pa bãng-a ye." 
1Kings1:5 A Adoniyas, a Agit biiga, da yaa rasãnga. A waa n tẽeme tɩ yẽe n na n led a Daviid zaoorẽ, la a ra zoe n maanda wa yẽ la na-bi-kẽenga n yetẽ: «Maam n na n dɩ naama.» A ra baoo bilim-bilm la wiidi la tãb-biis pis-nu sẽn na n zoet a taoore." 
1Kings1:6 A ba zɩ n sãam a sũuri n yeel-a: «Yaa bõe la f maand woto ye.» A Adoniyas me ra yaa rasãnga la a Absalom poore yẽ n da pʋgd ne kãsengo, tɩ yẽ n da pʋgd ne rogem." 
1Kings1:7 A tɩ yẽsa ne a Seruya biiga, a Zoab, la maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar, tɩ bãmb kẽ a tãpẽ." 
1Kings1:8 Sẽn yaool n da pa kẽ a Adoniyas tãpẽ, yaa maan-kʋʋd a Sadok, yaa a Zoyada biiga, a Benaya, yaa bãngd a Natã, yaa a Simeyi, yaa a Reyi, yaa a Daviid gãndaadã." 
1Kings1:9 Daar a ye, a Adoniyas maana kibsa, yɩɩ pĩ-saalga zugu, pĩ saalg ning sẽn pẽ fu-pɛgdba bãkã. B kʋ piisi, niisi, nag-bi-nobdse. A boola a ba-biisã, a kẽem-dãmb la a yaopa la Zɩɩda neb niyns fãa sẽn da tʋmd-b dĩm a Daviid zakẽ." 
1Kings1:10 A sẽn pa boole yɩɩ bãngd a Natã, n paas a Benaya, ne gãndaadã la a Salomo bala." 
1Kings1:11 A Natã yeela a Salomo ma, a Batseba: «Fo ka wʋm t'a Agit biiga, a Adoniyas, lebga dĩma, tɩ d zu-soab a Daviid ka mi tiir bɩ?" 
1Kings1:12 Bas tɩ m sagl-fo, tɩ foo ne f biiga a Salomo paam n põse." 
1Kings1:13 Kẽng a Daviid nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a: ‹M zu-soaba, ka yãmb n kãab maam tɩ m biig a Salomo n na n dɩɩ naam yãmb poore, tɩ yẽ n na n ledg yãmb zaoorẽ? Maana wãn marsã tɩ yaa a Adoniyas la dĩma?›" 
1Kings1:14 Fo sẽn wat n be ne dĩma n sõsdã la mam na n yaool n kẽ la m gom n dig fo sẽn zoe n tʋɩɩsẽ wã.» 
1Kings1:15 A Batseba bʋʋga dĩma a ro-gãagẽ. Dĩma ra kʋʋlame la Sunamitga, bi-pugl a Abisag, n da get a yelle." 
1Kings1:16 A yĩgimdame la a sulga a meng dĩma taoore tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Yaa bõe la f rata?» 
1Kings1:17 Paga yeelame: «M zu-soaba, yaa ne Naaba-Wẽnd la y wẽen n kãab maam tɩ m biig a Salomo n na n dʋ zaoorã yãmb poore." 
1Kings1:18 La ade, a Adoniyas sẽn lebg dĩma, m zu-soaba ka mi tiiri?" 
1Kings1:19 A tɩ kʋʋ niis ka tɛka, nag-bi-nobdse, piisi la a boola a ba-biisa fãa, n paas maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar, tãnsoab a Zoab, y biiga, a Salomo, bal la a ka boole." 
1Kings1:20 Yaool n yaa m zu-soaba la a Israyɛl gill gũuda tɩ b wilg sẽn na n deeg-a b zĩiga. 
1Kings1:21 M zu-soaba sã n wa maan kaalem, yaa maam ne m biig a Salomo n na n yãe toogo!»" 
1Kings1:22 A Sẽn da ket n gomd la bãngd a Natã sẽn ta. 
1Kings1:23 B yeela dĩma: «Ad-y bãngd a Natã, n be yɩnga.» A Natã sẽn kẽ, a wõgemda dĩma taoore, n kɩ a neng tẽnga." 
1Kings1:24 Ad-a sẽn yeele: «M zu-soab la m dĩma, yaa yãmb n yeele: ‹A Adoniyas n na n dɩ naam mam poore, yẽ n na n dʋ m zaoore?›" 
1Kings1:25 Dũnna, a kẽnga fu-pɛgdba bãkẽ, a tɩ kʋʋ niis ka tɛka, nag-bi-nobdse, la piisi. A boola a ba-biisa fãa, tãnsoaben-dãmba, maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar. B bee be n dɩtẽ la b yũuda la b kaasdẽ: ‹Wẽnd na kõ a Adoniyas yõore!›" 
1Kings1:26 La a ka bool tõnd ye, a ka bool maam, y yamba, bɩ maan-kʋʋd a Sadok, bɩ a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, bɩ y biiga, a Salomo ye." 
1Kings1:27 M sok n gese, ya m zu-soaba la m dĩma n kõ noor bɩ? Yãmb yaool n nan ka yaag y noor n wilg sẽn na n dɩ a naama yãmb poor ye.»" 
1Kings1:28 Dĩm a Daviid yeelame: «Bɩ y bool a Batseba.» A kẽe dĩma nengẽ n zĩnd b taoore. 
1Kings1:29 Tɩ dĩma na n wẽene: «Ne vɩɩm Naab a Wẽnde sẽn yiis maam yɩɩr buud fãa pʋgẽ," 
1Kings1:30 m na pids rũnna m sẽn kãab-fo, bãmb taoore, n yet tɩ f biiga a Salomo n na dɩ naam mam poore la a dʋ m zaoorẽ.»" 
1Kings1:31 A Batseba yĩgimdame n kɩ a neng tẽnga n yeele: «Wẽnd wogl m zu-soaba, a Daviid, yõore!»" 
1Kings1:32 T'a Daviid yeele: «Bɩ y bool a Sadok, maan-kʋʋdã, bãngd a Natã, a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, n kõ-ma.» B waame."
