1Kings1:33 Tɩ dĩma yeele: «Yi-y ne tãb-biisa sẽn gũud dĩma, zombg-y a Salomo dĩma bõn-wɛɛgã, n tall a n kẽng Giõ." 
1Kings1:34 Beene, maan-kʋʋd a Sadok la bãngd a Natã na taag-a kaam t'a lebg a Israyɛl dĩma, dẽ tɩ y peebda baorgo la y yetẽ: ‹Wẽnd na kaoos dĩma, a Salomo!›" 
1Kings1:35 Y na pʋg-a n lɛɛg n wa, a na dʋ m naama zaoore la a na rɩ naam m zĩigẽ tɩ yaa yẽ la m yãkre t'a na n yɩ Israyɛl la Zɩɩda dĩma.»" 
1Kings1:36 A Zoyada biig a Benaya leoka dĩma: «Sɩd ne sɩda, yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd ne dĩma, m zu-soaba:" 
1Kings1:37 Wala b sẽn pa ne m dĩma, m zu-soaba, woto me b na pa ne a Salomo, n zẽk a naama t'a zʋʋg m dĩma la m zu-soaba, a Daviid, rẽnna.»" 
1Kings1:38 Maan-kʋʋd a Sadok, bãngd a Natã, a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, Krɛt la Pelɛt dãmba siga Giõ, b zombga a Salomo bõn-wɛɛgã." 
1Kings1:39 A Sadok kẽe sɛka roogẽ n dɩk yɩɩlle ne kaam n pʋdg a Salomo zugu. Baorg peebame la neba fãa naaga taab n kelme: «Wẽnd na kaoos dĩma, a Salomo.»" 
1Kings1:40 A lʋɩɩ taoore tɩ neba pʋgd-a, n peebd wɩɩse, la b kaasd sũ-noog kaasgo, tɩ yaa wa tẽnga na n ninga mugnum." 
1Kings1:41 A Adoniyas ne a sẽn da bool b rãmba wʋma bʋʋre. B ra rɩɩ n sɛɛme. A Zoab me wʋma baorga rãamde n sok: «Bõe n yɛɛs tẽngã tɩ bʋʋr sãta?» 
1Kings1:42 A sẽn da ket n gomd la a Abiyatar biig, a Zonatã, sẽn pooge. A Adoniyas yeel-a lame: «Wa, tɩ f yaa pu-peen-neda la yaa kibar noog la f wat ne.»" 
1Kings1:43 T'a Zonatã leoke: «Sɩd ne sɩda, m ka wat ne koe-noog ye, a Daviid kõ-la a Salomo naam!" 
1Kings1:44 Dĩma yiis-a-la ne maan-kʋʋd a Sadok, bãngd a Natã, a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, Krɛt la Pelɛt dãmba: B zombg-a-la b meng bõn-wɛɛga." 
1Kings1:45 A Sadok ne a Natã kõ-a-la naam Giõ. B yii be n lɛɛg n wa tẽngã ne sũ-noog kilsgu, tɩ tẽnga fãa wulumdi, yaa rẽ bʋʋr la yãmb sẽn wʋmdã." 
1Kings1:46 Yɩɩd rẽ, a Salomo dʋʋ naama zaoore." 
1Kings1:47 La tãnsoaben-dãmba wa n pʋʋsa a Daviid bark la b yetẽ: ‹Bɩ Wẽnd zẽk a Salomo yʋʋr n zʋʋg yãmb dẽnna, bɩ a zaoora paam waoogre n yɩɩd yãmb dẽnna.› Dĩma wõgemda a gãagẽ," 
1Kings1:48 n tol n yeele: ‹A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama paam barka, tɩ rũnna b kõ-d-la ned sẽn na n dɩ naam m zaoorẽ wã la b kõ-m lame tɩ m yãend a soab ne m nifu.› »" 
1Kings1:49 Dabeem yõka a Adoniyas ne a sẽn da be ne b rãmba, tɩ ned kam fãa yi n tees a sẽn paame." 
1Kings1:50 A Adoniyas zoe rabeem, n yik n tɩ gãd maan-kugra yɩdba." 
1Kings1:51 B tɩ wilga a Salomo: «A Adoniyas zoeta a Salomo dabeem n tɩ gãd maan-kugra yɩdba n yetẽ: ‹A Salomo wẽen dũnna t'a kõn kʋ-m ne sʋʋg ye.› » 
1Kings1:52 A Salomo yeelame: «A sã n tall a meng neere a zoob-yend meng kõn lʋɩ tẽng ye. La sã n ka rẽ b na kʋ-a.» 
1Kings1:53 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ b babs a Adoniyas wẽnd doogẽ. B yiis-a lame n tall n wa a Salomo taoore la a sẽn ta, a wõgemda a taoore la a Salomo yeel a lame: «Leb f yiri!»" 
1Kings2:1 A Daviid sẽn mik t'a kũum kolgame, a sagla a biig a Salomo woto:" 
1Kings2:2 «M dɩka neba fãa sẽn dɩkd sor ninga n yit moogo. Keng f sũuri, yɩ raoa!" 
1Kings2:3 Tũ Naaba-Wẽnd, f Soaala, sẽn wilgi, tũ b soya, reeg b noya, b raabo, b sẽn togse, b sẽn yals zamaan fãa yĩnga, b sẽn gʋlse a Moyiiz sebrẽ, la woto f sẽn sɩnge bɩ sẽn dat n sɩng tʋʋm niynsa fãa na baas neere." 
1Kings2:4 La Wẽnd na pids b sẽn kãab maama n yeel-ma: ‹F kamba sã n tall b mens neere, n kẽn tɩrg m taoore, ne b sũur fãa, ne b yalẽ wã fãa, f kõn kong ned sẽn na n dɩ naam Israyɛl ye.›" 
1Kings2:5 Fo mi-la a Seruya biig a Zoab sẽn maan-m bũmb ninga, a sẽn maan Israyɛl tãnsoaben-dãmb a yiibu, a Nɛr biig a Abnɛr la a Yetɛr biiga a Amasa. F mii a sẽn kʋ-b to-to, a yika laafĩ wakato n kʋ, n bol ne zɩɩm a sɛɛg sẽbdg la a neooda." 
1Kings2:6 F na maan sẽn segd n ka bas-a t'a sig bʋg-tẽng bãane ne zoob-peend ye. 
1Kings2:7 Sã n yaa a Barzilayi Galaad daoã kamba, f na zã-b ne nonglem la b na lagm-f laag a yembre, tɩ m sẽn waa n zoet f kẽem a Absalom taoore, b sõng-m lame." 
1Kings2:8 Ade, a Gera biig, a Simeyi, Bẽnzame Bawurim daoã, n be fo sɛɛgẽ. Yẽ tʋʋ maam tʋ yoodo, m sẽn dɩk Maanayim sor daare. A lɛɛg n seg-m lame, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, tɩ m wẽen ne Soaala tɩ m sʋʋg kõn sɩɩs-a ye." 
1Kings2:9 Marsã f kõn bas-a n pa sɩbg-a ye, la f mi f sẽn na n sɩlem sɩlem ninga t'a sig bʋg-tẽng ne zoob peendo.»" 
1Kings2:10 A Daviid gãanda ne a saam-dãmba la b mum-a-la a Na-tẽngẽ. 
1Kings2:11 A Daviid dɩɩ naam Israyɛl, yʋʋm pis-naase: Ebrõ yɩɩ yʋʋm a yopoe, Zerizalɛɛm yɩɩ pis-tã la a tã." 
1Kings2:12 A Salomo dʋ-la a ba zaoorẽ, la a naam paama pãnga." 
1Kings2:13 A Agit biiga, a Adoniyas, kẽnga a Batseba, a Salomo ma nengẽ la a wõgemda a taoore. Paga sokame: «Yaa laafi tɩ f wat ka?» T'a leoke: «N-ye!»" 
1Kings2:14 A paasa woto: «M tara m koɛɛg ne foo.» Tɩ paga yeele: «Gome!» 
1Kings2:15 A Adoniyas yeel-a lame: «Fo miime tɩ naama ra tog n yɩɩ m dẽnda. A Israyɛl gilli me da tẽed-m la ne naama, la ade a yii mam nugẽ n lʋɩ m yao nugẽ, tɩ Wẽnd n kõ-a." 
1Kings2:16 Bũmb a ye marsã la m dat n kos-fo, da zãgs ye.» Paga yeel-a lame t'a gome." 
1Kings2:17 T'a yeel: «M kot-f lame tɩ f yeel dĩma, a Salomo, tɩ b kõn tõdg ye, yeel-ba tɩ b kõ-m Sunamitga, bi-pugla a Abisag tɩ m maan m paga.»" 
1Kings2:18 Paga leokame: «Yaa neere, m na gom dĩma f yelle.»" 
1Kings2:19 A Batseba kẽnga dĩm a Salomo nengẽ n tɩ gom a Adoniyas yelle. Dĩma yik n seg-a lame, n yaool n lɛɛg n zĩnd a zaoorẽ. B waa ne goeel dĩma ma yĩnga la a zĩnda a biiga rɩtgo." 
1Kings2:20 Ad-a sẽn yeele. «Yaa bũmb bilf bala la m tar n na n kos-fo, da zãgs ye.» Tɩ dĩma yeele: «Kos-ma tɩ m kõn tõdg ye.»" 
1Kings2:21 Tɩ paga yeele: «B tõe n dɩka Sunamitgã, bi-pugl a Abisag, n ko f kẽema Adoniyas t'a maan a pag bɩ?»" 
1Kings2:22 Dẽ la a Salomo leok a ma: «Yaa bõe la f kot a Adoniyas yĩnga Sunamitga, a Abisag? Bõe tɩ f pa kot naama a yĩnga? A Adoniyas ka mam kẽem La? Bõe tɩ naama pa na n deeg n kõ-yẽ, n kõ maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar, la tãnsoab a Zoab, a Seruya biiga?»" 
1Kings2:23 A Salomo wẽena woto: «Bɩ Wẽnd bãg-m wẽnga la b leb n bãg n paase, sã n ka kũum la Adoniyas bao n kõ a menga, n gom wa a sẽn goma." 
1Kings2:24 Ne Wẽnd ninga sẽn vɩ la sẽn zĩndga maam m ba a Daviid zaoorẽ dũnna, la sẽn kãab naam maam ne m yagense, m wẽen ne Wẽnde, t'a Adoniyas na n kii rũnda bala.»" 
1Kings2:25 Yaa a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, la dĩma yeel t'a tɩ kʋ-a. Yɩɩ woto la a Adoniyas maan yõore." 
1Kings2:26 Dĩma yeela maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar: «Kẽng Anatot, f buud tẽngẽ, tɩ f toga ne kũum, la ka rũnna la m na n kʋ-f ye tɩ pĩnda f paam n tʋka Soaala-Wẽnd zooda kasetã, m ba a Daviid wakato la m ba sẽn wʋm toog ningã fo me yãend-a lame.»" 
1Kings2:27 A Salomo yiisa a Abiyatar Soaala-Wẽnd maan-kʋʋdba sʋka. La woto b pidsa Wẽnd sẽn da kãab bũmb ninga a Eli, Silo." 
1Kings2:28 A Zoab wʋma kibarã; yẽ ra yi-la a Absalom poore n kẽe a Adoniyas; woto, a zoe n kẽe sɛka roogẽ, n bri maan-kugra yɩdba." 
1Kings2:29 B tɩ yeela dĩma a Salomo t'a Zoab kẽe sɛka roogẽ la a mobga maan-kugrã. A Salomo tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel-a: «Yaa bõe yĩnga la f zoe n tɩ mobg maan-kugrã?» T'a Zoab yeele: «M zoe yãmb rabeem n tɩ yõk Wẽnd sɛɛga.» A Salomo tʋma a Zoyada biig, a Benaya, t'a tɩ kʋ-a." 
1Kings2:30 A Benaya kẽnga sɛka roogẽ n yeel a Zoab: «Dĩma n kõt f noor, wa yi yɩnga.» A Zoab yeelame: «Ayo, yaa ka la m na n ki.» A Benaya tɩ wilgã dĩma: «A Zoab yeela woto, n le paas woto!»" 
1Kings2:31 Dĩma leok-a lame: «Maan wa a sẽn yeele: kʋ-a la f mum-a. Woto f na zãag ne maam la m ba-roogã a Zoab sẽn daag zɩɩm ninga zaalem-zaalma taale. 
1Kings2:32 Wẽnd kɩtame t'a zɩɩm lɛɛg n mad a zugu t'a wẽe neb a yi sẽn yɩɩd yẽnda ne sõmblem, la a kʋ-b-la ne sʋʋga tɩ dĩm a Daviid ka bãng tiir ye. Yaa a Nɛr biig a Abnɛr, a Israyɛl tãnsoaba, la a Yetɛr biig a Amasa, a Zɩɩda tãnsoaba." 
1Kings2:33 Bɩ bãmb b yiib zɩɩm lɛɛg n daag a Zoab ne a buud zugu, zamaan ne zamaana. La Wẽnd na kɩt t'a Daviid ne a buudu, a naama la a zaoorã paam laafi, Wẽnd maasmẽ, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa.»" 
1Kings2:34 A Zoyada biig a Benaya kẽngame, a wẽ a Zoab n kʋ la b mum-a-la a sẽn so vẽenem ninga pʋga, we-kɛɛnga." 
1Kings2:35 Dĩma ninga a zĩigẽ a Zoyada biig, a Benaya; yẽ n lebg a tãb-biisa tãnsoaba. Maan-kʋʋd a Abiyatar zĩigẽ, a ninga maan-kʋʋd a Sadok." 
1Kings2:36 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ b bool a Simeyi n yeel-a: «Me f zak Zerizalɛɛm la zĩnd be la ra le zãag ne-a, n kẽn goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
1Kings2:37 Daar ninga f sẽn na n dʋʋg Sedrõ bokã, bãng tɩ f na n kiime. La dẽ yaa foo n daag f meng zɩɩm.»" 
1Kings2:38 A Simeyi leoka dĩma: «Yaa neere, m na n maana wala m zu-soab, m dĩma, sẽn yeele.» A Simeyi paa Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Kings2:39 La sẽn maan yʋʋm a tã, a Simeyi yem-daad a yi n zoe n kẽng Gat dĩm a Maaka biig a Akis nengẽ. B waa n wilg-a lame t'a yemsa bee Gat." 
1Kings2:40 A Simeyi ninga a bõang gaare n ta Gat, a Akis nengẽ, n tɩ reega a yemse, n lɛɛg n wa." 
1Kings2:41 B wilga a Salomo t'a Simeyi yi Zerizalɛɛm n kẽng Gat la a lɛɛg n waame. 
1Kings2:42 Dĩma bool-a lame n yeel-a: «M da ka kɩt tɩ f wẽen ne Wẽnd, la m da ka wilg f vẽenega tɩ f sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa, tɩɩm ka ye, f na ki? Fo yeelame: ‹M sẽn wʋm bũmb ninga yaa sõmbo.›" 
1Kings2:43 Bõe tɩ fo wẽen ne Wẽnd n pa yals f wẽenega zugu, la f reeg m sẽn da kõ f noor ningã?»" 
1Kings2:44 Dĩma paasame: «F tẽra wẽng ning fãa f sẽn maan ne m ba, a Daviid. Ad yaa rẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd kɩt tɩ f wẽnema lɛɛg n dɩt-fo," 
1Kings2:45 la Soaala yaool n na n sõnga a Salomo tɩ dĩm a Daviid zaoora da luk a zĩigẽ badaar a ye.» 
1Kings2:46 Dĩma kõ-la a Zoyada biig a Benaya noor t'a kʋ-a. A yii ne-a, yɩnga, n wẽ-a n kʋ. Naama pãng paasa a Salomo nugẽ." 
1Kings3:1 A Salomo waa n lebga Ezipt naab rɛɛmba. A kẽe kãadem ne Ezipt dĩma bi-pugla, n tall-a n wa a Daviid na-tẽngẽ, n gũud a sẽn na n wa me na-yirã, n gũud wẽnd doogã la Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã sã n me n baase." 
1Kings3:2 Maanda ra ket n kʋʋda yaare, tɩ b ra nan ka me roog Soaala-Wẽnd yĩng ye." 
1Kings3:3 A Salomo yam kẽe Naaba-Wẽnde. La woto a vɩɩnda wala a ba, a Daviid. Sã n ya ne maandã la wisdã, rẽ fãa ra ket n maanda kunkuba la tãmsa zutu la tɩɩsa sẽn gũmẽ." 
1Kings3:4 Dĩma kẽnga Gabaõ n na n tɩ kʋ maando tɩ be la tãmsa ra lug n yɩɩda. A Salomo sẽn kʋ maand be taa tusri. 
1Kings3:5 Gabaõ tẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Salomo yʋngo, a zãmsdẽ, n yeel-a: «Wilg-ma! Bõe la m tõe n kõ-fo?»" 
1Kings3:6 T'a Salomo leoke: «Yãmb maana neer wʋsgo ne m ba, a Daviid. Yẽ me modgame n kẽn yãmb taoore, ne pʋ-peelem, ne zemsgo, ne sũ-tɩrga. Yãmb nonglem ka zãag ne-a ye, la y sõngame t'a biig a ye dʋ a naam zaoore." 
1Kings3:7 N-ye! Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb n kɩt tɩ m lebg dĩma n led m ba. La ade, mam ket n yaa yãaga, n ka mi naam dɩɩb ye." 
1Kings3:8 Yãmb yamba bee y buuda sʋka, la yaa buud sẽn labsa, al tɩ b pa tõe n sõd n bãng a sõor ye." 
1Kings3:9 Y tog n kõ-la y yamba yamvẽenem la sũ-tɩrga t'a bãng neer la wẽnga, n bake, tɩ buuda tõog n zã, tɩ buuda yaa bu-yalengo t'a zãab ya toogo.»" 
1Kings3:10 A Salomo pʋʋsg kãnga taa Soaala-Wẽnd yam. 
1Kings3:11 Woto b yeel-a lame: «Fo sẽn kos woto wã, n ka kos yõ-woko, n ka kos arzɛka, n ka kos bɛɛba wãabo, f sẽn kos yamvẽenem la yẽesem," 
1Kings3:12 m kõt-f-la f sẽn kose: yamvẽenem, la yẽesem, wa ned ba a ye sẽn zɩ n paam, sẽn deng b fooma bɩ sẽn na n yaool n wa-b fo poorẽ." 
1Kings3:13 La f sẽn pa kos bũmb ninga, m kõt-f la rẽ fãa: arzɛka la ziiri, f vɩɩma tõre, la dĩm ba a ye sẽn na n wẽneg foo kõn zĩnd ye." 
1Kings3:14 La f sã n dɩk sor ning m sẽn wilg-fã, n deeg m noore la m sẽn yalsa fãa wala f ba a Daviid, m na kõ-f yõ-woko.»" 
1Kings3:15 A Salomo nekame la a tẽega a sẽn zãmse. A leba Zerizalɛɛm, a tɩ yalsa zooda kaset taoore, a kʋʋ yũ-noog maando la laafi kosg maand, la a boola a poorẽ dãmba fãa tɩ b wa rɩ kibsa." 
1Kings3:16 Pʋg-yoaadb a yi n waa n tɩ yãend dĩma. 
1Kings3:17 Paga a ye yeelame: «Ade, m zu-soaba, maam ne pʋg kãnga da bee roog a ye; m doga m biiga, rẽ t'a bee ne maam." 
1Kings3:18 La mam sẽn doge tɩ maan da-yɩten-daare, yẽ me rogame. D da bee ne taaba, ned da ka paas tõnd ye, tõnd d yiib bala n da be roogẽ wã." 
1Kings3:19 Yʋng a ye, pʋg kãnga biiga kiime, a gãandame n bʋʋg-a." 
1Kings3:20 A yika ne yʋngã n dɩk m biiga m sɛɛgẽ, dẽ tɩ m ra gõe. Mam biiga la a rɩk n ning a yãoogẽ n yaool n lebs maam a bi-kɩɩngã." 
1Kings3:21 M sẽn yik tɩ m na n yẽsem m biiga, m mikame t'a kiime. Beoog sẽn vẽeg tɩ m maneg n gese, m yãeeme tɩ ka biig ning m sẽn doga ye.»" 
1Kings3:22 Dẽ la pag a to wã yeel yã: «Pa sɩd ye! Bi-vɩɩga la mam biiga, bi-kɩɩnga la fo rẽnna.» Tɩ pag a to wã leoke: «Ka sɩd koe! Bi-kɩɩnga la fo biiga, bi-vɩɩga la mam biiga!» La b kaooga zabr ne taab dĩma taoore." 
1Kings3:23 Dĩma yeelame: «Yãoo yetame: ‹Mam biiga n vɩ wã, fo biigã n ki.› Tɩ yãoo yetẽ: ‹Pa sɩd ye, fo biig la bi-kɩɩngã, mam biig la vɩɩgã!› »" 
1Kings3:24 Dĩma yeelame: «Wa-y ne sʋʋga!» La b talla sʋʋg n wa dĩma taoore," 
1Kings3:25 t'a paase: «Pasg-y bi-vɩɩgã n dɩk bogra a ye n kõ pag a ye, n dɩk bogr a to n kõ pag a to wã me.»" 
1Kings3:26 Pag a ye la bi-vɩɩga weoog yõk yã t'a yeel dĩma: «Wẽnd na kõ y yõore, la y ra kʋ biiga ye, dɩk-y biigã n kɩs pag a to wã.» Pag a to wã yẽ da gomda woto: «B paasge, woto mam kõn soog-a, la fo me kõn soog-a ye.»" 
1Kings3:27 Dĩma yeelame: «Da kʋ-y biiga ye, kɩs-y biigã pipi pagã, yaa yẽ la biiga ma.»" 
1Kings3:28 A Israyɛl tõr wʋma dĩma sẽn kao bʋʋda to-to la b waooga dĩma. B yãeeme tɩ yaa yĩngr yam la a paam yã n kaood bʋʋdo. 
1Kings4:1 A Salomo dɩɩ naam Israyɛl tõre, Israyɛl ne Zɩɩda." 
1Kings4:2 Ad-a rĩunga taoor dãmba, a kug-zĩidba: A Azariyas, maan-kʋʋda la a Sadok biiga;" 
1Kings4:3 a Elirɛf la a Ayiya, sɛb-gʋlsdba a Sisa kamba a Zozafat, koe-moanda la a Ayilud biiga;" 
1Kings4:4 a Benaya, tãnsoaba, a Zoyada biiga; a Sadok ne a Abiyatar, maan-kʋʋdba;" 
1Kings4:5 a Aziya, kombɛɛmba taoor soaba la a Natã biiga; a Zabud, maan-kʋʋd la dĩma sagenda, a Natã biiga;" 
1Kings4:6 a Ayisar, sɩmand naaba; a Adoniram, zaka tʋʋm pʋɩta, a Abda biiga." 
1Kings4:7 Kombɛɛmb piig la a yi la a Salomo zĩndig Israyɛl tõre. Bãmb da wata ne dĩma la a zaka rãmb sẽn da tar bũmb ninga tʋʋmde. B ra geta rĩma yell yʋʋmda pʋgẽ, ned kam fãa ne a kiuugu." 
1Kings4:8 Ad-b yʋya: A Ur biiga, Efrayim tãmsa zut rãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:9 a Dekɛr biiga, Makas, Saalbim, Bɛt-Semɛs la Elõ-Bɛt-Ana rãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:10 a Arubot, a Esɛd biiga, Soko la Efɛr dãmb yĩnga," 
1Kings4:11 a Abinadab biiga, Dor tãmsa rãmb fãa yĩnga; yẽ ra yii kãadem ne a Tafat, a Salomo bi-pugla;" 
1Kings4:12 a Baana, a Ayilud biiga, Taanak, Megido la Bɛt-Seã rãmb yĩnga. Bɛt Seã tɩ yega Sartã, Zizreyɛl tẽngre, al Abɛl-Meola n ta Yokneam." 
1Kings4:13 Galaad Ramot tẽng rao a Gebɛr biiga, a Manase biiga a Yayir pʋ-weesẽ dãmb yĩnga, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ, n paas Argob rãmb yĩnga, Bazã tãmsa zutu; tẽn-bɛd pisoobe sẽn me lals n gũbg la sẽn tar kʋɩlens sẽn sogd ne zũud la bãeense." 
1Kings4:14 A Ayinadab, a Ido biiga, Maanayim rãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:15 A Ayimaas, Neftali rãmb yĩnga (yẽ me yii kãadem ne a Salomo bi-pugla, a Basmat)." 
1Kings4:16 A Baana, a Usayi biiga, Asɛr la Bealot rãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:17 a Zozafat, a Paruwa biiga, Isakar dãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:18 a Simeyi, a Ela biiga, a Bẽnzame rãmb yĩnga;" 
1Kings4:19 a Gebɛr, a Uri biiga, Galaad rãmb yĩnga, Amoritsa dĩm a Siõ soolma yĩnga, la Bazã dĩm a Og soolma yĩnga. Ned a to n le wa paas bãmb piig la a yiibã, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelma yĩnga." 
1Kings4:20 A Zɩɩda ne a Israyɛl neba da yaa ka tɛka wala mogr noorẽ bĩisri. B ra ka kongd sẽn na yũ la sẽn na n dɩ ye. Woto me b vɩɩma ra sakd-b lame. 
1Kings5:1 Sɩda, yaa dĩm dãmb wʋsg zugu la a Salomo da rɩt naam. A soolma yɛdga al Efrat kʋɩl kãsengã, n wat Filisti rãmb tẽnga, n tat Ezipt toaaga. Dĩm bãmb fãa da reegda a noore la b ra kɩta yõor yaoodo, n tãag a Salomo kaalem." 
1Kings5:2 Daar fãa ad-a Salomo sẽn da reegd a meng yĩng la sẽn vɩ-b ne yẽnda wã yĩnga: alkam pɛɛlg zom yaa bõeens pis-tã sẽn tõe n zɩlge. Alkam kɛgenga yaa bõeens pisoob sẽn tõe n zɩlge. 
1Kings5:3 N paas nag-wubds piiga, bãgr niis pisi, piis koabga, n le paas yãgse, walse, yĩsa, lad dãmb buudu sẽn tar kaam wʋsgo." 
1Kings5:4 A Salomo rĩunga ra yãagame n ta tẽns niyns sẽn be Efrat noorẽ, sẽn sɩng Tifsa n ta Gaza. Laafi da bee yẽ ne a yags sʋka." 
1Kings5:5 Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl neba vɩɩnda ne laafi, b bugsuntund la b kankams tẽngre, al Dã n ta Beerseba, a Salomo vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Kings5:6 A Salomo ra tara wiidi tus piig la a yiibu. Rota sẽn da me wiidi wã yĩnga da tõe n deega bãmb tus pis-naase; yaa wiidi sẽn tõe n vu bilim-bilm. 
1Kings5:7 Kombɛɛmba ra wat n kõta a Salomo, ned kam fãa ne a kiuugu, a meng la a zaka rãmb rɩɩbo. A ra ka basd tɩ bũmb paoog ned ba a ye." 
1Kings5:8 Sã n ya alkam kɛgenga la yamdã, rũmsa yĩnga, b ra tar-b lame n wat a Salomo sẽn be zĩig ninga, la wala a sẽn kõ noor ninga." 
1Kings5:9 Soaala kõ-la a Salomo bãngr la sɩlem yam. A Salomo yama sẽn da vɛɛsd n na n bãng bũmb niynsa sõor zema bĩisri sẽn sam mogr noore. 
1Kings5:10 A Salomo bãngr yɩɩga Yaang rãmba fãa rẽnna, a yɩɩga Ezipt rãmb fãa rẽnna." 
1Kings5:11 Ned ba a ye ka paam yamzulung wala a Salomo rẽnna ye. A yamvẽenem yɩɩga Ezrayitga a Etã rẽnna, n yɩɩg a Ema, a Kalkol la a Darda, a Maol kamba. A yʋʋra taa tẽnsa fãa sẽn gũbgã." 
1Kings5:11 Ned ba a ye ka paam yamzulung wala a Salomo rẽnna ye. A yamvẽenem yɩɩga Ezrayitga a Etã rẽnna, n yɩɩg a Ema, a Kalkol la a Darda, a Maol kamba. A yʋʋra taa tẽnsa fãa sẽn gũbgã." 
1Kings5:12 A yiisa yelbũn tus a tã, la a yɩɩla yɩɩ tusri." 
1Kings5:13 A goma tɩɩs yelle; a goma tɩ-bɛd sẽn be Libã yelle, wala a sẽn gom tɩ-bõones sẽn lolemd lalse yelle. A goma rũms yelle, luiili yelle, wiis la kʋɩl-zẽed yelle." 
1Kings5:14 Neba yii zĩig zãnga. B dĩm dãmb n tʋm-b tɩ b wa kelg la b rɩ a Salomo bãngra kaseto, tɩ b ra wʋmame tɩ b kilsd-a zĩig zãnga." 
1Kings5:15 Tir dĩma, a Iram tʋma a sõgen-kamb a Salomo nengẽ a sẽn wʋm t'a lebga dĩma, a ba zĩigẽ. A Iram ne a Daviid da pĩnd n yaa zoodo." 
1Kings5:16 A Salomo taasa a Iram koe-kãnga: 
1Kings5:17 «Y paam n bãnga neere tɩ m ba, a Daviid, ka tõog n me roogo Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩng ye. A zaba ne a bɛɛba, goabg la rɩtgo, n tãag Wẽnd sẽn na n kɩt t'a maan raood n tõog a bɛɛbã." 
1Kings5:18 Marsã, Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-m-la laafi, goabg la rɩtgo, tɩ zabr bɩ zabr bʋʋr ka le be maam ne m yak ba a ye sʋk ye." 
1Kings5:19 Woto wã m tagsa m na me roogo Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga, wala b meng sẽn wilg m ba, a Daviid, n yeel-a: ‹Yaa fo biiga la m na zaoolg f zaoora zugu la yẽ n na n me roog m waoogr yĩnga.›" 
1Kings5:20 Dẽ yĩnga, kɩt tɩ b kɛ Libã ra-sĩdma. M neba na n naaga fo neba. M na yao f neba sẽn tʋmd m yĩnga wala d sẽn na n sed ne taabã. Tõnd ka tar neb sẽn mi raad kɛɛbo wala Sidõ rãmb ye!»" 
1Kings5:21 A Salomo koɛɛga sẽn ta a Iram, a sũur yɩɩ noog wʋsgo, t'a yeele: «Naaba-Wẽnd paam pẽgr dũnna b sẽn kõ a Daviid bi-sõngo t'a soog a bu-yalengã.»" 
1Kings5:22 A Iram gʋlsa woto: «M wʋma y sẽn yeelã. M na pids y raabo ne ra-sĩdma, wala y sẽn date." 
1Kings5:23 M neba na n tall-b lame n sig mogrã, n yi be n wa ne b zĩig ning y sẽn na n wilgi. M na lood-b be n kõ yã. Mam sẽn dat wa m dolbo, yaa y sõng-m ne koodo, m zak yĩnga.»" 
1Kings5:24 Woto a Iram kõ-la a Salomo ra-sĩdma wala a sẽn dat tɛka. 
1Kings5:25 A Salomo toola a Iram alkam; yaa bõeens tus pisi n zɩlg alkama n kẽng, yẽ ne a neba yĩnga, n paas oliv ka-yɩlgemde bõeens pisi sẽn tõe n zɩ. A Salomo ra kɩt-b la boto yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa." 
1Kings5:26 Wẽnd kõ-la a Salomo yamvẽenem wala b sẽn da kãab-a. A Salomo ne a Iram kell n wʋma taab moore, n yẽs n zems taaba." 
1Kings5:27 A Salomo rɩka tʋʋm-tʋmdba. Israyɛl tõre, yaa neb tus pis-tã la a modg n kẽes-b tʋʋmna." 
1Kings5:28 A tʋm-b-la Libã. Kiuug fãa yaa neb tus piiga. B maanda kiuug a ye Libã, n maan kiis a yiib b tẽngẽ. A Adoniram n da ya tʋʋma taoor soaba." 
1Kings5:29 A Salomo da tara kug-zɩtb tus-pisopoe la kug-peesdb tus pis-nii, tãnga zugu." 
1Kings5:30 Tog n naagame n sõd kãsem-pʋgdsã, kombɛɛmba sẽn lʋɩɩs neba taoore b sõngr yĩnga, bãmb tus a tã la kobs-tã." 
1Kings5:31 Dĩma yeelame tɩ b vigs kug-bɛda, kug-neeba, sẽn na n tʋɩɩs Wẽnd doogã. Yaa kug sẽn peese." 
1Kings5:32 A Salomo ne a Iram tʋʋm-tʋmdba la Gebal dãmba peesa kugã la b kɛ raadã n tall-ba n wa wẽnd doog meeb zĩigẽ. 
1Kings6:1 Yʋʋm kobs-naase la pis-nii Ezipt yiib poore, a Salomo sẽn waa n dɩt a yʋʋmd a naas soab naam, Israyɛl tẽnga, kiuug a yiib soaba, Ziv kiuugu, Wẽnd dooga meeb sɩngame." 
1Kings6:2 Ad-y roog ning a Salomo sẽn me Soaala-Wẽnd yĩngã woglem da yaa kãntɩɩs pisoobe, a yalma pisi, a zãndlema pis-tã." 
1Kings6:3 Zãong la a me taoore, zãonga woglem yaa wẽnd dooga yalem, la a menga yalem yaa kãntɩɩs piiga." 
1Kings6:4 A ninga wẽnd dooga vẽ-yalemse, n maneg kud-bõonese n pɩk-pɩk wa gãmbre." 
1Kings6:5 A mee n dɩdga wẽnd dooga lalse, n gilgi, a sɩngre n taa a sɛtmẽ, n ta sõmblem pid sõmblem doogã; a meeme n yegl yɛsa, dot sẽn dogl taaba a tãab-tãabo." 
1Kings6:6 Tẽngr dotã yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, rot niyns sẽn zao-b bãmba yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a yoobe, tɩ zugẽ dota ya kãntɩɩs a yopoe. Wẽnd dooga lalg sã n zẽkdẽ, a taglma ra woogdame. Rẽ me la rota sẽn doglem taaba yalem da ka a ye." 
1Kings6:7 Wẽnd dooga mee ne kug sẽn zoe n pees b zĩigẽ, woto wã meeba wakato b pa tol n wʋm zãar bɩ lar, bɩ kut bʋʋr ye." 
1Kings6:8 Sã n ya rot niyns sẽn me n yeglã, bãmb no-yɛnga ra bee wẽnd dooga yaang pẽkẽ. Dɩlla kẽeda pipi roogã tɩ yẽ pʋgẽ marsã la noor da bee n dʋʋd tẽnsʋk soabã, tɩ noor me le be be n dʋʋd a tãab soabã." 
1Kings6:9 A Salomo mee wẽnd doogã n sɛ, a paga a yĩngra ne ra-gils sẽn dɩgl n yegl taaba." 
1Kings6:10 Sã n ya rot niyns sẽn me n gilgã, roog fãa zãndlem da yaa kãntɩɩs a nu. Ra-sĩdma da roga lalsa zugu." 
1Kings6:11 Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg ta-la a Salomo, b yeelame:" 
1Kings6:12 «Roog ning f sẽn metã, ad-f sã kẽn wa m noora sẽn date, f sã n deeg m sẽn wilgi, f sã n tũ m sẽn zãms-fo, m na pids m sẽn kãab-f bũmb ninga, la m sẽn kãab f ba, a Daviid." 
1Kings6:13 M na waa n zĩnd m buud a Israyɛl sʋka, m kõn bas m buud a Israyɛl ye.»" 
1Kings6:14 A Salomo n sɩng wẽnd doogã la yẽ n baas-a. 
1Kings6:15 Pʋgẽ wã yaa ra-pegd sĩdma la b rɩk n ka n lud lalgã; sẽn sɩng tẽnga n tãag sugra ra-paadse, b kaa ra-pegdo. Rooga tẽngr gãnega tɩ-wogd ra-pegd sĩdma." 
1Kings6:16 Rooga yaangã, kãntɩɩs pisi wã fãa kaa ne ra-sĩdma, sẽn sɩng tẽngr n ta yĩngri. Be la b pasg ro-sõng mengã." 
1Kings6:17 Wẽnd dooga menga, ro-sõngã sẽn pasg a soab taoorã, ra yaa kãntɩɩs pis-naase." 
1Kings6:18 Ra-sĩdma la b ra ning a pʋgẽ. Raada ra maneg n peesame n gʋl kitrizĩgninsi ne puud sẽn weke. Ra-pegd n da lud kuga fãa. 
1Kings6:19 A Salomo manega Sõmblem pid sõmblem doogã, do-kãsenga pʋga n ning zood kaseta be." 
1Kings6:20 Sõmblem pid Sõmblem dooga woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi, a yalma me boto, a zãndlem me boto, a tablg-a-la ne sãnem. B da rɩgla a taoore maan-kugrã sẽn maneg n tablg ne ra-kegemse." 
1Kings6:21 Dooga pʋg zãng fãa ra yaa sãnem sẽn yɩlge. Do-sõnga noorẽ, b ninga sãnem yãndo. Rooga pʋg fãa ra bolga sãnem; maan-kugr ninga sẽn da na n kẽes a pʋgẽ wã tablga ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:22 Pʋs n yaa wẽnd dooga zãng zãnga la a pɛ ne sãnem. Maan-kugr ninga sẽn na n dɩgl kuga walsa sẽn be roog ninga noorã, yẽ me ra pɛɛ ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:23 Sõmblem dooga pʋga a ninga malɛgse, sẽn pees ne oliv raado. B zãndlema yaa kãntɩɩs piiga." 
1Kings6:24 Pɩgsr a ye woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, pɩgsr a to wã me boto, tɩ naag taaba n ya kãntɩɩs piiga." 
1Kings6:25 Malɛk a yiib soaba me pɩgsa yaa kãntɩɩs piiga. B yiiba fãa ra wẽnda taaba la b bedrema me taa taaba. 
1Kings6:26 Malɛk fãa zãndlem yaa kãntɩɩs piiga. 
1Kings6:27 Malɛgs a yiiba da rɩgla Sõmblem dooga tẽnsʋka. B ra yɛdga b pɩgsã. Malɛk a ye pɩgsa ra sɩɩsda kɩreng a ye lalgã t'a to wã rẽnd sɩɩsd lalg a to wã. B pɩgs a taaba ra tẽegame n sɩɩsd taab sʋka. 
1Kings6:28 B manega malɛgsã n bolg ne sãnem. 
1Kings6:29 Rooga lals fãa, pʋgẽ la yɩnga, gʋla malɛgs nense n gilg, n paas komse la tɩɩs vãado la puud sẽn weke." 
1Kings6:30 Wẽnd dooga tẽngr gãnega ne ra-pegdo la fãa bolga ne sãnem, pʋgẽ doogã wala yɩng soabã." 
1Kings6:31 Sõmblem dooga kʋɩlengã maana ne oliviye raoogo. Kʋɩlenga boka a sʋka, n pakd goabg la rɩtgo. Ra-luga la yĩngr rigno-koaka ra ninga maaba a nu." 
1Kings6:32 Kʋɩlensa sẽn lakd goabg la rɩtgã la sẽn pees ne oliviye raoogã, ra gʋla malɛgs nense, tɩɩs vãado la puud sẽn weke la b bolg-b la ne sãnem; b bolga malɛgsa la tɩɩsa vãada me ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:33 Yaa boto me la b maan ne maan-kugra rooga kʋɩlense. Kʋɩlensa ra-luga la yĩngr rigno-koaka ra yaa oliviye raoogo la b ra ninga maaba a naase. 
1Kings6:34 Kʋɩlens kãens raada ra ka pees ne oliviye raad ye, yaa tɩɩg a to. B ra zao sãnga a yiib sẽn maneg n dõog zutu, n pakd goabg la rɩtgo." 
1Kings6:35 B gʋla bãmb me zugu malɛgs nense, tɩɩs vãado, la puud sẽn weke, la sẽn bolg ne sãnem." 
1Kings6:36 Pʋgẽ zaka lals mee ne kug sẽn dogl taab naoor a tã n baas ne ra-pegd tagdo. 
1Kings6:37 Yaa a naama yʋʋmd a naas soaba, Ziv kiuugu, la a Salomo sɩng wẽnd doogã." 
1Kings6:38 Yaa a naama yʋʋmd piig la a ye soaba, Bul kiuugu, kiuug a nii soaba la a Salomo baas wẽnd doogã, wala a sẽn da tog n yɩ la b sẽn da rat t'a yɩ a soaba. Yaa yʋʋm a yopoe la a Salomo me roogã." 
1Kings7:1 Sã n yaa a meng roogã, yaa yʋʋm piig la a tãabo la a Salomo me-a." 
1Kings7:2 A mee roogo n pʋd-a tɩ Libã googo. Kãntɩɩs koabg la a woglem, a yalem yaa pis-nu, a zãndlem pis-tã. Rooga ra boondame tɩ Libã googo tɩ raado, ra-sĩdma wa kʋgse, n da tedg taab rũnus a naase, tɩ ra-gilsi ne ra-peg tagd palg b zutu." 
1Kings7:3 Dooga yĩngr da paga ne ra-sĩdma. Ra-kãens ra sẽba ne ra-paadsa pis-naas la a nu sẽn pɩkã, rũnug fãa bãmb piig la a nu n da zao ra-lug gils zutu." 
1Kings7:4 Vẽ wã ra tonga rũnug a tãabo. Rũnug fãa võor me ra tota a to. 
1Kings7:5 Kʋɩlensa ne b ra-lugsã ra yaa mags-magse la bãmb me ra tota taab zĩis a tãabo. 
1Kings7:6 A Salomo mee zãong ning sẽn boond tɩ ra gils zãongo. A woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu, a yalem kãntɩɩs pis-tã. A ra bee Libã googa taoore n tar bũmb sẽn kokd wĩndga." 
1Kings7:7 A Salomo mee zãong a to, zaoora yĩnga, n kaood bʋʋda be, tɩ b boond tɩ bʋʋd zãongo. A pʋga ra kaa ra-pegd sĩdma, a tẽngr n ta a yĩngri ra-paadsã." 
1Kings7:8 A mee a meng zaka kɩreng a to, zaoora zãong poorẽ, la meeba ra wẽnda taaba. A le mee roog a to sẽn wẽnd yẽnda, Ezipt dĩma bi-pugla yĩnga, t'a ra yii kãadem ne Ezipt dĩma bi-pugla." 
1Kings7:9 Ro-bãmb fãa ra mee ne ra-sĩdma sẽn pees n zems taaba, pʋgẽ la poore. Bãmb bal la b tall n me roogã, a tẽngre n ta a yĩngri." 
1Kings7:10 Kug niyns sẽn tʋɩ-b tẽngã ra yaa bɛda: kãntɩɩs piiga, bɩ kãntɩɩs a nii." 
1Kings7:11 B tʋɩɩsa rotã ne kug sẽn pees rẽnd yĩnga n paas ra-sĩdma. 
1Kings7:12 Zag-yalenga n da mee n gilg n sege ne kug peesem sẽn dogl taab rũnus a tãabo la sẽn baas ne ra-pegd-tagdo. Wẽnd dooga zaka la a zãonga me mee boto. 
1Kings7:13 A Salomo kosame n na dɩk a tʋʋmẽ wã Tir tẽng dao a Iram. 
1Kings7:14 A yaa Neftali pʋg-kõor a ye biiga. A ba wã da yaa Tir neda. A ra yaa yõaka. A ra miime la a ra tõeeme n tʋm neere zũud tʋʋmd fãa. A waa a Salomo nengẽ, la yẽ n tʋm zũuda tʋʋm fãa." 
1Kings7:15 Yẽ n dõog zũud ra-lug bɛd a yiibã. Ra-luk fãa woglem da yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nii, la gĩsg sẽn ta kãntɩɩs piig la a yi n da mobgd-a n sege. Ra-luk a to wã me ya boto." 
1Kings7:16 A baoo zũudu n dõog sẽn na n baas ra-luga zutã, la a ye fãa zãndlem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu." 
1Kings7:17 A maana fan-teed buud toor-toore ne zũudu, wa kut gãmbse, wa puud pãneng n kʋk a sẽn dõog n dogl ra-luga zutã, bãmb b yopoe. Zũud ra-luk fãa paama a rẽnna." 
1Kings7:18 A rõoga fan-teedo, n mams tɩ-biis wa pooloomse, n sog-b rũnus a yiibu n gilg bũmb ning sẽn na n dogl ra-luga zutã. Ra-luk fãa paama a rẽnna." 
1Kings7:19 Sã n ya zãongẽ ra-lug bɛdã, bũmb ning sẽn na n dogl b zutã zãndlem yaa kãntɩɩs a naase, la b ra wẽnda lɩɩn-puugu." 
1Kings7:20 Sẽn na n dogl ra-lug bɛda zuta tẽngre, gãmbsã la pooloomsa kobs-yi wã tẽngre, maabre n da tʋʋg n gilgi." 
1Kings7:21 Yaa wẽnd dooga zãonga taoore la b yals zũud ra-lugã. B yalsa rɩtg soabã n pʋd-a t'a Yakẽ, n yals goabg soabã n pʋd-a t'a Boaz: Wẽnd n wat ne keglem la Wẽnd la pãnga." 
1Kings7:22 Zũud ra-luga tʋʋmde, a Iram tõog n baas-a-la neere." 
1Kings7:23 A Iram maana ko-sĩnga. A rõog-a-la bedr-bedre ne zũudu; a maan-a-la gilga. A sɛɛga yaa kãntɩɩs piiga. A zãndlem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu. Gĩsg sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pis-tã n da tõe n mobg a lʋgrã n sege. 
1Kings7:24 Sĩnga noora tẽngre, n gilgi, b ningame n na n paas a neerem, bũmb wa pooloomse. Kãntɩɩg fãa yaa bãmb pisi. B ning-b-la rũnus a yiibu la b ra naagame n dõog ne ko-sĩngã rõog yɛnga." 
1Kings7:25 Sĩnga ra doga zũud niis piig la a yiib zugu. Lols a tãab neng teesa goabga; a tãab neng teesa nin-taoore, t'a tãab tees rɩtgo, t'a tãab tees yaanga. Sĩnga ra zao b zugu la b seesa ra teesa pʋgẽ." 
1Kings7:26 Sĩnga taglem yaa nug pʋg yalem la a noor da kõoga wa laag rẽnna, ne lɩɩns puudu. A ra tõe n deega ko-yʋy tus a yiibu." 
1Kings7:27 A Iram maana bilim-bilm bõonese ne zũudu. Bilim-bilm fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a naase, a yalem kãntɩɩs a naase, a zãndlem kãntɩɩs a tãabo." 
1Kings7:28 B ra kud-b-la woto: bilim-bilma yaaga ra wʋga ne zũud sẽn ya paklse n ka yalem ye la yɩɩ woto a tẽngr n wat a yĩngri, n maneg n sẽbg ne kud-tagd a naase." 
1Kings7:29 Bilim-bilma ra ninga fan-teedo: bõnyẽese, lolse, la malɛgse. Yĩngrã, bõnyẽesa la lolsa sẽn tek zĩig ningã, b tablga pãnega, tɩɩs vãad la puudu, tɩ b luundẽ." 
1Kings7:30 Zũud gʋl a naase n da be bilim-bilm fãa tẽngre. B paasa gʋla sẽn tuiid zĩig ninga pãnga la rẽ fãa naagame n dõog wakat yɛnga. Bãeens niyns Sẽn paasd pãnga ninga sĩnga tẽngre, n welg ne fan-teeda sẽn dõog n naagã." 
1Kings7:31 Bilim-bilma yĩngrã ra kɩbga no-gilga. Noora ra zẽka sẽn ta kãntɩɩga ne bãeensa sẽn pɩʋʋmd taab tẽngrã la ko-sĩng la b wat n sagl a pʋgẽ. Noora yalma yaa kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋk gĩsg n gilgda n sege. Sĩnga sẽn da sẽgdg zĩig ninga da ka le ya gilg a zugẽ wã ye, lebga maka, la b ra manegame n gʋl bõn-neeba tɩ sakd gesgo." 
1Kings7:32 Gʋl a naasa ra tuii kud taokã sẽn be tẽngrã. Gĩsg ning sẽn tõe n gilg gʋlã n sege tata kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka. 
1Kings7:33 Gʋla ra kuda wa bilim-bilm dẽnna. Kud-bɩlgemda sẽn zãad gʋlã, gʋla nao-beongã, gʋla tẽnsʋk bokã, a tẽnsʋk bãn-dibli wã, fãa ra naag n dõoga rõog yɛnga." 
1Kings7:34 Ko-sĩnga sẽn da zao bãeens a naas niyns sẽn pɩʋʋmd-b b taab tẽngrã ra naagame n dõog rõog yɛnga. 
1Kings7:35 Bilim-bilma yĩngrã, b ra gõda bãng sẽn ta kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka n maan gãtga. Gãtga maneg n soga ne tẽngr bãn-tagdã." 
1Kings7:36 Ko-sĩnga zugu, gãtsa la tẽngr bãeensa zugu, b ra kɩɩsa ne kɩtga, n gilgi, malɛgse, bõnyẽese, koms vãado; tɩɩs vãad ne puud pãnega la b rõog n gilgi." 
1Kings7:37 Yaa woto la a Iram kud bilim-bilm piigã. B fãa rõoga rõog yɛnga, b bedrema ra taa taaba, la b ra wẽnda taaba." 
1Kings7:38 A Iram maana zũud sĩms piiga. A ye fãa da reegda ko-yʋy pis-naase, a ye fãa da magda kãntɩɩs a naase. Bilim-bilm fãa da tara a ko-sĩnga." 
1Kings7:39 A yalsa bilim-bilm a nu wẽnd dooga goabga, n ning a nu rɩtgo. Sã n ya ne mogrã (ko-sĩng bedrã), yaa wẽnd dooga nug rɩtg la b yals yẽnda, n tees yaang bilfu." 
1Kings7:40 A Iram sẽn yõg yõg-laase, zɩ-mesdem laase la kardo, a baasa tʋʋmd ning fãa a Salomo sẽn da yet t'a tʋm a yĩng wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ. Ad teeda sõadga:" 
1Kings7:41 A yõga zũud-ra-lug bɛd a yiibã, n paas sẽn dog b zugẽ wã, gãms a yiibã sẽn mobg ra-lug bɛda zug sʋka," 
1Kings7:42 kitrizĩgnis kobs-naasã, sẽn da sog gãmsa, rũnus a yiibu, ra-luga sɛtmẽ." 
1Kings7:43 A yõga bilim-bilm piiga la sĩms piigã b sẽn da zɩtã," 
1Kings7:44 sĩn-kãseng a ye wã ne a lols piig la a yiibã; 
1Kings7:45 tompɛglma laase, zɩ-mesdma laase, kardã la ted a taaba sẽn kella fãa. A Iram sẽn maan bũmb ning a Salomo yĩng wẽnd dooga pʋga da yaa zũud sẽn maneg n duugi." 
1Kings7:46 Yaa Zʋrdẽ sɛɛgẽ la a rõog teedã, Sukot ne Sartã sʋka. Yagd da ka tuud n kong be sẽn na n maan teeda gãag-lung ye." 
1Kings7:47 Teeda fãa wala b zĩigẽ. Teeda ra labsame, b pa tõog n geelg zũudã b sẽn dɩk n tʋma zɩslem ye." 
1Kings7:48 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ b maan wẽnd dooga pʋg teeda fãa, sãnem maan-kugrã la te-roagendgã, Soaala-Wẽnd bura yĩnga. Yẽ me yaa sãnem." 
1Kings7:49 Fitils piig la b rõog ne sãnem; sõmblem dooga yĩnga, a nu rɩtgo, a nu goabga. Le paasa puudã, fitilsã, yɩʋʋda sẽn bolg sãnema," 
1Kings7:50 la-bõonesã, wõrsdsã, zɩ-mesdma laase, yõg laasã, wisda laase sẽn dõog ne sãnem menga, kut niyns sẽn be kʋɩlensa rĩirẽ, sõmblem dooga la maanda rooga rĩirẽ." 
1Kings7:51 Tʋʋm niyns fãa a Salomo sẽn kɩt tɩ b maan wẽnd dooga yĩnga sẽn waa n baase, a waa ne a ba, a Daviid, sẽn da kõ Soaala-Wẽnd teed niynsã: wanzurfã, sãnema, yõg-laasã, la a ning-b la wẽnd doogẽ, wa Soaala-Wẽnd arzɛka." 
1Kings8:1 A Salomo boola a sɛɛgẽ, Zerizalɛɛm, Israyɛl nin-kẽemsã, sagsa kãsem-dãmba, zagsa kãsem-dãmba tɩ b tɩ yiis kuga walsa koglg n wa ne-a Siõ, a Daviid na-tẽnga." 
1Kings8:2 Israyɛl nin-kẽemsa fãa tigma taab a Salomo zakẽ, Etanim kiuugu, kiuug a yopoe soaba, kibs raare." 
1Kings8:3 La Israyɛl nin-kẽemsa sẽn ta, maan-kʋʋdba tʋka kuga walsa koglgã." 
1Kings8:4 B tall-a lame n dʋʋs Siõ. Sɛka roogo, la te-sõma wã fãa sẽn da be a pʋgẽ wã me tall n waa Siõ. Tʋkdba yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdba ne b sõangdba." 
1Kings8:5 Dĩm a Salomo ne Israyɛl neba sẽn da tigim ne yẽnda, zood kaseta taoore, da tara maanda kʋʋbo, rũm bɛd la rũm bõonese la b sõora ka tõog n sõd lɛlɛ." 
1Kings8:6 Maan-kʋʋdba kẽesa koglga a zĩigẽ, sõmblem dooga pʋga, malɛgsa pɩgsa tẽngre." 
1Kings8:7 Malɛgsa ra tẽega b pɩgsa zĩig ning a sẽn da tog n diglẽ; malɛgsa ra yɛdga b pɩgsa wa maasem tɩɩga, koglga ne a ra-tuiidsa zugu." 
1Kings8:8 Raada ra wogmame. F sã n da be maanda kʋʋb roogẽ, f ra ne-b lame, f sã n yɛs zĩig ning sẽn be sõmblem dooga taoore. Ra ka tõe n zĩnd yɩng n yãend-b ye. B keta be ne rũnna." 
1Kings8:9 Bũmb da ka be koglga pʋga sã n ka kuga wals a yiibã. Yaa a Moyiiz n da sagl-b be, Orɛb tãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn waa n yõg zood ne Israyɛl kamba, Ezipt yiiba wakato." 
1Kings8:10 Maan-kʋʋdba sẽn yi wẽnd dooga pʋg n sɛ, la sawadg sẽn waa n deeg zĩig n yãmbe." 
1Kings8:11 Maan-kʋʋdba ka le tõog n maan bũmb sawadga yĩnga, tɩ Wẽnd zɩɩra ra pida wẽnd doogã." 
1Kings8:12 T'a Salomo na n yeele: «Naaba-Wẽnd yeelame tɩ b rat n paa likẽ! 
1Kings8:13 Ne rẽ fãa, bãng-y tɩ yaa yãmb yĩng la m me ro-kãnga. Yaa na-yir la m me yã tɩ y zĩnd a pʋgẽ zamaan ne zamaana.»" 
1Kings8:14 A Salomo wẽnemdame n ning a Israyɛl zãma wã sẽn yɛs yĩngra barka. 
1Kings8:15 A yeelame: «A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama paam barka! Bãmb n yaag b noore n togs m ba, a Daviid, la bãmb nug tʋmame n pids kãabg kãnga:" 
1Kings8:16 ‹M sẽn yiis m buud a Israyɛl Ezipt tẽng tɛka, m pa bao tẽng a Israyɛl tẽnsa sʋka n na n maan m na-tẽng ye, m pa yet tɩ b me roog n kõ-m tɩ m deegd y waoogr a pʋgẽ ye. A Daviid bal la m yãk t'a ges m buud a Israyɛl yelle.›" 
1Kings8:17 M ba a Daviid da tʋlga ne a sũur fãa n me roogo Wẽnd yĩnga, Israyɛl Wẽnda yĩnga." 
1Kings8:18 La Soaala leok-a lame: ‹F sẽn tʋlg n na n me roog n kõ-ma, f maana neere." 
1Kings8:19 La ade, ka foom n na n me rooga ye, yaa f meng biig n na n me roogã n kõ-ma.›" 
1Kings8:20 Soaala pidsa b sẽn da kãabe. Woto m leda m ba, a Daviid, la m deega Israyɛl naam wala Soaala sẽn da kãabe la m mee roogo Wẽnd yĩnga, a Israyɛl Wẽnda waoogr yĩnga." 
1Kings8:21 M yãka zĩig n bĩng kuga walsa koglgo; yẽ yaa zood kaseto, zood ning b sẽn yõg ne y yaab rãmba, b sẽn wa n yi Ezipt tẽnga, kaseto.»" 
1Kings8:22 A Salomo yalsa Soaala maan-kugrã la zãma wã taoore, a zẽka a nus yĩngri," 
1Kings8:23 n yeele: «Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, yãmb pa tar to yĩngr bɩ tẽng zug ka ye. Yãmb pa basd y zood t'a sãam ye, yãmb yam pa yit y yemse sẽn kẽnd tɩrg y taoor ye." 
1Kings8:24 Yãmb pidsa y sẽn da kãab m ba, y yamba a Daviid. Y sẽn yiis y noorẽ, y nug pãng taas-a-la rũnna, wa d fãa sẽn ne wã." 
1Kings8:25 La marsã, Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, pids-y kãabg ning me y sẽn kãab m ba, a Daviid, tɩ yãmb n da yeel-a: ‹F kõn kong biig sẽn na n zĩnd m taoor a Israyɛl naama zaoor zugu, f kamba sã n gũusi n kẽn tɩrga m taoore wa fo meng sẽn kẽne.›" 
1Kings8:26 Dɩlla, Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ y sẽn yeel m ba, a Daviid, pids zãnga." 
1Kings8:27 La m kotame n sok n gese Wẽnd sã n sɩd tõee n zĩnda ninsaalb sʋk tẽng zug ka? Yĩngr saasa meng yaool n ka tõe n deeg yãmb ye, m kõn gom do-kãnga m sẽn me y yĩnga ye." 
1Kings8:28 Kelg-y y yamba pʋʋsg neere, Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ rũnna y yamba wa-la y pʋʋsgo." 
1Kings8:29 Ypk-y y nin n ges ro-kãnga, wĩndg la yʋngo, n ges roog ning y sẽn yeele: ‹Ka n na n yɩ m pẽgr zĩiga!› Bɩ y kelg y yamba sẽn pʋʋsd yãmb a pʋgẽ." 
1Kings8:30 Kelg-y y yamba la y neba pʋʋsgo b sã n wa ka. Zĩnd-y y sẽn beẽ wã, zĩnd-y yĩngri n kelge la y maan sugri." 
1Kings8:31 Ned sã n beeg a to tɩ bʋʋda rãmb yet tɩ b wa wẽnd dooga pʋga la b kãab taab beed maan-kugra taoore," 
1Kings8:32 bɩ y zĩnd yĩngri n kelge. Kao-y y yemsa bʋʋdo, kɩt-y tɩ nin-wẽnga bãng t'a kongame n deeg a sɩbgre, tɩ nin-sõnga dɩ a pʋ-peelem yõodo." 
1Kings8:33 Y buud a Israyɛl sã n beeg yãmb n kong raood bɛɛba taoore, a sã n lɛɛg n wa n pẽg y yʋʋre, a sã n lɛɛg n wa yõk y sɛɛga wẽnd do-kãnga pʋga," 
1Kings8:34 zĩnd-y yĩngri n kelge, kõ-y buuda Israyɛl sugri n le tall-a n wa tẽng ning y sẽn kõ a yaab rãmba." 
1Kings8:35 Buuda sã n beeg yãmb tɩ saag pag n ka le niida, a sã n wa zĩ-kãnga n pʋʋs yã la a pẽg y yʋʋre, la a tuub a yel-wẽna, a sẽn deeg sɩbgre yĩnga," 
1Kings8:36 zĩnd y yĩngri n kelge, la y kõ y yambã la y buud a Israyɛl sugri, la y wilga so-sõng t'a rɩke, la y sik y saag tẽng ning y sẽn kõ y buuda tɩ yaa a pʋɩɩre." 
1Kings8:37 Kom la tẽn-kũum, wãoongo la gãnem sã n lʋɩ tẽnga, sʋʋr la kalwaare, sã n lʋɩ tẽngã, bɛɛb sã n wẽe a gũbri, bãag bɩ yell a to sã n pak-a," 
1Kings8:38 sẽn ya bũmb ning fãa yĩng la y buud a Israyɛl biig pʋʋsd la a yõkd y sɛɛga, a sã n wa bãng yell ning sẽn pak-a n tees do-kãnga n zẽk a nugu," 
1Kings8:39 bɩ yãmb zĩnd yĩngri, y sẽn be zĩig ningã, n kõ sugri, la y lebs ned kam fãa wala a manesem sẽn tog ne, tɩ yãmb mii sẽn be ninsaal sũurẽ." 
1Kings8:40 La woto, b na zoe y nifu, b vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ, b ba rãmb tẽngẽ." 
1Kings8:41 Ba sãan meng sẽn ka kĩ ne yãmb buuda Israyɛl, sã n yi tẽn-zãorgẽ n wa y waoogre," 
1Kings8:42 tɩ sẽn ya zĩig ning fãa b na wʋm tɩ b gomd y yelle, n gomd y kanga la y nuga pãnga yelle, a sã n kẽ ro-kãnga n pʋʋse," 
1Kings8:43 zĩnd-y yĩngri, y sẽn be zĩig ningã, n deeg sãana kosgo la woto tẽng zug rãmba fãa na bãng y yʋʋre la wala y buud a Israyɛl, b na zoe rabeem la b na bãng tɩ yaa m sẽn me roog ninga pʋga la b waoogd y yʋʋre." 
1Kings8:44 Y kamba sã n dabd zabre, la b rɩka sor ning yãmb sẽn wilg-bã, b sã n wẽnemd b neng n tees yãmb b Soaala, n tees tẽng ning y sẽn yãkã la roog ning m sẽn me y yʋʋra kilsga yĩngã," 
1Kings8:45 zĩnd-y yĩngr n kelg b pʋʋsgo la y reeg b kosgo tɩ ned da maan-b pãng ye. 
1Kings8:46 B sã n beeg yãmba, tɩ ned ka be n ka beegdẽ ye, y sũur sã n wa kãbd ne-ba, tɩ y bas-ba b bɛɛba nusẽ tɩ b tall-ba n loog pa-weere, tẽn-zãorgẽ bɩ tẽng sẽn pẽ," 
1Kings8:47 b sã n zĩnd be n kẽ b sũurẽ n tuubi la b pʋʋs yãmba b bɛɛba tẽngẽ, n yetẽ: ‹Tõnd beegame, tõnd mana wẽnga, d maana kegre,›" 
1Kings8:48 b sa n lɛɛg n wa kẽ yãmb ne b sũuri la b yam, b yembda tẽngẽ, b sã n wẽnemd b nense n tees tẽng ning y sẽn kãab b ba rãmba, n tees tẽng ning y sẽn yãke, n tees wẽnd doogã m sẽn me y waoogr yĩngã," 
1Kings8:49 zĩnd-y yĩngr, y sẽn be zĩig ningã n kelg b pʋʋsgo la b fĩinigu, tɩ ned da maan-b pãng ye." 
1Kings8:50 Kõ-y y kamba sugri, tɩ b beega yãmba, tɩ b zẽka b zug ne yãmba, kõ-y b bɛɛba sũ-maasem, tɩ b zoe b nimbãanega," 
1Kings8:51 tɩ b yaa y buudu, la y pʋɩɩre, bãmb la yãmb sẽn yiis Ezipt, tẽng ninga tʋʋlem sẽn tõe n yẽneg kutu." 
1Kings8:52 Ypk-y y nini n ges y yamba ne y buud, a Israyɛl sẽn pʋʋsde, yoog-y y tʋba n kelg b sẽn na n bool-y wakat ning fãa." 
1Kings8:53 Yãmb n welg-b toore tɩ b yɩ y pʋɩɩre, buud a taab sʋka, wala y sẽn togs ne y yamba, a Moyiiz, noore, y sẽn waa n yiis d ba rãmba Ezipt tẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnde!»" 
1Kings8:54 A Salomo sẽn gome la a taas Wẽnd a pʋʋsg n baase, a yika a sẽn da yĩg zĩig ningã, maan-kugra taoore, n tẽeg a nus yĩngri." 
1Kings8:55 A yalsa yĩngri, n ning a Israyɛl zãma wã barka ne koe-kãsenga:" 
1Kings8:56 «Soaala-Wẽnd paam barka, bãmb sẽn kõ b buud, a Israyɛl, laafi tẽnga wala b sẽn da kãab-a. Gom noodã b sẽn yiis ne a Moyiiz noora, ba a ye ka pa n ka pids ye." 
1Kings8:57 D Soaala-Wẽnnaama paa ne-do, wala b sẽn pa ne d ba rãmba, la b ra bas-do, b da bas-d kɛɛng ye." 
1Kings8:58 B wẽnemd d sũya n tees b menga, tɩ d tũ b sorã la d deeg b noorã, b saglsã b sẽn zãms d ba rãmba." 
1Kings8:59 Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ koees niyns fãa m sẽn taas Soaala pa b pʋtẽerẽ wĩndg la yʋngo, tɩ b zã maam b yamba la b buud, a Israyɛl, wala b sẽn tog ne, beoog fãa ne a noore." 
1Kings8:60 Woto dũni wã fãa na bãng tɩ Soaala bal la Wẽnde la a to ka be ye," 
1Kings8:61 la yãmb me na rɩk y sũur n kõ Wẽnnaam y Soaala la y reeg b noya la b sẽn yalse wala y sẽn maand rũnna.» 
1Kings8:62 A Salomo ne a Israyɛl kʋʋ maand Soaala taoore. 
1Kings8:63 A Salomo kʋʋ laafi kosg maando. Yɩɩ rũm bɛd tus pisi la a yi, rũm bõones tus koabg la pisi. Yɩɩ woto la a Salomo ne a Israyɛl maan Soaala-Wẽnd yi-kẽer kibsa." 
1Kings8:64 Badaare dĩma welga toore wẽnd dooga taoor zakã la yaa zag kãng sʋk la a kʋ yũ-noog maoongo la a kõ kũuna la laafi kosg maanda nem-kaama tɩ zũud maan-kugra ra paooda ne a reeg yũ-noog maoongã la kũuna n paas laafi kosga maand nem-kaam. 
1Kings8:65 Yɩɩ kiuug a yopoe soaba la a Salomo naag ne a Israyɛl zãng n maan kibsã. Yɩɩ zãma kãseng sẽn yi al Lebo-Amat la al Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛga. Dasem a yopoe sẽn pid zãnga, b paa Soaala taoore." 
1Kings8:66 Daar a nii soaba a Salomo sẽega nebã. Bãmb me pʋʋsa dĩma, la ned kam fãa leba a yiri. Yɩɩ kaasgo tɛka la b sũur yɩɩ noogo ne Wẽnd sẽn maan ne b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Daviid la buud a Israyɛl." 
1Kings9:1 A Salomo sẽn me wẽnd doogã, a zakã la a sẽn tʋlg fãa, n sɛ," 
1Kings9:2 Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Salomo, naoor a yiib soaba, wala b sẽn da lik-a Gabaõ tẽnga." 
1Kings9:3 Soaala yeel-a lame: «M wʋma f sẽn pʋʋs n kos-m bũmb ninga. F sẽn me roog ning n kõ-ma m deeg-a lame n dat n puk a pʋgẽ tɩ m be ne yãmb daar fãa. M nin la m sũur na n paa ne-a, wakat buud fãa, m sẽn nong yãmba yĩnga." 
1Kings9:4 Sã n ya foo, ad-f sã n kẽn wa f ba a Daviid, ne sũ-tɩrga, ne pʋ-peelem, n deeg m noya la m sẽn yals fãa," 
1Kings9:5 m na kɩt tɩ f rɩ naam a Israyɛl zugu, wala m sẽn kãab f ba, a Daviid, m sẽn waa n yeel-a: ‹F kõn tol n kong biig sẽn na n zaoond a Israyɛl naama zaoor ye.›" 
1Kings9:6 La yãmb bɩ y kamba sã n wa bas maam, y sã n ka reeg noya la saglsã m sẽn kõ yãmbã, y sã n tɩ pʋg wẽn-naandsã n waoog-ba," 
1Kings9:7 m na yiis a Israyɛl m sẽn tɩ kẽes-a tẽng ningã, m na yi n bas doog ning m sẽn kẽes m mengã, la a Israyɛl na lebg a bɛɛb yelbũndi la b laado dũni wã fãa pʋgẽ." 
1Kings9:8 Ned ning fãa sẽn na n kolg rooga sẽn me woto wã na n yɛɛsame la a na n yeelame: ‹Ya bõe yĩng la Soaala-Wẽnd maan woto ne b tẽnga la b roogã?› 
1Kings9:9 La b na n leokame: ‹Yaa b sẽn bas Wẽnnaam, b Soaala, sẽn yiis b ba rãmba Ezipt tẽnga, n yaool n tɩ kẽ wẽn-naandse, n pʋg-ba la b waoog-ba; yaa rẽ yĩng la Soaala tool-b yel-beed kãensã.› »" 
1Kings9:10 Yaa yʋʋm pisi pʋgẽ la a Salomo me wẽnd doogã ne a meng yiri. 
1Kings9:11 A Iram, Tir naabã, sẽn da wa ne ra-sĩdma, n wa ne sãnem, wala a sẽn dat tɛka, kosa a Salomo t'a kõ-a tẽns pisi Galile tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Kings9:12 A Iram yii Tir n wa n na n kaag tẽns niyns a Salomo sẽn kõ-a wã la b pa ta a yam ye. 
1Kings9:13 A yeelame: «Yaa bõe tẽn yood la f sẽn kõ maama, m saam-biiga?» Yaa rẽ yĩng la, ba ne rũnna, b boonda tẽn kãense tɩ Kabul tẽnse, zĩ yood tẽnse." 
1Kings9:14 A Iram kõo dĩma Salomo sãnem gil sẽn ta neb koabg la pisopoe la a nu zɩɩbo. 
1Kings9:15 Ad-a Salomo sẽn maan bũmb ning n paam tʋʋm-tʋmdba n tõog n me wẽnd doogã, a meng yiri, Milo, Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã, Asor, Megido, la Gezɛr." 
1Kings9:16 Sã n ya Gezɛr, ad-y yaa Ezipt naab n waa n zab n deeg Gezɛr, n yõog a bugum, n kʋ Kanaã rãmba sẽn da be a pʋgẽ, n dɩka n kõ a bi-pugl a sẽn yiis kãadem ne a Salomo menga." 
1Kings9:17 Yaa rẽ la a Salomo maneg n me Gezɛr la Bɛt-Orõ sẽn be bãoog noore. 
1Kings9:18 N paas Baalat, la Tamar sẽn be Zɩɩda we-raoogẽ." 
1Kings9:19 A Salomo le mee tẽns kẽere, teed bĩngr yĩnga, n paas tãb-biisi, bilim-bilm, la wed-dʋʋdba yĩnga. A saa n mee meeb a taab wala a sẽn dat Zerizalɛɛm, Libã la a sẽn da so tẽns niynsa pʋgẽ." 
1Kings9:20 Ad-y yaa neb sẽn pa kĩ ne a Israyɛl la sẽn da kell n pa ne bãmba, wa Amonitsã, Ititsã, Perizitsã, Ivitsã la Zebuze rãmba," 
1Kings9:21 ad-y yaa bãmb yagense sẽn dog bãmb poorẽ t'a Israyɛl bas n pa kʋ wã, yaa bãmb la a Salomo wʋk n kẽes a tʋʋma. La ket n yaa boto ne rũnna." 
1Kings9:22 A ka kẽes Israyɛl kamba tʋʋmd ye. Bãmb n da ya tãb-biisã, a sõgen-kamba, a kug-zĩidba, a wed-kɩɩm dãmba, a bilim-bilma la a wed-dʋʋdba nanamse." 
1Kings9:23 Sẽn da get-ba a Salomo tʋʋma da taa kobs-nu la pis-nu. 
1Kings9:24 Yaa Ezipt dĩma bi-puglã sẽn yi Siõ na-zakã n wa kẽ ro-paalã a Salomo sẽn me a yĩnga poore, la b yaool n pids bok ning sẽn da be wẽnd dooga la a Daviid zaka sʋka, Milo bokã." 
1Kings9:25 Yʋʋmd pʋgẽ yaa naoor a tã la a Salomo ra wat ne maand Soaala maan-kugra zugu, yaa yũ-nood maando la lagm-n-dɩ maando. B ra yõogda wisdu me maan-kugra zugu. Woto me la Soaala-Wẽnd daab ne b rooga pids yã." 
1Kings9:26 Dĩma a Salomo da tara koom-kogend Esiõ-Gebɛr, sẽn pẽ ne Eyilat, Rudum mogra noore, Edom tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Kings9:27 A Iram sakame, n kõ a Salomo neb sẽn mi koom-kogend zãabo la sẽn mi mogra menga. B naaga a Salomo nebã." 
1Kings9:28 B kẽn n taa Ofir la b waa n kõ-la a Salomo sãnem gil bɛd kobs-naas la pisi. 
1Kings10:1 Saba dĩm-poaka waa n wʋmame tɩ b gomd a Salomo yelle t'a yʋʋra ra yii wʋsgo. Woto a waame n na pẽrs a Salomo ne yelbũna n bãng a bãngra zulum tɛka. 
1Kings10:2 A waa Zerizalɛɛm ne neb ka tɛka la yʋgma sẽn zɩlg kaam sẽn tar yũ-noodo, sãnem zembala, kug neeba. A sẽn taa a Salomo taoore, a wilg-a-la a sũura sẽn da gãd bũmb ninga." 
1Kings10:3 Tao-tao bala a Salomo leoka a sogsga fãa. La bõn-toog ka zĩnd sʋk t'a wilgr nams dĩma ye. 
1Kings10:4 Saba dĩm-poaka sẽn dɩ a Salomo bãngra kaseto, a sẽn yãend na-yira sẽn me to-to," 
1Kings10:5 dĩma sẽn dɩt bũmb ningã, a sõgen-kamba roto, b sẽn deegd sãan to-to, b sẽn yer fut niynsi, rãama rãmb sẽn da pʋdgd b rãama to-to, yũ-nood maanda sẽn da kʋʋd Soaala roogẽ wã, a vʋʋsma tulgame." 
1Kings10:6 A tol n leoka dĩma: «M sẽn zĩnd m tẽngẽ wã n wʋm tɩ b gomd y gom-minim la y bãngra yelle yaa sɩd menga! 
1Kings10:7 M pa sak n deeg b sẽn togsã tɩ m pa reng n wa la m yãend fãa ne m nin ye. M neeme tɩ b sẽn togsã ka ta pʋɩ-sʋk meng ye. Y bãngrã la y arzɛka yɩɩda m sẽn wʋma. 
1Kings10:8 Zu-noog pagba la yãmb pagbã, zu-noog rãmb la y sõgen-kamba, sẽn zĩ-b yãmb taoor wakat fãa n kelgd y bãngra koɛɛga." 
1Kings10:9 Wẽnnaam y Soaala paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn tʋlg n zaoolg-y Israyɛl naama zaoor zugu. Yaa b sẽn nong a Israyɛl ne nonglem sẽn ka viigdã la b kõ yãmb naam, tɩ bũmb na n kell n pa a soaal nugẽ, tɩ sẽn tara bʋʋm na n kell n pa ne a bʋʋm.»" 
1Kings10:10 Saba dĩm-poaka kõo dĩma sãnem gil koabg la pisi, yũ-nood kaam sẽn ka paoode, la kug neeba sẽn yãngd faongo. Saba dĩm-poaka sẽn wa ne yũ-nood kaam niynsã, a Salomo pa le paam sẽn ta rẽnda bada." 
1Kings10:11 A Iram koom-kogenda sẽn wa ne Ofir sãnema, waa ne ra neeb ka tɛka la kug neeb me." 
1Kings10:12 Ne ra-neebã a Salomo kitame tɩ b pees-ba n ning wẽnd doogã la a menga roogo, rellgo bɩ tikr yĩnga. B rɩk-b lame me n pees bɛɛla la kola, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba yĩnga. Raad a woto ka le wa la b ka le yãend b buud n ta rũnna." 
1Kings10:13 Dĩma kõo Saba dĩm-poaka a sẽn tʋlg bũmb ning fãa n paas kũun a taaba wala yẽnda, a Salomo, bala a ye sẽn tõe n yãe n kõ neda. Dĩm-poaka ne a sõgen-kamba leba b tẽngẽ." 
1Kings10:14 Yʋʋmd a ye pʋgẽ a Salomo ra tõe n paama sãnem gil sẽn ta neb tusr zɩɩbo. 
1Kings10:15 La b pa sõt b sẽn da yãgsd lɛɛbdba nengẽ la koasdba nengẽ, b pa sõt tẽn-zẽnsa nanamsa sẽn da yaoodã, b pa sõt kombɛɛmba sẽn da saad n deesd tẽnga kamba nengẽ ye." 
1Kings10:16 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ b kud gãndo, gãnd bɛd, bãmb kobs-yi, gãnd sẽn kud ne sãnem, tɩ gãong a ye fãa sãnema sẽn dɩk n bolg-a wã zɩslem taa koom yubl zɩslem." 
1Kings10:17 A kuda gãnd bõonese, bãmb kobs-tã, n bolg-b ne sãnem. Gãong bedr a ye bolgda ne sãnem zɩslem sẽn ta ko-wamde. Dĩma reega gãndã n tedg b Libã googa pʋga." 
1Kings10:18 A Salomo maana naam zaoor sẽn tablg ne wob-yẽna, n lɛɛg n bolg ne sãnem sẽn yɩlge." 
1Kings10:19 Zaoora rellga ra yaa gilg bilfu la a ra tara nus palgr zĩiga. Nusa sẽn palgd zĩig ninga yegende, b naana bõnyẽese, a ye goabga, a ye rɩtgo." 
1Kings10:20 Bõnyẽes piig la a yiibu n da be teedsa zutu, a yoob goabga, a yoob rɩtgo. Rĩung ba a ye pʋgẽ b zɩ n maan zaoora a woto buud ye." 
1Kings10:21 A Salomo sẽn da tar lagd niyns n yũud a rãamã yaa sãnem zãnga. Teed niyns sẽn da rɩgl Libã googa roogẽ wã fãa da yaa sãnem sẽn maneg n yɩlge; wanzurf ka rɩk n tʋm bũmb be ye; a Salomo wakatẽ wã b ra pa get wanzurf wa bõn yõod ye. 
1Kings10:22 Dĩma da tara Tarsis koom-kogendo sẽn naag n maand tolbo ne a Iram dẽnna, la yʋʋm a tãab-tãab fãa Tarsis kogenda ra lɛɛgd n wata ne sãnem, wanzurfu, wob-yẽna, wãamse la wãam-kãdse." 
1Kings10:23 A Salomo waa n lʋɩɩ tẽng zug dĩm dãmba fãa taoore ne arzɛka la yamzulum. 
1Kings10:24 Tẽnga ween-vɩɩs a naasa fãa da rat n yãend-a lame n paam n kelg bãngr kãseng ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da ning a yamẽ. 
1Kings10:25 Ned kam fãa ra wata ne a kũuni: sãnem la wanzurf teedo, futu, zab-teedo, yũ-nood kaam, wiidi, bõn-weese; la yʋʋmd fãa ra yaa boto." 
1Kings10:26 A Salomo baoo bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdba. Bilim-bilma ra yaa tusr la kobs-naase, tɩ wed-dʋʋdba ya tus piig la a yiibu. B ra tigm-b-la tãnsoaben-tẽnsẽ, Zerizalɛɛm yegende." 
1Kings10:27 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, wanzurf yãeeb ra pa toog n yɩɩd kugr ye. Tẽnga tɩ-bɛd sõor da taa kooma noorẽ yɩlse." 
1Kings10:28 A Salomo wiida ra yita tẽns sẽn zãrẽ, al Silisi. A Salomo ra tʋmda neb ne ligdi tɩ b tɩ raad-b be." 
1Kings10:29 Ezipt rãmba da koosda bilim-bilm a ye fãa wakɩ koeems kobs-yoobe, tɩ weef ya koabg la pis-nu. Yẽ nebã n da wat ne-ba, n yãkd n koosd ne Ititse la Aramsa dĩm dãmba." 
1Kings11:1 A Salomo kẽe kãadem ne sãam-pogs wʋsgo, Ezipt dĩma bi-pugla toog sẽn yãke. A pabga yɩɩ Moabitse, Amonitse, Edomitse, Ititse la Sidõ rãmb buudu." 
1Kings11:2 Buud kãens poorẽ Soaala-Wẽnd da yeela a Israyɛl: «Da kẽng-y b nengẽ ye. Ka rẽ b na wẽnemd y yam la y sũuri n tees b wẽnd-naandsã.» A Salomo yaool n basame t'a yam kẽ bu-zẽna; bu-zẽna pagb yamleoog yõk-a lame. 
1Kings11:3 A pagb sẽn yɩ rĩm-biis yɩɩ kobs-yopoe; talsa kamb yɩɩ kobs-tã. Yaa a Salomo pagbã n kẽes-a moogo. 
1Kings11:4 A Salomo sẽn waa n kʋʋle, a pagba kɩtame t'a yam gãd wẽnd-naandse, woto a sũura ka pa zãng ne Naaba-Wẽnd wala a ba a Daviid sũur ye." 
1Kings11:5 A Salomo pʋga a Astarte, Sidõ rãmb wẽn-poaka n paas a Milkom, Amonitsa yel-yooko." 
1Kings11:6 A Salomo maana sẽn ka noom Soaalã, a ka sak-b wala a ba, a Daviid ye." 
1Kings11:7 A tɩ mee wẽnd doog tãng ning sẽn tot ne Zerizalɛɛma zug, a Kemos yĩnga; yẽ yaa Moab rãmba yel-yoogo. A mee wẽnd doog me a Molɛk yĩnga, Amonitsa ka-mi-sẽn-ya-la." 
1Kings11:8 A maana boto ne pabg a taab fãa wẽnd dãmba. Pagba ra kõta b wẽnd dãmba wisdu la maand. 
1Kings11:9 Wẽnd puuga b sũur ne a Salomo, t'a ra basa bãmba, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sẽn da lik-a naoor a yiibu," 
1Kings11:10 n yeel-a t'a ra pʋg wẽnd-naandsa ye, t'a zãgs n pʋg-ba." 
1Kings11:11 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Salomo: «F sẽn maan woto wã, n sãam m zoodã, n pa reeg m sẽn wilg-fã, m na n deega f naama n kõ f sõgne." 
1Kings11:12 Kõn yɩ f vɩɩmẽ, f ba a Daviid yĩnga. Yaa f biiga nugẽ la m na n gʋsg naama." 
1Kings11:13 Ka na n yɩ naama zãng ye. M na basa buuda sak a ye n kõ f biig t'a sooge, m sõgen a Daviid yĩnga la Zerizalɛɛm m tẽn-sõnga yĩnga.»" 
1Kings11:14 Soaala kõ-la a Salomo bɛ a ye: yɩ-la a Adad, Edom dĩm biiga." 
1Kings11:15 A Daviid da waa n zaba ne Edom n tõog-a. A tãnsoaba a Zoab, n tɩ mum sẽn pa-b zabrẽ n lɛɛg n kood Edom dapa fãa." 
1Kings11:16 A Zoab ne a Israyɛl tõr paa tẽnga kiis a yoobe, n tãag b sẽn waa n kʋ rapa fãa." 
1Kings11:17 A Adad paam n zoe n kẽnga Ezipt ne neb niyns sẽn da gũud a ba zaka. Wakat kãng t'a nan paoodame. 
1Kings11:18 B yii Madiã n wa Parã. B peega Parã neb kẽere la b tɩ noka Ezipt dĩma. Ezipt dĩma kõ-a-la zaka, n dɩlg-a, n kõ-a pʋʋgo." 
1Kings11:19 Ezipt dĩma yõga zood ne a Adad n tol n kõ-a paga, a meng pag a Tafnɛs yao." 
1Kings11:20 Dĩm-poaka tão doga a biiga, a Genubat. A Genubat wuba dĩma zakẽ ne Ezipt dĩma kamba." 
1Kings11:21 A Adad zĩnda Ezipt n wʋm t'a Daviid kiime, la a tãnsoab a Zoab me kiime. Dẽ la a Adad yeel dĩma: «Bas-m tɩ m leb m tẽngẽ.»" 
1Kings11:22 Tɩ dĩma leok a: «Yaa bõe n paoog f ka, mam seegẽ, tɩ f rat n leb f tẽngẽ?» A yeelame bala: «Ka bũmb ye! Bas-m tɩ m leb bala.»" 
1Kings11:23 Soaala le paasa a Salomo bɛ a to, yaa a Elyada biig a Rezõ. Yẽ ra zoeeme n zãag ne a zu-soaba, a Adadezɛr, Soba dĩma." 
1Kings11:24 Neb a taab waa n paas-a lame, la yẽ n lebg b kãsma. B sẽn mik t'a Daviid tara b kʋʋbo, b ra zoe n taa Damas n tɩ me n kẽ be, n tol n dɩ naam Damas." 
1Kings11:25 A Salomo vɩɩm tɛka a Rezõ yɩ-la a Israyɛl bɛyã. A paasa yel-beed niyns a Adad sẽn wa ne, la a sẽn dɩ naam Siri tɛka, a ka tol n vʋʋs ne a Israyɛl beem-tugb ye." 
1Kings11:26 A Zeroboam da yaa a Nebat biiga. A tẽnga la Sereda, Efrayim tẽn-peelmẽ. A Zeroboam ma yɩ-la a Seruya. A ma waa n lebga pʋg-kõore tɩ yẽ meng lebg a Salomo sõgne, la b moor waa n yõsga taaba." 
1Kings11:27 Ad bũmb ninga sẽn kɩt tɩ b moora yõsg taaba. A Salomo ra kɩtame tɩ b pidsd Milo boka sẽn be wẽnd dooga la na-zaka sʋka la b yẽt lal-gũbra sẽn da wurgi. 
1Kings11:28 A Zeroboam da yaa ned sẽn pid ne raoodo la sẽn tar pãnga. A Salomo gesa a sẽn da tʋmd to-to, la a yeel-a lame t'a yɩ Efrayim la Manase tʋʋm-tʋmdba gɛta." 
1Kings11:29 Ade, a Zeroboam waa n yii Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ bãngd a Ayiya, Silo rao, seg-a sor zugu. Bãngda ra yera fu paalga, la b ra yaa bãmb b yiib bala." 
1Kings11:30 A Ayiya yeega fu paallã n kẽes-a pɛɛl piig la a yiibu. 
1Kings11:31 A yeela a Zeroboam: «Deeg pɛɛl piiga, tɩ Soaalã, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam koɛɛg la woto: ‹M na gʋsga naama a Salomo nugẽ la yaa foom la m na n kõ sags piiga." 
1Kings11:32 M sã n kees-a soolma a ye, yaa Wẽnd maag a Daviid, m sõgna, la Zerizalɛɛm m sẽn kõ m meng a Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Kings11:33 Yaa a Salomo ne Israyɛl sẽn bas maama, n tɩ wõgend a Astarte taoore, Sidõ rãmb wẽn-poaka, n tɩ wõgemd a Kemos taoore, Moabitsa wẽnde, n tɩ wõgemd a Milkom taoore, Amonitsa wẽnde; yaa Salomo sẽn ka tũ sor ning m sẽn wilg-a, yaa a sẽn ka maan neer m nifẽ, n ka reeg m noya la m saglse wala a ba, a Daviid." 
1Kings11:34 Ka yẽ meng nugẽ la m na n gʋsg naama ye, tɩ m kõ-a-la naam a yõor tɛka, a ba, a Daviid, yĩnga, tɩ maam n yãk yẽ la a reega m noya la m saglse." 
1Kings11:35 Yaa a biig nugẽ la m na n deeg naama la m na n kõo foom a Zeroboam buuda sags piig tẽn-peelem. 
1Kings11:36 M na n kella sak a ye, a biiga yĩnga, sẽn na yɩ-la t'a Daviid fitil kell n widi m taoor Zerizalɛɛm, tẽng ning m sẽn yãk n na n paalg m ziiri." 
1Kings11:37 M na n yãka foom, Zeroboam, tɩ f rɩ naam wa f sẽn date, Israyɛl sags piig zugu." 
1Kings11:38 F sã n deeg m sẽn na n togs-f bũmb ning fãa, f sã n tũ sore, n maan sẽn ya neer m nifẽ, n deeg m noor la m saglse wala m sõgna a Daviid sẽn maane, mam me na pa ne foom, la m kãabdame tɩ f yagens na rɩ naam daar fãa, wala a Daviid yagensã. M na kõ foom a Israyɛl sags piigã." 
1Kings11:39 Woto m na ning a Daviid yagensã yãnde b beegra yĩnga, la ka wakat buud fãa la b na n tʋk yãndã b zug ye.› »" 
1Kings11:40 A Salomo baoome n na n kʋ a Zeroboam. Woto a zoeeme n kẽng Ezipt dĩm a Sisak nengẽ. A paa be n tãag a Salomo kũum. 
1Kings11:41 A Salomo vɩɩma yɛl a taaba, a tʋʋma, a yam zulungã, fãa pa gʋls a kibara sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings11:42 Yaa yʋʋm pis-naase la a Salomo dɩ Israyɛl tõr naam, Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Kings11:43 A kiime. B mun-a-la a ba, a Daviid, tẽngẽ, a biig a Roboam n led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings12:1 A Roboam kẽnga Sikɛm tɩ yaa be la a Israyɛl tõr da tigim n na n yug-a. 
1Kings12:2 A Nebat biig a Zeroboam wʋma a Salomo kũum. A yii Ezipt n lɛɛg n wa t'a ra zoe n kẽnga be n na n põs a Salomo. 
1Kings12:3 B tɩ boola a Zeroboam la Israyɛl tigmame n yãag-a n wa. B yeela a Roboam woto: 
1Kings12:4 «Y ba wã ra zɩlga tõnd zɩɩb sẽn zɩs wʋgo, d kos tɩ y yols-do, tɩ woto d na pʋg yãmba.»" 
1Kings12:5 A leok-b lame: «Kul-y, la sã n maan dasem a tã bɩ y lɛɛg n wa.»" 
1Kings12:6 A Roboam yẽsa ne nin-kẽembã sẽn da sõngd a ba, a Salomo, a sẽn waa n ketẽ la a sok-b lame: «M tog n leok-b-la wãna?»" 
1Kings12:7 Tɩ b yeele: «Yãmb sã n sak n lebg buuda zɩɩba tʋkda, n sõng-a, y sã n kõ-b koe-noogo, b na tũ yãmb daar fãa.»" 
1Kings12:8 A Roboam zãgsa nin-kẽemba saglgã, n bʋʋg a tũud-n-taase, la a reem-n-taase, sẽn tʋmd a zakẽ, n yẽs ne-ba." 
1Kings12:9 A sok-b lame: «Y yeelame tɩ m leok nin-bãmba wãna tɩ b waa n goma woto: ‹Yols-y zɩɩb ning y ba sẽn da zɩlg tõndã.› » 
1Kings12:10 Kom-bɩɩbã, a reem-n-taasã leokame: «Ad-y y sẽn na n leok sẽn yeel-b yãmb woto wã: ‹Y ba zɩlga tõnd wʋsgo, la yãmba, yols-y-do,› leok-y woto: ‹M pãnga sẽn tɩ paoog-m zĩig ninga ket n yɩɩda y ba wã pãng sẽn tɩ tigim zãng-zãng a nugẽ." 
1Kings12:11 M ba tʋka yãmb sẽn zɩse, la mam na paas y zɩɩbo. M ba pãba yãmb ne kaase, mam na pãb-y ne gãnd sẽn yod kutu.› »" 
1Kings12:12 Neba le tigma taab a Roboam taoor da-yɩten-daarã, wala a meng sẽn da wilgi: «Lɛɛg-y n wa-y ka ra-yɩta.»" 
1Kings12:13 Dĩma leoka neba pãr-pãre, a pa reeg nin-kẽemsa sagls ye." 
1Kings12:14 Yaa a reem-n-taasa la a kelg yã. Ad-a sẽn yeele: «M ba tʋka yãmb sẽn zɩse, la mam na paas y zɩɩbo, m ba pãb-y la ne kaase, la mam na pãb-y ne gãnd sẽn yod kutu.»" 
1Kings12:15 Dĩma pa kelg zãma wã ye. La rẽ yɩ Wẽnd n lʋɩ sʋka, sẽn na n yɩ-la n pids b sẽn da kãab a Nebat biig a Zeroboam, ne Silo bãngd, a Ayiya, noore." 
1Kings12:16 Neba sẽn mik tɩ dĩma pa kelg-bã, b leokame: «D pʋɩɩr bʋgo n be ne a Daviid? Tõnd pʋɩɩr ka be a Zese biig nugẽ ye. Israyɛl, leb f rotẽ. Daviid doogo, bãng n dɩlg f menga.» A Israyɛl leba a tẽnsẽ." 
1Kings12:17 A Roboam naama dɩɩb teka ne buud niyns sẽn da kẽed-b Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ bala. 
1Kings12:18 A Roboam tʋlg n maneg n yẽsa ne Israyɛl nebã la yẽ sẽn tʋm b nengẽ, a Adoram, a tʋʋma gɛta, rẽ puuga b sũur tɩ b lab-a ne kug n kʋ. A Roboam paam n kẽ-la a bilim-bilm n zoe n tees Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Kings12:19 Yaa woto la a Zɩɩda ne a Israyɛl roog welg taaba n ta ne rũnna. 
1Kings12:20 Israyɛl rãmba sẽn wʋm t'a Zeroboam lɛɛg n waame, b bool-a-la b tigsga zĩigẽ n yug-a t'a lebg Israyɛl dĩma. Woto a Zɩɩda ne a Bẽnzame bala n kell n pa a Daviid rooga naamẽ." 
1Kings12:21 A Roboam waa Zerizalɛɛm, n tigim a Zɩɩda ne a Bẽnzame tãb-biis sẽn mi zabre, bãmb tus koabg la pis-nii, n na n tɩ tak zabr ne a Israyɛl, n deeg naama n lebs a Roboam, a Salomo biigã." 
1Kings12:22 La Wẽnd koɛɛg taa b no-rɛɛs a Semaya: 
1Kings12:23 «Yeel a Salomo biig, a Roboam, Zɩɩda dĩma, n paas a Zɩɩda ne a Bẽnzame roog gilli:" 
1Kings12:24 ‹Woto la Soaala koɛɛga: Da bob-y zabre ne y saam-biis a Israyɛl kamb ye. Ned kam fãa leb a yiri, tɩ sẽn maana zemsa ne mam daabo.› » B kelga Soaala-Wẽnd gomdã, la wala Soaala sẽn wilgã, b rɩka sore n leb b tẽnsẽ." 
1Kings12:25 A Zeroboam maneg n mee Sikɛm, Efrayim tãnga zugu, n maan a na-tẽnga. A maneg n mee Penuwɛl me n paas a pãnga." 
1Kings12:26 A Zeroboam yeela a menga: «Yɛla sã n kell n yɩ woto, naama na n leba a Daviid doogo." 
1Kings12:27 Neba sã n ket n digd Zerizalɛɛm n kʋʋd b maando, b yama na n lɛɛg n kẽ-la a Roboam, Zɩɩda dĩma, la b na n kʋʋ maam, n lɛɛg n kẽ yẽnda.»" 
1Kings12:28 A paama yam n maan sãnem nag-bi a yiibu n yeel zãma wã: «Yaa yʋʋm sẽn ka paood la yãmb tʋgd Zerizalɛɛm. La ade, Israyɛl, ad wẽnd niyns sẽn yiis-b-foo Ezipt tẽnga!»" 
1Kings12:29 A ninga nag-bil a ye Betɛl, n ning a ye Dã." 
1Kings12:30 Dẽ me n wa ne Wẽnd beegrã. Neba tonga taab n tall nag-bil a ye n wa Dã. 
1Kings12:31 A Zeroboam mee pʋʋsg zĩiga, tãmsa zutu la a baoo maan-kʋʋdba yaare, ka tũus a Levi buudẽ ye." 
1Kings12:32 A Zeroboam maana kibsa, kiuug a nii soaba, kiuuga piig la a nu daare, wala b sẽn da maand Zɩɩda. A meng dʋʋ maan-kugra sẽn me tãng ning zugã; yaa woto la a maan Betɛl, n kʋʋd a nag-bi wã maando, n ningd maan-kʋʋdba, tãmsa zut maanda kʋʋb yĩnga." 
1Kings12:33 Kiuug a nii soaba, kiuuga piig la a nu daare, raar a sẽn yãk wa sẽn waa a yamẽ, a dʋ Betɛl maan-kugra, tãnga zugu. A maana kibs Israyɛl kamba yĩnga la a rʋʋ maan-kugrã n yõog wisdu." 
1Kings13:1 Wẽnd yeela b ned a ye t'a yi Zɩɩda n wa Betɛl, dẽ t'a Zeroboam da yõoda maandã, maan-kugra zugu." 
1Kings13:2 A kãaba maan-kugra kãab beedo n yeele: «Maan-kugri, maan-kugri, Wẽnd koɛɛga la woto: Biig n na n dog a Daviid buudẽ n boond tɩ Zoziyas, la fo zug la a na n kʋ maan-kʋʋdba sẽn tʋmd tãmsa zutã, f zugẽ b na n yõog ninsaalb kõaba.»" 
1Kings13:3 Bãngda paasa woto: «Maan-kugra na n tãsa mugnum, tɩ rũm-kaama tompɛglma sẽn dɩg a zuga dʋʋge la woto y na bãng tɩ Soaala n gome.»" 
1Kings13:4 Dĩma sẽn wʋm Wẽnd neda sẽn yeel Betɛl maan-kugra poorẽ, a tẽega a nug n tees bãngdã n yeele: «Yõk-y bãndã!» La a nuga kell n kʋɩɩme, n pa tõe n le gõd ye." 
1Kings13:5 Maan-kugra pusgame, tɩ rũm-kaama tompɛglma sẽn da be a zuga rʋʋge, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg ne b neda noore." 
1Kings13:6 Dĩma goma woto ne bãngdã: «Sigs Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri tɩ m nuga leb a zĩigẽ.» Bãngda sigsa Soaala sũuri, la dĩma nug leba a zĩigẽ wa pĩnda." 
1Kings13:7 Tɩ dĩma yeel-a: «Wa tũ maam tɩ d kuli, tɩ m tɩ kõ-f bũmbu tɩ f rɩ, la m kõ-f kũuni.»" 
1Kings13:8 Bãngda leoka dĩma: «Ba ya f zaka pʋɩ-sʋk la f na n kõ-ma, m kõn tũ n kul ye. M kõn dɩ, m kõn yũ bũmb f zakẽ ye.»" 
1Kings13:9 Wẽnd yeel-m la woto: «Da rɩ be, da yũ be, da le tũ so yɛng n wa ye.»" 
1Kings13:10 A tũu sor a to, ka yɩ a sẽn dɩk a soab n wa Betɛla ye." 
1Kings13:11 Bãngd kʋdgo n da be Betɛl. A kamba wa n wilg-a-la Wẽnd neda sẽn maan baraare, Betɛl. B wilg-a la bãngda sẽn togs dĩma." 
1Kings13:12 B ba wã sok-b lame: «Yaa so-bʋg la a rɩk yã?» T'a kamba wilg Zɩɩda raoã sẽn dɩk sor ninga. 
1Kings13:13 A yeela a kambã: «Ning-y bõanga gaare!» Tɩ b ning bõanga gaare t'a zombe," 
1Kings13:14 n pʋg Wẽnd nedã, la a tɩ paam-a lame t'a zĩ tɩɩg tẽngre, t'a sok-a: «Yaa yãmb la Wẽnd ned ning sẽn yit Zɩɩda wã bɩ?» T'a yeele: «N-ye!»" 
1Kings13:15 Tɩ bãngd kʋdga yeel-a: «Tũ maam n kuli, n tɩ paam bũmb n ning f noorẽ.»" 
1Kings13:16 T'a yeele: «M pa tõe n leb ne foo ye, m pa tõe n dɩ bɩ n yũ bũmb ka ye." 
1Kings13:17 Wẽnd kõ-m-la no-kãnga: Da rɩ, da yũ bũmb ba a ye, da tũ f pipi sorã n lɛɛg n wa ye.»" 
1Kings13:18 Dẽ la nin-kẽema yeel yã: «Mam me yaa bãngd wa foo, la malɛk n yeel maam: ‹Wẽnd kõt-f la noore tɩ f tall daoã n kul f yir t'a rɩ la a yũ.› » La ra yaa ziirẽ la a togsda." 
1Kings13:19 Woto wã bãngda tũ-a lame la a tɩ yũume, la a rɩ a zakẽ." 
1Kings13:20 B sẽn waa n dɩtẽ Wẽnd yiisa gomd bãngd kʋdga yĩnga," 
1Kings13:21 la bãngd kʋdga taasa Zɩɩda nedã: «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛga: Fo sẽn kɩɩs Wẽnde, fo sẽn pa reeg f Soaala-Wẽnnaam noore," 
1Kings13:22 fo sẽn lɛɛg n wa rɩ la f yũ zĩig ning b sẽn da yeel f tɩ f da rɩ la f ra yũ wã, ad-f yĩnga kõn mum f ba rãmba yaadẽ ye.»" 
1Kings13:23 Sɩda a sẽn dɩ la a yũ n sɛ, b ninga bõanga gaar t'a zomb n looge." 
1Kings13:24 La bõnyẽeg n seg-a n kʋ-a. A paa sora noore. Bõanga ne gɩgemda kell n pa-la a sɛɛgẽ. 
1Kings13:25 Neb n tũ sorã, n yãend kũuma la bõnyẽega sẽn yɛs a sɛɛgẽ, n wa wilg bãngd kʋdgã, tẽnga pʋga." 
1Kings13:26 Bãngda sẽn da kɩt t'a lɛɛgã sẽn wʋme, la a sẽn yeele: «Yaa bãngd ning sẽn kɩɩsa Wẽndã. Wẽnd bas-a la ne bõnyẽega, t'a lub-a n kʋ-a, wala a sẽn da paam Wẽnd vẽnegre.»" 
1Kings13:27 A yeela a kambã: «Ning-y bõanga gaare.» Tɩ b ning bõang gaare. 
1Kings13:28 Bãngda tɩ yãenda kũuma t'a rɩg sora pʋga, tɩ bõnyẽega yɛs a sɛɛgẽ. Bõnyẽega pa sɩɩs kũuma, a pa kaoog bõanga kõbr ye." 
1Kings13:29 Bãngda rɩka kũuma n palg a bõanga, n tall-a n wa Betɛl n na n maan a kʋʋre la a mum-a." 
1Kings13:30 A ninga kũuma a meng yaoogẽ, n kelm a kʋʋre: «Wiyee, m yao sõngo!»" 
1Kings13:31 A sẽn mum-a n sɛ, a yeela a kamba: «M sã n ki, bɩ y naag-m ne Wẽnnaam neda yaoog a ye pʋga. Gãneg-y m kõaba n yelg a rẽnna." 
1Kings13:32 Sɩda nin-kãnga goma Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga a sẽn togs Betɛl maan-kugra poorẽ Samari tẽn-peelmẽ tãmsã zutu pʋʋsga zĩisi poorẽ, sɩda a sẽn togsa fãa na n pidsame.»" 
1Kings13:33 Yell kãensa logr poore, a Zeroboam ka tedg a manes wẽnsa ye. A kell n bao maan-kʋʋdba a sẽn paamẽ. Sẽn data fãa ra lebgda tãmsa zut maan-kʋʋda." 
1Kings13:34 Dẽ kɩtame t'a roog lʋɩ yel-wẽndẽ, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd wa ne a sãoongo la a wãab, saaga tẽngre." 
1Kings14:1 Wẽnd kãnga, a Zeroboam biiga a Abiya lʋɩɩ bãaga." 
1Kings14:2 A Zeroboam yeela a paga: «Yik la f teem futu, tɩ b ra bãng tɩ f yaa Zeroboam pag ye. Fo na n kẽnga Silo, tɩ bãngda a Ayiya bee be, yẽ n da pĩnd n togs tɩ m na n lebga nin-bãmba dĩma." 
1Kings14:3 Zɩ bur piig ne samsa la sɩɩd ne yubla; kẽng a nengẽ t'a tɩ wilg-fu biiga yell sẽn na n yɩ-la.» 
1Kings14:4 A Zeroboam paga maana boto, n yik n kẽng Silo n tɩ kẽ a Ayiya yiri. A Ayiya da pa le ne ye, a nin da pa le noom ye, kʋʋlem yĩnga." 
1Kings14:5 Wẽnd da yeela a Ayiya: «Ade, a Zeroboam pag n wat n na n kudg kãntɩɩga tɩ f leok-a koɛɛga a biiga bãag poorẽ t'a pa keem ye. Fo na n leok-a la woto ne woto. Mik a sã n wa a na n maana wa ka yẽ la a Zeroboam pag ye.»" 
1Kings14:6 La a Ayiya sẽn wʋm a nao wã rãamd bal dignoorẽ, a yeelame: «Aya! Kẽ wɛ, Zeroboam paga! Bõe yĩnga tɩ fo teem f menga. M tara koɛɛg f yĩnga la ka koe-noog ye." 
1Kings14:7 Lebg n tɩ yeel a Zeroboam woto: ‹Ad-a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛga: Mam sẽn zẽk foom zãma wã sʋka, n kɩt tɩ fo lebg a Israyɛl naaba," 
1Kings14:8 mam gʋsga naama a Daviid roogẽ n kõ foom; la fo ka togs m tʋʋm-tʋmda a Daviid, sẽn sak mam noya la a tũ maam ne a sũur fãa, n pa maan bũmb a to, sã n ka sẽn noom maam bala." 
1Kings14:9 Fo maana wẽng n yɩɩg sẽn deng-b fooma fãa. Fo kẽng n tɩ maana wẽn-naandse, yõak tʋʋmde, n na n puug m sũuri, n dɩk maam n lob f poorẽ." 
1Kings14:10 Dẽ fãa yĩnga, ade, m na n taka yel-beedo a Zeroboam roog zugu, la m na sãam a Zeroboam zaka, n kʋ rapa fãa a buudẽ, kom-bõones wala kom-bɩɩba; mam na n pɩɩga a Zeroboam rooga zãng kas, wẽnd b sẽn kãagd sagdo, n menes zãnga." 
1Kings14:11 A Zeroboam zak biig fãa sẽn ki tẽnga pʋgẽ, baas n na n wãb-a, la sẽn ki-a weoogẽ, yĩngri luiili n dɩt-a.› Soaala-Wẽnd n togsd rẽnna.»" 
1Kings14:12 Bãngd a Ayiya paasa woto: «Fo na n yik n kula yiri, fo naoor sẽn poog tẽnga bala la f biiga na n ki." 
1Kings14:13 A Israyɛl gill fãa na n wiisa a zugu, tɩ b yaool n mum-a yaoogẽ, tɩ yaa yẽnda a ye, a Zeroboam kamba sʋka, n na n mum yaoogẽ, yẽnda nengẽ bala la b na n yãe bũmb sẽn ta a Israyɛl Soaala yam." 
1Kings14:14 La Wẽnd na n zẽka dĩm a to t'a soog Israyɛl la a wã a Zeroboam roog gilli. La rẽ fãa na n yɩɩ rũnna bala, la kabre tɩ m togs n baase: na n yɩɩ mars-mars nooga bala!" 
1Kings14:15 Wẽnd na n lenga a Israyɛl wala rudum sẽn lengd koomẽ. B na n feooga a Israyɛl tẽn-noogã pʋgẽ, bãmb sẽn dag n kõ a saam-dãmba, la b na n tɩ sẽeg-a la kʋɩlga poore. La rẽ yaa b sẽn saa n sel wẽn-peesdi, n yõog Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri." 
1Kings14:16 B na n basa a Israyɛl, t'a Zeroboam maana wẽnga la a tusa Israyɛl kamba tɩ b maan wẽnga.»" 
1Kings14:17 A Zeroboam paga yik n kulame. A leba Tirsa. La a sẽn gãndg dignoorã, la a biiga sẽn ki." 
1Kings14:18 B mum-a la yaoogẽ; a Israyɛl gill fãa wiisa a zugu, wala Wẽnd sẽn da yeel ne bãngda a Ayiya noore." 
1Kings14:19 A Zeroboam vɩɩma yɛla, a sẽn zabe la a sẽn dɩ naam to-to, fãa gʋlsa Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibarẽ." 
1Kings14:20 Yaa yʋʋm pisi la a rɩ naam. A saka a saam-dãmba la a biig a Nadab n dʋ a zaoorẽ. 
1Kings14:21 A Roboam ba la a Salomo. A ma la a Naama, Amonitga. A rɩɩ naam Zɩɩda. A Roboam da tara yʋʋm pis-naase la a ye, a sẽn waa n sɩng naam rɩɩbo. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yopoe Zerizalɛɛm; Wẽnd tũusa Zerizalɛɛm, Israyɛl tẽnsa fãa sʋka, n na n zĩndg b meng b buuda sʋka." 
1Kings14:22 A Roboam maana sẽn ya wẽnga, n yɩɩg a saam-dãmbã. A kɩtame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur yiki." 
1Kings14:23 Saam-dãmba mee pʋʋsg roto tãms zutu, la kunkubr fãa zugu la tɩɩg fãa sẽn tar maasem tẽngre." 
1Kings14:24 Neb tol n yoo yoob, tɩ woto la b wẽn-naandsa rat tɩ b balem-ba, tẽn-kãng pʋgẽ; b togsa yell yood buud fãa neb a taab sẽn maane tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da rig-ba n yiis a Israyɛl kamba taoore." 
1Kings14:25 A Roboam naam yʋʋmd a nu soaba, a Sisak, Ezipt dĩma, wa n pãba Zerizalɛɛm;" 
1Kings14:26 a wʋka arzɛka sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ wã, la arzɛkã sẽn da be dĩma roogẽ. A wʋka sãnem gãndã fãa a Salomo sẽn kɩt tɩ b kudã." 
1Kings14:27 Dĩm a Roboam kɩtame tɩ b maan zũud gãndo n lebs sãnem gãnda zĩigẽ la a kɩs-b-la tãnsoaben-dãmba sẽn da gũud dĩma zaka noore. 
1Kings14:28 Dĩma sã n da kẽed wẽnd doogẽ, gũudba da rɩkd-b lame, n yãag-a n yaool n le wa lebs-b gũudba roogẽ." 
1Kings14:29 A Roboam tʋʋma, la a sẽn maan fãa, rẽnda pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibara sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings14:30 A Roboam ne a Zeroboam zaba taab wakat buud fãa. 
1Kings14:31 A Roboam tɩ saka a saam-dãmba tɩ b mum-a yaoogẽ ne a saam-dãmba, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. A Naama la a ma wã yʋʋre, ra yaa Amonitga. A biig, a Abiyam, n led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings15:1 Dĩma a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii, a Abiyam n lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
1Kings15:2 A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a tã Zerizalɛɛm; a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Maaka la a ra yaa a Absalom bi-pugla. 
1Kings15:3 A Abiyam rɩka a ba nao n maan yel-wẽn niynsa fãa a ba sẽn reng n maane, la a sũur pa kẽ Soaala, a Wẽnnaam, wala a saamba, a Daviid ye." 
1Kings15:4 La baasg zãnga, a saamba, a Daviid, zug maasem yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnnaam ka bas tɩ b fitila ki Zerizalɛɛm ye; b kõ-a-la biig sẽn dɩ naam a poorẽ; Zerizalɛɛm kell n yɩɩ na-tẽnga." 
1Kings15:5 A Daviid maana sẽn ya tɩrga Wẽnd nifẽ, la sã n pa Ititga a Uri yella sẽn lʋɩ sʋkã, a pa bʋdg moogo n zãgs b noor ba a ye, b sẽn kõ-a, a vɩɩma zãnga." 
1Kings15:6 Zabre zĩnda a Roboam ne a Zeroboam sʋka, a vɩɩma zãnga." 
1Kings15:7 A Abiyam tʋʋm a taabã la a sẽn maan fãa, pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ? Zabre zĩnda a Abiyam la a Zeroboam sʋka." 
1Kings15:8 A Abiyam tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. A biiga a Asa n led-a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings15:9 A Zeroboam, a Israyɛl dĩma, naam yʋʋmd pisi soaba, a Asa n lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
1Kings15:10 A dɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-naas la a ye Zerizalɛɛm; a yaab poaka da boondame t'a Maaka, a Absalom biiga." 
1Kings15:11 A Asa maana sẽn ya tɩrga, Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a saamba a Daviid sẽn maane." 
1Kings15:12 A riga yoaadba fãa n yiis a soolmẽ la a menesa wẽn-naandsa fãa a ba rãmb sẽn da peese. 
1Kings15:13 A lebsa naab ma a Maaka poorẽ, a sẽn da pees Asera yooka nin-naand yĩnga. A Asa kʋʋsa wẽn-naand yookã n yõog-a bugum, Sedrõ sudga pʋga." 
1Kings15:14 La baasgo zãnga, pʋʋsg rotã sẽn da me tãmsa zutã pa menem ye. A Asa sũura kell n kẽe Soaala zãnga a vɩɩm tɛka." 
1Kings15:15 A tall n waa wẽnd doogẽ wã a ba sẽn da kõ Wẽnde n paas a meng kũuni: wanzurf, sãnem la lagdo." 
1Kings15:16 A Asa ne a Basa sʋka yɩɩ zabre daar fãa. 
1Kings15:17 Israyɛl dĩma, a Basa, waa n kaooga zabre ne a Zɩɩda dĩma, la a mee Rama n na n gɩdg a Asa, a Zɩɩda dĩma, t'a ra tõog n yi la a kẽ a tẽngẽ ye." 
1Kings15:18 A Asa kong n wʋka wanzurf la sãnema fãa sẽn da kell Wẽnd arzɛka roogẽ la dĩma arzɛka roogẽ n ning a sõgen-kamba nusẽ tɩ b kẽng Damas n tɩ kɩs Siri dĩm, a Ben-Adad, a Tabrimo biiga la a Eziõ yagenga, la b taas-a woto:" 
1Kings15:19 «Maam ne yãmb, mam saamba ne yãmb saamba, yaa zoodo. Ad-y m toonda yãmb kũuni, wanzurfu la sãnem. Bɩ y bas tɩ zooda sẽn be yãmb ne Israyɛl dĩm a Basa sʋka sãame t'a ra le wat n takd zabr ne-m ye.»" 
1Kings15:20 A Ben-Adad kelga a Asa koɛɛgã, n tʋm a tãnsoaben-dãmba tɩ b tak zabre ne Israyɛl tẽnse. A reega Iyõ, Dã, Abɛl-Bɛt-Maaka, Kinerɛt tẽng gilli, la Neftali zãnga." 
1Kings15:21 A Basa sẽn wʋm rẽnda, a basa Rama meebo la a leba Tirsa." 
1Kings15:22 A Asa, Zɩɩda dĩma, boola Zɩɩda gilli n ka bas ned ba a yembre, la b tɩ wʋka kuga la raado b sẽn da tigsi n met Rama, la dĩma rɩk-b la lame n me Gibea, a Bẽnzame soolmẽ, la Mispa." 
1Kings15:23 A Asa kibara zãnga, a raoodã, a tʋʋma, rẽ fãa pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibara sebrẽ bɩ? B sẽn pa wilgi yaa a sẽn n waa n lebg nin-kẽema n bẽed nao bãaga." 
1Kings15:24 A Asa tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a, a saamba, a Daviid, na-tẽngẽ; a biiga, a Zozafat, n led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings15:25 A Nadab, a Zeroboam biiga, rɩɩ naam, Israyɛl, a Asa, Zɩɩda dĩma naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, la a dɩɩ yʋʋm a yi bala." 
1Kings15:26 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Wẽnd nifẽ, a kell n dɩka a ba sore, la a ba sẽn kɩt t'a Israyɛl maan yel-wẽng ninga, yẽ me maan-a lame." 
1Kings15:27 La a Basa, a Ayiya biiga, a Isakar roogẽ, n zãmb-a. A Basa kʋ-la a Nadab Gibetõ, Filisti rãmba soolmẽ; wakat kãng t'a Nadab ne a Israyɛl gilli da gũbga Gibetõ." 
1Kings15:28 A Basa kʋ-a lame n deeg naam, a Asa, a Zɩɩda dĩma, naam yʋʋmd a tãab soaba." 
1Kings15:29 A sẽn lebg dĩm bala, a Basa wã-la a Zeroboam doog gilli. Ned ba a ye ka põse, wala Wẽnd sẽn da pĩnd n yeel ne b bãngda, a Ayiya, noore. Bãngda da yaa Silo raoa." 
1Kings15:30 Yɛla yɩɩ woto, t'a Zeroboam beega Wẽnde la a ra luba a soolem dãmb yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ la rẽ n da wa ne Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sũ-puuri." 
1Kings15:31 A Nadab tʋʋm a taabã, a sẽn maan fãa, pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings15:32 A Asa ne a Basa, a Israyɛl dĩma, zaba taab b vɩɩm tõre." 
1Kings15:33 Zɩɩda dĩma a Asa, naam yʋʋmd a tãab soaba, a Basa, a Ayiya biiga, rɩɩ naam Tirsa, Israyɛl zãng fãa zugu, yʋʋm pisi la a naase." 
1Kings15:34 A maana wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a rɩka a Zeroboam nao, la a togs n maana yel-wẽnd ning a Zeroboam sẽn da lub Israyɛl a soab pʋgẽ." 
1Kings16:1 Wẽnd goma ne bãngd a Yewu, a Anani biiga, a Basa poorẽ n yetẽ:" 
1Kings16:2 «Mam yiisa foom tãmpʋʋrẽ, m zẽka foom tɩ f yɩ m buud a Israyɛl dĩma, la fo rɩka a Zeroboam sore, n kɩt tɩ m buud a Israyɛl lʋɩ yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ, n puug m sũuri." 
1Kings16:3 Dẽ yĩnga, mam na n pɩɩga a Basa ne a roog gill kas, m na kɩt t'a rooga lebg wa a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga roogo." 
1Kings16:4 A Basa ned sã n ki tẽng pʋgẽ, baas n wãbd-a, la a sã n ki we-kɛɛnga, yaa yĩngri luiili n dɩt-a.»" 
1Kings16:5 A Basa kibare, a sẽn maan fãa, a raoodã, rẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibara sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings16:6 A Basa tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, la b mum-a-la Tirsa t'a biiga, a Ela, led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings16:7 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn waa n tũnug bãngd a Yewu, a Anani biiga, n taas b koɛɛgã, a Basa ne a zaka rãmba, yɩɩ bũmb a yiib yĩnga: Pipi yaa a Basa ne a zaka rãmb sẽn maan wẽng Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, n puug b sũuri, n wẽneg a Zeroboam roogo. A yiib soaba a kɩtame tɩ b kood a Zeroboam yagensa gilli." 
1Kings16:8 Zɩɩda dĩma, a Asa naam yʋʋmd pisi la a yoob soaba, a Basa biiga, a Ela, n lebg Israyɛl dĩma; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a yi, Tirsa." 
1Kings16:9 A tãnsoaba a Zimri n da get a bilim-bilm pʋɩ-sʋk yelle. A Zimri zãmb-a lame, dẽ t'a bee Tirsa n dɩtẽ la a yũud al tɩ rãam wa lub-a, samand naab a Arsa zakẽ." 
1Kings16:10 A Zimri kẽeme n wẽ-a n kʋ, n deeg a naam. Zɩɩda dĩm, a Asa, da zao a naama zaoorẽ yʋʋmd pisi la a yopoe." 
1Kings16:11 A Zimri sẽn lebg dĩm bala n zaond a zaoorẽ, a luba a Basa roog gilli, a ka bas ned ba a ye t'a põs ye, a ka bas bi-ribla, sẽn paood bɩ sẽn sɩlge, a Basa buud bɩ a zo-rãmb ye." 
1Kings16:12 Woto a Zĩmbri sãama a Basa roog gilli, wala Wẽnd sẽn da pĩnd n yeel-a ne bãngda a Yewu noore." 
1Kings16:13 A Basa, ne a biiga, a Ela, yel-wẽndã, yɩɩ bãmb sẽn kɩt t'a Israyɛl maan wẽn-yaalse n puug Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sũuri." 
1Kings16:14 A Ela sẽn maana fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ? 
1Kings16:15 Zɩɩda dĩm a Asa naam yʋʋmd pisi la a yopoe soaba, a Zimri dɩɩ naam dasem a yopoe Tirsa. Tãb-biisa da gãnega tãpo Gibetõ, Filisti rãmba soolmẽ." 
1Kings16:16 La b sẽn wa n gãneg tãpã, tãb-biisa wʋma b sẽn yeele: «A Zimri zãmbame n tol n kʋ dĩma.» La Israyɛl tãb-biisa gilli, zĩig pʋgẽ bala, tãb-sika pʋga, b yuga tãnsoab a Omri, t'a soog Israyɛl naam." 
1Kings16:17 A Omri ne a Israyɛl gilli basa Gibetõ n kẽng n tɩ gũbg Tirsa. 
1Kings16:18 A Zimri sẽn mik tɩ b rat n deega tẽngã, a kẽe dĩma gaosga pʋga n yõog rooga bugum, la a meng paa bugmẽ." 
1Kings16:19 Rẽ yaa a sẽn maan yel-wẽnda yĩnga, a sẽn tʋm wẽng Soaala nifẽ, n dɩk a Zeroboam nao, n togs-a, n kɩt t'a Israyɛl maan yel-wẽnde." 
1Kings16:20 A Zĩmbri tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn zãmb dĩma zãmb ninga, dẽ fãa ka gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings16:21 La a Israyɛl neba welga taaba sags a yi; neba pʋɩ-sʋk da kẽeda a Tibni, a Ginat biigã tãpẽ, n dat n kõ-a naam, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋk me kẽeda a Omri tãpẽ." 
1Kings16:22 La sẽn da kẽed-b a Omri wã, bãmb pãng n yɩɩge. A Tibni, a Ginat biigã, kiime. Woto a Omri rɩ naam." 
1Kings16:23 A Zɩɩda dĩma a Aza naam yʋʋmd pis-tã la a yembre soaba, a Omri n lebg Israyɛl dĩma, n dɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yi. A rɩɩ yʋʋm a yoob Tirsa." 
1Kings16:24 A ra-la a Semɛr nengẽ ne wanzurf gil a yi, Samari tãnga. A ninga tãnsoaben zak, tãnga zugu, la a pʋda tẽngã a sẽn me wã, tɩ Samari, yaa sẽn da so-a tẽnga yʋʋre, a Semɛr yʋʋre." 
1Kings16:25 A Omri maana wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a maana wẽng n yɩɩg sẽn deng-b yẽnda fãa," 
1Kings16:26 Bũmba fãa pʋgẽ, a rɩka a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, nao, a togsa a sẽn maan fãa, a luba a Israyɛl yel-wẽndẽ n puug a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam sũuri ne wẽn-naandsa sẽn ka võorã waoogre." 
1Kings16:27 A Omri tʋʋma, a sẽn maane, a raooda yelle, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings16:28 A Omri tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a Samari. La a biiga a Akab n led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings16:29 A Akab, a Omri, biiga, n lebg dĩma, a Israyɛl tẽnga, Zɩɩda dĩma a Aza naam deegr yʋʋmd pis-tã la a nii soaba; a Akab, a Omri biiga rɩɩ naam Samari yʋʋm pisi la a yi." 
1Kings16:30 A Akab, a Omri biiga, maana wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ n yɩɩg sẽn deng b yẽ wã fãa." 
1Kings16:31 A rɩka a Zeroboam nao, n togs a yel-wẽna, dẽ t'a nan paooda, a peega a Zezabɛl, Sidõ dãmba dĩma, a Itobaal, bi-pugla, n maan a paga, la a kẽng n tɩ waooga a Baal la a wõgemda a taoore." 
1Kings16:32 A Akab mee maan-kugri a Baal yĩnga, a Baal roogẽ, Samari." 
1Kings16:33 A Akab peesa wẽn-naands ne raado n lugl la a maana yɛl a taaba n paase. A maana wẽnga n puug Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sũuri, n yɩɩg Israyɛl dĩm dãmba fãa sẽn deng-b yẽ wã." 
1Kings16:34 Yẽ zamaanẽ, Betɛl nedã, a Iyɛl leb n mee Zeriko. La a Zozuwe, a Nun biiga sẽn da togs bũmb ninga ne Soaala vẽnegrã pidsame: A Iyɛl bi-kẽeng a Abiram maana kaalem b sẽn waa n na n sɩng meebã la a kamba yao-zʋʋg, a Segub, me kii tẽnga kʋɩlens sẽn lugl daare." 
1Kings17:1 A Eli, Tisbe dao, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ, yeela dĩm a Akab: «M wẽen ne Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, mam sẽn pʋgd a soaba, tɩ yʋʋma sẽn pʋgdã, saag kõ le ni la meenem kõ dʋʋge sã n ka maam n kose.»" 
1Kings17:2 Wẽnd goma ne a Eli: 
1Kings17:3 «Yik ka n kẽng yaang sẽnẽ n tɩ soond Kerit sudgã, Zʋrdẽ yaanga." 
1Kings17:4 Fo na n paama kʋɩlga koom be n yũuda, la m na n kõo gãabd noore tɩ b kõt-f rɩɩb beelẽ.»" 
1Kings17:5 A Eli kẽngame, a maana wala, b sẽn da kõ a noore, la a tɩ zĩnda Kerit sudgã, Zʋrdẽ yaanga." 
1Kings17:6 Gãabda ra wat n kõt-a-la bur la nemd yibeoogo, n kõt-a bur la nemd zaabre, la a ra yũuda kʋɩlga koom." 
1Kings17:7 La sẽn wa n yɩ bilfu, kʋɩlga koom fẽbgame, tɩ saag da pa le niid tẽnga ye." 
1Kings17:8 Soaala-Wẽnnaam goma ne a Eli la b yeelame: 
1Kings17:9 «Yik n kẽng Sarepta sẽn be Sidõ soolmẽ n tɩ zĩnd be, mam kõo pʋg-kõor noore t'a kõt-f rɩɩb beelẽ.»" 
1Kings17:10 A Eli yik n kẽnga Sarepta, la a sẽn ta tẽnga noore, ade, a yãee paga, a yãee pʋg-kõor sẽn da wɩɩsd raado. T'a bool-a n yeel: «M kotame tɩ f toog koom bilfu n wa kõ-m tɩ m yũ.»" 
1Kings17:11 A sẽn yet t'a rabda la a Eli sẽn tool n bool-a n yeele: «M kotame tɩ f zɩ bur bilfu f nugẽ n wa kõ-ma.» 
1Kings17:12 La paga leokame: «M wẽen ne Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama, tɩ m pa le tar bur pɛdg menga, m pa le tar bũmb sã n ka zom na pid nugu tɩ be m rʋkẽ, n paas kaam bilfu bala ne yubla. La ade, mam wɩɩsda ribli a yiibu n na n tɩ segle rẽndã, maam ne m biiga yĩnga, tɩ d rɩ la d yaool n ki.»" 
1Kings17:13 La a Eli leokame: «Da maan rabeem ba bilfu, leb yiri n tɩ maan wa m sẽn yeele; la reng n segl dɩɩb bilfu n wa kõ-ma, tɩ f na yaool n segl foom ne f biiga yĩnga." 
1Kings17:14 Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛg la woto: ‹Zoma sẽn be rʋkẽ wã kõn tol n sɛ ye, la kaama sẽn be ne yubla kõn tol n woog tɩ ta daar ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n tool saaga n madg tẽnga.› »" 
1Kings17:15 La pagã kẽng n tɩ maana wa a Eli sẽn yeele. A rɩɩme tɩ kaoose, yẽ ne a Eli la a zak rãmba." 
1Kings17:16 Zoma sẽn da be rʋkẽ pa sɛ ye, la kaama sẽn da be ne yublã ka woog ye, wala sẽn da pĩnd n togs ne a Eli noore." 
1Kings17:17 Dẽ loogre poore zaka pag biig lʋɩɩ bãaga al tɩ wɩnge, al t'a wa tol n ki." 
1Kings17:18 Paga yeela a Eli: «Bõe n be maam ne yãmb sʋka, Wẽnnaam neda? Yãmb siga mam yiri n na n le tẽeg m yel-wẽna la y kʋ mam biiga?»"
