1Kings17:19 A Eli leok-a lame: «Kõ maam f biiga ka!» A reega biigã a nugĩ n dʋ ne-a, yĩngri doogã, a sẽn da be zĩig ningã la a gãneg-a-la a meng gãag zugu." 
1Kings17:20 A pʋʋsa Wẽnde n yeele: «Soaala, m Wẽnnaam, pʋg-kõora sẽn deeg maam sãandã, yãmb na n maana wẽng ne-a n kɩt t'a biiga ki bɩ?»" 
1Kings17:21 La a yaool n gãanda naoor a tã n bʋʋg biigã, n pʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnd woto: «Soaala, m Wẽnnaam, kɩt-y tɩ bi-kãnga vɩɩma leb n wa a pʋgẽ.»" 
1Kings17:22 La Soaala-Wẽnd kelga a Eli koɛɛga; biiga vɩɩma leb n wa a pʋgẽ, t'a vʋʋge." 
1Kings17:23 A Eli rɩka biigã n sig tẽnga n kɩs-a a ma, la a yeelame: «Ade, f biiga vɩɩme.»" 
1Kings17:24 Pagã leoka a Eli: «Mam bãngame marsã tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnnaam neda la Wẽnnaam gomd n sɩd yit y noorẽ.» 
1Kings18:1 Sẽn kaoos rẽ loogr poore, yʋʋm sẽn taa a tã, Soaala-Wẽnnaam goma ne a Eli n yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ wilg f meng a Akab; mam na n kɩtame tɩ saag ni tẽnga zugu.»" 
1Kings18:2 La a Eli yikame n dabd a Akab nengẽ. Koma sɩd da wɩnga Samari; 
1Kings18:3 a Akab boola a samand naaba, a Obadiya. Bãng-y t'a Obadiya, yaa ned sẽn da mi Naaba-Wẽnd waoogre." 
1Kings18:4 Sɩd me, a Zezabɛl sẽn da waa n kʋʋd Wẽnd no-rɛɛsdbã, a Obadiya da peega no-rɛɛsdb koabga, n solg bãmb pis-nu-nu tãn-bogd a yiib pʋgẽ, m da rɩlgd-b beene ne buri la koom." 
1Kings18:5 A Akab yeela a Obadiya: «Wa tɩ d na n saaga tẽnga fãa kobumdum la bãad zĩisi, daare d na yãe yamdo n kõ wiidã la bõn-weesã la kõ yɩ modgre tɩ d kʋ bãmb kẽer ye.»" 
1Kings18:6 B pʋɩ tẽnsã n na n saag-ba; a Akab rɩka sor a yembre, t'a Obadiya me rɩk sor a to." 
1Kings18:7 A Obadiya sẽn wa n kẽnda, a sega a Eli, n bãng-a, n wõgemd n fõgneg a neng tẽnga n yeele: «Sɩd yaa yãmb bɩ, m naaba Eli?»" 
1Kings18:8 T'a leoke: «N-yẽe, yaa maam! Tɩ yeel f zu-soabã: Ad-a Eli bee ka.»" 
1Kings18:9 A Obadiya leokame: «Mam beeg-y-la ne bõe tɩ yãmb na n dɩk maam n ning a Akab nugẽ t'a kʋ-ma? 
1Kings18:10 M wẽen ne Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama, tɩ soolem bɩ rĩung ba a ye ka be, m dĩma sẽn pa tʋm tɩ b bao yãmb ye; la b sã n da yeele a ka be ka ye, a ra kɩtdame tɩ tẽng kãng bɩ rĩunga rãmb wẽene tɩ b sɩd ka yãe yãmb ye;" 
1Kings18:11 tɩ yãmb yet maam marsã: Kẽng n tɩ yeel f zu-soaba: ‹A Eli bee ka!› 
1Kings18:12 Bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ, yaa tɩ maam sã n wa zãag ne yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga na n dɩka yãmb n kẽng zĩig a to mam sẽn ka miẽ, dẽ tɩ mam yaool n zoe n togsa a Akab. A sã n bao yãmb be n konge, maam la a kʋda. Y yamba yaool n zoeta Soaala-Wẽnde al a yãadmẽ." 
1Kings18:13 M naaba, b ka togs yãmb mam sẽn maan bũmb ninga, n solg Wẽnd no-rɛɛsdb koabga, n welg-b pis-nu-nu tãn-bogd a yiib pʋgẽ n dɩlg-b ne bur la koom laa?" 
1Kings18:14 Yãmb sẽn yet maam marsã: ‹Kẽng n tɩ yeel f zu-soaba: ad a Eli bee ka,› y ratame t'a kʋ-m bala!»" 
1Kings18:15 A Eli leokame: «M wẽen ne Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, m sẽn yɛs a soab taoorã, tɩ dũnna bala mam na n kẽnga a Akab nengẽ.»" 
1Kings18:16 A Obadiya kẽng n tɩ sega a Akab n togs-a t'a bãng tiiri, la a Akab tɩ sega a Eli." 
1Kings18:17 A Akab sẽn yãee a Eli, a yeelame: «Foom n sɩd be ka, Israyɛl nin-yoogo?»" 
1Kings18:18 T'a Eli leok-a: «Ka maam la a Israyɛl sabaab ye, yaa foom ne fo ba-roogo, tɩ yãmb tõdga Soaala-Wẽnd noya, la yãmb zoe n pʋga a Baal dãmba." 
1Kings18:19 La marsã, bɩ f kɩt tɩ b tigim Israyɛl gill n kõ-ma, Karmɛl tãnga zugu, ne a Baal no-rɛɛsdba fãa, bãmb kobs-naas la pis-nu, la Asera no-rɛɛsdb kobs-naase sẽn dɩt a Zezabɛl zakẽ.»" 
1Kings18:20 A Akab boola Israyɛl kamba fãa, la a tigma bãngdba Karmɛl tãnga zugu." 
1Kings18:21 A Eli kolg n yeela zãma wã: «Yãmb na a n keoosa woto n kɩlld goabg la rɩtgo n ta da-bʋre?» Sã n yaa Soaala-Wẽnd la y pʋgda, bɩ y pʋg bãmba, la sã n yaa a Baal la y pʋgda, bɩ y pʋg yẽndã. La neba pa yãe koɛɛg n leok ye." 
1Kings18:22 A Eli yeela zãma wã: «Maam m ye tãa la Wẽnd no-rɛɛs n ket dũnna, ne yõore, la a Baal no-rɛɛsdb yaa kobs-naas la pis-nu." 
1Kings18:23 Kõ-y tõnd lols a yiibu, tɩ bãmb yãk a yembre n bees n dogl daad zugu la b da tugl bugum ye; mam me na n beesa loalg a to wã la m kõn ning bugum ye." 
1Kings18:24 Yãmb na n pʋʋsa y wẽndã tɩ mam me pʋʋs m Soaala. Wẽnd ning sẽn waa ne bugum, yaa yẽ la Wẽnnaam.» La neba fãa leokame: «N fãa, dẽ be neere!»" 
1Kings18:25 A Eli yeela a Baal no-rɛɛsdba: «Bɩ y yãk loalg a yembre la sɩɩg-y loalgã, tɩ yãmb sõor n yɩɩde, pʋʋs-y yãmb wẽndã, la y ra tugl bugum ye.»" 
1Kings18:26 B reega loalg ning b sẽn kõ bãmbã, n bees, n yaool n bool a Baal yʋʋr, al yibeoogo n tãag wĩnto-sʋk n yetẽ: «Baal woo, leok-y-do!» La b pa wʋm koɛɛg ye, b ra yĩgimdame la b saood b maan-kugra taoore." 
1Kings18:27 La sẽn waa n ta wĩnto-sʋka, a Eli laa bãmb n yeele: «Zẽk-y y koɛɛg n kelem t'a Baal yaa wẽnde, a nug ka zaalem ye, bɩ a toga sore; daare a gõeeme la a na neke.»" 
1Kings18:28 B kelma ne b koɛɛg pãng tɛka, la b kõsd b mense, ne sʋʋse la kãna tɩ zɩɩm yita, wala b sẽn yib n maanẽ." 
1Kings18:29 Sẽn wa n yõsg wĩnto-sʋka, b sɩnga goama, n gom n ta wakat ning b sẽn kʋʋd zafar maoongo. La b pa tol n wʋm koɛɛga, b pa tol n wʋm ned leokre, b pa yãend bũmb a to ye." 
1Kings18:30 A Eli yeela kʋʋnga: «Bɩ y kolg!» La neba fãa kolga a Eli. 
1Kings18:31 A le manega Soaala maan-kugrã b sẽn da lubã. A Eli rɩka kug piig la a yi n zems ne a Zakoob kamba sõore, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da gom ne-a n yeel: «B na n pʋda foom t'a Israyɛl.»" 
1Kings18:32 La ne kugã a mee maan-kugr, Soaala waoogr yĩnga, la a tuu boko n gilg maan-kugrã, bok sẽn tõe n deeg ko-yʋy a yiibu." 
1Kings18:33 A sigla raado, n bees loalgã n dogl raada zugu." 
1Kings18:34 A yeelame: «Pids-y yʋy a naas ne koom n dɩk n budg maoongã ne raada zugu.» Tɩ b maan boto. A yeelame: «Le maan-y n paase!» 
1Kings18:35 N le yeele: «Le maan-y n paas-y yɛsa.» Tɩ b le maan boto n daag tɩ ta pipi kooma naoor a taabo tɩ kooma gilg maan-kugrã n pid bokã n duki. 
1Kings18:36 Wakat ning b sẽn mii n kʋʋd zaabr maoongo, bãngda a Eli kolg n yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnde, a Abraam la Izaak la a Zakoob Wẽnde, bɩ b bãng dũnna tɩ yãmb la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, tɩ mam ya yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmda, la tũu ne yãmb gomde la m sẽn maand yell kãnga wã." 
1Kings18:37 Leok-y-ma, Soaala-Wẽnde, leok-y-ma tɩ nin-bãmba bãng tɩ yaa yãmba, Soaala, la Wẽnnaam, la y le wẽnemd b neng n tees y menga.»" 
1Kings18:38 Wẽnd bugum sigame n dɩ maoongã ne raadã la kugã la toma, n fõog kooma sẽn da pid bokã." 
1Kings18:39 Dabeem yõka zãma wã. B wõgemdame n fõgneg b neng tẽnga n yetẽ: «Yaa Soaala la Wẽnnaam, yaa Soaala la Wẽnnaam!»" 
1Kings18:40 T'a Eli yeel-ba: «Aya, bɩ y yõk a Baal no-rɛɛsdba fãa, la b ned ba a ye da põs ye!» La b yõg-b lame. A Eli kɩtame tɩ b tall-ba n sig Kisõ sudga pʋga t'a kood-ba." 
1Kings18:41 La a Eli yeela a Akab: «Dɩ la f yũ, tɩ mam wʋmda saag kɛleng rãamde.»" 
1Kings18:42 La a Akab kẽngame n na n tɩ rɩ la a yũ. A Eli rʋʋ Karmɛl tãnga zug tẽnsʋka la a sulgame n ning a zugã a rũma sʋka. 
1Kings18:43 A yeela a dakõore: «Rʋ n ges mogra sẽnẽ!» Dakõorã rʋ n gesame n yeel: «Bũmb ka ye!» A Eli yeel-a-la naoor a yopoe: «Leb n ges!» 
1Kings18:44 A yopoe soaba a yeelame: «Ade, sawad-bila n zẽkd mogra zugu, a paooda wala ned nug gilgu.» T'a Eli leok-a: «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Akab: ‹Segl f bilim-bilm tao tao n sigi tɩ saag da gɩdg f ye.› »" 
1Kings18:45 La sẽn yɩ bilf bala saag kʋɩɩme tɩ sobg yiki tɩ sa kãseng na n ni. A Akab kẽ a bilim-bilma n dɩk Zizreyɛl sore. 
1Kings18:46 Wẽnd pãng kẽ-la a Eli t'a sẽbg a sɛɛga n lʋɩ a Akab taoore n zoe n tɩ tãag Zizreyɛl tẽnga. 
1Kings19:1 A Akab tɩ togsa a Zezabɛl a Eli sẽn maan fãa la a sẽn kʋ bãngdba fãa ne sʋʋga. 
1Kings19:2 A Zezabɛl tʋma ned a Eli nengẽ, t'a tɩ yeel-a: «M wẽnd dãmba sãam-ma, n le sãam-m n bãge, mam sã n ka maan ne foo wa f sẽn maan ne bãngdbã.»" 
1Kings19:3 La a Eli sẽn wʋm woto a yik n zoeeme n na n fãag a yõore. La a taa Beerseba, a Zɩɩda soolmẽ, la a basa a dakõora be." 
1Kings19:4 La a meng kẽna weooga pʋga daar a ye tõre, la a tʋlga kũum n yeele: «Sekame marsã, Soaala-Wẽnde. Bɩ y reeg m vɩɩma, tɩ mam pa são m saam-dãmb ye.»" 
1Kings19:5 La a gãand n gũsa tɩɩg a ye tẽngre. La ade, malɛk n sɩɩs-a n yeel-a: «Yik n dɩ!»" 
1Kings19:6 La a sẽn gese, a yãee a sɛɛgẽ, miisgu sẽn dõos kug paklg sẽn wɩng bugmẽ, n paas koom ne yubla. A rɩɩme, a yũume, a le gãandame." 
1Kings19:7 La Soaala malɛkã le wa naoor a yiib soaba n le nek-a n yeele: «Yik n dɩ tɩ sora ra yɩɩ wok f yĩng ye.» 
1Kings19:8 A yik n dɩɩme la a yũ. La rɩ-kãnga pãng yĩnga a kẽna dasem pis-naase, wĩntoog la yʋngo n wa ta Orɛb, Wẽnd tãngã." 
1Kings19:9 Beene, a Eli kẽe tãn-boko n gãand n vẽeg beoogo la ade, Soaala-Wẽnd leok-a la b koɛɛg: «Eli, fo maanda bõe ka?»" 
1Kings19:10 T'a yeel: «Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, yãmb nonglma yik-m-la wa bãaga la m ka le tõe n sak tɩ Israyɛl kamba paoog-y woto ye. B sãama zoodã, b wãa yãmb maan-kugã, n kʋ y bãngdbã. Kella maam m ye bala tɩ b baood maam n na n dok m yõore.»" 
1Kings19:11 Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Yi n yals tãnga zugu, Wẽnd taoore. Gese, Soaala-Wẽnd na n loogame.» Sobg kãseng yika ne pãnga, n miim tãmsã, la a wãad pĩisi, Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. La Soaala-Wẽnd da ka be sobga pʋg ye. Sobgã sẽn looge, yɩɩ tẽng n miimi. La Wẽnd da ka be tẽnga miuungẽ wã ye." 
1Kings19:12 Tẽnga miuung poore yɩ bugum. La Wẽnd da ka be bugma pʋgẽ ye. La bugma sẽn looge, yɩɩ pems maasga la faasg bʋʋre." 
1Kings19:13 La a Eli sẽn wʋm rẽnda a rɩka a fuug n lud a nenga n yi. A yalsa tãn-boka noore, la a wʋma sẽn yeele: «Eli, fo maanda bõe ka?»" 
1Kings19:14 T'a yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala y nonglma sũur n yik-ma tɩ m pa rat tɩ Israyɛl kamba le paoog-y ye. Sɩda b sãama zoodã, n wã y maan-kugã, n kʋ y bãngdbã. La kella maam m ye bala, tɩ b baood maam n na n dok m yõore.»" 
1Kings19:15 Wẽnd yeela a Eli: «Aya! Kẽnge, le rɩk f sor, n pɩʋʋg weoogã n leb Damas. F sã n ta beelẽ bɩ f zɛ a Azayɛl naam kaam t'a yɩ Aram dĩma;" 
1Kings19:16 La f zɛ a Yewu, a Nimsi biigã, t'a yɩ Israyɛl dĩma; la f zɛ a Elize, a Safat biigã, Abɛl-Meola, t'a yɩ bãngda n led fo zĩigẽ." 
1Kings19:17 La bũmb ning sẽn na n yɩ, yaa tɩ sẽn põsa a Azayɛl sʋʋga, a Yewu n kʋʋd-a, la sẽn põs a Yewu sʋʋga, a Elize na kɩt tɩ b kʋ-a." 
1Kings19:18 La mam na n basa a Israyɛl pʋgẽ dap tus a yopoe, sẽn pa ning rũmdi a Baal taoore, tɩ b noor ka mogs-a ye.»" 
1Kings19:19 A Eli yika zĩ-kãng n looge, n seg a Elize, a Safat biigã, wakat kãng t'a ra koodame; nag-koods sẽn balg a yiib-yiibu, bãmb sags piig la a yi n da be a taoore t'a ra pʋgd piig la a yiib soaba. A Eli kolg-a lame n dɩk a fuug n lob-a." 
1Kings19:20 La a Elize basa a niisã n zoe n pʋg a Eli; a yeelame: «Kõ-y maam sore, tɩ m tɩ mobg m ba la m ma, la m yaool n wa tũ yãmba.» La a Eli leok a lame: «Aya, lebe! M kos-f la bũmb bɩ?»" 
1Kings19:21 La a Elize lebame n tɩ yõk a nag-koods a yiibu n kʋ, n dɩk nag-koodsã yubl daoog n dʋg b nemdã n kõ neba tɩ b rɩ, la a yaool n tũ-la a Eli n lebg a sõgne." 
1Kings20:1 A Ben-Adad, Siri dĩma, tigma a tãb-biisa fãa. Nanams pis-tã la a yi n da be ne-a ne b wiidi la b bilim-bilm. A Ben-Adad waa n gũbga Samari, n kaoog zabre." 
1Kings20:2 A tʋma neb tẽnga pʋgẽ, Israyɛl dĩma Akab nengẽ," 
1Kings20:3 tɩ b tɩ yeel-a: «A Ben-Adad koɛɛg la woto: Fo wanzurf la f sãnem, maam n so; fo pagba la f kamba, maam n so.»" 
1Kings20:4 La Israyɛl dĩma leokame: «M zu-soaba, m dĩma, yãmb yam bala; yãmb n so maam ne m sẽn tar fãa.»" 
1Kings20:5 La a le tʋma neb tɩ wa yeele: «A Ben-Adad koɛɛg la woto: Mam sɩd tʋmame tɩ b wa yeel foom: ‹F wanzurfu, f sãnem, f pagba la f kamba, yiis fãa n kõ-ma.›" 
1Kings20:6 Bãng tɩ beoog, wakat kãnga, mam na n tʋma m sõgen-kamba, tɩ b vɛɛs f roogo la f neba roto la bũmb ning fãa sẽn ta b yam, bɩ b rɩk n loog.»" 
1Kings20:7 La Akab boola tẽnga nin-kẽemba fãa n yeele: «Bɩ y ges la y bãng vẽenega, tɩ nin-kãnga rat-m-la ne wẽnga! A sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa reeg m pagba la m kamba, m wanzurf la m sãnem, m pa zãgs ye.»" 
1Kings20:8 Dẽ la nin-kẽemba la zãma leok yã: «Bɩ y ra kelg la y ra sak fɩ.» 
1Kings20:9 Woto a Akab yeela a Ben-Adad sẽn tʋm b rãmba: «Tɩ yeel-y y zu-soaba woto: ‹Yãmb sẽn deng n kos y sõgna bũmb ningã, a ra tõe n maaname, la y sẽn le paas bũmb ninga marsã wã, ka tõe ye.› » La b sẽn tʋm b rãmba lebg n tɩ togsa leokrã a Ben-Adad." 
1Kings20:10 A Ben-Adad tʋmame tɩ b le wa yeel-a: «Bɩ m wẽnd dãmba sɩbg maam n le sɩbg n bãge, Samari sã n kell tom sẽn sek a na pid nebã fãa sẽn pʋgd maama nusi.»" 
1Kings20:11 La a Israyɛl dĩma leokame: «Tẽeg-y dĩm-y a Ben-Adad yelbũnd kãnga: ‹Sẽn nan bobd-a n dabd zabre da maan wa sẽn zab-a n tõog n lɛɛg n watẽ ye.› » 
1Kings20:12 A Ben Adad sẽn wʋm woto, rẽ t'a ra zĩ n yũuda rãam a nanams rotẽ, a yeela a neba: «Aya! Ned kam fãa leb a zĩigẽ!» Tɩ neba leb b zĩisẽ n segl n na n tak zabr ne tẽngã." 
1Kings20:13 La ade, bãngda a ye n kolg a Akab n yeel Israyɛl dĩma: «Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd woto: Yãmb nee zãma kãsengã? Ade, dũnna, m na n ning-a la y nugẽ, la woto fo na bãng tɩ maam la yãmb Wẽnde.»" 
1Kings20:14 A Akab sokame: «Na n tũu ne ãn nugu?» Tɩ bãngda yeele: «Wẽnd leoka woto: Na n tuu ne kom-bɩɩbã b sẽn sa n yãgs tẽn-bɛdẽ wã.» T'a Akab soke: «La ãnd n na n tak zabrã?» Tɩ bãngda leoke: «Foom!» 
1Kings20:15 Dĩma saame n sõd tẽnsa kom-bɩɩba, kãsem-dãmba sẽn da sa n bool b rãmb tãpẽ wã, da yaa bãmb kobs-yi la pis-tã la a yi. La a yaool n saag n gesa a Israyɛl tãb-biisa fãa, da yaa bãmb tus a yopoe." 
1Kings20:16 Dĩma Akab boba tãpa wĩnto-sʋka, dẽ t'a Ben-Adad da yũuda rãam a roogẽ n gãeemnẽ, yẽ ne dĩm dãmb pis-tã la a yi sẽn da yõg zoodo ne-a." 
1Kings20:17 Kom-bɩɩbã n deng yiibu n na n tɩ zabe. A Ben-Adad tʋmame tɩ b tɩ ges sẽn ya-la; tɩ b lɛɛg n wa togs-a woto: «Neb n yi Samari n wa.» 
1Kings20:18 A yeelame: «B sã n yii laafi baoobo, yõg-y-b vɩɩse n wa, b sã n yii ne zabr daabo, yõg-y b vɩɩse n wa ne!»" 
1Kings20:19 Dẽ tɩ kom-bɩɩba la tãb-biisa sẽn da pʋgdã da paam n yi tẽngã. 
1Kings20:20 Ned kamb fãa kʋʋ sẽn waa a taoore. Aramsa zoeeme, t'a Israyɛl pʋgd n digd-b. A Ben-Adad, Aram dĩma, zomba weef n zoe, yẽ ne wed-dʋʋdb kẽere." 
1Kings20:21 Israyɛl dĩma yiime, n yõg wiidã la a reeg bilim-bilma. A tõoga Aram dãmba tõogr kãsenga." 
1Kings20:22 Bãngda kolg n yeela Israyɛl dĩma: «Keng f sũuri la ges f sẽn na n manega, tɩ yʋʋm vẽkrã, Aram dĩma na n lɛɛg n wa zaba ne foom.»" 
1Kings20:23 Aram dĩma poorẽ dãmba yeel-a lame: «Israyɛl Wẽnda yaa Wẽnd sẽn nong tãmse, yaa rẽ yĩng la b tõog tõndo. D kaoog zabre ne bãmb tẽn-nabrẽ n ges d kõn tõog-ba." 
1Kings20:24 Bɩ y maan woto, dĩma: deeg-y dĩm dãmba sẽn sõngd yãmba naam la y ledg-b ne y kombɛɛmba." 
1Kings20:25 Yãmb meng yiis tãb-biis sõor sẽn zem sẽn ki-bã, wiid sõor sẽn zem sẽn pa-b zabrã, bilim-bilma me sõor sẽn ta pĩnd dẽnna la d kaoog zabra tẽn nabrẽ. D tẽed tɩ d na maan raoodo, n tõog Israyɛl dãmbã.» La a Ben-Adad kelga b saglgo la a tũume." 
1Kings20:26 La yʋʋmdã sẽn vẽke, a Ben-Adad tonga Aramsã, la a kẽnga Afɛk n na n tɩ kaoog zabre ne a Israyɛl." 
1Kings20:27 Israyɛl kamba me tongame, b reega tãnsoaben-dãmba sẽn tog n kõ-b bũmb ning fãa la b looga Aramsa segbo. Israyɛl kamba gãnega b tãpo, tãb-sik a yiib pʋgẽ, tɩ bãmb ne Aramsa get taaba. Israyɛl tãb-biisa ra yaa wa bʋʋs bãg-bõones a yi, tɩ Aramsa yɛdg n pid tẽngã." 
1Kings20:28 Wẽnnaam neda kolgame n gom ne Israyɛl dĩma n yeel-a: «Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Aramsa sẽn yeel tɩ maam a Wẽnd yaa Wẽnd sẽn nong tãmsã, la ka Wẽnd sẽn kẽed tẽn-nabre, mam na n ninga zãma kãnga fãa fo nugẽ, la woto y na bãng tɩ maam la Wẽnnaam.»" 
1Kings20:29 Zab-zabdba zĩnda woto n get taaba, dasem a yoobe. La a yopoe daare zabra kaoogame. A Israyɛl tõoga Aramsã n kʋ b neb tus koabga daar a ye pʋgẽ." 
1Kings20:30 Sẽn kell-bã zoeeme n tud Afɛk, n tɩ kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ, tɩ lal-gũbra lʋɩ n bʋʋg neb tus pisi la a yopoe sẽn da kell-bã. A Ben-Adad zoeeme n tɩ kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ. A Paama roog n soond be." 
1Kings20:31 A kug-zĩidba yeel-a lame: «Tõnd wʋmame t'a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba, yaa dĩm dãmb sẽn be sugri. Wa-y tɩ d sẽgen sũ-pa-noang futu la d loe d nus ne tãando n kʋk d zutu n yaool n kẽng Israyɛl dĩma nengẽ; daare a na bas-d ne yõore.»" 
1Kings20:32 B rɩka sũ-pa-noang futu n sẽgen b seese, la tãando n vil b kamse n kẽng Israyɛl dĩma nengẽ n yeel-a: «Yãmb yamba, a Ben-Adad, tɩ b wa yeelyã: M yõkd y sɛɛga, bas-y-m ne yõore.» T'a Akab soke: «A keta ne yõor laa? Yaa m saam-biiga!»" 
1Kings20:33 B yãeeme tɩ na n zemsame. Woto wã b yeelame: «A Ben-Adad yaa yãmb saam-biiga?» T'a Akab yeele: «Bɩ y kẽng n tɩ bool-a t'a wa.» A Ben-Adad yi-la a sẽn da solgẽ wã, a waame, t'a Akab kẽes-a a bilim-bilm pʋga." 
1Kings20:34 A Ben-Adad yeel-a lame: «M na n lebsa yãmba, tẽnsã fãa m ba sẽn deeg y ba nugẽ. La yãmb na n mee roto Damas pʋgẽ, teed koosgo yĩnga, wala m ba sẽn dag n me Samari pʋgẽ. Mam sẽn kote, f sã n sake, yaa f wogl m yõore.» A Akab saka a sẽn yalsã n bas-a n pa kʋ ye." 
1Kings20:35 Wakat kãnga Soaala-Wẽnd kõo bãngd karen-biig a ye noor t'a yeel a tũud-n-taaga: «M kotame tɩ f wẽ-m n kʋ!» La a tũud-n-taagã zãgsame t'a kõ kʋ-a ye. 
1Kings20:36 T'a yeel: «Fo sẽn pa kelg m koɛɛg yĩnga, ade, fo sã n loog n bas maam, gɩgemde n na n yõk foom.» La a tũud-n-taagã sẽn yi n looge, gɩgemd seg-a lame n yõk-a n kʋ." 
1Kings20:37 La bãngdba karen-biiga sega ned a to n yeel-a: «Wẽ-m n kʋ!» La daoã wẽ-a lame n pogle. 
1Kings20:38 Bãngda teema futu, n tak a puglã n lud a nenga, n kẽng n tɩ yals dĩma Akab sẽn na n loog sor ninga noore." 
1Kings20:39 Dĩma sẽn wa n loogdẽ, a kelmame n yetẽ: «M zu-soaba, yãmb sõgna dag n zabda ne a bɛɛba, la ned n yi zabra zĩigẽ n tall ned a sẽn yõke n yeel-ma: ‹Gũ nin-kãnga t'a ra loog ye. A sã n zoe n põse, fo yõor la b na n deeg n ledg yẽ rẽnna sẽn põsã, ka rẽ bɩ f yao wanzurf gilgu.›" 
1Kings20:40 La yãmb yambã sẽn wa n maand woto la woto, daoã menemame.» Israyɛl dĩma leokame: «F bʋʋd kaoome, la yaa ne f meng noore.»" 
1Kings20:41 La bãngda yãka peenda sẽn da lud a nengã tao-tao, tɩ Israyɛl dĩma na n bãng tɩ yaa bãngdba nin-yende." 
1Kings20:42 Bãngda yeel-a lame: «Soaala koɛɛg la woto: ‹Fo sẽn bas neda t'a põsã, ne m sẽn da kãab a beedã, foo n na n ki a zĩigẽ, la fo soolma rãmba n na n ki a soolma rãmb zĩigẽ.› »" 
1Kings20:43 La Israyɛl dĩma kula a yiri, Samari tẽnga, ne nen-gãnenga la sũ-beedo." 
1Kings21:1 Ad bũmb ning sẽn zĩndi, rẽ loogr poore. Zizreyɛl dao a Nabot n da tar a bugsuntun-sõng pʋʋgo. Pʋʋga ra bee Zizreyɛl, Samari dĩma Akab na-yira sɛɛga." 
1Kings21:2 A Akab yẽsa ne a Nabot n yetẽ: «Kõ maam f bugsuntunga pʋʋgo, tɩ m maan zẽedo, n sel tɩ-rɩtse t'a pẽe ne mam zaka, la m na kõ foom zĩig a to sẽn yaa sõmbo n yɩɩda, n lebs f pʋʋgã, bɩ f sã n dat me m na kõ-f ligdi.»" 
1Kings21:3 A Nabot leoka a Akab: «Soaala gũ ma tɩ da beeg-ba n dɩk m buuda pʋɩɩre n kõ yãmb ye.» 
1Kings21:4 La a Akab leba a yiri ne nen-gãnenga la sũ-beedo. Zizreyɛl dao a Nabot sẽn leok-a woto wã yĩnga: M kõ dɩk m buuda pʋɩɩr n kõ yãmb ye. La a gãanda a gãagẽ n wẽnemd a neng, n tees a roog lalga la a zãgs dɩɩb buud fãa." 
1Kings21:5 A paga, a Zezabɛl, bʋʋg-a lame, n soke: «Yaa bõe sũ-sãang n tar yãmba tɩ y zãgsd rɩɩbo?»" 
1Kings21:6 T'a yeele: «Yaa m sẽn kos Zizreyɛl dao, a Nabot t'a kõ maam a bugsuntungã la a reeg ligdi, bɩ a sã n data, m na n kõ-a pʋʋg a to n lebse, t'a leok: ‹Mam ka na n kõ m pʋʋg ye.› »" 
1Kings21:7 A paga a Zezabɛl yeel-a lame: «Ka foo n dɩt naam Israyɛl bɩ? Bɩ f yik n deeg dɩɩb n dɩ la f noog f sũuri, tɩ mam na kõ-foo Zizreyɛl dao a Nabot pʋʋgo.»" 
1Kings21:8 A Zezabɛl gʋlsa sɛba a Akab yʋʋr yĩnga, n ning sɛba zugu bũmb sẽn kõt kaseto tɩ b yii dĩma nengẽ, n tool nin-kẽemba la kãsem-dãmba sẽn da be-b tẽnga pʋgẽ, a Nabot sɛɛgẽ." 
1Kings21:9 A gʋlsa woto sɛba pʋsẽ: «Moon-y no-loeere, la y yiis a Nabot t'a zĩnd neba fãa taoore." 
1Kings21:10 La bao-y neb a yiibu, nin-yoodo, tɩ b zĩnd a taoore n dõd a n yetẽ: ‹Fo tʋʋsa Wẽnnaam la dĩma.› La y yaool n tall-a n yi kɛɛnga n lab-a kuga, t'a ki.»" 
1Kings21:11 La nin-kẽemba la kãsem-dãmba sẽn da be-b tẽn kãng maana a Zezabɛl sẽn yeele, wala a sẽn gʋls sɛba pʋsẽ." 
1Kings21:12 B moona no-loeere, b kɩtame t'a Nabot yi n yals neba taoore," 
1Kings21:13 tɩ nin-yood a yiibã yaool n wa, n zĩnd n togl a Nabot. La nin-yoodã rõd-a lame n yetẽ: «Yõa tʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnd la dĩma!» La b yiisa a Nabot tẽngã kɩrenga n lab-a kuga t'a ki." 
1Kings21:14 B tʋmame tɩ b yeel a Zezabɛl: «B laba a Nabot kug la a kiime.» 
1Kings21:15 A Zezabɛl sẽn wʋm tɩ b laba a Nabot kuga la a kiime, a yeela a Akab: «Yik-y n tɩ soog a Nabot, Zizreyɛl daoã, pʋʋgã, a ra zãgsa a kũuni la a koosgo, a ka le ket ne yõor ye, a kiime.»" 
1Kings21:16 A Akab sẽn wʋm t'a Nabot kiime, a yikame t'a na n sig n deeg a Nabot pʋʋgã n sooge." 
1Kings21:17 La Wẽnd goma ne Tisbe rao, a Eli n yeele:" 
1Kings21:18 «Yik n sigi n seg a Akab, Israyɛl dĩma sẽn be Samari. Ade, a bee a Nabot pʋʋgẽ wã, a siga be n na n soog pʋʋgã." 
1Kings21:19 Fo na n goma ne-a: ‹Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Ya f sẽn wẽ n kʋ wã yĩng la f geen tɩ f na lebg pʋʋga soaala?› F na yeel-a: ‹Ad Soaala koɛɛg: Baasã sẽn leg a Nabot zɩɩma zĩig ningã, zĩ-kãng la b na n leg fo meng zɩɩm.› »" 
1Kings21:20 A Akab yeela a Eli: «Foo n le seg maam, m bɛyã?» T'a Eli leoke: «N-yẽe, maam n le seg foom, tɩ f saka zãmbo la f maana sẽn ka sõmb Wẽnnaam nifẽ!" 
1Kings21:21 Ade, mam na n sika yel-beed fo zugu, m na pɩɩg f sagda zãng kas. Rao fãa sẽn be a Akab soolmẽ, yamb bɩ burkĩna, m na loog ne-a." 
1Kings21:22 Mam na kɩt tɩ f roog yɩ wala a Nebat biiga a Zeroboam roogo, la Ayiya biiga, a Basa roogo, fo sẽn puug m sũura yĩnga, fo sẽn luba a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ yĩnga.»" 
1Kings21:23 La Soaala-Wẽnd goma a Zezabɛl me yelle: «Baas na n wãba a Zezabɛl, Zizreyɛl tẽnga pʋgẽ." 
1Kings21:24 A Akab yira ned sẽn ki tẽnga pʋg fãa, baas n wãbd-a, la sẽn ki-a we-kɛɛnga, yĩngri luiili n dɩt-a.»" 
1Kings21:25 Sɩd-sɩda, ned pa zĩnd t'a wẽnema kolg a Akab wẽnem ye. A saka zãmbo n maan sẽn pa sõmb Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, la yaa a pag a Zezabɛl n kẽes-a moogo." 
1Kings21:26 A maana yel-yoodo la sẽn yɩɩd fãa, a pʋga wẽnd dãmba sẽn ka võore, wala Amoritsa sẽn da maande tɩ Wẽnd reeg b tẽng n kõ Israyɛl kamba." 
1Kings21:27 A Akab sẽn wʋm gom kãensã, a kẽega a fugu, n pil a meng ne sũ-pa-noang futu, n loe noore, n gãe tẽnga la a kẽnd soaala, soaala!" 
1Kings21:28 La Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne a Eli, Tisbe dao, n yetẽ: «Fo yãee a Akab sẽn sulg a meng seem ninga mam taoor bɩ?" 
1Kings21:29 A sẽn sulg a meng mam taoor woto yĩnga, ka a vɩɩm wakat la m na n wa ne yel-beeda ye. La yaa yẽ poore, a biig sẽn wat n dɩt naama wakato la m na n wa ne yel-beed a roog zugu.»" 
1Kings22:1 Pemsem paama yʋʋm a tã, zabr pa zĩnd Aram la a Israyɛl sʋk ye." 
1Kings22:2 Yʋʋm a tã wã, a Zozafat, Zɩɩda dĩma, wa n gesa Israyɛl dĩma." 
1Kings22:3 Israyɛl dĩma da yeela a poorẽ dãmba: «Yãmb miime tɩ Galaad-Ramot yaa tõnd soolem: La tõnd yaool n ka maan fɩ n le reeg-a Aram dĩma nugẽ ye.» 
1Kings22:4 La a soka a Zozafat: «Yãmb na n yãaga maam tɩ d kẽng n tɩ kaoog zabre Galaad-Ramot bɩ?» Tɩ Zɩɩda dĩma leok Israyɛl dĩma: «Tõnd na n yɩɩ bũmb a ye bala, maam ne foo, mam soolma rãmba na n yɩɩ fo soolem, mam wiidi wã na n yɩɩ fo rẽnna.»" 
1Kings22:5 La a Zozafat yeela Israyɛl dĩma: «Mam kotame tɩ y sok Soaala-Wẽnd n paam b koɛɛga.» 
1Kings22:6 Tɩ Israyɛl dĩma tigim a bãngdba na ta kobs-naase, n sok-ba: «M kẽng n tɩ kaoog zabre ne Galaad-Ramot bɩ m base?» Tɩ b leoke: «Kẽng-y tɩ Soaala na ning tẽngã dĩma nugẽ.»" 
1Kings22:7 A Zozafat yeelame: «Wẽnd bãngd ka ket ka tɩ d yõk a sɛɛg n paam Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg laa?» 
1Kings22:8 La Israyɛl dĩma leoka a Zozafat: «Ned a ye n kete tɩ d tõe n kudg-a kãntɩɩs n sok Soaala-Wẽnde, la mam kɩs-a lame, t'a zɩ n togs koɛɛg sẽn ya noog m yĩng ye, dẽnd beed bala; yaa a Yimla biiga, a Mise.» A Zozafat yeelame: «Y kabre, dĩma, da gom-y woto ye!»" 
1Kings22:9 Tɩ Israyɛl dĩma na n bool a sõgne n yeel-a: «Kẽng tao-tao n tɩ wa ne a Yimla biiga, a Mise!»" 
1Kings22:10 Israyɛl dĩma, a Akab la Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zozafat, da maneg yeelga fan-teedo, tɩ ned kam fãa zao a naam zaoore, vɩʋʋg ninga sẽn da be na-yira sɛɛga, n tees Samari rãmba sẽn tũud noor ning n kẽedẽ wã. B ra zĩndga bãngdba fãa b taoore tɩ ned kam fãa zɛɛgd ne a bãngr wilgri." 
1Kings22:11 A Kenaana biiga, a Sedekiyas, kuda kut yɩɩla, n yik n yeele: «Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Ne yɩɩl bãmbã, fo na n tãa Aramsã n kʋ-b zãnga!»" 
1Kings22:12 Bãngdba fãa da gomdame n lebd zĩ-yɛnga n yetẽ: «Aya! Yik-y, kẽng-y Galaad-Ramot, tɩ y na maan raoodo, Wẽnd na rɩk-a n sagl dĩma nugẽ.»" 
1Kings22:13 B sẽn da tʋm dao ninga t'a tɩ bool a Mise wã da gomda ne-a n yetẽ: «Gese, bãndgba fãa goama yaa a yembre, bãmb fãa yaa zelemd a ye n kãabd dĩma noogo. Bɩ fo me toagsga wẽneg bãmb rẽnna. Yiis koɛɛg sẽn ya noogo!»" 
1Kings22:14 T'a Mise na n leok-a: «M wẽen ne Wẽnde, tɩ b sẽn yeel bũmb ning bal la m na n togse!»" 
1Kings22:15 A sẽn ta dĩma nengẽ, dĩma sok-a lame: «Mise, d tõe n kẽng n tɩ kaooga zabre Galaad-Ramot bɩ d ka tõe?» T'a leoke: «N-yẽe! Kẽng-y tɩ y na tɩ tõoge, Soaala na n sagla tẽnga dĩma nugẽ.»" 
1Kings22:16 La dĩma yeelame: «Mise m na n kudg-f la kãntɩɩga naoor a wãna, tɩ f togs-m sɩd bala, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga?»" 
1Kings22:17 T'a Mise na n yeele: «Mam yãee a Israyɛl kamba sẽn sẽeg tãng zugu, wa piis sẽn pa le tar pe-kɩɩma; tɩ Soaala yeel maam: ‹Nin-bãmba ka le tar Soaal ye; bɩ ned kam fãa leb a tẽngẽ ne laafi!› »" 
1Kings22:18 Israyɛl dĩma yeela Zɩɩda dĩma: «Mam da pa pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ nin-kãnga zɩ n togs koɛɛg sẽn noome, dẽnd beed bala!»" 
1Kings22:19 La a Mise le paasame: «Bɩ f kelg Wẽnd gomde. Mam yãee Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b zao b zaoorẽ, tɩ b na-yir dãmba fãa da yɛs bãmb sɛɛgẽ, rɩtgo la goabga." 
1Kings22:20 La Naaba-Wẽnd sokame: ‹Ãnd n na n belg a Akab t'a kẽng Galaad-Ramot n tɩ ki?› La yõa soab yeela woto, tɩ yõa soab me yeel woto." 
1Kings22:21 Wakat kãng marsã, la Wẽnd sõsd-n-taag a ye wa n yals b taoore n yeele: ‹Maam n na n belg-a.› Tɩ Wẽnd sok-a: ‹Fo na n maana a wãna?›" 
1Kings22:22 T'a leoke: ‹Mam na n kẽngame n tɩ pʋdg-a bãngdba fãa sẽn be-b ka wã zirẽ-beeda yama.› Tɩ Wẽnd leoke: ‹Kẽng n tɩ belg-a, tɩ m kõt-f la rẽ tõogo. Kẽng n tɩ belg-a.›" 
1Kings22:23 Ade, bãng tɩ bãngdba fãa gill noor sã n togsd zirẽ, yaa Wẽnd meng sẽn pa gom noog f yĩnga la b pa rat n togs fo.»" 
1Kings22:24 A Sedekiyas, a Kenaana biiga, kolgame, n wẽ a Mise pɛka n yetẽ: «Wẽnd tũu yɛɛnẽ n yi n bas maam, n gom ne foom?»" 
1Kings22:25 T'a Mise leok-a: «Fo na bãng rẽndã, daar ninga f sẽn wat n zoet n kẽed f rotẽ n na n soonde.»" 
1Kings22:26 Israyɛl dĩma yeelame: «Bɩ b yõk a Mise n tɩ kɩs a Amon, tẽnga naaba, la na-biiga, a Zoas," 
1Kings22:27 la yeel-ba: Dĩma noor la woto: sui-y nin kãnga bi-bees roogo, n kõt-a buri la ko-zaalga n zems bala, n gũud m sẽn na n lebg ne laafi.»" 
1Kings22:28 T'a Mise leok-a: «Fo sã n lebg ne laafi, bɩ f bãng tɩ ka Wẽnd n gomd ne mam noor ye.»" 
1Kings22:29 Israyɛl dĩma ne a Zozafat, Zɩɩda dĩma kẽnga zabre Galaad-Ramot." 
1Kings22:30 Israyɛl dĩma yeela a Zozafat: «Mam na n teema m fut n kẽng zabre, la yãmba, bɩ y yeelg y naama fuug.» La Israyɛl dĩma teema a fut, n kẽng zabre." 
1Kings22:31 Mik Siri dĩma dag n kõ-la a bilim-bilma nanams pis-tã la a tã wã noore, a ra yeel-b lame: «Da kaoog-y zabre ne nin naaba bɩ ne talg ye, maan-y zabre ne Israyɛl dĩma bala.»" 
1Kings22:32 Bilim-bilma nanams sẽn yãe a Zozafat bala, b yeelame: «Sãmbg ka ye, a Israyɛl dĩma la yõa.» La b kolgame tɩ b na n kʋ-a. T'a Zozafat tãs a zabr tãsga." 
1Kings22:33 Nanamsã sẽn bãng tɩ ka Israyɛl dĩma, b loogame n bas-a." 
1Kings22:34 La dao a yembre yãaga a tãpo n tão yaar bala, tɩ yõk a Akab, Israyɛl dĩma, kuta fuug sogb zĩiga; t'a yeel a wed-kɩɩma: «Wẽnemd ka tɩ m yi zabra sʋka, tɩ m paama sãmpogre.»" 
1Kings22:35 Zabra wɩnga badaare, tɩ b kong n bas Israyɛl dĩma a bilim-bilma pʋga, n tees Aram; a kii zaabre, a zɩɩma da raaga bilim-bilma pʋga." 
1Kings22:36 Wĩndg sẽn kẽ, b kelma zĩis fãa: «Ned kam fãa leb a tẽngẽ. Ned kam fãa leb a ba yiri," 
1Kings22:37 tɩ dĩma maana kaalem!» Dĩma kũuma poore, b tall-a lame n wa Samari la be la b mum-a." 
1Kings22:38 B peka bilim-bilma Samari bãka pʋga. Baas lega a Akab zɩɩma. A zɩɩma kalma ne pʋg-yoadba sẽn wa n so koom beelẽ wã rẽgdo, la Wẽnd da pĩnd n togsa rẽnna." 
1Kings22:39 A Akab tʋʋm a taabã, a sẽn maan fãa, wob-yẽna roogã, ne tẽnsã a sẽn me wã, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings22:40 A Akab tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, t'a biiga, a Akaziyas led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings22:41 A Zozafat, a Asa biiga deega a Zɩɩda naam, a Akab, a Israyɛl dĩma naam yʋʋmd a naas soaba." 
1Kings22:42 A Zozafat sẽn wa n dɩt naam, t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu. A rɩɩ yʋʋm pisi la a nu Zerizalɛɛm. A ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Azuba, a Sili biiga." 
1Kings22:43 A kell n dɩka a ba, a Asa, sẽn tũ sor ningã, la a pa tol n bʋdg moog ye, la a maana sẽn ya tɩrga Wẽnd nifẽ." 
1Kings22:44 La baasgo, pʋʋsga roto sẽn da be tãmsa zutã pa menem ye, neba da ket n kẽnd n kʋʋda maand be la b wisd tɩdare." 
1Kings22:45 A Zozafat yẽsa ne Israyɛl dĩma tɩ laafi zĩnd b sʋka. 
1Kings22:46 A Zozafat tʋʋm a taaba, a raoodã a sẽn maan zabrẽ, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
1Kings22:47 Yoaadba sẽn da ket-b tẽngã, al a ba, a Asa, zamaanẽ, a pɩɩg-b la zãng fãa n yiis a soolem pʋgẽ." 
1Kings22:48 Wakat kãng tɩ dĩm da ka le be Edom tẽng ye. 
1Kings22:49 A Zozafat kɩtame tɩ b maan Tarsis koom-kogend n na n kẽng Ofir n tɩ wa ne sãnem; la b pa tõog n kẽng ye, tɩ koglga wesga Esiõ-Gebɛr." 
1Kings22:50 A Akaziyas, a Akab biigã, yeel a Zozafat: «Bɩ mam tʋʋm-tʋmdba lagem ne yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmdba n dugs koom-kogendã.»" 
1Kings22:51 La a Zozafat pa sak ye. A Zozafat tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a a saamba, a Daviid, na-tẽngẽ, t'a biiga a Zoram led a zaoorẽ." 
1Kings22:52 A Akaziyas, a Akab biigã, rɩ Israyɛl naam Samari, a Zozafat, a Zɩɩda dĩma naam yʋʋmd piig la a yopoe soaba; a rɩɩ Israyɛl naam yʋʋm a yi." 
1Kings22:53 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Wẽnd nifẽ; a tũ-la a ba la a ma sore, la a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, sore, sẽn lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ." 
1Kings22:54 A waooga a Baal la a wõgemda a taoore, a puuga Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sũuri wala a ba sẽn maane." 
2Kings1:1 Dĩma a Akab poore, Moab zãgsame t'a kõn le kẽe a Israyɛl ye." 
2Kings1:2 A Akaziyas zĩnda a roog noorẽ kogsre n lʋɩ n pogle, Samari tẽnga. La a tʋma neba n yeel-ba: «Bɩ y kẽng-y n tɩ sok a Baal-Zebub, Ekrõ wẽn-naandã, n ges m na n tɩlga ne m sãmpogrã bɩ m ka na n tɩlge?»" 
2Kings1:3 Soaala Malɛk yeela a Eli, Tisbe rao: «Yik n seg Samari dĩma sẽn tʋm b rãmba la f yeel-ba: ‹Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n ka le be Israyɛl pʋgẽ bɩ bõe tɩ y na n tɩ sok a Baal-Zebub, Ekrõ tẽng wẽn-naandã?›" 
2Kings1:4 Dẽnd yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Fo sẽn dʋ gãag ninga zugã, fo kõn le sig ye. Sɩd ne sɩda, fo na n kiime.› » La a Eli loogame." 
2Kings1:5 Dĩma sẽn tʋm b rãmbã leba a Akaziyas nengẽ t'a sok-ba: «Bõe yĩng tɩ yãmb lɛɛg n wa?» 
2Kings1:6 Tɩ b leoke: «Dao a ye n seg tõndo n yeel tõndo: ‹Leb-y dĩma sẽn tʋma yãmba nengẽ, la y yeel-a: Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n ka le be Israyɛl tẽng bɩ tɩ f tʋm tɩ b tɩ sok a Baal-Zebub, Ekrõ tẽng wẽn-naandã? Woto wã, fo sẽn dʋ gãag ninga zugã, f kõn le sig ye. Sɩd-sɩda fo na n kiime.› »" 
2Kings1:7 A Akaziyas sok-b lame: «Dao ninga sẽn sega yãmb n gom woto ne yãmba da yaa wãna?» 
2Kings1:8 Tɩ b leoke: «Yaa dao sẽn da yer fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdo la yaa gãong n da mobg a sɛɛga.» A Akaziyas yeelame: «Yaa a Eli, Tisbe daoã!»" 
2Kings1:9 Dĩma tʋma a nengẽ tãnsoab ne a neb pis-nu. Tãnsoaba babsa a Eli. A ra zao Karmɛl tãnga zug tẽnsʋka. Tãnsoaba yeel-a lame: «Wẽnd neda, dĩma tɩ y sig n wa!»" 
2Kings1:10 A Eli yeela tãb-biis pis-nu tãnsoaba: «M sã sɩd yaa Wẽnd neda, bɩ bugum yi saag zugu n dɩ-fo, foom ne f neb pis-nu wã!» La bugum yii saag zugu n dɩ tãnsoaba ne a neb pis-nu wã." 
2Kings1:11 Tɩ dĩma le tʋm tãb-biis pis-nu tãnsoaba a to ne a neb pis-nu. Tãnsoaba yeela a Eli: «Wẽnnaam neda, naab tɩ y sig tao-tao koe!»" 
2Kings1:12 T'a Eli leoke: «M sã n ya Wẽnnaam neda bɩ bugum yi saaga zugu n dɩ-fo, foom ne f neb pis-nu wã!» La bugum yii saag zugu n dɩ tãnsoaba ne a neb pis-nu wã." 
2Kings1:13 Dĩma le tʋma tãb-biis pis-nu tãnsoaba, naoor a tãab soaba. Tãnsoaba babsa a Eli la a sẽn ta, a yĩgimda a Eli taoore, n yõk a sɛɛga n yeel-a: «Wẽnnaam neda, bɩ y ges wa sẽn zem bũmbu maam la m neb pis-nu wã vɩɩm!" 
2Kings1:14 Ade bugum yii yĩngri n dɩ tãb-biis pis-nu nanams a yi ne b neba. Marsã, y kabre! Bɩ m vɩɩma la m tãb-biisa vɩɩm wẽneg bũmb sẽn tar yõod y nifẽ.»" 
2Kings1:15 Soaala malɛka yeela a Eli: «Tũ daoã n sigi la f da zoe rabeem ye!» A Eli yikame la a tũ-a lame n leb dĩma nengẽ, n yeel-a:" 
2Kings1:16 «Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga la woto: Fo sẽn tʋm neb a Baal-Zebub, Ekrõ wẽn-naanda nengẽ wala Wẽnd n kongd Israyɛl sẽn tõe n leok fooma, ade, fo sẽn dʋ gãag ninga zʋgã, fo kõn sig ye, tɩ fo na n kiime, dẽ yaa vẽenega.»" 
2Kings1:17 A Akaziyas kiime, wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da togs a Eli, t'a yao a Zoram deeg naam n led-a zaoorẽ, t'a da ka tar biig ye. La yɩ-la a Zozafat biiga, a Zoram, Zɩɩda dĩma naamẽ, a naama yʋʋmd a yiib soaba." 
2Kings1:18 A Akaziyas tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maan bũmb ninga, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings2:1 Ad bũmb ning sẽn maane Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wa n kɩt t'a Eli tũ sɩlmand n dʋ yĩngrã. Sega yẽ ne a Elize sẽn waa n zãagd ne Gilgal," 
2Kings2:2 t'a Eli yeel a Elize: «Kabre! La kell n yaas kaalẽ, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tʋm-m-la al Betɛl.» La a Elize leokame: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd la ne yãmb menga, tɩ mam kõn serg n bas yãmb ye!» B tũu taab n ta Betɛl." 
2Kings2:3 Bãngdba karen-biis sẽn da be Betɛl yii n sega a Elize n sok-a: «Yãmb bãngame tɩ dũnna Soaala-Wẽnd na n dɩka y zu-soabã n loog ne b yĩngri bɩ?» T'a leoke: «Mam me miime, bɩ y da le gom ye!»" 
2Kings2:4 A Eli yeela a Elize: «Bɩ f pa kaalẽ tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tʋm-m-la Zeriko bala.» T'a Elize leoke: «M wẽend ne Wẽnde, la ne yãmb menga, tɩ m kõn serg n bas yãmb ye!» B tũ taab n kẽng Zeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Bãngdba karen-biis sẽn da be Zeriko, bãmb me kolg n soka a Elize: «Yãmb bãngame tɩ dũnna Soaala-Wẽnd na n dɩka y zu-soabã n loog ne b yĩngri bɩ?» T'a leok-ba: «Mam me miime, bɩ y da le gom ye!»" 
2Kings2:6 A Eli yeel-a lame: «Bɩ f yaas kaalẽ tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tʋm-m-la Zʋrdẽ.» La a leokame: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd la ne yãmb menga, tɩ mam kõn serg n bas yãmb ye!» Bãmb b yiib le rɩka sore." 
2Kings2:7 Bãngdba karen-biis pis-nu yõsg-b lame n tɩ yals b taoore, yɩɩga, tɩ bãmb b yiib yaool n yɛs Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga noore." 
2Kings2:8 A Eli yeega a fuug n kʋ n dɩk n wẽ kooma t'a welg rɩtg la goabga, tɩ bãmb tab tẽn-koɛɛnga n dʋʋge." 
2Kings2:9 B sẽn waa n dʋʋgd kʋɩlgã, a Eli yeela a Elize: «Sok n ges yaa bõe la m na n maan f yĩnga tɩ m nan ka loog n bas-fo?» T'a Elize leoke: «Pʋdg-y maam y yama, la m pʋɩɩr yɩ pidungu.»" 
2Kings2:10 T'a Eli leoke: «Fo kota bũmb sẽn ya toogo; b sã n wa loogd ne maam tɩ fo yɛs n getẽ, f na pam f sẽn kotã, la kõn yɩ boto f sã n ka yãend-m ye.»" 
2Kings2:11 Bãmb sẽn da kẽnd la b sõsd ne taaba, bugum bilim-bilm la bugum wiidi n waa n welg-b ne taaba, t'a Eli tũ sɩlmand n dʋ yĩngri." 
2Kings2:12 A Elize da ne-a lame la a kelemdẽ: «M ba, m ba, a Israyɛl bilim-bilm la a wed-dʋʋdb tãnsoaba!» A waa n pa le ne-a ye; la a taka a fuug n kẽeg a yiibu;" 
2Kings2:13 A rɩka fuugã sẽn da paag a Eli bãgdo n lʋɩ wã, n lɛɛg n wa Zʋrdẽ n yals kʋɩlga noor." 
2Kings2:14 A rɩka a Eli fuugã n wẽ kooma n yetẽ: «Soaala-Wẽnde, a Eli Wẽnda bɛɛ?» Yẽ me wẽe kooma t'a welg rɩtg la goabga t'a rʋʋge." 
2Kings2:15 Bãngdba karen-biis sẽn yi-b Zeriko la sẽn da yɛs n getẽ yãenda a Elize sẽn maana la b yeelame: «A Eli pãnga siga a Elize zugu.» B kẽngame n tɩ seg-a la b wõgemda tẽnga, a taoore." 
2Kings2:16 B yeel-a lame: «Ad-y neb pis-nu sẽn tar raoodo n paas tõnd y yemsã n be ka. Bas-y tɩ d saag n bao y zu-soabã. Tõe tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga dɩk-b lame n tɩ bas tãng ninga zug bɩ longẽ.» T'a Elize leok-ba: «Da tʋm-y ned ye!» 
2Kings2:17 B sẽn da ket n tar-a pẽdgre yĩnga a yeel-b lame: «Bɩ y tʋm neb!» B tʋma neb pis-nu wã tɩ b bao a Eli dasem a tã la b pa yãe-a ye. 
2Kings2:18 Tɩ b lebg n wa bʋʋg a Elize sẽn da be Zeriko, n togs, t'a yeel-ba: «Mam da pa pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ ra kẽng bɩ!»" 
2Kings2:19 Tẽnga rãmba wa n yeela a Elize: «Wala d zu-soaba sẽn ne wã, tẽnga zĩndgu bee neere, la yaa kooma bal n pa sõmbe, n sãamd dogem.»" 
2Kings2:20 A Elize yeelame: «Wa-y ne lengre paalga la yamsem.» 
2Kings2:21 Tɩ b tall n wa. A Elize kẽnga kooma sẽn da bund zĩig ninga, n yãk yamsem n lob koomẽ wã n yeele:" 
2Kings2:22 «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Mam manega kooma t'a lebg sõngo, a kõn le wa ne kũum, a kõn le sãam dogem ye!» La kooma lebga sõmbo n ta ne rũnna, wala a Elize sẽn yeele." 
2Kings2:23 A Elize yii be b dʋ Betɛl, la a sẽn da wa n dʋʋda, kamb yii tẽng pʋgẽ n laad-a n yetẽ: «Zug kõoga rʋ! Zug koella rʋ!»" 
2Kings2:24 T'a Elize wẽneg poorẽ n ges-ba, n kãab-b beed ne Wẽnde. La rũms a yi toolem sẽn yɩɩd gɩgemde yii kãoongẽ n wãb bãmb pis-naas la a yi." 
2Kings2:25 A Elize yii be n kẽng Karmɛl tãngã la a yaool n lebg n waa Samari. 
2Kings3:1 A Akab biiga, a Zoram, yɩɩ Israyɛl dĩm Samari. Yɩɩ Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zozafat wakatẽ, a sẽn waa n dɩt a yʋʋm piig la a nii naam. A Zoram rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yi." 
2Kings3:2 A sẽn maana yɩɩ wẽng Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ. Baasgo, a wẽnema ka ta a ba la a ma rẽnd ye. A vika Baal kug peesma a ba sẽn da lugli." 
2Kings3:3 A yam pa tol n lak ne yel-wẽnd ning a Nebat biig a Zeroboam sẽn da kɩt t'a Israyɛl lʋɩ a soab pʋgẽ wã ye. Bũmb pa woog ye. 
2Kings3:4 Moab dĩm, a Mesa, da gʋʋnda rũmsi, la yʋʋmd fãa, a ra yaooda a Israyɛl dĩma fadgo ne pe-kõbdo. Yaa pe-bi tus koabga la pe-raad tus koabg rẽnna." 
2Kings3:5 A Akab kũum poore, Moab dĩma zãgsame t'a kõn le yao a Israyɛl dĩma bũmb ye." 
2Kings3:6 Dẽ la a Zoram yi Samari n saag n sõd a Israyɛl gilli. 
2Kings3:7 A tɩ kɩtame tɩ b yeel Zɩɩda dĩm, a Zozafat: «Moab dĩma tõdga m noore, f na n tũ-m lame tɩ d tɩ tak zabr ne-a bɩ?» T'a yeele: «Mam na n tũume. Ad tõnd na n yɩɩ bũmb a ye bala, maam ne foom, mam soolma rãmb na n yɩɩ wa fo soolem, mam wiida na n yɩɩ wa fo rẽnna.»" 
2Kings3:8 La a le yeelame: «D tũuda so-bʋgo n kẽnge?» T'a leoke: «Edom we-raooga sore!» 
2Kings3:9 Israyɛl dĩma, Zɩɩda dĩma la Edom dĩma loogame. B sẽn kẽne, b maana rasem a yopoe la koom waa n paooga tãb-biisã la rũmsã sẽn da pʋgd-b ne teedã." 
2Kings3:10 Tɩ Israyɛl dĩma yeele: «M ba yeee! Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n tigim tõndo, dĩm dãmba a tã, n na n dɩk-do n sagl Moabitsa nugẽ»" 
2Kings3:11 T'a Zozafat soke: «Wẽnd bãngd a ye ka be ka, tɩ d tũ a maasem n sok Soaala-Wẽnd laa?» La Israyɛl dĩma na-yir-dao n leoke: «A Elize, a Safat biigã, n be ka la yẽ ne a Eli n da zemsd taaba.»" 
2Kings3:12 Tɩ Zɩɩda dĩm yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd bee ne-a n gomd ne-a.» Israyɛl dĩma, Zɩɩda dĩma, la Edom dĩma kẽnga a Elize nengẽ." 
2Kings3:13 A Elize yeela Israyɛl dĩma: «M toogo be ne foom? Kẽng n tɩ bʋʋg f ba wã la f ma wã wẽn-faada bãngdba.» Dẽ la Israyɛl dĩma leok yã: «Ayey! Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd meng b toore n bool tõnd d tãabo, n na n dɩk-d n sagl Moab rãmb nusẽ.»" 
2Kings3:14 A Elize yeelame: «M wẽend ne Naaba-Wẽnde, pãng rãmba Zu-soaba, m sẽn tũudã, tɩ m sã n da ka ningdẽ sʋka, Zɩɩda dĩm, a Zozafat, m kõn kelg f leokr ba a ye, m kõn ges-f ne m nif meng ye!" 
2Kings3:15 Ges marsã n bao yɩɩn-yɩɩnd a ye sẽn mi yɩɩla n kõ-ma!» Yʋʋmba sẽn waa n yɩɩnẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd nug tika a Elize," 
2Kings3:16 t'a yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Kẽ-y sudga pʋga n tu bogd wa y sẽn dat tɛka! 
2Kings3:17 Wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn togsde, yãmb nif kõn yãend sobgo, a kõn yãend saag ye, la sudga na n pida ne koom, tɩ y yũ, yãmb ne y tãb-biisi la y rũmsi." 
2Kings3:18 La rẽ yaa wa zaalem, n ka tõe n mak ne b sẽn na n dɩk a Moab n sagl y nugẽ wã ye." 
2Kings3:19 Yãmb na n pãbame n sẽeg b tẽnsã sẽn gũbg ne lalse, la b tẽn-bɛdã; yãmb na n kɛɛ b tɩ-rɩtsa fãa, yãmb na n yẽda b bulsa fãa, yãmb na n wʋka kug n sam b pʋtã n sãam ba.»" 
2Kings3:20 Beoog sẽn vẽege, maoonga kʋʋb wakato, koom fõda Edom n wa yʋgemd tẽngã zãnga." 
2Kings3:21 Moabitsa sẽn da wʋm tɩ dĩm dãmba sũu taaba n wat n na n tak zabr ne bãmba, boola neb niyns fãa sẽn da tõe n bob zab teedo, kom-bɩɩba la neb yʋʋm sẽn paam n fisgi, la b tɩ yalsa tẽnga toaagẽ." 
2Kings3:22 Dɩlla b sẽn nek yibeoogo la b ne wĩndgã sẽn yãgd koom zugu, Moabitsa yãendame tɩ kooma rɩga b taoor miuug wa zɩɩm." 
2Kings3:23 B yeelame: «Yaa zɩɩm! Daare dĩm dãmba wõoga b sʋʋse n zab n kɛ taaba. Aya, Moab kamba, d zoe marsã n tɩ zɛ d zɛɛbo!»" 
2Kings3:24 La bãmb sẽn kolg Israyɛl kamba tãb-sika, a Israyɛl kamb yik n kaooga zabre ne bãmb n tõog-ba, tɩ b zoe. B kell n pʋg-b-la b tẽngẽ n kʋ-ba." 
2Kings3:25 B luba tẽnsa lalse, tɩ ned kam fãa wʋk kug n lob b pʋtẽ, n yẽd b bulsã, n kɛ b tɩ-rɩtsã. Kir-Aresɛt bal n wa n kelle, tɩ loobsa rãmb gũbg-a n lob-a kuga." 
2Kings3:26 Moab dĩma sẽn mik tɩ zabrã yɩɩda a pãnga, a yãka neb kobs-yopoe sẽn bob sʋʋse la b yii ne pãnga n na n bʋʋg Edom dĩma, la b pa tõog ye." 
2Kings3:27 Woto wã, a yõka a bi-kẽenga, sẽn da tog n led-a a zaoorẽ wã, n kodg-a, n maan maoong lalga zugu, la nebã yika beem menga ne Israyɛl kamba tɩ b bas Moab dĩma n zoe n leb b tẽnsẽ." 
2Kings4:1 Daar a ye, bãngdba karen-biig a ye paga n wa n yõk a Elize sɛɛga n yetẽ: «Mam sɩda maana yõore la yãmb mi t'a ra zoeta Naaba-Wẽnde; la ade, a da rɩɩ ned samde t'a soaba wa n na n deeg m kamb a yi n maan a yemse.»" 
2Kings4:2 T'a Elize leok-a: «Bõe la m tõe n maan n sõng-fo? Bɩ f wilg-ma f sẽn tar f zakẽ.» Tɩ paga leoke: «Mam ka tar bũmb m yir sã n ka yũ-noog kaam bilf bala m sẽn tar n zɛɛd m yĩnga.» 
2Kings4:3 T'a Elize yeele: «Kẽng n tɩ peng f yags la-vɩɩdo, wa f sẽn tõe tɛka." 
2Kings4:4 Dẽ poore, kẽ f roogẽ, foom ne f kamba, lɛɛg n pag roogã, la f pʋdg laasã fãa kaam tɩ pidi tɩ f bĩng kɛɛnga.»" 
2Kings4:5 Paga yi-la a Elize nengẽ. A sẽn ta yiri, a tɩ pag a meng ne a kamba roogẽ, tɩ kamba kɩt-a laasã t'a pʋdgd kaama." 
2Kings4:6 Laasã wa n pidame t'a yeel a biiga: «Le wa ne a to!» Tɩ biiga leoke: «Laag ka ket vɩʋʋg ye!» 
2Kings4:7 Wakat kãnga kaama yõkame. Paga tɩ togsa Wẽnnaam nedã, t a yeel-a: «Kẽng n tɩ koos kaama n yao f samdã, la foom ne f kamba rɩ ligda sẽn na n kellã.»" 
2Kings4:8 Daar a ye, a Elize waa n looda Sunem tẽnga. Pag a ye nug sẽn da zãad bool-a lame t'a wa rɩ. Rẽ tɛka a Elize sã n da tũud tẽnga fãa, be la a ra kẽnd n dɩtẽ." 
2Kings4:9 Paga waa n yeela a sɩda: «Gese mam miime tɩ nin-kãnga sẽn tũud tõnd nengẽ daar fãa wã yaa Wẽnnaam nin-sõngo. 
2Kings4:10 Wa tɩ d me ro-bil bɛoonga zug n kõ-a, la d ning rooga pʋga: gãaga, te-roagendga, goeele la fitila, t'a sã n mii n wat tõnd yiri bɩ a kẽed be.»" 
2Kings4:11 Daar a ye, a Elize waa yirã n dʋ yĩngr doogã n gãande." 
2Kings4:12 A yeela a sõgna, a Geazi: «Bool Sunem pʋg-sõngã n kõ-ma.» Tɩ sõgna tɩ bool paga tɩ paga wa yals sõgna taoore." 
2Kings4:13 A Elize yeela a sõgna: «Gom ne paga woto: Fo waooga tõnd ne bũmb wʋsgo, bõe la m tõe n maan f yĩnga? Koɛɛg be sẽn na leok dĩma bɩ tãnsoaba f yĩng bɩ?» La paga leokame: «Mam bee ne m buudu n vɩ bãane.»" 
2Kings4:14 T'a Elize le sok a rakõorã: «Bõe la d tõe n maan a yĩnga?» A Geazi leokame: «Ade, paga pa tar biig ye, la a sɩda kʋʋlame.»" 
2Kings4:15 A Elize yeelame: «Bool-a t'a wa ka!» Tɩ sõgna bool pagã t'a wa yals dignoorẽ. 
2Kings4:16 T'a Elize yeele: «Vẽere, sasa kãnga, fo na n mobga biiga f nugẽ.» La paga yeelame: «Ayo! M naaba, ra belg-y yãmb yem-poakã n gom sẽn pa sɩd ye!»" 
2Kings4:17 Paga yaool n wa rɩka pʋga n dog bi-ribla, la yɩɩ sasa ning a Elize sẽn da wilgã." 
2Kings4:18 Biiga tol n bɩɩme. Daar a ye, tigsg wakato, a babsa a ba pʋʋgẽ." 
2Kings4:19 A waa n kelmame: «M zug wɛɛ, m zugu!» La biiga ba yeela a sõgne t'a tall-a n tɩ kɩs a ma." 
2Kings4:20 Tɩ sõgna tall biigã n kẽng a ma nengẽ; la biigã kell n paa a ma naoẽ tɩ ta wĩnto-sʋk t'a na n yaool n ki. 
2Kings4:21 La a ma rʋ n gãneg-a-la Wẽnnaam neda gãag zugu n n lɛɛg n yi n pag roogo. 
2Kings4:22 A bool a sɩda n yeele: «Tʋm-y sõgen t'a wa ne m bõn-yãanga tɩ m wudg ta Wẽnnaam neda nengẽ la m lebg n wa.» 
2Kings4:23 T'a sɩda sok-a: «Bõe tɩ f rat rũnna n ta a nengẽ? Ka ki-paalg kibsa, ka vʋʋsg raar me ye.» Dẽ la paga yeel yã: «Da-bʋ rẽ poorẽ ye!»" 
2Kings4:24 A kɩtame tɩ b loe bõanga gaare, la a yeela sõgna: «Tall-ma, kẽne la ra tek n yaas sorẽ tɩ m pa kõ-f sor ye!»" 
2Kings4:25 A rɩka sore, n tɩ ta Wẽnnaam neda nengẽ, Karmɛl tãnga. La Wẽnnaam neda yãee-a lame t'a nan ket yɩɩga, t'a yeel a sõgna Geazi: «Ad Sunem pagã," 
2Kings4:26 bɩ f zoe n tɩ seg-a, la f sok-a: ‹F bee laafi, f sɩd bee laafi, f biig bee laafi?› » La pagã leokame: «Laafi bala!»" 
2Kings4:27 La a sẽn bʋʋg Wẽnnaam nedã, tãnga zugu, a gãda a karsã, t'a Geazi kolg n na n kɩt t'a serge. Tɩ Wẽnnaam neda yeel-a: «Bas-a t'a sɩɩga tara toogo; Soaala-Wẽnd solg-m-la rẽnna n pa togs-m ye.»" 
2Kings4:28 Tɩ pagã na n yeele: «Maam n kos-y biiga bɩ, m naaba? Mam pa pĩnd n yeel yãmb tɩ y ra belg maam bɩ?»" 
2Kings4:29 A Elize yeela a Geazi: «Yiki, deeg m dasaarã f nugẽ, n looge! F sã seg ned bɩ f da pʋʋs a ye, la ned pʋʋs-f bɩ f da leok-a ye. Dogl m dasaarã biiga nenga.»" 
2Kings4:30 La biiga ma yeelame: «M wẽend ne Wẽnde la ne yãmb menga, tɩ mam kõn serg n bas yãmb ye!» La a Elize yik n pʋga pagã." 
2Kings4:31 A Geazi da renga bãmb taoore, la a tɩ gãnega dasaarã biiga nenga, la wõo menga ka wʋm ye, la bũmb ka maan ye; t'a lɛɛg n wa bʋʋg a Elize n yeele: «Biiga pa nek ye.»" 
2Kings4:32 A Elize taa yiri, n mik tɩ biiga ra kiime n dig a meng gãagẽ." 
2Kings4:33 A Elize kẽeme n lɛɛg n pag yẽ ne biiga, roogẽ, n yõk Soaala-Wẽnd pʋʋsgo." 
2Kings4:34 A Elize dʋʋ gãaga zugu n gãand n bʋʋg biigã, n dɩk a noor n togle biiga noore, a nin n togl a nini, a nus n bogl a nusi, n tẽeg a meng n bʋʋg biigã la biiga yĩns wɩngame." 
2Kings4:35 A Elize sigame n kẽnd tẽnga, n gõod dooga pʋga, n pɩkd ka la ka, n le wa rʋ n gãand n bʋʋg biigã tɩ biiga tĩs naoor a yopoe, n puk a nini." 
2Kings4:36 La a Elize boola a Geazi n yeel-a: «Bool Sunem pʋg-sõngã.» 
2Kings4:37 T'a Geazi bool-a t'a wa sak a Elize. T'a Elize yeele: «Dɩk f biigã.» Pagã kẽeme n wõgemd a taoore n fõgneg a neng tẽnga n yaool n dɩk a biig n yi. 
2Kings4:38 A Elize lɛɛg n waa Gilgal. Kom n da be tẽngã. Bãngdba karen-biis wa n zĩ-la a Elize taoore, t'a yeel a sõgna: «Bɩ f rʋgl rʋg-bedrã n dʋg zẽedo, bãndgba karen-biis yĩnga.»" 
2Kings4:39 Bãmb nin-yend kẽnga we-kɛɛnga n tɩ bao zẽedo. La a yãee bũmb wa no-raoog-kʋmba t'a tõs n yondg a fuugu, n wa bog ba n dɩk n los zẽeda rʋkẽ. Ned ba a ye ra ka mi a sẽn wa ne bũmb ninga ye." 
2Kings4:40 B tẽgna neba zẽedã tɩ b yʋbe; b sẽn lem zẽedã b kelmame n yetẽ: «Wẽnnaam nedã, ad zẽnem n be rʋka pʋga!» La b ka tõog n dɩ ye." 
2Kings4:41 T'a Elize yeele: «Tall-y zom n wa kõ-ma!» La a yãk n loba rʋkẽ wã n yeele: «Yãk-y n kõ nebã, tɩ b rɩ.» La zẽnem buud ka le kell rʋka pʋgẽ ye." 
2Kings4:42 Dao a yembre n yi Baal-Salisa. A waa n kõo Wẽnnaam nedã korgo ne kood rẽems buri. Yaa alkam kɛgeng bur pisi sẽn wẽ ne zom paalga. 
2Kings4:43 T'a Elize yeel a sõgna: «Pʋɩ neba tɩ b wãbe!» La a sõgna leokame: «M na n yɩɩ wãna n pʋɩ woto neb sẽn ta koabga?» T'a Elize le paase: «Pʋɩ-b tɩ b wãbe! Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹B na n dɩɩme la na n kellame.› » 
2Kings4:44 Sõgna pʋɩɩ nebã. B rɩɩme la kellame wala Soaala Wẽnd sẽn da yeele. 
2Kings5:1 Siri dĩma tãnsoaba, a Naama, yamleoog ra kẽ-la a zu-soabã. Dĩma sɩd da nong-a-la wʋsgo, tɩ da tũu ne yẽnda tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd fãag Siri dãmba. Tãnsoaba sẽn da pid ne raoodã da bẽeda yĩng bãaga." 
2Kings5:2 La Siri dãmba da kẽnga fãabo n tɩ peeg a Israyɛl tẽng bi-pugla n maan yem-poaka, t'a ra tʋmd a Naama paga roogẽ." 
2Kings5:3 Bi-pugla yeela a zu-soaba paga: «M zu-soaba sã n da tõe n taẽ bãngda sẽn be Samari wã nengẽ, a ra na yols-a ne a bãagã.»" 
2Kings5:4 T'a Naama kẽng n tɩ togs a zu-soaba woto: «Israyɛl tẽng bi-pugl n gom woto la woto.» 
2Kings5:5 La Siri dĩma leok-a lame: «Bɩ f kẽng tɩ m na tool Israyɛl dĩma sebre.» La a Naama kẽngame. A zɩɩ wanzurf sẽn ta neb piig la a nu zɩɩbo, sãnem sẽn ta neb a tãab zɩɩbo la fut piiga, a sẽn na n yeelgdẽ n teemnẽ." 
2Kings5:6 A Naama sẽn ta Israyɛl dĩma nengẽ, dĩma kɩs-a la sebre Siri naaba yĩnga. Sebra ra gʋlsa woto: «Sebrã sã n ta yãmb bala, bãng-y tɩ maam n tʋm m sõgne, a Naama, tɩ y sõng t'a tɩlg ne a yĩnga bãaga.»" 
2Kings5:7 Israyɛl dĩma sẽn karem sebrã, a kẽesa a futu n yetẽ: «Mam yaa Wẽnd laa, n kʋʋd la m kõt vɩɩm, tɩ b tʋmd wãoor m nengẽ tɩ m sãoog a wãoodo? Ges-y, a ka baood m noor sɩda!»" 
2Kings5:8 A Elize, Wẽnnaam neda, sẽn wʋm tɩ Israyɛl dĩma kẽesa a futu, a tʋmame tɩ b yeel dĩma: «Yãmb kẽesa y fut bõe yĩnga? Bɩ a Naama wa m nengẽ la a na bãng tɩ bãngd bee Israyɛl tẽnga.»" 
2Kings5:9 A Naama waa ne a wiidi la a bilim-bilm n tɩ yals a Elize dignoorẽ. 
2Kings5:10 A Elize tʋmame tɩ b yeel-a: «Kẽng Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ so naoor a yopoe tɩ f yĩng na sãooge la f kõn le yɩ rẽgd ye.» 
2Kings5:11 A Naama sũur puugame t'a loog, n yeele: «Ade mam da tẽedame t'a na n yiẽ n sega maam, la a wa a toore n pʋʋs Wẽnnaam, a Soaala, la a rɩk a nugu n sɩɩs mam yĩngã n sãoog m bãagã." 
2Kings5:12 Damas kʋɩlsã, Abana la Farfar, pa são a Israyɛl kʋɩlsa fãa bɩ? Mam ka tõe n so be n paam laafi laa?» La a wẽnemdame n dɩk a sor n kuiisẽ ne sũ-puuri." 
2Kings5:13 T'a sõgen kãsenga kolg n gom ne-a, n yeele: «Ba bãngda sã n da kosẽ yãmb bũmb sẽn ya toogo, y ra kõn maanẽ bɩ? Tɩ b pa gomd a sẽn yeel bala: ‹So tɩ f na paam laafi!› »" 
2Kings5:14 Dẽ marsã la a Naama sig n lis Zʋrdẽ koomẽ naoor a yopoe, wala Wẽnnaam neda sẽn kõ noore, la a yĩng lebga wa bi-bilf yĩnga, la a paama laafi." 
2Kings5:15 A leba Wẽnnaam neda nengẽ ne a poorẽ dãmba fãa n tɩ yals a taoore n yeele: «Marsã, mam miime tɩ Wẽnd ning sẽn be Israyɛl tẽnga bala la Wẽnnaam tẽng zug ka. La marsã, m kotame tɩ y sak n deeg yãmb yamba kũuni.»" 
2Kings5:16 A Elize leokame: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd ning m sẽn tũud a soabã, tɩ m kõn deeg ye.» Ne a Naama sẽn da pẽdgd-a t'a reegã, a pa sak ye." 
2Kings5:17 A Naama yeelame: «Sã n ya boto bɩ y kõ-m sore tɩ b yãk tẽnga tãndo n zɩlg bõn-wees a yiibu, m yĩnga, tɩ m ka na n le kʋ yũ-noog maoongo bɩ yamleoog maoong n kõ ned a to sã n ka Naaba-Wẽnd ye." 
2Kings5:18 M sẽn kot yaa Naaba-Wẽnd maan-m sugri tɩ m zu-soaba sã n kẽed a Rimõ doogẽ n na n pʋʋse b minim n tikda m kanga, tɩ ma me naagd bãmb n wõgemd a Rimõ roogẽ. Bɩ Naaba-Wẽnd kõ-m sugri manesem kãng yĩnga.»" 
2Kings5:19 A Elize leok-a lame: «Bɩ f kẽng ne laafi!» La a kulame. 
2Kings5:20 A Naama sẽn zãag bilfu, Wẽnnaam neda, a Elize sõgne, a Geazi yeela a sũurẽ: «Mam zu-soaba basa a Naama, Siri nedã, t'a loog n ka reeg bũmb ye; la m wẽend ne Wẽnd tɩ m na babs-a n tɩ paam bũmbu.»" 
2Kings5:21 La a Geazi zoe n babsa a Naama. A Naama sẽn yãe t'a zoet n pʋgd a poore, a zĩnda a bilim-bilma pʋga n sig tao-tao n seg-a, n sok-a: «Yaa noogo?»" 
2Kings5:22 T'a leoke: «Noog bala! M zu-soabã n tʋm-m tɩ m wa yeel yã: ‹Kom-bɩɩb a yiib n yi Efrayim tãngã n wa mars-mars noogã; b yaa bãngdb karen-biisi; mam kotame tɩ y yãk wanzurf wakɩ koɛɛng a ye n kõ-ba, n paas fut a yiibu.› »" 
2Kings5:23 T'a Naama yeele: «Bɩ y sak n deeg wakɩ koeems a yi.» La a pẽdg-a lame t'a reeg, la a kɩtame tɩ b loe wanzurf wakɩ koeems a yi sẽn wã bõonego, yond a yi, n kɩs sõgen-kamb a yi, tɩ b tʋk n lʋɩ a Geazi taoore." 
2Kings5:24 B sẽn ta Ofɛl, a reeg-b-la bãmb nusẽ n tɩ bĩng a yiri, la a kulsa sõgen-kamb a yi wã tɩ b looge." 
2Kings5:25 La a Geazi yaool n bʋʋga a zu-soaba, a Elize, tɩ yẽ sok-a: «Geazi, f yita yɛ?» T'a leoke: «Yãmb sõgna pa kẽng ni ye.»" 
2Kings5:26 La a Elize yeel-a lame: «Ka vẽnegre n vẽneg-m tɩ m yãe ned sẽn yi a bilim-bilma n tiimd tẽng n zoe n seg fooma laa? La m sok n gese, yaa marsã, la fo na n deeg fu-neeba la ligdi, n da oliviye tɩɩse, bugsuntundu n paas piisi, niisi, yem-daado la yem-pogs bɩ?" 
2Kings5:27 Bãng t'a Naama bãaga na n yõka foom ne f yagens daar fãa.» A Geazi sẽn yi a Elize nengẽ, a lebga yĩng soaba n pelg wa goore." 
2Kings6:1 Bãngdba karen-biis yeela a Elize: «Ade, tõnd sẽn be zĩig ning ne yãmb ka wã yaa sẽk d yĩnga." 
2Kings6:2 Bas-y tɩ d kẽng Zʋrdẽ tɩ ned kam fãa tɩ wa ne raoog tɩ d tilg yiri n zĩndi.» T'a Elize leoke: «Aya bɩ y kẽnge!» 
2Kings6:3 Tɩ ned a ye yeele: «D kotame tɩ y sak n yãag-do» T'a leoke: «M na yãag yã.» 
2Kings6:4 La a yãag-b lame tɩ b kẽnge. B sẽn ta Zʋrdẽ, b kɛɛ raado." 
2Kings6:5 La ned a ye waa n kɛɛgda da-bedre, t'a lar fʋrg n lʋɩ koomẽ t'a kelme: «M ba ye, mam da penga larã!»" 
2Kings6:6 Tɩ Wẽnnaam nedã sok-a: «A lʋɩ yɛ?» T'a wilg zĩiga 
2Kings6:7 t'a Elize kɛɛg raoogo n lob zĩ-kãnga tɩ larã ruki. T'a yeele: «Rɩk-a!» T'a tẽeg a nug n dɩk-a. 
2Kings6:8 Siri dĩma da kaooga tãpo ne a Israyɛl. A sã n da maan yẽsgo ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba n yeel-ba: «Yãmb na n gãnega tãpo zĩ-kãnga la zĩ-kãnga,»" 
2Kings6:9 Wẽnnaam nedã ra tʋmdame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Israyɛl dĩma: «Maan-y gũusg zĩ-kãnga, tɩ Siri dãmba na n siga beene.»" 
2Kings6:10 A Israyɛl dĩma da tʋmda neb Wẽnnaam nedã sẽn wilg zĩig ningã, n maand gũusgu, la pa yɩ vugr bala, bɩ naoor a yi bal ye." 
2Kings6:11 Siri dĩma yam waa n yooda ne yell kãnga, t'a tigim a tãnsoaben-dãmba n yeel-ba: «Yãmb pa na n yaa n togs maam ned ninga sẽn be-a yãmb sʋka, n kẽnd n zãmbd tõndo Israyɛl dĩma nengẽ?»" 
2Kings6:12 Tɩ ned a ye leoke: «D zu-soab la d dĩma, ad-y ka tõnd ned ba a ye. Yaa a Elize, bãngd ning sẽn be Israyɛl tẽngã. Yẽ tõeeme n togs Israyɛl dĩma gomd ning fãa yãmb sẽn gomd y roogẽ.»" 
2Kings6:13 Tɩ dĩma yeele: «Bɩ y kẽng n tɩ gese a be yɛ, tɩ m kɩt tɩ b yõk-a!» Tɩ b wa yeel-a: «Ade, a bee Dotã.»" 
2Kings6:14 Dĩma tʋma wiidi la bilim-bilm la tãb-biis wʋsgo tɩ b wa zembala n gũbg tẽnga ne yʋngo. 
2Kings6:15 A Elize sõgna sẽn yi tõd-beoogo, a yãee tãb-biisi sẽn gũbg tẽngã ne wiidi la bilim-bilm. T'a sõgna sok-a: «M naaba, d na n maana wãna?»" 
2Kings6:16 T'a Elize leok-a: «Da zoe bũmb ye tɩ sẽn be-b ne tõnd yɩɩda sẽn be-b ne bãmba.» 
2Kings6:17 A Elize pʋʋsame. A yeela woto: «Naaba-Wẽnde, puk-y m sõgna nini t'a yãe!» Soaala-Wẽnd puka a nini la a yãeeme: Ade, tãnga fãa da berga ne wiidi la bugum bilim-bilm sẽn gũbg a Elize." 
2Kings6:18 Siri rãmba sẽn wa a nengẽ, a Elize pʋʋsa Wẽnd n yeele: «M kotame tɩ y lob nin-bãmba zondo.» La Soaala-Wẽnd lob-b-la zondo, wala a Elize sẽn kose." 
2Kings6:19 La a Elize yeel-b lame: «Sor ka be ka ye, la yãmb sẽn baood a soaba ka kẽed tẽn-kãnga ye. Wa-y ka, pʋg-y maam tɩ m yãag y sẽn baood dao ninga nengẽ.» La a peeg-b lame n tɩ kẽes Samari." 
2Kings6:20 B sẽn kẽ Samari, a Elize yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnde, puk-y nin-bãmba nini tɩ b yãe.» La Soaala-Wẽnd puka b nin la b yãeeme la ade, b ra bee Samari tẽnsʋka." 
2Kings6:21 Israyɛl dĩma yãend-b lame n sok a Elize: «M ba, m kʋ-b bɩ?»" 
2Kings6:22 T'a Elize leoke: «Yãmb pa na n kʋ-b ye. Yãmb sẽn mi n gũbg b rãmb ne sʋʋs la tãbdo n yõg n kẽes yembdã, yãmb kʋʋd-b lame bɩ? Tẽgen-y dɩɩb la koom b taoore tɩ b rɩ la b yũ la b yaool n leb b zu-soaba nengẽ.»" 
2Kings6:23 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b segl dɩɩb n kõ-b tɩ b rɩ la b yũ, la a yaool n bas-b tɩ b leb b zu-soaba nengẽ. Dẽ tɛka Siri fãadba, pa le tag a Israyɛl soolmẽ ye." 
2Kings6:24 Dẽ loogr poore, a Ben-Adad, Siri dĩma, tigma a tãb-biis fãa n wa gũbg Samari." 
2Kings6:25 Kom kãseng lʋɩɩ Samari, tẽnga sẽn paga yĩnga. Bõang zug waa n daada wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-nii, tɩ sũm ne wũmbl koosd wanzurf wakɩ koeems a nu." 
2Kings6:26 Israyɛl dĩma waa n loogda lalga zugu la pag a yembre kaasame n bool-a n yetẽ: 
2Kings6:27 «Sõng-y-m wɛ, m naaba la m dĩma!» Tɩ dĩma leok-a: «Soaala-Wẽnd pa sõng-fo, m na n sõng-f-la ne bõe? Ne kood sẽn dʋr zɛɛgẽ bɩ ne bugsuntung rãam?»" 
2Kings6:28 La dĩma le paasame: «Bõe la f rata?» Tɩ pagã leoke: «Pʋg kãnga n yeel maam: ‹Wa ne f biigã tɩ d wãb-a rũnna tɩ beoogo d na wãb maam dẽnna.› 
2Kings6:29 Tɩ tõnd dʋg mam biigã n dɩ; vẽkembeoogo, mam sẽn yeel-a: ‹Wa ne f biigã tɩ d wãbe,› a solga a biiga.»" 
2Kings6:30 Dĩma sẽn wʋm paga goama, a kẽesa a futu, la rẽ t'a ra loogda lalga zugu, la nebã yãeeme t'a yeelga sũ-pa-noang fuugu, a futã tẽngre." 
2Kings6:31 Dĩma yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnd na sɩbg ma, n le sɩbg n bãge, mam sã n ka rok a Safat biiga a Elize zug rũnna.»" 
2Kings6:32 A Elize da zĩi a roogẽ tɩ nin-kẽemsa da zĩ n yeg-a, la dĩma waa n tʋma ned a nengẽ. Sõgna ra nan ka paam n ta ye, la Elize zoe n yeela nin-kẽembã: «Yãmb ne-la, nin-kʋʋda biig tʋma ned t'a wa rok m zugu, bɩ y gũus t'a sẽn tʋm a soaba sã n wa bɩ y pag roogã la y ra bas-a t'a kẽ ye. La ade, sãnd ka a zu-soabã n pʋgd-a tɩ d wʋmd a kẽnd rãamda bɩ?»" 
2Kings6:33 A sẽn da nan ket n gomd woto, la dĩma sẽn sig a yiri n yeel-a: «Ade, yel-beed kãnga fãa yita Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ, m yɩta wãna n le maan teegre ne Soaala-Wẽnde?»" 
2Kings7:1 A Elize yeelame: «Kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd gomde, Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Beoog wakat kãnga, zom wamde na ra wakɩre, tɩ alkam kɛgeng wama a yi ra wakɩre, Samari tẽng noorẽ.› »" 
2Kings7:2 La dĩma sẽn da tikd wed-kɩɩm ningã, yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnd poog vẽya, saaga zug menga, tɩ kood rʋʋge, gomd kãnga na tõog n yɩ sɩda?» T'a Elize leok-a: «F nif na yãe, la f kõn dɩ-a ye»" 
2Kings7:3 Dap a naase da be tẽnga noorẽ; b da bẽeda yĩng bãaga, la b ra yeta taaba:" 
2Kings7:4 «Bõe yĩng tɩ tõnd zĩ ka n gũud kũum? Koma sẽn lʋɩ tẽngã, d sã n yeele: ‹D kẽ tẽnga pʋga,› d na n kiime. D pa ka me d na n kiime. Sẽn ya woto wã d loog n tɩ kẽ Siri rãmba nengẽ; b sã n ka kʋ-do, d na vɩɩnd, b sã n kʋ-do, rẽ la bala.»" 
2Kings7:5 Zĩig sẽn waa n sobgdẽ neb a naasa yik n dabda Aramsa tãb-sikẽ. Bãmb sẽn ta tãb-sika noorẽ, b pa mik ned ba a ye." 
2Kings7:6 Soaala-Wẽnd da kɩtame tɩ bʋʋr wulumd Aramsa tãb-sikã: dag n yaa bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdb rãamde, tãb-biis zãma kẽeng rãamde, tɩ Aramsa yeel taaba: «Israyɛl dĩma, yaoo Ititsã nanamse la Ezipt nanamse n dɩk tãb-biisi tɩ b wat n na n kaoog zabre ne tõndo.»" 
2Kings7:7 Dɩlla zĩiga sẽn sobge, b zoeeme n bas b roto, b wiidi b bõeense, b tãb-sikã, wa a sẽn da ya-la, b zoeeme n na n fãag b yõore." 
2Kings7:8 Woto wã bãad dãmba sẽn ta tãb-sikã, b kẽe roog a ye pʋga la b rɩɩme, la b yũume, la b rɩka ligd ne sãnem la futu n tɩ solge. B lɛɛg n wa kẽe roog a to la b sẽn yãend be wã me, b yãkame n tɩ solge." 
2Kings7:9 Bãad dãmba waa n yeela taaba: «Tõnd sẽn maanda ka neer ye. Dũnna daarã, yaa kibar noog daare. Tõnd sĩnd d noor n gũ tɩ beoog vẽege, d kõn põs sɩbgre ning sẽn na n lʋɩ d zuga ye. Dẽ yĩnga wa-y tɩ d kẽ tẽngã, d kẽng na-yiri n tɩ togs kibar noogã.»" 
2Kings7:10 B waa n boola tẽnga noor gũudba n wilg-b woto: «Tõnd kẽe Aramsa tãb-sika la tõnd pa yãend ninsaala, d ka wʋm ninsaal koɛɛg ye. D sẽn yãend bala yaa wiidi sẽn za b baarẽ la bõeense, la ro-vɩɩdo.»" 
2Kings7:11 Tẽnga noor-gũudb boola pʋgẽ n wilg dĩma zaka rãmba. 
2Kings7:12 Dĩma yika ne yʋngo n yeel a sõgen-kambã: «Bas-y tɩ m wilg-y Aramsa sẽn bilgd sɩlem ninga. B sẽn mi tɩ kom namsda tõndã, b yik n basa b tãb-sikã n tɩ soond weoogẽ, n yeel taaba: ‹D sẽn pag b rãmb b tẽngẽ wã ma n yi b tẽngã tɩ d kell n yõg-b vɩɩse la d na paam n soog tẽngã.› »" 
2Kings7:13 Dẽ me la sõgen a ye leok yã: «Bɩ d yiis wiidi a nu wã sẽn kellã, la sẽn na n ki, wa tẽnga rãmb fãa sẽn ka na n põsã. D tʋm-ba n gese.»" 
2Kings7:14 B yiisa bilim-bilm a yiibu tɩ dĩma tʋm-ba tɩ b rɩk Aramsa nao. A yeel-b lame: «Aya, bɩ y kẽng n tɩ gese!»" 
2Kings7:15 B rɩka Aramsa nao al n tɩ tãag Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, la sorã ra pida ne futu la teedo Aramsa sẽn da zoetẽ la b lobda. B sẽn tʋm b rãmba lebg n wa togsa dĩma." 
2Kings7:16 Dẽ marsã la neba yii n tɩ zɛ Aramsã tãb-sikã. Dẽ me la alkam pɛɛlg zom bãaneg wamd koos wakɩre tɩ alkam kɛgeng wam a yi da raad wakɩre, wa Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da pĩnd n togse." 
2Kings7:17 Dĩma da kɩtame tɩ sõgen ninga a sẽn da tikd a soab n kẽnda tɩ yals n gũud tẽnga noor kʋɩlengã; la nebã tab-a lame n beds t'a ki, wa Wẽnnaam nedã sẽn da yeele. A Elize da wilga dĩma rẽnna a sẽn waa a nengẽ wã raare." 
2Kings7:18 Sɩda, Wẽnnaam neda da waa n yeela rĩma: «Beoog yibeoog wakat kanga, Samari tẽnga rãmb raagẽ, alkam kɛgeng wam a yi na n daa wakɩre, tɩ zom pɛɛlg wamd a ye raad wakɩre.»" 
2Kings7:19 Wed-kɩɩma ra yaool n yeela a Elize: «Ba Soaala-Wẽnd yoog saaga vẽya, tɩ kood dʋʋge, gomd kãnga kõn taas ye.» T'a Elize ra yeele: «F na yãend ne f nifu la f kõn dɩ ye.»" 
2Kings7:20 La yɩɩ boto. Neba tab-a-la tẽnga noore la a kiime. 
2Kings8:1 A Elize da gomda ne pag ninga a sẽn da vʋʋga a soab biigã n yeel-a: «Yiki, foom ne f zak rãmba, n tɩ zĩnd f sẽn tõẽ tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd boola kom la a na n sɩbga tẽnga yʋʋm a yopoe.»" 
2Kings8:2 Paga maana wa Wẽnnaam nedã sẽn yeele, n yik ne a yir dãmba n kẽng n tɩ zĩnd Filisti rãmba tẽngẽ yʋʋm a yopoe." 
2Kings8:3 Yʋʋm a yopoe sẽn looge, pagã yii Filisti rãmba tẽnga n lebg n wa, la a tɩ yõka naab sɛɛga t'a lebs-a a yiri la a pʋʋgo." 
2Kings8:4 Dĩma da sõsda ne a Geazi, Wẽnnaam nedã sõgne, la rĩma ra yetame: «Bɩ f maneg n togs maam tʋʋm kãsensa fãa, a Elize sẽn maana.»" 
2Kings8:5 A Geazi da togsda dĩma a Elize sẽn vʋʋg bi-kɩɩng a ye to-to. Mik a sẽn waa n gomdã, biig ning sẽn vuuga ma taame, n kudg naab kãntɩɩga t'a lebs-a a pʋʋgo la a yiri. T'a Geazi na n yeele: «M naaba, ad-y pagã, ne a biigã, a Elize sẽn vʋʋgã!»" 
2Kings8:6 Dĩma soka pagã t'a na n maneg n togs kibarã. La dĩma boola a tãnsoab a ye n kõ-a noor t'a ges paga yelle n yetẽ: «Sõng tɩ b lebs pagã a sẽn so zãnga, ne a pʋʋgã sẽn paam yõod ninga, paga sẽn yi tẽnga tɛka, n ta rũnna.»" 
2Kings8:7 A Elize kẽnga Damas. Segame tɩ Aram dĩma, a Ben-Adad, da ka laafi ye. B tɩ togs-a-la woto: Wẽnnaam nedã taa ka." 
2Kings8:8 Tɩ dĩma yeel a Azayɛl: «Rɩk kũuni f nugẽ n tɩ seg Wẽnnaam nedã, la f bõs t'a pʋʋs Wẽnd n bãng m sã n na n tɩlga ne bã-kãnga.»" 
2Kings8:9 A Azayɛl kẽng n tɩ sega a Elize ne kũuni a sẽn zɩ, a yĩnga. A yãka bõn-yõod fãa sẽn be Damas n zɩlg yʋgma pis-naase. A taame n yals a Elize taoore n yeele: «Y biig a Ben-Adad n tʋm maam tɩ m wa sok yãmb woto: ‹M na n tɩlga ne m bãaga bɩ?› »" 
2Kings8:10 A Elize leok-a lame: «Kẽng n tɩ belg-a n yeel-a t'a sɩd na n tɩlgame, la Soaala-Wẽnd yaool n wilga maam t'a na n kiime.»" 
2Kings8:11 La vugr bala Wẽnnaam neda waa n yɛsa sɩɩ t'a nina nood t'a get a Azayɛl n ka kamsdẽ la a yãbda. 
2Kings8:12 T'a Azayɛl sok-a: «Yaa bõe yĩnga tɩ mam zu-soaba yãbda?» A Elize leokame: «Yaa tɩ mam mii wẽng ning fo sẽn na n maan a Israyɛl kambã. Fo na n yõoga b tãnsoben-dota bugum, fo na n kooda b kom-bɩɩba ne sʋʋse; b kom-peelse, fo na n tag-b lame n bedse; b pagba sẽn tʋte, fo na n weed-b lame.»" 
2Kings8:13 La a Azayɛl leokame: «Yãmb yamba me zema bõe? Baag wa maama na n yɩɩ wãn n maan yɛl a woto?» T'a Elize leok-a: «Soaala-Wẽnd wilga maam, foo n na n lebg Aramsa dĩma.»" 
2Kings8:14 A Azayɛl basa a Elize n leb a zu-soaba nengẽ t'a sok-a: «A Elize yeelame tɩ bõe?» T'a leoke: «B yeela maam tɩ sɩd menga yãmb na n tɩlgame.» 
2Kings8:15 Vẽkembeoogo, a Azayɛl rɩka fu-goabga n los koomẽ n yaag n pil dĩma nenga. A Ben-Adad kiime t'a Azayɛl led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings8:16 A Akab biig a Zoram da rɩta naam Israyɛl. Dẽ tɩ yaa a Zozafat n da rɩt naam Zɩɩda. Yʋʋm sẽn maan a nu t'a Zozafat looge, yẽ me biig sẽn boond tɩ Zoram lebga Zɩɩda dĩma a ba zĩigẽ." 
2Kings8:17 A Zoram, naama deegr wakato t'a da tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a yi. A rɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋm a nii." 
2Kings8:18 A rɩka a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba nao, wala a Akab roog rãmba sẽn tũ a soaba, t'a da peega a Akab bi-pugla n maan a paga. A maana wẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ." 
2Kings8:19 La ne rẽ fãa, Naaba-Wẽnd pa sak n bas t'a Zɩɩda wã ye, b tʋʋm-tʋmda a Daviid maasem yĩnga. Bãmb n da kãabe tɩ b na kell n basa a roogẽ la a yagensa roogẽ, roagd a ye, fitil a ye, la a bugma na n wida yʋʋm sẽn kõn sɛ." 
2Kings8:20 Dĩm kãng zamaanẽ, la Edom zẽk a zug ne a Zɩɩda. Edom dãmba baoo dĩm n kõ b menga." 
2Kings8:21 A Zoram yik n kẽnga Sayir ne bilim-bilma gilli. A ra yika ne yʋngo n zab ne Edom dãmba sẽn da gũbg-a, yẽ ne bilim-bilma nanamse, tɩ neba zoe n leb b rotẽ." 
2Kings8:22 A Edom kell n zẽka a zug ne Zɩɩda rĩm n tãag rũnna. Yɩɩ wakat kãng me la Libna rãmb me zãgs t'a kõn dɩ naam b zug ye. 
2Kings8:23 A Zoram tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maan fãa, rẽ fãa sẽ pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb sebra pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings8:24 La a Zoram tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a ne a saam-dãmba, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ, t'a biiga a Akaziyas led a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings8:25 A Zoram, a Akab biiga la Israyɛl dĩma naam yʋʋmd piig la a yi soaba, a Akaziyas, a Zoram biiga, n dʋ zaoor n lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
2Kings8:26 Ad-y rẽ t'a Akaziyas da tara yʋʋm pisi la a yi la a rɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋmde. A ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Atali, a Israyɛl dĩm, a Omri, bi-pugla." 
2Kings8:27 A rɩka a Akab roog rãmba nao la a maana sẽn ya wẽnga Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a Akab roog rãmb sẽn maane, t'a da kĩi ne a Akab." 
2Kings8:28 A yãaga a Zoram, a Akab biiga, n tɩ zab ne Aram dĩma, a Azayɛl, Ramot-Galaad." 
2Kings8:29 Aramsa pogla a Zoram. Dĩma a Zoram lebg n waa Zizreyɛl n na n tɩbs Siri dãmba sẽn pogl-a poglg ningã Ramot, a sẽn da wa n zabd ne a Azayɛl, Aram dĩma. A Akaziyas, a Zoram biiga la Zɩɩda dĩma kẽnga Zizreyɛl n na n tɩ ges a Akab biiga a Zoram gãase, t'a ra pa keem ye." 
2Kings9:1 Bãngda a Elize boola bãngdba karen-biig a yembre n yeel: «Wudg n wa tɩ m tʋm-fo, reeg kaama ne tʋkã n kẽng Ramot-Galaad." 
2Kings9:2 Fo sã n ta, bɩ f bao a Zewu, a Zozafat biiga, a Nimsi yagenga; f sã n yãe-a, bɩ f yiis-a a tũud-n-taas sʋka, n peeg-a n kẽ roogẽ." 
2Kings9:3 Fo na rɩk kaama tʋkã n pʋdg a zug n yetẽ: ‹Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: Mam pʋdgda f zug kaam tɩ f yɩ Israyɛl dĩma.› Dẽ poore, bɩ f pak kʋɩlenga n yɩ n zoe la f da yaas ye.»" 
2Kings9:4 Bãngdba karen-biiga kẽnga Ramot-Galaad, a tɩ mika tãnsoaben-dãmba tɩ b zĩ la a yeelame:" 
2Kings9:5 «M naaba, m tara koɛɛg ne yãmba.» A Zewu sokame: «Tõnd yaa wʋsg ka, f tara koɛɛg ne ãnda?» T'a leoke: «Ne yãmba, m naaba»" 
2Kings9:6 La a Zewu yik n kẽe roogẽ. Bãngda pʋdga a zug kaam n yetẽ: «Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛg la woto: ‹Mam pʋdgda f zug kaam tɩ f yɩ dĩma n soog Wẽnnaam buudu, a Israyɛl." 
2Kings9:7 Fo na n pãba f zu-soaba a Akab roogo, la maam n na n sok a Zezabɛl samde, m tʋʋm-tʋmdba, m no-rɛɛsdba zɩɩma a sẽn daaga samde." 
2Kings9:8 A Akab roog gilli na n wãame, rao fãa, yem-daoogo wala burkĩna, a Israyɛl pʋgẽ, na n kiime." 
2Kings9:9 Mam na n sɩbga a Akab roogo, wẽnd m sẽn sɩbg a Zeroboam, a Nebat, biiga, wẽnd m sẽn sɩbg a Basa, a Ayiya biiga." 
2Kings9:10 Baas na n wãba a Zezabɛl, Zizreyɛl pʋgẽ, la ned kõn mum-a yaoogẽ ye.› » La bãngdba karen-biig paka kʋɩlengã n yi n zoe, a sẽn gom n sɛ." 
2Kings9:11 A Zewu yii n bʋʋga a zu-soaba tãnsoaben-dãmb a taabã tɩ b sok-a: «Yaa noogo? Zu-lɛbga waa fo nengẽ, bõe yĩnga?» T'a Zewu leoke: «Y mii raoã ne a sẽn saad n gomd goam niynsã.»" 
2Kings9:12 La b yeelame: «Zirẽ! Maneg n togs fãa.» La a Zewu yeel-b lame: «A goma ne maam woto, n le paas woto la baasgẽ a yeelame: ‹M na n pʋdga f zug kaam tɩ f yɩ Israyɛl dĩma.› »" 
2Kings9:13 La b wẽneg n pidga b koaba n yɛdg geera zugu t'a zĩndi, la b peeba baorgo la b kelennẽ: «A Zewu yaa dĩma!»" 
2Kings9:14 Segame t'a Israyɛl tãb-biisa gilli da zabd n na n fãag Ramot Galaad Aram dĩm a Azayɛl nugẽ. Zabra sẽn waa n zabd ne a Azayɛl, Aram dãmba ra pogla dĩm a Zoram." 
2Kings9:15 Woto a ra lebg n kẽe Zizreyɛl n na tɩp a menga. A sãmpogra ra paam n gãneg-a lame. A Zewu, a Zozafat biiga, a Nimsi yagenga, soos n zãmba a Zoram. A Zewu yeela tãnsoaben-dãmbã: «Y sã n lɛɛg n kẽeda mam tãpẽ, bɩ ned ba a ye da yi n kẽ Zizreyɛl tẽngã n togs yella sẽn maana ye.»" 
2Kings9:16 A Zewu kẽe bilim-bilm n kẽng Zizreyɛl. A Zoram bãaga da gãneg-a lame t'a Akaziyas, a Zɩɩda dĩma, wa n na n ges a gãaga." 
2Kings9:17 Tãb-gũuda sẽn da gũud Zizreyɛl tẽnga zĩnda yĩngr n tees n yãend a Zewu ne a tãb-biisa sẽn wate, t'a yeele: «Mam nee tãb-biis kʋʋngo» T'a Zoram yeele: «Tʋm-y wed-dʋʋda t'a kẽng n tɩ n seg-ba n sok-b n gese yaa laafi yĩng la b wat bɩ.»" 
2Kings9:18 Wed-dʋʋda tɩ seg-b lame n sok-ba: «Naab tɩ b wa ges yaa laafi yĩng la y wat bɩ?» T'a Zewu leoke: «Sã n yaa laafi, bõe n ta foom. Loog n leb mam poorẽ!» Tãb-gũuda le togsame: «Ad-y y sẽn tʋm a soaba bʋʋg-b lame, la a pa lebg ye.»" 
2Kings9:19 Dĩma tʋma wed-dʋʋd a to tɩ yẽ me bʋʋg-ba n yeele: «Naaba tɩ m wa soke, yaa laafi?» A Zewu leokame: «Sã n yaa laafi bõe n ta foom? Loog n leb mam poorẽ!»" 
2Kings9:20 Tɩ tãb-gũuda leb n yeele: «A bʋʋg-b lame la yẽ me pa lebg ye; la wa m sẽn ne: kẽndã yaa a Zewu, a Nimsi yagenga kẽnde, t'a zoeta tʋʋle wa gãeenga.»" 
2Kings9:21 A Zoram yeelame: «Bɩ y sog m bilim-bilma!» Tɩ b sog bilim-bilma. A Zoram, Israyɛl dĩma ne a Akaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, kẽng n na n tɩ sega a Zewu, ned kam fãa a bilim-bilm pʋga. B tɩ mik-a-la Zizreyɛl dao a Nabot pʋʋgẽ." 
2Kings9:22 A Zoram sẽn yãee a Zewu bala a sokame: «Yaa laafi bɩ Zewu?» T'a Zewu leoke: «Laafi bee yɛ, tɩ f ma a Zezabɛl wẽn-naandsa pʋgb la a tɩta tar paasg n dabda?»" 
2Kings9:23 A Zoram wẽnemda a salbre t'a na n zoe, n yeel a Akaziyas: «Zãmbo Akaziyas!»" 
2Kings9:24 La a Zewu dɩka tãpo n tão a Zoram bãgdã sʋka, la pĩima sãaga a sũurã n yi, tɩ dĩma lʋɩ a bilim bilma pʋga." 
2Kings9:25 A Zewu yeela a wed-kɩɩm-naaba, a Bidkar: «Rɩk-a n lob Zizreyɛl dao a Nabot pʋʋgẽ. Tẽeg bala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel a ba wã poorẽ, dĩm a Akab poorẽ, daar ning maam ne foom la neb a taaba sẽn waa n yãag-a ne bilim-bilma." 
2Kings9:26 Soaala yeelame: ‹Maam a Wẽnde, m yãenda fãa, zaamẽ, f sẽn waa n kʋʋd a Nabot ne a kambã. Maam n wẽende, maam a Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m na sɩbg-f rẽnd yĩnga f pʋʋgẽ ka bala.› » Woto wã a Zewu paasame bala: «Bidkar, dɩk a Zoram n lob pʋ-kãnga, n zems wala Soaala sẽn da pĩnd n wilgi.»" 
2Kings9:27 A Akaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, sẽn yãee woto, a rɩka Bɛt-Gã sor n zoetẽ, la a Zewu pʋg a poore n kõ noor kãnga: «Bɩ y tão yẽ me!» Tɩ b tão-a n pogl, a bilim bilma pʋga, Gur Kunkubrã zugu, sẽn be Yibleam sɛɛga, t'a zoe n tɩ kẽ Megido n ki be." 
2Kings9:28 A sõgen-kamba tall-a-la ne bilim-bilma n tɩ mum-a yaoogẽ, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ." 
2Kings9:29 Yɩ-la a Zoram, a Akab biiga, naam yʋʋmd piig la a yembr soaba, la a Akaziyas da lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
2Kings9:30 A Zewu da taa Zizreyɛl la bala la a Zezabɛl sẽn wʋm a waoongo. A baoo kɩrʋ n ning a nini, n pãnem a zuga neere, n lɩkd a roog võorẽ." 
2Kings9:31 A Zewu sẽn gãndg tẽnga noore, a Zezabɛl yeelame: «Yaa laafi, dĩm-kʋʋd-taag wa a Zimri?»" 
2Kings9:32 A Zewu zẽk a nenga n ges võora sẽnẽ n yeele: «Ãnd n be mam poorẽ, ãnda?» Na-yir dãmb a yiib bɩ a tã n lɩke." 
2Kings9:33 T'a yeel-ba: «Bɩ y lob paga tẽnga» B tus a Zezabɛl n lub tẽnga t'a zɩɩm fẽeg lalgã la wiidã. T'a Zewu tab-a ne a bilim bilma n looge. 
2Kings9:34 La a Zewu kẽe rĩma zakẽ n kɩt tɩ b wa ne bũmb t'a rɩ la a yũ, n na n yaool n yeel a tũud-n-taasã: «Tɩ ges-y pʋg-kõb-wẽngã yelle, la y mum-a t'a yaa dĩm biiga.»" 
2Kings9:35 B kẽngame tɩ b na n tɩ mum-a la b ka yãe bũmb sã n ka a zu-wanga, a karse la a nus-pʋs a yi." 
2Kings9:36 Tɩ b lɛɛg n wa togs a Zewu, t'a yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd gomdã taasame, b sẽn kɩt t'a Eli, Tesbe daoã, yeele: ‹Zizreyɛl pʋʋgẽ, baas na n wãba a Zezabɛl nemdo." 
2Kings9:37 A Zezabɛl yĩnga na n lebga wa birga b sẽn birg pʋʋgo, b kõn tõog n yeele tɩ wã la a Zezabɛl ye.› »" 
2Kings10:1 A Akab kamb pisopoe n da be Samari. A Zewu gʋlsa sebr n tool Samari nanamsã la nin-kẽembã la a Akab kamba ba wubdsã. 
2Kings10:2 A gʋlsa woto: «Ade, yãmb sẽn get dĩma kamb yelle, n tar bilim-bilm, wiidi, zab-teedo la y kẽed tãnsoben-doogẽ, y sã n deeg sebr kãnga," 
2Kings10:3 bɩ y ges yãmb zu-soaba kamb sʋka ãnd la nin-sõng la nin-tɩrga; zĩndg-y bi-kãng a ba naama zaoorẽ la y zab n fãag y zu-soaba roogo.» 
2Kings10:4 Dabeem yõk-b-la al wʋsgo tɩ b yeel taaba: «Dĩm dãmb a yiib sã n ka tõog nin-kãnga, tõnd yɩta a wãna n tõog-a?»" 
2Kings10:5 Dẽ me la sõgen-kãsenga, tẽnga kombere, nin-kẽemba la kamba ba-wubds tʋm tɩ b yeel a Zewu: «Tõnd yaa yãmb yemse, yamb sẽn yet bũmb ninga bala la d na n maane; tõnd pa na n kõ ned naam ye, maan-y bũmb ninga sẽn zems yãmb nifẽ.»" 
2Kings10:6 A Zewu leb n gʋls-b-la sebre n yetẽ: «Sã n ya boto, yãmb sã n kẽeda maam la yãmb sã n kelgda mam koɛɛga, bɩ y fiuus y zu-soaba kamba fãa zutu n wa ne b beoog woto wẽnde, mam nengẽ, Zizreyɛl tẽnga.» Dĩma kamb da yaa pisopoe n be tẽnga nin-bɛd zagsẽ tɩ b wubd-ba." 
2Kings10:7 Sebra sẽn ta bãmba, b yõga dĩma kamba n kood bãmb pisopoe wã fãa, n sagl b zutã pet pʋga n tool a Zewu, Zizreyɛl tẽnga." 
2Kings10:8 B sẽn tʋm a soaba kẽe n yeela a Zewu: «B waa ne dĩma kamb zutu.» T'a yeele: «Bɩ y rɩgl-b n tedg, tẽngã noorẽ, zĩis a yiibu, tɩ beoog vẽege!»" 
2Kings10:9 Beoog sẽn vẽege, a Zewu yii yɩnga n yals n yeel neba fãa: «Ad-y yãmb la nin-sõma tɩ taal ka y zug ye! Maam bal zug la yell dog yã tɩ maam n zãmbe la m kʋ a Zoram. La nin-bãmba fãa sẽn ka wã, ãnda n kʋ-ba?" 
2Kings10:10 Bɩ y bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd gomd ba a ye ka lʋɩt vɩʋʋgẽ ye. Bãmb n gom n kãab a Akab roogo. Naaba-Wẽnd pidsa b gomdã b sẽn yeel ne b bãngd a Eli noorã.» 
2Kings10:11 La a Zewu kʋ-la a Akab doog rãmb fãa sẽn kell Zizreyɛl, a kombɛɛmba, a na-yir dãmba, a maan-kʋʋdba, ali n ka bas ned ba a yembre t'a põs ye." 
2Kings10:12 La a Zewu sẽn yi be, a kẽnga Samari. A rɩka sore, n ta Rũm-kɩɩms Bɛt-Ekɛd, n seg Zɩɩda dĩma saam-biisi, n sok-ba: «Yãmb yaa ãnd dãmba?»" 
2Kings10:13 Tɩ b leoke: «Tõnd yaa a Akaziyas saam-biisi, la d wat n na n pʋʋsa dĩma kamba la a kamba ma, a Zezabɛl.»" 
2Kings10:14 La a Zewu, yeelame: «Yõg-y bãmb fãa vɩɩse» B yõg-b-la vɩɩse, t'a kood-ba Bɛt-Ekɛd ko-baoora sɛɛga, bãmb pis-naase la a yi. A Zewu ka bas ned ba a ye t'a põs ye." 
2Kings10:15 A Zewu yiime n yãend a Zonadab, a Rekab biiga, sẽn da wat a segbo. A Zewu pʋʋs-a lame la a yeel-a lame: «Fo pʋg yaa pɛɛlg ne maam, wala mam pʋg sẽn ya pɛɛlg ne fooma bɩ?» T'a yet tɩ n-yẽe! T'a paas: «Sã n ya boto bɩ f tud f nugu.» T'a Zonadab yõk a nugu; t'a Zewu tak-a t'a rʋ bilim-bilma pʋga, yẽ sɛɛgẽ." 
2Kings10:16 A yeelame: «Tũ maam tɩ f na yãe m sũur sẽn yik seem ninga, n na n zab Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga!»" 
2Kings10:17 A tall-a-la ne bilim-bilma n ta Samari, n kʋ a Akab doog-rãmb sẽn da ket Samari. A kʋ-b-la zãng fãa, wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel a Eli." 
2Kings10:18 A Zewu yaool n tigma neba fãa n yeel-ba: «A Akab waooga a Baal bilf bala, a Zewu yẽ na n waooga a Baal wʋsg-wʋsgo." 
2Kings10:19 Marsã, bɩ y bool a Baal bãngdba ne a maan-kʋʋdba fãa tɩ b wa sak-ma, la ned ba a ye da vaal ye, tɩ mam dat n maana maoong kãsenga n kõ a Baal. Sẽn vaala fãa kõn tɩlg ye.» Mik a Zewu da maanda yam n na sãam a Baal kẽedba fãa." 
2Kings10:20 A kõo noor n yetẽ: «Bool-y neba tɩ b maan tigsg sõngo n waoog a Baal» B boola neba tɩ wa tigsgã. 
2Kings10:21 A Zewu tʋmame tɩ b sa n togs Israyɛl gilli la a Baal kẽedba fãa waame, la ned ba a ye ka pa n ka wa ye." 
2Kings10:22 B kẽ a Baal wẽnd doogẽ, tɩ Baal wẽnd doogã pid zãnga. A Zewu yeela ned ninga sẽn da so-a futa bĩngri: «Yiis futã n kõ-ba.»" 
2Kings10:23 A Zewu tũ-la a Zonadab, a Rekab biiga, n kẽ a Baal wẽnd doogẽ, la a yeela nebã: «Bɩ y bao n gese sãnd sẽn pʋʋsd-b Naaba-Wẽnd ka naage, n ges yaa a Baal kẽedba bala n be ka.»" 
2Kings10:24 La b kẽeme n na n kʋ laafi kosgo la yũ-noog maoongo. A Zewu yaool n da yãka neb pis-nii tɩ b yals yɩnga, la a da yeel b lame: «Nin-bãmba sẽn dɩk n sagl yamb nusẽ wã, bɩ nin-yend meng ra põs ye. Sẽn basa ned t'a põse, yẽ la b kʋʋda.»" 
2Kings10:25 A Zewu sẽn kʋ yũ-noog maoongã n sɛ, a kõo tãb-biisa sẽn zao wiidi la wed-kɩɩmbã noor kanga: «Aya, wa-y! Bɩ y kʋ b fãa tɩ ned ba a ye da yi ye.»" 
2Kings10:26 La tãb-biisa ne wed-kɩɩmba kẽeme n kʋ-b ne sʋʋse. B tɩ loba b yĩnsa we-kɛɛnga n le kẽ a Baal wẽnd doogẽ wã n yiis da-peesma n yõog bugum. 
2Kings10:27 B luba a Baal maan-kugrã, n lub a waoogra roogo, n maan t'a lebg neb rõbendg zĩiga; la rẽ n ket n be rũnna." 
2Kings10:28 Woto, a Zewu kɩtame t'a Baal menem a Israyɛl sʋka." 
2Kings10:29 La baasgo fãa, a Zewu ka bas yel-wẽna fãa a Nebat biig, a Zeroboam, sẽn maane, n lub a Israyɛl, yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ ye. A ka yiis sãnem nag-bi wã sẽn da be Betɛl la Dã ye." 
2Kings10:30 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zewu: «Fo sẽn maan sẽn ya neer la tɩrga mam nifẽ yĩnga, n maan m sũur sẽn da rat ne a Akab roogã, f yagens na n zaoonda a Israyɛl naam zaoore tɩ maan zamaan a naase.»" 
2Kings10:31 Baasgo, a Zewu pa modg n tũ Israyɛl Wẽnnaam noor ne a sũur fãa ye. A pa zãag a meng ne yel-beed niyns a Zeroboam sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ ye." 
2Kings10:32 Dẽ me la Naaba-Wẽnd le sɩng a Israyɛl soolma wãdsgo, t'a Azayɛl, Siri dĩma, kaoog zabre ne Israyɛl kamba, Israyɛl soolmẽ gilli, n tõog-ba." 
2Kings10:33 A tõog n deega tẽns niyns fãa sẽn be Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga yaanga la tẽns niyns sẽn be Aroɛr goabga, Arno kʋɩl bɛɛga noorẽ, dat n yeelame tɩ Galaad la Bazã. Be la a Gad, a Rubẽ la a Manase yagensa da kẽeda." 
2Kings10:34 A Zewu tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maana fãa, a sũ-keelma, dẽ fãa pa gʋls dĩm dãmba sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings10:35 A Zewu tɩ saka a saam-dãmb, b mum-a-la Samari; a biiga a Zoakaz n led-a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings10:36 A Zewu dɩ a Israyɛl naam, Samari, tẽnga, yʋʋm pisi la a nii." 
2Kings11:1 A Atali, sẽn yãe t'a biiga Akaziyas kiime, a kɩtame tɩ b kʋ Zɩɩda dĩm biisa fãa." 
2Kings11:2 A Zoseba, dĩma a Zoram bi-pugla, la a Akaziyas tão, rɩka a Akaziyas biiga, a Zoas. A kɩtame t'a Zoas ma-wubdga yiisa b sẽn da na n kood b rãmba sʋka n tɩ solg-a gãasa roogẽ. B pa bas t'a Atali yãend-a ye, woto me b pa kʋ-a ye." 
2Kings11:3 Biiga paa ne a ma-wubdga wẽnd doogẽ. B soonda be yʋʋm a yoobe, dẽ t'a Atali n dɩt naam." 
2Kings11:4 Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada tʋmame tɩ b bool noakens sẽn yit Kari la sẽn ya tʋʋm-tʋmdb koabg nanamse n paas tãb-biis sẽn zao wiidi, tɩ b wa sak wẽnd doogẽ. A yõga zood ne bãmb n kɩt tɩ b kãab wẽnd doogẽ, la a wilg-b-la dĩma biiga, a Zoas." 
2Kings11:5 A kõ-b-la noor n yetẽ: «Ad yãmb sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga: Yãmb neb kẽer rɩkda tʋʋmd, vʋʋsg raare. Yaa woto la neb kẽer so dĩma zaka gũub baraare," 
2Kings11:6 tɩ neb kẽer gũud Sur noorã, tɩ neb kẽer gũud noor ning sẽn be tãb-biisa sika poore. Bãmb n na n gũud dĩma zakã n deesd taaba." 
2Kings11:7 Sẽn pa so-b gũub vʋʋsga raarã, bãmb n na n wa baraare n gũ wẽnd doogã, dĩm bila sẽn beẽ wã." 
2Kings11:8 Tãb-biig fãa zãada a sʋʋg a nugẽ, n tigim taab dĩma sẽn be zĩig ninga, n yãagd-a a sẽn dabd zĩig ninga. Ned ning fãa sẽn na n kolg y sẽn yɛsẽ wã tog n kiime.»" 
2Kings11:9 Sẽn so-b neb koabg nanamsa maana maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada sẽn kõ noor ninga fãa; bãmb ned kam fãa peega a neba, sẽn kẽed-b tʋʋmd vʋʋsg daare wa sẽn sigd b tʋʋmde, b fãa waa n bʋʋga a Zoyada." 
2Kings11:10 Maan-kʋʋda pʋɩ tãb-biisa kãsem dãmba dĩma a Daviid kãna la gãndo sẽn da bĩng wẽnd doogẽ. 
2Kings11:11 Tãb-biisa zã b zab-teed b nusẽ, n yals yĩngri wẽnd dooga nug rɩtgo n tɩ tãag wẽnd doogã nug goabga, maan-kugra la Rooga taoore, n gũbg dĩma." 
2Kings11:12 A Zoyada yiisa dĩma biiga, n fõgneg a zug naam pugla, n kɩs-a zooda noya sebre; b kõ-a-la naam, n pʋdg a zug kaam tɩ b wẽ nug pogse la b kelem woto: «Wẽnd na kaoos dĩma!»" 
2Kings11:13 A Atali wʋma zãma wã sẽn kaoog n watẽ wã bʋʋre t'a me yi n naag zãma wã n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ. 
2Kings11:14 La a sẽn gese, a yãeeme tɩ b zaoolga dĩma bũmb sẽn zãnd zugu, wala dog-n-mik sẽn da rate, tɩ kombɛɛmba la tõntõodã rãmba da be dĩma sɛɛgẽ, tɩ neb fãa kɩdemd sũ-noogo, tɩ tõntõod peebdẽ, t'a Atali na n kẽes a futu, la a kelem: «Zãmb wɛɛ! Zãmbo!»" 
2Kings11:15 La Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada kõo tãb-biisa kãsem dãmba noor n yetẽ: «Yiis-y pagãb! Sẽn yik-a t'a be-la a Atali poorẽ, bɩ b kodg-a ne sʋʋga!» Maan-kʋʋda ra yeelame: «Pa tog tɩ b kʋ-a wẽnd dooga pʋg ye.»" 
2Kings11:16 B yõka a Atali, t'a tũ wiidi wã noor n tees dĩma zaka. La b tek n kʋ-a lame." 
2Kings11:17 A Zoyada kɩtame tɩ dĩma la buuda maan kãabgo tɩ b na n yɩɩ Naaba-Wẽnd buudu. 
2Kings11:18 Tẽnga fãa yaool n kaoogame n kẽng a Baal wẽnd doogẽ, la b luba wẽnd doogã, b sarma a maan-kugã la nin-naandsã. A Matã sẽn da yaa a Baal maan-kʋʋdã, b kʋ-a-la maan-kugra taoore. Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada ninga tãb-biisi, Soaala rooga gũub yĩnga." 
2Kings11:19 A peega neb koabg nanamsã, Kari rãmba la gũudba la neba fãa tɩ b na n yiis dĩm a Zoas, wẽnd doogẽ. B waa n zaoondg-a-la dĩm dãmba naam zaoorẽ." 
2Kings11:20 Tẽnga rãmb fãa da kɩdemba sũ-noogo, la na-tẽnga ka rãmb ye. La sã n yaa a Atali, b ra kʋ-a-la ne sʋʋga dĩma zakẽ." 
2Kings12:1 A Zowas da tara yʋʋm a yopoe, a naam reegr wakato." 
2Kings12:2 A Zewu naam yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, la a Zowas lebg dĩma; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-naase, Zerizalɛɛm, a ma da boondame t'a Sibiya, t'a ba yir ya Beerseba." 
2Kings12:3 A Zowas maana sẽn ya tɩrga Wẽnd nifẽ daar fãa, a vɩɩm tɛka tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada da gʋʋl-a-la neere." 
2Kings12:4 La baasgo, wẽn-naandsa waoogra ka boog ye; b da ket n kẽnd n kʋʋda maando la b yõogd tɩdare." 
2Kings12:5 A Zowas yeela maan-kʋʋdba: «Ligda fãa sẽn kõt Naaba-Wẽnd b ro-sõngẽ wã, ligd-dɩtma, b sẽn deegd ned kam fãa nengẽ, wa a sẽn tõe n kɩse, yamleoog kũuna," 
2Kings12:6 bɩ maan-kʋʋdba reeg rẽ fãa n maneg wẽnd doogã, a sẽn wat n dat manegre zĩig ninga.»" 
2Kings12:7 La a Zowas naam yʋʋmd pisi la a tã soaba taame tɩ maan-kʋʋdba pa tol n maneg wẽnd dooga sẽn sãam zĩig ning ye. 
2Kings12:8 La dĩma a Zowas boola maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada ne a tʋmd-n-taase n yeel-ba: «Yaa bõe yĩnga la yãmb pa maneg bũmb ninga fãa sẽn sãam wẽnd doogẽ wã? Marsã tɛka bɩ sẽn deesd-b ligda da le reeg-a n kɩs yãmb ye. B na n kɩsa ligd kãng wẽnd dooga manegdbã.» 
2Kings12:9 La maan-kʋʋdba sakame tɩ b kõn le reeg neba ligd ye, la b kõn le soog wẽnd dooga manegre ye."
