2Kings12:10 Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada dɩka koglg a ye n poog a limda võore n dɩgl maan-kugra sɛɛga. F sã n kẽed wẽnd doogã, a bee f nug rɩtgo. B sẽn zĩndig maan-kʋʋdb niyns tɩ b gũud wẽnd dooga noor n da tog n deegd n ning koglga pʋga ligd ning fãa b sẽn da tar n wat wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
2Kings12:11 B sã n da mik tɩ ligda waooga koglga pʋga, b ra boonda dĩma sɛb gʋlsda la maan-kʋʋd kãsengã tɩ b wa yiis ligda fãa n sõde." 
2Kings12:12 Ligdã sẽn sõdã kɩta sẽn tʋmd-b tʋʋma la sẽn get-b tʋʋma tɩ bãmb deegd-a n yaood da-wãadbã," 
2Kings12:13 tãn-metbã ne kug peesdbã la b daad raado la kug sẽn peese, wẽnd doogã manegr yĩnga, la b yaood manegra sẽn dɩ ligd ning fãa." 
2Kings12:14 Sãnema la wanzurfã b sẽn da reegdã, b ra ka reegd n yõg wẽnd dooga yĩnga, yõg-la-zulumsi, wõrsdse, zɩ-mesdem laase tõntõodo bɩ bũmb a to ye." 
2Kings12:15 Ligd kãng ra kɩta sẽn da tʋmd-b tʋʋmna tɩ b reeg-a wẽnd dooga manegr yĩnga. 
2Kings12:16 B sã n sõd ligdã n kɩs tʋʋmda rãmba b pa le yɛs n kot bãmb tɩ b wilg b sẽn dɩka n maan bũmb ning ye. B rãmba da maanda bũmba fãa ne pʋ-peelem. 
2Kings12:17 B sẽn da kɩt ligdã sugr kosg bɩ yell manegr maoong yĩnga, ligd kãng n da pa kẽed wẽnd dooga rẽnnẽ. A yaa maan-kʋʋdba soolem." 
2Kings12:18 Wakat n waa n zĩndi t'a Azayɛl, Siri dĩma wa kaoog zabre ne Gat tẽng rãmba. B sẽn tõog tẽn-kãnga, a seglame n na n wa tak zabre ne Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings12:19 La a Zowas, Zɩɩda dĩma, wʋka laog ning fãa yẽ saam-dãmba: a Zozafat, a Zoram, a Akaziyas la yẽ meng sẽn da kõ Soaala-Wẽnde, n paas sãnema fãa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ, la dĩma koglgẽ, a pɩɩga fãa n tʋm tɩ b tɩ pʋʋs a Azayɛl, Aram dĩma, t'a sak n loog la a bas Zerizalɛɛm laafi." 
2Kings12:20 A Zowas tʋʋm a taaba la a sẽn maan fãa, pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibara sebr pʋg bɩ?" 
2Kings12:21 A tãnsoaben-dãmba sũu taaba n soos n yẽs ne taaba n na n lub-a. B pãba a Zowas n kʋ. 
2Kings12:22 Yɩ-la a Zozabad, a Simeat biiga, la a Yeozabad, a Somɛr biiga n pãb-a n kʋ, Bɛt-Milo. B mum-a-la ne a saam-dãmba, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ, t'a biiga a Amaziyas led a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings13:1 A Zowas yaa Zɩɩda dĩma a Akaziyas biiga. A Zowas naama pisi la a tãab yʋʋmde la dĩm me reeg naam Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, Samari tẽnga. Yɩ-la a Zoakaz, a Zewu biiga." 
2Kings13:2 A Zoakaz dɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yopoe. A maana sẽn ya wẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a togsa a Zeroboam sẽn lub Israyɛl yel-wẽnd ninga pʋgẽ; a pa tol n woog a wẽnema ye." 
2Kings13:3 Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puur yãnga ne a Israyɛl kamba, tɩ b bas-ba Aram dĩma, a Azayɛl, nugẽ, n le bas-ba a biiga, a Ben-Adad, nugẽ, wakat buud fãa." 
2Kings13:4 La a Zoakaz yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga n sigs b sũuri la b reega a kosgo," 
2Kings13:5 tɩ b yãee wẽoogr ninga Aram dĩma sẽn da wẽoogd a Israyɛl. Naaba-Wẽnd kõ-la a Israyɛl fãagda; a Israyɛl kamba tɩlga Aramsã. B leb n zĩnda b rotẽ wẽnd pĩnda. 
2Kings13:6 La baasgo bãmb kell n ka bas a Zeroboam dooga sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã ye. B pʋs n yɩɩga ne wẽnem menga. Ra-peesdma da ket n lugla Samari tẽnga. 
2Kings13:7 Neb sẽn da tõe n bob zabr la sẽn da ket ne a Zoakaz da pa yɩɩd wed-dʋʋdb pis-nu, bilim-bilm piiga la tãb-biis tus piig bal ye. Yaa Aram dĩma sẽn da kʋ n keesa la rẽ. Aram dĩma ra tab-b-la wa nao sẽn tabd tẽng tom." 
2Kings13:8 A Zoakaz tʋʋm a taaba a sẽn maane, la a raoodã, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibara sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings13:9 A Zoakaz tɩ saka a saam-dãmb tɩ b mum-a Samari, t'a biiga a Zowas led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings13:10 Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zowas da ta-la a naama pis-tã la a yopoe yʋʋmde. Wakat kãng la Zowas a to, a Zoakaz biig lebg dĩm Samari tẽnga, Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yoobe." 
2Kings13:11 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a ka bas a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ ye." 
2Kings13:12 A kell n maana wẽng bala. A Zowas tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maan fãa, a sẽn zab ne a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, ne raood ningã, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibara sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings13:13 A Zowas tɩ saka a saam-dãmba t'a Zeroboam led-a a zaoorẽ. B muma a Zowas Samari ne Israyɛl dĩm dãmbã. 
2Kings13:14 A Elize yika pa-keem, a da bẽeda bãag ninga sẽn na n yɩ a yõor bãaga. A Zowas, a Israyɛl dĩma, wa-la a nengẽ, n mobg-a n yãbd la a yetẽ:" 
2Kings13:15 «M ba, M ba, a Israyɛl pãnga, a tãnsoab menga!» A Elize yeel-a lame: «Rɩk f tãpo, la f pɛɛma.» T'a rɩk tãp la pɛɛma. T'a Elize yeel-a:" 
2Kings13:16 «Dõos tãpã ne f nugu.» Tɩ dĩma dõos tãpã ne a nugu. La a Elize ninga a nugu dĩma nusẽ n yaool n yeel-a: «Pak võore n tees yaanga» Tɩ dĩma pake. 
2Kings13:17 La a Elize yeel-a lame: «Tão!» T'a tão. T'a Elize yeele: «Ad fãagr pĩim sẽn yit Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ. Yaa pĩim sẽn na n fãag yãmb ne Aram. Fo na n pãba Aramsa Afɛk, ali n sãam-b zãnga.»" 
2Kings13:18 A Elize le yeelame: «Rɩk pɛɛma!» Tɩ dĩma dɩk-ba, T'a Elize yeele:" 
2Kings13:19 «Wẽ tẽngã!» Tɩ dĩma wẽ tẽngã naoor a tã n yaase. La Wẽnnaam nedã sũur yika ne-a, a yeelame: «Fo ra kõn wẽẽ naoor a nu bɩ a yoobe woto fo ra na pãbẽ Aram n sãam zãnga la marsã fo na n tõog-a-la naoor a tã bala»" 
2Kings13:20 A Elize kiime tɩ b mum-a. La ade, Moabitsa tãb-biis da mi n kẽeda tẽnga, yʋʋmd yʋʋmd fãa." 
2Kings13:21 Daar a yembre neb da tʋka kũum n na n tɩ mum, la b yãee Moabitsã n lob kũuma a Elize yaoogẽ la b looge. Kũuma sẽn sɩɩs a Elize kõaba, a vʋʋgame n yik n yals yĩngri." 
2Kings13:22 A Azayɛl, Aram dĩma wẽooga a Israyɛl, a Zoakaz vɩɩm tɛka." 
2Kings13:23 La Soaala-Wẽnd maan-b-la bãn-loeere n zoe b nimbãanega, n wilg-b nonglem, n wẽnemd b neng n ges-ba, zooda sẽn da yõg ne a Abraam, la a Izaak, la a Zakoob yĩnga. B ka sak n sãam-a zãng ye. Wakat kãnga b ka rig-ba n yiis b taoor n zãag ye." 
2Kings13:24 Dĩm a Azayɛl kiime t'a biiga Ben-Adad led a zaoorẽ 
2Kings13:25 Wakat kãnga, a Zowas, a Zoakaz biigã, le reega a Azayɛl biig a Ben-Adad nugẽ tẽns-niyns a sẽn da gʋsg a ba a Zoakaz naamẽ, zabr wẽnde. A Zowas tõog-b-la naoor a tã n le reeg a Israyɛl tẽnse." 
2Kings14:1 Israyɛl dĩma a Zoakaz biig a Zowas sẽn lebg dĩm tɩ yʋʋmbitẽ la Zɩɩda dĩm a Zowas biig a Amaziyas lebg dĩma. 
2Kings14:2 A naam deegr wakato, rẽ t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu, a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zerizalɛɛm. A ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Zoadã, n da ya Zerizalɛɛm paga." 
2Kings14:3 A mana sẽn ya tɩrga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, la yaool n ka yɩ wala a saamba a Daviid ye; yɩɩ wala a ba, a Zowas." 
2Kings14:4 Ne rẽ fãa tãmsa zut wẽn-naands waoogr zĩisa ra ketame tɩ neba ket n kʋʋd maando la b yõogd tɩdare. 
2Kings14:5 A naama pãng sẽn waa n paase, a kʋʋ na-yir dãmba sẽn da yiis a ba yõore." 
2Kings14:6 A pa kʋ b kamb ye, tɩ wala sẽn gʋls a Moyiiz noora sebr pʋgẽ, dẽ ra kisame. Naaba-Wẽnd da yeelame: Ba rãmba kõn kʋ, b kamb beegr yĩng ye, kamb me pa kʋʋd, b ba rãmb beegr yĩng ye; b kʋʋda neda a meng yel-wẽnd yĩng bala." 
2Kings14:7 Yẽ n zab ne Edomitsã yamsem aoogẽ n tõog-ba, dap na ta tus piiga; yẽ n zab n deeg Sela n pʋd a yʋʋr tɩ Yokteyɛl, la b ket n boonda yʋ-kãng al ne rũnna." 
2Kings14:8 A Amaziyas kong n tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛl dĩma a Zowas, a Zoakaz biiga la a Zewu yagenga: «Aya, wa-y tɩ d seg taaba!»" 
2Kings14:9 La a Zowas, Israyɛl dĩma tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Amaziyas Zɩɩda dĩma woto: «Libã yõeens-tabda tʋmame tɩ b yeel Libã kʋka: ‹Rɩk f bi-pugla n kõ m bi-ribla t'a maan a paga.› La ade, Libã we-rũnga taba a yõeens-tabdo." 
2Kings14:10 Yaa sɩda, fo zaba ne Edom la fo tõog-a lame, tɩ f sũur wʋk ne wilg-m-menga. Nage la f kell n pa f yiri. Bõe tɩ f na n bao yelle n kõ f menga, n wa ne f menga la Zɩɩda fãa sãoongo?»" 
2Kings14:11 La a Amaziyas pa kelg-a ye. Yẽ ne Israyɛl dĩma, a Zowas, sega taaba Bɛt-Semɛs, Zɩɩda soolmẽ." 
2Kings14:12 A Israyɛl tõoga a Zɩɩda, tɩ rapa fãa zoe n tɩ kẽ b rotẽ." 
2Kings14:13 La a Zowas, Israyɛl dĩma, yõka Zɩɩda dĩma, a Amaziyas, a Zowas biiga la a Akaziyas yagenga, n tɩ pag roog Bɛt-Semɛs. Dẽ poore a waa Zerizalɛɛm; a luba Zerizalɛɛm lalga wɛdga, a Efrayim dagnoorẽ n tãag Gõdra dagnoorã; lalga lʋɩɩ na ta kãntɩɩs kobs-naase." 
2Kings14:14 A Zowas wʋka sãnema la wanzurf la laoga fãa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ la dĩma ligda koglgẽ. A yõga neb n paas tɩ ya waa a raa bãmb dãmba yõore, n mi tɩ nin-bãmb yĩnga ned kõn tees n gɩdg-b ye, la a leba Samari." 
2Kings14:15 A Zowas tʋʋm a taaba a sẽn mane, a raooda yelle, a zaba ne a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings14:16 A Zowas tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, b mum-a-la Samari ne a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba, t'a biiga a Zeroboam led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings14:17 A Zowas biiga, a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, le kaoosa ne yõore, yʋʋm piig la a nu, Israyɛl dĩma, a Zowas kũum poore. A Zowas yaa a Zoakaz biiga," 
2Kings14:18 A Amaziyas tʋʋm a taaba, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibarã sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings14:19 Neb seda ne taaba Zerizalɛɛm n na n lub-a, t'a zoe n kẽng Lakis, tɩ b tʋm neba tɩ b babs-a Lakis, la b kʋ-a lame." 
2Kings14:20 B rɩk-a-la ne wiidi n tɩ mum Zerizalɛɛm ne a saam-dãmba, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ." 
2Kings14:21 Zɩɩda neba fãa tũusa a Azariyas sẽn da tar yʋʋm piig la a yoobe t'a rɩ naam, n led a ba, a Amaziyas, naama zaoorẽ." 
2Kings14:22 Yẽ n le n maneg n me Ebat tẽnga n yalse, Zɩɩda dĩma kũum poore." 
2Kings14:23 A Zowas biiga, a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, naam piig la a nu yʋʋmde, Israyɛl dĩma, a Zowas biig a Zeroboam n dɩ naam Samari, yʋʋm pis-naas la a ye." 
2Kings14:24 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ; a pa tol n bas a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Kings14:25 Yẽ n lebs a Israyɛl toaagã a zĩigẽ, sẽn sɩng Lebo-Amat n tɩ tãag Yamsem Mogre, wala Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sẽn da pĩnd n togs ne a Zonas noore. A Zonas yaa Gat-Efɛr bãngda, yaa a Amitayi biiga," 
2Kings14:26 Naaba-Wẽnd da yãee yãnd kãseng ning a Israyɛl sẽn da paame. Yamba bɩ burkĩna, ned ba a ye da ka be sẽn fãagda Israyɛl ye." 
2Kings14:27 Naaba-Wẽnd yaool n da nan pa kaool tɩ b na n yẽesa Israyɛl yʋʋre saaga tẽngr ye. Yaa rẽ yĩng la b lʋɩɩs a Zowas biiga a Zeroboam taoore, n fãag-a." 
2Kings14:28 A Zeroboam tʋʋm a taaba a sẽn maan fãa, a sẽn zab ne raood ning n le reeg Amat la Damas n lebs a Israyɛl, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings14:29 Dẽ poore a Zeroboam tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, tɩ b mum-a Samari ne Israyɛl dĩm dãmba, t'a biig a Zakari led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings15:1 Israyɛl dĩma a Zeroboam naam pisi la a yopoe yʋʋmde, a Amaziyas biiga a Azariyas n dɩ Zɩɩda naam." 
2Kings15:2 A naam reegr wakato t'a tara yʋʋm piig la a yoobe; a rɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋm pis-nu la a yi. A ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Yekoliya, t'a ba yir ya Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings15:3 A maana sẽn ya tɩrga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a ba Amaziyas sẽn maane." 
2Kings15:4 La baasgo tãmsa zut wẽn-naandsa waoogr zĩisa ra ketame tɩ neb me ra ket n kẽnd be n kʋʋd maand la b yõogd tɩdare. 
2Kings15:5 Naaba-Wẽnd wẽe dĩma t'a lebg yĩng soaba n tãag a kũum, t'a kell n zĩnd, a ye, roog sẽn zãag ne a taaba pʋga. A biiga a Zotam n da get a yir yelle la a soolma." 
2Kings15:6 A Azariyas tʋʋm a taaba la a sẽn maan fãa, dẽ pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibar sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings15:7 A Azariyas tɩ saka a saam-dãmba tɩ b mum-a a Daviid na-tẽngẽ, t'a biiga a Zotam led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings15:8 A Azariyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, naam pis-tã la a nii yʋʋmde la a Zeroboam biiga a Zakari lebg Israyɛl dĩma, Samari, n dɩ naam kiis a yoobe." 
2Kings15:9 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a saam-dãmba sẽn maane a pa tol n bas a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Kings15:10 A Yabɛs biiga, a Salum, zãmb-a lame, a pãb-a-la neba fãa nifẽ n kʋ, n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings15:11 A Zakari tʋʋm a taabã, ade, b gʋls-b-la a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋga." 
2Kings15:12 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd gomd n pidsi, bãmb sẽn da pĩnd n yeel a Zewu: «Fo yagens na n zaoonda a Israyɛl naam zaoore tɩ ta zamaan a naas soaba.» Sɩd yɩɩ boto." 
2Kings15:13 A Salum, a Yabɛs biigã, lebga dĩma, Zɩɩda dĩma a Azariyas naam pis-tã la a wɛ yʋʋmde. A rɩɩ naam kiuug a ye, Samari." 
2Kings15:14 A Menaem, a Gadi biiga, yii Tirsa n wa Samari, n pãb a Yabɛs biig, a Salum, n kʋ, la a led-a, a naam zaoorẽ." 
2Kings15:15 A Salum tʋʋm a taabã la a suduma, ade, yɛl bãmb fãa gʋlsa Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ." 
2Kings15:16 Wakat kãnga la a Menaem pãb Tifsa n kʋ nebã sẽn da be a pʋgẽ la a tẽn-toosa gilli, sẽn sɩng Tirsa. A maana boto tɩ tẽnga rãmb zãgsame tɩ b kõn pak b kʋɩlens ye. La a sẽn kẽ, a weeda tʋtr-pʋsa fãa sẽn da be-b tẽn-kãnga." 
2Kings15:17 A Azariyas, a Zɩɩda dĩma, naam yʋʋmd pis-tã la a wɛ yĩnga, a Menaem, a Gadi biiga, lebga a Israyɛl dĩma, a rɩɩ naam Samari yʋʋm piiga." 
2Kings15:18 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a pa tol n bas yel-wẽna fãa a Zeroboam, a Nebat biigã, sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Kings15:19 Asiri dĩma a Ypl waa n kẽe tẽngã. La a Menaem kõ-a-la wanzurf sẽn ta neb tusr la kobs nu zɩɩbo t'a sõng t'a naama paam pãnga a nugẽ. 
2Kings15:20 Ad-a Menaem sẽn paam ligda to-to. Israyɛl biig fãa nug sẽn da zãade da tog n kɩsa bũmbu tɩ b saglg Asiri dĩma nugẽ, ned kam fãa ra kɩta wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-nu. Woto a leba a tẽngẽ." 
2Kings15:21 A Menaem tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maan fãa, dẽ pa gʋls a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebra pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings15:22 A Menaem tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, t'a biiga a Pekaya led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings15:23 Zɩɩda dĩm a Azariyas naam pis-nu yʋʋmde, a Pekaya, a Menaem biiga, lebga Israyɛl dĩm yʋʋm a yi, Samari." 
2Kings15:24 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, a pa bas yel-wẽna, a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl wẽng pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Kings15:25 A Peka, a Remaliya biiga sẽn da ya wed-kɩɩma zãmb-a lame, a kʋ-a lame, dĩma gaosg pʋga, neb pis-nu n da be ne-a, Galaad dãmba." 
2Kings15:26 A kʋʋ dĩma n led-a a naam zaoorẽ. A Pekaya tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maane, yell bãmb fãa gʋlsa a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ." 
2Kings15:27 A Zɩɩda dĩma, a Azariyas naam pis-nu la a yi yʋʋmde, a Remaliya biiga, a Peka, n lebg a Israyɛl dĩm Samari; a dɩɩ naam yʋʋm pisi." 
2Kings15:28 A maana sẽn ya wẽnga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ; a pa tol n bas a Zeroboam, a Nebat biiga, sẽn maan n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã ye." 
2Kings15:29 A Israyɛl dĩma a Peka zamaanẽ, a Teglat-Falasar, Asiri dĩma waa n zabame n deeg Iyõ, Abɛl-Bɛt-Maaka, Yanoa, Kedɛs, Asor, Galaad, Galile la Neftali tẽnsa fãa, n wʋk neba n kẽng yembdo, Asiri." 
2Kings15:30 A Oze, a Elat biiga, soos n zãmba a Peka, a Remaliya biigã, n pãb-a n kʋ, n led-a a naam zaoorẽ, a Azariyas biig a Zotam naam pisi yʋʋmde. A Zotam dɩɩ naam Zɩɩda." 
2Kings15:31 A Peka tʋʋm a taabã, a sẽn maan fãa, ade, yell bãmb gʋlsa a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ." 
2Kings15:32 A Peka, a Remaliya biigã, Israyɛl dĩma, naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, a Zotam, a Azariyas biiga, n dɩ Zɩɩda naam." 
2Kings15:33 A ra tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu a naam deegr wakato, la a rɩɩ yʋʋm piig la a yoobe Zerizalɛɛm, a ma yʋʋr boondame t'a Yerusa, a ra yaa a Sadok biiga." 
2Kings15:34 A mana sẽn ya tɩrga Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a ba a Azariyas sẽn maane." 
2Kings15:35 La baasgo, wẽn-naandsa waoogra ra ketame; neba ra ket n kẽnd n kʋʋda maanda yaare la b yõod tɩdare. Yaa a Zotam n me wẽnd dooga dignoor ninga sẽn zãnda n yɩɩd a taabã." 
2Kings15:36 A Zotam tʋʋm a taaba, a sẽn maan fãa, rẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings15:37 Yɩɩ yẽnda wakatẽ la Aram dĩm, a Resẽ la a Remaliya biig a Peka paam Soaala-Wẽnd sore n kaoog zabre ne a Zɩɩda." 
2Kings15:38 A Zotam saka a saam-dãmba; b mum-a-la a saamba, a Daviid, na-tẽngẽ, ne a saam-dãmba, t'a biiga Akaz led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings16:1 A Peka, a Remaliya biiga, naam piig la a yopoe yʋʋmde, Zɩɩda dĩma a Zotam biiga, a Akaz, lebga dĩma." 
2Kings16:2 A Akaz yʋʋma da taa pisi a naam deegr wakato, la a rɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, yʋʋm piig la a yoobe. A pa maan sẽn ya tɩrg Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ wala a saamba a Daviid ye." 
2Kings16:3 A rɩka Israyɛl dĩm dãmba nao, n tol n kɩt t'a biig pɩʋʋg bugum wa bu-zẽmba sẽn da maand yel-yood niynsã tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd rig-b Israyɛl kamba taoore." 
2Kings16:4 A kʋʋ maando, n yõog tɩdare, tãmsã zutu la tɩɩg sẽn tobd maasem wʋsg fãa tẽngre." 
2Kings16:5 Wakat kãnga, a Resẽ, Aram dĩma, ne a Peka, a Remaliya biiga la Israyɛl dĩma, yiisa tãpo n na n tak zabre Zerizalɛɛm. B gũbga a Akaz la b pa tõog n tak zabr ne-a ye." 
2Kings16:6 Yaa wakat kãng me la a Resẽ, Aram dĩma, dig Zɩɩda rãmba n yiis Elat tɩ Edomitsa paam n kẽ be, la b kell n paa tẽng kãnga tɩ tãag rũnna." 
2Kings16:7 A Akaz tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ yeel a Teglat-Falasar, Asiri dĩma, woto: «Mam yaa yãmb yamba la y biiga. Wa-y n fãag-y-ma, Siri dãmba la a Israyɛl dĩma nusẽ tɩ b yika zabr ne maam»" 
2Kings16:8 A Akaz wʋka wanzurf la sãnem fãa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ la dĩma ligda koglgẽ, la a tʋmame tɩ b tɩ pʋʋs Asiri dĩma." 
2Kings16:9 Asiri dĩma kelga a koɛɛga; Asiri kẽng n tɩ pãba Damas n sooge. A wʋka a nebã n kẽng yembdo al Kir la a kʋ-la a Resẽ. 
2Kings16:10 Dĩma Akaz tɩ sega a Teglat-Falasar, Asiri dĩma, Damas tẽnga. A yãee maan-kugr ninga sẽn da be Damas. La dĩma Akaz maga maan-kugrã, a woglem, a yalem, a zãndlem n tool a Uriya, maan-kʋʋdã." 
2Kings16:11 Dĩma a Akaz sẽn zĩnd Damas n tool tɩ b maan bũmb ningã, maan-kʋʋd, a Uriya, tũu fãa kɛpi tɩ dĩma Akaz nan pa yi Damas n wa ye." 
2Kings16:12 Dĩma sẽn yi Damas n wa, a yãee maan-kugrã, a kolga maan-kugrã n dʋ-a." 
2Kings16:13 A menga toor kʋʋ yũ-noog maoongo n tũnug ne zom la rãam n le paas laafi kosg maoongo, n dɩk zɩɩma n daag maan-kugra zugu." 
2Kings16:14 A kɩtame tɩ b viig zũud maan-kugr sõngã sẽn da be wẽnd dooga noorã, wẽnd dooga ne maan-kugr paalga sʋka. A tɩ ning-a-la maan-kugr paalga poore, nug goabga." 
2Kings16:15 La dĩma Akaz yaool n kõo maan-kʋʋd a Uriya noor kãnga: «Yaa maan-kugr kãsenga zug la f na n kʋ maoongo. F na n kʋʋ yibeoog yũ-noog maoongã; zaabre, be la f na n kõ zoma, be la f na n kʋ dĩma yũ-noog maoongo la f tũnug-a a sẽn tog n tũnug bũmb ningã. Lebd n kʋʋ buuda maandã la f tũnug-b ne zom la rãam la f raag rũmsa zɩɩm. Sã n ya zũud maan-kugrã mam meng na ges m sẽn na n maanega.»" 
2Kings16:16 Maan-kʋʋd a Uriya maana dĩma a Akaz sẽn yeela fãa. 
2Kings16:17 Dĩma a Akaz kɩtame tɩ b kɛ wẽnd dooga bilim-bilma n lags b zũudã la b sik b sĩmsã sẽn da zao b zugã. A kɩtame tɩ b sik n dɩgl kug peesem zugu sĩn-kãsenga sẽn da zao niis piig la a yiiba zugã. 
2Kings16:18 A sẽn da rat n noog Asiri dĩma sũuri, a Akaz teema zãong ning sẽn da be wẽnd dooga kɩreng tɩ b boond tɩ Vʋʋsg raar zãongã; a le teema dĩma sẽn da tũud noor ning n kẽed wẽnd doogã." 
2Kings16:19 A Akaz sẽn maan fãa, rẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings16:20 A Akaz tɩ saka a saam-dãmba tɩ b mum-a a Daviid na-tẽngẽ ne a saam-dãmba; a biiga a Ezekiyas n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Kings17:1 Zɩɩda dĩma a Akaz naam piig la a yiib yʋʋmde, a Oze, a Ela biiga, lebga Israyɛl dĩma, Samari. Yaa yʋʋm a wɛ la a a rɩ naam." 
2Kings17:2 A maana sẽn pa neere Soaala-Wẽnnaam nifẽ, la pa yɩ wala Israyɛl dĩm dãmba sẽn deng yẽ wã ye." 
2Kings17:3 Asiri dĩm a Salmanazar waame n na n zab ne a Oze, la a tõog-a lame n kit t'a yaood fadgo." 
2Kings17:4 Asiri dĩma waa n bãngame t'a Oze da zãmbd-a lame. A Oze da soos n tʋma neb tɩ b kẽng Ezipt dĩm a So nengẽ, la a da pa yao Asiri dĩma fadgo wala yʋʋmd fãa ye. Asiri dĩma kẽes-a-la bi-bees roogẽ, n balg-a bãnga." 
2Kings17:5 Asiri dĩma bobame n na n zab ne tẽnga fãa, n wa gũbg Samari, n na n yẽd-a, n pãb-a, yʋʋm a tã tõre, n tõog-a." 
2Kings17:6 La a wʋka Israyɛl kamba n kẽng yembdo Asiri. A tɩ zĩndig-b-la Ala, la Abor, Gozã kʋɩlga noorẽ, la Mɛd dãmba tẽnsa pʋsẽ." 
2Kings17:7 Sẽn yɩ woto wã, yaa a Israyɛl kamba sẽn beeg Naaba-Wẽnd, bãmb Wẽnnaam, sẽn da yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga, n yols-b ne Ezipt dĩma wẽoogre. Yaa b sẽn bas tɩ wẽn-naandsa rabeem yõk-bã." 
2Kings17:8 Bãmb tũu bu-zẽmba noya, bu-zẽmb niyns Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da rig b rãmba n yiis bãmb taoorã. B tũu noy-niyns Israyɛl dĩm dãmba sẽn da kõ b mense." 
2Kings17:9 Israyɛl kamba tʋma sẽn kisi, n paoog Naaba-Wẽnde, bãmb Wẽnnaam. B mee roto b kunkuba zutu, wẽn-naandsa waoogr yĩnga, b sẽn kẽ tẽng ning fãa, gasda zutu wala b tãnsoben-dotẽ." 
2Kings17:10 B lugla maan-kuga, n sel ra-peesdi tãmsã fãa zutu, la tɩɩsa maasmẽ." 
2Kings17:11 B kunkuba zutu b yõoga tɩdare wala buud a taaba, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn dig b rãmb n yiis bãmb taoore. B tʋma tʋʋm yoodo n beeg Naab Wẽnde." 
2Kings17:12 Bãmb waooga wẽn-naandse, la Naaba-Wẽnd da yaool n yeela bãmba: «Da saag-y n maan dẽnna ye.»" 
2Kings17:13 Naaba-Wẽnd da sagla a Zɩɩda ne a Israyɛl ne no-rɛɛsdba la bãngdba fãa. B sagl-b la woto: «Bɩ y teem zʋgo, reeg-y m noya, pids-y m daabã. Noy bãmb la m sẽn kõ y ba rãmba tɩ m tʋʋm-tʋmdba la bãngdba reeg n taas yãmbã.»" 
2Kings17:14 La b pa reeg noora ye; b kenga b yubla n yɩɩd b saam-dãmba sẽn maane, n pa tẽ Naaba-Wẽnd, bãmb Wẽnnaam ye." 
2Kings17:15 B sãbsa b noya ne b Zoodã b sẽn yõg ne b saam-dãmbã. Naaba-Wẽnd maka zaalem n na leb n nek b pʋtẽere. Bãmb zoe n pʋga sẽn ka võore, la ad-b sẽn yɛs zaalem. B pʋga buud niyns sẽn da gũbg bãmbã. Soaala-Wẽnd da yaool n sagl-b lame tɩ b ra maan wa bãmb ye." 
2Kings17:16 Bãmb zãgsa Naaba-Wẽnd, bãmb Wẽnnaam, noya fãa; bãmb yõga zũudu n maan nag-bi a yiibu. Bãmb peesa raado, n sel, n sɩng-b waoogre, b waooga yĩngr ãdsã, b waooga a Baal." 
2Kings17:17 Bãmb kɩtame tɩ b kom-pugli la b kom-dibli pɩʋʋg bugum; b bʋga bagre, n sok wẽn-naandse, n sak wẽnem n beeg Wẽnnaam b Soaala." 
2Kings17:18 La Naaba-Wẽnd sũur yĩiga ne a Israyɛl, ali wʋsgo, tɩ b yiis-a b taoore, n kees a Zɩɩda bal a ye." 
2Kings17:19 A Zɩɩda me ka reeg Naaba-Wẽnd noya ye. Yaa a Israyɛl sẽn da yals bũmb niynsa la a tũ yã. 
2Kings17:20 Dẽ n so tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yam yi ne Israyɛl buud gilli, tɩ b ning-a yãnde n bas-a ne fãadba, n wa baas n dig-b n zãag bãmb taoore." 
2Kings17:21 Sɩd me, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn waa n welg a Israyɛl ne a Daviid roogo, t'a Israyɛl yãka a Zeroboam, a Nebat biigã, n kõ a naam, ad-y yaa yẽnna, ad-y yaa a Zeroboam n zãag a Israyɛl ne Naaba-Wẽnde, n kɩt t'a lʋɩ yel-wẽn-kãseng pʋgẽ." 
2Kings17:22 A Israyɛl kamba togsa a Zeroboam n maan yel-wẽn niyns fãa a sẽn maana. 
2Kings17:23 Naaba-Wẽnd me waa n makame n kong n dig a Israyɛl n yiis b taoore, wala b sẽn da kɩt tɩ bãngdbã, bãmb neba, pĩnd n togs-ba. B waa n kong n basame tɩ b wʋka a Israyɛl kamba n kẽng Asiri, tɩ b zãag ne b tẽnga, n ta rũnna." 
2Kings17:24 Asiri dĩma kɩtame tɩ neb yi Babilon, n yi Kuta, Ava, Amat la Sefarwayim, n zĩndig-b Samari tẽnsã fãa pʋsẽ tɩ b reeg a Israyɛl kamba zĩiga. B reega Samari n maan b tẽnga n kẽ a tẽn-peelma fãa." 
2Kings17:25 B sẽn wa n ta tẽnga paalem, bãmb sẽn da pa waoogd Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd tʋma gɩgma tɩ b wat n kʋʋd-ba." 
2Kings17:26 Dẽ me la b waa m yeel Asiri dĩma: «Neb niyns fo sẽn wa n zĩndig Samari wã pa mi tẽnga rãmb wẽnda sẽn waoogd seem ning ye, la yaa rẽ la b wẽnda tʋm gɩgma tɩ b wa wãb-ba.»" 
2Kings17:27 Asiri dĩma kõo noor kãnga: «Bɩ y yãk maan-kʋʋd a ye m sẽn kẽes yembdo t'a lebg n wa zĩnd ka n zãms-b Israyɛl Wẽnnaam pʋʋsgo.» 
2Kings17:28 La maan-kʋʋdba b sẽn da yõg Samari n loog pa-weerã sʋka, ned a yembre n wa n zĩnd Betɛl: la a da zãmsd-b-la Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn tog n waoog seem ninga." 
2Kings17:29 La sã n ya sɩda, Asiri rãmba maana wẽn-naandse n kõ b menga, n ning-b pʋʋsga zĩisẽ, Samari dãmba sẽn da me wã. Buud kam fãa ra maanda boto, a sẽn da be tẽng ning pʋgẽ:" 
2Kings17:30 Babilon dãmba da maana b Sukot-Benot, tɩ Kuta rãmba maan b Nergal, tɩ Amat rãmba maan b Asima." 
2Kings17:31 Awa rãmba maana b Nibaz la b Tartak, tɩ Sefarwayim dãmb ket n yõod b kamb bugum a Adramelɛk la a Anamelɛk waoogr yĩnga. Bãmb n da ya Sefarwayim wẽn-naandsã." 
2Kings17:32 B da rigda Naaba-Wẽnd dabeem la bãmb sʋka, b ra tũusa neba n maan b maan-kʋʋdba, sẽn da pʋʋsd bãmb zĩigẽ, b wẽn-naandsa rotẽ." 
2Kings17:33 Woto b ra waoogda Naaba-Wẽnd la b ra waoogda b wẽn-naandsa me, wala bu-zẽna sẽn da maand b tẽnsẽ." 
2Kings17:34 Al ne rũnna, b ket n tũuda b pĩnd dog-m-mika. B ra pa waoogd Naaba-Wẽnde, b pa tũud b sẽn yeel-b tɩ b waoog b seem ninga, b pa tũud saglsã la noya Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a Zakoob kamba n tol n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Israyɛla ye." 
2Kings17:35 Naaba-Wẽnd da yõga zoodo ne bãmba n da kõ-b noor kãnga: «Bɩ y da saag n waoog bu-zẽn wẽn-naandsa ye, da wõgemd-y bãmb taoor ye; da pʋʋs-y-b ye; la y da kõ-b maand ye." 
2Kings17:36 Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd bal n yiis yãmb Ezipt soolmẽ ne b pãng kẽeng ningã, b sẽn tẽeg b kanga raarã. Yaa bãmb la yãmb na n pʋʋs la y waoog ne maando." 
2Kings17:37 Yãmb na n tũ b sẽn wilg yãmb tɩ y pʋʋs seem ninga, n deeg noya b sẽn gʋls n kõ yãmba, la y reeg b neer daar fãa, la y ra waoog wẽn-naandsa ye." 
2Kings17:38 Bɩ y da saag n yĩm zooda mam sẽn yõg ne yãmb ye, la y da waoog wẽn-naandsa ye." 
2Kings17:39 Waoog-y Naaba-Wẽnd, yãmb Wẽnnaam bala, la bãmb na n fãaga yãmb y bɛɛb nusẽ.»" 
2Kings17:40 La a Israyɛl kamb pa reeg b noor ye, bãmb kell n tũu b pĩnd dog-n-mikã." 
2Kings17:41 Woto nin-bãmba buudu da waoogda Naaba-Wẽnd, la b da waoogd wẽn-naandse tɩ b kamba la b yagens ket n maand dẽ rũnna." 
2Kings18:1 Yaa a Ela biiga a Oze, Israyɛl dĩma, naama yʋʋmd a tãab soaba la a Ezekiyas, a Akaz biiga, lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
2Kings18:2 A naama sɩngrẽ t'a ra tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zerizalɛɛm; a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Abi; a ra yaa a Zakari biiga. 
2Kings18:3 A maana sẽn noom Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri, n togs a saamba, a Daviid, sẽn maane." 
2Kings18:4 Yẽ m sãam pʋʋsga zĩisi, n wã tẽn-kuga fãa, la a kɛ da-peesdi wã fãa n kʋʋse, la a wã zũud waafã a Moyiiz sẽn da maana. Bãng-y tɩ Israyɛl kamba da yik n yõogda tɩdare, zũud waafa taoore, n ta a Akaz biiga waoongo la b da boond-a zũud waafa t'a Newustã." 
2Kings18:5 Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam bala, la a Ezekiyas da teegre. Yẽ poore, dĩm a to ka zĩnd Zɩɩda pʋgẽ sẽn wẽneg a ye, la pa zĩnd pĩnd me ye." 
2Kings18:6 A kẽe Soaala-Wẽnde, n pa tol n yi b poorẽ, abada." 
2Kings18:7 A tũu noy-niyns fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a Moyiiz. Yaa rẽ n so tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pa ne-a, daar fãa, al t'a sẽn maan fãa zĩnd barka. A zẽka a zug ne Asiri dĩma, a pa le sak-a ye." 
2Kings18:8 Yẽ n pãb Filisti rãmba n tɩ tãag Gaza, n sãam b tẽngã, n lub tãb-gũudba roto la tãnsoben-doto." 
2Kings18:9 A Ezekiyas naama dɩɩb yʋʋmd a naas soaba, a Ela biiga a Oze, a Israyɛl dĩma, sẽn sɩng a naama rɩɩbo tɩ yʋʋm maan a yopoe, a Salmanazar, Asiri dĩma, waa n kaooga zabre ne Samari, n gũbg-a n pãbe." 
2Kings18:10 Yʋʋm a tã pʋgẽ la b tõog-a. A Ezekiyas sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm yoaablẽ, t'a Oze rɩt naam tɩ yʋʋm wɛɛlẽ la b tõog Samari." 
2Kings18:11 Asiri dĩma wʋka Israyɛl kamba n kẽng pa-weere, Asiri, n tɩ zĩndig-b Ala, Abor, Gozã kʋɩlga noore, la Mɛd rãmba tẽns pʋsẽ." 
2Kings18:12 La yaa bãmb sẽn pa sak Naaba-Wẽnd gomdã, bãmb Wẽnnaam gomdã, la zooda sẽn sãama. A Moyiiz, Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmda, sẽn da yeel bãmb bũmb ningã, b pa kelge, b pa tũ gomd ba a ye." 
2Kings18:13 Dĩm a Ezekiyas naama piig la a naas yʋʋmde, a Senakerib, Asiri dĩma, taka zabre ne Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnsã, n tõog-ba." 
2Kings18:14 A Ezekiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, tʋmame tɩ b yeel Asiri dĩma Lakis tẽnga: «Mam pa maan neer ye, m kotame tɩ y ra maam zabr ye; mam na n saka yãmb sẽn na n kõ-m noor ning fãa.» La Asiri dĩma kõ-la a Ezekiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, noore t'a bao wanzurf sẽn ta neb kobs-naas la pis-nu zɩɩbo, la sãnem sẽn ta neb pis-naas la a nu zɩɩbo." 
2Kings18:15 La a Ezekiyas kɩs-a-la ligd ning fãa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ, la naaba ligda kogendẽ." 
2Kings18:16 Yaa wakat kãnga la a Ezekiyas lags sãnema dĩma a ye sẽn da tablg wẽnd doog kʋɩlensã n dɩk n kɩs Asiri dĩma. 
2Kings18:17 La Asiri dĩma zĩnda Lakis n tʋm a Ezekiyas nengẽ, a tãnsoaben kãsenga ne a pʋgdga la tãb-biis wʋsgo. B fãa waa Zerizalɛɛm, la b sẽn ta be, b yalsa ko-sor ning sẽn takd kooma n wat ko-baoor ning sẽn be fu-pɛgdba pʋʋga sora noorã." 
2Kings18:18 B bolga dĩma, tɩ na-yiri sõgen-kãsenga, a Eliyakim, a Ilkiya biiga n paas seb gʋlsda a Sebna, la no-rɛɛs a Zoa, a Asaf biiga, yii n bʋʋg-ba." 
2Kings18:19 La tãnsoab kãsenga yeel-b lame: «A Ezekiyas tog n bãngame tɩ dĩm kãsengã, Asiri dĩma, gomda woto: ‹Yaa bõe teegre la f teeg yã?" 
2Kings18:20 Fo tẽedame tɩ noor gomd bal seka a kõ-f raoodo la sɩlem sẽn na n kiis zabr bɩ? Pʋs n yaa ãnd la f teeg yã n yik n zẽkd f zug ne maam? 
2Kings18:21 Ad-fo teega Ezipt rudum kãoongã sẽn sorgd ned ning fãa nug sẽn tikd-a. Woto la Ezipt dĩma maand ne ned ning fãa sẽn teegd-a! 
2Kings18:22 Daare, yãmb na n yeelame: Tõnd teega Naaba-Wẽnd, tõnd Wẽnnaam; la ka bãmb yẽne wẽnd doogo la foom a Ezekiyas sẽn lubã la f kõ Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda rãmba noor tɩ b ra le waoog Naaba-Wẽnd sã n ka Zerizalɛɛm maan-kugra taoor bɩ?" 
2Kings18:23 Be neere, bɩf maan sardo ne m zu-soaba, Asiri dĩma, mam na n kõ foom wiidi tus a yi, fo sã n tõe n yãe wed-dʋʋdba sẽn na n zomb-ba." 
2Kings18:24 Fo pãng bɛɛ tɩ f tõe n tus mam zu-soaba komber a ye, a sõgen bil a ye menga t'a serge. Bõe tɩ f teeg Ezipt dĩma, n gũud bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdba?" 
2Kings18:25 La y tẽedame tɩ ka sẽn zems ne Naaba-Wẽnd daabo la m sẽn wa Zerizalɛɛm ka, n na n wã-a wã bɩ? Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n yeele: kẽng n tɩ tak zabr ne tẽngã n sãam-a.› »" 
2Kings18:26 A Ilkiya biig a Eliyakim, a Sebna la a Zoa yeela sõgen kãsenga: «Y kabre, gom-y ne yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmdba Aramde tɩ tõnd wʋmdame, la y da gom ne Ebre dãmba goam tɩ neba sẽn be lalga zugã kelgdame.»" 
2Kings18:27 La sõgen kãsenga yeel-b lame «Fo tẽedame tɩ yaa foom bɩ f zu-soaba la b tʋm tɩ m wa togs-y gom kãensã? Ka yãmb bal ye, yaa nim bãmba sẽn zao lalga zugu, n ka le tar dabaar a to sã ka b rɩ b bĩndu la b yũ b rʋʋd kooma wala yãmbã?»" 
2Kings18:28 Sõgen kãsenga yalsa lalga zugu n zẽk a koɛɛga n moon ne Ebre rãmb goama, la a yeela woto: «Kelg-y Asiri dĩma koɛɛga:" 
2Kings18:29 A Ezekiyas da belg yãmb zaalem t'a kõn tõog n fãag yãmb mam nugẽ ye. 
2Kings18:30 A Ezekiyas da belg yã tɩ y maan tẽeb ne y Naaba-Wẽnd n yetẽ: ‹Sɩda Soaala-Wẽnd na n fãag-d lame, d tẽnga kõn lʋɩ Asiri dĩma nugẽ ye.›" 
2Kings18:31 Bɩ y da kelg a Ezekiyas ye tɩ Asiri dĩma koɛɛg la woto: ‹Bɩ y yẽs laafi yẽsgo ne maam. Rɩk-y y mense n kõ maam, la yãmb ned kam fãa na n rɩ a bugsuntund biisi, la a kankams kankama, la a yũu a ko-baoã koom," 
2Kings18:32 n gũudẽ tɩ m wa peeg-y n kẽng tẽng a ye sẽn wẽnd yãmb tẽngã, alkam la rãam tẽngã, kaam la sɩɩd tẽnga, tɩ y vɩɩnde la y ra ki ye.› Da kelg-y dĩm, a Ezekiyas, t'a belga yãmb n yetẽ: ‹Naaba-Wẽnd na n fãaga tõndo!›" 
2Kings18:33 M sok n gese: buud a taaba wẽnd dãmba tõoga da-bʋre n fãag b tẽngã Asiri dĩma nugẽ? 
2Kings18:34 Amat ne Arpad wẽnd dãmba maana a wãna? Sefarwayim la Ena la Iwa wẽnd dãmba maana a wãna? Samari tẽng wẽnd dãmba maana a wãna? Bãmb fãaga Samari mam nugẽ bɩ? 
2Kings18:35 Tẽnsa fãa wẽnd dãmb bʋse n fãag b tẽng mam nusẽ tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd na n tõog n fãag Zerizalɛɛm?» 
2Kings18:36 La neba sĩnda b noor n pa leok tɩ bũmb ye, tɩ naab da kõo noor tɩ b ra leok-a ye." 
2Kings18:37 Na-yir sõgen-kãseng a Eliakim, a Ilkiya biiga, n paas sɛb gʋlsda a Sebna, la no-rɛɛs a Zoa, a Asaf biigã, kẽnga a Ezekiyas nengẽ. B futã ra kẽesame la b togsa Asiri dĩma tãnsoaba sõgen-kãsenga goama fãa." 
2Kings19:1 Dĩma a Ezekiyas sẽn wʋm woto, a kẽesa a futu, n yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu n kẽng wẽnd doogẽ," 
2Kings19:2 la a tʋma sõgen-kãsenga a Eliakim, la sɛb-gʋlsda a Sebna la maan-kʋʋdba kãsem-dãmba tɩ bãmb me yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu n kẽng bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biiga nengẽ." 
2Kings19:2 la a tʋma sõgen-kãsenga a Eliakim, la sɛb-gʋlsda a Sebna la maan-kʋʋdba kãsem-dãmba tɩ bãmb me yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu n kẽng bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biiga nengẽ." 
2Kings19:3 A yeelame: «A Ezekiyas koɛɛg la woto: Dũnna yaa sũ-sãang daare, sɩbgre la yãnd daare. A Israyɛl kamba kũmda rogem, la pãng ka n na n dog ye." 
2Kings19:4 Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd, fo Wẽnnaam wʋm sõgen-kãsenga goama, Asiri dĩma sẽn tʋm a soab t'a wa tʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnde. Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ gom-bãmba paam b sɩbgre. Maan pʋʋsgo n kõ a Israyɛl kamba sẽn ket-bã.»" 
2Kings19:5 Dĩma Ezekiyas na-yir dãmba sẽn ta a Izayi nengẽ," 
2Kings19:6 a yeel-b lame: «Tɩ yeel-y yãmb zu-soaba: Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Da zoe-y goama y sẽn wʋma dabeem ye, ne tʋya fãa Asiri sõgen-kãsenga sẽn tʋ maama dabeem ye." 
2Kings19:7 Dĩma na n wʋma kibare, tɩ leb yiri n tɩ ges bõe n be, waa a yamẽ; la be, a soolmẽ, sʋʋg n na kodg-a.› »" 
2Kings19:8 Tãnsoaba sõgen-kãsenga wʋmame tɩ Asiri dĩma da yii Lakis n looge. Dẽ la a bʋʋg-a Libna, a sẽn tɩ zabd zĩig ningã." 
2Kings19:9 Kibar ninga a sẽn da wʋm Kus dĩma, a Tiraka, poorẽ da yaa woto: A Tiraka wat n na n zaba ne foo. A Senakerib le tʋma neba tɩ b wa a Ezekiyas nengẽ la woto la a gom ne a sẽn tʋm b rãmbã: «Tɩ gom-y ne a Ezekiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, woto:" 
2Kings19:10 Bɩ f Wẽnnaam, fo sẽn teeg a soaba da belg-fo, n yet tɩ Zerizalɛɛm kõn lʋɩ Asiri dĩma nugẽ ye." 
2Kings19:11 Fo wʋma Asiri dĩm dãmba sẽn maan tẽnsa fãa bũmb ninga, n kãab b fãa beedo, tɩ fo yẽ tẽed tɩ f na põse?" 
2Kings19:12 Mam saam-dãmb sẽn sãam soolem niynsã, bãmb wẽnd dãmba sõng-b-la wãn wãna? Gozã, Arã, Resɛf, Edenitsa sẽn da be-b Telasar," 
2Kings19:13 Amat dĩma, Arpad, Layir, Sefarwayim, Ena la Iwa dĩm dãmba bɛɛ?»" 
2Kings19:14 A Ezekiyas reega sebrã b sẽn tʋm b rãmba nugẽ n karem. A dʋʋ wẽnd dooga sẽn be zĩig ningã n lak sebrã n dɩgl Naaba-Wẽnd taoore. 
2Kings19:15 A Ezekiyas maana pʋʋsg kãnga: «Israyɛl Wẽnnaam sẽn zao sa-gãnẽ, yaa yãmb bal la tẽng zug dĩm dãmba fãa Wẽnnaam. Yãmb n naan saaga la tẽnga." 
2Kings19:16 Yoog-y y tʋbre n kelge, Soaala-Wẽnde, la y puk-y y nini n gese. Naaba-Wẽnde, kelg-y dĩm a Senakerib goama, a tʋmame tɩ b wa tʋʋs yãmba, sẽn vɩ-ba fãa Wẽnnaam!" 
2Kings19:17 Naaba-Wẽnde, Asiri dĩm dãmba menesa ninsaalb buudu wʋsgo, yaa sɩda," 
2Kings19:18 b yõoga b wẽn-naandsa bugum, tɩ b da ka Wẽnd ye, da yaa ninsaalb nus tʋʋmde, daoog bɩ kugri, yaa rẽ yĩnga la Asiri dĩm dãmb tõog n wã-ba." 
2Kings19:19 La marsã, Naaba-Wẽnde, fãag-y tõnd a nusẽ; m yõkd y sɛɛga, bɩ y fãag tõnd a Senakerib nugẽ tɩ tẽng zug dĩm dãmba bãng tɩ yãmb bal la Wẽnnaam.»" 
2Kings19:20 Wakat kãnga, a Izayi, a Amos biiga, tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ezekiyas: «Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, koɛɛg la woto: Mam wʋma f pʋʋsgã f sẽn taas maama, Asiri dĩm, a Senakerib poorẽ wã." 
2Kings19:20 Wakat kãnga, a Izayi, a Amos biiga, tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ezekiyas: «Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, koɛɛg la woto: Mam wʋma f pʋʋsgã f sẽn taas maama, Asiri dĩm, a Senakerib poorẽ wã." 
2Kings19:21 Ad koe-beed ning Soaala-Wẽnd me sẽn leokd-a: Ad bi-puglã, a Siõ bi-pugla laada foom, a toog ka be ne f ye. Wẽnemd f poor n ges a sẽn yĩgsd foom, ges Zerizalɛɛm pa-kula sẽn laad foom." 
2Kings19:22 Yaa ãnda la f tʋʋs yã, ãnda la f paoog yã? F zẽka f koɛɛga ne ãnda, ãnda la f get la f sãbsdẽ? Yaa a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, yaa mam menga la f tʋʋsyã." 
2Kings19:23 Ne f sẽn tʋʋm b rãmba noore la f tʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnde. Fo yeelame: ‹M bilim-bilma tĩig rʋʋs-m-la yĩngri, maam a Senakerib dʋ tãmse, m kẽe Libã tẽnsʋka n tɩ kɛɛ a tɩ-wogdã, n lub a tɩɩsã sẽn lugã, m saaga a tãmsa fãa, m saaga a tʋgra fãa." 
2Kings19:24 Mam tuu bulsi n yũ bu-zẽn koom, m tabame n kʋɩɩs ne m nao Ezipt ko-soya fãa.›" 
2Kings19:25 Fo ka mi-la, Senakerib, tɩ yaa al daar zãra, la maam a Naaba-Wẽnd sed m sɛdga, la m sẽn seda la m pidsd dũnna. M da bĩnga foo tɩ f wa sarem tẽnse, tẽns sẽn me lals n gũbgi." 
2Kings19:26 Tẽnga rãmb nus ka pãng ye, b komsame n zĩ ne yãnde, b lebga wa pʋt moodo, b lebga wa luiili-saase, n lebg kar-kar wa gaosg zug moogo, n lebg wa wãoong sẽn dɩ kood niynsi tɩ b nan ka paam n bɩ zãngã." 
2Kings19:27 Bãng tɩ m mi-f-la zãnga. Bãng tɩ f zĩ, bɩ f yit la f kẽedẽ, f sã n zĩi n digd la f yãbd sũ-toogo m mii fãa." 
2Kings19:28 Ade, fo yik n zabda ne maam m wʋma f sẽn tãoosd raoodã, m yãenda f sẽn maan tɩtaama. Dẽ me la m na n yõg-f wa weefo n vʋdg f yõore n sog bãnga, n yaag f noor n ning salbre. Woto f sẽn tũ sor ning n wa wã so-kãng la f na n tũ n lebe." 
2Kings19:29 Ade woto n na n yɩ makre n yɩ makr fo yĩnga, Ezekiyas: Doanna, yãmb na n dɩɩ koodo, kood sẽn yi a toore. Vẽer me na n yɩɩ boto. Yʋʋmd ninga sẽn pʋgdã, y na bʋde la y kẽeb y koodo, n sel y bugsuntundu n dɩ b biisi." 
2Kings19:30 La sẽn kell Zɩɩda roogẽ, sẽn põs fãa na n kɩɩ yẽgna, n kɩ yẽgen tẽngre, wa tɩɩga, la b wila na n woma biisi." 
2Kings19:31 Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, kelle n na n keese, la Siõ tãnga zugu põasg n na n põse. Wẽnd pãngã n na n tʋm dẽnna." 
2Kings19:32 Sã n ya Asiri dĩma poorẽ woto la Soaala yeta: A kõn kẽ tẽn kãnga ye. A kõn tão pĩim ye. A kõn zẽk a gãong ye. A kõn sam tãndo m paam n kẽ ye. 
2Kings19:33 A sẽn tũ sor ning n wa, so-kãng la a na n le tũ n kuli. Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele: A kõn kẽ tẽn-kãnga ye, m sẽn nong a Daviid yĩnga." 
2Kings19:34 Mam na n gũu tẽngã, la m na fãag Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde!»" 
2Kings19:35 La yʋn-kãng bala, Wẽnd malɛka yiime, la a wẽ Asiri dãmba tãb-sika; la a pʋgẽ, neb tus koabga la pis-nii la a nu n ki. Beoog sẽn vẽege, da yaa kũum ne kũum n diga." 
2Kings19:36 A Senakerib kɩtame t'a tãb-biis yiki la a kulame. A leba Niniv n tɩ pa beene. 
2Kings19:37 La daar a ye, a da wõga a wẽnd, a Nisrok, roogẽ t'a meng kom-dibli a yi, a Adramelɛk la a Sarezɛr, kɛ-a ne sʋʋga n yi n zoe n kẽng Ararat tẽnga, t'a biiga a Asaradõ led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings20:1 Dasem kãense, a Ezekiyas lʋɩɩ bãag sẽn da tõe n yãk yõore. Bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biiga, tɩ yeel-a lame: «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Bɩ y maneg y zak yɛla tɩ y na n kiime, y kõn le vɩɩnd ye.› »" 
2Kings20:1 Dasem kãense, a Ezekiyas lʋɩɩ bãag sẽn da tõe n yãk yõore. Bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biiga, tɩ yeel-a lame: «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Bɩ y maneg y zak yɛla tɩ y na n kiime, y kõn le vɩɩnd ye.› »" 
2Kings20:2 La a Ezekiyas, wẽnemdame n tees lalga n pʋʋs Naaba-Wẽnde n yetẽ:" 
2Kings20:3 «M yõkd y sɛɛga, tẽeg-y tɩ m kell n talla m menga, m manesem fãa pʋgẽ, ne zemsgo la pʋ-peelem, yãmb taoore, la m maana sẽn da noom y sũuri.» La a Ezekiyas kelmame t'a nintãm sodge." 
2Kings20:4 La a Izayi da nan pa yi na-zaka pʋg ye, la Naaba-Wẽnd le taas-a-la gomd kãngã:" 
2Kings20:5 «Lebg n tɩ yeel woto a Ezekiyas, mam buuda naaba: ‹Ad Naaba-Wẽnd, f saamba a Daviid Wẽnda, gomde: M wʋma f pʋʋsgo; m yãenda f nintãm; mam na n sãoog-f lame, ka la dasem a tã fo na n kẽnga wẽnd doogẽ." 
2Kings20:6 Mam na n le paasa f pʋlemd yʋʋm piig la a nu, mam na n fãaga-foo, foom ne f tẽngã, Asiri dĩma nugẽ; mam na n gũ tẽn-kãngã, mam maasem la m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Daviid maasem yĩnga.› »" 
2Kings20:7 A Izayi, yeelame: «Wã-y ne kankam miisgu.» Tɩ b wa ne, la b yãkame n bɛ naaba nodre, la naab sãoogame." 
2Kings20:8 Dẽ t'a Ezekiyas da reng n soka a Izayi: «Bõe n na n yɩ makre tɩ m bãng tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n sãooga maam la ka ne dasem a tã m na n kẽnga wẽnd doogẽ?» 
2Kings20:9 A Izayi leoka me: «Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel tɩ b kõ f makre ninga tɩ f bãng tɩ b na n pidsa b kãabgo: Fo ratame tɩ wĩndga maasem kẽng taoore bɩ a leb poorẽ nug yakem piiga!» 
2Kings20:10 A Ezekiyas leokame: «Maasema kẽng taoore nug yakem piiga ka toog ye. Ayo! A leb poorẽ nug yakem piiga!» 
2Kings20:11 A Izayi pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnde, la bãmb kɩtame tɩ maasem woog n leb poorẽ nug yakem piiga a Akaz yĩngr dooga teedsa zugu." 
2Kings20:12 Wẽnd kãnga, a Baladã biig a Merodak-Baladã, Babilon dĩma, tʋma sɛba ne kũuni tɩ b wa pʋʋs a Ezekiyas, t'a da wʋma a ka laafi wã kibare." 
2Kings20:13 A Ezekiyas, sũur yɩɩ noogo, la a wilga b sẽn tʋʋm b rãmbã, doog ning a sẽn bĩngd a wanzurfã, a sãnema, a tɩdarã, a yũ-nood kaama, la zab teedã la a laoga fãa. Bũmb ka zĩnd na-yiri la a soolma pʋga a sẽn pa wilg-b ye." 
2Kings20:14 La bãngda, a Izayi, waa dĩma nengẽ n sok-a: «Sãamba yeelame tɩ bõe la b yii yɛɛlẽ n wa f yiri?» T'a Ezekiyas leoke: «B yii tẽn-zãorgẽ, al Babilon.»" 
2Kings20:15 T'a Izayi le sok-a: «B yãee bõe fo zakẽ?» La a Ezekiyas leokame: «B yãee bũmb ning fãa sẽn be na-yiri, bũmb pa be m teeda rotẽ mam sẽn pa wilg-b ye.»" 
2Kings20:16 La a Izayi yeela a Ezekiyas: «Bɩ f kelg Soaala-Wẽnd gomde: 
2Kings20:17 Ade, daar n wate, tɩ bũmb ning fãa sẽn be f zakẽ la f saam-dãmba sẽn bĩng laog ning fãa n ta rũnna, b na n wʋk-b lame n kẽng Babilon la b kõn bas bũmb ye. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto." 
2Kings20:18 B na n wʋka f kamb wʋsgo, kamb fo meng sẽn doge, n kẽng tẽn-zẽngẽ. B na n yãka kẽere n maan zu-soaben-dãmba, tɩ b zĩ Babilon dĩma zakẽ.»" 
2Kings20:19 A Ezekiyas yeela a Izayi: «Soaala-Wẽnd gomdã f sẽn togsã yaa sõmbo» A tagsa a sũurẽ: «Gomda yaa sõmbo tɩ m na n kell n yãee laafi la yĩn-maasem m vɩɩmẽ.» 
2Kings20:20 A Ezekiyas tʋʋm a taabã, a sẽn me ko-baoor la ko-sore n na n tak koom n wa tẽnga pʋgẽ, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb kibara sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings20:21 A Ezekiyas tɩ saka a saam-dãmba la a biiga a Manase n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Kings21:1 A Manase da tara yʋʋm piig la a yi a naam deegr wakato la a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-nu la a nu Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame t'a Efsi-Ba. 
2Kings21:2 A maana sẽn pa sõmb Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ, a togsa bu-zẽmba tʋʋm yooda fãa, bu-zẽn niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da rig b rãmba n zãag a Israyɛl taoore." 
2Kings21:3 A le mee pʋʋsg rot niynsi a ba a Ezekiyas sẽn da lub b rãmbã la a lugla maan-kugri a Baal yĩnga, la a sela da-peesdi, wala Israyɛl dĩma, a Akab. A wõgemdame la a waooga yĩngr ãdsã." 
2Kings21:4 A mee maan-kug wẽnd doogẽ wã, la Soaala-Wẽnd da yaool n yeelame: «Yaa Zerizalɛɛm la m maand m belem la m waoogr zĩiga.»" 
2Kings21:5 A mee maan-kuga, yĩngri teedã fãa waoogr yĩnga, wẽnd dooga zags a yiiba pʋsẽ." 
2Kings21:6 A kɩtame t'a biig a ye pɩʋʋg bugum, a boola zĩn dãmba, a kẽe tẽn-kuga, a zĩndga neb sẽn sogsd kɩɩms la bagba. A sãama Soaala-Wẽnd sũuri ne a manes yoodã." 
2Kings21:7 A ninga a Asera nin-naand a meng sẽn kɩt tɩ b rõoge la a ning-a-la wẽnd doogẽ wã. Soaala-Wẽnd da yaool n yeela a Daviid ne a biiga a Salomo woto: «Yaa wẽnd doogã la yaa Zerizalɛɛm la m yãk Israyɛl tẽnsa fãa sʋka, n maan m belem la m waoogr zĩiga, zamaan woo zamaana." 
2Kings21:8 Woto m kõn le tall a kambã n zãag ne tẽng ning m sẽn kõ b ba rãmba ye. La rẽnd bãmb me modg n maan m sẽn yeel bũmb ninga fãa, n tũ noor ning m sẽn kõ m sõgen a Moyiiz." 
2Kings21:9 La bãmb pa sak ye, a Manase kẽes-b-la weoogo, al tɩ b maan wẽnga n yɩɩg bu-zẽn niynsi Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn menes a Israyɛl taoore.»" 
2Kings21:10 Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne bãmba ne b sõgen-kamba la bãngdba noore n yetẽ: 
2Kings21:11 «Zɩɩda dĩm a Manase sẽn tʋm tʋm yood yĩnga, n maan wẽng n yɩɩg Amonitsa sẽn deng b yẽ wã, la a tus a Zɩɩda me t'a naag yẽnda n maan yel-wẽnde ne a wẽn-naandsã," 
2Kings21:12 Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, koɛɛg la woto: ‹Mam na n waa ne a Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm zugu yel-beed a ye, ali tɩ ned ning fãa sẽn na n wʋm-a bɩ a tʋb a yiiba fãa naag n kʋre." 
2Kings21:13 Mam na n wãa Zerizalɛɛm wa m sẽn wã Samari. M na n sarma Zerizalɛɛm wala m sẽn sarem a Akab roogo. M na nedg Zerizalɛɛm wala b sẽn nedg lengr pʋg la a poore. 
2Kings21:14 Mam na n daaga a neb sẽn kellã n base; mam na n yõk-b lame n ning b bɛɛba nugẽ, bãmb na n yɩɩ b bɛɛb mogbo la b dɩɩbo," 
2Kings21:15 la rẽ yaa b sẽn maan tɩ pa ta m yam, la b kɩt tɩ m sũur puugi, sẽn sɩng b saamb dãmb sẽn yi Ezipt tẽnga n tãag dũnna.› »" 
2Kings21:16 A Manase naagame n daag zɩɩm, neb sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yell zɩɩm, al n pid Zerizalɛɛm zãnga, tɩ b pa gomd a sẽn kɩt t'a Zɩɩda maan sẽn ya wẽng woo wẽnga, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
2Kings21:17 A Manase sẽn maana fãa, rẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings21:18 A Manase tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, b mum-a-la zẽed sẽn da be a zaka pʋgẽ, a Uza zẽedẽ wã, a biiga Amon n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings21:19 A Amon da tara yʋʋm pisi la a yi, a naam deegr wakato, la a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a yiib Zerizalɛɛm, a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Mesullemet, a Arus biiga, a ba yir da yaa Yotba." 
2Kings21:20 A maana sẽn pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam, wala a ba, a Manase, sẽn maane." 
2Kings21:21 A togsa a ba a Manase n waoog wẽn-naandse la a wõgemda bãmb taoore. 
2Kings21:22 A basa Naaba-Wẽnd, a saam-dãmba Wẽnnaam, la a pa tũ b sor ye." 
2Kings21:23 A Amon poorẽ dãmba yẽsa ne taaba n na n lub-a, la b kʋʋ dĩma, a zakẽ." 
2Kings21:24 La tẽnga rãmb kʋʋ neb niyns fãa sẽn da yẽs-b ne taaba n na lub dĩma la b kɩtame t'a biiga a Zoziyas rɩ naam a zaoorẽ. 
2Kings21:25 Tʋʋm a taabã a sẽn maana, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings21:26 B mum-a-la a ba yaoogẽ, a Uza zẽedẽ wã la a biiga a Zoziyas n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings22:1 A Zoziyas sẽn waa n na n deeg naam, t'a tara yʋʋm a nii; a rɩ naam yʋʋm pis-tã la a ye Zerizalɛɛm, a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Yedida, a Adaya biiga, a ba yiri da yaa Boskat." 
2Kings22:2 A maana sẽn ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam la a togsa a saamba a Daviid manesem fãa, n pa bʋdg rɩtgo, n pa bʋdg goabga." 
2Kings22:3 A Zoziyas naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba, dĩma tʋma wẽnd doogẽ, a sɛb gʋlsda a Safã, a Asaliya biiga, a Mesulam yagenga. A yeel-a lame:" 
2Kings22:4 «Kẽng maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Ilkiya nengẽ la f kɩt t'a geelg ligdã b sẽn wat n kɩt Wẽnd doogẽ wã, dagno-gũudba sẽn deesd neba nengẽ wã." 
2Kings22:5 A rɩk ligd kãnga n kɩs tʋʋma nanamse sẽn get b wẽnd dooga manegrã, tɩ b reeg-a n yao tʋʋm-tʋmdba sẽn manegd-b wẽnd doogã. Bɩ b yao" 
2Kings22:6 da-wãadba la tãn-metba, tʋʋm-tʋmdb a taabã; b yãk n yao daada la kuga sẽn pees wẽnd doogã yĩnga." 
2Kings22:7 La b ra sok-b ligda geels ye, tɩ b maanda pʋ-peelem.»" 
2Kings22:8 Maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Ilkiya yeela sɛb-gʋlsda a Safã: «Mam yãenda Noora sebrã wẽnd doogẽ.» La a Ilkiya kɩsa a Safã sebra t'a karem. 
2Kings22:9 Sɛb-gʋlsda kẽnga dĩma nengẽ n tɩ yeel-a: «Tõnd tigsa ligdã sẽn be wẽnd doogẽ wã fãa, la d kɩs-a-la tʋʋma nanamse sẽn get-b wẽnd dooga manegrã.»" 
2Kings22:10 La sɛb-gʋlsda, a Safã, togsa naaba kibar kãnga: «Maan-kʋʋd a Ilkiya kɩsa maam sebr a yembre.» La a Safã karma sebrã dĩma taoore." 
2Kings22:11 Dĩma sẽn wʋm goama sẽn da be Noor sebra pʋgã, a kẽesa a futu." 
2Kings22:12 A kõo maan-kʋʋd a Ilkiya, a Ayikam, a Safã biiga, a Akbor, a Mikaya biiga, sɛb gʋlsda a Safã, la dĩma sõgen a Asaya noor kãngã:" 
2Kings22:13 «Kẽng-y, tɩ sok-y Naaba-Wẽnd bũmbu. Tɩ sok-y m yĩnga, buuda fãa yĩnga, a Zɩɩda fãa yĩnga. Sok-y sebra poorẽ, sebr ning b sẽn yãenda poorẽ. Ade, Naaba-Wẽnd sũur puuga wʋsgo ne tõndo, tɩ tõnd saam-dãmba pa tũ sebr kãng goama, b pa tũ bũmb ning fãa b sẽn gʋls a pʋgẽ ye.»" 
2Kings22:14 Maan-kʋʋd, a Ilkiya, n paas a Ayikam, a Akbor, a Safã la a Asaya kẽnga bãngd poaka a Ulda nengẽ. Yaa a Salum paga la yẽ n da gũud futã. A Salum da yaa a Tikwa biiga, a Aras yagenga. Paga ra bee Zerizalɛɛm, Kẽedpaoolgo. B togsa paga kibara zãnga." 
2Kings22:15 La a leok-b lame: «Naaba-Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛg la woto: ‹Tɩ togs-y ned ninga sẽn tʋma yãmb mam nengẽ wã:" 
2Kings22:16 Naaba-Wẽnd yetame: Mam na n waa ne yel-beedo tẽn-kãnga neba zutu, la m na n pidsa bũmb ning fãa sẽn be sebra pʋgã tɩ Zɩɩda dĩma karma," 
2Kings22:17 bãmb sẽn daag maam n bas yĩnga, la b kʋ maando n waoog wẽn-naandse, n na n puug m sũuri." 
2Kings22:18 Mam sũur puuga ne tẽn-kãnga, la a kõn sig ye. La yãmb na n yeela Zɩɩda dĩma sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y wa sokã, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam Koɛɛg la woto: Fo wʋma sebra sẽn togs bũmb ninga." 
2Kings22:19 Fo kelga m sẽn togs bũmb ning Zerizalɛɛm ne a neba poorẽ. M sɩd na n kɩtame tɩ tẽnga lebg tẽn-weongo, tẽng sẽn ka le be barka. La fo sakame tɩ f sũur bondge, tɩ f reeg foo ne buuda kongre, fo kẽesa fut la f yãba mam taoore, bãng neere, ad yaa maam n gomde, bãng tɩ mam me wʋmame." 
2Kings22:20 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la mam na n lagem foom ne f saam-dãmba tɩ f gãand ne laafi f yaoogẽ; fo nin kõn yãend yel-beed ning m sẽn na n wa ne zĩ-kãnga ye.› » Sẽn tɩ kelg-b bãngd poaka koɛɛga tɩ taasa dĩma Soaala-Wẽnd leokrã. 
2Kings23:1 Wẽnd kãnga, dĩm a Zoziyas kɩtame tɩ b bool Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm nin-kẽemba tɩ b wa sak-a." 
2Kings23:2 La dĩma kẽnga wẽnd doogẽ ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba fãa, la buuda fãa, talga la na-koambga. Bãmb taoore a karma bũmb ning fãa sẽn da be zooda sebra pʋgẽ. Yaa sebr ning b sẽn yãend wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
2Kings23:3 Dĩma da yɛsa yĩngri, geer zugu, Wẽnd taoore; a le kãaba zooda kãabgo, t'a na n tũu Soaala-Wẽnde, a na n saka b noya ne b zãmsga fãa la b saglsa fãa, ne a sũur fãa la a pãng fãa; a na n maana bũmb ning fãa sẽn gʋls sebrã pʋga. La zãma wã fãa wẽename tɩ b na n tũ zoodã kãabgo." 
2Kings23:4 Dĩma kõ maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, a Ilkiya, ne kãsem-pʋgdgã la wẽnd doog dagno-gũudbã noore, tɩ b yiis wẽnd dooga pʋga teed fãa b sẽn da rõog n na n waoog a Baal, la a Asera, la yĩngri bõn-naands fãa; a yiis-b-la Zerizalɛɛm n yõog-ba Sedrõ longẽ, n wʋk b tompɛglma n tɩ rʋʋg Betɛl." 
2Kings23:5 A riga maan-kʋʋdba dĩm dãmba sẽn da zĩndig tɩ b kʋʋd maand pʋʋsga zĩisẽ, la Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ la Zerizalɛɛm tẽn-kɩremsã la a riga sẽn da kʋʋd-b maando n kõt a Baal, n kõt wĩndgã, kiuugã, ãdsã la yĩngri teeda fãa." 
2Kings23:6 A yiisa a Asera ra-peesma wẽnd doogẽ la Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, n tall-a n kẽng Sedrõ longẽ wã, la a yõog-a-la bugum be;" 
2Kings23:7 a Kɩtame t'a lebg tompɛglem, t'a lob tompɛglma talsa yaadẽ; a luba yoaadba rotã sẽn da be wẽnd dooga pʋgã tɩ pagba da wʋgd pɛɛl beene, a Asera yĩngã." 
2Kings23:8 A boola maan-kʋʋdba fãa sẽn da be Zɩɩda tẽnsa pʋgẽ tɩ b wa, la a sãama zĩisa fãa, maanda sẽn da kʋʋdẽ wã, sẽn sɩng Geba n tɩ tãag Beerseba. Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, a luba maan-kug niyns sẽn da pẽ-b tẽnga kʋɩlensã, bũmb zãnga sẽn da pẽ-b kombere a Zozuwe rẽnna. F sã n kẽedẽ, yaa nug goabga." 
2Kings23:9 Maan-kʋʋdba sẽn da be pʋʋsga zĩisẽ wã, da pa tar sor n wa kʋ maoong Zerizalɛɛm maan-kugra zug ye, la b da naagda b saam-biisã n dɩt bur sẽn pa ning bɩllã." 
2Kings23:10 A Zoziyas gɩdga sagda yõogr Tofɛt boka sẽn da be Ben-Inom tãn-longã pʋga, woto ned ba a ye ka le yõog a bi-ribla bɩ a bi-pugl bugum, n waoog a Molok ye." 
2Kings23:11 A yiisa wiidi wã dĩm dãmba sẽn da gʋʋnd wĩntooga waoogr yĩnga. Wed bãmb ra bee wẽnd dooga dagnoorẽ, zu-soaba a Netã-Melɛk dooga sɛɛga, dĩma zakẽ; a yõoga bugum bilim-bilm niyns sẽn da rɩk n kõ wĩndgã." 
2Kings23:12 Dĩma wãa maan-kug niyns sẽn da be a Akaz bɛongã zugu. Zɩɩda dĩm dãmbã n da me-ba. A wãa a Manase sẽn da me b rãmba wẽnd dooga zãong a yiiba pʋsẽ. Dĩma tus-b lame n lubi, n wã-ba, n wʋk b toma n tɩ lob Sedrõ tãn-longa pʋga." 
2Kings23:13 A Zoziyas sãama pʋʋsga rotã sẽn da tot ne Zerizalɛɛm, n be Oliviye tãnga nug rɩtgo, Israyɛl dĩma a Salomo sẽn da me n na n waoog wẽn-poak a Astarte, Sidõ kẽedba wɩɩbdã, a Kemos, Moabitsa yel-yoogã, la a Milkom, Amonitsa bõn-dẽgdã." 
2Kings23:14 A Zoziyas wãa kug-peesma, n kʋʋs ra-peesdi wã, n wʋk ninsaalba kõaba n bus b zĩigẽ." 
2Kings23:15 A Zoziyas le sãama maan-kugr ning sẽn be Betɛl, A Nebat biig a Zeroboam, sẽn me a soaba n lub a Israyɛl yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ wã. A sãam-a lame, n wã kugã, n wer-b tɩ b lebg zom, la a yõoga ra-peesma bugum." 
2Kings23:16 A Zoziyas waa n wẽnemda a nenga n yãe yaadã sẽn da be tãnga zugu la a tʋmame tɩ b tɩ wʋk yaada kõaba n wa yõog-b maan-kugra zugu. A mana woto n dẽgem maan-kugrã la woto a taasa bãngd a ye sẽn da pĩnd n togse. 
2Kings23:17 A Zoziyas le sokame: «Yaa ãnda yaoog kugr n tond tɩ m neẽ wã?» Tɩ tẽnga neb na n yeele: «Yaa bãngd a ye sẽn yi Zɩɩda tẽng yaoogo la bãngd kãng n da pĩnd n togs fo sẽn maan mars-marsã kaalẽ, maan-kugra poorẽ wã.»" 
2Kings23:18 T'a Zoziyas na n yeele: «Bas-y yao kãnga, bɩ ned ba a ye da sɩɩs bãngda kõab ye!» La woto b pa sɩɩs a kõaba wala b sẽn pa sɩɩs Samari bãngda me kõabã." 
2Kings23:19 A Zoziyas kɩtame tɩ b sãam wẽnd dota fãa, a Israyɛl kamba sẽn da me Samari tẽns pʋsẽ n puug Naaba-Wẽnd sũurã; a maana ne bãmba, wa a sẽn maan Betɛl." 
2Kings23:20 A Zoziyas kooda maan-kʋʋdba sẽn da be pʋʋsga rotẽ wã, la a yõoga ninsaalb kõaba maan-kuga zutu. A lɛɛg n waa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings23:21 Dĩma kõo neba fãa noor kãnga: «Maan-y pak kibsa Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga, wala b sẽn gʋls tɩ b maan bũmb ninga zood sebra pʋgẽ.»" 
2Kings23:22 B ra pa le maan pak kibs a woto buudu al bʋ-kaoodba zamaanẽ ye. 
2Kings23:23 Yaa a Zoziyas naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba bala la b maan pak kãnga buudu n waoog Naaba-Wẽnd, Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings23:24 N paas me, sẽn boond b kɩɩmse, bagba, la tɩto, la tẽn-kuga, la yel-yoodã fãa b sẽn da tõe n yãend Zɩɩda soolmẽ la Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, a Zoziyas yiisa bãmb fãa, n na n tũ Noora goama sẽn gʋls sebra pʋgã, sebr ninga maan-kʋʋd a Ilkiya sẽn yãend wẽnd dooga pʋgã." 
2Kings23:25 Dĩm ba a ye pa reng n zĩnd pĩnda sẽn tũ Soaala-Wẽnd ne a sũur fãa la a pãng fãa la a sak a Moyiiz Noor ne pʋ-peelem wa a Zoziyas ye, la yẽ poore, a to pa zĩnd sẽn wẽneg-a ye." 
2Kings23:26 La ne rẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puur kãsengã da ket n yãnga ne Zɩɩda tʋʋm yoodã a Manase sẽn maan n bao b noorã. B sũura pa sig ye." 
2Kings23:27 Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Mam na n yiisa Zɩɩda m taoore, wala m sẽn yiis Israyɛl, mam na n daaga tẽngã mam sẽn da tũus a soabã n base, n bas Zerizalɛɛm ne wẽnd doog ning mam sẽn da yeel tɩ na n yɩɩ m naam la m waoogr zĩiga.»" 
2Kings23:28 A Zoziyas sẽn maan fãa, rẽ fãa pa gʋls dĩm dãmba kibar sebr pʋgẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings23:29 A Zoziyas zamaanẽ, A Nekao, Ezipt dĩma, kẽng n na n tɩ sega Asiri dĩma, Efrat kʋɩlga sẽnẽ. Dĩma a Zoziyas yika zabr ne-a, a tʋlgame n gɩdg-a, la Nekao kʋ-la a Zoziyas, Megido tẽnga." 
2Kings23:30 A sõgen-kamba rɩka a yĩnga ne bilim-bilm, Megido, n le tall-a n wa Zerizalɛɛm, n mum-a yaoogẽ, la tẽnga rãmba rɩka a Zoziyas biiga, a Zoakaz, n pʋdg a zug naam kaam, t'a rɩ naam a ba zaoorẽ." 
2Kings23:31 A Zoakaz da tara yʋʋm piig la a tã, a naam deegr wakato; a rɩɩ naam kiis a tã, Zerizalɛɛm, a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Amutal, a Zeremi bi-pugla, a ba yir da yaa Libna." 
2Kings23:32 A maana sẽn pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam ba bilfu, wala a saam-dãmba sẽn da maane." 
2Kings23:33 A Nekao yõk-a lame n balg-a bãeense, Ribla, Amat tẽn-peelmẽ, la a saaga a tẽnga yaoodo, wanzurf sẽn ta neb koabg la pis nu zɩɩbo, la sãnem sẽn ta neb piig la a nu zɩɩbo." 
2Kings23:34 A Nekao zĩndiga a Eliyakim, a Zoziyas biiga, t'a rɩ naam a ba zaoorẽ la a teka a yʋʋr n pʋd t'a Zoakim, la a Zoakaz tall-a lame n kẽng Ezipt t'a tɩ ki beenẽ." 
2Kings23:35 A Zoakim yaoo Ezipt dĩma wanzurfa la sãnema; la sẽn na n yɩ-la n paam ligdã n kɩse, a kong n saaga a tẽnga rãmb yaoodo. Ned kam fãa ra kɩta a sẽn tare, wanzurf bɩ sãnem, t'a reeg n kɩs a Nekao." 
2Kings23:36 A Zoakim da tara yʋʋm pisi a naam deegr wakato; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yembre, Zerizalɛɛm, a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Zebuda, a Pedaya biiga, a ba yir da yaa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 A maana sẽn pa neer Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ, wala a saam-dãmba sẽn da maane." 
2Kings24:1 A Zoakim zamaanẽ, a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, yiisa tãpo; a Zoakim saka a noore, yʋʋm a tã, n yaool n wa yik n giri." 
2Kings24:2 Naaba-Wẽnd basame tɩ so-gɩtb sẽn yit Kalde, Aram, Moab la Amon wa tak zabr ne a Zoakim. Yaa Zɩɩda la b ra baood n na n wã wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da wilg ne b bãngdba noore." 
2Kings24:3 Rẽ fãa lʋɩɩ a Zɩɩda zugu, t'a Manase yel-wẽna kɩtame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yam lak tɩ b ra pa rat n le zĩnd ne bãmb ye." 
2Kings24:4 Leb n yɩ-la a sẽn daag nin-sõma wã zɩɩm n pids Zerizalɛɛm la Naaba-Wẽnd pa tʋlg n kõ sugri. 
2Kings24:5 Yɛl a taaba fãa a Zoakim sẽn maane, dẽ fãa pa gʋls a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba kibara sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Kings24:6 A Zoakim tɩ saka a saam-dãmba, t'a biiga a Zoakẽ led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Kings24:7 Ezipt dĩma pa le yi a soolmẽ ye, tɩ Babilon dĩma da reega a sẽn da so tẽns niynsa fãa n yãmbe, sẽn sɩng Ezipt kʋɩlga n tãag Efrat kʋɩlgã." 
2Kings24:8 A Zoakẽ da tara yʋʋm piig la a nii a naama deegr wakato; a rɩɩ naam kiis a tã Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ; a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Newusta, a Elnatã biiga, a ba yir da yaa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings24:9 A maana sẽn pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam wala a ba sẽn da maane. 
2Kings24:10 La wẽnd kãnga, Babilon dĩma, a Nabikodonozor, yiisa tãpo n na n pãb Zerizalɛɛm;" 
2Kings24:11 la b sẽn gũgb tẽngã, n sege, Babilon dĩma, a Nabikodonozor wa a toore n na n kaoog zabrã." 
2Kings24:12 La Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zoakẽ, rɩka a meng n kɩs Babilon dĩma, yẽ ne a ma, a sõgen-kamba, a kombɛɛmba la a tãnsoaben-dãmba. A Zoakẽ lebg Zɩɩda rĩm tɩ yʋʋm niini la Babilon dĩma, a Nabikodonozor kẽes-a roogo." 
2Kings24:13 Wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da pĩnd n yeele, a Nabikodonozor wʋka wẽnd dooga arzɛgsa fãa, na-yir arzɛgsa fãa. A wãa sãnem lagda fãa, a Salomo, Israyɛl dĩma, sẽn da rõog wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
2Kings24:14 A wʋka Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga rãmba, sẽn so-b tʋʋma, tẽnga nin-bɛda, bãmb na ta tus piiga, n paas sẽn mi-b kut tʋʋma, n tõe n maan kʋɩlen-kuri la kʋɩlen-toore. Sẽn ka tar-b tʋʋmde la sẽn ka mi-b tʋʋmd buud ba a ye bal la a bas yã." 
2Kings24:15 A peega a Zoakẽ n kẽng Babilon yembdo, ne naab-ma, na-pagba, sõgen-kamba, tãnsoaben-dãmba, la na-komsa fãa; a wʋk-b-la Zerizalɛɛm n loog yembdo Babilon." 
2Kings24:16 Dakãagba fãa, bãmb tus a yopoe, la sãaba ne yõgsã fãa, bãmb tusri, la tãb-biisa sẽn tar sũuri, Babilon dĩma peeg-b lame n kẽng yembdo." 
2Kings24:17 A Zoakẽ zĩigẽ, Babilon dĩma yãka a saam-bila, a Matãniya, t'a rɩ naam. A teema a yʋʋrã n pʋd-a Sedesiyas." 
2Kings24:18 A Sedesiyas da tara yʋʋm pisi la a yembre a naam deegr wakato; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a ye Zerizalɛɛm; a ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Amutal, a Zeremi biiga, Libna tẽnga" 
2Kings24:19 a maana sẽn pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam, wala a Zoakim sẽn da maane." 
2Kings24:20 La yell bãmb fãa lʋɩɩ Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda zugu, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur da puuga ne-ba al tɩ b rig-ba n yiis b taoore. A Sedesiyas me waa n yeelame t'a kõn le kẽ Babilon dĩma tãpẽ ye." 
2Kings25:1 A Sedesiyas naama yʋʋmd a wɛ soaba, kiuug piig soaba, kiuuga piig daare, Babilon dĩma a Nabikodonozor, waa ne a tãb-biis fãa n kaoog zabre ne Zerizalɛɛm, a gãnega a tãpo tẽngã noore n tu boko n gũbg-a." 
2Kings25:2 A gũbga tẽnga n pãb-a tɩ ta a Sedesiyas naam yʋʋmd piig la a ye soaba. 
2Kings25:3 Kiuug a naas soaba, a daar a wɛ soaba, kom sẽn wa n wɩng tẽnga fãa, tɩ neba da pa le tar dɩɩbo, b pooga lal-gũbra võore." 
2Kings25:4 Dĩma yii yʋngo n zoe ne a tãb-biisa fãa, a tũu dagnoor ninga sẽn be lals a yiibã sʋka, naab zẽeda dignoore. Dẽ tɩ Kalde rãmba da gũbga tẽngã, la a rɩka Yamsem Mogra sore." 
2Kings25:5 Kalde rãmba riga dĩma n paam-a Zeriko tẽn-nabrẽ wã t'a tãb-biisa fãa sẽeg n bas-a. 
2Kings25:6 Kalde rãmba yõka rĩma n tall a n kẽng Ribla, Babilon dĩma nengẽ, la dĩma kɩtame tɩ b bʋ-a bʋʋdo." 
2Kings25:7 A kɩtame tɩ b kood a Sedesiyas kamba, a nifẽ, t'a yaool n leo a Sedesiyas nini, n balg-a bãnga, n tall-a n kẽng Babilon." 
2Kings25:8 Kiuug a nu soaba, daar a yopoe daare, a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, naama yʋʋmd piig la a wɛ soaba, a Nebuzaradã, tãnsoaba, la Babilon dĩma komber a yembre, kẽe Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings25:9 A yõoga wẽnd dooga bugum ne na-yirã la Zerizalɛɛm dota fãa. 
2Kings25:10 Kalde dãmba sẽn da be-b ne tãnsoabã, luba lalgã sẽn da gũbg Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings25:11 A Nebuzaradã wʋka neba b sẽn da bas Zerizalɛɛm tẽngã n loog yembdo ne neb niyns fãa sẽn da wa n nok Babilon dĩma la zãma wã sẽn da ketã. 
2Kings25:12 Tãnsoaba basa talsã kẽer bala, tɩ b send bugsuntung la b kooda." 
2Kings25:13 Kalde rãmb wãa zũud da-lugã sẽn da be wẽnd dooga noore, ne sĩmsã la zũud ko-sĩngã sẽn da be wẽnd doog sɩmandẽ, la b wʋka zũudã n zɩ n loog Babilon." 
2Kings25:14 La b wʋka lagdã sẽn da tar n ningd tompɛglma, kardã, sʋʋsã, laasã, la teeda fãa sẽn da yaa zũudu tɩ b da tar n maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋma." 
2Kings25:15 Gũudba naaba wʋka laasã sẽn da tar n wisd tɩdarã, la laas a taabã, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn da ya sãnem la wanzurf." 
2Kings25:16 Sã n yaa zũud da-lugã ne ko-sĩngã la sĩmsã, a Salomo sẽn da maan wẽnd dooga yĩnga, b ka tõog n mag te-bãmb fãa zɩslem ye." 
2Kings25:17 Da-luk a ye fãa woglem da yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a yopoe. B ra paasa b woglem na ta kãntɩɩs a tãabo ne zũudu la b paasa b neerma ne zũud gãmbre la tɩ-biis wa pooloomse sẽn dõog ne zũudu. Zũuda ra-luga ra wẽnda taaba, gãmbs a yiiba me ra wẽnda taaba." 
2Kings25:18 Gũudba naaba yõka a Seraya, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, n paas a Sefaniya kãsem-pʋgdgã ne zaka noor gũudba a tãabã." 
2Kings25:19 Tẽnga pʋgẽ a yõka ned ninga sẽn da so tãb-biisa yɛla welgre, n paas neb a nu sẽn be dĩma zakẽ, n paas ned ninga sẽn geta tãb-biisa yãkre, n ya tãnsoaba, n paas Zɩɩda tẽnga kamb pisoobe; bãmb fãa da bee Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Kings25:20 A Nebuzaradã, gũudba naaba, yõga bãmb fãa n kẽng Ribla, Babilon dĩma nengẽ." 
2Kings25:21 Yẽ kɩtame tɩ b kood b fãa Ribla, Amat tẽn-peelmẽ. Yɩɩ woto la b wʋk Zɩɩda n yiis a tẽngẽ n tall n kẽng yembdo." 
2Kings25:22 Neba sẽn pa-b tẽnga, Asiri dĩma sẽn bas b rãmba, a Nabikodonozor kõ-b-la a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, a Safã yagenga, t'a yɩ kombere." 
2Kings25:23 Tãnsoaben-dãmba la neba fãa bãngame tɩ Babilon dĩma da yãka a Gedaliya t'a yɩ kombere, tɩ b waa a nengẽ, Mispa: yaa a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga; a Zoana, a Karea biiga; a Seraya, a Tanewumɛt biiga, Netofɛt daoa; a Yazaniya, Maaka daoa." 
2Kings25:24 A Gedaliya wẽename n yeel-ba, bãmb ne b poorẽ dãmba: «Da maan-y rabeem ne Kalde rãmba ye. Pa-y tẽngã, sak-y Babilon dĩma, la bũmb kõn maan-y ye.»" 
2Kings25:25 Kiuug a yopoe soaba sẽn ta, a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga la a Elisama yagenga, na-koms buudu, wa n kʋ-la a Gedaliya n paas Zɩɩda la Kalde rãmba sẽn da be-b ne bãmb Mispa." 
2Kings25:26 Dẽ n so tɩ sẽn kell-ba fãa, bɛd woo, bõoneg woo, tãnsoab woo, bãmb fãa zoe Kalde dãmba dabeem n wudg n kẽng Ezipt." 
2Kings25:27 Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoakẽ sẽn kẽ yembdo tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la a yopoe, kiuug piig la a yiib soaba, kiuuga rasem pisi la a yopoe daare, Babilon dĩma, a Evil Merodak, kũma dĩma nimbãanega n yiis-a roogo." 
2Kings25:28 A goma noog ne-a, n tol n kõt-a zĩig sẽn ya waoogr zĩiga n yɩɩd dĩm dãmb a taaba sẽn da be ne-yẽ Babilon." 
2Kings25:29 A Zoakẽ yeesa a yembd futu la a rɩɩ ne Babilon dĩma n tãag a yõor tɛka. 
2Kings25:30 Dĩma n ges a yelle wakat fãa, beoog sẽn vẽege, n tãag a kũum." 
1Chronicles1:1 A Adem doogo: a Sɛt, a Enos," 
1Chronicles1:2 a Kena, a Malaleyɛl, a Yerɛd" 
1Chronicles1:3 a Enok, a Matusela, a Lamɛk," 
1Chronicles1:4 a Nowe, a Sem, a Kam, a Zafɛt." 
1Chronicles1:5 A Zafɛt roogo: a Gomɛr, a Magog, a Madayi, a Yavã, a Tubal, a Mesɛk, la a Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 A Gomɛr kamba: a Askenaz, a Difat, la a Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 A Yavã kamba: a Elisa, a Tarsis, a Kitim, la a Rodanim." 
1Chronicles1:8 A Kam kamba: a Kus, a Misrayim, a Ypt, la a Kanaã." 
1Chronicles1:9 A Kus kamba: a Seva, a Avila, a Sabta, a Ragma la a Sabteka. A Ragma kamba: Saba la a Dedã." 
1Chronicles1:10 A Kus roga a Nemrod; yẽ n deng n yɩ pipi gãndaoog, tẽng zugu." 
1Chronicles1:11 A Misrayim n dog Lud, Eyinam, Leav, Naftuwa rãmba," 
1Chronicles1:12 n paas: Patros, Kasluwa, Filisti rãmba yaaba la Kaftor rãmba." 
1Chronicles1:13 A Kanaã n dog a Sidõ, a bi-kẽenga la a Ɛt." 
1Chronicles1:14 Yẽ n dog Zebuzitse, Amoritse, la Girgazitse," 
1Chronicles1:15 Ivitse, Arkitse, Sinitse" 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvaditse, Semaritse, la Amatitse." 
1Chronicles1:17 A Sem kamba: a Elam, a Asʋr, a Arpaksad, a Lud, Aram, Us, Ul, Getɛr, la a Mesɛk." 
1Chronicles1:18 A Arpaksad n dog a Sela, a Sela n dog a Ebɛr," 
1Chronicles1:19 A Ebɛr kamb yɩ-la a yiibu. Pipi soaba ra boondame t'a Pelɛg tɩ yaa yẽ zamaanẽ wã la ninsaalba sɩng n welg taaba. A yao wã yʋʋr la Yoktã 
1Chronicles1:20 A Yoktã doga a Almodad, a Selɛf, a Asarmavɛt, a Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 a Adoram, a Uzal, a Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 a Eval, a Abimayɛl, a Saba," 
1Chronicles1:23 a Ofir, a Avila, la a Zobab, bãmb yɩ-la a Yoktã kamba." 
1Chronicles1:24 D le sõdg: a Sem, a Arpaksad, a Sela," 
1Chronicles1:25 a Ebɛr, a Pelɛg, a Rewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 a Serug, a Naoor, a Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 a Abram, bɩ Abraam." 
1Chronicles1:28 A Abraam kamba: a Izaak la a Ismayɛl. 
1Chronicles1:29 Bãmb dooga rãmba: a Nebayot, a Ismayɛl bi-kẽenga, a Kedar, a Adbey-el, a Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 a Misma, a Duma, a Masa, a Adad, a Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 a Yetur, a Nafis, a Kedma. A Ismayɛl kamb la bãmba." 
1Chronicles1:32 A Ketura, a Abraam pag a ye kamba: a Zimrã, a Yoksã, a Medã, a Madiã, a Yisbak la a Suwa. A Yoksã kamba: a Saba la a Dedã." 
1Chronicles1:33 A Madiã kamba: a Efa, a Efɛr, a Anok, a Abida, a Elda. A Ketura kamba la bãmb fãa." 
1Chronicles1:34 A Abraam doga a Izak, a Izak, kamba: a Ezayu la a Israyɛl." 
1Chronicles1:35 A Ezayu kamba: a Elifaz, a Reuwɛl, a Yewus, a Yalam la a Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 A Elifaz kamba: a Temã, a Omar, a Sefi, a Gatam, a Kenaz, a Timna la a Amalɛk," 
1Chronicles1:37 a Reuwɛl kamba: a Naat, a Zera, a Sama, la a Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 A Seyir kamba: a Lotã, a Sobal, a Sibeõ, a Ana, a Disõ, a Esɛr la a Disã." 
1Chronicles1:39 A Lotã kamba: a Ori la a Omam. A Lotã tão da yaa a Timna. 
1Chronicles1:40 A Sobal kamba: a Aliyam, a Manaat, a Eval, a Sefi, a Onam. A Sibeõ kamba: a Aya la a Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 A Ana biiga a Disõ: a Disõ kamba: a Amrã, a Esbã, a Yitrã, a Kerã." 
1Chronicles1:42 A Esɛr kamba: a Bileã, a Zawã, a Yakã. A Disã kamba: a Us la a Arã." 
1Chronicles1:43 Ad dĩm niyns sẽn dɩ-b naam Edom tẽnga, Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sẽn da waa n nan pa soog b tẽnga: a Bela, a Beor biiga; a na-tẽnga ra boondame tɩ Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 A Bela kiime t'a Zera biiga a Zobab, Bosra rao, led-a a zaoorẽ." 
1Chronicles1:45 A Zobab kiime t'a Usã sẽn ya Temanitga led-a a zaoorẽ. 
1Chronicles1:46 A Usã kiime, t'a Bedad biiga a Adad, led-a a zaoorẽ. Yaa yẽ n tõog a Madiã, Moab weoogẽ wã. A na-tẽnga da boondame tɩ Avit." 
1Chronicles1:47 A Adad kiime, t'a Samla, Masreka dao, led-a a zaoorẽ." 
1Chronicles1:48 A Samla kiime, tɩ Efrat kʋɩlg noorẽ Reobot dao a Sol deeg naam a zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles1:49 A Sol poore yɩ-la a Akbor biiga a Baal-Ana n dɩ naam. 
1Chronicles1:50 A Baal-Ana poore, yɩ-la a Adad. Payi n yɩ a na-tẽnga; a pag boondame tɩ Metabeyɛl, yaa Mezaab biiga a Matrɛd bi-pugla." 
1Chronicles1:51 A Adad poore, a Edom nanamse yɩ-la: a Timna, a Aliya, a Yetɛt," 
1Chronicles1:52 a Oolibama, a Ela, a Pino," 
1Chronicles1:53 a Kenaz, a Temã, a Mibsar," 
1Chronicles1:54 a Magdiyɛl, a Iram. Bãmb n yɩ Edom nanamse." 
1Chronicles2:1 A Zakoob yʋʋr a to la a Israyɛl; a kamba la woto: a Rubẽ, a Simeõ, a Levi, a Zɩɩda, a Isakar, a Zabulõ," 
1Chronicles2:2 a Dã, a Zozɛf, a Bẽnzame, a Neftali, a Gad la a Asɛr." 
1Chronicles2:3 A Zɩɩda kamba: a Ɛr, a Ona, la a Sela. Bãmb b tãaba fãa ma yɩɩ Kanaã paga, a Suwa biiga. A Zɩɩda bi-kẽenga, a Ɛr, maana sẽn ya wẽng Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ, tɩ b yãk a yõore." 
1Chronicles2:4 A Tamar, a Zɩɩda bi-paga, doga a Zɩɩda kamb a yi: a Perɛs la a Zera. A Zɩɩda kamba fãa yɩɩ bãmb b nu." 
1Chronicles2:5 A Perɛs kamba: a Esrõ la a Amul. 
1Chronicles2:6 A Zera kamba: a Zimri, a Etã, a Eman, a Kalkol, a Dara, bãmb b nu." 
1Chronicles2:7 A Karmi biiga: a Akar, waa ne yel-beed a Israyɛl zugu. A rɩka sẽn da kis rɩkre, zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles2:8 A Etã biiga, a Azariya." 
1Chronicles2:9 A Esrõ kamba: a Yerameyɛl, a Ram, a Kelubayi (Kalɛb)." 
1Chronicles2:10 A Ram doga a Aminadab; a Aminadab roga a Nasõ sẽn yɩ a Zɩɩda yagensa naaba. 
1Chronicles2:11 A Nasõ n dog a Salma, a Salma n dog a Booz." 
1Chronicles2:12 A Booz n dog a Obɛd, a Obɛd n dog a Zese." 
1Chronicles2:13 A Zese n dog a Eliab, a bi-kẽenga; a Abinadab la a yiib soaba, t'a Sama yaa a tãab soaba." 
1Chronicles2:14 A Netaneyɛl, a naas soaba, a Radayi, a nu soaba." 
1Chronicles2:15 A Osem, a yoob soaba, a Daviid, a yopoe soaba." 
1Chronicles2:16 Bãmb tãopã da yaa a Seruya la a Abigayil. A Seruya kamba: a Abisayi, a Zoab, a Asayɛl, bãmb b tãabo." 
1Chronicles2:17 A Abigayil roga a Amaza; a Amaza ba yaa a Yetɛr, Ismayɛlitga." 
1Chronicles2:18 Ad-a Esrõ biiga a Kalɛb sẽn paam kamb niynsi ne a paga, a Azuba, yaa bi-pugl a ye, a Yeriot la kom-dibli a tãabo: a Yesɛr, a Sobab, la a Ardõ." 
1Chronicles2:19 A Azuba kiime t'a Kalɛb peeg a Efrata n maan a paga t'a rog a Ur. 
1Chronicles2:20 A Ur roga a Uri, t'a Uri rog a Besaleyɛl." 
1Chronicles2:21 Dẽ poore a Esrõ kẽe ne a Makir bi-pugla. A Makir ba la a Galaad. A Esrõ da tara yʋʋm pisoobe a sẽn waa n kẽ kãadem ne pʋg kãngã, la paga roga a biiga, a Segub." 
1Chronicles2:22 A Segub n dog a Yayir, la yẽ n waa n lebg tẽns pisi la a tã naaba, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Chronicles2:23 Gesur ne Aram dĩm dãmb n wa n deeg Yayir pʋ-weesã, n paas Kenat ne a tẽn-kogse, bãmb pisoobe. Bãmb fãa da yaa a Galaad ba a Makir yagense." 
1Chronicles2:24 A Esrõ kũum poore, a Kalɛb kẽe ne a Efrata, a ba a Esrõ pʋg-kõore, n dog a Asewur, a Tekoa ba." 
1Chronicles2:25 A Yerameyɛl, a Esrõ bi-kẽenga, roga kamba: a pipi biig a Ram, n paas a Buna, a Oren, a Osem, a Ayiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 A Yerameyɛl paama paga a to sẽn da boond t'a Atara; yẽ yɩ-la Onam ma. 
1Chronicles2:27 A Ram, a Yerameyɛl bi-kẽenga kamba: a Maas, a Yamin la a Ekɛr." 
1Chronicles2:28 A Onam kamba yɩ-la a Samayi la a Yada. A Samayi kamba: a Nadab la Abisur. 
1Chronicles2:29 A Abisur paga yʋʋr da ya a Abiayil, a roga a Abã la a Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 A Nadab kamba: a Selɛd la a Apayim; a Selɛd kiime n ka rog biig ye. 
1Chronicles2:31 A Apayim biiga: a Yiseyi. A Yiseyi biiga: a Sesã; a Sesã biiga: a Alayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 A Samayi ba-biiga a Yada kamba: a Yetɛr la a Zonatã. A Yetɛr kiime n pa rog biig ye. 
1Chronicles2:33 A Zonatã kamba: a Pelɛt la a Zaza. A Yerameyɛl yagensa la bãmba. 
1Chronicles2:34 A Sesã pa rog bi-ribl ye, a roga kom-pugli bala; la a Sesã da tara yem-daoogo sẽn da yaa Ezipt neda t'a yʋʋr bond t'a Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 A Sesã kõ-la a yem-daoogã a bi-pugla t'a maan a paga, tɩ pagã dog biiga, a Atayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 A Atayi roga a Natã, a Natã doga a Zabad." 
1Chronicles2:37 A Zabad roga a Efial, a Efial roga a Obɛd." 
1Chronicles2:38 A Obɛd roga a Yewu; a Yewu roga a Azariya;

1Chronicles2:40 a Elasa roga a Sismayi; a Sismayi roga Salum. 
1Chronicles2:41 A Salum roga a Yekamiya; a Yekamiya roga a Elisama. 
1Chronicles2:42 A Yerameyɛl ba-biiga a Kalɛb kamba: a Mesa, a bi-kẽenga, sẽn yɩ a Zɩf ba, n paas a Maresa, a Ebrõ ba." 
1Chronicles2:43 A Ebrõ kamba yaa a Kora, a Tapuwa, a Rekem, a Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 A Sema roga a Rãam, a Zorkoam ba. A Rekem roga a Samayi." 
1Chronicles2:45 A Samayi biiga la a Maõ la a Maõ yɩ-la a Bɛt-sur ba. 
1Chronicles2:46 A Efa, a Kalɛb pag a to, doga a Arã, a Mosa, a Gazɛz. A Gazɛz ba la a Arã." 
1Chronicles2:47 A Yadayi kamba: a Regem, a Zotam, a Gesã, a Pelɛt, a Efa la a Saaf." 
1Chronicles2:48 A Kalɛb pag a to, a Maaka, roga a Sebɛr la a Tirana," 
1Chronicles2:49 pʋg kãng n dog a Saaf, a Madmana ba la a Seva, a Makbena la a Gibeya ba. A Kalɛb bi-pugl la a Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ad-a Kalɛb yagens a taab yɛsa: a Ur, a paga a Efrata bi-kẽenga doga a Sobal, a Salma la a Aref. A Sobal n me Kiriyat-Yearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 t'a Salma me Bɛtelyɛɛm, t'a Aref me Bɛt-Gedɛr."

1Chronicles3:1 Ad-a Daviid kamb niyns sẽn dog Ebrõ tẽnga: a bi-kẽenga: a Amno, a ma la a Ayinoam, Zizreyɛl bi-pugla. A yiib soaba, a Daniyɛl, a ma la a Abigayil, Karmɛl paga," 
1Chronicles3:2 a tãab soaba, a Absalom, a Maaka biiga, Gesur dĩma a Talmayi bi-pugla, a naas soaba, a Adoniyas, a Agit biiga." 
1Chronicles3:3 A nu soaba a Sefatiya, a ma la a Abital; a yoob soaba, a Yitream, a paga a Egla sẽn doge, yẽ me yɩɩ rĩma biiga." 
1Chronicles3:4 Bãmb b yooba doga Ebrõ, t'a Daviid dɩɩ naam be yʋʋm a yopoe la kiis a yoobe n yaool n wa rɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, yʋʋm pis-tã la a tã."

1Chronicles3:11 a Zoram, a Akaziyas, a Zowas," 
1Chronicles3:12 a Amaziyas, a Azariyas, a Zotam,"

1Chronicles3:14 a Amon, a Zoziyas. Bãmb fãa yɩ-la a kamba."

1Chronicles3:18 a Malkiram, a Pedaya, a Senasar, a Yekamiya, a Osama, a Nedabiya."

1Chronicles3:20 A Mesulam kamba: a Asuba, a Oyɛl, a Berekiya, a Asadiya, a Yusab-Esed: bãmb b nu."

1Chronicles4:1 A Zɩɩda kamba: a Perɛs, a Esrõ, a Karmi, a Ur, la a Sobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 A Reaya, a Sobal biiga, doga a Yaat, la a Yaat roga a Awumayi ne a Laad. Soreatitsa yagens la bãmba." 
1Chronicles4:3 A Ur, a Efrata bi-kẽenga la Bɛtelyɛɛm metã, roga a Etam, a Zizreyɛl, a Yisma, a Yidbas; bãmb tão la a Aslelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Kamb a taab n paase: a Penuwɛl, Gedor meta, a Ezɛr, Usa meta." 
1Chronicles4:5 A Asewur n me Tekoa; a da tara pagb a yi: a Ela la a Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 A Naara kamba: a Awuzam, a Efɛr, a Temni, a Aasetari." 
1Chronicles4:7 A Ela kamb yɩ-la a tãabo: a Serɛt, a Soar la a Etna." 
1Chronicles4:8 A Kos roga a Anub la a Sobeba n paas a Aareyɛl yagensa ba a Arum. 
1Chronicles4:9 Neba ra waoogda a Yabɛs n yɩɩd a saam-biisã, a ma pʋda a yʋʋra Yabɛs, t'a namsa wʋsg a rogma wakato." 
1Chronicles4:10 A pʋʋsa Soaala woto: «Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, pids-y maam ne y barka, paas-y m paoongo, tẽeg-y y nug n gũ-ma, zãag-y-m ne yel-beedo la pɛta!» Soaala kõ-a-la a sẽn kose." 
1Chronicles4:11 A Kelub, a Suwa ba-biiga, roga a Meyir sẽn yɩ a Estõ ba;" 
1Chronicles4:12 A Estõ doga a Bɛt-Rafa, a Pasea, a Teyina, a Ir-Naas ba, Bãmb yagense n waa n kẽ Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 A Kenaz kamba: a Otniyɛl la a Seraya. A Otniyɛl kamba: a Atat la a Meonotayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 A Meonotayi roga a Ofra, a Seraya doga a Zoab. Yẽ la nus-tʋʋm-mitba yaaba, Ge-Arasim ba. B yaa nus tʋʋm-tʋmdba. B bãg-faaga ra boondame tɩ nus-tʋʋm-tʋmdb bãg-faaga." 
1Chronicles4:15 A Yefume biiga a Kalɛb kamba: a Iru, a Ela, a Naam. A Ela biiga: a Kenaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 A Yaalelɛl kamba: a Zɩf, a Zifa, a Tiriya la a Asarɛl." 
1Chronicles4:17 A Ezra kamba: a Yetɛr, a Merɛd, a Efɛr, a Yalõ. A Merɛd kẽe kãadem ne Ezipt rĩm bi-pugla sẽn boond tɩ Bita la a Bita kõ-a-la a Miriyam, a Samayi la a Yisba, Estemoa meta." 
1Chronicles4:17 A Ezra kamba: a Yetɛr, a Merɛd, a Efɛr, a Yalõ. A Merɛd kẽe kãadem ne Ezipt rĩm bi-pugla sẽn boond tɩ Bita la a Bita kõ-a-la a Miriyam, a Samayi la a Yisba, Estemoa meta." 
1Chronicles4:18 A Merɛd da kẽe kãadem ne Zɩɩda bi-pugla la a doga a Yerɛd, Gedor meta, n dog a Ebɛr, Soko meta, n dog a Yekutiyɛl, Zanoa meta." 
1Chronicles4:19 A Odiya kẽe kãadem ne a Naam tão. Bãmb kamba la Garmitsa sẽn kẽed Keyila. Le paasa Maakatitse sẽn kẽed Estemoa. 
1Chronicles4:20 A Simo kamba: a Amno, a Rinna, a Ben Ana, la a Tilõ. A Yiseyi kamba: a Zoɛt, la a Ben-Zowɛt." 
1Chronicles4:21 A Zɩɩda biiga a Sela kamba; a Ɛr, Leka meta, a Laada, Maresa meta, n paas nus tʋʋm-mitb niyns sẽn da wʋgd-b gĩs bãanes sʋndo, Bɛt-Asbea." 
1Chronicles4:22 A Sela yagense le yɩ-la a Zokim, n paas neb niyns sẽn da kẽed-b Kozeba. A yagensa le yɩ-la a, Zoyas la a Saraf sẽn kẽng Moab soolmẽ n tɩ yi kãadem n lebg n wa Leyɛm; la rẽ fãa daar zãagame." 
1Chronicles4:23 Bãmb da yaa yagdba, n da kẽed Netayim la Gedera; b ra bee be n pẽ dĩma n tʋmd a tʋʋma." 
1Chronicles4:24 A Simeõ kamba: a Nemuwɛl, a Yamin, a Yarib, a Zera, a Sol." 
1Chronicles4:25 A Sol sẽn dog kamb niynsi: a Salum, a Mibsam, a Misma." 
1Chronicles4:26 A Misma kamba: a Amuwɛl, a Zakur, a Simeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 A Simeyi roga kom-dibli piig la a yoobe la kom-pugli a yoobe, la a ba-biisa pa rog kamb wʋsg ye, woto bãmb sags pa yalg wala a Zɩɩda rẽnd ye." 
1Chronicles4:28 B da kẽeda Beerseba, Molada, Asar-Suwal," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bila, Esem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuwɛl, Orma, Siklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bɛt-Markabot, Asar-Suzim, Bɛt-Bireyi, Saarayim. Woto n yɩ bãmb tẽn-bɛda n ta a Daviid naam." 
1Chronicles4:32 La b tẽn-bõonego n paase, Etam, Ayin, Rimon, Token, Asã: tẽns a nu," 
1Chronicles4:33 n paas tẽn-bõoneg sẽn da gũbg b tẽn-bɛdã al n tɩ tãag Baalat. B sẽn zĩnd tẽns niyns la woto. La woto me n be b sõadga sebrẽ. 
1Chronicles4:34 Sẽn yɩ-b a Simeõ buud sags nanamse; A Mesobab, a Yamlɛk, a Yosa, a Amasiya kamba." 
1Chronicles4:35 A Zowɛl, a Yewu, a Zosibiya kamba, t'a Zosibiya meng yaa a Seraya biiga la a Asiyɛl yagenga." 
1Chronicles4:36 A Eliyoenayi, a Yakoba, a Yesoaya, a Asaya, a Adiyɛl, a Yesimiyɛl, a Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 a Ziza, a Sifeyi biiga, a Alõ yagenga, a Yedaya yagen-tʋbra-kẽega, a Simri biiga, a Semaya biiga." 
1Chronicles4:38 B sẽn togs b rãmb yʋya, yɩɩ b buuda sags nanamse, bãmb buuda fɩɩgame tɩ looge." 
1Chronicles4:39 B kẽna al Gerar noorẽ, n tɩ ta tẽn-nabrã sẽn be yaanga, n baood yamd maasa b rũms yĩnga." 
1Chronicles4:40 La b tuka yamd maasa, yamd sõma, ne tẽng sẽn yalem wʋsgo, tɩ fãa ya laafi la bãane; sẽn da be-b tẽng kãng pĩnda da yaa a Kam yagense." 
1Chronicles4:41 B b sẽn gʋls b rãmb yʋʋr mars-marsã, bãmb n wa Zɩɩda dĩma a Ezekiyas zamaanẽ, b kʋʋ tẽnga rãmba fãa sẽn da be be, la b kãab-b kãab beed sẽn ket n yɛs ne rũnna, la b reesa b zĩisã n zĩndi, tɩ yamd maas da bee beene, b rũmsã yĩnga." 
1Chronicles4:42 Neb kẽere, bãmb sʋka, a Simeõ yagense, kẽnga Seyir tẽnsã sẽnẽ. Yaa neb kobs-nu, ne b taoor dãmba: a Pelatiya, a Neariya, a Refaya, a Uziyɛl, a Iseyi kamba." 
1Chronicles4:43 Bãmb luba a Amalɛk yagensã sẽn keesã, n deeg zĩig n zĩnd be n ta rũnna." 
1Chronicles5:1 A Rubẽ n da yaa a Zakoob bi-kẽenga. La a sẽn wa n dẽgem a ba gãaga, a bi-kẽemdã rɩk n kõ-la a Zozɛf. Yẽ me ra yaa a Zakoob biiga. Woto a Rubẽ buud pa le soog kãseng ye." 
1Chronicles5:2 A Zɩɩda yɩɩga a ba biisa fãa, tɩ yẽ yageng a ye n waa n lebg Israyɛl dĩma. La a Zozɛf n baas n soog bi-kẽemdã ne a yoodã." 
1Chronicles5:3 A Rubẽ, a Israyɛl bi-kẽenga kamba: a Enok, a Pallu, a Esrõ la a Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 A Zowɛl kamba: a Semaya, a Gog, a Simeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 a Mika, a Reaya, a Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 a Beera, yẽ la Asʋr dĩma a Teglat-Falasar yõk n tall n loog yembdo, yẽ la a Rubẽ yagensa kãsma." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ad-a ba-biisi sẽn da ya sags kãsem-dãmba tɩ b yʋʋr gʋls sõadga sebr zugu. Pipi, a Yeyiyɛl, sẽn pʋgda, a Zakari;" 
1Chronicles5:8 sẽn pʋgd yɛsa, a Bela, a Azaz biiga, a Sema yagenga, a Zowɛl yagen-tʋbra-kẽega. A Rubẽ yagensa ra kẽeda tẽns niyns sẽn be Aroɛr la Baal-Meõ sʋka. Aroɛr bee nug rɩtgo, tɩ Nebo la Baal Meõ be nug goabga." 
1Chronicles5:9 Yaangã, b ra tɩ kẽeda we-raaog ning sẽn da welgd bãmb tẽn-peelma ne Efrat, Babilon kʋɩlgã. B rũmsa ra yaa wʋsgo Galaad tẽnga." 
1Chronicles5:10 Dĩm a Sol zamaanẽ b yiisa tãpo n zab ne Agritsã n tõog-ba, n dees b roto n zĩndi, Galaad yaanga." 
1Chronicles5:11 A Gad yagens da zĩi Rubẽ rãmba yegende, Bazã tẽng n tɩ n ta Salka, yaanga." 
1Chronicles5:12 A Zowɛl yagensã n da ya pipi, t'a Safã pʋgda, t'a Yanayi la a Safat pʋgda." 
1Chronicles5:13 Sẽn da kẽed-b be yɛsa n ya yẽgr a ye yaa nin-bãmba: a Mikayɛl, a Mesulam, a Seva, a Zorayi, a Yakã, a Ziya, la a Ebɛr: bãmb b yopoe." 
1Chronicles5:14 B fãa ra yaa a Abiayil kamba: a Uri yagense, n paas a Yaroa, a Galaad, a Mikayɛl, a Yesiayi, a Yado, a Buz yagense." 
1Chronicles5:15 A Ayi, a Abdiyɛl biiga, a Guni yagenga n dag n ya b rooga kãsma." 
1Chronicles5:16 B rag n tilga b yiya, Galaad, Bazã ne b tẽn-kogse n paas Sarõ, zĩig ning fãa b sẽn tõe n wãbneg rũnga." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bãmb fãa yʋya da bee sõadga sebrẽ, Zɩɩda dĩma a Zotam la Israyɛl dĩma a Zeroboam zamaanẽ." 
1Chronicles5:18 A Rubẽ yagense, a Gad la a Manase bogre, da tara zab-zabdba sẽn pid ne zabr sũuri, sẽn tar gãndo la sʋʋse, la tãbdo, bãmb tus pis-naas la a naase la kobs-yopoe la pisoobe." 
1Chronicles5:19 B zaba ne Agritse n paas a Yetur, a Nafis, la a Nodab yagense." 
1Chronicles5:20 Bãmb kosa Soaala-Wẽnd sõngre b zabra wakato. B sẽn da teeg Wẽnd yĩnga, b deega b kosgo la b sõng-b lame. Woto b tõoga Agritsã la sẽn da kẽed-b bãmb tãpẽ." 
1Chronicles5:21 B zɛɛ b rũmsã, yʋgma tus pis-nu, piis tus kobs-yi la pis-nu, bõn-yãans tus a yi, la neb tus koabga." 
1Chronicles5:22 Bɛɛba ra kii ka tɛka. Soaala-Wẽnd n zab n sõng Rubẽ, Gad la Manase yagensã. Woto b reega Agritsa tẽns n kẽ n tãag yembda kẽnd wakato." 
1Chronicles5:23 A Manase bogra da waa n kẽe Bazã ne Ermo sʋka. Bazã bee nug rɩtgo tɩ Baal-Ermo, Senir la Ermo tãnga be nug goabga." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ad b rota nanamse: A Efɛr, a Iseyi, a Eliyɛl, a Azriyɛl, a Yirmea, a Odaviya, a Yadiyɛl. Bãmb da yaa zabr gãndaado, b yʋʋr yiime, b da yaa b buuda kãsem-dãmba." 
1Chronicles5:25 La bãmb beega b saam dãmba Wẽnnaam; wa pʋg-yoodr sẽn bas a sɩda n baood dapa, bãmb bao bu-zẽna wẽn-naandse, bu-zẽmb niyns Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn sãam a Israyɛl kamba taoore." 
1Chronicles5:26 A Israyɛl Wẽnnaam pirsa a Ypll ne a Teglat-Falasar, Asʋr dĩm dãmba. B wʋk-b lame n tɩ kẽes yembdo, b wʋka a Rubẽ, a Gad yagense, ne a Manase bogre, b peeg-b lame n tɩ bas Ala, Abor, Ara la Gozã kʋɩlga noore. B keta be ne rũnna." 
1Chronicles5:27 A Levi kamba: a Gersõ, a Keyat, a Merari," 
1Chronicles5:28 A Keyat kamba: a Aram, a Isar, a Ebrõ la a Uziyɛl." 
1Chronicles5:29 A Amram kamba; a Aarõ, a Moyiiz, a Miriyam. A Aarõ kamba: a Nadab, la a Abiyu, a Elazar la Itamar." 
1Chronicles5:30 A Elazar doga a Pinas; a Pinas roga a Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles5:31 a Abisuwa roga a Buki, a Buki roga a Uzi, a Uzi roga a Zeraya," 
1Chronicles5:32 a Zeraya roga a Merayot; 
1Chronicles5:33 a Merayot roga a Amariya; a Amariya roga a Ayitub. 
1Chronicles5:34 A Ayitub roga a Sadok, a Sadok roga a Ayimaas," 
1Chronicles5:35 a Ayimaas roga a Azariya, a Azariya roga a Zoana;" 
1Chronicles5:36 a Zoana roga a Azariya a yiib soaba; yaa yẽ n tʋm maan-kʋʋd tʋʋmde, Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, a Salomo sẽn me roog ninga pʋga, Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles5:37 A Azariya roga a Amariya, a Amariya roga a Ayitub" 
1Chronicles5:38 a Ayitub roga a Sadok, a Sadok roga a Salum," 
1Chronicles5:39 a Salum roga a Ilkiya, a Ilkiya roga a Azariya." 
1Chronicles5:40 A Azariya roga a Seraya, a Seraya roga a Zozadak."
