1Chronicles5:41 A Zosadak looga wakat ninga Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn tũ a Nabikodonozor nugu n wʋk a Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmba n kẽng yembdo. 
1Chronicles6:1 A Levi kamba: a Gersõ, a Keyat a Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 A Gersõ kamba: a Libni, ne a Simeyi." 
1Chronicles6:3 A Keyat kamba: a Amram, a Isar, a Ebrõ, a Uziyɛl." 
1Chronicles6:4 A Merari kamba: a Mali, la a Musi. Bãmb sɩgda a Levi." 
1Chronicles6:5 A Gersõ kamba: a Libni, a Yaat, a Zima," 
1Chronicles6:6 a Zoa, a Ido, a Zera, a Yeatrayi." 
1Chronicles6:7 A Keyat kamba: a Aminadab, a Kore, a Asir," 
1Chronicles6:8 a Elkana, a Ebiyasaf, a Asir," 
1Chronicles6:9 a Taat, a Uriyɛl, a Uziya, a Sol." 
1Chronicles6:10 A Elkana doga kamb a yiib n paase: a Amasayi la a Ayimot. 
1Chronicles6:11 A Ayimot kamba yɩ-la a Elkana, a Sofayi, a Naat," 
1Chronicles6:12 a Eliab, a Yeroam; a Elkana n dog a Samwɛl." 
1Chronicles6:13 A Samwɛl kamba: a Zowɛl, a bi-kẽenga, la a Abiya a yiib soaba." 
1Chronicles6:14 A Merari kamba: a Mali, a Libni, a Simeyi, a Uza," 
1Chronicles6:15 a Sima, a Agiya, a Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 Ad-a Daviid sẽn yãk b rãmba tɩ b soog yɩɩla, wẽnd doog pʋga, kuga walsa koglga, zood kaseta, sẽn waa n paam zĩiga." 
1Chronicles6:17 Bãmb tʋʋmd da yaa yɩɩla, sɛka rooga taoore, n tãag a Salomo sẽn waa n me wẽnd dooga Zerizalɛɛm. B ra maanda b tʋʋmdã wala b sẽn kõ-b noore." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ad sẽn da tʋmd-b tʋʋm kãnga ne b kamba: a Keyat kamba sʋka: a Eman, yɩɩn-yɩɩndã, a Zowɛl biiga, a Samwɛl biiga," 
1Chronicles6:19 a Elkana biiga, a Zeroboam biiga, a Eliyɛl biiga, a Toa biiga," 
1Chronicles6:20 a Suf biiga, a Elkana biiga, a Maat biiga, a Amasayi biiga," 
1Chronicles6:21 a Elkana biiga, a Zowɛl biiga, a Azariya biiga, a Sefaniya biiga," 
1Chronicles6:22 a Taat biiga, a Asir biiga, a Eviasaf biiga, a Kore biiga," 
1Chronicles6:23 a Isar biiga, a Keyat biiga, a Levi biiga, a Israyɛl biiga." 
1Chronicles6:24 A ba-biiga a Asaf da yɛsa yẽ nug rɩtgo. A Asaf ba wã yaab rãmba la a Berekiya, a Sima," 
1Chronicles6:25 a Mikayɛl, a Baaseya, a Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:26 a Etni, a Zera, a Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:27 a Etã, a Zima, a Simeyi," 
1Chronicles6:28 a Yaat, a Gersõ, a Levi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sẽn yaa a Merari yagensa ra yɛsa b nug goabga. A Etã n da lʋɩ b taoore tɩ yɩɩla yɩɩnẽ la yẽ yaab rãmba la a Kisi, a Abdi, a Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:30 a Asabiya, a Amasiya, a Ilkiya," 
1Chronicles6:31 a Amsi, a Bani, a Semɛr," 
1Chronicles6:32 a Mali, a Musi, a Merari, a Levi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Bãmb ba-biisi, Levits a taaba, da tʋmda wẽnd doog tʋʋma." 
1Chronicles6:34 A Aarõ ne a kamba da yõogda maanda maan-kugra zugu la b yõogd wisdu, la tɩdare. Bãmb n da so tʋʋm sõma fãa maanego ne maoong kʋʋbo, a Israyɛl yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga wala a Moyiiz, Wẽnnaam tʋʋm-tʋmdã sẽn da kõ noore tɩ b maane." 
1Chronicles6:35 Ad-a Aarõ roogo: a Elazar, a Pinas, a Abisuwa," 
1Chronicles6:36 a Buki, a Uzi, a Zeraya," 
1Chronicles6:37 a Merayot, a Amariya, a Ayitub," 
1Chronicles6:38 a Sadok, a Ayimaas." 
1Chronicles6:39 La ad zĩisã b sẽn da bẽeg n kõ bãmba tɩ b tilg b yiya, ad-a Aarõ biiga a Keyat roogo sẽn paam zu-noog pʋɩɩr ninga:" 
1Chronicles6:40 B kẽesa bãmba, a Zɩɩda soolem pʋga, Ebrõ ne a tẽn-kɩremsẽ." 
1Chronicles6:41 Sã n ya weoogã ne tẽn-bõonesã, b kõ-a-la a Kalɛb, a Yefune biigã." 
1Chronicles6:42 A Aarõ kamba, b kõ bãmb soondg tẽnse, Ebrõ, Libna ne a bãoogo, Yatir, Estemoa ne b bãado," 
1Chronicles6:43 Ilez ne a bãoogo, Debir ne a bãoogo," 
1Chronicles6:44 Asã ne a bãoogo, Bɛt-Semɛs ne a bãoogo," 
1Chronicles6:45 la b yãka a Bẽnzame soolmẽ: Alemɛt ne Geba ne b bãado, Anatot ne a bãoogo. B tẽnsã fãa-fãa yaa piig la a tã." 
1Chronicles6:46 A Keyat kamba: sẽn da kell-bã, b kõ bãmba, n zems ne b sagsã, tẽns piiga b sẽn yãk a Manase bogr soolmẽ." 
1Chronicles6:47 B kõ-la a Gersõ kamba n zems ne b sagse, tẽns piig la a tã b sẽn yãk a Isakar, a Asɛr, a Neftali la a Manase bogre tẽn-peelmẽ, Bazã." 
1Chronicles6:48 A Merari kamba: b poeesame n kõ bãmb sẽn zems ne b sagse, tẽns piig la a ye, b sẽn yãk a Rubẽ, a Gad la a Zabulõ tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Chronicles6:49 A Israyɛl kamba kõo Levit dãmba tẽn-bãmba ne b weto. 
1Chronicles6:50 B poeesame n yãk a Zɩɩda yagens pʋɩɩrẽ, a Simeõ, la a Bẽnzame yagens pʋɩɩrẽ n kõ-ba, b pʋda tẽnsã fãa b meng yʋʋre." 
1Chronicles6:51 B sẽn poeese, a Keyat yagens sags paama tẽnse, b sẽn yãk a Efrayin pʋɩɩrẽ." 
1Chronicles6:52 B kõ-b-la soondg tẽnse, Sikɛm, ne a weoogo, Efrayim tãnga pendẽ, Gezɛr ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:53 Yokmeam ne a weoogo, Bɛt-Orõ ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:54 Ayalõ ne a weoogo, Gat-Rimo ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:55 la a Manase bogre soolma pʋga b yãka Anɛr ne a weoogo, Bileam ne a weoogo n kõ a Keyat yagens a taaba." 
1Chronicles6:56 A Gersõ kamba: b kõ-b-la sẽn zems ne b roogo, tẽns b sẽn yãk a Manase bogrẽ, Golan, sẽn be Bazã, ne a weoogo, Astarot ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:57 B yãka a Isakar roog soolmẽ Kedɛs ne a weoogo, Daverat ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:58 Ramot ne a weoogo, Anem ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:59 b yãka a Asɛr buud soolmẽ: Masal ne a weoogo, Abdõ ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:60 Ukok ne a weoogo, Reob ne a weoogo." 
1Chronicles6:61 B yãka a Neftali roogẽ: Kedɛs sẽn be Galile ne a weoogo, Amo ne a weoogo, Kiriyatayim ne a weoogo." 
1Chronicles6:62 A Merari kamba a taabã, b yãka a Zabulõ soolmẽ n kõ bãmba, Rimon ne a weoogo, Tabor ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:63 la Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã poore, al Zeriko n tɩ ta al Zʋrdẽ yaanga, b yãka a Rubẽ soolmẽ, Besɛr sẽn be zĩ-pɛɛlẽ ne a weoogo, Yasa ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:64 Kedemot ne a weoogo, Mefaat ne a weoogo;" 
1Chronicles6:65 b yãka a Gad soolmẽ, Ramot sẽn be Galaad ne a weoogo, Maanayim ne a weoogo," 
1Chronicles6:66 Esbõ ne a weoogo, Yazɛr ne a weoogo." 
1Chronicles7:1 A Isakar kamba: a Tola, a Ypva, a Yasub, a Simrõ, bãmb b naase." 
1Chronicles7:2 A Tola kamba: a Uzi, a Refaya, a Yeriyɛl, a Yamayi, a Ibsam, a Semwɛl; bãmb la a Tola roog nanamse. Da yaa nin-tɩɩse b zagsẽ. A Daviid zamaanẽ b zabr gãndaada da taa tus pisi la a yiibu la kobs-yoobe." 
1Chronicles7:3 A Uzi biiga, a Izraya; a Izraya kamba: a Mikayɛl, a Obadiya, a Zowɛl, a Isiya, bãmb b nu fãa yɩɩ sak kãsem-dãmba." 
1Chronicles7:4 B ra tigma tãb-biisi zabr yĩnga, sẽn zems ne b saka la ba rãmb roto, neb tus pis-tã la a yoobe. Pagba la kamba da yaa wʋsgo b sakẽ wã." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bãmb saam-biisi, a Isakar sags kamb a taaba, da yaa zab-zabdba, sũ-keelem dãmba: Sõadga sebrẽ, b fãa da yaa tus pis-nii la a yopoe." 
1Chronicles7:6 A Bẽnzame kamba: a Bela, a Bekɛr a Yediayɛl: bãmb b tã." 
1Chronicles7:7 A Bela kamba: a Esbõ, a Uzi, a Uziyɛl, a Yerimot, a Iri: rot kãsem-dãmba a nu sẽn da yaa tãb-biisi, sũ-keelem dãmba bãmb ne b roog rãmba sõor da yaa dap tus pisi la a yi la pis-tã la a naase." 
1Chronicles7:8 A Bekɛr kamba a Zemira, a Zowas, a Eliezɛr, a Eliyoenayi, a Omri, a Yerimot, a Abiya, a Anatot, a Alemɛt, bãmb fãa da yaa a Bekɛr kamba." 
1Chronicles7:9 B sẽn gʋls-ba, roog fãa ne a nanamse la a kamba, b sõda tãb-biisi, sũ-keelem dãmba, dap tus pisi la kobs-yi." 
1Chronicles7:10 A Yediayɛl biiga: a Bileã; a Bileã kamba: a Yewus, a Bẽnzame, a Ewud, a Kenaana, a Zetã, a Tarsis, a Ayisaar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Bãmb fãa da yaa a Yediayɛl kamba la a roog nanamse la tãb-biisi, sũ-keelem dãmba; b sõor da yaa rap tus piig la a yopoe la kobs-yi sẽn da tõe n kẽng tãpo." 
1Chronicles7:12 A Supim la a Upim da yaa a Ir kamba: a Usim da yaa a Aɛr biiga. 
1Chronicles7:13 A Neftali kamba: a Yaaziyɛl, a Guni, a Yesɛr, a Salum; a Bila yagens la bãmba." 
1Chronicles7:14 A Manase kamba: a Asriyɛl la a Makir. B ma yɩɩ yem-poaka la aramga. A Makir n dog a Galaad. 
1Chronicles7:15 A Makir paama pagba n kõ a Upim la a Supim; a tão yʋʋr da yaa Maaka. A Makir doga biig a to, a yʋʋr a Selofead. A Selofead roga kom-pugli bala." 
1Chronicles7:16 A Makir paga a Maaka le roga a biiga, la a pʋda biiga yʋʋr t'a Perɛs. A sẽn le rog a to, a pʋd-a-la Serɛs, la yẽ kamb la a Ulam, la a Rekem," 
1Chronicles7:17 a Ulam biiga: a Bedã. Woto la a Galaad yagense. A Galaad, yaa a Makir biiga, la a Manase yagenga." 
1Chronicles7:18 A Galaad tão, a Amolekɛt n dog a Isod, a Abiezɛr la a Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 A Semida kamba: a Ayã, a Sekɛm, a Liki la a Aniam, Kom-dibli gilli." 
1Chronicles7:20 A Efrayim doogo: a Sutela, a Berɛd, a Taat, a Elada, Taat a to." 
1Chronicles7:21 A Zabad ne a Sutela n paas a Ezɛr ne a Elad, a Efrayim kamba, tʋlg n looga ne Gat rãmb rũmsi tɩ Gat rãmb kʋ-ba." 
1Chronicles7:22 B ba, a Efrayim, maana b kʋʋr n kaoos wʋsgo. A ba-biisa n kong n wa n bels-a, n bʋk a sũuri." 
1Chronicles7:23 A waa n kẽe ne a paga t'a rɩk pʋga n dog biiga, t'a pʋd a t'a Beriya n yetẽ: yel-beedo kẽ-la m zakẽ." 
1Chronicles7:24 A Efrayim da tara bi-pugla, a Sera; bi-kãng n kɩt tɩ b me Bɛt-Orõ Tãn-sɛɛgẽ la Bɛt-Orõ Tãngẽ, n paas Uzẽ-Sera." 
1Chronicles7:25 A Beriya rooga kamba: a Refa, a Resɛf, a Tela, a Taã," 
1Chronicles7:26 a Ladã, a Amiyud, a Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 a Nun, yẽ biig la a Zozuwe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ad tẽnsã b sẽn da kõ a Efrayim yagense: yaa Betɛl ne a tẽn-kogse wala Naaram sẽn be yaanga, Gezɛr ne a tẽn-kogse, nin-taoore, la tẽn-peelma sẽn be Sikɛm ne Aya sʋka." 
1Chronicles7:29 A Manase kamba n dag n so Bɛt-Seã, Taanak, Megido la Dor ne b tẽn-kogse. Yaa tẽn-bãmba pʋsẽ la a Israyɛl biiga a Zozɛf kamba ra kẽeda." 
1Chronicles7:30 A Asɛr kamba: a Imna, a Iseva, a Isevi la a Beriya. B tão wã la a Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 A Beriya kamba: a Ebɛr la a Malkiyɛl; a Malkiyɛl n me Birzayit tẽnga. 
1Chronicles7:32 A Ebɛr doga a Yaflɛt, a Semɛr, a Otam, la a Suwa, b tão." 
1Chronicles7:33 A Yaflɛt kamba: a Pasak, a Bimal a Asevat." 
1Chronicles7:34 A ba-biiga a Semɛr kamba: a Ayi, a Roga, a Uba, a Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 A ba-biiga a Otam kamba: a Sofa a Imna, a Selɛs, a Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 A Sofa kamba: a Suwa, a Arnefɛr, a Suwal, a Beri, a Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 a Besɛr, a Od, a Sama, a Silesa, a Itrã, a Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 A Itrã kamba: a Yefune, a Pispa, a Ɛra." 
1Chronicles7:39 A Ula kamba: a Ara, a Aniyɛl, a Risiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bãmb fãa yaa Asɛr yagense. B ra zãada b zags neere, b yʋʋr yiime la b tʋʋma fãa sakame. Sõadga sebr zugu b ra yaa bãmb tus pisi la a yoobe sẽn tõe n bob zabre." 
1Chronicles8:1 A Bẽnzame n dog a Bela, a bi-kẽenga, a Asbɛl, a yiib soaba, a Ara, a tãab soaba," 
1Chronicles8:2 a Noa, a naas soaba, a Rafa, a nu soaba." 
1Chronicles8:3 A Bela roga kom-dibli: a Adar, a Gera, a Abiyud," 
1Chronicles8:4 a Abisuwa, a Naama, a Aowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 a Gera, a Sefufã, la a Uram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ad-a Ewud kamba; Geba zak nanamse waa n kɩtame tɩ b yi n tɩ kẽ Manaat; ad b yʋya: 
1Chronicles8:7 A Naama, a Ayiya, a Gera. A Gera n lʋɩ taoore tɩ b yi n teem tẽngã la yẽ n dog a Uza la a Ayiyud." 
1Chronicles8:8 A Sarayim yiisa a pagb a yiibu: a Usim la a Baara. A sẽn ta Moab wetẽ," 
1Chronicles8:9 a kẽe kãadem ne pag a ye, a Odɛs, n dog a Zobab, a Sibiya, a Mesa, a Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 a Yewus, a Sakiya, la a Mirma. Bãmb la a kamba, bãmb n lebg rota nanamse." 
1Chronicles8:11 A Sarayim da roga kamb a yiib ne a paga a Usim, yɩ-la a Abitub la a Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:12 A Elpaal kamba: a Ebɛr, a Misam, a Semɛd. A Semɛd n me Ono tẽnga ne Lod la a tẽn-kogse." 
1Chronicles8:13 A Beriya ne a Sema, Ayalõ tẽnga kãsem-dãmba, bãmb n dig Gat tẽng rãmba tɩ b zoe." 
1Chronicles8:14 A Beriya kamba: a Ayiyo, a Sasak, a Yerimot," 
1Chronicles8:15 a Zebadiya, a Arad, a Edɛr," 
1Chronicles8:16 a Mikayɛl, a Yispa, la a Zoa." 
1Chronicles8:17 A Elpaal kamba: a Zebadiya, a Mesulam, a Iski, a Ebɛr," 
1Chronicles8:18 a Yismerayi, a Yizliya, a Zobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 A Simeyi kamba: a Yakim, a Zikri, a Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 a Eliyoenayi, a Siletayi, a Eliyɛl," 
1Chronicles8:21 a Adaya, a Beraya, a Simrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 A Sasak kamba: a Yispã, a Ebɛr, a Eliyɛl," 
1Chronicles8:23 a Abdõ, a Zikri, a Ana," 
1Chronicles8:24 a Ananiya, a Elam, a Anetotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 a Yifdeya, a Penuwɛl." 
1Chronicles8:26 A Zeroam kamba: a Samserayi, a Seariya, a Ataliya" 
1Chronicles8:27 a Yaresiya, a Eliya, a Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Bãmb n yɩ rot kãsem-dãmba, ned kam fãa a wakatẽ, b da kẽeda Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles8:29 Sẽn me-a Gabaõ tẽnga n pʋd-a a meng yʋʋrã da kẽeda be, yẽ ne a paga a Maaka." 
1Chronicles8:30 A bi-kẽenga a Abdõ, ne a yaopa: a Sur, a Kis, a Baal, a Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 a Gedor, a Ayio, a Zekɛr," 
1Chronicles8:32 la a Miklot, a Simea ba. Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga, b rota ra tota b saam-biisa rẽnna." 
1Chronicles8:33 A Nɛr roga a Kis, a Kis roga Sol; a Sol roga a Zonatã, a Malkisuwa, a Abinadab, a Isbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 A Zonatã biiga: a Meribaal; a Meribaal roga a Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 A Mika kamba: a Pitõ, a Melɛk, a Tarea, a Aaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 A Aaz roga a Zoada; a Zoada roga a Alemɛt, a Azmavɛt, la a Zimri. A Zimri roga a Mosa," 
1Chronicles8:37 a Mosa roga a Binea, a Binea roga a Rafa, a Rafa roga a Elasa, a Elasa roga a Asɛl." 
1Chronicles8:38 A Asɛl roga kom-dibli a yoobe, la ad-b yʋya: a Azrikam, a Bokru, a Ismayɛl, a Seariya, a Obadiya, a Anan. Bãmb fãa ya a Asɛl kamba." 
1Chronicles8:39 A Asɛl ba-biig a Esɛk kamba: a Ulam, a bi-kẽenga, a Yewus, a yiib soaba, a Elifelɛt, a tãab soaba." 
1Chronicles8:40 A Ulam kamba yɩɩ zabre gãndaado sẽn da mi tãpo. B paama kamba la yagense wʋsgo: bãmb koabg la pis-nu. Bãmb fãa yaa a Bẽnzame roogo. 
1Chronicles9:1 A Israyɛl kamba fãa yʋy gʋlsame, ned fãa a ba roogẽ la b gʋls-b-la a Israyɛl dĩm dãmba sebra pʋgẽ. B ra waa n wʋka Zɩɩda rãmb n kẽng Babilon n tɩ kẽes-b yembdo, Soaala-Wẽnd tũudma sẽn pa yɩ neer yĩnga." 
1Chronicles9:2 Sẽn lɛɛg-b n wa b tẽnsẽ la b soolmẽ pipi, yɩɩ nin-zaalse n paas maan-kʋʋdba, ne Levit dãmba la sẽn da tʋmd-b wẽnd doogẽ la b get a yellã." 
1Chronicles9:3 Sẽn waa n kẽ-b Zerizalɛɛma yɩ-la a Zɩɩda, a Bẽnzame la Efrayim ne Manase rãmba." 
1Chronicles9:4 Zɩɩda rãmba yɩ-la a Utayi, a Amiyud biiga, tɩ yẽ meng yaa a Omri biiga, a Imri yagenga, a Bani yagen-tʋbra-kẽega, a Perɛs roogẽ." 
1Chronicles9:5 Sã n yaa a Sela roogẽ, yɩ-la a bi-kẽeng a Asaya ne a kamba." 
1Chronicles9:6 A Zera roogẽ yɩ-la a Yeuwɛl. Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn da kẽed Zerizalɛɛm yɩɩ bãmb kobs-yoobe la pis-wɛ. 
1Chronicles9:7 Bẽnzame rãmba yɩ-la a Salu, a Mesulam biiga, a Odaviya yagenga la a Asenuwa yagen-tʋbra-kẽega." 
1Chronicles9:8 Le paasa a Ibneya, a Yeroam biiga. Le paasa a Ela, a Uzi biiga la a Mikri yagenga. Le paasa Mesulam a to, a Sefatiya biiga, a Reuwɛl yagena la a Ibniya yagen-tʋbra-kẽega." 
1Chronicles9:9 Bãmb fãa da yaa b buuda sags kãsem-dãmba. Bẽnzame rãmb sẽn da kẽed Zerizalɛɛm da yaa kobs-wɛ la pis-nu la a yoobe. 
1Chronicles9:10 Maan-kʋʋdba roogẽ da yaa a Yedaya, a Zoyarib, a Yakẽ," 
1Chronicles9:11 ne a Azariya, bãmb yaab rãmb la a Ilkiya, a Mesulam, a Sadok, a Merayot, la a Ayitub. Sẽn get wẽnd dooga yell fãa da roga a zugu." 
1Chronicles9:12 Le paasa a Adaya; yẽ yaab rãmb la a Yeroam, a Pasewur la a Malkiya. Le paasa a Masayi, yẽ yaab rãmb la a Adiyɛl a Yazera, a Mesulam, a Mesilemit, a Imɛr." 
1Chronicles9:13 Maan-kʋʋdb a taaba sẽn paas zagsa kãsem-dãmba, b gill fãa ra yaa nin-tɩɩse, bãmb tusr la kobs-yopoe la pisoobe n da get wẽnd dooga yelle." 
1Chronicles9:14 Levitsa roogẽ yɩ-la a Semariya, yẽ yaab rãmba la a Asub, a Azrikam a Asabiya, a Merari roogẽ." 
1Chronicles9:15 Le paasa a Basbakar, a Ɛres, a Galal, a Mataniya, bãmb yaab rãmba la a Mika, a Zikri, a Asaf." 
1Chronicles9:16 Le paasa a Obadi yẽ yaab rãmb la a Semaya, a Galal, a Yedutun, la a Berekiya, a Asa biiga, la a Elkana yagenga; a Elkana ra kẽeda Neftoa tẽn-toosẽ." 
1Chronicles9:17 Dagno-gũudba roogẽ da yaa a Salum, b kãsma, n paas a a Akub, a Talmo, la a Ayiman." 
1Chronicles9:18 Yaa bãmb yagensã n ket n tʋmd ne rũnna. Bãmb n so yaang noorã, dĩma noorã gũudem. Bãmb yaab rãmba sẽn da gũud noor ninga ra yaa Levitsa sika noore." 
1Chronicles9:19 Yaa bãmb yaab rãmba a Salum, a Kore biiga, a Ebiyasaf yagenga, a Kore yagen-tʋbra-kẽega la a Kore rooga neba n da gũud sɛka rooga noore, wala b yaab rãmba sẽn da maand Soaala buuda sikẽ." 
1Chronicles9:20 A Pinas, a Elazar biiga, n da yɩ bãmb naab pĩnda, Soaala sẽn da be ne a yĩnga." 
1Chronicles9:21 A Meselemiya biig a Zakari me ra yɩɩ dagno-gũud sɛka rooga noorẽ. 
1Chronicles9:22 B sẽn da tũus b rãmba tɩ b ya dagno-gũudba, b fãa da yaa kobs-yi la piig la a yiibu, b ra sõd-b-la b tẽnsẽ. Yaa a Daviid la bãngd a Samwɛl n da zĩndig bãmb b tʋʋmda zugu daar fãa yĩnga; B pʋg sẽn da peel ne bãmb yĩnga." 
1Chronicles9:23 Bãmb ne b yagensã n tong taaba n soog Wẽnd waoogr dooga gũudem. 
1Chronicles9:24 Wẽnd dooga noya, yaanga, nin-taoore, goabga, rɩtgo, noor fãa ra tara a gũudba." 
1Chronicles9:25 Gũudb kẽer da be b tẽnsẽ n wat wakat-wakato n sõngd ne gũubã, dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ." 
1Chronicles9:26 Dagno-gũudba nanams a naasã, bãmb yẽ da be b tʋʋmd zĩigẽ n ka viigdẽ ye. La Levitsa la b ra gũnug rotã la wẽnd dooga arzɛgse." 
1Chronicles9:27 Yʋngo b ra pa gãe n zãr ne wẽnd dooga ye. Bãmb n so a gũubu la a noya pakre, beoog sã n vẽege." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bãmb sʋka b ra yãka kẽere tɩ b gũud Wẽnnaam waoogre teedã. B sõt-b-la b yiisg wakato n le sõd-b b kẽesg wakato. 
1Chronicles9:29 B ra yãka kẽere me tɩ b pekd wẽnd dooga lagd sõma wã. Kẽer getame tɩ bũmb da paoog ye, wala zoma, rãama, kaama, wisdã la yũ-noog kaama." 
1Chronicles9:30 La sã n da ya yũ-nood kaama seglg la b kalengo, yaa maan-kʋʋdba n da get rẽnna." 
1Chronicles9:31 A Matitiya, Levit a yembre, a Salum bi-kẽenga, a Kore roogẽ, n da so bura wẽebo, bur ning sẽn na n dɩk n kõ Wẽndã." 
1Chronicles9:32 B saam-biisa kẽere, a Keyat yagense, n da wẽed bur sõma wã b sẽn da kõt Wẽnd vʋʋsg raar fãa wã." 
1Chronicles9:33 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sẽn da ya-b zags kãsem-dãmba n da so Soaala-Wẽnd balengã ne yɩɩlã, bãmb da kẽeda b meng rotẽ. B ra ka tʋmd tʋʋmd a to n paas ye. B ra ka tar vʋʋsg yʋng woo tɩ wĩntoogo." 
1Chronicles9:34 Levitsa nanamse sẽn sõd n gʋls sebrẽ, ned kamb fãa ne a roog-roog la woto. Zerizalɛɛm la b ra kẽeda." 
1Chronicles9:35 A Gabaõ ba, a Yeyiyɛl da kẽeda Gabaõ ne a paga a Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ne a Abdõ, a bi-kẽenga, ne a yaopã: a Sur, a Kis, a Baal, a Nɛr, a Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 a Gedor, a Ayiyo, a Zakari, la a Miklot." 
1Chronicles9:38 A Miklot roga a Simam. Bãmb me da naag n kẽeda Zerizalɛɛm wa b saam-biisi la b rota ra tota taaba. 
1Chronicles9:39 A Nɛr roga a Kis, a Kis roga a Sol, a Sol roga a Zonatã, a Malkisuwa, a Abinadab, a Isbaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 A Zonatã biiga: a Meribaal, a Meribaal roga a Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 A Mika kamba: a Pitõ, a Melɛk, a Tarea." 
1Chronicles9:42 A Aaz roga a Yara, a Yara roga a Alemɛt, a Alemɛt roga a Azmavɛt, a Azmavɛt roga a Zimri. A Zimri roga a Mosa," 
1Chronicles9:43 A Mosa roga a Binea, a Binea roga a Refaya, a Refaya roga a Elasa, a Elasa roga a Asɛl." 
1Chronicles9:44 A Asɛl doga kom-dibli a yoobe. B yʋya la woto: a Azrikam, a Bokru, a Ismayɛl, a Seariya, a Obadiya, a Ana: bãmb la a Asɛl kamba." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filisti rãmba waa n kaooga zabre ne a Israyɛl, Gilboa tãnga. Israyɛl kamba zoe Filisti rãmba taoore, b pogl-b lame tɩ b lʋɩ n ki Gilboa tãnga zugu." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filisti rãmba lɛɛg n kẽ-la a Sol ne a kamba n kʋ-ba, B kʋ-la a Zonatã, a Abinadab, a Malkisuwa, a Sol kamba." 
1Chronicles10:3 Zabra waa n wɩnga a Sol zĩigẽ n yɩɩda, la tãb-biisa paama a Sol n pogle." 
1Chronicles10:4 A Sol yeela sõgna sẽn da zãad a zab-teedã: «Wõog f sʋʋgã n kõs-ma, tɩ nin-dẽgd bãmba da wa yaal maam ye.» La sõgna pa sak ye. Dabeem da tar-a-la wʋsgo. A Sol wõoga a sʋʋga n bas a meng n lʋɩ n bʋʋg-a, n kʋ a menga." 
1Chronicles10:5 Sõgna sẽn mik t'a Sol kiime, yẽ me lʋɩ n bʋʋga a sʋʋga n kʋ a menga." 
1Chronicles10:6 A Sol kii woto ne a kamb a tãabã t'a roog gill naag n wã. 
1Chronicles10:7 A Israyɛl neba fãa sẽn da be tãn-longẽ wã sẽn yãend tɩ neba zoeeme la a Sol ne a kamba kiime, bãmb me basa b tẽns n zoe, tɩ Filisti dãmba wa reeg b tẽnse n kẽedẽ." 
1Chronicles10:8 Vẽkembeoogo Filisti rãmba waame n na n zɛ sẽn ki-ba teedo. B yãenda a Sol ne a kamba sẽn gãe Gilboa tãnga zugu. 
1Chronicles10:9 B yeesa a Sol futã la b looga ne a zugu la a zab teedo, n yaool n tʋm tɩ b saag Filisti rãmba tẽns n togs kibar sẽn ya noogo, b wẽn-naandsa la b buuda yĩnga." 
1Chronicles10:10 B bĩnga a Sol zab-teedã b pʋʋsga roogẽ, n yaool n ka a zu-wangã a Dagõ doogẽ." 
1Chronicles10:11 Yabɛs-Galaad dãmba fãa wʋma Filisti rãmba sẽn maana. 
1Chronicles10:12 Gãndaadã fãa kẽngame n tɩ rɩk a Sol ne a kamba n wa Yabɛs, la b muma b kõaba Yabɛs, tɩ-kãseng tẽngre, la b loe b noor dasem a yopoe." 
1Chronicles10:13 A Sol kii woto, a sẽn da beeg Wẽnd yĩnga, n pa reeg b noore, la a sẽn kos pagã t'a sok kɩɩmsa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles10:14 Yẽ pa bõs Wẽnd saglg ye, dẽ n so tɩ b bas t'a ki, n deeg a naama n kõ a Zese biig a Daviid." 
1Chronicles11:1 Wẽnd kãnga, a Israyɛl kamba fãa tigma taaba a Daviid sɛɛgẽ, Ebrõ, la b yeel-a lame: «Gese, tõnd yaa fo kõaba, la f yĩng nemdo." 
1Chronicles11:2 Pĩnda a Sol sẽn da waa n dɩt a naama, foom n da zoet n lʋɩt a Israyɛl taoore, a yit bɩ a kẽeda. Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, yeel-f lame: yaa foom n na n kɩɩm m buudu, a Israyɛl, la foom n na n yɩ a naaba.»" 
1Chronicles11:3 Yaa woto la a Israyɛl nin-kẽemsa fãa wa dĩma nengẽ, Ebrõ. A Daviid wẽena Ebrõ, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, t'a na pids b sẽn datã. B pʋdga a zug kaam, t'a lebg Israyɛl dĩma, wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel ne a Samwɛl noore." 
1Chronicles11:4 A Daviid ne Israyɛl gilli kẽngame n tɩ wẽ Zerizalɛɛm gũbri n lub-a. Tẽnga ra boondame tɩ Zebus tɩ Zebuzitse n da kẽed-a. 
1Chronicles11:5 La Zebuzitsa yeela a Daviid: «Fo ka na n kẽ d tẽnga ye.» 
1Chronicles11:6 La a Daviid deega Siõ tãnsoben-doogã, tɩ lebg a na-tẽnga. La a Daviid yeelame: «Sẽn denga Zebuzitg kʋʋbo yẽ soab n na n lebg m tãb-biisa tãnsoaba.» A Zoab, a Seruya biiga n deng n dʋ n tak zabrã la a lebga tãnsoaba." 
1Chronicles11:7 A Daviid tɩ kẽe tãnsoben-doogã tɩ zĩ-kãng na n bool t'a Daviid na-tẽnga. 
1Chronicles11:8 A maneg n mee tẽngã n gilgi, n sĩd Milo longã, n me lal-gũbrã. A Zoab n me tẽnga sẽn kellã." 
1Chronicles11:9 A Daviid naama waa n paama pãnga tɩ Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, ra bee ne-a." 
1Chronicles11:10 A Daviid gãndaada kãsem-dãmb naaga ne a Israyɛl zãng fãa n sõng a Daviid t'a rɩ naama wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn date. 
1Chronicles11:11 A Daviid gãndaada yʋy la woto: a Isbaal; a ba yaa Akmonitga la gãndaad pis-tã wã nin-yende. Yaa yẽ n kaoog zabre, daar a ye, ne neb kobs-tã la a kʋ-b-la zãnga t'a nug na n yaool n vʋʋs ne a kãnda zẽkr la kõsbo." 
1Chronicles11:12 Sẽn pʋgda yẽ, yaa a Elazar, Awoyitga a Dodo biiga, a da yaa gãndaad a tãabã nin-yende." 
1Chronicles11:13 A da bee Pa-Damim ne a Daviid. Filisti dãmba waa be n na n kaoog zabre. Pʋʋg me n da be be n pelg ne alkam kɛgenga la tãb-biisa sẽn da zoet Filisti rãmba taoore, waa n kẽ-a lame." 
1Chronicles11:14 Bãmb b tãaba tɩ yalsa pʋʋga tẽnsʋka n dig beebã, n kʋ Filisti rãmba. Wẽnd yĩnga a Israyɛl tʋma raood beelẽ n tõog bɛɛba gilli." 
1Chronicles11:15 Gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka neb a tãabo n bʋʋg a Daviid Pĩig ninga sẽn pẽ Adulam tãn-bokã; dẽ tɩ Filisti rãmba da maana b tãb-sika Refayim dãmba tãn-longẽ. 
1Chronicles11:16 A Daviid da bee tãn-boka pʋga, tɩ Filisti rãmba tãb-biis bogr da be Bɛtelyɛɛm." 
1Chronicles11:17 A Daviid waa n kosa woto: «Ãnna n na n kõ-m koom tɩ m yũ? M data bulg ninga sẽn be Bɛtelyɛɛm noorẽ wã koom n yũ!» 
1Chronicles11:18 Gãndaad a tãabã fõrg n kẽe Filisti rãmba tãb-sikã n tɩ yõng koom Bɛtelyɛɛm noorẽ kobaoorã n tall n wa kõ a Daviid. A Daviid pa sak n yũ kooma ye, la a raag-a-la Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
1Chronicles11:19 A yeelame: «Bɩ Wẽnd sɩbg maam n bãge m sã n yũ ko-kãnga. Na yɩẽ wala yaa nin-bãmba zɩɩm la m yũ-ya tɩ b saka b yõor yãkre n tõog n paam ko-kãnga.» Gãndaad a tãabã sẽn maan la boto. 
1Chronicles11:20 A Abisayi, a Zoab ba-biigã, yẽ me da yaa gãndaad pis-tã naaba. Yẽ me kaooga zabre ne neb kobs-tã la a kʋ-b-la ne a kãnde, t'a yʋʋr yi gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka." 
1Chronicles11:21 A paama ziiri n yɩɩd gãndaad pis-tã wã n wa tol n legb b naaba, la a ziira ka ta gãndaad a tãabã rẽnd ye." 
1Chronicles11:22 A Benaya, a Zoyada biiga, Kabseyɛl dao, yẽ la gãndaoog menga sẽn tʋm tʋʋm bɛda. Yẽ n kʋ Moab gãndaad a yiibu, yẽ n sig loangẽ n kʋ gɩgemde, wulg sẽn maan daare." 
1Chronicles11:23 Yaa yẽ me n le kʋ Ezipt ned ninga woglem sẽn da ta kãntɩɩs a nu, n zãad a nugẽ, kãnde sẽn zem koeer bõanga. A seg-a-la ne a dasaar bala, n fãsg kãndã Ezipt daoa nugẽ n lɛɛg n kʋ-a ne a meng kãnde." 
1Chronicles11:24 A Benaya, a Zoyada biiga me sẽn maan la woto, la rẽ kɩtame t'a yʋʋr yɩ gãndaad pis-tã wã sʋka." 
1Chronicles11:25 A paama ziiri n zʋʋg gãndaad pis-tã wã, la a ziirã ka ta gãndaad a tãabã rẽn ye. A Daviid kẽes-a-la a tãb-gũudba sʋka, sẽn gũud-b yẽnda menga sʋka." 
1Chronicles11:26 Gãndaad la sũ-keelem dãmba a taaba sẽn kellã yʋy la woto: a Asayɛl, a Zoab ba-biiga, a Elana, a Dodo biiga, Bɛtelyɛɛm daoa." 
1Chronicles11:27 A Samot: Arotitga, a Elɛs: Pelonitga." 
1Chronicles11:28 A Ira, Tekoa daoa a Ikɛs biiga; a Abiezɛr, Anatot daoa." 
1Chronicles11:29 A Sibkayi, Usa daoa; a Ilayi, Aoya daoa." 
1Chronicles11:30 A Marayi, Netofa raoa; a Elɛd Netofa raoa, a Baana biiga." 
1Chronicles11:31 A Itayi, Gibeya daoa, a Ribayi biiga, a Bẽnzame roogẽ; a Benaya, Pireatõ raoa." 
1Chronicles11:32 A Urayi, Gaas kʋɩlsẽ dao; a Abiyɛl, arvatitga;" 
1Chronicles11:33 a Azmavɛt, Bawurim daoa; a Eliyaba, Saalbonitga;" 
1Chronicles11:34 a Bene-Asem, Gizõ daoa; a Zonatã, Arar daoa a Sage biiga." 
1Chronicles11:35 A Ayiyam, Arar daoa a Sakar biiga; a Elifal, a Ur biiga;" 
1Chronicles11:36 a Efɛr, Mekera daoa; a Ayiya, Pelonitga." 
1Chronicles11:37 A Esrõ, Karmɛl daoa; a Naarayi, a Ezbayi biiga;" 
1Chronicles11:38 a Zowɛl, a Natã ba-biiga; a Mibar, Agritga." 
1Chronicles11:39 A Selɛk, Amonitga; a Narayi, Beerot daoa, sẽn da zãada a Seruya biiga, a Zoab, zab teedã." 
1Chronicles11:40 A Ira, a Yetɛr roogẽ; a Garɛb, a Yetɛr biiga." 
1Chronicles11:41 A Uri, Ititga; a Zabad, a Alayi biiga," 
1Chronicles11:42 a Adina, a Siza biiga, a Rubẽ yagensã kãsma la gãndaad pis-tã taoor soaba." 
1Chronicles11:43 A Ana, a Maaka biiga la a Zozafat, Mitenitga;" 
1Chronicles11:44 a Uziya, Astarot daoa; a Sama la a Yeyiyɛl, Aroɛr daoa a Otam kamba," 
1Chronicles11:45 a Yediayɛl, a Simri biiga, n paas a ba-biiga, a Zoa, Tisitga;" 
1Chronicles11:46 a Eliyɛl Maavim daoa; a Yeribayi la a Zosabiya, a Elnaam kamba; a Itma, Moabitga;" 
1Chronicles11:47 a Eliyɛl, a Obɛd ne a Yasiyɛl, Soba dapa." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ad neb niyns sẽn pʋga a Daviid, Siklag, a sẽn waa n zãag ne a Sol, a Kis biigã. Fãa da yaa gãndaado, n da sõngd-a zabr zĩigẽ." 
1Chronicles12:2 B ra boba logdo. B goabg ra vɩɩ wala b rɩtgo tɩ b tõe n lobg kugr bɩ b tão pĩim. Ad-a Bẽnzame roog kamba, a Sol ba-biisi:" 
1Chronicles12:3 b naaba, a Ayiezɛr, yẽ yao, a Zowas, Gibeya dao a Sema kamba; a Yeziyɛl la a Pelɛt, a Azmavɛt kamba; a Beraka la a Yewu, Anatot dapa;" 
1Chronicles12:4 a Ismaya, Gabaõ daoa, gãndaoog menga, gãndaad pis-tã wã nin-yende la b taoor soaba;" 
1Chronicles12:5 a Irmeya, a Yaaziyɛl, a Zoana la a Zozabad, Gedera daoa." 
1Chronicles12:6 A Eluzayi, a Yerimot, a Bealiya, a Semariya, a Sefatiya, Aruf dapa;" 
1Chronicles12:7 a Elkana, a Isiya, a Azarɛl, a Zoezɛr, a Yasobam, Koreyitse;" 
1Chronicles12:8 a Zowɛl la a Zebadiya, Gedor daoa a Yeroam kamba." 
1Chronicles12:9 A Gad roog rãmb me welgame n bʋʋg a Daviid a soondg zĩigẽ, we-raoogẽ, bãmb da yaa tãb-biisi sẽn tar sũ-keelem, sẽn da minim zabre al n mi neere gãong la kãna zãabo, b raooda da taa gɩgemd dẽnna, la b tĩigã da zema yãgs sẽn zoet tãmsa zut tĩiga." 
1Chronicles12:10 A Ezɛr n da yaa kãsma, t'a Obɛd pʋgda, t'a Eliab yaa a tãab soaba," 
1Chronicles12:11 a Mismana, a naas soaba, a Irmeya a nu soaba," 
1Chronicles12:12 a Atayi, a yoob soaba, a Eliyɛl, a yopoe soaba," 
1Chronicles12:13 a Zoana, a nii soaba, a Elzabad, a wɛ soaba," 
1Chronicles12:14 a Irmeya, piig soaba, a Makbanayi, piig la a ye soaba." 
1Chronicles12:15 A Gad yagens sʋka sẽn yɩ b tãnsoaben-dãmb la boto. Sẽn da yaa faoor bãmb sʋka da zema tãb-biis koabga, tɩ gãndaoog menga zem neb tusri." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bãmb n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, pipi kiuugu, wakat ninga a sẽn pid n daannẽ, n dig bãg-faaga nebã, yaanga la taoore." 
1Chronicles12:17 A Bẽnzame la a Zɩɩda yagense me bʋʋga a Daviid, a soondg zĩigẽ," 
1Chronicles12:18 t'a Daviid yi n seg-ba n gom ne ba n yeele: «Yãmb sẽn wa mam nengẽ ne pʋ-peelem n na n sõng maam, ad-y yaa ne sũ-noogo la d na n fãoog taaba. La yãmb sã n waa ne zãmbo n na n sõng m bɛɛba tɩ m yaool n ka maan ned pãnga, bɩ d saam dãmba Wẽnnaam ges la b kao d bʋʋdo.»" 
1Chronicles12:19 La Wẽnd pãng siga a Amasayi, gãndaad pis-tã wã naab a ye, t'a yeele: «Foom la tõnd soaala, Daviid, tõnd me bee ne foo, Zese biiga! Laafi la laafi sig f zugu. Laafi ne sẽn sõngda foo, tɩ yaa Naaba-Wẽnd meng n wat f sõngre!» A Daviid deeg-b lame la a kẽes-b-la a tãb-biisa nanams sʋka." 
1Chronicles12:20 A Manase yagens me kẽ-la a Daviid, a sẽn wa raar ning ne Filisti rãmba n na n kaoog zabre ne a Sol. La b yaool n ka naag Filisti rãmba n zab ye, tɩ Filisti rãmba nanamse ra yẽsa ne taaba n lebs a Daviid, n yetẽ: «A rat n koosa tõnd yõore n paam n le kẽ a zu-soaba, a Sol tãpẽ.»" 
1Chronicles12:21 A Daviid sẽn wa n lebd Siklag, ad-a Manase neb niyns sẽn waa n kẽ-a: a Adna, a Zozabad, a Yediayɛl, a Mikayɛl, a Zozabad, a Eliyu la a Siletayi, sẽn da ya a Manase tãb-biis nanamse." 
1Chronicles12:22 Bãmb n sõng a Daviid n zab, tɩ b fãa da yaa tãb-biisi sẽn tar daoodo la b lebga tãnsoaben-dãmba." 
1Chronicles12:23 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa a Daviid da reegd-b lame al t'a tãb-sikã yalge n ka le tar maken-taag ye. 
1Chronicles12:24 Ad zab-zabdba ne b sagsa sõore, sẽn bob-ba n babs a Daviid Ebrõ n na n kõ-a naam, a Sol naama, wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ noore:" 
1Chronicles12:25 A Zɩɩda roogẽ: dap tus a yoob la kobs-nii, sẽn bob zabre n zãad gãongo la kãna." 
1Chronicles12:26 A Simeõ roogẽ: zabr gãndaado, tus a yopoe la koabga." 
1Chronicles12:27 A Levi roogẽ: tus a naase la kobs-yoobe," 
1Chronicles12:28 n paas a Zoyada, a Aarõ yagenga, yẽ bobame n wa ne rap tus a tã la kobs-yopoe." 
1Chronicles12:29 Bi-bɩɩg la gãndaoog a ye, a Sadok, ye me waa ne a sags nanams pisi la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles12:30 A Bẽnzame roogẽ: a Sol saam-biisi, dap tus a tã; sã n ka baraare, b da kell n kẽeda a Sol tãpẽ." 
1Chronicles12:31 A Efrayim roogẽ: zabr gãndaado tɩ b yʋʋr da yi b buuda sʋka, bãmb tus pisi la kobs-nii." 
1Chronicles12:32 A Manase bogra sẽn da be nin-taoora roogẽ: dap tus piig la a nii. B ra tũusa bãmb a yembr-yembre tɩ b wa yug a Daviid naam. 
1Chronicles12:33 A Isakar roogẽ: tãnsoaben-dãmb kobs-yi ne b tãb-biisi sẽn da tar yẽesem, sẽn da mi sẽn ya wakat ninga la seem ninga la naama na n yugi." 
1Chronicles12:34 A Zabulõ roogẽ: neb tus pis-nu, sẽn da tõe n maan zabre ne zab-teed buud fãa la sẽn da mi zabra meng sẽn zabd to-to." 
1Chronicles12:35 A Neftali roogẽ: tãnsoaben-dãmb tusri ne b tãb-biis sẽn zãad gãndo la kãna, bãmb tus pis-tã la a yopoe." 
1Chronicles12:36 A Dã roogẽ: tãb-biis tus pisi la a nii la kobs-yoobe sẽn tõe n tak zabre. 
1Chronicles12:37 A Asɛr roogẽ: dap tus pis-naase sẽn zãms la sẽn mi zabr takre la sẽn segl n gũudẽ. 
1Chronicles12:38 Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga rʋʋre, a Rubẽ, a Gad, a Manase bogra roogẽ: dapa sẽn bob zab-teed buud fãa, bãmb tus koabga la pisi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Nin-bãmba fãa, tãnsoaben-dãmba wala tãb-biisã boba b zab-teedo n kẽng Ebrõ ne pʋ-peelem n tɩ yuga a Daviid t'a lebg Israyɛl gill naaba. Israyɛl kamba a taaba fãa yɩɩ sũur a ye n na n kõ a Daviid naama." 
1Chronicles12:40 B zĩnda ne a Daviid dasem a tã, n dɩtẽ la b yũud b saam-biisa sẽn da segl bũmb ning fãa b yĩnga." 
1Chronicles12:41 Ebrõ tẽn-toosã, la ba Isakar, Zabulõ la Neftali rãmba, da zɩlga teedo ne bõeense, yʋgma, bõn-weese, la niis n wat n kõt-ba: yaa zom, kankam koeemse, sib koeemse, dãam la kaam, piis la niis zembala tɩ dag n ya kɩdeng kãsenga ne a Israyɛl." 
1Chronicles13:1 A Daviid maana yẽsgo ne tãb-biisa nanamse la taoor dãmbã. 
1Chronicles13:2 A yeela Israyɛl tigungã gilli: «Sã n zems ne yãmba, la Naaba-Wẽnd me sã n data, bɩ d tʋm neba d saam-biis a taaba nengẽ, saam-biis niynsi, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa sẽn pa-b tẽnsẽ la b pʋtẽ wã, d bool-ba tɩ b wa naag tõndo." 
1Chronicles13:3 D na naag taab n tɩ lebs zooda kaseto, kuga walsa koglgã, d tẽngẽ, tɩ sɩda, tõnd pa ges a yelle, a Sol zamaanẽ wã ye.»" 
1Chronicles13:4 A Israyɛl kamba fãa reegame tɩ leokra yaa neere la b tog n maana wa sẽn togsã. 
1Chronicles13:5 A Daviid kɩtame tɩ b bool Israyɛl kambã b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, al Ezipt toaaga sẽn be nug rɩtgo n ta Lebo-Amat sẽn be nug goabga, tɩ b kẽng Kiriyat-Yearim n tɩ tall kuga walsa koglgã n wa." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dɩlla a Daviid ne Israyɛl kamba fãa kẽnga Baala, sẽn boond me tɩ Kiriyat-Yearim, n be Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. B kẽng n tɩ waa ne koglgã la yaa yẽ zug la Naaba-Wẽnd zao n deegd d pẽgre, tɩ malɛgsa me yɛdg b pɩgsã." 
1Chronicles13:7 Yaa a Abinadab yiri la b zɩlg koglga bilim-bilm paalga. A Uza ne a Ayiyo n da yegd bilim-bilma. 
1Chronicles13:8 A Daviid ne Israyɛl gill saoo ne b pãng fãa Wẽnnaam taoore. B yɩɩla ne koala, la gãngão-gilsi, la kɛma la tõntõodo." 
1Chronicles13:9 La b sẽn waa n ta Kidõ zɛɛgẽ, a Uza tẽega a nug n na n kok koglgã tɩ kellẽ la bilf bala tɩ niisa lubẽ-yẽe." 
1Chronicles13:10 Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puuga ne a Uza tɩ b wẽ-a, a sẽn dɩk a nug n sɩɩs koglga yĩnga; a Uza kii Wẽnnaam taoore." 
1Chronicles13:11 A Daviid sũur sãama wʋsgo, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn maan ne a Uza wẽnega ned sẽn wurg zak lalga. Dẽ me la a pʋd zĩ-kãng t'a Uza lal-bɛɛga, tɩ b ket n boond dũnna." 
1Chronicles13:12 Badaare a Daviid zoe Wẽnd dabeem la a yeelame: «M yɩta a wãna n kẽes kuga walsa koglgã m zakẽ?» 
1Chronicles13:13 La a Daviid pa tall koglgã n kẽng a yiri, a na-tẽngẽ ye, a kɩtame tɩ b tall-a n tɩ bĩng a Obɛd-Edom, Gat dao yiri." 
1Chronicles13:14 Kuga walsa koglg paa kiis a tã a Obɛd-Edom zakẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd ninga barka a Obɛd-Edom zakã ne sẽn be a pʋgẽ fãa. 
1Chronicles14:1 A Iram, Tir dĩma, tʋma neb a Daviid nengẽ. B waa ne ra-sĩdma, ne neb sẽn mi kug peesgo, la raad bogbo n na n me na-yir n kõ a Daviid." 
1Chronicles14:2 Wakat kãnga, a Daviid bãngame tɩ Wẽnnaam da kõ-a-la naam, la naam sẽn tar ziir la pãnga, b buud a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
1Chronicles14:3 Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga, a Daviid le peega pagba, la a roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli." 
1Chronicles14:4 A Daviid kamba sẽn dog-b Zerizalɛɛm yʋya la woto: a Samuwa, a Sobab, a Natã, a Salomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 a Ibar, a Elisuwa, a Elpelɛt," 
1Chronicles14:6 a Noga, a Nefɛg, a Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 a Elisama, a Beeliyada, la a Elifelɛt." 
1Chronicles14:8 Filisti rãmba vʋmame tɩ b taaga a Daviid ne kaam t'a ya Israyɛl zãng dĩma, la b yiime n na n tak zabr ne-a. La a Daviid sẽn wʋm woto, yẽ me yiime n na n tɩ seg-ba." 
1Chronicles14:9 Filisti rãmba tʋg n wẽe Refayitsa, bãg-faagẽ." 
1Chronicles14:10 La a Daviid deng n soka Naaba-Wẽnde: «M tɩ seg Filisti rãmba? Y na ning-b mam nusẽ?» La Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: «Kẽng tɩ m na ning-b fo nusẽ!» 
1Chronicles14:11 Filisti rãmba sega a Daviid Baal-Perasim la a Daviid tõog-b-la zĩ-kãnga. A Daviid yeelame: «Wẽnnaam sõnga m nugu tɩ m wurg m bɛɛba wa koom sẽn wurgd bɛongo.» Yaa rẽ yĩng la b boond zĩ kãanga tɩ Baal-Perasim. 
1Chronicles14:12 La zĩ-kãnga Filisti rãmba zoeeme n bas b wẽn-naandsã la a Daviid yeelame: «B yõog b fãa bugum!» 
1Chronicles14:13 Filisti rãmba le boba tãpo n wa. 
1Chronicles14:14 A Daviid le soka Naaba-Wẽnd n ges a sã n tog n seg-b lame? Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-a: «Da seg-b ye, gilg al yɩɩg n tɩ seg-b pargensa goog noore." 
1Chronicles14:15 Fo sã n wa wʋmd nao rãamde pargensa zutu, f na tak zabre marsã tɩ yaa wakat kãng la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n lʋɩ fo taoore, tɩ f zab n tõog Filisti rãmba.»" 
1Chronicles14:16 A Daviid maana wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-a. Israyɛl kamba tõoga Filisti rãmba al Gabaõ, n tɩ ta Gezɛr." 
1Chronicles14:17 A Daviid yʋʋr yii tẽnsa fãa pʋsẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ tẽnsã fãa zoe a rabeem. 
1Chronicles15:1 A Daviid me-la a zak a na-tẽngẽ. A segla zĩig be la a tii roog ne futu n na n wa kẽesd kuga walsa koglga be. 
1Chronicles15:2 A yiisa noore tɩ Levitsa bala n tõe n tʋk koglgã. Yaa bãmb bal la Naaba-Wẽnd tũus dar fãa yĩnga tɩ b tʋkd-a la b tʋmd sɛka roog tʋʋma. 
1Chronicles15:3 A Daviid tigma Israyɛl kamba fãa Zerizalɛɛm tɩ b na n tɩ rɩk koglgã n wa bĩng-a zĩig ning sẽn da segl a yĩngã. 
1Chronicles15:4 A Daviid tigma a Aarõ yagense, la a Levi yagense. Ad-ba:" 
1Chronicles15:5 a Keyat roogẽ, saka naab, a Uriyɛl, ne a yaop koabg la pisi." 
1Chronicles15:6 A Merari roogẽ, saka naab, a Azaya, ne a yaop kobs-yi la pisi." 
1Chronicles15:7 A Gersõ roogẽ, saka naab, a Zowɛl, ne a yaop koabg la pis-tã." 
1Chronicles15:8 A Elisafã roogẽ, saka naab, a Semaya, ne a yaop kobs-yi." 
1Chronicles15:9 A Ebrõ roogẽ, saka naab, a Eliyɛl, ne a yaop pis-nii;" 
1Chronicles15:10 A Uziyɛl roogẽ, saka naab, a Aminadab, ne a yaop koabg la piig a la yiibu." 
1Chronicles15:11 A Daviid boola maan-kʋʋdba, a Sadok la a Abiyatar, n bool Levitse a Uriyɛl, a Asaya, a Zowɛl, a Semaya, a Eliyɛl la a Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 A yeel-b lame: «Yãmb la Levit dãmba sak nanamse. Yɩlg-y y mense, yãmb ne y saam-biisi, la y tɩ tall Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, kuga walsa koglgã, n wa rɩgl-a m sẽn segl zĩig ningã." 
1Chronicles15:13 Yãmb ka zĩnd kaane pipi rɩkra ye. Dẽ me la Naaba-Wẽnd, tõnd Wẽnnaam yẽeg tõndo, tɩ tõnd ka reng n sok-b wala sẽn da segd ye.»" 
1Chronicles15:14 Maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa yɩlga b mense n tɩ wa ne Israyɛl Wẽnnaam zooda kasetã, kuga walsa koglgã." 
1Chronicles15:15 Levista tʋk-a lame n palg b bãgdo, wala a Moyiiz sẽn da kõ noore, la wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da yeele." 
1Chronicles15:16 A Daviid yeela Levitsa nanamse, tɩ b yals yʋʋmba, b zĩisẽ ne b yʋʋm teedo la b wilg b sũ-noogo. B zodg yɩɩla, tɩ ruudsa wãagdẽ, tɩ koala la kɛm wẽedẽ, tɩ zĩig fãa wulumd ne noogo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Levitsa sẽn yãk b rãmb la woto: a Zowɛl biiga a Eman, a Berekiya biig a Asaf, a Kusaya biig a Etã, a Merari yagenga." 
1Chronicles15:18 Levits kẽere waa n paasame. Yaa sẽn gũud-b noya, wala a Zakari, a Ben, a Yaaziyɛl, a Semiramot, a Yeyiyɛl, a Uni, a Eliyab, a Benaya, a Maaseya, a Matitiya, a Eliflewu, a Mikneya, a Obɛd-Edom, a Yeyiyɛl." 
1Chronicles15:19 Yʋʋmba kẽere, wa a Ena, a Asaf, a Etã, da tara kɛma sẽn yõg ne zũudu, la sẽn zãeed wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles15:20 A Zakari, a Yaaziyɛl, a Semiramot, a Yeyiyɛl, a Uni, a Eliyab, a Maaseya, la a Benaya da wẽeda pɛndga, bãmb da sokda raaga." 
1Chronicles15:21 A Matitiya, a Eliflewu, a Mikneya, a Obɛd-Edom, a Yeyiyɛl la a Azaziya bãmb da tara gĩs a nii koala n sokd yãanga." 
1Chronicles15:22 A Kenaniya, n da ya naaba n so Levits niyns sẽn zɩt-b koglgã, ya ned sẽn sɩd mi gũusgu tɩ bũmb pa yõsd a to ye." 
1Chronicles15:23 Dagno-gũudba A Berekiya la a Elkana, da tog n yegla koglgã. A Obɛd-Edom ne a Yeyiya me ra yaa boto." 
1Chronicles15:24 Maan-kʋʋdba, a Sebaniya, a Zozafat, a Netaneyɛl, a Amasayi, a Zakari, a Benaya la a Eliezɛr, bãmb n da tog n peebd tõntõodo, Wẽnnaam zood kaseta taoore. A Obɛd-Edom la a Yeyiya, bãmb da yaa koglga sẽn bĩngd doog ninga noor gũudba." 
1Chronicles15:25 A Daviid ne Israyɛl nin-kẽemba la neb tusri tãnsoaben-dãmba da kẽngame n na n tɩ rɩk koglgã a Obɛd-Edom yiri, ne sũ-noogo." 
1Chronicles15:26 Sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ Levitsa sẽn da tʋkd koglga paam Wẽnnaam sõngre, b kʋʋ lols a yopoe la pe-raad a yopoe maoongo." 
1Chronicles15:27 A Daviid da yeelga fuugu sẽn maneg n wʋg ne gĩs bãanese sẽn pɩnda. A ra saoodame n naag ne Levitsa sẽn da tʋk koglgã n paas yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã la a Kenaya sẽn da get tʋkra yelle. A Daviid da ninga sãnem-pɛ-m-poore sẽn wʋg ne gĩs peelse. 
1Chronicles15:28 A Israyɛl gilli da yãagda kuga walsa koglg tɩ b tar kilsgu, n tar bardo la tõntõod peebgo, la b wẽed kɛma la koala." 
1Chronicles15:29 La koglga sẽn waa n poog a Daviid na-tẽnga, a Sol bi-pugã a Mikal lɩka võorẽ n gese, la a sẽn yãend dĩma a Daviid t'a saood la a yɩgda, a sãbs-a-la a sũurẽ." 
1Chronicles16:1 B kẽesa kuga walsa koglgo, n dɩgl-a a Daviid sẽn segl zĩig ningã. B kʋʋ Wẽnnaam taoore yũ-nood maando, laafi kosg maando." 
1Chronicles16:2 A Daviid sẽn kʋ yũ-nood maandã la laafi kosg maandã n sɛ, a ninga neba barka Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
1Chronicles16:3 La a kɩtame tɩ b pʋɩ neba fãa rɩɩbo, dapa la pagba, ned kam fãa reega buri ne naaf neongo, ne pesg neongo, n paas miisd sẽn dõos ne bugsuntung bi-koeemse." 
1Chronicles16:4 A Daviid yãka Levitsa tɩ b yals kuga walsa koglga taoore la b tʋʋmd lebga b waoog la b pẽge, la b balem Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
1Chronicles16:5 Yaa a Asaf, yẽ la kãsma, la a Zakari, yẽ la kãsem pʋgdga, a Aziyɛl, a Semiramot, a Yeyiyɛl, a Matitiya, a Eliyab, a Benaya, a Obɛd-Edom la a Yeyiyɛl bãmb da zãada kʋnde la b wãagd ruudsi, t'a Asaf da wẽed kɛma." 
1Chronicles16:6 Maan-kʋʋdba a Benaya ne a Yaaziyɛl da peebda tõntõogo n pa sĩndidẽ, kuga walsa koglga taoore." 
1Chronicles16:7 Badaare a Daviid deng n pẽga Naaba-Wẽnd, la a Asaf ne a ba-biis reega yɩɩlã n yɩɩle." 
1Chronicles16:8 Pẽg-y Naaba-Wẽnde, kaas-y b yʋʋre, ninsaalb buud fãa sʋka, moon-y b tʋʋm-bãna." 
1Chronicles16:9 Balem-y bãmba, zodg-y yɩɩla bãmb yĩnga. Kils-y b bõn-bãna fãa." 
1Chronicles16:10 B sõmblema zẽkda d zugu, sẽn baood-b Wẽnd kɩdem sũ-noogo!" 
1Chronicles16:11 Bao-y Soaala-Wẽnde, bao-y b sõngre. Bao-y bãmb nenga la y da vʋʋs ye." 
1Chronicles16:12 Tẽeg-y bõn-bãna fãa bãmb sẽn maane. Ges-y b pãnga sẽn tʋme. Ges-y b yama sẽn kaoole. 
1Chronicles16:13 Wẽnd Sõgne a Israyɛl yagense, Wẽnd yembse, a Zakoob kamba, bãmb zo-rãmba," 
1Chronicles16:14 bãng-y tɩ bãmb la Naaba-Wẽnde, tõnd Wẽnnaama n kaood tẽng zug-rãmb bʋʋdo." 
1Chronicles16:15 Tẽeg-y b zooda yell daar fãa. Yaa gomde sẽn moon zamaan tusr yĩnga. 
1Chronicles16:16 Yaa zoodo b sẽn yõg ne a Abraam. Yaa b kãabgo b sẽn kãab a Izaak. 
1Chronicles16:17 B yalsa b noore, a Zakoob yĩnga, n yals zood sẽn kõn sɛ a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
1Chronicles16:18 Bãmb n yete: m kõt-f-la tẽng a ye, Kanaã tẽnga la f buud pʋɩɩre!" 
1Chronicles16:19 Wakat kãng tɩ yãmb sõor da paoodame. La y da yaa sãamba, tẽng kãnga pʋgẽ," 
1Chronicles16:20 n yit tẽn-kãngã n kẽ tẽn-kãngã n tat taoore n lebgdẽ, tɩ f yam la poorẽ." 
1Chronicles16:21 Soaala pa sak tɩ bu-zẽmba wẽoog-y ye. Yãmb yĩnga b sɩbga dĩm dãmba," 
1Chronicles16:22 n yeel-b tɩ b ra saag n sɩɩse b sẽn kees b meng yĩnga ye. La b da saag n maan b norɛɛs wẽng ye. 
1Chronicles16:23 Yɩɩl-y n pẽg Wẽnde, tẽng zug rãmba, beeog-beoog fãa bɩ y moon bãmb fãagre!" 
1Chronicles16:24 Togs-y b ziirã ninsaalba fãa, Adem biisa fãa moon b tʋʋm-bãna." 
1Chronicles16:25 Wẽnd waooga, bãmb n tog ne pẽgre! Bãmb kẽesda rabeem n yɩɩd wẽn-naandsa fãa." 
1Chronicles16:26 Bu-zẽmba wẽn-naandsa fãa yaa zaalem. Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n nan saaga. 
1Chronicles16:27 Bãmb nenga yãgda ne neerem la ziiri. Pãng la ziir n pid b ro-sõngã. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ninsaalb buudu, pẽg-y la y waoog Soaala, kils-y Soaala ziir la b pãnga!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Pẽg-y b yʋʋre, wa sẽn segde. Tall-y y kũun n wa b taoore, wõgemd-y n waoog-ba, tɩ b puka b sõmblem." 
1Chronicles16:30 Rig-y rabeem bãmb taoore, tẽng zug rãmba fãa! Bãmb n vigl dũniya t'a pa tõe n vik ye." 
1Chronicles16:31 Yĩngr dãmba kaas b sũ-noog kaasgo, tɩ tẽng zug rãmba kɩdem b kɩdengo. B moon n sok taaba tɩ bu-zẽmba wʋme tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd n so naam!" 
1Chronicles16:32 Mogra ne a pʋgẽ te-neeba, vũ a vũubu; pʋta yɛdg b kooda ne b biisi n wilg b zu-noogo," 
1Chronicles16:33 googa ne a tɩɩsã leng b sũ-noog lengre, tɩ tẽnga Soaala n wa n kaagd a soolem dãmba." 
1Chronicles16:34 Pẽg-y Wẽnnaam, tɩ b yaa nin-noanga, la b nonglem ka be sɛɛb ye." 
1Chronicles16:35 D tees n yeel-ba: Fãag-y-do Wẽnnaam, Fãag-y-do! Tigim-y-do n yiis-d bu-zẽmba sʋka woto d na tãs y pẽgre, woto d na pʋd y yʋʋre, d na bãng y yʋ-sõnga pʋdbo, Israyɛl Wẽnde." 
1Chronicles16:36 D pʋʋsda a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam barka; zamaan woo zamaana, d kãntɩɩg bee tẽnga. Tɩ neba fãa naag taab n deege: «Ami! Wẽnd paam pẽgre!»" 
1Chronicles16:37 A Daviid basa a Asaf ne a ba-biisi, kuga walsa koglga taoore. Bãmb n da tog n ges, ned kam fãa ne a wakato, tɩ Wẽnnaam waoogra ra tol n vaal koglga taoor ye." 
1Chronicles16:38 A basa noya gũudem ne a Obɛd-Edom, la a saam-biisi bãmb pisoob la a nii. A Yedutun biiga a Obɛd-Edom le boondame tɩ Oze." 
1Chronicles16:39 A Daviid ninga maan-kʋʋda, a Sadok, ne maan-kʋʋdb a taaba, a saam-biisã, kuga walsa koglga taoore, Gabaõ tãnga zugu." 
1Chronicles16:40 B da bee be daar fãa n kʋʋd maand Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, yũ-noog maan-kugra zugu, yibeoog la zaabre, la b ra getame tɩ b maan bũmb ning fãa sẽn gʋls noora sebrẽ, noor ninga Soaala sẽn kõ a Israyɛl." 
1Chronicles16:41 Sẽn da be-b ne bãmba, yaa a Eman la a Yedutun. Neb a taaba sẽn ketã, b da tũusa bãmb ned kam fãa, tɩ b tʋʋmd ya b peebd tõntõodo, bɩ b wẽed kɛma, bɩ b reemd ne yʋʋm teeda a taaba, Wẽnnaam pẽgr yĩnga. N pẽg-b tɩ b nonglem ka be sɛɛb ye." 
1Chronicles16:42 Sẽn naag-ba a Eman la a Yedutun da reesda pẽgra yɩɩlã. A Yedutun kamba n da so noya gũudem. 
1Chronicles16:43 Neb fãa kulame, ned kam fãa a yiri, t'a Daviid me kul n le tɩ ges a yir dãmba." 
1Chronicles17:1 A Daviid sẽn n kẽ a meng yiri, a waa n yeela bãngda a Natã: «Gese, mam sẽn be roog ning pʋga tilga ne kʋgs raado, tɩ Wẽnd zood kasetã, kuga walsa koglg, be pɛɛl zãnd tẽngre.»" 
1Chronicles17:2 T'a Natã yeel a Daviid: «Yãmb sũur sẽn dat fãa bɩ y maane tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd bee ne yãmba.» 
1Chronicles17:3 Mik yʋng ninga sẽn pʋga bala, Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga taa a Natã n yeel-a:" 
1Chronicles17:4 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Daviid: ad Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛga: ka foom n na n me roog n kõ maam tɩ m kẽ ye," 
1Chronicles17:5 tɩ mam sẽn wa ne Israyɛl tɛka n ta rũnna daare ka roog pʋgẽ la m zĩndri ye; mam zĩnda zãnd tẽngre, la m sẽn paamẽ." 
1Chronicles17:6 M sẽn tũ a Israyɛl n ta zĩig ning fãa, koɛ bʋg la m yiis n wilg Israyɛl bʋ-kaooda, bɩ a naaba, sẽn wẽnd m zabame n yetẽ: ‹Ya bõe tɩ y pa tilg roogo ne kʋgs daado n kõ maam?›" 
1Chronicles17:7 La marsã, fo na n yeela m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Daviid woto: a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam gomd la woto: Maam n yãk foom rũm-kɩʋng weoogẽ, tɩ fo da yaa pe-kɩɩma; maam n yãk foo tɩ f yɩ mam buud a Israyɛl naaba." 
1Chronicles17:8 Fo sẽn kẽng zĩig ning fãa, mam zĩnda ne foom, la mam sãama f bɛɛbã. Maam n kɩt tɩ fo yʋʋr zeng pãn-dãmba sẽn be tẽng zug rẽnna." 
1Chronicles17:9 Mam na n yãka zĩig a ye n kõ m buud, a Israyɛl, mam na vigl-a t'a kell n pa zĩig a ye; la b kõn le kẽes-a rabeem ye. Bi-bees me kõn leb n koms-a wa pĩnd ye." 
1Chronicles17:10 Mam sẽn yãk bʋ-kaoodba tɩ b soog Israyɛl tɛka, mam ninga f bɛɛba fãa yãnde la mam pĩnd n wilga foom, tɩ m na tilga yiri f yĩnga." 
1Chronicles17:11 F pʋlemd sã n ta a daare tɩ f na n tɩ sak f saam dãmba, mam na n zẽka f yagens sẽn na n pʋg foom, la f yageng a ye maasem yĩnga, m na paas f rĩunga pãnga." 
1Chronicles17:12 Yaa yẽ n na n me rooga mam yĩnga; la mam na n vigla a naama zaoor kẽnkẽ, daar fãa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mam na n yɩɩ wala ba a yĩnga, tɩ yẽ yɩ wala biiga, mam yĩnga, la mam kõn zãag m yel-sõmd ne-a wa dĩm ninga sẽn denga foo zaoora zuga ye." 
1Chronicles17:14 Mam na kɩt t'a rɩ naam m yiri la m soolmẽ, daar fãa, la a naam zaoore na n lugla kẽnkẽ zamaan sẽn wate.»" 
1Chronicles17:15 A Natã togsa rĩma gom kãensã la yɛla sẽn wat beooga fãa. 
1Chronicles17:16 Dĩm a Daviid kẽe n zĩnda Wẽnd taoore n yeele: «Mam yaa bõe, Soaala-Wẽnde, la m yir zema bõe, tɩ y zẽk-m woto fãa?" 
1Chronicles17:17 La y kell n gesa rẽ wa zaalem, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ yãmb na n kãab noogo y yamba roogo, zamaan woko sẽn wat beoog yĩnga. Naaba-Wẽnde, y ges-m-la wa nin-kãsenga." 
1Chronicles17:18 Maam, a Daviid, na n yeela yãmb tɩ bõe n paase, waoogr ning yãmb sẽn waoog-ma poorẽ? Ad-y y sɩd nonga y yambã!" 
1Chronicles17:19 Soaala, y nonglma sẽn labs yĩnga, y gesa y yambã la yaa tʋʋmd kãseng la y tʋm yã n le puk y ziiri." 
1Chronicles17:20 Soaala, d sã n tũ d tʋba sẽn wʋma, yãmb ka be taar ye." 
1Chronicles17:21 Tẽng zug ka, buud bʋgo n wẽnd yãmb buud a Israyɛl, buud y sẽn tũus y meng yĩnga, buud yʋʋr sẽn yi moogo, la sẽn kẽesd dabeem. Buudu y sẽn tɩ fãsg Ezipt ne pãng la tʋʋm bana?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Yãmb tũusa y buud a Israyɛl n kõ y menga, t'a yɩ yãmb buudu daar fãa, la yãmba, Naaba-Wẽnd n lebg a Wẽnnaam." 
1Chronicles17:23 La marsã, koɛɛgã yãmb sẽn leok y tʋʋm-tʋmdã poorẽ, a yira poorẽ, bɩ y kɩt tɩ gomd kãng yɩ sɩd daar fãa la a pids wala y sẽn yeelã." 
1Chronicles17:24 Y sẽn pʋlem bũmb ninga da vaal ye la woto b na pẽg y yʋʋr zamaan woo zamaana. B na tõog n yeele: ‹A Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, Wẽnd ninga sẽn yaa a Israyɛl Soaala la dũni wã fãa Soaala, Wẽnd na kaoos-m m zaoorẽ!›" 
1Chronicles17:25 Soaala, sɩd yaa yãmb meng n wilg m zaoorã la y wilg-m lame tɩ y na n kõ-m-la kamba sẽn na n wa led maam m zaoorẽ. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la a paam daoodo n yɛs y taoore n pʋʋsd-y." 
1Chronicles17:26 N-ye, yãmba, Naaba-Wẽnd, n kãab y tʋʋm-tʋmdã tɩ y na maan-a yel-sõmde!" 
1Chronicles17:27 Bɩ y sak n ning a rooga barka t'a yals n kaoos yãmb taoor daar fãa. Yãmb sẽn ningd-a barka, Naaba-Wẽnde, Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ y barka pa ne a daar fãa!»" 
1Chronicles18:1 Dẽ poore a Daviid tõoga Filisti rãmbã. A ning-b-la yãnde, a fãsga b nugẽ Gat ne a tẽn-toosa fãa." 
1Chronicles18:2 A Daviid tõoga Moab me, la Moabitsa sakame n yao-a fadgo." 
1Chronicles18:3 A Daviid tõoga a Adadezɛr, Soba dĩma, Amat tẽnga, yẽ da rat n yãaga a soolma n ta Efrat kʋɩlga." 
1Chronicles18:4 A Daviid reega a bilim-bilm tusri, n yõg wed-dʋʋdb tus a yopoe, la tãb-biis tus pisi; a Daviid pasa wiida nao-gĩini, a yãka bãmb koabg bala n base." 
1Chronicles18:5 Aramsã yii Damas n na n wa sõng a Adadezɛr, Soba dĩma la a Daviid kʋʋ Aramsã neb tus pisi." 
1Chronicles18:6 A Daviid ninga kombɛɛmb Aram tẽnga, Damas tẽn-peelmẽ; Aramsã lebga neb sẽn yaood-a fadgo. A Daviid sẽn da kẽngẽ fãa, Wẽnnaam da sõngd-a lame t'a tõog a bɛɛba." 
1Chronicles18:7 A Daviid deega sãnem gãndo, a Adadezɛr tãb-biisa sẽn da zãada n tall n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles18:8 Tibat ne Kun, a Adadezɛr tẽnsẽ, a Daviid pãb n deega zũud al wʋsgo, la yaa ne rẽnna la a Salomo kɩt tɩ b maan ko-sĩnga, sĩn kãsenga, n paas zũud ra-lugã la teed a taabã." 
1Chronicles18:9 A Towu, Amat dĩma, sẽn wʋm t'a Daviid tõoga Soba dĩma, a Adadezɛr, tãb-biisa fãa," 
1Chronicles18:10 a tʋma a biiga, a Adoram, t'a wa pʋʋs a Daviid la a pʋʋs-a ne a zu-noogo a sẽn zab ne a Adadezɛr n tõog-a wã yĩnga, t'a Adadezɛr da yaa yẽ bɛyã. A Towu tʋma a Daviid teed buud toor-toore, sẽn ya sãnem, wanzurf bɩ zũudu." 
1Chronicles18:11 La a Daviid rɩka rẽ fãa n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd, n paas sãnem la wanzurfã a sẽn da reeg buud a taaba nengẽ: Edom, Moab, Amon, Filisti la Amalesitsa nengẽ." 
1Chronicles18:12 A Abisayi, a Seruya biiga, pãba Edom dãmba, yamsem longẽ, n tõog-ba, bãmb tus piig la a nii." 
1Chronicles18:13 A ninga kombɛɛmb me Edom, la Edomitsa fãa lebga a Daviid talse. A Daviid sẽn kẽndẽ fãa, Wẽnd da kõt-a-la pãng t'a tõog a bɛɛba." 
1Chronicles18:14 A Daviid rɩɩ naam a Israyɛl zãng fãa zugu; a talla a soolem dãmba fãa ne pʋ-peelem la zemsgo. 
1Chronicles18:15 A Seruya biig a Zoab n da ya a tãnsoaba. Sẽn bĩngda sɛbã da yaa a Ayilud biig a Zozafat. 
1Chronicles18:16 Maan-kʋʋdba da yaa a Ayitub biiga, a Sadok, la a Abiyatar biiga, a Abimelɛk." 
1Chronicles18:17 A Zoyada biiga, a Benaya, n da get Krɛt la Pelɛt rãmba yelle. A Daviid kambã n da so pipi zĩisi, a sɛɛgẽ." 
1Chronicles19:1 Dẽ loogr poore, a Naas, Amonit dĩma, kiime, t'a biig led-a a zaoorẽ." 
1Chronicles19:2 T'a Daviid yeele: «Mam na n maana a Anun, a Naas biiga, yel-sõmde, t'a ba maana maam neere.» La a Daviid tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ pʋʋs-a toogo, a ba wã kaalem yĩnga. La a Daviid tʋʋm-tʋmdba sẽn ta Amonitsa tẽngẽ, a Anun nengẽ, n na n pʋʋs-a toogã," 
1Chronicles19:3 Amonitsa kombɛɛmba yeela b naabã: «Fo tẽedame t'a Daviid dat n waooga f ba, la rẽ yĩng la a tʋm neb tɩ b wa pʋʋs-f toogã? Bãmb ka wa ka n na n gese, la b lɩɩse n paam n lub tẽn-kãnga bal bɩ?»" 
1Chronicles19:4 Woto, a Anun yõka a Daviid sẽn tʋm b rãmbã n põng b toɛɛnga, n wõrs b futa pʋɩ-sʋka n ta b kɩgbã, n yaool n kõ-b sor tɩ b kuli." 
1Chronicles19:5 B wa n togsa a Daviid b sẽn yaal a neba yaoolg ningã, t'a tʋm ned a ye t'a zoe n tɩ seg neb niyns sẽn da yer futu sẽn da pa lut b yãndã. B yeel-b lame: «Bɩ y kell n pa Zeriko tɩ y toeemsã yi tɩ y yaool n wa.»" 
1Chronicles19:6 Amonitsa yãeeme tɩ b bao beem ne a Daviid. Woto b yiisa ligd ka tɛka, wanzurf sẽn ta neb tusr la koabg zɩɩbo la b paama Mezopotami tãb-biisi la zabr bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdba, Maaka la Soba Aramsa nengẽ." 
1Chronicles19:7 Woto wã a Anun ne Amonitsa yii n tigma ne bilim-bilm tus pis-tã la a yiibu, tɩ Maaka dĩma me yi ne a neba n wa wẽ b tãb-sik Madaba yegende." 
1Chronicles19:8 A Daviid sẽn wʋm dẽ a tʋma a tãnsoab a Zoab ne a tãb-biis la a gãndaadã. 
1Chronicles19:9 Amonitsa yiime n tong taaba zabr yĩnga, tẽnga noorẽ, la nanams a taaba yalsa toore, ween-vɩʋʋgẽ." 
1Chronicles19:10 A Zoab sẽn mik tɩ zabrã na n kaooga a poorẽ la a taoore, a tũusa Israyɛl tãb-biisa sẽn ya-b gãndaad n yɩɩd b fãa wã tɩ b togl Aramsã." 
1Chronicles19:11 A kõ-la a yao, a Abisayi, tãb-biisa sẽn ketã n tong-ba n togl Amonitsa. A yeelame:" 
1Chronicles19:12 «Aramsã sã n tõogd maam, bɩ f wa sõng-ma. Amonitsa sa n tõogd foom, m na wa n sõng-fo." 
1Chronicles19:13 Tall daoodo. Maan sũ-keelem, d buuda yĩnga, la Wẽnnaam tẽnsa yĩnga. La Wẽnd maan b yam sẽn date.»" 
1Chronicles19:14 A Zoab tãb-biis kaooga zabre ne Aramsã, la Aramsã zoe bãmb taoore." 
1Chronicles19:15 Amonitsa sẽn mik tɩ Aramsã zoeeme, bãmb me ninga tĩiga, b basa a Abisayi, a Zoab yao wã, n leb b tẽngẽ. A Zoab leba Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles19:16 Aramsã sẽn mik t'a Israyɛl tõoga bãmba, b tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ bao Aramsa taaba sẽn be b kʋɩlga rʋʋndã. A Sofak, a Adadezɛr tãnsoaba, n da lʋɩ b taoore." 
1Chronicles19:17 B tɩ togsa a Daviid, t'a tigim a Israyɛl gilli n dʋʋg Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã n tɩ paam-ba, n gãneg tãpo b sɛɛgẽ. A Daviid tonga a neba n togl Aramsã tɩ b kaoog zabre." 
1Chronicles19:18 La Aramsã leb n wudga a Israyɛl taoore. A Daviid kʋʋ tãb-biis niyns sẽn zao-b bilim-bilma tus a yopoe, la tãb-biis niyns sẽn kẽnd-b tẽngã bãmb tus pis-naase; a kʋʋ tãnsoaba a Sofak." 
1Chronicles19:19 A Adadezɛr neba sẽn mik t'a Israyɛl tõog-b lame, b kosa a Daviid tɩ b bas tɩ zabra sɛ, la b lebga a Daviid tʋʋm-tʋmdba. Aramsa pa le sak n sõng Amonitsa ye." 
1Chronicles20:1 Yʋʋmd sẽn wẽke, dĩm dãmba sẽn mii n kẽnd tãp sasa ningã, a Zoab peega a tãb-biisã n tɩ zab ne Amonitse. A waa n gũbga Raba dẽ t'a Daviid bee Zerizalɛɛm. A Zoab tõoga Raba n lub-a, n sarem-a." 
1Chronicles20:2 A Daviid fõka naama pugl sẽn da be b wẽn-naand a Milkom zugu, n mik t'a zɩslem taa nin-tɩɩg zɩɩbo. Kugr a yembre sẽn yãgd a toore la sẽn be yõodo la b ra tablg-a. B rɩka puglã n fõgneg a Daviid. A yii tẽnga ne laog sẽn ka paood ye." 
1Chronicles20:3 A talla tẽnga rãmba n looge la a kõ-b-la tʋʋm teedo: sʋʋs sẽn kɩ yẽna, teed sẽn tar n saremd pʋt kaalem la lɛ sẽn na n kɛ tɩɩse. A maana boto ne Amonitsa tẽnsã fãa. A Daviid ne a tãb-biisã yaool n lɛɛg n waa Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles20:4 Dẽ poore, zabr n waa n kaoog ne Filisti rãmba Gezɛr tẽnga. Wakat kãng la a Sibkayi, Usa daoã, kʋ a Sipayi, Refayitg a ye. Filisti rãmba lebga yem-daado." 
1Chronicles20:5 La zabr n waa n le kaoog ne Filisti rãmbã. A Elanan, a Yayir biiga, kʋ-la a Lami, Gat dao a Goliyat yao. A kãnda raoog ra zema koeer-bõanga." 
1Chronicles20:6 Zab kãseng n le zĩnd Gat, la nin-daoog a yembre n da be beene, n tar nus-bi la nao-bi pisi la a naase, nug fãa nus-bi a yoobe, naoor fãa nao-bi a yoobe; yẽ me da yaa a Arafa yagenga." 
1Chronicles20:7 La a sẽn da tãoosd daoodo ne a Israyɛl yĩnga, a Zonatã, a Sama biiga, a Daviid kẽem biiga, yõk-a lame n kʋ." 
1Chronicles20:8 Nin-bãmb fãa da yaa a Arafa, Gat daoã yagense; la a Daviid ne a tãb-biisã n wẽ-b n kʋ." 
1Chronicles21:1 Bɛ-Kudga, Sʋtaana, yikame n na n sãam a Israyɛl yelle n kʋɩɩb a Daviid t'a sõd a soolma rãmba." 
1Chronicles21:2 A Daviid yeela a Zoab ne a tãnsoaben-dãmbã: «Kẽng-y n tɩ sõd a Israyɛl, sẽn sɩng Beerseba n tɩ ta Dã, n lebg n wa n togs-m tɩ m bãng m neba sõore.»" 
1Chronicles21:3 T'a Zoab yeele: «M dĩma, ba Naaba-Wẽnd yalg y buudã ne a sẽn ka paoodã naoor koabga, bãmb fãa ka m naaba yems laa? M naab tʋlla sõadga bõe yĩnga? Yaa wãna tɩ b na n kɩt t'a Israyɛl maan yel-wẽnde?»" 
1Chronicles21:4 La baasg zãnga, yɩɩ pakre ne a Zoab, t'a rɩk sore, n sa n sõd Israyɛl gilli, n yaool n lebg n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles21:5 A Zoab kɩsa dĩma sõadgã sebre, buuda neba sõore; a Israyɛl zãng fãa da yaa tus-kẽemde la tus koabga, neb sẽn da minim tãpo, la a Zɩɩda da yaa tus kobs-naase la pisopoe, sẽn minim tãpo." 
1Chronicles21:6 A Zoab da pa sõd a Levi ne a Bẽnzame neba n naag ye, tɩ dĩma noor da yaa wẽng wʋsgo, a nifẽ." 
1Chronicles21:7 Noorã pa ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam ye, tɩ b sɩbg a Israyɛl." 
1Chronicles21:8 A Daviid yeela Naaba-Wẽnde: «Mam sẽn maan woto wã, mam beega al wʋsgo. La marsã bɩ y sak n kõ y yambã a yel-wẽnda sugri, tɩ sɩda mam maana yalemdo.»" 
1Chronicles21:9 Wẽnd goma ne bãngda a Gad a Daviid sagenda: 
1Chronicles21:10 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Daviid: Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: mam dɩgla f taoore sɩbgre buud a tã; bɩ f yãk a yembre tɩ m tõog n sɩbg-f wa f sẽn date.» 
1Chronicles21:11 A Gad kẽnga a Daviid nengẽ n yeel-a: «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛga la woto: Bɩ f yãke: 
1Chronicles21:12 Kom yʋʋm a tã, bɩ f bɛɛba sẽn na n digd-f tɩ f zoetẽ kiis a tã tõre, tɩ b sʋʋg yãgd n pʋgd-fo. Tõe n yɩɩ Wẽnd sʋʋga bɩ bã-longdem sẽn na n kẽ f soolmẽ, da-yɩten-daare, tɩ malɛk sɩbgd a Israyɛl gilli. La marsã bɩ f tagse, yaa koɛ bʋgo la f na n leok-m tɩ taas sẽn tʋm-b maama?»" 
1Chronicles21:13 A Daviid yeela a Gad: «Yɩɩr kãsenga n tar maam! La ade, mam sẽn lʋɩt Soaala-Wẽnd nugẽ n são, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd nimbãan-zoeer labsa la m yee n da lʋɩ ninsaalb nusẽ ye.»" 
1Chronicles21:14 Wẽnd tʋma bãaga, bã-longdem, a Israyɛl sʋka, t'a Israyɛl neb tus pisopoe ki." 
1Chronicles21:15 Soaala-Wẽnd tʋma malɛka Zerizalɛɛm t'a tɩ sãam tẽnga zãnga; la a sẽn sɩng tẽnga sãoongo, Soaala-Wẽnd gesame la b sũur sãamame la b waa n yeela malɛka sẽn da sãamd tẽngã: «Sekame marsã, yõk f nugu.» Malɛkã da yɛsa a Orna, Zebuzitga zɛɛg sɛɛgẽ." 
1Chronicles21:16 A Daviid sẽn zẽk a nenga, a yãee Wẽnd malɛkã sẽn zẽk yĩngri bilfu, tɩ sʋʋg wõog n be a nugẽ, n teesd Zerizalɛɛm. A Daviid ne a nin-kẽemsã sẽn da yeelg sũ-pa-noang futã, wõgemdame n fõgneg b neng tẽnga." 
1Chronicles21:17 A Daviid yeela Soaala-Wẽnd: «Ka maam n maan yel-wẽnda bɩ? Ka maam n maan n yet tɩ b sõd neba bɩ? La nim bãmba, bãmb maana bõe? Bãmb ka tũud bal laa? M Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ y nug sɩbg maam la a sɩbg m ba roogo, la bã-longdem da kʋ neb a taab ye.»" 
1Chronicles21:18 Wẽnd malɛkã kosa a Gad t'a yeel a Daviid woto: «Kẽng n tɩ lugl maan-kugr a ye, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, Zebuzitga a Orna zɛɛgẽ.»" 
1Chronicles21:19 A Daviid kẽngame wala a Gad sẽn yeel-a wã. 
1Chronicles21:20 A Orna wẽneg a poorẽ n yãe malɛkã. A kamb a naasa sẽn da be ne-a wã zoeeme n tɩ solge, wakat kãng t'a Orna da pãbda a alkam." 
1Chronicles21:21 A Daviid taa a Orna nengẽ; a Orna gesame la a yãee a Daviid. Woto, a yi-la a zɛɛgẽ wã n wa wõgemd a Daviid taoore n fõgneg a neng tẽnga." 
1Chronicles21:22 A Daviid yeela a Orna: «Kõ maam f zɛɛga tɩ m me maan-kugri Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga; kõ-a maam tɩ m na bao wanzurf ligd ninga sẽn zems ne a yaoodo la woto tẽn-kũuma na zãag ne buudã!» 
1Chronicles21:23 A Orna yeela a Daviid: «Bɩ y reeg zɛɛgã, m dĩma, n maan y yam sẽn dat ne-a. Ade, mam kõta yãmb m niisã yũ-noog maoong yĩnga, bilim-bilma yaa maoonga raado la y na n yãk be; alkama zom la y na n dɩk n tũnug maoongã; mam kõt-y-la rẽ fãa.»" 
1Chronicles21:24 La dĩma a Daviid leoka a Orna: «M na n daa zɛɛgã n yao sẽn zems yaood ninga tɩ mam pa rat n deeg f sẽn so, n kõ Soaala-Wẽnd ye, la m pa rat n kʋ maoong ne bũmb m sẽn pa yiis m ligd n da ye.»" 
1Chronicles21:25 A Daviid yao a Orna zɛɛga sãnem wakɩ koeems kobs-yoobe. 
1Chronicles21:26 A Daviid mee maan-kugra zĩ-kãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga, n kʋ sugr kosgo maand a zugu; a yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga tɩ b reeg a pʋʋsem, n zĩnd saag zugu n tʋm bugum maan-kugrã la maoongã zugu." 
1Chronicles21:27 Naaba-Wẽnd kõo malɛkã noore t'a lebs a sʋʋgã a wʋʋgẽ. 
1Chronicles21:28 Wakat kãnga, a Daviid sẽn mik tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd deega a kosgo, Zebuzitga zɛɛgẽ, a kʋʋ maando." 
1Chronicles21:29 Wakat kãng tɩ sɛka roogo, a Moyiiz sẽn da maan zĩ-pɛɛlẽ, Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, n paas maan-kugrã b sẽn da tar n kʋʋd maandã, bãmb b yiib fãa dag n keta Gabaõ kunkubra zugu." 
1Chronicles21:30 La a Daviid da pa tõog n ta, al beene, n yõk Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛg ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd malɛka sʋʋg da yɛɛs-a-la al wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles22:1 Yaa rẽ la a Daviid da gomd woto: «Yaa ka la wẽnd doogo la ad maan-kugri; yẽ zug la Israyɛl kamba tog n kɩs b maoong bũmbu.» 
1Chronicles22:2 A Daviid kõo noore tɩ b tigim sãamba fãa sẽn da be Israyɛl soolmẽ, la a yãka tʋʋm-tʋmdba sẽn na n pees kuga tɩ b me Naaba-Wẽnd doogo." 
1Chronicles22:3 A Daviid segla kut me zembala sẽn na n maan kaadse, kʋɩlensã yĩnga, n maan zũud sogdse zembala, al tɩ b ra ka tõe n mak b zɩslem sẽn zem to-to ye." 
1Chronicles22:4 A Daviid segla kʋgs raad ka tɛka. Sidõ rãmba ne Tir rãmba da waa ne ra-sĩdma al wʋsgo n kõ a Daviid. 
1Chronicles22:5 A Daviid da yetame: «Mam biiga a Salomo nan paooda la a pãng ka waoog ye, la roogã sẽn na n me Wẽnd yĩnga, tog n yɩɩ kãsenga la neere n yɩɩd rota fãa, tɩ b gomd a yelle la b pẽgd-a zĩis fãa la buud fãa soolmẽ. Mam na n segla a meebo, m biiga yĩnga.» A Daviid sẽn segl bũmb ning wẽnd dooga meeb yĩng t'a nan ket ne yõore, yɩɩ teed ka tɛka." 
1Chronicles22:6 A Daviid waa n boola a biiga a Salomo n kõ a noor t'a me roogo Naaba-Wẽnd, Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, yĩnga." 
1Chronicles22:7 A Daviid yeela a Salomo: «M biiga, mam da tʋlla ne m sũur fãa n me roogo, Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋr waoogr yĩnga." 
1Chronicles22:8 La bãmb taasa maam koe-kãnga: ‹Fo raaga neb zɩɩm al wʋsgo, fo zaba zab bɛda, ka foom n na n me roogã mam yʋʋr waoogr yĩng ye, tɩ fo raaga zɩɩm wʋsgo mam taoore." 
1Chronicles22:9 Ade, fo na n doga biiga, a na n yɩɩ laafi baooda; mam na n kõ-a-la laafi ne yags fãa sẽn gũbg a soolem, tɩ b na n pʋd a yʋʋr t'a Salomo, la mam na kɩt t'a Israyɛl zĩnd ne laafi la yĩn-maasem, yẽ zamaanẽ." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yẽ n na n me roogo mam yʋʋr waoogr yĩnga, a na n yɩɩ m biiga, tɩ m yɩɩ a ba. La m na n vigl a naama zaoore, a Israyɛl sʋk daar fãa.›" 
1Chronicles22:11 La marsã, m biiga, bɩ Wẽnd zĩnd ne foom tɩ f tõog n me b roog wala b meng sẽn tʋlge." 
1Chronicles22:12 Wẽnd na kõ-f gũusgu la yẽesem, bãmb sã n wa kõ foom naam Israyɛl zugu tɩ f vɩɩma me tũud b noya." 
1Chronicles22:13 Sɩda, fo sã n mao n tũ noya la saglsã, b sẽn kõ a Moyiiz a Israyɛl yĩnga, f sẽn maand na zĩnd barka. Aya! Keng f pɛlga la f maan sũ-keelem, da zoe rabeem la f ra yɛɛs ye." 
1Chronicles22:14 Ade, mam wɩnga ne m naongã n paam n segl roog bãmb yĩnga. M paama sãnem zɩslem sẽn ta neb tus koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo, la wanzurf zɩslem sẽn yɩɩd rẽ naoor pis-tã. La sã n ya zũudã ne kutã, ned ka tõe n mak b zɩslem, tɩ waoogame al tɩ looge. La m segla daado ne kug me, la fo na le bao n paase." 
1Chronicles22:15 F tara tʋʋm-tʋmdb wʋsgo sẽn ya kug-peesdba la da-wãadba, sẽn tar yam, n mi tʋʋm buud fãa." 
1Chronicles22:16 Sãnema, wanzurfã, zũudã la kutã ned ka tõe n bãng b sẽn zem tɛk ye. Aya, yik n sɩng tʋʋmde, la Wẽnd na zĩnd ne foom!»" 
1Chronicles22:17 A Daviid kõ-la a Israyɛl nanamsa fãa noore tɩ b sõng a Salomo. A goma woto: 
1Chronicles22:18 «Naaba-Wẽnd, yãmb Wẽnnaam ka be ne yãmb bɩ? La bãmb ka kõ laafi zĩig zãng fãa bãmb sẽn yõk tẽn-kãnga neba n ning mam nugẽ wã bɩ? Ges-y tẽn-kãens sẽn sulg b mens marsã Naaba-Wẽnd la b buuda taoore." 
1Chronicles22:19 Bɩ y mao n bao Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb Wẽnnaam, ne y sũur fãa, ne y pãng fãa, la y me yãmb Wẽnnaam doogo. Tall-y koglgã, Soaala zooda kasetã ne a teedã, n tɩ bĩng b rooga pʋga, roog ning y sẽn na n me b yʋʋra waoogr yĩnga.»" 
1Chronicles23:1 A Daviid sẽn lebg nin-kẽema n kʋʋl sũ-noog kʋʋlem, a kõ-la a biiga a Salomo naam t'a lebg a Israyɛl dĩma." 
1Chronicles23:2 A tigma a Israyɛl nanamsa fãa ne maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã. 
1Chronicles23:3 B sõda Levitsa sẽn da tar yʋʋm pis-tã bɩ yɩɩd rẽ. B sẽn sõde, b mikame tɩ b dapa yaa tus pis-tã la a nii." 
1Chronicles23:4 A Daviid yeelame: «Bɩ y yãk bãmb sʋka neb tus pisi la a naase, tɩ b soog wẽnd doog tʋʋma, la b yãk tus a yoobe, tɩ b yɩ sɛb gʋlsdba, bʋ-kaoodba." 
1Chronicles23:5 B yãk tus a naase tɩ b pẽgd Soaala-Wẽnd ne yʋʋm teedã mam sẽn kɩt tɩ b maan bãmb waoogr yĩnga.» 
1Chronicles23:6 A Daviid welg-b-la sags-sagse: ad-a Gersõ saka, ad-a Keyat la a Merari sagse. A tũ-la a Levi kamba roto." 
1Chronicles23:7 A Gersõ kamb yɩ-la a Ladã la a Simeyi; 
1Chronicles23:8 A Ladã kamba yɩ-la a tãabo: a Yeyiyɛl, b kãsma, a Zetam, a Zowɛl." 
1Chronicles23:9 A Simeyi kamb yɩ-la a tã: a Selomit, a Aziyɛl, a Yaat." 
1Chronicles23:10 A Simeyi waa n le roga kamb a naase: a Yaat, a Ziza, a Yewus, a Beriya." 
1Chronicles23:11 A Yaat n da ya b kãsma, t'a Ziza yaa a yiib soaba, a Yewus la a Beriya pa rog kamb wʋsg ye, dẽ n so tɩ b naag bãmba n sõd roog a ye." 
1Chronicles23:12 A Keyat kamb yɩ-la a naase: a Amram, a Isar, a Ebrõ, la a Uziyɛl." 
1Chronicles23:13 A Aram kamba: a Aarõ la a Moyiiz; b welga a Aarõ toore t'a kõt Soaala-Wẽnd b kũun-sõma wã. Yẽ ne a kamba welga toore daar fãa yĩnga, tɩ b tʋʋmde ya b wis tɩdare Naaba-Wẽnd taoore la b kʋʋd maando la b sik b bark b buuda zugu." 
1Chronicles23:14 La sã n yaa a Moyiiz, Wẽnnaam nedã, b sõda yẽ kamba n naag ne a Levi roogo." 
1Chronicles23:15 A Moyiiz kamba: a Gersõ la a Eliezɛr. 
1Chronicles23:16 A Gersõ kamba: a Sebuwɛl, kãsma." 
1Chronicles23:17 A Eliezɛr biiga: a Reabiya, yẽnda a ye zãn-tãa. La sã n yaa a Reabiya yẽ kamba yɩɩ wʋsg-wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles23:18 A Isar kamba: a Selomit, kãsma." 
1Chronicles23:19 A Ebrõ kamba: a Yeriya, kãsma, a Amariya, a yiib soaba, a Yaaziyɛl, a tãab soaba, a Yekamam, a naas soaba." 
1Chronicles23:20 A Uziyɛl kamba: a Mika, kãsma, la a Isiya, a yiib soaba." 
1Chronicles23:21 A Merari kamba: a Mali la a Musi. A Mali kamba; a Elazar la a Kis. 
1Chronicles23:22 A Elazar kiime n ka rog bi-ribl ye, a ra roga kom-pugli bala. Yẽ ba-biig a Kis kamba peeg-b lame n maan b pagba." 
1Chronicles23:23 A Musi kamba yɩ-la a tãabo: a Mali, a Edɛr, a Yerimot." 
1Chronicles23:24 A Levi kamb la bãmba ne b ba-rãmb roto, la b ba rot nanamse. Bãmb la b sõdyã, ned fãa ne a yʋʋre; bãmb n da tʋmd wẽnd dooga tʋʋma, tɩ b yʋʋm ta pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽ." 
1Chronicles23:25 A Daviid da yetame: «Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, kõ-la b buuda laafi, la bãmb meng zĩi Zerizalɛɛm daar fãa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles23:26 Woto wã Levitsa ka na n le tʋk sɛka roogã ne teedã sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã ye.» 
1Chronicles23:27 Wala a Daviid yaoolem noora sẽn tʋlgã, b gʋlsa Levit rãmba yʋy, tɩ b sɩng tʋʋmde, b yʋʋm sã n ta pisi bala." 
1Chronicles23:28 La bãmb tʋʋmda da yaa Aarõ yagensa sẽn yet tɩ b maan bũmb ning bal wẽnd doogẽ, a sɩmannẽ, a ro-bõonesa pʋsẽ, rot niyns sẽn yeg-b wẽnd doogã. Bãmb n pekd te-sõma wã la b maan tʋʋm a taaba, wala:" 
1Chronicles23:29 wẽ bur-sõma wã sẽn dɩkd n kõ Soaalã. Wa segl zoma sẽn na n tũnug ne maandã, miisda sẽn ka ningd bɩllã; ges bõn-kɩɩmdi wã yelle; ges teed niyns sẽn tar n magd woglem bɩ zɩslem." 
1Chronicles23:30 Soaala-Wẽnd pẽgr yibeoog la zaabrã maanda b nifẽ. 
1Chronicles23:31 Sẽn tog n kʋ b nifẽ yɛsa, yaa yũ-noog maoong buud fãa, vʋʋsg raare, kiuug pipi raare, kibs raare. Beoog beoog fãa tʋʋma sõor pitame la ka basd tɩ b wakata yõsg ye." 
1Chronicles23:32 Bãmb n gũud sɛka roogo la b gũud Sõmblem zĩigã. A Aarõ yagensã, b saam-biisã, n so tʋʋma sẽn tʋmd Soaala rooga pʋgã." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ad-a Aarõ yagensa sẽn pʋɩ to-to, tʋʋmda yĩnga. A Aarõ meng kamba yɩ-la a Nadab, a Abiyu, a Elazar la a Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 A Nadab la a Abiyu, denga b ba n ki, n ka rog kamb ye la yaa a Elazar la a Itamar n da tʋmd maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde." 
1Chronicles24:3 Sẽn waa n kaoose, a Sadok, a Elazar yagenga ne a Ayimelɛk, a Itamar yagenga, sõnga a Daviid n welg maan-kʋʋdba sak-saka, n zems ne tʋʋmdã b sẽn kõ-bã." 
1Chronicles24:4 La b wa n mikame t'a Elazar kamba da tara neba n yɩɩd a Itamar kamba. Dẽ wã b welga a Elazar kamba sags piig la a yoobe, n welg a Itamar kamba sags a nii." 
1Chronicles24:5 B poeesame n kẽes ned kam fãa a tʋʋmnẽ, a Elazar kamba wala a Itamar kamba. Kẽer ra boondame tɩ wẽnd doog na-biisi, tɩ kẽer boond tɩ Wẽnd na-yir dãmba. Tʋʋmd pa yãk n ya a Itamar bɩ a Elazar kamb dẽnd bal ye, b kalma taaba." 
1Chronicles24:6 Yɩɩ dĩma a Daviid taoore, na-komsa taoore, maan-kʋʋd a Sadok taoore, a Abiyatar biig a Ayimelɛk taoore, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa buud nanams taoore, la tʋʋmda pʋɩɩra pʋɩ yã. La Levit dãmba sakẽ, sɛb-gulsd a ye, a Netaneyɛl biig a Semaya, n da rɩkd sebr zugu ned kam fãa tʋʋma sak la a raare. Pʋɩɩra pʋɩ woto: sã n paam taoor dãmb a yi sẽn yit a Elazar roogẽ, yãkda a ye, a Itamar roogẽ." 
1Chronicles24:7 Pipi poeerã yãka a Zoyarib, a yiib soaba yaa a Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 a tãab soaba, a Arim, a naas soaba, a Seorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 a nu soaba, a Malkiya, a yoob soaba, a Miyamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 a yopoe soaba, a Asos, a nii soaba a Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 a wɛ soaba, a Zesuwa, piig soaba a Sekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 piig la a ye soaba a Eliyasib, piig la a yiib soaba a Yakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 piig la a tãab soaba a Upa, piig la a naas soaba a Yesebab," 
1Chronicles24:14 piig la a nu soaba, a Bilga, piig la a yoob soaba a Imɛr," 
1Chronicles24:15 piig la a yopoe soaba, a Ezir, piig la a nii soaba a Apisɛs," 
1Chronicles24:16 Piig la a wɛ soaba, a Petayiya, pisi soaba, a Ezekiyɛl" 
1Chronicles24:17 pisi la a ye soaba, a Yakẽ, pisi la a yiib soaba, a Gamul," 
1Chronicles24:18 pisi la a tãab soaba, a Delaya, pisi la a naas soaba, a Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Yaa bãmb la b welg sags-sagse, tɩ b na n paam n tʋm wẽnd doogẽ wala b ba a Aarõ sẽn zãms bãmbã, wala Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sẽn da kõ-a noore." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ad-b sẽn gʋls b rãmba a Levi kamba sẽn kella sʋka: a Amram yagensẽ: a Subayɛl; a Subayɛl yagensẽ: a Yediya. 
1Chronicles24:21 A Reabiya roogẽ, yẽ ne a kamba: a Isiya, kãsma." 
1Chronicles24:22 A Isar yagensẽ: a Selomot; a Selomot kamb sʋka a Yaat. 
1Chronicles24:23 A Ebrõ yagensẽ: a Yeriya, kãsma, a Amariya, a yiib soaba; a Yaaziyɛl a tãab soaba; a Yekamam, a naas soaba." 
1Chronicles24:24 A Uziyɛl yagensẽ: a Mika; a Mika biiga: a Samir. 
1Chronicles24:25 A Mika ba-biiga: a Isiya; a Isiya biiga: a Zakari. 
1Chronicles24:26 A Merari yagensẽ: a Mali, a Musi la a Yaziya." 
1Chronicles24:27 A Yaaziya yagenga a Merari kamba: a Soam, a Zakur la a Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 A Mali yagensẽ: a Elazar; yẽ ka rog bi-ribl ye. 
1Chronicles24:29 A Kis kambẽ: a Yerameyɛl; 
1Chronicles24:30 a Musi kambẽ: a Mali, a Edɛr, a Yerimot. Yaa woto la b gʋls roog-roogo, a Levi yagensã." 
1Chronicles24:31 B poeesame n welg-ba, wala b sẽn maan ne b saam-biisi, a Aarõ kamba, dĩma taoore, a Sadok, a Ayimelɛk, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa kãsem-dãmb taoore. La b maana woto ne yao zʋʋga roogo wala b sẽn maan ne a kẽem dãmba." 
1Chronicles25:1 A Daviid ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba welga toore, b tʋʋmda yĩnga, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba a Asaf, a Eman la a Yedutun kamba: bãmb da vẽena ne Wẽnd gomd kelgr la a võor wilgri, n wẽed koala la pendse la kɛma. Ad neb niyns sẽn da ya-b yɩɩn-yɩɩndba." 
1Chronicles25:2 Ad-a Asaf kamba: Yaa a Zakur, a Zozɛf, a Netaniya la a Asarela; a Asaf da vẽena ne Wẽnd gomda kelgre la a wilgri. Yẽ n da yɩɩnde n tũud dĩma sẽn kose." 
1Chronicles25:3 Sã n yaa a Yedutun, yẽ kamba la woto: A Gedaliya, a Seri, a Yesaya, a Simeyi, a Asabiya, a Matitiya; bãmb b yooba la b ba wã ra wilgd a sẽn dat yɩɩll ninga. A meng ra vẽena ne Wẽnd gomd kelgre la a võor wilgri la a ra wẽeda pɛndga n pẽgd Soaala." 
1Chronicles25:4 Sã n yaa Eman, a Eman kamba sʋka; a Bukiya, a Mataniya, a Uziyɛl, a Sebuwɛl, a Yerimot, a Ananiya, a Anani, a Eliyata, a Gidalti, a Romameti-Ezɛr, a Zosebekasa, a Maloti, a Otir, a Maaziyot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bãmb fãa da yaa bãngda a Eman kamba; Wẽnd da gomda ne a Eman la yẽ da reegda b goama n taasd dĩma tɩ dĩma mi Wẽnd sẽn dat t'a maam bũmb ninga t'a naama kɩ yẽgna. Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la Eman Kom-dibli piig la a naase la kom-pugli a tã. 
1Chronicles25:6 Bãmb da sokda b ba yɩɩla wẽnd doogẽ. B ra wẽeda kɛma, pendse la koala, wẽnd doogẽ; bãmb ne a Asaf, a Yedutun la Eman da ka zãagd ne dĩma ye." 
1Chronicles25:7 B da zãmsa pẽgra yɩɩla neere, n yɩɩnẽ tɩ tũudẽ, Soaala pẽgr yĩnga. Bãmb ne b ba-biisa sõor da yaa kobs-yi la pis-nii la a nii." 
1Chronicles25:8 Sã n ya yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sẽn na n pʋg taab to-to, b maana poeere, nin-bɛda wala nin-bõonegã, karen-saam-dãmba wala karen-biisi." 
1Chronicles25:9 B sẽn poees pipi, lʋɩ-la a Asaf buudẽ, a Zozɛf zugu. A yiib soaba, yɩ-la a Gedaliya, yẽ ne a ba-biisi la a kamba, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:10 A tãab soaba, a Zakur ne a ba-biisi la a kamba, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:11 A naas soaba, yɩ-la a Isri, a kamba la a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:12 A nu soaba, yɩ-la a Netaniya, a kamba la a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:13 A yoob soaba, yɩ-la a Bukiya, a kamba la ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:14 A yopoe soaba, yɩ-la a Yesarela, a kamba la a ba-biisi bãmb piig la a yiibu." 
1Chronicles25:15 A nii soaba, yɩ-la a Yesaya, a kamba la a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:16 A wɛ soaba, yɩ-la a Mataniya, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:17 Piig soaba, yɩ-la a Simeyi, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:18 Piig la a ye soaba, yɩ-la a Azarɛl, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:19 Piig la a yiib soaba, yɩ-la a Asabiya, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:20 Piig la a tãab soaba, yɩ-la a Subayɛl, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:21 Piig la a naas soaba, yɩ-la a Matitiya, a kamba la a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:22 Piig la a nu soaba, yɩ-la a Yerimot, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:23 Piig la yoob soaba, yɩ-la a Ananiya, a kamba ne a ba-biisi bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:24 Piig la a yopoe soaba, yɩ-la a Zosebekasa, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:25 Piig la a nii soaba, yɩ-la a Anani, a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:26 Piig la a wɛ soaba, yɩ-la a Maloti, yẽ ne a kamba la a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:27 Pisi soaba, yɩ-la a Eliyata, la a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:28 Pisi la a ye soaba, yɩ-la a Otir, la a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:29 Pisi la a yiib soaba, yɩ-la a Gidalti, la a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:30 Pisi la a tãab soaba, yɩ-la a Maaziyot ne a kamba la a ba-biisi: bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles25:31 Pisi la a naas soaba, yɩ-la a Romameti-Ezɛr, la a kamba ne a ba-biisi, bãmb piig la a yi." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ad-y dagno-gũudba me ra welga sagse. A Meselemiya, a Kore biiga, a Abiyasaf yagenga," 
1Chronicles26:2 roga kamb a yopoe. Bãmb la woto: a Zakari, a bi-kẽenga, a Yediayɛl, a yiib soaba, a Zebadiya, a tãab soaba, a Yatniyɛl, a naas soaba," 
1Chronicles26:3 a Elam, a nu soaba, a, Zoana, a yoob soaba, a Eliyoenayi, a yopoe soaba." 
1Chronicles26:4 A Obɛd-Edom roga kamb a nii: a Semaya, a bi-kẽenga, a Zozabad, a yiib soaba, a Zoa, a tãab soaba, a Sakar, a naas soaba, a Netaneyɛl, a nu soaba." 
1Chronicles26:5 A Amiyɛl, a yoob soaba, a Isakar, a yopoe soaba, a Pewultayi, a nii soaba. Sɩd me Naaba-Wẽnd da ning-a-la barka." 
1Chronicles26:6 A biiga a Semaya doga kamba sẽn paam pãnga b buuda sʋka. Yɩɩ neb sẽn ka bas b meng poorẽ ye. Bãmb sẽn leok n yɛse. 
1Chronicles26:7 A Semaya kamba yɩ-la a Otni, a Refayɛl, a Obɛd, a Elzabad, ne b yaop a yiibu, gãndaad menga, a Eliyu la a Semakiya. Bãmb b yiiba la b ra pẽgd n yɩɩda." 
1Chronicles26:8 Bãmb fãa da yaa a Obɛd-Edom yagense. B fãa ra yaa sũ-keelem dãmba la neb sẽn ka yogd ne b tʋʋm ye. B ra yaa bãmb pisoobe la a yi. 
1Chronicles26:9 A Meselemiya ne a kamba la a yaopa sʋka neb piig la a nii n sɩd da yɩɩd b taaba, n da ya sʋk neba." 
1Chronicles26:10 A Osa, a Merari yagenga, roga kamb a naase: a Simri, yẽ da ka bi-kẽeng ye, la a ba da kõ-a-la kãsengo." 
1Chronicles26:11 A Ilkiya la a yiib soaba, a Tebaliya, a tãab soaba, a Zakari a naas soaba. A Osa ne a kamba la a ba-biisa ra yaa bãmb piig la a tãabo." 
1Chronicles26:12 Dagno-gũudba ne b kãsem-dãmba da naaga taab n tʋmd wẽnd doogẽ wã. 
1Chronicles26:13 B pʋɩɩme n wilg ned kam fãa sẽn na n gũ noor ninga. B poeesame n kõ nin-bɛdã wala nin-bõonegã, ned kam fãa a zĩiga." 
1Chronicles26:14 B sẽn poeese yaang noorã, lʋɩ-la a Selemiya zugu. Poeera wilgame t'a biig a Zakari n so goabg noorã; a Zakari, da yaa nin-yẽesenga, n mi saglgo." 
1Chronicles26:15 Poeer wilgame t'a Obɛd-Edom n so dɩtgo noore, t'a kamba so teeda sẽn bĩngd doog ninga noora gũubu." 
1Chronicles26:16 Poeer wilgame t'a Supim la a Osa n so nin-taoor noore, n tees Salekɛt (Tɩ-viuku) sor ning sẽn dʋʋd yĩngrã. Ad tʋʋmda sẽn pʋɩ to-to." 
1Chronicles26:17 Yaang kɩrenga, daar a ye Levitsa a yoobe; dɩtg kɩrenga, daar a ye, Levitsa a naase, goabg kɩrenga, daar a ye fãa Levits a naase; teed bĩngri zĩisẽ, roog a ye fãa, Levits a yi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ro-gãasa noore, nin-taoor kɩrenga yaa Levits a naase, ro gãasa pʋga Levits a yi." 
1Chronicles26:19 Woto la dagno-gũudba, a Kore ne a Merari kamba, deeg b zĩisi." 
1Chronicles26:20 Levits a taaba, da geta arzɛgsa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ, arzɛgs sẽn da kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
1Chronicles26:21 A Ladã kamba, a Gersõ yagense, bãmb taoor dãmba yaa a Yeyiyɛli" 
1Chronicles26:22 ne a kamba, a Zetam ne a yao a Zowɛl, bãmb n soog wẽnd dooga arzɛka gũudem." 
1Chronicles26:23 Sã n yaa a Amram, a Isar, a Ebrõ, la a Uziyɛl doogẽ," 
1Chronicles26:24 yaa a Sebuwɛl, a Gersõ biiga, a Moyiiz yagenga, n da ya arzɛka gũub naaba." 
1Chronicles26:25 A Sebuwɛl rogma yũug ra tɩ tonga ne a Eliezɛr, a Gersõ ba-biiga; ad-a Eliezɛr yagensã: a Reabiya, a Yesaya, a Zoram, a Zikri la a Selomit." 
1Chronicles26:26 A Selomit ne a ba-biisã, bãmb n da gũud arzɛgsã sẽn da ya Wẽnd soolma. Yaa arzɛk ninga dĩm a Daviid, rota nanamse, neb tusr tãnsoaben-dãmba, neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba la tãnsoaben-dãmb a taaba sẽn da rɩk n kõ bãmbã." 
1Chronicles26:27 Yaa arzɛgs b sẽn da zɛ tãpẽ la b yãk n maan Wẽnd pʋɩɩre, sẽn na yɩ-la n paas Naaba-Wẽnd rooga ziiri." 
1Chronicles26:28 Le paasa teed niynsi, bãngda a Samwɛl, la a Sol, a Kis biiga, la a Abnɛr, a Nɛr biiga la a Zoab, a Seruya biiga, sẽn da kõ Soaala-Wẽnde. A Selomit ne a saam-biisã n da so kũun bãmb fãa gũudem." 
1Chronicles26:29 A Isar yagens sʋka, a Kenaniya ne a kamba n da gʋlsde la b bʋʋd bʋʋdo, n welgd a Israyɛl yɛla ne a yagse tɩ kalwẽdg ra wa kẽ sʋk ye." 
1Chronicles26:30 A Ebrõ yagens sʋka, yɩ-la a Asabiya ne a ba-biisi, sũ-keelem dãmba, bãmb tusri la kobs-yopoe, n da get Israyɛl kamba soolma sẽn da be Zʋrdẽ nin-taoore n welgd yɛl niyns sẽn tõe n be bãmb ne Naaba-Wẽnde, n be bãmb ne dĩma sʋka, n dat welgre." 
1Chronicles26:31 A Ebrõ yagensa roogẽ, a Yeriya n da rɩt kãsengo. A Daviid naama yʋʋmd pis-naas soaba, b bao-la b rogma soy la b mikame tɩ b rogma yũug waa n tɩ tonga ne neb sẽn pid ne sũ-keelem, Yazɛr tẽnga, Galaad tẽn-peelmẽ." 
1Chronicles26:32 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la dĩm a Daviid tũus neb tus a yi la kobs-yopoe, n paas a Yeriya. Nin-bãmb yaa buud a ye rãmba la b ba rot nanamse, la dĩma yãka bãmba tɩ b ges a Rubẽ, a Gad ne a Manase bogre yelle, n welg yɛl niyns sẽn tõe n be bãmb ne Naaba-Wẽnd sʋka, bãmb ne dĩma sʋka, n dat welgre." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ad sebr ning sẽn sõdgd a Israyɛl kamba sẽn da kẽ dĩma tʋʋmẽ. B yaa b ba rot nanamse, neb tusri bɩ neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba, tẽns zãadba. Bãmb la dĩma bas ne a tãpa yɛla. Dĩma ra weel-b-la woto: Kiuug fãa a ra yãkda neb tus pisi la a naase. Kiuuga sã n ki, tãb-biis a taab n wat n deeg-ba." 
1Chronicles27:2 Ad kiuug fãa ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba, tãnsoab fãa ne a yʋʋre: Pipi kiuugu, a Yasobam, a Zabdiyɛl biiga, a da yaa Perɛs yagenga, la yẽ n da so tãnsoaben-dãmba fãa sẽn get-b tʋʋmda pipi kiuugã. Kiuug a yiib soaba, Awoyitga a Dodayi, t'a Miklot sõangd-a. Kiuug a tãab soaba, a Benaya, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Zoyada biiga. A Benaya da yaa gãndaoog menga. A sẽn waa n lebg gãndaad pis-tã wã naaba; a biig a Amizabad n deeg a zĩiga. Kiuug a naas soaba yĩnga, yaa a Zoab yao a Azayɛl. A biiga a Zebadiya n led a zĩigẽ. Kiuug a nu soaba yĩnga, Ezrayitga a Samut. Kiuug a yoob soaba yĩnga a Ira, Tekoa daoa a Ikɛs biiga. Kiuug a yopoe soaba yĩnga, Pelonitga a Elɛs, a Efrayim roogẽ.
