Kiuug a nii soaba yĩnga, a Sibkayi, Usa neda, Zareyitga. Kiuug a wɛ soaba yĩnga, a Abiezɛr, Anatot daoã, a Bẽnzame yagenga. Kiuug piig soaba yĩnga, a Marayi, Netofa daoa, Zareyitga. Kiuug piig la a ye soaba yĩnga, a Benaya, Pireatõ neda, a Efrayim doogẽ. Kiuug piig la a yiib soaba yĩnga, a Eldayi, Netofa daoa, a Otniyɛl roogẽ." 
1Chronicles27:2 Ad kiuug fãa ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba, tãnsoab fãa ne a yʋʋre: Pipi kiuugu, a Yasobam, a Zabdiyɛl biiga, a da yaa Perɛs yagenga, la yẽ n da so tãnsoaben-dãmba fãa sẽn get-b tʋʋmda pipi kiuugã. Kiuug a yiib soaba, Awoyitga a Dodayi, t'a Miklot sõangd-a. Kiuug a tãab soaba, a Benaya, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Zoyada biiga. A Benaya da yaa gãndaoog menga. A sẽn waa n lebg gãndaad pis-tã wã naaba; a biig a Amizabad n deeg a zĩiga. Kiuug a naas soaba yĩnga, yaa a Zoab yao a Azayɛl. A biiga a Zebadiya n led a zĩigẽ. Kiuug a nu soaba yĩnga, Ezrayitga a Samut. Kiuug a yoob soaba yĩnga a Ira, Tekoa daoa a Ikɛs biiga. Kiuug a yopoe soaba yĩnga, Pelonitga a Elɛs, a Efrayim roogẽ. Kiuug a nii soaba yĩnga, a Sibkayi, Usa neda, Zareyitga. Kiuug a wɛ soaba yĩnga, a Abiezɛr, Anatot daoã, a Bẽnzame yagenga. Kiuug piig soaba yĩnga, a Marayi, Netofa daoa, Zareyitga. Kiuug piig la a ye soaba yĩnga, a Benaya, Pireatõ neda, a Efrayim doogẽ. Kiuug piig la a yiib soaba yĩnga, a Eldayi, Netofa daoa, a Otniyɛl roogẽ." 
1Chronicles27:3 Sẽn get-ba Israyɛl tẽnsa yelle: a Rubẽ sakẽ, da yaa a Eliezɛr, a Zikri biiga. A Simeõ sakẽ, da yaa a Sefatiya, a Maaka biiga." 
1Chronicles27:4 A Levi sakẽ, da yaa a Asabiya a Kemwɛl biiga. A Aarõ sakẽ, da yaa a Sadok." 
1Chronicles27:5 A Zɩɩda sakẽ, da yaa a Eliyu, a Daviid kẽem a ye. A Isakar sakẽ, da yaa a Omri, a Mikayɛl biiga." 
1Chronicles27:6 A Zabulõ sakẽ, da yaa a Yerimot, a Azriyɛl biiga." 
1Chronicles27:7 A Efrayim sakẽ, da yaa a Oze, a Azariya biiga. A Manase bogrẽ, nin-taoore, da yaa a Zowɛl, a Pedaya biiga." 
1Chronicles27:8 A Manase bogr sẽn da be Galaad, da yaa a Ido, a Zakari biiga. A Bẽnzame sakẽ, da yaa a Yaaziyɛl, a Abnɛr biiga." 
1Chronicles27:9 A Dã sakẽ, da yaa a Azarɛl, a Yeroam biiga. Woto la Israyɛl tẽnsoaben-dãmba." 
1Chronicles27:10 Sã n ya neba gill sõadga poorẽ, a Daviid pa sõd sẽn zems-b yʋʋm pisi bɩ sẽn pa ta rẽ ye, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da kãabame tɩ b na kɩt t'a Israyɛl fɩɩg n zeng ãds sẽn be yĩngri." 
1Chronicles27:11 A Zoab, a Seruya biiga, sɩnga sõadga la a ka baas ye, tɩ sõadga poorẽ, a Israyɛl da rɩɩ Wẽnd beem, la yaa rẽ yĩnga la sõadgã pa gʋls zãng a Daviid rĩung kibar sebr pʋgẽ ye." 
1Chronicles27:12 Taoor soaba sẽn da get dĩma arzɛka da yaa a Azmavɛt, a Adiyɛl biiga. Taoor soab sẽn da get dĩma kood sẽn da be tẽnsẽ, tẽn-bɛd la tẽn-bõonesẽ, la gasda pʋsẽ, da yaa a Zonatã, a Oziyas biiga." 
1Chronicles27:13 Taoor soaba sẽn da get pʋta koaadba da yaa a Ezri, a Kelub biiga." 
1Chronicles27:14 Taoor soaba sẽn da get bugsuntundã da yaa a Simeyi, Rama daoa. Taoor soab sẽn da get neb niyns sẽn da bĩngd-b dĩma rãama da yaa a Zabdi, Sefam daoa." 
1Chronicles27:15 Taoor soaba sẽn da get oliviye tɩɩse la tɩɩs niyns biis sẽn tõe n wõd kaam la sẽn da sel bãadẽ wã da yaa a Baal-Ana, Gedɛr daoa. Taoor soaba sẽn da get kaama bĩngrã da yaa a Zowas." 
1Chronicles27:16 Taoor soaba sẽn da get niisã b sẽn da kɩɩmd Sarõ bãoogẽ da yaa a Sitrayi, Sarõ tẽng neda. Taoor soaba sẽn get niisã b sẽn da kɩɩmd bãad a taabẽ, da yaa a Safat, a Adlayi biiga." 
1Chronicles27:17 Taoor soaba sẽn da get yʋgma wã yelle, a Obil, Ismayɛlitga. Taoor soaba sẽn da get bõn-yãansa yelle, da yaa a Yediya. Meronot daoa." 
1Chronicles27:18 Taoor soaba sẽn da geta wuba yelle, bʋʋsa la piisa yelle da yaa a Yaziz, Agritga. Yaa nin-bãmba n da ya dĩm a Daviid paoonga gũudba." 
1Chronicles27:19 A Zonatã, a Daviid ba-bila, da yaa dĩma sagenda, dag n yaa ned sẽn tar yam, n ya sɛb-mita, yẽ ne a Yeyiyɛl, Amonitgã, n da get dĩma kamba gʋʋlg yelle." 
1Chronicles27:20 A Ayitofɛl da yaa dĩma sagenda; a Usayi, Arkitga, da yaa dĩma zoa;" 
1Chronicles27:21 a Zoyada, a Benaya biiga ne a Abiyatar n led a Ayitofɛl zĩigẽ; a Zoab da yaa dĩma tãnsoab kãsenga." 
1Chronicles28:1 A Daviid tigma Zerizalɛɛm Israyɛl kombɛɛmba fãa, buuda nanamse, sagsa nanamse, neb tusri la neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba, sẽn da gũud-b dĩma ne a kamba arzɛgse la b rũmsi, na-pagba gũudba, tãb-biisã, sũ-keelem dãmbã la zabr gãndaada fãa." 
1Chronicles28:2 Dĩma a Daviid yik n yalsa yĩngri la a yeelame: «M saam-biisi la m soolem dãmba, kelg-y maam. Mam tʋlga ne m sũur fãa n me roogo, la ro-kãng pʋg la b na n ning zooda kasetã, Wẽnd sẽn nong n likb meng zĩig ningã. M da tol n segla bũmba fãa," 
1Chronicles28:3 la Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: ‹Ka foom n na n me roogã m yʋʋr waoogr yĩng ye, tɩ f yaa zab-zabda la fo daaga zɩɩm.›" 
1Chronicles28:4 Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, tũusa maam, m ba roog kamba fãa sʋka, tɩ m yɩ dĩma, n soog a Israyɛl daar fã. Sɩd me yaa a Zɩɩda buuda la b tũus yã t'a yɩ sora wilgda, la a Zɩɩda roogẽ, ya m ba roog la b tũus yã; la m ba-biis sʋka, taa bãmb yam tɩ b yãk maan tɩ m yɩ dĩma, n soog a Israyɛl gilli." 
1Chronicles28:5 Mam kamba fãa sʋka, tɩ sɩda Soaala-Wẽnd kõ maam kamb wʋsgo, yaa m biiga, a Salomo, la b tũus yã t'a zaoond naam zaoorẽ, n soog a Israyɛl gilli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: ‹Yaa fo biiga a Salomo n na n me mam doogo la m zaka tɩ mam yãk-a lame t'a yɩ m biiga la mam na n yɩ-la a ba. 
1Chronicles28:7 La mam segla naam sẽn kõn sɛ a yĩnga; a sã n kell n tũ wala a sẽn tũud dũnna, mam noya la m saglsã.›" 
1Chronicles28:8 Bɩ rũnna tɛka, a Israyɛl gill fãa nifẽ, Wẽnd tigungu taoore, Wẽnd meng taoore, bãmb sẽn wʋmd d koɛɛgã, bɩ y mao n deeg b noya, n bʋgs-ba, n wʋm b sẽn date, n tõog n soog tẽn-noog kãnga la y wa bas-a ne y kamba tɩ b soog-a yãmb poorẽ, daar fãa yĩnga." 
1Chronicles28:9 La foom, m biiga a Salomo, bɩ f bãng f saamba Wẽnnaam, la f tũ bãmba, ne f sũur zãnga, ne f yalẽ fãa, tɩ Wẽnd fɛɛsda ninsaalba sũya la b mii neere tagsg buud b sẽn tagsde. Fo sã n baood-ba, b na n sak tɩ fo yãend ba; la fo sã n bas bãmba, bãmb me na bas-fo." 
1Chronicles28:10 Bɩ f maag f meng n tags tɩ b tũusa foom tɩ f me roogo, sẽn na n yɩ Soaala-Wẽnd doogo. Aya! Wẽnd na n kõ-f raoodo, sɩng tʋʋmde!»" 
1Chronicles28:11 A Daviid wilga a biig a Salomo wẽnd doogã, sẽn na n sõog to-to, wẽnd doogã ne rotã sẽn na n gũbg-a wã, arzɛgsã sẽn na n bĩngd rot niyns pʋgẽ, roog ninga kuga walsa koglg sẽn na n bĩngẽ." 
1Chronicles28:12 A wilg-a-la a sẽn da tʋlg n me wã fãa sẽn sõog sebr zugu, wẽnd dooga sɩmande, dot niyns sẽn na n me n gilg-a wã, kʋɩlen-dotã sẽn na n pagd arzɛgsã la te-sõma wã b sẽn wat n kõt Naaba-Wẽndã." 
1Chronicles28:13 A kɩsa Levitsa la maan-kʋʋdba yʋy la b sagse, n kɩs sebr ninga sẽn wilgd tʋʋma sẽn na n tʋmd wẽnd doogẽ wã, n sõdg lagda sẽn na n tar n tʋmd wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
1Chronicles28:14 A wilga sãnema la wanzurfa zɩslem sẽn na n ta to-to tɩ b paam n dõog sãnem bɩ wanzurfa teedã, tɩ teed kẽer tog n dõoga ne sãnem tɩ kẽer dõog ne wanzurfu." 
1Chronicles28:15 A wilga sãnema bɩ wanzurfa sẽn na n dɩk n dõog fitilsa ne b roagendgã, tɩ fitils kẽer tog n dõoga ne sãnem, tɩ kẽer dõog ne wanzurfu." 
1Chronicles28:16 A wilga sãnema sẽn na n yãk n dõog sãnem te-roagendg ning Soaala bura sẽn na n dɩgend a soab zugã, n wilg wanzurfa sẽn na n yãk n dõog wanzurfa te-rogendse." 
1Chronicles28:17 A wilga kuta zɩslem, sẽn na n dɩk n kud nemda kõsã, n dɩk n kud zɩ-mesdma laase; n wilg sãnema la wanzurfa zɩslem sẽn na n dɩk n dõog la-bõonesã la la-bɛdã, tɩ kẽer tog n dõoga ne sãnem tɩ kẽer dõog ne wanzurfu." 
1Chronicles28:18 A wilga tɩdara maan-kugra sẽn tog n kud ne sãnem yʋllã zɩslem. A wilg-a-la bilim-bilm sõnga sẽn na n kud to-to, n paas sãnema malɛgsa sẽn na n dõog to-to, malɛgs niyns sẽn yɛdg b pɩgsa kuga walsa koglga linga zugã." 
1Chronicles28:19 A Daviid yeelame t'a sẽn sõdg bũmb ninga fãa bee sebra zugu, sebr ninga a sẽn paam Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ la sẽn wilgd tʋʋma fãa sẽn tog n tʋm to-to n pids b raabo." 
1Chronicles28:20 A Daviid baasa a koɛɛgã n yeel a biig a Salomo woto: «Wɩsg f menga, keng f sũuri, da zoe rabeem ye, da rig ye, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd, m Wẽnnaama, bee ne foo. B kõn mong foom b pãng la b sõngre al tɩ f wa baas tʋʋma f sẽn na n sɩngã." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ad-y Levitsa la maan-kʋʋdba sẽbga b kalle, wẽnd dooga tʋʋm yĩnga. Ad-y mitba yik n na n wilga b tʋʋm-minim, ad-y yamleoogo tʋʋm-tʋmdba, la buuda kãsem-dãmba na n tũu f sẽn na wilg-ba tɩ tʋʋmda kẽn neere.»" 
1Chronicles29:1 Dĩm a Daviid yeela zãma wã: «M biiga Salomo bala la Naaba-Wẽnd tũus b toore. La ade, a yʋʋma sõor nan paooda la a pãnga, ka sek ye, tɩ tʋʋmda bedmame. Ka ninsaal yĩng la rooga na n me ye, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:2 M segla m Soaala la m Wẽnnaama roog ne m pãng fãa. Sẽn tog n yɩ sãnem fãa na n dõoga ne sãnem. Sẽn tog n yɩ wanzurf fãa, na n dõoga ne wanzurfu. Sẽn tog n kud ne kut fãa tog n kuda ne kutu. Sẽn tog n dõog ne zũudu na n dõoga ne zũudu. Sẽn tog n maan ne raoog fãa na n yɩɩ raoogo. Kugr sẽn tog n ning zĩig ninga b na ning-a: kug sẽn yãgd b toore, kug-neeba, kug gʋlem-gʋlem, kug sẽn mobgd ne sãnem, t'a lebg faong bũmbu, kug sẽn peel wa goore." 
1Chronicles29:3 Sẽn be me, m sẽn dat m Soaala roog ne m sũur fãa wã, m le paasda m sẽn tare tɩ ya m meng rẽnna, sãnem bɩ wanzurfu; m kõta rẽ fãa ne yamleoogo, m Soaala roog yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:4 M sẽn kɩt la woto: yaa sãnem sẽn sek neb tus a nu zɩɩbo sãnem sẽn yi Ofir. Yaa wanzurf sẽn sek neb tus piig la a yiib zɩɩbo, wanzurf sẽn ka lagem ne rẽko; wanzurf kãng la b na n maneg n tablg wẽnd dooga lalse." 
1Chronicles29:5 La yãmb sʋka, ãnda n na n sak rũnna n dɩk n kõ wẽnd dooga yĩnga, a sãnem, a wanzurfu? Ãnda n dat n sõng tʋʋm-tʋmdba ne b beoog-beoog fãa yaoodo?»" 
1Chronicles29:6 Ad Israyɛl buuda kãsem-dãmba, sagsa rãmba, tusr bɩ koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba, sẽn get-b dĩma tʋʋma sẽn kɩs ne yamleoogo Naaba-Wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:7 Ad kũuna sẽn yɩ a soaba: Sãnema zɩslem: neb tus a nii la kobs-nu zɩɩbo. N le paas sãnem ligd dɩtem bãmb wakɩ koeems tus piiga. Wanzurfa zɩslem: neb tus pis-tã zɩɩbo. Zũuda zɩslem: neb tus pisoob zɩɩbo. Kuta zɩslem: neb tus koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo. 
1Chronicles29:8 Rẽ fãa waa n paasa kug neeba neb kẽer sẽn tall n wa wã la b rɩka rẽ fãa n kɩs a Gersõ yagenga a Yeyiyɛl, wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:9 Neba sũur yɩɩ noogo b sẽn maana yĩnga. Yɩɩ ne b sũur zãnga, la neba tʋlg n maan bũmb, Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga. Dĩma a Daviid me sũur yɩɩ noog wʋsgo." 
1Chronicles29:10 Woto wã dĩma pẽga Naaba-Wẽnde b fãa taoore. Ad-a sẽn yeele: «Israyɛl Wẽnde, sẽn ya tõnd Wẽnda, soog-y pẽgre zamaan buud fãa!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Yãmb n so kãsengo, n so neerem, n so naam, n so ziiri. Yãmb n so sẽn be yĩngri la tẽng zug fãa. Yãmba, Naaba-Wẽnde, n so naam. Yãmb zaoor vigla al yĩngr-yĩngri." 
1Chronicles29:12 Arzɛk la ziir yita yãmb nengẽ. Yãmb la bũmb fãa Soaala, y nug zãada pãng la tõogo. Yãmb nug n zẽkd ninsaala, yãmb nug n vigind naam." 
1Chronicles29:13 Marsã, Soaala, d pʋʋsda yamb barka, d balemda y yʋʋr, t'a sãda zĩis fãa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Maam la a bõe, la m neba pãng bela b yɛ tɩ d kãab-y wala d sẽn kãabã? Fãa yita yãmb nengẽ, la yaa yãmb nugẽ la d deeg d sẽn lɛɛg n kõt yãmbã." 
1Chronicles29:15 Tõndo, wala d ba rãmba, tõnd yɛsa yãmb taoore wa sãamba. D tẽng zug vɩɩma loogda wala sulunsuku, la d ka saagd t'a na gɩmb n ka loog ye." 
1Chronicles29:16 Naaba-Wẽnde, d Wẽnnaam, d sẽn sam bũmb niyns fãa y rooga meeb yĩngã la y waoogr yĩnga yita y nengẽ la yãmb n so fãa." 
1Chronicles29:17 Soaala-Wẽnde, m tara kaseto tɩ y mii sẽn be y kamba sũurẽ la y sẽn pẽgd yaa pʋ-peelem. Y yãeeme tɩ yaa ne pʋ-peelem la m kãab y rẽ fãa. M yãee ne sũ-noogo, y buuda neba sẽn yas y taoor dũnna la b sẽn kãab-y bũmb ningã." 
1Chronicles29:18 Naaba-Wẽnd, d ba a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam, deeg-y d kũnna fãa n sooge. Tũ-y rẽ n segl y buuda sũuri t'a kẽ yãmba." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kõ-y m biig a Salomo sũur sẽn kis wẽnga t'a tõog n deeg y noya, y salgsã, y sẽn wilg fãa n wa paam n me roog ning m sẽn segl y yĩngã.»" 
1Chronicles29:20 Dẽ poore a Daviid yeela zãma wã: «Pẽg-y Naaba-Wẽnd y Wẽnnaam!» Tɩ zãma wã fãa kils Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnde. B yĩgimdame la b wõgemda Naaba-Wẽnd la dĩma a Daviid taoore." 
1Chronicles29:21 Vẽkembeoogo, zãma wã kõo Wẽnd yũ-nood maando la maand dɩtse, yɩɩ lols tusri, pe-raad tusri, pe-bi tusri, ne kũun niyns sẽn tũnugd maandã, n paas sugr kosg maando, a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
1Chronicles29:22 B rɩɩme, b yũu ne sũ-noog baraare, Naaba-Wẽnd taoore. B yãka a Daviid biig a Salomo n kõ-a naam, b pʋdga kaam a zugu t'a lebg dĩma, n pʋdg a Sadok zug t'a lebg maan-kʋʋda." 
1Chronicles29:23 A Salomo zaoonda Wẽnd sẽn kõ b rãmb naama zaoorẽ. A rɩɩ naam a ba a Daviid zĩigẽ. Bũmb fãa sak-a lame, neba fãa saka-a lame." 
1Chronicles29:24 Tãnsoaben-dãmba fãa, a Daviid gãndaadã la a kamba meng reega a Salomo noore." 
1Chronicles29:25 A Israyɛl kamba nifẽ, Wẽnd zẽka a Salomo naama. B kõ-a-la ziiri. Sẽn deng-b yẽnda a Israyɛl zaoorẽ wã zɩɩ n paam a taar ye." 
1Chronicles29:26 A Zese biig a Daviid rɩɩ naam Israyɛl zãng zugu. 
1Chronicles29:27 A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-naase, yʋʋm a yopoe Ebrõ, yʋʋm pis-tã la a tã Zerizalɛɛm." 
1Chronicles29:28 A kʋʋla sũ-noog kʋʋlem, n tɩg ne raare, n tɩg ne arzɛka, n tɩg ne ziiri, n yaool n ki. A Salomo n dʋ a zaoorẽ." 
1Chronicles29:29 A Daviid kibare, pipi raare n tãag a yaoolem daar pa gʋls bãngda Samwɛl sebra pʋgẽ bɩ? Pa gʋls bãngdba a Natã la a Gad kibarẽ bɩ?" 
1Chronicles29:30 Sɛb kãens togsa a naama sẽn yɩ a soab zãnga, a gãndalsem, a zaka pʋgẽ vɩɩm, a vɩɩma ne Israyɛl nanamse la dũni wã nanams a taaba." 
2Chronicles1:1 A Daviid biig a Salomo naama waa n paama pãnga. Naaba-Wẽnde, a Wẽnnaama, da bee ne-a. B zẽka a naam n ta naam zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles1:2 Dẽ la a tigim a Israyɛl gilli, tãnsoaben-dãmba sẽn da rɩt naam neb tusr bɩ neb koabg zugu, bʋ-kaoodba, kombɛɛmba, sags kãsem-dãmba gilli." 
2Chronicles1:3 B tigma taaba, bãmb ne a Salomo, n dʋ Gabaõ tãnga tɩ be la b ra bĩng Sɛka roogo, roog ninga a Moyiiz, Wẽnnaam neda, sẽn da kɩt tɩ b ti Wẽnd yĩng we-raoogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles1:4 Sã n ya Wẽnd zooda kasetã, a Daviid yaool n da yiis-a-la Kiriyat-Yearim n tɩ bao zĩig n bĩng-a Zerizalɛɛm, zãnd a to tẽngre." 
2Chronicles1:5 A Uri biiga la a Ur yagenga, a Besaleyɛl, da kuda zũud maan-kugri la b da rɩgl-a-la wẽnd dooga taoore. Ad-y yaa yẽ sɛɛgẽ la a Salomo tigim a zãma wã n na n waoog Naaba-Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles1:6 Yaa maan-kugr kãng zugu, la Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, la a Salomo kɩt tɩ b rʋʋ n kʋ yũ-noog maoong ne rũms tusri." 
2Chronicles1:7 Yʋng sẽn ta, Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Salomo n yeel-a: «F sẽn dat tɩ m kõ-f bũmb ning bɩ f kose.»" 
2Chronicles1:8 T'a Salomo leoke: «Yãmb maana neer wʋsgo ne m ba a Daviid la y kõ-m-la naam a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles1:9 Soaala-Wẽnde, y pidsa kãabg ning y sẽn da kãab m ba a Daviid, tɩ marsã y kõ-m-la naam bu-yaleng zugu, buud neb sõor sẽn ta tẽnga bĩisri." 
2Chronicles1:10 Dẽ yĩnga kõ-y maam yam la bãngre, tɩ m tõog n zã m meng neere, y buuda taoore. Ãnda n tõe n zã bu-yalengo wa buud kãnga?»" 
2Chronicles1:11 Dẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd leok a Salomo: «Sẽn ya fo raabã, tɩ fo pa kos arzɛka, n pa kos sãnem, n pa kos ziiri, n pa kos f bɛɛba wãabo, n pa kos yõ-woko f meng yĩnga, f sẽn kos yam la bãngre n tõog n zã m sẽn kõ-f neb niynsã," 
2Chronicles1:12 ad yaa yam la bãngr zulunga la m na n kõ-fo. La m na n paasa f arzɛka, la f ziiri wala dĩm dãmba sẽn deng-b fooma bɩ sẽn na n wa-b fo poorẽ wã sẽn ka na n tõog n paam abada.»" 
2Chronicles1:13 Dẽ poore, a Salomo zãaga ne sɛka roogo, a yii Gabaõ n leb Zerizalɛɛm. A dɩɩ naam Israyɛl." 
2Chronicles1:14 A Salomo baoo bilim-bilm la wiidi. A bilim-bilm yɩɩ tusri la kobs-naase, a wed-dʋʋdba tus piig la a yi. A tɩ kẽesa kẽer tãnsoben-tẽnsẽ, n kẽes kẽer n pẽneg a meng Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles1:15 A Salomo yĩnga, Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, wanzurf la sãnem yãeebo ra pa toog n yɩɩd kugr ye. Tɩ-bɛda me ra yaa wɛɛla wa yɩls, baoog noore." 
2Chronicles1:16 Yaa Musri la Koa la a Salomo wiida ra yita. Yaa Koa la a Salomo neba ra kẽnd n daad-ba. 
2Chronicles1:17 B sã n lebg n watẽ, b tekd n da bilim-bilm Ezipt. Bilim-bilm a ye da raada wakɩ koeems kobs-yoobe, tɩ weef ya wakɩ koeems koabg la pis-nu. Ititsa la Aramsa dĩm dãmb fãa da raada b rẽnna a Salomo neba nengẽ." 
2Chronicles1:18 A Salomo waa n yeelame tɩ b me roog a ye Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga la b me a meng na-yiri. 
2Chronicles2:1 A Salomo rɩka neb tus pisopoe, teeda tʋkr yĩnga, n dɩk tus pis-nii n na n vigs la b pees kug tãnga zugu, n dɩk neb tus a tã la kobs-yoobe sẽn na n ges-b tʋʋmdã." 
2Chronicles2:2 Dẽ poore a toolame tɩ b tɩ yeel Tir dĩma a Iram woto: «Maan wala f sẽn maan ne m ba a Daviid n tool-a ra-sĩdma t'a me a na-yirã. 
2Chronicles2:3 Sã n ya maam a biigã, yaa roog la m dat n me Naaba-Wẽnd, mam Wẽnnaama, waoogr yĩnga. M datame tɩ wakat buud fãa, a Israyɛl pʋgẽ, bɩ tɩdar tõog n wis Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, tɩ bura b sẽn kõt bãmba tedg b taoore n ka vaanẽ, tɩ yibeoog la zaabr paamd a yũ-nood maando, tɩ vʋʋsg raare, ki-paala la tig-raase me paam b rẽnna, wala Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn yalse." 
2Chronicles2:4 Roogã m sẽn dat n me wã na n yɩɩ ro kãsenga, tɩ tõnd Wẽndã n yɩɩd fãa." 
2Chronicles2:5 La sã n ya sɩda, yĩngr saasa sẽn ka tõe n deeg a soaba, ãnda n tõe n me roogo n kõ bãmba? La sã n ka m sẽn dat n dʋʋs tɩdara yũ-noogã b taoorã, m na n mee rooga bõe yĩnga?" 
2Chronicles2:6 Tʋm ned sẽn mi sãnem, wanzurfu, zũudu, la kut tʋʋmd neere, ned sẽn tõe n wʋg peende t'a yɩ moomde, miuugu, mismiuugu, ned sẽn mi bõn-neeb peesgo. A na n waa Zerizalɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ, n naag mam nebã, mitba sẽn zĩnd-b ne m ba a Daviid." 
2Chronicles2:7 Tʋm Libã tɩ b wa kõ-m ra-sĩdma wa kʋgse, la sɩɩse. M wʋmame tɩ f nebã mii Libã tɩɩsa kɛɛbo. M neba na naag fo nebã n tʋm." 
2Chronicles2:8 B na segl daad wʋsgo tɩ yira m sẽn dat n me wã bedrema la a neerma na n yɩka pelense. 
2Chronicles2:9 Ra-kɛɛdba yĩnga, m na kõ alkam zom pet tus pisi, alkam kɛgeng zom pet tus pisi, rãam lagd tus pisi, kaam tʋgd tus pisi.»" 
2Chronicles2:10 Tir dĩma, a Iram, gʋlsame n leoke: «Naaba-Wẽnd nonga b buudã, b sẽn kõ-a dĩm wala yãmb to.»" 
2Chronicles2:11 A paasame: «Israyɛl Wẽnnaam paam pẽgre! Bãmb n naan yĩngri la tẽnga. Bãmb n kõ a Daviid bi-sõngo sẽn pid ne tõog-m-meng la pãnga t'a na n me roog n kõ a meng la a me roog n kõ Naaba-Wẽnde. 
2Chronicles2:12 Rũnda bala, m tʋmd-f-la ned sẽn mi tʋʋmd sõmbo: yaa a Uram-Abi." 
2Chronicles2:13 A ma yaa a Dã buud paga, t'a ba ya Tir neda. A mii sãnem tʋʋmde, wanzurfu, zũudu, kutu, kuga, daado. A tõe n wʋga peen moonde, mismiuugu, miuugu. A tõe n wʋga beren-dɩgre gĩs bãanese la a yũnug pɛɛl kẽer tɩ wẽneg saag-paga a Ninanina. A tõe n peesame bɩ n dõog bũmb fãa tɩ wẽnda. Yẽnda n na n tʋm ne yãmb nebã la y ba a Daviid sẽn bas b rãmbã." 
2Chronicles2:14 Yãmb ye n sõng ne alkam pɛɛlga, alkam kɛgenga, kaama la rãama, wala y sẽn togsã. B tool dẽ marsã tɩ wa." 
2Chronicles2:15 Tõnd na kɛ Libã tɩɩsã wala y sẽn dat tɛka. D na rugs b koomẽ n wa Zafa. Y na yaool marsã n sõng tɩ b ta Zerizalɛɛm.» 
2Chronicles2:16 A Salomo tʋlg n bãnga sãamba fãa sẽn be Israyɛl tẽng sõore. A rɩka a ba a Daviid sõadga sebre la a mikame tɩ yaa tus koabg la pis-nu la a tã la kobs-yoobe. 
2Chronicles2:17 A Yãka neb tus pisopoe tʋkr yĩnga, tus pis-nii kuga peesg yĩnga, tus a tã la kobs-yoobe tʋʋmda gesg yĩnga." 
2Chronicles3:1 Yɩɩ Zerizalɛɛm, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg a Ba a Daviid t'a me wẽnd dooga zĩig ningã, yaa zĩ-kãng la a Salomo me wẽnd doogã. Yɩɩ Zebuzitga a Orna zɛɛgẽ." 
2Chronicles3:2 Yɩ-la a naam dɩɩb yʋʋmd a naas soaba, kiuug a yiib soaba." 
2Chronicles3:3 A Salomo sõoga wẽnd dooga woto: a woglem yaa pĩnd kãntɩɩsã pisoobe, a yalem kãntɩɩs pisi." 
2Chronicles3:4 A Salomo gesa wẽnd dooga noorẽ n ning zãongo. Zãonga woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi, wa rooga meng yalem. A zãndlem yaa rooga meng zãndlem: kãntɩɩs pisoobe. A baoo sãnem meng n kɩt tɩ b tablg a pʋga zãnga." 
2Chronicles3:5 A baoo ra-sĩdma n ka rooga lalse n lɛɛg n tablg sãnem, n ning sãnem komse, tɩ sãnem pãneng luunẽ." 
2Chronicles3:6 A yãka zĩiga n ning kug sẽn pɩnda. Sãnema yii Parwayim. 
2Chronicles3:7 Sãnem kãng n tablg roogã, a ra paadsã, a lalsã, a peemleesã. A rõoga malɛgse n tablg lalsã." 
2Chronicles3:8 A yaoolame marsã n me sõmblem doogã. Yẽ me woglem la a yalem da yaa kãntɩɩs pisi. A woglem zemsa ro kãsenga yalem. A rɩka sãnem meng n tablg-a. Sãnema taa neb tusr zɩɩbo. 
2Chronicles3:9 Sẽn da ka fãa ra kaa ne sãnem kaadga. B maga kaadg fãa zɩslem: kuten-giling rẽnna. Yĩngr dota fãa tablga sãnem. 
2Chronicles3:10 Sõmblem dooga pʋgẽ a ninga malɛgs a yiibu. Yõga ne zũudu n yaool n bolg sãnem. 
2Chronicles3:11 Malɛgsa ra yɛsa yĩngri. B ra yega taaba la b nensa ra wẽnemdame n tees rooga noorã. Malɛk fãa pɩgs a yiiba ra tẽega kãntɩɩs piiga. 
2Chronicles3:12 Malɛk fãa pɩgsr a ye da sɩɩsda rooga lalga, t'a pɩgsr a to wã ra sɩɩsd malɛk a to rẽnd, tẽnsʋka." 
2Chronicles3:13 Fãa yaadma yaa kãntɩɩs pisi. 
2Chronicles3:14 Peen-lutga sẽe ne peen-mismiuugu, peen-moomde pɛɛl sẽn yũnug tɩ wẽnd saag-pag a Ninanina. Pɛɛla me buka malɛgs wẽnego." 
2Chronicles3:15 Dooga noorẽ, a yalsa kut ra-lug bɛd a yi. B woglem taa kãntɩɩs pis-tã la a nu. B rogla kut na ta kãntɩɩs a nu n kʋ ra-luga zutã." 
2Chronicles3:16 A yagla kut ra-luga zutu kut pãneng sẽn lɩʋs ne vãad la tɩ-biis sẽn wẽnd pooloomse, bãmb na ta koabga." 
2Chronicles3:17 Yaa dooga noorẽ la b yals kut ra-lugã, a ye rɩtgo, a ye goabga. Rɩtg soaba boolame tɩ Yakẽ, a ka tõe n ka yalse; goabg soaba boolame t'a Boaz, a pãnga." 
2Chronicles4:1 A Salomo maana zũud maan-kugri; a woglma taa kãntɩɩs pisi, a yalem kãntɩɩs pisi, a zãndlem kãntɩɩs piiga." 
2Chronicles4:2 A yẽnega zũudu n maan sĩng sẽn ya bedr-bedre, n pʋd-a tɩ mogre. A noora yalem yaa kãntɩɩs piiga, a yaa gilga. A zulum yaa kãntɩɩs a nu; gĩsg sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pis-tã bal n tõe n mobg-a n sege." 
2Chronicles4:3 Rũms sẽn wẽnd niis la b naan n ning sĩnga noore, n gilgi, naoor a yiibu. Sõta bãmb piig, kãntɩɩg a ye zugu. Fãa naaga ne sĩngã n dõog wakat yɛnga." 
2Chronicles4:4 Ko-sĩnga da roga zũud niis piig la a yi zugu. A tãab geta rɩtgo, t'a tãab get nin-taoore, t'a tãab get goabga, t'a tãab get yaanga. Sĩnga da roga bãmb zugu. B seesa ra togla pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles4:5 Sĩnga taglem yaa nug pʋga. A noora lɛɛ wa laaga, wa lɩɩng puugu. A ra tõe deega rʋg bɛd sẽn ta tus a yi, rʋk fãa sã n pit ne ko-yʋy a tãabo." 
2Chronicles4:6 B maana zũud sĩn-bi n tong a nu rɩtgo, n tong a nu goabga, maanda rũmsa pegb yĩnga. Yaa ko-sĩnga pʋga la maan-kʋʋdba ra pekd b mense." 
2Chronicles4:7 B rõoga sãnem fitils roagends piiga tɩ b ra tog n yɩɩ piiga, ro kãsenga pʋga, a nu goabga, a nu rɩtgo." 
2Chronicles4:8 B maana te-roagends piiga n ning b ro-kãsenga pʋga, a nu rɩtgo, a nu goabga. B maana zɩ-mesdem laas koabga. B maan-b-la ne sãnem." 
2Chronicles4:9 B maana zak kãsenga, maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga, ne a kʋɩlense la kʋɩlensa tablga ne zũudu." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ko-sĩnga ra tara a zĩiga. A ra bee sẽn lebd rɩtg bilf, yaanga." 
2Chronicles4:11 A Uram-Abi maana tompɛglem laase, kardo, zɩ-mesdem laase. A maana a Salomo sẽn da kos a bũmb ning fãa wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
2Chronicles4:12 Le paasa kut ra-lug bɛd a yiibã, ne kutã sẽn dogl b zugu n paas b yalma. N paas gãms a yiibu sẽn da mobg ralugsa zugẽ kutã." 
2Chronicles4:13 N paas tɩ-biisa sẽn wẽnd pooloomse; bãmb kobs-naase n da yag gãmsã n tong rũns a yiibã. 
2Chronicles4:14 N paas sĩn-bi piiga la b roagendsã. 
2Chronicles4:15 N paas mogrã, yẽnda a ye bala, ne niis piig la a yiibã sẽn da be a tẽngrã." 
2Chronicles4:16 N paas la-zulumsã, tompɛglem laasã, kardã, bãn-sɩlemsã sẽn tar n yaasd nemdã. D yeel bala t'a Uram-Abi sẽn da rõog teed niynsa fãa wẽnd dooga yĩnga, a da rõog-b-la ne zũud sẽn ya yɩlemde, wala a Salomo sẽn da kose." 
2Chronicles4:17 Yɩɩ Zʋrdẽ bãoogẽ la a yõg-ba, Sukot la Seredata sʋka. Boaaga yɩɩ yagd sõngo la yagd taok boaaga." 
2Chronicles4:18 A Salomo kɩtame tɩ b maan bũmb fãa zembala al tɩ b pa tõe n geelg zũuda sẽn dɩk n tʋma zɩslem ye. 
2Chronicles4:19 A Salomo le kɩtame tɩ b rõog teed a taaba ne sãnem: ad sãnem maan-kugrã, te-roagendsã, bura kũun yĩnga," 
2Chronicles4:20 fitilsã ne b roagendse, fitils sẽn dõog ne sãnem, sõmblem dooga yĩnga tɩ b ra tog n wid a pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles4:21 Paas-y puudã, fitilsã, wõrsdsã sẽn maan ne sãnem sẽn yɩlg zãnga." 
2Chronicles4:22 Paas-y sʋʋse, zɩ-mesdem laasã, ko-teesã, wisda laasã, la laas a taabã. Paas-y wẽnd dooga noya, sõmblem dooga kʋɩlensã, zaka kʋɩlensã, bãmb me yɩɩ sãnem." 
2Chronicles5:1 Wẽnd dooga tʋʋmd kãsengã sẽn baase, a Salomo kɩtame tɩ b wa ne teed niyns a ba a Daviid sẽn da zoe n kõ Soaala-Wẽndã: wanzurfã, sãnema, lagdã. A rɩka rẽ fãa n paas Soaala-Wẽnd arzɛkã." 
2Chronicles5:2 A Salomo tigma nin-kẽemba, buud kãsem dãmbã, nanamsã, Zerizalɛɛm, la a kɩtame tɩ b yiis Soaala zooda koglg a Daviid yiri, Siõ tãnga." 
2Chronicles5:3 Israyɛl zãng tigma taab dĩma yir n maan kibs kãsenga, kiuug a yopoe soaba." 
2Chronicles5:4 A Israyɛl nin-kẽemba fãa waame. A Levi kamba n da tʋk kuga walsa koglgã. 
2Chronicles5:5 B rɩka koglgã, sɛka roogã la te-sõma wã fãa sẽn da be a pʋgẽ. Levit dãmba la maan-kʋʋdba n tʋk-ba." 
2Chronicles5:6 A Salomo ne a Israyɛl sagsa sẽn da tigma kʋʋ piisi la niisi sẽn ka tõe n sõd n sɛ. 
2Chronicles5:7 Maan-kʋʋdba kẽesa kuga walsa koglg a zĩigẽ, sõmblem dooga pʋga, malɛgsa pɩgsa tẽngre." 
2Chronicles5:8 Malɛgsa ra yɛdga b pɩgsã n lut koglgã ne a ra-tuiidsã. 
2Chronicles5:9 Raada sẽn da tar n zẽkd koglgã da yaa wogdo. Do kãsenga pʋgẽ dãmb da tõe n yãend-b-la bilfu, sõmblem dooga noore. La f sã n da be yɩnga, f ka ne-b ye. B keta ne rũnna." 
2Chronicles5:10 Bũmb da ka be koglga pʋga, sã n ka kuga wals a yiibã, a Moyiiz sẽn da sagl Oreb tãng zugu, zooda yõgb wakato, Ezipt tẽng yiib wakato." 
2Chronicles5:11 Maan-kʋʋdba sẽn yi, la dooga sẽn lɛɛg n pid ne sawadgo. Maan-kʋʋdba fãa da paam n yɩlga b mense la b yaool n da ka welg sak-sak wala b sẽn da welg-b tʋʋmda yĩng ye." 
2Chronicles5:12 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba da bee sʋk zãnga: a Asaf, a Eman, a Yedutun ne b kamba la b yaopa, n maneg n yeelg fu-peelse. B ra wẽeda waase, pendga, kʋnde. B ra yɛsa maan-kugra yaanga. Maan-kʋʋdb koabg la pisi n da be ne-ba n sokd-b ne tõntõodo." 
2Chronicles5:13 Sẽn peebd-b bardã wala sẽn da yɩɩnd-ba da naaga taab sũur a ye n pẽgd la b kilsd Naaba-Wẽnde. B ra zẽkda b koeese tɩ bardã peebdẽ, tɩ waasa la pendsã wẽedẽ, tɩ ruudsa wãagdẽ, tɩ b pẽgd Soaala-Wẽnd n yetẽ: «Naaba-Wẽnd la sõngo, b nonglem ka be tɛk ye.»" 
2Chronicles5:14 Sawadga kɩtame tɩ maan-kʋʋdba ka tõog n le rɩk b tʋʋma ye. Wẽnd dooga ra pida ne Naaba-Wẽnd ziiri. 
2Chronicles6:1 A Salomo goma woto: «Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb da yeelame tɩ y na n solga y meng sawad-sablgẽ," 
2Chronicles6:2 tɩ m yet tɩ m na me roog sẽn tog ne rĩma n kõ yã tɩ y tõe n zĩ be daar fãa.» 
2Chronicles6:3 Dĩma sẽn wẽnemde, a yãee Israyɛl zãma wã fãa sẽn yɛs yĩngri t'a pʋʋs-a." 
2Chronicles6:4 A yeelame: «M pʋʋsda Naaba-Wẽnd barka, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam barka! Bãmb noor sẽn da kãab bũmb ning m ba a Daviid, b meng nug pids-a lame." 
2Chronicles6:5 B ra yeel-a-la woto: ‹M sẽn yiis m buud, a Israyɛl, Ezipt tẽng tɛka m pa yãk tẽng, Israyɛl tẽnsa sʋka, n kɩt tɩ b me roogo tɩ m kẽes m meng a pʋgẽ ye. M pa yãk ned me sẽn na n lebg m buuda dĩm ye." 
2Chronicles6:6 Ade, Zerizalɛɛm tẽng la m wa n yãk n zĩnd a pʋgẽ la foom a Daviid la m yãk yã tɩ f na n yɩ m buud, a Israyɛl, dĩma.›" 
2Chronicles6:7 M ba, a Daviid, sẽn waa n dat n me ro-sõng n kõ a Israyɛl Wẽndã," 
2Chronicles6:8 Soaala meng n waa n leok-a: ‹F sẽn tʋlg n me roogo m waoogr yĩngã, f maana neere." 
2Chronicles6:9 La ade, ka foo n na n me rooga ye, na n yɩ-la f biiga. N-ye! Na n yɩ-la f kur-wĩir biiga n na n me roogo m yʋʋra waoogr yĩnga.›" 
2Chronicles6:10 Bãmb pidsa b sẽn da kãabe, tɩ m dʋ m ba zaoorẽ n lebg a Israyɛl dĩma, wala b sẽn da wilgi. M mee roogo bãmba, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, waoogr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles6:11 M tol n ninga dooga pʋga kuga walsa koglgã. Zood ning bãmb sẽn yõg ne a Israyɛl kamba kaset bela a pʋgẽ.» 
2Chronicles6:12 A Salomo yalsa Soaala-Wẽnd maan-kugra taoore n tees a Israyɛl zãma wã la a tẽega a nusi n na n pʋʋse. 
2Chronicles6:13 A Salomo ra maana geer ne zũudu la a da rɩgl-a-la sɩmanda tẽnsʋka. Geera woglem da yaa kãntɩɩs a nu, a yalma kãntɩɩs a nu, a zãndlma kãntɩɩs a tãabo. A Salomo dʋʋ n yĩgimda a zug, Israyɛl zãma wã taoore la a zẽka a nus n na n pʋʋse," 
2Chronicles6:14 la a yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, yãmb ka tar y to, yĩngri la tẽng zug ye. Yãmb zood la y yamleoog ka tol n lak ne y kamba sẽn kẽn tɩrg, n kẽn ne nonglem y taoora ye." 
2Chronicles6:15 Y pidsa kãabg ning y sẽn da kãab y biig a Daviid, mam ba nongrã. Yãmb nug pãng pidsa y noor sẽn da togse, wala d sẽn ne rũnna wã." 
2Chronicles6:16 Marsã, Naaba-Wẽnde, kãabg a ye la y kãab m ba a Daviid tɩ m kot-y tɩ y pids-a. Yaa yãmb sẽn yeele: ‹F kamba sã n maan gũusgu, n deeg m noor la b kẽn m taoore wala fo sẽn kẽne, a Israyɛl kõn kong dĩm sẽn yi f pennẽ, la sẽn na n dɩ naam m taoor ye.›" 
2Chronicles6:17 N-ye, Naaba-Wẽnde, pids-y rũnna bũmb ning y sẽn togs y sõgna, a Daviid!" 
2Chronicles6:18 La m na n sokame n gese, Naaba-Wẽnd tõe n zĩnda ninsaalb sʋk tẽng zug bɩ? Yĩngri la yĩngr saas sẽn ka tõe n deeg a soaba, doogã m sẽn me wã maanda a wãna n deeg-ba?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kelg-y y yamba kosgo neere, Naaba-Wẽnde, m Wẽnnaam, kelg-y sẽn be-a yãmb taoora koɛɛg la a pʋʋsgo." 
2Chronicles6:20 Ypk-y y nin wĩndg la yʋngo n ges ro-kãnga, n ges y sẽn yet tɩ b pʋd y yʋʋr zĩig ninga. Kelg-y pʋʋsg ning m sẽn pʋʋsd yãmb zĩ-kãngã." 
2Chronicles6:21 Maam, a Salomo, la y buud a Israyɛl sã n pʋʋs y zĩ-kãngã bɩ y kelg-do. Zĩnd-y yĩngri, y sẽn be zĩig ningã n kelg la y kõ sugri." 
2Chronicles6:22 B sã n dõnd neda n yet tɩ yẽ n kɩt t'a to dɩ bõne la woto wã bɩ a wẽen n kãab a meng beedo yãmb do-sõnga pʋga la y maan-kugra taoore," 
2Chronicles6:23 zĩnd-y yĩngr n kelg la y leoke. Bʋ-y bʋʋdo n paalg nin-wẽngã la y kõ nin-sõngã wala a sẽn tog ne. 
2Chronicles6:24 Yãmb buud a Israyɛl sã n beeg yãmb n kong pãng a bɛɛba taoore, a sã n deeg a kongre, n wa pẽg yãmba, n wa pʋʋs yãmb doog ning y sẽn be a soab pʋgẽ wã," 
2Chronicles6:25 zĩnd-y yĩngri n kelge la y kõ sugri la y bas-a t'a lɛɛg wa kẽe a tẽngẽ ne bãane. 
2Chronicles6:26 Yĩngr ko-yũusa sã n wa page tɩ saag ka le niida, y kamba sẽn beeg yãmb yĩnga, la b wẽnemd n teesa zĩ-kãngã n pʋʋse, n pẽg y yʋʋre, n deeg b kongre ne sũur sẽn tuubdi," 
2Chronicles6:27 zĩnd-y yĩngri n kõ y yemse, n kõ y buud a Israyɛl sugri la y wilg so-sõng ning b sẽn tog n dɩke la y kõ tẽnga saaga, tẽng ninga sẽn ya b pʋɩɩre." 
2Chronicles6:28 Kom sã n lʋɩ tẽngã, tɩ y neba bẽed nod kegemse, tɩ kooda wãkdẽ, tɩ gãnem sobd koodo, tɩ sʋʋr la kalwaar dɩt-a, tɩ bɛɛb pag tẽnga noore, sẽn ya yel-beed la bãag ning fãa n yõk y nebã," 
2Chronicles6:29 pʋʋsg la kosg sã n kose, sẽn ya bũmb ning yĩng la pʋʋsga pʋʋs yã, tɩ kosga kose, yaa nin-yend bɩ Israyɛl tõr n kote, tooga la yel-beeda sã n nek pʋtẽere, tɩ nus zẽk n tees ro-kãngã," 
2Chronicles6:30 zĩnd-y yĩngri n kelge, n kõ sugri la y maan ne ned kam fãa wala a sẽn tog ne, wala y sẽn mi ninsaal sũuri tɛka, tɩ yãmb bala n mi ninsaal sũuri." 
2Chronicles6:31 Woto b na zoe yãmb la b tũ yãmb sore, b vɩɩm fãa pʋgẽ y sẽn kõ d ba rãmb tẽng ninga pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles6:32 Sãan meng sẽn ka kĩ ne y buud a Israyɛl, sẽn yi tẽn-zãorgẽ n wa, t'a wʋmame tɩ b gomd y yelle, tɩ b gomd y nug pãng yelle, t'a wa ro-kãnga pʋga n pʋʋs yãmba," 
2Chronicles6:33 zĩnd-y yĩngri, y sẽn be zĩig ningã n kelg-a, reeg-y, Soaala, a kosg fãa, woto bu-zẽmba fãa na wʋm y yʋʋre la b na yik wala y buud a Israyɛl, n dig rabeem y taoore la b bãng tɩ yaa m sẽn me roog ninga pʋga la b na n pẽg y yʋʋre." 
2Chronicles6:34 Y neba sã n tũ sor ninga y sẽn wilg-ba, n kẽng zabre, b sã n tẽeg n pʋʋs yãmba, b sã n wẽnemd b neng n ges roog ning m sẽn me yãmb yĩngã, y tẽn-sõnga pʋga," 
2Chronicles6:35 zĩnd-y yĩngri n kelg b pʋʋsgo, n kelg b koɛɛga la y maan wa b sẽn tog ne." 
2Chronicles6:36 B sã n beeg yãmba, tɩ d mi tɩ ned ka be n ka beegd yãmb ye, y sũur sã n wa puug ne-ba, tɩ y rɩk-ba n sagl b bɛɛba nusẽ, tɩ bɛɛba tall-ba n loog yembdo, tẽng sẽn pẽ bɩ tẽng sẽn zãrẽ," 
2Chronicles6:37 b sã n sulg b menga n zẽk b koɛɛg b yembda tẽngẽ n yeele: ‹Tõnd kongame, tõnd ka maan neer ye, tõnd wegmame,›" 
2Chronicles6:38 b sã n zĩnd be n wẽnemd b neng n tees tẽng ning m sẽn me n kõ yã, ne yam paale la sũ-paale, b sã n tees y tẽn-nongrã, n tees y roogã m sẽn me y yʋʋr waoogr yĩngã," 
2Chronicles6:39 zĩnd-y yĩngri, y zaoora zugu, n kelg b kosgo, n kelg b pʋʋsgo, n maan-b neere la y kõ-b b beegra sugri." 
2Chronicles6:40 La marsã, m Wẽnnaam, puk-y y nin la y yoog y tʋba n kelg sẽn pʋʋsd-b yãmb do-kãnga pʋga." 
2Chronicles6:41 M Wẽnnaam, sig-y marsã y vʋʋsga zĩigẽ n vigl y naam zaoore, sagl-y maan-kʋʋdba nao y fãagr sor pʋgẽ, kõ-y y buudã sũ-noogo." 
2Chronicles6:42 Naaba-Wẽnde, da zãag-y y menga ne y sẽn kõ a soab naama ye, tẽeg-y kũun sõma niynsi y sẽn kõ y yamb a Daviid.»" 
2Chronicles7:1 A Salomo sẽn pʋʋs n sɛ la bugum sẽn yi yĩngri n wa rɩ maandã tɩ sõmblem dooga lɛɛg n pid ne Naaba-Wẽnd ziiri. 
2Chronicles7:2 Maan-kʋʋdba ka tõog n yals a pʋgẽ ye, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ziira ra pid-a lame." 
2Chronicles7:3 B sẽn yãend yĩngr bugma sẽn sigi la Naaba-Wẽnd ziira sẽn pid ne sõmblem doogã, a Israyɛl gill wõgemdame n kɩ a neng tẽnga la a kilsa Naaba-Wẽnd n yet tɩ b yaa nin-noanga la b nonglem ka be sɛɛb ye." 
2Chronicles7:4 Dĩma ne zãma wã kʋʋ maand Naaba-Wẽnd taoore. 
2Chronicles7:5 Ad-a Salomo sẽn kʋ: niis tus pisi la a yi, piis tus koabg la pisi. B rɩka roogã n kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles7:6 Maan-kʋʋdba ra yɛsa b zĩigẽ la Levitsa ra pẽgda Naaba-Wẽnd ne yʋʋm teed niyns a Daviid sẽn da maan Soaala-Wẽnd pẽgra yĩnga; b ra yetame tɩ b yaa nin-noanga la b nonglem ka be sɛɛb ye. Yaa bãmb n da yɩɩnd pẽgr yɩɩla a Daviid sẽn da maane. Maan-kʋʋdba ra yɛsa bãmb sɛɛgẽ n peebd tõntõodo, la zãma wã ra yɛsa yĩngri." 
2Chronicles7:7 A Salomo ninga zaka tẽnsʋka barka, la be n lebg zĩig ning b sẽn na n kõ yũ-nood maanda, la laafi kosg maanda kaam. Maan-kugr ninga a Salomo sẽn maan ne zũuda ra pa tõe n deeg yũ-noog maoonga, ne kũuna sẽn tũnugdã la kaama ye." 
2Chronicles7:8 Yɩɩ rasem a yopoe tõre la a Salomo maan sẽgd kibsã, ne Israyɛl kamba sẽn da yi zĩig zãnga, al Lebo-Amat sẽn be nug goabga, al Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛga sẽn be nug rɩtgo." 
2Chronicles7:9 Daar a nii soaba le yɩɩ sɛɛg yõkr daare. Yɩɩ rasem a yopoe tõre la wẽnd dooga kibsa tõog n maane. 
2Chronicles7:10 Tisri kiuugu, kiuug a yopoe soaba, pisi la a tãab raare, a Salomo basa ned kam fãa t'a leb a tẽngẽ, n noogd a sũuri la a kɩdemnẽ tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd maana a Daviid neere, n maan a Salomo neere, n maan b buud a Israyɛl neere." 
2Chronicles7:11 A Salomo baasa wẽnd doogã la a meng rooga tʋʋma, wala a sẽn da rata." 
2Chronicles7:12 Dẽ marsã la Soaala-Wẽnd lika a Salomo yʋngo n yeel-a: «M wʋma f sẽn pʋʋs n kos bũmb ningã. M deega ro-kãnga t'a na n yɩ maanda roogo. 
2Chronicles7:13 M sã n wa pag yĩngr ko-yũusã tɩ saag paooge, m sã n wa yeel sʋʋr t'a rɩ tẽnga koodo, m sã tʋm bã-longdem m buuda sʋka," 
2Chronicles7:14 b sẽn yõkd m sɛɛg buud ning yĩngã, sã n sulg a menga, a sã n pʋʋse, a sã n baood m zĩiga, a sã n deeg a kongre, m na zĩnd yĩngr n kelge, m na kõ beegra sugr, m na le maneg tẽnga nenga." 
2Chronicles7:15 Marsã tɛka, m na n puka m nini la m yoog m tʋba n kelg pʋʋsg ning fãa sẽn na n pʋʋs zĩ-kãnga." 
2Chronicles7:16 Yaa ro-kãnga la m welg toore n na n zĩndg m meng a pʋgẽ. M nin la m sũur na n zĩnda be daar fãa. 
2Chronicles7:17 Sã n ya foom, f sã n kẽn m taoor wala f ba a Daviid sẽn kẽne, f sã n maan mam sẽn wilg-fã, f sã n deeg m noore la m saglsã," 
2Chronicles7:18 f naama na kaoos a zaoorẽ, wala m sẽn kãab f ba, m sẽn waa n yeel-a: ‹F buuda kõn kong biig sẽn na n dɩ naam Israyɛl ye.›" 
2Chronicles7:19 La yãmb sã n bas maam, y sã n pa reeg m noya la m saglse, y sã n pʋg wẽn-naandse, y sã n waoog-ba," 
2Chronicles7:20 m na yiis a Israyɛl tẽng ning m sẽn da kõ-a, m na yiis m taoore doog ning y sẽn me m waoogr yĩngã, la a na lebg bu-zẽmba fãa laado." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ned ninga fãa sẽn da mi wẽnd do-kãnga, n da mi a neerma, sã n wa pẽneg-a, a na n yɛɛsame la a yetẽ: ‹Bõe tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd maan woto ne tẽn-kãnga la wẽnd do-kãnga?›" 
2Chronicles7:22 La b na n leok-b lame: ‹Yaa b sẽn bas Naaba-Wẽnd, b yaab rãmb Wẽnnaam, sẽn yiis bãmb Ezipt tẽnga, yaa b sẽn tɩ kẽ wẽn-naandse, n waoog-ba, n kʋ b maandã, la Soaala-Wẽnd tʋm b yel-beed a woto fãa.› »" 
2Chronicles8:1 Yaa yʋʋm pisi pʋgẽ la a Salomo me wẽnd doogã la a meng yiri. 
2Chronicles8:2 A manegame n me tẽns niyns a Iram sẽn da kõ-a. A kẽesa Israyɛl kamb be. 
2Chronicles8:3 A paama Soba la Amat n sooge. 
2Chronicles8:4 A le maneg n me Tadmor, we-raoogẽ, n paas tãnsoben-tẽnse sẽn da be Amat tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles8:5 A le manega tãng zug Bɛt-Orõ la tãng sɛɛg Bɛt-Orõ tɩ b lebg tãnsoben-tẽnse, n tar lal-gũbri la kʋɩlens sẽn sogd ne kutu." 
2Chronicles8:6 A le manega Baalat, la tẽns niyns a sẽn da bĩngd a bilim-bilm, la tẽns niyns a sẽn kẽes a wed-dʋʋdba. A Salomo me a sẽn dat fãa Zerizalɛɛm, bɩ Libã, bɩ zĩis a taaba, a soolma pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles8:7 Neb n zĩndi n da ka Israyɛl buud ye, la a Israyɛl da bas-b lame n ka kʋ ye. B yaool n da keta Zerizalɛɛm. Yaa Ititsã, Amonitsã, Perizitsã, Ivitsã, Zebuze rãmba." 
2Chronicles8:8 A Salomo kẽe bãmb kamba sʋka n yãk a tʋʋm-tʋmdba, la ket n yaa boto ne rũnna." 
2Chronicles8:9 A Salomo ka kẽes Israyɛl kamba a tʋʋmnẽ ye. Yaa zabra yell bala n da pak bãmba. Bãmb n da rɩt naam n so sẽn tʋkd-b zab teedã. Bãmb n da ya wed-kɩɩmbã, la bilim-bilm nanamse." 
2Chronicles8:10 Sẽn da get-b tʋʋma sẽn welg toora nanamse da yaa bãmb kobs-yi la pis-nu. Bãmb n da sõngd a Salomo n gũud a zãma wã. 
2Chronicles8:11 A Salomo yiisa Ezipt dĩma bi-pugla a sẽn da be zĩig ninga, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ, n tall-a n wa kẽes roog a to a sẽn me a yĩngã. A ra yeta a meng woto: «M pag ka tõe n pa Israyɛl dĩm a Daviid zakẽ ye tɩ kuga walsa koglg sẽn bĩng zĩig ning fãa n baas n yɩɩd ne sõmblem.»" 
2Chronicles8:12 A Salomo kõo Naaba-Wẽnd yũ-nood maando, maan-kugr ninga a sẽn dɩgl zãonga taoora zugu." 
2Chronicles8:13 Maanda kʋʋba ra tũuda a Moyiiz sẽn da yals a soaba beoog-beoogã, sibr daarã, kiu-paalgã, kibs bɛd a tãabã sẽn ya bur sẽn ka ningd bɩll kibsa, tigsgu kibsa, la sẽgd kibsa." 
2Chronicles8:14 A pa teem a ba, a Daviid, sẽn da yals noy niynsa ye. A pa tedg maan-kʋʋdba sẽn tog n dees taab seem ning ye, a pa teem Levitsa noya ye, tɩ b na n kell yals maan-kʋʋdba sɛɛgẽ n pẽgd la b yɩɩnd beoog sẽn vẽege. A basa ragno-gũudba b zĩisẽ, wala a ba, a Daviid, Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmda, sẽn da wilgi." 
2Chronicles8:15 Maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa dɩ-rɩtem poorẽ menga, b ka bas noor ba a ye n pa reeg ye." 
2Chronicles8:16 Woto la yɛl niyns sẽn zĩndi wẽnd doga poorẽ, a teeda seglgo, a meeba sɩngre n tãag a baasgo, wala sẽn be dĩm dãmba kibara sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles8:17 A Salomo yikame marsã n ta Esiõ-Gebɛr la Eyilat, Rudum Mogra noore, Edom tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles8:18 Beelẽ a Iram kɩsa a neba koom-kogendo tɩ b wa kõ-a. A paasa Fenisi neb sẽn mi koom-kogenda rugsgu la mogra nenga. Nin-bãmb n yãag a Salomo neba tɩ b kẽng Ofir n lɛɛg n wa kɩsa sãnem. Sãnema zɩslem: seka neb kobs-yoob la pis-nu zɩɩbo. 
2Chronicles9:1 A Salomo yʋʋra sẽn da yi n zãag yĩnga, Saba dĩm-poaka wʋma rẽ n wa Zerizalɛɛm. A talla yɛl wʋsg ne pagdo n kos a Salomo t'a wegs n wilg b võore t'a rɩ a bãngra zulum kaseto. A waa ne arzɛgs me, ne yʋgma sẽn zɩt yũ-nood kaam, sãnem, la kug-neeba. A sẽn ta a Salomo nengẽ a yiisa a sẽn da bʋgs a yamẽ wã fãa." 
2Chronicles9:2 A Salomo leoka a sokr fãa. Bũmb pa zĩnd t'a wilgr yi toog ne-a ye. 
2Chronicles9:3 Saba dĩm-poaka sẽn bãng a Salomo yama sẽn zẽk n ta zĩig ninga, a sẽn yãe na-yira sẽn me to-to," 
2Chronicles9:4 dĩma sẽn dɩt bũmb ninga, a tʋʋma sẽn pʋɩ to-to, tʋʋmd fãa ne a taoor soaba, futa b sẽn yerã, sõgen-kamba ne b faongã, maanda sẽn da kʋʋd wẽnd doogẽ, a yɛɛsa wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles9:5 Dẽ la a yeel dĩma: «M sẽn wʋm tɩ b gomd bũmb ninga m tẽngẽ yãmb ne y bãngra poorẽ da yaa sɩd bala! 
2Chronicles9:6 M pa tʋlg n deeg tɩ m pa reng n wa m toor la m yãend ne m nif ye. La sã n ya sɩda, b pa wilg maam y bãngra pʋɩ-sʋk ye. Yãmb zʋʋga b sẽn togsdã al wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles9:7 Sũ-noog rãmb la f pagba, f sõgen-kamba sẽn be f taoore n kelgd f bãngre!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Naaba-Wẽnd, f Wẽnnaam paam barka, b sẽn maan f neere n dʋʋs-fo b naam zaoorẽ, bãmb pẽgr yĩnga! Yaa f Wẽnnaam sẽn nong a Israyɛl wʋsgo, n dat t'a ziira paasã la b kõ-f naam tɩ f na n wilg-a sẽn tog la sẽn kisi la f da bas-a t'a kong legend ye.»" 
2Chronicles9:9 Saba dĩm-poaka kõo dĩma sãnem. Sãnema zɩslem: seka neb koabg la pisopoe la a nu zɩɩbo. A paasa yũ-nood kaam ka tɛka, la kug-neeba. Yũ-nooda kaama taare da ka yãet moog ye." 
2Chronicles9:10 A Iram ne a Salomo neba me lɛɛg n wa ne Ofir sãnem, n paas ra-sĩdma, la kug neeba." 
2Chronicles9:11 Dĩma rɩka ra-sĩdma n pees n gãneg wẽnd dooga pʋga la na-rotã, n pees bɛɛla la pendse, yʋʋma yĩnga. B zɩ n yãend woto taar Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ ye." 
2Chronicles9:12 Dĩm a Salomo kõo Saba dĩm-poakã a sẽn tʋlg bũmb ning fãa. Dĩma pa ges a sẽn tall n wa n yaool n kõ-a ye. Yɩɩga rẽ al wʋsgo. Saba dĩm-poaka ne a neba yaool n leba b tẽngẽ. 
2Chronicles9:13 Yʋʋmd a ye pʋgẽ sãnem sẽn wa a Salomo yĩng yɩɩ sãnem gil sẽn sek neb tusr zɩɩbo. 
2Chronicles9:14 B pa naag n sõd lɛɛbdba ne b neba sẽn da tar n watẽ wã ye. B pa sõd Arabsa dĩm dãmba la tẽnga kombɛɛmbã rẽnd ye. Bãmb fãa ra wat n kõta a Salomo sãnem la wanzurfu. 
2Chronicles9:15 A Salomo maana gãndo, bãmb kobs-yi, gãnd sẽn da ya bɛd-bɛda. Kuta la sãnema sẽn dɩk n dõog a ye fãa zɩslem taa yubl sẽn pid koom." 
2Chronicles9:16 A maana gãnd sẽn ya bõonese, bãmb kobs-tã; kuta la sãnema sẽn dɩk n dõog a ye fãa zɩsa wa wam-pogbr sẽn pid ne koom. B tɩ yagl-b-la Libã Googa zãongẽ." 
2Chronicles9:17 Dĩma maana naam zaoor sẽn ya bedre, n tablg ne wob-yẽna la sãnem sẽn yɩlge n le yɩlge." 
2Chronicles9:18 Zaoora ra zẽkame. Tũuda sãnem teedse n dʋ la teedsa ra yaa a yoobe. Zaoora ra tara nusa sẽn gãte bɩ kamsa sẽn palgd zĩiga, goabg la rɩtgo. Kamsa sẽn palgd zĩig ninga b rõoga bõnyẽes a yi," 
2Chronicles9:19 b rõoga bõnyẽes piig la yi n tedg teeds a yoobã, goabg la rɩtgo. B zɩ n maan a buud rĩung ba a ye pʋg ye." 
2Chronicles9:20 A Salomo sẽn da tar lagd niyns n yũudã da yaa sãnem gilli. Teed niyns me sẽn da be Libã googa zãongẽ wa da maana ne sãnem sẽn yɩlge. A Salomo wakatã, b ra pa get wanzurf wa bõn-yõod ye." 
2Chronicles9:21 Dĩma ra tara koom-kogend sẽn da tʋgd Tarsis ne a Iram nebã, la yʋʋm a tãab fãa b ra lɛɛgd n wata ne sãnem, ne wanzurf, ne wob-yẽna, ne wãmse la noos-buudu sẽn ya neeba n sakd gesgo." 
2Chronicles9:22 A Salomo waa n yɩɩga dũni nanamsa fãa ne arzɛk la bãngre. 
2Chronicles9:23 Dũni dĩm dãmb fãa da rat n taa a Salomo nẽngẽ n bãng a menga la b kelg a bãngra goama, bãngr zulung ning a sẽn da paam Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ wã." 
2Chronicles9:24 Ned kam fãa ra wata ne kũuni: sãnem lagdo, wanzurf lagdo, futu, zab teedo, yũ-nood kaam, wiidi, bõn-weese, yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa." 
2Chronicles9:25 A Salomo mee do-bõones tus a naase wiida yĩnga. A ra tara bilim-bilm la wed-dʋʋdb tus piig la a yi. A da basa kẽer a sɛɛgẽ, Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles9:26 A Salomo dɩɩ naam Efrat kʋɩlga n ta Filisti, n ta Ezipt toaaga." 
2Chronicles9:27 A kɩtame tɩ wanzurf lebg wa kug zaal Zerizalɛɛm pʋga, tɩ tɩ-bɛd yãeeb ka toog n yɩɩd kankamse, bãada tẽnsẽ ye." 
2Chronicles9:28 A Salomo wiida ra yita Ezipt la tẽns a taabã. 
2Chronicles9:29 A Salomo vɩɩma kibare, a sɩngre n tãag a baasgo, dẽ fãa pa gʋls bãngd a Natã sɛbẽ, la Silo bãngd a Ayiya sebẽ, la bãngd a Yedo sɛbẽ bɩ? Bãngd kãng yãenda bũmb wʋsgo la a togsa yɛl wʋsgo a Nebat biig a Zeroboam poorẽ." 
2Chronicles9:30 A Salomo dɩɩ Israyɛl naam Zerizalɛɛm, yʋʋm pis-naase." 
2Chronicles9:31 A gãanda ne a saam dãmba tɩ b mum-a a ba a Daviid na-tẽngẽ la a biig a Roboam n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles10:1 A Roboam kẽnga Sikɛm tɩ yaa Sikɛm la a Israyɛl tigim n yug a na-paalga. 
2Chronicles10:2 A Nebat biig a Zeroboam sẽn bãng rẽ, a yii Ezipt n wa. Yẽ ra zoe-la a Salomo rabeem n dig Ezipt tẽnga." 
2Chronicles10:3 B bool-a lame la a waa Sikɛm tigsgã. Buuda goma woto ne a Roboam, dĩm paalgã:" 
2Chronicles10:4 «Y ba wã ra zɩlga tõnd zɩɩb sẽn zis wʋsgo, d kos tɩ y yols-do tɩ woto d na pʋg yã.»" 
2Chronicles10:5 A leoka buudã: «Kul-y la sã n maan dasem a tã bɩ y lɛɛg n wa.» La neba loogame. 
2Chronicles10:6 A Roboam soka nin-kẽemsã sẽn da sõngd a ba a Salomo a sẽn waa n ketẽ: «M tog n leok-b-la wãna?» 
2Chronicles10:7 Tɩ b yeele: «Yãmb sã n yɩ bʋgsgo, n kelgd-ba, n kõt-b koe noodo, b na tũ yãmb daar fãa.»" 
2Chronicles10:8 A Roboam basa nin-kẽemsa saglse, n sok a reemd-n-taase sẽn da paam tʋʋmd a sɛɛgẽ, zãma wã zãab tʋʋmde." 
2Chronicles10:9 A sok-b-la woto: «Y yetame tɩ m leok nin-bãmba wãna? Ad-y yaa woto la b gom ne-ma: ‹Yols-y zɩɩb ning y ba sẽn da zɩlg tõndã.› » 
2Chronicles10:10 Kom-bɩɩbã, a reemd-n-taasã leokame: woto la y na n yeel sẽn togs b yãmbã: «Y ba zɩlga tõnd wʋsgo, la yãmb yols-dã. Yeel-y woto: ‹M nug-bila pãng yɩɩda m ba kanga." 
2Chronicles10:11 M ba tʋka yãmb sẽn zɩse la mam na n paasa y zɩɩbo. M ba pãba yãmb ne sãbse la mam na pãb-y ne kaas sẽn yod kutu.› » 
2Chronicles10:12 Dɩlla a Zeroboam ne zãma wã le tigma taab a Roboam taoore dasem a tã wã sẽn waa n pidi, wala a meng sẽn da wilgi: «Lɛɛg-y n wa ka ra-yɩta.»" 
2Chronicles10:13 Dĩma leok-b-la pãr-pãre. Dĩma pa reeg nin-kẽemsa sagls ye. 
2Chronicles10:14 Yaa a reemd-n-taasa la a kelg yã. Ad-a sẽn yeele: «M ba tʋka yãmb sẽn zɩse, la mam na n paasa y zɩɩbo. M ba pãba yãmb ne sãbse la mam na pãb-y ne kaas sẽn yod kutu.»" 
2Chronicles10:15 Dĩma pa kelg zãma wã ye, la rẽ yɩɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n lʋɩ sʋka sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pids b sẽn da kãab a Nebat biig a Zeroboam ne Silo bãngd a Ayiya noore." 
2Chronicles10:16 Dĩma sẽn pa sak n kelg zãma wã, Israyɛl nug goabg rãmba me leokame: «D pʋɩɩr bʋgo n be ne a Daviid? Tõnd pʋɩɩr ka be a Zese biig nugẽ ye. Dẽ yĩnga, Israyɛl leb f rotẽ. Marsã tɛka, a Daviid soolem tek a na-tẽngẽ.» A Israyɛl leba a tẽnsẽ." 
2Chronicles10:17 A Roboam dɩɩ naam tẽns niyns sẽn da be a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ bala. 
2Chronicles10:18 A Roboam tʋma a Adoram, yẽ n da get a tʋʋma. A tʋm-a lame t'a kẽng tɩ b le tɩ maneg n yẽse, la b lob-a-la ne kug n kʋ. A Roboam kong n kẽe a bilim-bilm n zoe n tees Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles10:19 Yaa woto la a Zɩɩda ne a Israyɛl roog welg taaba n ta rũnna. 
2Chronicles11:1 A Roboam sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm, a tigma a Zɩɩda la a Bẽnzame roogo, bãmb tus koabg la pis-nii, tãb-biis sẽn mi zabre, n na n tɩ zab ne a Israyɛl, sẽn na yɩlẽ t'a leb a Roboam soolmẽ." 
2Chronicles11:2 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ta-la b neda, a Semaya. Koɛɛga yeelame:" 
2Chronicles11:3 «Taas a Salomo biig a Roboam, taas a Zɩɩda dĩma la Israyɛl kamb sẽn be Zɩɩda la a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ," 
2Chronicles11:4 wilg-b tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd yet-b lame: ‹Da tak-y zabre ne y saam-biisa ye. Ned kam fãa leb a yiri, tɩ welgra yaa mam tʋʋmde.› » B kelga Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga, b lɛɛgame, b pa tɩ zab ne a Zeroboam ye." 
2Chronicles11:5 A Roboam tɩ kẽe Zerizalɛɛm, n me tãnsoben-tẽns Zɩɩda." 
2Chronicles11:6 A le maneg n me Bɛtelyɛɛm, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bɛt-Sur, Soko, Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gat, Maresa, Zɩf," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adorayim, Lakis, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Sorea, Ayalõ, Ebrõ. Bãmb la tãnsoben-tẽns sẽn da be Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles11:11 A maneg n me-b lame n paas b pãng wʋsgo, n ning tãnsoab bɛda, n pag a dɩ-rɩtem, a kaam la a rãam be." 
2Chronicles11:12 Gãndo la kãn da be tẽn kãens fãa pʋsẽ. A paasa b pãnga. A waa n sɩd lebga Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame soaala. 
2Chronicles11:13 Maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa sẽn da sẽeg Israyɛl tẽn-peelma yi b tẽnsẽ n wa kẽ dĩm a Roboam. 
2Chronicles11:14 Levitsa basa b wãbnega zĩisi la b buuda pʋto n wa Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm. La rẽ yaa a Zeroboam ne a kamba sẽn yeel-b tɩ b kõn le paam maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd n tʋma yĩnga. 
2Chronicles11:15 A Zeroboam da bao-la a toorẽ maan-kʋʋdba wẽn-naandsa waoogr yĩnga. Yaool n da yaa boees la nag-bi la b da rõogd ne zũudu, n boond rẽ tɩ b wẽnde, n kʋʋd maand b yĩnga." 
2Chronicles11:16 Sagsa toor-toor neba sẽn da be Israyɛl n yaool n ket n dat n waoogd Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, tũ-b lame n wa Zerizalɛɛm n na n pʋg b yaab rãmb Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles11:17 Woto b paasa Zɩɩda rĩunga pãnga. B yalsa a Salomo biiga Roboam poorẽ, yʋʋm a tã, tɩ yaa yʋʋm a tã bala la a Roboam tũ a Daviid la a Salomo sẽn tũ sor ningã." 
2Chronicles11:18 A Roboam kẽe kãadem ne a Maalat. Yaa a Yerimot bi-pugla t'a Yerimot me yaa a Daviid bi-ribla. A ma, a Abiayil, da yaa a Eliab bi-pugla, la a Zese yagenga." 
2Chronicles11:19 Ad-a sẽn dog kamb niynsi: a Yewus, a Semariya, a Zaam." 
2Chronicles11:20 Dẽ poore a kẽe kãadem ne a Maaka, a Absalom biiga n dog a kamba, a Atayi, a Ziza la a Selomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 A Roboam waa n nonga a Absalom biig, a Maaka, n yɩɩd a pagb a taabã la pʋg lemsã. A pagb ra yaa bãmb piig la a nii, tɩ pʋg lemsa ya pisoobe. A roga kom-dibli pisi la a nii, a doga kom-pugli pisoobe." 
2Chronicles11:22 A Maaka biig a Abiya la a kõ kãsengo, a lʋɩs-a-la a ba-biisa taoore, n dat t'a wa lebg dĩma." 
2Chronicles11:23 A ra tʋllame n sẽeg a kamba Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame tẽn-peelma fãa, tãnsoben-tẽnsa fãa. A sõng-b-la ne kood la ligdi, n sõng-b ne pagb ka tɛka." 
2Chronicles12:1 A Roboam naam ra paam n viglame n tar pãnga, la wakat kãng la a yik ne a Israyɛl tõre n zãgs Soaala-Wẽnd noore." 
2Chronicles12:2 A naama yʋʋmd a nu soaba, Ezipt dĩm a Sisak gãnega tãp Zerizalɛɛm, a sẽn da yi Wẽnd poorẽ wã yĩnga." 
2Chronicles12:3 A waa ne bilim-bilm tusr la kobs-yi, ne wed-dʋʋdb tus pisoobe la tãb-biis ka tɛka sẽn yi Ezipt ne-a, ne Libi, Suk la Nubi." 
2Chronicles12:4 A pãba Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnsa la a taa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles12:5 Bãngd a Semaya waa n yãenda a Roboam la a tãnsoaben-dãmba tɩ b sẽn wʋm a Sisak rãamde, b fãa zoe n wa tigma Zerizalɛɛm. Ad-a sẽn yeele: «Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto. Yãmb basa maam, yaa rẽ me yĩng la mam me bas yãmb ne a Sisak.»" 
2Chronicles12:6 Woto wã tãnsoaben-dãmba ne a Roboam sulga b meng Soaala-Wẽnd taoore. B yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn maana zemsame.» 
2Chronicles12:7 La Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yãend tɩ b tuubame b yeela a Semaya: «B sẽn deeg b kongra yĩnga, m kõn kʋ-b zãng ye. Sã n yɩ bilfu m na fãag-ba, tɩ ka na n tũ ne a Sisak nugu tɩ m sũura bugum yõog Zerizalɛɛm ye." 
2Chronicles12:8 La ade, a na n kẽes-b-la a tʋʋma la woto b na bãng são-sãood sẽn be zĩig ninga. Yaa mam nengẽ, yaa bɛɛba nengẽ, b na bãnge.»" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ezipt dĩm a Sisak waa Zerizalɛɛm. A kɩtame tɩ b yiis Soaala-Wẽnd arzɛka sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ la dĩma arzɛkã. A looga ne fãa gilli; sãnem gãndã a Salomo sẽn kɩt tɩ b kuda fãa loogame. 
2Chronicles12:10 A Roboam kuda zũud gãndo n lebse. A yeela sẽn da kogend b dĩma yõora kãsem-dãmba sẽn da be dĩma zaka noorã tɩ b ges b yelle. 
2Chronicles12:11 Dĩma sã n da rabd wẽnd doogẽ fãa, sẽn da kogenda a yoorã ra wat n dɩk-b lame n yaool n le wa lebs-ba." 
2Chronicles12:12 Dĩma sẽn sulg a meng yĩnga, Wẽnd ka bas tɩ b sũurã fudg n daag n sãam-a zãng ye. Zɩɩda tẽn-peelma ra ka pid ne wẽnem bal ye. Bõn-sõma me ra ket n bee be." 
2Chronicles12:13 Dĩma naam maneg n vigla Zerizalɛɛm n paase. A Roboam da tara yʋʋm pis-naase la a ye a sẽn waa n lebg dĩma la a dɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, tẽng ning Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn tũus Israyɛl tẽnsa sʋka n na n maan b na-tẽnga. A Roboam ma ra boondame t'a Naama. A ra yaa Amonitga." 
2Chronicles12:14 A sẽn maan tɩ ka yɩɩ neere, yaa a sẽn pa kẽ Naaba-Wẽnd ne a sũuri." 
2Chronicles12:15 A Roboam vɩɩma kibare, a sɩngre n taa a baasgo, fãa pa gʋls bãngd a Semaya sebrẽ n paas bãngd a Ido me rẽnnẽ? A Roboam ne a Zeroboam zaba ka yãk raar n yals ye." 
2Chronicles12:16 A Roboam kiime tɩ b mum-a a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. A biig a Abiya n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles13:1 A Zeroboam naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba la a Abiya lebg Zɩɩda dĩma. 
2Chronicles13:2 A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a tã Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame t'a Mikaya n ya Gibeya rao a Uriyɛl bi-pugla. A Abiya ne a Zeroboam talla zabr ne taaba. 
2Chronicles13:3 A Abiya yi n seg-a-la ne tãb-biis sẽn pid ne raoodo, tãb-biis tus kobs-naase sẽn mi zabr sõmb-sõmbo. A Zeroboam me yii ne tãb-biis sẽn pid raoodo, sẽn mi zabr sõmb sõmbo, bãmb tus kobs-nii." 
2Chronicles13:4 A Abiya dʋ Semarayim tãng sẽn be Efrayim tãmsa sʋka, n yeele: «Zeroboam, la yãmb fãa, Israyɛl kamba, kelg-y yã!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Yãmb da tog n tẽegame tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, kõ-la a Daviid Israyɛl naam daar fãa yĩnga. Yaa zood sẽn yalse n pa le tõe n viigi, a Israyɛl ne a kamba yĩnga." 
2Chronicles13:6 A Nebat biiga a Zeroboam, a Daviid biiga a Salomo sõgne, yik n zẽka a zug ne a soaala." 
2Chronicles13:7 Nin-yaalse, nin-yoodo n yik n kẽ sʋka n sagl-a Roboam la a sẽn da nan ket n ya yãag yĩnga a basame tɩ b belga n tõog-a." 
2Chronicles13:8 Marsã y yetame tɩ y kõn sulg y mens a Daviid yagensa taoore, tɩ naama yaool n ya Naaba-Wẽnd n ning-a a Daviid kamba nugẽ. Ad-y y sẽn sũ taaba zembala, tɩ y wẽn-naandsa ya sãnem nag-bi a Zeroboam sẽn dõog n kõ yã!" 
2Chronicles13:9 Yãmb rigame n yiis y sʋka, Naaba-Wẽnd maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamba, n paas Levitsã, n yaool n bao y toorẽ maan-kʋʋdb wala bu-zẽmba sẽn maandã. Yãmb nengẽ, ned ning fãa sẽn wata ne loalga la piis a yopoe n dat maan-kʋʋr tõogo, ra tõe n lebga maan-kʋʋda, wẽn-naand maan-kʋʋda!" 
2Chronicles13:10 Sã n ya tõndo, Naaba-Wẽnd la d Wẽnde la d ka bas-b ye. A Aarõ kamb la maan-kʋʋdba, tɩ Levitsa sõngd-ba." 
2Chronicles13:11 Yibeoog la zaabr fãa d kʋʋda d yũ-noog maando Naaba-Wẽnd, d Wẽnnaama yĩnga. D tara tɩdar sõngã, d dɩgenda kaset buri, a roagendga zugu, d tara sãnem fitil kãsenga n yõgend zaabre. Tõnd ket n deegda Naaba-Wẽnd, d Wẽnnaam noor, tõnd ka bas-b wa yãmb ye." 
2Chronicles13:12 Tõnd Tãnsoab la Naaba-Wẽnde la d le tara b maan-kʋʋdba ne b tõntõodo. Bãmb n na n peeb tɩ tõnd kelem la d sɩng zabr ne yãmba! Israyɛl kamba, da kaoog-y zabr ne Naaba-Wẽnd, y yaab rãmb Wẽnd, zaalem ye! Ka na n yɩ raood tʋʋmd la y na n tʋm ye.»" 
2Chronicles13:13 A Zeroboam yãka tãb-biis kẽere tɩ b na n soos n leb Zɩɩda rãmba kudgẽ. Woto a Zɩɩda ra nee Israyɛl zãma wã a taoore mik neb n solg poorẽ. 
2Chronicles13:14 B sẽn wẽnemde, Zɩɩda rãmb yãeeme tɩ zab-zabdba gũbg-b-la taoor la poorẽ. B yõka Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga. Maan-kʋʋdba peeba tõntõodo." 
2Chronicles13:15 A Zɩɩda rãmb tãsa b zabr kɛlenga, la wakat kãng bala Naaba-Wẽnd kʋ-la a Zeroboam ne a nebã, a Abiya la Zɩɩda taoore." 
2Chronicles13:16 A Israyɛl kʋɩɩ tĩig a Zɩɩda taoore, Naaba-Wẽnd sagl-b-la a Zɩɩda nugẽ." 
2Chronicles13:17 A Abiya ne a tãb-biisa tõog-b-la sõmb-sõmbo. B neb tus kobs-nu sẽn ya zab-mitb lʋɩɩme. 
2Chronicles13:18 A Israyɛl paama yãnde, a Zɩɩda raood paasame, tɩ b teega Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles13:19 A Abiya pʋga a Zeroboam n deeg a tẽns kẽere. Betɛl ne a tẽn-kogse, Yesana ne a tẽn-kogse, Efrõ ne a tẽn-kogse." 
2Chronicles13:20 A Abiya wakato Soaala-Wẽnd wooga a Zeroboam naama pãnga. Naaba-Wẽnd wẽ-a lame n kʋ. 
2Chronicles13:21 A Abiya maneg n vigla a naam zaoore. A kẽe kãadem ne pagb piig la a naase, n dog kom-dibli pisi la a yi, kom-pugli piig la a yoobe." 
2Chronicles13:22 A Abiya kibare, a vɩɩma sẽn yɩ a soaba, a tʋʋma, fãa gʋlsa bãngd a Ido sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles13:23 A Abiya kiime tɩ b mum-a a Daviid na-tẽnga. A biiga Asa n led-a a zaoorẽ. A Asa naama wakato, tẽnga zĩnda yʋʋm piig ne laafi." 
2Chronicles14:1 A Asa naama yɩɩ sõmb la neere Soaala-Wẽnnaam nifẽ. 
2Chronicles14:2 A wãa sãamba maan-kuga, n gɩdg wẽn-naandsa waoogre, n vigs wẽn-naandsa sẽn da pees ne kug la raadã." 
2Chronicles14:3 A wilga Zɩɩda rãmb tɩ b bao Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnd, zĩiga, la b reeg b noya la b saglse." 
2Chronicles14:4 Zɩɩda pʋgẽ, a menesa wẽn-naanda maan-kuga la tɩdara yõogr zĩisi. Tẽnga yãee laafi a zamaanẽ." 
2Chronicles14:5 A le maneg n mee Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnsa. Zabr sẽn da ka le zabd yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn kõ-b laafi yĩnga, vɩʋʋg ra bee tʋʋm kãens yĩnga." 
2Chronicles14:6 Yaa rẽ yĩng la a yeel yã: «D le maneg tãnsoben-tẽnsã, d me lals n gũbg-ba, n ning kʋɩlens sẽn sogd ne kutu. D pa d tẽngẽ, d bao Naaba-Wẽnd, d Wẽnnaam, tɩ bãmb me pʋga tõndo n kõ-d laafi ne d yags fãa.» Woto wã b rɩka tʋʋmda ne raoodo la b tõog n yika lal-gũbrã." 
2Chronicles14:7 A Asa ra tara tãb-biis Zɩɩda tẽnga, bãmb tus kobs-tã, sẽn zãad gãnd yalemse la kãna. A ra tara a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ tãb-biis tus kobs-yi la pis-nii, sẽn zãad gãnd bɩ sẽn mi tãbdo, fãa ra yaa neb sẽn tar raoodo." 
2Chronicles14:8 Nubi rao a Zera waa a Asa soolmẽ ne tãb-biis tus kẽemde la bilim-bilm kobs-tã. A taa Maresa," 
2Chronicles14:9 t'a Asa yi n seg-a, la a tonga a zabr tongr Sefata bãg-faagẽ, pẽe ne Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:10 A Asa pʋʋsa Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaam, woto: «Yãmb bal la Wẽnde, n na n lʋɩɩs y toog nin-gãndaado la koams sʋka, wa-y n sõng-y-do, Naaba-Wẽnde, d Wẽnnaam. Tõnd teega yãmba, la yaa yãmb yʋʋr yĩnga la d na n wẽ nin-bãmba sẽn ka be tɛkã. Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb la d Wẽnde. Tõnd ninsaalba basda fãa ne yãmba.»" 
2Chronicles14:11 Naaba-Wẽnd pãba Nubi rãmbã, a Asa ne a neba taoore, tɩ b na n zoe." 
2Chronicles14:12 A Asa pʋg-b-la ne a tãb-biisi n ta Gerar. Sẽn pa b zabrẽ wã sõor n yɩɩge. Naaba-Wẽnd da wẽeme, tɩ tãb-biisa me naag n wẽ. B wʋka laog wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles14:13 B reega tẽns wʋsgo sẽn da pẽ Gerar, tɩ b ra ket n yɛɛsa Soaala yɛɛsgo. B reesa-b laog tɩ b ra tara laog wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles14:14 B tol n kẽe wuba pʋsẽ n yiis piis la yʋgma, n yaool n n lebg n dɩk Zerizalɛɛm sore." 
2Chronicles15:1 Soaala-Wẽnd vẽnega a Odɛd biig a Azariya. 
2Chronicles15:2 A yɩ n sega a Asa n yeel: «Asa, la yãmb fãa Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame rãmba, kelg-y! Yãmb sã n pa ne Naaba-Wẽnde, bãmb me paada ne yãmba. Yãmb sã n gẽesd-ba, b basdame tɩ b yãend-ba. Yãmb sã n zãag ne-ba, bãmb me zãagda ne yãmba." 
2Chronicles15:3 A Israyɛl kaoosame n ka le tar Wẽnd sɩda, n ka le tar maan-kʋʋd sẽn na n zãms-a, wilg noorã, n ka le tar noora ye." 
2Chronicles15:4 La a pɛta pʋgẽ, a lɛɛg n wa kẽe Naaba-Wẽnd. B bao-b lame, la b basame tɩ b yãend-ba." 
2Chronicles15:5 Sasa kãnga, tɩ ned ba a ye ka zĩ n pa yɩɩdẽ, tɩ pa gomd a sã n togd sore. Sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa yɛɛsgo la rabeem." 
2Chronicles15:6 Rĩung ra yikda zabr ne a to, tɩ tẽng yik ne a yaka. Naaba-Wẽnd da gãneg-b-la yɩɩr pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles15:7 Sã n ya yãmba, keng-y y sũuri, la y da bas raood ye tɩ y tʋʋma na n paama b rolbo.»" 
2Chronicles15:8 A Asa wʋma bãngda goama, n yeel t'a na n yiisa wẽn-naandsa sẽn da be Zɩɩda ne Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ la tẽnsã sẽn be Efrayim tãnga zugu, a sẽn da pãb n deese. A le manega maan-kugrã sẽn da rɩg wẽnd dooga zãonga noore." 
2Chronicles15:9 A kɩtame tɩ Zɩɩda ne Bẽnzame tigim taaba, n paas sẽn da yi-b Efrayim, Manase la Simeõ tẽn-peelmẽ tɩ bãmb wʋsg da zoe n kẽ-la a Asa, b sẽn yãend tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd da pʋgda a poore." 
2Chronicles15:10 A Asa naama yʋʋmd piig la a nu soaba, kiuug a tãab soaba, Sivã kiuugu, b fãa waa n tigma Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles15:11 Baraare b yãka b sẽn tɩ paam zabra weoogẽ n kʋ maand Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, niis kobs-yopoe la rũms bõones tus a yopoe." 
2Chronicles15:12 B wẽename tɩ b na n baoo Naaba-Wẽnde, b ba-rãmb Wẽnde, ne b sũur fãa, ne b pãng fãa." 
2Chronicles15:13 Ned ninga sẽn ka na n bao Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnde, b na n kʋ-a lame, a ya nin-kãseng bɩ nin-bila, pag bɩ raoa." 
2Chronicles15:14 B kãaba Naaba-Wẽnd ne bʋ-raase, tɩ tõntõod la bard peebdẽ." 
2Chronicles15:15 Zɩɩda rãmba fãa sũur yɩɩ noogo ne b kãabgã, tɩ ya bũmb sẽn sɩd yi sũurẽ. B bao Naaba-Wẽnd yamleoogo. La rẽ yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd me basame tɩ b yãend-ba la b kõ-b-la laafi ne b yagsa fãa." 
2Chronicles15:16 Dĩm a Asa ma menga, a Maaka, ka le bool tɩ naab ma ye, tɩ yẽ ra kɩtame tɩ b pees wẽn-poak a Asera nin-naande. A Asa luba a yel-yaalgã, n to-a n bõgse, n yõog a bugum Sedrõ." 
2Chronicles15:17 A sãama waoogra zĩis fãa. A Asa yaool n yɩɩ pʋ-peelem soaba a vɩɩma fãa pugẽ. 
2Chronicles15:18 A bĩnga wẽnd dooga pʋga, a ba kũum sõma, a meng kũuni, wanzurfu, sãnem la lagd wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles15:19 Zabr ka le zĩnd n tãag a Asa naam yʋʋmd pis-tã la a nu soab ye. 
2Chronicles16:1 A naama yʋʋmd pis-tã la a yoob soaba, Israyɛl dĩm a Basa yika zabr ne a Zɩɩda. A maneg n me Rama n paas a pãnga la a tõog n gɩdga Zɩɩda dĩma a Asa leebgo." 
2Chronicles16:2 A Asa kong n kẽe wẽnd doogẽ, n kẽ dĩma roogẽ n yãk wanzurf la sãnem n tool Aramsa dĩma, a Ben-Adad. Dĩm kãng ra kẽeda Damas. A Asa yeel-a-la woto:" 
2Chronicles16:3 «Zood n be maam ne foom tẽnsʋka, m ba la fo ba tẽnsʋka; m toond-f-la wanzurf la sãnem. Ade, sãam f zooda ne a Basa, Israyɛl dĩma, t'a zãag, la a ra le wa zab ne m ye!»" 
2Chronicles16:4 A Ben-Adad deega dĩma Asa kosgo. A yiisa a tãnsoaben-dãmb tɩ b tɩ zab ne Israyɛl tẽnse. A pãba Iyõ tẽnga, Dã, Abɛl-Mayim, la Neftali tẽnsã, a sẽn da bĩngd a kood zĩis niynsã." 
2Chronicles16:5 A Basa sẽn wʋm dẽ a bas a meeba a sẽn da met Rama. 
2Chronicles16:6 A Asa tɩ wʋka fãa n wa Zɩɩda. Yaa kuga la raadã, la b tall-b lame n me Geva la Mispa, n paas b pãnga." 
2Chronicles16:7 Yaa wakat kãng la bãngd a Anani wa dĩma a Asa mengẽ. Ad-a sẽn yeele: «Fo sẽn bas Naaba-Wẽnd teegre n teeg Aram dĩma, bãng t'a tãb-biisa na n fʋsg n yi-la f soolmẽ." 
2Chronicles16:8 Nubi la Libi tãb-biisa ra naaga tãaba n ya neb ka tɛka, n tar wiidi la bilim-bilm ka tɛka. Fo sẽn da teeg Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, b rɩk-b lame n sagl f nugẽ." 
2Chronicles16:9 Naaba-Wẽnd nin kargda tẽnga gilli n na n keng sẽn kẽed b bãmb sũuri. Fo maana yalemdo, la marsã tɛka yaa zabr la f na n yãe.»" 
2Chronicles16:10 A Asa sũur puuga ne bãngdã, la a sẽb-a lame n kẽes roogo. Baraar tɛka a zãa toogo, a soolma neb kẽere." 
2Chronicles16:11 A Asa kibare, a sɩngre n ta a baasgo, fãa gʋlsa a Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles16:12 A naam yʋʋmd pis-tã la a wɛ soaba, a yika bãag sẽn zab a nao. A bãaga pʋgẽ a basa Naaba-Wẽnd teegre n teeg tɩt rãmba." 
2Chronicles16:13 A Asa kiime, a naam yʋʋmd pis-naas la a ye soaba." 
2Chronicles16:14 B mum-a-la yaoog ning a meng sẽn da kɩt tɩ b tu a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. B gãneg-a-la a gãagẽ n wʋk yũ-nood kaam, la tɩdare la bõn-yood a taaba n zam-a. A waoogr yĩnga, b widga bugum sẽn ka zĩnd taar ye." 
2Chronicles17:1 A Asa biig a Zozafat n led zaoorẽ, a paasa a naama pãnga." 
2Chronicles17:2 A ninga tãb-biis a Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnsẽ, n ning kombɛɛmba Efrayim tẽnse a ba, a Asa, sẽn pãb n deege." 
2Chronicles17:3 Naaba-Wẽnd zĩnda ne a Zozofat t'a vɩɩma wẽneg a ba, a Daviid, rẽnd sẽn sɩng to-to. A ka pʋg a Baal dãmb ye." 
2Chronicles17:4 A baoo Naaba-Wẽnd, a ba rãmb Wẽnde, la a reega b noore. A ka maan wa Israyɛl dĩm dãmb ye." 
2Chronicles17:5 Naaba-Wẽnd kenga naama a nusẽ. Zɩɩda neba fãa ra yaooda fadgo la woto a paama waoor la arzɛk wʋsgo. 
2Chronicles17:6 A sũura tol n kẽe Wẽnd n paase t'a wã wẽn-naandsã, n menes ra-peesdi wã fãa." 
2Chronicles17:7 A naam yʋʋmd a tãab soaba, a yiisa a taoor dãmb kẽere tɩ b sa n karem Zɩɩda tẽnsa rãmba n nek b yam. Yɩ-la a Ben-Ayil, a Obadiya, a Zakari, a Netaneyɛl, a Mikaya." 
2Chronicles17:8 Levitsa kẽer n yãag-ba. Yɩ-la a Semaya, a Netaniya, a Zebadiya, a Asayɛl, a Semiramot, a Zonatã, a Adoniya, a Tobiya, a Tob-Adoniya, n paas maan-kʋʋdba a Elisama la a Zoram." 
2Chronicles17:9 B sɩnga b zãmsga Zɩɩda ne Wẽnd noora sebre. B saaga Zɩɩda tẽnsa fãa n zãmsd neba. 
2Chronicles17:10 Naaba-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ tẽns niyns sẽn da gũbg-b Zɩɩda rig rabeem kãsenga. B pa tak zabr ne a Zoazafat ye. 
2Chronicles17:11 Filisti rãmba mens ra wata ne kũuni la ligdi. Arabsa waa ne rũmsi, pe-raad tus a yopoe la kobs-yopoe la boees tus a yopoe la kobs-yopoe." 
2Chronicles17:12 A Zozafat pãnga da tara paasgo, a mee tãnsoben-doto la kood bĩngr tẽnse." 
2Chronicles17:13 B paam n bĩnga kood zembala Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ. A ninga tãb-biis sẽn tar sũur Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles17:14 Ad-b sõore, roog-roogo. A Zɩɩda roogo: tãb-biis sẽn tar sũuri, bãmb tus kobs-tã, tɩ b tãnsoaba yaa a Adna," 
2Chronicles17:15 n le paas tãb-biis tus kobs-yi la pis-nii tɩ b tãnsoab yaa a Zoana. 
2Chronicles17:16 Sẽn waa n paas-a yɩ-la ned sẽn kẽ Naaba-Wẽnd tʋʋmda ne yamleoogo, a Zikri biig a Amasiya. A neba yɩɩ tãb-biis sẽn pid ne raoodo, bãmb tus kobs-yi." 
2Chronicles17:17 Sã n yaa a Bẽnzame roogo, yɩ-la a Eliyada, gãndaoog menga ne neb tus kobs-yi, sẽn bob tãbdo la sẽn zãad gãndo." 
2Chronicles17:18 Yẽ sɛɛgẽ da yaa a Zozabad, yẽ ra tara tãb-biis tus koabg la pis-nii sẽn bob zabre." 
2Chronicles17:19 Sẽn da sõngd-b dĩma la woto, la pa gomd neb niyns a sẽn da ning tãnsoben-dotẽ wã, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelma fãa pʋgẽ ye." 
2Chronicles18:1 A Zozafat paama waoor la arzɛka wʋsgo. A yõga zood ne a Akab la zooda waa n baasa ne reemdo. 
2Chronicles18:2 Sẽn maan yʋʋm a wãna, a waa Samari n na n ges a Akab. A Akab kʋʋ piis la niis ka tɛka, yẽnda ne a poorẽ dãmba yĩnga, la rẽ yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a wa sõng-a n tak zabre ne Galaad-Ramot dãmba." 
2Chronicles18:3 Israyɛl dĩma Akab yeela Zɩɩda dĩm a Zozafat: «F na n waa ne maam Galaad-Ramot bɩ?» T'a yeele: «Foo ne f neba sẽn maand bũmb ninga, maam ne m neba me maanda boto.»" 
2Chronicles18:4 A Zozafat le yeela Israyɛl dĩma: «Mam kotame tɩ f sok n paam Wẽnd koɛɛga.» 
2Chronicles18:5 Dẽ la Israyɛl dĩma tigim bãngdba na ta kobs-naase n sok-ba: «D tog n kẽng n tɩ kaooga zabre Galaad-Ramot bɩ m tog n basame n pa kẽnge?» Tɩ b naag taab n leoke: «Kẽng-y tɩ Soaala na ning tẽnga dĩma y nugẽ.» 
2Chronicles18:6 T'a Zozafat yeele: «Naaba-Wẽnd bãngdba ba a ye ka ket tɩ d kudg yẽ me kãntɩɩga?» 
2Chronicles18:7 Israyɛl dĩma leoka a Zozafat: «Ned a ye n kete tɩ d tõe n kudg kãntɩɩga n sok Naaba-Wẽnde, la mam kis-a lame, a zɩ n togs koɛɛg sẽn noom-m ye, dẽnd beed bala. Yaa a Yimla biig a Mise.» A Zozafat yeelame: «Bɩ dĩma da gom woto ye!»" 
2Chronicles18:8 Israyɛl dĩma boola a sõgen a ye n yeel-a: «Bool a Yimla biig a Mise t'a wa tao-tao!» 
2Chronicles18:9 Israyɛl dĩma ne Zɩɩda dĩma da zao b naam goeele, n yeelg naam futu. B ra bee vɩʋʋg ninga sẽn be Samari Noorã tɩ bãngdba da yɛs b taoore n gomd b bãngra goama." 
2Chronicles18:10 A Kenaana biiga a Sedesiyas ra kuda kut yɩɩla la a yeelame: «Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Ne yɩɩn-bãmba, fo na n tãa Aramsã n kʋ-b zãnga.› »" 
2Chronicles18:11 Bãngdba fãa da gomda gom yɛnga n yetẽ: «Kẽng Galaad-Ramot, f na tõoge. Wẽnd na n ning-a-la dĩma nugẽ.»" 
2Chronicles18:12 B sẽn tʋm dao ninga t'a tɩ bool a Mise wã goma ne a woto: «Bãngdba fãa zemsa taab noor a ye n gomd noog dĩma poorẽ. Fo me maan wa bãmb nin-yende n kãab noogo.» 
2Chronicles18:13 Dẽ la a Mise leok yã: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd sẽn vɩ, tɩ m Soaala sẽn yeel-m bũmb ninga bal la m na n togse.»" 
2Chronicles18:14 A sẽn ta dĩma taoore, dĩma sok-a lame: «Mise, d kẽng n tɩ kaoog zabr Galaad-Ramot bɩ d ra kẽnge?» T'a leoke: «Kẽng-y, y na tõoge, Wẽnd na n ninga tẽnga zãng y nugẽ.»" 
2Chronicles18:15 La dĩma yeel-a lame: «Yaa naoor a wãna la m na n kos-fo tɩ f togs sɩd bal Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga?» 
2Chronicles18:16 Dẽ marsã la a Mise yeel yã: «Mam yãenda Israyɛl gill sẽn sẽeg tãmsa zutu, wala piis sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩma. La Naaba-Wẽnd yeelame: b ka le tar Soaal ye, la rẽ yĩng bɩ ned kam fãa leb a yir ne laafi.»" 
2Chronicles18:17 Israyɛl dĩma yeela Zɩɩda dĩma: «M da ka pĩnd n yeel tɩ nin-kãnga zɩ n togs koɛɛg sẽn noome, dẽnd beed bala?»" 
2Chronicles18:18 T'a Mise yeel: «Maneg-y n kelg Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛga. M yãee Naaba-Wẽnd tɩ b zao b zaoorẽ, tɩ b sõsd-n-taasa fãa yɛs b sɛɛgẽ goabg la rɩtgo." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tɩ Wẽnd soke: ‹Ãnda n na n belg a Akab, Israyɛl dĩma, t'a kẽng Ramot-Galaad n tɩ pa be.› La nin-yend leoka woto, t'a to leok woto." 
2Chronicles18:20 Wakat kãng marsã la yam soab a ye kolg Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, n yeele: ‹Yaa maam n na n belg-a!› Tɩ Wẽnd sok a: ‹Fo na n maana wãna?›" 
2Chronicles18:21 T'a yeele: ‹M na kẽngame, m na n lebga zirẽ-beed zelemde, bãngdba fãa sẽn be ka wã noorẽ.› Tɩ Soaala le yeele: ‹F na belg-a, f na tõog n tudg-a, kẽng la f maan boto!›" 
2Chronicles18:22 A Mise paasame: Goam sɛɛme. Soaala-Wẽnd zoe n ninga zirẽ-beedo bãngdba sẽn be ka wã noorẽ, ad yaa b meng sẽn dat beed ne fooma yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles18:23 Dẽ la a Kenaana biiga a Sedesiyas kolg n wẽ a Mise noore n yetẽ: «Naaba-Wẽnd yam tũu so bʋgo n bas maam n lɛɛg n kẽ foom?» 
2Chronicles18:24 T'a Mise yeele: «F na bãng rẽ raar ning f sẽn wat n zoe n soonde, f zaka ro-likẽ.»" 
2Chronicles18:25 Israyɛl dĩma kõo no-kãnga: «Yõk-y bãngd, a Mise, n tɩ kɩs tẽnga kombere, Amon tẽnga naba, la na-biiga a Zowas." 
2Chronicles18:26 Y na yeel-ba: ‹Dĩma koɛɛg la woto: Sui-y nin-kãnga bi-bees roogo, n kõt a bur la koom bala, n gũud m sẽn na n lɛɛg n wa ne laafi.› »" 
2Chronicles18:27 T'a Mise yeel-a: «F sã n lɛɛg n wa ne laafi, dẽnd Soaala-Wẽnd ka gom ne mam noor ye.»" 
2Chronicles18:28 Israyɛl dĩma ne Zɩɩda dĩm a Zozafat, kẽnga zabre, Galaad-Ramot." 
2Chronicles18:29 Ad Israyɛl dĩma sẽn yeel a Zozafat: «Mam na n teema m fut n kẽng zabrã, la yãmba, bɩ y yeelg y fuugu.» Israyɛl dĩma sɩd teema futu tɩ b kẽng zabre." 
2Chronicles18:30 Aram dĩma yaool n da kõ-la a bilim-bilm nanams no-kãnga: «Da kaoog-y zabre ne nin-naaba bɩ ne talg ye, kaoog-y zabre ne Israyɛl dĩma bala.»" 
2Chronicles18:31 Bilim-bilm nanamse sẽn yãend a Zozafat, b yeelame: «Yaa Israyɛl dĩma,» la woto wã b fãa wẽnemdame n tees yẽnda. A Zozafat kelmame, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd wa sõng-a n tall-a n zãage." 
2Chronicles18:32 Nanamsa sẽn bãng tɩ ka Israyɛl dĩma, b loogame n bas-a." 
2Chronicles18:33 Dao a ye n waa n yãag a tãpo n tão yaare tɩ yõk Israyɛl dĩma kuta fuug sogb zĩiga. Dĩma yeela sẽn tata bilim-bilma wiidã: «Wẽnemd tɩ m yi zabra sʋka, tɩ m paama sãmpogre.»" 
2Chronicles18:34 Zabra wɩnga wakat kãnga. Israyɛl dĩma kell n yalsa yĩngri a bilim-bilm pʋga, n ta zaabre, n get Aramsã, la wĩndg sẽn lʋɩ, a kiime." 
2Chronicles19:1 Sã n yaa a Zozafat, yẽ leba a tẽngẽ n ka tol n pogl ye." 
2Chronicles19:2 Bãngd a Anani biig a Yewu n yi n seg dĩma n yeel-a: «Yɛ la yãmb yãe tɩ b sõngd nin-yaalga? Bõe tɩ y na n nong sẽn kis-b Wẽnde, n tak Wẽnd beem y zugu?" 
2Chronicles19:3 Bũmb la b yãe yãmb nẽngẽ sẽn ya sõmbo; yãmb yiisa ra-peesdi wã fãa sẽn da be tẽnga pʋga la y sũur yaa ned sẽn baood Wẽnd sũuri.» 
2Chronicles19:4 A Zozafat yalsa Zerizalɛɛm bilfu, la dẽ poore a yi n saag n gesa a nebã, sẽn sɩng Beerseba n ta Efrayim tãnga. La yaa sẽn na n le tall-ba n wa b yaab rãmb Wẽnda nengẽ, Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ." 
2Chronicles19:5 A ninga bʋ-kaoodb tãnsoben-tẽnsẽ la tẽns a taaba pʋga. 
2Chronicles19:6 A yeel-b-la woto: «Bãng-y y tʋʋmna võore tɩ ka ninsaal yĩng la y kaood bʋʋdo, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, la b bee ne yãmba y bʋʋda wakato." 
2Chronicles19:7 Dẽ yĩnga zoe-y Soaala-Wẽnd wʋsgo. Tũ-y noorã, deeg-y y vɩɩma pʋgẽ, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ka sak zãmbo, b ka sak a zagl yɩɩda a zagl ye, b ka rat tɩ b reeg kũuni tɩ bʋʋda tũ rẽ n kedb ye.»" 
2Chronicles19:8 A Zozafat ninga maan-kʋʋdb Zerizalɛɛm, n ning Levitse la sags kãsem-dãmba. Bãmb n da wilgd sẽn toge la b paasd zaba. B ra bee Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles19:9 A Zozafat yeela bãmb me: «Tʋm-y tʋʋma woto, n zoet Soaala-Wẽnde, la y maand pʋ-peelem la y gãd rẽ y sũurẽ zãnga." 
2Chronicles19:10 Koɛɛg ning fãa y saam-biisa sẽn na n tall n wa y nengẽ: yaa zɩɩm la b rat n daag n dole, yaa no-koeemde, noora poorẽ, saglsa poorẽ, dog-n-mika poorẽ, bɩ y vẽneg-ba, tɩ b ra beeg Naaba-Wẽnd ye la woto b sũura kõn yik ne tõndo la y saam-biisa ye la yãmb me kõn dɩ taal ye." 
2Chronicles19:11 A Amariya, maan-kʋʋdba kãsma, n na n lʋɩ y taoore, n leok-y sẽn segd la sẽn pa segd ne Naaba-Wẽnde. Sã n ya sẽn get dĩma yelle na n yila a Zebadiya, a Yismayɛl biiga, sɩmand naaba. Levitsa n na n sõng-y ne gʋlsgo. Da reem-y ye, tũ-y m sẽn wilga fãa. Wẽnd na zĩnd ne ned ning fãa sẽn baood neere!»" 
2Chronicles20:1 Dẽ sẽn looge, Moabitsã la Amonitsã, ne Maonitsã waa n yika zabre ne a Zozafat." 
2Chronicles20:2 B waa n togsa a Zozafat woto: «Zãma ka tɛk n yi mogra rʋʋnde la Edom, n wat n na n tak zabre ne foo. Marsã b taa Asasõ-Tamar, dat n yeelame tɩ En-Gedi.»" 
2Chronicles20:3 Rabeem yõka a Zozafat t'a na n yõk Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛga. A yiisa a koɛɛga, a yeela Zɩɩda tõre tɩ b loe noore." 
2Chronicles20:4 Zɩɩda rãmb fãa tigma taab n na n yõk Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛga. Tẽng fãa sẽn be Zɩɩda yiisa a neb tɩ b wa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles20:5 B sẽn waa n naag Zerizalɛɛm dãmbã, a Zozafat yaasa yɩng zãong paalga taoore," 
2Chronicles20:6 n yeele: «Naaba-Wẽnd, d yaab rãmb Wẽnde, ka yãmb n so bʋ-zẽmba fãa rĩunda bɩ? Pãng la tõog be-la y nugẽ. Ned ka be n kolg yãmb ye." 
2Chronicles20:7 Ka yãmb la tõnd Wẽnd bɩ, ka yãmb n dig a Israyɛl taoore tẽn-kãnga pipi soaalba bɩ? Yãmb pa rɩk-a n kõ y sẽn nong b rãmba, a Abraam yagens bɩ?" 
2Chronicles20:8 B kẽe tẽn-kãnga, n me roogo y yʋʋr yĩnga, la b yetẽ:" 
2Chronicles20:9 ‹Yell sa n pak do, zabre, sɩbgre, bã-longdem, kom, d na wa y taoore la y rooga taoore, tɩ y zĩndga y meng a pʋgẽ. D yɩɩra pʋga d na tees-y n kelem, y na wʋme la y na fãag-do.›" 
2Chronicles20:10 Ges-y Amonitsã, Moabitsã, Seyir tãng zug rãmbã. Yãmb ka bas t'a Israyɛl sãam-ba, a sẽn wa n yi Ezipt n watẽ ye. A lakame n bas-ba, n ka sɩɩs-b ye." 
2Chronicles20:11 Ges-y b sẽn don b sõm to-to, n wat n na n yiis tõnd y sẽn kõ-d soolem ninga pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles20:12 Soaala, y ka na n kao d bʋʋdo n fãagd-d nin-bãmba sẽn ka be tɛka nugẽ, tɩ b waa n na n zaba ne-do? Tõnd ka mi d sẽn na n maneg ye. Woto wã yãmb bal la d geta.»" 
2Chronicles20:13 Zɩɩda neba fãa, b pagb la b kom-bõones ra yɛsa Soaala-Wẽnd taoore." 
2Chronicles20:14 Soaala-Wẽnd vẽnega a Yaaziyɛl, a Zakari biiga la a Benaya yagenga. A Benaya ba la a Yeyiyɛl, a Yeyiyɛl ba la a Mataniya, Levitga la a Asaf biiga." 
2Chronicles20:15 A tãsame: «Kelg yã, yãmb fãa Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, la yãmba, dĩm a Zozafat, ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga: ‹Da zoe-y rabeem ye, da yɛɛs-y zãma kãsenga taoor ye. Ka yãmb n so zabra ye, yaa Naaba-Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles20:16 Beoog bɩ y sig n seg y bɛɛbã. Yaa puuda kunkubra sor la b rɩk yã. Y na seg-b sudga noorẽ, Yeruwɛl weoogẽ." 
2Chronicles20:17 Ka zabr la y na n zab ye. Yals-y bala, tong-y bala la y na yãend fãagr ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn segl Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm yĩnga. Da zoe-y rabeem ye. Da yɛɛs-y ye, yi-y beoogo n seg-ba, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na zĩnd ne yã.› »" 
2Chronicles20:18 A Zozafat wõgemdame n kɩ a neng tẽnga. Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba me wõgemdame n waoog Naaba-Wẽnde. 
2Chronicles20:19 Levitsa, a Keyat la a Kore yagense, sɩnga Soaala-Wẽnd pẽgre ne b koees pãng tɛka." 
2Chronicles20:20 B sãda beoogo n dɩk Tekoa we-raooga sore. B sẽn waa n looda, a Zozafat yaasa yĩngr n yeele: «Kelg-y-ma, Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba. Da yi-y Naaba-Wẽnd poorẽ tɩ y na tilge. Tẽ-y bãngdba sẽn togsã tɩ y yɛl na baas neere.»" 
2Chronicles20:21 A reng n yẽsa ne zãma wã, la tãb-biisa taoore, a lʋɩɩsa Naaba-Wẽnd yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sẽn da yeelg b tʋʋmda fu-sõma n tar b pẽgre. B ra yetame: «Pẽg-y Naaba-Wẽnd, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye.»" 
2Chronicles20:22 B sẽn waa n pʋt b pẽgr la b sũ-noog yɩɩla, Wẽnd lobga sẽeg-taab yam, Amonitsã, Moabitsã la Seyir tãnga zug rãmba." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amonitsã la Moabitsã yika zabre ne Edomitsa, Seyir tãnga zug rãmbã, la b kʋ-b-la zãnga n pa tol n kees ned ye. Amonitsa la Moabitsa me lɛɛg n kẽe taaba n kʋ taaba." 
2Chronicles20:24 B sẽn ta we-raoog noore t'a Zozafat dʋ kunkubr n na n gese, ad-a sẽn yãende: yaa sẽn ki n dɩg bala. B pa yãe sẽn põs ye." 
2Chronicles20:25 A Zozafat waa ne a nebã n zɛ-ba. B yãee rũms ka tɛka, lagdo, futu, la sãnem teedo. B waa n wʋkame tɩ yaa n loog b zɩɩbo. Te-zɛɛdma sẽn da labs yĩngã, dasem a tã tõre la b zõond ne b wʋkre. Ne rẽ fãa b pa tõog n sɛ ye." 
2Chronicles20:26 Daar a naas soaba, b tigma taab Beraka bãg-faagẽ. B pẽga Soaala-Wẽnd be, b pʋʋs-b-la barka la yaa rẽ yĩng la b boond zĩiga tɩ pẽgr la bark puusg zĩiga, n ta ne rũnna." 
2Chronicles20:27 Zɩɩda ne Bẽnzame neba lɛɛga ne sũ-noogo n wa Zerizalɛɛm. A Zozafat da kẽnda b taoore. Wẽnd deega b bɛɛba sũ-noogo n kõ bãmba. 
2Chronicles20:28 B sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm, b kẽe wẽnd doogẽ wã tɩ kola wẽedẽ, tɩ ruuds wãagdẽ, tɩ tõntõod peebdẽ." 
2Chronicles20:29 Dabeem kãseng yõka tẽnsa fãa b sẽn waa n wʋm tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd meng b toore n da tak zabre ne a Israyɛl bɛɛbã. 
2Chronicles20:30 A Zozafat rɩɩ a naam ne bãane. Wẽnd kõ-a-la laafi ne a yagse. 
2Chronicles20:31 A Zazafat dɩɩ naam Zɩɩda. A ra tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a nu a sẽn waa n lebg dĩma, la a rɩɩ a naama yʋʋm pisi la a nu Zerizalɛɛm. A ma la a Azuba, a Sili biiga." 
2Chronicles20:32 A tũ-la a ba, a Asa, vɩɩm n ka bʋdg ye, n maand sẽn ya neere Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ." 
2Chronicles20:33 Wẽn-naandsa ka wã zãng ye, woto zãma wã sũur ka tõog n kẽ b ba rãmb Wẽnda zãng ye." 
2Chronicles20:34 A Zozafat vɩɩma, a sɩngre n ta a baasgo, fãa gʋlsa a Anani biig a Yewu tʋʋma sebrẽ, seb kãng pʋgẽ la b gʋls Israyɛl dĩm dãmba kibare." 
2Chronicles20:35 A Zozafat waa n yik n tɩ yõga zoodo ne Israyɛl dĩm a Akaziyas, la yẽ n tus-a t'a maan wẽnga." 
2Chronicles20:36 A naag-a lame n maan koom-kogend sẽn na n tʋgd Tarsis. Yaa Esiõ-Gebɛr la b maan-ba. 
2Chronicles20:37 Maresa dao a Dodava biig a Eliezɛr, yiisa bãngr goam beed a Zozafat poorẽ. «Fo sẽn tɩ yõg zood ne a Akaziyas yĩngã, Naaba-Wẽnd wurga f tʋʋm sõma wã lalga.» Kogenda fãa wãame, b pa tõog n loog Tarsis ye." 
2Chronicles21:1 A Zozafat kiime. B mum-a-la a saamb a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. A biig a Zoram n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles21:2 A Zoram yaopa, dĩm a Zozafat kamba, yɩ-la a Azariya, a Yeyiyɛl, a Zakari, a Azariya, a Mikayɛl, la a Sefatiya." 
2Chronicles21:3 B ba a Zozafat ra kõ-b-la ligd naoor yaka, n kõ-b sãnem, wanzurfu, fan teedo, tãnsoben-tẽns sẽn be Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ; naama la a bas n kõ a Zoram, tɩ yẽ la kãsma." 
2Chronicles21:4 A Zoram deega naama, la a naama sẽn waa n paam pãnga, a kooda a yaopa fãa ne Israyɛl taoor dãmb kẽere." 
2Chronicles21:5 A sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoorã t'a tara yʋʋm pis-tã la a yiibu. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a nii Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles21:6 A togsa Israyɛl dĩm dãmba vɩɩm. A maana waa a Akab, t'a ra yii kãadem ne a Akab bi-pugla. A maana sẽn ka ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam." 
2Chronicles21:7 Baasgo Naaba-Wẽnd ka tʋlg n wãa a Daviid doogo, tɩ b ra yõga zood ne a Daviid, la b ra kãab-a lame tɩ wakat buud fãa fitil na widgi, yẽ yĩnga la a kamb yĩnga." 
2Chronicles21:8 Yaa yẽ zãmaanẽ la Edom yi a Zɩɩda soolmẽ; a bao dĩm n kõ a menga. 
2Chronicles21:9 A Zoram gãndga a Edom toaaga ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba la a bilim-bilm gilli. A yika ne yʋngo, n pãb Edom tãb-biisa sẽn da gũbg-a. A tõoga bilim-bilma tãnsoaben-dãmba." 
2Chronicles21:10 Dẽ tɛka Edomitsa fʋsg yi-la a Zɩɩda soolmẽ, n ta ne rũnna. Yaa wakat kãng me la Libna fʋsg n yi a soolmẽ. La rẽ yaa a Zoram sẽn da bas Naaba-Wẽnd, a ba-rãmb Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles21:11 Yẽ n wa ne wẽn-naandsa waoogre Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. Yẽ n kɩt tɩ Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda rãmb wɩɩbe. 
2Chronicles21:12 Bãngd a Eli waa n tool-a-la sebr a ye. Sebra ra yetame: «Ad Naaba-Wẽnd, f ba a Daviid Wẽnda koɛɛga: Fo sẽn pa tũ f ba a Zozafat la Zɩɩda dĩm a Asa nao," 
2Chronicles21:13 n yaool n tũ Israyɛl dĩm dãmba, f sẽn kɩt t'a Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba wɩɩbe, wala a Akab roogo, f sẽn kʋ f yaopa, f ba-biisã sẽn da são fooma," 
2Chronicles21:14 rẽ fãa yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd na n sɩbg-f-la ne sɩbgr kãsenga," 
2Chronicles21:15 foo ne f nebã, f kamba, f pagba, f sẽn tar fãa. Fo meng na n bẽe bã-toose, na n yɩɩ pʋg roog bãaga la f na wʋba f yãada zãnga.»" 
2Chronicles21:16 Soaala-Wẽnd tusa Filisti rãmba, Arabsã, Nubi rãmbã tɩ b maan zabre ne a Zoram." 
2Chronicles21:17 B waa n wẽe Zɩɩda, n tõog-a, n wʋk dĩma zak teedo ne a kamba, la a pagba. A kamba yao-zʋʋg bala, a Akaziyas, n põse." 
2Chronicles21:18 Dẽ sẽn looge, Naaba-Wẽnd lob-a-la pʋg-roog bãag sẽn ka tɩɩm ye." 
2Chronicles21:19 Bãaga kaoosa sẽn yɩɩd yʋʋmde. Sẽn maan yʋʋm a yi, a wakat sẽn ta, a wʋba a yãadã, n nams wʋsgo, n ki. B pa yõog tɩdar a yĩng wala b sẽn maan a ba wã kaalmẽ ye." 
2Chronicles21:20 A Zoram sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoore t'a yʋʋm yaa pistã la a yiibu; a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a nii Zerizalɛɛm. A loogame tɩ ned ba a ye ka yãb-a ye. B mum-a-la a Daviid na-tẽngẽ la pa yɩ dĩm dãmba yaadẽ ye. 
2Chronicles22:1 Zerizalɛɛm dãmb dʋʋsa a Zoram biig, a Akaziyas, zaoorẽ. Yẽ la a kamba yao zʋʋga. Arabsa n da waa n kẽ Zɩɩda n kʋ a kẽem dãmba fãa. Yɩɩ woto la a Zoram biig a Akaziyas lebg Zɩɩda dĩma." 
2Chronicles22:2 A sẽn waa n dʋʋd zaoorã t'a yʋʋm yaa pisi. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋmd Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame tɩ Atali. A Atali ba la a Omri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Yẽ me togsa a Akab rooga vɩɩm, a ma sagl wẽnsa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles22:4 A maana sẽn ka ta Soaala-Wẽnd yãm wala a Akab roogo. A ba kũuma poore, nin-wẽnsa sagl-a lame n kẽes moogo." 
2Chronicles22:5 A tũ-la b saglse n kẽng ne a Zoram, Israyɛl dĩm a Akab biiga, n tɩ zab ne Aramsa dĩma, a Azayɛl, Galaad-Ramot. Aramsa pogla a Zoram." 
2Chronicles22:6 Yaa Zizreyɛl la a lɛɛg n wa n na n tɩp sãmpogrã a sẽn paam Ramot, a sẽn waa n zabd ne Aramsa dĩm, Azayɛl. A Zoram biiga a Akaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, waa Israyɛl n na n ges a Zoram, a Akab biigã, t'a ra ka keem ye."
