2Chronicles22:7 Naaba-Wẽnd kɩtame t'a Zoram gesga wa ne a Akaziyas kũum. Ade, a taa a Zoram nengẽ tɩ b yi n na n zab ne a Zewu, a Nimsi biiga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ naam, t'a na n sɛɛs a Akab buudu." 
2Chronicles22:8 A Zewu sɩd da baood n na n menesa a Akab roogo, a sega Zɩɩda tãnsoaben-dãmbã, a Akaziyas kẽem dãmba kambã, la a sõgen-kamba. A kʋ-b lame." 
2Chronicles22:9 A kɩtame tɩ b bao a Akaziyas. A Akaziyas ra kẽe Samari n na n soonde la b yõk-a lame n wa kɩs a Zewu t'a kʋ-a. B mum-a lame n yetẽ: «Yaa a Zozafat biiga, ned sẽn da baood Soaala-Wẽnd ne a sũur fãa, biiga.» Ned ka kees a Akaziyas roogẽ sẽn da tõe n dɩ naam ye." 
2Chronicles22:10 A Akaziyas ma, a Atali, sẽn wʋm a biiga kũum, a me baoome n na n wã Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb roogo." 
2Chronicles22:11 Dĩma bi-pugla, a Zoseba, solga a Akaziyas biiga a Zowas, b sẽn wa n kʋʋd a kẽem-dãmbã. A solg-a lame, yẽ ne a ma wubdga, gãag roog a ye pʋga, wẽnd doogẽ. Yɩɩ woto la a Atali ka paam-a n kʋ ye. A Zoseba da yaa maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada paga, n leb n ya Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoram bi-pugla la a Akaziyas tão." 
2Chronicles22:12 A Zowas paam n solga yʋʋm a yoobe, wẽnd doogẽ, ne sẽn tʋlg-ba n fãag a yõorã. Dẽ t'a Atali n lebg dĩm poaka." 
2Chronicles23:1 Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, a Zoyada baoo yella tɩɩm. A kɩtame tɩ b tɩ bool neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba: a Azariya, a Yeroam biiga, n paas a Yismayɛl, a Zoana biiga, n paas a Obɛd biiga a Azariya, n paas a Adaya biiga a Maaseya, n paas a Zikri biig a Elisafat, la b yẽsame n zems taaba." 
2Chronicles23:2 B saaga Zɩɩda tõre n bool Levitsa la buud kãsem-dãmba; fãa waa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles23:3 La b fãa wẽename tɩ b na n pʋga rĩm biiga poore, la yaa Wẽnd dooga pʋga la b wẽen dẽnna. A Zoyada yeelame: «Ad dĩma biiga. Bɩ a rɩ naam wala Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn kãab a Daviid kamba." 
2Chronicles23:4 Ad-y y sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga. Y na n weela sags a tãabo, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã, sẽn na n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ, vʋʋsga raar pʋʋsg yĩnga, bãmb kẽer n na n lebg dagno-gũudbã." 
2Chronicles23:5 Bãmb kẽer na n paa dĩma zakẽ, tɩ kẽer pa gũudba rota noore, tɩ zãma wã fãa pa wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ." 
2Chronicles23:6 Ned ba a ye ra saag n kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋga sã n ka maan-kʋʋdbã la Levitsã sẽn so b tʋʋna baraare, tɩ b welga toor rẽ yĩnga. Bãmb yẽ tõe n kẽeme. Zãma wã na n tedgame n gilgi." 
2Chronicles23:7 Levitsa na n gũbga dĩma, tɩ ned kam fãa zãad a zab teedo, b na n yãaga dĩma a sẽn dabd zĩig ninga fãa. Sẽn kɩɩsa n kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋg bɩ b kʋ-a.»" 
2Chronicles23:8 Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada sẽn yals bũmb ningã, Zɩɩda rãmba deega fãa. Sẽn baasd-b tʋʋmde wala sẽn da sɩngd-bã, fãa yalsa b sẽn yet tɩ b yals zĩig ninga tɩ maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada ka bak ned ba a ye n bas ye." 
2Chronicles23:9 A kõo tãb-biisa kãna, gãndo, bɛd la bõonego, a Daviid dẽnna sẽn da be Wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles23:10 A tonga zãma wã, ned kam fãa ne a zab teed a nugẽ. B tonga pipi gõdrã nug rɩtgo n tãag nug goabg gõdrã. B gũbga maan-kugrã ne wẽnd dooga, n bas dĩma a zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles23:11 B yaoolame marsã n yiis dĩma biiga, n fõgneg-a naam pugla, n kõ-a naam. A lebga dĩma. A Zoyada ne a kamba pʋdga kaam a zugu. Dẽ poore b tãsame tɩ sãde: «Wẽnd na kõ dĩma yõore!»" 
2Chronicles23:12 A Atali wʋma zãma wã sẽn kilsd la a kaasd dĩma, t'a na n kolg Naaba-Wẽnd roogã." 
2Chronicles23:13 A sẽn yãend dĩma t'a yɛs yĩngr, wẽnd dooga noore, a sẽn yãend nanamsa la tõntõodã dĩma sɛɛgẽ, a sẽn yãend zãma wã t'a kɩdemnẽ la a peebd tõntõodo, a sẽn yãend yɩɩn-yɩɩndba ne b yʋʋm teedo tɩ b putẽ la b reesd yɩɩlã, a Atali kẽesa a futu n yetẽ: «Zãmbo, zãmbo!»" 
2Chronicles23:14 Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada yiisa tãb-biisa ne b nanamse. A yeel-b lame: «Yiis-y paga, a Atali, yɩnga, la ned sã n kẽed a tãpẽ, bɩ b kʋ-a.» Maan-kʋʋda ra yeelame: «Da kʋ-y paga wẽnd dooga pʋg ye.»" 
2Chronicles23:15 A sẽn ta dĩma yiri b yõk-a-la wiida noorẽ, n kʋ." 
2Chronicles23:16 A Zoyada yalsa ne nebã la dĩma tɩ b na n modgame n yɩ Naaba-Wẽnd neba. 
2Chronicles23:17 B tũu taaba n dʋ a Baal wẽnd doogã, n wãa-a zãnga. B sarma a maan-kugã, a wẽn-naandsã; b kʋ-la a Baal maan-kʋʋdã, a Matã." 
2Chronicles23:18 A Zoyada gũnuga wẽnd doogã a Levi maan-kʋʋdbã. Yaa bãmb la a Daviid da kõ wẽnd doogã wala b pʋɩɩre, tɩ b na n tõog n kõ yũ-nood maando, wala sẽn gʋls a Moyiiz noora sebrẽ la b yɩɩla ne sũ-noogo wala a Daviid sẽn da rate." 
2Chronicles23:19 Wẽnd dooga noyẽ, a ninga gũudba, sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ nin-dẽgd da tõog n kẽ ye." 
2Chronicles23:20 A boola tãb-biisa nanamse, nin-bɛda sẽn da tar-b naam buud fãa la zãma wã la b yisa dĩma wẽnd doogẽ. B kẽe dĩma zakẽ. B tũu tẽnsʋk noorã. B tɩ zĩndg-a-la a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles23:21 Neba fãa ra kɩdemda sũ-noogo la tẽnga pa kaoog ye. Sã n yaa a Atali, b kʋ-a-la ne sʋʋga." 
2Chronicles24:1 A Zowas sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoorẽ t'a tara yʋʋm a yopoe. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-naas Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame tɩ Sibiya, yaa Beerseba tẽng paga." 
2Chronicles24:2 Maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada vɩɩma wẽnde, a Zowas maana sẽn tat Naaba-Wẽnd yam." 
2Chronicles24:3 Maan-kʋʋda sõng-a lame t'a yi kãadem ne pabg a yiibu n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli. 
2Chronicles24:4 A waa n tʋlgame n le maneg wẽnd doogã. 
2Chronicles24:5 A tigsa maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã n yeel-ba: «Kẽ-y Zɩɩda tẽnse, n dees ligd Israyɛl kamba nengẽ, n wa maneg wẽnd doogã, wala sẽn tog, yʋʋmd fãa. Maan-y tao-tao.» Levitsa yaool n ka maan yãgb ye." 
2Chronicles24:6 Woto wã dĩma boola a Zoyada, bãmb kãsma, n yeele: «Bõe tɩ f pa wilg Levitsa vẽenega tɩ b wa ne yaood ninga, Zɩɩda tẽnse la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb sẽn da tog n kɩs tɩ b maneg zood kaseta sẽn da bĩngd roog ning pʋgẽ wã, wala a Moyiiz, Wẽnd sõgna, la Israyɛl kambã sẽn da naag taab n yalsã?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Pʋg-yoog, a Atali, ne a kamba wegmame n bas-a t'a sãame. B tol n kẽe Soaala-Wẽnd roogẽ n yiis te-sõma wã b wẽn-yooda yĩnga!»" 
2Chronicles24:8 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b maan koglgo n dɩgl wẽnd dooga dignoorẽ. 
2Chronicles24:9 B moona Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽns a taaba, tɩ b tog n wa kõo Soaala-Wẽnde, b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz sẽn da yals yaood ning we-raoogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles24:10 Taoor dãmbã la zãma wã waa ne sũ-noogo, n lob koglga pʋga b sẽn da tog n kɩs fãa." 
2Chronicles24:11 B sẽn waa n na n dɩk koglgã n tɩ kɩs dĩma, ligd naaba yãeeme tɩ ligda yaa wʋsgo. Dĩma sɛb gʋlsdba sõnga taab n dɩk-a n tɩ vaage n le tall-a n wa rɩgle. B maana woto beoog-beoog fãa la b paama ligd wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles24:12 Dĩma ne a Zoyada rɩka ligdã n kɩs wẽnd doog tʋʋma naaba. Tʋʋm-tʋmdba, tãn-metba, ra-wãadba sɩnga wẽnd dooga manegre. Sãaba la yõgsa me waa n sɩngame." 
2Chronicles24:13 Tʋʋmda kẽnga tao tao tʋʋm-tʋmdba nugẽ. B kell n manega wẽnd doogã n paas a pãnga la a woglma ka paase, a yalma me ka teem ye." 
2Chronicles24:14 B sẽn tʋm n sɛ, b lebsa dĩma la a Zoyada ligda sẽn kellã. Woto wã b paam n maana teed wẽnd dooga yĩnga: zɩ-mesdem laase, sãnem la wanzurf lagd a taaba. A Zoyada vɩɩma tõre b tõoga beoog fãa n kʋ maand wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles24:15 A Zoyada waa n kʋʋlame. A paama yõ-woko n yaool n ki. A paama yʋʋm koabga la pis-tã. 
2Chronicles24:16 B mum-a-la ne dĩm dãmba a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. La rẽ yaa a sẽn maan neer ne Israyɛl Wẽnd la b roogo. 
2Chronicles24:17 A Zoyada kũum poore, Zɩɩda tãnsoaben-dãmba waa n wõgemda dĩma taoore la dĩma yaa n sak n kelga b koɛɛga." 
2Chronicles24:18 Zɩɩda rãmb basa b ba rãmb Wẽnda roogo, n saad n waoogd ra-peesdi la nin-naandse. Dẽ yɩɩ wẽng sẽn yik Naaba-Wẽnd sũuri, n wa ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm wãabo." 
2Chronicles24:19 Baasgo Naaba-Wẽnd kõ-b-la norɛɛs sẽn na n sõng-b tɩ b lɛɛg n kẽ bãmba. La Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas b koees niynsã b zãgsa kelgre. 
2Chronicles24:20 Naaba-Wẽnd waa n vẽnega maan-kʋʋd a Zoyada biiga a Zakari. A sẽn yals zãma wã taoore a yeelame: «Ad Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn sokde: ‹Bõe tɩ y namsd y mens zaalem n tõdgd Naaba-Wẽnd noore? Bãng-y tɩ yaa yãmb sẽn bas Naaba-Wẽndã la bãmb me bas yãmba.› » 
2Chronicles24:21 Dẽ la b yik zabr ne-a, tɩ dĩma tol n kõ noor tɩ b lab-a ne kuga Wẽnd sɩmannẽ." 
2Chronicles24:22 Dĩm a Zowas yĩma sõm ning a Zakari ba a Zoyada sẽn da maan-a. A kʋ-la a Zakari, la a sẽn waa n kiidẽ, a yeelame: «Wẽnd neeme la b na soke.»" 
2Chronicles24:23 Yʋʋmd sẽn vẽke, Aram dãmb kaooga tãpo ne a Zowas. B sẽn poog Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm, b kooda tãnsoaben-dãmb fãa n dees b laogo n tool Damas dĩma." 
2Chronicles24:24 Sã n ya sɩda tɩ Aram dãmba da waa ne neb bilfr bala, yaa sɩd me tɩ yaa neb ka tɛka la Naaba-Wẽnd ning b nugẽ. La rẽ yaa b sẽn bas Naaba-Wẽnd, b yaab rãmb Wẽndã. Yaa a yel-manesem la Aram dãmba dol a Zowas." 
2Chronicles24:25 A ra gãee n bẽeda bã-toogo tɩ Aram dãmba loog n bas-a la yẽ meng sõgen-kamb n yɩk n kʋ-a, a gãag zugu, n dok b sũuri, a sẽn da kɩt tɩ b lab a Zoyada biig a Zakari yĩnga. A Zowas sẽn ki, b mum-a-la a Daviid na-tẽngẽ la pa yɩ dĩm dãmba yaadẽ ye." 
2Chronicles24:26 Neb niyns sẽn naag taab n sed a kũuma yɩɩ Amonitga a Simeat biig a Zabad, n paas Moabit poak a Simrit biig a Zozabad." 
2Chronicles24:27 A Zowas kamba kibare, a sẽn yaoolg neba to-to, a sẽn maneg wẽnd doogã, dẽ fãa gʋlsa dĩm dãmba vɩɩma sebrẽ. A biiga a Amaziyas n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles25:1 A Amaziyas yʋʋm pida pisi la a nu t'a yaool n deeg naam la yaa yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ la a rɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame tɩ Zoadã la a ma wã roga Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles25:2 A Amaziyas maana taa Naaba-Wẽnd yam. Baasgo d ka tõe n yeel t'a maana pʋ-peelem zãng ye. 
2Chronicles25:3 A naama sẽn waa n paam pãnga, a kʋʋ neb niyns sẽn da yãk a ba wã yõore." 
2Chronicles25:4 A yaool n pa kʋ b kamb ye tɩ gʋlsa Noora pʋgẽ, a Moyiiz sɛba pʋgẽ, sebr ning a sẽn da paam Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ. Ad sebra sẽn da yete: «Ba rãmb ka tog n ki b kamb beegr yĩng ye, kamba me ka tog n ki b ba-rãmb beegr yĩng ye; f kũum tũuda f meng beegre.»" 
2Chronicles25:5 A Amaziyas tigma Zɩɩda rãmb gilli, n tigim b sak-saka, n kõ-b neb tusr la neb koabg tãnsoaben-dãmba, a Zɩɩda wala a Bẽnzame. A sõda sẽn da tar-b yʋʋm pisi bɩ yɩɩd rẽ la a paama neb sẽn ta tus kobs-tã la yaa zab-mitb sẽn tõe n zẽk kãnd la gãongo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Israyɛl pʋgẽ a yãee gãndaad tus koabga, n yao wanzurf zɩslem sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo n kẽes-ba a tãpẽ." 
2Chronicles25:7 Wẽnd norɛɛs a ye yaool n wa yeel-a lame: «Ad-y pa tog ye, dĩma, tɩ Israyɛl tãb-biis wa naag yãmb ye, tɩ Israyɛl la Efrayim ned fãa, Soaala-Wẽnd lak n bas-a lame." 
2Chronicles25:8 B sã n naag foo, ba f modgda, ba f zabd ne raoodo, Soaala-Wẽnd kõn sõng-f tɩ f ka lʋɩ f bɛɛba nugẽ ye. Naaba-Wẽnd b ye tãa n tõe n sõnge la bãmb me n tõe n bas tɩ lʋɩ.»" 
2Chronicles25:9 Dẽ la a Amaziyas leok norɛɛsã: «La m wanzurfa sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩba, ãnda n na n lebs-ma?» T'a yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnd tõe n kõo foo tɩ yɩɩg rẽ wɛ!»" 
2Chronicles25:10 Neb niyns sẽn da yit Efrayim tẽn-peelmẽ wã, a Amaziyas welg-b-la ne a nebã n lebs-ba, b tẽngẽ, tɩ b sũur kɛɛda." 
2Chronicles25:11 A Amaziyas yii ne nebã n tɩ tak zabre. Yaa Yamsem bãg-faaga la a tũ yã. Neb tus piig la a tõog Seyir. 
2Chronicles25:12 Zɩɩda kamba talla b sẽn yõg b rãmba n dʋ pĩig sẽn lugi n tus b tɩ b lʋɩ n bõgse. 
2Chronicles25:13 Sã n ya ne neb niyns a Amaziyas sẽn pa reeg a tãpẽ tɩ b lɛɛg n leb b tẽngẽ wã, ad-y b tɩ kẽe Zɩɩda ne Samari tẽnse la Bɛt-Orõ. B sega zab-zabdb sẽn ta tus a tã n tõog-ba la b zɛɛ b zɛɛbo." 
2Chronicles25:14 Zabr sẽn zab ne Seyir dãmb n sɛ, a Amaziyas waa ne Seyir wẽn-naandse; a waoog-b-la wa wẽnd, a wõgemda b taoore la a yõoga wisdu b yĩnga." 
2Chronicles25:15 Dẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd sũur puug ne a Amaziyas tɩ b tʋm bãngd a nengẽ. Bãngda sokame: «Bõe tɩ f pʋgd wẽnd dãmba sẽn ka tõog n fãag b neb fo meng nugẽ?» 
2Chronicles25:16 Bãngda yaasame n le baas n yeele: «M miime tɩ yaa Wẽnd n yẽs b na sãam f yelle la f sẽn ka reeg b saglsã n maan f sẽn maana.» 
2Chronicles25:17 Zɩɩda dĩma, a Amaziyas, rega saglgã n tʋm tɩ b tɩ yeel a Zoakaz biiga, la Israyɛl dĩm a Yewu yagenga a Zowas: «Wa tɩ d wags taaba.»" 
2Chronicles25:18 La Israyɛl dĩm a Zowas leoka a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, koe-kãnga: «Libã yõees-tabda tʋmame tɩ b wa yeel Libã kʋkã: ‹Dɩk f bi-pugla n kõ m biig t'a maan a paga.› Mik Libã we-rũmsa waa n taba yõees-tabdã." 
2Chronicles25:19 Fo yeelame: ‹M tõoga Edom,› n na n maan wilg-m-menga. Pĩnd n pa ne f raoodã f zakẽ. Bõe yĩng la f baood n na n wã f menga la f naag n wã Zɩɩda?»" 
2Chronicles25:20 A Amaziyas pa kelg ye. La yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n wa ne rẽ, n dat n ning b yãnde b sẽn kẽ Edom wẽn-naandsa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles25:21 Israyɛl dĩma, a Zowas, boba zabre. Yẽ ne Zɩɩda dĩm a Amaziyas sega taab Bɛt-Semɛs, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles25:22 Zɩɩda dãmbã n kong raoodo n lɛɛg n zoe a Israyɛl taoore. 
2Chronicles25:23 Sã n yaa a Amaziyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zowas biig la a Akaziyas yagenga, Israyɛl dĩm a Zowas pag-a-la roog Bɛt-Semɛs, n wa yiis-a be n dig Zerizalɛɛm. A luba lal-gũbrã, sẽn sɩng Efrayim noore n ta gõdra noore, kãntɩɩs kobs-naase." 
2Chronicles25:24 A looga ne sãnema fãa, wanzurfã, teeda fãa sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ t'a Obɛd-Edom da gũudẽ, n paas na-yira arzɛka, la yemse, la a leba Samari." 
2Chronicles25:25 Zɩɩda dĩm a Zowas biiga a Amaziyas paa tẽng zug yɛs yʋʋm piig la a nu, a ba a Zowas kũum poore." 
2Chronicles25:26 A Amaziyas kibɛ a taaba, a sɩngre, n tãag a kũum, dẽ fãa pa gʋls Zɩɩda la Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sebrẽ bɩ?" 
2Chronicles25:27 La a Amaziyas sẽn waa n lak n bas Naaba-Wẽnde, b seda a kũum Zerizalɛɛm. A zoe n diga Lakis. La b pʋg-a-la be n yõk n kʋ." 
2Chronicles25:28 B tʋk-a-la ne wiidi la b waa n mum-a-la ne a saam dãmba, a Daviid na-tẽngẽ." 
2Chronicles26:1 Zɩɩda rãmb lagma taaba n yãk a Oziyas n maan b dĩma, a ba a Amaziyas zĩigẽ. A yʋʋm da zemsa piig la a yoobe." 
2Chronicles26:2 Yẽ n le maneg n me Elat la a lebs-a Zɩɩda soolmẽ, a ba kũum poore." 
2Chronicles26:3 A Oziyas sɩnga a naam dɩɩb a yʋʋm piig la a yoobe. A rɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, yʋʋm pis-nu la a yiibu. A ma ra boondame tɩ Yekoliya, a ba yir yaa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles26:4 A maana sẽn ta Wẽnd yam, wala a ba a Amaziyas." 
2Chronicles26:5 A modgame n bao Soaala-Wẽnde, a Zakari vɩɩma tɛka. A Zakari yɩ ned sẽn loog a taab ne Wẽnd nif zoeere. A Oziyas sẽn bao Soaala-Wẽnd wakat ning fãa a yell manegame." 
2Chronicles26:6 A Oziyas tɩ zaba ne Filisti rãmba, n wã Gat lalse, Yabne la Asdod dẽnna. A le maneg n mee tẽns kẽer Asdod sẽnẽ la Filisti rãmb tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles26:7 Naaba-Wẽnd sõng-a-la a zabrẽ ne Filisti rãmba, ne Arabsã, ne Gur-Baal la Mewunitsã." 
2Chronicles26:8 Amonitsa mens yaoo a Oziyas fadgo. A Oziyas pãnga waa n paasa wʋsgo. A yʋʋr yiime n ta Ezipt toaagẽ. 
2Chronicles26:9 A Oziyas mee ro-lug-lug Zerizalɛɛm, gõdra noorẽ, Bãooga noorẽ, la lalsa pẽkẽ. A paasa b pãnga." 
2Chronicles26:10 A mee ro-lug-lug we-raoogẽ, n ning ko-bao ka tɛka, tɩ rũmsa ra yaa wʋsgo. Koaadba ra yaa wʋsgo tẽn-nabrẽ wala tãmsa zutu. Bugsuntunda me ra yaa wʋsgo, tãmsa zut la Karmɛl. A Oziyas ra nonga koobo." 
2Chronicles26:11 A Oziyas tãb-biis ra zãmsa b tʋʋmda neere. B ra bob-n-dõbame, b ra weela sak-saka la a Yeyiyɛl ne a Maaseya da gʋlsa ned kam fãa ne a zĩiga la a tʋʋmde. A Ananiya, dĩma tãnsoab a ye, n da get b yelle." 
2Chronicles26:12 Yaa tãb-biis sẽn tar sũur ne zabre. B sagsa kãsem-dãmba da yaa bãmb tus a yi la kobs-yoobe. 
2Chronicles26:13 Bãmb n da so tãb-biisã sẽn tõe n bob zabrã, bãmb tus kobs-tã la a yopoe la kobs-nu. B ra mii b tʋʋmda neere n tõe n sõng dĩma n zab a bɛɛba." 
2Chronicles26:14 B sã n dabd zabr fãa, a Oziyas ra kõt-b-la gãndo, kãna, kut zug-peto, kut-futu, tãbdo la loob-kuga." 
2Chronicles26:15 Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ a kɩtame tɩ sɩlem-dãmb maan zab-teedo, a ro-lug-luga zutu la lal-gũbra gõdrẽ. Yaa zab-teedo sẽn tõe n tão yɩɩg-yɩɩga la ne pãnga, kãn buudu la kug bɛda. A Oziyas yʋʋra zãaga zĩiga. La rẽ sɩd yɩɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n sõng-a." 
2Chronicles26:16 A sẽn wa n mik t'a pãnga lebga wʋsgo, a maana wilg-m-menga la rẽ n wa ne a sɩbgre. A tar n basa Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaam. A saag n kẽe wẽnd dooga pʋga, n wis tɩdar maan-kugra zugu." 
2Chronicles26:17 A Azariya ne Wẽnd maan-kʋʋdba, nin-tɩrse sẽn ta pis-nii," 
2Chronicles26:18 pa sak ye la b yeela a Oziyas: «Ka yãmba, d dĩm sõngo, n tog n yõog wisd Naaba-Wẽnd taoor ye, yaa maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ kamb sẽn welg toor dẽnna yĩnga. Yi-y wẽnd dooga pʋga tɩ y wɩɩbame, la ziir ninga Wẽnd sẽn kõ yãmb ka le tog ne y ye.»" 
2Chronicles26:19 A Oziyas sũur puugame t'a nan ket n zãad wisda laaga. A sũura sẽn yik ne maan-kʋʋdba n sɛ, la yĩng bãag sẽn puk a rĩirẽ, maan-kʋʋdba taoore, wẽnd dooga pʋga, tɩdar maan-kugra taoore." 
2Chronicles26:20 Maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Azariya ne a tũud-n-taasã yãee yĩnga sẽn puk a rĩirã tɩ b rig-a tao-tao la yẽ meng sakame n yi, a sẽn yãe tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd meng nug n sɩɩs-a." 
2Chronicles26:21 A Oziyas paa ne a bãagã n tãag a kũum. A paa roogẽ, b ka le bas-a t'a kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋg ye. A biig a Zotam n da get a zaka yelle la a soolma me yelle." 
2Chronicles26:22 A Oziyas kibare, a sɩngre n taa a baasgo, bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biigã, n gʋls-a." 
2Chronicles26:22 A Oziyas kibare, a sɩngre n taa a baasgo, bãngd a Izayi, a Amos biigã, n gʋls-a." 
2Chronicles26:23 A Oziyas kiime tɩ b mum-a dĩm dãmb yaad sẽn tuudẽ, la a ka naag ne a saam dãmba ye. B ra yeela woto: «A bẽeda yĩng bãaga.» A biig a Zotam n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles27:1 Zotam sẽn waa n dʋ zaoor t'a yʋʋm yaa pisi la a nu, a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zerizalɛɛm. A ma, a Sadok biiga, da boondame tɩ Yerusa." 
2Chronicles27:2 A maana sẽn ya neer Naaba-Wẽnd nifẽ. A wẽnega a ba a Oziyas. A pa saag n kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋg n tʋm wẽng ye. A neba vɩɩma yaool n da pa lebd Soaala sẽn datẽ ye. 
2Chronicles27:3 A maneg n me wẽnd dooga no-kãsengã, a mee meeb wʋsgo, Ofɛl lalga sẽn tẽeg n kẽngã." 
2Chronicles27:4 A mee tẽns Zɩɩda tãmsa zutu. A ninga tãnsoben-doto la ro-lug-lugi pʋta noore. 
2Chronicles27:5 A zaba ne Amonitsa dĩma, n tõog-a, la yʋʋm kãnga a reega b nengẽ, wanzurf sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo, alkam pet tus piiga, alkam kɛgeng pet tus piiga. Dẽ n yɩ b yaoodo, yʋʋm kãng la yʋʋm a yiibã sẽn pʋg-bã." 
2Chronicles27:6 A Zotam waa n paama pãng wʋsgo. A ra kẽnda neere Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaam taoore." 
2Chronicles27:7 A Zotam vɩɩma kibare, a zaba, a manesem ne dĩm dãmb a taaba, fãa gʋlsa Zɩɩda la Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles27:8 A sɩnga a naama rɩɩb a yʋʋm pisi la a nu la a rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles27:9 A kiime tɩ b mum-a a Daviid na-tẽngẽ. A biiga Akaz n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles28:1 A Akaz sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoora t'a tara yʋʋm pisi. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yoob Zerizalɛɛm. A ka maan sẽn ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam wa a yaab a Daviid ye. 
2Chronicles28:2 Yaa Israyɛl dĩm dãmba vɩɩm la a togs yã. A tol n kɩtame tɩ b rõog Baal dãmba. 
2Chronicles28:3 A yõoga wisdu b yĩnga, Inom bãg-faagẽ. A yõoga a kamb bugum, wala bu-zẽmb niyns Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn dig n zãag a Israyɛl taoorã sẽn da maande." 
2Chronicles28:4 A kʋʋ maando, a yõoga wisd tãmsa zutu, kunkuba zutu la tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem tẽngre." 
2Chronicles28:5 Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaam, dɩk-a lame n sagl Aramsa nugẽ. B yõga neb wʋsgo n tall n kẽng yembd Damas tẽnga. Soaala-Wẽnd bas-a-la Israyɛl dĩma me nugẽ. A konga raood zabrẽ." 
2Chronicles28:6 A Remaliya biig a Peka kʋʋ Zɩɩda rãmb neb tus koabg la pisi raar a ye. Fãa ra yaa zab-mitba la b sẽn pa zabrẽ wã yaa b sẽn lak ne Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles28:7 Efrayim gãndaoog a ye, a Zikri, kʋʋ na-biig a Maaseya, n paas samand naab a Azrikam, la dĩma komber, a Elkana." 
2Chronicles28:8 B yõga Zɩɩda neb tus kobs-yi, pagba, rapa, kom-pugli, kom-dibli. A loga ne teed zembal Samari." 
2Chronicles28:9 Bãngd a ye n da be n boond t'a Odɛd. A yi n sega tãb-biisa Samari noorẽ n yeel-ba: «Ade, Naaba-Wẽnd, yãmb Wẽnnaam, sagla Zɩɩda rãmb y nugẽ, b sũur sẽn puug ne b yĩnga. Yãmb sẽn kʋ-b kʋʋb ninga, saaga meng reeg n wiisdame." 
2Chronicles28:10 Y gomdame tɩ y na n dɩka Zɩɩda kamba n maan y sõgen-kamba. Woto wã ka yãmb meng n dogl yell y zugu Soaala-Wẽnd taoore? 
2Chronicles28:11 Kelg-y m koɛɛga, bas-y y saam-biisã tɩ b soog b mense, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur da yik ne y ye.»" 
2Chronicles28:12 Efrayim kãsem-dãmba kẽer sɩd yika ne sẽn kẽng-b zabr n lɛɛg n watẽ wã. Yaa a Zoana biig a Azariya, a Mesilemot biig a Berekiya, a Salum biig a Yeyizkiya la a Adlayi biig a Amasa." 
2Chronicles28:13 B yeelame: «Da wa-y ne y sẽn yõg b rãmba ka ye, ka rẽ d na n beega Naaba-Wẽnde. Y datame n paas d yel-wẽna la d samde sẽn zoe n ya wʋsgo, n takd Naaba-Wẽnd sũ-puur, a Israyɛl zugu.»" 
2Chronicles28:14 Tãpa rãmb basa fãa kãsem-dãmba la zãma wa taoore. 
2Chronicles28:15 B yãka neb tɩ b na n bels b sẽn yõg b rãmbã. B baoo fut n yeelg sẽn da ka tar-b fuugu; b pʋɩ-b-la futu, neooda, dɩɩbo, koom, la roogo. B zombga bõeens zutu sẽn da pogl-bã la b talla b fãa n wa lebs Zeriko, koms tẽnga; b le lɛɛg n dɩka Samari sore." 
2Chronicles28:16 Yaa wakat kãng la a Akaz tool Asiri naab nengẽ t'a wa sõng-a. 
2Chronicles28:17 Edomitsa le wa kẽe Zɩɩda. B tõog-a lame, la b wʋka b neb n looge." 
2Chronicles28:18 Filisti rãmba sẽegame n pid tãmsa zut la tãmsa sees tẽnsã, la Zɩɩda Negɛb. B pãbame n deeg Bɛt-Semɛs, Ayalõ, Gederot, Soko, ne a tẽn-kogse, Timna ne a tẽn-kogse, Gimzo ne a tẽn-kogse la b kẽe be n zĩndi." 
2Chronicles28:19 Naaba-Wẽnd kɩtame t'a Zɩɩda rɩ bõne, Israyɛl dĩm a Akaz yĩnga. A basa Zɩɩda t'a maan a raabo la yẽ meng laka ne Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles28:20 A Teglat-Falasar, Asiri dĩma, zãgsa a wa sõng-a, n wa gũbg-a a tẽngẽ n pãb-a n tõog." 
2Chronicles28:21 A Akaz kong n yãka Soaala-Wẽnd arzɛka, ne dĩma la na-komsa rẽnna n tool Asiri dĩma, la pa zĩnd yõod ye." 
2Chronicles28:22 Tẽnga sẽn waa n wẽe n gũbgã, dĩm a Akaz maneg n laka ne Soaala-Wẽnd n paase." 
2Chronicles28:23 Damas wẽn-naandsa sẽn da tõog yẽnda wã, a baas n kʋʋ maand b yĩnga. Ad-a sẽn yeel a menga: «Aramsa dĩm dãmb tara wẽn-naands sẽn sõngd-ba, woto wã m na kʋ-b maando tɩ daare b na sõng-ma.» Mik yaa bãmb n na n wa ne a meng wãabo la Israyɛl gill wãabo." 
2Chronicles28:24 A Akaz tigsa wẽnd dooga teed kẽere, n wã-ba, n pag Soaala rooga kʋɩlensã, n sa n ning maan-kug Zerizalɛɛm pʋga." 
2Chronicles28:25 Tẽng fãa pʋgẽ a yãka zĩiga n na n yõog wisd wẽn-naandsa yĩnga, n puug Naaba-Wẽnd, a ba-rãmb Wẽnda sũuri." 
2Chronicles28:26 A vɩɩma kibare, a sɩngre n taa a baasgo, a manesem ne dĩm dãmb a taaba, fãa gʋlsa Zɩɩda la Israyɛl dĩm dãmba sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles28:27 A Akaz kiime tɩ mum-a Zerizalɛɛm, Israyɛl dĩm dãmba yaadẽ. A biig a Ezekiyas n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles29:1 A Ezekiyas yʋʋm da yaa pisi la a nu a sẽn waa n lebg dĩma. A dɩɩ naam yʋʋm pisi la a wɛ Zerizalɛɛm. A ma ra boondame t'a Abiya. A Abiya yaa a Zakari biiga. 
2Chronicles29:2 A naana taa Soaala-Wẽnd yam, tɩ bãmb taoore a kẽna wa a yaab a Daviid." 
2Chronicles29:3 Yẽ n kɩt tɩ b le pags wẽnd dooga kʋɩlense, a naama pipi yʋʋmda pipi kiuugu. A le lebsa bũmb fãa b zĩisẽ." 
2Chronicles29:4 A boola maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã, n tigs b yaang kɩrenga" 
2Chronicles29:5 n yeel-ba: «Kelg-y ka, Levitse, yɩlg-y y mense, la y yɩlg d yaab rãmba Wẽnnaam doogo. Yiis-y rẽgd buud fãa." 
2Chronicles29:6 Y ba-rãmb wegmame, n maan sẽn pa ta Naaba-Wẽnd yam. B basa bãmba, b pa le ges b rooga ye, b wẽnemda b kãare." 
2Chronicles29:7 B paga zãonga noore, n kiis bugma, b pa le kʋ yũ-noog maoongo, b pa le wis tɩdare, b ro-sõnga pʋg ye." 
2Chronicles29:8 Naaba-Wẽnd sũur puuga ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm la yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd kɩt t'a lebg yel-yoogo, la bɛɛb laado, wala a sẽn yaa a soab rũnna." 
2Chronicles29:9 Yaa rẽ yĩng la sʋʋg kʋ d ba rãmba, tɩ b wʋk d kom-dibli, d kom-pugli la d pagb n loog pa-weere." 
2Chronicles29:10 M dat n yõga zood ne Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, n kos-b tɩ b sigs b sũuri." 
2Chronicles29:11 M kamba, da le lak-y ne Soaala-Wẽnd ye tɩ yaa yãmb la b yãk n na n yals b taoore, tɩ y tʋm b tʋʋma, n ges b waoogre yelle, n ges b wisda yelle.»" 
2Chronicles29:12 Levitsa yikame. Yɩ-la: a Amasayi biig a Maat, a Azariya biig a Zowɛl, a Keyat doogẽ, sã n yaa a Merari doogẽ, a Abdi biiga a Kis, a Yealelɛl biig a Azariya, a Gersõ doogẽ, a Zima biig a Zoa la a Zoa biig a Eden." 
2Chronicles29:13 A Elizafã kamba: a Simri ne a Yeyiyɛl. A Asaf kamba: a Zakari ne a Mataniya. 
2Chronicles29:14 A Eman kamba: a Yeyiyɛl ne a Simeyi; a Yedutun kamba: a Semaya ne a Uziyɛl. 
2Chronicles29:15 B tigma b saam-biisã, n yɩlg b mense, wala dĩma sẽn yeele, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn date. Dẽ poore b yɩlga wẽnd doogã." 
2Chronicles29:16 B kẽe wẽnd doogẽ wã n na n yɩlg a. B yiisa wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ bũmb ning fãa b sẽn yãend a pʋgẽ tɩ ya bõn-dẽgdo. B yiis-b-la bal-balle, n tɩ rʋʋg b Sedrõ bãg-faagẽ." 
2Chronicles29:17 B sɩnga yɩlgrã kiuuga pipi raare. Yaa kiuuga raar a nii soaba la b ta wẽnd dooga zãongẽ. B yɩlga rooga dasem a nii. Dɩlla b sɛɛ pipi kiuuga piig la a yoob daare. 
2Chronicles29:18 B bʋʋga a Ezekiyas a zakẽ n yeel-a: «Tõnd yɩlga wẽnd dooga zãnga. Sẽn sɩng maan-kugrã ne a teedo. 
2Chronicles29:19 A Akaz sẽn da yiis teed niynsa fãa, tõnd le lebs-b-la b zĩisẽ. D dɩgl-b-la Naaba-Wẽnd maan-kuga taoore.»" 
2Chronicles29:20 Dĩm a Ezekiyas wẽneg n yikame, n tigs a taoor dãmba tɩ b kẽng wẽnd doogẽ." 
2Chronicles29:21 B waa ne lols a yopoe, pe-bi a yopoe n paas boees a yopoe yel-wẽna sugr kosgo maoong yĩnga. Maoonga na n kʋʋ dĩma yĩnga, wẽnd dooga yĩnga, Zɩɩda yĩnga. Dĩma kõo maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ yagensa, noore tɩ b kood dũmsã maan-kugra zugu." 
2Chronicles29:22 B kooda niisã tɩ b kok b zɩɩma n daal a zugu. 
2Chronicles29:23 B kolga ne sugra kosg boeesã dĩma la zãma wã taoore tɩ b tẽeg b nus b zutu. 
2Chronicles29:24 B kood-b lame n daag b zɩɩma maan-kugra zugu tɩ yɩ sugr kosgo a Israyɛl gill yĩnga. La sɩda, ra yaa a Israyɛl gill yĩnga la dĩma tʋlg yũ-noog maoongã la sugra kosg maoongã." 
2Chronicles29:25 B kẽesa Levitsa wẽnd doogẽ ne kɛma, pendse, ruudsi wala a Daviid sẽn da yalse, tɩ dĩma bãngd a Gad, la Naaba-Wẽnd bãngd a Natã wilgi. Noorã ra yaa Soaala-Wẽnd noore tɩ bãngdba reegd-a n taasdẽ." 
2Chronicles29:26 Levitsa sẽn ta b zĩisẽ ne a Daviid yʋʋm teedã, tɩ maan-kʋʋdba me yɛs ne b tõntõodo," 
2Chronicles29:27 a Ezekiyas yeelame tɩ b kʋ yũ-noog maoongã. La b sẽn sɩng kʋʋbo, la yɩɩla me sẽn sɩnge, tɩ tõntõoda peebdẽ tɩ kɛma wẽedẽ, tɩ pɛndga la ruudga wãagdẽ, wala a Israyɛl dĩma a Daviid sẽn yalse." 
2Chronicles29:28 Zãma wã wõgemdame, n yɩɩnẽ, tɩ tõntõoda peebdẽ, n ta maoonga baasgo." 
2Chronicles29:29 A sẽn baase, dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmb yĩgimdame, la b wõgemdame." 
2Chronicles29:30 Dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba yeela Levitsã tɩ b pẽg Soaala-Wẽnde ne a Daviid la bãngd a Asaf yɩɩla. Sɩd yɩɩ pẽgr menga. Bãmb me waa n yĩgimdame, b wa n wõgemdame." 
2Chronicles29:31 A Ezekiyas zẽka a koɛɛg marsã n yeele: «Marsã yãmb n so Naaba-Wẽnd tʋʋma. Kolg-y, wa-y ne y maan-dɩtse, la y pẽgr maando.» Tɩ zãma wã wa ne maan-dɩtse, pẽgr maando la yamleoog kũuni." 
2Chronicles29:32 Yũ-nood maanda niis yɩɩ pisopoe, pe-raad koabga, pe-bi kobs-yi. Fãa kʋʋ Naaba-Wẽnd sũur maagr yĩnga." 
2Chronicles29:33 Dẽ poore, yɩɩ niis kobs-yoobe la piis tus a tã la b kõ Soaala-Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles29:34 Maan-kʋʋdba sõor da paood ne b tõog n sɩɩg maanda fãa. Woto wã Levitsa sõng-b lame, tɩ fãa wa sɛ, tɩ b fãa yɩlge. Levitsa pus n wilgame tɩ bãmb n dat b mens yɩlgre n yɩɩda." 
2Chronicles29:35 B yõoga kaama me la ra yaa wʋsgo. B waa ne kũuna sẽn tũnugd maandã. Woto Wẽnd doog pʋga b le rɩka pĩnd waoogra sore. 
2Chronicles29:36 A Ezekiyas ne zãma wã sũur yɩɩ noogo b sẽn sak tao n pa kɩɩsã. 
2Chronicles30:1 A Ezekiyas tʋma neb Israyɛl la Zɩɩda, n gʋls sebr a Efrayim la a Manase n yeel tɩ b wa Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ n maan pak kibsa, n tẽeg a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam sẽn pɩʋʋg b sʋkã." 
2Chronicles30:2 Dĩma, a poorẽ dãmbã, zãma wã sedame tɩ b na n maana kibsã kiuug a yiib soaba," 
2Chronicles30:3 t'a wakata da zoe n loogame. Maan-kʋʋdba ka paam n yɩlg b mens a wakata ye, la neba me ra ka paam n tigs Zerizalɛɛm ye." 
2Chronicles30:4 Dĩma la zãma wã gesame tɩ boto n zemse. 
2Chronicles30:5 B maana wa b sẽn yalsã. Woto b toola sebre n bool Israyɛl neba gilli, sẽn sɩng Dã n ta Beerseba, tɩ b wa Zerizalɛɛm tɩ b maan paka kibs Naaba-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama yĩnga, tɩ ka wʋsg n da paam n maan kibsa wala sẽn gʋls sebra pʋg ye." 
2Chronicles30:6 Dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba gʋlsa sɛba la b yiisa neba tɩ b saag Israyɛl la Zɩɩda tõre n moon woto: «Israyɛl kamba lɛɛg-y n wa kẽ a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob Wẽnnaam, tɩ bãmb me na pa ne yãmba." 
2Chronicles30:7 Da maan-y wa y ba rãmba la y saam-biisa ye, bãmb lak n basa Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ Wẽnd me bas-b ne fare wala d sẽn ne a soab rũnna wã." 
2Chronicles30:8 Da nak-y y kãare wa y ba rãmba sẽn maana ye. Lɛɛg-y n kẽ-y Wẽnde la y wa b roogẽ tɩ b welg-a-la toor b meng yĩnga la b na n zãaga b sũ-fõora ne yãmba. 
2Chronicles30:9 Yãmb sã n lɛɛg n wa kẽ Naaba-Wẽnde, y saam-biisã la y kambã na paam tɩ b bɛɛba zoe b nimbãanega n bas-b tɩ b lɛɛg n wa b tẽngẽ, tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd, yãmb Wẽnnaama, yaa nin-noanga la nimbãan-zoeta, yãmb sã n lɛɛg n kẽ bãmba, b me kõn wẽnemd b neng ye.»" 
2Chronicles30:10 Sẽn tʋm b rãmba kẽe tẽng woo tẽnga, n ta Efrayim, Manase la Zabulõ. La bãng-y tɩ b yãee laado la paoogre." 
2Chronicles30:11 Asɛr neb kẽere la Zabulõ neb kẽer bala n sulg b meng n wa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles30:12 Yɩɩ Zɩɩda bala la Soaala-Wẽnd nek neba raabo tɩ b na n deeg dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba noore sẽn ya Naaba-Wẽnd meng noorã. 
2Chronicles30:13 Neba tigma taab Zerizalɛɛm, kiuug a yiib soaba, Ziv kiuugu, n maan bur sẽn ka ning bɩll kibsa. Neba sɩd waa wʋsgo." 
2Chronicles30:14 B sɩngame n wã maan-kuga sẽn be Zerizalɛɛm la wisda maan-kuga la b tɩ lob-b-la Sedrõ sudga pʋga. 
2Chronicles30:15 B kʋʋ paka rũmsi kiuug a yiib soaba piig la a naas raare. Maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã zoe yãnde n yɩlg b mense la b tõog n kolga ne maanda rũmsa wẽnd doogẽ. 
2Chronicles30:16 Ned kam fãa tɩ yalsa a zĩigẽ wala a Moyiiz noora sẽn da wilgi. Maan-kʋʋdba da reegda zɩɩma Levitsa nusẽ n daagdẽ. 
2Chronicles30:17 Ka zãma wã fãa n da paam n yɩlg ye. Woto wã Levitsa reega nin-bãmb zĩiga n koot rũmsã, b sẽn da ka tõe n kolg Naaba-Wẽnd taoorã." 
2Chronicles30:18 Sɩda neb wʋsgo wala Efrayim dãmba, Manase rãmba, Isakar la Zabulõ rãmba da ka paam n yɩlg b mens ye. B da rɩɩ pakã la b pa tũ noora sẽn da rat ye. A Ezekiyas yõka sɛɛg bãmb yĩnga. A yeela woto: «Ned ning fãa sẽn tʋl ne a sũur n bao Soaala-Wẽnnaam a ba rãmb Wẽnde," 
2Chronicles30:19 bɩ a paam a yel-wẽna yẽesgo, a sã n ka tõog n yɩlg a meng wa sẽn segde wakat fãa a sẽn kolgd Soaala-Wẽnde.»" 
2Chronicles30:20 Naaba-Wẽnd deega a Ezekiyas kosgo, n pa maan neba bũmb ye." 
2Chronicles30:21 Neb niyns sẽn da be-b Zerizalɛɛm maana bur sẽn ka ning bɩll kibsa ne sũ-noogo. Levitsa ne maan-kʋʋdba da pẽgda Naaba-Wẽnd ne b pãng fãa. 
2Chronicles30:22 A Ezekiyas pẽga Levitsa sẽn da wʋm Soaala-Wẽnd daabo, n wa rasem a yopoe tõre, n na n dɩ la b pẽg Naaba-Wẽnde la b kõ-b maando." 
2Chronicles30:23 B naaga taab n yeel tɩ b na n paasa rasem a yopoe yɛsa, la sɩd yɩɩ dasem a yopoe sũ-noogo." 
2Chronicles30:24 Zɩɩda dĩm a Ezekiyas kɩtame tɩ b wa ne lols tusri, la piis tus a yopoe zãma wã yĩnga, tɩ dĩma poorẽ dãmb me wa ne niis tusri la piis tus piiga. Maan-kʋʋdba waa wʋsgo la b yɩlga b menga." 
2Chronicles30:25 Yɩɩ sũ-noog kãseng ne Zɩɩda rãmba, ne maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã sẽn yi Israyɛl. Yɩɩ sũ-noogo ne b sẽn da yiis b rãmb b tẽnsẽ tɩ b be Zɩɩda bɩ Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ." 
2Chronicles30:26 Yɩɩ sũ-noog kãseng Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ b ra pa le yãend kibs a woto buudu al Israyɛl dĩma a Daviid biig a Salomo loogr poor ye." 
2Chronicles30:27 Levitsa sẽn ya-b maan-kʋʋdba ninga zãma wã barka. Soaala-Wẽnd zĩnda b yĩngr do-sõnga pʋga n wʋm b koɛɛga la b reega b pʋʋsgo. 
2Chronicles31:1 Dẽ poore Israyɛl kamba fãa sẽn da tigma kẽe Zɩɩda tẽnsa fãa n wã kuga la raada sẽn pees n selã, n bugs tãmsa zut maan-kugã n menes-b zãnga, Zɩɩda, Bẽnzame, Efrayim la Manase tẽn-peelmẽ. B yaoolame n leb b tẽnsẽ la b zagsẽ." 
2Chronicles31:2 A Ezekiyas le pʋɩɩ maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa sags-sagse. F ya maan-kʋʋd bɩ Levitga, f paamda f tʋʋmde. Tõe n yɩɩ yũ-nood maand tʋʋmde, bɩ laafi kosg maando, tõe n yɩɩ wẽnd doog tʋʋm a taaba, bark pʋʋsgo bɩ pẽgr yɩɩla, wẽnd dooga dagnoya gũubu." 
2Chronicles31:3 Dĩma kɩsa a meng ligdi yũ-nood maanda yĩnga, yibeoog la zaabr dẽnna, vʋʋsg raar la ki-paal dẽnna, tig-raasa rẽnna, wala sẽn gʋls noor sebra pʋga." 
2Chronicles31:4 A yeela zãma wã la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, tɩ b ges tɩ maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa paam b pʋɩɩre, b me tõog n deeg Soaala-Wẽnd noore." 
2Chronicles31:5 Koɛɛga sẽn lʋɩ b tʋbrẽ, Israyɛl dãmb waa ne b kood rẽemsa lems zembala, paas rãam, kaam, sɩɩdo, la b sẽn paam b pʋtẽ fãa." 
2Chronicles31:6 Israyɛl kamba la Zɩɩda tẽnsa neba waa ne rũmsa kom-dẽemse, b rũm-bɛd la b rũm-bõonese, b waa ne b yamleed kũun sõma, b talla fãa n wa zam taaba." 
2Chronicles31:7 Yaa kiuug a tãab soaba la b sɩng yã, la yaa kiuug a yopoe soab la b baas yã." 
2Chronicles31:8 A Ezekiyas ne a poorẽ dãmba kolg n gesa kũuna sẽn same la b pẽga Naaba-Wẽnd la b buud a Israyɛl. 
2Chronicles31:9 A Ezekiyas soka maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsã kũuna poorẽ. 
2Chronicles31:10 Yɩ-la a Azariya, maan-kʋʋdba kãsma, la a Sadok yagengã n leoke: «B sẽn sɩng n wat ne kũuna tɛka tõnd me modga ne rɩɩbo la sẽn kella labsa tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ninga b buuda barka. Yaa kũuna la sẽn ket n sam woto fãa wã.»" 
2Chronicles31:11 A Ezekiyas yeelame tɩ b maneg dot wẽnd dooga pʋga, tɩ b manege." 
2Chronicles31:12 Woto b tõog talla wakat buud fãa n wa bĩng be neba kũuni, lemsã la yamleoog kũun sõma wã. Levit a Konaniya ne a yao a Simeyi n soog b bĩngri." 
2Chronicles31:13 Dĩma Ezekiyas naaga maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Azariya, tɩ yẽ n da get wẽnd dooga yelle la b bao nin-bãmba n paas a Konaniya ne a Simeyi, teeda gũub yĩnga. Yɩ-la a Yeyiyɛl, a Azaziya, a Naat, a Asayɛl, a Yerimot, a Zozabad, a Eliyɛl, a Ismakiya, a Maat, la a Benaya." 
2Chronicles31:14 Levitga a Imna biig a Kore da soo yaang noorã gũudem, la yẽnda la b leb n kos t'a reegd yamleoog kũuna sẽn kõt Naaba-Wẽndã la a welg toore kũun-sõma ne kũun niyns sẽn ya-b sõmb n yɩɩdã." 
2Chronicles31:15 Sẽn da sõngd a Kore wakat buud fãa, maan-kʋʋdba tẽnsẽ da yaa a Eden, a Miniyamin, a Yesuwa, a Semaya, a Amariya la a Sekaniya. Bãmb n da so rɩɩba pʋɩɩbo. B ra pʋɩt-a-la b tũud-n-taasã, bɛd la bõonese, ned kam fãa a tʋʋmda zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles31:16 Sẽn paama t'a yʋʋr gʋls fãa da reegda a pʋɩɩre, ba a yʋʋma sã n zems yʋʋm a tãabo. B ra pʋɩta neb niyns fãa sẽn da wat-b n tʋmd wẽnd dooga pʋga, ned kam fãa ne a sull la a raare." 
2Chronicles31:17 B ra gʋlsda maan-kʋʋdba roog-roogo; la sã n ya Levitsã yʋʋm sẽn ta pisi, b tʋʋmda sull la b ra get n gʋlsd-ba." 
2Chronicles31:18 B ra naagd n gʋlsa b zaka rãmb fãa, b pagba, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli, b zĩnd-n-taas fãa sẽn tar sor n dɩt maanda ne b sẽn tũnugd bũmb niynsã." 
2Chronicles31:19 Sã n ya maan-kʋʋdba, a Aarõ yagensã sẽn be-b rũmsa wãbneg zĩisẽ, n pẽ tẽns niyns b sẽn bok n kõ bãmbã, b ra yãka neb be tɩ b get b yelle n kõt bãmba b sẽn tog n deeg bũmb ningã, wala Levits niyns yʋʋr sẽn be sebra zugã." 
2Chronicles31:20 A Ezekiyas sẽn maan woto a soolma pʋgẽ a maana sẽn tog la sẽn ya sõmbo, Wẽnnaam a Soaala sẽn nonge." 
2Chronicles31:21 A sẽn waa n na n maneg wẽnd doogã, a sẽn waa n yet tɩ b modg n deeg Soaala noor la b saglsã, a tʋlg n maana b sẽn dat fãa ne pʋ-peelem la rẽ me yĩng la bũmb ka tol n kedbe n baas neer zãnga." 
2Chronicles32:1 Ne a Ezekiyas vɩɩma sẽn yɩ sõngã, Asiri dĩm a Senakerib waa n kẽ-la a tẽngẽ. Sɩda a kẽe Zɩɩda n wẽ a sik tãnsoben-tẽnsa noore la a yeelame tɩ b po lalsã." 
2Chronicles32:2 A Ezekiyas bãnga neere t'a sẽn dat n lub n yɩɩda yaa Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles32:3 Dẽ la a kɩt t'a tãnsoaben-dãmba la a gãndaadã pag bulsã sẽn da be lalga poore. B sõnga taaba. 
2Chronicles32:4 Neb wʋsg waame n yẽd bulsã la sẽn yɩɩda, kʋɩlg a ye sẽn da zoet ko-sorẽ, ko-sor sẽn tuk zulunga. B ra yeta taab woto: «Bõe yĩng la d na n bas tɩ Asiri neba wa mik koom sẽn ka sɛt kaalẽ.»" 
2Chronicles32:5 A Ezekiyas yika ne raoodo, n le kɩt tɩ b me lal-gũbrã a sẽn da lʋɩ zĩig ningã. A paasa ro-lug-lugi, n le paas lalg a to yɩnga. A Daviid na-tẽngẽ, a le maneg n sĩda Milo bokã. A kuda kãna la gãnd ka tɛka." 
2Chronicles32:6 A baoo tãnsoaben-dãmba n zĩndig-b tẽnga pʋga. B tigma neba tẽnga noore la b gomame n kõ-b raoodo, n yeele:" 
2Chronicles32:7 «Keng-y sũuri, maan-y raoodo, da zoe-y rabeem ye, da rig-y Asiri rĩma taoor ye, da rig-y rabeem a tãb-biis ka tɛka sẽn pʋgd-a wã taoor ye. Sẽn be-a ne tõndã pãng yɩɩda sẽn be-a ne Asiri rĩma." 
2Chronicles32:8 Yẽ sẽn teegã yaa ninsaalba. Sẽn sõngd-a tõndã, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd meng nugu. Bãmb n zabd tõnd zĩigẽ.» Zãma wã sẽn wʋm Zɩɩda rĩm a Ezekiyas goama, b raood paasame." 
2Chronicles32:9 Dẽ wẽnde tɩ Asiri dĩma, a Senakerib da bee Lakis ne a tãb-biisa fãa. A tʋma a neb a Ezekiyas nengẽ la Zɩɩda rãmba fãa sẽn da kẽed Zerizalɛɛma nengẽ. Sẽn tʋm b rãmba waa n yeela woto:" 
2Chronicles32:10 Ad Asiri rĩm a Senakerib koɛɛga: «Yãmb teega bõe taki la y sẽn paad Zerizalɛɛm sẽn gãneg tãp n gilgã? 
2Chronicles32:11 A Ezekiyas n belgd yãmba tɩ y Wẽnnaama na n fãaga yãmb mam nugẽ. Ad-y belgr la a belg yãmb, tɩ y rɩk kom la ko-yũud sore, a belg-y lame tɩ y rɩk kũum sore." 
2Chronicles32:12 M yet tɩ yaa Ezekiyas kãng n menes wẽn-naandsa waoogre la a wilg Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm tɩ yaa maan-kugr a ye taoore, la y tog n wõgemde, tɩ maan-kugr a ye bal la y na n wisi." 
2Chronicles32:13 Yãmb yĩma maam ne m ba sẽn maan bũmb ning ne tẽns ka tɛka laa? M sok n gese tẽn-kãens wẽnd dãmba tõog n fãag-b-la mam nugẽ bɩ? 
2Chronicles32:14 Yaa tẽns ka tɛk la m wã yã la tẽn-bʋg wẽnde n tõog n fãag a neba mam nusẽ? Y tẽedame tɩ yãmb dẽnna n na n fãag-y bɩ? 
2Chronicles32:15 A Ezekiyas da belg-y ye, a ra tudg-y woto ye. Da tẽe-y y rĩma goama ye, tɩ tẽng ba a ye wẽnde, rĩung ba a ye wẽnde, ka tõe n fãag-a, maam la m ba rãmb nusẽ ye. Yãmb Wẽnda me kõn fãag-y mam nugẽ bada.»" 
2Chronicles32:16 Asiri dĩma sẽn tʋm b rãmba ra ket n gomdame n paoogd Soaala-Wẽnd la b tʋʋm-tʋmd a Ezekiyas. 
2Chronicles32:17 Asiri dĩma meng ra gʋlsa sebre n na n tʋʋs Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama. Sebra ra gʋlsa woto: «Wala buud a taab wẽnd dãmba sẽn pa tõog n fãag fɩ mam nugẽ, a Ezekiyas Wẽnnaama me kõn tõog n fãag bũmb ye.»" 
2Chronicles32:18 A Senakerib sẽn tʋm b rãmba ra gomdame Ebre rãmba goama n zẽkd b koɛɛga. B ra gomda ne Zerizalɛɛm nebã sẽn zao lal-gũbrã zugu. B da baood n na, n yɛɛs-b lame la b woog b raoodo tɩ b paam n kẽ tẽngã." 
2Chronicles32:19 B ra gomda Zerizalɛɛm Wẽnda yelle wala b sẽn da gomd wẽnd dãmb a taaba yelle, neb sẽn maan ne b nusi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Yaa rẽ yĩng la dĩm a Ezekiyas la bãngda a Izayi, a Amos biiga, pʋʋs yã n yõk Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛga." 
2Chronicles32:20 Yaa rẽ yĩng la dĩm a Ezekiyas la bãngda a Izayi, a Amos biiga, pʋʋs yã n yõk Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛga." 
2Chronicles32:21 Naaba-Wẽnd tʋma malɛka Asiri dĩma tãb-sikẽ t'a kʋ gãndaadã la tãnsoaben-dãmba. Dĩma lɛɛga ne yãnde n leb a tẽngẽ. A sẽn kẽ a wẽnd doogẽ a meng kamb kʋ-a-la ne sʋʋga. 
2Chronicles32:22 Yaa woto la Naaba-Wẽnd fãag dĩm a Ezekiyas la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, Asiri dĩma a Senakerib nugẽ, la a bɛɛb a taaba nugẽ. Naaba-Wẽnd kẽesa laafi a Ezekiyas soolmẽ." 
2Chronicles32:23 Wʋsg waa Zerizalɛɛm ne b kũuni Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga la Zɩɩda dĩm a Ezekiyas yĩnga. Yell kãensa poore dĩma yʋʋr yiime n paas, bu-zẽmba sʋka." 
2Chronicles32:24 A Ezekiyas waa n lʋɩ bãaga la kella bilf bal t'a kiẽ. A pʋʋsame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sãoog-a b toore. 
2Chronicles32:25 A Ezekiyas ka lebs Naaba-Wẽnd sõm ye. Wilg-m-meng wuka a sũuri la Soaala-Wẽnd zaba ne dĩma, n zab ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles32:26 La a waa n tuubame, tɩ Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm me maan wa yẽ. Naaba-Wẽnd sigsa b sũuri, la b sũura ka le yik ne a Ezekiyas n tãag a kũum ye." 
2Chronicles32:27 A Ezekiyas paama ziiri la arzɛk ka tɛka. A tigsa sãnem, wanzurfu, kug neeba, kaam sẽn tar yũ-noodo, fan-teedo, laog sẽn be yõodo." 
2Chronicles32:28 A manega tẽnse a kooda bĩngr yĩnga, a rãama la a kaama yĩnga. A mee wuba a rũmsa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles32:29 A daa bõeense, a daa rũms wʋsgo, rũm-bɛd la rũm-bõonese. Naaba-Wẽnd da kõ-a-la b kũuna zembala." 
2Chronicles32:30 Yaa a Ezekiyas n gõdg Giõ kʋɩlgã n tees a Daviid na-tẽnga, nin-taoore. A Ezekiyas tõoga a sẽn mak fãa." 
2Chronicles32:31 A sẽn waa n yik ne tɩtaam n gom ne Babilon dĩma tãnsoaben-dãmba, n wilg-b bõn-bãndã sẽn maan a soolmẽ wã, Soaala-Wẽnd bas-a lame bala n na n gese bõe n be a sũurẽ." 
2Chronicles32:32 A Ezekiyas vɩɩma, a nonglma ne Soaala kaseto, dẽ fãa gʋlsa bãngd a Amos biiga a Izayi sebrẽ la Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles32:32 A Ezekiyas vɩɩma, a nonglma ne Soaala kaseto, dẽ fãa gʋlsa bãngd a Amos biiga a Izayi sebrẽ la Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles32:33 A Ezekiyas kiime tɩ b mum-a a Daviid kamba yaadẽ. Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb waoog-a lame. A biig a Manase n led-a a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles33:1 A Manase da tara yʋʋm piig la a yi a sẽn waa n lebg dĩma, a dɩɩ naam yʋʋm pis-nu la a nu Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles33:2 A maana sẽn ka ta Naaba-Wẽnd yam, a togsa bu-zẽmba wɩɩbdo, bu-zẽmb niyns Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da rig bãmb taoorã wɩɩbdo." 
2Chronicles33:3 A le yalsa wẽn-yooda waoogre, wẽnd niyns waoogre a ba a Ezekiyas sẽn da gɩdge. A mee maan-kug Baal dãmb yĩnga la a peesa raad n sele. A yĩgimda n waoog yĩngr ãdsa." 
2Chronicles33:4 A saag n mee Naaba-Wẽnd dooga pʋga, wẽn-naandsa maan-kuga, n yĩm tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd da yeelame: «Yaa Zerizalɛɛm la m yãk n na n kẽes m ziira daar fãa yĩnga.»" 
2Chronicles33:5 A mee maan-kuga yĩngr ãdsa yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ." 
2Chronicles33:6 Yaa yẽ n yõog a kamb bugum Inom bãg-faagẽ. A bʋga bagre, n sogs kɩɩmse, n kẽ tɩto. A maana bũmb ning fãa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn get wa wẽnga la sẽn yikd b sũuri." 
2Chronicles33:7 A kɩtame tɩ b rõog bũmbu t'a tɩ kẽes-a wẽnd doogẽ. La Wẽnd da yeelame: «Yaa wẽnd dooga pʋga, yaa Zerizalɛɛm la m tũus Israyɛl sʋka, n na n kẽes m ziir daar fãa yĩnga." 
2Chronicles33:8 M kõn le zãag Israyɛl kamba nao ne tẽng ning m sẽn kõ b ba rãmba ye. B ye n modg n tũ m sẽn wilgi, n deeg m noya, m saglse, m dog-n-mik, a Moyiiz sẽn taas bãmba.»" 
2Chronicles33:9 A Manase kẽesa moogo Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm neba, al tɩ b wẽnema wa yɩɩg buud niyns Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn menes b rãmb bãmb taoorã." 
2Chronicles33:10 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Manase la a soolma rãmba la b pa kelg ye. 
2Chronicles33:11 Naaba-Wẽnd yiisa Asiri tãnsoaben-dãmba tɩ b wa zab ne-a. B yõk-a lame n balg ne yãndo n tall a n kẽng Babilon. 
2Chronicles33:12 Woto wã a baoome n na n sigs Naaba-Wẽnd sũuri, n sulg a meng sõmbo a ba-rãmb Wẽnd taoore." 
2Chronicles33:13 A sẽn sɩd pʋʋs-ba, b zoe-la a nimbãanega. B wʋma a kosgo n le tall-a n wa Zerizalɛɛm, a naama zaoorẽ. A reegame tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd la Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles33:14 A Manase le manega a Daviid na-tẽnga yɩng lalgã, Giõ nin-taoore, bog zulunga yegende, n ta Zĩma noorẽ. Lalga tõogame marsã n gũbg Ofɛl, la a paasa a zãndlma wʋsgo. A ninga tãnsoaben-dãmb Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnsa fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles33:15 A zãaga Naaba-Wẽnd dooga marsã ne sãamba wẽn-naandse, ne naandã a meng sẽn da kudi, n paas maan-kugã a sẽn da me wẽnd dooga sẽn zao tãng ninga zugu, la Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles33:16 A lebsa Naaba-Wẽnd maan-kugrã a zĩigẽ, n kʋ laafi kosg maand la pẽgr maando. A wilga Zɩɩda rãmba tɩ b waoog Naaba-Wẽnd, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
2Chronicles33:17 Zãma wã sã n da ket n kʋʋd maand b tẽnsẽ, b pĩnd zĩisẽ, da ka le ya wẽn-naandsa yĩng ye, da yaa Soaala b Wẽnnaama yĩnga." 
2Chronicles33:18 A Manase vɩɩma kibar gʋlsa Israyɛl dĩm dãmba sebrẽ. Sebr kãng pʋg la b gomd pʋʋsgã a sẽn pʋʋsa yelle, n gomd Soaala-Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽnda koees a sẽn paam bãngdb kʋʋng nengẽ." 
2Chronicles33:19 B gomda a kosgã la Wẽnd sẽn deeg-a to-to. B sõdga a yel-wẽna, a wẽn-kɩɩsgã, zĩis niyns fãa a sẽn yals wẽn-faada waoogre, n sel da-peesdi, n dõog nin-naandse. B goma a sẽn deeg a kongre Wẽnd taoore. Dẽ fãa gʋlsa bãngdba sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles33:20 A Manase gãanda ne a saam dãmba, tɩ b mum-a a zakẽ, a biiga Amon n led-a a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles33:21 A Amon da tara yʋʋm pisi la a yiibu a sẽn waa n dʋ zaoore. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm a yi Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles33:22 A maana sẽn ka ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam, wala a ba, a Manase. A Amon kʋʋ maando n waoog nin-naandse, a sẽn da rõoge." 
2Chronicles33:23 A ka sulg a meng Naaba-Wẽnd taoor wala a ba a Manase sẽn da sulg a meng ye. A pʋs n yɩɩga a Manase ne beegre. 
2Chronicles33:24 A sõgen-kamb maana sudum n kʋ-a a zakẽ. 
2Chronicles33:25 Zãma wã me yika ne neb niyns sẽn kʋ a Amon n kʋ bãmb me. A Amon biig a Zoziyas la b dʋʋs a zaoorẽ. 
2Chronicles34:1 A Zoziyas da tara yʋʋm a nii a sẽn waa n lebg dĩma. 
2Chronicles34:2 A maana sẽn ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam, a togsa a yaab a Daviid n ka bʋgd goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
2Chronicles34:3 A naama yʋʋmd a nii soaba, dẽ t'a nan ket n yaa bilfu, a sɩng n na n baoo Naaba-Wẽnd, a yaab a Daviid Wẽnde. A naama yʋʋmd piig la a yiibu soaba, a yiisa Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tãmsa zut maan-kuga, ra-peesdi, nin-naandse." 
2Chronicles34:4 B sarma Baal dãmb maan-kuga a nifẽ, la tɩdara sẽn da wisd zĩis niynsã, a wãa ra-peesdi, wẽn-naandsa, a to-b-la wa zom, n dɩk n yugl sẽn da kʋʋd-b bãmb maanda yaado." 
2Chronicles34:5 A yõoga maan-kʋʋdba kõab b maan-kuga zugu. Yaa woto la a yɩlg Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles34:6 A Zoziyas maana boto me Manase, Efrayim, Simeõ la Neftali tẽn-peelmẽ, la b tẽn-kogse sẽn da zĩ ne nimbãanega." 
2Chronicles34:7 A wãa maan-kugã la ra-peesdi, a too wẽn-naandsa n bõgse, a sarma tɩdara maan-kuga zĩig zãnga, n yaool n lɛɛg n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles34:8 A Zoziyas naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba, a tʋlg n yɩlga wẽnd doogã. Woto wã a yiisa a Asaliya biig a Safã, tẽnga kombere a Maaseya, la koe-moãnd a Zoa, a Zoakaz biiga, tɩ b tɩ maneg Naaba-Wẽnd doogã." 
2Chronicles34:9 B tɩ kɩsa maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Ilkiya, b sẽn da tall ligd ning n wa wẽnd doogẽ tɩ dagno-gũudba reegã. Ligda ra yita Manase tẽnsẽ, Efrayim tẽnsẽ, la Israyɛl tẽns a taaba, n paas Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame rãmb sẽn da kẽed Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles34:10 B kɩsa ligdã wẽnd doog tʋʋm nanamse, a manegra yĩnga." 
2Chronicles34:11 B kõo ligdã ra-wãadbã, la ro-metbã tɩ b paam n da kuga la raado n tõog n maneg wẽnd doogã, Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba sẽn bas tɩ sãama." 
2Chronicles34:12 Neba tʋmame, b modgame. Sẽn da get b yelle yaa Levitse, a Merari yagense, a Yaat ne a Obadiya la a Keyat yagense, a Zakari la a Mesullam, bãmb la tʋʋmda zu-raoogo. Levitsa sẽn da minim yʋʋm teeda zãabã," 
2Chronicles34:13 bãmb n da get zɩtba yelle, la b ra yaa tʋʋma pʋɩtba, ned kam fãa ne a tõog la a bãngre. Levits kẽer da yaa sɛb-gʋlsdba, bɩ tʋʋma wilgdba, bɩ ragno-gũudba." 
2Chronicles34:14 B sẽn waa n vaagd ligdã b sẽn da tall n wa wẽnd dooga yĩnga, maan-kʋʋd a Ilkiya me yãenda a Moyiiz noora sebre." 
2Chronicles34:15 A Ilkiya yeela sɛba naab a Safã: «M yãenda Noora sebr wẽnd doogẽ.» La a rɩka sebrã n kɩs a Safã. 
2Chronicles34:16 A Safã tall-a lame n tɩ kɩs dĩma la a naagame n wilg yɛla sẽn be zĩig ninga. A yeela woto: «Y sẽn kõ y neba tʋʋmd ninga, b tar-a lame n dabd a baas-neera zĩigẽ." 
2Chronicles34:17 B kɩsa tʋʋm-tʋmdba la tʋʋmda getba ligda sẽn da be wẽnd doogẽ wã.» 
2Chronicles34:18 Dẽ poore sɛb gʋlsd a Safã yeela rĩma: «Maan-kʋʋd a Ilkiya kõ-m-la Sebr a ye.» A karma sebrã dĩma taoore. 
2Chronicles34:19 A sẽn wʋm Noora karõngo, dĩma kẽesa a futu." 
2Chronicles34:20 A yeela a Ilkiya, la a Safã biig a Ayikam, a Mika biig a Abdõ, a Safã menga, sɛba naaba, la a Asaya, dĩma kombere:" 
2Chronicles34:21 «Kẽng-y n tɩ sok Soaala-Wẽnde b sebra poorẽ tɩ maam ne Israyɛl la Zɩɩda bãnge. B sũur tog n puuga wʋsg ne tõndo tɩ d ba rãmb ka reeg la b pa tũ sẽn gʋls sebra pʋgẽ wã ye.» 
2Chronicles34:22 A Ilkiya ne dĩma neba kẽnga bãngd poaka a Ulda nengẽ. Da yaa a Salum paga, a Tokeyat biiga, a Asra yagenga. A sɩda n da gũud futã. A ra bee Zerizalɛɛm Kẽedpaolgo. B goma ne-a n wilg yɛla sẽn be zĩig ninga." 
2Chronicles34:23 Dẽ la a Ulda yeel-b tɩ b taas dĩma koe-kãnga: 
2Chronicles34:24 «Ad Soaala-Wẽnd meng sẽn yete: ‹M na n taka yel-beed tẽn kãnga ne a neba zugu. La yaa kãab wẽns niyns sẽn be sebra pʋgẽ, sebr ning b sẽn karem Zɩɩda dĩma taoorã." 
2Chronicles34:25 B basa maam n waoog wẽn-naandse, n tʋlg n puug m sũuri ne b tʋʋm wẽnse. La sɩda m sũur widga bugum ne tẽngã la m bugma kõn kiis ye." 
2Chronicles34:26 La tɩ yeel-y Zɩɩda dĩma sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa sok-ma, ad maam a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam koɛɛga: Fo sẽn wʋm koees niynsa na n taasame." 
2Chronicles34:27 La ade, fo sẽn sãam f sũuri, n sulg f meng Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, f sẽn wʋm b sẽn segend bũmb ning tẽnga yĩnga, fo sẽn sulg f meng mam taoore n kẽes f futu n yãb m taoorã, ad-m yãeeme, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles34:28 M na n bas-f lame tɩ f tɩ sak f saam dãmba, tɩ f sig f yaoogẽ ne laafi, tɩ f nin ka yãend yel-beeda fãa sẽn na lʋɩ tẽn-kãnga ne a neba zug ye.› » Maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Ilkiya ne a tʋmd-n-taasã lɛɛg n tɩ wilga dĩma Naaba-Wẽnd leokre." 
2Chronicles34:29 Dĩma kɩtame tɩ b tigim Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm kãsem-dãmba. 
2Chronicles34:30 Dĩma tũ-b lame n kẽ Wẽnd doogẽ, ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm neba, maan-kʋʋdba, Levitsã, zãma wã fãa, nin-bɛd la kom-bõonego. Bãmb taoore a karma Zooda sebre b sẽn yãend wẽnd doogẽ wã." 
2Chronicles34:31 Dĩma da yɛsa yĩngri a zĩigẽ la a kãaba Naaba-Wẽnde t'a na n modga a meng n deeg b noya, b salgse, b rog-n-miki, t'a na n tũ ne a sũuri, ne a pãng fãa, sebra, sẽn yet bũmb niynsã fãa." 
2Chronicles34:32 A goma neba fãa zĩigẽ, f be Zɩɩda bɩ Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ. Zerizalɛɛm dãmba saka zoodã ne Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnde." 
2Chronicles34:33 Bũmb ning fãa sẽn da be Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ n ka tog ne Soaala-Wẽnde, a Zoziyas menes-a lame. A vɩɩma tõre, Israyɛl kẽed fãa lebga wẽnd-tũuda. B pa le lak ne Naaba-Wẽnd, b ba rãmb Wẽnnaam ye." 
2Chronicles35:1 A Zoziyas maana Pak kibs Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga, Zerizalɛɛm. Paka maana pipi kiuugã piig la a naas daare." 
2Chronicles35:2 A Zoziyas le kõo maan-kʋʋd fãa a tʋʋmde, la a gesame tɩ ned kam fãa sɩd tõog n maan a tʋʋmd wẽnd doogẽ." 
2Chronicles35:3 A yeela Levitsã sẽn da tar yẽesem n yɩɩd b taaba ne Naaba-Wẽnd sorã tũudem, la sẽn da welg toor Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga: «Ning-y kuga walsa koglga wẽnd dooga pʋga, Israyɛl dĩm a Daviid biig a Salomo sẽn me roog ningã. A ra le yɩ zɩɩb y bãgdẽ ye. Tʋm-y marsã, Soaala-Wẽnd la buud a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
2Chronicles35:4 Zĩnd-y toor-toore, ned kam fãa a tʋʋmda rãmb sakẽ, wala a Daviid sẽn ning a sebr zugu, t'a biig a Salomo, reeg n taase." 
2Chronicles35:5 Pa-y wẽnd doogẽ, buuda yĩnga, la sẽn ka tõe n kolg-b Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Buuda me na ges Levitsa yelle." 
2Chronicles35:6 Kʋ-y paka, yɩlg-y mense, vɩɩnd-y y saam-biisa yĩnga wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas b koɛɛg a Moyiiz.»" 
2Chronicles35:7 A Zoziyas yãka nin-zaalsa yĩnga rũm-bõonese, pe-bi la bulli, bãmb tus pis-tã. Yɩɩ pak kibs rũmsi, sẽn tigim-ba yĩnga, n paas niis tus a tã. Rũmsa yii dĩma soolmẽ." 
2Chronicles35:8 A poorẽ dãmba me baoo b yamleoog maand rũmsi, zãma wã, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa yĩnga. Sẽn get-b tʋʋma kõo wẽnd doogẽ maan-kʋʋdbã, a Ilkiya, a Zakari la a Yeyiyɛl, dũm-bõonese, pe-bi la bulli tus a yi la kobs-yoobe, la rũm-bɛda, niis kobs-tã." 
2Chronicles35:9 Levitsa kãsem-dãmba, a Konaniya, a Semaya la a yao a Netaneyɛl, a Asabiya, a Yeyiyɛl ne a Zozabad kɩsa Levitsa yĩnga pak rũm-bõones tus a nu la niis kobs-nu." 
2Chronicles35:10 B wilga bũmb fãa ne a wakato, tɩ maan-kʋʋdba kẽng b zĩisẽ, tɩ Levitsa tigim sak-saka, wala dĩma sẽn da yalse." 
2Chronicles35:11 B kʋʋ pakã, maan-kʋʋdba da reegda zɩɩma Levitsa nusẽ n daannẽ. Levitsã n da sɩɩgd dũmsã." 
2Chronicles35:12 B ninga toore, rũmsã, la sẽn yɩɩda lolsa sẽn da tog n kʋ yũ-nood maando Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Rũms kãens yaa Israyɛl sagsa toor-toor sẽn da tog n wa ne wala sẽn gʋls a Moyiiz noora sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles35:13 Wala noora sẽn date, b sẽe pak pe-bilã la rẽ tɩ b rʋgda nemdã rʋgd pʋgẽ, miisd laas pʋsẽ, la-bõones pʋsẽ. B yika ne yãgbo n saa n pʋɩ nemdã Israyɛl kamba." 
2Chronicles35:14 Dẽ poore Levitsa segla pakã bãmb la maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga. A Aarõ kamba tʋʋmde yɩɩ yũ-nood maanda kʋʋbo la kaama yõogre n tar yõogre, n ta yʋngo." 
2Chronicles35:15 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, a Asaf kamba, da be b zĩigẽ, wala a Daviid sẽn da yalse. A Asaf, a Eman, a Yedutun, dĩma bãngdã, dagno-gũudbã, ned ba a ye ka luk a naoor ye, tɩ Levitsa segla fãa b yĩnga." 
2Chronicles35:16 Yaa woto la badaare Naaba-Wẽnd pẽgrã yɩ yũ-nood maand kũuni, b maan-kugra zugu, wala a Zoziyas sẽn da tʋlge." 
2Chronicles35:17 Israyɛl kamba sẽn da tigim-b be wã maana paka rasem a yopoe, n pa rɩt bɩll ye." 
2Chronicles35:18 Bãngd a Samwɛl loogr tɛka, b ka maan Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ wã pak sẽn wẽneg pak kãnga ye. Israyɛl dĩm ba a ye ka maan Pak wa a Zoziyas rẽndã n paam tɩ maan-kʋʋdba fãa, Levitsa fãa, Zɩɩda la Israyɛl, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb fãa zĩnd be ye." 
2Chronicles35:19 Paka kibsa maana a Zoziyas naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba. 
2Chronicles35:20 A Zoziyas waa n tõogame tɩ yɛla fãa leb b zĩisẽ, Naaba-Wẽnd doogẽ wã. Ezipt dĩm a Neko me yikame n na n tak zabre al Karkemis sẽn me Efrat kʋɩlg noore. A Zoziyas pa sak tɩ Ezipt rãmba bʋdg a soolmẽ ye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ezipt dĩm a Neko tʋmame tɩ b wa yeel-a: «M koɛ-bʋg n be ne foom, Zɩɩda dĩma? M ka wat dũnna n na n zab ne foom ye. Yaa ne ned a to la m wat zabre la Wẽnd yeel-m lame tɩ m maan yãgbo. Wẽnd sẽn be ne maama, da kẽ sʋk tɩ b wa kʋ-f ye.»" 
2Chronicles35:22 A Zoziyas da ninga a yamẽ tɩ rẽnd a zab ne a Neko bala, woto a pa kelg koɛɛga sẽn yaool n da ya Wẽnd meng koɛɛg ye. A boba zabre. B sega taab Megido sigdgẽ." 
2Chronicles35:23 B tão a Zoziyas ne tãpo t'a yeel a sõgen-kamba: «Tall-y-ma n looge, tɩ toog tar-m lame.»" 
2Chronicles35:24 A sõgen-kamba yiis-a-la a bilim-bilma n kẽes a to pʋgẽ n tall-a n leb Zerizalɛɛm la a kii be. B mum-a-la a ba rãmb yaadẽ. Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm gill maana a Zoziyas kʋʋre. 
2Chronicles35:25 A Zeremi maana yɩɩla n yãb a Zoziyas, la yɩɩn-yɩɩndba ket n yɩɩnd-b-la ne rũnna. Waa n lebga rog-n-miki; yɩɩn kãens la sẽn boond tɩ kʋʋr yɩɩlã." 
2Chronicles35:26 A Zoziyas vɩɩma kibare, a nonglem ne Wẽnd sẽn yɩ wa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da rat a soaba, wala sẽn gʋls bãmb noora sebrẽ," 
2Chronicles35:27 a kibarã, a sɩngre n ta a baasgo, fãa gʋlsa Israyɛl la Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb sebrẽ." 
2Chronicles36:1 A Zoziyas biig a Zoakaz lebg dĩma; b yuga a naama Zerizalɛɛm na-tẽnga. 
2Chronicles36:2 A Zoakaz sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoor t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a tã. A dɩɩ naam kiis a tã Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles36:3 Ezipt dĩma wa n yiis-a-la Zerizalɛɛm, la a kɩtame tɩ tẽnga rãmb yao wanzurf sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo la b yao sãnem sẽn ta neb piig la a nu zɩɩbo." 
2Chronicles36:4 A Zoakaz ba-biiga a Eliakim la a kõ Zɩɩda naam. A teka a yʋʋrã tɩ lebg Zoakim. Ezipt dĩm a Neko talla a Zoakaz n kẽng Ezipt. 
2Chronicles36:5 A Zoyakim sẽn waa n na n dʋ zaoor t'a tara yʋʋm pisi la a nu. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a ye Zerizalɛɛm. A maana ka ta Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaama, yam ba bilfu." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor zaba ne-a n yõk-a n balg bãense n tall-a n loog Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:7 A looga ne wẽnd dooga teed kẽer me n tɩ bĩng a na-yir, Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:8 A Zoyakim kibare, a sẽn lak ne Naaba-Wẽndã, a sẽn maan tɩ neba fãa mii, fãa gʋlsa Zɩɩda la Israyɛl dĩm dãmb sebrẽ. A biig a Zoakẽ n led-a zaoorẽ." 
2Chronicles36:9 A Zoakẽ da tara yʋʋm a nii a sẽn waa n dʋ zaoore la a dɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm kiis a tã la la rasem piiga. A maana sẽn ka ta Soaala-Wẽnd yam. 
2Chronicles36:10 Yʋʋmd sẽn vẽke, dĩm a Nabikodonozor toolame tɩ b tɩ wa ne-a. A tall-a lame n kẽng Babilon ne wẽnd dooga teedo, n yaool n lebs a ba-biig a Sedesiyas a zaoorẽ, Zerizalɛɛm." 
2Chronicles36:11 A Sedesiyas da tara yʋʋm pisi la a ye a sẽn waa n dʋ zaoore la a dɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a ye Zerizalɛɛm. 
2Chronicles36:12 A ka maan sẽn ta Naaba-Wẽnd, a Wẽnnaam, yam ye. A ka reeg a kongre bãngd a Zeremi taoor ye. Soaala-Wẽnd n yaool n da tʋm a Zeremi a nengẽ." 
2Chronicles36:13 A zẽka a zug ne dĩm a Nabikodonozor; a yaool n da kãaba Naaba-Wẽnd taoore t'a na n tũu bãmba. A Sedesiyas naka a kãare, n kidb a sũuri, a ka lɛɛg n pʋg Naaba-Wẽnd a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam ye." 
2Chronicles36:14 Sẽn paas wẽnema, ad-y maan-kʋʋdba taoor dãmba, ne kãsem dãmb a taabã ka vʋʋs ne b tʋʋm yooda ye, b maan bu-zẽmba wɩɩbda gilli, n dẽgem doog ninga sẽn da me Zerizalɛɛm Soaala-Wẽnd yĩngã." 
2Chronicles36:15 Naaba-Wẽnd, b yaab rãmb Wẽnnaama, tʋma bãngdb ka tɛka, la naoor yaka, n yeel-b tɩ b maan gũusgu. La rẽ yaa b sẽn da zoet b buuda nimbãanega la b ra pa rat b rooga sãoongã." 
2Chronicles36:16 B laa bãngdbã, b sãbsa b goama, al tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd sũur wa puug ne-ba, la b sũ-puura ka le yãend tɩɩm ye." 
2Chronicles36:17 Dẽ me la b kɩt yã tɩ Babilon dĩma kood b kom-bɩɩba, b wẽnd dooga pʋga, n ka kees bi-ribla, bi-pugla, bɩ nin-kẽem zug sẽn pelg ye. Soaala-Wẽnd bas-b-la fãa Babilon dĩma nugẽ." 
2Chronicles36:18 Wẽnd dooga teed fãa, te-bɛd la te-bõonese, wẽnd dooga laogo, dĩma arzɛka, nin-bɛda rẽnna, a looga ne fãa Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:19 B yõoga wẽnd doogã, n tus Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã n lubi, b yõoga dĩma zak la a roto, la a sẽn da tar fãa tɩ ya yõodo." 
2Chronicles36:20 Sʋʋga sẽn ka kʋ b rãmba, a Nabikodonozor wʋk-b lame n kẽng yembd Babilon. B paa be n tʋm dĩma ne a kamb yĩnga, n ta Pɛrs rãmb sẽn wa n vigl b rĩungu Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:21 Woto taasa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da yeel ne bãngd a Zeremi noore: «Tẽnga na n yaoo vʋʋsga raar sama, a me na vʋʋs ne wombo, yella sẽn na n lʋɩ a zugu tɛka, tɩ yʋʋm wa pid pisopoe.»" 
2Chronicles36:22 Pɛrs dãmb dĩm, a Sirus, pipi yʋʋmde, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pids koɛɛg ning b sẽn yiis ne a Zeremi noore, Naaba-Wẽnd kõ-la a Sirus yam sõngo, t'a kɩt tɩ b moon la b gʋls n yaglge, a soolma fãa pʋgẽ." 
2Chronicles36:23 Ad-a Sirus, Pɛrs dãmb dĩma koɛɛga: «Naaba-Wẽnd, yĩngr Wẽnnaam dɩka dũni wã rĩunda fãa n sagl m nugẽ. Bãmb n yeel maam tɩ m me roog n kõ-b Zerizalɛɛm. Ned ning fãa sẽn yaa b buuda ned, bɩ Wẽnd zĩnd ne-a la a rɩk Zerizalɛɛm sore!»" 
Ezra1:1 Ade, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ koɛɛg ning Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yeel a Zeremi wã taase, Pɛrs dãmb dĩm a Sirus paama yam sõngo, a naama dɩɩb pipi yʋʋmd bala. A toola sebr la a kɩtame tɩ b moon woto a soolma fãa pʋgẽ:" 
Ezra1:2 «Ad Pɛrs dãmb dĩm a Sirus koɛɛga: ‹Soaalã, yĩngr Wẽnda dɩka dũniya rĩunda fãa n ning m nugẽ. Bãmb n yeel maam tɩ m me b roog Zerizalɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽnga." 
Ezra1:3 Dɩlla yãmb sʋka, ned sã n beẽ n ya Israyɛl biig fãa bɩ Naaba-Wẽnd zĩnd ne-a. A leb Zerizalɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽnga, tɩ b me roog Israyɛl Wẽnda yĩnga. Bãmb la b sẽn waoogd Zerizalɛɛma." 
Ezra1:4 Israyɛl biig sã n ket yãmb sʋka, a sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, bɩ tẽn kãng rãmb wa sõng-a ne wanzurf, ne sãnem, ne koodo, ne rũmsi, ne a yamleoog kũuni, wẽnd dooga sẽn be Zerizalɛɛma meeb yĩnga.› »" 
Ezra1:5 Tũu boto t'a Zɩɩda ne a Bẽnzame roog kãsem-dãmbã, n paas maan-kʋʋdba, Levitsã la Wẽnd sẽn yẽeg b rãmb yama yik n dɩk sore n kẽng Zerizalɛɛm n tɩ me wẽnd doogã." 
Ezra1:6 B yagsa fãa sõng-b lame wa b sẽn tõe ne b sãnem, b wanzurf, b koodo, b rũmsi, b laog ka tɛka, b yamleoog kũuni, Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
Ezra1:7 Dĩm a Sirus kɩtame tɩ b tigs teed niyns a Nabikodonozor sẽn da wʋk Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ n wa ning a meng wẽnda roogẽ. 
Ezra1:8 Pɛrs dãmb dĩm, a Sirus, reeg-b lame n ning a Mitridat nugẽ, arzɛka gũud kãsengã. Yẽ reeg-b lame n kɩs a Sesbasar, Zɩɩda rĩm-biiga." 
Ezra1:9 Ad-a sẽn sõde: sãnem laas pis-tã, wanzurf laas tusri, sʋʋs pisi la a wɛ," 
Ezra1:10 sãnem la-bɛda pis-tã, wanzurf la-sɩnsɩlse kobs-naas la piiga; teed a taaba: bãmb tusri." 
Ezra1:11 Sãnem la wanzurf lagda gilli: tus a nu la kobs-naase; b sẽn waa n yit Babilon, b yembda sẽn sɛ wã, a Sesbasar talla rẽ fãa n wa Zerizalɛɛm." 
Ezra2:1 Ad neb niyns sẽn yi yembdo n lɛɛg n wa. Yembdã, yaa a Nabikodonozor n da kẽes-ba, Babilon tẽnga. A Nabikodonozor da yaa Babilon dĩma. B sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm ned kam fãa leba a a tẽngẽ, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezra2:2 B taoor dãmba la woto: a Zorobabɛl, a Zozuwe, a Neemi, a Seraya, a Relaya, a Mordokayi, a Bilsã, a Mispar, a Bigwayi, a Rewum la a Baana. Ad sull fãa ne a neba:" 
Ezra2:3 Neb tus a yi la koabg la pisopoe la a yiibu (2172) a Paros roogẽ; 
Ezra2:4 neb kobs-tã la pisopoe la a yiibu (372) a Sefatiya roogẽ; 
Ezra2:5 neb kobsopoe la pisopoe la a nu (775) a Ara roogẽ; 
Ezra2:6 neb tus a yi la kobs-nii la piig la a yiibu (2812) a Paat-Moab roogẽ, dat n yeelame t'a Zozuwe ne a Zoab yagense;" 
Ezra2:7 neb tusr la kobs-yi la pis-nu la a naase (1254) a Elam roogẽ; 
Ezra2:8 neb kobs-wɛ la pis-naas la a nu (945) a Zatu roogẽ; 
Ezra2:9 neb kobs-yopoe la pisoobe (760) a Zakayi roogẽ; 
Ezra2:10 neb kobs-yoob la pis-naas la a yiibu (642) a Bani roogẽ; 
Ezra2:11 neb kobs-yoob la pisi la a tã (623) a Bebayi roogẽ; 
Ezra2:12 neb tusr la kobs-yi la pisi la a yiibu (1222) a Azgad roogẽ; 
Ezra2:13 neb kobs-yoob la pisoob la a yoobe (666) a Adonikam roogẽ; 
Ezra2:14 neb tus a yi la pis-nu la a yoobe (2056) a Bigwayi roogẽ; 
Ezra2:15 neb kobs-naas la pis-nu la a naase (454) a Adim roogẽ; 
Ezra2:16 neb 98, a Atɛr roogẽ; dat n yeelame t'a Yeyiskiya yagense;" 
Ezra2:17 neb kobs-tã la pisi la a tã (323) a Besayi roogẽ; 
Ezra2:18 neb koabg la piig la a yiibu (112) a Zora buudẽ; 
Ezra2:19 neb kobs-yi la pisi la a tã (223) a Asum roogẽ; 
Ezra2:20 neb 95, a Gibar roogẽ;" 
Ezra2:21 neb koabg la pisi la a tã (123) Bɛtelyɛɛm dãmba; 
Ezra2:22 neb 56, Netofa rãmba;" 
Ezra2:23 neb koabg la pisi la a nii (128) Anatot rãmba; 
Ezra2:24 neb 42, Bɛt-Azmavet dãmba;" 
Ezra2:25 neb kobs-yopoe la pis-naas la a tã (743) Kiriyat-Yearim, Kefira la Beerot rãmba;" 
Ezra2:26 neb kobs-yoob la pisi la a ye (621) Rama ne Geba rãmba; 
Ezra2:27 neb koabg la pisi la a yiibu (122) Mikmas rãmba; 
Ezra2:28 neb kobs-yi la pisi la a tã (223) Betɛl ne Ayi rãmba; 
Ezra2:29 neb 52, Nebo rãmba;" 
Ezra2:30 neb koabg la pis-nu la a yoobe (156) Magbis rãmba; 
Ezra2:31 neb tusr la kobs-yi la pis-nu la a naase (1254) Elam a to roogẽ; 
Ezra2:32 neb kobs-tã la pisi (320) a Arim roogẽ; 
Ezra2:33 neb Kobs-yopoe la pisi la a nu (725) a Lod, a Adid la Ono tẽng rãmba;" 
Ezra2:34 neb kobs-tã la pis-naas la a nu (345) Zeriko tẽng rãmba; 
Ezra2:35 neb tus a tã la kobs-yoob la pis-tã (3630) Senaa tẽng rãmba; 
Ezra2:36 neb kobs-wɛ la pisopoe la a tã (973) maan-kʋʋdbã, a Yedaya kamba dat n yeelame t'a Zozuwe yagense:" 
Ezra2:37 neb tusr la pis-nu la a yiibu (1052) a Imɛr roogẽ; 
Ezra2:38 neb tusr la kobs-yi la pis-naas la a yopoe (1247) a Pasewur kamba; 
Ezra2:39 neb tusr la piig la a yopoe (1017) a Arim kamba; 
Ezra2:40 neb 74, Levit dãmba, a Zozuwe yagense, a Kadmiyɛl, a Odaviya kamba;" 
Ezra2:41 neb koabg la pisi la a nii (128) yɩɩn-yɩɩndba a Asaf kamba; 
Ezra2:42 neb koabg la pis-tã la a wɛ (139) dagno-gũudba a Salum a Atɛr n paas a Talmo, a Akub, a Atia la a Sobayi kamba;" 
Ezra2:43 noakense: a Siba, a Asufa, a Tabaot kamba;" 
Ezra2:44 a Keros, a Sia, a Padõ kamba;" 
Ezra2:45 a Lebana, a Agaba, a Akub kamba;" 
Ezra2:46 a Agab, a Samlayi, a Ana kamba;" 
Ezra2:47 a Gidɛl, a Gaar, a Reaya kamba;" 
Ezra2:48 a Resin, a Nekoda, a Gazam kamba;" 
Ezra2:49 a Uza, a Pasea, a Besayi kamba;" 
Ezra2:50 a Asna kamba, a Meon ne a Nefusa yagense;" 
Ezra2:51 a Basbuk, a Akufa, a Arur kamba;" 
Ezra2:52 a Baslut, a Meyida, a Arsa kamba;" 
Ezra2:53 a Barkos, a Sisra, a Tema kamba;" 
Ezra2:54 a Nesiya, a Atifa kamba." 
Ezra2:55 A Salomo yem-daada kamba: a Sotayi, a As-Soferet, a Peruda kamba," 
Ezra2:56 a Yala, a Darkõ, a Gidɛl kamba;" 
Ezra2:57 a Sefatiya, a Atil, a Pokerɛt-Sebayim, a Ami kamba." 
Ezra2:58 Noakensa la a Salomo yem-daada kamba, fãa gill yaa kobs-tã la pis-wɛ la a yi (392)." 
Ezra2:59 Sã n ya neb niyns sẽn yit Tel-Mela, Tel-Arsa, Kerub, Adãn-Imer, b pa tõog n wilg b roogo la b buuda sẽn kĩ ne a Israyɛl buud to-to ye." 
Ezra2:60 Yaa a Delaya, a Tobiya, a Nekoda kamba: kobs-yoob la pis-nu la a yi (652)." 
Ezra2:61 Maan-kʋʋdba sʋka, a Obaya kamba, a Akos la a Barzilayi kamba me ka tõog n wilg b ba rooga vẽeneg ye. Yaa a Barzilayi paga sẽn da yaa a Barzilayi biigã la yẽ me rɩk yʋ kãnga. A Barzilayi da yaa Galaad neda." 
Ezra2:62 Bãmb me vɛɛsa b buuda sɛba la b pa yãe tɩ b kĩi ne a Israyɛl buud ye. Dẽ la b lebs-b kɛɛnga wa neb sẽn pa tõe n tʋm maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmde. 
Ezra2:63 Kombera meng tol n yeel-b lame tɩ b da rɩ maanda rɩɩbo, tɩ b pa reng n sok Wẽnd n ges b yeetame tɩ N-yẽe bɩ Ayoo." 
Ezra2:64 Israyɛl kamb sẽn yi pa-weerã n lɛɛg n wa wã sẽn naag taaba yaa tus pis-naas la a yi la kobs-tã la pisoobe (42 360) 
Ezra2:65 B rakõapa, kom-dibli la kom-pugli, da yaa tus a yopoe la kobs-tã la pɩstã la a yopoe (7337). Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, pagb la rapa, yaa bãmb kobs-yi." 
Ezra2:66 B wiida yɩɩ kobs-yopoe la pis-tã la a yoobe; b bõn-wees kobs-yi la pis-naas la a nu (2045)," 
Ezra2:67 b yʋgma kobs-naas la pis-tã la a nu, b bõeense tus a yoob la kobs-yopoe la pisi." 
Ezra2:68 B sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm, wẽnd dooga sẽn me tẽng ningã, sags kãsem-dãmb kẽer yiisa b yamleoog kũuni sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ wẽnd dooga le wa tõog n me a pĩnd zĩigẽ." 
Ezra2:69 B maana b sẽn tõe la a ad-b sẽn paam Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga: sãnem wakɩ koeems tus pisoob la a ye, wanzurfa ta neb koab la pisi la a nu zɩɩbo. Maan-kʋʋra fut yɩɩ koabga." 
Ezra2:70 Maan-kʋʋdba, Levit dãmba la neb kẽere wala yɩɩn-yɩɩnba, dagno-gũudba la wẽnd dooga tʋʋm-tʋmdba tɩ kẽe b sẽn zĩndg-b tẽns niynsã. Zerizalɛɛm; noakensã, dagno gũudba, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba la a Israyɛl kamb a taaba leba b buud sagsẽ." 
Ezra3:1 Kiuug a yopoe soaba la Israyɛl kamba fãa yi b tẽnsẽ n lɛɛg n wa Zerizalɛɛm wa nin-yende. 
Ezra3:2 A Zosadak biig a Zozuwe ne a yaopa sẽn ya maan-kʋʋdba n paas a Salatiyɛl biiga a Zorobabɛl ne a yaop sɩnga maan-kugra meebo, a Israyɛl Wẽnda yĩnga. Yaa sẽn na n yɩlẽ n tõog n kʋ yũ-nood maandã wala b sẽn wilg Wẽnd ned a Moyiiz noor sebra pʋga." 
Ezra3:3 B sũur da ka kegem ne tẽnga rãmb ye. B ra waa n kẽ n sooga tẽngã pa-weera wakato. Baasgo b mee maan-kugrã a zĩ kʋdgẽ. B kʋʋ yũ-nood maand, yibeoog la zaabre, Soaala yĩnga." 
Ezra3:4 B maana sẽgda kibsa wala a sẽn da tog n yɩ a soaba. Maanda sõor pida zãnga beoog-beoog fãa. 
Ezra3:5 Baraar tɛka b kʋʋ beoog-beoog maanda, vʋʋsg raare, ki-paalse la tig-raas rẽnna. M paas yamleed kũuna." 
Ezra3:6 Yɩɩ woto la kiuug a yopoe soaba pipi raare, b sɩngame n kʋ yũ-noog mando, Naaba-Wẽnd yĩnga. Dẽ tɩ wẽnd dooga nan ka sɩng meeb ye." 
Ezra3:7 B kõo kug-peesdba la ra-pɛɛsdba ligdi. B baoo koodo, rãam la kaam n kõ Tir dãmba tɩ b tall Libã ra-sĩdma n wa Zafa wala Pɛrs dãmb dĩm a Sirus sẽn da sed bũmb ningã." 
Ezra3:8 B sẽn yi yembdo n wa Zerizalɛɛm tɩ yʋʋmd la kiis a yi la a Salatiyɛl biig a Zorobabɛl, a Zosadak biig a Zozuwe ne maan-kʋʋdba la Levit dãmba, b saam-biisi, la pa-weta fãa sɩng tʋʋma. Yaa Levit dãmb yʋʋm sẽn pid pisi, bɩ yɩɩd rẽ, la b tũusyã tɩ b na n yɩ tʋʋmna zu-raoog rãmba." 
Ezra3:9 A Zozuwe ne a kamba la a yaopa, a Kadmiyɛl, ne a kamba, a Odaviya yagense, bãmb n sõng taab ne wẽnd dooga tʋʋma gesgo, bãmb ne a Enadad yagense, Levitse." 
Ezra3:10 Metba sẽn wa n sɩng meebo, n gãneg pipi kugã, maan-kʋʋdba yeelga b maan-kʋʋra futu n yi ne tõntõodo t'a Asaf yagensa yi ne waase la kɛma n pẽgd Soaala-Wẽnd wala Israyɛl dĩm a Daviid sẽn da wilgi." 
Ezra3:11 B pẽga Soaala n kils-ba la yaa yɩɩn-kãnga la b ra yɩɩn n deesd taaba: «Soaala yaa nin-noanga la b nonglem ne a Israyɛl ka be sɛɛbo.» Zãma wã ra pẽgda Soaala la b kaasd sũ-noogo, wẽnd dooga meeb sẽn sɩnga yĩngã." 
Ezra3:12 B sẽn yãend tɩ wẽnd dooga meeb sɩngame neb kẽere, wala maan-kʋʋdba, Levitsa, sagsa kãsem-dãmb da kiigda nintãm tɩ b da tẽra rooga sẽn yɩ a soab pĩnda. Wʋsg me bʋʋrã la b kaasgã ra yaa sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Ezra3:13 Dɩlla yɩɩ sũ-sãang la sũ-noog kɛlenga n da naaga taab n sãt al yɩɩga, la ned da ka tõe n bãng-b n welg ne taab ye." 
Ezra4:1 A Zɩɩda la a Bẽnzame bɛɛba sẽn bãng tɩ pa-weta meta roog a Israyɛl Wẽnda yĩnga," 
Ezra4:2 b kolga a Zorobabɛl, a Zozuwe la sagsa kãsem-dãmbã n yeel-ba: «Tõnd dat n naaga yãmb n me. Tõnd ne yãmb pʋgda Wẽnd a ye. Tõnd kõt-b-la maando al a Asaradõ, Asʋr dĩma, sẽn tall tõnd tɩ d yi yembdã n lɛɛg n wa ka. Al n ta rũnna d ka teem ye.»" 
Ezra4:3 Dẽ la a Zorobabɛl, a Zozuwe la kãsem-dãmb a taabã leok-ba: «Meeba ka tõnd ne yãmb n na n naag taab n me ye, ya tõnd bala n na n me roogã n kõ Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam. Pʋs n yaa woto la Pɛrs dãmb dĩm a Sirus kõ noore tɩ b maane.»" 
Ezra4:4 Tẽnga kamba gomame n woog Zʋɩf rãmba raoodo, n yɛɛs-ba, sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b bas rooga meebo." 
Ezra4:5 Pɛrs rãmb dĩm a Sirus sẽn waa n ket n dɩt naam n tãag a Dariyus naam, b tol n bao ligd n kõ kug-zĩidba tɩ daare tʋʋmda na mudi." 
Ezra4:6 A Zerksɛs sẽn waa n sɩng a naam dɩɩbo, Samari rãmba da gʋlsa sebr n wilg tɩ bãmb ne Zɩɩda, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb ka zemsd taab ye." 
Ezra4:7 A Artazerksɛs wẽnde, a Bislam, a Mitridat ne a Tabeyɛl la b tũud-n-taase le gʋlsa beedo Zerizalɛɛm dãmb poorẽ. Sebra goama la a gʋlsga da yaa Aram dãmb dẽnna." 
Ezra4:8 Sebr kãnga la komber a Rewum la sɛba gʋlsd a Simsayi tool dĩm a Artazerksɛs Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ: 
Ezra4:9 «Sɛba bĩngr naaba a Rewum, sɛb gʋlsd a Simsayi, n paas b tũud-n-taase, sẽn yit Din, Afarsatak, Tarpɛl, Afaras, Erek, Babilon, Suz, Dea, la Elam tẽnse," 
Ezra4:10 tõnd ne d buuda rãmb dĩm kãseng a Asnapar sẽn yiis yembdo n tall n wa kẽes Samari la tẽns niyns sẽn be Efrat rʋʋnde, ad-y yaa tõnd n toond pʋʋsem." 
Ezra4:11 Yaa tõndo, y yemsa sẽn be Efrat rʋʋndã n gʋlsd a Artazerksɛs." 
Ezra4:12 Dĩm sõngo, togame tɩ d wilg yã tɩ neb niyns sẽn yi fo nengẽ n lɛɛg n wa be ne tõnd Zerizalɛɛm, dat n le yika Zerizalɛɛm, tẽng ning sẽn ka be sugri la sẽn ya tõata. B rat n le yika a lalsã. Yaa meeb sẽn tar pãng zugu la b na n dogl lal-gũbrã." 
Ezra4:13 Y tog n bãngame tɩ tẽnga sã n me tɩ lal-gũbra yiki, a kẽedba pa na n le yao yõor yaood ye, b kõn wa ne kood ye, b kõn yao sor n paam n kẽedẽ la b yit ye, yaa bõne la bõn bala la y na n dɩ, yãmb la dĩm dãmb sẽn na n pʋg b yãmbã." 
Ezra4:14 Tõnd sẽn dɩt dĩma rɩɩbo, d yeelame tɩ pa tog tɩ y yãe paoogr a woto buud ye, tɩ d gʋlsd-y n na n wilg yã." 
Ezra4:15 Y sã n kɩt tɩ b karem y ba-rãmb sẽn gʋls fãa tẽnga poorẽ, y na bãng tɩ tẽnga ka reegd naana ye, n takd yel-beedo a neb la a soaalb zugu al daar zãra, la rẽ n pus n wa ne a wãaba, pĩnda." 
Ezra4:16 D wilgda dĩma tɩ tẽn-kãnga sã n me, a lal-gũbra sã n le yiki, y soolem sɛɛ Efrat rʋʋnde.»" 
Ezra4:17 Dĩma leoka woto: «Wẽnd laafi zĩnd ne a Rewum, tẽnga sɛba gũuda la a sɛb gʋlsd, a Simsayi, la b zĩnd-n-taase sẽn be-b Samari, bɩ tẽns a taaba, Efrat rʋʋnde! Ade," 
Ezra4:18 sebrã y sẽn gʋls-ma, b lebg-a-la ne tõnd buuda goam n togs-ma." 
Ezra4:19 D kɩtame tɩ b lags d sɛbã la d yãeeme tɩ yaa naoor yaka, la daar zãra la tẽn-kãnga sɩng a zug zẽkre ne a soaalba. Tẽnga zɩɩ n sak naana, a zɩɩ n kong zab ye." 
Ezra4:20 Sɩda dĩm bɛd dɩɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, n sãag n dɩ naam Efrat rʋʋnd menga tɩ b yaood b yõor yaoodo, n kõt-b koodo la b yaood soy wã b sẽn tũudã." 
Ezra4:21 Modg-y tɩ tʋʋmd ninga sẽn sɩngã ra baas ye; b ra saag n le maneg tẽnga tɩ ka tũ ne mam noor ye. 
Ezra4:22 Da maan-y reem ye, ka rẽ wẽnem na n paasame la dĩm dãmb na n dɩɩ bõne.»" 
Ezra4:23 Tẽnga taoor soaba a Rewum, sɛba gʋlsd a Simsayi ne b zĩnd-n-taas kelga a Artazerksɛs sebra karengo la b yika tao-tao n kẽng Zerizalɛɛm n babs Zʋɩf rãmbã la b wõosa b sʋʋse, tɩ metba bas meebã." 
Ezra4:24 Yɩɩ woto la b yals wẽnd dooga meeb Zerizalɛɛm, n tãag Pɛrs dãmb dĩm a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba." 
Ezra5:1 Bãngdba n waa n yiki, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam pãng la b yʋʋr yĩnga, n gomd Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ. Yɩ-la bãngda a Aze ne a Zakari, a Ido biiga." 
Ezra5:2 Woto me la a Salatiyɛl biig a Zorobabɛl, a Zosadak biig a Zozuwe yik n sɩng wẽnd dooga meebo Zerizalɛɛm. Wẽnd neba ra bee bãmb ne tʋʋm-tʋmdba sʋka n kengd b pɛlga." 
Ezra5:3 Yaa wakat kãng la Efrat rʋʋnd komber a Tatnayi n paas a Setar-Boznayi ne b tũud-n-taas waa n sok-ba tɩ ãnda n kõ bãmb sore tɩ b me wẽnd doogã la b le yik a lal-gũbrã? 
Ezra5:4 D datame tɩ y wilg tõnd sẽn met-ba yʋʋre! 
Ezra5:5 Wẽnd da bee ne Zʋɩf rãmba taoor dãmba, woto b pa gɩdg metba ye. B da gũudame bal tɩ sebr taa a Dariyus nengẽ n lɛɛg n wa tɩ b bãng sẽn na n yɩ a soaba. La b ra ket n tara meebo." 
Ezra5:6 Seb kãnga la a Tatnayi, Efrat rʋʋnd komberã n paas a Setar Boznayi, ne b tʋmd-n-taase, Arfasak rãmb sẽn be Efrat rʋʋnde, tool dĩm a Dariyus." 
Ezra5:7 Yaa woto n da gʋls b sebra pʋga: «Bɩ laafi pemsem wẽ dĩm a Dariyus zãnga! 
Ezra5:8 Dĩma bãng tɩ d taa Zɩɩda. D taa b Wẽnd kãsenga roogẽ. B met-a-la ne kug sẽn peese la raad la b rɩkd n pɛ lalsã. Tʋʋmda tʋmda neere la a kẽndame. 
Ezra5:9 Tõnd goma ne nin-kẽembã n sok-ba: ‹Ãnda n kõ yãmb sore tɩ y me ro-kãnga la y le yik n ka-a raado?› 
Ezra5:10 Tõnd soka sẽn be-b taoor dãmbã yʋya n na n gʋls n wilg yã. 
Ezra5:11 Woto la b leok tõndo: ‹Tõnd yaa yĩngr la tẽng Soaala sõgẽn-kamba, la Israyɛl dĩm kãseng a ye n me roog al daar zãra, la yaa ro-kãng lals sẽn lʋɩ la d le yikda." 
Ezra5:12 Yaa tõnd yaab rãmb n puug yĩngr Wẽnda sũuri tɩ b rɩk-ba n sagl a Nabikodonozor nugẽ, Kalde rao la Babilon dĩma. Yẽ n wã roogã la a wʋk buudã n kẽng pa-weere, Babilon." 
Ezra5:13 Babilon dãmb dĩm a Sirus, a naama pipi yʋʋmde, kõo sor ti b le maneg roogã n me." 
Ezra5:14 A tol n kɩtame tɩ b yiis Babilon wẽnd dooga pʋga sãnem la wanzurf teed niynsi a Nabikodonozor sẽn da yiis Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ n tall n wa be. Yaa a Sesbasar la a lebs teedã tɩ yẽ la a yãk n maan a kombere. 
Ezra5:15 A yeel-a lame t'a reeg teedã n tɩ lebs Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ la a kɩt tɩ b le maneg n me-a, a pĩnd zĩigẽ." 
Ezra5:16 A Sesbasar meng n wa n sɩng rooga meebo, Zerizalɛɛm, la rẽ tɛka n ta rũnna, d tall-a a meebo la nan ka sɛ ye.›" 
Ezra5:17 Sã n taa dĩma yam bɩ a kɩt ti; b vɛɛs sɛba sẽn bĩngd zĩig ningã, Babilon tẽnga, n ges dĩm a Sirus sã n sɩd kõo noore rooga poorẽ la b togs dĩma sẽn yals bũmb ninga tɩ d bãng.»" 
Ezra6:1 A Dariyus kɩtame tɩ b vɛɛs sɛba sẽn bĩngd zĩig ningã, Babilon tẽnga." 
Ezra6:2 Yaa Mɛd dãmb Ekbatan tãnsoben-doog a ye pʋga la b yãend sebr la b gʋlsa sebra zugu tɩ woto yaa sebr sẽn tog n bĩngi. 
Ezra6:3 A Naama pipi yʋʋmde, a Sirus kõo noor kãnga, Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd dooga poorẽ: «B na n le maneg n me roogã, zĩig ning b sẽn da kʋʋd maandã, a zĩ kudgẽ. A zãndlem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs pisoobe, a yalem me boto." 
Ezra6:4 Kug sẽn pees rũnus a tãab zugu, b gãnegda ra-sĩdim paals rũnug a ye. Tʋʋmda yaood paka dĩma." 
Ezra6:5 Rooga teed fãa sẽn ya sãnem bɩ wanzurf, t'a Nabikodonozor tall n loog Babilon, teoog fãa na n leba a zĩigẽ, wẽnd doogẽ wã, fãa na n bĩnga be." 
Ezra6:6 Marsã, bɩ a Tatnayi, Efrat rʋʋnd komber, n paas a Setar-Boznayi, a tʋmd-n-taase la sẽn yi-b Pɛrs tẽnsẽ, bɩ bãmb fãa ra lʋɩɩs b toog ye." 
Ezra6:7 B bas tɩ wẽnd dooga tʋʋm baase, b bas tɩ Zʋɩf rãmba sẽn lʋɩɩs a soab b taoora la b nin-kẽemba lebs roogã n me a zĩ kudgẽ." 
Ezra6:8 Y sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ne Zʋɩf rãmbã nin-kẽemsa sẽn na n lagem yãmb rooga meebẽ la woto: m datame tɩ ligda yi yõora yaoodẽ y sẽn deesd neba nengẽ b tẽnsẽ wã. Yãk-y ligda be n kɩs y sẽn tog n kɩse, wakat fãa la bũmb da paoog ye." 
Ezra6:9 Ad-b sẽn tog n deeg bũmb ninga: lol-bõonese, pe-raado, pe-bi, yũ-noog maoonga yĩnga, alkam, yamsem, rãam, kaam, wala Zerizalɛɛm maan-kʋʋdba sẽn na n wilgã. Y tog n kõ-b-la beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa." 
Ezra6:10 Woto b na tõog n wa ne kũun sẽn na n sigs yĩngr Wẽnda sũuri la b pʋʋs tɩ b wogl dĩma ne a kamba yõore. 
Ezra6:11 Ad-m sẽn leok bũmb ning noora poorẽ; sẽn saaga n tõdg noorã, bɩ b võog a soab roog baafo n lɛɛg n ka-a menga la b kɩt t'a roog lebg tãmpʋʋre." 
Ezra6:12 Bɩ Wẽnd ninga sẽn yãka zĩ-kãnga n na n maan a waoogr zĩiga tus n lub dĩm ning fãa la buud ning fãa sẽn na n tõdg noorã n yik n dat ro-kãnga sẽn me Naaba-Wẽnd yĩng Zerizalɛɛma lʋɩɩse. Yaa maam a Dariyus n yiis no-kãnga la m datame tɩ b tũ m sẽn wilga zãnga.» 
Ezra6:13 Efrat rʋʋnd komberã, a Tatnayi ne a Setar-Boznayi ne b tʋmd-n-taasa maana wala dĩm a Dariyus sẽn datã." 
Ezra6:14 Zʋɩf rãmba nin-kẽemsa kell n talla wẽnd dooga meebo neer-neere, wala bãngd a Aze la a Ido biig a Zakari sẽn da togse. B baasa rooga meebo wala Pɛrs dĩm dãmba, a Sirus, a Dariyus la a Artazerksɛs sẽn da rate." 
Ezra6:15 B baasa roogã Adar kiuug pisi la a tãab daare. Dĩm a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yoob soaba. 
Ezra6:16 Israyɛl kamba, b maan-kʋʋdba, b Levitsã sẽn da yi yembd weooga, fãa maana Naaba-Wẽnd dooga bark ningr kibsa ne sũ-noog kãsenga." 
Ezra6:17 Rooga bark ningri yĩnga, b kʋʋ lols koabga, pe-raad kobs-yi, pe-bi kobs-naase. A Israyɛl yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga, boees piig la a yiibu, tɩ Israyɛl buuda sags yaa piig la a yiibu." 
Ezra6:18 Wala a Moyiiz noora sẽn date, b pʋɩɩ maan-kʋʋdba b raare, n wilg Levitsa ned kam fãa a tʋʋmde, Naaba-Wẽnd waoogr yĩnga." 
Ezra6:19 Pa-weta maana paka kibsa pipi kiuuga piig la a naas raare. 
Ezra6:20 Maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa ra paam n naaga taab n yɩlge. Woto b tõog n maana Pakã. Paka maand kʋʋ pa-weta fãa yĩnga, b saam-biisa sẽn ya maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga, buuda fãa yĩnga." 
Ezra6:21 Woto pa-wetã, a Israyɛl kamba, naagame n dɩ pakã ne neb niyns fãa sẽn zãag b mense ne bu-zẽmba rẽgdã, n baood a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
Ezra6:22 B maana bur sẽn pa lob bɩll kibs ne sũ-noogo dasem a yopoe tõre. B sũ-nooga ra yita Wẽnd meng nengẽ, tɩ bãmb n tedg Asiri dĩma sũuri la b kõ b nus pãnga tɩ b baas Israyɛl Wẽnnaam doogo." 
Ezra7:1 Dẽ fãa sẽn looge, Pɛrs rãmb dĩm a Artazerksɛs zamaanẽ, a Esdras yii Babilon n wa. A Esdras ba la a Seraya, a Azariya biiga, a Ilkiya biiga." 
Ezra7:2 A Ilkiya ba la a Salum, a Salum ba la a Sadok, a Sadok ba la a Ayitub." 
Ezra7:3 A Ayitub ba la a Amariya, a Amariya ba la a Azaria, a Azariya ba la a Merayot." 
Ezra7:4 A Merayot ba la a Zeraya, a Zeraya ba la a Uzi, a Uzi ba la a Buki." 
Ezra7:5 A Buki ba la a Abisuwa, a Abisuwa ba la a Pinas, a Pinas ba la a Elazar, a Elazar ba la maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Aarõ." 
Ezra7:6 A Esdras da yaa sɛb gʋlsda sẽn da mi a Moyiiz noora neere, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam sẽn da yiis noor ningã. La Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da nong-a yĩnga, dĩma me kõ-a-la a sẽn kos bũmb ning fãa." 
Ezra7:7 Wakat ning Israyɛl kamba, maan-kʋʋdba, Levitse, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, dagno-gũudba la sõangdba kẽer sẽn wa Zerizalɛɛm, dĩm a Artazerksɛs naama yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba," 
Ezra7:8 a Esdras me waa Zerizalɛɛm, ne bãmba, kiuug a nu soaba." 
Ezra7:9 Ade, Babilon yiiba ra yãkame tɩ na n yɩ pipi kiuuga pipi raare, la yaa kiuug a nu soaba pipi raare la a ta Zerizalɛɛm t'a Soaala-Wẽnda nug ra gũud-a lame." 
Ezra7:10 A Esdras da modga ne a sũur fãa n ning Naaba-Wẽnd noor a pʋtẽerẽ, n tũ-a a vɩɩmẽ la a wilg a Israyɛl a sẽn segd la a sẽn tog n tũ wala a rog-n-miki." 
Ezra7:11 Sebr la dĩm a Artazerksɛs da tool maan-kʋʋd la sɛb gʋlsd a Esdras. A Esdras n da wegsd neba yĩnga Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da yiis koees niyns la noy-niyns a Israyɛl yĩnga. 
Ezra7:12 Gʋlsa woto: «Dĩm a Artazerksɛs n pʋʋsd a Esdras, Yĩngr Wẽnnaama noya gʋlsda." 
Ezra7:13 M noora la woto: m soolma pʋgẽ, ned ninga fãa sẽn yaa a Israyɛl buudu, n ya maan-kʋʋda, bɩ Levitga, n dat ne yamleoogo n leb Zerizalɛɛm, bɩ a leb ne foo!" 
Ezra7:14 Yaa dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba a yopoe n tʋmd foo tɩ f tɩ ges Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm tõnd noya sã n zemsda ne Wẽnd ning sẽn nonga yãmba rẽnna. 
Ezra7:15 Sẽn le paas yaa ligdã, wanzurfa la sãnema dĩma ne a sagendba sẽn kõt ne yamleoogo Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sẽn yals a waoogr zĩig Zerizalɛɛm." 
Ezra7:16 Zɩ wanzurfa la sãnema la yamleoog kũun a taaba maan-kʋʋdba bɩ neb a taab sẽn be Babilon soolma pʋga n dat tɩ f reeg-b Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd dooga yĩnga. 
Ezra7:17 Dẽnd yĩnga, f na modg n da ne ligdã, lolse, pe-raado, pe-bi la f ra maanda sẽn tũnugd ne bũmb ningã. F na tall-ba n tɩ rɩgl y Wẽnnaama roogẽ sẽn be Zerizalɛɛma maan-kugra zugu." 
Ezra7:18 Maan bũmb ning fãa f sẽn ne tɩ segdame ne ligda sẽn na n kellã, foo ne f poorẽ dãmba, la wala Wẽnd meng sẽn date." 
Ezra7:19 Teed niyns f sẽn na n deeg wẽnd dooga tʋʋma yĩnga, f na tɩ rɩgl-b Wẽnd taoor Zerizalɛɛm." 
Ezra7:20 Bũmb sã n na n paoog f Wẽnnaama roog yĩnga tɩ f tog n tall n wa, f na yãk ligda dĩma koglgẽ." 
Ezra7:21 Yaa maam a Artazerksɛs meng m toore n kõt ligd nanamsa sẽn be Efrat rʋʋnde, noor kãnga: Yĩngr Wẽnnaama norɛɛs, a Esdras sẽn na n kos-y bũmb ning fãa bɩ y maan wala a sẽn togse." 
Ezra7:22 A yeeg n da kos tɩ yɩɩg wanzurf zɩslem sẽn ta neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo, alkam pet koabga, rãam yʋy koabga, kaam yʋy koabga. Sã n ya yamsem, yaa waa a sẽn dat tɛka." 
Ezra7:23 Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa b roog yĩnga, bɩ f maan fãa ne yãgbo, tɩ b sũur da wa yik ne dĩma tẽn-peelem la a neba ye." 
Ezra7:24 Sẽn ket yaa y bãng tɩ y ka tõe n deeg yaood ba a ye maan-kʋʋd nengẽ, bɩ Levitga, bɩ yɩɩn-yɩɩnda, bɩ dagno-gũuda bɩ sõangd ye." 
Ezra7:25 Sã n yaa foo, Esdras, yik ne yam pidung ning f Wẽnd la f noanga sẽn kõ fooma, n zĩndig bʋ-kaoodba la sɩlem dãmba tɩ b welgd sẽn be b Efrat rʋʋnda yɛla, sẽn mi-b Wẽnnaam noora fãa yɛla la b sõng tɩ sẽn ka mi-b noora wa bãng-a." 
Ezra7:26 Ned ning fãa sẽn ka reeg neere Wẽnnaam la dĩma noore, bɩ b paalg-a bʋʋdo n kʋ-a, bɩ b dig-a n yiis y tẽn-peelmẽ, bɩ b yaoolg-a ligdi, bɩ b kẽes-a roogo.»" 
Ezra7:27 A Esdras yeela ne koe kãsenga: «Wẽnnaam d ba rãmb Wẽnde paam barka! Yãmb ninga dĩma sũurẽ t'a tʋlg n waoog yãmba la y rooga sẽn be Zerizalɛɛm. 
Ezra7:28 Yãmb kelga y nonglem sẽn ka be tɛka n waoog maam dĩma taoore, a sagendba la a kug-zĩidb taoore.
