Yaa woto me la m pam raoodo, yãmb sẽn pʋg maam yĩnga tɩ m me yik n tigim Israyɛl kãsem-dãmb kẽere tɩ d tũ taab n lɛɛg n wa. Wẽnd paam barka, b sẽn kõ yam sõngo, dĩma, a kug-zĩidbã la a tẽnga nin-bɛda. Sã n ya maam, Wẽnd kõ-m la sũ-keelem la b sẽn da be ne maam yĩnga, m tõog n tigima buuda kãsem-dãmba tɩ d tũ taab n wa.»" 
Ezra8:1 Ad sagsa kãsem-dãmb niyns sẽn yi-b ne maam Babilon dĩm a Artazerksɛs naamẽ n lɛɛg n wa ka, bãmb ne b zak rãmba." 
Ezra8:2 A Pinas roogẽ, a Gersõ, a Itamar roogẽ, a Daniyɛl, a Daviid roogẽ, a Atus," 
Ezra8:3 a Sekaniya biig a ye; a Paros roogẽ, a Zakari la neb 150 n yãag-a." 
Ezra8:4 Paat-Moab rãmb sakẽ, a Zeraya biig a Eliyoenayi, neb 200 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:5 a Zatu sakẽ, a Yaziyɛl biig a Sekaniya, neb 300 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:6 a Adin sakẽ, a Zonatã biig a Ebed, neb 50 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:7 a Elam sakẽ, a Ataliya biig a Yesaya, neb 70 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:8 a Sefatiya roogẽ, a Mikayɛl biig a Zebadiya, neb 80 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:9 a Zoab roogẽ, a Yeyiyɛl biig a Obadiya neb 218 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:10 a Bani roogẽ, a Zosifiya biig a Selomi, neb 160 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:11 a Bebayi roogẽ, a Bebayi biig a Zakari, neb 28 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:12 a Azgad roogẽ, a Akatã biig a Zoana, neb 110 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:13 a Adonikam rooga yao-zʋʋse, a Elifelɛt, a Yeyiyɛl ne a Semaya, neb 60 n yãag-a;" 
Ezra8:14 a Bigwayi roogẽ, a Utayi, a Zakur, neb 70 n yãag-a." 
Ezra8:15 Yaa ko-sor ning sẽn teesd Aava noor la m tigim pa-wetã, la d paa be ra-yɩten-daare. M gesa neere la m pa yãend maan-kʋʋdba la nin-zaalsa sʋka, Levits ye." 
Ezra8:16 Dẽ la m tʋm kãsem-dãmb a Eliezɛr, a Ariyɛl, a Semaya, a Elnatã, a Yarib, a Elnatã, a Natã, a Zakari la a Mesulam n paas noora karen-saam-dãmba a Zoyarib la Elnatã." 
Ezra8:17 M kõ-b-la noore tɩ b babs Kasifiya naab a Ido. M wilg-b-la b sẽn na n togs bũmb ning a Ido ne a tʋmd-n-taasã la sõangdba sẽn be Kasifiya. M yeel-b lame tɩ b wa ne neb, wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ tʋʋma yĩnga." 
Ezra8:18 La Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn be ne-do n dat d sõngrã, b talla ned sẽn be yam n wa kõ-do. Yɩ-la a Serebiya, a Mali biiga, a Levi biiga, a Israyɛl roogẽ. Yɩɩ yẽ ne a kamba la a saam-biisi, bãmb piig la a nii." 
Ezra8:19 Sẽn waa n paas-a: a Asabiya ne a ba-biig a Yesaya, a Merari roogẽ, bãmb ne b kamba, bãmb pisi." 
Ezra8:20 A Daviid sẽn dɩk b rãmba n kɩs Levitsa sõngr yĩnga, bãmb kobs-yi la pisi, fãa yʋy ra gʋlsa sebr zugu." 
Ezra8:21 Aava ko-sora noore m moona no-loeere la d sulga d mens d Soaala taoore n bõs tɩ b ges-do tɩ d tõog n sɩng d kẽna ne laafi tõnd ne d kamba la zɩɩbã d sẽn tʋkã. 
Ezra8:22 M da zoeta yãnde ne m kos wed-dʋʋdba sẽn na n kogl-d ne d bɛɛbã, sora zugu. Tõnd meng n da pʋs n yeel dĩma tɩ Wẽnd sõngr ka paoogd sẽn baood-b bãmb ye tɩ b sũur yaool n fõt ne neb niyns toog sẽn ka be ne bãmbã." 
Ezra8:23 Tõnd loee d noore n pʋʋs Wẽnde, la b sõng-d lame." 
Ezra8:24 M yãka maan-kʋʋd kãsem-dãmb piig la a yiibu n paas a Serebiya ne a Asabiya la b ba-biis piiga. 
Ezra8:25 Bãmb taoore, m maga sãnema, wanzurfã la teeda fãa dĩma, la a kombɛɛmba, la taoor dãmba, la Israyɛl kamba sẽn kɩs wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
Ezra8:26 M maga b zɩlem n yaool n sagl-ba b nusẽ. Wanzurfa yɩɩ neb tusr zɩɩbo, wanzurf lagdo, neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo, sãnema, neb koabg la pis-nu zɩɩbo." 
Ezra8:27 Sãnem laas wakɩ koeems tusri, zũud lagd a yi sẽn pɩnd, n ya neere, n tar yõod wa sãnem," 
Ezra8:28 Dẽ poore m yeel-b lame: «Y rɩka y meng n kõ Wẽnde, teeda me rɩkame n kõ Wẽnde, wanzurfa la sãnema yaa kũun sẽn kõ yaab rãmb Wẽnda ne yamleoogo." 
Ezra8:29 Bɩ y zã-ba, n le wa magb-b maan-kʋʋdba nanams taoore, Zerizalɛɛm, do-bõonesa pʋga.»" 
Ezra8:30 Maan-kʋʋdba, Levitsa yaoolame marsã n deeg wanzurfã, sãnema la teedã, b tall-b lame n loog Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ." 
Ezra8:31 D gãndga Aava ko-sorã pipi kiuuga pipi raare n dɩk Zerizalɛɛm sore. Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn gũ d sor yĩnga, b zãaga tõnd ne bɛɛba la fãadba sɩlem." 
Ezra8:32 D sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm, d vʋʋsa rasem a tã." 
Ezra8:33 Daar a naas soabã, d talla wanzurfã, sãnema la lagdã n tɩ mag-b wẽnd doogẽ n yaol n dɩk-ba n kɩs maan-kʋʋd a Meremot. Naaga ne a Pinas yagenga, a Elazar, n paas Levits a Zesuwa yagenga a Zozabad la a Binuwi yageng a Noadiya." 
Ezra8:34 Marsã ne pĩnd magbã zemsa taaba; sõora, a ye; zɩslma, a ye; la rẽ fãa gʋlsa sebr zugu. Dẽ poor marsã," 
Ezra8:35 la pa-weta kʋ yũ-noog maoongo Israyɛl Wẽnda yĩnga: yɩɩ lols piig la a yiibu, a Israyɛl kamba yʋʋr yĩnga, la pe-raad pis-wɛ la a yoobe, pe-bi pisopoe la a yiibu. Yel-wẽna sugr kosg yĩnga b kʋʋ boees piig la a yiibu. Maanda fãa yɩɩ yũ-noog maando." 
Ezra8:36 B kɩsa sɛbã Efrat rʋʋnd kombɛɛmba la taoor dãmbã. B fãa sõnga nebã wẽnd dooga tʋʋmd yĩnga. 
Ezra9:1 Sẽn waa n maan kiis a wãna, kãsem-dãmba kolg-m lame n wilg-m woto: «Israyɛl zãma wã, a maan-kʋʋdba, a Levitsa wegma wa tẽnga rãmba. B maana wa Kanaã rãmba, Ititsã, Perizitsã, Zebuzitsã, Amonitsã, Moabitsã, Amoritsã la Ezipt rãmba." 
Ezra9:2 Bãmb ne b kamba kẽe kãadem ne bu-zẽmba la woto buud sõnga tɩ fãooga a meng ne buud a taaba la yaa kãsem-dãmba la nin-bɛdã n dẽgem pipi.» 
Ezra9:3 M sẽn wʋm dẽ, m kẽesa m futu la m gʋsa m zoodbo la m toɛɛnga la m pãs n lʋɩɩ ne sũ-sãanga." 
Ezra9:4 Neb niyns fãa sẽn da zoet-b Israyɛl Wẽnnaama nif waa n tigma mam seegẽ tɩ d yẽs pa-weta bʋdgra yelle la m zĩnda woto ne sũ-sãang n ta zafar maoonga sasa. 
Ezra9:5 Zaabr maoonga wakato la m yik yã, ne m futa sẽn kẽesã la m yĩgimdame n tẽeg m nusa Wẽnnaam m Soaala taoore," 
Ezra9:6 n yeele: «M Wẽnnaam, yãnd tar-m la wʋsgo tɩ m pa rat n doog m neng yãmb taoor ye, Soaala. Tõnd yel-wẽna looga d zĩnd n sõdg-ba, b sama wa tãnga." 
Ezra9:7 Al d yaab rãmba zamaanẽ n ta marsã, d tara y beegr bala n dabda. Yaa d yel-wẽna yĩng la d mense, d dĩm dãmba, d maan-kʋʋdba lʋɩ dũni wã dĩm dãmb a taab soolmẽ, tɩ b koot tõnd ne sʋʋse, n kẽesd tõnd yembdo, n fãad d paoongo, n ningd-d yãnde, la rẽ yaa vẽeneg rũnna." 
Ezra9:8 Daar sẽn nan ka zãage, Soaala nimbãan-zoeera kees-d-la neb kẽere, n yãend zĩig n kẽes-ba, b tẽn-sõnga pʋgẽ. Woto d Wẽnnaama vẽnega d yam la b le kõ-d-la saagre, d yembda pʋgẽ." 
Ezra9:9 D yaa yemse, la d yembda pʋgẽ, d Wẽnnaama ka raag-do n bas ye. Pɛrs rãmba dĩma taoore, b puka b nonglem, n kõ-d pãnga tɩ d le me b roogo n yalse, n yik raboodã, n le me Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm lalse." 
Ezra9:10 La marsã, Naaba-Wẽnde, d na n yeelame tɩ bõe? Tõnd basa y sora tũudem," 
Ezra9:11 d basa noya bãngdba sẽn da taas tõndo. Yãmb n da yeel-do: ‹Ad-y m sẽn na n kẽes-y tẽng ninga yaa tẽn dẽgdo. Tẽnga rãmb rẽgem-a-la ne yel-yoodo niyns b sẽn pids-a, goabg la rɩtgo, poorẽ la taoore." 
Ezra9:12 Woto wã, dũnna tɛka bɩ y ra le rɩk y kom-pugli n kõ b kom-dibli ye, da reeg-y b kom-pugli n kõ y kom-dibli ye, da bao-y laafi ne b ye, da bao-y nin-bãmba yĩn-maasem la b naar ye. Yaa woto bal la y wat n lebg buud sẽn tar pãnga, buud sẽn na n dɩ tẽnga yõodo, tẽng y sẽn na n bas ne y yagense zamaan ne zamaana.›" 
Ezra9:13 D Soaala-Wẽnde, yɛl wʋsgo n pak tõndo, d yel-wẽna yĩnga, d kongra sẽn yɩ wʋsg yĩnga, la ne rẽ fãa y kell n kõo beegra sugri n kees tõnd sẽn yɛs y taoor ka wã." 
Ezra9:14 Ad-y d pa rat n le saag n tõdg y noor ye; d kõn bas tɩ kãadem le zĩnd tõnd ne bãmba sẽn pid ne wẽnema sʋk ye. Ka rẽ y sũura na n puuga ne tõndo tɩ y kʋ-d zãng n ka kees bũmb ye. 
Ezra9:15 D Soaalã, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, yãmb ka bʋʋd kɛg soab ye, dẽ n so tɩ tõnd ket n yɛs y taoor dũnna. La yãmb bal n tõe tɩ sẽn beega yãmb ket n yɛs ne yõore.»" 
Ezra10:1 A Esdras sẽn waa n pʋʋsdẽ la a reegd a kongre la a tees roogã n yãbd la a zĩ ne sũ-sãanga, Israyɛl kamba waa n tigma taab zembala, a sɛɛgẽ: rapa, pagba, kamba la b tar nintãm kiigri." 
Ezra10:2 Dẽ la a Yeyiyɛl biig a Sekaniya, a Elam yagenga, yeel a Esdras: «Tõnd tõdga Wẽnde n kẽ kãadem ne tẽnga bu-zẽmba pagba. Marsã a Israyɛl saagdame tɩ rẽ kõn le mak ye." 
Ezra10:3 D le yõg zoodo ne Naaba-Wẽnd la d dig bu-zẽn-pogsã ne b kamba, wala Esdras la sẽn zoet-b Wẽnd nif sẽn sagend tõndã. Bɩ d sẽn maand fãa marsã tũ wa noora sẽn date." 
Ezra10:4 Yiki Esdras, tɩ foo n tar yella tɩɩm la d bee f poorẽ. Wɩsg f menga tɩ d sɩnge.»" 
Ezra10:5 A Esdras yikame n kɩt tɩ zagsa kãsem-dãmba, maan-kʋʋdba, Levitse la a Israyɛl gill wẽen wala a sẽn da yalse." 
Ezra10:6 A Esdras yika a sẽn da be zĩig ningã n tees wẽnd doogã la a rɩka a Eliyasib biig a Zoana yir sore. A taa be n kell n zãgs koom la rɩɩbo, n yõk yãbr pa-weta sẽn bʋdg mooga yĩnga." 
Ezra10:7 A kɩtame tɩ b moon Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda n wilg pa-weta fãa tɩ b tigim Zerizalɛɛm. 
Ezra10:8 Ned ning fãa sẽn zãgsa waoong rasem a tãab pʋgẽ, wala nin-kẽemsa sẽn yẽs n dɩglã, bɩ a sẽn so fãa lebg kisgu la b yiis-a pa-weta sʋka." 
Ezra10:9 Dasem a tãab pʋgẽ, a Zɩɩda la Bẽnzame neba gill tigma taab Zerizalɛɛm, Tebɛt kiuugu, kiuug a wɛ soaba, kiuuga pisi raare. Neba fãa gill paa wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ. Yella kẽes-b-la rabeem n paas saaga me sẽn yõk niibã." 
Ezra10:10 Maan-kʋʋd a Esdras yik n yeel-b lame: «Yãmb pa maan neere; y sẽn kẽ kãadem ne bu-zẽn-pogsã, yaa a Israyɛl doog la y kẽes moog zãnga." 
Ezra10:11 Reeg-y y kongr Naaba-Wẽnd taoore, y yaab rãmb Wẽnda taoore, n maan b raab marsã la y zãag-y mens ne tẽnga rãmba, ne bu-zẽn-pogsã.»" 
Ezra10:12 Zãma wã fãa leoka ne pãnga: «F gomd yaa sɩda la d na n maana wala f sẽn togsã! 
Ezra10:13 D na n kong n wilg-f lame bala tɩ zãma wã labsa la yaa sa-sika. Yals saagẽ wã yaa toogo, la ka dasem a yiib pʋgẽ la d tõe n welg yella ye." 
Ezra10:14 Sẽn ya woto wã bɩ zagsa kãsem-dãmb bal pa b zĩigẽ ka. Neb niyns sẽn tar b bu-zẽn-pogsa na tɩ sak b tẽnga nin-kẽems la b bʋ-kaoodba, b sẽn bool-b raare n na n welg yellã. Na n yɩɩ woto n tãag Naaba-Wẽnd sũura maagre.»" 
Ezra10:15 Neb a yiibu n yeel tɩ sẽn leok woto wã ka zems ye. Yɩ-la a Asayɛl biig a Zonatã la a Tikva biig a Yasega. A Mesulam ne Levitg a Sabetayi me goma boto. 
Ezra10:16 Pa-weta yẽ maana wala b sẽn yeel-bã. B yãka maan-kʋʋd a Esdras, yẽ ne neb a taaba, ned kam fãa a ba roog yĩnga, n gʋls b yʋʋr tɩ b sɩng yɛla vɛɛsgo, kiuug piiga soaba pipi raare," 
Ezra10:17 n baas pipi kiuuga pipi raare. B paama neb niyns fãa sẽn da tar b bu-zẽn-pogse. 
Ezra10:18 Ad maan-kʋʋdba yagensa sʋka neb niyns sẽn kẽ-b kãadem ne bu-zẽn dãmba. A Zozuwe roogẽ: yaa a Zosadak biiga, la a saam-biis kẽere, a Maaseya, a Eliezɛr, a Yarib la a Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 B wẽename tɩ b na yiis b pagbã la b beegra yĩnga b yõka pe-raoog n maan sugr kosg maoongo. 
Ezra10:20 A Imɛr roogẽ: a Anani la a Zebadiya. 
Ezra10:21 A Arim roogẽ: a Maaseya, a Eliya, a Semaya, a Yeyiyɛl la a Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 A Pasewur roogẽ: a Eliyoenayi, a Maaseya, a Yismayɛl, a Netaneyɛl, a Zozabad la a Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Levitsa sʋka yɩ-la a Zozabad, a Simeyi, a Kelaya, kẽer t'a Kelita, a Petayiya, a Yewuda la a Eliezɛr." 
Ezra10:24 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sʋka: a Eliyasib. Dagno-gũudba sʋka: a Salum, a Telem, a Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Israyɛl nin-zaalsa sʋka, a Paros roogẽ: a Ramiya, a Iziya, a Malkiya, a Miyamin, a Elazar, a Malkiya la a Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 A Elam roogẽ: a Mataniya, a Zakari, a Yeyiyɛl, a Abdi, a Yerimot, a Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 A Zatu roogẽ: a Eliyoenayi, a Eliyasib, a Mataniya, a Yerimot, a Zabad, a Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 A Bebayi roogẽ: a Zoana, a Ananiya, a Zabtayi, a Atlayi." 
Ezra10:29 A Bani roogẽ: a Mesulam, a Maluk, a Adaya, a Yasub, a Seal, a Yerimot." 
Ezra10:30 A Paat-Moab roogẽ: a Adna, a Kelal, a Benaya, a Maaseya, a Mataniya, a Besaleyɛl, a Binuwi la a Manase." 
Ezra10:31 A Arim roogẽ: a Eliezɛr, a Isiya, a Malkiya, a Semaya, a Simeõ," 
Ezra10:32 a Bẽnzame, a Maluk, a Semariya." 
Ezra10:33 A Asuwum roogẽ: a Matenayi, a Matata, a Zabad, a Elifelɛt, a Yeremayi, a Manase, a Simeyi." 
Ezra10:34 A Bani roogẽ: a Maadayi, a Amram, a Uwɛl," 
Ezra10:35 a Benaya, a Bediya, a Keluwu," 
Ezra10:36 a Vaniya, a Meremot, a Elyasib," 
Ezra10:37 a Mataniya, a Matenayi, la a Yasayi." 
Ezra10:38 A Bani, a Binuwi, a Simeyi," 
Ezra10:39 a Selemiya, a Natã la a Adaya." 
Ezra10:40 A Maknadebayi, a Sasayi, a Sarayi," 
Ezra10:41 a Azarɛl, a Selemiya, a Semariya," 
Ezra10:42 a Salum, a Amariya, a Zozɛf." 
Ezra10:43 A Nebo roogẽ: a Yeyiyɛl, a Matitiya, a Zabad, a Zebina, a Yadayi, a Zowɛl, a Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Bãmb fãa da kẽe ne bu-zẽmb pagba. La b yiis-b-la gilli, bãmb ne b kamba. Pagb kẽer da roga kamba." 
Nehemiah1:1 Ad-a Akaliya biig a Neemi sẽn togse. Kislewu kiuugu, a Artazerksɛs sẽn waa n dɩt a yʋʋm pisi naam, tɩ m da bee Suz pʋgẽ, tẽng sẽn tõe n zab n fãag a meng pugẽ." 
Nehemiah1:2 M yao a ye sẽn boond tɩ Anani waa ne neb sẽn yi Zɩɩda. M sẽn sok-b Zʋɩf rãmb yelle, yembda sẽn dɩ n keesa yelle, Zerizalɛɛm yelle," 
Nehemiah1:3 b leok m lame: «Yembdã sẽn dɩ n kees tɩ b lɛɛg n wa b tẽngẽ wã tara pɛt la yãnde. Sã n ya Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã, a yaa begse la kʋɩlensa dɩɩ bugum.»" 
Nehemiah1:4 M sẽn wʋm dẽ m lʋɩɩme n sĩng yãbre, m paa sũ-sãang pʋgẽ dasem a wãna, n loe m noore la m pʋʋsa Yĩngr-Soaala taoore." 
Nehemiah1:5 M yeel-b lame: «Naaba-Wẽnde, Yĩngr-Soaala, Pãng sẽn kẽesd dabeem soab la yãmba. Wakat buud fãa y nonglma pʋgda sẽn nong-b yãmb la b reegd y noya." 
Nehemiah1:6 Bɩ y yoog y tʋb la y puk y nini la y kelg y yamba pʋʋsgo. Yaa wĩndg la yʋng marsã la m tar pʋʋsgo, y kamba yĩnga la m wilgd beegr ning d sẽn beeg yãmbã. Maam ne m saam-biisa sɩd beegame." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tõnd ka maan neer ye, d ka reg y noya, y saglse la dog-n-mik ning y sẽn kõ a Israyɛl ne a Moyiiz noora ye." 
Nehemiah1:8 Tẽeg-y gomd ninga y sẽn ning y sõgen a Moyiiz noorẽ. Yaa woto la y ra yeel-a: ‹Y sã n yɩ tõatba, y na sẽeg buud a taab sʋka." 
Nehemiah1:9 Y sã n le gãd maam, n deeg m noya, y sã n tũ-ba, ba ya mooga satmẽ la b loog ne y nebã, m na tɩ tall-ba n wa tẽng ning m yʋʋr sẽn na n paam pẽgrã, m sẽn yãk tɩ ya m waoogr zĩigã.›" 
Nehemiah1:10 Ade, yaa bãmb la y sẽn fãag ne pãnga la rugdu." 
Nehemiah1:11 Soaala, kelg-y y yamba pʋʋsg neere. Kelg-y y buuda pʋʋsgo tɩ b nonga yãmba n pẽgd y yʋʋra ne rabeem. M kot y lame tɩ m tʋʋmd zĩnd yõodo la y sak tɩ dĩma deeg-m neere.» Tʋʋmd ning m sẽn da paam dĩma nengẽ, yaa n pʋdgd dãam n kõt-a t'a yũuda." 
Nehemiah2:1 A Artazerksɛs naam sẽn wa n pid yʋʋm pisi, nizã kiuug pʋgẽ, m waa n kotã rĩma rãam tɩ rẽ n da ya m tʋʋmde la a mikame tɩ m neng gãnemame, la m neng da zɩ n gãnem bada." 
Nehemiah2:2 Yaa rẽ la dĩma sok-ma: «Yaa bõe yĩng la f neng ya dusa? F yaool n ka bãad la? Yaa bõe sũ-sãang n tar-fo?» M sũura sɩnga kiuusgu," 
Nehemiah2:3 la m waa n tõog n yeela dĩma: «Dĩm sõngo, Wẽnd na wogl y yõore! La ges-y wɛ, m neng yɩta wãn n ka gãneme tɩ m ba rãmb sẽn gãe tẽng ninga lebg raboogo, t'a kʋɩlens lebg bug-rɩɩndo?»" 
Nehemiah2:4 Dẽ la dĩma sok yã: «Bõe la f rata?» M sẽn pʋʋs yĩngr Soaala," 
Nehemiah2:5 m leoka dĩma woto: «Wẽnd na kaoos-y y gãagẽ la y sã n nong-ma bɩ y bas-m tɩ m kẽng Zɩɩda, m ba rãmba yaad sẽn be tẽng ningã n tɩ yik a lalse.»" 
Nehemiah2:6 Dĩma sok-m lame, la dẽ tɩ na-paga ra zĩ-la a sɛɛgẽ: «F kẽnda na n kaoosa kiis a wãna? F na n lɛɛg n waa ra-bʋre?»" 
Nehemiah2:7 M le paasame: «Sã n ta y yam, y kõn kɩs-m sɛb tɩ m kõ Efrat rʋʋnd kombɛɛmba tɩ b bas-m tɩ m loog n ta Zɩɩda?" 
Nehemiah2:8 La y kõn paas sebr a to a Asaf yĩnga, dĩma tɩɩs naaba yĩnga t'a sõng-d ne raado sẽn na n ka tãnsoben-dooga kʋɩlense? Ro-kãng la sẽn pẽ wẽnd dooga. A sõngd ne raad niyns fãa d sẽn tar b rãmb tʋʋmde, lal-gũbrã la m meng roog yĩnga.» Dĩma kõ-m-la sɛbã. Soaala-Wẽnd ka zãag-m ne b sõngr ye." 
Nehemiah2:9 M sẽn ta kombɛɛmba nengẽ, kombɛɛmb nins sẽn kẽed nin-taoor tẽnsã, m kɩs b la sɛbã. Dĩma kɩtame tɩ tãnsoab-bi la wed-dʋʋdb yãag maam." 
Nehemiah2:10 A Sanebalat, Orõ tẽng raoa la a tʋmd-n-taaga, Amonitga a Tobiya, sẽn wʋm m waoongã, b sũur pa yɩ noog ye. B ra pa rat tɩ ned pʋg Israyɛl dãmba poor ye." 
Nehemiah2:11 M sẽn ta Zerizalɛɛm, m paa be rasem a tã." 
Nehemiah2:12 M pa wilg ned ba a ye Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn da ning m sũurẽ tɩ m maan Zerizalɛɛm yĩng ye. Dẽ poore m yika ne yʋngo n kɩt tɩ neb bilf bal yãag-ma. Rũng a to me ra ka paase sã n ka m sẽn zomb bõang ningã. 
Nehemiah2:13 M yii ne yʋngo. M tũu noor ning sẽn tees bãg-faagã. M teesa wag-bãnda bãka la tãmpʋʋra noore. M gesa Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbra. M yãeeme t'a lʋɩɩ zĩig-zĩiga la bugma dɩ-la a kʋɩlensã. 
Nehemiah2:14 M kell n gilgame n ta ko-bundga noore, n ta dĩma kʋɩlga. Be tɛka bõanga ka le yãend a sẽn tõe n tũ zĩig ning ye." 
Nehemiah2:15 M lɛɛg dʋʋga Sedrõ sudga ne yʋngo n maneg n ges lal-gũbrã. Woto m sẽn ta tãnga pende, m gilga fãa n sege." 
Nehemiah2:16 Tẽnga soaalba ka bãng m sẽn kẽngẽ la m sẽn da rat n maan bũmb ning ye. M da nan pa yaag m noor n togs Zʋɩf rãmba tɩ bũmb ye. M da nan ka wilg maan-kʋʋdba, bɩ kãsem-dãmba, bɩ nin-kẽemba, bɩ a mi-saglsa rãmba, bɩ taoor dãmba ye." 
Nehemiah2:17 Yaa wakat kãng marsã la m yeel-ba: «Yãmb nee d sẽn be nimbãaneg ning pʋga, Zerizalɛɛm rota lebga wãando, a kʋɩlens rɩɩ bugum. Wa-y tɩ d le me a lal-gũbra tɩ b ra le paam n tʋʋs-d ye.»" 
Nehemiah2:18 M wilg-b lame menga Wẽnd nimbãan-zoeera nug sẽn tik-m to-to. M wilg-b-la dĩma koɛɛga. Dẽ la b naag taab n yeele: «D yik n sɩng meebo.» Baad-y b sɩd ninga pãng ne b tʋʋmd sõngã. 
Nehemiah2:19 B sẽn wʋm dẽ, Orõ daoa a Sanebalat, Amon daoa a Tobiya, a tũud-n-taaga la arabga a Gesem sɩnga tõnd laado. B waa n yeel-d lame: «Bõe la yãmb maand ka? Yãmb dat n yii dĩma soolmẽ laa?»" 
Nehemiah2:20 Dẽ la m leok-ba: «Yaa Yĩngr Soaala n na n kɩt tɩ tʋʋmda baas neere; tõnd sẽn ya bãmb yemsã, yaa tõnd n na n yik n sɩng tʋʋmna. Yãmb yee n bãng tɩ Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ y ka so fɩ, y ka tar noor n kõtẽ, ned ka sokd-y yell ye.»" 
Nehemiah3:1 Maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Eliyasib ne maan-kʋʋdb a taaba yikame n sɩng Rũmsa pegba noor meebo. B me-a lame n sɛ n ning-a barka, n lugl a kʋɩlensã. B talla lal-gũbra manegre n ta neb koabg ro-lug-lugã, n ning-a barka; n le tall meebo n ta a Ananeyɛl ro-lug-lugi." 
Nehemiah3:2 Zeriko rãmb n dɩk sẽn pʋgdã, t'a Imbri biig a Zakur me rɩk sẽn pʋgdã." 
Nehemiah3:3 Yaa Senaa tẽng rãmb n maneg n ta Zĩm noora zãongo. B maneg-a lame n me n ning sugri, n yals kʋɩlengã a nao zugu, n ning kut sogdse." 
Nehemiah3:4 A Uriya biiga la a Akos yagenga a Meremot n da yegd bãmba. Bãmb yegende yaa a Berekiya biiga a Mesulam, a Mesezabɛl biiga. Bãmb yegende, a Baana biig a Sadok." 
Nehemiah3:5 Bãmb yegende, Tekoa rãmba. B tẽnga nin-kẽems zãgsame tɩ b kõn wa n naag n tʋm ne tʋʋmda taoor dãmb ye." 
Nehemiah3:6 Sã n ya Kẽedpaoolg zãongã ne a kʋɩlenga yaa a Zoyada, a Paseya biiga la a Besodiya biig a Mesulam n maneg-a. B maneg-a lame n me n ning sugri, n yals a kʋɩlengã, a nao zugu, n ning kut sogdse." 
Nehemiah3:7 Sẽn pʋg-b bãmba: Gabaõ raoa a Melatiya, Meremot daoa a Yadõ ne Gabaõ la Mispa rãmb neb kẽere. Efrat rʋʋnd komberã n yeel bãmb tɩ b wa tʋme." 
Nehemiah3:8 Sẽn yõsg bãmba, yaa yõaka a Uziyɛl, a Araya biiga, n paas yũ-nooda kalemda, a Ananiya. B sɛɛsa b tʋʋmda Zerizalɛɛm b sẽn ta lal-gũbra sẽn lebg yaleng zĩig ningã." 
Nehemiah3:9 Bãmb yegende yɩ-la a Refaya, a Ur biiga, Zerizalɛɛm bogr a ye soaala." 
Nehemiah3:10 Bãmb yegende: a Yedaya, a Arumaf biiga; a manega sẽn tot ne a roogã. Sẽn pʋge, yɩ-la a Asabneya biig a Atus." 
Nehemiah3:11 Sẽn pʋge: a Arim biig a Malkiya la a Paat-Moab biig a Asub, la b manegame n ta sãaba bugtoolsa zĩisẽ." 
Nehemiah3:12 Sẽn pʋge: Zerizalɛɛm bogr a to wã soaala, a Aloɛs biig a Salum, yẽ ne a kom-pugli." 
Nehemiah3:13 Sã n ya bãg-faaga zãongã, Zanoa tẽng rãmb ne a Anun maneg-a lame n me, n ning sugri, n yals a kʋɩlengã, a nao zugu, n ning kut sogdse. Bãmb n kell n maneg lal-gũbrã n ta Tãmpʋʋra dignoore. B manegra taa kãntɩɩs tusri." 
Nehemiah3:14 Tãmpʋʋra dignoorã, Bɛt-Kerem soaal a Malkiya, a Rekab biiga, maneg-a lame n me n ning sugri, n yals a kʋɩlengã, a nao zugu n ning kut sogdse." 
Nehemiah3:15 A Kol-Oze biig a Salum sẽn ya Mispa soaalã n maneg Ko-bundma zãongã n me, n ning sugri, n yals a kʋɩlengã, a nao zugu n ning kut sogdse. A naagame n maneg lal-gũbr ning sẽn yegd Siloe kʋɩlgã, sẽn sɩng dĩma zẽedẽ n ta teedsã sẽn dʋʋd a Daviid na-tẽnga." 
Nehemiah3:16 Yẽ poore: Bɛt-Sur soaala, a Neemi, a Azbuk biiga, n maneg lalgã n ta dĩm dãmba yaado, n ta kooma sẽn gɩdg zĩig ningã, n ta dĩma gũudba tãb-sika." 
Nehemiah3:17 Yẽ poore, Levit dãmb n pʋge: A Bani biig a Rewum n yɩ pipi; sẽn pʋge yɩɩ Keyila bogre soaal, a Asabiya. A tʋma Keyila bogr a sẽn so wã yĩnga." 
Nehemiah3:18 A Bavayi n pʋge, yaa a Enadad biiga la Keyila bogr a to wã soaala." 
Nehemiah3:19 Sẽn pʋge yɩ-la a Ezɛr, Mispa naaba la a Zesuwa biiga. A manega kɩreng ning sẽn tot ne zab-teeda bĩngr zĩigã, zĩig ning lalga sẽn tʋʋg n yi yɩngã." 
Nehemiah3:20 Bãmb yegende: a Zabayi biig a Barʋk, ra zɛɛgda ne tʋʋmna; yẽ sɩnga lalga sẽn tʋʋg n yi yɩngã n ta maan-kʋʋd kãseng, a Eliyasib, dooga noore." 
Nehemiah3:21 Yẽ yegende, a Uriya biig la a Akok yagenga, a Meremot. A sɩnga a Eliyasib doogã n ta a satem." 
Nehemiah3:22 Sẽn pʋg-b yẽ yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdb niyns sẽn pẽ-b Zerizalɛɛm. 
Nehemiah3:23 A Bẽnzame ne a Asub manega sẽn tot bãmb dotã, t'a Ananiya yagenga la a Maaseya biig a Azariya soog lalg ning sẽn pẽ a roogã." 
Nehemiah3:24 Sẽn pʋge: a Enadad biig a Binuwi; yẽ manega Gõdra tɛka ne a Azariya dooga sʋka. 
Nehemiah3:25 Sẽn pʋge: a Uzayi biig a Palal; yẽ meeba sɩnga lalga gõdre n ta ro-lug-lugã, dĩma zak taoore, gũudba tãb-sika yegende. Yẽ taoore, a Paros biig a Pedaya," 
Nehemiah3:26 da naaga ne sẽn da sõngd-b wẽnd dooga tʋʋm-tʋmdbã la sẽn da kẽed Ofɛl la bãmb n maneg n ta ro-lug-luga la gõdra sẽn be kooma noora yaanga. 
Nehemiah3:27 Bãmb yegende: Tekoa rãmba. B mee ro-lug-luga tɛka n ta Ofɛl lalga. 
Nehemiah3:28 Sẽn sɩng Wiidi noorã, yɩɩ maan-kʋʋdba n tʋme la ned kam fãa manega sẽn tot ne a roogo." 
Nehemiah3:29 Bãmb taoore, a Imɛr biig a Sadok manega sẽn tot ne a roogo. Sẽn pʋga yẽ yɩ-la a Sekaniya biig a Semaya, yaang dignoora gũuda." 
Nehemiah3:30 Sẽn pʋgde: a Selemiya biig a Ananiya, n paas a Salaf a Anun biiga, yẽ kẽem-dãmb ya-la b nu. Yẽ yegende: a Berekiya biig a Mesulam; yẽ me manega lalg ning sẽn tota ne a yiri." 
Nehemiah3:31 Yẽ taoore: noakensã la lɛɛbdba roto, sẽn sɩng Gũudb noore n ta do-lug-luga sẽn me gõdrẽ wã." 
Nehemiah3:32 Yõgs a taaba la lɛɛbdba n maneg sẽn tot gõdrã n ta Dũmsa pegb noore. 
Nehemiah3:33 A Sanebalat sẽn wʋm tɩ tõnd le yikda lalgã, a sũura wẽnemdame, a sũura puuga wʋsgo. A sɩnga Zʋɩf rãmba laado." 
Nehemiah3:34 A yeela a saam-biisi la Samari ligd bɛda rãmba: «Yaa bõe la Zɩɩda nin-yaalsa maand ka. B tẽedame tɩ b daaba na waa n pidsi? Tɩ b na le tõog n kʋ maand ka? Tʋʋmda na baase? Lalg kõn lʋɩ tɩ b gaas a kuga n yiis bug rĩungẽ n le lɛɛg n dɩk-ba n me lalg tɩ yaas ye.» 
Nehemiah3:35 Dẽ la Amonitga, a Tobiya, sẽn da yɛs a sɛɛgẽ yeel-a: «B ning pãng ne meebo. We-baag yee n da wa fão b kuga lalgã n lub-a sara!»" 
Nehemiah3:36 Tɩ m gom ne Wẽnd n yeele: «Ges-y b sẽn laad tõndo; kɩt-y tɩ b paoogr lɛɛg n dɩ-ba. Bao-y yembd tẽng n kẽes-ba tɩ b me yãe yaoolgo. 
Nehemiah3:37 Da yĩm-y b wẽnema ye, da pek-y b yel-wẽnda ye tɩ b yaala y tẽnga metba.»" 
Nehemiah3:38 Tõnd yika lal-gũbra n dʋʋs-a a zãndlma pʋɩ-sʋka la neba ra tʋma ne sũuri. 
Nehemiah4:1 B sẽn wʋm tɩ Zerizalɛɛm lalsa yikda sõmb-sõmbo, tɩ bogda sɩngd yẽdbo, a Sanebalat, a Tobiya, arab dãmba, Amon dãmba la Asdod dãmb puuga b sũuri." 
Nehemiah4:2 B sedame tɩ rẽnd b wa tak zabr ne Zerizalɛɛm, n ning-a yãnde." 
Nehemiah4:3 Dẽ la tõnd pʋʋs d Wẽnnaam tɩ b gũ d tẽngã la d yalsa neb sẽn na n maan gũusgu ne bɛɛba, wĩndg la yʋngo." 
Nehemiah4:4 A Zɩɩda kamba ra zoe n basa raoodo n yetẽ: «Kug zɩtba pãng komsame, toma yaa wʋsgo! D kõn tõog abada, n le yik lal-gũbra ye!»" 
Nehemiah4:5 Dẽ tɩ d bɛɛba me ra gomda woto: «D na n soos n kẽ-la b sʋka tɩ b pa bãng la b pa yãend fɩ la d na n kʋ-b-la zãnga tɩ b tʋʋmda pa tõog n baas ye.» 
Nehemiah4:6 B ka bãng tɩ Zʋɩf rãmba sẽn ya bãmb yagse n waa n wilg naoor yaka: «Ad f sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, f nee bɛɛba sẽn baood n na lʋɩ n yẽegd-do.»" 
Nehemiah4:7 M tɩ yalsa m neba lal-gũbra tẽngr pẽgsẽ. M yals b la zak-zaka, ne sʋʋse la kãna la tãbdo." 
Nehemiah4:8 M neba da rigda rabeem. Dẽ la m yeel zãma wa ne tẽnga nin-bɛd la a nin-kẽemse: «Dã zoe-y nin-bãmba ye, tags-y Soaala-Wẽnd yelle, tẽeg-y tɩ b tara pãnga, tɩ ned fãa tog n zoe-ba, zab-y saam-biisa yĩnga, y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli yĩnga, y pagb la y rot yĩnga.»" 
Nehemiah4:9 Bɛɛba waa n bãngame tɩ tõnd mi-la b tiiri. B bãngame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pa sak tɩ b raab wẽnga pids ye. Woto d fãa le sɩnga lalga tʋʋmde, ned kam fãa leba a zĩigẽ." 
Nehemiah4:10 Baraar tɛka neba pʋɩ-sʋk bala n da tʋmdẽ. Pʋɩ-sʋka ra yɛsa ne kãna la gãndo la tãbdo la kut futu. Zagsa kãsem-dãmba fãa ra kogenda Zɩɩda lal-gũbra metba. 
Nehemiah4:11 Sẽn dʋʋsd-b lalgã, sẽn zɩt-b kuga la raadã ra boba b zab-teedo. Nug a ye n da tʋmde, tɩ nug a to wẽbg zab-teoogo." 
Nehemiah4:12 Metba sẽbgda sʋʋg b sɛɛgẽ n yaool n sɩng tʋʋmde. M da yalsa baorg pɛɛdb m sɛɛgẽ. 
Nehemiah4:13 M yeela nin-bɛdã, nin-kẽemsã la zãma wã fãa: «Tʋʋmda labsa la a wogma, woto tõnd sẽega taaba la d zãra ne taaba la ade," 
Nehemiah4:14 tigim-y taab baorga sẽn na n peeb zĩig ningã la Wẽnd na zab n sõng do.» 
Nehemiah4:15 Yaa woto la tõnd pʋɩ-sʋk ra tʋʋmda, tɩ d nug a ye tik kãnde, zĩig yẽgre n tãg ãds pukri." 
Nehemiah4:16 Wakat kãnga m le yeela zãma wã me woto: «Ned fãa ne a dakõor tog n paa Zerizalɛɛm tɩ yʋngo bɩ d tar gũusgu, tɩ wĩntoogo bɩ d tar meebo.»" 
Nehemiah4:17 Maam woo, m saam-biisa woo, zãma wã woo, sẽn so-b gũusgã, ned ba a ye pa yeeg a fuugu, zab-teoog pa yi ned ba a ye nug rɩtg ye." 
Nehemiah5:1 Nin-zẽmba ne b pagbã waa n yika guglgu ne Zʋɩf rãmba. 
Nehemiah5:2 Kẽer da yetame: «Tõnd ne d kamba yaa wʋsgo, d datẽ lame n paam alkam, n dɩ n põse.»" 
Nehemiah5:3 Kẽer da yetame: «Yaa pakr ne tõndo tɩ dɩk d pʋto la d bugsuntundu la d zagsa mense n boble, d sã n dat alkam, kom wẽnde.»" 
Nehemiah5:4 Kẽer da yetame: «Sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam naaba yaoodã n kɩse, tõnd kong n sarda d pʋt la d bugsuntundu." 
Nehemiah5:5 Tõnd yaool n yaa buud a ye, d kamba zema bãmb kamba, la bõe marsã tɩ d tog n koos d kom-dibli la d kom-pugli? D kom-pugli kẽer meng zoe n lebga yemse tɩ d ka tar noor n leokdẽ ye. D putã la d tɩɩsã zoe n yaa d sẽn dɩ b rãmb samda soolem.»" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ma me sũur yika wʋsgo m sẽn wʋm b guglgu la b goama. 
Nehemiah5:7 M bilga yellã m yamẽ la ne m zaba nin-kẽembã la taoor dãmbã. M yeel-b lame: «Yaa bõe tɩ yãmb zɩlg taab zɩɩb bɛda?» M kɩtame tɩ neba fãa tigim. 
Nehemiah5:8 M goma woto: «D maana d sẽn tõe n yiis d saam-biisã sẽn da kẽes yembd bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ. Bõe marsã tɩ yãmb lɛɛg n koosd-b ne taaba?» La b fãa paa sɩɩ n pa tõog n leok bũmb ye. 
Nehemiah5:9 Tɩ m paase: «Y sẽn maanda ka neer ba bilf ye. Y vɩɩm tog n yɩɩ neb sẽn zoet Wẽnd nif vɩɩm, n da wa lebg bu-zẽmba sẽn ya tõnd bɛɛba laad ye." 
Nehemiah5:10 Maam me, wala m yaopã la m saam-biisã, mam me ra peng-b-la ligd la koodo. D da sok d samda ye." 
Nehemiah5:11 Lebs-y rũnda menga b pʋt la b tɩɩse la b roto, d bas b sama taale: ligda samdã, koodã, dãama, kaamã.»" 
Nehemiah5:12 La b fãa naaga taab n leoke: «D na n lebsa fãa mars-marsã bala, d basa fãa taale, wala fo sẽn wilgã.» La m boola maan-kʋʋdbã n kɩt tɩ b wẽen tɩ b na pids b kãabgã." 
Nehemiah5:13 Dẽ poore m fugumda n fuug n yeele: «Bɩ Wẽnd fugumd ned ning fãa sẽn ka pids a kãabgo, n yiis a soab b tẽn-peelmẽ la b soolmẽ! Bɩ Wẽnd fugumd a soaba wa m sẽn fugumd m fuugã t'a fɩk n menem!» La b zãng fãa naaga taab n yeel: «Ami!» La b pẽga Naaba-Wẽnde la b pidsa b pʋlengo." 
Nehemiah5:14 Dẽ n so tɩ yʋʋm piig la a yiib pʋgẽ, dĩma sẽn yet tɩ m lebg Zɩɩda komber tɛka, a Artazerksɛs naam sẽn ta pisi yʋʋmde n digd a yʋʋmd pis-tã la a yiibu, maam ne m saam-biisa ka le reeg yõor yaood ye." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kombɛɛmba sẽn deng b maama yẽ da zɛɛda nebã. Beoog fãa, b bura raab yĩnga b ra reegda wanzurf wakɩ koeems pis-naase. B sõgen-kamba meng ra namsda nebã. La mam sẽn zoet Soaala-Wẽndã, m zɩɩ n maan boto ye." 
Nehemiah5:16 M modga ne lalga meebo ne m sẽn da ka tar pʋʋgã. M tigma m neba fãa tʋʋmda yĩnga. 
Nehemiah5:17 Sẽn yaool da naagd-b maama n dɩtẽ wã yaa taoor dãmbã la kãsem-dãmbã, neb koabg la pis-nu. La m pa gomd sẽn mi n yi b tẽns a taab n wa wã ye." 
Nehemiah5:18 Beoog fãa, m da kõt-b-la loalg a ye, pe-wubds piiga la noose. Dasem piig fãa m da kɩtdame tɩ b wa ne rãam lagd ka tɛka. M zɩ n deeg yõora yaood ye tɩ neba ra zoe n tʋmda tʋʋmd toogo." 
Nehemiah5:19 Tẽeg-y m yelle, Soaala, tẽeg-y m sẽn maan fãa y buuda yĩnga." 
Nehemiah6:1 B sẽn waa n togs a Sanebalat, a Tobiya, arabg a Gesem la d bɛɛb a taabã tɩ tõnd yika lalgã n pa tol n kees wɛdg ba a ye, dẽ tɩ m da ka paam n lugl kʋɩlensa zãng ye." 
Nehemiah6:2 Ad-b sẽn tʋm tɩ b wa yeel-ma: «Wa tɩ d seg taab Kefirim, Ono sẽne.» B ra baood-m-la ne wẽnga." 
Nehemiah6:3 M tʋma b nengẽ tɩ b tɩ yeel-ba: «M tara tʋʋmd kãsenga, m pa tõe n bas n wa be ye. Bõe tɩ m na n bas n wa sak y boolla tɩ tʋʋmda yõdg n yalse?»" 
Nehemiah6:4 Yɩɩ naoor a naas la b sẽn bool-m woto la wakat fãa m leok-b-la leok-yɛnga. 
Nehemiah6:5 La a Sanebalat sẽn da gãd yella kẽnkẽ tʋma a sõgen naoor a nu soaba ne sebr sẽn ka pag ye. 
Nehemiah6:6 Woto n da be sebra zugu: «Kibar n wa m nengẽ tɩ foo ne Zʋɩf rãmbã dat n fugumda y mens n yɩ dĩma soolmẽ la yaa rẽ yĩng la y le yikd lal-gũbrã, la b paasame tɩ foo n na n lebg dĩma." 
Nehemiah6:7 Tɩ rẽnd yĩnga f bao bãngdba sẽn na n sõng-fo, bãngdb sẽn na n moone: a Zɩɩda paama dĩm marsã. Ade, dẽ fãa na n lʋɩ dĩma tʋbrẽ, dẽ la m yet tɩ f wa tɩ d yẽse.»" 
Nehemiah6:8 M yeelame tɩ b tɩ leok-a woto: «Bũmb ka be n wẽnd fo sẽn togsa ye; foom n naan dẽ fãa f yamẽ.» 
Nehemiah6:9 B da baood n na n yɛɛsa tõnd, tɩ d yɛ ne d tʋʋma, n ka baas-b ye, la dẽ kenga tõnd daoodo. «Soaala, sõng-y-ma tɩ m tʋʋmda baas neere!»" 
Nehemiah6:10 M waa n kẽnga a Delaya biig a Semaya nengẽ; a Delaya ba la a Metabeyɛl; m kẽnga a nengẽ t'a ra ka paam vɩʋʋg n wa ye la ad-a sẽn yeel-ma: «D seg taab Naaba-Wẽnd doogẽ. D kẽ wẽnd dooga tẽnsʋka, d pag a kʋɩlensã neere, tɩ b rat n wa kʋ-f lame. N-ye, yʋng kãnga bala, b na n wa kʋ-f lame.»" 
Nehemiah6:11 M leokame: «Mam to wã na zoe? Ãnda wa maama n na n saag n kẽ wẽnd doogẽ n le vɩɩnde? M pa na n seg-y ye!» 
Nehemiah6:12 M bãngame tɩ ka Wẽnd n tʋm-a ye, m bãngame t'a sẽn gom woto wã, a Tobiya n da kõ-a ligdi t'a togs boto." 
Nehemiah6:13 A ra tʋll n kẽesa rabeem m sũurẽ tɩ m maan wẽnga la woto b na tõog n sãam m yʋʋr la b paoog-ma. 
Nehemiah6:14 Tẽeg-y-yã, Soaala, a Tobiya la a Sanebalat yelle, da yĩm-y-yã b sẽn maana ye. Tẽeg-y bãngd-poak a Noadiya yelle, da yĩm-y bãngdba taaba me sẽn da rat n kẽes-m dabeema ye!" 
Nehemiah6:15 Lal-gũbra mee n sɛɛ dasem pis-nu la a yiib pʋgẽ, Elul kiuug pisi la a nu raare." 
Nehemiah6:16 Bɛɛba fãa sẽn wʋme tɩ d le yika lal-gũbrã, bu-zẽmba sẽn ya tõnd yagsã riga rabeem la yãnd yõk-b lame. B reegame tɩ Wẽnd yalsa d poorẽ tʋʋmd kãnga yĩnga." 
Nehemiah6:17 Wakat kãng tɩ Zɩɩda nin-bɛd wʋsgo da tara a Tobiya gʋlsgo la b reesd a sɛba. B ra gʋlsdame n dat n sãam m yelle. 
Nehemiah6:18 A Tobiya zo-rãmb da yaa wʋsg Zɩɩda pʋgẽ t'a Ara biig a Sekaniya n da yaa a rɛɛmba la a biig a Zoana da kẽe kãadem ne a Berekiya biig a Mesulam bi-pugla. 
Nehemiah6:19 B ra tol n pẽgda a Tobiya tʋʋma mam taoore, n deesd mam goama n togsd-a. A ra gʋlsda sɛb n na n kẽes-m rabeem." 
Nehemiah7:1 Lal-gũbrã sẽn mee n sɛ, m lugla kʋɩlensa fãa la m ninga gũudba n paas yɩɩn-yɩɩndba la Levitse." 
Nehemiah7:2 M kõ-la m yao a Anani Zerizalɛɛm gũudem, n kõ a Ananiya tãnsoben-zaka gũudem. M pʋg ra pɛɛla ne-a, tɩ ned da ka zoet Soaala-Wẽnd wa a Ananiya ye." 
Nehemiah7:3 M yeel-b lame: «Da pak-y Zerizalɛɛm kʋɩlensã sã n ka wĩndg sẽn zẽke tɩ dagno-gũudba yɛs b zĩigẽ la pag-y kʋɩlensã tɩ wĩndg nan ket n zãr lʋɩɩse. Yals-y gũudb Zerizalɛɛm pugẽ, kẽer b zĩigẽ la kẽer me pa b zags noore.»" 
Nehemiah7:4 Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga ra yalmame, la a ra wogmame, a neba yaool n da ka waoog ye, tɩ rota ra ka le maneg n me ye." 
Nehemiah7:5 Dẽ la Wẽnd ning m yamẽ tɩ tigim tẽnga nin-bɛda, a taoor dãmba la a zãma wã n maan sõadga, yaa buud sõadga. M yãenda pa-weta sõadg sebre la ad-m sẽn karme." 
Nehemiah7:6 Sẽn yi-b yembdo la pa-weer n lɛɛg n wa la woto. Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor n da kẽes b yembdo. Yaa Zerizalɛɛm ne Zɩɩda la b lɛɛg n wa, ned kam fãa a tẽngẽ." 
Nehemiah7:7 B lɛɛg n waa ne a Zorobabɛl, la a Zozuwe, a Neemi, a Azariya, a Raamiya, a Naamani, a Mordokayi, a Bilsã, a Misperet, a Bigwayi, a Newum la a Baana. Israyɛl kamba sõor la woto:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Neb 2172, a Paros roogẽ;" 
Nehemiah7:9 neb 372, a Sefatiya roogẽ;" 
Nehemiah7:10 neb 652, a Ara roogẽ;" 
Nehemiah7:11 Neb 2818 a Paat-Moab roogẽ, dat n yeelame t'a Zozuwe la a Zoab yagense;" 
Nehemiah7:12 neb 1254 a Elam roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:13 neb 845 a Zatu roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:14 neb 760 a Zakayi roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:15 neb 648 a Binuwi roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:16 neb 628 a Bevayi roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:17 neb 2322 a Asgad roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:18 neb 667 a Adonikam roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:19 neb 2067 a Bigwayi roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:20 neb 655 a Adin roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:21 neb 98 a Atɛr roogẽ, a Iskiya yagense;" 
Nehemiah7:22 neb 328 a Asum roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:23 neb 324 a Besayi roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:24 neb 112 a Arif roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:25 neb 95, Gabaõ tẽng rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:26 neb 188, Bɛtelyɛɛm ne Netofa rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:27 neb 128, Anatot rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:28 neb 42, Bɛt-Azmavet rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:29 neb 743, Kiriyat-Yearim dãmba n paas Kefira la Beerot;" 
Nehemiah7:30 neb 621, Rama ne Geva rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:31 neb 122, Mikmas rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:32 neb 123, Betɛl ne Ayi rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:33 neb 52, Nebo rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:34 neb 1254 a Elam a yiib soab roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:35 neb 320 a Arim roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:36 neb 345 Zeriko rãmba; 
Nehemiah7:37 neb 721, Lod, Adid la Ono rãmba;" 
Nehemiah7:38 neb 3930 Senaa rãmba. 
Nehemiah7:39 Neb 973, maan-kʋʋdba roogẽ, a Yedaya, a Zozuwe yagense;" 
Nehemiah7:40 neb 1052 a Imɛr roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:41 neb 1247 a Pasewur roogẽ; 
Nehemiah7:42 neb 1017 a Arim roogẽ. 
Nehemiah7:43 Neb 74, Levitse a Zozuwe roogẽ, dat n yeelame t'a, Kadmiyɛl, a Odwa yagense." 
Nehemiah7:44 Neb 148, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba: a Asaf kamba." 
Nehemiah7:45 Neb 138, dagno-gũudba: a Salum, a Atɛr, a Talmo, a Akub, a Atita la a Sovayi kamba." 
Nehemiah7:46 Noakensã, a Sia, a Asufa, a Tabaot kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:47 a Keros, a Sia, a Padõ kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:48 a Levana, a Agaba, a Salmayi kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:49 a Anan, a Gidɛl, a Gaar kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:50 a Reaya, a Resin, a Nekoda kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:51 a Gazam, a Uza, a Pasea kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:52 a Besayi, a Meunim, a Nefis kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:53 a Bakbuk, a Akufa, a Arur kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:54 a Baslit, a Meyida, a Arsa kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:55 a Barkos, a Sisera, a Tama kamba;" 
Nehemiah7:56 a Nesiya, a Atifa kamba." 
Nehemiah7:57 A Salomo yem-daada kamba, a Sotayi, a Soferɛt, a Perida roogẽ," 
Nehemiah7:58 a Yaala, a Darkõ, a Gidɛl roogẽ," 
Nehemiah7:59 a Sefatiya, a Atil, a Pokerɛt-Sebayim, a Amon roogẽ." 
Nehemiah7:60 Noakensã la a Salomo yem-daad kamb sẽn naag taaba: 392. 
Nehemiah7:61 Sẽn kell-bã ra yita Tel-Mela, Tel-Arsa, Kerub-Adõ la Imɛr la b pa tõog n wilg b buudã la b rogma yũug sẽn tong to-to ne Israyɛl buud ye." 
Nehemiah7:62 Yɩ-la a Delaya kamba, a Tobiya kamba la a Nekoda kamba, bãmb kobs-yoob la pis-naas la a yiibu." 
Nehemiah7:63 Maan-kʋʋdba sʋk me, a Obaya kamba la a Akok kamba, n paas a Barzilayi kamba. Nin kãnga da rɩka Galaad Barzilayi bi-pugl n maan a paga tɩ b kell n pʋda a rɛɛmba yʋʋre." 
Nehemiah7:64 Bãmb me vɛɛsa b buuda sɛba la b pa mik tɩ b yaa Israyɛl buud ye. Dẽ yĩnga b ges-b-la wa nin-dẽgdo la b pa sak tɩ b tʋm maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd ye. 
Nehemiah7:65 A Neemi yeel-b lame tɩ b ra le rɩ wẽnd dooga rɩɩbo n gũ Wẽnd leokre, n-yẽe, bɩ ayoo!" 
Nehemiah7:66 Zãma wã fãa sẽn tigim taaba yɩɩ tus pis-naas la a yiibu la kobs-tã la pisoobe. 
Nehemiah7:67 B pa naag b yemsã la bãmb me ra taa tus a yopoe la kobs-tã la pis-tã la a yopoe. Sã n ya yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, pagb la raop, yaa kobs-yi la pis-naas la a nu." 
Nehemiah7:68 Wiidi wã sõda kobs-yopoe la pis-tã la a yoobe, bõn-wees kobs-yi la pis-naas la a nu; yʋgma kobs-naas la pis-tã la a nu, bõeens tus a yoob la kobs-yopoe la pisi." 
Nehemiah7:69 Sagsa kãsem-dãmb kẽer waa ne b yamleoog kũuni. Kombera kɩsa sãnem wakɩ koeems tusri, rã-yũudem lagd pis-nu, maan-kʋʋr fut kobs-nu la pis-tã." 
Nehemiah7:70 Sags kãsem-dãmb kẽer kõo sãnem wakɩ koeems tus pisi. Wanzurfa zɩslem taa neb pis-nu la a nu zɩɩbo. 
Nehemiah7:71 Neb a taaba sẽn kɩs yaa sãnem wakɩ koeems tus pisi. Wanzurfa zɩslem taa neb pis-nu zɩɩbo. Maan-kʋʋr fu-yord yɩɩ pisoob la a yopoe. 
Nehemiah7:72 Maan-kʋʋdbã, Levit dãmbã, dagno-gũudbã, yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã, sõangdbã tɩ kẽ-la b tẽnsẽ. Yʋʋmda kiuug a yopoe soaba, Israyɛl kamba fãa yii b sẽn da be tẽns niynsa n le wa." 
Nehemiah8:1 Zãma wã fãa tigma wala nin-yend, Zerizalɛɛm, neba sẽn segd taab zĩig ning Kooma rignoorẽ la b yeela sɛb gʋlsda a Esdras t'a wa ne a Moyiiz noora sebrã, noor ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da kõ a Israyɛl. A Esdras ra vẽena ne noora wʋsgo." 
Nehemiah8:2 Maan-kʋʋd a Esdras waa ne noora sebre zãma wã taoore, pagba, rapa la kamb sẽn wɩsge taoore. Yɩɩ kiuug a yopoe soaba pipi raare." 
Nehemiah8:3 Kooma rignoorẽ, a Esdras karma sebrã, al yibeoogo n ta wĩnto-sʋka, pagba, rapa la kamba taoore la b fãa ra yooga b tʋba." 
Nehemiah8:4 B ra kaa ra-pegdo n zẽke t'a Esdras dʋ be n karemdẽ. Ad neb niyns sẽn da yeg a Esdras, a rɩtgo: a Matitiya, a Sema, a Anaya, a Uriya, a Ilkiya la a Maaseya. A goabga: a Pedaya, a Misayɛl, a Malkiya, a Asum, a Asbadana, a Zakari la a Mesulam." 
Nehemiah8:5 A Esdras laka sebrã neba fãa nifẽ, neba fãa ra tõe n yãend-a lame. A sẽn lak sebrã b fãa gill yika yĩngri." 
Nehemiah8:6 A Esdras pẽga Naaba-Wẽnde, Pãng-Soaba, la neba fãa zẽka b nus yĩngr n yeele: Ami, ami! La b zõondame, b yĩgimdame n kɩ b neng tẽnga Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
Nehemiah8:7 Zãma wã ra yɛsame t'a Zozuwe, a Bani, a Serebiya, a Yamin, a Akub, a Sabetayi, a Odiya, a Maaseya, a Kelita, a Azariya, a Zozabad, a Ana, a Pelaya, Levitse, bãmb da reesda goama n togsd neba sẽn da yɛs zĩ yɛnga." 
Nehemiah8:8 Bãmb n da karemd noora sebrã vẽeneg vẽenega la b wilgd a võore sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ b rɩk zãng fãa. 
Nehemiah8:9 A Neemi la sɛb naab a Esdras ne Levitsa sẽn da zãmsd neba, yeela zãma wã: «Ad-y rũnna raarã yaa Wẽnd daare, yaa ra-sõngo, dẽ yĩnga ra yãb-y ye.» Sɩda zãma wã ra yãbdame la a kelgd sebra karengo." 
Nehemiah8:10 B le yeelame yɛsa: «Kẽng-y n tɩ rɩ-y rɩ-sõma la y yũ rã-sõma la bao-y rɩɩb n kõ sẽn ka segla rɩɩb t'a rɩ; raarã yaa Naaba-Wẽnd raare. Zãag-y mens ne sũ-sãang. Y sũ-noog sã n yit Wẽnd nengẽ a pidsd-y-la ne pãnga.» 
Nehemiah8:11 Levitsa maasa zama wã sũuri, b ra yetame: «Da yãb-y ye tɩ rũnna yaa Soaala raare, da sãam-y y sũur ye!»" 
Nehemiah8:12 Woto wã b baoo koom n yũ, n bao rɩɩb n dɩ la b kell n tɩ kõ, la b kɩdem wʋsgo. B ra paam n wʋma karenga võore." 
Nehemiah8:13 Daar a yiib soaba, buud kãsem-dãmba ne maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa le gũbga a Esdras n bao sebra võor n paase." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ad-y b sẽn karem sebrã, sebr ning Soaala sẽn da kõ a Moyiiz, b wʋmame tɩ Israyɛl kamb da tog n paa sẽgdẽ kiuug a yopoe soaba kibsa wakato." 
Nehemiah8:15 B bãngame tɩ yaa bũmb sẽn da tog n moone Zerizalɛɛm la tẽns a taaba tɩ neba dʋ tãmsã n kao tɩɩs wila, wala oliviye, kankamse, komse la tɩɩs fãa sẽn tob vãado, n wa ti roto." 
Nehemiah8:16 Israyɛl kamba tɩ baoo wila n ti roto, kẽere, b gasd zugu, kẽer, b sɩmannẽ, kẽer, wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ, kẽer kooma rignoorẽ, la a Efrayim dignoorẽ." 
Nehemiah8:17 Zãma wã fãa sẽn yi yembd weoogo maana sẽgdo n kẽ. Yɩɩ kibs la sũ-noog menga. A Nun biig a Zozuwe loog poore, Israyɛl kamb zɩ n maan a taar ye." 
Nehemiah8:18 Beoog sã n vẽeg fãa, a Esdras da karemda bũmb sebra pugẽ, kibsa sɩngra daare n tãag sɛtma raare. Kibsa maana rasem a yopoe. La wala Noora sẽn date, raar a nii soaba yɩɩ baasg tig-raaga." 
Nehemiah9:1 Kiuuga pisi la a naas daare, Israyɛl kamb yeelga sũ-pa-noang futu, n yug b yĩng tom la b tigim taab n na n loe b noore." 
Nehemiah9:2 A Israyɛl buuda welga ne buud a taabã, b yalsa yĩngri n na n deeg b mens la b yaab rãmb kongre." 
Nehemiah9:3 B yalsa yĩngri, ned kam fãa a zĩigẽ tɩ b karem Sebrã Wẽnd sẽn kõ-bã, wakat a tãabo. Wakat a tãaba sẽn pʋgã, b yõka b yel-wẽna tẽesgo la sugr kosgo n wõg Wẽnnaam b Soaala taoore." 
Nehemiah9:4 A Zozuwe, a Bani, a Kadmiyɛl, a Sebaniya, a Buni, a Serebiya, a Bani, a Kenani yika b sẽn da zao zĩig ningã n tees Naaba-Wẽnd, b Wẽnnaam, n kelem tɩ sãde." 
Nehemiah9:5 Levitsã: a Zozuwe, a Kadmiyɛl, a Bani, a Asabneya, a Serebiya, a Odiya, a Sebaniya, a Petayiya yaool n yeelame: «Yɩk-y yĩngri, pẽg-y Wẽnde! Naaba-Wẽnde, tõnd Wẽnda, paam pẽgr wakat buud fãa. Bɩ ned kam fãa kils y yʋʋr sẽn tog ne pẽgre, yʋʋr sẽn zʋʋg pẽgr la kilsgu!" 
Nehemiah9:6 Yãmb la Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb y ye tãa! Yãmb n naan yĩngri, ne a yalma la a ãdsã. Yãmb n naan tẽngã ne a teeda fãa, n naan mogra ne a pʋgẽ teedo! Yãmb la bõn-vɩɩl fãa vɩɩm kõata. Yĩngr tãb-biisa fãa wõga yãmb taoore." 
Nehemiah9:7 Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb la Wẽnd ninga sẽn yãk a Abram, n yiis-a Ur, Kalde tẽnga; y teka a yʋʋre la Abram waa n leb a Abraam." 
Nehemiah9:8 Y sẽn yãe t'a yaa pʋ-peen-neda, y yõga zood ne-a. La y kõ-a-la Kanaã rãmb tẽnga n paas Ititse, Amoritse, Perizitse, Zebuzitse ne Girgazits dãmb tẽnga. Y kõ-a-la yẽnda ne a yagense. La y sẽn ya sõng yĩnga, y kãabg ka pa vɩʋʋg ye." 
Nehemiah9:9 Y yãenda d yaab rãmba nimbãaneg Ezipt tẽnga; y wʋma b kɛleng Rudum Mogra noore. 
Nehemiah9:10 Y maana yel-soalem la yel-ban Ezipt dĩma taoore, a sõgen-kamb la a soolem dãmb taoore. Y yãenda wʋglem la tɩtaam ninga b sẽn maan d yaab rãmba taoore. Y tʋmame tɩ y yʋʋr sãde n ta rũnna." 
Nehemiah9:11 Y kɩtame tɩ mogr kʋɩ d yaab rãmba taoore la b rʋʋg-a-la koɛɛnga. Y lobga b bɛɛba kooma sʋka wala b sẽn lobgd kugr ko-zulungẽ. 
Nehemiah9:12 Wĩndga, sawadg n da wilgd-b sore, la yʋngo, sawadga ra lebgda b vẽenem." 
Nehemiah9:13 Yãmb siga Sinayi tãnga zugu, yãmb zĩnda yĩngri n gom ne-ba, n kõ-b no-sõma, noy sẽn ka kẽesd moogo, noy sẽn wat ne fãagre." 
Nehemiah9:14 Yãmb wilg-b-la y raare, vʋʋsg raare, yãmb yalsa noya la y saglsã ne a Moyiiz zelemde, yãmb tʋʋm-tʋmd a Moyiiz zelemde." 
Nehemiah9:15 Yãmb yiisa b kom ne yĩngr dɩɩbo. Yãmb yiisa b ko-yũud ne pĩig koom. Y kõ-b-la noore tɩ b tɩ reeg tẽng ning y sẽn da wẽen n kãab-ba. 
Nehemiah9:16 La d yaab rãmb maana nagre, n nak b kãare, n yet tɩ b kõn sak ye." 
Nehemiah9:17 B zãgsa y noora reegre, b yĩma y tʋʋm-bãna y sẽn maan b yĩnga. B naka b kãare n yet tɩ rẽnd b leb Ezipt tẽnga, dẽnd b leb b yembd tẽngẽ. Yãmb wilgame tɩ y yaa sugr soaba, sũ-bʋgsem soaba nimbãan-zoeta la sũ-maasem soaba, y wilga y sũur sẽn pid ne yardo tɩ y ka tʋlg b basg ye." 
Nehemiah9:18 B waa n yẽnega b sãnem n maan b nag-bila la b saag n yeela vẽenega: ‹Woto la wẽnd ninga sẽn yiisa tõnd Ezipt tẽnga!› Y ka bas-b ye tɩ yɩɩ paoogre, yɩɩ yãmba Wẽnd paoogr kãsenga." 
Nehemiah9:19 Yãmb tũ-la y sũ-maasem n ka bas-b tɩ b pa weoogẽ ye, sawadga ka zãag ne bãmb ye, a ka pa n ka wilg b sor wĩndg ye, a ka pa yʋngo n ka yãng a vẽenem ye." 
Nehemiah9:20 Yãmb pʋdga y yam n kõ-ba, la b lebga yẽesem dãmba. Yĩngr dɩɩba pa zãag ne b noore ye la y kõ-b-la koom tɩ b kiis b ko-yũudu." 
Nehemiah9:21 Yãmb gesa b yell yʋʋm pis-naase. Zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã, bũmb ka paoog-b ye, b fut ka lebg kʋɩdse la b nao ka mod ye." 
Nehemiah9:22 Yãmb sagla b nugẽ tẽns la neb ka tɛka, bãmb la y rɩk n ning b toosẽ: Esbõ dĩm a Siyõ la Bazã dĩm a Og." 
Nehemiah9:23 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ b wek balbo. B sõorã, bãng yĩngr ãdse. Y tall b lame n kẽes b tẽngẽ, tẽng ning y sẽn da yeel b ba rãmb tɩ b wa sooge." 
Nehemiah9:24 B kamba sɩd wẽe tẽngã n soog-a, tẽnga rãmba, Kanaã rãmba tɩtaam sigame la b zã-b-la b nugẽ wala b sẽn date." 
Nehemiah9:25 B reega tẽns sẽn tar lal-gũbri, b koo pʋt sẽn pa faagd ye. B kẽe zags sẽn pid ne bũmb fãa, tẽns sẽn tar bulsi, sãbse, oliviye la tɩɩs a taab ka tɛka. B rɩɩme, b tɩgame, b nobame, b pidsa b yamleoogo ne arzɛk sẽn ka tõe n sɛ ye." 
Nehemiah9:26 La ade, b waa n lebga tõatba, b waa n wegmame n dɩk yãmb Noorã n lobe, b rɩk-a lame n lobg b zãnkudgẽ, la b kood bãngdb niyns sẽn da legend-bã; mik b sẽn maan dẽ, b maana wɩɩbdo." 
Nehemiah9:27 Yãmb bas-b-la ne b bɛɛba tɩ b sɩbg-ba. Sɩbgra wakato b ra kaasdame n boond yãmba la yãmb zĩnda yĩngr n kelg b boaala la y yika ne y nimbãan-zoeerã n kõ-b neb sẽn na n fãag-ba. 
Nehemiah9:28 La b sã n paam laafi bilf bala b le rɩkda b wẽnema tɩ yãmb me le bas-b ne b bɛɛba tɩ bɛɛba le sɩbg-ba, tɩ b le sɩng yãbre, tɩ yãmb le zĩnd yĩngr n kelg-ba. La y sẽn ya nimbãan-zoeer soab yĩnga, yaa naoor ka tɛka la y sig n fãag-ba." 
Nehemiah9:29 Yãmb sagl-b la naoor yaka n na n wẽnemd b meng n tees y menga la b wilg-m-meng tus-b lame tɩ b zãgs y noore. B tõdga noya sẽn wat ne vɩɩma, b yeelame tɩ b kõn zõond n tʋk zɩɩba ye, b naka b kãare, b tõdga sakre." 
Nehemiah9:30 Yãmb maaga y meng ne-ba n kaoose, yãmb wɩnga ne b saglgo, yãmb kõ-b-la bãngdba la b zãgsa kelgre. Dẽ la yãmb bas-b tẽnga rãmb nusẽ." 
Nehemiah9:31 Y sũ-maasem yĩnga b ka wã zãng ye, y ka bas-b ye, y sɩd yaa nimbãan-zoeta, y sũur sɩd pida ne nonglem." 
Nehemiah9:32 La yãmb sẽn ya Pãng-Soaba, Soaala, yãmb sẽn kẽesd dabeem wʋsgo n yaool n ya bʋgsem la nonglem, da ges-y wa bõn-faasga pɛt ning d sẽn tʋk d zugẽ, tõndo, d dĩm dãmba, d nanamse, d maan-kʋʋdba, d bãngdba, d buuda gilli. D tʋka d pɛtã, Asiri rãmba wakatẽ n ta rũnna." 
Nehemiah9:33 Yɛla pak d lame la y nengẽ kegr pa zĩnd ye, yãmb nonglem kell n yalsa a zĩigẽ, yaa tõnd n yɩ wẽn-kɩɩsdba." 
Nehemiah9:34 N-ye, d dĩm dãmba, d taoor dãmba, d maan-kʋʋdba, d ba rãmba ka tʋ noora ye. B pa kelge, b pa reeg y sagls ye!" 
Nehemiah9:35 B sẽn kẽ kãoobg tẽnga, b sẽn mik tɩ yaa tẽng sẽn sakd koodo n yɛdg n dɩg b taoore, b pa le nams n pʋg-y ye, b pa vʋʋs ne tʋʋm wẽn ye." 
Nehemiah9:36 Yaa rẽ yĩng la d lebg yem-daad dũnna, tẽng ning y sẽn da kõ d yaab rãmba tɩ b kẽ n me la b rɩ a yõodo." 
Nehemiah9:37 Sẽn dɩt-b tẽnga yõod marsã, yaa dĩm niyns yãmb sẽn dɩk tõndo n sagl b rãmb nusẽ, d wẽnema yĩnga. Bãmb n so tõnd ne d dũmsi n maand b sẽn date. Kato! D pɛta ka zem-zem ye!»" 
Nehemiah10:1 Yaa rẽ fãa yĩng la d kãab yã la d gʋlsa d sẽn kãabã sebrẽ. Sebra sẽn gʋls n sɛ d lɛɛg n pag-a lame la neb niyns sẽn gʋls b yʋʋr sebra zugu yɩ-la d taoor dãmbã, d Levitsã la d maan-kʋʋdbã." 
Nehemiah10:2 Ad yʋy niyns sẽn be sebra pʋga: komber a Neemi, a Akaliya biiga, ne a Sidkiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 a Seraya, a Azariya, a Irmeya," 
Nehemiah10:4 a Pasewur, a Amariya, a Malkiya," 
Nehemiah10:5 a Atus, a Sebaniya, a Maluk," 
Nehemiah10:6 a Arim, a Meremot, a Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:7 a Daniyɛl, a Ginetõ, a Barʋk," 
Nehemiah10:8 a Mesulam, a Abiya, a Miyamin," 
Nehemiah10:9 a Maaziya, a Bilgayi, a Semaya. B gill yaa maan-kʋʋdba" 
Nehemiah10:10 Levitsa la woto: a Yesuwa, a Azaniya biiga, a Binuwi, a Enadad roogẽ, a Kadmiyɛl," 
Nehemiah10:11 la b yaop a Sebaniya, a Odiya, a Kelita, a Pelaya, a Anan," 
Nehemiah10:12 a Mika, a Reob, a Asabiya," 
Nehemiah10:13 a Zakur, a Serebiya, a Sebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:14 a Odiya, a Bani, a Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:15 Buuda kãsem-dãmb la woto: a Paros, a Paat-Moab, a Elam, a Zatu, a Bani," 
Nehemiah10:16 a Buni, a Azgad, a Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:17 a Adoniya, a Bigwayi, a Adin," 
Nehemiah10:18 a Atɛr, a Izkiya, a Azur," 
Nehemiah10:19 a Odiya, a Asum, a Besayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 a Arif, a Anatot, a Nebayi," 
Nehemiah10:21 a Magpias, a Mesulam, a Ezir," 
Nehemiah10:22 a Mesezabɛl, a Sadok, a Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:23 a Pelatiya, a Anan, a Ananiya," 
Nehemiah10:24 a Osee, a Ananiya, a Asub," 
Nehemiah10:25 a Aloɛs, a Pila, a Sobek," 
Nehemiah10:26 a Rewum, a Asabna, a Maaseya," 
Nehemiah10:27 a Ayiya, a Ana, a Anan," 
Nehemiah10:28 a Maluk, a Arim, a Baana, tẽnsa koagendba." 
Nehemiah10:29 Sẽn kell-bã, buudã, maan-kʋʋdba, Levitsa, dagno-gũudba, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, noakense, neb niyns fãa sẽn welg b ne b tẽng rãmba n na n tũ Wẽnde, ne b pagba, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli sẽn wɩsge," 
Nehemiah10:30 fãa naaga b saam-biisã la taoor dãmba n wẽen la b kãab tɩ b na n deega Noor ning b sẽn kõ a Moyiiz, Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmdã. B kãbame tɩ b na n tũu Wẽnd daabo, b rog-n-mik, b na n gɩdga meng ne Wẽnd sẽn gɩdge." 
Nehemiah10:31 B tol n kãabame tɩ b kõn dɩk b kom-pugli n kõ bu-zẽnd dãmb ye la bãmb me kõn deeg b kom-pugli n kõ b kom-dibli ye. 
Nehemiah10:32 La vʋʋsga daare, tẽnga rãmb sã n wa ne b teed bɩ rɩɩbo n na n koos ne tõndo, b bãng tɩ b kõn paam daag ye. Fɩ kõn da vʋʋsg daar bɩ kibs raar ye. Yʋʋm a yopoe-poe, d kõn yãk koadba kood lems ye la d kõn sok samd ye." 
Nehemiah10:33 Ad-d sẽn kãab-b tɩ d na n maana bũmb ninga n paase: yʋʋm a tãab-tãabo, ned kam fãa na n kɩsa wakɩre, wẽnd dooga yĩnga." 
Nehemiah10:34 Woto b na paam n daad buri, la beoog beoog fãa maamda rũmsi ne kũun a taaba, n paas vʋʋsg raar, ki-paalse, la tig-raasa maanda rũmsi, n paas sẽn tʋmd-b wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ dɩɩbo, a Israyɛl yel-wẽna rolb maand rũmsi, la bũmb ning fãa sẽn get wẽnd dooga yɛla." 
Nehemiah10:35 Tõnd maan-kʋʋdbã, Levitsã la zãma wã d maana poeere n bãng buuda sẽn tog n wa ne raad yʋʋmd fãa, wakata sã n ta, maan-kugra bugma yĩnga, wala sẽn be Noora sebrẽ." 
Nehemiah10:36 Yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa d na tall n wa wẽnd doogẽ d kood rẽemse la d tɩɩs bɩ-rẽemse," 
Nehemiah10:37 d kom-dẽems la d rũms kom-dẽemse, wala sẽn gʋls Sebra pugẽ, rũm-bɛdã wala rũm-bõonesa kom-dẽems yaa maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga." 
Nehemiah10:38 D na n paasa zom bãanega, tɩɩs biisi, rãam, kaam; dẽ fãa na n tall n waa d Soaala roogẽ. D na n yãka d kooda pʋɩɩr piig soaba n kõ Levitsa la yaa Levit dãmbã b toore n na n sa n dees pʋɩɩrã, tẽng ning fãa b sẽn kẽedẽ." 
Nehemiah10:39 A Aarõ roogẽ maan-kʋʋd a ye n na n yãag Levit dãmbã b sã n saad n deesd b pʋɩɩrã. Levit dãmba me na n kẽe b sẽn paama pʋgẽ n yãk pʋɩɩr piig soaba n kɩs wẽnd doogẽ. 
Nehemiah10:40 Da yaa wẽnd dooga pʋga la Israyɛl dãmba la Levitsa da bĩngd koodã, rãama bɩ kaamã. Beenẽ me la b ra bĩngd lagdã, wẽnd dooga rẽnna; maan-kʋʋdba, yɩɩn-yɩɩndba ne ragno-gũudba me ra kẽeda be. Sã n ya woto d kõn pa n ka ges d wẽnd dooga yell ye." 
Nehemiah11:1 Buuda kãsem-dãmb tɩ kẽe Zerizalɛɛm. Neba taaba ra leba b tẽnsẽ. Sẽn na n yɩlẽ n pids na-tẽngã, neb piig zugu, b sʋka nin-yend n paalg Zerizalɛɛm, Wẽnd tẽn-sõnga pʋgẽ. Sẽn kell-bã kẽe b tẽnsẽ." 
Nehemiah11:2 Neba sũur yɩɩ noog wʋsgo b sẽn paam tɩ kẽer sak n tɩ kẽ Zerizalɛɛm. 
Nehemiah11:3 Ad kombɛɛmba sẽn kẽ-b Zerizalɛɛm yʋya. Sã n ya ne maan-kʋʋdbã, Levitsã, noakensã, na-yir dãmba kamba (a Salomo na-yir dãmba) ned kam fãa paa a tẽngẽ." 
Nehemiah11:4 A Zɩɩda ne a Bẽnzame kamba da kẽeda Zerizalɛɛm. A Zɩɩda kamba: a Ataya, a Perɛs roogẽ, a Malaleyɛl biig a Sefatiya yagenga. Ad-a Amariya, a Zakari, ad-a Uziya," 
Nehemiah11:5 ad-a Maaseya, a Barʋk biiga, a Kol-Oze biiga, a Azaya biiga, a Adaya biiga, a Zoyarib biiga, a Zakari, Silo raoa" 
Nehemiah11:6 A Perɛs yagensa sẽn ti-b Zerizalɛɛm da yaa kobs-naase la pisoob la a nii, neb sẽn sek zabr bobre." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ad-a Bẽnzame kamba: a Salu, a Itiyɛl biiga a Yesaya yagenga, a Maaseya, a Kolaya, a Pedaya, a Zoyɛd la a Mesulam, biiga," 
Nehemiah11:8 n paas a yaopa: a Gabayi, a Salayi, bãmb kobs-wɛ la pisi la a nii." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yaa a Zikri biig a Zowɛl n da ya bãmb kãsma, n paas a Yewuda, a Asenuwa biiga, yẽ n da ya tẽnga naab sõangda." 
Nehemiah11:10 Ad maan-kʋʋdbã: a Yedaya, a Zoyarib biiga, a Yakẽ," 
Nehemiah11:11 a Seraya, maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Ayitub ba a Merayot yagenga, ne a Sadok, a Mesulam, la a Ilkiya," 
Nehemiah11:12 n paas neb kobs-nii la pisi la a yiibu, sak a ye kamba, sẽn da get wẽnd dooga tʋʋm yelle; n paas a Adaya a Malkiya, a Pasewur yagense, n paas a Zakari, a Amsi, a Pelaliya, la Zeroam," 
Nehemiah11:13 bãmb ne b sak kãsem-dãmba, bãmb kobs-yi la la pis-naas la a yiibu; n paas a Amasesayi, a Imɛr ba a Meselimot yagene; n paas a Azayi, a Azarɛl," 
Nehemiah11:14 bãmb ne tãb-biis sẽn yaa sũ-keelem dãmba, bãmb koabg la pisi la a nii. A Zabdiyɛl, a Agedolim biiga n da so ba." 
Nehemiah11:15 Levit dãmba: a Semaya, a Buni ba a Asabiya yagense, a Azrikam, a Asub." 
Nehemiah11:16 Le paasa Levitsa kãsem-dãmba a Sabetayi ne a Zozabad, sẽn so wẽnd dooga yɩng tʋʋma." 
Nehemiah11:17 Le paasa a Mataniya, a Asaf ba, a Zabdi yagenga ne a Mika, yẽ n da pʋt pẽgr yɩɩla pʋʋsga wakato, ne a Basbukiya, a Mataniya saam-biig a ye, n da sõangd-a. Ad yɛsa a Abda, a Yedutun ba, a Galal yagenga, n paas a Samuwa." 
Nehemiah11:18 Dɩlla Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ Levitsa zãng da taa neb kobs-yi la pis-nii la a naase. 
Nehemiah11:19 Ad dagno-gũudbã: a Akub, a Talmo ne b yaop sẽn da so rignoya gũubu, bãmb koabg la pisopoe la a yiibu." 
Nehemiah11:20 Israyɛl kamb a taaba, maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa kẽer pa b tẽnsẽ, a Zɩɩda soolmẽ, ned kam fãa a buud pʋɩɩrẽ." 
Nehemiah11:21 Sã n ya noakensã, bãmb da kẽeda Ofɛl; b kãsem-dãmb la a Sia la a Gisepa." 
Nehemiah11:22 A Uzi n da ya Levit dãmba naab Zerizalɛɛm. A Uzi da yaa a Mika ba, a Mataniya yagenga, a Asabiya ne a Bani n da sõangd-a. B ba roog la a Asaf roogo, bãmb n so yɩɩla wẽnd doogẽ." 
Nehemiah11:23 Dĩma ra kõo noor yɩɩn-yɩɩndba poorẽ la b ra yiisa sebr n wilgd ned kam fãa tʋʋm beoog sẽn vẽege. 
Nehemiah11:24 A Petayiya, a Mesezabɛl biiga, a Zɩɩda biig a Zera roogẽ n da get zãma wã yell Pɛrs dĩma zakẽ." 
Nehemiah11:25 A Zɩɩda yagens kẽer da kẽeda tẽn bõonesã sẽn da yɛdg tẽn-nabrẽ wa Kiriyat-Arba ne a tẽn-toose, Dibõ ne a tẽn-toose, Yekabseyɛl ne a tẽn-toose." 
Nehemiah11:26 N le paas Yesuwa, Molada, Bɛt-Pelɛt," 
Nehemiah11:27 Asar-Suwal, Beerseba ne a tẽn-toose," 
Nehemiah11:28 Siklag, Mekona ne a tẽn-toose," 
Nehemiah11:29 Eyin-Rimo, Sorea, Yarmut," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoa, Adulam ne b tẽn-toose, Lakis ne a pʋto, Azeka ne a tẽn-toose; bãmb da basda Beerseba nug-rɩtgo, n basd Inom bãg-faaga nug goabga." 
Nehemiah11:31 A Bẽnzame kamba ra kẽeda Geba, Mikmas, Aya, Betɛl ne b tẽn-toose," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatot, Nob, Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Asor, Rama, Gitayim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Adid, Seboyim, Neballat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod, Ono la tʋʋm-mitba bãg-faagẽ." 
Nehemiah11:36 Zɩɩda Levit dãmb kẽere tɩ kẽe n naaga a Bẽnzame rãmba. 
Nehemiah12:1 Ad maan-kʋʋdb la Levits niyns sẽn tũ-b a Salatiyɛl biiga, a Zorobabɛl, ne a Zozuwe n wa: a Seraya, a Irmeya, a Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:1 Ad maan-kʋʋdb la Levits niyns sẽn tũ-b a Salatiyɛl biiga, a Zorobabɛl, ne a Zozuwe n wa: a Seraya, a Irmeya, a Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:2 a Amariya, a Maluk, a Atus," 
Nehemiah12:3 a Sekaniya, a Rewum, a Meremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 a Ido, a Ginetoyi, a Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 a Miyamin, a Maadiya, a Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 a Semaya; a Zoyarib, a Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 a Salu, a Amok, a Ilkiya, a Yedaya. A Yesuwa wakatẽ bãmb n da ya maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa sags kãsem-dãmba." 
Nehemiah12:8 Levitsa sʋka ad-a Yesuwa, a Binuwi, a Kadmiyɛl, a Serebiya, a Yewuda, a Mataniya. Yaa a Mataniya ne a yaopã n da so pẽgr yɩɩlã." 
Nehemiah12:9 B saam-biis a Basbukiya ne a Uni n da zĩ n tot bãmba, n yɩɩnẽ n sokd bãmba." 
Nehemiah12:10 A Yesuwa n dog a Zoakim, a Zoakim n dog a Eliyasib. A Eliyasib n dog a Zoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 a Zoyada n dog a Zoana, t'a Zoana dog a Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ad neb niyns sẽn da ya-b maan-kʋʋdba sags kãsem-dãmba a Zoakim wakato, a Seraya roogẽ: a Meraya; a Irmeya roogẽ: a Ananiya," 
Nehemiah12:13 a Ezra roogẽ: a Mesulam; a Amariya roogẽ: a Zoana; 
Nehemiah12:13 a Ezra roogẽ: a Mesulam; a Amariya roogẽ: a Zoana; 
Nehemiah12:14 a Meliku roogẽ: a Zonatã; a Sebaniya roogẽ: a Zozɛf. 
Nehemiah12:15 A Arim roogẽ: a Adna; a Meremot roogẽ: a Elkayi," 
Nehemiah12:16 a Ido roogẽ: a Zakari; a Ginetõ roogẽ: a Mesulam; 
Nehemiah12:17 a Abiya roogẽ: a Zikri; a Z... roogẽ: a Miniyamin; a Moadiya roogẽ: a Piltayi. 
Nehemiah12:18 A Bilga roogẽ: a Samuwa; a Semaya roogẽ: a Zonatã," 
Nehemiah12:19 n paas a Zoyarib roogẽ: a Matenayi; a Yedaya roogẽ: a Uzi. 
Nehemiah12:20 A Salayi roogẽ: a Kalayi; a Amok roogẽ: a Ebɛr; 
Nehemiah12:21 a Ilkiya roogẽ: a Asabiya; a Yedaya roogẽ: a Netaneyɛl. 
Nehemiah12:22 A Eliyasib, a Zoyada, a Zoana la a Yaduwa sẽn waa n ya maan-kʋʋdba sags nanamse, gʋlsa sebr zugu Levitsa yʋya, Levits niyns sẽn da ya-b sags nanamse. Woto me b gʋlsa sebr zugu me maan-kʋʋdba la yɩɩ woto n tãag Pɛrs dĩma a Dariyus naam." 
Nehemiah12:23 Sã n yaa a Levi yagensã, buuda kãsem-dãmb gʋlsa na-rota sebrẽ la gʋlsga teka a Eliyasib yageng a Zoana naam." 
Nehemiah12:24 Levit dãmba kãsem-dãmba: a Asabiya, a Serebiya, a Zesuwa, a Kadmiyɛl biiga da zĩ n tota Levits a taaba n na n yɩɩl Soaala pẽgr la b kils bãmba, b wakata sã n gilg n sege tɩ b le rɩk tʋʋmd wẽnd doogẽ. B ra tũuda Wẽnd sõgen a Daviid sẽn da siglã." 
Nehemiah12:25 Dagno-gũudbã a Mataniya, a Basbukiya, a Obadiya, a Mesulam, a Talmo la a Akub n da gũud teda sẽn da bĩngd rot niyns sẽn me n pẽneg wẽnd dooga rignoya." 
Nehemiah12:26 Yɩɩ boto a Zoakim, a Yesuwa biiga la a Zosadak yagenga wakatẽ. Boto me komber a Neemi wakatẽ la a Esdras wakatẽ. A Esdras la maan-kʋʋd ning sẽn da vẽena ne Soaala noorã." 
Nehemiah12:27 Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbra kibsa yĩnga, b tɩ yiisa Levitsa b sẽn da be zĩig ning fãa n wa ne-b na-tẽnga. Da togame tɩ sũ-nooga yɩ kãsenga, tɩ b yɩɩl bark pʋʋsg yɩɩla, tɩ kɛm wẽ, tɩ pends la ruuds wãage." 
Nehemiah12:28 A Levi kamb sẽn ya-b yɩɩn-yɩɩndba fãa waame. B yii tẽns niyns sẽn da pa zãr ne Zerizalɛɛm bɩ Netofa," 
Nehemiah12:29 b yii Bɛt-Gilgal sɛɛgẽ, Geba la Azmavɛt sɛɛgẽ, tɩ b ra pa zãag Zerizalɛɛm n me b tẽnsa ye." 
Nehemiah12:30 Maan-kʋʋdba la Levit rãmb deng n yɩlga b mense n yaool n yɩlg zãma wã, kʋɩlensã la lal-gũbrã." 
Nehemiah12:31 M kɩtame tɩ Zɩɩda nanamsã dʋ lal-gũbrã. M welga yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã sags a yiibu. Pipi saka dʋʋ lal-gũbra zug tẽnsʋka, b teesa rɩtgo, la Tãmpʋʋra Noor la b tũyã." 
Nehemiah12:32 A Osaya n pʋg-b ne a Zɩɩda nanamsa bogre," 
Nehemiah12:33 bãmb poore a Azariya, a Ezra, a Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:33 bãmb poore a Azariya, a Ezra, a Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 a Yewuda, a Bẽnzame, a Semaya, a Irmeya." 
Nehemiah12:35 Bãmb poore da yaa maan-kʋʋdba la b ra zãada tõntõodo. Bãmb poore, a Zakari, a Zakur biiga, a Asaf yagenga. Yẽnda poore, a Mikaya, a Mataniya, a Semaya la a Zonatã," 
Nehemiah12:36 A Zonatã tũud-n-taase: a Semaya, a Azarɛl, a Milalayi, a Gilalayi, a Maayi, a Netaneyɛl, a Yewuda, a Anani. Bãmb da zãada yʋʋm teedo, Wẽnd sõgen a Daviid sẽn da kɩt tɩ b maane. A Esdras, noora mita, n da be nin-bãmb taoore." 
Nehemiah12:37 B sẽn ta ko-bundma noorã, b ta teedsã sẽn dʋʋd a Daviid na-yirã. B rʋʋ lalga zug n ne dĩma roog sẽn wẽneg n dɩg b taoore la b kell n kẽname n ta kooma noorã, n tees tẽnga yaanga." 
Nehemiah12:38 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba bogr a yiib soaba teesa goabga, maam, a Neemi, pʋg-b-la lalga zugu, tɩ zãma wã bogra pʋgd m poorẽ. D taa bugtoaalsa ro-lug-lugã, n ta zĩig ning lal-gũbrã sẽn tɩ yɛdg zĩig ningã." 
Nehemiah12:39 D yii be n loog a Efrayim noore, a Yesana noore, kʋɩl-zẽeda noore. D sẽn loog a Ananeyɛl ro-lug-lugi la neb koab ro-lug-lugã, d waa n looga Piisa noore n ta gũudba noore." 
Nehemiah12:40 Yɩɩn yɩɩndba sags a yiibã taa wẽnd doogã. Mam me yalsame, maam ne taoor dãmba sẽn da yãagd-ma." 
Nehemiah12:41 Maan-kʋʋdba a Elyakim, a Maaseya, a Miniyamin, a Mikaya, a Eliyoenayi, a Zakari la Ananiya da peebda tõntõodo." 
Nehemiah12:42 N paas a Maaseya, a Semaya, a Elazar, a Uzi, a Zoana, a Malkiya, a Elam la a Ezɛr. A Izrayiya, yɩɩla naaba, kɩtame tɩ yɩɩn-yɩɩndba tãs tɩ sãde." 
Nehemiah12:43 Baraare b kʋʋ maamd ka tɛka la ra yaa kibs kãsenga. Soaala ra pidsa b buuda ne sũ-noog kãsenga. Zerizalɛɛm pabga la kamba me wilga b sũ-noogo la bʋʋra ra sãta al yɩɩga. 
Nehemiah12:44 Wẽnd kãnga b yãka neb sẽn na n ges kũuna neba sẽn tar n watẽ wã. Yaa Maan-kʋʋdba la Levit dãmba sẽn da tog n paam bũmb ninga b tẽnsẽ la b soolmẽ, wala kood rẽemsã lemsã la kũun a taabã. A Zɩɩda zãng da tara sũ-noogo tɩ maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa tʋʋmd da yaa sõma." 
Nehemiah12:45 Wẽnd maag bãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd da paamda waoogre tɩ zãma wã paamd yɩlgre, bãmb ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã la ragno-gũudbã, wala a Daviid la a biig a Salomo sẽn da yals bũmb ningã." 
Nehemiah12:46 Pĩnd-pĩnda, a Daviid ne a Asaf wakatẽ, b yãka yɩɩn-yɩɩndb taoor dãmba la b ra yɩɩnda pẽgr la bark pʋʋsg yɩɩla." 
Nehemiah12:47 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la a Zorobabɛl la a Neemi wakatẽ, b ra dɩlgda yɩɩn-yɩɩndbã la ragno-gũudba, wala sẽn segde. Levitsa da reegda maanda kũun sõma wã la b ra taasda maan-kʋʋdbã, a Aarõ yagensã, b rẽnna." 
Nehemiah13:1 B waa n karma woto a Moyiiz sebra pʋgẽ tɩ b ra saag n deeg Amonitga la Moabitga neb niyns sẽn waoogd-b Israyɛl Wẽnnaama buudẽ ye. 
Nehemiah13:2 Bãng-y tɩ Amonitsa la Moabitsa pa seg Israyɛl kamba ne rɩɩb la koom, b sẽn waa n poog b tẽngẽ ye. Yɩɩd rẽ, a Moab yao a Balaam ligdi, t'a kãab-b kãab wẽnga. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n tedg kãab wẽngã t'a lebg kãab noogo." 
Nehemiah13:3 B sẽn karem woto sebra pʋga, b yiisa bu-zẽmba gilli, b buudẽ." 
Nehemiah13:4 Maan-kʋʋd a Eliyasib la b waa n kõ wẽnd dooga teed gesg kãsengo. Yẽ ne a Tobiya ra yaa rogem la boto yĩnga 
Nehemiah13:5 a baoo do-yalengo n kõ a Tobiya t'a bĩngd teedã. Yɩɩ roog ning b sẽn da bĩngd yamleoog kũuna, tɩdarã, lagdã, kooda lemse, rã-paalgã, kaama, b sẽn da reegd bũmb ning fãa Levitsa yĩnga, gũudba yĩnga la maan-kʋʋdba yĩnga." 
Nehemiah13:6 Wakat kãng tɩ m da ka be Zerizalɛɛm ye. M da babsa Babilon dĩm a Artazerksɛs, a naam yʋʋmd pis-tã la a yiib soaba. M zĩnda be bilfu la m sẽn paam sore," 
Nehemiah13:7 m lɛɛg n waa Zerizalɛɛm. M sẽn ta, m yãenda a Eliyasib sẽn maan ne a Tobiya, n kõ a zĩ-sõngo tɩ f sã n be zĩ-kãng bɩ f ne wẽnd dooga sɩmande." 
Nehemiah13:8 M sũur puuga wʋsgo la m kɩtame tɩ b vaag a Tobiya teeda fãa n dɩgl yɩnga. 
Nehemiah13:9 M kɩtame tɩ b yɩlg roogã neere, n lebs wẽnd dooga teed bala n bĩng be n paas kũuna la tɩdarã." 
Nehemiah13:10 M wʋmame tɩ Levitsa da ka le paamd b pʋɩɩr ye, woto bãmb ne yɩɩn-yɩɩndba sẽn da tog n ges wẽnd waoogrã, zoe n diga b pʋ-weesẽ." 
Nehemiah13:11 Dẽ la m zab ne taoor dãmbã n yeel-ba: «Bõe tɩ y pa le get wẽnd dooga yelle?» M boola ned kam fãa t'a le wa rɩk a tʋʋmde. 
Nehemiah13:12 A Zɩɩda tõre le waa ne koodã, rãama la kaama lemse." 
Nehemiah13:13 M dɩka teeda roto n gũnug a Selemiya ne seb gʋlsd a Sadok. M kɩtame tɩ Levitga a Pedaya n paas a Ana, a Zakur biiga, a Mataniya yagenga, wa sõng-ba. Bãmb n deeg pʋɩɩrã n pʋɩt b saam-biisã." 
Nehemiah13:14 Soaala, yell kãens fãa m sẽn maan y roogã la y pẽgra yĩnga, tẽeg-y m yelle!" 
Nehemiah13:15 Vʋʋsga daare, m waa n yãee neb sẽn wẽkd b sibi n na n maam dãam. Kẽer me ra zɩlga bõeens alkam kalse, rãam, sibi, la zɩɩb buud toor toore, n kẽed Zerizalɛɛm. M yeel-b lame tɩ b ra saag n koos bũmb ye." 
Nehemiah13:16 Vʋʋsg daar yɛsa, m yãee Tir dãmb tɩ b tond zĩma la teed a taaba n wat n na n koos ne Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm rãmba." 
Nehemiah13:17 M zaba ne taoor dãmbã n sok-b tɩ yaa bõe yĩnga tɩ b maand wɩɩbdo n pa tũud vʋʋsg daar noore. 
Nehemiah13:18 Ka woto la y yaab rãmb maan pĩnda la ka rẽ yĩng la Soaala-Wẽnd kɩt tɩ tõnd ne d tẽnga yãend pɛt buud fãa? Bõe tɩ y tõdgd vʋʋsg noore n na n yãng Wẽnd sũ-puuri? 
Nehemiah13:19 Dẽ n so tɩ m sã n mik tɩ zaabr maasem tat kʋɩlensã n wilgd tɩ vʋʋsg daar taame, m kɩtdame tɩ b pag kʋɩlensã la b ra ka le pakd-b tɩ vʋʋsga raar ka loog ye. M da baooda neb n zĩndg noyẽ wã tɩ zɩɩb ra tõog n kẽ vʋʋsg raar ye." 
Nehemiah13:20 Woto naoor a yi bɩ a tã lɛɛbd kẽer ka paam Zerizalɛɛm pʋg n gãand ye. 
Nehemiah13:21 M yeel b la woto: «Bõe tɩ yãmb gãe lalg poore, y sã n le paase, m na kɩt tɩ b yõg yã.» Baraar tɛka b ka le saag n wa vʋʋsg daar ye." 
Nehemiah13:22 M kosa Levitsa tɩ b yɩlg b mense la b gũ ragnoya tɩ b ra le tõdg vʋʋsg daar noor ye. Dẽ yĩng me, Soaala, y nimbãan-zoeer sẽn ka be tɛka, bɩ y tẽeg m yelle la y kũm-ma!" 
Nehemiah13:23 M waa n mikame tɩ Zʋɩf rãmb kẽer pagb yita Asdod, Amon la Moab tẽnse." 
Nehemiah13:24 La b kamba pʋɩ-sʋk ra gomda Asdod dãmb bɩ bu-zẽmb a taab goama n yaool n ka le wʋmd Zʋɩf rãmb goam ye. 
Nehemiah13:25 M zaba ne-ba, n pãb kẽer la m võ b zut zoobdo, n kɩt tɩ b wẽen ne Wẽnd tɩ b kõn le rɩk b kom-pugli n kõ bu-zẽmba ye la bãmb me kõn deeg bu-zẽmba kom-pugli n maan b pagb ye." 
Nehemiah13:26 Ka yell a woto buud n wa ne Israyɛl dĩm a Salomo lʋɩɩs bɩ? Dĩm ba a ye pa wẽneg a Salomo. Soaala-Wẽnd da nong-a lame, Soaala-Wẽnd da kõ-a-la Israyɛl naam la bu-zẽmba pagb kɩtame t'a lak n lʋɩ." 
Nehemiah13:27 Ka segd tɩ b wʋm tɩ yãmb me maana yẽ wɩɩbda ye. 
Nehemiah13:28 Maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Eliyasib biig a ye, a Zoyada ra yaa Orõ dao a Sanebalat rɛɛmba. M dig a lame n zãage." 
Nehemiah13:29 Tẽeg-y nin-bãmba yelle, b sãama maan-kʋʋdb yʋʋre, b sãama zood ning sẽn da be maan-kʋʋdba la Levit dãmb sʋka." 
Nehemiah13:30 M yiisa bu-zẽmba Israyɛl sʋka la m wilga maan-kʋʋdba la Levitsa ned kam fãa tʋʋmd sẽn yaa a soaba. 
Nehemiah13:31 M wilga wakat ning b sẽn na n wa ne raado la kood rẽemsa lemse. Tẽeg-y m yelle, Soaala!" 
Job1:1 Ned n da be Us tẽnga, t'a yʋʋr boond t'a Zoob. A ra yaa nin-tɩrga, ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle, n zoet Wẽnd la a zãagd a meng ne wẽnga." 
Job1:2 A roga kom-dibli a yopoe, la kom-pugli a tã." 
Job1:3 A ra tara piis tus a yopoe, yʋgma tus a tã, niis tusri, n paas bõan-yãans kobs-nu; a zak neb ra yaa wʋsg-wʋsgo. Nin-kãnga n da yɩɩd a taaba Yaang kẽedba sʋka." 
Job1:4 Ade, a kamba da mi n kẽnd n maanda kibsa ned kam fãa yiri, ned fãa ne a daare, la b mi n boonda b tãop a tãabã tɩ b wat n dɩtẽ la b yũud ne bãmba." 
Job1:5 La b sã n mi n wa maan kibs rãmba n gilg b zags fãa n sege, b ba, a Zoob, da boond-b lame n yɩlg-ba tɩ b lebg sõma. Woto wã, vẽkembeoogo, sõor pukri, a ra kʋʋda yũ-noog maoongo bãmb ned kam fãa yĩnga. Bala a da tagsda a yamẽ: «Daar ninga mam kamba maana yel-wẽnde, n beeg Wẽnnaam b sũurẽ.» Yaa woto la a Zoob da maand wakat fãa." 
Job1:6 Daar n zĩndi tɩ sẽn balemd-b Naaba-Wẽnd wa seg taab Naaba-Wẽnd zãongẽ n na n wilg yɛla sẽn be zĩig ninga tɩ Bɛ-kʋdga, Sʋtãana, me tũu n wa." 
Job1:7 Dẽ la Wẽnnaam sok-a: «Fo yita yɛ?» T'a leoke: «Mam gilga moogo n lɛɛg n watẽ.» 
Job1:8 Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd leb n sok-a: «La fo yãenda m sõgna a Zoob bɩ? A ka tar a to moog ye: a yaa nin-tɩrga, ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle, n zoet Wẽnde la a zãagd a meng ne wẽnga.»" 
Job1:9 Dẽ la Bɛ-kʋdga gõgneme n leoke: «Yaa zaalem t'a Zoob zoet Wẽnnaam nifu? 
Job1:10 Yãmb ka wẽ yãgr n gũbg a menga, a zaka la a soolma fãa wɛ? Y ninga a tʋʋm fãa barka, a rũmsa yẽnegda tẽnga pʋtẽ." 
Job1:11 La yãmb ye n tẽeg y nug n sɩɩs a paoongã, m mii vẽenega t'a na tʋʋs yãmba.»" 
Job1:12 Wẽnnaam yeela Bɛ wã: «Dẽ ka yell ye, a paoongã, fãa be f nugẽ, gũus bala n da sɩɩs a meng ye.» Tɩ Bɛ wã yik n loog Wẽnnaam taoore." 
Job1:13 Daar a ye, a Zoob kamba da rɩtame la b yũud, b kẽema yiri." 
Job1:14 La ned a ye n wa a Zoob nengẽ n wilg-a: «Fo niisa da koodame, tɩ bõan-yãansa da wãbd yamdo pʋʋga noorẽ." 
Job1:15 Saba fãadb kell n wa kʋʋ nebã n loog ne rũmsã; maam m ye tãa bala n põse n zoet n na n wa togs fo.» 
Job1:16 Yẽ sẽn nan ket n gomda, la ned a to sẽn wa, n yeele: «Ad Wẽnnaam bugum yii yĩngri n lʋɩ; a yõoga fo piisã la f nebã, n dɩ-b zãnga. Maam m ye tãa bala n põse, n zoet n na n wa togs fo.»" 
Job1:17 Yẽ soaba ka paam n gom n sɛ ye la ned a to sẽn wa n yeele: «Kalde rãmb sẽn welg sags a tãabo zoe n kẽe rũn-kɩɩmbã n kʋ-ba, n loog ne yʋgma wã. Maam m ye tãa bal n põse n zoet n na n wa togs fo.»" 
Job1:18 Yẽ sẽn da ket n gomda la ned a to sẽn wa n yeele: «Fo kom-dibli la f kom-pugli da bee b kẽema yiri n dɩtẽ la b yũuda," 
Job1:19 la sob-kãseng sẽn yi we-raooga yaanga waa n zũndga zaka kɩrems a naasã t'a lʋɩ n buug kambã n kʋ. Maam m ye tãa bala n põse, n zoet n na n wa togs fo.»" 
Job1:20 Dẽ la a Zoob yik yã, n pãrg a fuugu, n põng a zugu; dẽ poore, a lʋɩɩ tẽnga, a yãnvabga" 
Job1:21 n yetẽ: «Mam yii m ma pʋgẽ bilemde, mam na n leba bilemde. Wẽnd da kõome, Wẽnd le reegame. Bãmb yʋʋr paam pẽgre.»" 
Job1:22 Ne yella sẽn yɩ toog ne-a wã, a Zoob ka maan wẽng ye, a ka tʋʋs Wẽnnaam ye." 
Job2:1 Daar a ye n le zĩndi tɩ sẽn balemd-b Wẽnda le seg taab Naaba-Wẽnd zãongẽ wã, tɩ Bɛ wã me tũ n wa t'a me na n wilga sẽn be." 
Job2:2 Wẽnnaam soka Bɛ wã: «Fo yita yɛɛne?» T'a leoke: «Maam gõ n gilga moogo n lɛɛg n watẽ.» 
Job2:3 Tɩ Wẽnnaam leok-a: «Fo tẽeg n gesa m sõgna a Zoob bɩ? A ka tar a to moog ye: a yaa nin-tɩrga, ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle, n zoet Wẽnde la a zãag a meng ne wẽnga. A kell n pa-la a pʋ-peelma zugu la yaa zaalem la f tõg-m tɩ m fɛɛs-a.»" 
Job2:4 La Bɛ wã gõgnemame n leoke: «Yõor la gɛla; ninsaal sẽn tar fãa, a kɩt-a lame n fãag a yõore." 
Job2:5 Dɩlla y sã n tẽeg y nugu n sɩɩs a yĩnga kõaba la a yĩnga nemdo, m mii vẽenega t'a na tʋʋs yãmb.»" 
Job2:6 Tɩ Wẽnnaam leok Bɛ wã: «Be neere, a Zoob yɛla fãa be-la f nugẽ, fo yee n da sɩɩs a vɩɩma!»" 
Job2:7 Bɛ wã yik n looga Wẽnd taoore. A loba a Zoob yĩng bãaga, sɩnga a nao-pʋga n ta a zug tẽnsʋka." 
Job2:8 A Zoob kong n dɩka sa-pɛɛga n wurd a yĩnga, la a tɩ gãe tampʋʋrẽ." 
Job2:9 Dẽ la a paga yeel-a: «Fo na n kell n vɩɩnda wa ned sẽn ka tar zʋga bɩ? Ges n yaa n tʋʋs Wẽnnaam la f ki!» 
Job2:10 La a Zoob leokame: «Fo gomda wa yam kɩdg soaba; tõnd sã n deegd sũ-noog Wẽnnaam nengẽ, bõe yĩnga la d ka na n deeg sũ-sãang me boto?» Ne a yɛla sẽn yɩ a soab fãa, a Zoob ka tol n tʋʋs Wẽnnaam a goamẽ ye." 
Job2:11 La yɛl kãensã fãa wa n lʋɩ a Zoob zo-rãmba a tãab tʋbrẽ, la ned kam fãa yi-la a tẽngẽ n wa: yaa, a Elifaz, Tema raoa, a Bildad, Suwa raoa, la a Sofar, Naama raoa. B sega taaba n yet tɩ b na n tɩ kũma a Zoob la b maas a sũuri." 
Job2:12 B tool n gesa a Zoob yɩɩga la b ka le bãng-a ye. Tɩ b sɩng yãbre. Ned kam fãa pãrga a fuugu la a wʋka tom n lob yĩngr t'a lɛɛg n dʋʋg a zugu. 
Job2:13 Dẽ poore b zĩnda tẽnga, a sɛɛgẽ, la b paa ne-a dasem a yopoe, wĩntoog la yʋngo. La ned ba a ye ka tõog n yaag a noor n gom ne-a ye, a namsga toolem yĩnga." 
Job3:1 A Zoob waa n yaaga a noore n na n kãab a rogma raar beedo. 
Job3:2 A goma woto: 
Job3:3 M tʋllẽ-la ne sũur fãa tɩ Wẽnd yẽesẽ m dogma daare, n yẽesẽ yʋng ninga sẽn walme: «Biig n na n wa moogo!»" 
Job3:4 Bɩ b sõd ra-kãnga wa lik sẽn pid lik raare! Bɩ Wẽnd da le zĩnd yĩngrã n tẽeg a yell ye! Bɩ vẽenem buud da yãg a zug ye! 
Job3:5 Bɩ lik sẽn pid lik wa reeg-a n yãmbe, tɩ sawad-taok wa lud-a, tɩ wĩndga booga a vẽenema boog-bãnde!" 
Job3:6 Bɩ yʋng kãng yɩɩg a taab ne lika, a raara kell n menem zãnga tɩ b sõt n boogd kiuug kãng raar a ye." 
Job3:7 Bɩ rogem zãag ne yʋng kãnga, a beoog vẽeg tɩ sũ-noog kaasg pa tol n kaas ye!" 
Job3:8 Bɩ bagba la mitba sẽn tõe m kãab tɩ tũ, la b tõe n nek wag-bãnd a Leviatã, bɩ b kãab yʋng kãnga kãab-beedo." 
Job3:9 A tõd-beoog ãdg ra tõog n puk ye a gũ beoogo tɩ sõor tõdg pukri, a gũ beoog vẽegre n kell n pa ne lika." 
Job3:10 La rẽ yaa a sẽn ka maan bũmbu n gɩdg m waoong dũni pʋgẽ, n gɩdg nimbãaneg ning sẽn yaa m dẽnd dũnna wã." 
Job3:11 Bõe yĩng tɩ mam ka ki m ma pʋgẽ, bɩ m sẽn doge, bõe yĩng tɩ m pa wẽneg n ki?" 
Job3:12 Bõe tɩ pag sagl-m a naoẽ? Bõe tɩ m yẽsma a bĩs a yi n vɩɩnde? 
Job3:13 Marsã tɩ m pa gãeẽ yĩn-maasem zĩigẽ, marsã tɩ m gõẽ-la m laafi gõeem," 
Job3:14 ne rĩm dãmba la nin-bɛda, ne dĩm niyns sẽn da baood yʋʋre, n yikd raboodo sẽn da lʋɩ." 
Job3:15 Ka rẽ bɩ m beẽ ne na-koms sẽn gãe ne sãnem, tɩ b rot bolg ne wanzurfu." 
Job3:16 M yɩtẽ la wa pa-tare sẽn wẽneg n bus n menese, m yɩtẽ la wa bi-pɛɛlg sẽn ka yãend wĩntoog vẽenem." 
Job3:17 Ad-y kɩɩmkulgã, nin-wẽnsa ka le mi vɩg-vɩg ye, beelẽ yaamsa rãmb sɩnga vʋʋsgo." 
Job3:18 Sẽn da pag b rãmb rooga paamda laafi, b ka le wʋmd b gũudb toosa bʋʋr ye." 
Job3:19 Yem-daoog ne a zu-soaba, wĩir ka b sʋk ye. Bõoneg la bɛda, fãa zema taaba," 
Job3:20 Vɩɩma kõta sẽn namsda bõe yĩnga? Sẽn tar-a tooga reegd-a-la bõe yĩnga? 
Job3:21 Wʋsg boonda b kũum t'a tõt waoongo, sẽn vɛɛsd-ba n baood kũum bãmb sõor n yɩɩd arzɛka baoodba; b baood a lame n yɩɩd arzɛka," 
Job3:22 bãmb sũ-noogo yãẽ la yaoogo, b kɩdeng la b sẽn taẽ a pʋgẽ." 
Job3:23 M yaa ned sẽn ka mi a sẽn lebdẽ ye la ya wa Wẽnd mee lalga n gũbg-ma. 
Job3:24 Sã n yet tɩ m dɩ, yaa kũsga, yaa toog bal n tar-m tɩ m waasdẽ." 
Job3:25 M sẽn zoet bũmb ningã n tat-ma, m sẽn ligind bũmb ningã n gãd-ma." 
Job3:26 Mam nengẽ vʋʋsg ka ye, laafi ka ye, sẽk ka ye, pɛt bal la m zĩ ne." 
Job4:1 A Elifaz, Tema raoa, goma ne a Zoob woto:" 
Job4:2 M mi tɩ m sã n gome m na n paasa f naongo m yaool n ka tõe n le sĩnd n paas ye. 
Job4:3 Gese, fo menga sagla neb kʋʋngo, n da kengd yaams sẽn tar b rãmb sũuri." 
Job4:4 Sẽn da reegd-a fo saglgã da le paamda raoodo; sẽn pãsd-a n lʋɩtẽ da le paamda pãnga. 
Job4:5 Marsã, taa foo tɩ fo burd n lʋɩtẽ, tooga sãaga foom tɩ f ka le mi f sẽn kẽedẽ ye. Yel-beeda taa foo marsã tɩ f basd raoodo, taa foom marsã tɩ f yɛɛsdẽ." 
Job4:6 Fo yeelame tɩ f tũuda Wẽnde la f vɩɩma ka tar goaleng ye, bõe tɩ f ka na n kell n zĩnd ne f saagre?" 
Job4:7 Tags n gese, ka-yell-soab a bõe la nin-tɩrg a bõe la yel-beed peeg n loog tɩ fo mii?" 
Job4:8 Mam sẽn mi bala, yaa tɩ f sã n bʋd nimbãanega f sã n bʋd zãmbo, f tigsda zãmbo la nimbãanega." 
Job4:9 Neb sã n tʋm n puug Wẽnd sũuri, b fʋʋsd-b lame tɩ b menem, n menem wa saag sobgo ne mo-paoko." 
Job4:10 Wẽnd n tõe tɩ gɩgemd sĩndi tɩ bõnyẽ-bi yɩ lamboama. 
Job4:11 We-rũmsa tõe n konga rɩɩb n ki, tɩ b kamba sẽeg taaba!" 
Job4:12 M zãmsdẽ, koɛɛg n waa n walme, la m tʋbr wʋma bʋrbʋre." 
Job4:13 Yʋng zãmsd sẽn waa n lengd m tagsgo tɩ Adem biisa gãe wa bõn-kɩɩmse," 
Job4:14 yɛɛsg n digimd-m waoodo, n kɩt tɩ m kõaba wẽ taab koe-koe!" 
Job4:15 Pemsem n wẽ m nengã valɛll, tɩ m yĩnga kõbd fãa yik n yɛsẽ." 
Job4:16 Ned n da yɛs m taoore la m da ka mi a soab ye, m da nee bũmb bal sẽn yɛs m taoore. Fãa ra yaa sɩɩ, la m waa n wʋma koɛɛg:" 
Job4:17 «Adem biig tõe n bʋʋ tɩrga, a bʋʋda tõe n yɩɩ tɩrga n yɩɩg Wẽnd dẽnd bɩ? Ninsaal sõmblem tõe n yɩɩga a Naanda rẽnd bɩ?" 
Job4:18 Gese, Wẽnd sũur ka peel ne b buuda kamb ye, b malɛk rãmba nengẽ menga b nee bũmb wa gãeemdo." 
Job4:19 M na n yeelame tɩ bõe marsã ne nin-tãndã, ne sẽn ya-b tom-pʋlempʋk rãmba? Bãmb na n bedsa wa karenga." 
Job4:20 Yibeoog n ta zaabre tɩ goama gilame, bilf-bilf bala b wat n menema zãng fas." 
Job4:21 B rooga tii ne pɛɛla la a wĩ wã zoe n loodame. B yalemdã n dɩt-b zãng kas.» 
Job5:1 F bolgda ãnna t'a wa leok fo, Zoob? F na n goma ne Wẽnd yamba a bõe, malɛk sõng a bõe la f na n gom ne?" 
Job5:2 Sɩda, sũ-toogo n kʋʋd ka-yõod-soaba, tɩ zoe-bõn baasd yalma." 
Job5:3 Mam yãenda nin-yoog zak sẽn piuugdi, la m wẽneg n kãaba a zaka beedo:" 
Job5:4 «Bɩ a kamba bolg sõngre n konge, bɩ bʋʋd zĩigẽ, b bʋʋda yɩ toogo, la ned da sõng-b ye." 
Job5:5 A wãka sẽn kõ-a kood ninga lebg kom sẽn tar a soab rɩɩbo, b kao a gõosa yãgrã n kẽ n wʋke, a ba sẽn bas ne a fãa gilli, bɩ zɛɛdba loog ne!»" 
Job5:6 Yɛl kɛga ka pusgd tẽng n yi abada, nimbãaneg me ka bund wa kood n yi ye." 
Job5:7 Ninsaal yẽ dogame n na n wʋm toogo wa bug-pãrg sẽn baood n na n zom moogo. 
Job5:8 M sã n da yaẽ foo, yaa Wẽnd la m na n taasẽ m koɛɛga, m bʋʋda yaẽ-la bãmb n na n bʋ-ma." 
Job5:9 Bãmb tʋma tʋʋm kãsense sẽn zʋʋg ninsaal yam. B tʋʋma yãgda ne neerem la b yaa kõn-bãng-n-sõde. 
Job5:10 Bãmb n zãgsd tẽnga ne b sa-koom, pʋta paamda koom n yɛs ne tɩgre." 
Job5:11 B dat n zẽka nin-bõoneg zutu, la b kõ neng sẽn gãnem b rãmba fãagre." 
Job5:12 B sãamda sɩlem dãmba magbo, n kɩt tɩ b geels fãa pa fãado." 
Job5:13 Bãmb n yõkd sɩlem dãmba b sɩlma bẽdgẽ, bãmb n dengd n puk zãmb rãmba zãmbo." 
Job5:14 Wĩnto-sʋka, zãmb dãmba fãooda lika, n babend wĩnto-sʋka wa yʋn-sʋka." 
Job5:15 Wẽnd fãagda naong soaba, t'a põs a bɛɛb sʋʋga n põs b yẽna, n põs b nug-yẽese sẽn ya barse." 
Job5:16 Yaa boto la nimbãan-ned lɛɛg n bilgd tɩlgre, tɩ nin-wẽng fãa za wĩir n yɛsẽ." 
Job5:17 Sɩd sɩda, sũ-noog soaba la Wẽnd sẽn demsd a soab kẽnde! Bɩ f sake, Zoob, n tũ Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba saglse." 
Job5:18 Wẽnd n wat ne toogo la b wat ne pemsem, bãmb n kaoogd ne b nus n lɛɛg n wobge." 
Job5:19 B na n yiis-f-la yɩɩr a yoob pʋgẽ, la a yopoe soaba na n gil n bas-f lame." 
Job5:20 Kom wẽnde, b na fãag-f ne kũum, la f põsda sʋʋga, zabr wakato." 
Job5:21 Zelem toaag soab sãbsg kõn sãbs-f ye, f kõn maan dabeem ne beoog yel-beed ye." 
Job5:22 Kom la tẽn-kũum ka loe f zug ye, f ka rigd we-rũng poorẽ ye." 
Job5:23 Bũmb kõn sɩɩs f pʋʋg ye, kugr kõn fẽrg a pʋʋgẽ ye, rũng kõn wõrg bũmb ye." 
Job5:24 F zak pida ne laafi, f rũmsa wãbneg zĩigẽ yamd kõn paoog ye." 
Job5:25 F na n yãee f buuda fɩɩre, la f yagens na n yãmba zĩiga wa moog sẽn dɩ pʋ-wɛɛga." 
Job5:26 F kõn zarbe n yaool dɩk yaada sor ye. F kooda rengd n kalsame, n kals n sam zĩ yɛnga, tɩ f ket n pid ne vɩɩm dẽ poor marsã la kũuma na n yaool n wa." 
Job5:27 Tõnd vɛɛsame la d yãendame la sɩd yaa woto, Bas tɩ b wilg-fu, n paas f bãngre, Zoob." 
Job6:1 A Zoob le yaaga a noor n yeele: 
Job6:2 M nongẽ lame tɩ m sũ-sãangã yaẽ la bũmb sẽn tõe n mage, tɩ m sũ-kãbrã tarẽ magdga!" 
Job6:3 M tẽed t'a zɩsame n yɩɩd mogr noorẽ bĩisri; ya rẽ la yiis gomd biig n togs lebg toog ne m no-gãndo. 
Job6:4 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba pɛɛma kõsa maam n gilgi, la m fõosa b zẽnema zãnga, Wẽnd sẽn yiisd bũmb ning fãa tɩ tõe n yɛɛs ninsaala, m seg-b-la zãng kasi, b zãng bobame n na n zab ne maam." 
Job6:5 Burgumd na yãbd kom yamd noog sɛɛgẽ? Ka rʋʋgd loalg yamdo t'a le mi kɛleng ye. 
Job6:6 Rɩ-sãbsgo tog n dɩɩme n ka ning yamsem bɩ? Gel-kood nooma noorẽ bɩ? 
Job6:7 M pa rat rɩɩb a woto buud ye, namsg ka bur sẽn sakd dɩɩb ye." 
Job6:8 La ãnd n na n sõng tɩ m kosga pidsi, n sõng tɩ Wẽnd kõ-m m sẽn saagde?" 
Job6:9 Wẽnd sã n da sakẽ n neem maam b teoogẽ, n wãagẽ maam wa sʋlg sẽn wãagd a peende!" 
Job6:10 M sũur na maagẽ, m sũur na yɩẽ noogo, m namsg kẽenga pʋgẽ, la rẽ yaa m meng sẽn tar kaseto, tɩ m pa tol n kɩɩs Sõmblem-Naaba noor ye." 
Job6:11 Mam na n yãee pãng yɛɛnẽ n yaas n gũ; m kũuma sẽn ya tɩlɛ, m vɩɩma yõod la bʋgo?" 
Job6:12 Mam keelma taa pĩig dẽnd bɩ? Mam yĩnga tara zũud keglem bɩ? 
Job6:13 M sẽn gũud sõngr ninga ka loog n tɩ yag vɩʋʋgẽ bɩ? Zĩ bʋg la m kẽed n paam n põse? Saagr bilfr menga ka le ket m nengẽ ye. 
Job6:14 Toog sẽn wʋm a soaba tog n paama a tũud-n-taasa sõngre, ka rẽ a kõn zoe Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba nif ye." 
Job6:15 M saam-biisa yɩɩ sõm-zitba, b zoe n looga wa koom, wa koom sẽn zoe n bas kʋɩl-waoko." 
Job6:16 Waooda sã n nan ket bilfu, kʋɩlsa wuk n yɛsame, kooma sẽn da gũsa boogd n watame," 
Job6:17 zĩiga sẽn wɩng bala, kʋɩlsa kʋɩtame, tʋʋlga fẽbgd-b-la zãnga." 
Job6:18 Ko-yũud mii n wa legla toandba n legl-ba n kẽes moogo, n legl-ba n tɩ menes we-raoogẽ." 
Job6:19 Tema toandba, Saba leebdba nin kargda weoogã, tɩ koom sẽn na n furg la b baooda, n tẽed tɩ kʋɩl-waoka na pids b tẽebo," 
Job6:20 mik b sẽn kolge lebga teeg lemde, tẽeb loogame n bas b rãmb ne yɩɩre." 
Job6:21 Ad-y yaa woto me, maam ne yãmb sʋka, y sẽn yãend m bãaga la y sẽn yɛs ne yɩɩre." 
Job6:22 Da-bʋr la m yeel yã: «Wa-y n kõ-y kũuni, wa-y n zam-y maam y sẽn tare?" 
Job6:23 Wa-y n yao m bɛya tɩ m paam n põse, wa-y n fãag-y-m pãn-tõoga soab nugẽ.»" 
Job6:24 Tẽeg-y fãa n wilg mam tɩ m na sĩndi, wilg-y maam m tudugra zĩiga." 
Job6:25 Togs sɩd ka mot noor ye. Togs-y y sẽn yãend m nengẽ tɩ ya goalenga, togs-y-m m goalenga sẽn golmẽ." 
Job6:26 Yãmb bilgda y na yãe kegre m goama pʋgẽ wɛ? A ka-neng-soab goam me yaa bõe tɩ ka gom faad sobg sẽn loogd ne bala? 
Job6:27 Y na sak n bas tɩ b koos kɩɩba a sẽn ka tɛɛgd yĩnga, n bas tɩ b koos y zoa sẽn ya y zoa menga?" 
Job6:28 Ade, wɩsg-y y meng n doog n ges-ma, m na saag n yag-y zirẽ bɩ?" 
Job6:29 Lebg-y n wa yã la y da maan zãmb ye, bi y lebg n wa tɩ m yiis m meng yellẽ." 
Job6:30 Mam zelemde n yagd zirẽ, bɩ sɩd la m ka mi n bakd ne zirẽ-beedoo?" 
Job7:1 Ninsaal vɩɩm tẽng zug yaa bõe, sã n ka yem-da-tʋʋma tʋm n baase? Beoog vẽegd-a-la tʋʋmd zugu, tɩ sẽoog wa reeg sɩpaolgo." 
Job7:2 Wala yem-daoog sẽn sesd n baood maasem, wala tʋʋm-tʋmd sẽn gũud a yaoodo," 
Job7:3 m gũume la kiuug fãa waa ne a belgre, tɩ yʋng fãa wa ne a yaamse." 
Job7:4 M sẽn lʋɩ m gãagẽ tɩ m na n gãande la m sẽn sokd m menga: «M na n yika wakat bʋgo?» Zĩig sã n sobg la a sẽn sobge, beoog ka le pʋgd ye, tɩ m gãe n zʋbsdẽ n gũud sõore." 
Job7:5 Rẽgd la karense wʋma maam, tɩ m yĩn-gãongã wukd ne meto." 
Job7:6 Mam daara zoee tʋʋlg-tʋʋlga, n yɩɩd koeer-wamde. La gĩsga sẽn taa a tɛkã, wʋgb me sɛ yã." 
Job7:7 Tẽeg-y yã, Wẽnde, tɩ m vɩɩma yaa noor pemsem la m nif kõn le teeg sũ-noog bada." 
Job7:8 Adem biig nif kõn le teeg maam ye, m loogdame la yãmb bal y ye n ket ne maam." 
Job7:9 Wala sawadg sẽn wɩlg n looge, sẽn lisa bʋg-tẽng kõn le puk ye," 
Job7:10 a kõn le kẽ a zakẽ ye, a yir dãmb kõn le sok a yell ye." 
Job7:11 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ m ka na n sĩnd ye; ba m na gomd la m sesdẽ, m na gome, m na n gom n wilg tɩ m pɛtã n wa ne m guglgu." 
Job7:12 M yaa mogra bɩ bõn-ninda sẽn be a pʋgẽ wã, tɩ y bao gũudb sẽn na n gũusd m yikr la m gãaga?" 
Job7:13 M sã n yeele: «M na n paama yolsgo m gãagẽ, m debra zugu m namsgã na wooge,»" 
Job7:14 y wat n yɛɛsd-m-la ne zãmbsdo. 
Job7:15 Mam sẽn tull la sãrg m menga, mam kũum n são m yĩnga vuubu." 
Job7:16 Ad-y m ya n yɛɛme, m ka na n vɩɩnd daar fãa ye. Bas-y-ma tɩ m daara loogda wa bug walem." 
Job7:17 Ninsaal pus n yaa bõe tɩ y mams-a wa bũmb sẽn pid ne yõodo, wa bũmb sẽn sek y ning-a sʋka?" 
Job7:18 Y lɩkd n get-a-la yibeoog fãa, n dat n bãng a gãag sẽn yɩɩ a soaba;" 
Job7:19 Y na n basame n ka le ges-ma tɩ m yãe vɩʋʋg n vel m kolkood bɩ?
