Job7:20 M sã n maana yel-wẽnde, yel-wẽnda maand-y-la bõe waare, tɩ y tar m gũusgu wĩndg la yʋngo? Bõe yĩng tɩ y nif kell n tuk maam woto? M zãab paasda yãmb zɩɩb bʋgo?" 
Job7:21 Y sɩd ka tõe n bas m beegra taale, n mum y nif n kõ sugri? Bala sã n yɩ bilfu tɩ m yaa tom y na n babl n bao-m lame la rẽ tɩ m ka ket ye." 
Job8:1 A Bildad, Suwa raoa, sɩnga goama n yeele:" 
Job8:2 Zoob, fo na n kell n tara yɛla toagsg woto, n gomd goam sẽn kaood sɩlmana?" 
Job8:3 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba tõe n tedga bʋʋm? Naaba-Wẽnd tõe n bʋʋ tulma? 
Job8:4 Fo kamb sã n beeg Wẽnde, Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba, basd-b-la ne b yel-wẽnde." 
Job8:5 Fo menga, sã n baood Wẽnde, n yõkd b sɛɛga," 
Job8:6 f sã n ya pʋ-peen-needa la nin-tɩrga, Wẽnd na gũ-f goabg la rɩtgo, n le zaoolg fo f sõmblema zugu." 
Job8:7 Fo sẽn da yɩ a soab pĩnda na n lebga zaalem sã n mak ne beoog rẽnna. 
Job8:8 Sok pĩnd dãmba, gese, sok n ges b yaab rãmba sẽn seg bũmb ninga." 
Job8:9 Tõnd dũnna kamba, tõnd nan mii bõe, d vɩɩm ka maasem bal sẽn buid tẽnga bɩ?" 
Job8:10 Pĩnd dãmba na gom n wilg-fu, b pʋtẽer na yiis yelbũna." 
Job8:11 «Rudum yita yɛ tɩ ka bãoogẽ? Kʋɩlg moog tõe n bɩ tɩ koom ka beẽ? 
Job8:12 Koom ka be, kʋɩlg moog kiidame t'a nan puudẽ, a rengda a taab n kʋɩ tɩ b pa kũug-a ye.»" 
Job8:13 Ad-y sẽn yĩma Wẽnnaam yell me yaa boto; nin-wẽng sẽn gãe n tẽed fãa paada sãoogo. 
Job8:14 A ra-tɛɛgdg na n kaoogame la a sẽn teega yaa sʋlg gaam-gaam. 
Job8:15 A sã n dell a roogo, tɩ roog kɩlle t'a maneg n gĩd kẽnkẽ tɩ roog lʋɩ." 
Job8:16 Sẽn ka mi a Wẽnde, wẽnda tɩɩga tɩɩga tobame n yɛs wĩndgẽ, a yɛdga a wila n lud tɩɩs a taaba." 
Job8:17 A yẽgna sʋg n kẽe kuga n kẽ n gaam kuga pẽgsẽ. 
Job8:18 Mik b sã n võog-a a sẽn da yɛsẽ wã b na wẽen tɩ tɩɩg zɩ n zĩnd be ye. 
Job8:19 Yaa woto la sẽn yĩm-b Wẽnda pʋɩɩre. Bãmb zĩigẽ tɩɩg a to n na n yi. 
Job8:20 Abada, Wẽnd ka basd nin-tɩrg kɛɛng ye, la b ka sõngd yɛl kɛga rãmb ye." 
Job8:21 Wẽnd na n le pidsa f noor ne laado, f noor na n le wuka ne kilsgu." 
Job8:22 Fo bɛɛb na sud ne yãnde, nin-wẽens rot na sarem zãnga." 
Job9:1 A Zoob leokame la ad-a sẽn yeele: 
Job9:2 Mam mi tɩ sɩd yaa woto. Adem biig na bʋ ne Wẽnd n paam bʋʋm? 
Job9:3 Fo sã n wẽed no-koeemd ne Wẽnde, fo goam yaa tusr tɩ b nan pa yaag b noor ye." 
Job9:4 B pida ne bãngr zulunga la pãnga; ãnd n tak zabr ne-ba n ka reeg toogo? 
Job9:5 B tusda tãmse n teemd zĩisi tɩ b ka mii ye, b tusd-b lame n lubd, b sũ-puur daare." 
Job9:6 Tẽnga miimda a zĩigẽ, a sẽn vigl n yɛs bũmb niyns zuta kɩldame." 
Job9:7 Wĩntoog reegda b noor n ka puk ye, tɩ ãdsa fãa tõdg yiibu." 
Job9:8 Wẽnd b ye tãa n tẽeg sa gãongã n yɛdge, la b karg n tabd mogra ko-wiisã." 
Job9:9 Ãds niyns b sẽn boond tɩ Bʋdb kukuri, susi, noaag ne a kamba, yʋʋm toadga, fãa yaa bãmb nug tʋʋmde." 
Job9:10 Bãmb nug tʋʋma sɩd labsame; b sẽn maan ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. 
Job9:11 Bãmb kẽnd m sɛɛgẽ me, m ka ne-b ye, b loodame la m ka tar b buk ye." 
Job9:12 B sã n dɩk bũmbu, ãnda n gɩdgde, ãnda n sokd tɩ bõe la b maanda?" 
Job9:13 Wẽnd sũur sã n yiki, sikd ka ye. Mogr pʋgẽ pãn-dãmba fãa sura bãmb taoore." 
Job9:14 La woto wã mam na saag n leok bãmba? M na n bao gomd n bẽd-ba? 
Job9:15 Ba m sã n tar bʋʋm, m na n leokame tɩ bõe? M tɛk la m kos m bʋ-kaooda sugr bala." 
Job9:16 Mam bool b tɩ b sak n wa me, m kõn sak n deeg tɩ b kelga m koɛɛg ye." 
Job9:17 Bãmb sob-raadã n fãood-m n lubdẽ, n tar-m poglgo tɩ m ka wʋmd võor ye." 
Job9:18 B ka basd-m tɩ m vʋʋs ye, b sẽn tɩgs-m ne bũmb ning yaa toog ne toogo." 
Job9:19 M na bao n maan raood ne bãmba? Ka bãmb la Pãng-Naaba? M kos tɩ yella welg bʋʋdẽ, ka bãmb taoor bal la bʋʋda na n bʋ laa?" 
Job9:20 Ba m tar bʋʋm me, mam noor goam bala n paalgd-m. M tags tɩ yell ka m zug me, m noorã n lɛɛgd n puk m wẽnem." 
Job9:21 La bãng yell ka m zugã, m tũuda bõe n wa bãng rẽnna? Wẽnd na laas-m ne dũnna vɩɩma!" 
Job9:22 Yaa wala m sẽn yeelã: Yell sẽn ka be ned ning zugu kiida wala nin-yoogo 
Job9:23 Yel-beedo sã n tiig n lʋɩ pʋ-peen-dãmb zugu, tɩ b rigd rabeem la b kiidẽ, bãmb toogo?" 
Job9:24 Nin-yood tõeeme n wa reeg tẽng n yãmbe, la sã n ka bãmb n lud bʋ-kaoodba nini, maana a wãn tɩ ya sɩɩ?" 
Job9:25 Sẽn tõe n zoe-ba kõn dig m daarã n yõk ye, m daara loogame tɩ m pa yãend sũ-noog ye." 
Job9:26 M dasma salgame n looge wala b kẽe koom-kogend faase sẽn wʋg ne rudma, b looga wala sɩlg sẽn loogd ne a sẽn bri." 
Job9:27 Mam sã n yeel m menga: bas gõgnego yõgem f noore, la f la f laado," 
Job9:28 m fara rabeem yõkd-m lame; tɩ m mi tɩ y ka na n bas taal ye. 
Job9:29 Sẽn yaa a soab fãa, dẽnd m deeg tɩ maam n konge! Bõe tɩ m le yɛs n namsd m meng zaalem?" 
Job9:30 M nong bɩ m so ko-yɩlgemde, m nong bɩ m nudgd m nusi ne zẽem," 
Job9:31 y na tus-m n lub begdẽ, tɩ m futa lɛɛg n wʋk-m wa waoosa." 
Job9:32 Sɩda Wẽnd ka ninsaal wa maam tɩ m tõe n wẽ no-koeemd ne bãmb ye, tɩ b naagd d yiiba fãa, bãmb ne maam, n kẽesd bʋʋd ye." 
Job9:33 Ned sã n da beẽ tõnd d yiiba sʋk n na n paas do, ned sã n beẽ sẽn na n sõng tɩ d zems taaba," 
Job9:34 a na n zãagẽ Wẽnd kaasa ne maam, la m kõn le rigẽ bãmb dabeem ye." 
Job9:35 M naan n kengẽ m sũur n gome; la rẽ sẽn ka be wã, m paada m ye ne m menga." 
Job10:1 Mam yam yaa n laka ne vɩɩma, dẽ yĩnga, m goama na n pãrame; m na n goma ne sũur sẽn sãame." 
Job10:2 M na n yeela Wẽnde: da paalg-y-m ye, wilg-y maam yãmb zabra võore." 
Job10:3 Y sũur nooma m sẽn zĩ ne yɩɩra laa? Y pa le nand y sẽn nams n yag laa? Y rat n sõnga sẽn wʋgd b zãmb sʋnda laa? 
Job10:4 Y nina ka ne n yɩɩd ninsaal dẽnd laa? Y sẽn ne tekda ninsaal nif yaadem bal laa? 
Job10:5 Yãmb vɩɩma yaa koɛɛg wa ninsaal rẽnd bɩ? Yãmb daara loogda tao tao wala ninsaal rẽnd bɩ," 
Job10:6 tɩ y baood n na n bãng mam beegrã, n sokd n na n tɩg m yel-wẽnda sẽn yɩ a soaba?" 
Job10:7 Y yaool n mi vẽenega tɩ m pʋg yaa pɛɛlga, la ned sɩd ka tõe n fãag maam yãmb nugẽ?" 
Job10:8 Y nus n gãd maam, n wẽoog maam, y nus n naag taab n yag-ma la b naag taab n sor-m begdẽ." 
Job10:9 Tẽeg-y tɩ yãmb sɩd yag-m-la ne yagdo la y na n le kɩtame tɩ m leb tomẽ. 
Job10:10 M sɩnga koaag-koaaga n wa lebg kɩd-kɩda. 
Job10:11 Y waa n yaool m kõ-m-la nemdo, n dɩk yĩn-gãong n yeelg-ma, n zĩnd be n kãam m yĩnga ne kõab la gĩin." 
Job10:12 Yãmb n kõ-m vɩɩm la pãnga la y gũudem tonga m yõore. 
Job10:13 Y sẽn da solg y sũurẽ wã la woto, y sẽn da wʋgd wa sʋnda la woto." 
Job10:14 Y yõka m nug laagẽ, m beegra wakato, n yet tɩ y kõn bas beegrã n ka sɩbg ye." 
Job10:15 Mam sã n maana yell kegre, m bʋko! M sã n ya nin-tɩrg me, m zug kõn doog ye, yãnd bal n tar maam, far bal n wʋm maam." 
Job10:16 M yet tɩ m yikda, y wudgd n bri-m-la wa ãbga. Y le sɩngda y tʋʋm beeda ne maam," 
Job10:17 y le yãngda y sũ-puura ne maam, y tãb-biisa zabda ne maam n deesd taaba." 
Job10:18 Bõe tɩ yãmb yiis maam m ma pʋgẽ? M sã n da kiẽ, nif kõn yãee-m ye," 
Job10:19 da na n yɩẽ-la wa m ka zĩnd ye, n yi m ma pʋgẽ n yak yaoogẽ." 
Job10:20 La yaa m daarã n tong wok-wok tẽng zug ka, bɩ bõe, tɩ y ka na n bas-ma, tɩ y ka na n yols tɩ m me paam n deem bilfu," 
Job10:21 n yaool n kul zãng-zãng m tẽngẽ, lik la kɩɩms na-tẽngẽ?" 
Job10:22 Beelẽ sõor yaa ki-lika, beelẽ zĩiga pila ne kũum sõngo, beelẽ vẽenem la yʋn-sʋk lika." 
Job11:1 A Sofar, Naama daoa, n deeg goama, n yeele:" 
Job11:2 Gom minem soaba pa tẽed leokr laa? Dẽ yĩnga bʋrg la gom toodo n wat ne bʋʋm bɩ? 
Job11:3 Ad-f goama pãrãrr kɩtame tɩ neba yaag b noor n kelgdẽ. Fo bee yɛ n laad neb tɩ b pa tõe n kʋɩdg-fo? 
Job11:4 Fo saag n yeelame: «M zãmsga ka pa sãoog ye, la m neeme tɩ yell ka m zug ye!»" 
Job11:5 Ade, Wẽnd sã n da ratẽ goama, b sã n da yaagẽ b noore n leoke," 
Job11:6 b sã n da rat n vẽnegẽ b sẽn mi, la rẽ yaa bũmb sẽn zʋʋg ninsaal yam pãnga, f na bãngẽ tɩ Wẽnd sẽn bas taal n ka sɩbg labsa." 
Job11:7 Fo tagsdame tɩ f tõe n bãnga Wẽnde n paam b bãngra zulma tɛk wɛ, fo tagsame tɩ f tõe n bãnga Wẽnd pãnga zãng wɛ?" 
Job11:8 Baad a lug n yɩɩda sagãna, fo na n maana wãna? A zulum n yɩɩda bug-tẽnga, bõe la f tõe n bãnge?" 
Job11:9 A woglem yɩɩda tẽnga t'a yalem zʋʋg Mogrã. 
Job11:10 Wẽnd loogda, yalsd ka ye, b yõkda, deegd ka ye, b boond bʋʋdo, tõat ka ye." 
Job11:11 Bala Wẽnd mii zirẽ-be-rãmbã, b welgda neer la wẽng tɩ ka tũ ne toog ye," 
Job11:12 tɩ ninsaal yɩɩra yaool n menesd a yam, t'a rogma daare ninsaal ya wa burgumd bila." 
Job11:13 Fo sã n paam tɩ f yama sĩdi, fo sã n wa yɛdg la f tẽeg f nusã n tees bãmba," 
Job11:14 f sã n mik tɩ yel-yood tab-f lame, bɩ f pĩng rẽ n lob yɩɩga la f ra lɛɛg n gãe f meng rẽgdẽ ye." 
Job11:15 Woto la f na n tõog n zẽk f zug ne pʋ-peelem. Fo sũura sẽn pek ne a rẽgdã kõn kiuus rabeem ye. 
Job11:16 F fara fãa na tiig n sɛ tɩ f ka le tags a yell ye; f wat n tẽra a yelle wa koom sẽn daage. 
Job11:17 Fo vɩɩma na n yãnga wala wĩnto-sʋka, tɩ ki-lik legb wa sõor sẽn pukdi." 
Job11:18 F na n le sɩng saagre, f na le yik ne raoodo. F sẽn ne tɩ bũmb fãa le wa-la a zĩigẽ f na gãand ne laafi." 
Job11:19 Fo sã n vʋʋsdẽ, ned kõn saag n nek-f ye, f sõsd-n-taasa na le wa tigim f sɛɛgẽ." 
Job11:20 Sã n ya nin-wẽensa b yiiga b nin n zĩi n getẽ, b kõn yãend zĩig n lamdg ye, la yaa kũum bala la b zĩi n gũudẽ." 
Job12:1 A Zoob reega goama n yeele: 
Job12:2 Sɩda yãmb gomda wa wulwaalbdã, bãngr zulung na n naag-y lame n menem moogo." 
Job12:3 Ad-y mam me tara yam wa yãmba, y ka yɩɩd-m ne baa fɩ. Y sẽn lʋɩɩs bũmb niyns taoorã, mam me tõe n waa ne bãmba." 
Job12:4 Maam la y zo-rãmb laad n tuumnẽ. B laada maam tɩ m ket n teesda Wẽnd n kelemdẽ, n kelemdẽ tɩ b yaool n ka le leokd wa pĩnd ye. Nin-tɩrg la nin-sõngo la bɛɛb laado." 
Job12:5 F meng sã n ka namsde f nong n sãbsa sẽn tar-b toog la naongã. 
Job12:6 Bi-beesa yaool n gãee b zakẽ ne laafi. Sẽn boond b Wẽnd tɩ b wa tɩ b sog maoora, zĩime tɩ bũmb ka yɛɛsd-b ye; b ka teeg wẽnd a to tɩ ka b yãoog pãng ye." 
Job12:7 Modg n sok rũmsã tɩ f na paam leokre, sok yĩngr luiili wã tɩ b na zãms-fo." 
Job12:8 Gom ne tẽngã t'a na kõ-f bãngre, sok mogra zĩm tɩ b na zãms-f wʋsgo." 
Job12:9 Sɩda, bãmb sʋka ãnna n ket n zɩ tɩ sẽn maan fãa yaa Wẽnnaam nug tʋʋmde?" 
Job12:10 Bõn-vɩɩl fãa vɩɩm bee bãmb nugẽ, bãmb pãng n tongd Adem biig fãa yõore." 
Job12:11 Neb maana b sɩɩlga: «Gomd nooma tʋbre, wala rɩɩb sẽn noom dasendaka." 
Job12:12 Gom minim yaa nin-kẽem bũmbu, zug sẽn pelg n tar yɛl welgre yam.»" 
Job12:13 Bãngr zulung la Wẽnd ning b rɩtgo, tɩ pãng kẽnd b goabga, bãmb n so saglg la yɛla-welgre." 
Job12:14 Wẽnd sẽn sãamẽ, manegd ka ye; b sẽn pag roogẽ, pak tɩ yi soab ka ye." 
Job12:15 B tõdg b saaga, kũuni, fãa zĩi ne ware; b bas tɩ saaga ni, tẽnga fãa na n teema nenga." 
Job12:16 Pãng la minem soab la bãmba, n lekd sẽn menesda la sẽn menema." 
Job12:17 Sẽn mi a saglg lebga zʋbsa, tɩ gãeemd zomb tẽnga soaalba." 
Job12:18 Bãmb n deegd dĩm dãmba naam, bãmb wĩir n loe b sɛɛg tɩ b tat n dabd yembdo." 
Job12:19 Maan-kʋʋdba piita b neooda wã b taoore, Sẽn da pa tẽed b tekra teema zãnga." 
Job12:20 A-mi-goam rãmb yaa sɩɩ, tɩ nin-kẽems yẽesem lebg kʋʋsem." 
Job12:21 Bãmb sẽoosda na-komse, la b loota pãn-tõog rãmba sɛɛs sẽbdse." 
Job12:22 Bʋg-tẽng rãmb likã, bãmb n menesd-a, la b wata ne vẽenem lik sẽn kẽ pãf zĩig ningã." 
Job12:23 Bãmb n tõe n zẽk buudu n le lɛɛg n fabg-a tẽnga. B kɩtdame tɩ buud a ye yalge n pid tẽnga, n le maan b yam n wʋk-a n kẽng pa-weere." 
Job12:24 B sobda tẽng soaalba yam tɩ b saad likẽ n ka le mi sor ye," 
Job12:25 tɩ b babend likẽ, vẽenem sẽn kaẽ, la Wẽnd menesda b yam wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam." 
Job13:1 Ad-y m nif yãee woto fãa; tɩ m tʋbr wʋme, tɩ m yam deege." 
Job13:2 Yãmb sẽn mi bũmb ningã, mam me mii rẽ, y yama ka yɩɩd-m ye." 
Job13:3 La yaa ne Wẽnd-Pãng-Soabã la m dat n gome; mam dat n goma ne bãmb n yiis m meng yellẽ. 
Job13:4 Yãmb yẽ, yaa tã-met faado, yãmb yaa m-bũmb-ka-zabd tɩɩm kõatba." 
Job13:5 Ãnna n na n yaa n mum y noorã, tɩ y bãng yam?" 
Job13:6 Yoog-y y tʋbre n kelge, tɩ m gom n yiis m meng yellẽ Bɩ y tʋba kelg m noora gomde." 
Job13:7 Yaa Wẽnd yʋʋr yĩng la y gomd n tuut neb bɩ? Yaa Wẽnd sõngr yĩng la y yelgd zirẽ-beed bɩ? 
Job13:8 Yaa Wẽnd bʋʋda sẽn yɛs bũmb ninga zugã la y wat ne y sõngra bɩ? 
Job13:9 Wẽnnaam maag b menga n vɛɛs y pʋga na zems y yĩnga? Y tẽed tɩ y na paam n la bãmb wala y sẽn laad ninsaala? 
Job13:10 Ad-y b na waa n zab ne yã tɩ y soos n kẽe a zagl n bas a zagla. 
Job13:11 Wẽnd ziira ka yɛɛsd yãmba? B ka kẽesd yãmb dabeem? 
Job13:12 Y sẽn gãd bũmb ning n tarẽ wã yaa tompɛglem bala, y sẽn dat n lill bũmb ning n paam n goma, yaa tãnd la boll bala." 
Job13:13 Bɩ y sĩnd y noor marsã tɩ maam n na n gome: sẽn na n yɩ a soaba, bɩ yɩ!" 
Job13:14 Ba sã n na n tũu ne m yõore, mam me na gãd m sẽn gãde." 
Job13:15 M mii vẽenega tɩ b na n kʋ-m lame, põasg ka ye. Baasgo, bãmb taoore m na gom n wilg m bʋʋma sẽn beẽ." 
Job13:16 Dẽ meng n na n wa ne m fãagre, tɩ m ka tarẽ pʋ-peelem m kõn sak n kolg bãmb ye." 
Job13:17 Kelg-y, kelg-y mam goama, wʋm-y m sẽn na n togs bũmb ninga võore." 
Job13:18 Ade, mam kosame tɩ b kẽes-m bʋʋdo, la m miime tɩ maam n na n paam bʋʋm!" 
Job13:19 Ãnna soaba n na n yɩ m bʋʋd-n-taaga? M sã n kong bʋʋm, m saka m na n sĩndi, m na ki menga." 
Job13:20 M Wẽnnaama zãag-m ne bũmb a yiib bala, tɩ m kõn bao n le solg m meng yãmb taoor ye." 
Job13:21 Zãag-y-m ne y sɩbgr buud fãa. Da yɛɛs-y-ma, da kẽes-y-m dabeem ye." 
Job13:22 Sɩng-y bʋʋdo, tɩ m na yãe koɛɛg n leoke; la ma me sã n gome, bɩ y leok-ma." 
Job13:23 M beega naoor a wãna? M yel-wẽna sõor yaa a wãna? Wilg-y y noor m sẽn tõdge, wilg-y m sẽn kong ne bũmb ninga." 
Job13:24 Bõe tɩ y solgd y nenga? Bõe tɩ y get-m wa y bɛyã? 
Job13:25 Y na yɛs n gũusd vãoog sobg sẽn laande, la y rigd mo-paoko?" 
Job13:26 Y na wɩɩg n kao m bʋʋda toaag-toaaga n le kẽesd sʋka beegr sẽn beeg al m yãadmẽ? 
Job13:27 Bõe tɩ yãmb n dat n sog m nao rabõanga, Bõe tɩ y baood n bãng m sẽn mand fãa, n pʋgd n dɩgsd m nao-kẽndre?" 
Job13:28 Mam vɩɩma ka besd n sʋʋgd a toore, wa yõgdr sẽn sʋgd daoogo, bɩ bugd sẽn kʋʋd fuugu bal bɩ?" 
Job14:1 Pag biig vɩɩm yaa koɛɛga, tɩ pɛt baas n wʋmd-a." 
Job14:2 Ninsaala, yaa puugu, a wekdame n wẽneg n lʋɩ, fãa loogda wa maasem, n ka yɛs n kaoosdẽ ye." 
Job14:3 La yaa bõn-yaalg a woto la y puk y nif n getẽ; maam la yãmb tar n wat bʋʋd y taoore? 
Job14:4 La ãnna n tõe n yiis neer wẽng pʋgẽ? Ned ba a ye. 
Job14:5 Yãmb zoe n sõda ninsaal daare, n yals a kiisa fãa sõore, t'a kell n sɩd ka tõe n yõsge daar ning y sẽn sõd n kõ-a ye." 
Job14:6 Bi y wẽnemd y neng n loog la y bas-a. Bas-y ninsaal t'a pemse; t'a vʋʋs wa tʋʋm-tʋmda, a vʋʋsg daare." 
Job14:7 Sã n ya tɩɩga, a tara a saagre, kɛɛgd-a lame t'a le lɛɛg n tobe, n tobd n ka yɛɛdẽ ye." 
Job14:8 A yẽgna ye n paam n kʋʋl b bokẽ; ba a sɛɛga sã n sɩng kʋɩɩbo," 
Job14:9 a sã n le paam tɩ koom madg-a, a le tara tobr bala, a le tobda vãad wa tɩ polle." 
Job14:10 Ninsaal sã n ki, a loogame. Ninsaal sã n ki a rigda yɛ?" 
Job14:11 Mogra koom wat n yõbgame, kooma wat n fẽbga kʋɩlgẽ, n le wa pid n daale." 
Job14:12 Ninsaal ka kiid n le tõog n yik a gãagẽ ye; a kõn lebg a nugu, a kõn nek a gãgẽ n tãag sa-gãongã sẽn wat n pilg n looge." 
Job14:13 Kato! M paamẽ lame tɩ y solg-m bokẽ tɩ m sor be n gũud y sũura sigbu, tɩ y wa yãk daare n le wa tẽeg m yelle." 
Job14:14 La ay! Ninsaal sã n ki ka sɛ wɛɛ? M tɛk la m tʋm m tʋʋma, tɩ ned a to wa led m zĩigẽ." 
Job14:15 Tõe tɩ y toog le wa zĩnd ne y sẽn naane, la ad-y sẽn bool-m daar ning fãa, m na n sakame." 
Job14:16 Dũnna yãmb sõta m nao-yakma, Tõe tɩ beoog bɩ y ra le gũus m beegr ye" 
Job14:17 Y tõe n baoo waooga waoog sẽn ya taoko n solg m kongrã, y na tõog n sɩd maan wa y ka yãe bũmbu?" 
Job14:18 M neeme tɩ tãng meng baasdame n sirgi, tɩ pĩig meng bilim n serg a zĩigẽ," 
Job14:19 koom meng wat n baas n pedsa kuga, tɩ sa-koom kãagd tãndo, n tuud bogdo, woto me la ninsaal wat n miki t'a sẽn gãe n tẽed bũmb ningã, a tẽeba wat n menema zãnga." 
Job14:20 Yãmb wat n koms-a lame t'a looge, y wat n menesa a neerma n dig-a n kẽes weoogo." 
Job14:21 B yõdg n pẽgd a kamba, a kõn bãng ye, b yõdg n sãbsd a kamba, a zɩ ye." 
Job14:22 A sẽn yãet toog ningã n namsd-a, a sẽn yãbd yaa a meng bala." 
Job15:1 A Elifaz, Tema raoã, goama ne a Zoob:" 
Job15:2 Gom vɩɩd ka be yẽesem ye, yẽesem soab goam ka faad wa fo rẽnna ye." 
Job15:3 Gom faad na wa ne bʋʋm? Gom pererr ka zaalem sɩda? 
Job15:4 F wat n gom n kõo Wẽnd bɛɛba bʋʋm b ka wat n le ne fo tẽeba sẽn sog bũmb ning ye. 
Job15:5 Yɛl yooda f sẽn maana n pirsd foom tɩ f gome, la lebga f gom bal n wilg tɩ f mii goama." 
Job15:6 La fo meng noorã n ningd-f taale, ka maam ye; fo zelemd bala n paagld-f bʋʋdo." 
Job15:7 Dẽ yĩnga fo la a Adem, n deng fãa n wa moog laa? Fo renga kunkubã fãa n wa dũni laa?" 
Job15:8 Fo zĩnd n kelga Wẽnd yẽsgo n tẽed tɩ foo bal la mita? 
Job15:9 Fo mii bõe tɩ tõnd zɩ? Yel-bʋg võor la fo wʋmda tɩ wẽnd yell sãamga? 
Job15:10 Ad neb kẽer n be tõnd sʋka n tar bãngre, ad neb sẽn kʋʋle n yɩɩd fo ba menga n be ka." 
Job15:11 Tõnd sẽn maasd-f sũur ne Wẽnd saglsã n ka noom-foo? Tõnd sẽn bʋk d sũuri n gomd ne fooma n ka ta f yam? 
Job15:12 Bõe tɩ fo bas f sũur tɩ fõta, bõe tɩ f kamsdẽ, tɩ d wa kẽ f tãpẽ?" 
Job15:13 Bõe tɩ f wuk ne Wẽnde, n zĩ ne sũ-toogo, bõe tɩ f goama ya pererr n ka sɛtẽ?" 
Job15:14 Ninsaal sõmblem be-la a yɛ? Pag biig tũuda yɛ n yɩ nin-tɩrga? 
Job15:15 Ne b sõsd-n-taasa menga, Wẽnnaam pʋg ka peel ye, bãmb nifẽ yĩngri dãmba meng ket n ka sõma ye." 
Job15:16 Tɩ b ka gomd ninsaal, bõn-zʋklgo la zʋg yoog soaba, sẽn dɩk wẽnem tɩ lebg a koom t'a yũuda." 
Job15:17 Kelg ka tɩ m wilg-fu. Mam dat n togs-f-la m nif sẽn yãende. 
Job15:18 M dat n togs-f-la kʋdem dãmba sẽn wilg n pa solge b sẽn wilg tɩ yaa b ba rãmb nengẽ la b zãms yã," 
Job15:19 tɩ yaa Wẽnd sẽn kõ b rãmb tẽnga pipi wã, yaa bãmb dãmb nengẽ la b paam yã, dẽ tɩ sãan ba a ye nan ka wa naag bãmb ye, yaa wakat kãng la b wʋm yã." 
Job15:20 Ade, nin-wẽng vɩɩm yaa namsg wakat buud fãa, ba Wẽnd sã n pʋlem-a-la yõ-woko," 
Job15:21 a na n wʋma kaasgo a zak pʋgẽ. A sẽn pa tẽed wakat ningã, laafi wakato la a bɛ na n yik zabre ne-a." 
Job15:22 A pa tẽed t'a na yi a likẽ wã ye, t'a zoe n nee sʋʋg sẽn luund a zugu." 
Job15:23 A saad n na n baoo rɩɩbo, la yɛ la a na n teese? A mii bũmb ning sẽn gũud-a: a kũuma raare." 
Job15:24 Rigb la yɩɩre na n yɛɛs-a lame, toog la pɛt sũu taab a zug wala dĩm sẽn kaoog a tãpo." 
Job15:25 La rẽ yaa a sẽn sak n tees Wẽnnaam nug gilgu; yaa a sẽn zẽk a zug ne Wẽnd-Pãng-Soabã. 
Job15:26 A ra sɩd fõrd n kẽed-b lame, n yet t'a boba a kut gãondo." 
Job15:27 La rẽ yaa a sẽn nobe t'a nenga pɩnd ne kaam, t'a lʋga fãa yɛdge." 
Job15:28 A tɩ yãee tẽng b sẽn wã t'a kẽ n yãmbe; a ra kẽeda ro-põaasa, sẽn besd n dʋʋgdẽ." 
Job15:29 A ka na n legb rakãagr ye, a paoong fãa sɛta bõra. A maasem kõn bui tẽng yɛs ye." 
Job15:30 A kõn zãag ne lik abada. A wẽnegda wa tɩɩga, bugum n na n kʋɩɩs a vã-miinim, tɩ sobg fãra a puudu." 
Job15:31 A ra teeg a zãmba ye t'a na n tudga a menga, tɩ zãmb n na n yao zãmbo." 
Job15:32 Dẽ fãa na n waame tɩ wakat nan ka ta ye, la a vãoog buug kõn le tob ye." 
Job15:33 Wala bugsuntungu, a kamba na n sʋʋga kãse, wala oliviye tɩɩga, a puuda na n sʋʋga zãnga." 
Job15:34 Sɩd sɩda nin-wẽng buud yaa bu-kɩɩnga, Nin-yoog zaka, bugum n dit-a zãng buga." 
Job15:35 Sẽn tʋta wẽnem pʋga, dogda yel-beed biiga. A biigã n na n lɛɛg n kʋ-a." 
Job16:1 A Zoob yeelame: 
Job16:2 Naoor a wãna la m kelg goam faad a woto. Sã n ya neb sẽn dat n maas m sũur koees la woto, sũur maagr nan ka ye." 
Job16:3 Y sẽn leok-m-la woto: «F goam faada sɛɛme?» N le paas yɛsa: «Ãnda n modg-foom tɩ f gome?» 
Job16:4 Y sã n da beẽ la m zĩigẽ tɩ mam beẽ y zĩigẽ, m me ra na gomẽ wa yãmba, la m me na tãoosẽ daoodo, m me ra na gomẽ ne tɩtaam." 
Job16:5 M me ra na gomẽ n keng y sũuri, la m goam minima na sõogẽ y sũura kaam." 
Job16:6 Mam sã n gomda, m namsga ka woogd ye, m sĩndri me, bõe n na n loog ne-a?" 
Job16:7 Marsã wã yaa n looga toogo. N-ye! M yagsa fãa wɩlg n bas-m lame. 
Job16:8 Kʋʋlma kell n bẽesa m diira ne a wãka, tɩ m faagra ya kaset sẽn naag n mongd-m bʋʋm, n mongd m bʋʋm tɩ Wẽnd bɛ bal la b zãad woto." 
Job16:9 N-ye! M bɛ wã baood-m-la ne sũ-puuri n na n tõs zɛrma, a yẽna kẽrsdame n dat n yĩ-m, m bɛ wã nin gẽend-m lame." 
Job16:10 A yaaga a noor n tees-ma, n tʋʋsd-m la a laand-m pegse, neba fãa sũu taab n na n yẽeg-ma." 
Job16:11 N-yẽe, Wẽnd n bas maam bi-yaalg nugẽ, bãmb n bas maam nin-wẽens nugẽ!" 
Job16:12 M da zĩi ne laafi tɩ b wa miim-m wa tɩɩga; n gãd m kãare n kaoog m yubla, n yals-m tɩ tãbda rãmb tar-m tãoobo." 
Job16:13 Pɛɛma tão-m lame n gilgi, b pooda m lʋga, n pa zoet m nimbãaneg ye, m yama pusgame n daag m sãoorẽ." 
Job16:14 B kõsa m yĩnga n põ yaare, b wudg n kẽe-maam wala tãb-biiga." 
Job16:15 Sũ-pa-noang fuuga ka le yeegdẽ ye, la dĩira yuga tom." 
Job16:16 M yãbame tɩ m nina fãa mooge, m nina vẽbsd n paasdame." 
Job16:17 M yaool n ka maan ned pãn-tõog ye, la m kosga ra ket n tũuda sore." 
Job16:18 Bɩ tẽnga ra yũ m zɩɩma ye, bɩ m kɛlenga sãde, n sãde." 
Job16:19 Yĩngri m tara m kaset soaba, m tara ned sẽn na n wa yals m poorẽ." 
Job16:20 M vɩɩma kaset soab la sẽn bɛɛ yĩngrã la bãmb la m tees n gomd tɩ m nintãm dʋʋgdẽ 
Job16:21 Bɩ sẽn na n sõnga maam n zab ne Wẽndã, a wa sõng-m wa Adem biig sẽn sõngd a to." 
Job16:22 La kato! A kaoosda, tɩ m yʋʋma yaool n sõd n dɩg, tɩ m zoe n dɩk ra-babs-sore." 
Job17:1 M vʋʋsma tulgame, m wĩndga lʋɩtame, m yao-tuudba zoe n wa sɩngame." 
Job17:2 Neb n zoe n wa yaand maam, b wẽnema kɩtame tɩ m bao gõeem n konge." 
Job17:3 Wẽnde, bɩ yãmb lʋɩ taoore, n yɩ m Fãagda. Ãnda n na n kẽ m tãpẽ sã n ka yãmba?" 
Job17:4 M zo-rãmba ka le mi b sẽn maand ye. Da bas-y tɩ b tẽ tɩ bãmb n maan daood ye. 
Job17:5 B ra wẽneg wa b sẽn togsd kibarẽ tɩ ned n bool a zo-rãmb n kõ-b rɩɩbo, t'a kamb yaool n gũ b rẽn n ka yãend bũmb ye." 
Job17:6 M lebga bɛɛb laado. M yʋʋr ka pʋt tɩ ned ka yɛɛs ye. 
Job17:7 Mam nina mumda ne pɛta, tɩ m yĩnga wils pãng sɛ zãnga." 
Job17:8 Nin-tɩrg yãeta woto t'a pɛleng yɩke, sũ-tɩrg soab puugda a sũur ne nin-wẽnga." 
Job17:9 Pʋ-peelem soab kell n tall a vɩɩm sõngo; la nug sẽn ka mi-a wẽng fãa kell n maan daoodo. 
Job17:10 Aya, bɩ y fãa wa tedg tɩ d gese! M kõn yãend ned sẽn mi gũusg yãmb sʋk ye." 
Job17:11 Mam wakat zoe n loogame, m sẽn da baood wa fãa-fãa wã me tũ n yɩkame." 
Job17:12 B yeetame tɩ yʋng la wĩntoogo, wĩndg sã n wa lʋɩtẽ b gomdame tɩ sõor n pukdi." 
Job17:13 Bõe la m ket n zĩ n saagdẽ? Bʋg-tẽng la m zĩiga. Yaa likẽ la m tʋɩ m gãaga. 
Job17:14 M boonda yaooga tɩ m ba n boond mogda tɩ m ma bɩ m tão. 
Job17:15 M sẽn da gãe n saagdẽ wã kẽe yɛ? Ãnda nif n le ne-a? 
Job17:16 A na n lisa bug-tẽnga, al tẽngr tẽngre. Yaa tom-pʋlempʋkẽ la d fãa na n lagem n gãande." 
Job18:1 A Bildad, Suwa daoa, deega goama n yeele:" 
Job18:2 Yãmb na n yaa n sĩnda da-bʋre? Yaas-y n tags-y. Dẽ poore tõnd n na n gome. 
Job18:3 Bõe tɩ d na n bas tɩ b bool-d tɩ neb sẽn ka yam? Bõe tɩ f mams tõndo, Zoob, wa neb sẽn ka tõe n wʋm bũmb võore?" 
Job18:4 Fo sũurã sẽn fõog la fudugd woto wã, fo ratame tɩ nin-yend yĩnga, bɩ tẽnga fãa wa lebg zĩ-peen-daaga, tɩ pĩisa bilim n teem zĩis laa?" 
Job18:5 Nin-wẽng vẽenem sobdame, a bug-toaalga ka tog n le wid ye." 
Job18:6 A roog lebgda lika, a fitila sẽn da wit a zugẽ wã kiida tama." 
Job18:7 A da kẽndame t'a nao kida limsd taaba, marsã a kẽnd n lamsdame." 
Job18:8 Bẽdgo n koomd a nao, la yaa bẽdga wĩ wã la a tabd n kẽnda." 
Job18:9 Bẽdga na n gaaga a nao-kãsen-kãarã, wĩira na n loe-a-la ra-long-sore." 
Job18:10 Wĩir n maneg n gãneg tẽnga n maneg n solg bokẽ, a sora zugu." 
Job18:11 Pɛlen-yɩk n tar-a, n pʋgd-a a sẽn dabd zĩig ning fãa." 
Job18:12 Yẽ sẽn da ket n wɩɩd ne pãnga, ad kom sẽn gãneg-a tẽnga tɩ nimbãaneg lebg a pak-n-taaga," 
Job18:13 a na kɩt t'a lelem a yĩn-gãongo. La tẽn-kũum sẽn ya toaaga n yɩɩd a taaba, n wat n vel-a." 
Job18:14 B na n yiisa nin-wẽng a roog maasmẽ n vuu-a, n tɩ kɩs a yɛɛsgo naaba." 
Job18:15 A le ka so a roog ye, tɩ neb na n deeg n kẽ, b na n dɩka kidibri n yugl a vẽenema gilli." 
Job18:16 Tɩɩga na n kʋɩ-la a yẽgnẽ t'a wil be yĩngri n kaoodẽ. 
Job18:17 Tẽnga fãa gilli yĩma a yelle, t'a yʋʋr kell n menem zãnga." 
Job18:18 B yiis-a-la vẽenemẽ n tɩ lob likẽ, b yiis-a-la zamaana rãmb sʋka." 
Job18:19 Yẽ n ka roagda, yẽ n ka yagenga nin-vɩɩg ka kell a zakẽ ye." 
Job18:20 A baasga wẽnema yɩka nin-taoor dãmb pɛlenga, n yaand yaang rãmb sũuri, tɩ b gomda:" 
Job18:21 «Sẽn kees a ka-zoet-Wẽnd-nif zakẽ la woto, zak ning sẽn ka mi Wẽnda sẽn lebg la boto!»" 
Job19:1 A Zoob le reega goama n yeele: 
Job19:2 Da-bʋre la yãmb na n yaa n bas m namsgo la y bas-m taal ningri ne y goama? 
Job19:3 Yãmb sẽn tʋʋs maam woto ka be sõor ye, y sẽn tar maam n yaanẽ wã yãnd ka tar yã?" 
Job19:4 Ba sã n ya sɩd tɩ m tudgame, m tudugra pakẽ la maam bala." 
Job19:5 Y sã n dat n lʋɩɩs y mens taoore la y lebs m poorẽ, y sã n zabd-m bũmb sẽn ningd m yãnd poorẽ," 
Job19:6 bãng-y tɩ yaa Wẽnd n maan-m pãnga, Wẽnd n tilg-m ne b zulunga." 
Job19:7 M sã n kelem tɩ yaa pãn-tõog la Wẽnd maan-ma, kɩɩsd ka ye. M bool bʋʋd me, bʋ-kaood ka ye." 
Job19:8 B gɩdga m sor tɩ m da loog ye, lik la b kẽes m soy wã zutu." 
Job19:9 B wobga m ziira fãa, n fõk m naam pugl n bas-ma." 
Job19:10 B sãama m yell zĩig fãa n bas-m ne kũum bala; b võoga m saagre wala tɩɩga. 
Job19:11 B sũurã puuga ne maam tɩ b get maam wala b bɛyã. 
Job19:12 B tãb-biisã sũu taab n wa, b tuka b sore n tãag maam n gũbg m zaka n sege." 
Job19:13 Wẽnd zãaga m saam-biisa ne maam, tɩ m sõsd-n-taasã gind-m wa sãana." 
Job19:14 M yags ne m tũud-n-taas wɩlgame, m gãa-soaben-dãmb yĩma m yelle." 
Job19:15 Mam lebga sãana m zak neb la m kom-pugli taoore, n legb ned b sẽn zɩ n yãende." 
Job19:16 M boola m dakõore, la a ka sak ye, la m meng m toor n yaool n yet t'a wa." 
Job19:17 M noora vʋʋsma yaanda m paga sũuri, m lebga waoosa m kamb yĩnga." 
Job19:18 Kom-bõonesa meng pursda maam, mam sã n yɛsẽ b tara m wɩdga." 
Job19:19 M zĩnd-n-taasa fãa lebga beem ne maam, ba m zo-rãmba wẽneg n kis-m lame." 
Job19:20 M kõaba yii n dʋra yɩnga, m no-gãonga vɛɛgame n bas m yẽna yɩnga." 
Job19:21 M zo-rãmba, kũm-y-ma, zoe-y m nimbãanega, tɩ yaa Wẽnd nug n maan-m woto." 
Job19:22 Bõe yĩnga la y na n togs Wẽnd n zab ne maam? M yĩnga la y rɩt n pa tɩgd bɩ bõe? 
Job19:23 M sẽn nongẽ yaa b gʋlsẽ m goama n gʋls-b ne kɩtga kugr zugu! 
Job19:24 N gʋls-b pĩig zugu n lɛɛg n gãneg namdo, tɩ ra yẽes lɛlɛ." 
Job19:25 Mam miime tɩ m fãagda vɩ ne yõore, b na n tik n yika tẽn-peelma zug, yaoolem daarã." 
Job19:26 M yĩn-gãongã sã n wa tõose yaa ne m nin la m na n ges Wẽnde. 
Job19:27 Yaa maam n na n tall b nenga gesgo, mam menga! M nif sẽn na n teeg a soabã kõn yɩ sãan m yĩng ye; la m sũura tʋll-b-la wa fãa-fãa." 
Job19:28 Y sã n yeele: «Namsg bʋg la d na n namsa t'a gom tɩ d paam n kẽes-a bʋʋdo?» 
Job19:29 Wakat kãng bɩ y mens maan sʋʋga rabeem, tɩ Wẽnd sɩbgda beem kʋdg ne sʋʋga, la rẽ me n wilgd-y tɩ Wẽnd bʋʋd na n kaoome." 
Job20:1 A Sofar, Naama daoa, n deeg gomdã n yeele:" 
Job20:2 M tagsame la m dat n leok-f lame, m yãgdame n na n yiis m sẽn mi." 
Job20:3 Gomd la m wʋm yã, sẽn yɩ m tʋʋre, la ad-m yama sẽn kõt-m tɩ m leoke." 
Job20:4 Fo zɩ tɩ al zamaan woko, Wẽnd sẽn ning ninsaal tẽng zug tɛka," 
Job20:5 fo zɩ tɩ nin-wẽng zu-noog kõn yɩ woko? Nin-wẽng sũ-noog ka longd daar ye. 
Job20:6 Ba a zuga woglem tõkd saaga, ba a zug sɩɩsd sa-gãongã," 
Job20:7 a na menema wa rẽgdo, b kõn le bao a zĩig ye, tɩ sẽn da mi-a sokdẽ: «A kẽe yɛ?»" 
Job20:8 A menemda wala zãmsdo, ãnd n na n le yãend-a? A sẽn yɩ pɩʋla, tɛk la tɛka." 
Job20:9 Nif sẽn minem a yãeebo kõn le yãend-a ye, a zaka meng ka mi a sẽn tɩ solgẽ ye." 
Job20:10 Na yɩ modgr ne a kamba tɩ b lek naong rãmb sãoogo, a meng nus n na n vaag n kõ a taaba." 
Job20:11 Ba a yĩnga kõabã nan ket n kegmẽ, n ket n kegmẽ wala bi-bɩɩg rẽnna, fãa naagdame n bus tomẽ." 
Job20:12 Wẽng da yaa wa sɩɩd a noorẽ, dẽ la a ra wukda a kokoɛ" 
Job20:13 n mogsd a noosma, n ka tol n vʋʋsdẽ ye," 
Job20:14 mik a rɩɩba na n põoga a pʋgẽ, n lebg wag-toaag zẽnem." 
Job20:15 Lebga modgr tɩ laoga sẽn da wʋk n sama, yiis n pʋɩ. Wẽnd na kɩtame t'a wʋk-a." 
Job20:16 Yaa põeer zẽnem la a ra mogsd n venda, põeerã noor n na n lɛɛg n kʋ-a." 
Job20:17 A nif kõn le yãend kʋɩlsa ye, a kõn le yãend a kʋɩlsa sẽn fõt ne sɩɩd la bĩisim ye." 
Job20:18 A sẽn paam n ka tõe vel la a wʋkda, a sẽn leeb n paama fãa, a kõn dɩ b yõod ye." 
Job20:19 A sẽn wẽg naong rãmba la a pa ges b yellã, a sẽn zãgs meebo n zuud dot n kẽedẽ wã," 
Job20:20 a pʋga sẽn sak yão-beed yĩnga, a laog ba a ye kõn põs ye." 
Job20:21 Bũmb ba a ye sẽn da ka põsd a velma a sũ-nooga kõn kaoos ye, t'a meng n vel fãa vugri." 
Job20:22 Tɩgr wẽnde, kom na n kẽe a zaka, nimbãan-neba nus na n naaga taab n kud-a." 
Job20:23 A sẽn ket n baood n na n pids a pʋga wakato, la Wẽnd sũura na n fudg ne-a. Sũura sẽn fudg n daagã n na n wẽneg n waag-a." 
Job20:24 Yaa kut zab-teoog la a zoet n na n põse, yaa zũud tãp n na n lub-a." 
Job20:25 A takda pĩima n feoog a lʋgrẽ, la pĩima sẽn yi sãoorẽ wã lebga waood la rigbu." 
Job20:26 Lik na n yãmba a rooga pẽgs zãnga, Bugum n dɩt-a t'a yaool n ka ne a tugund ye; sẽn pa a rooga pʋg fãa lebga bõne." 
Job20:27 Yĩngr dãmba puka a beegrã, tɩ tẽng zug rãmb yik ne-a." 
Job20:28 A rooga sẽn da pid ne paoong ninga fãa loogame, wala koom sẽn fãood ne pãnga n tees a teesgo." 
Job20:29 Ade, Wẽnd donda nin-wẽng fãa woto, woto la pʋɩɩr a sẽn paamd Wẽnd nengẽ." 
Job21:1 A Zoob gomame n yeele: 
Job21:2 Kelg yã, kelg-y mam goama, sak-y woto tɩ y na maas m sũuri." 
Job21:3 Yaas-y tɩ m togs y koɛɛg a yembr bala, m sã n gom n sɛ, y na yaool n yaal-ma." 
Job21:4 M sẽn zabdã, yaa ne ned bɩ? Dẽ yĩnga, bõe la m na n maan yãgbo?" 
Job21:5 Wẽnemd-y n ges-ma, y pɛleng na yɩke, la y na mobg y noore." 
Job21:6 Mam menga sã n mi n tagse, m yɛɛsdame, m yĩnga fãa rigdame." 
Job21:7 Bõe yĩng tɩ nin-wẽnsã ket n vɩ ne yõore? Yaa waa b sã n kʋʋnẽ la b pãnga paasda. 
Job21:8 Bãmb yagensa paamda pãng b nifẽ, b kamb sõor paasdame tɩ b zĩi n sõta." 
Job21:9 Bãmb zags gãee ne laafi tɩ rabeem ka ye, Naaba-Wẽnd sãbsga gind-b lame." 
Job21:10 B lols tara rogem pãnga tɩ b nag-yãans rogd wa bʋʋse. 
Job21:11 B basda b kom-bõonese tɩ b zoet n kɩdemd wa pe-bi, tɩ b kamb yɩgd n tiisd n saood b saooga." 
Job21:12 B wẽeda gãngãado la b kʋnde, n peebd b wɩɩse, n kɩdemd sũ-noogo." 
Job21:13 Bãmb daar loogdame tɩ b ket n zĩ ne sũ-noogo, la b na n wa siga bʋg-tẽnga ne laafi." 
Job21:14 Bãmb n yaool n da yeel Wẽnde: «Zãag-y ne tõndo! Y soya tũudem ka noom tõnd ye. 
Job21:15 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba yaa ãnda tɩ tõnd na n wõgemd b taoore, d pʋʋsd-b lame n dok yõod bʋgo?»" 
Job21:16 Gese, ne b sẽn basd Wẽnd kɛɛngã, b sũur baas n pida ne sũ-noogo." 
Job21:17 Ka naoor wʋsg la nin-wẽensa fitil kiida tɩ yel-beed lʋɩt b zugu, tɩ Wẽnd sũur puugd ne b ye." 
Job21:18 Bãng-y tɩ kãab wẽng n be b zugu: «B yɩ wa moogo sobg sẽn dɩkde, la ka-fɩɩb sɩlmand sẽn tʋke!»" 
Job21:19 B maana yelbũndi tɩ biig reegda a ba sɩbgre. La ba wã sã n deegdẽ a rẽnd ka são? 
Job21:20 B kɩt t'a yãend a meng wãabo, t'a lemb Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba sũ-puur dãam!" 
Job21:21 A raara sã n wa ta t'a looge, a toog be ne a yira sẽn na n yõdg n lebg a soaba?" 
Job21:22 Ãnda n tar yam n na n peng Wẽnde, n na n peng sẽn daaga zɩɩm fãa bʋ-kaooda?" 
Job21:23 Yõa soab loogda a bi-bɩɩlemẽ, ne sũ-noog la laafi," 
Job21:24 t'a lʋg zɩs ne kaam, t'a kõab pid ne sɩɩlem." 
Job21:25 Kũum wa n mika yõa soab ne sũ-toogo, a waa n mika ned sẽn zɩ n lemb sũ-noogo." 
Job21:26 Bãmb b yiib fãa naaga taab tomẽ, la b mogda sẽn dɩt-ba zem taaba ne toolem." 
Job21:27 Ade, mam mii yãmb sũur tagsgo, m mii y sẽn bilgd m poorẽ." 
Job21:28 Y sokda woto: «Dakãagra yir lebga wãna? Fãadba sẽn da nok roog ninga bɛɛ?» 
Job21:29 Sok-y so-toagdbã, wʋm-y b goama võore!" 
Job21:30 Tẽn-kũum daare nin-wẽng põsdame, Wẽnd sũ-fõora raare, b baooda zĩig n solg-a." 
Job21:31 Ãn n na n sak n wilg-a a kongre, ãnd n lebsd-a a tʋʋm kɛga yaoodo?" 
Job21:32 B yãagd-a-la yaadẽ, b gũuda a yaoogo t'a ra sirg ye." 
Job21:33 Tẽnga na n maaga a yĩnga, neba fãa n na n yãag-a a gãagẽ, la yãagdba sak n yii wʋsgo. B ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye." 
Job21:34 Woto wã, f leokra maanda wãn n maag sũuri? Y goama pʋs n wʋga ne bõe sã n ka zirẽ-beedo?" 
Job22:1 A Elifaz, Tema daoa, n wa ne a leokre:" 
Job22:2 M sok n gese sẽn pida ne raooda sõngda Wẽnd wãn wãna? Ninsaal bãngr zulunga nafda ãnda sã n ka a meng bala. 
Job22:3 Pãng soab a Wẽnd toog bee ne fo sõmblema? Bõe la f paasd Wẽnd ne f zʋga tekre? 
Job22:4 B yɛɛsda-foom n na n gom n yiis b meng yellẽ bɩ? Foo n na n lebg b bʋʋd-n-taag bɩ? 
Job22:5 Sã n ya sɩda, f tʋʋm dẽgda labsa. F yɛl kɛga ka tar tɛk ye." 
Job22:6 Fo ra reesda boabla f saam-biisa nengẽ, fo reesa b fut n bas-b tɩ b kẽnd bɩlma." 
Job22:7 Ko-yũud sẽn tar a soaba kõn paam koom f nengẽ ye, kom sẽn tar b rãmba, fo mongd-b-la rɩɩbo." 
Job22:8 Fo sẽn tar pãngã, fo n da so tẽngã, Wẽnd sẽn maan-f zu-noogo, f reega tẽngã n yãmbe." 
Job22:9 Pʋg-kõapa waa fo bõsgo tɩ fo kʋls-b zaalem, la kɩɩb-bi wã nus yɛɛ ne f tʋʋma." 
Job22:10 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la b karg bẽdgo n gilgi-fu, tɩ f mi n yik n tar digbu." 
Job22:11 Wakat ninga yaa lika, tɩ fo ka le neẽ ye, wakat ninga yaa ko-kẽeng n loogd ne-fo." 
Job22:12 Ade, Zoob, yaa woto la f tagsda: Wẽnd ka tʋg n be al sagãnẽ wã bɩ? Ges ãdsa zĩiga sẽn zãr ne tõndo." 
Job22:13 Bãmb sẽn tɩ be yĩngrã la f yeel yã: «Wẽnd mii bõe, b nif tõe n yãe sẽn be sawad-sablga poor sɩda?" 
Job22:14 Bala sawatã tagma wʋsgo n lut b nini. Yaa saaga sẽn karg n gilga bal la b ne.» 
Job22:15 Fo rat n tũu kʋdem-wẽnnẽ sorã, sor ninga nin-wẽng fãa sẽn da tũuda laa?" 
Job22:16 Bãng tɩ b looga ne-ba tɩ b daar nan pa ta ye, b ra zaoolga b meng ko-zoetem zugu." 
Job22:17 Bãmb sɩd da gomda ne Wẽnd woto: «Zãag y ne tõndo.» B goma woto n tẽed tɩ Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba ka tõe n maan-b bũmb ye. 
Job22:18 Maam, a Elifaz ka tõe n sak bada tɩ nin-wẽnsa gom wa b sẽn gomda ye, tɩ Wẽnd n da yaool n pids nin-wẽnsa zagsã ne sũ-noogo, B yik n zãag ne b zirẽ-be-goama!" 
Job22:19 Nin-tɩrsã na n kɩdma sũ-noogo b lʋɩɩsa yĩnga. Pʋ-peelem soab na n laa bãmb n yetẽ: 
Job22:20 «D bɛɛba konga pãnga bugum n dɩ b paoongã tẽma!» 
Job22:21 Maneg f yell ne Wẽnde, tɩ sɛ, woto f sũur na le yɩ noogo." 
Job22:22 Kok b zãmsga sẽn yit b noorẽ, deeg b koees n ning f sũurẽ." 
Job22:23 Fo sã n lɛɛg n le kẽ Naaba-Wẽnde, la f kɩt tɩ zãmb buud fãa zãag ne f zaka, na zemse." 
Job22:24 Tɩ lob f sãnem gila tomẽ, lob Ofir sãnem gila kʋɩlga koomẽ." 
Job22:25 Naaba-Wẽnd na lebg sãnem neere fo yĩnga, n lebg wanzurf baoor fo yĩnga." 
Job22:26 Dẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd na n pids-f ne sũ-noogo. Dẽ me la f na n doog f nenga n ges Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba. 
Job22:27 F sã n bõs-ba, b na reeg f kosgo, tɩ fo me tũ rẽ n pids f pʋlengo." 
Job22:28 Fo sẽn sed fãa na baas neere, la f sor na yɩ vẽenega f taoore." 
Job22:29 Neb kẽer sã n bas raoodo, f na tõog n yeel-ba: «Yik-y!»" 
Job22:30 Bãmb n doogd neng fãa sẽn sũuri. Ba yell sẽn be b rãmb zuga na n paama fãagre. B nug sẽn pa rat sɩbgrã n na n wa ne tɩlgre. 
Job23:1 A Zoob gomame n yeele: 
Job23:2 M modgame n na n sɛɛs m yãbrã mik m yãngd-a lame n paasdẽ. 
Job23:3 M sã n da miẽ Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn beẽ wã m na maanẽ m sẽn na n maanega n paam n ta b zaoorẽ wã. 
Job23:4 Bãmb taoore m na togsẽ m koɛɛga, m noora na bãng a sẽn na n togsẽ." 
Job23:5 M na bãng b sẽn na gomẽ n leok-ma, la m na wʋmẽ b goama võore." 
Job23:6 B leoba na yɩẽ zabr sɩda? Ayo! B maagdẽ la b meng n kelg-ma. 
Job23:7 B na mikẽ tɩ b bʋʋd-n-taaga yaa nin-tɩrg menga, m na gomẽ n yiis m meng yellẽ." 
Job23:8 Bʋko! M ka mi b sẽn beẽ ye. Yaanga, b ka beelẽ ye. Nin-taoore, m ka yãet-b be ye." 
Job23:9 B tʋmda b tʋʋma nug goabga, m ka ne-b be ye, B solga b meng nug rɩtgo, dẽ la zãng zãnga." 
Job23:10 Wẽnd yẽ yaool n mii sor ning m sẽn dɩke, b sã n los maam b boaagẽ, m na yi yɩlgemde wa sãnem." 
Job23:11 Mam zẽka m naoore n sagl bãmb dẽnnẽ, m tũu bãmb sorã n ka bʋdg moog ye," 
Job23:12 m deega b noore la m pa salg n lʋɩ ye. M lebsa m meng poorẽ n tũ bãmb raabã. 
Job23:13 La bãmb sẽn pa gird n le gõmsã, ãnda n na n lek-ba? B yamleoog la b tũuda." 
Job23:14 Bʋʋda b sẽn bʋ wã n yɛse, m dẽnna wala m taaba bʋʋd ka teemd ye." 
Job23:15 Dẽ n kɩt tɩ mam yɛɛsd bãmb taoore, m sã n tags fãa b rabeem kẽed-m lame." 
Job23:16 M raooda booga Wẽnd taoore, Pãng-Soaba yaool n maana m sẽn da pa tẽede" 
Job23:17 tɩ b ka põsg-m me ne lika sẽn wat me, b pa menes-ma tɩ lik nan ka yãmb zĩig ye." 
Job24:1 Bõe tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ka kees daar n bĩngi, yɛla sẽn na n puk nin-sõma nifẽ daare?" 
Job24:2 Nin-sõma wã toaag kuga la nin-wẽnsa wat n teeme, wagdem dũms la kẽer deegd n teesd yamd zĩiga," 
Job24:3 tɩ kẽer loogd ne kɩɩb-bil bõanga, tɩ pʋg-kõor naaf tat n tɩ kɩt bobelle." 
Job24:4 Koms rãmba rigdame n yiis sorẽ, lebga tẽnga nimbãan-dãmba zoe n soond zãnga." 
Job24:5 B lebga wa burguma sẽn be we-raoogẽ, tɩ b sãt beoog n sɩng rɩɩb gẽesgo, yaa pʋ-weesã n na n dɩlg b kamba." 
Job24:6 A ka-neng-rãmb n na tɩ wʋr rũmsa yamdo, pʋtẽ, bãmb n na n tõs nin-wẽnsa bugsuntundu," 
Job24:7 la yʋngo b gãe bɩlgemde tɩ b ka tar fuug ye, yaa waoodo, la b pa tar fu-goabg ye." 
Job24:8 Tãmsa zut sa-mina-mina yʋgemda b fut, la rot ka ye, tɩ b kong n kẽed pĩis bogdẽ." 
Job24:9 Kɩɩb bila tõsgda a ma bĩisrẽ, naong soab bobenda a fu-goabga tɩ b yaool n sak n peng-a bũmbu." 
Job24:10 B kɩtdame t'a kẽnd a bɩlgemd waare, b zɩlgd-a-la ka-gĩna t'a yaool n kẽnd ne pʋ-vɩʋʋgo," 
Job24:11 b tãngd-a-la ne oliviye biis sĩm-bila t'a wõt b kaam, ka rẽ bɩ a yɛs rã-rʋgd sʋka tɩ ko-yũud kʋʋd-a." 
Job24:12 Tẽnga pʋgẽ b wʋmda yãbre, sẽn pogl b rãmba kũsga sãtame, la Wẽnnaam ka kũmd b nimbãaneg ye." 
Job24:13 Sẽn maand-b wẽnga kisa vẽenem, vẽenem sor ka bãmb sor ye, b pa tagd be ye." 
Job24:14 Zĩig sobg yã, tɩ nin-kʋʋd yiki, n na n kʋ naong soaba la nimbãan-neda, yʋng taame t'a na n tʋm wagdem tʋʋma." 
Job24:15 Ra-taag me teega zĩ-sobdo, la a gomda a yamẽ: «Ned kõn yãend-m ye.» A takda peende n pil a nenga." 
Job24:16 Yaa likẽ la wagdr pood roto. Wĩntoogo a ka yit a roogẽ ye, a ka mi meng tɩ sõor yẽegame ye." 
Job24:17 Bãmb fãa gill yamẽ wã, sõora la yel-beedo, sẽn ta b yam yaa yʋngã la tʋʋm-beedã b sẽn tʋmna." 
Job24:18 Yãmb yetame: «Tao tao tɩ koom peega nin-wẽnsã n looge, tɩ b tẽng lebg ka bark tẽnga. Ned kõn le yi t'a rabda a bugsuntungẽ ye." 
Job24:19 Wala wĩndg sẽn boog waooda tẽnsẽ kooma, koom sẽn gũs wa ka-neema, yaa woto la nin-wẽnsa na n boog tɩ bʋg-tẽng yaag a noor vel-ba." 
Job24:20 B ma na yĩm b yelle la b na lebg mogd dɩ-noogo. Ned kõn le tẽeg b yell ye. Yaa wa b tiig n kʋʋsa tɩ-wẽnga wila. 
Job24:21 Nim bãmba yikd n namsa paga, a sẽn ka rogd yĩnga, tɩ bãmba rãmb ka kũmd pʋg-kõor ye." 
Job24:22 La ade, Wẽnd pãnga tõe n looga ne pãn-dãmba, b yikda ne bãmba tɩ b wẽneg n menem moogo." 
Job24:23 Wẽnd mi n bas-b lame tɩ b tẽed tɩ bũmb kõn tol n maan-b ye. Mik b nif ket n geta b sẽn tʋmde. 
Job24:24 Wat n yaa wala b na n le rooga b nenga, mik nenga na n le sulga wala puug sẽn zelgde, n wãk wala ka-zug sʋʋg sẽn kẽbge.»" 
Job24:25 Ad-y m sẽn togsã n ya sɩda n yɩɩd y rẽnna. Da le bool-y-m tɩ pʋ-yags ye! Ãnda n na n tõog n lub-m ne a goama? 
Job25:1 Suwa daoa, a Bildad, reega goama n yeele:" 
Job25:2 Sẽn kõta yĩngr dãmb laafi wã, yaa dĩm sẽn kẽesd rabeem." 
Job25:3 Wẽnd tãb-biisa sõor ka tɛk ye, b wĩndga vẽenema paoogda ãnd dãmba?" 
Job25:4 Adem biig yɩta a wãn n bʋ ne Wẽnde n paam bʋʋm tɩ Wẽnd konge? Pag-biig maanda a wãna n kẽes a meng pʋ-peen-neba sʋka? 
Job25:5 Bãmb nifẽ kiuug peelem yaa zaalem, b geta ãds wa rẽgd bala." 
Job25:6 Wala bõe marsã la b na n ges ninsaala? Adem biig ka zũnzũur bala? 
Job26:1 A Zoob n gome n yeele: 
Job26:2 Yaa ninsaal la f rat n sõng bɩ? F rat n sõnga ned sẽn ka tar yõnofre bɩ? 
Job26:3 Ad foo n mi ninsaal, a ka yam, saglgo, ad foo n mi bãngr pʋdgre!" 
Job26:4 La fo goama gomda ne ãnd dãmba, yɛ la f paam bãngrã sẽn yit f noorẽ wã? Yeel tɩ yaa Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba nengẽ." 
Job26:5 Ad yaa bog-zulunga pʋga, bok sẽn zulme n yɩɩd mogre, n yɩɩd mogra sẽn bĩng a pʋgẽ teeda zĩig ningã, ad yaa be la kɩɩmsa gãe n digd." 
Job26:6 Bũmb ka lud bʋg-tẽnga t'a yɛdg n dɩg Wẽnd taoore, la a noora me ka lud bũmb, bãmb nifẽ ye." 
Job26:7 Yaa Wẽnd n yɛdg, vɩʋʋgẽ, yĩngr saasã, bãmb zãnegẽ la b sagl tẽnga tɩ yẽ me luund vɩʋʋgẽ." 
Job26:8 Bãmb n tigsd kooma sawatẽ, t'a be be n ka niid yaar ye." 
Job26:9 B yɛdga sawadgo n lud kiuuga tɩ b pa tõe n yãend-a ye. 
Job26:10 Vẽenema la lika toaagẽ la b ning kooma koaka. 
Job26:11 Bũmb niyns sẽn zãad saaga miimdame, Wẽnd sã n tãse b rigdame." 
Job26:12 Wẽnd pãnga sigsa mogrã rãamde, b yama sɛɛsa ko-wiiga pãnga." 
Job26:13 B nor pemsem fʋʋsa saagã n pɩɩs-a. B tẽega b rɩtg kanga n kõs rũm-bãnde, a Leviatã." 
Job26:14 D mii vẽenega tɩ d bãngr paooda, yaa b tʋʋma sẽn lʋɩ d nifẽ bilf bal la woto, b pãn-tʋʋma marsã, ãnna n tõe n bilg-ba a yamẽ?" 
Job27:1 A Zoob kell n yõka goama n yeele: 
Job27:2 Ne Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn mong maam bʋʋma, ne Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba b sẽn kɩte tɩ m vɩɩma lebg miisg tag-tagã," 
Job27:3 mam sã n ket n vʋʋsd ne yõore, Wẽnd vʋʋsem sã n ket n kẽed m yõ-bogdẽ," 
Job27:4 m wẽend tɩ m noor kõn togs sẽn tõe tudg m to ye, tɩ zirẽ-beed kõn yɩ m gomd ye." 
Job27:5 Bɩ yell pak-ma, m sã n ka pids m sẽn kãabã! Al n wa tãag m kũum, m na kell n tall m pʋ-peelem." 
Job27:6 M gãda m pʋ-peelma la m kõn bas-a abada, m sẽn ges m vɩɩma, yãnd ka tar-m ye." 
Job27:7 Bɩ m bɛyã deeg nin-wẽns dolbo, tɩ m zabd-n-taaga ra põs kʋʋdba sɩbgr ye." 
Job27:8 Yãmb meng n gomd woto: «Toog-sẽn-ka be-a-ne-Wẽnda soab saagda bõe, Wẽnd sã n deeg a vɩɩm?" 
Job27:9 B na n wʋma a kɛlengã yel-beeda sã n wa tiig n lʋɩ a zugu bɩ? 
Job27:10 Maan zood ne Wẽnda sã n da yɩẽ la noogo ne-a, a na yõkẽ b sɛɛg wakat buud fãa.»" 
Job27:11 M wilg-y lame n puk Wẽnd tõogã, sẽn be Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba sũurẽ, m ka na n solg-y bũmb ye." 
Job27:12 Wala yãmb meng sẽn ne wã, m zo-rãmba, bõe tɩ y goama fãa ya gom faado?" 
Job27:13 Ad Wẽnd sẽn segl nin-wẽng yĩnga, ad pʋɩɩr ning a sẽn deegd Pãng Soaba nengẽ:" 
Job27:14 «A kamb sõor sẽn ya a soab fãa, sʋʋg n kʋʋd-ba, a yagens na n konga rɩɩbo." 
Job27:15 Sẽn põs-b kom la sʋʋga, bã-longdem n loogd ne-ba, la a pʋg-kõap kõn yãb-a ye." 
Job27:16 A samd wanzurf wa bĩisri, n samd futa wa yagd sẽn samd a yagdo," 
Job27:17 yaa nin-sõng n wat yeelg futã. Sã n ya wanzurfã, sẽn ka mi a zãmbo n soogd-a." 
Job27:18 A roogã, yaa nadga la a me n kõ a menga, yaa pʋʋg roog la a tɩ n kõ a menga. Ka tar pãng ye." 
Job27:19 A kẽeda a gãagẽ ne ligdi la a kõn yik a gãagẽ ye. A puk a nini a kõn yãend fɩ. 
Job27:20 Rabeem la yɛɛsgo n fãood-a wa kʋɩlg ko-ralem. Yʋng a ye, sɩlmande n loogd ne-a." 
Job27:21 Yaang sob-tʋʋlga n zẽkd-a n looge, yaang sobg n võogd-a a zĩigẽ." 
Job27:22 Yẽ bal la ned kam fãa kʋɩɩs a sũur n tãoodẽ, t'a baood n na n põs tãoodba pɛɛm." 
Job27:23 A bɛɛba kɩdemda a lʋɩɩse, a zaka rãmb meng n lɛɛg n kis-a lame.»" 
Job28:1 Zĩis ka kongd sẽn na n tu bogdo n vaag wanzurf ye, sãnem yɩlgr zĩis ka baood n ka yãend ye." 
Job28:2 Kut tuuda tãngẽ n vaage, zũud yẽnegda kuga n sɩlge." 
Job28:3 B widigda bugum n gaas tẽngã n zulgi, n ta zĩ-likẽ n buk kug sabla." 
Job28:4 B zãagda neba sẽn kẽedẽ wã n wedg bogdo, zĩig ninga so-loaadba sẽn ka tatẽ wã, la boka pʋg la neb lengd wĩ zutu." 
Job28:5 Tẽnga sẽn dɩlgd ninsaalã la bugum dɩ n sãam fãa. 
Job28:6 Yaa kuga pʋg la b yiisd kug neeba, kẽeg yom, yaa bãmb zomẽ la b yãet sãnem." 
Job28:7 Sɩlsa ka yãend so-kãens n dɩk ye, wɩbsa nif pa seg-b ye." 
Job28:8 We-rũng naoor nan ka tab-b ye, bõnyẽeg zɩ n pɩʋʋg be ye." 
Job28:9 Ninsaal zaba ne pĩ-kegemde. Ninsaal wura tãmse n tãag b seese. 
Job28:10 B weeda pĩisi, n tuk soy, bɛd la bõonego la sẽn be yõod fãa ninsaal nif yãend-a lame." 
Job28:11 B kʋɩɩsda kʋɩls ko-nini, n yiisd sẽn da solg wĩndga." 
Job28:12 La m na sok n gese, bãngr pidung yãeta yɛ? Yam sẽn pid yam zak tii yɛɛlẽ?" 
Job28:13 Ninsaal ka mi a yõod saagr ye, a ka be nin-vɩɩs sʋk ye." 
Job28:14 Bʋg-tẽng yetame: «A ka be m nengẽ ye.» Tɩ mogr me yeele: «A ka be m pʋgẽ ye.» 
Job28:15 A ka tõe n tek ne sãnem gilgu ye. Ka magd wanzurfu n da-a ye. 
Job28:16 Ofir sãnem ka tõe n dɩk n mak-a ye, tɩ b pa gomd kug neeba buud toɛ-toɛ ye." 
Job28:17 A yõod ka tek sãnem la nin-gɛtg rẽnd ye, a pa tek sãnem laok sẽn tekẽ ye," 
Job28:18 tɩ b pa gomd kug-neeb la bõn-neeb a taab ye. Yam pidung baoob n são miuzãan neeba. 
Job28:19 Nubi kug moam neeba yaa zaalem, sãnem yõod yaa bilf a taoore." 
Job28:20 La m sok n gese bãngr pidung yita yɛ? Yam sẽn pid yam yãeta yɛ? 
Job28:21 Nin-vɩɩg nif pa segd-a ye, yĩngr luiili pa yãet-a ye." 
Job28:22 Bʋg-tenga, kɩɩmkulgu rãmba yetame: «A kibar bal n lʋɩ d tʋbrẽ.»" 
Job28:23 Wẽnnaam b yembre bala n bãng a sore, la a menga sẽn beẽ." 
Job28:24 Yɩɩ wakat ninga b sẽn sulg n ges dũni wã zãnga, n ges bũmb ning fãa sẽn be saaga tẽngre," 
Job28:25 n na n sigs sobda pãnga, la b yãk toaag n kõ kooma." 
Job28:26 Yɩɩ wakat ning b sẽn wilg saagã a niib sasa la b tuk sor n kõ sawadga ne a bʋ-raasã. 
Job28:27 Yɩɩ wakat kãng la b yãend yã la b pẽg yam pidungu, wakat kãng la a bas tɩ b yãenda a sẽn tõe bũmb ninga." 
Job28:28 B yaool n yeela ninsaalba: «Soaala nif zoeese la bãngr sẽn pid bãngre, la yam sẽn pid yam la zãag f meng ne wẽnga.»" 
Job29:1 A Zoob le paasa gomde; ad-a sẽn yeele: 
Job29:2 Ãnna n na n sõng-m tɩ m le yãend kiis niyns sẽn loogã? Daar niynsi Wẽnnaam sẽn da kogend maama," 
Job29:3 b fitila sẽn waa n wit mam zugẽ, tɩ m kẽnd yʋngo ne a vẽenema," 
Job29:4 wala m sẽn da yaa a soaba m zĩ-lik paallẽ, Wẽnd zooda maasem sẽn waa n buid m doogã," 
Job29:5 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba sẽn waa n da ket n be ne maam tɩ m kom-dibli wã ra gũbg-ma," 
Job29:6 bũmb da ka paoog-m ye, bĩisim ka paooge, kaam ka paoog-m ye." 
Job29:7 M sã n da yit tẽnga noorẽ, mam sã n da rɩgl m goeele tigsga zĩigẽ," 
Job29:8 kom-bɩɩba sã n da yãend maam, b loogdame, tɩ nin-kẽemsã yik n yɛs yĩngri, m taoore." 
Job29:9 Tẽnga kãsem-dãmba basda b goama, n dɩk b nus n pĩ b noore." 
Job29:10 Nanamsa koeesa ra gĩtame, tɩ b zɛlma tabend b dasendagsẽ." 
Job29:11 Tʋbr ninga fãa sẽn wʋm m goama da boond-m lame tɩ zu-noog soaba, nifr ninga sẽn yãenda maam ra pẽgdame." 
Job29:12 M da fãagda naong soab sẽn kot m sõngre, n paas kɩɩb bil sẽn ka tar teegda." 
Job29:13 Sẽn kiid-ba kãab nooda ra lʋɩta m zugu, la m da kõta pʋg-kõap sũ-noogo." 
Job29:14 M da yera sõmblem wa m fuugu, zemsgo n da ya m fuyorgo la m zu-vindga." 
Job29:15 M da lebga zoeensa nini, n lebg wobs karse." 
Job29:16 M da yaa nimbãan-dãmba ba, maam n da wegsd sãan yɛla n fãagd-a bʋʋd zĩigẽ." 
Job29:17 M da kaooda sẽn dat-b n wãb b taaba yẽna, m da yaagda b noorã n gʋsg b sẽn da yõke." 
Job29:18 M da yeta m menga: «M sã n wa kiid m gãagẽ, badaar la m na n le wẽneg n vʋʋge wa tɩɩga." 
Job29:19 Kooma na ta tɩɩga yẽgna, yʋngo, menem na madg a vãado." 
Job29:20 M yʋʋra na le tus ne pãn-paalg n sãde, la m nugẽ, m tãpa na le rõos a gĩindi.»" 
Job29:21 Ned kam fãa ra maagda a meng n kelgdẽ. Ned kam fãa da reegda m saglgo. 
Job29:22 M sã n da gom n sɛ, ned ka le yaagd a noor ye, b fãa da reegda m goama a yembr-yembre." 
Job29:23 B ra gũuda m leokr wa b sẽn gũud saaga, wa b sẽn gũud sigr saag sẽn kaoosd niibu." 
Job29:24 M da yõgemda m noor ne-ba, la b ra pa tẽed-m ne rẽ ye, la b ra kokda ne sũ-noogo, bũmb ning fãa sẽn ya kaseto tɩ m ket n dat-b-la ne neere." 
Job29:25 M da zĩi wa naaba n wilgd-b sore, m da zaoo wa rĩma, m tãb-biis sʋka, m tʋʋmd yaa sũ-sãang sẽn tar b rãmba belsgo." 
Job30:1 Ade, marsã mam lebga kom-bõoneg laado, kamb sẽn ka mi b kẽem waoogr ye. Pĩnda m yaool n da pa get b ba rãmba wa neb sẽn zem baasã m sẽn wubd m zakẽ wã ye." 
Job30:2 Yõod bʋg la m da na n dokẽ ne b nusa tʋʋmde ne neb sẽn da zĩ wa b kiime? 
Job30:3 B mensa ra kʋɩɩme, nimbãaneg la kom yĩnga, weooga la b ra pɩkda n baood n na n kõ b noore, la weooga me la sẽn pid ne kom la fare." 
Job30:4 Vãad sẽn ya yamsem-yamsem la b ra gẽemd tuuda sɛɛsẽ, b da rɩlgda mens ne kʋɩlgen-bengdo." 
Job30:5 B yiisa bãmb Adem biis sʋka, n kaas-ba tɩ b yaa wagda." 
Job30:6 Tãmsa pɛlẽ la b ra baood zĩis n na n soonde, n soond tẽnga bɩ pĩisa bogdẽ." 
Job30:7 B bee tuuda pʋgẽ n yãbda, b tɩ samda taab gõosa tẽngre," 
Job30:8 n wẽnd gãeemse, neb sẽn ka tar yʋʋre, b sẽn dig n yiis tẽnga pʋg ne rasaba." 
Job30:9 Marsã, maam la b yɩɩn n laadẽ, maam n lebg b baobgo." 
Job30:10 B kis-m lame la b zãagda ne maam, b yɛsa m taoore n tar m nenga sẽnesg bala." 
Job30:11 Wẽnd sika m tãpa wĩiri, la b tusa maam n lubi, la mam taoore bũmb ka be b sẽn ka maand ye." 
Job30:12 M dɩtgo, b ka tɛk ye, b gũuga m nao tɩ m lʋɩ, b tuka b sor n ta m sẽn beẽ n na n kʋ-m." 
Job30:13 B kell n gũbga maam n seg zãnga, b baooda m yõor yãkre, la rẽ ka bũmb sẽn ya toog ne b ye." 
Job30:14 B wedga m lalg n kẽedẽ, n tusd taaba a tãnda zugu." 
Job30:15 Dabeem buud fãa lebg n kẽe maam, tɩ m daooda tũ rẽ n loog wala sobg n dɩk-a, tɩ m yĩn-maasma loog wala sawadgo." 
Job30:16 Marsã mam vɩɩma salgda m pʋgẽ n menemdẽ, yaa namsgo daare n vẽeg m yĩnga, n yẽeg-ma." 
Job30:17 Yʋngo, toog tara m kõaba n podẽ, m yĩnga tara wɩngre n ka maagdẽ ye." 
Job30:18 Wẽnd gãda m fuuga ne pãnga, la yaa wa m fuuga loore n tiig n lebg sẽk n sãrd-ma." 
Job30:19 Yaa begdẽ la b lobd-ma, m lebga wubsgu la tompɛglem." 
Job30:20 Mam zẽka m koɛɛg n boond yãmba, la y pa leokd-m ye, m yɛsa y taoore tɩ ya wa y nina pa ne-m ye." 
Job30:21 Yãmb lebga nin-kʋʋd m yĩnga, tɩ y nugã ne a keelma wẽoogd-m." 
Job30:22 Yãmb tũnuga maam y sobgo, tɩ y saaga na n ni n boog-ma." 
Job30:23 M sɩd miime tɩ y le rat n kẽes-m-la kũum soolmẽ, tɩ bõn-vɩɩl fãa rigda be." 
Job30:24 Sã n ya sɩda, nuga sã n zẽk n sɛ, ba b rãmba kaasda, sɛɛga yõkr ka le tar võor ye." 
Job30:25 Sẽn yãbd b rãmbã, m naaga bãmb n yãbe, m sã n ne nimbãan-ned fãa, yaa tɩlɛ tɩ m kũm-a." 
Job30:26 M da tẽeda sũ-noogo n mik sũ-sãang n wa, m da tẽeda vẽenem, la lik n wa n yãmbe." 
Job30:27 Mam pʋga roog gudgda wakat buud fãa, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa yaa namsg la a wat n kõt-m." 
Job30:28 M yĩnga gãong tekame tɩ m kẽnda, la ka wĩndgã n yõog-m ye. Tigsga zĩigẽ, dẽn m yik n yals n wese." 
Job30:29 Mam lebga we-baas sõsd-n-taaga, mam tũud-n-taas yaa na-neoondo." 
Job30:30 Mam yĩnga gãonga sobdame n dʋʋgdẽ, M yĩnga kõab fãa digimda waoodo." 
Job30:31 M kʋnda wãagda kʋʋr yɩɩla tɩ m wɩɩga wiisd ne kʋ-yãbdbã. 
Job31:1 Mam da kaoola ne m nini, tɩ m kõn ges pa-kul ye." 
Job31:2 Kaẽ boto, bõe la m na n gũẽ Pãng-Soaba-Wẽnd sẽn bee yĩngra nengẽ?" 
Job31:3 Wala y sẽn gomd n yetẽ tɩ pɛt bala la nin-wẽng segda, la zu-beed bal la b tʋk n kẽnda," 
Job31:4 Wẽnd ne tɩ mam nengẽ wã ka boto ye. Naaba-Wẽnd mi m vɩɩma sẽn yaa a soaba, b tara m buka, b sõta m nao-yakma fãa." 
Job31:5 M ka rɩk zirẽ-beed sor ye! M naoor ka tall-m ne yãgbo n tees zãmb zĩigẽ ye. 
Job31:6 Bɩ b meng wa bʋ m bʋʋdo bãmb meng na reeg tɩ m pida ne pʋ-peelem. 
Job31:7 Mam sã n bas so-tɩrga n bʋt moogo, m nif sã n belg-m lame tɩ m sũur baood wẽnga, rẽgd sã n dẽgma m nusã," 
Job31:8 bɩ Wẽnd kɩt tɩ m sẽn bʋd m pʋʋgẽ yɩ ned a to rɩɩbo, la b võ m sẽn sela fãa gilli!" 
Job31:9 M sũura sã n tʋlga paga, al tɩ m tɩ yals m yak zak noor n gũ-a," 
Job31:10 bɩ mam meng paga kẽ neere n wer ned a to yĩnga, tɩ rapa a taaba pʋg-a." 
Job31:11 M maan dẽ, m tʋmẽ la kegre wakat kãnga, n togẽ tɩ paalg-m bʋʋdo." 
Job31:12 M naan n widgẽ bugum t'a rɩ-m zãnga, ali n loog n dɩ m paoonga gilli." 
Job31:13 Mam sã n maana no-koeemde ne m dakõapa n tol n mong bi-ribla bɩ bi-pugla b sẽn da tog n paame," 
Job31:14 Wẽnd bʋʋda raare, m maanda wãna? Bãmb sã n sokd võore, m leokdame tɩ bõe?" 
Job31:15 Sẽn naana maam m ma pʋgẽ wã, n naan bãmb me. Yaa Wẽnd a ye tãa n yag tõnd d ma pʋgẽ." 
Job31:16 Daar bɩ y tagse tɩ naong rãmb kos-m-la bũmbu tɩ m zãgse, tɩ pʋg-kõor gũ-la m sõngre t'a nin wa yiigi;" 
Job31:17 tɩ m dɩ m dɩɩb m yembre, n ka yãk n kõ kɩɩb bil ye." 
Job31:18 La ayoo! Al m yãadmẽ, kɩɩb bila bɩɩ m zakẽ wala a ba sɛɛgẽ. Al m yãadmẽ m yɩɩ pʋg-kõor so-sõng wilgda." 
Job31:19 Daar bɩ y tagse tɩ m yãee naong soab t'a ka tar fuugu, la nimbãan-neda t'a ka tar fu-goabga," 
Job31:20 tɩ mam ka modg t'a pʋʋs m barka, a sɛɛg sẽn paam fuug yĩnga, fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbdo n tõe n yiis waoodo." 
Job31:21 Daar bɩ y tagse tɩ m teesa m nug-bil kɩɩb bil, bʋʋd zĩigẽ, m mi tɩ bʋʋdb a taaba na n maana wa maam, bada!" 
Job31:22 Sã n ya boto, bɩ Wẽnd fãsg m kangã m bãokẽ, bɩ m nug sũk m kãntɩɩgẽ." 
Job31:23 M digda rabeem wʋsg ne Wẽnd sɩbgre; m maanda wãn n yaas b ziira taoore. 
Job31:24 M sã n da teeg sãnema, m sã n yeel sãnem yullã: «Foo la m fãa-fãa,»" 
Job31:25 m sã n da ningẽ m sũ-noog m arzɛk sẽn waooga pʋgẽ, arzɛk ninga mam sẽn tʋm n paama pʋgẽ," 
Job31:26 m sã yãenda wĩndga t'a tãoosd a vẽenem, n yãend kiuug t'a pelgda," 
Job31:27 tɩ m sũur soos n yeel t'a wẽnd puk yã, tɩ m zẽk m nug n waoog-a," 
Job31:28 dẽ na yɩẽ yell kegr bʋ-kaooda sẽn sɩbgde, tɩ rẽ yaẽ la yĩngr Wẽnda kɩɩsgo." 
Job31:29 M pa tẽed tɩ m bɛyã paama bõne tɩ mam kɩdem a bõna yĩnga, tɩ m noog m sũur yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ a zuga yĩnga ye," 
Job31:30 tɩ m zɩ n bas m noor t'a kãab wẽnga, m zɩ n kãab m bɛ kũum ye." 
Job31:31 M zak rãmb ka mi n gomd woto sɩda: «Ãnna soab n ka paam nemd a nengẽ n wãb n tɩge?» 
Job31:32 Ba vugr menga sãan ka wa m yir n gãand yɩng ye, so-toagd mikda m zaka noore tɩ pak yã." 
Job31:33 Mam yɩta wãna n maan wa Adem biisã n solg ned m yell kegre, n solg m beegrã m pʋgẽ?" 
Job31:34 M maan dẽ fãa, yɩtẽ la neb goam dabeem sẽn tar-m yĩnga, yɩtẽ la m sẽn zoet neba sãbsgo yĩnga; tɩ m na n kong n sĩnd m noor la m pa rat n yi m zakẽ." 
Job31:35 M yaoolem koɛɛg la woto: M yãeta yɛɛlẽ ned sẽn na n kelg-ma? Bɩ Pãng-Soaba wa leoke! 
Job31:36 Sã n kella m bɛ wã sẽn sõdg yɛl niyns toor-toorã, m na rɩk-ba n palg m bãoko, m na rɩka n maan m faong rĩ-tɛɛgdga." 
Job31:37 Yaa Pãng-Soaba la m na n wilg n kẽnda sẽn yɩ a Soaba, bãmb la m na seg ne zu-zẽkre!" 
Job31:38 M pʋʋga koaadba sã n yika zabr ne maam, sẽn bʋd-ba la sẽn ko-ba sã n ninga nintãm," 
Job31:39 tɩ m sɛɛsa b pãnga n yaool n ka yao-b ye," 
Job31:40 bɩ a tõdg kood wombo n yi gõose, bɩ a tõdg ki wekre n wek lamzʋʋdo. La woto me n baasd a Zoob goama." 
Job32:1 Neb a tãabã makame n kong n sĩnd b noor n bas a Zoob, bala a Zoob da tagsdame t'a yaa nin-tɩrga." 
Job32:2 La ade, a Barakeyɛl biig a Eliyu, Buz tẽng neda, a Ram doogẽ, kolga a Zoob ne sũ-puuri, a sẽn da gomd wala a sɩda yɩɩda Wẽnd dẽnna." 
Job32:3 A ra puuga a sũur ne a Zoob zo-rãmb a tãabã la rẽ yaa b sẽn ka tõog n leok a Zoob neere, tɩ lebg wala Wẽnd n sɩd ka bʋʋma." 
Job32:4 Bãmb sẽn wa n tar goama a Eliyu da maag a meng n sĩnd a noore, bala yẽ n da yaa bãmb fãa yao-zʋʋga;" 
Job32:5 la yẽ sẽn wa n mik tɩ bãmba ka le tõe n leok a Zoob tɩ fɩ, a sũura puugame." 
Job32:6 Dẽ la yẽ menga, a Eliyu, a Barakeyɛl, Buz daoa biiga, sɩng goam n yeele: Mam yẽ sɩd ket n paoodame, la yãmb yaa nin-kẽemse. Dẽ yĩng la mam da zoet dabeem, n da ka rat n wilg yãmb m sẽn mi ye." 
Job32:7 Mam da yeelame: «Kãsem dãmba n na n gome, yʋʋm sẽn waoogẽ dãmbã n na n puk sɩda.»" 
Job32:8 La sã n ya sɩda, bũmb a to la ninsaal paamda, Ninsaal paamda Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba yam n lebg mita." 
Job32:9 Yʋʋm ka wat ne yam ye, leb n ka kʋʋlem n wat ne sẽn ya tɩrg bãngr ye." 
Job32:10 Woto wã, m na n kos-y lame tɩ y kelg maam: tɩ m dat n wilga mam me sẽn mi." 
Job32:11 Sẽn ta marsã, m da teega yãmb goama pãnga, n da yoog m tʋbre n kelgd yãmb wilgrã, n kelgd ned kam fãa sẽn leokd a Zoob to-to." 
Job32:12 Mam sɩd da kʋmba m menga n kelgd-y neere, la bʋko! M yãeeme tɩ ned ba a ye ka leok a Zoob ye, ned ba a ye ka tõog n leok n koms a goama pãng ye." 
Job32:13 Bɩ y da le yeele: «Tõnd n tar yam: tɩ ka ninsaala, yaa Wẽnd bal n tõe n gom n lub-a.»" 
Job32:14 Ad-y yẽ gomd ba a ye ka gomd sẽn tar yõod m yĩng ye, la mam me pa rat n leok-a wa y sẽn leok-a wã ye." 
Job32:15 Yãmb kell n yɛsa woto sɩɩ, n ka leokdẽ ye n ka tõog n yiis gomd y noorẽ ye." 
Job32:16 M yaas n gũume la y sẽn ka le gomdã, tɩ y zuka y sẽn da tar fãa y yãmẽ," 
Job32:17 leokrã, yaa maam n na n leok m dẽnna, m me na wilg m sẽn mi." 
Job32:18 Mam yẽ ka tõe n kong sẽn na n togs ye, m bãngr zulunga n tusd-m tɩ m gome." 
Job32:19 M pʋgẽ wã yaa wa bũmb sẽn wuk n dat n pusgi, yaa wa rãam sẽn wukd ko-wao-paalle t'a rat n pusgi." 
Job32:20 La m sã n paam n gome m vʋʋsga na lebg naana, m na yaag m noor n sɩng ned kam fãa leobo." 
Job32:21 Mam kõn gom n sõng ned ba a ye ye; m kõn gom n bao n noog ned ba a ye sũur ye. 
Job32:22 M pʋs n ka mi belg ned n noog a sũur ye, m pʋs n maan dẽ m Naanda na wẽneg n yãk m yõore." 
Job33:1 Zoob, maag f meng n kelg m goama, yoog f tʋbre n kelg m toagsgã." 
Job33:2 M yaagda m noore, tɩ m zelemd leebd m goama." 
Job33:3 M sũ-tɩrga koɛɛg la m na n yiisi, la m noor na n togsa sɩd bala." 
Job33:4 Wẽnd n fʋʋs b pemsem m yõorẽ, Pãng-Soaba maasmẽ la m vɩ." 
Job33:5 Fo sã n tõe, bɩ f leok-ma, segl f menga n gũ-ma." 
Job33:6 Gese, maam ne foom yaa bũmb a ye, Wẽnd taoore, b yiisa maam tãndẽ wa foom." 
Job33:7 Woto wã f ka tog bas tɩ m goama yɛɛs-fo, bɩ n tẽ tɩ m baood n na wilg-f-la m pãng ye." 
Job33:8 Fo n gom tɩ m tʋbr wʋme, f koɛɛga rãamd ket n tat-m lame, la f ra yetame:" 
Job33:9 «Mam yaa sõng zãnga, m ka yɩ tõat ye yel-wẽnd ka m zug ye," 
Job33:10 ne rẽ fãa Wẽnd baooda yɛla n dogend m zugu, la b get maam wa bɛyã." 
Job33:11 B balga m naoor ne kutu, m pa tõe nang bũmb tɩ b ka bãng ye.»" 
Job33:12 La zĩ-kãnga wã m na yeele, Zoob, tɩ f konga bʋʋm. Bala Wẽnd yɩɩda ninsaala, la b na yɛs n wẽed no-koeemd ne ninsaal, sɩda?" 
Job33:13 Bõe yĩng tɩ fo maand zabr ne-ba n yet tɩ b pa leokd b sẽn sok-b bũmb ningã, n yaool n mi tɩ ka modgr tɩ b wilg b sẽn maande?" 
Job33:14 Wẽnnaam bẽta yell dũnna n gome, n bẽd yell a to n gom beoogo, la rẽ pa wat neba yamẽ ye." 
Job33:15 Tõe n bẽda ne yʋng zãmsdo bɩ likri, yaamsa sã n mii n lub ninsaalbã." 
Job33:16 Wakat kãnga, b watame n gomd ninsaal tʋbrẽ, n wilg vẽenega b sẽn dat t'a gũus ne bũmb ninga," 
Job33:17 sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ ninsaal bas a tʋʋm wẽna, tɩ sẽn maana raooda me tuub a wilg-m-mengã." 
Job33:18 Woto a zãagda a meng ne yaoogo, la a zãag a vɩɩm ne kãna sẽn wat ne kũum." 
Job33:19 Wakat ninga b demsda ninsaala n gãneg-a t'a gãe n bẽedẽ, tɩ tooga sãag n kẽ a kõaba," 
Job33:20 tɩ rɩɩb sã n ta a noorẽ bɩ a rat n wʋke, t'a yam lak ne a rɩ-noodo." 
Job33:21 A yĩnga kʋɩtame tɩ b neẽ, t'a kõaba sẽn da busã, sãd n dʋr yɩnga." 
Job33:22 Wakat kãng la a kẽnd n yegd a yaoogo, wakat kãng la b bas-a nin-kʋʋdba nusẽ." 
Job33:23 Wakat kãnga, a sã n paam tɩ malɛk yaas a sɛɛgẽ, ned sẽn tũus neb tusr sʋka, n tõe n taas-a Wẽnd koɛɛga neere, la a wilg-a a tʋʋm-pakre," 
Job33:24 a sã n paam t'a zoe a nimbãanega n yeel a: «Da bas-y t'a sig yaoogẽ, tɩ m paama a vɩɩma rondo n na n kɩse,»" 
Job33:25 a yĩnga lebd n bʋkame, n lebg wa a sẽn da yaa a soaba a bi-bɩɩlmẽ." 
Job33:26 A na n pʋʋsa Wẽnnaam sẽn nong-a n kelem sũ-noog a sẽn ne b nengã, neng ning sẽn kõt ninsaal sõmblema." 
Job33:27 A tara yɩɩn-kãnga n yɩɩn neba taoore: «Mam da maana yel-wẽnd n bʋdg moogo, la Wẽnd ka sɩbg-m wala m sẽn da tog ne ye" 
Job33:28 Bãmb fãaga m sɩɩga ne kũum, la m vɩɩma na n le koka b vẽenem.»" 
Job33:29 Ade, wã fãa la Wẽnd tʋmda, naoor a yi, naoor a tã, ninsaal yĩnga," 
Job33:30 sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a tɩlg kũum, tɩ nin-vɩɩs vẽenem bui-a." 
Job33:31 Zoob, maag f meng neere n kelg maam, sĩnd f noore tɩ m na n le goma me yɛsa." 
Job33:32 Fo sã n tara koɛɛga n na n gome bɩ f gome tɩ m dɩ f sõmblema kaseto," 
Job33:33 sã n ka rẽ bi f sĩnd n kelg maam, sĩnd f noore tɩ m zãms f yam sẽn pid yam." 
Job34:1 A Eliyu le gomame n yeele: 
Job34:2 Sã n ya ne yãmba, yẽesem dãmba, kelg-y m goama; yãmba, mitba, bi y yoog y tʋbre n kelge." 
Job34:3 Sɩda, yaa tʋbre n mi gomd noom, wala zelemd sẽn mi rɩɩb noosem." 
Job34:4 D lagem taaba n ges sẽn be neere. D ges ne taaba sẽn ya sõmbo. 
Job34:5 Kelg-y a Zoob sẽn gomd t'a tara bʋʋma, tɩ Wẽnd ket n ningd-a taalã," 
Job34:6 tɩ Wẽnd bʋʋda ka tũud sorã, tɩ b pogl-a lame t'a rat n ki, la yell ka a zugu ye, a ka beeg ye." 
Job34:7 Pʋs n yaa bõe ned la nin-kãnga? Fo leokd-a-la bũmb t'a lɛɛg n yaal-fo la yaoolga ka toe ne-a ye. 
Job34:8 A naaga nin-wẽnsã n dɩk so-yɛnga nin-wẽnsa la a tũud-n-taase. 
Job34:9 Sɩda yẽ n be tẽngr n gomda: «Zems f vɩɩma ne Wẽnd daabã ka kõt ninsaal fɩ.» 
Job34:10 Bɩ y kelg-ma, sẽn tar-b yama rãmba, Wẽnd zãra ne wẽnga. Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba zãr ne wʋg yell kegre." 
Job34:11 Bãmb n dond ninsaal tʋʋma yõodo, n dond ned kam fãa wala a manesem sẽn tog ne." 
Job34:12 Sɩd sɩda, Wẽnd ka tʋmd wẽng abada, Naaba-Wẽnd ka basd sɩd t'a golem ye." 
Job34:13 M sok n gese: ned a to n gũnug bãmb tẽngã laa? Ned a to ka kos bãmb tɩ b ges dũni wã yell koe! 
Job34:14 B sã n da tagsdẽ b meng yell bala, n yõk pemsma ninsaalba sẽn vʋʋsde," 
Job34:15 nin-vɩɩs fãa kõn naagẽ taab n ki. Ninsaal fãa kõn lebgẽ tẽng tom. 
Job34:16 Zoob, f sã n tara yɛla wõore bɩ f modg n kelg-ma, kelg la f wʋm m sẽn na n togs-fo." 
Job34:17 Wẽnd sã n ka tũudẽ zemsgo b na tõogẽ n zãẽ dũni wã bɩ? Fo na saag n mong bʋʋd tɩrsa soab bʋʋm bɩ? 
Job34:18 Bãmb bal n tõe n yeel dĩma: «Ad-f ka võor ye,» bãmb n tõe n yeel dĩm biisi: «Y sẽn mi yaa zɩɩm daagr bala.»" 
Job34:19 Wẽnd pa ges n welg bãmb toor ye bãmb nengẽ arzɛk soab pa yɩɩd naong soab ye, b yiiba fãa ya bãmb nug n naane." 
Job34:20 Vugri bala zĩig sobgdame tɩ kũum deeg tẽng n yãmbe, tẽnga wat n wulumdame n kʋ a soaalba. B tusda naaba ne a pãn-tõogã n lebs kɛɛnga, tɩ rẽ ka tũ ne toog ye." 
Job34:21 Wẽnd neng ka lakd ne ninsaal ye, b dɩkda a nao kẽndra gilli, n mi a tʋʋma." 
Job34:22 Lik ka be n ya lika n sãamd yãeebo, n sãamd tʋʋm wẽna yãeeb ye." 
Job34:23 Ka modgr tɩ Wẽnd bool bʋʋdo, tɩ ninsaal wẽnema tõog n puk b nifẽ ye." 
Job34:24 B ka sokd la b sik pãn-dãmbã la b bao ned a to n ning b zĩigẽ ye. 
Job34:25 La yaa b sẽn mi ned kam fãa manesem; yʋn yɛng bala tɩ b sik-ba tɩ neb fẽd-ba. 
Job34:26 B reegda b wẽnema sɩbgr neba fãa taoore. 
Job34:27 Nin-kãens da wẽnemda b kãare n tees bãmba; n maand wa b ka mi Wẽnd sẽn dat tɩ b maan ye. 
Job34:28 La woto b kɩtame t'a ka-neng-soaba la a nug-pa-zãad soaba kong n kelem Wẽnde, la nin-koam kɛleng ka paad n ka lʋɩ b tʋbrẽ ye." 
Job34:29 La Wẽnd sã n da maanẽ wala b toog ka be, ãnda n na n ning-b taale? B sã n solg b nenga, ãnda n na n yãend-ba? B tõe n dɩka tẽnga naam," 
Job34:30 n kõ dĩm yoogo, n kõ na-yaalga, la sẽn maanda pãn-tõog bala." 
Job34:31 D mak wala ned n yik n yeel Wẽnde: «M namsame n dol m beegrã, m kõn le paas beoog ye," 
Job34:32 wa-y y toore n wilg-ma m sẽn bas b rãmb n ka sõdgã la m tuuba fãa gilli. M kõn le paas ye.» 
Job34:33 Foom a Zoob, fo tagsdame tɩ bõe fo tagsdame tɩ Wẽnd na sɩbg a soab bɩ? Gome, wilg f sẽn tagsde, foo n so yella welgre, ka maam ye!" 
Job34:34 Ad-y yẽesem dãmba fãa, yam sẽn puk b rãmba fãa, na naag maam n yɩ zelemd a ye." 
Job34:35 D na n naaga taab n yeele: «A Zoob ka mi a sẽn gomd ye, t'a goama ka gomd tɩ tũudẽ ye." 
Job34:36 A sã n gomd n sõngd nin-wẽnse, bɩ a kell n tall boto." 
Job34:37 D na yãend tɩ beegr a to n wat n paas a sẽn zẽk a zug ne Wẽndã, t'a na n sɩnga Wẽnd tʋʋr la b sãbsgo, la a na n kɩtame tɩ d maand sãmb-sãmbe, n maand sãmb-sãmb ne Wẽnde.»" 
Job35:1 A Eliyu n kell n tall goama: 
Job35:2 M ned sõngo, Zoob, fo sã n yet Wẽnde: «M be bʋʋm, m ka bʋʋm fãa yaa bõn-yɛng ne maam,»" 
Job35:3 fo tẽedame tɩ Wẽnd taoore, f goama tũuda sore?" 
Job35:4 Ad-m sẽn na n leok-foo, foom ne f zo-rãmba." 
Job35:5 Nak n ges saaga neere; ges sawatã sẽn lug to-to b pa zʋʋg foo n kul yĩngr sɩda? 
Job35:6 Fo sã n maan yel-wẽnde bõe n maand Wẽnde? Fo beeg-b naoor yaka, b nod bʋgo la f rãmsda? Fo ka maand-b fɩ!" 
Job35:7 Fo sã n ya nin-tɩrg me, bõe la f kõt-ba? Yaa f bõe la b reegd f nugẽ?" 
Job35:8 Yaa f taaba bala la f wẽnema namsda, Adem biis bala la fo sõmblema nafda." 
Job35:9 Nanamsa sã n maand b neba pãn-tõogo, b neba ka pẽgd ye. B boonda goabg la rɩtg tɩ b wa fãag-ba." 
Job35:10 Ned ba a ye ka tẽegd n yeele: «Wẽnd la m Naanda bɛɛ? D sẽn mii n kilsd a soab ne yʋnga bɛɛ?» 
Job35:11 Bãmb n yaool n pukd d yam n yɩɩd we-rũmsa vɩɩm, n yɩɩd luiili wã rẽnna." 
Job35:12 Wilg-m-meng rãmba la nin-wẽnsã sã n zãad tõnd toogo tɩ d bool Wẽnd me, ad-y b pa leokd ye." 
Job35:13 D tar waasgo me, yaa zaalem, Pãng-Soaba ka wʋmde, b ka kelgd wa d yiisa gomd sẽn be yõod ye." 
Job35:14 M pa tẽed tɩ b na leoke, f sã n wa yɛs n gomda tɩ f yiisa f koɛɛga daar zãra la f ket n ka ne-b ye la f ket n gũuda b leokre," 
Job35:15 M pa tẽed tɩ fo tara bʋʋm ye, Zoob, fo sã n tagsd tɩ Wẽnd pa sɩbgd yel-wẽnde." 
Job35:16 Woto wã fo goama fãa yaa gom faado, fo gomda wʋsgo, la f ka mi f sẽn yet ye." 
Job36:1 A Eliyu kell n talla goama woto: 
Job36:2 Maag f meng bilfu, Zoob, tɩ m wilg-fu. Bũmb wʋsg n ket m sẽn tõe n leoke n puk bʋʋm n kõ Wẽnde." 
Job36:3 Bala, m na n ta-la m bãngra sẽn zulmẽ, n yiis bʋʋm n kõ m Naandã." 
Job36:4 Zirẽ-beed ka naag m sẽn na n togsa ye, la bãng tɩ yaa mit meng n yɛs f taoorã." 
Job36:5 Gese, Wẽnd ziira labsa, ka bãmb n na n sak n yeel tɩ b toog ka ye. B yalsda b gomda zĩ yɛnga, b pa gird n le gõms ye." 
Job36:6 B kõn bas nin-wẽng t'a vɩɩnd ye, b na sõng b sẽn maand b rãmb pãnga." 
Job36:7 B yama kẽeda nin-tɩrse la yaa daar fãa yĩnga. D gom dĩm dãmb yelle: bãmb n zaoolg-b b naama goeel zugu, n dat tɩ b rɩ naama n kaoose. Dẽ me la kẽer mi n yik n maand wilg-m-menga." 
Job36:8 La wakat kãnga marsã Wẽnd zad-b lame, b zad-b-la ne bãeense wa bi-beese, b kẽesd-b-la toog ne toog pʋgẽ." 
Job36:9 Wẽnd pukda b yam tɩ b mi b kongra sẽn beẽ, tɩ b mi tɩ b wilg-m-menga n wa ne zẽk f zugu ne Wẽnde." 
Job36:10 B pakda tʋba tɩ b reeg b saglse, b wilgd-b lame tɩ b tek b naoor wẽnga sor zugu." 
Job36:11 Bãmb sã n kelg la b sak n tũ, b vɩɩma na baas sũ-noog kãseng pʋgẽ." 
Job36:12 La b sã n tõdg kelegre, tɩlɛ tɩ kũum lʋɩ sʋka la yaa wʋmba sẽn ka pida yĩnga la b na n ki." 
Job36:13 B sẽn pa rɩk b mens n kɩs Wẽnd zãngã, b maanda zabre ne bãmba la b pa teesd Wẽnd kelme, b sã n wa yõk-ba n na n pag roog ye." 
Job36:14 Bãmb dãmb loogdame n pa kʋʋl ye, n loog ne vɩɩm sẽn sãam ne yoobo." 
Job36:15 Naong soab naong n fãagda, naonga rengda taoore n yet t'a maan gũusgu." 
Job36:16 Wẽnd ra kɩtame tɩ fo me põs yɩɩre yĩn-maasem n wa n deeg pɛta zĩiga, tɩ f rɩɩba roog lɛɛg n pit ne rɩ-noodo." 
Job36:17 La ad Wẽnd sẽn kao f bʋʋdo n paalg-fo, la ra tẽ tɩ sɩbgra na tõog n boog ye." 
Job36:18 Da bas tɩ f sũura sẽn puugã tus-fu n lub wẽng a to pʋg ye. Da wa tẽ tɩ f sã n zamd kũun dũnna n le yik n zam kũun beoogo, f na tõog tɩ Wẽnd tũ fo raab ye, Wẽnd ka bõn-daadg ye." 
Job36:19 Ad-f arzɛkã, ad-f sãnema kõn sek ye, dẽnd f modg f meng rũnna, n le modg beoogo." 
Job36:20 Da gãe n boond yʋng ninga sẽn na n yɩ dũni wã tɛkem-tɛkema ye. 
Job36:21 Tɩɩma yaa ra wẽnemd f neng n tees wẽnga tɩ wẽngã n wa ne naongã la pɛtã. 
Job36:22 Gese, Wẽnd n yɩɩd fãa la b pãng labsa. Karen-saamb a bõe n tõe n zãms a karen-biis wa bãmba?" 
Job36:23 Ãnna n be n wilgd-b b sẽn tog n maane? Ãnd n saagd n yeel bãmba: «Ad-y y ka maan neer ye!» 
Job36:24 Woto wã da yĩm ye, tẽeg n pẽg bãmb tʋʋma, tʋʋm niyns Adem biis fãa sẽn kilsdã," 
Job36:25 tʋʋm niyns fãa b sẽn maane, tɩ ninsaal tõe n yãend ne a nifã." 
Job36:26 Sɩda Wẽnd waoogame n zʋʋg tõnd yama zãnga, bãmb yʋʋm ka tõe n sõd ye." 
Job36:27 Bãmb n tigsd yĩngri kooma, bɛɛl-bɛɛla, b fẽegd-a-la wa wulgu," 
Job36:28 sawata na n pʋdga kooma tẽnga, n pʋdg-a bɛɛl-bɛɛla n madg ninsaalb kamba." 
Job36:29 Ãnna n tõe wilg sawatã sẽn tʋɩt to-to, n wilg yĩngr sa-tãsa võore?" 
Job36:30 Ade, fo neeme tɩ yaa Wẽnde n gũbg b meng ne sa-yãgdo, bãmb n pids mogra bog-zulung ne kooma." 
Job36:31 Wẽnd saaga niidame n na n dɩlg ãndũni rãmba, n kõt ninsaalba kood tɩ b rɩt n tɩgda." 
Job36:32 Bãmb nusa mumda sa-tãsã, b zab-teoogo, dẽ tɩ b nina kargdame n baood b sẽn na n wẽ a soaba." 
Job36:33 Sa tãsã n wilgd b waoongo, la b waoonga ka lingd rũmsa mens ye." 
Job37:1 Saaga sã n tãse, m sũura deegd n digimdame, al tɩ ya waa a yɩk n yi-la m yãoogẽ." 
Job37:2 Bɩ y sĩnd n kelge; kelg-y b koɛɛga rãamde, kelg-y bʋʋr ninga sẽn yit b nengẽ." 
Job37:3 Yaa ween-vɩɩs a naasa fãa n deegd koɛɛgã n sokd taaba. La kãna sẽn tãoodã tata dũni wã sɛtmẽ. 
Job37:4 Saaga sã n yãgemd n looge la koɛɛg sẽn vũudi, sẽn pida ne ziira soab koɛɛga wat n sãta ne pãnga." 
Job37:5 Wẽnd koɛɛga sãtame n pukd b yel-bãna. B yel-bãna sɩd zʋʋga tõnd yama pãnga. 
Job37:6 Wẽnd yeta sẽn wẽnda sapɩlem faagã dʋʋg tẽnga, wa zom pɛɛlga. Dẽ poore yaa saluka, dẽ poore yaa bedg-bedge, saaga niidame n tõt yoogre," 
Job37:7 tɩ tʋʋmd buug ka le tõe n tʋm ye, tɩ neba na n tũ rẽ n bãnge tɩ Wẽnd n tʋmd b tʋʋmde." 
Job37:8 Rũng lebda a gãagẽ, sẽn gãe a bokẽ tʋgd n soonda a pẽkẽ." 
Job37:9 Sob-raoog yita nug rɩtgo, tɩ sob maasga yit goabga." 
Job37:10 Wẽnd fʋʋsda kooma zug t'a sɩng gĩsbu, kooma sẽn da ya koaagã ginda taok wa kutu." 
Job37:11 Wẽnd pidsda sawata ne koom, la b pidsd-b-la ne sa-tãse la b tʋmd-b-la goabg la rɩtgo." 
Job37:12 B sɩngda gilgr yĩngri la zĩig ka yaagd n bas ye, b reegda b noorã n taas zĩig zãnga," 
Job37:13 bũmba fãa maanda wa b sẽn date b sikda b toolem ka, n puk b nonglem ka-sẽnẽ." 
Job37:14 Zoob, fo ra tog n maana gũusgu, f ra tog n kʋmsa f yĩnsi n ges Wẽnd bõn-bãna." 
Job37:15 Fo mii Wẽnd sẽn sigind b yɛl bãna to-to? Fo mii sawata sẽn yiisd sa-tãsa to-to bɩ? 
Job37:16 Pɩgs bʋg la b tar n laand yĩngri? Wã ka bãngr sẽn pid bãngr sɩda? 
Job37:17 Tẽnga sã n sɩng n na n namse n nams ne nug rɩtg sob-tʋʋlgã ad-y futa yeelgr lebgda sɛsga. 
Job37:18 Wẽnnaam sẽn waa n yɛdgd sa-gãongã b sẽn saas-a t'a lebg wala zũud nin-gɛtgã, fo n zĩnd be n sõng-b bɩ?" 
Job37:19 Wilg maam d sẽn tõe n togsẽ Wẽnde? D meng sẽn zĩ ne lik ningã n pa tẽed d na walem bõn-sõng ye. 
Job37:20 M sã n wa rat n gome m tog n deng n wilg-b lame bɩ? M sã n gom n sɛ, tog n pʋg n yeelame tɩ yaa a Zagl n gom bɩ?" 
Job37:21 Ade, nif kamsg pʋgẽ bala vẽenem wat n menemame, sawatã n wat n luda wĩndga zãnga, tɩ sobg na n yik n pek sa-gãongã." 
Job37:22 Vẽenem sẽn ya neer wa sãnem n wat n puk nug goabga. Yaa Wẽnd n gũbg b meng ne vẽenem vẽenem sẽn wat ne rabeem la yɩɩre. 
Job37:23 Bãmb la tõnd sẽn ka tõe n kolg ned ningã, bãmb la Pãng-Soabã, sẽn pid ne naam la zemsgã, n pa sɩɩsd yell sẽn ka be a soab zug ye," 
Job37:24 Dẽ me la ninsaal fãa rigd dabeem b taoore. Dẽ me la bãmb ka sulgd n gese sẽn yet-a t'a yama pida zãnga ye, Bãmb me ka sokd yẽ soab yell ye." 
Job38:1 Naaba-Wẽnd zĩnda sob-raooga pʋgẽ n leok a Zoob: 
Job38:2 Yaa ãnna soab n gomd goam faado la a wɩt yĩngr la tẽnga Naanda? 
Job38:3 Yik n sẽbg f kalle, la kolg ne sũ-keelem la f leok m sokre n paas m bãngre." 
Job38:4 Mam sẽn wa n vigind tẽnga tɩ fo bee yɛ? Leok-m wɛ, pid ne bãngr soaba!" 
Job38:5 Fo mi ned ninga sẽn maga tẽngã, sẽn tar-a a yalem la a woglem?" 
Job38:6 A sud n yɛsa bõe zugu. Ãn n kõ a yasra pãnga, ãnda n kɩt tɩ ãdsa na n naag taaba," 
Job38:7 n naag taab n pɩl tõd-beoogo pɩlbo tɩ Wẽnd kamba na n naag taab n yeele: «Ne y tʋʋmd-tʋʋmde!» 
Job38:8 Ãnna soab n yõk mogrã n page, a sẽn wa n yi paalem n yɛdg yaarã," 
Job38:9 m sẽn waa n dɩk wulgu n pil-a wa fuugu, n bao sawat wa fuugu n tʋɩ a gãaga?" 
Job38:10 Maam n yiis noor n koms mogra pãnga, n lɛɛg n pag a noora kẽnkẽ, ne kʋɩlenga." 
Job38:11 Mam n yeel-a: «Da long n ta taoor ye! F ko-wiisã sã n yiki, bɩ b pa ka bala.»" 
Job38:12 Fo sẽn doga tɛka, fo zoe n kõo yibeoog noor la f yals sõor a zĩigẽ bɩ?" 
Job38:13 Fo n gãd tẽnga kɩrems a naasã n fugumd nin-wẽnsa bɩ? 
Job38:14 Tẽnga ne a teedã paamda neng a Yagda nugẽ. Fãa yitame n yɛs ne faongo. 
Job38:15 Nin-wẽnsã vẽenem bal n menemde, Kang ninga sẽn da zẽkda n na n wilg a pãngã n kaoogde." 
Job38:16 La fo kẽe mogrã pʋgẽ n taa a ko-nina bɩ? F gõ n saaga mogra tẽngr bɩ? 
Job38:17 B wilga-foom kɩɩmsa dooga noore kʋɩlens bɩ? Fo yãenda kʋɩlens niyns sẽn pag kũuma a likẽ wã bɩ? 
Job38:18 Fo nan bilga f yamẽ, tẽnga yalem sẽn yaa a soaba? Fo sã n mi a zãng bɩ f mak n wilg-ma." 
Job38:19 Vẽenema bee kɩreng bʋgo? Lika yẽ yita al yɛ? 
Job38:20 Kẽng n tɩ gẽes-b b soolmẽ, f sã n mi sor ning sẽn dɩkd n ta be." 
Job38:21 Fo yaool n tog n mii sorã, tɩ f sẽn wa moog daar zãra." 
Job38:22 M sok n gese: fo kẽname n ta kooma sẽn gĩs n gãneg zĩig ningã, fo yãee sapɩlma sẽn sam zĩig ninga?" 
Job38:23 Mam bĩnga rẽ fãa n gũud yɩɩr daare, zabre la tẽn-kũum daare." 
Job38:24 Wĩntooga vẽenema tãoosd n teesda yɛ? Sob tʋʋlga yii yɛ n wẽed tẽngã? 
Job38:25 Ãnna soab n tuk ko-soya n kõt sa-kooma? Ãnd n tuk sor n kõ sawata sẽn maand bʋʋrã 
Job38:26 la a kɩt tɩ b niid n kõt ninsaalb kooma, n madgd we-raoogo la zĩ-peen-daaga," 
Job38:27 n yũnugd tẽn-koɛɛnga tɩ mood buli n paam n yi? 
Job38:28 Saaga sẽn niida tara ba bɩ? Meenema sẽn dʋʋgda yita yɛ? 
Job38:29 Ko-gĩsdma ma la a bõe, la ãnda n dog fʋlfʋl-bi wã?" 
Job38:30 Kooma maanda a wãna n gũsi, n lebg kẽnkẽ wa kugri, mogra kooma maanda a wãn n gãd taab zãnga?" 
Job38:31 Fo tõe n paam n loe Susã ne taaba? La f lodg yĩngr tãb-biiga sɛɛg sẽbdga? 
Job38:32 Fo mii wakat bʋg la sẽoog na n deeg sɩpaolgo, la wakat bʋg la f na n kẽes noaaga ne a kambã?" 
Job38:33 La fo mi yĩngri teedã sẽn tũud noy niynsã? Fo n wilgd sẽn be-b tẽng zugã noy niyns b sẽn na n deege? 
Job38:34 Fo sã n tees saagã n tãse, na sek tɩ sa-koom kiigi?" 
Job38:35 Yaa foo n tʋmd sa-tãsa tẽnga? Yaa f sẽn bool-ba la b leokda: «Ad tõnd wooo! Tõnd la f rat bɩ?» 
Job38:36 Ãnna soab n kõ kʋɩl-pesg yam, ãnd n kɩt tɩ no-raoog tar pʋtẽere?" 
Job38:37 Ãnna n tõe n sõd sawatã neere, n kɩll yĩngri ko-yũusã tɩ b raag b koom," 
Job38:38 tɩ wubsga lebg begdo, tɩ tãndaga boogdẽ?" 
Job38:39 Fo n baood rɩɩb n kõt gɩgemd yãang bɩ? Foo n yiisd a kamba kom," 
Job38:40 kamb niyns sẽn wũg b gãasẽ la sẽn sor-b tuudẽ wã bɩ? 
Job38:41 Gãoobg rɩɩb yita ãnna nugẽ tɩ yẽ paam n kõt a kamba, b sẽn wat n tees Wẽnd n yãbdã, koma sẽn wat n yilimd b nenga?" 
Job39:1 Fo mii tãmsa zut bʋʋsã sẽn dogd wakat ning bɩ? La fo zoe n wʋma b sẽn kũmd dogem bɩ? 
Job39:2 B pʋga kaoosda kiis a wãna? Wakat bʋg la b rogda? 
Job39:3 Ad-b yĩgimdidame n doge, n wẽneg n vʋʋs ne toogo." 
Job39:4 B kamba wɩsgdame, b pãnga wat n paasame tɩ b ka tol n yãend põnegr ye, la b wat n looga b sẽn datẽ n bas b ma." 
Job39:5 Ãnna n bas burgumdi t'a saad a yam? Ãn n kõt bõan-wɛɛg soog-m-menga? 
Job39:6 M dɩka zĩ-peela n kõ-a tɩ lebg a na-tẽnga. 
Job39:7 A toog ka be ne tẽng pʋgẽ bʋrg ye. Bõan-kɩɩm ka be n na n yaal-a ne a guug ye. 
Job39:8 A vɛɛsda tãmsã n baood a wãbr zĩiga, n baood yam maasa menga sẽn tõe n paam bilfr bal zĩig ninga." 
Job39:9 We-naaf na sak n yɩ f sõangda, a na sak tɩ f loe a bãgrẽ yʋngo," 
Job39:10 f na moadg-a t'a ko pʋʋgo, a na leb fo poorẽ n saremd kaalma?" 
Job39:11 Fo na teeg a pãngã n dɩk f tʋʋma fãa n bas ne-a? 
Job39:12 Fo na yet tɩ f bas-a-la ne f kooda tall n taas f zakẽ, n bas-a ne wʋk n sui baoorẽ?" 
Job39:13 Naneong tara pɩgsa, la dũni na yiki, t'a pa tol n yɩk wa kʋɩl-pesgo bɩ raong ye!" 
Job39:14 A basda a gɛla tẽnga, tɩ tẽngã tʋʋlem wek-ba." 
Job39:15 A yĩmdame tɩ naoor tõe n tabg-b lame, la we-rũng tõe n wʋk-b lame." 
Job39:16 A tara a kamba toogo wala ka yẽ kamb ye, a ka zoet a naonga na n wa yɩ zaalem ye." 
Job39:17 Bala Wẽnd mong-a-la yam, b pa kõ-a tags wok ye." 
Job39:18 La a sã n yik n na n kʋɩ tĩiga a laada wed raoog ne a wed-dʋʋda. 
Job39:19 Yaa foom n kõt weef sũ-keelem bɩ, bɩ foom n ningd a yubla gɛde?" 
Job39:20 Fo tõe t'a yɩk wala sʋʋre; a sã n kelem, rabeem yõkda neb fãa." 
Job39:21 A yɛsa tãnga pennẽ n tibd ne pãnga; a wʋm zabr rãamde, a zoet n dabdame." 
Job39:22 A toog ka be ne rabeem ye, a sũur me ka kiusd ye, sʋʋg ka wõogd t'a targ ye." 
Job39:23 Lok kaglemda a zugu, n paas kãnd sẽn yãgd la kãn-dibga." 
Job39:24 A yɛsame t'a yĩnga tõsbdẽ t'a na n ning tĩiga, baorgo sã n peebe, a ka le tõe n yaas ye." 
Job39:25 Sã n peeb fãa, a kelemdame: Ẽee, ẽee! A rɩkda zabra yũug al yɩɩga, a wʋmda tãnsoaben-dãmba tãsga la b bʋʋre." 
Job39:26 Wɩbg kõbd sẽn pusd to-to wã, fo n wilg-a yam kãnga? A sã n yɛdga a pɩgsã n dɩɩmd wĩntoogo, foo n wilg-a rẽ?" 
Job39:27 Fo n kot panantugri noor t'a yɩk n kul yĩngri, n tɩ maan a tʋko?" 
Job39:28 A gãag zĩig yaa pĩig zugu, a zaoo pĩ-sɩlenga, ned sẽn ka tõe n taẽ." 
Job39:29 A zaoo be n gẽesd a rɩɩbo, t'a nin tõe n long n tɩ ne rɩɩbã al sẽn zãrẽ." 
Job39:30 A kamba rɩɩb yaa zɩɩm bala. Dɩgre sẽn be zĩig ninga, be la a be." 
Job40:1 Soaala boola a Zoob n yeel-a: 
Job40:2 Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba zabd-n-taaga tara bũmb n na n paas bɩ? Sẽn tara goam pererr ne Wẽnda ket n tara leokr bɩ? 
Job40:3 T'a Zoob me na n yeele: 
Job40:4 Soaala pãnga yɩɩda maam, woto wã m leokdame tɩ bõe? Mam sẽn tõe marsã, yaa m pĩ noor bala." 
Job40:5 M zoe n gomame, m kõn leb n paas ye, m zoe n leoka naoor a yiibu, m kõn le tõog ye." 
Job40:6 Wẽnnaam zĩnda sa-raooga pʋgẽ n yeel a Zoob: 
Job40:7 Sẽbg f kall kẽnkẽ wa gãndaoogo. M na n sok-f lame tɩ f vẽneg-ma. 
Job40:8 Fo ratame tɩ b le maneg n sɩng bʋʋdã, tɩ b mong maam bʋʋm n kõ-foom." 
Job40:9 Fo kanga tara Wẽnnaam kanga pãng bɩ, fo koɛɛga tõe n tãsa wala Wẽnnaam dẽnna?" 
Job40:10 Aya! Bao naam la ziir n yeelge, yãg ne pãng la neerem." 
Job40:11 Bas tɩ f sũurã puugi, gẽen wilg-m-meng rãmba tɩ b zug sulgi." 
Job40:12 Gẽen zẽk-m-meng soaba n sik-a, tab nin-wẽns n beds zĩig pʋgẽ bala." 
Job40:13 Naag b fãa n bus tomẽ, kɩt tɩ b mum b noor bʋg-tẽnga." 
Job40:14 Dẽ marsã la m menga na n pẽg-fo, fo nuga pãng sẽn kɩt tɩ f maan daooda yĩnga." 
Job40:15 Ges Rũn-bãnd a Beemot, maam n naan-a wala m sẽn naan fooma. A wãbda yamdo wa naafo." 
Job40:16 Ges pãng ning sẽn be a kɩgbẽ, ges a pʋga gĩin sẽn wɩk wɩkr ninga." 
Job40:17 A nakda a zʋʋrã wala kʋk willi, a gɛyã gĩina kẽe taaba wa pãnenga." 
Job40:18 A kõaba keelem, zũud dẽnna, a sĩ-bi wã, kut sẽn toos ne zãar." 
Job40:19 M bõn-naandsa fãa sʋka, yẽ la m nand n yɩɩda maam bal a Naanda la a zoeta." 
Job40:20 Dẽ la tãmsa me kõn dɩlg-a, b kõn dɩlg-a ne bũmb a to tɩ ka yamd ye. Pʋ-weesa rũms reemd n gilgd-a lame." 
Job40:21 A gãee mugnusa tẽngre, a sora bãada moodẽ." 
Job40:22 Mugnusã n kõt-a maasem kʋɩlga yɩlsa sʋk la a vʋʋsda. 
Job40:23 Kʋɩlga koom rat bɩ a yik n vũ, ad-y a ka tol n yɛɛsdẽ ye, Zʋrdẽ koom lim-a n tãag a noora me, ad-y a ka bʋʋd ye. Sẽn noom-a la rẽ." 
Job40:24 A pukda a nina n getẽ tɩ f yõk-a wãn-wãna? N yãend ra-sɩleng yɛ n vʋdg a yõore? 
Job40:25 Ges koomẽ rũn-toaaga a Leviatã, fo yõkd-a-la ne lɛoog bɩ, f lɛooga kõsda a zelemd bɩ?" 
Job40:26 Fo na n vʋdga a yõ-bogdã ne susutga bɩ f poogda yeera ne bãn-sɩlenga? 
Job40:27 Foo la a na n kudg a kãntɩɩga la a gom ne f gom-noodo? 
Job40:28 A na sak tɩ yãmb sed ne taaba, t'a lebg f sõgne, a vɩɩm zãnga?" 
Job40:29 Fo na sak n deem ne-a wa luiil sẽn ka yẽna, f na loe-a ne wĩir n kõ f kom-pugli tɩ b reemd ne-a?" 
Job40:30 Koos rãmb na sũ taab n wa kẽes-a raaga? Raadba na pas-a nemdã n weele? 
Job40:31 Fo na po a gãongã ne pɛɛma, la f na vʋdg a zug ne kãnd bɩ?" 
Job40:32 Tik a ne nug bala: fo na yẽ maoore, fo kõn le mak yɛs ye." 
Job41:1 Da belg f meng a taoor ye, n yet tɩ rabeem ka ye, bala a nif gẽeneg meng seka lʋɩɩse." 
Job41:2 Ãnd n na n puk a gẽemdo n maan bũmb n yik a sũuri? La ãnda n na n puk a gẽemdo n yɩɩda, n maand no-koeemd ne maam, Naaba-Wẽnde?" 
Job41:3 Ãnna samd la m dɩ yã, n tog n bao n lebse? Sẽn be saaga tẽngr fãa yaa maam n so." 
Job41:4 M ka na n sĩnd n ka gom a Leviatã yĩnga wils yell ye. M kõn sĩnd n ka gom a pãngã la fuug ninga sẽn lud a poor wa kuta ye. 
Job41:5 Ãnna n tõog n lak fuug ninga sẽn lud a yãoogã? Ãn n saag n kẽ a yɛga pʋgẽ? 
Job41:6 Ãnna n modg-a t'a yaag a noorã yalengo n wilgd a yẽn-daada sẽn sel n gilgã? Pɛlen-yɩk bala la a yẽna! 
Job41:7 A poorã yaa wa kut gãnd n pʋglem taaba, n maneg n sũg wa kur dẽnna." 
Job41:8 Gãnda sũga taaba tɩ pemsem meng ka tõe n kẽ ye. 
Job41:9 Paoko n tablg paoko tɩ fãa tabend n naag taaba, n ka tõe n welg lɛ-lɛ." 
Job41:10 A Leviatã tĩsga yaa bug-pãrse, a nina mooga wa sõore." 
Job41:11 A noorã yiisda bug-zɩlemse, la bug-pãrs yɩgdame n yita." 
Job41:12 A yõ-bogdã nukda bug-zõose, wa rubl bɩ bugum-dʋk sẽn yiisd a waolgo." 
Job41:13 A vʋʋsem widigda bug-saala, tɩ bug-zɩlemse yit a noorẽ." 
Job41:14 A yubla pida ne pãnga, tɩ sẽn yɛs a taoor digd dabeem." 
Job41:15 A yubla gãong luunda yalengo, a tẽname n lebg weoglgo." 
Job41:16 A kʋɩɩsa a sũura wa kugri, wala neguug kugri." 
Job41:17 A sã n doog a nenga, pãn-dãmba meng zoetame. Dabeem kɩtdame tɩ b kʋɩ tĩiga." 
Job41:18 Sʋʋg tat-a lame n ka kẽ ye, la kãnde, kãn-bila, kʋɩ tĩiga, fãa makd n kongame." 
Job41:19 Sã n ya ne-yẽ, kut yaa moogo, tɩ kud-kɛgeng ya wa ra põosgo." 
Job41:20 Lok pĩim ka tõe t'a wudg ye. A reegda loaabg kugri wa a reega mo-paoko. 
Job41:21 A reegda guugu wa katrefeoogo, a laada kãnd sẽn dĩmdi." 
Job41:22 A tẽngr pagda peesa wa wãgse, a sã n tũ kʋɩl-waoko a bẽesd-a lame n dɩgle." 
Job41:23 A kɩtame tɩ bog-zulunga kɛɛd wa rʋko, tɩ Mogre lebg tɩdar wisb sare." 
Job41:24 A basda a vuri, a poorẽ, la woto mogra pelgda ne puudu." 
Job41:25 Tẽng zug ka a to ka ye, m naan-a lame n kõ a sũ-keelem." 
Job41:26 A ka kamsd a nif bɛ ba a ye taoor ye, yẽ la rũn-toosa fãa naaba." 
Job42:1 A Zoob leoka Naaba-Wẽnd woto: 
Job42:2 Mam mi tɩ bũmb ka be y sẽn ka tõe n maan ye, y tõe n maana y sẽn tagsd fãa!" 
Job42:3 M ba bõe n sãbsd Wẽnd sẽn gũud dũni wã to-to n yaool n ka mi ba fɩ wã? M saag n goma m sẽn ka mi, sẽn yɩɩd-ma, tɩ yɛl kãens wʋmb le lebg toog n paase,"
