Job42:4 Y ra yet-m lame: kelg la f bas tɩ m gome, bas tɩ m sok-f tɩ f na leoke." 
Job42:5 Ad-y m sẽn da mi yãmb poorẽ, yaa b sẽn gom tɩ lʋɩ m tʋbrẽ bala la marsã, mam nin yãe-y lame." 
Job42:6 Woto wã m lebsda m noore m deegda m kongre la m sulga m menga, m faoola m menga n zĩ tomẽ la tompɛglemẽ." 
Job42:7 B sẽn gom ne a Zoob n sɛ, Wẽnd yeela Tema raoa, a Elifaz: «M sũur puuda ne foom la f tũud-n-taasã, tɩ yãmb pa togs sɩd mam poorẽ wala a Zoob ye." 
Job42:8 Dẽ yĩnga, bao-y lols a yopoe la pe-raad a yopoe, n bʋʋg a Zoob. Yãmb na n maana yũ-noog maoongo, a Zoob na n pʋʋsa y yĩnga; m na n deega a Zoob pʋʋsgã, m kõn dig yãmb n yiis m taoore ne y sẽn pa gom m yell neere wala rao kãngã.»" 
Job42:9 Tema raoa, a Elifaz, Suwa raoa, a Bildad, Naamat rao, a Sofar tɩ maana wala Wẽnd sẽn wilg-bã. Wẽnd maan-b-la sugri, a Zoob yĩnga." 
Job42:10 A Zoob sẽn yõk sɛɛg a tũud-n-taasa yĩngã, Wẽnd lebsa a Zoob a pĩnd paoongã naoor a yiibu." 
Job42:11 A saam-biisi, kom-dibli la kom-pugli n paas sẽn da mi-ba a Zoob, wa-la a nengẽ n wa ges-a. B ra naaga taab n dɩtẽ, la yĩn-sirg ra tar-b lame, la b ra maagda a sũuri, t'a ra yãee toog Wẽnd nengẽ. Ned kam fãa kõ-a-la ligdi, la sãnem nug bĩnga." 
Job42:12 Wẽnd barka siga a Zoob zug n yɩɩg pĩnda. A paama piis tus piig la a naase, yʋgma tus a yoobe, niis tus a yi, bõn-yãans tusri." 
Job42:13 A paama kom-dibli a yopoe, kom-pugli a tãabo." 
Job42:14 Bi-pugl a ye pʋdame tɩ Walle: a to wã: a Yp-neere, a to wã: a Kirʋ." 
Job42:15 B pa yãend tẽnga pʋgẽ pagb sẽn ya neer wala a Zoob kom-pugli wã ye. B ba naag-b-la ne a kom-dibli wã n pʋɩ-ba a paoongo. 
Job42:16 Wẽnd sẽn mak a Zoob poore, b sẽn fɛɛs-a wã poore, a vɩɩnda yʋʋm koabg la pis-naase. A yãe-la a yagense, la a yagen-tʋbra-kẽese." 
Job42:17 A Zoob waa n kiime, n pid ne yʋʋma la raare. Tɛk la tɛka!" 
Psalms1:1 Zu-noog soaba la ned ning sẽn ka kelgd nin-yood saglse, n ka rɩkd so goalenga la a ka sõsd ne sẽn nong-a a taab laado." 
Psalms1:2 Sẽn noom nin-sõng yaa Soaala noorã, la rẽ la a bʋgsd wĩntoog la yʋngo." 
Psalms1:3 A wẽnda tɩɩg sẽn sel kʋɩlg noore, n womd a biisi, a wakato, t'a vãad ka tol n sʋʋgdẽ ye. Nin-sõng sẽn sɩng fãa baasda neere," 
Psalms1:4 la bada, ka woto ne sẽn ka mi-b Wẽnda ye! Sẽn ka mi-b Wẽndã, bãng ka-fɩɩba sobg sẽn dɩk n looda." 
Psalms1:5 Bʋʋda raare nin-yooda zug kõn zẽk ye, nin-sõma wã lageng zĩigẽ, nin-wẽnsa me zug kõn doog ye." 
Psalms1:6 Soaala mii nin-sõma wã sore, a yaa tɩrga, la nin-wẽnsa sor bʋta moogo." 
Psalms2:1 Bõe tɩ zamaana yik n kɩrda? Bõe tɩ b yik n tar bʋrbʋre? 
Psalms2:2 Dĩm dãmb yẽsda b yẽsgo, kombɛɛmba sũuda taab n na tak zabre n na n zab ne Soaala la b sẽn tʋm a soabã." 
Psalms2:3 Woto la b gomda: «D kao bãeensã la wĩirã, n fugumd n yi b soolmẽ!»" 
Psalms2:4 Sẽn dɩt-a naam yĩngra pusga laado, b laad-b-la a yeyn-ye." 
Psalms2:5 La wa n lebga mo-beedo la sũ-puuri, tɩ b na n sɩng yɛɛsgo." 
Psalms2:6 B yeelame: «Maam n yãk m dĩm n kõ-a naam. M vigla a naama Siõ, m tãn-sõnga zugu.»" 
Psalms2:7 Wẽnd sẽn togsa la m na n moone. La woto la Soaala togs-m: «Fo yaa m Biiga; maam n dog-foo rũnna! 
Psalms2:8 Yaag f noor n kos-ma tɩ m na dɩk bu-zẽmba zãng n kõ-fo, f naama sɩngda dũni wã sẽn sɩngdẽ n wa baas a sẽn baasdẽ." 
Psalms2:9 Kut door la m na n kõ-fo, tɩ pãbr wʋm-ba, f pãbd-b lame n bõgse wa yagd laoko.»" 
Psalms2:10 Dɩlla, dĩm dãmba, bao-y yam sõng n kõ y menga Bas-y tɩ b sagl yã, dũni wã bʋ-kaoodba!" 
Psalms2:11 Noog-y y sũuri la y waoog Soaalã, sulg-y meng bãmb taoor ne rigbu." 
Psalms2:12 Sak-y n deeg b zãmsgo. Ad-y b sũura sã n puugi, y yaa bõne; la b sũura tõe n wa yika vugr bala. Zu-noog soaba la sẽn na n soond-a bãmba!" 
Psalms3:1 A Daviid yɩɩla woto a sẽn waa n zoet a Absalom taoore. 
Psalms3:2 Soaala, ad-y m bɛɛba sõor labsa b yika ka tɛka n na n zab ne maam," 
Psalms3:3 b yika zembala n wẽenẽ: «A yell sɛɛ zãng a Wẽnda taoore!» 
Psalms3:4 La yãmba, m Soaala, yãmb la m gãongo, la m ziir la zu-zẽkre." 
Psalms3:5 M teesa m Soaala n kelemd ne pãnga, la b zĩnda b tãn-sõnga zug n leok-ma." 
Psalms3:6 Woto m sẽn gãande, gõeem sakame. M nekame n mik tɩ b ket n gũuda b yamba." 
Psalms3:7 Bɛɛba sẽn gũbga sõor ka tɛk ye la mam nengẽ rabeem buud ka ye. 
Psalms3:8 Yiki-y yã, Soaala! Fãag-y-ma, m Wẽnde! Bɩ m bɛ fãa yeer deeg toogo, la nin-yooda yẽn sʋʋg zãnga." 
Psalms3:9 Fãagra na n yi-la Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ. Bɩ b barka sig b buudã! 
Psalms4:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab kɩtdame tɩ kʋnd la ruuds naag n wãagdẽ. 
Psalms4:2 M sã n bool-y bɩ y leok-ma tɩ yãmb la m Wẽnd la m bʋ-kaooda! M sẽn paam toog la yɩɩr daare, y fãag-m lame; zoe-y m nimbãanega la y reeg m kosgo!" 
Psalms4:3 Ninsaalb kamba, y na n kell n basa m ziira waoogre n pʋgd pemsem la zirẽ-beedo?" 
Psalms4:4 Ad-y Soaala bao zĩiga n bĩng b noanga, woto m sã n bool-ba b kelgdame." 
Psalms4:5 Ba y sũura sã n yiki bɩ y ra kẽ moog ye. Pam-y tags sõma y gãag zugu, da bas-y tɩ bũmb yɛɛs-y ye." 
Psalms4:6 Kɩs-y b sẽn wilg-y maoong ninga la y bas sẽn kella ne Wẽnde.

Psalms4:9 Bũmb sẽn pa paoog-m yĩnga, m gõeem sakd-m lame. Soaala yĩnga, m zãra ne rabeem buud faa." 
Psalms5:1 Yɩɩla naab sebrẽ la yɩɩlla be, la yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩn-kãnga yɩɩndame tɩ wɩɩs peebdẽ." 
Psalms5:2 Soaala, kelg-y m koɛɛga, wʋm-y m wõosgo;" 
Psalms5:3 kelg-y m koɛɛga, m yãbra lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ, m dĩm la m Wẽnde, tɩ yaa y sɛɛg la m yõkda." 
Psalms5:4 Y kelgda m koɛɛga yibeoogo la yibeoogo m segenda m kũuni, n gũudẽ!" 
Psalms5:5 Yãmb pa Wẽnd sẽn sakd wẽng ye, nin-yoog ka tar zĩig y sɛɛgẽ ye." 
Psalms5:6 Goam põaas soab ka wat y taoore, y kisa yel-wẽn-maandba fãa," 
Psalms5:7 y menesda zirẽ-be-rãmba, soey! Y menesda zãmb soaba la sẽn daagd-a a taab zɩɩm; Wẽnd sẽn kis la bãmb dãmba, Wẽnd yãka b bark zãnga." 
Psalms5:8 Soaala sẽn ket n nong-m yĩnga, ad-m sẽn kẽed b zakẽ, ad-m sẽn wõg ne waoogre tɩ m neng tees b ro-sõngo." 
Psalms5:9 Soaala, y sõmblema sor la m dat n dɩke, sõng-y tɩ m da rɩk m bɛɛba zak sor ye." 
Psalms5:10 Sɩd ka be b noorẽ ye, b pida ne wẽnem bal n kẽnda; b yaaga b kokora wa yaoogo, b gom yã, b gãnegda bẽdgo la salse." 
Psalms5:11 Soaala, bao-y sɩbgre n sɩbg-ba, bas-y tɩ b bẽdga lɛɛg n yõk-ba; b tʋʋm yooda yĩnga, pĩng-y-ba, b sẽn zẽkd b zug ne yãmba yĩnga, rig-y-ba." 
Psalms5:12 Sẽn dɩk-b yɛla fãa n bas ne yãmbã, bãmb fãa langda ne sũ-noogo. B sũ-nooga yaa b sẽn mi tɩ y kogend-b lame. Bas-y tɩ sẽn nong-b yãmba kaas b sũ-noogo." 
Psalms5:13 Soaala, yãmb n pidsd nin-sõng ne barka; yãmb nonglma lebga a gãongo, n kokd bɛɛb pɛɛm." 
Psalms6:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle; a bee yɩɩla naab me sebrẽ; yɩɩnda ne pɛndg buudu. 
Psalms6:2 Sɩbg-y-ma, Soaala, la ra yɩ ne sũ-puur ye. Sɩbg-y-ma la ra tũ ne sũ-fõor ye."

Psalms7:3 Y ka wa, b na n kodg-m-la wa bõnyẽese, y mi tɩ b sã n bri, reegd ka ye." 
Psalms7:4 Soaala-Wẽnde, m sã n maana wala n bola m nug ned zɩɩmẽ," 
Psalms7:5 n zãmb m zoa, n bas m bɛ t'a põse," 
Psalms7:6 bɩ m bɛ me rig-m n yõke, a me nao tab-m n kʋ, a bilim m zuga tomẽ n ning-m yãnde!" 
Psalms7:7 Yik yã, Soaala, puug-y y sũuri la y wõd m bɛɛbã, yals-y m sɛɛgẽ tɩ y sẽn togsa la d fãa tog n tũ."

Psalms7:10 Da bas-y tɩ nin-wẽnsa wẽnem le kẽng taoor ye. Le pids-y nin-sõng ne raoodo! Ned ninga sẽn tara ninsaal buka, yaa yãmb bala Soaala, bʋʋd tɩrg soaba."

Psalms7:12 Bʋʋd tɩrg soaba la Wẽnde, la d tog n maana rabeem beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms7:13 Nin-wẽng sã n ka tuubd a wẽnem, la bãmb me sẽn saasd b sʋʋga la b dõos b tãp n delle." 
Psalms7:14 B paka b kudgu n na n kud pɛɛm la yaa pɛɛm sẽn kʋʋde, sẽn yõogd wa bug vɩlenga." 
Psalms7:15 Wẽng rɩkda pʋga n tẽed biiga, mik fɩ ka na n dog ye." 
Psalms7:16 F tuuda bok n maneg n zulg-a, mik fo meng n na n lʋɩ a pʋgẽ." 
Psalms7:17 Fo sẽn da rat f to ne wẽng ningã n lɛɛgd n dɩ-fo, pãn-tõog ning f sẽn da rat n maan f taabã, pãng kãng n lɛɛgd n yẽeg-fo." 
Psalms7:18 M kõn vʋʋs ne Soaala-Wẽnd bark pʋʋsgo tɩ b sõmblema ka be taar ye, m na kils yĩngr Soaala yʋʋre." 
Psalms8:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle; yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Bugsuntunga biis yɩɩlle. 
Psalms8:2 D Soaala-Wẽnnaam, y yʋʋra sãdame, a gilga tẽnga zãng fãa; la yĩngr dãmba fãa kilda y ziiri." 
Psalms8:3 Kom-bõonego, kom-peelsa noore zoe n tara y pẽgre. Rẽ yaa lalg la b zẽk bɛɛba taoore, bɛɛb tɛk yaa b noor mudi la b vel b beem." 
Psalms8:4 M sã n get saaga sẽn ya y nug tʋʋmde, m sã n get kiuuga la ãdsã y sẽn yagle"

Psalms9:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle; yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yɩɩnda wa biig kʋʋre. 
Psalms9:2 Soaala, m na n pʋʋs-y-la bark ne m sũur fãa, m na n moona y tʋʋm-bãna." 
Psalms9:3 Y saoolg-m-la sũ-noog saooga la m kilsda y yʋʋre, yĩngr Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms9:4 Ges-y m bɛɛba sẽn lɛɛg n zoetẽ, ad b sẽn lʋɩt la b kiid y taoore," 
Psalms9:5 la rẽ yaa y sẽn bʋ m bʋʋda neerã, yaa y sẽn sak n zaond y bʋʋd tɩrsa goeela zugu." 
Psalms9:6 Y yeela bu-zẽmba tɩ b maan gũusgu, tɩ y ra wa kʋ-b ye, n menes b yʋʋr moog ye." 
Psalms9:7 Bɛ wã lʋɩ zãnga, a kõn le yik ye, yãmb sarma tẽnse tɩ b pa le tẽr b yʋʋr meng ye." 
Psalms9:8 Soaala la rĩm, beoog sẽn wate, b maneg n vigla b goeel n na n kao bʋʋdo." 
Psalms9:9 B geta dũni wã ne zemsgo, n zãad ãndũni rãmb wa sẽn toge." 
Psalms9:10 Bɩ b sẽn namsd b rãmba tɩ sool bãmba, n sool bãmba n tɩlg pɛta." 
Psalms9:11 Yɩ-y sẽn mi-b yãmba teegda, yãmb zɩ n bas sẽn baood-b yãmb ye, Soaala!" 
Psalms9:12 Bɩ d pʋd yɩɩlle n pẽg sẽn dɩt-a naam Siõ, d kils b tʋʋm bãna bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ!" 
Psalms9:13 Sẽn daag-a zɩɩm la Wẽnd pʋgda la bãng-y tɩ b pʋtẽer wogma, b sẽn mi, b kõn nams n soke: «Ãnda la b kʋʋd t'a kelemd woto?»" 
Psalms9:14 Zoe-y m nimbãanega, Soaala, ges-y m bɛɛba sẽn paoogd maam to-to; yãmb sẽn tõe n zãag-m ne kũuma," 
Psalms9:15 zãag-y-m tɩ m paam n pẽg y yʋʋr, Siõ tẽn-sõng pʋgẽ la m kɩdem m sẽn paam y fãagra sũ-noogo." 
Psalms9:16 B sẽn zulg bok ningã, be la bɛɛba sig yã. Bẽdg ning b sẽn da maneg n solgã, n paam n kolemd b nao." 
Psalms9:17 Soaala bʋ-la b bʋʋdo n wilg yɛla sẽn yɛsẽ; la yaa nin-wẽngã n lʋɩ a meng bẽdgẽ. 
Psalms9:18 Bɩ bʋg-tẽng leb n deeg a soolem, sẽn yĩm-b Soaala fãa leb zĩ-kãnga." 
Psalms9:19 Bada, Wẽnd kõn yĩm a-ka-neng soab yell ye, nimbãan-dãmba saagr kõn pa n ka pids ye." 
Psalms9:20 Aya, m Soaala, bɩ ninsaal da maan daood ye! Yals-y bu-zẽmbã y taoore, y bʋʋda zĩigẽ." 
Psalms9:21 Wilg-y-ba y pãnga n yɛɛs-ba; wilg-y-b tɩ b pãnga teka ninsaal pãngẽ. 
Psalms10:1 Bõe tɩ y maan wa y zãra ne-do, Soaala, n solgd y meng d pɛta wakato?" 
Psalms10:2 Ad-y yaa a toog-ka-be-ne-Wẽnd soaba tɩtaama n yaand nimbãan-dãmbã. A toog-ka-ne-Wẽnde n tusd-b n lubd a bẽdgẽ. 
Psalms10:3 A tusd n lubame n tẽed t'a maana raoodo, a raaba sã n yaool n pidsi, ka Wẽnd la a pʋʋsd barka, yaa Wẽnd la a lɛɛg n laadẽ." 
Psalms10:4 A toog-ka-ne-Wẽnd pida ne yamsekre, A sẽn ka le baood Wẽndã, wã bal n be a noorẽ: «Wẽnd ka ye!» La rẽ sek-a lame." 
Psalms10:5 Yaa wa a raaba pidsda wakat buud fãa, la wa yãmb sẽn leokd bũmb ning yĩngrã zãra ne a wʋmbo, dẽ la a kẽnd n sẽoosdẽ la pursdẽ." 
Psalms10:6 Woto la a gomd a sũurẽ: «M paam n kɩɩ yẽgna, yel-beed buud kõn tol n pak-m ye.»" 
Psalms10:7 A noora pida ne kãab beedo, a raaba yaa tudg m to la m maan-a pãnga, a zelemd sẽn gomd yaa a zãmbã la a tʋʋm yoodã." 
Psalms10:8 Tẽn-bõonesa noorẽ la soondeda, n maneg n solg n na n kʋ ned sẽn ka yelle, ka võor dãmba la a gũusda." 
Psalms10:9 A maneg n solga a tʋgrẽ n gũusd wa bõnyẽega, a sorame n na n bri zu-bʋk soaba; f lʋɩ a bẽdgẽ, t'a vu n looge." 
Psalms10:10 Ad-a sẽn sore, ad-a sẽn vũnumdi n na n yɩk ne a pãng fãa n lʋɩ n yẽege." 
Psalms10:11 A bee tẽngr n maane: «Wẽnd yĩmame, tõnd solga b nini, b ka ne fɩ.»" 
Psalms10:12 Yik-y yã, Soaala, zẽk-y y nugu, da yĩm-y nimbãan-dãmba yell ye!" 
Psalms10:13 Pʋs n yaa bõe yĩnga la a toog-ka-ne-Wẽnd laad Wẽnd la a yetẽ: «B na n yi n gẽes-m-la yɛɛnẽ?» 
Psalms10:14 A yĩmame bal tɩ y yãenda a tʋʋm yoogã la a sẽn wa ne naong ninga, a yĩmame tɩ y kolda bũmb fãa, a yĩmame tɩ ka yõod soab teega yãmba, a yĩmame tɩ kɩɩb rɩt mɛdga, yãmb n pʋgd n punda bɩɩm." 
Psalms10:15 Yik-y yã, Soaala, n menes a toog-ka-ne yãmb dãmba! Tɩ y sã n wa yik n baood-b ne b zɩtma bɩ y ra yãend fɩ ye." 
Psalms10:16 Wẽnd n so naam beoog sẽn wate: nin-dẽgdã kõn le kell y soolmẽ ye. 
Psalms10:17 Soaala, yãmb deega a ka mi zẽk-m-meng kosgo, n kengd a sũuri, yãmb yoogda y tʋbre n kelgdẽ," 
Psalms10:18 woto kɩɩb-bil la ka neng soaba lebda b zakẽ ne b bʋʋm, woto me la y na n sɛɛs tẽng zugu zãmb la pãn-tõog buud fãa." 
Psalms11:1 Yɩɩla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. M Soaala la m sool yã y yɩta a wãn n le tõog n yeele: «Leb-y tãmsa zutu, lʋɩn-yirsi!»" 
Psalms11:2 Nin-wẽns rõosda b tãbdo, b yãagda b pɛɛma, n na n soos n tão nin-tɩrga," 
Psalms11:3 Sẽn da tog ne taoora la b lebs poorẽ, nin-sõng yell na n yɩɩ wãna?" 
Psalms11:4 Soaala be-la b ro-sõngẽ, Soaala naama goeel vigla yĩngri, be la b zao n getẽ, n get neba ne b tʋʋma." 
Psalms11:5 Soaala pẽgda nin-sõngo, n yaool n sãbsd nin-wẽnga la sẽn maand-a a taab pãnga." 
Psalms11:6 Yel-beed na n naga nin-wẽns wa saaga, tɩ kidibr bugum wa zom-b wa sɩlmande; bãmb me pʋɩɩr la rẽ tɩ b tugund taaba." 
Psalms11:7 Soaala pida ne zemsgo, b pẽgda nin-sõma tʋʋma; bãmb ne nin-sõma wã nens n na n tees n get taaba." 
Psalms12:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle; yɩɩla naab kɩtdame tɩ b yɩɩl ne koala la ruuds. 
Psalms12:2 Wa-y n fãag-y-do, Soaala, nin-sõng ka le ket ye, ba a ye, ninsaalba menesa b pʋ-peelem zãnga." 
Psalms12:3 B leokda taab beed bala, b mii belgr ne goama, n naag n kalemd zirẽ la sɩda." 
Psalms12:4 Bɩ Soaala wõrg zelemd fãa sẽn mi belgre la zelemd sẽn lasd tɩtaam goama," 
Psalms12:5 zelemde fãa sẽn yete: «M na gom n lubi, m tara m zab-teoogo, ãnda n le tõe-ma?»" 
Psalms12:6 Dẽ me la Soaala yeel yã: «M nee a ka-neng rãmb pɛta, la naong rãmb kɛleng lʋɩ-la m tʋbrẽ, tɩ m me vaag n yiki, n bao zĩ-sõng n solg b sẽn paoogd b rãmbã.»" 
Psalms12:7 Soaala gomd yaa vẽenega, yaa wala wanzurf sẽn yɩlg boaagẽ n le yɩlge." 
Psalms12:8 Soaala, yãmb pidsda y sẽn yeele. D tẽed tɩ y na fãag-d daar fãa ne neb a woto buudu." 
Psalms12:9 Nin-wẽnsa pida zĩig zãnga, tɩ ninsaalba tẽnga reeg zãng n pid ne wẽnem." 
Psalms13:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle; a bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. 
Psalms13:2 Soaala, nan n yaa n taa da-bʋre? Y na n yĩma m yell zãng laa? Y na n solg-m-la y nengã n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms13:3 Y na n bas-m lame tɩ m zĩ ne sũ-sãang la m bʋʋd ne m menga beoog sẽn vẽege, n ta da-bʋre? M bɛɛba na n zao n kutame n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms13:4 Ges-y tɩ m paam leokre, Soaala-Wẽnde! Bɩ y kell n bas y vẽenema t'a tʋʋs m nina ka rẽ yaa m kũuma gãag la m na n gãande;" 
Psalms13:5 la bɛ wã na paam n yeele: «M tõog-a lame!» M lʋɩsa na noog m bɛɛb sũuri. 
Psalms13:6 M sẽn mi tɩ y kãabga ka vaandã m saagda y fãagr m sũurẽ, la m sɩnga bark pʋʋsgo, y yel-sõmda yĩnga." 
Psalms14:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Gãeemsã n gomd woto: «Wẽnnaam ka ye!» Ad-y b wegmame n tʋm yɛl yoodo; sẽn maand-a neer le ka ye. 
Psalms14:2 Wẽnd zĩnda yĩngr n sulg n ges ninsaalba, b sulg n gesa yam soab sã n ketame n baood Wẽnd zĩiga." 
Psalms14:3 Mik b fãa bʋdgame n dɩk wẽng sore; sẽn maand-a neer le ka ye, a ye meng ka yãet ye." 
Psalms14:4 Dẽ la Soaala yeta: «Sẽn pʋgd-b wẽnga konga yam woto fãa laa? Bãmb n yaool n wat ne b taab nimbãanega, n zɛɛd m nebã, n gʋsd b burã n deesdẽ, n ka mi m sɛɛg yõkr ye.»" 
Psalms14:5 Bãmb n yik marsã n tar digbu n neẽ tɩ Wẽnd be-la b sɩd zĩigẽ. 
Psalms14:6 Y baood n na n sãama naong rãmba saagre, mik Soaala la b sool yã." 
Psalms14:7 Ãnda n zĩnd Siõ tãnga zug n sõng a Israyɛl t'a tõog a bɛɛba? Bõe t'a Zakoob langdẽ, bõe t'a Israyɛl pid ne sũ-noogo? Yaa Soaala sẽn lɛɛg n wat ne pa-wetã!" 
Psalms15:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala, ãnda la y na n deeg y zakẽ? Ãnda n na n pa y tãn-sõnga zugu?" 
Psalms15:2 Yaa ned ning vɩɩma sẽn tũud tɩrga, yaa sẽn tũud-a zemsgo sore, sẽn pʋgd-a sɩd ne a sũuri." 
Psalms15:3 A zelemd ka gomd yaar ye, a ka wat ne a taab bõne, a ka paoogd a taab ye." 
Psalms15:4 A mii sẽn beeg-b Soaalã n tog ne sãbsgo; a waoogda sẽn zoet-b Wẽnde. A sẽn pʋlem Wẽnd bũmb ning fãa, a pidsda a pʋlengo, ba a sã n mi t'a pʋlenga wata ne a meng bõne." 
Psalms15:5 A ka pengde n wa reeg roaglg ye, a ka reegd lagfo n bõn ned sẽn ka tar yell ye. Ned ninga sẽn vɩ-a woto vigla wa pĩiga." 
Psalms16:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Bʋkda koɛɛg n yɩɩle. Sõng-y tɩ m pa ne yãmba tɩ m soonda yãmba. 
Psalms16:2 M yeela Soaala: «Yãmb la m Wẽnde, M sũ-nooga zãng-zãng fãa la yãmba.»" 
Psalms16:3 Tẽng zug ka wẽn-naandsã, m sẽn da teeg b rãmb pãnga la m sẽn da pʋgd ne sũ-noog mengã," 
Psalms16:4 ad-y bãmb n tar neba sãoong n dabda, bãmb la neba zoet n pʋgda; wẽn-naand bãng t'a kõn le paam m rũng ye, la m noor kõn le walem a yʋʋr meng ye." 
Psalms16:5 Soaala, yãmb la m paam wa m pʋɩɩre, wa pʋɩɩr sẽn pid zãnga. M pʋlemda zãng sɩd be-la y nugẽ." 
Psalms16:6 M sẽn paam pʋɩɩr ninga noom-m lame, yẽ n be neer n yɩɩd fãa." 
Psalms16:7 M pẽgda Wẽnd ne b saglsã, ba m gãag zĩigẽ m tagsda b yelle." 
Psalms16:8 M ne-b-la m taoor wakat fãa. B zĩ-la m dɩtgo, m pa le ya bõn-lubdg ye." 
Psalms16:9 Dẽ me la m sũur nooma tɩ m sɩɩg pẽgda, tɩ m yĩng pemsd ne laafi la bãane." 
Psalms16:10 Y pa basd-m kũum soolmẽ ye, y ka basd y yamba nif meng t'a karg bog zulunga ye." 
Psalms16:11 Y sẽn wilgd-m yaa vɩɩm sore, m neng togla yãmba tɩ ya laad ne laado, m pĩir dɩgla y rɩtg tɩ m sũ-noog tõt sɛɛbo." 
Psalms17:1 A Daviid pʋʋsgo. Maan-y-m neere, Soaala, n kelg m pʋʋsgo, yoog-y y tʋb n wʋm m waasgo kelg-y m kosgo, ka zirẽ-be-ned kosg ye." 
Psalms17:2 Ges-y-m ne neng sẽn mi sugri ges-y-m ne bʋʋd tɩrg nini! 
Psalms17:3 Soaala, yãmb tɩga m sũurã, yʋng tõre y sogs-m lame, y fɛɛs-m lame n ka yãend fɩ ye, sẽn wa m yamẽ ka yi m noorẽ ye." 
Psalms17:4 La rẽ yaa m sẽn tʋlg n wẽneg ned sẽn deegd y noor sẽn togse, la m tũu sor ning y sẽn wilgi." 
Psalms17:5 Y naoor sẽn tabgẽ la m me sẽn sagl m nao, dẽ me la m pa lak bũmb ye." 
Psalms17:6 M boond-y lame, Soaala, la m miime tɩ y na n leokame. Wʋm-y m koɛɛga la reeg-y m kosgo." 
Psalms17:7 Soaala, sẽn waa n soonda yãmba, ka paad a bɛɛb nusẽ ye, tɩ y pʋgd-a-la ne y nonglem, y rɩtgã n na n wa ne a fãagre." 
Psalms17:8 Gũ-y maam tɩ m zoeta toog wa fãa-fãa n zoet toog wa nin-beelle, solg-y maam y fãagra maasmẽ," 
Psalms17:9 n tall-m n zãag ne m laoga zɛɛdba, zãag-y-m ne bɛɛba sẽn gũbg maama." 
Psalms17:10 B pida ne wakre, n kẽnda; tɩtaam goam bal la b yiisd b noorẽ." 
Psalms17:11 Ges-y b sẽn lagsd m nao, ges-y b sẽn zoe n gũbg-ma; b baood n n na n tebg-m lame n fabge." 
Psalms17:12 B wẽnda gigma, n baood n na n yĩigi, n wẽnd we-rũng sẽn sor tʋgrẽ." 
Psalms17:13 Yik-y yã, Soaala, seg-y bɛ wã, tõog-y bɛ wã! Wa-y ne y sʋʋga n fãag-ma!" 
Psalms17:14 Pĩng-y-b ne y nugu n yiis ninsaalb sʋka, yiis-b nin-vɩɩs sʋka, dũni wã pʋga! Boto n tog n yɩ b pʋɩɩra tẽng zug ka. Modg-y tɩ b reeg sɩbgr ning y sẽn bĩng-bã. Sek-ba la sek b kamba, tɩ b kees n bĩng b yagense." 
Psalms17:15 Wala sẽn yẽs n dɩgle, mam yẽ na yãend y nenga. M nin sẽn puk fãa, y nenga bal la m tar gesgo." 
Psalms18:1 Yɩɩn-kãnga bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid n gʋls-a; yɩɩ Soaala sẽn fãag-a raare ne a bɛɛbã la a Sol menga. 
Psalms18:2 A Daviid yeelame: M nong-y lame, Soaala, yãmb la m pãnga." 
Psalms18:3 Soaala yaa m pĩiga la m lilli, bãmb la m tãnsoben-doog la m fãagre, bãmb la m gãongo la m fãagr zab-teoogo." 
Psalms18:4 Bɩ Wẽnd paam pẽgre, tɩ m sẽn bool-ba b waame la m tõoga m bɛɛba." 
Psalms18:5 Kũum kolga ne a wĩ, n gũbg-ma, a kolga ne a ko-wiiga n na n ling-ma." 
Psalms18:6 Bʋg-tẽng kolga ne a wĩ n gũbg-ma, Kũum kolga ne a sʋgre n na n tiig-ma." 
Psalms18:7 M tees n kelma Wẽnd m yɩɩra pʋgẽ, m tees n bool-b lame la b zĩnda b ro-sõngẽ n wʋm m koɛɛga m koɛɛga waa n lʋɩ-la b tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms18:8 Tẽnga rigimdame tɩ tãmsa vigs b seesẽ tɩ Wẽnd sũur puugame. 
Psalms18:9 Ad-y bug-zõos n nuki, Wẽnd sũ-puurã n widg a bugum, tɩ b noora puusd bug-walem la bug saala." 
Psalms18:10 Soaala pilga saagã n sigi sawad taok la b naoora teeg n sigi. 
Psalms18:11 B looga wala b yɩk n zomba weoofo, wala b laanda ne sobg pɩgsa." 
Psalms18:12 Likẽ la b zoe n tɩ solge lik sẽn pid lik menga, sawadg sẽn pid sawadgo." 
Psalms18:13 Vẽenem n deng taoore tɩ sawadga yaool n pʋgda, n le paas sapɩlem la bug pãrse." 
Psalms18:14 Soaala zĩnda yĩngri n kũms bʋʋre, Yĩngr Pãng-Soaba tãsame tɩ sãde, tɩ sapɩlem la bug saal na n le bare." 
Psalms18:15 B sẽn yãag b tãpo, pɛɛm sẽega zĩig zãnga, saaga sẽn tãse la b sʋʋga sẽn yãg goalma." 
Psalms18:16 Ad-y kʋɩlsa koom fẽbga vugri, sẽn da be zugẽ zoe n busa tẽnga, la y tãsgã n wa ne rẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽnde! Y tĩsga n wa ne bũmb fãa zũndugri." 
Psalms18:17 Soaala zĩnda yĩngr n tʋm la b waa n yaag-m-la ko-liungẽ. 
Psalms18:18 B waa n fãag-m-la ne bɛɛb toose, bɛɛb sẽn da tãag-m yĩid ne pãnga." 
Psalms18:19 B sẽn tẽ raar ning tɩ m na n konga pãngã, baraare la Soaala yik n teeg n sõng-ma." 
Psalms18:20 B fãag-m lame, m paam n põsame, b fãag-m lame tɩ b nong-m lame." 
Psalms18:21 Soaala zã-m-la wa sẽn tog ne-ma, wala m sõmblem sẽn tog tɛka." 
Psalms18:22 M dɩka Soaala sore, n pa kɩɩs b noor ye" 
Psalms18:23 M tũ-la b soya tɩ b fãa rɩga m taoore, m ne-b lame la m pa kɩɩs ba a ye reegr ye." 
Psalms18:24 M pelga m pʋga n tũ Soaala, m modg n zãaga m meng ne wẽnga." 
Psalms18:25 B maana ne maam wa sẽn segde, wala m pʋ-peelma sẽn tog ne." 
Psalms18:26 Wẽnd pʋgda sẽn pʋgd-b bãmba, b pʋg peela ne pʋ-peen neda." 
Psalms18:27 Sẽn ka tar-a a toorẽ yelle, Wẽnd ka rat yẽ soab ne yell ye. Ned sɩlsda a wẽnem wa baafo, tɩ Wẽnd sɩls b sɩlem wa pĩim." 
Psalms18:28 Wẽnd doogda sulg-m-meng soaba, la b sulgd sẽn zẽkd b mense." 
Psalms18:29 Wẽnd maag yãmba, m naama nan ka gʋsg ye! Soaala, m Wẽnnaam, vẽnegda m lika." 
Psalms18:30 M yɩgd n gãeesda bogd ne sũ-keelem, m yɩgd n kanda lalse ne bãmb pãnga." 
Psalms18:31 Soaala sora la so-sõngo, bãmb gomd ka lʋɩt vɩʋʋgẽ ye, b kogenda sẽn baood-b bãmb zĩiga." 
Psalms18:32 Ãnda la Wẽnde, sã n ka tõnd Soaalã? Ãnda la pĩiga, sã n ka tõnd Wẽndã?" 
Psalms18:33 Bãmb n mobg-m ne b pãnga, bãmb n dems m sora tɩrga." 
Psalms18:34 Bãmb kõ-la m nao keglem wa walg rẽnna, b tol n zẽk-m lame n dʋʋs yĩngri." 
Psalms18:35 B zãmsa m nusa zab-teed zãabo, m kang rõosda kut tãbdo." 
Psalms18:36 Y gãong yĩnga m maanda raoodo, y kõ-m-la pãnga, y pʋg-m-la ne y nonglem, y zẽk-m lame n dʋʋs yĩngri." 
Psalms18:37 M kẽnd lebga faasga la m pʋs n ka le mi yaams ye. 
Psalms18:38 M pʋgd n yõgda m bɛɛba, m pa lɛɛgd n wa tɩ b ket vɩɩs ye." 
Psalms18:39 M kʋʋd-b lame n gãnege, b fãa rʋʋgda m taoore." 
Psalms18:40 Soaala yĩnga m boba zabr ne raoodo, bãmb yĩnga m bɛɛba gãnegda m taoore." 
Psalms18:41 Ad-m nug sẽn teeg b kãare, tɩ m kʋʋd-b yaare." 
Psalms18:42 B tara kɛlenga la yɛ la b fãagr na n yi? B boola Soaala la b pa leokd-b ye; 
Psalms18:43 m neem-b lame tɩ b lebg tom tɩ m dɩk n kõ yĩngr sobgo. M kãagd-b lame n lobd wa sor zug begdo. 
Psalms18:44 M neba sã n mi n yik n wulumd ne-ma, yãmb n kongd n wa fãag-ma, Soaala, yãmb kõt-m-la naam bu-zẽmba zugu, m sẽn da ka kĩ ne b rãmba, yik n kẽeda m soolmẽ." 
Psalms18:45 Sãamb waa n nok-m lame. M sã yaag m noor bala b tũudame," 
Psalms18:46 m sã n gome b basda raoodo b zoet n yi n basa b roto. 
Psalms18:47 Soaala paam pẽgre, m pĩiga soog barka! Wẽnd ninga sẽn kõt-m pãnga soog naam!" 
Psalms18:48 Bãmb n kõt-m tɩ m dokd m sũuri bãmb n kõt-m naam bu-zẽmba zugu. 
Psalms18:49 Bãmb n sõngd-m tɩ b tõe m bɛɛba, bãmb n sõngd-m tɩ m maand raoodo ne m zabd-n-taase, bãmb n fãagd-m pãn-tõog rãmb nusẽ." 
Psalms18:50 Soaala, m pẽgd-y-la bu-zẽmba sʋka, m na n yɩɩlame n kils y yʋʋrã." 
Psalms18:51 Dĩma tõe-la a bɛɛba, Wẽnd sõngda b sẽn taag a soab naam kaama, B ket n pʋgd-a-la ne b nonglem, beoog sẽn vẽege, b ket n data a Daviid buuda ne naam, zamaan ne zamaana!" 
Psalms19:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms19:2 Yĩngr teeda fãa kilsda Wẽnd ziiri, sa-gãonga reegame tɩ yãmb nug n yɛdg-a." 
Psalms19:3 Dũnna raara reegdame n togs beoog raare, tɩ rũnna yʋnga reegd n togs beoog yʋngo." 
Psalms19:4 B goama ka gom-biis n togsd bũmb ye, ka gomd tɩ koɛɛg sãt ye." 
Psalms19:5 B sẽn yaool n gʋls bũmb ninga vẽneg n dɩgame, b sẽn dat tɩ d wʋm bũmb ninga yaool n tata tẽnga tɛka. Wẽnd kula al yĩngri n bao zĩig n kõ wĩndga." 
Psalms19:6 Yibeoogo a yita a gãagẽ wa yi-kãad paalga, n baood sẽn na n wagsa ne-yẽ n kongdẽ." 
Psalms19:7 A sẽn puk kɩreng a ye, a gildame n wa kɩreng a to tɩ zĩiga reeg n wɩng zãnga." 
Psalms19:8 Soaala noor sẽn yals fãa toga ne pẽgre la a kõta vɩɩm yamleoogo; bãmb sora ka kẽesd moog ye, a lekda yam sẽn pa sãoogo." 
Psalms19:9 Soaala noora n ka tar goaleng ye, a pidsda sũur ne sũ-noogo, nora rɩga wa ko-yɩlemde, a vẽenema leooda nini." 
Psalms19:10 Zoe Soaala nif ka tar no-koeemd ye, yaa bũmb sẽn tog wakat buud fãa, Bãmb yɛsa b sɩd zug bala, b sẽn yals fãa yaa sõmbo." 
Psalms19:11 M pẽgda Soaala noorã n yɩɩd sãnem yulli, m pẽgd-a lame n yɩɩd sãnem gilgu, n yɩɩd sɩ-vak la sɩ-kaam." 
Psalms19:12 Yãmb noora la m tũuda n kẽnd vẽenemẽ, y noora tũudem pida ne yõodo, Soaala." 
Psalms19:13 Ãnda n tẽr a zaamẽ kongr zãnga? Yiis-y wẽng sẽn ket n solg m pʋgẽ, Soaala." 
Psalms19:14 Zãag-y-m ne wilg-m-meng rãmba, sõng-y tɩ m lok m toog ne bãmba, la m tõog rẽ, m põs yel-wẽnde, m tõog rẽ, m pida m sõmblem." 
Psalms19:15 Bɩ m noora goama la m sẽn walemd m sũurẽ ta y yam, m Soaala, m Pĩiga la m Sõangda!" 
Psalms20:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms20:2 Bɩ Wẽnd leok-fo f sũ beeda raare! A Zakoob Wẽnda gũ-f baraare," 
Psalms20:3 b zĩnd b ro-sõngẽ wã n tool-f b sõngre, b zĩnd Siõ n kogl-fo." 
Psalms20:4 Bɩ b tẽeg f kũuna fãa, b bas tɩ f yũ-nooga maoong ta b yam," 
Psalms20:5 n kõ-f f sẽn date la y pids-f ne f sẽn gãe n tẽede. 
Psalms20:6 Woto f bɛɛba tõogr na yãk daare, baraar d na tong d Wẽnda yʋʋr pẽgr yĩnga. Bɩ Wẽnd deegd f kosga fãa!" 
Psalms20:7 M mii marsã tɩ Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ b sẽn taag a soab ne b ka-sõngã tõog a bɛɛba gilli. B na n zĩnda b yĩngr do-sõnga pʋg n leoke n kãab-ba tɩ b rɩtg kanga yaagame n na n tʋm b pãn-tʋʋma. 
Psalms20:8 Neb kẽer teega b bilim-bilma sõore, tɩ kẽer teeg b wiida tĩiga; tõnd yẽ teega Soaala yʋʋr bala, bãmb yʋʋra bal la d boaanda." 
Psalms20:9 D ne d bɛɛba sẽn pãsd n lʋɩtẽ tɩ tõnd ket n teeg n yɛsẽ. 
Psalms20:10 Soaala, wa sõng-y dĩma t'a maan raoodo, woto la yẽ me tõogd n sõng-do, d sẽn na n bool-a raare." 
Psalms21:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms21:2 Dĩma sũur noomame tɩ y pãnga labsame. A sẽn tõog a bɛɛba pids-a-la ne sũ-noog kãsenga. 
Psalms21:3 Ad-y y pidsa a sũur daabo, y reega a sẽn yaag a noor n kose." 
Psalms21:4 Yãmb barkã n deng taoore t'a zug paam naam pugla, n fõgen." 
Psalms21:5 A sẽn kos y vɩɩm, a paamame, a paama yʋʋm sẽn tong taab wogd-wogdo." 
Psalms21:6 A sẽn tõog a bɛɛba, a ziir kula yĩngr; y yeelg-a-la ne naam la faongo." 
Psalms21:7 Y pids-a-la ne daar fãa barka. Y zĩndig-a-la y taoore t'a sũur tosd kaam. 
Psalms21:8 Dĩma teega Soaala, bɩ Yĩngr-Soaala kãabg sẽn ka vaandã, maneg n vigl a naama goeele." 
Psalms21:9 Zɩsg-y y nuga bɛɛba fãa zugu, zɩsg-y tɩ b yubla wa põde." 
Psalms21:10 Y sã n lik tɩ bɛɛba yãend y nengã, yaa wa bugum n na n dɩ ba, tɩ sɩda y sũura na n puugame la a bugma na n widg n dɩ-b lame." 
Psalms21:11 B buuda na menes baraar tẽnga zugu, baraar tɛk la b tɛka." 
Psalms21:12 B rat-y ne wẽng, n yik n maand sudum me, b kõn tõog n maan bũmb ye." 
Psalms21:13 Y lub-b-la b po-raoog zugu, la y sẽn yãag y tãpã n tees-bã, b neeme." 
Psalms21:14 Yik-y yã, Soaala, wilg-y y pãnga; tõnd me na n baoo yɩɩlle n kils y tʋʋm sõngã." 
Psalms22:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Sõor yĩsr kilsga yɩɩlle. 
Psalms22:2 Y bas-m-la bõe yĩnga, Soaala? M tara yãbre la m ket n zãra ne fãagre." 
Psalms22:3 M kɛlenga ka paamd leokr wĩntoog ye, la yʋngo gõeem ka-m ye, m Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms22:4 Yãmb yaool n pida ne sõmblem, n pid ne naam, n yaa a Israyɛl zu-zẽkre." 
Psalms22:5 D ba rãmba ra teega yãmba tɩ y wat n yolsd-b. 
Psalms22:6 B ra teesa yãmb n kelemdẽ, la y wat n fãagd-b lame, b ra teega yãmba la y ra pidsda b raabo." 
Psalms22:7 Mam yẽ lebga wa bɛdenga, n ka le wẽnd ninsaal ye; neba tara m tʋʋre, tɩ buuda lebsd-m poorẽ." 
Psalms22:8 Sẽn seg-a maam fãa tara-m laado, b laad-m lame la b tara m pursgu." 
Psalms22:9 Bãmb n gomd ne-ma tɩ m wẽnemd n ges Soaala, tɩ Soaala sẽn nong-ma, b na fãag-ma." 
Psalms22:10 Yãmb n yiis maam m ma pʋgẽ. Yãmb n gãneg-ma a yãoogẽ ne laafi. 
Psalms22:11 M sẽn wa moogo, b rɩk-m lame n gũnug yãmba. Yãmb la m Wẽnde, m dogem tɛka." 
Psalms22:12 Da pa-y yɩɩg a woto tɩ yel-beeda pẽnegame la sõangd a to ka ye. 
Psalms22:13 Lols ka tɛk n gũbg maam, Bazã rũm-nobdsã n wẽ-m gũbri." 
Psalms22:14 B yaaga b noor n tees-ma, bãng-y bõnyẽes sẽn tõosd zɛrma la b yãbda." 
Psalms22:15 M lebga ko raandem, m kõaba fãa sũgsame, m pʋgẽ, m sũura booga wa siribdu." 
Psalms22:16 M yagda sɛɛme tɩ m kʋɩ wa sa-pɛɛga, m zelemda taba m dasendaka, y zoe n bus-m-la tomẽ wa kũum." 
Psalms22:17 Baas n gũbg-ma, tɩ nin-wẽens yegd-ma, b sẽb-m-la wa bõnyẽega, b sẽba m nus la m nao," 
Psalms22:18 M tõe n sõda m kõaba fãa. Sẽn yãend-b maama tara m gesgo. 
Psalms22:19 B rɩk m futã n pʋɩt taaba b poees n bãnga ned fãa ne a zu-noogo. 
Psalms22:20 Soaala, da yals-y yɩɩg ye, yãmb la m Sõangda, maan-y tao tao." 
Psalms22:21 Zãag-y maam ne b sʋʋse, baasa zoe n gãneg-m-la b naoẽ n gusda." 
Psalms22:22 Fãag-y maam bõnyẽesa noorẽ, we-niisa yɩɩl da tã-m ye; la y bark tɩ y reega m kosgo!" 
Psalms22:23 M na n le kilsa y yʋʋr m saam-biisa taoore, m na n le yika kʋʋnga sʋka n pẽg yãmba." 
Psalms22:24 Yãmb fãa sẽn zoet Soaala, pẽg-y-ba! Yãmb fãa, a Zakoob yagense, pẽg-y-ba, yãmb fãa, a Israyɛl buudu, zoe-y-ba." 
Psalms22:25 B zɩ n zãgs nimbãan-ned kelgr ye, b zɩ n wẽnemd b nenga kɛɛng ye, d kelemsa lʋɩta b tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms22:26 M sẽn pẽgd yaa yãmb bala, yãmb bal la m kilsd kʋʋnga sʋka, la yaa sẽn zoet-b yãmba fãa taoore la m na n pids m pʋlengo." 
Psalms22:27 Naong rãmb dɩta b yam, sẽn baood-b Soaala tara b pẽgre; la woto la b gomda: «Wẽnd na pids y vɩɩma zãnga!»" 
Psalms22:28 Tẽnga gill na n maana tẽegre, n le lɛɛg n wa kẽ a Soaala, dũni ninsaalba na n lɛɛge n wa wõgemd Soaala taoore." 
Psalms22:29 Naam toga ne Wẽnde, n tog ne bu-zẽmba Soaala!" 
Psalms22:30 Tẽnga pãn-dãmbã na n wõgemdame, sẽn ya-a bõn-kiidg fãa na n wõgemda Wẽnd b ye bal taoore." 
Psalms22:31 Sẽn ki-a basda buudu, a buudã n na n zãms a zamaana rãmba tɩ bãmb me kẽ Soaalã." 
Psalms22:32 Bãmb me na wilg zamaana sẽn pʋgdã Soaala tʋʋma sẽn tʋm ne zemsgã, la zemsg tʋʋm n sɩd tʋme." 
Psalms23:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala la mam gũuda menga la bũmb fãa bee m nugẽ. 
Psalms23:2 M paama bʋgsg zĩig n tʋɩ m gãaga, b tall-m lame n ta koom noore, tɩ m vʋʋsd be." 
Psalms23:3 M vɩɩma le yẽegame. B kẽes-m-la so-sõng pʋgẽ tɩ m kẽnd la m pẽgd b yʋʋre. 
Psalms23:4 Ba m sora yegd bog-zulunga n yegd kũum, dabeem ka tar-m ye, tɩ m Soaala bee ne maam. M teega b roorã la b rasaarã pãnga." 
Psalms23:5 Rɩɩb la y tẽgen m taoore, tɩ m bɛɛba zĩ n getẽ. Y bao yũ-noog n sudg m zugu, ad-y bũmb sɩd ka paoog-m ye." 
Psalms23:6 N-ye! Y nonglma tara m pʋgbo, la yaa sũ-noog ne sũ-noogo, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa. M na n le tɩ pa-la m Soaala roogẽ, be la m na n pa n sõt kiis la yʋʋma." 
Psalms24:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala n so tẽnga ne a laogo, bãmb n so dũni wã ne a kẽedba." 
Psalms24:2 Mogra sʋk la b viglig tẽngã, n maneg n kɩls-a n yals-a kooma zugu." 
Psalms24:3 Ãnda n na n dʋ Soaala tãnga, ãnda n na n tɩ kẽ b ro-sõngẽ?" 
Psalms24:4 Yɩta nus sẽn pa rẽgem la sũ-tɩrg soaba, yɩta sẽn ka pʋgd-a wẽnga, kõn yɩ wẽen-faad soab ye." 
Psalms24:5 Sũ-tɩrg soab n paamd Soaala barka, n paamd b sõmblem la b fãagre." 
Psalms24:6 Nin-bãmb buud n baood Wẽnd zĩiga, nin-bãmb la a Zakoob kamba." 
Psalms24:7 Rĩm biisi, paks-y kʋɩlense, tẽnkʋdem-wẽnnẽ kʋɩlensã la y na n pagse tɩ d Dĩma sẽn pida ne ziira loog n kẽ." 
Psalms24:8 Dĩm kãng la ãnd soaba? Yaa bũmb fãa Soaala, bãmb la Dĩma sẽn pid ne ziirã." 
Psalms24:9 Rĩm biisi, pags-y kʋɩlense, tẽnkʋdem wẽnnẽ kʋɩlensa la y na pagse tɩ d Dĩma sẽn pid ne ziira loog n kẽ." 
Psalms24:10 Dĩm kãng la ãnd soaba? Yaa Soaala, yaa Pãng-Soabã, bãmb la Dĩma sẽn pid ne ziirã." 
Psalms25:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. M wẽnemda m neng n tees yãmba. 
Psalms25:2 Soaala, m teega yãmba, pids-y m daabo, da sak-y tɩ m bɛɛba tõog-m ye." 
Psalms25:3 Ned zɩ n teeg yãmb n kul zaalem ye. Ad-f sã n ka leb ne bũmbu, f ka wa b nengẽ ne pʋ-peelem ye." 
Psalms25:4 Wilg-y maam y noya, Soaala. Wilg-y maam b sẽn teesd-m." 
Psalms25:5 Zãms-y-ma, togl-y-m sɩd sore, yãmb m Wẽnde la m Fãagda. M gũud-y-la wakat buud fãa." 
Psalms25:6 Tẽeg-y tɩ y yaa nin-bʋgsgo la y pʋleng zɩ n vaal ye. 
Psalms25:7 Yĩm-y m bi-bɩɩlmẽ wẽnnẽ yel-wẽna, ges-y-m ne nonglem la nimbãan-zoeer bala." 
Psalms25:8 Soaala yaa noanga la b ka mi zãmb ye, n ket n wilgd yel-wẽn-maand so-sõngo." 
Psalms25:9 Sõmblem sora la y teesd sulg-m-meng rãmba, so-kãng la b zãmsd tɩ b rɩke." 
Psalms25:10 Soaala sor fãa yaa nonglem la sɩd sore. F rat tɩ b kãabga pids f yĩnga, bɩ f rɩk so-kãnga." 
Psalms25:11 Y ziira labs ne m wa beeg yãmb woto fãa, la rẽ me yĩng la m kot-y sugri." 
Psalms25:12 Fo nif sã n ka sãag Wẽnde, ad-b wilgd-f-la sor ning f sẽn na n dɩke." 
Psalms25:13 Yʋngo gõeem na n saka yẽ soaba, la bãmb buudã n na n wa soog moogo." 
Psalms25:14 Wẽnd pakda b sũur ne sẽn zoet-b bãmbã, b wilgda bãmb b zoodã." 
Psalms25:15 M sẽn teeg a soaba la Soaala tɩ b tõee fãa; bãmb n tõe n lood bɛɛba sẽn za-m ne wĩ niynsã. 
Psalms25:16 Wẽnemd-y y neng n tees-ma, Soaala, zoe-y m nimbãanega, tɩ m yaa m ye la m ka yõod ye." 
Psalms25:17 M nina yaee yɛl bɛda tɩ m yam puki. Wa-y n fãag-y-ma! 
Psalms25:18 Ges-y m nimbãanega la m pɛta, loog-y ne m wẽnema fãa." 
Psalms25:19 Ges-y tɩ m bɛɛba sõora labsa, ges-y tɩ b pʋ-toogã n yɩɩda." 
Psalms25:20 Wogl-y m yõore, fãag-y-ma, m sool-y lame, kogl-y-ma." 
Psalms25:21 M gũuda yãmba, Soaala, zãag-y-m ne yel-wẽnde, wilg-y-m sõmblem sore." 
Psalms25:22 Fãag-y Israyɛl wɛ, Wẽnde! Gũ-y y buudã, a zu-loeesa fãa pʋgẽ." 
Psalms26:1 Yaa a Daviid yɩɩlle. Kõ-y maam bʋʋm, Soaala, m teega yãmb zãnga la m kẽnd yaa tɩrga!" 
Psalms26:2 Fɛɛs-y-ma, Soaala, ges-y m neng la m poore, pãrg-y m pʋga ne m sũurã." 
Psalms26:3 M ne y sẽn ket n pʋgd-m ne nonglem ninga, m vɩɩnda wala y sẽn wilg-ma." 
Psalms26:4 M pa saag n kẽ zirẽ-be-rãmb zakẽ ye, m pa sõs ne ninsaan-kazukem ye." 
Psalms26:5 Nin-wẽnsa n lebg m bɛɛba, bãmb ne wẽn-kɩɩsdba sʋka, m pa saag n zĩnd ye." 
Psalms26:6 M peka m nusi n na n kõ kaset tɩ yell goaleng ka m zug ye. M dat n kolga y maan-kugrã," 
Psalms26:7 ne m bark pʋʋsg yɩɩla la m kilsd y tʋʋm sõma wã. 
Psalms26:8 M nonga y ro-sõngã, yẽ pʋgẽ la yãmb yʋʋra zẽk yã." 
Psalms26:9 Welg-y-m toore ne yel-wen-maandba, da rɩk-y-m n fãoog ne nin-kʋʋdba ye." 
Psalms26:10 B sɩɩsa rẽgma zãnga, b reega ligd n na n tʋm beedo." 
Psalms26:11 M vɩɩma yaa tɩrga, la zoe-y m nimbãanega, n fãag-ma." 
Psalms26:12 M naoor paama zĩ-sõngo tɩ m teeg n yɛsẽ, Soaala, m tara y pẽgr kʋʋnga sʋka." 
Psalms27:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala n ya m vẽenem, m fãagra yita bãmb nengẽ. M na n zoe ãnda rabeem? Soaala kẽes-m-la b tãnsoben-doogẽ, m na n diga ãnda taoore?" 
Psalms27:2 Nin-wẽnsa sã n baood-m n na n kʋ, ad-y yaa bãmb n lɛɛgd n pãsd n lʋɩtẽ." 
Psalms27:3 Bɛɛba tãp sã n gũbg-ma, m sũur ket n ka rigd ye. B sɩng b zabra takre, m ket n zĩi ne saagre." 
Psalms27:4 Bũmb a ye la m kos Soaala, la m kos-a-la me m sũur fãa, yaa m pa b ro-sõngẽ, m vɩɩma zãnga, n tõog n tɩg b rasãndlem, la m me tõog tɩ rooga pa ne a neerem." 
Psalms27:5 Ra-beeda raare, b baooda pẽk n solg-ma b baooda zĩ lilli n kẽes-ma, b baooda pĩig n lill-ma." 
Psalms27:6 Marsã yaa m bɛɛba n sur m taoore. Ro-sõnga pʋga mam tõe n kẽe ne m kũuni, m tõe n waa ne maand sẽn naagd ne kilsgu, maand sẽn naagd ne Soaala pẽgr yɩɩla." 
Psalms27:7 Soaala, kelg-y m boolgo, zoe-y m nimbãaneg n leok-ma." 
Psalms27:8 M tẽra y sẽn yeele: «Bao-y m zĩiga, tɩ mam me baood-y lame.»" 
Psalms27:9 Da solg-y y nenga ye, da pĩng-y y yamba ye, da lak-y n bas-ma tɩ y zoe n wa fãag-m lame. Yãmb la m Wẽnd la m Fãagda." 
Psalms27:10 M ba ne m ma bas-m lame, tɩ yãmb deeg maam y sɛɛgẽ." 
Psalms27:11 Wilg-y maam y sora, Soaala, kẽes-y maam y so-sõngẽ, woto m na põs sẽn baood-b maan ne wẽngã." 
Psalms27:12 Da bas-y maam m bɛɛba nusẽ ye. Ad-y b waa ne neb sẽn na n dõd-ma, b waa ne neb sẽn baood n na n maan m pãnga." 
Psalms27:13 M yella yɩtẽ la wãna m sã n da pa tarẽ kaseto tɩ Soaala na yeg-m ne b nonglma tẽng zug ka, nin-vɩɩsa sʋka?" 
Psalms27:14 N-ye! Ninsaal biiga, teeg Soaala. Wɩsg f menga la f yik ne raoodo, teeg Soaala ne sũ-maasem." 
Psalms28:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala, m boond-y lame, yãmb la m dell wa pĩiga, kelg-y-ma! Y sã n sĩnda, m na n lebga bõn-kɩɩnga." 
Psalms28:2 M sã n tees yãmb n kelme bɩ m koɛɛga lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ, m sã n zẽk m nus fãa n tees ro-sõngã." 
Psalms28:3 Da naag-y-m n vu ne nin-wẽnsa ye, la sẽn daagd-b zɩɩma ye, ne neb sẽn gomd laafi goama, tɩ b sũur yaool n pid ne wẽnema ye." 
Psalms28:4 Zãag-y-ba tɩ b vɩɩm yooga sẽn tog la rẽ. Rol-y-ba wa b tʋʋm yooda sẽn tog ne. 
Psalms28:5 B pa pẽgd Wẽnd sẽn tʋm ye, b pa get Wẽnd tʋʋma sẽn yaa a soab ye. Bɩ Soaala pãb-ba n sẽege la bũmb da le yals ye." 
Psalms28:6 Wẽnd soog pẽgre tɩ b kelga m pʋʋsgo! 
Psalms28:7 Soaala yaa m tãnsoben-doogo la m gãongo. M sẽn teeg bãmba b wa n sõng-m lame. M kɩdemda sũ-noogo, m tãsda m pẽgr yɩɩla." 
Psalms28:8 Soaala kõta b buuda pãnga, B sẽn taag a soab ne b naama kaama, Soaala gũbga a zaka, bɛ ka tõe n ta ye." 
Psalms28:9 Soaala, fãag-y y buudã, pids-y y soolma rãmb ne barka, yɩ-y b gũuda la y buk-ba y poore, daar buud fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms29:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yĩngr ne a pãn-dãmba fãa pẽg Wẽnde, pẽg-y b pãnga ne b ziirã," 
Psalms29:2 Kils-y b ziira wa a sẽn tog ne, wõgemd-y b taoore, b sõmblema pukr daare." 
Psalms29:3 Soaala koɛɛg limda ko-wiisa rẽnna, Soaala sẽn pid ne ziirã kũmsa saagã, Soaala koɛɛg limda ko-wiisa rẽnna." 
Psalms29:4 Soaala koɛɛg tara pãnga, Soaala koɛɛg sãta zĩig zãnga;" 
Psalms29:5 Soaala koɛɛg kaooda tɩɩse, b lubda Libã tɩ bɛda mense." 
Psalms29:6 B kɩtame tɩ Libã pʋgemd wa nag-bila, n kɩt tɩ Siriõ yɩgd wa we-naaf biiga." 
Psalms29:7 Satãsa yaa Wẽnd n gomde. 
Psalms29:8 Wẽnd gomdame tɩ we-raooga tar rigbu, Wẽnd gomdame tɩ Kadɛs rãmb neng tak bem-bem." 
Psalms29:9 Wẽnd tãsdame tɩ rogem waood kẽed walse, Wẽnd gomdame tɩ wil na n sʋʋg goodẽ. Ro-sõnga meng reegd n sokame: «Soog-y ziiri!»" 
Psalms29:10 Saag niid n ka yoogdẽ wã, Wẽnd-Pãng n tõe rẽnna. Soaala la rĩma, zamaan woo zamaana!" 
Psalms29:11 Soaala na n kõ-la b buuda pãnga, Soaala bark yĩnga laog buud fãa kẽeda b buudã." 
Psalms30:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle, a dooga bark ningr daare." 
Psalms30:2 M pẽgd-y-la ne m pãng fãa, Soaala, y yaag-m-la bul-zulungẽ, m bɛɛba ka paam n la-m ye." 
Psalms30:3 Soaala, m Wẽnde, yãmb la m tees n kelme la y sãoog-m lame." 
Psalms30:4 Soaala, y yiis-m-la bʋg-tẽnga, yãmb le vʋʋg-m lame ne m sẽn da zoe n lebg yaoog bũmbã." 
Psalms30:5 Wẽnd kamba yɩɩl Soaala yĩnga; kils-y-b tɩ b pida ne sõmblem. 
Psalms30:6 Y sũura puuga bilf bal ne-ma la yaa m vɩɩma tõre la m tɩg y nonglem. M yãbra yãba yʋngo n zʋʋg zĩiga, la beoog sẽn vẽege, lebga sũ-noogo." 
Psalms30:7 M da zĩi ne laafi n gomda: «Bũmb kõn zãag-m ne Wẽnd ye! 
Psalms30:8 Mik yãmb yika ne nonglem n kõ-m tãng keglem.» Y yaool n wa yik n solga y nengã tɩ rabeem yõk-ma. 
Psalms30:9 Dẽ me la m bool-y, Soaala, dẽ me la m kolg n yõk y sɛɛga, n yeele:" 
Psalms30:10 «M zɩɩma daagr ka yõod yɛ, m yaoog pʋgẽ sigb ka yõod ye, Sẽn lebg-a tom ka tõe n le pẽg-y ye, a ka tõe n le kils y nonglem ye.»" 
Psalms30:11 Kelg-y-ma, Soaala, zoe-y m nimbãanega! Zoe-y n wa sõng-y-ma." 
Psalms30:12 Y teka m kʋ-yãbra tɩ lebg saooga, Soaala Wẽnde, m na pʋʋs-y barka, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa," 
Psalms30:13 tɩ m tar yɩɩl n pa rat n sĩnd ye, n tar y bark pʋʋsg daar fãa." 
Psalms31:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms31:2 Yãmb doogẽ wã la m wa n na n soonde, bɩ bũmb da wa maan-m be ye, bɩ y sõmblema wa fãag-ma." 
Psalms31:3 Kelg-y m pʋʋsgã la fãag-y-ma. Yɩ-y pĩig sẽn pid ne keglem n lill-ma. Kẽes-y maam y tãnsoben-dooga pʋga. 
Psalms31:4 Yãmb n naag n ya m pĩiga la m tãnsoben-doogo. Y wilg-m-la y ziira sẽn labs to-to, y lʋɩ-la m taoore n wilg-m sore." 
Psalms31:5 Lood-y b sẽn za-m ne wĩ niynsã, yãmb la m soond n na n põse." 
Psalms31:6 Y nugẽ la m lebsd m vɩɩma, Yãmb fãag-m-la ne y sɩda, Soaala." 
Psalms31:7 M kisa sẽn tar-b tẽeb yoodo, yaa Soaala bal la mam yẽ teeg yã." 
Psalms31:8 Soaala ket n pʋgd-m-la ne nonglem tɩ m na n sigl saooga. Yãmb gesa m nimbãanega la m pɛta. 
Psalms31:9 Y ka bas maam m bɛɛba nusẽ ye; m le kẽnda m nao zugu, n zãr ne yel-beedo." 
Psalms31:10 Zoe-y m nimbãanega, Soaala, m sũ-sãanga kiisa m nini, n kʋɩɩs m pʋg la m koɛɛga." 
Psalms31:11 M vɩɩma baasda ne nintãm la waasgo, m yel-wẽna yĩnga m pãng sɛɛ fas! M kõaba sɩɩlem fõoga zãnga." 
Psalms31:12 Bɛɛba naaga taab n tar m tʋʋre la m yagsã n yɩɩd ne wẽnem; m zo-rãmba yɛɛsd-m lame, b sã n seg-m kɛɛnga, b ningda tĩiga." 
Psalms31:13 B yĩm-m-la wala bõn-kɩɩnga, m yʋʋra menema b pʋtẽerẽ, b sã n tẽrẽ me yaa wedse." 
Psalms31:14 M wʋmda neba sẽn togsde: «A bugsda nebã n gilgdẽ, wa kɩɩma.» B zemsa taab n na n yãk m vɩɩm." 
Psalms31:15 M teega yãmba, Soaala, m yetame tɩ yãmb la m Wẽnde." 
Psalms31:16 M vɩɩma saga y nugẽ, fãag-y-m tɩ bɛɛba pʋgd-m-la ne sũuri." 
Psalms31:17 Bɩ y vẽenema le bui y yamba nenga. Kell-y n pʋg-a ne nonglem n fãag-a. 
Psalms31:18 Bɩ m da bool n ka paam leokr ye! Bɩ m bɛɛba wʋm y leokre la b kell n pa sɩɩ, wa bʋg-tẽng rãmba." 
Psalms31:19 Mum-y noor ning fãa sẽn yagd ziri, noor sẽn dõt nin-sõng la sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle, noor sẽn dõt ne tɩtaam la wʋglem." 
Psalms31:20 Yaa yel-sõma sõor sẽn ka be tɛka la y bĩng sẽn zoet-b yãmb nifã. Yel-sõmda yaa sẽn waa n soond-b yãmba yĩnga, la na n yɩɩ neb fãa nifẽ," 
Psalms31:21 Y sẽn solg y meng zĩig ningã, Soaala be la y na n solg y neba tɩ b paam n zãag ne ninsaalb zelem goalma." 
Psalms31:22 Soaala paam barka! Y wilg-m-la y sũ-maasma sẽn ka taarã. Bɛɛb sẽn wẽed tẽng gũbri t'a lebg a soabã, m da wẽnda boto." 
Psalms31:23 M da ka le mi m sẽn beẽ ye, n ka le tẽed tɩ y ne-m lame ye; mik m sẽn tees n kelma, y wʋma m koɛɛga." 
Psalms31:24 Nong-y Soaala, Wẽnd kamba, tɩ Wẽnd kogenda sẽn kẽed-b bãmba la yaa naoor a yi la b sɩbgd sẽn paoogd-b bãmba." 
Psalms31:25 Yãmb fãa sẽn saagd Wẽnde, keng-y y sũuri, da bas-y raood ye!" 
Psalms32:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Zu-noog soab la sẽn paamd-a a beegr ludbu la a yel-wẽnd yẽesgo. 
Psalms32:2 Zu-noog soaba la Wẽnd sẽn bas a soab taale, t'a modg n zãagd a meng ne nagre." 
Psalms32:3 M sẽn da waa n ka reeg m kongrã, m pãnga ra sɛta zãnga ne m meng zabre." 
Psalms32:4 Wĩndg bɩ yʋngo, yãmb da ka basd-m ye, m da namsda wa tʋʋlg sẽn kʋɩɩsd tɩɩga." 
Psalms32:5 M wilg-y-la m yel-wẽndã m pa tol n solg bũmb ye, m yeelame tɩ m na wilg Soaala m kongre la m paam n tɩlga ne m zɩɩbo." 
Psalms32:6 Dẽ me la y neba nong n pʋʋs yã, b sẽn paam wakat ning fãa. Yel-beed fõd n wa wa kʋɩl bɛɛga, bũmb kõn sɩɩs-b ye." 
Psalms32:7 Yãmb yaa m doogo, y yiis-m la yɩɩr pʋgẽ, m wʋmda m fãagr yɩɩl sẽn yɩɩnde." 
Psalms32:8 M na n wilg-y-la sor tɩ y rɩke, m na n sagl-y-la sagl-sõngo." 
Psalms32:9 Da wẽneg-y weoof bɩ bõan-wɛ-yalenga, tɩ b boogd b tĩig ne wĩir la salbr ye. Da wẽneg-y bãmb tɩ bũmb kõn maan-y ye." 
Psalms32:10 Toog ne toog n nan gũud nin-yoogo, tɩ Soaala nonglem pid sẽn teeg-a bãmba." 
Psalms32:11 Kɩdem-y yã, nin-sõma, kɩdem-y Wẽnd yĩnga, lang-y sũ-noogo, sũ-tɩrs rãmba!" 
Psalms33:1 Nin-sõma, pẽg-y Soaala yʋʋre! Ad-y Wẽnd pẽgr toga nin-tɩrs noorẽ." 
Psalms33:2 Pʋʋs-y b barka ne ruudga, ruudga susa yegl taab piig piiga," 
Psalms33:3 tɩ y pʋd y yɩɩn-paale n kils-ba; maan-y noog wala y sẽn tõe tɛka. 
Psalms33:4 Wẽnd sẽn yeel n yɛse, b sẽn maan fãa yaa sõngo" 
Psalms33:5 la b sẽn nong yaa zemsgo la sɩda; tẽnga fãa pida ne b nonglma kaseto. 
Psalms33:6 Wẽnd gomdã n naan yĩngr ne a teedã; yɩɩ ne b noora gomd bal la rẽ fãa maan yã 
Psalms33:7 bãmb n kaad kooma la b bɛɛd a soya, bãmb n wat n pag-a mog-bɛd pʋgẽ." 
Psalms33:8 Bɩ tẽnga fãa maan dabeem ne Soaala, bɩ tẽnga rãmb fãa rig b taoore." 
Psalms33:9 B gomame bala la bũmba fãa yalsame, b yaaga b noore la bũmba fãa waa moogo." 
Psalms33:10 Soaala kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmba sẽn da seda vaale, bu-zẽmba sẽn da seda fãa lʋɩɩ vɩʋʋgẽ." 
Psalms33:11 Bãmb daab bal n pidsd wakat buud fãa, b sũura raab pita fãa zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms33:12 Zu-noog rãmb la neb niyns Soaal sẽn ya b Wẽnde. Zu-noog la buud ning Wẽnd sẽn yãk wa b pʋɩɩre. 
Psalms33:13 Wẽnd bee yĩngri n getẽ, la b nee ninsaalba fãa." 
Psalms33:14 B sẽn be zĩig ninga, b getame, b nee tẽng zug rãmba fãa." 
Psalms33:15 Wẽnd neeme tɩ b yaga b fãa ne tãnd yɛngã la b gũud-b-la gũub-yɛnga. 
Psalms33:16 Ka tãb-biis sõor n fãagd dĩm ye ka sũ-keelem n fãagd gãndaoog ye. 
Psalms33:17 Ka weoof n tõe n fãag ye, ka weoof n tõe n zoe n põs ye." 
Psalms33:18 Yaa sẽn zoet-b bãmb la Soaala fãagda, yaa sẽn saagd-b kãabga sẽn ka vaandã." 
Psalms33:19 Sẽn teeg-b bãmb la b na n fãag ne kũum, bãmb dãmb n na n põs kom wẽnde." 
Psalms33:20 Tõnd yẽ gũuda Soaala, bãmb la d sõangda la d gãongo." 
Psalms33:21 D sũ-noog yita bãmb nengẽ, d teega b yʋʋra sẽn ya sõngã." 
Psalms33:22 Bɩ Wẽnd nonglma kell n pa ne-do, tɩ d saagra me paada ne bãmba!" 
Psalms34:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. A sẽn waa n faool a meng dĩm a Abimelɛk taoore, tɩ dĩma dig-a n zãage." 
Psalms34:2 M na n pẽga Soaala wakat buud fãa, m noora ka na n vʋʋs ne b pẽgr ye." 
Psalms34:3 M sũur nooma ne m Soaala. M kota a ka-neng rãmba tɩ b kelg-m-la b noog b sũuri. 
Psalms34:4 D naag taaba n pẽg Soaala, d naag taab n zẽk b yʋʋre." 
Psalms34:5 M boola Soaala la b leok-m lame, b zãag-m-la ne yɛɛsg buud fãa." 
Psalms34:6 Sẽn doog-a a neng n tees bãmba, yẽ soab lɛɛgd n pida ne sũ-noogo. D ka ne bũmb ning sẽn na n le wa ne b yãnd ye." 
Psalms34:7 Ned zĩnd a pɛt pʋgẽ fãa n bool Soaala, b na wʋme la b na fãag a soaba, ba a yɛla sẽn yaa a soab fãa." 
Psalms34:8 Soaala malɛka ka zãagd bada ne sẽn zoet-a Wẽnnaam nif ye la a soab paamda fãagre. 
Psalms34:9 Ges-y-la y bãng Wẽnd nonglem sẽn zem to-to! Zu-noog soab la sẽn wat-a n soond bãmba. 
Psalms34:10 Maan-y rabeem ne Soaala, ad-y y sẽn paam tɩ b welg-y toorã, bũmb ka na n tol n le paoog-y ye." 
Psalms34:11 Bõnyẽeg tõeeme n dat bũmbu, kom tõee n wa tar-a lame, la bũmb kõn paoog sẽn baood-a Wẽnd ye." 
Psalms34:12 Wa-y n kelg-y-ma, m kamba, tɩ m na zãms-y tɩ y zoe Soaala nifu." 
Psalms34:13 Ned sã n beẽ n nong vɩɩm, n sɩd dat t'a vɩɩma yɩ sũ-noog vɩɩm," 
Psalms34:14 bɩ a soab noor da yiis beedo la wɩds ye. 
Psalms34:15 A zãag a meng ne wẽnga, a maan neere, a bao la a pʋg laafi sõmb-sõmbo." 
Psalms34:16 Wẽnd nif teega nin-sõma, Wẽnd tʋbr kelgda b boolgo." 
Psalms34:17 Wẽnd kaoogda zabr ne nin-wẽnga, la a soab yʋʋr na menem tẽng zugu." 
Psalms34:18 Sẽn zoet-b Wẽnda sã n boole, Wẽnd wʋmdame, la b zoet n wa fãag-b lame." 
Psalms34:19 Soaala pẽe ne sẽn zĩ-b ne yɩɩre, n fãagd sẽn zĩ-b ne sũ-sãanga." 
Psalms34:20 Nin-sõng segda yel-beed ka tɛka la Wẽnd menesd-b-la fãa gilli. 
Psalms34:21 Wẽnd gũuda b kõaba fãa, ba a ye meng kõn kaoog ye." 
Psalms34:22 Yell beed n na n loog ne yel-wẽn-maanda, Sẽn dɩt-a beem ne nin-sõng na reeg a sɩbgre." 
Psalms34:23 Wẽnd fãagda b yemse. Sẽn soond-a bãmba, põsda sɩbgre." 
Psalms35:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala, bool-y sẽn dõt-b maama bʋʋdo, zab-y ne sẽn zabd-b maama." 
Psalms35:2 Dɩk-y y gãong la y kut fuugu, zoe-y n wa sõng-ma." 
Psalms35:3 Zẽk-y y kãnde tɩ sẽn digd-b maama kẽ moogo. Gom-y tɩ m bãng tɩ yãmb la m Fãagda. 
Psalms35:4 Sẽn baood-b n na n kʋ maama, yãk-y b barka la pids-y-b ne yãnde. Sẽn baood-b maam ne wẽng tare n leb poorẽ, b fãa gill leb poorẽ ne yãnde!" 
Psalms35:5 B wẽneg ka-fɩɩb sobg sẽn dɩke, Wẽnd malɛka sẽn na n pĩng-b raare," 
Psalms35:6 b sor sẽn na n lebg lik la sals raare, Soaala malɛka sẽn na n fugumd-b raare." 
Psalms35:7 M ka ne m sẽn maan-b bũmb ning ye, b tuka loanga, n gãneg b wĩ n na n yõk-ma." 
Psalms35:8 Bɩ yel-beed wa ling-ba n tus-b n lub, tɩ b bẽdga yõk-ba tɩ b pa be." 
Psalms35:9 M na paam dẽ n kɩdem Soaala yĩnga, b sẽn fãag-ma yĩnga, m na sigl saooga." 
Psalms35:10 M na yeele: «Ãnda n wẽnd yãmba, Soaala? Y fãaga ned sẽn ka tar yõnofre nin-daoog nugẽ, y zãag-a-la ne sẽn tar-a n fãadã.»" 
Psalms35:11 Zirẽ-be-rãmb yikame n sogsdẽ, m sẽn ka tar yell ning buka la b sokd-m." 
Psalms35:12 M maan-b-la neere tɩ b lebsd-m wẽnga, ad-m sẽn lebg m ye marsã." 
Psalms35:13 B sẽn waa n bẽedẽ, m da yera peen-gʋsd futu m da sɩbgda m meng ne no-loeere, b yĩnga, m da ka yɛɛd ne pʋʋsg ye." 
Psalms35:14 M da kẽndame la m watẽ, wa ned sẽn maand a zoa bɩ a roagd yĩnga. M da zĩi ne sũ-sãanga wala m dɩta m ma kʋʋre." 
Psalms35:15 M sẽn lʋɩ bãaga, b kaoog n waa ne sũ-noogo. Kar-kegd mens yik n baooda zabr ne maam. B tãag n yĩid-m lame tɩ m ka wʋmd a võor ye." 
Psalms35:16 Nin-dẽgda zĩndg-m-la sʋka, n tugd beem ne maam." 
Psalms35:17 Soaala maana wãn n ne yel-beedo, yel-beed sẽn ta woto fãa la b sĩnda? Zãag-y-m ne vɩɩm a woto buudu, zãag-y-m ne bõnyẽesã." 
Psalms35:18 Woto m na zĩnd kʋʋnga sʋka n pʋd m bark pʋʋsg yɩɩlle, m na zĩnd b sʋka n pẽg y yʋʋre." 
Psalms35:19 Da sak-y tɩ sẽn kis-b maam zaalma wa tõog n lang sũ-noog m poorẽ ye. Sẽn kis-b maam zaalma ra wa yõgem b noor ye. 
Psalms35:20 Tẽnga rãmb ka baood laafi ne ned ba a ye, b rõta neb sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yelle." 
Psalms35:21 Bɛɛba yaaga b noor n tar goama: «N-faa, n-faa! D nif yãend-a lame!»" 
Psalms35:22 Y wʋmame la, Soaala, da maan-y wa y ka wʋm ye. Da zãag-y ne maam ye." 
Psalms35:23 Yik-y n bʋ m bʋʋdo, m Soaala la m Wẽnde, bʋ-y n yiis-m yellẽ." 
Psalms35:24 Yals-y m poorẽ, m Soaal la m Wẽnde, y mong-m bʋʋm, y na pids m bɛɛba ne sũ-noogo." 
Psalms35:25 Bɩ bɛɛba ra wa gomd ne taab woto: «N-faa! D na n vel-a-la vugr bala.» Soaala, ra sak-y tɩ b tõog n yeel bada: «Tõnd vel-a-la vugr bala.»" 
Psalms35:26 M pɛta sẽn noogd b sũurã bɩ Wẽnd naag n sudg-b yãnde! Sẽn da tẽgd-b maama, b fãa deeg yãnd la paoore!" 
Psalms35:27 Sẽn da tʋll-b tɩ m paam bʋʋma, kaas sũ-noogo la b yeel wakat buud fãa: «Soaala tõoga b bɛɛba, Soaala tʋlga b yamba ne sũ-noogo.»" 
Psalms35:28 Mam me noor na moon tɩ y pida ne zemsgo, la m na kils y yʋʋr beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms36:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms36:2 Nin-wẽnga gomdã n wat m yamẽ: «Da tol n dig Wẽnd dabeem ye.» 
Psalms36:3 Nin-wẽng pẽgda a menga n ka nee a wẽnem ye, a pa tẽed t'a beegame n tog n tuub ye." 
Psalms36:4 Sẽn be a noorẽ bala, yaa tudg f to, yaa f tʋʋs-a. A ka le mi bõe n ya neer ye." 
Psalms36:5 A keta a gãagẽ la a zoe n dat n tʋma beedo. Sor sẽn ka so-sõng la a yãe n dɩke, wẽng bal la a yãend n tar pʋgbo." 
Psalms36:6 Soaala, y pʋ-peelma la yĩngr dãmba kilsda, y sõmblema la sagãna moonda." 
Psalms36:7 Y sõmblema gãndga y tãn-wogda gilli, y yama zulum le gãndga bʋg-tẽnga. Yãmb n fãagd ninsaalba la rũmsã." 
Psalms36:8 Soaala, y nonglma yaa bõn-sõngo! Ninsaalba zoe n wa soonda y maasmẽ." 
Psalms36:9 Y zaka pʋgẽ dɩ-nooda la b pidsd b pʋga, sẽn nooma fãa la y tugl-b tɩ b yũuda." 
Psalms36:10 Yãmb n tãoosd vɩɩma ko-nifu, yãmb vẽenema n kõt tõnd vẽenem." 
Psalms36:11 Bɩ sẽn mi-b yãmba le tɩg y nonglma n paase, tɩ sũ-tɩrsa rãmb me tɩg y sõmblem." 
Psalms36:12 Wʋglem soab naoor da tag m zakẽ ye, la nin-dẽgda me nus da sɩɩs-m ye." 
Psalms36:13 Ad-y nin-wẽnsa sã n ta y ro-sõngã, b rʋʋgdame. B sẽn lʋɩ zĩig ninga, b paada be, ka le tõe n yik ye." 
Psalms37:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Da nams-y n puug y sũur ne nin-wẽnsa ye. Da maan sũ-kiiri b nuga sẽn zãada yĩng ye. 
Psalms37:2 Ad-y b na n wẽneg n zelga wa moogo, vã-maasa na n wẽneg n kʋɩɩme." 
Psalms37:3 Teeg-y Wẽnd bala la y maan neere, woto la y paad tẽngã n vɩ ne laafi." 
Psalms37:4 Sõng tɩ Wẽnd yɩ f sũ-noogo, bãmb n na n pids f sũura raab zãnga." 
Psalms37:5 Wẽnemd f neng n tees Wẽnde, teeg bãmba tɩ f tẽeb na pidsi." 
Psalms37:6 B sõmblem na puk wa sõore, tɩ f bʋʋma me puk wa wĩntoogo." 
Psalms37:7 Yaas sɩɩ Soaala sɛɛgẽ la teeg bãmba, Da maan sũ-kiir ne ned ninga nug sẽn zãad ye, maan gũusg ne zãmb soaba." 
Psalms37:8 Bas sũ-puuri, bas sũ-fõore, da widg wa bugum tɩ rẽ ka baasd neer ye." 
Psalms37:9 Nin-wẽnsa na n wa võo raar a ye. Sẽn gũud-b Soaala n na n wa soog tẽngã. 
Psalms37:10 Keta bilf bala tɩ nin-wẽng yãeebo wa lebg toogo. Fo tata a zĩigẽ la f kõn yãend fɩ. 
Psalms37:11 Sulg-m-meng rãmba n na n soog tẽngã. B sẽn na n tɩg yaa laafi la laafi. 
Psalms37:12 Nin-wẽng baooda zabr ne nin-sõngo, n tol n tugd beem ne-a." 
Psalms37:13 Dẽ me la Wẽnd pusg laado, tɩ b zoe n nela b wãaba sõor sẽn pukdi." 
Psalms37:14 Naongo soaba, a ka-neng-soaba la b rat n tus n lubi, sẽn ket n kẽnda tɩrg la b rat n kodge, dẽ la nin-wẽnsa wõogd b sʋʋse la b rõosd b tãbdo." 
Psalms37:15 Ad-y b sʋʋsa na n lɛɛg n kõsa b sũuri tɩ b tãbda lɛɛg n kao zãnga. 
Psalms37:16 Nin-sõng sẽn tar bilfã n são wẽn kɩɩsdb ka tɛk arzɛka. 
Psalms37:17 Wẽn-kɩɩsdba kams pãng na n sɛɛme, la Wẽnd n ket n ya nin-sõma wã sõangda." 
Psalms37:18 Wẽnd sõda nin-sõma wã yʋʋma, b buuda ka buud sẽn na n tol n sɛ ye." 
Psalms37:19 Ra beeda yʋʋmde, bũmb kõn paoog-b ye, koma yʋʋmde na kell n yɩ tɩgr yʋʋmde." 
Psalms37:20 Nin-wẽnsa na n wãame, Soaala bɛɛba na n wẽnega pʋt moogo, b na n dɩɩ n looga wala bug-zõose." 
Psalms37:21 Nin-wẽng ka pengd n lebs ye, tɩ nin-sõng kũmd nimbãaneg n kõt zaalem." 
Psalms37:22 N-ye, Wẽnd sẽn ning b rãmb bark n na n soog tẽngã, la sẽn ka paam-b bãmb barka na n loogame." 
Psalms37:23 Wẽnd sẽn zẽkd a soab naoor ka tabd n yõsd ye la a kẽna tata b yam. 
Psalms37:24 A sã n lak me a ka lʋɩt ye tɩ Wẽnd kokd-a-la ne b nusi. 
Psalms37:25 M yɩɩ yãaga, n wa kʋʋle, la m zɩ n yãend Wẽnd sẽn bas nin-sõng ye, m zɩ n yãend a buud ne bõs-wamd ye." 
Psalms37:26 Beoog sẽn vẽege nin-sõng kũmda nimbãanega n yãet n pengdẽ, la a buud na paam Wẽnd barka." 
Psalms37:27 Bas wẽnga, maan neere, tɩ f roog kõn tol n sirg ye." 
Psalms37:28 Soaala nonga sẽn ya tɩrga b ka basd b zo-rãmba, b bee ne b raar fãa, n yaool n na n menes nin-wẽnsa zãnga." 
Psalms37:29 Nin-sõma wã n na n soog tẽngã, la bãmb n na n paa a pʋgẽ daar fãa." 
Psalms37:30 Nin-sõng sã n zĩẽ yaa Wẽnd tʋʋm sõma wã la a noor bilgd n gomda, la a zelemd zãmsd a taab sẽn toge." 
Psalms37:31 A Wẽnnaama noor be-la a sũurẽ a ka mi kẽnd n lagsdẽ ye. 
Psalms37:32 Nin-wẽns baooda nin-sõngo, b baood n na n paam-a lame n kʋ;" 
Psalms37:33 la Soaala ka basd-a bãmb nugẽ ye, b ka basd tɩ b bʋ-a n paalg-a bʋʋd ye." 
Psalms37:34 Gũ-y Soaala la rɩk-y b sorã, tɩ b na rɩk tẽngã n kõ yã, la b na n deng n diga nin-wẽnsa zãnga." 
Psalms37:35 M yãee nin-wẽng t'a maand pãn-tõogo, n yik n tão vugr bala wa tɩɩga, wa kos-zĩig-n-yãmb-zãnga." 
Psalms37:36 La ade, a loogame n ka bas buk ye, m bao-a lame la m pa le yãend-a ye." 
Psalms37:37 Ges-y nin-sõngo, ges-y sẽn kẽnd-a tɩrga ad-y sẽn nong-b laafi wã rãmb buudu zɩ n yɩ yõ-koees buud ye." 
Psalms37:38 Sã n yaool n ya nin-wẽnsa buudu, ad-y b naagda zãng n menem, b buuda võogda vugr n looge." 
Psalms37:39 Nin-sõma wã fãagr yita Soaala nengẽ, Yel-pakr daare bãmb la b tãnsoben-doogo." 
Psalms37:40 Soaala sõngd-b lame la b fãagd-b lame. B reegd-b-la nin-wẽnsa nusẽ, n kõ-b laafi tɩ b bãngame n wa soond bãmba." 
Psalms38:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. A sẽn wa n dɩgl wisdu t'a nukd Wẽnd taoore n nekd b pʋtẽere. 
Psalms38:2 Soaala, sɩbg-y-ma la ra tũ ne sũ-puur ye. Dems-y m zʋgã la ra naag-y ne sũ-fõor ye." 
Psalms38:3 Y pɛɛma fãa yõka maam, y nuga yɩ-m-la zã!" 
Psalms38:4 M yĩng wilg ka be n ka reeg toogo, y sũura sẽn puug wʋsga yĩnga. M yel-wẽnda yĩnga, m kõaba fãa tara toogo." 
Psalms38:5 M sama m yel-wẽna tɩ wa loog m zɩɩbo. Sɩd yaa zɩɩb meng sẽn yɩɩd m pãnga. 
Psalms38:6 M noada wõsgame n ningd koom tɩ yaa wa yalemd la m maan yã. 
Psalms38:7 Ad-m sẽn gõd n zĩ ne sũ-sãanga! Nenga gãoogame la m yẽrda ne m sɛɛga. 
Psalms38:8 M yĩnga wɩnga bas, a zabd-m-la zĩig zãnga." 
Psalms38:9 M yĩnga tõrame, m zĩi ne waoodo, m sũura la m yãooga tara kũsga." 
Psalms38:10 Soaala, m sɛsga sesda y taoore, m wõosga lʋɩ-la y tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms38:11 M sũura tara kiuusgu, m pãng sɛ zãnga, m nina meng ka le ne bũmb ye." 
Psalms38:12 M zo-rãmba, m tũud-n-taasa yãenda m noadã; ned fãa tarame n leb kɛɛnga." 
Psalms38:13 Sẽn dat-b n kʋ-ma gãnega b bẽdgo. Ned kam fãa gomame n dat tɩ b yiis m yõore. Beoog ka vẽegd tɩ b ka yãend yelle n dogl m zug ye. 
Psalms38:14 M lebga wa wʋnga n ka le wʋmd bũmb ye. M lebga muka n ka le yaagd m noor meng ye. 
Psalms38:15 M lebga wʋnga n ka le wʋmd bũmb ye. M dat n gom me, m ka tar sẽn leokd ye." 
Psalms38:16 M saagra fãa paa ne yãmba, Soaala, m Soaal la m Wẽnde, yãmb n na n leok-ma!" 
Psalms38:17 M da kota woto: «Da bas-y tɩ m sẽn pãsd n lʋɩt b rãmb taoora wa yik n tar-m laad ye.» 
Psalms38:18 La ade, m lʋɩɩme la bala, toog tar-m-la wakat fãa." 
Psalms38:19 M deega m kongre, m yɛɛsda m yel-wẽna yĩnga." 
Psalms38:20 M bɛɛba wɩɩda ne pãnga, sẽn kis-b maam zaalma sõor labsa." 
Psalms38:21 M sẽn maan b rãmb neer tɩ b lebsd-m wẽnga bãmb dãmb beema, yaa m sẽn maan neera yĩnga." 
Psalms38:22 Soaala, da bas-y-m ye, da pa-y yɩɩg ye, m Wẽnde!" 
Psalms38:23 Zoe-y n wa-y n sõng-y-ma, m Soaal la m Fãagda!" 
Psalms39:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab la Levit dãmba sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms39:2 M da yeela m menga: «Maan gũusgu f vɩɩma pʋgẽ ne f goama. Kʋɩdg la f na n bao n tẽo f noore, nin-wẽng fãa sã n be f sɛɛgẽ.»" 
Psalms39:3 M paga m noor n ka le gomd ye, m sĩndgu meng waa n looga toogo, la m tooga waa n yɩɩga m zɩɩbo." 
Psalms39:4 M sũura da widgda bugum m yãoogẽ. M yaamsã la bugma toolem kɩtame tɩ m gome. 
Psalms39:5 Soaala, wilg-y maam m sẽn na n baas to-to, wilg-y m raara sẽn mag n tek zĩig ninga tɩ m bãng tɩ m bee rũnna n ka beoog ye!" 
Psalms39:6 M yõora woglem, nug pʋg yalem bala. Sã n ya ne yãmba, dẽ yaa zaalem. Ninsaal ne a keglem, yaa sobg bala." 
Psalms39:7 Ninsaal kẽndame la a watẽ, wa sulunsuku, a sẽn samd goabg la rɩtgo, yaa sobg bala, sẽn sama menga a ka mi a wʋkd ye." 
Psalms39:8 Woto wã, bõe la m na n gũ, Soaala? Y nengẽ bal la m saagr keta." 
Psalms39:9 Fãag-y-m ne m yel-wẽna fãa. Da bas-y tɩ m wa lebg gãeemsa laad ye. 
Psalms39:10 M sẽn mum m noorã a kõn le pak ye. M basda yãmb ne sẽn ketã, yãmb soog tʋʋm kãnga." 
Psalms39:11 Da le pãb-y-m ye, tɩ y na n va-m lame n lubi." 
Psalms39:12 Y sɩbgda ninsaala a zʋg tekr yĩnga, rasempʋɩɩg la y lobgd a yĩn-nongrã. Soaala, ninsaal yaa sobg bala!" 
Psalms39:13 Soaala, m kosgo la m kɛlenga lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ. Ges-y m nintãma sẽn daagde, kelg-y m yãbrã. M yɛsa y taoor wa sãan bala, m yaa noaka wa m saam-dãmba." 
Psalms39:14 Bas-y-m bilf bala tɩ m noor le sɩng laado tɩ m yaool n loog la m menem zãnga. 
Psalms40:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms40:2 M zĩndame n gũ Soaala; b kelga m sẽn beẽ la b wʋma m kɛlenga. 
Psalms40:3 B yiis-m-la bog zulungẽ, b buk-m-la begd sẽn tagmẽ. B le yik-m-la yĩngri, m karg teega pĩiga, m kẽnd le yaa sõmbo." 
Psalms40:4 Yɩɩn-paalle la b ning m noorẽ, m Wẽnnaama pẽgr yɩɩlle. Wʋsg na yãende n woog b yɛlã, n lɛɛg n kẽ la b teeg Wẽnde." 
Psalms40:5 Zu-noog soaba la sẽn teeg-a Soaalã, n ka wẽnemd a neng n tees wẽn-naand ba a ye, n ka bao sõngr zirẽ-be-rãmba nengẽ ye." 
Psalms40:6 Ad-y b labsa, Soaala, yɛl bɛda la bõn-bãna y sẽn maan m yĩnga! Y ka tar to ye. Bõe la y pʋs n pa maan d yĩnga? M datẽ lame bala n pord-ba m noorẽ, la labsa." 
Psalms40:7 Yãmb sẽn nong bũmb ningã, ad-y ka maoong bɩ kũun ye, y sõng-m lame tɩ m wʋm rẽ vẽenega. Y pa kos-m yũ-noog bɩ sugr maoong ye." 
Psalms40:8 Dẽ la m yeel yã: «Ad ma, m wata m toore. M tol n zãada y sebr m nugẽ," 
Psalms40:9 la m dat n tũ-la y raabo, m Wẽnde, m data ne m sũur fãa n tũ-a zãnga.»" 
Psalms40:10 M zĩnda kʋʋnga sʋka n moon y sõmblem, wala y sẽn mi Soaala, m ka sĩnd m noor ye!" 
Psalms40:11 Y sẽn zãad-m neerã m pa solg rẽ m sũurẽ ye. M moona y sẽn pʋgd n tar-m fãagrã, m pa solg y nonglma la y sɩdã, m sẽn kẽ kʋʋnga sʋk fãa ye." 
Psalms40:12 Soaala, y pa tol n zãag y nimbãan-zoeera ne m ye. Y sẽn pʋgd-m ne nonglem sɩdã n fãagd-m daar fãa." 
Psalms40:13 Yɛl sẽn ka sõor n da yik n na n lim-ma. M yel-wẽna wulumd-m lame n loog ne m pʋtẽere. B sõora yɩɩda m zuga zoobdo, m pãnga zoe sɛɛ zãnga." 
Psalms40:14 Soaala, sak-y n fãag-y-ma. Zoe-y n wa tao-tao n sõng-ma!" 
Psalms40:15 Kɩt-y tɩ sẽn baood-b n na n menes m vɩɩma naag taab n zʋʋl ne yãnde! B tar n leb poorẽ ne paoore, sẽn baood-b maam ne yel-beedo!" 
Psalms40:16 Bɩ yãnd pʋg-ba, n dɩ-b zãnga. Bãmb n yaool n da kẽnd la b maanẽ: «N-faa, n-faa!»" 
Psalms40:17 Yãmb yĩng bɩ b kɩdem sũ-noogo, Soaala; neb niyns fãa sẽn baood-b yãmbã, kɩdme! Yãmb fãagra sẽn noom b rãmbã talla toagsg bala n ka wʋʋsdẽ, la b yetẽ: «Soaala yaa nin-kãsenga!»" 
Psalms40:18 M yaa nin-bila la naong soaba tɩ Soaala tẽegd m yelle. Yãmb la m sõangd la m fãagda. M Wẽnde, da kaoos-y ye!" 
Psalms41:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms41:2 Zu-noog soab la sẽn tẽegd-a nin-koam yelle! Yẽ me sũ-beed raare, Soaala na n fãag-a lame." 
Psalms41:3 Wẽnd na n kõ-a-la vɩɩm noog tẽng zugu. Soaala kõn bas t'a bɛɛba tõs-a ye. 
Psalms41:4 Sẽn tẽegd-a nin-koam yell sã n gãee ne toogo ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd n ya ye me sõangda, n wat n lebgd-a a gãaga zugu." 
Psalms41:5 Mam yẽ da gomda woto: «Soaala, zoe-y m nimbãanega, sãoog-y-ma tɩ sɩda maam n beeg-y.»" 
Psalms41:6 M bɛɛba wɩt-m lame la b maanẽ: «Da-bʋr la a na n ki t'a yʋʋr meneme?» 
Psalms41:7 Bɛɛba nin-yend sã n wa n na n ges-ma, a watame bala n na n paam n yi n wɩd-ma. A wat n tigsa a zirẽ-beedo la a sã n yi, dẽ bal n be a noorẽ t'a tar n gomda." 
Psalms41:8 Dẽ la bɛɛba na n sũ taab n wa. B na n walma taaba b na geela b gɛɛla n yetẽ: 
Psalms41:9 «Ad-y yaa bã-yoog la a bẽeda. A rʋ-la a gãag la a kõn le sig ye.» 
Psalms41:10 Zoa ning m sẽn da nong n yɩɩdã, mam pʋg sẽn da peel ne a soabã, sẽn da naagd-a maam n dɩtẽ wã menga, zẽka a nao-kãsen-kãare, n na n tão-ma." 
Psalms41:11 Soaala, yãmb yee n maan sugri, tɩ m yik m gãagẽ wã m me paam n dok m sũuri." 
Psalms41:12 Ya woto la m bãngd tɩ y be-la m poorẽ m sã n mik tɩ m bɛ wã ka le tãoosd raoodo. 
Psalms41:13 Zãag-y m zug ne yelle tɩ m paam zĩig yãmb sɛɛgẽ. 
Psalms41:14 Bɩ Soaala, Israyɛl Wẽnda, paam barka zamaan sẽn ka sɩng n ka be sɛɛbo! Ami! Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ yɩ boto!" 
Psalms42:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Kore kamb zãmsgo. 
Psalms42:2 Wala yĩsr sẽn yɩɩd n baood kʋɩlg koom, woto me la m sesdẽ n baood yãmba, m Wẽnde." 
Psalms42:3 Wẽnd ko-yũudu, Wẽnd vɩɩga ko-yũud n tar maam. Wakat bʋg la m na n tõog n kolg y ro-sõngã? Wakat bʋg la d nensa na n yaa n togl taaba?" 
Psalms42:4 Wĩndg la yʋngo, m nintãm la m moende. M wʋmda b sẽn sokd-m beoog sẽn vẽege: «Fo Wẽnda pʋs n tʋmda bõe taki?»" 
Psalms42:5 M wat n le tẽega pĩnd yɛlã, m sẽn da waa n be sẽn tong-ba taoore, n dɩk Wẽnd do-sõnga sore, n kaasd d sũ-noog la d bark pʋʋsg yɩɩla." 
Psalms42:6 Bõe tɩ m na n sãam m sũuri la m yõk yãbre ne m menga? M sẽn na n teeg Soaala n são, m sẽn na n le sɩng b pẽgrã n são, tɩ bãmb la Wẽnd la m Fãagda." 
Psalms42:7 Ad-y m na n basa yãbre, m na n goma ne yãmba, m Wẽnde, m na n zĩnda m sẽn be zĩig ningã, Zʋrdẽ ko-nifa sẽn pusg zĩig ningã, tãn-bila sɛɛgẽ, Ermo tãmsa zutu." 
Psalms42:8 Yãmb basa kʋɩl-beesã tɩ b fõta, tɩ ko-wiig loogd ne ko-wiiga, tɩ y basd-b tɩ b fãa wẽed-m la b rat n lim-ma." 
Psalms42:9 Bɩ Wẽnd nonglma kell n pʋg-m wĩndga, tɩ m kell n tall b yɩɩl yʋngo, la m pʋʋsd-b tɩ bãmb n kõt-m vɩɩm." 
Psalms42:10 M dat n soka Wẽnde, n sok m pĩ-lillã: «Bõe tɩ y yĩm m yelle, bõe tɩ m na n kong n loog ne nen-gãnenga, bõe tɩ y basd m bɛɛba tɩ b na n beds-ma?»" 
Psalms42:11 M yĩnga komsa zãnga, m bɛɛba sẽn tar m tʋʋr yĩnga, tɩ beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa bɩ sokd-m: «Fo Wẽnda tʋmda bõe taki?»" 
Psalms42:12 Bõe tɩ m na n sãam m sũuri, la m yõk yãbr ne m menga? M sẽn na n teeg Soaalã n são, m sẽn na n le sɩng b pẽgrã n são tɩ bãmb la m Wẽnde la m Fãagda." 
Psalms43:1 Soaala, bool-y m bɛɛba bʋʋdo; fãag-y-ma tɩ yaa nin-yaalse, neb sẽn mi zirẽ-beedo la sẽn ya nin-kʋʋdba." 
Psalms43:2 Yãmba, m Wẽnd la m tãnsoben-doogo, maana a wãn tɩ y basd-m kɛɛnga? Bõe tɩ m na n kong n loog ne nen-gãnenga? Bõe tɩ y bas m bɛɛba tɩ na n beds-ma?" 
Psalms43:3 Tool-y-m y vẽenema la y sɩda tɩ b vẽneg m sora tɩ m dʋ y tãn-sõngã, la m paam n kẽ y ro-sõnga pʋga." 
Psalms43:4 M sã n paam n ta y maan-kugrã m sã n paam n kolg Wẽnde, Wẽnd ninga sẽn pids-m ne sũ-noogã, tɩ m zĩi tɩ yaa saoog la m lengdã, ad-y m na rɩk m kʋnde n pẽg m Soaala la m Wẽndã!" 
Psalms43:5 Bõe tɩ m na n sãam m sũuri, la m yõk yãbre ne m menga? M sẽn na n teeg Soaalã n são, m sẽn na n le sɩng b pẽgrã n são, tɩ bãmb la m Wẽnde la m Fãagda." 
Psalms44:1 Yɩɩla naaba la a Kore kamb yɩɩlle. Wẽnd tʋʋm-bãna tẽegre. 
Psalms44:2 D wʋma ne d tʋba, d yaab rãmb togsa tõndo y sẽn maan bõn-bãn niynsi tẽn-kʋdem-wẽnnẽ." 
Psalms44:3 Y sẽn waa n baood zĩig n na n zĩndg-ba y diga neb n deeg b tẽnga. Y sẽn waa n baood vɩʋʋg n na n kõ-ba tẽns wʋsg yãenda pɛta. 
Psalms44:4 Ka yaab rãmba sʋʋs n sõng-b tɩ b soog tẽnga ye ka ne b kang pãnga la b tõogr ye, tũu ne yãmb pãnga, tũu ne y sẽn ka lak n bas-bã, tũu ne y nonglma sẽn da kẽ bãmbã." 
Psalms44:5 M Wẽnd la m dĩma, yɩ-y y sõgen, a Zakoob, tãnsoaba t'a na maan daoodo!" 
Psalms44:6 Y maasem yĩnga d tõoga d bɛɛba, y yʋʋr yĩnga d taba d zabd-n-taase." 
Psalms44:7 M da ka teeg m tãp la m lok ye. M sʋʋga ra ka tõe n sõng-m ne fɩ. 
Psalms44:8 Yãmb n sõng tɩ d tõog bɛɛbã, yãmb n ning d bɛɛba yãnde." 
Psalms44:9 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, d na n pʋda yɩɩla, Soaala la d na n pẽge, bãmb yʋʋr la d na n kilsi." 
Psalms44:10 Sã n ya marsã, Soaala, y basd-d-la kɛɛnga, y pa le yãagd d tãb-biisa ye." 
Psalms44:11 Y basd-d lame tɩ d tard bɛɛba taoore, d bɛɛba looga ne d laog zãnga." 
Psalms44:12 Y tees-d-la d kʋʋb zĩigẽ wa pe-bi, y sẽega tõnd, buud a taaba sʋka." 
Psalms44:13 Y rɩka y pʋɩɩr n kɩs zaalem, y pa koos-a n dok yõod ye." 
Psalms44:14 Y kɩtame tɩ d lebg d bɛɛba yaoolgo y basame tɩ d lebg d yagsa laado. 
Psalms44:15 Tõnd lebga bu-zẽmba baobg tɩ b wẽed n gilgdẽ, b sẽn yãend-d zĩig ning fãa, yaa bãgd yĩgsgu la pursgu." 
Psalms44:16 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, m nee m sẽn sãamd n dabda, m nee m sẽn tʋk yãnd ning n zĩi," 
Psalms44:17 tɩ bɛɛba tar m tʋʋr la kãab wẽnse, n baood n na n dok b sũuri." 
Psalms44:18 Dẽ fãa yaa yɛl sẽn lʋɩ d zugu la baasgo d pa yĩm y yell ye, d ka bas zooda tɩ sãam ye," 
Psalms44:19 d ka tol n lebs d zelemd ye, d nao da ka paam n bʋdg sor ye," 
Psalms44:20 ba y sẽn waa n basd-do d bɛɛba nusẽ, we-baasa tãmsẽ, tɩ kũuma tʋm a tʋʋm sablego." 
Psalms44:21 Tõnd sã n da yĩmi-la d Wẽnda yelle, n yãend wẽnd sãang a ye n kos sõngre," 
Psalms44:22 yãmba Wẽnd naan n bãngẽ, tɩ y mii sẽn solg sũurẽ." 
Psalms44:23 D sẽn ne, yaa tɩ yãmb yĩnga, la beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, d saga kũum nusẽ, b koota tõnd wa pe-bi, rũmsa koodg zĩigẽ." 
Psalms44:24 Nek-y yã, Soaala, bõe tɩ y ket n gõe? Yik-y-la y ra le bas tɩ kaoos woto ye!" 
Psalms44:25 Bõe tɩ y solgd y nenga, n yĩmd d bɛɛba sẽn tar-d toogã?" 
Psalms44:26 D pãs n lʋɩɩ tomẽ, d pãs n lʋɩ-la d yãvabga." 
Psalms44:27 Yik-y yã, Soaala, wa-y n sõng-y-do! Y sẽn ket n pʋgd tõnd ne y nonglma wa-y n fãag-y-do." 
Psalms45:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ, Yɩɩla naaba yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg lɩɩnga puug pẽgr yɩɩlle. Yɩɩlla be a Kore kamb sebrẽ. Nonglem yɩɩlle." 
Psalms45:2 Gom nood n pid m sũuri tɩ m wɩɩdẽ la m na n pʋda m yɩɩlle, m dĩma yĩnga. La Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ m zelemda lebg m gomda naana wa gʋls mit nug sẽn maand sebr zugu." 
Psalms45:3 Dĩma zʋʋga a Adem kamb a taaba ne neerem, gom nood ka kongd a noorẽ ye, a naama na yɩɩ daar buud fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms45:4 Tãb-biig sẽn pid ne sũuri, sẽbg f sʋʋg f sɛɛgẽ. Sʋʋga naag n yɩ f arzɛka la a yɩ f naama kaseto." 
Psalms45:5 Dõos f tãpo, la Wẽnd na sõng-fo! Zomb f weoof n tak f zab-sõngo, n wa fãag naong rãmb la f yals zemsgo zamaane. Bɩ f rɩtg kanga tʋm a pãn-tʋʋma." 
Psalms45:6 Fẽeg f pɛɛma sẽn maneg n sɩlse tɩ b rʋʋg bu-zẽmba zut, tɩ b fãa yɛɛse." 
Psalms45:7 Dĩma, y naama zaoor wẽnda Soaala rẽnna, ka bũmb sẽn vigl daar a ye yĩng ye. Naama na n dɩɩ ne zemsgo." 
Psalms45:8 Y nonga sẽn zemse n kis sẽn ya wẽnga. Yaa rẽnd me yĩnga la Wẽnnaam, y Wẽnda, taag-y sũ-noog kaam n welg y toore, y taaba sʋka." 
Psalms45:9 Y futa yũugu, yũ-nood a yeyn-ye! Ro-neeba wulumda ne yʋʋm-teed bʋʋre bʋʋr sẽn noom n sakd kelgre." 
Psalms45:10 Zĩiga pida ne kom-pugli, yaa na-biis sẽn maneg n fam b mense, y nug rɩtgo, la y yals na-pagã, t'a yãgd ne Ofir sãnem." 
Psalms45:11 Kelge, bi-pugl sõngo, ges la f yoog f tʋba, yĩm f roagdba la f buudu." 
Psalms45:12 Bas tɩ f yamleoog kẽ rĩma, Bãmb la f zu-soaba, yĩgimd b taoore," 
Psalms45:13 la bãng marsã, Tir bi-pugla, tɩ sẽn gãe-b ne arzɛka na kaoog n wa belem-f ne b kũuni." 
Psalms45:14 Dĩma bi-pugl sẽn tog ne naama be-la a roogẽ. A fuuga maneg n buka ne sãnem. 
Psalms45:15 Fuga peende, saag gomtɩʋʋg rẽnna; b tall-a-la woto n wa kɩs dĩma. A tũud-n-taasa me naagame n wa dĩma taoore," 
Psalms45:16 b tongame n kẽed dĩma zakẽ ne sũ-noog yɩɩla. 
Psalms45:17 Kamba na n leda ba rãmba zĩiga dũni wã nanams na n yɩɩ bãmba. 
Psalms45:18 Sã n ya maam, m na kɩt tɩ b tẽeg dĩma yelle, zamaan ne zamaana, la neba na kell n talla a pẽgre, zamaan sẽn wate." 
Psalms46:1 Yɩɩla naab la a Kore kamb yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda wa biig kʋʋre. 
Psalms46:2 Tõnd yĩnga Soaala yaa soondg zĩiga, yell sã n pake, bãmb la d sõangda." 
Psalms46:3 Woto wã, ba tẽnga miimda, d ka rigd ye, ba kooma pʋgẽ tãmsa tar kɩllgo, dabeem ka ye." 
Psalms46:4 Mogra koom ningda a rãamde, a zẽkdame n kuiis yĩngri tɩ tãmsa rigda." 
Psalms46:5 La kʋɩlg a ye n be n kõt sũ-noogo, t'a naoor yegd Wẽnd tẽnga, tẽng ning sẽn yɩɩd a taaba ne sõmblem." 
Psalms46:6 Wẽnd zĩi tẽn kãng sʋka la bũmb kõn maam-a ye. Wẽnd tẽra a yelle, beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms46:7 Bu-zẽmba yik n wilgda b sũ-pa-noanga, nanams yik n boba tãpo, la Wẽnd sẽn tãse, tẽnga sɩnga miungu." 
Psalms46:8 Dũni fãa Soaala bee ne tõndo, a Zakoob Wẽnda la tõnd tãnsoben-doogo." 
Psalms46:9 Wa-y n ges-y Soaala sẽn maan d yĩnga. Wa-y n ges-y tʋʋm-bãna b sẽn tʋm tẽng zugu. 
Psalms46:10 B kɩtame tɩ zab yalse, al tẽnga sɩngrẽ n ta a sɛtmẽ, n kɩt tɩ tãbd la kãn kao, n kɩt tɩ bugum na n kok gãndo." 
Psalms46:11 Kelg-y b sẽn yete: «Bas-y zaba, deeg-y tɩ maam la Wẽnde, m luba dĩm dãmba, m soo tẽnga gilli.»" 
Psalms46:12 Dũni fãa Soaala bee ne tõndo, a Zakoob Wẽnda la tõnd tãnsoben-doogo." 
Psalms47:1 Yɩɩla naab la a Kore kamb yɩɩlle. 
Psalms47:2 Dũni rãmba pãb-y nug pogse, kils-y Wẽnde ne sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Psalms47:3 D tog n diga Soaala la Yĩngr Wẽnda taoore. Bãmb la dĩm kãseng tẽng zugu. 
Psalms47:4 Bãmb n kẽesd dĩm dãmb a Israyɛl soolmẽ, bãmb n lubd bu-zẽmba tõnd taoore." 
Psalms47:5 B bao tẽng n kẽes tõndo, d zu-zẽkr tẽnga, tõnd b bi-nongr a Zakoob yagense." 
Psalms47:6 Wẽnd wata Siõ tãnga zug tɩ b kilsd-b tɩ barda tar peebgo, n tar peebgo." 
Psalms47:7 Pẽg-y Wẽnde, pẽg-y ba, yɩɩl-y d dĩma yĩnga, yɩɩl-y!" 
Psalms47:8 Tẽnga fãa dĩma la Wẽnde, yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-noogo n togs-b rẽnna." 
Psalms47:9 Wẽnd dɩta naam bu-zẽmba zutu, Wẽnd zaoonda b naama goeele." 
Psalms47:10 Bu-zẽmba dĩm biisa waame n naaga a Abraam Wẽnda buudu, tɩ dĩm dãmba fãa miime tɩ Wẽnd n so-ba, Wẽnd n so sẽn so-b tẽngã, la ned ka so bãmba, tɩ b zʋʋga fãa." 
Psalms48:1 A Kore kamb yɩɩlle. 
Psalms48:2 Soaala yaa nin-kãsenga tõnd Wẽnda yʋʋr sãta ne pẽgre, b tẽn-sõnga pʋga. B tãnga yaa tãn-sõngo," 
Psalms48:3 n tar neerem, n tar zãndlem, yaa Siõ tãnga, dĩm kãsenga tẽngẽ." 
Psalms48:4 Wẽnd nif karda a lal-gũbrã, yẽ la b tãnsoben-doogo." 
Psalms48:5 Dĩm dãmb n da waa n yik n sũ taaba n na n tak zabr ne Siõ," 
Psalms48:6 la b sẽn yãend Soaala bala, rabeem yõk-b lame, b sẽn yɛɛse, b lɛɛg n zoeeme." 
Psalms48:7 Vugr bala b sɩnga rigbu, vugr bala waood kẽ-b lame waood wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Psalms48:8 Yɩɩ vugr bala wa yaang sobg sẽn wegsd koom-kogendo. 
Psalms48:9 D sẽn yãend ne d nifu, dũni fãa Soaala tẽngẽ, d Wẽnnaama tẽngẽ, wẽnega b sẽn da togsd tɩ d kelgdẽ. Ne bãmb tõogo a ket yɛsa yĩngri." 
Psalms48:10 Soaala, d sẽn be y ro-sõnga pʋga, d le rɩta y nonglma kaseto." 
Psalms48:11 Al dũni wã sɛtmẽ b mii yãmba, al dũni wã sɛtmẽ b pẽgda yãmba. Y rɩtg pida ne kũuni tɩ y saad n pʋɩta." 
Psalms48:12 Bɩ Siõ tãnga zug rãmb kɩdem sũ-noogo, tɩ Zɩɩda tẽnsa noog b sũuri, ne y sẽn kaood y bʋʋda seem ninga." 
Psalms48:13 Bɩ y tong taaba n gilg Siõ tãngã, bɩ y sõd b ro-lug-lugã." 
Psalms48:14 Ges-y lal-gũbrã, ges-y b keglem; woto y na tõog n togs zamaan ning sẽn watã," 
Psalms48:15 t'a bãng tɩ Wẽnd kãng la tõnd Wẽnde, dũnna la beoogo, bãmb nug n zãad tõndo." 
Psalms49:1 Yɩɩla naaba la a Kore kamb yɩɩlle. 
Psalms49:2 Dũni rãmba, kelg-y woto: dũni wã kẽedba, yoog-y y tʋba." 
Psalms49:3 Nin-bɛd la nin-bõonese, arzɛk bɩ naong rãmba, kelg-y, y fãa gilli." 
Psalms49:4 Yaa yam zulung goama la m noor yiisda, yaa goam sẽn be võor la m yiisd m sũurẽ." 
Psalms49:5 M maaga m meng n kelg yelbũna la m dɩka m kʋnde n na n wegs-a ne yɩɩlle. 
Psalms49:6 Bõe tɩ m na n maan yɩɩre, ra-beeda raare, yɩɩre tɩ nin-wẽns n gũbg-ma," 
Psalms49:7 yɩɩre tɩ neb sẽn teeg-b laogo n yegd-ma, la yaa b arzɛk sẽn waoogã la b kilsda?" 
Psalms49:8 Ned ka tõe n fãag a to ye, a ka tõe n deeg-a Wẽnd nugẽ ne ligd ye." 
Psalms49:9 F sẽn kɩs bũmb ning fãa n na n fãag yõore, raara sã n ta, f yõora ta-la a tɛk bala." 
Psalms49:10 Ned tõee n kell n vɩɩnda woto raar fãa? N vɩ woto n ka tol n yãend a yaoogo? 
Psalms49:11 D ka nee nin-tɩrs sẽn kiid bɩ, d ka ne b sẽn kiid zãnga ne ka-yõod rãmba bɩ nin-toos bɩ? N kiidẽ tɩ neb a taab yõneg n dɩt b raboog bɩ?" 
Psalms49:12 B ra tẽedame tɩ bũmb kõn luk-ba b zĩisẽ ye, n tẽed tɩ b roog kõn tol n kɩll ye, n tol n dɩk b yʋʋr n pʋt b tẽnse!" 
Psalms49:13 Ad-y b sẽn zẽk ninsaal n ta zĩig ning fãa, a miime t'a wat n kẽe gãag n ka vẽeg beoog ye, a wat n lebga bõn-muka wa rũnga." 
Psalms49:14 Ad neb niyns sẽn teeg-b meng zãnga, ad sẽn kilsd-b mens ne b noor goama, ad-b sẽn na n baas to-to:" 
Psalms49:15 B wẽnda piisi la kũum n tar-ba n digd bʋg-tẽnga. Na n pag-b-la bʋg-tẽnga wa pe-bi. B loogra poor marsã, nin-sõma n wat n tab-ba n bedse. B fãa gill sigda yaoogẽ, n menem, b zãagda ne b ro-neeba." 
Psalms49:16 Sã n ya maam, Wẽnd n na n wa fãag-ma, bãmb n na n wa yiis-m bʋg-tẽnga." 
Psalms49:17 Da le maan yɩɩr lɛ-lɛ f sã n ne neb sẽn tiig n lebg arzɛk rãmba, tɩ b zak pid ne faongo, n pid ne ziir ye." 
Psalms49:18 B sã n kiidẽ, ad-y b pa zɩt bũmb n loog ye, b ziira pa tũud-b yaoogẽ ye." 
Psalms49:19 Neda sẽn waa n vɩ wã, ba a sã n da pẽgda a menga n yet tɩ bũmba fãa zemsa a nengẽ," 
Psalms49:20 a bãng t'a na n leba a saam-dãmbẽ, la ba a ye nif kõn le teeg vẽenem ye." 
Psalms49:21 Ãnda n be n ka miẽ, tɩ ninsaal ne a ziira fãa, wat n lebga muk wa rũnga?" 
Psalms50:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Soaalã, Wẽnd akɩkã, goma ne tẽnga rãmba, b boola yaang la nin-taoor dãmba." 
Psalms50:2 Wẽnd yãgda ne ne neerem menga Siõ tãnga zugu. 
Psalms50:3 Bɩ d Wẽnd wa la b gome, b gom la b ra sĩnd ye. Bugum n zoet bãmb taoore n tar dɩɩbo la b meng be sob-raoog sʋka." 
Psalms50:4 B boola yĩngr la tẽng zug rãmba tɩ b buuda bʋʋdo, na n bʋ b b taoore." 
Psalms50:5 Ad-y b yeelame: «Tigim-y m neba n kõ-ma, tigim-y sẽn yõg-b zood ne maam, zood sẽn yõg maan-kugra taoore.»" 
Psalms50:6 Ad-y yĩngr dãmb deegame tɩ bãmb la Wẽnd ninga sẽn bʋʋd-a ne zemsgã. 
Psalms50:7 Kelg-y yã, m neba, tɩ m na n gomame, Israyɛl kelg tɩ maam n bool f bʋʋdo, maam, fo Wẽnnaama." 
Psalms50:8 M tara zabr ne foo la ka f maanda poorẽ ye tɩ m ne-b-la m taoor wakat buud fãa. 
Psalms50:9 La kelge, m kõn yõk f zak naaf ye, m kõn yõk f wubr boɛɛg ye." 
Psalms50:10 We-rũmsa fãa ka maam n so laa? Maam n le so rũms niynsi sẽn kɩɩmd tãms ka tɛka zutu. 
Psalms50:11 M mii luiili wã sẽn yɩgd yĩngra fãa, we-rũmsa fãa yaa maam n so." 
Psalms50:12 Kom da tarẽ maam me, m kõn leok-y tɩ bũmb ye, tɩ dũni wã ne a pʋgẽ teeda fãa yaa maam n so." 
Psalms50:13 Niisa nemd la m na n wãb bɩ, bɩ yaa boeesa zɩɩm la m na n yũ?" 
Psalms50:14 Sõng n pẽg Wẽnde, f pẽgra la f maoongo. Sõng n pids f sẽn pʋlem Yĩngr Soaala." 
Psalms50:15 Gũ ra-beeda marsã n bool-ma, ad-m na fãag-fo la f na kils m ziiri." 
Psalms50:16 Ad Wẽnd sẽn leokd wẽn-kɩɩsa: «Bõe tɩ f zĩ n sõdgd m noya, tɩ f noor gomd zood goama, zood ning d sẽn yõg ne taabã," 
Psalms50:17 tɩ f yaool n pa reegd m saglgo? 
Psalms50:18 Fo sã n yãend wagdre, y na zems taaba, f be yoaadb sʋka, fo lebga b tũud-n-taaga." 
Psalms50:19 F noor sẽn mi yaa wɩdse, f zelemd sẽn tõe yaa zirẽ-beedo." 
Psalms50:20 Fo moor kõn zems ne f to ye, f saam-biiga la f vuud begdẽ." 
Psalms50:21 Woto la f tʋʋma, n yaool n yet tɩ m sĩndi? F tẽedame tɩ m wẽnd-f lame? M yɛdgda f beegra fãa f taoore, m ningd-f-la taale." 
Psalms50:22 Ning-y rẽ y yamẽ, yãmb fãa sẽn yĩmd Wẽnd yelle! Ka rẽ m na n tõosa zɛrma la ned kõn tõog n gɩdg-m ye." 
Psalms50:23 Ned ninga sẽn mi-a mam pẽgre, yẽ soab n wat ne a bark pʋʋsg bũmbu. Ned ninga vɩɩm sẽn tũud sore, m na wilg yẽ soab tɩ maam la Fãagda.»" 
Psalms51:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms51:2 A sẽn waa n seg a Natã, a yel-wẽnda poore." 
Psalms51:3 Zoe-y mam nimbãanega, Wẽnnaam, wa y sẽn miẽ n maanẽ. Y nimbãan-zoeera sẽn labsã bɩ y yẽes m yel-wẽndã." 
Psalms51:4 Wa-y ne koom waare, n pek-ma, tɩ m lebg yɩlgemde n zãr ne m yel-wẽndã." 
Psalms51:5 M deega m kongre, maam n beege, la m beegra dɩga m taoor wakat fãa." 
Psalms51:6 Yaa yãmb y ye bal la m beeg yã. Y sẽn ka rata la m maan yã. Y sã n yãe koɛɛg n na n leoke, y tara bʋʋm, y bʋʋda me bʋʋda tɩrga." 
Psalms51:7 N-ye! M doga ne yel-wẽnde, la m ma sẽn dog-m tɛka, m ket n vɩ-la a pʋgẽ." 
Psalms51:8 Yãmb sẽn dat ninsaal ne bũmb ninga yaa pʋ-peelem la sɩd nonglem. Bɩ y kẽ m pʋgẽ n zulg m yama n kõ-ma. 
Psalms51:9 Menes-y m yel-wẽndã, n yɩlg-ma pek-y-m n yɩlem tɩ m lebg pɛɛlg wa laongo." 
Psalms51:10 Wilg-y-m tɩ m paama sugri, n lɛɛg n pisd-m ne sũ-noogo tɩ m sẽn da zĩ ne sãmpogrã, bɩ m yik n sɩng kibsa." 
Psalms51:11 Da ges-y m yel-wẽna ye, yẽes-y b fãa gilli." 
Psalms51:12 Soaala, kõ-y m sũur sẽn nedge, tek-y m yama t'a lebg yam paale." 
Psalms51:13 Da rig-y-ma n zãag ne y meng ye, da reeg-y y Yam sõnga n bas-m ye." 
Psalms51:14 Kõ-y maam y sẽn fãagd b rãmba sũ-noogo, Pids-y-m ne y kũuma n paas m pãnga!" 
Psalms51:15 Sẽn bʋdg b rãmba fãa na paam m koɛɛga b na bãng y sẽn gũud b nengẽ la fãa gill na le lɛɛg n wa kẽ yã. 
Psalms51:16 M Wẽnnaam, Wẽnd sẽn mi fãagre, zãag-y-m ne kũum tɩ m wilg y sẽn fãag-m to-to la m kaas m sũ-noogo." 
Psalms51:17 Soaala, yaag-y m no-gãndã, tɩ m noora tõog n pẽg y yʋʋrã." 
Psalms51:18 Ka maoong buud la y rat ye, yũ-noog maoong meng kõn noogd y sũur ye." 
Psalms51:19 Soaala, maoong ning m sẽn na n wa ne ya m meng sẽn ka le tar zẽk-m-menga. Soaala da zãgs-y tɩ m tuubga pida zãnga." 
Psalms51:20 Bɩ Siõ le yãend y yel-sõmde, la Zerizalɛɛm lalsa le paam yikri." 
Psalms51:21 Dẽ marsã la maanda na n noog y sũuri, y na tʋlg yũ-nood maandã, la d na tõog n wa ne lolse, y maan-kugra zugu." 
Psalms52:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms52:2 A tẽegda Edomitg a Doeg sẽn waa n wilg a Sol t'a Daviid kẽla a Abimelɛk zakẽ. 
Psalms52:3 Wʋglem bãag bʋg la f bẽeda n yet tɩ wẽng bala la fo na n tʋme? 
Psalms52:4 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa wẽng bala la f yama tar bilgri. F zelemda rɩta wala wanzam barga, f sẽn mi bal la neb kãnegre." 
Psalms52:5 Fo nonga wẽnga n kis neere, n nong zirẽ-beed n yɩɩd sɩda." 
Psalms52:6 F zelemd goalenga sẽn mi yaa sẽn sãamd bala. F sẽn leok fãa yaa kalem-kalem. 
Psalms52:7 Wẽnd na n bas-f lame tɩ f lʋɩ n da le yik ye, b na n tak-f lame n yiis f roogẽ, b na n võog-f lame n yiis nin-vɩɩs sʋka." 
Psalms52:8 Dẽ marsã la nin-sõma wã na n yãende, n wẽed siri la b gomda:" 
Psalms52:9 «Ges-y rao ninga sẽn da maand wʋglma, n da teeg a paoongã n yɩɩd Wẽndã!»" 
Psalms52:10 Sã n ya maam, m na n wẽnega oliviye, sẽn tãood a wil Wẽnd zakẽ. M teega Wẽnd nonglma sẽn ket n pʋgd-m wakat fãa." 
Psalms52:11 Y tʋʋm sõnga yĩnga, m na pʋʋs-y barka, la m gũuda wa bũmb sẽn toge, daar ning b sẽn na n pẽg y yʋʋrã nin-sõma wã sʋka." 
Psalms53:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩl-naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩndame tɩ wɩɩs peebdẽ. 
Psalms53:2 Gãeemsa gomdame: «Wẽnd ka ye!» Adem biig fãa sãamame, b kẽesa b mens yel-yoodẽ. Sẽn le maand-a neer ka ye." 
Psalms53:3 Soaala sulgame n na n gese, n na ges yam soab sã n ketame n baood Wẽnde." 
Psalms53:4 Fãa kẽe moogo, fãa zaa ne wẽnem wĩiri. Sẽn maand-a neer ka be, ba a ye." 
Psalms53:5 B yalemdã n zem b wẽnema. Bãmb n tãag m neba n sɛ zãng wa buri, n yaool n zɩ n gomd ne Wẽnd ye." 
Psalms53:6 B waa n yikame n tar digbu tɩ sẽn sek rigb yaool n da kaẽ ye. Wẽnd meng b toor n na n sẽeg b bɛɛba kõaba, b na n dɩɩ yãnde." 
Psalms53:7 Ãnda n be Siõ n sõngd a Israyɛl t'a tõogd a bɛɛba, sã n ka Soaalã? A Zakoob langdame, t'a Israyɛl kɩdemd sũ-noogo, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n lɛɛg n wat ne b pa-weto." 
Psalms54:1 Yɩɩla naab kɩtdame tɩ b yɩɩle ne ruuds la koala. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms54:2 Yɩɩ Zif tẽng rãmba sẽn waa n wilg a Sol t'a Daviid waa n solga a meng bãmb sʋka. 
Psalms54:3 Soaala, wa-y ne y pãnga n fãag maam. Wilg-y tɩ b bãng tɩ yãmb n kõt-m bʋʋm." 
Psalms54:4 Soaala, wʋm-y m pʋʋsgo, kelg-y m sẽn togsde." 
Psalms54:5 Bu-zẽmba baoo zabr ne maam, nin-kʋʋdba dat n daaga m zɩɩm la b pa geelg n ning Wẽnd sʋk ye." 
Psalms54:6 Mik Wẽnd ya-la m sõangda, bãmb bala."
