Psalms54:7 Woto wã bɩ b ra bas sẽn dat-b maam ne wẽnga ye, y sẽn nong maama bɩ y menes-ba." 
Psalms54:8 Yɩta ne yamleoog la m na n kʋ maando y yĩnga, la m pẽg y yʋʋr sẽn pid ne sõmblem." 
Psalms54:9 Soaala yols-m-la ne yɩɩr buud fãa, tɩ m me kẽnd la m yĩgsd m bɛɛba." 
Psalms55:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Yɩɩnda ne koala la ruudsi. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms55:2 Soaala, kelg-y m pʋʋsga neere. M sã n pʋʋsd-y bɩ y ra solg ye." 
Psalms55:3 Ges-y-ma la leok-y-ma. M ka le mi m sẽn beẽ ye, n lebd goabga, m lebd rɩtgo, n zĩ ne yɩɩre," 
Psalms55:4 n ka wʋmd bɛɛba sẽn gomd n lebdẽ ye, n ka mi nin-wẽnsa dɩdgr sẽn na n tekẽ ye. B boola yel-beed m zugu, b pʋgd-m-la ne sũ-puuri." 
Psalms55:5 M sũura yalsa m yãoogẽ, m waa n yik n yɛɛsda yɛɛsg sẽn tõe n kʋ-m," 
Psalms55:6 m waa n yik n digda rabeem kãsenga, m waa n yik n digda waoodo." 
Psalms55:7 Tɩ m yeel m menga: «M sã n da tarẽ la wal pɩgsa m na yɩkẽ n bao zĩiga," 
Psalms55:8 m naan n zoẽ n zãagẽ n tɩ gãand we-raoogẽ," 
Psalms55:9 m na tɩ baoẽ zĩig n soond n tɩlg sobg la sob raado.» 
Psalms55:10 Soaala, kalm-y m bɛɛba zɛlma, sõng-y tɩ b ra le zems taab ye. M sẽn ne tẽnga pʋga yaa neb sẽn kaood zaba la sẽn maand b taab pãnga." 
Psalms55:11 Bãmb n gilgd tẽnga wĩndg la yʋngo. Tẽnga pʋg marsã, yaa yel-beed la pɛta;" 
Psalms55:12 tẽnga pʋg pida ne wagdem la koodgo, la pãn-tõog la zirẽ-beedo." 
Psalms55:13 Sẽn tʋʋsd-a maam dũnna wã yaool n da ka m bɛ ye, yaẽ m bɛyã, m yetẽ lame tɩ ka yell ye. Sẽn zabd-a ne maama ra ka tar beem ne m ye, beem da beẽ m da na lak n basẽ-yẽe." 
Psalms55:14 Woto wã yaa fo menga, m neda m sõsd-n-taaga, m zoa menga." 
Psalms55:15 D da togsda taab d pʋga la Wẽnnaam sɩmannẽ wã, d da kẽnda ne taaba." 
Psalms55:16 Bɩ kũum vẽ m bɛɛba wa sɩlga, tɩ b sig vɩɩs bʋg-tẽnga, tɩ wẽnem ti-la a zak b sũurẽ." 
Psalms55:17 Mam yẽ boonda Soaala la b na wa n fãag-ma. 
Psalms55:18 M da tara waasgo yibeoogo, wĩntoog la yʋngo, la b wʋma m koɛɛga." 
Psalms55:19 B tol n yaoome n na n fãag-ma; ad-b sẽn wat m nengẽ, neba fãa sẽn waa n sẽeg n bas-ma." 
Psalms55:20 Bɩ Wẽnd wʋm m kosgã n sɩbg bɛɛbã, Bãmb la rĩm zamaan ne zamaana! Maam ne bɛɛba kõn tõog n zems taab bada, tɩ b ka le zoet Wẽnd ba sẽn paood ye." 
Psalms55:21 Ned kam fãa zãmbda a zoa, a lebsda a sẽn da wẽen a noorẽ." 
Psalms55:22 Ad-y nina sã n gomda, yaa kaam la a sɩlgda, la sũura yaool n pida ne zaba, a noor bʋgsame n yɩɩd kaam, mik yaa sʋʋga la a zẽk n na n kɛ." 
Psalms55:23 F zoa wã sẽn zãmbd-fã dɩk f yellã n bas ne Soaala. F na kell n yaas yĩngri tɩ b pa basd nin-sõng t'a lʋɩ ye. 
Psalms55:24 Soaala, tus-y sẽn nong-b zɩɩm la zãmbo n tɩ lub bog zulungẽ, tɩ b vɩɩma pʋlemd nan ka ta a pʋɩ-sʋk ye. Mam yẽ teega yãmb bala." 
Psalms56:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. Filisti rãmba sẽn waa n yõk-a, Gat tẽnga." 
Psalms56:2 Zoe-y m nimbãanega Soaala tɩ bɛ n pʋgd-ma. Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa a sogda m kokoɛ la yaa zabr tɛka. 
Psalms56:3 Neb sẽn mi sudum n pʋgd-m daar fãa b yaool n ka mi tɩ m sõangda bee yĩngri ye. B ka mi tɩ yaa Pãng-Soab ye. 
Psalms56:4 Dabeem sẽn tar-m wakat ning fãa, yaa yãmb sɛɛg la m yõkda." 
Psalms56:5 B gomda yaa sɩda, tɩ m pẽgda tɩ rabeem me menem zãnga. Bõe la ninsaal tõe n maan-ma?" 
Psalms56:6 B namsd-m-la beoog sẽn vẽege, b baooda m sãoong bala." 
Psalms56:7 B soos n lamame n gũud-m, n gẽesd yɛ la m tees yã, n na n paam-m n kʋ." 
Psalms56:8 Soaala, y ka na n sɩbg-b rẽ fãa? Bas-y tɩ y sũura fudg n waag-ba!" 
Psalms56:9 Ade, wala y sẽn ne, m kong n zoeeme. Kok-y m nintãma, ges-y m yãbra sẽn ta zĩig ninga." 
Psalms56:10 M sẽn bool-y tɩ y wa sõng-m daare, m bɛɛba bãng tɩ b na tare n leb poorẽ. M miime tɩ yãmb be-la m sɛɛgẽ." 
Psalms56:11 M pẽgda Wẽnd ne b sẽn taas-m gomd ningã. N-ye, m pẽgda Soaala b gomda yĩnga!" 
Psalms56:12 M teega bãmba tɩ rabeem sɛ zãnga. Bõe la ninsaal tõe n le maan-m yɛsa? 
Psalms56:13 M na n pidsa m pʋlengo, Soaala, m na n waa ne bark pʋʋsg maando." 
Psalms56:14 Yãmb fãaga maam ne kũum, salga ka paam n taas-m tẽng ye. M le kẽnda y taoore, n vɩ vẽenemẽ ne nin-vɩɩse." 
Psalms57:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. A Sol sẽn waa n digd-a. 
Psalms57:2 Zoe-y m nimbãanega, Soaala, yãmb nengẽ la m na n wa soonde, yãmb maasmẽ la m na n vʋʋse, n gũud yel-beeda loogre." 
Psalms57:3 Yaa Yĩngr Soaala la m boonda. Wẽnd ninga sẽn na n maan fãa m yĩngã. 
Psalms57:4 B zĩnd yĩngri n tool-m laafi! Ade, m bɛ wã tʋʋsda yãmba, bɩ y puk y meng ne y nonglem!" 
Psalms57:5 M bee bõnyẽes sʋka, m bee nin-toos sʋka. B yẽna, bãng kãn la pɛɛma; b zelemdã, sʋʋg sẽn saas n dɩga." 
Psalms57:6 Soaala, dɩ-y naam yĩngri yɩ-y tẽnga fãa dĩma!" 
Psalms57:7 Bẽdgo la b gãneg m sor zugu, b bao wĩir n na n sãr-ma. Loang la b tuk m yĩnga la bãmb n wẽneg n lʋɩ a pʋgẽ." 
Psalms57:8 Y pids-m-la ne sũ-keelem, Soaala tɩ m na n pʋd yɩɩlle." 
Psalms57:9 M kos tɩ y neke, m Soaala! La yãmb me bee yɛ, m ruudg la m kʋnde, tɩ m man noog n nek sõore?" 
Psalms57:10 Soaala, m na n pẽg-y-la kʋʋnga sʋka, bu-zẽmba sʋka, m na kils yã." 
Psalms57:11 Y nonglma tãoome n kul sagãna, y pʋlenga kõn vaala le yaa vẽeneg ne neba fãa." 
Psalms57:12 Soaala, zẽk-y y yʋʋra t'a kul yĩngri tɩ y ziira reeg tẽngã n yãmbe!" 
Psalms58:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ; yɩɩnd-a lame tɩ wẽneg: Da sãam-y ye. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms58:2 Ninsaalb kamba, ned tõe n pelga a pʋg ne yãmb bɩ? Y sã n wilgd zemsg sore d tõe n dɩk-a lame bɩ? La y bʋʋda bʋʋda tɩrs bɩ?" 
Psalms58:3 M pa tẽed ye, ka tẽng zug ka ye. Yãmb sẽn mi yaa tʋm beedo, yaa y zablg tẽng zug rãmb ne taaba." 
Psalms58:4 Nin-wẽng sẽn wa moog bala, la a sẽn zoe n lebg tõata. Zirẽ-be-ned sẽn dog bala la a sẽn zoe n sɩng a zirẽ-beedo." 
Psalms58:5 B zẽnem kʋʋda wa waaf rẽnna, b gãee wa raob-kiugu, n maand wa b ka tʋb ye." 
Psalms58:6 B kõn maan b sẽn kos-b bũmb ning ye, pa saoolgd-b saoog tɩ b le gele b zug ye." 
Psalms58:7 Soaala, kao-y b yẽna b noorẽ, kao-y bõnyẽesa yẽn-daado." 
Psalms58:8 Raag-y-b wa koom tɩ b zoe n looge. Gẽeg-y-b neere tɩ y pɛɛma tʋm b tʋʋmde. 
Psalms58:9 B kʋɩɩs b meng wa garweongo sẽn kẽnd t'a kolkood yʋʋnẽ, b loog wa pa-tar sẽn ka yãet wĩndga!" 
Psalms58:10 Bɩ sɩlmand loog ne b yõeestabda tɩ b nan ket n ya pẽba bɩ bugum n paam n dɩ-b n keese. 
Psalms58:11 Nin-sõng sũur na yɩ noogo, a na n yãee Wẽnd sẽn dok b sũuri, tɩ nin-wẽnsa rugd b zɩɩmẽ wa koomẽ." 
Psalms58:12 Wakat kãng la b fãa na n yeele: «Nin-sõma wã na n deega b rolbo, tɩ Wẽnd sẽn mi bʋʋd kaoobo, n dɩt naam tẽng zugu.»" 
Psalms59:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. A Sol sẽn waa n kos-a t'a gũ a zaka, n dat woto n paam-a n kʋ naana." 
Psalms59:2 Soaala, fãag-y maam m bɛɛba nusẽ, gũ-y maam ne m bɛɛba." 
Psalms59:3 Zãag-y maam ne nin-wẽnsã, zãag-y-m ne sẽn nong-b zɩɩma raagrã." 
Psalms59:4 B bao zĩig n sorẽ n gũud-ma, yaa nin-bɛd mens n yik n na n zab ne-ma. La ade, Soaala, m pa beege, m pa maan wẽng ye." 
Psalms59:5 Ne m sẽn ka beegã, b zoet n beoogd-m lame. Yik-y y gãagẽ, Soaala, seg-y-ma, tɩ y na yãe!" 
Psalms59:6 Yãmba, Soaala, Pãng Naaba, a Israyɛl Wẽnde, yik-y n sɩbg-y bu-zẽmba fãa. Da zoe-y ned ba a ye nimbãaneg ye, b fãa maana zãmbo n bõn b mense." 
Psalms59:7 Zĩig sã n sobge, b lɛɛgd n watame. B saada tẽngã n wũund wa baase," 
Psalms59:8 b noora pida ne tãntãmpuudu, tɩ b yẽna lebg wa sʋʋs b noorẽ. Woto wã ãnd n tõe n wʋm b goama? Bãmb n gãgnemd ne taaba." 
Psalms59:9 La yãmb laada bu-zẽmba, Soaala, yãmb toog ka ne b ye." 
Psalms59:10 M na n dooga m neng n ges yãmba, yãmb la m pãnga, m tãnsoben-dooga yaa Wẽnde." 
Psalms59:11 Wẽnd ning kãabg sẽn ka vaandã wata m segbo; bãmb la m teeg yã n yĩgsd m bɛɛba. 
Psalms59:12 Da menes-y b zãng ye, ka rẽ m buuda wat n yĩma a yel-sõmd soaba. Y pãnga yee n vigs-ba la y ning-b yãnde, d Wẽnd la d gãongo!" 
Psalms59:13 Zãmb rãmba sã n yaag b noore, yaa b wẽnema bal la b pẽgda. B kãab beedo, b wẽn-tʋʋr la zirẽ yĩnga, bas-y tɩ b wilg-m-menga lebg bẽdgo n yõk-ba." 
Psalms59:14 Ypug-y y sũuri n sɛɛs-ba, da kees-y bũmb ba a ye ye. Woto yaang la taoor dãmb na bãnge tɩ Israyɛl Wẽnda pida ne naam la tõogo." 
Psalms59:15 Zĩig sobgdame tɩ bu-zẽmba lɛɛg n wa. B lɛɛgd n waame la b wũund wa baase, n saad n pɩkd tẽngã." 
Psalms59:16 Yaa sẽn na ning b noorẽ wã la b baooda. B pa rɩ n tɩg fãa, b yãbdame tɩ beoog vẽege." 
Psalms59:17 Sã n ya maam m yɩɩndame n pẽgd y pãnga, y nonglma sẽn ket n pʋgd-ma la m kilsd yibeoogo, tɩ y yɩɩ tãnsoben-doog m yĩnga, m soondg zĩig m yɩɩra pʋgẽ." 
Psalms59:18 M na n yɩɩlame n pẽg y pãnga, m Wẽnd la m tãnsoben-doogo, tɩ y nonglma ket n pʋgd-m-la beoog sẽn vẽege!" 
Psalms60:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: lɩɩng kaseto. Yaa yɩɩlle sẽn naag ne zãmsgo. 
Psalms60:2 Yaa a sẽn waa n zabd ne Mezopotami la Sova Aramse. Yaa a Zoab sẽn waa n tõog Edom dãmb, bãmb tus piig la a yiibu, yamsem bãg-faagẽ." 
Psalms60:3 Soaala, yãmb basa tõndo tɩ d zoe n sẽeg zãnga. Y sũur da kãbda ne tõndo, leb-y n tigim-y-do." 
Psalms60:4 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tẽnga digimdi, yãmb kɩtame t'a pus mugnum. Wa-y n sẽ-y tẽnga peesã tɩ b ra sẽeg ye." 
Psalms60:5 Y buuda vɩɩm waa n yɩɩ toogo, y waa n yũnug-d-la rãam sẽn lubdi." 
Psalms60:6 Y wilga sẽn zoet-b yãmb nifu wakat ning, b sẽn na n zoe n põs bɛ ninga sẽn tãood pɛɛma." 
Psalms60:7 Bɩ y modg n leok-do; la y rɩtga me maan bũmbu n fãag y sẽn nong b rãmbã. 
Psalms60:8 Wẽnd zĩnda b roogẽ wã n leoke, tɩ m kɩdemnẽ. M maanda Sikɛm wa m sẽn date, m pasda Sukot vẽenem." 
Psalms60:9 M soo Galaad la Manase. A Efrayim la m dɩk n fõgne m zug wa zug-peoogo, t'a Zɩɩda ya m naam dasaare." 
Psalms60:10 A Moab yaa la-zulunga, yẽ pʋgẽ la m pegd m menga. A Edom yaa m soolem, rẽ ka be no-koeemd ye. M tõoga Filisti n kaas m sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Psalms60:11 Ãnda n na n sõng-m tɩ m ta tãnsoben-doogã? Ãnda n na n tall-m n ta Edom? 
Psalms60:12 Sã n ka yãmba, m Soaala? D Yaool n neeme tɩ yãmb bas-d lame, y pa le yãagd d tãb-biisa zabrẽ ye." 
Psalms60:13 Wa-y n sõng-y-d ne d bɛyã tɩ laong ka yiisd laong bugmẽ ye. 
Psalms60:14 Wẽnd sã n be sʋka d na maan daoodo, tɩ yaa bãmb n na n tab d bɛɛba gilli." 
Psalms61:1 Yɩɩla naab kɩtdame tɩ b yɩɩl ne ruuds la koala. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms61:2 Soaala, kelg-y m boolgo, kelg-y m pʋʋsgo." 
Psalms61:3 M bee tẽnga yaanga n boond-y, m sã n wa ka le mi m sẽn maande. Sõng-y tɩ m ta m pĩiga zug tẽnsʋka tɩ pĩiga zãndame." 
Psalms61:4 M ta be, m ta m põasg zĩigẽ, tãnsoben-doog pʋgẽ la m paam n kẽ, tɩ m bɛɛba na n tare." 
Psalms61:5 M nongẽ lame n pa y sɩmannẽ wã daar fãa, n paam n solgẽ y maasmẽ." 
Psalms61:6 Ya yãmba, Soaala, n deeg m kosgo, n kõ sẽn nong-b yãmba b sẽn date." 
Psalms61:7 Kõ-y dĩma yõ-woko, a yʋʋmd a ye kaoos wa yʋʋm koabga!" 
Psalms61:8 Kell-y n zĩndg-y dĩma y taoore. A kell n pa y nonglem la y sɩda vẽenemẽ. 
Psalms61:9 Woto m na tõog n pẽg y yʋʋra raar fãa, woto m na pids m sẽn kãab-y wã fãa." 
Psalms62:1 Yɩɩla naab basdame tɩ Levitsa pʋde. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms62:2 Sɩda, m gãee ne laafi Wẽnd taoore, m fãagra yita bãmb nengẽ." 
Psalms62:3 Bãmb la m pĩiga la m lilli, m paama m tãnsoben-doogo, bɛɛb kõn ling-m doogo." 
Psalms62:4 Rasma a wãn yɛsa la m bɛɛba na n kell n naag taaba n tar nin-yend pʋgbo, n baood n na n lub-a, n lub-a wa lalg sẽn kɩlle, wa wubri sẽn wurgi?" 
Psalms62:5 M yʋʋra sẽn yi wã yĩng la b rat n dig-ma; n yik n lebg ninsaan-kazukma: b noora gomda noogo, la sũurẽ wã yaa kãab wẽnse." 
Psalms62:6 M neda, da maan dabeem Wẽnd sɛɛgẽ ye tɩ bãmb bal la m teeg yã." 
Psalms62:7 Bãmb la m pĩiga la m fãagr lilli, bãmb la m tãnsoben-doogo, zabr kõn ling-m doogo." 
Psalms62:8 Wẽnd la m fãagda, bãmb n sõng tɩ m yʋʋr yi; bãmb la m tãnsoben-doogo la m soondg zĩiga." 
Psalms62:9 Bɩ Adem biisa teeg bãmb wakat buud fãa, bɩ b wa b taoore n wilg sẽn be b sũurẽ. Wẽnd la d soondg zĩiga." 
Psalms62:10 Adem biisa faasa wa pemsem, rĩm biisa ne b naama me yaa belgre; f mag b zɩslma, f mag pemsem." 
Psalms62:11 Da teeg-y pãn-tõog ye, da teeg-y fãab la wagdem ye. Y arzɛka sã n wa paasdẽ, bɩ y ra yãg n yõgem y noor ye." 
Psalms62:12 Yaa naoor wʋsgo la m wʋm Wẽnd tɩ b gomda: «Yaa maam bal n tar pãnga!» 
Psalms62:13 Ad-y yãmb n naag n so nonglem, Soaala, tɩ y rond ned kam fãa wa sẽn segde." 
Psalms63:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle, a sẽn waa n be Zɩɩda we-raoogẽ." 
Psalms63:2 Yãmb la m Wẽnde, tɩ m baood-y. M menga zãng n tʋl yã wa naka, wa tẽn-koɛɛnga. M tõta beoogo n baood y zĩiga." 
Psalms63:3 Ade, m zĩnda y ro-sõnga pʋga n ges-y n tɩge, n tɩg y ziir la y pãnga." 
Psalms63:4 M Yãeeme tɩ yãmb nonglma ne maam n be yõodo n yɩɩd vɩɩm, tɩ m yaag m noor n sɩng y kilsgu." 
Psalms63:5 Yaa m vɩɩma tõre la m na n pẽg yã. M na n zẽka m nus n pʋʋs-y barka. 
Psalms63:6 Wala ned sẽn tɩg rɩ kaam, n zota, m pida ne sũ-noogo, m noora na kils yã." 
Psalms63:7 M sã n tẽegd y yelle, m gãag zugu, m sẽn tar y pʋʋsg la m sẽn tare." 
Psalms63:8 La rẽ yaa y sẽn yɩ m sõangda, la rẽ yaa m sẽn kaas sũ-noog y maasmẽ." 
Psalms63:9 Yãmb bal la m dat ne m sũur fã, tɩ y kanga pãng n gũud maam." 
Psalms63:10 Sẽn baood-b n na n kʋ-ma, yãend b menesgo! B sud n ta tẽnga tɛka!" 
Psalms63:11 Kʋ-y-b zãnga n kõ we-baase! 
Psalms63:12 Woto dĩma sũur na yɩ noog ne Wẽnde. Sẽn na n wẽen-a fãa n yet tɩ Wẽnd la a kaset soaba, bɩ a bãng tɩ yẽ la yam soaba, tɩ zirẽ-beed fãa na n sɛɛme." 
Psalms64:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms64:2 Soaala, kelg-y m sẽn wat ne koɛɛg ningã; zãag-y m vɩɩma ne bɛ-toaag a woto buudu." 
Psalms64:3 Solg-y maam tɩ sẽn minim-b sudum n zoe n tigs taab n dat-m ne wẽnga. 
Psalms64:4 Ad-y b zɛlma saasa wa sʋʋga, b zẽna b goama wa pɛɛma;" 
Psalms64:5 zĩig bal la b baood n na n lilli n paam n tão ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle. 
Psalms64:6 B wat n kenga b sũur n tão bala. Yam la b baooda n na n solg b bẽdgã. B wat n tol n yeela woto: «Ãnda n pus n na n tagse tɩ yaa bẽdgo la d gãneg yã?» 
Psalms64:7 B zĩndame n sõdg tʋʋm beed niyns fãa b sẽn na n tʋma la b pẽgd b mense n yetẽ: «D geelsa maneg n geela neere; ninsaal sẽn tõe n yiis a yamẽ labsa.» 
Psalms64:8 Mik Wẽnd n deng tãoobo, b waa n yãenda pĩima vugr bala, tooga lɛɛg n lebga b rẽnna." 
Psalms64:9 B gom yoodã n lɛɛg n dɩ-ba. Ned ninga fãa sẽn yãend-b bãmb marsã tara b laado la b sãbsgo. 
Psalms64:10 Dabeem kẽeda Adem biig fãa t'a sɩng n na n pẽg Wẽnde la a bao yam sõng n kõ a menga. 
Psalms64:11 Bɩ nin-sõma wã noog b sũur ne Soaala, la b wa soomd bãmb bala, la b pẽg b sẽn bãng so-sõngã n dɩkã." 
Psalms65:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms65:2 Siõ Wẽnde, ad-y yãmb n tog ne pẽgre. Yaa d kãabg la d wa n na n pidsi." 
Psalms65:3 Y sẽn kelgd kosg yĩnga, ned kam fãa tõe n kolgame." 
Psalms65:4 M beegra waa n looga toogo, la y sak n yẽesa fãa gilli." 
Psalms65:5 Zu-noog rãmb la tõndo tɩ y bool-d lame tɩ d na n pa y sɩmannẽ. Y na tɩgs tõnd ne y zaka kũun sõma, ne kũun sõma niyns sẽn gãe y ro-sõngẽ wã." 
Psalms65:6 Y maan-d-la neere n wilg y bõn-bãna. D Wẽnd la d Fãagda, yãmb n kõt y laafi, tẽng zug la mogra sʋk-rãmba." 
Psalms65:7 Yãmb pãn-kẽenga la y sẽbg y meng wa kalle n vigl tãmsa kẽnkẽ, b zĩisẽ." 
Psalms65:8 Y sigsda ko-wiisa ne b bʋʋrã. Neba sẽn mi n yik n wulumd ne taabã, yãmb n leb n kẽed sʋka n sɛɛsd b no-koɛɛma." 
Psalms65:9 Dũni wã tõr fãa ne-la y bõn-bãna, yaang la taoor dãmba kɩdemda sũ-noogo." 
Psalms65:10 Yãmb kargame n ges tẽngã, n zãgs-a koom, yãmb pids-a-la ne laogo. Wẽnd kʋɩlga pidame n daannẽ, alkam la y segenda n na n kõ y nebã. Yaa woto la y segend n na n kõ-d koodo:" 
Psalms65:11 wãka sẽn vɛɛg tẽngã rengd n pidsa koom, tãnda manegd n bẽega vuk-vuka, tɩ sa-koom wa yʋgumd fãa gilli, tɩ y sik y bark tɩ sẽn bʋda bul n yi." 
Psalms65:12 Yʋʋmda baasda wa a sẽn sɩnge ne yãmb kũun sõma, la sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa tɩgr ne tɩgre." 
Psalms65:13 Rũmsa paamda b wãbneg zĩiga, tãmsa zut menga yaa sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Psalms65:14 Pʋ-weesa na n yẽnega ne rũmsi, tɩ pʋta pelg ne koodo. Zĩis fãa yaa kaasgo la yɩɩla." 
Psalms66:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. Bɩ tẽnga gill kils Soaala," 
Psalms66:2 tẽnga yɩɩl b yʋʋr la b pẽg b ziiri, tẽnga kils la a sond-ba." 
Psalms66:3 Yeel-y Soaala woto: «Ad-y tʋʋma yɩkda pɛlenga! Y pãnga sẽn labsa yĩnga, bɛ tata y taoore n lebg kʋʋsa." 
Psalms66:4 Tẽnga gill wõga yãmb taoore, yãmb la a yɩɩnda, y yʋʋra la a kilsda.»" 
Psalms66:5 Wa-y tɩ y na yãend Wẽnd sẽn maane, la b tʋʋma sɩd yɩkda ninsaalb pelense." 
Psalms66:6 Bãmb n welg tẽn-koɛɛnga ne mogre, n kɩt tɩ kʋɩls kʋɩ n bas sore la woto seka kibs maanego." 
Psalms66:7 Wẽnd maana raoodo, n lebg dĩm zĩig zãnga. B nin kargda bu-zẽmba tẽns fãa. Tõatba kõn le tõog n doog b zut ye." 
Psalms66:8 Adem biisi, kilsi tõnd Wẽndã, kɩt-y tɩ b pẽgra sãde." 
Psalms66:9 Bãmb n kõt-d vɩɩm, bãmb n kɩt tɩ d yɛs d nao zutu." 
Psalms66:10 Yãmb fɛɛsa tõndo, n los-d boaagẽ tɩ d yɩlg wa wanzurfu." 
Psalms66:11 Y kẽes-d-la yɛl toodẽ, y bas-d-la ne yɩɩre." 
Psalms66:12 Y basame tɩ wiidi tab d zut n looge, y kẽes-d-la koomẽ la bugmẽ, la y sẽn yiis-d be, lebga tɩgre." 
Psalms66:13 M kẽeda y zaka ne yũ-nood maando, tɩ m dat n pidsa m kãabgo," 
Psalms66:14 kãabg ning m sẽn yaag m nore n kãabe yɛla sẽn waa n sẽbga raare. 
Psalms66:15 Yaa rũms sẽn yẽnegd ne kaam maoong la m na n kõ yã, n paas pe-raad dẽnna, n paas lols la boeese." 
Psalms66:16 Yãmb fãa sẽn zoet Wẽnde, wa-y tɩ m na togs b sẽn maan m yĩnga." 
Psalms66:17 M sẽn waa n boond-ba, dẽ tɩ m zelemda da zoe pʋta pẽgr yɩɩlle." 
Psalms66:18 Wẽnem sã n da be m yamẽ, b naan n bãngẽ la b pa na n kelgẽ ye." 
Psalms66:19 Soaala yaool n kelgame, b kelga m kosga neere." 
Psalms66:20 B soog pẽgre, bãmb sẽn pa zãgs m kosgã, bãmb sẽn kell n pʋg maam ne b nonglma." 
Psalms67:1 Yɩɩla naab kɩtdame tɩ b wẽ bɛɛl la kʋnde. 
Psalms67:2 Soaala, zoe-y d nimbãanega la y ning-d barka! B togl tõnd b nenga sẽn tar yãgbã." 
Psalms67:3 Woto, tẽng zug ka, b na bãng y soya, la bu-zẽmba mens na yãend y fãagrã." 
Psalms67:4 Soaala, bɩ Adem kamba pʋʋs-y barka. Bɩ b naag taab gilli n pʋʋs yã." 
Psalms67:5 Bu-zẽmba yɩɩl b sũ-noogo tɩ y zãad-b-la ne zemsgo, la tẽng zug ka bãmb n wilgd b sore." 
Psalms67:6 Soaala, bɩ Adem biisa pʋʋs-y barka! Bɩ b naag taab gilli n pʋʋs yã!" 
Psalms67:7 Tẽnga woma a biisi, Soaala tõnd Wẽnda ningd-d-la barka." 
Psalms67:8 N-ye! Bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ning-d barka, bɩ tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba reeg tɩ bãmb la b Soaala." 
Psalms68:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms68:2 Bɩ Wẽnd yiki tɩ b bɛɛba fãa sẽege, tɩ b fãa ning tĩig b taoore." 
Psalms68:3 Wala bug-zõose sẽn nukd n looge, wala siribdu sẽn yẽnegd bugmẽ, bɩ nin-wẽnsa me menem woto Soaala taoore." 
Psalms68:4 Bɩ nin-sõma wã yẽ noog b sũuri, Wẽnd taoore bɩ b sɩng kɩdengo la saooga!" 
Psalms68:5 Yɩɩl-y Wẽnd yĩnga, pẽg-y b yʋʋre, n deeg sẽn zao-a sawadga wa weefo; b yʋʋr la Soaala, d kɩdem b taoore." 
Psalms68:6 B ro-sõnga pʋga bãmb la kɩɩb-bi ba, pʋg-kõapa sã n paamd bʋʋm tũuda ne bãmba." 
Psalms68:7 Zĩ-m-ye soab wat n lebga zak soaba. Sẽn pag-b rãmb roogo wat n paama yɩng pemsem noogo. Tõatba bal n ka na n paam zĩ-bʋgsgo. 
Psalms68:8 Soaala, y sẽn waa n yi ne y buudã n kẽne n ta we-raoogẽ," 
Psalms68:9 tẽnga miimame tɩ saag meng minisi, Sinayi Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽnde!" 
Psalms68:10 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ saag ni wʋsgo. Tẽnga sẽn da kʋɩ wã le vʋʋgame. 
Psalms68:11 Yaa be la y zĩndg y buudã, yaa zĩ-kãng la y nonglma ra segl n bĩng naong soaba." 
Psalms68:12 Soaala yiisa b koɛɛga tɩ sẽn na deeg-ba n yelg mooga ya tãb-biis ka tɛka. 
Psalms68:13 Dẽ me la dĩm dãmb ne b tãb-biisa sẽn sɩng zoees la b sẽn tar zoeese. Pagba sẽn pa yira na paam teed n pʋɩ. 
Psalms68:14 Da bõn-y y mens n pa y tãb-sikẽ ye. A Israyɛl pʋɩɩra wẽnda walle la a pɩgsa tablga wanzurfu, la pigsa kõbdã yaa sãnem." 
Psalms68:15 Wẽnd sẽn waa n sẽeg dĩm dãmba zĩ-kãnga, dẽ tɩ waooda saag gĩsa kooma, tɩ tãn-sablga zugu lebg pɛɛlg-a." 
Psalms68:16 Bazã tãmse, tãms sẽn lug n kul yĩngri, tãms ne kũna, Bazã tãmse," 
Psalms68:17 bõe tɩ y maan sũ-kiiri, Bazã tãmse, bõe tɩ y sɩndge n get tãng ninga Wẽnd sẽn dat n zĩnd a soab zugã? N-ye! Soaala na n zĩnda a zug daar fãa." 
Psalms68:18 Wẽnd wed-dʋʋdba sẽn yer miida ka tõe n sõd ye. Soaala yii Sinayi n wa ne bãmba, b ro-sõngẽ." 
Psalms68:19 Yãmb dʋʋ yĩngr tẽnsã n yõg neb kẽere, be me y reega kũuni, ba tʋb-pa-wʋmdba rẽnna, la y tilga y zak Siõ." 
Psalms68:20 Bɩ Wẽnd paam pẽgr beoog sẽn vẽege! Yaa bãmb n wat ne d bɛɛba tõogre. 
Psalms68:21 Wẽnd ning sẽn kõt-d daooda la bãmba la bãmb n naag n pagdẽ la b pakd bʋg-tẽng noore. 
Psalms68:22 Wẽnd bõgsda b bɛɛba zutu, zut ne zoobd sẽn ka põngde, wa sẽn tog ne tʋʋm-beed rãmba." 
Psalms68:23 Soaala yeelame: «M na n talla m sẽn yõg b rãmb Bazã n wa, n paas m sẽn yõg b rãmb mogra ko-zulungẽ." 
Psalms68:24 F nao na fẽd-ba, b zɩɩmẽ, f baasa fãa zelemd na lemb b sẽn pʋɩ n kõ-ba.»" 
Psalms68:25 Wẽnnaam, Adem biisa yãenda y neba sẽn tonge, m Wẽnd la m dĩma neb sẽn tong y do-sõnga pʋga." 
Psalms68:26 Yɩɩn-yɩɩndba n be taoore, tɩ yʋʋm teeda rãmb be poorẽ, tẽnsʋk yaa kom-pugli wã, kom-pugli niyns sẽn wẽed gãngão-gilsã." 
Psalms68:27 Bɩ Wẽnd paam pẽgr kʋʋnga sʋka Bɩ Israyɛl kamba sẽn tigim taaba pẽg Wẽnde. 
Psalms68:28 A Bẽnzame n lʋɩt taoore. Yẽ n paood n yɩɩd sags a taabã. Sẽn pʋgd yaa a Zɩɩda sak kãsem dãmba, sẽn yer fut sẽn maneg n buk ne sãnem, Dẽ poore a Zabulõ la a Neftali sak kãsem dãmba." 
Psalms68:29 F Wẽnda yalsame tɩ b na tʋm daoodo. Wilg-y-du, m Wẽnde, y pãn-kẽengo, bũmb ka be a sẽn pa tõog d yĩng ye." 
Psalms68:30 Dĩm dãmba sã n yãeend dĩma zakã sẽn lug yĩngr Zerizalɛɛm, ad-y b na wa ne b kũuni." 
Psalms68:31 Bɩ dĩma gẽen rudma bõn-nindã n gẽen lol-toosã, gẽen koomẽ rũmsã, gẽen sẽn kũud-b f taoor ne b ligdã! Dĩma sẽeg buud niyns sẽn baood-b zabrã," 
Psalms68:32 tɩ peen neeba le tõog n yit Ezipt n watẽ, tɩ Etiopi wat Wẽnd taoore, t'a nug teesd-b kũuni." 
Psalms68:33 Tẽng zug dĩm dãmba, pʋd-y yɩɩl Soaala yĩnga. Kils-y Soaala-Wẽnde, maan-y sũ-noog bãmb yĩnga." 
Psalms68:34 Bãmb weoof zomb n kẽeda sawad-kutẽ, bãmb koɛɛga la saaga peng n tãsd ne pãnga. Reeg-y tɩ bãmb n so pãnga." 
Psalms68:35 B siga Israyɛl ne naam tɛka. B pãnga tigma sawatẽ. 
Psalms68:36 Wẽnd bee b ro-sõngẽ wã n wilgd tɩ b pãnga ka be taar ye, bãmb la Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, bãmb n kõt b neba pãng la tõogo. B soog barka!" 
Psalms69:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: lɩɩnsa yɩɩlle. 
Psalms69:2 Soaala, fãag-y-ma kooma tata m kokoɛ." 
Psalms69:3 Begd a nare pʋgẽ la m lisda la bũmb kaa n gãtẽ ye. M na n lisa ko-zulungẽ, t'a peeg-m n looge." 
Psalms69:4 M sɛla m pãng ne yãbre; m kokora yõogda bugum; m yõka Soaala gẽesgo la b gũubu tɩ m nin wa yiigi. 
Psalms69:5 Ad-y sẽn kis-b maam tɩ m yaool n ka beegã, ad-y b sõora yɩɩda m zuga zoobdo. Ad-y sẽn dat b maam ne wẽnga la m yaool n ka tar m toorẽ yell ye, yaa nin-kʋʋdb sẽn dat n maan pãng bala. M maanda a wãn n lebs m sẽn pa zuki." 
Psalms69:6 Soaala, yãmb mi m sẽn maane, m beegr ba a ye pa solg-y ye." 
Psalms69:7 Soaala, Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, m da yɩ sẽn teeg-b yãmba nin-zʋklg ye, m da yɩ sẽn baood-b yãmba nin-yaalg ye." 
Psalms69:8 Yaa yãmb yĩng la b tʋʋsd-m tɩ m sĩnda, yãmb yĩng la m bas tɩ m zuga wuk ne yãnde." 
Psalms69:9 M lebga sãan m saam-biis yĩnga, n lebg sãan m ma-biisa yĩnga." 
Psalms69:10 M basame tɩ yãmb ne y ro-sõnga nonglem dɩ-m zãnga, woto neba sẽn tʋʋsd yãmbã na lɛɛg n zab maam." 
Psalms69:11 M Yãbame, m loe m noore, la rẽ waa ne m tʋʋre." 
Psalms69:12 M bao sũ-pa-noang fuug n yeelge, m lebga bɛɛb laado." 
Psalms69:13 Sẽn zĩ-b tẽnga kʋɩlensa noor gomda m yelle. Rã-yũudba ka yɩɩnd ned tɩ ka maam ye. 
Psalms69:14 Soaala, m pʋʋsga la woto; da zãgs-y m kosga ye. Yãmb nonglma sẽn ket n pʋgd-ma bɩ y leok-ma, tɩ yãmb bal la m Fãagd menga." 
Psalms69:15 Bɩ y wa yiis-m begdẽ wã, tɩ m da sud ye! Bɩ y wa zãag-m ne sẽn kis b maama! Bɩ y wa yaag-m ko-liunga pʋga!" 
Psalms69:16 Kooma ko-wiig da tall-m n loog ye! Kʋɩlga bog zulunga ra yɩ m yaoog ye! Bulga sẽn yaag a noora ra vel-m ye! 
Psalms69:17 Soaala, leok-y-m tɩ y ket n nong-m lame. Y nimbãan-zoeera sẽn waoog yĩnga, wẽnemd-y n ges-ma." 
Psalms69:18 Da le solg-y y nenga y yamba ye. M zĩi ne yɩɩre, leok-y-m tao-tao." 
Psalms69:19 Wa-y n yegl-y-ma, n zab n sõmg-ma. M bɛɛba labsa, fãag-y-ma." 
Psalms69:20 Y miime tɩ b tar-m lame n tʋʋda, n tar m paoogr tɩ m zug wuk ne yãnde; m bɛɛba fãa yɛsa m taoore." 
Psalms69:21 Tʋʋra kẽla m sũurẽ n pogl-ma. M tẽe bũmb y nengẽ, la ayo! M gũu neb sẽn na n wa yãb-ma, la m pa yãend ye!" 
Psalms69:22 Nin-bãmb mens soosd n yugla m dɩɩba zẽnem; ko-yũud sã n tar-ma, b kõt-m-la rãam sẽn kẽke." 
Psalms69:23 Bɩ b rɩɩba roog lebg b bẽdgo n lebg bãng b zo-rãmb yĩnga! 
Psalms69:24 B nina mumi n bas-b ne lika; la y nuga pãng kaoog b po-raoogo. 
Psalms69:25 Waag-y-ba ne y sũ-puuri, y sũ-fõora bugum dɩ-ba!" 
Psalms69:26 Bũmb da kees b tãb-sikẽ wã ye, ned da le kẽ b roogẽ ye." 
Psalms69:27 B sẽn dat a soab ne wẽng n yɩɩda, yaa yãmb sẽn zoe n sɩbg a soaba b wat n paasa yẽ soab namsgo." 
Psalms69:28 Yãmb me sõd b beegre, n paalg-b bʋʋdo." 
Psalms69:29 Yẽes-y b yʋyã vɩɩma sebrẽ, da naag-y-ba n sõd ne nin-sõma wã ye." 
Psalms69:30 Sã n ya maam, m paam yaoolgo, b tol n pogl-m lame la wa-y yã, Soaala, tɩ m na põse." 
Psalms69:31 Mam me na pʋd yɩɩlle n pẽg y yʋʋre. M na kils y yʋʋr tɩ y zʋʋga bũmb fãa. 
Psalms69:32 Y yʋʋra pẽgr n noom-y n yɩɩd sẽn ketã, n yɩɩd loalg ne yɩɩl la naobeong sẽn kãde." 
Psalms69:33 Nin-koama na yãend m fãagre n noog a sũuri, n noog a sũur la a yetẽ: «Yãmb fãa sẽn baood Wẽndã, Wẽnd na wogl y yõore!" 
Psalms69:34 Bãng-y tɩ Soaala reegda nimbãan-dãmb kosgo. Ba b yõg-ba n pag roogo, Wẽnd ket n pʋgd-b lame." 
Psalms69:35 Bɩ yĩngri la tẽng pẽg Soaala, bɩ mogra la sẽn vɩ-a pʋgẽ pẽg-ba!" 
Psalms69:36 Wẽnd na n fãaga Siõ, Wẽnd na n le yika Zɩɩda tẽnse, rota soaalb na n le reega b rot n kẽ n zĩnd b pʋsẽ." 
Psalms69:37 Yaa sẽn kẽed-b Wẽnda buudu n na n soog-ba, yaa sẽn nong-b Soaala n na n vɩɩnd b pʋsẽ.»" 
Psalms70:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms70:2 Soaala, wa-y n fãag-y-ma, Zoe-y tao n wa sõng-ma!" 
Psalms70:3 Bɩ yãnd yõk sẽn dat-b n kʋ maama. B tar n leb poorẽ ne yãnde sẽn dat-b maam ne yel-beedã. 
Psalms70:4 Sẽn da yãet-b maam tɩ ya: «N-faa, n-faa!» Bãmb fãa kũ n tɩ roog ne yãnde." 
Psalms70:5 Sẽn baood-b yãmba, Soaala, b fãa lang ne sũ-noogo! Bɩ sẽn baood-b yãmb fãagrã kẽnd la b yetẽ: «Wẽnd waooga! Wẽnd waooga!»" 
Psalms70:6 M zĩi ne naong la fare, Soaala, wa-y tao. Yãmb la m Sõangda la m Fãagda, Soaala, da kaoos-y ye!" 
Psalms71:1 Soaala, m yãk-y lame tɩ y yɩ m soondg zĩiga. Da le sak-y tɩ b paoog-m ye." 
Psalms71:2 Y sẽn pid ne zemsgã, yãmb n na n fãag-ma. Kelg-y m koɛɛg n fãag-ma." 
Psalms71:3 Yɩ-y pĩig ning sẽn na n lill-ma, soondg zĩig m sẽn tõe n ta wakat buud fãa. Yãmb kãab-m-la y fãagre. Sɩda yãmb la m pĩiga, m tãnsoben-doogo." 
Psalms71:4 Fãag-y-m nin-toaaga nugẽ ne nin-kʋʋdba la pãn-tõog rãmb me rẽnnẽ. 
Psalms71:5 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb la m saagre. Al m yãadmẽ yãmb sɛɛgẽ bala la m sũur da ya kẽnkẽ." 
Psalms71:6 M sẽn wa dũni tɛka, yãmb bal la m teegda, m dogem tɛka, yãmb bal la m pẽgda." 
Psalms71:7 M da yaa wa bõn-bãnd neb wʋsg nifẽ m sẽn paam tɩ y lebg m tãnsoben-doogo. 
Psalms71:8 M noor sẽn da mi yaa yãmb pẽgr bala, tɩ m da nee wakat fãa, y sẽn da pid ne ziir ningã." 
Psalms71:9 M sẽn kʋʋl marsã wã bɩ y ra bas-m kɛɛng ye. M pãnga sẽn woogd n dabdã, da zãag-y-m ye." 
Psalms71:10 M bɛɛba gomda m yelle, lɩɩsdba kʋ-la b yẽsgo." 
Psalms71:11 Ad-b sẽn yeele: «Wẽnd bas-a lame wẽ-y gũbri n yõk-a. Ned ba a ye kõ wa n fãag-a ye!» 
Psalms71:12 Soaala, da zãag-y ne m ye, zoe-y tao n wa fãag-ma." 
Psalms71:13 Sẽn baood-b maama zoe n menem ne yãnde. Sẽn baood-b maam ne wẽnga sẽgen paoor la yʋ-beed kʋɩdse. 
Psalms71:14 Sã n ya maam, m ket n saagdame la m ket n tara y pẽgra yɩɩla." 
Psalms71:15 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa m noor le sõdgda y sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa n wa ne zemsgo la fãagre. Ad-y y sẽn maana yaa kõn bãng n sõde. 
Psalms71:16 Maam n dɩ Wẽnd tʋʋm-bãna yõodo. Yãmb sõmblema bal n pid zãnga. 
Psalms71:17 Soaala, al m yãadmẽ la y pʋgd-m ne y wilgri la sẽn ta marsã, m tara y tʋʋm-bãna moonego." 
Psalms71:18 M kʋʋlame la m zug pelgame, Soaala, da bas-y m kɛɛng ye. M dat n tõog n wilga dũnna zamaana rãmba y sẽn maan ne y kang pãnga, n wilg beoog zamaana rãmba y sẽn tʋm ne raoodo." 
Psalms71:19 Y sõmblema zẽk n kula yĩngri, Soaala. Y maana yɛl bɛda, Soaala, ãnda n tõe n wẽneg yãmba?" 
Psalms71:20 Y basame tɩ m yãe bʋko la yel-beed wʋsgo, bɩ y le bas-m bilf bala tɩ d vɩɩnde, Wa-y n yiis-y-ma m sẽn sud n be zĩig ninga." 
Psalms71:21 Wa-y n le paas m ziiri, la y le keng m pɛlga." 
Psalms71:22 M na n baoo bɛɛla n pẽg Soaala, n pẽg b sẽn pʋgd maam ne b nonglma. M na n bao kʋnde n wẽ y yĩnga, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam!" 
Psalms71:23 M na n wãaga ruudg y yĩnga la m noor na n pʋda sũ-noog yɩɩla, tɩ yãmb n fãag m vɩɩm." 
Psalms71:24 M zelemda na n kilsa y sõmblem beoog sẽn vẽege. Yãmb maasem yĩnga, sẽn da baood-b maam ne wẽngã, ad-y yaa bãmb n seg yãnde, n tʋk yʋ-beedo." 
Psalms72:1 A Salomo yɩɩlle. Wẽnnaam, kõ-y dĩma yam ning y sẽn tar n kaood y bʋʋdã; kõ-y dĩm biigã y yam sõngã." 
Psalms72:2 Woto a na bʋ y neba ne zemsgo, n bʋ y yemsa wa sẽn toge." 
Psalms72:3 Y sẽn maand fãa ne zemsgã, bɩ tãmsa la kunkuba dɩlg dĩma soolem." 
Psalms72:4 Bɩ nin-koam paam a sẽn tog n paame, tɩ naong soab paam a teenda, tɩ kalwẽdg la zãmb sɛ zãnga." 
Psalms72:5 Wĩndga la kiuuga sã n ket n wit b bugma fãa, bɩ a neba fãa dig dabeem a taoore, n tãag dũni wã tekre." 
Psalms72:6 Dĩma yɩ kõata, wa saaga n ni bedg-bedg n yʋgemd tẽnga, n ni tɩ yamda wuk bãoogẽ!" 
Psalms72:7 A zĩnd a zaoora zugu, n sik arzɛk la tɩgr nin-sõng zakẽ, tɩ yʋʋma tong taab n tõt sɛɛbo!" 
Psalms72:8 Dĩma rĩunga toaag sɩngda mogrã n ta mog-kãsengã, n sɩng kʋɩl-kãsengã n ta dũni wã tɛka." 
Psalms72:9 We-raoogẽ dãmba na n wõgemda a taoore, a bɛɛba na n moga tom." 
Psalms72:10 Tarsis rãmb la tẽnsa sẽn puk koomẽ dãmba na n toola b kũuni; Saba la Seva dĩm dãmb na n yaoo fadgo. 
Psalms72:11 Dĩm dãmb a taaba na n wõgemda a taoore, bu-zẽmba fãa zug la a na n dɩ naam." 
Psalms72:12 A na n fãaga naong soab sẽn kos a sõngre, la nin-koam sẽn ka tar teegda." 
Psalms72:13 A na n gesa naong la sẽn ka-a pãng soab yelle, a na n fãaga naong rãmb yõore." 
Psalms72:14 A na fãag-b sũ-to-rãmba la nin-toose nusẽ, a kõn bas tɩ b kood-b zaalem ye." 
Psalms72:15 Wẽnd na kaoos rĩma! A soolma rãmba na ges t'a paam Saba sãnema, b na pʋʋs a yĩng n ka vʋʋs ye, b na kils-a beoog sẽn vẽege!" 
Psalms72:16 Bɩ tẽnga tõre, tẽn nabrẽ n tãag tãmsa zutu, yɛdg ne pʋto, tɩ kooda zut sulgdẽ la b roogdẽ wa Libã googa sẽn maande. F sã n be tẽnga pʋga, f sẽn ne yaa vã-maas bala." 
Psalms72:17 Bɩ dĩma yʋʋr da menem moog ye, a yʋʋra zẽk saaga tẽngre, tɩ ned fãa pʋd a yʋʋra ne pẽgre, tɩ neba fãa boola tɩ zu-noog soaba." 
Psalms72:18 Bɩ Wẽnd paam pẽgre, bɩ Israyɛl Wẽnda paam pẽgre! Bãmb b ye bala n maan bõn-bãna." 
Psalms72:19 B yʋʋr sẽn tog ne pẽgra soog barka! B pids mooga ne b ziiri! Ami, ami!" 
Psalms72:20 Woto n baasd a Zese biig a Daviid yɩɩla. 
Psalms73:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Sã n ya sɩda, Wẽnd pida ne nonglem a Israyɛl yĩnga n pid ne nonglem sũ-tɩrg soab yĩnga." 
Psalms73:2 M yaool n da sɩnga lʋɩɩse, bilf bal tɩ m taẽ tẽnga." 
Psalms73:3 M da maanda sũ-kiiri ne sẽn tiig-ba n lebg arzɛk rãmba. M da nee nin-wẽnsa zu-noogo. 
Psalms73:4 B ka mongd b meng bũmb n tãag b kũum ye, b pʋʋra maneg n zɩsgame tɩ b kẽnda," 
Psalms73:5 b pa namsd wa neb a taab ye, b pa reegd toog ning sẽn lʋɩt b taab zug ye." 
Psalms73:6 B kẽnda ne tɩtaam, tɩ rẽ yaab zu-zẽkre. Maan ned pãng toga ne-ba wa fuug sẽn mag n yaool n sẽ sẽn tog ne a soaba." 
Psalms73:7 B arzɛka sẽn ya wʋsgã, b geta neb a taaba wa zaalem, la ned kam fãa mii b sẽn tagsd b sũurẽ." 
Psalms73:8 Ad-y b laadame la b gomd ne wẽnem, la yaa tɩtaam bal la b maanda, b pa togsd sɩd ye." 
Psalms73:9 B noor sã n yaage, ya Wẽnd bal la b rat n tʋʋse; b ka yãet bũmb tẽng zug ka n ka gom n yãk a zak ye." 
Psalms73:10 Dẽ me la neba fã wẽneg n get-b la b gagd b zirẽ wã wa zom-koom. 
Psalms73:11 Ad-y nin-wẽnsa yetame: «Wẽnd kõn bãng fɩ! Sẽn zao-a yĩngrã yɩta wãn n yãende?» 
Psalms73:12 Nin-bãmba sɩd vɩɩ wa bũmb ka be d sẽn tog n gãd wa bõn-pakdem ye. Yel-beed ka tat-b ye, b yɛla manegdame n dabda." 
Psalms73:13 Dɩlla, mam sõmblema, yaa zaalem, m mi m na kell pa ne-a? Yaa zaalem la m nus na n pek n wilg tɩ yell ka m zug bɩ?" 
Psalms73:14 M yãeta toog buud fãa beoog sẽn vẽege, yibeoog fãa sood-m-la a ko-tʋʋlga." 
Psalms73:15 M yik n gomd wa bãmba, m kõn le wẽneg y buuda kamb ye." 
Psalms73:16 M tagsdame n baood sẽn ya toog ne maama võore, la rẽ fãa waa n lebga m zu-loɛɛga," 
Psalms73:17 n tãag daar ning m sẽn kẽ Soaala roogẽ; wakat kãng la m bãng yã nin-wẽnsa yɛla sẽn na n baas to-to. 
Psalms73:18 Yãmb yalsa salse nin-wẽnsa nao tẽngre n na n tus-b tɩ b lʋɩ bẽdgẽ. 
Psalms73:19 Ad-y nin-wẽnsa sãoonga na n yɩɩ vugr bala, vugr bal tɩ b na n lebg zaalem, vugr bal tɩ rabeem ne yɛɛsgo loog ne-ba!" 
Psalms73:20 Soaala, y sã n sɩng b menesgo, ad-y na n yɩɩ wa ned sẽn zãms n neke, yɛla soy kaa n dɩkdẽ ye." 
Psalms73:21 M sẽn da waa n zĩ ne sũ-pa-noanga, n zĩ ne yɩɩr la yɩɩre," 
Psalms73:22 m da wẽnda wa yalma, n ka ne fɩ, m ra yaa wa rũnga, yãmb taoore." 
Psalms73:23 M yaool n da bee ne yãmb daar fãa, tɩ y zãad-m y nugẽ." 
Psalms73:24 Y sẽn wilg-m sor ninga la m vɩɩma tũuda, y zɩɩra sẽn pukẽ wã la m tees yã." 
Psalms73:25 Yĩngri, ãnda n na n wa sõng-ma sã n ka yãmba. La tẽng zug ka, m sẽn tar yãmbã, bõe la m na n tʋlg n paase?" 
Psalms73:26 Kʋʋlem tõe n sɛla m yĩngã, n loog ne m daooda fãa, la m teegdã, m daoodã, m fãa-fãa wã, na n yɩɩ yãmba, Wẽnde, daar fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms73:27 Ad-y sẽn zãag-a ne yãmb baooda a kũum. Sẽn bas-a yãmb n baood bũmb a to, menemdame." 
Psalms73:28 Pa yãmb sɛɛgẽ la m sũ-noogo, Soaala, tɩ yaa yãmb sɛɛgẽ la m waa n soond la m na n tõog n moon y tʋʋm-bãna." 
Psalms74:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Bõe tɩ y basd-m kɛɛng daar fãa, bõe tɩ y puug y sũur ne y bãgra rũmsi?" 
Psalms74:2 Tẽeg-y buud ning y sẽn bao n kõ y meng sɩngrẽ, buud ning y sẽn yãk wala y pʋɩɩre. Tẽeg-y Siõ tãnga, yẽ zug la b tii y ro-sõngã." 
Psalms74:3 Kẽn-y n tees a raboogã sẽn yɛdg n dɩgã. Bɛɛba wãa fãa y ro-sõngã. 
Psalms74:4 Yaa yãmb sẽn da segd tõnd zĩig ninga la bɛɛba kẽ n kaase b zabr kaasgo. Be la b kẽ n yagl b zab-yʋy. 
Psalms74:5 B ra wẽnda ra-kɛɛdba sẽn kẽ goog ne b lare," 
Psalms74:6 n tãag b kʋɩlensã n pãbe la b kɛ n kʋʋse. 
Psalms74:7 B tugla y dooga bugum, b rẽgmame la b sarma b sẽn waoogd-y zĩig ningã." 
Psalms74:8 B zemsa taab gilli n na n yõog tẽnsa pʋsẽ, zĩis niyns fãa d sẽn da tar sɛk ne Soaala." 
Psalms74:9 D ka le ne bõn-bãn ye, bãngd ka le ket ye, la ned ba a ye ka mi sẽn na n ta wakat ning ye." 
Psalms74:10 Soaala, keta rasma a wãna, rasma a wãn tɩ bɛ wã na n kell n tall y tʋʋre? A na n kell n laa maam n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms74:11 Bõe tɩ y na n yõbg y rɩt kanga? Bõe tɩ y pa na n zẽk-a n va? 
Psalms74:12 Yãmb la m Wẽnd la m dĩm al sɩngrẽ, la yaa yãmb maasem yĩng la m tõog bɛɛbã." 
Psalms74:13 Yãmb yalsa mogrã a toaagẽ, wag bãnda zuta koglma taab koomẽ n bõgs taab wa yoaga." 
Psalms74:14 Yãmb bedsa a Leviatã zutã, la y rɩgs-b lame n lob we-rũmsi." 
Psalms74:15 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ ko-nin pusi n kɩt tɩ kʋɩls zoe ne pãnga, n kɩt tɩ kʋɩls niyns sẽn da pid n daannẽ, lebg kʋɩl wagdo." 
Psalms74:16 Yãmb n so raare, n so yʋngo, yãmb n yagl-b, b zĩigẽ, wĩntoog la kiuugu." 
Psalms74:17 Yãmb n karg tẽnga toaaga, n welg sẽoog la sɩpaolgo." 
Psalms74:18 Tẽeg-y tɩ bɛ wã tʋʋsa Wẽnde, tẽeg-y tɩ gãeemse n sãam y yʋʋre." 
Psalms74:19 Da rɩk-y y wallã n lob wɩbg ye, tẽeg-y toog sẽn gũbg-b rãmb vɩɩma yelle." 
Psalms74:20 Le nek-y zoodã; ges-y tãmsa bogd sẽn pidi; neba zoe n wa soonda be n na n tɩlg pãn-tõogo. 
Psalms74:21 Modg-y tɩ ned da paoog a to, modg-y tɩ neba zã taab ne laafi la bãane, sõng-y tɩ sẽn ya-a naong la sẽn tar-a pɛta tõog n pẽg y yʋʋre." 
Psalms74:22 Yik-y yã, Soaala, zab-y y zabre. Tẽeg-y tɩ b yika wa gãeemse n tar y tʋʋre, la b tʋʋd-y lame tɩ wĩndg kẽ." 
Psalms74:23 Da bas-y tɩ bɛɛba bʋ-raasa wek y tʋb ye, Da bas-y tɩ b bʋra le yãng paas ye." 
Psalms75:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Da sãam-y ye. 
Psalms75:2 Soaala, d pẽgda yãmba; d kilsda y yʋʋrã tɩ y waa n be-la d sʋka. D datame tɩ neba tẽeg tʋʋm-bãna y sẽn tʋm d yĩnga." 
Psalms75:3 Naaba-Wẽnd sã n bool bʋʋdo, yella welgda ne zemsgo." 
Psalms75:4 Tẽnga na n looga ne a neba fãa. Ka maam a Wẽnde n yals-a a zĩigẽ laa? 
Psalms75:5 M yeela sẽn wuk-b n zĩi wã: «Bas-y wilg-m-menga!» M yeela sẽn ka mi-b Wẽndã: 
Psalms75:6 «Da maan-y zẽk-m-meng ye! Da nak-y y kãara woto n gomd ye!» 
Psalms75:7 Y fãagra ka na n yi yaang bɩ taoor ye, a ka na n yi we-raoogẽ wã ye." 
Psalms75:8 Yaa Wẽnd n so bʋʋdo, bãmb n paalgd yãoo soaba, bãmb n yiisd yãoo soab yellẽ." 
Psalms75:9 Ya wamd la Soaala zãad b nugẽ, a pida ne rãam sẽn kũmi n miki; la b na n tugla tẽnga wẽn-kɩɩsdba tɩ b yũ-a n tãag bɩlle." 
Psalms75:10 Sã n ya maam, ad-m sẽn na n yɩɩl bũmb ninga, ad-m sẽn na n yɩɩl daar fãa a Zakoob Wẽndã:" 
Psalms75:11 «B na sulga nin-wẽnsa fãa zutu la b na n dooga nin-sõma wã fãa rẽnna.» 
Psalms76:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩnda ne ruuds la koala. 
Psalms76:2 Wẽnd lika b meng Zɩɩda, b yʋʋra yii wʋsg Israyɛl." 
Psalms76:3 B wẽ-la b sika Salɛm, Siõ tãnga la b zaoolg b ro-sõngo." 
Psalms76:4 Yaa be la b kao bɛɛba tãbdo b gãongo la b sʋʋga, n sɛɛs zabre." 
Psalms76:5 Siõ yãgda ne neerem, be la bɛɛba laog reeg n zam wa tãnga." 
Psalms76:6 Tãb-biisa sẽn da pid ne raooda waa n mikame tɩ b reesa b teedo. B basame tɩ gõeem lub-ba. B sẽn neke b pa le yãend zab teoog b nugẽ ye. 
Psalms76:7 Yãmb mooga y nif ne bãmba, Zakoob Wẽnde, tɩ wiid la wed-dʋʋdb gĩin wẽneg n maage." 
Psalms76:8 Yãmb sɩd kẽesda rabeem, la ãnda n tõe n yals y taoore, y sũura sã n wa yik n kɛɛda?" 
Psalms76:9 Yãmb bee yĩngri n kaood y bʋʋdo, tɩ dabeem kẽed dũni wã, t'a zĩ sɩɩ," 
Psalms76:10 yãmb sã n wa yik n yeele tɩ y na n fãaga dũni wã nin-bõonesã. 
Psalms76:11 Ad-y neba sũur sẽn puuga menga na n lɛɛg n waa ne yãmb yʋʋra pẽgre. Sẽn põs-b bʋʋda, b sẽn ka paalg b rãmbã na n maana kibs n pʋʋs-y barka." 
Psalms76:12 Pʋlem-y y pʋleng y Soaala la y Wẽndã, la modg-y n pids y pʋlengo. Yãmb fãa sẽn be b sɛɛgẽ wã, wa-y ne kũuni n kõ Pãng-Soabã." 
Psalms76:13 B taoore rĩm biisa yɛɛsdame, tɩ tẽnga dĩm dãmba rigda." 
Psalms77:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab la Levitsa sebrẽ. A Asaf yɩɩlle. 
Psalms77:2 Yaa Wẽnd la m kaasd n boondẽ. Yaa Soaala la m boonda, b wa kelg-ma." 
Psalms77:3 M yɩɩra pʋgẽ, m bao Soaala, m wẽnemda m neng n tees bãmba, yʋnga tõre m nusa zẽkame n tees bãmba, m pa teeg ned a to yolsg ye." 
Psalms77:4 M tẽegda Wẽnd yelle, n yãbda la m sẽn tar tẽegrã, m yama maneg n kẽeda weoogo." 
Psalms77:5 M gãeeme n ka gõe ye, m yama bondgame, m ka mi m sẽn gomd n lebdẽ ye." 
Psalms77:6 M le tẽegda pĩnd wakatã, m sõta yʋʋma sẽn looge." 
Psalms77:7 Zĩig sã n sobge, m tẽra m sẽn da yɩɩnde m le rɩkd-a-la m sũurẽ tɩ m yam le sɩng gõobo." 
Psalms77:8 Soaala tõe n wa bas-m-la zãng bɩ? B kõn waa n le bao m zĩiga? 
Psalms77:9 B ka le pʋgd-m ne b zooda bɩ? B koɛɛga pa na n le yiis bada bɩ? 
Psalms77:10 Soaala yĩmame n ka le kõt sugr bɩ? B sũura puugame tɩ b pag b nonglma zaka noor laa? 
Psalms77:11 Sɩda, m sẽn zĩ tɩ m yama yoodã yaa m sẽn pa le ne Yĩngr Soaalã n pa le ne-b ne b pĩnd tʋʋm-bãna." 
Psalms77:12 M tẽra b nug sẽn da tʋmd pĩnda; m tẽra b pĩnd wẽnd-makrã," 
Psalms77:13 m le tẽegda y sẽn maana fãa a yeyn-ye. 
Psalms77:14 Soaala, yãmb sora yaa sõmblem sore. Wẽnd bʋg n ya Wẽnd wa tõnd Wẽnnaama?" 
Psalms77:15 Yãmb la Wẽnd ninga sẽn maanda bõn-bãna. Yãmb n wilg y pãng bu-zẽmbã. 
Psalms77:16 Y Nug pãng n fãag y buudã, a Zakoob la a Zozɛf yagensã." 
Psalms77:17 Kooma yãenda yãmba, Soaala, kooma yãenda yãmba, n leng ne rabeem, mogra meng ra yɛɛsdame." 
Psalms77:18 Sawata budga b kooma fãa, sa-tãsa maana bʋʋr yĩngri, saaga sʋʋs yãga goalma." 
Psalms77:19 Saaga tãsame la a naag n yãge t'a vẽenema reeg zĩig n yãmbe, tɩ tẽnga na n yɛɛs la a miimi." 
Psalms77:20 Y kẽe mogra pʋga n tuk y sore, n tuk so-yaleng mog-zulungẽ la sã n ka yãmba, ned ba a ye ka tar a buk ye." 
Psalms77:21 Yãmb gũ-la y buuda wa rũm-kɩɩm sẽn gũud a rũmsi. A Moyiiz la a Aarõ nug n tʋm dẽnna. 
Psalms78:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. M buudu, kelg m gomde! M noora goam lʋɩ f tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms78:2 M na n yaaga m noor n gome tɩ zaamẽ yɛla yik rũnna n le kõ-d zãmsgo. 
Psalms78:3 Tõnd sẽn wʋme, d sẽn yãende, d ba rãmba sẽn taas tõndo," 
Psalms78:4 d ka na n sĩnd-b ye, d na n deeg-b lame n wilg d yagense, d na wilg-b bõe yĩng la Soaala tog ne pẽgre, d na puk b pãnga ne bõn-bãna sẽn maana." 
Psalms78:5 Noor la b yals a Zakoob tẽn-peelmẽ, a Israyɛl buuda yĩng la b yiis noore, la noora ra yeta d yaab rãmbã" 
Psalms78:6 tɩ b wilg b yagensã, tɩ bãmb me wa reeg n taas b sẽn na n dog kamb niynsã." 
Psalms78:7 Noora ratame tɩ b teeg Wẽnde, tɩ b da yĩm wẽnd-makr dãmba ye, tɩ b tũ sor ning b sẽn wilgi," 
Psalms78:8 n da wẽneg b yaab rãmba, tɩ yaab rãmba zamaan yɩɩ tõatb zamaana, ninsaan-yiu la pilimpigd zamaan, ninsaalb sẽn ka pelg b pʋg ne Wẽnd zamaana." 
Psalms78:9 A Efrayim yagensã sẽn da bob logdo n na n tak zabrã kong n lɛɛg n zoe tula, zabra raare," 
Psalms78:10 tɩ b zãgsa Wẽnd noora reegr n sãam zoodã. 
Psalms78:11 B ra yĩma b bõn-bãna, n yĩm b tʋʋm-bãna b sẽn maan b barãmb nifẽ." 
Psalms78:12 B ba rãmba nifẽ, b ra maana makr-dãmb a taaba: Ezipt tẽnga, Tanis noorẽ," 
Psalms78:13 mogra koom waa n yik n yalsa wa lalga goabg la rɩtgo tɩ b loog sʋka. 
Psalms78:14 B ra wilgd-b-la sor wĩntoogo ne sawadgo, yʋngo sawadg kãng kelld n yãngda ne vẽenem." 
Psalms78:15 We-raoogẽ pĩisa ra pusda koom, tɩ b ra tar koom n yũud b yam wa b pooga tẽngr ko-yũugã." 
Psalms78:16 Pĩisa pusga koom la b kooma zoe wa kʋɩlse. 
Psalms78:17 Ne rẽ fãa yaab rãmba kell n talla Wẽnd beegre. Pʋ-weesẽ wã b yõka Pãng-Soaba tõdgre. 
Psalms78:18 B yika ne pʋ-toogo n fɛɛs Wẽnde. B kosame tɩ b kõ-b tɩ b rɩ wa b sẽn dat tɛka. 
Psalms78:19 B guglma ne Wẽnde, la ad-b sẽn yeele: «D ges Wẽnd sã n tõe n kõ-d-la rɩɩb we-raoogẽ." 
Psalms78:20 D yãenda b sẽn wẽ pĩigã, n sɩd tõog tɩ koom zoe wa kʋɩlse, la sã n ya bura la nemdã, b yãet-a-la yɛ n kõ nebã?»" 
Psalms78:21 La Wẽnd me sẽn wʋm dẽ, b sũura puugame, tɩ bugum widg n na n dɩ a Zakoob, tɩ b sũura na n fudg n waag a Israyɛl." 
Psalms78:22 B ra ka bas b yɛla ne Wẽnd ye, b ra pa tẽed tɩ b na fãag-b ye." 
Psalms78:23 Soaala kõo yĩngr sawata noore, b pagsa yĩngr ko-nina." 
Psalms78:24 B kɩtame tɩ rɩɩb yi yĩngr n dʋʋge, alkam sẽn bʋd yĩngr la b kõ-ba." 
Psalms78:25 Woto ned kam fãa paama yĩngr dãmba dɩɩb n dɩ. B kõ-b lame tɩ b rɩ n tɩge. 
Psalms78:26 Yĩngri, b tusa yaang sobga t'a menem, b Pãnga boola nug rɩtg sobgã." 
Psalms78:27 Nemd kaooga wa sobg n dʋʋge, luiili nemd la b kõ-ba, la luiili wã sõor zema mogr noor bĩisri." 
Psalms78:28 Luiili wã ra wat n dʋʋgda b sika pʋga, b rʋʋgame n gilg b rotã." 
Psalms78:29 B rɩɩme la yɩɩ rɩɩb tɛka; Wẽnd da reega b kosgo. 
Psalms78:30 B velma ra ket n zabd-b lame, b noor da ket n pida ne nemdo," 
Psalms78:31 la Wẽnd sũur puuga ne-ba la sẽn da ya-b nin-tɩɩsa fãa loogame, a Israyɛl kom-bɩɩba me naag n dʋʋgame." 
Psalms78:32 Ne rẽ fãa b ra ket n beegda Wẽnde, bõn-bãna sẽn da maanda ka gãneg b yam ye." 
Psalms78:33 B raar ra loogda wa sobg sẽn loode, tɩ b yʋʋma ra pid ne yɛɛsg la yɛɛsgo." 
Psalms78:34 B sẽn wat n kiidẽ wã la b baood Wẽnd zĩiga; wakat kãng bal la b ra teemd zʋgo, la b wẽnemd b neng n tees bãmba." 
Psalms78:35 B ra lebd n tẽegame tɩ Wẽnd la b pĩiga, tɩ Pãng-Soaba la b Sõangda." 
Psalms78:36 La b waa n gomdame n dat n tudug Wẽnde, b zelemda da ka leokd sɩd ne Wẽnd ye." 
Psalms78:37 B sũura ra ka loe ne bãmb ye, b ra ka maand pʋ-peelem ne Wẽnd zooda ye." 
Psalms78:38 Wẽnd kelga b nimbãan-zoeerã n da yẽesd b beegrã, la b ra basd-lame n pa kʋʋd ye. Naoor wʋsgo Wẽnd yõka b menga, b pa bas tɩ b sũura fudg zãng ye." 
Psalms78:39 Wẽnd tẽrame tɩ b naan-b-la ne nemd bala, la b yaa pemsem sẽn lood n ka na n lebg ye." 
Psalms78:40 Yaa naoor ka tɛka la b yɩ tõatb, we-raoogẽ wã, yaa naoor ka tɛk la b yɩ kɩɩsdb, zĩ-peen-daasẽ wã." 
Psalms78:41 Yaab rãmba ka wʋʋs ne Wẽnd fɛɛsg ye. B sãamda Israyɛl Nin-sõnga sũur dũnna, n le sãam-a beoogo." 
Psalms78:42 B wa n yĩma tʋʋm-bɛd niyns b nug sẽn tʋme, tɩ b paam n yi b soaalba yembdẽ." 
Psalms78:43 B yĩma b sẽn maan Ezipt, b sẽn maan Tanis." 
Psalms78:44 B yĩma b sẽn yũnug b tẽnga t'a lebg zɩɩm, zĩig zãnga, tɩ ko yũudem ka le tõe n paam n yũ ye." 
Psalms78:45 B yĩma b sẽn tʋm dũms la keooda, n tʋm loms b zagsẽ la b ko-yũusẽ." 
Psalms78:46 B yĩma b sẽn tʋm sʋʋre t'a wa sɛɛs b bõn-koadi, n tʋm kalwaare t'a wa loog ne sẽn bʋde." 
Psalms78:47 B yĩma b sẽn bas tɩ sapɩlem sʋʋg b bugsuntundu, n bas tɩ waood pus b kankama." 
Psalms78:48 B yĩma b sẽn bas tɩ sapɩlem lab b rũmsi, n bas tɩ sa-tãs yõog b bãg la b wuba." 
Psalms78:49 B yĩma b sẽn bas tɩ b sũura puug n waag-ba, n bas-b ne sũ-beed la yɩɩre, n bas-b ne tẽn-kũum malɛgse." 
Psalms78:50 B yĩma b sẽn bas-b ne b sũ-fõore, tɩ kũum kẽed b zagsẽ, tɩ bã-longdem loogd ne yõore," 
Psalms78:51 B yĩma b sẽn kʋ Ezipt kom-dẽemse, tɩ b zags fãa dig rogem waoodo." 
Psalms78:52 B sẽn yiis b neba wa niisi, b sẽn tees-b we-raooga wa piisi." 
Psalms78:53 B yĩma b sẽn kiis b yɩɩre n wilg-b so-sõma n yaool n bas tɩ mogra rɩ b bɛɛba. 
Psalms78:54 B yĩma b sẽn tall-ba n kẽes b soolmẽ b sẽn deeg tãn-sõnga ne pãnga, n tall-ba n dʋʋs a zug tẽnsʋka." 
Psalms78:55 B yĩma b sẽn dig bu-zẽmbã b taoore, b sẽn kõ buud fãa a zu-noog pʋɩɩre b sẽn kẽes Israyɛl sak fãa a roogẽ." 
Psalms78:56 Yaab rãmba le yik n yeelame tɩ zãaba pa ta b yam ye, tɩ b le yik n tar yĩngr Wẽnda fɛɛsgo, tɩ b le yik n zãgs b noora reegre," 
Psalms78:57 tɩ b le sɩng zãmbo ne Wẽnde, n sɩng zoe n zãag ne Wẽnde. B yɩɩ wa pĩim sẽn lɛɛg n kõs a tãooda." 
Psalms78:58 B ra yaanda Wẽnd sũuri ne b tãmsa zut maan-kugã, Wẽnd sũur da kãbda ne b wẽn-naandsã." 
Psalms78:59 Wẽnd wʋmame n sɩd yik ne b kamba, a Israyɛl la b yik n dig zãnga." 
Psalms78:60 B meng zãaga ne Silo, n zãag ne roog ning b sẽn da kõ b menga, b sẽn waa n dat n zĩnd b neba sʋkã." 
Psalms78:61 B basame tɩ b loog ne zood kasetã, n bas tɩ bɛɛba na n sɩng b ziira paoogre." 
Psalms78:62 B basa b buuda ne bɛɛba sʋʋse, b zaba ne b sẽn da kees buud ning wala b pʋɩɩrã." 
Psalms78:63 Bugum tilgame n dɩ b kom-bɩɩbã, b kom-pugli ka le paam tɩ b yãb b kʋʋr ye." 
Psalms78:64 Maan-kʋʋdba mens kooda ne sʋʋse, la pʋg-kõapa pa yãb b sɩdb rãmb ye." 
Psalms78:65 Wẽnd waa n neka wa ned sẽn da gõe, wa gãndaoog sẽn paam dãam n yẽeg a gĩini." 
Psalms78:66 B leba poorẽ n wẽ b wẽedo, la bɛɛba kõn tõog bada n pek rẽgd ning sẽn dẽgem-b baraara ye." 
Psalms78:67 B basa a Zozɛf buuda kɛɛnga, b basa a Efrayim roogo." 
Psalms78:68 A Zɩɩda buuda la b yãk yã, Siõ tãnga n waa n ta b yam n yɩɩd." 
Psalms78:69 B mela b rooga tɩ yẽ me lug wa tãnga, b yals-a-la wa b sẽn yals tẽngã, yaa daar fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms78:70 B sõgen, a Daviid, la b lʋɩɩs taoore, la rẽ t'a ra yaa pe-kɩɩma." 
Psalms78:71 A Daviid basa a piisã n wa sake, la Wẽnd kɩtame t'a lebge a Zakoob buuda pe-kɩɩma, n kɩt t'a lebg a Israyɛl, bãmb pʋɩɩra, pe-kɩɩma." 
Psalms78:72 Pe-kɩɩma sũur da yaa tɩrga, la a sɩd gũ piisa ne yam sõngo." 
Psalms79:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Bu-zẽmba reega y soolma n yãmbe, Soaala, b rẽgma y ro-sõngã, b kɩtame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm lebg raboogo." 
Psalms79:2 B sẽn kood b rãmbã yĩnsi, b rɩk-b lame n lob yĩngr luiili, b rɩk-b lame n lob we-rũmsi." 
Psalms79:3 B budga b zɩɩma n gilg Zerizalɛɛm, la ba a ye sẽn paam yaoog ka ye." 
Psalms79:4 D yagsa tar-d lame n yaannẽ, d lebga d bɛɛb laad n gilgi." 
Psalms79:5 Soaala, y sũura sẽn ka maagdã, na n kell n yɩɩ woto n ta da-bʋre? Y sũura na n kell n kãba ne tõnd n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms79:6 Fudg-y y sũura ne buud niyns sẽn ka mi-b yãmbã ne buud niyns sẽn ka waoogd-b yãmbã," 
Psalms79:7 tɩ yaa bãmb n tak zabr ne a Zakoob, la yaa bãmb n wã a soolem." 
Psalms79:8 Da rogl-y d zugu pĩnd yel-wẽna ye. Aya! Seg-y-d ne nimbãan-zoeere, tɩ yɛla sẽbga wʋsgo." 
Psalms79:9 Sõng-y-do, d Wẽnd la d Fãagda, tɩ y yʋʋra na paam pẽgre." 
Psalms79:10 Bõe tɩ y bas bu-zẽmba tɩ b gomda: «B Wẽnda bɛɛ?» Bɩ bu-zẽmba bãng rũnda bala, tɩ b na n doka b sũuri, b sẽn kʋ b neba yĩnga." 
Psalms79:11 Bas-y tɩ b sẽn pag b rãmb rooga kɛleng ta yã. Y pãnga sẽn labs yĩnga, bɩ b ra kʋ b sẽn paalg b rãmb bʋʋda ye." 
Psalms79:12 Bɩ d yagsa reeg naoor a yopoe, b zugẽ, paoogr ning b sẽn paoog yãmba, Soaala." 
Psalms79:13 Tõnd sẽn ya yãmb buudã, y sẽn get b rãmb yelle wa rũm-kɩɩm ne a rũmsã, tõnd na tõog marsã n pẽg y yʋʋre, la d kils yã, zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms80:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Tees lɩɩnse. 
Psalms80:2 Israyɛl pe-kɩɩma, kelge! Yãmb n get a Zozɛf yelle wa rũm-kɩɩm ne a rũmsi. Yãmb sẽn tɩ zaoolg y meng malɛgsa zutu," 
Psalms80:3 puk-y y meng a Efrayim, a Bẽnzame la a Manase. Le yik-y ne d sẽn mi-y ne raood ningã n wa fãagd-do." 
Psalms80:4 Le kẽes-y tõnd d soolmẽ. Sõng-y tɩ y nenga vẽenem bui-du tɩ d na paam fãagre. 
Psalms80:5 Soaala, Pãng-Soaba, y sũura na n puugame n ta da-bʋre, y buuda neba kosg na n yaal-y lame n ta wakat bʋgo?" 
Psalms80:6 Y na n kell n dɩlga y kamba ne bur sẽn wẽ ne nintãm, n yũnug-b ne nintãm wam pogbre?" 
Psalms80:7 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ d bɛɛba tar no-koɛɛm tõnd poorẽ, yãmb kɩtame tɩ d lebg d bɛɛba laado." 
Psalms80:8 Soaala, Pãng-Soaba, le kẽes-y tõnd d soolmẽ, Bɩ y nenga vẽenem bui-du, tɩ d na paam fãagre." 
Psalms80:9 Bugsuntung ning y sẽn võog Ezipt tẽnga, y lebs-a lame n sel zĩig ning y sẽn dig bu-zẽmbã n yiisã." 
Psalms80:10 Y pesma tẽngã a yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩlẽ t'a kɩ yẽgen sõma n wa reeg zĩigã n yãmbe." 
Psalms80:11 Tãmsa ra bãma ne a maasem, t'a biisa gaam tɩ bɛdã," 
Psalms80:12 t'a tão a wila n tãag mogre, n tão a yagense n tãag kʋɩlgã." 
Psalms80:13 Bõe tɩ y bas t'a yãgra wurgi, tɩ so loaadba kẽed n kaood a biisi?" 
Psalms80:14 Reoog yita a tʋgrẽ n wa rɩ-a tẽnga rũms wat n wãbd-a lame. 
Psalms80:15 Wẽnnaam Pãng-Soaba, lɛɛg-y n wa-y yã. Zĩnd-y yĩngr n ges y bugsuntungã, la y y maan bũmbu a yĩnga." 
Psalms80:16 Maan-y bũmb y tɩɩga yĩnga tɩɩg ning y nuga sẽn selã, maan-y bũmb y dĩma yĩnga, y sẽn taag a soab naama kaama yĩnga." 
Psalms80:17 Bɩ sẽn yõog-b la sẽn kʋʋg-b tɩɩga da le yaas Wẽnd sẽn pid ne sũ-fõora taoor ye. 
Psalms80:18 Bɩ y nuga kell n tik dĩma y sẽn zĩndg y rɩtgo n kõ naama. 
Psalms80:19 Woto d kõn le bas-y ye, y na paas d vɩɩma noogo, la d na waoog y yʋʋre." 
Psalms80:20 Soaala Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba, le kẽes-y tõnd y soolmẽ, bɩ y nenga vẽenem le bui-du tɩ d na paam fãagre." 
Psalms81:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Bugsuntunga biis yɩɩlle. 
Psalms81:2 Kaas-y sũ-noog Soaala yĩnga: bãmb la d pãnga. D kils a Zakoob Wẽndã. 
Psalms81:3 Maan-y noogo, ne gãngãoogo ne ruudg la kʋnde." 
Psalms81:4 Kũms-y baorg ki-paalga yĩnga, a rãamd sãd ki peoolgo la yʋʋm-vẽkre." 
Psalms81:5 Yaa noor sẽn yals a Israyɛl yĩnga, yaa noor a Zakoob Wẽnda sẽn yiisi." 
Psalms81:6 Yaa noor b sẽn kõ a Zozɛf buudu, Wẽnd sẽn wa n yik zabr ne Ezipt tẽnga. No-rɛɛs n deeg n gome n yeele:" 
Psalms81:7 M sika zɩɩbã f bãgdẽ, m yolsa f nug ne yembd-tʋʋma." 
Psalms81:8 F sẽn waa n zĩ ne yɩɩre f bool-m lame la m fãag-f lame. M zĩnda sa tãsa sʋka n leok-fo. M fɛɛs-f-la Meriba ko-nifẽ. 
Psalms81:9 M buudu, kelg-ma, tɩ m tara bũmb n na n wilg-fu, la fo sã n da tõe bɩ f kelgẽ, Israyɛl!" 
Psalms81:10 Fo nengẽ, bɩ weer da le zĩnd wẽnd sãang yĩng ye! Wẽn-naand da paam waoogr f nengẽ ye!" 
Psalms81:11 Maam f Soaala la f Wẽnde, la maam n yiis-f Ezipt tẽnga. Wilg maam f raaba fãa t'a na pidsi." 
Psalms81:12 M buuda ka kelg-m ye, a Israyɛl ka le tʋlg maam ye." 
Psalms81:13 Ya rẽ me yĩng la mam me bas-a ne a tʋb-pa-wʋmdem. B maan b sẽn date. 
Psalms81:14 M buud a Israyɛl sã n da kelgẽ a sã n da rɩkẽ sor ning m sẽn wilg-a," 
Psalms81:15 kõn le kaoosẽ tɩ bɛɛba tũ sor ye. M naan n zẽkẽ m nug n pãb-b n tõoge. 
Psalms81:16 Wẽnd bɛɛba naan n sulgẽ b menga la Israyɛl na n yãeẽ-la vɩɩm noogo daar fãa. 
Psalms81:17 Wẽnd na dɩlgẽ-yẽe ne alkam sõngo n tɩgs-a ne weoog sɩɩdo. 
Psalms82:1 A Asaf yɩɩlle. Wẽnd dʋ-la b zaoore la malɛgsa sʋka b sɩngame n na n bʋ bʋʋdo. 
Psalms82:2 Ad-y yaa woto la Wẽnd sokda: «Y na n talla y bʋʋd lɛbla kaoobo, n bʋʋd n fãagd nin-wẽnga, la y paalgd nin-sõngo, n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms82:3 Bɩ kɩɩb-bil bʋʋdo la a ka neng soab bʋʋd bʋ tɩrga, sẽn zĩ-a ne pɛta, a nug ka zãad soaba," 
Psalms82:4 da sak-y tɩ bãmb dãmb bʋʋda golem ye, bʋ-y n fãag-b nin-wẽnsa nugẽ.»" 
Psalms82:5 La ayoo! Y ka mi rẽ ye, y ka baood rẽ ye. Bʋʋda bʋʋda likẽ, y babenda goabg la rɩtgo wa zom-bi la woto y na n wãa tẽngã." 
Psalms82:6 M togsda sɩda, y yaa wẽn-bi, y zãng yaa Yĩngr Wẽnda kamba." 
Psalms82:7 Y fãa yaool n na n kii wa ninsaalba y na n dʋʋga wa rĩm biisi. 
Psalms82:8 Dʋ-y y zaoorẽ, Soaala, kao-y dũni wã bʋʋdo, bu-zẽmba fãa ya y soolem."

Psalms83:7 Ad Edom la a Ismayɛl yagense, n paas a Moab ne a Agar kamba" 
Psalms83:8 a Geval, a Amon, a Amalɛk, Filisti la Tir dãmba."

Psalms84:1 A Kore kamb yɩɩlle. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩnd-a lame t'a wẽneg: Bugsuntunga biis yɩɩlle.

Psalms84:3 M gãeeme n sũkdẽ la m wẽed siri la yaa Soaala zaka la m data. M yama ne m sũurã baooda Wẽnd ning sẽn kõta vɩɩma. 
Psalms84:4 Koobr paamda a roogo tɩ sɩlaal tʋɩ a tʋko n wekd a kamba yãmb maan-kugra sɛɛgẽ, dũni fãa Soaala, m dĩma la m Wẽnda sɛɛgẽ." 
Psalms84:5 Yãmb zaka rãmb la sũ-noog rãmba tɩ b tar yãmb pẽgr n ka vʋʋsdẽ ye.

Psalms84:10 Soaala, ges-y d dĩma, d gãongã, ges-y y sẽn kõ a soab naama nenga." 
Psalms84:11 Daar a yembre y sɩmannẽ zĩndgu wẽnda dasem tusri. Woto wã m yãkame tɩ m sẽn na n pa y zaka noorẽ, são m sẽn na n tɩ m zaka neb niyns sẽn ka tũud-b Wẽnda sʋka."

Psalms84:13 Soaala, Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba, zu-noog soab la sẽn teeg-a yãmba!" 
Psalms85:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Kore kamb yɩɩlle.

Psalms85:3 Y luda y buuda rẽgdo, y yẽesa a yel-wẽna zãnga." 
Psalms85:4 Soaala, y sigsa y sũuri, y kiisa y sũ-puurã." 
Psalms85:5 Le kẽes-y tõnd y soolmẽ, Soaala la d Fãagda. Da bao-y n dok y sũur ne tõnd ye." 
Psalms85:6 Bõe tɩ y sũur na n kell n puug ne tõndo? Bõe tɩ y sũura na n zab dar fãa? 
Psalms85:7 D yet tɩ yaa yãmb n na n kõ-d vɩɩm? D yet tɩ yãmb n na n yɩ y buuda sũ-noogo?

Psalms86:1 A Daviid pʋʋsgo. Soaala, kelg-y m pʋʋsgo, leok-y-ma; m yaa nimbãan-neda la naong soaba."

Psalms86:3 Zoe-y m nimbãanega, Soaala, yaa yãmb la m boond beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms86:4 Noog-y y yamba sũuri tɩ yaa yãmb bal la m baooda. 
Psalms86:5 Yãmb yaa nin-bʋgsgo n kõt sugri, yãmb deegda sẽn boond-b yãmba pʋʋsg daar fãa," 
Psalms86:6 bɩ y kelg m pʋʋsgo, Soaala, bɩ y wʋm m koɛɛga rãamde." 
Psalms86:7 M zĩi ne yɩɩre n boond-y, bɩ y kelg-ma." 
Psalms86:8 Yãmb ka tar mak-n-taag ye, Soaala, Yãmb n yɩɩd ne bũmba fãa." 
Psalms86:9 Buuda fãa sẽn yi y nugẽ na n wa wõgemda y taoore, Soaala, b na n wa pẽga y yʋʋre." 
Psalms86:10 Yãmb pãnga labsa tɩ y maand bõn-bãna. Yãmb yaa Wẽnde, yãmb y ye tãa!" 
Psalms86:11 Soaala, wilg-y maam m sore tɩ m paam n kẽn y vẽenemẽ. Kõ-y-m yam sõngo tɩ m zoe yãmba." 
Psalms86:12 Soaala-Wẽnde, m dat n pẽg-y-la ne m sũur fãa, m dat n pẽg-y-la wakat buud fãa." 
Psalms86:13 Yãmb sẽn tar mam pʋgb la y sẽn tar m pʋgbo; y waa n yiis-m-la bog zulunga pʋga. 
Psalms86:14 Soaala, wilg-m-meng rãmb n yik zabr ne maam, la nin-toos n sũ taaba n na n yãk m yõore; la b geela b geelsã n bas yãmb kɛɛnga." 
Psalms86:15 Soaala, yãmb sẽn pid ne nimbãan-zoeere, yãmb sẽn pid ne sõmblem, yãmb sẽn tar sũ-maasem, n pid ne nonglem la zemsgo,"

Psalms86:17 Tʋm-y pãng tʋʋmd m yĩnga la m bɛɛba na rɩ yãnde b sã n wa mik tɩ yãmb n sõngd-m la y yẽesd m nintãm.

Psalms88:2 Soaala, m Wẽnd la m Fãagda, m kelma yãmb wĩndg la yʋngo." 
Psalms88:3 Bɩ m kosga lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ, tɩ y reeg-a."

Psalms88:7 Y sik-m-la bog zulunga pʋga, y sik-m-la bog zulungẽ, lik tam."

Psalms88:16 M zu-bʋka sɩnga m yãadmẽ la m yɛɛme, yɛɛsg la b yɛɛs-m, tɩ m ka le mi m sẽn beẽ ye."

Psalms88:18 Y yɛɛsga gũbg-m-la zĩig zãnga, n gũbg-m wa kʋɩlse, tɩ m be sʋka." 
Psalms88:19 Yãmb zãaga maam ne zoa la sõsd-n-taaga, m sõsd-n-taaga la m zoa lebga likã." 
Psalms89:1 Noog sɩlgre — Ezrayitga a Etã yɩɩlle. 
Psalms89:1 Noog sɩlgre — Ezrayitga a Etã yɩɩlle. 
Psalms89:2 Soaala yel-sõmda la m na n yɩɩl wakat fãa. M noor na kɩt tɩ b bãng zamaan sẽn wate tɩ Wẽnd pʋlemd ka vaal baraar a ye. 
Psalms89:3 Ade, Soaala, y nonglma kaset yalsa daar fãa yĩnga, yaa al yĩngr la y tɩ yals y kasetã." 
Psalms89:4 Yãmb n yeele: Neba fãa taoore m kaoola zooda ne m sẽn yãk a soabã, ne m sõgna a Daviid." 
Psalms89:5 N-ye, Daviid, yaa fo buuda la m kõt naam daar fãa yĩnga! Yaa fo n na n zaond zaoorã zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms89:6 Bɩ yĩngr dãmba kils bõn-bãnd a woto buudu! B kils pʋlenga sẽn ka vaal ba raar a ye wã, nin-sõma wã kʋʋng sʋka." 
Psalms89:7 Yĩngrã, ãnda n be n zem Soaala? Ãnda n wẽnd Soaala, wẽn-naandsa sʋka?" 
Psalms89:8 Nin-sõma wã tigsg zĩigẽ Wẽnd ket n kẽesda rabeem wʋsgo. Nin-sõma wã ne sẽn gũbg-b bãmba fãa yɛɛsdame. 
Psalms89:9 Soaala, Pãng rãmb Wẽnde, ãnda n tar pãng wa yãmba? Ãnda pʋ-peelem n zem yãmba?" 
Psalms89:10 Yãmb n tõe n sik mogra zẽk-m-mengã, a kooma sã n rãmbe yãmb n lebd n sik-a." 
Psalms89:11 Yãmb n beds rũm-bãnd a Raab, bũmba fãa sɩngrẽ, yãmb kanga pãng n kɩt tɩ y bɛɛba sẽege." 
Psalms89:12 Yãmb n so yĩngri, yãmb n so tẽnga. Dũni wã ne a arzɛka, yãmb n naan-a." 
Psalms89:13 Dũni wã goabg la a rɩtgo, y nug tʋʋmde. Tabor la Ermo reesda y yʋʋra n sokd taaba." 
Psalms89:14 Yãmb kanga wɩɩda ne pãnga, y zẽk y rɩtgã la y sẽn tʋm raoodo." 
Psalms89:15 Y naama zaoor vigla zemsgo la sõmblem zugu. Y sẽn poog zĩig ninga, y waa ne nonglem la sɩda." 
Psalms89:16 Zu-noog soaba la buud ninga sẽn mi y pẽgre. Buud kãng kẽnda ne Wẽnd nenga vẽenem. 
Psalms89:17 Y buuda sã n wʋm y yʋʋrã a sũ-nooga na n saoolg-a-la saooga, beoog sẽn vẽege. Wẽnd sõmblema na dooga a nenga." 
Psalms89:18 N-ye! Yãmb la buuda pãn-kẽeng, yãmb sẽn welg-d toora yĩnga, d zug zẽkame." 
Psalms89:19 Tõnd dĩma bee Wẽnd nugẽ, a soolga Israyɛl Soaala la Nin-sõngã." 
Psalms89:20 Yaa woto la y lik y nebã raar a ye n gom ne-ba: «M yãenda gãndaoogo n sõng-a, m yãenda m buuda bi-bɩɩga n zẽk a yʋʋre." 
Psalms89:21 M yãenda m sõgna a Daviid, n pʋdg a rĩir naam ka-sõngo." 
Psalms89:22 M kõn zãag ne-a la a na pid ne raoodo. 
Psalms89:23 Bɛ kõn tõog n ling-a ye, ned zẽk a zugu n dat n paoog-a, a kõn tõog ye." 
Psalms89:24 M na n fẽda a bɛɛba fãa a taoore, m na n kʋʋ sẽn kis-a fãa." 
Psalms89:25 M na n pẽneg-a-la ne m sɩda la m nonglem. M yʋʋra sẽn pʋd bala la a zug sẽn dooge. 
Psalms89:26 M na n dɩka mogra meng soolem n kõ-a, n dɩk kʋɩlsa fãa n sagl a rɩtg-nugu." 
Psalms89:27 Yẽ na n boola maam t'a ba, t'a Wẽnde, n bool-m t'a soondg pĩiga." 
Psalms89:28 Mam me na bool-a tɩ m bi-kẽenga, m na kõ a Daviid naam sẽn yɩɩd a taab rẽnda, tẽng zug ka." 
Psalms89:29 M nonglem na kell n pa ne-a daar fãa, d zooda na kell n yɩ bũmb sẽn ka na n kao ye." 
Psalms89:30 M na kɩt t'a rɩ naam daar fãa yĩnga. A na kaoosa wa saagã, a naama goeela zugu." 
Psalms89:31 La ade, a kamba sã n bas m noorã n ka le maand sẽn segde," 
Psalms89:32 b sã n tõdg m noorã n pa le sakdẽ," 
Psalms89:33 m na bao rasaar n sɩbg b tõdgre, beegr fãa na reeg a wẽedo." 
Psalms89:34 La kõn tũ ne m nonglma boogre, kõn tũ ne zooda sãoong ye." 
Psalms89:35 M kõn bas tɩ zooda sãam ye, m kõn lebs m noor sẽn yiis ye." 
Psalms89:36 M wẽena rẽ ne m menga sẽn pid sõmblem, m kõn tudg a Daviid bada!" 
Psalms89:37 A naama na n kaoosa daar fãa. A naama zaoor na n yalsa m taoor wa wĩntoogã. 
Psalms89:38 A na n yalsa wa kiuugu, n yals yĩngr wa kaset sẽn ka tõe n kɩɩs ye.»" 
Psalms89:39 D yaool n tẽedame tɩ ya yãmb n sãbse la y bas kɛɛnga y sẽn da taag a soab y naama kaama, yãmb m maan zabr ne-a." 
Psalms89:40 Yãmb n kao zooda sẽn da yõgã, yãmb n fabg tẽnga la y tab a naama pugla." 
Psalms89:41 Yãmb kao-la a yãgrã, n lub a tãnsoben-dotã." 
Psalms89:42 Soloadba fãa paam n zɛ-a lame, a yagsa fãa waa n paoog-a lame." 
Psalms89:43 Y paasa bɛɛba pãnga, n noog b fãa gill sũuri," 
Psalms89:44 y tol n salga a sʋʋga noor menga, y ka yals a sɛɛgẽ zabra sẽn waa n wulumda ye." 
Psalms89:45 Yãmb waa n wooga a naama pãnga, n tus a naama goeel n sik tẽnga." 
Psalms89:46 Y kʋʋga a bi-bɩɩlma yʋʋma, y kɩtame t'a rɩ yãnde." 
Psalms89:47 Soaala, na n yɩɩ woto n ta da-bʋre? Y na n kell n talla y meng solgre, n ta da-bʋre? Y na n basa y sũura t'a fudg laa?" 
Psalms89:48 Ges-y m vɩɩma sẽn kaoosd tɛka; y naana ninsaal t'a na n kell n looge, n kell n loog yaleng-yaleng a woto bɩ?" 
Psalms89:49 Ãnda n na n vɩ n ka na n bãng kũum, la a ka na n bãng bʋg-tẽng sor sẽn dɩkdẽ?" 
Psalms89:50 Soaala, yɛɛlẽ la y solg y pĩnd nonglma? Yãmb n da wẽen ne y meng n kãab a Daviid." 
Psalms89:51 Soaala, ges-y y buuda sẽn zĩ ne paoogrã; tẽeg-y y sẽn yet tɩ m ges b rãmba yelle." 
Psalms89:52 Soaala, ad-y bɛɛba paoog-a lame, bɛɛba tʋʋsa y sẽn welg a soab toore n taag-a y naama kaama." 
Psalms89:53 Wẽnd paam bark daar buud fãa! Ami! Ami! 
Psalms90:1 Wẽnnaam ned a Moyiiz yɩɩlle. Soaala, zamaana sẽn tong taabã, yãmb maasmẽ la d waa n soonde." 
Psalms90:2 Tãmsa sẽn waa n nan ka pusi n yi, tɩ tẽnga la dũnĩ, nan ka naane, yãmb yaa Wẽnd zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms90:3 Yãmb tõeeme tɩ ninsaal leb tẽng tomẽ, Yãmb n pʋs n yeele: «Adem biisi, leb-y y tomẽ!»" 
Psalms90:4 Ade, yãmb nifẽ, yʋʋm tusr yaa wa daare, sẽn ta n kaoose, yʋng wakat a ye." 
Psalms90:5 Y menesd-b-la wala yʋng gõeem sẽn menemde, beooga sẽn vẽeg tɩ gõeema loogã, wẽnda wa moodo ne b pu-neeba." 
Psalms90:6 Moog ningda a puug yibeoogo, tɩ sɛ; a zelegda sõore, la zaabre a zoe n kʋɩɩme." 
Psalms90:7 Sɩda yãmb sũ-puura yɛɛs-d-la wʋsgo, tɩ y sũ-fõora wa loog ne-do." 
Psalms90:8 Yãmb dɩgla d yel-wẽna y taoore n getẽ, d yel-wẽna sẽn solgã puka y nenga vẽenemẽ." 
Psalms90:9 Y sũur sẽn puug ne tõndã, y looga ne tõnd vɩɩm; d kaoosg ka yɩɩd vʋʋsgo, pemsem fõogre la a lebsgo, zoe n yaa vɩɩma n looge." 
Psalms90:10 D yʋʋma sõor yaa pisopoe, sẽn pid-b ne keglem n tat pis-nii. La rẽ fãa yõod yaa naong la pɛta, tao-tao tɩ d yɩk n loogame." 
Psalms90:11 Ãnda n tõe n bãnge y sũura sẽn fudg n ta zĩig ninga? Sẽn mi-b yãmb sũura sẽn fudg n ta zĩig ninga, yaa sẽn digd-b rabeem yãmb taoorã." 
Psalms90:12 Woto wã, Soaala, zãms-y tõnd d daara sõadga tɩ d yama na lebg yam zulunga." 
Psalms90:13 Lɛɛg-y n wa-y yã, Soaala. Y na n le taa da-bʋre? Kʋʋg-y y raarã, zoe-y y yemsa nimbãanega!" 
Psalms90:14 Yibeoogo pids-y tõnd sũura ne y nonglem; woto d vɩɩma tõre d na kell n pa sũ-noog pʋgẽ. 
Psalms90:15 Teem-y y sɩbgra raare tɩ lebg sũ-noog raare. Sũ-beeda yʋʋm me tek boto. 
Psalms90:16 D datame tɩ y tʋʋm-bãna le sɩng d nifẽ d datame tɩ d yagensa bãng tɩ y ziira labsa. 
Psalms90:17 Soaala tõnd Wẽnde, bas-y tɩ y nonglma kel n pʋg tõndo! Sõng-y tɩ d tʋʋma wom biisi la biis sẽn na naf-do." 
Psalms91:1 Ned ninga sẽn paam n be roog ningã Yĩngr Wẽndã sẽn solg b mengã, yẽ soab gãee Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba maasmẽ," 
Psalms91:2 yẽ soab gomda ne Soaala woto: «Yãmb la m soondg zĩiga, m tãnsoben-doogo, yãmb la m Wẽnde, yãmb la m teeg yã.»" 
Psalms91:3 Yaa Soaala n na n fãag-f bẽdgẽ. Bãmb n na n fãag-f ne bãag sẽn wat ne tẽn-kũum. 
Psalms91:4 B na n kogl-f lame, b na n yɩɩ f soondg zĩiga. F na n soonda bãmba wa no-bi, b ma pɩgsẽ. F sẽn tar Wẽnd nonglma yaa gãong la f zãada, yaa kut fuug la f yeelg yã." 
Psalms91:5 F ka na n zoe yʋng yɛɛsg ye, f ka na n zoe pĩim sẽn tãood wĩntoog ye," 
Psalms91:6 bɩ tẽn-kũum sẽn gilgd rot yʋngo, bɩ bã-longdem sẽn tũud wĩnto-sʋgs ye." 
Psalms91:7 Ba neb tusr lʋɩt f sɛɛgẽ, tɩ tus-piig lʋɩt f rɩtgo, bũmb kõn maan-f ye." 
Psalms91:8 Ypk f nin bala tɩ f na yãend Wẽnd sẽn sɩbgd sẽn ka kẽed-b bãmba. 
Psalms91:9 N-ye, yaa Soaala la f tɩ soonde! La sɩda yĩngr Wẽnda sɛɛgẽ la f tʋɩ f gãaga." 
Psalms91:10 Bũmb kõn maan-f ye, bũmb kõn lɩk f roogẽ ye." 
Psalms91:11 B malɛgsa la b na n kõ noore, tɩ b gũ f nao kẽndre." 
Psalms91:12 B na n kok-f-la b nusẽ tɩ f naoor da sɩɩs kugr ye. 
Psalms91:13 F na n taba bõnyẽeg la põeere, n tag ãbga la wag-bãnde." 
Psalms91:14 Wẽnd leokd a la woto: «A sẽn teeg maama yĩnga, m na fãag-a, m na kogl-a t'a mi-la m yʋʋre." 
Psalms91:15 A sã n bool-ma, m na leoke, m na zĩnd ne-a, a yɩɩra pʋgẽ, m na fãag-a la m na kõ-a pẽgre." 
Psalms91:16 M na pids-a ne raare la yʋʋma, m fãagra sõor na puk a yĩnga.»" 
Psalms92:1 Yɩɩlle. Vʋʋsg raar yĩnga. 
Psalms92:2 Yãmb pẽgr nooma, Soaala, Yaa sõmbo, yĩngr Soaala, tɩ d pẽg-y ne yɩɩla." 
Psalms92:3 Yik yibeoogo n kils b nonglma yaa sõmbo! Ta yʋng n ket n kilsd b nonglma yaa neere! 
Psalms92:4 A nooma ne kʋnd la bɛɛla, n noom ne ruudga!" 
Psalms92:5 M sũur nooma ne y sẽn maan m yĩnga, Soaala. M sã n get y tʋʋm-bãna fãa, m kaasda sũ-noogo." 
Psalms92:6 Sɩda y tʋʋma labsa, Soaala, b tagma la b zɩsa ne ninsaala." 
Psalms92:7 Yalma n ka mi tɩ bũmb n maane, yam kɩdg soab ka wʋmd võor ye." 
Psalms92:8 Nin-wẽnsa piuugda wa kɩmgo, bũmb ka paoogd nin-wẽnsa ye, b yaool n na n wẽneg n menema gill beoogo." 
Psalms92:9 Sã n ya yãmba, Yĩngr Soabã, Yãmb la Soaala daar buud fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms92:10 Sẽn na n loog bala, Soaala, yaa yãmb bɛɛba. Bãmb ne sẽn tʋʋmd-b taab beedã, bãmb fãa na n sẽega vugri." 
Psalms92:11 Ade, y kõ-m-la we-naaf pãnga, n pʋdg ka-bʋgsg m zugẽ." 
Psalms92:12 M neeme tɩ m bɛɛba konga pãnga, toog tara m zabd-n-taasa tɩ b kelemdẽ." 
Psalms92:13 Nin-sõng tãooda wa koanga, n yɛdgd wa Libã kʋka." 
Psalms92:14 Yaa tɩɩg sẽn sel wẽnd dooga sɩmannẽ tɩɩg sẽn tãood d Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛgẽ. 
Psalms92:15 A sã n kʋʋl me, a ket n womda biisi, a ket n pida ne vɩɩm la pãnga." 
Psalms92:16 Dẽ me n kõt kaseto tɩ Wẽnde, m pĩiga pida ne zemsgo, la b ka sak goaleng ye." 
Psalms93:1 Soaala yaa rĩma, naam la naam bal la b yeelg wa fuugu, pãng bal la b rɩk n sẽbg b sɛɛga. Dũni wã na n kell n yals a nao zutu." 
Psalms93:2 Sɩda y naama zaoor vigla kẽnkẽ, y sẽn be la y sẽn be, Soaala." 
Psalms93:3 Soaala, mogra paasa a bʋʋre ko-wiisa tara rãmbgo." 
Psalms93:4 Koɛɛg ninga sẽn sãta n yɩɩda, n yɩɩd ko-wiisa bʋ-raasã yaa yãmb dẽnna, yãmb sẽn be yĩngra rẽnna." 
Psalms93:5 Yãmb noyã n wilgd so-sõngo, yãmb zaka la zag-sõngo, Soaala, zamaan sẽn wate." 
Psalms94:1 Soaala, yãmb la Wẽnd ninga sẽn dokd sũuri. N-ye! Wilg-y y nenga tɩ b bãng yã." 
Psalms94:2 Yik-y n kao-y dũni wã bʋʋdo, tɩ wilg-m-meng rãmba reeg b sɩbgre, sɩbgr ning b sẽn tog ne a soaba." 
Psalms94:3 M sok-y n gese, Soaala, m sok-y nin-wẽnsa poorẽ, y na n bas-b lame n ta da-bʋre, n bas-b tɩ b maan daoodo n ta da-bʋre?" 
Psalms94:4 B kẽndame n wukdẽ, n gomd tɩtaam goama, n gomd wa b mi fãa la b tõe fãa." 
Psalms94:5 Soaala, bãmb n namsd y neba n paoogd y pʋɩɩra kamba," 
Psalms94:6 n kʋʋd pʋg-kõor la sãana, n koot kɩɩb-bi." 
Psalms94:7 Bãmb n gomde: «Wẽnd ka ne ye a Zakoob Wẽnda ka mi fɩ ye!» 
Psalms94:8 Bãng-y yã tɩ nin-wẽnsã n yɩɩd fãa me yalemdo, yam kɩds rãmba, da-bʋr-daare la y yama na n puki?" 
Psalms94:9 Wẽnd na naan tʋbre, n yaool n ka wʋmnẽ? N naan nifu n yaool n ka tõe n yãende?" 
Psalms94:10 B sẽn tõog n dems bu-zẽmbã, b maanda a wãn n kong nin-yend vɩɩma remsgo? Ka bãmb n zãmsd ninsaal laa tɩ bãngr na n wa paoog-ba?" 
Psalms94:11 Soaala mii ninsaal geelse, b mii neere tɩ yaa geel-faad bala," 
Psalms94:12 Soaala, zu-noog soaba la sẽn paam-a tɩ yãmb demsd a vɩɩma ne y noorã!" 
Psalms94:13 Yẽ soab n na n yãe a pɛta sɛɛbo, la a yãend bok ning b sẽn tuud nin-wẽnsa yĩnga." 
Psalms94:14 Wẽnd pa basd b buuda ye, b pa basd b pʋɩɩra ye." 
Psalms94:15 Nin-tɩrg bʋʋd na le kaoo wa sẽn segde la no-koeemd kõn zĩnd ned ba a ye poorẽ ye. 
Psalms94:16 Bʋʋda zĩigẽ, Soaala n na n sõng-ma, bãmb n na n gom n fãag-m nin-wẽnsa nugẽ." 
Psalms94:17 Soaala sã n da ka sõngẽ maam m gãeẽ-la ne kɩɩmse, bʋʋr sẽn kaẽ zĩigẽ." 
Psalms94:18 M sẽn yeel wakat ning fãa: «M na n lʋɩɩme,» wakat kãng la y nonglma pʋg-m ne y sõngre." 
Psalms94:19 M sẽn waa n zĩi n yɩɩd yɛl ka tɛk poorẽ la m paam tɩ y wa ne yolsgo la sũ-noogo. 
Psalms94:20 F bõe n be ne nin-yood a woto sẽn kaood bʋʋdã? B yetame tɩ b tũuda noorã n bʋʋdẽ, mik yaa nimbãaneg bala la b paasda." 
Psalms94:21 B sẽn kis yaa neb sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yelle, b bʋʋdame n paalgd nin-tɩrse." 
Psalms94:22 Wẽnd lebga m tãnsoben-doogo. B lebga m Pĩiga tɩ m lilld bãmba. 
Psalms94:23 Wẽnd donda nin-yoodã b tʋʋm wẽna, b pʋ-toogã lɛɛgdame n wɩbg-ba. D Soaala-Wẽnd menesd-b lame." 
Psalms95:1 Wa-y tɩ d kaas sũ-noog Soaala yĩnga, d kils pĩiga sẽn fãagd tõndã." 
Psalms95:2 D kẽng b taoor ne bark pʋʋsgo, d bao yɩɩl n zodg noogo." 
Psalms95:3 Soaala la Wẽnd kãsengã, bãmb la dĩm kãsenga, wẽn-naandsa sura b taoore." 
Psalms95:4 Tẽnga ne sẽn sud a pʋgẽ yaa bãmb n so, n le so tãmsa ne sẽn zao-b a zug tẽnsʋka." 
Psalms95:5 B soo mogrã, bãmb n naan-a, tẽn-peelma gilli b nusã n sa n yɛdg-a." 
Psalms95:6 Kẽ-y! D ta n sulgi, d ta n wõgemd b taoore, d kɩ rũmd b taoor tɩ bãmb n yiis tõnd moogo." 
Psalms95:7 Bãmb la tõnd Wẽnde, d buuda yaa bãmb bãgre, bãgra rũms b sẽn gũuda la tõndo. Dũnna bɩ y kegl b koɛɛga." 
Psalms95:8 Da kidb-y y sũur wa zabra raar ye, wa fɛɛsga raare, we-raoogẽ wã ye." 
Psalms95:9 Beenẽ y barãmb zaba ne-ma la b fɛɛs-m lame, ne b nina sẽn da ne m tʋʋma." 
Psalms95:10 B yika m sũuri, yʋʋm pis-naas pʋgẽ. Dẽ me la m yeel yã: «Buud kãnga yam menemame, a ka mi m sẽn tũud soy niyns ye.»" 
Psalms95:11 La mam me sũura puugame tɩ m wẽene: «Ayo! B kõn kẽ m vʋʋsga zĩigẽ ye!» 
Psalms96:1 Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paal Soaala yĩnga, Tẽnga gilli, yɩɩl-y Soaala yĩnga" 
Psalms96:2 yɩɩl-y n pẽg b yʋʋre! Moon-y b fãagra rũnna la beoogo. 
Psalms96:3 Ypk-y b ziira bu-zẽmba yĩnga, wilg-y Adem kamba b sẽn maan bõn-bãn niynsã." 
Psalms96:4 Wẽnd yaa nin-kãsenga tɩ b pẽgdba me ya ka tɛka. B kẽesda rabeem la b yɩɩda wẽn-naandsa fãa. 
Psalms96:5 Bu-zẽmba wẽnd dãmba fãa: sobgo. Tõnd Soaala n naan yĩngr teedã. 
Psalms96:6 B nenga yãgda ne ziiri, la b rooga pida ne pãng la naam." 
Psalms96:7 Kils-y Soaala, Adem biisi, Kils-y Soaala ziir la b pãnga." 
Psalms96:8 Kils-y n pẽg b yʋʋrã. Wa-y ne y kũuna, ta-y sɩmannẽ." 
Psalms96:9 Wõgemd-y tẽnga, Soaala taoore, b sõmblema sẽn wat n pukdẽ. Bɩ tẽnga gilli rig rabeem b taoore." 
Psalms96:10 Togs-y bu-zẽmba sʋka: «Soaala yaa rĩma. Dũni wã vigla kẽnkẽ, n pa sergd zĩig ye, Wẽnd kaooda dũni wã bʋʋd ne zemsgo.»" 
Psalms96:11 Bɩ yĩngr dãmba lang sũ-noogo, tɩ mogra ne a pʋgẽ teeda reeg n soke." 
Psalms96:12 Pʋta gill moon b tig-raaga tɩ gooda kelem sũ-noogo, Soaala taoore." 
Psalms96:13 B watame n na n dɩ naam tẽnga zugu. B na n dɩɩ naam ne zemsgo, b na n gesa tẽnga yelle ne pʋ-peelem." 
Psalms97:1 Soaala yaa Dĩma, bɩ tẽnga kɩdem sũ-noogo bɩ kooma noorẽ dãmb maan kibsa!" 
Psalms97:2 Lik la sawadgo n gũbg Soaalã, b tʋɩ zemsgo la sõmblem n zaoolg b naama goeele." 
Psalms97:3 Bugum n kẽnd b taoore, n dɩt bɛɛba n gilgdẽ." 
Psalms97:4 Sa-yãgba vẽenem vẽnega dũniã la tẽnga yãendame n yɛɛse. 
Psalms97:5 Tãmsa yẽnega wa siribdu, Soaala taoore, dũni wã Soaala taoore." 
Psalms97:6 Yĩngr dãmb moona b zemsgo la tẽng zug rãmba yãenda b ziiri. 
Psalms97:7 Bɩ sẽn waoogd-b wẽn-faadã, bɩ b fãa zuta wuk ne yãnde! Wõgemd-y Soaala taoore, wẽn-faado, y fãa gill wõgemd!" 
Psalms97:8 Siõ rãmb sẽn paam vẽnegre, b kaasa sũ-noogo, Zɩɩda tẽnsa fãa langda sũ-noogo tɩ Soaala yalsa yɛlã b zĩigẽ." 
Psalms97:9 Sɩd yaa yãmb la Soaala, yãmb n zao yĩngr-yĩngr, n zʋʋg wẽn-faada fãa gilli." 
Psalms97:10 Yãmb fãa sẽn nong-b Soaala, kisg-y wẽnga! B gũuda sẽn kẽed-b bãmba vɩɩm, b fãagd-b-la nin-wẽnsa nusẽ." 
Psalms97:11 Vẽenem n yãgd sẽn tũud-ba yĩnga, sũ-tɩrs rãmb pida ne sũ-noogo." 
Psalms97:12 Yãmba, tũudba, noog-y y sũur Soaala yĩnga, pẽg-y Wẽnde n tẽegd tɩ b yaa sõngo." 
Psalms98:1 Yɩɩlle. Yɩɩl-y Soaala yɩɩn-paalle tɩ b maana bõn-bãna, b maana raoodo ne b rɩtg kang sõngã." 
Psalms98:2 Soaala wilga dũni wã tõre tɩ bãmb la Fãagda, B puka b sõmblema ne bu-zẽmbã." 
Psalms98:3 B tẽega b nonglma sẽn ka viigdã, n tẽeg tɩ b pa kãabd a Israyɛl bũmbu n ka pids b sẽn kãab ye. Yaa dũni wã tõre n dɩ kaseto tɩ d Soaalã n sɩd fãag-do." 
Psalms98:4 Tẽnga rãmb naag taab n kils Soaala. Tãs-y y yɩɩla, tɩ yʋʋmba maan noogo." 
Psalms98:5 Maan-y noog b yĩnga ne ruudga la reem teed a taaba. 
Psalms98:6 D kils dĩma, d Soaalã, d kils-b ne tõntõog la bargo." 
Psalms98:7 Bɩ mogra ne a pʋgẽ teedã, dũni wã ne a nebã maan noogo." 
Psalms98:8 Kʋɩlsa me fõd ne bʋʋre, tɩ tãmsa naag n kaas sũ-noogo." 
Psalms98:9 B kaas Wẽnd sẽn wat n na n dɩ naam tẽng zugu. B geta neb yell ne zemsgo, n zãad ãndũni rãmba wa sẽn segde." 
Psalms99:1 Yɩɩlle! Soaala yaa dĩma, bɩ zãma wã sɩng rigbu! B zaoo al yĩngr-yĩngri, bɩ tẽnga dĩmi!" 
Psalms99:2 Wẽnd n so naam Siõ, bãmb n so dũni wã." 
Psalms99:3 Bɩ dũni wã gill pẽg b yʋʋre, yʋʋr sẽn ya sõng la sẽn kẽesd dabeem." 
Psalms99:4 Dĩm pãnga ya a nong zemsgo, yãmb n wilg bũmb ning fãa sẽn toge, Yaa yãmb n wilg a Zakoob buudã sẽn zems la sẽn segde." 
Psalms99:5 Kils-y Soaala tõnd Wẽnnaam la y wõgemd b taoor tɩ b yaa sõngo. 
Psalms99:6 Maan-kʋʋdba a Moyiiz ne a Aarõ la b sɛɛg yõkda, a Samwɛl, da boonda Soaala la b ra leokd-b lame." 
Psalms99:7 B ra gomda ne-ba sawad-taoka pʋga. Ad-y b reega b zãmsgo, b reega b noyã." 
Psalms99:8 D Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb meng y toore n da leokde. Y yɩɩ Wẽnd sẽn bʋk b sũur ne bãmba la sẽn da rokd b sũur ne b bɛɛbã." 
Psalms99:9 Kils-y Soaala tõnd Wẽndã! Wõgemd-y n tees b tãn-sõngã, tɩ Wẽnnaam tõnd Soaala yaa sõngo!" 
Psalms100:1 Yɩɩlle. Bark pʋʋsgo. Tẽnga gill kils Soaala! 
Psalms100:2 Waoog-y b naama ne kɩdengo! Kolg-y b taoore n kaas y sũ-noogo. 
Psalms100:3 Reeg-y tɩ Soaala la Wẽnde, b naana tõndo, n so tõndo, tõnd la b buudu, b yãgra rũmsi." 
Psalms100:4 Kẽ-y b roogẽ n pʋʋs-b barka, sɩng-y b pẽgr b sɩmannẽ, kils-y-ba, pẽg-y b yʋʋre." 
Psalms100:5 Soaala yaa bʋgsgo, n pʋgd tõnd ne b nonglem beoog sẽn vẽege, la b kõn lebs b zelemd zamaan sẽn wat ye." 
Psalms101:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. M sẽn dat n pẽg ne m yɩɩla la woto: n pẽg y nonglma la y sẽn dat zemsgã. Yaa yãmba Soaala la m dat n pẽg ne yɩɩla. 
Psalms101:2 M na n baoome n bãng bõe la m na n maan tɩ zemse. M dat n bãnga y sẽn na n sig maama wakato, tɩ m bãng n tall m meng neere, n da wa wẽneg m yagsa ye." 
Psalms101:3 M kõn pʋg sẽn ka sõmb ye, m kõn bas m tẽeb tɩ sãam ye, m kõn maan bũmb sẽn wẽnd dẽ buud ye." 
Psalms101:4 M na n zãaga m meng ne nin-yoogo tɩ m ka rat n bãng yel-wẽnd ye. 
Psalms101:5 Ned ninga sẽn soosd n lukd a taab bãongo, m na modg-a t'a sĩndi, m pa nong sẽn get-b taab ne sãbsg ye la sẽn wuk-b ne wilg-m-meng ye." 
Psalms101:6 M na n tũusa tẽnga neba, m sẽn mi b rãmb pʋga, n zĩndig m sɛɛgẽ. Ned ninga wɩɩm sẽn ka tar kɛka, yẽ soab n na n yɩ m kug-zĩida." 
Psalms101:7 Ned ninga sẽn minima n tudgd a taaba yẽ soab ka tar zĩig m zakẽ ye, zirẽ-be-rãmba me boto." 
Psalms101:8 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa m na kɩte tɩ tẽnga nin-wẽnsa fãa noor mumi. M na yiis nin-wẽnsa fãa Wẽnd tẽnga. 
Psalms102:1 Nimbãan-ned pʋʋsgo Soaala taoore. 
Psalms102:2 Kelg-y m pʋʋsgo, Soaala, bɩ m boolga lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ." 
Psalms102:3 Da solg-y maam y neng m yɩɩra raar ye. Wʋm-y m sẽn na n bool-y raare n leok-m tao-tao. 
Psalms102:4 M daara loogda wa bug-zõose, m kõab zab-m-la wala m lʋɩɩ bug-toaalgẽ." 
Psalms102:5 M yagda kʋɩ n menema zãnga, bũmb fãa yamleoog sɛɛ m sũurẽ, rɩɩba meng ka le sakd-m ye." 
Psalms102:6 M yãbra sɛ-la m nemsã n kell gãong la kõaba. 
Psalms102:7 M wẽnda we-raoogẽ gãoobgo, n wẽnd raboodẽ viuug luiila." 
Psalms102:8 M nif ka tol n pugl gõeem ye, m wẽnda wa luiil sẽn zao a ye sugr zugu." 
Psalms102:9 M bɛɛba paoogd-m-la beoog sẽn vẽege; b sũur sẽn puud ne-ma, b geenda m zug rokre." 
Psalms102:10 M dɩɩb lebga tompɛglem, m koom kalemda ne m nintãm." 
Psalms102:11 Y sũura puugame, a fõoga ne maam tɩ y gãd-m n lobg yɩɩga." 
Psalms102:12 M daara menemda wa sulunsuku, tɩ m kʋɩt wa moogo." 
Psalms102:13 Sã n ya yãmba, Soaala, y rɩta y naam daar fãa yĩnga. B tẽra y yelle, zamaan woo zamaana." 
Psalms102:14 Y na yiki, Soaala, a Siõ nonglem yĩnga, y na yiki tɩ wakata nan ka looge, n zoe a nimbãanega; la d pʋs n tẽedame tɩ wakata la marsã." 
Psalms102:15 Tõndo, yãmb kambã, d nonga Siõ kugã, n nong a rabooda toma menga." 
Psalms102:16 Bɩ bu-zẽmba rig Soaala rabeem, la dũni wã dĩm dãmba sulg b mense la b kils bãmb ziiri." 
Psalms102:17 Soaala sã n kɩt tɩ Siõ rota le yiki, n le yik n yals ne a ziirã," 
Psalms102:18 ad-y b na n le wẽnemda b nenga n tees b sẽn welg-b rãmb toorã, n deeg b kosgo, n da le rig-b ye." 
Psalms102:19 Ad-y y sẽn na n gʋls bũmb ning sebr zugu, n gʋls sẽn na n dog-b beoog rãmba yĩnga, tɩ buud paalga wa bãng n pẽg Soaala:" 
Psalms102:20 «B zĩnda b ro-sõnga zug n sulg n gese, b zĩnda yĩngr n sulg n ges tẽnga," 
Psalms102:21 n sulg n kelg sẽn be-b bi-bees roogẽ waasgo, n yet tɩ b ra kʋ sẽn da tog-b ne kũuma ye.»" 
Psalms102:22 B na n kilsa Soaala yʋʋr Siõ, b na n pẽg-b-la Zerizalɛɛm," 
Psalms102:23 wakat ning Adem biisa nanamse sẽn na n lagem taaba n kẽ Wẽnde. 
Psalms102:24 M da yeela woto, Soaala: «Y wooga m tĩiga, m sẽn waa n ket n zoet ne pãnga," 
Psalms102:25 y kʋʋga m yʋʋma, da loog-y ne-ma tɩ nan zemsa m pʋlenga pʋɩ-sʋka, la yãmb yʋʋma tonga taab n tõt sɛɛbo." 
Psalms102:26 Yãmb n naan tẽnga pĩnda la saaga yaa y nug tʋʋmde. 
Psalms102:27 Yãmb na n paame tɩ bãmb fãa looge. Fãa na n kʋdga wa fuugu, fãa na n teka wa fu-goabga, t'a to led a zĩiga." 
Psalms102:28 Yãmb yẽ bee woto, y yʋʋm ka sɛt ye," 
Psalms102:29 Yãmb sõgen-kamba kamb na waa n lebg zak rãmba, la b yagensa meng na n wa-la y taoore.»" 
Psalms103:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Pẽg Soaala, m ned sõngo, kils b yʋʋr sõngã ne f sũur fãa." 
Psalms103:2 Pẽg Soaala, m ned sõngo, da yĩm b yel-sõmd ba a ye!" 
Psalms103:3 Yaa Soaala n kõ-f yel-wẽnda sugri, yaa bãmb n sãoog f bãasa zãnga." 
Psalms103:4 Bãmb n zãag-f ne yaoogã, bãmb n pids fo vɩɩma ne nonglem, nonglem sẽn wẽnd ma rẽnna." 
Psalms103:5 M vɩɩma pida ne sũ-noogo, m le wɩɩda ne m bi-bɩɩlmẽ pãngã. M dɩta m pãngẽ wa wɩbga." 
Psalms103:6 Soaala bʋʋda b bʋʋdo, tɩ sẽn da rɩt-b bõna lɛɛg n paamd bʋʋm." 
Psalms103:7 B wilga a Moyiiz b soyã, n wilg Israyɛl kamba b tʋʋm-bãna." 
Psalms103:8 Wẽnd pida ne nimbãan-zoeere la bʋgsem, b sũura ka puugd tao-tao ye, b pʋleng ka vaand ye." 
Psalms103:9 B bʋʋd ka bʋʋd n ka sɛtẽ ye, b pa rɩkd yelle n paalg b sũurẽ ye." 
Psalms103:10 B pa sɩbgd tõnd ne sɩbgr ning d sẽn da tog ne ye. B pa sokd beegra samd zãng ye. 
Psalms103:11 B nonglma ne sẽn zoet-b bãmba zʋʋga saaga sẽn zãr ne tẽngã. 
Psalms103:12 B zãagda tõnd ne d tʋʋm dẽgdã wala yaang sẽn zãr ne nin-taoore. 
Psalms103:13 Wala ba sẽn nong a kamba, woto la Wẽnd nong sẽn pʋgd-b bãmba." 
Psalms103:14 Bãmb mii b sẽn yag tõnd ne bũmb ninga, b yag-d-la ne tom bilfr bala." 
Psalms103:15 Ninsaal vɩɩm, bãng moog rẽnna. A ningda puugu wala moogo," 
Psalms103:16 la sob tʋʋlg sã n wẽ-a, a ka ye. F bao-a me f kõn le yãend-a ye." 
Psalms103:17 Soaala nonglem yaool n pʋgda wakat buud fãa neb niyns sẽn zoet-b bãmba. Wẽnd na n zãa yagensa wala b sẽn zã ba rãmba," 
Psalms103:18 bãmb me sã n n ka bas zooda tɩ sãame, bãmb me sã n sak n deegd b noore." 
Psalms103:19 Wẽnd vigla b naama zaoor yĩngri, Wẽnd dɩta b naama bũmb fãa zugu." 
Psalms103:20 Yãmba, b malɛgse, pẽg-y Soaala! Yãmb n deegd b koeesã n taasd zĩig zãnga, b sẽn tʋm-y-la y sẽn looge." 
Psalms103:21 Yãmba b sõgen-kamba, sẽn tũud b raabo, wɩng-y ne bark pʋʋsgo." 
Psalms103:22 Yãmb fãa b sẽn yiis moogo, pẽg-y-ba y sẽn be zĩig ning fãa. M ned sõngo, fo me pʋʋs-b barka!" 
Psalms104:1 M ned sõngo, pẽg Soaala! Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb labsa! Yãmb naama pɩnda wa wĩntoogo," 
Psalms104:2 vẽenem la yãmb dɩk n pil wa fuugu, y yɛdga saaga wa maasem tɩɩga." 
Psalms104:3 Yaa yĩngr la yãmb tɩ zaoolg y roogã, y zomba sawatã wa naab sẽn zomb a bilim-bilm, yaa ne sobga pɩgs la y kẽnda." 
Psalms104:4 Y tʋʋm-tʋmdba la sobgo, la sobga tʋʋla wa bugum." 
Psalms104:5 Yãmb n vigl tẽngã a zĩigẽ la bũmb kõn luk-a abada. 
Psalms104:6 Mogra la y rɩk n pila wa fuugu; tãmsa me n da kokd kooma. 
Psalms104:7 La y sẽn wilg kooma y raabo, kooma wʋma saaga sẽn kelme n yɛɛse," 
Psalms104:8 n na n sig tãmsã la bãg-faasã n tees y sẽn wilga zĩig ningã. 
Psalms104:9 Y wilg-a-la toaag a sẽn ka tog n gãndge, y yeel-a lame t'a ra le wa rɩ tẽnga ye." 
Psalms104:10 Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ kooma sẽn pusg n yi wã kẽ sudsã wa b sore, n gind tãmsã." 
Psalms104:11 Ko-kãng n yũnugd yir rũmsã bãmb me la burgumd teeg n na n kiis a ko-yũudu. 
Psalms104:12 Yĩngr luiili wã me pa zãagd b tʋgdã ne kooma ye, la b bee tɩɩsa maasmẽ n yɩɩnẽ." 
Psalms104:13 Wẽnd be-la b zĩigẽ n zãgsd tãmsã b modgdame tɩ koom sek tẽngã. 
Psalms104:14 Yaa bãmb n kõt rũmsã b yamdo, bãmb kɩt tɩ tɩɩsa womd biisi, tɩ ninsaal paamd a rɩɩbo;" 
Psalms104:15 n paamd rãam sẽn noogd sũuri, n paamd kaam n zɛɛd b yĩnga, n paamd bur n paasd b pãnga." 
Psalms104:16 Tɩ bɛda menga, wala sẽn yit-b Libã, paamda koom tɩ sekd-ba, Soaala." 
Psalms104:17 Luiili wã wat n yagenda b tʋgdo, tɩ kʋɩl-piisa me samd b rẽnna tɩ-neeba zutu." 
Psalms104:18 Tãmsa zutu la yãgsa me sõsda, tɩ kɩɩsa reemd pĩisa bogdẽ." 
Psalms104:19 Kiuuga yitame la a kiidẽ, yaa y tig-raasa la b sõta. Wĩndga mi-la a lʋɩɩs sasa." 
Psalms104:20 Y bool yʋngo, y bool lika, tɩ tʋgẽ dũmsa fãa na yi b gãasẽ." 
Psalms104:21 Bõnyẽeg ningda rãamde, n baood bũmb n na n yõke, a kota Wẽnd tɩ b kõ-a a rɩɩbo." 
Psalms104:22 Zĩig sã n yẽeg tɩ bõnyẽeg leb a gãagẽ. 
Psalms104:23 Ninsaal me yita a tʋʋmde, a na n pa-la a pʋʋgẽ n ta zaabre." 
Psalms104:24 Ad-y y tʋʋma labsa, Soaala, la y zulga y yam n maan bũmb fãa, tẽnga fãa pida ne y sẽn naane."
