Psalms104:25 Ad mogrã. A wogma, a yalma, a zulma. A pʋgẽ wã yaa rũms ka tɛka, bɛd la bõonego." 
Psalms104:26 Mogra zug la koom kogenda kẽnda, mogra pʋg me y ninga bõn-nind a Leviatã a bee be n pʋgemdẽ, tɩ y mii n wa ges-a n pusg laado." 
Psalms104:27 B fãa teega yãmba n na n dɩ b rɩɩbo, wakat sã n ta bala." 
Psalms104:28 Y sã n kõ-ba b reegdame, y sã n yaag y nugu, b rɩtame n tɩge." 
Psalms104:29 Yãmb solgda y nenga tɩ rabeem kẽ-ba. Y sã n deeg b yõore, b yita moogo. Toma lebda a tomẽ." 
Psalms104:30 Y sã n le lebs-b vɩɩm, bõn-paals la y yag yã, tẽnga neng lebd n teemame." 
Psalms104:31 Bɩ y paam pẽgr wakat fãa Soaala. Noog-y y sũur ne y sẽn maana fãa. 
Psalms104:32 Yãmb geta tẽngã t'a sɩng miungu, y nug-bil sɩɩs tãmsã la b sẽn sobd ne bug-zõose." 
Psalms104:33 M dat n pẽg-y-la ne yɩɩla, m vɩɩma tõre. Beoog sẽn vẽeg-m fãa ne yõore, m na pẽg yã." 
Psalms104:34 Bɩ m yɩɩla ta y yam, m Soaala. Yãmb sẽn yaa m Wẽndã, m sũ-noog pida zãnga." 
Psalms104:35 Ad-y neb niyns toog sẽn ka be ne yãmba tog n yii moogo. Bɩ yel-wẽn-maandba la sẽn ka mi-b yãmba naag n menem zãnga. N-ye! M dat n pʋʋs-y-la barka, Soaala. Soog-y pẽgre, kaoos-y zamaan ne zamaana!" 
Psalms105:1 Kils-y Soaala, pẽg-y b yʋʋre! Ta-y bu-zẽmba sʋk n moon b sẽn maane." 
Psalms105:2 Yɩɩl-y b yĩnga, sigl-y reem b yĩnga, le togs-y b tʋʋm-bãna fãa." 
Psalms105:3 Bɩ y zug roog yĩngri, b yʋʋra sẽn paamd pẽgra yĩnga, la y sũur yɩ noogo y sẽn baood b zĩiga yĩnga." 
Psalms105:4 Bao-y Soaala ne b pãngã, bao-y b nenga vẽenem." 
Psalms105:5 Tẽeg-y b tʋʋm-bãna la koees niyns sẽn yi b noorẽ. 
Psalms105:6 Yãmba, b sõgna a Abraam buudã, maan-y tẽegre, tẽeg-y yã, Zakoob kamba, b kom-nongdsã." 
Psalms105:7 Bãmb la Soaala tõnd Wẽnde, bãmb n dɩt naam dũni wã zugu." 
Psalms105:8 B tẽega b zooda yelle, zood ning sẽn yõg yʋʋm ka tɛka yelle." 
Psalms105:9 Zood sẽn yõg ne a Abraam, kãabg sẽn kãab noogo a Izaak yĩnga," 
Psalms105:10 tẽeg-y b zelemd sẽn yiis a Zakoob yĩnga, tẽeg-y b sẽn yals daar fãa a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
Psalms105:11 Ad-y kãabga kãaba woto: «M kõt-f-la Kanaã tẽnga, yaa fo ne f yagensa pʋɩɩr la rẽnna.»" 
Psalms105:12 Dẽ tɩ b sõora nan paooda, da yaa neb a wãn bala sẽn yi b tẽngẽ." 
Psalms105:13 B ra yita buudu n tɩ kẽ buudu, n yi buud a ye soolmẽ n tɩ kẽ a to rẽnnẽ." 
Psalms105:14 B pa bas tɩ bu-zẽmba yaal-b ye, b tol n sɩbga dĩm dãmb, bãmb yĩnga." 
Psalms105:15 B ra yeelame: «Da sɩɩs-y m sẽn welg b rãmb toora ye, da sɩɩs-y m bãngdba ye!»" 
Psalms105:16 B boola kom t'a wa lʋɩ tẽngã, rɩɩb buug ra ka le yãet ye." 
Psalms105:17 Ned la b reng n tʋm b taoore: a Zozɛf, yɩ-la a Zozɛf la b ra koos wa yem-daoogo." 
Psalms105:18 B bao bãng n sog a karga, n bao bũmb n sog a kokore," 
Psalms105:19 la a gũu woto n tãag wakat ninga Wẽnd meng sẽn wa n yiis-a yellẽ. 
Psalms105:20 Dĩma kõo noor tɩ b yiisa bãngẽ, Ezipt dĩma kɩtame tɩ b yiis-a roogẽ." 
Psalms105:21 A tol n kɩtame t'a lebg a zaka soaala, n lebg a sẽn so bũmb ning fãa soaala." 
Psalms105:22 A paamame tɩ rĩm biis wa kẽ a tãpẽ, n paam t'a yama nek nin-kẽems rẽnna." 
Psalms105:23 A Israyɛl tũ rẽ n kẽ Ezipt. A Zakoob wa n lebga sãan a Kam tẽnga. 
Psalms105:24 Wẽnd sõnga a buuda t'a fɩɩge, a pãnga waa n yɩɩga a bɛɛba rẽnna." 
Psalms105:25 Wẽnd tedga bɛɛba zʋgo tɩ b na n yik n maan beem ne b buudã, tɩ b na n yik n zã a Israyɛl ne wẽnem." 
Psalms105:26 Dẽ me la b tʋm b sõgna a Moyiiz n paas a Aarõ, a sẽn da yãke." 
Psalms105:27 Ezipt tẽnga b maana bõn-bãn niynsi Wẽnd sẽn kõ-b noor tɩ b maan a Kam tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Psalms105:28 Lik la b tʋm yã la a waame tɩ b sɩng marsã n bas no-koeemde. 
Psalms105:29 Kooma tekame n lebg zɩɩm la zĩma tũu rẽ n ki. 
Psalms105:30 Loms yãmba b tẽngã n tãag b dĩma roogẽ. 
Psalms105:31 B sẽn le gome, la keooda sẽn wa, tɩ keooda loog tɩ rũm-pigli wa reeg n yãmb zãnga." 
Psalms105:32 B mong-b-la saaga n kõ-b sapɩlem yɩɩ bugum la bug-walem la saaga ni yã. 
Psalms105:33 B yorga b bugsuntund la b kankamse, b tol n kʋʋsa tẽnga tɩɩse." 
Psalms105:34 B sẽn gom yɛsa sʋy waame, n gãneg b gɛl n wek b kamba," 
Psalms105:35 la bãmb n sɛɛs tẽnga yamdo la tɩɩsa biisi. 
Psalms105:36 B kʋʋ tẽnga kom-dẽemse. Bãmb n yaool n da ya yõod ninga b sẽn da paam ne rogem pãnga. 
Psalms105:37 Wẽnd yaool n yiisa b neba wa rakãagba, ne wanzurf la sãnem, tɩ b kẽnd sakdẽ." 
Psalms105:38 B loogra pidsa Ezipt ne sũ-noogo tɩ b sẽn loogã b yɛɛsga kolga weoogo. 
Psalms105:39 B yɛdga sawadgo sẽn na n lebg b maasem tɩɩga, la sawadga widga bugum n kõ-b vẽenem yʋngo." 
Psalms105:40 B neba sẽn kose, sobg waa ne pitr-lʋɩɩse; yĩngr bura me la b paam n dɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms105:41 Pĩig sẽn wẽ n wurgi, koom dʋʋgame, la kʋɩlg n tuk a sore n kẽed pʋ-weese." 
Psalms105:42 B tẽega b sẽn da yiis gomd sõng ninga b sõgen, a Abraam, yĩngã." 
Psalms105:43 B yiisa b buuda ne kɩdengo, b yiisa b sẽn tũus b rãmba tɩ b kaasd sũ-noogo." 
Psalms105:44 Bu-zẽmba tẽns la b rɩk n kõ-ba, b tʋʋma yõod la b tigs n kõ-ba." 
Psalms105:45 B kos-b lame bala tɩ b reeg b noorã la b tũ b rog-n-miki. Wẽnd paam pẽgre! 
Psalms106:1 Wẽnd paam pẽgre! Pẽg-y Soaala tɩ b pida ne sõmblem la b pidsda b kãabga raar fãa. 
Psalms106:2 Ãnda n tõe n togs Wẽnd sẽn maana fãa, ãnda n tõe n pẽg b tʋʋm sõma wã fãa?" 
Psalms106:3 Zu-noog soaba la sẽn tũud-a Wẽnd sẽn yalse la a maan sẽn ya sõmb wakat buud fãa. 
Psalms106:4 Tẽeg-y d yelle, Soaala, yãmb sẽn get y buuda ne nimbãan-zoeerã, ges-y d yelle tɩ yãmb la Fãagda." 
Psalms106:5 Sõng-y tɩ m yãend y nin-sõma wã sũ-noogo, m me naag y buuda n kɩdme, tɩ m zuga zẽk wa sẽn paam b pʋɩɩr yãmb nengẽ." 
Psalms106:6 Wala d ba rãmba, d beega yãmba, d bʋdga sore n tog ne sɩbgre." 
Psalms106:7 Ezipt tẽnga d ba rãmba ka wʋm y bõn-bãna võor ye, b yĩma y nonglma sẽn zã-b zãab ninga. B taa Rudum mogrẽ n zẽk b zut ne yãmba." 
Psalms106:8 La Wẽnd sẽn pa rat yʋ-beoog yĩnga n yaool n dat n wilg b pãnga, b fãag-b lame." 
Psalms106:9 B tãsa Rudma Mogre t'a kʋɩ. Woto b naoor paa koɛɛnga wala b kẽna zĩ-pɛɛlẽ. 
Psalms106:10 B fãag-b-la b bɛɛba nusẽ, bɛɛba kang ka tõog n zẽk n wẽ-b ye." 
Psalms106:11 Kooma rɩ-la b bɛɛba n pa kees ba a ye. 
Psalms106:12 Ba rãmba tẽe b goama n pʋd pẽgr yɩɩlle. 
Psalms106:13 La pa yẽ n kaoos ye, b ka paam n pids b sẽn data ye la bãmb zoe n yĩmame." 
Psalms106:14 We-raoogẽ wa, kom n yõk-ba; zĩ-peen-daasẽ wã b yik n fɛɛsa Wẽnde." 
Psalms106:15 Wẽnd ra kõt-b-la b sẽn da rate, la bãmb yeelame tɩ ka sek ye, tɩ ka waoog ye." 
Psalms106:16 B yika sikẽ wã n maan sũ-kiiri ne a Moyiiz, n maan sũ-kiir ne a Aarõ, Wẽnd nedã." 
Psalms106:17 Tẽnga yaaga a noore n vel a Datã, tẽnga lɛɛg n busa a Abiram ne a poorẽ dãmba." 
Psalms106:18 Bugum yõog-b lame, bugum dɩɩ kɩɩsdbã." 
Psalms106:19 Orɛb tãnga zugu yõgsa yõga nag-bila la b fãa wõgemda yõak tʋʋmd taoore," 
Psalms106:20 la b teka Wẽnd ziirã ne naaf dẽnna, b tek-a-la ne yamd wãbd dẽnna." 
Psalms106:21 B yĩma Wẽnde, bãmb Fãagda, sẽn da maan bõn-bãn b yĩng Ezipt tẽnga," 
Psalms106:22 n maan bõn-bãn Kanaã tẽnga, n tʋm tɩ pɛleng yik Rudum mogrẽ." 
Psalms106:23 B yeelame tɩ b na n kʋ-b-la zãnga. Dẽ la b sõgna a Moyiiz lʋɩ sʋka n kos-b tɩ b sigs b sũuri la b ra maan bũmb ye. 
Psalms106:24 B pa tẽ Wẽnd sẽn gom ne b ye, b pa pẽg tẽnga ne a sõmblema ye." 
Psalms106:25 B kẽ-la b rotẽ n guglme, b pa sak Soaala noor ye." 
Psalms106:26 Dẽ la bãmb me wẽen yã tɩ b fãa na n paa we-raoogẽ wã," 
Psalms106:27 tɩ b sɩd na n sẽeg-b bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ n paam n menes-b zãnga. 
Psalms106:28 Peor tẽnga b sak n kẽ-la a Baal, tẽnga rãmb wẽn-naand a ye, woto b rɩ maand sẽn da kʋ kɩɩms yĩnga." 
Psalms106:29 B tʋʋm yooda puuga Naaba-Wẽnd sũuri la tao bala bã-longdem kõsa a kãnde. 
Psalms106:30 Wakat kãng me la a Pinas yik yã n na n kẽ Soaala tãpẽ, n kʋ, n kʋ n same, tɩ tẽn-kũuma na n yaool n looge." 
Psalms106:31 Wẽnd gesa rẽ wa raood tʋʋmde, tʋʋmd sẽn tog ne pẽgre, zamaan ne zamaana!" 
Psalms106:32 Ba rãmba puuga Wẽnd sũuri, Meriba tẽngẽ la rẽ taka yell beed a Moyiiz zugu." 
Psalms106:33 B waa n menesa a Moyiiz yam tɩ yẽ me gome, la pa yɩ wa Wẽnd sẽn da rat ye." 
Psalms106:34 Ba rãmba ka menes bu-zẽmba Wẽnd sẽn da gom b rãmb yella ye. 
Psalms106:35 B rɩka b nao, n zãms b tʋʋm yoodã." 
Psalms106:36 B waooga b wẽn-naandã, n lʋɩ bẽdgẽ," 
Psalms106:37 n yik n koot b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli, tɩ bãmb n waa n lebg b Sʋtãana maand rũmsi." 
Psalms106:38 B raaga zɩɩm sẽn ka tog n daag ye, b raaga b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli zɩɩm, Kanaã wẽn-naandsa yĩnga, la zɩ-kãng n dẽgem tẽnga zãnga." 
Psalms106:39 B lebga rẽgdo tɩ b basa Wẽnd vɩɩga n tɩ kẽ wẽn-faado. 
Psalms106:40 Wẽnd sũur puuga ne b buudã, Wẽnd sũur waa n yaanda ne b pʋɩɩrã," 
Psalms106:41 tɩ b na n kong n bas-b bu-zẽmba nusẽ, la b bɛɛba maan-b-la pãnga." 
Psalms106:42 Bɛɛba yaal-b lame, bɛɛba zisga b nus b zugu." 
Psalms106:43 Yaa naoor ka tɛka la Wẽnd waa n fãag-ba. Bãmb pa sak n teem zʋg ye, b wẽnema le maneg n paasame." 
Psalms106:44 Wẽnd waa n wʋma b kɛlenga n kũm b nimbãanega. 
Psalms106:45 B tẽega b zooda ne bãmba, n tẽeg b kãabga sẽn pa tog n vaalã n na n bas taale." 
Psalms106:46 B kɩtame tɩ b weoog kẽ b bɛɛbã. 
Psalms106:47 La rẽ yaa b sẽn yiis b noorẽ: «Fãag-y-do, Soaala-Wẽnde, yiis-y tõnd bu-zẽmba sʋka. Woto d na kils y yʋʋre, woto d zug na kell n zẽke d sẽn ya yãmb pẽgdbã." 
Psalms106:48 Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama paam barka zamaan ne zamaana!» Tɩ buuda gill na n naaga taab n yeele: «Amina! Wẽnd soog pẽgre!»" 
Psalms107:1 D kils Soaala tɩ b pida ne sõmblem la b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. 
Psalms107:2 B le togs rẽnna n yɩlme, Wẽnd sẽn fãag b rãmba, b sẽn fãag b rãmba b bɛɛba nusẽ," 
Psalms107:3 b yit yaang bɩ taoore. Goabg bɩ mogra sẽnẽ. 
Psalms107:4 Kẽer waa n menema zĩ-peen-daasẽ, n pa le ne tẽng sẽn na n kẽ ye." 
Psalms107:5 Kom la ko-yũud n da kʋʋd-ba. 
Psalms107:6 B yɩɩra pʋgẽ b teesa Wẽnd n kelme la b waa n fãag-b lame. 
Psalms107:7 B kɩtame tɩ b rɩk sore n kẽn n tãag neb sẽn kẽedẽ. 
Psalms107:8 Bɩ b pẽg Wẽnnaam sẽn pʋg bãmb ne zoodã, b pẽg-ba, b wẽnd-makr dãmba yĩnga." 
Psalms107:9 Sɩda, kokor sẽn da kʋɩ zãng paama koom tɩ pʋg sẽn da ya vɩʋʋg rɩ n tɩge." 
Psalms107:10 B ra yõga kẽere n balg bãnga la b gãneg-b ne lik bi-bees roogẽ. 
Psalms107:11 B ra tõdga Yĩngr Pãng-Soaba noore, b ra pa yɛɛsd ne Wẽnd sẽn gɩdg bũmb ning ye." 
Psalms107:12 Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ b yãend toogo, la b zãag-b-la ne yolsda." 
Psalms107:13 Woto b nimbãanega pʋgẽ b tees n kosa Wẽnd sõngre la b waa n fãag-b lame. 
Psalms107:14 B yiis-b-la b ro-likẽ wã, n kao b wĩ." 
Psalms107:15 Bɩ b pʋʋs Wẽnd bark b maan-neera yĩnga, b pʋʋs barka b sẽn maan bõn-bãn ninsaal yĩnga." 
Psalms107:16 Sɩda b kao kut kʋɩlense ne b bãn-sogdse. 
Psalms107:17 Neb kẽer vɩɩma meng sẽn ya yoogã n da wilgd tɩ b zuta ra menemame. 
Psalms107:18 Rɩɩb menga yamleoog ra ka le tar b ye, bãmb ne Kũum zak noore: nif la yõore." 
Psalms107:19 B le yika b yɩɩra pʋgẽ n kelem Wẽnde, la Wẽnd waa n fãag-b lame." 
Psalms107:20 Wẽnd sẽn yiis b koɛɛga, B tool-b-la fãagre, n zãag-b ne yaooga." 
Psalms107:21 Bɩ b kils Wẽnnaam sẽn ket n pʋgd-b ne nonglma, b pẽg-b bõn-bãna sẽn maan ninsaalba yĩnga." 
Psalms107:22 B kʋ pẽgr maando la b kils b tʋʋm sõma wã ne sũ-noogo. 
Psalms107:23 Sẽn togd b sor ne koom-kogendo tɩ b tʋʋma fãa tʋmd kooma zugu," 
Psalms107:24 bãmb fãa yãenda sẽn maane, b yãenda bõn-bãna sẽn maan mogrẽ." 
Psalms107:25 Wẽnd sẽn gome la sobg sẽn kaooge, sobg sẽn na n zẽk ko-wiisi," 
Psalms107:26 tɩ kogenda rãmb na n zẽkd n kuiis yĩngri la b lɛɛgd n sigd bʋg-tẽnga, tɩ b sũur yaanẽ, tɩ yaa wala b na n wʋba b yãado." 
Psalms107:27 B sigdame la b rʋʋda, n lebd goabga n lebd rɩtgo wa rã-yũudba, la ya wa b zɩɩ n dugs koglg ye." 
Psalms107:28 B sẽn yik b yɩɩra pʋgẽ n kelem Wẽnde, b yols-b-la ne rabeem buud fãa." 
Psalms107:29 Sobga sẽn kaooga ne ko-wiisa sigsame," 
Psalms107:30 tɩ neba sũur na n yɩ noogo, tɩ b na n paam n yals b sẽn da rat zĩig ningã." 
Psalms107:31 Bɩ b kils Soaala sẽn ket n pʋgd-b ne b nonglma, b pẽgb ba, b sẽn maan bõn-bãn ninsaalba yĩnga," 
Psalms107:32 b pẽgb-b buuda sʋka, nin-kẽemsa tigsg zĩigẽ." 
Psalms107:33 B tõeeme tɩ kʋɩlsa nao lebg zĩ-peen-daase, tɩ kooma sẽn be zĩig ninga wa lebg ko-yũud tẽnga," 
Psalms107:34 tɩ kooda sẽn sakd zĩig ninga wa lebg lɛɛlga, tẽnga rãmb wẽnema yĩnga." 
Psalms107:35 B tõeeme tɩ we-raooga lebg ko-ralem, tɩ koom sẽn ka be zĩig ninga lebg ko-bundem zĩiga," 
Psalms107:36 al tɩ kom sẽn tar b rãmba na n wa kẽ n me tẽn-sõngo. 
Psalms107:37 B na n bʋda pʋto, n sel bugsuntundu, la b na n tõsa biisi." 
Psalms107:38 B na n paama Wẽnd barka, n wek balbo. Bãmb ne b rũmsi." 
Psalms107:39 Neb kẽer me beeme tɩ b sõora tar woogr n dabda tɩ b paoonga tar woogr n dabda n bas-b ne zu-beed la toogo. 
Psalms107:40 Wẽnd basdame tɩ na-komsa yãe paoore, tɩ b rɩk so-yoog n tees n menem." 
Psalms107:41 B yaool n kogenda naong soaba a naonga pʋgẽ; a zaka pita ne neba, wala a wuba sẽn pit ne rũmsi." 
Psalms107:42 Nin-tɩrsa yãeta rẽ n noog b sũuri, tɩ zelem goalma ka tõe n leok bũmb ye." 
Psalms107:43 Sẽn tar-a yam sẽn weke na n gesa ne yam, la a na bãng tɩ sõmblem bal n pid Soaalã." 
Psalms108:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. 
Psalms108:2 Y pids-m-la ne sũ-keelem, Soaala, tɩ m na n yɩɩlle la m pẽg-y ne m sũura pãng tɛka." 
Psalms108:3 La yãmb me bee yɛ, m ruudg la m kʋnde, tɩ m maan noogo n nek sõore?" 
Psalms108:4 M na n pʋʋs-y-la barka, kʋʋnga sʋka m dat n pẽg-y-la bu-zẽmba sʋka, Soaala." 
Psalms108:5 Y nonglma tãoome n kul sagãna y pʋlenga kõn vaala le yaa vẽeneg ne neb fãa. 
Psalms108:6 Soaala, zẽk y yʋʋrã t'a kul yĩngri, tɩ y ziira reeg tẽngã n yãmbe!" 
Psalms108:7 Bɩ y modg n leok-do la y rɩtga me maan bũmbu n fãag y sẽn nong b rãmbã. 
Psalms108:8 Wẽnd zĩnda b roogẽ wã n leoke: Maam n maand raoodo. M maanda ne Sikɛm wa m sẽn date, m pasda Sukot vẽenem." 
Psalms108:9 M Soo Galaad, n so Manase, a Efrayim la m dɩk n fõgne m zugu wa zug-peoogo, a Zɩɩda n ya m naam dasaare." 
Psalms108:10 A Moab yaa m la-zulunga, yẽ pʋgẽ la m pegd m menga. A Edom yaa m soolem, rẽ ka be no-koeemd ye. Filisti poorẽ, m kaasa m sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Psalms108:11 Ãnda n na n sõng-m tɩ m paam n ta tãnsoben-dooga pʋga? Ãnda n na n sõng-m tɩ m ta Edom? 
Psalms108:12 Sã n ka yãmba, Soaala? La yãmb yaool n basa tõndo n pa le yãagd d tãb-biisa zabrẽ ye." 
Psalms108:13 Wa-y n sõng-y-d ne d bɛyã tɩ laong ka yaagd laong bugmẽ ye. 
Psalms108:14 Wẽnd sã n be sʋka d na maan daoodo tɩ yaa bãmb n na n tab d bɛɛba gilli. 
Psalms109:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yãmb la m pẽgda Soaala. Bõe tɩ y ya sɩɩ n ka leokdẽ? 
Psalms109:2 M bɛɛba yaaga b noor n dat n wãb-ma, b yaaga b noor n dat n tudg-ma, b zelemda yiisa goam sẽn pa sɩd ye," 
Psalms109:3 b gomame n wilg tɩ b kis-m lame, b zabda ne-ma la m ka tar b zabra võor ye." 
Psalms109:4 B yao-la m zooda ne wɩdse dẽ la m tar y sɛɛga. 
Psalms109:5 M maan-b-la neere la b lebs-m-la wẽnga, mam nonga bãmba tɩ b lɛɛg n kis maam." 
Psalms109:6 Ad-b sẽn gomd m poorẽ: «D bao yelle n dogl a zugu, n bao kaset soab n zĩndg a rɩtgo." 
Psalms109:7 Sõng-y tɩ b paalg-a bʋʋdo. Bɩ a kosga ra yɩ bũmb y sẽn na n sak kelgr ye. 
Psalms109:8 Kɩt-y t'a yõor lebg koɛɛga, tɩ ned a to led a zĩiga," 
Psalms109:9 t'a kamb lebg kɩɩb-bi, t'a pag lebg pʋg-kõore," 
Psalms109:10 t'a kamb lebg gõaadba la bõs rãmba, tɩ b rig-b n yiis b raboodẽ," 
Psalms109:11 tɩ bobl-wẽng soab wa loog ne a paoong fãa, tɩ sãamb wa loog ne a sẽn tar fãa," 
Psalms109:12 t'a ra le yãend pʋ-peen-ned a sɛɛgẽ ye, tɩ ned da yãb a kɩɩbsa ye," 
Psalms109:13 tɩ b menes a yagensa fãa gilli, tɩ yʋʋm a wãn pʋgẽ bɩ a yʋʋr menem moogo," 
Psalms109:14 tɩ b le tẽegd Wẽnde a ba la a saamb dãmb yel-wẽna, t'a ma beegr ra tol n paam sugr ye!" 
Psalms109:15 Bɩ b wẽnema fãa pa Wẽnd pʋtẽerẽ, tɩ b yʋʋr yẽes tẽng zugu!" 
Psalms109:16 Ad-y nin-kãnga pa tol n bao n na n vɩɩnd ne pʋ-peelem ye. A namsa naong soaba, a pʋga nimbãan neda, a pʋgame n na n kʋ ned yam sẽn yi vɩɩm zãnga." 
Psalms109:17 A sẽn da nong n kãab beedã, bɩ a kãab beeda lɛɛg n lʋɩ a zugu. A sẽn pa tʋlg n kãab noogã, bɩ kãab beed pa ne-a." 
Psalms109:18 A sẽn dat beedã bɩ beeda lebg a ko-yũudem a bʋk a yĩnga wa ka-zɛɛdem. 
Psalms109:19 A pil-a wa fu goabga a mobg-a wa sẽbdga.» 
Psalms109:20 Yaa woto la m kaset zirẽ dãmba maanda, yaa woto la b rõt-m Wẽnd taoore." 
Psalms109:21 La yãmba, m Soaala-Wẽnnaam, maan-y ne maam wala y sẽn sɩng n maandẽ, y nonglma n tat m yam, fãag-y-ma." 
Psalms109:22 M yaa naong soaba la nimbãan neda, m sũura võoga m pʋgẽ." 
Psalms109:23 M yõbgda bilf bilfu wa lika; b pĩngd-m-la wa zõ-ralle. 
Psalms109:24 M no-loeera sɛ-la m pãng zãnga, m faagame tɩ rɩɩb ka le kẽed m noorẽ ye." 
Psalms109:25 B sã n laad ned fãa, yaa mam bala, b sã n yãend-m fãa, b girda b zutu." 
Psalms109:26 Wa-y n sõng-y-ma, Soaala-Wẽnde! Y sẽn nong-ma bɩ y fãag-ma." 
Psalms109:27 Bɩ neba fãa bãng, Soaala, tɩ yãmb n maan woto m yĩnga." 
Psalms109:28 Bãmb kãabd beed me, yãmb dẽnd yaa noogo. B sã n baood zabr ne maam b na n lebga b bɛɛb laado, tɩ y yamba sũur lɛɛg n tosd kaam." 
Psalms109:29 Sã n ya sẽn dõt-b maama, bɩ paoor lebg b fu taoko, bɩ b yeelg yãnde n vuud-a wa kobre." 
Psalms109:30 M dat n pẽga Soaala ne m koɛɛg pãng tɛka. M dat n pẽg-b-la kʋʋnga sʋka. 
Psalms109:31 Bãmb bʋʋdo n yiisd nin-koam yellẽ, bãmb n fãagd-a sẽn dat-b tɩ b kʋ-a wã nugẽ." 
Psalms110:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Zu-soaba yeela dĩma, m soaala: «Wa-y n zĩnd-y m dɩtgo, tɩ m modg y bɛɛbã n zõneg y taoore tɩ y palgd y nao b poor zugu.»" 
Psalms110:2 Bɩ Soaala rɩ naam siõ b pãb b bɛɛbã n gilgi. 
Psalms110:3 Dũnna y tigimda y tãb-biisã la yaa neb sẽn mi b zab-teed zãab n yãagd-y. Ad-b sẽn sigd tãn-sõngã, ad kom-bɩɩba sẽn sigd wa tõd-beoog meenem." 
Psalms110:4 Soaala wẽename la b kõn lebs b zelemd ye: «Yãmb yaa maan-kʋʋd daar fãa yĩnga, wala a Melkisedɛk maan-kʋʋra sẽn date.»" 
Psalms110:5 Soaala be-la y sɛɛgẽ. B sũ-puura raare b fẽta dĩm dãmba," 
Psalms110:6 b kaooda bu-zẽmba bʋʋdo, tɩ b bãg-faasa fãa na n pid ne kũum, tɩ nanamsa fãa kõab na n weel zĩig zãnga." 
Psalms110:7 Sor zugu dĩma paama kʋɩlg koom n yũ n le yik ne raoodo. 
Psalms111:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! M na pẽga Soaala ne m sũur fãa, na n yɩɩ nin-tɩrsa sɛk la b tigung raare." 
Psalms111:2 Soaala tʋʋma labsa. B tata wʋsg yam tɩ b baood ne yamleoogo n na n bãng-ba. 
Psalms111:3 Wẽnd tʋʋma yãgda ne neerem la b wilgdame tɩ b nonglma ka lebd poorẽ ye. 
Psalms111:4 B ratame tɩ b tẽegd b bõn-bãna. Soaala pida ne nonglem la nimbãan-zoeere. 
Psalms111:5 B rɩlgda sẽn pʋgd-b bãmba, b kõn bas b kãabg tɩ vaal ye." 
Psalms111:6 B wilga b buuda b sẽn tõe n maan fãa b sẽn waa n deeg buud a taab tẽns n kõ-ba. 
Psalms111:7 B sẽn maan fãa tũuda ne nonglem la zemsgo, b sẽn wilg tõnd sor ninga la tɩrga," 
Psalms111:8 b noyã yalsa daar buud fãa yĩnga la b sẽn yet tɩ d maana yaa sẽn segd la sẽn zemse. 
Psalms111:9 B toola b buuda fãagre, buud ning b sẽn tũus n kõ b mengã, buud ning b sẽn kãab b zood daar fãa yĩngã. B yʋʋr yaa sõngo la d tog n zoe-b lame." 
Psalms111:10 Yam sõng sẽn tʋɩɩs ne bũmb ninga yaa rabeem Wẽnd taoore. Sẽn maand-b woto la yam zulung rãmba. Wẽnd soog pẽgre, zamaan fãa yĩnga!" 
Psalms112:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Zu-noog soaba la sẽn zoeta Soaala n deegd b noyã. 
Psalms112:2 A buud kɩɩ yẽgna tẽng zugu, la Wẽnd ningda nin-tɩrs buud barka." 
Psalms112:3 A zak kõn kong laogo la arzɛk ye, a keld n yɛsa a sõmblem zugu daar fãa." 
Psalms112:4 Vẽenem n na n puk likẽ nin-tɩrs yĩnga, tɩ Wẽnd mii zemsgo, n tar nonglem la nimbãan-zoeere." 
Psalms112:5 Sẽn kũmd-a a to n pengd a bũmbu maanda neere. A na n gesa a zaka yɛl ne zemsgo. 
Psalms112:6 A vigla a meng daar fãa yĩnga, a yʋʋr kõn tol n menem ye." 
Psalms112:7 A kõn zoe soy zut gom-yood ye, a teega Soaala t'a sũur kegme," 
Psalms112:8 a ka na n zoe bũmb ba a ye; a tõe n yĩgsa a bɛɛba. 
Psalms112:9 A paama wʋsg n kõ naong rãmba, a sõmblem na kell n pʋg-a, a zug na kell n zẽke." 
Psalms112:10 Nin-wẽng nee-a lame t'a kẽnda t'a sũur puudẽ. A wuka ne beem la a ka le so a meng ye; nin-wẽnsa geels na n paa faado. 
Psalms113:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Wẽnd yemse, pẽg-y Soaala, Wẽnd yemse pẽg-y b yʋʋre." 
Psalms113:2 Bɩ Wẽnd yʋʋr paam pẽgre marsã la daar fãa! 
Psalms113:3 B yʋʋr paam pẽgr wĩntoog pukri n tãag a lʋɩɩse! 
Psalms113:4 Wẽnd la bu-zẽmba fãa dĩma, b ziira kula sagãna." 
Psalms113:5 Ãnda n wẽnd Soaala tõnd Wẽndã? Bãmb tɩ vigla b naama zaoor al yĩngri. 
Psalms113:6 B geta tẽngr-tẽngre, saaga la tẽngã." 
Psalms113:7 B roogda tomẽ ka-pãng-soaba, n yiisd naong-soab tãmpʋʋrẽ," 
Psalms113:8 n na n tɩ zĩndg-a rĩm biis sʋka, ne bãmb buuda na-komse." 
Psalms113:9 Pag ninga sẽn da ka rogdã b baooda zak n kõ-a, a lebgda ma sẽn pid ne sũ-noogo. Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms114:1 A Israyɛl sẽn yi Ezipt, a Zakoob sẽn zãag ne nin-toosã," 
Psalms114:2 Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ la b waa n tilg b zag-sõngo la Israyɛl n lebg b pʋɩɩre. 
Psalms114:3 Mogra yãee rẽ n kʋɩ tĩiga, tɩ Zʋrdẽ zoe tula." 
Psalms114:4 Tãmsa pʋgma b zĩisẽ wa pe-raado, tɩ kunkuba yɩg wa bulli." 
Psalms114:5 Bõe tɩ f zoetẽ, mogre? Bõe tɩ f kẽnd tula, Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga?" 
Psalms114:6 Tãmse, bõe tɩ y pʋgemd wa pe-raado, bõe tɩ y yɩgd wa bulli, kunkuba?" 
Psalms114:7 Tẽnga, miim f Soaala taoore, miim a Zakoob Wẽnda taoore," 
Psalms114:8 tɩ bãmb yĩnga kʋɩlg pusga kugrẽ, tɩ pĩig tõog n bul koom." 
Psalms115:1 Ka tõnd n na n soog pẽgr ye, ayo! Ka tõnd ye, yaa yãmb yʋʋrã, tɩ y nonga tõndo, tɩ y kãabga ka vaanẽ ye." 
Psalms115:2 Yaa bõe tɩ bu-zẽmba gomda: «A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama bɛɛ?» 
Psalms115:3 Tõnd Wẽnda zao yĩngri, b maanda b sẽn dat fãa." 
Psalms115:4 Sã n ya bu-zẽmbã, b wẽnd dãmba yaa wanzurf la sãnem, fãa yaa ninsaal nug tʋʋmde." 
Psalms115:5 B tara noore la b pa gomd ye, n tar nini la b pa ne ye." 
Psalms115:6 B tara tʋba la b pa wʋmd ye, n tar yõore la b pa kokd yũug ye." 
Psalms115:7 B tara nusi la b ka tõe n sɩɩs bũmb ye, b tara nao la b pa lukd b zĩigẽ ye, gomd buud ka yit b kokorẽ ye." 
Psalms115:8 Bãmb ne sẽn naan b bãmba zem taaba, bãmb ne sẽn teeg-b bãmba pa são to ye!" 
Psalms115:9 Israyɛl kamba teeg-y Soaala, bãmb la y sõangda la y gãongo." 
Psalms115:10 Aarõ roogo, teeg-y Soaala, bãmb la y sõangda la y gãongo." 
Psalms115:11 Yãmb fãa sẽn zoet Soaala, teeg-y bãmba, bãmb la y sõangda la y gãongo!" 
Psalms115:12 Wẽnd ket n tẽra y yelle, b na ning-y barka, b na ning a Israyɛl buud barka, n ning a Aarõ buud barka." 
Psalms115:13 B na ning Wẽnd kẽed-paalsa barka, nin-bõoneg wala nin-bɛda!" 
Psalms115:14 Bɩ Wẽnd paas y kamb sõore, n paas y yagensa me sõore!" 
Psalms115:15 Bɩ Wẽnd ning-y barka, bãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽnga." 
Psalms115:16 Yĩngrã Wẽnd bas-a-la b meng yĩnga, la b rɩka tẽngã n kõ ninsaalba." 
Psalms115:17 Ka sẽn ki-ba n pẽgd Wẽnd ye, bãmb sigda noor kõn le tõog n yaag zĩigẽ." 
Psalms115:18 Sã n ya tõndo, tõnd kilsda bãmba marsã la wakat buud fãa. Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms116:1 M nonga Soaala tɩ m sã n bool-ba, b wʋmdame." 
Psalms116:2 B teesame n kelg-ma, la yaa m vɩɩma tõre la m na n bool-ba." 
Psalms116:3 Kũum gadra waa n za-m lame, wĩ niyns sẽn tat n digd bʋg-tẽnga waa n sẽbd-m lame, m da zĩi ne toog la yɩɩre," 
Psalms116:4 tɩ m pʋd Soaala yʋʋre; m yeelame: «Soaala, fãag-y-ma!»" 
Psalms116:5 Soaala pida ne nonglem la zemsgo. Tõnd Wẽnda pida ne nimbãan-zoeere. 
Psalms116:6 Wẽnd nonga neb sẽn ka tar wilg-m-menga. M da yaa nin-koama la b fãag-m lame. 
Psalms116:7 Zĩnd ne laafi, m ned sõngo, tɩ Wẽnd maan-f-la neere." 
Psalms116:8 Y fãag-m la kũum nugẽ, Soaala, y zãaga m nini ne nintãm, n tɩlg m nao ne lʋɩɩse," 
Psalms116:9 tɩ m paam n kẽn Soaala taoore nin-vɩɩs tẽngẽ. 
Psalms116:10 Ba m sẽn waa n gomd tɩ m yaa nimbãan-neda, m da ket n teega Wẽnde." 
Psalms116:11 M waa n ka mi m sẽn gomd n lebdẽ n maandẽ tɩ neba fãa yaa zirẽ-be-rãmba. 
Psalms116:12 M yɩta a wãn n lebs Wẽnde neer ning b sẽn maan maama? 
Psalms116:13 M na n zẽka m bark pʋʋsg kũuni, n tees-ba, la m na n pʋda Soaala yʋʋre." 
Psalms116:14 M na n pidsa m sẽn kãab Soaala fãa, buuda sẽn tigimd taaba zĩigẽ." 
Psalms116:15 Bũmb sẽn ka noom Wẽnde yaa kũuma sẽn loogd ne b kambã. 
Psalms116:16 Woto m sẽn ya y yamba yĩnga, Soaala, m sẽn ya y yem-poaka biiga, y looda m wĩ." 
Psalms116:17 M na n kõ-y-la pẽgr maoongo la m na n pʋda y yʋʋre. 
Psalms116:18 M na n pidsa m sẽn kãab Soaala fãa buuda fãa gill taoore. 
Psalms116:19 Na n yɩ-la y sɩmannẽ Zerizalɛɛm tẽnsʋka! Wẽnd soog pẽgre! 
Psalms117:1 Y fãa gill pẽg Soaala, Adem biisa gilli kils-y-ba." 
Psalms117:2 Wẽnd sẽn pʋgd tõnd ne nonglem ninga zʋʋga tõnd sẽn tõe n tagse, la b kãabga na n pidsa zamaan ne zamaana. Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms118:1 D kils Soaala tɩ b pida ne sõmblem, la b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms118:2 A Israyɛl le yeel n paase: B nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye! 
Psalms118:3 A Aarõ rooga le yeele: B nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. 
Psalms118:4 Sẽn zoet-b Soaala le togse: B nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye! 
Psalms118:5 Tãb-biisa sẽn waa n gũbg maam, m boola Soaala la b leok-m lame, n fãag-ma." 
Psalms118:6 Soaala bee m poorẽ, rabeem sɛɛme. Bõe la ninsaal tõe n le maan-ma?" 
Psalms118:7 Soaala be-la m poorẽ n na n sõng-ma la m yĩgsda m bɛɛba. 
Psalms118:8 Teeg Wẽnd sãoo teeg ninsaala. 
Psalms118:9 Teeg Soaala sãoo teeg rĩm biisi. 
Psalms118:10 Bu-zẽmba gill da gũbg-m lame, la Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga, m sẽeg-b lame." 
Psalms118:11 B gũbg-m lame, n gũbg-ma, la Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga, m wes-b-la wa raado." 
Psalms118:12 B gũbg-m-la wa kãnenkãase la b wẽneg n kii wa gõaag-tuug bugum, Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga, m da pʋgd n pãbd-b lame." 
Psalms118:13 B tus-m lame n na n lubi la Soaala kok-m lame. 
Psalms118:14 Bãmb n kõ-m pãnga, bãmb n tãs m zabr tãsga. Bãmb yĩng la m maan raoodo." 
Psalms118:15 Nin-sõma rot pida ne sũ-noogo, b sẽn paam fãagra sũ-noogo, n gomda: «Soaala zẽka b ritgã n zabe la bãmb n tõoge." 
Psalms118:16 Wẽnd zẽka b nug rɩtgo la b rɩtg tʋma a tʋʋma.» 
Psalms118:17 Ayey! M kõn ki ye, m na n vɩɩndame la yaa Wẽnd tʋʋma la m na kilsi." 
Psalms118:18 Sɩbgre, Wẽnd sɩbg-m lame la b pa bas-m ne kũum ye." 
Psalms118:19 Nin-sõma sẽn tũud noor ning n tat yãmbã, pak-y no-kãnga tɩ m kẽ n kaas m Soaalã." 
Psalms118:20 Soaala roog noor pakame, bɩ nin-sõma wã loog n kẽ!" 
Psalms118:21 M pẽgd-y lame tɩ y leok-m lame la yãmb maasmẽ m maana raoodo. 
Psalms118:22 Kugr ninga tãn-metba sẽn da bas kɛɛngã kug kãng la b rɩk yã n wa ne rooga pãng la a neerem. 
Psalms118:23 Dẽ yaa Wẽnd tʋʋmde la yaa tʋʋmd bãnde. 
Psalms118:24 D pẽg raara Wẽnd sẽn kõ tõndã. A pids-du ne sũ-noog la langre. 
Psalms118:25 Soaala, sõng-y-d tɩ d tõog d bɛɛba. Sõng-y-d tɩ d maan daoodo!" 
Psalms118:26 Sẽn wat-a Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga paam pẽgre! Yaa Soaala roogẽ la d be n pẽgd-ba. 
Psalms118:27 Soaala yaa Wẽnde, bãmb n kõ-d vẽenem. D kaoog willi n zã d nugẽ n sɩng gilgri, d gilg n ta maan-kugra menga." 
Psalms118:28 Yãmb la m Wẽnde tɩ m kilsd-y. Yãmb la m Wẽnde tɩ m zẽkd y yʋʋre. 
Psalms118:29 D kils Soaala tɩ b pida ne sõmblem la b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye! 
Psalms119:1 Zu-noog soaba la nin-tɩrga sẽn deegd-a Soaala noore. 
Psalms119:2 Sẽn tũud-a b sẽn yalse, n sakd noora zãnga." 
Psalms119:3 Yẽ soab n vɩ wa Soaala sẽn date n ka maand wẽng ye. 
Psalms119:4 Soaala n yiis b noore la d tog n tũ-a-la neere. 
Psalms119:5 Sõng-y-m-tɩ m kẽn tɩrga, sõng-y-m tɩ m wɩng n tũ zãnga," 
Psalms119:6 woto m kõn kong m sẽn datã, m sã n modg n tũ-ba a yeyn-ye." 
Psalms119:7 M na pẽg-y ne m sũur fãa. M miime tɩ y sẽn yals fãa yaa sõmbo. 
Psalms119:8 M na modg n deeg y noorã, la bɩ yãmb me keng m daoodo." 
Psalms119:9 Bi-bɩɩg rat t'a kẽnd yɩ tɩrga bɩ a reeg Soaala noor. 
Psalms119:10 M data ne m sũur fãa n tũ y raabo, da bas-y-m tɩ m bʋdg ye." 
Psalms119:11 M sã n kẽnd n ka yĩmd y saglsã m kõn tol n beeg-y ye. 
Psalms119:12 Y barka, Soaala, tɩ y wilg-m-la y raabo." 
Psalms119:13 M zĩi n sõta m yamẽ y sẽn gɩdg bũmb ning fãa. 
Psalms119:14 Y noora reegr pids-m-la ne sũ-noogo, yaa arzɛk kẽeng la m paam yã." 
Psalms119:15 M na n zĩnd n bilga y raabo n tɩg sor ning y sẽn tuk m yĩnga. 
Psalms119:16 Y noora tũudem la m sũ-noogo, m kõn yĩm y gomda ye." 
Psalms119:17 Maan-y neer ne y yambã tɩ m le yik n tũ y sẽn togse. 
Psalms119:18 Ypk-y m nina tɩ m yãend neere, m yãend y noora sẽn pid ne bõn-sõma niynsã." 
Psalms119:19 M yaa sãan tẽng zug ka, da solg-y maam y noya ye." 
Psalms119:20 Bɩ m yam kẽ y sẽn yalsã la y sẽn yet tɩ m maan fãa. 
Psalms119:21 Y kãabda y sɩbgr tɩtaam dãmba la b fãa na n kẽe moogo. 
Psalms119:22 M sẽn tũud y noora zãngã bɩ y ra bas tɩ b wa la-ma la b sãbs-m ye. 
Psalms119:23 Rĩm biisa nong bɩ b yik n maan beem ne maam, Wẽnd sẽn yals bũmb ninga la m tũuda, b sẽn gɩdg bũmb ninga la m gɩdg m menga." 
Psalms119:24 Y noyã pʋs n noogda m sũuri, bãmb n sõngd-m tɩ m vɩ neere." 
Psalms119:25 M faoolame n gãe tomẽ wa-y n vʋʋg-y-ma wa y sẽn kãab-ma. 
Psalms119:26 M wilg-y-la m vɩɩma sẽn yɩ a soaba n dat leokre la y leok-m lame. Kell-y n wilg-y maam y raabo. 
Psalms119:27 Wilg-y maam y sẽn gɩdg bũmb kẽera võore, sõng-y tɩ m bilg fãa m yamẽ." 
Psalms119:28 M sũur sãamame tɩ m tar yãbre, keng-y m vɩɩma wa y sẽn kãabe." 
Psalms119:29 Zãag-y-m ne zirẽ-beedo, paalg-y maam y noora pʋgẽ." 
Psalms119:30 M deegame tɩ m tog n tũ-la y noya. M na tũ y sẽn yalse. 
Psalms119:31 M saka y sẽn date, Soaala, bɩ m da yãend paoogr ye." 
Psalms119:32 M tũuda y noya faasg-faasga, tɩ m yama tar yẽegre n dabda." 
Psalms119:33 Wilg-y maam y sẽn gɩdgã tɩ m gɩdg m menga la m vɩɩnde. 
Psalms119:34 Wilg-y maam y raaba neere tɩ m na pids-a ne m sũuri. 
Psalms119:35 Wilg-y maam y sẽn date, tɩ m nonga y sẽn nonge." 
Psalms119:36 Pa sẽn noom maama n so taoor ye, yaa sẽn noom yãmba la m sũura pʋgda." 
Psalms119:37 M da belg m meng n pʋg yell yaals ye, sõng-y tɩ m vɩɩnd y noora pʋga." 
Psalms119:38 Pids-y y kãabgo y yamba yĩnga, tɩ neba na rig y rabeem." 
Psalms119:39 Y sẽn yalsa noom-m lame, zãag-y-m bal ne bɛɛba tʋʋre." 
Psalms119:40 M sẽn nong y sẽn kõ-m noy-niynsã, bɩ m paam y sõmblema n tõog n vɩɩnde." 
Psalms119:41 Kõ-y maam y nonglem kõ-y maam y fãagrã wala y sẽn kãabe. 
Psalms119:42 M na tõog n leok sẽn tʋʋsd-b maama la m leokra na n tũu yãmb dẽnna. 
Psalms119:43 M noora ra yiis bũmb a to tɩ ka yãmb sẽn togs ye, tɩ m tara y kãabga saagre." 
Psalms119:44 M na n tũ y noorã n ka vʋʋs ye dũnna la beoogo. 
Psalms119:45 M na n kẽna faasg-faasga, tɩ m tũuda y sẽn wilgi." 
Psalms119:46 Dĩm dãmb taoore m na goma y noora sẽn gɩdge, la m kõn paam yãnd ye." 
Psalms119:47 Yãmb daaba maneg n pids-m-la ne sũ-noogo, sɩda m nong-y lame." 
Psalms119:48 M kokda y sẽn yiis noor ning fãa tɩ m yama kẽ-b la zãnga. 
Psalms119:49 Tẽeg-y y sẽn yeel y yambã, tɩ gomd kãng n wa ne m saagre." 
Psalms119:50 M sã n zĩ ne toogo, yaa yãmb nengẽ la m paamd belsgo, yãmb noya n le yãngd m vɩɩma." 
Psalms119:51 Wilg-m-meng rãmba yik n laada maam, la m yaool n ka bʋdg ye." 
Psalms119:52 M tẽra y sẽn yals al daar zãra la yãmb daaba pidsgu n wat ne m sũ-noogo. 
Psalms119:53 M sũur yikda nin-wẽnsa taoore, la yaa b sẽn bas y sorã." 
Psalms119:54 Yãmb noya n lebg m yɩɩl tɩ m zodgdẽ, m pa-weera tẽngẽ." 
Psalms119:55 Yʋngo m tẽegda y yelle, Soaala, m kotame n tũ y noya." 
Psalms119:56 Tʋʋmd a ye bal la m kõ m menga: yaa y noora reegre. 
Psalms119:57 M wilga yãmb m zu-noog pʋɩɩra sẽn yaa a soaba, ya m tũ y noora bala." 
Psalms119:58 M gũuda ne m sũur fãa tɩ y tees maam y nenga, m tẽed tɩ y na maan sugr wa y sẽn kãabã." 
Psalms119:59 M gesa m sẽn tũud sor ningã, m kõn sak n kẽn n zãag ne y noya ye." 
Psalms119:60 M kẽna ne yãgbo, m ka vʋʋs ye, la yaa y sora bala la m dɩk yã." 
Psalms119:61 Nin-wẽnsa yõk-m-la b bẽdgẽ la ad-y b pa tõog tɩ m yĩm y noora ye. 
Psalms119:62 Y sẽn yalsa yaa sõmbo tɩ m yikd ne yʋngo n pʋʋsd-y barka. 
Psalms119:63 M yõga zood ne neb niyns fãa sẽn zoet b yãmbã, n deegd y noya." 
Psalms119:64 Dũni wã gill pida ne y nonglma kaseto, wilg-y maam y raabo." 
Psalms119:65 M sũ-nooga sɩd yi-la y nengẽ wala y sẽn da kãab-ma, Soaala." 
Psalms119:66 Wilg-y maam tɩ m bãng y sẽn yalsã n maneg n pẽge. 
Psalms119:67 M sẽn waa n nan ka wʋm toogo m da bʋta moogo, marsã ya y sora bal la m tũuda." 
Psalms119:68 Soaala pida ne nonglem n maand-m neere, wilg-y maam y noya." 
Psalms119:69 Wilg-m-meng rãmb n yiki n sãam m yʋʋr ne b rõadga, m yaool n tũuda sora ne m sũur fãa." 
Psalms119:70 Nin-wẽnsa sũur gũsa wa kaam; sã n ya maam, y raaba pidsgu n wat ne m sũ-noogo." 
Psalms119:71 M sẽn dɩ tooga waa ne m nafre, tɩ m zĩnd n vɛɛsa y noorã." 
Psalms119:72 Sagls niyns y sẽn yiis y noorẽ wã, m pẽgd-b lame n yɩɩd sãnem la wanzurfu." 
Psalms119:73 Yãmb nusã n yag maam n zĩndgi. Kõ-y-m yam tɩ m zãms y sẽn dat ne maam. 
Psalms119:74 Sẽn zoet-b yãmba sã n yãend maam b sũur yaa noogo; b neeme tɩ ya yãmb bal la m teeg yã. 
Psalms119:75 M deegame, Soaala, tɩ y sẽn yalsa yaa sõmbo, y talla bʋʋm y sẽn waa n bas tɩ bɛɛba laad-m." 
Psalms119:76 Bɩ y pʋlenga sẽn ka vaanda bʋk m sũuri, tɩ boto la y rat m yĩnga." 
Psalms119:77 Bɩ y kũm m nimbãanega la y sõng tɩ y noora paalg-ma vɩɩm sõnga so-raoogẽ. 
Psalms119:78 Bɩ sẽn dõd-b maam zirẽ-beeda loog ne yãnde, Soaala nee m sẽn bʋgsd b noora seem ninga." 
Psalms119:79 Sẽn zoet-b yãmba lɛɛg n wa m nengẽ tɩ m zãms-b yãmb daabã. 
Psalms119:80 Mam me na modg n deeg y noya neere n da wa paam yãnd ye. 
Psalms119:81 M zĩndame n kaoos n gũud y fãagre, ad-y m da saagda y kãabgã." 
Psalms119:82 M nina waa n yiigdame tɩ m ket n vɛɛsd y noya. Dẽ me la m sokda: «Y na n wa bʋka m sũur da-bʋre?» 
Psalms119:83 M waa n lebga wa ko-waoog sẽn kʋɩ n weglme, ne rẽ fãa m pa yĩm y noya ye." 
Psalms119:84 Ya rasma a wãn yɛs la m na n le gũ? Da-bʋr la y na n yik n wɩbg m bɛɛbã? 
Psalms119:85 Wilg-m-meng rãmb n kɩɩs y noorã n yik n bẽd b bẽdgo. 
Psalms119:86 Y noya fãa pid n daanda ne nonglem. Sõng-y-ma tɩ neb n pʋgd-m ne raab wẽnga. 
Psalms119:87 M yɛɛ zãnga, b lub-m lame la bala, la m ka zãgs y sora tũudem ye." 
Psalms119:88 Y nonglma sẽn ka be sɛɛba yĩnga, wa-y n vʋʋg-y-ma tɩ m na tũ y noor sẽn togse." 
Psalms119:89 Soaala, y noora la m wĩndga t'a zao yĩngri n vẽnegd-m." 
Psalms119:90 Y nonglma pʋgd-d-la zamaan ne zamaana; wala y sẽn vigl tẽngã, y nonglma me vigla boto." 
Psalms119:91 Bũmb fãa yɛsa a zĩigẽ wa y sẽn tʋlge; dũni wã yaa yãmb sõgne. 
Psalms119:92 Y noora sã n da ka pids-m ne sũ-noogo, pɛt n da na n kʋẽ maam." 
Psalms119:93 M kõn yĩm y noya abada tɩ bãmb n tong m yõore. 
Psalms119:94 M yaa yãmb soolem, fãag-y-ma, y sora la m bao yã." 
Psalms119:95 Nin-wẽnsa tẽeme tɩ b na n kẽes-m-la moogo, m tara gũusgu ne y sẽn wilgi." 
Psalms119:96 M yãee bõn-sõng fãa ne a sõmblem tɛka, yãmb noora sõmblem tɛk bal la m pa yãende tɩ yẽ la a sõmblem ka tar tɛka." 
Psalms119:97 Ad-y m nonga y noora wʋsgo, m bilgd-a-la m yamẽ beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms119:98 Y noora la m paoong wa fãa fãa, tɩ m pẽgda, a kõ-m-la yam n yɩɩg m bɛɛba." 
Psalms119:99 M yama zulgame n yɩɩd m karen-saam-dãmba, la rẽ yaa m sẽn zĩnd n bʋgs y noorã m yamẽ." 
Psalms119:100 M mii yɛla welgre n yɩɩd nin-kẽemsã tɩ m deega y noya fãa. 
Psalms119:101 M pa saag n dɩk wẽng sor ba a ye, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n tũ y raabo." 
Psalms119:102 M pa zãgs y sẽn yalsa ye, tɩ yãmb n yɩ m karen-saamba." 
Psalms119:103 Y noya nooma m noorẽ, a noomame n yɩɩd sɩɩdo." 
Psalms119:104 Y gomda yĩnga m tara yell ne a võore, la m kisa zirẽ-beeda soya." 
Psalms119:105 Y gomda yaa vẽenem m nao-kẽndr yĩnga, a yaa vẽenem sẽn vẽnegd m sore." 
Psalms119:106 M wẽename la m kõn lebs m noor ye, tɩ m na n tũ-la y sẽn wilg ne y zemsgo." 
Psalms119:107 M pãnga sɛɛ zãnga, Soaala, bɩ y gomda le wa vʋʋg-ma." 
Psalms119:108 Reeg-y yã, Soaala, m pʋʋsgo, wilg-y maam y sẽn date." 
Psalms119:109 Da tõe n tũla m yõor yãkre la ne rẽ fãa m pa bas y sora tũudem ye. 
Psalms119:110 Nin-wẽns n bẽd b bẽdgo, b pa yõk-ma tɩ m pa zãag ne y sora ye." 
Psalms119:111 Y noya sẽn kõ-m bãngr ninga la m buud pʋɩɩre. M sũur yaa noogo. 
Psalms119:112 M modgdame n na n deeg y noore. Be la m dolb na n yi. 
Psalms119:113 M pa rat n be zĩis a yi wa kazukemd ye, y noora bal la m nonga." 
Psalms119:114 Yãmb la m soondg zĩiga la m gãongo, m saagda y kãabgã." 
Psalms119:115 Nin-wẽnse, da pʋg-y-m ye, yaa m Wẽnda noor la m dat n tũ." 
Psalms119:116 Wala y sẽn yiis y noorẽ, Soaala, yɩɩ-y m teegda tɩ m na vɩɩnde. M da gũ sõngrã n kong ye." 
Psalms119:117 Teel-y-ma tɩ m na põse la m kõn yĩm y saglsa ye. 
Psalms119:118 Yãmb basa sẽn da bʋdg-ba n kẽed moogã, tɩ b manesma fãa ra yaa tuud taaba." 
Psalms119:119 Noora nonglem n be yõodo, la nin-wẽnsa sẽn ka nong-a wã, Wẽnd lobda bãmba wa boaag pʋgẽ sagdo." 
Psalms119:120 M sã n be yãmb taoore m yĩnga rigda rabeem, m yɛɛsda y sẽn yalsã." 
Psalms119:121 M vɩɩma tũu zemsg so-tɩrga. Da bas-y-ma m bɛɛba nusẽ ye. 
Psalms119:122 M maanda saagr tɩ m na yãend sũ-noogo, tɩ wilg-m-meng rãmba kõn wõd-m ye." 
Psalms119:123 M yiiga m nin n gũ y fãagre, la sõmblem sore m sẽn na n dɩke." 
Psalms119:124 Maan-y ne y yamba wala y nonglma sẽn sede, zãms-y maam y raabã." 
Psalms119:125 M ya-la y yamba, puk-y m yama zãnga tɩ m na bãng y noya gilli." 
Psalms119:126 Soaala, y yaa n tog n maana bũmbu tɩ neba tõdga y noorã." 
Psalms119:127 Bãng-y tɩ m nonga y noorã, m nong-a lame n yɩɩd sãnem sẽn yɩlge." 
Psalms119:128 M deegame tɩ fãa zemsa noora pʋgẽ la m kisa zirẽ-beeda soya. 
Psalms119:129 Y sẽn yalsa yaa sõmbo, dẽ me la m tũud bãmba." 
Psalms119:130 Sẽn wʋm-a y sẽn togsa fãa paamda vẽnegre, yam bõonesa rãmb fãa yam wekdame." 
Psalms119:131 M yaaga m noor n gũud n na vel-ba tɩ m nong-b-la fãa. 
Psalms119:132 Wẽnemd-y n tees-ma la y maan m sugri, tɩ woto la y maand ne sẽn nong-b yãmb yʋʋrã." 
Psalms119:133 Y gomda wa paas m karsa keglem, da bas-y tɩ wẽng buud tõog-m ye." 
Psalms119:134 Fãag-y-m ne ninsaalba wẽoogre, tɩ m na reeg y noya." 
Psalms119:135 Bɩ y yamba paam tɩ y nenga vẽenem tʋʋs-a, tɩ m tũ rẽ n bãng y raabã." 
Psalms119:136 Ad-y m nintãm dʋʋgdame m sẽn ne tɩ b pa tũud y noorã. 
Psalms119:137 Soaala, yãmb pida ne zemsgo, la y sẽn yet tɩ b maan fãa yaa sõmbo." 
Psalms119:138 Y kõ-d-la noore la y tũ-la y sõmblema la y kãabga sẽn ka vaandã. 
Psalms119:139 M sũura puuda wʋsgo m sã n ne tɩ m bɛɛba yĩmda y saglsã. 
Psalms119:140 Bũmb ka kalem y noorã n pa zems ye, la yaa rẽ me la y yamba nong-a." 
Psalms119:141 Ba m sẽn waa n ka pãnga tɩ b pa nand-ma, m ka yĩm y noya reegr ye." 
Psalms119:142 Y sẽn yals bũmb ningã, y yals-a-la daar fãa yĩnga la y noora tũuda sɩda." 
Psalms119:143 M sega yɩɩre la sũ-beedo, la y noora pids-m-la ne sũ-noogo." 
Psalms119:144 Y tũ-la y sõmblema sẽn ka teemna n na n gome bɩ y puk m yama zãnga tɩ m na vɩɩnde. 
Psalms119:145 M bool-y-la ne m pãng fãa, Soaala, leok-y-ma! M na maan y sẽn date." 
Psalms119:146 M bool-y lame, fãag-y-ma, m na tũ y noorã." 
Psalms119:147 M bool-y-la tõd-beoogo tɩ m saagda y kãabgã. 
Psalms119:148 M nekame tɩ beoog nan ka vẽeg ye, la yaa sẽn na tõog n bʋgs y goama." 
Psalms119:149 Tũ-y y nonglma n kelg m koɛɛga, sõng-y tɩ m vɩɩnd wa y sẽn yalsã." 
Psalms119:150 Ad-y b watame, neb niyns sẽn namsd m vɩɩma la sẽn kẽnd n zãagd ne yãmb noorã." 
Psalms119:151 Yãmb yẽ pẽeme, Soaala, la y sẽn wilga fãa yaa sɩd bala." 
Psalms119:152 M mii al daar zãra tɩ y sẽn yals y noya yaa yʋʋm sẽn ka be sɛɛb yĩnga. 
Psalms119:153 Ges-y m pɛta, fãag-y-ma, ad-y m pa yĩm y noora ye." 
Psalms119:154 Bʋ-y m bʋʋdã n kõ-ma, Gom-y n le nek m vɩɩma." 
Psalms119:155 Nin-wẽnsa zãr ne fãagre, tɩ b pa bao n na n pids y raaba ye." 
Psalms119:156 Soaala, y nimbãan-zoeera labsa, wa-y n vʋʋg-y-ma tɩ rẽ la y kãab-m." 
Psalms119:157 Ad-y m bɛɛba waooga, sẽn tar-b maam n namsdẽ wã labsa, ne rẽ fãa, m pa bʋdg sor ye." 
Psalms119:158 M yãenda zirẽ-be-rãmba la m sũur puugame tɩ b pa tũ y noora ye. 
Psalms119:159 Ges-y m sẽn nong y noya to-to sõng-y tɩ m vɩɩnd wala y sẽn kãab-m. 
Psalms119:160 Y gomd fãa tʋɩ-la a gãag, sɩd zugu; y sẽn yals yaa daar buud fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms119:161 Rĩm biisi n yik n namsd-m tɩ m ka wʋmd a võor ye. B bãng tɩ m sẽn zoet yaa yãmb bala. 
Psalms119:162 Wala ned sẽn paam laog n wʋk t'a sũur ya noogo, woto la y noora noogd m sũuri." 
Psalms119:163 M sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa ya zirẽ-beedo, m sẽn nong yaa y noorã." 
Psalms119:164 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, m pẽg-y-la naoor a yopoe, y noy-sõma wã yĩnga." 
Psalms119:165 Sẽn nong-b yãmb noora zĩi ne laafi, gɩdgr ka le ket b yĩng ye." 
Psalms119:166 Soaala, yaa yãmb nengẽ la m gũ m fãagre. M tũ-la y noya fãa." 
Psalms119:167 M deega y saglsã, m sɩd nong-b lame." 
Psalms119:168 M maana y sẽn date, m zãgsa y sẽn kisi, m sẽn tũ soy niynsa fãa rɩga y taoore." 
Psalms119:169 Bɩ m kɛlenga sãd n ta yãmba, Soaala wek-y m yama n kõ-ma wa y sẽn kãabe." 
Psalms119:170 Bɩ m kosga lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ fãag-y-ma wala y sẽn kãabe. 
Psalms119:171 Bɩ m nora sɩng y kilsgu tɩ yãmb la m karen-saamba. 
Psalms119:172 Bɩ m zelemda yɩɩl y noya tɩ y noya fãa wata ne sõmblem. 
Psalms119:173 Bɩ y rɩtga wa sõng-ma, yaa y noora la m dat n tũ." 
Psalms119:174 Yaa yãmb fãagra la m bõsda, Soaala, y noora noogda m sũuri." 
Psalms119:175 Sõng-y tɩ m vɩɩnd y pẽgra yĩnga, Sõng-y-m ne y noya reegre." 
Psalms119:176 M saada zĩis fãa wa pe-yãang sẽn meneme, bao-y y yamba t'a ka yĩm y noora ye." 
Psalms120:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. M sẽn waa n ka mi m sẽn lebdẽ, m boola Soaala la b leok-m lame. M da yeel-b-la woto:" 
Psalms120:2 «Fãag-y maam ne zirẽ-be-neba, fãag-y maam ne zelem goalma.»" 
Psalms120:3 Sɩbgr bʋg la y tog ne, noor kõn-togs-sɩd dãmba?" 
Psalms120:4 M na n tool-y-la zabr pɛɛm, pɛɛm sẽn kud noɛɛk bug-saalẽ." 
Psalms120:5 M zĩi ne bʋk sẽn pid bʋko tɩ m kong n tɩ tii m zaka nin-toos sʋka neb sẽn ka yãe wubr sʋka. 
Psalms120:6 M kaoosa tẽng zug tɩ looge, ne neb sẽn kis laafi." 
Psalms120:7 Mam nengẽ yaa laafi bal la m baooda, la yaa zabra bal la bãmb pʋgda." 
Psalms121:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. M teesa tãmsã n getẽ: sãnd m fãagra kõn yi be sẽnẽ," 
Psalms121:2 sãnd Soaala, yĩngr la tẽng Naanda, kõn tall-a n wa kõ-ma." 
Psalms121:3 Bɩ m gũuda ra suus ye, b ra bas tɩ salg koomd m naoor ye." 
Psalms121:4 Ayo, a Israyɛl gũuda pa suusdi, a pa gõe ye!" 
Psalms121:5 Soaala na n pa-la f sɛɛgẽ n gũ-fu, n zĩndig foom b rɩtgo, bãmb maasmẽ." 
Psalms121:6 Wĩntoogo, wĩndg kõ zab-f ye, la kiuug me kõn tak yell f zug, yʋng ye." 
Psalms121:7 Soaala na n wogla f yõore, b na n zãag-f-la ne wẽng buud fãa." 
Psalms121:8 Bãmb n na n gũ f yiib la f kõom, marsã la wakat buud fãa." 
Psalms122:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Gilgra kẽn yɩɩla. M sũur kiuusa ne sũ-noogo b sẽn waa n yeel-ma: «D kẽng Soaala zakẽ!» 
Psalms122:2 D yaa n paam n ta-la f tẽn-peelmẽ, Zerizalɛɛm." 
Psalms122:3 Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga meeb be neere, b zẽka a lalsã n gilgi." 
Psalms122:4 Yaa Zerizalɛɛm la Israyɛl kamb wata yaa be la Wẽnd kamba kẽeda. B wata wa noora sẽn yals buuda yĩnga, n na n pẽg b Soaala." 
Psalms122:5 Yaa Zerizalɛɛm la a Daviid vigl a naam zaoore, be la a biiga zĩ n kaood bʋʋdo." 
Psalms122:6 Kos-y laafi Zerizalɛɛm yĩnga! Bɩ sẽn nong-b Zerizalɛɛm vɩɩnd a pʋgẽ ne laafi. 
Psalms122:7 Bɩ laafi zĩnd a pʋgẽ, n zĩnd a ro-neeba pʋsẽ." 
Psalms122:8 Laafi la m kot f yĩnga, Zerizalɛɛm. M saam-biisi la m tũud-n-taasa yĩnga," 
Psalms122:9 Soaala tõnd Wẽnda rooga yĩnga, yaa laafi bal la m kot f yĩnga, Zerizalɛɛm!" 
Psalms123:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Y naama zaoor vigla yĩngri, Soaala, dẽ la m zẽk m neng n tees yãmba." 
Psalms123:2 Wala yem-daoog sẽn get a zu-soaba, wala yem-poak sẽn get a roog-ma, woto me la m doog m neng n get yãmba, la yaa y sõngra la d gũuda, d Soaala la d Wẽnde." 
Psalms123:3 D tar y sɛɛga, Soaala, d tar y sɛɛga! D ya n yɛɛ ne d bɛɛba sẽoosgo." 
Psalms123:4 D yɛɛ zãnga, d tɩg-b-la fas. Bɛɛba zut na wuk ne yãnde, b tɩtaama na sig zãnga." 
Psalms124:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Sã n ka Soaala b ye tãa ãnda n da sõngd tõndo a Israyɛl n gomd woto," 
Psalms124:2 Sã n ka Soaala b ye tãa ãnda n da sõngd tõndo neba sẽn da waa n yik ne tõndã? 
Psalms124:3 Ad-y b sũura sẽn da fudg fudgr ning ne tõndã, ad-y b velẽ-la tõnd vɩɩse." 
Psalms124:4 Ko-wiig n loogẽ ne tõndo, kʋɩl-bɛɛg n dɩẽ tõndo." 
Psalms124:5 Ko-fõtma loogẽ la ne tõndo. 
Psalms124:6 Bɩ Wẽnd paam barka tɩ b pa sak tɩ d lebg d bɛɛb rɩɩb ye. 
Psalms124:7 D paam n fãaga wa luiil sẽn fãag bẽdgẽ. Bẽdga wĩir kaoogame tɩ tõnd paam n põse. 
Psalms124:8 Tõnd sõangda yaa Wẽnnaam, bãmb la yĩngr la tẽng naanda." 
Psalms125:1 Gilgr kẽna yɩɩla. Neb niyns sẽn teeg-b Wẽnde wẽnda Siõ tãnga sẽn yɛs a zĩ yɛng ne keglem, la daar buud fãa yĩnga." 
Psalms125:2 Tãms n gũbg Zerizalɛɛm, Soaala me gũbga b kamba la rẽ yaa sɩd rũnna la beoogo." 
Psalms125:3 Na-yook kõn dɩ naam be lɛlɛ, a kõn dɩ naam Wẽnd kamba zug ye, n wa zãms a soolma kamb wẽng ye." 
Psalms125:4 Soaala, wilg-y y nonglma ne neb niyns sẽn ya-b sõma la sẽn kẽnd-b tɩrga." 
Psalms125:5 Sẽn tũud-b so-wẽnse la sẽn baood-b taab bõne, pĩng-y-ba n yiisi, Soaala. Kõ-y y buud a Israyɛl laafi!" 
Psalms126:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Bũmb sẽn wẽneg zãmsdo d yĩnga, yɩɩ Soaala sẽn lɛɛg n wa Siõ ne pa-wetã." 
Psalms126:2 Da lebga sũ-noog la laad bala. Bu-zẽmba mens ra gomdame: «Ad Wẽnd maan-b-la neer wʋsgo!» 
Psalms126:3 Wẽnd sɩd maan-d-la neer wʋsgo, la d da pida ne sũ-noogo." 
Psalms126:4 Soaala, le tek-y d vɩɩma yɛs n kõ-do, a le pid vugr bala wala Negɛb kʋɩlse." 
Psalms126:5 Sẽn da bʋt-a la a yãbd-a kẽebdame la a laadẽ. 
Psalms126:6 A ra yita ne bõn-buudu n kẽnd la a yãbda. Ad-a sẽn lebg n wat ne kals paala t'a sũur tosd kaam. 
Psalms127:1 A Salomo yɩɩlle. Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Soaala sã n ka sɩng rooga meebo, metba na n namsa b mense. Soaala sã n ka gũud tẽngã, gũuba yaa zaalem." 
Psalms127:2 Yik pĩnd me yaa zaalem, kʋʋg f gõeem me yaa zaalem, gõe n pa nekdẽ me yaa zaalem, rɩ rɩɩb sẽn ya naong rɩɩb me ka yõod ye. Wẽnd zoa paamda sõngr yɛnga, a gõe bɩ a nek yã." 
Psalms127:3 Zak yõod la kamba la Wẽnd dolba la rẽ. 
Psalms127:4 Wa tãb-biig sũur sẽn ya noogo a sã n zãad pɛɛma, roagd sũur me nooma boto a sã n ne a sɛɛgẽ kamb niyns a sẽn dog a bi-bɩɩlmẽ." 
Psalms127:5 Sẽn paama pɛɛm n pids a loko la zu-noog soaba, tẽnga noorẽ bʋ-kaoodba kõn ning a yãnde a bʋʋd-n-taasa taoor ye." 
Psalms128:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Zu-noog rãmba la sẽn zoet-b Soaala n tũud b sora neere. 
Psalms128:2 Fo sã n dɩt f tʋʋmda yõodo, zu-noog soaba la foom, sũ-noog soab la foom!" 
Psalms128:3 F pag wẽnda bugsuntung womdga f sẽn sel f zak pʋga. F kamba wẽnda oliviye tɩ poala sẽn tão n gũbg-fu. 
Psalms128:4 Yaa woto la Wẽnd barka sigd ned ning fãa sẽn ya-a wẽn-tũuda. 
Psalms128:5 Bɩ Soaala zĩnd Siõ do-sõngã n sik b barka, tɩ f paam n yãend Zerizalɛɛm ne a neerma f vɩɩma pʋgẽ, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa." 
Psalms128:6 Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f yãend f yagense! Wẽnd na zĩndga a Israyɛl ne laafi! 
Psalms129:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. A Israyɛl tõr tõe n kõo kaseto tɩ al m yãadmẽ, neba yika ne maam." 
Psalms129:2 Sɩda al m yãadmẽ, b yika ne ma, la b pa tek bũmb m nengẽ ye." 
Psalms129:3 Wala koaad pʋʋg sẽn bẽes to-to, b bẽesa m poorã. Bẽesga rɩga wogd-wogdo." 
Psalms129:4 Soaala pida ne zemsgo, woto m tõog n kao bɛɛba gada." 
Psalms129:5 Bɩ Siõ bɛɛba fãa dɩ yãnde, bɩ b fãa tar n leb poorẽ." 
Psalms129:6 B wẽneg bɛoong zug moodo, n pa yãee n bɩ n wẽneg n sʋʋge." 
Psalms129:7 Sẽn dʋ-a a roogã n na n wʋr-a kõn pids a nug ye, ka tigsdi n paam kalg ye." 
Psalms129:8 Ka wʋrd n paam tɩ b yeele: «Wẽnd ning-y-la barka sõmbo!» Sã n ya tõndo d kotame tɩ Soaala bark sig-y. 
Psalms130:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. M zĩnda al tẽngr-tẽngre n bool yã, Soaala." 
Psalms130:2 Kelg-y m sẽn dat bũmb ningã la y reeg m kosgo. 
Psalms130:3 Yãmb sã n tẽegd beegrã, ãnda n na n põse?" 
Psalms130:4 Sugra bee y nengẽ, tɩ fãagr bee y nugẽ." 
Psalms130:5 Soaala, m gũud-y-la ne m sũur fãa, m gũuda y leokre." 
Psalms130:6 M gũuda y sõngra ne yãgbo, wala zag gũud sẽn gũud beoog vẽegre. M yãgba yɩɩda yẽnd dẽnna." 
Psalms130:7 Bɩ Israyɛl teeg Wẽnd tɩ b yaa nin-noanga la b tara rabaar buud fãa n na n fãag-do. 
Psalms130:8 Yaa Soaalã n pekd a Israyɛl ne a rẽgda fãa. 
Psalms131:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Soaala, m ka mi zẽk-m-meng ye, m pa baood sẽn yɩɩd-m ye, m pa baood m yʋʋr kilsgu, m pa baood sẽn zãr ne m ye." 
Psalms131:2 M yõka m sũura tʋlsem n yɛs m zĩ-yɛng, sɩɩ, wa bi-pɛɛlga a ma naoẽ, sẽn ka rat bũmb a to ye." 
Psalms131:3 A Israyɛl teega Soaalã, rũnda la beoogo." 
Psalms132:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Soaala, bɩ y tẽeg a Daviid yelle la a namsga sẽn yɩ a soaba." 
Psalms132:2 Yẽnda n pʋlem Wẽnde, n pʋlem a Zakoob Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba woto:" 
Psalms132:3 «M kõn saag n kẽ m doogẽ, m kõn dʋ m gãag zugu," 
Psalms132:4 m kõn mum m nin ba bilfu, m kõn zuk gõeem," 
Psalms132:5 tɩ m ka reng n paam doogo m Soaala yĩng ye, a Zakoob Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba yĩng ye." 
Psalms132:6 D waa n wʋmame tɩ b gomda tɩ zooda kaseta paa Efrata, la Yaar sẽnẽ la d waa n yãend-a." 
Psalms132:7 D kẽ d Soaala roogẽ, d kolg b zaoorã n sulg d menga." 
Psalms132:8 Yik-y yã, Soaala, wa-y n kẽ y vʋʋsg zĩigẽ, yãmb ne kuga walsa koglgo, koglg kãng zug la y zaoolg y pãngã." 
Psalms132:9 Bɩ y fãagra yãag maan-kʋʋdba, b sẽn wat n kolgd maan-kugra ne b fu-neebã, bɩ y ning sũ-noog kaasgo y kamba noorẽ." 
Psalms132:10 Y sõgna a Daviid yĩnga, da bas-y kɛɛnga dĩm ning y sẽn kõ naama ye.»" 
Psalms132:11 Wẽnd kãaba a Daviid noogo la b kõn lebs b zelemd ye: «Yaa f biig a ye la m na n yãke, t'a wa ledg-foom f zaoorẽ." 
Psalms132:12 A sã n kell n pids zooda sẽn yalsã, a sã n tũ m noorã, yaa yẽ meng biiga n na n dɩ naam a zaoorẽ zamaan woo zamaana.»" 
Psalms132:13 Yaa Siõ tãnga la Soaala yãk yã. Be la b tʋlg n me b roogo, n yeele:" 
Psalms132:14 «Kaalẽ n na n yɩ m vʋʋsg zĩig daar fãa, Yaa kaalẽ la m tʋlg n me m zaka." 
Psalms132:15 M na n maana Siõ neere, m na kõ-a tɩ seke, a naong rãmba na rɩ b sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa." 
Psalms132:16 Yeelg-y maan-kʋʋdba ne manegr pãnga, la ning-y sũ-noog kaasg y kamba noorẽ." 
Psalms132:17 Dĩm sẽn tar pãng la m na n yiis Siõ, A Daviid buudẽ la m na n yiis-a. M sẽn kõ a soab naama la m na n zaoolg a zaoorẽ, wa fitil sẽn zaoolgd a widb zĩigẽ." 
Psalms132:18 M na n bao fuug sẽn pa lut yãnde n yeelg bɛɛbã, n yaool fũgneg dĩma sãnem pugla.»" 
Psalms133:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle, Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Ad-y zĩnd ne taab wa ba-biisi dẽ la bõn-sõng la bõn-noogo!" 
Psalms133:2 Yaa wa yũ-noog kaam sẽn pʋdgd zugu tɩ lɛɛg n sigd toɛɛnga, n lɛɛg n sigd a Aarõ toɛɛnga, n lɛɛg n mat a fuug loore." 
Psalms133:3 Yaa wala meenem sẽn dʋʋgd Ermo tãnga meenem sẽn lɛɛg n sigd Siõ tãnga. Be la Soaala ningd barka, be la vɩɩma ka tar sɛɛbo!" 
Psalms134:1 Gilgra kẽna yɩɩla. Kils-y Soaala yãmb fãa gilli, yãmb fãa sẽn tʋmd-b b sɛɛgẽ, yãmb fãa sẽn tʋmd-b b roogẽ, zĩig sã n sobge." 
Psalms134:2 Zẽk-y y nus n tees b ro-sõngã la y tar bark pʋʋsgo. 
Psalms134:3 Bɩ Soaala sẽn naan yĩngr la tẽnga zĩnd Siõ tãnga zugu n sik b barkã f yĩnga. 
Psalms135:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Pẽg-y Soaala yʋʋre! Yãmb fãa sẽn tʋmd b zakẽ," 
Psalms135:2 yãmb fãa sẽn kẽed b ro-sõngẽ, yãmb fãa sẽn yɛs b sɩmannẽ." 
Psalms135:3 Pẽg-y Soaala! B yaa nin-noanga kils-y b yʋʋre, bãmb la d zoodo." 
Psalms135:4 Soaala n tũus a Zakoob, a Israyɛl la b reeg n kõ b menga." 
Psalms135:5 N-ye! M miime tɩ Soaala yaa nin-kãsenga, tõnd Wẽnda n yɩɩd sẽn keta fãa." 
Psalms135:6 B maana b sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa, yĩngri, saasẽ wala tẽng zug ka, mogra ne a bog zulunga, bãmb n naana." 
Psalms135:7 Bãmb n zẽkd sawat tɩ b kuiis yĩngri, bãmb n tãsd n sik saaga, bãmb n kõt sobgã a pãnga." 
Psalms135:8 Soaala zẽka b nug Ezipt tẽnga, t'a kom-dẽemsa na n loog zãnga, rũmsa kamba wala rĩm biisi." 
Psalms135:9 B sẽn tʋm b rãmba me nus zĩnda pãnga; t'a Moyiiz na n pids Ezipt ne bõn-bãna, t'a Aarõ na n pids-a ne yɛl soalma; tɩ b na n lub dĩma ne a poorẽ dãmba." 
Psalms135:10 B tõoga bu-zẽmb ka tɛka, n kʋ dĩm dãmb sẽn da tar pãnga," 
Psalms135:11 yɩ-la a Siyõ, Amoritsa dĩma, n le paas a Og, Bazã dĩma la Kanaã tẽng dĩm dãmba." 
Psalms135:12 Bãmb tẽnsa la b reeg n kõ a Israyɛl, t'a Israyɛl lebga bãmb pʋɩɩre." 
Psalms135:13 Soaala, b na n kilsa y yʋʋrã; b na n tẽega y yell zamaan woo zamaana." 
Psalms135:14 Wẽnd n pukd b buuda sõmblem, bãmb n kogend neb niyns sẽn waoogd-b bãmbã." 
Psalms135:15 Bu-zẽmba wẽn-naandsa, sẽn dõog ne wanzurf bɩ sãnema, yaa ninsaal nug tʋʋmde." 
Psalms135:16 B tar noor me, b pa gomd ye, b tar nin me b pa ne fɩ," 
Psalms135:17 B tara tʋba la b pa wʋmd ye, pemsem buud ka yit b noorẽ ye." 
Psalms135:18 Bɩ sẽn naan-b bãmba wẽneg-ba, la sẽn teeg-b bãmba me boto." 
Psalms135:19 Yãmba, Israyɛl kamba, pʋʋs-y Wẽnd barka; yãmba, a Aarõ yagense, pʋʋs-y Wẽnnaam barka." 
Psalms135:20 Yãmba, Levitsa buudu pʋʋs-y Wẽnd barka. Yãmb fãa, Wẽnd kẽed-paalsã, pʋʋs-y Wẽnd barka." 
Psalms135:21 Bɩ Zerizalɛɛm sẽn zao Siõ tãnga kaas a barka pʋʋsg tɩ kul yĩngri. Wẽnd soog pẽgre! 
Psalms136:1 Pẽg-y Soaala tɩ b yaa nin-noanga la b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. 
Psalms136:2 D pẽg Wẽnd sẽn ka be taare tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. 
Psalms136:3 D pẽg bũmb fãa Soaala, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:4 Bãmb bala n yiisd bõn-bãna, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:5 Bãmb la yam bedr soab sẽn naana yĩngr teedã, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:6 Bãmb n kɩʋʋlem tẽngã n kõ-a yako, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:7 Bãmb n yals bug-bɛda yĩngri, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:8 Wĩndg la bug bedra rɩt a naam, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:9 Tɩ kiuug la ãds so yʋngo, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:10 Bãmb n loog ne Ezipt kom-dẽemsa vɩɩm, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:11 Bãmb n sɛɛs a Israyɛl yembdo, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:12 B nuga tʋma pãng la raoodo, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:13 Bãmb n pasg Rudma mogre tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. 
Psalms136:14 La a Israyɛl looga nao koɛɛnga, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:15 Mog-kãng n yaool n lɛɛg dɩ Ezipt tãb-biisi, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:16 Bãmb n yãag b buuda we-raoogẽ, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:17 Bãmb n lub a Israyɛl zabd-n-taasã, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:18 B luba dĩm dãmb sẽn tar pãense, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:19 Yaa Amonitsa rĩm a Siyõ, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:20 Yaa Bazã dĩm a Og, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:21 B reega rĩm kãens soolem n kõ b kamba, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:22 B reeg-b lame n kõ b sõgen, a Israyɛl, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:23 Tõnd pɛta pʋgẽ b tẽega d yelle, tɩ nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:24 B fãag-d-la bɛɛba nusẽ, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:25 B kõta rɩ-rɩt fãa a rɩɩbo, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye." 
Psalms136:26 Yĩngr Wẽnda soog barka, tɩ b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye!" 
Psalms137:1 Babilon kʋɩlsa noor la d da zĩi n tar yãbre, d da gomdame la d tẽegd Siõ yelle." 
Psalms137:2 D da baoo kooma noor tɩɩse n yagl d koala. 
Psalms137:3 Ad-y sẽn da kẽes-b tõnd yembdã, sẽn da namsd-b tõndã saag n kosa yɩɩla. B saag n kosa sũ-noog yɩɩla, n yetẽ: «Yɩɩl-y Siõ yɩɩl tɩ d kelge!»" 
Psalms137:4 D maanda wãna n pʋd yɩɩlle n pẽg Soaala n yaool n be pa-weere? 
Psalms137:5 M sã n yĩm f yelle, Zerizalɛɛm, bɩ m rɩtg lebg nug-kɩɩnga!" 
Psalms137:6 M sã n yĩm f yelle, Zerizalɛɛm, fo yell tẽegr sã n ka le ya m sũ-noog menga, bɩ m zelemd tabend m dasendaka!" 
Psalms137:7 Tẽeg-y Edom kamba yelle, Soaala, tẽeg-y b sẽn yeel Zerizalɛɛm lʋɩɩsa raare: «Kõog-y tẽnga zãnga!»" 
Psalms137:8 Ade Babilon, fo na n lebga raboogo. Fo tʋma tõnd beedo, la m pẽgda neb niynsi sẽn na n lebs-foom f sẽn maan tõndã." 
Psalms137:9 M pẽgd ned ninga sẽn na n yõg f kom-peelse n fabs b zuta ne pĩig n wegse! 
Psalms138:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yaa ne m sũur fãa la m pʋʋsd-y barka, Soaala. M pẽgd-y-la malɛgsa taoore." 
Psalms138:2 M teesa y ro-sõngã n wõgemde, m pʋʋsda barka tɩ y nong-m lame. Y kãab kʋdga ka vaal ye, tɩ y ket n wat ne kãab noodo." 
Psalms138:3 M sẽn bool-y tɩ y sak raarã, baraare y kenga m pɛlga." 
Psalms138:4 Bɩ dũni wã dĩm dãmb fãa pẽg yã tɩ b wʋma y sẽn kãab-m. 
Psalms138:5 Bɩ b yɩɩl b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa tɩ Wẽnnaam ziira labsa! 
Psalms138:6 Ba b sẽn zao al yĩngr-yĩngrã b nee sulg-m-meng soaba n bak ne wilg-m-meng soaba. 
Psalms138:7 Ba m kẽnd ne sũ-sãamse, yãmb n kõt-m vɩɩm. Y nug na n wẽ-la m bɛɛba sẽn wuk ne sũ-puuri, y kanga pãng yĩnga, m na n le tʋma raoodo." 
Psalms138:8 Soaala na n maana fãa m yĩnga, Soaala, y nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye! Bɩ y nug ra vʋʋs ne y tʋʋm sõma wã ye." 
Psalms139:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. A Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala, yãmb vɛɛsa m sũurã la y tɩg-m-la zãnga." 
Psalms139:2 M zĩ tẽnga, y miime, m yɛs yĩngri, y neeme. Y beool n mi-la m raaba fãa." 
Psalms139:3 M be m zakẽ bɩ zĩig a to, bũmb ka ling-y ye. Y mi-la m sẽn maand fãa." 
Psalms139:4 M noor nan ka yaag ye la yãmb zoe n mi-la m sẽn na n yeele. 
Psalms139:5 Y be-la m taoore, n be m poorẽ y rɩka y nug n tik-ma." 
Psalms139:6 Y sẽn mi-m woto wã yaa bũmb sẽn yɛɛsd-m, bũmb sẽn zʋʋg m tagsgo." 
Psalms139:7 M teesda yɛ n zãag ne yãmba? M wudgdame n ta yɛ n põs yãmba? 
Psalms139:8 M dʋ yĩngri, yãmb la m segda, m sig n solg kɩɩmsa sʋka, y ne-m lame." 
Psalms139:9 M tees wĩndg sẽn pukdẽ, ad-y! M tees a sẽn lʋɩtẽ, ad-y!" 
Psalms139:10 Y nuga ket tat-m lame, y nug rɩtg zoe n gãd-m lame n pa basdẽ ye." 
Psalms139:11 M kos-y-la woto, tɩ y bas y lika t'a wa solg-ma, n bas y wĩndga t'a tiig n lebg yʋngo," 
Psalms139:12 la ayoo! Lik pa lebg lik y yĩng ye yãmb nengẽ yʋng yãga ne vẽenem wa wĩntoogo, lika lɛɛg n tãoosda vẽenem." 
Psalms139:13 Yãmb n naan maam wa m sẽn ya-la, yãmb n wʋg maam wa fuugu m ma pʋgẽ." 
Psalms139:14 M pʋʋsd-y-la barka, Soaala, y sẽn kãam m yĩnga t'a ya neera, yaa yell bãnd la y maan yã, m mii rẽ neere." 
Psalms139:15 Bũmb ka m yĩngẽ wã tɩ y ka yãend zĩig n kõ-a, y sẽn waa n naand maam m ma pʋgẽ wã ye." 
Psalms139:16 M sẽn da waa n nan ka tar nenga, y ra zoe n ne-m lame, y ra zoe n gʋlsa fãa n ning y sebrẽ, y ra zoe n sõda m daarã n bĩng-ma, tɩ m nan ka rog meng ye." 
Psalms139:17 M ka tõe n bãng y sẽn sed m yĩng ye, y sẽn tags m poorẽ labsa." 
Psalms139:18 M datẽ lame n sõde, la sõora yɩɩda tẽnga bĩisri. M tõog n sõd n sɛ me m ket n ka tar b võor ye." 
Psalms139:19 Soaala, m nongẽ lame tɩ y menes nin-wẽnsã, tɩ sẽn nong-b yɛl kɛga zãagẽ ne maam." 
Psalms139:20 Bɛɛba sãamda y yʋʋr bala, b pʋt-a lame n na n kãab beed bala." 
Psalms139:21 Soaala, d maanda wãna n ka kisg y bɛɛbã, n ka sẽoos tẽn-wãadbã?" 
Psalms139:22 M kis-b-la ne kisg menga, m bɛɛba mens la bãmba." 
Psalms139:23 Vɛɛs-y-ma, y na bãng m tagsgo, fɛɛs-y-ma, y na tɩg m daabo." 
Psalms139:24 M da rɩk wẽn-naandsa waoogr sor ye, togl-y maam vɩɩm sẽn kõn sɛ sore." 
Psalms140:1 Yɩɩlla bee yɩɩla naab sebrẽ. 
Psalms140:2 Soaala, fãag-y maam ne nin-wẽnga, zãag-y maam ne ned sẽn maand pãn-tõogo," 
Psalms140:3 ne neb sẽn segend wẽng m yĩnga, ne sẽn wat-b ne zaba, beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms140:4 B zelemda kʋʋda wa waafo, põeer zẽnem n be b noorẽ." 
Psalms140:5 Soaala, fãag-y maam nin-wẽng nugẽ, fãag-y maam ne sẽn maand-b pãn-tõogo, ne neb niyns sẽn baood m lʋɩɩse." 
Psalms140:6 Zẽk-m-meng rãmba n solg bẽdgo m taoore, m sora noore, b solga b wĩ la b gãmbre, b solga bãng sẽn na n sog-ma." 
Psalms140:7 M yeela Soaala: «Yãmb la m Wẽnde!» Soaala, kelg-y m koɛɛga sẽn leokd-y." 
Psalms140:8 M Soaala Wẽnde yãmb pãnga n fãagd maam. Zabra raare y lill-m-la m bɛɛba. 
Psalms140:9 Soaala da reeg-y bɛɛba kosg ye, da sak-y tɩ b zãmba wĩ paam n loe-m ye, ka rẽ b na maneg n paas b wẽnem." 
Psalms140:10 Bɩ m bɛɛba lɛɛg n dɩ b no-beeda taale. 
Psalms140:11 Bɩ bug-saal widg b zugu tɩ b rɩ bugum b lʋɩ bog zulungẽ n da le tõog n yik ye! 
Psalms140:12 Gom-yooda rãmb kõn yals tẽnga ye, n paas pãn-tõog soaba la nin-toaaga, b rig-ba n yiis zĩig zãnga." 
Psalms140:13 M miime tɩ Wẽnd n na n dok nimbãan-ned sũuri, naong rãmb na n paama bʋʋm bãmb taoore." 
Psalms140:14 Bɩ nin-sõma wã kils y yʋʋre, Soaala, Bɩ nin-tɩrsa paam zĩig y sɛɛgẽ." 
Psalms141:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. M boonda yãmba, Soaala, wa-y tao n fãag-ma. M sã n boond-y bɩ y kelg-ma." 
Psalms141:2 M pʋʋsga dʋ tɩrga n ta yãmba, a rʋ wa tɩdar bug-zõose, n ta y nengẽ wa m zaabr kũuni." 
Psalms141:3 M noora ra yaag bada n togs beed ye, m goama fãa yɩ gũusg goama." 
Psalms141:4 Da sak-y tɩ m gom beed ye, da sak-y tɩ m kʋɩɩs m sũuri wa nin-wẽnsã n tʋm beedo, n bõn m to ye. Da bas-y tɩ b yam wẽnga long-m ye." 
Psalms141:5 M sakdame tɩ nin-sõng laal-m pegse, m sakda nin-tɩrs saglse tɩ saglg yaa nonglem kũuni, tɩ m ka rat n zãgs ye. M sẽn zãgsde, yaa nin-wẽnsa wẽnem tõog n zãag-m ne y sɛɛg yõkre." 
Psalms141:6 M da pa gomd ne wẽng tʋlsem ye, la m bɛɛba na wʋm neere, b sã n wa neẽ tɩ bʋ-kaoodba zut kuglemd ne pĩisi." 
Psalms141:7 Wala b sẽn mi n wedg bok tẽnga, Kɩɩmkulg me na n paka a kʋɩlensa yalengo a na n vela b kõaba sẽn weele." 
Psalms141:8 Mam yẽ wẽnemda m neng n tees yãmba, Soaala, m yõkda y sɛɛga, fãag-y m vɩɩm." 
Psalms141:9 Da sak-y tɩ bẽdga yõk-m ye da sak-y tɩ nin-wẽnsa wĩira gĩd-m ye. 
Psalms141:10 Bɛɛba bẽdg lɛɛg n yõk-ba tɩ mam paam n põse. 
Psalms142:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Yaa a Daviid koɛɛg ne Wẽnde a sẽn waa n be tãnga bokẽ. 
Psalms142:2 Soaala la m kaasd n boondẽ m tara wiisgu, n yõkd b sɛɛga." 
Psalms142:3 M wilgda m yãbra wõore, m wilgda m pɛta sẽn yaa a soaba." 
Psalms142:4 Y mii m sẽn nong n dɩk sor ninga, m daooda sã n mii n wa sɛ zãnga la y mii m bɛɛba sẽn gãnegd-m bẽdg ninga." 
Psalms142:5 Bãng-y tɩ ned ka m sɛɛgẽ n yet t'a toog bee ne maam ye. M pʋs n ka le tar zĩig sẽn na n solg ye la m yella ka le pak ned ba a ye ye. 
Psalms142:6 Yaa yãmb la m boonda Soaala, yãmb n lebg m fãa-fãa tẽng zug ka." 
Psalms142:7 Kelg-y m kosga neere. Ad-y m lʋɩɩ zãnga. Fãag-y-m ne m zabd-n-taase, b pãng yɩɩd-m-la wʋsgo." 
Psalms142:8 Yiis-y maam bi-beesa roogẽ tɩ m tõog n pẽg y yʋʋre ne sẽn ket n pʋgd-b yãmbã. La rẽ me la m gũud wa y kũun sõngo. 
Psalms143:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Soaala, kelg-y m pʋʋsgo, m pʋʋsga yee n lʋɩ y tʋbrẽ. Y nonglma sẽn pʋgd-m daar fãa tɩ y ka basd-m kɛɛngã, bɩ m paam y leokre." 
Psalms143:2 Mam yaa y sõgne, da kẽes-y-m bʋʋd ye, tɩ y mi tɩ d fãa tʋka yelle n kẽnda." 
Psalms143:3 M tara bɛyã, ned sẽn yaand maam, ned sẽn lub-m tẽnga n dʋʋ n tabda. A tusd-m lame n kẽesd kũum likẽ, a rat n naag-m-la ne sẽn ki-b al daar zãrã." 
Psalms143:4 M raood sɛɛ gilli, m pãnga looga zãnga, m ka tõe n maan fɩ." 
Psalms143:5 M tagsda sẽn looge, m tagsda y sẽn maane, m bilgda y sẽn tʋme." 
Psalms143:6 M tẽega m nus n na n yõk-y sɛɛga, m yɛsa y taoore n yãbd ko-yũudu, wa tẽng sẽn gũud saaga." 
Psalms143:7 Soaala, ad-y m ka le tõe ye, da kaoos-y m leokr ye, da wẽnemd-y y nenga ye, tɩ m yell wa wẽneg n sãam ye." 
Psalms143:8 Tõd-y beoogo n wilg maam y nonglem; yãmb bal la m teeg yã. Wilg-y m sor ning m sẽn tog n dɩke, tɩ yãmb la m tees n getẽ." 
Psalms143:9 Soaala, fãag-y maam m bɛɛba nusẽ. Yãmb sɛɛgẽ bal la yell ka le tõe n pak-ma." 
Psalms143:10 Zãms-y-m tɩ m maan y raabo tɩ yãmb la m Wẽnnaam, la y tõe n kõ-m-la y yam sõngã, la y tees-m so-saalle." 
Psalms143:11 Yãmb sẽn yaa m Wẽndã, le vʋʋg-y-ma. Yãmb sẽn pidsd y pʋleng daar fãa wã, wa-y tɩ m tɩlg yɩɩre." 
Psalms143:12 Yãmb sẽn pid ne nonglma, mum-y m bɛɛba noore, sõng-y tɩ m tõog-b zãnga, sõng-y-m tɩ m yaa yãmb sõgne." 
Psalms144:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Bɩ Soaala soog barka tɩ bãmb la m pĩiga, bãmb n wilgd-m zabr takre, bãmb n zãmsd m bɛɛba fabgre." 
Psalms144:2 Bãmb la m sõangda, m tãnsoben-doogo, bãmb zakẽ la m soond yã. Bãmb n kokd m bɛɛba pɛɛma, bãmb n sulgd dĩm dãmb a taabã m taoore." 
Psalms144:3 La sã n ya sɩda, ninsaal zema bõe, Soaala, tɩ y na n ges a yelle? Ninsaal zema bõe tɩ y ningd-a sʋka?" 
Psalms144:4 Ninsaal zɩslem, pemsem dẽnna, a vɩɩma, bõn-yɩgdr sulunsuku." 
Psalms144:5 Soaala, kɩll-y saagã n sigi. Sɩɩs-y tãmsã ne y nug-bila tɩ b nuk bug-zõose." 
Psalms144:6 Tão-y y saaga kãna goabg la rɩtgo, tão-y y pɛɛma poorẽ la taoore." 
Psalms144:7 Zĩnd-y yĩngri n tẽeg y nugu, tɩ m paam fãagre, tɩ m põs yel-beedo, n põs bu-zẽmb sẽn sũ taab n watẽ." 
Psalms144:8 Ad-y ka neb sẽn mi sɩd ye, b nug zɩ n pids b noor sẽn pʋlem ye." 
Psalms144:9 Soaala, m dat n pʋda y pẽgr yɩɩn-paale, m dat n yɩɩla y pẽgr ne m kʋnde." 
Psalms144:10 Dĩm pãng yita y nengẽ, yãmb n tõe n fãag y sõgna a Daviid." 
Psalms144:11 Fãag-y mam ne sʋ-bɛɛga, fãag-y maam bu-zẽmba nusẽ. Bãmb noor zɩ n togs sɩd ye, b nug zɩ n pids b sẽn pʋlem b noorẽ ye." 
Psalms144:12 Bɩ d kom-dibli lebg wa tɩɩse, sẽn pus tẽnga n yi tɩrse, tɩ d kom-pugli pa ne neerem, wa met-mit sẽn nagsd na-yir lal-gilsi." 
Psalms144:13 Bɩ d baoa lʋg wɩk ne koodo, n wɩk ne kood buud fãa, tɩ d bãada yẽnegd ne piis la rũms a taaba, tɩ d sã n sõd tus piiga, bɩ d yet tɩ nan paooda." 
Psalms144:14 Bɩ niis la bõeens pid bãga. Bɛ ra wa reeg d tẽns ye, la pa-weer sor da rɩk ye, tɩ kɛleng me ra kelem d dotẽ ye." 
Psalms144:15 Zu-noog buudu la buud ninga sẽn paam-a Wẽnd kũuna, zu-noog buudu la Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yaa a soab Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms145:1 A Daviid yɩɩlle. Ade, m Soaala, yãmb la dĩma tɩ m dat n kils y pãnga. M datame tɩ m bark pʋʋsga rɩg y taoore zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms145:2 Yaa beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa la m na n pẽg-ba, m dat n pẽg-b-la zamaan ne zamaana." 
Psalms145:3 Sẽn ta-a bãmb ka ye, sẽn tog-a ne pẽgrã la bãmba. B sẽn tar ziir ninga ka tõe n gom ye." 
Psalms145:4 Da bas-y zamaan kãnga t'a loog woto n ka wilg zamaan ning sẽn pʋgdã, y sẽn maan fãa tɩ tog ne pẽgr ye." 
Psalms145:5 M na n sõdga a yeyn-ye y sẽn tʋm n yɩk d pelense, m na n puka b ziira la b neerem." 
Psalms145:6 Yãmb sẽ n ka ne tɩ b pãnga labsa la b tʋʋm-bɛda sõor ka be tɛka? 
Psalms145:7 Gom-y b sẽn zam ninsaal ne kũun niynsã, gom-y b sẽn maan fãa ne zemsgã." 
Psalms145:8 A Israyɛl Wẽnnaam kũmda nimbãanega, a Zakoob Wẽnda pida ne sũ-maasem la nonglem." 
Psalms145:9 Ka nin-yend bal la b nong ye, b nonga b sẽn maan fãa." 
Psalms145:10 B sẽn maan fãa tõnd yĩngã, bɩ d fãa naag n pẽg b yel-sõmde." 
Psalms145:11 Modgr tɩ b gom b naama yelle, modgr tɩ b togs b sẽn tõe n maan bũmb fãa wã yelle." 
Psalms145:12 Ninsaalba na paam n wʋm y tʋʋm-bãna. B na sak n kils naam sẽn ya naama. 
Psalms145:13 Õõ! Ka yʋʋm a wãn bal la y na n dɩ naam ye, y na n yɩɩ dĩm zamaan woo zamaana! Wẽnd zɩ n pʋlem n ka pids ye, Wẽnd sẽn tũ zĩig ning n looge zĩ-kãng pita ne b nonglem la b kũun sõma." 
Psalms145:14 Soaala kokdame tɩ lʋɩɩs ra lʋɩ ye, la b yikda sẽn paam-ba n ta tẽnga." 
Psalms145:15 Reeg-y b kosgo tɩ b gũuda y sõngre, Kõ-y b rɩɩbo, la daar fãa wa ne a rẽnna." 
Psalms145:16 Sẽn vɩ-a fãa tara a raabo n dat tɩ pidsi. Yaag-y y nug yalengo tɩ y kũuna bar n dʋʋge. 
Psalms145:17 Tõnd Soaala sẽn zɛɛgd ne bũmb ninga, yaa b tʋʋmd fãa kõ kaseto, b nonglma sẽn ka sɛɛba kaseto." 
Psalms145:18 Tao-tao bala tɩ b taa b sẽn bool-b zĩig ningã, boola sã n bool ne raab tɩrga." 
Psalms145:19 Yaa vẽeneg tɩ b na kelg kosgã; bõasa koɛɛg sã n lʋɩ b tʋbrẽ la fãagra sẽn paame. 
Psalms145:20 Wẽnd kogenda sẽn nong-b bãmba, Wẽnd sẽn basd kɛɛng yaa nin-wẽnga." 
Psalms145:21 M noor na n pẽga, Soaalã, ninsaal fãa na n kilsa b yʋ-sõngã, zamaan woo zamaana!" 
Psalms146:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! M ned sõngo, pẽg Wẽnde!" 
Psalms146:2 Beoog sẽn vẽeg-m fãa m na pẽg Soaala, m vɩɩma zãnga m na pẽg m Wẽnnaam." 
Psalms146:3 D da wẽnemd d neng n tees dĩm biisã tɩ bãmb me yaa ninsaalb wa tõndo, b ka tõe n fãag-d ye." 
Psalms146:4 Bãmb me vɩɩma tara tɛka. Bãmb sã n poog ra-babs-tẽnga, b geels la b saagr naagd n busa tomẽ." 
Psalms146:5 Zu-noog soab la ãnda? Sẽn teeg-a a Zakoob Wẽnda la yẽ soaba, tɩ bãmb sõngr n wat ne fãagre." 
Psalms146:6 Bãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽnga, n naan mogr ne sẽn be a pʋgẽ. Bãmb la d na n pʋg beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Psalms146:7 Bãmb bʋʋd yaa bʋ n wa ne laafi bʋʋdo. Bãmb n tɩgsd kom sẽn tar a soaba, bãmb n zaagd b sẽn za a soab wĩiri." 
Psalms146:8 Bãmb n pukd zoensa nini. Bãmb n yikd sẽn pãsda n lʋɩtẽ. Bãmb n pʋgd sẽn nonga bãmba. 
Psalms146:9 Sãan lebgda tẽngen-neda kɩɩb la pʋg-kõor teegd la bãmba, tɩ wakr dãmba tẽeb faagd bãmb nugẽ." 
Psalms146:10 Soaala n na n dɩ naam bãmb la f Wẽnde, Siõ, tɩ yʋʋma pʋgd taab n zãgsd sɛɛbo. Bɩ Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms147:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Wẽnd pẽgra segda, la pẽg Wẽnd wa sẽn segdã n wat ne ninsaal sũ-noogo." 
Psalms147:2 Soaala le yikda Zerizalɛɛm lalse n na n le pids-a ne Israyɛl pa-weto. 
Psalms147:3 Sũ-sãang sẽn da tar b rãmb nintãma yẽesame, b noada la b sãmpoag maagame." 
Psalms147:4 Soaala tara ãdsa fãa sõore, b boonda ãdg fãa ne a yʋʋre." 
Psalms147:5 Naaba-Wẽnd pãng labsa, Naaba-Wẽnd bãngra zulma." 
Psalms147:6 Bãmb n zẽkd sẽn sulgd a menga, bãmb n turgd tẽnga zẽk-m-meng soab noore." 
Psalms147:7 D pʋʋs-b barka b kũuna yĩnga. D pẽg-b ne ruudg la kʋnde. 
Psalms147:8 Ad-y yaa bãmb n lut saaga ne sawato, bãmb n tigsd sa-kooma sẽn na n bʋk tẽnga, tɩ tãmsa sũur na n yɩ noogo ne b yamd paala," 
Psalms147:9 tɩ rũmsa na n paam dɩɩbo. Gãab-bi wã sẽn yãbd koma, bãmb nug n fẽegd-b rɩɩbo." 
Psalms147:10 Soaala sẽn pẽgd ninsaal nengẽ, ka a raood la a pãng ye," 
Psalms147:11 Sẽn noom Soaala, ya b zoe bãmb nifu, yaa teeg b kãabga sẽn ka vaandã." 
Psalms147:12 Bɩ f pẽg f Soaala, Zerizalɛɛm! Siõ pẽg f Wẽnde!" 
Psalms147:13 Ad Soaala lugla f kʋɩlensa kẽnkẽ. Soaala bark siga f kamba fãa. 
Psalms147:14 F yagsa bas-f-la ne laafi, f kamb dɩlgda b mens ne rɩ-noodo." 
Psalms147:15 Bãmb sã n yaag b noore, b koɛɛga tata dũni wã tɛka, la b raab fãa pidsdame." 
Psalms147:16 Bãmb gomdã n wat ne fu pɛɛlga n yeelg tẽngã, tẽnga pelgdame n dɩg wa bãmb n yɛdg b lamdo." 
Psalms147:17 Sapɩlem n dʋʋgde la yaa bãmb nug n fẽegd-a. Waood sẽn ya waood n wat n kẽed kõaba la rigb ka tõe n ka rig ye. 
Psalms147:18 B sã n bool tʋʋlgo, fãa wẽnegd n boogame. Kooma sẽn da gĩs n dɩga na n zoeeme." 
Psalms147:19 Soaala yãenda gomd n taas a Zakoob, a Israyɛl deega b noya la b saglse." 
Psalms147:20 Ka buuda fãa n paam dẽ ye, ka neba fãa n bãng b raab ye. Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms148:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Soaala paam pẽgr al yĩngri! Sẽn be-b yĩngrã tall Soaala pẽgre! 
Psalms148:2 Pẽg-y-ba malɛgse, pẽg-y-ba yĩngr tãb-biisi!" 
Psalms148:3 Wĩntoog la kiuugu, ãdsa fãa sẽn yãgdã," 
Psalms148:4 yĩngr wen-vɩʋʋgã, sawata poorẽ-poorẽ ko-yũusã," 
Psalms148:5 fãa naag taaba n pẽg Soaala, tɩ tũu ne Wẽnd gomd bala tɩ fãa wa beẽ." 
Psalms148:6 B yalsa ned kam fãa a zĩigẽ zamaan fãa yĩnga, n wilg ned kam fãa sor sẽn ka tar badga." 
Psalms148:7 Tẽng zug rãmba pẽg Soaala, mogra ne a pʋgẽ wag-bãna," 
Psalms148:8 la yãmb me, bugum la sapɩlem, koom sẽn gĩs n yɛsẽ la wulgu, sob-raad sẽn vũud Wẽnd nug sẽn teesẽ." 
Psalms148:9 Pẽg-y-ba, tãmse la kunkuba, pẽg-y-ba ne y biisã, moog tɩ-noodo, pẽg-y-ba, kʋgse ne y woglem la y maasem," 
Psalms148:10 pẽg-y-ba, yir la weoog rũmsi, luiili la wiisi," 
Psalms148:11 pẽg-y-ba, tẽnga dĩm dãmba ne b soolem, pẽg-y-ba, na-komse la dũni soaalba," 
Psalms148:12 pẽg-y-ba, kom-dibli la kom-pugli yãas la nin-kẽemse." 
Psalms148:13 B pẽg b yʋʋre tɩ b yɩɩda fãa ne ziiri, b ziira pida yĩngr la tẽnga." 
Psalms148:14 Bãmb n pids b neba ne raoodo, bãmb me la Israyɛl kamb pẽgda; yaa buud sõnga kamb la bãmba. Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms149:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! Pʋd-y yɩɩn-paalle tɩ d pẽg Soaala, d naag taab n kils bãmba." 
Psalms149:2 A Naanda taoor bɩ a Israyɛl kaas a sũ-noogo, a dĩma taoor bɩ a zodg a yɩɩn-noodo." 
Psalms149:3 Sigl-y saoog n pẽg bãmba, tĩng-y gãngãoogo, wãag-y ruudsi." 
Psalms149:4 Soaala maand b buuda neere, b sõngda nin-bi wã meng tɩ b maand daoodo." 
Psalms149:5 Wẽnd pẽgra yĩng la d maand kibsa n kelemd d sũ-noog ne yʋngo. 
Psalms149:6 Wẽnd pẽgrã n pid Wẽnd kamba noore tɩ b sũura pid ne raoodo, tɩ b nug zãad zabr sʋʋga," 
Psalms149:7 n na n dok b sũur ne Wẽnd bɛɛba, n na n sɩbg bu-zẽmbã," 
Psalms149:8 n na n loe ne wĩiri, dĩma la kombere," 
Psalms149:9 n sɩbg-b wa Wẽnd sẽn date, la rẽ me la Wẽnd kamba zu-zẽkre. Bɩ Wẽnd soog pẽgre!" 
Psalms150:1 Wẽnd soog pẽgre! D pẽg Naaba-Wẽnd b ro-sõngẽ, d pẽgb-b b yĩngr naama zaoorẽ," 
Psalms150:2 D pẽg-b b tʋʋm sõma wã yĩnga, d pẽg-b tɩ b yaa nin-kãsenga." 
Psalms150:3 D kũms baorgo n pẽg-ba d pẽg-b ne pɛndg la ruudga. 
Psalms150:4 D pẽg-b ne gãngãoog la saooga, d pẽg-b ne kʋnd la wɩɩse." 
Psalms150:5 D sigl noog ne kɛm sẽn sãte d pẽg-b ne waaga la kilsgu. 
Psalms150:6 Bɩ nin-vɩɩg fãa pẽg Naaba-Wẽnde. Wẽnd soog pẽgre! 
Proverbs1:1 Israyɛl dĩma a Daviid biiga, a Salomo, yelbũna." 
Proverbs1:2 Ad-y yelbũna na n zãmsa ninsaala t'a zã a meng ne yẽesem, n paam gʋʋl-sõngo la a wʋm b sẽn zulg n togsd bũmb ninga võore." 
Proverbs1:3 B wilgda ninsaal sẽn na n tũ sor ninga n yẽege, n zoe Wẽnd nifu, n lak ne so-goalma, n pid ne zemsgo." 
Proverbs1:4 B zãmsda neb niyns vɩɩma sẽn nan ka sĩdã tɩ b maan gũusgu la sõngda kom-bɩɩba tɩ b modg n bãng n bak bũmb ne a taaga. 
Proverbs1:5 Woto, sẽn zoe n tar-b bãngre, bɩ b karem-ba, n paas b bãngre, n sɩls b yama n paase. Sẽn zoe n pid-b ne yam na tõog n wilg b taab tɩ b rɩk so-sõngo." 
Proverbs1:6 B na n tõog n wegsa yelbũn kẽer pagdo, b na n sɩd paama karen-saamb dãmba yam zulungã n dɩke." 
Proverbs1:7 Bãngr zulunga yẽgende yaa zoe Soaala Wẽnd nifu. Sẽn tar-a yam vẽenem, gʋʋla gʋʋlg sõngo; gãeeng bala n ka baood yam vẽenem la a zãgsd a tũudem." 
Proverbs1:8 Kelge, m biiga, kelg f ba saglse la da sãbs f ma wilgri ye." 
Proverbs1:9 Ad-b saglsã na n manega f vɩɩma wa pugl neere sẽn fõgneg f zugu, bɩ faong teedo sẽn luund f yãoogẽ." 
Proverbs1:10 M biiga, dar ninga kamb sẽn ka paam gʋʋlg sõngo wat n dat n kʋɩɩb-f lame, bɩ f da sak ye." 
Proverbs1:11 B sã n yeel-fo: tũ tõndo, d bao zĩig n soonde n paam ned zɩɩm n yiis zaalem, d bao zĩig n soonde, n tʋm beedo ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle," 
Proverbs1:12 d vel-a vɩɩga wala bʋg-tẽnga, d vel-a mumdi wala bo zulunga," 
Proverbs1:13 b sã n yeel-fo: wa tɩ d na paam arzɛka, wa tɩ d pids d roto ne fãab teedo, wa tɩ f na paam f zu-noog sẽn na n tʋʋg foom a soaba fãa," 
Proverbs1:14 wa tɩ ligda korgo na yɩ-la d fãa korgo," 
Proverbs1:15 m biiga, da sak n tũ-b ye. Zãag f nao ne b soya tũudem." 
Proverbs1:16 Ad-b nao zoet n dabda wẽng zĩigẽ, ad yaa zɩɩm la b yãgd n na n tɩ raage." 
Proverbs1:17 Ade, da nams zaalem, tɩ bẽdg ka rɩgend luiil nifẽ t'a le yõk-a ye." 
Proverbs1:18 B bãng tɩ b bẽdgã n na n wẽneg n daag b zɩɩm. 
Proverbs1:19 Na n yɩɩ woto ne ned ning fãa sẽn fãad a taaba: b wat n fãsga yẽ meng vɩɩm. 
Proverbs1:20 Yɩnga yam vẽenem kẽndame la a boondẽ. A koɛɛgã n sãt soya zutu. 
Proverbs1:21 A yɛsa sobadsẽ n boondẽ, a yɛsa tẽns noore n sokdẽ:" 
Proverbs1:22 Yalemse, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb nong yalemdo? Yam-pa-wisg rãmba, yaa bõe tɩ yãmb pa rat n yẽege? Sẽn nong-b taab laado y na n laa taaba n ta wakat bʋgo? Yalemse, y na n baoo bãngre da-bʋre." 
Proverbs1:23 Deeg-y m saglgo n teem y zʋgo. M na n zuka sẽn be m sũura pʋga tɩ y wʋm m koeesa fãa. 
Proverbs1:24 M bool-y lame tɩ y zãgse, m tuda m nug, la y pa yõk-a ye." 
Proverbs1:25 M sagl-y lame tɩ y kɩɩse, y pa sak n deeg y kongre ye." 
Proverbs1:26 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la mam me na n la yã, y rigba wakato. Y sã n wa yɛɛsdẽ, m na n pusga laado." 
Proverbs1:27 Yɛɛsgã yaool n na n tiig-y-la wa saluka, tɩ y rigbã yik-y wa sɩlmande, tɩ y sɩbgre la y sũ-beedo wẽneg n ta." 
Proverbs1:28 Wakat kãnga la y na n bool ma, la m kõn sak ye. B na n bao-m lame la b kõn yãend-m ye." 
Proverbs1:29 B pa rat bãngr ye, b pa rat n zoe Soaala nif ye." 
Proverbs1:30 B pa rat m saglgo ye, b toog ka be ne m leokre ye." 
Proverbs1:31 Ad-y b na n dɩ b tudgrã yõodo, b na tɩge ne b meng saglse." 
Proverbs1:32 Yaa b sẽn pa sakd n deeg yella n kʋʋd yam kaoolg soaba, yaa yalem sẽn gãd t'a miime wã n kẽesda moogo." 
Proverbs1:33 Sẽn yaool n kelgd-a maam zĩi ne laafi. A zĩi ne laafi, a ka rigd bũmb ba a ye rabeem ye." 
Proverbs2:1 M biiga, f sã n deeg m goama, f sã n deeg m noya f sũurẽ," 
Proverbs2:2 f sã n yoog f tʋba n deeg yam zulunga saglse, f sã n gãneg f sũurã sɩda zugu," 
Proverbs2:3 f sã n nek f pʋtẽere, f sã n bao yam sõngo n pẽneg f menga," 
Proverbs2:4 f sã n bao-a wala f arzɛka," 
Proverbs2:5 ad yaa wakat kãnga, la f na sɩng n zoe Soaala nifu, wakat kãnga la f na n sɩng Wẽnd bãngre." 
Proverbs2:6 Yaa Wẽnd n kõt yam sõngo: bãmb noor n yiisd minim la bãngre. 
Proverbs2:7 B sõngda nin-tɩrse la b yaa nin-sõma gãongo. 
Proverbs2:8 Bãmb n get tɩ bũmb ba a ye da kedb ye, bãmb n togend b zo-rãmba so-sõngo," 
Proverbs2:9 tɩ b mii sẽn zemse, sẽn toge, sẽn yaa tɩrga, tɩ b mii sor ninga sẽn dabd sũ-noog zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs2:10 Yam sõngo kẽeda f sũuri, tɩ f bãngre pids-f ne sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs2:11 Wakat kãng la gũus-m-meng na n yẽeg-fo tɩ yam minim fãag-fo. 
Proverbs2:12 F kõn le saag n dɩk so wẽng ye, n le saag n tũ gom yood soab ye," 
Proverbs2:13 n le saag n tũ sẽn basd-b so vẽenese n kẽnd likẽ ye. 
Proverbs2:14 Bãmb dãmb sũ-noogo la wẽng maanego, kẽes moogo la b tʋʋmde, tɩ b pẽgda." 
Proverbs2:15 B soya fãa yaa goalma, b soya teesa pɩgla." 
Proverbs2:16 Yam sõngo n na n zãag foom ne sãana, ne pag sẽn ka tẽnga paga, pag sẽn gomd gom noodo." 
Proverbs2:17 Ade, a basa a pipi zoa, a basa a sẽn loe a meng ne a soaba Wẽnd taoore." 
Proverbs2:18 Ade, a roog kɩlla a wãab kɩllgo. A sẽn tũud soy niyns fãa kẽesd-a-la Likẽ, kũuma zakẽ." 
Proverbs2:19 Sẽn sõs-a ne-a ka lɛɛgd n wa ye, a pa le tõe n paam vɩɩm sor n dɩk ye." 
Proverbs2:20 Bao nin-sõma sor n dɩke, bao nin-tɩrs sor n tũ." 
Proverbs2:21 Nin-tɩrse n na n vɩɩnde, sẽn ka mi b wẽng roto n na n yalse." 
Proverbs2:22 Nin-wẽnsã la tẽng kãnga nin-yoodã na n digame n yiisi. 
Proverbs3:1 M biiga, da yĩm m zãmsga ye, bĩng m noya f sũurẽ." 
Proverbs3:2 Woto f yõor na yɩ woko, n pid ne yʋʋma la sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs3:3 Da zãag f meng ne sũ-bʋgsem ye, da zãag f meng ne pʋ-peelem ye, bao wĩiri n tui-ba n bob f kokore, gʋls-ba f sũurẽ." 
Proverbs3:4 F sor na yɩ sõngo la f na paam f sẽn date Wẽnd la ninsaal nengẽ. 
Proverbs3:5 Dell Soaala-Wẽnd ne f sũur fãa, da teeg f meng bãngr ye." 
Proverbs3:6 F sẽn maan bũmb ning fãa bɩ f tags Wẽnd yelle tɩ f sor kunkub na sirgi. 
Proverbs3:7 Da kao tao tɩ f yaa ned sẽn mi vɩɩm ye. Zoe Wẽnd nifu n zãag f meng ne wẽnga. 
Proverbs3:8 Woto, f na n paam yĩn-maasem, woto f kõab kõn wãg ye." 
Proverbs3:9 Yãk f sẽn tare n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde. Yãk f kood rẽemse n kõ-ba. 
Proverbs3:10 Woto f bao na pid n sudg ne koodo la f sĩmsa na raal ne rã-paalga. 
Proverbs3:11 M biiga, da sãbs Soaala-Wẽnd sɩbgr ye, da bas tɩ zabr puug f sũur ye." 
Proverbs3:12 Yaa b sẽn nong a soaba la Wẽnd zabd ne, wala ba sẽn maand ne a bi-nongre." 
Proverbs3:13 Zu-noog soaba la sẽn pam-a yam sõngo, sẽn paam-a t'a yam weke." 
Proverbs3:14 Yam sõng yõodo yɩɩda ligdi, f sã n tar-a n são f sẽn tar sãnem." 
Proverbs3:15 A yõod yɩɩda muizãana, bũmb ka be f sẽn tõe n mak-a f bõn datsa sũk ye." 
Proverbs3:16 Dɩtgo a zãada yõ-woko, goabga, a zãada arzɛk la ziiri." 
Proverbs3:17 Soy niyns a sẽn tũudi yaa sũ-noog sẽn pid zãng soy, a soy fãa digda sũ-noog sẽn beẽ." 
Proverbs3:18 Sẽn paam-a n gãd, bee vɩɩm tɩɩg tẽngre, sẽn gãd-a zĩi ne sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs3:19 Wẽnd ne b bãngrã n maan tẽngã b yamẽ, bãmb n yals yĩngri teedã." 
Proverbs3:20 Bãmb minima n tuk mogre, bãmb yama n le zĩnd tẽngre n kɩt tɩ sawat dʋʋgd meenem." 
Proverbs3:21 M biiga, tũ b sẽn wilg-fu, maan gũusgu, puk f nin neere." 
Proverbs3:22 Gũusgu la saglsã deegre n na n kõ f vɩɩm, n na n yɩ faoong bũmbu f sẽn bob n kẽnda." 
Proverbs3:23 F pa kẽnd tɩ f sũur kiuusdẽ ye, f pa kẽnd n lagsdẽ ye." 
Proverbs3:24 F sã zĩẽ, rabeem ka ye, f sã n gõe, f gõeem sakd-f lame." 
Proverbs3:25 Bɛɛba yɩɩr pa tar-f ye, b kõn soos n tak zabre ne f ye." 
Proverbs3:26 Wẽnd na n yɩ-la f sõangda, Soaala-Wẽnd kõn bas tɩ f lʋɩ bẽdgẽ ye." 
Proverbs3:27 Ned sã n kos f sõngre, tɩ f tõe n sõng-a, bɩ f da zãgs ye." 
Proverbs3:28 Da yeel f saam-biiga: kẽnge tɩ f na lɛɛg n wa wakat a to, beoogo, m na kõ-fo, n yaool n tõe n kõ-a dũnna ye." 
Proverbs3:29 Da tʋlg ne wẽnga ned sẽn tẽed tɩ fo ket n dat-a-la ne neer ye. 
Proverbs3:30 Ned sã n ka maan f wẽnga, bɩ f ra yaas n maan no-koeemd ne-a ye." 
Proverbs3:31 Da wẽneg sẽn ka mi-a sugri soab ye, da togs a manesem ye." 
Proverbs3:32 Wẽnd pa nong nin-wẽng ye, Wẽnd data nin-tɩrse n maan b zak kamba." 
Proverbs3:33 Wẽnd kãab wẽnga n sirgd nin-wẽng roogo, Wẽnd kãab noodo n pid nin-sõng dẽnna." 
Proverbs3:34 B laada sẽn nong-b taab laado, la b kũuna zamda sulg-m-meng rãmba." 
Proverbs3:35 Sẽn tar-a yam sõngo, n paamd ziiri, la yalemsã n so yaoolgo." 
Proverbs4:1 M kamba, kelg-y y ba zãmsgo, ning-y pãnga n bãng sɩda." 
Proverbs4:2 M sẽn togsda ya bõn-sõngo, da bas-y m sẽn wilg-y wã ye." 
Proverbs4:3 Mam me yɩɩ m ba biiga, mam me yɩɩ m ma bi-nongre, m ma bi-zelle." 
Proverbs4:4 Yaool n ya woto la b zãms ma, modg tɩ m goama pa f sũurẽ, modg n deeg m noya, n paam n vɩɩnde." 
Proverbs4:5 Bao yam sõngo, maan tẽegre, da yĩm m goama, da bas-b tɩ b looge." 
Proverbs4:6 Tall yam sõngo t'a fãag-fo, nong-a t'a gũ-fu." 
Proverbs4:7 Deeg tɩ yẽ la pipi kũuni, dɩk f sẽn tare n tek ne-a." 
Proverbs4:8 Sog-a dɩm-dɩm n paam n yɩ neda. Ad-f sã n mobg-a, a na n wa ne f zu-zẽkre." 
Proverbs4:9 A na fõgneg f zugu ne neerem pugla, a na n mobg f dĩir ne sãnem peende." 
Proverbs4:10 M biiga, deeg m goama tɩ f yʋʋm lebg kʋʋma." 
Proverbs4:11 M kẽes-f-la yam sõng sor pʋga, m kẽes-f-la so-tɩrs pʋga." 
Proverbs4:12 F sã n ka teem sore, f kẽnd na n yɩɩ faasga. F zoet me f kõn lak n lʋɩ ye." 
Proverbs4:13 Deeg noore, da bas-a ye, tũ-a, yaa yẽ n wat ne vɩɩm." 
Proverbs4:14 Da tũ nin-wẽns sor ye, da pɩʋʋg b sẽn kẽnd zĩig ning ye." 
Proverbs4:15 Bas-a, da tũ be ye, da ges be ye, gãndg-a." 
Proverbs4:16 Bãng tɩ nin-wẽns sã n ka maan wẽnga b gõeem pa sakd ye, b sã n pa kʋ b pa suusd ye." 
Proverbs4:17 B rɩɩb yaa sãmpog rɩɩbo, b rãama yaa pãn-tõog rãam."
