Proverbs4:18 Nin-sõma sore yaa wa sõore, wĩntooga zẽkdame t'a vẽenema paasdẽ." 
Proverbs4:19 Nin-wẽns sore yaa lika, b kẽnd n lagsdame la b pa ne b sẽn lakda ye." 
Proverbs4:20 M biiga, kelg m koeesã neere, kelg m goama ne f tʋb fãa." 
Proverbs4:21 Tees f nengã b sẽn dat-f zĩig ninga; bĩng-ba f sũurẽ. 
Proverbs4:22 B kõta vɩɩm, b kõta yĩng laafi." 
Proverbs4:23 Gũus f sũurã n yɩɩd sẽn keta fãa, vɩɩma ko-nin bunda sũurẽ." 
Proverbs4:24 Da saag n yag zirẽ ye, da kãneg f to ye." 
Proverbs4:25 F gesg yɩ pʋ-peelem la a ra yɩ zãmb gesg ye. 
Proverbs4:26 Da kẽnd n tugd bogd ye, da bʋdg sore ye." 
Proverbs4:27 Da leb goabg bɩ rɩtg ye, da sak n zoe n pʋg wẽng ye." 
Proverbs5:1 M biiga, deeg m sẽn zãmsd-f bũmb ninga, kelg m yama sẽn wilg-f bũmb ninga," 
Proverbs5:2 n tõog n paam gũusgu, n tõog n lebg bãngda, n tõog tɩ f noor da yiis beed ye. Da kelg pʋg yoog ba bilfu." 
Proverbs5:3 Sãan a woto tara gom noodo, a goama bʋgsem zem kaam." 
Proverbs5:4 Mik a na n waa ne yell tɩɩsem sẽn yɩɩd kʋk tɩɩsem t'a yaa wa sʋʋga sẽn dɩt a noya a yiibu. 
Proverbs5:5 A rɩka kũum sore, bʋg-tẽng sor la a tũuda." 
Proverbs5:6 A kẽnd n zãagda ne vɩɩm sore, a pʋs n ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ la a ka bʋʋd ba bilfu." 
Proverbs5:7 Kelg-m marsã, m biiga, da bas tɩ b zãag-fo ne mam goama kelgr ye." 
Proverbs5:8 Sõng tɩ f sore da pẽneg pʋg yoog dẽnd ye, sõng n da pẽneg a dignoorẽ ye." 
Proverbs5:9 Ka rẽ, f yʋʋr na sãam f taab nengẽ, tɩ f samd dɩt a ye wa kʋʋg f yʋʋma," 
Proverbs5:10 tɩ f paoong na n wa lebg sãamb rẽnna, tɩ f rĩir tʋʋlg yõodo wa lebg sãan dẽnna," 
Proverbs5:11 tɩ kʋʋlem wa lʋɩ sʋka, tɩ f loogdẽ la f waasdẽ" 
Proverbs5:12 la f kelemdẽ: «M ba ye, ye! M ka bao yam vẽenem ye, m ka kelg a saglsa ye," 
Proverbs5:13 m ka kelg m zu-soaben-dãmba goama ye, m ka kelg m karen-saamb-dãmb ye.»" 
Proverbs5:14 Yaa rẽ la m yɛs ne sũ-beedo m taab sʋka. 
Proverbs5:15 Ade, yũ f meng bulg koom," 
Proverbs5:16 da sak t'a yɩ neb fãa dẽnd ye. 
Proverbs5:17 A yɩ fo koom, da saag n kõ-a sãan t'a yũ ye." 
Proverbs5:18 F kooma yɩ bark koom f yĩnga. Da bao sũ-noogo pag a to nengẽ sã n ka sẽn kul-a foom f bi-bɩɩlem wẽnnẽ. 
Proverbs5:19 A yɩ neere, f nifẽ wala walga, wala yĩsri, tɩ y sõsd ne taaba, n tɩgd taaba, n yãngd y nonglem ne taaba." 
Proverbs5:20 M biiga, yaa bõe la f bas tɩ sãan kẽes-f moogo, yaa bõe yĩnga la f na n mobge f sẽn ka mi a soaba?" 
Proverbs5:21 Wẽnd geta ninsaala, Wẽnd geta a sẽn tũud soy niynsi." 
Proverbs5:22 Nin-wẽng lʋɩta a meng bẽdgẽ, a yel-wẽna wĩiri n na n wẽneg n sãr-a." 
Proverbs5:23 Gũusga sẽn ka beẽ, yaa kũum la gãeemd sẽn galẽ, yaa meneng zĩiga." 
Proverbs6:1 M biiga, fo sã n yeel neda tɩ foom n na n yao a samde, fo sã n wẽen tɩ f na yao sãan samde," 
Proverbs6:2 sã n ya fo meng n yaag f noor n pʋlme, sã n ya fo meng bẽdgo n lɛɛg n yõk fo," 
Proverbs6:3 ad-f sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga n põse: yella sẽn pak-fã, kẽng n tɩ yãend f tũud-n-taagã, yẽs ne-a, dɩdg ne-a." 
Proverbs6:4 Da bao vʋʋsgo, da bao gõeem, tɩ y wa zems taaba." 
Proverbs6:5 Modg n yi wĩirẽ wã, wala yãk sẽn fãagd bẽdgẽ, wala luiil sẽn fʋremd n yi nakalbteongẽ." 
Proverbs6:6 Kʋɩɩm daolgo, yi n ges gũuri! Ges a sẽn maan bũmb ninga n bao yam n kõ f menga." 
Proverbs6:7 Gũuri ka tar ned sẽn wilgd-a tʋʋmda ye, ned ka pʋʋsd-a tʋʋmde, la a ka tar soansoa-ma ye." 
Proverbs6:8 La sɩpaolgo, a tigsda a sẽoog dɩɩbo. Tigsgu sã n ta, yẽ me tigsdame." 
Proverbs6:9 Kʋɩɩma, fo yẽ na n paa f gãagẽ n ta wakat bʋgo? Wakat bʋg la f na n neke?" 
Proverbs6:10 F yetame tɩ f rat n gũsa bifu, tɩ f na n suusa bilfu, n kalemd f nusi, n gãe." 
Proverbs6:11 Ad wakat kãng la naong na n soos n kẽ-fo, a na n soos n waa wa wagdre la fãada tɩ lebg pɛta." 
Proverbs6:12 Ka võor soaba la sẽn saad-a n yagd zirẽ. Dẽ ka sõma ye. 
Proverbs6:13 A kamsda ne a nini, n kamsd ne a nus la a nao." 
Proverbs6:14 A yamleoog sẽn beẽ, yaa wẽng bala. Tʋʋm yood la a baood n na n tʋme, zab la a rʋʋsda." 
Proverbs6:15 Yaa rẽ me yĩng la a yella na n sãame. A lʋɩta vugri bala tɩ tɩɩm kaẽ ye. 
Proverbs6:16 Bũmb a yoob n be tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kisa, b ka tat b yam ba sẽn paood ye." 
Proverbs6:17 Yaa gesg sẽn ya wilg-m-meng gesgo, zelemd sẽn ya zelem goalenga: nus sẽn daagd ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yell zɩɩm," 
Proverbs6:18 sũur sẽn bilgd wẽnga, nao sẽn tʋʋl ne wẽng babsgo." 
Proverbs6:19 A yopoe soaba yaa kaset zirẽ soaba, pʋ-yagsa la tẽn-kãn-neda." 
Proverbs6:20 M biiga, deeg f ba noore, da zãgs f ma wilgri ye." 
Proverbs6:21 Loe a goama f sũurẽ tɩ b da zãag ba bilfu, loe-ba f loorẽ wa fan-teoogo," 
Proverbs6:22 tɩ b yãagd foom zĩis fãa, la b gũud foom, f gõeemẽ. B yɩ f sõsd-n-taaga, f sã n nek n sɛ." 
Proverbs6:23 Soaala noor yaa wa fitila sẽn paalgd tõnd vɩɩma sor zugu. 
Proverbs6:24 Noora n na n sõng-f tɩ f maan gũusgu ne pʋg yoogo, n gũ-f ne f to pag sẽn pid ne goam bʋgsa." 
Proverbs6:25 Da bas f sũurã t'a tʋlg a neerma ye, da bas t'a nina kamsgo lub foom a bẽdgẽ ye." 
Proverbs6:26 Pag sã n yooda n baood ligdi, la a ka tar sɩd ye, bur gɩrg sekd-a lame. Pag sẽn tar sɩda sã n dat n yõg zood ne foo, ad yaa f kũum la a rata." 
Proverbs6:27 F sã n dat n mok bugum, ka ningd gɩfẽ ye; kɩɩs n ning tɩ fuug yõk bugum." 
Proverbs6:28 Bug-saal ka tabd ne nao ye, kɩɩs n tabe tɩ nao feebe." 
Proverbs6:29 Yaool n yaa boto la f maanda, f sã n baood f to paga, f kõn sɩɩs-a n looge tɩ yell ka pak-f ye." 
Proverbs6:30 B pa ningd wagdre sẽn zuud n na pidsa a pʋg taal ye, yaa kom n tar-a." 
Proverbs6:31 Baasgo b sã n yõk-a, a na n yaoo naoor a yopoe, a na vaag a roog zãng n kɩse," 
Proverbs6:32 la sẽn baood-a a meng wãabo yaa yam kaoolgo soaba a ra-taaga. 
Proverbs6:33 B na n pãb-a lame, b na n laa-a lame, a kõn yi yãnd pʋgẽ bada." 
Proverbs6:34 Sũ-kiir bugum sã n wit rao pʋgẽ, bãng-y t'a sũur dokre daare, sugri kõn zĩnd ye." 
Proverbs6:35 Nimbãan-zoeer ka ba bilfu, ba f rɩgl f kũuna a taoore, a kõn bars ye." 
Proverbs7:1 M Biiga, kelg m goama, bĩng koɛɛgã f sũurẽ." 
Proverbs7:2 Deeg m salgsã tɩ f na vɩɩnde, nong m saglsã wala bũmb sẽn be yõod wʋsgo." 
Proverbs7:3 Gãd-b ne f nus-bi, gʋls-ba f sũurẽ." 
Proverbs7:4 Bool yam vẽenem tɩ f tão, bool-a tɩ f zoa." 
Proverbs7:5 Woto a na zãag-f ne sãana, ne pag sẽn tar zelem noogo." 
Proverbs7:6 A lɩka a peemlɛɛgẽ, a karga tẽnga ween-vɩʋʋgo," 
Proverbs7:7 a yãenda a yam-pa-seke, kom-bɩɩba sʋka." 
Proverbs7:8 A yam-pa-sek dɩk a yir sore, a tũuda so-buka sẽn yegd sãana doogo." 
Proverbs7:9 Zĩig yaa pugsgu, zĩig zoe n sobgame, ya yʋn-sʋka, yaa lika," 
Proverbs7:10 la paga yiime n seg-a, a baoo peend n lud a nenga wa bi-pugla." 
Proverbs7:11 A ka yɛɛsd bũmb ye, a ka zoet nif ye, a ka tõe n zĩnd yir ye." 
Proverbs7:12 A saada so bɛda, a saada so-tiisã, a baooda zĩiga n yɛs n gũud neba." 
Proverbs7:13 A wudgdame n mobg a sẽn seg a soaba, a wɩsga a meng n yeele:" 
Proverbs7:14 «M da tara bark pʋʋsg maando n na kʋ; n pidsa m pʋlong dũnna. 
Proverbs7:15 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m yi n seg foom, m yiime n na n bao foom, la m yãend-f lame." 
Proverbs7:16 M gãaga tʋɩ ne peend neere, yaa peend sẽn yit Ezipt tẽnga." 
Proverbs7:17 M baoo bũmb sẽn tar yũ-noogo n mese, bũmb sẽn tar gondreyẽoogo, la wisao yũugu." 
Proverbs7:18 Wa, tɩ d bao sũ-noogo tɩ beoog vẽege, wa tɩ d dɩk d meng n kõ sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs7:19 M sɩd ka yir ye, a toga so-woko," 
Proverbs7:20 a looga ne ligda korgo, dẽn kiuugã lebg ki-peelgo t'a yaool n lɛɛg n wa.»" 
Proverbs7:21 A tara goama n tar goama, t'a yam-pa-sek yama wẽnemde. A goama paama pãnga t'a yam-pa-sekr na n tũ-a." 
Proverbs7:22 A tũud-a lame t'a sũur kiuusdẽ, a tũuda wala naafo b sẽn tat n na n tɩ kʋ, wala yãk sẽn lʋɩ loangẽ." 
Proverbs7:23 La pĩim n gũud a wakato, n na n kõs a lʋgre, wala tãoog sẽn yõk luiila t'a miẽ tɩ yaa a vɩɩm baasgo." 
Proverbs7:24 M biiga, kelg maam marsã, kelg m goama neere," 
Proverbs7:25 sõng tɩ f sore da bʋgd n yek a yam-pa-sek dẽnd ye, da saag n tũ a menesg soy wã ye." 
Proverbs7:26 Ad neb niyns a sẽn wẽ n kʋ sõor labsa, sẽn da teeg-b meng pãnga paame." 
Proverbs7:27 A yirã yaa bugum yir sore, a sorã sigd n dabda kɩɩms zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs8:1 Yam vẽenem ka kaasd n boondẽ sɩda? A pa zẽkda a koɛɛg sɩda? 
Proverbs8:2 Tãms zutu, soy zutu, so-tiisẽ la a yɛsa," 
Proverbs8:3 a yɛsa tẽnga noore, a yɛsa sobadsẽ wã n boondẽ." 
Proverbs8:4 Adem biisi, yaa yãmb la m boonda, ninsaalba, yaa ne yãmb la m kaasda." 
Proverbs8:5 Yam-pa-sek rãmba, zãms-y yam sõngo, yam kaoolgo rãmba, bao-y sɩlem." 
Proverbs8:6 Kelg-y, m tara m sũur koɛɛga n na n togs yã; m noor na n yiisa gomde sẽn yaa tɩrga." 
Proverbs8:7 Yaa sɩd la m na n wilgi, wẽng pa tõe n yi m noorẽ ye," 
Proverbs8:8 m noora goama fãa yaa sɩda, zirẽ-beed la bõn-goaleng ka be sʋk ye:" 
Proverbs8:9 b fãa yaa vẽenese ne ned ning fãa sẽn tar-a yam, ne ned ning fãa yam sẽn vɩ." 
Proverbs8:10 Bao-y mam zãmsgo, da bao-y ligd ye, bao-y bãngre n yɩɩd sãnem sẽn yɩlge." 
Proverbs8:11 Yam sõngo são muizãanfo; bũmb ka be sẽn tog baoobo wala yam sõng ye. 
Proverbs8:12 Maam, a yam vẽenem, maam n tar bãngre. Maam n wa ne bãngre sẽn yaa zulunga." 
Proverbs8:13 Wẽng kisgu n wilgdi tɩ f zoeta Wẽnd nifu. M kisa wilg-m-menga la tɩtaam, vɩɩm sẽn ka tũud tɩrga, zelem golongo." 
Proverbs8:14 Maam n so saglgo la neer wilgri, maam n so wʋmbo la m tar tõogo." 
Proverbs8:15 Maam n kõt dĩm dãmb b naam. B pãnga yita mam nengẽ, b tõoga yaa mam tõogo." 
Proverbs8:16 B sã n dɩt naam, yaa maam n kõ-ba, b sã n kaood bʋʋdo, yaa mam maasem yĩnga." 
Proverbs8:17 Mam nonga sẽn nong-b maam, sẽn baood-a maam ne raab sɩda yãet-m lame." 
Proverbs8:18 Mam nengẽ yaa faongo la ziiri, arzɛka la sõmblem." 
Proverbs8:19 M sẽn kõt bee yõodo n yɩɩd sãnem, sãnem sẽn yɩlge, n yɩɩd wanzurg sẽn yit boaagẽ." 
Proverbs8:20 M sẽn be sor ning zugã yaa sõmblem sore. So-kãng zugu yaa zemsgo tʋʋm la b tʋmda, yaa vɩɩm sõng la b vɩ." 
Proverbs8:21 So-kãng zugu m pʋɩta sẽn nong-b maama m kũun sõma wã. M pidsda b rota ne arzɛka. 
Proverbs8:22 Naaba-Wẽnd n naan maam sɩngrẽ, mam la pipi soaba, b bõn-naandsa fãa sʋka." 
Proverbs8:23 B naan-m lame tɩ bũmb nan ka be ye, b naan-m-la sɩngrẽ, dẽ tɩ tẽnga nan ka yals ye." 
Proverbs8:24 B naan-m lame dẽ tɩ mogra nan ka tigs a kooma ye, tɩ ko-bulsa nan ka sɩng b kooma bulb ye," 
Proverbs8:25 tɩ tãmsa nan ka tilg b nao zug ye, tɩ kunkuba nan ka vigl ye." 
Proverbs8:26 B naan-m lame tɩ tẽnga ne a tẽn-peelma nan ka be ye, dẽ tɩ b sẽn dɩk bũmb ninga n yag dũni wã nan ka be ye." 
Proverbs8:27 B sẽn wa n yɛdg sa-gãongã, tɩ m beeme, b sẽn wa n kargd mogra toaaga, tɩ m beeme." 
Proverbs8:28 B sẽn waa n kɩt tɩ sawatã tigimd yĩngri, b sẽn wa n pood mogra ko-nina," 
Proverbs8:29 b sẽn waa n yãkd mogra toaaga, n yeel a kooma t'a da fudg n yi wã, b sẽn wa n kɩʋʋlemd tẽnga gãongo," 
Proverbs8:30 m da yɛsa b sɛɛgẽ wala tʋʋmda soaba, n noogd b sũuri beoog sẽn vẽege. M kɩdemda b taoore wakat buud fãa," 
Proverbs8:31 m da saad n pʋgemda zĩis fãa tɩ m daab yaa m vɩɩnd Adem kamba sʋka. 
Proverbs8:32 La marsã, m kamba kelg-y m goama: sũ-noog soaba la sẽn tũud-a mam sore;" 
Proverbs8:33 kelg-y m goama, n lebg sẽn mi-b meng võore. Da sãbs-y m saglga ye." 
Proverbs8:34 Zu-noog soaba la sẽn wʋmd-a m goama, sẽn yɛs-a m dignoorẽ beoog sẽn vẽege n gũud-ma."

Proverbs8:36 Sẽn beeg-a maam pogenda a menga, sẽn kis-b maam, nonga kũum." 
Proverbs9:1 Yam vẽenem soab me-la a roogo, ra-nina a yopoe la a yals yã," 
Proverbs9:2 a kʋ-la a rũmsi, n kõg a rãam, n maneg a rɩɩb roogo." 
Proverbs9:3 A tʋma a roog kamba tɩ b moon tẽnga fãa. 
Proverbs9:4 Sẽn ka tar-a yam tɩ seke, wa ka, yalem buud fãa, wa ka." 
Proverbs9:5 Wa-y n dɩ m dɩɩbã la y yũ m rãama m sẽn kõgã," 
Proverbs9:6 bas-y yalemdã tɩ y na vɩɩnde, kẽn-y tɩrga so-sõng pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs9:7 Fo sã n dat n sagl ned sẽn ka reegd yelle, yaa f sãbsg bala la f bao yã. Fo sã n wilg nin-wẽng a kongre, yaa a tʋʋr bal la f bao yã." 
Proverbs9:8 Fo sã n wilg sẽn ka reegd-a a kongre, a na n kisg-f lame. Sã n ya nin-sõng la f wilga a kongre, a na n nong-f lame." 
Proverbs9:9 Kõ nin-sõngo t'a na lebg sõng n paase, zãms nin-tɩrga n paas a bãngre." 
Proverbs9:10 Yam vẽenem yẽgre yaa Naaba-Wẽnd nif zoeese. Sẽn tara-a yam vẽenem, sẽn mi-a Wẽnde, la nin-sõgo." 
Proverbs9:11 Maam a yam vẽenem, n na paas f raara sõore, la m na kõ-f yõ-woko." 
Proverbs9:12 F sã n tar sõmblem yam, f na rɩ a yõodo, f yam sã n ya la f taab yam, f na rɩ bõne." 
Proverbs9:13 M ba yam kaoolgo yaa pirpiri, a pa tagsd yɩɩga la a ka vʋmd fɩ." 
Proverbs9:14 A zĩ-la a dignoorẽ, tãng zugu, a zao a goeele," 
Proverbs9:15 n kamsd so-loaadba, sẽn lood b sore:" 
Proverbs9:16 «A Yam pa sek soab wa ka.» La a yeta yam sẽn paoog a soabã: 
Proverbs9:17 «Rãam sẽn ya wagdem rãam nooma, tɩ rɩɩb sẽn soosd n dɩtẽ me sakd velbo.»" 
Proverbs9:18 A yĩmdame bala tɩ lik tara a na-tẽnga, tɩ rɩɩba fãa segl be n gũud b rɩ-rɩtba." 
Proverbs10:1 A Salomo yelbũna: Bi-sõng noogda a ba sũuri, tɩ bi-wẽng sãamda a ma sũuri." 
Proverbs10:2 Arzɛk sẽn paam ne tʋʋm yoodo ka yõod ye, f sẽn paam ne f tʋʋm sõma bala n tõe n zã f vɩɩm." 
Proverbs10:3 Sẽn pʋʋsd-a Wẽnde ka kiid kom ye; la Naaba-Wẽnd mongda nin-wẽng a sẽn datã. 
Proverbs10:4 Nug sẽn pa tʋmd wata ne naongo, tɩ nug sẽn tʋmd wat ne arzɛka." 
Proverbs10:5 Yam soaba tigsda sɩpaolgo, la sẽn basd-a tigsgu n kẽed gãaga yaa nin-yaalga." 
Proverbs10:6 Naaba-Wẽnd bark bee nin-sõng zugu, la nin-wẽng noor la a kũum loko." 
Proverbs10:7 Nin-sõng tẽegre yaa pẽgre tẽegre, nin-wẽng yʋʋre ka zɛɛd sãoong ye." 
Proverbs10:8 Sẽn tar-a yam sõngo deegda noore, yam kaoolgo soaba goam wãad-a lame." 
Proverbs10:9 Sẽn kẽnd-a tɩrga tata a sẽn datẽ, sẽn kẽnd-a n tuumnẽ baooda a meng sɩbgre." 
Proverbs10:10 Sẽn dat-a a to ne wẽnga na n dɩɩ bõne, wa yam kaoolg soab goam sẽn lɛɛg n dɩt-a." 
Proverbs10:11 Nin-sõng noore: vɩɩm ko-yũuga, nin-wẽng noore: kũum gʋlgo." 
Proverbs10:12 Beem yaa zabre bug-vɩlenga, tɩ nonglem ya peende sẽn tar n lut kongre." 
Proverbs10:13 Yam sõng n yaagd nin-sõng noore, la dasaare n palg nin-wẽng bãgdo." 
Proverbs10:14 Bãngre la yam sõng soab tigsda wa arzɛka, tɩ nin-wẽng zelemde wat ne a wãabo." 
Proverbs10:15 Arzɛk soab pãng la a arzɛkã, la bũmb ka wãad naong soaba n zʋʋg a naonga ye." 
Proverbs10:16 Yaa vɩɩm la nin-sõng dolbo, yaa kũum la nin-wẽng laogo." 
Proverbs10:17 Vɩɩm sore: noor tũudem. Meneng sore saglgo zãgsgo. 
Proverbs10:18 F sã n tugd beem f ka togsd f pʋg ye, f sã n yelgd rõadga f zema gãeenga." 
Proverbs10:19 Goam pa gomd n sesdẽ tɩ wẽng ka tũ ye, sẽn mi-a n gom n zemse la gũusg soaba." 
Proverbs10:20 Nin-sõng zelemde yaa wanzurf sẽn yɩlg zãnga, nin-wẽng sũur ka yiisd bũmb sẽn be yõod ye." 
Proverbs10:21 Nin-sõng zelemde dɩlgda neb ka tɛka, la gãeemsa gãeemdo n kʋʋd-ba." 
Proverbs10:22 Wẽnd barka n wat ne arzɛka n yɩɩd m kaaga m rĩir tʋʋlgo. 
Proverbs10:23 Nin-wẽng wɩsgda a gĩini ne wẽng maanego, tɩ nin-sõng yẽegd a gĩini ne yam sõng baoobo." 
Proverbs10:24 Nin-wẽng sẽn ka rat yell ningã n pakd-a, nin-sõng sẽn kot bũmb ninga la a paamda." 
Proverbs10:25 Nin-sõng maneg n wẽrs n zĩime, tɩ sɩlmand sẽn wa bɩ a loogd ne nin-wẽnga." 
Proverbs10:26 F bao kʋɩɩm daolgo n kẽes f tʋʋmdẽ, f paama bõn-miisg sẽn na n zãab f yẽna la bug-zõos sẽn na n leo f nini." 
Proverbs10:27 Sẽn zoet-a Soaala nif paasda a yʋʋm sõore, la nin-wẽng yʋʋm tara woogre n dabda." 
Proverbs10:28 Nin-sõng yɛl baasda ne sũ-noogo, tɩ nin-wẽng saagr faagd n dabda." 
Proverbs10:29 Sẽn tũud-a Wẽnd be-la a tãnsoben-doogẽ, sẽn pa tũud-a bãmb wãada a menga." 
Proverbs10:30 Nin-sõng nao ka lukd b zĩigẽ ye. Nin-wẽng roogo ka tiid tɩ yals ye. 
Proverbs10:31 Nin-sõng zelemda gomda yam goama, la b na n kong n võoga nin-wẽng dẽnna." 
Proverbs10:32 Nin-sõng noor gomda sẽn sakd kelgre, tɩ nin-wẽng gomd gom yoodo." 
Proverbs11:1 Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa yaa zãmb magbo. B sẽn nong yaa pʋ-peelem magbo. 
Proverbs11:2 Ned sã n tãoosd daoodo, a yãnd pa zɛɛd ye, sẽn sulgd-b mense, bãmb dãmb n taar yam sõngo." 
Proverbs11:3 Nin-sõma kẽnda b pʋ-peelem zugu, tɩ nin-wẽns zãmbo wãad-b zãng-zãnga." 
Proverbs11:4 Naaba-Wẽnd sũ-fõora raare, arzɛk lebgda bõne, la sõmblem na n waame tɩ kũum zãage." 
Proverbs11:5 Nin-sõng sor yaa saalga, la nin-wẽng paada a wẽnema bẽdgẽ." 
Proverbs11:6 Nin-tɩrs fãagre la b pʋ-peelem, nin-wẽns wãabo la b tʋls yoodã." 
Proverbs11:7 Nin-wẽng tẽeb yaalsã yaa kũum n loogd ne-ba, la b tẽeb faadã na n paa koeese." 
Proverbs11:8 Nin-sõng ka mi yɩɩr ye, nin-wẽng n gãe ne yɩɩre." 
Proverbs11:9 Nin-yoogo wãad a to ne a zelemde, nin-sõng bãngre yĩnga a yiisda a meng yellẽ." 
Proverbs11:10 Nin-sõng sũur noomame, tɩ tẽnga fãa naag n kɩdemnẽ, nin-wẽng yell sãamdame, tɩ tẽnga fãa kaasd sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs11:11 Nin-sõma maasem yĩnga la tẽng meta, la nin-wẽns zelemde n wãad-a." 
Proverbs11:12 Yam kaoolg soaba n pursd a taaba, yam soab sẽn mi la sĩndgu bala." 
Proverbs11:13 Sẽn gomd-a wʋsgo lukda a taab bãongo, yam sõng soaba solgda yɛla." 
Proverbs11:14 Buud sẽn be n ka tar naaba ka yẽegd ye; sagendb lagem koabga tɩ yõod kẽ tẽnga. 
Proverbs11:15 Sẽn yet-a t'a na n yao a taab sama, bõnda a menga, sẽn dat-a laafi ka lʋɩɩsd a toog samd a woto yaoobẽ ye." 
Proverbs11:16 Pag sẽn tar neerem paamda waoogre, la rao sẽn modgd a menga paamda arzɛka." 
Proverbs11:17 Bũmb sẽn manegd nin-noanga yaa a nonglma. Sẽn ya-a nin-toaaga lɛɛg n sɩbgda a menga. 
Proverbs11:18 Nin-wẽng tõe n paama bũmbu la a ka mi a na rɩ a yõod ye, sẽn tũud-a zemsgo paamda a rolbo." 
Proverbs11:19 Sẽn yet-a t'a baooda sõmblem dɩkda vɩɩm sore, tɩ sẽn baood-a wẽng dɩkd kũum sore." 
Proverbs11:20 Wẽnd sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa yaa ninsaan-kazukma. Wẽnd sẽn nonge la ned ninga sẽn tara a meng neere. 
Proverbs11:21 Nin-wẽng pa tõe n pa reeg a sɩbgre ye, nin-sõma buudu na n tɩlgame." 
Proverbs11:22 F sã n dɩk bũmb sẽn dõog ne sãnem n sog kurkur yõore, f maana wa paga sẽn tar neerem, n yaool n ka mi sẽn toge la sẽn segd ye." 
Proverbs11:23 Nin-sõng yam sẽn date, yaa vɩɩma tũ neere. Nin-wẽng sẽn kãabd a meng neera wat n teka Wẽnd sɩbgre." 
Proverbs11:24 A kõ n da kees paoong fɩɩdame, la a tigsd-n-bĩngdẽ naong sɩlgdame." 
Proverbs11:25 Sẽn ya-a kõata, b na n kõo yẽ soaba, la sẽn kõt-a koom me na paam n yũ n tɩge." 
Proverbs11:26 Sẽn daad-a kood zãng n basd a taaba ka tar zoa ye. Neba sẽn nonge la sẽn sakd-a a teed koosgo. 
Proverbs11:27 Sẽn baood-a neere baooda Wẽnd sõm, sẽn dat-a wẽnga, wẽng n dɩt a." 
Proverbs11:28 Sẽn teeg-a arzɛka, arzɛk n wãad-a. Nin-sõng wẽnda tɩɩg sẽn tobd vãado." 
Proverbs11:29 Fo zak sã n ya zũna, fo yaooga sobgo, f sã n ya yalma fo lebga yam soab yamba." 
Proverbs11:30 Nin-sõng pʋɩɩr la vɩɩm tɩɩga, yam vẽenem soab paamda neba pẽgre." 
Proverbs11:31 Nin-sõng sã n paam dolb tẽng zug ka menga, nin-wẽng me kõn kong a sɩbgr ye." 
Proverbs12:1 Sẽn nong-a zãmsgo nong n deega saglgo; sẽn ka rat-a saglgo wilgdame t'a ka yam ye. 
Proverbs12:2 Soaala sõm la nin-sõngo takd a zugu, b ka basd yam wẽng soab n pa sɩbg ye." 
Proverbs12:3 Wẽnem pa paasd keglem ye, sõmblem yẽgendã n ka tar vikda." 
Proverbs12:4 Pag sẽn tar sũ-keelem yaa a sɩd faongo. Pag sã n pa zoet yãnde, a sɩd zĩime tɩ ya wa zũnzũuri n fõosd a kõaba sɩɩlem." 
Proverbs12:5 Nin-sõng sẽn baoode yaa zemsgo, nin-wẽng sẽn baoode yaa tudgri:" 
Proverbs12:6 nin-wẽns goama yaa bẽdgo sẽn kʋʋde, nin-sõma noor n fãagd-b." 
Proverbs12:7 F lub nin-wẽnse, sɛɛme, la nin-sõma roog na n kell n yalsame." 
Proverbs12:8 B pẽgda ned sẽn gomd tɩ tũudẽ, b sãbsda ned ne a goam kɛdba." 
Proverbs12:9 Fo sẽn na n mams f meng wa nin-bila, tɩ f sõgna yaa a ye bala, dẽ n são fo sẽn get f meng wa nin-kãsenga, n yaool n ka tar bur n wãbdẽ ye." 
Proverbs12:10 Nin-sõng geta a rũmsa mens yell neere, nin-toaag sẽn mi yaa toolem bala." 
Proverbs12:11 Sẽn kood-a pʋʋgo kõn kong dɩɩb ye, geel faad soab bal la yalma." 
Proverbs12:12 Wẽn-kɩɩs tʋlsem yaa nin-wẽnsa paoongo; nin-sõma kɩda b yẽgna bilf-bilfu n wa tõe n wom biisi. 
Proverbs12:13 Nin-wẽng zelemd golemd n wẽneg n yaa a bẽdgo, nin-sõng ka mi zĩi n yɩɩdẽ ye." 
Proverbs12:14 Ninsaal zelem sõngo n kõt-a rɩ noodo, ned kam fãa zĩ-la a tʋʋm maasmẽ." 
Proverbs12:15 Yam kaoolg soaba tagsdame t'a kẽnda tɩrga, yam sõng soaba n kelgd saglgo." 
Proverbs12:16 Yam kaoolg soab ka tõe a menga, n wẽneg n basd a sũ-puura tɩ pukd yɩnga, yam soab tʋʋsdame tɩ yaa wa b ka tʋʋs-a ye." 
Proverbs12:17 Sɩd togsdame tɩ bʋʋd tõog n kao tɩrga, kaset zirẽ wata ne tudgri bala." 
Proverbs12:18 Goam toog ned sẽn be zĩig ninga, sʋʋg zẽkdame. Nin-sõng zelemd liginda sãmpoaga." 
Proverbs12:19 Noor sẽn togs sɩd kõn mum abada ye, sẽn tuut-a neba kõn kaoos ye. Nif pa yãet n kams t'a loog ye." 
Proverbs12:20 Sẽn bilgd-a wẽng sũurẽ ya zirẽ-beed n gãe, sẽn sagend-a laafi saglse tara sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs12:21 Yel-beed buud kõn lʋɩ nin-sõng zug ye, nin-wẽns nengẽ yel-beed la b arzɛka." 
Proverbs12:22 Wẽnd sẽn kis la zirẽ-be-neda; Wẽnd sẽn nonge la sɩd soaba. 
Proverbs12:23 Yam soab ka zukd a sẽn mi fãa yɩng ye, yalemsa bala n moond b sũura gãeemdo." 
Proverbs12:24 Sẽn nong-a tʋʋmde la naam tog ne, sẽn kis-a tʋʋmde, la yembd tog ne." 
Proverbs12:25 Sũ-sãang kʋɩɩsda neda, tɩ gom nood maagd sũuri." 
Proverbs12:26 Nin-sõng wilgda a to so-sõngo, nin-wẽns sore ya b meneng sore." 
Proverbs12:27 Kʋɩɩm-daolg ka kẽnd gʋga n paam bũmb n sẽ ye, wɩng-m-meng bala n wat ne yõodo." 
Proverbs12:28 Sõmblem sore: vɩɩm sore; wẽnem sore: kũum sore. 
Proverbs13:1 Bi-sõng vɩɩm pukda a ba sẽn wub-a to to. Sẽn sek-a a menga ka reegd saglgo ye.

Proverbs13:3 Sẽn maand-a gũusgu ne a zelemde n paamd yõ woko, sẽn gomd-a wʋsgo kẽeda moogo." 
Proverbs13:4 Kʋɩɩm-daolg dat rɩɩb n zoet toogo, tɩ sẽn ka zoet-a toog raab na n pid zãnga." 
Proverbs13:5 Nin-sõng kisa zirẽ-beedo, tɩ nin-wẽng paoogdẽ la lukd a taab bãongo." 
Proverbs13:6 Sõmblem gũuda sẽn kẽnd-a tɩ yell ka a zugu, la yel-wẽnd n sãamd nin-wẽnsa yelle."

Proverbs13:13 Sẽn ka kelgd-a sõmblem koɛɛga kẽeda moogo, sẽn deegd-a noore paamda dolbo." 
Proverbs13:14 Yam sõng sẽn zãmsd a soaba wata ne vɩɩm, t'a sõngdame tɩ f põs kũum bẽdgo." 
Proverbs13:15 F tagsgo sã n wẽnd neba fãa rẽnna, neba fãa nong-f lame; la ka zu-noog kãng sora la nin-wẽnsa na n yãend n dɩk ye; soy na n yɩɩ goalma, kẽnd na n yɩɩ toogo." 
Proverbs13:16 Yam soab tʋmda ne gũusgu, yalem daoog yalemdã pukda zĩig zãnga."

Proverbs13:18 Sẽn yet-a t'a toog ka be ne a kamb gʋʋlgo, yẽ soab soga yãnde la fare. B sẽn wilg a soab t'a reege, yẽ soab na n paama waoogre."

Proverbs13:23 Nin-sõng kooda a naong pʋʋgo t'a kẽesd-a tɩgre, la nin-wẽng kũuma, a wẽnema n wat ne rẽ."

Proverbs16:3 Wilg Wẽnd f sẽn dat n tʋm tʋʋmd ninga, tɩ f sẽn dat na pidsi." 
Proverbs16:4 Wẽnd n naan bũmb fãa ne b raabo, n naan nin-wẽnga t'a yẽ toogo, sɩbgr kãsenga daare."

Proverbs16:18 Titaam soaba wãab ka zɛɛd ye, wilg-m-meng lʋɩɩse segl n sɛɛme." 
Proverbs16:19 Sulg-m-menga n lebg bilfu ne nin-bõonese bee yõodo n yɩɩd naag nin-bɛdã n dɩ b paoongo.

Proverbs16:21 F tagsgo sã n ya sõngo, b tõe n bool-f lame tɩ yam vẽenem soaba. Sẽn sakd kelgre yaa koɛɛg sẽn bʋk n gome." 
Proverbs16:22 Sẽn tar-a yam sõngo tũuda vɩɩm sore, yalemsa yalemdo la b sɩbgre." 
Proverbs16:23 Nin-sõng sẽn tagsd n yaool n goma yiisda gom tɩrse, a noor goama me yaa tɩrse, n sakd deegre."

Proverbs16:31 Zoob peendo yaa zɩɩr pugla, zɩɩr soaba segda sõmblem sor zugu." 
Proverbs16:32 Ned sẽn tõe a sũuri yɩɩda gãndaoogo, maag-m-meng soaba yɩɩda tãnsoaba sẽn tõe n wã tẽnse." 
Proverbs16:33 Tentees loadb lagem koabga tɩ Wẽnd daab reng pidsgu. 
Proverbs17:1 Rɩ-faasga ne laafi são zak sẽn pid ne nemd la zaba. 
Proverbs17:2 Sõgen sẽn tar yam são bi-roak sẽn wegme, n ningd a ba yãnde; sõgen sõng lebgda zak biiga n dɩt zaka soab raboogo." 
Proverbs17:3 Wala wanzurf la sãnem sẽn yɩlg boaagẽ, woto me la Wẽnd vɛɛsd sũya." 
Proverbs17:4 Nin-wẽng kelgda zelem goaleng soaba, tɩ zirẽ-be-ned kelgd gom yood soaba."

Proverbs22:10 Dig zab-baooda tɩ zabre na wẽneg n sɛ, tɩ gãgsa la tʋya pa koees-koeese." 
Proverbs22:11 Ned sã n nong pʋ-peelem soaba la nin-bʋgsgo, dĩma me nonga nin-kãnga." 
Proverbs22:12 Naaba-Wẽnd sõngda mita la bãmb n kalemd nin-wẽng zelemde. 
Proverbs22:13 Kʋɩɩm daolg yetame: bõnyẽeg n be yɩnga, m sã n yi a nan kʋ-m lame." 
Proverbs22:14 Loang sẽn zulum wʋsgo la pag sẽn ka zoet yãnde Wẽnd sẽn bas a soaba lʋɩta a goama bẽdgẽ. 
Proverbs22:15 Kom-bɩɩba sũur bãag la gãeemdo, dasaar sẽn mukd sõmbo n sãoogd-b." 
Proverbs22:16 Naong soab tara pɛta la pɛta n na n wa ne a yidgri; sẽn kõt-a arzɛk soaba paasda a naong bala. 
Proverbs22:17 Kɩll f tʋbre n kelg yam vẽenem rãmb goama, nek f yam n deeg bãngr ning m sẽn dat n kõ-fo." 
Proverbs22:18 Bĩng-ba f yamẽ, pẽneg-ba f noorẽ tɩ b na wa ne f sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs22:19 M tʋllame tɩ f rɩk f saagre n bas ne Wẽnde, yaa rẽ la m dat n wilg-f rũnna." 
Proverbs22:20 Ade, fo yĩnga, m gʋlsa naoor yaka n dat n sagl-fo la m kõ-f bãngre." 
Proverbs22:21 F sẽn na n paam zãmsg ninga na n sɩd puka f yam. Woto ned sã n baood bãngre f na tõog n zãms-a sɩda la sɩd bala. 
Proverbs22:22 Da tũ naong soab ka pãngã n loog ne a sẽn tar ye; bʋʋd zĩigẽ me bɩ f ra wɩbg sẽn ka tar-a sõangd ye. 
Proverbs22:23 Naaba-Wẽnd na n sõng-a lame, la yaa fãadba vɩɩm la b na n deege." 
Proverbs22:24 Da yõg zood ne sũ-pu-ned ye, da tũ sũ-to-ned ye." 
Proverbs22:25 F wat n lebga wa yẽnda n lʋɩ a bẽdgẽ. 
Proverbs22:26 Da saag n kãab ned tɩ f na n yao a sam ye. 
Proverbs22:27 Ad-f sã n ka tar n yaooda b wat n looga ne f gãaga. 
Proverbs22:28 Da saag n vik toaag kugri f yaab rãmb sẽn vigli ye. 
Proverbs22:29 Yɩ ned sẽn mi-a a tʋʋmde la ra yɩ tʋʋm-tʋmd yaalg ye tɩ woto rĩma meng wat n kẽes-f-la a tʋʋmnẽ. 
Proverbs23:1 F sã n zĩi n dɩt ne nin-kãsenga, maan gũusgu ne f sẽn zĩ a soab taoorã." 
Proverbs23:2 F puk f yão-beedo, sʋʋg la f pẽneg f kokore." 
Proverbs23:3 Da tʋlg a rɩ-nooda ye, tɩ tõe n dɩɩme tɩ wa kãgemd-fo." 
Proverbs23:4 Da nams n bao arzɛk ye, da tags a yell meng ye." 
Proverbs23:5 Fo pa yãet n ges-a n kaoos, t'a loog ye, a mii pɩgs pusbu. A wat n yɩka wa sɩlga n loog yĩngri." 
Proverbs23:6 Da rɩ zoe-bõn soab rɩɩb ye, da tʋlg a rɩ-nood ye." 
Proverbs23:7 A na n maana wa ta-la a yam, n yet tɩ f rɩ la f yũ, tɩ yaool n pa yit a sũurẽ ye." 
Proverbs23:8 A sag-võr sẽn ta f noorẽ la f sẽn lɛɛg n wʋk-a, tɩ fo sẽn yiis gom nood niynsa na n lebg zalem." 
Proverbs23:9 Da gom tɩ yalem tʋbr dɩk ye, a na sãbs f goama yẽesem." 
Proverbs23:10 Da viig kʋdem-wẽnnẽ toaag kugri ye, da ko n kẽ kɩɩb vẽenemẽ ye." 
Proverbs23:11 Sẽn na n deeg-a kɩɩbsa zĩigẽ n zaba tara pãnga. La yẽ soabã n na n bʋ ne foo n paalg-fo. 
Proverbs23:12 Ning pãng n deeg saglgo, ning pãng n kelg mitba." 
Proverbs23:13 Da zoe yaams ne biig sɩbgre ye, sãbsg wẽedo ka kʋʋd biig ye." 
Proverbs23:14 Bao sãbsga n sɩbg-a, n fãag-a ne bʋg-tẽng rãmba." 
Proverbs23:15 M biiga, f sã n tar yam soab sũuri, ad mam me sũura na n yɩɩ noogo." 
Proverbs23:16 Ad-m yĩnga fãa na n langame, f noorã sã n wa togsd sẽn ya sɩda." 
Proverbs23:17 Bas nin-wẽnsa togsgo n sulg f meng raar fãa Soaala taoore," 
Proverbs23:18 la noog f sũur tɩ f sẽn saagd bũmb ning beooga kõn vaal ye. 
Proverbs23:19 M biiga, kelge, lebg yam sõng soaba, tɩ f sora na yɩ tɩrga." 
Proverbs23:20 Da yɩ rã-tɩgd ye, da yɩ vɛlg ye." 
Proverbs23:21 Dã-yũud la vɛlga kẽesda a meng naongo. Sẽn ka wɩsgd-a a meng ne tʋʋmde, yeelgda kʋdse." 
Proverbs23:22 Kelg sẽn dog-a fooma, da sãbs f ma sẽn lebg pʋg-yãang ye." 
Proverbs23:23 Bao sɩda, yɩ ned sẽn dengd n tagse, ned sẽn sak noora tũudem." 
Proverbs23:24 Nin-sõng ba zĩi n kɩdemdame, sẽn dog-a yam sõng soaba tara sũ-noogo." 
Proverbs23:25 Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f lebg f ba la f ma kɩdengo. Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ f ma lang ne sũ-noogo! 
Proverbs23:26 M biiga kelg m neere, f sẽn yãend bũmb ning m nengẽ wã, modg n vɩɩnd boto." 
Proverbs23:27 Loang sẽn zulum la pʋg-yoodre, bulg sẽn ya sẽka la sãama." 
Proverbs23:28 A maanda wa fãada, n bao zĩig n soonde, la yaa rap wʋsgo la a tudgda." 
Proverbs23:29 Ãnda rãmb n maand: kato! Ãnda rãmba n maand: m sã n da bãngẽ? Ãnda rãmba la zabre, ãnda rãmb n tar guglengu, ãnda rãmba la b pãbd n yɩlemnẽ, ãnda rãmba nini n ka ne b taoore?" 
Proverbs23:30 Yaa sẽn kaoosd-b rãam zĩigẽ, yaa sẽn yũud-b toose." 
Proverbs23:31 Da ges rãam n yeele: ges a nifã sẽn mooge, ges a sẽn kũmd yʋʋrẽ wã, ges a sẽn vend naana naana." 
Proverbs23:32 A wat n dũma wa waafo, n kɛ wa põeere." 
Proverbs23:33 F nina na n sɩng n nee bõn-bãna, tɩ f noora na n yiis gãeeng goama." 
Proverbs23:34 Fo wat n tẽeme tɩ f bee mogre kosʋka, n be koglg zugu, n dʋ n sog koglga ra-wokã n be be n lengdẽ." 
Proverbs23:35 F wat n zaoo be n maandẽ: «Yaa waa m poglame, yaa waa b pãb-m lame tɩ m ka bãng ye. M na n yaa n neka wakat bʋgo? M yikyã, ad-m na n le kosame n yũ!»" 
Proverbs24:1 Gũus n da maan sũ-kiir ne nin-wẽns ye, da tʋlg b tũudem ye." 
Proverbs24:2 B sẽn baood yaa maan pãnga. B noor sẽn yiisd fãa yaa beedo. 
Proverbs24:3 Minim n lʋɩt taoore tɩ yir tõog n me. Yɩlẽ t'a pʋgẽ sak zĩndigu bee ne yam vẽenem dãmba. 
Proverbs24:4 Yam vẽenem n lʋɩt taoore tɩ teoog fãa paam a zĩiga, teed sẽn tar yõodo, teed sẽn sakd gesgo." 
Proverbs24:5 Ninsaal yam vẽenem n wat ne a pãnga, a bãngra paasda a pãnga." 
Proverbs24:6 Zabr zabda ne yam: sagend-b lagem koabga tɩ zab-zabd maan raoodo. 
Proverbs24:7 Yalem nifẽ, yam vẽenem wẽnda bũmbu a sẽn ka tõe n paame. B sã n gomd sẽn wat ne tẽnga manegr yelle, yẽ tɛk la a sĩnda." 
Proverbs24:8 Sẽn dat-a wẽnga, bool-y yẽ soaba tɩ lɩɩsa." 
Proverbs24:9 A yam-pa-sek tagsda wẽng bala, la neb fãa sẽn kis a soaba, wa fãa-fãa, yaa ned ninga toog sẽn ka be ne a taaba." 
Proverbs24:10 Yɩɩr sã n tar-fo, bɩ f ra bas raood ye, ka rẽ f pãng na n lebga komslem." 
Proverbs24:11 Fãag b sẽn tar b rãmb fãa n dabd kʋʋbo, da bas tɩ b tall-ba n loog ne nen-soabg b sɩbgr zĩigẽ ye." 
Proverbs24:12 Da wa yeele: tõnd da miime la? Fo zɩ tɩ sẽn zãad-a tõnd yõora miime. Bãmb n na n dol ninsaala wala a tʋʋm-manesem sẽn tog ne. 
Proverbs24:13 M biiga, dɩ sɩɩdo tɩ yaa noogo; sɩ-vak nooma noorẽ." 
Proverbs24:14 Bãngre me yaa noog boto f yamẽ. F sã n paam-a, ad beoog saagr beeme, f sẽn saagd bũmb ninga kõn vaal ye." 
Proverbs24:15 Nin-wẽnga, da gãneg bẽdgo nin-sõng zakẽ ye, da zɛ a yir ye." 
Proverbs24:16 Nin-sõng lʋɩ naor a yopoe me a na n yikame, nin-wẽng yẽ paada a wẽnemẽ." 
Proverbs24:17 F bɛ sã n lʋɩ bɩ f ra la ye, da noog f sũuri a sẽn lakẽ n lʋɩ wã yĩng ye." 
Proverbs24:18 Wẽnd sã n vʋm f laadã b sũur puugdame tɩ b bas-a n ka le sibg-a ye. 
Proverbs24:19 Da maan gãgs ne nin-wẽns ye, da maan sũ-kiir ne b ye." 
Proverbs24:20 Nin-wẽns ka tar beoog yell saagre ye, b fitil na n kiime." 
Proverbs24:21 Zoe Wẽnd nifu, m biiga, zoe dĩma, lak ne zãms paala." 
Proverbs24:22 B wãab na n tiiga vugri bala, la d ka mi wɩɩbd ninga sẽn na n lʋɩ f zug ye." 
Proverbs24:23 Woto ket n yaa yam dãmba goama. Ka tog tɩ b ges neng n bʋ bʋʋd ye. 
Proverbs24:24 Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n yeel-a nin-wẽnga: ad-fo yaa nin-sõngo, yẽ soab bãng tɩ neba fãa kis-a lame, tɩ neba kãab-a-la wẽnga." 
Proverbs24:25 Sẽn sagend-a nin-wẽnga zĩi ne laafi, Wẽnd bark sigda a soab zugu." 
Proverbs24:26 Sẽn leokd-a n togs sɩda, b mok a soab yɛgdga." 
Proverbs24:27 Sɩng f tʋʋmda yɩnga, sɩng f pʋta tʋʋma; dẽ poore, f na yaool n tɩ tɩ f yiri." 
Proverbs24:28 Da kõ kaset faad ye, da tudg neb ne f goama ye." 
Proverbs24:29 Da yeele: «A zagl sẽn maan maam woto wã, m na maan-a n lebse. M na n dola ned kam fãa a tʋʋm-manesem.»" 
Proverbs24:30 M bʋdga kʋɩɩm daolg pʋʋgo, m yega a sẽn sel a tɩɩs zĩig ningã." 
Proverbs24:31 M sẽn yãende, yaa gõose; gõos tuudu n da gãneg zĩig zãnga, kuga lalga da lʋɩɩme." 
Proverbs24:32 M yẽeme la m tagsa m yamẽ la m yeelame: 
Proverbs24:33 mik m na n gũsa bilfã, m na n suusa bilfã, m na n kalma m nusã, m na n tẽega m nao bilfã," 
Proverbs24:34 mik yaa rẽ n soos n wat ne naongo, wala wagdre sẽn soosd n wat zuubu; koma me na n soos n sig-f-la sãando." 
Proverbs25:1 Woto le yaa a Salomo yelbũna, la Zɩɩda dĩma a Ezekiyas n kɩt tɩ b gʋls-ba." 
Proverbs25:2 Bũmb ning sẽn wat ne Wẽnd pẽgrã yaa b sẽn solg n tʋmd b tʋʋma. Bũmb sẽn wat ne rĩm pẽgre, ya a sã n tags neere n yaool n tʋme." 
Proverbs25:3 Bũmb bãngr sẽn ya toogo yaa yĩngr zãrem, yaa tẽnga sẽn sud n ta zĩig ninga, la bũmb ning sẽn be rĩm sũurẽ." 
Proverbs25:4 Yõak yiis wanzurf rẽgdo a na yõg laok neere," 
Proverbs25:5 dĩm yiis nin-wẽng a taoore, a zaoor na lebg zemsg zaoore." 
Proverbs25:6 Dĩm taoore da maan wa f yaa nin-kãseng ye, da rɩk nin-bɛdã n maan f sõsd-n-taas ye," 
Proverbs25:7 b sẽn na n yeel foom: dʋ ka, são b sẽn na n sik foom dĩm biig taoore." 
Proverbs25:8 Da yãg ne toagseg bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye, f tũud-n-taaga sã n kʋɩdg-fo, fo maanda a wãna?" 
Proverbs25:9 Bʋ ne f bʋʋd-n-taaga la ra luk ned a to bãong ye. 
Proverbs25:10 Ka rẽ a wat n tʋ-f lame, a sã n wʋme, la f kõn le tõog n lebs f zelemd ye." 
Proverbs25:11 Gomd sẽn yiis tɩ neb fãa zut gõmsdẽ, wẽnda tɩɩg biis sẽn dõog ne sãnem la wanzurfu: yaa laogo." 
Proverbs25:12 Fo sã n sagl ned t'a reege, yaa sãnem tʋb-longo la muizãan miidu la f pid a kokore, bɩ bõn-neer a to la f yõg n kõ-a." 
Proverbs25:13 Wala saag sẽn maagd pemsem tigsgu wakato, sẽn taasd-a koe noogo me yaa boto. Sẽn tʋm-a yẽnda wã sũur na n bʋkame." 
Proverbs25:14 Sẽn pʋlemd-a wʋsgo n yaool n ka kõt fɩ, wẽnda sawato la sobgo sẽn be, tɩ saag yaool n ka niid ye." 
Proverbs25:15 Yam ne yam tɩ b tudg la b lub bʋ-kaooda, zelemd bʋgsgo tara yẽn pãnga n wegsd kõaba." 
Proverbs25:16 F sã n yãe sɩɩdo bɩ f rɩ n tɩge, gũus n da rɩ tɩ looge, ka rẽ f na wʋbe." 
Proverbs25:17 Da lɩkd naoor wʋsgo f zoa zakẽ ye, a wat n yɛɛ ne foom tɩ lebg mo-beedo." 
Proverbs25:18 Sẽn maand-a kaset zirẽ, wẽnda guugu, sʋʋga, la pĩ-sɩlenga." 
Proverbs25:19 Yell sã n pak-fo, tɩ zãmb soaba lebg f teegda, fo n bao f yẽn-feedo, la f kar-keoko." 
Proverbs25:20 Kɩt tɩ b yeeg fu taoko waood wakato wẽnda zẽem sẽn paas miisem. Yɩɩl yɩɩl sũ-beed soab taoore, me wẽnda rẽnna zãnga." 
Proverbs25:21 Kom sã n tar f bɛyã, kõ-a t'a rɩ, ko-yũud sã n tar-a bɩ f kõ-a t'a yũ." 
Proverbs25:22 Woto wã f woogda a waoodo, la Naaba-Wẽnd na role." 
Proverbs25:23 Nug goabg sobgo wata ne saaga, neng gãneng wata ne gom n tudg f to." 
Proverbs25:24 F sẽn na n pa zãnnẽ são f sẽn na n be roog a ye ne pʋg-gãeenga. 
Proverbs25:25 Kibar noogo sẽn yi al mooga satmẽ n wa wẽnda ko-maasga ne kokore sẽn kʋɩ zãnga. 
Proverbs25:26 Nin-sõng sẽn lʋɩ yel-wẽnd pʋgẽ, nin-wẽng nifẽ wẽnda bãk sẽn bendge, ko-sõng sẽn dẽgme." 
Proverbs25:27 Ka tog tɩ b rɩ sɩɩd tɩ loog ye. Bũmb sẽn wẽnd f tõe n baoome tɩ looge, ya yell sẽn tog ne bãngra bãngre." 
Proverbs25:28 Tẽng sẽn wã n ka tar lal-gũbri wẽnda ninsaal yam sẽn tagsd a sẽn date. 
Proverbs26:1 Yalem pa tog ne waoogr ye, wala waood sẽn pa tog sɩpaolgo, tɩ saag pa tog tigsg wakato." 
Proverbs26:2 Wala luiil sẽn yɩgd a yɩgbo, tɩ sɩlaall kõosd a kõosgo, woto me kãab vɩɩd ka tũud ye." 
Proverbs26:3 Weefo la sãbsega, bõang la wĩiri, yam-pa-sek po-raoogo la gʋlgo." 
Proverbs26:4 Da leok yam kaoolg soab wala a yam kaalma sẽn data ye, ka rẽ f meng wat n wẽneg-a lame." 
Proverbs26:5 Leok yam kaoolg soaba, wala a yam kaoolga sẽn tog ne t'a ra wa tẽ t'a tara yam vẽenem ye." 
Proverbs26:6 F sã n tʋm yalma; ko-tɩɩseng la f yũuda, Tõe t'a wa ne yel-beedo sẽn na n wẽneg n dɩ-fo." 
Proverbs26:7 Wala wabg karg sẽn keoosde, woto me yelbũndi keoosda yalem noorẽ." 
Proverbs26:8 Sã n ka gãeenga, loaabg kugr ka sẽbd ne loaabga meng ye, la sã n ka gãeenga, ned ka pẽgd yalem ye." 
Proverbs26:9 Yelbũnd sẽn be yalem noorẽ wẽnda rã-yũud sẽn zãad gõaag a nugẽ. 
Proverbs26:10 Naab bõnda a soolma gilli a sã n dɩkd a tʋʋmnẽ yalem ning fãa a sẽn paame. 
Proverbs26:11 Yalem lebda a yalem tʋʋmẽ, wala baag sẽn lebda a wʋbdẽ." 
Proverbs26:12 Teeg yalma n yɩɩd ned ning sẽn ya yam soab a meng nifẽ. 
Proverbs26:13 Kʋɩɩm daolg yetame: bõnyẽeg n be sorẽ wã, bõnyẽeg n be tẽnga pʋga." 
Proverbs26:14 Wala kʋɩleng sẽn yɛs woto zĩ yɛnga n bilgdẽ, woto me la kʋɩɩm maanda, a gãagẽ." 
Proverbs26:15 Kʋɩɩm daolg nus tʋmda laagẽ, la zẽk n wa noorẽ wã namsd-a lame." 
Proverbs26:16 Kʋɩɩm daolg tẽeda a yamẽ t'a mii yam n yɩɩd neb a yopoe sẽn ya mitb kʋda. 
Proverbs26:17 Ned sẽn yɩgd n kẽed zabr sẽn pa a zabre wẽnda ned sẽn dat baaga n yõke, n gãt a tʋba." 
Proverbs26:18 Wala ned sẽn maand gãeemdo n tãood pɛ-zẽnem, pɛɛm sẽn tõe n kʋ," 
Proverbs26:19 woto la f maanda, f sã n tudg f to n lɛɛg n zĩ tẽngre n maandẽ: «M deemdame!»" 
Proverbs26:20 Raad sã n kaẽ, bugum kiidame, woto me la zabre sɛta, tẽn-kãn-ned sã n kaẽ." 
Proverbs26:21 Zab-rʋʋs rʋʋsda zaba, wala saala, wala raoog sẽn paasd bugum pãnga." 
Proverbs26:22 Tẽn-kãn-ned goama wẽnda nem-võya sẽn sakd wãbre, sẽn noom yĩnga." 
Proverbs26:23 Tãnd laaga sẽn maneg n mobg ne wanzurf wẽnda zelemd sẽn ya noogo tɩ sũur yaool n kegmẽ. 
Proverbs26:24 Sẽn dɩt-a beem gomda gom noodo a noorẽ t'a sũur yaool n gãe ne zãmbo. 
Proverbs26:25 A goama sã n ya bʋg-bʋge bɩ f maan gũusgu tɩ zãmb sẽn be a sũurẽ wã ta-la a yopoe. 
Proverbs26:26 Sẽn dɩt-a beem modgd ne a beema solgre me, a na waa n puk neba fãa nifẽ." 
Proverbs26:27 Sẽn kɩbgd-a boko lɛɛgd n lʋɩ-la a pʋgẽ. Ned bilgda kugri tɩ kugrã lɛɛg n fẽdg-a. 
Proverbs26:28 Zelemd sẽn minim zirẽ, kisa a sẽn dõt b rãmba, zelemd sẽn minim gom-noodo n minim wãabo." 
Proverbs27:1 Bũmb sã n ya beoog tẽebo, bɩ f ra yãg n noog f sũur ye, tɩ f ka mi rũnna sẽn na n wa ne bũmb ning ye." 
Proverbs27:2 Bas tɩ ned a to kils-fu la f da kils f meng ye, bas tɩ ned a to pẽge, ra yɩ fo meng ye." 
Proverbs27:3 Kugr zɩsame, bĩisri zɩsame, la yalem sũ-puur zɩslem yɩɩda rẽ fãa." 
Proverbs27:4 Sũ-puur dɩta wa bugum, n fõt wa kʋɩlga la ãnda n tõe yals sũ-ki-ned taoore?" 
Proverbs27:5 Zabre sẽn ya vẽenega, são nonglem sẽn ya mugri." 
Proverbs27:6 Zoa pãbre são bɛ mogsgo. Mogsga yaa belgre. 
Proverbs27:7 Kokor sẽn tɩge pa rat sɩɩd ye, kokor sẽn sõs kom yetame tɩ bõn tɩɩsensa fãa yaa noogo." 
Proverbs27:8 Ninsaal sẽn zãr ne a ba yiri, yaa luiil sẽn zãr ne a tʋko." 
Proverbs27:9 Kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo kõta sũ-noogo, zood naagda ne saglgo n zãagd yɩɩre." 
Proverbs27:10 Da bas f zoa, da bas f ba zoa ye. Yell sã n pak-fo, bɩ f ra zoe n babs f saam-biig sẽn be yɩɩg ye; zoa sẽn pẽ são f ba biig sẽn zãre." 
Proverbs27:11 Bao yam sõngo, m biiga, n noog m sũuri tɩ m toog n leok sẽn paoogd-b maama fãa." 
Proverbs27:12 Yam soab yãeta yel-beedo n zoe n soonde, t'a yam-pa-sek zãgs soondgo n bao yell n kõ a menga." 
Proverbs27:13 Ned sã n yet t'a na yao samd sãan zĩigẽ, bɩ a kɩs bobelle. Reeg bobelle, ka rẽ samda wat n paame n ka yao ye." 
Proverbs27:14 Ned sã n sãd beoogo n pord a yibeoog pʋʋsgo, b na n deega a pʋʋsga ne tʋʋre: «Menem!»" 
Proverbs27:15 Pʋg-mo-be-neda wẽnda roog sugri sẽn tokd koom n pa sɛtẽ, saag niib raare." 
Proverbs27:16 Kok sobg tã ra loog yaa naana n yɩɩd gɩdg pʋg-kãnga t'a ra gome. Zã kaam f nugẽ tɩ ra rʋʋge, yaa naana n yɩɩda." 
Proverbs27:17 Kutu n saasd kutu, tɩ ninsaal yam zulgd a to rẽnna." 
Proverbs27:18 Sẽn get-a a kankang yell nere, rɩta a biisi, sẽn get-a a zu-soab yell neere, paamda waoogre." 
Proverbs27:19 Wala ned sẽn get a neng koomẽ, woto me ninsaal ne-la a sũuri a to sũurẽ." 
Proverbs27:20 Wala bʋg-tẽnga la mogr sẽn pa tɩgdã, ninsaal me zɩ n yeel t'a raab pidame ye." 
Proverbs27:21 Wanzurf la sãnem yɩlgda boaagẽ, ninsaal me yʋʋr sẽn ka sãame n wilgd a sõmblem." 
Proverbs27:22 Ba b sã ning yalem teoogẽ n to ne koodo, a yalemdã kõn fʋk n bas-a ye." 
Proverbs27:23 Bãng f rũm-bõonego sã n bee laafi bɩ b sã n ka keem, ges b yelle." 
Proverbs27:24 Arzɛk ka bũmb sẽn ka tar sɛɛb ye, arzɛka yaa wa naam pugla, ka tolemd zamaana n dabd zamaan ye." 
Proverbs27:25 Wʋr pʋtẽ yamdã, bas yamda sẽn na n lɛɛg n yi wã wʋrbo la f wʋk sẽn zoe n wʋr tɩ be tãnga zugã." 
Proverbs27:26 Wõrs f piisa kõbdo n wʋg futu n paam n yeelge; koos f boeesã n da pʋʋgo. 
Proverbs27:27 F bʋʋsa sẽn kõt-f bĩisim wʋsgã, dɩk rẽ n dɩlg f menga, f zak rãmba la f roog kamba." 
Proverbs28:1 Nin-wẽng kʋɩta tĩiga tɩ ned yaool n ka pʋgd-a ye, nin-sõngo yaa wa bõnyẽ-bila a ka zoet sẽn wãgd ye." 
Proverbs28:2 Tẽng rãmb sã n zẽk b zugu ne b naaba, nanamsa lebgda kʋʋngo. Naaba sã n tar yam la bãngre, bũmb fãa lebda a zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs28:3 Zu-soab sẽn ya naong soaba n dɩt a ka-neng rãmba, wẽnda saag sẽn ni ne pãnga n loog ne fãa, tɩ rɩɩb kaẽ n dɩtẽ ye." 
Proverbs28:4 Sẽn ka tũud-b noore pẽgda nin-wẽnga, tɩ sẽn tũud-b noor puugd b sũuri ne-a." 
Proverbs28:5 Nin-wẽns ka mi noor deegre sẽn dat n yeel tɩ bũmb ning ye. Sẽn deegd-b noor bala n tar dẽ võore. 
Proverbs28:6 Naong soab sẽn vɩ ne sõmblem, são nin-wẽnga sẽn tũud so-golemse, n yaool n ya arzɛk soaba." 
Proverbs28:7 Sẽn tũud-a noor yaa biig sẽn tar yam, sẽn tũud-a yoaadba lebgda a ba yãnde." 
Proverbs28:8 Sẽn paasd-a a paoongo ne peng-wẽnse, tigsda arzɛka, ned a to sẽn na n wa rɩk n kõ naong rãmba." 
Proverbs28:9 Sẽn yẽt-a a tʋba n pa rat n bãng noore, Wẽnd ka reegd a soab pʋʋsg ye." 
Proverbs28:10 Sẽn takd-a nin-sõma n kẽes a so wẽng pʋga, yẽ soab lɛɛgd n lʋɩ-la a meng loangẽ." 
Proverbs28:11 Arzɛk soab tẽedame t'a tara yam, mik naong soab yam n na n yɩɩg-a." 
Proverbs28:12 Nin-sõma paoongo sã n paasdẽ yaa sũ-noogo, sã n yaa nin-wẽns dẽnd n paasde, lebga f zoe n bao zĩiga." 
Proverbs28:13 Sẽn solgd-a a wẽnem ka tõe n yɩ ned ye, sẽn pukd a wẽnem wilgdame t'a kis-a lame la a paamda sugri." 
Proverbs28:14 Sũ-noogo soaba la sẽn maand-a gũusgu, sẽn zãgs-a gũusgu, lʋɩta yell pʋgẽ." 
Proverbs28:15 Na-wẽnga sẽn dɩt naam t'a soolem dãmba zĩ ne pɛta, wẽnda bõnyẽega la gɩgemd-padre, bãmb tɛk yaa kelem la wudg n bri." 
Proverbs28:16 Naab sẽn ka tar yam pida ne pãn-tõogo; sẽn ka tar-a fãad yam tara yõ-woko. 
Proverbs28:17 Ned sẽn mi a sũurẽ t'a kʋʋ neda, zoet n digda a meng yaoogẽ, bɩ ned da gɩdg-a ye." 
Proverbs28:18 Sẽn tar-a a meng neere, yell kõn pak-a ye. Zãmb soab kõn põs ye; a sã n põs rɩtgo, a paada goabga." 
Proverbs28:19 Sẽn kood-a a pʋʋgo kõn kong rɩɩb ye, la sẽn pʋgd-a a kuroogo na tɩg kom gãase." 
Proverbs28:20 Pʋ-peelem soab n paamd Wẽnd barka, sẽn dat-a n lebg arzɛk soab tao-tao ka põsd sɩbgr ye." 
Proverbs28:21 Ges ned nenga n kao a bʋʋdo, ka sõma ye, la neb a wãna n sakd yel-wẽnde, dɩɩb bilfu yĩng bala?" 
Proverbs28:22 Sẽn zoet-a n pʋgd arzɛk nini ka noom ye, a ka mi tɩ nimbãaneg na n wẽneg n lʋɩ-la a zug ye." 
Proverbs28:23 Sã n ka zoet ned nifu n wilg-a a kongre, f wat n mikame tɩ foo ne-yẽ lebga zoodo, n yɩɩd sẽn pʋgd-a n belgd-a." 
Proverbs28:24 Ned sã n zuk a ba bɩ a ma n yet tɩ rẽ ka yel-wẽnde, yẽ soab ne fãad zem taaba." 
Proverbs28:25 Rat wagl soaba wata ne zaba, la sẽn teeg-a Wẽnde, bũmb kõn paoog-a ye." 
Proverbs28:26 Sẽn teeg-a a meng dabaar yaa yalma; sẽn kẽnd-a ne gũusgu na n põsame. 
Proverbs28:27 Ned ka kõt naong soaba n lɛɛg n ki kom ye, la sẽn yãet-a naong soaba n mum nini n looge, Wẽnd yãkda a soab barka." 
Proverbs28:28 Nin-wẽns sã n so tẽnga, ned kam fãa baooda zĩig n soonde, b sã n looge, nin-sõma wekda balbo." 
Proverbs29:1 Sã n sagend neda t'a nakd a kãare, a bãng t'a na wã vugri la tɩɩm kõn le zĩnd ye." 
Proverbs29:2 Sã n ya nin-sõma n dɩt naam b soolem dãmb sũur yaa noogo. Sã n ya nin-wẽnse, b yãbdame." 
Proverbs29:3 Sẽn pʋgd-a yam sõngo noogda a ba sũuri, sẽn pʋgd-a pʋg-yoaad sãamda a paoongo." 
Proverbs29:4 Dĩm sa n tũud zemsgo a tẽng zĩi ne laafi; sẽn ka zãad-a a soolem dãmb ne zemsgo, wãad-b lame." 
Proverbs29:5 Fo sã n belgd neda, bẽdgo la f gãnegd a naoẽ." 
Proverbs29:6 N-ye, yel-wẽnd gãnegda bẽdg nin-wẽng yĩnga, la nin-sõng zoetame t'a sũur pa kiuusdẽ ye." 
Proverbs29:7 Nin-sõng tẽegda naong rãmb yelle la nin-wẽng toog ka be ne-b ye. 
Proverbs29:8 M toog-ka-be rãmba zũndgda tẽnga, la nin-sõma wã n sigsd sũuri." 
Proverbs29:9 Yam soaba sã n bʋʋd ne yalma, a nong bɩ a gãnem a nenga, a nong bɩ a la, a kõn paam vʋʋsg ye." 
Proverbs29:10 Sẽn nong-a zɩɩm daagre pa nong nin-sõng ye, la nin-sõma ket n baooda a zĩiga." 
Proverbs29:11 Yam kaoolg soaba basdame tɩ sũ-noog buud fãa yamleoog yõk-a; wakat buud fãa yam soab toẽ-la a menga. 
Proverbs29:12 Naab sã n kelgd zirẽ-be-neda, a tãnsoaben-dãmba fãa lebgda bi-beese." 
Proverbs29:13 Naong soaba la sẽn maand-a zãmbo, wẽnda taaba. Wẽnd kõo bãmb b yiiba fãa nina vẽenem." 
Proverbs29:14 Dĩm sã n bʋʋd naong rãmba ne zemsgo, a naam zaoore vigla zamaana n dabd zamaana." 
Proverbs29:15 Dasaare la saglgo wata ne yam sõngo; biig sẽn bas ne a meng bala lebgda a ma yãnde. 
Proverbs29:16 Nin-wẽns sã n so kãsengo, yel-wẽna kɩɩda yẽgna, la nin-sõma nini na yãend b lʋɩɩse." 
Proverbs29:17 Sɩbg f biiga n zãag f meng ne yɩɩr buud fãa la f paam sũ-noogo. 
Proverbs29:18 Bãngd sã n ka tẽngẽ, ned kam maanda a sẽn date; la sẽn deegd-a noor la zu-noog soaba." 
Proverbs29:19 Yamb zʋgo ka tekd ne goam bal ye: a tõe n wʋmame n yaool n ka reeg ye. 
Proverbs29:20 F yãee ned sẽn nong goama, ad yalem kelgre n são ne yõodo." 
Proverbs29:21 Fo sã n põneg f yamba t'a paooda, a wat n yɩɩ kʋɩɩma." 
Proverbs29:22 Sũ-pu-ned wata ne zaba, tɩ sũur sẽn yiki maanda yel-wẽn n yɩlemdẽ." 
Proverbs29:23 Wilg-m-meng takda kʋɩdgre, sẽn sulg a meng paamdame t'a zug zẽke." 
Proverbs29:24 Sẽn naag-a wagdre n pʋɩt a teedo kisa a menga, t'a wʋmda b sẽn kãabd-a beedo, la a pa lukd a bãong ye." 
Proverbs29:25 Fo sã n digd rabeem neb taoore, fo yõka f meng n kõ. Fo sã n teeg Wẽnnaam f zĩi ne laafi." 
Proverbs29:26 Wʋsg ratame tɩ dĩma nif teeg-ba la Wẽnd bala n tõe n dol wala sẽn segde. 
Proverbs29:27 Nin-sõma sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa yaa nin-wẽnga. Nin-wẽns sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa yaa nin-sõngo. 
Proverbs30:1 Wã yaa a Yake biig a Agur goama: bãngd goama. A Agur goma ne a Itiyɛl, a Itiyɛl la a Ukal." 
Proverbs30:2 N-ye, maan la dũni wã fãa yalma, n ka tar ninsaal yam ba bilfu." 
Proverbs30:3 Mam ka tʋlg yam vẽenem ye, Wẽnd bãngra la m tʋlg yã." 
Proverbs30:4 Ãnda n dʋ yĩngri n lɛɛg n sigi? Ãnda n kogl a nusin kok pemsem, ãnda n yondg a fuugu n yõng koom? Ãnda n kɩʋʋlem tẽngã, a taoor la a yaanga? A yʋʋr la bõe, a biig yʋʋr la a bõe, fo miime?" 
Proverbs30:5 Wẽnd goama fãa kõt-b-la kaseto. Ned ninga fãa sẽn soonda Wẽnd maasmẽ paama a gãongo. 
Proverbs30:6 Da paas bũmb b goamẽ wã ye tɩ b na n zaba ne-fo, la b ges-fo wa zirẽ-be-neda." 
Proverbs30:7 Bũmb a yiib la m kot yãmba, Soaala, kõ-y-ma tɩ m nan ket n vɩ." 
Proverbs30:8 Zãag-y-m ne zirẽ-beedo la pʋ-lika. Da kõ-y-m arzɛka, da kõ-y-m naong ye. Bas-y-m tɩ m rɩ m pʋɩɩr n zemse;" 
Proverbs30:9 m sã n dɩ tɩ looge m wat n yik n basa yãmba la m gomd woto: «Soaala la ãnda?» Ka rẽ bɩ m naonga kẽes-m wagdem tɩ m sãam m Wẽnda yʋʋre. 
Proverbs30:10 Da kãneg yamba ne a zu-soab ye, tɩ yãmba na n wa kãab-f lame tɩ tũ." 
Proverbs30:11 Neb n be n kãabd b ba la b yãkd b ma zaka. 
Proverbs30:12 Neb n be n yet tɩ b ka tar yell ye, tɩ b wẽnema yaool n nan ka pek ye." 
Proverbs30:13 Neb n be n sãbsd b taaba, b nina kʋɩɩme, nina ka kamsd ye." 
Proverbs30:14 Neb n be tɩ b yẽna ya zãngoeego, tɩ b noora ya sʋʋga, tɩ b tar n wãbd nin-koam dãmba la naong rãmba." 
Proverbs30:15 Rendeoogo tara kom-pugli a yiibu: a wa ne, la a wa ne yɛsa. Bũmb a tãab n be n ka tɩgd ye, t'a naas soaba zɩ n yeele tɩ sekame ye:" 
Proverbs30:16 Yaa bʋg-tẽnga, pʋg-kiiri, tẽng sẽn zĩ ne ware, bugum sẽn zɩ n yeele: m tɩgame." 
Proverbs30:17 Nif sẽn sãag ba, nif sẽn sãbsd ma-pʋg-yãanga, kʋɩlsa noorẽ gãabdo la yĩngr sɩlse n na feoog nif kãnga." 
Proverbs30:18 Bũmb a tãab n yɩɩd mam yam, la a naas soaba m ka tar a sor ye:" 
Proverbs30:19 sɩlg sẽn tũud sor ning yĩngri, waaf sẽn tũud sor ninga pĩig zugu, koom-koglg sẽn tũud sor ninga mogr zugu n paas rogem buka." 
Proverbs30:20 Pʋg-yoodre maanda woto: a rɩtame, n yẽes a noore n yetẽ: m ka maan wẽng ye." 
Proverbs30:21 Bũmb a tãab n yɛɛsd tẽnga, la a naas soaba la a ka tõe n tʋke:" 
Proverbs30:22 yem-daoog sẽn lebg dĩma, yalem sẽn paamde n dɩt n tɩgda;" 
Proverbs30:23 bi-pugl neb fãa sẽn kis sẽn paam sɩda, roog-biiga sẽn deeg a roog ma zĩiga." 
Proverbs30:24 Bũmb a naas n be tẽng zugu n paoodẽ n yaool n tar yam n yɩɩd yẽesem dãmba fãa: 
Proverbs30:25 Yaa gũuri, a paooda, la sɩpaolgo a tigsda a rɩɩbo." 
Proverbs30:26 Yaa marawa, nao paooda la b rot yaa pĩis bogdo." 
Proverbs30:27 Sʋya: b ka tar naab ye, la b pa yɩgd yaar ye." 
Proverbs30:28 Bõnpoaka, kamb sẽn digd n yõgda, la a yaool n gãee dĩm dãmb zakẽ." 
Proverbs30:29 Bũmb a tãabo n sakd gesgo, la a naas soaba m mi kẽnde:" 
Proverbs30:30 yaa bõnyẽega, yẽ la sũur soaba rũmsã fãa sʋka, bũmb ka tõe t'a tar ye;" 
Proverbs30:31 yaa no-raoogo, sẽn tabgd naam tabgre noosa sʋka: yaa pe-raoogo sẽn lʋɩt piisa taoore le paasa dĩma a sã n wa kõta a soolma rãmb a koɛɛga." 
Proverbs30:32 Fo yalemdã sã n da kɩtame tɩ f baood n na zẽk f menga, la marsã f tagsame tɩ yaa wẽnga, dik f nugu n pĩ f noore." 
Proverbs30:33 Bĩisim sã fɩre n yooge, kella kaam; yõor sã n deeg wẽedo, a yũnda zɩɩm, sũur sẽn fõta bolgda zabre." 
Proverbs31:1 Woto yaa yelbũna Maasa dĩma, a Lemuwɛl, sẽn zãms a ma nengẽ:" 
Proverbs31:2 M biiga, m bi-nongre, biig m sẽn tʋlg ne m sũur fãa!" 
Proverbs31:3 Da sɛɛs f pãng ne pagb ye, da rɩk f menga n bas ne sẽn wãada dĩm dãmb ye." 
Proverbs31:4 Bũmb sẽn ka segd ne dĩma, Lemuwɛl, bũmb sẽn ka segd wa fãa-fãa, yaa rãam yũubu; ka segd tɩ dĩm-bi wã nong toos ye." 
Proverbs31:5 B wat n yũume n yĩm noy niynsi sẽn yalse, b wat n tudgame tɩ nin-koam fãa paad bʋʋd zĩigẽ." 
Proverbs31:6 B bao rã-toose n kõ sẽn dɩk b kũum sore, b bao rãam n kõ sẽn zĩ-a ne sũ-toogo," 
Proverbs31:7 t'a yũ n kiis a yɩɩre, n yĩma a sũ-sãanga." 
Proverbs31:8 Yaag f noore n gom muk zĩigẽ, yaag f noore n sõng sẽn ka tar-a sõangda." 
Proverbs31:9 Yaag noore n kao bʋʋd sẽn ya tɩrse, n kao nimbãan-dãmba la naong rãmb bʋʋdo." 
Proverbs31:10 *Ad tõog n yãend pag sẽn pid pag yaa toogo; a bee yamleogo n yɩɩd muizãan neeba fãa. 
Proverbs31:11 *Bɩ a sɩd teeg-a zãng zãnga, bɩ a sɩd dɩ a yõodo." 
Proverbs31:12 *Ka sũ-sãang la a na n seg ye, na n yɩɩ sũ-noog beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Proverbs31:13 *Dɩk gendre n wĩ lamdo, dĩng beren-dɩgre bɩ pe-kõbd gĩsi la a tʋʋmde, la tʋʋmda tʋmda ne minim." 
Proverbs31:14 *Ey! Ad-y yaa nanamsa dɩ-noodã la a na n segl n kõ a zak rãmba. Yaa wa pʋg-sõnga paama koom kogend n zɩlgd a koodã n watẽ. 
Proverbs31:15 *Fooda kallã tɩ zĩig nan pa yẽeg ye, n segl dɩɩbo a zak rãmb yĩnga, n wilg a roog kamba fãa b tʋʋmde." 
Proverbs31:16 *Gese, a wa n tʋlga pʋʋgo la a ra-a lame; a yiisa a meng ligdi, n kɩt tɩ b sel tɩɩse." 
Proverbs31:17 *Israyɛl bi-pugla sẽbga a kalle, a wilga a nug pãnga." 
Proverbs31:18 *La a sẽn ne a tʋʋmda yõodã, beoog vẽegdame t'a fitil yaool n kiisi." 
Proverbs31:19 *Ma sõnga yãenda sõore n dɩka a gendre, n sɩng wĩibu." 
Proverbs31:20 *Naong rãmba yĩnga, a puka a nusi n kõ rɩɩbo; a tuda a nug nimbãan-dãmba." 
Proverbs31:21 *Õ-õ! A zak rãmb kõn dig waood ye, ned kam fãa yera fut a yiib-yiibu." 
Proverbs31:22 *Pʋg-sõnga wʋga fu-gobse a meng yĩnga, a yera gormuska la nufa." 
Proverbs31:23 *Rao a ye la b sõt tẽnga nin-bɛd sʋka, yaa a sɩdã la a zug zẽkame." 
Proverbs31:24 *Sẽbdse la paga le wʋgd n koosdẽ, n paas peen neeb buud toor-toore." 
Proverbs31:25 *Tɩgr la a kẽes a zakẽ, dabeem ka beoog yĩng ye, la a yeelga pãng la ziir n kẽnda." 
Proverbs31:26 *Ur daoã yagenga yaagda a noor ne gũusgu, a zelemda goama yaa sõmblem goama." 
Proverbs31:27 *Vɩɩm kõata mi-la a zak rãmb gãaga la b sõasg zĩiga, a ka sak a ya kʋɩɩma la a rɩtẽ ye." 
Proverbs31:28 *Wʋsg yikame n kils a zu-noogo, b sɩd yikame n kils a sõmblem." 
Proverbs31:29 *Yaang la taoor pagba sẽn tʋm b tʋʋm bɛdã ad foom n loog b fãa gilli! 
Proverbs31:30 *Zĩ ne faong yaa zaalem, tar neerem yaa zaalem, sẽn toga ne pẽgre, yaa pag sẽn zoet Wẽnde." 
Proverbs31:31 Bɩ a sɩd la a kamb rɩ a tʋʋma yõodo, bɩ a tʋʋma wa ne a pẽgre. Zamaan ne zamaana!" 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Zerizalɛɛm dĩm a Daviid biig, a Kowelɛt, karen-saamb kõn yɛ ne kareng soab, a Kowelɛt, goam la woto." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ka yõod ne ka yõodo, a Kowelɛt n yete, ka yõod ne ka yõodo, bũmba fãa yaa ka yõodo sẽn pid ne ka yõodo." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ninsaal sẽn namsd a meng namsg ninga, wĩndga tẽngrã, bõe yõod la a rɩt a pʋgẽ?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Zamaan kãnga loogdame, tɩ zamaan a to wa, tɩ tẽng ket a zĩigẽ daar faa." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Wĩndg pukdame, wĩndg kẽedame: a sẽn yi zĩig ninga la a yãgd n dat n lebe." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Sobgo teesda rɩtgo n wẽneg n tees goabga, n gilim n gilim n le rɩk a sore, n ket n tar gilgri." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Kʋɩlsa fãa zoet n dabda mogrẽ, la mogre ka pit ye, tɩ kʋɩls ket n zoetẽ bala n tar kẽnde, b sẽn teesẽ zaamẽ wã, be la b le teesd rũnna." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Bũmba fãa wata ne yam yiisgu, bũmba fãa togs n sɛɛme. Nif kõn tɩg gesg ye, tubr kõn tɩg kelgr ye." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Sẽn yɩ pĩnda na n le yɩɩme, tɩ sẽn maan pĩnda le maane. Bũmb ka be saaga tẽngre t'a taar pa reng n zĩnd ye." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 D sã n wa yãend bũmb n yeele: «Wã yaa yell sãanga,» d bãng tɩ reng n zĩnda al daar zãra, pĩnd zamaanẽ wã." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Tõnd yĩmda d yaab rãmb sẽn yãende. Ad-y sẽn na n wa-b tõnd poorẽ wã ka na n bas bũmbu b yagensa sẽn na n yõdg n tẽeg n gomd ye. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Maam, a Kowelɛt, mam yii Israyɛl Dĩm, Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Mam maaga m meng ne yam kãsenga, n ges neere bũmb fãa sẽn maand saaga tẽngre. Mik waa! Yaa tʋʋm toog bala la Wẽnnaam rɩk n tãng ninsaalba. Yaa tʋʋmd sẽn dat gũusgu la b kõ Adem biisi." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Mam maaga m menga n ges bũmbã fãa sẽn maande, saaga tẽngre, la ade, bũmb ba a ye ka yõod ye, la yaa wudg n bir sobgo." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Sẽn golem ka tõe n yɩ tɩrga; sẽn yãk me ka tõe n le sõd n naag ye. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 M tẽedame tɩ dĩm niyns fãa sẽn deng b maam Zerizalɛɛma, ba a ye ka paam yam vẽenem wala maam ye. M paama yam vẽenem la bãngr kãsenga vɩɩma poorẽ." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Mam maaga m menga n welg yam vẽenem soaba la gãeenga, n welg sẽn wẽnd yam bũmbu ne sẽn wẽnd yalemdo. M bãnga tʋʋmd ning m sẽn kõ m menga sẽn wẽnd a soaba: yaa wudg n bir sobgo bala." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Yam wʋsgo wata ne sũ-sãang wʋsgo. Sẽn paas-a a bãngre paasa a naongo. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Mam da kõo m meng yam kãnga: yik n maan f yamleoogo, loog n dɩ naare! La kato! Dẽ me yaa wudg n kok zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 M waa n leoka laad poorẽ tɩ yaa yalemdo! N leok yĩng sũ-noog poorẽ tɩ m pa yãend a sẽn paasd bũmb ning ye. 
Ecclesiastes2:3 M kaoola m sũurẽ tɩ m na n tɩgsa m yĩnga ne rãam, n kaool tɩ m kõn bas n yẽesma zãng yẽ ye. La baasgo n na maan yalemdo sẽn zems bala, m bãng bõe n tog ne Adem biig a tẽng zug vɩɩm koɛɛga pʋgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 La mam maana sẽn labsa. M yik n mee roto, m sela bugsuntungu," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 m koo zẽedo, n sel tɩɩse. M sela tɩɩs sẽn womd biisi, buud toor-toore." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 M tuu bãgse n tõog n zãgs m tɩ bõonese sẽn piuug wa googo. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 M daa yem-daado la yem-posge; m baoo sõgen-kamba la rũmsi, m niis la m piis sõor yɩɩ ka tɛka. M yɩɩga sẽn deng-b maam Zerizalɛɛma fãa." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 M baoo arzɛka n zame, wanzurf la sãnem. M deeg-b-la dĩm dãmb kẽere nengẽ, b soolem dãmb nengẽ. M baoo yɩɩn-yɩɩndba, dapa la pagba. M paama paga, m paasa pagb wʋsgo, la rẽ la Adem biis sẽn pẽgd wa fãa-fãa wã." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 M lebga nin-kãsenga, m lebga arzɛk soaba, m yɩɩga sẽn deng-b maam Zerizalɛɛm. Yam vẽenem ning m sẽn paama n sõng-m." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Mam gesa m nini sẽn tʋlg n ges bũmb ninga fãa, la m ka mong m sũurã sũ-noog ba a ye. M sũur yɩɩ noogo ne m tʋʋmda fãa, dẽ n yɩ yõod ninga m sẽn dɩ, m tʋʋma pʋgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 La mam gesa m nus sẽn tʋm tʋʋm ninsa fãa; m gesa naong ning m sẽn namsã, la ayo! Dẽ fãa ka yõod ye, la yaa wudg n bir sobgo; ad-y yõod ka be saaga tẽngr ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 M tʋlgame n bãng yõoda sã n bee yẽesmẽ wã n yɩɩd gãeemdẽ la yalemdẽ. M tʋlgame n bãng ned ninga sẽn na n dʋ zaoora mam poorẽ wã manesma sã n na n yɩɩ toore. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Sɩda m miime tɩ yam vẽenema n são yalemdã wa m sẽn mi tɩ vẽenem n são likã. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Sẽn tar-a yaam nee a sẽn dabdẽ la yalma babendame n baood a sore. Yaa sɩda! La mam miime tɩ bãmb b yiib fãa baasg na n yɩ-la a ye. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tɩ mam yet m sũuri: gãeeng baasgo sẽn yaa a soaba, mam me baasgo yɩta boto, dẽ yĩnga, m yẽesmã yõod be yɛ marsã? La mam yeta m sũurẽ tɩ rẽ me m ka tar võor ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Yam soab woo, gãeeng woo, b sẽn tẽegda a soab yell n kaoos ka ye, beoog ne a na n vẽege tɩ yĩma bãmb b yiib yelle; yam soab na n wa kii wala yalma la neba pa na n tẽeg a ye yelle n yɩɩg a to ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 La yɛla sẽn ya woto wã, m yam ka be ne m vɩɩma baa bilfu; tɩ sẽn maan fãa saaga tẽngre pa tat m yam ye, la bũmb fãa yaa ka yõodo, yaa wudg n bir sobgo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Mam kisga tʋʋmda ne a naongã a sẽn pids m vɩɩma tẽng zug ka, la rẽ yaa m sẽn ne tɩ yaa tɩlɛ tɩ m wa bas-a ne sẽn na n deega mam zĩigã." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ãnd n mi la ãnda n tõe n bãnge a na n yɩɩ yẽesem soaba, bɩ gãeenga? Yẽnda n yaool n na n wa soog yõodo, m tʋʋmdã m sẽn tʋm saaga tẽngrã ne yama yõodo. Dẽ me yaa bũmb m sẽn ka wʋmd a võore." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Woto marsã la m waa n dat n bas raoodo, ne m tẽng zug tʋʋma fãa." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ges-y ned sẽn tʋm a tʋʋna ne yam la minim tɩ sake, la yaool n yaa ned sẽn pa naag n tʋme, n na n deeg a pʋɩɩre. Ad-y m ka ne rẽ me yõod ye, yaa naong kãseng bala." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 La woto marsã, bõe n kees nin-kãnga yĩnga? A tʋʋm tooga ne a namsgã, a sẽn yãend a vɩɩma pʋgẽ, tẽng zug ka wã, bõe yõodo la a rɩkd a pʋgẽ?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Beoog sẽn vẽege, yaa namsg ne namsgo, tʋʋmda menga yaa sũ-sãanga, la yʋngo gõeem ka laafi gõeem ye. Dẽ me yõoda la bʋgo?" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Ninsaal raab yaẽ la a rɩẽ la a yũẽ la a lembẽ sũ-noogo ne a tʋʋmde. M neeme tɩ yaa Wẽnd me raabo. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ned sɩd ka be n tõe n dɩ la a noog a sũuri, Wẽnd sã n ka kõ-a ye." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Wẽnd kõta b sẽn dat a soab yam vẽenem, bãngre la sũ-noogo. B sẽn kõt yel-wẽnd maand tʋʋmd ninga yaa bao la a tigs nin-sõng yĩnga. Woto wã yel-wẽn-maanda yõodo ne sẽn bira zaalem yõod zem taaba." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Bũmb fãa bee ne a a wakato, la saaga tẽngre, wakato me bee bũmb kam fãa yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Dogem bee wakato tɩ kũum me be wakato. Sel tɩɩg bee wakat tɩ võog tɩɩg me be wakato. 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Kʋʋb bee wakato tɩ sãoogre me be wakato. Tus n lubi bee wakato tɩ meeb sɩngr be wakato. 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Yãbr ne a wakat, laad ne a wakat, kʋʋr kɛleng ne a wakat, saoog ne a wakat." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kug lobr ne a wakat, kug tigsgu ne a wakato. Yõk nug bee wakato, da yõk nug me be wakato." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Baoob bee wakato tɩ bao n kong me be wakato. Bũmb zãab bee wakato, a lobr me bee wakato." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Pãrg fuug bee wakato, t'a sẽeb me be wakato. Sĩndgu bee wakato tɩ goama me be wakato." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Zabr bee wakato, bas tɩ zabr sɛ me bee wakato." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Yõod bʋg la tʋʋmda soab rokd ne a tʋʋmna? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 M nee tʋʋm niyns fãa Wẽnd sẽn kõ ninsaal t'a tʋme. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Bãmb sẽn maan fãa zemsa ne a wakato. B basda ninsaala t'a ges zamaana sẽn tong taaba, n yaool n pa basd t'a wʋm bãmb sẽn maan bũmb niynsa võore, b sɩngre n tãag b baasgo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Mam miime tɩ ninsaal ka rat bũmb a to sã n ka a noog a sũuri la a pems ne vɩɩma yɩɩre. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ned sã n dɩtẽ la a yũuda, a sã n paamd sũ-noog a tʋʋmd fãa pʋgẽ, a bãng tɩ rẽ yaa Wẽnd kũuni." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mam miime tɩ Wẽnnaam sẽn yalse yalsa wakat fãa yĩnga. Bũmb ka be sẽn na n paase, bũmb me ka be sẽn na woog ye. Wẽnd kɩtdame tɩ b rigd rabeem b taoore." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Sẽn be zoe n zĩndame, la sẽn na n yɩ, zoe n zĩndame. Wẽnd na n sokame la b sɩbg sẽn looge." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ad-m sẽn le maag m meng n ges la m sẽn yãend tẽng zugu: wẽnem n dɩt naam tɩ sẽn da toga ne bʋʋd paalgr põsd bʋʋd toogo. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Tɩ mam yeel m sũurẽ: Wẽnnaam n na n kao nin-sõng ne nin-wẽng bʋʋdo, tɩ bũmb fãa bee ne a wakato la d yɛla toor-toorã na n waa Bʋʋda taoore." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Sã n ya ne ninsaalba, m tẽedame tɩ Wẽnd dat n fɛɛs-b lame la woto b bãngdame tɩ b yaa wa rũmsa bala." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 La sɩd me, ninsaal baasgo ne rũng baasgo yaa a ye; yãoo soaba kida woto, tɩ yãoo soaba ki boto. Rũng ne ninsaala, bãmb b yiiba fãa yaa vʋʋsma a ye, la ninsaal sẽn yɩɩd rũng ne bũmb ninga, m sɩd ka ne a yõod ye, tɩ bũmba fãa yaa ka yõod ne ka yõodo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Bãmb b yiib fãa teesda zĩ yɛnga; fãa yita tomẽ la fãa lebda tomẽ. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ned ba a ye ka tõe n yeele tɩ ninsaalba sẽn vʋʋsd n vɩ wã, bãmb vʋʋsma lebda yĩngri, tɩ rũmsa rẽnd lebd tẽng ye." 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Mam neeme tɩ ninsaal sũ-noog yaa a kɩdem a tʋʋma yĩnga; tɩ rẽ yaa ninsaal pʋɩɩre. Ãnna n na n tall-a t'a lɛɛg n wa ges sẽn yõdg n maan a poorẽ? 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Mam le nee pãng ning neb sẽn maand taaba, saaga tẽngre. D nee neb kẽer nintãm sẽn dʋʋgde tɩ b zĩi n pa tar belsd ye. N-ye! Pãnga rãmb maand-b-la pãnga la belgd ka ye." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Woto la m yam be kɩɩmsa pẽgre n yɩɩd nin-vɩɩse. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 La m sẽn pẽgd a soab n yɩɩda, yaa b sẽn nan ka naan a soaba, woto a ka mi yel-beed ning sẽn tʋʋmd saaga tẽngr ye." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Mam neeme tɩ tʋʋmde sã n tʋme la a sakame, a sẽn wat ne bũmb ninga yaa neb maand sũ-kiir ne taaba. La rẽ me yaa dig sobg n biri." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Yalma nug zoeta tʋʋmde t'a rɩt bõne, n wãad a menga;" 
Ecclesiastes4:6 la m tẽed tɩ vʋʋsg sẽn ka zem bũmbu, n ka pit nug-koore sãoo tʋʋm-tãnde sẽn ka bũmb a to n zʋʋg rig sobg n bri." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Mam le nee bũmb a to sẽn ka yõod saaga tẽngre. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Ges nin-kãnga, a yaa a ye, a ka tar tũud-n-taag ye, a ka tar biiga, a ka tar kẽem bɩ yao ye; a tʋʋmda ka be vʋʋsg wakat ye, arzɛka bal la a tar pʋgbo, ad-y m na sok n gese yaa bõe yĩng la a tʋmda, la a mongd a meng sũ-noogo? Sɩda m ka ne rẽ me yõod ye, yaa zãngr-bõne." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Neb a yiibu sẽn be ne taaba, dẽ n são, f sã n tʋmd f ye, woto me la tʋʋmda tõe n zĩnd yõodo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ned a ye lʋɩ yã, a to na yiki. La ned sẽn kẽnd a ye sã n lʋɩ, yaa yell n paam-a, tɩ ned ka be sẽn na n tak a t'a yik ye." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Yãmb y yiib naag taab gãag a ye, y yĩng na wɩnge la f sã n ya f yembre, f yĩng na n wɩnga wãn wãna?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ned sã n yaa a ye b tõe n yõk-a lame n lubi; b sã n yaa b yiibu, a yiib lubri pa naana ye, la gĩs a tãab sẽn kalem taab n dĩng pa kaood tao tao ye." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Bi-bɩɩg sẽn ya naong soaba la yẽesenga são nin-kẽem sẽn ya dĩm n ka le reegd ned saglgo. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ba bi-bɩɩga sã n yii bi-bees roogo n wa reeg naama dẽ n são. Ba a sã n dag n yaa bõasa, n wa lebg dĩma, dẽ n são." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 M yãeeme tɩ sã n ya yell a woto n be, neba fãa yik n dat bi-bɩɩga ne naama n yɩɩd ned a to wã." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Dĩm kʋdga yaool n da rɩta naam neb ka tɛk zugu. Yẽ sẽn na n loog n bas b rãmba tõe n wa yĩma a yell fas. La rẽ me yõod la bõe sã n ka wudg n bir sobgo? 
Ecclesiastes4:17 F rigd wẽnd doogẽ bɩ f gũus f nao-kẽndre. F raaba yɩ kẽ n kelge. Dẽ n são kolg ne maando wa gãeemsa sẽn maande n yaool n ka mi tɩ rẽ ka segd ye. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Da yãg ne goam ye. La f da yãg tao-tao n pʋlem f pʋlen-bɛd Wẽnnaam taoor ye. Tɩ Wẽnnaam be yĩngri tɩ fo be tẽnga. Bɩ goama gom n zemse. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 F sã n gomd wʋsgo, f tõeeme n ka tags tɩ sek ye. Yaa wala ned sẽn zĩi n yɩɩdẽ sẽn tõe n zãms yoodo." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 F sã n pʋlem Wẽnnaam bũmbu, bɩ f ning pãnga n pids f pʋleng tao, tɩ Wẽnnaam pa nong yalemd ye. Pids f kãabgo." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Da pʋlme n são f sẽn pʋlemd n pa pidsi. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Maan gũusgu, tɩ f noor gomd da wa kɩt tɩ f menga tõre dɩ taale, la f da wa yeel maan-kʋʋdã tɩ f tudgame ye. Ad goam a woto tõe n puuga Wẽnd sũuri tɩ f sẽn tʋlg neera wa lebg zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Goam pererr ne ta yʋng n zãmsd zãmsd ka tɛka zem taab ne yõodo. Woto wã ges n lʋɩɩs Wẽnd waoogra taoore. 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Fo sã n wa yãe tɩ tẽnga pʋgẽ b namsda naong soaba, la b kaood bʋʋdo n ka yɛs n get ãnna n so bʋʋm, n pa baood sɩda, bɩ f ra maan wa ling-f lame ye. Ad nin-kãseng n be nin-kãseng zugu, tɩ bɛd-bɛd me le be bãmb zugu." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Tẽngã n waa n tɩ gal ne yõodo, tɩ dĩma meng teega pʋtã." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Sẽn nong-a ligdi, ligdi pa sekd-a ye; sẽn dat-a naare arzɛk pa paad a nugẽ ye. Dẽ me ka võor ye." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Rɩɩba sẽn nar zĩig ninga, ad rɩtb tigimdta taab be zembala. La bõe la dɩɩba soab paamd a arzɛka pʋgẽ sã n ka nina gesg yamleoogo bala?" 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Sẽn nong-a tʋʋmd soab gõeem noma, a rɩ n tɩge t'a pa rɩ n tɩge; la arzɛk soab pʋg pitame tɩ gõeem yaool n pa sakd-a ye." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Mam le yãeta yell a to saaga tẽngre sẽn pa zems baa bilfu: yaa arzɛk sẽn bĩngi t'a na n yaool n wa wã a soaba. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Yel-beedo n wat n sɛɛs arzɛka gilli. A sã n dog biiga a ka basd a nug ne bũmb ye. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Ned dogda bɩlgemde n na n loog bɩlgemde wala a sẽn wa bɩlgemde, t'a tʋʋmnã pʋgẽ, a pa rɩkd bũmb n tall n loog ye." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Yell kãng me ka zemsg baa bilfu, fo sẽn lebd bɩlgemde, wala f sẽn dog bɩlgemdã, bõe yõod la f rɩk yã, f sẽn tʋme, f bira sobg bala!" 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Dẽ pʋgẽ me beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, pɛt bala n tar foom la sũ-sãang la yɩɩre la bãase la sũ-toogo." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Ade, sũ-noog ninga sẽn tog ne ninsaala m sẽn yãende, yaa a rɩ la a yũ, yaa a rɩ yõod ne tʋʋma fãa a sẽn tʋmd tẽng zugã; tɩ zems ne Wẽnd sẽn kõ a dasem sõor ninga, tɩ rẽ la a pʋɩɩre." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 La f sã n zãad arzɛka, n zãad paoongo, f sã n paam n dɩt f tʋʋma yõodo la f kɩdemnẽ, ad rẽ yaa Wẽnd kũuni." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ninsaal ka le tagsd a pʋlemdã sõor tɛka, Wẽnnaam sã n yãmb a sũurã ne sũ-noogo ye." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Wẽng a to n be tẽng zug ka tĩ mam maag m meng n get-a la a rɩta ninsaala. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Yaa wala ned a yembre Wẽnnaam sẽn tʋʋg-a ligdi, arzɛk la waoogre; bũmb ka le be a soab sẽn na n tʋlg ye. Tɩ Wẽnnaam wa yaool n pa bas a soab t'a soog la a rɩ ye; bãmb kɩtdame tɩ ned a to, tɩ sãan menga, wa reeg a zĩig n dɩ. Dẽ me yaa bõe n zʋʋg bir sobgo." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ned sã n dog kom-dibli la kom-pugli koabga, n vɩ yʋʋn kʋʋma, tɩ ba a yʋʋma sõor sẽn zemb bũmb ninga, bɩ a ka tɩg ne sũ-noogo, la a ka paam tɩ b mum-a wa sẽn segde, ad-y pa-tar menga lɛɛg n são yẽnda." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Pa-tar sũ-noog n yɩɩd-a, t'a soos n waa likẽ, n le soos n leb likẽ, la yẽ me yʋʋr na n kell n paa likẽ." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 A nif pa yãend wĩntoog vẽenem, a ka mi a sẽn ya-la, yẽ n são ne laafi vʋʋsgo," 
Ecclesiastes6:6 n yɩɩd sẽn vɩɩnd-a yʋʋm tus a yi menga la a me ka yãend sũ-noogo. D sẽn tees n dabd zĩig ninga sɩd yaa zĩ yɛng bala. 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ned namsdame n na n paam n kõ a noore, t'a pʋg ket n kũmnẽ t'a pa tɩgd ye." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Sẽn tar-a yam me pa são yalem ye. A sẽn mi dabaare n lut a bãonga yõod la bʋgo? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 F sẽn na n noog f sũuri ne f sẽn tare n são f sẽn na n bas tɩ f sũur pʋgd bũmb yõod sẽn ka yɩɩd bir sobg ye. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Yaa daar zãra la b mi ninsaala t'a ka rũnda sãan ye. Ad-a kõn saag n wẽ no-koeemde ne sẽn yɩɩd-a ye. 
Ecclesiastes6:11 D sã n wẽed no-koeemde, la d goama meng sẽn maneg n lebgd gom-vɩɩdo. B yõoda la bʋgo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ninsaal vɩɩma loogda wa sulunsuku. Ãnd n mi a sẽn tog n maan bõn-sõng ning n yɩɩda ne vɩɩm koɛɛg a woto buudu? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Yʋ-noog são ka-noog sẽn daad toogo, tɩ kũum daar são dogem daare." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kẽ kũum zakẽ são f sẽn kẽed kibs sẽn dɩt zĩig ninga, tɩ ninsaal fãa baasgo na n yɩɩ boto, la kũum zakẽ sẽn vɩ-a ne yõor fãa bɩɩsda a tagsgo." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Yãbre são laado; yãbr wata ne nen-gãnenga la a pekda sũuri. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Yam yẽesem soaba la b segd sũ-sãanga zakẽ, yalem la b segd sũ-noog yiri." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kelg yẽesem soab saglgo são yalma pẽgr yɩɩl kelgre. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Gãeeng laad sẽn wẽnd bũmb ninga, bãng tuud sẽn dɩt bugum yɩgrẽ la b pusdẽ. La sẽn ka be võor n yɩɩda," 
Ecclesiastes7:7 yaa pãn-tõog sã n lobgd yam soab gãeemdo, tɩ kũun sẽn kõt menesd a pʋ-peelem." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Baas neer são sɩng neere. Maag-m-menga n são wilg-m-menga. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Da yãg n puug f sũur ye, tɩ yalem sũuri n puugd tao-tao." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 D da sok yaa bõe yĩnga la zaamẽ são rũnna ye. Sokr a woto buud ka segd ye. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Yẽesem nooma wa buud pʋɩɩre la a nafda sẽn be a tẽng zugu ka. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Yẽesem sõngda wala ligdi n ligind yɛla. Yẽesem rõnegda vɩɩm dẽ me la paam-a la bãng n sog-a tar yõodo. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ges Wẽnnaam tʋʋma. Ãnna n tõe n tẽeg Wẽnd sẽn põde? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Kɩdeng daar bɩ f noog f sũuri, la ko-yũud daare bɩ f tagse: ad Wẽnnaam n maan bãmb b yiibã fãa la ninsaala ka tõe n yãg n bãng bõe n na n lʋɩ taoore, t'a to pʋg ye." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Mam vɩɩma ne a ya koɛɛga, ad-m paam n bãngame tɩ d tõe n sega fãa. Nin-sõng sẽn kiid ne a sẽn yaa nin-sõngã, tɩ nin-wẽng ket ne yõore ne a sẽn yaa nin-wẽngã." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Gũus n da mams f meng wa nin-sõng tɩ yõsg ye, la f da maan tɩ foom n tar yẽesem tɩ loog ye. F bõnda f meng bõe yĩnga?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Da maan wẽnem tɩ loog ye, da yɩ yalem ye. Bõe yĩng la f na n ki tɩ nan pa ta?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Togame tɩ d gãd sagls a yiibã. Sẽn waoogd-a Wẽnde ka kongd a sẽn na n yalsẽ ye. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Yẽesem kõta yẽesem soaba vẽenem n yɩɩd tẽn-soaben-dãmb piiga sẽn get tẽng a ye yelle. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ninsaal ka be tẽng zug t'a sõmblema sek a vɩɩnd neere n ka tol n tudg bada ye. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ka tog tɩ d gãd wa sɩd menga neba sẽn gomd goabg la rɩtga ye. Ka rẽ f na wʋm tɩ b yet tɩ f dakõor gomda beed f poorẽ. 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Naoor a wãna la f meng rɩ kaseto tɩ f wɩta f taaba? 
Ecclesiastes7:23 M gesa dẽ fãa ne gũusgu n tẽed tɩ m na paam yam vẽenem la m neeme t'a paoong yaa toogo. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Tõnd sẽn ne bũmb ning marsã wã yita sẽn zulmẽ. A yita al yɩɩga. Yɩlẽ n wʋm a võor zãng yaa toogo. 
Ecclesiastes7:25 M nadga pãnga ne gẽesgo la vɛɛsgo. M tʋlgame n wʋm yɛla võore. M pa rat n dok zugẽ n bas sẽn tagem tẽngr tẽngra ye. M bãngame tɩ sẽn pʋgda wẽnga bɩ yalma, fãa wẽnda gãeemdo." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 M yãendame tɩ pag nina yaa wa bẽdgo la a sẽn wat ne sũ-sãang ninga yɩɩda kũum sẽn wat ne a soaba. Pag nina sũur yaa gãmbre t'a kams yaa loetse. Sẽn tũud-a Wẽnd daabo, yẽ soab põsdame. Yel-wẽnd maand yẽ paada a bẽdgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Woto la m yãe yã, a Kowelɛt n gomde, m sẽn waa n zĩnd n pʋg yɛla a yeyn-ye n na n bãng b võore tɩ baas n pa yãk neng ye." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Neb tusri sʋka mam yãeta dao sẽn tõe n bool tɩ yẽesem soaba. Pagba ka tɛka sʋka m baoo pag sẽn tog ne waoogre n konge. 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ad mam sẽn wʋm bũmb ninga: Wẽnnaam naana ninsaala t'a pʋg ya pɛɛlg fas la yaa ninsaal n yik n baood gõdem-gõdem. 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ned ka be n yet t'a tara yam vẽenem la a tara yell fãa buk ye. La bãng-y tɩ ned sã n tar yam vẽenem, a noor yõgemdame t'a nen-gãneng teeme." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Mam yeta foom, reeg dĩma noore. Tẽeg f sẽn kãab bũmb ning Wẽnd taoore." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Da yãg ne f lak n bas dĩma ye. Sã n mik t'a pa gomd n lebd fo sẽn datẽ bɩ f yõbge, bɩ f tar n leb poorẽ, tɩ yaa a sẽn data bal la a na n maane." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Dĩma gomd n so taoore. Ned pa tõe n sok-a yaa bõe la a maand woto ye. 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Sẽn deegd-a noore tɩlgda ne yel-beedo, la yẽesem soab mi a sũurẽ tɩ bũmb fãa tara a wakato la Wẽnd leokr na n waame." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 N-ye! Bũmb fãa bee ne a wakato, la ne a bʋʋdo, tɩ ninsaal wẽnem labsa." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ned ka mi sẽn wat beoog ye. Ãnda n na n wilg yɛla sẽn na n yɩ to-to? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ned ba a ye ka tar pãng n na n paas a vɩɩm la a tadg a kũum daar ye. Zabr daar sã n ta, ka tõe n le tare n leb poorẽ ye; la bi-beelem pa fãagd bi-bɛɛg ye." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 M maaga m meng n ges bũmb ninga fãa sẽn maand tẽng zugu la m yãeeme tɩ zamaan kãnga, ned n so a to. La ade, ned sã n so a to zamaan kãnga, yaa pãng bal la a maand-a n menesd a sũ-noogo." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Mam yãee b sẽn yãbd nin-wẽns kʋʋre; Zerizalɛɛm dãmb da yãet-b la wẽnd doogẽ ye, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb wẽneg n yĩma b vɩɩm wẽngã. La rẽ me yaa bũmb sẽn ka tũ sore." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Vɩɩm wẽng bʋʋd sẽn pa kaoode t'a soaba wẽneg n deeg a sɩbgra yĩnga, wʋsgo ka zoet wẽng maaneg ye." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nin-wẽng yɛl kɛga tõe n taa koabga me, la a yõor tõe n kell n yɩɩ woko. M miime tɩ wusg gãdame: tɩ sẽn mi-b Wẽnd waoogr bala la b zoet b nifu, n na n paam sũ-noogo; b sẽn sulg b mens Wẽnd taoora yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Nin-wẽng yẽ kõn paam sũ-noogo, la a kõn paas a yõor woglem ye, a na n looga wala sulunsuku, a na n kii pẽbgo a sẽn pa zoet Wẽnda yĩnga." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 La bõe la d yãeta tẽng zugu? Nin-sõma beeme tɩ b zãad-b wa nin-wẽnse, la nin-wẽens me beeme tɩ b yɛla kẽnd wa b sẽn date tɩ paamd sẽn togẽ ne nin-sõngo. M yetame tɩ rẽ me yaa a ye ne wudg n bir sobgo." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 La mam yẽ pẽgda sũ-noogo tɩ ninsaal yĩnga, bũmb ka be saaga tẽngr sẽn ya sõmbo sã n ka rɩ la f yũ la f noog f sũuri. Dẽ n tog n yãag-a la sõng-a a tʋʋmnẽ, a vɩɩma zãng, tẽng zug ka." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Mam modga m menga n bao yam vẽenem dãmba sẽn maand n paam yam vẽenem; m gesa ne gũusgu ninsaalba tʋʋm sẽn yaa a soab tẽng zugu. M yãendame tɩ ba d sã n tagsd wĩndg la yʋngo, n mong d nina gõeem," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 d ka tõe n bãng Wẽnd sẽn tʋmd to-to dũni wã pʋg ye. Ninsaalba tõe n namsame n bao la b kõn bãng fɩ. Neb niyns sẽn yet tɩ b paama yam vẽenema sã n gomd tɩ b miime, bãng-y tɩ b ket n ka tar a võor ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ad-y m ka mag n bas bũmb kɛɛng ye, m dɩka fãa m yamẽ la sẽn lebg vẽenega, yaa tɩ Wẽnd bala n so nin-sõma wã vɩɩm la b tʋʋma. Ninsaalba ka mi sã n yaa nonglem bɩ beem la b na n sege. B ka tõe n bãng rẽ b toor ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ket n yaa bõn-yɛnga ne nin-tɩrg la nin-wẽnga, ne pʋ-peelem soaba la nin-kʋʋda. Bũmb pa welg sẽn deegd-b noya ne sẽn pa reegd-b ye, sẽn kʋʋd-b maand la sẽn pa kʋʋd-b ye, sẽn yaa nin-sõngo ne yel-wẽn maand ye, sẽn pʋlma la sẽn pa pʋlma ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ninsaalba fãa yĩnga yaa so yɛng n tuki la rẽ me n wat ne yel-beedo. Ninsaalb maanda wẽnga, b raaba yaa wẽnga, la tallda woto n wa tãag b kũum." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ned ninga sẽn ket vɩ bala n tar saagre. Baag sẽn vɩ sãoo bõnyẽeg sẽn ki. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Sẽn vɩ-ba miime tɩ b na n kiime. Sẽn ki-ba ka mi fɩ. B ka le gũud fɩ tɩ b rʋʋ yĩmb-tãnga. 
Ecclesiastes9:6 B sẽn nong bũmb ninga, b sẽn kis bũmb ninga, b sẽn da zoet bũmb ning bõne, rẽ fãa sɛɛme. Bãmb ka le tõe n kẽes b toogo bũmb ning fãa sẽn maand saaga tẽngr ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Dẽ yĩnga, bɩ f rɩ f dɩɩbo, ne sũ-noogo, la f yũ f rãam ne yamleoogo, tɩ Wẽnnaam zoe n mi-la f pʋga, b zoe n mi-la f tʋʋma." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Daar fãa yeelg kibs futu la f zug da kong yũ-noog kaam ye. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Vɩɩnd f vɩɩm ne pag ninga f sẽn nongã, ka võor vɩɩma tɛka, Wẽnnaam sẽn kõ-f saaga tẽngre, tɩ rẽ la fo me pʋɩɩre, rẽ la f rolbo, f tẽng zug vɩɩm tooga rolbo." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Tʋʋmd ninga fãa f sẽn tõe n maane bɩ f maan-a wa f sẽn tõe tɛka, tɩ tʋʋmde, bɩ tagsgo, bɩ yam minim, bɩ yẽesem ka be kɩɩmkulgu f sẽn dabdẽ wã ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 M le yãenda yɛl a taab tẽng zug ka. Ad-y ka sẽn be-b tĩigã n wudgd n loog b taaba, la ka sẽn be-b sũuri n yɩɩd b taaba n maand raood zabrẽ ye. Ka sɩlem dãmbã n paamd n dɩlgd b vɩɩm ye. Sẽn tar-a rabaar ka lebgd arzɛk soab daar fãa ye. La mitba ka paamd waoogr daar fãa ye. Ned kam fãa tõe n sega zu-beedo." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ninsaal ka mi a zu-beed daar ye; wala zulung sẽn soosd n yõkd zĩma, tɩ bẽdgo yõkd luiila woto me la yell tiigda." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 M le yãenda bũmb a to sẽn be n sek toagsga, yaa yam vẽenem tʋʋma dũni wã pʋgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Tẽn-bila a ye n da be t'a neba pa waoogẽ ye, tɩ dĩm kãseng wa kaoog zabre n gũbg-a, n me lals bɛd-bɛda n pag-a." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 La naong soaba a ye sẽn tar yam n yaool da be tẽngã la a ra tõe n fãaga tẽngã, a yama yĩnga. La ned pa tags naong a woto soab yell ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Mam yetame tɩ yam yɩɩda pãnga la ad-b pa mi tɩ naong soaba bee yam ye, b pa waoogd-a-la b pa kelgd a goama ye." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Fo sẽn kelgd ned sẽn tar yẽesem la a gomd bʋg-bʋge, dẽ n são f sẽn kelgd dĩm sẽn porda ne yalemdo." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Yẽesem yɩɩda zab-teedo, tãbdo la logdo, la yel-wẽnd a ye tãa bala tõe n gɩdga bũmb wʋsgo manegre." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Yalemd bilf sãamda yẽesem la yʋ-sõngo, wa zõos bilfu sẽn ki sẽn sãamd yũ-noog kaam." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Yẽesem soaba togenda a meng so-sõngo la yalem gõod n tuumdame. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Yalem kẽnd sor zugu me yam ka ye, la a maandame tɩ neb fãa mi t'a yaa yalma." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Naab sã n yik mo-beed ne foom bɩ f da loog n bas f tuumd ye, tɩ maag-m-meng gɩdgda yel-wẽn wʋsgo." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Tẽng soaal tõe n tudgame. La m sɩd nee sẽn ka zemse tẽng zug ka. 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Yaa yalem sẽn paam zẽkre ne naam la waoogre, tɩ arzɛk rãmba sur tẽng ne yãnde." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Mam yãeta yem-daado tɩ b zombd wiidi n looda tɩ na-biis kẽnd ne nao wa yem-daado. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Sẽn tuud-a bulg loang n lʋɩt a pʋgẽ, sẽn lubd-a lalga, waaf tõe n kɛ-a lame," 
Ecclesiastes10:9 sẽn wʋkd-a kuga pogenda a menga tɩ sẽn kɛɛd, a raad me tõe n pogl a menga." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Lar sã n kong saasgo n pa rɩtẽ, modgre n be tɩ b kɛ ne pãnga, la yẽesem yõodo yaa tɩ bũmb fãa sakda a soab nugẽ." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 M mii saoolg waaf t'a são wã yõod la bʋgo, fo sã n bas tɩ waafa kɛ-fo?" 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Yẽesem dãmb noor sẽn yet bũmb ninga nooma sũuri, la yalem zelemde wata ne a sãbsgo." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 A goama sɩngre yaa yalemdo tɩ b baasgo ya zu-kaoolg meng-menga. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Yaa yalem n paasd goam ne goama. Ninsaal ka mi beoog yell ye, a maanda wãn n tõog n togs sẽn na n wa maan yẽ meng poorẽ?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Yalem tʋʋmd kõt-a-la yaamse, a ka mi sor ning sẽn dɩkd n kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ ye." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ad na pak yãmba, tẽnga rãmba, bi-bilfu sã n ya y dĩma tɩ kombɛɛmba sãt beoogo n tar dɩɩb bala." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Zu-noog tẽnga la tẽng ning sẽn tar dĩm sẽn dog ne naam t'a kombɛɛmba dɩt wakat sẽn zemse bala. B baood n na n paasa b pãnga n yɩɩd b tɩgs b mens ne rãam. 
Ecclesiastes10:18 F nus a yi wã sã n zãms kʋɩɩm, f roog bɛɛda ne ra-põaasa. Nus sã n pa le nong tʋʋmde, roog yũnda koom." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Nin-bɛda segenda rɩ-noogo n na n kiis b yɩɩre, la rãam kɩtdame tɩ vɩɩm yaa noogo, la ligdi sõngame tɩ f paamd f sẽn dat fãa." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Da wɩd dĩma f sũur pʋgẽ meng ye, da gom wẽng nin-kãseng poore ba ya nin-yend taoor ye. Tõe tɩ luiil deeg f gomdã n sa n togse." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 F sã n mak vugr n kong bɩ f ra bas raood ye, tõe n wa zemsa raar a to." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Yãk n pʋɩ tɩ ta neb a yopoe bɩ a nii, tɩ f ka mi yel-pakdem ninga sẽn na n paam-f tẽng zug ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Sawat sã n pid ne sa-koom, ad-b kiigd-a-la tẽnga zugu. Tɩɩg lʋɩ goabga bɩ rɩtgo a paada a sẽn lʋɩẽ wã." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Sẽn zoet-a sobgo la saaga kõn bʋde, la a kõn tigs ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Fo ka mi biig vɩɩm sẽn bɩɩsd to-to a ma pʋgẽ ye. F kõn tõog n bãng bada Wẽnd sẽn maand bũmb fãa wã sẽn tʋmd b tʋʋma ye. 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Woto wã bʋd f koodo, sɩng yibeoogo n gũud zaabre. Ad-f ka mi bõe n na n sake, bõe n ka na n sak ye, f ka mi f tʋʋmda fãa sã n na n yɩɩ yõod ye." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Vẽenem nooma la nin me nonga wĩntoog gesgo. 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ninsaal sã n kaoosd ne yõore bɩ a ning pãnga n noog a sũuri la a yʋʋma fãa zĩnd yõodo a yĩnga. A bãng bala tɩ zu-beed dasem sõore n na n yɩɩge. 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Bi-bɩɩga, dɩ f bi-bɩɩlma yõodo, noog f sũuri wakat kãnga. Maan f sẽn dat fãa, sẽn noom-f fãa. Bãng bala tɩ Wẽnd na n bʋ-la f bʋʋdo." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Yiis sũ-sãanga f sũurẽ la f zãag namsgo ne f yĩnga. Bi-bɩɩlem la vɩɩma sõor pukri la ka na n kaoos n loog ye. 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Tẽeg f Naanda yelle tɩ f ket n ya pẽbre. Tẽeg b yelle tɩ raara nan ket n zãra, daar ning f sẽn wat n yeele: «M ka le rɩt m vɩɩma sũ-noog ye.»" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Wakat kãng tɩ wĩndga kɩllame tɩ ya lika. Wakat kãng tɩ kiuuga la ãdsã sobame, tɩ saaga niid n pa yoogdẽ ye." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Wakat kãnga f na n wẽnega ro-gũud sẽn digd rabeem a roog noore, n wẽneg bi-bɩɩg sẽn wẽneg n kʋʋl n zõonde, n wẽneg roog-biig sẽn zãgs neerẽ werbo, a sẽn lebg a ye yĩnga, n wẽneg pag sẽn ka le rat tɩ b yãend a neng yɩnga." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 F vɩɩma na n lɛɛg n paga a toore wa kʋɩlenga sẽn lug roog noore. Werd-m-toor sã n yaasdẽ, a bʋʋra me woogdame; luiila, yɩɩn-yɩɩnda sã n yɩɩl n tɩge, a koɛɛga boogdame." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Sor sã n dʋʋda, a tũub wat n lebga rabeem ne-fo, nao wã zẽkr meng wat lebga toogo; f zoobda na n pelga wa laongo; yɩgd n vũud f yam wa sʋʋra ka na n le yɩg ye, f zelemda ka na n le bak toog la miisg ye. Daar n wate tɩ Adem biig fãa na n dɩk ra-babs sore la kʋ-yãbdba zoe n seglame n gũudẽ." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Daara na n taame, vɩɩma gĩsga, a gĩs pɛɛlg wa wanzurfa, na n tõsgame, sãnema wamda na n wãagame, yʋʋra na wesga kʋɩlgẽ, lɩʋʋga na pa bulgẽ." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Wakat kãng la ninsaal yĩnga na n leb a tomẽ tɩ yaa be la a yi yã, tɩ vɩɩma vʋʋsem me leb Wẽnnẽ tɩ bãmb n da fʋʋs-a." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Wa a Kowelɛt sẽn togse, sɩda, bũmba fãa yaa zaalem sẽn pid zaalem." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Tog n paasame t'a Kowelɛt ka vʋʋs ne zãma wã zãmsg ye. A zuka a bãngra zãnga n kõ-ba. A dõoga yelbũn ka tɛka. A modgame tɩ yelbũnd fãa pid ne yõodo. 
Ecclesiastes12:10 A Kowelɛt modgame n togs yɛla wa b sẽn ya-la, la a baas n yãe goam sẽn kõt-d daoodo."
