Ecclesiastes12:11 Mitba goam yaa wa bũmb sẽn nekd yam, yaa wa wĩir sẽn loet bãngra ne taaba, tikem-tikem. Yaa Wẽnnaam n walemd gom-kãense, tɩ bãmb bala n mi sor n wilgdẽ." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 M biiga m na n wilg-f lame tɩ f ra saag n gʋls bũmb n paas ye. Sɛba sõor paasgo yaa tʋʋmde sẽn ka be baasg ye la sẽn sɛt ninsaal pãnga. 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Goama tɛk yɩ woto. D zems taab zãnga. Zoe Wẽnd nifu la f tũ b noore tɩ rẽ la ninsaal fãa tʋʋm-pakre. 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Bãng tɩ d yel-manesem buud fãa, sẽn solge bɩ sẽn puki, sẽn ya neere, bɩ sẽn yã wẽnga, fãa na n bool-d-la bʋʋdo Naaba-Wẽnd taoore." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ad yɩɩll sẽn noom n yɩɩd a taab fãa. Yaa a Salomo yɩɩlle. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Kolg n mok m wɛ, m noanga, kolg n mok-m tɩ f nonglem noom-m lame n yɩɩd rãam," 
SongOfSongs1:3 n yɩɩd yũ-noog kaama f sẽn dɩk n zɛ f yĩngã. Fo menga kõta sũ-noogo wa yũ-noog kaam sẽn maneg n sɩlge, yaa rẽ me la kom-pugli wã nong-fo n zoet n pʋgd f poore." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Yõk m nugu tɩ d wudgi, m dĩma, tɩ d wudg n kẽ f roogẽ, tɩ f nonglma noog sẽn yɩɩd sɩdã la d dat n naag taab n kilsi. Ad kom-pugli wã sẽn nong fooma tar bʋʋm!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 M nenga sobr me, Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli, m baas n tara neerem, wa Kedar dot sẽn pil ne bʋ-sabl gãndo wa roog sẽn tʋɩ ne nufa." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Da ges-y m yĩnga sẽn soba ye, tɩ rẽ yaa wĩndg tʋʋmde, yaa m ma-biis n yik zabr ne-ma n yet tɩ m pa wĩndgẽ n gũ b tɩɩse. M yaool n da ka mi m meng tɩɩs gũub ye." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Wilg m wẽ, m noanga, yaa yɛ la f na n kɩɩm f rũmsã, wĩnto-sʋka, yaa yɛ la f na n paam maasem n vʋʋse? Wilg-ma, tɩ m da wa saad n yegd f tũud-n-taasa rũms ye." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Pag sẽn ya neer n yɩɩd a taaba, f ka mi zĩig bɩ f pʋg piisã, tees f bulli wã rũm-kɩɩmba sikẽ." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Bãng yaa, m Zoodo, tɩ m yamẽ wã fo wẽnda weef sẽn maneg neere tɩ b zombg rĩm biiga." 
SongOfSongs1:10 F yɛga yaa neeba la f tʋb-londã n pʋgd n saasd-ba. F paasda f yubla neerem ne puud pãnenga. Wanzurf la sãnem la d na n mobg f kamsã. 
SongOfSongs1:11 D yam la d dõog sãnem tʋb-londo sẽn naag n wẽn ne wanzurf n sog f tʋbã. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Bɩ m zĩnd n kokdẽ m ka-nooda yũugu, n gũudẽ tɩ m dĩma yi a rɩɩba roogẽ." 
SongOfSongs1:13 M noanga lebga wa wisao will sẽn wulum ne yũ-noogo, m sẽn dɩk n dogl m yãoogẽ;" 
SongOfSongs1:14 A wẽnda bugsuntundẽ puugu, wala En-Gedi pɛlg pu-killi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 M zoodo, fo yaa neere, n-ye, fo yaa neere, kirʋ meng la f nina rõog yã!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Fo me yaa neere, m noanga, fo me yaa neer wʋsgo!" 
SongOfSongs1:17 D gãaga tʋɩɩ ne vã-miinim, d dooga ra-paadse yaa kʋgsa wila, lalsa la kamsãooga vãado." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Mam yaa Sarõ bãg-faagẽ puugu, mam yaa bãg-faagẽ lɩɩnga." 
SongOfSongs2:2 M zood bee kom-pugli a taaba sʋka, la a yaa wa lɩɩnga sẽn be pulgumd sʋka." 
SongOfSongs2:3 M noanga, fo yẽ bee kom-dibli a taaba sʋka wala tɩ-yõodo sẽn be tɩ-yaals sʋka. M zĩ-la m tɩ-nongra maasmẽ n tar a bi-moaama rɩɩbo la b yaa noog m zelemdẽ." 
SongOfSongs2:4 M noanga tɩgs-m-la ne a nonglma rãam, a nonglma roogẽ." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Bao-y rɩɩb n kõ-m tɩ m dɩ, sõng-y-m ne bugsuntung biisi tɩ nonglem kom zabda." 
SongOfSongs2:6 M zug kʋgla m noanga goabga, t'a rɩtg mobg-ma." 
SongOfSongs2:7 M tar y sɛɛga, Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli, zoe-y weooga walse, zoe-y weooga yĩsã, la y ra nek m zooda ye, la y ra nek m noangã lɛ-lɛ; bas-y m noanga t'a gũs a raab tɛka." 
SongOfSongs2:8 M wʋmda m noanga koɛɛga. Ad-a sẽn gãensd tãms la kunkuba. 
SongOfSongs2:9 M noanga yaa wa walga bɩ yĩsri biiga. Ad-a sẽn be m dooga poore ad-a sẽn lɩkd peemlɛɛgẽ, ad-a sẽn lɩgsd vẽya." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ad-a sẽn yɩɩnde n yetẽ: «Wa wɛ, m zoodo, bi-neere, wa wɛ!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Zĩig likame, saag yooga zãnga," 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ypud weka zĩig zãnga, yɩɩn nood wakat taame; kelg watreguusgu, a zodgda a yɩɩla, a zodgd-b-la tõnd sɛɛgẽ." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Gese, kankang yoda a pipi kankama tɩ sãbsa yelgd b yũ-noodo. Wa wɛ, m zoodo, wa wɛ!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 M walla solgda a meng pĩis bogdẽ, a solgda a meng pĩisa poore. Sõng tɩ m yãe f nenga tɩ m wʋmda f koɛɛga la a nooma m tʋba. Bãng tɩ f nenga me sakda gesgo.»" 
SongOfSongs2:15 Sõng-y-do n yõg d kẽesã bãmb n na n sãam d tɩɩsa zãnga. La d tɩɩsa zoe n yoda b puudu. 
SongOfSongs2:16 M noanga ra kɩɩmda a rũms lɩɩns pʋ-weesẽ la m noang lebga m soolem tɩ mam me lebg a soolem. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Tũ zaabr pems maasgã, tɩɩsa sẽn wat n takd b sulunsugdã n lɛɛg n wa, m zoodo, n lɛɛg n wa wala yãka, wala yãg-bila sẽn lolemd kunkubã." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Zĩig sobgame tɩ m kẽ m gãagẽ n bao m yam sẽn kẽe a soaba. M bao-a lame la m pa yãend-a ye. 
SongOfSongs3:2 Tɩ m na n yik n gilg tẽnga tõre, tɩ m na n sa soya la so-tiisã n bao m yam sẽn kẽe a soabã. M bao-a lame la m pa yãend-a ye." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Sẽn gũud-b tẽngã, sẽn gilgd-b tẽnga, m seg-b lame n sok-ba n gese b sã n ka yãend m noangã." 
SongOfSongs3:4 M sẽn loog bãmbã, m wẽneg n yãenda m sũur sẽn nong a soabã, tɩ m gãd-a n yet tɩ m kõn bas-a ye, tɩ rẽnd m tall-a n kẽes m ma roogẽ, sẽn doga maama roogẽ." 
SongOfSongs3:5 M tar y sɛɛga Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli, zoe-y weooga walse la weooga yĩsã la y ra sɩɩs m noanga ye, la y ra nek-a ye. Bas-y m noanga t'a gũs a raab tɛka." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Yaa ãnda n yit zĩ-pɛɛlẽ wã n watẽ, n nukd wa bug-zõose, n nukd wa sawadgo n nukd tɩdare la gondreyẽoog yũugu, t'a yũug ya tẽn-zẽng tɩɩs yũugu?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ad-y yaa a Salomo ne a sẽn zao pãndar ning zugã. Tãb-biis pisoobe n gũbg-a, tãb-biis sẽn tũus Israyɛl tãb-biis sʋka, sẽn mi sʋʋg zẽk n kɛ, sẽn kaoos zabrẽ." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Ned kam fãa sʋʋg bela a sɛɛgẽ la rabeem ka tar-b yʋng ye. 
SongOfSongs3:9 Dĩm a Salomo peesa Libã tɩɩs pãndare, n kẽ n sag a pʋgẽ. A sã n dɩg tẽnga, yaa ra-sĩdim zutu; zuga kugenda wanzurfu, sãnem zug la a zĩ, la maneg n tʋɩɩ ne peen-miidu, la Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli wã n maneg pɛɛla ne nonglem." 
SongOfSongs3:10 A sẽn dellda yaa sãnem la fãa maneg n tʋɩ peen neeba. Tẽnga kom-pugli n maneg a pʋgã, la b maneg-a-la ne nonglem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Wa-y n ges-y yã, Siõ kom-pugli, wa-y n ges a Salomo sẽn fũgna a kãadem pugla la yaa a ma n wʋg n kõ-a, a sũ-nooga raar pugla." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ad-f be neere, m zoodo, ad-f sɩd be neere. Peenda ludame n bas nina yɩnga. Põeer-bi-yooll bala n tar f neerem. Zoobda yɛdga f poore n zẽkdẽ la b sigd wa bʋʋs sẽn dʋʋd Galaad tãnga, n kũudẽ la b roogdẽ." 
SongOfSongs4:2 F yẽna pelga wa piis sẽn wors paalem la sẽn so koom. Yẽna fãa be-la b zĩisẽ, ned kam fãa tara a pak-n-taaga." 
SongOfSongs4:3 F no-ganda moosem: gĩs miuugu rẽnna, f zelemda yaa bõn-neere. F yɛga nukda f zug peenna." 
SongOfSongs4:4 F yubla yaa rog-roge la bũmb ninga sẽn kolg-a ne neerem, ya-la a Daviid gasgo sẽn me ne kug gilsi. Gãong woo sẽn yagl n gilga na ta tusri, la yaa tãb-biis sẽn pa yɛɛsd-d bũmb dẽnna." 
SongOfSongs4:5 F bĩs a yi wã, bãng bulli a yiibu bãng yĩsr kamb a yi sẽn wãbd yamdo lɩɩns pʋ-wɛɛgẽ." 
SongOfSongs4:6 M na n tũu zaabr pems maasga, tɩɩsa sẽn wat n takd b sulunsugdã, tɩ m dat n wa rʋʋ tãmsa la kunkubã sẽn wulumd ne gondreyẽoog yũugu, n wulumd ne tɩdar yũugu." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Fo yaa neer zãnga, m zoodo, bũmb-bulen-buug ka paoog-f ye." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Yi Libã n wa, m zoodo, yi Libã n wa ne ziiri. Sig Amana n wa, sig Senir la Ermo n wa, zãag f meng ne bõnyẽes la ãbs tãmse, n wa." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ad-f nifr kamsg bala la m sũura sẽn tosd kaam, m zoodo. Ad sãnema pãneng sẽn luund f kokorã loet-m-la f soolmẽ, wa b sẽn loet bi-bɛɛga ne bãn-kagbre." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Fo nonglma pids-m-la ne sũ-noogo; m zoodo, m tão sõngo, fo nonglma pids-m-la ne sũ-noogo, sẽn yɩɩd dãam sẽn wat ne a soabã. Yũ nood niyns fo sẽn dɩk n zɛ f nenga noom-m lame n yɩɩd kaam buud fãa." 
SongOfSongs4:11 M zoodo, ad-f noora goama yaa wa sɩ-kaam; sɩɩd la f rɩɩbo, bĩisim la f koom, f futa yũug yaa Libã rẽnna." 
SongOfSongs4:12 M zoodo, ad-f yaa wa zẽedo sẽn gũbg yãgre, m tão wã yaa wa zẽed sẽn gũbg neere. Yaa bulg sẽn page." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Zẽeda yaa tẽn-noogẽ zẽedã, n tar bʋgsem, n womd a pooloomse, tɩ-biis sẽn sakd diibo. Tɩ-puuda me yelgda b yũugu." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Tɩɩg fãa ne a yũ-noogo: wala yulunyuug rẽnna, gondreyẽoog rẽnna, tɩdar dẽnna, naglɛng rẽnna, wisao rẽnna, ka-noog fãa sẽn tar n zɛɛd yĩng rẽnna." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Fo kooma bunda a toore, n zãgsd zẽedã, a bunda a toore n sigd Libã tãnga." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Goaabg sobdo, yik-y, rɩtg sobdo, zoe-y n wa-y. Bui-y m zẽedã t'a tɩɩsa yũug yãng tɩ m noang wa kẽ n dɩ a tɩ-nood biisi." 
SongOfSongs5:1 M wata m zẽedẽ wã, m tão sõngo, m wat n na n tõsa bi-sõma, biis sẽn tar yũ-noogo, m wat n na n dɩ-la m sɩɩdo, m sɩ kaam, m wat n na n yũ m rãam la m bĩisim. Wã-y n dɩ-y yã, m zo-rãmba, la y yũ, la y tɩgs y meng ne nonglem." 
SongOfSongs5:2 M da gõeeme la m sũura pa gõe ye. M wʋmda m zoa sẽn kabsde n yetẽ: «Pak m wɛ, m zoodo, m tão sõngo, m noanga, pak-m wɛ, dog ne neerem soaba! M zuga mada ne meenem, m zobda tosda yʋng meenem.»" 
SongOfSongs5:3 La m zĩnda pʋgẽ n leok-a: «M zoe n yeega m fuugu, m ka na n le yeelg-a ye. M zoe n peka m nao, m ka rat n le rẽgem-b ye.»" 
SongOfSongs5:4 M zoa tʋma a nug kʋɩlenga võorẽ tɩ m pɛleng yɩke. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Tɩ m yɩk tɩ m na n pak-a tɩ ka-sõngã m sẽn zɛ wã na n kao wa tʋʋlgo n mad kʋɩlenga pagdga. 
SongOfSongs5:6 M pakame tɩ m noanga kẽ, mik a lɛɛg n zoeeme. M yama bondgame. M yii n pʋg-a lame m baoo-a lame la m pa yãend-a ye, m bool-a lame la a pa leok-m ye." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Sẽn gũud-b tẽnga seg-m lame, sẽn kargd b tẽnga yʋngã seg-m-la lal-gũbra zugu, B pãb-m lame, b pogl-m lame, b tol deega m bãg-paagã." 
SongOfSongs5:8 M tar y sɛɛga, Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli, y sã yãenda m noangã, bõe la y na n leok-a? Leok-y m noangã tɩ m sũur bẽedame, tɩ nonglma yik-m-la bãaga!" 
SongOfSongs5:9 Fo zoa wã tara bõe n yɩɩd a taaba? Dog ne neerem soaba, fo zoa wã tara bõe n yɩɩd a taaba tɩ f yõkd d sɛɛga?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 M zoa wã neng yaa rasãng nenga. Rasãmb tusr lagem taaba, tɩ yẽnda lʋɩ b taoore." 
SongOfSongs5:11 A zuga yaa wa b bolga sãnem sẽn yɩlge. Zobda gila wa ga-bi sabla, n lob sabl wa salsang kõbdo," 
SongOfSongs5:12 A nina yaa wa kʋɩl-wall dẽnna, kʋɩl-wall sẽn be koom noore, kʋɩl-wall sẽn pelg wa a soo bĩisim." 
SongOfSongs5:13 A yɛɛma tobda wa googo, tɩɩs sẽn tar yũ-noog googo. A no gãnda pɛɛla wa lɩɩng puugu a noora sɩlgda noogo." 
SongOfSongs5:14 A nusa pida ne sãnem zũya la kug neeb kagse. A pʋga yaa pɛɛlg wa goore, n pɛ muizãan kẽega." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Karga yaa wa kugr la b pees yã tɩ nao wã ya waa b rõoga sãnem. A sẽn wẽnd yaa Libã kʋka, ka be taar ye." 
SongOfSongs5:16 A goama yaa gom-noodo, a bũmba fãa tara yamleoogo. Ad-y m zoa wã yaa woto, ad-y m noãnga yaa woto, Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Dog ne neerem soaba, f zoa wã kẽnga yɛ? F noanga teesa yɛ tɩ d sõng foom n bao-a?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 M noang kẽ-la a zẽedẽ, yũ nooda sẽn wulumd zĩig ningã, a kẽ-la a zẽedẽ n na n wãben a rũmsi la a bao lɩɩng pu-neeba." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mam yam kẽ-la m noang zãnga la m noang yam me kẽe maam zãnga. M noang wãbenda a rũmsi lɩɩns pʋ-wɛɛgẽ. 
SongOfSongs6:4 M zoodo, fo yaa neer wala Tirsa tẽnga, fo gesg noogda sũuri wa Zerizalɛɛm yãeebo." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Pʋs n da le ges-m ye tɩ f nina rɩt-m lame. F zoobda zẽkdame la b sigd wa bʋʋse b sã n dʋʋd Galaad tãnga. 
SongOfSongs6:6 F yẽna pɛɛla wa piis sẽn wõrs paalem wa piis sẽn so koom. Ned kam fãa tara a pak-n-taaga sẽn ka tara yak ka ye. 
SongOfSongs6:7 F yɛga nukda f zug peenna wa poaloang bi-bogre. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Dĩma pagba taa pisoobe, pʋg-lemsa taa pis-nii tɩ pʋg-bi wã ya ka tɛka," 
SongOfSongs6:9 la m noanga ka tar a to ye, a yaa a ye tãa, a yaa neer zãnga, a yaa a ma bi-yende, a ma bi-nongre. Kom-pugli wã yãend-a lame n pẽge, pagba naaga taaba n kils-a. B yeela b sũurẽ:" 
SongOfSongs6:10 Bõe n pɩnd wa sõore, n ya neer wa kiuugu, n yãgd wa wĩntoogo, n kẽesd dabeem wa tãb-biis sẽn sũ tãpo?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 D taa nobsa sẽn tigim zĩig ningã, n na n ges kʋl-waoka sẽn ningd vã-miinim; n na n ges sãbsa sã n tobdẽ, n na n ges sẽn wẽnda poaloanga sã n pu-la a puudu." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ade, m ka mi bõe n waa n lʋɩ sʋk ye. M lɛɛg n yɛɛsd-f lame, m noangã, buud sõng bi-pugla." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Wẽnemd ka, wẽnemd ka, zɩ-yɩɩr soaba, wẽnemd ka n bas tɩ d ges f nenga. Y na n maana a wãn n paam n ges a Zɩ-yɩɩre? Bas-y t'a saodame, a saooda ne a tũud-n-taase, la saooga ka basd n vʋʋs ye." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Dĩm biiga, ad-f nao la f neooda be neere! Rũma tɛka n digd yĩngri, yõak-mita n dõog a rõogre, la yaa neerem sẽn pid neerem." 
SongOfSongs7:3 F pʋga gila wa koore la rãam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ka tõe n kong a pʋgẽ ye. F pʋga peela wa zom bɩ lɩɩn-puugu." 
SongOfSongs7:4 F bĩs a yiibã, bõn neeba b wẽnda bulli a yiibu, b wẽnda yãk kamb a yiibu." 
SongOfSongs7:5 F yubla rooga sas la fan-teed n pelg-a n gilgi. F nina, wẽnda Esbõ bãgse, Bat-Rabim noorẽ; f yõorã yaa neere wa Libã gũudba ro-lug-lugã sẽn lug n tees Damas." 
SongOfSongs7:6 F zuga rooga ne naam wa Karmɛl tãnga; f zoobdã, bãng pĩir sẽn wʋg ne nufa. Dẽ la dĩma yãee n lʋɩ f bẽdgẽ." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ad fo sɩd yaa neere, bi-nongre, ad-f neng sɩd sakda gesgo, bi-sõngo!" 
SongOfSongs7:8 Fo tãoo n kula yĩngr wala koanga, koanga biis yaa f bĩsã." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Dẽ la m yeel yã: M na n dʋʋ koangã n tõs a biisã, la b na n yɩ-m-la noogo wa sib gĩndi; a noora na wẽ-m-la pemsem, pemsem sẽn tar tɩ-noog yũugu." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ad-y m yũuda f goama wa rã-noogo. Rãam sẽn ya noogo la m bĩng m noangã, yaa rãam sẽn sakd yũubu, ba m sã n zoe n suusdẽ." 
SongOfSongs7:11 M lebga m noang soolem, tɩ m yam kẽ-a-la zãnga." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Wa wɛ, m noanga, wa tɩ d kẽ weoogo tɩ yʋngo d na lɛɛg n wa tẽnga pʋgẽ." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Zĩiga sã n yẽege d na leb pʋtẽ n tɩ ges siba sã n yodame, n ges sẽn wẽnda poaloanga puuda sã n lebga biisi, n ges tɩɩs a taaba sã n ninga puudu. M na yaool marsã n dɩk m meng n kõ foo." 
SongOfSongs7:14 Tɩɩs kẽer zoe n yelgda b yũugu la b pa yelgd b yũ-nooga yaar ye. Tɩɩs wʋsg womame n yɛs d dignoorẽ. Yaa tɩ-rẽems la tɩ-yaoose, m noanga, ad fãa basa fo yĩnga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ges wɛ! Tõnd dag n yaẽ ma-biisi, n yẽsmẽ ma a ye bĩisim, m sẽn yãendẽ foo zĩig ning fãa m tõe n mobgẽ-f lame tɩ ned ba a ye ka sãbs-d ye." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Sã n yaẽ woto m lʋɩtẽ la f taoore, m taldẽ-f lame n kẽes m ma roogẽ, n kelg f koɛɛga zãnga la m yũnug-f ne rãam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, wa weooga fãa sẽn yelgd a soaba soom-saar wakato. M na yũnug-f ne m meng rã-toose." 
SongOfSongs8:3 M zug kʋglẽ-la f goabga tɩ f rɩtg mobgẽ-ma. 
SongOfSongs8:4 M yõkda y sɛɛga, Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli tɩ y ra nek-a ye, tɩ y ra nek m zooda ye, bas-y m zooda t'a gũs a raab tɛka." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Yaa ãnda n tik a noanga n yit we-raoogẽ n watẽ? Yaa maam n nekd foo tɩɩga tẽngre, f ma sẽn dɩk f pʋg zĩig ningã, sẽn doga fooma sẽn dɩk f pʋg zĩig ningã." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Bas tɩ m yɩ wa makre f sũurẽ, tɩ m yɩ wa makre f kangẽ, tɩ zood yaa pãng soaba wala m ba kũum. To nonglem ka be kabsg ye, A sẽn sog ka le tõe n fãag ye. A bugum ka rɩt n kees ye a zabda wa Wẽnd bugum." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Sa-bɛd lagem koabga tɩ nonglem bugum tõt kiusgu. Kʋɩls sũ tãpo n na n dɩ-a t'a tõt kiusgu. Ned sẽn ka tõe n yɩ a bɛɛb laado yaa sẽn wʋka a zak arzɛk fãa n da nonglem. 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tõnd tão wã nan paooda, a bĩsa nan ka yod ye. Bõe la d na n maan a yĩnga, a yell sã n wa be sʋka?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 D tão wã da yaẽ lal-gũbri d na n roglẽ wanzurf lill a zug n paase. D tão wã sã n da yaẽ dignoore, d na n kɛ tɩ-kegemse n maneg n page." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Mam mee wa zabr kõn-ling-m doogo, ne a lal-gũbri. Bũmb ka paoog ye. Sẽn zao-b ro-lug-lugã, n gũusd bɛɛba me meeme. Woto wã m sɩd yaa a Zɩ-yɩɩre, la pidsda m noanga ne sũ-noogo." 
SongOfSongs8:11 A Salomo sela a bugsuntung Baal-Amo sẽnẽ. A baoo neb n gũnug tɩɩsã. Sẽn data n kẽ n tõs wata ne wakɩ koeems tusri. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Sã n ya maam, maam bal n get m tɩɩsa yelle. A Salomo nong bɩ a kẽ wakɩ koeems tusra pʋgẽ n yãk koeems kobs-yi n kõ gũudba." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Fo bee zẽeda tẽnsʋka, m zoodo, tɩ m tũud-n-taasa rat n wʋm f koɛɛga. Sõng tɩ d wʋm f koɛɛga, m noanga!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Zoe n looge, m noanga! M noanga; zoe tao tao wa yãg-bila, zoe wa yĩs-bila, wudg n dʋ f yũ-nood tãmse!" 
Isaiah1:1 Ad-a Amos biiga, a Izayi, sẽn yãende. Yaa yɛl niyns fãa sẽn na n pak Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm. A yãend-b-la a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba, a Oziyas, a Zotam, a Akaz la a Ezekiyas wẽnnẽ." 
Isaiah1:1 Ad-a Amos biiga, a Izayi, sẽn yãende. Yaa yɛl niyns fãa sẽn na n pak Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm. A yãend-b-la a Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba, a Oziyas, a Zotam, a Akaz la a Ezekiyas wẽnnẽ." 
Isaiah1:2 Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde: Bɩ yĩngr dãmb kelge, tɩ tẽng zug rãmb yoog b tʋba: M yɩta a wãna n wub m kamba, tɩ b tol n bɩ, n wa rat n yi m soolmẽ?" 
Isaiah1:3 Naaf ka yãet a zu-soab n kong ye, bõang me ka kongd a gãag zĩiga, a zu-soab zakẽ ye. A Israyɛl bala n ka mi fɩ, m buuda yam bal n ka weke." 
Isaiah1:4 Bʋk ne foo, bʋk ne foo, yel-wẽn-maandb tẽnga! Fo neba yaa neb sẽn pid ne wẽnem, yaa bi-bees buudu, yaa buud sẽn sãame. B basa Soaala-Wẽnde, b paooga a Israyɛl Nin-sõngo, b wẽnemda b kãare n tees bãmba." 
Isaiah1:5 Y sẽn ket n zãgsd bãmbã, yɛ la b na n le tõog n wẽ yã? Zuga fãa zoe n yaa noada, sũura pãng sɛɛ zãnga." 
Isaiah1:6 Sẽn yi zug tẽnsʋka n wat nao wã, zĩig ka le beẽ n ka sãmpogr ye. Yĩngã bugame, n meede, n feebe, fãa yaa noada, la b ka bãn kaam, b ka vil peend ye." 
Isaiah1:7 Y tẽnga fãa lebga we-raoogo, y zagsa fãa yõoga bugum, la ad tẽn-zẽng rãmba sẽn sãamd y pʋto tɩ y zĩi n getẽ." 
Isaiah1:8 Zerizalɛɛm lebga wala pʋʋg-roogo, wala niir pʋ-wɛɛgẽ ro-zaoko, wala tẽnga, bɛɛb sẽn gũbgi." 
Isaiah1:9 Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd sã n da pa sʋkẽ neb kẽere, n base tõnd yaẽ la wala Sodom, tõnd yaẽ la wala Gomor." 
Isaiah1:10 Yãmba, taoor dãmba, nin-wẽns wa Sodom dãmba, kelg-y Wẽnd koɛɛga! Nin-wẽns wa Gomor dãmba, wʋm-y Wẽnd saglgo!" 
Isaiah1:11 Yãmb maandã, ne b ya ka tɛkã, b maanda maam bõe? Yaa Wẽnd n gomda. M yam yii ne y piisi sẽn kãbd bugmẽ, la ne y nag-bi nobdsa kaam. Y lolsa la y boeesa zɩɩm, m pa le rat ye." 
Isaiah1:12 Y wata m taoore, la ãnda n kos-y tɩ y kẽ m zakẽ?" 
Isaiah1:13 Vʋʋs-y ne y kũun yoodã, ad-b ka tar yõod ye. Y pa ne tɩ y b bug-zõosã ka tat m yam! Vʋʋs-y ne y kibs rãmbã, kiu-paalle, tig-raase, vʋʋsg daare. Y kibs bɛd la bõonese, fãa lebga m sɩ-lakre tɩ b naaga ne yel-wẽna." 
Isaiah1:14 Tigr ninga fãa y sẽn maande, y kibs buud fãa, m yɛɛ ne bãmba, b lebga zɩɩb ne-ma." 
Isaiah1:15 Yãmb zẽkda y nusi n na n pʋʋs maam, tɩ mam wẽneg m nenga. Y pʋʋsga sã n pʋʋsdẽ n ka yɛɛdẽ me, ad-y mam ka le kelgd ye. Y nusa mooga ne zɩɩm." 
Isaiah1:16 Pek-y y mense, yɩlg-y y mense, zãag-y y wẽnema ne maam, vʋʋs-y ne wẽng maanego." 
Isaiah1:17 Zãms-y neer maanego, bao-y zemsgo, zãag-y sẽn dat-ba n maan pãnga; zoe-y kɩɩb nimbãanega, da bas-y tɩ b zãmb pʋg-kõor ye." 
Isaiah1:18 Soaala-Wẽnd meng n yete: Wã-y tɩ d yẽse, ad-y y yel-wẽna sã moos wa zɩɩm, m tõe tɩ b pelg wa goore, b moos wa nufa, m tõe tɩ b pelg wa lamdo." 
Isaiah1:19 Y sã n sɩng m noora reegre, y na rɩ y tẽnga yõodo." 
Isaiah1:20 Y sã n yet tɩ y kõn sulg y zugu, sʋʋg n na n dɩ yã. Maam a Naaba-Wẽnd n yeele." 
Isaiah1:21 M tẽn-sõnga maana a wãna n wa rɩk pʋg-yoodr zʋgo? A Siõ da yaa tẽng sẽn nong sɩda, n da baood zemsgo, la marsã a pida ne nin-kʋʋre." 
Isaiah1:22 Zerizalɛɛm, ges f sẽn lebge, ad fo wẽnda wanzurf sẽn kalem ne rẽgdo, n wẽnd rã-toos sẽn pul koom." 
Isaiah1:23 F nanamsa ka le tũud maam ye, b yõga zoodo ne wagda. B sẽn nong la ligd bala. Kɩɩb la pʋg-kõore kõn paam sõngre b bʋʋd zĩigẽ ye." 
Isaiah1:24 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga - yaa Soaala-Wẽnd Pãng soabã n gomde, a Israyɛl Wẽndã n gomde: M na tõog m bɛɛbã, m na rok m sũur ne-ba." 
Isaiah1:25 Zerizalɛɛm, m na n zaba ne-fo, m na n los-f-la boaagẽ, n yiis f namdã, n pek f rẽgda fãa ne safãnde tɩ f lebg yɩlemde." 
Isaiah1:26 Sẽn bʋʋd-b bʋʋda na n le paama pĩnd dãmba zʋgo, sẽn sagend-ba na n le rɩka pĩnd dãmba nao. Fo na n deega yʋ-paalle: Zemsg tẽnga, Ka mi zãmb tẽnga." 
Isaiah1:27 A Siõ na paam fãagre a sã n lebg sɩd-baooda, a kamba sã n tuub n baood zemsgo." 
Isaiah1:28 Sẽn ka sak-bã la yel-wẽn-maandbã, b na n dɩka b zutã n wẽ taaba n sẽege, sẽn bas-b Soaala-Wẽnd na n kiime." 
Isaiah1:29 N-ye! Yãnd na yõk yã, y sẽn da maand bũmb niyns y tɩɩsa tẽngrã na n waa ne y yãnde, y maand yooda sẽn da kʋʋd y tɩɩsa tẽngrã na n kɩtame tɩ y zug sulgi." 
Isaiah1:30 Y na n wẽnega wa tɩɩse sẽn ka le tar vãad ye n wẽneg wa zẽed tɩɩs sẽn ka le tar koom ye. 
Isaiah1:31 Tẽnga ned fãa sẽn pid ne pãnga na n lebga gʋmdo, t'a tʋʋm yooda lebg bug-pãrga, tɩ b fãa naag taab n yõk bugum, la bugma kõn yãend ned sẽn na n kiis-a ye." 
Isaiah2:1 Ad-a Amos biig a Izayi sẽn yãend bũmb ning yɛsa Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ. 
Isaiah2:1 Ad-a Amos biig a Izayi sẽn yãend bũmb ning yɛsa Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ. 
Isaiah2:2 Wakat n wate tɩ Soaala roogã sẽn me tãng ning zugã, tãng kãng na lugame n zʋʋg a taaba, n lug n zʋʋg kunkuba fãa. Zamaana buud toɛ-toɛyã neb na n waa be." 
Isaiah2:3 Buud wʋsgo na n yiime n dɩk sore; b na n yeela taaba: «Wa-y tɩ d dʋ Soaala tãnga, wa-y tɩ d kẽ a Zakoob Wẽnnaam doogẽ, tɩ b wilg tõnd b noya tɩ d dɩk b sore.» N-ye! Yaa Siõ la Wẽnd zãmsga yita, yaa Zerizalɛɛm la Soaala Gomd sigda." 
Isaiah2:4 Bãmb n na n kao dũni rãmba bʋʋdo, bãmb n na n paas b zaba, n deeg b sʋʋsã n kud wãgse, n deeg b kãna n kud goeto. Tẽnsa kõn le yik zabr ne taab ye, la ned ba a ye kõn le zãms zabr takr ye." 
Isaiah2:5 Zakoob buudu, wa tɩ d kẽn Soaala vẽenemẽ." 
Isaiah2:6 Soaala, y pa le rat y nebã, y pa le rat a Zakoob buuda ye. Yaang rãmba n waa n deeg tẽngã n yãmbe. Filisti rãmba sõor sẽn zem to-to, b bagba me sõor zema boto. Y buuda yõgda zood ne sãamba." 
Isaiah2:7 Tẽnga pida ne wanzurfu la sãnem; arzɛka ka tõe n geelg n sɛ ye. Tẽnga pida ne wiidi. Bilim-bilma ka tõe n sõd n sɛ ye. 
Isaiah2:8 Tẽnga pida ne wẽn-faado, tɩ b wat n yĩgimd b taoore n waoogd b mens nus sẽn naane, b nus sẽn dõoge." 
Isaiah2:9 Yaa rẽ la na n yɩ pakre tɩ b noor turg tom. La yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnde, da sak-y tɩ b le roog ye!" 
Isaiah2:10 Ninsaalba, bao-y pĩisi n lilli, bao-y bok n kẽ, n põs Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ b pãnga na n kẽes-y-la rabeem la b ziira na n yɛɛs-y lame." 
Isaiah2:11 Ninsaal zẽk-m-meng na n sikame, a tɩtaam na n sɛɛ daar a ye, la baraare, Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋr bal n na n zẽke, bãmb b ye tãa." 
Isaiah2:12 Sɩda daar n na n zĩndi, Wẽnd-Pãng-Soaba raare. Baraare la nagra sɛɛb raare, tɩtaama sɛɛb raare, zẽk-m-menga sikr raare." 
Isaiah2:13 Na n yɩɩ Libã tɩ-bɛda lʋɩɩs raare, Bazã tɩ-bɛd wa kʋgsa tõrb raare," 
Isaiah2:14 tãm-bɛda la tãm-bi sirgri raare," 
Isaiah2:15 ro-lug-lug la lals sẽn ka tõe n gãndg boogre raare," 
Isaiah2:16 Tarsis koom-kogend bɛda ne b arzɛka lisb raare. 
Isaiah2:17 Ninsaal zẽk-m-menga na n sigame, a tɩtaama na n sɛɛme, badaare Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋra na n zẽkame, bãmb b ye tãa." 
Isaiah2:18 Bõn-naandsa fãa sẽn da paamd waoogrã, fãa na n tus n menesame." 
Isaiah2:19 Bao-y pĩisa pẽkse, sig-y tãmsã bogdẽ n paam n tɩlg Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-fõore. Ad-y badaare, b ziira na kẽesa rabeem kãsenga, b na kɩtame tɩ tẽnga fãa digimdi." 
Isaiah2:20 Badaare ninsaal na n dɩk a sẽn waoogd b rãmba, n lob sãbtõaase la zãnkiti. A yaool n da yagb-b-la ne sãnem la wanzurfu n na n yĩgimd b taoore." 
Isaiah2:21 B na n bas-b lame n zoe n tɩ soond tãms bogdẽ la pĩis pẽgsẽ n paam n tɩlg Wẽnd ziira la b sũ-puura sẽn wat ne rabeem ningã, tɩ badaare, b na n yik n kɩtame tɩ tẽnga digimdi." 
Isaiah2:22 Vʋʋs-y ne ninsaal teegre, bãng-y t'a yõor koɛɛma. A yaẽ bõn-koosem a ka beẽ saag-toog ye." 
Isaiah3:1 Ad-y bũmb fãa Soaala, yĩngr la tẽng Soaala, na n monga neba bũmb fãa, n mong Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, n mong Zɩɩda rãmba. B na n mong-b-la rɩɩb la koom, b na n mong-b-la b sẽn teeg fãa." 
Isaiah3:2 B na n mong-b-la zabr gãndaoogo, n mong-b tãb-biiga, bʋ-kaooda, bãngda, baga, buud kãsma," 
Isaiah3:3 tãnsoaba, kug-zĩida, sagenda, zʋʋr soaba, tɩ-rɩtba la tɩ-busdba." 
Isaiah3:4 B na-rɩtba na n yɩɩ kom-bõonego, sẽn na n zã-b wala b sẽn date." 
Isaiah3:5 Neba na n yika zab ne taaba, yãag pat-n-taaga la nin-kẽema, tɩ talg rẽnd yaa na-koambga." 
Isaiah3:6 Ned na n yikame n sog a saam-biiga, a ba zakẽ, n yeel-a: «Foom n tar fu woko lebg tõnd naaba, zã d tẽnga sẽn wẽnd raboogã.»" 
Isaiah3:7 La sẽn yẽeg a soaba na n yeelame: «Ade, m ka tɩɩm soab ye, m ka tar dɩɩbo, m ka tar fu-songo m doogẽ ye. Da rɩk-y tẽnga naam n kõ-m ye.»" 
Isaiah3:8 Zerizalɛɛm dãmb sɩd kẽnd n lagsdame, tɩ Zɩɩda rãmb tar lʋɩɩse; la ad-y ka bũmb a to, ya b sẽn yaag b noore la b zẽk b nugu n paoog Soaala-Wẽnd ne b ziirã." 
Isaiah3:9 B nenga meng pa yãet n sãmb ye, wẽnema lebga b yẽesem, b yel-wẽna yɛdga zĩig zãnga wa Sodom dãmba rẽnna, lebga b zu-zẽkre. Ad-y rẽ n na n wã-b zãnga." 
Isaiah3:10 Yeel-y tɩ zu-noog soaba la nin-sõngo, a na n dɩ-la a tʋʋm sõma yõodo." 
Isaiah3:11 Yeel-y tɩ far soaba la nin-wẽnga, a na n deega a tʋʋm yooda sɩbgre." 
Isaiah3:12 Kato! Bi-bilfr bala n tar m neba n yaandẽ! Katõ! Naama sẽn lʋɩ b rãmb nusẽ wã nan yaa kom-bõonese, ad-y pagbã n dɩt naama. Kato, f soaalba tat-f lame n kẽed moogo! Kẽnda ka tees a sẽn togẽ ye." 
Isaiah3:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yikame n na n kao b bʋʋdo, b yik n yɛsa yĩngri." 
Isaiah3:14 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n bool b rãmb bʋʋdã yaa rĩm-biisi la nin-kẽembã; b na n yeel-b lame: «Yãmb n deeg naong soab bugsuntungu, n deeg a sẽn da so, a sẽn da tar n lut a naongo, yaa rẽ la yãmb yeeg n bas-a." 
Isaiah3:15 Ãnda n kõ yãmb sore tɩ y nams m nebã, bõe tɩ y sulgd naong rãmb zug n paasdẽ? Dũni fãa Wẽndã n sokde.»" 
Isaiah3:16 Soaala yeelame: «Siõ kom-pugli wã wilg-m-menga waooga. B kẽndame n dõond b yubla, n kẽnd tɩ b nina kamsd kams yoodo, tɩ nao wã solsdẽ, tɩ b bugla wẽed taaba.»" 
Isaiah3:17 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd na n bas Siõ pagba zut tɩ b kẽ rasempʋɩɩga, la bũmb kõn lud b rĩir ye." 
Isaiah3:18 Badaare Soaala-Wẽnd na n piida fan-teedã, nao-zũya, wĩntoog la kiuug sẽn dõog n pit yublã," 
Isaiah3:19 n paas tʋb-londã, kagsã, pɛɛla sẽn lut nenga," 
Isaiah3:20 zu-vindsi, yãndo, pãnense sẽn mobgd sɛɛga, tɩto, gãn sẽn boond zu-noogo," 
Isaiah3:21 nug-bĩnsi, fan-teed sẽn sogd yõore," 
Isaiah3:22 kibs futu, fut sẽn ka tar nusi, pɛɛl sẽn teegd zugu, kordo," 
Isaiah3:23 fu-tagdo, fu-yord faase, pɛɛl sẽn tar n vind kokoɛ la bãg-paase." 
Isaiah3:24 Ad-y bõn-põosg yũugu n na n deeg yũ-nooda zĩiga, la wĩir bala n na n lebg sɛɛga sẽbdga. Zoobda sẽn pãnem ne nagra na n kõogame. Fu-neeba na n lebga sũ-pa-noang futu, kut sẽn mooge, la b na dĩ b yɛgdgã, yɛgdga dĩida ne kud moomde n sãam b neerem." 
Isaiah3:25 Sʋʋg n na vɩlem tãb-biisã tɩ gãndaadã pa tãpẽ. 
Isaiah3:26 Wakat kãng marsã la tẽnga tõr na n kelem. B na kʋka zug n kelem kʋʋre. B na n yɩɩ wala pag sẽn menes a sẽn tar fãa, t'a pãs n lʋɩ tẽnga." 
Isaiah4:1 Daar n wate tɩ pagb a yopoe na n pʋg rao yende la b na yeel-a lame: «Tõnd n na n dɩlg d menga, tõnd n na n bao d toor futu, fo ye n bas-d bala tɩ d soond f yʋʋra maasmẽ n tɩlg yãnde.»" 
Isaiah4:2 Daar n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ bũmb bul n yi tẽngã la a na n yɩɩ Israyɛl kamba sẽn põsã zu-zẽkre la b pẽgre." 
Isaiah4:3 Sẽn pa-b Zerizalɛɛm, sẽn na n põs-b Siõ, bãmb fãa na n boolame tɩ neb sẽn welg toor Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga; bãmb fãa yʋy la Soaala gʋls b vɩɩma sebr pʋgẽ tɩ b na n vɩɩnd Zerizalɛɛm." 
Isaiah4:4 Soaala-Wẽnd na n waa ne zemsgo la b neba yɩlgre. Ad-y Zerizalɛɛm pagba sã n wa paam tɩ Soaala pek b rẽgdã, Siõ sã n wa paam tɩ Soaala buuda pek zãnga, n pek zɩɩma sẽn daagã, n yõog rẽgda fãa ne b sũ-fõora bugum," 
Isaiah4:5 wakat kãng la Soaala-Wẽnd meng b toore na n maan woto: Siõ tãnga zugu, sẽn na n tigim-b be wã yĩnga, bug-zõos sawadg n na n puki wĩntoogo, tɩ vẽenem na n yãng yʋngo. La Wẽnd ziira na pukame n gũ-ba." 
Isaiah4:6 Na n yɩɩ wala maasem tɩɩga, wala zãnde sẽn ti ne tɩɩs vãado tɩ b neba na n tɩlg tʋʋlgo wĩnto-sʋka la b põs sa-koom la sob-raado." 
Isaiah5:1 M na yɩɩla yɩɩlle n kõ m zoa: ya m zoa ne a bugsuntunga yɩɩlle. M zo-nongre n da paam zĩ-sõngo n sel bugsuntungu. 
Isaiah5:2 A maaga a menga n wʋgs kuga n sam zĩ-yɛnga, m maag a meng n ko, n bao bu-sõng n sele. A gesa pʋʋga tẽnsʋka n ning gũud roogo, la a vigl sĩnga, rãama yĩnga. Mik bugsuntunga zãgsa moogre, n pa kãse." 
Isaiah5:3 M kot-y lame marsã, Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda rãmba, tɩ y kao maam ne m bugsuntunga bʋʋdo." 
Isaiah5:4 Bõe la m da tõe n paase n ka paase? Bõe tɩ m da gũud bɩgma n wa yɛs ne kãse? 
Isaiah5:5 Bas-y tɩ m wilg yã m sẽn na n maan m tɩɩsa bũmb ninga: yãgrã m na yãk-a lame tɩ rũms kẽ n wãbe; lalgã m na n lub-a lame tɩ b kẽ n tabe. 
Isaiah5:6 A sãoongo la m data, m pa le rat n ko, m pa le rat n kʋʋs wila tɩ maneg n tob ye; gõos rat bɩ b wulumdi. M na n diga sawato tɩ saag da le tosg ye." 
Isaiah5:7 Bãng-y t'a Israyɛl la dũni fãa Wẽnda pʋʋgo; tɩɩsã sẽn tũus n yãkã, yaa Zɩɩda kamba. Wẽnd da tẽeda ka-yell dãmba, n wa yɛs ne nong-b-zɩɩm-daagre; zems taaba la b da rat n yãe, mik yaa waasgo la b na n wʋme." 
Isaiah5:8 Yell be-la y zugu, yãmb fãa sẽn met doogo n paasd roogo, yãmb fãa sẽn tukd pʋʋgo n paasd pʋʋgo, zĩis fãa lebga yãmb soolem, yaa wa yãmb bala la tẽnga kẽedba." 
Isaiah5:9 Wẽnd sẽn walem m tʋbrẽ la woto: Yaa rot ka tɛka n na n dʋʋge, dot sẽn tar yalem la neerem; nin-vɩɩg ka ket sẽn na n kẽ-b ye." 
Isaiah5:10 Tɩɩsa senda ka tɛka la biisã wat n yaa pet a wãn bala; bʋta peoogo n kẽeb wamde. 
Isaiah5:11 Yell be la y zugu yãmb fãa sẽn vẽegd beoogo tɩ yaa rã-rot bala la y sɩngd saabo; zĩig wat n sobgame tɩ y ket n be be n tuumnẽ. 
Isaiah5:12 B tara b pendse la b ruuds wãagre, n pãbd b gãngãado la b peebd b wɩɩse, la b gagd b rã-yũura rãam. Sã n yaool n ya Soaala-Wẽnd poorẽ b toog ka be ye, Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋma, b pa ne rẽ ye." 
Isaiah5:13 La m neba sẽn ka tar yama, b na n wʋk-b lame n kẽes yembdo; kom n na n kʋ b nin-bɛdã, b zɛlma na n kʋɩ ne ko-yũudu." 
Isaiah5:14 Bog-zulung n yaagd a kokore, n yaagd a no-yalenga n na n vele, n vel zãma sẽn kɩdemd sũ-noogo la sẽn yer kibs futu." 
Isaiah5:15 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la ninsaal fãa na n turg a neng tẽnga, sẽn da get a taaba ne sãbsgo na n kong n sulga a nenga." 
Isaiah5:16 Dũni fãa Soaala na n puka b ziiri tɩ yaa dũni paall la b na n wa ne. Naaba-Wẽnd yaa sõngo, b zemsgã n na n puk b sõmblem." 
Isaiah5:17 Pe-bi na n paama b wãbneg zĩiga, rabooda yamdo la b na wãbneg bulli la rũms sẽn be kaam." 
Isaiah5:18 M sẽn yãbd neb niynsi yaa yel-wẽnda wĩir sẽn zoe n gaag b rãmbã la a vuud-ba n digd b sɩbgr zĩigẽ, n vuud-b wa b sẽn vuud bilim-bilm." 
Isaiah5:19 M yãbda sẽn yet-ba: «Wẽnd na n sɩnga b tʋʋmdã da-bʋre b na n sɩnga da-bʋr tɩ d gese, da-bʋre la Wẽnd pʋlemde a Israyɛl Wẽnda pʋlemd na yẽrge n kolg a pidsgu zĩiga tɩ d yãende?»" 
Isaiah5:20 Yell me ne neb niynsi sẽn boond-b wẽng tɩ neere, la b boond neere tɩ wẽnga; sẽn kɩt-b tɩ lik lebgd vẽenem, tɩ vẽenem lebgd lika, tɩ tɩɩsg lebgd sɩɩdo, tɩ sɩɩd lebg tɩɩsga, yell be la b zugu!" 
Isaiah5:21 Sẽn tẽed-b tɩ b yaa neb sẽn maan gũusgu la sẽn tar-b yam, yell be la b zugu!" 
Isaiah5:22 Sẽn deeg-b rã-yũur naam, n yũud rã-toosã n kalem taaba, tɩ bũmb ka maand-bã, yell be la y zugu." 
Isaiah5:23 Yel-maand sã n yiis a ligdi n kõ yãmba, yẽ soab n so bʋʋm, tɩ nin-sõng na n paam taale." 
Isaiah5:24 Ade, wala yamda sẽn dɩt bugum to-to, wala bug-vɩlenga ne vãado, woto me b yẽgna na n lebga tompɛglem tɩ b wila go tom pɛɛlga, la ya b sẽn ka reeg dũni fãa Wẽnda noor yĩnga, yaa b sẽn sãbs Israyɛl Soaala gomde." 
Isaiah5:25 Wẽnd sũur yika ne b neba, tɩ b zẽk b nug n wẽ. Yaa zẽk-m-meng rãmba la b kʋ yã, b bilim-b lame n dʋʋg soya zutu. Ade Wẽnd sũur nan pa sig ye, b ket n zẽka b nugu." 
Isaiah5:26 Wẽnd na n kamsa tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, b na peeba wɩɩg n bool-ba, la tao-tao bala tɩ b zoe n waame." 
Isaiah5:27 Koamsa la sẽn yɛɛ soab ka b sʋk ye, sẽn suusda, gõeem sẽn tar a soaba, ka b sʋk ye, ned ba a ye ka lodg a sɛɛg sẽbdg ye, ned ba a ye gãndalsa pa yols ye." 
Isaiah5:28 B pɛɛm sɩlsa neere, b tãbd dõosa dɩm-dɩm, b wiidi wã nao-bend keglem, bãng bug-bãng kugri, b bilim-bilm tĩiga, bãng sɩlmande." 
Isaiah5:29 B bʋʋrã: bõnyẽ-yãang dẽnna; kelemda wa bõnyẽega, n wudg n bri, la ned ka n deegdẽ ye." 
Isaiah5:30 N-ye! Daar a ye, bʋʋr n na n maane wala mogr dãamde, Zɩɩda tẽnga. La fo sẽn ges zĩig ning fãa yaa lik sẽn wat ne rabeem, lebga lik tuu, tɩ vẽenem sɛɛ zãnga." 
Isaiah6:1 Dĩm a Oziyas kaalem yʋʋmde, m yãee Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ b zĩ b naan goeel zugu. Naama goeel da vigla yĩngri, Wẽnd futa ra pida rooga fãa." 
Isaiah6:2 Malɛk rãmb n da pẽ-ba. Ned kam fãa tara pɩgs a yoobe: a yiib tarame n lut nenga, t'a yiib tar n lut nao, t'a yiib tar n yɩgda." 
Isaiah6:3 B ra moondame n deesd taaba: «Sõmblem Naaba, Sõmblem Naaba, Sõmblem Naaba la Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala! Yĩngri la tẽnga pida ne bãmb ziiri!»" 
Isaiah6:4 La yɩɩla sẽn pʋdã, kʋɩlensa deeg n dĩmsame la bug-zõos n wẽneg n pid wẽnd doogã." 
Isaiah6:5 La mam yeelame: «Ade, m ka le tõe n yaag m noore, tɩ m noor yaa rẽgdo, m ka tõe n naag n pẽg ye; pʋs n yaa m buuda zãnga n ya rẽgdo. M sẽn yaool n yãend a soaba yaa Dĩma, dũni fãa Soaala.»" 
Isaiah6:6 Malɛk a ye yɩk n kolga maam, a saka bug-saalle maan-kugra zugu ne yɩʋʋgo," 
Isaiah6:7 la a sɩɩsa m no-gãongã n yetẽ: «Bug-saala sẽn sɩɩs f noorã, f yel-wẽna yẽesa zãnga, f wẽnema peka zãnga.»" 
Isaiah6:8 La m wʋma Soaala sẽn soke: «Ãnda la m na n tʋme, ãnda n na n taas m koɛɛgã?» La m yeelame: «Ad-ma, tʋm-y maam!»" 
Isaiah6:9 La b yeelame: «Kẽnge la f tɩ togs neba: B rat bɩ b yoog b tʋba, b kõn wʋm fɩ, b rat bɩ b puk b nini, b kõn yãend fɩ." 
Isaiah6:10 Pag nin-bãmba yam la b tʋba la b nini tɩ b legb zoeense la wʋmse la yam kɩdg rãmba, tɩ b zʋga da tedg ye, tɩ m pa rat b sãoogr ye.»" 
Isaiah6:11 Dẽ la m sok yã: «Na n talla woto n tãag wakat bʋgo, Soaala?» La b leok-m lame: «M na gũu tẽnsã sẽn wat n lebg vɩɩdo, tɩ ned ba a ye ka le kẽed-b ye, tɩ pʋʋg ba a ye pa le tar koaad ye.»" 
Isaiah6:12 Soaala na n tɩ kẽesa neb wʋsg al yɩɩga, woto vɩʋʋg na n yãenda wʋsg tẽnga pʋga." 
Isaiah6:13 La tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, nin-yend sã n põse, neb piig sʋka, ad-y b na n wẽnega tɩ-tobendo, kʋk bɩ tɩ-wok tobendo. Ad-y b na n lebga rũms rɩɩbo. La bãng-y tɩ tɩɩga yagenga na n yɩɩ bõn-paall a to sɩngre." 
Isaiah7:1 Da yaa a Akaz zamaanẽ. A Akaz ba la a Zotam, a Zotam ba la Zɩɩda dĩm a Oziyas. Dɩlla a Akaz zamaanẽ, dĩm dãmb a yiibu n sed ne taaba n na zab n deeg Zerizalɛɛm la b ka tõog ye. Dĩm a ye la a Resin, yẽ yaa Aram dĩma; la a waa ne Israyɛl dĩm a Peka, a Remaliya biiga." 
Isaiah7:2 B wa n yeela a Akaz, a Daviid yagenga, yẽnda ne a poorẽ dãmba tɩ Aram dĩma kẽe Efrayim. La dĩma ne a neba sɩnga rigbu, wa sobgo sẽn kẽ kãoongo tɩ tɩɩsa vãad lengdẽ." 
Isaiah7:3 Wẽnnaam yeela a Izayi: «Kẽnge, fo ne f biiga a Sear-Yasub, n tɩ seg rĩma. A bee zugẽ ko-baoora ko-sora sɛtmẽ. Yaa fu-pɛgdba pʋʋga sor zugu." 
Isaiah7:4 Ad-f sẽn na n yeel-a: Gũus n da yɛɛs ye, da zoe rabeem ye, da bas raood ye. Da zoe Aramga a Resin, la a Remaliya biiga sũur sẽn puuga ye. Yaa ra-giis a yiib sẽn nukd bug-zõos bala." 
Isaiah7:5 M miime tɩ Aramsa, ne a Peka la a Efrayim tãb-biisa baood n na n taka zabr ne foo. D wʋma b sẽn yeele:" 
Isaiah7:6 d bob zabre n kẽ Zɩɩda! D kẽes-a rabeem; d modg-a t'a wa naag tõndo, d kẽes-a a Tabeyɛl biiga soolmẽ." 
Isaiah7:7 La ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: Dẽ kõn saage, dẽ kõn tõog ye." 
Isaiah7:8 Aram na-tẽnga yaa Damas, la a Resin yaa dĩm Damas pʋgẽ bala. — Ka ne yʋʋm pisoob la a nu tɩ Efrayim yell sɛɛme." 
Isaiah7:9 A Efrayim na-tẽng yaa Samari, la a Remaliya biiga yaa dĩm Samari pʋgẽ bala. Y sã n pa teeg Soaala-Wẽnd bala yãmb me yell sɛɛme.»" 
Isaiah7:10 La Soaala-Wẽnd le yeelame tɩ b wilg a Akaz woto: 
Isaiah7:11 «Kos f Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b kõ-f makre, n wilg tɩ b be-la f poorẽ. F ratame tɩ makra yi tẽnga, togse; f ratame t'a yi sa-gãnẽ, togse.»" 
Isaiah7:12 A Akaz leokame: «M kõn saag n kos makre, m kõn saag n kʋɩɩb Soaala-Wẽnd ye.»" 
Isaiah7:13 T'a Izayi na n yeele: Kelg-y ka, Daviid doogo neba, pa sek tɩ y lak ninsaalb yam tɩ y rat n lak m Soaala-Wẽnd dẽnna?" 
Isaiah7:14 Yaa Soaala meng n na n kõ-y makre. Ade: Pa-kuli n dɩk pʋga n na n dog a biiga la a na pʋd-a-la a Emmanwɛl, Wẽnd bee ne-do." 
Isaiah7:15 Biiga rɩɩb na n yɩɩ bĩisim la sɩɩdo, n tãag wakat ninga a sẽn wat n mi wẽng kisgu la neer baoobo." 
Isaiah7:16 La ka ne rẽ, tɩ tẽns a yiibã fo sẽn digd b dĩm dãmba taoorã lebga we-raoogo." 
Isaiah7:17 Sã n ya foo, sã n ya f buudã la f naama roogo, Soaala-Wẽnd na n sika a zugu yel-beedo wa b sẽn zɩ n yãend a taare, al Israyɛl ne Zɩɩda welgra tɛka. — Wã gom n yegda Asiri." 
Isaiah7:18 Daar n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd na n peeba wɩɩga la neb sẽn ya wa zõose, n ka tõe n sõde, na n dʋʋga Ezipt kʋɩlgã n wa, la neb sẽn ya toos wa sĩ na n yi Asiri n wa." 
Isaiah7:19 B fãa na n wa kẽe tãmsa londẽ la pĩisa bogdẽ, n kẽ tuuda fãa n kẽ bãadã fãa." 
Isaiah7:20 Daar n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd na n dʋʋga Efrat kʋɩlga n peng barga n põng y zug zoobdo la kõbg fãa la toɛɛnga." 
Isaiah7:21 Yaa dasem kãense la ned kam fãa na n gʋʋl nag-yãang a ye la bʋ-yãans bɩ pe-yãans a yiibu. 
Isaiah7:22 Rũmsa sẽn tar bĩisim wʋsgo yĩnga, ned fãa na n tõog n dɩɩ bĩs-naare. Sẽn pa-b tẽnga fãa dɩɩbo na n yɩɩ bĩs-naare la sɩɩdo." 
Isaiah7:23 Dasem kãense, pʋʋg sẽn sel bugsuntungu, bugsuntung tɩɩs na ta tusri, n da tõe n koos n paam ligd ka tɛka, pʋ-kãng na n piuuga ne kãgre la gõose." 
Isaiah7:24 Tãbda rãmb na n wa tãoosa be. Tẽnga gill na n lebga gõos ne gõose. 
Isaiah7:25 Tãmsa pend sẽn da ya pʋtã, ned ba a ye wãk kõn le kõrg be, sɩlg-nao-yẽes la gõosa yĩnga. B na n lebga niis la piis wãbnego zĩiga." 
Isaiah8:1 Soaala kõ-m-la noor kãnga: «Dɩk bũmb sẽn ya gilga la sẽn bedme, dɩk f sẽn paam kut ninga n gʋls woto a zugu: A Wudg-n-deeg-f-pʋɩɩre, a Wudg-n-zɛ-f-zɛɛbo.»" 
Isaiah8:2 M wilga gʋlsma kaset dãmb a yiibu sẽn ya pʋ-peelem dãmba, maan-kʋʋd a Uriya, n paas a Yeberekiya biiga a Zakari." 
Isaiah8:3 Mam sẽn yõk m pag nugu, bãngd poaka nugu, a tedgame. A waa n tol n doga biiga tɩ Soaala yeel-ma: «Pʋd a yʋʋra woto: Wudg-n-deeg-f-pʋɩɩre, Wudg-n-zɛ-f-zɛɛbo." 
Isaiah8:4 Ad biiga sẽn wat n na n bãng a ba la a ma boolgo, tɩ Damas la Samari arzɛka fãa wʋk n tɩ sama Asʋr dĩma taoore.»" 
Isaiah8:5 La Soaala-Wẽnd le kõ-m-la koɛɛga: 
Isaiah8:6 «Nin-bãmba sẽn ka pẽgd Siloe kooma koom sẽn zoet n ka maand bʋʋre, n long n n pẽgd a Resin, n long n pẽgd a Remaliya biigã," 
Isaiah8:7 m na n kɩtame tɩ Efrat kʋɩlga fõde n wa rɩ yã; yaa kʋɩlg sẽn tar ko-wiiga la sẽn zulme, kʋɩlg sẽn ya Asiri dĩma la a pãnga makre. Efrat kʋɩlgã na wukame la a na n gãndga a koagsã," 
Isaiah8:8 a na lima a Zɩɩda n tãag yubla n lɛɛg n daale, n yɛdg n saag zĩis fãa, n saag f soolma fãa wɛ, Emmanwɛl.»" 
Isaiah8:9 Bãng-y-yã, Adem biisi, y nong bɩ y sũ taaba ad-y yaa yɛɛsg la y na n yɛɛse. Tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, gũus-y! Y nong bɩ y yiis y zab-teedo, yɛɛsg bal la y na n sege. N-ye, y nong bɩ y yiis y zab-teedo, yɛɛsg bal la y na n sege!" 
Isaiah8:10 Y sẽn sed bũmb ning fãa, y kõn tõog n pids-a ye. Yẽs-y ne taaba wala y sẽn date, bũmb kõn maan a to. Tõnd sẽn teeg a soaba la a Emmanwɛl, a Wẽnd bee ne-do." 
Isaiah8:11 Ade, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn gãd maam b yeel-m lame tɩ m modge n da togs buuda manesma ye. Ad-b sẽn yeel-ma:" 
Isaiah8:12 Da togs-y nin-bãmba n boond tɩ sudum b sẽn zoet bũmb ning rabeem n boond tɩ sudum mengã. 
Isaiah8:13 Gãd-y bala tɩ yaa dũni fãa Soaala n tõe n teem bũmb la yaa ne bãmb la y na n maan rabeem, yaa bãmb la d tog n yɛɛse." 
Isaiah8:14 Soaala-Wẽnd na n teka bũmb a Israyɛl soolma a yiiba pʋgẽ. B na n yɩɩ kugri tɩ neb na n lakdẽ, b na yɩɩ pĩiga tɩ neb na n lakd n lʋɩtẽ." 
Isaiah8:15 Wʋsg na n lak n lʋɩɩme la b na n kaoome. Yaa bẽdgo n na n gãneg Zerizalɛɛm dãmb yĩnga; a na n koomda wʋsg nao la b kõn tẽb n põs ye. 
Isaiah8:16 M na n baoo zĩiga n gãneg m sẽn da rat n togsã; kʋɩlen-doogẽ la m na n pag n sẽn tog n wilgã; m karen-biisa bal la m pa na n solge. 
Isaiah8:17 M gũuda Soaala-Wẽnde. La yaa wa b pa rat a Zakoob buuda gesg ye. M yaool n maaga m meng n ket n teeg bãmba. 
Isaiah8:18 Maam ne kamb niyns Soaala sẽn kõ maama, tõnd lebga makre la bãnde Israyɛl yĩnga; dẽ yaa Wẽnd daabo, bãmb la dũni fãa Soaala. Bãmb n ti b zak Siõ tãnga zugu." 
Isaiah8:19 B na n wa yeela yãmba tɩ y sogs kũum, tɩ kẽer tõe n walem-y-la beoog yelle. B yetame tɩ segdame tɩ buuda gom ne a wẽnd dãmba, tɩ segdame tɩ b gom ne kɩɩmsã, n yõk b sɛɛg sẽn vɩ-ba yĩnga. B sã n gom-y boto," 
Isaiah8:20 bɩ y yeele: Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilga la d na n lɛɛg n tũ. Sẽn ka rata n tũ boto me, beoog kõn vẽeg-a ye." 
Isaiah8:21 Tẽnga kẽedb zĩi ne pɛta, n zĩ ne pʋ-vɩʋʋgo. Koma namsd-b lame tɩ b tʋʋd dĩma la Wẽnde. B nakdame n ges yĩngri," 
Isaiah8:22 n le wẽneg n sulg tẽnga, la b sẽn ne yaa pɛt bala, b sẽn ne yaa lik bala n paas sũ-weoogre la yʋng sẽn pid yʋngo." 
Isaiah8:23 Yʋng a woto buud ka tar beoog n vẽegdẽ ye. Soaala-Wẽnd deng n basame tɩ yãnd dɩ Zabulõ la Neftali tẽn-peelem, la beoog raarã b na n le pids-a ne b ziiri mogra noorẽ dãmba, Zʋrdẽ yaang rãmba, la Galile rãmba, tẽns sẽn da lebg bu-zẽmba soolem." 
Isaiah9:1 Buud ninga sẽn da kẽnda likẽ wã yãee vẽenem kãsenga: vẽenem n yik n yãgd sẽn vɩ-b lik tẽngẽ. 
Isaiah9:2 Soaala, buuda sũ-noog paasa zembala, buuda kɩdeng lebga wʋsgo. Buuda langenda yãmb taoore wala koaad sẽn langd kooda rɩkr daare, wala te-zɛɛdem pʋɩɩb daare." 
Isaiah9:3 Wala y sẽn maan pĩnda, y sẽn waa n dig Madianitsã n sẽege, y le maanda boto rũnna. Y sika zɩɩb ning sẽn da zɩlg a bãgdo wa raoog sẽn palg nag-koods yubla, y kaoo gʋlg ning tʋʋma gɛta sẽn da yulumd a nugẽ." 
Isaiah9:4 Zabr sɛɛme tɩ neooda la fut sẽn mad zɩɩm na n los bugmẽ tɩ b rɩ zãnga. 
Isaiah9:5 Biig n doge, bi-ribl la b kõ-do, dũni wã soolem la b zɩlg a bãgdo, a yʋʋr la woto: a Mi-saglgo, Pãng soaba Wẽnde, Zamaan sẽn wat beoog Ba, Laafi-Dĩma." 
Isaiah9:6 A soolem na n yɩɩ kãsenga, a naama na n yɩɩ laafi tõt sɛɛb naam, a Daviid naama zaoor la a rẽnna, a Daviid soolma n na n yɩ a soolem. A na n vigla a naam, la a na n paasa a naama pãnga, la naama na n tũu zemsg sore. Na n yɩɩ woto dũnna la wakat fãa, la yaa Wẽnd sẽn ka mi yaamse, Soaala sẽn ka yɛɛd ne ninsaal pʋgbã, yaa bãmb n yals rẽnna." 
Isaiah9:7 Soaala-Wẽnd kãaba a Zakoob beedo, sẽn pa sakd kelgre la b togs a Israyɛl." 
Isaiah9:8 Beeda pʋgda a Efrayim a pʋgda Samari rãmba tɩ b neẽ. B yikame n yeele ne wʋglem la tɩtaam: 
Isaiah9:9 Tan-koɛɛm sẽn wʋm bugmẽ roto la b tus n lubi, la d na maneg n pees kug n lebs n me. Rota bɛɛnd ra paga ne ra-pegd pãng sẽn zemse, d na bɛ marsã ne kʋgs ra-pegdo." 
Isaiah9:10 Ad-y Soaala kɩtame tɩ b bɛɛba kaoog zabr ne-ba, b kɩtame t'a Resin kaoog zabr ne-ba." 
Isaiah9:11 Sɩnga yaanga ne Aramsã tɩ Filisti rãmb pʋgda. B sɛɛ Israyɛl zãnga. Soaala sũur ket n na n pa maag ye, b nug ket n zẽkame n na n wẽ." 
Isaiah9:12 Ne rẽ fãa a Israyɛl pa lɛɛg n wa a poorẽ, a ka kẽ dũni fãa Soaal sẽn sɩbgd yẽnda wã ye." 
Isaiah9:13 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd fiuug zugu la b kʋʋg zʋʋre, n yãk vãoog la willi, daar a ye." 
Isaiah9:14 Zuga yaa nin-kẽemba la taoor dãmba, zirẽ-be-bãngdba la zʋʋrã." 
Isaiah9:15 Sẽn da tog n wilg-b sorã kẽe moogo, bãmb n deng menengo." 
Isaiah9:16 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, la Soaala-Wẽnd ka na n bas kom-bɩɩbã. B pa na n zoe kɩɩb-bi nimbãanega, b ka na n zoe pʋg-kõap nimbãaneg ye. Buuda yaa zãmb la nin-wẽns buudu, b goama fãa yaa gãeen-goama. Dẽ la Soaala sũur ket n pa maage, b nug ket n zẽkame n na n wẽ." 
Isaiah9:17 Sɩda wẽnem dɩta wa bugum; a na n sɩnga kãgre la gõose, n wa tat tʋga gilli, tɩ bug-zõos na n tão yĩngri, n tão wala sɩlmande." 
Isaiah9:18 Dũni Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puura bugum n dɩt tẽnga ne a nebã. Ned ka le rat a to ne yõor ye. 
Isaiah9:19 F sã n paam f yaka yaa rɩɩb bala, fo wẽnegda rɩtgo n wãag tɩ kom ket n tar-fo, tɩ f yĩig goabga, n ket n pa tɩgd ye, ned kam lɛɛg n dɩta a menga." 
Isaiah9:20 A Manase zɛɛda a Efrayim, a Efrayim zɛɛda a Manase, t'a Manase ne a Efrayim naag taaba n digd a Zɩɩda. La Soaala sũur ket n pa maag ye, b nug ket n zẽkame n na n wẽ." 
Isaiah10:1 Neb niyns sẽn kõt-b noya sẽn pa segde la sẽn gʋlsd-b sɛb sẽn pa sɛba, yell be-la b rãmb zugu." 
Isaiah10:2 Bãmb n mumd naong rãmb noore tɩ b pa tõe n wilg b sẽn dat ye, bãmb n kɩt tɩ buuda naong rãmb dɩt bõne. Bãmb n fãad pʋg-kõapa la b zɛɛd kɩɩb-bi." 
Isaiah10:3 La y na n maana bõe n põse, Soaala sɩbgr la tẽn-kũuma raarã? Y na n zoe n kẽnga yɛɛnẽ n paam n tɩlge? La ãnda meng la y na gũnug y paoongã?" 
Isaiah10:4 Paka y sulg n deeg y yembd wĩiri, keta y naag sẽn ki-bã n looge. Soaala sũ-puur ket n pʋgda y fãa gilli, b nug ket n zẽkame n na n wẽ." 
Isaiah10:5 Yell be la f zugu, Asʋr, foom la m sũ-puura zãande la a guugu." 
Isaiah10:6 Maam n tʋm Asiri, nin-wẽnsa sʋka, Maam n kõ-a noore t'a zab ne sẽn da yikd-b mam sũurã, n kõ-a noore t'a fã la a zɛ b laoga gilli, la a fẽd b mensã wa sor zug begdo." 
Isaiah10:7 Mik pa wa Asiri yamẽ tɩ maam n tʋm-a ye; a tagsga yaa toore, a baoodame n na n sãam la a menes buud a taaba wala a sẽn tõe tɛka." 
Isaiah10:8 A waa n yeta a meng woto: «M tãnsoaben-dãmb sẽn tar naam ninga ka yɩɩd dĩm dãmba rẽn sɩda? 
Isaiah10:9 M ka maana ne Kalno tẽnga wala m sẽn maan ne Karkemis bɩ bõe? Yaa Amat la m pa sɩbge wa m sẽn sɩbg a Arpad bɩ bõe? La m pa sɩbga Samari wa m sẽn sɩbg Damas bɩ bõe? 
Isaiah10:10 M nug wãa rĩundu, sẽn da waoogd wẽn-naandse, - b wẽn-naandsa togsenda sõor da yɩɩda Zerizalɛɛm la Samari rẽnda, -" 
Isaiah10:11 bõe tɩ m pa na n maan ne Zerizalɛɛm wẽn-naandsã wala m sẽn maan ne Samari rẽnna. M ka tõeeme bɩ bõe?» 
Isaiah10:12 Soaala sã n wa sɛ b tʋʋma Siõ tãnga zug la Zerizalɛɛm, b na sɩbga a Asʋr, t'a sũur pida ne zẽk-m-menga, la a pa get wa ned toga ne waoogr ye." 
Isaiah10:13 Bãng-y t'a yetame: M nug n tʋm a pãng tʋʋma, m yam n tʋm a yam tʋʋma. M sɩlma yɩɩda m taab rẽnna. M vigsa nanams toose n loog neb arzɛka, la wala gãndaoogo, m sik-b-la b naama goeels zugu." 
Isaiah10:14 M nug wʋka tẽnsã arzɛgse wala gɛl sẽn be tʋkẽ; m wʋk-b-la naana-naana, la pɩgs pa laal m zugu, noor pa yaag n kelem ye." 
Isaiah10:15 La Soaala-Wẽnd n sokde: Ned na zẽk lare n na n pees bũmbu, tɩ lara lɛɛg n wukd a menga? Ned na kɩ a sʋʋg yẽna n na n wãag bũmbu t'a tãoosd daood wala a wãada a toore? Yaa wala dasaarã n yuumd sẽn yuumda yẽ wã, bɩ kukurã n zẽkd sẽn zẽka yẽ wã." 
Isaiah10:16 Dẽ n so tɩ bũmb fãa Wẽndã, dũni fãa Soaala na n kɩt tɩ sẽn tar-b arzɛka fãa Asiri tẽng na n lebga naong rãmba. B sẽn pɩnd ne neerem ninga na n yɩɩ bugum dɩɩbo." 
Isaiah10:17 Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl vẽenema, na n lebga bugum; a Israyɛl Soaala na n lebga bug-witem n dɩ tʋga la gõosa daar a yembre bala." 
Isaiah10:18 Kãoonga maasem, zẽeda bʋgsem, neba fãa sẽn pẽgdã, rẽ fãa na n sɛɛ zãnga; yita wa bãada, kũum sẽn loogd ne." 
Isaiah10:19 Tɩɩs niyns sẽn na n põs-ba b sõor na yɩɩ bilfu, põadg meng tõe n sõd-b lame." 
Isaiah10:20 Badaar tɛka a Israyɛl la a Zakoob zakẽ dãmba sẽn paam-ba n põsã, b yam na n laka ne Asiri sẽn da zãad-b toogã. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Nin-sõngã nengẽ la b na n bao sõngre." 
Isaiah10:21 Bilfra sẽn põs a Zakoob zakẽ wã na n lɛɛg n kẽe Pãng soaba Wẽnde. 
Isaiah10:22 Ade, Israyɛl, ba fo kamba sõor da taẽ bĩisri sẽn sam mogr noore, yaa bilfr bala n na n lɛɛg n wa kẽ Soaala-Wẽnde. Buuda wãab yals n sɛɛme. Sẽn tog la sẽn zems la d na n maane." 
Isaiah10:23 Bũmb fãa Soaala-Wẽnda na n waa ne sãoong ning b sẽn kãabe. 
Isaiah10:24 Ne rẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽndã, dũni fãa Soaalã gomda woto: «M buuda sẽn kẽed Siõ, da zoe a Asʋr sẽn pãbd-f ne guugu la zãande, wala f sẽn yãend Ezipt tẽnga ye." 
Isaiah10:25 Kõn le kaoos tɩ m sũura maag ye. La yaa ne bãmb marsã la m na n pa, n kʋ-b zãnga.»" 
Isaiah10:26 Wẽnd na n pãba Asiri rãmba ne kaase wala b sẽn maan ne a Madiã, Orɛb tãnga zugu, b na n zẽka b dasaare n va sẽn be-b mogra sẽnẽ, wala b sẽn maan ne Ezipt." 
Isaiah10:27 Badaar tɛka, f bãgd na tɩlg ne zɩɩbo, f zug na vʋʋs ne tʋkre. Raoog ning sẽn palgd nag-koodsa yublã na n yãkame n lob yɩɩg-yɩɩga." 
Isaiah10:28 Bɛ wã rʋʋda Samari a tata Ayat, n pɩʋʋgd Migrõ, n wat Mikmas n bĩngd a teeda be." 
Isaiah10:29 Bɛ wã wẽdga so-sẽka n ta Geva, n yeele: «D gãand ka. Rama rãmb gãeeme n digda, tɩ Gibea rãmb ning tĩiga, t'a Sol tẽng rãmb sɩng zoeese." 
Isaiah10:30 Kelem-y-yã, Bat-Galim dãmba, wẽ-y no-bɩnga. Layisa rãmba modg-y ne kelgre, Anatot rãmba, sak-y boole!»" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmena rãmb zoetame, tɩ Gebim dãmb baood zĩig n soondẽ." 
Isaiah10:32 Baraar bala, bɛ wã taa Nob n yals be, n zẽk a nug gilgu n na n yeel Siõ, la a yeel Zerizalɛɛm tɩ b maan gũusgu." 
Isaiah10:33 Mik bũmb fãa Soaala, dũni fãa Naanda na n tusa tɩɩsa wil n lub ne pãnga; tɩ-wogda fãa rʋʋgame, b fãa rʋʋgame." 
Isaiah10:34 Googa tɩɩse, lar n lub-b fãa gilli. Libã kʋgsa ne b rasãndlma dʋra tẽnga." 
Isaiah11:1 A Zese tɩɩga na n tãoo will polle, tɩ-polle n na n tãoo a yẽgnẽ n yi." 
Isaiah11:2 Soaala-Wẽnd na n kõ-a-la b meng Vʋʋsem sɩlem la yɛl-welgr yam, saglgo la sũ-keglem yam, bãngre la Wẽnd nif zoees yam." 
Isaiah11:3 Sɩda b na n wilg-a lame t'a zoe Soaala-Wẽnd nifu. A ka na n tũ a nif sẽn yãend ye, a ka na n tũ a tʋbr sẽn wʋme n kao bʋʋd ye." 
Isaiah11:4 M ba-ka-neng rãmb bʋʋd tũuda tɩrga, tẽnga naong-rãmb paamdame tɩ b bʋʋd tũud sɩda. A gomd lebga daasare t'a tar n pãbd nin-yoodo, a noor pemsem kʋʋd-b lame," 
Isaiah11:5 Zemsgo la a bob n kẽnda, a sɛɛg sẽbdg yaa pʋ-peelem." 
Isaiah11:6 Digd-n-yĩidga ne pe-bila na n vɩɩnda ne taaba, tɩ ãbg gãe n yeg bulla. Nag-bila la bõnyẽ-bila na n wãba bãoog a ye la yaa bi-bilfu n kɩɩmd-ba." 
Isaiah11:7 Nag-yãanga la katre rɩɩb na n yɩ-la a ye tɩ b kamb sõsd maasem yɛnga. Bõnyẽeg na n wãba yamdo wala naafo. 
Isaiah11:8 Yãag reemda ruruug bok noore, a na n dɩka a nugu n ning boosr bokẽ." 
Isaiah11:9 Wẽng buud ka le tʋmde, sãoong buud ka le sãamd Soaala tãn-sõnga zug ye; tẽnga pida zãng marsã ne Wẽnd bãngre wa mogr sẽn pid ne koom." 
Isaiah11:10 Wakat n wate t'a Zese yagenga na n lebg wa tãb-kaoore ninsaalb fãa yĩnga la a na n pida ne ziiri. 
Isaiah11:11 Wakat n wate tɩ Soaala na le zẽk b nugu n fãag b buuda sẽn kellã, sẽn kees-b Asiri la Ezipt, sẽn be-b Patros, Kus, Elam, Sinear, Amat la mogra tẽnsʋk tẽnsã." 
Isaiah11:12 Tãb-kaoor n na n zẽk neba fãa yĩnga tɩ Israyɛl pa-weta fãa na n yi ween-vɩɩs a naasã n lɛɛg n wa tigim Zɩɩda. 
Isaiah11:13 A Efrayim Zab-taasma la a zoe-bõna na n sɛɛme, a Zɩɩda bɛɛba na n menesa zãnga, a kõn le zab ne a Efrayim ye." 
Isaiah11:14 B na n naaga taaba n kaoog zabre ne nin-taoor dãmba, ne Filisti rãmba; b na n naaga taaba n tɩ zɛ yaang rãmbã. B kams na n tẽega a Edom la Moab zugu la Amon kambã n na n lebg b soolma neba." 
Isaiah11:15 Wẽnd na n kʋɩɩsa Rudum mogre. B na n tẽega b nugu Efrat kʋɩlga zugu, b na fʋʋsa a kooma ne b noor pemsem la a na weela nao a yopoe, la b na n dʋʋg-a lame tɩ neooda pa woob ye." 
Isaiah11:16 Woto, buuda sẽn kellã, sẽn da paa a Asʋr nugẽ, na n tũu sore sẽn ya naana wala Israyɛl sẽn paam sor ninga a sẽn waa n yit Ezipt tẽnga." 
Isaiah12:1 Badaare a Israyɛl na n yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnde m pẽgd yã, yãmb da puuga y sũur ne maam la y sigsa y sũuri n wa belgd maam." 
Isaiah12:2 Ade, Soaala n yaa m Fãagda, m basa m meng bãmb nugẽ la dabeem ka le tar-m ye; Soaala n kõ-m pãnga tɩ m yɩɩnd-ba. Yaa bãmb n wa ne m fãagre." 
Isaiah12:3 Soaala la y Fãagr kʋɩlga, kẽng-y ne kɩdengo n tɩ toog koom.»" 
Isaiah12:4 Badaare y na n yeelame: «Pẽg-y Soaala, kils-y b yʋʋre, moon-y b tʋʋm bãna nin-vɩɩs sʋka, moon-y tɩ b yʋʋr yaa sõngo." 
Isaiah12:5 Kils-y Soaala-Wẽnd tɩ b maana bõn-bãna. Tãs-y tɩ tẽng zug rãmb fãa wʋme. 
Isaiah12:6 Siõ kamba, kaas-y sũ-noogo la kɩdem-y! A Israyɛl Nin-sõnga paam pẽgr f tẽn-peelmẽ!»" 
Isaiah13:1 Ad-a Amos biiga a Izayi sẽn wʋm Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ, ad Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Babilon." 
Isaiah13:1 Ad-a Amos biiga a Izayi sẽn wʋm Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ, ad Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Babilon." 
Isaiah13:2 Dʋ-y tãng sẽn ka tar tɩɩse n yagl tãb-kaoore, wẽ-y no-bɩnga, zẽk-y y nugu n kams tãb-biisã tɩ b wa na-komsa noorẽ." 
Isaiah13:3 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n boond m tãb-biisi tãb-biis niyns m sẽn welg toorã, tãb-biis niyns m sẽn mi b rãmb tiirã gãndaad sẽn pid ne mam ziira kilsg sũ-noogã, m boond-b lame tɩ b wa zab n sõng-ma." 
Isaiah13:4 Kelg-y tɩ bʋʋre n maand tãnga zugu la yaa neb ka tɛk sẽn lood bʋʋre. Kelg-y dĩm dãmb sẽn sũ taab bʋʋre. Ad-y yaa dũni fãa Soaala-Wẽnd n segend zabre n tongd b tãb-biisa sẽn na n tak zabrã. 
Isaiah13:5 B yita tẽn-zãorgẽ, al saaga satmẽ. Yaa Soaala n puug b sũuri n wat ne b zab-teedo n na wã tẽnga zãnga." 
Isaiah13:6 Wiis-y, kelem-y kʋʋre tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd daar kolgame! Yaa Soaala n wat n na n wã b wãabo." 
Isaiah13:7 Yaa rẽ la nug kaẽ n na maan daoodo, tɩ sũur kaẽ n na n yals ye." 
Isaiah13:8 B fãa gill tara yɛɛsgo, baag-po-rũng gesa b gĩina n sẽbe, toog lebsda b yĩnga goabg la rɩtgo; pag sẽn kũmd rogem bas n vʋʋse. B yiiga b nina n get taaba, rabeema teema b yĩn-gãongã." 
Isaiah13:9 Soaala daara waa n sɛɛme. Yaa sũ-puuri daare, ka-sugri daare, tɩ tẽnga na n lebg rasempʋɩ-kãsenga, tɩ yel-wẽn-maandba fãa na n sɛ baraare." 
Isaiah13:10 B kõn le yãend yĩngri ãdsã ne b tikim-tikma ye; b kõn le yãend b vẽenema ye. Wĩndga na n puka sablgo, la kiuug kõn le yãg a yãgb ye." 
Isaiah13:11 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «M na n sɩbga dũni wã, a wẽnema yĩnga, n sɩbg, nin-wẽnsã b bi-beelma yĩnga; m na sika na-toosã wilg-m-menga la b tɩtaama." 
Isaiah13:12 Sãnem yãeeb sẽn ya toog ningã, ninsaalba yãeeb na n yɩɩ toog n yɩɩge. B yãeeb na n yɩɩ toogo n yɩɩg Ofir sãnem." 
Isaiah13:13 Ade, m na n miima saagã tɩ tẽnga na n deeg n dĩmi, dũni fãa Wẽnd sũ-puurã raare, dũni fãa Wẽnd sũ-fõora raare." 
Isaiah13:14 Ninsaalba na n wẽnega yãk sẽn yɛɛse, n wẽneg wala piis sẽn ka tar gũuda, ned kam fãa na n bao a buud zĩiga, ned kam fãa na n zoe n dɩk a ba yir sore." 
Isaiah13:15 Sẽn basa tɩ b yõk-a, b kodgda a soaba. Sẽn basa tɩ b paam-a, sʋʋg n lubd-a." 
Isaiah13:16 B na kooda b yagense b nifẽ, n zɛ b roog teedo, n sãam b pagba." 
Isaiah13:17 M na n tusa Mɛd dãmb tɩ b yik zabr ne-ba, la Mɛd toog ka be ne wanzurfu la a ka ges sãnem wa bũmb ye." 
Isaiah13:18 B pɛɛma na n kõsa kom-dibli wã, b na taba kom-pugli wã n bedse. B ka zoet pag biig nimbãaneg ye, b nin kõn kals tɩ bi-bilf n tar toog ye." 
Isaiah13:19 Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ Babilon, Kalde dãmb na-tẽnga, b tẽn-neere la b faong menga, lebg raboog wala Sodom la Gomor, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tus pĩnd n lubi." 
Isaiah13:20 A kõn le paam tɩ ned le wa ti a yir be n tãag dũni wã yikri. Arab kõn pɩʋʋg be, la rũm-kɩɩm kõn bas a niis tɩ b gãand be." 
Isaiah13:21 Na n lebga we-rũms gãaga, rota na n pida ne viuug luiili, na-neend meng na n waa be, wãams na n saoo be." 
Isaiah13:22 Kata na n kõo taab sɛk tẽnga do-neeba pʋga, we-baas me boto. Tẽnga wãab daar kolgame, Babilon lʋɩɩs ka na n le tadg ye.»" 
Isaiah14:1 Ade, Soaala na n wilgame tɩ b nonga a Zakoob yagensã. B na n wilgame tɩ bãmb n yãk a Israyɛl. B na n le kẽesa b nebã b saam-dãmb tẽngẽ. Sãamba na n wa naaga ne bãmba, b na n fãooga ne a Zakoob buudu." 
Isaiah14:2 Yaa bu-zẽmbã n na n sõng a Israyɛl t'a leb a tẽngẽ. La zĩig ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk tɩ yaa b soolma, a Israyɛl na zã bu-zẽmb kãense wala yem-daado la yem-pogse. A pĩnd soaalba la a na n sooge, sẽn da paga yẽ roogã la a na n lɛɛg n pag roogo." 
Isaiah14:3 Ade, Israyɛl, Soaala-Wẽnd sã n le wa kõ-f laafi f pɛta la f nimbãanega poore, f yembda sẽn yɩ tooga poore," 
Isaiah14:4 fo na n pʋda yɩɩn-kãnga n la n kaas Babilon dĩma. Ges-y yel-bãnde! Dĩm toaaga wẽneg n baasa woto, sẽn da tara nebã n wẽoogdẽ wã baasa woto?" 
Isaiah14:5 Soaala-Wẽnd kaooga nin-wẽng dasaare. B tõra dĩm toaaga naam dasaare. 
Isaiah14:6 Sɩda, rasaar n da pãbd buud a taabã dasaar sẽn ya zɩsgo la sẽn da pãbd n yɩlemnẽ. Babilon dĩma, foo n da wõrda, foo n da pãbd dĩmd dãmb a taab n ka tol n mi yaamsa bɩ?" 
Isaiah14:7 Marsã dũni wã gill yaa n vʋʋsdame, laafi yaa n waame, la neba kaasda b sũ-noog kaasgo." 
Isaiah14:8 Tɩɩsa mens tara sũ-noogo. Wakat n zĩndi tɩ bãmb me ra tar toogo. Tɩ-bɛda naaga ne Libã kʋgsã n tãsdẽ: «Ad-b sẽn maan fo kʋʋr tɛka, b ka le wat n kɛɛd tõnd ye!»" 
Isaiah14:9 Bʋg-tẽng me yika ne foo, rĩm toaagã. Ad-a sẽn wʋm f waoongã a neka a kɩɩmsa fãa, a neka sẽn yɩ-b rĩm bɛda, sẽn yɩ-b dũni wã soaalba, fãa yikame n yɛsẽ." 
Isaiah14:10 B fãa na n naaga taab n moone: «Õõ! Fo me pãnga sɛɛme, fo me yaa wa tõnd bala!»" 
Isaiah14:11 F naama busa tẽngr-tẽngre n naag ne f ruudsa rãamde. F gãaga yolgo yaa karen-tʋko, zũnzũi la f fu-goabga." 
Isaiah14:12 Fo maana wãna n fare n lʋɩ, ka fo taoore la dũni wã ninsaalb da sur laa, tõd-beoog ãdga, puk tɩ zĩig yẽeg soaba? Ad-f sẽn gãe tẽnga, foom, sẽn da lubda dũni nanamse!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ka foom n da yet f sũurẽ: «M na dʋʋ yĩngri n zʋʋg Wẽnd ãdse, m na n tɩ zaoonda tãnga wẽnd dãmba ne b kug-zĩidba tãnga, tãng sẽn lug nug goabg, yɩɩg yɩɩga." 
Isaiah14:14 M na n dʋʋ sawad-sabla zugu, maam ne yĩngri Soaala na n zenga taaba.»" 
Isaiah14:15 Maana a wãn marsã tɩ f sigi n sig bʋg-tẽnga, bog-zulung pʋgã?" 
Isaiah14:16 Be rãmba sẽn ne foom tɩ f watã kolgame n get-fo n ka kamsdẽ la b yetẽ: «Yaa rao-kanga n da rĩmsd tẽnga bɩ? Yẽ n da sikd dĩm dãmba b zaoorẽ wã bɩ? 
Isaiah14:17 Yaa yẽ n da tekd tẽnsa neng tɩ lebgd we-raada bi? N wãad rotã la a zãgsdẽ t'a kõn yiis a sẽn sui b rãmb rooga bɩ?» 
Isaiah14:18 N-ye! Dĩm dãmb a taaba paama b vʋʋsg zĩiga, b yaoogẽ," 
Isaiah14:19 Foom bala la b lob yɩnga, n ka paam yaoogo n kõ-fo, tɩ f rɩg wa pa-tare, wala bũmb sẽn ya waoosa, wala kũum b sẽn tabe. Neb sẽn ki la b rɩk n zam foom, bãmb fãa na n wa gãnega yaoogẽ," 
Isaiah14:20 foom bala n ka na n yãag-ba, b yaada zĩigẽ, tɩ f wã-la f tẽnga, f raaga f soolma rãmb zɩɩm. Abada, b kõn le pʋd f buuda yʋ-yooga ye." 
Isaiah14:21 Bɩ b segl kamba kʋʋbo, b kʋ-b n dolb b ba rãmb tʋʋm wẽna, tɩ b me ra wa yik n le baood n na n soog dũni wã la b le me tẽns ye." 
Isaiah14:22 Dũni fãa Soaala le paasame: «M na yika zabre, la m na n menesa Babilon yʋʋre, fãa na n sɛɛme, a kõn le paam biiga tɩ b pa gomd yageng ye." 
Isaiah14:23 Babilon na n lebga bãoogo la raond na-tẽnga. M na pɩɩsa Babilon ne saaga, ne saag sẽn menesd sagd zãnga.»" 
Isaiah14:24 Dũni fãa Soaala kãaba woto: «M sẽn sed bũmb ninga, n na n yalse, m sẽn yalsã n na n pidsi." 
Isaiah14:25 M na n luba Asiri m tẽngẽ, m na n tab-a-la m tãmsa zutu. A ra kẽesa m nebã a yembdẽ, m na rig-a n menese; zɩɩb bɛd la a ra zɩlg m kamba, m na tus zɩɩb kãng n lubi.»" 
Isaiah14:26 Woto la Soaala yals dũni wã fãa yĩnga, woto me la b yet ãndũni rãmba tɩ b maan gũusgu." 
Isaiah14:27 Dũni fãa Soaala sã n yals bũmbu, ãnda n tõe tɩ pa pidsi? B nug sã n zẽk n na n wẽ, ãnna n tõe tɩ wẽed ka wẽ?" 
Isaiah14:28 Dĩma Akaz sẽn ki yʋʋmd ningã la Soaala yiis koe-kãnga. 
Isaiah14:29 Yãmb fãa, Filisti rãmba, ad-y dasaar ning sẽn da tar n pãbd yãmba, dasaar kãng sã n kaooge, bɩ y ra yãg n kɩdem ye. Bãng tɩ b sã n kʋʋg wag-maasre a tobda põeere, la põeera na n lebga wag-bãnde sẽn yɩgd n kɛɛdẽ." 
Isaiah14:30 Ad-y naong rãmba na n paama dɩɩb zĩiga, sẽn tar-b pɛta na n paama vʋʋsem la laafi. Sã n ya foo, Filisti, ad-f bɛ wã na n waa ne kom n sɛɛs f buuda zãnga, a na n kooda koma sẽn na n kees b rãmbã." 
Isaiah14:31 Yãmb fãa, tẽns sẽn tõe n zab n fãag y mense, naag-y taab n kelem Filisti kʋʋre, Filisti rãmb gĩin maagame tɩ b zĩ ne yɩɩre, tɩ b nee bug-zõos sẽn nukd nug goabga sẽnẽ. B nee tãb-biisa sẽn sũ taab gilli n watẽ." 
Isaiah14:32 Bõe la b na n leok Filisti rãmba? Leok-y-ba tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd mee Siõ; la nimbãan-dãmba na n zĩnda a pʋgẽ ne laafi. 
Isaiah15:1 Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne a Moab. Yʋng ning b sẽn tõog-a wã ad-y Ar-Moab rãmb lebga sɩɩ. Ad-y yʋng ning b sẽn tõog-a wã, Kir-Moab me lebga sɩɩ." 
Isaiah15:2 Dibõ neba kẽnga Wẽnd waoogra zĩ-sõngẽ n na n tɩ yãbe. Nebo tãnga zug la Mɛdeba, a Moab kelma kʋʋre. Zug fãa põngame, toɛɛng fãa wõrsame." 
Isaiah15:3 Neb sẽn yer sũ-pa-noang fuug la b ne tẽnsa pʋgẽ, la bɛɛnda zutu la raasẽ wã yaa kaasg bala la b wʋmda. Sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa nintãm." 
Isaiah15:4 Esbõ ne Eleale rãmb kotame tɩ b wa sõng-ba. Yãbra rãamd sãag n ta Yaas. Yaa rẽ la a Moab tar kaasgo, a pɛleng yɩkame, t'a yam bonnege." 
Isaiah15:5 M boondame tɩ b wa sõng a Moab. A neba zoe n digda Soar, la Eglat-Selisiya. B rʋʋda Luyit ne nintãm, Oronayim sor zugu b wiisdame." 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim, koom zĩiga, lebga tẽn-koɛɛnga, tɩɩsa kʋɩɩme, mooda wãkame, mo-maas yãeeb lebga toogo, vã-maas ka le ket ye." 
Isaiah15:7 B sẽn da ket n tõe n sõng b mens ne bũmb ningã neba tall-a lame n kẽng taoore, b tall-a lame n dʋʋg tɩ-wogda kʋɩlga." 
Isaiah15:8 A Moab kɛlenga gilga tẽnga fãa n sege. A kɛlenga taa Eglayim, n ta Elim bulga." 
Isaiah15:9 Divõ kʋɩlga na n mooga ne zɩɩm. La Soaala-Wẽnd le paasame: «Sɩbgr n nan ket n wate: sẽn paam-ba n zoe n põse, a Moab kamba sʋka sẽn ka paam-b n zoe n põse, tẽnga pʋgẽ fãa na n yɩɩ bõnyẽeg dɩɩbo.»" 
Isaiah16:1 Moabitsa yeelame tɩ b zĩnd Sela, al zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã, n tool dĩma pe-bila, dĩm ning sẽn dɩta naam Siõ bi-pugla tãnga zugu." 
Isaiah16:2 Yaa Arno kʋɩlga sẽn tõe n dʋʋg zĩig ningã la Moab pagba ra tigim taaba. B da yaa wa luiili b sẽn yɩk b tʋgdẽ, tɩ b sẽeg yaare." 
Isaiah16:3 Moabitsa ra kota Zerizalɛɛm woto: «D bõsda y saglgo, leok bũmb tɩ d kelge. Yɛdg f pãnga wa maasem n gũ tõnd wĩntoogo, la wala yʋngo tẽeg f likã n pil sẽn zoe-b n wa kẽ ka wã, da luk sẽn zoet-ba bãong ye." 
Isaiah16:4 Kõ sẽn waa n soond-b ka wã sore, tɩ b kell n pa f tẽngẽ. Sõng-b tɩ b põs sẽn data n kʋ-bã. La ned sã n wa ka le wẽoogd a to, pãn-tõoga sã n wa sɛ fãada sã n wa looge n bas tẽngã," 
Isaiah16:5 wakat kãnga, f nonglma yĩnga, naam zaoor la b na n le maneg n vigl zaoor sẽn tar pãnga, sẽn na n kaoos, a Daviid sɩmannẽ, a Daviid yagenga yĩnga. A na n yɩɩ bʋ-kaooda la bũmba fãa na n tũu sɩd la zemsgo.»" 
Isaiah16:6 D mi-la a Moab wilg-m-mengã, a wilg-m-menga yaa wʋsgo. A tɩtaama la a wʋglma waooga, a pa gomd wa bũmb n be t'a pa tõe n maan ye." 
Isaiah16:7 Moab rãmb zĩime n tar waasgo. B fãa yɩɩnda b yɩɩlle, n tẽegd Kir-Erɛs rɩ-noodã sẽn da maan ne bugsuntung biisi. B sũur da zabda wʋsgo tɩ b wiisdẽ." 
Isaiah16:8 Ges-y yel-beedo! Esbõ pʋta sãamdame, pʋt sẽn da zao wa b lolomda tãnga. Sibma bugsuntunda kʋɩtame, bãmb rã-toosa n yaool n da lubd dũni wã soaalba. B ra yɛdgame n ta Yazɛr n tol n kõs weoogã n wa menem be, n tol n tão yagense n wa tãag Yamsem mogre." 
Isaiah16:9 Yaa rẽnna la m naag Yazɛr rãmba n yãbd Sibma bugsuntundu. M yãbd-y lame, Esbõ ne Eleale, tɩ m pa le wʋmd sũ-noog kaasgo, y bugsuntunda tõsb raar ye." 
Isaiah16:10 Sũ-noogo la kɩdengo buud fãa sɛɛ y bugsuntunda pʋtẽ. Rʋgd ka le tar rãam ye, sẽn wẽkd-b siba biis ka le tar tʋʋmd ye, b ka le kelemd n deesd taab ye." 
Isaiah16:11 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la m yɩɩn n kũmd a Moab wala ruudg sẽn kũmdi, m kũmda a Kir-Erɛs m sũurẽ." 
Isaiah16:12 B na n le yãenda a Moab t'a le yẽrd n pʋgd a wẽn-naandsã, t'a le babsd-b tãmsa zutu, n yõkd b sɛɛga, la fɩ ka na n tek ye." 
Isaiah16:13 Woto n yɩ koɛɛg ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yiis a Moab poorẽ al daar zãra. 
Isaiah16:14 Ad-b sẽn yet dũnna: «Ka ne yʋʋm a tã muka, Moab ne a nin-tɩɩsã, ne a zãma wã, na n paama yãnde: sẽn na n kellã na yɩɩ bõn-mɛdga, bũmb sẽn ka sek sõadg ye.»" 
Isaiah17:1 Ad Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Damas: Yɩ bilfu Damas kõn le sõd tẽn-bɛda sʋk ye, a na n lebga raboogo." 
Isaiah17:2 Tẽns niyns sẽn gũbg yẽ wã, ned kõn le kẽ bãmb me abada. B na n lebga rũms wãbneg zĩiga. Be la b na n vʋʋse la ned kõn dig-b ye." 
Isaiah17:3 A Efrayim lal-gũbrã na n lʋɩɩme. Damas naam na n sɛɛme. Aram kamb sẽn na n keese pa na n yɩɩg Israyɛl kamb ye. Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala gom yã. 
Isaiah17:4 Daar n wate t'a Israyɛl na n faage, a pʋʋra na n woogame." 
Isaiah17:5 Na n yɩɩ wala tigsg wakato tɩ b wʋrd alkam, la b rɩgsd kalse; na n yɩɩ wa tigsgu Refayitsa bãg-faagẽ," 
Isaiah17:6 sẽn kees yaa yiisgu rẽnna; na n yɩɩ wa oliv yagsgo: yiib bɩ tãab sẽn pa yĩngr-yĩngri; naas bɩ nu sẽn pa will poala zugu. Woto yaa Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽndã koɛɛga." 
Isaiah17:7 Badaare ninsaal na n gesa a Naanda, a na gesa a Israyɛl Nin-sõngã." 
Isaiah17:8 A kõn le ges maan-kuga sẽn yaa a nus tʋʋmde, a kõn le yãend a nus-bi piiga sẽn dõoge bɩ sẽn peese, wala a sẽn ka na n le ges raadã a sẽn peesã, la a wisda laase." 
Isaiah17:9 Badaare, soond-n-põs kũuma tẽnse na n lebga vɩɩdo, fãa na n lebga raboodo wala Amoritsa la Ivitsa tẽns sẽn lebg to-to, a Israyɛl kamba taoore. Na n yɩɩ we-raoogo." 
Isaiah17:10 Ade, Israyɛl, fo yĩma Soaala-Wẽnde, Wẽnd ninga sẽn fãaga fooma. Fo yĩma f pĩ-kɛgengã la lillã. Dẽ la f send tɩɩse n na n waoog f wẽnde la f bʋt f bʋdbo tẽn-zẽng wẽn-naands yĩnga." 
Isaiah17:11 Fo sẽn bʋd-b daare la b wẽnegd n yi, la vẽkembeoogo b zoe n yaa puudu. F yaool n kõn dɩ f sẽn bʋda yõodo tɩ yel-beed sõor n puki, bũmb ka be sẽn na n tõog n tigsi la rẽ ka be tɩɩm ye." 
Isaiah17:12 Ade, neb ka tɛk bʋʋr n sãte, bu-zẽmba bʋʋr n sãt wa mogr sũur sẽn puug bʋʋre, bu-zẽmba bʋʋre, mogr sũur sẽn yik bʋʋre." 
Isaiah17:13 Ade, neb ka tɛk bʋʋr n sãte, bu-zẽmba bʋʋr n sãt wa ko-kẽenga rẽnna. Mik Soaala-Wẽnd na n mooga b nifu, tɩ b kʋɩ tĩiga, n zãage, tɩ b yɩk wala sobgo sẽn dɩkd ka-fɩɩba sẽn yɛdg tãng zugu, tɩ b yɩk wala sɩlmand sẽn loogd ne bõn-faoogo." 
Isaiah17:14 Sẽn da yɛɛsd-b neb zaabrã, vẽega beoogo n kaẽ ye, sẽn zɛɛd-b tõndã yell na n yɩɩ woto, sẽn fãad-b tõndã yell baasda yoogo." 
Isaiah18:1 Yel-beed ne-fo, tẽng sẽn pid ne rũmsi, tẽng sẽn me Nubi kʋɩlsa noore!" 
Isaiah18:2 Yaa foo n tʋm f neba ne koom-kogend faase, koom-kogend sẽn wʋg ne rudma. Bɩ y fãa zoe tao-tao n leb y nin-wogd tẽngẽ, neb sẽn kõogd b yɛɛm tẽngẽ, tẽng sẽn kẽesd a yags rabeem. Leb-y-yã, gãndaad sẽn tabd b bɛɛba. Leb-y y kʋɩl-fõtsa tẽngẽ!" 
Isaiah18:3 Yãmb fãa, dũni ninsaalba, tẽng zug nin-vɩɩsa fãa, ges-y tãnga zugu, tãb-kaoora sã n wa laannẽ, yoog-y y tʋb n kelge, baorga sã n wa peebd n zẽesdẽ." 
Isaiah18:4 Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne m woto: «M zao m doogẽ wã n get sɩɩ yɛla sẽn maandã. M zĩi sɩɩ tɩ b pa ne-ma, wala wĩntoog tʋʋlgo, wala sawadg sẽn dʋʋgd a meenem ka-kɛɛr wakato.»" 
Isaiah18:5 La bãng-y tɩ tigsga wakato, bugsuntunga sẽn wat n ning a puudã n sɛ, a sẽn wat n sɩng n na n yod a biisã, tɩ biisa me sɩng moogre, b rɩkda sʋ-yaleng n kʋʋs wila wil niyns sẽn ka wome la b yolem vãada la tobendã." 
Isaiah18:6 Rẽ fãa rɩkdame n bas ne tãng zug sɩlse la we-rũmsi. Sɩlsã n na sõs ne-ba, tʋʋlgo, la we-rũmsã n so b rɩgra waood wẽnde." 
Isaiah18:7 Yaa wakat-kãng marsã la b na n tall kũuni n wa kõ dũni fãa Wẽnde. Sẽn na n wa-b ne kũuna yaa nin-wogdo, yaa neb sẽn sõ b nens kaam tɩ pɩnda, yaa buud sẽn kẽesd dabeem dũni wã yaang la a taoore, buud sẽn tabd a bɛɛba, la sẽn yit kʋɩl-bɛd tẽngẽ. La kũuna na n tall n wa kõo dũni fãa Wẽnde, Siõ tãnga zugu, b waoogr zĩigẽ." 
Isaiah19:1 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Ezipt. Ade, Soaala-Wẽnd zomba sawad-faasga n ta Ezipt tɩ Ezipt tẽng wẽnd dãmba, zirẽ-be-wẽnd dãmba digd rabeem, tɩ Ezipt dãmba sũur bendg b pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah19:2 «M na zablga Ezipt rãmba ne taaba: yao na n yika ne a kẽema, tɩ zoa yik ne a noanga, tɩ tẽng yik ne a tẽn-taaga, tɩ rĩung yik ne rĩungu." 
Isaiah19:3 Ezipt yẽesem sɛɛme, a bãngre sɛɛme, tɩ b na bʋg b zirẽ-be-wẽnd dãmba, n bʋg b bagba, b tɩt rãmba, n sogs b kɩɩmse." 
Isaiah19:4 M dɩka Ezipt rãmba n ning nin-toaag nugẽ; dĩm sẽn kʋʋd nugẽ la m na n ning-ba. Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele, dũni fãa Soaala n yeele.»" 
Isaiah19:5 Mogr kooma na n sɛɛme, kʋɩlga koom na n fõogame." 
Isaiah19:6 Ko-soya na n lebga yũugu, Nil kʋɩlgã na yõbgame, a na kʋɩɩme; rudma la bãng-n-sãag na n lʋɩɩme." 
Isaiah19:7 Nil kʋɩlga moodo na n wãkame, b pʋs n sʋʋgame, b kõn le yãend bũmb ye." 
Isaiah19:8 Kʋɩl-zẽ-yẽedba na n kelmame, zĩm-leoosa rãmba na n yãbame, zulumsa rãmba na n waasame." 
Isaiah19:9 Sẽn kood-b lamda ka na n naf ye, gurs-kãna rãmba, sʋnda rãmba, bãmb pa na n dɩ yõod ye." 
Isaiah19:10 Sʋnda rãmb sũur sãamame, sʋnda sẽn da rɩlgd b rãmba basda raoodo." 
Isaiah19:11 Ad-y Tanis nanamsa ka tar yam ye. Sẽn sagend-b Ezipt dĩma yam paooda. B yɩta a wãn n yeel dĩma: «Mam yaa yam vẽenem dãmb biiga, pĩnd dĩm dãmba yagenga?»" 
Isaiah19:12 Yam vẽenem dãmba bɛɛ? Kos bãmb tɩ b wa wilg-fu dũni fãa Wẽnd sẽn yals Ezipt poorẽ. 
Isaiah19:13 Tanis dĩm biis yaa gãeemse. Memfis dĩm biisi belgda b mense, b taoor dãmba kɩtame tɩ Ezipt tõr saad n tuumnẽ." 
Isaiah19:14 Naaba-Wẽnd lob-b-la nen-yilinga dẽ la Ezipt kẽnda n ka le mi a sẽn maande, wala rãam sẽn lub rã-yũuda t'a sãad n wʋbdẽ." 
Isaiah19:15 Ezipt ka le tõe fɩ, a taoor dãmb ka le tõe fɩ, a poorẽ dãmb ka le tõe fɩ." 
Isaiah19:16 Badaare Ezipt rãmb na n diga rabeem wa pagba, b na yɛɛsame, b sã n wa yãend dũni fãa Wẽnde sẽn zẽk b nug bãmb zugu." 
Isaiah19:17 Zɩɩda soolma na n kẽesa Ezipt rãmb rabeem kãsenga, Ezipt rãmba na n saoo kalwaare, b sã tẽeg Zɩɩda yelle, b sã n tẽeg dũni fãa Wẽnd sẽn dat bãmba ne wẽng ningã." 
Isaiah19:18 Badaare tẽn-bɛd a nu n na n gom Ebre rãmb goama la b na n yik n wẽename tɩ b na n kẽe dũni fãa Wẽnde. Ir-Aeres, sãoong tẽnga, na n zĩnda sʋka." 
Isaiah19:19 Badaare b na n mee maan-kugri dũni fãa Wẽnd yĩnga, Ezipt tẽnsʋka. Ezipt toaagẽ me, b na vigla kugri, Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga." 
Isaiah19:20 Dẽ n na n kõ kaseto, dẽ n na n wilgi tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnd tara waoogdb Ezipt tẽnga. B sã n namsd-b tɩ kelem n tees Soaala-Wẽnde, b na tʋm-b fãagda, b na tʋm ned sẽn na n zab n sõng-ba tɩ b tɩlge." 
Isaiah19:21 Wẽnd na n lika b meng Ezipt rãmba la Ezipt rãmb me na n bãng-b lame. B na n waa ne b maand la b kũuni. B na n pʋlma Soaala-Wẽnde la b na pidsa b pʋlengo. 
Isaiah19:22 Ba Soaala-Wẽnd sã wa wẽ Ezipt rãmba, b na n sãoog-b lame. B na n pʋga Soaala-Wẽnde la Soaala-Wẽnd na n deega b kosgo la b fãag-ba." 
Isaiah19:23 Badaare sor n na n yi Ezipt n dig Asiri tẽnga. Asʋr na n waa Ezipt tɩ Ezipt kẽng Asʋr. B fãa na n naaga taaba n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Isaiah19:24 Badaare, a Israyɛl na n naaga Ezipt la Asʋr, tɩ bãmb b tãabã reeg kaseto tɩ b paama Wẽnd barka." 
Isaiah19:25 Dũni fãa Wẽnd na n ning-b-la bark woto: «M ningda Ezipt, m buuda, barka. M ningda Asiri, m nus sẽn naana barka. M ningda m pʋɩɩr, a Israyɛl barka.»" 
Isaiah20:1 Yʋʋmd n zĩndi tɩ Asʋr dĩm a Sargõ tʋm a tãnsoaba t'a wa zab ne Asdod, n tõog-a." 
Isaiah20:2 Yaa yʋʋm kãnga la Soaala-Wẽnd taas b gomdã a Amos biiga, a Izayi, n yeel-a: «Ade, sẽk sũ-pa-noang fuugã f sɛɛgẽ la piid f nao wã gãndalsa.» T'a Izayi sɩd maan wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeele, n da kẽnd a zaala, la a ka wid neooda ye. Asdod lʋɩɩsa wakato, Soaala yeela a Izayi t'a togs woto:" 
Isaiah20:2 Yaa yʋʋm kãnga la Soaala-Wẽnd taas b gomdã a Amos biiga, a Izayi, n yeel-a: «Ade, sẽk sũ-pa-noang fuugã f sɛɛgẽ la piid f nao wã gãndalsa.» T'a Izayi sɩd maan wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeele, n da kẽnd a zaala, la a ka wid neooda ye. Asdod lʋɩɩsa wakato, Soaala yeela a Izayi t'a togs woto:" 
Isaiah20:3 «M sõgna, a Izayi, kẽna a zaala la a ka wid neoodr yʋʋm a tã ye. Rẽ n na n yɩ makre Ezipt la Kus yĩnga." 
Isaiah20:4 Ade, Asʋr dĩma na n talla Ezipt rãmb n tɩ pag roogo la a loog ne pa-weere Nubi rãmba, b kom-bɩɩb la b nin-kẽemse neodr kõn ningi la fuug kõn lud kɩgbr ye. Na n yɩɩ yãnde, yãn-pʋ-lʋʋmd ne Ezipt rãmba!" 
Isaiah20:5 Sẽn da teeg-b Kus, sẽn da get-b Ezipt wa b zu-zẽkre, bãmb dãmb zĩi ne rabeem la yãnde.»" 
Isaiah20:6 Mogra noorẽ dãmba na n yeela badaare: «Ges-y tõnd saagra sẽn sãam zãnga! Tõnd da teega bãmba n zoe n wa soond bãmb tẽngẽ, n paam sõngre, n põs Asʋr dĩma; woto wã marsã d yɩta wãna n põse?»" 
Isaiah21:1 Ad Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Babilon sẽn na n lebg we-raoogo. Bɛɛb n yit we-raoogẽ wã n watẽ, n yit tẽng ning sẽn kẽesd rabeema n watẽ, la a wẽnda Negɛb sob-raoogo." 
Isaiah21:2 Sẽn pa sõmbe tɩ Soaala wilg-ma la woto. Pĩnd zoa wã n lebg zãmb soaba, la bɛ wã zoe n sɩnga wãabo. Dẽ me la Soaala yeta: «Elam dãmba, wa-y Babilon! Mɛd dãmba, wẽ-y gũbri! Yaa rũnna la m na n sik a wilg-m-mengã.»" 
Isaiah21:3 Ad-y m sẽn wʋme, toog sãaga m yĩnga, m digimda waoodo, wala pag sẽn kũmd dogem. M sẽn wʋma leeba m yama zãnga, m sẽn ne wã yɛɛsd-m-la wʋsgo." 
Isaiah21:4 M dat n basa raoodo, m digda rabeem kãsenga. M da gũuda zaabre n na n paam pemsem maasga, la a teemame n lebg yɛɛsg wakato." 
Isaiah21:5 Rɩɩba tall n waa rɩɩba roogẽ, roog manegame n tʋɩ pɛɛla, tɩ b sɩng rɩɩb la yũubu; la koɛɛg lʋɩɩme n yetẽ: «Tãnsoaben-dãmba, yik-y-yã! Dɩk-y y zab-teedo!»" 
Isaiah21:6 Ad-y Soaala yeel-m-la woto: «Kẽnge, dʋʋs gũud rooga zugu t'a wilg a sẽn na n yãend bũmb ninga!" 
Isaiah21:7 A sã n ne bilim-bilm sẽn sog wiidi zabr yĩnga, n ne bõeens bɩ yʋgma, bɩ a maan gũusgu, a maan gũusg wʋsgo!»" 
Isaiah21:8 Gũuda yeelame: «M pa-la m zĩigẽ wã daara tõre, yʋnga tõre m maana gũusgu," 
Isaiah21:9 la ade, ges-y, ned n yi yɩɩg n watẽ. Ned n zao bilim-bilm, la wiidi n tat-a. Nin-kãng n yet woto: ‹Babilon lʋɩɩme, Babilon lʋɩɩme! A wẽnd dãmba togsendã, fãa wãame n dɩg tẽnga!› »" 
Isaiah21:10 M buudu, Soaala sẽn pãb a soaba wala ki sẽn dʋʋg zɛɛgẽ, ade, m buudu, yaa woto la m wʋm yã, dũni fãa Wẽnda nengẽ, woto la m wʋm Israyɛl Soaala nengẽ, la m waame n na n wilg-fu." 
Isaiah21:11 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Duma. Koɛɛg n yi al Seyir, m sok ma: «Gũuda, yʋnga ta-la a wakat bʋgo? Yʋnga ta-la a wakat bʋgo?»" 
Isaiah21:12 Tɩ gũuda leoke: «Zĩiga sɩngda yẽegre la ket n yaa yʋngo, la y sã n dat leokre, y tõe n le lɛɛg n waame.»" 
Isaiah21:13 Bãngda sẽn yeel Arabi poorẽ. Dedã toandba, leb-y weoogẽ wã, leb-y pʋ-weesẽ wã n gũ beoog vẽegre." 
Isaiah21:14 Tema kẽedba, wa-y ne koom, yi-y n seg-y ko-yũud sẽn kʋʋd b rãmbã, yi-y ne buri n seg sẽn zoet-bã." 
Isaiah21:15 Yaa sʋʋs la b zoeta, sʋʋs sẽn wõos n dat kɛɛb la b zoeta, yaa tãbdo sẽn dõos la b zoeta, tɩ yaa zabre sẽn zabd ne rugdu." 
Isaiah21:16 N-ye! Soaala goma ne maam woto: Yʋʋmd a ye yɛsa, yʋʋmd muka, t'a Kedar pãnga la a ziir sɛɛ zãnga." 
Isaiah21:17 Sẽn na n kees Kedar tẽnga, a tãb-tãoodb ka tɛkã sʋka, a tãb-biisa sẽn ya gãndaadã sʋka, sẽn na n keesa ka na n zeng bũmb ye. La rẽ yaa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, n yeele." 
Isaiah22:1 Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yeele b likra bãg-faag poorẽ. Yaa bõe n wate Zerizalɛɛm? Bõe tɩ f neba fãa zoet n dʋʋd b bɛɛndo? 
Isaiah22:2 Bõe tɩ tẽng pid ne bʋʋre n pid ne kaasgo? Bõe tɩ tẽnga wulumd zãnga? Sẽn ki-ba n gãe f tẽn-peelmẽ wã, ka zabrẽ la b kʋ-b ye ka zabr zĩigẽ la b lʋɩ ye." 
Isaiah22:3 F tãnsoaben-dãmba naaga taaba n zoe. Tãp sẽn yãage, zabr sɛɛme, tɩ bɛɛba na n yõg-ba n pag roogo, b tol n yõga sẽn da paam-ba n zoe n zãagã." 
Isaiah22:4 Yaa dẽ la m yet-y marsã: «Zãag-y ne maam, bas-y tɩ m yãb m yãb toogo, da mak-y m belgr ye, maam ne m buuda sẽn dɩ bõna belgr ye." 
Isaiah22:5 Dũnna, Soaala, dũni fãa Wẽnda, waa ne d sũ-bondgre, tɩ d konga raoodo n zĩ ne yãnde.» Bãngda sẽn yɛs bãg-faag ninga noorã n yãet a yãeebã, bãg-faag kãng wulumda ne bʋʋre kelensa sãt n kuiisa yĩngri." 
Isaiah22:6 Elam tãb-biisa dɩka b tãbd la b logdo, bilim-bilma pida ne neb tɩ wiid tatẽ, Kir tãb-biisa segenda b gãndo." 
Isaiah22:7 Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga, ad bãg-faag neerem sẽn yɩɩd a taaba, pida ne bilim-bilm la wiidi; fãa tonga tẽnga noore." 
Isaiah22:8 A Zɩɩda ka le tar sõngr ye. Badaare yãmb wẽnemda y nenga, n tees zab teeda sẽn bĩngd doog ningã, n tees na-zaka, Libã googã." 
Isaiah22:9 Y yãeeme t'a Daviid tẽngẽ lalsa poo zĩis ka tɛka, y koka koom n pids pipi ko-baoorã," 
Isaiah22:10 y sõda Zerizalɛɛm dota fãa; y wãa rot kẽere n na n paam n zab tɩ lal-gũbrã ra lʋɩ bɛɛba nusẽ ye. 
Isaiah22:11 Y mee ko-baoor lals a yiiba tẽnsʋka n na kok zugẽ soaba koom. Y nenga sẽn pa wẽnemd n ges a soab bala, yaa Soaalã, sẽn tara bũmb fãa tɩɩma. Soaala sẽn da segl yɛla al pĩndã yaa bãmb bal la y pa yãende." 
Isaiah22:12 Ad-y marsã wã, dũni fãa Soaala da ratẽ lame tɩ y yãbẽ, n kelmẽ kʋʋre, n põngẽ y zugu la y sẽgnẽ sũ-pa-noang futu." 
Isaiah22:13 La ayoo! Yãmb maanda sũ-noog la kɩdengo; yãmb koota y niisi la y piisi, yãmb wãbda y nemdo la y yũud y rãam, la y yetẽ: «D dɩ la d yũ tɩ beoogo d na n loogame.»" 
Isaiah22:14 La dũni fãa Soaala menga n kõ maam koe-kãnga: «M wẽendame tɩ yell a woto ka tõe n manege, tɩ yãmb ka reng n ki ye.»" 
Isaiah22:15 Dũni fãa Soaala goma woto: Kẽng sõgen kãsenga a Sebna nengẽ, kẽng sẽn geta dĩma zaka nengẽ." 
Isaiah22:16 Sok-a n gese a soo bõe ka, a kĩi ne ãnda ka, t'a tol n kɩt tɩ b wedg pĩiga, n ning a yaoogo tãnga lʋgrẽ, la a maneg n pees-a n gilgi, tɩ be n na n yɩ a yaoolem doogo?" 
Isaiah22:17 Ade, vugr bala Soaala-Wẽnd na n lub-f lame, nin-sõngo, b na n baoo bũmb n sagl-fo," 
Isaiah22:18 b na n lob-f lame tɩ f bilim wa koaasga, n tees-f tẽn-yalengẽ. Be la f na n ki, be la f na n pa ne f bilim-bilma sẽn ya f zu-zẽkrã, tɩ fo meng yaool n ya f zu-soaba yãnde!" 
Isaiah22:19 M na n vik-f-la f zĩigẽ, yaa Soaala n gomde, m na n yiis-f-la f tʋʋmnẽ." 
Isaiah22:20 Badaare bala m na n boola m sõgne, a Ilkiya biig a Eliyakim." 
Isaiah22:21 Yẽnda la m na yeelg fo fu-yorgo n sẽbg-a fo sẽbdga, n deeg fo naama n kõ-a, la a na n lebga wa ba Zerizalɛɛm dãmb yĩnga, a Zɩɩda rĩunga yĩnga." 
Isaiah22:22 M na n dɩka kʋɩlen-bila, a Daviid dooga kʋɩlen-bila n bobl-a a sã n pake, ned kõn page, a sã page ned kõn pake," 
Isaiah22:23 M na n vigla a naama zĩig sẽn ya kɛgengẽ; a naama zaoor na n viglame a na n lebga a buuda zu-zẽkre. 
Isaiah22:24 Bũmb ning sẽn be, yaa a Eliyakim sẽn base t'a buuda neba fãa, bɛd la bõonese, wa n fãoog yẽnda wala b sẽn mii n naag n yagl zĩ yɛnga: leense, laase, yʋya, tɩ lebg zɩsgo." 
Isaiah22:25 La ade, dũni fãa Wẽnd n gomde, daar n wate, tɩ kaadga menga, ne b sẽn ka-a zĩ kɛgengẽ wã, na n feoogame n lʋɩ tẽnga, la teeda fãa sẽn da yagla na n wãame. Soaala-Wẽnd n yals rẽnna." 
Isaiah23:1 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg ne Tir. «Kelem-y kʋʋre, Tarsis koom-kogendo, tɩ y tẽnga wãame, la roog pa kees ye.» Ad-y yaa b sẽn ta Sipr la b yaool n wʋm rẽnna." 
Isaiah23:2 Yɛɛs-y la mum-y y noore, mogra noorẽ dãmba, Sidõ toandba," 
Isaiah23:3 toandba, sẽn dʋʋgd mogre. Kood niyns fãa sẽn bʋd Nil kʋɩlga noore yaa Sidõ n da tʋkd n looge. Yẽ n da rɩt ãndũni rãmba fãa yõodo." 
Isaiah23:4 Yãnde, Sidõ, Yãnde! Foo la mogra noorẽ dãmba tãnsoben-doogo! Mogra meng yaaga a noor n gomda: «M zãgsda rogem waood rigbu, m zãgsda rog kamba, m zãgsda wub kom-dibli la kom-pugli.»" 
Isaiah23:5 Ezipt rãmba sã n wʋm kibarã, b na n yãee toog wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem, b na n yãee toogo wala b sẽn yãe toog ninga yɛla sẽn waa n pak Tir." 
Isaiah23:6 Mogr noore dãmba, rʋʋg-y mogrã n ta Tarsis n kelem y kɛlenga!" 
Isaiah23:7 Y sũ-noog tẽnga n lebg woto? Y tẽnga sẽn ya tẽn-kʋdem-wẽnnẽ tẽnga, t'a kamba sẽeg n kẽed al yɩɩga la woto?" 
Isaiah23:8 Yaa ãnda n yals woto Tir yĩnga, tẽng sẽn da ya naam pugli pʋɩta? A toandba ya na-komse tɩ raadba ya tẽng nin-bɛd gilli." 
Isaiah23:9 Ad-y yaa dũni fãa Wẽnde n yals woto, sẽn na yɩ-la n sik wilg-m-menga, sẽn baood-b waoogra wilg-m-menga, la b sik sẽn paamd-b waoogr dũni rãmba nengẽ." 
Isaiah23:10 Tir, ko pʋt marsã, tɩ zĩig ka le ket koom-kogenda sẽn na n soond sobg ye." 
Isaiah23:11 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela mogra t'a maan gũusgu, b kɩtame tɩ nanams dig rabeem, b kõo noore tɩ b menes tao-tao Kanaã tãnsoben-dota fãa." 
Isaiah23:12 Bãmb n sɩd yeele: «Da le bao sũ-noog ye, Siõ bi-pugla, tɩ fo sãamame tɩ f nan pa kul sɩd ye. Ba f sã n yik n dɩk sore, f sã n dʋʋg mogrã n ta Sipr f na bao vʋʋsg n konge." 
Isaiah23:13 Ges Sipr dãmba tẽnga: bũmb ka le ket ye. Asʋr da rɩk-a lame n maan a koom-kogend tigsg zĩiga, la b waa n mee ro-lug-lugi n wa tak zabr ne-a; b sɩd waa n wã-la a ro-neeba tɩ fãa lebg raboogo." 
Isaiah23:14 Kelem-y, Tarsis koom-kogendo, tɩ y sẽn da soond sobga zĩig ningã tẽn-kãng wãa zãnga.»" 
Isaiah23:15 Wakat n na n zĩndi, yʋʋm pisopoe pʋgẽ, dĩm a ye naam dɩɩb tõre, b pa na n le tags Tarsis yell ye. La yʋʋm sã n wa maan pisopoe, Tir na n wẽnega pʋg-yoodr ninga b sẽn togsd a soab kibar woto ne yɩɩllã:" 
Isaiah23:16 Dɩk f pɛndga, ka le tar sõm soaba, saag tẽnga roto n wẽed f pɛndgã, le wẽ-a wa f sẽn mi tɛka, le rɩk f pĩnd yɩɩlã tɩ daare b na le tẽeg f yelle." 
Isaiah23:17 Yʋʋm sã n pid pisopoe, ad Soaala na n le gesa Tir yelle la Tir na n le sɩng n deegda a yooba ligdi, a na le rɩka a menga n kõ ãndũni rãmba." 
Isaiah23:18 La a yaoodã, a sẽn paamda fãa na n lebga Wẽnd soolem, pa tõe n le bĩng ye, pa tõe n le tisg ye, yaa sẽn tʋmd-b wẽnd dooga tʋʋma n na n soog ligd kãnga, n paam n dɩlgd b menga, n dɩt n tɩgda la b yeelgd fut sẽn ya neeba." 
Isaiah24:1 Ad-y Wẽnd meng n na n wa sãam tẽngã, n sãam-a t'a nenga tedg fasi, n sẽeg a kamba zĩig zãnga." 
Isaiah24:2 Maan-kʋʋda wala neb a taaba, zu-soab wala yamba, roog-ma wala roog-biiga, sẽn yaa pengda wala sẽn deegda pengrã, sam-dɩta wala b sẽn dɩ a soab samde, fãa na n wẽnega taaba." 
Isaiah24:3 Tẽnga na n sãama zãnga, zɛɛdba na n zɛɛ-a lame. Soaala-Wẽnd yalsa woto:" 
Isaiah24:4 «Tẽnga lebga kʋ-yiri, a lebga raboogo, dũni wã sãamdame, a lebgda raboogo, yĩngra meng naaga tẽngã n teemnẽ.»" 
Isaiah24:5 Tẽnga rẽgmame, tẽnga kamb n tʋm dẽnna tẽnga kamb tõdga noore, tẽnga kamb kɩɩsa Wẽnd noore, n sãam zoodã sẽn da yõg daar fãa yĩnga." 
Isaiah24:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la kãab wẽng pʋg tẽnga zãnga t'a reeg a sɩbgre, yaa rẽ la bugum dɩt tẽng zug rãmba, tɩ sẽn na n põs-ba sõor lebgd bilfu." 
Isaiah24:7 Rãam ka le kõgd ye, bugsuntunda bẽedame, sũ-nooga rãmba waasda toog waasgo." 
Isaiah24:8 Gãngãad pa le maand noog ye, sũ-noog kaasgo ka le kaasd ye." 
Isaiah24:9 Rã-yũudba ka le yɩɩnd b yɩɩl ye, rã-toosa lebga tɩseng b noorẽ." 
Isaiah24:10 Tẽnga lebga vɩʋʋgo, n lebg zũnd-zãnde, zak fãa noor pagame, noor ka bee n kẽedẽ ye." 
Isaiah24:11 B yãbda soya zutu, tɩ dãam sɛɛme, tɩ sũ-noog buud fãa sɛɛme, sũ-noog digame n zãag ne tẽngã." 
Isaiah24:12 Tẽnga pʋgẽ, bũmb ba a ye ka le ket a zĩigẽ ye, tẽnga noor kʋɩlenga kaoome."
