Isaiah24:13 Tẽnga ninsaalb na n lebga yiisgu wala oliviye tɩɩg sẽn tõs n looge, wala sãbse sẽn kao n sɛ." 
Isaiah24:14 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn fãag b rãmba, n zẽkd b koeese, Soaala-Wẽnd ziira la b kilsd ne yɩɩla, sũ-noog kaasgo la b kaasda; b yii nin-taoor n watẽ, la woto la b yɩɩnda:" 
Isaiah24:15 «Yaang rãmba, pẽg-y Soaala yʋʋre, moon-y mogra noorẽ tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam.»" 
Isaiah24:16 Tõnd wʋmda yɩɩn-kãnga, yaa al tẽnga satmẽ la a yit woto: «Sẽn nonga zemsg soaba, paam pẽgre!» M wʋmame n yeele: «Yel-beed lʋɩ m zugu, yel-beed lʋɩ m zugu! Ad-y lebga bʋk ne bʋko! Zãmb n zãmbde, ned kam fãa zãmba wa a sẽn tõe tɛka." 
Isaiah24:17 Y sẽn lebẽ fãa na n yɩɩ yɛɛsgo, loanga, bẽdgo n gũud-y, yãmb fãa, tẽng zug rãmba." 
Isaiah24:18 Yɛɛsda bʋ-raasã n wudg n lʋɩ loangẽ, n paam n yi loangẽ, n tees n pa wĩir bẽdgẽ. Kooma rat n dɩɩ tẽngã, tẽnga tara miuungu." 
Isaiah24:19 Tẽnga tara pusbu, ad-a sẽn kɩllde, ad-a sẽn lʋɩte." 
Isaiah24:20 Tẽnga tuumda wala rã-yũuda, a zũndga wala roog sugri, a yel-wẽna zɩsg-a lame, a sẽn lʋɩ, a ka le tõe n yik ye.»" 
Isaiah24:21 Baraar me, zabre n na n yiki, n yik ne yĩngr-yĩngr dãmba, n yik ne tẽng zug dĩm dãmba fãa." 
Isaiah24:22 B na tigs-b lame n kẽes bokẽ, b na n pag-b-la roogo n bas tɩ kaoose n yaool n wa kao bʋʋdo." 
Isaiah24:23 Kiuug na n moogame, yãnd n na yõk-a, yãnd n na n yõk wĩntoogo tɩ yẽ me vẽenem booge. Dũni fãa Wẽnd n na n dɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm, Siõ tãnga zugu. B kug-zĩidba taoore, sẽn wat-b bãmb taoor ne koeesa toor-toorã, b na n basame tɩ b ziira yãge." 
Isaiah25:1 Soaala, yãmb la m Wẽnnaam, m datame n kils la m pẽg y yʋʋre, m datame n wilg y sẽn yaa a soaba. Sɩda yãmb pidsa y kãab-noogã, kãabgo y sẽn zĩnd n tagse, tɩ bũmb ka be sẽn na teem ye." 
Isaiah25:2 Yãmb kɩtame tɩ tẽnga lebg kug-saongo, y kɩtame tɩ ka sugr dãmba tãnsoben-dooga tek n lebg raboogo, wilg-m-meng rãmb tẽnga ka le ya tẽng ye, b kõn le tõog n me-a n yik abada." 
Isaiah25:3 Yaa rẽ la buud sẽn tar pãnga na n pẽg y yʋʋre. Bu-zẽmb toosa tẽnsẽ, Soaala, yãmb n na n dɩ naam." 
Isaiah25:4 La rẽ wã yaa y sẽn sõng nin-koam dãmba, n sõng naong sẽn tar b rãmbã, b sẽn da waa n zĩ ne b farã. Yãmb yɩ-la b roogo saag niib wakato, n yɩ b maasem tɩɩga, wĩntoogẽ. Ad-y na-toosa sũura fõta wa saag sobgo," 
Isaiah25:5 tɩ b sũ-puura maand wa wĩntooga tʋʋlem sẽn maand ne tẽn-koɛɛnga. Yãmb sɛɛsda wilg-m-meng rãmba bʋʋre. Wala sawadg maasem sẽn woogd wĩndg waolgo, woto me na-toosa sẽn wat n dat n wilg b pãnga, wakat kãng la b noor ka na n le tõog n yaage." 
Isaiah25:6 Dũni fãa Wẽnd na n segla dɩɩbo, Siõ tãnga zugu, ninsaalb buud fãa yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ nemd sẽn be kaam, la rã-sõma me pa na n paoog ye, nemd sẽn bʋgse la sẽn tar kaam, rãam sẽn pid rãam, n ka tar zurbzutu." 
Isaiah25:7 Bũmb ning sẽn lud b yama wa fuugã bũmb ning sẽn mum bu-zẽmba nina, Wẽnd na pilg-a-la Siõ tãnga zugu." 
Isaiah25:8 Kũum na n menema zãng-zãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd na n yẽesa nensa fãa nintãm, b na peka b buuda rẽgdo n menes zãnga; rẽ yaa Soaala n kãabe." 
Isaiah25:9 Baraare b na n yeelame: «Bãmb la tõnd Wẽnde. Bãmb nengẽ la d da gũud fãagre, la b sɩd fãag-d lame, bãmb la tõnd teegre, d kɩdem la d lange tɩ b sɩd fãag-d lame." 
Isaiah25:10 Wẽnd pãng siga tãn-kãnga zugu.» Sã n yaa a Moab, b tabd-a lame wala b sẽn tabd yamdo b sẽn gãneg bokẽ tɩ põogẽ." 
Isaiah25:11 A Moab zẽkda a nusi n kabend wa ko-rugsa, la a sẽn maand fãa Soaala na n sɛɛsa a tɩtaama." 
Isaiah25:12 Ad-f lal-gũbrã sẽn me ne kug sĩdma la sẽn ka tõe n gãndgã, Soaala-Wẽnd tus-a lame n lub tomẽ." 
Isaiah26:1 Badaare b na yɩɩla yɩɩn-kãnga a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ: «Tõnd tẽng yaa tãnsoben-tẽnga, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn dat-a ne fãagr yĩnga, a tara lal-gũbri la pʋgẽ lalse." 
Isaiah26:2 Pak-y kʋɩlense tɩ nin-sõma wã buud kẽ, buud ning sẽn deegda Soaala noore." 
Isaiah26:3 Ad-y yaa neb sẽn tar zʋg sõngo, la yãmba, Soaala, y zãad-b-la y laafi pʋgẽ tɩ yaa yãmb bal la b teeg yã." 
Isaiah26:4 Dɩk-y yɛla wakat fãa n bas ne Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ bãmb yaa pĩig sẽn kõn wã abada. 
Isaiah26:5 Bãmb n sikd sẽn da zao-b yĩngri, n sikd tẽnga, sẽn da zao-a tãn-silenga zugu. Tẽng sã n beẽ n yet tɩ b ra tag a pʋgẽ bada, bãmb tusd-a lame n lubi la b bilim-a tomẽ." 
Isaiah26:6 Bãmb basdame tɩ buud ninga sẽn yaa naong la ka-pãng-soaba wa tab-a n bedse.» 
Isaiah26:7 Nin-tɩrg sor yaa tɩrga, nin-sõng sor ka tar bogdo la goaleng ye." 
Isaiah26:8 N-ye! D da yɛsa yãmb so tɩrga zugu n get yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnnaam, tõnd teega yãmba! Ned kam fãa sẽn date yaa pʋd y yʋʋre, yaa bool yãmba." 
Isaiah26:9 Yʋngo, mam me ratame tɩ y pẽneg-ma m baood-y-la ne m sũur fãa. Yãmb sã n maand ne tẽng zug rãmba wala y sẽn yiis y noorẽ, b manegd n tũu so-tɩrga." 
Isaiah26:10 La yãmb sã n zoet nin-wẽnsa nimbãanega, b ka zãmsd b sẽn tog n maan ye, b golemda sẽn ya tɩrga, b pa ne yãmb ziira ye, Soaala." 
Isaiah26:11 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb basda ninsaalba tɩ b gũusi, la b pa ne fɩ. Bɩ b paam yãnde, bãmb sẽn pa ne y sẽn zabd ne sũur ninga, y buuda yĩnga! Bɩ bugum ning sẽn da segl bɛɛba yĩnga, bɩ bug kãng dɩ-b zãnga." 
Isaiah26:12 Soaala-Wẽnde, y na kõ tõnd d sẽn datã. Sõng-y tɩ d sẽn sɩng bũmb ninga wa tõog n baas neere." 
Isaiah26:13 Soaala-Wẽnnaam, tõnd sulga d zugu dĩm dãmb a taab taoore, la yãmb bal yell la d ket n dat n tẽege." 
Isaiah26:14 D soaalba taaba kiime la b kõn le vʋʋg ye, b kẽe kũum zamaanẽ b kõn le yik b gãagẽ ye. Sɩda yaa yãmb n wa n menes-ba n menes bũmb ning fãa sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ b le tẽeg b yelle." 
Isaiah26:15 Yãmb paasa d buuda neba sõore, la rẽ yaa yãmb zu-zẽkre, Soaala; yãmb zẽka d buuda yʋʋre, yãmb yalga d tẽnga toose." 
Isaiah26:16 Wẽnnaam, d nimbãanega pʋgẽ yaa yãmb la d bao yã, tɩ d zoe-la y sɩbgr rabeem." 
Isaiah26:17 Wala pag sẽn kũmd dogem, n waasdẽ la a kɩlld goabga la rɩtgo, tõnd me yɩɩ boto, yãmb taoore, Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Isaiah26:18 Yɩɩ wa tõnd me da rɩka pʋga n kũmd dogem, wala d na n sɩd dogame, la kato, yɩɩ sobg bal la d wa ne, tõnd ka maan fɩ n fãag dũni wã ye, d ka rog nin-paalse n kõ dũni ye." 
Isaiah26:19 M buudu, sẽn ki-b yãmb maasmẽ wã na n vʋʋgame, m neba na n nekame. Sẽn gãee-b tẽnga tomẽ wã fãa gilli, la b na n kelma b sũ-noogo. Dũni fãa Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ vẽenem sig wa meenem, tɩ tẽnga na n lebsa kɩɩmsã b vɩɩm." 
Isaiah26:20 M buudu, kẽ f roogẽ n lebs n pag f kʋɩleng neere, solg f meng bilfu tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũur paam n sigi." 
Isaiah26:21 Ade, b yita b roogẽ n na n sɩbg tẽng zug rãmba gill yel-kɛga, tẽnga na n basa zɩɩma a sẽn da busã t'a le ruki; a ka na n le solg kɩɩmsa sẽn da muma ye." 
Isaiah27:1 Badaare, Soaala-Wẽnd na n dɩka b sʋ-yalenga, n dɩk b sʋ-kɛgenga, b sʋ-rɩtga, b sʋ-taoko, la b na n sɩbga a Leviatã. Yẽ la koomẽ rũm-bãndã, waaf sẽn ka sɩɩsde. yẽ la waaf ne põada, Ad-y Soaala na n kʋʋ yẽnd me." 
Isaiah27:2 Baraare, yɩɩl-y m bugsuntunga yɩɩlle, tɩɩg ninga biis sẽn kõgd rã-noogã." 
Isaiah27:3 Yaa m menga, Soaala-Wẽnd menga, n gũud-a, m zãgsd-a-la koom wala a sẽn date, m gũud-a-la wĩndg la yʋngo, tɩ ned da wa kẽ a pʋgẽ ye." 
Isaiah27:4 M sũur ka le puud ne-a ye, gõose la pulgumdi sã n belg b meng n yi, m na zab ne-ba, m na yõog b bugum zãnga." 
Isaiah27:5 Sẽn kete yaa bɛɛba wa soond mam maasmẽ, yaa b wa maan zood ne maam, n-ye, yaa b bao laafi ne maam!" 
Isaiah27:6 Sã n yɩ bilfu a Zakoob buuda na n pusa yẽgen-paala, a Israyɛl na n tobame la a na n ninga puudu, la tẽnga gill na n pida ne a biisi." 
Isaiah27:7 Soaala-Wẽnd pãba b buud a Israyɛl wala b sẽn pãb a bɛɛba bɩ? Soaala-Wẽnd kodg-a lame wala b sẽn kood a bɛɛba bɩ? B kʋ-a lame wala b sẽn kʋ a bɛɛba bɩ? 
Isaiah27:8 Ayey! Soaala bʋ-la a Israyɛl kamba bʋʋdo n dig-b bala n yiisi, n dig-b bala n zãage. Daar a ye bala la b tũnug-b ne yaang sobgo n loog ne b pa-weere." 
Isaiah27:9 Ad-a Zakoob yel-wẽnda sẽn na n yẽes to-to marsã, ad sugra sẽn kõ wã yõodo sẽn na n yɩ a soaba. Kug niyns sẽn tall n me maan-kugrã, b na n pãb-b lame n bõgse, la a na n booga wa goore, la b kõn le yãend tɩ b peesd da-lugri, b kõn le yãend tɩ b rõogd wisd laas ye." 
Isaiah27:10 Tãnsoben-tẽnga lebga raboogo, ned ka le be a pʋgẽ ye, a lebga wa we-raoogo, wa pʋ-wɛɛga, tɩ nag-bi wat n wãbd yamd be, la b wat n gãe be, la b wat n wãbd tuudu." 
Isaiah27:11 Wil niyns sẽn kʋɩ-bã, sẽn kao-bã, pagba wat n ning-b-la bugum. Ad-y yaa buud sẽn ka tar yam, dẽ me la a Naanda pa le nong-a, dẽ la sẽn wuba bãmba ka le wat ne sõngr ye." 
Isaiah27:12 Baraare, ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd na n pãba b koodo, b na n sɩnga Efrat kʋɩlga n wa baas ne Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛga. Wakat kãng marsã, Israyɛl kamba, la b na n dɩgs yãmb a yeyn-ye" 
Isaiah27:13 Baraare, b na peeba tõntõ-kãsenga tɩ sẽn menem-ba n be Asʋr tẽnga lɛɛg n wa, sẽn be-b Ezipt tẽnga me na n waame la b na n waooga Soaala-Wẽnde b tãn-sõnga zugu, Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah28:1 A Samari la a Efrayim naam pugla, yẽ la a rã-yũudba na-tẽnga la b zu-zẽkre, la yell be-la a zugu! A zao yĩngri n get a bãg-faagã. Bãg-faaga ra tog n pidẽ la ne yõodo, la bũmb sẽn kete yaa puud sẽn zelge a kamba sẽn tɩg rãama sẽn dɩk n bɛ b zutu." 
Isaiah28:2 Ade, buud sẽn tar pãng n na n wa, la Soaala-Wẽnd n tʋmd-a; a na n waa wala sapɩlem-saaga, wala saag sẽn lubd fãa, a sor zugu, wala sa-ko-bɛd saaga, saag ne koom sẽn na n dɩ tẽnga zãnga. Soaala-Wẽnd nugã n na n tus tẽngã n lubi." 
Isaiah28:3 B na taba naama pugl ne nao, n tab a Efrayim rã-yũudba na-tẽng la b zu-zẽkrã." 
Isaiah28:4 B na n taba ne nao, Samari faonga sẽn zelgã wa puugã, Samari sẽn zao yĩngr n get a bãg-faaga, bãg-faag sẽn togẽ n pidẽ ne yõodo. Samari na n wẽnega kankamde, kankamd sẽn bɩ tɩ wakat nan pa ta ye. Sẽn deng-a a yãeebo, fãsgd-a-la a nugẽ la yaa leems vuka." 
Isaiah28:5 Daar n wate tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnda na n waa ne naam pugla, pugl sẽn be neere, bu-kella yĩnga." 
Isaiah28:6 Bãmb n na kɩt tɩ bʋ-kaood fãa bʋ a bʋʋda ne zemsg yam, bãmb n na n kõ tãb-biig fãa raoodo, t'a zãag bɛɛba ne tẽnga noor kʋɩlenga." 
Isaiah28:7 Ad-y neb n be tɩ rãama kẽesd-b moogo, neb n be tɩ rãama kɩt tɩ b kẽnd n lagsdẽ: yaa maan-kʋʋdba la bãngdbã. Rãam sẽn tar pãnga la b yũ n kẽed moogo, rãama kɩtame tɩ b kẽnd n lagsdẽ n ka le mi b goabg la b rɩtg ye. Rãama sẽn tar pãng la b yũ n tuumnẽ, b pa le tẽr Wẽnd sẽn lik bãmba n yeel-b tɩ bũmb ning ye. Dẽ la b gomd b bãngra goama n kalemd taaba." 
Isaiah28:8 Rɩɩba zĩig rẽgma ne wʋbdo, zĩ-yɩleng ka le ket ye." 
Isaiah28:9 Dẽ me la b sokda: «Ãnda la Izayi rat n karme? Ãnda la a rat n wilg a sẽn yãenda võore? Daare yaa kamb sẽn nan bas bĩisri paalem, yaa kamb sẽn nan ka yi b ma roogẽ." 
Isaiah28:10 Kelg-yã a goma: ‹S-A-S-A, S-A-S-A, T-A-T-A, T-A-T-A, pĩnd boto, marsã woto.› »" 
Isaiah28:11 N-ye, yaa ne bidg noore, yaa ne goam sẽn ka tõe n wʋme yaa ne bu-zẽnd goam bala la Soaala-Wẽnd na n gom ne b buudã." 
Isaiah28:12 Wẽnnaam yaool n da yeel-b lame: «Vʋʋsg tõe n vʋʋsa ka, bas-y sẽn yɛɛ t'a vʋʋse tɩ kaalẽ ka be bʋʋr ye.» La b pa tʋlg n kelg ye." 
Isaiah28:13 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Wẽnd gomda na n wẽneg bãmb rẽnna n ka tar võor ye: «S-A-S-A, S-A-S-A, T-A-T-A, T-A-T-A, pĩnd boto, marsã woto.» Tɩ b sã n tarẽ, bɩ b wa lɛɛg n lʋɩ zãmbɛɛla, n kaoog-b sɛɛga, tɩ wĩir sog b nao." 
Isaiah28:14 Kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga, yãmb fãa sẽn laad y taaba, la sẽn ya-b Zerizalɛɛm soaalba." 
Isaiah28:15 Y yetame: «Tõnd yõga zoodo ne kũum, la d maana sardo ne bʋg-tẽng rãmba. Y yetame tɩ yel-beed ning sẽn wata kõn ta yãmb ye tɩ yãmb tara y soondg zĩiga, y mii y sẽn na n yag zirẽ ninga n põse, y mii y sẽn na n padem padeng ninga.»" 
Isaiah28:16 Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd yet-y lame: M na n vigla kug-kɛgeng Siõ pʋgẽ, yaa kugr sẽn maneg n pees meeb yĩnga, yaa kug-neere sẽn vigl sõmbo. Kug kãng la sẽn teeg-b maama na n wẽnege, n wẽneg ne neerem la keglem." 
Isaiah28:17 Wĩir ning m sẽn na tall n mage tɩ bũmb da yõsg a to, bũmb ning m sẽn na n tall n ges tɩ meeba ra kɩll goabg bɩ rɩtgo, na n yɩɩ zemsgo ne y meng la y taaba. Yaa roog la y me n na n kẽ, yaa bũmb la y me n na n soond a pʋgẽ, ad-y m sã n pa yãend zemsg a pʋgẽ, sapɩlem n na n pãb n sẽeg y zirẽ-be-roogã la koom n na n looge ne soondg zĩigã." 
Isaiah28:18 Woto yãmb ne m ba kũum zooda na sɛ, yãmb sarda ne bʋg-tẽnga ka na n yals ye. Yel-beed ninga sẽn na n fõd wa koom n wa wã la sẽn na n kãag bũmb fãa n loogã, na n wẽneg n bedsa yãmb zãnga." 
Isaiah28:19 Yel-beeda segd-y yibeoogo, a segd-y wĩntoog bɩ yʋngo a na n yẽeg-y lame. Y sẽn bãng a waoong raar fãa na n yɩɩ yɛɛsgo." 
Isaiah28:20 Ade wala yelbũnda sẽn togsde Gãaga na n yɩɩ koɛɛga tɩ pa tõe n tẽeg n gãand ye, fu-goabga na n yɩɩ bilfu tɩ pa tõe n yɛdg n pil ye." 
Isaiah28:21 N-ye, wala Perazim tãngẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd na n yikame, wala Gabaõ pʋtẽ, b na n sɩngame n tʋm b tʋʋmde, n yals b sẽn sede, la tʋʋmda yaa tʋʋm-bãnde, ka beoog-beoog fãa tʋʋmd ye." 
Isaiah28:22 Woto wã, bɩ laada rãmba, bas-b laado tɩ b ra wa sãrg wĩ niyns sẽn pid b kokorã n paas ye. M wʋma dũni fãa Soaala nengẽ, tɩ tẽnga fãa wãab ya bũmb b sẽn yalse." 
Isaiah28:23 Maneg-y tʋba n kelg m koɛɛga, wʋm-y m sẽn na n togsa neere!" 
Isaiah28:24 Wala y sẽn mi wã, ka-koaad sã n tʋmnẽ a ka tar a pʋʋga koob bal ye, a ka maand vugs bala, ka mooga bal la a tar pĩngr ye," 
Isaiah28:25 A sã n sarem kaalma n sɛ a bʋta kood buud toor-toore. A rengda ne puudã, n wat zẽ-biisã sẽn tar yũ-noogo, n wat alkam pɛɛlga, la alkam pugsgu, ned kam fãa ne zĩig ning sẽn tog ne-a, n yaool marsã n bʋd alkam kɛgeng n gilgi." 
Isaiah28:26 Ka-koaad zãmsa a tʋʋma a Naanda nengẽ, b sẽn zãms-a wã la a tũuda." 
Isaiah28:27 Ypuda ka tabd n beds ye, bilim-bilma nao ka sɩɩsd zẽ-biisa sẽn tar yũ-nooga ye, b sʋʋgd-b-la ne rabãande." 
Isaiah28:28 Alkam pɛɛlga, bilim-bilma n tabd rẽ, la ka tar tabr tɩ wa beds ye. Bilim-bilma tabdame n looge la bũmb ka bedsd ye." 
Isaiah28:29 Dẽ me yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n wilgi. Woto me la d ne tɩ bũmb fãa tara a zĩiga, la b bãngra me ya zulunga." 
Isaiah29:1 Ariyɛl, Ariyɛl, kato! Kato, Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga! Yaa ne foo la a Daviid waa n na n tak zabre. Ba f sã n ket n maand f kibs rãmba n gilgdẽ, tɩ yʋʋmd pʋgd yʋʋmde," 
Isaiah29:2 ad-m na n nams-f lame, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde. Fo kõn tol n tɩlg ne sũ-sãang la pɛt ye, la mam yĩnga fo ka na n le yɩɩ Laafi tẽng ye, f na n yɩɩ maan-kugra zĩig bala, maanda yõogr zĩig bala." 
Isaiah29:3 M na taka zabr ne foo wala a Daviid, m na n tuu bok n gũbg-fo, f sẽn na n tɩ kẽ zĩig ningã, m na n bʋʋg-f-la be n zabe la m zẽk tãnd wa lal-gũbri, n yẽd-f zãng-zãnga." 
Isaiah29:4 Fo na n lʋɩ bog-zulungẽ, tɩ f koɛɛga na n yit wala bʋg-tẽngẽ, koɛɛg sẽn ka le sãt ye, n ya wala kɩɩm koɛɛga, koɛɛg sẽn yit wala no-bi fɩɩlgo." 
Isaiah29:5 F bɛɛba yaa wa wubs-bãanega, yaa nin-toose la b sõor ka tɛk ye, yaa wa ka-fɩɩba sobg sẽn dɩke. La Ade, vugr bala," 
Isaiah29:6 dũni fãa Wẽnd na n wa sõng-f lame, b na n waa ne sa-tãsg bʋʋre, bʋʋr sẽn kẽesd rabeem, n naag ne sobg sẽn zẽkd wubsgu, la bug-walem sẽn yõogde." 
Isaiah29:7 Ade, na n yɩɩ wa zãmsdo, n yɩ wa bõn-bãnd la f yãend yʋngo. F bɛɛba sẽn da sũ ka tɛka la b wat n na n zab ne-fã, n da segd-f ne b zab-teedã, la b tuud bogd n gilgd fooma, Ariyɛl, ad-b fãa sẽn menemde, n menemd wala yʋng yãeeb bɩ zãmsdo." 
Isaiah29:8 Lebga wa ned sẽn da gãe n zãmsdẽ, n zãmsd t'a rɩta noogo, n wa nek ne pʋ-vɩʋʋgo. Yaa wa ko-yũud sẽn tar ned t'a gãe n zãmsdẽ, t'a paama koom n yũuda, n wa nek ne yaamse, n nek ne kokor sẽn kʋɩ zãnga. Na n yɩɩ woto ne bu-zẽmba tãb-biisi sẽn da zabd-b ne Siõ tãnga." 
Isaiah29:9 Yɩɩ-y neb wa bũmb sẽn lingi tɩ b yɛs sɩɩ, n ka yaagd y noor ye, yɩɩ-y wa neb sẽn ka tar nini, la y yɛs sɩɩ n ka yaagd y noor ye. Yɩɩ-y wa neb sẽn kẽnd n tuumnẽ la ka rãam la b tɩg ye, n kẽnd n latemnẽ n yaool n ka yũ fɩ ye." 
Isaiah29:10 Sɩda, Soaala-Wẽnd daag-y-la suusgu bãaga. Y nina mumame, gomda ne bãngdbã, y nenga luda peende, gomda ne sẽn yet tɩ b neeme wã." 
Isaiah29:11 Yɛla yãeeb lebga toog ne yãmba, wala sebr sẽn ka lak gʋlsem, wala sebr sẽn pag ne siribdu. Dɩkda sebrã n kɩs sẽn mi-a karengo, n yeel-a t'a reeg n karem, tɩ yẽ me na n leok tɩ pa tõe ye, tɩ sebra pagame." 
Isaiah29:12 Dɩkda sebra marsã n lake, n kis ned sẽn ka mi karengo n yeel-a t'a karem, t'a na n leoke t'a ka mi kareng ye." 
Isaiah29:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yeta b buuda poorẽ: «Nin-bãmba kolgda maam ne b noor goam bala, n pẽgd maam ne b no-gãnd bala, la sũurã paada yɩɩga, b zãra ne maam. Woto wã mam tũudma, mam waoogrã lebga maan woto tɩ yaa boto n toge; lebga reeg ninsaal sẽn togse n ning f pʋtẽerẽ." 
Isaiah29:14 Yaa rẽ la m na n kell n wilg-b yɛl-soalma n wa tol n kẽes moogo sɩlem dãmba sɩlem, n menes yam dãmba yam.»" 
Isaiah29:15 Yell bee nin-bãmba zugu! Yaa neb sẽn solgd b meng Soaala-Wẽnde, n solgd b sẽn dat n tʋm beedã, n geend b geels likẽ n yetẽ: «Ãnna n ne-do, ãnna mi-do. Ãnda n tõe n bãng d sẽn dat n maane?»" 
Isaiah29:16 Yaa bõe wẽnem yãanga la woto? La m sok n gese, yagdo la yagda yaa a ye bɩ? Bũmb tõeeme n yiki n yeele sẽn maana yẽ wã: «Ad ka foom n maan maam koe!» Yʋʋr tõe n yeela yagdã: «Yõa yaa nin-yaalga?»" 
Isaiah29:17 Daare y ka mi ye, sã n yɩ bilfu, la kõn le kaoos ye, Libã googa na n tedg n lebga wa zẽedo, tɩ zẽeda tedg n lebg googo!" 
Isaiah29:18 Baraare, wʋms na n wʋma sebra karengo tɩ zoeens na n tɩlg lika, b na n sɩnga yãeebo." 
Isaiah29:19 Naong rãmb yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd na n yɩ-la b sũ-noogo; tɩ nimbãan-dãmb na n kɩdem b kɩdengo, a Israyɛl Nin-sõnga maasmẽ." 
Isaiah29:20 Ade na-toosa kõn le rɩ naam ye, sẽn nong-ba n la b taaba, sẽn baood-b wẽng ne b taaba na n wãa zãnga." 
Isaiah29:21 Neba na paam b mense ne sẽn kãnegd-b b taaba, la sẽn gãnegd-b bẽdgo, n na n paalg b taab bʋʋdo, n na n paalg ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle." 
Isaiah29:22 Yaa rẽ fãa yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd kõt b koɛɛga, la a Zakoob ne a yagensa Wẽndã, Wẽnd ninga sẽn fãaga a Abraama yet woto: Yãnd kõn le yõk a Zakoob buuda ye, a zug kõn le sulg ye." 
Isaiah29:23 Bãmb ne b kamba sã n wa yãend m sẽn na n tʋm tʋʋm niynsi bãmb sʋka, b na reeg tɩ yaa Soaala la maam, tɩ maam la a Zakoob Wẽnd sõngã. Rabeem na yõk-ba tɩ b pa saage n sãam a Israyɛl Wẽnda sũur ye." 
Isaiah29:24 Bãmb sẽn dag n ka le tar yama b na sɩng n wʋm taab moore, bãmb sẽn da pa rat n deeg bũmbã, b na bas tɩ b karem-ba." 
Isaiah30:1 Wẽnd n gomde: yell bee kom-bi-beesa zugu! B geenda geels sẽn ka mam rẽnd ye, b yõgda ne taaba zood sẽn ka tat m yam ye, la woto b rɩkda kongre n dogl kongr zugu." 
Isaiah30:2 B yit n kẽnda Ezipt n yaool n ka reng n sok-m ye. B kẽnd n na n tɩ soonda Ezipt tãnsoben-doogẽ b kẽnd n na n tɩ soonda Ezipt dĩma maasmẽ. 
Isaiah30:3 Mik Ezipt tãnsoben-doogo mik Ezipt dĩma sõngre, fãa na n waa ne b yãnde." 
Isaiah30:4 M nee b taoor dãmba sẽn ta Tanis m ne b sẽn tʋm b rãmba sẽn zoe n be Anes. 
Isaiah30:5 B raaba ka na n tõog n pids ye, Ezipt rãmb ka na n tõog n sõng-b ye, b ka na n tõog n maan bũmb b yĩng ye, dẽnd yʋ-sãoongo, dẽnd yãnd tʋkre." 
Isaiah30:6 Rũms n yõrd ne zɩɩbo n tees nug rɩtgo. B sẽn kẽndã yaa pɛta, sũ-wẽnegr la war tẽngẽ, yaa bõnyẽes sẽn tar kaasg tẽngẽ, yaa boosr la wag-bãnd sẽn yɩgd n kɛɛdẽ tẽngẽ. Yaa be la bõeense ne yʋgma tʋk laogo, n dabda. B rabd n na n tɩ kõo nin-yaals sẽn ka tõe fɩ b yĩnga." 
Isaiah30:7 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m pʋd a yʋʋr woto: «A Gãe-tẽng-n-zabdẽ.» 
Isaiah30:8 Soaala yeela a Izayi: «Kẽng marsã n bao bũmb n gʋlse, n gʋls Zerizalɛɛm dãmb taoore, t'a yɩ beoog raare kaset sẽn kõn menem.»" 
Isaiah30:9 Yaa bi-bees buudu, yaa zirẽ-be-rãmba sẽn pa rat n kelg Wẽnd gomd ye." 
Isaiah30:10 B yeta sẽn ne-b bõn-bãna: «Sã n ya tõnd yĩnga, da yãend-y bũmb ye.» B yeta bãngdba: «Sã n ya tõnd yĩnga, da paam-y bãngre n wilg sɩd ye. Togs-y tõnd sẽn noom tõndo, belg-y tõnd ne bõn-faado." 
Isaiah30:11 B sẽn dat tɩ bãngdba maan bũmb ninga, yaa b bʋdg n kẽ moogo yaa b bʋdg n bas so-sõngã. B yet-b lame tɩ b ra yɛs b taoore n tar goama la yaa Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, yaa Israyɛl Nin-Sõnga yell bal la b gomd ye.»" 
Isaiah30:12 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã yeel yã: «Yãmb ka rat n deeg m saglgo ye, y sẽn teege, y sẽn dell b rãmba yaa sẽn nong-b n wẽoog b taaba, yaa sẽn nong-b n zãmb b taaba." 
Isaiah30:13 Yel-wẽnd kãng sẽn na n wẽneg a soaba, yaa lalg sẽn tãs mugnum; lalga sẽn ya wokã, a na n põdame, n nuki, a na n kaoogame n lʋɩ vugri." 
Isaiah30:14 Yaa woto me la tãnda rʋk wãagda; yaa pees la a tãsda tɩ tɩɩm ka ye; f kõn yãend peesa sʋka, pɛɛg sẽn tõe n mok bugum bug-toaalgẽ, bɩ sẽn tõe n zolg koom bãkẽ ye.»" 
Isaiah30:15 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel yã, rẽ yĩng la a Israyɛl Nin-sõnga yeel yã: «Y zʋga tekre n na n wa ne y fãagre la y laafi. Y sã n ket n teegd Soaala y na pid ne pãng la raoodo. La yãmb ka rat rẽ ye.»" 
Isaiah30:16 Yãmb leokdame: «Tõnd na n zoee ne weefo!» Y na zoe la d na gese. Y le yeelame: «D na kẽe bilim-bilm sẽn tar tĩiga.» Kato, ad-y sẽn pʋgd-b yãmba n yɩɩd ne tĩiga!" 
Isaiah30:17 Nin-yend bala, bɛ a ye bala seka a fʋʋs yãmb tusri; neb a nu sã n pʋgd yã, y gill fãa n na n kʋɩ tĩiga, la y wat n wa keesa nin-yende, wa tãb-kaoor sẽn laand a ye, tãng bɩ kunkubr zugu." 
Isaiah30:18 Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd gũuda b wakato n na n yik n maan-y sugri. N na n yik n zoe y nimbãanega, Soaala-Wẽnd yaa zemsg soaba: sũ-noog rãmba la sẽn teeg b bãmba!" 
Isaiah30:19 N-ye! Siõ rãmba, Zerizalɛɛm rãmba, y kõn le yãb ye. B sẽn wʋm y kosg bala la b sẽn wẽneg n deeg-a." 
Isaiah30:20 Y pɛta pʋgẽ Soaala-Wẽnd na kõ-y rɩɩbo, la b yũnug-y koom, y sũ-pa-noanga pʋgẽ; sẽn da tog n zãmsa wã kõn le solg a meng ye, y nin na yãend yẽnda soaba." 
Isaiah30:21 F tʋbr na wʋm koɛɛga, n wʋm sã n ya rɩtg bɩ goabg la f tog n kẽnge. Koɛɛgã n na n yeele: «Ad sor ning f sẽn tog n dɩke!»" 
Isaiah30:22 F na n gesa wa rẽgdo wanzurf la sãnem sẽn dɩk n bolg nin-naandsã; fo na n lob-b-la wala bõn-dẽgdo la f na n yeel-b lame: menem-y ka! 
Isaiah30:23 Wẽnd na kõ-y-la saaga y kooda yĩnga, la tẽnga sẽn na n kõ-y rɩɩb ningã na n yɩɩ kũun sẽn ya zembala la sõmbo. Y rũmsa na n paama yamdo b wãbneg zĩ-yalensẽ." 
Isaiah30:24 Niisa la bõeensa sẽn koodã, bãmb rɩɩb na n yɩɩ yamd sẽn kʋʋse, sẽn welg ne sagdo, sẽn dɩɩme la sẽn ning yamsem." 
Isaiah30:25 Zɩɩma daagr poore, zaba la ro-wogda lʋɩɩs poore, tãng fãa, tãn-woko, tãn-bil fãa pennẽ, b na yãe koom sẽn zoete n zãgsd pʋto." 
Isaiah30:26 Kiuuga vẽenem na n yɩɩ wa wĩntooga rẽnna, la wĩntooga vẽenem na n paasa naoor a yopoe, wala dasem a yopoe vẽenem sẽn naag taaba. Yaa wakat kãnga la Soaala-Wẽnd na n tɩp b neba noada la b sãoog pãbra sãmpoagã." 
Isaiah30:27 Ges-y, Soaala-Wẽnd yita al yɩɩg n watẽ. B sũur wita wa bugum, wa bug-toaaga, b noor yiisda b sũ-fõora walem, b zelemda põngda wa barga." 
Isaiah30:28 B noor pemsem yaa wa kʋɩlg sẽn pid n daannẽ, n limd n tat kokoɛ. B waame n na n go bu-zẽmba ne goaadg sẽn ka basd rẽok tɩ loog ye. B waame n na n ning salbre bɛɛba noorẽ, n paam n tall-ba n zãage." 
Isaiah30:29 Sã n ya yãmba, Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, yãmb yɩɩlle na n yɩɩ sũ-noog yɩɩlle, a na n yɩɩ wala yʋn-sʋk kibsa rẽnna. Y sũur na pida ne sũ-noogo, wala f sẽn dʋʋd Soaala tãngã, tɩ wɩɩg peebdẽ, n dʋʋd n babsd Soaala a Israyɛl Pĩigã." 
Isaiah30:30 Soaala-Wẽnd na n basa b koɛɛga t'a sãde wa nin-naab koɛɛg sẽn sãte, la b na n yãenda b nug sẽn zẽke n na n wẽ sũ-puur wẽebo, n na n widg bugum sẽn ka sugri, n na n kiig koom la sapɩlem." 
Isaiah30:31 La Soaala-Wẽnnaam koɛɛga sã n sãde, Asʋr na n yɛɛsame. Soaala na n waa ne dasaare." 
Isaiah30:32 Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa pãbd ne dasaarã, yaa yam la b na n wilg ninsaala; gãngãoog bil la pɛndg me na n naagame n kũmdẽ n sokd Soaala-Wẽnd wẽedo." 
Isaiah30:33 Yaa al daar zãra la wʋnga segl n yɛsẽ, la a bugma wita Asiri rĩma yĩnga. Wʋnga segla zĩ-vɩʋʋgẽ, zĩ-yalengẽ, wʋnga kɩbga bog-zulungẽ. Buguma sẽn na n widgã raado manegame n tigim, n tigim ka tɛka. Soaala-Wẽnd na n fʋʋsa bugma la a na n widgame, n widg wala kidbri bugum." 
Isaiah31:1 Yell bee ne neb niyns fãa sẽn kẽnd-b Ezipt n na n tɩ bao sõngre, n teeg b wiid tĩiga, n teeg b bilim-bilm! B teega b wiidi wã, b teega b bilim-bilma tɩ b sõor ka be tɛk ye. B teega b wiidi wã pãnga. B yaool n ka teeg Israyɛl Nin-Sõnga baa bilfu, b yaool n pa sokd Soaala-Wẽnd daab ye." 
Isaiah31:2 Wẽnd me ra tõeeme n wa ne sagl-sõngo, b ra tõee n wilgẽ-b lame tɩ b ka pʋlem Ezipt noog ye. B yeelame tɩ b na n yika ne nin-wẽnsã, n yik ne nin-yood niyns y sẽn kot b rãmb sõngrã." 
Isaiah31:3 Ezipt ned yaa ninsaala, a ka wẽnd ye, b wiidi wã yaa nemdo, ka malɛgs buud ye, Soaala-Wẽnd sã n tẽeg b nug bala, la sõangda sẽn latemde, la a sẽn da waa a soab sõngrã na n konga sõngre, b yiiba na n naaga taab n ki." 
Isaiah31:4 N-ye! Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne maam woto: «Bõnyẽega bɩ bõnyẽ-bila sã n yõk rũnga, n gãe n wũunẽ, ad-y yã a pa yɛɛsde, a pa suusdi; a toog ka ne pe-kɩɩmba kɛlenga, a toog ka ne pe-kɩɩmba gãngãada ye. Na n yɩɩ boto me ne maam, dũni fãa Soaalã. M na n siga Siõ tãmsã zugu, n zab m zabre." 
Isaiah31:5 Wala luiili sẽn tẽegd b pɩgsa, n põgend b kamba, woto me dũni fãa Soaala na n gũu Zerizalɛɛm n lill-a ne a bɛɛba, n fãag-a, n bas n ka sɩbg-a, t'a tɩlge." 
Isaiah31:6 Lɛɛg-y n wa kẽ yãmb sẽn bas a soab zãngã, Israyɛl kamba." 
Isaiah31:7 Daar n wate tɩ ned kam fãa na n bas a wanzurfu, n bas a sãnem nin-naandse a sẽn kɩɩs n dõog ne a nugu." 
Isaiah31:8 Pa sʋʋg sẽn ya ninsaal sʋʋga, n na kʋ Asʋr ye, la pa sʋʋg sẽn ya ninsaal sʋʋga n na n pas-a ye. A na n wudg n põsa sʋʋga la b na n paama a kom-bɩɩbã n kẽes tʋʋma." 
Isaiah31:9 Asʋr ne pĩig ning a sẽn dellã na n diga rabeem wʋsgo, n zoe n looge, a tãnsoaben-dãmba sẽn wat n yãend Wẽnd tãb-kaoorã sẽn laande.» Yaa Soaala n togsd rẽnna, bãmb bugum n wit Siõ, bãmb bug-toaalga yõgna Zerizalɛɛm." 
Isaiah32:1 Dĩm a ye n na n wa, la a na n dɩɩ naam ne zemsgo; nanamsa na n tũu noora sẽn date." 
Isaiah32:2 B na n naaga taaba n yɩɩ wa lilli: sobgo, tɩ fo tɩ soond bãmba, saaga, tɩ fo tɩ soond bãmba. B na n yɩɩ wa kʋɩlse, war tẽnsẽ, b na n yɩɩ wa pĩig sẽn lug n tar maasem, maasem sẽn da ka tõe n saag zĩig ningã." 
Isaiah32:3 Woto wã sẽn ne-ba nin kõn le mum ye, sẽn kelgd-ba yoogda b tʋba." 
Isaiah32:4 Sẽn ka yaasd-b n tɩg yellã na yaas n baoo võore; bids zelemd na n lakame. 
Isaiah32:5 B kõn tudg n bool gãeenga tɩ nin-tɩrg ye, b kõn tudg n bool zãmb-soaba tɩ nin-kãseng ye." 
Isaiah32:6 Sẽn yaa gãeenga yiisda gãeen-goama, a sũur data wẽnga t'a baood a sẽn na n maanega, t'a baood Soaala-Wẽnd sãbsgo, t'a yet tɩ b bas kom sẽn tar b rãmba tɩ b bas-b ne pʋ-vɩʋʋgo, n bas ko-yũud sẽn tar b rãmba ne zelem-koɛɛnga." 
Isaiah32:7 Zãmb soab baoodame n na wã neba, a baooda a yamẽ zirẽ-beed ninga sẽn na n bõn naong rãmba, ba b sã n yɛs b bʋʋm zugu." 
Isaiah32:8 Sẽn yaa nin-tɩrga, yẽ tagsg yaa neer tagsgo, yaa zemsg la a baood bala." 
Isaiah32:9 Pagb niyns sẽn ka yɛɛsd-b bũmbã, yãmb me yik n kelg m koɛɛga." 
Isaiah32:10 Ka ne yʋʋmde la dasem a wãna, y na rigi, ka mi yɛɛsg rãmba; bãng-y tɩ ka ne kiuug a yoob soaba, ka ne Elul kiuugã, bugsuntung biis ka ket n na n tõs ye, kood me ka be n na n tigs ye." 
Isaiah32:11 Dig-y rabeem, ka yɛɛsd bũmb dãmba, dɩka mi rabeem dãmba? Yees-y futu, kẽne y bɩlgemde, mobg-y y sɛɛg ne sũ-pa-noang fuug bala." 
Isaiah32:12 Kelm-y kʋʋre, koaadba, yãb-y pʋtã sẽn da yɛs ne koodã, tɩɩsã sẽn da womd sõma wã;" 
Isaiah32:13 yãb-y tẽnga kʋʋre, tɩ marsã, a lebga gõose n lebg sɩlg-nao-yẽese. Sũ-noog zãaga ne tẽnga kẽedba, n zãag ne b sẽn da kɩdemd zĩig ningã." 
Isaiah32:14 Dĩma zak lebga vɩʋʋgo, bʋʋr sɛɛ tẽnga pʋga, bogd sẽn kõn le yẽde n tu tẽnga pʋga, a lebga bõn-weese kɩdeng zĩiga, a lebga rũms wãbneg zĩiga." 
Isaiah32:15 Wakat n wate, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga na n sig-du. Wakat kãnga zĩ-peen-daaga na n lebga bãoogo, n lebg googo." 
Isaiah32:16 Zĩ-peen-daagẽ b na tũ noorã sẽn yalse, la bãoogẽ, zemsg na n siga be." 
Isaiah32:17 Zemsga na n waa ne laafi, noora tũubu na n waa ne zĩ n ka mi rabeem, la na n yɩɩ daar buud fãa." 
Isaiah32:18 M neba na n kẽe laafi tẽnga, n tar dot sẽn tõe n gũ-ba, n tar zags sẽn ka wãgd ne bʋʋr ye." 
Isaiah32:19 Dẽ tɩ sapɩlma kaoo googa tɩɩse, dẽ tɩ tẽnga me paam n siigame la yaa siigr kãsenga." 
Isaiah32:20 Y na n lebga sũ-noogo rãmba, tɩ y na bʋda koom sẽn be zĩig ning fãa, la naaf bɩ bõanga kõn le za ye." 
Isaiah33:1 Yell ne foom, wãab naab sẽn põs wãabo, zãmb soab sẽn põs zãmbo! Fo sã n wã n sɛ, wakat kãng la b na n wã foom me, fo sã n zãmb n sɛ, wakat kãng bal la b na zãmb foom me." 
Isaiah33:2 Soaala-Wẽnde! Zoe-y tõnd nimbãanega. Tõnd da teega yãmba, yɩɩ-y tõnd pãng beoog sẽn vẽege, yɩɩ-y d fãagre, d sũ-sãanga pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah33:3 Yãmb tãsame tɩ ninsaalb kʋɩ tĩiga, yãmb yik n yalsa yĩngri tɩ b lob naoore." 
Isaiah33:4 B na n wʋka teedã sẽn bar n lʋɩ wã wala b sẽn wʋkd sʋya la wa sʋʋr sẽn zɛɛd koodo, woto me la b maan ne zɛɛdã." 
Isaiah33:5 Soaala-Wẽnd paam pẽgre, bãmb sẽn zao b yĩngri zaoorã, n pidsd a Siõ ne zemsgo la sõmblem!" 
Isaiah33:6 La sã n ya yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd buudu, Wẽnd na kaoos-y ne laafi! Paam yam vẽenem, paam n bãng Wẽnde, dẽ n wat ne fãagr-yõodo. Bãng Soaala-Wẽnd waoogre, dẽ n na n yɩ f fãa-fãa!" 
Isaiah33:7 Ges-y-yã a Ariyɛl neba sẽn yãbd soya zutu, b sẽn tʋm b rãmba ne laafi koɛɛga lɛɛg n watame la b yãbd yãb toogo." 
Isaiah33:8 Soya lebga vɩɩdo, ned ba a ye ka le lood be ye. Na-toaaga sãama zoodã, a riga zooda yõgb kaset rãmba; a sẽn mi yaa neba sãbsg bala." 
Isaiah33:9 Tẽnga yãbda kʋʋre n faagdẽ, yãnd tara Libã t'a lʋɩtẽ. Sarõ lebga dasempʋɩɩga, Bazã, ne Karmɛl lebga wa zɛɛga." 
Isaiah33:10 M yikdame marsã, m yikda yĩngri, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Isaiah33:11 Yãmb dɩka mood pʋga, la y na n doga mo-kila, la wala bugum, m noor pemsem na n dɩ-y lame." 
Isaiah33:12 Bu-zẽmbã, ad-y b na n yõog-b-la bugum, b na n dɩɩ bugum wa gõos sẽn kʋʋs n same." 
Isaiah33:13 Sẽn be-b al yɩɩga, kelg-y m sẽn maane! Sẽn pẽ-ba, ges-y m pãnga sẽn tõe bũmb ninga!" 
Isaiah33:14 Yel-wẽn-maandba zĩi ne yɩɩre, Siõ, sẽn ka zoet-b Wẽnd nifã, digdame. Ãnna n tõe n yals bug-vɩɩga a woto taoore, ãnna n tõe n yals bug-walem a woto taoore, bug-walem a woto sẽn ka boogd taoore?" 
Isaiah33:15 Yaa sẽn mi a zemsgo, sẽn togsda sɩda, sẽn ka nonga wagdem, sẽn vẽsda a nugu n pa rat n bas tɩ b kõ-a ligdi tɩ bʋʋda tũ rẽ n golme, sẽn ka kelgda zɩɩm na raag goama, sẽn ka rata wẽng gesgo n mumd a nini." 
Isaiah33:16 Yẽ soab zak bee yĩngri, a soab kẽe yir sẽn kõn wã, la sẽn me pĩig zugu." 
Isaiah33:17 F nin na n yãee dĩm sẽn yɛs ne rasãndlem, f na n yãee tẽng ne yalem." 
Isaiah33:18 F na n tẽega bũmb ning sẽn da yɛɛsd fooma: «Sẽn da saada n sogsdẽ wã bɛɛ? Sẽn da saada n sõt fadga ligd bɛɛ? Sẽn da saada n get lal-gũbra manegra bɛɛ?» 
Isaiah33:19 F kõn le yãend buud sẽn pid ne tɩtaam ye, sẽn gomd-b goama tɩ b pa tõe n wʋma ye, sẽn gomd gom-zẽnd sẽn ka tar võor ye." 
Isaiah33:20 Ges Siõ, d kibs bɛda tẽnga, ges Zerizalɛɛm, laafi tẽnga; a yaa wala roog sẽn ti ne pɛɛla t'a biili wã pa na n tol n le feoos bada, t'a wĩr ba a ye ka na n le kaoog bada." 
Isaiah33:21 Yaa tẽng kãng pʋgẽ, la Soaala-Wẽnd na n wilg b pãnga, tẽnga na n paama kʋɩlse, a na n paama kʋɩls sẽn ya yalense, la zab-zabdb koom-kogend kõn kẽ be ye, koom-kogend bɛda ka na n dugs be ye." 
Isaiah33:22 Soaala-Wẽnd n wilgd tõnd sore, bãmb la tõnd sɩleto bãmb la tõnd dĩma, bãmb la tõnd Fãagda." 
Isaiah33:23 Kogenda wĩ wã yolsame n ka le sog da-woka ye, b pa le loet tãb-kaoorã a zug ye. Laoga sẽn paama la b na n zĩnd n pʋɩ. Ba kar-kegda fãa zĩnda zɛɛbẽ wã." 
Isaiah33:24 Ned ba a ye kõn tõoge n le yeel Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ t'a ka keem ye. La neb niyns sẽn be tẽnga pʋgẽ na n paama b yel-wẽna sugri. 
Isaiah34:1 Kolg-y-yã, bu-zẽmba, kolg-y, yoog-y y tʋba; tẽnga ne sẽn be-b a pʋgẽ wã, fãa yoog b tʋba n kelge!" 
Isaiah34:2 Soaala-Wẽnd sũur puuga ne yãmb fãa, b sũur fõta ne bu-zẽmba fãa, tɩ b kãab tɩ b na wã-ba, la b na kood b fãa." 
Isaiah34:3 Sẽn kood b rãmba, b lobd-b-la sor zugu tɩ yũuga reeg zĩig n yãmbe. Ges-y zɩɩm sẽn zoet n sigd tãmsã!" 
Isaiah34:4 Yĩngr teeda fãa na n lebga zũnd-zãnde, saaga na n paga wa sebre b sẽn dat n bĩngi, ãdsa ne b bugma na n sʋʋga zãnga, wala bugsuntung vãad sẽn dʋʋgde bɩ wala kankang vãado." 
Isaiah34:5 Soaala n gomd woto: yĩngri, m sʋʋga tɩga zɩɩm la a tɩga zɩɩm wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam. Ad-a sẽn lʋɩt a Edom zugu, Edom ninga m sẽn kãab sɩbgrã." 
Isaiah34:6 Soaala-Wẽnd sʋʋga lebga zɩɩm, n mad ne kaam, zɩɩma yaa pe-bi la boees dẽnna, kaama yaa pe-raada yɩɩma rẽnna. Maoongo la Naaba-Wẽnd kʋʋd Bosra, koodgo la Soaala-Wẽnd koot Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Ka yikayã la b na n gãneg ye, yaa ninsaalba, ka niis la b na n kood ye, yaa kom-koeemsã; b na n yɩɩ sʋʋg rɩɩbo, b tẽnga na n tɩga zɩɩm, a toma na n gĩsa ne kaam." 
Isaiah34:8 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd sũur dokre daare, yaa Siõ gũuda daood yʋʋmde." 
Isaiah34:9 B kʋɩlsã lebga ka-sablgo, tɩ tẽnga tom ya kidbri, tẽnga tõre na n lebga bugum," 
Isaiah34:10 yʋng la wĩntoog bugma kõn ki ye, a bug-zõosa dʋʋda yĩngri, wakat buud fãa; tẽnga na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga, tɩ zamaan pʋg taaba; ned ba ye kõn le tũ be meng ye." 
Isaiah34:11 Tẽnga na n lebga bakardo la yʋgenpɛl na-tẽnga, viuug la gãoobgo na n kẽe be. Soaala-Wẽnd na n kɩtame t'a lebg ween-vɩʋʋgo, Soaala-Wẽnd na n sarem-a-la zãnga." 
Isaiah34:12 Wãams na n ti-la b rot be, na-koms kõn le zĩnd ye, naam kõn le deeg be ye, na-biisa fãa na n kiime." 
Isaiah34:13 Gõos na n yii do-neeba pʋsẽ, sɩlg-nao-yẽese la pulgumdi na n yii be, na n yɩɩ we-baas zaka, na n yɩɩ na-neend vagse." 
Isaiah34:14 We-yũus ne kata na n kõo taab sɛk be, wãams na n boola taab be. Be la bõn-nind a Lilit na n wũundi be la yʋng naab a Lilit na n paam n vʋʋse." 
Isaiah34:15 Põeere na n paama a roog be n lob a gɛla, n wũnug-ba, n wek-ba. Yɩbrend na n tigma taab be, ned kam fãa ne a tũud-n-taaga." 
Isaiah34:16 Lak-y Soaala sebre n karem sẽn gʋlse: B nin-yend meng kõn pa poorẽ ye, ba a ye sũur kõn kiuus a tũud-n-taag poorẽ ye, tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd meng noor n yet tɩ b maan boto; yaa bãmb n tʋlg tɩ b tigim taaba." 
Isaiah34:17 Soaala-Wẽnd tũusa pʋɩɩre ned kam fãa yĩnga, b magame n pʋɩ tẽnga zãnga, b neba n na n soog-a la b zĩnd a pʋgẽ zamaan sẽn wate." 
Isaiah35:1 Tẽns sẽn ya zĩ-peen-daase, tẽns sẽn kʋɩ, lang-y sũ-noogo, la ning-y puudu." 
Isaiah35:2 Ypuda reeg b pʋtã n weke; tẽng koɛɛnga yɩge la a sao la a kelem sũ-noogo! A na n paama ziir wa Libã n paam ziir wa Karmɛl la Sarõ; yaa Wẽnde, tõnd Wẽnda la d Soaala, bãmb vẽenema la b ziirã n na n bui-a." 
Isaiah35:3 Kɩt tɩ yaamse da kẽ nus ye, kɩt-y tɩ rũma da le rig rabeem ye." 
Isaiah35:4 Yeel-y yɩɩr sẽn tar b rãmba: «Aya! Keng-y y sũuri, da zoe-y rabeem ye, Soaala n wat n na n dok b sũuri, b wat n na sɩbga b bɛɛbã, b wat n na n fãag-y lame.»" 
Isaiah35:5 Wakat kãnga zoeens nin na n pukame, wʋms tʋb na n yoogame." 
Isaiah35:6 Woabg na n wudga wa walga, muk zelemd na n pãra a sũ-noogo. Zĩ-peen-daag na n bula koom, ko-zoetem na n zoe zĩ-pɛɛlẽ." 
Isaiah35:7 Dasempʋɩɩg na n lebga bãoogo, ko-yũud tẽng na n tẽgna ko-yɩlma, we-baas tẽnga na n lebga rudma la bãng-n-sãag sẽn pag n yɛsẽ." 
Isaiah35:8 So-raoog na n pɩʋʋga be, tɩ b bool-a tɩ sor sẽn welg toore; nin-dẽgd soab pa rɩkd so-kãng ye, Soaala meng n na n pak sorã, gãeems kõn saag n tũ so-kãng ye." 
Isaiah35:9 Bõnyẽeg kõn le zĩnd ye, we-rũng kõn le tab be ye; b sẽn fãag b rãmba bala n na dɩk so-kãnga." 
Isaiah35:10 So-kãng la Wẽnd sẽn fãag b rãmb na n dɩke, b na n waa Siõ, n kaasd sũ-noogo, b nensa na n pɩla ne sũ-noog sẽn ka be sɛɛb ye. Kɩdengo la saooga n kelle, namsgo la waasgo sɛɛme." 
Isaiah36:1 A Ezekiyas sẽn wa n dɩt a yʋʋm piig la a naas naam, Asʋr dĩma, a Senakerib, taka zabre ne Zɩɩda tãnsoben-tẽnse la a tõog-b lame." 
Isaiah36:2 Asʋr dĩma zĩnda Lakis n tʋm Zerizalɛɛm, a Ezekiyas nengẽ, a meng sõgne ne tãb-biis wʋsgo. Sõgna kolga pipi ko-baoora ko-sorã, fu-pɛgdba pʋʋga sor zugu." 
Isaiah36:3 Neb n yi n tɩ seg-a. Yɩ-la a Ilkiya biiga, a Eliyakim, yẽ n get dĩma zak yelle, n paas a Sebna, yẽ la sɛba gʋlsda, la a Azaf biig a Zoa, yẽ n deegd koeesã n togsdẽ." 
Isaiah36:4 Asʋr tãnsoaba sõgna yeel-b lame: «Kẽng-y n taas a Ezekiyas Asʋr dĩm kãsenga, koɛɛg kãnga. ‹Ãnda soaba la f sẽn dɩk f yɛla fãa n bas a soab nugẽ wã?" 
Isaiah36:5 Fo tẽedame tɩ zabre zabda ne wakre goama bala tɩ zĩnd n yẽs ka lʋɩ taoore, tɩ raood ka be sũurẽ? Fo teega bõe n na n yik n zẽk f zugu ne maam." 
Isaiah36:6 M mi tɩ f teega Ezipt la! La Ezipt ka rudum kãoonga laa? A tɛka yaa kõs n sãag nug ninga sẽn palga yẽ wã, la neb niyns fãa sẽn teega yẽ wã.›" 
Isaiah36:7 Daare f na n yeel-m lame: ‹Yaa Naaba-Wẽnde la f teeg yã! M sok n gese, ka bãmb waoogr zĩisi la f sẽn wã wã laa? Ka foo n kõ noor Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmba tɩ b ra le waoog Wẽnd zĩig a to sã n ka Zerizalɛɛm maan-kugra taoor bal laa?›" 
Isaiah36:8 Dɩlla, yẽs ne Asʋr dĩma, m zu-soaba, la a sã n sake, m na kõ-f wiidi tus a yi f sã n tõe n paam wed-dʋʋdb sẽn na n zomb-ba." 
Isaiah36:9 La rẽ sẽn ka wã, fo yɩta a wãn tɩ tõnd zu-soaba tãnsoab-bila a ye meng tar n leb poorẽ? Ka Ezipt la fo teeg n na n paam bilim-bilm la wiidi bɩ?" 
Isaiah36:10 La bũmb a to me la m na n soke: yãmb tẽedame tɩ mam dĩma kẽe yãmb tẽnga n na n wã-a tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd zɩ tiiri la b ka sak bɩ? Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n yeel-ma: tak zabre ne tẽn-kãnga n wã-a!» 
Isaiah36:11 Dẽ la a Eliyakim, a Sebna la a Zoa yeel a Rabsas, tãnsoaba sõangda: «D kotame tɩ f gom ne-do ne Aram dãmb goama tɩ d wʋmdame la f ra gomd ne-do ne tõnd buuda goama tɩ neba sẽn zao lal-gũbrã wʋmdame.»" 
Isaiah36:12 La a Rabsas leokame: «Yaa ne yãmba bɩ ne y zu-soaba la m wa ne koɛɛga laa? M yet yaa sẽn zao-b lalga zugu la b tʋm-m tɩ m wa togse? M yet tɩ yaa tãb-biisã sẽn kong n naag yãmba n dɩt b bĩndu la b yũud b rʋʋdma?» 
Isaiah36:13 Sõgna yika yĩngri, a pora ne Zɩɩda rãmba goama: «Kelg-y dĩm kãsenga koɛɛga, Asʋr dĩma koɛɛga." 
Isaiah36:14 Asʋr dĩma tɩ m togs y woto: ‹Da bas-y t'a Ezekiyas belg-y ye. A ka na n tõog n fãag-y ye. 
Isaiah36:15 Da bas-y t'a Ezekiyas belg yã n yeel-y tɩ y teeg Wẽnd bala, tɩ b na fãag yã, la tẽnga kõn lebg Asʋr soolem ye." 
Isaiah36:16 Da kelg yã a Ezekiyas ye, tɩ Asʋr dĩma yet-y-la woto: Maan-y zood ne maam. Bas-y tɩ m soog yã tɩ woto ned kam fãa na rɩ a bugsuntung la a kankang biisi, la a yũ a bulg koom," 
Isaiah36:17 n gũudẽ tɩ m wa tall-y n kẽng tẽng sẽn wẽnd yãmb dẽnna, tẽng sẽn sakd alkam, n tar koodo, n tar bugsuntund la rãam." 
Isaiah36:18 Da bas-y t'a Ezekiyas belg yã n yetẽ: Naaba-Wẽnd na fãag-do. M sok n gese buud a taaba wẽnd dãmba tõogame n fãag b meng tẽng Asiri dĩma nugẽ bɩ? 
Isaiah36:19 Amat la Arpad wẽnd dãmba bɛɛ? Sefarwayim wẽnd dãmba bɛɛ? B tõog n fãaga Samari mam nugẽ bɩ? Samari wẽnd dãmba bɛɛ? B deega a Samari mam nugẽ bi? 
Isaiah36:20 Tẽnsa fãa sʋka, tẽn bʋg wẽnd dãmba n tõog n fãag a tẽng mam nugẽ, tɩ yãmb Wẽnd na n fãag Zerizalɛɛm m nugẽ?› »" 
Isaiah36:21 B fãa yɛsa sɩɩ n pa tol n leok-a ye, tɩ dĩm a Ezekiyas ra kõ-b-la noore tɩ b ra leok-a tɩ bũmb ye." 
Isaiah36:22 Sõgen kãsenga a Ilkiya biiga, a Eliyakim, n paas sɛb gʋlsda, a Sebna, la a Azaf biiga, a Zoa, dĩma no-rɛɛsa, taka b fut n kẽese la b lɛɛg n waa a Ezekiyas nengẽ la b wilg-a-la Asʋr daoa sẽn togse." 
Isaiah37:1 Dĩma Ezekiyas sẽn wʋm goama, yẽ me kẽesa a futu, n bao sũ-pa-noang fuug n yeelge n dɩk wẽnd doogã sore." 
Isaiah37:2 A kɩtame t'a Eliyakim, a Sebna la maan-kʋʋdba taoor-dãmb me yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu t'a tʋm-ba a Amos biiga, a Izayi, nengẽ." 
Isaiah37:2 A kɩtame t'a Eliyakim, a Sebna la maan-kʋʋdba taoor-dãmb me yeelg sũ-pa-noang futu t'a tʋm-ba a Amos biiga, a Izayi, nengẽ." 
Isaiah37:3 B yeela a Izayi: «A Ezekiyas koɛɛg la woto: ‹Dũnna yaa sũ-sãanga, sɩbgre la yãnd daare. Pʋga bɩɩme la pãng ka n dogdẽ ye." 
Isaiah37:4 Daare Wẽnnaam f Soaala wʋma tʋɩ niyns Asʋr dĩma sõgen sẽn wa n tʋ Vɩɩm-Naabã la daare b na sɩbg-a. Woto wã maan pʋʋsgo m neba sẽn kella yĩnga.› » 
Isaiah37:5 A Ezekiyas sẽn tʋm b rãmba sẽn ta a Izayi taoore," 
Isaiah37:6 a Izayi yeel-b lame: «Y na tɩ togs y zu-soaba tɩ Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Da maan dabeem ne goam niyns f sẽn wʋma, ne tʋʋr ning Asʋr dĩma sõgna sẽn tʋʋs maama ye." 
Isaiah37:7 Ad-m sẽn na n walma bũmb ninga: a na n wʋma bũmbu n zoe n leb a tẽngẽ la a sã ta a tẽngẽ, m na n kɩtame tɩ sʋʋg kodg-a, a meng tẽngẽ.› »" 
Isaiah37:8 Asʋr tãnsoaba sõgna leba a tẽngẽ la a tɩ yãenda rĩma. Wakat kãng tɩ rĩma ra takda zabre ne a Libna. Sõgna ra wʋmame tɩ dĩma da yii Lakis n wa. 
Isaiah37:9 La rẽ yaa a sẽn da wʋm kibare tɩ Nubi dĩm a Tiraka bobame n wat n na n zab ne-a. Asiri dĩma wʋma kibarã la a tʋma neba tɩ b tɩ yeel Zɩɩda dĩma, a Ezekiyas:" 
Isaiah37:10 «Da bas tɩ f sẽn teeg Wẽnd ninga wa belg-fo n yeel-f tɩ Zerizalɛɛm kõn lʋɩ Asʋr dĩma nugẽ ye. 
Isaiah37:11 Fo wʋma Asʋr dĩm dãmba sẽn maan ne tẽnsã fãa, b sẽn kãab beedã la fo tẽedame tɩ fo na põse?" 
Isaiah37:12 Tẽns niyns m ba sẽn wã wã, b wẽnd dãmba tõogame n deeg-ba? Tẽeg Gozã, Arã, Resɛf la Telasar, Edenitsa na-tẽnga!" 
Isaiah37:13 Sok f memg n gese: Amat dĩma bɛɛ, Arpad dĩma bɛɛ? Layir, Sefarwayim, Ena la Iwa dĩm dãmba bɛɛ?»" 
Isaiah37:14 A Ezekiyas deega sebrã b sẽn tʋm b rãmba nugẽ, n karem la a yikame n kẽng wẽnd doogẽ, a laka sebrã n dɩgl Wẽnd taoore." 
Isaiah37:15 A pʋʋsa woto Wẽnd taoore: 
Isaiah37:16 «Dũni fãa Wẽnde, Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, yãmb vigla y zaoora al yĩngr-yĩngri, yãmb y ye la dũni wã fãa Wẽnnaam, yãmb n maan yĩngri la tẽnga." 
Isaiah37:17 Bɩ y yoog y tʋbre, m Soaala, n kelge; puk-y y nini, Soaala, n gese. Kelg-y yã a Senakerib goama, t'a tʋmame tɩ b wa tʋʋs yãmba, Vɩɩm Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Isaiah37:18 Yaa sɩda, Asʋr dĩma wãa buud ka tɛka, a wãa tẽns ka tɛka." 
Isaiah37:19 B loba b wẽnd dãmba bugmẽ tɩ ra yaa wẽn-faado; ninsaal nugu n da pees raad bɩ kuga, yaa rẽ la b tõog n menes-ba." 
Isaiah37:20 La marsã Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam, fãag-y-do a Senakerib nugẽ, tɩ tẽng zug rãmb fãa na bãnge, Soaala, tɩ yãmb bal la Wẽnde.»" 
Isaiah37:21 A Amos biiga, a Izayi, tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ezekiyas: «Woto la Israyɛl Wẽnnaam leokd kosgã f sẽn kos dĩma a Senakerib yĩnga." 
Isaiah37:21 A Amos biiga, a Izayi, tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel a Ezekiyas: «Woto la Israyɛl Wẽnnaam leokd kosgã f sẽn kos dĩma a Senakerib yĩnga." 
Isaiah37:22 Kelg kãab beed niynsi Wẽnd sẽn kãabd-a: 
Isaiah37:23 Ad Siõ bi-pugla laada foom, a pursda foom, Zerizalɛɛm bi-pugla yĩgsda foom. Ãnda la fo tʋʋs yã n paoog-a? Ãnda poorẽ la fo gom beedo? Ãnda taoore la f zẽk f zug ne nagre? Ad yaa maam, a Israyɛl Nin-sõngã." 
Isaiah37:24 Fo tʋma neb tɩ b wa tʋʋs-ma, maam Naaba-Wẽnde, fo yeelame: Maam a Senakerib, m tara bilim-bilm ka tɛka, la yaa ne bãmb la m dʋ tãms ka tɛk zug tẽnsʋka, m taa Libã sẽn lug n sãdẽ wã, m kʋʋsa tɩ bɛda googo, m kʋʋsa a tɩ neebã, m bʋʋg-a-la a soondg zĩigẽ, a tʋgra pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah37:25 Maam a Senakerib, m tuu bulsi la m yũu tẽn-zẽng koom, m nao kẽe Nil kʋɩlga pʋgẽ n kʋɩɩs-a m naoor sẽn tabg Ezipt bala." 
Isaiah37:26 Sãnd fo miime, Senakerib, tɩ al daar zãra mam segla m seglgo n na n wã foo? M sẽn zĩnd n bʋgsã la m na pids rũnna Mam da kõo foo tõogo tɩ f kɩt tɩ tẽn-bɛd lebg raboodo." 
Isaiah37:27 Tẽnsa rãmb nus da maagame, b pãng ra sɛɛme, rabeem la yãnd tar-b lame tɩ b lebg wala pʋt moodo, wa mood sẽn sele, wa tɩɩs sẽn yit roog zugu, bɩ pʋ-wees mood sẽn nan ka bɩ n yãg n sʋʋgdẽ." 
Isaiah37:28 Ad mam mii f sẽn yikd wakat ninga, m mi f zĩndigu wakato, f kẽed bɩ f yita m miime, m mi f sẽn wuk n zĩ ne sũ-puur wakato," 
Isaiah37:29 La f sẽn puug f sũurã ne maama yĩnga, f sẽn yiis tɩtaam goam tɩ lʋɩ m tʋbrẽ, m na vʋdg f yõore n sog bãnga, n ning salbre f noorẽ, n kɩt tɩ f rɩk sor ninga f sẽn tũ a soab n wa wã." 
Isaiah37:30 Woto n na n yɩ makre f yĩnga: rõanna, ka-yiisem la y na n dɩ; vẽere, ka-yogdo biisi, la yʋʋm yita bʋd-y-la y tigsi, sel-y tɩɩse la y rɩ b biisi." 
Isaiah37:31 Sẽn na põs Israyɛl kamba sʋka m na n yiisa yẽgen paal tẽngre, la b na n wom biis b wilẽ." 
Isaiah37:32 Kelle n na n kell Zerizalɛɛm, bũmb n na n põs Siõ tãnga zugu.» A Izayi paasame: «Yaa woto la dũni fãa Wẽnd na n maan b nonglma sẽn ka mi maagra yĩnga." 
Isaiah37:33 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto Asʋr poorẽ: ‹A kõn kẽ tẽn-kãnga ye, a kõn tão a pĩim ye, a kõn zẽk a gãong ye, a kõn sam tãndo n gilg-a ye," 
Isaiah37:34 sor ninga a sẽn tũ n wa wã a na tũ so-kãng n lebe, a kõn kẽ tẽn-kãnga ye. Dẽ yaa maam a Wẽnd n yeele." 
Isaiah37:35 M na n gũu Zerizalɛɛm la m na fãag-a lame, m meng yĩnga la m sõgen a Daviid yĩnga.› »" 
Isaiah37:36 Badaare yʋngo, Soaala-Wẽnd malɛka kẽnga Asʋr dãmba gãagẽ n kʋ neb tus koabg la pis-nii la a nu. Yibeoogo, sẽn loog-b be yãenda kũum bala." 
Isaiah37:37 Asʋr dĩm a Senakerib yika a tãpã n looge, a tees n paa Niniv, a na-tẽnga." 
Isaiah37:38 Daar a ye, a Senakerib kẽ a wẽnd a Nisrok roogẽ n pʋʋsdẽ t'a meng kamb a yiibu: a Adramelɛk ne a Sarezɛr n kɛɛ-a ne sʋʋga n lɛɛg n zoe n dig Ararat. A Asaradõ, a Senakerib biig a ye, n led a zĩiga." 
Isaiah38:1 Wakat n zĩndi tɩ bã-kʋʋdg yõk a Ezekiyas; bãngda Izayi, a Amos biiga, wa n yãend-a lame n yeel-a: Soaala gomd la woto: «Marsã, maneg f zaka yɛla tɩ f bãaga na n tõog-f lame.»" 
Isaiah38:1 Wakat n zĩndi tɩ bã-kʋʋdg yõk a Ezekiyas; bãngda Izayi, a Amos biiga, wa n yãend-a lame n yeel-a: Soaala gomd la woto: «Marsã, maneg f zaka yɛla tɩ f bãaga na n tõog-f lame.»" 
Isaiah38:2 A Ezekiyas wẽnemda a neng n tees a roog lalga la a pʋʋsa Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Isaiah38:3 A yeela woto: «Ade, Soaala-Wẽnde, tẽeg-y neere tɩ mam vɩɩnda wala y sẽn date; m pelga m sũuri n tũ yãmba, m maan sẽn ta y yam.» La a Ezekiyas yõka yãbre." 
Isaiah38:4 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Izayi 
Isaiah38:5 t'a gom ne a Ezekiyas: «A Daviid Wẽnnaama koɛɛg la woto: ‹M wʋma f koɛɛg, m yãe-la f nintãm. M na n paas-f-la yʋʋm piig la a nu." 
Isaiah38:6 M na fãag-f lame la m fãag Zerizalɛɛm Asʋr dĩma nugẽ, m na n gũu tẽngã.› »" 
Isaiah38:7 A Izayi yeelame: «Soaala na n kõ-f-la makre tɩ f bãng tɩ b na n pidsa b sẽn kãabã. 
Isaiah38:8 Ade, a Ezekiyas tũuda teedse n dʋʋd a roogo; teedsa ra bee wĩntoogẽ, n wa n kẽe maasmẽ. Bãng tɩ Soaala na n kɩtame tɩ maasma le yõbg teeds piiga!» La sɩda, maasma le yõbga teeds piiga, n leb poorẽ." 
Isaiah38:9 Ad yɩɩll ninga, Zɩɩda rĩma, a Ezekiyas, sẽn yɩɩle a bãaga sẽn wa n sãooge:" 
Isaiah38:10 M da yetame: m vɩɩnda m vɩɩma pʋɩ-sʋk bala n na n zoe n looge, n na n zoe n loog kɩɩmsa sẽn beẽ wã, n tɩ baas bogra sẽn pa wã." 
Isaiah38:11 M da yetame: m kõn le yãend Soaala nin-vɩɩsa zamaanẽ ye, m kõn le seg ned ba a ye tẽng zug ka ye." 
Isaiah38:12 Roog ning m sẽn da kẽedã, sobg looga yɩɩg ne-a, wala rũm-kɩɩm sẽko. B wʋka m vɩɩma wala sʋlg sẽn wʋkd a peende, n vili n sɛ n kedg n kʋʋg gĩsgã. Ka ne zaabra bala, Soaala, tɩ y sɛɛ ne maam," 
Isaiah38:13 ka ne beoogo tɩ kũuma looga ne maam. Soaala wera m kõaba wa bõnyẽega, n-ye! Ka ne zaabrã tɩ m yell sɛɛme." 
Isaiah38:14 M fɩɩnda wala sɩlaalle, la m guusda wa walle. M gesa yĩngr tɩ n nin yiigi. M yɩɩra pʋgẽ, Soaala, maan-y bũmb n kõ-ma!" 
Isaiah38:15 M na n yeelame tɩ bõe? M na n yeela yãmb tɩ bõe? M yet yaa bãmb n wa ne rẽ fãa wɛ! M sũ-tooga labsa tɩ gõeem yɩk n bas-ma. 
Isaiah38:16 Soaala, yãmb da mii tiiri, y ra mii yɛl niyns sẽn na n pak-ma fãa la y le vʋʋg-m lame, y le waa ne pãn-paalga, y kell n wogla m yõore." 
Isaiah38:17 M tooga na n tedgame n lebg m laafi y nonglma yɩɩ wʋsgo, tɩ y põsg-m ne kũum; y teeba m yel-wẽna n lob y poorẽ la y teeb-b lame n lob al yɩɩga." 
Isaiah38:18 Kɩɩmsa ka mi yãmb pẽgr ye, ka sẽn gãe-b tẽngã n na n kils-y ye. F sã n sig yaoogẽ n sɛ, ne y nonglma sẽn ka tɛka, saagr ka le bee n saagdẽ ye." 
Isaiah38:19 Nin-vɩɩsa bal n tõe n pẽg yãmba, wala mam sẽn ket n maand dũnna wã, wala ba rãmb niynsi sẽn ket n tõe n wilg b kamba tɩ yãmb ka yɛɛd ne ninsaal pʋgb ye." 
Isaiah38:20 Soaala, yãmb fãag-m lame. Dẽ la d na kils yãmb ne yɩɩla d vɩɩma fãa pʋgẽ, y ro-sõnga pʋgẽ, Soaala!" 
Isaiah38:21 A Izayi yeela woto: «Bɩ b to kankama n bɛ zĩig ninga sẽn zabdã tɩ rĩma na sãooge!» 
Isaiah38:22 Dẽ la a Ezekiyas sok yã: «Makr bʋg la f kõt-ma tɩ m na n le tõog n taa wẽnd doogẽ?» 
Isaiah39:1 Wakat kãnga, Babilon dĩma a Baladã biiga, a Merodak-Baladã, da wʋmame t'a Ezekiyas lʋɩ bãaga la a sãoogame. A toola sebre la kũuni tɩ b wa kɩs a Ezekiyas." 
Isaiah39:2 A Ezekiyas sũur yɩɩ noogo t'a na n wilg b sẽn tʋm b rãmba a arzɛka roogo, a wanzurf la sãnem, wisdu, kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo, a zab teedo, bũmb ning fãa sẽn da be a rotẽ wã. Bũmb ka pa a zakẽ la a soolma pʋga t'a Ezekiyas ka wilg ye." 
Isaiah39:3 Dẽ la bãngda wa n yãend-a n sok-a: «Nin-bãmba yeelame tɩ bõe? B yii yɛ?» T'a Ezekiyas yeele: «B yii al zĩig sẽn zãrẽ, al Babilon n wa ges-ma.»" 
Isaiah39:4 T'a Izayi na n yeele: «Bõe la b yãe yãmb zakẽ wã?» A Ezekiyas yeelame: «B yãenda m zaka teed fãa, m sẽn bĩng rotẽ wã fãa, bũmb ka be b sẽn ka yãend ye.»" 
Isaiah39:5 T'a Izayi yaool n na n yeel: «Kelg dũni fãa Wẽnd koɛɛga: 
Isaiah39:6 ‹Daar n wate, la bũmb ninga fãa sẽn be f zakẽ wã, f saam-dãmba sẽn tigs bũmb ninga fãa gill na n looga Babilon. Bũmb ba a ye kõn pa, Wẽnd n yeele!›" 
Isaiah39:7 Fo kamba sʋka, fo meng kamb sʋka, kẽer na n lebga zu-soaben-dãmba, Babilon, dĩma zakẽ.»" 
Isaiah39:8 A Ezekiyas leoka a Izayi: «Ad ket n yaa Wẽnd koe-noogo la f sẽn wilgd-ma.» A ra yeta a sũurẽ: Sã n ya woto, m sã n ket n vɩ, m na kell tɩlg yɩɩre la m yãend laafi." 
Isaiah40:1 Yaa yãmb Wẽnda koɛɛga: «Maas-y m neba sũuri, la yɩ tao-tao!" 
Isaiah40:2 Gãneg-y Zerizalɛɛm dãmb yam, Yeel-y-b tɩ b yembda sɛɛme, tɩ b yel-wẽna paama sugri, tɩ b paama sɩbgr m nengẽ, n yao b samda naoor a yiibu.»" 
Isaiah40:3 Koɛɛg n moonde: «Ges-y we-raoogẽ wã n segle, n segl sor Soaala-Wẽnd yĩnga. Kõog-y so tɩrg zĩ-peen-daagẽ kõog-y so tɩrg n kõ d Wẽnde." 
Isaiah40:4 Long buud fãa yẽde, tãng la kunkubr fãa sarme, sẽn zẽk fãa lebg bõn-langa, kunkuba lebg tẽn-nabre." 
Isaiah40:5 Yaa wakat kãng marsã la Naaba-Wẽnd na n wilg b ziiri la ninsaalb buud fãa na bãnge, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd noor n gome.»" 
Isaiah40:6 Koɛɛg n yete: «Moone!» Tɩ m leoke: «M moon bõe?» T'a yeele: «Moon woto: moon tɩ ninsaal ne moog zem taaba, moon tɩ ninsaal keglem ne puug zem taaba." 
Isaiah40:7 Moog kʋɩtame, puug zelgdame, Wẽnd pemsma sã n bui-b ne pãnga. N-ye, ninsaal keglem, moog rẽnna!" 
Isaiah40:8 Moog kʋɩtame, puug zelgdame, tõnd Wẽnda kãabg bala n yɛs wakat buud fãa.»" 
Isaiah40:9 Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, neb sẽn zao tãn-lug-lugi Siõ rãmba, zẽk-y y koɛɛga. Yaa kiba-noog la y wat n na n togse, bɩ y ra zoe rabeem la y moon tɩ b wʋm-a. Yeel-y Zɩɩda tẽnse: «Baad-y y Wẽnde." 
Isaiah40:10 Ad Soaala-Wẽnde, b wata ne pãnga, Bũmb pa tõe tɩ b pa rɩ naam ye, b sẽn zab n paama yãagd-b lame, n watẽ b sẽn nams n paama lʋɩta b taoore." 
Isaiah40:11 B wẽnda pe-kɩɩma, sẽn kɩɩmd a piisi, n zẽkd a kang bala tɩ b wẽneg n tigim taaba; a põkda pe-bi wã a yãoogẽ, a lekda pe-yãansã sẽn yẽsemd kamba, tɩ b kẽ maasmẽ.»" 
Isaiah40:12 Ãnda n mak mogrã koom a nug koorẽ? Ãnd n yaag a nus-bi n mak saaga yalem? Ãnda n mag tẽnga tom ne peoogo? Ãnda n mag tãmsã la tãm-bi wã zɩslem? 
Isaiah40:13 Ãnna n mag Soaala yama zulum? Sagend a bõe n zĩnd b sɛɛgẽ n walem-ba? Ãnda la b yɛdg n wilg b sẽn dat n maane? 
Isaiah40:14 B zĩnda ne ãnda n yẽse? Ãnna la b zãms t'a bãnge sẽn tog n maane? T'a bãng sẽn tog n bãnge? N bãng tʋʋmda sẽn tʋmd ne bũmb ninga? Ãnna zãms b sɩlem? 
Isaiah40:15 Soaala-Wẽnd nifẽ bu-zẽmba ka zem ko-beelle sẽn yi sĩn-bil noorẽ n lʋɩ ye. B zɩslma pa yɩɩd bĩisri beell zɩslem ye. Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnnaam nusẽ tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba pa yɩɩd tom bilfr bal ne zɩslem ye. 
Isaiah40:16 Libã googa rũms ka sekd maoong sẽn tog ne bãmb ziira ye, Libã googa tɩɩs ka sekd maoonga bugum raad ye." 
Isaiah40:17 Ninsaalba sẽn naag taaba ket n yaa zaalem bãmb yĩnga, yaa zaalem a nare." 
Isaiah40:18 Ãnda la y na gese n yeele: woto la Wẽnd wẽnego! Bõe la y na n dɩk m mams ne Wẽnde; 
Isaiah40:19 Y na mak-b ne wẽn-naande? Wẽn-naanda yaa yõak n dõoge, tɩ tʋʋm-mit bao sãnem n bole, n bao wanzurf yãndo n ning ka la ka." 
Isaiah40:20 F pãng sã n ka sek f na rɩk wanzurfu f baooda raoogo, yõgdre sẽn na n wẽneg n kẽ, n bao ra-pɛɛs sẽn mi a tʋʋmde n tõe n pees wẽn-naanda togsende, n tõe n yals-a a nao zutu." 
Isaiah40:21 Y ka mi tɩ ka rẽ la Wẽnd sɩda, y pa wʋm tɩ b gomd b yell sɩda, b ka togs yãmb al sɩngrẽ sɩda? Y ka mi tẽnga sẽn naan to-to sɩda?" 
Isaiah40:22 Soaala-Wẽnd vigla b naama goeel yĩngri; b sã n be be n get tẽng zug rãmba, b yaa wa gũuri. B yɛdga saaga wa peende, peen-kãsenga, b yɛdg-a-la wala peende, wa peend sẽn tar n tiid roto, b ti-a-la wala bãmb me roogo." 
Isaiah40:23 Tẽnga soaalba lebga zaalem, tẽnga bʋ-kaoodba lebga zaalem." 
Isaiah40:24 B pa yãet n paam zĩiga, b pa yãet n zĩnd b zĩigẽ, b pa yãet n kɩ yẽgna la Soaala-Wẽnd sobga sẽn pɩɩsd-b la a kʋɩɩsd-b la a loogd ne b wa mo-pagdo." 
Isaiah40:25 Ãnda la y na n gese n yeele: Wẽnd wẽneg la woto? Sõmblem Wẽndã n sokd woto: «Maam ne ãnda n zem taaba?» 
Isaiah40:26 Zẽk-y neng yĩngri la y gese, ãnda n naan ãdsã la sẽn be yĩngrã? Sã n ka Wẽnd ninga sẽn yalsa ned kam fãa a zĩigẽ, n yals-b b zĩigẽ wala tãb-biisi, la b boond ned kam fãa ne a yʋʋre, tɩ ned ba a ye ka be n kɩɩsdẽ ye." 
Isaiah40:27 Yaa bõe Zakoob? Yaa bõe Israyɛl, tɩ fo yet tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ka mi m sẽn na yɩ a soaba? Tɩ b ka ne m sẽn tog ne a soaba?" 
Isaiah40:28 Fo ka mi? Fo ka zãmse, fo ka wʋm tɩ b gomda? Soaala-Wẽnd yaa zamaan buud fãa Wẽnde. Bãmb n naan tẽngã ne a yalma fãa, b ka namse, b pa yãe yaams ye, la ned ka tõe n mage n bãng b yama sẽn ta zĩig ning ye." 
Isaiah40:29 Yaamsa sẽn kẽ a soaba, b kõta pãnga, pãn-kaoolg soaba, b kõta sõngre." 
Isaiah40:30 Kom-bɩɩb yaandame, b yam yita ne b menga, b mi n wa pãsd n lʋɩtame." 
Isaiah40:31 Sẽn teeg-b Soaala-Wẽnde, bãmb kõt-b-la pãn-paalle, b paamda pɩgs wala sɩlga, b zoetame n ka mi yaams ye, b kẽnda taoore la b pãng pa woogd ye." 
Isaiah41:1 Tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, bas-y bʋʋr m taoore, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, dũni rãmba, keng-y y pɛlse la y wa tɩ m boond-y-la bʋʋdo. Y na waa n leok-ma. D kolg taaba, yãmb ne y wẽn-naandsã. tɩ bʋʋda sɩnge." 
Isaiah41:2 M yet yaa maam n yiis yaang raoã rao ninga sẽn lubd a bɛɛbã la a tabd-b ne a naoore. A kɩtdame tɩ bu-zẽmba basd raood a taoore, a naoor tabda rĩm dãmba, a sʋʋg kɛɛd-b-la zeremse, a tãp sẽegd-b-la wa sobgo wa sobg sẽn sẽegd mo-pagdo." 
Isaiah41:3 Ade, a rigda a bɛɛba a pɩʋʋgda a bɛɛba sʋka tɩ rabeem kaẽ ye, a pa sigd a weefã, a nao pa sɩɩsd tẽng ye." 
Isaiah41:4 La yaa ãnda n tagse la a wa ne yɛl niyns d sẽn gomdã? Ad-y yaa ned ninga sẽn deng n gomd bũmb yelle tɩ b nan ket al yɩɩg-yɩɩgã. Ad-y yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. Maam n be bũmba fãa sɩngrẽ. Yaa maam a Wẽnde n so Kãsengo, pipi zamaana rãmb sʋka, n na n le soog Kãsengo ne yaoolem dãmba." 
Isaiah41:5 Tẽns sẽn puk koomẽ dãmb yãenda rẽnna, tɩ rabeem tar-ba, tẽnga yaang rãmb kolgame n digda." 
Isaiah41:6 Ned sõngda a tũud-n-taaga, tʋʋmd zugu, n yet t'a ning pãnga!" 
Isaiah41:7 Sẽn yẽnegda kutã kõta yõaka raoodo, sẽn toosda ne zãar sõngda sẽn kut a soabã, a yeta sẽn bolgd a soaba: ning pãnga, yaa sõmbo la a baooda kaadse n ka nin-naandã t'a tõog n yals a nao zugu." 
Isaiah41:8 Foo, Israyɛl, m biiga, foom Zakoob, m sẽn tũus a soaba, m zoa a Abraam buudu," 
Isaiah41:9 m tɩ yiis-f-la tẽnga yaanga, m tɩ bool-f-la tẽnga sɛtmẽ. M yeel-f lame: «Foom la m Tʋʋmd-tʋmda. M yõga zood ne foom la zoodã pa sãam ye.»" 
Isaiah41:10 Da maan dabeem ye, m bee ne foom. Bas yɩɩre, tɩ m yaa f Wẽnde. M bɩɩsda f pãnga la m sõngd-f lame, m teend-f-la ne m dɩtg nugu, ne m raood nugu." 
Isaiah41:11 N-ye! Yãnd na yõk sẽn da yik-ba n na tak zabre ne foom. B na n kiime n menem zãnga sẽn baood-b zabr ne foom. 
Isaiah41:12 Fo na n baoo f zabd-n-taasã la f pa na n yãend-b ye; f zabd-n-taasã na n kiime n menem zãnga, bũmb kõn kell ye." 
Isaiah41:13 Yaa maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. M gãd-f-la ne m dɩtgo, m yet-f lame: «Bas rabeem, m wata f sõngre!»" 
Isaiah41:14 Da zoe rabeem ye, Zakoob, zũnzũur sẽn ka tõe n fãag a menga, da zoe rabeem ye, Israyɛl, bɛdẽng, ka pãng soaba! M wata f sõngre! Maam Naaba-Wẽnde n gomde, a Israyɛl Nin-sõngo la f Fãagda." 
Isaiah41:15 Ade, m yals-f lame wa bũmb sẽn na n wes tãndaga; m ning-f-la kud-paala la sẽn tar pãnga, f tʋʋmd na n yɩɩ tãmsa werbo la b wesbo wesda kunkunba tɩ b wa lebg bõonese n wa lebg faase wa ka-fɩɩba," 
Isaiah41:16 tɩ b yelg tɩ sobg sẽeg-ba, tɩ sɩlmand tall n looge, la foom, fo na kɩdem sũ-noogo, Wẽnnaam maasmẽ, a Israyɛl Nin-sõnga maasmẽ." 
Isaiah41:17 Nimbãan-dãmba la naong rãmba baooda koom, la fɩ! Ko-yũud kʋɩɩsa b zelemde, la maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, na n deega b kosgo. Maam, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, m kõn bas-f ye." 
Isaiah41:18 Tãms sẽn ka yit mood b zutu, m na kɩt tɩ kʋɩls tãoos koom, m na kɩt tɩ tãmsa sigdsa pusg koom, m na kit tɩ zĩ-peen-daag lebg bãoogo, m na kɩt tɩ tẽn-koɛɛng bul ko-vɩɩse." 
Isaiah41:19 M na n sela kʋk zĩ-peen-daagẽ, n sel dõaaga, n sel lɛɛlga, n sel taanga. M na n sela sãbga, sãbtulga, kagdga tɩɩsa buud toɛ-toɛ, n yegl taaba." 
Isaiah41:20 Woto b na yãe la b bãnge, b na tags la b wʋme, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n maan rẽ fãa, tɩ Israyɛl Nin-sõngã n yiis b fãa." 
Isaiah41:21 La yãmba, bõn-naandse, bu-zẽmba sẽn boond tɩ b wẽndã wa-y tɩ m bool-y-la bʋʋdo, wa-y n gom tɩ m kelge, Soaala, a Zakoob dĩma, n gomde." 
Isaiah41:22 Kolg-y n wilg-y-do, n wilg sẽn yɩ pĩnda, n wilg-d tɩ d le tẽege. Ka rẽ bɩ y gom beoog yelle tɩ d bãng sẽn na n yɩ-la." 
Isaiah41:23 N-ye! Wilg-y bũmb ning sẽn na n wa tɩ woto d na bãnge tɩ y sɩd yaa wẽnd dãmba. Maan-y bũmb bilfu, yĩngr bɩ tẽnga n yik d pɛlenga, tɩ d kilsi." 
Isaiah41:24 Yãmb yaa zaalem, y tʋʋma me yaa zaalem, yãmb pʋgb yaa wɩɩbdo." 
Isaiah41:25 Nug goabg sẽnẽ, al yɩɩga m kɩtame tɩ ned yi n dɩk sore, la ad-a sẽn wate. Al yɩɩga, wĩndga sẽn pukd zĩig ningã, b gomda a yelle, b pʋta a yʋʋre. A tabda kombɛɛmba wa tãndo, wala yagd sẽn nomd a yagdo." 
Isaiah41:26 Ãnda n deng n wilg yell kãnga tɩ d wʋm-a tɩ ket n zãra? Ãnda n yɩ pipi n gome tɩ d yet t'a togsa sɩda? M miime tɩ ka yãmb nin-yend ye, sẽn tõee rẽ ka be y sʋk ye. Y ned ba a ye ka yaag a noor ye." 
Isaiah41:27 Maam n yɩ pipi n taas yella Siõ. Maam n deng n tʋm Zerizalɛɛm kibar nooga soaba. 
Isaiah41:28 M gẽesa wẽnd bãmba sʋka la m pa yãend ye, sagend ka ye, m sẽn tõe n sok a soaba n paam leodre ka ye." 
Isaiah41:29 B naaga taab n ya zaalem, b tʋʋma yaa zaalem. Bõn-naandsã: sobgo la viʋ-raoogo!" 
Isaiah42:1 Ad-m tʋʋm-tʋmda, m nug tik-a lame; ad-m Nin-sõngo, Yẽ zug la m sik m Vʋʋsem. M yam sig-a lame, t'a na n wa ne zemsgo n kõ ãndũni rãmba." 
Isaiah42:2 A ka pord ye, a ka zẽkd a koɛɛg ye, a ka maand bʋʋr so-tiisẽ ye." 
Isaiah42:3 A ka kũugd rudumd sẽn kaoog ye, a ka kiisd fitil sẽn fibd ye; zemsg ning m sẽn data la a wat ne." 
Isaiah42:4 A kõn bao vʋʋsg ye, a kõn bas raood ye n tãag wakat ninga tẽnga sẽn wat n pid ne zemsgo; tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba me gũuda Noora zãmsgo." 
Isaiah42:5 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomda. Soaala la yĩngri Naanda, bãmb n yɛdg saaga, bãmb n pids tẽnga ne a tɩɩsã; sẽn vɩ-ba a pʋgẽ wã reega vɩɩm bãmb nengẽ, b tʋmda b tʋʋma bãmb maasmẽ. Ad Soaala sẽn gomd ne b sẽn tũus a soabã:" 
Isaiah42:6 «Yaa Soaala-Wẽnde, yaa maam n bool-fo tɩ m dat n pidsa m sẽn yals ne zemsgã. M sõngra kõn paoog-f ye. M naan-f lame n dat-f ne m tʋʋmde, n dat tɩ m zooda ne ninsaalba tõog n yõge, n dat tɩ f yɩ dũni wã fãa vẽenem." 
Isaiah42:7 Tɩ woto bɩ zoeens nin puki, tɩ b sẽn pag b rãmb doog tõog n yi, tɩ sẽn zĩ-b likẽ toog n wa vẽenemẽ." 
Isaiah42:8 Maam la rũnda la beoog Wẽnde, m yʋʋr la boto. M kõn dɩk m ziirã, n kõ ned a to ye, m kõn bas me tɩ nin-naandsa deeg m pẽgra ye." 
Isaiah42:9 Pipi yella taasa wa m sẽn da rate, m na togs-y yɛl niyns sẽn pʋgd-ba marsã, tɩ b nan ka sɩng ye.»" 
Isaiah42:10 Yɩɩl-y yɩɩn-paalle Soaala yĩnga! B pẽgrã yi al tẽnga satmẽ, mogra ne a pʋgẽ teed fãa kils-ba, tẽn-zãorgẽ rãmb fãa kils-ba." 
Isaiah42:11 Zĩ-peen-daaga ne a tẽn-toosã, b fãa zẽk b koeese; a Kedar pʋ-weesẽ dãmba yɩɩl, pĩigẽ dãmba tãs tɩ sãde, tãng zug rãmba kelem." 
Isaiah42:12 B pẽg Soaala-Wẽnd yʋʋre, tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmb moon b pẽgre." 
Isaiah42:13 Wẽnd wata wala tãb-biiga, wala tãb-biig sẽn pid ne raoodo, t'a yĩnsã tõbsd wala tãnsoab yĩnsi, t'a kelm a zabr sɩngr kɛlenga, t'a segd a bɛɛba ne sũ-keelem." 
Isaiah42:14 Al daar zãra m da sĩndame, m da ka gomd ye, m da yõkda m menga. M waasda wala pag sẽn kũmd dogem, m vʋʋsem tulgame, tɩ m sũur dat n yalse." 
Isaiah42:15 M na n sãama tãmsa la tãn-bi, m na n kɩtame tɩ tãn-bɛda la tãn-bõonego kʋɩ zãnga, m na n kɩtame tɩ moog buud fãa, tɩɩg buud fãa zelge, n kɩt tɩ kʋɩls sẽn zoet lebg ko-ralem, n kɩt tɩ ko-ralma fẽbg zãnga." 
Isaiah42:16 M na kɩt tɩ zoeens kẽne, so-raad zugu, m na kɩt tɩ b tũ so-bõonese, m na kɩt tɩ b lika lebga vẽenem, n kɩt tɩ so-ruda lebg saalse; ad-m sẽn na maanega, la kõn pa n ka taas ye." 
Isaiah42:17 B na tar n leb poorẽ ne yãnde, neb niyns fãa sẽn teeg-b nin-naande, neb niyns fãa sẽn get-b yõak sẽn yõge, n maanẽ: «Yãmb yaa tõnd wẽnd dãmba.»" 
Isaiah42:18 Wʋmse, kelg-y! Zoeense, ges-y la y yãe!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ãnda la zoanga, sã n ka m no-rɛɛsã? Ãnda la wʋnga wala no-rɛɛsã m sẽn tʋmdã? Ãnna n ya zoanga wala m tʋʋm-tʋmda? Ãnda n ya wʋnga wala ned ning m sẽn tʋmdã? Ãnda n ya zoanga wa a Le-wa-yã? Ãnda n ya wʋnga wa Soaala-Wẽnd sõgna?" 
Isaiah42:20 Fo yãee bũmb wʋsgo, n yaool n ka le tẽr baa fɩ. Fo tʋb yoogame tɩ f yaool n ka wʋmnẽ ye." 
Isaiah42:21 B sõmblema yĩnga, Soaala-Wẽnd dat n wilgame tɩ b sẽn yiis noor ninga yaa no-kãsenga, a reegr wata ne kẽn-tɩrse." 
Isaiah42:22 La ade, m nebã, b zɛ-b lame tɩ b ka le tar fɩ. B kẽes-b-la loangẽ, b solg-b-la ro-likẽ. B ra get-b-la wa bõn-zɛɛdem, n get-b wa bũmb b sẽn dig n yõke, la ned da pa leokd tɩ pa tog ye, ned da ka yet-b tɩ b lebs ye." 
Isaiah42:23 Yãmb sʋka, ãnda n na n maan gũusgu? Ãnda n na n kelge la a ning a yamẽ?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ãnda n bas a Israyɛl a zɛɛdba nugẽ? Ãnda bas a Zakoob ne a fãadba? M yet yaa Soaala-Wẽndẽ, m yet yaa tõnd sẽn da beeg a soabã. A Israyɛl ka tʋlg n tũ b sor ye, d ka tʋlg n deeg b noor ye." 
Isaiah42:25 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd bas b sũ-puurã t'a raag a Israyɛl zugu, n bas zaba tɩ b fõd a zugu. Sũ-puura gũbg-a-la ne bug walem, la a ka bãng ye, a yõog-a-la zãnga t'a yam ket n nan pa nek ye." 
Isaiah43:1 Ad yaa f Naanda, Israyɛl, yaa sẽn welga foo toorã, Zakoob, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yet-f woto: «Da zoe rabeem tɩ m fãag-f lame m boola f yʋʋre, fo lebga m soolem." 
Isaiah43:2 F sã dʋʋgd ko-ralma, m na zĩnd f sɛɛgẽ; f sã dʋʋgd ko-zoetem, a kõn dɩ-f ye. F sã loogd bugum sʋka a kõn yõog-f ye, bug-walma kõn maan-f bũmb ye." 
Isaiah43:3 Mam la fo Soaala, fo Wẽndã, maam, Israyɛl Nin-sõngã, la f Fãagdã. Yaa Ezipt tõre la m kɩs yã, n deeg foom, a Kus la Seba la m kis f zĩigẽ." 
Isaiah43:4 Ya m sẽn nand f wʋsga yĩnga, ya f sẽn be yõodo tɩ m nong-fã yĩnga. Neb la m kɩs f zĩigẽ, buud la m kɩs n yao f yõore." 
Isaiah43:5 Da zoe rabeem ye, m bee ne foo. M na kit tɩ f yi yaang n lɛɛg wa, m na kɩt tɩ f yi taoore n lɛɛg n wa tigim ka." 
Isaiah43:6 M na yeel goabg rãmba: ‹Wa ne-ba!› N yeel dɩtg rãmba: ‹Bas-y-ba!› Yiis-y m kom-dibli wã be n kõ-ma, yiis-y m kom-pugli wã tẽnga sɛtmẽ n kõ-ma." 
Isaiah43:7 Le tall-y n wa-y mam sẽn kõ b rãmb m yʋʋrã, la m sẽn naane la m welg toore m pẽgr yĩnga!»" 
Isaiah43:8 Kɩt tɩ sẽn tar-b nini n ka neẽ wã kolge, tɩ sẽn tar-b tʋba n ka wʋmdẽ wã kolge." 
Isaiah43:9 Kɩt tɩ bu-zẽmba fãa tigim, tɩ tẽnsa kẽedba fãa tigim. La sok-y b wẽn-naandsã n gese, bãmb sʋka, ãnda n da pĩnd n gom yɛl niyns sẽn maana, tɩ d wʋme? Yeel-y-b tɩ b wa ne b kaset dãmba tɩ d kelge n kelge la d tõog n yeele: «Yaa sɩda!»" 
Isaiah43:10 M buudu, yaa yãmb la m kaset dãmba, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, yaa yãmb la m sẽn tũus b rãmba n yet tɩ b wʋm yɛla võore la b dɩk b saagrã n dell maam. M daab la b bãng la b wilg m sẽn yaa a soaba, la b reeg tɩ wẽnd ba a ye pa reng maam, la sẽn le wẽnda maam me ka ye." 
Isaiah43:11 Yaa maam, la maam bala la Soaala, Fãagda a to ka be sã n ka maam ye." 
Isaiah43:12 Yaa maam n wilgi, yaa maam n fãage. Yaa maam n togse ka wẽn-sãang ba a ye. Dẽnd yĩnga, yãmb la m kaset dãmba. Yaa Soaala n togse, la maam, yãmb Soaala, la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Isaiah43:13 M na n kell n yɩɩ wala m sẽn yaa a soabã. M ka tõe gãd bũmbu tɩ ned deeg-a m nugẽ ye. M ka yalsd bũmb tɩ ned tus-a n lub ye. 
Isaiah43:14 Yaa woto la b gomda, woto la yãmb Fãagdã, a Israyɛl Nin-sõnga gomda: «Yaa yãmb yĩnga la m tʋm neb Babilon tɩ b tɩ kao yemsa rot kʋɩlense. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la Kalde rãmba nengẽ sũ-noog yɩɩl na n lebga wiisgu." 
Isaiah43:15 Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde yãmb Nin-sõngo, a Israyɛl Naanda, yãmb Dĩma.»" 
Isaiah43:16 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnde n gomd woto, yaa bãmb n tuk sore mogrẽ n tuk sor mogr pʋga, mogr sẽn dãmbd a ko-wiis pʋga." 
Isaiah43:17 Bãmb n yiis pĩnda bilim-bilm, wiidi, tãb-biis sẽn mi zabre. Bãmb fãa gãandame n ka le yik bada, b fãa rɩɩme n ki wa lam-palg bugum." 
Isaiah43:18 Soaala koɛɛga la woto: «Da le tẽeg-y pipi yɛla ye, da le tẽeg-y sẽn maan pĩnd ye." 
Isaiah43:19 M wata ne bõn-bãn-paala, la b zoe n waame, yãmb sẽ n ka ne-ba. N-ye! M na n tuka sore we-raoog tẽnsʋka, n tuk sor zĩ-peen-daasẽ." 
Isaiah43:20 We-rũms na n pẽga m yʋʋre, we-baase la na-neendo na n pẽgame tɩ m na n kõ-b-la koom we-raoogẽ, tɩ ko-zoetem na n saag zĩ-peen-daaga, n yiis m neba ko-yũudu, n yiis buud ning m sẽn kõ m menga ko-yũudu la woto b na kils m yʋʋre." 
Isaiah43:21 La buud ning m sẽn gʋʋlã na wilg a sẽn pẽgd maama võore.» 
Isaiah43:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yetame: «Israyɛl, ka mam sɛɛg la fo yõkr ye, fo maana wala f yama yii ne maam, Israyɛl, m buud nongre." 
Isaiah43:23 Ad ka mam yĩnga la f ra kʋʋd pe-bi maand ye, ka maam la f ra waoogd woto ye. Bũmb sẽn ka sɩd yaa f sã n tẽed tɩ m kẽes-f-la yembdo tɩ beoog-beoog fãa bɩ m tarẽ: ‹Wa ne maando, wa ne maando!› Da tẽ tɩ m sɛɛsa f pãnga ne beoog-beoog fãa tãsgã: ‹Yõog tɩdare, yõog tɩdare!›" 
Isaiah43:24 Ka mam yĩng la f da yiis ligd wʋsgo n na n paam n da wisdu ne yũ-noog ye. F maanda sẽn tosd kaama ra ka mam yĩng ye. Ad yaa foo n kẽes maam yembdo ne f yɛl kɛgã, foom n kẽes maam yaamse ne f yel-wẽna." 
Isaiah43:25 Yaa maam n modge n yĩm f beegrã, yaa maam n modg n bas taale." 
Isaiah43:26 Le maneg n togs bũmb ning sẽn kɩt tɩ d da ka zemsd taabã. D naag taab n bao a tɩɩm. Gome n kõ-f meng bʋʋm. 
Isaiah43:27 F pipi ba wã n deng n maan wẽnga, fo no-rɛɛsdba me taka zabr ne maam." 
Isaiah43:28 Ya rẽ la m ning f maan-kʋʋdba yãnde, n yet tɩ m na n wãa a Zakoob buudu, tɩ m na n basa a Israyɛl t'a bɛɛba paoog-a.»" 
Isaiah44:1 M tʋʋm-tʋmda, Zakoob, kelg neer marsã: Israyɛl, m sẽn tũus a soaba, yoog f tʋba." 
Isaiah44:2 Yaa woto la sẽn naana fooma, sẽn yaga foom f ma pʋgẽ wã, sẽn sõngda fooma, gomd ne foom: Da maan dabeem ye, Zakoob, m tʋʋmd-tʋmda, da maan dabeem ye, Israyɛl m sẽn maneg a soab yelle." 
Isaiah44:3 M na n daaga koom n yiis ko-yũudu, ko-yũud sẽn kʋɩɩs koɛɛg ninga na n le paam n bʋkame; m na sika m Vʋʋsem f buuda zugu, m na sika m barka f yagensã zutu." 
Isaiah44:4 B na tãoome wala moog sẽn yi koom sʋka, wala kankanga sẽn sel kʋɩlg noore." 
Isaiah44:5 Nin-yend na n yeelame: «Maam la Naaba-Wẽnd soolem,» la a to na n yeelame tɩ b bool-a t'a Zakoob; a to na n gʋlsa a nugẽ: «Naaba-Wẽnd n so maam,» la a kot tɩ b bool-a t'a Israyɛl tɩ rẽ la a zu-zẽkre." 
Isaiah44:6 Yaa woto la Soaala, a Israyɛl dĩma, gomda, yaa woto la dũni fãa Wẽnde a Israyɛl Fãagda, gomda: «Maam la sɩngre la baasgo; sã n ka maam bala Wẽnd a to ka ye." 
Isaiah44:7 Ãnda n ya wa maam? A soab yiki la a gome, a wilgi m taoore, a bʋʋma sẽn yɛs zĩig ninga? Ãnna n wilg al sɩngrẽ yɛla sẽn da na n yaool n wa wã? B puk sẽn be beoogo n wilg-du." 
Isaiah44:8 Da zoe-y dabeem, da bas-y raood ye. Ka al daar sẽn zãre la m togs-y la m wilg-y rẽnna fãa? Yãmb la m kaset dãmba. Wẽnd a to beeme sã n ka maam? Ad-y teegd a to ka ye, m ka ne pĩig a to ye!»" 
Isaiah44:9 Bãng-y tɩ neb niyns tʋʋmde sẽn ya nin-naands peesgo, bãmb la tʋʋm yaals rãmba la yaoolg rãmba; sẽn peesd-ba miime, tɩ b sẽn pees b rãmba ka ne ye, b ka tar yam ye, la rẽ lɛɛg n wata ne bãmb meng yãnde." 
Isaiah44:10 Pees bɩ rõog wẽnde, sẽn ka be yõodo yaa yalemdo." 
Isaiah44:11 Neb niyns me sẽn sõngd-bã, bãmb me na n paama yãnde. Sẽn peesd-ba yaa ninsaalb bala. B naag taab n wa sak bʋʋdo, b na rig rabeem la b na paam yãnde." 
Isaiah44:12 Sẽyã ningda saala tɩ kuta sã n mooge bɩ a pãb ne zãare. A namsda a menga, kom tar-a lame, ko-yũud tar-a lame, la yaams kẽed-a lame." 
Isaiah44:13 Da-pɛɛsa sɩngda magbo, n karg ne bug-zẽongo a sẽn dat tɩ naanda yɩ a soaba, n yaool n dɩk a pɛsga n tũ sõogrã n pees raoogã, n kõ-a ninsaal yagdo la ninsaal nenga, n wa tol n kẽes-a a waoogr doogẽ." 
Isaiah44:14 A ra tɩ kɛɛga kʋka, bɩ pusga, bɩ sãbga, bɩ raoog a to, la rẽ wã, a ra kẽe tʋgr pʋgẽ n bao. Dag n tõe n yɩɩ tɩɩs menga a sẽn sele ne a raab a to, n zãgs koom." 
Isaiah44:15 Sã n ya ne ninsaala, raoog fãa tar n widgda bugum. B mi n yãkame n tugl bugum n woode bɩ n segl dɩɩbo. Pɛɛsa nengẽ raoog lebgda Wẽnde, t'a wõg a taoore, a lebgda wẽn-naande t'a kẽnd n yĩgimd a taoore." 
Isaiah44:16 Pɛɛsa yãkda daada pʋɩ-sʋka n ning bugum, n sẽed a nemdo, n wãbd n tɩgda. A tõeeme bala n woot bugma la a yetẽ: «M woota bugum, m geta bugma sẽn wit ne sũ-noogo.»" 
Isaiah44:17 A rɩkda raooga sẽn kellã n pees a wẽnde, n pees a nin-naande, n tat a taoore n sulgdẽ la a wõgemdẽ, la a pʋʋsdẽ, n yetẽ: «Fãag maam tɩ foom la m wẽnde.»" 
Isaiah44:18 Pɛɛsdba ka tar yam ye, b ka tagsd ye, b ka ne ye, b ka tar b tʋʋmda võor ye." 
Isaiah44:19 Ned ba a ye ka tagsd ye, ned ba a ye ka tagsd tɩrg ye, ned ba a ye ka leokd a menga: «M dɩka pʋɩ-sʋka n ning bugum, n dʋg m miisgu, n sẽ m nemdo n wãbe la sẽn kellã n dɩkame n maan wɩɩbdo, m yita a wãna n sulg m meng da-giig taoore?»" 
Isaiah44:20 Yaa tompɛglem marsã la ra-pɛɛsa pʋgda, a belgda a menga n kẽed moogo. A kõn fãag a yõor ye; a ka na n tõog n yeel bada: «M sẽn gãd a soab ne m nugã, sãnd ka belgre bala?»" 
Isaiah44:21 Tẽeg woto, Zakoob, tẽege Israyɛl, fo ya m sõgne, m naan-f lame tɩ f yɩ m sõgne, dɩlla da maan m sẽn pa tẽed ne f ye." 
Isaiah44:22 M yẽesa f beegra, n yẽes f yel-wẽna wa sobg sẽn loogd ne sawadgo. Lebg n wa mam nengẽ tɩ m yaoome n deeg-fo." 
Isaiah44:23 Yĩngr dãmba kaas-y sũ-noogo tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tʋmame. Tẽnga bog zulungẽ dãmba, lang-y sũ-noogo; tãmse, kelem-y y zu-noogo; tʋgre ne f tɩɩsã fãa, fo me lange? Soaala-Wẽnd n fãag a Zakoob, b wilga b ziirã a Israyɛl." 
Isaiah44:24 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel yã, Wẽnd ninga sẽn naana foom f ma pʋgẽ, n gomde: «Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n naan fãa gilli. Mam m ye n yɛdg saaga, maam m ye tãa, maam n kɩt tɩ tẽnga sĩdi la m pa yãe sõaangd ye." 
Isaiah44:25 Maam n kɩt tɩ bag rãmb bagre yaa zaalem. M lebsda sɩlem dãmba poorẽ, m kɩtame tɩ b bãngra lebg zɩtem." 
Isaiah44:26 Maam n kõt m tʋʋmd-tʋmdba goama pãnga, mam n kɩt tɩ b sẽn yeela taasdẽ. Maam n yeel tɩ Zerizalɛɛm na paam kẽedba, n yeel tɩ Zɩɩda tẽnsã sẽn wã na le me, la m sɩd na n le yika a lalsã." 
Isaiah44:27 Maam n yet tɩ mogrã fẽbge; maam n kɩtd tɩ kʋɩlsa koom yõbgdẽ. 
Isaiah44:28 M yeta a Sirus poorẽ: ‹Yaa m pe-kɩɩma. Sẽn ta m daab fãa, a na pids-a.› M na n leoka Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ: ‹B le maneg-a n me.› n leok wẽnd dooga poorẽ: ‹Le maneg-y n me-a.› »" 
Isaiah45:1 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga ne b sẽn tũus a soabã, ne a Sirus, ne bãmb sẽn gãd a soab nug rɩtgã. Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «M na n wãa tẽnsã, f taoore, n deeg dĩm dãmb naam, n pags fo taoore tẽns kʋɩlens sẽn da maneg n sog kẽnkẽ." 
Isaiah45:2 Mam meng na n kẽna f taoore m na n sarma tãmsa fãa, m n na kaoo kuta kʋɩlensã la m na n kaoo b kuta sogdsã." 
Isaiah45:3 M na n yiisa f yĩnga, arzɛk sẽn da solge, m na n yiisa laog sẽn da bĩngi, tɩ f bãng tɩ maam la f Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sẽn bool foom ne f yʋʋre." 
Isaiah45:4 Yaa m sõgen a Zakoob yĩnga, m zoa a Israyɛl yĩnga la m bool foom ne f yʋʋre, n waoogd foom tɩ f yaool n ka mi maam ye." 
Isaiah45:5 Yaa maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, m ka be taare, Wẽnd a to ka be n zʋʋg maam ye. Maam n sog f sɛɛg sẽbdga tɩ f yaool n ka mi-m ye." 
Isaiah45:6 M datame tɩ b bãng al yaanga la nin-taoore tɩ sã n zʋʋg maam, Wẽnd a to ka ye. Yaa maam la Soaala, a to ka ye." 
Isaiah45:7 Maam n naan lik la vẽenem, n wat ne sũ-noog la sũ-beedo. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n maan dẽ fãa." 
Isaiah45:8 Bɩ zemsga yi yĩngr n dʋʋge, n yi yĩngr n dʋʋg wa meenem; bɩ sawata sik saaga tɩ tẽnga yaag a noor n koke, tɩ zemsga la fãagra bul n yi! Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yag m daoa.»" 
Isaiah45:9 Yãb-y ninsaal sẽn ya tãnd rʋko wala rʋgd a taaba bala, la sẽn yik n na n zab ne a yagda. Yagd sã n nomd a yagdo tãnda na sok sẽn nomd-a wã: «Bõe la f maanda?» Yagda sẽn yag laok ninga na wẽneg n yeel-a: «Fo yaa nug-kɩɩng laa?»" 
Isaiah45:10 Yell ne ned ninga sẽn yet biig ba-roaka: «Yaa bõe biig la f rog yã?» N yet biig ma: «Yaa bõe la f yiis dũniya?» 
Isaiah45:11 Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã, bãmb sẽn naan b buudã, n sokde: «Yaa ne maam la y gomd m kamba poorẽ bɩ, la y wilgd-m m sẽn tog n maan ne b bɩ?" 
Isaiah45:12 Yaa maam n naan tẽnga ne ninsaalba sẽn be a pʋgẽ, yaa maam n yɛdg yĩngri ne m nugu, maam n so yĩngri tãb-biisã fãa yaa maam n kõt b noore." 
Isaiah45:13 Yaa maam n yiis m gãndaoogo sẽn na n waa ne fãagrã. M na zĩnd a sɛɛgẽ, t'a tʋʋmda yi naana ne-a. A na le mee m tẽnga, a na n le mee Zerizalɛɛm, m kamba sẽn kẽng yembdã na lɛɛg n wa tɩ pa tũ ne yaood ye. Dũni fãa Wẽnd n yeele!»" 
Isaiah45:14 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd le gomda: Ezipt rũm-kɩɩmba, Kus toandba, Seva dãmba, nin-wogd buudu, na n tong n wa f nengẽ la foom n na n soog-ba, f na n ning-b-la wĩiri tɩ b pʋg foom, b na n wõgemda f taoore, b na pʋʋsa foom n yetẽ: «Yãmb Wẽnda bal la Wẽnde, Wẽnd a to ka ket zĩig a to ye.»" 
Isaiah45:15 Israyɛl Wẽnd sẽn wat ne fãagre yãmb yaa Wẽnd sẽn solgd a menga. 
Isaiah45:16 Sẽn yagd-b wẽn-faada sã n ningd-b mens yãnde la b paoogd b mense b nenga sã n surẽ n le ka tõe n dooge," 
Isaiah45:17 ad-y ka boto ne Israyɛl buud ye. Yẽ paama Wẽnd fãagr zãnga, yẽ kõn tol n yãend yãnd la paoor ye." 
Isaiah45:18 Soaala n naan saaga bãmb la Wẽnd ninga sẽn naana tẽngã; bãmb n yɛdg-a la b kɩʋʋlem-a bãmb n pids-a ne teedo, bãmb n naan-a n na n kẽes ninsaalba. Woto la b gomd marsã: «Maam la Soaala, Wẽnd a to ka ye." 
Isaiah45:19 M ka soos n gom ye, m pa bao pẽk n solg ye. M pa kos a Zakoob kamba tɩ b bao-ma m sẽn ka be zĩig ning ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m goma vẽenega, m sẽn yet tɩ bũmb ning n na n yɩ wã n ka be sãmbga.»" 
Isaiah45:20 Naag-y taab n wa, naag-y taab n kolge, yãmb fãa sẽn paam n põsã. Sẽn ka mi-b bũmbu, yaa neb niynsi sẽn tʋk-b da-peesdi n kẽnda, neb niyns fãa sẽn pʋʋsd wẽnd sẽn ka tõe n fãag-ba." 
Isaiah45:21 Gom-y-yã, wa-y ne kaset dãmba, yẽs-y ne taaba. Ãnda n dag n wilg al pĩnd-pĩnda bũmb ning sẽn maand marsã wã? Ãnda n da zoe n togse? Ka maam, Naaba-Wẽnd laa? Wẽnd a to ka paas maam ye. Wẽnd sẽn mi zemsgo la sẽn ya Fãagda, ned a to ka le paas maam ye." 
Isaiah45:22 Dũni wã sɛtmẽ dãmba, wẽnemd-y y neng n tees maam tɩ m fãag yã, y sẽn be zĩig ninga fãa, wẽnemd-y y neng n tees maam, Naaba-Wẽnd ka be taar ye." 
Isaiah45:23 M wẽenda ne m menga, m noor sẽn yiis yaa sɩda, yaa gomd sẽn ka tõe n ka pidsi. Yaa mam taoor bala la rũmd fãa tog n yĩgimdi yaa ne mam yʋʋr bala la zelemd fãa na n wẽene," 
Isaiah45:24 n na wẽene n yeele: «Ne Wẽnd tõogo, ne Wẽnd pãnga!» Sẽn da yik-b zabr ne bãmba na n lɛɛg n waa ne yãnde." 
Isaiah45:25 Wẽnd maasem yĩnga, a Israyɛl buuda na paam tõog la ziiri!" 
Isaiah46:1 A Bel kɩldame, a Nebo wata tẽnga. B rɩka b togsendã n zɩlg b rũmsi, n tʋk zɩɩb zɩtba; wẽn-naanda sẽn zoe n zɩt bãmb yɩɩrã la b kong n dɩk n tʋk rũmsã; sɩd ya bõn-zɩsd menga la rũmsa tʋk n yõrdẽ." 
Isaiah46:2 La ad-a Bel sẽn kɩllde, ad-a Nebo sẽn wat tẽnga. Ka tʋk-b tɩ b yi n kaag moog ye; b ka tõe n fãag sẽn zɩt-b bãmba meng ye, yaa yembdo la bãmb meng dabda." 
Isaiah46:3 Kelg-y-ma, Zakoob doogo, kelg-y-ma sẽn ket-ba, a Israyɛl zaka! Mam buga yãmba al y ma pʋgẽ, mam gesa y yelle al y yãadmẽ." 
Isaiah46:4 Yãmb na waa n kʋʋle la y na mik tɩ m pa teem ye, yãmb na kʋʋle tɩ m ket n lobd m toogo; yãmb zug na pɛlge tɩ m ket n be y poorẽ. Yaa bũmb sẽn zoe n maane, m zoe n bug-y lame, m na kell n bug yã, m na kell n fãag yã." 
Isaiah46:5 Ãnda la y na yãe n mams maam? Ãnda la y na n yet tɩ m wẽnda a soaba? Ãnda la y na yeele t'a soab tõe n maka ne maam? 
Isaiah46:6 Ges-y neb sẽn sãamd b ligdi b magda b sãnem la b wanzurf n dɩkd n kɩs yõaka t'a na n maan wẽnde, tɩ b sã n dõog-a n sɛ, bɩ b wẽneg n wõgemd a taoore n waoog-a." 
Isaiah46:7 Ad-b sẽn tʋkd-a, ad-a sẽn zɩsgd b bãgdo, ad-b sẽn baood zĩig n na n sik-a n pemse, wala a yɛɛ ne kẽnde la a yaool n pa kẽn ye. Zĩ-kãnga a kõn le serg ye, la b sã n pʋʋsd-a, a sĩndame, la yell sã n pak-a, a ka fãagd a meng ye." 
Isaiah46:8 Tẽeg-y dẽnna tɩ yãnd yõk yã, yel-maandba, teem-y zʋgo." 
Isaiah46:9 Maan-y tẽegre ne yɛl niyns fãa sẽn looge, maam la a ka be taar soaba Wẽnde, Maam la Wẽnd sẽn ka tar mak-n-taaga." 
Isaiah46:10 Al sɩngrẽ m wilga sẽn na n yaool n wa, m togsame tɩ nan ka ta ye, m gomame la m sẽn yeelã n yalse, m sẽn dat fãa pidsame." 
Isaiah46:11 M boola m sɩl-bedr, yaanga, m boola ned al zĩig sẽn zãre, la yẽ soab n na n pids m daabã. M boond-a-la al zĩig sẽn zãre, a na n wẽneg n waame, m sẽn tʋlge wẽnegd n pidsame." 
Isaiah46:12 Kelg-y maam, kõn-teem-zʋg rãmba, yãmb fãa sẽn ket n zãr ne y bɛɛba lubri!" 
Isaiah46:13 M fãagra kolgame, a kõn le kaoos ye, a ka le zãr ye. A Siõ na n paama fãagre, a Israyɛl na yãenda m ziiri." 
Isaiah47:1 Aya! Zĩnd tomẽ, Babilon bi-pugla, b sẽn deeg a soab naama zĩnd tẽnga, Kalde biiga, zãag ne naam goeele n zĩnd tẽnga; f kõn le paam tɩ b bool foom Tɩg-põnegre, bada." 
Isaiah47:2 Kẽ neerẽ n wer f zom, yidg f zoobdo, kool f fuugu, kool-a n ta rũma, rʋʋg kʋɩlga," 
Isaiah47:3 Sẽk f fuugu, yals f zaala tɩ yãnd yõk fo. M dat n sɩbg-f lame n dok m sũuri, la ned a to kõn gɩdg-m ye." 
Isaiah47:4 Tõnd Fãagda, sẽn boond a soab tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnde, n boond tɩ Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã, n gome." 
Isaiah47:5 Zĩnd-y sɩɩ, pa-y likẽ, Kalde rãmba, b kõn le bool Kalde tɩ dũni wã soaal ye." 
Isaiah47:6 M sũur da puuga ne m neba tɩ m yãk b barka, m da rɩk-b lame n bas fo nugẽ, la fo me wilgame tɩ f yaa ned sẽn ka be sugri. M nin-kẽemba, fo zɩlg-b-la zɩ-bedre." 
Isaiah47:7 Fo ra yetame: m yaa dĩma la m naam kõn zĩnd sɛɛb ye; fo ka zĩnd n tags yɛla neer ye, fo ka zĩnd n bao b sẽn na n baas to-to ye." 
Isaiah47:8 Kelg marsã, nong-m-meng soaba, nonga-noog soaba, fo zĩime tɩ f sũur ka kiuusdẽ ye, tɩ f yetẽ: «Maam, maam bal la neda, sẽn keta yaa zaalem; m kõn tol n yɩ pʋg-kõore, m kamba me kõn loog n bas-m ye.»" 
Isaiah47:9 Bãng tɩ yɛl a yiibã fãa na n lʋɩɩ f zugu daar a ye, vugr bala, f kamb na n kiime, f na n lebga pʋg-kõore. F sẽn na maan bɩ f maane, f bagba ne f tɩta rãmb me yik n guri tɩ põasg kõn põs ye." 
Isaiah47:10 Fo ra teega f wẽnema n yetẽ: «Ned ka ne-m ye.» Ad yaa f sɩlma la f bãngr-yaalsã ad yaa bãmb n kẽes-f moogo, tɩ f na n yeel f sũurẽ: «M ka tar mak-n-taag ye!»" 
Isaiah47:11 Yel-beedo, f sẽn ka tõe n põse, n na n lʋɩ f zugu, wɩɩbdo, f sẽn ka tõe n gili n na n lʋɩ f zug vugr bala; zɛɛbo n na n zɛ la ka bũmb sẽn tõe n bilg ye." 
Isaiah47:12 Pa ne f tɩtã, f tɩt kʋʋma, fo sẽn pʋg b rãmba f yãadmẽ n sɛɛs f pãng zãnga, pa ne bãmba tɩ daare, f na rɩ b yõodo, tɩ daare, f na le wa ne neb yɛɛsgo." 
Isaiah47:13 Fo yɛɛme ne sẽn da sagend-b fooma laa? Bool-b tɩ b wa, n wa fãag-fo, bool f karen-saam-dãmbã, bool sẽn mi-b yĩngr ween-vɩɩs a naasã, bool sẽn karemd-b ãdsa gʋlsem, la b wilgd kiu-paal fãa sẽn wat ne a pʋɩɩr ningã." 
Isaiah47:14 B na n yɩɩ wala moodo la bugum n na n zomb-ba, b kõn tõog n fãag b yõore tɩ bugma gũbg-b lame, la ka bugum sẽn zems kolg n wood ye." 
Isaiah47:15 Yaa bãngr bɛda rãmb nengẽ la fo sẽn sɛɛs f pãngã; yaa bãmb n dɩt foom al f yãadmẽ la ned kam fãa yeebda a yeebgo, sẽn ya-a fo fãagd ka ye." 
Isaiah48:1 Kelg-y woto, Zakoob kamba, b sẽn boond yɛs tɩ Israyɛl kamba tɩ y sũur tosd kaam! Kelg-y woto, sẽn yit-b Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. Ade, yãmb wẽenda ne Soaala yʋʋre, n wɩngd ne Israyɛl Wẽnda boolgo, n yaool n ka boond ne yam tɩrga, n ka boond ne pʋ-peelem ye." 
Isaiah48:2 Kelg-y woto, yãmb fãa sẽn paame tɩ b boond-y tɩ Tẽn-sõnga kamba, n yet tɩ y sẽn dell Wẽnd ninga, yaa Israyɛl Wẽndã, yaa dũni fãa Wẽndã!" 
Isaiah48:3 Ade, yaa al daar zãra la m togs yɛl niyns sẽn loogã, maam n dag n wilg-b ne m noor gomde; vugri bala m tʋlgame tɩ b taase, la b taasame." 
Isaiah48:4 M da miime t'a Israyɛl yaa bi-tõtre, t'a yubla yaa kẽnkẽ wa kutu, t'a zuga keelma yɩɩd kutu." 
Isaiah48:5 M bãnga rẽ n togs yɛlã tɩ b nan ket n zãra, n togs yɛlã tɩ b nan ka wa ye, tɩ f ra wa tudg f menga n yeele: «Wã yita mam wẽnda nengẽ, yaa mam nin-naandã, mam kutã n yeel tɩ rẽ yɩ.»" 
Isaiah48:6 Fo wʋma rẽ fãa; fo yãee rẽ fãa, f tõe n le kɩɩsame bɩ? Marsã, m wata ne koe-paalse, koees sẽn solge, ned ba a ye sẽn nan ka mi." 
Isaiah48:7 Ka bũmb sẽn naan al pĩnd ye, Israyɛl, yaa mars marsã bala, la fo na n yãend-ba, sã n ka rũnda bala, f zɩɩ n wʋm ye. Woto f kõn saag n yeel tɩ f ra miime ye." 
Isaiah48:8 Sã n ya sɩda, Israyɛl, f pa kelg ye, f ka tʋlg n wʋm bũmb ye, f zɩ n maan gũusg ye. M mi f kamba wa sudum dãmba; bãmb la b ra boond tɩ ka pʋg rãmba, al tɩ b nan ket n paoodẽ." 
Isaiah48:9 Ya m sẽn zoet m yʋʋrã sãoongo, la m sẽn da yõk m sũuri, ya m sẽn da baood m yʋʋrã pẽgre, la m da sĩnda, la m ka sɩbg-f ye." 
Isaiah48:10 Ade, m yɩlg-f lame, la ka bugmẽ la m lob-f tɩ f yɩlg wa wanzurf ye, m yɩlg-f-la ne sulg-m-menga." 
Isaiah48:11 Yaa mam yĩnga, maam m yembr yĩnga la m sẽn maan woto wã, tɩ m yʋʋr da sãam ye, la ned a to me da reeg pẽgre sẽn ya m dẽnd ye." 
Isaiah48:12 Kelg-ma, Zakoob, kelg-ma, m biiga Israyɛl, yaa maam la sɩngre, maam la baasgo." 
Isaiah48:13 Ya m nugu n sigl tẽnga, yaa mam dɩtgo n yɛdg saaga. Maam n yagl sẽn be yĩngra fãa m sã n bool-ba, vugr bala, b watame."
