Isaiah48:14 Tigim-y taaba n kelge: m tara m zoa sẽn na n pids m daaba fãa, n pids m sẽn togs fãa Babilon poorẽ, la Babilon dãmb na bãng tɩ maam n so-ba. La yãmb sʋka ãnd n tõog n wilg rẽnna? Ned ba a ye!" 
Isaiah48:15 Yaa maam n gome, yaa maam n bool m nedã, maam n kɩt t'a wa, maam n na n kɩt t'a tõog n pids m daabo." 
Isaiah48:16 Kolg-y n kelg woto: Wakat ka tol n zĩndi tɩ m solg-y bũmb ye. Yɛla fãa sɩnga m nifẽ. Marsã wã Soaalã n tʋmd-ma, yaa maam la b tool b Vʋʋsem." 
Isaiah48:17 Woto la Wẽnd gomda, woto la f Fãagda, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã, gomda: «Maam la Soaala, f Wẽnde, maam n wilg-f sẽn ya yõodo, maam n kẽes-f sor ninga f sẽn kẽnd a soab pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah48:18 Fo sã n da reegẽ-la m noya, f rugdẽ la laafi pʋgẽ wa kʋɩlgẽ, tɩ f sõmblema yɛdg n dɩgẽ wa mogr koom." 
Isaiah48:19 Buuda yaẽ-la wala bĩisri, fo yagensa yaẽ-la wala zẽka. Fo yʋʋra kõn tõog n menemẽ, a kõn tõog n yẽesẽ m taoor abada.»" 
Isaiah48:20 Yi-y Babilon tẽnga! Zoe-y n bas-y Kalde rãmba! Tãs-y tɩ b wʋme. Moon-y tɩ ta tẽnga sɛtmẽ, yeel-y woto: «Wẽnd fãaga b sõgen, a Zakoob.»" 
Isaiah48:21 Ko-yũud pa yõk-b we-raoogẽ, b sẽn tall-ba n gõtem zĩig ninga ye. Bãmb yĩnga b kɩtame tɩ pĩig pusg koom. Pĩiga sẽn wẽ la koom sẽn zoe n sigi." 
Isaiah48:22 Nin-wẽns bal n ka na n paam laafi. Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele. 
Isaiah49:1 Tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, kelg-y, tẽnga sɛtmẽ dãmba, kelg-y! Soaala-Wẽnd boola maam, tɩ m nan ka rog ye, b boola m yʋʋre tɩ m ket m ma pʋgẽ." 
Isaiah49:2 B saasa m noore wa sʋ-rɩtga, b solg-m-la b nug pʋga, b sɩlsa maan wala pĩim, n dɩk n solg b lokẽ." 
Isaiah49:3 Soaala yeel-m lame tɩ m taas a Israyɛl: «Fo yaa m sõgne, na n tũu ne foom a Israyɛl, tɩ m puk m ziiri.»" 
Isaiah49:4 M da yeta m sũurẽ tɩ m namsa zaalem, tɩ m sɛ-la m pãng zaalem, mik m pʋɩɩr da keta m Soaala nengẽ, m dolb da keta Wẽnnaam nengẽ." 
Isaiah49:5 Marsã wã Soaala-Wẽnd sɩd gomame, bãmb yeelame tɩ b naana maam m ma pʋgẽ, tɩ m yɩ b tʋʋm-tʋmda, la m sõnge t'a Zakoob lɛɛg n wa, n sõng t'a Israyɛl lɛɛg n wa tigime. Woto wã m be yõodo Wẽnd nifẽ, la m Soaala-Wẽnd meng la m pãnga." 
Isaiah49:6 Bãmb n yeel maam: «Ka sek tɩ f yaa m tʋʋm-tʋmd ninga sẽn na yik a Zakoob kamba sẽn lʋɩ wã la f tall a Israyɛl kamba sẽn kellã n wa ye. M datame tɩ f lebg bu-zẽmba fãa vẽenem, tɩ m fãagrã ta dũni wã yaanga.»" 
Isaiah49:7 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda ne foo, a Israyɛl Fãagda, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõnga gomda ne ned ninga sẽn ka yãe waoogre, ne dũni ninsaalba sẽn ges a soab wa wɩɩbdã, ne ned ninga na-toosã sẽn kẽes yembdã: «Ad-y dĩm dãmb sã n yãend-fo, b na n yika b zaoorẽ n yals yĩngri, na-komsa na n wõgemda f taoore.» Woto la b na n wilg tɩ b waoogda Soaala, Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã, ned ninga sẽn tũusa foom la b pids b pʋlemde." 
Isaiah49:8 Naaba-Wẽnd yeta woto: «M nimbãan-zoeera wakatã, m deega f kosgo, f fãagra raare, m wa n sõng-f lame, m welg-f-la toore la m segl-f lame, la m yalsa f poorẽ tɩ zooda na n le tõog n yõge. M na le yik tẽn-sõngã, sẽn sãam n dɩgã n le maneg-a n pʋɩ." 
Isaiah49:9 M na yeel b sẽn pag b rãmb doogo: ‹Yi-y-yã!› M na yeel sẽn be-b likẽ: ‹Wa-y vẽenemẽ!› La soya zutu, tãmsa zutu, b na yɩ wa rũms sẽn kẽnd la b wãbdẽ la sẽn paamd yamdo kunkuba fãa zutu." 
Isaiah49:10 Kom sɛɛme, ko-yũud sɛɛme, wĩnto-raase, pemsem sẽn yõogd wa bugum sɛɛme. B sẽn zoe b nimbãanegã, b na tees-b ko-vɩɩs zĩiga." 
Isaiah49:11 Tãmsa fãa na n lebga sore londa fãa na n pidsame. 
Isaiah49:12 Ad-b sẽn wate, la yaa yɩɩg la b yita; kẽer yita nug goabg sẽnẽ, tɩ kẽer dʋʋg mogre, nin-taoore, tɩ kẽer yit Ezipt sẽnẽ.»" 
Isaiah49:13 Yĩngri dãmba, kaas-y sũ-noogo, tẽng zug rãmba, kɩdem-y! Sẽn be-b tãmsa zutu, tãs-y sũ-noogo! Wẽnd wa n maaga b neba sũuri, Wẽnd kũma b neba nimbãanega." 
Isaiah49:14 A Siõ da yetame: «Soaala-Wẽnd yĩma m yelle, Soaala-Wẽnd bas-m lame.»" 
Isaiah49:15 M sok n gese: pag tõe n yĩma a biiga a sẽn yẽsem bɩ? Pag tõe n kisga biig sẽn dog a pʋgẽ bɩ? La rẽ sã n da beẽ, mam yẽ kõn yĩm f yell abada." 
Isaiah49:16 Gese Siõ, m gʋlsa foom m nuga pʋga, f tẽnga lalse la m nina karg n getẽ." 
Isaiah49:17 Sẽn wat-b n na n le yik fo lalsã, ad-b sẽn wat ne yãgbo, fo wãadbã la f zɛɛdba loogame." 
Isaiah49:18 Wẽneg f neng n gese, ad-f kamba fãa gilli sẽn tigim taab n watẽ, n wat f nengẽ. La m wẽenda, yaa Wẽnd n gomde, m wẽenda, tɩ b na n yɩɩ fo yĩnga wala faong bũmbu sẽn tar neerem, wala sẽbdg b sẽn sogd pʋg-paala." 
Isaiah49:19 Ade, fo tẽnga sẽn ka tar zãma la sẽn ya raboogã, fo tẽnga sẽn wã wã ka na n sek a kẽedba, wãadba sã n wa looge." 
Isaiah49:20 La fo sẽn da tẽed tɩ b menemame wã, bãmb dãmb n na n walem foom: «Zĩiga paooda wʋsgo, yalg-a tɩ d tõog n zĩndi.»" 
Isaiah49:21 Fo na n yeela f sũurẽ: «Ãnna n dog woto fãa n kõ-ma, m da yaa pʋg-kiiri, n ka tar kamb ye, ãnna n wub bãmba tɩ b bɩ? B ra basa maam tɩ m zĩ m ye; dɩlla bãmba yita yɛ?»" 
Isaiah49:22 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela woto: «M na n kamsa dũni wã rãmba, m na n dʋʋsa m tãb-kaoore b yĩnga. B na n yondga kom-dibli b futẽ n wa kõ foom, la b na n tʋka kom-pugli wã gʋbla n wa kõ foom." 
Isaiah49:23 Dĩm dãmb na n yɩ-la f ba-wubdsi, tɩ dĩm-pogsã yɩ f ma rãmba. B na n wõgemda fo taoore, b na n lelma f nao wã tom. Woto f na bãnge tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde. Sẽn teeg-b maam kõn paam yãnd abada.»" 
Isaiah49:24 Gãndaoogo a bõe n tar a bũmbu tɩ b le reege? Na-toaag a bõe n yõk a bɛyã n le bas tɩ looge? 
Isaiah49:25 Ade, Soaala-Wẽnd yeta woto: «B na n deega zabr gãndaooga nugẽ a sẽn da yõk a soaba n pag roogo, n deeg nin-toaaga nugẽ, a sẽn da fãag laog ningã! Zerizalɛɛm, ad yaa mam meng n na n zab n sõng-fo, la m fãag f kambã." 
Isaiah49:26 Sẽn tar-b foom toogã, m na kɩt tɩ b wãb b meng nemdo, m na kɩt tɩ b yũ b zɩɩm n gãeeme wala b yũu rã-paalga, la ninsaalb fãa na n bãngame tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la Fãagda, b na bãng tɩ m lʋɩɩsa m toogo, maam, a Zakoob Wẽnd pãng soabã.»" 
Isaiah50:1 Soaala-Wẽnd tara b sokre n na n sok yã: «Sã n yaa sɩda tɩ m yiisa Zerizalɛɛm, yãmb ma wã, wa-y ne sebr ninga m sẽn gʋls n yiis-a wã, ka rẽ bɩ y wilg maam ned ninga m sẽn koos yãmb ne a soabã tɩ y lebg a yem-daadã, tɩ m paam ligdi n yao m sama. Ade, b sã n koos yãmba yaa y yel-wẽna yĩnga la b koos-y-yã. La m sã n yiis y ma wã, yaa a tõdgra yĩnga, yaa y tõdgra yĩnga." 
Isaiah50:2 M sẽn wa yirã, yaa bõe yĩng la m pa yãe neda? Bõe tɩ m bool tɩ ned pa leok-ma? Yao ligd n deege yaa toog ne maam bi? M konga pãng sẽn na n fãag-y bi? M gomd a ye bala tɩ mogr kʋɩ, m gomd a ye bala tɩ kʋɩlg lebg dasempʋɩɩga, m gomd a ye bala tɩ zĩma kong koom, n ki ko-yũudu n põoge." 
Isaiah50:3 Ad-y m datame n yeelg saaga fu-sablga, n yeelg-a kʋʋr futu.»" 
Isaiah50:4 Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-m-la karen-biig zelemde, n wilg mam sẽn tog n togse, n wilg mam sẽn na n yiis gomd ninga, n le yẽeg sẽn basd-b raooda gĩini. Yibeoog fãa b nɛkd-m lame, yibeoog fãa b yoogda m tʋbre tɩ m le kelg wa karen-biig sẽn tog n kelge." 
Isaiah50:5 Soaala-Wẽnd yoogda m tʋbre, tɩ m kelge la m ka zãgs ye, m ka tar n leb poorẽ ye." 
Isaiah50:6 M sulga m poore n kɩs pãbdba, m teesa m yɛgdga tɩ b gʋs m toɛɛnga, m basame tɩ b tʋbs m neng kolkoodo, m sakame tɩ b paoog-m ne tʋʋre." 
Isaiah50:7 Soaala-Wẽnd wa-la m sõngre, yaa rẽ me la m pa bas raoodo, m wɩsga m nenga wa wãre, la m saagdame tɩ maam n na n tõoge." 
Isaiah50:8 Soaala-Wẽnd be-la m sɛɛgẽ la b na n kõ-m-la bʋʋm. Ãnda n na n sak n bool-m bʋʋdo? A soab wa tɩ d babs bʋ-kaooda! Ãnda n dat n yɩ m bʋʋd-n-taaga? A soab wa tɩ d seg taaba! 
Isaiah50:9 Soaala-Wẽnd wa-la m sõngre, ãnda n na paalg-ma? M bʋʋd-n-taasa na n kʋdga wa fuugu, wa fuug sẽn kẽ bugdu n tõosd kʋdse." 
Isaiah50:10 Ned sã n be yãmb sʋka n zoet Soaala-Wẽnd nifu, bɩ a kelg Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmda koɛɛga! Ned ninga fãa sẽn kẽnda likẽ n pa tol n ne vẽenem wa sẽn paoode, a soab rɩk a meng n bas ne Wẽnde, a soab teeg Soaala-Wẽnde!" 
Isaiah50:11 La sã n ya yãmb fãa sẽn yõgen bugma, tɩ y logd pid ne pɛ-zẽnema, ad bũmb ning sẽn gũud yãmba: Yaa yãmb menga bugum n gũud yã yaa yãmb menga pɛɛma, yaa pɛɛm niyns yãmb sẽn zẽna n gũud-y. Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn bĩng yãmba la rẽnna, y na n kii kũ-toogo." 
Isaiah51:1 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «Yãmb fãa sẽn baood-b fãagre, yãmb fãa sẽn baood-b maama, kelg-y m koɛɛga: Ges-y pĩig ninga b sẽn dɩk n pees yãmbã, ges-y b sẽn tu n buk yãmb zĩig ningã!" 
Isaiah51:2 Ges yã a Abraam, yãmb ba, ges yã a Sara, y ma! M sẽn waa n bool a Abraam t'a nan ka rog biig ye, la m ning-a-la barka, n kɩt t'a lebg bu-yaleng ba.»" 
Isaiah51:3 N-ye, Wẽnd zoe-la a Siõ nimbãanega, b zoe-la a rota sẽn wã nimbãanega! Soaala-Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ zĩ-peen-daaga lebg Eden, n kɩt tɩ rasempʋɩɩga lebg Wẽnd zẽedo. Yaa sũ-noogo la kɩdeng bʋʋre la b na n wʋm be, na n yɩɩ bark pʋʋsgo sẽn tũnug ne yɩɩla." 
Isaiah51:4 Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd na n gome: «Kelg-y m goama neere, m buudu, yoog-y y tʋb n kelg-ma, Noorã na n yii mam nengẽ, sor ning m sẽn yet tɩ b tũ wã n na n yɩ dũni wã vẽenem." 
Isaiah51:5 M sẽn wat n na n kõ-f fãagr ningã, ad-a wakata kolgame, a pukra wakata zoe n taame. M na n kɩtame, m na n modgame tɩ buuda fãa tũudma yɩ tɩrga. Ba tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba na n teega maam, b na n teega m pãnga." 
Isaiah51:6 Doog-y nini n ges yĩngri, sulg-y y menga n ges tẽngre, saaga na n looga wala bug-zõose, tɩ tẽnga tõose wala kʋdse. Ninsaalba na n kii wa zõose. La m na n yalsa m fãagra daar buud fãa yĩnga, a ka na n tol n zĩnd sɛɛb ye." 
Isaiah51:7 Kelg-y-ma, yãmb fãa sẽn mi sẽn zemse, yãmb fãa sẽn deegd m noya y sũurẽ. Da zoe-y ninsaal tʋʋr ye, da sak-y n bas raoodo, tʋʋra yĩng ye." 
Isaiah51:8 Tɩ sẽn tʋʋsd-b yãmba yelle na n baasa wa pe-kõbd fuugu sẽn kẽ bugdu, bugd a nare. M sẽn wat ne fãagr ninga na n yalsame, a na n yɩɩ fãagr daar buud fãa yĩnga.»" 
Isaiah51:9 Nek-y wɛ, Soaala, nek-y tao-tao, yẽeg-y y gĩini, nek-y wala pĩnda, nek-y wa kʋdem-wẽnnẽ zamaana. Ka yãmb sʋʋga n kɛ rũm-bãndã ka yamb sʋʋgã n pas a Raab?" 
Isaiah51:10 Ka yãmb n fẽbg mogra koom, ka yãmb n kʋɩɩs-a zãnga? Ka yãmb n kɩt tɩ sor tuk a pʋgẽ tɩ y sẽn fãag b rãmba tõog n looge?" 
Isaiah51:11 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd na n fãaga b neba tɩ b le lɛɛg n wa Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ b le wa kẽed Siõ, la b kilsd b sũ-noogo kilsgu. Sũ-noog sẽn kõn sɛ sõore n na n puk b nini, langre la kɩdengo n yãagd-ba, yãbre la sũ-beed zoe n menemame." 
Isaiah51:12 Yaa maam la maam bala, yaa maam y Soaalã n tõe n sigs y sũuri. Yaa bõe la m buuda maand dabeem, ninsaal taoore, ned sẽn be dũnna n ka beoog taoore? Sẽn yaa wa mooga soab taoore?" 
Isaiah51:13 Fo yĩma Soaala-Wẽnde, f Naanda, bãmb n yals yĩngri la tẽnga. Beoog sẽn vẽege, fo rigda rabeem f na-toaaga taoore, wala a menes-f lame la bala. A puugda a sũuri la bõe n pʋgde?" 
Isaiah51:14 Keta bilf bala tɩ sẽn be a roogẽ wã yi, a kõn le yaal likẽ wã ye, rɩɩb kõn le paoog-a ye." 
Isaiah51:15 Yaa maam f Soaala la f Wẽnde, maam n dãmbd mogre t'a ko wiisa bʋʋr sãta, m yʋʋr la dũni fãa Wẽnde." 
Isaiah51:16 M le yɛdgda saagã, n le vigind tẽngã a zĩigẽ la m yeta Zerizalɛɛm: «Foo la mam buudu fo n na n deeg m koɛɛgã n taase, fo la m na n solg m nugẽ.»" 
Isaiah51:17 Zerizalɛɛm, nek tao, yik yĩngri! Wẽnd yũnug-f-la b sũ-puur dãam, la rãama yɩɩ rã-toaaga, n lebgd zugu, fo yũ-a lame, fo yũ-a-la zãnga, fo yũume tɩ neng yilimdẽ." 
Isaiah51:18 F sẽn dog kamb niynsa sʋka ba a ye ka wa wilg-f so-sõnga ye. F bi-wubdg ba a ye ka wa gãd f nug ye. 
Isaiah51:19 Yɛla lʋɩta f zugu a yiib-yiibu: tẽnga wãab la a zũnd-zãnde, zabr sʋʋga la kom. Ãnda n na n wa yãb-fo, ãnda n na n wa maas f sũuri?" 
Isaiah51:20 Ad-f kamb sẽn gãe vãna soya zutu, b gãee wala walga sẽn lʋɩ bẽdgẽ, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puura rɩt-ba, n yɛ ne Wẽnd tãsga." 
Isaiah51:21 La ade, Zerizalɛɛm sẽn gãe ne pɛta, kelg neer marsã, foom a ka yũ rãam n yaool n kẽnd n tuumnẽ:" 
Isaiah51:22 Soaala, f zu-soaba, f Wẽnda na n sõnga b buudã la b gomda woto: «M na n deega f nugẽ f wamdã, rã-toaaga sẽn yũud n tuumnẽ wã wamde m sũ-puura wamde la f kõn le yũ a pʋgẽ ye." 
Isaiah51:23 M na ning-a-la f bɛɛba nugẽ, bɛɛb niyns sẽn da yet-b fooma: ‹Zõond tɩ d tabe n looge.› Tɩ fo sɩd zõond tɩ b tabe, tɩ fo po-raooga sɩd lebg b sore.»" 
Isaiah52:1 Zerizalɛɛm neke, nek tao! La wɩsg f menga, Siõ, tẽn-sõngo, yeelg f fu-neeba. Ad sãan la nin-dẽgdo kõn le tag f sɩmand ye." 
Isaiah52:2 Fo rẽgma ne wubsgu, fugumd wubsgã, Zerizalɛɛm, Yik yĩngri, leb f zĩigẽ, Siõ, foom b sẽn yõk n pag roogo, kao wĩ wã sẽn pid f yublã." 
Isaiah52:3 N-ye! Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd ne buudã: «B ka ra yãmb ne ligd ye, dẽ yĩnga mam me na reeg yã tɩ ka tũ ne ligd ye.»" 
Isaiah52:4 N-ye, woto la Wẽnd gomda: «M buuda neba da kẽnga Ezipt n na n tɩ zĩnd be, la rẽ loogr poore yɩɩ Asʋr n tall-a toogo." 
Isaiah52:5 La woto wã m yõoda la bʋgo? Naaba-Wẽnd meng n sokde. B looga pa-weer ne m buuda zaalem, m pa reeg lagfr ye. B sẽn be b rãmb nugẽ wã kaasdame tɩ bãmb n maan raoodo. Ket n yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde. Beoog sẽn vẽege m yʋʋra tara sãoong n dabda!" 
Isaiah52:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la raar a ye, m buuda na bãng m sẽn yaa a soaba la raara zoe n waame.»" 
Isaiah52:7 Zu-noog soaba la sẽn dʋ-b tãnga zugu ne kiba-noogo, n na wilg laafi la sũ-noog zamaan paalga, n wilg fãagre, n na n yeel a Siõ: «Wẽnd sɩnga b naama rɩɩbo.»" 
Isaiah52:8 Bʋʋr n sãte, yaa tẽnga gũudba koees n sãte, b naaga taab n kelemd sũ-noogo, tɩ b nin nee Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kẽed Zerizalɛɛm." 
Isaiah52:9 Naag-y taaba n kils y sũ-noogo Zerizalɛɛm dot sẽn da sarem, Soaala-Wẽnd maagda b kamba sũuri, Soaal le deega Zerizalɛɛm." 
Isaiah52:10 Soaala-Wẽnd wilgda b pãnga, n wilgd b sõmblem ãndũni rãmba, ba sẽn be-b mooga sɛtmẽ, na n yãenda fãagre ninga Wẽnd sẽn wa ne a soaba." 
Isaiah52:11 Yik-y, yik-y, yi-y n loog-y, yãmb fãa sẽn zɩt-b Soaala-Wẽnd waoogr teedã, yi-y Babilon tao-tao. Da sɩɩs-y bũmb sẽn ya rẽgd ye, woob-y y rẽgda fãa n base." 
Isaiah52:12 La y ka na n zoe yãgb zoees ye, y ka na yi wa b rigd-y lame ye; sẽn pakda y sorã yaa Soaala-Wẽnde, sẽn le be a poorẽ n gũusdẽ le yaa Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
Isaiah52:13 Ad Soaala sẽn le gomde: «M tʋʋm-tʋmda yell na n manegame, a yʋʋr na n yiime, a pẽgr na n paasame." 
Isaiah52:14 Neb wʋsgo da yãee-a lame n yɛɛse t'a nenga da sãama zãnga, t'a ra ka le tar ninsaal wẽneg ye." 
Isaiah52:15 Marsã wã b pɛleng na n yɩkame tɩ b nee dĩm dãmba sẽn sur a taoore n ka yaagd b noore, tɩ b nee b sẽn zɩ n yãende, la yaa wa b kelgda b sẽn zɩ n wʋme.»" 
Isaiah53:1 Ãnda n deeg sẽn lʋɩ tõnd tʋbrẽ, tõnd sʋka, ãnda n tagse tɩ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n lʋɩɩs b toogo?" 
Isaiah53:2 Bãmb nifẽ, b tʋʋm-tʋmda bɩɩme, a bɩɩ wala will sẽn tão tɩɩg sɛɛga, wala tɩɩg sẽn kɩ a yẽgna zĩ-koɛɛngẽ. A ka tar yagd sõngo la rasãndlem ye." 
Isaiah53:3 Yẽ la dũni rãmba sãbs yã, yẽ la b bas kɛɛnga, yẽnda n yãe toogo la fare. F pa yãet-a n pa lud f neng ye, yaoolgo la paoor bala n yɩ a rɩɩbo." 
Isaiah53:4 Yaool n yaa tõnd namsgo la a reeg n namse, a wʋma toogo sẽn da tog n yɩ tõnd dẽnna. Tɩ tõnd bas n tẽed tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n sɩbg-a, tɩ Wẽnd, n wẽ-a, tɩ Wẽnd n ning-a yãnde." 
Isaiah53:5 Mik yaa tõnd yel-wẽna yĩnga la b da paoogd-a mik yaa tõnd yel-wẽna zɩslem n to-a teoogẽ. A yãee toogo tɩ tõnd yãend laafi, a noadã n maag tõnd dẽnna." 
Isaiah53:6 Tõnd da kẽeda moogo wala piisi. Ned kam fãa da tũuda a meng sore, dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd dogl a zug tõnd fãa yel-wẽna." 
Isaiah53:7 B talla a lengre, t'a bas a menga, a pa yaag a noor ye. Wala pe-bila b tall-a lame n na tɩ kʋ, wala pe-yãanga b tall-a lame n na n tɩ wõrs a kõbdo t'a pa yaagd a noor ye. Tʋʋm-tʋmda me pa yaag a noor ye." 
Isaiah53:8 B paalg-a-la pãn-tõog bʋʋdo, la a zamaana ned pa gom n yiis-a wĩirẽ ye. N-ye! B yiis-a-la nin-vɩɩs sʋka, yɩɩ buuda yel-wẽna yĩng la b kʋ-a." 
Isaiah53:9 B bao-la a gãag zĩig nin-wẽns yaadẽ, b bao-la a yaoog arzɛk rãmb sʋka. A yaool n zɩ n maan kegre, a noor zɩ n togs zirẽ-beed ye." 
Isaiah53:10 Yaa Soaala n da yalse tɩ b sõgna yãend toogo la b waa n sãoog-a lame, t'a sɩd kɩsa a vɩɩma a taab yĩnga. A yõor na n yɩɩ woko la a na n le roga kamba. Soaala-Wẽnd na n tũ yẽ maasem n pids b raabo." 
Isaiah53:11 «A namsga sẽn yɩ wʋsga poore, Soaala n gomde, m tʋʋm-tʋmda na n vɩɩndame la a vɩɩm na n yɩ-a-la noogo. Ninsaalba taoore m na n yals-a-la wa nin-sõngo t'a sak n tʋka b yel-wẽna a zugẽ." 
Isaiah53:12 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m na n zẽk a zugu nin-bɛda sʋka la a na n naaga pãn-dãmbã n deeg a raood pʋɩɩre. Bãng-y t'a rɩka a menga n bas ne kũum tõogo, t'a basame tɩ b sõd-a yel-maandb sʋka. La yaool n yaa zãma wã beegre la a tʋk yã, yaool n yaa yel-maandba yĩnga la a ra yõkd sɛɛga.»" 
Isaiah54:1 Kɩdem sũ-noogo, Zerizalɛɛm, pag sẽn da ka le rogdẽ, kelem f sũ-noogo tɩ sãde sẽn da ka le kũmd-a rogma! Soaala-Wẽnd yet-f lame: «Ad pʋg-beoogã kamb sõor yɩɩda rʋmda kamba.»" 
Isaiah54:2 Yalg f roogo, tẽes f pɛɛla, tẽes f wĩya, ka biili n paase." 
Isaiah54:3 Fo na n yɛdga goabga la rɩtgo, fo buudã na n sooga dũni wã ninsaalba, bãmb n na n pids tẽns niynsi sẽn lebg-b tẽn-vɩɩdã." 
Isaiah54:4 Da zoe rabeem tɩ yãnd kõn le yõk-f ye, da zoe yãnde tɩ b kõn le paoog-f ye, yĩm f bi-bɩɩlma yãnde, da le tẽeg f pʋg-kõtã me rẽnd ye." 
Isaiah54:5 Fo Naanda n lebg f sɩda, la bãmb la dũni fãa Wẽnde, bãmb la Fãagda, bãmb la Israyɛl Nin-Sõngo, bãmb la b sẽn boond tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnnaam." 
Isaiah54:6 Fo ra zĩi ne pʋg-beoog sũ-sãanga, la Soaala-Wẽnd bool-f lame. «Ned tõe n basa a pipi pag bi? Yaa Wẽnd n sokde." 
Isaiah54:7 M da bas-f-la dasem a wãn bala, la f weoog yõk-m lame, la m waame n na le tigs f kamba." 
Isaiah54:8 M sũur puuga al wʋsgo tɩ m da solg foom m nenga dasem a wãn bala, la m nonglma sẽn ka be sɛɛba yĩnga, m zoe f nimbãanega. Yaa Wẽnd n yeele. Yaa maam n na n sõng-fo." 
Isaiah54:9 M sẽn tar sũur ning rũnda wã yaa m sẽn da tar a soab a Nowe wakatẽ; wala m sẽn wẽen wakat kãnga tɩ sa-kãseng kõn le sãam tẽnga, woto me m wẽenda dũnna tɩ m sũ-puurã, m kãab beedã, kõn le lʋɩ f zugu n wã-f ye." 
Isaiah54:10 Tãmsa tõeeme n looge, tãn-bi wã tõeeme n vik b zĩigẽ la mam nonglma ne foom kõn viig ye, f zooda kasetã kõn sãam ye. Yaa nimbãan-zoeer soaba Wẽnd n yeele.»" 
Isaiah54:11 Ade, Zerizalɛɛm, fo zĩi ne nimbãanega, b tusda fo n lengd goabg la rɩtgo, fo ka tar ned sẽn na n yẽes f nintãm ye. Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn leokde: «M na n tʋɩɩsa f lalsa meebo ne kug neeba, n gilgi." 
Isaiah54:12 B tẽnsʋka na yɩɩ kug moama, dignoor fãa yaa kug-peelle, lal-gũbra meng yãgda a toore." 
Isaiah54:13 Soaala-Wẽnd n na n yɩɩ f kamba fãa karen-saamba, f kamba sũur na n tosa kaam." 
Isaiah54:14 M na n kẽes-f-la zemsg tẽngẽ, tɩ f tɩlg ne moadg buud fãa la yɩɩr buud fãa, la f tɩlg ne rabeem sẽn pʋs n ka na n le zĩnd bada." 
Isaiah54:15 Ned sã n baood zabr ne yã, ned sã n dat-y ne beedo, ade, kõn le yɩ maam ye, la sẽn na n baoo-a zabr ne yãmbã, m sẽn nong yãmb yĩnga, m na lub a soaba." 
Isaiah54:16 Maam n yiis sẽyã, tʋʋm-mita. Sẽn zugda bug-saala sã n wa tʋm n yiis zab teoogo, sẽn tõe n tʋm tʋʋm beedo, ad yaa maam n kõ yẽ soab sãoong yam, wala m sẽn kõ sẽn na n wãa yẽnda wã me yam." 
Isaiah54:17 Bãng marsã tɩ zab-teoogo sẽn na n dɩk n zab ne foom kõn tõog kudb ye. Ned ninga me sẽn na n boola foo bʋʋdo yẽ soab n na n paa bʋʋdo. Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋm-tʋmdba pʋɩɩr la woto, m sẽn tog n sõng-b ne bũmb ningã, bõn-kãng kõn paoog-b ye.»" 
Isaiah55:1 Ko-yũud sẽn tar b rãmb fãa, wa-y tɩ koom bee ka ba y ka tar ligdi bɩ y wa. Wa-y tɩ kood me la b kẽes raaga la ka yiisd ligdi n daadẽ ye. Bĩisim la rãam me yaa boto." 
Isaiah55:2 Bõe tɩ y na n sãam y ligdi n da bur sẽn ka yiisd kom, bõe tɩ y na n nams y mense n yaool n ka ne yõodo? Y sã n sak n kelg-ma, y na paam rɩ-sõng n dɩ, y na tɩgs y mens ne sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩda." 
Isaiah55:3 Kelg-y neere, wa-y mam nengẽ! Kelg-y tɩ y na vɩɩnde! Ad-y yaa Soaala n gomde: «Yaa zood sẽn kõn sɛ la m na n yõg ne yãmba. A Daviid sẽn paam kũun niynsa la m na n kõ yã." 
Isaiah55:4 Ade, m kɩtame t'a Daviid kõ bu-zẽmba kaseto kaset tɩ m pãnga labsa, m kɩtame t'a soog-ba, n dɩ naam b zugu." 
Isaiah55:5 Foo me, Israyɛl, fo na n kamsa sãamba neb sẽn ka mi-fu, tɩ fo me ka mi-b ye, la mam yĩnga b na n zoe n waame, tɩ maam, Soaala-Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõngo n kõt-f zu-noog kãnga.»" 
Isaiah55:6 Bao-y Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ y ket n tõe n yãend-ba, yõk-y Soaala-Wẽnd sɛɛga tɩ b nan ket n pẽ." 
Isaiah55:7 Bɩ nin-wẽng yi a so-wẽng pʋgẽ, tɩ yel-wẽn-maand bas a tags wẽnse. B sã n lɛɛg n wa Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ, Wẽnd na n zoe-la b nimbãanega, tɩ tõnd Soaala-Wẽnda sũur yalma, la b pa mongd b sugr ye." 
Isaiah55:8 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele: «Yãmb tagsgo ne mam dẽnna ka a ye ye, mam soya ne yãmb dẽnna ka a yembr ye." 
Isaiah55:9 Wala saaga ne tẽnga sẽn zãr ne taaba, woto me la tõnd soya zãr taaba, woto me la mam tagsgã zʋʋg yãmb dẽnna." 
Isaiah55:10 Tʋʋlgo bɩ waoodo, saaga pa rʋʋgde tɩ kooma le lɛɛg n kul yĩngri tɩ tẽnga ka madg ye. A madgda tẽnga tɩ b bʋde, tɩ sẽn bʋd yi n wom biisi, tɩ koaada paam a rɩɩbo." 
Isaiah55:11 Woto me Wẽnd gomna ka yit b noorẽ n ka wom biis ye, n ka pids b sẽn dag n dat bũmb ninga ye.»" 
Isaiah55:12 N-ye! Yãmb na n yii ne sũ-noogo n lɛɛg n wa y tẽngẽ, tɩ bũmb pa maan-y ye. Tãmse la kunkuba na n kilsa b sũ-noogo, tɩɩsa fãa na n pãba nug-pogse." 
Isaiah55:13 Gõosa zĩigẽ yaa taamse n na n yi, sɩlg-nao-yẽesa zĩig na n yɩɩ luiili sibi. Rẽ na n waa ne Soaala-Wẽnd pẽgr kãsenga a na n yɩɩ zood kaseto, zood sẽn ka tõe wã abada." 
Isaiah56:1 Soaala-Wẽnd n gom woto: «Reeg-y noore, maan-y sẽn zemse tɩ m fãagra pẽnegame la m sõmblema pukri me taame." 
Isaiah56:2 Zu-noog soaba la ned ninga sẽn maana wa m sẽn togsã, n ka viig ye: a kõn saag n tõdg vʋʋsg raara noor ye, a kõn saag n tʋm tʋʋm-kegr ye.»" 
Isaiah56:3 Bɩ sãamba kamba sẽn pʋgd-b maama da saag n yeele: «M mii vẽenega tɩ Soaala na n welga maam ne b buudu.» La zu-soab me ra saag n yeele: «Mam ya tɩ-koɛɛng bala.» 
Isaiah56:4 «Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd leokd zu-soaben-dãmba sẽn deegd-b vʋʋsga raar noore sẽn maand-b mam sẽn date," 
Isaiah56:5 sẽn dat-b zood ninga m sẽn yõg ne a Israyɛl, m na kõ bãmba, m dooga pʋga, m tẽn-sõngã pʋga, yʋʋr sẽn yɩɩd rogem dẽnna, n yɩɩd rogem sẽn wat ne yʋʋr ninga. Kugr zugu la m na n gʋls b yʋʋrã, la a kõn menem abada.»" 
Isaiah56:6 Sãamba kamba sẽn pʋgd-b Soaala n maand b raabo, sẽn pẽgd-b bãmb yʋʋre, sẽn dat-b n yɩ bãmb tʋʋmd-tʋmdba, ad Soaala sẽn yet bãmb poorẽ: «B sã n deegd vʋʋsga raar noor neere, b sã n sak m sẽn kaool ne m buud a Israyɛl," 
Isaiah56:7 b bãng tɩ m na n tall-b lame n dʋʋs-m tãn-sõngã zugu. M na noog b sũuri m pʋʋsga zĩigẽ. Kũuna la maandã b sẽn na dɩgl maan-kugra zugu mam na reeg-ba ne sũ-noogo. B na n boola m roogã tɩ ninsaalba buuda fãa pʋʋsg roogo.» 
Isaiah56:8 Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tigim a Israyɛl kamba sẽn da sẽegã, ad-y Naaba-Wẽnd n paasd woto: «M zoe n tigmame la m na n le tigmame n paase.»" 
Isaiah56:9 Yir rũmsa fãa, wa-y, wãb-y yamdo. Weoogẽ rũmsa fãa, wa-y n wãb-y y yam." 
Isaiah56:10 Tõnd rũn-kɩɩmbã ya zoeens gilli, b fãa gill ka mi baa fɩ. B fãa yaa ba-mugsi n ka tõe n wes ye. B gãeeme n zãmsdẽ, la b tar suusgu." 
Isaiah56:11 Yaa baas sẽn ya yão-be-rãmba, n ka tɩgd dɩɩb ye. B zɩ n yeele: «Sekame!» Yaa rũn-kɩɩmba sẽn ka wʋmd baa fɩ. Ned kam fãa tũuda a sore, n get a fãaba sẽn na n tekẽ." 
Isaiah56:12 Bãmb n gomd woto: «Wa-y-yã, d na n baoo rãam; d na n tɩga rã-toose n gãeem, la beoogo na n yɩɩ wa rũnna, rãama sẽn ket pa paood ye.»" 
Isaiah57:1 Nin-sõma loogdame la yaa wa rẽ ka lam ned ba a ye. Nin-sõma kiidame tɩ ned ba a ye ka mi tiir ye. N-ye! Nin-sõma loogdame, la yaa sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ b põs yel-beedã." 
Isaiah57:2 Laafi wã na n waame, nin-tɩrg na n gũsa ne laafi." 
Isaiah57:3 Kolg-y, wa-y, dat-b-wẽng kamba, da-taase la pʋg-yoaadb kamba!" 
Isaiah57:4 Ãnda la yãmb belgda, ãnda noor la y baooda, ãnda la y laada? Yãmb buuda yaa yel-maandb buudu, yaa zirẽ-be-rãmb buudu." 
Isaiah57:5 Yãmb saa n vigla y tẽn-kugã tɩ bɛd tẽngre la maasem sẽn beẽ. Yãmb kooda y kamba kʋɩls noorẽ la pĩis pẽgsẽ. 
Isaiah57:6 Yãmb sẽn baood wa fãa-fãa yaa kʋɩlsa kug saala, yaa bãmb sɛɛgẽ la f sũur nooma, Israyɛl, Bãmb yĩnga la f tũnugd rãam la kũun a taaba. M tõe n saka rẽ sɩda? Soaalã n sokde." 
Isaiah57:7 Fo rɩgla f gãag tãn-wok zugu, be la f rʋ yã n na n kʋ f maandã." 
Isaiah57:8 F rignoorẽ, f kʋɩlenga sɛɛga la f yasl f wẽnda togsende, f solgda f meng maam n yees f futã n maneg n dʋ f gãaga n bao ligd n yao f roellã la f yaal f yaalgo." 
Isaiah57:9 Fo zoe n pʋga a Melɛk ne kaam fo kõ-a-la yũ-nood kaam fo tʋma f neba al tẽn-zãorgẽ fo sika f meng n ta bʋg-tẽnga. 
Isaiah57:10 F wa n yɛɛ ne f so-wogdã la f ka saag n yeele: m kõn le kẽn ye. F le yẽega f pãnga wa bi-bɩɩga wa yaams ka tol n kẽ-f ye. 
Isaiah57:11 La m sok n gese, fo sẽn bas maama, f ra zoeta ãnna rabeem, f ra zoeta ãnda nifu. Fo ka tẽeg maam yell ye, fo ka kees vɩʋʋg bilfr menga mam yĩnga, f sũurẽ ye, la rẽ wã m sĩnda m noore, m muma m nini; yaa rẽ la f ka zoe m nifu." 
Isaiah57:12 F wẽnema na n vẽnegame la f kõn dɩ f tʋʋma yõod ye. 
Isaiah57:13 Toogã sã n wa tar-fo, kelem tɩ sãde tɩ daare wẽn-yoodã sẽn tigim f sɛɛgẽ wã na naag taaba n wa fãag-fo. Bãng tɩ sobgo n na loog ne b fãa. Sẽn teega maam, yẽnda n na soog m tẽnga, n soog m tãn-sõngã." 
Isaiah57:14 Daar n wate tɩ b na n yeele: «Maneg-y sore, tuk-y sorã yalengo, tɩ m neba tõog n looge naana-naana.»" 
Isaiah57:15 Yaa woto la Wẽnd ninga sẽn zʋʋga bũmb fãa wã, sẽn kẽed-a roog sẽn kõn wã abada, la sẽn tar yʋ-sõngã, gomda: «Maam, Sõmblem naaba sẽn zao yĩngrã, ad-y m bee ne nimbãan-dãmba, n be ne neng sẽn sur-a tẽngã, tɩ m datame n keng b sũuri, m datame n doog b nenga la m vʋʋg tooga sẽn zɩsg b rãmbã." 
Isaiah57:16 M ka na n yɛs n tar no-koeemde daar fãa, n tar zab la m puugd m sũur ye. Ka rẽ m neba sʋka, ned ba a ye kõn põs ye." 
Isaiah57:17 A Israyɛl n beege tɩ m sũur puug wakat yɛnga tɩ m nug zẽk n wẽ, tɩ m da ka rat n le yãend-a ne m nif ye. Yaa bãmb n kell n yɩ tõatba n bao sor ning b sẽn dat n dɩke." 
Isaiah57:18 M mi-la a Israyɛl tʋʋm wẽnsã la ne rẽ fãa, ad-m sẽn na n maane: M na sãoog-a lame, m na n wilg-a-la sore, m na maasa a kamba sũuri:" 
Isaiah57:19 M na n kɩtame tɩ b yɩɩl sũ-noog yɩɩla, Wẽnd n yeele. Sẽn pẽ-ba zĩnd ne laafi, sẽn zãr-ba zĩnd ne laafi, m na n waa ne laafi!»" 
Isaiah57:20 Bas-y tɩ m mak nin-wẽnsã ne mogre: Mogrã dãmbame n ka le tõe n sigs ye, t'a wʋkd a noorẽ, rẽgdo la begdo." 
Isaiah57:21 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele: «Nin-wẽnsa kõn paam laafi abada.» 
Isaiah58:1 Da zoe yaamse la f tãs ne pãnga. Yaa Wẽnd n gomde. Zẽk f koɛɛg wala baorgo, n wilg m neba b yel-wẽna, n wilg a Zakoob a kongre." 
Isaiah58:2 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa b baood n na n bãngame, yaa bõe la m dat tɩ b maane. B maanda wala buudu sẽn nong zemsgo, sẽn ka mongd Wẽnd bũmb ye. B ratame tɩ m bʋʋda tũ zemsgo sore, B sũ-noog wa fãa-fãa yaa b yẽrg n kolg Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Isaiah58:3 B yaool n sokdame: «Bõe yĩnga la d na n loe d noore? Soaala-Wẽnd sã n ka ne-do? Bõe yĩng la d na sɩbg d menga bãmb sã n ka mi tɩ d sɩbgda d menga?» Dẽ la m leokda: Yãmb sẽ n pa ne tɩ y loeta y noore la y ket n leebdẽ, n baood yõodo, la y ket n namsd y tʋʋm-tʋmdba." 
Isaiah58:4 Y loeta y noore tɩ mobeed ketẽ, tɩ pãb taab ket n pãbda! Y noora sã n loet woto ad-y y pʋʋsga ka tat-m ye." 
Isaiah58:5 M sẽn dat no-loeer ningã, sulg-m-meng ningã, tõe n yɩɩ woto bɩ? Yeelame tɩ f sulg f zugu wa moog sẽn kaooge, n tʋɩ yondo tompɛglmẽ n lʋɩ n gãande? Yaa rẽ la fo boond tɩ no-loeere, la f yet t'a tara bark Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ?" 
Isaiah58:6 Y ka mi tɩ no-loeer ninga m sẽn data la woto: Y sẽn yõg b rãmb n sẽbe tɩ yaool n ka segdã, lood-y bãmb dãmba wĩ. Sik-y zɩɩb ning y sẽn zɩlg b bãgdã. Yiis-y sẽn tar-b toogo b pɛta pʋga; zãag-y-ba ne yembd buud fãa." 
Isaiah58:7 No-loeer ning m sẽn datã yaa: Kaoog f buri n kõ kom sẽn tar a soaba, pak f roogo n deeg sãana, yeelg sẽn kẽnda a zaala, kũm f meng roagda." 
Isaiah58:8 Sã n ya woto f vẽenem na n puka wala wĩntoogo la f noadã na n wẽneg n maagame; f sõmblema na n kẽna f taoore, la Soaala-Wẽnd pẽgra na n pʋga f poore." 
Isaiah58:9 F sã n yiis f koɛɛga, Soaala-Wẽnd na n kelgame, f sã n boole b na n leokame: «Ad-ma!» Moadg sã n kaẽ, mobeed sã n kaẽ, kãab yood sã n kaẽ," 
Isaiah58:10 kom sẽn tar a soaba sã n paamd f dɩ-võre, far sẽn tar a soaba sã n paamd bũmbu n ningd a noorẽ, f vẽenema na n puka likẽ, f lik na n lebga vẽenem wa wĩnto-sʋka." 
Isaiah58:11 Soaala-Wẽnd n na n lʋɩ f taoore wakat buud fãa, la bãmb n na n kiis f ko-yũud wĩnto-sẽengẽ. B na n paasa f kõaba keelem. F na n lebga wa zẽed sẽn tɩg koom, f na n lebga wala ko-bundga sẽn bund n ka vʋʋsdẽ ye." 
Isaiah58:12 Fo maasem yĩnga, b na n leb n yika pĩnd raboodã. B sẽn na n le yik-b zĩig ningã, yaa meeba sẽn da tʋɩɩs zĩig ning pĩnda la b yaool n ka me fɩ n tãag rũnna wã. Zĩ-kʋd kãens zutu la b na n le yik ro-paala. B na bool foom tɩ yi-wãoong maanegda, rabood yikda." 
Isaiah58:13 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Fo sã n vẽ vʋʋsg daare ne bũmb raabo bɩ koosgo, f sã n yãend ra-sõnga raare bũmb sẽn be yõodo, n dat-a, la fo sẽn boond vʋʋsga raare tɩ f sũ-noogo yĩnga, n boond Soaala-Wẽnd daarã tɩ raar sẽn tog ne pẽgrã, fo kʋʋga f naoore, ad-f zug na n sɩd zẽkame, f sã n bas bõn-yõoda pʋgbo n bas tʋʋm buud toor-toore, la f bas goam sẽn pa gomd n sɛtẽ." 
Isaiah58:14 Wakat kãnga, Soaala-Wẽnd na pids-f ne sũ-noogo, b na tall-fo n dʋʋs tãnga zugu tẽnsʋka ne kilsgu; Soaala-Wẽnd na lebs foom f ba a Zakoob pʋɩɩre.» Woto yaa Wẽnd n togse." 
Isaiah59:1 Soaala-Wẽnd tara pãnga tɩ sek a fãag-do; b tʋbr pa yẽde tɩ d gomd tɩ b sĩnd ye. 
Isaiah59:2 Yaa tõnd wẽnema n ning gɩdgre tõnd ne Wẽnd tẽnsʋka, yaa yel-wẽna yĩnga la b wẽnemd b neng n pa rat n kelgd-d ye." 
Isaiah59:3 Yãmb nus rẽgma ne zɩɩm, yãmb nus-bi soba ne yel-wẽna, y sã n yaag y noore, ya zirẽ la y yagda, bɩ yaa rõadg la y rõata." 
Isaiah59:4 Bʋʋd zĩigẽ, y wata ne yɛl sẽn pa sɩda. Ned ba a ye pa gomd ne pʋ-peelem ye, y sẽn lʋɩɩsd taoora yaa yɛl-faado, y sẽn gomd n na n yiis y meng yellẽ wã yaa gom-vɩɩd zãnga; y raaba yaa sãoong raab bala, y sẽn na n tõog n wa ne bũmb ning yaa yel-beedo." 
Isaiah59:5 Y sẽn dat bũmb ninga yaa bũmb sẽn na n wa ne y bõne, wa ned sẽn wũnugd wag-gɛla. Lebga sɩɩs n bao f kũum, tɩ gella sẽn lake, la põeer sẽn yi." 
Isaiah59:6 Pɛɛl niyns y sẽn wʋgdã yaa sʋlg gaam-gaam la y gaamda; y ka wʋgd-ba n na n yeelg ye, ka waood la y rat n dig ye, yaa yel-beed la y rata; y sã n kẽes y nug tʋʋmnẽ, ya pãn-tõog bal la y rat n tʋme." 
Isaiah59:7 Y nao wã sẽn tõe yaa wudg tao-tao n tɩ maan yelle, yaa zoe tao-tao n tɩ raag zɩɩm, n daag sẽn ka tara a toorẽ yell zɩɩm. Y ka bilgd bũmb a to tɩ ka wẽng bilgri ye, y sẽn tũ sor ninga yaa sãoongo la wãabo." 
Isaiah59:8 Y zɩ n dɩk laafi sor ye, y zɩ n tuk sor n kõ zemsgo ye. Yãmb soya yaa so-golomse; sẽn dɩka yãmb soya kõn tãag laafi tẽng ye." 
Isaiah59:9 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala pa yãgd ne tõnd ye, n gũud beoogo n na pids b sẽn kãabe. Tõnd da gũuda vẽenem, la ket n yaa lik zĩig zãnga, d da gũuda sõore, la d ket n kẽnda ne yʋngo." 
Isaiah59:10 D babenda wala zoanga sẽn yegd lalga, wala zoanga, nao wã sordame n pa zẽkdẽ ye. D lagsda wĩnto-sʋka wala zĩ-lik menga, d kẽnda ne laafi, la d pa são sẽn ki-b ye." 
Isaiah59:11 D fãa zĩ n waasda wala we-rũnga, la d guusda wala malwalle. D da tẽedame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n lʋɩɩsa b toogo, la zaalem; fãagre la d da gũuda, la d ket n zãr ne-a." 
Isaiah59:12 Yãmb taoore tõnd beegra yaa wʋsgo, Soaala, la tõnd yel-wẽna n paalgd tõnd bʋʋdo. D yel-wẽna dɩga d taoore, d mi d kongrã sẽn yaa a soaba." 
Isaiah59:13 D ka sulg d meng y taoor ye, Soaala-Wẽnde, d zãgsa y pʋgbo, yãmb d Soaala. Sẽn be d noorẽ bala, ya maan to pãnga, ka rẽ bɩ d zoe n yi yãmb soolmẽ. Sẽn be tõnd sũurẽ, sẽn be tõnd yamẽ, ka bũmb a to n zʋʋg zirẽ-beed ye." 
Isaiah59:14 Rɩk so-tɩrgã, kẽn tɩrga ka le noom-d ye. Paam tɩ bʋʋda bʋ tɩrse lebga toogo. Raaga pʋga, togs sɩd le ka ye, zãmb geels geendame n kalemd fãa." 
Isaiah59:15 Ned ba a ye ka le togsd sɩd ye, sẽn ka rata wẽnga yẽ soab la b maan wẽnga, n deeg a sẽn tar fãa. Soaala-Wẽnd yãee rẽnna. B yãee ne sũ-sãanga tɩ bʋʋd ka le bʋʋd ye." 
Isaiah59:16 Bãmb yɛɛsa ned sẽn ka ningd a toogã, tɩ b yet tɩ b na ges rẽ b toore, tɩ b yet tɩ b na n della b zemsgo la b teeg b meng pãnga, n le wa ne fãagre." 
Isaiah59:17 B dɩka zemsgã n yeelg wa kut fuugu, fãagrã n lebg b kut pugla. B yeelga b zab-n-dok-sũur fu-yorgo, la wala fu-goabga, b rɩka b nonglma sẽn ka mi belgrã n pil b menga." 
Isaiah59:18 Ninsaalba na n deega sɩbgr ning b sẽn tog ne, Soaala na n basame tɩ b sũura pusgi n waag b bɛɛba gilli, ba sẽn be-b yɩɩgã." 
Isaiah59:19 La woto b yʋʋra na paam waoogre yaang la taoore, goabg la rɩtgo, b sẽn na n wa ne ziira raare, n wa wala kʋɩl-bɛɛg koom sob-raoog sẽn tusd ne pãnga." 
Isaiah59:20 Soaala-Wẽnd na n waame, Zerizalɛɛm la b na n wa fãage, n paas Israyɛl kamb niyns sẽn tuub b wẽnema. Dẽ yaa bãmb meng n togse." 
Isaiah59:21 Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «Sã n ya maam, zooda na n yõga woto: m Vʋʋsma sẽn be ne fooma, m goama m sẽn ning f noorẽ wã, bãmb bal la f na n togse, bãmb bal la f yagensa na n pore, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde, na n yɩɩ boto zamaan ne zamaana.»" 
Isaiah60:1 Zerizalɛɛm yiki, yik n yãge tɩ f vẽenem waame, yik tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ziira buid-f lame, a buiid-f-la wa sõore." 
Isaiah60:2 Tẽnga gill zĩi ne lika, bu-zẽmba zĩi ne yʋngo, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ziirã yaool n puk foom wa sõore. B vẽenema puka f zugẽ." 
Isaiah60:3 Vẽenem ninga fo sẽn deeg n tãoosdẽ wã vẽenem kãng n na n tak bu-zẽmba dĩm dãmba. 
Isaiah60:4 Zẽk f nenga, karg n ges f taoore, ges f kamba fãa sẽn wate, ges b sẽn wat n tigimd f sɛɛgẽ. F kom-dibli yita tẽn-zãorgẽ f kom-pugli wã, b tat-b lame n watẽ." 
Isaiah60:5 F na yãend-ba, f na n kɩdmame, f sũur na yɩ noog wʋsgo, f sũ-nooga na pusgame n lebg langre, tɩ mogra pʋgẽ arzɛka, ne bu-zẽmba rẽnna, fãa tigmame n wat f nengẽ." 
Isaiah60:6 Yʋgma ka tɛka n na n pid f tẽn-peelma. Yaa Madiã la Efa yʋgma, la b fãa yita Saba la b fãa wata ne sãnem la tɩdare, la b fãa watame la b pẽgd Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedar rũmsã fãa na n tigma f sɩmannẽ, Nebayot pe-raadã wata f yĩnga. B na n tall-b lame n wa Soaala maan-kugra zugu, la b maoonga na reege; la woto me la b na n zẽk b buuda yʋʋre." 
Isaiah60:8 Yaa yɛ rãmb la woto fãa, tɩ ya wa sawadg n maand zĩ-boogo, tɩ ya wa malwal n sigd b roogẽ?" 
Isaiah60:9 N-ye! Koom-kogend tigma taaba al yɩɩga koom-kogend bɛdã n lʋɩt b taoore. Yaa al tẽn-zãorgẽ la b wat ne f kamba, n wat ne f kamba wanzurf la b sãnem, n wat n na n waoog Soaala-Wẽnde, n wat n na n waoog Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, la b kos tɩ b kõ-f sũ-noogo, Zerizalɛɛm." 
Isaiah60:10 Sãamba n na n le yik f lalse, b dĩm dãmb na n lebga f sõgen-kamba. Dẽ yaa Soaala n togse. Yaa mam sũur n dag n puugi tɩ m wẽ-fo, Israyɛl, la noom-m lame marsã tɩ m wilg foom m nonglem." 
Isaiah60:11 F kʋɩlensã kõn le pag ye, wĩntoog bɩ yʋngo b kõn le sog ye, sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ b kẽes-f pʋgẽ bu-zẽmba arzɛgsã, tɩ b dĩm dãmba yaool n pʋgd a yeyn-ye." 
Isaiah60:12 Tẽng ninga la rĩung ninga sẽn ka na n kẽ-a foom, na n menemame, b fãa na n wãa zãnga." 
Isaiah60:13 Sẽn ya Libã googa faong la a zu-zẽkre tɩɩs sẽn wẽnd kʋgse, noense, ãoose, fãa na n wa paasa wẽnd dooga neerem. Woto b sẽn waoogd maam zĩig ningã m na pids zĩ-kãng ne m ziiri." 
Isaiah60:14 Sẽn da maan b foom pãnga, ad-b kamb sẽn kũudi n wat fo nengẽ, ad sẽn da sãbsd-b fooma sẽn yĩg f taoore. B na n bool-f lame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd tẽnga, t'a Israyɛl Nin-sõnga Siõ." 
Isaiah60:15 B ra basa foom, ned da ka le nong-f ye, ned da ka le lɩkd n get-f ye. Rẽ sɛɛme, tɩ marsã tɛka m na n kɩtame tɩ f zug zẽk wakat buud fãa, m na n kɩtame tɩ f lebg sũ-noog bũmb tɩ yʋʋm tong taab n tõt sɛɛbo." 
Isaiah60:16 Bu-zẽmba ne b nanamsã n na n dɩlg-foo. Dẽ marsã la f na n bãnge tɩ maam f Soaala la f Fãagda, tɩ m sẽn pid ne pãnga, maam n yaa a Zakoob Wẽndã, maam n na n ges f yelle." 
Isaiah60:17 Yaa sãnem la m na n tall n wa f nengẽ kõn le yɩ zũud ye, yaa wanzurfu n na n deeg kut zĩiga, zũudu n na n deeg raoog zĩiga, kutu n na n deeg kugri zĩiga. Sẽn na n deeg pãng zĩiga, la ad-y pãn-tõog zĩiga, na n lebga laafi la zemsgo. Bãmb n so taoore." 
Isaiah60:18 B kõn le wʋm tɩ ned maand a to pãng tẽnga pʋgẽ ye; b kõn le gom sãoongo la wãab yelle f tẽn-peelmẽ wã ye. F na n tõog n boola f lal-gũbrã tɩ Wẽnd fãagre, n bool f kʋɩlensã tɩ Wẽnd Pẽgre." 
Isaiah60:19 Ka wĩntoogã n na n le vẽneg f raar ye, ka kiuugã n na n le kõ-f vẽenem yʋng ye, na n yɩɩ maam, f Soaala-Wẽnde, maam n na n kõ-f vẽenem wakat buud fãa la f na n yãga vẽenem tɛka." 
Isaiah60:20 Fo vẽenema kõn tol n menem wa wĩndg sẽn pukd la a lʋɩtẽ ye; vẽenem kõn paoog f yʋngo wa ki-lik wakat ye. Maam, f Soaala-Wẽnde, n na n yɩ f vẽenem wakat buud fãa. M na wa ne kʋ-yãbra me tɛkem-tɛkem." 
Isaiah60:21 F tẽnga kẽedba na n yɩɩ nin-sõma bala, bãmb n na n soog tẽnga zamaan sẽn wate tɩ bãmb la m yag ne m nusi tɩ b puk m ziiri; b na n yɩɩ wa tɩɩse m sẽn sel m zẽedẽ." 
Isaiah60:22 Zak ninga sẽn ka weka wʋsgo na paam neb tusri la nug sẽn pa zãada soaba, a buuda na n lebga pãn-dãmb buudu. Yaa woto la maam, Soaala-Wẽnd meng yãgd n na n pidsi, wakata sã n ta." 
Isaiah61:1 Soaala-Wẽnd pids-m-la ne b Vʋʋsem, b taaga maam b kaam la b kõ-m-la tʋʋmd kãnga: tɩ m taas naong rãmba koe-noogo, tɩ m maas sũ-sãang sẽn tar b rãmb sũuri, tɩ m wilg pa-weto tɩ b pa-weer sɛɛme, n wilg sẽn be-b roogẽ, tɩ b bãeensa na n loodame;" 
Isaiah61:2 tɩ m moon Soaala yʋʋmde, yʋʋmd ning b sẽn na n wilg b buudã b nonglem, raar ning tõnd Soaala sẽn na n dok b sũur ne bɛɛbã, la b wa menes sũ-sãanga, sẽn zĩ-b n yãbd kʋʋr sũ-sãanga." 
Isaiah61:3 B rɩta Siõ kʋʋre, la mam waame n na n yẽes makr buud fãa sẽn da wilgdi tɩ b bee sũ-sãang pʋgẽ n lebs makr niynsi sẽn na n wilg marsã tɩ b bee sũ-noog pʋgẽ. Tɩ m ledga b zuta tompɛglem ne zu-vindg sẽn be neere, n tek b nintãm ne kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo; tɩ m teka b nimbãan-nenga ne fuug sẽn ya kibs fuugu. Wakat kãng marsã la b na n mams-ba, n mams-b ne tɩɩse, sẽn pẽgd Soaala-Wẽnd ne b woglem, n mak-b ne zẽed tɩ-neeba, sẽn pukd Soaala ziiri." 
Isaiah61:4 Kʋdem-wẽnnẽ lalsã na n le yikame, kʋdem-wẽnnẽ dotã na n le meeme, raboodã na n le maneg n yikame, tẽns niyns sẽn da wã n dʋr al daar zãra na n le maneg n mee paala." 
Isaiah61:5 Sãamb n na n wa kɩɩm y rũmsi, neb sẽn yi tẽng a to n na n wa ko y pʋto la b ges y bugsuntundu." 
Isaiah61:6 B na n boola yãmba tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd maan-kʋʋdba, b sã n gomd y yelle b na n goma woto: «Tõnd Soaala-Wẽnda sõgen-kamba.» Y na dɩɩ dũni rãmba arzɛgse, y fan-teedã na n yii bãmb laogẽ." 
Isaiah61:7 Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd woto: «Yãmb paama yãnd wʋsgo, yãmb paam-a lame n bãge; yãmb sẽn da reegd yaa paoore, neba ra tʋbsda y nenga. Yaa rẽnd me yĩnga, la b na n dol-y naoor a yiibu nin-bãmba rãmb tẽngẽ, la y na n bãnga sũ-noogo, sũ-noog sẽn ka be sɛɛbo." 
Isaiah61:8 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m baooda zemsgo. M kisame la m yetame tɩ pa segde tɩ b reeg bũmb ne pãng ye. Woto wã m na lebs-y b sẽn yõk n deege, la m na yõg ne yã, zood sẽn ka tõe n le sãame.»" 
Isaiah61:9 Y yagensã, b na bãng-b zĩig zãnga, b na bãng-b bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ fãa. Sẽn na n yãend-ba, na n bãng-b lame n welge tɩ yaa buudu Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn ning barka." 
Isaiah61:10 Soaala-Wẽnd pidsd-m-la sũ-noogo, M Wẽnda pidsd-m-la ne kɩdengo; sõngr ning b sẽn sõng-ma, wẽnda fuug b sẽn yeelg-ma. M sũ-noog yaa pʋg-sɩd sũ-noogo, pʋg-sɩd sẽn ning a kibs pugla, m sũ-noog yaa pʋg-paal sũ-noogo, pʋg-paal sẽn ning a fan-teedo." 
Isaiah61:11 Wala koodã sẽn bund n yit tẽnga, wala zẽedo sẽn sakd koobo, woto me Soaala-Wẽnd na n kɩtame tɩ b fãagre la b pẽgre pusgi n yi ãndũni rãmba sʋka." 
Isaiah62:1 Fo nonglem yĩnga, Zerizalɛɛm, f nonglem yĩnga Siõ, m kõn le sĩnd ye, m kõn zĩi n ka maand bũmb ye, n tãag wakat ning f fãagra sẽn wat n puk wa sõore, bɩ n wit wa bug-vɩlenga." 
Isaiah62:2 Bu-zẽmba na yãende tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd fãag-f lame, dĩm dãmba na yãend f ziiri. B na n boola f yʋ-paalã Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn pʋd-fã." 
Isaiah62:3 Soaala f Wẽnnaama nugẽ f na n wẽnega wa naam zu-vindga n wẽneg pugl sẽn yiis kibs yĩnga. 
Isaiah62:4 B kõn le bool foom tɩ pʋg-beoog ye, b kõn le bool foo abada, tɩ tẽng sẽn lebg raboog ye. B na n boola foom a rʋmde, n bool f tẽngã tɩ pag sẽn paam sɩd sõngo. Soaala na n pidsa f tẽnga ne sũ-noogo, f tẽnga na n wẽnega pag sẽn paam sɩd sõngo." 
Isaiah62:5 N-ye! Wala rasãng sẽn kẽed kãadem ne bi-pugla, woto me, sẽn le maneg n meta fooma, na n yɩ-la f sɩda. La wala pʋg-bil sẽn noogd a sɩd sũuri woto me foo n na yɩ f Wẽnda sũ-noogo." 
Isaiah62:6 Zerizalɛɛm, f lal-gũbra zugu, neb la m ning tɩ b gũ tẽngã, la wĩndg bɩ yʋngo b pa tog n sĩnd b noor ye. M yeel-b lame: «Yãmb tʋʋmd yaa y tẽeg Zerizalɛɛm yelle, n tẽeg y Soaala-Wẽnd tẽnga yelle; dẽnd yĩng bɩ y ra vʋʋs ye." 
Isaiah62:7 Da bas-y Wẽnd ne laafi ye, n tãag wakat ninga b sẽn na n le maneg n me Zerizalɛɛm n kɩt t'a lebg dũni wã tõr zu-zẽkre.»" 
Isaiah62:8 Soaala-Wẽnd wẽena woto: «Wala sẽn ya sɩda la sɩd bala tɩ tõog buud fãa be-la m nugẽ, m wẽenda ne foo, m buudu, tɩ m kõn le bas bɛɛba tɩ b rɩ f sẽn ko ye, la ned kõn le yi kɛɛnga, n wa yũ f yʋʋmda rãam f sẽn nams f meng n paam ye." 
Isaiah62:9 Yaa sẽn na n tigs-b koodã n na dɩ-a la b naag n pẽg Soaala-Wẽnde; yaa sẽn na n fãs-b bugsuntunga biisi n na yũ rãama, Wẽnd sɩmannẽ.»" 
Isaiah62:10 Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, yi-y, yi-y la y bas y tẽngã! Pak-y tɩ sẽn wat-ba tõog n kẽ; maneg-y n yẽd-y sora londo, yiis-y kuga zãnga, la rʋʋs-y tãb-kaoor tɩ bu-zẽmba yãende." 
Isaiah62:11 Ad Wẽnd na n kõo noore, dũni wã yaang la a taoor dãmba. Yeel-y Siõ rãmba: «Ad-y Fãagda sẽn wate, a wata ne a sẽn zab n deeg b rãmba, a wata ne a sẽn nams n paame.»" 
Isaiah62:12 B na boola yãmb ne bãmba tɩ buud sõngo, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn fãag b rãmba. La foo Zerizalɛɛm, b kõn le bool foo tɩ tẽng b sẽn zoe n bas ye, b na n bool-f lame: tẽng b sẽn nonge." 
Isaiah63:1 Yaa so-toagd a bõe n yit Edom, n yit Bosra, a na-tẽngẽ, t'a futa maneg n moog ne zɩɩm? A pila fu-taoko, n kẽnd ne naam, n kẽnd la a mi a sẽn wɩɩd ne pãng ninga. Soaala yeelame: «Yaa maam, la m watame n na n kao bʋʋdo, m watame n na n zab ne bu-zẽmbã la m fãag m buudu.»" 
Isaiah63:2 «La yaa bõe yĩnga la y fuuga tẽk miuugu, bõe n bol y futã? Yaa waa y kẽ-la y sĩngẽ n wẽk y bugsuntung biisi.»" 
Isaiah63:3 «N-ye! M tʋma m ye, m buuda ned ka sõng-m ye. M sũura sẽn da fudgã, m sũura sẽn da wit bugma, m tabame, n tab neba, m nao tabame n bedse m tabame tɩ sib moaama yɩg n bol-ma, tɩ sib moaama rẽgem m futã." 
Isaiah63:4 M da yeta m yamẽ: m paama m dok-m-sũur daare, tɩ m buuda fãagr wakata ra yaa n taame." 
Isaiah63:5 M gesame, la m pa yãe sõangd ye, la ned sẽn ka wa sõng-ma, ad-y rẽ sɩd yɩɩ lingri, la rẽ me n kɩt tɩ m yik m toore la m sũ-puura paasa m pãnga." 
Isaiah63:6 Yaa neba la m sũ-puurã kɩt tɩ m tab n bedse, b tɩga m sũ-puurã wa ned sẽn tɩg rãam, m daaga b zɩɩma tẽnga.»" 
Isaiah63:7 M dat n tẽega Wẽnd kũuni, n tẽeg sẽn kɩt tɩ b tog ne pẽgrã; m dat n tẽega b sẽn maan fãa d yĩnga, n tẽeg b nonglma fãa ne b buud a Israyɛl n tẽeg b nonglma la b nimbãan-zoeera sẽn tʋme." 
Isaiah63:8 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Israyɛl poorẽ: «Bãmb sɩd yaa mam buud neba, neb sẽn na n tʋm tɩ m pẽge.» La Soaala sɩd yɩ-la b Fãagda." 
Isaiah63:9 Ka ned la b tʋm yã t'a wa fãag-ba b zu-loeesa pʋgẽ ye, b meng b toore n zẽk b naoore, b meng b toore n wa ne nonglem la nimbãan-zoeere, n na n ges b yelle, n na n zã-ba, b nusẽ, yʋʋm wogd sẽn pʋg taaba." 
Isaiah63:10 La Israyɛl kamb yɩɩ tõatba, b waa n lebga b Vʋʋsma sɩ-lakre, tɩ bãmb me yik beem ne-ba, tɩ bãmb me tak zabre ne-ba." 
Isaiah63:11 Buuda wa n yik n tẽega pĩnd yelle, b wa n tẽega a Moyiiz yelle, la b sokame: «Sẽn fãaga buuda koomẽ, n fãag a rũmsã ne b rũn-kɩɩmba bɛɛ? B sẽn da pids a soab ne b Vʋʋsma bɛɛ?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ad-y yaa bãmb n yals a Moyiiz rɩtgo, bãmb n wilga a pãng la a naam. Bãmb n welg mogrã b buuda taoore, tɩ b yʋʋr na n yi zamaan ne zamaana." 
Isaiah63:13 Yaa bãmb n kɩt tɩ b buuda neba dʋʋg kooma wa weef sẽn ka ning gadre, tɩ kẽnd ya naam kẽnde, tɩ lakr pa tol n lak ye." 
Isaiah63:14 Yɩɩ wala rũms sẽn digd bãoogẽ, la ya b vʋʋsg zĩigẽ la Wẽnd Vʋʋsma ra tusd bãmb n dabda.» Dɩlla yɩɩ woto, Soaala, la y tall y nebã, yɩɩ woto me la y paam yʋ-sõngo." 
Isaiah63:15 Zĩnd-y yĩngr n gese, zĩnd-y y ro-sõnga la y ro-neera pʋg n gese, ges-y yell ning sẽn dat n dɩ tõndã. Y sẽn da nong tõnd ne nonglem ninga kẽe yɛ? Y sẽn da zabd n sõngd tõnd ne pãng ninga bɛɛ? Y bʋgsma, y sũ-maasma kẽe yɛ? Da vʋʋs-y ye, Soaala, wilg-y tõnd y nonglem." 
Isaiah63:16 Yãmb bal la ba. D yaaba Abraam ka mi tõnd ye, a Israyɛl ka tẽr tõnd yell ye, yaa yãmba, Soaala, la tõnd Ba, yãmb la d boond tɩ d Fãagda, al daar zãra." 
Isaiah63:17 Yaa bõe la yãmb bas tõndo tɩ d bas yãmb sor n kẽed moogo? Yaa bõe tɩ tõnd sũura kidbi tɩ d ka le rat n sak y noore? Le wa-y-yã, d nonglem yĩnga, tõnd la y sõgen-kamba la buud ning sẽn ya y pʋɩɩre." 
Isaiah63:18 Tõndo, y buud sõngã, d ka paam n soog d tẽngã n kaoos ye, d bɛɛba kẽe n taba y ro-sõngã." 
Isaiah63:19 Ad-y daar zãr marsã d lebga wa neb sẽn yi yãmb soolmẽ, n lebg wa neb sẽn ka le kĩ ne yãmb ye. Y ka na n pãrg saagã n sigi, la y sigd tɩ tãmsa mens rigd y taoore?" 
Isaiah64:1 Y yɩtẽ-la wa bugum sẽn dɩt tuudu, wa bugum sẽn na n kɩt tɩ koom kɛɛge; la woto y bɛɛba na bãngẽ y sẽn ya Wẽnd ninga. Bu-zẽmba me na digẽ dabeem y taoore," 
Isaiah64:2 tɩ yaa bõn-bãna la y na n maanẽ. Y sã n sigda, tãmsa mens na rigimd y taoore." 
Isaiah64:3 Ned zɩɩ n wʋm tɩ b gomda, ned nif zɩɩ n gese, bɩ n yãende, tɩ wẽnd a to sẽn ka yãmba tõog n maan, a neba yĩnga, a teegdba yĩnga, bõn-bãn a woto buud ye." 
Isaiah64:4 Yãmb yikd n sega sẽn maand-b yãmb raabo, sẽn maand-b yãmb raab ne sũ-noogo, la b sak n dɩkd sor ning y sẽn tuk b yĩnga. Yãmb sũur waa n puuga ne tõndo, la rẽ yɩɩ tõnd n konge. Marsã d sã le rɩk d pĩnd so-sõngã, d na paam fãagre." 
Isaiah64:5 D fãa da lebga wa nin-dẽgdo n ka le tõe n maan bũmb y yĩng ye. D tʋʋma fãa ra yaanda y sũuri wala fuug sẽn kõd ne zɩɩm. D wẽnema tall-d lame n looge wa sobgo sẽn loogd ne tɩɩg vã-koeemse. 
Isaiah64:6 Ned ba a ye ka le ket sẽn yõkd y sɛɛg ye, sẽn dat-a n le maneg a yelle la a le rɩk a meng n kõ yãmb ye. D neeme tɩ y ka le get d neng ye, la y bas-d-la d yel-wẽna maasmẽ." 
Isaiah64:7 Ne rẽ fãa, Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb bala la tõnd ba. Tõnd yaa yagdo, tɩ yãmb ya d yagda, tõnd yaa yãmb nug tʋʋmde." 
Isaiah64:8 Da puug-y y sũur tɩ loog ye, Soaala-Wẽnde, da zĩi n tar d yel-wẽna tẽesg ye, n tar d kongra tẽegr ye. Lʋɩɩs-y taoor bala d sẽn ya y buudã." 
Isaiah64:9 Y tẽn-sõma wã lebga raboodo, Zerizalɛɛm lebga zĩ-peen-daaga Siõ lebga vɩʋʋgo," 
Isaiah64:10 Doog ning sẽn da ya y rẽnna, d ba rãmba sẽn da waoogd-y zĩig ningã, d wẽnd do-neerã, b ning-a-la bugum. Zĩ-kãng la d ra nonga la a lebga raboogo." 
Isaiah64:11 Yãmb tõe n nee raboogã n sĩnda, Soaala-Wẽnde, n sĩnd tɩ tõnd yãnd paasdẽ n dabda? A pus n zoe n looga toaag menga." 
Isaiah65:1 M da rat n leokame la b pa sok-m tɩ bũmb ye. M da ratame n sõnge la ned pa kos-m sõngr ye. Dẽ la m yeel yã: «Ad-ma, m watame,» mik yɩɩ waa m goma ne buud a to, ne buud sẽn da ka gomd ne maam ye." 
Isaiah65:2 M da tuta m nugu buud sẽn nak a kãare, sẽn tũud sor sẽn ka so-sõngo, sẽn maanda a sẽn date." 
Isaiah65:3 Yaa buud sẽn da baood m noore, dẽ yɩɩ vẽenega, la rẽ yɩɩ wakat fãa. Buud kãng n da kʋʋd maand tɩɩs sẽn gũmẽ, la a yõod tɩdare wẽn-naandsa yĩnga." 
Isaiah65:4 Buud kãng ra kẽed n zĩi yaadẽ, n gãe bogdẽ, n wãbd kurkuri, tɩ b laas reegd nemdo, la nemd dɩɩb sẽn da kisi." 
Isaiah65:5 Buuda kamb ra yeta sẽn segd-b bãmbã: «Pa-y yɩɩga, da sɩɩs-y-d ye ka rẽ d sõmblema na wa ne y kũum.» Ad-y m sã n ne Wẽnd tũudem a woto buudu, m sũur puugdame n yõogd-ma." 
Isaiah65:6 Ade, m gesa b manesma n tɩge la m ka na n le sĩnd ye, dẽnd m dok m sũuri, n kõ ned kam fãa a sẽn tog ne, pʋs n na n zʋʋga a sẽn dat menga." 
Isaiah65:7 Maam a Naaba-Wẽnde, n gomd woto: m naagame n sõta b mensã la b ba rãmba yel-wẽna. Bãmb me ra yõoda wisdu b wẽn-naandsa yĩnga, tãms sẽn lug zutu, b kunkuba zutu, la yaa woto la b ra baood m noore. Dẽ me yĩng la m na n sɩbg-ba, la m na n sɩbg-b lame n bãge." 
Isaiah65:8 F sã n yãend bugsuntung willi sẽn tar biis sẽn bɩ n sakd dɩɩbo, f yetame: «D da kaoog-a ye, tɩ yaa rãam sẽn na n tall pãnga la a na n wa kõ-d tɩ d yũ.» Yaa woto la m na n maan ne m nebã, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, m nug ka na n sɩɩs-b ye." 
Isaiah65:9 M na n kõo yagense a Zakoob, n kõ yagens a Zɩɩda; bãmb n na n soog m sẽn kõt-b tãms niynsã, bãmb n na n soog-b zãnga, bãmb zut la m neba na n wa ti b zagse." 
Isaiah65:10 Sẽn na n lɛɛg-ba n kẽ maama Sariõ bãg-faagã n na n lebg b rũmsa wãbneg zĩiga, Akor bãooga la b na n wẽ yãgre b rũmsa yĩnga." 
Isaiah65:11 La yãmb sẽn basd maama, yãmb la m na n leok marsã, n leok-y tɩ y ka le rɩkd ba bilfu sor ning sẽn dʋʋsd yãmb m tãn-sõnga zuga ye. Y sẽn mi marsã yaa y sam rɩ-noodo a Gad, y zu-noog wẽndã, wa y sẽn gomdã. Y sẽn mi marsã, yaa y pul rã-toose n kõ a Meni, la y yetame tɩ y pʋlemd nooga be-la a Meni nugẽ." 
Isaiah65:12 Yaa kũ-toog la m pʋlemd y fãa gili. Y fãa na n pãs n lʋɩɩme tɩ b kood yã. M boolame la yãmb pa sak ye, m gomame la yãmb pa wʋm ye, m sẽn get tɩ ya wẽnga la yãmb maan yã, sẽn ka noom maama n noom yãmb sũuri." 
Isaiah65:13 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, m kamba na rɩtẽ tɩ kom kʋʋd yãmba, m kamb na yũud tɩ ko-yũud kʋʋd yãmba. M kamba na kɩdem sũ-noogo, tɩ yãmb zĩ ne yãnde." 
Isaiah65:14 B sũ-nooga sẽn na n pid zãng yĩnga, b na n zodga yɩɩn noodo la yãmb kɛlenga na n yɩɩ toog waasgo; yãmb na n waasame, y na n basa raoodo." 
Isaiah65:15 Y na n basa y yʋʋre t'a yɩ kãab-beed yʋʋre m kamba nengẽ, tɩ b na n gomd woto: «Bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd bas-f tɩ f looge wala a Zagla bɩ a Zagla!» Yʋʋr ning m kamba sẽn na n sakã na n yɩɩ toore." 
Isaiah65:16 B tẽngẽ wã, ned ninga sẽn dat-a n kãab a to kãab noogo, yaa bãmb b ye bal sẽn ya Wẽnda yʋʋre la b na n pʋde. Sẽn dat-ba n wẽene, yaa Wẽnde, sɩd Naaba, yʋʋr bal la b na n wẽene. N-ye! Yel-beed niyns sẽn loogã Soaala-Wẽnd na n yĩm-b lame, b na luda Wẽnd nifẽ. Yaa Soaalã n gomde." 
Isaiah65:17 M na n naana yĩngri la tẽnga, b na n yɩɩ paala. B kõn le tẽeg yĩngr la tẽnga sẽn looga yell ye," 
Isaiah65:18 Bɩ y kɩdem sũ-noogo, bɩ y ra vʋʋs ne kilsgu ye; ad-y bũmb la m na n maane, m na n naana Zerizalɛɛm sẽn mi kɩdengo, t'a kamba me pid ne sũ-noogo." 
Isaiah65:19 M sũur yaa noogo ne Zerizalɛɛm, m sũur yaa noogo m sã n tẽegd m buuda yelle. B kõn le n wʋm yãbr dãamd ye, b kõn le wʋm waasg ye." 
Isaiah65:20 Bi-pɛɛlg sẽn na n doge n wẽneg n pa ne dasem a wãna kõn le zĩnd ye; bi-bɩɩg me kõn loog t'a pa reng n kʋʋl ye. F sã n ki f yʋʋm kobaga, f kii pẽbgo. F sã n ki n pa ta yʋʋm koabga, b na n ges-f-la wa b kãab-f-la wẽnga." 
Isaiah65:21 B sã n me roto, b na kẽ b pʋsẽ, b sã n sel bugsuntundu, b na rɩ b yõodo," 
Isaiah65:22 B kõn le me tɩ ned a to wa reeg n kẽ ye, b kõn le sel tɩɩse tɩ ned a to wa rɩ b biis ye; m neba na kaoosame wala b tɩɩsã sẽn kaoosde, m kamba na n dɩ-la b tʋʋma yõodo." 
Isaiah65:23 Nams zaalem kõn le zĩnd ye, b kõn le rog kamba sẽn na n wẽneg n kɩ b nifẽ ye. Bãmb n na n lebg buud ning sẽn paamd m barkã." 
Isaiah65:24 M na sake, tɩ b nan ka bool-m meng ye, b ka na n gom n baase, tɩ m zoe n wʋma b sẽn date." 
Isaiah65:25 Digd-n-yĩidg ne pe-bila na n naaga taab bãoog a ye, bõnyẽeg na n wãba yamdo wa naafo, waaf rɩɩb na n kong n yɩɩ tẽnga tom bala. Tãn-sõnga zugu, sãoong buud kõn le sãam ye, wẽng buud me kõn le tʋm ye, Wẽnd n yeele." 
Isaiah66:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn gomde: «Yĩngra ya m zaoore, tẽnga ya m nao teegr zĩiga; doog ninga y sẽn na n me m yĩngã, do-kãng buud na n yɩɩ wãn wãna? Yaa zĩ-bʋgo la m vʋʋsga rooga na n ti?" 
Isaiah66:2 Y sẽn ne wã fãa yaa mam nug tʋʋmde, fãa gill yaa maam n so, yaa maam n gomde. Mam sẽn pẽgd a soaba, yaa naong soaba, yaa nimbãan-neda, sẽn kelgd m goama n yɛɛsdẽ la a rigd dabeem." 
Isaiah66:3 La yaa bõe la m ne yã? Kẽer maoong rũng sã n ya naafo, kẽer dẽnd yaa ninsaala, tɩ kẽer ya pesgo. Kẽer me yaa baag la b wẽeda; kẽer wata ne zom wamde, tɩ kẽer wat ne kurkur zɩɩm; kẽer yaa wisd la b yõogda. Kẽer yaa wẽn-naands la b waoogda. La bãmb sẽn yãk b so-yoog n tũudẽ wã, b sẽn bas maam n pʋgd yel-yoodã b yetame tɩ rẽ n tat bãmb yam." 
Isaiah66:4 Ad-y mam me sedame tɩ m na sɩbg b tʋʋm yoodã, tɩ m na tak b zugu b sẽn zoet bũmb ninga wa fãa-fãa wã. Sɩda, mam boolame la ned pa sak ye, mam gomame la ned pa wʋm ye, mam sẽn get bũmb ning wa bõn-wẽngã ad-y yaa bõn-kãng la b maan yã, sẽn ka noom maama la b yãk yã.»" 
Isaiah66:5 Kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd gomde, yãmb fãa sẽn yɛs ne rigbu m koɛɛga sã n lʋɩ y tʋbẽ. Kelg-y tɩ y sẽn nong maama yĩnga, y tara saam-biis sẽn kis yãmba, sẽn lebsd yãmb poorẽ. Bãmb n gomd n laadẽ la b yetẽ: «Soaala-Wẽnd ziira pukr daare, sãnd d ka na yãend y sũ-noog langre!» Ad-y yaa bãmb dãmb n na n paam yãnde." 
Isaiah66:6 Kelg-y koɛɛg ning sẽn sãta, bʋʋr ning sẽn yit tẽnga pʋgã, sẽn yit wẽnd doogẽ wã. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n dond b bɛɛba b sẽn tog ne rolb ningã." 
Isaiah66:7 Yɛ la pag rog biiga n ka reng n kũm dogem, n dog bi-ribla n ka tol n dig rogem waoodo?" 
Isaiah66:8 Ãnda n zoe n wʋm yell a woto buudu, ãnda n zoe n yãend yell a woto buudu: tẽng sẽn tiig vugr n lebg tẽn-kãsenga? Buud yikda vugri n lebg bu-yaleng bɩ? Yaool n na n yɩɩ woto ne Siõ: a na n doga a kamba t'a pa yãe n kũm dogem ye." 
Isaiah66:9 «M sã n sak tɩ pag pʋg bɩ, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, m na gɩdg biiga rogem sɩda? Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, kõn bɩɩs pʋga la m le kẽ sʋk n sãamd dogem ye.»" 
Isaiah66:10 Dɩlla, yãmb fãa sẽn nong Zerizalɛɛm bɩ y naag-a n kɩdem sũ-noogo, bɩ y naag-a n lange. Yãmb fãa sẽn da yãend a bʋko n zoe n kelem a kʋʋrã, naag-y-yẽe marsã n bas y sũ-nooga t'a fudg n daale." 
Isaiah66:11 Woto a na bels yãmb n gãneg y sũuri, y na lebg wa kom-peelse b ma rãmb sẽn bugd b yãoogẽ tɩ bĩisim noog ka le tõe n paoog-b ye." 
Isaiah66:12 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «M na n teesa Zerizalɛɛm m kũun sõma wã, n tees-a bu-zẽmba arzɛgsã, tɩ b fõd wa kʋɩl-bɛɛga, n madg-a zãnga. M na n gesa y yelle wa ma sẽn get a bi-pɛɛlg yelle, n bugd-a, n gãnegd-a a naoẽ, n laad ne-a." 
Isaiah66:13 Wala ma sẽn belgd a biiga, mam me na belg yã, Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ, m na belg yã." 
Isaiah66:14 Y na n yãee rẽnna la y sũur na n yɩɩ noogo la y vɩɩma na n le yãnga y pʋgẽ, tɩ y wuk wa sẽoog moogo.» Soaala-Wẽnd na n wilga b pãnga b kambã la b sũura na n fudgame n yõog b bɛɛba." 
Isaiah66:15 Soaala-Wẽnd zomba bugum sawadgo, b sẽn zomba wẽnda sɩlmande. Ad-y b pida ne sũ-puuri, b wata wa bugum sẽn zomb tʋgre n na n wilg b sũ-puuri la b pids b kãab beedo." 
Isaiah66:16 Wẽnd na n bʋʋ ninsaalba fãa, ne bugum la sʋʋga. Sẽn na n pa-b Wẽnd nugẽ wã na n yɩɩ wʋsgo." 
Isaiah66:17 M gomda neb niyns sẽn yɩlgd b mense n na n kẽ tɩɩs sẽn gũmẽ la b gũbg b wẽn-naanda sẽn yɛs tẽnsʋkã, n naag ne sẽn zĩ n wãbd-b kukuri nemdo, bɩ laoose, bũmb fãa sẽn ya wɩɩbdo. Ad-y nin-bãmba fãa na n menema vugri!" 
Isaiah66:18 Soaala-Wẽnd mi b sẽn maanda fãa, Wẽnd mi b sẽn tagsd b yamẽ. M watame, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, n na tigim ninsaalba buud toɛ-toɛyã la zɛlma buud toɛ-toɛyã. M yeelame tɩ b wa tɩ m puk bãmb m ziirã." 
Isaiah66:19 M na ning makre b tẽngẽ tɩ b bãng tɩ maam n so-ba. M sẽn na n kao b rãmb bʋʋdo n bas-b ne yõore, m na n tees-b-la Tarsis, Ypl la Lud tẽnse. Tẽn kãens neba tãp ka yãagd n tão n yõsg ye. M na n tees-b-la Tubal la Yavã tẽnse. M na n tees-b-la al tẽn-zãorgẽ, al zĩis niyns b sẽn zɩ n wʋm tɩ b gomd m yelle, zĩis niyns b sẽn zɩ n yãend m ziirã. M sẽn na n tʋm neb niynsã n na n puk-a." 
Isaiah66:20 Tẽn kãens na n le talla y saam-biisa fãa sẽn da be ne bãmbã n wa. B na n zombg-b-la wiidi, bilim-bilm, bõones la bɛda, n zombg-b bõn-wees bɩ yʋgma, n dʋʋs m tãn-sõnga zugu, Zerizalɛɛm. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde. Dẽ n na n yɩ kũun b sẽn na n wa kõ maam; la m na reeg b kũuna wala m sẽn maand ne a Israyɛl kamba sẽn wat ne b kũuni, la-sõma pʋsẽ, m do-sõngẽ." 
Isaiah66:21 M na tũus kẽer meng bu-zẽmba sʋka n maan m maan-kʋʋdba, n maan maan-kʋʋdba sõangdba. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Isaiah66:22 Ad-b sẽn le paase: m na n le naana bõn-paala, sa-paalga la tẽn-paalga. La al n gũud sa-paalgã la tẽn-paalga yikri, yãmb yagensã na kell n pa m taoore ne yʋʋr sẽn tar pẽgre." 
Isaiah66:23 Kiuug na n pʋga kiuugu, tɩ vʋʋsg raar pʋg vʋʋsg raare, tɩ ninsaal buud fãa wat n yĩgend m taoore. Dẽ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele." 
Isaiah66:24 La wakat kãng marsã la b na n yi n ges neb niyns sẽn zãgs-b maama n ki n dɩgã. Zũnzũra sẽn dɩt-ba pa kiidi, bugma sẽn dɩt-ba me ka na n wẽneg n ki ye. B gesgo na n yaala ninsaal buud fãa sũuri." 
Jeremiah1:1 Sebr kãnga wilgda a Zeremi sẽn togs la a sẽn maane. A Zeremi yaa a Ilkiya biiga, maan-kʋʋdba buud neda, sẽn da be Anatot, a Bẽnzame soolmẽ." 
Jeremiah1:2 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn gom ne a Zeremi wakatã la woto: Yɩɩ Zɩɩda dĩma a Amon biiga a Zoziyas wakato. A naama yʋʋma sẽn waa n ta piig la a tãabo. 
Jeremiah1:3 B goma ne-a yɛsa, Zɩɩda dĩma a Zoziyas biig a Zoakim wakato. N paas Zɩɩda dĩma a Zoziyas biig a Sedesiyas wakato. A Sedesiyas rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a ye la kiis a nu. Kiuug a nu soaba pʋgẽ la b wʋk Zerizalɛɛm dãmb n kẽng yembdo." 
Jeremiah1:4 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeele: 
Jeremiah1:5 «Mam da zoe n mii fo tiiri tɩ m nan pa yag foo f ma pʋgẽ ye. Mam da zoe n welga foo toore m tʋʋmd yĩnga tɩ f ma nan ka rog foom ye. M da yãk-f lame tɩ f yɩ m no-rɛɛsa bu-zẽmba tẽngẽ.» 
Jeremiah1:6 Tɩ mam leoke: «Katõ! Soaala-Wẽnde! Ad-y m paood ne m gom kʋʋng sʋka.» 
Jeremiah1:7 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd leok-ma: «Da sak n yet tɩ fo yaa yãaga n paoodẽ ye. Ad foo n tog n kẽng mam sẽn na n tʋm foom neb niyns nengẽ, n wilg-ba m sẽn yet tɩ f wilg-b bũmb ning fãa." 
Jeremiah1:8 Da zoe neba rabeem ye, tɩ mam bee ne foom, n na n yiis foom yell fãa pʋgẽ.» B sẽn togs maama la woto." 
Jeremiah1:9 Soaala-Wẽnd yaool n tẽega b nugu, n sɩɩs mam noore n yeel maam: «Ade, yaa foom n na n togs m koeesã." 
Jeremiah1:10 Rũnna m kõt-f-la tʋʋmde m tʋmd-f-la bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ: tɩ f võ la f tus n lubi, tɩ f sirg zãng la f pãb n wã, tɩ f me la f sele.»" 
Jeremiah1:11 Soaala-Wẽnd le goma ne maam n yeele: «Bõe la f ne Zeremi?» Tɩ m leoke: «M nee tɩɩg willi, tɩɩg ning sẽn yãgd ne puud wekra willẽ.»" 
Jeremiah1:12 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yeel maam: «F yãee neere, m sɩd yãgdame n na n pids m sẽn yeela fãa.»" 
Jeremiah1:13 Soaala-Wẽnd le goma ne maam n sok-ma: «Bõe la f ne marsã?» Tɩ mam leoke: «M nee rʋg-bedr sẽn kɛɛde, la yaa nug goabg sobdã n fʋʋsd a bugma.»" 
Jeremiah1:14 Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd yaool n na n wilg-ma: «Yaa Goabg la yel-beeda kɛɛda n watẽ la yaa tẽn-kãnga rãmb yĩnga. 
Jeremiah1:15 Maam n yeele, mam na n boola goabg rãmba, b sagsa ne b rĩundã. B na n waame, n vigl b rĩm dãmba naam goeel Zerizalɛɛm dignoy wã. B na n gũbga a lalsã. B na n taka zabre ne Zɩɩda tẽnsa fãa." 
Jeremiah1:16 Woto m na pids m sẽn kãab tẽnga rãmb bũmb ning fãa. La rẽ yaa b sẽn beeg-ma yĩnga; yaa b sẽn bas maam n tɩ kʋ maand wẽn-naands yĩnga. Yaa wẽnd dãmb b sẽn naane n na n waooge. 
Jeremiah1:17 Aya, Zeremi! Bɩ f sẽbg f sɛɛga, yiki! Moon bũmb ning fãa m sẽn na n yeel tɩ f togs-ba. Da bas tɩ b yɛɛs-f ye, sã n ka rẽ maam n na n kɩt tɩ f rig rabeem bãmb taoore." 
Jeremiah1:18 Dũnna menga m kõt-f-la pãnga wa tãnsoben-tẽng sẽn tar a soabã; m na n yals-f-la wa kut lalga, wa zũud ra-luka, tẽnga rãmb taoore, a Zɩɩda rĩm dãmba taoore, a kug-zĩidba, a maan-kʋʋdba, a nin-zaalsa fãa taoore." 
Jeremiah1:19 B na n zaba ne foom la b ka na n tõog-f ye. Mam bee ne foom n na n fãag-fo. Maam n yeele, maam a Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Jeremiah2:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel woto," 
Jeremiah2:2 tɩ tãs woto Zerizalɛɛm neba tʋbẽ, ad Soaala sẽn yeele: «M tẽegda f nonglma ne maam, f sẽn waa n ya pʋg-sɛda, la f sẽn waa n ya m pʋg-paala, f ra tũuda maam zĩ-pɛɛlẽ, zĩig ninga bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yi." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israyɛl, fo ra yaa maam m ye soolem, wala kood-rẽeng biisi. Ned sã n da sɩɩs-fo, d da reegda toogo, yel-beed da wẽnegd n lʋɩta a soab zugu.» Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Jeremiah2:4 Zakoob zak rãmba, Israyɛl buud rãmba, kelg-y koɛɛg ninga" 
Jeremiah2:5 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõt yãmba: «Kegr bʋg la y yaab rãmba yãend m nengẽ? Bõe tɩ b lak ne maam? B laka ne maam n na n pʋg wẽn-faado, tɩ bãmb me na n tũ rẽ n lebg nin-faado." 
Jeremiah2:6 B ka sok lɛ-lɛ: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd bee yɛ? Bãmb n yiis tõnd Ezipt tẽngã, n yɩ d sɩleto zĩ-pɛɛlẽ, tẽn-koɛɛngẽ, lond la lik tẽnga, tẽng ned sẽn ka pɩʋʋgde, tẽng ned ba a ye sẽn ka tiid n kẽedẽ.›" 
Jeremiah2:7 Maam n yaool n tall yãmba n tɩ kẽes-y tẽn-noogẽ, tẽng sẽn bĩm ne tɩɩse tɩ y na n dɩ bi-noodo, la y rok y nin yõodo. Be la m tẽnga, la y tɩ kẽeme n dẽgem-a; da yaa m soolem, la y kɩtame t'a lebg wɩɩbdo." 
Jeremiah2:8 Maan-kʋʋdba ka saag n sok-ma: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd bee yɛ?› Noora karen-saam-dãmb me boto, tẽnga taoor dãmba zẽka b zug ne maam, bãngdba sẽn da taasd-b koees niynsa ra yaa wẽn-faoog a Baal koeese. B fãa tɩ noka wẽn-faadã." 
Jeremiah2:9 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m boond-y bʋʋdo, n na n wa bool bʋʋd yɛsa y kamba la b yagense. Yaa maam n gomde, yaa Soaalã n gomde." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kẽng-y Kitim sẽn puk koom sʋka, ka rẽ bɩ y tʋm tɩ b sok Kedar n gese be rãmba ne ka rãmba manesem sã n yaa a ye." 
Jeremiah2:11 B maneg n sok n ges tẽn-bʋg rãmba n teem b wẽnd dãmba? Ad-y yaool n da ka wẽnd me ye. Mam buuda zug sẽn noome t'a paam tɩ m yaa a Wẽnde, yẽnda n tek a rẽnda sẽn pid ne ziir, yẽnda n bas maam n kẽ wẽn-faado." 
Jeremiah2:12 Yĩngr saase, bɩ y yɛɛse, bɩ y zoe rabeem, zoe-y rabeem wʋsgo. Maam n yeele, maam, y Soaalã." 
Jeremiah2:13 Yaa yel-wẽna a yiib la mam neba maan yã: b basa maam, mam sẽn ya ko-vɩɩga, ko-nifu, n na n tu bul-kẽoto, buls sẽn yũnd koom." 
Jeremiah2:14 A Israyɛl lebga yamb bɩ bõe, a roga ne yembdo bɩ bõe, tɩ neb a taab na n wa soog-a?" 
Jeremiah2:15 B yik n yɛsa ne-a wa bõnyẽese, b tees-a lame n wũundẽ, b kɩtame t'a tẽnga lebg zĩ-pɛɛla, a tẽn-bɛda fãa rɩɩ bugum, tɩ ned ba a ye ka ket b pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah2:16 Memfis la Tapanɛs rãmb menga wa n põng-a-la wa zugu. 
Jeremiah2:17 La rẽ fãa yaa foo n bao, Israyɛl, yaa foo n bas Soaala, f Wẽnnaam, bãmb n da kẽnd taoore n wilgd-f sore." 
Jeremiah2:18 Marsã fo na n le kẽnga Ezipt tẽnga n tɩ maan bõe? N tɩ yũ Nil koom bɩ bõe? Fo na n kẽnga Asiri bõe yĩnga? N tɩ yũ a kʋɩl-kãsenga koom bɩ bõd? 
Jeremiah2:19 Bɩ f bi-beelem dɩ-fo, bɩ f yel-wẽna sɩbg-fo! Woto la f bãngd Soaala-Wẽnd basgo sẽn ya wẽng la tɩɩseng to-to. Woto la f bãngda, tɩ ka segd tɩ f zẽk f zug ne bãmb ye. Yaa Soaala n gomde, yaa dũni fãa Wẽnd n gomde." 
Jeremiah2:20 Kelge, Israyɛl, f Soaala koɛɛga! N-yẽe! Al daar zãra, fo tara f zug zẽkr ne maam, fo basa maam la yaa woto la f zĩ n gomda: M dat n sooga m menga, la sɩda, wa pʋg-yoodre, f tʋɩta f gãag tãms zutu la tɩɩs tẽngre." 
Jeremiah2:21 Mam yaool n da sela foom wala bugsuntungu sẽn ya sõmbo, t'a biisa me ya sõma. La maana a wãn marsã tɩ fo lebg bugsuntung yooko, n womd biis sẽn ka lebd be?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Ba fo pek f meng ne zẽ-koom, ba f sõ safãnd tɩ wʋme, mam taoore fo yel-wẽna ket n tab-f lame. Maam n yeele, maam a Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah2:23 Fo na n maana wãna n tõog n yeele: Mam ka rẽgem m meng ye, m ka zoe n pʋg Baal dãmb ye. Ges f nao-tagdr sẽn dɩg bãg-faagẽ, reeg f kongre. Ad-f wẽnda yʋgem-sɛdga, n saad n zoet goabg la rɩtgo." 
Jeremiah2:24 Ad-f wẽnda burgumd yãanga sẽn nok zĩ-pɛɛla. A sã n doog a neng n kok yũugu a ningda tĩiga, n ka le tõe n yaas ye. Burgum-daada ka namsd ba bilfu t'a meng a toore n wat n seg-ba, a raab wẽnga sã n tus-a t'a yiki." 
Jeremiah2:25 Gũus f menga Israyɛl! F sã n zoet ne tĩiga, f na n pogla f naoore ko-yũud na n yõk-f lame. La fo leokdame tɩ m da wɩɩg n gom ye, tɩ f nonga f wẽn-sãamse, tɩ bãmb bal la f rat n pʋge." 
Jeremiah2:26 La ade, raar a ye, Israyɛl kamba, pagb la rapa, dĩm dãmb ne b kug-zĩidba, maan-kʋʋdba la bãngdba, ad-y y zug na n wuka ne yãnde wala wagdre, b sẽn lingi." 
Jeremiah2:27 Yãmb gomda ne raoog sẽn maneg n peese la y yetame: ‹Foo la m ba.› Y gomda ne kugr sẽn maneg n pees tɩ y boond rẽnda tɩ y wẽnde, la y yetame: ‹Foo n dog maam.› Y zãgsa a tees n ges maam, n wẽneg y poor n tees maam. Toog sã n tar-y marsã bɩ y yaool n tees maam n kelemdẽ: ‹Yik n fãag-do!›" 
Jeremiah2:28 Ad-y m na n leok-y-la woto: ‹Wẽnd dãmba fo sẽn maana bee yɛ? Bɩ bãmb yik n fãag-fo, f yell pakr wakato, b sã n tõe. Sɩda Zɩɩda, fo wẽnd-naandsa sõor zema f tẽnsa sõore.›" 
Jeremiah2:29 Bõe yĩng tɩ f rat n dogl yell m zugu? - Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde. Yãmb fãa ka bas maam laa? 
Jeremiah2:30 Mam sɩbga yãmba la yaa zaalem bala; yãmb pa reeg m saglga ye. Y tol n yika wa bõnyẽese n kʋ y bãngdbã. 
Jeremiah2:31 Zamaan kãnga rãmba, wʋm-y Soaala-Wẽnd gomde! Israyɛl kamba, m lebga yãmb yĩnga wa we-raoog sẽn kẽesd dabeem bɩ wa tẽng sẽn gãe la a yikd ne lika. M buudu, bõe tɩ y gomd tɩ y so-la y menga, la y kõn lɛɛg n wa kẽe maam yɛsa?" 
Jeremiah2:32 M sok-y n gese, bi-pugl yĩmda a fan-teedo, pʋg-paal yĩmda a sɛɛg sẽbdg sẽn maneg n pãneme? M pa tẽed ye! La sã n ya foom, m buudu, f yĩma m yelle, al daar zãra; dasma ka le tõe n sõd ye." 
Jeremiah2:33 Sã n ya sɩda, ad foo n mi f sẽn na n tũ sor ninga n bao f sũ-noogo, woto, ba na tũ ne yel-kɛga, fo na rɩk f sorã, tʋm tɩ narã lebga f minungu," 
Jeremiah2:34 al tɩ b ne f futa zugu neb sẽn ka tar-b toorẽ yell zɩɩm. F pa ling-ba tɩ b kaood kʋɩlens ye. Ne rẽ fãa, fo raaga b zɩɩm," 
Jeremiah2:35 la fo ket n yetame tɩ f yaa nin-tɩrga, la ka tog tɩ m sũ-puura kell n pʋg-f ye. Ade, fo sẽn yeel tɩ f ka maan bũmbã m na n bool-f-la bʋʋdo." 
Jeremiah2:36 Fo sɩd ka zɛɛd ne sor tedgr ye, f ka zɛɛd ne f zo-rãmba teengo ye. La Ezipt na n ning-f-la yãnde wa Asiri sẽn ning-f yãndã." 
Jeremiah2:37 Fo na n kʋka f zugu n yi Ezipt tɩ maam a Wẽnd ka rat fo sẽn teeg b rãmba ye. F yɛla ka tõe n maneg woto ye.» 
Jeremiah3:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel: «Ned sã n dig a paga, tɩ paga yi n tɩ rɩk sɩd a to, sɩda tõe n le reeg-a-la a nengẽ bɩ? Ka tõe ye, ka rẽ, yaa tẽngã n dẽgemde. La foo, Israyɛl, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, fo saka yoob ne neb wʋsgo, n ket n dat tɩ m le reeg-fo. M sok n ges na tõoge?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Zẽk f neng n tees tãmsã la ges yaa tãn-bʋg zugu la f ka yaale. Wala we-raoogẽ fãada, sẽn soos n gũud so-loaada woto me fo ra zĩi soya noore n gũud f ra-sãmba. Fo rẽgma tẽnga ne f yoodem la f tʋʋm wẽna." 
Jeremiah3:3 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m mong-f saaga n mong-f sa-yaoose, la f zãgsame n kell n tar yoobo, n zãgs tɩ f kõn deeg f kongr ye." 
Jeremiah3:4 Ne rẽ fãa fo saagd n gomda m yelle, n yetẽ: ‹M ba wã, m yãadmẽ zoa wã," 
Jeremiah3:5 na n dɩɩ beem ne-m daar fãa laa?› N-ye! Yaa woto la f gomda n yaool n ka basd f wẽnema ye, la sã n ya wẽnem, f sɩd tõe ne wẽnem.»" 
Jeremiah3:6 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam, naab a Zoziyas zamaanẽ: «Fo yãenda a Israyɛl, a long rõaag long sɩɩga, sẽn maana bɩ? A saa n yoo tãn-bɛda fãa zutu la tɩɩg fãa sẽn tob tẽngre." 
Jeremiah3:7 Tɩ mam da tagsdẽ t'a sã n maan woto fãa n sɛ, a na lebg n wa mam nengẽ. La a ka lɛɛg n wa ye. A Zɩɩda, a Yi-saada, a yao wẽnga yãee rẽ." 
Jeremiah3:8 A yãeeme tɩ m da kɩsa a Israyɛl, a long rõaag long sɩɩga, kãadma kaoob sebre, tɩ m da yiis-a lame, a yeebga yĩnga. Mik a yao, a Zɩɩda, mik a Yi-saad, ka zoe rabeem ye; yẽ me saame n yo." 
Jeremiah3:9 Yẽ me saame n yo ne wẽn-naandse, sẽn pees ne raoog bɩ kugri. A rẽgma tẽngã." 
Jeremiah3:10 A Zɩɩda, a Yi-saada, ne a long rõaag long sɩɩga, a Israyɛl tão wã, ka le lɛɛg n wa kẽ maam ye, a ka lɛɛg n wa ne a sũur fãa ye, a noor bal n yaag n togse. Yaa maam a Wẽnde n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah3:11 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: «A Israyɛl, a long rõaag long sɩɩga, maanda wala a be-la a sɩd zugu, sã n mak-a ne a Yi-saada, a Zɩɩda." 
Jeremiah3:12 Bɩ f tees goabga sẽnẽ n tãs woto: ‹Israyɛl, long rõaag long sɩɩga lɛɛg n wa tɩ m ka rat-f ne wẽnga la m kõn gãnem m neng ye. M ka mi beem tugb ye, Soaalã n yeele." 
Jeremiah3:13 Fo we n sak n deeg f kongre, n deeg tɩ f zaba ne Soaala-Wẽnde, n deeg tɩ f saa zĩis fãa n pʋg wẽn-sãamse, tãmsa zutu la tɩɩg sẽn tob tẽngre; fo ka kelg mam koɛɛg ye. Maam n yeele, maam a Wẽnde.›" 
Jeremiah3:14 Lebg-y n wa-y yã, tõatba. Maam n yeele, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, maam la Soaala. M na n yãka nin-yend tẽng a ye pʋgẽ, n yãk neba a yiib buuda a ye pʋgẽ, n tall-ba n wa Siõ." 
Jeremiah3:15 M na n kõ-y-la pe-kɩɩmba sẽn tat m daabo, tɩ b kɩɩm yã, ne yam la gũusgu." 
Jeremiah3:16 Wakat ning sẽn watã, Soaala n gomde, y na n doga kamba n lebg bu-yalengo. Wẽnd zooda kaset sẽn pag koglgo ninga pʋgã, y kõn le sok a yell ye. Ned ba a ye kõn le tẽeg a yelle ye. B na n yĩma a yelle, b kõn le bao a zĩig ye, b kõn le maan a taar ye." 
Jeremiah3:17 Wakat kãng b na n boola Zerizalɛɛm tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd naam zaoore. Ninsaalb buud fãa na n tigma taab be, m waoogr yĩnga. B sẽn da keng b sũuri n tũud sor ningã, wẽnem la yalemd sorã, b kõn le rɩk so-kãng ye." 
Jeremiah3:18 Wakat kãnga, a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelma neba la a Israyɛl tẽn-peelma neba na n tɩ fãooga taaba. B fãa na n yii nug goabg sẽnẽ n lɛɛg n wa tẽng ning m sẽn dɩk n kõ b yaab rãmba wala b toorẽ pʋɩɩre.»" 
Jeremiah3:19 M da yeta m memga: M da nongẽ lame tɩ f lebgẽ m bi-kẽenga, tɩ m kõ-f tẽng sẽn ya f raab tẽnga, tẽng noom sẽn ka taar dũni wã pʋgẽ! M da tagsdame: Fo na n boola maam tɩ f Ba, la f kõn le bas mam pʋgb ye." 
Jeremiah3:20 La ayo, yãmb ka pʋg-m ye, Israyɛl kamba, y zãmba maam wa pag sẽn zãmbd a sɩda. Yaa Soaalã, yaa mam menga n togsd boto." 
Jeremiah3:21 Kɛleng n kelem tãmsa zutu. Yaa Israyɛl kamb n yãbd la b kũmdẽ, yaa b sẽn tudg sora yĩnga, ya b sẽn yĩm mam yelle, b sẽn yĩm maam b Soaala yelle." 
Jeremiah3:22 Lebg-y n wa-y yã, wa-y n pʋg maam, bi-beese, m na sãoog y tʋb-pa-wʋmdma. Ade, tõnd wata y nengẽ, tɩ yaa yãmb bala, Soaala, la tõnd Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah3:23 Sɩda, tõnd basame tɩ b belg-do ne d sẽn da waoogd b rãmb kunkuba zutã, ne kaasg ning sẽn da kaasd tãmsa zutã. Yaa d Soaala-Wẽnd nengẽ bala la a Israyɛl tõe n paam fãagre." 
Jeremiah3:24 D bãnga al d yãadmẽ tɩ d saka yãnde n waoog wẽn-naand a Baal la rẽ n sɛɛsd d yaab rãmba paoongo, rẽ n sɛɛs b rũmsi, bɛd la bõonese, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli." 
Jeremiah3:25 Bɩ d sak n dɩ yãnde la paoore, tɩ tõnd n beeg d Soaala la d Wẽnde, tõndo, wala d ba rãmba, al d yãadmẽ n tãag rũnna. Wẽnnaam d Soaala sẽn da togs-d bũmb ningã, d pa reeg ye." 
Jeremiah4:1 Israyɛl, ad-f sã n leb poorẽ, yaa Soaala n gomde, f tõe n le wa-la m nengẽ. Fo sã n zãag ne maam f wẽn-naan-yoodã, f kõn le baood n na n zoe ye." 
Jeremiah4:2 Zirẽ-beed sã n ka f noorẽ, tɩ f wẽen wa sẽn tog la sẽn zemse, n wẽen ne Soaala, vɩɩm naaba, ad bu-zẽmba mens na kos-ma tɩ m ning-b barka, la b na kils m yʋʋre." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yet Zɩɩda neba la Zerizalɛɛm tẽng rãmba: Pesem-y y meng pʋ-paalle, da le bʋd-y gõos sʋk ye." 
Jeremiah4:4 Ade, sã n yaa mam yĩnga la y zãag y sũura ne a rẽgdã, Zɩɩda rãmba, Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba, bɩ y kell n dɩk y mens n kõ maam. Y ka maan boto, y tʋʋm yooda yĩnga, m sũura na n widga wa bugum, bugum sẽn pa tõe n kiisi, bugum sẽn na n dɩ-y zãnga." 
Jeremiah4:5 Wẽ-y kũnga, a Zɩɩda yĩnga, tãs-y koɛɛg, Zerizalɛɛm yĩnga Peeb-y baorg tẽnga fãa pʋgẽ, tãs-y ne y koɛɛg pãng tɛka. Wilg-y tɩ b wa tigim tãnsoben-dotẽ," 
Jeremiah4:6 Wilg-y tɩ b yagl tãb-kaoore n tees Siõ, Wilg-y tɩ b bao zĩig n soonde, la ned ba a ye ra paa a zĩigẽ ye. Yaa nug goabg sẽnẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd tusd yel-beed t'a watẽ; yaa wɩɩbd sẽn pid wɩɩbdo." 
Jeremiah4:7 We-naaba yi-la a tʋgrẽ, dũni wã tẽn-wãada yikame n dɩk sore; a yi-la a sẽn da sorẽ la a wat n na n zɛ-la y tẽnsã. Y tẽnsa na n lebga raboodo, ned ba a ye kõn le pa b pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah4:8 Yeelg-y sũ-pa-noang futu, wilg-y y sũ-sãanga, kelem-y kʋʋre; Soaala-Wẽnd pa rat n bas-d taal ye: b sũura sɩd puuga wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah4:9 La rẽ sã n wa beẽ - Maam n yeele, maam a Wẽnde, - dĩma meng na n basa raoodo, yẽ ne a kug-zĩidba; maan-kʋʋdba sũur na n yaalame, bãngdba na n yɛɛsame." 
Jeremiah4:10 B na n yeelame: «Soaala-Wẽnde, sɩda yãmb belga buud kãnga, yãmb belga Zerizalɛɛm, n yeel-a tɩ fãa na n zemsame, tɩ sʋʋg yaool n pẽneg d kokore!»" 
Jeremiah4:11 Badaare, koe-kãnga la Soaala-Wẽnd na n togs Zerizalɛɛm dãmba: «Tãmsa zut sob-tʋʋlga n wẽed m buudu la sobga yita zĩ-pɛɛlẽ. Ka sob-bil sẽn zems kood yelgr ye," 
Jeremiah4:12 Yaa sobg sẽn tar pãnga, la maam n yiis-a a sẽn yitẽ wã. Yaa marsã la m na n kao bʋʋd ne bãmba.»" 
Jeremiah4:13 Ad bɛ wã sẽn wate, a fõta wa sa-raoogo, a bilim-bilma tʋʋla wa saag sobgo, a wiidi wã tĩig yɩɩda sɩlg rẽnda. D yell sãamame, d wãa zãnga!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Zerizalɛɛm, f sã n dat fãagre pek f sũuri, yiis a wẽnema. F sũura na n kell n paa ne a tags wẽnsã n ta da-bʋre?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Kelg bʋ-raasa sẽn yit al Dã, kelg yel-beeda kibar sẽn yit Efrayim tãmsẽ." 
Jeremiah4:16 Wilg-y tẽnga rãmba, wilg-y Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, wilg-y-b tɩ bɛɛba kolgdame la b yii tẽn-zãorgẽ n watẽ, la b teesa Zɩɩda n kelemd b zabr kɛlenga." 
Jeremiah4:17 Wala gũudb sẽn gũbg pʋʋgo, woto me la b gũbg Zerizalɛɛm. La Soaala-Wẽnd yetame t'a tõdgra rolb la rẽnna." 
Jeremiah4:18 Ad yaa Zerizalɛɛm tʋʋm kɛgã n tak yel-beedã a zugu, yaa so-wẽngã a sẽn dɩka yĩnga. Yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ a zugã la a lemb yã; ad-a yaa tɩɩsenga la a wẽnemdeda sũuri." 
Jeremiah4:19 Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga sẽn lʋɩ a tʋbrẽ a Zeremi yeelame: «Aba, m pʋga zabdame! Tooga wẽnd-a-la wa fuugu, m sũura rat n tõsgame, m yĩnga saooda kalwaare! M ka tõe n sĩnd ye: m wʋma tõntõoga bʋʋre m wʋma zabr sɩngr kaasgo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Yaa yel-beed woo yel-beed bal la b gomda. Tẽnga fãa paama zɛɛbo, vugr bala d pɛɛla-rota fãa rʋʋgame, sẽgda fãa siiga nif kamsg pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah4:21 M na n gesa tãb-kaoorã n ta da-bʋre? Da-bʋr la zabra bard na n sĩndi? 
Jeremiah4:22 M buuda yaa yalma, m buuda ka mi maam ye.» Yaa Soaalã n gomde. Yaa yãas sẽn ka tar yam ye, b ka wʋmd bũmb ye. B sẽn mi la b sẽn tõe yaa wẽng maaneg bala. Sã n ya maan neerã, b ka mi la b ka tõe fɩ." 
Jeremiah4:23 Mam sulg n gesa tẽngã la a yaa vɩʋʋgo, vɩ-raoogo, la yĩngr vẽenema me kii tam." 
Jeremiah4:24 M le gesame, la ade, tãmsa ka le yɛs b nao zut ye, la tãn-bi wã miimdame." 
Jeremiah4:25 Mam gesame, la ned ba a ye ka le ket ye; yĩngr luiili fãa menemame." 
Jeremiah4:26 Mam gesame: tẽnga sẽn da bĩm wa zẽedã lebga zĩ-peen-daaga, tẽn bɛda fãa lebga raboodo. La rẽ yaa Soaala-Wẽnd tʋʋmde, yaa b sũ-fõora tʋʋmde." 
Jeremiah4:27 N-ye! Woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomda: «Tẽnga gilli na lebga zĩ-pɛɛla, sã n ges bala f sũur sãamdame; m yaool n ka na n menes-a gill ye." 
Jeremiah4:28 Woto wã tẽnga na kelem kʋʋre la yĩngri, saaga na n sobame. M sẽn da yeela la m na n pidsi m daaba kõn tek ye, m kõn bars bũmb ye.»" 
Jeremiah4:29 Kɛleng n kelme tɩ b baad bilim-bilm, tɩ b baad tãbda rãmba. Tẽnga neba fãa sɩnga zoees bala. Kẽer soonda tʋgẽ, tɩ kẽer dʋʋd pĩisi. Tẽnsa fãa lebga vɩɩdo, ned ba a ye ka le ket b pʋsẽ ye." 
Jeremiah4:30 La foom Zerizalɛɛm, maana a wãna tɩ f ket n yeelgd fu-neeba tɩ neba fãa nina yiig n get-fo, maana a wãn tɩ f famd f meng ne sãnem teedo, la f maneg f nini n dõos kɩrʋ? F manegda f meng zaalem: ra-sãmba ka le baood-f ye, f kũum la b baood marsã." 
Jeremiah4:31 N-yẽe! M sẽn wʋmd marsã wã wẽnda pag sẽn kũsd rogem kũsga, wẽnda pag sẽn nan dogd a pipi biig waasgo. Koɛɛga yaa a Siõ koɛɛga, yẽ n waasd la a zẽkd a nus n yetẽ: «M yell sãamame, m lʋɩ m kʋʋdba nusẽ yeee!»" 
Jeremiah5:1 Zoe-y n saag-y Zerizalɛɛm, ges-y neere, sa-y n sogs-y, gilg-y raasã n gese y na yãend ned sẽn tũud so tɩrga, ned sẽn baood sɩda? Y sã n yãend nin-yend menga m na maan sugri ne Zerizalɛɛm. Maan n yeele, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah5:2 Ad-y tẽnga rãmb sã n wẽenẽ la b yet woto: «M wẽend ne Soaala-Wẽnd, Vɩɩm Naaba,» b wẽena Soaala yʋʋr zaalem." 
Jeremiah5:3 Soaala-Wẽnde, yaa bõe la y gũuda? Yaa y neba ra bas yãmb pʋgbo. Yãmb sɩbgd-b lame la b ka yɛɛsd ye. Yãmb sɛɛsd-b-la a yeyn-ye la b baas n zãgsda y kelgre. B kʋɩɩsa b nens wa pĩig kugri, b ka rat n lɛɛg n wa kẽ yãmb ye." 
Jeremiah5:4 Mam da yeta m menga tɩ b sẽn maand woto wã, b maanda wa yãas sẽn ka mi bũmb ye; m yetame tɩ b ka mi Soaala-Wẽnd daab ye, tɩ b ka mi Soaala sẽn dat tɩ d modg n pʋg-b n ta zĩig ning ye." 
Jeremiah5:5 Woto m yeelame tɩ m na n pẽnega são-sãood rãmba tɩ daare bãmb mii Soaala raabo, b mi Naaba-Wẽnda sẽn dat tɩ b modg n ta zĩig ninga, la kato, piig ka são a nu ye! Bãmb me kaoo bũmb ning fãa sẽn da loe-b ne b Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah5:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la bõnyẽeg yit tʋgrẽ n yõgd-ba, yaa rẽ yĩng la digd-n-yĩidg tõsd-ba, tɩ ãbg wat n sor b tẽnsa noore, la a sɩɩgd sẽn yit-a fãa. Kato, b sẽn tar tõdgr la b sẽn tare, b zãmba ka be tɛk ye!" 
Jeremiah5:7 Zerizalɛɛm, m na n kõ-f-la sugr bõe yĩnga? Fo kamb basa maam, b wẽenda b wẽenego ne wẽnd sẽn ka wẽnd ye. M ka bas tɩ bũmb paoog-b ye, la b saa n yo-la b yoobo, Yooba zĩigẽ la b ra zoet n dengd taaba." 
Jeremiah5:8 B sẽn wẽnd bũmb ninga: bãng wed-nobdse sẽn pʋgd wed-yãanse. Ned kam fãa yãeta a to paga n kelem bõndre. 
Jeremiah5:9 Ka tog tɩ m lʋɩɩs m toog sɩda? Ka tog tɩ m sɩbg nin-bãmba sɩda? Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n sokde. Ka tog tɩ m maan buud kãnga bũmbu n paam n dok m sũur sɩda? 
Jeremiah5:10 Bɩ b kɛ a bugsuntundã sẽn lolemd tãnga, n kẽ a pʋgẽ n kɛ fãa n dʋʋge, n kees bala bũmb sẽn pa zem fɩ; bɩ b võ tobendã tɩ m pa so bãmb ye." 
Jeremiah5:11 A Israyɛl roogo wala a Zɩɩda roogo ka maan pʋ-peelem ne maam ye. Maam n yeele, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah5:12 Zɩɩda rãmb yeelame tɩ b ka mi Soaala ye. Bãmb n maand tɩ Wẽnd ka tar pãng ye, la woto yel-beed kõn ta-b ye, b ka na n seg zabre bɩ kom ye." 
Jeremiah5:13 B bãngdba goama yaa sobgo, b ka tar sẽn sek toagsg ye. Bɩ b sẽn gomd yel-beed ninga lɛɛg n lʋɩ b zugu!" 
Jeremiah5:14 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Wẽnda, gomd woto: Kelge, Zeremi, sẽn ya woto la b gomdã ad koɛɛg ning m sẽn na n kõ fooma na n lebga bugum, tɩ buuda lebg raado, tɩ bugma rɩ-a." 
Jeremiah5:15 Sã n ya yãmba, Israyɛl kamba, yaa Soaala n gomde, m na n boola tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, tɩ b wa yik zabr ne yãmba. Ned zɩ n tõog bãmb ye, yaa buud sẽn pid ne yʋʋma, buud kʋdg menga, y ka tõe n gom b goama, y ka tõe n wʋm b goama ye." 
Jeremiah5:16 B lok kʋʋdame, b tãb-biis yaa gãndaado." 
Jeremiah5:17 Buud kãnga n na sɛɛs zãnga: y kood biisi la y buri, y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli, y rũmsi, bɛd la bõonese, y bugsuntund biisi la y kankama. Zabr na n luba y tãnsoben-doto, y sẽn tẽed zĩig ninga tɩ bũmb kõn maan-y wã." 
Jeremiah5:18 Baasgo, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, m kõn sak n menes-y gill ye." 
Jeremiah5:19 La b sã n wa soke tɩ yaa bõe yĩng la Soaala sɩbg-ba ne yel-beed a woto fãa, fo na leoke, foom a Zeremi, tɩ yaa b sẽn bas b Soaala n na n waoog, b meng tẽngẽ, bu-zẽn wẽn-naandse. Woto wã b na yɩ sãamba sõgen-kamba, b pa-weoog tẽngẽ!" 
Jeremiah5:20 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele: Bɩ b taas a Zakoob yagense, bɩ y sõng tɩ Zɩɩda rãmb wʋme." 
Jeremiah5:21 Bɩ y kelge woto, yalems buudu, yãmb tara nin la y ka ne ye, y tara tʋba la y ka wʋmd ye." 
Jeremiah5:22 Maam n sokde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: Bõe tɩ y ka na n deeg tɩ maam la y Soaala? Bõe tɩ y ka na n dig rabeem m taoore? Yaa maam n kok mogr ne bĩisri, dẽ la a toaag a sẽn kõn gãndg bada. Mogra nong bɩ a rãmb a rãmbgo a kõn tõog n gãndg-a ye; ko-wiisa nong bɩ b ning rãamde b kõn tõog fɩ." 
Jeremiah5:23 Buud kãnga bala la buudu sẽn tar zʋg-wẽnga, yẽ bala n ka reegd m noore. Yẽ bal n lake, n looda," 
Jeremiah5:24 a zãgsame t'a kõn yeele: tõnd da togame n deeg tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd la d Soaala. Yaa bãmb n kõt tõnd saaga, sẽego la sɩpaolgo, b wakata sã n ta bala. Bãmb n kõt-d wakato, d kooda tigsgu yĩnga." 
Jeremiah5:25 Yãmb yel-wẽna sãama rẽ fãa, y yel-wẽna kɩtame tɩ y ka le tõe n paam kũun kãens ye." 
Jeremiah5:26 Bi-bees n be m buudẽ wã. La ad-y b wẽnda luin-bẽtba sẽn sor moogẽ n gũudẽ. B bẽda b bẽdgo la yaa ninsaalba la bãmb baood n na n yõge. 
Jeremiah5:27 Wala b sẽn pidsd no-sẽko ne noose, b pidsa b rota ne wagdem laogo. La yaa woto la b paas b arzɛka la b pãnga." 
Jeremiah5:28 B nobame n pidi; b wẽnema ka be tɛk ye. B ka kaood bʋʋd ne sɩd ye; b bʋʋd zĩigẽ b zãmbda kɩɩba, ka rẽ kɩɩbã n soẽ bʋʋm. Yaa rẽ yĩng la b paam n lebg arzɛk rãmba. B zãmbda naong rãmba." 
Jeremiah5:29 Da ka tog sɩda, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, da ka tog tɩ m maan buud kãnga bũmbu, n paam n dok m sũur bɩ?" 
Jeremiah5:30 Ad-y yel-beedo, bũmb sẽn yikd sũuri n tʋmd tẽnga pʋga:" 
Jeremiah5:31 Bãngdba gomda wẽn-faoog yĩnga, tɩ maan-kʋʋdba baood sẽn ya yõod b yĩng bala, tɩ m buuda get rẽ wa bõn-sõngo. Yɛla baasg raare, y na n maana bõe?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Bẽnzame kamba, zoe-y n yi Zerizalɛɛm n bao zĩig n soonde, peeb-y baorg Tekoa; ning-y tãb-kaoore Bɛt-Kerem tãnga zugu, tɩ yel-beed n yit Goabg n watẽ, yaa tẽn-kũum menga." 
Jeremiah6:2 Siõ bi-pugla ne a neerma fãa, sãamame n dɩga." 
Jeremiah6:3 Neb n wat a nengẽ neb ka tɛka wa rũn-kɩɩmb ne b rũmsi. B waa n tii n gũbg-a lame, tãb-biig fãa ne a zĩiga." 
Jeremiah6:4 B moondame: Yik-y! D sɩng zabre! D sɩng zabra wĩnto-sʋka. Kato, wĩntooga na n paoog-d lame, wĩntooga zoe n kɩllame n dabd lʋɩɩse, zaabr maasem zoe n dõnega wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah6:5 Bɩ y yik tɩ d sɩng zabrã ne yʋngo, n wã tẽnga ro-neeba gilli." 
Jeremiah6:6 B kelg dũni fãa Wẽnd sẽn yet-ba: Lub-y tɩɩsã la y sam tãndo, sam-y tãndo n pag Zerizalɛɛm. D tara kaset vẽenega, tɩ b maanda pãn-tõog a pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah6:7 A wẽnema tãoosdame, wa ko-bunem sẽn tãoosd a koom. Tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, yaa zabr la pãng bʋrg bala la b wʋmda. M nin nee daar fãa, sãmpoaga la namsg sẽn pid namsgo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Zerizalɛɛm, maan gũusgu ka rẽ m na n lak n basa foo tɩ f lebg zĩ-peen-daaga la raboogo." 
Jeremiah6:9 Ad dũni fãa Wẽnd sẽn kõt noor ninga: Wʋk-y, wʋk-y Israyɛl bu-kellã, yiis-y yã, wala b sẽn yiisd bugsuntung biisi; y nusa saag wilã a yeyn-ye." 
Jeremiah6:10 M na n goma ne ãnna? M na n togsa ãnna t'a kelg-ma? Ade, b tʋba ka yoog ye, b ka tõe n maag b meng n kelg ye. Soaala-Wẽnnaam gomdã lebga b laad bũmbu. B ka rat-a n kelg ye."
