Jeremiah6:11 Ad-y sã n ya maam, Soaala, m zĩime tɩ m sũur fõta, m pa le tõe t'a ka fudg n daal ye. Ypug f sũura, Zeremi, puug n waag f sẽn paam a soaba, n waag kamba sẽn be soya zutu, puug f sũur ne kom-bɩɩbã. Ad-b pagba la rapa, nin-bɛd ne nin-kẽem kulkuugu, fãa na n kãag n loogame." 
Jeremiah6:12 B na n kõo neb a taaba b zagse, b pʋtã, b pagba menga. N-ye! M na n tẽega m nug tẽn-kãnga rãmb zutu. Maam n yeele, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah6:13 B fãa, b kom-bõoneg ne b nin-bɛda, b fãa baooda b yõod bala. Bãngdba wa maan-kʋʋdba, zirẽ bal la b tʋʋmde." 
Jeremiah6:14 B geta m buuda neba sãmpogre wa yel-yaalga la b yetẽ: «Laafi bal la d gãe ne!» Tɩ laafi yaool n kaẽ ye. 
Jeremiah6:15 Y tẽedame tɩ b tʋʋm wẽnsã yãnd tar-b lame bɩ? Baa bilfu! Deeg tɩ b kongame wã ka wat b yamẽ ye. Yaa rẽ yĩnga, maam Naaba-Wẽnd n yete, m waoonga raare, fãa na sõd sẽn lʋɩ-ba sʋka." 
Jeremiah6:16 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn le paase: Yals-y y sora zug n gese, sok-y n bãng pĩnd ra yaa wãna. Sok-y n bãng so-sõngo n tũ, tɩ y na paam laafi. La ayo, b yeelame: «Tõnd kõn maan fɩ!»" 
Jeremiah6:17 Mam ninga neb sẽn na n wilg-ba tɩ b maam gũusgu, baorga sã n wa peebdẽ la b leokame tɩ rẽ ka pak-b ye." 
Jeremiah6:18 Woto wã, bu-zẽmba, kelg-y la y bãng yell ning sẽn na n pak-ba." 
Jeremiah6:19 Kelg-y yã, dũni ninsaalba m na n tool-b-la yel-beed ninga sẽn na n dol b raab wẽnsã. B pa maan gũusgu wa m sẽn da kos-ba ye, b ka tʋlg n kelg m goama ye." 
Jeremiah6:20 Y sẽn tʋgd Saba n wat ne bũmb ningã tɩdarã la yẽgen sẽn tar yũ-noodã, y sẽn kẽnd al yɩɩg n wat ne bã dẽ maanda maam bõe? Rũmsã b sẽn kʋʋd m yĩnga, n basdẽ tɩ bugma rɩt-b zãnga ka wat ne m sũ-noog ba bilfu, b maand a taaba me yaa boto." 
Jeremiah6:21 Yaa rẽ yĩng la Soaala-Wẽnd gomda: Mam na n bẽda tẽn-kãnga rãmba, bũmb la m na n ning b taoore tɩ b lake; b na n lak n lʋɩɩme n ka le yik ye: ba rãmba, kamba, yagse, zo-rãmba, b fãa na n kiime." 
Jeremiah6:22 Ad Soaal Wẽnd sẽn yeele: Bɛɛb n yit Goabg n watẽ, Tẽn-kẽeng rãmb n yit al tẽnga sɛtmẽ." 
Jeremiah6:23 B tãb-biisa zãada tãbdo la sʋʋse yaa nin-toose sẽn ka mi sugr ye. B bʋrga sãta wa mogr dẽnna. B zaoo wiidi la b tonga b zabr tongre, tongr sẽn sakd gesgo, la yaa fo yĩng la b wata, Siõ!" 
Jeremiah6:24 Tõnd sẽn wʋm kibarã, d raood menemame, rabeem kẽe tõndo, tɩ d digd waoodo wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem." 
Jeremiah6:25 Woto wã bɩ y da kẽn y pʋtẽ ye, da kẽn-y sor zug ye, tɩ bɛ-wã yɛsa be n kʋʋda. Sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa tẽn-kũum." 
Jeremiah6:26 M buuda kamba, bao-y sũ-pa-noang fuugu n sẽgen y sɛɛga, bilim-y tompɛglmẽ. Kelem-y kʋʋre, bi-yend sẽn ki kʋʋre, pʋd-y kʋ-toog yɩɩlle, tɩ bɛ wã yika vugr bala n wat n na n wã-fo." 
Jeremiah6:27 M yãka foo, Zeremi, tɩ f yɩ wa ned sẽn losd kut buud boaagẽ n tõe n bãng a sã n ka kalem ne bũmb a to. M datame tɩ f mak m buudã, woto m na bãng a vɩɩma sẽn yaa a soaba." 
Jeremiah6:28 B fãa yaa tõatba, tẽn-kãnem dãmba, b fãa sũurã kʋɩ wa zũud bɩ kutu, b fãa yaa wãadba." 
Jeremiah6:29 Zugba soab zugame n kong pãnga, bugma ra tog n yẽnegame n welg namdã, la ayo! Wanzurfa zãgsa yɩlgre, rẽgda ka yit ye." 
Jeremiah6:30 B boonda nin-bãmba buudu tɩ wanzurf sẽn ka yõodo, Soaala-Wẽnd pa rat b buud ye." 
Jeremiah7:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zeremi 
Jeremiah7:2 t'a tɩ yals wẽnd dooga noore n moon woto: Kelg yã, Zɩɩda rãmba, yãmb fãa sẽn tũud digno-kãensa n kẽed n waoogd Soaalã, kelg-y b sẽn yete." 
Jeremiah7:3 Ad-y yaa maam, a Israyɛl Wẽnda n yet tɩ y tall y mens neere, la y vɩɩnd wa sẽn segde tɩ m na pa zĩ-kãnga ne yãmba." 
Jeremiah7:4 Dɩlla, da kelg-y zirẽ-be-goama ye. B vẽegda beoog n tarẽ: Soaala roogo, Soaala roogo, Soaala roogo la woto!" 
Jeremiah7:5 Tall-y y mens neere, vɩɩnd-y wa sẽn segde. Neb a yiibu sã n bool taab bʋʋdo y taoore bɩ y bʋ tɩrga." 
Jeremiah7:6 Yãmb sã n ka maan sãan pãnga, bɩ kɩɩba, bɩ pʋg-kõore, yãmb sã n ka raagd pʋ-peelem soab zɩɩm zĩ-kãnga, la y sã n ka pʋgd bu-zẽmba wẽn-naandsã, tɩ yaa wẽn-naandsa pʋgb n wãad yãmba," 
Jeremiah7:7 ad-y mam na pa zĩ-kãnga ne yãmba. Y na kell n pa tẽng ninga mam sẽn dɩk al daar zãra n kõ y saam-dãmb tɩ b soog-a daar fãa yĩngã. 
Jeremiah7:8 La ade, yãmb sakdame n deegd zirẽ goama, goam sẽn ka yõodo la sẽn tudgd yãmba." 
Jeremiah7:9 Sɩda, y zuudame, n kʋʋda, n yooda, n kãabdẽ n yaool n ka pidsdẽ, n kẽnd a Baal taoore ne y maando, n pʋgd wẽn-sãamse la m yaool n ka ne bũmb ninga sẽn be yãmb ne bãmb sʋk ye." 
Jeremiah7:10 Y yaoondame marsã n wa m taoore, wẽnd dooga pʋga, m waoogra roogẽ la y yetẽ: «Tõnd yell manegame,» la y baas n ket n tʋmda y tʋʋm wẽna." 
Jeremiah7:11 Yãmb sẽn getã, do-kãnga sẽn ya m waoogr zĩigã yaa wagda tigsg zĩig sɩda? La wagdem bal la m ne, ad-y m ka zoang ye. Yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah7:12 Bɩ y kẽng zĩ-sõng ninga m sẽn da tar Silo, m sẽn da vigl m naama zaoor zĩig ningã la ges-y mam sẽn kɩt t'a lebg raboog ninga, m buud a Israyɛl yel-wẽna yĩnga." 
Jeremiah7:13 M yet-y lame, Soaala n gomde, y tʋma wẽng wa pĩnd dãmbã. M wilgame n le wilg n paase la y pa kelg ye. M bool-y lame la y pa sak ye." 
Jeremiah7:14 Woto wã mam na n maana do-kãnga sẽn welg toor mam yĩngã, roog ninga yãmb sẽn teeg a soab wa fãa fãa wã, roog ning m sẽn dɩk n kõ y yaab rãmb la yãmb mensã, mam na n maan-a-la wa m sẽn maan ne Silo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Mam na rig yãmb tɩ y menem mam taoor wa m sẽn dig y saam-biisi, a Efrayim kamba." 
Jeremiah7:16 La foo, Zeremi, bɩ f ra yõk m sɛɛg buud kãnga yĩng ye. Ra zẽk f koɛɛg n kelem, da pʋʋs-m nin-bãmba yĩng ye. Ra pẽdg-ma ne f pʋʋsgo tɩ m pa na n kelg-f ye!" 
Jeremiah7:17 Fo yẽ sẽ n pa ne b sẽn maan bũmb ning Zɩɩda tẽnsa pʋsẽ, la Zerizalɛɛm soya zut bɩ?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Kambã n dɩgsd raado, tɩ ba rãmba tugund bugum, tɩ pagba nagd zoma n na n dõos miisdu, yĩngr dĩm poaka yĩnga, la b wat ne rãam la kũun a taaba wẽn-sãamsa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah7:19 La woto wã yaa maam la b beegd bɩ? Soaalã n sokde. Ayo, yaa bãmb n baood yãnde la bõne n kõt b mense!" 
Jeremiah7:20 Yaa rẽ yĩng la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto: «Ade, m na n basame tɩ m sũura fudg n waag b tẽngã, b nebã, rũmsã, pʋtã, tɩɩsã, tẽnga kooda biisi. Bugum ning sẽn widg m sũurẽ wã ka tõe n kiis ye.»" 
Jeremiah7:21 Ad Soaalã, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛga, wʋk-y y maanda nemd n wãbe; naag-y yũ-nood maanda la maand a taabã n wãb y toore." 
Jeremiah7:22 Mam sẽn wa n yiis y saam-dãmba Ezipt tẽnga, mam pa kõ b noor yũ-noog maoong la maand a taaba poorẽ ye." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ad mam sẽn da kõ bãmb noor ninga: «Kelg-y mam koɛɛga tɩ m yɩ yãmb Wẽnde, tɩ yãmb yɩ m neba. Tũ-y sor ninga mam sẽn wilg yãmba tɩ y na paam sũ-noogo.»" 
Jeremiah7:24 La ayo, b pa kelg ye, b pa yok b tʋbr ye; b kẽna b yam, b kidba b sũuri, b tũ-la b yalemdo. B zãgsa b ges maam n wẽnemd b kãare n tees-ma." 
Jeremiah7:25 Yãmb saam-dãmba sẽn yi Ezipt tẽnga n tãag rũnna, mam tʋma yãmb m tʋʋm-tʋmdba, m bãngdba, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa. M da tʋmd-b lame n ka yɛɛdẽ ye." 
Jeremiah7:26 La yãmb ka kelg ye; y ka yok y tʋbr ye; y naka y kãare; y wẽnema yɩɩga y saam-dãmba rẽnna. 
Jeremiah7:27 Foo, Zeremi, fo na n togs-b-la gom-bãmba fãa, la b kõn kelg-f ye. Fo na n taas-b-la m toollã, la b kõn leok-f ye." 
Jeremiah7:28 Wakat kãng marsã la f na n yeel-ba: Yãmb la buud ninga sẽn pa kelgd a Soaala, n pa kelgd Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga la a pa sakd b saglgo. Pʋ-peelem ka le be ye, a menema bãmb nengẽ." 
Jeremiah7:29 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela Zɩɩda nebã: Wõrs-y y zoob-wogdã n lobe. Wõrs-y zoobd niyns sẽn wilgd tɩ y rɩka y meng n kõ Wẽndã. Dʋ-y tãmsa zutu n pʋd sũ-sãang yɩɩlle. Zɩɩda, fo yaa buudu sẽn sãamd m sũuri m ka le rat-f ye, m lob-f-la kɛɛnga." 
Jeremiah7:30 N-yẽe! Soaalã n gomde, a Zɩɩda kamba maana sẽn ya wẽng m nifẽ. B ninga b rẽgdã, b wẽn-naandsa m dooga pʋga, doog ning m sẽn welg toore m meng yĩnga, la b rẽgem-a lame." 
Jeremiah7:31 Zɩɩda kẽedba kẽe Ben-Inom bãg-faagẽ, n me b yao rasãnde la yẽ sɛɛgẽ la b yõod b kom-pugli la b kom-dibli. Man yaool n zɩ n kos bũmb a woto, tagsg a woto zɩ n wa m yamẽ ye." 
Jeremiah7:32 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd gom woto: «Daar n na n wa zĩndi, tɩ b pa na n le bool tɩ Tofɛt bɩ Ben-Inom long ye, b na n boolame tɩ Tẽn-kũum longo.» Weer sẽn na n wa paoog yĩnga, Tofɛt meng n na n lebg kũuma lobr zĩiga." 
Jeremiah7:33 Tẽnga rãmb na n kii ka tɛka. B na n yɩɩ yĩngr luiili la we-yũus rɩɩbo. B na rɩ b rɩɩbo tɩ ned pa tol n dig-b ye. 
Jeremiah7:34 Mam na kɩt tɩ sũ-noog kaasgo la kilsgu buud fãa sɛ Zɩɩda sagsa pʋgẽ la Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu. B kõn le wʋm yikãad paalsa yɩɩl ye, tɩ tẽngã na n lebga raboogo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Soaala le paasame: Wẽnd kãnga b na n vaaga Zɩɩda dĩm dãmb kõaba b yaadẽ, b kug-zĩidba kõaba, b maan-kʋʋdba, b bãngdba, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb kõaba." 
Jeremiah8:2 B na n yɛdg-b-la wĩndga la kiuuga vẽenemẽ, yĩngr ãdsã vẽenemẽ, tɩ bãmb la b ra nonga, bãmb la b ra kʋʋd maando, bãmb la b ra pʋgd ne b sũur fãa, bãmb la b ra bʋgda n na n bãng beoog yɛla. Bãmb la b waoog yã. Kõaba pa na n n wʋk ye, b ka na n le bus yaoogẽ ye, b na n yɛdg-b-la wa birga." 
Jeremiah8:3 Buud yoog kãnga neba sẽn keesa yĩnga, b sẽn sẽeg n be zĩig ning fãa, ad-y ka vɩɩm n le tar yamleoog ye, lebga kũum. Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnda leok yã." 
Jeremiah8:4 Fo na n togs-b lame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n sokde: Ned lʋɩtame n zãgs yikr laa? Ned tudgda sore n zãgs a poorẽ lebr laa? 
Jeremiah8:5 Yaa bõe marsã tɩ Zerizalɛɛm dãmba wẽnemd b kãare la b ket n wẽenẽ tɩ b kõn tek zʋgo? B yam kẽ-la b wẽn-naandsã tɩ b zãgs a le wa kẽ maam. 
Jeremiah8:6 Mam kelga b sẽn gomda neere, la b goama ka be võor ye. Ned ba a ye sẽn yet t'a tudgame ka ye; sẽn sokd-a a meng tɩ bõe la a maan, ka ye. Ned kam fãa vẽegda beoogo n kẽnd a kẽn-faadã wa weef sẽn ka le mi-a sẽn lebdẽ, zabr zĩigẽ." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ba sigr-walle mi-la a sẽn na n teem tẽng wakato; walle, sɩlaalle, kʋʋl-n-ki, b fãa mi-la b tẽnga lebr wakato. Mam neba bala n ka mi Soaala sẽn kõ d noy niynsã." 
Jeremiah8:8 Yãmb tõog n yeelame: «Tõnd yaa neb sẽn tar yam vẽenem, tɩ Soaala wilga tõnd b raab la b noore.» Awa! Yãmb yɩta a wãn n gom woto tɩ sẽn gʋlsd-b Noora reegd-a n gʋlsd lɛbl-lɛbla n tudgd b taaba?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Yãnde na n yõka mitbã, tɩ b ka le yaa n mi b sẽn beẽ ye; b lɛɛg n lʋɩ-la b meng bẽdgẽ. B sẽn pa rat Soaala-Wẽnd Gomdã, b yam yẽesma na n naf-b-la wãn wãna?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Sẽn ya woto wã, Soaala n gomde, m na n dɩka b pagbã n kõ neb a taaba, n dees b pʋto n kõ sẽn dat-ba. Bãng-y tɩ b fãa gill, sẽn sɩng kom-bõonego, n digd bɛda yaa b meng yõod bal la b baooda; sẽn sɩng bãngda n wat maan-kʋʋda fãa yaa ninsaan-kazukma." 
Jeremiah8:11 B tɩbsda yood-yoodo mam bi-pugla sãmpogre, n yetẽ: «Laafi beeme, tɩ laafi yaool n kaẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah8:12 Y tẽedame tɩ b sẽn tʋmd beedã, b tʋʋm-wẽna yãnd tar-b lame bɩ? Yãnd ka baa bilfu! Reeg tɩ b kongame, yaa bũmb b sẽn ka mi lɛ-lɛ. Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Soaala yet-ba, tɩ b na n zĩnda sẽn lʋɩ-ba sʋka, b sã n wa yik ne bãmba." 
Jeremiah8:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yeelame: mam datẽ lame n paam bũmb bãmb nengẽ, la m pa ne bugsuntung biig bugsuntunga zug ye, m pa ne kankamd kankanga zug ye; tɩɩsa vãad wãkame; dɩlla m bas taale, bɩ b lebg so-loaadba soolem." 
Jeremiah8:14 Bõe tɩ ned kam fãa yɛs a zĩigẽ? D tigim taaba tɩ rẽ n são, d tɩ kẽ tãnsoben-tẽnse n gũ d kũuma beelẽ. Wẽnnaam d Soaala data d kũum, b rat n yũnug-d-la ko-zẽnem, la rẽ yaa d sẽn beeg-ba yĩnga." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tõnd da tẽeda laafi, la fɩ! Tõnd da saagda sãoogre, d tol n da gũuda a wakato, la yɛɛsg bala la d seg yã." 
Jeremiah8:16 Bɛ wã zoe n kẽe Dã, be rãmb wʋmda b wiidi wã sɛsga. B wed-daadã kɛleng miima tẽngã. B waame la bũmb kõn kell ye, tẽn-peelma ne a pʋgẽ teedo, na-tẽnga ne a kẽedba fãa." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ade, mam na n tʋma wag toose, la ka wiis sẽn tõe n saolg tɩ sao ye, b na n wa kɛ-y lame. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomda!" 
Jeremiah8:18 Sũ-sãang kãsenga n paam maam la m sũ-sãanga ka tar tɩɩm ye. 
Jeremiah8:19 Kelg-y tɩ yaa buudã n gomd woto, a boondame n kot sõngre, la a boolgã zĩig zãra, la a sokdame: «Soaala-Wẽnd ka leb n be Siõ yɛs laa? Siõ dĩma ka leb n be be laa?» Yaa bõe yĩng la b bao m noore n sak n waoogd wẽn-naandse, tẽn-zẽngẽ dãmba yel-yoodo?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Tigsgu wakat loogame, tʋʋlg wakat loogame la bala, la tõnd ket n gũuda fãagre." 
Jeremiah8:21 Yel-beed ninga sẽn lʋɩ buuda zugã n lɛɛg n dɩt maam M tara sẽn dɩt-a kʋʋr sũ-sãanga m yama yi-la m menga. 
Jeremiah8:22 Tɩɩm ka leb n be Galaad yɛs laa? Tɩpd ba a ye menga ka le be be laa? Bõe yĩnga tɩ m buuda bãag ka sãoogdẽ? 
Jeremiah8:23 M datẽ lame tɩ m zuga pidẽ ne koom tɩ m nina wukẽ ne nintãm, tɩ m tõog n kũmi, wĩndga la yʋngo, mam buuda neba sẽn ki wã!" 
Jeremiah9:1 M sã n da tõe n taẽ we-raoogẽ n paam n tiẽ so-toagd sẽko, m basdẽ la m buudã, m zãagdẽ-la ne-a. B fãa gill zãmbda b Soaala, wa pʋg-yoodre sẽn maan ne a sɩdã." 
Jeremiah9:2 Ad-y b zelemda yaa zab-teoog menga Soaalã n gomd boto. Zirẽ n so naam n yɩɩd sɩda, a Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. B sẽn tar beegre la b sẽn tare. B ka mi maam wa sẽn paood ye." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bɩ ned kam fãa gũus a menga ne a to, a ra pelg a pʋga ne a saam-biig ye, fo saam-biiga, bãng Zakoob a to zãmb ka tõe n ka zãmb ye, t'a tara pipi Zakooba zʋgo. Ad-y f zoa meng yaa tẽn-kãn-neda." 
Jeremiah9:4 Ned kam fãa zãmbda a to, sẽn togsda sɩd ka be ye b minima zirẽ yagbo, B ka tõe n le wa kẽ maam, b beegra sẽn ya wʋsg yĩnga." 
Jeremiah9:5 B goabg yaa pãn-tõogo b rɩtg yaa pãn-tõogo; zirẽ yagda rũnna n le yag beoogo; b pa rat tɩ tõnd seg taab ye, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Jeremiah9:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la dũni fãa Soaala gomda: M na n los-y-la bugmẽ tɩ y yɩlge m na n ning-y-la boaagẽ. M ka ne m sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, tɩ m buuda wẽnem sɩd pida wẽnem." 
Jeremiah9:7 B zelemd yaa wala pĩim b sẽn zẽne, sẽn zẽne neb kʋʋb yĩnga, b sẽn togsda yaa zirẽ-beedo. Goama yaa gom noodo, yɩnga, la pʋgẽ wã, b sũurẽ wã, yaa bẽdg la b bẽta." 
Jeremiah9:8 Y pa tẽed tɩ m tog n yika ne-ba, yaa Soaala n gomde, la m dok m sũuri ne neb a woto buud bɩ?" 
Jeremiah9:9 Tãmsã zutu mam zẽkda m koɛɛga m yãbra la m waasga sãtame; m pʋta m sũ-sãang yɩɩlle n yãbd rũmsa wãbneg zĩis sẽn lebg a soabã. Fãa rɩɩ bugum, ned ka le pɩkd be ye, b ka le wʋmd piisa rãamd ye. Luiil wala rũnga, ka le yãet ye, fãa loogame." 
Jeremiah9:10 M na n kɩtame, yaa Soaala n gomde, tɩ Zerizalɛɛm lebg raboogo, n lebg we-yũus gãaga, n kɩt tɩ Zɩɩda tẽnsa lebg we-raoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem tɩ ned ka leb n zĩ a pʋgẽ ye." 
Jeremiah9:11 Yam soaba a bõe n tõe n wilg yɛl kãensa võore? Sã n yaa Soaala n gom ne-a bɩ a wilg tẽnga wãab võore, n wilg bõe n kɩt t'a lebg we-raoogo tɩ ned ka le rat n tag a pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn leokde: «Yaa b sẽn pa tũ m sẽn wilgã, b sẽn tõdg Noor ninga mam sẽn da kõ-bã, b sẽn ka kelg m gomdã; yaa rẽ fãa yĩng la m bas-ba." 
Jeremiah9:13 B kʋɩɩsa b sũur n tũ wẽn-naandsa, a Baal dãmb sore, sor ning b ba rãmb sẽn zãms-b al b yãadmẽ." 
Jeremiah9:14 Dẽ n so tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama gomd woto: Ade, mam na n kõo nin-bãmba ko-tɩɩsga, la ko-zẽnem tɩ b yũ." 
Jeremiah9:15 Mam na n sẽeg-b-la bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ, m na n kẽes-b la tẽnsẽ bãmb sẽn ka mi, la b ba rãmb me sẽn ka bãng ye, m na kɩtame tɩ b pʋg-ba ne sʋʋse n kʋ-b pẽs.»" 
Jeremiah9:16 Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnd leok yã. Tẽeg-y n bool-y kʋ-yãbdba tɩ b wa! Tʋm-y tɩ b tɩ bool sẽn mi-b yãbr neer-neere tɩ rẽ yaa b tʋʋmna tɩ b wa! 
Jeremiah9:17 B wa ne yãgbo, la b yãb b yãbra n kũm-do al tɩ d mensa nin wa reeg n wuk ne nintãm al tɩ nintãm wa sord d nenga!" 
Jeremiah9:18 N-yẽe! Kũmkũma yita Siõ, a yita be tɩ d wʋmnẽ: «Aya! Ges-y d sẽn be zĩig ninga, d yãnda ka tõe n bilg ye, tɩ d tog n yii tẽngã, tɩ d rota fãa zoe n lʋɩɩme.»" 
Jeremiah9:19 Pagba, bɩ y kelg Soaala-Wẽnd gomd kãnga, yoog-y y tʋba n kelg b koɛɛga, zãms-y y kom-pugli wã sũ-sãang yɩɩl kãnga; b zãms b yags kũmkũm kãnga:" 
Jeremiah9:20 Kũum tũu tõnd dota vẽya n kẽ kũum kẽ-la d ro-neebẽ, a kʋʋda kamb sor zugu, n kʋʋd kom-bɩɩba sõasg zĩigẽ." 
Jeremiah9:21 Foo, Zeremi, togs-b Soaala gomd kãnga n paase: Neba kii n dʋra zĩis fãa, wala põosg sẽn gãneg pʋʋgẽ, wala kood sẽn kẽebe, wala kood sẽn lʋɩ tɩ wʋrdba gãndgd n loogdẽ." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Bɩ yam yẽesem soaba da maan wilg-m-menga ne a yẽesem ye! Bɩ pãng soaba, da maan wilg-m-menga ne a pãng ye! Bɩ arzɛk soaba da maan wilg-m-menga ne a arzɛk ye." 
Jeremiah9:23 Ned sã n dat n pẽg a menga bɩ yɩ a sẽn tõe n bãng maama, yɩ a sẽn mi maam a Soaala, n mi tɩ m pida ne nonglem n pid ne zemsgo m tʋʋma fãa, tẽng zugu, yaa pʋ-peelem tʋʋma. N-yẽe! Ya bãngr a woto n tat mam yam.» Soaala n gome." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ad daar n wate, Soaala koɛɛga, tɩ m na n yik ne sẽn kẽ-a bãongo sẽn ya yĩng bãong bala." 
Jeremiah9:25 Ad Ezipt rãmba Zɩɩda, Edom, Amon kamba, Moabitse la neb niyns fãa sẽn kõogd b yɛɛma, n vɩ zĩ-pɛɛlẽ. Tɩ bala tẽn-kãens rãmba la a Israyɛl buuda menga, ka kẽ b bãongã Soaala yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah10:1 Israyɛl buudu, kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga." 
Jeremiah10:2 Yaa woto la b gomda: Da nong-y n dɩk bu-zẽmba sor ye, Da maan-y dabeem ne bõn-bãna yãmb sẽn yãet yĩngrã, ba neb a taab sã n zoet-b rabeem." 
Jeremiah10:3 N-yẽe! Buud a taaba wẽn-tũudma ka bũmb a to n zʋʋg sobg ye. Gese, raoog bal la b kɛɛgd tʋgrẽ tɩ da-pɛɛsa pees wẽn-naande." 
Jeremiah10:4 B bolgd-a-la ne wanzurfu bɩ sãnem. B baooda kaadse la bũmb sẽn na n tall n ka, n maneg n ka sẽn peesã t'a tõog n yaas tɩrga" 
Jeremiah10:5 La wala belsem-belsem sẽn yag niir pʋʋgẽ, luiili yĩnga, ad-y wẽn-bãmb yɛsame la b ka mi goam ye; b sẽn pa kẽndã, dɩll b põk-ba. Da zoe-y bãmb rabeem ye, b pʋs n ka tõe n maan bũmb ye, b ka tõe bõn-wẽng y yĩnga, wa b sẽn ka tõe bõn-sõng y yĩnga." 
Jeremiah10:6 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb bal n ka tar mak-n-taaga Yãmb yʋʋra naaga y pãngã n sãag n ta zĩig zãnga." 
Jeremiah10:7 Dĩm dãmba fãa ne b soolma da tog n sulga b mens yãmb taoore, dẽ togame la segdame. Yam vẽenem dãmba fãa sʋka, y ka tar y to moog ye." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bãmb fãa gill kɛpi, yaa yalemse. Buud a taaba karen-doogẽ, f kõn bãng b wẽn-tũudma naoor n dɩk ye, f kõn zãms sẽn be yõod ye." 
Jeremiah10:9 Ya wanzurf sẽn yi Tarsis bɩ sãnem sẽn yi Ufaz, la b bẽesd pakls-paklse n tabend wẽn-naandsã sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paas b neerem. Pɛɛsã n peesd-ba tɩ yõaka tablgdẽ. B yeelgd-b-la fu-miidu, fu-mismiidu. Wẽn-naandsa fãa yaa ninsaal nug sẽn tʋme, a nug sẽn tʋm ne minim la bãngre." 
Jeremiah10:10 Sã n ya Soaala-Wẽnde, bãmb sɩd yaa Wẽnnaam, b yaa Wẽnd sẽn vɩ, b yaa Na-kãsenga, daar fãa yĩnga. B sã n puug b sũuri, tẽnga fãa miimdame; b sã n puug b sũuri, bu-zẽmba fãa ka le tar daood ye." 
Jeremiah10:11 Ad yãmb sẽn na n togs bu-zẽmba, togs-y-ba tɩ wẽn-naandsã, ka bãmb n naan yĩngr la tẽng ye la b na n menes-b-la tẽng zugu, weer ka na le zĩnd bãmb yĩnga, saaga tẽngr ye." 
Jeremiah10:12 Soaala-Wẽnd naana tẽngã n wilg b pãnga, b wilga b yẽesma n naan dũniyã; b wilga b yama-zulum n yɛdg saaga." 
Jeremiah10:13 Soaala-Wẽnd sã n gome kooma sẽn be yĩngra tigimda taaba, Sawad-tagd zẽkda yĩngri. Sa-yãgr sikda sa-koom, sobda kaoogdame n fugda." 
Jeremiah10:14 Sẽn yãenda woto fãa yɛsa yɛɛ, n ka wʋmd võor ye. Yãnd tara sẽn dõog-a wẽn-naandsã; b dõoga belsem-belsem, bũmb sẽn ka vɩ ye." 
Jeremiah10:15 B yaa wa sobg bala b yaa bũmb sẽn wat ne laado. Rẽ fãa yaa bũmb sẽn na n menese, Soaala-Wẽnd sã n wa yik ne-ba." 
Jeremiah10:16 Ad-y Soaala ka wẽnd bãmb ye, bãmb me ka wẽnd a Israyɛl Pʋɩɩr sõnga ye, b ka wẽnd dũni wã fãa Naanda ye. Dũni fãa Naanda la a Israyɛl Wẽnde, b yʋʋra la dũni fãa Soaala." 
Jeremiah10:17 Zerizalɛɛm, bɛɛba sẽn pag n gilgi wʋk f teedo n looge!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Ad Soaala gomda woto: «Mam na n diga tẽn-kãnga rãmba n zãag wʋsgo, la m sẽn na n pʋg-b pʋgb ningã, ba a ye kõn põs ye.»" 
Jeremiah10:19 Zerizalɛɛm yeta woto: Kato! Mam sãmpogra yaa kãsenga. La m da baas n yetame tɩ bãaga yaa mam bãaga, tɩ m na sak n deeg toogã." 
Jeremiah10:20 Mik m dooga sirgame, m sẽn ti-a ne pɛɛla, a wĩ wã fãa kaoome; mam kamba zoe n basa maam, ned ka le be n na n yik m doogã, tɩ m le paam m sẽn na n kẽẽ ye." 
Jeremiah10:21 Ad-y yaa taoor dãmba yelle, b maana yalemdo, b ka sok Soaalã n paam b leokr ye. Yaa rẽ la b raaba ka pids ye, yaa rẽ la b sẽeg b neba zãnga." 
Jeremiah10:22 Kelg-y rãamde, bʋʋr n kolgde: yaa bũmb n yit nug goabga, la a wata ne zũnd-zãnde; a na n kɩtame tɩ Zɩɩda tẽnsã lebg we-raoogo n kẽesd rabeem, n lebg we-yũus roogo." 
Jeremiah10:23 Mam miime, Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ ninsaal ka so a vɩɩm ye, so-toagd ka mi a sor sẽn na n baas to-to ye." 
Jeremiah10:24 Soaala-Wẽnde, sɩbg-y-ma, la ra yɩ ne sũ-puur ye, ra yɩ toog wʋsg ye, ka rẽ y wã-m-la zãnga." 
Jeremiah10:25 Ypug-y y sũuri ne bu-zẽmbã, ne neb niyns sẽn ka mi-b yãmbã, la ne neb niyns toog sẽn ka be ne yãmbã. Bãmb dãmb n zɛɛd y buudã, n zɛɛd a sẽn tar fãa, n wãad a tẽnga zãnga." 
Jeremiah11:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Zeremi n yeele: 
Jeremiah11:2 Tũ-y m sẽn kɩt tɩ y pʋlem bũmb ningã. La b le wa paasame: «Ad-y y sẽn na n togs Zɩɩda rãmba, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba." 
Jeremiah11:3 Fo na n wilg-b lame tɩ Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam gomda woto: m na n sɩbga ned ning fãa sẽn ka tũud m sẽn kɩt tɩ m buuda pʋlma;" 
Jeremiah11:4 yaa pʋleng ning y yaab rãmba sẽn pʋlme, m sẽn wa n yiis-b Ezipt, b namsga tẽngã. Wakat kãnga la m yeel-b tɩ b kelg la b tũ wa m sẽn wilgã tɩ yaa noor la m kõt-ba, la woto b na yɩ mam neba, la mam na lebg bãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah11:5 M na pids kãabg ninga mam sẽn kãab y ba rãmba n yet tɩ m na n kõo bãmb tẽnga, bĩisim la sɩɩd sẽn zoetẽ, tẽn-kãng la y sẽn be a soab pʋgẽ dũnna wã.» Tɩ maam a Zeremi leoke: «Soaala, yaa boto la d na n maane!»" 
Jeremiah11:6 La Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ la Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu, fo na n mooname n yeele: Maan-y wa y sẽn pʋlma, tũ-y m sẽn wilgã." 
Jeremiah11:7 M goma naoor yak ne y yaab rãmbã, m sẽn yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga wakato la m ket n tara yãmb dɩdgre dũnna, n kot-y tɩ y kelg-ma." 
Jeremiah11:8 La ad-b ka kɩll b tʋbre n kelg m goama ye. B pa kelg-a neer ye. Ned kam kʋɩɩsa a sũuri n kell n tũ a zʋg wẽnga. Woto bãmb sẽn zãgs tũubã mam me kong n pidsa m sẽn da kãabe.» 
Jeremiah11:9 Soaala-Wẽnd le paasame: «Sɩd-sɩda, Zɩɩda rãmba la Zerizalɛɛm rãmb gãe tẽngr n bilgd wẽnga." 
Jeremiah11:10 B leb n sɩnga tʋʋm wẽns niynsi b ba rãmba sẽn da tõdg mam noor n tʋma. B yõga zood ne wẽn-sãamse n waoog-ba. A Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda sãama zood ning m sẽn da yõg ne b yaab rãmbã, zood ninga sẽn da waa n yõgd tɩ saaga kũmdẽ la a yãgdã.»" 
Jeremiah11:11 Dẽ n so tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto: «Ade, mam na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed lʋɩ b zugu, la b kõn põs ye; b na n kelmame n wat mam nengẽ, la mam kõn kelg-b ye." 
Jeremiah11:12 Zɩɩda tẽnse, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba na n kẽngame n tɩ bõs sõngre. B sẽn waoog wẽnd niyns ne b kũna la b na n kos sõngre. Wẽnd kãens yaool n pa na n fãag-ba b yel-beeda raar ye." 
Jeremiah11:13 A Zɩɩda, tẽnsã sõor sẽn zem to-to, a wẽn-naandsa me sõor zema rẽnna. Maan-kuga sẽn me Zerizalɛɛm sõor zema a soya sõore. Bãmb zutu b na n kʋʋ maand n kõ b wẽn-dẽgd a Baal." 
Jeremiah11:14 Sã n ya foo, Zeremi, da saag n kos maam bũmb buud kãnga yĩng ye; da pʋʋs la f ra yõk m sɛɛg ye, tɩ m pa na n kelge, yell sã n wa pak-b ye, b sã n wa kot-m sõngr ye.»" 
Jeremiah11:15 Soaala gomda woto: «M sẽn nong buud ningã ka tar pʋ-peelem ye. A wata m doogẽ wã bõe yĩnga? A tẽedame t'a sẽn pʋlemd bũmb ninga bɩ a sẽn kõt-m maand niynsã, tõe n zãag-a-la ne yel-beed bɩ? Yel-beeda sã n wa n sɛ, a le tara tɩɩm bɩ?" 
Jeremiah11:16 M da pʋda a yʋʋr tɩ Oliviye sẽn tõe wombo, t'a biis ya sõmbo, t'a vãad sob n yɛsẽ. La ade, y sẽn wʋmd bʋʋr ningã, yaa bugum n dɩta ne pãnga, yaa a wila la b kaooda." 
Jeremiah11:17 Yaa dũni fãa Soaala-Wẽnd n da sel tɩɩgã la bãmb n wilgd-a marsã tɩ yel-beed be-la a zugu, a Israyɛl yel-wẽna yĩnga, a Zɩɩda yel-wẽna yĩnga. B kʋʋ maand n kõ a Baal, n beeg bãmb Soaalã.»" 
Jeremiah11:18 Soaala-Wẽnd wilg-m lame tɩ m bãng a Israyɛl neba sẽn be tẽngr n sʋgdã. 
Jeremiah11:19 La maam a Zeremi mam da yaa wala pe-bila b sẽn tar n dabd rũms kʋʋb zĩigẽ, m da ka mi tɩ b rat n tʋm-m-la beed ye. Ad-b sẽn da gomde: D kɛɛg tɩɩga sẽn tar pãngã n lubi; d yiis a bõn-vɩɩs sʋka tɩ ned ba a ye ra le tẽeg meng t'a zĩndame ye." 
Jeremiah11:20 La yãmba Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, yãmb bʋʋd fãa kaooda tɩrga. Yãmb mii sẽn solg sũurẽ, la m tẽedame tɩ m sẽn dɩk m yellã n bas ne yãmbã, m na yãend y sẽn dokd m sũuri." 
Jeremiah11:21 Bɩ Anatot rãmba bãng tɩ dũni fãa Wẽnd tara koɛɛg ne-ba, bãmb sẽn baood n na n kʋ maam la b yetẽ: «Fo ka na n le gom bãngr goam Soaala yʋʋr yĩng ye, ka rẽ tõnd nug n na n kʋ-fo!»" 
Jeremiah11:22 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto: «Ade, mam na n yika ne-ba la zabr sʋʋg n na n kʋ b kom-bɩɩba, tɩ kom loog ne b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli." 
Jeremiah11:23 Yʋʋmd ning m yel-beeda sẽn na n lʋɩ Anatot rãmba, zugu, ba a yembr meng kõn põs ye, na wʋm b fãa.»" 
Jeremiah12:1 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb pida ne zemsgo, woto m zãr ne m maan zabr ne yãmba. M yaool n nongẽ lame n bãnge yaa bõe yĩnga la nin-wẽnsa yɛl baasd neere? Bõe tɩ sẽn ka tũud-b yãmba, vɩ b laafi vɩɩm?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Bãmb sela wa tɩɩse b kɩɩda yẽgna, n bɩtẽ, n womd biisi. Yãmb yʋʋr pʋta b noorẽ tɩ b sũura yaool n zãr ne yãmba." 
Jeremiah12:3 Yãmba, Soaala, yãmb mii maam, yãmb nee maam, yãmb dat n bãngame tɩ m kẽeda yãmba. Sã n ya nin-wẽnsa, m na n kos-y lame tɩ y wʋk-ba wala piisi n tees b kʋʋb zĩigẽ. Bĩng-y-b toore, kodg la f kõ-m sʋʋg raara yĩnga!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Ges-y wɛ, tẽnga na n paa ne sũ-sãanga n ta wakat bʋgo? Ges-y weooga mood fãa sẽn kʋɩ, na n talla woto n ta wakat bʋgo? Tẽnga rãmb wẽnem yĩnga, dũmsã tara kũum, tɩ b yaool n be tẽngre n gomda: «Soaala-Wẽnd ka ne d sẽn maand ye.»" 
Jeremiah12:5 Fo sã n pa tõe n tũ sẽn zoet-b ne nao, fo yɩta a wãn n wags ne wiidi? Soaalã n gomde. Fo sã n zoe n yɛɛsdẽ n nan ket tẽng sẽn ka tar tʋga, fo na n maan wãna Zʋrdẽ tʋga sʋka?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ad-f saam-biisa menga, f buudu meng zãmba foo, yaa bɛɛb ka tɛka la b tigsd fo yĩnga. Da pelg f pʋg ne b ye, tɩ b na n goma ne foom gom noodo, goam sẽn zãr ne sɩda." 
Jeremiah12:7 Mam basa roog ning sẽn da ya m roogã, m basda m sẽn da so wã fãa M basda bɛɛba nusẽ m sẽn da nong wa m fãa-fãa." 
Jeremiah12:8 Mam neba yikame n na n yɩ toos ne maam. B yik n kelma maam wala weoog bõnyẽega; yaa rẽ la m pa nong-ba. 
Jeremiah12:9 Sẽn da ya-b mam soolma bãmb n lebg luin neera sɩlsa sẽn laand n pʋgda bɩ? Bɩ b tigim we-rũmsa fãa gilli! B tall-b fãa n wa kibsa rɩɩb zĩigẽ! 
Jeremiah12:10 Dũn-kɩɩmb wʋsgo waame n sãam mam bugsuntungu, b taba mam pʋʋgo, pʋʋga da yaa pʋ-sõngo; b kɩtame t'a lebg zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Jeremiah12:11 Tẽnga lebga sũ-sãang zĩiga, kʋʋr yãbre n yãbd a pʋgẽ. Tẽnga sãamame n dɩg m taoore la ned ka kũmd-a ye." 
Jeremiah12:12 Fãadba, tẽn-wãadba waa tãmsa zutu. Ad-y yaa wa Soaala zãada sʋʋg sẽn dɩte n vargd tẽnga fãa, la ned ba a ye ka na n põs ye." 
Jeremiah12:13 Y ra bʋda alkam, la gõos la y na n wʋre; y namsa y meng zaalem bala, y ka rok yõod ye. Y kooda yãnd tar-y lame. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd me sũura sẽn puug wʋsgã la y paam yãnd a woto fãa." 
Jeremiah12:14 Soaala-Wẽnd n yet woto, b buuda yags wẽnsa poorẽ: b saag n sɩɩsa vẽenem ning m sẽn da bẽeg n kõ a Israyɛl, m buudu. Woto ma me na rig-ba n yiis-b b tẽngẽ, wala m sẽn na n kẽ bãmb tẽngẽ n yiis a Zɩɩda kamba." 
Jeremiah12:15 M sã n yiis m nebã n sɛ, m na yaool marsã n zoe b yagsa nimbãanega, n kɩt tɩ ned kam fãa kẽng a soolmẽ, tɩ ned kam fãa leb a tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah12:16 B ra zãmsa m buuda t'a wẽend ne a Baal yʋʋre. La b sã n tõog n zãms n vɩɩnd wa m neba sẽn tog n vɩɩndã, b sã n wẽend ne Soaala, ne Vɩɩm Naaba yʋʋre, bãmb me na paam zĩiga m buuda sʋka." 
Jeremiah12:17 La b sã n ka rat n tũ dẽnna, m na n dig-b lame n yiisi, la b na menem moogo. Soaala-Wẽnd n gome." 
Jeremiah13:1 Ad noor ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ-ma: «Kẽng n tɩ ra sẽbdga sẽn wʋg ne beren-dɩgr gĩsi, n sẽbg f sɛɛga. Da los-a koomẽ n pek ye.»" 
Jeremiah13:2 Mam daa sẽbdga, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg-ma, n sẽgne." 
Jeremiah13:3 Naoor a yiib soaba, Soaala-Wẽnd waame n gom ne-ma, n yeele:" 
Jeremiah13:4 «Dɩk sẽbdga f sẽn da sẽgna. Aya, yiki! Kẽng Efrat kʋɩlga n tɩ solg-a pĩig bokẽ.»" 
Jeremiah13:5 Mam sɩd kẽngame n tɩ maan wala Soaala-Wẽnda sẽn kõ maam noorã. 
Jeremiah13:6 Sẽn kaoos wʋsg dẽ poore, Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: «Aya, yiki! Mam sẽn da kõ foom noor tɩ f tɩ solg sẽbgd ningã, kẽng Efrat kʋɩlga n tɩ rɩk-a n wa!»" 
Jeremiah13:7 Mam kẽnga Efrat n tɩ rɩk sẽbdgã mam sẽn da solgã. La mam mikame t'a sãamame n ka le tar yõod yɛs ye. 
Jeremiah13:8 Dẽ zugẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeele:" 
Jeremiah13:9 Ad-m koɛɛg: «Yaa woto la m na n sik a Zɩɩda zẽk-m-menga, n sãam Zerizalɛɛm neerma." 
Jeremiah13:10 Nin-bãmba sẽn tõdge tɩ b ka na n kelg mam goama, nin-bãmba sẽn tũud b sũ-wẽnga sẽn kʋɩ wa kugri, la b zoet n pʋdg wẽn-naandse n wõgemd b taoore n waoogd-ba, mam me na n kɩtame, tɩ b lebg wala sẽbdg kãnga sẽn põog n ka leb n tar võor yɛsã." 
Jeremiah13:11 Wala sẽbdga sẽn sẽbdg ned sɛɛga, boto me mam da ratame t'a Israyɛl buuda fãa, a Zɩɩda buuda fãa tũ maam koɛɛga, n lebg mam neba, mam zu-zẽkre, mam waoogre, la mam faongo, la ade, b pa kelg ye.»" 
Jeremiah13:12 Fo na n yeela nin-bãmba: «Maam a Israyɛl Wẽndã n gomde. Yʋʋr yagda a na sui rãam.» La b sã n leok foom: «Tɩ ãnda n ka mi tɩ yʋʋr fãa tõe n pidsa ne rãam,»" 
Jeremiah13:13 fo na yeel-ba: «Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd woto: Ade, mam na n tɩgsa tẽn-kãnga rãmb fãa ne rãam; m na n tɩgsa b dĩm dãmb sẽn zĩ a Daviid naam goeel zugu, maan-kʋʋdba, bãngdba, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmb fãa." 
Jeremiah13:14 Dẽ poore mam na n sãama b fãa yell ne taaba. M na n kalma ba rãmb ne b kamba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gome, la sugr ka ye, nimbãan-zoeer ka ye, m na kʋ-b fãa.»" 
Jeremiah13:15 Kelg-y yã, yoog-y y tʋba, da maan-y tɩtaam ye, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Jeremiah13:16 Yeel-b tɩ b waoog bãmb Soaala la b Wẽnnaam, tɩ b nin ket n neẽ n da wa kẽnd n lagsd tãms ne lik ye. Yãmb da gũuda beoog vẽegre, la m na n kɩtame tɩ vẽenem lebg lik bãm, wala saag n kʋɩ." 
Jeremiah13:17 Yãmb sã n ka kelge, m yama na n bondgame, tɩtaam a woto yĩnga, mam nintãm na n dʋʋgame, n dʋʋg zembal waare, tɩ yaa pa-weere la b tar Soaala wubrã n dabda." 
Jeremiah13:18 Togs dĩma ne a ma wã: Zĩnd-y tẽnga, tɩ ad yãmb naama pugla, fõka yãmb zugẽ n lʋɩ." 
Jeremiah13:19 B paga Negɛb tẽnsa kʋɩlense. Ned ka le tõe n kẽ be ye. B talla Zɩɩda tẽnga fãa tõre n na n loog pa-weere. Pa-weera yaa b fãa gill n na n looge. 
Jeremiah13:20 Zerizalɛɛm zẽk f nin n gese, ges f bɛɛb sẽn yit Goabg n watẽ. Piis niynsi b sẽn dɩk n gũnug fooma, b yell na n yɩ-la a wãna? Piis niynsi sẽn da ya fo zu-zẽkrã b yell na n yɩ-la a wãna?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Fo na n yeelame tɩ bõe, fo sẽn minim b rãmba, sẽn lebg-b fo sõsd-n-taasa sã n wa yik ne foo n na n soog foo, ad-f na n wʋma toog bala wa paga sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Jeremiah13:22 La fo sã n yeel f sũurẽ: «Bõe n maane tɩ yell kãensã fãa wa lʋɩ mam zug woto?» Bãng tɩ yaa fo wẽnema sẽn ka tɛka yĩnga la b kolemd fo futu n ningd f yãnde. 
Jeremiah13:23 Etiopi ned tõeeme n tek a gãong bi? Ãbg tõeeme n tek a kõbg bi? La yãmba, yãmb sẽn tar yel-wẽna minungã, yãmb tõeeme n maan neer bi?" 
Jeremiah13:24 Mam na n sẽeg-f lame, Zerizalɛɛm wala sobgo sẽn sẽegd mo-faado, zĩ-pɛɛlẽ." 
Jeremiah13:25 Fo pʋɩɩr la woto, fo zẽk-m-meng dolbo la woto. Woto yita mam nengẽ, yaa f Soaala-Wẽnda koɛɛga, tɩ ya maam f Wẽnda la fo yĩm yã, n dɩk f menga n kɩs zirẽ." 
Jeremiah13:26 Mam menga, maam f Wẽnnaam n na n kolemd f futã n ta f nenga, tɩ neb yãend f yãnde." 
Jeremiah13:27 Kato! Fo yooba tʋʋma, la fo sũ-nood wẽnsa kaasgã, f tʋʋm dẽgdã fãa sẽn wat ne f yãndã, m yãend-b-la fãa gilli. M yãenda tãmsa zutu, la wetẽ wã fãa, f wẽn-naandsa gilli! Kato! Zerizalɛɛm, bõe tɩ f pa rat n yɩlg ne f rẽgdã? Na n yɩɩ woto n ta da-bʋre?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas koɛɛg ning a Zeremi war kãsenga wakato. 
Jeremiah14:2 A Zɩɩda rɩta a kamb kʋʋre sũ-noog fãa sɛ-la a tẽn-kogsẽ, fãa pida ne lik la sũ-sãanga, Zerizalɛɛm waasg bal la b wʋmda." 
Jeremiah14:3 Taoor dãmba yiisa b nebã tɩ b tɩ bao koom n wa la b sẽn ta kʋɩlgẽ b mikame tɩ koom ka ye, tɩ b na n leb n wa ne yʋ-vɩɩdo. Yãnd tar-b lame, tɩ b lud b zutu." 
Jeremiah14:4 Pʋt ka le kõt bũmb ye, saag kaalem yĩnga; yãnd tara koaadba tɩ b lut b zutu. B nee tẽnga sẽn tãs mugnum." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ba yãk sẽn be weoogẽ, a sã n dog a biiga, a basd-a lame n zoe, yamd kaalem yĩnga." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kunkuba zutu, yamd ka le ket ye, Burguma yɛsa wa waase n kokd yũugu. Ad-y b nina yiigame la yaa mo-maas la b saad n baoodẽ, la mo-maas ka le ket ye." 
Jeremiah14:7 Tõnd tʋʋm wẽnsã sã n kɩt tɩ tõnd yãend woto, Soaala, bɩ y maan y sẽn na n maanega, yãmb yʋʋr pẽgr yĩnga. Yaa sɩda, tõnd wilg-m-menga ka tɛk ye, tõnd maana yel-wẽna n ka sak n sulg d mens yãmb taoore ye, tõnd beega yãmba." 
Jeremiah14:8 Soaala, a Israyɛl teegda, a Israyɛl Fãagda, yel-pakdem wakato, bõe yĩnga tɩ yãmb maandẽ wala y yaa sãan tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, wala so-toagd sẽn ta tẽngẽ n na n gãand be la a yik n loog bala?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Yaa bõe yĩnga la y maand wa nin-bãada, wala gãndaoogo sẽn ka tõe n fãag a taaba? Yãmb be-la d sʋka, Soaala, Yãmb n so tõnd gõeem la d gũsma da bas-y-d tɩ d lʋɩ ye!" 
Jeremiah14:10 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn gomd nin-kãensã poorẽ: «B nong n saada zĩis fãa, b ka zoet kẽna ye! La Soaala-Wẽnd toog ka be ne b ye; marsã b na n tẽega b yel-wẽna n sɩbg-ba.»" 
Jeremiah14:11 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel maam: «Da bao nin-bãmba sõngr ye, da bao b sũ-noog ye." 
Jeremiah14:12 Ba b sã n loet noore, mam kõn deeg b pʋʋsg ye; ba b sã n kʋʋd maoongo, la b tar kũuna n watẽ, mam toog ka ne nin-bãmba ye; mam na kʋ b fãa gill pẽs ne sʋʋga, ne kom la ne bã-longdem.»" 
Jeremiah14:13 La mam leokame: «Soaala-Wẽnde, bãngdba yet-b lame: ‹Y kõn seg sʋʋga, y kõn seg kom ye, kaalẽ y yɛla na n manegame n paas bala.› »" 
Jeremiah14:14 Dẽ la Soaala me yeel-m: «Bãngdba sẽn yet tɩ b gomda mam yʋʋr yĩnga, ad yaa zirẽ-beedo. M ka tʋm-b ye, m ka kõ-b noor ye, m ka yeel-b tɩ bũmb ye. B pa ne fɩ; b togsda sẽn ka na n yɩ ye; b yʋng zãmsd la b togsda, yaa rẽ bala.»" 
Jeremiah14:15 Dẽ n so tɩ m meng yet woto bãngdba poorẽ: «Ka maam n tʋm-b ye, yaa bãmb n yik b toore n gomd tɩ maam n yeele tɩ zabre la kom kõn zĩnd tẽn-kãnga ye. Bɩ b bãng tɩ yaa zabre la kom n na n menes-b fãa gill." 
Jeremiah14:16 Sã n ya ne buuda neba sẽn kelg-b zirẽ-beedã, bãmb fãa la zabre la kom na n gãneg Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu la ned kõn zĩnd sẽn na n mum-b ye, bãmb ne b pagba, b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n lebs-b-la b wẽnema.»" 
Jeremiah14:17 Fo na n taas-b-la koe-kãnga: M datẽ lame tɩ m nina pidẽ ne nintãm, n pid yʋngo la wĩndga, al tɩ laafi kaẽ ye, tɩ m buuda paama sãmpogr kãsenga, a nodra yaa solenkẽega." 
Jeremiah14:18 Mam sã n yi we-kɛɛnga mam yãetame tɩ neb n gãe, zabra sʋʋg n kʋ bãmba; mam sã n kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ yaa koma sẽn kʋ b rãmba la m yãeta. Bãngdba ne maan-kʋʋdba saaga tẽngã, b ka tar yella moor ye." 
Jeremiah14:19 Woto la buuda sokd Soaala: Y basa a Zɩɩda kɛɛng laa? A Siõ yaanda y sũur laa? Bõe tɩ d sãmpogra ka tõe n maage? D da tẽedame tɩ yɛla na n wa zemsame, la fɩ ka teem ye. D da gũuda d noada maagre, la d zĩi ne yɩɩre." 
Jeremiah14:20 Soaala d miime tɩ d ka maan neer ye, tõnd deegame tɩ d ba rãmb tʋʋm yɩɩ wẽnse; tõnd beega yãmba." 
Jeremiah14:21 Maan-y sugri tɩ y yʋʋra ra wa tũ rẽ n sãam ye. Da maan-y wa y ka le rat y ziira goeel ye, da tus-y y goeelã n serg ye. Tẽeg-y y sẽn kãab tõndã, da sãam-y y zooda ne tõnd ye." 
Jeremiah14:22 Bu-zẽmba wẽn-naandsa sʋka yɛɛlẽ soaba n tõe n bool saaga? Yaa saagã n wat ne saas bɩ? M yet yaa yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnde. Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb la d teegre, yãmb la bũmb fãa Naanda." 
Jeremiah15:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yeel-ma: «Ba yaa a Moyiiz ne a Samwɛl n yõkd m sɛɛg buud kãng yĩnga, b kõn tõog tɩ m yama tedg ye. Dig buud a woto t'a menem mam taoore n zãag zĩiga." 
Jeremiah15:2 La b sã n sok-fo: ‹D na n kẽnga yɛ?› Bɩ f leok-b tɩ Soaala goma woto: ‹Ned kam fãa ne a sẽn tog ne: bã-longdem n kʋʋd kẽere kẽer yaa sʋʋga, kẽer yaa kom, kẽer na n looga pa-weere.› »" 
Jeremiah15:3 Soaala-Wẽnd gomdame tɩ bũmb a naase n na n sõng-ba n zabe: sʋʋg na n kʋ-b lame, bãas na n vu-b lame, yɩbrendo la we-yũusi n na dɩ-ba, n menes-ba." 
Jeremiah15:4 Woto dũni wã pʋgẽ dãmba fãa na yãend la b yɛɛse. Ad-y ka ned a to yell ye, yaa Zɩɩda dĩma a Ezekiyas biiga, a Manase, yelle; a maana sẽn ka neere Zerizalɛɛm." 
Jeremiah15:5 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sokd Zerizalɛɛm: Ned ba a ye ka le ket moogo sẽn na n zoe fo nimbãaneg laa? Ned ka ket sẽn na n kũm-fo, la a sok-f n ges f gãas yaa wãna?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Mik yaa fo meng n yeele tɩ f toog ka le be ne maam ye, fo n tud maam f zãnkudga. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m sɩbg-fo. Mam yɛɛ ne belsgo!" 
Jeremiah15:7 Tẽnga fãa sagsẽ, m waa ne m zɛɛdga, n na n yelg tɩ sobg loog ne-ba. M monga m buuda kamba, n boog a neba sõore. Ne rẽ fãa a pa tek a manesem ye." 
Jeremiah15:8 M kɩtame tɩ b pʋg-kõapa sõore yɩɩd bĩisra sẽn be mogra noore. Mam kɩtame tɩ fãada wa wĩnto-sʋka n sɩng zabre ne tãb-biig ma, vugr bala a yɛɛsa yɛɛsg kãsenga." 
Jeremiah15:9 Pag ninga sẽn doga kamb a yopoe wã pʋg kang vʋʋsma tulga a yãoogẽ, A wĩndga lʋɩɩme tɩ daara nan ka ta a pʋɩ-sʋk ye. A konga waoor n zĩ ne yãnde. Neb a taaba sẽn kell-ba ra tẽ põasg ye; m na n bas-b-la bɛɛba nusẽ: Soaala n togs rẽnna." 
Jeremiah15:10 M ma, fo ra ka rogẽ-ma, m kõn tɩlgẽ ne yel-beedo! Tẽnga pʋgẽ, maam la b kisa, maam la b tugd beem. M ka peng ned ye ned me ka peng-m ligd ye, la neba fãa naaga taab n kis-ma." 
Jeremiah15:11 Dẽ la Soaala yeel yã: M wẽendame tɩ neer maaneg yĩnga m bas-f lame tɩ f so f menga. M na tus bɛ wã menga t'a wa yõk f sɛɛga a pɛt la a yɩɩr wakato. 
Jeremiah15:12 Kut na kaooge, Goabg zamaanẽ dãmb kutu, bɩ b zũudu, fo maanda a wãna n kaoog-ba?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Gese, Zɩɩda, fo arzɛka la f paoong fãa, m dɩk-b lame n basd ne fãadba. Woto la f na n yao f yel-wẽna, yel-wẽna fo sẽn maan tẽnga fãa pʋgẽ wã." 
Jeremiah15:14 F na n lebga yamba f bɛɛba tẽngẽ, tẽng f sẽn ka mi la sẽn zãre. Sɩda m sũura wuka ne foo, m sũura widga bugum." 
Jeremiah15:15 Soaala, yãmb mii yell ning sẽn pak maama. Dẽnd yĩnga tẽeg-y m yelle, sɩbg-y m bɛɛba n dok m sũuri. Da kaoos-y waoong ye. Y meng miime tɩ yaa yãmb yĩnga la m basd tɩ b tʋʋsd-m." 
Jeremiah15:16 Mam sã n da wʋm yãmb gomd fãa, mam da kelgd-a-la neere, y goama ra pidsda maam ne sũ-noogo, m sũura ra tosda kaam, tɩ m dɩka m meng zãng n kõ yãmba, dũni fãa Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah15:17 Abada, m ka bao reem, m ka na n tɩ naag sẽn nong-b reema tɩ sũ-noog la m baood ye Yãmb modg-m lame tɩ m pa kɛɛnga, y kɩtame tɩ m sũura yik ne ba." 
Jeremiah15:18 Yaa bõe tɩ mam namsg ka sɛtẽ, tɩ mam sãmpogr kẽ pãafo, tɩ tɩɩm buudu ka be n tõe n sãoog-a? Sɩd-sɩda, yãmb belga maam y belg-m-la wala kʋɩls kẽere, n pid dũnna n daannẽ n yik beoog n ya koɛɛnga." 
Jeremiah15:19 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn leok-m bũmb ninga: Fo sã n leb n wa, ne m sõngre m na n le reeg foo f tʋʋmnẽ. F sã n mi tɩ ka goam vɩɩd la f na n gome, f sã n mi tɩ f na n goma sẽn be yõodo, fo na yɩ m no-rɛɛsa. Yaa Zɩɩda rãmba n na n lɛɛg n kẽ foo, ka foo n na n pʋg bãmb ye." 
Jeremiah15:20 Bãmb taoore, m na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg wala zũud-lalga, bũmb sẽn ka tusd n lub naana. B na n zaba ne foom, la b kõn tõog foom abada, tɩ bala, mam bee ne foom, n na n fãag fo, n na n yiis f roogo. Soaala-Wẽnd n leok rẽnna." 
Jeremiah15:21 Mam na n fãaga foom nin-wẽnsã nugẽ, la m zãag-f ne pãn-tõog rãmba pãnga." 
Jeremiah16:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m-la woto: 
Jeremiah16:2 «Da rɩk paga n dog bi-ribla bɩ bi-pugl zĩ-kãnga ye. 
Jeremiah16:3 Ad-m menga sẽn yet bũmb ninga kom-dibli la kom-pugli wã sẽn na n dog zĩ-kãnga poorẽ, b ba rãmba, b ma rãmba, poorẽ." 
Jeremiah16:4 Koma na n nams-b lame n kʋ-ba. B kõn paam yaoogo, b kõn yãmb b kʋʋr ye; b na n lebga põosg bala, n dʋr tẽnga. Sʋʋga la kom n na n kʋ-ba, la b na na lebga yĩngr luiili la we-rũms rɩɩbo.»" 
Jeremiah16:5 Sɩda, Soaala-Wẽnd le yeel-m-la woto: «Da kẽ kũum sẽn ki zak ning pʋg ye; da yãbe, la f da kũm zaka rãmb ye, tɩ mam zãaga m laafi, la m nimbãan-zoeere ne-ba." 
Jeremiah16:6 Nin-bɛd woo, kom-bõoneg woo, sẽn be tẽn-kãnga, b fãa na n kiime, b kõn paam mumb ye, la b kõn kelem b kʋʋr me ye; ned kõn põng zugu la ned kõn kɩɩs a yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah16:7 Ned sã n tar kʋʋre, a buuda ka na n paam tɩ b wa maas a sũuri la b kõ-a rɩɩb ye. B ka na n kõ kʋʋra soab rãam t'a yũ n gãneg a sũuri, a ba bɩ a ma sẽn ki yĩng ye." 
Jeremiah16:8 Neb sã n be zakẽ n maand kibsa, da kẽ be n naag-b n zĩnd n dɩ la f yũ ye," 
Jeremiah16:9 tɩ woto la m gomda, maam dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽndã, la m yetame tɩ m na n sɛɛsa kibs fãa bʋʋre, n sɛɛs sũ-noog kaasgo la kãad-paalsa yɩɩla. La rẽ fãa na n yɩ-la y nifẽ." 
Jeremiah16:10 Fo sã n wa taas nin-bãmba koe-kãnga, tõe tɩ b sok foom tɩ yaa bõe yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd kãabd tõnd kãab-wẽns a woto fãa? Yell bʋgo la tõnd maan yã? Yel-wẽnd bʋgo la tõnd maan n beeg Soaala-Wẽnde?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Fo na n leok-b lame: ‹Yaa yãmb ba rãmba sẽn bas maama yĩnga, n bas maam n tũ wẽn-sãamse, n maan b yam, la b wõgemd b taoore n waoog-bã. Sã n ya maam, m leokd-b lame tɩ b basa maam, b ka reeg mam noor ye. Soaalã n gomde!" 
Jeremiah16:12 Sã n ya yãmba, yãmb wẽnem yɩɩda y ba rãmb dẽnna. Ade, yãmb ned kam fãa tũ-la a sũurã sẽn dat wẽng ninga n ka kelg mam goama ye." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ad-y mam na n diga yãmb n yiis tẽn-kãnga tɩ y kẽng tẽngẽ yãmb sẽn ka mi ye, la y ba rãmba me sẽn ka bãng ye. Beenẽ, wĩntoog la yʋngo, y na n waooga wẽn-sãamse tɩ m na n maana wa m toog ka le be ne yãmb yɛs ye.› »" 
Jeremiah16:14 Wakat n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga, tɩ b ka na n leb n yeele: «M wẽend ne Soaala sẽn vɩ la sẽn yiis-a a Israyɛl Ezipt dãmb tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah16:15 B na n yeelame: ‹M wẽend ne Soaala sẽn vɩ la sẽn tɩ reeg a Israyɛl nug goabg tẽnsẽ, la tẽns niyns b sẽn da sẽeg-ba fãa.› M na n tall-b lame n wa tẽng ninga mam sẽn da kõ b ba rãmba.»" 
Jeremiah16:16 Ade, mam a Wẽnde, m na n tʋma kʋɩl-zẽ-yẽedba wʋsg-wʋsgo tɩ b tɩ yõg-ba, la m na n tʋma tãoos rãmba tɩ b tɩ rig-b zĩis fãa: tãms zutu, kukumba zutu, la pĩis bogdẽ." 
Jeremiah16:17 Mam nin nee b soya fãa, b manesma fãa ka solg-m ye la mam mi-la b yel-wẽna fãa." 
Jeremiah16:18 Mam na n sɩbg-b-la b yel-manesem a yiib yĩnga, m na n sɩbg-b-lame tɩ b rẽgma m tẽngã la b ra pids-a-la ne b waoosa la b yell yoodã." 
Jeremiah16:19 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb la m pãnga, m teegd fãa-fãa, m gũuda, m soondg zĩiga m yɩɩr wakato! Ad-y bu-zẽmba na n yii zĩis fãa n wa yãmb taoore. B na n yeelame: D ba rãmba sẽn da pʋgd wẽnd niynsã yaa belgem-belgem bala, yaa sobgo, yaa zaalem." 
Jeremiah16:20 Ninsaalba sẽn ka wẽndã tõe n naana wẽnd n kõ b mens bɩ? 
Jeremiah16:21 Ade, dũnna sẽ, Soaala n gomde, m na kɩt tɩ b bãng mam tõog sẽn ya a soaba, mam nug pãng sẽn ya to-to! B na bãng marsã tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah17:1 A Zɩɩda yel-wẽnda gʋlsa ne kut kɩtga ne kɩtg keglem sẽn pid keglem. Gʋlsma gʋlsa ninsaal sũurẽ. Yaa bũmb sẽn dɩg vẽenega wa maan-kuga sẽn me zĩig zãngã. 
Jeremiah17:2 Bãng-y tɩ wala ned sẽn gomd a kamb yelle, yaa b maan-kuga yell la b gomda, n gomd ra-lugã sẽn sel kunkuba zut bɩ tɩɩsa sẽn gũma maasmẽ." 
Jeremiah17:3 M sẽn na n bas tɩ zɛɛdba zɛ n loog ne wã, na n yɩɩ foom a Zɩɩda, sẽn waoogd wẽn-naandsã la f pʋgd-b pʋt noore bɩ tãmsa zutu. Na n yɩɩ f arzɛka, f laoga fãa la b na n loog ne. La rẽ n na n yɩ f sɩbgre, f wẽn-naandsa pʋgba sɩbgre." 
Jeremiah17:4 Woto me la f na n yao pʋta la rũmsa lemse f sẽn da zãgs yaoob pĩndã. F meng n na lebg yaoodã bɛɛba nusẽ, pa-weer tẽngẽ. Woto me la f bãngd tɩ f widga m sũura bugum la bũmb kõn le tõog n kiis-a ye." 
Jeremiah17:5 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto: M na gesa wa ka bark soaba, ned sẽn wẽnemda a kãar n tees maam, ned sẽn teeg ninsaala, nemd bala." 
Jeremiah17:6 A yell na n yɩɩ wa tuugu sẽn be zĩ-koɛɛngẽ, a ka tẽed zu-noog ba bilfu. A yɛsa a ye we-raooga kuga sʋka, a sela birg sẽn paoog zĩigẽ, yaa zĩ-peen-daaga, yaa yams-neere." 
Jeremiah17:7 M yaool n ningda barka ned ninga sẽn teegda maam, n dɩkd a menga n ningd maam nugẽ." 
Jeremiah17:8 A yell na n yɩɩ wa tɩɩga sẽn sel kʋɩlg noore, t'a yẽgna tẽeg n tat kooma. A ka na n zoe rabeem, tʋʋlg ye, a vãada ka na n kʋɩ ye. Ba ya sa-paoor yʋʋmde, a ka ne a sẽn na n bʋ bũmb ning poorẽ ye, Biisa sẽn tar wombo la b sẽn tare." 
Jeremiah17:9 Ninsaal sũur pida ne sẽn golme, sẽn golme n ka le tõe n tẽeg ye. Ãnda n tõe meng n bãng sẽn be sũurẽ?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, maam bala n vɛɛsd ninsaal tagsgo, maam bal n ne sẽn be a sũurẽ, maam bal n tar ned yel-manesem fãa n tõe n wa rol-a." 
Jeremiah17:11 Ad-y ned sẽn tũ noor tõdgre n lebg arzɛk soaba, wẽnda koadeng sẽn wũg gɛla, gɛla a sẽn pa lobe. A arzɛka menemda a nifẽ la a vɩɩma baasgẽ, t'a yama menem n bas-a-la zãnga." 
Jeremiah17:12 Al dũni sɩngrẽ tõnd wẽnd doogo tɩ zaoolga yĩngr wala naam zaoore. 
Jeremiah17:13 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb la a Israyɛl saagre, la sẽn ka pʋgd-b yãmbã, bãmb na looga ne yãnde. Sẽn wẽnemd-b b kãare n tees yãmbã bãmb yʋʋra kõn pa dũniya, t'a gʋlsa tom zugu. La rẽ yaa b sẽn bas yãmba, vɩɩma ko-nifu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Tũuda ne yãmba, Soaala tɩ m paam tɩlgre. Fãag-y maam tɩ m na põse, M ziira zãng-zãng la yãmba." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ad neba fãa sẽn sokde: «Soaala gomda na n pidsa da-bʋre? Bɩ b bas b gomda t'a pids wɛ!» 
Jeremiah17:16 Soaala, ka maam n dɩdgd yãmba tɩ y bool yel-beeda ye, m pa kos tɩ y bas-a t'a lʋɩ d zug ye; y mii rẽ neere; y ket n tẽra m sẽn yaag m noor n togs fãa." 
Jeremiah17:17 Da maan-y tɩ m wa ka le mi m sẽn beẽ ye tɩ yel-beed sã n wa fãa, yaa yãmb nengẽ la m wat n soonde." 
Jeremiah17:18 Sẽn namsd-b maama n togẽ ne yãnde, kaẽ maam ye. Bãmb n tog n zĩẽ ne sũ-sãanga la kaẽ maam ye. Bool-y yel-beeda raare n kõ-ba, pãb-y-ba n beds zãnga." 
Jeremiah17:19 Soaala-Wẽnd meng n yeel maam: Kẽng n tɩ yals buuda dignoorẽ; dignoor ninga a Zɩɩda nanamse sẽn tũud n kẽedẽ la b yitã. Dẽ poore, saag Zerizalɛɛm dignoya fãa." 
Jeremiah17:20 Fo na n yeel-b lame: Kelg-y Soaala koɛɛga, Zɩɩda nanamse, Zɩɩda rãmba, Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba, la yãmb fãa sẽn tũud a kʋɩlensã n kẽedẽ la y yitã." 
Jeremiah17:21 Soaala-Wẽnd yet-y lame tɩ y gũus y menga la y da tʋk zɩɩbo, vʋʋsga raar ye. Da sak-y tɩ b tall zɩɩbo n tũ Zerizalɛɛm dignoya n kẽ ye." 
Jeremiah17:22 Da tʋk-y zɩɩbo n yi yãmb zagsẽ, vʋʋsga raar ye. Baraare da tʋm-y tʋʋmd ye. Yaa Soaala raare wala m sẽn da wilg y ba rãmba." 
Jeremiah17:23 Yaa sɩda tɩ ba rãmba pa kelg ye; b pa kɩll b tʋbre n kelg goama neer ye. B naka b kãare, b pa tʋlg n kelge, b pa tʋlg m deeg saglgo ba a ye." 
Jeremiah17:24 Yãmba, b kamba,- yaa Soaala n gomde — yãmb sã n kelg-m neere, vʋʋsga raare, y sã n ka sak tɩ b tʋk zɩɩbo, zɩɩb buud ba a ye, n tũ tẽn-kãnga dignoya n kẽ, tɩ daara yaa m daare la y kõn tʋm tʋʋmd buud ba a ye," 
Jeremiah17:25 ad-y y dĩm dãmba sẽn zao a Daviid naama goeela zugu, n kẽnd ne wiidi bɩ n zao bilim-bilm, bãmb ne b kug-zĩidba, bãmb ne Zɩɩda neba la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, bãmb fãa na n kell n tũuda noya n kẽed tẽngã la neba na n kell n pa-la a pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah17:26 Sã n ya woto neb na n yii Zɩɩda tẽnga n wa pid wẽnd doogã. B na n yii Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ, Zerizalɛɛm tẽn-kɩremse, a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ, kunkuba zutu, bãg-faagẽ, la Negɛb zĩ-pɛɛlẽ. B na n wa kʋʋ maando, maanda buud toor-toore: yũ-nood maando, laafi kosg maando, bark pʋʋsg maando, n paas alkam la tɩdar kũuni." 
Jeremiah17:27 La yãmb sã n ka kelg mam goama, y sã n pa kees vʋʋsga raare n kõ maam, n saag n tũ noya n kẽ Zerizalɛɛm ne zɩɩbo, m na widg bugum tẽnga pʋga, bugum sẽn na n dɩ a ro-neeba la sẽn ka na n tõog n kiis ye." 
Jeremiah18:1 Ad noor m sẽn paam Soaala nengẽ: 
Jeremiah18:2 «Yiki, Zeremi n kẽng yagda yiri; beenẽ la m na n togs foom m koɛɛga.»" 
Jeremiah18:3 Mam kẽnga yagda nengẽ n tɩ yãend t'a be a yagd-doogẽ. A ra sagla yagd a tebra pʋgẽ n tʋmnẽ. 
Jeremiah18:4 A sẽn da yagd bũmb ninga ka sak ye, t'a le maneg n yag a to, tɩ tũ wala a sẽn da rata." 
Jeremiah18:5 La Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n sok-ma: Mam ka tõe n maan ne a Israyɛl zaka rãmba, wa yagda sẽn maanda bɩ?" 
Jeremiah18:6 Gese, Israyɛl, wala yakã sẽn be yagda nugẽ, yãmb me bee mam nugẽ boto!" 
Jeremiah18:7 Wakat ninga mam mii n gomda buud kẽer yelle, n gomd rĩund kẽer yelle n yet tɩ m na n võome, tɩ m na n tus n lubame, tɩ m na n wãame." 
Jeremiah18:8 Bãng-y tɩ buud kãens sã n tuub b wẽnema, mam basdame tɩ sɛ, n ka lebd n sɩbg-b ye." 
Jeremiah18:9 Daar ninga, mam mii n yeelame tɩ m na n manega soolma a yembre t'a yɩ sõngo, tɩ m na n meeme la m sele." 
Jeremiah18:10 La mam sã n mik tɩ b maanda wẽnga, n ka kelgd mam goama, mam me ka kelld n maan neer ninga m sẽn da rat n maana ye, m tekda m daabo." 
Jeremiah18:11 Marsã, Zeremi, fo na n goma ne Zɩɩda rãmba, la ne Zerizalɛɛm neba: Wilg-b tɩ m temdame n na n kɩt tɩ yell pak-ba, mam bʋgsda m yamẽ n dat n sɩbg-ba. Bɩ ned kam fãa bas so-wẽng ninga a sẽn tũudã. Bɩ a modg t'a tʋʋma yɩ sõma t'a manesma tek n yɩ neere." 
Jeremiah18:12 La ayo, b pa rat n lak n bas b tʋʋm wẽna ye, b yetame tɩ m da wɩɩg ye, tɩ b na maana wala b sẽn yalse." 
Jeremiah18:13 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto: Sogs-y bu-zẽmbã n gese, ãnna n wʋm yell a woto! M bi-pugla, a Israyɛl, maana yell sẽn ka sakd kelgre, a maana yel-beedo." 
Jeremiah18:14 Waooda sẽn gĩs Libã tãmsa zug kooma, ko-maasga sẽn fõt n sigdã, y na wʋm tɩ b gomd tɩ b pa rat ko-kãnga? Tõe n sãbsa koom sẽn yit yɩɩga, tõe n sãbsa koom sẽn ya maasg yʋdʋd?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Mam neba bala n yĩmd mam yelle! B wisda wẽn-naands tɩdare, wẽnd dãmb sẽn pa wẽnde, sẽn gãnegd beoos b sor zugu tɩ b kẽnd n lagsdẽ. B basa so kʋdre n dɩkd soy sẽn ka manege." 
Jeremiah18:16 La woto la b tẽng lebg zĩ-peen-daaga. Ned ka yãet-a n ka wiis ye. Ned ninga fãa sẽn loogda be pɛleng yɩkdame, la a girda a zugu." 
Jeremiah18:17 M maanda ne-ba wala yaang sobg sẽn maande m sẽegd-b-la b bɛɛba taoore. B sẽn kong pãng raare mam na n wẽnemda m kãare, kõn yɩ m neng ye, m kõ ges-b ye." 
Jeremiah18:18 Neb n waa n yeele: «Aya, wa-y yã tɩ d kɩt tɩ wʋm a Zeremi, tɩ bala, ka maan-kʋʋdb sẽn na n zãms-do n paoog-d ye, ka neb sẽn tar yẽesem n na sagl n paoog-d ye, ka bãngdb sẽn na n taas tõnd Soaala koɛɛg n paoog-d ye. D zãgs a karenga kelgre, d modg n sãam a yell zãnga ne d wɩdse!»" 
Jeremiah18:19 Soaala-Wẽnde, kelg-y-m neere kelg-y m bɛɛba rõadga." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ned na maan wẽnga n dol yel-sõmde. B yaool n segenda bẽdgo mam yĩnga. Tẽeg-y mam sẽn yaas yãmb taoore n da pẽgd-ba, la m da yõkd sɛɛga b yĩnga, tɩ y sũur da puuga ne-ba." 
Jeremiah18:21 Woto wã bas-y b kamba tɩ b ki kom, tus-y-ba n lub sʋʋs zutu! Kɩt-y tɩ b pagba kelem b kamb kʋʋre, kɩt-y tɩ b pagba lebg pʋg-kõapa! Kɩt-y tɩ bã-longdem kʋ b sɩdb rãmba fãa! Kɩt-y tɩ b kom-bɩɩba fãa pa tãpẽ!" 
Jeremiah18:22 Kɩt-y tɩ b wʋm kũmkũma b yiya pʋsẽ, daar ning y sẽn na n tiig n tʋm bɛɛb b nengẽ. B baood n na n yõk-m lame, b gãneg-m-la b bẽdgo." 
Jeremiah18:23 Sã n ya yãmba, Soaala, yãmb mi-la b sẽn dat n maan bũmb ning fãa, n kʋ-ma. Da kõ-y-b sugr ye; da yẽes-y b yel-wẽna ye. Kɩt-y tɩ b fãa lʋɩ yãmb taoore, puug-y y sũuri n kɩt tɩ wʋm-ba!" 
Jeremiah19:1 Dẽ zugẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zeremi: Kẽng yagd nengẽ n tɩ bao yʋʋr n da. Bool buuda kãsem dãmb kẽere, bool maan-kʋʋdba me kẽere." 
Jeremiah19:2 Fo na n tũu Sapeesa noorẽ n dɩk Ben-Inom bãg-faaga sore. 
Jeremiah19:3 Fo na n yeelame: Zɩɩda nanamse, la yãmb sẽn kẽed Zerizalɛɛm, kelg-y dũni fãa Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛga: Mam tara yell kãsenga n wat tẽn-kãnga yĩnga, al tɩ ned ninga fãa sẽn na n wʋm yellã, a tʋba na n kʋrame!" 
Jeremiah19:4 Sɩda, Zɩɩda rãmb basa maam, b tedga zĩ-kãnga nenga; b kʋʋ maando n kõ wẽn-naandse, yaa wẽn-sãamse, bãmb da ka mi-ba, sẽn deng-b bãmba da ka mi-ba, Zɩɩda rĩm dãmba me ra ka mi-b ye. B pidsa zĩ-kãnga ne neb sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yell zɩɩm." 
Jeremiah19:5 N paas me, b manega zĩiga a Baal yĩnga n wat be n kʋʋd b kamba n yõod bugum. Mam zɩɩ n kõ b noore tɩ b maan dẽ ye, m zɩɩ gom maand a woto buud yell ye, b tagsg meng zɩɩ n wa m yamẽ ye." 
Jeremiah19:6 Woto fãa yĩnga, la Soaala gomd tɩ daar n wate tɩ b ka na n le bool zĩ-kãnga tɩ Tofɛt bɩ Ben-Inom bãoogo, b na n bool-a lame tɩ nin-kʋʋr bãg-faaga." 
Jeremiah19:7 Zɩɩda ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmb sẽn geen bũmb ninga kõn toog ye. M na n lub-b-la ne sʋʋga b bɛɛba taoore. M sʋʋga na n sagla sẽn dat n yãk-b bãmb yõora nusẽ. M na n basa b yĩnsã ne yĩngr luiili la we-rũmsi. 
Jeremiah19:8 M na n bas tẽnga t'a lebg raboogo; f sẽn yãend tẽnga fãa dẽnd f kelem a kʋʋre. F sã n ta a pʋgẽ fãa dẽnd f wẽ siri, dẽnd f pɛleng yɩke." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ad bɛɛb sẽn ka be sugri na n wa gũbga tẽngã. Tẽnga rãmb yɩɩre la b nimbãanega na n looga toogo, tẽnga rãmb na n kong n wãba b kamb nemdo la b lɛɛg n wãbd taaba." 
Jeremiah19:10 Zeremi, fo na n wãaga yʋʋrã neb niyns sẽn yãag-b fooma nifẽ, la fo na n yeel-b lame:" 
Jeremiah19:11 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, na n wãa tẽn-kãnga ne a nebã, wala b sẽn wãad yagd yʋʋre tɩ tɩɩm ka le beẽ ye. B na n muma neba Tofɛt, vɩʋʋg kaalem yĩnga." 
Jeremiah19:12 M na n maana ne zĩ-kãnga la ne a neba wa m sẽn maan ne Tofɛt. 
Jeremiah19:13 Zerizalɛɛm yiya, la Zɩɩda nanamsa yiya, na n lebga yi-yoodo, zĩ-põosgo wala Tofɛt zĩiga. Na n yɩɩ boto tɩ do-kãsensa fãa zutu, b wisa tɩdare yĩngri ãdsa yĩnga, la b basa rãam tẽn-taas wẽn-naands yĩnga." 
Jeremiah19:14 A Zeremi yii Tofɛt, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da tʋm-a zĩig ninga, t'a tɩ togs b koɛɛgã. A sẽn lɛɛg n wa, a yaasa wẽnd dooga taoore, n zẽk a koɛɛga n yeel neba fãa:" 
Jeremiah19:15 «Ad Yĩngr Soaba, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomde: Ade, yel-tood buud toor-toore la m kãab tẽn-kãnga ne a yagse, m na n waa ne-ba b fãa zutu, tɩ bala b tuda maam b kãare la b yeelame tɩ b kõn kelg mam goama ye.»" 
Jeremiah20:1 Bala Maan-kʋʋda a Pasewur, a Imɛr biiga, n da ya wẽnd dooga gũudb naaba. A wʋma Soaala koeesa fãa a Zeremi sẽn togsã." 
Jeremiah20:2 A wẽ-la a Zeremi pɛka, n kɩt tɩ b loe-a ra-luka a Bẽnzame digno-kãsengẽ, dignoor ninga sẽn tota ne wẽnd dooga rẽnna." 
Jeremiah20:3 Vẽkembeoogo, a Pasewur kɩtame tɩ b lok a Zeremi. Dẽ la a Zeremi yeel-a: «Soaala-Wẽnd ka leb n boond foo tɩ Pasewur ye, fo yʋʋr lebga a Yɛɛsgo-naaba.»" 
Jeremiah20:4 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn gomda: «Mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yɛɛs yɛɛsgo kãsenga, foom ne f zo-rãmba fãa. Bɛɛba na n kʋ-b-la ne sʋʋga; fo nif na n yãenda b kũum. N paas me, m na n kɩtame tɩ Babilon naaba wa wʋk Zɩɩda tẽnga fãa n tall n kẽng Babilon, ka rẽ bɩ a kʋ-b ne sʋʋga." 
Jeremiah20:5 Tẽnga arzɛka fãa, tẽnga laog fãa, bũmb niyns fãa sẽn tar yõodo, Zɩɩda nanams arzɛgs fãa, m na kɩtame tɩ b bɛɛba wa wʋk-b fãa gilli n tall n kẽng Babilon." 
Jeremiah20:6 La sã n ya foom, Pasewur, foo ne f zak rãmba fãa, b na n talla yãmb fãa n kẽng yembdo Babilon. Fo na n kẽnga be, la fo na n kii be, la b na n muma foom be, foom ne f zo-rãmba, fo sẽn da yagd zirẽ tɩ neb niyns kelgdẽ wã.»" 
Jeremiah20:7 Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb gomame n belg-ma, la m basame tɩ yãmb yõk-ma. Yãmb wõra maam, yãmb tõog-m lame. Woto me la neba paam yã, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, n laad-m la b tar-m n yaanẽ." 
Jeremiah20:8 M sã n gom fãa n sɛ dẽnd m lɛɛg n yõk sɛɛga dẽnd m kelme n wilg tɩ b maand-m-la pãnga. Taas neba yãmb gomd fãa wata ne m laado la m tʋʋre. 
Jeremiah20:9 M sã n wa yik n yeel m menga tɩ m ka na le gom Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga, bũmb n widgd m pʋgẽ wa bugum, n yõogd maam, tɩ m baood n na n kiis-a la m pa tõe ye." 
Jeremiah20:10 M wʋmda neb wʋsg sẽn wɩt-ma, b yãee yʋʋr n pʋd-ma: a Yɛɛsgo-naaba, poorẽ la taoore, goabg la rɩtg Yɛɛsgo. Tɩ zĩig sɩd wulumd ne: «Yõk-a, yõk-a n wa!» M zo-rãmba meng gũusda m goama, b ratame tɩ m tudg tɩ b yõk-ma. B pʋs n yetame: «D na yõk-fo, d na paam n dok d sũuri.»" 
Jeremiah20:11 La yãmba Soaala, yãmb pida ne pãnga la yãmb n zabd n sõngd-m. Woto wã yaa m bɛɛba n na n kong pãnga bãmb neng n na n turg tẽnga. B lʋɩɩsa yãnd na n yõk-b lame, b zug na n sulgame n ka le roog bada, la neba na tar n gomda." 
Jeremiah20:12 Yãmba, dũni fãa Soaala, yãmb mii sẽn ka pʋgd-b yãmb ne belgrã. Yãmb mii sẽn solg sũurẽ. Mam yẽ basa m yɛla fãa ne yãmba, m saagda m na yãend ne m nini, y sẽn na n dok y sũura to-to ne m bɛɛbã." 
Jeremiah20:13 M buudu, sõng-y-ma n kils Soaala, yɩɩl-y n pẽg-ba tɩ b fãag-m-la nin-wẽnsa nugẽ." 
Jeremiah20:14 Wẽnd na sãam m dogma daare, Wẽnd na yãk m ma sẽn dog-m daar ninga barka!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Ned ninga sẽn pidsa m ba ne sũ-noogo n wilg-a t'a paama bi-ribla," 
Jeremiah20:16 bɩ b maan ne nin-kãnga wa b sẽn maan ne tẽns niyns sẽn tiig n lebg raboodã, tɩ sugr ka zĩndã. Bɩ nin-kãng sãd beoog n wʋm kɛlenga, la zabr kaasgo, wĩnto-sʋka!" 
Jeremiah20:17 M yee n da paamẽ bala tɩ Soaala bas-m tɩ m ki tɩ m nan ka rogẽ ye! M ma wã n yɩtẽ m yaoogo, tɛk la tɛka." 
Jeremiah20:18 Bõe tɩ m yi m ma pʋgẽ, vɩɩma sã n ya bãng toog la namsgo, n wa ki ne yãnd bala?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ad koɛɛg ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Zeremi dĩm a Sedesiyas yĩnga. Dĩma da tʋma a Zeremi nengẽ a Pasewur, a Malkiya biiga, n paas maan-kʋʋda a Sefaniya, a Maseya biiga. A ra tʋm-b lame tɩ b tɩ yeel-a" 
Jeremiah21:2 tɩ sã n ta a raabo, bɩ a tɩ gom ne Soaalã Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor poorẽ, tɩ dĩm kãng waa n maanda zabr ne tõndo. Daare Soaala na maan makre d yĩnga, n zãag-d ne Babilon tãb-biisã." 
Jeremiah21:3 A Zeremi yeela b sẽn tʋm b rãmbã: «Tɩ yãend-y dĩm, a Sedesiyas, la y wilg-a leokr ninga," 
Jeremiah21:4 Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽndã sẽn leokde: ‹Yãmb na n taka zabre ne Babilon dĩma tãb-biisa sẽn gũbg yãmbã. M na n modga tãb-biis niynsi sẽn zabd-b lal-gũbra taoorã tɩ b leb poorẽ, n tɩ tigim tẽnga pʋga." 
Jeremiah21:5 Mam menga n na n yik ne m sũura sẽn puug wʋsgã, n zab ne yãmba n wilg-y m nugu la m kang pãnga, n wilg m zab-minim." 
Jeremiah21:6 M na n zaba ne tẽn-kãnga bõn-vɩɩl fãa: ninsaalba, rũmsi; bãag sẽn ka sugri n na n loog ne b fãa." 
Jeremiah21:7 Dẽ poore, ket n yaa Soaala koɛɛga, mam na n ninga Babilon dĩma nugẽ, Zɩɩda dĩm a Sedesiyas, n paas a kug-zĩidba la a soolma rãmb sẽn põs-b bãagã, zabra sʋʋga la koma. N-ye, m na n bas-b-la b bɛɛba nugẽ, sẽn dat-b n kʋ-ba nusẽ! A Nabikodonozor na kɩt tɩ b kʋ-ba; a kõn zoe ned ba a ye nimbãanega, a kõn bas ned ba a ye, a kõn sak belgr ye.› »" 
Jeremiah21:8 Soaala le kɩtame t'a Zeremi taas buuda koe-kãnga: «M yalsda yãmb so-badgẽ. Soy a yiibu n dɩg y taoore: vɩɩm la kũum sore. 
Jeremiah21:9 Sẽn na n paa tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, sʋʋg n na n kʋ-a, ka rẽ bɩ kom, bɩ bã-longdem. Ned ninga marsã sẽn na n yɩ tẽngã n tɩ rɩk a meng n bas ne Kalde rãmba sẽn gũbg tẽngã, yẽ soab na n vɩɩndame." 
Jeremiah21:10 Tɩ bala m ka rat tẽnga fãagr ye, a wãab la m data; a na n lʋɩɩ Babilon dĩma nugẽ la a na n ning-a-la bugum.»" 
Jeremiah21:11 Koɛɛg a Zɩɩda na-yira rãmb yĩnga: Ad Soaala sẽn yete: 
Jeremiah21:12 Zɩɩda Na-yiri, Daviid buudu, kelg-y. Sɩng-y y raarã ne bʋ-kaoor sẽn ya tɩrga. Reeg-y pãng rãmba sẽn yõkd n deesdẽ wã. Ka rẽ m sũura na widga wa bugum Bugma na n dɩɩ zãnga, la yaa bugum sẽn ka tõe n kiis ye. Dẽ me n na n yɩ y tʋʋm wẽnsa yaoodo." 
Jeremiah21:13 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n zaba ne yãmba, ne sẽn be-b tãnga pennẽ, pĩ-labra zugu; m na n zaba ne yãmb fãa sẽn gomd-ba tɩ y ka ne bɛ ninga sẽn na n sig n ta yãmbã, bɩ sẽn na n saag-a n kẽ y rotẽ wã." 
Jeremiah21:14 Ade, maam Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, woto n na n yɩ y tʋʋm wẽnsa yaoodo: m na n ninga y tɩ-wogda googa bugum la bugma kõn kees bũmb ye, bũmb kõn kees poorẽ la taoor ye." 
Jeremiah22:1 Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la a Zeremi noor kãnga: «Kẽng Zɩɩda, na-yirã, ad fo sẽn na n tɩ yeel bũmb ninga:" 
Jeremiah22:2 ‹Kelg Soaala gomde, Zɩɩda dĩma, sẽn zao a Daviid naam goeel zugu n paas yãmba, kug-zĩidba, la yãmb fãa sẽn kẽed la y yit dĩma zakẽ," 
Jeremiah22:3 ad-y Soaala gomd-y-la woto: Bɩ y bʋ-kaoor yɩ tɩrga, reeg-y pãng rãmba sẽn yõgd n deesdẽ wã. Sã n yaa sãana bɩ yaa kɩɩba, bɩ pʋg-kõore, da tũ-y b sẽn ka pãngã n zãmb-b ye, n deeg b paoong ye. Da le sak-y tɩ nin-sõng zɩɩm daag ka ye." 
Jeremiah22:4 Yãmb sã n mao n deeg mam saglgo, nanams na n kell n zaoonda a Daviid naama goeel zugu, b na n kell n zomba wiidi bɩ b na n kẽe b bilim-bilma. B na kell n tõog n kẽed na-yirã, bãmba, wala b kug-zĩidba, la b soolma rãmba." 
Jeremiah22:5 La yãmb sã n ka kelg mam goama, sɩd ne sɩda, yaa Soaala koɛɛga, do-kãnga na n lebga do-wãoongo.› »" 
Jeremiah22:6 Sɩda, yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd Zɩɩda naaba roog poorẽ: Ne m sẽn get-fo tɩ f neerma pida wa Galaad googo, wala Libã zug-tẽnsʋka, ad-m kãabdame tɩ m na kɩte tɩ f lebg zĩ-peen-daaga, f na lebg raboogo." 
Jeremiah22:7 Fo yĩnga m na tigs tẽn-wãadba, m na yiis-b ne wãab te-bɛda b na kɛ y kʋgsã, y tɩ-neebã, la b na n ning-b-la bugum." 
Jeremiah22:8 Neb wʋsgo na n wa loogda tẽn-kãnga sɛɛgẽ, b na n wa sogsda taaba: «Bõe la Soaala-Wẽnd maan yã tɩ tẽn-kãseng kãnga lebg woto?»" 
Jeremiah22:9 Dẽ marsã la b na n leok-ba tɩ yaa tẽnga rãmb sẽn wõgemd wẽn-naands taoore n waoog-bã. La woto b basame n ka pids b sẽn da kãab Soaala, bãmb Wẽnnaama ye." 
Jeremiah22:10 Zɩɩda rãmba, da kũm-y ned ninga sẽn ki-a wã ye, da kũm-y dĩm a Zoziyas ye, da sãam-y y sũur ye. Kũm-y ned ninga sẽn loogd-a yembdã, kũm-y dĩma a Salum, tɩ bala a ka na n lɛɛg n wa ye, a ka na n leb n yãend a ba yir ye." 
Jeremiah22:11 Yaa woto la Soaala-Wẽnd gom Zɩɩda rĩm a Salum poorẽ. Zɩɩda dĩm kãng dɩɩ naam a ba a Zoziyas poore, la b tall-a lame n loog pa-weere: b yeelame t'a kõn lɛɛg n wa ye." 
Jeremiah22:12 B sẽn tall-a n kẽng tẽng ningã, a na n kii be, la a kõn leb n yãee a ba yir abada." 
Jeremiah22:13 Yell n na n pak foo, Zoakim, fo kɩtame tɩ b me na-yiri, la fo yaool ka maand sẽn tog ye. Fo meta roto n dogend doog a to zugu, la f ka maand neer ne f soolma rãmb ye. Fo kẽesda neb tʋʋmde n yaool n ka yaood-b ye." 
Jeremiah22:14 Fo yetame tɩ f rat n me f yĩnga ro-kẽeng-kẽenga, ro-roglem-roglem. Fo kẽe n ningda ro-vẽ-yalense. Fo tablgda rooga lalse ne ra-peg-sĩdma; fo kɩtdame tɩ bolg-b tɩ b lebg miid yʋs." 
Jeremiah22:15 Yaa fo sẽn dat n wilg tɩ f yaa dĩma la f n ning ra-sĩdma. Fo ba wã da rɩtame la a yũuda wa neb a taaba sẽn maande, la yẽ ra maanda sẽn tog la sẽn zemse la rẽ da ka sãamd bũmb ye." 
Jeremiah22:16 A ra ka sãbsd naong soaba, a ra ka paoogd nimbãan-ned ye. La rẽ n da noom ned fãa. Sẽn maanda woto wilgdame t'a mii maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah22:17 Fo sẽn ne yaa sẽn nafd foom bala. Sẽn pak foo bala yaa f kʋ sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yelle, yaa f maan bi-beelem la pãn-tõog." 
Jeremiah22:18 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, la Soaala-Wẽnd yet a Zoakim poorẽ, a Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoziyas biiga poorẽ: A kũum daare, b kõn kelem kʋʋr ye, Ned ba a ye kõn yeele: «M saam-biiga, ges yel-beedo! M tão sõngo, ges yel-beedo!» B kõn daagd nintãm la b yetẽ: «Ges yel-beedo, m zu-soaba! Ges yel-beedo, m naaba!»" 
Jeremiah22:19 B na n mum-a-la wa rũnga, B na vu-a lame n tɩ lobe Zerizalɛɛm digem-poore." 
Jeremiah22:20 Dʋ Libã tãnga zugu n kaase, Zerizalɛɛm, Dʋ Bazã tãnga n kelem tɩ sãde. Kelem lolle Abarim tãmsa zutu, woto f zo-rãmba na bãng tɩ f yell sɛɛme." 
Jeremiah22:21 Yel-beeda sẽn da waa n ket n zãra, m da zoe n togs-f lame, la f leok-m lame bala: «M pa na n kelg ye.» La yaa woto la f ra sɩng n maanẽ, f zɩɩ n kelg m goam ye." 
Jeremiah22:22 Sobg peega f taoor dãmbã, f zo-rãmba boba yembdo. Yaa f tʋʋm wẽnsã n wa ne f paoor la f yãnde." 
Jeremiah22:23 Fo sẽn da zao ne laafi Libã tãmsa zutu, n da tʋɩ f tʋk kʋg-wogda zutu, kelg waasg ning f sẽn waasde, ges f sẽn tiig n wẽnd f yĩnga n lebsd-a goabg la rɩtgo, wa pag n digimd rogem waoodo." 
Jeremiah22:24 Fo na n togsa Zɩɩda dĩm a Koniya, a Zoakim biiga, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, tɩ ba a sã da yaẽ nug-bĩnga nug-bĩn-neere, ad-m naan n pidgẽ yã n lobe. M wẽend ne m menga!" 
Jeremiah22:25 M sẽn basd foo neb niyns nusẽ, yaa sẽn dat-b fo kũuma. Yaa neb niyns fo sẽn yɛɛsd wʋsgã, yaa Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, ne a tãb-biisã." 
Jeremiah22:26 M na n diga foom ne pag ning sẽn dog foomã tɩ y tees tẽng a to. Tẽn-kãng ka wẽnd fo tẽnga lɛ-lɛ; be la foo ne f ma wã na n tɩ ki. 
Jeremiah22:27 Y na n tʋlga ne y sũur fãa n lɛɛg n wa y tẽngẽ, la y kõn tõog ye. La tẽng ninga y sẽn dat ne y sũur fãa n leb n wa wã, y kõn le tag be ye." 
Jeremiah22:28 Woto la neba sokda: «A Koniya yaa rʋk sẽn ka be barka la sẽn wãage, bɩ a yaa bũmbu ned sẽn ka rata? Bõe n maame, tɩ b dig yẽnda ne a buudu, tɩ b kẽng tẽng ninga bãmb sẽn ka miẽ?»" 
Jeremiah22:29 M tẽnga! M tẽnga! Kelg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga. 
Jeremiah22:30 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «Gʋls-y nin-kãnga wa ned sẽn ka tar kamb ye. Bi-ribl kãnga vɩɩma ka pids ye. A buuda sʋka, ned ka be sẽn na n paam zu-noogo n zaond a Daviid naama goeela zug ye, la a kõn dɩ naam Zɩɩda ye.»" 
Jeremiah23:1 Yell na n paka pe-kɩɩmb niynsi sẽn get m buuda yellã, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde. Ad-y b yaa pe-kɩɩmb wẽnse. B basdame tɩ piisa kiid kom la b menemdẽ." 
Jeremiah23:2 Dẽ n so tɩ Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomd woto ne pe-kɩɩmbã: Yãmb basa m piisa tɩ b menemdẽ la b sẽegdẽ, y pa ges b yell ye. Mam yẽ na ges y yelle n sɩbg y manes yoodã." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ade, mam meng n na n tigim piis niynsi sẽn ket-bã, m na n tigim-b-la m sẽn sẽeg-b tẽns niynsa fãa. Maam n na n tall-ba n kẽng b wãbneg zĩigẽ. B na n noba sõma, la b na n doga wʋsgo tɩ b sõora paase." 
Jeremiah23:4 Mam na n baoo pe-kɩɩmb sõma n gũnug-ba. Ne pe-kɩɩmb kãense, b kõn yɛɛse, b kõn dig bũmb rabeem ye, ba a ye menga kõn le menem ye, Soaala gomde." 
Jeremiah23:5 Ade, daar n wate, Soaala n gomde, mam na n kɩtame tɩ nin-sõngo, nin-tɩrga, yi a Daviid meng buudẽ. Na n yɩɩ dĩm sẽn mi naam dɩɩbo, sẽn zãad a soolma rãmb sɩd la zemsg pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah23:6 A sã n wa rɩt a naama a Zɩɩda na paam fãagre, t'a Israyɛl vɩɩma ya laafi vɩɩm. Ad yʋʋr ninga b sẽn na n pʋd-a: «Bʋ-kaood tɩrg soaba Wẽnde.»" 
Jeremiah23:7 Daar n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga, tɩ Israyɛl dãmb ka na n leb n wẽen woto: «M wẽen ne Wẽnd sẽn vɩ la sẽn yiis-a tõnd Ezipt tẽnga.»" 
Jeremiah23:8 Woto la b na n wẽen marsã: «M wẽen ne Vɩɩm Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yiis Israyɛl buudu, nug goabg rãmba soolmẽ, la zĩis niyns fãa b sẽn da sẽegẽ, tɩ b na n le vɩɩnd b tẽngẽ.»" 
Jeremiah23:9 Bãngdba poorẽ, goam n gome la m sũ-keelma menema zãnga, mam yĩnsã fãa digimdame. Soaala yiisa goam sẽn ya sõma la tagdo tɩ m digimdi, n tãag n yɛsẽ wa rã-tɩgda, rãam sẽn lubi. Goama goma woto:" 
Jeremiah23:10 Tẽnga pida ne yoaadba. B fãa zoet n pʋgda wẽnga. B pa yɛɛd ne tʋʋm wẽns ye. Yaa rẽ la tẽnga yãbd a neba kʋʋre, yaa rẽ la yamd kʋɩ rũmsa wãbneg zĩisẽ." 
Jeremiah23:11 Bãngdba wa maan-kʋʋdba, b fãa lebga bi-beese. B tol n talla b manes wẽnsã n wa Soaala-Wẽnd roogẽ. Yaa Soaala n wilg-m rẽ." 
Jeremiah23:12 Dẽ n so tɩ b soya na n pid ne salse. B na n kẽnd n fãooda taab likẽ la b pãsd n lʋɩtẽ, m sã n wa tool yel-beedã, m sã n wa yik ne bãmba. Soaala n gome." 
Jeremiah23:13 Bũmb la m yãend Samari bãngdba nengẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, la yaa bũmb sẽn ka sakd toagsg ye. Ad-y b ra gomda a Baal yĩnga, n kẽesd m buud a Israyɛl moogo." 
Jeremiah23:14 La m sẽn yãet bũmb ning bãngdba nengẽ Zerizalɛɛma pʋgẽ, n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: yoobo, zirẽ yagbo, fãadba pirsgu. B pa basd tɩ ned ba a ye tõog n vʋʋs ne wẽng maaneg ye. M sẽn get-ba, b wẽnda Sodom dãmba, la Zerizalɛɛm dãmba pa são Gomor dãmb ye." 
Jeremiah23:15 Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala gomd Zerizalɛɛm bãngdba poorẽ: M na n yũnug-b-la ko-tɩɩsenga, n yũnug-b ne ko-zẽnem. Zerizalɛɛm bãngdba lebga zẽnem sẽn sãamd tẽnga zãnga." 
Jeremiah23:16 Ad dũni fãa Wẽnd sẽn leokde: Da kelg-y bãngdb kãensã sẽn togsd yãmb ye, b tudgda yãmba, b togsda yãmba, bũmb ninga sẽn be b yamẽ; b goama ka yit maam Naaba-Wẽnd nengẽ ye." 
Jeremiah23:17 Neb n be tɩ b toog ka be ne mam goama ye. Yaa bãmb dãmb la b yeta: «Na n zemsame!» Neb niyns sẽn kʋɩɩs b sũuri n giri, bãmb dãmb la b yeta: «Bũmb kõn maan-y ye.»" 
Jeremiah23:18 Bãmb sʋka, ãnd n zĩnd d yẽsga wakato? Ãnda n yãende, ãnda n wʋme m sẽn togs bũmb ning wakat kãnga? Ãnda n wʋm maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, goama, ãnda n wegs-ba?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ges-y sobg kãseng sẽn wate, Yaa Soaala sũur n puugdi. Sɩlman-daoogo n wat nin-wẽnsa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah23:20 Soaala sũ-puura ka na n yõke tɩ b pa pids b sẽn yalsa ye. Y na waa n wʋm dẽ, raar a ye." 
Jeremiah23:21 Mam ka tʋm bãngdb kãensã ye, tɩ b yaool n tar zoeese. Mam ka yeel-b tɩ fɩ, la koees buud fãa yita b noorẽ." 
Jeremiah23:22 B sã n da zĩndẽ d yẽsga wakato ad-y b na tõogẽ n taasẽ buudã m goama n kɩtẽ tɩ neba bas b so-wẽnga tũubu, la b tʋʋm-yooda fãa." 
Jeremiah23:23 Soaal Wẽnd n sokde: «Mam yaa ned sẽn ka ne yɩɩg laa? Ayo! M yaa Wẽnd sẽn ne yɩɩga. 
Jeremiah23:24 Ned sã n solg a menga a tõeeme tɩ m ka le ne-a bɩ? M bee zĩis fãa, yĩngr la tẽnga; y ka mi rẽnda sɩda?»" 
Jeremiah23:25 Mam Naaba-Wẽnde, mam wʋma bãngdba sẽn gomd to-to, b gõod n yagda zirẽ mam yʋʋr yĩnga n yetẽ: «Mam zãmsa woto m gõeemẽ, mam paama likri.»" 
Jeremiah23:26 Na n yɩɩ woto n ta da-bʋre? Nin-bãmba tagsdame tɩ bõe b zirẽ-beeda moonega wakato, b sẽn wat n yelgd b meng sẽn naana wakato?" 
Jeremiah23:27 B sẽn togsd taaba b sẽn paam likri niynsã, ka bũmb a to la b rata n zʋʋg maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, leb kɛɛnga. B raab la b yĩm m yelle wala b ba rãmba sẽn da yĩm m yelle n pʋgd Baal dãmbã." 
Jeremiah23:28 Bãngd ninga sẽn paam-a zãmsgo, bɩ a togs a zãmsgo! La a sã n wʋma mam gomde, bɩ a togs mam gomde n da rogl bũmb ye! B ka tõe n dɩk kãnkãre n mak ne kaaf ye, Soaalã n gomde." 
Jeremiah23:29 Mam gomda yaa wa bugum. Mam gomda yaa wala zãar sẽn wãad pĩiga. 
Jeremiah23:30 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m na n yik ne bãngdba sẽn be tẽngre n zuud taab m goama. 
Jeremiah23:31 Mam na n zaba ne bãngdb niyns sẽn ka bãngdba n kalemd m goama ne bãmb mens rẽnna. 
Jeremiah23:32 Mam na n zaba ne bãngdb niynsi sẽn yagd-b zirẽ tɩ b paama beoog yɛla pukri. Zirẽ-be-wagla rãmb tar m buudã n kẽesd moogo. Mam pa tʋm-ba, m pa kõ-b noore. B pa sõngd m buuda ba sẽn paood ye. Soaala n gome!" 
Jeremiah23:33 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Zeremi: «Bãngd bɩ maan-kʋʋd, bɩ ned a to sã wa sok-fo: ‹Bõe tɩ Soaala gomda ya woto, bõe t'a ya zɩɩbo?› F na leok a soaba: ‹Yaa yãmb meng la m zɩɩbo. La m na n sik-y lame n vʋʋse.›" 
Jeremiah23:34 Bãngd bɩ maan-kʋʋd, bɩ ned a to sã n gomd tɩ yaa zɩɩb la Soaala zɩlgd-a, m na yik ne yẽ soaba, la m yik ne a zak rãmba." 
Jeremiah23:35 Yãmb sẽn tog n sogs taaba, yaa Soaala leokame tɩ bõe, Soaala yeelame tɩ bõe?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Sã n ya sẽn gomd-b zɩɩb yellã, m da le wʋm dẽ ye. Soaala gomd maanda wãn n lebg zɩɩbo, ninsaal yĩnga. F sã n gomd woto f ka togsd sɩd ye la f tekda Vɩɩm Naaba gomde, dũni fãa Soaala la a Israyɛl Wẽnda gomde." 
Jeremiah23:37 Fo sẽn tog n sok bãngda, yaa a wilg-fu Soaala sẽn leok yẽnda, Soaala sẽn togs yẽnda." 
Jeremiah23:38 La yãmb sã n ket n gomd zɩɩbo, Soaala sẽn zɩlg yãmba yelle, ne m sẽn yet tɩ m pa rat n le wʋm-a, m yet-y-la woto:" 
Jeremiah23:39 ‹Ade mam na n zẽk yãmba n palg m bãgdo wala zɩɩbo n tɩ bao zĩig n lob yãmb n zãag ne tẽn-kãnga, m sẽn da rɩk n kõ y yaab rãmbã.›" 
Jeremiah23:40 Man na n ning-y-la yãnde, yãnd sẽn kõn sɛ, la yãnd sẽn ka tõe n yĩm tɩ ka yʋʋm wɛɛla.»" 
Jeremiah24:1 Soaala-Wẽnd wilga maam pet a yi sẽn pid ne kankama n dɩg wẽnd dooga noore. Dẽ t'a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, talla yembsã n zãag ne Zerizalɛɛm. Yɩ-la a Yekoniya, Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zoakim biiga, n paas kug-zĩidba, tʋʋm-mitba la Zerizalɛɛm kʋɩlensa pagdsa manegdb, la a tall n kẽng Babilon." 
Jeremiah24:2 M yãee pet a yiibu, peoog a ye da pida ne kankam sẽn ya sõma, n ya noog wʋsgo, wala kankam dẽemse. Peoog a to wã da pida ne kankam põaasa; b da põoga wʋsg wʋsgo n ka tõe n le yɩ rɩɩb ye." 
Jeremiah24:3 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: «Zeremi, fo nee bõe?» Tɩ mam leoke: «Kankama! Kẽer yaa sõma, n ya neeba. Sẽn ka-b sõma wã, põogame; b põoga wʋsg-wʋsgo al tɩ b ka tõe n le wãb-b ye.»" 
Jeremiah24:4 Dẽ la Soaala-Wẽnd yeel maam: 
Jeremiah24:5 «Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, sẽn togsde: Kankam sõma wã gesg sakdame. Woto me noom-m lame tɩ m ges Zɩɩda yemse, mam sẽn yiis tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ n kɩt tɩ b kẽng Kalde dãmb tẽnga." 
Jeremiah24:6 N-ye! M get-b lame tɩ m sũur noom wʋsgo, tɩ m na n le tall bãmba n wa tẽn-kãnga. M pa rat n sãam-b ye, m datame n le lebs-ba b pĩnd zĩigẽ. M pa rat n võ n lobe, m datame n maneg n sele." 
Jeremiah24:7 M na kɩt tɩ b bãng tɩ maam la Soaala. B na n lɛɛg n wa kẽe maam ne b sũur fãa. B na lebg m buudu tɩ m lebg b Wẽnnaam.» 
Jeremiah24:8 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn leokd Zɩɩda dĩma, a Sedesiyas, poorẽ, a kug-zĩidba poorẽ, neb niyns fãa sẽn pa Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ, neb niyns fãa sẽn tɩ kẽ Ezipt poorẽ: m na n maana ne bãmba wa b sẽn maand ne kankama sẽn sãame n ka tõe le yɩ rɩɩbã." 
Jeremiah24:9 Woto dũni wã rĩunda na yãend a Sedesiyas n yɛɛse. M sẽn na n sẽeg-b zĩig ning fãa, yẽ yellã n na n lʋɩ taoore; al tɩ b sã n dat n la, bɩ n tʋ, bɩ n pʋd yɩɩlle, bɩ n kãab kãab beedo, yẽ bal la b bẽt n gomda." 
Jeremiah24:10 Yel-beed ka tɛk na n lʋɩ-la b zugu: zabr-sʋʋga, kom, la bã-longdem, n wa menes-b zãnga tẽng ning m sẽn da reeg n kõ b yaab rãmba la bãmb mense." 
Jeremiah25:1 Gomd sẽn get Zɩɩda neb fãa yelle. Gomd kãnga taasa a Zeremi, dẽ t'a Zoakim, a Zoziyas biiga, Zɩɩda dĩma, deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm naasẽ, dẽ t'a Nabikodonozor nan dɩt a naama pipi yʋʋmde, Babilon tẽnga." 
Jeremiah25:2 Bãngd a Zeremi goma Zɩɩda neba taoore, n paas Zerizalɛɛm dãmb fãa taoore." 
Jeremiah25:3 A goma woto: «Sẽn sɩng a Amon biig a Zoziyas naam deegre yʋʋm piig la a tãab soaba n tãag dũnna, ad-y m sõta yʋʋm pisi la a tã la Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yõk goam ne maam tɩ mam me ka vʋʋsd ne m deeg b goama n taas yã. Yãmb bala m pa kelgde." 
Jeremiah25:4 Dẽ pʋgẽ me, Soaala-Wẽnd pa vʋʋs ne b tʋm bãngdba y nengẽ ye. B pʋga yãmba n tʋm b tʋʋmd sõngã la yãmb pa kelg-b ye, y pa maan gũusg ye." 
Jeremiah25:5 B gomdã da yetame: ‹Ned kam fãa bas a so-wẽnga, n bas a tʋʋm yaalsã, tɩ woto y na tõog n vɩɩnd tẽng ning m sẽn dɩk n kõ y yaab rãmba la yãmb mense, zamaan sẽn pʋgd taab n zãage." 
Jeremiah25:6 Yãmb sã n pa pʋgd n waoogd bu-zẽn wẽn-naandse, y sã n ka pees wẽn-naandse, n puug m sũuri, mam kõn maan-y bũmb ye.›" 
Jeremiah25:7 La yãmb yaool n ka kelg maam ye; Soaalã n gomde, y tol n maana wẽn-naandse n puug m sũuri, la rẽ n wa ne yel-beedã.»" 
Jeremiah25:8 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la dũni fãa Wẽnd, gomd woto: «Yãmb sẽn pa kelg m sẽn togsã," 
Jeremiah25:9 ade, mam na tʋmame tɩ b kẽng n tɩ bool goabg rãmba fãa la b bool m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma. M na n kɩtame tɩ b wa zab ne tẽn-kãnga nebã la a yagsã sẽn ya bu-zẽmba. M na naag bãmb ne yãmb n wã zãnga, la m na n kɩtame tɩ tẽnga lebg raboogo, la sẽn na n yãend-a na n yɛɛsame la a fɩɩle n wilg a sũ-beedo. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomd woto." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ad-m sẽn na n menes y tẽngẽ: kibs bʋʋre, sũ-noog kaasgo, kãad-paalsa yɩɩla, werb-bʋʋr neerẽ, fitil vẽenem." 
Jeremiah25:11 Tẽn-kãnga na n wãa gilli n lebg raboogo la yʋʋm pisopoe pʋgẽ, bu-zẽmba na n paa Babilon dĩma soolmẽ." 
Jeremiah25:12 La yʋʋm pisopoe wã sã n wa pidi, mam na n soka Babilon dĩma a tʋʋm yoodã, a neba tʋʋm yoodã; m na n yika ne b tẽngã n kɩt t'a lebg daar fãa yĩnga, we-raoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem." 
Jeremiah25:13 Yel-beed niyns sẽn na n lʋɩ tẽn-kãnga zugã, yaa yel-beeda sẽn na n dɩ bu-zẽna, yaa yel-beed niyns a Zeremi sẽn gome la sẽn sõdg sebr kãnga pʋgã." 
Jeremiah25:14 Tẽn-bɛda neba la dĩm dãmb sẽn tar pãnga n na n wa soog Babilon dãmba, bãmb me wakata sã n ta. Woto la m na n dol b yel-wẽna.»" 
Jeremiah25:15 Ad noor ninga Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda, sẽn kõ a Zeremi: «M kɩt-f-la wam-pobgr kãnga sẽn pid ne m sũ-puura rãam. Reeg-a la f yũnug bu-zẽmba mam sẽn tʋmd foom b rãmb nengẽ wã." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bɩ b yũ n tuum la b gãeeme, b sã n wa yãend yel-beedã m sẽn na n bool b yĩngã.»" 
Jeremiah25:17 Maam a Zeremi deega wamda ne rãama Soaala-Wẽnd nugẽ la m kɩtame tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tʋm maam b rãmb nengẽ wã yũ-a. 
Jeremiah25:18 M sɩnga ne Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽnse, n sɩng ne b nanamse, b kug-zĩidba. M kɩtame tɩ b tẽnga na n lebg kãab-wẽns sẽn sãame, n lebg raboogo la we-raoogo, al tɩ sẽn na n yãend-a na n yɛɛs la a fɩɩle la woto n be rũnna." 
Jeremiah25:19 Zɩɩda poore, bu-zẽmba n pʋge: Ezipt tẽng naaba, ne a tãnsoaben-dãmba, a kug-zĩidba, a neba fãa" 
Jeremiah25:20 Adem biis toɛ-toɛ sẽn kalem taab Us pʋgẽ la Us dĩm dãmba, Filisti tẽn-peelmẽ dĩm dãmba wala Askalõ, Gaza, Ekrõ la Asdod bogre." 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, Moab la Amon kamba;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Tir dĩm dãmba fãa, Sidõ dĩm dãmba fãa, mogra rʋʋnd dĩm dãmba fãa;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedã, Tema, Buz, la neb niyns fãa sẽn kõogd-b yɛɛma;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabi dĩm dãmba fãa la sẽn vɩ-b zĩ-pɛɛlẽ; 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri, Elam la Mɛd dĩm dãmb fãa;" 
Jeremiah25:26 Nug goabg dĩm dãmba, sẽn pẽ-b la sẽn zãr-ba; Ad-y yɩɩ dũni wã ninsaalb fãa n deeg rãama, a yeyn-ye, n yũ. Sẽn na yũ-a, yaoolem soaba na n yɩɩ Sesak dĩma." 
Jeremiah25:27 Soaala-Wẽnd wilga maam a Zeremi tɩ m yeel-ba: «Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, kõt yãmba. Yũ-y yã, n wa gãeemnẽ, n wa wʋbdẽ, n wa lʋɩtẽ n ka le tõe n yik ye, n ka le tõe n põs tẽn-kũum ninga sẽn wata wã ye.»" 
Jeremiah25:28 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn le paase: «Ned sã n zãgs t'a kõn deeg n yũ, wilg a soab t'a rat t'a pa rat me a na yũ, tɩ yaa dũni fãa Wẽnd noore." 
Jeremiah25:29 M yɩta a wãna n ka bas tẽng ning sẽn ya m tẽngã n wa basd yãmb wala y ka maan bũmbu. Ayo, m kõn maan wa y ka tar yell y zug ye; sʋʋg la m na n yiis dũni wã yĩnga. Maam, dũni fãa Soaala, n gomde.»" 
Jeremiah25:30 Soaala le yeel-m lame: «M datame tɩ f wilg-ba mam sẽn togsa fãa; la ad-f sẽn na n paase: Soaala zĩnda yĩngri n tãse b zĩnda b ro-sõnga pʋga n gome, b zabda ne b soolma, b tara kaasgo wa sẽn fẽt-b bugsuntung biisi." 
Jeremiah25:31 Bʋʋra sãtame n tat tẽnga sɛtmẽ, n tat ãndũni wã ninsaalba. Yaa bʋʋd la Soaala yik ne bãmba, yaa neba fãa la b bool bʋʋdo. Sẽn beeg-a fãa kõn põs ye. Yaa boto la Soaala gom yã.»" 
Jeremiah25:32 Dũni fãa Soaala sɩd yeela woto: «Yel-beeda na n sɛɛ tẽng a ye n long tẽng a to, la sɩlmanda na n yii tẽnga sɛtmẽ." 
Jeremiah25:33 Baraare, ned kõn zĩnd dũni n na n yãb sẽn pa-b Soaala nugẽ ye, ned kõn zĩnd sẽn na n dɩk-ba n mum ye. B na n yɛdga tẽnga wa põosgo." 
Jeremiah25:34 Pʋd-y Sũ-sãang yɩɩlle la-n-kaas-y yã, yãmba, dũni soaalba. Lʋɩ-y n bilim-y tẽnga, yãmba, pe-kɩɩmba tɩ yãmb daar n ta tɩ b tat yãmb n dabd rũmsa kʋʋb zĩigẽ. B na n lub-y lame wala wubra pe-ra-nobdse. Taoor dãmba ka na n põs ye." 
Jeremiah25:35 Pe-kɩɩmba taoor dãmba ka tõe n tar n leb poorẽ ye. 
Jeremiah25:36 M zoe n wʋmda b bʋʋre m wʋmda b tooga waasgo; Soaala-Wẽnd kʋɩɩsa wãbnega zĩisi. 
Jeremiah25:37 Soaala sũura bugum yõoga yamda sẽn da sakd gesgã fãa rɩga sɩɩ wa kũum. 
Jeremiah25:38 Yaa wa gɩgemd sẽn mi n yi a tʋgrẽ tɩ fãa lebg sɩɩ. Tẽnga fãa lebga zĩ-peelle. La zabra tẽn-kũuma n wa ne rẽnna, Soaala sũura sẽn puugã n wa ne rẽnna.»" 
Jeremiah26:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Zeremi. Yɩɩ Zɩɩda dĩma, a Zoziyas biig a Zoakim sẽn deeg naam paalem. Ad-b sẽn yeel-a:" 
Jeremiah26:2 «Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n kõt-f noore: kẽng n tɩ yals wẽnd dooga sɩmandẽ la wilg neb niyns fãa sẽn yit-b Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ n wat n na n waoog Soaalã, togs-b bũmb ning fãa, m sẽn yet tɩ f togs-ba n da kees bũmb a ye meng ye." 
Jeremiah26:3 M saagdame tɩ b na kelge tɩ ned kam fãa bas a wẽnem. M dat n sɩbga b tʋʋm wẽnsã. La b sã n kelge, m na bas n ka sɩbg-b ye." 
Jeremiah26:4 Woto wã fo na n yeel-b lame: Ad Soaala gomde: ‹Kelg-y m goama, tũ-y m sẽn wilgã;" 
Jeremiah26:5 la reeg-y m bãngdba la m sõgen-kamba, sẽn togsd yãmba wa bũmb sẽn tog kelgre. M tʋm-b-la yãmb nengẽ wakat buud fãa la yãmb pa kelg-b ye." 
Jeremiah26:6 Ad-y y sã n pa kelg-ba, m na n wãa wẽnd do-kãnga wala m sẽn wã Silo rẽnna la m na n kɩtame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm yɩ tẽng ning f sẽn wat n dat tɩ f bɛ tẽng fãa wẽneg a soab ne sãoongo.› »" 
Jeremiah26:7 Maan-kʋʋdba, bãngdba, la sẽn da be-b be wã wʋma a Zeremi t'a taasd Wẽnd gomda wẽnd dooga sɩmandẽ." 
Jeremiah26:8 La a Zeremi sẽn wa n tosg Soaala koees niyns b sẽn da kõ yẽ noor t'a togsã, neba fãa yõk-a lame n yeel-a: «Fo na n kiime!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Yaa bõe yĩnga tɩ fo yet tɩ Soaala n kõ-f noore tɩ f togs tɩ wẽnd do-kãnga na n wãa wala Silo, tɩ tẽn-kãnga me na n wã, la ned kõn leb n zĩnd a pʋgẽ?» Sẽn da be-b wẽnd doogẽ wã wa n gũbga a Zeremi, n zabd-a." 
Jeremiah26:10 Zɩɩda kug-zĩidba sẽn wʋm dẽnna, b yii dĩma zakẽ n wa wẽnd dooga No-paallẽ n sɩng bʋʋdo." 
Jeremiah26:11 Woto la maan-kʋʋdba ne bãngdba yeel kug-zĩidba la neba fãa: «Dao kãnga toga ne kũum, t'a goma gom-wẽnse tẽn-kãnga poorẽ, wala yãmb meng sẽn wʋme!»" 
Jeremiah26:12 La a Zeremi leoka kug-zĩidba la neba fãa. A yeelame: «Yaa Soaala meng n tʋm maam tɩ m wa pĩnd n togs yell ninga sẽn na n pak do-kãnga la tẽn-kãnga; yaa bãmb meng noore. 
Jeremiah26:13 Sẽn ya woto wã marsã, bɩ y maneg n dɩk soy-sõma, maan-y tʋʋm sõma, kelg-y Soaala sẽn togse. Woto b kõn bas yel-beedã b sẽn togsã t'a lʋɩ y zug ye." 
Jeremiah26:14 Sã ya maam, mam be yãmb nugẽ; bɩ y maan wala yãmb sẽn tẽed tɩ m toga ne." 
Jeremiah26:15 La bɩ y pĩnd n bãng neere tɩ yãmb sã n kʋ maan, yaa ned sẽn ka tar a toorẽ yelle la y kʋ yã la y na rɩ m zɩɩma taale, yãmb ne y tẽnga, tɩ bala, yaa Soaala meng n tʋm maam tɩ m wa togs-y koees niyns fãa mam sẽn togs yãmba, tɩ yãmb meng tʋbr wʋma.»" 
Jeremiah26:16 B sẽn wʋm woto, nanamsa la neba fãa gilli yeela maan-kʋʋdba la bãngdba: «Nin-kãnga ka tog ne kũum ye, t'a sẽn gom ne tõndã, yaa Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaama yʋʋr yĩnga la a gom yã!»" 
Jeremiah26:17 La tẽnga nin-kẽems kẽere yikame n yeel sẽn tigim-b be wã: 
Jeremiah26:18 «Zɩɩda dĩma a Ezekiyas wakato, bãngd a ye n zĩnd Moresɛt n boond t'a Mise. A Mise waa n yeela Zɩɩda nebã: ‹Dũni fãa Wẽnda tɩ m wilg-y woto: Siõ na n lebga pʋʋgo tɩ b kooda, Zerizalɛɛm na n lebga raboogo, la wẽnd dooga tãnga na n wuka ne tuudu.›"
