Jeremiah26:19 D sok n gese, yãmb yãeeme tɩ Zɩɩda dĩm a Ezekiyas, la Zɩɩda neba kʋ-la a Mise bi? Ayoo! B sulga b meng Soaala taoore la b kos-b lame tɩ b maan sugri. La sɩda Soaala ka bas tɩ b sẽn gom yel-beed ninga lʋɩ b zug ye. Tõnd sã n kʋ a Zeremi rũnna, d kõn dogl yell kãseng d zugu?»" 
Jeremiah26:20 A Zeremi wakatẽ me bãngd a ye n zĩndi n da taasd Soaala koeese. Yaa a Uriya, a Semaya biiga, Kiriyat-Yeyarim tẽng neda. Yẽ soab me da goma wa a Zeremi, n pĩnd n togs yell ninga sẽn na n pak Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽnga." 
Jeremiah26:21 Dĩm a Zoakim ne a zaka gũudba la a kug-zĩidba sẽn wʋm a Uriya goama, b yikame tɩ b na n kʋ-a. A Uriya sẽn wʋm woto, dabeem yõk-a lame, t'a zoe n kẽng Ezipt tẽnga." 
Jeremiah26:22 La naab a Zoakim tʋma Ezipt tẽnga, a Akbor biiga a Elnatã, n paas neb a taaba." 
Jeremiah26:23 B sẽn ta be, b yãee a Uriya n tall-a n wa kɩs dĩm a Zoakim. Dĩma kõo noore tɩ b kʋ-a ne sʋʋga n dɩk a n tɩ lob tẽnga rãmb yaadẽ." 
Jeremiah26:24 Sã n yaa a Zeremi, Wẽnd maag a Ayikam, a Safã biiga, tɩ yẽ põse; a Ayikam maasem yĩnga, neba ka paam n kʋ-a ye." 
Jeremiah27:1 A Zoziyas biig a Sedesiyas waa m lebga Zɩɩda dĩma la ka yãend n kaoos tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd taas gomd kãnga a Zeremi: 
Jeremiah27:2 «Bẽes gãndo la pees raado sẽn tar n palgd nag-koods yubla. Yãk a ye n palg f bãgdo n maneg n loe! 
Jeremiah27:3 Dẽ poore; fo na n toola a taabã Edom dĩma, Moab dĩma, Amonitsa dĩma, Tir dĩma, la Sidõ dĩma. Woto wã fo na n dɩk-b lame n kɩs sẽn wa-b b dĩm bãmb zĩigẽ, Zerizalɛɛm ka, a Sedesiyas nengẽ, tɩ bãmb na taas-ba b zu-soaben-dãmba." 
Jeremiah27:4 Fo na n yeel-b lame tɩ b tosg b zu-soaben-dãmba, mam sẽn togsã, maam, dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam." 
Jeremiah27:5 M wilga m pãnga, n wilg tɩ m mii tʋʋmde la m naana tẽnga, n naan ninsaalba la rũmsa sẽn vɩ wã. Mam sẽn naana m dɩkd-b lame n kõt m sẽn dat a soaba." 
Jeremiah27:6 Bɩ y bãng tɩ m yeelame tɩ m na n dɩka y tẽnsa fãa n sagl m ned nugẽ, Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, nugẽ. La ba we-rũmsa menga, mam ning-b-la yẽ nugẽ t'a soog-ba." 
Jeremiah27:7 Tẽnsa fãa na n lebga a soolem, a kamb soolem, a yagens soolem n tãag wakat ninga yẽ meng tẽnga sẽn na n lebg tẽns a taaba soolem, dĩm dãmb pãng sẽn yɩɩd yẽnd rẽnna soolem." 
Jeremiah27:8 Tẽng ninga fãa, bɩ rĩung ninga fãa sẽn ka na n kẽ a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, la a tẽeg a yubla tɩ Babilon dĩma palg nag-koodsa raoogã, m na n kɩtame tɩ b pa zabrẽ, tɩ kom lʋɩ b tẽngẽ, tɩ bã-longdem yõk-ba. M na kɩt tɩ Babilon dĩma sõng-ma tɩ m menes tẽn-kãnga." 
Jeremiah27:9 La yãmba, da kelg-y yãmb bãngdba ye, bɩ bagba sẽn lobd kuga, bɩ neb sẽn wilgd zãmsd võore, n wilgd sawat sẽn yɛdg võore, sẽn tar yel-bãn-tɩto. Bãmb fãa togsd-y lame tɩ ka Babilon dĩma n na n soog yãmb ye." 
Jeremiah27:10 Bãng-y tɩ yaa zirẽ, la y sã n kelg-ba b na n tall-y lame n zãag ne y tẽnga. M na rig-y n yiisi la y kõn põs sʋʋg ye." 
Jeremiah27:11 La tẽng ninga sẽn na n saka n tẽeg a yubla tɩ Babilon dĩma palg a yubla, nag-koodsa daoogã, la a sak n lebg a soolma neda, mam na n kɩtame t'a pa a tẽngẽ la a ko a pʋʋgo. Soaala n yeele.»" 
Jeremiah27:12 Koɛɛg sẽn wẽnd koe-kãnga la a Zeremi le taas Zɩɩda rĩm a Sedesiyas n gom ne-a woto: «Foo ne f nebã, yãmb tog n sak n kẽ-la a Nabikodonozor soolmẽ. Bas t'a soog-fo, foo ne f nebã tɩ woto la y na n põse." 
Jeremiah27:13 Bõe yĩnga tɩ yãmb na n bas y menga la y neba tɩ sʋʋg kʋ yãmba, tɩ kom la bã-longdem kʋ yãmba. Yaool n yaa woto la tẽng fãa na n baase, a sã n zãgs t'a kõn sulg a meng Babilon dĩma taoore, wala Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg-ma." 
Jeremiah27:14 Bãngdba n bee n gomda tɩ kõn le yɩ pakr ne yãmba tɩ y pa Babilon dĩma soolmẽ ye. Ad-y b sẽn togsda ka sɩd ye, da kelg-y-b ye." 
Jeremiah27:15 Soaala paasame tɩ ka bãmb n tʋm-b ye, ba b sã n yet tɩ b gomda Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga, wakat kãnga b yagda zirẽ. Yãmb sã n kelg-ba, m na n dig-y lame n zãag ka la y kõn põse, yãmb ne y bãngdbã sẽn gomd ne yãmbã.»" 
Jeremiah27:16 A Zeremi goma ne maan-kʋʋdba la neb niyns fãa sẽn da tigma la a yeel-b lame: «Ad Soaala koɛɛga: ‹Da kelg-y bãngdb kãensa ye. B yetame tɩ ka na n le kaoos tɩ b le tall wẽnd dooga teedã n wa ye. Yaa teed niyns b sẽn da wʋk n loog Babilon tẽngã. Dẽ fãa ya zirẽ la b togsd yãmba. 
Jeremiah27:17 Da kelg-y ye. Maan-y Babilon dĩma yam, tɩ y na põse. Bõe yĩng la tẽn-kãnga na n wa lebg raboogo?› »" 
Jeremiah27:18 A Zeremi paasame: «Nin-bãmba sã n sɩd ya bãngdba, sã n sɩd ya Soaala yʋʋr yĩnga la b gomda bɩ b yõk dũni fãa Soaala sɛɛga, tɩ b ra wʋk n loog Babilon teed sõma niyns sẽn ket wẽnd doogẽ wã, Zɩɩda rĩma zakẽ, bɩ tẽnga pʋga." 
Jeremiah27:19 Soaala-Wẽnd ket n tara koɛɛga ra-lug-bɛd a yiiba poorẽ, zũud-sĩn-kãsenga poorẽ, sĩmsa sẽn zao bilim-bilma la teed a taaba sẽn pa Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ." 
Jeremiah27:20 Ad-y Babilon dĩma ra pa wʋk te-bãmba, a sẽn wa n looge ne a Yekoniya, a Zoakim biiga la Zɩɩda rĩma, yẽ ne Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda rakãagba ye." 
Jeremiah27:21 Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama gomda woto te-sõma wã poorẽ, teed niyns sẽn pa wẽnd dooga pʋga bɩ Zɩɩda dĩma zakẽ, bɩ Zerizalɛɛm:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‹Te bãmb fãa na n wʋk n looga Babilon la b na n paa be n tãag wakat ning m meng m toore sẽn na n le tall-ba n wa ka. Mam koɛɛg la woto.› » 
Jeremiah28:1 Yʋʋmd n zĩndi, yɩ-la a Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, naam deegr yʋʋmd a naas soaba, yʋʋmda kiuug a nu soaba. Dẽ wakato la a Ananiya sẽn ya bãngda la sẽn ya Gabaõ rao, a Azur biiga, ra be wẽnd dooga pʋga n gomda. A goma a Zeremi taoore, maan-kʋʋdba taoore, la sẽn da tigim-b be wã fãa taoore la a yeel-a-la woto:" 
Jeremiah28:2 «Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala la Israyɛl Wẽnnaama tɩ m wilg-fu: M na n deega Babilon dĩma naam wa b sẽn kaoogd raoog ning sẽn palgd na-koaadg yubla." 
Jeremiah28:3 Keta yʋʋm a yiib muka tɩ m kɩt tɩ b le wa ne zĩ-kãnga, wẽnd dooga teedo la teed a taabã Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, sẽn wʋk n loog a tẽngẽ wã." 
Jeremiah28:4 N paas me, m na n kɩtame t'a Yekoniya, a Zoakim biiga, Zɩɩda dĩma lɛɛg n wa, yẽnda ne a neba sẽn da be Babilon. Wẽnd n gome. N-ye! M na n deega Babilon naama, m na n paag-a-la y zugẽ wa b sẽn paagd raoog nag-koaadg yublẽ.»" 
Jeremiah28:5 Bãngd a Zeremi leoka bãngd a Ananiya, ne maan-kʋʋdba la neba sẽn da be wẽnd dooga pʋga:" 
Jeremiah28:6 «Amina! Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ yɩ boto! D data ne d sũur fãa tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd goama pidsi. Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ goam niyns fo sẽn togsã, taase! Tɩ b kɩt tɩ wẽnd dooga teed fãa, ne yemsa sẽn be Babilon, le lɛɛg n wa zĩ-kãnga!" 
Jeremiah28:7 La koɛɛg n be tɩ m na n togs fo: Kelg neere goam niynsi mam sẽn na n togs foo ne neba fãa sẽn be ka wã. 
Jeremiah28:8 Bãngdba sẽn deng tõnd taoore, maam ne foom taoore, al daar zãra, b wɩng n goma zabre, la yel-beedo, la bã-longdem yelle, sẽn na n zĩnd tẽns wʋsg pʋgẽ, la rĩund wʋsg pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah28:9 Bãngd ninga sẽn gomda laafi yelle marsã, ad-y yaa a sẽn togsã sã n sɩd taase, la b bãngda tɩ sɩd-sɩda, a ya bãngd akɩka, Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tʋme.»" 
Jeremiah28:10 Dẽ marsã la bãngd a Ananiya yãk daoogã sẽn da palg bãngd a Zeremi yublã la a kaoog-a lame. 
Jeremiah28:11 La a Ananiya yaool n yeela neba: «Ad Soaala koɛɛga: ‹Ka ne yʋʋm a yi muka, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n kao gɩrse Babilon dĩma a Nabikodonozor naama wa nag-koodsa raoog sẽn kao y nifẽ wã. A da rɩka a naama n zɩsg ãndũni rãmba wa raoog sẽn palg nag-koaadg yubla.› » Dẽ poore, bãngd a Zeremi loogame." 
Jeremiah28:12 Bãngd a Ananiya sẽn wa n kaoog raoogã sẽn da palg bãngd a Zeremi bãgdã, Soaala-Wẽnd kõ a Zeremi no-kãnga:" 
Jeremiah28:13 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Ananiya, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg la woto: ‹Fo sẽn kaoog raoogã a Zeremi sẽn da palg a bãgdã, ad yaa kut dẽnda la f na n ledge.› »" 
Jeremiah28:14 A Zeremi paasame: «Kelg-y dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, sẽn togsde: ‹Dĩm niyns fãa sẽn gũbg Zɩɩda tẽn-peelma, wilg-b tɩ yaa kut zɩsgo la m na n palg b bãgdo; b na n lebga Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, soolem. Ba we-rũmsa meng na yɩ-la a soolem.› »" 
Jeremiah28:15 La bãngd a Zeremi le yeela bãngd a Ananiya: «Ananiya, kelg neere: Gese, ad Soaala-Wẽnd ka tʋm foom ye, la fo yaool n kɩtame tɩ neba tẽ f zirẽ-be-goama." 
Jeremiah28:16 Dẽ n so tɩ Soaala wilgd-fo tɩ b na n menes-f-la tẽn-kãngã. Fo na n kiime, yʋʋm paalga ka na n vẽk-f ye, tɩ fo tusa neb tɩ b tõdg Soaalã.»" 
Jeremiah28:17 Yʋʋmda kiuug a yopoe soaba pʋgẽ bala bãngda a Ananiya sɩd kiime. 
Jeremiah29:1 Bãngd a Zeremi zĩnda Zerizalɛɛm n tool sebre a Nabikodonozor sẽn da peeg b rãmb n kẽng Babilon tẽnga. A gʋlsa dĩma sagendbã, maan-kʋʋdbã, bãngdbã la pa-weta fãa." 
Jeremiah29:2 Sebra gʋlsa dĩm a Yekoniya sẽn waa n yi Zerizalɛɛm, yẽnda ne a ma, ne kug-zĩidba, ne sagendba, ne Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda taoor dãmba, ne tʋʋm mitba la sẽn manegdb kʋɩlensa pagdsã." 
Jeremiah29:3 Segame tɩ Zɩɩda dĩm a Sedesiyas da tʋma a Elasa, a Safã biiga, a Gemariya, a Ilkiya biiga, tɩ b kẽng Babilon, a Nabikodonozor nengẽ. Bãmb la a Zeremi kɩs sebrã la ad bũmb ning sẽn da be a pʋgẽ:" 
Jeremiah29:4 «Woto yaa dũni fãa Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, koɛɛga ne neb niyns fãa sẽn yi Zerizalɛɛm n digd Babilon:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Mee-y roto n kẽ be; tu-y bãado, n sel tɩɩse tɩ b wome, tɩ y rɩ b biisi;" 
Jeremiah29:6 bao-y pagba n maan kãadem, n dog kamba, kom-dibli la kom-pugli; y kom-dibli wã paam pagba, y kom-pugli wã paam sɩdba, tɩ bãmb me rog b kamba. Modg-y tɩ y sõor paase, da sak-y t'a woog ye!" 
Jeremiah29:7 Modg-y tɩ b sẽn kẽes-y tẽng ninga lebg tẽng sẽn gãe ne laogo, pʋʋs-y tẽn-kãng yĩnga tɩ tẽnga manegre yaa yãmb manegre." 
Jeremiah29:8 Dũni fãa Wẽnd, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, wilgd-y lame tɩ y maan gũusgu. Da bas-y tɩ bãngdb niyns sẽn be-b ne yãmba tudg-y ye. Da bas-y tɩ sẽn gomd-b tɩ b nee beoog yɛla tudg-y ye. Da kelg-y wa bũmb sẽn be yõodo, neb niyns sẽn wilgd yãmb y zãmsd võor ye." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bala b yetame tɩ b sẽn gomdã yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n tʋm-ba la yaa zirẽ. Bãng-y tɩ mam ka tʋm-b ye. Yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah29:10 Soaala le yetame tɩ yʋʋm pisopoe sã n ta, b na waa n ges yãmba, la b na n pidsa b sũ-noog kãabgo, bãmb sẽn da kãab yãmba: b na n le tall-y lame n wa y tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah29:11 Mam, Naaba-Wẽnde, mam mii m sẽn dat bũmb ning y yĩnga. Yaa laafi la m data, ka sũ-sãang ye, m sẽn dat yaa y yell yɩ neer beoogo." 
Jeremiah29:12 Yãmb sã n wa bool-ma, n wa pʋʋs-ma, m na kelg-y." 
Jeremiah29:13 Y sã n wẽnemd y neng n tees-ma, y na le yãend-ma sã n sɩd yaa ne y sũur fãa la y baood maam." 
Jeremiah29:14 M na sak n wa zĩnd yãmb sʋka. Yaa Soaala n gomde. Y sã n bao maam ne y sũur fãa, m na lik m menga. M na tedg y vɩɩma; y sẽn sẽeg n be zĩis niyns fãa bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ, m na le tɩ tall-y n wa. M na n tigim-y lame n le wa kẽes ka, tɩ ka la m da rig-y n yiisi." 
Jeremiah29:15 Soaala togsd-y-la woto fãa tɩ y sẽn be y pa-weera tẽngẽ, Babilon tẽnga, y yetame tɩ Soaala kõ-y-la bãngdb be." 
Jeremiah29:16 Ad Soaala sẽn leokd bũmb ning dĩma poorẽ, sẽn da rɩt-a a Daviid naama poorẽ, la neb niyns fãa sẽn kell-b Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ, y saam-biis niyns sẽn ka tũ-b yãmb n loogã," 
Jeremiah29:17 Sɩd yaa dũni fãa Soaala n gomde: Bũmb a tãab n na n zab ne bãmba: zabre, kom la bã-longdem. B sẽn na n lebg bũmb ninga na kɩt tɩ b tags tɩ b lebga wa kankam sẽn põoge, tɩ ned ka le rat ye." 
Jeremiah29:18 Mam na n pʋg-b-la ne sʋʋga, ne kom la ne bã-longdem. Woto neb niyns fãa sẽn na n yãend-ba, na yɛɛse, dũni wã tõre na yɛɛse. M sẽn na n sẽeg-ba n kẽes tẽng ning fãa, b na tees bãmba wala f sẽn dat n kãab f bɛ t'a lebg a soaba, bɩ wala f sã n dat n gom yel-beed yelle, bɩ bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem wʋsgo yelle, bɩ bũmb sẽn ya yãnd wʋsgo yelle." 
Jeremiah29:19 Dẽ fãa yaa b sẽn ka kelg mam goama yĩnga, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn togs-bã. M yaool n tʋma m bãngdba bãmb nengẽ wakat buud fãa, la ade, b pa kelg-b ye." 
Jeremiah29:20 La sã n ya yãmba, pa-weto, m sẽn yiis b rãmb Zerizalɛɛm n tɩ kẽes Babilon, yãmb yee n kelg maam!" 
Jeremiah29:21 Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam gomda woto, a Kolaya biiga, a Aab, poorẽ, ne a Maaseya biig, a Sidekiya, poorẽ, bãmb sẽn ka bãngdba n yaool n gomd mam yʋʋr yĩnga wa yaa maam n tʋm-ba: m na n bas-b-la Babilon dĩma, a Nabikodonozor, nugẽ, la yẽ na n kood-b-la yãmb taoore." 
Jeremiah29:22 Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn lebg Babilon pa-weto na pʋta bãmb yʋʋre, dũnna tɛka, b sã n wa rat n kãab ned beedo. B na n yeela woto: Bɩ Soaala maan ne foo wa b sẽn maan ne a Sidekiya la Aab, Babilon dĩma sẽn kɩt tɩ b kɩɩm bugmẽ!" 
Jeremiah29:23 La yell a woto sẽn na n pak neb a yiibã, ka bũmb a to n zʋʋg b sẽn ya ra-taase, bũmb sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. B yoome n ket n yet tɩ yaa mam yʋʋr yĩng la b gomda la m yaool n pa kõ-b noor ye. M mi b sẽn maana fãa, m nif yãenda fãa.» — Soaala n gomda." 
Jeremiah29:24 Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnde, tʋma a Zeremi ne b koɛɛg, Neelam dao a Semaya nengẽ." 
Jeremiah29:25 Bãng-y tɩ Neelam dao a Semaya da gʋlsa sebr a toore n tool maan-kʋʋd, a Sefaniya, a Maaseya biiga, la maan-kʋʋds a taaba la neb niyns sẽn pa-b Zerizalɛɛma fãa. A ra gʋlsa woto:" 
Jeremiah29:26 «Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kɩt tɩ fo lebg maan-kʋʋda, a Yeoyada zĩigẽ la f gũd wẽnd doogã, foo n tog n gũus ne neb niyns fãa sẽn yet tɩ b yaa bãngdba la f yõg-ba n pid b yubl ne kutu la f loe-b ne yãndo." 
Jeremiah29:27 Maana a wãn marsã tɩ Anatot rao, a Zeremi, gomd yãmb fãa taoore n yet t'a yaa bãngda tɩ fo ka maan-a bũmbu?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Yella fãa bee fo zugu, tɩ foo n bas-a la a tõog n tool tõnd sebr Babilon ka, n tol n yetẽ tɩ d na n kaoosa ka la d me roto ka n kẽ, la d maan zẽedo n dɩlg d memse ne d kooda biisi.»" 
Jeremiah29:29 Maan-kʋʋd a Sefaniya karma a Semaya sebrã bãngd a Zeremi taoore," 
Jeremiah29:30 la Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la a Zeremi noor kãnga: 
Jeremiah29:31 «Taas yemsã fãa koe-kãnga: ‹Woto la Soaala gomd a Semaya, Neelam raoa, poorẽ: A Semaya sẽn gom ne yãmb wa bãngda yĩnga, tɩ mam yaool n ka tʋm-a wã, la a kɩtame tɩ yãmb tẽ zirẽ goama," 
Jeremiah29:32 woto wã, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, mam na n sɩbga a Semaya, Neelam neda, ne a poorẽ dãmba fãa. Yẽ ned ba ye menga kõn zĩnd yãmb sʋka n yãend sũ-noog ninga mam sẽn na n kõ m nebã. Tɩ bala a sagla m neba tɩ b tõdg Soaala. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde!› »" 
Jeremiah30:1 Soaala-Wẽnd togsa a Zeremi woto: 
Jeremiah30:2 «Yaa maam, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, n gomd ne foom marsã. Gʋls f meng yĩnga, sebr zugu, goam niyns fãa mam sẽn togs foomã." 
Jeremiah30:3 Wakat n wate tɩ m neba yelle, a Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda yelle, na n teeme. Mam na n leb n tall-b lame n wa tẽng ninga mam sẽn da kõ b ba rãmba la b na n le soog-a lame. Dẽ yaa Soaala gomde.»" 
Jeremiah30:4 Ad koɛɛg ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg a Zeremi t'a taas a Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda me. 
Jeremiah30:5 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «Pɛlen-yɩk kɛlenga n sãte, yaa bʋʋr sẽn paasd n dabda." 
Jeremiah30:6 Sok-y n gese rao sã n zoe n dogame. Bõe marsã tɩ m ne rapa fãa sẽn teeg-b sɛɛga wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem, tɩ b sobd n kiidẽ, tɩ b neng yeege?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Kato! Yaa da kãsenga! Daar sẽn ka wẽnd a taaba! Yaa yɩɩr wakato, a Zakoob yĩnga, la a n na põsame.»" 
Jeremiah30:8 Daara sã n wa ta, dũni fãa Wẽnd n gomde, m na n kao raoog ning sẽn palg b yubla la m na kãs b wĩya. B kõn leb n yɩ sãamb yems ye." 
Jeremiah30:9 Yaa maam b Wẽnnaam yam la b na n maane. M na n lebsa a Daviid a naama zaoorẽ la b na n sak-a-la wa b rĩma. 
Jeremiah30:10 Sã n ya foo, Israyɛl, m neda, da zoe rabeem ye, Yaa Soaala n gomde, foom a Zakoob, da maan dabeem ye tɩ bala m watame n na n fãag-fo, m wat n na n yiis-f-la tẽn-zãorgẽ, m wat n na n yiisa f kamba, b yembd tẽngẽ. Israyɛl, f na n le paama laafi, ned kõn le wa sãam f gãag ye." 
Jeremiah30:11 M bee ne foo n na n fãag-fo Soaalã n yeele. M datame tɩ d yɛla yaa n baase, maam ne bu-zẽmbã, mam sẽn sẽeg foo b rãmb tẽngẽ. Sã n ya foo, m ka bas-f saal ye; M waa n kong n sɩbg-f lame wala sẽn segde, m da ka tõe n bas f saal woto ye." 
Jeremiah30:12 N-yẽe! Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: Fo sãmpogrã kẽe pãafo, fo nodrã ka bõn-maagdg ye." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ned ka be sẽn sõngd foo ye; nodr fãa mii n paamda tɩpgo; sã n ya foom, tɩɩm ka ye." 
Jeremiah30:14 Fo roell fãa, yĩma f yelle; b ka leb n baood fo zĩig ye. Mam sɩbga foom wala m da yaa f bɛyã m sɩd yɩɩ toaag ne foo." 
Jeremiah30:15 Bõe yĩnga la f kũmd f sãmpogr yĩnga, n kũmd f tooga sẽn ka woogda yĩnga? Ad-m sã n maan-f woto, yaa f beegra sẽn yɩ kãsenga yĩnga, yaa f kongra sõor sẽn labsa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah30:16 La bãng tɩ sẽn da namsd-b fooma, na n paama namsgo fo bɛɛba nengẽ. Sẽn kis-b fooma na n looga yembdo; sẽn yeesd-b fo futã, b na n yeesa bãmb me futu; sẽn zɛɛd-b fooma, b na n zɛɛ bãmb me. Bɛɛba fãa na n looga yembdo." 
Jeremiah30:17 B boonda foom tɩ nin-faoogo, b boonda foo, Siõ tɩ ned ba a ye toog sẽn ka be ne a soaba; kelge, m na n sãooga f sãmpogrã. Soaala-Wẽnd n gome!" 
Jeremiah30:18 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg a to: «Israyɛl buudu, m na n teema y vɩɩm, m na n zoe-la y nimbãanega; tẽnsa na n le maneg n meeme la na n yɩɩ rabooda zugu. Ro-neeba na n le me b pĩnd zĩisẽ." 
Jeremiah30:19 Neb na n zĩnda yɩng n wʋm yɩɩla, n wʋm sũ-noog yɩɩla; la yãmba, Zakoob kamba, ad-y y sõora ka na n boog ye. M na n paasa y neba sõore. B kõn saag n le ges yãmb kegr ye, m na n pids-y-la ne waoogr kũuni." 
Jeremiah30:20 La yãmba, Zakoob kamba, y na n le maana y tig-raasã m nifẽ la m na zẽk m nug ne sẽn wẽoogd-b yãmba." 
Jeremiah30:21 Yãmb nin-yende n na n lebg yãmb naaba; N-ye, yãmb nin-yend n na n yɩ-y naaba! M na n kõ-a-la sore t'a pẽneg maam, tɩ ned ba a ye ka na le saag n koos a yõor ye, n sak n kolg maam tɩ m ka bool-a ye, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n togs rẽnna." 
Jeremiah30:22 Woto y na n leb n yɩɩ mam buudu, tɩ mam me lebg yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Jeremiah30:23 Ad-y sɩlmande n yiki. Yaa Soaala sũ-puuri. Sob-raoogo n buiid nin-wẽnsã. 
Jeremiah30:24 Soaala-Wẽnd sũura ka na n sigi tɩ b ka pids b sẽn da yalsa ye. Dẽ na waa n lebg vẽeneg y yĩnga, daar a ye!" 
Jeremiah31:1 Wakata sã n wa ta, Soaala n kãabd noogo, mam na n yɩ-la a Israyɛl buud fãa Wẽnde, la a Israyɛl na n yɩɩ mam buudu." 
Jeremiah31:2 Woto la Soaala gomda: Buud ninga sẽn põs-a sʋʋga a pa-weera tẽnsẽ, yẽ la m pʋgd ne nonglem, la woto me la a Israyɛl le wɩɩd ne a bi-bɩɩlmẽ pãnga." 
Jeremiah31:3 Ad Soaala sẽn zĩnd yɩɩg n leok-ma: M ket n nong-f-la ne m pĩnd nonglem, m ket n nong-f lane n ka teemnẽ ye." 
Jeremiah31:4 Israyɛl, m pʋg-nongre f na n le yik n yalsa f nao zutu, f na le tõog n dɩk f gãngão-gilga f me lagem sẽn saood-b ne sũ-noogã." 
Jeremiah31:5 Fo na n le sela bugsuntung Samari tãmsã zutu; bugsuntunda rãmb na yaa n dɩ b tʋʋmd yõodo. 
Jeremiah31:6 Sɩda, daar n wate, tɩ gũudba na n tãs Efrayim tãnga zugu: «D dʋ Siõ tãnga zugu, d dʋ n paam Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam.»" 
Jeremiah31:7 Tãs-y sũ-noog yɩɩlle a Israyɛl yĩnga. D wek bu-zẽmba tʋba ne d kaasgo, zodg-y y pẽgr yɩɩla, yeel-y: «Soaala, fãag-y y buudu, fãag-y Israyɛl bu-kellã.» Sɩda yaa woto la Soaala gomda:" 
Jeremiah31:8 «M na tɩ yiis-b-la nug goabg n wa, m na n yiis-b-la tẽn zãoorgẽ n wa. B fãa gill bee ka, zoeens la wobse, tʋtr-pʋse la kom-peels ma rãmba. M buuda lɛɛg n wata zãnga." 
Jeremiah31:9 B lɛɛg n wata ne nintãm tɩ mam yãagd-b la m belgd-b. M tar-b lame n teesd koom zĩigẽ, b tũuda so naana, bɛoog ka be n na n lub-b ye. M yaa ba a Israyɛl yĩnga la a Efrayim la m bi-kẽenga.»" 
Jeremiah31:10 Yãmba, bu-zẽmba, kelg-y Soaala koɛɛga. Taas-y b koɛɛga tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba, al tẽnsa sẽn puk koom sʋka; yeel-y yã: «Soaala ra sẽega a Israyɛl la bãmb n lɛɛg n tigimd-a marsã la b get a yelle, wa rũm-kɩɩm sẽn get a rũmsi.»" 
Jeremiah31:11 Soaala fãaga a Israyɛl nebã, b fãag-b-la bɛ sẽn tar pãng nugẽ." 
Jeremiah31:12 B na n lɛɛg n waame ne sũ-noogo, Siõ tãnga zugu. B neng na n pɩla ne sũ-noogo tɩ yaa kũun ka tɛk la b na n paame: B na n paama alkam, rã-paalga la ka-paalga; n paas piisi, bʋʋse, niisi. B na n kẽe tẽns sẽn wẽnd zẽedo, zẽed sẽn gãe ne koom. Beenẽ, fãagr saagr ka le ya toog ye." 
Jeremiah31:13 Wakat kãnga, kom-pugli na n sao ne sũ-noogo; na n yɩɩ boto me ne kom-bɩɩba la nin-kẽemse. Sɩda, Soaala n gomde, b sũ-beeda na n tedgame n lebg sũ-noogo. M na n maasa b sũuri n menes b sũ-sãangã, m na n pids-b-la ne sũ-noogo." 
Jeremiah31:14 M na n tɩgsa maan-kʋʋdba ne rũm-kaam, m na n kõ-la m buudã bũmb ning fãa sẽn ya sõmbo." 
Jeremiah31:15 Woto la Soaala le gomda: Kelg-y tɩ koɛɛg n yit Rama, yãb toog n yit be, yaa a Rasɛl n yãbd a kamba, la a tõt belgre, tɩ b ka ket ye." 
Jeremiah31:16 La Soaala yeta a Rasɛl woto: «Sigs f sũuri, yẽes f nintãm, f naong na n paama rolbo. Yaa maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. F kamba na yi-la bɛɛba tẽngẽ n le wa." 
Jeremiah31:17 Beo-sõng na n le vẽeg-f lame. Yaa Soaala n gomde. F kamba, na n lebg n waa b ba yiri.»" 
Jeremiah31:18 M wʋma a Efrayim guglengu, a yetame: «Soaala, yãmb sɩbga tõnd al wʋsgo, y noma tõnd wa nag-bi-tõtre. Sõng-y tɩ d le lɛɛg n kẽ yãmba, n wa kẽ yãmb ne d sũur fãa, tɩ yaa yãmb bala la tõnd Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah31:19 N-ye! Tõnd da basa yãmba, la d tuubame marsã. D deega d kongre la d tooda d yãoogo; d vɩɩma yãnd tar-d lame, a yãnda tar-d-la wʋsgo, d tẽra wẽng ning d sẽn tʋme d sẽn waa n ya kom-bɩɩba.»" 
Jeremiah31:20 A Efrayim ya m bi-nongre. Yaa Soaala n gomde, m yama kẽe-a lame. A sã n beeg n tog ne sɩbgre, m baas n kũmd-a lame m sẽn nong-a wʋsg yĩnga, m ka tõe n ka zoe a nimbãaneg ye." 
Jeremiah31:21 Ning makre f sora zugu ges f sẽn dɩk sor ningã. Israyɛl bi-pugla lɛɛg n wa, lɛɛg n wa f tẽnsẽ!" 
Jeremiah31:22 F lebgra na n le tadgame n ta da-bʋre, bi-tõtre, ra-bʋg la f yãk yã? Mik Soaala le waa ne bõn-paal tẽng zugu: marsã yaa pagã n na n belma a sɩda." 
Jeremiah31:23 Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda, gomd la woto. M sã n le wa tedg Zɩɩda ne a tẽnsa nenga yaa woto la b na n le yeele: «Bɩ Soaala ning-f barka, Siõ tãn-sõngo, fãagr doogo!»" 
Jeremiah31:24 Wakat kãnga sẽn be-b pʋtẽ, sẽn kẽed-b Zɩɩda tẽnsã na n sooga tẽnga gilli, koaadba, rũm-kɩɩmba ne b rũmsi." 
Jeremiah31:25 Pãng sẽn sɛɛ a soaba na n paamame tɩ mabge, sẽn yãbd-a kom, m na n dɩlg-a lame." 
Jeremiah31:26 La neba na n wa gomda woto: «M sẽn gũs n neke, m pa yãend bũmb sẽn paoog ye, m yãeeme tɩ m gõeem yɩ noogo.»" 
Jeremiah31:27 Soaala gomde: daar n wate tɩ m na n pids Israyɛl la Zɩɩda tẽns ne neba la rũmsi wala b sẽn pids pʋt ne koodo. 
Jeremiah31:28 Sẽn ta marsã, m da yika ne bãmba n võod la m tusd n lubdẽ, n vigsdẽ, la m sãamnẽ, n maandẽ wẽnga. Dũnna tɛka m na n wẽneg n teesa yãmba, n modg ne maneg n me la maneg n sele. Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah31:29 Wakat kãnga, b pa na n le yeel abada: «Saam-dãmbã n wãb sib kãse tɩ kamb yẽn deeg n zãabe.»" 
Jeremiah31:30 Ned sã n wãb sib kãse, yaa yẽ soab yẽna n na n zãabe; ned kam yel-wẽnd n kʋʋd-a." 
Jeremiah31:31 Soaala n gomde: «Daar n wate, tɩ m na n yõg zood paalga ne Israyɛl roogo, ne Zɩɩda roogo." 
Jeremiah31:32 A kõn yɩ wa zood ninga m sẽn yõg ne b yaab rãmba, m sẽn waa n gãd bãmb nug daare n yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga ye. Zoodã, bãmb b toore n sãam-a la mam yaa bãmb zu-soaba.» Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele." 
Jeremiah31:33 Soaalã n gomde: «Zood ninga m sẽn na n yõg ne Israyɛl roogo wakat kãnga la woto. M na n ninga m noorã neba sũurẽ, m na n gʋls-a-la b sũurẽ. Rẽ wẽnde m na n lebga b Wẽnde tɩ bãmb yɩ mam neba." 
Jeremiah31:34 Bãmb sʋka ned kõn le yeel a tũud-n-taaga, a saam-biiga t'a wa t'a wilg-a maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yaa a soaba, tɩ b fãa na n bãng-m lame, nin-bila n wat nin-kãsenga. Wakat kãng tɩ m basa fãa taale, m ka le tẽr b beegra ye.»" 
Jeremiah31:35 Ad-y ned ninga sẽn yagend-a wĩndga a zĩigẽ t'a kõt raara vẽenema, sẽn kõt-a kiuug la ãdsa noore tɩ b tʋʋs vẽenem yʋngo, sẽn dãmbd-a mogra t'a ningd bʋʋre, yaa dũni fãa Wẽnde, yaa maam. La woto la m yeta:" 
Jeremiah31:36 «M sã n tõog, ba raar a ye bala, n yeel tɩ m sãama m noorã, tɩ noor ning kiuuga la ãdsa sẽn deegdã lebga no-kʋdgo, lebga no-faoogo, Soaalã n gomde, wakat kãng marsã la m me na n tõog n yeele t'a Israyɛl ka le ya m buud ye." 
Jeremiah31:37 Ned sã n tõe n yeele tɩ saaga ne tẽnga sẽn zãr taaba yaa bũmb sẽn tõe n mage, n yeel t'a mii tẽnga sẽn sudi n ta al zĩig ninga, mam me na yeel marsã tɩ m tõeeme tɩ maam ne a Israyɛl zooda sãame. M na yeel tɩ m tõe n zãaga ne a Israyɛl a beegra yĩnga.» Yɩɩ woto la Soaala gom yã." 
Jeremiah31:38 Daar n wate, Soaala gomde, la daara zoe n kolgame, tɩ b na n le me Zerizalɛɛm lalsã, mam waoogr yĩnga. Na n sɩnga a Ananeyɛl gaosgã n ta b sẽn boond tɩ Gõdr-noorã." 
Jeremiah31:39 B na n sõoga tẽnga toaag paalle; na n deng n teesa nin-taoore, Gareb tãn-bilã, n gõdg n tees Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Vɩʋʋg ning b sẽn na n dɩk n kõ maama la woto: bãg-faag ning b sẽn mumd kũuma la b lobd maanda tompɛglma, vɩʋʋg ning sẽn yegd Sedrõ kʋɩl-bɛɛgã n tat yaanga, wiida noora gõdrã. Bũmb kõn le tõog n võog be, bũmb kõn le tõog n lub be ye." 
Jeremiah32:1 Soaala taasa b gomd a Zeremi, Zɩɩda dĩm a Sedesiyas naamẽ, a yʋʋmd piig soaba, rat n yeelame tɩ Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba." 
Jeremiah32:2 Babilon naab da yẽda Zerizalɛɛm. Rẽ wakat tɩ b da paga a Zeremi Zɩɩda dĩma yiri, gũudba zakẽ." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zĩ-kãng la a Sedesiyas ra kɩt tɩ b pag a Zeremi. La rẽ yaa a sẽn zab ne-a n yeel-a tɩ yaa bõe yĩng la a taas Soaala gomd kãnga: «M na n dɩka Zerizalɛɛm n sagl Babilon dĩma nugẽ. Babilon dĩma na n kẽ-la a pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah32:4 A Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, kõn põs Kalde rãmba, tɩ m yalsame t'a na n paa Babilon dĩma nugẽ. A na n wa-la a Nabikodonozor taoore tɩ b neng tees taaba, t'a gomd t'a leokdẽ." 
Jeremiah32:5 Dẽ poore b na n talla a Sedesiyas n kẽng Babilon t'a tɩ pa be n ta wakat ning m sẽn na n wa ges-a. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde la m paasdame tɩ ba yãmb sã n ket n maand zabre ne Babilon me, y kõn tõog-a bada.»" 
Jeremiah32:6 Dẽ me wakat la a Zeremi ra togsda: «M wʋma Soaala sẽn gomd ne-ma la b maanẽ: 
Jeremiah32:7 ‹Ad a Anameyɛl, f roagda, a Salum biiga, na n wa yãend-f lame, a pʋʋgẽ, Anatot poorẽ; a na n goma ne foo tɩ f ra pʋʋgã, tɩ foo n pẽ yẽ ne rogem; fo n so raaga pipi.› »" 
Jeremiah32:8 Wala Soaala sẽn da wilg-ma, m doagda a Anameyɛl waa n yãend-m-la gũudba zakẽ n yeel-ma: «Foo n tog n da m pʋʋg ning sẽn be Anatotã, a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ. Fo n tog n da-a, tɩ foo n pẽ maam ne rogem. Foo n tog n da-a pipi n soog-a.» Woto wã m bãngame tɩ yaa Soaala n da gom ne maam." 
Jeremiah32:9 Woto wã m da-la a Anameyɛl pʋʋga sẽn da be Anatot n yao ligdi. Yɩɩ wakɩ koeems piig la a yopoe. 
Jeremiah32:10 Sɛb a yiib zugu la m gʋls pʋʋga raabã. M paga sebr a ye kaset dãmb taoore n ning m meng kaseto, la m maga ligda zɩslem." 
Jeremiah32:11 La m dɩka sɛb a yiiba sẽn kõt pʋʋga raaba kasetã t'a ye page wala noora sẽn datã, t'a to wã ka pagã," 
Jeremiah32:12 la m kɩs-b-la a Barʋk, a Neriya biiga la a Maaseya yagenga. M doagd a Anameyɛl ne neb niyns sẽn da naag maam n kõ b kasetã, ra bee be, n paas Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn da be gũudba zakẽ." 
Jeremiah32:13 M yeela a Barʋk neba fãa taoore: 
Jeremiah32:14 «Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama gomda: Rɩk sɛb kãensã, sẽn paga ne sẽn ka paga wã, n ning-b yagd rʋk pʋgẽ, sẽn na yɩ-la tɩ b tõog n bĩng be n kaoose.»" 
Jeremiah32:15 Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnd, gomda: «B na n le raa pʋto la roto la bugsuntundu, tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ.»" 
Jeremiah32:16 M sẽn kɩs a Neriya biiga a Barʋk sɛb a yiibã, m pʋʋsa Soaala woto:" 
Jeremiah32:17 «Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb wilga y pãnga la y tʋʋm-minim n naan saag la tẽnga. Ne yãmba, bũmb ka be n ya toog ye." 
Jeremiah32:18 Yãmb wilgda y nonglem ne ninsaalba, nonglem sẽn ka be sɛɛbo; ba rãmb sã n beege, yãmb kɩtdame tɩ b kamba dɩ b beegra taale. Yãmb la pãng la ziir soaba Wẽnde, yãmb la dũni fãa Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah32:19 Yãmb sẽn dat bũmb ninga zulma la y pãnga tõe n pids-b-la fãa. Yãmb geta ninsaalba sẽn maande n na n dol ned kam fãa wala a tʋʋma sẽn tog ne. 
Jeremiah32:20 Yãmb wilga y sẽn yaa a soaba ne yel-bãna y sẽn maan d yaab rãmba nifẽ, b sẽn waa n be Ezipt, la rũnna menga, ka Israyɛl buuda bala n ket n ne-b ye, yaa ninsaalba fãa buudu." 
Jeremiah32:21 Y wilga y pãnga, n wilg y tʋʋm-minim n maan yel-bãn sẽn yɩkd pɛlenga, n paam n yiis y buud, a Israyɛl, Ezipt tẽnga." 
Jeremiah32:22 Y ra kãaba d yaab rãmbã tɩ y na n kõ-b-la tẽng ning d sẽn kẽed dũnna wã, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo, la y sɩd tõog n pidsa y kãabgo." 
Jeremiah32:23 B wa n deega tẽngã n sooge. B yaool n pa kelg y goama ye, b pa tũ y sẽn wilg ye, b pa reeg y noor ye. Yaa rẽ la yɛla rɩt-b rũnna." 
Jeremiah32:24 Ges-y Babilon tãb-biisã, b yẽrgda Zerizalɛɛm wãaba seglgo n digd a baasga zĩigẽ. B na n deega Zerizalɛɛm, a zoe n lʋɩ-la b nugẽ la bala, b rat n tõog-a-la ne b zab-teedo, ne kom la bã-longdem. Soaala sẽn da kãabã n pidsi, wala y nin sẽn ne." 
Jeremiah32:25 N-ye! Tẽnga lʋɩ Babilon dãmb nugẽ la bala. Bõe yĩng marsã la y yeel-ma, Soaala-Wẽnde, tɩ m da pʋʋgo la m yao vẽenega, kaset dãmb taoore?»" 
Jeremiah32:26 La yaa woto, a Zeremi n gomde, la Soaala leok maam:" 
Jeremiah32:27 «Ade maam la Wẽnde, bõn-vɩɩs fãa Wẽnde. Maam la Soaala. Bũmb ka be sẽn toe ne maam ye." 
Jeremiah32:28 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, Soaalã n gomde, m yeta woto: m na n dɩka tẽngã n sagl Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, nugẽ, a tãb-biisa nugẽ. Tẽnga na n lʋɩɩme." 
Jeremiah32:29 Babilon dãmba sẽn da sɩng tẽnga wãabã na n kẽ-la a pʋgẽ la yaa bugum la b na n ning-a. B na n yõoga rot niynsi b sẽn da paoog maam b rãmb pʋsẽ, n yõogd wisdu a Baal yĩnga la b wat ne kũuni la rãam, bu-zẽna wẽn-naandsa yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah32:30 «Sɩda, Soaala n ket n gomda, al b kibara sɩngrẽ, Israyɛl la Zɩɩda rãmb maana sẽn ka tat m yam bala. Israyɛl dãmb sẽn tõog bũmb ninga bala yaa m beegre." 
Jeremiah32:31 Zerizalɛɛm tẽngã n wa ne m sũ-puurã la m sũ-fõorã, a meeb raare n tãag rũnna, la dẽ wã m pa rat n le yãend-a m taoor ye." 
Jeremiah32:32 Yaa yel-wẽna a Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda sẽn maana n zabd-ma, a dĩm dãmba yel-wẽna, a nin-kẽemsã, a maan-kʋʋdbã, a bãngdbã la Zerizalɛɛm kẽedbã yel-wẽna." 
Jeremiah32:33 B teesa maam b kãare, ka b neng ye; m yaool n ka vʋʋs ne b saglgo, m ka vʋʋs ne wilg-b tɩ b gũusi, la ned ba a ye ka sak n kelg-m ye." 
Jeremiah32:34 Yɩɩd rẽnna, b waa n kẽesa b wẽn-naandsã m dooga pʋga, n dẽgem-a." 
Jeremiah32:35 B manega zĩiga, Ben-Inom bãoogẽ wã, b wẽn-naand a Baal yĩnga; b wẽnd a Molɛk yĩnga b maana b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli maando. M yaool n zɩ n kos-b bũmb a woto ye. Yell a woto buud da zɩ pɩʋʋg m yam ye. B sẽn maan yel-beed a woto fãa, b dogla yell kãseng a Zɩɩda zugu." 
Jeremiah32:36 Ne rẽ fãa, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, m tara sẽn na n paas Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ. Tẽn-kãng poorẽ, fo naaga neb n gomd woto: ‹Zabr sʋʋga, kom la bã-longdem kẽes-a-la Babilon dĩma soolmẽ.›" 
Jeremiah32:37 Ade, mam daaba yaa toore. M sũur sɩd waa n puugame, m da ka nonge, m sũur waa n fõtame ne tẽnga rãmba la m dig-b lame n sẽeg tẽns ka tɛk pʋsẽ. La m na le tigim-ba la m tall-ba tɩ b wa vɩɩnd ka ne laafi." 
Jeremiah32:38 Woto b na leb n yɩ m buudu, tɩ mam yɩ b Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah32:39 M na kõ-b sũ yɛnga tɩ b pa ne maam daar fãa, n paam sũ-noogo, bãmb ne b kamba." 
Jeremiah32:40 Mam wẽendame tɩ m na ges b yelle, m pids-b ne m kũuni. M na n yõga zood sẽn ka sɛɛb ne bãmba. M na tõog tɩ b waoog-ma n da le saag n zãag ne-m ye." 
Jeremiah32:41 M sũur na yɩ noogo m sẽn paamd n maand-b neere la m na vigl-b tẽn-kãnga, daar fãa yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah32:42 «M le yeta woto, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, maam n tall yel-beedã n wa kõ a Zɩɩda. La maam n na n pidsa ne sũ-noog ning m sẽn kãab-a." 
Jeremiah32:43 Fo naaga neb a taab n gomda tɩ tẽn-kãnga lʋɩɩ Babilon nugẽ, n lebg we-raoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem, tɩ ned ka tiid a pʋgẽ, tɩ rũng me ka a pʋgẽ ye. Yaool n yaa tẽn-kãnga pʋga la b na n le sɩng n daad pʋto." 
Jeremiah32:44 N-ye, a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelmẽ, Zerizalɛɛm vẽenemẽ, a Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ, sẽn zao-b tãmsa zutu, bãadẽ dãmba, sẽn be-b Negɛb, b na n le raa pʋto, b na n le koosa pʋto, b na n waa ne kaset rãmba, b na n ninga kaset pʋta koosga sɛb zutu. M na n teka tẽnga kẽedb nenga.» Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah33:1 A Zeremi da ket n zĩi ne bãeense gũudba zakẽ; Soaala le goma ne-a n yetẽ: 
Jeremiah33:2 «Woto la sẽn naana tẽnga, n kõ-a nenga la keglma, woto la sẽn boond a soab tɩ Soaala gomda:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‹Bool maam tɩ m na leok-fo; mam na n togs-f-la yell kãsens sẽn solge tɩ f ka mi baa fɩ. 
Jeremiah33:4 Ade, maam a Israyɛl Wẽnda tara koɛɛg n na n wilg-fu tẽng kãnga roto la Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba rot poorẽ. Fãa lebga raboogo." 
Jeremiah33:5 Yaa zaalem la b na n mak n gɩdg wãaba sẽn segendã, n gɩdg Babilon dãmbã. Dẽ na n wa pidsa tẽnga bal ne kũum. M sũura yika ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmba. B wẽnema sẽn ya wʋsg yĩnga mam me maana wa m toog ka le be ne-b ye." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ad-m sẽn le yik n wat n na n tɩp-ba wala b sẽn tɩpd ned sẽn paam sãmpogre. B na n sãoogame, b na n le paama laafi, m na n kɩtame tɩ tẽnga le zĩnd laafi la a tɩlg rabeem buud fãa." 
Jeremiah33:7 Mam na n teka a Zɩɩda la a Israyɛl vɩɩma, m na n le yals-b-la b pĩnd zĩigẽ." 
Jeremiah33:8 M basa b beegra taale, m kõ-b-la b sẽn welg ne maama sugri." 
Jeremiah33:9 Dẽ marsã la m sũur na n yɩ noogo m sã n pʋt Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋre, a na n lebga m zu-zẽkre la m faongo ãndũni rãmba fãa taoore. B sã n wa bãng m sẽn segend n na n kõ-b kũun niynsã, b na n diga rabeem, b na n yɛɛsa b sẽn na n gale ne sũ-noog la arzɛk ningã.› »" 
Jeremiah33:10 Woto la Soaala gomda: Zɩɩda rãmba, yãmb saad n pordame tɩ b wʋka y tẽnga laog fãa n looge, ned ka kete, rũng ka kete. Yaa sɩda, Zɩɩda tẽnse la Zerizalɛɛm soya lebga vɩɩdo, nin-vɩɩg ka kete, ninsaal bɩ rũnga. Bãng-y tɩ tẽn-kãens pʋgẽ b na n le wʋma" 
Jeremiah33:11 sũ-noog kaasgo, kibs rãmb bʋʋre. B na n le wʋma kãad-paals yɩɩla, b na le wʋm tɩ b yɩɩnd yɩɩll kãnga: Dũni fãa Wẽnd paam pẽgre! B pida ne bʋgsem la b nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye. B na n le wʋma yɩɩla, neb niyns sẽn wat wẽnd doogẽ ne b maanda yɩɩla. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd tɩ b na n le tall-b lame n wa b pĩnd zĩigẽ." 
Jeremiah33:12 Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnd gomda: Tẽn-kãnga sẽn sãama pʋgẽ tɩ ned bɩ rũng ka le ketẽ, tẽns a taaba pʋgẽ, vɩʋʋg na n le yãenda rũn-kɩɩmba yĩnga, rũn-kɩɩm niyns sẽn gũud-b bʋʋsa la piisa yʋngã." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tãnga zugu, bãoogẽ, Negɛb, Bẽnzame tẽnsẽ, Zerizalɛɛm, la Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ, rũn-kɩɩmba na n le leglame la b sõd b bʋʋs la b piisi. Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah33:14 Soaala n gomde: «Ade daar n wate, la a zoe n pẽnegame tɩ sũ-noog kãabgo mam sẽn kãab Israyɛl roog ne Zɩɩda roogo na n taase." 
Jeremiah33:15 Wakat kãnga mam na n yiisa a Daviid yagenga. A na n dɩɩ naam ne zemsgo tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ. 
Jeremiah33:16 Dasem kãense, Zɩɩda na n paama fãagre, Zerizalɛɛm na n zĩnda ne laafi. Ad yʋʋr ninga b sẽn na n bool tẽngã: Soaala-Wẽnd la d bʋ-kaooda.»" 
Jeremiah33:17 Ad Soaala koɛɛg a to: A Daviid kõn kong yagenga sẽn na n dɩ naam Israyɛl zug abada. 
Jeremiah33:18 Boto me a Levi buudẽ wã maan-kʋʋd kõn konge abada sẽn na n yaas m taoore n kʋ, beoog-beoog fãa, yũ-noog maoongo, laafi maoongo la a yõog wisdu ye." 
Jeremiah33:19 La Soaala le goma ne a Zeremi: 
Jeremiah33:20 «Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde n sokde: Yãmb tõe n teema noor ning m sẽn kõ daare la yʋnga bɩ, y tõeeme tɩ bũmb viig bɩ? M pa tẽed ye!" 
Jeremiah33:21 Bɩ y bãng tɩ zood ning m sẽn yõg ne m sõgna a Daviid kõn kao ye. Ned kõn tõog t'a Daviid yageng ka rɩ naam Zerizalɛɛm ye. Ned me kõn tõog t'a Levi yageng ka yals m taoore n tʋm maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd ye. 
Jeremiah33:22 M na n kɩtame tɩ m sõgna a Daviid yagensa yɩ wʋsgo, n kɩt t'a Levi yagens yɩ wʋsgo. B sõora ka na n tõog n sõde, wa ãds sẽn be yĩngri, wa bĩisri sẽn sam mogr noore.»" 
Jeremiah33:23 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto yɛs ne a Zeremi: 
Jeremiah33:24 «F ka kelgd neba sẽn yete? B gomdame tɩ m basa a Israyɛl ne a Zɩɩda: buud a yiibã, m sẽn da tũusã. Ad-y sẽn gomd-b woto wã ka le get m neba wa buud sẽn zem bũmb ye. B sãbsd-a lame." 
Jeremiah33:25 Ad-m sẽn yete: M wilga wĩndg la yʋngo m daab sẽn yaa a soaba, m yalsa m noya yĩngr la tẽng yĩnga." 
Jeremiah33:26 Dɩlla ned tõe n deegame tɩ m basa m sõgna a Daviid yagense, n zãgs tɩ m kõn tũus bãmb sʋka ned ninga sẽn na n dɩ naam a Abraam, a Izaak la a Zakoob buuda zug bɩ? M sũura pida ne nonglem bãmb yĩnga la m na sɛɛsa b yembdo.»" 
Jeremiah34:1 Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, da taka zabre ne Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽnsã. A ra waa ne a tãb-biisã la a sẽn da so tẽns niynsa fãa tãb-biisi. Wakat kãng me la Soaala taas a Zeremi koees kãensã:" 
Jeremiah34:2 «Maam, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, maam n kot-f tɩ f kẽng n tɩ yãend a Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma la f yeel-a: Kelg Soaala koɛɛga: ‹M na n dɩka tẽn-kãnga n sagl Babilon dĩma nugẽ la a na n sãam-a-la ne bugum." 
Jeremiah34:3 La foom, Zeremi, fo kõn põs ye; b na n yõka foom n n kɩs dĩma. F na tõog n ges Babilon naaba ne f nini; f na n leok a sokre, f meng f toore, n yaool n dɩk Babilon sore." 
Jeremiah34:4 Yeel a Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda rĩma, t'a sã n maan wa m sẽn yeel-a, a na n põsa kũ-toogo. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n togsd-a woto." 
Jeremiah34:5 A kũuma ka na n yɩ kũ-toog ye, a na looga ne bãane. B na n mum-a-la wala a ba rãmba, wa dĩm dãmba sẽn deng-b yẽnda; b na wisa tɩdar a yĩnga la kʋʋr yɩɩll kãnga la b na n pʋd a yĩnga: Kato, dĩma konga pãnga! Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n togsd rẽnna.› »" 
Jeremiah34:6 Woto la koees niyns bãngd a Zeremi sẽn taas Zɩɩda rĩm a Sedesiyas. Yɩɩ Zerizalɛɛm. 
Jeremiah34:7 Rẽ tɩ Babilon dĩma tãb-biis ra wẽeda Zerizalɛɛm la tãnsoben-tẽnsa sẽn be Zɩɩda n ket n nan pa lʋɩ, wala Lakis la Azeka." 
Jeremiah34:8 Soaala gomd le taa a Zeremi, rẽ tɩ dĩm a Sedesiyas kaoola ne Zerizalɛɛm na-biisa fãa, t'a na n basa yemsã." 
Jeremiah34:9 Ned kam fãa da tog n basa a yemse sẽn ya Ebre-buudu, raoa bɩ paga, ned ba a ye da ka tog n le tall Ebre buud wa yamb ye, t'a yaa a saam-biiga." 
Jeremiah34:10 Na-biisã ne neba fãa sakame n bas b yemse tɩ b soog b mense, b yaa raoa bɩ paga, b ka na n le kẽes-b yembd ye." 
Jeremiah34:11 La rẽ poore b teka yam n le yõg b yemsã, b sẽn da base, la b le kẽes-b-la yembdo, rapã ne pagbã." 
Jeremiah34:12 Rẽ la Soaala taas a Zeremi gomd kãnga: 
Jeremiah34:13 «Woto la Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda, gomda: ‹Mam yõga zoodo ne y yaab rãmba, mam sẽn wa n yiis-b Ezipt, b yembd-tẽngẽ, m yeel-b lame:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba poore, fo na n basa f sẽn da yamb ning fãa t'a soog a menga. Yʋʋm a yoobe, a na n yɩɩ f yãmba, rẽ poore fo na n lebs-a-la a yiri ne a burkĩndlem. Y ba rãmba ka kelg mam gomda ye." 
Jeremiah34:15 Sã n ya yãmba, yãmb da wɩsga y meng y toore n bas y yemsã tɩ m da pẽgd yã. Y ra tol n wẽena, mam taoore, m waoogra roogẽ ka, tɩ na n yɩɩ boto." 
Jeremiah34:16 La y teka yam, n paoog maam, n le reeg y yemse la yãmb n yaool n da bas-ba, pagb la rapa, tɩ b kẽng b sẽn datẽ.› »" 
Jeremiah34:17 Woto wã, ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga: «Ned kam fãa tog n basẽ-la a yamba t'a soog a menga. F yamba yaa f saam-biiga, a yaa f to. Yãmb pa reeg m noor ye. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la maam, y Wẽndã, na n bas sʋʋga, bã-longdem la kom tɩ bãmb me soog b menga n tʋm b soog-m-meng tʋʋma ne yãmba. Bãng-y tɩ ãndũni rãmba fãa sẽn na n yãend-b yãmba, b na yɛɛs la b pĩ b noore." 
Jeremiah34:18 M na n sɩbga neb niyns fãa sẽn ka pids-b kãabgã m sẽn yet tɩ b kãabã. B yaool n da kaoolame tɩ b yemsa na n sooga b mense. B kaoola rẽ mam taoore, maoonga wakato, b sẽn waa n pasg nag-bila boaag a yi n dɩgl tɩ b tũ sʋk n loogã." 
Jeremiah34:19 M sẽn na n dɩk b rãmba n kɩs b bɛɛba la woto: Zɩɩda na-biisi n paas Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, maan-kʋʋdba la tẽnga neb niyns sẽn tũ-b nag-bila boaag a yiiba sʋkã n loogã." 
Jeremiah34:20 Mam na n bas-b lame tɩ b lʋɩ b bɛɛba nusẽ, sẽn dat n yãk b yõora nusẽ. B rɩgre na n yɩɩ yĩngri luiili la tẽng rũms rɩɩbo." 
Jeremiah34:21 Zɩɩda dĩma, a Sedesiyas menga, m na n dɩka yẽnda ne a kug-zĩidba, n bas b bɛɛba sẽn dat b kũuma nusẽ. M na n bas-b-la Babilon dĩma nugẽ. Babilon tãb-biisa yaool n n zoe n yikame menga n tar n lebd poorẽ, n zãagd ne Zerizalɛɛm b sẽn da gũbgã." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ad-y m na bool-b tɩ b lɛɛg n wa tẽn-kãnga, n zabe, n lub-a, n yõog-a bugum. La mam na n tedga Zɩɩda tẽnsã tɩ b lebg we-raoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gome.»" 
Jeremiah35:1 Soaala goma ne a Zeremi. Yɩ-la a Zoziyas biiga, a Zoakim sẽn waa n dɩt naam Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ. Ad-b sẽn yeele:" 
Jeremiah35:2 «Kẽng n tɩ yãend a Rekab yagense n peeg-ba n kẽ wẽnd dooga zãong a ye pʋga la kõ-b rãam be tɩ b yũ.» 
Jeremiah35:3 Rẽ la a Zeremi tɩ peeg a Yazaniya sẽn ya a Irmeya biiga la a Abasiniya yagenga. A le peega a Yazaniya saam-biisi n paas a kom-dibli la Rekabitsa gilli. 
Jeremiah35:4 A kẽes-b-la wẽnd dooga ro-bil a ye pʋga, a Anan karen-biisa roogẽ. Nin-sõng a Anan yaa a Igdaliya biiga. Rooga ra pẽe ne gũudba rẽnna, a ra zao a Maaseya rẽnna zugu la a Maaseya yaa a Salum biiga, maan-kʋʋd ninga sẽn da gũud wẽnd dooga noorã." 
Jeremiah35:5 A Zeremi rɩgla Rekabitsa taoore yʋy sẽn pid ne rãam n paas koteese n yaool n yeel-ba: «Yũ-y rãam bilfu.» 
Jeremiah35:6 Tɩ b leoke: Tõnd ka yũud rãam ye, tɩ tõnd yaaba a Zonadab, a Rekab biiga, kõo tõnd noor kãnga: «Y kõn yũ rãam abada, yãmb bɩ y biiga." 
Jeremiah35:7 Woto me y ka tog n me roogo, bɩ n ko, bɩ n sel bugsuntungu bɩ n tall pʋ-wɛɛg ye; la na n yɩɩ sẽgd-rot pʋsẽ la y na n vɩɩnde y vɩɩma zãnga, n paam n kaoos tẽng zugu, zĩig ninga y sẽn ya sãamba.»" 
Jeremiah35:8 Tõnd deega d yaaba a Rekab biiga, a Zonadab, noor neere, n ka yũud dãam abada, tõnd ne d pagba, d kom-dibli la d kom-pugli," 
Jeremiah35:9 n ka met roogo, n ka tar bugsuntund bɩ pʋʋg sẽn na n ko ye," 
Jeremiah35:10 n vɩ sẽgd rotẽ. Tõnd reega fasi la d tũu noor ninga d yaaba a Zonadab sẽn kõ tõndo. 
Jeremiah35:11 Yaa a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, sẽn wa n tak zabr ka, la d yeel d mense: Aya! D kẽ Zerizalɛɛm n põs Kalde la Aram tãb-biisi! Rũnda wã, d vɩɩ Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ." 
Jeremiah35:12 Rẽ la Soaala gom ne a Zeremi woto: 
Jeremiah35:13 «Gom ne Zɩɩda, ne Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba la yeel-ba: Ad dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda koɛɛga: yãmb da tog n sakẽ-la m saglgo la y kelgẽ m goama. Yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah35:14 A Rekab biig, a Zonadab, da kõ-la a kamba noore tɩ b ra yũ rãam ye. A kamba tũ-la a noore wa bũmb sẽn toge la al n ta rũnna b ka yũ ye, n deeg b yaab noore. La sã n ya maam, yãmb Soaala, m pa vʋʋs ne y saglgo la y pa kelg m koɛɛg ye." 
Jeremiah35:15 M tʋm-y-la naoor ka tɛka bãngdba, m sõgen-kamba tɩ b yeel yã: bas-y y so-yoodã, vɩɩnd-y wala sẽn segde, zãag-y y mens ne wẽn-naandsa pʋgbo la b waoogre, tɩ sã n ya woto y na tõog n vɩɩnd tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, tẽng ning m sẽn kõ y yaab rãmba ne b yagense. La yãmb pa maan gũusg ye, yãmb pa kelg ye." 
Jeremiah35:16 Sã n yaa a Rekab biiga, a Zonadab, yagensã, bãmb reega b yaab noore, la yãmba, Zɩɩda rãmba y ka kelg mam goam ye.»" 
Jeremiah35:17 A Zeremi paasame: «Ad-y yaa rẽ yĩnga la dũni fãa Soaala la a Israyɛl Wẽnde, gomd woto: Mam na n taka yel-beed ninga m sẽn kãabã n sik Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm neba fãa gill zugu: m goma ne bãmba la b pa kelg maan ye, m bool-b lame la b tõdga sakre.»" 
Jeremiah35:18 A Zeremi yaoola me marsã n yeel a Rekab yagensã: «Woto la dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama gomda: Yãmb sẽn sak y yaab a Zonadab noore, n tũ a sẽn wilga fãa neere," 
Jeremiah35:19 woto wã a Zonadab kõn kong yageng a buudẽ sẽn na n tʋm maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, tʋʋmd ye. Dũni fãa Soaal la Israyɛl Wẽndã n gome.»" 
Jeremiah36:1 A Zoakim yaa Zɩɩda rĩm, a Zoziyas biiga. A naama yʋʋmd a naas soaba, Soaala goma ne a Zeremi woto:" 
Jeremiah36:2 «Dɩk sebre, la f gʋls sebrã zugu goam niyns fãa mam sẽn togs foo, a Israyɛl, a Zɩɩda, la bu-zẽmba tẽnsa fãa poorẽ, sẽn sɩng wakat ning mam sẽn gom ne foom, a Zoziyas zamaanẽ, n tãag rũnna." 
Jeremiah36:3 Daar ninga Zɩɩda rãmb na wʋm sɩbgr ninga mam sẽn dat n sɩbg bãmbã, n bas so-wẽng ninga bãmb sẽn dɩkã. Tɩ sã n ya boto, mam na tõog n kõ b yel-wẽna sugri, la m bas b tʋʋm wẽnsã taale.»" 
Jeremiah36:4 A Zeremi boola a Barʋk, a Neriya, biiga, n kɩt t'a gʋls sebr zugu goam niyns fãa Soaala sẽn da togs yẽ wã. A Zeremi n da gomda t'a Barʋk gʋlsdẽ." 
Jeremiah36:5 A Zeremi kõ-la a Barʋk no-kãnga: «B ka le sakd tɩ mam kẽ Soaala roogẽ ye. Dɩlla m pa tõe n ta be m toor ye. 
Jeremiah36:6 Sã n ya foo, ad-f na n kẽnga be, no-loeera raare la f na tɩ zẽk f koɛɛga n karem Soaala koees niyns m sẽn kɩt tɩ f gʋlsã. Fo na n karma sebrã Zɩɩda rãmb fãa taoore." 
Jeremiah36:7 Daar ninga, b na sɩng n kos Soaala tɩ b bas-ba. Daare bãmb me na yaa n bas b vɩɩm yoogã. Soaala pa solg-ba tɩ b sũura puuga wʋsg ne b buuda ye.»" 
Jeremiah36:8 A Barʋk, a Neriya biiga, tũu neer-neere, bãngd a Zeremi sẽn da kõ yẽ noor ningã: la a karma Soaala goama fãa sẽn gʋls sebra zugã, Soaala roogẽ. A zẽka a koɛɛg tɩ neb tõog n wʋme." 
Jeremiah36:9 Yɛl kãensa maana Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoakim, a Zoziyas biiga, wakatẽ, a naam yʋʋmd a nu soaba, kiuug a wɛ soaba. B ra boola Zerizalɛɛm dãmb fãa, la Zɩɩda tẽns neba fãa tɩ b na n maan no-loeer Soaala taoore." 
Jeremiah36:10 Wẽnd dooga pʋga, sẽn da tigim-ba fãa taoore, a Barʋk zẽka a koɛɛg n karem a Zeremi sẽn da kɩt tɩ b gʋls sebra zugã. A ra be-la a Gemariya zãongẽ. Yẽ yaa a Safã biiga, sẽn yɩ dĩma sɛba gɛta. Zãonga ra bee wẽnd dooga sɩmandẽ, No-paala sɛɛga." 
Jeremiah36:11 A Mika, a Gemariya biiga, a Safã yagenga, sẽn kelg Soaala-Wẽnd goama sẽn gʋls sebra pʋgã," 
Jeremiah36:12 a Mika siga dĩma zakẽ, n tɩ kẽ sɛb-gʋlsda roogẽ. Beene la kug-zĩidba fãa ra tigim n yẽsd b yẽsgo. Bãmb la woto: Sɛba gɛta kãsma, a Elisama, a Delaya, a Semaya biiga, a Elnatã, a Akbor biiga, a Gemariya, a Safã biiga, a Sidekiya, a Ananiya biiga, n paas kug-zĩidba a taaba." 
Jeremiah36:13 A Mika wilg-b-la goam niyns fãa yẽ sẽn wʋm a Barʋk sẽn togs nebã, sẽn gʋls sebra zugã." 
Jeremiah36:14 Dẽ poore kug-zĩidba seda ne taaba, n tʋm a Barʋk nengẽ, a Yewudi, a Netaniya biiga, a Selemiya yagenga, la a Kusi yagen-tʋbra-kẽega. A tɩ yeel-a lame t'a wa ne sebr ninga a sẽn karem neba taoorã." 
Jeremiah36:15 A Barʋk sẽn wa, b yeel-a lame: «Zĩnd n karem tõnd sebrã.»" 
Jeremiah36:16 B sẽn kelg sebra karengo n sɛ, dabeem kẽ-b-la wʋsg-wʋsgo tɩ b wẽneg n get taaba, la b yeela a Barʋk: «D na n togsa dĩma tõnd sẽn wʋma fãa.»" 
Jeremiah36:17 B yeela a Barʋk: «Wilg fo sẽn yɩ to-to n gʋls goam kãensa fãa.» 
Jeremiah36:18 T'a Barʋk leok-ba: «Yaa a Zeremi n da gomda tɩ mam gʋlsd sebra zugu ne rʋba.» 
Jeremiah36:19 La kug-zĩidba yeel a Barʋk: «Yik n zoe n tɩ solge, foom ne a Zeremi fãa; tɩ ned da bãng yãmb sẽn beẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah36:20 B bĩnga sebrã sɛb-gʋlsda, a Elisama, doogẽ, n yik n kẽng dĩma nengẽ, na-zakẽ. B sẽn ta, b togsa dĩma bãmb sẽn wʋma fãa." 
Jeremiah36:21 Tɩ dĩma tʋma a Yewudi t'a tɩ rɩk sebrã n wa; a Yewudi kẽngame n tɩ wa ne sebrã la a zẽka a koɛɛg n karem-a dĩma la kug-zĩidba sẽn da zĩ n yeg-a wã taoore. 
Jeremiah36:22 Da yaa yʋʋmda kiuug a wɛ soaba tɩ dĩma ra be roog ning a sẽn kẽed waood wakato, n da tugl bugum a pʋgẽ n zĩi n wootẽ." 
Jeremiah36:23 A Yewudi sã n paam n karem sebra rũnus a wãna, dĩma wãagda a sẽn karma, ne sʋ-bila, n dɩk n lob bugmẽ. A maana woto tɩ sebra wa sɛ zãnga." 
Jeremiah36:24 La dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba sẽn wʋm gom-kãensã, b ka yɛɛs ye la b ka kẽes b fut ye, ba a ye." 
Jeremiah36:25 A Elnatã, a Delaya la a Gemariya da yaool n yõka dĩma sɛɛga t'a da yõog sebra bugum ye, la dĩma ka kelg b goama ye." 
Jeremiah36:26 N yɩɩd rẽ, a kõo gũudba naab a Yerameyɛl noore, n paas a Seraya, a Azriyɛl biiga, la a Selemiya, a Abdeyɛl biiga, tɩ b yõk sɛb-gʋlsda, a Barʋk, la bãngda a Zeremi. La Soaala-Wẽnd solg-b lame." 
Jeremiah36:27 Dĩma sẽn waa n yõog sebr ninga a Barʋk sẽn da gʋls a Zeremi koeesã, Soaala goma ne a Zeremi n yeel-a:" 
Jeremiah36:28 «Bao sebr a to, n leb n gʋls a zugu goam niyns fãa sẽn da gʋls pipi sebra pʋgã, sebr ninga dĩm a Zoakim sẽn yõogã." 
Jeremiah36:29 Dẽ poore fo na yeel woto a Zoakim, Zɩɩda dĩma poorẽ: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-la a Zeremi koɛɛg la yẽ gʋlsame n wilg tɩ Babilon dĩma na n sɩd wa wãa tẽngã n kʋ rũmsa la ninsaalbã la Zoakim zaba ne-a n deeg sebrã n yõog bugum." 
Jeremiah36:30 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoakim poore: A Zoakim kõn paam ned a to yɛs sẽn na n zaond a Daviid naama goeel zug ye, la a sã n ki b na n dɩka a yĩnga n bas wĩntoog tʋʋlmẽ la yʋng waoodẽ." 
Jeremiah36:31 Mam na n yika ne yẽ menga, ne a buudu, a tãnsoaben-dãmba la m na sɩbg-ba, b tʋʋm yooda yĩnga. M na n kɩtame tɩ lʋɩ bãmb zugu, Zerizalɛɛm dãmba zugu, Zɩɩda soolma fãa zugu, yel-beed ning sẽn da gʋls sebra pʋgã. M yeel-b lame tɩ b maan gũusgu la b pa ges rẽ wa bũmb sẽn sek kelgr ye.› »" 
Jeremiah36:32 A Zeremi bao sebr a to n kɩs sɛb-gʋlsda a Barʋk, a Neriya biiga. A Barʋk gʋlsa seb-kãng zugu a Zeremi sẽn da yet t'a gʋlse. A gʋlsa goam niyns fãa sẽn da gʋls pipi sebra zugã, sebr ning Zɩɩda dĩma a Zoakim sẽn deeg n yõogã. Goama wʋsg ra wẽnda pipi rãmbã." 
Jeremiah37:1 A Zoziyas biiga, a Sedesiyas n lebg dĩma, a Zoakim biig a Koniya zĩigẽ. Yaa a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, n da kõ-a Zɩɩda tẽnga naam." 
Jeremiah37:2 La yẽ menga, la a tãnsoaben-dãmba, n paas Zɩɩda rãmba, ka kelg Soaala goama bãngda a Zeremi sẽn da togsd bãmba ye." 
Jeremiah37:3 Dĩm a Sedesiyas tʋma a Yukal, a Selemiya biiga, la maan-kʋʋd a Sefaniya, a Maaseya biiga, bãngd a Zeremi nengẽ. A tʋm-b lame tɩ b tɩ yeel-a: «D kotame tɩ f pʋʋs Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam, d yĩnga.»" 
Jeremiah37:4 A Zeremi da bee neba sʋka n kẽnd la a watẽ. Dẽ tɩ b da nan ka kẽes-a bi-bees roogẽ ye. 
Jeremiah37:5 Wẽnd kãng la Ezipt dĩma tãb-biis yii Ezipt. Kalde rãmba da gũbga Zerizalɛɛm la b sẽn wʋm kibarã, b yikame n bas tẽngã. B zãaga bilfu." 
Jeremiah37:6 La Soaala goma ne a Zeremi n yeel-a t'a leok a Sedesiyas sẽn tʋm-b rãmba woto: 
Jeremiah37:7 Ad Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛga: «Tɩ yeel-y Zɩɩda dĩma sẽn tʋm yãmb tɩ y wa sok maama; tɩ leok yã tɩ Ezipt naaba tãb-biisa sẽn da wat y sõngrã lɛɛg n lebda b tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kalde rãmba na n le waame n zab ne tẽn-kãnga, n tõog-a, n ning-a bugum." 
Jeremiah37:9 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n yet-y woto: Da belg-y y menga, n tẽed tɩ Kalde rãmba loog n basa tẽnga zãng-zãng ye, tɩ bala b ka na n loog ye." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ad-y y sã n wa tẽed tɩ y tõog n diga Kalde rãmba sẽn zabd ne yãmbã, n tẽed tɩ sẽn kell-bã yaa neb sẽn gãe b sẽgdẽ ne sãmpoaga, bãng-y tɩ bãmb n na n yik n wa sãam tẽn-kãnga n yõog-a bugum. Ba yãmb sã n da tõog n digẽ-la Kalde rãmba tãb-biisi, sẽn zabd ne yãmbã, ba sã n da keesẽ-la sẽn paam-b sãmpoag n be b rotẽ, b na mao n yik n yõog tẽnga bugum.»" 
Jeremiah37:11 Wakat ninga Kalde rãmba tãb-biisi sẽn wa n zãag bilf ne Zerizalɛɛm, Ezipt dĩma tãb-biisa rabeem yĩnga," 
Jeremiah37:12 a Zeremi tʋlgame n yi Zerizalɛɛm n kẽng a Bẽnzame tẽngẽ n tɩ naag tẽnga rãmba tɩ b welg sagsa pʋɩɩb no-koɛɛma. 
Jeremiah37:13 A sẽn waa n tũud a Bẽnzame dignoor n na n yi la ned a yembre, gũudba naaba, sẽn gãd-a. Yɩ-la a Iriya, a Selemiya biiga la a Ananiya yagenga. A Iriya sẽn gãd a Zeremi, a yeel-a lame: «Fo zoet n na n tɩ koosa tõnd ne Babilon dãmba!»" 
Jeremiah37:14 T'a Zeremi leoke: «Yaa zirẽ, mam ka kẽed Kalde rãmb ye!» A Iriya pa yaas n kelg a Zeremi ye; a yõk-a lame n tɩ kɩs a kãsem-dãmba." 
Jeremiah37:15 B sẽn yãee a Zeremi, b sũur puuga ne-a wʋsgo, tɩ b pãb-a la b tɩ kẽes-a bi-bees roogẽ, sɛb-gʋlsda a Zonatã yiri sẽn da lebg bi-bees roogo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yɩɩ ro-munumdẽ la b ning a Zeremi. A Zeremi waa n kaoosa be," 
Jeremiah37:17 tɩ dĩm a Sedesiyas wa tʋm ned tɩ b bool-a t'a wa, t'a soos n sok-a, a na-zakẽ. A sẽn taa, dĩma sok-a-la woto: «Fo tara Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛg m yĩng bɩ?» T'a Zeremi leoke tɩ koɛɛg kõn kong ye: «Fo na n lʋɩɩ Babilon naab nugẽ!»" 
Jeremiah37:18 Dẽ poore, a Zeremi yeela a Sedesiyas: «Bõe beegre la mam beeg yãmba, yãmb bɩ y na-yir dãmba, bɩ tẽnga rãmba, tɩ yãmb sui maam doogo?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Yãmb bãngdba, sẽn da yet-b yãmb tɩ Babilon dĩma kõn wa n zab ne yãmb la ne tẽn-kãnga wã bee yɛ?»" 
Jeremiah37:20 A Zeremi yõka sɛɛg woto: «M naaba, m kotame tɩ y sak n kelge m kosgo: Da lebs-y maam sɛb-gʋlsda a Zonatã nengẽ, tɩ m na n kiime.»" 
Jeremiah37:21 Dẽ la dĩm a Sedesiyas kõ noore tɩ b ning a Zeremi gũudba zakẽ la b kõt-a bur gilga; bura ra koosda Bur-wẽedba sora zugu. Bura sẽn da tõe n paam tẽnga pʋgẽ daar fãa, a Zeremi me ra paamda a rẽnna. Tũu boto t'a Zeremi kell n pa gũudba zakẽ." 
Jeremiah38:1 Ad-y a Sefatiya, a Matã biiga, a Gedaliya, a Pasewur biiga, a Yukal, a Selemiya biiga, la a Pasewur, a Malkiya biiga, ad-y b wʋma goama a Zeremi sẽn da togsd neb niyns fãa sẽn da pɩʋʋgd-b gũudba zakẽ:" 
Jeremiah38:2 «Ad-y Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: ‹Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n paa tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, sʋʋg n na n kʋ-a, ka rẽ bɩ kom, bɩ bã-longdem; la ned ninga sẽn na n yi-a tẽn-kãnga n tɩ kẽ Kalde rãmba, yẽ soab na n vɩɩndame, vɩɩm n na n yɩɩ yẽ pʋɩɩre.› »" 
Jeremiah38:3 A Zeremi ra yetame yɛsa: «Soaala-Wẽnd wilgdame tɩ b na n sak n dɩka tẽn-kãnga n bas Babilon tãb-biisa nugẽ tɩ b soog-a.» 
Jeremiah38:4 B sẽn wʋm woto a Zeremi noorẽ, tãnsoaben-dãmba yeela a Sedesiyas: «Tõnd datame tɩ b kʋ a Zeremi, t'a sẽn gomd woto wã a woogda tãb-biisa raoodo, sẽn pa-b tẽnga pʋgẽ wã raoodo. A ka baood n na n yols neb pɛt ye, b nimbãanega la a baood n na n paase.»" 
Jeremiah38:5 Dẽ la dĩm a Sedesiyas leok woto: «Maan-y y sẽn dat ne-a, m yaa dĩm, yaa sɩda, la m ka tõe n gɩdg-y ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:6 Tãnsoaben-dãmb a naasa kɩtame tɩ b yõk a Zeremi n tɩ bas-a a Malkiya ko-baoora pʋga; a Malkiya yaa gũudba naab a ye. Ko-baoora ra bee gũudba zakẽ. B bao wĩiri n loe a Zeremi n sik-a be. Koom da ka leb n be ko-baoorẽ wã ye, a da pida ne begd bala; a Zeremi da suta begdã." 
Jeremiah38:7 A Ebed-Melɛk, Kus neda, ra paamame tɩ dĩma lakd a sũuri n wilgd-a. Yẽ n wʋme tɩ b ninga a Zeremi ko-baoorẽ. Woto a sẽn yãend dĩma a Bẽnzame dignoorẽ," 
Jeremiah38:8 a yi na-zakẽ wã n wa yeel dĩma: 
Jeremiah38:9 «M naaba, nin-bãmba sẽn maan bãngda a Zeremi bũmb ningã ka neer ye, b ning-a-la ko-baoorẽ, a na n kii kom beene, tɩ bala bur ka leb n yãet tẽnga pʋgẽ ye»" 
Jeremiah38:10 La dĩma kõo Kus rao a Ebed-Melɛk noore: «Bao neb pis-tã tɩ b tũ foom n tɩ yiis bãngda a Zeremi ko-baoorẽ wã t'a nan ka ki ye.» 
Jeremiah38:11 A Ebed-Melɛk sɩd baoo neba wala dĩma sẽn kõ noorã; a kẽnga na-yiri n kẽ teeda bĩngr roogẽ n wʋk kʋds rãmba, n dɩk wĩ n loe kʋds rãmba, n sik ko-baoorẽ wã a Zeremi yĩnga." 
Jeremiah38:12 Kus rao a Ebed-Melɛk yeela a Zeremi: «Dɩk kʋds rãmba n yaag f bãgdo n ning n yaool n dɩk wĩya n bʋʋge.» A Zeremi sɩd maana boto. 
Jeremiah38:13 B naaga taaba n tak a Zeremi n yiis ko-baoorẽ wã. Dẽ poore, a Zeremi paa gũudba zakẽ." 
Jeremiah38:14 Dĩm a Sedesiyas tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool bãngd a Zeremi t'a wa sake. Dĩma da bee Soaala rooga dignoor a tãab soaba. Dĩma yeela a Zeremi: «M na n soka bũmb a yembre, la togs m sɩda, da solg-m bũmb ye!»" 
Jeremiah38:15 T'a Zeremi leok a Sedesiyas: «Mam sã n togs m sẽn tog n togs-y bũmb ningã, y na kɩt tɩ b kʋ maam. M sã n sagl yãmba, yãmb ka na kelg maam ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:16 Tɩ dĩma na n soos n kãab a Zeremi woto: «M wẽend ne Wẽnd ninga sẽn vɩ la sẽn kõt vɩɩma, m wẽend tɩ m ka na n kɩt tɩ b kʋ-f ye, la m ka na n ning foo neb niyns sẽn dat-b n kʋ fooma nugẽ ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:17 Dẽ la a Zeremi yeel a Sedesiyas: Ad dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛga: «Fo sã n yi n tɩ kẽ Babilon dĩma, fo na n põsa kũum, foo ne f zaka, la b ka na n yõog tẽn kãnga bugum ye." 
Jeremiah38:18 La fo sã n zãgse, tẽn-kãnga na n lʋɩɩ Kalde dãmb nugẽ tɩ b yõog-a bugum; la fo menga ka na n põs ye.»" 
Jeremiah38:19 Dẽ la dĩm a Sedesiyas yeela a Zeremi: «Mam zoeta Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn kẽ-b Kalde rãmba dabeem. M zoeta b na n wa yõk maam n kɩs-ba tɩ b yaal maam.» 
Jeremiah38:20 T'a Zeremi leoke: «B ka na n kɩs-f ye, kelg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga mam sẽn wilg foomã, boto bũmb kõn maan-f ye, la fo na n vɩɩndame." 
Jeremiah38:21 La fo sã n tõdg tɩ f kõn kẽnge, ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg maam bũmb ninga:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Pagb niyns fãa sẽn na n pa-b na-zakẽ wã, b na n tall-b lame n tɩ kɩs Babilon dĩma tãnsoaben-dãmba. Fo pagba mens n na n pʋd yɩɩl kãnga n la-foo: Ges belgr ninga f zo-rãmba sẽn belg foo. Yella sẽn pak fooma b ka bas-f tɩ f lʋɩ sɩda?" 
Jeremiah38:23 N-yẽe! Yaa sɩda, f pagba fãa ne f kamba, b na n tall-b lame n tɩ kɩs Kalde rãmba. La fo ka na n põs-b ye, b na n suii foom bi-bees roogẽ. Sã n ya tẽn-kãnga, b na n yõog-a-la bugum!»" 
Jeremiah38:24 Woto wã a Sedesiyas yeela a Zeremi: «Mam pa rata tɩ ned wʋm goam kãensã ye; ka boto fo na ki. 
Jeremiah38:25 Tãnsoaben-dãmba kãsem-dãmba na n bãngame tɩ tõnd sõsa ne taaba. Ad-b na n wa sok-f lame n bãng d sẽn gom bũmb ningã. B na n tol n kãab-f lame tɩ bũmb kõn maan-fo, fo sã n ka solg-b bũmb ye." 
Jeremiah38:26 Fo na n leok-b lame bala: M kosa dĩma tɩ b ra lebs-ma a Zonatã zakẽ ye, tɩ m sã n leb be m na n kiime.»" 
Jeremiah38:27 Tãnsoaben-dãmba kãsem-dãmba sɩd waa a Zeremi nengẽ n sok-a. La a Zeremi leoka wala dĩma sẽn da yeel yẽ t'a leok bũmb ningã. B sẽn wʋm woto, b bas-a-la ne laafi, la b ka bãng dĩma ne a Zeremi sõasgã sẽn yɩ a soab ye." 
Jeremiah38:28 A Zeremi kell n paa gũudba zakẽ n ta wakat ninga b sẽn wa n tõog Zerizalɛɛm. Ad yɛl niyns sẽn maane, Zerizalɛɛm lʋɩɩsa wakato." 
Jeremiah39:1 Yɩ-la a Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, naam yʋʋmd a wɛ soaba, kiuuga piig soaba la a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma wa ne tãpo n gũbg Zerizalɛɛm." 
Jeremiah39:2 Yɩ-la a Sedesiyas naam yʋʋmd piig la ye soaba, kiuug a naas soaba, kiuuga daar a wɛ soaba la Babilon dãmba poog lal-gũbra zĩig a yembre." 
Jeremiah39:3 A Nabikodonozor tãnsoaben-dãmba kẽe tẽngã la b wẽ-la b sika n pẽneg Sʋk dignoorã. Yɩ-la a Nergal-Sarezɛr, b na-kãsengã, n paas a Samgar-Nebo, a Sar-Sekim, dĩma yam sẽn da kẽ a soab n yɩɩdã la tãnsoaben-dãmba fãa." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zɩɩda dĩm, a Sedesiyas, ne a tãb-biisa fãa sẽn yãend-ba, b zoeeme n tũ dĩma zẽedã n yi tẽngã ne yʋngo; noor n da be lals a yiib sẽn ya bɛd sʋka la be la b tũ n yi n dɩk Zʋrdẽ bãg-faaga." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kalde rãmba tãb-biis pʋg-b lame, la b tɩ paama a Sedesiyas Zeriko sẽnẽ. B sẽn paam-a n yõke, b tall-a lame n kẽng Ribla, Amat tẽnga, Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor nengẽ. A Nabikodonozor kẽes-a-la bʋʋdo, n paalg-a." 
Jeremiah39:6 Yaa be la a kɩt tɩ b kood a Sedesiyas kamba, a nifẽ. Babilon dĩma kɩtame yɛsa tɩ b kood a Zɩɩda nin-bɛda fãa." 
Jeremiah39:7 Dẽ poore, a leo a Sedesiyas nini, n kɩt tɩ b balg-a bãnga n tall-a n loog Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kalde rãmba ninga naaba zak bugum, la b yõoga neb a taab me roto; b wãa Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã." 
Jeremiah39:9 Gũudba tãnsoabã, a Nebuzaradã, talla neb niynsi sẽn da ket tẽngã n kẽng Babilon, n paas neb niynsi sẽn zoe-b n wa kẽ yẽ, la tʋʋm mitbã, a tall-b-la fãa n loog Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:10 Sã n ya a Nebuzaradã, gũudba tãnsoaba, yẽ basa Zɩɩda neb niynsi sẽn da ya-b naong rãmba n ka tar bũmbu; dẽ pʋgẽ me, a pʋɩɩ-b-la bugsuntund pʋto, n paas pʋt a taaba." 
Jeremiah39:11 Sã n yaa a Zeremi, a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, kõo a Nebuzaradã, gũudba tãnsoab, noore. A yeel-a lame:" 
Jeremiah39:12 «Peeg a Zeremi, ges a neere, da maan-a bũmb ye, a sẽn dat tɩ f maan bũmb ninga, bɩ f maane.»" 
Jeremiah39:13 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la gũudba tãnsoaba, a Nebuzaradã, yẽs ne a Nebusazbã, dĩma sẽn da lakd a sũur zãng n wilgd a soabã, n yẽs ne a Nergal-Sarezɛr, tãnsoaben-dãmba kãsma, n paas Babilon dĩma tãnsoaben-dãmb a taaba," 
Jeremiah39:14 tɩ b tɩ yiis a Zeremi gũudba zakẽ n tɩ kɩs a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga la a Safã yagenga. A Gedaliya ra kõt-a-la sore t'a lebd a zakẽ. Dẽ la a Zeremi tõog n paad ne tẽnga rãmba." 
Jeremiah39:15 A Zeremi sẽn da waa n nan ket n be gũudba zakẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd da goma ne-a n yeel-a:" 
Jeremiah39:16 «Kẽng n tɩ yeel a Ebed-Melɛk, Kus raoa tɩ dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnda, gomda woto: ‹Ade, mam sẽn da kãab tɩ m na maana tẽn-kãnga bũmb ninga na n taasame, ka na n yɩ b sũ-noog yĩng ye, na n yɩɩ b sũ-sãang yĩnga. M na n taasa kãab-beedã la ka na n le kaoos ye." 
Jeremiah39:17 Daarẽ kãnga, mam na n fãaga foom, m kõ sak tɩ f lʋɩ f sẽn yɛɛsd b rãmba nugẽ ye. Yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah39:18 N-yẽe! Sɩd menga, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo põse: b ka na n kʋ foom ne sʋʋg ye, vɩɩm n na n yi fo pʋɩɩre, tɩ bala fo pelga f pʋg ne maam. Soaala n yeele.› »" 
Jeremiah40:1 Ad Soaala sẽn taas a Zeremi koɛɛg ninga gũudba naab a Nebuzaradã sẽn waa n bas-a t'a yi Rama. B ra sẽba a Zeremi ne bãeense n naag Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda neb niyns sẽn da na n loog yembd Babilon. Gũudba naab tɩ bak-a-la toore. 
Jeremiah40:2 A sẽn bool-a n yi kɛɛnga, a yeel-a lame: «Yaa yel-beed a woto la Wẽnnaam, f Soaala, da kãab tẽn-kãngã," 
Jeremiah40:3 la b sɩd waa ne-a. Soaala maana waa b sẽn da wilgi, tɩ yãmb ka kelg b goama ye. Dẽ n so tɩ yell kãnga paam yãmba." 
Jeremiah40:4 Marsã gese, dũnna menga, mam na n looda bãeensã sẽn sog fo nusã. Fo sã n dat n yãag maam Babilon, bɩ f wa tɩ d kẽnge tɩ bũmb kõn maan-f ye. La sã n ka ta f yam bɩ f base. Gese, tẽnga fãa dɩga fo taoore; zĩig ninga fãa fo sẽn dat n kẽnge, sã n noom foom, bɩ f kẽnge.»" 
Jeremiah40:5 La a Zeremi sẽn pa leokd tɩ bũmbã, a yeel-a lame: «Fo tõe n kẽnga a Ayikam biiga, la a Safã yagenga a Gedaliya nengẽ tɩ yẽ la Babilon dĩma kõ tõogo t'a ges Zɩɩda tẽnsã. Fo tõe n zĩnda tẽnga pʋgẽ ne yẽnda, wala f sẽn tõe kẽng fo sẽn datẽ fãa.» Tãnsoaba kõ-a-la sor zug rɩɩbo n paas kũuni, n bas-a t'a looge." 
Jeremiah40:6 A Zeremi kong n dɩka Mispa sore, n ta a Ayikam biiga, a Gedaliya nengẽ, la a paa be ne neb niynsi sẽn da ket-b tẽngã." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ad-y Zɩɩda neb n da ket tẽngã n baood zabre ne Babilon dãmbã. Bãmb dãmb n waa n wʋme tɩ Babilon dĩma kõ-la a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, tẽngã naam t'a soog dapa, pagba, kamba, la neb niyns fãa sẽn da ka tall n loog yembdo Babilon." 
Jeremiah40:8 B kẽnga a Gedaliya nengẽ Mispa: yɩ-la a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga, ne a Zoana la a Zonatã, a Karea kamba, ne a Seraya, a Tanewumɛt biiga, ne Netofa rao a Efayi kamba, la Maaka rao a Yazaniya." 
Jeremiah40:9 A Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, yeel-b lame, bãmb ne b poorẽ dãmba: «Da zoe-y rabeem ne Kalde rãmba sẽn dɩt naam y zuga ye. Ti-y roto, n zĩnd b pʋsẽ la y maan Babilon dĩma yam n tʋm a tʋʋma neere, pa-y y tẽngẽ tɩ m wẽendame tɩ bũmb kõn paoog-y ye." 
Jeremiah40:10 Sã n ya maam, mam zĩi Mispa wala yãmb no-rɛɛsa, Kalde rãmba sẽn wat-b ka wã yĩnga. La yãmba, kõg-y y tɩɩs biis rãam, rɩgs-y y tɩɩs biisi, bao-y kaam n pids y rʋgdo la pa-y tẽns niynsi yãmb sẽn beẽ wã, tɩ b tog n le yɩɩ yãmb soolem.»" 
Jeremiah40:11 Zɩɩda rãmba fãa sẽn da be ne Moabitse, ne Amonitse, ne Edomitse bɩ ne tẽnsa taab rãmba, wʋmame tɩ Babilon dĩma da basa neb kẽer Zɩɩda n dɩk-ba n gũnug a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, a Safã yagenga." 
Jeremiah40:12 Zɩɩda nin-bãmba fãa yii zĩis niynsi b sẽn da sẽeg bãmba n wa. B sẽn wa n ta Zɩɩda tẽnga, Mispa, a Gedaliya nengẽ, b paama kood wʋsgo, n paas tɩɩs biis me wʋsg-wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah40:13 A Zoana, a Karea biiga, n paas zab-zabdb kẽer sẽn da ket wetẽ, waa Mispa, a Gedaliya nengẽ, n yeel-a:" 
Jeremiah40:14 «Fo bãngame t'a Baalis, Amonitsa naaba, kõ-la a Netaniya biiga a Ismayɛl noore t'a wa kʋ foom?» A Gedaliya pa reeg tɩ yaa sɩd ye." 
Jeremiah40:15 A Zoana, a Karea biiga, yaool n da soos n tɩ yeela a Gedaliya Mispa: «Fo ratame tɩ m kẽnge n tɩ kʋ a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga bɩ? Ad ned ka na n bãng ye. Bõe yĩnga la a rat n kʋ foom? Fo sã n ki, bãng tɩ Zɩɩda dãmb fãa sẽn be ne fooma na n sẽegame. Bilfa sẽn kell Zɩɩda rĩunga pʋg na n menemame.»" 
Jeremiah40:16 A Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, n leok a Zoana, a Karea biiga: «Da maan woto ye, tɩ bala fo sẽn yet a Ismayɛl poorẽ wã yaa zirẽ!»" 
Jeremiah41:1 Bãng-y tɩ kiuug a yopoe soaba, a Netaniya biiga la a Elisama yagenga a Ismayɛl sẽn da ya na-koambga, la sẽn da zĩnd dĩma zakẽ, waa ne neb piiga a Ayikam biiga a Gedaliya nengẽ, Mispa. La b sẽn da waa n zĩẽ n dɩtẽ," 
Jeremiah41:2 a Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl, yika ne a neb piigã n kõs a Ayikam biig a Gedaliya ne sʋʋga. Dɩlla yɩɩ woto la b kʋ ned ninga Babilon naab sẽn da rɩk n lʋɩɩs tẽnga taoore." 
Jeremiah41:3 Paas me, Zɩɩda rãmba fãa sẽn da be-b ne a Gedaliya Mispa, la Kalde tãb-biisã, a Ismayɛl kʋ-b-la fãa." 
Jeremiah41:4 B kʋ a Gedaliya tɩ maan dasem a yi tɩ ned ba a ye nan ka wʋm a kũuma kibar ye. 
Jeremiah41:5 Ade neb n yi Sikɛm, Silo la Samari, bãmb pis-nii; b da kõosa b toeemse, b fut fãa da kẽesame; b da boga b yĩnga, b da tara kũuni n paas tɩdare n na n tɩ kõ Soaala, Zerizalɛɛm wẽnd doogẽ." 
Jeremiah41:6 A Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl yɩ Mispa n seg-ba, la a da kẽndame la a kũmnẽ. A sẽn seg-ba, a yeel-b lame: «Wa-y yã a Ayikam biiga, a Gedaliya, nengẽ.»" 
Jeremiah41:7 B sẽn kẽ tẽnga pʋgẽ n sɛ, a Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl ne a neba kʋ-b lame, la b dɩk-b lame n lob ko-baoorẽ." 
Jeremiah41:8 Bãmb sʋka, neb piig n zĩnd be n paam n yeel a Ismayɛl: «Da kʋ-d ye; ade, tõnd tara dɩɩbo tõnd sẽn solg pʋtẽ: alkam, alkam pugsgu n paas kaam la sɩɩdo.» A sẽn wʋm woto, a Ismayɛl bas-b lame n ka kʋ-b ye." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ko-baoor ninga a Ismayɛl sẽn da kɩt tɩ b lob a sẽn da kood b rãmba, da ya ko-bao-kãseng ning dĩm a Asa sẽn da kɩt tɩ b manege, a sẽn waa n takd zabre ne a Basa, a Israyɛl dĩma. Yaa ko-baoor kãng pʋga la a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga, ning neba yẽ sẽn da kʋ wã." 
Jeremiah41:10 Dẽ zugẽ, a Ismayɛl kɩtame tɩ b yõg neb niyns sẽn da ket-b Mispa n kẽes-b bi-bees roogẽ, bãmb ne dĩma kom-pugli, la neb niyns fãa a Nebuzaradã, gũudba tãnsoaba, sẽn da gũnug a Ayikam biiga, a Gedaliya, Mispa. A Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl tall-b lame wala bi-beese n tũ Amonitsa nengẽ." 
Jeremiah41:11 A Zoana, a Karea biiga, ne tãb-biisa sẽn da be-b ne-yẽ wã waa n wʋma tʋʋm wẽns niyns fãa, a Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl sẽn maana." 
Jeremiah41:12 Woto b waa ne b neba n na n zab ne a Netaniya biiga, a Ismayɛl. B tɩ paam-a-la Gabaõ ko-ralma noorẽ." 
Jeremiah41:13 Neb niyns sẽn da be ne a Ismayɛl sẽn yãend a Zoana, a Karea biiga, la tãb-biisã sẽn da tũud yẽ, b sũur yɩɩ noogo." 
Jeremiah41:14 Neb niyns fãa sẽn da yi-b Mispa n tũud a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga, bãmb fãa zoe n waa a Zoana nengẽ." 
Jeremiah41:15 A Ismayɛl zoe ne neb a nii n tɩ kẽ Amonitse. 
Jeremiah41:16 Dẽ zugẽ a Zoana, a Korea biiga n paas zab-zabdba sẽn da yãagd-b yẽ wã, tigma neb niyns a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga sẽn da wʋk Mispa wala yemse, a sẽn wa n kʋ a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga: dapa, zab-zabdba, paga la kamba, n paas na-yir dãmba sẽn da be Gabaõ." 
Jeremiah41:17 B yikame n sɩng kẽnde la b tɩ yalsa Kimam, tẽng sẽn pẽ ne Bɛtelyɛɛm." 
Jeremiah41:18 B yama ra yaa b ta Ezipt, tɩ bala a Ismayɛl, a Netaniya biiga, da kʋ-la a Gedaliya a Ayikam biiga, la Babilon naaba n da kõ a naam, t'a gũ tẽngã. Dẽ yĩnga dabeem da tar-b lame." 
Jeremiah42:1 Dẽ zugẽ tãb-biisã kãsem-dãmb la sẽn yɩɩd fãa: a Zoana, a Karea biiga, a Azariyas, a Osaya, biiga, n paas neba fãa, kom-bõonego wa kom-bɛda," 
Jeremiah42:2 wa n yeela bãngda a Zeremi: «Wẽnd na sõng tɩ d kosgo kẽ f sũurẽ! Yõk fo Wẽnnaam, Soaala-Wẽnda sɛɛga n kõ-do, yõk b sɛɛg nin-bãmba sẽn keta yĩnga, tɩ wala fo sẽn da ne d sõorã sẽn yɩ zembalã, tõnd sẽn ket bal la woto." 
Jeremiah42:3 Kos tɩ Soaala, fo Wẽnnaama, sak n wilg tõndo, sor ninga tõnd sẽn na n dɩke, la d sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga.»" 
Jeremiah42:4 Tɩ bãngda Zeremi yãe n leok-ba: «M wʋmdame. M na n yõka Soaala yãmb Wẽnnaam sɛɛga n kõ yã wala yãmb sẽn kotã; la Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n leok a soaba, m na taas yã, m kõn solg fɩ ye!»" 
Jeremiah42:5 La bãmb me yeela a Zeremi: «Bɩ Soaala sẽn ya sõngo la sɩd soaba, da bas-d ye, tõnd sã n pa tũ goam niynsi, b sẽn wilg foom, tɩ f togs tõndã. Tõnd wẽenda rẽ bãmb yʋʋr yĩnga." 
Jeremiah42:6 Yaa foo la tõnd kos yã tɩ f sok Soaala-Wẽnd n kõ-do. Tõnd na n tũ-la b sẽn yeel tɩ d maan fãa, noom-d tɩ ka noomd-do. Woto bũmba fãa na zems d yĩnga, tɩ d deega Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam, noore.»" 
Jeremiah42:7 Dasem piiga, dẽ poore, Soaala goma ne a Zeremi:" 
Jeremiah42:8 La a Zeremi boola a Zoana, a Karea biiga, la tãb-biis kãsem-dãmba, la neba fãa sẽn da be-b ne-yẽ, n pa kees ned ba a ye." 
Jeremiah42:9 La a yeel-b lame: «Yãmb da kosame tɩ m taas y koɛɛga Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, ad b leokre:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‹Yãmb sã n pa tẽn-kãnga, yãmb yɛl na manege: m na n mee yãmb doogo, la a kõn lʋɩ ye. Tɩ bala yel-beed ninga sẽn paka yãmbã mam tuubd-a-la zãnga." 
Jeremiah42:11 Da zoe-y Babilon dĩma dabeem ye; yẽ taoore yãmb digdame. Da zoe-y dĩma ye. Soaala koɛɛga. Bala mam bee ne yãmba n na n fãag yãmb na-kãnga nugẽ. 
Jeremiah42:12 Mam na n kɩtame t'a zoe yãmb nimbãanega, la a bas yã tɩ y leb n wa y tẽngẽ.› »" 
Jeremiah42:13 A Zeremi paasame: «D mak wala y zãgsame tɩ y kõn tũ Soaala y Wẽnnaama noore, la y ka na n tɩ vɩɩnd tẽn-kãnga pʋg ye," 
Jeremiah42:14 yãmb sã n yeele: ya Ezipt tẽnga la tõnd na n kẽnge, beene, tõnd ka na n leb n yãe tãp ye, tõnd ka na n leb n wʋm zabr baorg peebg ye, la bur kõn le paoog tõnd ye, ya be la tõnd dat n zĩndi!" 
Jeremiah42:15 Be neere, sẽn ya woto wã, yãmba, Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn ketã, kelg-y Soaala koɛɛga: Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam gomda woto: Yãmb sã sɩd yet tɩ yamb datame n kẽng Ezipt n tɩ zĩnd be," 
Jeremiah42:16 bãng-y yã tɩ sʋʋg ninga yãmb sẽn zoet a soabã na n paama yãmb be; Ezipt tẽnga la yãmb sẽn zoet n dabdã, kom kõn bas yãmb Ezipt tẽng ye: yaa be la y na n ki!" 
Jeremiah42:17 Neb niyns fãa sẽn yet-ba tɩ bãmb datame n tɩ zĩnd Ezipt tẽnga, b fãa gilli, sʋʋg n na n kʋ-ba, ne kom, la bã-longdem; ba a ye menga, bãmb sʋk, kõn põs yel-pakr ninga mam sẽn na kɩt tɩ pak-ba ye." 
Jeremiah42:18 Sɩda, yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomda: Wala mam sũur sẽn puug wʋsgo ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, boto me, mam sũur na n puuga ne yãmb al wʋsgo, yãmb sã n ta Ezipt tẽnga. Beene, y sũur na sãam wʋsgo, la tʋʋr ka be b sẽn ka na n tʋʋs-y ye, kãab wẽng ka be b sẽn ka na n kãab-y ye la y kõn le yãend tẽn-kãnga ye.»" 
Jeremiah42:19 A Zeremi kell n paasame: «Zɩɩda rãmba sẽn ket-bã, Soaala-Wẽnd yeela yãmba: Da kẽng-y Ezipt tẽng ye! Bãng-y yã tɩ ya sɩd menga la mam togsd yãmb rũnna." 
Jeremiah42:20 Yãmb sẽn ka reng n tags neerã, y wa n kosa maam tɩ m yõk Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaama sɛɛg y yĩnga. Y kos-m lame tɩ m wilg-y zãng d Soaala-Wẽnnaam sẽn na n leoke, tɩ y na maan wa b sẽn yeele." 
Jeremiah42:21 La ade, mam taasa yãmb Soaala, yãmb Wẽnnaam, koɛɛga, la yãmb pa reeg bãmb goama, ba a ye menga." 
Jeremiah42:22 Bɩ y pĩnd n bãng neere tɩ ade, sʋʋg n na n kʋ yãmba, n paas kom la bã-longdem, zĩig ninga yãmb sẽn dat n tɩ kẽ n soondã.»" 
Jeremiah43:1 A Zeremi sẽn wa n togs neba, goam niyns fãa Soaala-Wẽnd, bãmb Wẽnnaam sẽn da kõ-yẽ noore t'a togse," 
Jeremiah43:2 a Azariyas, a Osaya biiga, a Zoana, a Karea biiga, n paas nin-yaalsa fãa, leoka a Zeremi woto: «Fo sẽn togsda fãa yaa zirẽ bala. Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam ka yeel foom tɩ f togs tõndo tɩ d da kẽng Ezipt tẽnga n tɩ zĩnd be ye." 
Jeremiah43:3 Yaa a Barʋk, a Neriya biiga, n pirsd foom, a sẽn kis tõnda yĩnga, n dat tɩ fo ning tõnd Kalde rãmba nugẽ, tɩ b kʋ tõndo, bɩ b tall tõnd n kẽng yembdo al Babilon.»" 
Jeremiah43:4 Woto wã a Zoana, a Karea biiga, n paas tãb-biis kãsem-dãmba la tẽnga rãmb ka kelg Soaala gomde n pa Zɩɩda tẽng ye." 
Jeremiah43:5 A Zoana, a Karea biiga, la tãb-biis kãsem-dãmb peega Zɩɩda neb sẽn da keta fãa, sẽn da yi-b tẽns a taabã n leb n wa b tẽngẽ, b peega sẽn da sẽeg-bã fãa:" 
Jeremiah43:6 dapa, pagba, kamba n paas naab kom-pugli la neb niyns fãa a Nebuzaradã, gũudba tãnsoaba, sẽn da bas ne a Gedaliya, a Ayikam biiga, a Safã yagenga, la sẽn yɩɩd fãa, b peega bãngd a Zeremi la a Barʋk, a Neriya biiga." 
Jeremiah43:7 B sɩd looga ne-b Ezipt tẽnga n tõdg Soaala noore, la b taa Tapanɛs. A Zeremi yaool n da pĩnd n wilgame t'a Nabikodonozor na n wa pãba Ezipt tẽnga." 
Jeremiah43:8 Soaala taasa b koe-kãnga a Zeremi, Tapanɛs tẽnga:" 
Jeremiah43:9 «Bao kug-bɛda n wʋke, fo na n bus-b-la tẽnga kombera rooga noore. F na n bus-b-la a Zɩɩda neba nifẽ." 
Jeremiah43:10 La f yeel neba: Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomda woto: ‹Ade mam tʋmame tɩ b tɩ bool a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, mam tʋʋm-tʋmdã, a na n wa vigla a naam goeele kug kãensã zutu, la a tilg a naam zãongo." 
Jeremiah43:11 A na n waame, la a na n sɩbga Ezipt tẽnga: a na n kʋʋ kẽere, n tall kẽer n loog yembdo, a na n kooda kẽere." 
Jeremiah43:12 A na n yõoga Ezipt tẽng wẽn-naandsã dot bugum, a na n yõoga b mensa bugum, bɩ a na wʋk-b lame n loog a tẽngẽ. A na n zɛɛ Ezipt zãnga wa rũn-kɩɩm sẽn saagd a fuugu n menes a karens zãnga. Dẽ poor marsã la a na n yaool n loog a tẽngẽ ne yẽesem." 
Jeremiah43:13 A sã n ta Eliopolis, a na n tusa kuga lal-gilsã n lubi la a yõog Ezipt wẽn-naandsa rota bugum.› »" 
Jeremiah44:1 Koɛɛg a Zeremi sẽn deege n na n taas Zɩɩda rãmb fãa sẽn be Ezipt tẽnga, sẽn kẽed-b Migdol, Tapanɛs, Memfis la Patros tẽnga. A Zeremi goma ne b woto:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam n togsde: «Yãmb yãee yel-beed niyns fãa mam sẽn tak Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽns fãa zugu. Ade, dũnna b lebga raboodo, neb ka leb n be be yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah44:3 Yaa b yel-wẽna n puug mam sũuri. B tɩ kʋʋ maando la b waooga tẽn-zẽng wẽn-naandse. M yaool n da ka ne bũmb ninga sẽn be bãmb ne taab sʋka. Y ka bãng-b pĩnda, y yaab rãmb me ka bãng-ba." 
Jeremiah44:4 M ka vʋʋs ye, m tʋma m bãngdba, a yeyn-ye, yãmb nengẽ tɩ b wa yeel yãmba tɩ y bas yel-yood a woto tɩ b ka tat m yam ye." 
Jeremiah44:5 La yãmb pa kelg ye, yãmb pa maan gũusgu, yãmb pa tek y zʋg wẽngã, la y kell n waooga tẽn-zẽng wẽn-naandse." 
Jeremiah44:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m sũura widg bugum n yõog Zɩɩda tẽnse, la Zerizalɛɛm soya. Bũmb ka kelle sã n ka raboog sẽn kẽesd rabeem wa d sẽn ne a soab rũnna wã.»" 
Jeremiah44:7 A Zeremi le paasame: «La marsã, dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, gomda woto: ‹Bõe tɩ yãmb na n sãam y meng yell woto? Yãmb na n kɩtame tɩ b kʋ Zɩɩda rãmb fãa, dapa, pagba, kom-bɩɩse la yagense. Y ratame tɩ m sɛɛs-b zãng laa?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Bõe tɩ y baood n na n beeg-ma ne y tʋʋm yoodo, n kʋʋd wẽn-sãams maando, y sẽn waa n na n soond tẽng ninga, Ezipt tẽnga? Bõe tɩ y rat tɩ m menes yã tɩ dũni ninsaalba wa get-y wa yãnde la kãab wẽng bũmbu?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Yãmb yĩma y ba rãmb tʋʋm wẽna, Zɩɩda nanams tʋʋm wẽna, yãmb meng tʋʋm wẽna, yãmb pagba tʋʋm wẽna, tʋʋm wẽns niynsi fãa sẽn maan Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ, la Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Al n tãag dũnna, ned ba a ye ka tol n tuub ye, ned ba a ye ka reeg tɩ maam la Soaal ye, ned ba a ye ka reeg m zãmsgo, ned ba a ye ka reeg m noorã m sẽn kõ y ba rãmba ye, la m sẽn kõ yãmba, bãmb kamba ye.› »" 
Jeremiah44:11 A Zeremi paasame: «Rẽ fãa yĩnga dũni fãa Soaala a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam leokda woto: ‹Ade, marsã mam na n sɩbga yãmba. M na n kʋʋ Zɩɩda rãmba fãa." 
Jeremiah44:12 M na n deega Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn kẽng-ba n na n tɩ zĩnd Ezipt tẽnga. B fãa na n kii be, sʋʋg n na n kʋ-ba, kom n na n kʋ-ba. Ned ba a ye kõn põs ye. B fãa na n paa tẽn-kãnga. Zabr sʋʋg bɩ kom n na n loog ne-ba. Yaa woto la b fãa na n looge. Bãmb zu-beeda la f na n tagse f sã n dat n kãab ned kãab-beedo; bɩ f sã n dat n tẽeg bũmb sẽn ka sakd tẽegr, n ya wẽnga, n ya yãnde." 
Jeremiah44:13 Neb niynsi sẽn be-b Ezipt tẽnga, m na n kãab-b lame, wala m sẽn kãab Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, na n yɩɩ sʋʋga, kom, la bã-longdem." 
Jeremiah44:14 Neb niynsi, sẽn yi-b Zɩɩda n wa soond Ezipt tẽng ka, ba a ye kõn põs ye, ba a ye kõn leb Zɩɩda, la yaa be la b yaool n dat n lɛɛg n wa kẽ, daar a ye, la ayo, na n yɩɩ neb a wãn bala.› »" 
Jeremiah44:15 Rap niyns fãa sẽn da mi tɩ b pagba da kʋʋda maand wẽn-sãams yĩnga, pagba sẽn da tigim ka tɛka, neb niyns fãa sẽn da kẽed Paros, Ezipt tẽnga, naaga taab n leok a Zeremi woto:" 
Jeremiah44:16 «Goam niyns fãa fo sẽn togs tõnd tɩ yaa Soaala goama, tõnd pa rat n kelg-b ye." 
Jeremiah44:17 Tõnd na n kell n maana tõnd sẽn da kãabe. D na n waa ne tɩdare la rãam n kõ a Astarte, yĩngr dĩm-poakã, wala d sẽn da maan n tãag rũnna, tõndo wala d ba rãmba, d dĩm dãmba, d kug-zĩidba, Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ la Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu. Wakat kãng tɩ d da rɩtame tɩ seke, d zug ra yaa noogo, yel-beed da ka pʋgd-d ye." 
Jeremiah44:18 La ade, tõnd sẽn bas n ka leb n wisd yĩngr dĩm-poaka tɩdare, n ka leb n kõt-a rãam, bũmb fãa paoogda tõndo, zab la kom namsda tõndo.»" 
Jeremiah44:19 Pagba tol n paasame: «Tõnd sã n kõt kũuni yĩngr dĩm-poak a Astarte, tõnd sɩdb rãmba mii tiiri. B miime tɩ tõnd dõosda miisdu sẽn tar a Astarte wẽnego n kõt-a, n paas ne rãam.»" 
Jeremiah44:20 A Zeremi goma woto ne sẽn da leok-b yẽ wã, pagba la rapa:" 
Jeremiah44:21 «M miime tɩ Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ la Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu y ra zoe n kõta kũun kãense, yãmba, y ba rãmba, y dĩm dãmba, y kug-zĩidba la zãma wã fãa. Dẽ yaa vẽenega! M sok n gese, y tẽedame tɩ Soaala ka mi bɩ b yĩmame?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Soaala ka yĩm ye, dẽ me la b ka le tõe n nee y tʋʋma, y manes yaalsã la b sĩnd ye. Dẽ me la y tẽnga lebg raboogo, wala a sẽn yaa a soab rũnna wã: b looga ne a paoonga fãa, ne a neba fãa. La yaa yel-beed ninga sẽn lʋɩ a zugã la ned kam fãa tar n kãabd a bɛɛba. Dẽ me yaa vẽenega." 
Jeremiah44:23 Yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ y zug rũnna wã, ka bũmb a to n wa ne-a, n zʋʋg y sẽn kʋ maand wẽn-sãams yĩnga n beeg Soaalã. Y pa kelg b koɛɛg ye, y pa tũ b sẽn wilg ye, y pa reeg b saglse, y pa tũ b noya ye.»" 
Jeremiah44:24 A Zeremi le yeela neba fãa, pagb la rapa: «Kelg-y Soaala koɛɛga, yãmba, Zɩɩda rãmb sẽn wa Ezipt tẽngã." 
Jeremiah44:25 Woto la dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomda: ‹Yãmba, pagbã, y sẽn yiis y noorẽ la y sẽn wẽnegd n pids ne y nusi, y yetame tɩ y sẽn pʋlem bũmb ningã, y na pids-a, yĩngr dĩm-poaka yĩnga, y na n waa ne wisdu la rãam. Y sɩd maana boto. M nong-y, kell-y n tall-y boto!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Bɩ y fãa gill kelg neer marsã, yaa mam meng m toore, yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n togsde, yaa mam meng n wẽende ne m yʋʋra sẽn ka be taarã, tɩ Ezipt tẽn-peelma fãa pʋgẽ Zɩɩda ned kõn le wẽen ne mam yʋʋra ye; b kõn le yeele: m wẽend ne Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn pid ne vɩɩma ye." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ad-m sẽn na n modg n tool-y bũmb ninga: ka na n yɩ sũ-noog ye, na n yɩɩ yel-beedo. Zɩɩda neb niyns fãa sẽn be-b Ezipt tẽnga, sʋʋga la kom n na n kʋ b fãa gilli." 
Jeremiah44:28 Yaa neb kẽer bala, neb sẽn ka zem bũmbu la sʋʋga bɩ koma na n keese. Bãmb na yi Ezipt n leb Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ la bãmb dãmba n na n kõ kaseto sã n ya mam gomdã n pidsi, bɩ sã n yaa bãmb dẽnna." 
Jeremiah44:29 M na n yika ne yãmb kaalẽ bala, Soaala n gomde. M na n kõ-y-la makre la woto y na bãnge tɩ m na n waa ne m sẽn kãab-y yel-beed ningã. Makra la woto:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: ade, mam na n ninga a Ofra, Ezipt tẽnga naaba, a bɛɛba nusẽ, neb niyns fãa sẽn da tʋl a kũuma nusẽ, wala mam sẽn ning a Sedesiyas, Zɩɩda dĩma, bɛ ninga sẽn da rat a kũuma nugẽ, a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma nugẽ.› »" 
Jeremiah45:1 Ad-y yɩ-la a Zoziyas biig a Zoakim sẽn waa n lebg Zɩɩda rĩma tɩ yʋʋm pids a naase la a Zeremi kɩt t'a Neriya biig a Barʋk gʋls sebre. Yɩɩ wakat kãnga la a Zeremi yeel a Barʋk: 
Jeremiah45:2 «Ad Soaala-Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, gomda woto fo poorẽ, Barʋk:" 
Jeremiah45:3 ‹Fo yeela woto: kato, m tara zu-bʋko! Tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ yel-beed buud toor-toore, paam maam! M pãng sɛɛme, m yaalame, mam tara kũmkũma bala al tɩ vʋʋsg kaẽ ye." 
Jeremiah45:4 Ad Soaala sẽn yet tɩ m wilg-fu: Ad-m tʋʋma sẽn lebg a soaba: mam sẽn da me la m tusd n lubdẽ, mam sẽn da sele la m pʋgd n võoda. Na n yɩɩ woto ne tẽnga gilli, m na n leeb-a-la lɛbla!" 
Jeremiah45:5 La foo, fo baoodame n na n maan yɛl kãsense, bas tɩ sɛ woto! Yaa yel-beed n na n wa ninsaalb fãa yĩnga. M sẽn na n maan bũmb ning bal f yĩnga, yaa kẽng f sẽn datẽ tɩ m ka na n yãk f yõor ye.› »" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ad koees niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas bãngda a Zeremi bu-zẽmba poorẽ. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ad Soaala koees ne Ezipt dĩm a Neko, ne Ezipt tãb-biisi. Dĩma ra bee Karkemis, Efrat kʋɩlga noore, la a wʋmame tɩ Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor zaba ne a neba n tõog-ba. Yɩ-la a Zoakim naamẽ, a sẽn deeg naam tɩ yʋʋm naasẽ. A Zoakim yɩɩ Zɩɩda dĩm a Zoziyas biiga." 
Jeremiah46:3 Tãnsoaben-dãmba tãsda woto: Aya, segl-y gãndo; bõonego la bɛda, tɩ yaa zabr loogre!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Segl-y wiidi, wed-dʋʋdbã, zomb-y y wiidi! Ning-y zug-peto, yals-y y zĩigẽ! Maneg-y y kãna n saase bob-y y zab-teedo!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Bõe la m yaool n neẽ? Tãb-biisa basda raoodo, b tard n lebda poorẽ. B sẽega b gãndaadã, ned kam zoet n tees a sẽn teesẽ, ned ba a ye ka wẽnegd a poorẽ ye, sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa yɛɛsgo. Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah46:6 Sẽn tõe n wudga wʋsgo ra tẽ t'a na põs ye, gãndaada ra tẽ tɩ b na põs ye. Sẽn lebd Goabg sẽnẽ, Efrat kʋɩlga noorẽ, la b pãsd n lʋɩtẽ." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ãnna n wẽnd Nil kʋɩlga Nil kʋɩlg sẽn pid n daannẽ, Nil kʋɩlg sẽn fõt wa kʋɩl bɛɛga?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ad-y yaa Ezipt tẽng n gomde: «Wala Nil kʋɩlg sẽn pid n daannẽ Nil kʋɩlg sẽn fõt wa kʋɩl-bɛɛga, m na n gãndg m yiime n lim tẽngã, n sãam dotã la nebã." 
Jeremiah46:9 Wiidi, wudg-y! Bilim-bilm, aya, wɩng-y! Tãb-biis gãndaado, loog-y taoore! Lʋɩ-y taoore Kus la Pʋt dãmba, lʋɩ-y taoor ne y gãndo, y gãnd-bõonese, loog-y yã, Lud rãmba ne y tãbdo!»" 
Jeremiah46:10 Mik bala, da-kãng la Soaala daare, dũni fãa Wẽnda sẽn da gũud la ra-kãnga. Da-kãng la b ra gũuda n na n tug beem ne b bɛɛba. Dẽ la b sʋʋga tar velbo, wa rũm-bãnde, la a yiisd a kom la a ko-yũud ne zɩɩm. Sẽn lebẽ fãa Soaala tara kɛɛbo, dũni fãa Wẽnda kʋʋd n samdame, yaa sẽn lebd nug goabg sẽnẽ, yaa Efrat kʋɩlga noore." 
Jeremiah46:11 M yãbd fo, Ezipt! La rʋ Galaad tãmsã tɩ f na paam kaam n bãn f noada. La m yet-f lame tɩ f ra nams ne tɩpg ye ad-f sãmpogra ka na n sãoog ye." 
Jeremiah46:12 Bu-zẽmba bãngame tɩ f paama yãnde, f waasga sãta zĩig zãnga. Gãndaoog n seg a gãnda-taaga, la b yiiba fãa naaga taab n lʋɩ." 
Jeremiah46:13 Woto la koɛɛg ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Zeremi, Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor sẽn waa n na n zab ne Ezipt raare:"
