Jeremiah46:14 Wilg-y kibara Ezipt rãmba, taas-y kibara Migdol rãmba, taas-y Memfis la Tapanɛs tẽnse. Yeel-y-ba: «Ned kam fãa yals a zĩigẽ!» Zabra zoe n looga ne y yagse." 
Jeremiah46:15 Bõe n maane? Loalgã, f wẽn-naanda, lʋɩɩme? Soaala sẽn tus-a, a taa tẽnga?" 
Jeremiah46:16 Yɩɩ wala b sẽn tusd tãb-biisã n lubdẽ tɩ ned kam fãa sã n yik bɩ a yetẽ: «Wa-y tɩ d leb d tẽngẽ, d zãag ne zabra la a yel-beedã.»" 
Jeremiah46:17 La sã n ya Ezipt dĩma, a bãng t'a sẽn tog ne yʋʋr ninga yaa a Be bʋʋr zaalem." 
Jeremiah46:18 Ad-y Soaala, dũni fãa Wẽnd, wẽendame: «Bɛ wã na n waame, dẽ yaa bũmb sẽn ya sɩda wa sẽn ya sɩda tɩ Tabor yaa tãnga n leb n ya sɩda tɩ Karmɛl sulgd n geta mogrã." 
Jeremiah46:19 Ezipt tẽng rãmba, kẽ n wʋgs-y y teedo n tees y pa-weer tẽnga, Memfis na n lebga we-raoogo, weoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem, we-raoog sẽn ya vɩʋʋgo." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ezipt da yaa nag-sɛdga sẽn ya neere, la keoodre n yi nug Goabga, n wa tabend-a." 
Jeremiah46:21 Tãb-biis niyns sẽn da zabd n deegd ligda da tara fãa, bũmb da ka paoogd-b ye. Mik bãmb fãa na n lɛɛg n zoeeme. Sẽn na n sak-a n yaas ka ye, ra-beeda raare, m sẽn na n yik ne bãmba raare, sẽn na n sak-a n yaas ka ye." 
Jeremiah46:22 Ezipt tãb-biisa soos n loogame n pa tol n maan bʋʋre, wa waafo, a sẽn yãend tɩ bɛɛba watame n na n tak zabr ne-a, n wat wala ra kɛɛdba, n yuumd b lare la b zende." 
Jeremiah46:23 B kɛɛda googã; da yaa tɩ bɛd bala n sẽg taaba, wa Soaala sẽn wilg-ma. Da-kɛɛdba sõor da ka tɛk ye, b da wẽnda sʋya, n ka tõe n sõd ye." 
Jeremiah46:24 Ezipt tẽng neera zĩi ne yãnde, a lʋɩɩ Goabg rãmba nugẽ.»" 
Jeremiah46:25 Dũni fãa Wẽnde, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam, yeelame: «Mam na n yika ne a Amon, Tɛɛb wẽn-naandã, n yik ne Ezipt wẽn-naandsã, ne a dĩm dãmba. M na n yika ne Ezipt dĩma la sẽn teega yẽ fãa." 
Jeremiah46:26 Mam na ninga bãmb fãa neb niyns sẽn dat n kʋ bãmba nugẽ: Babilon dĩma, a Nabikodonozor, nugẽ, la a tãb-biisa nugẽ. La kaoosg pʋgẽ, naab na n le wa zĩnda Ezipt tẽnga wala pĩnda.» Soaalã n wilg rẽnna." 
Jeremiah46:27 Sã n ya foom, m biig a Zakoob, da zoe rabeem ye. Da bas raood ye, Israyɛl! Tɩ bala, ade, mam na n fãaga foom tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmb nugẽ, f yembda tẽngẽ dãmb nugẽ. A Zakoob na n le wa zĩnda ne laafi, tɩ ned ka be n na n kẽes-a rabeem ye." 
Jeremiah46:28 Sã n ya foom, m biig a Zakoob, da maan dabeem ye! Soaala n gomde. Tɩ bala, mam bee ne foom. Mam sẽn da sẽeg yãmb tẽns niynsa pʋsẽ wã, tẽn-kãens na n wãame. Sã n yaa foom, m ka na n sɛɛs f rooga ye, m sɩbg-f lame bala wa sẽn da segde, m da ka tõe n bas-f saalle, wa ned sẽn ka tol n beeg ye!" 
Jeremiah47:1 Koɛɛg ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn togs bãngd a Zeremi Filisti rãmb poorẽ, dẽ tɩ Ezipt dĩma nan ka yik zabr ne Gaza ye." 
Jeremiah47:2 Soaala koɛɛga yɩɩ woto: Ad koom sẽn yit Goabg n watẽ, a lebga kʋɩl-kãsenga t'a kooma pidi, n zoet zĩis fãa. A limda tẽnga, la roto, neba tara yãbre, tẽnga rãmb fãa yɩɩnda b kʋʋr yɩɩlle." 
Jeremiah47:3 B wʋmda wiidi nao sẽn tibda, b wʋmda bilim-bilma sẽn maand bʋʋr kãsenga, n wʋmd bilim-bilma gʋla sẽn tõgd tẽnga. Ba rãmb ka le tẽr b kamb yell yɛs ye, n wa tong n zĩ zaalem." 
Jeremiah47:4 Daara taame, Filisti rãmb wãab raare. Ned ka le ket n na n sõng Tir la Sidõ ye. Filisti rãmb tẽns wãa zãnga, b bu-kella la Kaftor rãmba." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza rãmb zut põngame, yaa kʋʋre. Bʋʋr ka le yit Askalõ ye. Yãmb fãa, nin-wogda yagensã, y na n kell n kɩɩsa y yĩngã n ta da-bʋre?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Yãmb n zĩi n maandẽ: «Da-bʋre la Soaala sʋʋga na n vʋʋse, da-bʋre la a na n vʋʋs a wʋʋgẽ?»" 
Jeremiah47:7 Soaala kõ-a-la noore, a na n vʋʋsa wãn wãna? Yaa Askalõ la mogra noorẽ, yaa be la a tog n ta." 
Jeremiah48:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛga, Moab poorẽ: Yell na n paka Nebo tẽnga: b zɛɛ-a-la zãnga; Kiriyatayim paama yãnde: b tõog-a lame, do-kãseng ninga sẽn tara pãnga, yãnd me n na n kʋ yẽ, a raooda fãa wooga zãnga." 
Jeremiah48:2 A ka leb n ya Moab zu-zẽkr bũmb ye! Esbõ tẽnga, b baoome n na n sãam a yelle: Ad-b sẽn yete: Aya! D kɩt t a menem zãnga, tɩ b ra le gom a yell abada! Foom me, Madmena, fo yell me na n sãamame, tɩ bala fo ka na n põs sʋʋg ye." 
Jeremiah48:3 Kɛlenga n yit Oronayim: Yaa yel-beedo, yaa wãab menga!" 
Jeremiah48:4 A Moab yell sɛɛme, a kɛlenga n sãt n tat Soar." 
Jeremiah48:5 Sẽn põs-b kũuma zĩi ne nintãm. F rʋʋd Luyit tãmse, f sigd Oronayim, f wʋmda b sẽn gomd yel-beeda yelle." 
Jeremiah48:6 Aya, zoe-y yã, bao-y laafi! Zoe-y yã, wala bõn-wɛɛga sẽn zoet zĩ-pɛɛlẽ." 
Jeremiah48:7 Yaa sɩda, Moab, fo ra teega f tʋʋma la f arzɛkã, la ade b na n tõoga foom me! B tʋka f wẽnd a Kemos n dabd pa-weere tɩ f maan-kʋʋdba la f na-biisa yãagd-a." 
Jeremiah48:8 Tẽn-wãada saada tẽnsã a yeyn-ye, a ka na n long tẽng ba a ye. Longẽ bɩ kunkubrẽ, nin-vɩɩg ka le ket ye. Pʋs n yaa rẽ la Soaala togs yã." 
Jeremiah48:9 Segl-y yaoog a Moab yĩnga, t'a na n sɩd wãame a tẽnsa fãa na n lebga raboodo, nin-vɩɩg kõn le kell be ye." 
Jeremiah48:10 Sẽn maanda Soaala tʋʋma yood-yoodo, bɩ Wẽnd yãk a soab barka! Bɩ Wẽnd yãk a soab barka, ned ninga sẽn kɩta t'a sʋʋg kong zɩɩm!" 
Jeremiah48:11 Al a yãadmẽ, Moab da vɩɩme tɩ dabeem kaẽ ye; b ra zɩ n tall-a n kẽng pa-weer ye, a ra zĩi ne laafi, wala rãam b sẽn bas t'a kũm a yam, t'a rabɩlla tisg zãnga. Rãama zɩ n teem yʋʋr ye, bũmb pa teem a noore, bũmb ka loog ne a yũ-nooga ye." 
Jeremiah48:12 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m yãk wakato, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomda, tɩ rãama na n leeg yʋʋr a to pʋgẽ. Dã-rʋgda fãa na n lebga vɩɩdo, b na n pãb-b lame n wã." 
Jeremiah48:13 A Moab ka paam a wẽnd a Kemos nengẽ, a sẽn da gũud bũmb ninga ye. Yɩɩ wala a Israyɛl me sẽn ka paam fɩ Betɛl wẽn-naanda nengẽ, la a yaool n da teeg-a-la wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Moab tẽng rãmba, yãmb na n yɩɩ wãna n yeele: «Tõnd ya sũ-keelem dãmba, zab-zabdb sẽn ka zoet bũmbu?»" 
Jeremiah48:15 Ned ninga sẽn na n wã a Moab, kẽeda a tẽnsã ne zabr sʋʋga la a legenda a kom-bɩɩba n tees b kodgr zĩigẽ, wa b sẽn maand ne rũmsi. Yaa woto la Dĩm kãsenga gomda, bãmb yʋʋr la Wẽnde, dũni fãa Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab sãoong kolgame, yel-beeda wata ne yãgbo." 
Jeremiah48:17 Yãmb fãa sẽn yaa a yagse, yãmb fãa sẽn mi-a neere, wa pʋʋs-y a Moab a zaamẽ wʋm-beedo. Sok-y n ges maana a wãna tɩ b wã tẽng ninga sẽn da tar pãng a narã, pãng sẽn da yãet pẽgr zĩig zãngã?" 
Jeremiah48:18 Dibõ tẽng rãmba, sig-y y ziira goeel zugu; zĩnd tẽnga Dibõ, zĩnd tẽn-nabrẽ, tɩ bala sẽn wãa Moab, wata fo nengẽ, a na n wãa fo tãnsoben-dotã." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aroɛr dãmba, yaas-y sora noor n gũudẽ, sok-y sẽn zoet-bã, sok-y sẽn põs-bã n gese yaa bõe n maane?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Yaa woto la b leokda: Yãnd tara a Moab, a basa raood zãnga! Waas-y yã! Kelem-y yã! Moon-y Arno kʋɩl-bɛɛga noore t'a Moab wãame." 
Jeremiah48:21 Soaala kao-la b bʋʋdo n paalg kunkubã la Olon tẽnse, n paas Yaas, Mefaat," 
Jeremiah48:22 n paas Dibõ, Nebo, Bɛt-Diblatayim," 
Jeremiah48:23 n paas Kiriyatayim, Bɛt-Gamul, Bɛt-Meõ," 
Jeremiah48:24 n paas Keriyot la Bosra. A tata Moab tẽnsa fãa, sẽn pẽ-ba, wala sẽn zãr-ba." 
Jeremiah48:25 A Moab pãng sɛɛme, a kang kaoogame. Boto la Soaala-Wẽnd gomda." 
Jeremiah48:26 Lub-y Moab tẽng rãmba, tɩ bala b maana zẽk-m-menga ne Soaala. La Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ b yũnug-b rãama tɩ b wa gãe n wʋbdẽ, tɩ neba fãa wa gũbg-ba n laadẽ." 
Jeremiah48:27 A Moab tẽeg tɩ yẽ n da laad a Israyɛl, n da get-a wa wagdre, n da ka gomd a yelle n ka gird a zug ye." 
Jeremiah48:28 Moab rãmba, bas-y tẽnsã, kẽng-y n tɩ zĩnd-y pĩisa zutu. Maan-y wala walle sẽn tʋɩt a tʋko, a gãndgda bog-zulungã n tʋɩ." 
Jeremiah48:29 Tõnd wʋma a Moab yelle, n wʋm a wilg-m-menga yelle, la a tɩtaama yelle, a sẽn geend a meng ne bũmb ninga, a sẽn gomd põt-põto, a sẽn tẽed tɩ yẽ n yɩɩd fãa." 
Jeremiah48:30 Mam me mi-la a wʋglem, Soaalã n gomde, a gomdame n paasd yɛla, a lʋɩɩsda a meng taoore, la rẽ fãa yaa zaalem." 
Jeremiah48:31 Dẽ n so tɩ m sã n tagsd a Moab yelle yaa kʋʋr yɩɩlle la m pʋta, m yãbda a neba yĩnga, m yãbda Kir-Erɛs dãmba!" 
Jeremiah48:32 Mam kũmda foom, Sibma bugsuntungu pʋʋgo, mam kũmda foom n yɩɩd Yazɛr. Fo willa da tẽegame n zãag zĩiga, f ra tol n gãndga mogrã, n da tat Yazɛr. Sẽn wãada tẽnga wa n deega f biisa zãnga" 
Jeremiah48:33 Sũ-noog sẽn naag ne bʋ-raasa sɛɛme, B tɩɩsa tẽngr yaa sɩɩ. Sĩmsa ka le yɛs ne rãam ye, ned ka ket n na n fẽd bugsuntunga biis ye, yɩɩl niyns sẽn da yɩɩnd tɩ tʋʋmda kẽnda, ned ba a ye ka le be n yɩɩn-b ye." 
Jeremiah48:34 Esbõ boondame tɩ b wa fãag-a, la Eleale rãmb wʋmda b kɛlenga. Yaas rãmb wʋmda b kɛlenga; bʋʋra yita Soar n tat Oronayim, n tat Eglat-Selisiya, tɩ Nimrim sẽn da gãe ne kooma lebg ko-yũud zĩisi." 
Jeremiah48:35 Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele: «Ned ninga sẽn wata ne kũuni tãmsa zutu n na n kõ wẽn-naande, bɩ sẽn wisda tɩdare bãmb taoore, m na kɩt t'a soab menem." 
Jeremiah48:36 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m yãbd a Moab la m yãbd Kir-Erɛs. M wiisda wa wɩɩga tɩ b sẽn da paama fãa lebga zaalem. 
Jeremiah48:37 Ninsaalba wõrsa b zoobdo, n kõog b toeemse, b kɩɩsa b nusi, la b yera sũ-pa-noang futu." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab bɛɛnda fãa zutu, la sõasg zĩisi fãa, yaa yãbr bala; dẽ wã yaa mam sẽn wã Moab, wala b sẽn wãad yʋʋr f sẽn ka le rate.» — Soaala gomde." 
Jeremiah48:39 Pʋd-y sũ-sãang yɩɩlle: «Kato, a Moab lʋɩ zãnga! A sẽn wẽnemd a kãar n tees Soaala ka lebg yãnde?» A Moab lebga laad bũmbu la dabeem bũmbu, a yags fãa yĩnga." 
Jeremiah48:40 Tɩ bala Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «Bũmb wala sɩlga n laande, n tẽegd a pɩgs a Moab zugu." 
Jeremiah48:41 B reesa a tẽnsã fãa, tãnsoben-dota fãa, b wã-b lame. A Moab tãb-biisa sẽn ya gãndaadã, fãa zĩi ne yɩɩre wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem." 
Jeremiah48:42 B menesa a Moab b ka le sõt-a nin-vɩɩs sʋk ye, A tẽeme t'a yɩɩda Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah48:43 Ad Soaala sẽn gomd y yĩnga, Moab rãmba, y pʋɩɩr la woto: Sũ-puur sẽn ka taare, bog-zulunga la wĩ ka tɛka." 
Jeremiah48:44 Sẽn data n põs sũ-puurã, na n lʋɩ bog-zulunga pʋga. A sẽn yet t'a yii bog-zulunga la wĩ wã sẽn wẽneg n loe-a. A Moab yella na n yɩɩ woto, m sã n wa yik ne-a. Soaala n gomd boto." 
Jeremiah48:45 Neb niynsi sẽn zoet-ba yɛɛme, n yaas Esbõ n na n soond be. La bugum yii Esbõ, bug-zɩlenga yii naab a Siyõ zakẽ bug-walem n loog n na n tɩ yõog nin-bãmba tẽnsa sẽn pid ne bʋʋrã; bugma yita kɩrenga n tees sʋka." 
Jeremiah48:46 Fo yell sãam yã, Moab! A Kemos neba loogda zãnga; B talla f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli n loog yembdo." 
Jeremiah48:47 La daar n wate, Soaala n gomde, A Moab yɛla na n tekame.» Koe-kãnga n baasd koeesã Soaala sẽn taas a Zeremi a Moab poorẽ." 
Jeremiah49:1 A Amon kamba poorẽ, Soaala gomda woto: «Sɩngame tɩ bõe tɩ wẽnd a Milkom wa so Gad tẽn-peelem? Sɩngame tɩ bõe tɩ Amonitsa wa so Israyɛl tẽnse? A Israyɛl konga kamb bɩ, kamb sẽn na n welg b ba raboog bɩ?»" 
Jeremiah49:2 Sẽn ya woto wã, ad daar n wate, Soaala koɛɛga, tɩ mam na n kɩt tɩ b wʋm tãp bʋrga Amonitsa Raba pʋgẽ. A na n lebga sũ-sãang tãn-bila, n lebg raboog sẽn kẽesd rabeem. Yagsa tẽns mens na n dɩɩ bugum. Dẽ marsã, la Israyɛl na n deeg a soolma. Soaalã n yeele." 
Jeremiah49:3 Esbõ rãmba, kelem-y kʋʋre tɩ bala Ayi wãame! Raba kom-pugli, kũm-y yã! Yeelg-y sũ-pa-noang futu yõk-y kũmkũma, vɛɛs-y goabg la rɩtgo. Wẽn-naand a Milkom tʋk n dabda pa-weere, yẽ ne a maan-kʋʋdba la a na-komse." 
Jeremiah49:4 Raba, bi-pugl sẽn ya tõata fo da maanda wilg-m-menga ne f bãado, f ra teega f sẽn tigs n bĩngi. Woto la f ra gomd f sũurẽ: «Ãnda n na n saag n tak zabr ne maam?»" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ade, mam na n kɩtame, yaa Soaala n gomde, yaa dũni fãa Wẽnd n gomde, mam na n kɩtame tɩ f yɛɛse; f yɛɛsga na n yii zĩig zãnga; b na dig-y-la fãa n tees taoore. Ned kõn zĩnd yãmb sʋka, sẽn na n tõog n tigim zoetba zĩ yɛng ye." 
Jeremiah49:6 La rẽ poore marsã m na gese n tek Amonitsa yelle. Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto. 
Jeremiah49:7 Soaala koɛɛg a Edom poorẽ. Dũni fãa Soaala gomda woto: Yam-vẽen-ned ka le ket Teman laa? Yam zulumsa rãmb yam kẽe yɛ? B basame tɩ b yama sɩlem kẽk laa? 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedã rãmba, leb-y poorẽ, zoe-y yã! Bao-y bogdo n soond neere, tɩ bala m wat n na n sãama a Ezayu yagense. Y wakata yaa n taame." 
Jeremiah49:9 Bugsuntunda tõsdba sã n wa y nengẽ, b ka na n bas sib gĩnd meng ye. La yʋng ninga wagda wã sẽn na n wa, dɩll b raab pids zãnga, bũmb kõn kell be ye." 
Jeremiah49:10 Tɩ bala yaa maam n na n deeg a Ezayu sẽn tara fãa, m na n bãnga a sẽn solgd a laoga zĩiga, a ka na n leb n tõog n solg bũmb ye, na n yɩɩ yell a Ezayu yĩnga. F yak kõn tõog n yeele:" 
Jeremiah49:11 «Y sã n wa looge m na ges y kɩɩb-bi wã yelle, y pʋg-kõapa na tõog n teeg maam.»" 
Jeremiah49:12 Ad Soaala gomd a to: «Kelg-y neere. Rã-toaaga sẽn da ka segl b rãmb yĩngã, bãmb n baas n yũ-a. La foo, Edom, fo ratame tɩ b ges foo wa ned sẽn ka maan yelle. Kõn yɩ boto bada. Fo me na n yũu rãama." 
Jeremiah49:13 Bala, mam meng kãabame, la sɩda wa m sẽn ya Wẽndã, Bosra na-tẽnga na n lebga yel-beed tẽnga, bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem; a na n lebga raboogo la a yella n na n wa f yamẽ, f sã n wa rat n kãab beedo. A yagsa tẽns me na n naagame n lebg rabood sẽn ka na n tõog n le yik bada.» Yaa woto la Soaala gom yã." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ad-y Soaala wilg-m-la woto: tɩ b tʋma ned t'a togs bu-zẽmbã: «Tigim-y taaba! Kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne Edom! Yik-y yã tɩ yaa tãpo! 
Jeremiah49:15 Ade, Edom, mam na n kɩtame tɩ fo lebg tẽn-bila tẽns fãa sʋka, neb fãa na n sãbsa foom." 
Jeremiah49:16 Fo n da yɛɛsd Adem biisi, n da tẽed tɩ fo n yɩɩd fãa, la rẽ wã, f ra belgda f meng bala. Ne f sẽn kẽed pĩis bogdẽ, ne f sẽn tɩ zao tãn-lug-lugã, ne f sẽn tɩ zaoolg f tʋka yĩngr wa sɩlg sẽn zaoolgd a rẽnna, m na tɩ sik-fo.» Soaala n gome." 
Jeremiah49:17 Edom na n lebga raboogo. Neb niyns fãa sẽn na n loog a tẽn-peelmẽ, a pɛleng na n yɩkame, yel-beed la b na n yãend n wiisi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Wala Sodom la Gomor sẽn yɩ a soaba, Edom ne a yagsa me na n yɩɩ boto. Tẽn-kãens me pʋgẽ ned kõn leb n zĩnd yɛs ye." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ade, m na n yɩɩ wa bõnyẽega, sẽn yit Zʋrdẽ kãgrẽ n tees rũms wãbneg-zĩiga, Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, la vugr bala m na n sẽega fãa. Dẽ poore m na n ninga m yam sẽn dat a soab be. Ãnna n zem maam? Ãnna n tõe n bool maam bʋʋdo? Nin-naab a bõe n tõe n yaas mam taoore?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Bãng-y Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn sede, a Edom sɩbgr yĩnga. Wẽnd sẽn segle Teman rãmb yĩnga. Bãng-y tɩ b na n looga ne-ba a yembr-yembre wala rũmsi. Bãng-y tɩ b tẽn-peelma meng n na n zãgs-ba, wala bũmb sẽn yaand sũuri." 
Jeremiah49:21 Bãmb lʋɩɩsa bʋrg yĩnga, tẽng rĩmame al n sãag n ta Rudum mogre." 
Jeremiah49:22 Ade, yaa wala sɩlga sẽn lug yĩngri n laannẽ, n tẽeg a pɩgsa Bosra zugu. Badaare, Edom tãb-biis sũuri na n pida ne yɩɩre wala pag sẽn kũmd dogem dẽnna." 
Jeremiah49:23 Koɛɛg a Damas poorẽ. Amat la Arpad tẽnse gãee ne sũ-sãanga tɩ b wʋma sẽn pa tõe n kelge. Yɩɩre n tar-ba tɩ b ka mi b sẽn na n maaneg ye; 
Jeremiah49:24 Damas rãmb basda raoodo b lɛɛgame n na n zoe, rabeem kãseng la b rigda; toog tara b yĩnga n wẽnnẽ wala paga sẽn kũmd dogem." 
Jeremiah49:25 Yaa wãna, tɩ b zoet n basd tẽnga tẽng yʋʋr sẽn yi a taab sʋka, tẽng sũur sẽn noom ne a menga?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Tẽnga kom-bɩɩba na n lʋɩɩ b sõasg zĩigẽ, la a tãb-biisa na n kii baraare. Dũni fãa Wẽndã n gomd boto." 
Jeremiah49:27 Mam na n ninga Damas lalsa fãa bugum, la a na n dɩɩ Damas dĩm a Ben-Adad doogã." 
Jeremiah49:28 Koɛɛg Arabsa poorẽ. Yaa sẽn be-b Kedar la Asor, bãmb la Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor sẽn tõogã. Ad Soaala koɛɛg b poorẽ: Aya! Yik-y yã, yaang rãmba, kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne Kedar dãmba. Da kees-y bũmb zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã ye." 
Jeremiah49:29 B wʋk b pɛɛl roto la b rũmsã; b wʋk b pɛɛla la b lagda fãa! B deeg b yʋgma wã la b moone: «Yɛɛsgo, goabg la rɩtgo!»" 
Jeremiah49:30 Asor rãmba, Zoe-y yã! Da yals-y ye! Solg-y yã, Asor dãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, tɩ bala a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, bilgda a yamẽ n dat n tʋm yãmb tʋʋm beedo." 
Jeremiah49:31 Yik-y yã! Kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne tẽng sẽn vɩ ne laafi tɩ dabeem kaẽ ye, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, kẽng-y n tɩ tak zabre ne tẽng sẽn ka tar kʋɩlense, n vɩ kɛɛnga." 
Jeremiah49:32 B yʋgma, b na n yõg-b lame, la b rũmsa a taaba na n lebga b soolem. M na n sẽega yaang la taoore goabg la rɩtgo, nin-bãmba sẽn kõogd b yɛɛma. Sẽn lebẽ fãa, m na n sãam-b lame, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Jeremiah49:33 Asor na n lebga we-yũus tẽnga, n lebg we-raoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem, ned kõn le zĩnd be ye; a na n lebga wala raboogo." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ad koɛɛga Soaala sẽn togs a Zeremi, Elamit rãmb poorẽ. Yɩɩ Zɩɩda naaba, a Sedesiyas, naama sɩngrẽ." 
Jeremiah49:35 Dũni fãa Wẽnda goma woto: «Ade mam na n kaooga Elam tãpo, t'a tãpa la a pãnga." 
Jeremiah49:36 M na n kɩtame tɩ sobgo yi kɩrems a naasã: yaanga, nin-taoore, goabga la rɩtgo, n wa sẽeg Elamitsa zĩis fãa; tẽng ka be n ka na n yãende b sẽn dig b rãmba n yiis Elam ye." 
Jeremiah49:37 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Elamitsa digimdi b bɛɛb taoore, neb niyns sẽn dat n kʋ bãmba taoore. Yell kãsenga la m na n tak b zugu mam sũura na yikame, Soaalã n gomde, m na n kɩtame tɩ b pʋg-b ne sʋʋse n kʋ-b gilli." 
Jeremiah49:38 M na n yiisa Elam dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba n maneg n zaoolg m naam goeele.» Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto. 
Jeremiah49:39 La daar a ye, bãmb n togsde: m na n gesa Elam t'a yella teke." 
Jeremiah50:1 Gomd ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn wilg bãngd a Zeremi t'a leok Babilon la Kalde rãmba. 
Jeremiah50:2 Moon-y yã tɩ tẽnsa fãa wʋme; wilg-y zĩis fãa; bao-y makre n wilg tɩ neb fãa bãnge, da solg-y bũmb ye; Moon-y woto: b tõoga Babilon; a wẽn-naandsa zĩi ne yãnde, n zĩ ne yɩɩre, yãnd na n kʋ-la a Bel. Dabeem kãseng kẽ-la a Marduk." 
Jeremiah50:3 Tɩ bala, neb n na n yi Goabga n wa a tẽngẽ, n wãa-a t'a lebg weoog sẽn kẽesd rabeem t'a lebg rabo-vɩɩdo tɩ rũng bɩ ninsaala ka le pɩʋʋgd be ye." 
Jeremiah50:4 Wakat kãng marsã, Soaalã n gomde, Israyɛl la Zɩɩda rãmba na n wẽnemda b naoore n lɛɛg n watẽ la b yãbda, n lɛɛg n wa bao maam b Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah50:5 B na n baoo Siõ sore; b na n wẽnemda b nense n tees be. Zood la b rat n yõg ne maam zood sẽn ka na n le sãame, zood sẽn ka na n zĩnd sɛɛbo." 
Jeremiah50:6 Mam neba da lebga piis sẽn menem Pe-kɩɩmba ra bas-b lame tɩ b menem, b ra bas-b lame tɩ b saad tãmsa zutu. Tãmsa la b ra tar rʋʋbo n wa yĩm b bãgra yelle." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bɛ ninga fãa sẽn seg-ba, ra tara b yõgb bala la b yetẽ: «Tall-ba! Bãmb n beeg b Soaala n zãag ne b tɩlgr roogo, n bas b yaab rãmba sẽn da teeg a soaba.»" 
Jeremiah50:8 Soaala tãsd-b-la woto: Zoe-y n bas-y Babilon, yi-y Kalde rãmb tẽng n zoe! Zoe-y wala boeese sẽn lʋɩt bʋʋsa taoore." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ade: mam na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-bɛda sũ taaba, n tɩ zab ne Babilon. B na n yii Goabga n seg taaba n tɩ zab ne-a, n tõog-a. B pɛɛma, ka tãood n yõsg ye: ya tãb-biig nug sẽn noom pɛɛma mesgre. Gãndaoog ka kẽnd zabre n lɛɛg n wa tɩ nug ka zãad ye." 
Jeremiah50:10 Babilon tẽnga rãmba, ad-y b na n zɛ-b lame zɛɛdba na n zɛɛ ne sũ-noogo. Woto la Soaala gomda." 
Jeremiah50:11 Aya! Modg-y ne kɩdengo, y tõe n nooga y sũuri, yãmb fãa, m soolma fãadba! Modg-y ne zoeese wa nag-sɛdg sẽn be bãoogẽ, Kelem-y yã wa wed-daado sẽn kelemde!" 
Jeremiah50:12 Y zɩ tɩ y ba yiri zĩi ne yãnde, y zɩ tɩ yãnd wuka a zugu, y zɩ tɩ yẽ n pa poorẽ zãnga, y zɩ t'a lebga zĩ-peen-daaga!" 
Jeremiah50:13 Yaa a sẽn yik Soaala sũur yĩnga, la a lebg we-raoogo, tɩ nin-vɩɩg zãag ne-a, tɩ sẽn pẽnega be rigd rabeem la a wiisdẽ, t'a nee sãoong ning sẽn sãama." 
Jeremiah50:14 Yãmb fãa sẽn dõos y tãbdo, wa-y n teedg-y ne Babilon, gũbg-y na-tẽngã. Tão-y y pɛɛma, da zoe-y y pɛɛm bõn ye, tɩ bala a beega Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah50:15 Kɩt-y t'a wʋm a tãb-biisa kaasgo. A ges a gasdã sẽn lʋɩte, a lal-gũbrã sẽn sirgi la a reeg t'a konga pãnga. Yaa Soaala n dokd b sũuri. Yãmb me rok y sũuri ne Babilon Lebs-y na-tẽngã a sẽn maan a taaba." 
Jeremiah50:16 Bʋdb ra zĩndi, ka-kɛɛr ra zĩndi. Zabra yel-beeda yĩnga, bɩ ned kam fãa leb a buudẽ, ned kam fãa leb a tẽngẽ." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israyɛl da yaa pe-yãang sẽn da menem, pe-yãang bõnyẽes sẽn da rigdi. Sẽn yɩ-a pipi soaba n yĩig-a, yaa Asʋr dĩma. Yẽ poore yɩ-la a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, la dĩm kãnga pãba a kõabã n bõgse." 
Jeremiah50:18 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaam gomd woto: «Mam na n yika ne Kalde dĩma, ne a tẽnga wala m sẽn maan ne Asʋr dĩma." 
Jeremiah50:19 M yaool n na n talla a Israyɛl n lebs-a wa rũnga, a wãbneg zĩigẽ; a na paam tɩ m dɩlga, Karmɛl la Bazã tãmsa zutu, n dɩlg-a Efrayim la Galaad tãmsa zutu la bũmb kõn paoog-a ye." 
Jeremiah50:20 Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ b na n baoo a Israyɛl sẽn beeg ne bũmb ninga la b ka na n leb n yãe bũmb ye. B na n bao a Zɩɩda beegre, la b ka na n le yãend bũmb ye. M sẽn bas b rãmb vɩɩsa na n paama sugri." 
Jeremiah50:21 Kẽng-y ko-mensenda tẽngẽ, kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne-yẽ, kẽng-y n tɩ zab-y ne a Pekod! B kʋ-b fãa gilli, n da bas bũmb ye, Soaala gomde. Mam sẽn kõ foom noore, tɩ f maan bũmb ninga bɩ f maane." 
Jeremiah50:22 Tãp bʋʋr wulumda ne tẽnga, yel-beed bal n pid tẽngã!" 
Jeremiah50:23 Maana a wãn-wãna? Babilon da wẽnda guugu, n tood n bõgsd dũni wã gilli; la ade, yẽ n kao gɩrse n dɩga. Ad-a sẽn wẽnd bũmb ning rũnna: zĩ-peen-daaga sẽn kẽesd rabeem. La rẽ yɩ-la a wãna?" 
Jeremiah50:24 Ad yaa maam n gãneg-f bẽdgo Babilon, la fo basame tɩ b yõk-fo; fo ka bãng meng ye. Ad-f sẽn pag bi-bees roogo, tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la f beeg yã.»" 
Jeremiah50:25 Soaala paka b zab-teed doogo, la b yiisa b sũ-puur zab-teedo. Babilon dãmb nif na n yãendame, b nif na n yãenda dũni fãa Soaala tʋʋma." 
Jeremiah50:26 Aya! Yi-y zĩis fãa n wa Babilon! B fõgs bao wã fãa, b tigs laogã gilli n yõog bugum. B sõng tɩ bũmb ra kees ye." 
Jeremiah50:27 Kʋ-y gãndaadã, tall-y b fãa n kẽng n tɩ koode! Bãmb wakat n ta, bɩ b me looge, tɩ Soaala me yika ne bãmba." 
Jeremiah50:28 Kelge, Siõ, ad yaa neb n põs Babilon la bãmb dãmb n wate, n na n wilg Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn dok b sũur ne fo bɛɛbã. B roka b sũur ne wẽnd dooga wãadba." 
Jeremiah50:29 Bool-y tãb-biisi, bool-y neb niyns fãa sẽn dõosd tãpo, tɩ b wa zab ne Babilon. Bɩ b wẽ b sika n gilg Babilon; a ra paam zĩig n zoe n põs ye. B lebs-a wẽngã a sẽn maana, a sẽn nams a taaba to-to, b nams yẽnda me boto. Rẽ n segd, t'a zẽka a menga Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõnga taoore." 
Jeremiah50:30 Kʋ-y kom-bɩɩbã tẽnga fãa pʋgẽ, sõng-y tɩ b tãb-biisã fãa ki badaare. — Soaala gomde." 
Jeremiah50:31 Ade, m yika ne foom, Babilon, wilg-m-meng soaba. Yaa dũni fãa Soaala n gomde. Ad fo wakat n ta tɩ m na n yik ne foo." 
Jeremiah50:32 Zẽk-m-meng soaba lakame n lʋɩ; ned ka be n na n sõng-a t'a yik ye. M na n ninga tẽnga bugum la bugma kõn kees bũmb ye. 
Jeremiah50:33 Soaala koɛɛga, a Israyɛl Wẽnda koɛɛg la woto: B namsa Israyɛl kamb wʋsgo, n nams Zɩɩda kamba me wʋsgo. Neb niyns sẽn wʋk-ba n loog pa-weerã pa rat tɩ b lɛɛg n wa ye." 
Jeremiah50:34 La bãmb Fãagda yaa maam, la maam me la pãng Soaba menga, maam la dũni fãa Wẽnde. Maam n na n zab b zĩigẽ, la m na n waa ne laafi tẽng zugu, Babilon bal n na n pa ne zũnd-zãnde." 
Jeremiah50:35 M na n yika zabr ne Babilon dãmba ne na-tẽnga rãmba, ne a na-biis la a mitba, yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah50:36 M na n yika zabre ne zirẽ bagbã m na n menesa b yẽesma. M na yika ne a tãb-biisã n zãag b yama ne b zab-teeda zãabo. 
Jeremiah50:37 M na n yika zabre ne a wiidi n yik zabr ne a bilim-bilm, n yik zabr ne buud niyns sẽn sõngd-a, n kɩt tɩ b lebg rabɛɛmb wa pagba. M na n yika zabre ne a laogã, n kɩt tɩ b wa zɛ-ba n looge." 
Jeremiah50:38 M na n yika zabre ne kʋɩlsã n kʋɩɩs-b zãng-zãnga. Tɩ bala tẽnga pida ne wẽn-naandse la bãmb n menesd b neba yam, sẽn waoogd-b bãmba yam." 
Jeremiah50:39 Dẽ n so tɩ b tẽnga na n lebg we-yũusi, la kata zĩiga; na-neendo na n wa kẽe be. Babilon na n lebga vɩʋʋgo, ned kõn le zĩnd tẽn-kãng abada." 
Jeremiah50:40 M na n sãam-a-la zãnga wala Sodom ne Gomor la b yagse. Yaa Soaala n gomde. Ned kõn le tol n zĩnd be ye, ninsaal kõn le ti a roog be ye." 
Jeremiah50:41 Neb n yit nug goabg n watẽ, yaa tẽn-kãseng rãmba. Nanams sẽn tar pãnga n dɩk sor n watẽ la yaa al mooga sɛtmẽ la b yita." 
Jeremiah50:42 B tãb-biisa tara tãbdo la b yuumda b sʋʋse. Yaa neb sẽn ya nin-toose, neb sẽn ka tar sugr ye. B bʋʋra zema mogra rẽnna, mogra sẽn mi n wa yik a ko-wiisã. Yaa wiidi la b zao, la b tonga b zabr tongre, la b wat n na n zaba ne foo, Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babilon dĩma wʋma koɛɛgã t'a raood na n sɛ zãnga, tã na n digimd waoodo wala pag sẽn kũmd rogem." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ade, m na n yɩɩ wa bõnyẽega, sẽn yit Zʋrdẽ tʋgrẽ n wat rũms wãbneg zĩigẽ. Tao bala, bũmb fãa na menem. M na kẽes Babilon dĩm ning m sẽn tũusa soolmẽ. Ãnda n tõe n mak a meng ne maam, ãnda n na sok maam m sẽn maande? Tẽng-soaal a bõe n tõe n yals m taoore?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Bɩ y kelg neere Soaala sẽn yals Babilon poorẽ, bɩ y bãng b sẽn yalse tẽnga yĩnga. Bãng-y tɩ b na n tall-b lame n looge n loog a yeyn-ye wa rũmsi. Bãng-y tɩ yaa b tẽnga menga n ka le rat n wʋm b yũugu." 
Jeremiah50:46 B sẽn wʋm tɩ b tõoga Babilon, tẽnsa miimame, la b wʋma kaasgo bu-zẽmba tẽnsa pʋsẽ." 
Jeremiah51:1 Woto yaa Soaala koɛɛg a to: Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sob-raoog kaooge n wa sãam Babilon ne a kẽedbã. 
Jeremiah51:2 Mam na n tʋma neba, la b na n wa sẽeg-a-la wa sobgo sẽn yelgd mo-pagdo la b zɛ a tẽngã. A zu-beeda raare, b na n gũbg-a lame n gilgi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Tãbda rãmb sɩng tãoobo. Sẽn tar-b kuta fut sɩng yeelgre, da bas-y tãb-bi-poala ye, zab-zabd ba a ye da põs ye." 
Jeremiah51:4 Sẽn paam-b sãmpogre na n paa Babilon, tɩ soya pid ne sẽn lʋɩ-b zabrẽ." 
Jeremiah51:5 Tɩ bala, tẽnga fãa pida ne yel-wẽna, tɩ bala b beega Soaala-Wẽnde, b beega a Israyɛl Nin-sõngã. Israyɛl la Zɩɩda kell n talla b sõangda, bãmb la dũni fãa Soaala." 
Jeremiah51:6 Zoe-y n yi Babilon, ned kam fãa bao a menga da bas-y tɩ b wa naag-y n kʋ ye. Ad-y marsã yaa Soaala raare, yaa b rok b sũur daare. Soaala lebsda Babilon a sẽn tog ne." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilon da yaa sãnem wamde Soaala-Wẽnd nugẽ. Wamd-kãng rãama n da tɩgsd ãndũni rãmba, a rãama la b ra yũud n tuumnẽ." 
Jeremiah51:8 Vugr bala, wamda lʋɩɩme n wã: kũm-y Babilon! Bao-y kaam n kõ-a t'a bãn a nodre n boog a toogo. Daar bɩ a sãooge!" 
Jeremiah51:9 Tõnd tɩbsa Babilon la a ka sãoog ye. Wa-y tɩ d loog n bas-a, ned kam fãa leb a tẽngẽ. Pɛt ning a sẽn na n yãenda yaa pɛt menga, tɩ yaa dũni wã la a beeg yã." 
Jeremiah51:10 Sã n ya sɩda, Soaala maan-d-la neere. D ta Siõ n togse tõnd Wẽnda sẽn maan d yĩnga." 
Jeremiah51:11 Soaala yẽsame n dɩgle: b na n sãama Babilon. Yaa Mɛd dãmbã n na n tʋm tʋʋnd kãnga. Yaa Soaala raare. B rokda b sũuri tɩ b sãama b ro-sõngã. Saas-y y pɛɛma neere, saas-y n pids y loko." 
Jeremiah51:12 Zẽk-y y tãp-kaoore tɩ b sɩng zabre ne Babilon lalse! Paas-y gũudba sõore, zĩig fãa paam a gũuda; zaoolg-y sẽn ne-b yɩɩga. Soaala na n pidsa b sẽn kãabe, n pids b sẽn yeel fãa Babilon poorẽ." 
Jeremiah51:13 Babilon, fo sẽn be ko-bɛd noorẽ la fo sẽn ya dakãagre, fo wakat taame, fo wẽnema pida zãnga." 
Jeremiah51:14 Dũni fãa Wẽnd n wẽend ne b menga: «Mam na n kɩtame, la rẽ yaa sɩda wa sẽn ya sɩd tɩ m ya Wẽndã, m na n kɩtame tɩ neb sẽn ya ka tɛka wa sʋya, wa kalwaare wa reeg f tẽngã n yãmbe. B na n teesa foom n tãs b zabr tãsga.»" 
Jeremiah51:15 Soaala wilga b pãnga. B naama tẽngẽ la b wilga b tʋʋm-minim n yag dũniya, n wilg b yama zulum, n pids yĩngra ne a teedã." 
Jeremiah51:16 B sã n gom bala, la koom sẽn tigimd yĩngri, sawad-tagda yɛdgda yĩngri tɩ sa-tãsga wa ne sa-koom; sobga yita a sẽn da tigimẽ." 
Jeremiah51:17 Dẽ la ned kam yɛsa n ka mi a sẽn maande. La sẽn kẽ-b moog zãnga, yaa yõgsã sẽn dõog b wẽn-naandsã, b zĩime la b zut wuka ne yãnde; yaa belgem-belgem bala la b naan yã; sẽn vʋʋsda ne yõor ka ye." 
Jeremiah51:18 Yaa sobg ra-taase, yaa laad bũmbu. Dẽ fãa na n kãag n loogame, Soaala sẽn na n yik raare." 
Jeremiah51:19 A Zakoob Pʋɩɩrã ka ya wa bãmb ye, bãmb la dũni fãa Naanda, t'a Israyɛl yaa b sẽn bok n kõ b menga, b yʋʋra la Pãng soaba Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah51:20 Babilon, foom n yɩ m zãare fo yɩɩ m zab-teoogo. M talla foo n zab ne bu-zẽmbã, m talla foo n sik nanamse b zaoorẽ." 
Jeremiah51:21 M talla foo n pãb n kʋ wed-dʋʋdba ne b wiidi. Mam talla foo n to bilim-bilma la sẽn da be-b pʋsẽ. 
Jeremiah51:22 Maam n tall-fo n wẽ paga la raoa, nin-kẽema la yãaga, n tall-fo n wẽ bi-ribla la bi-pugla," 
Jeremiah51:23 maam n tall-fo n dig rũm-kɩɩmba ne b rũmsi n dig koaadba ne b nag-koodse, n dig kombɛɛmba ne b sõangdba." 
Jeremiah51:24 La ade, Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, y na yãend marsã m sẽn na n lebs Babilon ne a kẽedbã wẽng ning b sẽn maan Siõ." 
Jeremiah51:25 N-ye! M yika ne foom Babilon, tẽn-wãada, sẽn wã dũni wã gilli, m gila m nugu la m zẽk-a lame n tees foo, Soaala n gomde; m na n tus-f lame n sik f pĩisa zugu. M na n kɩtame tɩ bug-kãseng zomb fo," 
Jeremiah51:26 bugum sẽn ka na n kees kugri, sẽn tõe n le rɩk n me roogo bɩ sẽn tõe n le paas a pãnga. Fo na n lebga we-raoog sẽn ka sakd gesgo, yaa Soaala n gomde." 
Jeremiah51:27 Zẽk-y tãp-kaoore tẽnga rãmba peeb-y bardo, bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ, Yik-y fãa gilli n teedg ne Babilon. Bool-y tɩ b yi Ararat la Minni tɩ b yi Askenaz n wa sõnge. Yiis-y neb sẽn na n sa n bao tãb-biisi, yiis-y wiidi sẽn na n kẽ zabre; yiis-y-b ka tɛk wa kalwaare." 
Jeremiah51:28 Kɩt-y tɩ tẽnsa fãa tigim, tigim-y Mɛd dãmba nanamse, b kombɛɛmba ne b sõangdba, n paas b soolma rãmb fãa." 
Jeremiah51:29 Tẽnga rigimdame la a yɛɛsdame, a sã n ne fãa tɩ Soaala pidsda b kãabgo, n kɩt tɩ Babilon tẽn-peelem lebg we-raoogo sẽn kẽesd rabeem." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babilon gãndaada mens ka rat n zab ye, b baooda zĩis n na n wũundi. B ka le tar raood ba bilfu, lebga rabɛɛmb wa pagba. Dẽ me la kʋɩlensa pakr ka le ya toogo, dẽ me la bugma na n zomb rotã" 
Jeremiah51:31 Kibɛ-kõatba reesda taaba b ninga tĩig n digd na-yiri, n na n tɩ wilg dĩma kibare; bɛɛba zoe n kẽe tẽnga zãnga." 
Jeremiah51:32 Soya fãa gɩdgame, tãnsoben-dota fãa yõoga bugum, dabeem kãsenga kẽe zab-zabd fãa." 
Jeremiah51:33 Dũni fãa Soaala koɛɛga, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama koɛɛg la woto: «Babilon gãee ne zu-beedo. B kõog-a-la wa b sẽn kõogd zɛɛga n na n pãb alkam. Yaa tigsga wakat n zoe n ta.»" 
Jeremiah51:34 Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor yũ-la m zɩɩma zãnga, a basa maam wala la-vɩʋʋgo, a vela maam wala rũng sẽn tar pãnga, a pidsa a pʋga ne m paoongo n yaool n wa bas-m kɛɛnga." 
Jeremiah51:35 Bɩ Babilon deeg a sɩbgre, a sẽn maan-m pãn-tõoga sɩbgre, yaa Siõ tẽnga rãmb n gomde. Bɩ Babilon yao t'a raaga m zɩɩm! Zerizalɛɛm n leokd rẽnna." 
Jeremiah51:36 Dẽ n so tɩ Soaala gomd woto ne Zerizalɛɛm Ade mam dɩkda fo yellã n dogl m zugu, la mam n na n ges n tug beem ne f bɛ wã. Mam na n kʋɩɩsa a kʋɩlgã, la m yẽd a ko-nini." 
Jeremiah51:37 M na kɩtame tɩ Babilon lebg raboogo a na n lebga we-yũus na-tẽnga, tẽnga na n lebga vɩʋʋgo, na n lebga yɛɛsgo la yel-beed tẽnga." 
Jeremiah51:38 Marsã wã Babilon dãmba wẽnda bõnyẽese sẽn yãbde, b kelemda wa bõn-nindi." 
Jeremiah51:39 M basdame tɩ b velma wa yiki tɩ m dɩlg-b sõmbo, m na yũnug-b-la rã-toose tɩ b lʋɩ n ka le yik ye. Dẽ yaa maam m leoke, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah51:40 M na n kɩtame tɩ b tall-ba n kẽng dũms kʋʋb zĩigẽ wala pe-bi, pe-raado, la boeese." 
Jeremiah51:41 Yɩɩ wãn wãna t'a Sesak lʋɩ a bɛɛb nugẽ? Tẽnga yʋʋr yaool n da yi zĩig zãnga. Maana a wãn tɩ b wa tõog-a? Babilon lebga zĩ-peen-daaga; zĩ-peen-daag sẽn yɩkd pɛlenga nin-zẽmba tẽn-peelmẽ. 
Jeremiah51:42 Mogra koom wukame n kẽ Babilon, Ko-wiisa waa ne bʋ-raase n wa lim-a zãnga." 
Jeremiah51:43 A tẽns tekame n lebg bũmb sẽn pa sakd gesg ye, n lebg zĩ-koɛɛnga, n lebg weoogo tɩ ned ka be a pʋgẽ ye, ned ka le saagd n pɩʋʋgd be ye." 
Jeremiah51:44 Soaala wilgda woto: Maam n yik ne a Bel, Babilon wẽn-naandã. A sẽn dat n vel bũmb ningã, m na kɩt t'a lɛɛg n wʋk-a. Bu-zẽmba kõn le sũ taaba n waa a nengẽ ye. Babilon lal-gũbrã lʋɩɩme." 
Jeremiah51:45 Yãmba, m neba, yi-y tẽnga pʋgẽ! Ned kam fãa bao a meng fãagre, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sũura yika wʋsgo." 
Jeremiah51:46 Da bas-y raood ye, da maan-y rabeem ne y sẽn wʋmda ye. Rõanna b gomda boto n yik vẽer n gom woto. B gomda pãn-tõog yelle, n gomd tɩ na-wẽng n dig a to, n deeg a zĩiga." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ade wakat n wate tɩ m na n yik ne Babilon wẽn-naandsã. Na n yɩɩ yɛɛsg kãseng tẽnga. Sẽn na n lʋɩ-b tẽnga pʋga na n paame n ka yãend yaoog ye. 
Jeremiah51:48 Wakat kãng la b na n wʋm kaasgo, kaasg sẽn na n wulumd yĩngr la tẽnga la yaa nug goabg rãmbã n wat n na n wã Babilon. Dẽ yaa Soaala n togse." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilon yiisa neb ka tɛk yõore dũni wã pʋgẽ. Yẽ me wakata taame marsã t'a na n deeg sɩbgre, a sẽn kʋ Israyɛl kamba yĩnga." 
Jeremiah51:50 Yãmb sẽn põs sʋʋga, kul-y yã! Da yaas-y ye! Y sẽn ta zĩig ning fãa, tẽeg-y Soaala-Wẽnd yelle, la da yĩm-y Zerizalɛɛm yell ye." 
Jeremiah51:51 Yãnd da tara tõndo, tõnd sẽn da waa n wʋmd tʋya; yãnd da na n kʋʋ tõndo, sãamba sẽn waa n kẽ Soaala do-sõngã." 
Jeremiah51:52 Yaa rẽnd yĩnga, Soaala n gomde wakat n wate tɩ m na n yik ne Babilon wẽn-naandsã. Tẽnga pʋg, zĩis fãa, b na wʋm sẽn paam-b sãmpoaga waasgo." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babilon rat bɩ a rʋ yĩngri, a nong bɩ a tɩ yãk zĩig sẽn ka tõe n ta mam na n kõo noore tɩ tẽn-wãadba ta be. Soaala n gome." 
Jeremiah51:54 Kelg yã, bʋrg n yit Babilon; yaa yel-beed kaasgo n yit Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:55 Ad-y yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n wa n na n sãam Babilon. Bʋ-raasa na n wẽneg n sɛɛme. Bala bɛ wã tara kɛlenga a maanda bʋʋre wa mogre, a tãsda wa saaga." 
Jeremiah51:56 Sẽn wãada tẽnsã kolgda Babilon a na n zaba ne-a, a gãndaadã la a na n sui roogo a na n tõra b tãbdã, Soaala yaa Wẽnde sẽn dok b sũuri n lebsd ned kam fãa a tʋʋm wẽna. Bãmb meng n gomde." 
Jeremiah51:57 M na n yũnuga rãam: a kug-zĩidbã, a mitbã, a kombɛɛmbã, a tãnsoaben-dãmbã, a gãndaadã. B na n kẽe gõeem la b kõn nek ye. Yaa dĩm kãsenga n gomde, bãmb la dũni fãa Wẽnde." 
Jeremiah51:58 Bãmb meng n le paasd woto: Babilon lal-gũbra ne a sẽn yalma wãame n leb n wã; a kʋɩlen-wogda rɩɩ bugum. Ad-y neba mi n namsda b meng zaalem! Naonga yaa nams tɩ bugum wa loog ne bala! 
Jeremiah51:59 Ad noor ninga bãngd a Zeremi sẽn kõ a Seraya, a Neriya biiga, a Maseya yagenga, a sẽn wa n kẽng Babilon ne Zɩɩda dĩm a Sedesiyas. Wakat kãng tɩ dĩma sẽn dʋ a naam zaoor nan yaa kiis a naase. Wakat kãng me t'a Seraya da yaa yemsa sika naaba." 
Jeremiah51:60 A Zeremi da gʋlsa sebr zugu, yell niyns fãa sẽn da na n pak Babilon. Sebr kãng la sẽn karem ka wã." 
Jeremiah51:61 A Zeremi yeela a Seraya: «Fo sã n wa ta Babilon, f na n zẽka f koɛɛga la f maag f meng n karem gom kãensã fãa neere." 
Jeremiah51:62 La fo na n paasame: ‹Soaala, yãmb meng n yeele, tɩ tẽn-kãnga na n wãame la ninsaal kõn pa a pʋgẽ ye, rũng me kõn pa a pʋgẽ ye, t'a na n lebga sũ-sãang zĩ-peen-daaga, tɩ zamaana tong taaba.›" 
Jeremiah51:63 Fo sã wa karem sebrã n sɛ, fo na n baoo kugri n loe sebrã n dɩk a n lob Efrat kʋɩlgẽ." 
Jeremiah51:64 F sã n wa lobd sebrã f na n yeela woto: ‹Wala sebra sẽn menem koomẽ wã, woto me la Babilon na n menem. A kõn tõog n põs yel-beed ning Soaala sẽn segl a yĩnga ye.› » A Zeremi baasa a goama woto: «Ad-y bu-zẽmba sẽn kẽesd b meng zĩig ningã, ad-y ka zĩig a to n zʋʋg pɛta la pɛt bala.»" 
Jeremiah52:1 A Sedesiyas sẽn wa n dɩt Zɩɩda naam, t'a da tara yʋʋm pisi la a yembre. A rɩɩ naam yʋʋm piig la a yembre Zerizalɛɛm. A ma yʋʋr da boondame t'a Amutal, a Irmeya biiga, Libna tẽng neda." 
Jeremiah52:2 A naama ka yɩ sõmbo Soaala taoor ye, yɩɩ yood-yood wala a Zoakim naama." 
Jeremiah52:3 Yɛl niyns fãa sẽn maan Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ puuga Soaala sũuri tɩ b kong n zãag wʋsgo ne b buudã. A Sedesiyas zẽka a zug Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor taoore. 
Jeremiah52:4 T'a na n wa Zerizalɛɛm ne a tãb-biisa fãa. Tãb-biisa wẽ-la b sik Zerizalɛɛm noorẽ la b tuu bogdo n gũbg-a. Yɩ-la a Sedesiyas naama yʋʋmd a wɛ soaba, kiuug piig soaba, dasem piiga raare." 
Jeremiah52:5 Bɛɛba kell n gũbga tẽngã n ta a Sedesiyas naama piig la a ye yʋʋmde. 
Jeremiah52:6 Koma ra zabda wʋsgo, tẽnga pʋga. Rɩɩb ra ka le be n dɩlgd neba ye. Kiuug a naas soaba, la kiuugã dasem a wɛ raare, koma yik n wɩnga ne tẽnga; neb da ka leb n tar dɩɩb n dɩtẽ ye." 
Jeremiah52:7 B pooga lal-kãseng ninga sẽn gũbg tẽngã. Yʋng sẽn ta, Zɩɩda zab-zabdba zoeeme. Babilon dãmba sẽn da gũbg tẽngã, yii Zerizalɛɛm. B tũu kʋɩleng a ye sẽn da be lal-bɛd a yiiba sʋka, n pẽ dĩma zẽedã. B rɩka sor ning sẽn digd Zʋrdẽ bãg-faagã." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kalde rãmb zab-zabdba yik n pʋga a Sedesiyas la b paam-a-la Zeriko, la beene a tãb-biisa fãa sẽegame n bas-a." 
Jeremiah52:9 B yõka dĩm a Sedesiyas n tall-a n kẽng Ribla, Amat tẽnga, dĩm a Nabikodonozor nengẽ, t'a kɩt tɩ b kẽes-a bʋʋdo n paalg-a." 
Jeremiah52:10 A kooda a Sedesiyas kamba a nifẽ; a kooda Zɩɩda taoor dãmba fãa. 
Jeremiah52:11 Dẽ poore, Babilon dĩma leo dĩm a Sedesiyas nini, la a kɩtame tɩ b sẽb-a ne bãeense, n tɩ sui roogo. A Sedesiyas paa be n tãag a kũum." 
Jeremiah52:12 Yɩ-la a Nabikodonozor naama yʋʋmd piig la a wɛ soaba, kiuug a nu soaba piig raare, la a Nebuzaradã kẽ Zerizalɛɛm. A Nebuzaradã da yaa gũudba naaba. Babilon dĩma taoore a ra tõe n yãenda koɛɛg n leoke." 
Jeremiah52:13 A yõoga Soaala roogã, n yõog na-yiri la a ning Zerizalɛɛm dot fãa bugum, la rakãagba rot n yɩɩda." 
Jeremiah52:14 Kalde rãmb tãb-biis sẽn da be ne tãnsoaba, pãba lalsa sẽn da gũbg Zerizalɛɛm n wã." 
Jeremiah52:15 Tãnsoaba a Nebuzaradã tall n kẽnga yembdo neb niyns sẽn da pa-b tẽnga pʋgẽ; yaa naong rãmb kẽere, yaa sẽn zoe-ba n tɩ kẽ Babilon dĩma, yaa tʋʋm-mitba sẽn da keesã." 
Jeremiah52:16 Dẽ poore a Nebuzaradã sʋka tẽnga naong rãmb kẽere, n kell n bas-ba tɩ b na n kood pʋt la bugsuntundu." 
Jeremiah52:17 Kalde rãmba wãa wẽnd dooga lal-gils bɛda a yiibã sẽn yõg ne zũudã la sẽn da yɛs wẽnd dooga noorã. B talla bilim-bilma la zũud ko-sĩngã sẽn da rɩg sɩmandẽ wã, b talla zũudã fãa n kẽng Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 B wʋka sẽn da rõog ne zũud fãa n ya laok sẽn tar tʋʋmde, maanda kʋʋb wakato: laase, b sẽn da tar n ningd tompɛglem, kardo, sʋʋse, zɩ-mesdem laase la rãama laase." 
Jeremiah52:19 Gũudba naab leb n wʋka laase, wisd laase, zɩ-mesdem laase, tompɛglem laase, fitilse, yõg-la-yalemse, bũmb niyns fãa sẽn da maan ne sãnem bɩ ne wanzurfu, a wʋka fãa." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ad-y b ka tõog n geelg n bãng teeda fãa zɩslem ye, teed niyns dĩm a Salomo sẽn kɩt tɩ b rõog ne zũudu Soaala rooga yĩng ye. Ges-y lal-gils bɛda a yiibã, ko-sĩng kãsenga ne a lols piig la a yiibã, n paas bilim-bilma." 
Jeremiah52:21 Bãng-y tɩ lal-gilg-bedr a ye fãa woglem yaa kãntɩɩs piig la a nii, t'a mobg n sega ya kãntɩɩs piiga la a yiibu. Lal-gilsa pʋg ra yaa vɩʋʋgo la zũuda taglem ra baas n taa tẽnsʋk nug-bila woglem." 
Jeremiah52:22 B ra paasa lal-gilg fãa zug yalem la woglem ne zũudu. A zãndlem taa kãntɩɩs a nu la b mobg-a-la ne zũud gãmbre la tɩ-biis sẽn wẽnd pooloomse la sẽn dõog ne zũudu; lal-gils a yiiba fãa ra zema taaba. Faonga teed sẽn paasa me yaa bũmb a yembre. 
Jeremiah52:23 B yagla tɩ-biis sẽn wẽnd pooloomse, bãmb pis-wɛ la a yoobe tɩ b luun kɩremsã. Sã n naag ne sʋk rãmbã, yaa bãmb koabga." 
Jeremiah52:24 Gũudba naab yõka a Seraya, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, n sui roogo, n paas a Sefaniya, maan-kʋʋd kãsem-pʋgdga, la digno-gũudba a tãabo." 
Jeremiah52:25 A kɩtame tɩ b yãk neda t'a get tãb-biisa yelle, n paas neb a yopoe sẽn da be rĩma zakẽ, la tãnsoab kãsenga sɛb gʋlsda; yẽ n da get tãb-biisa yãkre, n le paas a Zɩɩda neb pisoobe. Nin-bãmba fãa da bee Zerizalɛɛm." 
Jeremiah52:26 A Nebuzaradã, tall-b lame n kẽng Ribla, Babilon dĩma nengẽ." 
Jeremiah52:27 La Babilon dĩma kɩtame tɩ b kʋ-b fãa Ribla, Amat tẽn-peelmẽ. Yɩɩ boto t'a Zɩɩda wa zãag ne a tẽnga." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ad a Nabikodonozor sẽn tall b rãmb n kẽng yembda sõore: Yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba: Zɩɩda rãmba neb tus a tã la pisi la tãabo. 
Jeremiah52:29 A Nabikodonozor naam yʋʋmd piig la a nii soaba, neb kobs-nii la pis-tã la a yi, n yi Zerizalɛɛm." 
Jeremiah52:30 A naam yʋʋmd pisi la tãab soaba, a Nebuzaradã, gũudba tãnsoab talla Zɩɩda rãmb kobs-yopoe la pis-naas la a nu n kẽng yembdo. Fãa-fãa sẽn naag taaba, yaa neb tus a naas la kobs-yoobe." 
Jeremiah52:31 A Zoakim, Zɩɩda dĩma, kẽng yembdo tɩ yʋʋm pis-tã la yopoe, a Evil-Merodak, lebga Babilon dĩma. La ade kiuug piig la a yiib soaba, la kiuugã dasem pisi la nu raare, a Evil-Merodak sʋka a Zoakim n yiis-a roogo." 
Jeremiah52:32 B yẽsgo yɩɩ noogo ne taaba, a goma ne-a neer-neere, la a kõ-a-la naam sẽn yɩɩd nanams niynsi sẽn da be-b ne-yẽ Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:33 A Zoakim yeesa a yembd futu, la badaar tɛka, a da naagda ne dĩma n dɩtẽ." 
Jeremiah52:34 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, dĩma ra geta a yelle tɩ bũmb da wa paoog-a ye, n ta a kũum." 
Lamentations1:1 Kato! A zĩ-la a ye tẽng-ninga sẽn da pid ne nedgo. Tẽng-ninga yʋʋr sẽn da kut moogo. A lebga wa pʋg-kõore. Zaamẽ na-paga da rɩta a naam, tɩ tẽns ka tɛk kũud a taoore. Rũnna, yẽ ne yem-poak zem taaba!" 
Lamentations1:2 Yʋnga tatame tɩ ya yãbr bala. Yɛga mada ne nintãm. Ned pa le nong-a n na n wa bels-a ye. A zo-rãmba fãa zoe n bas-a lame. Bãmb n pʋs n lebg a bɛɛba. 
Lamentations1:3 A Zɩɩda roog looga yembdo, a looga yembd ne yãnde. Bu-zẽmba sʋk la a na n vɩɩnde, la ka zĩ-yɛng la a na n paam n zĩnd ye. A tata zĩig ning n tẽed t'a põsame, mik be la b na n le bʋʋg-a, mik be la b na n le pʋg n yaal-a." 
Lamentations1:4 Sor ning fãa sẽn digd Siõ pida ne kʋ-yãbdba. Tig-raas sɛɛ zãnga; Siõ kʋɩlens rʋʋgame, maan-kʋʋdba kũmdame, pʋg-sɛdba zĩi ne sũ-sãanga. Ad-y sɩd lebga toog ne bãmba." 
Lamentations1:5 Marsã a bɛɛba zug n zẽkde, sẽn da kis-b yẽ wã vɩɩ ne laafi. Yaa Soaala n wa ne sɩbgre, a yɛl kɛga sẽn ka tɛk yĩnga. Bɛɛba tusda a kom-bɩɩba la yaa yembd la b rabd ne-ba." 
Lamentations1:6 A Siõ zĩime tɩ b tar n lood pa-weere bũmb ning fãa sẽn da yaa a zu-zẽkre. A kug-zĩidba wẽnda yãgse: bãmb n ka yamdo n wãbdẽ, bãmb n ka na n põs tãoosa." 
Lamentations1:7 Zerizalɛɛm bee nimbãaneg pʋgẽ dũnna n tẽegd a pĩnd arzɛka. A lʋɩ-la a bɛɛba nugẽ tɩ ned ka le be n na n sõng-a ye. A sẽn lebg zaalma, rẽ pidsa a bɛɛba ne sũ-noogo." 
Lamentations1:8 Zerizalɛɛm beega beegr kãsenga, dẽ yĩng la a lebg bõn-dẽgdo. Sẽn da waoogd-b yẽnda wã fãa yam laka ne yẽnda. A sẽn paam yãnde, marsã lebga a bao a zĩiga, lebga a wẽnemd a neng kɛɛnga n yãb a yãb toogo." 
Lamentations1:9 A fuuga kõda ne a rẽgdã; a ra ka ning a yamẽ t'a baasga ra tõe n yɩɩ woto ye. La ade, a zarbame tɩ looge. Ned sẽn na n bels-a le ka ye. Dẽ la a gomd ne Soaala n yetẽ: «Ges-y m nimbãanega Soaala, tɩ m bɛɛba tõog-m lame!»" 
Lamentations1:10 Bɛɛba wʋka a arzɛka fãa. Bũmb sẽn pa yɩ-a noogo: a yãenda bu-zẽmb ro-sõnga pʋga. Yãmb yaool n da gɩdga rẽ, Soaala." 
Lamentations1:11 Siõ kamb basa raoodo n wẽed siri, la bũmbu la b baood n na n kõ b noore. B rɩka b arzɛka fãa n kɩse; bur la b rat n dɩ n paam pãnga. Soaala la b kota tɩ b wa ges-ba tɩ ned toog ka le be ne-b ye." 
Lamentations1:12 Yãmb-fãa, so loaadba, yaa a Siõ n gomd woto, yãmb fãa zẽk-y y neng n gese tɩ y zɩ n yãend toogo sẽn zem tõnd rẽnna ye, Soaala sẽn tool tõnd a soaba, b sũ-puura raara ye." 
Lamentations1:13 Soaala zĩnda yĩngri n tool bugum la bugma yõog-m la sõmbo. B ninga bẽdgo m sor zugu, m lʋɩɩ nimbãaneg pʋgẽ; m lebga ned b sẽn bas kɛɛnga, la rẽ n lebg m bãaga, tɩ m bẽed beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Lamentations1:14 Soaala tigsa m yɛl kɛgã b sẽb-b-la wa raoogo d dɩk n palg m yubla, woto b sɛɛsa m pãnga fãa, n dɩk-m n bas ne m bɛɛba, la m ka le tõe n yals yĩngr ye." 
Lamentations1:15 Soaala sãbsame la b basa kɛɛnga gãndaad niyns sẽn da be-b m sɛɛgẽ. Tãb-biis la b tigim n na n wa zab ne maam, n na n wa kʋ m kom-bɩɩba gilli. La sɩda, b wẽk-m-la wa sibi, maam a Siõ, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ, b wẽk-m-la wa bugsuntung biisi." 
Lamentations1:16 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m kũmda tɩ m nintãm dʋʋgd wa koom. Sẽn tõe n belsa maam n le paas m vɩɩma pãngã, yẽ soab zãaga ne maam. M kamba ka na n le yɩ m kamb ye, tɩ bɛɛba pãng n yɩɩde." 
Lamentations1:17 Siõ tuda a nus n baood sõngre la sõngr ka zĩig ba a ye. Soaala kõo noor a Israyɛl yagsã, tɩ b rɩ beem ne-a. B sã n wʋm Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋr bala la b sũur sẽn yaande." 
Lamentations1:18 Soaala sẽn maand woto wã ad-y b bee bʋʋm tɩ maam n da yɩ tõata. Yãmb fãa sẽn yɛs ka, kelg-y neere! Ad-y m naonga yaa wʋsgo, tɩ m kom-pugli la m kom-dibli looga yembdo." 
Lamentations1:19 Mam boola m zo-rãmba la bãmb fãa bas-m-la kɛɛnga. M maan-kʋʋdba la m sagendba baoo rɩɩb n konge la b sẽn kong pãnga b kii tẽnga pʋga. 
Lamentations1:20 Soaala-Wẽnde, ad-y m pɛta la woto. Sẽn yõogd m sũura la woto. M baooda sẽn sɩng ne bũmb ninga tɩ m wa yik n tõdg yãmb woto. Woto, sor zugu, zabr sʋʋg looga ne m kamba. Zaka pʋg me ka são ye, yaa kũum ne kũum." 
Lamentations1:21 Ges-y m sẽn zĩi n wẽed siri; la ned ka be n na n keng m sũur ye. B sẽn wʋm m yel-pakrã, m bɛɛba fãa noogda b sũuri la b yetame tɩ wã n tog ne-ma. Kɩt-y tɩ daar ning y sẽn yalsã wa tao, tɩ bãmb me lebg wa maam sẽn yaa a soab rũnna!" 
Lamentations1:22 Bas-y tɩ b tʋʋm beeda fãa puk y taoore. Sɩbg-y-ba wala y sẽn sɩbg m tʋʋm kɛgã. Sɩda m nintãm tara kiigri tɩ m sũura bẽedẽ. 
Lamentations2:1 Kato! Soaala yika ne sũ-puuri n na n sãam a Siõ neerem, n na n sãam a Israyɛl ziiri n sãam tẽnga ne wẽnd doogã. Soaala yika ne sũ-puuri n yĩm b ziira sẽn da pukd zĩig ningã." 
Lamentations2:2 Soaala muma b nini n loog vugr bala ne b buuda sẽn da tar fãa. B sũura yikame tɩ Zɩɩda tãnsoben-dot na n wã. Naama ne a na-rɩtbã b luba rẽ fãa tẽng n tabe. 
Lamentations2:3 B sũ-puura pʋgẽ b menesa a Israyɛl ziira fãa. Bɛɛba taoore b ka wilg b nug pãng ye. Bug kãseng la b tugl a Zakoob pʋgẽ, la bugma ka rɩ n kees bũmb ye." 
Lamentations2:4 B rʋʋsa b tãp wala bɛ sẽn maande la tãpa yãagame n gũudẽ. B tʋma tõnd bɛ tʋʋmde, n kʋ, n sãam tõnd sẽn da get n pẽgdã. B sũura fudgame n waag-do, n yõog ro-sõngã la Zerizalɛɛm." 
Lamentations2:5 Soaala lebga wala a Israyɛl bɛyã sẽn vel a Israyɛl vugr bala, n menes tẽnga ne a ro-neebã; b wã-la a tãnsoben-dotã, n pids tẽnga rãmb gilli ne sũ-sãang la yɩɩre." 
Lamentations2:6 B pãrga a Israyɛl zẽeda yãgre, b pãba b tigsga zĩig n sarem. Soaala kɩtame tɩ b yĩm Siõ pʋgẽ, kibs la vʋʋsg daare. B sũ-kãbra pʋgẽ neb n paam yãnde: yaa dĩma menga la maan-kʋʋdba." 
Lamentations2:7 Maan-kugra lebga bõn-yũugu Soaala yĩnga. Wẽnd dooga lebga b sɩ-lakre. B basa na-yirã ne a lal-gũbrã bɛɛba nusẽ. Kɛleng n yit Soaala roogẽ la a sãta wala tigr daare. 
Lamentations2:8 Soaala ra ninga b yamẽ tɩ b na n wãa Zerizalɛɛm lal-gũbrã. B tẽega wĩiri n na n pãb n sarme, Bũmb ka yõbg b nuga ye. Lal-faoogã la lalga menga, bũmb ka pãb n keese, fãa naaga taab n ta tẽnga." 
Lamentations2:9 Tẽnga noor kʋɩlensa lʋɩɩme, kʋɩlensa pagdsa sʋʋga wa tẽngempiisim. Dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba, fãa lʋɩɩ bu-zẽmba nusẽ. Ned ka be n togsd Wẽnd sẽn dat ye; bãngdba mens ka le paamde tɩ Soaala gomd ne b ye." 
Lamentations2:10 Siõ bi-pugla sagendba zĩi tẽnga, b fãa zĩi sɩɩ wa mugsi. Tompɛglem la b yug b zutu; yaa kʋʋr fut la b yeelg n zĩẽ; Zerizalɛɛm kom-pugli nens sura tẽnga." 
Lamentations2:11 M nintãma raaga m nini, m zĩime tɩ m sũur kãbdẽ, fãagr saagr yi-la m yamẽ tɩ m nee yel-beed ninga sẽn lʋɩ m buuda zugu. Tẽnga pʋga, ko-yũud kʋʋda kom-peelse." 
Lamentations2:12 Kamba sokda b ma rãmba: Yɛ la d na n yãend rɩɩb n dɩ? Bãmb n kongd pãnga n kiid b ma rãmb nusẽ. 
Lamentations2:13 Zerizalɛɛm bi-pugla, m ka mi m sẽn na n yeel ye. Fo yella sɩd lebga toor zãnga. M ka ne m sẽn na n mak-f ne buud ning ye; fo zãr ne ned na tõog n bels-fo. Kato, siõ, f sẽn lʋɩ bok ning pʋgã ad-a yalma wa mogre. Tɩlgr ka ye!" 
Lamentations2:14 F bãngdba sẽn taas foom koees niynsã yɩɩ zirẽ la yɛl faado. B pa wilg foom f kongr ye; dẽ n dag n na n sãoogẽ f yĩnga. B sẽn taas foo koees niynsa yaa zirẽ la belgre. 
Lamentations2:15 F lʋɩɩsa nooma so-loaadbã, dẽ la b kẽnd la b fɩɩnẽ, dẽ la b yĩgsda la sokdẽ: «Yaa foo la b sẽn boonde t'a neerem ka be to wã bɩ? Yaa foo la b boond yɛsa tɩ dũni wã fãa sũ-nooga bɩ?»" 
Lamentations2:16 Fo bɛɛba fãa baooda f noore; b yĩiga b yẽna n tees-fo. B fɩɩndame la b yetẽ: «D vel-a lame n ka yãee n takem ye. Daar ning d sẽn da gũuda yaa n taame, a beooga yaa n vẽegame.»" 
Lamentations2:17 Soaala pidsa b sẽn da kaoole, b pidsa b sẽn da yeele, b sẽn tʋlg al pĩnd-pĩnda taasame. B wã-f la zãng n pa kell ye. F sɩbgra nooga f bɛɛba sũuri, f bɛɛba wilg-m-menga tũu rẽ n paam pãnga." 
Lamentations2:18 Siõ bi-pugla, tees Soaala n kelme tees n kelem ne f pãng fãa. Bas f nintãma t'a kiigi, a kiig wĩndg la yʋngo. Da vʋʋs ne yãbr ye, da kʋɩɩs f nintãma ye." 
Lamentations2:19 Mi n yik n kelem wakat wakato, n yik n pids yʋnga ne f kaasgo. Zuk sẽn be f sũurẽ wã zãnga, Wẽnnaam f Soaala taoore. Zẽk f nus n yõk b sɛɛga tɩ f kom-bõonega paam n põse tɩ f ne b sẽn loogde, f nee b sẽn ki n dɩg soy wã zutu." 
Lamentations2:20 Soaala, ges-y yã, ges-y neere; bãng-y sẽn ya ned ninga la y maan woto. Ges-y yel-beedo: pag sẽn tõe n lɛɛg n wãb a meng biiga, biig a sẽn doge la a sẽn da nonge! Ges-y b sẽn koot maan-kʋʋd la bãngda yãmb meng ro-sõnga pʋga." 
Lamentations2:21 Kom-bõonego la nin-kẽemba lagem n dɩga vɩla soy wã zutu. Y sũ-kãbra raare, kom-pugli la kom-dibli kii kũ-miuugu. Y sɩd sãamame la y ka sãam zem-zem ye." 
Lamentations2:22 Yãmb maana wa kibs n be, y boola m bɛɛba, m yagsa fãa. Y bool-b-la y sũ-puura raare, la mam ned ba a ye ka põs ye. Kamb niyns m sẽn da wub ne nonglem, bɛ wã kʋ-b-la fãa gilli." 
Lamentations3:1 Far wʋm-m lame tɩ Soaala pãb-m-la sũ-to-pãbre. 
Lamentations3:2 B lʋɩɩsa maam b taoore n modg-m tɩ m kẽne, la ka yɩ vẽenemẽ, yɩɩ likẽ." 
Lamentations3:3 Maam la b yõkd pãbre beoog sẽn vẽege. 
Lamentations3:4 M yĩnga fãa bugame, m kõaba fãa pãb n kaoome." 
Lamentations3:5 Sũ-toog la pɛta n gũbg maam wa lalga. 
Lamentations3:6 Lik kãseng pʋgẽ la b gãneg maam, wala b sẽn minim n gãnegd kũum." 
Lamentations3:7 B meeme n gũbg-ma sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ m yiib lebg toogo. Bãn-zɩsgo la b rɩk n balg-ma. 
Lamentations3:8 M tara yãbr n kot sõngre, la b pa reegd m kosg ye." 
Lamentations3:9 B peesa kug n yẽd m soya zãnga. Sor a to la m kong n dɩke. 
Lamentations3:10 B yɩɩ wa rũn-toaaga, mam yĩnga, n yɩ wa bõnyẽeg sẽn lam tʋgre, n gũudẽ." 
Lamentations3:11 B kɩtame tɩ m vɩɩma lebg toogo, m yĩnga ka le tar gãbe, m koɛɛga me ka le yit ye." 
Lamentations3:12 Tãpa rʋʋsa m yĩnga, maam la pɛɛma tees n tãoodẽ." 
Lamentations3:13 Bɛ wã yiisa a loka pɛɛma, la m lʋga la b tão n sãage." 
Lamentations3:14 Neba fãa tara maam n laadẽ, beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa maam la b paoogda." 
Lamentations3:15 B yũnug-m la bõn-tɩɩsenga. B pidsa maam ne sũ-toogo. 
Lamentations3:16 B kɩtame tɩ m yẽna wer kuga, b tab-m-la tom-pʋlempʋkẽ." 
Lamentations3:17 M vɩɩma zãaga ne laafi, sũ-noog lebga m sãana." 
Lamentations3:18 Woto wã m yeelame tɩ m ka le tar beoog tẽeb ye, m ka le gũud bũmb Soaala nengẽ ye." 
Lamentations3:19 M sã n tẽegd m pɛta, n tẽegd m sẽn ka tar sõsd-n-taagã, yaa wa zẽnem toaag la m venda." 
Lamentations3:20 Rẽ la m tar tẽegr wakat fãa al tɩ m yam bondg m pʋgẽ. 
Lamentations3:21 M sẽn dat n tẽeg bũmb ninga la woto, bũmb ning tẽegr sẽn kõt m saagr la woto:" 
Lamentations3:22 yaa Soaala nimbãan-zoeer sẽn ka be tɛkã, yaa b nonglem ne tõndã sẽn ka be sɛɛbã." 
Lamentations3:23 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa pukda b nonglem, Soaala, ad-y y nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye!" 
Lamentations3:24 N-ye! M moondame tɩ Soaala la m arzɛka la rẽ yĩnga m teega bãmba! 
Lamentations3:25 Soaala sõm bee ne sẽn teegd-b bãmba, ne sẽn baood-b bãmb ne b sũur fãa." 
Lamentations3:26 Bas bʋʋre n gũ Soaala sõngre, tɩ rẽ n be neere." 
Lamentations3:27 Sak n bas f yamleoog pʋgbo tɩ f nan paooda, tɩ rẽ n tõe n wa ne f yõodo." 
Lamentations3:28 Bao zĩig n zĩnd sɩɩ, Soaala sã n wa n na n fɛɛs-fo." 
Lamentations3:29 Sulg f meng zãng Soaala taoore n saagd b leokre. 
Lamentations3:30 Tud f yɛgdga tɩ b wẽ-fo bas tɩ tʋʋda tʋʋ n yɛ. 
Lamentations3:31 Sɩda Soaala pa naag ne neb niynsi sẽn daagd ninsaal n bas zãng ye. 
Lamentations3:32 Ba b sã n sɩbgdẽ, b ket n zoeta nimbãanega, tɩ b nonglma labsame." 
Lamentations3:33 Soaala pa ningd ninsaal yãnde b pa namsd ninsaal ne sɩbgre tɩ b sũur noomẽ ye. 
Lamentations3:34 Y tẽedame tɩ Soaala pa ne bɩ? Yaa tẽnga neb zãng la y wool n pag roogo. 
Lamentations3:35 Yaa zabre la y baood ne Yĩngr Soaala, y sã n get ninsaal wa bõn-yaalga." 
Lamentations3:36 Y sã n maand kegre bʋʋd zĩigẽ, y tẽedame tɩ Soaala pa ne laa?" 
Lamentations3:37 Ãnda n gomd ne noor bala tɩ sẽn be zĩndi? Yaa Soaala! 
Lamentations3:38 Ka Yĩngr Soaba noor gomd bala n yiisd yel-beed bɩ sũ-noog laa? 
Lamentations3:39 Bõe poorẽ la ninsaal tõe n guglem ne Wẽnnaam? Bũmb zãnga a sã n ket n vɩ ne yõore t'a yel-wẽna yaool n ya ka tɛka? 
Lamentations3:40 Bɩ d maneg n gese d soya la d lɛɛg n dɩk sor sẽn digd Soaala nengẽ. 
Lamentations3:41 D zẽk d yam la d sũuri n tees Wẽnnaam n tees Yĩngr Soabã. 
Lamentations3:42 Tõnd yɩɩ beegdba la tõatba rẽ n so tɩ y ra pa bas d taale. 
Lamentations3:43 Yãmb kelga y sũ-puurã n digd tõnd la y kʋʋd tõnd tɩ sugr kaẽ ye. 
Lamentations3:44 Yãmb baoo sawadg n lilli tɩ tõnd pʋʋsg ra tõog n ta-y ye. 
Lamentations3:45 Dũni ninsaalba sʋka tõnd lebga sagdo tõnd n lebg tãmpʋʋre. 
Lamentations3:46 Tõnd bɛɛba fãa pãsga b noya n kiigd tõnd beedo. 
Lamentations3:47 Ad tõnd pʋɩɩr sẽn lebg a soaba: pɛlen-yɩka, rigbu, zɛɛbo la wãabo." 
Lamentations3:48 M nina tara nintãm kiigri yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ m buuda zug yĩnga. 
Lamentations3:49 M nintãm tara rʋʋgre n ka yõkdẽ ye; pemsem ka le be m yĩng ye. 
Lamentations3:50 M gũudame tɩ Soaala sulgi, b sulg n ges la b yãende," 
Lamentations3:51 n yãend yel-beed ninga sẽn lʋɩt kom-pugli wã zutu. A gesgo yaa bõn-toog ne maam. 
Lamentations3:52 Sẽn kis-b maam zaalma rigd-m lame n dat n yõk-m wa luiila. 
Lamentations3:53 B pag-m-la vɩɩga bog-zulungẽ, n tol n bao kugri n maan linga." 
Lamentations3:54 Kooma lima maam bõra, tɩ m yet tɩ m ki yã." 
Lamentations3:55 M zĩnda bog-zulunga pʋga n bool yãmba. 
Lamentations3:56 Y wʋma m sẽn yeel yãmbã: «Yoog y tʋba n kelg m siri la m boaala.» 
Lamentations3:57 M kelmame n bool yã la y kolgame n yeel-ma: «Da zoe rabeem ye.» 
Lamentations3:58 Soaala yãmb bʋʋme n sõng-ma, yãmb fãaga m yõore." 
Lamentations3:59 Soaala yãenda neba sẽn maan m kegre, la b bʋ n sõng-m lame." 
Lamentations3:60 Y yãenda b sẽn dok b sũur ne maam y yãenda b sẽn sed bũmb ning n na n sãam-ma. 
Lamentations3:61 Soaala, y wʋma b tʋy wã la b sẽn da rat m maan bũmb ning ne maam." 
Lamentations3:62 Y wʋma m zabd-n-taasa sẽn gomde, y nee sẽn be b yamẽ; b yikda ne maam beoog sẽn vẽege." 
Lamentations3:63 Ges-y b sẽn maanda fãa, maam la b yɩɩnd n laadẽ." 
Lamentations3:64 Soaala, maan-y ne bãmba wa b sẽn maan maama." 
Lamentations3:65 Kidb-y y sũuri, n kãab b wẽnga." 
Lamentations3:66 Pʋg-y-ba ne y sũ-puuri menes-y-ba saaga tẽngre. 
Lamentations4:1 Bõe tɩ sãnema sẽn yɩlg menga ka le yãgd wa pĩnda? Bõe tɩ b yiis kug neeba n lob soya zutu? 
Lamentations4:2 Maana a wãna tɩ Siõ kamba sẽn da zem sãnem menga, maana a wãn tɩ b get-b wa tãnd laase?" 
Lamentations4:3 We-yũusa meng nonga b kamba n kõt-b bĩisim tɩ b yẽsemdẽ. Mam bi-pugla bala n lebg pʋ-to-neda wala zĩ-pɛɛlẽ na-neoongo. 
Lamentations4:4 Ko-yũud kɩtame tɩ bi-pɛɛlg zelemd tabend a ragsendaka. Kom-bɩɩba kota buri la b ka kõt-b ba sẽn paood ye. 
Lamentations4:5 Sẽn da rɩt-b rɩ-nood pãsd n lʋɩta sor zugu. Sẽn da wub-b nanams zakẽ vɛɛsda tãmpʋʋr n baood rɩɩbo 
Lamentations4:6 Mam buuda bi-pugl beegr yɩɩ wẽnga n yɩɩd Sodom dẽnna. Tẽng kãng wãa nif kamsg pʋgẽ, ka tũ ne naong ye." 
Lamentations4:7 Pĩnda na-komsa da yaa yɩlma, laong peelem ka ta b rẽnd ye, b yĩn-gãonga ra peela wa bĩisim, b yĩnga ra moosa wa rulg-lɛlma, b zɩ-wĩisa ra rʋra yɩng, kẽeg-kẽega." 
Lamentations4:8 La ad-b sẽn sob marsã wa bug-vũundu; ned seg-b sor zug marsã a kõn le bãng-b ye. B yĩnga gãong tabla b kõaba; b kʋɩɩ n weglma wa ra-peoko. 
Lamentations4:9 Sẽn ki-b kũ-miuuga são sẽn ki-b koma! B são sẽn ki-b rɩɩb kaalem yĩnga! 
Lamentations4:10 Ma rãmba ne b nonglma baas n dʋgda b kamb b toore. B kamb n lebg b rɩɩbo, m buuda bi-pugl namsga wakato." 
Lamentations4:11 Soaala basa b sũur t'a fudgi, b bas-a lame t'a fudg n daag zãnga. B ninga Siõ bugum la a ka na n dɩ n kees bũmb ye." 
Lamentations4:12 Dũni wã dĩm dãmb da pa tẽeda, talg ba a ye me ra pa tẽeda tɩ bɛ bɩ zab-zabd na tõog n tũ Zerizalɛɛm kʋɩlensã n kẽ a pʋgẽ ye." 
Lamentations4:13 La rẽ fãa yaa bãngdba yɛl kɛga yĩnga, yaa maan-kʋʋdba tʋʋm beeda yĩnga, tɩ tẽnga pʋgẽ b raaga pʋ-peelem dãmb zɩɩm." 
Lamentations4:14 B ra kẽnda tẽnga pʋgẽ wa zoeense, n kõd ne zɩɩm, tɩ b fut ra ka le tõe n sɩɩs ye." 
Lamentations4:15 Woto b sã n kolgdẽ, b ra tãsd-b lame: «Loog-y n bao zĩiga, bõn-dẽgdã, loog-y la y ra sɩɩs-d ye!» B zoetame n ka mi b sẽn na n kẽẽ ye la bu-zẽmba sã n yãend-ba, b yetame: «B ra saag n kaoos tõnd sʋk ye!»" 
Lamentations4:16 Yaa Soaala meng n sẽeg-ba n ka rat tɩ b nin le yãend-b ye, la yaa neba sẽn pa le sake tɩ bãngd bɩ maan-kʋʋd le paam waoogrã." 
Lamentations4:17 Tõnd yiiga d nin n da gũud sõngre, la kato! Sõngr ka wa ye. Tõnd da gũuda tẽng sẽn na n wa sõng-do, la tẽn-kãng rãmb ka wa ye." 
Lamentations4:18 Tõnd bɛɛba ra gũusda d yiibu, n gɩt d soy la d tigsg zĩisi. Tõnd zamaana loogame, d meneng wakat taame." 
Lamentations4:19 Sẽn digd-b tõnda tʋʋla, b tʋʋla wa yĩngr sɩlga. B riga tõnd tãms zutu, n gãneg b bẽdgo zĩ-pɛɛlẽ." 
Lamentations4:20 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a soab naam t'a lebg tõnd yõora gʋʋnda, tõnd sẽn da gomd a soab yell woto: «Yẽ maasem yĩnga d me yʋʋr na yi moogo, yẽ ne tõnd naaga taaba n kẽes bog-yɛng pʋga.»" 
Lamentations4:21 Noog f sũuri Edom tẽnga, noog f sũuri Us bi-pugla! La bãng tɩ wamda me na n ta-y lame, y me na n yũ n gãeemame n kẽn y zaala." 
Lamentations4:22 Siõ bi-pugla, fo tʋʋm-beeda paama b sɩbgr zãnga la b kõn le tall-fo n loog yembd ye. Fo bãong marsã, Edom, la Soaala na n luki, fo n na n kolg n deeg f sɩbgre." 
Lamentations5:1 Tẽeg-y yɛl niyns sẽn paam tõndã, Soaala, tags-y la y ges paoogr ning b sẽn paoog tõndã." 
Lamentations5:2 Tõnd buud pʋɩɩr lebga sãamb soolem, d dota lebga sãamb soolem." 
Lamentations5:3 Tõnd lebga kɩɩb-bi n ka tar ba ye. Tõnd ma rãmb lebga pʋg-kõapa. 
Lamentations5:4 D bulsa koom meng raada ne ligdi, raad lebga f sõd ligd n kɩse." 
Lamentations5:5 Zɩɩb la d bɛɛba palg d poore. D yɛɛ zãnga, la vʋʋsg kõn paam ye." 
Lamentations5:6 D tuta d nus Ezipt la Asiri n bõsd sẽn na n pids d pʋga. 
Lamentations5:7 Tõnd ba rãmba tʋma b tʋʋm kɛga n bas n looge, la tõnd n tʋk b wẽnema zɩɩbo." 
Lamentations5:8 Yemse n lebg tõnd soaalba la ned ka n fãagd tõnd b nusẽ ye. 
Lamentations5:9 Tõnd sã n baood dɩɩbo tõe n tũu ne d yõore, dẽnd d da zoe we-raooga sʋʋs ye." 
Lamentations5:10 Yaa waa b los-d-la wʋng pʋga, tɩ bugma fʋkd d yĩnga gãongo, yaa woto la koma zab ne tõndo." 
Lamentations5:11 B maanda pagb pãng Siõ, n yõgd kom-pugli Zɩɩda tẽnsẽ." 
Lamentations5:12 B luula kug-zĩidba, nin-kẽems pa yãend waoogr ye." 
Lamentations5:13 Ad-b sẽn dɩk neguus n tʋk kom-bɩɩba, tɩ kom-dibli tʋk raad n yõrdẽ." 
Lamentations5:14 Zĩig ning b sẽn da sõsd n manegd tẽnga yelle, nin-kẽemsa ka le tigimd taab be ye. Kom-bɩɩba yĩma b kʋnd zĩiga." 
Lamentations5:15 Sũ-noog sɛɛ zãng d sũurẽ. Kʋʋr yɩɩla n deeg d saooga zĩiga. 
Lamentations5:16 Tõnd naama pugl fõkame n lʋɩ tẽnga, tõnd zãmba d Soaala tɩ pak-do." 
Lamentations5:17 D sã n zi ne sũ-toogo, la d nina sã n moog ne yãbre," 
Lamentations5:18 yaa Siõ tãnga sẽn lebg vɩʋʋgo, n lebg we-baas gõob zĩiga." 
Lamentations5:19 Sã n ya ne yãmba, Soaala, y naama goeel vigla yʋʋm sẽn ka sɛɛb yĩnga." 
Lamentations5:20 Boe tɩ y na n yĩm d yell zãnga? Y na n bas-d-la zãng bɩ? 
Lamentations5:21 Wẽnemd-y tõnd sũurã n tees yãmba, Soaala, tɩ d sɩd lɛɛg n wa kẽ yãmba. Wa-y n kõo tõnd pĩnd zamaan noogã!" 
Lamentations5:22 Y na n sɩd bas-d-la zãng bɩ? Y sũura na n sɩd puuga ne tõnd woto fãa bɩ? 
Ezekiel1:1 M yʋʋma sẽn waa n na n pidẽ pis-tã, yʋʋmda kiuug a naas soaba la kiuuga rasem a nu raare, maam, a Ezekiyɛl, maan-kʋʋd a Buzi biiga, m da bee Kebar kʋɩlga noor ne pa-wetã. La ad-y sa-gãonga pilgame tɩ m paam Soaala likri." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kiuuga rasem a nu wã n da tõkd dĩm a Zoakim pa-weera yʋʋm a nu. 
Ezekiel1:3 Wakat kãng la Soaala-Wẽnd nuga tik maam. 
Ezekiel1:4 M zẽka m neng n gese: da yaa saag sobgo n zẽkd nug goabga ne sawad-kẽemde. Sawadga wulumda ne sa-yãgre. Vẽenem n da gilg sawadgã. Bugum n da yãng a tẽnsʋkã n pɩnd wa zũud sẽn yẽnegde. 
Ezekiel1:5 Mam yaool n yãee bũmb tẽnsʋka, bõn-vɩɩs a naase sẽn wẽnd ninsaalba." 
Ezekiel1:6 B fãa da tara nens a naase, la pɩgs a naase." 
Ezekiel1:7 B karsa ra yaa tɩrse, tɩ b nao wẽnd naaf na-bendo, n pɩnd wala zũud b sẽn duugi;" 
Ezekiel1:8 Kanga n da yit b pɩgsa yẽokẽ; nug-pʋga ra yɛdg n teesa nensa la pɩgsa sẽn teesẽ. 
Ezekiel1:9 Pɩgs-zʋʋsa ra sɩɩsda taaba; nin-vɩɩsa ra teesa tɩrg n kẽnda n ka wẽnemdedẽ ye. 
Ezekiel1:10 Ned kam fãa ra tara nens a naase: ninsaal nenga, taoore, bõnyẽeg neng, rɩtgo; loalg neng, goabga; sɩlg neng, poorẽ." 
Ezekiel1:11 Pɩgs a yiibu n da yɛdge n tees yĩngri la b ra tɩ sɩɩsda taaba. Pɩgs a yiib n da lut b yĩngã. 
Ezekiel1:12 Ned kam fãa da teesa taoore n dabda. B da rabda b sẽn datẽ tɩ yĩnga pa wẽnemdedẽ ye. 
Ezekiel1:13 Nin-vɩɩsa sʋkã, b ra nee wa bug-saala. B ra nee wa bug-vɩlense, sẽn yãngd la b boogdẽ. Bugma ra tãoosda vẽenem, tɩ sa-yãgr ra yit a pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel1:14 Nin-vɩɩs a naasã ra kẽndame la b watẽ; b zoeesa ra tʋʋla wa saag sʋʋga. 
Ezekiel1:15 Mam zẽka m nenga n gese la m yãee nin-vɩɩg fãa sɛɛgẽ gʋl sẽn sɩɩsd tẽnga. 
Ezekiel1:16 Gʋla ra pɩnda wala kug neer sẽn yãgd a toore. Gʋl a naasã fãa ra wẽnda taaba, tɩ yaa wala b kud-b lame tɩ ned kam fãa sog a to pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel1:17 B ra tuta ween-vɩɩs a naasã n ka tol n wẽnemded b nao wã zut ye. 
Ezekiel1:18 Gʋla yalma ra labsame la b ra bolg n gilga ne bõn-pɩndem. 
Ezekiel1:19 Nin-vɩɩsa sã n kẽnda, gʋla kẽnda bãmb sɛɛgẽ; la b sã n n zẽkd yĩngri gʋla me naag n zẽkdame." 
Ezekiel1:20 Nin-vɩɩsa ra kẽnda b sẽn datẽ tɩ gʋla me naag bãmb n bilimdẽ. Nin-vɩɩsa raab la gʋla me ra tũuda. 
Ezekiel1:21 Woto nin-vɩɩsa sã n kẽnda, gʋla me tũud n kẽndame; b sã n yalse, tɩ bãmb me yalse, b sã zẽk yĩngri, tɩ bãmb me zẽke, tɩ b ra tũuda nin-vɩɩsa raabo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Bũmb wa roog sugri n da yɛdg bõn-vɩɩsa zutu, n yãgd wala wanzurfu." 
Ezekiel1:23 Sugra tẽngre, bõn-vɩɩsa ra tẽega b pɩgs a yi n tees taab tɩrga, n kees a yiibu n mobg b yĩngã." 
Ezekiel1:24 La nin-vɩɩsa sã n kẽnda, mam wʋmda b pɩgsa rãamde. A ra wẽnda mogr bʋrga, n wẽnd Pãng Naaba-Wẽnd dẽnna, n wẽnd tãp-sik-yãang bʋrga. Nin-vɩɩsa sã n da yalse, b manegd n põda b pɩgsã." 
Ezekiel1:25 Sugra zugẽ me bʋʋr n da sãte. 
Ezekiel1:26 B ra nee kug kẽeg me be sẽn da rɩg wa yaa zaoore la b pees n dɩgle, la kug kãng zugu bõn-vɩɩla sẽn wẽnd ninsaala n da zao." 
Ezekiel1:27 La mam yãeeme t'a soaba ra yãgda wa sãnem la yaa wa bugum n da gũbg-a. Woto a menga zãng da reegame n tãoosd vẽenem. 
Ezekiel1:28 Vẽenema sẽn da tão n gilga ra wẽnda saag gomtɩʋʋg sẽn mii n puk saag niib raare. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnnaam, yaa bãmb n da lik ne b ziiri. Mam yãendame, la mam lʋɩɩ m yãvabga la m wʋma ned sẽn gom ne-ma." 
Ezekiel2:1 Koɛɛga yeela maam: «Ninsaal biiga, yik yĩngri tɩ m na n goma ne foom.»" 
Ezekiel2:2 Koɛɛga sẽn waa n gomd ne-ma, Wẽnd pãng n kẽe maam n kɩt tɩ m yals yĩngri la m kelgd sẽn da gomda ne maama." 
Ezekiel2:3 A yeel-m lame: «Ninsaal biiga, m tʋmda foom Israyɛl kamba nengẽ; b yaa tõatba, b yik n zaba ne maam. Wala b yaab rãmba, b zɩɩ n vʋʋs ne mam tõdgr ye." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ad nin-bãmba zuga yaa kɛgenga, b sũura kʋɩɩme la yaool n yaa bãmb nengẽ la m tʋmd-fo. Tɩ wilg-b tɩ yaa Soaala meng n gomde." 
Ezekiel2:5 Bãmb sẽn ya kɩɩsdb zãng kas, b kelgd tɩ b pa kelgd me, b na bãnge tɩ Wẽnnaam no-rɛɛs n be b sʋka." 
Ezekiel2:6 Sã n ya foom, Ezekiyɛl, da zoe-ba, da zoe b goama rabeem ye. B na n kɩɩsame tɩ f vɩɩma lebg wala b lob-f-la gõos la nams sʋka. Da zoe b goama rabeem ye; ra zoe-b tɩ b kʋɩɩsa b sũuri n yaa kɩɩsdb bala a yeyn-ye." 
Ezekiel2:7 Sõng tɩ m koeesa ta tõatba buudu. B nong bɩ a kelge, b nong bɩ b ra kelg ye." 
Ezekiel2:8 La foom, ninsaal biiga, kelge m sẽn na n yeel-fã, ra yɩ kɩɩsd wala bãmb ye. Yaag f noorã n deeg la f wãb bũmb ninga m sẽn na n kõ fooma.»" 
Ezekiel2:9 Mam sẽn gese, nugu n zãad seb-pilimdi n teesd maam," 
Ezekiel2:10 a pilg-a-la mam taoore. B ra gʋlsa a nens a yiibã fãa. Bũmb a to ra ka be sebra pʋgẽ n zʋʋg yãbre, waasgo la sõngr kosg ye." 
Ezekiel3:1 Sẽn da gomda wã yeela maam: «Ninsaal biiga, bũmb ninga b sẽn tees foomã, wãb-a, wãb sebrã m sẽn tees fooma la f kẽng tɩ gom ne Israyɛl buudu.»" 
Ezekiel3:2 Mam yaaga m noore, la b kɩtame tɩ m wãb sebrã," 
Ezekiel3:3 t'a le yeel maam: «Ninsaal biiga, rɩlg f f menga n tɩge ne sebrã m sẽn kõt fã.» M wãba sebrã la a ra yaa bʋgsgo wa sɩɩdo." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tɩ b le yeel maam: «Ninsaal biiga, kẽng a Israyɛl buudẽ wã n tɩ togs-b m goama." 
Ezekiel3:5 Yaa f buuda goama la f na n gome, ka gãgnens nengẽ la m tʋmd-f ye, yaa a Israyɛl buudẽ." 
Ezekiel3:6 Tõe tɩ m sã n da tʋm-f buud kʋʋng nengẽ, buud goam sẽn ya toore t'a wʋmb me ya toog ne-fo, tõe tɩ b baasẽ n kelg-fo." 
Ezekiel3:7 La sã n yaa a Israyɛl kambã, ad-b ka na n kelg-f ye, tɩ yaa maam la b pa rat n kelge. Israyɛl neba zʋg yaa zʋg yoogo, zu-kugr soab zʋgo." 
Ezekiel3:8 Ade, m na n kɩtame tɩ f me kʋɩɩs f sũura wa bãmba. Fo me yubla na n yɩɩ wa bãmb dẽnna, pa girda, pa gõmsde." 
Ezekiel3:9 M na n kõ-f-la keglem wa kut sẽn yũnugi, n kõ-f keglem sẽn yɩɩd pĩig rẽnna. Woto wã ra zoe rabeem ne b buuda sẽn ya kɩɩsdb buuda ye.»" 
Ezekiel3:10 Sẽn da gomda wã yeela maam: «Ezekiyɛl, goam niyns fãa m sẽn na n togs-fã, bĩng-b f sũurẽ, kelg ne f tʋba fãa." 
Ezekiel3:11 Kẽng pa-weta nengẽ, f saam-biisa nengẽ, n tɩ gom ne ba. F na yeel-ba: ‹Ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga.› B nong bɩ b kelge, b nong bɩ b ra kelg ye.»" 
Ezekiel3:12 Wẽnd Vʋʋsma zẽk-m-la yĩngri, la mam poorẽ, m wʋma bʋʋr kãsenga, m wʋma woto: «Soaala paam pẽgre, zĩig ning b sẽn puk b ziiri!»" 
Ezekiel3:13 M wʋma nin-vɩɩsa pɩgsa sẽn da wẽed taaba, la gʋla me sẽn be b sɛɛgẽ wã bʋʋre. Ad-y bʋʋra sɩd yɩɩ kãseng-kãsenga." 
Ezekiel3:14 La Wẽnd Vʋʋsma sẽn da kẽ maama koomd-m lame, n dɩk-m n looge, tɩ m zĩ ne yɛɛsgo la yɩɩre." 
Ezekiel3:15 Mam taa Tel-Abib tẽnga, pa-weta nengẽ, pa-weta sẽn tɩ be Kebar kʋɩlga noora nengẽ. M paa b sʋka rasem a yopoe n ka mi m sẽn maande la m digda." 
Ezekiel3:16 Rasem a yopoe wã poore, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel3:17 «Ninsaal biiga, mam yalsa foom tɩ f lebg ned ninga sẽn na n yeel a Israyɛl t'a maan gũusgu. Fo n na n kelg m koɛɛga n deeg-a n taas Israyɛl." 
Ezekiel3:18 Wala m sã n dat n wilg yel-wẽn-maanda t'a rɩka sor n digd a kũum zĩigẽ tɩ fo ka sak n vẽneg-a t'a teem sore n paam n vɩɩnde, bãng tɩ yel-wẽnda soab na n ki-la a yel-wẽnda yĩnga la fo zug la m na n tʋk a kũuma taale." 
Ezekiel3:19 La fo sã n wilg nin-wẽnga la yẽe n ka tuub a wẽnema n zãag ne-a, a na ki a beegra yĩnga, la foo, f na fãag f yõore." 
Ezekiel3:20 D mak marsã tɩ nin-tɩrga n waa n bas zemsgo n kẽ wẽng maanego, dẽ na lebg yel-beed a yĩnga, a na ki. Fo sã n pa wilg-a t'a gũusi, a na n ki-la a yel-wẽnda yĩnga. M kõn le tẽeg a pĩnd yel-sõma ye la yaa fo zug la m na n tʋk a kũuma taale." 
Ezekiel3:21 La fo sã n wilg nin-tɩrga t'a ra maan wẽnga, t'a sɩd pa maane, a na n vɩɩndame tɩ bala fo n gɩdg-a, la foom, f na fãag f yõore.»" 
Ezekiel3:22 Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga le koomd-m lame la b yeel-m lame: «Yik n ta bãoogẽ wã tɩ m gom ne-fo.» 
Ezekiel3:23 Tɩ mam yik n yi n ta bãoogẽ wã; la Soaala-Wẽnd le siga be ne b ziirã wa Kebar kʋɩlga noorã, tɩ mam lʋɩ yãvabga n kɩ m menga tẽnga." 
Ezekiel3:24 Soaala-Wẽnd pãnga le kẽe maam n kɩt tɩ m yik n yals yĩngri, la b goma ne maam. B yeel-m lame: «Lɛɛg n tɩ pag f meng f roogẽ." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ninsaal biiga, ade, b na n dɩka sẽbdse n sẽb-fo tɩ f pa le tõog n yi n kẽng neba sʋk ye." 
Ezekiel3:26 M na n kɩtame tɩ f zelemdã tabend f ragsendaka tɩ f lebg muka, woto fo kõn le tõog n sagl-b ye, tɩ bala b yaa tõatb buudu." 
Ezekiel3:27 La m sã n wa tar koɛɛga f sẽn na n deeg n taas-ba, m na wa n yaag f noorã tɩ f gome. F na gom ne-ba, n yeel-ba: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd ne-yã.› Kẽer na n sak n kelgame, kẽer me na n zãgsa kelgre tɩ buuda yaa bu-tõatga.»" 
Ezekiel4:1 Soaala-Wẽnd paasa woto: «Ninsaal biiga, rɩk tãn-koeemde n dɩgl f taoore: sõog Zerizalɛɛm tẽngã a zugu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Mak wala bɛɛba kargame n gũbg-a n dat n lub-a; tu bogd n gilg-a, n me gũudb gasgo, n ning tãb-sika n gũbg-a kɛpi, yals b sẽn tar bũmb ning n tãad dotã n lubdẽ wã." 
Ezekiel4:3 Rɩk kut sẽn ya paklga n sele wala kut lalga, foom ne tẽngã sʋka. Ges tẽnga marsã wa a bɛɛb gũbg-a lame n sege, la yaa foo la bɛɛbã, la rẽ na yɩ makre Israyɛl kamba yĩnga." 
Ezekiel4:4 Gãande f nug goabga zugu la f sã n wa gãe woto, bãng tɩ f tʋka Israyɛl rĩunga yel-wẽnde f zugu la na n yɩɩ zɩɩb f yĩnga." 
Ezekiel4:5 M na n sõda raar n kõ-f tɩ f pa woto. Rasma sõor na n taa yʋʋma sõor. Yʋʋm niyns a Israyɛl rĩunga sẽn beege. Woto wã yaa rasem kobs-tã la pis-wɛ la f na zɩ a Israyɛl yel-wẽna taale. 
Ezekiel4:6 La f sã n wa sɛ rasem kobs-tã la pis-wɛ wã, f na wẽnemd n gãand f rɩtg nuga zugu la marsã yaa a Zɩɩda rĩunga yel-wẽndã taale la f na n zɩlg f menga, rasem pis-naase tõre. Yʋʋmd a ye beegr taale zɩta raar a ye." 
Ezekiel4:7 Dẽ poore f na wẽnemd n tees Zerizalɛɛm sẽn mak n dɩg f taoore t'a bɛɛba gũbg n segã; f na zẽk f kanga, bɩlgemde, n tees tẽngã, la f kãab-a m meng kãab-beedo." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ade, m na n maneg n za-f lame, woto f gãeeme la f kõn tõoge n lebg f nugu tɩ daarã sẽn sõda nan ka pids ye." 
Ezekiel4:9 Rɩk alkam pɛɛlga, alkam pugsgu, bɛnga la sũma la alkam kɛgenga. Kalem-b laok a ye pʋga n maan dɩɩbo. Dẽ n na n yɩ fo rɩɩbo rasem kobs-tã la pis-wɛ wã f sẽn na n gãand f nug-goabgã." 
Ezekiel4:10 Fo na n maga rɩ-kãng sutg a yi bala la rẽnda tog n seka f raar a ye fãa rɩɩbo. 
Ezekiel4:11 F tog n yũu kooma ne kẽgsgo; yaa koom wamde la f yũud daar a ye. 
Ezekiel4:12 Rɩɩbã f sẽn na n dɩ wã na n wẽnega alkam pugsgu miisdu; la f na n dõos-a-la ninsaal bĩn-koeems bugum zugu, Israyɛl kamba fãa nifẽ.»" 
Ezekiel4:13 Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «Yaa woto la Israyɛl kambã na n dɩ dɩ-rẽgdo, tẽng ninga m sẽn na n dig-b n tɩ kẽesa pʋgẽ.»" 
Ezekiel4:14 Rẽ la mam yeel yã: «Ayo! Soaala-Wẽnde, m ka nin-dẽgd ye. Mam yãadmẽ tɛka n tãag marsã, mam zɩ n wãb rũn-kɩɩnga bɩ we-rũng sẽn yõke; n paas me nemd dẽgd buud zɩ n kẽ m noore ye.»" 
Ezekiel4:15 Tɩ b na n leok-ma: «Be neere! M sakame tɩ f bas ninsaal bĩndã, la nag-bĩndu la f na n bao n segl rɩɩbã.»" 
Ezekiel4:16 La Soaala meng n le paase: «Ninsaal biiga, ade, m na n menesa sẽn tõe n dɩk fãa n wẽ bur Zerizalɛɛm dãmb yĩnga. Zerizalɛɛm dãmb na fĩdsa b burã la b na n kẽgsa b kooma." 
Ezekiel4:17 Bala buri la koom na n paoogame, b fãa gill na n namsa al wʋsgo la b kõn põse, b yel-wẽna yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel5:1 Ninsaal biiga, rɩk sʋʋg sẽn dɩte, n tall-a wa barga n põng f zugu la f kõog f toɛɛnga. Mag f zoobda zɩslem la pʋɩ-b dʋr a tã." 
Ezekiel5:2 Rɩk rʋr a ye n yõog bugum tẽnga sʋka, b sã n wa wãa-a n sɛ. Rɩk rʋr a to wã n kʋʋs ne sʋʋgã n dʋʋg-ba n gilg tẽngã. Yãk rʋr a tãab soaba pʋgẽ n lob sobgo tɩ mam na pʋg-b ne m meng sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel5:3 La f na n yãka kõbdã sẽn kees bilfã n ning f fuuga loaabẽ. 
Ezekiel5:4 Bãmb la f na n yãkd n lobd bugmẽ. Bãmb n na n yãngd bugum ninga sẽn na n dɩ Israyɛl buuda gilli. 
Ezekiel5:5 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam y Soaala, yaa woto la m na n maan ne Zerizalɛɛm, tẽng ning m sẽn yals bu-zẽmba tẽnsa sʋkã." 
Ezekiel5:6 Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba tõdgame n ka reeg m sẽn kõ-b noy niynsã, n pʋg mam sẽn da gɩdg bũmb ningã. B pʋga wẽnga ne b sũuri n yɩɩg b yagsã, b wẽnema looga buud a taaba rẽnna. B ka reeg m noya, b tõdgame tɩ b kõn vɩɩnd wa m sẽn data ye." 
Ezekiel5:7 Rẽ n so tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd gomd ne y woto: Yãmb n yɩ tõatba n yɩɩd tẽns niyns sẽn gũbg-b yãmba. Yãmb pa reeg m noya la y pa tũu m rog-n-mikã, n yaool n tũud tẽns a taabã sẽn gũbg yãmba rog-n-miki." 
Ezekiel5:8 Be neere! Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde, mam me zabda ne foom, Zerizalɛɛm, m na wɩnga ne f sɩbgre ninsaalba nifẽ." 
Ezekiel5:9 La m na n yika ne f kamba wala m sẽn zɩɩ n make, la m kõn le mak menga, tɩ y sɩd tʋmame tɩ nare." 
Ezekiel5:10 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la ba rãmba na n dɩ b kamba, tɩ kamb na dɩ b ba rãmba, tẽnga pʋga. M na n pidsa m sẽn kãabe, m na menes sẽn na n kell-bã, ween-vɩɩs a naasã." 
Ezekiel5:11 Dɩlla, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet yãmba tɩ y sɩd dẽgma m sõmblem zĩigã ne y manes yoodã, ne y wẽn-naands yoodã. Ad-y m na n menes-y lame tɩ sugr kaẽ ye. M ka na n bas-y ye." 
Ezekiel5:12 Bã-longdem bɩ kom n na n kʋ fo neba kẽere, tẽnga pʋga, tɩ sʋʋg kʋ kẽer lal-gũbra poore. M na sẽega ween-vɩɩs a naasã sẽn na n kell-bã la m na n pʋg-b-la ne m sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel5:13 M na n basa m sũura t'a fudgi n tʋm beed ne beedo. Woto m na rok m sũura ne-yã, la y na bãng tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m gom ne-yã, m sẽn pa sak zãmb a woto buuda yĩnga." 
Ezekiel5:14 Tẽns niyns sẽn gũbg fooma la neb niyns fãa sẽn na n wa f tẽngẽ na yãend m sẽn kɩt t'a lebg bũmb ninga: raboog sẽn ka nenga. 
Ezekiel5:15 M na n pidsa m sẽn yalsã, m na n yika ne Zerizalɛɛm, n yik ne-a ne sũ-puur la zaba. A na n lebga a yagsa lado, a yagsa na n tʋʋs-a lame, tẽnga sãoong na n yɛɛs-b lame la bãmb me na tũ rẽ n maan gũusgu. Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomde." 
Ezekiel5:16 M na n nams-y lame la m na n menes-y-la ne kom. Koma na n zab-y lame wala pɛɛm sẽn zẽne. M na n sãama y sẽn tigs n bĩngã tɩ y ki kom. 
Ezekiel5:17 M sẽn na n tool-y kom ninga la we-rũms niynsã na n kʋ-la y kamba. Bã-longdem, pãn-tõogo la zabr sʋʋga na n looga ne-yã. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n togs woto!" 
Ezekiel6:1 Soaala-Wẽnd taasa maam koe-kãnga: 
Ezekiel6:2 «Ninsaal biiga, wẽnemde n tees Israyɛl tãmsã, la f gome ne a nebã." 
Ezekiel6:3 Bɩ b kelge! Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leokd sẽn be-b tãmsa zutu, kunkuba zutu, bogdẽ wã la bãadẽ wã: M na n taka zabre ne-yã, la m na n sãama y wẽn-faada waoogr zĩisi." 
Ezekiel6:4 B na sarma y maan-kugã, y wisda laase. Y wẽn-naandsa rota noore, yãmb wʋsg na n paa be." 
Ezekiel6:5 M na n yɛdga Israyɛl kamba sẽn ki wã b wẽn-naandsa taoore la m na n sẽega b kõaba n gilg b maan-kugã. 
Ezekiel6:6 Yãmb sẽn kẽed tẽns niynsa ka na n le yãend kẽedb ye, la b kõn le yãend ned wẽn-naandsa waoogr zĩigẽ ye. Y maan-kuga na n wãame n ka le tar tʋʋmd ye, y wẽn-naandsa, b na n wã-b lame, b na n menes-b lame, y wisda laase na n wãame, y sẽn naana fãa na n lebga tom." 
Ezekiel6:7 Yãmb sʋka wʋsg na n kiime. Woto la y bãngd tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel6:8 La m zabra sʋʋg na n keesa yãmb neb kẽere la bãmb la m na n sẽeg tẽn-zẽngẽ. 
Ezekiel6:9 B na tẽeg m yelle b pa-weera tẽngẽ. B na tẽeg tɩ m sẽn nams-b woto wã, yɩ-la b yama sẽn lak ne maama la b sẽn wẽnemd b nens n tees wẽn-naandsã. B sũur na n yaala ne b meng marsã b sẽn tʋm tʋʋm yooda yĩnga." 
Ezekiel6:10 Woto b na bãnge tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, da pa gomd vɩʋʋgẽ, m sẽn da waa n yeel-b tɩ b gũus tɩ yel-beed n na n lʋɩ b zutã.»" 
Ezekiel6:11 Naaba-Wẽnd n gomd woto: «Vam-y y noore, n wilg y sũ-toogo, tib-y y nao la kaas-y n sãbs Israyɛl dãmba tʋʋm yoodã la b tʋʋm kɛgã. B bãng tɩ sʋʋg n na n menes-ba, bɩ kom, bɩ bã-longdem." 
Ezekiel6:12 Bã-longdem n na n kʋ sẽn be b yɩɩgã; sʋʋg n na n lub sẽn pẽ-bã; kom na n kʋ sẽn põs-bã, tẽnga wãab poore. M na n basame tɩ m sũura fudg n waag-ba." 
Ezekiel6:13 B yĩnsa na n sẽega tẽnga n naag ne b wẽn-naandsa, b maan-kuga sɛɛga, tãmsa la kunkuba zutu, tɩɩsa sẽn tob la sẽn gũma tẽngre, la zĩis niyns fãa b sẽn kʋʋd b wẽn-naandsa maando. Woto b fãa na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel6:14 M na n wilg-b-la m pãnga; m na n kɩtame tɩ b tẽngã, b sẽn kẽed zĩig ning fãa lebg raboogo, sɩngda zĩ-peen-daagã nug rɩtgo n ta Ribla, nug goabga. B fãa na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel7:1 Wẽnd taasa maam koe-kãnga: 
Ezekiel7:2 «Ninsaal biiga, kelg maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn togsd Israyɛl buudu, Ad-f wãaba segl n sɛɛme, la tẽnga kɩreng ba a ye ka na n põs ye." 
Ezekiel7:3 Marsã y yell sɛɛme; m na n basa m sũura t'a fudgi n waag yã, m na n bʋ y bʋʋdo n sɩbg y tʋʋm yoodã." 
Ezekiel7:4 M pa na n ges a Israyɛl ne zoe-nif ye, m ka na n bas-a saal ye. M na n kɩtame t'a yao a tʋʋm dẽgdã a sẽn ket n maande. Woto la m na n kɩt tɩ y bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel7:5 Ad-m sẽn le yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: Yel-beed sẽn ka taare, n wate." 
Ezekiel7:6 Ad-y wakata taame, wakata taa n sɛɛme; m ne-a lame!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Tẽnga rãmba, ya y wãaba yell la m gomda. Y sẽegra raar la m gomda. Bʋʋda raar kolgame. Sũ-nooga kaasg sẽn da kaasd tãmsa zutã, rabeem kaasgo n ledg a zĩiga." 
Ezekiel7:8 La marsã, kõn le kaoos tɩ m sũ-puura waag-y ye. M na n basame tɩ m sũura fudg n ta a tɛka. M na n kao-la y bʋʋdo n kɩt tɩ y yao n dol y tʋʋm yoodã." 
Ezekiel7:9 Mam nimbãan-zoeere kõn lʋɩ y zug ye, kõn paoog y ye. Y na n yao y tʋʋm yooda la y tʋʋm kɛga y sẽn ket n maandã. Woto y na bãng tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n sɩbgd-y." 
Ezekiel7:10 Ad daarã, ad-a sẽn wate: yãmb me la wã, yel-beeda me la wã. Pãn-tõog paasdame, wilg-m-menga paama pãnga." 
Ezekiel7:11 Pãn-tõog paama zĩiga, a rasaara zẽkame n tar pãbre. Bũmb ka na n kees ye. Y sõor na n boogame, y yẽesma na n loogame, y ziira na n sɛɛme." 
Ezekiel7:12 Wakata yẽrgame, daara kolgame; bɩ sẽn daada bũmb ra nams n kɩdem ye, la sẽn koosda me ra zoe bõn ye, tɩ bala m sũ-puura na n dɩɩ neba fãa gilli." 
Ezekiel7:13 Sẽn koos-a wã ka tõe n le reeg a sẽn koos ye, ba a sã n põse. Sẽn yet tɩ tẽnga gill na n wãame wã, na n sɩd yɩɩ boto. Nin-tɩrg sẽn ka le be sʋkã, sẽn na n põs-a me ka ye." 
Ezekiel7:14 Ba tõntõog peeb-ya, tɩ fãa gill segle n sɛ, ned ba a ye ka na n bob zabr ye, tɩ yaa ne buuda zãng la m sũura puug yã." 
Ezekiel7:15 Soya zutu, zabr sʋʋga; rota pʋsẽ, bã-longdem la kom. We-kɛɛnga yaa zabrẽ la b na n pa, tẽnga pʋga yaa kom la bãaga." 
Ezekiel7:16 Sẽn põs-ba na n zoe n dʋʋ tãmse wala watr-gũusdu, tɩ ned kam fãa tar waasgo, a beegr yĩnga." 
Ezekiel7:17 Nusa fãa na n lʋɩɩ vãbnega, tɩ rũma koosd taaba," 
Ezekiel7:18 B na yeelga sũ-pa-noang futu, ned kam fãa zĩ n yɩɩdame, yãnd sulga ned kam fãa neng tẽnga, ned kam fãa zug põngame." 
Ezekiel7:19 B na n loba b wanzurf sor zugu, la b sãnema na n lebga rẽgdo b yĩnga. Wanzurf bɩ sãnem kõn tõog n le fãag-ba, Soaala sũura sẽn na n puug raare. B ka na le paam n kõ noor ye, b ka na n le paam n da b sẽn dat ye, tɩ yaa wanzurfa la sãnema n wa ne b tudgri." 
Ezekiel7:20 B maana wilg-m-menga tɩ b ra tara laogo, wʋsg-wʋsgo. Be la b yãk n dõog wẽn-naandse, bõn-yaals sẽn ka sakd gesgo. Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala yeel yã: m na n kɩt tɩ rẽ fãa yaal b sũuri." 
Ezekiel7:21 M na base tɩ sãamba wa fã b laogã, n bas tɩ nin-yaals sẽn ka mi bũmb waoogra tall fãa n loog wa b pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel7:22 M ka na n leok-b tɩ bũmbu b sã wa wɩɩbe n loog ne ro-sõnga sãnem ye. Tɩ sɩda nin-kʋʋdba n na n kẽ ro-sõnga pʋga n dẽgem-a. 
Ezekiel7:23 Maneg n kud bãeense, bi-beesa yĩnga, tɩ bala tẽngã pidame, a pida ne nin-kʋʋre a pida ne pãn-tõogo." 
Ezekiel7:24 M na kɩt tɩ bu-zẽmb sẽn yɩɩd b taab ne toolem wa reeg b zagsã. M na n sɛɛsa pãn-dãmbã wilg-m-meng la b tɩtaama, m na dẽgma b wẽn-naandsa waoogr zĩisi." 
Ezekiel7:25 Yɩɩr n wate, b na bao laafi la b kõn paam-a ye." 
Ezekiel7:26 Yel-beed ne yel-beedo n wate, kibar sẽn ka sakd kelgre n pʋgd a to. Yaa zaalem la b kot bãngda sẽn na n wa ne Wẽnd koɛɛga; maan-kʋʋd ka le tar zãmsgo n na n zãms ye, nin-kẽems ka le sagend ye." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kũum na n lʋɩɩ na-yiri, sũ-sãang na n dɩɩ rĩm-biiga, talsa zĩi ne rigbu. M na n sɩbga wala sẽn segde; bʋʋda me na n bʋʋ ne zemsgo. Woto b na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel8:1 Pa-weera loogr yʋʋmd a yoob soaba, a kiuug a yoob soaba, kiuuga daar a nu soaba, maam da zĩ m yiri t'a Zɩɩda nin-kẽembã ra zĩ m taoore. Beelẽ, Soaala-Wẽnd nuga waa vugr bala n tik maam." 
Ezekiel8:2 M da getame la ade: bõn-vɩɩla sẽn wẽnd ninsaala, n lik-m. Sɛɛga tɛka n dabd tẽngrã ra yaa bugum; sɛɛga tɛka n dadb zugã ra yãnga ne vẽenem sẽn ya moomd yʋs." 
Ezekiel8:3 Bũmb n tẽeg wa nugu n kolemd mam zoobdã. Wẽnd pãnga zẽk-m-la yĩngri la m yãeeme tɩ b tall-m lame n taas Zerizalɛɛm. B taas-m-la tẽnga pʋgẽ, nug goabg noora sẽnẽ. Zĩ-kãng la b ra yals wẽn-naand a ye togsende. Bõn-kãng yãeeb ra yĩida Naaba-Wẽnd sũuri." 
Ezekiel8:4 A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama lik-m-la ne b ziiri wala b sẽn da maan bãoogẽ wã. 
Ezekiel8:5 B yeela maam: «Ezekiyɛl, zẽk f nini n ges nug goabga.» Tɩ mam zẽk m nin n ges nug goabga. Maan-kugr n da be nug goabga. Maan-kugra sẽn da be roog ninga noorẽ, b ra zaoolga Naaba-Wẽnd nif sẽn ka rat yãend a soabã." 
Ezekiel8:6 Dẽ la b yeel maam: «Ninsaal biiga, f ne b sẽn maan la? A Israyɛl rooga maanda wɩɩbdo sẽn na yɩlẽ tɩ m zãag ne m ro-sõngã. Ad-f na le yãee wɩɩbd a taaba sẽn zem woto.»" 
Ezekiel8:7 B talla maam n dig yɩng sɩmannã. M mikame tɩ lalga pooga võore tɩ zãonga pʋg tonnẽ. 
Ezekiel8:8 Tɩ b yeel-ma: «Ninsaal biiga, yalg lalga võorã.» Tɩ mam yalg-a tɩ lebg noore." 
Ezekiel8:9 Tɩ b yeel maam: «Kẽ n ges wɩɩbd niyns bãmba sẽn maand ka!» 
Ezekiel8:10 Mam kẽe n gesame; da yaa gʋlb la b kar yã, n makd wiis buud fãa la rũms yoodo, n paas a Israyɛl sẽn waoogd wẽn-naands niynsa, bãmb n pid lalsã n karg n sege." 
Ezekiel8:11 La neb pisopoe, Israyɛl roogã nin-kẽemse, n da yɛs wẽn-naandsa taoore. A Safã biiga a Yazaniya da yɛsa bãmb sʋka. Ned kam fãa ra zãada wisdu laag a nugẽ. Wisda yũuga ra zẽkdame." 
Ezekiel8:12 M wʋma koe-kãnga: «Ninsaal biiga, fo nee Israyɛl rooga nin-kẽemb sẽn maand bũmb ning, likẽ wã, ned kam fãa a wẽn-naanda sẽn zaolgẽ la. Bãng tɩ yaa woto la b ra gomd ne taaba: ‹Soaala ka le rat n yãend-d ye, Soaala loog n basa d tẽngã.› »" 
Ezekiel8:13 Koɛɛga le paasa woto: «F na yãend wɩɩbd a taab wʋsgo sẽn zem woto b sẽn le maande.»
