Ezekiel8:14 B talla maam n tees wẽnd dooga nug goabg noorã. Pagb n da zĩ be n yãbd a Tamuz. 
Ezekiel8:15 Tɩ b sok maam: «F neeme-la, ninsaal biiga? F na le yãend wɩɩbd a taab wẽnem sẽn yɩɩd wã n paase.»" 
Ezekiel8:16 La b talla maam n kẽ pʋgẽ sɩmannã. Mik ro-sõnga noorẽ, zãonga la maan-kugra sʋka, neb sẽn ta pisi la a nu n da be be; b zãnkudgã ra teesa ro-sõngã tɩ b nenga tees yaanga. B ra wõgemdame n waoogd wĩntoogã." 
Ezekiel8:17 Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd yeel maam: «F yãeeme-la, ninsaal biiga? Bãng tɩ wɩɩbda sẽn maand ka wã ka sek Zɩɩda tẽnga rãmb ye tɩ b na n pids-a ne pãn-tõogo n le sɩng m beegre la m sũur yikri." 
Ezekiel8:18 Taa maam marsã tɩ m me na n yik m sũuri. M kõn ges-b ne nimbãan-zoeer ye. B nong bɩ b kaas n kos m sõngre, m kõn kelg-b ye.»" 
Ezekiel9:1 Rẽ poore m wʋma Soaala sẽn tãse: «Wa-y yã, yãmb fãa sẽn tog n sɩbg tẽngã. Ned kam fãa wa ne a sãoong teedo!»" 
Ezekiel9:2 Rẽ la neb a yoob yi rigno-kãsengã, nug goabga sẽnẽ n wa, ãnkam fãa ne a wãab teedo a nugẽ. Bãmb sʋka ned a yembre n da yer fu pɛɛlga n sẽbg a sɛɛgẽ b sẽn tar bũmb ning fãa n gʋlsdẽ. B fãa kolgame la b yalsa zũuda maan-kugr sɛɛga." 
Ezekiel9:3 A Israyɛl Wẽnnaama sẽn da lik ne ziir malɛgsa zugẽ wã zẽkame n tees wẽnd dooga dignoore. La b boola ned ningã sẽn da yera fu pɛɛlgã n loe a sɛɛgẽ b sẽn tar bũmb ning fãa n gʋlsdẽ wã. 
Ezekiel9:4 B yeela nin-kãnga: «Saag Zerizalɛɛm, la f sẽn yãend ned ning fãa t'a kũmdẽ la a wiisdẽ, wɩɩbda fãa sẽn maand tẽngã pʋgẽ wã yĩnga, bɩ f bẽeg makre a rĩirẽ.»" 
Ezekiel9:5 La mam wʋma a sẽn yeel neb a nu wã: «Pʋg-y nin-kãnga, tẽnga pʋga, n kʋ nebã. Nimbãan-zoeer da yõk-y ye; da bas-y ned ba a ye ye." 
Ezekiel9:6 Kʋ-y nin-kẽemba wala kom-bɩɩba la kom-pugli, la pagba wala kom-bõonego. Kʋ-y b fãa gilli. Da sɩɩs-y ned ning fãa sẽn tar-a makrã b rĩirẽ ye. Sɩng-y ka, m do-sõnga pʋga.» Rẽ la b sɩng kʋʋbo, la b sɩnga ne nin-kẽembã sẽn da yɛs wẽnd dooga taoorã." 
Ezekiel9:7 Soaala kõo noore tɩ b rẽgem doogã n pids a sɩmandã ne kũum la b yaool n teem zĩiga. La rẽ sẽn maane, b yiime n kẽ tẽngã n tar a wãabo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Maam a Ezekiyɛl da yɛsa m ye tɩ kʋʋba kʋʋda, tɩ m na n lʋɩ yãvabga la m kelemdẽ: «Wii! Soaala-Wẽnde, y sũura sẽn puug woto ne Zerizalɛɛma, yãmb datame n menes a Israyɛl kamba sẽn kella laa?»" 
Ezekiel9:9 Tɩ b na n leok-ma: «A Israyɛl la a Zɩɩda rooga beegra labsa, a ka tar tɛk ye, tẽnga fãa pida ne zɩɩm, zemsg ka ye, tɩ b lagem n gomd woto: ‹Soaala toog ka le be ne tõnd ye, tɩ b loog n basa d tẽngã.›" 
Ezekiel9:10 Bãng-y tɩ m kõn maan nimbãan-zoeer ye, m kõn bas ned ba a ye ye! M na rɩk b manesmã taale n zɩlg-ba.»" 
Ezekiel9:11 Dẽ marsã la ned ninga sẽn da yeelga fu pɛɛlgã n sẽbg a sɛɛgẽ bũmb ning fãa b sẽn tar n gʋlsdẽ wã, nin-kãng waa n goma a tʋʋmna yelle. A wilga Soaala woto: «M tũ-la y raaba zãnga!»" 
Ezekiel10:1 M zẽka m neng n gese, la malɛgsa sẽn da be zĩig ninga yĩngra ra tonda neere wa koobr gelle, n mams-mams wa naam zaoore." 
Ezekiel10:2 La Soaala-Wẽnd yeela sẽn da yera fu pɛɛlgã: «Tũ vɩʋʋga sẽn bas gilga malɛgsa tẽngr la kolg n yãk bug-saala, ne f nusi, la kẽng n tɩ fẽeg-b tẽnga pʋga.» La neda kolga m nifẽ n yãk bug-saalã." 
Ezekiel10:3 Neda sẽn waa n dabd n na n yãk bug-saalã tɩ malɛgsa ra bee wẽnd dooga nug rɩtgo la sawadg n kẽ n pid dooga noore. 
Ezekiel10:4 Soaala-Wẽnd ziirã, zẽkame n zʋʋg malɛgsã la a teesa wẽnd dooga noore. Sawadg n lɛɛg n pid wẽnd doogã, la wẽnd dooga taoor ra yãnga ne Wẽnd ziira vẽenem." 
Ezekiel10:5 Malɛgsa pɩgsa bʋʋra da sãtame n tat yɩnga wa Soaala-Wẽnd pãng soaba koɛɛga, b sã n gomda." 
Ezekiel10:6 Fu-pɛɛlga soab da yɛs n yega gʋlã, Soaala sẽn waa n na n yeel-a t'a kolg malɛgsã n yõng bug-saala, bug-toaalgẽ wã." 
Ezekiel10:7 Malɛk a ye tẽega a nug tẽngre n yãk bugma n pids fu-pɛɛlga soab nusi t'a tall n looge. 
Ezekiel10:8 Bũmb wala ninsaal nusi n da tond malɛgsa pɩgsẽ. 
Ezekiel10:9 Mam sẽn gese, m yãee gʋl a naase: gʋll a ye malɛk fãa sɛɛgẽ. Gʋla ra tãoosda vẽenem wa kug neeba sẽn tãoosdã." 
Ezekiel10:10 Gʋla ra wẽnda taaba la yaa waa b ra sog n kẽe taaba, tɩ ãnkam be a to tẽnsʋka." 
Ezekiel10:11 B ra tõe n kẽn n teesa ween-vɩɩs a naasã n ka tol n wẽnemd b zug ye. B ra bilimdame n tees nensa sẽn teesẽ n ka wẽnemd goabg bɩ rɩtg ye. 
Ezekiel10:12 La malɛgsa zãnga, b poore, b nusi, b pɩgsa, b gʋl a naasa fãa, ra tãoosda bug-pãrse." 
Ezekiel10:13 La mam wʋmame tɩ b boond gʋla yʋʋre tɩ Galgal, sɩlmande!" 
Ezekiel10:14 Malɛk fãa da tara nens a naase: pipi neng ra yaa malɛk nenga; yiib soaba da yaa ninsaal nenga; tãab soaba ra yaa gɩgemd nenga, tɩ naas soaba ya sɩlg nenga." 
Ezekiel10:15 Malɛgsa zẽka yĩngri. Ra yaa malɛgs niyns m sẽn da yãend Kebar kʋɩlga noorã. 
Ezekiel10:16 Malɛgsa sã n da kẽnda, gʋla me kẽnda ne bãmba; b sã n yɛdg b pɩgsã n na n yɩk yĩngri, gʋla me naagd n zẽkame." 
Ezekiel10:17 B sã n yalsdẽ, bãmb me yalsdame, la b sã n yɩkdẽ bãmb me tũudame n yɩke, tɩ bala malɛgsa raab la gʋla me ra tũuda." 
Ezekiel10:18 Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn da likã zẽka ne b ziirã wẽnd dooga noore n tɩ sig malɛgsa zugu. 
Ezekiel10:19 Bãmb yɛdga b pɩgsã n yɩk mam nifẽ, bãmb ne b gʋlã, n looge. B tɩ yalsa yaang dignoorã, la a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama ziira vẽenem da yãnga b zugẽ." 
Ezekiel10:20 Kebar kʋɩlga noore, m da yãee malɛgs a woto tɩ Israyɛl Wẽnnaama ra zao b zugu. M bãngame tɩ yaa malɛgse." 
Ezekiel10:21 Ãnkam fãa ra tara nens a naase, pɩgs a naase la wala ninsaal nusi a pɩgsa yẽokẽ." 
Ezekiel10:22 B nensã ra wẽnda nens niyns m sẽn da yãend Kebar kʋɩlga noore. Ãnkam fãa ra teesa a taoore n kẽnda. 
Ezekiel11:1 Soaala pãng kolemda maam n kẽng wẽnd dooga yaang no-kãsengã. Neb pisi la a nu n da yɛs be; bãmb sʋka m yãenda a Yazaniya, a Azur biiga n paas a Pelatiya, a Benaya biiga. Bãmb la tẽnga taoor dãmba." 
Ezekiel11:2 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: «Ezekiyɛl, ad yaa nin-bãmba n dat n tʋm tʋʋm yoodã la b yelgd sagl yoodã, Zerizalɛɛm pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel11:3 B yetame: ‹Na kaoos tɩ b le me rot ka. Tẽnga yaa wa rʋko la tõnd la nemd n be a pʋgẽ.› 
Ezekiel11:4 Woto wã, Ezekiyɛl, gom bãngr goama n luk b bãongo.»" 
Ezekiel11:5 Wẽnd pãnga kẽ-m lame la b yeel-m lame tɩ m gom woto. Ad Soaala leokre: «M mi-la y sẽn walemd taaba la m mii tagsg ning sẽn wat y yamẽ, Israyɛl kamba!" 
Ezekiel11:6 Yãmb kʋʋ neb ka tɛka, tẽn-kãnga pʋgẽ, n kɩt tɩ soya fãa rɩg ne kũum." 
Ezekiel11:7 Rẽ n so tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, gomd ne-y woto. Tẽnga sɩd wẽnda rʋko la nemda yaa yãmb sẽn kʋ b rãmbã. Sã n ya yãmb mense, m na n dig-y lame n yiisi." 
Ezekiel11:8 Yãmb sẽn zoet zabr sʋʋgã, yaa zabr la b na n zab ne-yã. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togsd rẽnna." 
Ezekiel11:9 M na yiis-y tẽngã n bas-y tɩ y lʋɩ sãamb nusẽ, la m kao y bʋʋdo n paalg yã." 
Ezekiel11:10 M na n tʋma zemsga sẽn dat tɩ m tʋm tʋʋm niynsã a Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ la y na n paa zabrẽ, la woto y na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel11:11 Tẽn-kãngã kõn yɩ yãmb rʋk ye, yãmb me kõn yɩ a pʋgẽ nemd ye. Yaool n yaa a Israyɛl soolma pʋgẽ la m na n kao y bʋʋdo n sɩbg yã." 
Ezekiel11:12 Woto y na bãnge tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, ned ninga yãmb sẽn pa reeg a soab noya la y pa lak ne a soab sẽn gɩdgã, n yaool n tũud buud niyns sẽn gũbg yãmba rog-n-mikã.»" 
Ezekiel11:13 La maam, a Ezekiyɛl, sẽn waa n taasd gom kãensã, a Benaya biig a Pelatiya, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn keese, wẽneg n bee kũum. M lʋɩ-la m yãvabga la m kelmame: «M ba-yee, y na n kʋʋ Israyɛl kamba fãa sẽn kelle, Soaala!»" 
Ezekiel11:14 Soaala yeel-m lame: 
Ezekiel11:15 «Ninsaal biiga, bãng tɩ Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba sagenda Israyɛl kamba fãa sẽn be pa-weere, fo tẽngen-bi-taase, fo saam-biisi, la b yet-b lame: ‹Zãag-y ne Soaala-Wẽnd tẽngã tɩ ka yẽ bal la b rɩk n kõ tõnd ye.›" 
Ezekiel11:16 Woto wã togs b sẽn tall b rãmb n kẽng pa-weerã, tɩ maam a Wẽnd n wilgd-ba: ‹M sẽeg-y-la tẽn-zẽnsẽ, tẽn-sãamsẽ la ne rẽ fãa m be-la y sʋka, wa m do-sõngẽ.›" 
Ezekiel11:17 Bɩ f taas-ba maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn kãab-bã. Taas-b woto: ‹M na n yiis-y-la bu-zẽmba sʋka, n yiis-y tẽns niyns m sẽn da sẽeg yã, n le tall-y n wa kẽes Israyɛl." 
Ezekiel11:18 Y sã n leb be y na menes tʋʋm yooda la wẽn-naandsa waoogre. 
Ezekiel11:19 M na n kõ-la y fãa gilli sũur a ye; y yama me na n lebga yam paale. M na n teka y sũura sẽn kʋɩ wa kugrã tɩ m goama tõog n bʋd a pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel11:20 Woto y na reeg m noya la y lak ne m sẽn gɩdgã la y na lebg m buudu tɩ m me lebg y Wẽnde," 
Ezekiel11:21 La sã n ya sẽn waoogd-b nin-naandsã, sẽn tũud-b b sũur daabo la b maand wɩɩbdo, m na sɩbg-b wala b beegra sẽn tog ne. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, wilgd-y-la woto.› »" 
Ezekiel11:22 Malɛgsa yɛdga b pɩgsã tɩ gʋla me sɩng bilingu. Rẽ t'a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama ziira vẽenem da yãgda bãmb zugẽ. 
Ezekiel11:23 Dẽ poore Soaala sẽn da lik ne ziira zẽkame n tees tẽnga tẽnsʋka n tɩ yals tãng ning sẽn be Zerizalɛɛm yaanga zugu. 
Ezekiel11:24 Wẽnd pãnga koomda maam n tall-ma n kẽng Babilon tẽnga, pa-weta sʋka. Dẽ marsã la m ka le yãend bũmbu." 
Ezekiel11:25 Soaala sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yãend bũmb niynsa fãa, m dɩkame n togs pa-wetã." 
Ezekiel12:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel12:2 «Ninsaal biiga, ad fo sẽn vɩ ne b rãmba yaa tõatb buudu; b tara nini, gesg yĩnga, la b ka rat n yãe ye; n tar tʋba, wʋmb yĩnga, la b ka rat n wʋm ye, tɩ bala b yaa tõatba a yeyn-ye." 
Ezekiel12:3 La foom, ninsaal biiga, segl pa-weoog teedo la f segl f pa-weer loogr wĩntoogo, neba fãa nifẽ. Yi f sẽn be tẽng ningã n tɩ kẽ tẽng a to. Yi neb fãa nifẽ. Daar bɩ b bãng b kɩɩsga sẽn ta zĩig ninga." 
Ezekiel12:4 Bɩ f maneg f teedã wa pa-weoogo b nifẽ, wĩntoogo. La zaabre bɩ f yi b nifẽ, wala pa-wetã sẽn mii n yitã." 
Ezekiel12:5 B nifẽ bɩ f poog lalga võore n tũ be n yiis f teedã. 
Ezekiel12:6 Bɩ b yãend tɩ f palgda teedã f bãgdo n lood ne lika. F meng na n luda f nenga n ka mi f sẽn dabdẽ ye. Yaa woto la m yet tɩ f wilg Israyɛl kamba yell ning sẽn na n pak-ba.» 
Ezekiel12:7 Mam maana wala Soaala sẽn kõ maam noor ningã; wĩntoogo m sɩd manega m teedã wa pa-weoogo, la zaabre m meng pooga lalga võore. Neba yãend-m lame tɩ m lood likẽ tɩ m teed palg m bãoko." 
Ezekiel12:8 Vẽkembeoogo yibeoogo, Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel12:9 «Ninsaal biiga, m miime t'a Israyɛl roogã, tõatb buudã, sok-f lame tɩ bõe la f maand woto." 
Ezekiel12:10 Yeel-ba tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd ratame tɩ sẽn dɩta naam Zerizalɛɛm la Israyɛl kamba sẽn be tẽn-kãnga maan gũusgu. 
Ezekiel12:11 Togs-ba tɩ f maana woto n na n wilg-b yell ning sẽn na n pak-ba: b na n tall-b lame n loog pa-weere. 
Ezekiel12:12 Sẽn dɩta naama na n palga a teed a bãokẽ n yi ne yʋngo. B na n pooga lalga võore t'a tũ be n yi. A na n luda a neng n kẽnd n ka mi a sẽn dabdẽ ye. 
Ezekiel12:13 Maam Naaba-Wẽnde, maam n na n gãneg bẽdgo n yõk-a. M na n tall-a lame n kẽn Babilon dãmb tẽnga. A nif kõn yãend Babilon tẽngã, la yaa be la a na n ki." 
Ezekiel12:14 A poorẽ dãmba fãa, neb niyns sẽn gũud-b yẽ, a tãb-biisa fãa, m na n sẽeg-b-la zĩis fãa n zẽk zabr sʋʋg n pʋg-ba." 
Ezekiel12:15 M sã n wa sẽeg-b bu-zẽmb sʋka, n sẽeg-b tẽn-zẽnsẽ b na bãnge tɩ maam la Soaala." 
Ezekiel12:16 M yaool n na n basa neb kẽer tɩ b põs sʋʋga, la kom la bã-longdem. Nin-bãmb na togs b sẽn na n tɩ kẽ tẽns niynsã, a Israyɛl tʋʋm wẽna sẽn yɩ a soaba. Tẽn-bãmb dãmb me na bãnge tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel12:17 Naaba-Wẽnd le paasame: 
Ezekiel12:18 «Ninsaal biiga, dɩ f rɩɩbo la f rigda, yũ f koom ne sãmbse la yɩɩre." 
Ezekiel12:19 F na yeel tẽnga gilli tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd n yete: ‹Zerizalɛɛm dãmba sẽn pa Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ na n dɩta b rɩɩbo la b yũud b kooma ne yɩɩre la sũ-beedo. Sɩda b tẽnga na n wãame tɩ tẽnga rãmb pids-a-la ne pãn-tõogo. 
Ezekiel12:20 Tẽnsã na n lebga vɩɩdo, pʋta na n lebga zĩ-pɛɛla la woto y na bãng vẽenega tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel12:21 Wẽnd gomda taa maam n yeele ma: 
Ezekiel12:22 «Ninsaal biiga, bõe tɩ b yelgd yelbũnd kãng Israyɛl tẽnga poorẽ: ‹Raara paasda raare tɩ bãngr gomd ba a ye yaool n ka pidsdẽ?›" 
Ezekiel12:23 Be neere! Yeel-ba tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd kõn le bas tɩ b wẽ yelbũnd kãnga ye. B sẽn na n wʋme yaa tɩ bãngdba sẽn togsa fãa pidsga wakat taame." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israyɛl zakẽ wã bãngr fãado la wilgr faad kõn le zĩnd ye. 
Ezekiel12:25 Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde la m sẽn yeel taasda a wakato. Ad-y na n yɩ-la y nifẽ, tõatb buudu, la m na pids m sẽn togse. Maam n gomd boto, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel12:26 Wẽnd kell n talla woto: 
Ezekiel12:27 «Ninsaal biiga, ad Israyɛl rooga rãmb yetame tɩ fo sẽn yet tɩ f nee bũmb ning marsã wã kõn taase tɩ raar ka sõd n paas ye, tɩ la y sẽn togsd bãmb poorẽ wã yaa zamaan sẽn loog raar zãr yɛla." 
Ezekiel12:28 Woto wã yeel-ba tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, na n pidsa m sẽn togse la kõn le kaoos ye. Maam n yeele.»" 
Ezekiel13:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam woto: 
Ezekiel13:2 «Ninsaal biiga, neb niyns sẽn yet tɩ b yaa bãngdbã, Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, la b gomd b meng bãngr goama, luk b fãa bãongo. Yeel-b tɩ b kelg mam goama." 
Ezekiel13:3 La ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn togsde: yel-beed n na n lʋɩ yalem-daada zutu. B tũuda b meng yam n yãet b zirẽ-be-yãeebo." 
Ezekiel13:4 Israyɛl, ad-f bãngdba wẽnda raboodẽ we-yũusi." 
Ezekiel13:5 Bãngdba pa tɩ sõng n le yik lalga sẽn wã wã la b pa me lalga n na n lill Soaala sũ-puura raar zabra ye. 
Ezekiel13:6 B gomda likr b sẽn yãend b yamẽ yelle, la yaa zirẽ-beedo. B yetame: ‹Woto yaa Soaala koɛɛga› la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, yaool ka tʋm-b ye. B bas n tẽedame tɩ m na n yeelame tɩ b nee yellã, la yaa zaalem, b yagda zirẽ n yaool n zĩ n gũudẽ tɩ m maan bũmb n kõ-b bʋʋm." 
Ezekiel13:7 La ayo, m yet-b lame: ‹Y sẽn gomd tɩ Soaala koɛɛgã,› yaa zirẽ bal la y yagda; y yetame tɩ yaa mam koɛɛg la y taasda, la m yaool n pa gom ne y ye." 
Ezekiel13:8 Ade, maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, y sẽn saad n yelgd y sẽn gãand n zãmse la y zirẽ-beedã, m na n yika ne-yã. M koɛɛga, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛga la woto." 
Ezekiel13:9 M na n wilga m pãnga ne bangdb niyns sẽn saad n togsd b sẽn gãand n tagse la b yelgd b zirẽ-beedã. M ka na n le bas-ba m neba sʋk ye, b yʋʋr meng kõn gʋls Israyɛl buuda kamb sʋk ye la b kõn leb b tẽngẽ ye. Woto la b bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel13:10 Bala, b tudgda m nebã n gomd laafi yelle, tɩ laafi yaool n kaẽ ye. Mam buuda neb n met lalgã, tɩ bãmb tɛk ya goora fẽebo." 
Ezekiel13:11 Yeel sẽn fẽed-b goorã tɩ lalga na n lʋɩɩme. Sa-luk n na n wa ne sapɩlem, sob-raoog n na n fão-a." 
Ezekiel13:12 Lalga sã n lʋɩ, b na sok yãmb y goora fẽeb yõodo." 
Ezekiel13:13 Sɩd yaa woto la m togsd yãmba, maam a Naaba-Wẽnde: M sũura na n yikame la m na n kaoo sob-raoogo tɩ m sũ-fõorã wa ne sa-bɛda. M sũ-puura na n toola sapɩlem sẽn na n kao fãa a sor zugu." 
Ezekiel13:14 M na n sãama lalgã y sẽn bolã, n lub-a tẽnga, n buk sẽn da me n sut tẽngã, tɩ fãa tond yɩng marsã. Lalga na n lʋɩɩme n pãb yãmb n kʋ. Rẽ la y bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel13:15 M na n basa m sũura t'a fudg a raab tɛka n sãam lalga la neb niyns sẽn fẽeg-a goorã. B na yeel-y: ‹Lalga lʋɩɩme, sẽn da fẽed-a goora me loogame," 
Ezekiel13:16 bãngdba me loogame, bãngdb niyns sẽn da gomd Zerizalɛɛm poorẽ n yet tɩ na zemse, tɩ bũmb yaool n ka zemsd a to ye.› Woto la m wilgda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel13:17 La foom, Ezekiyɛl, wẽnemd n tees f buuda pagba sẽn saad n gomd b meng-b-toore bãngr goama la luk b fãa bãongo." 
Ezekiel13:18 Wilg-b tɩ yaa ne bãmba la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, gomd woto: ‹Yel-beed na n lʋɩ-la y zugu. Pɛɛl la yãmb wʋgd n loet neba nug-sũgsẽ. Y wʋgda nin-bɛd la kom-bõones yĩnga, pɛɛl sẽn na n lud neng n paam tɩ vɩɩma lebg yãmb soolem. Bõe tɩ yãmb dat tɩ y meng vɩɩma pa y soolmẽ tɩ neb a taaba rẽnd yaool n lebgd yãmb soolem?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd yeta yãmb pagbã tɩ y paoogda maam, m neba taoore, nug pʋgẽ alkam bɛɛla la bur gɩrse raab yĩnga. N paas me, y sẽn dõogd zirẽ n kõt m nebã sẽn tẽed yãmbã, y kʋʋda neb sẽn pa tog ne kũum, la y basd vɩɩse neb sẽn pa tog n vɩɩnde." 
Ezekiel13:20 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n yik ne-yã, y pɛɛla poorẽ, pɛɛla sẽn loet y taaba vɩɩma pãnga. M na n kẽes-b lame n lood-b kamsẽ, la m na fãag y sẽn yet tɩ y sẽba b rãmb vɩɩma." 
Ezekiel13:21 M na n kẽesa pɛɛlã sẽn vilnengã la m na fãag m buudã y nusẽ. Y kõn le soog-b ye la woto y na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel13:22 Yãmb zirẽ-beedã menesa nin-tɩrsa raoodo. Ka bãmb la m yaool n da rat n sɩbg ye. Woto me y pirsa nin-wẽnsã tɩ b kell n dɩk b so-wẽngã sẽn wat ne b kũum. 
Ezekiel13:23 Bãng-y tɩ y sẽn yet tɩ y neeme wã sɛɛme. Y kõn le saa n yelg zirẽ-beed ye. M na n fãaga m buudã y nusẽ. La rẽ me la y bãngd tɩ maam la Soaala.› » 
Ezekiel14:1 Daar n zĩndi tɩ Israyɛl nin-kẽemba kẽere wa maam a Ezekiyɛl nengẽ n na n sok-m bũmbu. 
Ezekiel14:2 La Wẽnd taasa maam b koe-kãnga: 
Ezekiel14:3 «Ninsaal biiga, nin-bãmba sẽn gãd b yamẽ, yaa b wẽn-naandsa bala. B pʋgd-b lame n ka mi tɩ rẽ n wat ne b yel-wẽnda ye. B ra tẽ tɩ mam na n basame tɩ b sok-m bũmb ye." 
Ezekiel14:4 Dɩlla wilg-ba maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn leokd-b: ‹Israyɛl ned sã n lebg wẽn-naandsa yamba, a sã n bas tɩ sẽn lubd-a yel-wẽndẽ wã gãd-a, t'a baas n wat n na n sok bãngda, a bãng tɩ yaa mam meng m toore n na n leok-a. M na ges a sẽn pʋgd wẽn-naands niynsa sõor sẽn zem to-to." 
Ezekiel14:5 M leokra na n yɛɛsa sẽn da zãag b mens ne maam, b wẽnd-naandsa yĩnga.›" 
Ezekiel14:6 To be neere! Yeel a Israyɛl roogã tɩ woto la Soaala gomd ne ba: ‹Teem-y zʋgo, bas-y wẽn-naandsa pʋgbo, gãneg-y y tʋʋm yoodã.›" 
Ezekiel14:7 Israyɛl biig bɩ sãan sẽn zĩ Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ sã n sak n lebg a wẽn-naandsa yamba, a sã n bas tɩ sẽn lubd-a yel-wẽndẽ wã gãd-a t'a baas n wat n na n sok bãngda n bãng m leokre, yaa mam menga n na n leok-a m toore." 
Ezekiel14:8 M na zab ne nin-kãnga la b na gom a yelle la b na maan baobg a poorẽ; m na yiis-a buudẽ la rẽ me na paa y yamẽ tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel14:9 La bãngd sã n belg a meng n leok a menga toore, yɩta mam meng n daag-a. M pãnga la m na n wilg yẽ soaba la m na n menes-a-la m buud a Israyɛl sʋka." 
Ezekiel14:10 Bãngd a woto buudu la sẽn sok-a yẽ wã, b yiiba fãa tʋka b yel-wẽnda taale n tog ne sɩbgre." 
Ezekiel14:11 Woto a Israyɛl dooga kõn leb n zãag ne maam ye, a kõn le rẽgem a menga ne a yel-wẽna sẽn ka tɛka ye. B na n lebga m buudu, tɩ mam lebg b Wẽnde. Woto la m da tar n na n leok-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel14:12 Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel-ma: 
Ezekiel14:13 «Ninsaal biiga, d mak wala tẽng n beeg maam n bas maam. Ad-y m na n wilga tẽn-kãnga m pãnga, m na n menesa bura a sẽn da kees a meng yĩnga. M na sɩbg-a ne kom, m na menes tẽnga pʋga ninsaalb la rũmsi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Ba neb a tãabo wala a Nowe, a Daniyɛl la a Zoob, sã n da beẽ tẽng kãng pʋga, nin-bãmba a tãabã tũudma na n fãagẽ-la bãmb yõor bala. Ned a to kõn paas ye." 
Ezekiel14:15 Tõe meng tɩ m bas tɩ rũm-toos kẽ tẽngã. Tẽnga na n lebga we-raoogo, tɩ rũmsa na n kʋ neba fãa. Rũmsa rabeem yĩnga ned kõn saag n tag be ye." 
Ezekiel14:16 Ba nin-bãmba b tãaba ra beẽ tẽngẽ wã, bãmb b tãab bal n na n põsẽ. Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele. Tẽnga rãmb kõn tõog n fãag b meng kamb ye, la tẽnga na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Ezekiel14:17 Ka rẽnd bɩ m wa ne zabre tẽnga pʋga, n bool tãnsoab a ye ne a tãb-biisi tɩ b wa zɛ tẽngã la b menes a nebã ne a rũmsã." 
Ezekiel14:18 Nin-bãmba b tãabã sã da beẽ tẽn-kãng pʋga, yaa bãmb bal n na n põsẽ. Wa m sẽn vɩ wã, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n togsd rẽnna, b kõn tõog n fãag b meng kamb ye." 
Ezekiel14:19 Ka rẽnd bɩ m tʋm bã-longdem, n wilg m sũura sẽn puugã ne bãag sẽn na n kʋ tẽnga neb la a rũmsi." 
Ezekiel14:20 Ba a Nowe, a Daniyɛl ne a Zoob sã n da beẽ tẽn-kãng pʋga, b tũudma na n fãagẽ la bãmb yõor bala. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Wẽnd vɩɩgã, n yete, b kõn tõog n fãag b meng kamb ye.»" 
Ezekiel14:21 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: «M sɩbga Zerizalɛɛm ne yel-beed a naase: zabre, kom, we-rũmsi la bã-longdem, sẽn na n yɩlẽ n menes a nebã la a rũmsã." 
Ezekiel14:22 Neb kẽer pam n põsame, pagb la rapa. B kɩtame tɩ b yi tẽnga pʋga. Ad-y bãmb na n bʋʋga yãmb pa-weere. Y sã n wa yãend b sẽn vɩ to-to, Y sã n wa yãend b tʋʋm wẽna, y na bãng tɩ sɩbgr ning m sẽn sɩbg Zerizalɛɛma da yaa bũmb sẽn segde." 
Ezekiel14:23 Y sũur na sig bilfu, tɩ y sã n wa yãend-ba y na bãnge tɩ m da tara bʋʋm m sɩbg-b wa m sẽn maana. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yete.»" 
Ezekiel15:1 Naaba-Wẽnd taasa maam b koɛɛga n yet-ma: 
Ezekiel15:2 «Ninsaal biiga, bõe n kɩt tɩ bugsuntung raoog na n yɩ sõmbo n yɩɩg googa raad a tãaba?" 
Ezekiel15:3 B tõe n dɩka a raoog n pees bõn-kɛgenga, n pees baafo sẽn na n ka n yagl teed bɩ?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Ad-a sẽn segd ne bũmb yaa b rɩka n lob n yãng bugum bug-toaalgẽ. A noya a yiibã sã n yõk bugum tɩ tẽnsʋka me sɩng rɩɩbo, tõe n le tall-a lame n maan bũmb bɩ?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Bũmb sẽn da waa n nan ka sɩɩs-a, b ra ka tõe maan fɩ ne-a ye, marsã bugma sẽn yõog-a wã, n yɩɩda." 
Ezekiel15:6 Rẽ n so, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, gomd woto: yaa bugmẽ la m nong n lobd bugsuntunga raoogo n yɩɩd googa tɩɩse. Woto me, yaa Zerizalɛɛm dãmb la m bugma rɩta." 
Ezekiel15:7 Yaa ne bãmb la m na n yiki. B tẽeme tɩ b põsa bugum la yaa bugum n na n dɩ-ba. Dẽ marsã la b bãngda tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel15:8 M na kɩt tɩ tẽn-kãnga lebg we-raoogo, a tũudma sẽn pa yɩ wa m sẽn datã. Yaa maam n yet rẽnna, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel16:1 Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga taa maam n yeel-ma: 
Ezekiel16:2 «Ninsaal biiga, kɩt tɩ Zerizalɛɛm bãng t'a tʋʋma ka sõma ye." 
Ezekiel16:3 Yeel-a tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n wilgd-a: ‹Kanaã tẽnga la f saam-dãmb tẽnga. Be la f rog yã; f ba yɩɩ Amoritga tɩ f ma yɩ Ititga." 
Ezekiel16:4 F sẽn na n wa moog raare, b ka wãag f yũug ye, b ka so-f koom ye, b ka so-f ne yamsem ye, b ka pil-f fuug ye." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ned ba a ye ka tol zoe f nimbãanega, n zã-f wa sẽn segd ye. F sẽn paame yaa neba sãbsgo; b bas-f-la f zaal tomẽ." 
Ezekiel16:6 La mam looga f sɛɛgẽ n yãend-fo tɩ f tẽbd f zɩɩma pʋgẽ. La f sẽn wa n bee f zɩɩma pʋgẽ m yeel-f lame tɩ f vɩɩnde. 
Ezekiel16:7 M kɩtame tɩ f tão wa kɩmgo, tɩ f sɩd yik n bɩ n pids f sãdemdo, n pids f ne neerem. La fo ra yaa f zaala, n ka tar fuug ye." 
Ezekiel16:8 M sẽn loog f sɛɛgẽ, m mikame tɩ f ta-la f baoob wakato. M yɛdga m fuug noore n lud f yãnde; m yõga zood ne foo; m yeelame tɩ m kõn bas-f ye. Yɩɩ woto la f lebg m soolem. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomd woto." 
Ezekiel16:9 M so-f-la koom, n pek f yĩnga zɩɩma, n sõog-f kaam sẽn tar yũ-noogo." 
Ezekiel16:10 M kõ-f-la fu neeba, fut sẽn maneg n kõoge, n paas gãnd neooda sẽn ya faase, n paas gĩs bãanes sẽbdga la fu neere menga." 
Ezekiel16:11 M par-f-la ne fan-teedo, n ning zũi f nusẽ, la kĩndfu f loorẽ." 
Ezekiel16:12 M soga bũmb f yõorẽ, n ning f tʋb-londo, la m fõgnega f zugã ne pugl neere." 
Ezekiel16:13 B ra fam-f lame ne sãnem la wanzurf, n yeelg foo ne gĩs-bãanes peen-neba sẽn maneg n kãde. Zom-bãanega la sɩɩdo n paas oliv kaam n da yaa f rɩɩbo. F neerma ra yãngd n paasdame, la f paam n lebga na-paga." 
Ezekiel16:14 F yʋʋra yii dũni wã pʋgẽ, f neerma yĩnga, tɩ bala a ra taa neerem tɛkẽ, tɩ m da zam-f-la ne fan-teedo. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n togsde." 
Ezekiel16:15 La fo waa n bas n geta f neerma bala la f sẽn paam tɩ f yʋʋra yi wã, f lebga yoaada, n maan yoob ne sẽn waa fãa." 
Ezekiel16:16 F yãka zĩis kẽere n bao peen neeb n tʋɩ n gãande. La yell a woto ra zɩ n maane la kõn le paas ye. 
Ezekiel16:17 F wʋka sãnema la wanzurfa fan-teedã m sẽn kõ-fã, n kud wẽn-naands, f yoob yĩnga." 
Ezekiel16:18 F rɩka f futã sẽn maneg n kõogã n pil-ba la yaa m kaama ne wisdã, m sẽn kõ-fã yũug la b kok yã." 
Ezekiel16:19 M sẽn da kõ foom koodã, ne zom bãanegã, n paas kaama ne sɩɩdã, f rɩɩbã yĩnga, yaa rẽ la f rɩk n kõ-ba n na n maas b sũuri. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde n gomde." 
Ezekiel16:20 Fo tol n dɩka kom-dibli la kom-pugli f sẽn dog mam yĩnga, f rɩk-b lame n kõ f wẽn-naandsã. Yooba ra ka sek-f laa?" 
Ezekiel16:21 F kooda m kom-dibli wã n lob bugmẽ fo wẽn-naandsa waoogre yĩnga. 
Ezekiel16:22 La f sẽn waa n yood f yoobã, f ka tol n tẽeg f pʋg-sademdẽ wã yell ye, f pa tẽeg f yãadmẽ wã yell ye, f pa tẽeg f sẽn waa n yaa f zaala wakato la f tẽbd f zɩɩma pʋgẽ ye." 
Ezekiel16:23 La kato! F tʋʋm wẽna ka tɛk f sẽn da zoe n tʋma n wa ne f bõne. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yeele." 
Ezekiel16:24 Mik fo na n le paasame, n met n zẽkd f geera so-badsẽ." 
Ezekiel16:25 So-tiisẽ wã la f me f geere n dẽgemd f neerem, la f kõt f meng so-loaad fãa, n tʋm f yooba tʋʋma n bãge." 
Ezekiel16:26 Fo yoo wʋsgo ne Ezipt rãmba, f yagse sẽn be pãnga la f puuga m sũuri." 
Ezekiel16:27 Dẽ me la m wilg m pãnga n mong-f rɩɩbo, n bas-f ne f bɛɛba, ne Filisti rãmba, tɩ f yooba ra puuda bãmb me sũuri." 
Ezekiel16:28 Dẽ ka sek-f ye, tɩ f yo ne Asiri rãmba, n kell n pa tɩg ye." 
Ezekiel16:29 Tɩ f babs lɛɛbdba, Babilon dãmba, n kell n pa tɩg ye." 
Ezekiel16:30 Ad fo ka tar yõnofr ye, maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. F wẽnema yɩɩga pʋg-yoaad bɛda fãa rẽnna." 
Ezekiel16:31 F sẽn me f geerã la f maneg f zĩig so-palempaasẽ wã, f pa yaas n bao f yaood wa yoaadb a taab ye." 
Ezekiel16:32 F maana wa pʋg-yoodr sẽn bas a sɩda n baood sãamba. 
Ezekiel16:33 Pʋg-yoaadb a taaba fãa reegda b yaoodo. La foo, yaa foo n wa ne kũuni n kõ f roelle, fo n yao ra-sãmba tɩ b yi zĩig zãng n wa yo ne foo." 
Ezekiel16:34 Fo ka maan wa pʋg-yoaadb a taaba ye. Ned da ka baood-fo, ned da ka kõt-f ligd ye, yaa foo n da yaood. Yɛla ra lebga lɛbla." 
Ezekiel16:35 Be neere, pʋg-yoaada, kelg Soaala-Wẽnd gomde." 
Ezekiel16:36 Kelg m sẽn na n yeel-fo: f yooba wakatã, f yalsa f zaala n ning f meng yãnde, f wẽn-yaalsa taoore. Bãmb yĩnga f tol n daaga f kamb zɩɩm, n tol dɩk-ba n kʋ maoongo." 
Ezekiel16:37 Rẽ fãa yĩnga m na n tigsa ra-sãmba fo sẽn noog b rãmb sũuri, fo sẽn nong b rãmba wala fo sẽn kisg b rãmba fãa, tɩ b kaoog zabr ne-fo. M sã n paam tɩ b yi zĩig zãng n wa, m na yees f futa bãmb taoore, f na yals f zaal b taoore tɩ b get-f." 
Ezekiel16:38 Pʋg yoaadbã la sẽn daagd b zɩɩm sɩbgre la m na n sɩbg-fo. F yĩnga na n bola zɩɩm tɩ m na puuga m sũuri ne foo, tɩ m na n doka m sũuri." 
Ezekiel16:39 M na n bas-f-la f roellsa nusẽ. B na saa n sirg geer fãa f sẽn da me. B na n yeesa f futã, n loog ne f fan-teedã, la b bas-f f zaala." 
Ezekiel16:40 Rẽ poore m na n pirsa zãma wã tɩ b lob f kuga, n bees-f ne sʋʋse;" 
Ezekiel16:41 b na n yõoga f rota bugum, b na n sɩbg-f lame wa b sẽn kao bʋʋdã n yet tɩ b sɩbg-f sɩbgr ningã, la na n yɩɩ pagb ka tɛk taoore; m na n kɩt tɩ f yooba yãend a tɛka, la f kõn le yao ned ligd ye." 
Ezekiel16:42 M na n basa m sũura t'a fudg n waag-fo la m sũ-kiira na sɛ, m sũura na bʋke, m sũura na sigi." 
Ezekiel16:43 La ade, fo sẽn ka tẽeg f yãadmẽ wakatã, tɩ f tʋʋmde yaa f na bao m noora balã, mam me na n kɩtame tɩ f manesma fãa taale lʋɩ f zugu.› Yaa maam, Soaala-Wẽnde, n yeele. Bãng tɩ f wẽn-naandsa waoogre waa n naaga ne tʋʋm yoodo, ne wɩɩbdo.»" 
Ezekiel16:44 Soaala paasame: «Zerizalɛɛm, ad yelbũn-kɩta sẽn na n naan yelbũnd ning f poorẽ: ‹Ma zʋgo, biig zʋgo!›" 
Ezekiel16:45 Ade, fo sɩd yaa f ma biiga, ma ning sẽn da kis a sɩda la a kambã! Fo kẽem dãmba kisga b sɩdba la b kamba. F ma ra yaa Ititga tɩ f ba ya Amoritga." 
Ezekiel16:46 F kẽem yaa Samari, yẽ n be nug goabg ne a tẽn-peelem. F yao wã yaa Sodom, yẽ n be ritgã ne a tẽn-peelem." 
Ezekiel16:47 Ka sek tɩ f rɩk bãmb manesema, la b tʋʋm yooda ye. Fo rẽnna n sɩd tɩ zʋʋg ne wẽnem." 
Ezekiel16:48 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, m yetame tɩ f yao, a Sodom, ne a tẽn-peelma ka tõog n tʋm tʋʋm wẽnse wa foo ne f tẽn-toosa ye." 
Ezekiel16:49 Ad-a Sodom f yao wã, yel-wẽna: a zẽk-m-mengã, a yão-beoogã, a ka mi zĩ n bʋʋd beoogã, a ka mi naong rãmb yaoogrã, a ka mi ka neng rãmb kollgã." 
Ezekiel16:50 B lebga zẽk-m-meng rãmba n tol n wɩɩb mam taoore. M ka tõe n sak rẽ ye la rẽ yĩng la m menes-b tẽng zugu, wala f sẽn mi." 
Ezekiel16:51 Sã n ya Samari, yẽ pa tol n maan fo yel-wẽna pʋɩ-sʋk ye. Fo maana wɩɩbd n bãge n yɩɩd yẽnda. F kẽema ne f yao wã, a Samari ne a Sodom, pa tar b toorẽ yelle, b sã n mak-b ne foom." 
Ezekiel16:52 Ad-f na n deega yãnda marsã. Fo kɩtame tɩ bãmb zug le rooge tɩ fo wẽnema yɩɩg bãmb dẽnna al zĩig sẽn zãre. Fo taoore bãmb ket n wẽnda nin-sõma. Taa foom marsã tɩ f na n deeg yãnde la paoore. Foo la sɩbgra tog ne, tɩ bãmb ya ka tar yell dãmba." 
Ezekiel16:53 M na manega tẽn-bãmba. M na manega Sodom ne a tẽn-toosã, n maneg Samari ne a tẽn-toosã. M na yaool marsã n wa ges fo me yelle n maneg-f wala bãmba." 
Ezekiel16:54 F yao wã la f kẽema sũur na maage f sẽn paam yãnda yĩnga. 
Ezekiel16:55 A Sodom, a Samari ne b tẽn-toosa na n le paama b pĩnd naare. Wat n yɩɩ boto me ne foo la f tẽn-toose." 
Ezekiel16:56 F sẽn waa n pẽgd f menga wakato, f ra paoogda Sodom." 
Ezekiel16:57 Dẽ tɩ b ra nan ka luk a bãong ye. Taa-foo marsã tɩ f reeg Edomitsa ne b tẽn-toosa tʋʋr la b paoore, tɩ f reeg Filisti rãmb tʋʋr la b paoore sẽn yit goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel16:58 Fo na n yao-la f tʋʋm dẽgdã la f wɩɩbdã. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete." 
Ezekiel16:59 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn le yetẽ: ‹Fo pa tẽeg f sẽn da pʋlma n sãam zooda sẽn da yõgã. Dẽ me la kãab beedã f sẽn da pa tẽedã lʋɩ f zugu." 
Ezekiel16:60 Mam yẽ na n le tẽeg zood ninga m sẽn da yõg ne foom, rẽ tɩ f paoodã; m na n tedg-a lame t'a lebg zood sẽn kõn sãam abada." 
Ezekiel16:61 Sã n ya foom, f na le tẽeg f manesma tɩ yãnd yõk fo, f sã n le wa reegd sãando f kẽem dãmba f yaopa zagsẽ. M na n le rɩk-b lame n kõ foo wala f kamba, tõnd zooda yõod bala la b pa na n naag n dɩ." 
Ezekiel16:62 M na n le maneg n yõg zõoda ne foom, la woto f na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel16:63 Woto wã f na tẽeg f pĩnd vɩɩma tɩ yãnd yõk-fo. La yãnd yĩnga f kõn tõog n yaag f noore m sã n wa kõ f beegra fãa sugr ye.› Yaa Soaala gomde.» 
Ezekiel17:1 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg taa maam: 
Ezekiel17:2 «Ninsaal biiga, bao yelbũndi n tão Israyɛl kamba. Kõ-b kibare," 
Ezekiel17:3 la wilg-ba tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n tãood-b solemde. Ad solemdã. Sɩl-kẽenga, sɩlg ne pɩgs sẽn yalme, sɩlg sẽn labs waare, t'a kõbdã ya pẽrem-pẽrem, n wa Libã tẽnga, n sig tɩ kãseng a ye zug tẽnsʋka." 
Ezekiel17:4 Sɩlga kʋʋga will ning sẽn da luga n yɩɩd a taabã n tall n loog a tẽngẽ, toandb tẽnga, n wa tɩ bas-a lɛɛbdb tẽngẽ." 
Ezekiel17:5 A yaoolame n dɩk tẽn-kãng tɩɩg bulli n tɩ maneg zĩiga n bʋd-a, kʋɩl-kãseng noore." 
Ezekiel17:6 La bulla tobame n lebg bugsuntung buud sẽn wesd la yɛdgd tẽnga. Bugsuntunga wil ra tãoodame n teesd sɩlgã, la yẽ maasmẽ la a ra sut a yẽgna. Bugsuntunga wesame, a tãoo vãad, n tão wila." 
Ezekiel17:7 Bãng-y tɩ sɩl-kẽeng a to me n wa. A pɩgsa ra yaa bɛd-bɛda t'a kõbda ya zʋʋ. Bãng-y tɩ bugsuntunga wẽnemda tao-tao n tees sɩl-kãnga, n kos t'a zãgs-a koom, n zãgs a wila wala a yẽgna. Mik a sẽn tar tãoobo a waa n londga toaaga." 
Ezekiel17:8 B yaool n da sel-a-la kʋɩl-kãseng noore la a pʋʋga ra sakda koodo t'a ra togẽ n wese la a wom biisi, la a yɩ bugsuntung sõng menga." 
Ezekiel17:9 Sokre la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sokda: Na yɩ sɩda, bugsuntunga na tõog n wom biis n yɩɩge? Pipi sɩlga ka na n pãs a yẽgna, la a fãs a biisã la a kʋɩɩs a vã-miinim, la a võ a yẽgna tɩ pa tũ ne toogo, tɩ pa tũ ne neb kʋʋng sõngre bɩ?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Bugsuntunga keta pʋʋg pʋga, yaa sɩda, la a kõn tõog n wom ye. Yaang sobgã sã n yiki, a kõn kʋɩ zãng sɩda? Ad-y zĩig ninga a sẽn da rat n yɛdgã la a na n wẽneg n kʋɩ.»" 
Ezekiel17:11 Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga taa maam: 
Ezekiel17:12 «Sok nin-bãmba sẽn ya tõatbã n gese b ka wʋmd solemda võore. Ade, Babilon dĩma kẽ Zerizalɛɛm. A yõka Zerizalɛɛm dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba n tall n loog a tẽngẽ." 
Ezekiel17:13 A baoo rĩm-biig a ye n yõg zood ne-a, n modg-a t'a kãabe tɩ b zĩnen-taar na yɩ noogo. Rẽ t'a yõga tẽngã nin-bẽdã n zãage." 
Ezekiel17:14 A maana woto tɩ tẽnga rãmb pãng woog tɩ b ra wa tʋlg n zẽk b zug ye, n kell n yɩ sakdba." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ad-y nin-kãng yik n yeelame t'a kõn sak tɩ ned a to soog a tẽng ye. Woto a tʋma neb Ezipt tẽnga tɩ b tɩ bao wiidi la b bao tãb-biis wʋsgo sẽn na n wa sõng-a n zabe. Woto na tõoge? Ned ninga sẽn maana woto wã na tõoge n yiis a meng yellẽ? A sãama zoodã n geend t'a na tõoge? 
Ezekiel17:16 M wẽend ne m menga, Soaala-Wẽnd n yete: ‹Yaa naab ninga sẽn kõ a yẽ naamã tẽngẽ la a na n ki, yẽ sẽn ka pids a sẽn kãabã, la a sãam zooda. Yaa na-kãng tẽngẽ la a na n ki, yaa Babilon tẽn-peelma pʋgẽ la a na n ki." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ezipt dĩma ne a tãb-biisã, a tãb-biis ka tɛka, kõn tõoge n zab n fãag-a Babilon dĩma nugẽ ye. Babilon dĩma na n wa sama tãndo la a tuk bok n gilg Zerizalɛɛm la a na n paam n kʋʋ neb ka tɛka." 
Ezekiel17:18 Rĩm paalga sẽn pa sakã, n maan wa a toog ka wã, n ka pids a sẽn kãabã, a bãng t'a sãama a meng yelle.›" 
Ezekiel17:19 Dɩlla ya woto la maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Wẽnd vɩɩga gomda: ‹Israyɛl dĩma zãgsame t'a kõn pids a sẽn da kãab-m bũmb ninga ye. Bãng-y t'a na reeg a sɩbgre." 
Ezekiel17:20 M na n bẽd-a lame n yõk-a ne bẽdgo, m tall-a n kẽng Babilon tẽnga n tɩ sɩbg-a, a sẽn ka pids a kãabgã ne maama yĩnga." 
Ezekiel17:21 A tãb-biisã, a gãndaada fãa, sʋʋg n na n kʋ-ba la sẽn põs-ba, m na sẽeg-b zĩis fãa.› Woto la b bãngda, tɩ maam n gome, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel17:22 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga: ‹M na n yãka tɩ-kãsenga zugẽ will poll a ye n sel-a m toore, tãn-lug-lug zugu." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israyɛl tãn-lug-lug a ye zug la m na n sel-a. A na n tobame n yɩ tɩ-kãsenga, n wom biisi, n lebg tɩ-neere. Luiili wã buuda toor-toore, na n wa ninga b tʋgdo a maasmẽ." 
Ezekiel17:24 La weooga tɩɩs fãa na bãnge tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, n tõe n lub tɩ-kẽenga la m kɩt tɩ tɩ-bil tobe, maam n tõe n kʋɩɩs tɩɩg me vãado, la m kɩt tɩ tɩ-koɛɛng tobe. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gome la m na pids m sẽn yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel18:1 Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛgã taa maam n yetẽ: 
Ezekiel18:2 «Bõe yĩng la yãmb ket n wẽed yelbũnd kãnga Israyɛl soolma pʋgẽ: Ba rãmba wãba sib kãse tɩ kamb yẽn deeg n zãabdẽ. 
Ezekiel18:3 Ad-y maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, n wilgd-y tɩ b kõn le wẽ yelbũnd kãnga Israyɛl tẽng ye." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ade, yõor fãa yaa maam n so: ba rẽnna, biig rẽnna. Sẽn maana yel-wẽnde, yẽ bal yõore n yãkde." 
Ezekiel18:5 D dɩk makre: nin-kãnga yaa nin-tɩrga, n tũud sɩd la zemsgo." 
Ezekiel18:6 A ka rɩt maanda rɩɩb tãmsa zut ye; a toog ka be ne Israyɛl wẽn-naandsã, a bõn-dẽgdã ye; a ka baood a to paga, la a yõgda a menga a pag kiuug wakato." 
Ezekiel18:7 A kẽes tʋʋmde, a na yao; a kõn dɩk a to bũmb ye; ned sã n bobl-a bũmbu, a lebsda a soaba; kom sã n tar neda a kõt-a-la rɩɩbo, la a yeelgda sẽn kẽnd-a a bɩlgemde." 
Ezekiel18:8 A ka pengd ligdi n na n dok yõodo ne zãmb ye; a pʋs n ka rat kegre baa bilfu, n bʋʋd bʋʋd tɩrse; a togsda-sɩda." 
Ezekiel18:9 A reegda m noya la a gũusda a meng ne mam sẽn kisi, a tʋʋm yaa pʋ-peelem tʋʋma. Ade, maam a Naaba-Wẽnde, m yetame tɩ ned a woto buud sɩd yaa nin-tɩrga la a na vɩɩnde." 
Ezekiel18:10 D mak tɩ ned a woto buud roga bi-bɛɛga; a fãadame, a kʋʋdame, wẽng ka be a sẽn gɩdg a meng ye." 
Ezekiel18:11 A ka rɩk a ba nao, la a rʋʋda tãmsa zutu n dɩt maand dɩɩbo, bɩ n yõgd a to paga," 
Ezekiel18:12 bɩ n wẽt naong rãmba la a ka-neng rãmba, bɩ n zuud a taaba, n pa lebsd b sẽn bobl-a bũmb ning ye. A wɩɩbdame n kʋʋd wẽn-naandsa maando." 
Ezekiel18:13 A pengda ligdi n dokd yõod ne zãmbo. Ned a woto buud tog n vɩɩndame sɩda? M pa tẽed ye, t'a tʋma tʋʋm yoodo, a na n kiime la a kũuma taal lʋɩta a zugu." 
Ezekiel18:14 La d mak marsã tɩ ned a woto buud roga biiga. Biiga yãenda a ba wã sẽn tʋm tʋʋm dẽgdã la a pa saag n dɩk a ba nao ye. 
Ezekiel18:15 A ka rɩt tãmsa zutu, a toog ka ne Israyɛl wẽn-naandsã, a ka yõgd a to pag ye." 
Ezekiel18:16 A ka wẽgd a taaba, a ka reegd bobelle, a kõta kom sẽn tar a soaba a buri, a yeelgda sẽn ka tar-a fuugu." 
Ezekiel18:17 A yaa zemsg soaba, a ka pengd ligdi n dok yõod ne zãmb ye. A sakda m noya, n gɩdgda a meng ne m sẽn gɩdge. Ad-y nin-kãnga kõn ki a ba wã beegra yĩng ye. A na n vɩɩndame." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ad-y yaa a ba wã sẽn maan kegrã, n maan wagdem, la a ka maan neere m neba sʋka, ad-y yẽ n na ki, a toorẽ yel-wẽna yĩnga." 
Ezekiel18:19 Tɩ yãmb zĩ tẽngr n sokdẽ tɩ yaa bõe yĩng la ba wã yel-wẽnd ka rɩt biigã? Yaa biiga sẽn tũ sɩda la zemsgã, a reega m noya fãa n tũ-b zãnga; rẽ wã, a tog n vɩɩndame." 
Ezekiel18:20 Sẽn maan-a yel-wẽnde, yẽ soab bal n kiidi! Biig kõn deeg a ba yel-wẽnd taal a zug ye. La ba me kõn deeg biig yel-wẽnd taal a zugu ye. B na n pila nin-sõng a sõmblem fuugu, n yeelg nin-wẽng a wẽnem fuugu." 
Ezekiel18:21 Nin-wẽng sã n tuub yel-wẽn niyns fãa a sẽn maana, a sã n deegd m noya fãa la a tũud sɩd la zemsgo, a na n vɩɩndame, a kõn ki ye." 
Ezekiel18:22 B kõn leb n tẽeg a sẽn maan yel-wẽn niyns yell ye, a na vɩɩnde, a zemsg tʋʋma yĩnga." 
Ezekiel18:23 Mam yam la nin-wẽng kũum bɩ? Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m daaba yaa a bas a zʋg wẽngã la a paam n vɩɩnde." 
Ezekiel18:24 La nin-tɩrg sẽn bas burkĩndlem, n tʋm wẽnga, n dɩk nin-wẽng nao, yãmb tẽed t'a na vɩɩnd bi? M pa tẽed ye. B na yĩm tʋʋm sõma niyns a sẽn tʋma. A sẽn beege n kɩɩs noorã n maan yel-wẽndã, rẽ bal n na n wa ne a kũum." 
Ezekiel18:25 Tɩ yãmb yetẽ: ‹Ad Soaala manesma ka zems ye.› Israyɛl dãmba kelg-y wɛ. Yaa mam manesma n ka zems sɩda? Ka yãmb zʋgã n ya wẽng bi? 
Ezekiel18:26 Ad-y nin-tɩrg sã n bas zemsgo n maan yel-wẽnde tɩ rẽ wa ne a kũum, yaa yel-wẽndã a sẽn maana yĩng la a ki yã." 
Ezekiel18:27 La nin-vẽng sã n bas wẽng sore n tũ sɩda la zemsgo, yẽ togame n vɩɩnde." 
Ezekiel18:28 A sẽn tuub a yel-wẽna fãa a sẽn maana, ya tɩlɛ t'a vɩɩnde, a kõn ki ye." 
Ezekiel18:29 Dẽ la a Israyɛl roog rãmba zĩ tɩ Soaal manesmã n ka zemse. Israyɛl dãmba, yaa mam manesmã n ka zems sɩda? Ka yãmb zʋgã n ya wẽng bi?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Israyɛl roog rãmba, yaa rẽ la m na n bʋ ned kam fãa n zems a manesem. Maam n togsd boto, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. Teem-y zʋgo la y tuub y yel-wẽna fãa, modg-y tɩ yel-wẽnd ba a ye ra wa ne y kũum ye." 
Ezekiel18:31 Fugumd-y yel-wẽn niyns fãa y sẽn maana, la bao-y sũ-paalle la yam paalle. Bõe tɩ f rat kũum, Israyɛl roogo?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ned ba a ye kũum ka noogd m sũur ye. Zãag-y y meng ne wẽng la y vɩɩnde. Yaa maam a Wẽnd n togsd rẽnna.» 
Ezekiel19:1 Soaala yeela maam tɩ m pʋd yɩɩn-kãnga n yãb Israyɛl dĩm dãmbã: 
Ezekiel19:2 Yãmb ma wã yɩɩ bõnyẽ-yãanga; a yii gɩgem-neeba buudẽ. A ra gãee a kamba sʋka n kõt-b rɩɩbo. 
Ezekiel19:3 A wuba a biig a ye t'a wa lebg polle n lebg gɩgemd sẽn nong a menga n zãms-a a rɩɩb sɩɩgre, n tol n yõgd ninsaalba." 
Ezekiel19:4 Bu-zẽmba wʋmame tɩ b gomd a yelle tɩ wa bẽd-a n yõke la b sẽb-a lame n tees Ezipt. 
Ezekiel19:5 A ma wã yaasame n gũ n wa bas saagre t'a na n dɩk a biig a to n wub-a t'a lebg pãng a nare. 
Ezekiel19:6 A sɩd vɩɩnda ne bõnyẽesã n wa lebg gɩgemd sẽn nong a menga. Yẽ me zãmsa a rɩɩb sɩɩgre la a yõga ninsaalba. 
Ezekiel19:7 A tɩ wãa tẽns niyns sẽn tõe n zabe n fãag b mense la tẽns a taabã. Tẽnga rãmb da yɛɛsdame b sã n wʋm a kɛlenga. 
Ezekiel19:8 Bu-zẽmba yii zĩis ka tɛka n wa tak zabr ne-a. B gãnega b bẽdgo n gũbg-a la b paam n yõk-a lame. 
Ezekiel19:9 B ta-a-la ne bãn-kõse n tɩ kɩs Babilon dĩma. B pag-a-la roogo, b ra pa rat n le wʋm a yãbrã Israyɛl tãmsa zut ye." 
Ezekiel19:10 Yãmb ma wã ra wẽnda bugsuntungu bugsuntung sẽn sel koom noore. A ra zɩsga ne vãad la biisi a sẽn da paamd kooma wʋsg yĩnga. 
Ezekiel19:11 A toba a wil neeba la wil bãmb n lebg naam dasaba. Bugsuntunga tẽeme n kul yĩngri n wa tɩ zʋʋg tɩɩsã. B ra pẽgda a wila tãoobo, n da pẽgd b sõora sẽn labsã." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ade, b võog-a lame n võog-a ne sũ-puuri n gãneg tẽnga. Yaang sobga waa n kʋɩɩsa a biisã, la b fãa sʋʋgame. A wil neeba me kʋɩɩme tɩ bugum wa rɩ-ba." 
Ezekiel19:13 B tall-a lame n tɩ sel we-raoogẽ, weoog sẽn kʋɩ n ka yãet saag ye." 
Ezekiel19:14 Bugum yi-la a sɛɛgẽ n dɩ a wila la a biisã. Bugsuntunga ka le tar wil neere sẽn tõe n lebg naam dasaar ye. Bɩ d dɩk yɩɩn-kãnga n yɩɩl d bugsuntunga kʋʋre! 
Ezekiel20:1 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd a yopoe soaba, kiuug a nu soaba, kiuuga piig daare, a Israyɛl nin-kẽems kẽer wa m taoore n bõs Wẽnd vẽnegre." 
Ezekiel20:2 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam woto: 
Ezekiel20:3 «Ezekiyɛl, togs Israyɛl kamba maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yet tɩ f taas-ba: ‹Yãmb waa n sokame n na n bãng m daabo la ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba sẽn leokde: m kõn bas-y tɩ y sok-m ye!›" 
Ezekiel20:4 Foo, Ezekiyɛl, foo n na n kao b bʋʋdo, la ra zãgs b bʋʋda kaoob ye. Sõng tɩ b tẽeg b ba rãmba wɩɩbda zãnga." 
Ezekiel20:5 Taas-b koees niyns maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leokdã: ‹M sẽn waa n yãk a Israyɛl, yɩɩ buuda fãa taoor la m wẽen yã. M lika m meng bãmb Ezipt tẽnga la m wẽename tɩ m na yɩɩ bãmb Soaal la b Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel20:6 Baraare, m zẽka m nug n wẽen tɩ b na yi Ezipt tẽnga n tɩ kẽ tẽng ning m sẽn da yãk n bĩng-ba; tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo, tẽng sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩd tẽns a taaba." 
Ezekiel20:7 M yeel-b lame: zãag-y y meng ne bũmb niyns fãa gesg yamleoog sẽn tar yã. Da rẽgem-y y mens ne Ezipt wẽnd-naandsa ye, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la yãmb Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel20:8 La b yika zabre ne maam, n pa le tʋlg n kelg m ye. Ba a ye ka bas bũmb niyns yãeeb yamleoog sẽn da tar-a ye. B ka zãag b mens ne Ezipt wẽnd-naandsa ye, tɩ m da yet tɩ m na bas m sũura t'a fudg n waag-ba, tɩ m na bas m sũ-puura t'a rɩ-b Ezipt tẽng menga." 
Ezekiel20:9 La m gesa m yʋʋra sõmblem, n pa tʋlg tɩ b sãam-a bu-zẽmba sʋk ye. M da zoe n gomame tɩ bu-zẽmba wʋm, tɩ m na n yiis-b-la Ezipt tẽnga." 
Ezekiel20:10 Ya rẽ yĩng la m sẽn yiis-b Ezipt n tall-ba n kẽng zĩ-peen-daagẽ. 
Ezekiel20:11 M kõ-b-la m noya, m wilg-b-la sor ning b sẽn tog n tũ n paam n vɩɩnde wa m noya sẽn date." 
Ezekiel20:12 M tol n kõ-b-la vʋʋsg raare tɩ yɩ b kaseto, maam ne bãmb sʋka, tɩ b bãng tɩ maam n wat ne sõmblem." 
Ezekiel20:13 La a Israyɛl rooga yika ne maam zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã. B ka tũ m noya ye. B sãbs-b lame la bãmb deegre n yaool n da wat ne vɩɩm. B sãama m sũur wʋsgo n ka tũ vʋʋsga raar noya ye. M yeelame tɩ m na n basa m sũ-puurã t'a fudg n waag-ba, zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã tɩ b ki zãnga." 
Ezekiel20:14 La m gesa m yʋʋra sõmblem, m pa tʋlg t'a sãam bu-zẽmb sʋk ye tɩ b bãngame tɩ maam n yiis-b Ezipt tẽnga." 
Ezekiel20:15 Yɩɩd rẽ, m wa n kong n zẽka m nug we-raoogẽ wã n wẽen tɩ m kõn tall-ba n kẽes b tẽngẽ ye, tẽng ning m sẽn da bao b yĩngã, tẽng sẽn bund bĩisim la sɩɩdo, tẽng sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩd a taab fãa." 
Ezekiel20:16 Bãng-y tɩ m sẽn wẽen woto wã yaa b sẽn zãgs tɩ b kõn deeg m noya, n zãgs n tũud soy niyns m sẽn gɩdge, n zãgs vʋʋsga raar noora reegre, b yama sẽn da kẽ b wẽn-naandsa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel20:17 La m zoe-la b nimbãanega n pa tʋlg n sãam-b ye la m sɩd ka menes-b zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã ye. 
Ezekiel20:18 M yeela b kamba zĩ-peen-daagẽ wã: Da tũ-y y ba rãmb nao ye. Da tũ-y b manesma ye, da rẽgem-y y mens ne b rẽgdã, ne b wẽn-naandsa ye." 
Ezekiel20:19 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la yãmb Wẽnnaam! Tũ-y m noya, deeg-y dog-n-mik ning m sẽn kõ yã la y tũ-a." 
Ezekiel20:20 Deeg-y m kibs-ramba noya, tɩ b yɩ kaset, maam ne yãmb sʋka, n wilg tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, la yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kamba me yika ne maam, b pa reeg m noya ye, b pa tũ dog-n-mika ye, b pa tũ soy niyns sẽn wat ne vɩɩm ye, b raaga vʋʋsga raar noor n base la m me yeelame tɩ m na n bas m sũ-puurã t'a fudg n waag-b zĩ-peen-daagẽ." 
Ezekiel20:22 La m tar n leba poorẽ, m gesa m yʋʋra sõmblem n pa tʋlg n sãam m sẽn da yiis b rãmb Ezipt tẽng tɩ bu-zẽmba zĩi n getẽ wã ye." 
Ezekiel20:23 M le zẽka m nug zĩ-peen-daagẽ n wẽen tɩ m na n sẽeg-b-la bu-zẽn-dãmb sʋka. 
Ezekiel20:24 B ra ka tũ rog-n-mika ye, b ra zãgsa m noya n bas vʋʋsga raare n pʋgd b ba rãmba wẽn-naandse." 
Ezekiel20:25 B tol n tagsame tɩ m kõ-b-la noya sẽn pa sõmbe la rog-n-mikã sẽn pa kõt vɩɩm. 
Ezekiel20:26 M basame tɩ b rẽgem b mens ne kũun niyns b sẽn kõt b wẽn-naandsã, n bas b tɩ b kood b kom-rẽemsã fãa. La rẽ yɩɩ sẽn na n yɩlẽ tɩ b yama waa n laka ne b mense, la b bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.›" 
Ezekiel20:27 Yaa rẽnd yĩnga, la m yet-fo, Ezekiyɛl, taas a Israyɛl roogo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, koeesã. Y ba rãmba sẽn le beeg-m ne bũmb ninga, yaa b sẽn ka sak n pa m nonglma pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel20:28 M da tall-b lame n taas tẽng ning m sẽn da kãab tɩ m na n kõ-b lame. Beelẽ b yãenda kunkuba zutu tɩɩs sẽn tar maasem tɩ b rʋ n sɩng b maanda kʋʋbo. B yika m sũuri ne b sẽn yiis kũun niyns n kõ wẽn-naandsã. B rɩgla maand sẽn tũnug ne b kũuni, ne tɩdare sẽn tar yũ-noogo n maagd sũuri, n paas rãam." 
Ezekiel20:29 Dẽ la m sok-ba: ‹Y kũud n na n tɩ rooga yɛ?› Tɩ b leoke tɩ kunkuba zutu. Dẽ la b ket n boond ne rũnna tɩ Bama, waoogr zĩisi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Sẽn ya woto wã, taas a Israyɛl doogã, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leok bũmb ning yell kãnga poorẽ. Yãmb yɩ-la a wãna n dɩk y yaab rãmb nao, n dẽgemd y mense ne b rẽgdã, ne b wẽn-naandsa waoogre n yaool n lakd n basd maam?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ba ne rũnna yãmb ket n pʋgda b wẽn-naandsã n dẽgemd y menga ne y kũuni, ne y kamb kʋʋbo. Yãmb yɩta a wãna, Israyɛl kamba, n tẽed tɩ m na bas tɩ y sok-ma?" 
Ezekiel20:32 Yãmb ninga y memg yamẽ tɩ y tõeeme, wa bu-zẽmbã, n waoogd tɩɩse la kuga tɩ m sĩnda. Ad-y rẽ ka tõe ye!" 
Ezekiel20:33 Maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, m na n tʋma m pãn-tʋʋma; m na n basa m sũura t'a fudg n waal yã tɩ m kell n tõog n dɩ naam y zutu." 
Ezekiel20:34 M na yiis-y-la bu-zẽmba sʋka, n yiis-y m sẽn da sẽeg-y zĩis niynsã. M na puuga m sũuri la m wilg m pãnga n tigs-y zĩ yɛnga." 
Ezekiel20:35 M na n tall-y lame n kẽng we-raoogẽ, n zãag-y ne buud a taaba la m na bool-y-la bʋʋdo." 
Ezekiel20:36 Wala m sẽn paalg y ba rãmba bʋʋdo Ezipt we-raoogẽ, woto m na paalg yãmb me. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto." 
Ezekiel20:37 M na modg-y n kẽes m bãgrẽ, tɩ y tũ d sẽn sed ne taabã." 
Ezekiel20:38 M na n kẽe yãmb sʋka la m na n sʋkame n bas kɛɛnga sẽn zẽk b zut ne maam la sẽn tõdg-b maama. M na n yiis-b-la b sẽn be zĩig ning marsã wã la b kõn leb Israyɛl tẽng ye. La woto y na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel20:39 Ad beoog yella sẽn na n yɩ a soaba tɩ m wilgd-y, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. Ned kam fãa tõe n pʋga a rẽgdo, a wẽn-naandse, la m wẽend tɩ wakat n wate, y na kelg-ma, y kõn le sãam m yʋʋr sẽn ya sõngã ne maandã la y wẽnd-naandsã pʋgb ye." 
Ezekiel20:40 Yaa m tãn-sõnga zugu, tãn-woka zugu la a Israyɛl na wa waoog-ma. Yaa be la m na n deeg-y ne sũ-noogo la m kos-y tɩ y wa ne y sẽn segl m yĩnga la sẽn ya sõng zãngã, y maanda ne b sẽn tũnugd bũmb ningã." 
Ezekiel20:41 M na reeg-y wa tɩdar yũ-noogo sẽn maagd sũuri, y sã n wa yi bu-zẽmba sʋka. Y sã n wa paam tɩ m bool-y n tigs zĩ-yɛnga. Woto neba na yãend m sẽn zãad-y to-to la b na bãng tɩ maam la Nin-Sõngo, yãmb Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel20:42 Yãmb me na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, m sã n wa taas yã a Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, tẽng ning m sẽn da kãab y yaab rãmba." 
Ezekiel20:43 Beelẽ y na tags y vɩɩma sẽn yɩ a soab pĩnda. La y sã n tags bũmb ning sẽn da rẽgemd yãmbã, y sũura na yaale ne y menga, y tʋʋm wẽna yĩnga." 
Ezekiel20:44 La y na bãnge, Israyɛl roogo, tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, m sã n zoe m yʋʋr sãoongo n ka sɩbg-y wala y wẽnema sẽn da tog ne a soabã, wala y vɩɩm yookã sẽn da tog ne a sobã. Yaa woto la m da tar n na n wilg yã, maam, y Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel21:1 Naaba-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: 
Ezekiel21:2 «Wẽnemd f ritgo, ninsaal biiga, gom ne ritg rãmba, gom ne Negɛb tʋgrẽ dãmba." 
Ezekiel21:3 Yeel-b tɩ b kelg koɛɛgã maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn togsd googa poorẽ. M na n yõgna bugum sẽn na n dɩ tɩɩsa fãa, maas bɩ koeemse. Bũmb kõn tõog n kiis bug-kãng ye. A na n yii rɩtgo n ta goabga la a na n dɩɩ fãa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ninsaal fãa na bãnge tɩ yaa maam Naaba-Wẽnd n ning bugma la ned kõn tõog n kiis-a ye.» 
Ezekiel21:5 La m yeelame: «Naaba-Wẽnde, ad-y b zoe n wɩta maam n yet tɩ m gomda ne yelbũna.»" 
Ezekiel21:6 Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd na n leoke: 
Ezekiel21:7 «Ezekiyɛl, tees f neng Zerizalɛɛm, gom wẽnd dooga poorẽ, gom Israyɛl tẽn-tõra poorẽ." 
Ezekiel21:8 Yeel-b tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet woto: ‹M na n yika ne yãmba m na n wõoga m sʋʋga, n kʋ-y zãnga, nin-sõng la yel-maanda." 
Ezekiel21:9 Yaa nin-sõng la yel-maand menesg yĩnga la m sʋʋga wõog yã. A wõoga nin-vɩɩg fãa yĩnga, Goabga rãmba wala rɩtg rãmba yĩnga." 
Ezekiel21:10 Neba fãa na bãnge tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n wõog m sʋʋga. M kõn lebs-a a wʋʋgẽ ye.›" 
Ezekiel21:11 La sã n ya foom, Ezekiyɛl, zõond ne sũ-sãanga, n waas b fãa taoore." 
Ezekiel21:12 La b sã n sok tɩ yaa bõe tɩ f waasdẽ, f na leoke: ‹Kibar n na n wa, la sũur fãa na n kiuusame, nug na n digame, tɩ yam bondge, tɩ rũmd sao kalwaare. La ade yella taa-d lame n sɛ. Soaala-Wẽnd n yete.› »" 
Ezekiel21:13 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne m woto: 
Ezekiel21:14 «Adem biiga, gom bãngr goama, taas ninsaalba maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn togsde. Ad sʋʋga, sʋʋg sẽn saas n le saase." 
Ezekiel21:15 A saasa vargr yĩnga, a saasame n yãgd wa saag sʋʋga;" 
Ezekiel21:16 Maam n yet tɩ b saas-a tɩ ned wa rɩk-a n yulumnẽ. B saas-a lame t'a yãgda n na n ning-a nin-kʋʋd nugẽ. 
Ezekiel21:17 Kelme, wiisi, Adem biiga, tɩ b saas-a-la mam buuda yĩnga, a saasa Israyɛl dĩm-biisa yĩnga, tɩ bãmb me na n naagame n ki. Dẽ yĩnga, toomd f yãoogo, da tẽ põasg ye." 
Ezekiel21:18 Yella na n yɩɩ toogo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete." 
Ezekiel21:19 Foom, Adem biiga, gom bãngr goama, pãb nug pogse, pãb n yɩlem naoor a yi, naoor a tã. Sʋʋga yaa tẽn-kũum sʋʋga, zãngoeoog sẽn lubd goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel21:20 A loogda ne ned kam fãa sũ-keelem sẽn yãend-a ka le mi a sẽn kẽedẽ ye. M dɩgl-a-la doog fãa noore, t'a rɩg n yãgd wa saag sʋʋga n gũud n na n kʋ bala." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kɛ rɩtgo, kɛ goabga, sʋ-rɩtga, kõs f sẽn teesẽ fãa!" 
Ezekiel21:22 Maam me, m na n wẽe nug pogse, m yaa n doka m sũuri. Yaa maam n gomde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel21:23 Naaba-Wẽnd gomame n yeel-ma: 
Ezekiel21:24 «Adem biiga, tuk soy a yiibu n kõ Babilon dĩma. Yaa soy bãmb la Babilon dĩma na n dɩke n wa ne a sʋʋgã. Soya yita tẽng a ye. Ning makre sor fãa sɩngrẽ n wilg a sẽn dabd tẽng ninga." 
Ezekiel21:25 Sor a ye na n talla Babilon tãb-biisã n tees Raba, Amonitsa tẽngẽ. Sora a to wã rigda Zerizalɛɛm, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezekiel21:26 Babilon dĩma na n taa soya sẽn welgd taaba zĩigẽ, n bug bãgre. A na n zugsa a loko, n sok wẽn-naandse, n sok rũmsa sãoore." 
Ezekiel21:27 Pĩim ninga sẽn na n sãam Zerizalɛɛma la a wõog ne a nug rɩtgo n tees Zerizalɛɛm la a tãsd a zabr tãsga. A yalsa zab-teedo, ra-bɛd sẽn tar n tãad lalse, n tedg-b ne tẽnga kʋɩlense la a sɩng tãnd sambo la a tuud bok n gilgd tẽngã." 
Ezekiel21:28 Zerizalɛɛm dãmb da tẽedame tɩ bagra yaa mams tɩ seg bala la bũmb kõn maane, tɩ Wẽnd wẽeneg lʋɩɩ sʋka. Dẽ la Babilon dĩma tẽegd-b tɩ b pa tũ Soaala-Wẽnd wa b sẽn da rat ye la rẽnd yĩnga b na n tall-b lame n kẽng yembdo." 
Ezekiel21:29 Yaa rẽnd yĩnga la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, ye-y woto: ‹Y maaname tɩ m tar y yell tẽegre, wakat buud fãa, n tẽegd tɩ y zãgs-m-la vẽenega la y beeg-m-la ne tʋʋm wẽn ka tɛka. Y sẽn pa sak tɩ m yĩm y yellã, m na teel-y n taas y bɛɛba!›" 
Ezekiel21:30 Sã n ya foom yẽ, Israyɛl dĩma, fo yaa nin-wẽnga la zãmb soaba. M yãka raare sẽn ya fo wẽnema sɛɛb raare." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ad-m sẽn yete maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹B na deega sẽn wilgd tɩ f yaa rĩma, b na n fõka f pugla. Yɛla teemame. Sulg-m-meng rãmb la b na n zẽke la b sik pãng rãmba." 
Ezekiel21:32 Raboogo n paas raboogo, yaa rẽ la m na n wa ne Zerizalɛɛm. Tẽnga na n wãa zãnga la rẽnd ned a ye reng n wa. M na n kõo nin-kãng tõog t'a yik zabr ne-a.› »" 
Ezekiel21:33 Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «La foo, Ezekiyɛl, taas Amonitsa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leokd bãmb poorẽ, b sẽn paoogd a Israyɛl yĩnga. Yeel-ba: ‹Sʋʋg n be ka, sʋʋg sẽn tõe n lub yãmb mars-marsã bala. A saasa kɛɛb yĩnga, b saas-a lame t'a yãgd wa saag sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel21:34 Yãmb zĩime n teeg y zãmsdo, la y zirẽ-be-bagba la sʋʋga na n dogsa zutu, zãmb dãmba la tʋʋm-wẽna rãmb zutu. Sɩda, wakat taame tɩ b wẽnema sɛɛb raar na n yãke." 
Ezekiel21:35 Marsã lebs-y y sʋʋsã b wʋʋsẽ, tɩ yaa zĩig a to la m na n yik ne-yã. Yaa y sẽn yi zĩig ningã, yaa y sẽn dog tẽng ningã." 
Ezekiel21:36 M na n puuga m sũur ne-yã, la m na n waag-y-la ne m sũ-fõora bugum, n dɩk-y n bas nin-toos la a mi-wãab rãmb nusẽ." 
Ezekiel21:37 Y na lebg bugum pʋɩɩre, la y zɩɩma na raag n pʋk tẽngã. Dẽ poore ned ba a ye kõn le gom f yell ye. Dẽ me yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n leokde.› »" 
Ezekiel22:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam woto: 
Ezekiel22:2 «Ezekiyɛl, segl f menga tɩ yaa foo n na kao Zerizalɛɛm bʋʋdo, tẽng ning sẽn nong zɩɩm fõogra bʋʋdo. Modg t'a bãng t'a wɩɩbame." 
Ezekiel22:3 Taas-a maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yete: ‹Fo basdame tɩ f tẽnga rãmba kʋʋd neba. Ad-b sẽn maand woto b segenda f wãabo. B rõogda yel-yaalse, wẽn-faado, n dẽgemd f tẽnga." 
Ezekiel22:4 Zɩɩma sẽn daaga taal la f tʋk f zugu, la wẽn-naandsa peesgo me rẽgma f tẽn-peelma. Fo meng n takde n pẽnegd f menga f wãaba raare. F wãaba raar sõd n dɩgame. Yaa rẽ la m bas tɩ f lebg tẽn-zẽnsa fãa laado, dũni wã fãa laado." 
Ezekiel22:5 Fo yʋʋra sãamame, bũmb ka le kẽnd tɩrg ye. Sẽn pẽ-ba wala sẽn zãr-ba na n laa foo." 
Ezekiel22:6 Ges Israyɛl, fo pʋgẽ, rĩm-biig fãa, zʋʋgda a tõogo, tɩ kũum kʋʋda." 
Ezekiel22:7 Israyɛl pʋgẽ, biig sãbsda a ba la a ma, n namsd sãana, n yũud kɩɩb la pʋg-kõor zɩɩm." 
Ezekiel22:8 M wẽnd doog ka paamd waoogr ye, vʋʋsg raar lebga wa da-zaan-daare." 
Ezekiel22:9 F pida ne munaafɩgs sẽn daagd b taab zɩɩm. F neba rʋʋda tãmsa zutu n dɩtẽ la b wɩɩbdẽ. 
Ezekiel22:10 Kẽer yooda ne b ba paga. Pag sẽn pa yɩlg meng yãeta pãn-tõogo. 
Ezekiel22:11 Kẽer yooda ne b taab pagba, kẽer doda b bi-pagba bɩ b yaop pagba." 
Ezekiel22:12 Fo nengẽ b reegda ligd n daagd zɩɩm, fo pengda ligdi n deegd roaglse, n deegd roaglg tɩ loogdẽ. F maanda f taab pãn-tõogo, n deegd b laogo. La maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, b yĩmda maam zãnga. Yaa woto la m sẽn ne." 
Ezekiel22:13 M na n gila m nugu n tees foo, Zerizalɛɛm, f ligd baoora yĩnga la f sẽn daagd zɩɩma yĩnga." 
Ezekiel22:14 M sok n gese: M sẽn na n yik ne yãmba raare, y na paam raood la sũ-keelem n yals m taoore? Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, na pidsa m sẽn yeelã." 
Ezekiel22:15 M na sẽeg-y-la bu-zẽmb sʋka, n sẽeg-y sẽn ka y saam-biis sʋka, m paam tɩ y tʋʋm-dẽgda fãa sɛ." 
Ezekiel22:16 Y yʋʋra na n sãama buud a taaba sʋka, a kõn le yi ye. La rẽ la y reegda tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel22:17 Wẽnd gomame n wilg maam woto: 
Ezekiel22:18 «Adem biiga, ad mam nifẽ a Israyɛl buuda wẽnda kut sẽn ka yẽneg boaagẽ n ket n tar rẽgdo. A Israyɛl wẽnda kutu, zũudu, zũud wɩsbre, namdo sẽn ning boaagẽ n na n tõog n yɩlge." 
Ezekiel22:19 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, gomd woto: ‹Yãmb fãa lebga wa kut sẽn ka yɩlge, woto m na n tigs-y-la Zerizalɛɛm." 
Ezekiel22:20 Wala b sẽn sagend boaagẽ, zũudu, kutu, namdo, zũud wɩsbre, n zug-b tɩ b yẽneg, wotome m na tigs-y m sũ-puura boaagẽ n yẽneg-y zãnga." 
Ezekiel22:21 M na n tigs-y-la Zerizalɛɛm n yõog-y ne m sũ-puura bugum, n yẽneg-y wa kutu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Wala b sẽn yẽnegd wanzurf boaagẽ, wotome m na yẽneg yãmb boaagẽ; la woto y na bãng tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n waag-y ne m sũ-puur bugum.› »" 
Ezekiel22:23 Soaala-Wẽnd paasa woto: 
Ezekiel22:24 «Ninsaal biiga, yeel Israyɛl tẽnga rãmba tɩ b tẽnga wẽnda tẽng sẽn kong saaga, n kong sa-luka. M sũura na n puuga ne-ba n kʋɩɩs-b wa pʋʋg sẽn ka paamd saaga." 
Ezekiel22:25 Wala gɩgemde sẽn yãbda la a tõsd rũnga, tẽnga taoor dãmb kʋʋdame la b loogd ne b taab paoongo, la b paasd pʋg-kõap sõore." 
Ezekiel22:26 Maan-kʋʋdba tõdga m noya, n dẽgem m doogo. B ka bakd bõn-wẽng ne bõn-sõng ye; b ka wilgd bõn-dẽgd n bak ne sẽn ka rẽgd ye. B pa waoogd vʋʋsg raar ye. Woto wã ned ba a ye ka waoogd maam wala sẽn segd ye." 
Ezekiel22:27 Tẽnga taoor dãmba yũuda b neba zɩɩm wa rigd-n-yĩidsi. B kʋʋdame n na n paas b arzɛka. 
Ezekiel22:28 Tẽnga bãngdba solgda rẽ fãa n bas n gomd zirẽ-be-likri la b yet tɩ maam n yeel woto la woto tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd yaool n pa yaag m noor ye." 
Ezekiel22:29 Tẽnga neb sẽn mi yaa pãn-tõogo la fãabo. B namsda naong rãmba la nug ka-zãad rãmba. Sãamba nengẽ yaa serg la f kõ-m zĩiga. 
Ezekiel22:30 Bãmb fãa sʋka m bao ned sẽn na n yik n me lal-gũbri bɩ ned sẽn na n yik n yals lalsa sẽn wurg zĩig ningã, n zab n sõng tẽnga rãmba la a gɩdg-m tɩ m da wãa-a ye, la m pa yãend ned ye." 
Ezekiel22:31 Dẽ la m sũura fudg n waag-ba, m basame tɩ sũ-puura bugum dɩ-b zãnga. M basa b wẽnema t'a lɛɛg lʋɩ b zugu. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togsd rẽnna.»" 
Ezekiel23:1 Wẽnd goma ne m woto: 
Ezekiel23:2 «Ezekiyɛl, pagb a yiib n zĩndi, n ya ma a ye kamba." 
Ezekiel23:3 B ra ket n yaa pʋg-sɛdba la b lebga yoaadba Ezipt tẽnga. Be la b salem b yãoogo la b wẽbs b pʋg-sadem-bĩsa. 
Ezekiel23:4 Ad-b yʋy: kãsma la a Oola, yao wã, a Ooliba. Kãsma makda Samari, tɩ yao wã makd Zerizalɛɛm. M maana kãadem ne maam la b roga kom-dibli la kom-pugli n kõ-ma." 
Ezekiel23:5 A Oola maana yoodem ne a sẽn da yaa m pagã. A yo-la a yooba ne a roellse, Asʋr dãmba." 
Ezekiel23:6 Yaa tãb-biis sẽn yer n kẽnd wa saag-pag a Ninanina, n paas tẽnga kombɛɛmba, yaa kom-poala, ra-sãmb bɛɛlaa, la wed-dʋʋd mitba." 
Ezekiel23:7 A Oola yam waa n kẽe Asʋr nin-bɛdã, la a sẽn pʋg bãmbã, a pʋga b wẽn-naandsã gilli." 
Ezekiel23:8 A le sɩnga vɩɩm yoog ninga a sẽn da vɩ Ezipt tẽnga tɩ Ezipt rãmb sɩnga a gãaga la a bĩsa wẽbsgo t'a nan paooda. 
Ezekiel23:9 Yaa rẽ yĩng la m bas-a t'a lʋɩ Asʋr rãmba nugẽ, a ra-sãmba nugẽ." 
Ezekiel23:10 Bãmb bas-a-la a zaala, n loog ne a kom-dibli la a kom-pugli. B kodga yẽ menga ne sʋʋga. A yʋʋr yii pagba sʋka, a wa n lebga neba fãa kisgu." 
Ezekiel23:11 Pʋg-kãng yao, a Ooliba, nif rɩɩ dẽ fãa kaseto, la bãng-y tɩ yẽ n yɩɩg ne wẽnem a yooba pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yẽ me yam waa n kẽe Asʋr kombɛɛmba, taoor dãmba, a tãb-biis sẽn da yer fu-neeba, n dʋʋd wiidi sõmb-sõmbo, kom-poala la ra-sãmba." 
Ezekiel23:13 Yẽ me basame t'a wẽnema sãam-a zãnga. M gesame la m bãngame tɩ neb a yiiba zʋg ra yaa a ye. 
Ezekiel23:14 Bãng-y t'a Ooliba yooba n wa n tɩ zʋʋg ne wẽnem. Daar a ye a yãee b sẽn gʋl miid-miidu, lalg zugu, raop sẽn wẽnd Babilon dãmba." 
Ezekiel23:15 B ra ninga sẽbds b sɛɛgẽ, n vil b zut ne zu-vindsi. Da yaa zab-zabdb sẽn nand b menga. Sɩd da wẽnda Babilon tẽng neba Kalde tẽn-peelmẽ la b rog yã." 
Ezekiel23:16 A Ooliba sẽn yãend gʋlba bala, a yam kẽ-b lame, t'a tʋm neb Kalde tẽnga." 
Ezekiel23:17 La Babilon dãmba babs-a lame n wa gãand ne-a n dẽgem-a. La a sẽn yaal ne bãmba n tɩge, a yam laka ne-ba, lebga beem menga." 
Ezekiel23:18 La yẽ me sẽn yɩ yoaad neba fãa nifẽ, n yals a zaal neba fãa taoorã, ma me sũura wa n yaanda ne-a wala a sẽn da yaal ne a kẽema." 
Ezekiel23:19 A yooba paasame, a yooba wẽnem wa n yɩɩga a pʋg-sademdẽ rẽnna, wa n yɩɩga Ezipt rẽnna." 
Ezekiel23:20 A yama ra waa n kẽe yoaadba sẽn mi yõgbo la sẽn tar pãng wala bõeense, wala wiidi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Gese, Ooliba, fo le sɩngame n maand wala f pʋg-sademdẽ f sẽn da basd tɩ Ezipt rãmba salemd f yãoog la b wẽbsd f bĩsa." 
Ezekiel23:22 Yaa rẽ me la m yet-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m na n kɩtame tɩ f zo-rãmba yik ne-fo. Fo sẽn yɛ ne b marsã wã, m na kɩt tɩ b yi zĩig zãng n wa zab ne-fo." 
Ezekiel23:23 M na n boola Babilon dãmba, Kalde rãmba, Pekod, Soa la Koa rãmba, Asiri dãmba. M na n tigma kom-poala, ra-sãmba, kombɛɛmba la bʋ-kaoodba, zab-zabdba, neb sẽn dʋʋd wiidi sõmb-sõmbo." 
Ezekiel23:24 B na n wa taka zabr ne foo la b na n yii goabga sẽnẽ. B na n waa ne bilim-bilm, bɛd la bõonego, la tãb-biis ka tɛka. B tara gãndo la b fõgnega kut zug-peto la b na n gũbg-f lame. M na wilg-b-la fo sẽn maane la b na n bʋ-la f bʋʋdo wa sẽn zems ne bãmb me noya." 
Ezekiel23:25 M sũura sẽn puug ne foom yĩnga m na bas tɩ b maan-f pãnga. B na wõrga f yõor la f tʋba, n wa baas-f ne b sʋʋse. B na n looga ne f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli, la b na n yõoga sẽn keta bugum." 
Ezekiel23:26 B na yeesa f futu la b loog ne f fan-teedo. 
Ezekiel23:27 M na n sɛɛsa f yoobã la f saabã sẽn sɩng Ezipt tẽnga. F kõn le tʋlg ned ba a ye, f kõn le tẽeg Ezipt rãmba yell ye." 
Ezekiel23:28 Maam n yet-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m na n bas-f-la f sẽn kis b rãmba nugẽ, sẽn yaand-b fo sũur marsã wã." 
Ezekiel23:29 B ka na n zã-f neer ye, b na n looga ne f tʋʋma yõodo. B na n basa foo zaala tɩ neba fãa get-f wala b sẽn maand ne pʋg-yoaada. Yaa f wẽnema la f yoobã," 
Ezekiel23:30 n na n wa ne rẽ. Fo yoo ne tẽn-zẽng rãmba la f waooga b wẽn-dẽgdã n dẽgem f menga. 
Ezekiel23:31 Fo vɩɩma wẽnega f kẽema rẽnna. A sẽn deeg sɩbgr ninga buudu n na n yɩ f rẽnna. 
Ezekiel23:32 Woto yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n yete: F na yũ tooga wamde f kẽema sẽn zoe n yũ wã. Yaa wam-yalengo, wam-pogbre! A sẽn labs yĩnga, a yũ zãng wata ne laado la yĩgsgu." 
Ezekiel23:33 Wamda na n tɩgs-f-la ne sũ-beedo, na n yũudame la f rigda n yũud la f waasd toogo, tɩ yaa f kẽema Samari wamde." 
Ezekiel23:34 F na yũ-a, f na yũ-a zãnga, n yaool n wa rũm-a n wã peese, t'a peesa sɩ f yãoogã. Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde!" 
Ezekiel23:35 Sẽn ya woto wã, Wẽnd n gomde, f sẽn yĩm m yella yĩnga, f sẽn tud maam f kãare, tʋk f zugẽ f yooba ne a rẽgdã taale.»" 
Ezekiel23:36 La Soaala-Wẽnd paasame: «Ninsaal biiga, segl bʋʋdo, a Oola la a Ooliba bʋʋdo. Ypk b tʋʋm wẽna." 
Ezekiel23:37 B zãmb-m-la ne b yoobã, b nug mooga ne zɩɩm. B rẽgma b meng ne wẽn-naandsa waoogre. B sẽn da rog kamb niyns m n kõ-ma, b yõog-b-la bugum tɩ bugma rɩ-b zãnga." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ad-b sẽn maan bũmb ning n paase tɩ m zabdẽ: b rẽgma m doogo n sãbs vʋʋsga raare. 
Ezekiel23:39 Bãng-y tɩ raar ninga b sẽn yõog b kamb bugum, baraar la b kẽ m doogẽ wã n dẽgem-a. B saaga woto fãa mam doogẽ." 
Ezekiel23:40 Yɩɩd rẽ menga, b sẽn bool b rãmb tɩ b yi yɩɩg n wa wã, sɩd wa-la b nengẽ. Tɩ b so koom, n ning kɩrʋ, n ning b muizãana," 
Ezekiel23:41 n gãand gãn-bʋgsg zugu, n dɩk tɩdarã la yũ-noog kaama m sẽn da kõ-bã, n dogl te-roagendg a ye zugu n wisd b menga." 
Ezekiel23:42 Sẽn wa-ba yɩɩ wʋsgo. Koɛɛg n da sãte, ya neb ka tɛka sẽn zɩ ne yɩɩr koɛɛga. Neb ka tɛka n da yi zĩ-peen-daagẽ n wa. B pida kamb a yiiba zũi, la naam pugl neeba la b fõgneg b zugu." 
Ezekiel23:43 M da yeta m menga: ges-y laado, yoob sẽn kʋʋl pag la bala, t'a ket n baood dapa!" 
Ezekiel23:44 Rapa wata b nengẽ. B ra ket n pʋgda a Oola la a Ooliba, n le sãam n paas, pagb neerem sẽn sãam zãnga." 
Ezekiel23:45 Nin-tɩrs n na n kao pʋg bãmba bʋʋdo. B na n deega yoaadba la nin-kʋʋdba sɩbgre, tɩ sɩda b yoome la b nus mooga ne zɩɩm.»" 
Ezekiel23:46 «Ad-m sẽn yet bũmb ninga maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Tigim-y nebã b sɛɛgẽ, n yɛɛs-ba, n fã-ba." 
Ezekiel23:47 Lab-y-b ne kuga, la b bees-b ne sʋʋga. Kʋ-y b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli la yõog-y b roto." 
Ezekiel23:48 Mam meng n na n sɛɛs b yoobã tẽnga pʋga. Woto pagb a taab yam na neke la b kõn dɩk tãop a yiiba nao ye. 
Ezekiel23:49 Bãmb n na n dɩ b tʋʋm yooda taale, bãmb n na n tʋk b wẽnema b zugẽ, bãmb sẽn waoog wẽn-naandsa yĩnga. Woto la y bãngda tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel24:1 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd a wɛ soaba, kiuug piig soaba, kiuuga piig daare, Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne m woto:" 
Ezekiel24:2 «Ezekiyɛl, dɩk sebre n gʋls dũnna daarã a zugu, tɩ yaa rũnna raarã la Babilon dĩma na n gũbg Zerizalɛɛm." 
Ezekiel24:3 Gom ne m buudã sẽn ya tõatã, gom-a ne yelbũndi, la f wilg-a tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n kõ-f noor tɩ f gome. Segl rʋko, ning koom a pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel24:4 Los nemdo, los nem-sõma, gere, la bãoko, pids rʋka ne kõb-sɩɩlem." 
Ezekiel24:5 Yãk pe-nobdsa nemdo, ning raad rʋka tẽngre. Sõng tɩ fãa kɛ sõma, tɩ kõaba fãa bɩ neere." 
Ezekiel24:6 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: Kato nin-kʋʋdb tẽnga! Fo wẽnda rʋk sẽn kẽ piisem, t'a pekr lebg toogo. M na n yiisa f nebã a yeyn-ye tɩ tẽnga wa lebg vɩʋʋgo, f ka le ya m tẽn-nongr ye." 
Ezekiel24:7 Zɩɩma sẽn daagã ket n dɩga tẽnga pʋga. Zɩɩma raaga pĩig zugu, a pa raag tomẽ ye la ned me ka lob tom n bus-a ye." 
Ezekiel24:8 Mam me na n basa zɩɩma sẽn madg kugrã n ka bao tom n bus-a ye, m basd-a lame t'a yãng m sũuri, tɩ m sɩbg nebã n dok m sũuri." 
Ezekiel24:9 N-ye! Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ nin-kʋʋdb tẽnga na n sega bʋk ne bʋko. Ade yaa bugum la m na n widgi na yɩɩ bug-kãsenga." 
Ezekiel24:10 Sam daado, ning bugum, rʋg nemdã, lebg-a n le rʋge, ning noosdo tɩ wʋme, los kõab-raada bugmẽ tɩ rɩ zãnga." 
Ezekiel24:11 Vaag rʋkã n bas vɩʋʋgo, dogl-a bug-saal zugu, t'a mooge, woto f na menes rẽgda fãa sẽn ket a pʋgẽ. Daare piisma na sʋʋge." 
Ezekiel24:12 Piisma waa ne tʋʋm toogo. Bugma ka na n tõog piisma naana ye, a ra kẽe rʋka wʋsg-wʋsgoo." 
Ezekiel24:13 Ad ka bũmb a to n dẽgem-fo n zʋʋg f yooba ye. M maana fãa n tẽed tɩ f na peke la f sẽn zãgs pekrã, m na kong n bas m sũura t'a fudgi n bas-a t'a fudg zãng n dɩ-fo." 
Ezekiel24:14 Maam n gome, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, la m gomda na n pidsame. M kõn bas tɩ bũmb pa ye nimbãan-zoeer ka ye, sugr ka ye. Bʋʋda na n bʋʋme n tũ f tʋʋm yoodã. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n togse!»" 
Ezekiel24:15 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne m woto: 
Ezekiel24:16 «Ezekiyɛl, vugr bala, m na n looga ne f yam sẽn kẽe a soabã, ne f pagã. La f kõn kelma a kʋʋre, f kõn yãbe, f nintãm kõn dʋʋg ye." 
Ezekiel24:17 Waas f sũurẽ bala, da yeelg kʋʋr fut ye, vil peend f zugu, wid f neoda, da teeg peend f lemd ye, da reeg rɩɩb f yags sẽn na n wa kõ-f ye.»" 
Ezekiel24:18 Yibeoogo m sõsa ne zãma wã, la zaabr sẽn ta m paga kiime, la beoog sẽn vẽege m maana wala b sẽn da wilg-ma." 
Ezekiel24:19 Dẽ la zãma wã sok ma: «F kõn wilg tõnd f manesma võor bi?» 
Ezekiel24:20 Tɩ m yeel-ba: «Ad Soaala sẽn togs-m yãmb yĩnga: 
Ezekiel24:21 ‹Wilg a Israyɛl roogo, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete: M meng m toore n na n wã m do-sõngã, yãmb sẽn get ne zu-zẽkrã, y nin sẽn get ne yamleoogã, y yam sẽn loe a soaba. Y sẽn loog n bas y kom-dibli la y kom-pugli niynsã na n yɩɩ sʋʋg noor dɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel24:22 La yãmb me na n maana wa maam. Y pa na n teeg lemd ye, y pa na n dɩ kʋʋr dɩɩb ye." 
Ezekiel24:23 Da lood-y pɛɛla sẽn vil y zuta ye, da woob-y y neooda ye, da kelem-y ye, da yãb-y ye. Sẽn be yaa d faage, d tʋʋm yood waolgẽ, la d kũm taaba." 
Ezekiel24:24 A Ezekiyɛl sẽn maan bũmb ningã, yaa woto la yãmb me na n maane. La rẽ sã n wa taase y na reeg tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel24:25 Dẽn poore Soaala yeel-m lame: «Gese, Ezekiyɛl, m na n zãag-b-la ne ro-sõngã sẽn ya b soondg zĩiga, b nin yamleoog bũmbu, b zu-zẽkre la b saagre. M na n looga ne b kom-dibli la b kom-pugli." 
Ezekiel24:26 Yella sã n wa maane ned n na n põse n zoe n wa togs foom. 
Ezekiel24:27 Baraare f kõn le yɩ muk ye. F na n le tõog n gomame, f na n tõog n sõsa ne sẽn põs-a n wa ne kibarã. Fo sãoogra na n yɩɩ kaset b yĩnga, la b kõn le sãmb tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnd ye.»" 
Ezekiel25:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeele: 
Ezekiel25:2 «Ezekiyɛl, taas Amonitsa tɩ m zabr n be ne-ba." 
Ezekiel25:3 Fo na n yeel-b lame tɩ b kelg maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yet-ba. B sẽn waa n dẽgem m do-sõngã, n sãam Israyɛl tẽnga, n tall Zɩɩda rãmb n loog pa-weere, bãmb kaasa sũ-noogo." 
Ezekiel25:4 Woto wã m na n kɩtame tɩ yaang we-gõaadba wa soog y tẽnga. B na n ti-la b gãnda rot yãmb tẽn-peelmẽ. Bãmb n na n dɩ y tɩɩsa biisi, bãmb n na n yũ y tẽnga bĩisim." 
Ezekiel25:5 M na n kɩtame tɩ Raba, y na-tẽnga, lebg yʋgma bãgre, t'a Amon tẽn-peelma lebg piis wubri. Woto la y bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ad-m sẽn paasde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Fo wẽe nug pogs la f saoome, fo nooga f sũuri, yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ a Israyɛl zug yĩnga. F pa ges m buuda ne waoogr ye, f maana beem ne-a." 
Ezekiel25:7 Mam me na n wilg-f-la m pãnga n bas-f bu-zẽmb nusẽ tɩ b loog ne f paoonga fãa. F buuda yʋʋr na n menema buud a taab sʋka, f ka na n le paam tẽng ye, m na n sɛɛs-f-la zãnga. Woto la f bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel25:8 Yaa woto la m gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: «A Moab n yeele tɩ Zɩɩda rãmba me yaa neb wa b taaba." 
Ezekiel25:9 Ade, m na wãa tẽns niyns fãa sẽn zao Moab tãmsa pennẽ, a tẽn-neeb wala a Bɛt-Yesimot, a Baal-Meõ la Kiriyatayim." 
Ezekiel25:10 B na n yɩɩ Yaang rãmba soolem, bãmb n paas Amon dãmba. Tẽnga na n lebga bãmb soolem al tɩ b ka le tẽeg a Amon yell meng bu-zẽmba sʋk ye." 
Ezekiel25:11 M na n sɩbg a Moab wa sẽn segde. Woto b na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde.» 
Ezekiel25:12 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leokde: «Edomitsa doka b sũur ne Zɩɩda la yaa rẽ la b beegrã." 
Ezekiel25:13 Maam na tẽega m nugu a Edom zugu, la m na n kʋ-la a neba la a rũmsa fãa; a na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga, al Teman sɩngrẽ n ta Dedã, b tãb-biisa na n paa zabrẽ." 
Ezekiel25:14 M na n basa m buud a Israyɛl t'a rok m sũur ne Edomitsa n kõ-ma. Israyɛl na n maana ne-ba wala a sũ-fõora sẽn date, woto b na bãng tɩ b ka beegd maam zaalem ye. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto.»" 
Ezekiel25:15 Ad-m sẽn leokde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: «Filisti rãmba tuga beem ne maam. B yika ne tɩtaam n na n dok b sũuri ne b bɛ kʋdgo n sãam a yell zãnga." 
Ezekiel25:16 Boto wã yĩnga, mam yet-b lame, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m na n wilg-b-la m pãnga. M na n menesa neb niyns fãa sẽn yi Kaftor n wa kẽed mogra noore." 
Ezekiel25:17 M na n doka m sũuri, m na n sɩbg-b lame tɩ wʋm-ba. La woto b na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala.»" 
Ezekiel26:1 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a yembr soaba, kiuuga pipi daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel:" 
Ezekiel26:2 «Ezekiyɛl, ad Tir dãmba laada Zerizalɛɛm dãmba n yetẽ: ‹N-faa, n-faa! B wãa tẽng ning sẽn da ya na-tẽn-kãsenga. Tõnd n na n deeg a zĩiga. D na n lebga arzɛk rãmb n yɩɩd pĩnda, tɩ Zerizalɛɛm wãame.›" 
Ezekiel26:3 Dẽ yĩnga, ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne foo, Tir tẽnga. M na n kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsgo wa zab ne-fo. B na n wa fão-f lame wa mogr ko-wiis." 
Ezekiel26:4 B na n wãa Tir lal-bɛdã, b na n tusa b do-lug-lugã n lubi, b na n pɩɩsa a toma n kees pĩig a nare." 
Ezekiel26:5 Sẽn na n keese yaa tẽng sẽn puk mogr sʋka, n zems zĩm-loabdba na yɛdg b zulumsi. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yete. Nin-zẽmb na n wa zɛɛ Tir," 
Ezekiel26:6 n paas tẽns sẽn pẽ ne-a n tong mogra noore. Woto y na bãng tɩ yaa maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› 
Ezekiel26:7 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n le yet woto: ‹M na n zaba ne foo, Tir. Ade, mam na n talla dĩm a yembre, sẽn yit goabga, a Nabikodonozor, Babilon dĩma, dĩm dãmba dĩma; a na n waa ne wiidi, ne bilim-bilm, ne wed-dʋʋdba, la tãb-biisi sẽn ka be tɛka." 
Ezekiel26:8 A Nabikodonozor na n zɛɛ tẽns niyns sẽn be mogra noore. Dẽ poore, tãb-biisa na n tuu bogdo la b sam tãndo n gilg-fo. Gãnd me la b na n sel n gilgi n kok f pɛɛma zãnga." 
Ezekiel26:9 A na n waa ne zab teedo, ra-bɛdã a sẽn tar n tãad dotã la a na n tus-f lalsã n lubi; a na n siiga f ro-lug-luga ne somse." 
Ezekiel26:10 Wĩida sõor na n yɩɩ wʋsgo; b wubsgu na n bui-f-la zãnga. Lalsa na n dĩmsa ne wed-dʋʋdba la bilim-bilma bʋʋre. Tãb-biisa na n tũ f dignoya n kẽ; b na n kẽe tẽnga naana-naana wala b sẽn tũud lal-wãoongo n kẽedẽ. 
Ezekiel26:11 B na n tũu f soya fãa n loog ne b wiidi, b na n kʋʋ fo neba ne sʋʋga, b na n tusa f lal-gilsã sẽn ya bɛd-bɛdã n lubi." 
Ezekiel26:12 B na n wʋka f arzɛgsã n sooge, b na n deesa fo bõn-koosma; b na n wãa f lalsã, fo ro-neebã, b na n wã-b lame, b na loba b kuga la b raada mogrẽ." 
Ezekiel26:13 M na n kɩtame tɩ b ra leb n wʋm f yɩɩla yɛs ye, b kõn le wʋm kʋnd dãamd ye." 
Ezekiel26:14 M sẽn na n kees-fo, yaa f zu-koeella bala, yaa f pĩiga bala, sẽn na n lebg zulums yɛdgr zĩiga, la b kõn leb n me-f n yik ye. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, koɛɛg la woto.›" 
Ezekiel26:15 Ad-m koɛɛg yɛs ne Tir dãmba: ‹Tẽnsa sẽn tedg kooma noor n zãagã na n sɩnga rigbu b sã n wa wʋm fo lʋɩɩse, n wʋm sẽn pogl b rãmb waasgo." 
Ezekiel26:16 Mogra noorẽ nanams fãa na n siga b naam goeel zugu, b na n piida b naama futu, b na yeesa b fu-neeba. Dabeem kãseng na n yõk-b lame; b na n zĩi tẽnga n tar digbu, fo lʋɩɩsa sẽn yɛɛs-b wʋsga yĩnga." 
Ezekiel26:17 B na yɩɩla sũ-sãang yɩɩla, fo poorẽ, la b na n yeel-f lame: Wao! Tẽng ninga yʋʋr sẽn da yi wʋsgã tɩ mogra pʋgẽ dãmba da tar a pãnga kasetã, tɩ neba fãa da yɛɛsd a naama, tẽn-kãng wãa zãnga!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Marsã tẽns niyns sẽn be-b mogra noore zĩi ne yɩɩre, fo lʋɩɩsa poore. Sẽn tedg-b kooma noor n zãagã wʋma f wãab n tar digb bala.›" 
Ezekiel26:19 N-ye! Maam n gomde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na kɩt tɩ f lebg raboogo tɩ ned ka le be f pʋgẽ ye, m na kɩtame tɩ mogra koom fudg n dɩ-fo." 
Ezekiel26:20 Mam na n tus-f lame n lub tɩ f babs sẽn sig-b bʋg-tẽnga al tẽn-kʋdem-dãmb wẽndẽ. M na n kɩtame tɩ f sig ne pĩnd kɩɩmsã. F Kõn le tõog n wa bõn-vɩɩs sʋk, tẽng zug ka ye." 
Ezekiel26:21 F sẽn lebg a soaba na n yɛɛsa ãndũni rãmba, tɩ f na n wãa zãnga. B na n bao-la f zĩiga la ned kõn le yãend-a bada. Yaa woto la m gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel27:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel27:2 «Foom, Ezekiyɛl, pʋd yɩɩlle n yãb Tir." 
Ezekiel27:3 Yaa tẽng sẽn be mogra noorẽ la sẽn leebd ne mogra noorẽ dãmb a taaba. Taas-a m koɛɛga, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, koɛɛga: ‹Tir, yaa foo n da pẽgd f menga, foo n da pẽgd f neerem!" 
Ezekiel27:4 F toaaga tɩ bee mogra sʋka. B mee foo tɩ f wẽnd koom koglgo. 
Ezekiel27:5 Yaa Senir tɩ-wogda ra-pegdo la b rɩk n ka koglgã la Libã tɩ-wogdã la b kɛɛg yã n maan peen-loetgã. 
Ezekiel27:6 B rɩka Bazã daoog sẽn ya kɛgenga n pees paklse n tar n dugsd koglgã. Koglga ra-paadsã yaa Kitim ra-kegemse, bãmb zug la b ra samd teeda la laogã, la b maneg n tablga ne bõn-peesdi, ne bũmb sẽn pees ne wobd yẽna." 
Ezekiel27:7 Ezipt tẽng peend b sẽn manege n buki n da ya peend ninga sobga sẽn tusdi tɩ koglga kẽnd kooma zugã. B miime tɩ yaa foo n wate tɩ f nan ket yɩɩg menga. Peen-moaama la peen-mismiidu, Kitim tẽng pɛɛla n da lut teedã." 
Ezekiel27:8 Sidõ la Arvad neba n da ya fo ko-rugsdba. Tir ko-rugs-mitba n da wilgd sore tɩ koglga tũudĩ. 
Ezekiel27:9 Biblos tʋʋm-mitba n da manegd sẽn sãam fãa, koglga pʋgẽ. Koom-kogenda ne b neba sẽn da mi tolbã da yaasda f nengẽ n daad b teedo." 
Ezekiel27:10 Pɛrs, la Lud la Ypt dãmba da bee fo tãb-biisa sʋka, b da yagenda b gãndo la b zug-peto fo meng tãb-sikẽ, la fo yʋʋra ra tũu rẽ n zẽke." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvad rãmba da naaga f tãb-biisã n gilgd lalga zugu tɩ Gamad rãmba gũusd bɛɛba ro-lug-luga zutu. B ra yagenda b gãndã lalsã la rẽ ra yaa bũmb sẽn sakd gesg waare. 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarsis rãmb da wata f nengẽ n daad teed buud fãa. B da raada f teedã ne wanzurfu, ne kutu, ne waasdo, ne namdo." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yavã, Tubal la Mesek da maanda leebgo ne foom, B da wata ne yemse la teed sẽn yõg ne zũudu n tekd ne fo sẽn da tõe n koos ne-ba." 
Ezekiel27:14 Rũms n da yit Bɛt-Togarma n wat fo nengẽ: wiidi sẽn tat teedo, wiidi sẽn mi zoeese, la bõn-weese." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedã rãmba da leebda ne foom. Tẽns wʋsgo da yaa fo raadba. F ra leebda ne tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmba la b ra wata ne wob-yẽna la da-sĩdma. 
Ezekiel27:16 Edomitsa da raada teed wʋsgo la b da wata ne kug sẽn pɩnda, peen-miidu, pɛɛl sẽn gʋl tɩ sakd gesgo, gĩs sẽn ya neere, koomẽ zẽems buud la kug miid sẽn yãgd-b-toore." 
Ezekiel27:17 Zɩɩda la Israyɛl tẽnsa ra leebda ne foom, b da wata ne Minit alkam, ne ki, ne sɩɩdo, ne kaam, la tɩ-sũm sẽn tar yũ-noogo." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damas da yaa fo raada, a ra wat n daada teed buud toor-toore. B ra yaooda foo ne Elbõ rãam n paas Saar pe-kõbdo." 
Ezekiel27:19 Al Uzal tẽnga, Dã la Yavã, da wata ne kut sẽn kudi, ne tɩɩs pagd sẽn tar yũ-noogo, ne kãnkẽ-sɩɩdo." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedã da wata ne fut sẽn tar n famd wiidi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Fo ra leebda ne Arabi la Kedar nanams fãa, b da yaooda ne pe-bi, pe-raado la bʋʋse." 
Ezekiel27:22 Saba la Ragma toandba da wata fo nengẽ. B da yaooda ne kaam sẽn tar yũ-nood wʋsgo, ne kug neeb buud toor-toore n paas sãnem." 
Ezekiel27:23 Arã, Kane, la Eden, Seba, Asʋr la Kilmad toandba da leebda ne foom." 
Ezekiel27:24 B da wata ne fu-neeba, ne fut sẽn ya mismiidu, ne fut sẽn gʋl tɩ ya neer wʋsgo, ne fu-gʋlem-gʋlem, ne wĩ sẽn tar pãnga." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tir, fo da tara koom-kogend sẽn wat ne f teedã, f kogenda da pida wʋsgo, wa sẽn tog ne mogr zug kogendo." 
Ezekiel27:26 Koom-kogenda rugsdba tall-f lame n ta ko-sʋka. Yaang sob-lebende n wa n sãam f kẽnde mogra sʋka. 
Ezekiel27:27 Fo arzɛkã, fo teedã, kogenda zɩɩbã neb niyns fãa sẽn da rugsd koglgã, neb niynsi sẽn be a pʋgẽ n manegd-a wã a sẽn mii n wa sãama, neb niyns sẽn get-b fo tolba yelle, zab-zabdba, la neb niyns fãa sẽn da be koglga pʋgã, bãmb fãa gilli paa koomẽ, tɩ f lisa mogra pʋga." 
Ezekiel27:28 B sẽn wʋm ko-rugsdba kɛlenga, mogra noorẽ dãmba digimdame." 
Ezekiel27:29 Wakat kãnga, sẽn da rugsda koglgo fãa yii n basa a koglgo b fãa siga tẽnga." 
Ezekiel27:30 B ra wiisda fo poorẽ, b ra waasda waas-toodo, n yugd b zut ne tom, n bilimd tompɛglmẽ." 
Ezekiel27:31 B põngda b zut fo yĩnga, b na n dɩka sũ-pa-noang fut n yeelge. Sũ-sãang pida b sũuri tɩ b na n wiis f yĩnga, tɩ b na n yãb yãb-toogo." 
Ezekiel27:32 B na yɩɩla sũ-sãang yɩɩla b na n kelma f kʋʋre. Tir, fo ra yaa tẽng sẽn ka tar a to ye, la ad fãa sẽn lebg sɩɩ, f tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezekiel27:33 F sã n da sik f kogendã, yaa neb ka tɛk n da wat n daadẽ. Fo arzɛka la fo teeda yĩnga fo kɩtame tɩ ãndũni wã nanams lebg arzɛgs rãmba, tɩ f arzɛka la f paoonga da yaa wʋsgo." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ade, marsã, ko-wiisa sãama foom, ko-zulunga sʋka la f lis yã. Fo zɩɩbã la f nebã, koom dɩɩ zãnga." 
Ezekiel27:35 Sẽn tedg-b mogra noora fãa yɛɛsa yɛɛsg menga. B dĩm dãmba rigdame, b fãa neng gãnemame." 
Ezekiel27:36 Tẽn-zẽnsa lɛɛbdba da rigda rabeem, fo tiig n lebga pɛlen-yɩk bũmb b yĩnga; fo yell sãama daar buud fãa yĩnga.› »" 
Ezekiel28:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel28:2 «Ninsaal biiga, taas Tir dĩma Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn leokd-a bũmb ningã: ‹Fo n yik n gom ne wilg-m-menga n maand tɩ f yaa wẽnde. Wala wẽnde, m zao naam goeel la mogr ne mogre n gũbg goeelã. F yetame tɩ f zema wẽnde, mik fo yaa ninsaal bala, f ka tar wẽnd fɩ." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ade, fo tẽedame tɩ f tara yam n yɩɩd a Daniyɛl, tɩ bãngd ka be n zem foom ye, la f tõe n wʋma yel-solgdi wã fãa." 
Ezekiel28:4 Fo bãngre la f yam yĩnga, fo lebga arzɛk soaba, fo paama sãnem la wanzurf n bĩngi." 
Ezekiel28:5 Fo talla f minim kãsenga n paas f paoong wʋsgo, la fo maana wilg-m-menga, f arzɛka yĩnga." 
Ezekiel28:6 Woto wã, kelg m sẽn yet-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: Fo waa n tẽeme tɩ f yaa wẽnde," 
Ezekiel28:7 la rẽnd yĩnga, m na n kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmb wa zab ne-fo. Yaa neb sẽn tar pãng wʋsgo. B na n wa sãama fo sẽn zĩnd n geelg wa yam pidung soab sẽn geendã. B na n sãbsa f ziirã." 
Ezekiel28:8 B na n tusa foom n lub f yaoogẽ, la f na n kii kũ-toogo, mogr sʋka." 
Ezekiel28:9 Fo na leb n yeel yɛs tɩ f yaa wẽnde, fo kʋʋdba taoore? Fo kʋʋdba nifẽ, fo yaa ned bala, fo ka wẽnd ye." 
Ezekiel28:10 Fo na ki nin-dẽgd dãmba kũum, tẽn-zẽng rãmb n na n kʋ-fo. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete.› »" 
Ezekiel28:11 Soaala-Wẽnd le goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel28:12 «Ezekiyɛl, pʋd kũmkũm yɩɩla, Tir naab yĩnga. Fo na n yeel-a lame tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n ning goama f noorẽ. Yeel-a woto: ‹Fo da yaa ned sẽn pid ne sõmblem menga, f yam da waooga wʋsgo, fo neerem da ka be to ye." 
Ezekiel28:13 Fo ra vɩɩ Eden tẽnga, Wẽnd zẽed pʋga. F fuuga ra tisa ne kug neeb buud ka tɛka: kõod-miuugu, kõod-pespele, kẽeg-toenɛɛga, mosmoomde, wõnog kõbgo, peelgo, pɛɛlg fas, birba, mismiuugu. F gãngãada la f wɩɩsã ra bolga sãnem. Te-neeba la fan-teedo la b sɩd segl f yĩnga, f rogma raare." 
Ezekiel28:14 Mam da yalsa f yĩnga, malɛk gũuda sẽn da ya nin-daoogo. Fo ra bee m tãn-sõnga zugu tɩ f nao tagd kug sẽn yãgd-b-toore." 
Ezekiel28:15 Goaleng ka zĩnd f vɩɩmẽ, f naanega tɛka n tãag wakat ning f wẽnema sẽn waa n yaool n pukã." 
Ezekiel28:16 Fo tolba sẽn waa n paam pãng yĩnga, f lebga ned sẽn mi pãn-tõog la kalwẽdga. Yaa rẽ la m kɩt tɩ f lebg wa neb a taaba la m dig-fo n sik m tãnga zugu. Malɛk gũuda rig-f lame n zãag ne kuga sẽn da yãgd b toorã." 
Ezekiel28:17 F sẽn da paam n ta zĩig ninga kɩtame tɩ f wuk ne wilg-m-menga, f paoonga sẽn da ka paooda kɩtame tɩ f yama menem zãnga. Yaa rẽ yĩng la m gãnegd f tẽnga tɩ dĩm dãmb a taaba na n la-fo." 
Ezekiel28:18 Fo leebga pʋgẽ fo maana zãmbo la f wẽda f taaba. F waa n dẽgma m waoogra zĩiga, la yaa rẽ yĩng la m na n widg tẽnga pʋgẽ bugum ning sẽn na n dɩ-fã. Sẽn na n gesa foo fãa na yãenda m sẽn kɩt tɩ f lebg bug-rɩɩnda bala." 
Ezekiel28:19 Buud ning fãa sẽn mi foo la sẽn yãend f sẽn lebg a soaba na n yɛɛsa wʋsgo, fo na n lebga bũmb sẽn kẽesd rabeem, la m na n menes-f-la daar buud fãa yĩnga.› »" 
Ezekiel28:20 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne m woto: 
Ezekiel28:21 «Ninsaal biiga, kedg n tees Sidõ, la taas a nebã m sẽn yet tɩ b gũus ne yell ning sẽn na n paam-bã." 
Ezekiel28:22 Ad-m sẽn yet-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne foo, Sidõ, m na n wilg-f-la m pãnga ne tʋʋm bɛd niyns m sẽn na n tʋma. M sã n wa yik n na n sɩbg-b wala m sẽn kãabã, b fãa na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala, m na wilg-b tɩ maam la Nin-Sõngã." 
Ezekiel28:23 M na n loba bã-longdem tẽngã, soya fãa na n yɩɩ zɩɩm bala. Zabra na n yãnga zĩig fãa la f neb wʋsg na n lʋɩɩ tẽnga pʋga. Dẽ me la b fãa bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel28:24 Soaala-Wẽnd n yete: «A Israyɛl yak ba a ye kõn kell n tõog a yaoolg ye. B kõn le yɩ a yĩnga wa gõaaga n kõsdẽ la yorgdẽ ye. Woto b na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.» 
Ezekiel28:25 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga: «Mam na n tigma a Israyɛl kamba, b sẽn sẽege n be zĩig ning fãa. M na n sʋk-b lame la woto m na wilg tẽns a taabã tɩ maam la Nin-Sõngo. B na n vɩɩnda b tẽngẽ, tẽng ning m sẽn kõ a Zakoob." 
Ezekiel28:26 B na n zĩnda be ne laafi, b na n mee roto, la b sel bugsuntungu. B na n zĩnda ne laafi, tɩ m na n sɩbga a yak ning fãa sẽn na n paoog-a. Woto b na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Ezekiel29:1 Babilon pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd piig soaba, kiuug piig soaba, kiuuga piig la a yiib daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel29:2 «Ezekiyɛl, kedg n tees Ezipt dĩma la f pĩnd n togs-a yell ninga sẽn na n paam-a, yẽ ne Ezipt tẽng fãa gilli." 
Ezekiel29:3 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne foo, Ezipt dĩma, fo wẽnda rũn-bãndã sẽn tẽeg a meng n gãe Nil pʋga. Fo yetame tɩ kʋɩl-kãnga yaa f soolem, a yaa f nug tʋʋmde."
