Ezekiel29:4 M na n ninga bãn-kõse f yɛgẽ, n kɩt tɩ Nil kʋɩl-zẽeda pɛ fo yĩnga pagda fãa. M na yiisa foom Nil koomẽ, foo ne kʋɩl-zẽedã sẽn pɛ f yĩnga pagdã." 
Ezekiel29:5 M na n loba yãmb zĩ-pɛɛlẽ. Fo na n paa zĩ-koɛɛngẽ. Fo kõn paam dɩkre, fo kõn paam mumb ye. M na n kɩtame tɩ f lebge we-rũmsi la yĩngri luiili rɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel29:6 La woto Ezipt neba fãa na bãnge tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. Sõngr ning a Israyɛl sẽn paam f nengẽ na n wẽnega ned sẽn baoode bũmb sẽn na n tar n tikdẽ tɩ b kõ-a rudumdi. 
Ezekiel29:7 Gese, rudumdi, foo la b wudg n gãnde tɩ fo wẽneg n kao b nusẽ, la fo sẽn kao f pogla b bãoko la bãok sẽn pogle b basa raoodo.›" 
Ezekiel29:8 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Tãb-biis la m na n yiis tɩ b tak zabr ne foo la m na n menesa f neb la f rũmsi." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ezipt tẽng na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga, na n lebga raboogo. Boto b na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde. Fo sẽn yet tɩ Nil yaa fo n so wã, t'a yaa f nug tʋʋmna, d na ges sɩda sẽn beẽ." 
Ezekiel29:10 Bãng tɩ foo ne Nil dãmba fãa yell sãamame. M na n kɩtame tɩ Ezipt tẽnga lebg tẽn-wãoongo, sũ-sãang zĩiga, sẽn sɩng Migdol nug goabga, n ta Asuwã la Ezipt toaag, nug rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel29:11 Ned bɩ rũng naoor kõn leb n tag be ye. Yʋʋm pis-naas pʋgẽ, bõn-vɩɩg kõn le zĩnd be ye." 
Ezekiel29:12 M na n kɩtame tɩ Ezipt tẽnga lebg zĩ-peen-daaga, zĩ-peen-daasa sʋka; a tẽn-bɛda na n lebga raboodo wa b sẽn zɩ n yãend a taare. Dẽ na n maana yʋʋm pis-naase, la m na n modgame tɩ b sẽeg nin-zẽmb tẽnsẽ.›" 
Ezekiel29:13 Ad-m sẽn paasde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Yʋʋm pis-naasa sã n wa pidi, m na sa Ezipt rãmba sẽn sẽeg zĩig ningã n tigs-ba." 
Ezekiel29:14 M na n sɛɛsa b nimbãanegã la m na n kõ-b-la sore tɩ b leb n wa b buuda tẽngẽ, Ezipt tẽn-zugẽ." 
Ezekiel29:15 B na n le vigla rĩung sẽn ka zem fɩ, rĩung sẽn ka tar pãng a taaba sʋka, rĩung sẽn ka le tõe n kẽes rĩung a to a soolmẽ, tɩ m na n wooga a neba sõor wʋsgo." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israyɛl kamba ka na n le sak n teeg Ezipt ye. A Israyɛl me kõn le maan wẽnga, n bas maam, Naaba-Wẽnd teegre, n teegd Ezipt ye. Woto me la b bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel29:17 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd pisi la a yopoe soaba, pipi kiuuga, kiuuga pipi daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel29:18 «Ned biiga, Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor yika ne pãng la raoodo n tɩ zab ne Tir. Tãb-biisa zuta fãa waa n wurame tɩ b bãgdã fãa meede. La zabra sẽn tak woto ne Tir ka zĩnd yõod a yĩnga, tɩ b gomd a zab-zabdba." 
Ezekiel29:19 Woto wã, ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yete: ‹Maam n na n dɩk Ezipt n sagl Babilon dĩm a Nabikodonozor nugẽ. A na n wʋka b arzɛka fãa n kuli la a sãam tẽngã. A na n looga ne a arzɛka fãa. Dẽ n na n yɩ a zab-zabdba yaoodo." 
Ezekiel29:20 A sẽn ka zoe toogo ne a tʋʋma, mam dɩkda Ezipt tẽnga n ning Babilon dĩma nugẽ t'a soog-a, wala a yaoodo, tɩ yaa mam yĩng la a tãb-biisa tʋm yã.› Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel29:21 Badaare m na n kɩtame tɩ Israyɛl raooda le paase. La sã n ya foo, Ezekiyɛl, m na n kõ-f-la sore tɩ f gom ne-ba tɩ b bãng tɩ maam la Soaala.»" 
Ezekiel30:1 Soaala-Wẽnd le goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel30:2 «Ezekiyɛl, gom bãngr goama, taas neba maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn yet tɩ f taas-b koees niynsã: ‹Yãb-y tɩ yel-beed n wat y zugu!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ade, daara kolgdame, Naaba-Wẽnd daara zoe n taame tɩ m sũura na n fudgi. Badaare sawat na n zĩnda wʋsgo, sawat sẽn kẽesd rabeem. Na n yɩɩ baraare la m na n dok m sũur ne bu-zẽmbã." 
Ezekiel30:4 Sʋʋg na n varga Ezipt rãmba, la Kus rãmb na n diga rabeem. B na n kooda Ezipt rãmba gilli, n zɛ b laoga fãa, tɩ b tẽnga lebg raboogo." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kus, Ypt la Lud, Arabi tẽng ne Libi n paas Israyɛl kamb kẽere, fãa na n paa zabrẽ." 
Ezekiel30:6 Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ al Migdol sẽn be nug goabga n tãag Asuwã sẽn be nug rɩtgo, Ezipt tẽng sõangdba na n paa zabrẽ. A sẽn da tar pãng m maand wilg-m-mengã, ad-a na n lʋɩɩme. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togsd rẽnna." 
Ezekiel30:7 Tẽnga na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga zĩ-peen-daasa sʋka. B sẽn da kẽed tẽns niynsa na n lebga raboodo. 
Ezekiel30:8 B na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde daar ning m sẽn na n yõog Ezipt bugum n daag a kamba zɩɩm la m menes a sõangdba fãa gilli. 
Ezekiel30:9 Ezipt wãab daare, m na yiis neb ne koom-kogendo tɩ b tɩ wilg Kus rãmba tɩ b maan dabeem, la b na n sɩnga yɛɛsgo la rigbu. Ad-y daara kolgame!›" 
Ezekiel30:10 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n kɩtame tɩ Babilon dĩm, a Nabikodonozor, kʋ Ezipt zãma wã." 
Ezekiel30:11 Yẽ ne a neba, nin-toos menga, na n wãa tẽngã. B na n wõoga b sʋʋse n kʋ Ezipt tẽng rãmba, la tẽngã na n pida ne kũum bala." 
Ezekiel30:12 M na n kɩtame tɩ Nil kʋɩ, la m na n basa Ezipt rãmba nin-toos nugẽ. M na n kɩtame tɩ tẽn-zẽng neba wa sãam-a la b loog ne a laoga fãa. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete.›" 
Ezekiel30:13 Ad-m sẽn paasde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n wãa Memfis wẽn-naandsa fãa ne b togsendo. Dĩm ba a ye kõn le rɩ naam Ezipt tẽng ye. M na n pidsa tẽnga ne rabeem." 
Ezekiel30:14 M na n wãa Patros, m na n yõoga Soã bugum, m na n pidsa m kãab-beeda ne No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Mam na kɩt tɩ wʋm Sin, Ezipt tãnsoben-doogã la m na n kʋʋ No zãma wã." 
Ezekiel30:16 M na n daaga Ezipt rãmb zɩɩm la m ning b tẽnga bugum. Sin tẽng rãmb na n yɛɛsame. No lalsa na n wurame tɩ koom dɩ tẽngã. 
Ezekiel30:17 On la Pi-Besɛt kom-bɩɩba na n paa zabrẽ, tɩ b tall sẽn ketã n loog yembdo." 
Ezekiel30:18 Tapanɛs tẽnga kõn le yãend wĩntooga vẽenem ye, Ezipt wãab raare, a kõn le tõog n yɩ a zu-zẽkre la a faong ye. Sawad sabelle n na n lud-a, la b na n talla a nebã n kẽng yembdo." 
Ezekiel30:19 M na pidsa kãab-beed ning m sẽn kãab Ezipt tẽnga la b na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› » 
Ezekiel30:20 Yembda kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a ye soaba, pipi kiuugã, a daar a yopoe soaba, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel30:21 «Ezekiyɛl, mam wooga Ezipt tẽng dĩma pãnga, m kaooga a kanga la ned ba a ye ka wa ne tɩɩm, bɩ pɛɛla, ned ba a ye ka vil a kanga t'a leb n paam pãnga n tõog n gãd sʋʋg ye." 
Ezekiel30:22 Yaa rẽ me la m leokda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne Ezipt dĩma. Kang ninga sẽn ket n tar-a pãngã na kaoogame n paase tɩ yɩ kams a yiiba fãa. A sʋʋga na n lʋɩ-la a nugẽ." 
Ezekiel30:23 M na n sẽega Ezipt tẽns a taab pʋgẽ, m na n sẽeg-a-la tẽn-zẽnsa pʋsẽ." 
Ezekiel30:24 Mam na n paasa Babilon dĩma pãnga, la m na n ninga m meng sʋʋg a nugẽ. Ezipt dĩma kamsa sẽn kao yĩnga, a na n wa yãbdame la a kiid a bɛ taoore." 
Ezekiel30:25 N-ye! Ezipt dĩma kamsa na n luunda woto, n ka tar pãng ye tɩ m yaool n na n paas Babilon dĩma rẽnna. M na n dɩka m meng sʋʋg n ning a nugẽ la a na n zẽk-a-la Ezipt dĩma zugu, la neba fãa na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel30:26 M na n sẽega Ezipt tẽns a taab pʋgẽ, m na n sẽeg-a-la tẽn-zẽnsa pʋsẽ. Dẽ la b bãngd tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel31:1 Yembda kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a ye soaba, kiuug a tãab soaba, la kiuuga pipi daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel31:2 «Ninsaal biiga, ad-f sẽn na n yeel Ezipt dĩma la a soolma rãmba sẽn ka tɛkã: ‹M na n mak-f-la ne bõe, fo sẽn gãe ne pãngã?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Fo wẽnda Libã kʋk buudu; fo tẽega f wila neere tɩ f maasem ya noogo. F tão-la f zugã, t'a kul sawatẽ." 
Ezekiel31:4 Tɩɩga ra bɩɩ ne saaga koom, koom sẽn da bund a tẽngre n da bɩɩs-a. Kooma ra tigimda a sɛɛgẽ, n lɛɛg n zoet n babsd pʋta tɩɩs a taaba." 
Ezekiel31:5 Kooma sẽn da sekd-a wã a tãoome n zʋʋg tɩɩs a taaba. Wila ra paam n tãoome la b ra waoogame. 
Ezekiel31:6 Luiili buud toor-toore da tʋɩta b tʋgdo a willẽ; tɩ we-rũmsi da wat a tẽngre, n dogd b kamba. Neb wʋsgo da wat n zĩ-la a maasmẽ." 
Ezekiel31:7 A da yaa tɩ-neere, n tar maasem, n tar zãndlem; a wila sẽn da sud zĩig ninga ra gala ne koom." 
Ezekiel31:8 Eden zẽeda pʋgẽ tɩɩg ba a ye ra ka be n wẽnd-a ye; tɩɩs niyns vãad sẽn ka kʋɩtã, zɩ n tão a wila buud ye. Vã tagda rãmb zɩ n bĩm wa yẽnd ye." 
Ezekiel31:9 M da sɩd kõ-a-la wil neeba; Eden, Wẽnnaam zẽeda, tɩɩsã da get-a lame la b kũmd sũuri.›" 
Ezekiel31:10 Ad-m sẽn le gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Kʋka bɩɩme t'a zug tɩ be sawatẽ, t'a na n tũ rẽ n maan wilg-m-menga." 
Ezekiel31:11 Yaa rẽ la m dɩk-a n bas tẽng zug dĩm kãsenga nugẽ, t'a na n paoog-a wala a sẽn tog ne paoogr ningã." 
Ezekiel31:12 Bu-zẽn dãmba toolem sẽn yɩɩd buud a taab rẽnna, kɛɛg-a lame la b bas-a lame n looge. A wil bɛdã, a wil bõonega kaoome n dʋr tãnga zug la bãadẽ. Neb niyns sẽn da vɩ a maasmẽ wã zoe n loogame." 
Ezekiel31:13 Yĩngri luiili wã fãa dã zao-la a wil sẽn kʋʋse; we-rʋmsa fãa da waa n tabda a wilã. 
Ezekiel31:14 Maana woto tɩ tɩɩg ba a ye sẽn be koom noore, n tɩg koom, da le tõog n zẽk a wilã n ta sawato, tɩ rẽ wa ne a wilg-m-meng ye. Bala tɩɩsa wa ninsaalba, fãa gill yaa kũum n so, fãa gill na n gãanda tẽnga ne sẽn deng-b bʋg-tenga.›" 
Ezekiel31:15 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Kʋka sẽn sig bʋg-teng daare, mam kɩtame tɩ bũmb fãa kelem a kʋʋre; m paga tẽngr kʋɩlga koom, a ka le zoet ye, ko-nif ba a ye ka le bund ye. A kʋʋra yãbr yĩnga, m pidsa Libã tãmsa ne lika, la m kʋɩɩsa weta tɩɩs fãa." 
Ezekiel31:16 Mam sẽn kɩt tɩ tɩɩga lʋɩ, n kẽng n tɩ naag ne kɩɩmsã, bu-zẽna wʋma a lʋɩɩsã, n yɛɛse, n sɩng rigbu. Sẽn kɩdem-b sũ-noogo yaa bʋg-tẽng rãmba, yaa Eden tɩɩsã, tɩɩs sẽn tar neerem wʋsgo, tɩɩs sẽn tɩg-b koom n yɩɩd fãa, Libã tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezekiel31:17 Bãmb me busa tẽnga ne sẽn pa-b zabrẽ, bãmb n da sõngd-a, la b ra vɩ-la a maasmẽ, bu-zẽmba sʋka." 
Ezekiel31:18 Eden tɩɩg ba a ye ka kolg foo ne neerem la bedrem ye. B na n yaool n naaga foom bʋg-tẽnga, tɩ f gãe be ne nin-dẽgdo la sẽn pa-b zabrẽ. Woto n na n yɩ Ezipt dĩma ne a neba pʋɩɩre. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete.› »" 
Ezekiel32:1 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a yiib soaba, kiuug piig la a yiibu soaba, kiuuga pipi daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel32:2 «Ezekiyɛl, maan kũmkũm yɩɩlle Ezipt dĩma yĩnga. Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yete: ‹Fo bee bu-zẽmba sʋka wa bõnyẽ-bila, la wakat kẽer me f manesma wẽnda wag-bãnda manesem; tɩ f be kʋɩlga naoorẽ n deemnẽ, tɩ f nao wã dẽgemd kooma, tɩ f bendgd kooma ne f ko-wiisi.›" 
Ezekiel32:3 Kelg maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yete: ‹M gũudame tɩ neba wa tigim zembala, tɩ m lob m zulungã n yaag-fo n dɩgl kʋɩlga noore." 
Ezekiel32:4 M na n basa foom yɩnga, m na n kɩtame tɩ yĩngr luiili wã fãa wa zõm f zugu, m na n kɩtame tɩ we-rũmsa fãa wa wãb foom." 
Ezekiel32:5 M na n ninga fo nemdã sẽn keesã la sẽn lebg yũugã tãms zutu, m na n ning-b-la bãg-faasẽ." 
Ezekiel32:6 Tẽnga na n yũ-la f zɩɩma; zɩɩma na mada tãmsã, n mad f sudsã." 
Ezekiel32:7 Fo sã n wa ki, m na n luda saaga, la m na n kɩtame tɩ ãds sobe, m na n luda wĩndga ne sawato, la kiuug ka na n le kõ a vẽenem ye." 
Ezekiel32:8 Fo yĩnga m na n kiisa yĩngr vẽenem fãa. Tẽnga gill na n paa likẽ. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n togsde." 
Ezekiel32:9 Buud wʋsgo fo sẽn ka mi menga sũur na sãame, f wãaba kibar sã n ta-ba." 
Ezekiel32:10 M sẽn na n kɩt tɩ f nams namsg ninga na n kẽesa neb wʋsgo rabeem kãsenga. B nanams pɛleng na n yɩka wʋsgo tɩ b digimdi, mam sã n wa dĩms m sʋʋga bãmb zutu. Fo lʋɩɩs daare, b na n diga rabeem, daara tõre, ned kam fãa zĩi n bʋʋda a yõore.›" 
Ezekiel32:11 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn paasde: ‹Babilon dĩma tãb-biis na n pʋg-f lame. 
Ezekiel32:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ tãb-biisi sẽn ya toos wʋsgo wa kʋ f neb ka tɛkã. Tãb-biisa na wãa Ezipt sẽn pid ne wilg-m-menga n pa kees ned ye. 
Ezekiel32:13 M na n kʋla a rũmsa fãa sẽn yelgd Nil kʋɩlga noore. Ninsaal bɩ rũng nao kõn leb n bendg a koom ye. 
Ezekiel32:14 Mam na bas Nil kooma tɩ tisgi; kʋɩlga na zoe wala kaam n ka tar bʋʋr ye. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto." 
Ezekiel32:15 M na kɩtame tɩ Ezipt lebg zĩ-peen-daaga; b na n looga ne a laoga fãa, a neba fãa na n loogame. Woto la b bãngda tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.›" 
Ezekiel32:16 Yaa sũ-sãang yɩɩl kãnga, la tẽnsa fãa pagb na n yɩɩle. B na yɩɩl-a-la Ezipt la a zãma wã yĩnga. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n wilgd rẽnna.»" 
Ezekiel32:17 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a yiib soaba, kiuug piig la a yiib soaba, kiuuga piig la a nu raare, Soaala goma ne maam:" 
Ezekiel32:18 «Ninsaal biiga, yãb Ezipt zãma wã; bɩ f kũmkũma tus yẽnda la bu-zẽmba gilli tɩ b lʋɩ bog zulung ninga kɩɩmsa sẽn dabdẽ wã." 
Ezekiel32:19 Sok-y-b woto: ‹Yãmb yẽ tẽedame tɩ y na põs la? Loog-y n tɩ gãand-y ne bu-zẽmb a taaba sẽn pa zabrẽ.› 
Ezekiel32:20 Sɩda Ezipt rãmba na n kii zabrẽ. Bɩ sʋʋsa sẽn yiis b wʋʋgẽ wã kʋ Ezipt tãb-biisa fãa! 
Ezekiel32:21 Gãndaad menga, Ezipt zo-rãmba, n na n zĩnd bʋg-tẽngẽ n yeele: ‹Ad-y b watame, ad-y nin-dẽgda sẽn ki zabrẽ wã watame n na n gãand tõnd sʋka.›" 
Ezekiel32:22 Ad-a Asʋr, ad-a tãb-biis fãa sẽn lʋɩ zabrẽ wã yaad sẽn gũbg a rẽnna." 
Ezekiel32:23 Bʋg-tẽng boka sẽn tɩ zulmẽ wã la b tu b yaado n gũbg b rĩma rẽnda. Zabr sʋʋg n kood b fãa gilli. Bãmb n yaool n da yɛɛsd ãndũni rãmba. 
Ezekiel32:24 Ad-a Elam, ad-a tãb-biis yaad sẽn gũbg a yaoogo; b fãa lʋɩɩme, fãa yaa sʋʋg n koode. Nin-dẽgd bãmba n da yɛɛsd ãndũni rãmba, la ad-b sẽn bus tẽnga. B naagame n sig bʋg-tẽng ne yãnde tɩ b kii wa neb a taaba." 
Ezekiel32:25 N-ye! Elam dĩma tʋɩ-la a gãaga, a tãb-biis sʋka. A tãb-biisa yaad gũbga a rẽnna. Nin-dẽgd bãmba fãa kii zabrẽ; bãmb n yaool n da yɛɛsd ãndũni rãmba la ad-b sẽn gãe marsã ne yãnde, ne neb sẽn ki zabrẽ wa bãmba." 
Ezekiel32:26 Ad Mezek, ad Tubal dĩm dãmba ne b tãb-biisã. B yaada gũbga ne b tãb-biisa rẽnna. Nin-dẽgd bãmba fãa lʋɩ zabrẽ. Bãmb n yaool n da yɛɛsd ãndũni rãmba." 
Ezekiel32:27 B ka naag ne gãndaad niyns sẽn lʋɩ b pĩnda ye, gãndaad niyns sẽn da yɛɛsd-b ãndũni rãmba, la sẽn sig bʋg-tẽng ne b zab-teedo, n dɩk b zug n kʋgl b sʋʋga, n dɩk b gãndo n pil b yĩnga ye." 
Ezekiel32:28 Yãmb me Ezipt rãmba, y me na n kiime la b na n mum-y-la ne nin-dẽgdo sẽn lʋɩ zabrẽ." 
Ezekiel32:29 Ad-a Edom, ad-a dĩm damba ne a na-biisi. Ne b raooda sẽn pa yɩ bilfã, b muma bãmb me wa sẽn pa-b zabrẽ. Bãmb me gãnega bʋg-tẽng ne nin-dẽgdã sẽn deng-b bãmba." 
Ezekiel32:30 Ad nug goabg dĩm dãmba, bãmb me bee ka ne Sidõ rãmba fãa sẽn gãe ne kɩɩmse. Yɩɩ gãndaad sẽn da yɛɛsd ãndũni rãmba, la marsã nin-dẽgd bãmba gãe ne yãnde ne sẽn ki-b zabrẽ wa bãmba. Bãmb me gãe ne yãnde." 
Ezekiel32:31 Ezipt dĩma na n yãenda a tãb-biisã la yẽ nengẽ wã na sãoog bilfu, tɩ yẽ naag-b lame n ki zabrẽ. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel32:32 M basa Ezipt dĩma t'a yɛɛs ãndũni rãmba. Marsã, yẽ ne a tãb-biisa fãa na n naagame n mum ne nin-dẽgdo sẽn pa zabrẽ. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gome.»" 
Ezekiel33:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel33:2 «Ezekiyɛl, gom ne m buuda kamba. Tẽeg-b sẽm maand bũmb ninga, zabr sã n wa yik tẽngẽ. Tẽnga rãmb yãkda bãmb nin-yende t'a yɩ gũusda." 
Ezekiel33:3 A sã yãend tɩ bɛɛb wata, a peebda baorgo tɩ neb bãng tiiri." 
Ezekiel33:4 Sẽn wʋma baorga peebgo, n maan wa a toog ka be ye tɩ b yõk-a n kʋ, yẽ soab zɩɩm daagr taale be-la a meng zugu." 
Ezekiel33:5 A wʋma baorga peebgo, la a maana wa a ka wʋm ye. A zɩɩma daagre lʋɩta a zugu. A sã n da ka maanẽ wa a toog kaẽ, a põsdẽ lame." 
Ezekiel33:6 La b sẽn yãk a soab t'a gũusdẽ wã, sã n yãe tɩ bɛɛb wata, t'a yaool n ka peeb baorga tɩ neb bãng tiiri, sʋʋgã sã n wa kʋ bãmb nin-yende, ya gũusda yelle, yaa yẽ zug la taala lʋɩta." 
Ezekiel33:7 Foo, Ezekiyɛl, yaa foo la m yãk yã, tɩ f yɩ gũusda a Israyɛl yĩnga. Fo na n kelga m goama, fo na n taasa Israyɛl dãmb m sẽn yet tɩ b gũus ne bũmb ningã." 
Ezekiel33:8 Mam sã n dat tɩ yel-wẽn-maand bãng t'a rɩka a kũum sore tɩ fo pa yeel-a t'a tedg vɩɩm, nin-kãng na n ki-la a sẽn maan wẽnga yĩnga la yaa foo n na n dɩ a kũuma taale." 
Ezekiel33:9 Marsã fo sã n pĩnd n wilg nin-wẽngã, t'a bas a wẽnema, n tek a zʋgo, t'a pa sake, a na n ki-la a sẽn maan wẽnga yĩnga la taal ka gũusda zug ye, f fãaga f yõore.»" 
Ezekiel33:10 «Foom, Ezekiyɛl, yeel a Israyɛl doogo: ‹Yãmb gomdame tɩ y tʋʋm-wẽna la y yel-wẽna tʋk-y-la zɩɩb sẽn na n kʋ yãmba la y ka mi y sẽn na n maan bũmb ning n põs ye.›" 
Ezekiel33:11 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, Vɩɩm Naaba sẽn leokde: ‹Mam pa nong nin-wẽnsa kũum ye, mam sẽn date, yaa b teem zʋgo n paam n vɩɩnde. M kot-y lame, Israyɛl kamba, tɩ y bas wẽnem. Bõe yĩng la y na n tʋlg kũum?›" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ninsaal biiga, yeel f buuda kamba: ‹Nin-tɩrg sã n yik n maand wẽnga, neer ning a sẽn maan pĩnda kõn sõng-a t'a põs yel-beed ninga sẽn gũud-a wã ye. La nin-wẽng sã n teem vɩɩm, a pĩnd yel-wẽnda ka na n le wa ne a kũum ye. La nin-sõng sã n sɩng wẽng maanego, ad-a kõn põse, a pĩnd vɩɩma yĩng ye." 
Ezekiel33:13 Mam sã n yeel nin-tɩrga t'a na n vɩɩndame, a ra tẽ t'a pĩnd sõmblema sekame t'a na n yik marsã n maan wẽng ye. M na n yĩma a tʋʋm sõma wã la a tʋʋm wẽnsa na n waa ne a kũum." 
Ezekiel33:14 La mam sã n yeel nin-wẽnga t'a toga ne kũum, t'a yik n bas a wẽnema n lebg nin-tɩrga, n lebg zemsg soaba, ad-a kõn ki ye." 
Ezekiel33:15 A sã n peng bũmb n deeg bobelle la a lebsa a sẽn deegã, bɩ a lebsa a wagdema bũmbu, a sã n ka le maand wẽnga la a reegd noy-niyns fãa sẽn kõt vɩɩm, sɩda a kõn ki ye, a na n vɩɩndame." 
Ezekiel33:16 B ka na n le tẽeg yel-wẽn-niynsi fãa a sẽn maana ye. A tũu noore la zemsg sẽn dat bũmb ninga, a na n vɩɩndame.›" 
Ezekiel33:17 Fo buuda kamba yetame tɩ maam sẽn maanda yaa n looga toogo. M sok n gese sãnd ka bãmb n ka bʋʋm? 
Ezekiel33:18 Nin-tɩrga sã n bas neer maanego n maand wẽnga, a na ki rẽnd yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:19 La nin-wẽnga sã n basd a wẽnem, n na n tũ noore la zemsgo sẽn dat a soabã, yẽ me na vɩɩnd rẽnd yĩnga." 
Ezekiel33:20 La yãmb yetame tɩ mam dẽnna n loog toogo, bãng-y tɩ m na n kaoo yãmb bʋʋdo n tũ ned kam fãa manesem.»" 
Ezekiel33:21 Pa-weera kẽnd yʋʋmd piig la a ye soaba, kiuug piig soaba, kiuuga daar a nu soaba, nin-yende, sẽn põs Zerizalɛɛm wãaba raare, n waa n yeele: «Tẽnga lʋɩɩme!»" 
Ezekiel33:22 Zaabre, a waoonga ket tɩ beoogo, Naaba-Wẽnd wilga maam b pãnga n kɩt tɩ m tõe n gome. Sẽn põsa wã sẽn ta m nengẽ, m da tõe n gomame, m da ka le ya muk ye." 
Ezekiel33:23 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel33:24 «Ninsaal biiga, yaa woto la neb niyns sẽn pa Israyɛl tẽn-wãanda pʋs gomda: ‹A Abraam yɩ-la a ye la yẽ n da so tẽn-kãnga gilli. Tõnd sẽn lebg ka tɛkã yaa vẽeneg t'a tog n yɩ-la d soolem.›" 
Ezekiel33:25 Woto wã! Togs-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn leokd-ba: ‹Yãmb wãbda rũng sẽn ka kodg nemdo, yãmb zẽkda y nini n get wẽn-naandse, yãmb daagda zɩɩm, n yaool n zĩ be n gomd tɩ tẽnga yaa yãmb n so?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Yãmb teega y sʋʋs bala, yãmb tʋmda tʋʋm yoodo, yamb dooda taaba pagba, n yaool n zĩ be n gomd tɩ tẽnga yaa yãmb n so?›" 
Ezekiel33:27 Taas-b woto: ‹Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, n wilgdi tɩ b na kʋʋ neb niyns sẽn pa-b raboodẽ wã, sẽn be-b wetẽ, wã we-rũms n na wãb bãmba; sẽn solg-b tãmsa zutã la tãmsa bogdẽ, bã-longdma n na n kʋ bãmba." 
Ezekiel33:28 M na n wãa tẽngã n kɩt t'a lebg zĩ-peen-daaga. A ra teega a pãng n maand wilg-m-menga. Israyɛl tãmsã kõn le yãend ned sẽn na n saag n dʋ be ye. 
Ezekiel33:29 M sã n wa tedg tẽnga neng zãnga t'a lebg we-raoogo n sɩbg tẽnga rãmb tʋʋm yoodã, b na bãng marsã tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.›" 
Ezekiel33:30 La foom, ninsaal biiga, fo yems-taasã tara goam tẽnga lals seese la b rot kʋɩlens noore. B gomda fo poorẽ n yet taaba: ‹D kẽng n tɩ kelg Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga.›" 
Ezekiel33:31 La woto m neba wata wʋsgo fo nengẽ, n na n kelg-fo. B kelgda f goama la b pa maand f sẽn yet ye. B maanda wa b sẽn date, n baood sẽn nafd bãmba." 
Ezekiel33:32 Ade, bãmb nengẽ fo wẽnda yʋʋma sẽn tar koe noogo la sẽn zodgd noogo. B kelgda f saglsã la b pa tũud ye." 
Ezekiel33:33 B bãng tɩ fo sẽn bilgda sã n wa pidsi, la kõn le kaoos ye, b na reeg tɩ bãngd n da be b sʋka.»" 
Ezekiel34:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam woto: 
Ezekiel34:2 «Ezekiyɛl, zab ne Israyɛl pe-kɩɩmbã la f taas-ba m sẽn yet tɩ b gũus ne bũmb ningã. Maam n yet-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Yell na pak yã, Israyɛl pe-kɩɩmba! Y geta y mens yelle. Yaool n yaa bãgrã la pe-kɩɩma tog n gese." 
Ezekiel34:3 Yãmb basda bãgra piisi. Y sẽn mi bal yaa y rɩlg y meng ne bĩisima la y yeelg kõbda futã la y kʋ pe-nobdsã n wãbe. 
Ezekiel34:4 Yãmb ka ges pe-waga yell ye, yãmb ka tɩbs bãad-dãmb la sẽn pogl-ba ye. Yãmb ka lek pesg ninga sẽn da bʋdgda ye, la y ka bao sẽn da menem-a wã ye. Yãmb ka zã-b neer ye, y maan-b-la pãn-tõogo." 
Ezekiel34:5 Woto, pe-kɩɩm sõng kaalem yĩnga, piisa sẽegame n lebg we-rũms rɩɩbo." 
Ezekiel34:6 Mam piisa kẽngame n tɩ menem tãms la kunkub zutu, mam piisa sẽega zĩis fãa tẽng zugu, la ned ka lob a toog ye, ned ba a ye ka sa n bao-b ye." 
Ezekiel34:7 Dẽ wã yĩnga, Israyɛl pe-kɩɩmba, kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd gomde:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Sɩd ne sɩda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, m yam ya n yii ne b sẽn basd m piisa ne fãadbã. Pe-kɩɩmb kaalem yĩnga, piisa lebga we-rũms rɩɩbo. M pe-kɩɩmba ka ges b yell ye. B basa piisa gesg n ges b meng yelle." 
Ezekiel34:9 Boto wã yĩnga, Israyɛl pe-kɩɩmba, kelg-y!" 
Ezekiel34:10 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m wilgd-y lame tɩ m na n yika ne-yã, la y ka na n le zã m piisa ye. Ka yãmb n na n le ges b yell ye, la y kõn le rɩ b yõod ye. M na deega y noorẽ m bãgra rũmsi, y kõn le rɩlg y mens ne b ye." 
Ezekiel34:11 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam a Naaba-Wẽnde: Marsã tɛka m meng m toore, n na n ges m piisa yelle. M meng n na n gũ-ba." 
Ezekiel34:12 M na modg n le tigim-ba wala pe-kɩɩm sẽn maande, a piisa sã n sẽege. M na n tɩ bao m rũmsã b sẽn tɩ sẽeg zĩig ning fãa, sa kãsenga niiba raare." 
Ezekiel34:13 M na yiis-b bu-zẽmb tẽnsẽ, b sẽn be zĩig ning fãa; m na tall-ba n wa tigim la m le tall-b n wa b tẽngẽ. M na tall-ba n dʋʋs Israyɛl tãmsã, a bãg-faasã, tẽnga sẽn sakd zĩigẽ fãa." 
Ezekiel34:14 M na n kɩtame tɩ b kẽes-b yam nood zĩigẽ. B wãbneg zĩig na n yɩɩ Israyɛl tãmsa zutu. Beelẽ b na n paama vʋʋsg la yamd nood zĩiga. 
Ezekiel34:15 Maam n na n yɩ b pe-kɩɩma. M na n fãag-b-la ne we-rũmsã. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yeele." 
Ezekiel34:16 Pesg ninga sẽn meneme, m na bao-a n tall n wa; sẽn pogl-a, m na tɩbs-a; la sẽn bẽed-a, m na sãoog-a t'a paam pãnga. Sẽn nob-a tɩ looge, sẽn tar-a pãng tɩ looge, m na yiis-a. M na yɩ pe-kɩɩm ning tʋʋmde sẽn be yõodo.›" 
Ezekiel34:17 Sã ya bãgrã, ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Mam na n ges sẽn be piisa ne taab sʋka, sẽn be pe-raada la boeesa sʋka." 
Ezekiel34:18 M na bãng sẽn ya bũmb ning yĩnga la rũms kẽer ka rat n pa wãbneg zĩis sẽn ya sõmb n yɩɩd zĩis a taaba. M na bãng bõe yĩng la b tabd yamda sẽn ketã, tɩ ko-yɩlemda sẽn na n yũ wã pa tat b yam, tɩ b na n deng n bendga ne b nao?" 
Ezekiel34:19 M na bãng yaa bõe la rũmsa bogr na n kong n wãbd yamda kẽer sẽn tabe la b yũud kooma b sẽn bendgã. 
Ezekiel34:20 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, yet-y woto: m na bʋ n ges sẽn ya bũmb ning n be rũm-waglsa la sẽn nob-ba sʋka." 
Ezekiel34:21 Sẽn nob-ba tusa ne b bãgdo la b lʋga, piis niyns sẽn ka tar-b pãngã. B tãad-b-la ne y yɩɩla n wa rig-b n yiis bãgrẽ." 
Ezekiel34:22 M wata b sõngre, tɩ b ra le bas-b ne we-rũms ye la m na n yalsa yãmb ne bãmb sʋka." 
Ezekiel34:23 M na n lʋɩɩsa m bãgra taoore, pe-kɩɩm yɛnga, sẽn na n bãng a gesgo. Na n yɩ-la m tʋʋm-tʋmd, a Daviid. Yẽ na n gesa bãgra rũms yelle la a na n yɩɩ pe-kɩɩm sõngo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m na yɩ bãmb Wẽnde la m tʋʋm-tʋmd a Daviid na yɩ b na-biiga. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel34:25 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ laafi zĩnd rũmsa bãgrẽ, n kɩt tɩ we-rũmsa menem tẽnga pʋgẽ. Woto rũmsa na zĩnd ne laafi, b wãbneg zĩisẽ, b na gũs ne laafi b bãgrẽ." 
Ezekiel34:26 M na n kõ-b-la sore tɩ b pa m tãn-sõnga sɛɛga. M na kɩt tɩ saag ni a wakato, n wa ne kũun toor-toore." 
Ezekiel34:27 Tɩɩsa na n womame, la tẽnga kood me na n bɩɩme, tɩ ned kam fãa zĩ tẽnga ne laafi. M na n kao bãeensã sẽn loe m buuda neb kẽere, m na n fãag-b-la b zu-soaben-dãmb nusẽ la woto la b bãngd tɩ maam la Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel34:28 Bu-zẽmba me kõn le wa yõg-ba tɩ b lebg b pʋɩɩr ye, we-rũmsa me kõn le wãb-b ye. B na n vɩɩnda ne laafi, tɩ bũmb ka leb n kẽes-b rabeem ye." 
Ezekiel34:29 M na n kõ-b-la pʋto sẽn ka be tar ne wombo, la kom kõn le nams tẽnga rãmb ye. Tẽns a taaba kõn le paoog-b ye." 
Ezekiel34:30 Woto b na bãng tɩ maam b Wẽndã, toog bee ne bãmba la a Israyɛl buuda la m buudu. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yeele." 
Ezekiel34:31 N-ye, yãmba, m bãgra piisi, m geta y yelle tɩ maam la yãmb Wẽnde. Yaa mam menga, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n togse.› »" 
Ezekiel35:1 Soaala-Wẽnd goma woto: 
Ezekiel35:2 «Ezekiyɛl, kedg n tees Seyir la f pĩnd n togs woto a poorẽ." 
Ezekiel35:3 Yeel-b tɩ b kelg m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. M na n yika ne yãmba, M na n wilg-y-la m pãnga, Edom, m na n wã-f lame, la f na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Ezekiel35:4 M na n wã-la f tẽn-bɛdã, f tẽnga gill na n lebga raboogo la f na bãng tɩ maam la Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel35:5 Fo zɩ n vʋʋs ne Israyɛl dãmba kisgu ye. M sẽn waa n tʋlg n sɛɛs b wẽnema n dɩk-ba n bas b bɛɛba nugẽ, fo varg-b la ne f sʋʋga." 
Ezekiel35:6 Dẽ yĩnga, sɩd ne sɩda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, n yete: ‹M na n daaga f zɩɩm la m yõog-f ne bugum tɩ zɩɩm ninga fo sẽn daagã n dat zɩɩm n lebse. Fo sẽn pa zoe f taab kũuma, fo me na n kiime." 
Ezekiel35:7 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ Seyir tãnga lebg zĩ-peen-daaga la m na n kʋ ned ning fãa sẽn na n pɩʋʋg be. 
Ezekiel35:8 M na n pidsa f tãmsa zut ne kũum. Zabra sʋʋg na n gãnega kũum f kunkuba zutu, f bãadẽ, la f tãmsa bogdẽ wã fãa." 
Ezekiel35:9 Yaa daar fãa yĩnga la f tẽnga na n lebg zĩ-peen-daaga, la ned kõn le kẽ f tẽngẽ ye. La woto f na bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel35:10 Fo saag n yeelame: m na n pãb n sooga Israyɛl la Zɩɩda rĩundu, Soaala sẽn maan b yamleoog tẽnsã." 
Ezekiel35:11 Ade, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, Vɩɩm Naaba, m na n zã-f lame wala fo sẽn zã bãmba la bãng tɩ f maan-b-la pãn-tõogo, f maana sũ-kiir ne-ba, f kisg-b lame. M na wilg-b mam sẽn yaa a soaba ne sɩbgr ning m sẽn na n sɩbg fooma." 
Ezekiel35:12 Rẽnda marsã la f bãngda tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, wʋma f tɩtaam goama, f sẽn waa n maanẽ tɩ Israyɛl tãmsa yaa foom n so-b, n maanẽ tɩ f wã-b lame la b lebga f soolem." 
Ezekiel35:13 Fo paooga maam al wʋsgo. M pa yĩm f tɩtaam goama ye.› 
Ezekiel35:14 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n wã-f-la zãnga n pids f yagsa ne sũ-noogo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Fo nooga f sũuri ne m buud a Israyɛl wãabã. Fo me na n wãa wa yẽnda; f tãmsa gilli, f tẽn-peelma zãnga, fãa na n wãame. La woto la neba fãa bãngda tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel36:1 «La foom, Ezekiyɛl, pĩnd n gom a Israyɛl tãmsa poorẽ. Fo na n wilg-b lame tɩ b kelg" 
Ezekiel36:2 maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yet-ba: ‹Y bɛɛba pusga laado la b yeelame: a Israyɛl ne a tãmsa yaa tõnd n so!›" 
Ezekiel36:3 Ad yaa rẽ yĩnga, Ezekiyɛl, la m yet tɩ f taas Israyɛl kamba woto: ‹M yãendame tɩ sẽn lebẽ fãa, b yika zabr ne y tãmsã. Wʋsg tʋlgame n soog-ba, la b sɩd waa n lʋɩ bu-zẽmb soolmẽ, la bu-zẽmba sɩnga laad la tʋʋre.›" 
Ezekiel36:4 Dẽ yĩnga, gom ne b woto: ‹Israyɛl tãmse, kelg-y maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, sẽn kãabd bũmb ninga, y tãmse, y kunkuba, y kʋɩls sẽn zoet ne rãamde, y bãado, y raboodo, y tẽn-wãando. Yãmb yagsa pidsa yãmb ne naong la paoore." 
Ezekiel36:5 Sẽn ya woto wã, maam m yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m sũura puugame tɩ m yet a Israyɛl yagsã, maan gũusgu, bũmb zãnga a Edom, tɩ tẽn-bãmb yika ne kɩdengo, n yik ne tɩtaam, n deeg m tẽngã la b zɛɛ a rũmsi.›" 
Ezekiel36:6 Woto yĩnga, Ezekiyɛl, taas a Israyɛl m koɛɛgã. Yeel tãmsã, kunkubã, kʋɩlsa sẽn zoet ne rãamdã la bãadã, tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n basa m sũura t'a fudgi. Yeel-ba: ‹Bu-zẽmba tʋʋsa yãmba, n paoog yãmba." 
Ezekiel36:7 Sã n ya maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m zẽka m nugu la mam kãabdame tɩ tẽnsa sẽn gũbg yãmba, n tʋʋsd yãmbã, dẽ fãa na n leb-b lame." 
Ezekiel36:8 Badaare, Israyɛl tãmsa zutu tɩɩsa na n tãoo will la vãado, n wom biisi mam buud a Israyɛl yĩnga, la kõn le kaoos t'a kamba leb b tẽngẽ ye." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ade, m na n maana bũmb y yĩnga, m na n kɩtame tɩ b le ko tẽngã la b bʋd-a." 
Ezekiel36:10 M na n kɩtame tɩ neba me sõor paase, tɩ neb leb n wa kẽ tẽnsã. Tẽns niyns sẽn wã-ba na n le meeme." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ninsaalba la rũmsa sõor na n paasame. Y sõora pʋs n na n yɩɩ wʋsgo, y yagensa na n yɩɩ ka tɛka. Tẽnga na n le pida neb wa pĩnda, y arzɛka na n yɩɩga pĩnd dẽnna. Woto y na reeg tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel36:12 Mam na n kɩtame tɩ m buud a Israyɛl kamba kẽ tẽngã, n karg-a, n soog-a la a kamba kõn le yi n bas-a ye." 
Ezekiel36:13 Ad-m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: B yetame tɩ Israyɛl wẽnda bõn-ninda sẽn wãbd a meng kamba." 
Ezekiel36:14 To! Dũnna tɛka tẽnga kõn le wãb a kẽedb ye; a kõn le reeg neba kamba n bas-b ye. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togsde." 
Ezekiel36:15 M na kɩt tɩ f ra le wʋm tẽns a taba tʋʋr la b laad ye. Y tẽnga kõn le bas t'a kamb ki ye. Maam n gomd boto, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel36:16 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maan n yeele: 
Ezekiel36:17 «Ninsaal biiga, kelge: a Israyɛl kamba sẽn da waa n ket b tẽngẽ wã b tʋma tʋʋm yoodo n dẽgem tẽngã. B rẽgda looga pag sẽn nan ka pek rẽnna." 
Ezekiel36:18 B rẽgma tẽnga ne nin-kʋʋre la wẽn-naands waoogre. Yaa rẽ la mam sũur puug ne bãmb al wusgo. 
Ezekiel36:19 Mam sẽeg-b-la zĩis fãa, m sẽeg-b-la tẽn-zẽmbẽ. Dẽ la sɩbgr ning m sẽn sɩbg-ba, b tʋʋm yooda yĩnga." 
Ezekiel36:20 La b sẽn zĩnd tẽns niynsã, be me b sãama m yʋʋr sõngã, tɩ b ra gomd bãmb poorẽ n yetẽ: ‹Yaa Naaba-Wẽnd kamba la b yiis-b-la b tẽngẽ.›" 
Ezekiel36:21 Woto wã Israyɛl sẽn tɩ kẽ bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ, a maaname tɩ b paoog la b sãam m yʋʋre. Rẽ nams-m lame." 
Ezekiel36:22 M yet-f lame, Ezekiyɛl, tɩ f taas-ba m koɛɛg kãnga: ‹M sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, Israyɛl kamba, ad-y ka y vɩɩm sõnga la mam get ye. M pa ratame bala tɩ b paoog m yʋʋr sõngã, bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ, y sẽn sẽeg n be zĩis niynsã." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ne y sẽn paoog maam bãmb taoorã, m na wilg-ba, ne m sẽn na n maan y yĩngã, tɩ maam la Na-kãseng, Na-Sõngo, Naaba-Wẽnde. Yaa maam n gomda." 
Ezekiel36:24 M sã n wa yiis-y buud niynsi la tẽns niyns y sẽn be rũnna wã, m na n tigim-y lame n tall-y n tɩ lebs y tẽngẽ." 
Ezekiel36:25 M na n dɩka ko-yɩlgemde n waal yã, n pek wẽn-naandsa pʋgbã sẽn dẽgem yãmbã." 
Ezekiel36:26 M na n kõo yãmb sũ-paalga, la yam paalga, m na n yãka yãmb sũurã sẽn ya kugrã n ledg sũuri sẽn deegd saglgo." 
Ezekiel36:27 M na n pids-y-la ne m meng yam, y na lebg neb sẽn deegd gomde, sẽn deegd m noya la sẽn tũud m sẽn yalse." 
Ezekiel36:28 Yãmb na tõog n zĩnd tẽng ninga mam sẽn kõ y ba rãmba. Yãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba, la mam na n lebga yãmb Wẽnnaam." 
Ezekiel36:29 M na yiis-y y rẽgdẽ wã fãa; m na n kɩtame tɩ yãmb paam kood tɩ sek yã, la kom kõn leb n lʋɩ y tẽngẽ ye." 
Ezekiel36:30 M na n kɩtame tɩ tɩɩs wom biis wʋsg-wʋsgo, tɩ pʋtã fãa sake, la yãnd kõn le yõk-y bu-zẽmba taoore tɩ y zĩi ne kom ye." 
Ezekiel36:31 Dẽ me la y na n tẽeg y yel-wẽnã, la y tʋʋm dẽgdã yelle. Y na tẽeg rẽ tɩ y sũur yaale." 
Ezekiel36:32 Bãng-y tɩ ka yãmb yĩnga la m tʋmd m tʋʋma ye, yaa m yʋʋra kõn sãam la m tʋmda, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde. Bãng-y rẽ la y zoe yãnde, Israyɛl kamba.›" 
Ezekiel36:33 Ad-m sẽn wilgdi, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M sã n wa pek y yel-wẽna zãnga m na le pids y tẽnsa ne neba, tɩ sẽn da sirg fãa le maneg n me." 
Ezekiel36:34 B na n le sɩnga pʋ-weesa koobo; so-loaadba kõn le yãend pʋt sẽn ka ko ye.› 
Ezekiel36:35 B na n yeelame: ‹Tẽn-kãnga ra lebga zĩ-peen-daaga la ad-a sẽn lebg wa Eden zẽedo. Tẽns sẽn da wã, dot sẽn da tus n lubi, fãa le manegame n me n yals ro-bɛd sẽn tar pãnga, tɩ neb me be b pusẽ.›" 
Ezekiel36:36 Tẽns niyns sẽn kell-b yãmb sɛɛgẽ wã na bãng tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, lebsdame n me raboodo la m kood pʋ-weese. Dẽ yaa mam koɛɛga la m na n pidsa m kãabgo." 
Ezekiel36:37 Yaa maam m gomde: ‹M na n le basa Israyɛl kamba tɩ b kos m sõngre, la m na n deega b kosgo la ma na n kɩtame tɩ b fɩɩg wa bãgr piisi." 
Ezekiel36:38 Kibs bɛda wakato, Zerizalɛɛm da pita ne maanda sẽn da na n kʋ wã rũmsi. B ra wata ne b zembala. Ade, neb niyns sẽn na n le wa kẽ y raboodã sõor na n ta boto. Dẽ me la neba fãa na n deeg tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel37:1 Soaala-Wẽnd nug tika maam, tɩ b pãnga tall maam n tɩ sik bãg-faag a yembrẽ. Bãg-faaga ra yaa yalenga, n da pid ne kõaba." 
Ezekiel37:2 Soaala kɩtame tɩ m kẽne n gilg kõabã, bãg-faagẽ wã. Kõaba ra yaa wʋsg-wʋsgo, la b da kʋɩ n pelga fas." 
Ezekiel37:3 Soaala waa n sok-m lame: «Ezekiyɛl, kõab-kãensa rãmb tõe n le vɩɩndame bi?» Tɩ mam leoke: «Soaala-Wẽnde, yaa yãmb n mi.»" 
Ezekiel37:4 Tɩ b le yeele: «Gom ne kõabã, la fo na n yeel-b lame: ‹Kõab koeemse, kelg-y!" 
Ezekiel37:5 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taasd-y koɛɛg ninga: m na n le fʋʋsa y zugu la y naa n le vɩɩndame. 
Ezekiel37:6 Mam na n kõo yãmb gĩini, n le tablg yãmb nemdo, la yĩn-gãongo; m na n kõo yãmb vʋʋsem, la yãmb na n vɩɩndame. La boto y na bãng tɩ mam la Naaba-Wẽnde.› »" 
Ezekiel37:7 Mam goma ne kõab koeemsã wa Soaala sẽn da kõ maam noorã. La ade, mam sẽn da wa n gomdã, bʋrg n wãge. Tẽnga digimdame, la kõaba ra kolgda taaba, sũgdug woo sũgdug." 
Ezekiel37:8 Mam gesame, la m yãenda gĩin la nemdo, la gãong sẽn lud-ba, vʋʋsem bal la b rag n nan ka vʋʋsde." 
Ezekiel37:9 Soaala yeela maam: «Ninsaal biiga, fo na n goma ne pemsem ning neba sẽn vʋʋsd a soabã n yeel-a: ‹Vɩɩm pemsem, ad Soaala-Wẽnd n kõt-f noor tɩ f yi ween-vɩɩs a naasã n wa wẽ kũuma tɩ b le vʋʋge.› »" 
Ezekiel37:10 Mam maana wala b sẽn kõ maam noorã la vʋʋsem waa n wẽe kũuma la b paama vɩɩm n yik n yals yĩngri, b nao zutu. Yɩ tãb-biisi ne tãb-biisi." 
Ezekiel37:11 Soaala kell n paasame: «Fo ne-la, Ezekiyɛl, kõaba makda a Israyɛl. A Israyɛl neba yetame: ‹Tõnd wẽnda kõab sẽn kʋɩ, saagr buud fãa sɛ-la d nengẽ, d ka ne d sẽn tõe n le yɩ bũmb ning ye.›" 
Ezekiel37:12 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la fo na n taas-ba maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, sẽn kãabd-b bũmb ningã: ‹M na n pagsa y yaadã n yiis yã, yãmba, m buuda neba, la m na n tɩ kẽes-y-la Israyɛl, y tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezekiel37:13 M sã n wa pags y yaadã n yiis yã, y na reeg tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel37:14 M sã n kɩt tɩ pemsem vʋʋsdga wẽ-y tɩ y le vɩɩnde, m sã n le kẽes-y y tẽn-peelmẽ, y na reeg tɩ maam la Soaala-Wẽnde, la m na n pidsa m sẽn kãabe. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yeele.› »" 
Ezekiel37:15 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam: 
Ezekiel37:16 «La foom, Ezekiyɛl, dɩk ra-peoko n gʋls a zugu: ‹Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl pa-weto.› Dɩk ra-peok a to la f gʋls a zugu: ‹A Zozɛf, bɩ a Efrayim, la Israyɛl kẽedba.›" 
Ezekiel37:17 Kolg ra-pegda taaba tɩ b yɩ wa bũmb a ye, f nugẽ." 
Ezekiel37:18 Fo buuda kamba na n kos-f lame tɩ f wilg-b rẽ võore. 
Ezekiel37:19 Fo na yeel-ba tɩ maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, yet-b-la woto: ‹M na n dɩka ra-peok ning sẽn gʋls a Zozɛf la Israyɛl pa-wetã, n tɩ yegl ra-peok ning sẽn gʋls Zɩɩda kẽedbã, la mam nugẽ b na n lebga rĩung a ye.›" 
Ezekiel37:20 Foom a Ezekiyɛl, fo na n zãa ra-pegdã sẽn gʋlsã, f nugẽ, tɩ neba fãa ne-ba." 
Ezekiel37:21 F na taas-b maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yet-ba: ‹Israyɛl dãmba, ad-m na n yiis-y-la y sẽn da be bu-zẽmb niyns sʋkã, la m na n tigim-y, n le tall-y n wa Zɩɩda." 
Ezekiel37:22 M na lagem-y ne taaba, la y na n lebga buud a ye, Israyɛl tãmsa zutu. Dĩm a ye n na n dɩ naam y zugu, y kõn le welg buud a yi la rĩund a yi bada." 
Ezekiel37:23 Y ka na n le rẽgem y mense ne wẽn-naandsa pʋgb ye. Y ka na n le tʋm tʋʋm yoodo, y ka na n le maan yel-wẽnd buug ye. M na zãag-y ne tõdgr buud fãa. M na n pek-y lame, y na n yɩɩ m buudu tɩ mam yɩ y Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel37:24 Mam biiga a Daviid n na n dɩ naam yãmb zugu, yẽnda a ye bala n na n yɩ y pe-kɩɩma. Y na reeg la y tũ m sẽn wilg-y bũmb ningã." 
Ezekiel37:25 Y na n zĩnda tẽng ning mam sẽn kõ m biig a Zakoob. Y ba rãmb sẽn zĩnd tẽng ning pʋgã la yãmb me na n zĩndi. Y na n zĩnda beene, daar fãa yĩnga, yãmba, y kamba la y yagense. Mam biiga a Daviid n na n yɩ yãmb dĩma, daar fãa." 
Ezekiel37:26 Mam na n kãab-y-la laafi daar fãa. M na n maneg n zĩndg-y-la y tẽngẽ n paas y neba sõore. M na n yalsa m wẽnd dooga yãmb sʋka, daar fãa yĩnga." 
Ezekiel37:27 Mam na n yɩɩ yãmb Wẽnnaam, yãmb na n yɩɩ mam neba." 
Ezekiel37:28 La buud a taaba na bãnge tɩ mam la Naaba-Wẽnde la m welga a Israyɛl toore. Yẽ n na n yɩ m sõgne, m wẽnd dooga sã wa yɛs y sʋka, daar fãa yĩnga.› »" 
Ezekiel38:1 Naaba-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel-ma: 
Ezekiel38:2 «Ezekiyɛl, kedg f neng n ges a Gog. Yẽnda la Tubal la Mesɛk rãmb dĩma, Magog tẽn-peelmẽ. Yeel-a t'a maan gũusgu." 
Ezekiel38:3 Ad-m sẽn yet-a, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne foo, Gog, Mesɛk la Tubal dãmb dĩma." 
Ezekiel38:4 M na po-la f yɛga n sog wĩiri n ta-f ne pãnga. M na n modg-f lame tɩ f yi f tẽngẽ, foo ne f tãb-biisa fãa. F wiida ne b fan-teedo, f wed-dʋʋdba ne b fan-teedo, me f tãb-biis ka tɛk sẽn zãad gãndo la sʋʋse." 
Ezekiel38:5 Pɛrs, Kus la Ypt tãb-biisa na n yii ne foo, n zãad b gãndo la b fõgneg b kut zug-peto." 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomɛr tẽng zab-zabdba, ne zab-zabdb sẽn yi nug goabg sẽnẽ, Bɛt-Togarma rãmb, na n waa ne foo. B na n yɩɩ ka tɛka; buud a taab sõor sẽn ka tɛk na n wa paas-f lame." 
Ezekiel38:7 Maneg n segl f meng neere, tɩ f lebga zãma kãseng tãnsoabã." 
Ezekiel38:8 Sã n maan yʋʋm a wãna, m na kõ-f noore tɩ f wã Israyɛl tẽnga. Dẽ wakatã tɩ sẽn põs-b zabr sʋʋgã paam n yii b sẽn da sẽeg tẽns niynsã n lɛɛg n wa tigim Israyɛl tãmsa zutu. Tãmsa sẽn da lebg vɩɩdo, yʋʋm wɛɛla, waa n le paama kẽedba. B ra vɩɩ ne laafi, tɩ b ra paam n zãaga ne buud a taaba." 
Ezekiel38:9 Gog, foo ne tãb-biisã, la f zo-rãmb ka tɛkã, na n boba zabre, y na n tiiga Israyɛl tẽnsã wa sob-kãsenga, y na n yɩɩ wala sawad kãsenga sẽn waa n lud b tẽnga vugri." 
Ezekiel38:10 Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ wakat kãng sã n wa ta, tags wẽns wʋsgo n na n wa f yamẽ tɩ f na n yik n maan wa f sẽn tagsã." 
Ezekiel38:11 Fo meng n na n yik n sɩng zabre ne neb sẽn ka baood zabr ye, neb sẽn vɩ ne laafi la sẽn kẽed tẽns sẽn nan ka tar lal-gũbr ye, tẽns sẽn ka tar kʋɩlens ne sogds meng ye." 
Ezekiel38:12 F na n wa zɛɛme la f sãame, f na n wa zaba ne neb sẽn nan kẽ paalem-paalem tẽns sẽn da ya raboodo. Tẽnga neb yi pa-weere n lɛɛg n wa ne rũmsi la arzɛka la b vɩɩ dũni wã tẽnsʋka." 
Ezekiel38:13 Saba la Dedã nebã, Tarsis ne a tẽn-toosa toandba na n sok-f lame: Fo tãpa bobame n na wa zɛ la f sãam bi? F wat n na n deega wanzurf la sãnem bɩ? F wat n na n zɛɛme n paas f rũms sõor la f laog bɩ?›" 
Ezekiel38:14 Dẽ yĩnga, Ezekiyɛl, gom n wilg sẽn wat beoogo. Wilg a Gog, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn yete: ‹Wakat ning m buud a Israyɛl sẽn na n wa vɩ ne laafi, fo na n yika ne-a." 
Ezekiel38:15 Fo na n yi-la f tẽngẽ, nug goabg sẽnẽ, n wa ne tãb-biis sẽn yit ween-vɩɩs a naasã. Na n yɩɩ wed-dʋʋdb gilli, na n yɩɩ tãp sẽn tar pãnga." 
Ezekiel38:16 Fo na n sega mam nebã, a Israyɛl, fo na n yɩɩ wala sawadgo sẽn waa n lud m tẽngã. Kõn yɩ mars-marsã ye, la yaa foo, Gog, la m na tʋm tɩ f wa wẽ m tẽngã la f wilg bu-zẽmba tɩ maam la Na-Sõng a Wẽnde. Yaa rẽ la m na n wilg-ba ne tʋʋmd ning m sẽn kõ fooma.›" 
Ezekiel38:17 Ad-m sẽn yet-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Yaa fo yell la m gom al daar zãra. M da waa n yeela Israyɛl bãngdba, mam tʋʋm-tʋmdbã, m da waa n yeel-b-la al daar sẽn vẽsge, tɩ b wilg tɩ m na n tʋma ned t'a wa zab ne-ba." 
Ezekiel38:18 La ade, Gog, badaare, m sũura na n puugame. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel38:19 Mam sũura sẽn puug wʋsga yĩnga, m wẽendame tɩ baraare, tẽnga na n miima miim bãnde, Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ." 
Ezekiel38:20 Wẽnd kãnga, mogra zĩma, yĩngri luiili, we-rũmsi, bõn-yood sẽn vuud tẽnga, ninsaalba, fãa na n diga rabeem m taoore. Tãmsa na n siigame, kunkuba na sudame, tẽnsa lals na n dʋʋga tẽnga." 
Ezekiel38:21 M na n yɛɛs-f-la yɛɛsg buud fãa. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet rẽnna. F tãb-biisa na n lɛɛg n kʋʋ taaba." 
Ezekiel38:22 Mam na n sɩbg-f-la ne bã-longdem la ne sʋʋga. Mam na n kɩtame tɩ sa-kãseng nag foo ne tãb-biisã la f zo-rãmb ka tɛkã saag sẽn naag ne sapɩlem ne bugum la kidbri. 
Ezekiel38:23 Woto m na wilg bu-zẽmba fãa tɩ maam la Pãng soaba la Nin-Sõngã. B na bãng tɩ maam la Soaala.› » 
Ezekiel39:1 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela maam: «Foo Ezekiyɛl, taas a Gog tɩ maam n yet-a t'a maan gũusgu. Ad-m sẽn yet-a, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹M na n yika ne foom, Gog, Mesek la Tubal dãmb dĩma." 
Ezekiel39:2 M na n kɩtame tɩ fo yi f tẽngẽ, n kɩt tɩ f yi al nug goabg yɩɩga n wa tak zabr Israyɛl tãmsã zutu." 
Ezekiel39:3 M na yaool marsã n wẽ f goabgã t'a bas f tãpa t'a lʋɩ. M na n kɩtame tɩ pɛɛma sẽn be f nug rɩtga lʋɩ n sẽege. 
Ezekiel39:4 Foo ne f tãb-biisã la f zo-rãmb ka tɛkã yãmb na n kii Israyɛl tãmsa zutu. M na n basame tɩ y lebg yɩbrendo la luiili la we-rũms rɩɩbo. 
Ezekiel39:5 Fo na n lʋɩɩ n paa tẽnga wala m sẽn togs-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel39:6 Mam na n widga bugum Magog tẽn-peelmẽ la mogra noorẽ tẽnsã sẽn da zĩ ne bãane. Woto la fãa na n bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Ezekiel39:7 M na n kɩtame tɩ mam buud a Israyɛl bãng tɩ m yaa nin-sõngo la m kõn le bas tɩ b paoog-a ye la buud a taaba na reeg tɩ maam la Soaala, a Israyɛl Nin-Sõngã." 
Ezekiel39:8 N-ye! Sẽn togsa na n pidsame, b pʋs n sɩnga pidsgu, m bʋʋda raar sẽn yãka kolgame. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yete." 
Ezekiel39:9 Wakat kãnga, Israyɛl neba na n yi-la b tẽnsẽ. B na n widga bugum n yõog b bɛɛba zab-teedo. Yʋʋm a yopoe tõre, bugma kõn ki ye, t'a na n dɩɩ gãndo, bɛd la bõonego, tãbdo, pɛɛm, kãna, kãn-tãoodse." 
Ezekiel39:10 Neba ka na n le wɩɩg n tɩ kɛ raad weoogẽ bɩ tʋgrẽ ye; na n yɩ zab teeda la b na n tar n yõgend bugum. Bãmb n na n zɛ sẽn da zɛɛdb bãmbã la b fã sẽn da fãad b bãmba. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togse.›" 
Ezekiel39:11 Yɛla pidsgu raare, m na wilg b sẽn na n mum a Gog zĩig ning ka, Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. Na n yɩɩ So-loaadba bãg-faagẽ, Yamsem Mogra yaanga. Yaooga na n kɩtame tɩ sora teem zĩ-kãnga, tɩ so-loadba bʋdg zĩ-kãnga. Yao kãng pugẽ la b na n mum a Gog ne a tãb-biisa fãa tɩ b na bool zĩ-kãng t'a Gog nedg ne nedg bãg-faaga, tɩ tusr lagem koabg bãg-faaga." 
Ezekiel39:12 Yaa kiis a yopoe tõre la Israyɛl dãmba na n tall zãma a woto fãa solgre la tẽnga rẽgda pekre. 
Ezekiel39:13 Tẽnga rãmb fãa n na n mum kũuma la rẽ na n lebga b zu-zẽkre, mam sẽn na n wa puk m ziira raare. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomd boto." 
Ezekiel39:14 La kiis a yopoe wã sã n looge, b na n yãka neb kẽere tɩ b tʋʋmd lebg b saad tẽngã n mumd neb niyns sẽn nan ka paam-b mumbu, n ket n dɩg yɩnga." 
Ezekiel39:15 Neba na n saaga tẽnga tõre; ned sã n yãend ninsaal kõaba, a na n dʋʋga kug n gilg-ba tɩ laagdba bãng zĩig n wa wʋk-ba n tɩ mum a Gog bãg-faagẽ." 
Ezekiel39:16 Tẽng a ye meng la b na n pʋd Amona, neb kõn bãng n sõde. Na n talla woto tɩ tẽnga wa yɩlg zãnga.»" 
Ezekiel39:17 Soaala-Wẽnd le yeel-m lame: «Ezekiyɛl, bool luiili wã la we-rũmsã la f yeel-ba: ‹Yi-y zĩig zãng n wa tɩ maoong la m dat n kʋ y yĩnga. Na n yɩɩ maoong kãsenga, Israyɛl tãmsa zutu. Y na paam nemd n wãbe, y na paam zɩɩm n yũ." 
Ezekiel39:18 Yãmb na n wãba tãb-bi-gãndaada nemdo; yãmb na n yũu tẽnga nanams kãsensa zɩɩm. Yaa bãmb la b kʋ maoong Bazã pe-raada zĩigẽ, Bazã pe-bi, boeese, la lol-nobds zĩigẽ." 
Ezekiel39:19 Yaa maoong kãng la m boond-y tɩ y wa. Nem-kaam na yidg y yam, zɩɩm na lub-y wala rã-toose." 
Ezekiel39:20 Mam dɩɩba roogẽ, y na n wãb n tɩge: wiidi, wed-dʋʋdba, gãndaado, tãb-biis toor-toore. Dẽ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete.›" 
Ezekiel39:21 M na n puka m ziira bu-zẽna nifẽ. B na yãend m pãnga sẽn tʋmd tʋʋmd ninga n pidsd m sẽn kãabe. 
Ezekiel39:22 Israyɛl buuda me na reeg baraar tɛka, tɩ maam la bãmb wẽnde." 
Ezekiel39:23 Tẽns a taaba me na n bãngame tɩ b talla Israyɛl kamba n loog pa-weere b sẽn beeg maama yĩnga. M daag-b lame n bas b bɛɛba nusẽ la zabr sʋʋg n kood-b zãnga. 
Ezekiel39:24 Mam sẽn daag-b n basã, m maana sẽn da tog ne bãmb tʋʋm wẽna, b tʋʋm dẽgda." 
Ezekiel39:25 La ade, ya woto marsã la m gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Marsã tɛka m na n kũma Israyɛl dãmba nimbãanega, m na n kũma a Zakoob nimbãanega. M na n teka b yellã la ned kam fãa na n modgame tɩ b ra le paoog m yʋʋr sõnga ye." 
Ezekiel39:26 B na yĩma b tʋʋm yooda sẽn zɩlg-b yãnd la paoor ningã. Woto me la b na n le paam n vɩɩnd b tẽngẽ ne laafi, tɩ ned ba a ye ka na n le yɛɛs-b ye." 
Ezekiel39:27 Mam sã n tɩ yiis-b b bɛɛba sʋka, m na tall-ba n wa b tẽngẽ. Na n tũu ne bãmb wilgri tɩ bu-zẽmb ka tɛka sẽn gũbg bãmba bãng tɩ maam la Na-Sõng a Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel39:28 Bãmb meng na reege tɩ maam la Soaala, bãmb Wẽnnaam, m sã n wa tigim-ba n ka tol n yĩm ned ba a ye a pa-weer tẽngẽ ye." 
Ezekiel39:29 M na n pʋdga a Israyɛl kambã m meng yam la m yam kõn le lak ne bãmb bada. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto.› »" 
Ezekiel40:1 Soaala nug pãng waa n zẽk-m lame n ta Zerizalɛɛm. Yɩɩ tõnd yembda yʋʋmd pisi la a nu soaba sẽn waa n sɩngdẽ, yʋʋmda pipi kiuuga rasem sẽn sõd piiga, Zerizalɛɛm wãab poore yʋʋm sẽn maan piig la a naase, a raara tã-tã wã. Naaba-Wẽnd lika b menga" 
Ezekiel40:2 la m yamẽ, ne yĩngr vẽnegre, m yãeeme tɩ b talla maam n ta Israyɛl, n dʋʋs maam tãn-lug-lug a ye zugu. M yãee tãnga sigdga nug-rɩtgo, bũmb sẽn tonde wa tẽng ne a roto." 
Ezekiel40:3 Be la b tall-m n ta la m yãenda neda. Raoa neng ra pɩnda wa zũudu sẽn duugi. Nin-kãng ra zãada beren-dɩgr wĩir a nugẽ, n paas rasaar la yaa rasaar sẽn tar n magda. Raoã ra yɛsa tẽnga noore." 
Ezekiel40:4 Nin-kãng n yeel maam: «Ezekiyɛl, puk f nini la yoog f tʋba. Ges m sẽn na n wilg-f bũmb ninga neere. Yaa bõn-kãng gesg yĩnga la m tall-f n wa ka. F sã n yãend-a la f na n yaool marsã n wilg Israyɛl kambã f sẽn yãende.»" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ad-m sẽn yãende: lalg n da gũbg wẽnd doogã. Raoã ra zãada a magdga. Magdga woglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yoobe. (Paasda nug yakemde tɩ marsã kãntɩɩga paam pĩnd soaba woglem.) Raoã maga lal-gũbrã taglem la a zãndlem. Fãa ra yaa kãntɩɩs a yoob-yoobe. 
Ezekiel40:6 A taa noor ning sẽn get yaangã, n dʋ a teedsã, n mage: kãntɩɩs a yoobe. Noor fãa maga kãntɩɩs a yoobe." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ro-bõonesa magame: b woglem dasaare, b yalem, dasaare. Ro-bil ne a to sʋka yaa kãntɩɩs a nu. A paama dasaare a sẽn mag noora sẽn kẽed dooga pʋgã." 
Ezekiel40:8 A sẽn mag noorẽ zãongã," 
Ezekiel40:9 a paama kãntɩɩs a nii. Lalse la ra me tagd-tagdo n yals noorẽ wã la a ye fãa taglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yiibu. Zãonga kʋɩlenga da ninga pʋgẽ. 
Ezekiel40:10 Yaang noorẽ ro-bõonesa ra tonga a tãab kɩreng a ye, a tãab kɩreng a to. B fãa ra zema taaba, b lals tagda me ra zema taaba." 
Ezekiel40:11 Raoã maga dignoora yalem: kãntɩɩs piiga, n mag noora menga: kãntɩɩs piig la a tãabo." 
Ezekiel40:12 Gɩdgre n da gɩdg ro-bil ne a to sʋka, da yaa kãntɩɩga. La ro-bõonega da tara kɩreng a ye kãntɩɩs a yoobe, kɩreng a to wã me kãntɩɩs a yoobe." 
Ezekiel40:13 Raoã maga noorã, a sɩngre n tãag a sɛɛbo: kãntɩɩs pisi. Rignoor fãa ra tota ne a to." 
Ezekiel40:14 A maga zãongã sẽn pʋgd ro-bõonesã: kãntɩɩs pisi. A ra tɩ yɛsa sʋka n tar a toorẽ lalse. 
Ezekiel40:15 Sor n da yit zãongã n digd pʋgẽ noorã. Sora maga kãntɩɩs pis-nu. 
Ezekiel40:16 B ra ninga peem-lees sẽn pɩgdg ne raado, ro-bõonesa, yɩng lalsã, lals niyns sẽn welg-b ro-bõonesa ne taabã, la taoor zãonga lalse. Peem-leesa ra yaa yalems pʋgẽ n yɩɩd yɩnga. B ra ning-b-la zãonga lalsã n gilgi. Koms vãad la b ra gʋl pugẽ lalsa zutu n paas b neerem." 
Ezekiel40:17 Raoã tall-m lame n ta pipi simandã. Kug la b ra maneg n gãnege n me roto n gilgi: dot pis-tã. 
Ezekiel40:18 B ra gãnega kugã, n gilg sɩmanda zãnga. Kuga ra gãnegame n tekd kʋɩlensa noore." 
Ezekiel40:19 Raoã maga vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be yɩng noorã n ta pʋgẽ zaka lalgã. A paama kãntɩɩs koabga. A maga boto me yaanga la nug goabga. 
Ezekiel40:20 Noor ning sẽn pakd nug goabg tɩ b tũud be n paamd pʋgẽ zakã, raoã maga yẽ me yalem la a woglem." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ro-bõones a yoobe n da tong be: a tãab kɩreng a ye, a tãab kɩreng a to, n paas zãongo la lalsa sẽn da me tagd-tagdã, la fãa maga wa sẽn da be pipi noorã: woglma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu, yalma yaa kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Zãongã, peem-leesã, komsã sẽn da gʋlã, da wẽnda yaang noorẽ dẽnna. F rʋʋda teeds a yopoe n paam n kẽ zãongã, f taoore." 
Ezekiel40:23 Noor n da be pipi zakã n tot ne nug goabg soabã tɩ b tõe n tũ be n kẽ pʋgẽ zakã; noor a to me n le be yaanga. Raoã maga vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be noor ne a to la a paama kãntɩɩs koabga. 
Ezekiel40:24 Dẽ poore raoã tall-m lame n kẽ pʋgẽ zakã. D tũu rɩtg noorã. A maga lalsa sẽn me tagd-tagdã, a zãongã, b yalem wala b woglma ra yaa wala pipi noora rẽnna." 
Ezekiel40:25 Noora ne a zãongã da tara peem-leese n gilgi. No-kãng me ra wẽnda a taaba: woglma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu, yalma kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:26 B teedsa yaa a yopoe tɩ b rʋʋd bãmba n paam n kẽed zãongã. Pʋgẽ lalsa sẽn me tagd-tagdã ra nagsa ne koms vãado, goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel40:27 Pʋgẽ zaka ra tara noor sẽn tees nug rɩtgo. Raoã maga vɩʋʋg ning sẽn be noor ne a to la a paama kãntɩɩs koabga. 
Ezekiel40:28 Raoã tall-m lame tɩ d tũ nug rɩtg noorã n kẽ pʋgẽ zakã. A maga noor kãnga, la fãa ra yaa a ye ne noy a taabã." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ro-bõonesã, lalsa sẽn da welgd-b ne taabã, zãongã, fãa ra yaa a ye ne noya a taaba rẽnna. Noora ne zãongã ra ninga peem-leese sẽn ya yalemse n gilgi. Woglma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu, yalma yaa kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Zãonga ra ka a ye ye, b ra yaa wʋsgo n gilgi: woglem, kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu, yalem, kãntɩɩs a nu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Zãonga ra tota ne yɩng zakã. A lalsa sẽn me tagd-tagdã ra gʋla komse la a ra tara teeds a nii. 
Ezekiel40:32 Raoã tall-m lame tɩ m tũ yaang noorã n tɩ kẽ pʋgẽ zakã. A maga noorã la a yãeeme t'a yaa waa a taaba. 
Ezekiel40:33 A ro-bõonesã, lalsa sẽn da me tagd-tagdã, a zãongã, fãa ra yaa a ye ne noy a taaba rẽnna. B ra ninga no-kãng ne a zãongã peem-lees bɛda n gilgi. Woglma maga kãntɩɩs pis-nu, yalma kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel40:34 A zãonga ra tota yɩng zakã. A lalsa sẽn da me tagd-tagdã ra gʋla komse poorẽ la taoore, la a teedsa yaa a nii." 
Ezekiel40:35 Raoã tall-m lame m wa nug goabg noorã. A magame 
Ezekiel40:36 la no-kãng me yaa wa a taaba. A wogma ra yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu t'a yalma ya kãntɩɩs pisi la a nu la yẽ me ra tara ro-bõonese, lals sẽn me tagd-tagdo, zãongo la peem-lees n gilgi." 
Ezekiel40:37 Rooga ra tota yɩng zakã. Goabg la rɩtgo, b ninga koms vãad lalsa sẽn me tagd- tagda zugu. Teedsa yaa bãmb b nii." 
Ezekiel40:38 Roog a ye noor n da pakd goabg noorẽ zãongã pʋga. Yaa ro-kãng pʋga la b ra pekd yũ-noog maoonga rũmsi. 
Ezekiel40:39 Noor kãngẽ zãongã, te-roagens a yiibu n da be kɩreng a ye t'a yiib me be kɩreng a to. Yaa bãmb zutu la b ra koot maanda rũmsi: yũ-nood maand bɩ sugr kosgo, bɩ yel-wẽnd dolb maando." 
Ezekiel40:40 F sã n da tees nug goabg noorã f ra tõe n yãenda kɩreng fãa, te-roagens a yiibu." 
Ezekiel40:41 Te-roagensa zãng yaa bãmb b nii, bãmb zut la b ra koot rũmsã." 
Ezekiel40:42 Te-roagens a naasa sẽn ya yũ-noog maanda kʋʋb yĩnga ra mee ne kug sẽn peese. B voglma ya kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka, b yalma: kãntɩɩg la pʋɩ-sʋka, b zãndlema: kãntɩɩga, la yaa bãmb zug la b da rɩgend sʋʋsa sẽn tar n koot maanda rũmsi, yũ-noog maando la maand a taaba." 
Ezekiel40:43 Bũmb yalem sẽn ta nug-pʋga la b ra ning n gilg te-roagensã. Te-roagensa zutu la b da rogeng maanda nemdo. 
Ezekiel40:44 Raoã tall-m lame n kẽes pʋgẽ zaka. Rot a yiib n da be be, a ye nug goabg noorã t'a meng neng teesd rɩtgo. A to wã ritg noorã t'a neng teesd nug goabga." 
Ezekiel40:45 A yeela maam tɩ roog ning sẽn get-a goabga ra yaa maan-kʋʋdba sẽn tʋmd-b wẽnd dooga tʋʋma rẽnna. 
Ezekiel40:46 Roog ning neng sẽn tees nug goabga yaa sẽn tʋmd-b maan-kugra rẽnna. A tol n paasame t'a Levi kamba sẽn yaa a Sadok yagens bala n da tõe n kẽ ro-sõnga pʋg n tʋm maan-kʋʋra tʋʋma. 
Ezekiel40:47 Raoã maga wẽnd dooga zaka; a woglem: kãntɩɩs koabga; a yalem: kãntɩɩs koabga. Kɩrẽng pa yɩɩd a to ye. Maan-kugr n da rɩg wẽnd dooga taoore. 
Ezekiel40:48 A tall-m lame n kẽes wẽnd dooga zãongẽ. A maga zãonga lals niyns sẽn me tagd-tagdã: kãntɩɩs a nu kɩreng a ye, kɩreng a to wã kãntɩɩs a nu. Kʋɩlenga yalem: kãntɩɩs a yoobe, a tãab kɩreng a ye, a tãab kɩreng a to." 
Ezekiel40:49 Zãong ning sẽn tũud n paam wẽnd dooga noorã woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi t'a yalem ya kãntɩɩs piig la a yiibu. Rʋʋda teeds piiga n yaool n kẽ. Lal-gils bɛd a yiibu n da be noorẽ, a ye goabga, a ye rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel41:1 Raoã tall-m lame n kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ ro-kãsengã la a maga lals niyns sẽn me tagd-tagdã. B yalma yaa kãntɩɩs a yoob-yoobe. 
Ezekiel41:2 Rooga noora yalem, kãntɩɩs piiga. Noora sẽn yãkã b keesa lalg woglem kãntɩɩs a nu goabga la kãntɩɩs a nu rɩtgo. A maga rooga woglem, kãntɩɩs pis-naase, a yalma kãntɩɩs pisi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Doog a to la d le kẽ, yaa taoor doogã. Kãntɩɩs a yi la lalsa sẽn me tagd-tagd noorẽ wã. Noora yalem yaa kãntɩɩs a yoobe. Nora sẽn yãk sʋkã, keesa kãntɩɩs a yopoe lalse, goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel41:4 Rooga meng woglem ne a yalem fãa zema taaba: kãntɩɩs pisi. La raoã yeel-m lame tɩ sõmblem pid sõmblem dooga la woto. 
Ezekiel41:5 Raoã maga wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ lalgã: a taglem yaa kãntɩɩs a yoobe. Kɩremsa ra ninga ro-bõonese. Do-bõonesa yalem: kãntɩɩs a naase la b ra me n gilga wẽnd doogã. 
Ezekiel41:6 Do-bãmb da roglma taaba a tãab-tãabo la b sõora zãng yaa pis-tã. Ro-bãmb da meeme n kẽes yɩng lalgã n yaool n pa me n sog ne wẽnd dooga lalg meng ye. 
Ezekiel41:7 Rota sẽn dogl taab zutã, ad-y yĩngr dãmba yalma ra paasame n yɩɩd tẽngr dãmba. B lalsa taglem bal n da boogde. Sẽn gilg wẽnd dooga fãa ra ya boto. Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la f sã n dʋ yĩngri dotã, f neeme tɩ vɩʋʋg ra beeme n yɩɩda. F sã n be tẽngr doogã f ra tõe n dʋʋ al yĩngr soaba bɩ n tek tẽnsʋk soabã." 
Ezekiel41:8 M yãeeme tɩ rota sẽn da me n gilg wẽnd dooga ra zẽka kãntɩɩs a yoobe. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ro-bãmb yɩng lalsã taglem ra yaa kãntɩɩs a nu. Vɩʋʋg ning sẽn kell ro-bãmb ne ro-bõones a taaba sʋka," 
Ezekiel41:10 da yaa kãntɩɩs pisi n gilgi. 
Ezekiel41:11 F ra tõe n tũu noya a yiibu n yi rota sẽn doglem taabã n ta vɩʋʋga sẽn bas sʋkã. Noor a ye ra bee goabga t'a ye be rɩtgo. Lalg ning sẽn da me n gilg n basd noya a yiiba ra yaa taoko; a taglma ra yaa kãntɩɩs a nu. 
Ezekiel41:12 Bũmb la b me nin-taoore n yegl wẽnd doogã. Yaa roogo woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pis-wɛ, t'a yalem ya kãntɩɩs pisopoe, a lalsa taglem yaa kãntɩɩs a nu." 
Ezekiel41:13 Raoã sɩnga wẽnd dooga magbo. Woglma yaa kãntɩɩs koabga. Wẽnd dooga ne a zakã. Yalma me yaa boto. 
Ezekiel41:14 Wẽnd dooga yalem ne vɩʋʋga sẽn keesã ra yaa kãntɩɩs koabga. 
Ezekiel41:15 Raoã maga roog ning sẽn da me wẽnd dooga poor woglem. Sã n naag ne vɩʋʋga sẽn kees goabg la rɩtgã, woglma yaa kãntɩɩs koabga. Wẽnd dooga pʋgẽ do kãsengã, zãongã la zakã," 
Ezekiel41:16 noya, vɩʋʋga sẽn basã, peem-leesã, b tẽngrã n ta b mensã, da maneg n tablga ne ra-neeba." 
Ezekiel41:17 Wẽnd dooga yɩnga wala a pʋgẽ, al dignoorã n ta sõmblem pid sõmblem doogã, b ra gʋla b lalsã n paas b neerem." 
Ezekiel41:18 Yaa malɛgs la koms vãado la b ra ning yã. Komsa vãad ne malɛgsa ra lɩʋʋsda taaba. Malɛk fãa ra tara nens a yiibu. 
Ezekiel41:19 Neng a ye sẽn ya ninsaal nenga n wẽnemd n tees koanga vãoogo tɩ neng a to sẽn ya bõnyẽeg rẽnna tees vãoog a to. Yɩɩ woto zãnga n gilg wẽnd doogã. 
Ezekiel41:20 B ra ninga malɛgsa ne komsã al tẽngre n ta kʋɩlensa zãndlem. 
Ezekiel41:21 Do-kãsenga noor ra-lugsã da ka gils ye, b ra yaa nags-magse. Sõmblem pid sõmblema dooga taoore b da rɩgla bũmb" 
Ezekiel41:22 wa maan-kugri. A kaa ne ra-pegdo, a zãndlema yaa kãntɩɩs a tãabo, a woglma a yiibu, a yalem a yiibu. A pẽgsã, a tẽngrã la a kɩremsã me yaa raado. La ad neda sẽn yeel-m: «Woto yaa te-roagendg sẽn dɩgl Wẽnd taoore.»" 
Ezekiel41:23 Do-songa ne Sõmblem pid Sõmblem dooga ra pagda ne kʋɩlense. 
Ezekiel41:24 Kʋɩlensa ra pakda goabg la rɩtgo. 
Ezekiel41:25 Malɛgs la koms la b ra gʋl b zugu wala lalsã. Sã n ya f sẽn tat noor ning n yaool n kẽ ro-sõngã, a ra ka tar kʋɩleng ye, yaa lill sẽn ka ne raado la b da rɩgl yɩngã." 
Ezekiel41:26 Zãnd kãng kɩremse ra ninga peem-lees yalemse sẽn maneg raad n ka n pɩgle, la sẽn gʋl malɛgs la koms vãado." 
Ezekiel42:1 Dẽ poore raoã tall-m lame n ta sɩmandẽ wã, n le wa tall-m n tees rot niyns sẽn be nug goabgã n tot ne zĩ-vɩʋʋgã la roog ning sẽn be-a wẽnd dooga poorã." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ro-kãng woglma rɩkda wẽnd doog rẽnna n tar kãntɩɩs koabga. A yalem yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu. 
Ezekiel42:3 A kɩreng a ye a ra yegda vɩʋʋga sẽn gũbg wẽnd doogã t'a yalma ta kãntɩɩs pisi wã. A kɩreng a to wã, a ra tata kuga sẽn maneg n gãneg sɩmandẽ wã la be la rota sɩng n dogend taab a tãab-tãabã." 
Ezekiel42:4 Do-bãmb taoore, pʋgẽ zakẽ wã, sor me la b ra bas yã. A yalem taa kãntɩɩs piiga t'a woglem ya kãntɩɩs koabga. Yaa nug goabg noora sore." 
Ezekiel42:5 Yĩngr dota yalem da paoodame. Yaa sẽn na yɩlẽ n paam vɩʋʋg n loogdẽ la b ra booga b yalem. La sora sẽn bas yĩngrã, sẽn bas tẽnsʋkã la sẽn bas tẽn-nabrã ka a ye ye." 
Ezekiel42:6 Bãng-y tɩ rota ra roglma taaba rũns a tãabo la ka lal bedre wa zãongẽ dẽnna n da zɩt b ye. Yĩngr dota yalem pa ta tẽnsʋka la tẽngr dãmba rẽnn ye. 
Ezekiel42:7 Lalg la b ra me rota poore t'a woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu. 
Ezekiel42:8 Sɩmandẽ dota woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pis-nu tɩ wẽnd dooga zak tar kãntɩɩs koabga. 
Ezekiel42:9 Tẽngr dota ra tara noore la yaa no-kãng la f ra tũud n paam n yi yɩnga, yaang sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel42:10 No-kãng ra bee zaka lalg sɩngrẽ. Nug goabga, zaka lalg woglemẽ, wẽnd dooga taoore, b le mee rot a taaba. Bãmb da tota ne vɩʋʋga sẽn da basã la b tot roog ning sẽn be wẽnd dooga poorã." 
Ezekiel42:11 B le basa sor bãmb taoore. Do bãmb da wẽnda wa nug goabg rotã. B bedrema, b yasrã, b noya, b kõom la b yiib noya, fãa ra wẽnda taaba." 
Ezekiel42:12 Dota sẽn me nug rɩtga kʋɩlensa fãa ra wẽnda nug goabg rẽnna. Sora sɩngrẽ, noor n da base n tees lalga sẽn da lill wẽnd doogã. Tũuda yaang n paam n ta be." 
Ezekiel42:13 Raoã yeel-m lame: «Rota sẽn be goabg la rɩtgo, n be zaka pʋga yaa ro-sõma. Yaa be la maan-kʋʋdb niyns sẽn tõe n kẽ Soaala ro-sõnga pʋga kẽed n dɩt kũuna sẽn ya sõma n yɩɩd b taabã. Ro-bãmb welga toor Wẽnd yĩnga, tɩ b tar kũun sõma wã n wat be. Be la b wat ne kũuna, ne maand toor-toora rũmsi sẽn kʋʋd sugr kosg yĩngã." 
Ezekiel42:14 N paas me, maan-kʋʋdba sẽn kẽed be ne fut niynsã, b pa tõe n le yi yɩng ne fu kãens ye. B yeesd-b lame n bas be tɩ b lebga fu-sõma la fut a taab la b yeelgda n leb b saam-biisa sʋka.»" 
Ezekiel42:15 Raoã sẽn mag wẽnd dooga pʋg n sɛ a yiis-m-la yɩnga. D tũu yaang sorã n yi n sɩng rigenpoora magbo. 
Ezekiel42:16 Magba maga ne dasaarã kãntɩɩs kobs-nu yaanga. 
Ezekiel42:17 A maga goabga me kãntɩɩs kobs-nu," 
Ezekiel42:18 n mag rɩtg kobs-nu," 
Ezekiel42:19 n mag nin-taoor kãntɩɩs kobs-nu. 
Ezekiel42:20 Yaa woto la a mag lal-gũbrã, a kɩrems a naasã. Woglem la yalem zema taaba: kãntɩɩs kobs-nu. Lalg n da welg vɩʋʋg ning sẽn ya Soaala rẽnna ne a taaba." 
Ezekiel43:1 Raoã tall-m lame n leb noor a ye, yaang noorã" 
Ezekiel43:2 Wẽnd ziira puka yaanga n sɩgda. Bʋʋr n da yãagd-b wa ko-kẽeng rãamde, tɩ tẽnga reeg n yãgd ne Wẽnd vẽenem." 
Ezekiel43:3 M sẽn yãend bũmb ningã wẽnega m sẽn yãend tẽnga wãab wakato la Kebar kʋɩlga noorẽ. M wõgemdame n kɩ m neng tẽnga. 
Ezekiel43:4 Naaba-Wẽnd ziira tũu yaang noorã n kẽ wẽnd doogã. 
Ezekiel43:5 Wẽnd Pãnga tall-m lame n kẽes zak a yiib soaba pʋga la m mikame tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd ziirã ra pida wẽnd doogã. 
Ezekiel43:6 M wʋma ned sẽn zĩnd pʋge n gom ne-ma. M sẽn da pʋgd rao ninga yaool n da yɛsa m sɛɛgẽ. 
Ezekiel43:7 Ad Soaala sẽn yeel-ma: «Ninsaal biiga, ges zĩigã. Yaa ka la m dɩgl m zaoorã, ka la m sigb zĩiga. M na n waa a Israyɛl kamb sʋka la m na n zĩnda ne-ba, daar fãa yĩnga. A Israyɛl doogo, yẽ ne a dĩm dãmba kõn le rẽgem m yʋ-sõnga ye. B kõn le faool b menga ne b tʋʋm yooda ye, b kõn le mum b dĩm dãmba ka ye." 
Ezekiel43:8 Dĩm dãmba ninga b rot noy la b kʋɩlens ra-lugs n yegl mam dooga rẽnna. Yaa lalg bala n welgd b zaka ne mam dẽnna. B paooga m yʋ-sõngã ne b tʋʋm yoodo. Yaa rẽ n puug m sũuri tɩ m menes-ba. 
Ezekiel43:9 Dũnna tɛka b wɩɩbda kõn le wɩɩb m nifẽ ye la b dĩm dãmba yaad na zãag ne-ma la woto m na pa ne bãmb daar fãa. 
Ezekiel43:10 La foo, Ezekiyɛl, wilg a Israyɛl kamba, wẽnd doogã sẽn ya-la, wilg-b tɩ b tʋʋm wẽna yãnd yõk-ba. B ges b sẽn sõog wẽnd dooga toto." 
Ezekiel43:11 B tʋʋm wẽna yãnd sã n tar-ba, wilg b Wẽnd dooga meeb sẽn na n yɩ tot-to, wilg-b rota sẽn na n pʋɩ tot-to, wilg-b b sẽn na n tũud noy niyns n kẽedẽ la noy niyns b sẽn na n tũudẽ n yita. Wilg zãnga. Gʋls n wilgi, puk b yam tɩ b gɩdg b mens ne mam sẽn gɩdge, tɩ b tũ m sẽn yet tɩ b tũ bũmb ninga." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ad bũmb ning sẽn yals wa noor menga wẽnd dooga poorẽ: tãnga zug tẽnsʋk vɩʋʋga fãa yaa vɩʋ-sõngo.» 
Ezekiel43:13 Ad maan-kugra magbo: maga ne kãntɩɩg magdga. Bok ning sẽn tuk n gilg maan-kugra sɛɛgã: kãntɩɩg la b mag a yalem la a zulum. Boka kɩreng a ye ninga kogsre sẽn ta kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka. Ad maan-kugra zãndlem: 
Ezekiel43:14 tẽn-nabrã n ta a pipi zẽkrã: kãntɩɩga. Pipi zẽkrã n ta a yiib soaba: kãntɩɩga. Zẽkr a yiib soaba n ta yĩngri: kãntɩɩs a yiibu. Woglma zãng yaa kãntɩɩs a naase. 
Ezekiel43:15 Bugma tuglg zĩig ne tẽngã: kãntɩɩs a naase. Maan-kugra yĩngr kɩrems a naasa ra zẽkame n paase. Woto maan-kugra ra tara yɩdb a naase. 
Ezekiel43:16 Bug-toaalga yalem la a woglem ra zema taaba: kãntɩɩs piig la a yiibu. 
Ezekiel43:17 Zẽkr a yiib soaba tɛka, maan-kugra ra yalga kãntɩɩg n paase. Woto yalma la woglma lebga kãntɩɩs piig la a naase. Kogsr la b ra ning n gilg t'a zãndlema ya kãntɩɩg pʋɩ-sʋka. Kogsr kãng yalma taa kãntɩɩga la a ra wedga bok n gilgi. Teedsa sẽn na paam n dʋ a zuga ra ninga yaang kɩrenga." 
Ezekiel43:18 Wẽnd yeel-m lame: «Ezekiyɛl, kelg m sẽn yet-fo, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. Woto la f na n maane maan-kugra sã n wa me tɩ b na n yõogd maanda rũms a zug la b raagd zɩɩma." 
Ezekiel43:19 Loalg la f na n kõ maan-kʋʋdba, a Levi kamba, a Sadok yagense; bãmb bal la m kõ sore tɩ b maan maan-kʋʋr tʋʋmd m waoogr yĩnga. Loalga na n maana maoong sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Ezekiel43:20 A zɩɩma rɩkdame n bol yɩdb a naasã, n bol maan-kugra sʋka la a noorã n gilgi. Woto la f na n yɩlg maan-kugrã la f rɩk-a n kõ Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel43:21 Loalga sẽn kʋ n kos sugrã, rɩkdame n tɩ yõog zĩig a ye sẽn yãk rẽnd yĩnga, wẽnd dooga yɩnga." 
Ezekiel43:22 Daar a yiib sobã, yaa boɛɛg sẽn ka tar bãnd la f kʋʋda. F kʋʋd-a-la yel-wẽna pekr yĩnga wala f sẽn maan ne loalgã." 
Ezekiel43:23 Sugr kosga maoonga poore, yaa loalg la pe-raoog sẽn ka tar bãnde la f wat ne." 
Ezekiel43:24 F talld-a lame n wa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, taoore. Maan-kʋʋdba yugenda rũms a yiiba ne yamsem la b kʋʋd-b lame n yõog tɩ bugum dɩ-b zãnga." 
Ezekiel43:25 Dasem a yopoe pʋgẽ, beoog-beoog fãa b na n kʋʋ boɛɛg, yel-wẽnd pekr yĩnga n paas loalg la pe-raoog sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Ezekiel43:26 Yaa woto la b na n yɩlg maan-kugrã, rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, n zãag-a ne rẽgdo t'a lebg Wẽnd soolem, n yaool n sɩng maanda kʋʋb a zugu." 
Ezekiel43:27 Dasem a yopoe wã sã n looge, daar a nii soaba maan-kʋʋdba yaoondame marsã n kood maan-kugra zugu yũ-nood maand la maan dɩtse. Woto m na reeg y kosgo. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto.»" 
Ezekiel44:1 Raoã tall-m lame n yi yɩnga, yaang noorẽ. Noora ra pagame." 
Ezekiel44:2 Soaala yeel-m lame: «No-kãnga tog n pagame, b ra pak-a bada. Ned ba a ye, ra tũ be n loog ye tɩ yaa be la maam a Israyɛl Wẽnda tũ n kẽ. Dẽ yĩnga bɩ b pag-a." 
Ezekiel44:3 M sẽn kõ dĩma naama yĩnga, yẽ tõe n taa wẽnd dooga pʋga n dɩ Wẽnd taoore. La ade, yaa roog ninga sẽn da pẽ wẽnd doogã n yɩɩda noor la a na n tũud n kẽedẽ la a yita.»" 
Ezekiel44:4 Raoã tall-m lame n ta goabg noorã, wẽnd dooga taoore. M yãeeme tɩ Wẽnd ziira ra pida roogã tɩ m na n kɩ m neng tẽnga." 
Ezekiel44:5 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: «Maan gũusgu, Ezekiyɛl, ges neere, yoog f tʋba. Ad yaa noya sẽn get m dooga la m na n kõ-fo. Maan gũusg neere ne noy-niyns sẽn get a pʋgẽ kõom la yiibu." 
Ezekiel44:6 Yeel a Israyɛl kamba sẽn ya tõatbã maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn wilgd-ba. M yam yaa n yii ne y tʋʋm yooda buud toor-toorã, Israyɛl kamba." 
Ezekiel44:7 Wakat ning y sẽn wat ne m dɩɩba pʋɩɩre, maanda rũmsa kaam la b zɩɩma, y yikd n kẽesda m do-sõngẽ wã neb sẽn ka kẽ bãongo, la sẽn ka reegd m noor ye. Woto wã y rẽgemda m doogã. Y sãama m zooda ne y manes wẽnse." 
Ezekiel44:8 Tʋʋm niyns y sẽn da tog n tʋm m yĩng m do-sõnga pʋgã, y rɩka tʋʋm kãense n tãng ne sãamba. Woto bãmb n deeg y zĩiga." 
Ezekiel44:9 M yet-y lame, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ sãan fãa sẽn ka kẽ bãongo la a ka reegd m noore, kõn le kẽ m do-sõngã, ba a zak sã n ti Israyɛl kamba sʋka." 
Ezekiel44:10 Sã n ya Levits niyns sẽn bas-b maam n naag Israyɛl kamb a taaba n maan wa b toog ka le be ne maama, n na n pʋg b rẽgdã, b wẽn-naandsã, ad bãmb na n dɩɩ b beegra taale." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ad tʋʋm niyns b sẽn tõe n tʋm m yĩnga. B tʋʋmd na n yɩɩ dooga noya gũubu la yɛl a taaba gesgo. B na n tõogame n kodg yũ-nood la maan-dɩtsa rũmsi. M buuda sẽn dat tɩ b wa sõng ne bũmb ning fãa bɩ b wa sõng-a. 
Ezekiel44:12 La b sẽn lʋɩɩs b toog a Israyɛl ne a wẽn-naandsa waoogr pʋgẽ, n tol n kʋɩɩb Israyɛl kambã, ad-m sẽn yet-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. M na n yika ne bãmba la b na rɩ b beegra taale." 
Ezekiel44:13 B ra le saag n deeg maan-kʋʋr naam ye, b ra saag n sɩɩs bõn sõma wã sẽn welg toor m yĩngã ye, la b ra kẽ sõmblem sẽn pid sõmblem dooga ye. Yaa woto la b na n yao b tʋʋm yooda sẽn ning-b yãndã." 
Ezekiel44:14 M sẽn kees-b yaa beoog-beoog fãa tʋʋm yaalsã. 
Ezekiel44:15 Levit niyns sẽn yaa a Sadok yagense, bãmb yẽ kell n tũu noy-niyns sẽn get do-sõngã, ba Israyɛl kamba sẽn wa n yik n bas maam, bãmb Wẽndã. Woto yĩnga yaa bãmb bala n tõe n wa kõ-m maanda kaam la zɩɩm. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bãmb bal n na n kẽ m do-sõngẽ wã n kolg m dɩɩba zĩigẽ n tʋm b sõgen-tʋʋma. B na tũ m noya neere. 
Ezekiel44:17 B sã n kẽed zak a yiib soaba, bɩ b yeelg fut sẽn wʋg ne gĩs bãanese. B ra kẽ be bɩ wẽnd dooga pʋga ne fuug sẽn wʋg ne pe-kõbd ye." 
Ezekiel44:18 B fõgneg gĩ-bãanes pugli, la b mobg b sees ne peende. B kõn yeelg fuug sẽn na n kaoog b tʋʋlg ye." 
Ezekiel44:19 B sã n yit yɩnga n le tɩ kẽed zãma wã sʋka, b deng n yees b sẽn da yer fut niyns n tʋmd Wẽnd taoorã. Fu bãmb bĩngda do-bõonesa pʋga n yaool n yi ne fut a taaba la woto neb a taaba kõn sɩɩs b tʋʋmda fu-sõma wã ye." 
Ezekiel44:20 Maan-kʋʋdba zut ka põngd koeel ye, zoobda me ka basd tɩ kẽ wʋsg n loog ye." 
Ezekiel44:21 Maan-kʋʋd sã n na n kẽ wẽnd dooga pʋg raare, a ka yũud rãam ye." 
Ezekiel44:22 A pa tõe n yɩ kãadem ne pʋg-kõor bɩ ne pag b sẽn yiis ye. A yita ne Israyɛl buud bi-pugla bɩ paga maan-kʋʋd a to sẽn ki n base. 
Ezekiel44:23 Maan-kʋʋdbã n na wilg zãma wã bũmb ning fãa sẽn welg toore Wẽnd yĩnga la b wilg n bak bũmb sẽn ka rẽgemde la bũmb sẽn dẽgemde f sã n sɩɩs-a. 
Ezekiel44:24 Bãmb n kaood bʋʋdo la b na n kao-a-la wa m sẽn wilgi. B na n maana kibs rãmbã wala m sẽn wilgi la b na modg tɩ fãa tũ vʋʋsg raara noya. 
Ezekiel44:25 Maan-kʋʋd da kolg kũum n wa rẽgem a meng ye. A sẽn tõe n kolg sẽn lebg kũum yaa a ba, a ma, a bi-roaka, a ba bɩ a ma bi-ribla, a ba bɩ a ma bi-pugla, a sã n nan ka yi kãadem." 
Ezekiel44:26 Maan-kʋʋda sã n sɩɩsa bãmb nin-yende, a yɩlgda a menga, la a maanda rasem a yopoe n yaool n le sɩng tʋʋmde." 
Ezekiel44:27 La a sẽn na n le tag zak a yiib soaba daare, a na n maana maoong m sugr kosg yĩnga. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet rẽnna." 
Ezekiel44:28 Maan-kʋʋdba n na n tʋm m waoogr yĩnga. B ka na n deeg pʋɩɩr Israyɛl tẽng ye, tɩ maam n na n yɩ b pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel44:29 B soo kũun niyns sẽn tũnugd sugr kosg bɩ yɩlgr maando; bũmb ning fãa sẽn pʋlem Wẽnde t'a Israyɛl ka le tõe n dɩ a yõodo lebga bãmb soolem. 
Ezekiel44:30 B sẽn so yɛsa yaa rũms rẽemsã, kood rẽemsã sẽn lembd Wẽndã n paas b paoonga rʋr a ye piig zugã. Neba na n kõ-b-la b bur sõma wã tɩ m tũ rẽ n ning b zags barka." 
Ezekiel44:31 Luiila bɩ rũng buud fãa sẽn ki bɩ a to sẽn yõke, maan-kʋʋd ka sɩɩsd a neong ye.»" 
Ezekiel45:1 Woto la Soaala Wẽnd gomda: «Y sã n wa yet tɩ y na n pʋɩɩ tẽngã n kõ buud kam fãa a pʋɩɩre, wa a zu-noog sẽn tʋʋg-a, y na n kõo Soaala b rẽnna. B soolma woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu t'a yalem ya kãntɩɩs tus pisi. Vẽenem kãng welga toor bãmb yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:2 Vẽenem kãng pʋgẽ b na n basa wẽnd dooga yĩnga, vɩʋʋg woglem la yalem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs kobs-nu. Vẽenem kãng kokdame n gilg ne toaag sẽn ta kãntɩɩs pis-nu." 
Ezekiel45:3 Kẽ-y Wẽnd soolmẽ wã n bẽeg vẽenem yalem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs tus piiga t'a woglem ya kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu. Be la b na n ning wẽnd doogã, sõmblem sẽn pid sõmblem zĩigã." 
Ezekiel45:4 Vẽenem kãng na n boolame tɩ pʋɩɩr sõngo. Be la maan-kʋʋdba sẽn kolgd Wẽnd n tʋmd b tʋʋmna na n me b roto la be me la wẽnd dooga na n paam a zĩiga. 
Ezekiel45:5 Vẽenema a to me woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu t'a yalem yaa kãntɩɩs tus piiga n na n yɩ Levitsa soolem; bãmb n so tʋʋm niyns fãa sẽn tʋmd wẽnd doogẽ tɩ yaool n ka maan-kʋʋr tʋʋm ye. Be la bãmb me na n me n kẽ. 
Ezekiel45:6 Wẽnd vẽenema yegende b na n le bẽega vɩʋʋg woglem sẽn ta kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu t'a yalem ya kãntɩɩs tus a nu n me tẽngã. Israyɛl biig fãa tõe n wa kẽe be. 
Ezekiel45:7 Dĩma na n deega vẽenem Wẽnd vẽenema la tẽnga rãmb rẽnd sʋka. Nin-taoore, vẽenem kãng yalem na n tãaga Tẽnsʋk Mogre la yaanga a na n teka a Israyɛl tẽn-peelma toaaga. Sã n yaa a woglma yaa a Israyɛl buuda sags sẽn tong taaba woglem." 
Ezekiel45:8 Woto Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ dĩm dãmba tara b zĩiga. B kõn le maand Wẽnd neba pãn-tõog ye, b na bas vẽenema sẽn kellã a Israyɛl sagsa yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel45:9 Woto la Naaba-Wẽnd gomda: «Sekame marsã, Israyɛl dĩm-biisi. Y rẽnda yaa n looga toogo. Bas-y pãn-tõogo la nin-kʋʋre. Maan-y sẽn toge la sẽn zemse. M neba ra le nams ne y fãaba ye. Maam n kõt-y noore, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Ezekiel45:10 Ned kam fãa mag a te-koosem zɩslem ne bõn-magdi sẽn ya sõma. Y bõn-sĩin magdga, efa, yɩ sõmbo. Y bõn-koaag madga, bat, yɩ sõmbo." 
Ezekiel45:11 Bõn-magds a yiibã, efa la bat zema taaba. Bãmb piiga n pit bõn-sĩin magdg kãsengã, omer, la bõn-koaag magdg kãsengã, kor. Kor la omer me magame tɩ b zem taaba." 
Ezekiel45:12 Sã n ya zɩslma magbo, sikl yaa zera rãmb pisi. Sã n mag zera rãmb kobs-yoobe la pisi, f tara min a ye." 
Ezekiel45:13 Kũuna sẽn yãkd n kõt Soaala, ad-y y sẽn na n yãk-a to-to. Sã n ya alkam pɛɛlg bɩ alkam pugsgu, y pʋɩta y sẽn paama dʋr pisoobe n yãk dʋr a ye n kɩse." 
Ezekiel45:14 Sã n ya kaam lens koabg la y paam yã, yaa lengr a ye la y kɩta." 
Ezekiel45:15 Sã n ya rũmsã, yaa pe-yãang a ye bɩ bʋ-yãang a ye la y yãkd n kɩs bãmb kobs-yi zugu. Kaama, rãama bɩ zoma na n tũnuga yũ-noog bɩ yamleoog maoong bɩ maan-dɩtga, yel-wẽna sugr paoong yĩnga. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n kõt noor kãnga." 
Ezekiel45:16 Sẽn tog n deeg n kɩs rĩma, bɩ tẽnga biig fãa modg n paam n kɩs dĩm-biigã." 
Ezekiel45:17 Dĩma marsã n na n bãnge tɩ maanda tõog n kʋ: yũ-nooda maand sẽn tũnugd ne kaam la rãam, kibs bɛda raare, kiu-paala, vʋʋsg raare la tig-raase. Yaa dĩma n na n ges sugr kosg maandã, yũnood maandã, maan-dɩtsã la b sẽn tũnugd ne kũun niynsã, maanda sã n kʋʋd a Israyɛl dooga yĩnga.»" 
Ezekiel45:18 Ad Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn le paase: «Pipi kiuuga pipi raare, loalg sẽn ka tar bãnde la y na n kʋ do-sõnga yɩlgr yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:19 Maan-kʋʋda yãkda naafa zɩɩm n taag kʋɩlensa ra-lugã, maan-kugra kɩrems a naasã n paas pʋgẽ zaka kʋɩlens ra-lugã." 
Ezekiel45:20 Yaa boto la b na n le maan yɛsa kiuuga rasem a yopoe daar fãa neb niyns sẽn dẽgem b mense, tagsgo la gũusg kaalem yĩnga, la woto wẽnd dooga paamda yɩlgre." 
Ezekiel45:21 Kiuuga piig la a naas raare, sɩng-y pak kibsa. Yaa rasem a yopoe la kibsa na n kaoose la bura ka na n le ning bɩll ye." 
Ezekiel45:22 Kibsa pipi raare, dĩm-biiga na n kʋʋ loalga a meng yĩnga la buuda yĩnga n kos yel-wẽna sugri." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kibsa rasem a yopoe wã pʋgẽ, beoog sẽn vẽege yaa lols a yopoe la pe-raad a yopoe sẽn ka tar bãnde la dĩm-biiga na n kʋ yũ-noog maoongo. Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa boɛɛg me la a na n kʋ sugr kosg yĩnga." 
Ezekiel45:24 Maoonga loalg bɩ pe-raoogo fãa na n tũnuga ne zom peoogo la kaam lengre.» 
Ezekiel45:25 Ad Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn le paase: «Kiuug a yopoe soaba, kiuuga piig la a nu raare, dĩm-biiga na n maana wala a sẽn maan paka wẽnde. Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, a na n maana sugr kosg maoong wa pakã. Yũ-noog maanda na n yɩɩ wa pakã, alkama la kaama kũuna na n yɩɩ wa pakã.»" 
Ezekiel46:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Zaka a yiib soaba noor sẽn tees yaanga tog n paga rasem a yoobã n yaool n pak vʋʋsga raare la kiu-paalã. 
Ezekiel46:2 Dĩm-biiga na n tũu pipi zaka noor n kẽ la a na n kẽeme n sãag roog ning sẽn be noorẽ wã. A na n yalsa kʋɩlenga sɛɛga tɩ maan-kʋʋdba baas b yũ-nooda maand la b maan-dɩtse. A na n wõgemda rooga noor la a lebe. Kʋɩlenga ka na n pag sã n ka zaabre ye. 
Ezekiel46:3 Yaa no-kãng me la zãma wã na n wa wõgemd m taoore vʋʋsg raare la kiuuga yiib raare. 
Ezekiel46:4 Dĩm-biiga na n wa kõ-m-la vʋʋsg raare, pe-bi a yoobe la pe-raoog sẽn ka tar bãnde yũ-noog maoong yĩnga." 
Ezekiel46:5 Pe-raooga tũnugda ne zom peoogo. Sã n yaa pe-bi wã, a kɩta wala a sẽn tagse. Zom peooga paasda kaam lengre." 
Ezekiel46:6 Kiuuga yiib raare, na n yɩɩ loalga, pe-bi a yoobe, la pe-raoogo, la fãa yaa rũms sẽn ka tar bãnde." 
Ezekiel46:7 Loalgã, pe-raoogã tũnugda zom peoogo. Sã n ya pe-bi wã, dim-biiga tũnugda a sẽn tagse. A na n paasa kaam lengre, zom fãa ne a rẽnda." 
Ezekiel46:8 Rĩm-biiga sẽn tũ noor ning n wa wã, no-kãng la a tũud n yi. A tũuda roog ning sẽn pẽ-a noorã." 
Ezekiel46:9 Tẽnga kamba sẽn wat m waoogre, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, wala kibs bɛdã, tig-raasã, tog n bãnga neere tɩ sẽn tũ-b goabg noora lɛɛgd n yii rɩtgo, tɩ sẽn tũ-b rɩtga lɛɛg n yi goabga. F sẽn tũ noor ning n kẽ wã f ka tõe n le tũ no-kãng n yi ye. Yɩta noor ning sẽn tota yẽ wã." 
Ezekiel46:10 Dĩm-biiga watame la a yit ne neb a taabã, yiib wakato.»" 
Ezekiel46:11 Naaba-Wẽnd le paasdame: «Kibs daare la lagemg-taab raare, kũuna sẽn na n tũnugã yaa naaf fãa zom peoogo, pe-raoog fãa zom peoogo. Sã n ya pe-bi wã, yaa wa b sẽn date. Zom peoog fãa togẽ-la ne kaam lengre." 
Ezekiel46:12 Dĩm-biiga sã n wat ne a yamleoog maoongo, yũ-noog maoong bɩ maan-dɩtga yaa yaang rignoorã la b tog n pak t'a kẽ. A maanda kʋʋda wa vʋʋsga raare, la a sã n looge b lebgd n paga kʋɩlengã." 
Ezekiel46:13 Beoog sẽn vẽeg fãa, yaa pe-bil sẽn ka tar bãnde la b na maan yũ-noog maoong Soaala yĩnga. Yaa yibeoog la maoonga kʋʋda." 
Ezekiel46:14 Yibeoog fãa b tũnugda zom wamde la kaam bilfu sẽn na n nag zoma. Dẽ yaa bũmb sẽn yals daar buud fãa yĩnga. 
Ezekiel46:15 Pe-bilã, zoma la kaama sẽn tũnugdã yaa bũmb sẽn tog n kõ Soaala yibeoog fãa n tãag dũni wã yikri.»" 
Ezekiel46:16 Woto la Naaba-Wẽnd gomda: «Dĩm-biiga sã n kẽ a soolma pʋgẽ n yãk a vẽenema n kõ-a bi-roaka, biigã n na n soog-a wa a pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel46:17 Sã n yaa a sõgne la rĩm-biiga dɩka a vẽenema n kõ, sõgna n na n soog-a n tãag a sẽn paam n na n soog a meng raare. A sẽn so a meng raare, vẽenema lebda rĩm-biigã. Yaa dĩm-biiga kamb bal n tõe n dɩ a raboog pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel46:18 Dĩma ka tõe n fã zãma wã, n kẽ a soolma pʋgẽ n deeg bũmb a meng yĩng ye. Yaa a sẽn so pʋgẽ bal la a tõe n yãk n kõ a kamba, la woto b kõn tõog n dig ned ba a ye n yiis a soolmẽ ye.»" 
Ezekiel46:19 Raoã tall-m lame n ta rot niyns sẽn me nug goabgã n kẽes-m maan-kʋʋdba ro-sõma wã pʋsẽ. A tɩ yãenda zĩiga, nin-taoor dota pʋsẽ." 
Ezekiel46:20 A yeel-m lame: «Yaa ka la sugr kosg la yel-wẽnd dolb maanda rũms na n dʋge. Na n yɩɩ woto me ne kũuna sẽn tũnugã, tɩ ka yɩ modgr ne maan-kʋʋdba tɩ b tall dɩ sõma wã n yi sɩmandẽ wã n pẽneg zãma wã ye.»" 
Ezekiel46:21 Raoã tall-m lame n yi sɩmandẽ n kɩt tɩ d yeg a gõd a naasã. Gõdr fãa ne a zaka. 
Ezekiel46:22 Zag-bãmb da yaa bõonese, la fãa ra zema taaba. Woglma yaa kãntɩɩs pis-naase, tɩ yalma ya kãntɩɩs pis-tã." 
Ezekiel46:23 Zak fãa ra gũbga ne kug lalga, la b ra tedga bug-toaalse." 
Ezekiel46:24 Raoã yeel-m lame: «Ya bug-toaals kãensa zugu la maan-kʋʋdba rʋgd zãma wã sẽn wat ne rũms niyns n kʋʋd maandã.» 
Ezekiel47:1 Raoã tall-m lame n le wa wẽnd dooga noore. M yãenda koom sẽn bund n yit yaang noorã. Wẽnd dooga lʋgre ra teesa yaanga, kooma me boto. Kooma ra zoet n teesa wẽnd dooga rɩtgo, n yegd maan-kugra rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel47:2 Raoã kɩtame tɩ m tũ goabg noorã n yi wẽnd doogã la m gilgame n wa ta yaang noorã. Kooma ra yita no-kãng nug goabga. 
Ezekiel47:3 Neda zãagame n tees yaanga la a ra zãada wĩ-bãanega a nugẽ n magda. A maga kãntɩɩs tusri. A kɩtame tɩ m kẽ kooma la a ra tekda m nao-sũgsi. 
Ezekiel47:4 A sẽn le mag kãntɩɩs tusri a le kɩtame tɩ m kẽ kooma la a ra tata m dũma. T'a le mag kãntɩɩs tusri n yet tɩ m dʋʋge la kooma ra tata sɛɛga. 
Ezekiel47:5 A le maga kãntɩɩs tusri la lebga ko-fõtem sẽn ka tõe n dʋʋg ye. Kooma paasame, kʋɩlga lebga zulunga, kʋɩlga le ka tõe n dʋʋg sã n ka rugb ye." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tɩ neda na n sok-ma: «F gesa neere, Ezekiyɛl?» A tall-m lame tɩ d zãag bilfu n le tall-m n wa kʋɩlga noore." 
Ezekiel47:7 M sẽn lɛɛg n wa kʋɩlga noore, m yãendame tɩ tɩɩsa yaa wusgo, kʋɩlga goabg la rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel47:8 Raoã yeel-m lame: «Ko-kãnga rigda yaanga, Araba foole la a tũud n kẽed yamsem Mogrã la a sẽn kẽed Mogrã a kooma na n lebga sõma." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kooma sẽn ta zĩig ninga bõn vɩɩl fãa vɩɩm na n yãngame. Kʋɩl-zẽeda na n weka balbo tɩ kooma sẽn ta zĩig ning fãa, zĩ-kãng lebgda sõmbo tɩ vɩɩm sakd a pʋgẽ." 
Ezekiel47:10 Kʋɩl-zẽ-yẽedba na n tonga taab kʋɩlga noore. B na n yɛdga b zulumsi Engadi n ta En-Eglayim. Kʋɩl-zẽeda sẽn yõgda yaa buud toor-toore wa Tẽnsʋk Mogra zĩma. 
Ezekiel47:11 Sã n ya bãtã la ko-ralma, bãmb pa tek ye. Yamsem bal n pid-b zãnga." 
Ezekiel47:12 Kʋɩlga noore, goabg la rɩtgo tɩ-rits buud toɛ-toɛyã n na n yi. B vãada kõn tol n sʋʋg ye, b womb ka be wakat ye. Kiuug fãa wata ne a bɩ-paala, tɩ kooma yaa do-sõnga koom. Biisa womda rɩɩb yĩnga la vãada yaa tɩɩm.»" 
Ezekiel47:13 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Ad tẽn-peelma Israyɛl sags piig la a yiibã sẽn na n pʋɩ taaba. A Zozɛf pʋɩɩra na n yɩɩ wa sags a yiib rẽnna. 
Ezekiel47:14 Y fãa na n paama pʋɩɩre tɩ m wẽename n kãab y ba rãmba tẽn-kãnga, la a na n lebga y tẽnga." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ad tẽnga toose: Nug goabg yaa Mog kãsenga la a sɩngda, n tũud, Etlõ, Lebo-Amat, Sedad," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berota, Sibrayim sẽn be Damas, ne Amat la Asɛr-Tikõ rĩung tẽnsʋka, n kolg Awurã toaaga." 
Ezekiel47:17 Woto wã toaaga sɩngda Tẽnsʋk Mogrã n tat tẽng ning sẽn boond tɩ Asar-Ena. A na n teka Damas la Amat rĩundu. Woto la toaaga, nug goabga sẽnẽ." 
Ezekiel47:18 Yaang marsã, toaaga na n sɩnga Awurã ne Damas sʋka, a na n tũu Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlga, Galaad la Israyɛl sʋka la a na n taa Tamar, sẽn be Yamsem mogra noore." 
Ezekiel47:19 Nug rɩtgo, toaaga na n sɩnga Tamar n ta Kadɛs Meriba bãoogo. Dẽ poore a na n yega Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛgã n ta Tẽnsʋk Mogre. Woto la nug rɩtg toaaga." 
Ezekiel47:20 Nin-taoore yaa Tẽnsʋk Mogrã n na n yɩ toaaga, al nug rɩtgo n ta Lebo-Amat. Nin-taoor toaaga la rẽ." 
Ezekiel47:21 Pʋɩ-y tẽnga ne taaba, ne a Israyɛl sagsã." 
Ezekiel47:22 Y na n poeesame n pʋɩ la ra yĩm-y sãamba sẽn nok-b yãmba n dog kamb sẽn be ne yãmba ye. Da zẽng-y-b ne Israyɛl tẽnga kamba ye. B tog n paama b pʋɩɩr Israyɛl buuda sags sʋka. 
Ezekiel47:23 Yaa sẽn kẽed sak ninga la sãan na n paam a pʋɩɩre. Yaa maam a Naaba-Wẽnd n kõt no-kãnga.» 
Ezekiel48:1 Ad buuda sagsa ne b pʋɩɩre: «A Dã paama a pʋɩɩre. A toaaga sɩngda Nug goabg, yɩɩg-yɩɩga, al Etlõ n digd Lebo-Amat, Asar-Ena, n pẽneg Amat la Damas rĩungu; a na n tonga a toaag yaanga n ta Tẽnsʋk Mogra, nin-taoore." 
Ezekiel48:2 A Asɛr paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Dã rẽnna yaang n tat nin-taoore. 
Ezekiel48:3 A Neftali paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Asɛr rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:4 A Manase paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Neftali rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:5 A Efrayim paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Manase rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:6 A Rubẽ paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Efrayim rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:7 A Zɩɩda paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Rubẽ rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:8 A Zɩɩda yegende, yaang toaagã n ta Tẽnsʋk Mogra, nin-taoore y na n basa vẽenem, yẽ ne sak ninga sẽn pʋgda sʋka, wẽnd dooga yĩnga. A yalem yaa kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu. Woglma yaa sags a taaba fãa rẽnna, yaanga n ta nin-taoore." 
Ezekiel48:9 Y sẽn na n toog vẽenem ning Soaala yĩnga woglem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu la yalem na n yɩɩ kãntɩɩs tus pisi. 
Ezekiel48:10 Maan-kʋʋdbã n na n ti vẽenem kãng pʋgẽ. Yaang n ta nin-taoore yaa kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu; nug goabg n ta rɩtgo kãntɩɩs tus piiga, tɩ wẽnd dooga be tẽnsʋka." 
Ezekiel48:11 Sẽn na n soog-b zĩ-kãng yaa a Sadok kamb nins sẽn kell-bã n tʋmd Wẽnd tʋʋmda ne pʋ-peelem, sẽn ka naag-b Israyɛl kamba n wɩɩb b wɩɩbdã wala Levitsã." 
Ezekiel48:12 B vẽenema yãka Wẽnd pʋɩɩrẽ, Levitsa rẽnd yegende." 
Ezekiel48:13 Wala maan-kʋʋdba rẽnna, Levitsa pʋɩɩr woglem yaa kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu la yalem yaa kãntɩɩs tus piiga." 
Ezekiel48:14 Vẽenem kãng pʋgẽ bũmb ka be sẽn tõe n kẽes raag bɩ sẽn tõe n tek ye. Bũmb ka be sẽn tõe n lebg ned a to soolem ye, tɩ yaa Soaala pʋɩɩre." 
Ezekiel48:15 Vẽenem n na n kelle t'a yalem zems kãntɩɩs tus a nu, t'a woglem ya kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu. Yaa vẽenem kãng pʋga la neb a taaba na n ti b roto tɩ rũmsa me paam b wãbneg zĩiga. Tẽnga meta sʋka." 
Ezekiel48:16 Tẽnga me magb la woto: a woglem la a yalem yaa magb a ye: kãntɩɩs tus a naase la kobs-nu. 
Ezekiel48:17 Tẽnga kɩrems a naasã n gilgi, vɩʋʋg la b na n bok n base. A yalma yaa kãntɩɩs kobs-yi la pis-nu." 
Ezekiel48:18 Vẽenem a yi la b na n bas Wẽnd pʋɩɩra yegende, tẽnga yaanga la tẽnga nin-taoore. B woglem na n taa kãntɩɩs tus piiga. Vẽenem kãng la tẽnga rãmb pʋto." 
Ezekiel48:19 Neb niyns fãa sẽn tʋmd-b tẽnga pʋgẽ na n tõog n ko zĩ-kãnga, b sẽn ya sak ning fãa neba." 
Ezekiel48:20 Wa sẽn togsã, vɩʋʋga fãa sẽn bas Wẽnd yĩnga la tẽnga rãmb pʋta yĩnga, b woglem la b yalem ka yɩɩd to ye, yaa kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu." 
Ezekiel48:21 Rĩm-biiga me na n paama a pʋɩɩre. Na n yɩɩ sʋka. Wẽnd vẽenema ne tẽnga vẽenema sʋka; vẽenem kãng woglem la a yalem yaa kãntɩɩs tus pisi la a nu.
