Yaanga a toaag yaa tẽns niyns sẽn yãk toaag ne Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlgã, nin-taoore yaa tẽns niyns sẽn yãk toaag ne Tẽnsʋk Mogrã. Wẽnd pʋɩɩra la wẽnd dooga na n zĩnda tẽnga tẽnsʋk sẽn welg Wẽnd yĩngã." 
Ezekiel48:22 Levitsa vẽenem la rota sẽn tɩ zĩig ningã basda rĩma pʋɩɩr sʋka. Rĩm-biiga pʋɩɩr sẽn le be vẽenem ning sʋk yɛsa, yaa a Zɩɩda la a Bẽnzame tẽn-peelem. A Zɩɩda rẽnd bee nug goabga, t'a Bẽnzame rẽnd be nug rɩtgo." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ad buud niyns sẽn kell-bã ne b pʋɩɩre: a Bẽnzame paama a pʋɩɩre, a tẽeg n taa yaanga rãmba toaag n wat Tẽnsʋk Mogra, nin-taoore." 
Ezekiel48:24 A Simeõ paama a pʋɩɩre, a yegda a Bẽnzame rẽnna, a yaanga n ta a nin-taoore." 
Ezekiel48:25 A Isakar paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Simeõ rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:26 A Zabulõ paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Gad rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:27 A Gad paama a pʋɩɩre. A yegda a Zabulõ rẽnna. 
Ezekiel48:28 Nug rɩtgo a Gad toaaga tata Tamar, yaanga, n tat Meriba-Kades, n yegd Ezipt kʋɩl-bɛɛga, n tat Tẽnsʋk Mogrã." 
Ezekiel48:29 Yaa woto la y na n pʋɩ tẽngã n kõ sak fãa a rẽnna. Yaa maam a Naaba-Wẽnd n kõt-y noor kãnga. 
Ezekiel48:30 Ad Zerizalɛɛm tẽnga noya piig la a yiibã. Nug goabg lal-gũbra woglem taa kãntɩɩs tus a naas la kobs-nu n tar noya a tãabo. 
Ezekiel48:31 Noor fãa reegda a Israyɛl sak a ye yʋʋre: a Rubẽ, a Zɩɩda la a Levi noya." 
Ezekiel48:32 Yaanga, lal-gũbra yaa kãntɩɩs tus a naas la kobs-nu, n tar noya a tãabo: a Zozɛf, a Bẽnzame, a Dã noya." 
Ezekiel48:33 Nug rɩtgo, lal-gũbra yaa kãntɩɩs tus a naas la kobs-nu n tar noya a tãabo: a Simeõ, a Isakar, a Zabulõ noya." 
Ezekiel48:34 Nin-taoore, lal-gũbra yaa kãntɩɩs tus a naase la kobs-nu n tar noya a tãabo: a Gad, a Asɛr, a Neftali noya." 
Ezekiel48:35 Tẽnga sẽn mag n gilgã: kãntɩɩs tus piig la a nii. Rũnda tɛka ad tẽnga yʋʋr sẽn na n yɩ a soaba: ‹Soaala-Wẽnd zĩig la ka.› » 
Hosea1:1 Bũmb ninga sẽn be sebr kãnga pʋga: yaa koees niyns Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Oze, a Beeri biiga. Yɩ-la a Zowas biig a Zeroboam sẽn waa n ya Israyɛl dĩma. Sã n ya Zɩɩda dĩm dãmba, yɩ-la a Oziyas, a Zotam, a Aas la a Ezekiyas wakato." 
Hosea1:2 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd koeesa sɩngre, koees niyns a Oze sẽn deeg n taas-dã. Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Oze: «Kẽng n bao pʋg-yoodr a ye, n maan f paga. A sẽn na n dog kamb niynsã kõn deeg f raboog pʋɩɩr ye. Tẽnga rãmb basa maam, b Soaala. B maana wa pʋg-yoaad sẽn bas a sɩda.»" 
Hosea1:3 A Oze sɩd kẽng n tɩ kẽe ne a Gomɛr, a Diblayim bi-pugla. A Gomɛr rɩka pʋga n dog bi-ribla." 
Hosea1:4 Soaala-Wẽnd yeela a Oze: «Pʋd biiga tɩ Zizreyɛl, tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu m na rok m sũuri ne Zizreyɛl zɩɩma raagda. M na n kɩtame tɩ naam sɛ a Israyɛl roogẽ." 
Hosea1:5 Daar a ye, Zizreyɛl tẽn-nabrẽ wã, a Israyɛl tãb-biisa na n konga pãnga.»" 
Hosea1:6 Paga le rɩka pʋga, n dog bi-pugla. Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd yeele: «Pʋd-a t'a Lo-Ruama, a pʋg-beoogo, tɩ marsã tɛka mam yam laka ne Israyɛl buud neba fãa; m ka leb n nong-b ye." 
Hosea1:7 Yaa ne a Zɩɩda buuda la m yama na n kell n pa. Yaa maam b Wẽndã n na n fãag-ba. La m fãagrã ka na n tũ ne loko, ne sʋʋga, ne zabre, ne weefo, bɩ ne wed-dʋʋd ye.»" 
Hosea1:8 Paga sika a Lo-Ruama, n leb n dɩk pʋga, n dog bi-ribla." 
Hosea1:9 Tɩ wẽnd leb n yeele: «Pʋd biiga t'a Lo-Ami, a Sãana, tɩ yãmb a Israyɛl kamba lebga m sãamba. M ka le yaa a Be-n-beẽ, yãmb yĩng ye.»" 
Hosea2:1 Daar a ye, a Israyɛl kamba na n yɩɩ wa Mogr noorẽ bĩisri, b sõora na n lebga ka tɛka. Soaala kõn le yeel wa pĩnda tɩ b ka bãmb neb ye. B na n bool-b-la woto: «Wẽnnaam Vɩɩga kamba.»" 
Hosea2:2 Sasa kãnga, Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl kamba na n le lagma taaba, b dĩma na n yɩ-la a ye. B tẽn-peelma me kõn le yɩ ned a to soolem ye. Wẽnd na taas a Zizreyɛl a da kãsenga raare!" 
Hosea2:3 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet tɩ y wilg y saam-biisi, pagb la rapa tɩ bãmb la m buudu, la bãmb tẽngã la m na n bool tɩ m pʋg-rʋmde." 
Hosea2:4 Zab ne f ma, Israyɛl, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, zab ne-a wʋsgo t'a ka le ya mam pag ye la mam me ka leb n yaa a sɩd ye. Yeel-a t'a pek a nenga la a yãoogo n yiis bũmb ning fãa sẽn wilgd t'a yaa pʋg-yoodre." 
Hosea2:5 Ka rẽ mam na sẽk a fuugu n bas-a zaala wala a rogem daare; a tẽn-peelma na lebg zĩ-peen-daaga la ko-yũud na kʋ-a, a meng tẽngẽ." 
Hosea2:6 M ka nong a kamba ye; b pʋɩɩr ka m nengẽ ye," 
Hosea2:7 tɩ b ma yaa yi-saada, la a ka zoet yãnd ye. La bãng-y t'a pʋgd n gomdame: «M na n pʋga m kamba poore, bãmb n na n kõ-m m dɩɩb la m koom, n kõ-m m sẽn na n yeelg la m sẽgne, n kõ-m m kaam la m dãam!»" 
Hosea2:8 La ad m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m na n gɩdga a sorã t'a ra le tõog n loog ye. A soya na n yãga ne gõose. Mam na n mee lalg n gũbg-a t'a ra le tõog n yi ye." 
Hosea2:9 A na mak a roell dãmba pʋgbo, la a kõn tõog ye. A na kõ-b sɛka la na vaale. Dẽ marsã la a na n yeel a menga: «M na n leba m sɩd kʋdga nengẽ, tɩ m sẽn da be ne-yẽ wã, m sũur da ya noog n yɩɩd marsã.»" 
Hosea2:10 Ad-y paga ra yĩmame tɩ maam n da moenegd-a, n kõt-a koodo, rã-paalga la ka-neem. A yĩmame tɩ maam n da kõt-a wanzurf la sãnem t'a rõogd a Baal waoogr lagdo." 
Hosea2:11 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la tigsga wakato a kõn paam kood ye, Bugsuntunga kõn tõs n kõg rãam n yũ ye, M na n deega m pe-kõbdo la m lamdo, la fuug sẽn na n lud yãnde kõn le wʋg ye." 
Hosea2:12 A doell dãmba taoore m na yees a futã n ning-a yãnde la ned kõn gɩdg-m ye. 
Hosea2:13 Sũ-noog raar kõn le zĩnd ye. B kõn le gom Wẽnd waoogra tẽnga gilgr yell ye. B kõn gom ki-paala, vʋʋsg raare la kibs a taab yell ye, fãa na n sɛɛme." 
Hosea2:14 M na n võ-la a bugsuntund la a kankamse. La bãmb poorẽ a ra gomdame: «Ad-y wã fãa yaa m yooba yõodo!» Yõoda na n lebga rũms rẽnda tɩ f pʋʋgã n na n lebg rũmsa wãbneg zĩiga. 
Hosea2:15 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete: «Woto la a na yao a sẽn bas maam n pʋg a Baal ne a wẽn-taase. A ra pʋgda bãmb ne a kũuni. A ra ninga a fan-teedo, a tʋb-londo la a muizãana n babsd a roell dãmba. Mam yell bal la a ra yĩm yã. Soaala n gomde." 
Hosea2:16 Ade, m na n le bels-a lame n tall-a n leb we-raoogẽ, tɩ d sũur le tabend taaba," 
Hosea2:17 tɩ m yaool marsã n lebs-a a bugsuntundã; Akor bãooga sẽn kẽesd rabeem dũnna wã na n pidsa a sẽn gãe n saagd bũmb ninga fãa. A na n pʋg-m-la zĩ-kãnga wala a bi-bɩɩlmẽ, wala Ezipt yiiba wakato.»" 
Hosea2:18 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n paasde: «Badaare fo na n boola maam tɩ f sɩda. F kõn le bool maam tɩ f Baal, tɩ f zu-soab ye." 
Hosea2:19 M kõn sak tɩ Baal yʋʋr meng le yi f noorẽ ye. A wẽn-taasa yʋʋr meng kõn le pʋd ye. 
Hosea2:20 Badaare, m buuda yĩnga m na n yõga zood ne yir dũmsi, yĩngri luiili la tẽng bõn-vuudi wã fãa. Tãpo, sʋʋga, zab-teoog buud fãa kõn le yiis ye. M buuda na ya n paam n vʋʋs ne laafi." 
Hosea2:21 F na n lebga m paga daar buud fãa yĩnga. La m na yao m sẽn tog n yao bũmb ning fãa tɩ f lebg m paga. M na lɛɛg n pids-f ne pʋ-peelem, ne zemsgo, nonglem la sũ-bʋgsem." 
Hosea2:22 M na n paamame tɩ f ra le bas maam n pʋg ned a to ye la f na n bãngame tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde. 
Hosea2:23 Badaare, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete, m na lebg Wẽnd sẽn sakde, b sã n bool-ma. Yĩngr sẽn kose, m na kõ-a t'a reeg n taas tẽnga. Tẽnga na kõ pʋtã b sẽn date." 
Hosea2:24 Woto tẽnga na wa ne alkam, n wa ne rã-paalga, n wa ne ka-neem. Fãa na n yɩɩ wala a Zizreyɛl, wala a Wẽnd mi bʋdb, sẽn date." 
Hosea2:25 M na n vigla a Zizreyɛl a tẽngẽ, a Pʋg-beoog na n lebga a Rʋmde. M na n yeela a Sãana: ‹Foo la m buudu,› tɩ yẽ na n leok-ma: ‹Yãmb la m Wẽnde.› »" 
Hosea3:1 Naaba-Wẽnd yeela maam yɛsa: «Modg tɩ f yama kẽ pʋg kãnga sẽn tar doell la a vɩ yoob vɩɩma. Yõg zoodo la nong-a wala maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn nong a Israyɛl kamba ne b sẽn bas maam n pʋgd wẽn-naandsã la b pidsd b pʋga ne kũuna b sẽn kõt-bã, ne miisda sẽn dõosd ne bugsuntund biisã.»" 
Hosea3:2 Mam maana wa Soaala sẽn yeelã, m sõda wakɩ koeems piig la a nu, la ki pet bɛd piig la a yiibu n tɩ kɩs la paga le wa-la m nengẽ." 
Hosea3:3 La m yaool n yeel-a lame: «Bas tɩ kaoos tɩ f be m zakẽ wã bala n pa yit ye, n ka yood ye. Fo na n basa rao fãa pẽnegre, la mam meng na n zãaga ne foo.»" 
Hosea3:4 Na n yɩɩ woto tɩ bala Israyɛl kamba na n kaoosame n ka naaba, n ka dĩma, n ka maoongo n ka ra-luga, n ka bag-korgo la bag-kuga." 
Hosea3:5 Na n kaoosame tɩ b yaool n le lɛɛg n wa kẽ Soaala, n le wẽnemd b neng n tees b Wẽnd la b tees b dĩm a Daviid yagense. La wakat n wate tɩ b na n yik n baood Soaala ziira pẽnegre la b baood b kũun sõma." 
Hosea4:1 Naaba-Wẽnd na n yika bʋʋd ne tẽnga rãmba. Dɩlla Israyɛl kamba, kelg-y tɩ woto la b koɛɛga: «Sɩd pʋgb ka ye, nonglem ka ye, Wẽnd bãngr ka ye. B ka le get-m wa Wẽnd ye." 
Hosea4:2 Ned kãabda a to beedo, n zãmbd-a, n kʋd-a, n yood la a zuud. Nin-zẽmb waa n kẽe tẽngã n yãmbe. Kʋʋda taab rũnna n le kʋ beoogo." 
Hosea4:3 Rẽ n so tɩ war na n lʋɩ tẽngã. Neba fãa na n komsame. Yir rũmsi, la yĩngri luiili, al ba mogra zĩma, fãa tara menengo." 
Hosea4:4 La baasg fãa ka neba fãa n na n dɩ rẽ taal ye. Ka neba fãa n tog ne sãbsg ye. Zabra bee ne foo, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga! Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd boto." 
Hosea4:5 Wĩntoogo, fo na n lʋɩɩme, la yʋngo yaa f sõsd-n-taaga, yaa bãngda n na n lake. F ma menga na n kiime." 
Hosea4:6 Mam buuda neb sãamdame, bãngre kaalem yĩnga, tɩ b ka mi mam sẽn yaa a soab ye. Fo meng ka tʋlg n zãms mam sẽn yaa a soab ye. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la m me ka le rat-fo, f kõn le yɩ m maan-kʋʋd ye. Fo basa m noorã, ma me na bas f kamba." 
Hosea4:7 Maan-kʋʋdba gill fãa zãaga ne sora sẽn da tuk n kõ-ba. B rɩka maam, ne m sẽn pid ne ziirã n tek ne wẽn-faoogo." 
Hosea4:8 B rɩlgda b mens ne kũun niyns m buud tõtra sẽn wat ne, n na n kos a yel-wẽna sugri. Dɩlla b sẽn dat bala, yaa m buuda kell n yɩ beegda, tɩ rɩɩba watẽ tɩ b rɩtẽ." 
Hosea4:9 La ka na n paoog ba a ye, buuda woo, maan-kʋʋdba woo, m na sɩbg b tʋʋm yoodã sẽn tog ne sɩbgr ninga." 
Hosea4:10 B na rɩ la b kõn tɩge, b na yo la b kõn dog kamb ye, tɩ b raaga maam m base, maam b Wẽnde, n na yo b yoobo." 
Hosea4:11 M buuda sɩnga zʋbsgo, n dat t'a bugsuntunda kõ-a rãam wʋsgo," 
Hosea4:12 la yaa wẽn-naande, wẽnd sẽn pees ne raado la a tɩ soke. Ra-giig yɩta wãn n wilg sẽn wat beoogo? Ad-y yaa yoob raab n wa b yamẽ n kẽes-b moogo. Yooba la b sẽn bas Naaba-Wẽnd n pʋg wẽn-naandsã." 
Hosea4:13 B rɩta maand dɩɩb tãms zutu. Kunkuba zut la maanda yũ-nooga rukda. B kẽeda tɩɩs maasmẽ, maasem sẽn noom-ba: wala kʋgse, kankalse, ãoose. Dẽ n wa ne b kom-pugli wã yoobo, n wa ne b bi-pagba wɩɩbgo." 
Hosea4:14 La ka y kom-pugli wã la m na n zab ne ye. Ka y bi-pagba sẽn bas b sɩdb rãmba n yood rap a taaba la m na n zab ne ye. Yaa yãmb la m na n sɩbge, tɩ yãmb n tall-ba n yi kɛɛnga, tɩ b naag n dɩt maand dɩɩbo ne sẽn yood-b wẽnd dota pʋsẽ; tɩ wala yelbũnda sẽn yete: yam kaalg menesda buud tõre." 
Hosea4:15 Woto wã, Israyɛl, fo saka yoobo. Bɩ a Zɩɩda vẽ ne rẽ. Da kẽng-y Gilgal b sẽn boond tɩ b tẽn-sõnga ye, da rʋ-y Betɛl sẽn ya bug-tẽnga ye. Da wẽen-y n yet tɩ ne Vɩɩm Naaba-Wẽnd ye!" 
Hosea4:16 Israyɛl tõdga wa nag-yãanga sẽn ka tʋlg t'a yubla reeg raoog ning b sẽn sogd nag koodsa ye. Bõe marsã la a rat tɩ Soaala ges-a wa pe-bi sẽn tar n na n tɩ wãben zĩ yalemsẽ? 
Hosea4:17 Efrayim waoogda bõn-naandse, bas-y-ba," 
Hosea4:18 tɩ b baas b rɩ bɛdã, n yo b yoobã la b sak yãnd ning ra-taasa sẽn tʋk b zug n kẽndã." 
Hosea4:19 Sob-raoog na loog ne b fãa; b maamda yãnd n na n dɩ-ba. 
Hosea5:1 Maan-kʋʋdba, kelg-y yã, Israyɛl taoor dãmba, na-yir dãmba, maan-y gũusgu. Mispa tẽnga yãmb yɩɩ wa bẽdgo m buuda yĩnga, n yɩ wa zulung sẽn tẽeg Tabor tãnga zugu." 
Hosea5:2 Y yɩɩ loang sẽn zulum Kitim. La maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m na sagl-y sagl-sõngo." 
Hosea5:3 Mam mi m sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ne a Efrayim, m sẽn na n maan bũmb ning ne a Israyɛl. Sɩda y tusa a Efrayim n tees yoobo, la yaa Israyɛl tõre la y rẽgem yã." 
Hosea5:4 A Israyɛl kamba sẽn maana kɩtame tɩ b ka tõe n lɛɛg n wa kẽ Naaba-Wẽnd ye. Yooba liba b yam tɩ b ka le mi Naaba-Wẽnd ye. 
Hosea5:5 Israyɛl zẽk-m-menga n sãamd-a. A Efrayim ne a Israyɛl yel-wẽna n kɩt tɩ b kẽnd n lagsd n lʋɩtẽ la yaa b yel-wẽnda n kand-ba n lubdẽ. A Zɩɩda meng naagame n lagsdẽ. 
Hosea5:6 B wat n baooda Soaala leokre ne b piisi la b niis maando, la b ka paamd leokr ye, tɩ Soaala zãaga ne bãmba." 
Hosea5:7 B zãmba Wẽnde, b roga tãmpĩ-bi; rẽ yĩnga, ka ne kiuugu, b tẽnga na n lebga raboogo." 
Hosea5:8 Peeb-y baorg Gibea tẽnga, peeb-y tõntõog Rama tẽnga. Wẽ-y no-bɩnga Bɛt-Avɛn tẽngẽ; la a Bẽnzame maan gũusg a poorẽ." 
Hosea5:9 Sɩbgre daare Efrayim na n lebga raboogo la m sẽn gomd woto a Israyɛl buuda sags poorẽ yaa sɩd menga. 
Hosea5:10 Zɩɩda nanamse yaa wa neb sẽn teemd b pʋt toaag kuga, la m sũura na fudg n waag-ba." 
Hosea5:11 Efrayim tara toogo, b maan-a-la pãnga, la yaa yẽ meng n bas sɩda n pʋg kuroto." 
Hosea5:12 A Efrayim yĩnga mam na n yɩɩ rasempʋɩɩga la m na n feo-la a Zɩɩda yẽna n bas-a lamboaama. 
Hosea5:13 A Efrayim reega a kongre. A Zɩɩda yãe-la a bãaga sẽn lebg bã-toogã. Woto a Efrayim tɩ yõka Asiri sɛɛga. A Zɩɩda kẽng n tɩ yẽsa ne dĩm kãsenga; yẽ me ka na n tõog n sõng-y ne bũmb ye. A kõ tõog n tɩp y nodr ye, Efrayim kamba." 
Hosea5:14 Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n zabd ne yã wa bõnyẽega, yaa maam n kaoog zabre ne a Zɩɩda, wala rũn-toaaga. M sã n yõk bũmbu, n tar-a n looda, ned ka tõe n le reeg-a mam nugẽ ye." 
Hosea5:15 Ade, Naaba-Wẽnd meng n gomda: ‹M na n leba m doogẽ, n tãag a Efrayim kamba sẽn wat n deeg b kongre. B sẽn wat n lʋɩ yɩɩr pʋgẽ la b na n bao mam sẽn beẽ.› »" 
Hosea6:1 Y gomda woto: «Wa-y tɩ d leb Wẽnd nengẽ. Sãmpogra yaa bãmb sãmpogre, la b na le sãoog-d lame; b sɩbg-d lame la b na n loe-la d noadã." 
Hosea6:2 B na n vʋʋg-d-la dasem a yiibu, dasem a tãab poore; b na n le yik-d lame. D na n le vɩɩnda bãmb taoore." 
Hosea6:3 D ning pãnga n bãng tɩ bãmb la Wẽnde. N-ye, d modg n bãng tɩ bãmb la Soaala! B waoonga pa tõe n vaal ye. Yaa wala sõore, a ka tõe n ka puk ye. B na n wa-la d nengẽ wala sẽoogo sẽn wat ne a saaga tɩ zĩ-lik paalele me wat ne a rẽnna n le bʋk tẽngã.»" 
Hosea6:4 La bãng-y tɩ Soaala na n leokame: «Yaa bõe la m na n maan f yĩnga, Efrayim, bõe la m na n maan f yĩnga, Zɩɩda? Y sẽn nong maam ne nonglem ninga wẽnda yibeoog sawadgo, n ka zɛɛd wɩlgr ye, n wẽnd meenem n ka zɛɛd mesgr ye." 
Hosea6:5 Rẽ yĩnga la m zabd ne yã. M zabd-y-la ne bãngdba koeese, la m wilgd-y lame tɩ y babsda y kũum. M sẽn yals sɩbgr ninga na n puka vẽeneg wa sõore." 
Hosea6:6 M sẽn data yaa nonglem lʋɩ taoore n yɩɩd maanda kʋʋbo; la b bãng tɩ maam la Naaba-Wẽnde, la rẽ n yɩɩd rũmsa nemd sẽn kãbd bugmẽ." 
Hosea6:7 Sã n ya yãmba, bãngdba, y maana wa neb a taaba n ka pids y sẽn kãab ye, y zãmba maam." 
Hosea6:8 Galaad yaa bi-bees tẽnga, b kẽndame tɩ zɩɩm raagd n pʋgd b poore." 
Hosea6:9 Sikɛm sor zugu, maan-kʋʋdba solgdame n tek n kʋʋd neba wa so-gɩtba, la rẽ yaa yel-beedo." 
Hosea6:10 Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ, m yãenda yel-yoodo. A Efrayim yooba longa a Israyɛl tõre." 
Hosea6:11 La foom me, Zɩɩda, m na n kẽ-la m pʋʋgẽ n tigs m tigsga, tɩ m datame marsã n maneg m buuda yelle.»" 
Hosea7:1 Soaala n gomd woto: «M da sɩng n na n yiis m buudã a nimbãaneg pʋgẽ, m sɩngame n na n sãooga a Israyɛl bãasã, la wakat kãng la m yãend a Efrayim yel-wẽna, n yãenda a Samari yel-yoodã. Ned kam fãa tudgda a sõsd-n-taaga, wagdb kẽeda roto, fãadb gɩta soya." 
Hosea7:2 La ned ba a ye yaool n ka tags ye tɩ mam, Naaba-Wẽnd, nee wẽngã b sẽn maanda ye. Ad b wẽnema sẽn na n lɛɛg n dɩ-ba. B sẽn maana fãa rɩga m taoore." 
Hosea7:3 B solgda b wẽnema n maand laad tɩ dĩma la a kug-zĩidba kelgdẽ. 
Hosea7:4 B fãa baooda b taab pagba. B wẽnda wʋng sẽn wɩnge tɩ looge, tɩ b pa le ningd daado, bura zom sẽn wẽ tɛka n gũud a wukri." 
Hosea7:5 Dĩma kibs daare, yaa kug-zĩidba n sɩngd yũubu. Rãama tʋmda a tʋʋmde tɩ ned fãa gomd yaare." 
Hosea7:6 Sẽn dat-b zɩɩma n daagã sũura kɛɛdame la a moogd wa sare. B gãnegda b sũura yʋng tõre la beoog sẽn wat n vẽegdẽ t'a widga wa bugum sẽn zom weoogo. 
Hosea7:7 B fãa sũur sẽn moog wa sare, ya kombɛɛmba la b kʋʋda. B dĩm dãmba kʋʋr kelemdame n pʋgd taaba. La ned ba a ye ka tẽegd n yõk Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛg ye." 
Hosea7:8 A Efrayim wẽnda bu-zẽmbã. A wẽnda miisgu sẽn pa lebge n bɩ bogre. 
Hosea7:9 Sãambã n sɛt a pãnga t'a ka miẽ ye. A zoobda zoe n lobda peendo t a zɩ tiiri. 
Hosea7:10 A Israyɛl zẽk-m-menga n sãamd-a, a ka lɛɛgd n wat maam a Wẽnda nengẽ ye. Yɛla lʋɩ-la a zug toor-toore, la b pa bao m zĩig ye." 
Hosea7:11 Efrayim yaa yirga, a kota Ezipt sõngre n bas n yik n tees Asiri." 
Hosea7:12 A sẽn waa n dabd be wã la a pusg m tãooga. La m tãooga yõk-a-la wa luiila n sɩbg-a wala yella sẽn dog a zugã sẽn tog ne. 
Hosea7:13 A Efrayim kamb zug yaa beedo. B zoet n zãagda ne maam. Bũmb ning sẽn wa ne b wãaba la woto. B zẽka b zug ne maam. M sẽn waa n baood n na n fãag-ba la b yik ne b zirẽ-beedo. 
Hosea7:14 B sã n boond n kot sõngre, b ka boond ne pʋ-peelem ye. B basda b meng n lʋɩ n gãe n waasdẽ, b kɩɩsda b yĩnga ne barse n tẽed tɩ b pʋt na wom biisi, n yɩɩge, tɩ b bugsuntund na wom n yɩɩge. La woto wã yaa ne maam la b zabda." 
Hosea7:15 Mam da kenga b kanga, n da kõ-b pãnga, la wẽng bal la b tagsd-m poorẽ." 
Hosea7:16 B sẽn baood a soab zĩiga, ka maam ye. Ned ka tõe n teeg-b ye, b lebga tãp sẽn golme tɩ b ka le tõe n tão n yõk bũmb ye. B nanamsa na n paa tãpẽ tɩ b goama yaa tɩtaam goama, Ezipt rãmb sẽn na n wʋm n pusg laado." 
Hosea8:1 Rɩk-y baorgo n peebe, wẽ-y kũnga, ad-y yel-beed n n sigd Soaala tẽngẽ la a fõta wa wɩbga. Ad-y yaa Israyɛl kambã n ka pids d zooda sẽn da rat bũmb ningã. Yaa Soaala n gomde. B pa tũ m sẽn zãms-ba ye." 
Hosea8:2 Ba b sã n yet woto: ‹Tõnd yaa Israyɛl kamba, tõnd mii yãmba, Wẽnnaam,›" 
Hosea8:3 basgo b zãgsa neer maanego. Dẽ me la bɛɛba rigd-ba. 
Hosea8:4 B yuga b dĩm dãmba la b pa sok-m n ges sã n taa m yam bɩ sã n pa ta ye. B kõta kug-zĩidb naam tɩ m ka mi tiir ye. B rɩka b wanzurf la b sãnem n dõog wẽn-naandse n yɛs ne bõne sẽn pid bõne. 
Hosea8:5 Samari rãmba, y rat neer bɩ y menes y sãnem nag-bilã. M sũura widga bugum. Wakat bʋg la m na n mik tɩ yell ka y zugu?" 
Hosea8:6 Yãmb yẽ yita a Israyɛl buudẽ, la sãnem nag-bila ka tʋʋmd-mit bal n dõog-a-la? A ka wẽnd ye. Sãnem nag-bila na n yɩga peese." 
Hosea8:7 ‹Sẽn bʋta sobgo, silman-daad la a na n tigsi.› Tɩ yelbũnd a to le paasdẽ: ‹Kaaf sẽn ka zug kõn wer zom ye.› La a modg n paam zom me, yaa sãamb n so." 
Hosea8:8 Yɛla lima a Israyɛl. Ade marsã a bee bu-zẽmba sʋka wa rʋk sẽn wã n ka le be yõod ye. 
Hosea8:9 Yẽnna n yik a toore n dɩk Asiri sore. Burgumd sẽn pẽgd la a soog-m-menga. Efrayim ka mi rẽ n saad n daad roellse n ka le so a meng ye. 
Hosea8:10 B wʋkda b laogã n kõt bu-zẽmbã, la ne rẽ fãa wakat taame tɩ m na n tigim-ba. Ka na le kaoose tɩ na-biisa dĩma zɩlg-b zɩɩb ye." 
Hosea8:11 A Efrayim mee maan-kug zembala, la maan-kuga waa n paasa b wẽnem. Maan-kuga sɩd waa n paasa b wẽnem, d da ka tẽed rẽnd ye." 
Hosea8:12 M gʋls m noya tusri a Efrayim yĩnga, a na maan wa a toog ka ye." 
Hosea8:13 B sã n nong maanda kʋʋbo, yaa b sẽn nong bala n wãb nemdo, la rẽ ka noogd maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sũur ye. M pa yĩmd b yel-wẽna ye, m sõdgda b beegrã. M na n lebs-b la Ezipt tẽnga." 
Hosea8:14 A Israyɛl yĩma a Naanda la a mee bɛɛndo sẽn be neere. A Zɩɩda me me-la a tẽn-beda zembala. M yaool n na n ninga tẽn-kãens fãa bugum, la bugma na rɩ ro-neeba fãa." 
Hosea9:1 Da noog f sũur ye, Israyɛl, da kɩdem wala nin-zẽmbã, tɩ f basa f Wẽnnaam n kẽ yoobo; fo sakame n deeg f yaoodo zɛɛsa fãa pʋsẽ." 
Hosea9:2 Zɛɛga ki wã la sĩm-bila kaama ka na n yɩ f soolem ye. Rã-paalgã f sẽn gũudã na n looga f taoor la f kõn lemb-a ye. 
Hosea9:3 A Efrayim ka na n pa Soaala tẽngẽ ye, a na n leba Ezipt la Asʋr, b na n dɩɩ rẽgd dɩɩbo." 
Hosea9:4 A Efrayim pa na n le raal dãam Soaala Wẽnd yĩng ye, b pa na n le kʋ maand Soaala sũur noogr yĩng ye. Ad-y b rɩɩba na n yɩɩ wa kʋʋr dɩɩbo. Ned ning fãa sẽn na n dɩ-a, na n lebga rẽgdo. B rɩɩb na n yɩɩ bãmb yĩng bala, a pa na n kẽ Wẽnd zakẽ ye." 
Hosea9:5 Wẽnd kibsa daare, b kibs kãsenga raare bõe la yãmb na n maane?" 
Hosea9:6 Y sã n wa yi y tẽnga sẽn lebg raboogo, Ezipt na reeg yã la y yaad na n tuka Memfis tẽnga. Y sẽn bas y poorẽ wã, y laoga sẽn da bĩngd zĩig ninga, yõeens-tabdo n na n yi be, tɩ gõos pag y rotã." 
Hosea9:7 Soaala sẽn na n yik ne yãmb daara na n taame. Geelsa raar taame, la ka ling a Israyɛl ye. Y maandame tɩ bãngda yaa gãeenga, Wẽnd sẽn pʋdg a soab bãngrã yaa zʋbsa. Ade, y yel-wẽna sẽn ka tɛkã n wa ne rẽ, y sẽn ka tar sugr ne bãngdã n wa ne rẽ." 
Hosea9:8 Bãngd ning sẽn ka gõe a Efrayim yĩngã, Soaala bee ne yẽnda. La yaa yẽ yĩng la y tar y bẽta gãnegre, n gãnegd a naoor sẽn teesẽ fãa. Naaba-Wẽnd tẽngẽ, a Wẽnda tẽngẽ, yaa beem ne beem bal la a segda." 
Hosea9:9 Y yõga zood ne wẽnga wa pĩnd dãmba sẽn waa n be Gibea. Soaala tẽra y yel-yoodã, b na n sɩbga y yel-wẽna." 
Hosea9:10 M sega a Israyɛl wa bugsuntung we-raoogẽ, m yãenda y ba rãmba wa kankang rẽeng bi-moomde. Y ba rãmba sẽn ta Baal-Peor la b sẽn wẽneg n bas t'a Baal yamleoog kẽ-ba tɩ b naag yẽ n lebg Waoosa." 
Hosea9:11 A Efrayim ziirã na n yɩkame n loog wala luiin-sugri. Rogem ka na n le rog ye, kamb ka na n le wa moog ye, pag ka na n le rɩk pʋg meng ye." 
Hosea9:12 Ba b sã n tõog n gʋʋl kamba, mam na reeg b fãa n pa kees ba a ye. M sã n wẽnemd m kãar n tees-ba, yell ning sẽn na n pak-ba bɩ a pak-ba." 
Hosea9:13 M sẽn ne a Efrayim t'a yaa a soabã, a mamsa a kamba ne gʋg rũmsi. A legend-b lame n tees b kʋʋda." 
Hosea9:14 B toga ne sɩbgr waare, la sɩbgr bʋg la y na n sɩbg-ba, Soaala? Bɩ b pagba ra le tõog n dog ye, la b ra le tõog n yẽsem b kamb ye." 
Hosea9:15 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n le yete: «Yaa Gilgal la b zãmba puk yã. Yaa be la m sɩng b kisgu. Dɩlla m na n dig-b lame n yiis m tẽngẽ, b wẽnnema yĩnga. M na n kʋʋga m nonglma. B taoor dãmba pʋs n yaa tõatb gilli." 
Hosea9:16 A Efrayim bãaga wʋm-a lame; a yẽgna kʋɩɩme, a kõn le wom biig ye. Ba b pagba sã n ket n dogdẽ, m na tees-ba, b sẽn nong wa fãa-fãa wã: bʋg-tẽng sore.»" 
Hosea9:17 M Wẽnda ka le rat Efrayim dãmb ye, tɩ b pa kelg-b ye, la rẽ me la b na n lebg yɛɛbdba bu-zẽmba sʋka." 
Hosea10:1 A Israyɛl sẽn da yaa a soaba, bãng bugsuntung sẽn da sel zĩ-sõngẽ, n da womd biis wʋsgo. La a biisã sẽn tar paasgo la a maan-kuga me sõor sẽn tar paasgo; a tẽnga arzɛk sẽn tar paasgo, la a maan-kuga me sõor sẽn tar paasgo." 
Hosea10:2 A Israyɛl kamba yaa ninsaan-kazukma, sɩd ka be b pʋgẽ ye. B wẽnema la b na n tʋk marsã wa zɩɩbo. Soaala na n wã-la b maan-kugã." 
Hosea10:3 N-ye, b na n yeela marsã: ‹Ad-y tõnd sẽn ka tar dĩma yaa d sẽn ka reeg tɩ Soaala la d dĩma. D sẽn pʋs n be zĩig ning marsã wã, dĩm yõod la bʋgo, dĩm tõe bõe?›" 
Hosea10:4 Dĩm dãmba sẽn tõe yaa goam pororor. Yaa pʋlem-vaalse, zood sẽn yõgd yaare, yaa pãn-tõogo. Zemsgo ka le ya bõn-sõng ye, a wẽnda mo-yoogo sẽn yi pʋʋg sẽn maneg n ko." 
Hosea10:5 Samari neba waoogda sãnem nag-bila sẽn be Bɛt-Avɛn, zirẽ-be-tẽngẽ. Samari nebã, ne a maan-kʋʋd yoodã kaasda sãnem nag-bilã. B pẽgda a ziir la yaa a baasgẽ la a rabda." 
Hosea10:6 Nag-bila meng na n tũu n looga Asiri. A na n lebga kũun sẽn na n dɩk n kõ dĩm kãsengã. Dẽ na n kẽesa a Efrayim yãnde, a Israyɛl na maan t'a sã n da bãngẽ, b zooda kõn tõogẽ ye." 
Hosea10:7 Samari wãame, a naab yaa wa rasaar sẽn dog koom zugu tɩ kooma maan ne-a wala a sẽn date." 
Hosea10:8 B wãa pʋʋsga zĩisi: rẽ la a Israyɛl wɩɩbdo, rẽ la a Israyɛl yel-wẽnde. Tuudu la gõos gũbga maan-kugã. Marsã la b tog n yeele: ‹Tãmse, sirg-y n bus-y-do; kunkuba sirg-y n bʋʋg-y-do.›" 
Hosea10:9 Yella sẽn maan Gibea tɛka, a Israyɛl ka le bas yel-wẽnd ye, a ka tar n leb poorẽ ye. B bãng tɩ yaa Gibea la b beegra na n deeg a sɩbgre." 
Hosea10:10 M waame, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n na n sɩbg-ba. Buud kʋʋng neb na sũ taaba n sɩbg-a, a sẽn ka yɛɛd ne yel-wẽnda yĩngã." 
Hosea10:11 A Efrayim ra yaa nag-sadg sẽn yãe wubri, sẽn nong n tab ki zɛɛgẽ. M sẽn yãend a yubla sẽn nobe, m tʋlgame n sog-a wãk bɩ bũmb a to. M sedame t'a Zɩɩda na sog wãk n ko, t'a Israyɛl sog kaal-bʋkda." 
Hosea10:12 Ned tuuda zemsgo sẽbdo, n tigs nonglem koodo. Pesm-y zĩ-paala tɩ maam, Vɩɩm Naaba, baoob wakat taame la m na n waa ne m fãagre." 
Hosea10:13 Yaa wẽng la yãmb bʋd yã, yaa nin-kʋʋdb la y na tigim ka la ka. Yaa zãmb biisi la y zelemd na n lembe. Gese, Israyɛl, f ra teega f bilim-bilma zabr yĩnga, n teeg f tãb-biisa sõore." 
Hosea10:14 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la bʋʋr kãseng na n wulumd f tẽnsẽ, la f tãnsoben-dota fãa na n tus n lubame. B na n lebga wa Bɛt-Arbɛl dĩm a Salman sẽn wẽe-a raare, n naag kamb n kʋ ne b ma rãmba." 
Hosea10:15 Yaa woto la maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n maan ne-yã, Israyɛl kamba, y wẽnema yĩnga. Ad beooga sã n vẽeg tɩ zabra sɩnge, na n wẽneg n yɩɩ Israyɛl dĩma kʋʋbo.»" 
Hosea11:1 Naaba-Wẽnd goma woto: «A Israyɛl sẽn wa n ya bi-bɩɩga, m sɩng n nong-a lame. Maam n yiis-a m toore, Ezipt tẽnga." 
Hosea11:2 Dẽ poore m mikame tɩ m sẽn tar-a boaala la a sẽn lakd ne maam n yɩɩd pĩnda. Mam buuda kʋʋda maand, a Baal ne a wẽn-taase yĩnga, la a yõogd tɩdare." 
Hosea11:3 Yaool n da yaa maam n zãms a Efrayim kẽna, m da rɩkd-a m nusẽ la a pa tẽeg tɩ maam n da get a yell ye." 
Hosea11:4 Mam da tat-a-la ne bʋgsem, ne nonglem. Wala ba sẽn maand ne a biiga, n zẽkd-a n na n mok a yɛgdga. M da sukda a rɩɩbã n kõt-a t'a rɩtẽ." 
Hosea11:5 A Israyɛl kõn le tag Ezipt ye; yaa Asiri n na n yɩ a dĩma. La rẽ yaa a sẽn zãgs t'a kõn le sak maama. 
Hosea11:6 Dẽ me yĩnga la zabr sʋʋg na n tʋm beedo a tẽnsa pʋgẽ. Lalsa na n lubame, fãa na n sarmame. A sẽn yõg zood yaarã n na n wa ne rẽnda." 
Hosea11:7 M buuda pa rat n bas a zãmba ye. M bool-a lame n dat n le maneg a yelle la yaa zaalem. 
Hosea11:8 M pa tẽed, Efrayim, tɩ f na saag n tags tɩ m tõe n bas-f lame ye. M pa tẽed tɩ m na sak n kisg foom ye, Israyɛl? M na n yɩɩ wãna n maan ne f tẽngã wala m sẽn maane ne Adma la Seboyim tẽnse? M maan boto gõeem kõn le sak-m ye, m sũur kõn le gãand ye." 
Hosea11:9 M pa na n bas tɩ m sũ-puurã maan a sẽn dat ye, m pa na n sãam a Efrayim ye, tɩ maam la Wẽnde, la m pa ninsaal ye; m bee fo sʋka wa nin-sõngo m pa wat n na n wilg m sũ-puur ye." 
Hosea11:10 Ges-y pa-weta sẽn tonge. B pʋgda b Soaala la Soaala boond-b-la ne koɛɛg sẽn vũud wa bõnyẽeg koɛɛg. Pa-weta tusda taab n watẽ, b rʋʋga mogrã n watẽ." 
Hosea11:11 Kẽer yita Ezipt wa yirs luin-sugri, tɩ kẽer yit Asiri wa wala. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n le tar-ba n wat b tẽngẽ." 
Hosea12:1 A Efrayim karga zirẽ-beed bal n gũbg maam. A Israyɛl karga belgre bala n gũbg maam. La a Zɩɩda yẽ ket n bee ne a Soaala, a ket n pʋgda Sõmblem Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Hosea12:2 A Efrayim leebda kaam ne Ezipt rãmba; a yõgda zood ne neb sẽn wẽnd sobgo. Yaa sobg sẽn tʋʋla n gãoogd yĩnga, yaa sobg a woto buud la a pʋgd beoog sẽn vẽege, n yõgd zood ne Asiri rãmba. A tara zirẽ yagbo la pãn-tõogo." 
Hosea12:3 Soaala tara bʋʋd ne a Zɩɩda. B na n yika zabre ne a Zakoob, a vɩɩma sẽn ka sõng yĩnga. B na n sɩbga a Zakoob wala sẽn segd ne a tʋʋma." 
Hosea12:4 A sẽn waa n nan ka rog menga a ra zoe n zãmbda a saam-biiga. A sẽn waa n yet t'a lebga rao n pid raoa, a zẽka a meng ne Soaala." 
Hosea12:5 A Zakoob maoo ne malɛk n tõog-a, malɛkã n kong n bõs-a t'a bas tɩ moora sɛ. Soaala seg-a-la Betɛl la be la Soaala gom ne-do." 
Hosea12:6 N yẽe! Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaalã," 
Hosea12:7 yeela a Zakoob: ‹Fo tog n lɛɛg n wa kẽe maam tɩ maam la f Wẽnde. Le yɩ ned sẽn nong a taaba, n nong zemsgo. Yaa maam la f tog n teeg, tɩ maam la f Wẽnde.›" 
Hosea12:8 Gese, Efrayim, fo maanda wa Kanaã rãmba n zãad f nugẽ, bõn-magdi sẽn tudgd raadba, f nonga wagdem la zãmbo." 
Hosea12:9 Fo yetame: N-yẽe! M lebga arzɛk soaba. M nug zãadame. La bao n paas ka wẽng ye! 
Hosea12:10 La ade, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, sẽn ya fo Wẽndã, al f sẽn waa n be Ezipt tẽnga, ade m na le kɩtame tɩ f vɩɩnd zãnd tẽngre, wala tõnd segba daare." 
Hosea12:11 Wakat kãnga m da gomda ne bãngdbã, b ra paamda likr buud toor-toore. Pʋs n yaa ne bãngdba la m ket n wilgd dũnna m sẽn na n tʋm bũmb ninga." 
Hosea12:12 Galaad rãmba yɩɩ bi-bees menga. Bũmb me ka kell b nengẽ ye. Gilgal do-sõngẽ wã yaa lols ka tɛk maand la b ra kʋʋda. Ne rẽ fãa ad b maan-kugã sẽn lebg kug saong rũnna, b pʋtẽ." 
Hosea12:13 A Zakoob ra zoe n diga Aram pʋ-weesẽ; pag yĩnga, a Israyɛl kẽesa a meng tʋʋmd toogo, pag yĩnga a gũu rũmsi." 
Hosea12:14 Tũu ne bãngda tɩ Soaala wa yiis a Israyɛl Ezipt tẽnga. Yaa bãngda la b yãk yã t'a na n yɩ b buuda gũuda. 
Hosea12:15 A Efrayim maana sõm-zɩtem ne Soaala, dẽ me la b na n tʋk b zugu b zẽk-m-menga taale." 
Hosea13:1 A Efrayim sã n da gomda, ned fãa da rigda rabeem. A ra lʋɩ-la a Israyɛl buuda sagsa taoore. La yel-kãseng la a rogl a zugu, tɩ yẽ n yik n waoog a Baal. Rẽ me n wa ne a kũum." 
Hosea13:2 La marsã a yagensã ket n be-la a tudgra pʋgẽ. Efrayim neba rõogda wẽn-naandse. B wanzurf la b rɩkd n yẽnege n kõ-a b sẽn dat bũmb ning fãa wẽnego. Yaa tʋʋmd-mit bal tʋʋmde la ne rẽ fãa b yetame: ‹D na n kʋʋ maand n kõ-a.› Yãmb sẽn getã, ninsaal na waoog nag-bi? Dẽ ka yelle?" 
Hosea13:3 Yaa rẽ la b na n menem wa yibeoog sawadgo, wala meenem sẽ mesgd pĩnda, wala mo-paoko saag sobg sẽn zẽk n zãag ne zɛɛga, wala bug-zõos sẽn tũud peem-lɛɛg n yita." 
Hosea13:4 Bãnge, Israyɛl tɩ Ezipt yiib tɛka, maam la f Soaala-Wẽnde. F ka mi Wẽnd a to wa maam ye la pʋs n ka be me ye. Fãagd a to ka ye, sã n ka maam." 
Hosea13:5 Mam bãnga foo zĩ-pɛɛlẽ, ko-yũud tẽngẽ." 
Hosea13:6 M yɩ-la f pe-kɩɩma, m kõ-f lame tɩ f rɩ la f yũ n tɩge la f zẽka f zug ne maam, f yĩma m yelle, ko-yũud tẽngẽ." 
Hosea13:7 Dẽ me la m lebg wa bõnyẽega yãmb yĩnga, m lebga wa ãbga sẽn wũg sor noorẽ." 
Hosea13:8 M na n yɩɩ toaag ne yãmba wa gɩgem-padre sẽn ne tɩ b yõkd a biiga la m na n basa m barsa tɩ b tʋm b tʋʋmde. Baas na wa n wãb yã, we-rũmsa na bees yã." 
Hosea13:9 Israyɛl, m sãam-f-la zãnga; ãnda n na n le wa sõng-fo?" 
Hosea13:10 Fo rĩma bʋl n bee yɛ, ka yẽ n da tog n wa fãag-f laa? Fo kãsem-dãmb bɛɛ, n na n sõng fo? Ka bãmb n tog n ges f yell laa? Yaa foo n da kose, Israyɛl, tɩ m kõ-f dĩma, la kãsem-dãmba." 
Hosea13:11 M sũur puugame tɩ m kõ-f dĩm dãmba, m sũur puugame tɩ m le reegd-ba." 
Hosea13:12 A Efrayim beegra fãa sõd n dɩgame. M tara a beegra kaseto la kaseta ka tõe n menem ye. 
Hosea13:13 A na n wʋma toogo wa pag sẽn kũmd dogem. A biiga na n yɩɩ bi-yalma. A rogma daar tatame t'a tõdg waoongo. 
Hosea13:14 Tog n yɩɩ pakr ne maam tɩ m fãag-b kũum soolmẽ, Kũum, f basa f zab-teeda yɛɛlẽ? Nimbãan-zoeer kõn zĩnd ye." 
Hosea13:15 A Efrayim be-la mo-pukẽ wã n paasd a paoongo. La sob-tʋʋlgo n yit zĩ-peen-daagẽ n watẽ. Yaa Soaala n tʋm-a. Koom kõn le bul ye. Arzɛk fãa, sẽn be yõod fãa na n loogame." 
Hosea14:1 Samari rãmb zẽka b zugu ne b Wẽnde, woto wã b tog n deega b beegra sɩbgre. B na n paa zabrẽ, b na n kʋ-la b kamba, b na n dadga pag fãa sẽn tʋte.»" 
Hosea14:2 Lebg n wa, Israyɛl, lebg n wa f Soaala-Wẽnnaam nengẽ, tɩ f sã n lʋɩ, yaa fo yelle." 
Hosea14:3 Lebg-y n wa-y Israyɛl kamba, y Soaala nengẽ la yeel-y-b woto: «Yãmb bal n mi sugr kũuni. Reeg-y neere d sẽn pẽgd-y ne pẽgr ningã." 
Hosea14:4 A Asʋr ka tõe n fãag tõnd ye; d pa na n le zomb wiid n kẽng zabr ye. D wẽn-naandsa yaa d nug tʋʋmde la d pa na n le bool tɩ tõnd Wẽnnaam ye. Yãmb bala n mi kɩɩb kollgo.» 
Hosea14:5 Soaala gomda woto: «M na n sãooga a Israyɛl t'a ra le zãmb-m ye, m na n nong-a lame tɩ ka tũ ne toog ye. M zabr sɛɛme." 
Hosea14:6 M na yɩɩ wala meenem sẽn maagd yĩnga la Israyɛl na n ninga puudu wala lɩɩnga, a na n suda a yẽgna wa Libã tɩɩse." 
Hosea14:7 A na n bɩɩ ne keelem, n ya neer wala oliviye n yelgd a yũugu wa Libã googo." 
Hosea14:8 M neba na n lebg n wa zĩnda m maasmẽ. B na n ko-la b alkam. B bugsuntund na n woma biisi, b rãama noog na n zenga Libã rẽnna." 
Hosea14:9 Bõe n le be a Efrayim ne wẽn-naandsa sʋka? Mam deegda a kosgo la m geta a yelle. Mam yaa tɩɩg ninga sẽn sob n yɛs wakat fãa wã. Maam n kɩt tɩ f kooda womd biisi.» 
Hosea14:10 Ned sã n tar yam, a na wʋm a Oze goama. Ned sã n tar yam zulunga, a na wʋm b võore. Soaala-Wẽnd soya yaa tɩrse. Nin-tɩrsa tũud-b lame, nin-wẽnsa bal n kẽnd n lagsd n lʋɩtẽ." 
Joel1:1 Naaba-Wẽnd taasa goam kãensã a Petuwɛl biig a Zowɛl. 
Joel1:2 Nin-kẽemsã yoog-y y tʋba, Zɩɩda tẽnga rãmb fãa, kelg-y neere. Togs-y tɩ d bãng yaa yãmb zamaanẽ bɩ y saam-dãmb zamaanẽ la yell a woto zĩnd yã." 
Joel1:3 Y sẽn ne bũmb ning rũnda wã, wilg-y koɛɛgã y kamba tɩ bãmb me reeg-a n taas b kamba, tɩ y yagensa reeg n taas y yagen-tʋbra-kẽese." 
Joel1:4 Menemeeda sẽn dɩ n keese, sʋʋr n loogd ne. Sʋʋra sẽn keese, mogdr-zẽenga loog ne. Mogdr-zẽenga sẽn keese, sʋ-warengo. Sʋ-warenga sẽn keese, pãng-n-vũudri." 
Joel1:5 Aya, rã-tɩgdba, gõeem ka ye, yik-y n yãbe. Yãmb fãa sẽn yũud rãam, tɩ noom-y, kelem-y wɛ, tɩ bugsuntund ka wom biis ye la rã-paalg kõn paam n yũ ye." 
Joel1:6 Tãb-biis ka tɛk wa sʋʋre n waa n kẽ d tẽngã. B tʋʋla ne sãoongo, b ka tõe n sõd ye. B yɛga keglem, bõnyẽeg rẽnna. B yẽna sɩlem, bõnyẽ-yãang rẽnna." 
Joel1:7 B sãamda d bugsuntundu, n vigsd d kankamse. B lagsda b pagdo n basd wil-pɛɛla." 
Joel1:8 Kelem-y kʋʋre, wala pag sẽn yãbd a sɩda a sẽn kul paalem." 
Joel1:9 Alkama la rãama ka le wat n kõt wẽnd doogẽ ye. Maan-kʋʋdba fãa zĩi ne sũ-sãanga tɩ Soaala ka le paamd waoogr ye. 
Joel1:10 Pʋta ka le be bũmb ye, tẽnga meng tara fare. Kaaf ka le ket ye. Rãam sɛɛme, tɩ b pa gomd kaam ye." 
Joel1:11 Koaadba ka le mi b sẽn beẽ ye. Bugsuntung koaadba basda raoodo. Alkam pɛɛlga, alkam pugsgu, kooda fãa gill sãamame." 
Joel1:12 Bugsuntund kʋɩɩme, kankams wãkame, tɩɩg ning sẽn womda biis wa poaloangã, koanga, subdga la pʋta tɩɩg ba a ye ka ning biig ye; fãa zãgsa tobre. Sũ-noog buud ka le be ninsaal sũurẽ ye." 
Joel1:13 Yeelg-y sũ-pa-noang futu la kelem-y yã, maan-kʋʋdba, maan-kugra sõgen-kamba. Yãmba, Soaala-Wẽnd sõgen-kamba, gãand-y wẽnd doogẽ n wiisi, n wilg y sũ-sãanga. Alkama la rãama ka le wat n kõt wẽnd doogẽ ye." 
Joel1:14 Aya, moon-y no-loeer daare, moon-y tig-raaga, tigs-y nin-kẽemsã la buuda fãa tõnd Soaala-Wẽnda roogẽ tɩ y yõk sẽega." 
Joel1:15 Way! Da-beed n wate, Soaala-Wẽnd sũ-puura raar n wate. Yaa sãoong raare la Soaala-Wẽnd pãng soaba yals yã." 
Joel1:16 Ade, tõnd nif ka le yãet rɩɩb ye. Tõnd ka le yãet kɩdeng la sũ-noog tõnd wẽnd doogẽ ye." 
Joel1:17 Kood paa b sẽbdẽ, b pa tõog n tus tãndagã n yi ye, fãa paa bogdẽ. Alkam ka yãe n tigs ye. Bao yaa vɩɩdo, zãna lʋɩɩme." 
Joel1:18 Kelg-y rũmsa yãbre! Rũmsa saad n zoeta yaare n baood yamdo n kongdẽ. Piisa meng tara yaoolgo. 
Joel1:19 Soaala-Wẽnde, m teesa yãmb n boonẽ. Bugum n dɩt pʋ-weesã. Bug-walma rɩɩ pʋta tɩɩs gilli." 
Joel1:20 Al ba we-rũmsa mens wẽnemda b nens n teesd yãmba tɩ kʋɩlsa fãa kʋɩɩme. Bugma me ka kees yamd ye. 
Joel2:1 Peeb-y tõntõodo Siõ tẽngẽ, wẽ-y kũnga tãn-sõngã zugu! Bɩ tẽnga neb sɩng rigbu tɩ Wẽnd daarã taame la bala, ka le zãr ye." 
Joel2:2 Yaa zĩ-boog raare, sawad-sabl daare, wulgu raare. La ade, tãb-biis n wate, ka tɛk wa sʋʋre, toos wa bõn-nindi, n maand lik wa yʋng sẽn lʋɩt tãms zutu. B zɩ n yãend a taare la b kõn le yãend ye." 
Joel2:3 Tãb-biisa wẽnda bugum sẽn widgi. Yaa bugum sẽn ka be sugri n ka basd bũmb a poorẽ ye. Bũmb ka tõe n põs-a ye. Bugma sẽn waa n nan ka widgi, tẽnga ra wẽnda Eden zẽedo, la a widgr poore, lebga zĩ-peen-daaga sẽn kẽesd rabeem." 
Joel2:4 Tãb-biisa wẽnda wed-dʋʋdb sẽn zao wiid sẽn tar tĩiga. 
Joel2:5 Yaa waa b yɩkda tãnga n tɩ tiimd tãng a to zugu. B bʋʋrã wẽnda bilim-bilm sẽn digd zabre, bɩ bugum sẽn zom moogo t'a pusdẽ. Yaa tãb-biis sẽn tar pãnga n tong b zabr tongre n watẽ." 
Joel2:6 B sẽn poog zĩig ning fãa, yaa yɛɛsgo, neng sobdame." 
Joel2:7 B zoeta wa gãndaado sẽn takd zabre; wa zab-mitba, b zoet n dʋʋda lalse. Ned kam fãa teesa a taoore, n ka bʋdgd goabg bɩ rɩtg ye." 
Joel2:8 Ned ka tusd a to ye, ned kam fãa tũuda a sore. Pɛɛma fɩɩnda b sʋka n looda la tãb-biisa ka sẽegd taab ye." 
Joel2:9 B zoet n kẽeda tẽngã n lolemd lalsã, n gãensd roto, n tũud rota vẽ n kẽed wa wagda." 
Joel2:10 Tãb-biisa sẽn tong n watẽ wã la tẽnga sẽn dĩmi, tɩ saaga maan wa a na n lʋɩɩ tẽnga, tɩ wĩndg la kiuug na n kiis b bugum." 
Joel2:11 Soaala-Wẽnd lʋɩ-la b tãb-biisã taoore tɩ b koɛɛg sãta! Tãb-biisa sẽn zabd bãmb zabra me yaa ka tɛka la b tara pãnga. Soaala-Wẽnd daar yaa daar sẽn yɛɛsde, la sẽn na n paam-ba n põsã ka ye." 
Joel2:12 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd woto: «Y ket n tõe n lɛɛg n wa kẽe maam. Lɛɛg-y n wa-y yã ne y sũur fãa. Loe-y y noore, yãb-y la yõk-y m sɛɛga." 
Joel2:13 Ka sek tɩ y kẽes y fut ye, yaa y sũurã n tog n tedge.» Lɛɛg-y n wa y Soaala, y Wẽnnaama, nengẽ, tɩ b tara nonglem la nimbãan-zoeere, b sũura ka yãgd fudgr ye. B ka tõt b lebs b zelemde, n bas n ka sɩbg ye." 
Joel2:14 Tõe tɩ b bʋk b sũuri, n bas taale n sudg b kũun sõma. Dẽ marsã la y na n tõog n le wa kõ-b alkam la rãam." 
Joel2:15 Peeb-y tõntõogo, Siõ tẽnga! Moon-y no-loeer daare, moon-y tig-raaga." 
Joel2:16 Tigs-y zãma wã, bool-y tẽnga neba, tigs-y nin-kẽemsã, tigs-y kom-bɩɩba la kom-bõonega menga. Bɩ kãad paalsa yi b roogẽ." 
Joel2:17 Bɩ maan-kʋʋdba, Wẽnd sõgen-kamba, wa ning nintãm wẽnd doogẽ, zãongã la maan-kugra sʋka. Bɩ b yeele: «Soaala-Wẽnde, zoe-y tõnd sẽn ya yãmb buuda neba nimbãanega. Ra bas-y y pʋɩɩrã ne yãnd ye, da bas-y tɩ bu-zẽmba wa laad tõnd n yetẽ: ‹Bãmba Wẽnda zĩi n maanda bõe?› »" 
Joel2:18 Soaala-Wẽnd nonga b tẽnga ne nonglem kãsenga la b zoeta b buuda nimbãanega. 
Joel2:19 Wẽnd deegda b buuda kosgo n yetẽ: «Ade, m le kõt-y-la koodo, alkam, rãam la kaam. Y na n paamame tɩ sek yã. La y kõn le paam yãnd bu-zẽmba sʋk ye." 
Joel2:20 Bɛ ninga sẽn yi-a nug goab n wa wã, m na rig-a. M na rig-a n zãage, m na tees-a zĩ-peen-daaga, m na tus a taoorẽ tãb-biisã n lub Yamsem Mogrẽ, n tus poorẽ dãmbã n lub Tẽnsʋk Mogrẽ. B na n põogame n bas yũug ned ba a ye sẽn ka rat t'a wẽ-a, la sẽn na n wulumd zĩig zãnga. Woto la m na n menes sẽn nams-b yãmb tɩ loogã." 
Joel2:21 Bɩ tẽng ra le zoe rabeem ye, a kɩdem n lang ne sũ-noogo, tɩ Wẽnd tʋma tʋʋm kãsense." 
Joel2:22 Da le zoe-y rabeem ye, rũmsi! Pʋ-weesa le tobda yamdo, tɩɩs le womda biisi, kankam la bugsuntund le zõnega ne biisi." 
Joel2:23 Siõ kamba, kɩdem-y yã, lang-y Soaala y Wẽnnaama yĩnga! Tɩ y paama sẽoog saaga; b kõt-a-la yãmb t'a niid n zemsd wa pĩnda, b kɩtame tɩ koom le zoe, sapaolgo la sẽoogo, wa kʋdem wẽnnẽ." 
Joel2:24 Lʋrsa na n le pida ne koodo, tɩ y rʋgda la y sĩmsa na n le pid n daal ne rãam la kaam.»" 
Joel2:25 N-ye! Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete: «M na n lebs-y-la menemeedã, sʋy wã la kalwaarã sẽn dɩ yʋʋmda pʋgẽ. Ad-y bãmb la tãb-biis niyns mam sẽn tʋm-b tɩ b wa zab ne yãmbã." 
Joel2:26 Yãmb na n dɩɩme n tɩge, la y na waooga maam y Wẽnde, y Wẽnd ninga sẽn tʋma tʋʋm-bãna y yĩnga. La m buuda kõn le paam yãnd abada!" 
Joel2:27 Dẽ la y na n bãnge, Israyɛl kamba, tɩ m be-la y sʋka, tɩ maam la Soaala, yãmb Wẽnde la a to ka be ye. M neba kõn le paam yãnd abada!»" 
Joel3:1 Soaala paasa woto: «Dẽ poore ninsaal buud fãa na n paama m Vʋʋsma. Yãmb kom-dibli la y kom-pugli na n goma bãngr goama. Yãmb nin-kẽems na n paama zãmsdo tɩ y kom-bɩɩba paam likri. 
Joel3:2 Baraare, f yaa yamba, paga, raoa, mam Vʋʋsma na n siga y fãa zutu." 
Joel3:3 M na n waa ne yɛl sẽn yɩkd pɛlenga, yĩngr bɩ tẽng zug yɛla. Y na n yãenda zɩɩm, bugum, bug-zõos la sawato." 
Joel3:4 Wĩntoog na n sobame, tɩ kiuuga moog wa zɩɩm, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd daara nan ka ta ye. B daara na n yɩɩ daar sẽn wat ne rabeem kãsenga." 
Joel3:5 Sẽn pʋʋs-b Wẽnd fãa na n paama fãagre. Zerizalɛɛm pʋga, Siõ tãnga zugu, kẽer na n paam n põsa yel-beedã, wala Soaala sẽn kãabe. Yaa b sẽn dat b rãmb ne vɩɩma la bãmba.»" 
Amos1:1 A Amos koeese. A Amos yaa Tekoa dao a ye sẽn da gʋʋnd rũmsi. Yaa vẽnegre la a paam a Israyɛl poorẽ, Zɩɩda dĩm a Oziyas wẽnnẽ. Sã n ya Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ yɩɩ dĩm a Zowas biiga, a Zeroboam wakatẽ, tẽnga miuung ket tɩ yʋʋm a yi." 
Amos1:2 A Amos ra yetame: «Naaba-Wẽnd rãamd n yit Siõ, Naaba-Wẽnd koɛɛg n sãt Zerizalɛɛm. Rũmsa wãbneg zĩisẽ yaa sũ-sãanga, Karmɛl tãnga zugu yaa ware.»" 
Amos1:3 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Damas tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: Damas rãmb rɩka b sẽn tar bũmb ning n leebdẽ la b bʋkd b pʋta kaalem, bũmb sẽn kud ne kutu, n leeb la b tab Galaad tẽng rãmba. Woto m kõn lebs m zelemd ye la m na sɩbg-b wa m sẽn da yeele." 
Amos1:4 M na n tugla bugum dĩma Azayɛl zakẽ la a na n dɩ-la a Ben-Adad na-yirã. 
Amos1:5 M na n kaoo Damas kʋɩlensã bãn-sogdse. Bikeyat-Avɛn, m na n sika tẽnga, dĩm ning sẽn zao-a rẽgda naama goeel zugu, la Bɛt-Eden, sũ-noog tẽngẽ, m na n sika sẽn zãad-a naama dasaarã. M na n wʋka Aram neba n kẽng yembdo al Kir tẽnga.» Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd woto." 
Amos1:6 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Gaza tʋʋm-beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: Gaza rãmb talla tẽns wʋsg neba n kẽng pa-weer Edom. M kõn lebs m zelemd ye, b na n deega b sɩbgre." 
Amos1:7 M na n sika bugum Gaza la bugma na n dɩ-la a ro-neebã. 
Amos1:8 M na n menesa Asdod dãmba, n menes Askalõ dĩma. M ka na n vʋʋs ne Ekrõ rãmba, m kõn kees nin-vɩɩg Filisti rãmba tẽngẽ ye.» Soaala n le gomd boto." 
Amos1:9 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Tir tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd a taab ne wẽnem: Tir dãmba kãsga zooda wĩir sẽn da loe bãmb ne b saam-biig a Israyɛl la b wʋka tẽns wʋsg neba n kẽng pa-weer Edom. M kõn lebs m zelemd ye, m na n sɩbg-b lame wa m sẽn da yalse." 
Amos1:10 M na sik bugum Tir la bugma na n dɩ-la a ro-neebã.» 
Amos1:11 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete. «Edom tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: Edom dãmb wõoga b sʋʋse n pʋg b saam-biig a Israyɛl, n kʋɩɩs b sũuri n dɩt beem ne-a, n baood a sãoong bala, beoog sẽn vẽege. M kõn lebs m zelemd ye;" 
Amos1:12 m na n sika bugum Tema la bugma na n dɩɩ Bosra ro-neebã.» 
Amos1:13 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Amon kamb tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd a taab ne wẽnem. B radga tʋtr-pʋse Galaad tẽnga sẽn na n yɩlẽ n paam n yalg b soolem. Woto wã m kõn lebs m zelemd ye. 
Amos1:14 M na n yõoga Raba, b na-tẽngã, la bugma na n dɩ-la a ro-neebã. Na n yɩɩ zabr daare, tɩ zab-zabdba kaasd b kaasgo, tɩ saag sob-raoog fugda." 
Amos1:15 B dĩma ne a dĩm-biisa na n wʋk n looga pa-weere.» Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto. 
Amos2:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Moab tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: Moab rãmb yõoga Edom dĩma kõab bugum n maan goore. Woto wã m kõn lebs m zelemd ye. 
Amos2:2 M na n sika bugum Moab zugu t'a rɩ Keriyot ro-neebã. A Moab na n paame; na n yɩɩ zabr daare, tɩ zab-zabdba kaasdẽ, tɩ barda peebdẽ." 
Amos2:3 M na n menesa b rĩma, m na n naaga na-komsã n kʋ.» Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto." 
Amos2:4 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Zɩɩda tʋʋm beeda labsa la a ye n yɩɩd ne wẽnem: Zɩɩda rãmb pa reeg m zãmsg ye, b pa reeg m noya ye, b basame tɩ wẽn-naandsa kẽes-b moogo, wala b yaab rãmba. Woto wã m kõn lebs m zelemd ye," 
Amos2:5 m na n sika bugum a Zɩɩda zugu t'a rɩ Zerizalɛɛm ro-neebã.» 
Amos2:6 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Israyɛl tʋʋm beeda labsa. La m sẽn yet tɩ m na n sɩbg-a lame wã, m na sɩbg-a. Ad a tʋʋm beed niyns sẽn yɩɩd ne wẽnema: Israyɛl kamb koosda nin-tɩrse n baood ligdi; b koosda a ka-neng rãmba n na n yao b neooda sẽn da, tɩ ligd paooge." 
Amos2:7 B nong n paooga naong rãmba. Bʋʋd zĩigẽ a kõn paam bʋʋm ye. Biig ne a ba dooda bi-pugla a ye tɩ m yʋʋr tũud rẽ n sãamnẽ. 
Amos2:8 B sẽn gãe wẽnd dotẽ ne fut niynsã, yaa naong rãmba sẽn kɩs-b bobelle. B wẽn-naandsa roogẽ, b sẽn yũud rãam ningã, yaa b sẽn yõg n deese." 
Amos2:9 La mam n yaool n da sõng yãmba n wã Amoritsã n kõ yãmba. Da yaa nin-daado, wogd wa gʋmse, kegemse wa pusga. M sãam-b-la zãnga." 
Amos2:10 Maam n deng n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga, n kogl-y yʋʋm pis-naas we-raoogẽ n tãag y sẽn waa n tõog Amoritsã." 
Amos2:11 Dẽ sẽn looge, maam n tũus bãngdba y kamba sʋka la m boola yãmb kamb kẽere tɩ b pʋlem la b welg toor mam yĩnga. Ka yɩ boto sɩda, Israyɛl kamba? Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n sokde." 
Amos2:12 Bõe marsã tɩ yãmb yũnugd rã-toose mam sẽn welg b rãmb toore n kõ m mengã, bõe tɩ y gɩdgd bãngdba tɩ b ra taas-y m koeese." 
Amos2:13 Y sɩbgra la woto: m na beds-y-la tẽngã wala bilim-bilm gʋl sẽn bedsd moodo. 
Amos2:14 Sẽn tar-b tĩig kõn tõog n zoe n paam soondg zĩig ye. Sẽn tar-b pãng kõn tõog n wilg b pãng ye. Gãndaoog kõn tõog n fãag a meng ye. 
Amos2:15 Tãp soab kõn yals ye. Sẽn tõe-a zoees kõn põs ye. Wed-dʋʋd kõn fãag a yõor ye. 
Amos2:16 Baraare, tãb-biisa gãndaoog na lob a zab-teedo n bas n wudgi.» Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Amos3:1 Israyɛl kamba, buud ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yiis Ezipt tẽnga, kelg-y gomd ning b sẽn togsd y poorẽ:" 
Amos3:2 «Buuda toor-toor sẽn be tẽnga zugã, yaa yãmb buuda la m yama kẽ yã. Yaa rẽnda me yĩng la m na n sok sẽn tũ ne bũmb ninga tɩ y wa beegd-m woto fãa.»" 
Amos3:3 Neb a yiib na naag taab n dɩk sore tɩ b ka reng n wʋm taab moore? 
Amos3:4 Gɩgemd na ning rãamd weoogẽ t'a ka yãe a sẽn na n yõke? Gɩgemd pol na yiis a koɛɛg a gãagẽ t'a ka yõk bũmbu? 
Amos3:5 Luiil na yõk a meng bẽdgẽ tɩ b ka bẽd-a ne bũmbu? Tãoog na fisg n ka yõk bũmbu? 
Amos3:6 Tõntõog na peeb tẽng pʋgẽ tɩ neb pɛleng ka yɩkẽ? Yel-beed na maan tẽng pʋgẽ tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd zɩ tiiri? 
Amos3:7 Sɩd sɩda, Soaala-Wẽnd ka maand bũmbu, tɩ b ka reng n wilg b raabã b bãngdbã sẽn ya b sõgen-kamba ye." 
Amos3:8 Gɩgemd kelem yã, ãnna n ka na n digi? Soaala-Wẽnd gomyã, ãnna n ka na n deeg n togse?" 
Amos3:9 Togame tɩ Asdod na-zaka rota zugu, togame tɩ Ezipt na-zaka rota zugu bɩ b moon woto: «Tigs-y taab Samari tãms zutu la y ges bũmb ning fãa sẽn ka zemsa sẽn be tẽnga pʋga, n ges pãn-tõoga sẽn maand tẽnga pʋga.»" 
Amos3:10 Naaba-Wẽnd yetame: «Samari tẽng rãmb ka mi tʋʋmd sõng sẽn yaa a soab ye. B samda b zakẽ, b pãn-tõoga la b zɛɛba sẽn kõt-b bũmb ninga.»" 
Amos3:11 Yaa rẽ me yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd yeta: «Bɛ n na n wa kẽ tẽngã, a na n luba a lalsa sẽn me tagd-tagdã la a na n zɛɛ dĩma roogo.»" 
Amos3:12 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Wala rũm-kɩɩma sẽn paame n fãag gɩgemd noorẽ, a rũng kars a yi bɩ tʋbre, wotome sẽn na kees Israyɛl kamba sẽn kẽed Samari wã wat n yɩ-la b goeel bɩ b gãag bʋgsg karga.»" 
Amos3:13 Kelg-y yã, la y wilg a Zakoob zakẽ dãmba, Soaala-Wẽnde, Pãng rãmba fãa Wẽnd, sẽn yeele." 
Amos3:14 M sẽn waa n na n sɩbg Israyɛl a tʋʋm wẽna yĩnga, m na menesa Betɛl maan-kugã. B wẽn-naandsa maan-kuga na kaoo n lʋɩ tẽnga." 
Amos3:15 Y rota buud toor-toorã, m na n wã-b lame, n wã zags niyns sẽn maneg ne fan-teedo wa wob yẽna, n wãa ro yalemsã. Yaa woto la Soaala gomda." 
Amos4:1 Yãmba Samari pagba, sẽn nob wa Bazã nag-yãansã, kelg-y koɛɛg ning maam, Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn tar n na n taas yã. Yãmb sẽn fãad koms rãmba la y namsd naong rãmbã, la y yet y sɩdb rãmba: «Tall-y n wa-y tɩ d yũ,»" 
Amos4:2 ad-y Soaala n wẽend woto ne b sõmblema: «Sɩda, dasem n wate, b na n vuu yãmb a yeyn-ye, sẽn yɩ pipi soaba n wat yaoolem soaba, b na n vuu yãmb wa lɛoog sẽn yõk zĩifu." 
Amos4:3 Y na fʋra lal-gũbra vẽya n yi tɩ ned kam fãa tees a taoore n tɩ pa nug goabg sẽnẽ.» Soaala-Wẽnd n gomd boto. 
Amos4:4 Israyɛl kamba, modg-y ne Betɛl wẽnd dooga kõom n paam n zãag ne maam n paase. Ka rẽ bɩ y kẽnd Gilgal la y ket n zẽkd y zug ne maam. Y sẽn ta n vẽeg beoog bala bɩ y wa ne y maando, la ra-yɩten-daare bɩ y wa ne zom, rãam la kaam." 
Amos4:5 Yõog-y bur sẽn ka wẽ ne rabɩlle maan-kugra zugu, y bark pʋʋsg maanda yĩnga. Moonega sẽn noom yãmbã, moon-y tɩ b bãnge, tɩ yaa y yamleoog kũuni la y tar n watẽ. Soaala n kot-y rẽnna." 
Amos4:6 Ad-y y tẽnsa fãa pʋgẽ yaa maam n da zoe n wa ne kom. Bura ra paoogd-y-la y tẽnsa fãa pʋsẽ la y ka lebg n wa kẽ maam ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Amos4:7 M da zoe n mong-y-la sa-koom, ka-keer ket kɩɩs a tã; m kɩtame tɩ saag ni tẽn-kãnga la a bas tẽn-kãnga; tɩ pʋ-kãnga paam saaga, tɩ pʋ-kãnga kʋɩ, saag kaalem yĩnga." 
Amos4:8 Tẽns a yi, tẽns a tã da latmame n ta tẽng a to n na paam koom yũ n lɛɛg n wa ne ko-yũudu la y ka lebg n wa kẽ maam ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Amos4:9 M tʋma y yĩnga wãango la gãnem, m kʋɩɩsa y bãto la y pʋto. M kẽesa zũnzũur y kankamse la y oliviye biisi, la y ka lebg n wa kẽ maam ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Amos4:10 Ezipt bã-longdem la m wẽnemd n tees yãmba, m basame tɩ sʋʋg loog ne y kom-bɩɩba tɩ y wiidi wã yõgb lebg naana, m basame tɩ y tãb-sika yũug kẽ yã, la y ka lebg n wa kẽ maam ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n yet rẽnna." 
Amos4:11 M zũndga y yɛla y tẽnsẽ wa m sẽn zũndg pĩnda Sodom la Gomor. Y põsa wa ra-giig sẽn foog bugmẽ la yãmb ka lebg n wa kẽ maam ye. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yet rẽnna." 
Amos4:12 Yaa rẽnda yĩnga, Israyɛl, la f na n yãend mam sẽn na n maan ne foo. Mam sẽn na n maan-f bũmb ningã, Israyɛl, segl f menga tɩ yaa maam f Wẽnnaama taoor la f na n yalse." 
Amos4:13 Tẽeg tɩ yaa maam n naan tãmse la sobgo, maam n wilgd sẽn be ninsaal sũurẽ, maam n pukd sõore la m wat ne yʋngo. Mam sora tuka al yĩngr-yĩngri. Mam yʋʋr la Wẽnde, Naaba-Wẽnd Pãng soaba." 
Amos5:1 Israyɛl, kelg gomdã m sẽn na n togse, yaa kʋʋr yɩɩlle la m pʋta, yɩɩll la m pʋt f yĩnga, Israyɛl!" 
Amos5:2 A Israyɛl lʋɩɩme, a kõn le yik ye, a Israyɛl gãee tẽnga la a meng tẽngẽ a kõn paam tɩ ned wa yik-a ye." 
Amos5:3 Soaala koɛɛg la woto: «Tẽng ninga sẽn tõe n kẽes tãpo tãb-biis tusri tãb-biis koabg bal n na n kelle. Tẽng ninga sẽn tõe n kẽes tãpo tãb-biis koabga, tãb-biis piig bal n na n kelle a Israyɛl doogẽ.»" 
Amos5:4 Woto la Wẽnd gomd ne a Israyɛl: «Bao-y maam tɩ y na vɩɩnde. Sok-y-ma tɩ m leok yã. 
Amos5:5 Ka Betɛl wẽnd doogẽ wã la y na n wa sok-m bũmb ye. Da kẽng-y Gilgal ye. Da tɩ gilg-y Beerseba rooga ye. M leokda Gilgal poorẽ t'a na n looga pa-weere. M leokda Betɛl poorẽ t'a na n lebga wẽnem tẽnga.» 
Amos5:6 Zozɛf roogo, bao-y Soaala-Wẽnde, bao-y-ba tɩ y na vɩɩnde. Sã n ka boto b bugma na n yõog-y lame. Betɛl na n yõka bugum la ned kõn waa n kiis-a ye." 
Amos5:7 Bʋʋda sẽn kaood marsã wã ka le tat ned ba a ye yam ye. Sẽn tar-b bʋʋma la b fabgd tẽnga. 
Amos5:8 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n naan toadga, n maan susi, n maan yĩngr tãb-biiga. Bãmb n tedgd lika tɩ lebg vẽenem yibeoogo, bãmb n sobd daara tɩ yʋng watẽ. Bãmb n takd mogra koom n yɛdgd-a tẽng zugu. Ad-y bãmb yʋʋre la Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Amos5:9 Naaba-Wẽnd saaga yãgdame n lubd nin-daoogo, b saaga sʋʋg wata ne tãnsoben-dooga wãabo." 
Amos5:10 Bʋʋd zĩigẽ y sũura fõta ne sẽn baooda zemsgo. Y sẽn kis wa fãa-fãa yaa kaset soab sẽn togsd sɩda. 
Amos5:11 Ade, yãmb sẽn namsd pãng-kaoolg soaba la y fãad a koodã, ade, zãmb rãmba, y sẽn pees kug n me rot niynsã, y kõn kẽ b pʋsẽ ye. Bugsuntundã y sẽn selã, y kõn yũ b rãam ye." 
Amos5:12 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n yete, ad-y m mi-la y tʋʋma fãa, m mii b wẽnema zãnga. Yãmb bɛ la ned ninga sẽn ka tʋk yell a zugu n ya nin-tɩrga. Yãmb deegda ligdi n kedbd bʋʋdo. Yãmb pa sakd tɩ b kõ naong soab bʋʋm ye." 
Amos5:13 Zamaana lebga yel-beed zamaana. Marsã ned kam fãa mumda a noore. 
Amos5:14 Bao-y sẽn be neere la y kisg wẽnga n tõog n vɩɩnde tɩ Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Wẽndã, zĩnd ne yã wa y sẽn yetã." 
Amos5:15 Kisg-y wẽnga, nong-y neere, maan-y zemsg tʋʋma tɩ daar ninga Soaala-Wẽnd, Pãng rãmb Wẽnd, na zoe a Zozɛf bu-kellã nimbãanega." 
Amos5:16 Soaala-Wẽnd, Pãng rãmb Wẽndã yeta woto: «Zĩis fãa na yɩ kɛleng woo kɛlenga! Wii, wii! Soya fãa zut b na n yeelame: ‹M ba woo! M ma woo!› B na n dooga koaada, n bool kʋ-yãbdba tɩ b wa yãb b yãbrã." 
Amos5:17 Pʋtẽ wã, bugsuntundẽ wã na n yɩɩ kũnkũm, m sã n wa tũud bãmb sʋk n loogdẽ. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n yete.»" 
Amos5:18 M yãbd neb niyns sẽn gũud Soaala raarã. Yaa bõe la raara na n wa kõ yã? Na yɩ sũ-noog sẽn ka naag ne sãmbs bɩ? Ayo, raara na n yɩɩ lik raare." 
Amos5:19 Na n yɩɩ wa ned sẽn zoet gɩgemde n tɩ ling gɩgem-padre. Ned sẽn kẽed a zakẽ n tik a roog lalga tɩ waaf kɛ-a. 
Amos5:20 Wẽnd daarã kõn yɩ lika, a na yɩ vẽenem sɩda? A na n yɩɩ lik tam, vẽenem kõn tol n zĩnd baraar ye." 
Amos5:21 Mam kisa y tẽnsa gilgri, m pa rat n le yãend-y ye. Yaa Soaala n gomd boto. Y sẽn tigimd taab m waoogr yĩnga ka le tat m yam ye." 
Amos5:22 Y sẽn wat n kõt maam y yũ-nood maandã, y kooda kũuna, ad-y m ka le rat-b ye; y rũm-kaama, y nag-bi nobdsã, lagem taab rɩɩbã, mam ka get-b ye." 
Amos5:23 Serg-y ne y yɩɩlã, m da le wʋm y bɛɛla wẽeb ye." 
Amos5:24 Sõng-y tɩ ned kam fãa paam a sẽn tog n paam tɩ zemsg na tãoos wa ko-bunem. 
Amos5:25 Israyɛl, m sok n gese, yʋʋm pis-naas y sẽn zĩnd zĩ-pɛɛlẽ wã, yãmb kʋʋ maand n kõ maam bɩ?" 
Amos5:26 Y ra ka pʋgd wala y sẽn pʋgd dũnna a Sakut la a Kewã ye. Wẽn-bãmb yaa yãmb n yaool n dõoge. Bãng-y tɩ y na tʋk-ba n looge," 
Amos5:27 m sã n wa dig-y n tees Damas tɩ y tɩ y tɩ pa yembd be. Soaala-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala n yet boto." 
Amos6:1 M yãbd yã, yãmb fãa sẽn teeg-b Siõ taoor dãmbã n gãe n ka bʋʋdẽ. M yãbd yã, yãmb fãa sẽn teeg Samari tãngã. M yãbd-y lame dũni wã na-tẽng a Israyɛl kẽedba, sẽn ya-b taoor dãmbã tɩ neba fãa bʋʋgd-y n gomda:" 
Amos6:2 «Ta-y Kalne n tɩ gese, y yi be bɩ y ta Amat, tẽn-kãsengã; y sã n yi be bɩ y sig Gat sẽn be Filisti rãmb tẽngẽ. Kẽng-y n ti ges tẽns sẽn pid tẽnse!» Ay! Y kẽng yã y na mik tɩ tẽn-bãmb pa são Siõ, b pa são Samari ye. B tẽnsa pa yalem n yɩɩd ye." 
Amos6:3 Yãmb datame n tadg Naaba-Wẽnd daarã, n yaool n pidsd y zamaana ne pãn-tõogo?" 
Amos6:4 Y gãee gãas zutu sẽn maneg n pɛ ne wob yẽnna, n gãe loga, n dɩt pe-bi sẽn tũus wubrẽ la nag-bi sẽn tũus bãgrẽ." 
Amos6:5 Y yɩɩnda ne y pãng fãa la ne bɛɛla. Y togsda a Daviid n wat ne yʋʋm te-paala. 
Amos6:6 Y yũuda rãam wanzurf la-yalems pʋsẽ la y sõod y mens ne ka-noodo tɩ y sũur yaool n pa kiuusd ne yel-beed ning sẽn na n lʋɩ a Zozɛf buuda zuga ye. 
Amos6:7 Rẽ n so marsã tɩ m na n wilg yã tɩ yãmb n na n yɩ pipi rãmba n loog pa-weere. Bãng-y yã, kʋɩɩm dãmba, tɩ kibs kõn le zĩnd y yĩng ye." 
Amos6:8 Maam, dũni fãa Wẽndã, n yet woto: «M wẽenda ne m menga, t'a Israyɛl wilg-m-menga laka m yam, m yam laka ne a ro-neebã. M na n basa bɛɛba nugẽ bũmb ning fãa sẽn be Samari pʋgẽ, a Israyɛl na-tẽnga pʋgẽ.»" 
Amos6:9 Neb piig kõn kell vɩɩse zak a ye pʋgẽ ye. 
Amos6:10 B na n modga sẽn ki-ba roagd a ye t'a sa roog-roogo n yiis kũuma. A sã n ta yaoolem dooga tɩ nin-vɩɩg ket be n sok-a: «Ned keta ne foo bɩ?» A na leok tɩ sɛɛme la a na le paase: «Bas bʋur tɩ ned sẽn tõe n yõk Wẽnd sɛɛg ka ket ye.» 
Amos6:11 Yaa Soaala raab la woto tɩ ro-bedr lʋɩ la ro-bil me tãs mugnum. 
Amos6:12 Weef zoeta pĩis zut bɩ? Bɩ b warda pĩisa ne nag-koodse? Yaa bõe marsã tɩ yãmb tek zemsg t'a lebg pĩ-zẽnem sẽn wat ne kũum, n tek bõn-sɩɩd t'a lebg toog lig-ligi?" 
Amos6:13 Yãmb noogda y sũur ne y sẽn tõog Lo-Debar tẽn-yaalgã. Y yetame: «Yaa d sẽn tar pãnga yĩnga la d tõog Karnayim sẽn ya pãng a narã.» 
Amos6:14 Boto! Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, dũni fãa Soaala, m na n yiisa tẽng a ye t'a nams yã, Israyɛl, al Lebo-Amat noorẽ n tɩ tãag Araba kʋɩlgã. Soaala-Wẽnd n yeele." 
Amos7:1 Ad Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yãende: Da yaa sʋy wekre, alkam sẽn ningd a yagens wakato, dĩma ka-kɛɛra poore." 
Amos7:2 Sʋy wã da wãba tẽnga mood fãa gilli, tɩ mam yeele: «Y sugri, Soaala-Wẽnde, maan-y sugri. A Zakoob na n yɩɩ wãn n vɩɩnde? Ad a paood wɛ!»" 
Amos7:3 La Naaba-Wẽnd sigsa b sũuri, n yeele: «Sugra paamame!»" 
Amos7:4 Ad Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, sẽn kɩt tɩ m le yãende: Wẽnnaam, m Soaala da boola bugma bʋʋdo t'a sẽn da fẽbg mogrã, a ra baood n na n dɩɩ tẽngã me." 
Amos7:5 Tɩ mam yeele: «Y sugri Soaala-Wẽnde, bas-y woto. A Zakoob na n yɩɩ wãn n vɩɩnde? Ad a paood wɛ.»" 
Amos7:6 La Naaba-Wẽnd sigsa b sũuri, n yeele: «Sugr paamame!»" 
Amos7:7 Ad Wẽnnaam, m Soaala, sẽn kɩt tɩ mam le yãende: Soaala meng da yɛsa lalg zugu n zãad metba namdo." 
Amos7:8 Tɩ Naaba-Wẽnd sok maam: «Amos, yaa bõe la f ne?» Tɩ mam leoke: «Met-namdo ne a gĩsga!» Tɩ Soaala yeele: «M na n maka m nebã, Israyɛl kambã, n ges b sã n yaa tɩrse. B ka tɩrse bɩ m da le wa kõ-b sugri ye." 
Amos7:9 M na n wã-la a Izaak yagensa pʋʋsg zĩisi, a Israyɛl wẽn-naandsa na n bõrame n dʋʋge, la m na n boba zabre ne a Zeroboam doogo.»" 
Amos7:10 A Amaziya, Betɛl maan-kʋʋda, tʋmame tɩ b tɩ yeel Israyɛl dĩm a Zeroboam, woto: «A Amos tʋl-f-la ne wẽnga, a tʋl n deega f naama Israyɛl tẽng ka. Ad-y tẽnga gill yam yi-la a goama." 
Amos7:11 Ad a Amos sẽn yete: ‹Sʋʋg n na n kʋ a Zeroboam, la b na n kãaga a Israyɛl n loog yembdo zĩig sẽn zãrẽ.› »" 
Amos7:12 La a Amaziya yeela a Amos: «Menem ka, bãngda; ta a Zɩɩda tẽngẽ n tɩ n wilg f bãngrã, la f paamd f rɩɩbo n dɩtẽ." 
Amos7:13 Sã n ya Betɛl ka, bas f bãngrã, tɩ yaa ka la dĩma wat n pʋʋsd Naaba-Wẽnde la neba fãa mii zĩ-kãnga tiiri.»" 
Amos7:14 A Amos leoka a Amaziya: «M da ka bãngda bɩ bãngdb karen-biig ye. M da yaa rũm-kɩɩma la m da kʋɩɩsda m kõnkʋɩɩg biisi n na n kõ m dũmsi. 
Amos7:15 Yaa Soaala-Wẽnnaam n waa n bak maam ne m rũmsã n yeel-m tɩ m tɩ taas b koees b buud a Israyɛl. 
Amos7:16 La ade, foom a Amaziya, fo n gɩdg-m tɩ m da wilg Wẽnd sẽn leok bũmb ning a Israyɛl poorẽ ye la m da por m goama, wa fo sẽn yetã, ne a Izaak yagens ye. Woto wã kelg neere Soaala koɛɛga." 
Amos7:17 Koɛɛga la woto: ‹Fo paga na n kong n lebga pʋg-yoaad tẽnga pʋgẽ. Sʋʋg n na n kood f kom-dibli la f kom-pugli. B na n bẽesa f vẽenema n pʋɩ. Fo menga na n kii bu-zẽmb tẽngẽ, la a Israyɛl na n looga pa-weere.› »" 
Amos8:1 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kɩt tɩ mam yãende: Da yaa peoog sẽn pid ne tɩɩs bi-moaama. 
Amos8:2 La Soaala sok-m lame: «Amos, yaa bõe la f ne?» Tɩ mam leoke: «Peoog sẽn pid ne tɩɩs bi-moaama!» Dẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd yeel maam: «M nebã, a Israyɛl kamba, bɩɩme n sek b bob n looge. M kõn le bas b beegre n ka sɩbg-b ye." 
Amos8:3 Maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m sẽn na n yik ne b raare, bãng-y tɩ kʋ-yãbdba sẽn be dĩma zaakẽ wã na wiis b wiisgu. Kũum sẽn sam taab la b na n yãende, kũum sẽn dɩg zĩig zãng la b na n yãende. Sẽn lebẽ fãa, tẽnga na n yɩɩ sɩɩ.»" 
Amos8:4 Kelg-y yã, yãmb fãa sẽn namsd nimbãan-dãmba, la y menesd talsa tẽnga pʋgẽ," 
Amos8:5 yaa yãmb n gomd woto: «Kiu-paalga na n looga da-bʋre, tɩ d koos d koodo? Vʋʋsg raara na n looga da-bʋre tɩ d pags d baoa?» Yãmb yaool n boogda y petã, y bõn-magdi wã magdame bala n dʋʋsd daaga." 
Amos8:6 Ba kood ning sẽn kẽ bugdã y vaagd-a lame n koosdẽ. A ka-neng rãmba, naong rãmba sẽn da y neoodr n ka tõog n yao, lebgda y yem-daado." 
Amos8:7 Ad-y yaa woto la Soaala wẽen yã: «Ne tẽng ninga sẽn yaa a Israyɛl zu-zẽkrã, m kõn yĩm y manesma abada.»" 
Amos8:8 Yaa rẽ yĩng la tẽnga na n miimi, t'a kamba fãa kelem kʋʋre. Tẽnga na n zẽka yĩngri n lɛɛg n lʋɩ, wa Ezipt kʋɩl-kãsenga sẽn maande." 
Amos8:9 Badaare, Soaala n yeele: «M na kɩt tɩ wĩndg lʋɩ wĩnto-sʋka, m na kɩt tɩ lik zĩnd wĩnto-sʋka." 
Amos8:10 M na kɩt tɩ y kibs rãmba lebg sũ-sãanga, tɩ y yɩɩla lebg kũmkũm. M na sẽgen-y sũ-pa-noang futu, la zuta fãa zoobd na kõoge. Na n yɩɩ wala ma-bi-yend kʋʋre. Daara na n kell n yɩɩ sũ-beedo ne sũ-beedo!»" 
Amos8:11 Daar n wate, Soaal Wẽnd n yeele, tɩ m na n tool kom, tẽn-kãnga rãmba. La ka bur kom la b na n yãb ye, ka ko-yũud la b na n yãb ye. Yaa m goama kom la ko-yũud n na n yõk-ba." 
Amos8:12 B na n yii tẽnga nug goabg n tees nin-taoore, n yi nug rɩtgo n tees yaanga, n baood n na n kelg Soaala koɛɛga, la kato, a kõn lʋɩ b tʋbrẽ ye." 
Amos8:13 Badaare kom-neeba, kom-pugli la kom-dibli na n kii ko-yũudu." 
Amos8:14 Sẽn wẽend-b ne Samari yel-beedã, sẽn yet-ba: «Dã, ad m wẽenda ne fo wẽndã, m wẽenda ne Beerseba tõog la a pãnga,» bãmb fãa na n lʋɩɩme la b kõn le yik ye." 
Amos9:1 Mam yãee Soaala sẽn yɛs maan-kugra zugu; b yeelame: «B tus sẽn dog lalsa sẽn ya gilsa zutã n siki, (d tus tẽnga pãn-dãmbã n siki) tɩ wẽnd dooga noora meng deeg n komse. M na n wãa b zutã fãa, la ned sã n kelle, a kõn põs ye, m na kɩt tɩ b koadg-a, ned ba a ye kõn tõog n zoe ye." 
Amos9:2 Ba b modg n kẽ bʋg-tẽnga, m nug na tɩ tak-ba n yiisi; ba b dʋ sa-gãna m na sik-ba." 
Amos9:3 Ba b sã n solg b mens Karmɛl tãng zugu, m na kẽng n tɩ bao-b n yõge. Ba b sã n zoe n kẽ mogr pʋga, be me m na kõ waafa noor t'a rũm-ba." 
Amos9:4 La b bɛɛba sã n loog ne-b yembdo, m na kõ noor tɩ b kood-b be. M nif kõn zãag ne-ba la kõn yɩ b manegr yĩng ye, na n yɩ-la b sãoong yĩnga.»" 
Amos9:5 Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, dɩka b nug-bil b sɩɩs tẽngã la a sɩnga miuungu la tẽng zug rãmba fãa kelma kʋʋre. Tẽnga ra zẽkda yĩngri n le lɛɛg n lʋɩtẽ wa Ezipt kʋɩl-kãsenga sẽn maande." 
Amos9:6 Soaala-Wẽnd ti-la b rota yĩngri, la sa-gãonga lɛɛg n tilga tẽnga. Soaala-Wẽnd boonda mogra koom tɩ b le wa rʋʋg n madg tẽngã. Soaala yʋʋr la a Beẽ-n-beẽ." 
Amos9:7 Israyɛl kamba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n sokde: «Yãmb tara yõod n yɩɩd Kus rãmba laa? Sã n ya maam n yiis yãmb Ezipt tẽnga, yaa maam n yiis Kaftor Filisti rãmba la m yiis Kir Siri rãmba. Y ka mi rẽ sɩda?»" 
Amos9:8 Ad-y maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, nif nee Israyɛl dĩm dãmba roogo la bãmb n beege. Dẽ la m yeel yã: «M na n yiis-a-la moogo. M ka mi m sã n na n menesa a Zakoob yagensa ye." 
Amos9:9 Nanda yaa Israyɛl la m yet tɩ b go-a wala b sẽn good bõn-sĩin tɩ bũmb ba a ye ka lʋɩ tẽng ye. 
Amos9:10 Yel-wẽnd maandba fãa sẽn be m neba sʋkã, yaa zabrẽ la b na n ki. Dɩlla sẽn na n loog-ba fãa, yaa sẽn yet-b bãngdã t'a menem la a ra wa ne yel-beed ninga a noora sẽn togsda ye." 
Amos9:11 Baraare m na yika a Daviid pʋʋg rooga sẽn ta tẽngã. La maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete, m na bɛ-la a sẽn wurg zĩig ningã, m na n yika a raboogã, m na n le maneg n yik-a-la wala a sẽn da ya a soab pĩndã." 
Amos9:12 Dẽ marsã la Israyɛl na n le reeg Edom ne tẽns a taaba soolem sẽn deng n yɩ m rẽnna. Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gome la m sẽn yeela na pidsi.»" 
Amos9:13 Soaala-Wẽnd le yetame: «Ad daar sẽn wate tɩ tigsgu sẽn tigs bɩ koob wẽneg n kooda, tɩ selb sẽn sele bɩ b wẽneg n wẽkd bugsuntung biisi. Woto rã-paalga na n zoe n siga kunkuba, n zoe n yʋgemd tãn-bi wã." 
Amos9:14 M na n teema a Israyɛl nenga: tẽnsa sẽn wã wã na n le maneg n meeme tɩ neb me le kẽ b pʋgẽ. B na le sel la b le yũ b bugsuntund rãam. B na n koo b zẽedo la b rɩ b yõodo. 
Amos9:15 M na n le kẽesa m nebã b tẽngẽ. Ned kõn le rig-b n yiis m sẽn kõ-b tẽng ningẽ wã ye. Yaa woto la m yals yã, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb Wẽnnaam.»" 
Obadiah1:1 Woto yaa Naaba-Wẽnd sẽn wilg a Abdiyas; yaa koees niyns b sẽn kɩt t'a yiis Edom rĩunga poorẽ. Ned la Naaba-Wẽnd tʋm bu-zẽmbã. D wʋma nin-kãng sẽn gomd woto: «Yik-y tɩ d tak zabre ne Edom.» 
Obadiah1:2 Edom, yaa Soaala n gomd ne-fo, m na kɩtame tɩ f lebg bilf buud a taaba sʋka, m na n kɩtame tɩ f reeg buud a taaba paoore." 
Obadiah1:3 F zẽk-m-menga menes-f lame, pĩig sẽn lill-f yĩnga, la f sẽn zao ned sẽn ka tõe n taẽ, f yeta f sũurẽ: «Ãnda n na n sik-ma?»" 
Obadiah1:4 La ade, ba f tɩ zaoond yĩngr wa sɩlga, ba f tʋka tʋɩ ãdsa sʋka, m na tus-f n siki. Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde." 
Obadiah1:5 Yaa wãna, Edom? Wagdb la yʋng fãadb wa-la f zakẽ, tɩ f zĩ sɩɩ! Ad-b na n looga ne b sẽn tõe fãa. Bugsuntung biis rɩgsdb sã n kẽ fo pʋʋgẽ, ka sib yiisdem bal la b na n bas ne-f laa?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ges b sẽn vɛɛsd foo, Ezayu roogo, ges f laogã sẽn da maneg n solgã sẽn yiis n dɩga!" 
Obadiah1:7 B diga foo, Ezayu, n gãndg toaaga; sẽn sõangd-b fooma belg-f lame bala! F zo-rãmba tudg-f lame bala! Zooda sẽn da yõg sõmb ne neb niynsã, bãmb n bẽt-f bẽdgo. B yetame tɩ f zuga lebgame." 
Obadiah1:8 Badaare, Wẽnd n gomde, m kõn kees bũmb Edom pʋgẽ ye, m kõn kees bũmb a Ezayu tãnga zugu ye. M kõn kees nin-yẽseng ye." 
Obadiah1:9 Tema tẽnga, ad f tãb-biisa na n diga rabeem kãsenga, b na n kʋ-la b fãa gilli." 
Obadiah1:10 Tẽeg-y yã, Edom rãmba, tɩ y fãame la y kʋ-la y saam-biisi, a Zakoob yagensã. Y ka zoe yãnd ye la rẽ me la y na n menem gilli, beoog raare." 
Obadiah1:11 Bɛɛba sẽn waa n tõog a Israyɛl tãb-biisã n kẽ a na-tẽngẽ wã, y ra zĩi n getame. Sãamba sẽn waa n pʋɩt taab Zerizalɛɛm laogã, y me maana wa bãmba." 
Obadiah1:12 Fo ra pa togẽ n noog f sũuri yel-beeda sẽn lʋɩ f saam-biisa zuga raare, Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ wã ye. Fo ra pa togẽ n noog f sũuri, b sẽn waa n kʋʋd-ba ye. Fo ra pa togẽ n purs-b beedo b sẽn waa n zĩ ne yɩɩra ye." 
Obadiah1:13 F naoor da ka tog n tabgẽ m buuda na-tẽnga a wãaba raar ye. F nif ra ka togẽ n yãend a zu-beeda ye. F nug ra ka togẽ n sɩɩs a laogo, zɛɛba raar ye." 
Obadiah1:14 Fo ra pa togẽ n yals so-tiisẽ n kʋ sẽn da zoet-ba bɩ n yõg-b n kɩs b bɛɛba, b zu-bʋka raar ye." 
Obadiah1:15 Bãng-y marsã tɩ Soaala bʋʋd kãsenga raar taame. Woto wã fo sẽn maan ne f taabã, boto me la b na n maan ne foo. Fo sẽn da rat yel-beed ningã n na n lɛɛg n dɩ-fo." 
Obadiah1:16 Sã n ya yãmba, Israyɛl kamba, yaa m tãn-sõnga zug la y zoe n yũ m sũ-puura rãama wamde. Buud a taaba me na n deega b rẽnna. B me na n yũ n gãeemame n yaool n menem zãnga." 
Obadiah1:17 Woto Siõ na le lebg f soolem la yẽ tãnga zugu la sẽn põs-ba na n wa soonde. A Zakoob yagensa na n le sooga b tẽnga, b na n le fãsg-a-la a bɛɛba nugẽ." 
Obadiah1:18 A Zakoob ne a Zozɛf kamba na n yɩɩ wa bugum; bugma na n dɩ-la Ezayu kamba wa moogo, n menes-b gilli, n ka na n kees nin-vɩɩg ye. La yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n togsd rẽnna." 
Obadiah1:19 Nug rɩtgo, Zɩɩda nebã na n wẽe n deega Edom tẽnga, B na n deega Filisti rãmb tẽn-nabrã. B na n sooga a Samari, a Efrayim na-tẽngã, t'a Bẽnzame soog Galaad." 
Obadiah1:20 A Israyɛl pa-weta sẽn da kẽed nug goabgã na n yika wa tãb-biisi n wẽ n deeg Fenisi n ta Sarepta. Sã n ya a Zɩɩda pa-wetã sẽn lɛɛg n wa kẽed Sefarad, bãmb na n sooga nug rɩtg tẽnsã." 
Obadiah1:21 B na n maana raoodo n dʋ Siõ tãnga la b na n sooga Edom. La bãmb fãa dĩma la Soaala-Wẽnde. 
Jonah1:1 Wẽnd gomda ta-la a Zonas, a Amitayi biigã. B yeel-a la woto:" 
Jonah1:2 «Aya, yik n ta Niniv, tẽn-kãsengẽ wã, n yeel nebã tɩ mam wʋma b wẽnema kibare.»" 
Jonah1:3 A Zonas yikame n dɩk Taris sore, n na n zoe n põs Soaala-Wẽnde. A taa Zafa tẽnga la a paama koom-koglg sẽn digd Tarsis tẽnga, a yaoome n kẽ n naag neb a taaba, n na n ta Tarsis, n zãag ne Soaala-Wẽnde." 
Jonah1:4 La Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ sobg kãseng yik mogra zugu. Kooma rãmba wʋsgo tɩ koglga rat n lisi. 
Jonah1:5 Rabeem yõka so-toagdba fãa; ned kam fãa kelmame n tees a wẽnde, la b lobd b teeda fãa mogrẽ, sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ koom-koglga lebg faasga. Wakat kãnga t'a Zonas da siga tẽngr doogã n gãe n fõogd a gõeem." 
Jonah1:6 La koglgã soab kolg-a lame n yeel-a: «Yaa bõe la f maand ka, yaa bõe tɩ fo gõe? Yik n kelem f Wẽndã! F Wẽnda tõeeme n ges d yelle, tɩ d ka ki ye.»" 
Jonah1:7 Koglga pʋgẽ dãmba waa n yeela taaba: «D poees n ges ãnd la yella soaba?» B bʋga b babgre, la yella lʋɩ-la a Zonas zugu." 
Jonah1:8 La b yeel-a lame: «Foo la yella soaba. Aya! Yɩɩ wãn-wãna, fo yii yɛ, fo tẽng yʋʋre, togs f buud yʋʋre.»" 
Jonah1:9 T'a Zonas na n yeel-ba: «Mam yaa Ebre, n waoogd Naaba-Wẽnde, yĩngr Wẽndã, sẽn naan mogrã la tẽngã.»" 
Jonah1:10 A togs-b-la a kibarã. La neba pɛleng yɩka al wʋsgo b sẽn bãng t'a ra zoet n na n põsa Soaala-Wẽndã, tɩ b sok-a: «Fo yɩɩ wãna n maan woto!" 
Jonah1:11 Tõnd na n maana foom bõe n paam tɩ mogra sigi.» Sɩda kooma da fudgdame n paasdẽ. 
Jonah1:12 La a yeel-b lame: «Dɩk-y-ma m lob mogra pʋga t'a na sigi y yĩnga. Bala mam miime tɩ yaa mam yĩnga la sob-raoogã zabd ne yãmba.» 
Jonah1:13 Sẽn dugsd-b koglgã makame tɩ b na ta kʋl-koaka la ayo, kooma da fudgdame n paasdẽ." 
Jonah1:14 B yõka Naaba-Wẽnd sɛɛg n yetẽ: «Ad wɛ, Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ y ra bas tɩ d ki ninsaan-kãnga yĩng ye. Bɩ y ra ning d taale ne pʋ-peen-ned zɩɩm ye, tɩ yaa yãmba, Soaala, n maand y yamleoogo.»" 
Jonah1:15 Dẽ poore b tʋka a Zonas n los mogrẽ wã la ko-wiisa sigame. 
Jonah1:16 Soaala-Wẽnd dabeem kẽ-b-la wʋsgo tɩ b na n kʋ maando la b pʋlem pʋlem-bɛda. 
Jonah2:1 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ zĩm kãsenga vel a Zonas. A Zonas paa zĩifã pʋgẽ dasem a tãab para. 
Jonah2:2 A Zonas zĩnda zĩifã pʋgẽ n pʋʋs a zu-soaba Wẽnde: 
Jonah2:3 «Mam da zĩi ne fare n zẽk m koɛɛga n tees yãmba, la y leok-m lame; m zĩnda bʋg-tẽnga n yõk y sɛɛga la y wʋma m koɛɛga." 
Jonah2:4 Yãmb da loba maam ko-sʋka tɩ mogrã lim maam; ko-wiisa la ko-bɛɛla wẽ-m lame. 
Jonah2:5 Tɩ mam da zoe n gomda: ‹Soaala riga maam n zãag ne b menga m yaool n da nongẽ lame tɩ m nif le teegẽ b ro-sõngã.› 
Jonah2:6 Koom da zoe n dɩdga m kokoɛ tɩ m ka mi m sẽn tutẽ ye. Kʋl-mood da zoe n vila m zugu. 
Jonah2:7 M da sud n taa tãmsã yẽgnẽ, tɩ bʋg-tẽng kʋɩlensa lɛɛg n pag-ma, daar buud fãa yĩnga. La yãmba, m Soaala-Wẽnde, yãmb yiisa maam bog-zulungẽ y yiis-m-la vɩɩga." 
Jonah2:8 M sẽn waa n tẽed kũuma, wakat kãng la m tags y yelle, Soaala-Wẽnde tɩ m pʋʋsga ta yãmba, al y wẽnd do-sõngẽ wã." 
Jonah2:9 Sẽn tũud-b wẽn-naandse bãmb zãagda b meng ne fãagre. 
Jonah2:10 M na n pʋda m bark pʋʋsg yɩɩlle m na kʋ maoongo n waoog yã. M na n pidsa m pʋlengo. Sɩda, Soaala, yãmb n so fãagre.»" 
Jonah2:11 Naaba-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ zĩifã wʋk a Zonas mogra noorẽ. 
Jonah3:1 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda le ta-la a Zonas la b yeel-a lame: 
Jonah3:2 «Yik n kẽng Niniv tẽn-kãsengẽ n togs mam sẽn yeel fooma!» 
Jonah3:3 A Zonas sakame n yik marsã n kẽng Niniv. Tẽnga da yaa tẽn-kẽenga, sã n ya ne nao, dasma tãab la f gilgd a n segre." 
Jonah3:4 A pipi raarã a Zonas ra kẽndame la a moonẽ: «Keta dasem pis-naas bala tɩ Niniv rota wã.» 
Jonah3:5 Niniv neba tẽe Wẽnd gomdã. B yalsame tɩ b na n loe b noore la b nin-bɛda wala a ka-neng rãmba fãa yeelga sũ-pa-noang futu. 
Jonah3:6 Niniv dĩma sẽn wʋm gomdã, a siga a zaoorẽ, n yeeg a naam fuugu, n yeelg sũ-pa-noang fuug n tɩ zĩnd tompɛglmẽ." 
Jonah3:7 Dẽ poore dĩma kɩtame tɩ b moon tẽnga pʋga n yetẽ: «Dĩma ne a kug-zĩidba datame tɩ ninsaal bɩ rũng da rɩ la a ra yũ bũmb ye. 
Jonah3:8 Ninsaalba la rũmsa na n pila sũ-pa-noang futu. Ned kam fãa kos Wẽnd ne a sũuri la a bas tʋʋm wẽna la pãn-tõogo. 
Jonah3:9 Ãnda n mi Wẽnd sã n ka na n teeme, n le kʋ b sũuri, n sik b sũ-puurã tɩ d da ki?»" 
Jonah3:10 Wẽnnaam sɩd yãeeme tɩ b sɩd maanda b sẽn tõe n na n bas b zʋg wẽnga. Rẽ yĩnga Soaala-Wẽnd basa b zugẽ yɛla taale n ka pids b sẽn da yeela ye. 
Jonah4:1 Sugra kũuna ka ta a Zonas yam ye t'a wuk ne sũ-puuri. 
Jonah4:2 A maana pʋʋsgo n yeel Soaala-Wẽnd woto: «Naaba-Wẽnde, yell a woto la m ra sãmbd m yamẽ rẽ tɩ m ket m ba yiri! Yaa rẽ yĩng la m da pĩnd n zoe n kẽng Tarsis; m da miime tɩ yãmb yaa Wẽnd sẽn tar nimbãan-zoeer la nonglem, n ka puugd y sũur tao tao ye, n lebsd y zelemd sẽn yiisi tɩ sɩbgra vaanẽ." 
Jonah4:3 Marsã, Soaala-Wẽnde, bɩ y yãk m yõore tɩ mam kũum são m belem.»" 
Jonah4:4 Tɩ Soaala yeel-a: «Yaa bõe yĩng la fo puugd f sũur woto, fo bee bʋʋm bɩ?»" 
Jonah4:5 A Zonas yaool n yii tẽngẽ wã n tɩ zĩi nin-taoore n get-a. A tii sẽgd roogo n kẽ n zĩnd. A ra gũuda tʋʋmd bʋgo la Soaala na n tʋm ne Niniv rãmba. 
Jonah4:6 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ tɩɩg sẽn tar woglem la maasem tão n yi sẽn na n yɩlẽ n kõ a Zonas maasem la b woog a sũ-sãangã. A Zonas paama rẽ n noog a sũur wʋsgo. 
Jonah4:7 La vẽkembeoogo yibeoogo Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ zũnzũur kẽ tɩɩga t'a kʋɩ. 
Jonah4:8 La sõor sẽn yeege, Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ yaang sob-tʋʋlg yiki; wĩntoog yõoga a Zonas zugu t'a ra na n sobgẽ. A Zonas le boola kũum n yetẽ: «Mam kũum n são m belem.»" 
Jonah4:9 Naaba-Wẽnd soka a Zonas: «Fo sẽn puug f sũur, tɩɩga sẽn ki wã poorã, fo bee bʋʋm bɩ?» T a leoke: «N-ye! Mam sũur sɩd puugame; mam kũum bala n são.»" 
Jonah4:10 Tɩ Wẽnd na n leoke: «Fo yãbda tɩ-kãnga kũuma, fo yaool n ka maan bũmb a yĩng ye, ka foo n kɩt t'a yi ye. A tãoo n yii yʋn-yende, a le kii yʋn-yende." 
Jonah4:11 Fo ratẽ lame tɩ m da zoẽ Niniv nimbãanega? Ad Niniv yaa tẽn-kãsenga, a kẽedba taa tus koabg la pisi! Neb be-la a pʋgẽ sẽn ka tar b toorẽ yelle n le paas rũms ka tɛka.»" 
Micah1:1 Ad koɛɛg ninga Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn kõ a Mise, Moresɛt neda, Zɩɩda nanamse a Zotam, a Aaz la a Ezekiyas wakatẽ. Likra pʋgẽ, Samari ne Zerizalɛɛm yɛla la a yãend yã." 
Micah1:2 Tẽnsa fãa kelg-y yã! Tẽnga ne a bõn-naandsa fãa yok-y y tʋbre! Soaala-Wẽnd na n zĩnda b ro-sõngẽ wã n bool-y bʋʋdo. 
Micah1:3 Sɩda b yita zĩ-sõng ning b sẽn beẽ wã, la b sigda pʋʋsga zĩisẽ." 
Micah1:4 Soaala-Wẽnd watame tɩ tãmsa boogdẽ, wa bugum n yẽnegd siribdu. Soaala watame tɩ bãg-faasa pʋkdẽ, wa koom sẽn sigd kunkuba." 
Micah1:5 B sẽn yi b zĩ-sõngẽ wã ya-la a Zakoob yagensa beegr yĩnga, yaa Israyɛl kamb sẽn bas bãmba yĩnga. Ãnda n tusd a Israyɛl t'a zẽkd a zugu? Yaa a na-tẽngã, yaa Samari. Ãnda n tusd a Zɩɩda a wẽn-naandsa waoogr zĩigẽ, yaa Zerizalɛɛm memga." 
Micah1:6 Dẽ la Naaba-Wẽnd gomda: M na n kɩtame tɩ Samari lebg raboogo, lalsa na n tusame n lub zãng tɩ m wʋk a kugã n lob sudgẽ la Samari na n lebga wa bugsuntungu pʋʋgo sẽn maneg paalem." 
Micah1:7 Mam na n sãama a wẽn-naandsã fãa, a laoga na n dɩɩ bugum, ned kõn le yãe b wẽn-naandsa ye. Samari arzɛka yii pʋg-yoaadb nengẽ la bãmb nengẽ la a na n lebe." 
Micah1:8 Maam a Mise, m na n kaasame, m na n wiisame. M na n piida m neooda, la m pidg m futu, n kelem wa we-yũuga, m na yãba wa na-neoongo." 
Micah1:9 Samari sẽn deeg sɩbgr ninga wʋm-a lame. Sɩbgra tol n sãag n ta-la a Zɩɩda, n ta Zerizalɛɛm, m buuda na-tẽnga." 
Micah1:10 Ra taas-y kibar kãnga Gat tẽng ye. Be rãmb nintãm da rʋʋg ye. Bɛt-Leafra rãmb bilim tomẽ tɩ b rɩta kʋʋre. 
Micah1:11 Loog-y pa-weere, Safir dãmba, loog-y bɩlgemde la ne yãnde. Sã n ya yãmba, Sãana rãmba, b ra le yãend-y yɩng ye. B yãbda kʋʋre Bɛt-Esɛl tẽnga, soondg zĩig ka kees be ye." 
Micah1:12 Marot rãmba rigdame tɩ b ka mi b yell sẽn na n yɩɩ a soab ye. Soaala sẽn wat ne yel-beed ninga zoe n ta Zerizalɛɛm tẽng noore. 
Micah1:13 Lakis rãmba, segl-y y wiidi n zoe tɩ y manesma wẽnda Israyɛl, y yɩɩ tõatbã, n pirs Zerizalɛɛm t'a zẽk a zugu." 
Micah1:14 Woto wã y tog n welga ne Moresɛt-Gat rãmba. Sã n ya Akzib tẽng rãmba, ad-y b kõn sõng Israyɛl dĩma ne baa fɩ." 
Micah1:15 Maresa tẽng rãmba, ad-y Soaala na n kẽes-y-la na-paalg a to soolmẽ. A Israyɛl nanamsa ne b ziirã na n kong n tɩ soonda Adulam tãnga bokẽ." 
Micah1:16 Gʋs-y y zoobdo, põng-y y zugu, Zerizalɛɛm dãmba; bɩ y zuta kõog wa yɩbrgo rẽnna. Yãb-y y kom-nongdsã tɩ b na n looga pa-weer zĩ-zãorgẽ." 
Micah2:1 Na pak neb niyns sẽn dat-b yel-beedã, la b gãe b gãagẽ n bilgd wẽnga. Zĩig ne a sɩng pʋkri, tɩ b sɩnga b sẽn sed n dɩglã b sã n tara rẽ pãnga." 
Micah2:2 B sã n dat pʋʋgo b reegd-a lame. B sã n dat roogo, b reegd-a lame. B yõkda zak soaba ne a zak rãmba n dees b sẽn so." 
Micah2:3 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la Soaala-Wẽnd gomd woto: «Ad yel-beed ning m sẽn na n sik zamaan kãnga rãmb yĩnga. Ned ba a ye ka na n tõog n põs ye; y zug na n sulgame, tɩ zamaan ning sẽn watã yaa yel-beed zamaan.»" 
Micah2:4 Yella raare, b na n sɩɩl n tʋʋsa yãmba, wala m sẽn zoe n neẽ. B na n yɩɩla sũ-sãang yɩɩla, la b na n yeelame: «B fãa tõnd laoga zãnga. B reega tõnd vẽenem, b rigda tõnd n deesd d pʋt n pʋɩt taaba. Yaa bõe yĩng la b reesd-d sẽn so?»" 
Micah2:5 Yãmb sʋka ned ba a ye sẽn na n paama bũmb Wẽnd pʋɩɩrẽ ka ye. Pʋɩɩra raare Soaala buuda kõn tẽeg y yell ye. 
Micah2:6 A Mise wʋma b sẽn yete: «Yaa n vʋʋs ne f goama, tɩ f gomda gom yaalse la yaa wala f ka mi tɩ d kõn tɩlg yãnd abada." 
Micah2:7 Ãnda n da tõe n tags woto, Zakoob roogo? Soaala-Wẽnd la sẽn ka mi yaams la. B ka minim n maand boto ye; sẽn kẽnd-b tɩrs yĩnga, b goama yaa nonglem goama.»" 
Micah2:8 Sã n ya ne yãmba Soaala gomda woto: Yãmb yik n dɩta beem ne m buudã. Sẽn tɩ zab-ba n lɛɛg n watẽ ne yẽesem, yãmb yekd-b lame n yeesd b fu-tagdo." 
Micah2:9 Yãmb digda buuda pagba n yiisd-b b sẽn da nong n kẽed rot niynsã. Yãmb pa get b kamba ne waoor ning m sẽn yet tɩ b toga ne a soaba ye. 
Micah2:10 Yik-y n loog-y! Vʋʋsg sɛɛme. Y sẽn bas maama yaa naong ne naong la y na n sege. 
Micah2:11 Ad-y ned sã n yiki n togsd yãmb gom vɩɩdo la a wãagd koom, n yetẽ: «M na gom y yĩnga y sã n na n tɩgs-m ne rãam la rã-toos buud fãa.» Ad-y ned a woto la bãngd gãeeng ninga sẽn tog ne yãmbã." 
Micah2:12 N-ye! Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde: «M dat n tigma yãmb gilli, Zakoob yagense; mam dat n lagem-y-la taaba, Israyɛl bu-kelle. Mam na n tigim-y lame, wala piisi, b bãgr pʋgẽ la wala rũmsi, b wãbneg zĩigẽ. Y goama na wẽneg neb sẽn mi b nens goam marsã." 
Micah2:13 Sẽn pakd-a sorã lʋɩɩ y taoore. Yãmb paama y menga. Y paka sor n looge. B dĩma lʋɩ-la b taoore, yaa Soaala b Wẽnnaama n yɩ bãmb sɩleto.»" 
Micah3:1 M gomda ne yãmba, Zakoob yagens sẽn dɩt naam. M gomda ne yãmba, buuda bʋ-kaoodba. «Yãmb sẽn be bũmb ning yĩnga, ya y ges tɩ bũmba fãa tũ noora sẽn wilgi." 
Micah3:2 Yãmb yaool n nonga sẽn ya wẽnga n kis sẽn ya neere. Yãmb dɩta nebã n tãag b yĩn-gãongo, n tãag b kõaba.»" 
Micah3:3 Sɩda, b rɩta m buudã, a yĩn-gãongã, nem-bugã, kõabã, kõaba sɩɩlem. Fãa pasda wa nemd sẽn na n ning rʋkẽ." 
Micah3:4 Woto me la b sã n yõk Soaala sɛɛga, Soaala ka leokd-b ye. B na n wẽnemda b nenga, b tʋʋm wẽna yĩnga." 
Micah3:5 Ad Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn togsd bãngdba poore, bãngdb niyns sẽn tudgd m buudã: «Sã n kõ bãngdba yaood sẽn tagme, b yetame tɩ laafi na zĩndi. Sẽn ka kõt-b bũmb tɩ b ningd b noorẽ, b yetame tɩ laafi ka ye." 
Micah3:6 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la yʋng wat yãmb yĩnga tɩ y ka na n le paam Wẽnd likr ye. Lik n na gũbg yãmba, wa zĩig sẽn sobge tɩ b ka le ne baa fɩ.»" 
Micah3:7 Woto, bãngdba fãa na n pɩla b nenga n lud b yãnde, tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pa le leokd-b bũmb ye." 
Micah3:8 Maam, a Mise, ket n pida ne pãnga, tɩ Soaala kõ-m-la b Vʋʋsem, woto m pida ne zemsg la raoodo n tõe n wilg a Israyɛl buudu la m wilg a Zakoob yagense, tɩ b zẽka b zug ne Soaala la b ka pʋg bãmb b ye bal ye." 
Micah3:9 Kelg-y wɛ, Zakoob zak na-biisi, Israyɛl taoor dãmba, yãmb kisa sɩda la y golemd bũmb ning fãa sẽn ya tɩrga," 
Micah3:10 yãmb meta Siõ ne zɩɩm, n met Zerizalɛɛm, Wẽnd tẽnga, ne pãn-tõogo." 
Micah3:11 Yãmb soaalba deegda kũuni n yaool n kaood bʋʋdo. Maan-kʋʋdba deegda ligdi n yaool n na n zãms noorã. Bãngdba ka yaagd b noore n togs sẽn wat beoogo tɩ b ka reng n deeg ligd ye. Bãmb n maand tɩ b teega Wẽnde la b yetẽ: «Wẽnd ka be tõnd sʋk laa? Yel-beed yɩta a wãn n lʋɩ d zugu?» 
Micah3:12 Yaa rẽ yĩnga, yãmb manes yooda yĩnga la Siõ na n lebg pʋʋgo, tɩ Zerizalɛɛm lebg raboogo, tɩ wẽnd dooga tãng lebg kãgre." 
Micah4:1 Wakat n wate, tɩ wẽnd doogã tãnga na n lʋɩ tãmsã fãa taoore: a na n zẽkame t'a zãndlem yɩɩg tãmsã fãa. Neb ka tɛk n na n zoe n wa be." 
Micah4:2 Buud ka tɛk na n waa be. B na yeele: «D dʋ Soaala-Wẽnd tãnga zugu, a Zakoob Wẽnnaama roogẽ, tɩ be Soaala na zams tõnd b soya tɩ d tũ-ba.» Bala, noya na n yii Siõ la Wẽnd gomdã na n taa tõnd Zerizalɛɛm." 
Micah4:3 Soaala na n dɩɩ naam, buud ka tɛk zugu, la b na n yɩɩ tẽn-bɛd bʋ-kaooda, n yɩ tẽn-zãorgẽ dãmb bʋ-kaooda. B na n dɩka zabre sʋʋse n kud wãgse, la b kud goet ne kãna Tẽnsã kõn le wõ sʋʋse n zab taab ye, la b kõn le zãms zabr ye." 
Micah4:4 La ned fãa na n pa-la a bugsuntung la a kankang tẽngre, tɩ ned ba a ye ka yɩk a to pɛleng ye. Dũni fãa Wẽnda noor gomd la woto." 
Micah4:5 Bala buud fãa baood n na n nooga a wẽnd sũuri. Sã n ya tõndo, d vɩ-la d Soaala, tõnd Wẽnnaam, yĩnga, daar fãa la yʋʋm tõt sɛɛb yĩnga." 
Micah4:6 Daar n wate, yaa Soaalã n gomde: «Mam na n tigma sẽn bẽedbã, n tigim mam sẽn nams b rãmba ne pa-weerã." 
Micah4:7 M na tigma sẽn bẽedbã, n vʋʋg buuda gilli. M na tigma sẽn zĩnd-b pa-weerã tɩ buuda lebg buud sẽn tar pãnga tɩ maam, b Naaba-Wẽnd, vigl m naama goeel Siõ tãnga zugu, yʋʋm tõt sɛɛb yĩnga." 
Micah4:8 La foom, Zerizalɛɛm sẽn zao f tãnga zug, f gũuba roog zugu, n get dũni wã, fo na n leb n paama f pĩnd naama. Foo n na n le yɩ rĩunga na-tẽnga.»" 
Micah4:9 Bõe tɩ y tar yãbre dũnna Zerizalɛɛm dãmba? Bõe tɩ tooga namsd yãmba wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem? Ya y sẽn ka le tar dĩma, n ka le tar sagendba bɩ?" 
Micah4:10 Yãb-y toog wa pag sẽn kũmd rogem. Na n yɩɩ modgre tɩ y yi tẽngã, n kẽ wetẽ, n tol n ta Babilon. Beelẽ y na n paama y menga. Soaala na n fãag-y-la y bɛɛba nusẽ." 
Micah4:11 Marsã tẽns wʋsgo zoe n sũu taaba n na n zab ne yãmba. B yetame: «Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ Zerizalɛɛm yãe paoore, Wẽnd na kɩt tɩ d yãe a raboogo!»" 
Micah4:12 Ad-y b ka mi Wẽnd sẽn dat n maan a soab ye, la b ka mi b tagsg ye. B rat n tigma b nebã wa kood sẽn kalse, zɛɛga sẽn be zĩig ningã." 
Micah4:13 Yiki! Pãb-y alkam, Zerizalɛɛm dãmba. M na n kõ-y-la pãnga sẽn zem naaf rẽnda, naaf ne yɩɩl sẽn ya kutu t'a nao-bend ya kut sẽn yũnugi. Yaa buud ka tɛk la y na n tab n bedse. La y sẽn na wʋk laog ning wala y tõogr yõodã, yaa maam la y na n kõ, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, dũni fãa Soaala." 
Micah4:14 Marsã Zerizalɛɛm dãmba, sẽn tigsd-b tãb-biisã, kɩɩs-y y yĩnga wa ned sẽn dɩt kʋʋre. Ad-y bɛɛba sɩnga d tẽnga gũbgri la b zoe n kuta ne b guugu a Israyɛl buuda naaba." 
Micah5:1 La foom Bɛtelyɛɛm Efrata, yaa Soaala n gomde, fo yaa tẽn-bila a Zɩɩda soolma fãa pʋgẽ. Yaool n yaa fo pʋgẽ la sẽn na n dɩ-a a Israyɛl naama, mam zĩigẽ, na n doge. A ka zamaan-yaooga ned ye, ya kʋdem-wẽnnẽ neda." 
Micah5:2 Rẽ n so tɩ Soaala-Wẽnd na n yĩm f yelle n tãag paga rogem wakato. Dẽ poore saam-biisa sẽn kell pa-weerã na n lɛɛg n wa Israyɛl kamb sʋka. 
Micah5:3 La ned ninga sẽn na n wa rɩ naama na n lʋɩ-la a buuda taoore tɩ b kẽnd ne yẽesem la b kilsd b Soaala-Wẽnnaama pãng la b ziir. Bãmb na n vɩɩnda laafi ne b buud a Israyɛl, la al dũni wã tɛka, neba fãa na n bãngame tɩ b yaa nin-kãsenga." 
Micah5:4 La Israyɛl pe-kɩɩma na n waa ne laafi a Israyɛl yĩnga. Asiri rãmba sã n wa rat n kẽ tõnd tẽngã, n kẽ d na-rota pʋsẽ, d na yiis nanams wʋsgo sẽn na n wa zab ne ba." 
Micah5:5 Bãmb zab-teeda yĩnga, b na n tõoga Asiri, la Nemrod tẽnga. B na fãag tõnd ne Asiri rãmba b sã n wa gãndg toaagã n na n kẽ n sãamd d tẽngã." 
Micah5:6 A Israyɛl bu-kellã na n zĩnda buud toɛ-toɛ sʋka wala meenem Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn tool n na n bʋk-ba, wala sa-ko-bɛɛla, sẽn madgd moogo la mooga ka teeg ninsaal pãnga, la a ka gũud ba fɩ ninsaal nengẽ." 
Micah5:7 A Israyɛl bu-kellã na n zĩnda buud toɛ-toɛ sʋka wala bõnyẽega we-rũms sʋka, wala gɩgemd-pol sẽn piʋʋgd piis sʋka n fãood n lubdẽ, la a tat n tõsda tɩ ned ka tõe n taa n deeg ye." 
Micah5:8 Israyɛl bu-kelle, wɩk f kanga, f bɛɛba zugu tɩ fãa meneme!" 
Micah5:9 Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde: «Daar n wate, tɩ m na n menes y wiidã la y bilim-bilma." 
Micah5:10 M na n sarma f tẽn-bɛda fãa, f tãnsoben-dota fãa."
