Micah5:11 M na n sãama f tɩtã, b kõn le yãend neb sẽn bʋgd ãds yãmb sʋk ye." 
Micah5:12 M na n luba y wẽn-naandsa fãa, y kug-sendi wã fãa. Y kõn le waoog bũmb sẽn ya yãmb nug tʋʋmd ye." 
Micah5:13 M na n vigsa y ra-luga fãa sẽn paamd y waoogrã, m na n wã-la y tẽnsã." 
Micah5:14 M sũura na n puugame, m na n doka m sũur ne bu-zẽmba sẽn ka reeg m noore.»" 
Micah6:1 Kelg-y Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yete: «Yiki, m buudu, yik n bool-m bʋʋd tãmsa taoore, gom tɩ tãn-bi wã wʋm f sẽn gomd n lebdẽ." 
Micah6:2 Tãmsã fãa kelg-y maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, sẽn bʋʋd ne a buudu. Tẽnga sẽn vigl kẽnkẽ bũmb ning zug n yɛsẽ wã, fãa kelg tɩ m yika bʋʋd ne a Israyɛl.»" 
Micah6:3 Yaa woto la b sokd b buudã: «Bõe la m maan yã? M nams-y-la ne bõe? Leok-y-m wɛ? 
Micah6:4 Yaa m sẽn yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga, n yiis-y yembdẽ n tʋm a Moyiiz, a Aarõ la a Miriyam tɩ b lʋɩ yãmb taoora bɩ bõe?" 
Micah6:5 M buudu, maan tẽegre! Moab dĩm a Balak sẽn waa n dat n tʋm beedã, tẽeg-y yã a Beor biig, a Balaam, sẽn yeel-a. Tẽeg-y tɩ m yãag-y-la al Sitim n tãag Gilgal tẽnga. Woto wã y tõog n yãenda kũun niyns m sẽn sudg-y, maam, y Soaala-Wẽnnaam.»" 
Micah6:6 Yaa kũun bʋgo la d tog n wa ne, d sã n wat n na n waoog Soaala, yĩngr Wẽnnaama? Tog n waa ne nag-bil maoongo, yʋʋmd yend nag-bil sẽn yõogd tɩ bugum dɩ zãnga?" 
Micah6:7 Piis bãgre na noog a sũur sɩda? Bɩ b na n deega ka-neem sẽn pid ne sĩn-bi? D tog n kõ-b-la d kom-dẽems n paam sugri d sẽn zẽkd d zug ne bãmba la d sẽn ka pʋg bãmb wala sẽn da segda bɩ? 
Micah6:8 B wilg-f lame, Adem biiga, sẽn ya sõmbo, n wilg-f Soaala sẽn dat ne foo: ad ka bũmb a to n zʋʋg maan sẽn segde ne nonglem sẽn ka viigdi la f pʋg-b ne sulg-m-menga." 
Micah6:9 Soaala gomda ne tẽnga rãmba n yet tɩ b na n fãaga sẽn sulgd-b meng bãmb taoore. Kelg-y yã, Zɩɩda rãmba sẽn tigim Zerizalɛɛm!" 
Micah6:10 M na tõog n sake tɩ nin-wẽnsa tigsd b rotẽ laog sẽn paam ne zãmbo. M na sak sẽn ya wẽng zãnga, tɩ b sẽn tar teed niyns n magda yɩ zãmb te-magdse?" 
Micah6:11 M na tõog n ges wala pʋ-peen neda, ned sẽn bobd korg sẽn pid ne zirẽ-be-magdse?" 
Micah6:12 Sẽn ya-b rakãagba n be tẽnga pʋga, ad-y b sẽn mi yaa maan pãn-tõogo la b yag la b tudg b taaba." 
Micah6:13 M sɩnga y wẽedo la ya y wãab yĩnga, y yel-wẽna sẽn waooga yĩnga." 
Micah6:14 Y na n dɩɩme la y kõn tɩg ye. Y na n waasa kom waasgo. Y na kẽgsame la kõn yɩ y noor dɩɩb ye. Y sẽn na n tõog n bĩng bũmb ning fãa, bɛɛba na n wa zabame n deeg-a." 
Micah6:15 Y na n bʋdame la y kõn kẽeb ye. Y na wõda kaam ne oliv la y kõn tõog n zɛ y yĩng ne-a ye. Y na kõga rãam la y kõn tõog n yũ-a ye. 
Micah6:16 Y tũuda so-wẽng ning dĩma Omri sẽn tuki. Yẽnda ne a biig a Akab zak rãmb n tũ so-kãnga. Yaa bãmb nao la y rɩk yã. Rẽ n so tɩ y na n yãend y tẽnga wãabo. M na n kɩtame tɩ yãmba, a kẽedbã, lebg y bɛɛb laado. Buuda fãa yãnde la y na n deeg n tʋke." 
Micah7:1 Kato! Mam lebga wala ned sẽn wat tɩ-biis tõsbo b tõsba soansoaag poore; wala ned sẽn baood sib-gĩini sãbg sẽn kao poore. Bugsuntung biig la f da rata, kankamd la f da rata, fãa sɛɛme." 
Micah7:2 Nin-sõma menema tẽngã. Nin-tɩrg ba a ye ka le be ye. B fãa baoodame n na n daag zɩɩm, beoog vẽegdame tɩ b gẽesd taaba." 
Micah7:3 Sã n ya wẽng maanego, b nusa tõee rẽ neere. Naab tõe n maan-f-la neere la rẽnd a reng n wilg a me sẽn date. Bʋ-kaooda rengd n deega kũuni. Taoor soaba rengd n wilga a raab waglse." 
Micah7:4 Sẽn são a taaba ket n wẽnda gõaaga. Sẽn pida ne zemsgo yaa gõ-tuugu. Bãngdba sẽn wilg raar ninga sẽn ta, y sɩbgra raara sẽn ta y yika ne ba. Dẽ me la b zĩ ne yãnd la pɛta." 
Micah7:5 Ra tẽe-y yak sẽn togs ye, Da reeg-y y zoa sẽn dõogd ye. Da yaag-y y noore ba y meng pag taoor ye." 
Micah7:6 Biig tʋʋsda a ba, bi-pugl tãoosda raoodo ne a ma, bi-paga sẽoosda a sɩd ma. Ned kam fãa bɛ yaa a zak rãmba." 
Micah7:7 La sã n ya ne maam, mam geta Soaala-Wẽnde, m fãagr bee m Wẽnnaama nugẽ la yaa bãmb la m saagda, la yaa bãmb n na n deeg m kosgo." 
Micah7:8 La yãmba, m buuda bɛɛba, da laa-y tõnd yel-beeda ye! D sã n lʋɩ me, d na le yiki. D sã n be likẽ me Soaala-Wẽnd la d vẽenem." 
Micah7:9 M na sakame tɩ b puug b sũuri tɩ m beeg-b lame. M na sak n ta daar ning sẽn wate tɩ b na n yik n bʋ n sõng-ma. B na n le tall-ma n wa vẽenemẽ la m na pẽg b zemsga tʋʋma. 
Micah7:10 Dẽ na n yɩɩ d bɛɛba nifẽ la yãnd na n yõk-ba, bãmb sẽn da sokd tõndo: «Y Wẽnnaama pʋs n maanda bõe?» Ad-y d nao wã na n taba bãmba wala b sẽn tabd sor zug begdo, la tõnd n na ges rẽ ne sũ-noogo." 
Micah7:11 Daar n wate tɩ b na n le yik na-tẽnga lalse. Y lalga sẽn gũbg tẽnga na n lʋɩɩme, y toaaga na n yalgame." 
Micah7:12 Baraare, y saam-biisa na lɛɛg n wa, b na lɛɛg n wa b tẽngẽ. Sɩngda Asiri n wat Ezipt, n sɩngd Nil n wat Efrat, n sɩngd mogra noor n wat tãn-wogdã." 
Micah7:13 Dũni wã sẽn kellã na n tiig n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga tẽnga rãmb wẽnem yĩnga. 
Micah7:14 Dɩk-y y rũn-kɩɩm dasaare, n legl y buuda neba, Soaala. B bee kɛɛnga, tɩ tɩɩs gũbg b pʋ-weese. Tall-y-b wa pĩnda, n taas Bazã la Galaad." 
Micah7:15 Wala Ezipt tẽng yiib wakato, le maan-y tʋʋm bãna." 
Micah7:16 Bu-zẽmba na yãende la ne b pãnga sẽn yaa a soabã, b na rɩ yãnd sẽn ya yãnde. B fãa na yɛɛse n lebg mugs la wʋmse." 
Micah7:17 Wala wiisi la bõn-vuudri buud fãa b na n lelma tẽng tom; b na n yii b soondg zĩisẽ n wa yãmb taoore, pãng soaba Wẽnde, la yãmb taoore b na n saoo kalwaare." 
Micah7:18 Wẽnd bʋgo n le zem yãmba, Soaala? Yãmb sakame tɩ b beeg yã, yãmb kõta y bu-kella beegre sugri. Ka wakat fãa la y sũura puugd ne tõnd ye, tɩ sẽn noom yãmbã yaa y wilg y nonglma ne tõndo." 
Micah7:19 Zoe-y tõnd nimbãaneg yɛsa, da yaas-y n sõdg d yel-wẽna ye. Lob-y d yel-wẽna mogra pʋga." 
Micah7:20 Wilg-y yã a Abraam la a Zakoob yagense, wilg-y tɩ y nonglma ka be sɛɛb ye; y sẽn kãab d yaab rãmb al pĩndã n ket n yɛse." 
Nahum1:1 Ad Wẽnd sẽn wilg bũmb ninga Elkos tẽng raoa, a Nawum, Niniv tẽng poorẽ." 
Nahum1:2 Soaala-Wẽnd pa gird n le gõms ye. B sɩbgda tõatba. B sũur sã n yiki, b yaa toaag tɩ looge. B rokda b sũur ne b bɛɛba tɩ sugr kaẽ ye." 
Nahum1:3 Wẽnd sũur ka yikd tao-tao ye, b pãnga labsa. B pa tudgd n ges sẽn beega soaba wa nin-sõng ye. Soaala sã n lukd b naoore yaa sobd n fugdi. Sawata yaa wubsgu, b nao wã sẽn zẽkde." 
Nahum1:4 B tãsda mogrã t'a kʋɩ, n tãs kʋɩlsã tɩ koom fẽbge. Bazã la Karmɛl yamda moogda wa sũtu, Libã puuda sʋʋgdame." 
Nahum1:5 Soaala sã n sɩɩs tãmsã b vigsda b zĩigẽ. Tãn-bi wã sutame. Tẽnga sẽn tar miungu la a sẽn tare. Ninsaalba me sẽn tar digb la b sẽn tare. 
Nahum1:6 Soaala-Wẽnd sũura sã n puugi, ãnda n le yɛs b taoore? B sũura puugr wẽnda weoogo, bugum sẽn zombe. Pĩisa meng na n pusame." 
Nahum1:7 Soaala-Wẽnd yaool n yaa nin-noanga, bãmb maasmẽ la d tog n pa, yel-beeda raare. B geta sẽn be-b bãmb maasmẽ wã yell neere," 
Nahum1:8 ba ko-wi-bɛda rãmbg raare. B saremda tẽnga lal-gũbra zãnga, la b tusda b bɛɛbã n kẽes likẽ." 
Nahum1:9 Zɩɩda rãmba, yaa bõe la y tagsd ne Soaala? Ka bãmb n menesd yãmb bɛɛba wa zaalem bɩ? Ad-y bɛɛba ka na n le tõog n maan yãmb bũmb ye." 
Nahum1:10 Bɛɛba wẽnda gõos sẽn tãood b wila n kẽed taaba. Bɛɛba sẽn wat n tɩg rãama n ka le mi gũusgã la bugum na n dɩ-ba wa mo-puka. 
Nahum1:11 Ned n yi fo tẽn-peelmẽ, Niniv, ne raab sẽn ya wẽnga; yaa ned sẽn dɩt beem ne Soaalã." 
Nahum1:12 Yaa woto la Soaala leokd Zɩɩda rãmba: «Ba y bɛɛba sõor ya ka tɛka tɩ b wɩɩd ne pãnga, b fãa na n loogame, ba a ye kõn kees ye. M kɩtame tɩ m zɩɩb kao y po-raoogo la m kõn le paas beoog ye." 
Nahum1:13 M na n sika y zɩɩbo, m na n kaoo y wiyã.»" 
Nahum1:14 Yaa woto me la b leokd Niniv rãmba: «Ned kõn le zĩnd moogo n ya yãmb buuda ned ye, n boond yãmb buuda yʋʋr ye. M na n kẽ-la y wẽn-naandsa roogẽ n yiis sẽn kudi ne kutu la sẽn pees ne raoogo. M segenda y yaoogo tɩ mam nifẽ, y ka le be yõod ye.»" 
Nahum2:1 Ade, Zɩɩda rãmba, ges-y ned sẽn sigd tãmsã ne kiba-noogo. A soaba gonda laafi yelle. Dɩlla Zɩɩda maan-f f kibs rãmba. Wa kõ Soaala f sẽn kãab bãmb bũmb ninga. Nin-wẽng n da tʋmd yãmb beedo la a kõn le paas ye. A pãnga ta-la a tɛka." 
Nahum2:2 Niniv, ad b wat n na n taka zabr ne foo. Bɩ tãb-biisa gũ b tãnsoben-doogã, b gũ soya, b segl zabre, b tigim b zab-teedo." 
Nahum2:3 Soaala-Wẽnd lebsda a Zakoob yagense b pĩnd laogo, n lebsd a Israyɛl a pĩnd ziir. A Israyɛl la Wẽnd bugsuntungã, zɛɛdba sẽn da zɛ n loogã." 
Nahum2:4 Bɛɛba tãb-biis gãong yaa miigu, tɩ futa me ya boto. B sã n bob zabre, b bilim-bilma zirda wa bugum, tɩ kãna zegsdẽ." 
Nahum2:5 Bilim-bilma yɛdg n pida soya, b zoet n gɩta zĩig zãnga, wa rũms sẽn yik gãeemdo. F sã n get-ba, bãng bug-vɩlense, bãng saag sʋʋg sẽn kẽnd to-to." 
Nahum2:6 Niniv dĩma tigsda a tãnsoaben-dãmba, la b lagsd n lʋɩtame. Zab-zabdba kaooga vugri n tees lal-gũbrã, n paam pẽk n soonde." 
Nahum2:7 Vugr bala b kaoo kʋɩlens niyns sẽn yegd kʋɩlgã. B kẽe dĩma zakẽ. 
Nahum2:8 B tʋka wẽn-poaka togsende n looge, tɩ pagba sẽn da get a yella na n wũus wa wala. B sũur sãamame tɩ b toosd b yãoogo." 
Nahum2:9 Niniv wẽnda ko-baoor sẽn wurg n daannẽ. B toond n boonda tãb-biisã sẽn zoetã la ba a ye ka yaasd ye. 
Nahum2:10 Lebga: zɛɛ-y ligdi, zɛɛ-y sãnem, zɛɛ-y tɩ ka sɛt ye, yaa yõod ne yõodo!" 
Nahum2:11 Tɩ sɩd ya zɛɛbo, wãabo, sãoongo. Raood sɛɛme, kars saooda kalwaare, yaa nen-soabga." 
Nahum2:12 Tẽng ninga sẽn ya bõnyẽesa gãaga lebga bõe? Bõnyẽ-poala ra bee be n gũud b rɩɩbo. Bõnyẽ-raooga sã n da yit n na n bao a rɩɩbo, bũmb da ka saagd n pẽneg a kamba ye." 
Nahum2:13 Bõnyẽega ra yõgda a kamb yĩnga, a pag yĩnga. A gãagẽ rũms n same, a gãagẽ nemd pa sɛt ye." 
Nahum2:14 Dũni fãa Soaala n yete: «M na n yika ne foo, Niniv, m na n yõoga bilim-bilm niyns f sẽn tar n zabdẽ wã, f kom-bɩɩba na n paa zabrẽ. M na n sɛɛsa f fãabã, b kõn le wʋm fo sẽn tʋm b rãmba koɛɛg ye.»" 
Nahum3:1 Yell ne tẽng ninga sẽn nonga zɩɩm daagre! Yell ne zirẽ-be-rãmb tẽnga! Yell ne wagdb tẽnga! Yell ne fãadb tẽnga! 
Nahum3:2 Kelg-y bʋʋre, yaa kaas sẽn kiigd bʋʋre. Kelg-y bʋʋre, yaa bilim-bilm nao rãamde! Kelg-y bʋʋre! Yaa wiidi nao bʋʋre." 
Nahum3:3 Wed-dʋʋdba kaooga zabre, sʋʋsa widgda b bugum, kãna yãgda wa saaga. Sẽn ki yaa zãma, kũuma vɩlmame n dɩg, naoor ka tõe n kẽne n ka lak kũum ye." 
Nahum3:4 Niniv, pʋg-yoaad bãnde, f neerma, f fan-teeda ra lubda neba. F da raada dũni rãmba ne f bagrã la f yoobã." 
Nahum3:5 Rẽ n so tɩ m na n yik ne foo, maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. M na n zẽka f fuug n tãag f nenga, tɩ bu-zẽmba fãa yãe f yãnde, tɩ f buuda fãa yãe f paoogre." 
Nahum3:6 M na n vu-f-la begdẽ n dẽgem-fo, n kams neba fãa tɩ b wa la-fo." 
Nahum3:7 Ned ninga fãa sẽn na n yãenda foo na n wẽnemda a neng, la a yeel: «Niniv la woto! A lebga raboogo. Ãnda n na n kũm a nimbãanega. Ãnda n na n wa maas a sũuri?»" 
Nahum3:8 Niniv, fo yɩɩda Tɛɛb, Nil kʋɩlga sẽn da gũbgi t'a gũbgra meng neerem yɩɩd lal-gũbri, n kok-a zĩig zãnga bɩ?" 
Nahum3:9 Yaa Nubi la Ezipt n da kõta laog ka tɛka. Ypt ne Libi rãmba n da sõngd-a, zabr sã n yiki." 
Nahum3:10 M sok n gese, ne rẽ fãa b ka tall a nebã n loog pa-weere, b ka fẽd a kom-bɩɩba so-tiisẽ? B pida b nanamsa ne bãeense, n dɩk-ba n pʋɩ sẽn tõog-b bãmba wala b zu-noog pʋɩɩre." 
Nahum3:11 Fo me wakat n ta, Niniv. Toog na wʋm-f tɩ looge. Fo me na n baoo zĩig n soonde." 
Nahum3:12 Fo tãnsoben-dota wẽnda kankam-rẽemse. Miimda kankangã tɩ fãa sʋʋge, tɩ sẽn dat-a fãa rɩtẽ." 
Nahum3:13 Ges f buuda neba, yaa rabɛɛmb wa pagb bala. F tẽnga kʋɩlens pakda b toore, tɩ bɛɛba kẽedẽ. Yaa bugum n dɩ kʋɩlensa sogdse." 
Nahum3:14 Bao-y koom n bĩng, zabra yĩnga, Niniv rãmba, zẽk-y lal-gũbrã. Kẽ-y tãnnaokẽ n tab tãndo; dɩk-y tãn-koɛɛm-wamde n wẽ tãn-koɛɛma." 
Nahum3:15 Bãng-y tɩ y na n kiime, y na n paa zabrẽ, bɩ y na n paa bugumẽ, bugum ninga sẽn na n dɩ y tẽngã. Y na n looga wa sʋʋr sẽn loogd ne kood vãado. Niniv rãmb da yaa wʋsgo wa kalwaare." 
Nahum3:16 Lɛɛbdb ra pida Niniv, b ra yaa wʋsgo wa ãds sẽn be yĩngri. B sõora yaa wa sʋʋr sẽn lʋɩ pʋtẽ, la fãa gill loogame." 
Nahum3:17 Sẽn da get-b tẽnga yelle da yaa wʋsg wa sʋʋre. Tʋʋma taoor dãmba wẽnda bõn-yɩgdi sẽn dʋʋgd tuuda zug, n soond yʋng waoodo, la sõor sã n yẽege, b yɩkdame la ned ka mi b sẽn kẽedẽ ye. Ned kõn tõog n togs ye." 
Nahum3:18 Asiri dĩma, f soaalba gãandame n ka na n le yik ye. Tãnsoaben-dãmba me boto. Buuda neba zoeeme n dʋ tãmse la ned ka be n na n le tigim-b ye." 
Nahum3:19 Yaa yel-beed n lʋɩ f zugu. Neb niyns fãa sẽn wʋm yell ning sẽn pak fooma wẽeda nug-pogse. Ãnda la f toolma la f wẽnema ka namse, naoor a yi, naoor a tã?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Ad Wẽnd sẽn wilg bũmb ning bãngd a Abakuk. 
Habakkuk1:2 Soaala, m na m bool-y lame tɩ y wa sõng-ma n ta wakat bʋgo, tɩ y ket n pa kelgdẽ? M na n kell n kaasdame la m gomd pãn-tõoga yelle, tɩ y ka wat m fãagre?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Bõe yĩnga la y bas tɩ m yãet yel-beedo, yaa bõe la y ne pãn-tõogã n sĩnda? M goabga, m dɩtgo, m sẽn lebẽ fãa yaa pãn-tõogo, yaa bʋʋdo la zaba." 
Habakkuk1:4 Woto la noor lebg zaalem, tɩ b ka le kaood bʋ-tɩrg ye. N-yẽe! Nin-wẽng yaanda nin-sõngo, zemsgo sor lebga so-buka." 
Habakkuk1:5 Ges-y bu-zẽmbã, yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde, ges-y la y pɛleng yɩke, tɩ y yɛɛse. Yaa tʋʋmd la m na n tʋm tɩ y ket n vɩ. Yaa tʋʋm-bãnde, la ned sã n togse, y kõn deeg ye." 
Habakkuk1:6 N-yẽe! M na n waa ne Kalde rãmba, sũ-to-neba, neb zɩɩm sẽn tʋʋle, neb sẽn saad zĩis fãa, n zɛɛd b taab tẽnse!" 
Habakkuk1:7 Buud kãnga pãng la a raood ka be to ye. A pãnga la a bʋʋm, a pãng la a zu-zẽkre." 
Habakkuk1:8 B wiidi tĩig yɩɩda ãbga, n yɩɩd digd-n-yĩidsa rẽnna. B wed-dʋʋdba yii yɩɩg n watẽ, b fõta wa sɩlg sẽn baood a rɩɩbo." 
Habakkuk1:9 Kalde rãmba pida ne pãn-tõogo la ad b sẽn wate. B pa lebd goabg bɩ rɩtg ye. B sẽn yõg tãb-biisa sõore: bãng bĩisri. 
Habakkuk1:10 Buud kãnga toog ka be ne naab ye. A laada tẽnga soaalba. Tãnsoben-dota ka yɛɛsd-b ye. A samda tãndo lalsa sɛɛga, n paam n kẽ." 
Habakkuk1:11 B loogda wa sob-raoogo, n teem zĩiga. Ad-y b geta b pãnga wa b wẽnde." 
Habakkuk1:12 Al yʋʋm sẽn zãre ka yãmb la Soaala Pãng soaba, mam Wẽnnaama, mam nin-sõngã sẽn ka kiida bi? Yãmb zĩndiga buud kãngã, t'a kao d bʋʋdo, Soaala, Pãng soaba, m soondg pĩiga." 
Habakkuk1:13 Yãmb nina yaa sõma wʋsgo ne y tõog n ges wẽnga, yãmb kõn sak n ges pãn-tõog ye. Bõe yĩng marsã tɩ y neẽ la y sĩnda, tɩ b tʋmd b tʋʋm yoodo? Bõe yĩnga la y sĩnda tɩ wẽn-kɩɩs na n vel nin-sõngo?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Yãmb maanda ne ninsaalba wala y sẽn maand ne mogr zĩm, ne rũm-yaalsa y sẽn basd tɩ b rugd yaarã." 
Habakkuk1:15 Babilon rãmba yõgda neba wala b sẽn yõkd zĩif ne lɛooga n yiisd-b ne sũ-noogo kãsenga. 
Habakkuk1:16 B lɛɛgd n kʋʋda b zulumsa maando, n yõogd tɩdare b yĩnga. B yetame tɩ yaa bãmb maasem yĩng la b paamd b rɩ-bɛda la b rɩ-noodo." 
Habakkuk1:17 Woto wã y na kell n bas bɛɛ wã t'a wõod a sʋʋse la a tar neba kʋʋbo, tɩ vʋʋsg la nimbãan-zoeer ka beẽ?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Mam na n yalsa yĩngri, m gaosg zugu, mam na n yalsa wa sẽn tog n gũ-a tẽngã sẽn zao a gaosga zugu, n bãng Soaala sẽn na n leok-m bũmb ninga, n bãng b sẽn na n bʋk m sũura ne koɛɛg ninga." 
Habakkuk2:2 Dẽ la Soaala leok maam n yetẽ: «Gʋls f sẽn ne bũmb ninga, gʋls-b walg zugu, gʋls bedre tɩ kareng yɩ naana." 
Habakkuk2:3 F sẽn ne wã na n wa-la a wakato, ba sã n wẽnd a na n kaoosame, a na n wa-la a wakato. Gũ ne saagre; yaa tɩlɛ t'a wa la pʋs n ka na n le kaoos ye." 
Habakkuk2:4 Ad-y pãn-tõog soab wuka ne nagre n ka mi sẽn segd ye. A ka mi tɩ sõmblem vɩɩm la nin-tɩrg vɩɩm ye.» 
Habakkuk2:5 Rãam sã n tar pãnga a tõe n zãmb-f lame la sẽn teeg-a a meng pãng ka paad a zĩigẽ ye. A sẽn mi yaa a yaag a noor wala bʋg-tẽnga, la wala kũum, bũmb pa sekd-a ye. A woonda buuda toor-toore n kẽesd a soolme, wolgda a ye rũnna n wolg a to beoogo." 
Habakkuk2:6 A sẽn ka mi bala yaa t'a sẽn yõk b rãmb n deeg b tẽngã na n wa pusga laad a poorẽ la woto la b na n wa yeele: «Bʋk ne bʋko! Pãn-tõog soaba! M ba wagdr samda a sẽn zu, la na n yɩɩ woto n ta da-bʋre a ka mi tɩ yaa sam n samd taab ye.»" 
Habakkuk2:7 B na n wa yẽeg-f-la vugr bala, fo sẽn dɩ b rãmb samda na n waame n wa miim-f wa taanga n loog ne b laog naana naana." 
Habakkuk2:8 Yaa tẽns ka tɛk la f zɛ yã la yaa dũni wã zãng n na n wa zɛ-fo tɩ ninsaalb zɩɩm la f raagyã tɩ pãn-tõog la f maan tẽngã, Zerizalɛɛm ne a kẽedbã." 
Habakkuk2:9 Bʋk ne bʋko! Gomda m ba ro-meta! Wẽdgame n deeg f to zĩiga tɩ f rat n ti-la f roogã taaba sẽn ka tõe n taẽ ye n paam n põs ne a ka neng rãmba nus yõkre. 
Habakkuk2:10 Bãng tɩ woto wã yaa yãnde la f bao n na n kõ f zaka yaa neb ka tɛk yõor la f rat n gʋsge yaa f meng vɩɩm la f rat sãame. 
Habakkuk2:11 Lalsa kug na n naaga taab m kelme la yaa sug-raadã n na n yãb n soke. 
Habakkuk2:12 Bʋk ne bʋko! Gomda ne m ba tẽn-meta! Tẽnga meeb tʋɩɩsa zɩɩm zugu, yaa zɩ-raagd n met a tẽnga." 
Habakkuk2:13 Woto ka yit Wẽnd Pãng Soaba nengẽ sɩda, Adem biis tʋʋma yõodo bugum n mi nadgra fãa nadga zaalem." 
Habakkuk2:14 Wakat n wate tɩ tẽnga na n pidi ne Soaala ziira bãngre, n pid wa mogr sẽn pid ne koom." 
Habakkuk2:15 Bʋko ne bʋko! Gomda ne m ba Rã-yũuda! A yũnugda a tũud-n-taaga rãama kalemame t'a wa tõe n lub neda t'a wa tõe tɩ f fʋk f zãnde. 
Habakkuk2:16 Ad b sẽn na n tɩgs-f bũmb ning wakat kãnga, ka na n yɩ ziiri, na n yɩɩ yãnde, na yɩ-la f me yũ la f fʋk f zãnde. Soaala sũ-puura wamd n na n daag f zugu, la woto f yʋʋra kilsgu poore, f paoor meng-meng n na n pʋge." 
Habakkuk2:17 Pãn-tõog ning f sẽn maan Libã wã na n lɛɛg n wɩbga foo, we-rũms niyns sẽn tɩ soond be wã, fãa na n yõg n koodame, pãn-tõoga sẽn maan ne tẽnga la a nebã, pãn-tõoga sẽn maan be yĩnga, ninsaalba zɩɩma sẽn daag be yĩnga." 
Habakkuk2:18 Wẽn-naandsa yõod la bʋgo? Yaa kut bala la belgem-belgem. Yõaka belgdame tɩ bũmb la a teeg yã, la yaool n yaa bõn-muk la a rõog yã." 
Habakkuk2:19 Bʋk ne bʋko! Gomda ne m ba ra-pɛɛsa! Fo yeta ra-giiga: «Yik yĩngri,» ka rẽ bɩ f yet kugri sẽn ka tʋba: «Nek f gõeem la yik n togse tɩ bũmb la f wat n na n wilgi.» Bũmb togsend la d sɩd ne, yãgda ne sãnem la wanzurfu, la ka vʋʋsd wa nin-vɩɩg ye." 
Habakkuk2:20 Sã n ya Soaala, bãmb zĩ-la b ro-sõngẽ. B sẽn dat yaa tẽnga fãa bas bʋʋr bãmb taoore." 
Habakkuk3:1 Woto ya pʋʋsgo, bãngd a Abakuk pʋʋsgo. Pʋʋsga yaa sɛɛg yõkre." 
Habakkuk3:2 Soaala, Soaala, m wʋma y noora sẽn togsã, la rabeem bal n tar-ma, Soaala paam pẽgr yʋʋma sẽn tong taabã y tʋʋm sõma wã y sẽn tʋma yĩnga! Yʋʋma sẽn watã le berg-y y tʋʋm bãna tõnd ninsaalba nifẽ. Ba y sã n be bʋʋm n yikd y sũur ne-do, baasgo wilg-y tõnd y nimbãan-zoeere." 
Habakkuk3:3 Soaala-Wẽnd yii Tema n watẽ, Nin-sõnga yii Parã tãnga. Yĩngr pida ne b ziiri tɩ tẽnga pid ne b pẽgre." 
Habakkuk3:4 Soaala watame n yãgd ne vẽenem. Wĩnto-kãn a yiibu n tond b nugẽ, b pãnga la b mum b nugẽ." 
Habakkuk3:5 B lʋɩɩsda bã-longdem b taoore, tɩ yĩn-wɩngr pʋgd b poore." 
Habakkuk3:6 B yalsa b nao zugu la tẽnga la b magyã. B gesa Adem biisi tɩ b sɩng rigbu. Tẽn-kʋdem wẽnnẽ tãmsa vigsdame, tɩ tãn-bi wã kell n sut zãnga. Yaa so-kʋda la b le rɩke." 
Habakkuk3:7 Mam yãee Kusã rãmb roto la fãa lebga rabood n dɩga; Madiã tẽng rota sug zũndga zãnga. 
Habakkuk3:8 Soaala, yaa ne kʋɩlsã la yãmb sũura fõt bɩ? Yaa ne mogrã, la yãmb sũur puug bi? Yaa y sũurã n puugi tɩ y zomb sawatã wa wiidi, n zomb-b wa b soga bilim-bilm, tɩ y na n zab y raood zabre bɩ?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Y zãada y tãpo, y nugẽ, y zãada y nugẽ wa kãna, y sẽn da kãab tɩ y na n toola beed ning fãa. Tẽnga me wurgame n tãoosd a koom wa pɛɛma." 
Habakkuk3:10 Tãmsã yãenda yãmba la ad-y b sɩnga rigbu. Mogra ningda a koɛɛga n tãoosd a ko-wiisa yĩngri. 
Habakkuk3:11 Wĩndga la kiuugã wʋmda y pɛɛma sẽn fɩɩnde, b yãeta saag-sʋʋsa sẽn yãgd goalma tɩ wĩndig ne kiuug na n pa b zĩigẽ." 
Habakkuk3:12 Soaala sũur puugame tɩ b saagd tẽngã la yaa bu-zẽmba nao la b tabda. 
Habakkuk3:13 Y yi-la y buuda fãagr yĩnga y yi-la y dĩma fãagr yĩnga. Y fõka nin-wẽnga roog sugri, y sarma a rota lals zãnga." 
Habakkuk3:14 Yãmb deesda bɛɛba zab-teedo n wẽneg n wurd b zutu. B ra fõt n kẽeda maam wa sɩlmande, b ra wat n na n yaam-m lame wala sẽn maand ne b sẽn tõog a soab fãa." 
Habakkuk3:15 Yãmb tuka sor mogr zug ne y wiidi, tɩ ko-wiisa zẽkdẽ la b sigd ne pãnga." 
Habakkuk3:16 Mam wʋma rãamdã tɩ rabeem yõk-ma bʋʋra kɩtame tɩ m no-gãnda rigda; zũnzũur n kẽ m kõabã, tɩ kam-wers sẽb m gĩina. Daara la m da yɛs sɩɩ n gũudẽ, m gũuda bɛɛba zu-beeda raare, n na bob zabre n fãag m menga." 
Habakkuk3:17 M sẽn ne nanda, m neeme tɩ kankang ka ningd puud ye, bugsuntund ka womd biis ye. Oliviye rãmb dõosg ka yõod ye, pʋt ka rɩlgd a koaad ye, wubr ka le tar pesg ye, nag-gãagẽ nag-bil meng ka ye." 
Habakkuk3:18 Ne rẽ fãa yaa Soaala la m sũ-noogo, yaa bãmb la m Fãagda." 
Habakkuk3:19 M Soaala yaa m Wẽnd la m pãnga. B kɩtame tɩ m karse lebg wala yĩsr rẽnna, la tãmsa zut la lolemd marsã. Yɩɩla naab yɩɩndame tɩ kʋnde, ruudg la bɛɛl wẽedẽ." 
Zephaniah1:1 Woto yaa koees niyns a Sofoni sẽn paam Soaala nengẽ a Amon biiga a Zoziyas sẽn waa n ya Zɩɩda dĩma. A Sofoni, yaa a Kusi biiga, t'a Kusi yaa a Gedaliya biiga, a Amariya yagenga, a Ezekiyas yagen-tʋbra-kẽega." 
Zephaniah1:2 Soaala-Wẽnd gomda woto: «N-yẽe! M na n menesa fãa tẽnga zugu. 
Zephaniah1:3 M na n menesa neba la rũmsi, m na n menesa yĩngr luiila la mogr zĩifu, m na n luba nin-wẽnse, la m na n yiisa ninsaalba tẽnga zugu.» Soaala n yeele." 
Zephaniah1:4 M na n zẽka m nugu n zab ne Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba fãa, ne Zɩɩda neba fãa. M na n yiisa Zɩɩda tẽn-peelmẽ bũmb ning fãa sẽn ket n wẽnd a Baal waoogre. M kõn le sak tɩ b tẽeg a maan-kʋʋdba meng yell ye." 
Zephaniah1:5 M na n zaba ne sẽn dʋʋd-b rot zutu n waoogd yĩngr ãdsã, n zab ne sẽn ka yɛs-b zĩ-yɛnga. Bãmb dãmb n wẽende tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, la b pʋgda la b naag n pʋgd wẽn-naand a Milkom." 
Zephaniah1:6 M na n menesa sẽn zãagd-b ne maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n pa kot m sõngre, n pa kot m vẽnegre." 
Zephaniah1:7 Bas-y bʋʋre Soaala-Wẽnd taoore, tɩ b sũ-puura raar kolgdame! N-yẽe! Soaala segla maoongo, la b zoe n yɩlga b sẽn bool b rãmba." 
Zephaniah1:8 Daara sẽn watã, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, maoonga raarã, m na n sɩbga taoor dãmbã la rĩm-biisã ne neb niyns fãa sẽn yer bu-zẽn-futu, n tũud rog-n-mik paala." 
Zephaniah1:9 Maoonga raare, m na sɩbga neb niyns fãa sẽn kẽed-b wẽnd dooga yaare. M na sɩbga sẽn pidsd-b zu-soab zaka ne arzɛk b sẽn paam ne zãmbo la pãn-tõogo." 
Zephaniah1:10 Maam n le yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ m maoonga raare, Zerizalɛɛm dãmb na wʋm kɛleng, Zĩma rignoorẽ. Kũmkũm na sãd Kẽedpaalgo la tãmsa na wulumd ne bʋ-raase." 
Zephaniah1:11 Kaas-y yã, Teoogẽ dãmba tɩ bala Kanaã neba fãa na n kiime, sẽn maand-b leobg fãa na n loogame." 
Zephaniah1:12 Baraare m na n widga fitila, m na n vɛɛsa Zerizalɛɛm m na n zaba ne neb niyns sẽn gãe ne bãane, wala rãam sẽn dɩgle t'a rabɩlla tisgi, la b yet b sũurẽ: Soaala pa tõe fɩ, b pa tõe wẽng bɩ neer ye!" 
Zephaniah1:13 Bɩ b bãng tɩ b arzɛk na n lʋɩɩ fãadb nusẽ, tɩ b rot sẽege; b mee roto la b kõn kẽ ye, b sela bugsuntungu la b kõn yũ b rãam ye." 
Zephaniah1:14 Naaba-Wẽnd sũ-puura raar kolgame, a wata ne yãgbo. Daara na n yɩɩ kelem bag-bag raare, kelem n pa tẽed fãagr daare, kelem ba f ya gãndao-maasre." 
Zephaniah1:15 Na n yɩɩ sũ-puur daare, namsgo la rigb daare, lika la sawat sabla daare, wulgu, zĩ-boog daare." 
Zephaniah1:16 Badaare tãb-biisa na n peeba tõntõogo la b na n tãsa b zabr tãsga la b na n taka zabre ne tãnsoben-dotã la b gasda sẽn lug n kul yĩngrã. 
Zephaniah1:17 M na n kɩtame tɩ yel-beed paam nebã la b na n kẽna wala zoeense tɩ b beega, Soaala-Wẽnnaam. B zɩɩma na n daaga zĩig zãnga wala toma sẽn yɛdg tẽngã, tɩ sẽn ki-ba lob wala sagdo, tɩ b be be n põogdẽ." 
Zephaniah1:18 Soaala sũ-puura raare ka wanzurf bɩ sãnem n tõe n le fãag ned ye. Tẽnga fãa na n dɩɩ bugum, b sũ-fõora bugum, tɩ bala b na n waa ne yel-beedo, b na n menesa tẽnga kẽedba fãa gilli." 
Zephaniah2:1 Adem biisi, tags-y neere, zoe-y yãnde n teem y manesem." 
Zephaniah2:2 B sẽn na n sẽeg yãmb raar a ye wa mooda nan ka ta ye. Soaala-Wẽnd sũura sẽn na n fudg a bugum n waag-y daara nan ka ta ye. 
Zephaniah2:3 Wẽnemd-y n tees Soaala, yãmb fãa, tẽng zug nin-bõonese, sẽn deegd-b noya; bao-y zemsgo, sak-y sulg-m-menga: tõe tɩ y põse, Soaala sũ-puura raare." 
Zephaniah2:4 N-yẽe! Gaza, na n lebga we-raoogo, Askalõ na n lebga raboogo. Wĩnto-sʋka la b na n dig Asdod dãmba; Ekrõ rãmb na n digame n yiis b tẽngẽ." 
Zephaniah2:5 Yell na pak-y, yãmb fãa sẽn yi Kaftor n wa kẽed ka, n vɩ mogra noorẽ. Ad Soaala sẽn leokd-y poorẽ: Kanaã, Filisti rãmba tẽnga, m na n wã-f lame, m na yiisa f neba fãa." 
Zephaniah2:6 Mogra noorã na n lebga rũms kɩʋng zĩiga. Rũm-kɩɩmba na n mee wuba, b piis yĩnga." 
Zephaniah2:7 Mogrã noore na n yɩɩ a Zɩɩda bu-kellã soolem, b na n kɩɩma b rũmsa be, la zaabre, b na n tɩ gãanda Askalõ rota pʋga. Ade, Naaba-Wẽnde, b Wẽnnaama, na n lʋɩɩsa b toogo tɩ b yella manege." 
Zephaniah2:8 Naaba-Wẽnd n yete: «Mam wʋmame tɩ Moab la Amon kamba laadame la b paoogd m buudã. B tʋʋs-a lame la b kẽ n wedga a soolma n paas b rẽnda. 
Zephaniah2:9 Yaa rẽ yĩnga la m wẽend ne m menga, maam, dũni fãa Soaala, a Israyɛl Wẽnnaama, tɩ sɩd wa m sẽn vɩ wã, Moab ne Amon na n wãa zãnga wala Sodom la Gomor. B tẽn-peelma fãa na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga, gõos zĩiga, tẽng yamsem sẽn sãame; mam bu-kellã n na n wa zɛ-ba, la b soog b tẽngã." 
Zephaniah2:10 Dẽ n na n yɩɩ b wilg-m-menga sɩbgre tɩ bala b paooga dũni fãa Soaala buudu; b tʋ-a lame la b reega a tẽnga bogre n sooge. 
Zephaniah2:11 Soaala-Wẽnd na n yɩɩ toaag ne bãmba. B na n menesa wẽn-naandsa gilli. La bu-zẽmba gilli, ned kam fãa a tẽngẽ, na n waooga Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Zephaniah2:12 Soaala-Wẽnd n yete: «Yãmb me, Nubi rãmba, m zabra sʋʋga na n pogl-y lame tɩ y ki.»" 
Zephaniah2:13 Soaala-Wẽnd na n yika ne yãmb me, nug goabg rãmba la b na n wãa Asiri. B na n waa ne Niniv lʋɩɩse. A pʋs n na n lebga zĩ-peen-daaga." 
Zephaniah2:14 Tẽnga vẽenema na n pida ne yir rũmsi la rũms a taaba. Lalsa sẽn me gils-gilsi n ka lʋɩ wã zutu, la viuug luiila la kos-ki na n soonde. F sã n kolg be yaa luiili bʋʋr bal la f wʋmda la f sẽn ne yaa raboogo. Sẽn ya raoog fãa kao n dɩgame." 
Zephaniah2:15 Yaa woto la a na n baase, tẽng ninga sẽn da pẽgd a mengã t'a kẽedba ra tẽed tɩ bũmb kõn maan-bã, n tẽed tɩ Niniv taar ka be moogã. Ade, a ka lʋɩ? A ka lebg rũms na-tẽnga? N-ye! Sẽn looda be pĩida a noor la a fɩɩnẽ." 
Zephaniah3:1 Yell na n paka Zerizalɛɛm, tẽn-tõata, n pak tẽng sẽn pid ne wẽnga la pãn-tõogo!" 
Zephaniah3:2 A pa kelg Soaala boolla ye, a pa reeg saglga ye: a pa pelg a pʋg ne a Soaala, a pa teeg b sõngr ye." 
Zephaniah3:3 Tẽnga pʋgẽ, kug-zĩidba yaa gɩgma sẽn ningd b rãamde; bʋ-kaoodba yaa zaabr digd-n-yĩidsi sẽn pa rɩt n kell yibeoog no-soak ye." 
Zephaniah3:4 A bãngdba yaa yʋ-baoodba, zirẽ dãmba. A maan-kʋʋdba ka zãad te-sõma wã wa sẽn segd ye, b kɩɩsda Soaala noore." 
Zephaniah3:5 Soaala yaool n keta tẽnga pʋga. B raab la zemsga zĩndi tɩ wẽnga meneme. Beoog-beoog fãa b wilgda bõe n zemse, la bõe n ka zemse. Ne rẽ fãa nin-wẽnsa tara b tʋʋma sẽn wat ne b yãndã." 
Zephaniah3:6 Le yaa Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde: «M wãa bu-zẽmb wʋsgo; b ro lug-luga rʋʋgame, ned ka le kẽnd b soya zut ye, b tẽnsã sarmame, ned ka le be be ye." 
Zephaniah3:7 Mam da yetame: Zerizalɛɛm dãmba na yaa n zoe m nifu, b na yaa n deeg m saglgo; woto wã kõn yɩ pakr tɩ m wãa-a ye, kõn yɩ pakr tɩ m pids m sẽn yalsa ye. Kato! B ka zɛɛg ne bũmb a to sã n ka b tʋʋm wẽna." 
Zephaniah3:8 Rẽ yĩnga, gũ-y-ma, Soaala n gomde, gũ-y daar ninga m sẽn na n yik bʋʋd ne yã, tɩ bala m da yeelame tɩ m na n tigma bu-zẽmbã, n tigim rĩundu, n kiig m sũ-puurã b zutu, m bas tɩ m sũura widg a bugum n dɩ tẽnga zãnga.»" 
Zephaniah3:9 Soaala-Wẽnd le paasdame: «N yẽe! M na tedga bu-zẽmbã. M na peka b noorã tɩ b pẽg-ma, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde. B na n naaga taaba n waoog-ma." 
Zephaniah3:10 Ba sẽn be-b Nubi kʋɩlsa rʋʋnde na n waa ne kũuni n pʋʋs ma.» 
Zephaniah3:11 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd n gomde: «M waoonga raare, yãnd kõn le yõk-fo, m buudu, f yel-kɛga yĩnga la f sẽn beeg maama yĩng ye. M na n zãaga ne-fo f kamb niyns sẽn pid ne wilg-m-mengã. M na sɛɛsa wilg-m-men-tʋʋma m tãn-sõnga zugu." 
Zephaniah3:12 M na n keesa m menga fo kamb niyns sẽn ka mi zẽk-m-menga la sẽn ya naong rãmba, neb sẽn na n kos-m tɩ m sõng-ba." 
Zephaniah3:13 A Israyɛl bu-kellã kõn le maan sẽn ya kegr ye, b kõn le yag-m zirẽ ye, b zelemd kõn le tudg b taab ye. B na tõog n dɩ la b gũsi tɩ ned ba a ye ka yɛɛs-b ye.»" 
Zephaniah3:14 Kelem sũ-noogo, Siõ, kaas sũ-noogo, Israyɛl! Noog f sũuri zãnga, Zerizalɛɛm!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Soaala basa taale n lebs b kãab beedã. B kɩtame tɩ f bɛɛba kʋɩ tĩiga. Soaala, a Israyɛl Dĩma bee ne foo. B pãnga labsa, Zerizalɛɛm dãmb kõn le zoe yel-beed dabeem ye." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ad daar n wate, Zerizalɛɛm, la b na n yeelame: «Da zoe rabeem ye, Siõ tẽnga! Da bas raood ye!" 
Zephaniah3:17 F Soaala-Wẽnnaam bee ne foo, b tara pãnga la b na sõng-f tɩ f maan raoodo. B sũura nooma ne foo, b nonglma waa n kõ-f-la vɩɩm paalga. F neba me kaasda sũ-noog f yĩnga," 
Zephaniah3:18 wa kibs daare.» Soaala-Wẽnd n paasde: «M na n menesa yel-beedo, m na n zãag-f-la ne f yãndã." 
Zephaniah3:19 Daar n wate tɩ m na n sɩbg neb niyns fãa sẽn maan-b yãmb pãngã. M na n tɩpa sẽn paam-b sãmpoagã, m na n le waa ne pa-wetã. Ãndũni rãmba ra sẽoosdame la b ra pursd yãmba, m na n teka rẽ fãa n kõ-y yʋ-sõngo la ziir." 
Zephaniah3:20 Wakat kãnga, yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde, m na n tigs-y-la kaanẽ. M na n teka y pɛtã. M na kõ-y yʋ-noogo la ziir dũni rãmba sʋka.»" 
Haggai1:1 Dĩm a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug a yoob soaba, kiuuga pipi daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne bãngd a Aze. Soaala yeel-a lame t'a taas b koɛɛg a Zorobabɛl, a Sealtiyɛl biiga, Zɩɩda kombere, n paas maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Zosadak biiga a Zozuwe:" 
Haggai1:2 «Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala gomda: ‹Buud kãnga neba yetame tɩ wakat ninga b sẽn na n le maneg n me m dooga nan pa ta ye.› 
Haggai1:3 Ad maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, leokre:" 
Haggai1:4 ‹Y sẽn getã, segdame tɩ yãmb kẽed zag-neeba, tɩ m dooga yaool n lʋɩ zãng n dɩg bɩ?" 
Haggai1:5 Rẽ n so tɩ m yet tɩ y tags y sũur pʋgẽ n ges yɛla sẽn ya to-to. 
Haggai1:6 Yãmb bʋda wʋsgo la y pa tigs wʋsg ye. Y pa tar sẽn na rɩ n tɩge, y pa tar sẽn na yũ n noog y sũur ye. Y pa tar sẽn na yeelge n dig y waood zãng ye. Y sẽn tog n yao y tʋʋm-tʋmdba ne ligd ninga yaa waa y rɩk-a lame n sui kor-wurung pʋgẽ." 
Haggai1:7 Dẽ la maam, y Wẽndã, dũni fãa Soaala, yet tɩ y tags n ges y yɛla sẽn be zĩig ninga." 
Haggai1:8 Modg-y n dʋ y tãnga zugu n wa ne raado n le yik m doogã. Maam n wilgd-y, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, tɩ ya ro-kãng pʋg la m na n deeg ne sũ-noogo, waoogr ning y sẽn tog n waoog-ma." 
Haggai1:9 Yãmb da gũuda tɩgre, la kood faagame; yãmb ninga y kood baoorẽ, tɩ m kẽes bugd y baoorẽ la yaa bõe yĩnga? Maam n sokde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala. Ad-y ka bũmb a to, yaa m dooga sẽn lʋɩ zãnga tɩ yãmb ned kam fãa bas-a n yaool n manegd a roog n ka vʋʋsdẽ ye." 
Haggai1:10 Yaa rẽ yĩng la saag mong a koom, tɩ tẽng me tõdg biis wombo." 
Haggai1:11 M waa ne ware y tẽnga pʋgẽ, y tãms zutu, y oliviye pʋtẽ, y alkam pʋtẽ, y bugsuntund pʋtẽ, y wãk sẽn kõrgd zĩig ning fãa. Yɩɩ naong ne ninsaalba, n yɩ naong ne rũmsi; y tʋma zaalem.› »" 
Haggai1:12 A Zorobabɛl, a Sealtiyɛl biiga, n paas a Zozuwe, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, a Zosadak biiga, n paas pa-wetã, fãa kelga Soaala-Wẽnd koɛɛga, bãngda Aze sẽn taas bãmbã. B kelg-a-la wa bũmb sẽn sɩd tog ne kelgre. Yɩɩ woto la bãngda Aze pids tʋʋmd ning a sẽn deeg Soaala nengẽ la buuda sakame n deege." 
Haggai1:13 Buuda sẽn sak kelgrã la Soaala leok a Aze woto: «M na zĩnd ne yãmba, maam n kãabd-y rẽ, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, yãmb Soaala.»" 
Haggai1:14 Soaala-Wẽnd pidsa ne raoodo Zɩɩda komber a Zorobabɛl, n paas maan-kʋʋd kãseng, a Zozuwe, la pa-weta fãa la b yikame n sɩng n na n le maneg n me Wẽnnaam, dũni fãa Soaala roogo." 
Haggai1:15 Meeba sɩnga yʋʋmd kãng bala, kiuug a yoob soaba pisi la a naas daare." 
Haggai2:1 A Dariyus naama yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug a yopoe soaba pisi la a ye raare, Soaala koɛɛg le taa bãngda Aze:" 
Haggai2:2 «B kos-a lame t'a sok woto a Zorobabɛl, Zɩɩda kombere, a Sealtiyɛl biigã, maan-kʋʋd kãseng a Zozuwe, a Zosadak biiga la pa-wetã:" 
Haggai2:3 ‹Yãmb sʋka ãnda n ket n tẽr pĩnd wẽnd dooga sẽn da tar ziir ningã? La yãmb sẽn get-a rũnna wã a yaa wãn-wãna? A ka lebg zaalem yãmb nifẽ sɩda? 
Haggai2:4 Yaa rẽ me la m yet-fo, Zorobabɛl, keng f sũuri! Keng f sũuri, Zozuwe, Zosadak biiga! Keng-y sũuri tẽnga rãmb fãa. Sɩng-y tʋʋma tɩ m bee ne yãmba, maam y Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaalã." 
Haggai2:5 M tẽra m sẽn kãab-y bũmb ning m sẽn waa n yiis-y Ezipt tẽnga. M na n kell n paa yãmb sʋka, woto wã da zoe-y rabeem ye." 
Haggai2:6 Woto la m gomda, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, tɩ sã n yɩ bilfu, m na n miima yĩngr la tẽnga, mogre la tẽn-koɛɛngã." 
Haggai2:7 M na n leeba bu-zẽmba fãa lɛbla. B arzɛka fãa na n wa sama ka, la m yet-y lame tɩ wẽnd dooga na n le paama a pĩnd ziirã." 
Haggai2:8 Maam n so dũni wã fãa sãnem la wanzurf. 
Haggai2:9 Woto wã wẽnd do-paalla ziir na yɩɩg pipi soabã la yaa ro-kãng pʋga la m na n zĩnd n tool yãmb m laafi. Yaa maam n kãabd-y rẽ, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaalã.› »" 
Haggai2:10 Dĩma a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug a wɛ soaba pisi la a naas daare, Soaala le goma ne bãngd a Aze." 
Haggai2:11 Woto la Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, goamda: «Kos maan-kʋʋdba tɩ b leoke yell kãnga poorẽ. Sok-ba n gese:" 
Haggai2:12 ‹Ned sã n yondg a fuugẽ nemd sẽn ya maoong nemdo, la a fuuga sɩɩsa wa buri, rɩɩbo, rãam bɩ kaam, rɩɩb buuda fãa, rɩ-kãng me tõe n boolame tɩ rɩɩb sẽn welg toor Wẽnd yĩng bɩ?› » La maan-kʋʋdba leokame tɩ ka tõe ye." 
Haggai2:13 T'a Aze leb n yeele: «La ned sã n sɩɩs bõn-kɩɩnga, n wa sɩɩs rɩɩbo, rɩɩb kãng na n dẽgmame bɩ?» Maan-kʋʋdba leokame tɩ: N-yẽe!" 
Haggai2:14 A Aze yeel-b lame: «Ad Soaala koɛɛga: ‹Ad-y yaa woto me ne tẽn-kãnga rãmb ne b tʋʋma. M sẽn getã, b sẽn wat ne bũmb ning fãa maan-kugra zugu, ad-y b wata ne rẽgdo.› »" 
Haggai2:15 Soaala le yeelame: «Ges-y bũmb ninga sẽn na n maane marsã tɛka. Y sẽn waa n nan ka sɩng kuga rɩgsgo m dooga meeba yĩngã," 
Haggai2:16 bõe n da maande? Ned sã n da sok tɩ kooda sẽn dʋʋg n na n koosa yaa pet a wãn dẽnna, b yetame tɩ yaa pisi la yaool n yaa piig rẽnna. Sẽn tõsd-b bugsuntunga biis me ra maanda boto; b yetame tɩ b waa n kiiga pet pis-nu, mik yaa pisi bala." 
Haggai2:17 Ad-y yaa maam n wa ne kɩɩms kolkoodo, n wa ne gãnem la sapɩlem n sãam y koodã, la y pa lɛɛg n kẽ maam y Soaala ye." 
Haggai2:18 Maan-y gũusgu neere, ges-y yɛla sẽn na n yɩ marsã, dũnna raara tɛka. Rũnna raarã, dooga sɩngrã, yaa kiuug a wɛ soaba pisi la a naas daare. Ning-y rẽ y pʋtẽerẽ." 
Haggai2:19 Y neeme tɩ bũmb ka le ket baoorẽ ye, bugsuntundu, kankamse, tɩɩs niyns sẽn womd b biisa wa poaloangã, oliviye la tɩɩs a taaba ka wom fɩ. Bãng-y tɩ rũnna tɛka m na n sudga m kũuna y zugu.»" 
Haggai2:20 Badaare, kiuuga pisi la a naas raare, Soaala le waa n kõ-la a Aze koɛɛga." 
Haggai2:21 B yeel-a lame t'a wilg woto Zɩɩda komber a Sealtiyɛl biig a Zorobabɛl: «Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala, ad-y m na n miima yĩngri la tẽnga." 
Haggai2:22 M na n deega ãndũni rãmba fãa naam la m lub b dĩm dãmbã. M na n luba bilim-bilma ne b soaalba. Wiida na n kiime la wed-dʋʋdba na n kʋʋ taaba. 
Haggai2:23 Badaare, Zorobabɛl, m sõgne, m na n kõ-f-la tʋʋmde. Mam yĩnga fo na n lebga wa bũmb ning m sẽn tar n tikd m sɛba t'a kõt kaset tɩ b yii mam nengẽ; foo la n yãkda tɩ f na yɩ m na-yir-dao-a-ka-yelle. Yaa maam, dũni fãa Soaala n yeele!»" 
Zechariah1:1 Dĩma a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug a nii soaba, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Zakari, a Berekia biiga la a Ido yagenga." 
Zechariah1:2 B kõ-a-la noore t'a yeel Israyɛl kamba woto: 
Zechariah1:3 «Maam, dũni fãa Soaala, sũur puuga al wʋsgo ne yãmb ba rãmba. Lɛɛg-y n wa kẽ-y Soaala, tɩ mam me na le bao y zĩiga. M kãabd-y-la rẽnna." 
Zechariah1:4 Sõng-y n da wa yɩ wala y yaab rãmb ye. Pipi bãngdba da yeel-b lame: bas-y y so-wẽnse la y tʋʋm wẽnse. La bãmb ka wẽneg n ges maam, b ka kelg maam ye." 
Zechariah1:5 Yãmb ba rãmba ka ket ye. Bãngdba me ka ket ye, y mii rẽnna." 
Zechariah1:6 La ade, mam sẽn yeel bãngdbã, m sõgen-kamba, tɩ b togs bũmb ningã, ad-y ba rãmba waa n kong n deegame. B teema zʋgo. B reegame tɩ m tall-b lame wala m sẽn da wilg-ba la wala b vɩɩma la b tʋʋma sẽn da tog ne.»" 
Zechariah1:7 Dĩma a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a yiib soaba, kiuug piig la a ye soaba, Sebat kiuugu, kiuuga pisi la a naas daare, Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne bãngd a Zakari, a Berekia biiga, la a Ido yagenga. Ad a Zakari sẽn yãende." 
Zechariah1:8 M gãanda yʋngo n yãe rao sẽn zom wed-zẽega n yɛs tuud sʋka, bãg-faagẽ. Daoã poorẽ, wiidi a taaba n da yɛse, tɩ b kõbga ya zẽega, tãmpʋʋre la pɛɛlga." 
Zechariah1:9 Tɩ m sok-a: «M zu-soaba, wed-bãmba makda bõe.» Malɛk ning sẽn da gomda ne maama leokame: «M na n wilg-f lame.»" 
Zechariah1:10 Raoã zĩnda tuuda sʋka n le paase: «Yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n tʋm-ba tɩ b saag moogo.» 
Zechariah1:11 Wed-dʋʋdba wilga Soaala malɛka sẽn da yɛs tuudẽ wã bãmb sẽn yãende. B yeelame: «Tõnd saaga tẽnga n nan watẽ, la d yãendame tɩ tẽnga zĩi ne laafi la bãane.»" 
Zechariah1:12 Tɩ malɛka yeel woto: «Dũni fãa Soaala, yaa yʋʋm pisopoe marsã la y sũur puud ne Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda tẽns a taaba. Y na n mong-b-la y nimbãan-zoeerã n ta da-bʋre?»" 
Zechariah1:13 La Naaba-Wẽnd kedg n leoka Malɛkã gom-noodo, goam sẽn maagd sũuri." 
Zechariah1:14 Malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maamã yeelame tɩ m wilg dũni fãa Soaala koe-kãnga: «Mam nonga Zerizalɛɛm la Siõ tãnga ne nonglem kãsenga. 
Zechariah1:15 M sũura yaool n puuga wʋsgo ne bu-zẽmbã sẽn zĩ n ka yɛɛsd baa fɩ wã. M sũura dag n nan ka fudgd zãng ye la b waa ne yelle n paase. 
Zechariah1:16 Rẽ yĩnga m yetame, maam, dũni fãa Soaala, tɩ m le wẽnemda m neng ne nimbãan-zoeere n tees Zerizalɛɛm. M na kɩt tɩ b le me wẽnd dooga be. M na kɩt tɩ b le tẽeg wĩir n mag n me. Yaa maam, dũni fãa Soaala n gomde.»" 
Zechariah1:17 Malɛka kos-m lame tɩ m le moon woto: «Ade, dũni fãa Soaala koɛɛga: ‹M tẽnsa nan ka tar sũ-noog zãng ye, yaa sɩda, la Soaala na n le wa bʋka Siõ sũuri, Zerizalɛɛm la b yama na n le wa kẽ.› »" 
Zechariah2:1 Mam sẽn zẽk m neng yĩngri m yãenda bũmb a to: yɩɩl a naase. 
Zechariah2:2 Tɩ m yeel Malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maamã: «Bõe yɩɩl la woto?» T'a leoke: «Yaa bu-zẽmb niyns yɩɩl sẽn tã Zɩɩda, Israyɛl ne Zerizalɛɛm dãmb n sẽeg dũniya.»" 
Zechariah2:3 La rẽ poore Soaala-Wẽnd wilg-m-la sẽeb a naase. 
Zechariah2:4 Tɩ m soke: «Nin-bãmba wat n na maana bõe?» Tɩ b leoke: «B wat n na n yɛɛsame la b tus n lub bu-zẽmb niyns sẽn yik zabre ne Zɩɩda tẽnga, n sẽeg a neba, la b maand b sẽn dat marsã.»" 
Zechariah2:5 M sẽn le zẽk m nenga m yãee woto: Raoa sẽn zãad wĩiri a nugẽ n na n mage. 
Zechariah2:6 Tɩ m sok-a: «Fo rabda yɛ?» T'a leoke: «M dabd n na n tɩ maga Zerizalɛɛm n bãng a yalem ne a woglem sẽn zem tɛka.» 
Zechariah2:7 Malɛka sẽn da gomd ne maama, kolga malɛk a to sẽn da wat a segbo." 
Zechariah2:8 A kõ-a-la no-kãnga: «Zoe n tɩ wilg da-sãngã, sẽn zãad-a wĩirã tɩ Zerizalɛɛm ka tog m me lals n gũbg ye, tɩ neba la rũmsa sẽn na n vɩɩnd a pʋgẽ wã na n yɩɩ ka tɛka.»" 
Zechariah2:9 Ad Soaala meng sẽn yete: «Mam meng n na n gũbg tẽnga wa bugum lalga la m na n puka m ziira be.» 
Zechariah2:10 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd ne-yã: «Yãmb fãa m sẽn da sẽeg ween-vɩɩs a naasã, lɛɛg-y n zoe-y n wa-y yã! Bas-y nug goabg sẽnẽ rãmba la y wa!" 
Zechariah2:11 Zerizalɛɛm dãmb sẽn ya pa-wet Babilon, ning-y pãnga n zoe n wa!»" 
Zechariah2:12 Sɩda dũni fãa Soaala sẽn tʋm maama tɩ m wa taas-y b koe kãsenga, gomda woto ne buud niyns sẽn kẽes-b yãmb yemdo la b zɛ yãmbã: «Ned ning fãa sẽn le sɩɩsa yãmba, a soab bãng t'a sɩɩsa m fãa-fãa." 
Zechariah2:13 Ade, m na n yika ne bu-zẽmbã. Bãmb sẽn kẽes b rãmb yemdã na zɛɛ bãmb me, wa b sẽn zɛ b taabã. Woto, yɛla sã n wa pidsi, y na bãnge tɩ yaa dũni fãa Soaala n tʋm maam.»" 
Zechariah2:14 Soaala le yetame: «Kɩdem n lange, Zerizalɛɛm, tɩ m wat n na n zĩnda yãmb sʋka." 
Zechariah2:15 Badaare, buud kʋʋng na n kẽe maam, dũni fãa Soaala, n lebg m buudu la yaa yãmb sʋk la m na n zĩndi. Dẽ sã n wa beẽ, y na bãng tɩ sẽn tʋma maam yãmb nengẽ wã yaa dũni fãa Soaala." 
Zechariah2:16 Soaala na n sooga a Zɩɩda wala b meng pʋɩɩre, b tẽn sõngẽ wã, la Zerizalɛɛm n na n yɩ b yamleoog tẽnga." 
Zechariah2:17 Sẽn vʋʋsda ne yõor yɩ sɩɩ, tɩ vugr bala Soaala na n yi-la b ro-sõngẽ.»" 
Zechariah3:1 Soaala-Wẽnd kɩtame tɩ mam yãe a Zozuwe, maan-kʋʋd kãsengã; a ra yɛsa yĩngri, Soaala malɛka taoore. Sʋtãan waa n yaasa maan-kʋʋda rɩtgo n na n dõd-a." 
Zechariah3:2 Soaala malɛka yeela Sʋtãana: «Bɩ Soaala-Wẽnd pag f noorã, Sʋtãana, bɩ b pag f noorã tɩ bãmb yam n kẽ Zerizalɛɛm! A Zozuwe ka wẽnd ra-giiga b sẽn foog bugmẽ sɩda?»" 
Zechariah3:3 A Zozuwe da yɛsa malɛka taoore, n yer fu-rẽgdo." 
Zechariah3:4 Tɩ malɛka na n yeel a tũud-n-taasã tɩ b yees a futã. A yaoolame marsã n yeel a Zozuwe: «M pidga f beegrã la m na n le yeelg-f-la kibs futu.» 
Zechariah3:5 A kõo noor tɩ b fõgneg pugl neere a Zozuwe zugu. Dɩlla, malɛka taoore b yeelga a Zozuwe fu-paala la b kõ-a-la pugla." 
Zechariah3:6 La Soaala malɛka yaool n zẽk a koɛɛg n yeel a Zozuwe woto: 
Zechariah3:7 «Ad dũni fãa Soaala sẽn pʋlemde: ‹F sã n deeg m noya, n tũ wa m sẽn datã, f na lebg m do-sõngã ne a zaka gũuda, la m na kẽes-f sẽn tʋmd-b mam tʋʋmda sʋka.› »" 
Zechariah3:8 «Kelg neere, Zozuwe, maan-kʋʋd kãsenga, yaa dũni fãa Soaala n gomde, kelg-y neere, yãmba, maan-kʋʋdba, a tũud-n-taase, yãmb fãa yaa fãagra sẽn wata makre. M na n waa ne sõgne b sẽn boond a soab tɩ Bullã." 
Zechariah3:9 Ad kugr la m na n dɩgl a Zozuwe taoore. Kugra yaa a ye la bõn-pɩndi a yopoe n be a zugu. Kug kãng zugu m na n gʋlsa m gʋlsem la daar a ye bala, m na n yẽesa tẽn-kãnga rẽgdã. N-ye, maam n yet rẽnna, mam dũni fãa Soaalã!" 
Zechariah3:10 Badaare, Wẽnd n gomde, y na n boola taaba n sõse y sãbse, la y kankams tẽngre.»" 
Zechariah4:1 Malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maama lebg n wa neka m yama wala b sẽn nekd ned a gõeemẽ. 
Zechariah4:2 A soka maam: «Fo nee bõe?» Tɩ m leoke: «M nee sãnem bug-roagendga ne a kaam laaga, a zugẽ. Fitil dãmba yaa a yopoe. Fitil fãa laong da kẽeda kaama laagẽ." 
Zechariah4:3 Bug-roagendga goabg la rɩtgo b ra yalsa oliviye.» 
Zechariah4:4 M kedgame n sok malɛkã sẽn da gomda ne maamã: «M Zu-soaba, bõn-bãmba yaa bõe makre?»" 
Zechariah4:5 Malɛkã sẽn da gomda ne maamã leok-m lame: «Fo ka mi bõn-bãmba sẽn makd bũmb ninga?» Tɩ m yeele: «Ayo, m zu-soaba!»" 
Zechariah4:6 La malɛkã leok-m-la woto: Malɛka yeel-m lame tɩ m taas a Zorobabɛl gomd kãnga: «Dũni fãa Soaala yetame: ‹Ad ka na n tũ ne f yãoog pãnga bɩ ne f kang wɩkre la f na n tʋm f tʋʋmda ye, na n tũu ne maam, Naaba-Wẽnd maasem.› »" 
Zechariah4:7 A paasame: «Tãng meng ne a bedrema kõn yɩ bũmb sẽn na n wa ne gɩdgre a Zorobabɛl yĩng ye. A na sarm-a. A na n yiisa a pʋgẽ kugr ning sẽn na n dogl wẽnd dooga rĩira tẽnsʋka. Neba fãa na n yeelame: kug kãnga be neere, kug kãnga be neere!»" 
Zechariah4:8 Soaala-Wẽnd le taas-m-la koe-kãnga: 
Zechariah4:9 «A Zorobabɛl nugu n sɩng wẽnd do-kãngã meebo la a na baas-a. La rẽ sã n wa yɩ, y na bãnge tɩ yaa maam, dũni fãa Soaala n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ." 
Zechariah4:10 «Fitils a yopoe wã makda Soaala nin a yopoe sẽn ne bũmb ning fãa sẽn maand tẽng zugã.» D ka tog n sãbs pipi tʋʋma n yet tɩ b yaa tʋʋm bõones ye. D noog d sũur wʋsgo tɩ d ne-la a Zorobabɛl sẽn le sɩng wẽnd dooga meebo.» 
Zechariah4:11 Mam le sokame: «La oliviye tɩɩs a yiibã sẽn be fitilsa roagendga goabg la rɩtgã yaa bõe makre?» 
Zechariah4:12 M le kell n pẽdg n sokame: «Oliviye tɩɩg wil a yiibã sẽn yegl sãnem dibli a yi sẽn ya yogdo tɩ kaam sẽn ya neer wa sãnem tũud be n duugdẽ wã, dẽ me yaa bõe makre?»" 
Zechariah4:13 T'a leok-ma: «Fo ka mi-laa?» Tɩ m leok tɩ ayo! 
Zechariah4:14 Tɩ malɛka yeele: «B yaa neba a yiibã b sẽn welge n na n zɛ ne kaam tɩ b lebg dũni fãa Soaala sõgen-kamba.» 
Zechariah5:1 M le zẽka m neng yĩngri la m yãee woto: sebre sẽn tõe n pil wa rebre n da laand yĩngri. 
Zechariah5:2 Malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maama yeelame: «Fo nee bõe?» Tɩ m leoke: «M nee sebr sẽn laande; a woglem yaa kãntɩɩs pisi, a yalem kãntɩɩs piiga.»" 
Zechariah5:3 Tɩ malɛka yeel maam: «Woto yaa kãab wẽnga sebre, kãabg sẽn na n lʋɩ tẽnga fãa zugu. Sebra neng a ye gʋlsame tɩ b na n diga wagdba fãa n yiis tẽngã. Neng a to wã zugu b gʋlsame tɩ b na n maana boto me ne neb niyns fãa sẽn ka pidsd b pʋlengo." 
Zechariah5:4 Dũni fãa Soaala yetame tɩ yaa bãmb meng n kãabd kãab wẽngã. A na n lʋɩɩ wagdr fãa la pʋlen-vaal soab fãa zakẽ la mam yʋʋr yĩnga a na n paa be la fãa na sãame, dooga kuga wala a sugra da bɛda.»" 
Zechariah5:5 Malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maama kolg n yeel-m lame: «Zẽk f nenga n gese yaa bõe n watã!» 
Zechariah5:6 Tɩ m soke: «Yaa bõe?» T'a leoke: «Yaa peoogo sẽn pid ne tẽnga fãa yel-wẽna.» 
Zechariah5:7 La peooga ling sẽn da ya namdã fõkame, la m yãenda pag sẽn zĩ a pʋgẽ." 
Zechariah5:8 Tɩ Malɛkã yeele: «Yaa wẽnem naaba.» La malɛka tusa pagã n lebs peooga pʋga n yaool n lebs namda lingã n fõgneg a noorã. 
Zechariah5:9 M sẽn zẽk m neng yĩngri m yãee pagba a yiibu. B ra yɩgda yĩngri. Sobg n da tusd-ba la b ra tara pɩgs sẽn wẽnd kʋl-pesg rẽnna. Bãmb n tʋk peoogã n loog yĩngri. 
Zechariah5:10 Tɩ m sok malɛkã sẽn da gomd ne maamã, b sẽn tar-a n dabd zĩig ninga." 
Zechariah5:11 T'a leok-ma: «B rabda Sinear tẽnga n na n tɩ me roog be a yĩnga, la b maneg zĩig be n dogl-a.»" 
Zechariah6:1 M le zẽka m neng yĩngri la ad m sẽn yãe: bilim-bilm a naase, n da yit tãms a yiib sʋka, la tãmsã da ya kutu." 
Zechariah6:2 Wed-zẽese n da vuud pipi bilim-bilma; a yiib soaba wed-zɩlse 
Zechariah6:3 a tãab soaba wed-peelse: la a naas soaba yaa wed-bolle. 
Zechariah6:4 Tɩ m sok malɛkã sẽn da gomda ne maamã: «M zu-soaba, bilim-bilma ne b wiidã makda bõe?»" 
Zechariah6:5 Tɩ Malɛka leok-ma: «Yaa dũni wã sobd a naasã. B ra bee dũni wã fãa Soaala taoore la b zãagda ne b marsã.» 
Zechariah6:6 Bilim-bilm ninga sẽn sog wed-zɩlsa teesa nug goabga. Wed-peelsa teesa nin-taoore. Wed-bola teesa nug rɩtgo. 
Zechariah6:7 Wed zẽesa kolgame la b kosame n na n saag tẽngã. Soaala yeel-b lame: «Kẽng-y, saag-y tẽngã.» La b saaga tẽngã." 
Zechariah6:8 Soaala boola maam n yeel-ma: «Ad sẽn dabd b nug goabgã na n tɩ sika mam Vʋʋsma beelẽ.» 
Zechariah6:9 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne maam n yeel-m woto: 
Zechariah6:10 «Reeg sẽn be-b yembda tẽngẽ wã kũuni, a Eldayi, a Tobiya la a Yedaya sẽn tall n wa wã. La f kẽng a Sefaniya biiga, a Zosiya, yiri tɩ yaa be la sẽn yi-b Babilona waa n kẽ." 
Zechariah6:11 F na n dɩka ligdã ne sãnema n maan naam pugla n fõgneg maan-kʋʋd kãsenga a Zosadak biiga, a Zozuwe." 
Zechariah6:12 Dẽ poore bɩ f wilg-a: ‹Dũni fãa Soaala gomda woto: Ad-y ned n be ka n boond tɩ Bõn-Bulli. A sẽn taẽ fãa, a na bulame, la yẽnda n na n me m do-sõngã." 
Zechariah6:13 N-ye! Yaa yẽ n na n le me wẽnd doogã, yaa yẽ n na n ning naam teedo. A na n zĩnda a goeela zugu n dɩ naam m buuda zugu. Maan-kʋʋd la b na n zĩndg n yegl-a. Bãmb b yiiba sʋka no-koeemd buud kõn zĩnd ye.›" 
Zechariah6:14 Naama pugl na n paa wẽnd doogẽ wã n tẽegd a Eldayi yelle, a Tobiya, a Yedaya la a Zosiya yelle. A Sefaniya biig a Zosiya sɩd yɩ kõt-zãng soaba.»" 
Zechariah6:15 Neba na n yii yɩɩga n wa me wẽnd doogã, tɩ rẽ la y na n bãnge tɩ yaa dũni fãa Soaala n tʋm maam yãmb nengẽ. Sẽn wilga fãa na n taasame, yãmb sã n sakd neere Wẽnnaam, y Soaala." 
Zechariah7:1 Dĩm a Dariyus naam yʋʋmd a naas soaba, Kislewu kiuugu, kiuug a wɛ soaba, kiuuga daar a naas soaba, Soaala-Wẽnd gomd kãnga n taa a Zakari." 
Zechariah7:2 Betɛl tẽng neba tʋma a Sarezɛr la a Regem-Melɛk la tẽnga rãmb neb kẽere tɩ b kẽng dũni fãa Soaala roogẽ wã n tɩ yõk sɛɛga," 
Zechariah7:3 la b sok maan-kʋʋdba la bãngdba n ges sã n ket n yaa modgr ne bãmba tɩ b yãbe la b loe noor yʋʋmda kiuug a nu soaba wala b sẽn da sɩng n maandẽ? 
Zechariah7:4 Dẽ la dũni fãa Soaala kõ-m noore 
Zechariah7:5 tɩ m leok maan-kʋʋdba la tẽnga neba fãa: «Ade, yaa yʋʋm pisopoe rõanna la y loet noor la y yãbda, kiuug a nu soaba la kiuug a yopoe soaba, m sok n gese da yaa mam nonglem yĩnga la yãmb da maan boto bɩ?" 
Zechariah7:6 Y sã n dɩtẽ la y yũuda ka y meng sũur la y noogd laa?» 
Zechariah7:7 Al pĩnd-pĩnda, bãngdba da zoe n taas-y-la m koeese. B kos-y lame tɩ y maan gũusgu ne yell a woto. Dẽ wakatã tɩ Zerizalɛɛm ne a tẽn-toosa da ket n vɩ ne laafi, tɩ tẽnga nug rɩtgo ne mogra noor ket n pid ne neba." 
Zechariah7:8 Soaala-Wẽnd goma ne a Zakari n yeel-a: 
Zechariah7:9 «Ad m sẽn da gomd n yet tɩ y maan gũusg ne bũmb ninga la woto: Kao-y bʋʋd ne sɩda la y vɩɩnd vɩɩm sẽn pid ne bʋgsem la nimbãan-zoeere, ãnkam fãa ne a saam-biiga." 
Zechariah7:10 Da yɩɩ nin-toose ne pʋg-kõore, ne kɩɩba, ne sãana, la naong soab ye, la y da tags tags wẽnse y sũurẽ ne taab ye.»" 
Zechariah7:11 Neba ka tʋlg n kelg-m ye; b yĩgsa maam; b yẽda b tʋba sẽn na n yɩlẽ n da tõog n wʋm ye. 
Zechariah7:12 B kʋɩɩsa b sũuri wa kugr ninga sẽn ka tar mak-n-taag ne keglma ye. B pa tʋlg n kelg dũni fãa Soaala sẽn zãms-ba ne tẽn-kʋdem wẽnnẽ bãngdba ye. Yaa rẽ me yĩng la Soaala puug b sũur wʋsgo. 
Zechariah7:13 Soaala leok-b lame: «M sẽn waa n sagend-b tɩ b tũ m sẽn wilgã, b ka tʋlg n kelg-m ye, woto la mam me yeel tɩ m kõn leok-ba, b sẽn waa n yõkd m sɛɛga ye." 
Zechariah7:14 M sẽeg-b lame, n kẽes tẽnsẽ b sẽn da ka mi; woto b basa b poorẽ, tẽng sẽn lebg vɩʋʋgo, tɩ ned ka le yit bɩ a kẽeda a pʋgẽ ye. Woto b basame tɩ tẽng sẽn da ya tẽn-nooga lebg zĩ-peen-daaga.»" 
Zechariah8:1 Dũni fãa Soaala taas-m-la koe-kãnga: 
Zechariah8:2 «Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, m nonga Zerizalɛɛm ne nonglem kãsenga, m nonglma ne a rʋʋga kʋɩlse." 
Zechariah8:3 Yaa rẽ me yĩng la m yeta tɩ m lɛɛg n wa kẽ Zerizalɛɛm, m lɛɛg n wa kẽe Siõ. B na n boola Zerizalɛɛm tɩ tẽn-sõngo, n bool Siõ tɩ Wẽnd tãnga, tãn-sõngo." 
Zechariah8:4 Ad Wẽnd noor gomde: nin-kẽemse, pʋg-yãanse, sẽn tikd-b rasaar fãa, na n leb n wa zĩnda Zerizalɛɛm." 
Zechariah8:5 Tẽnga na n le pida ne kom-bõonego, kom-dibli la kom-pugli la b na n le sigla b reem Zerizalɛɛm soya zutu." 
Zechariah8:6 Dẽ fãa wẽnda wa bũmb sẽn ka tõe n yɩ sɩda, ne Israyɛl bu-kella ye, la m tõeeme, maam, dũni fãa Soaala, tɩ sɩd yɩ boto." 
Zechariah8:7 M kãabd-y lame, m na n fãaga m buuda neba sẽn be pa-weere, yaanga bɩ nin-taoore." 
Zechariah8:8 M na n le tall-b lame n wa, tɩ b zĩnd Zerizalɛɛm tẽnsʋka. B na yɩɩ mam neba la mam me na n yɩɩ bãmb Wẽnnaam, tɩ m zã-b ne pʋ-peelem la zemsgo.»" 
Zechariah8:9 Ad dũni fãa Soaala sẽn yete: «Bɩ y keng y sũuri, yãmb fãa sẽn ket n wʋmd kãab mood niyns m sẽn da yeel bãngdba tɩ b taas yãmbã, b sẽn waa n le sɩng wẽnd dooga meebã." 
Zechariah8:10 Pĩnda ned da ka le yaood ninsaalba la rũmsa tʋʋmd ye. Bɛɛba ra gɩdga yi ka n kẽ ka, tɩ rẽ wakatã tɩ m da basa neba tɩ b yũud taab zɩɩm." 
Zechariah8:11 La marsã m ka na le maan ne bu-kellã wa m sẽn maan pĩnda ye. 
Zechariah8:12 M na n waa ne laafi tẽng zugu. Bugsuntunda na n le woma biisi, tẽnga kood na n le sakame. Saaga na n le nii sõmbo; m na n kõ kũun kãens fãa m bu-kellã." 
Zechariah8:13 Zɩɩda la Israyɛl, yãmb wẽnega buud niynsi Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn yãk b rãmb bark tẽng zugu. Ad m sẽn fãagd-y marsã la y na n lebga buud ning sẽn pid ne Wẽnd barka kaseto. Woto wã da zoe-y rabeem ye, keng-y y sũuri!»" 
Zechariah8:14 Dũni fãa Soaala yeta woto: «M sẽn da waa n yeel pĩnd tɩ m na n bas-y-la ne pɛta, y yaab rãmba sẽn da puug m sũura wakato, ad-y m da ka lebs m zelemd ye." 
Zechariah8:15 Marsã m lebsda m zelemde, m tʋllame marsã n maan Zerizalɛɛm la a Zɩɩda neere. Da zoe-y rabeem ye!" 
Zechariah8:16 Ad yãmb sẽn tog n maan bũmb ninga: Togs-y taab sɩda, kao-y zemsg bʋʋdo, laafi bʋʋdo." 
Zechariah8:17 Da tʋlg-y wẽng ne taab ye, da wẽen-y wẽen-faad ye, tɩ yɛl a woto buud la m kis wa fãa-fãa, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde.»" 
Zechariah8:18 Dũni fãa Soaala taas-m-la koe-kãnga: 
Zechariah8:19 «M yet-y lame tɩ no-loeer niyns y sẽn maand kiuug a naas soaba, a nu soaba, a yopoe soaba, la piig soaba na n lebga a Zɩɩda yĩnga, kibs bɛd daare, sũ-noog daare. La y sẽn na n bao bũmb ning n yɩɩda yaa sɩda la laafi vɩɩm ne taaba.»" 
Zechariah8:20 Ad dũni fãa Soaala sẽn le paasde: «Bu-zẽmba la tẽns a taab neb ka tɛka na n le wa kẽe Zerizalɛɛm. 
Zechariah8:21 Tẽng a ye neb na n yeela tẽng a to rãmba: ‹Wa-y yã, wa-y tɩ d tɩ pʋʋs dũni fãa Soaala, wa-y tɩ d pẽneg-ba.› B na n paamame tɩ b leoke: d na n tũ-y lame." 
Zechariah8:22 N-ye! Neb kʋʋngo, tẽns sẽn tar pãng na n wa baoo maama Naaba-Wẽnde, Zerizalɛɛm, la b na n wa pʋʋs-m lame." 
Zechariah8:23 Wakat kãnga, yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n yete, neb piig sẽn gomde goam toɛ-toɛ yã na n gãda Zʋɩf fuug noore n yeel-a: ‹Tõnd tʋl n wa zĩnda ne yãmb Zʋɩf rãmbã tɩ d wʋmame tɩ Wẽnnaam bee ne yãmba.› »" 
Zechariah9:1 Ad Soaala sẽn yet tɩ m wilgi. B koɛɛga tata Adrak la Damas tẽnga. Ka Israyɛl neba yell bala la Soaala get ye, b geta ninsaalba fãa yelle." 
Zechariah9:2 B gomda ne Damas yaka, a Amat, n gomd ne Tir la Sidõ, tẽns sẽn pid ne yẽesem la nus tʋʋmd bãngre." 
Zechariah9:3 Tir me-la a tãnsoben-doogo la a kẽesa a pʋgẽ, wanzurf la sãnem wala sor noor sẽn zam ne tãndo, wala soya sẽn pid ne tom." 
Zechariah9:4 Soaala na n deega a laoga fãa, n tus a lal-gũbrã n lubi, n yõog tẽnga bugum." 
Zechariah9:5 Askalõ na n yãeeme la rabeem na n yõk-a lame. Gaza me na n digame, n paas Ekrõ t'a sẽn da teeg a soaba lʋɩɩme. Dĩm kõn le zĩnd Gaza, la ned ba a ye kõn le zĩnd Askalõ ye." 
Zechariah9:6 Bu-kalem-kalem na n zĩnda Asdod. La maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, na n kɩtame tɩ Filisti wilg-m-menga sɛ." 
Zechariah9:7 M na n deega Filisti rãmb noorẽ rũng fãa sẽn pa kodg nemdo, rũng fãa sẽn kʋ maoong wẽn-naand yĩnga nemdo. Filisti rãmba bu-kell na n paamame tɩ m lebg bãmb Wẽnde wa m sẽn yaa a Zɩɩda Wẽnde. Ekrõ rãmb na n wa naaga m buudã wa Zebuze rãmba sẽn maane." 
Zechariah9:8 M na n gilgd n geta m soolma la m na n zaba ne a bɛɛba. Ned kõn le kẽ a pʋgẽ ye, ned kõn le wa maan m buuda pãn-tõog ye. M get-a-la marsã ne nonglem." 
Zechariah9:9 Kɩdem ne f pãng fãa, Zerizalɛɛm! Lang sũ-noogo, Siõ tẽnga! Ad f Dĩma sẽn wat f nengẽ. A yaa zemsg soaba la yẽ n yɩɩd ne pãnga. A yaa sulg-m-meng soaba, la a zomba bõanga; yaa bõn-bila, yaa bõn-yãang biiga la a zom yã." 
Zechariah9:10 A na n yiisa zabra bilim-bilma Efrayim, a na n yiisa wed-daad Zerizalɛɛm, a na n kao tãbdo, a na n sika laafi bu-zẽmba tẽnsẽ. A soolem na n sɩnga mogr noorẽ n tɩ tãag mogr noore, a na n sɩnga Efrat kʋɩlga noorẽ n tɩ tãag tẽnga sɛtmẽ." 
Zechariah9:11 Yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomd woto: «Tõnd zooda yĩnga, zood sẽn yõge tɩ maand zɩɩm kaset lʋɩ sʋka, zood kãng yĩnga, m na n yiisa y kamb niyns sẽn pag roogo la roog sẽn wẽnd ko-baoor sẽn ka tar koom." 
Zechariah9:12 Yãmb fãa sẽn da pag roogo la sẽn da ket n zĩi n saagdẽ, leb-y y tẽngẽ tɩ b le maneg n yika a lal-gũbrã. M zoe n togsd-y-la marsã tɩ m na n dola y namsgã naoor a yiibu ne m kũuni." 
Zechariah9:13 Zabr yĩnga m na n dɩka a Zɩɩda t'a yɩ m tãpo. M pĩim la a Efrayim; Siõ, m na n pirsa f kamba tɩ b tak zabre ne a Yavã kamba, la m nugẽ a Siõ na n lebga m sʋʋga tɩ m tʋm gãndalsem tʋʋma.»" 
Zechariah9:14 Soaala-Wẽnd na n le siga vugr bal b buudẽ. B pĩima na n tãoo wa sa-yãgbo. Bãmb meng n na n peeb tõntõogo, b na n waa ne nug-rɩtg sa-lugsã." 
Zechariah9:15 Dũni fãa Soaala na n yɩ b gũuda. Yaa sapɩlem la b na n lobe la b sẽeg bɛɛbã. Sapɩlma na n daaga bɛɛba zɩɩm la zɩɩma na n zoe wa rãam; na n yɩɩ wa maanda zɩɩm sẽn pid zɩ-mesdem laase bɩ sẽn serd maan-kugra yɩdba. 
Zechariah9:16 La badaare, Soaala-Wẽnd na n fãaga b buudu. B na n fãag-a-la wa rũm-kɩɩm sẽn fãagd a rũmsi. Neba na n wẽnega kug neeb sẽn tablg naam pugla, b na n yãga tẽnga rãmb nini." 
Zechariah9:17 Tẽnga na pida ne neerem la sũ-noogo. Kom-dibli la kom-pugli na n nooga b sũuri ne alkam la bugsuntund rã-paalga. 
Zechariah10:1 Kos-y Soaala-Wẽnd sa-koom; saaga yaa bãmb nug kũuni. Kos-y tɩ b na kɩt t'a ni wʋsgo tɩ ned kam fãa pʋʋg bĩm ne koodo. 
Zechariah10:2 Y sokda y wẽn-naandsa saaga poorẽ la yaa zirẽ bal la b leokd-y. Bagba me ka tar pʋg ye, yaa b sẽn gãand n zãms la b wilgda, n togsd zirẽ-beedo, n kɩt tɩ neba tuumnẽ wa piisi sẽn ka tar pe-kɩɩma." 
Zechariah10:3 M sũur puuga ne pe-kɩɩm sãamsã. B yetame tɩ b tõe n gesa m buuda yelle; dẽ me la m na n yik ne-ba. N-ye! Maam n yete, maam, dũni fãa Soaalã, yaa m meng m toore n na n ges m bãgra yelle, maam n na n ges a Zɩɩda yelle. M na n tall-a lame n kẽng zabre wa weef sẽn sõngd-m tɩ m maand raoodo." 
Zechariah10:4 Yaa yẽ nengẽ la m na n yiis nanams buud toor-toore. B na yɩɩ kegems wa kug niyns sẽn tar n tʋɩɩsd roto, kẽnkẽ wa baaf ning b sẽn loet pɛɛl roog, dɩm-dɩm wa zabr tãpo." 
Zechariah10:5 B fãa na n yɩɩ gãndaado, n tabd b bɛɛba wala b sẽn tagd tom sor zugu. B na n zabame tɩ maam, b Soaala, bee ne bãmba la sẽn zao-b wiidi na n yãee yãnde." 
Zechariah10:6 M paasa a Zɩɩda pãnga, m na n fãaga a Israyɛl. M na n le talla a kambã n wa b tẽngẽ la m na n wilg-b-la m nonglem wala m zɩ n bas-b ye. M yaa Wẽnnaam, bãmb Soaala, la m na n deega b kosgo." 
Zechariah10:7 Efrayim neba na n yɩɩ wa tãb-biisi sẽn tar pãnga la sẽn pid ne sũ-noogo wa neb sẽn tɩg rãam. B kamba na n yãee rẽ b me kɩdem, Soaala yĩnga, b na n pida ne sũ-noogo." 
Zechariah10:8 M na n boola m buudã n le tigim-a; m yeelame tɩ m na n fãag-a lame. B na n le yɩɩ ka tɛk wa pĩnda. 
Zechariah10:9 M sẽeg-b-la bu-zẽmb sʋka la b sẽn zãag n tɩ be zĩig ning fãa, b na tẽeg m yelle, b na rog kamb be la b na le lɛɛg n wa." 
Zechariah10:10 M na n yiis-b-la Ezipt la Asʋr tẽnga, n tall-ba n wa tigs Galaad la Libã la vɩʋʋg ka na n sek-b ye." 
Zechariah10:11 B na n dʋʋga mogrã ne rabeem la maam, b Soaala, m na sigs ko-wiisã. Nil kʋɩlg na n kʋɩɩme. Asʋr wilg-m-menga na n sɛɛme b na n deega Ezipt naam dasaare." 
Zechariah10:12 M na n paasa m buuda pãnga. Wakat fãa a na n maana sẽn tat m yam. Yaa maam n togsd rẽ, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde." 
Zechariah11:1 Pak f kʋɩlense, Libã, tɩ bugma rɩɩ f tɩ-bɛdã." 
Zechariah11:2 Zõond-y n kelem, tɩɩs niyns vãad sẽn ka mi sʋʋgre, ad-y tɩ-kãsensa rʋʋgame. Kelem-y yã, Bazã tɩ-neebã, y googa sẽn da yɛs tɩ ned ka tõe n kẽ a pʋgẽ wã, ad-y fãa na n kɛɛme n dʋʋge." 
Zechariah11:3 B wʋmda neb niyns sẽn gũud buuda wa piisa waasgo, b ziira wakat loogame. B wʋmda bõnyẽes yãbre. B ra sora b tʋg-tagdẽ Zʋrdẽ kʋɩlg noore la fãa na n yõogame." 
Zechariah11:4 Daar a ye Soaala-Wẽnd kõ-m-la no-kãngã: «Kɩɩm rũms niyns sẽn sʋk maanda yĩnga. 
Zechariah11:5 Sẽn daad-b piisa wẽnegdame n koot-ba b toore tɩ b sũur pa kiuusdẽ ye. Sẽn koosd-b piisa yetame: ‹D pʋʋs Wẽnd barka tɩ d lebga arzɛk rãmba.› Sɩda pe-kɩɩmba ka zoet b piisa nimbãaneg ye. 
Zechariah11:6 Ade, maam n yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, tɩ mam me kõn zoe tẽnga rãmb nimbãaneg ye. Mam na n basa ned kam fãa ne a yaka, la a rĩma. Dĩm dãmba na n wãa tẽngã la m kõn fãag ned ba a ye b nugẽ ye.»" 
Zechariah11:7 Maam n lebg lɛɛbdba piisa pe-kɩɩma, piis niyns b sẽn tar n wat kʋʋbã. M bao pe-kɩɩm dasab a yi, n pʋd dasaar a ye tɩ Zoodo, n pʋd a to wã t'a Lagengo. La m kẽnga piisa gũudem." 
Zechariah11:8 Kiuug a ye bal pʋgẽ m diga b pe-kɩɩmb a tãabã. M waa n yɛɛ ne piisã tɩ bãmb me yam yi maam. 
Zechariah11:9 Tɩ m yeele: «M kõn le gũ-y yɛs ye. Sẽn na n ki-a bɩ a ki; sẽn na n kodg a soab bɩ b kodg-a, sẽn na n menem-a bɩ a menem, tɩ b sẽn bas b rãmba dat bɩ b wãb taaba!»" 
Zechariah11:10 M yaool n dɩka dasaarã, a Zoodo, la m kao-a-la gɩrse n wilg tɩ m kao zood ninga m sẽn da yõg ne neba fãa wã." 
Zechariah11:11 Zoodo kao badaar bala. Piisa raadba sẽn da get maama bãngame tɩ sɩd yaa Wẽnd n da gomd ne maam. 
Zechariah11:12 M yeel-b lame: «Woto sã n nooma yãmba, bɩ y kõ-m yaoodo; y sã n ka sake, bɩ y base.» B sõda m yaoodo, yaa wakɩ koeems pis-tã." 
Zechariah11:13 Soaala-Wẽnd yeel-m lame: «Bɩ f tall ligd sẽn zem woto waare n tɩ kɩs yõka t'a yẽneg-a.» M dɩka wakɩ koeems pis-tã wã n tɩ kɩs yõaka, Soaala wẽnd doogẽ." 
Zechariah11:14 Dẽ poore, m dɩka dasaare a to wã, a Lagengo, la m kao-a-la gɩrse n wilgi tɩ saam-biira sɛɛme, Zɩɩda ne Israyɛl sʋka." 
Zechariah11:15 Naab a Wẽnd le yeela maam: «Maan marsã wa rũm-kɩɩm yalma," 
Zechariah11:16 tɩ bala mam menga n na n bao rũm-kɩɩma sẽn ka zugu n kõ tẽn-kãngã. Pesgo ning sẽn menema, a toog kõn zĩnd ne a ye; a kõn tɩp sẽn pogl-a ye; a kõn sõng pãng sẽn sɛɛ ye. La a na n wãba rũm-nobdi wã nemdo al n tol n võ b nao-bendo." 
Zechariah11:17 Wẽnd na sãam rũm-kɩɩm-yalma, sẽn basd a rũmsi! Wẽnd na koms a rɩtg kanga la a rɩtg nifu, t'a rɩtg nug yɩ kɩɩnga la a rɩtg nif yɩ feoogo!»" 
Zechariah12:1 Soaala koɛɛg ne a Israyɛl. Soaala sẽn yɛdg saagã la b viglg tẽngã koɛɛga. Soaala sẽn kõ ninsaalb yama koɛɛga: 
Zechariah12:2 «M na kɩtame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm wẽneg wamd sẽn pid ne m sũ-puura rãam. Tẽns niyns sẽn gũbg Zerizalɛɛma sã n yũ-a fãa, a na lub-ba. Na n yɩɩ boto me ne a Zɩɩda, bɛɛba sã n wa gũbg Zerizalɛɛm, a rãama na lub-ba." 
Zechariah12:3 Badaare m na n kɩtame tɩ Zerizalɛɛm lebg kugri bu-zẽmba fãa sẽn na n tʋlg n zẽke. Neb niyns sẽn na n mak-b kugra zẽkre, ad-y b na n pogla b mense. Woto b na wa n lagem taab n tʋlg a zẽkre." 
Zechariah12:4 La ad m sẽn yete, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde: ‹Badaare m na n kɩtame tɩ wiida pid ne rabeem, tɩ wed-dʋʋdba pid ne yɩɩre. M na n gũ-la a Zɩɩda la m na n kɩtame tɩ bu-zẽmba wiid lebg zoeense.›" 
Zechariah12:5 Woto la Zɩɩda nanams na n yeel b sũuri: ‹Zerizalɛɛm neba pãnga bee dũni fãa Soaala nengẽ.› 
Zechariah12:6 Badaare m na n kɩtame tɩ Zɩɩda nanams wẽneg bugum sẽn zomb googo, bɩ bug-vɩleng sẽn ning alkam sẽn kals tẽngre. Goabg la rɩtgo, poorẽ la taoore, b na n sãama b yagsa fãa, tɩ bãmb menga yaool n ket n vɩ ne laafi b tẽngẽ.»" 
Zechariah12:7 Yaa Zɩɩda neba la Soaala na n deng n fãage, la woto a Daviid yagense la Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba, kõn saag n tags tɩ bãmb n yɩɩd Zɩɩda neb a taaba ye." 
Zechariah12:8 Badaare Naaba-Wẽnd na n gũ sẽn kẽeda Zerizalɛɛm tẽngã; ned ninga sẽn kɩlla lʋɩɩsã bãmb sʋka, na n paama a Daviid meng pãngã, t'a Daviid yagensa na n lʋɩ bãmb taoor n kẽnd wa Wẽnde, n kẽnd wa Soaala malɛka." 
Zechariah12:9 «Badaare, yaa Soaala-Wẽnd n gomda, m na lub bu-zẽmb niyns fãa sẽn na n zab ne Zerizalɛɛm, m na n wã-b-la gilli." 
Zechariah12:10 M na n pidsa a Daviid yagense la Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba ne neer baoob yam la Wẽnd sɛɛg yõkr yam. B na n wẽnemd n gesa maam, ned a to wã yĩnga, kãnda sẽn kõs a soaba yĩnga, b na n yãba yẽ soaba wala b sẽn yãbd bi-yend sẽn ki, wala b sẽn yãbd bi-kẽeng kũum." 
Zechariah12:11 Badaare Zerizalɛɛm na n pida ne wiisgu wala Adad-Rimõ wiisgu, Megido bãg-faagẽ." 
Zechariah12:12 Buud toɛ-toɛ wã na n wiisa b tẽngẽ. A Daviid zaka na n wiisame, a Natã zaka na n wiisame, pagba toore, rapa me toore." 
Zechariah12:13 A Levi zaka, a Simeyi zaka na n wiisame, pagba toore la rapa me toore." 
Zechariah12:14 Buuda sagsa fãa na n wiisame, pagba toore, rapa me toore.»" 
Zechariah13:1 Badaare ko-bundum n na n pusg a Daviid neba yĩnga la sẽn kẽed-b Zerizalɛɛm yĩnga, sẽn na n yɩ-la tɩ b tõog n paam b yel-wẽna rẽgda pekre." 
Zechariah13:2 Badaare, dũni fãa Soaala n gomde: «M na n yiisa wẽn-naandsa fãa, b kõn leb n tẽeg b yell ye. M na n yiisa neb niyns sẽn boond b mens tɩ bãngdba, la m na n menesa b yamẽ b wẽn-naandsa pʋgbo." 
Zechariah13:3 Ned sã n ket yãmb sʋka n gomd bãngr goama, bɩ a ba-roaka ne a ma-roaka naag taab n yeel-a: ‹Fo kõn vɩɩnd ye, tɩ bala f yetame tɩ yaa Soaala yʋʋr yĩng la f goamda la yaa zirẽ bal la f togsda.› La a wat n yɛs n gomda a bãngra goama t'a ba-roaka la a ma-roaka na n kõs-a ne sʋʋga." 
Zechariah13:4 Badaare yãnd na n kẽe bãngdbã b sẽn wat n gomd b sẽn yãendã. B kõn saag n le yeelg maan-kʋʋra fuug ye. 
Zechariah13:5 B fãa na n yeelame marsã: ‹Ad m n ka bãngd ye, m yaa koaada, n dɩt m pʋt yõodo al m yãadmẽ.›" 
Zechariah13:6 La b sã n sok-a: ‹Yaa bõe sãmpoaga n be f yãoogẽ?› A na n yeelame: ‹M paam-b-la m zo-rãmb nengẽ.› » 
Zechariah13:7 Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala gomda: «Sʋʋga, yik zabre ne m rũm-kɩɩma, yik n zab ne m sẽn yãk a soab t'a yɩ m sõangd sõngã, wẽ pe-kɩɩma tɩ piisa sẽeg zĩig zãnga, la ba pe-bõonesa kõn põs m meng nug ye.»" 
Zechariah13:8 Ad dũni fãa Soaala sẽn le gomda: «Tẽnga fãa pʋgẽ, neb a tãab zugu, neb a yiib n na n ki n kees a ye." 
Zechariah13:9 M na n fɛɛsame la m na n yɩlga sẽn kell-bã. M na n ning-b-la wa b sẽn ningd sãnem la wanzurf bugmẽ tɩ b paam n yɩlge. B na yõk m sɛɛg marsã la m na reeg b kosgo. M na n boola bãmb tɩ m buudu, tɩ bãmb me yeele: ‹Soaala la d Wẽnnaam.› »" 
Zechariah14:1 Ad Wẽnd sũ-puura daar sẽn wate; badaare, Zerizalɛɛm kẽedba, b na n pʋɩ-la y laoga fãa." 
Zechariah14:2 Sɩda Soaala na n tigma bu-zẽmbã tɩ b bob zabr ne Zerizalɛɛm. B na n pãba tẽngã n deege, b na n zɛɛ rotã, b na n yõga pagbã, b na n basa tẽnga pʋɩ-sʋka, n loog pa-weer ne pʋɩ-sʋka." 
Zechariah14:3 Dẽ poore, Soaala-Wẽnd na n yii n zaba ne bu-zẽmba zabr menga." 
Zechariah14:4 Badaare b nao wã na n yaasa tãng zugu, tãng ning sẽn be Zerizalɛɛm yaangã, Oliviye tãngã. Tãngã na n wesga sʋka, al yaanga n digd taoore, n bas bãg-faag sʋka. Bogr a ye na n sergame n leb goabga tɩ bogr a ye serg n leb rɩtgo." 
Zechariah14:5 Zerizalɛɛm dãmba na n tũu bãg-faaga sẽn wedg sʋkã n paam n zoe n tɩ tãag Asal tẽnga. Y na n zoee wala y yaab rãmba sẽn maan Zɩɩda dĩm a Oziyas wẽnnẽ; y na n zoeeme, tẽnga sẽn na n miima yĩnga. Wakat kãng marsã la m Soaala-Wẽnd na n sigi tɩ nin-sõma fãa yãagd-ba." 
Zechariah14:6 Badaare, wĩntoog vẽenem bɩ kiuug vẽenem ka le tar tʋʋmd ye, waood la wulg kõn le zĩnd ye." 
Zechariah14:7 Daar n na n zĩndi, la Wẽnd bal n mi, zĩiga na n kell n yɩɩ vẽenega, b kõn bãng n welg wĩntoogo ne yʋng ye. Zaabr na n yɩɩ vẽenem." 
Zechariah14:8 Badaare, ko-vɩɩg n na n pusg Zerizalɛɛm. Kooma pʋɩ-sʋk na n kẽnga yaang mogrã, yamsem mogre, tɩ pʋɩ-sʋka me kẽng nin-taoore mogrã, Tẽnsʋk Mogre. Kooma na n zoe tʋʋlg wakato wa sẽoogo." 
Zechariah14:9 Wakat kãng la Soaala na n dɩ naam dũni fãa pʋgẽ. Bãmb bal la neba na n waoog wa b Wẽnde, ãndũni rãmb fãa na n gesa bãmb bala wala Wẽnde." 
Zechariah14:10 Tãmsã fãa sẽn gũbg Zerizalɛɛm na n lebga pʋto, al Geba sẽn be nug goabga n tɩ tãag Rimõ sẽn be nug rɩtgo. Zerizalɛɛm na n zao yĩngri. Tẽnga sɩngda a Bẽnzame dignoorã n tɩ tãag pipi Gõdrã; n sɩng no-kʋdgã, a Ananeyɛl ro-lug-lugã, n tɩ tãag b sẽn kõgd naab rãama zĩiga." 
Zechariah14:11 Neb na tõog n kẽ n vɩɩnd tẽnga pʋga. Wãab kõn le wã ye la ned kam fãa na n zĩnda ne laafi. B na n kẽe be; kãab-wẽng kõn le zĩnd ye, b na n kẽe Zerizalɛɛm ne laafi." 
Zechariah14:12 Ad sɩbgr ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn na n kõ neb niynsi sẽn na n zab ne Zerizalɛɛm: b na n kɩtame tɩ b yĩng põoge tɩ b ket n yɛs b nao zutu, b nini na n põoga b bogdẽ, tɩ b zelemde põog b noorẽ." 
Zechariah14:13 Wakat kãng la Soaala na n kɩt tɩ b rig rabeem kãsenga. Ned kam fãa na n yik n teega ne a yaka. 
Zechariah14:14 Zɩɩda rãmb na n zabame n fãag Zerizalɛɛm. A na deega a yagsa laoga fãa. B na n wʋka sãnem, wanzurf la fut ka tɛka." 
Zechariah14:15 Yel-beed ning sẽn na n pak ninsaalba na n paka rũmsã. Bɛɛba wiidi, b bõn-weese, b yʋgma la b bõeense, fãa na n kiime." 
Zechariah14:16 Tẽns niynsi sẽn zab-b ne Zerizalɛɛm, neb niyns fãa sẽn põs-ba na n waa Zerizalɛɛm yʋʋmd-yʋʋmd fãa n wõgemd dũni fãa Soaala taoore n waoog-ba, la b maan Sẽgda kibsa." 
Zechariah14:17 Buud ninga sẽn ka kẽnga Zerizalɛɛm n waoog dũni fãa Soaala, a bãng t'a kõn paam sa-koom ye." 
Zechariah14:18 Ezipt buudã sã n ka kẽng Zerizalɛɛm n maan Sẽgda kibsa, a na n paam sɩbgr ning Wẽnd sẽn sɩbgd tẽns niynsi sẽn ka maand Sẽgda kibsã." 
Zechariah14:19 Yaa woto la b na sɩbg tẽns niynsi sẽn ka na n kẽng b Zerizalɛɛm n tɩ maan Sẽgda kibsa. 
Zechariah14:20 Wakat kãnga b na n gʋlsa wiidi wã loamba zutu: Soaala-Wẽnd soolem. Wẽnd dooga rʋgdã, rʋgd zaalsã, fãa na n lebga Wẽnd soolem wa zɩ-mesdma laase, sẽn dɩg maan-kugra taoore." 
Zechariah14:21 La rʋgda fãa sẽn be Zerizalɛɛm la Zɩɩda na n lebga dũni fãa Soaala soolem. Neb niyns fãa sẽn dat-ba n kʋ maoongo na wa n dɩk-ba n dʋg b nemdo. Wakat kãng sã n wa ta, lɛɛbdba kõn le zĩnd dũni fãa Wẽnda roogẽ ye." 
Malachi1:1 Ad koɛɛg ning Soaala-Wẽnd sẽn taas a Israyɛl kamba ne a Malasi noore. 
Malachi1:2 Soaala-Wẽnd yeta b buudu: «M nong-y lame.» La sã n sok-ba: «Y nonglma kaset la bʋgo?» Soaala leodame: «A Ezayu da yaa a Zakoob saam-biiga, ne rẽ fãa m da nonga a Zakoob," 
Malachi1:3 n yaool n bas a Ezayu kɛɛnga. M looga ne bũmb ning fãa a kamba, Edomitsa, sẽn da tar b tãmsa zutã la b tẽnga lebga weoogo la we-yũus tẽnga." 
Malachi1:4 A Edom tõe n yeelame: ‹B sãama tõnd tẽnga la tõnd na n yika d raboodo.› Ad m sẽn leokd-ba, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala: ‹B rat bɩ b me, m na le wã. B na n pʋda b tẽngã: Wẽng sẽn dɩt naam tẽnga, la buud ninga Soaala sũur sẽn puud ne a soab daar fãa wã.›" 
Malachi1:5 Yãmba, Israyɛl kamba, y na n yãee rẽ fãa la y na n yeelame: ‹Soaala gãndgda Israyɛl tẽn-peelem n wilgd b pãnga.› »" 
Malachi1:6 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala yeta maan-kʋʋdba woto: «Biig waoogda a ba, tɩ yem-daoog zoet a zu-soab nifu. La sã n yaa maam, m ka naag n ya y ba la y zu-soab bɩ? Bõe tɩ y pa waoogd-m la y pa zoet m nifu? Y toog ka be ne maam ye la y bee tẽngre n sokdẽ: ‹D sãbs-y-la wãn-wãna?›" 
Malachi1:7 Ade, yãmb wata ne rɩ-yoodo m maan-kugra zugu. La yãmb yetame: ‹Tõnd paoog-y-la wãn-wãna?› Ade, yaa y nifã sẽn sãag m maan-kugrã." 
Malachi1:8 Y sẽn mii n talld rũng sẽn ya zoanga, woabga, bãada n na n kʋ maoong n kõ-ma, y tẽedame tɩ rẽ zemsame bɩ? Sã n ya tẽnga naaba la y kõ rũng a woto buudu, y tẽed t'a sũur na yɩ noogo? Y tẽed t'a na kõ-y y sẽn date? Yaa maam n sokde, maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, dũni fãa Soaalã." 
Malachi1:9 La marsã mak-y n na n kos m bũmbu, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, n kos-m tɩ m zoe m buuda nimbãanega, y tẽed tɩ m na kelge la m reeg y kosgo, tɩ y tʋʋm wẽnsa yaool n dɩg m taoore? M pa tẽed ye!" 
Malachi1:10 M tẽed tɩ yãmb nin-yend sã n pag wẽnd dooga kʋɩlens n são. Woto y kõn le tɩ yõgen bugma zaalem m maan-kugra zug ye. M pa get-y ne sũ-noog ye, la y sẽn wat ne kũuna ka noogd m sũur ba bilfu. Mam n yet rẽnna, maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala." 
Malachi1:11 Sẽn sɩng dũni wã yaanga n wat taoore, neb sẽn ya buud toor-toore mi-la m pãnga. Zĩig zãnga b wata ne kũun sẽn tog ne ma. Zĩig zãnga b yõogda tɩdare m waoogr yĩnga. Bala m yʋʋra yaa kãsenga tẽnsã fãa yĩnga. Yaa maam n yet rẽnna, maam, dũni fãa Soaalã." 
Malachi1:12 La yãmba, yãmb paoogd-m lame la y tagsdẽ tɩ Soaala maan-kugri ka tog ne waoogr ye, la y tõe n waa ne kũun niyns fãa y sẽn date." 
Malachi1:13 Y tol yetame: ‹Yaa zɩɩb yoodo la b zɩlgd tõndo.› Y sẽn tar m paoogr la y sẽn tar paoogre, maam m toore, dũni fãa Soaalã. Y kõt-m-la rũms sẽn ya wagdem dũmsi, bɩ rũms sẽn ya wobse, bɩ rũms sẽn bẽede. M yɩta a wãn n deeg maand a woto buudu. Leok-y tɩ m kelge." 
Malachi1:14 Yell na pak zãmb rãmba sẽn tar dũms sõma b wubrẽ n yaool n tũusd dũms yoodo n na kʋ maoongo. Yell na pak yẽ soaba, tɩ m yaa dĩm kãsenga la bu-zẽmba fãa zoeta maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaalã, m pãnga sẽn waoog yĩnga.»" 
Malachi2:1 La marsã, ad Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala sẽn yet maan-kʋʋdba tɩ b gũus ne bũmb ninga:" 
Malachi2:2 «Kelg-y-ma la modg-y tɩ m paam waoogr ning sẽn tog ne-ma. Ka rẽ mam na n teka y zu-noogã m sẽn kãabã t'a lebg zu-beedo. M na n maana boto tɩ yãmb n yet tɩ y pa ne m sẽn yet tɩ y gũus ne bũmb ningã sẽn sɩd sek gũusg ye. 
Malachi2:3 M zoe n zẽkda m koɛɛg ne yãmb yagensã. Sã n ya yãmb menga yaa rũmsa bĩndu la m na n lob y nenga, rũms niyns y sẽn kʋʋd y kibs rãmba wakato. Y fãa na n naagame n tɩ yõog bugum." 
Malachi2:4 Y na bãng tɩ yaa maam, Naaba-Wẽnde, dũni fãa Soaala n kõ no-kãnga, tɩ m datame tɩ m zooda ne a Levi la a Levi yagensa ra sãam ye." 
Malachi2:5 D zooda yĩnga m kõ-b-la vɩɩm la arzɛka, m zãms-b-la m waoogre, b reega m noore la b riga rabeem m taoore." 
Malachi2:6 Sɩd zãmsg ra be-la b noorẽ, la zãmb da ka be b sũuri ye; b ra kẽnda ne maam, pʋ-peelem la zemsgo pʋgẽ; b ra yiisda neb wʋsg wẽng pʋgẽ." 
Malachi2:7 Maan-kʋʋd tʋʋmd yaa a zãmbs neba tɩ b bãng Soaalã. Yaa yẽ la b na n wa sok n bãng yaa so-bʋgo la noora rat tɩ b tũ tɩ yẽ la dũni fãa Soaala no-rɛɛsa. 
Malachi2:8 La yãmba, maan-kʋʋdba, yãmb bʋdga sore. Y zãmsga kɩtame tɩ neb wʋsg kẽ moogo. Y sãama d zoodã, maam n yete, maam, dũni fãa Soaalã." 
Malachi2:9 La mam na n tusa neba tɩ b sãbs yã la b paoog yã tɩ y ka maand m daab ye la y ka yals y sɩd zĩigẽ daar fãa ye.» 
Malachi2:10 D fãa ka tar ba a ye laa? Ka Wẽnd a ye n naan-do? Yaa bõe marsã tɩ d zãmbd taaba n sãamd zood ninga Wẽnd sẽn yõg ne d yaab rãmbã? 
Malachi2:11 Zɩɩda rooga neb tʋma ne zãmbo. Yel-wẽnd kãseng la a maan Zerizalɛɛm la Israyɛl tẽn-peelmẽ. Zɩɩda neba pa waoog wẽnd dooga, b zĩ-nongrã, wa b sẽn da tog n waoog-a ye. Woto b kẽe ne pagba sẽn pʋgd wẽn-naandse la wẽn-sãamse." 
Malachi2:12 Ned ninga fãa sẽn maand woto, bɩ Wẽnd yiis a roagdb la a kamba a Zakoob buudẽ, ba a sã n yaa maan-kʋʋda." 
Malachi2:13 Ad bũmb a to me y sẽn maande: y pʋkda Wẽnd maan-kugrã ne nintãm, y tara kelemse la yãbre, tɩ Soaala ka le gete la b ka le reegd y kũuna ye." 
Malachi2:14 La y sokdame tɩ yaa bõe yĩng la b pa le rat y kũuni. Ade, yaa y sẽn da kãab bãmb taoore tɩ y kõn bas y bi-bɩɩlmẽ pag ye. Pʋg kãng n yɩ y pak-n-taaga, yãmb n da bao-a, yãmb n le bas-a." 
Malachi2:15 Soaala kɩtame tɩ foo ne f paga lebg bũmb a ye y yĩngẽ la y yamẽ. La y sẽn lebg nin-yendã, bõe la y raabo sã n ka Wẽnd kõ-y kamba? Woto wã, gũus-y la y ra bas y sẽn kẽ kãadem ne pag ning y bi-bɩɩlma wakat ye." 
Malachi2:16 M kisa pag yiisgu, m kisa pãn-tõogo. Yaa maam n yet rẽnna, maam, a Israyɛl Wẽnde la dũni fãa Soaala. Bɩ ned kam fãa maan gũusgu la a pids a sẽn kãabe." 
Malachi2:17 Y namsda Soaala-Wẽnd ne y goama; la y ka mi ye, n tol n zĩ n sokdẽ: «D namsd-b-la wãn-wãna?» Ade, yaa y sẽn yete: «Soaala nif nee sẽn maand-a wẽnga la b sĩnda.» Ka rẽ bɩ y zĩ n sokdẽ: «Wẽnd ning sẽn nonga zemsga bee yɛɛnẽ?»" 
Malachi3:1 Yaa woto la dũni fãa Soaala leokda: «Ade, m tʋmda neda, t'a tuk sore m taoore. Soaala y sẽn baood a soaba, na n waa vugr bala n kẽe a roogẽ. Tʋʋm-tʋmd ning y sẽn gũud a soaba watame n na n moon tɩ m na n yõga zood ne yãmba. Ad a sẽn wate!»" 
Malachi3:2 B waoonga raare ãnda n na n pa vɩɩga, ãnda n na n tõog n yalse? B na n yɩɩ wa bugum sẽn yɩlgd kutu, wala safãnd sẽn pekde." 
Malachi3:3 B na n zĩndame n menes sẽn ya rẽgd buud fãa. Wala b sẽn yɩlgd sãnem la wanzurf, b na n peka a Levi yagensã tɩ b tõog marsã n wat ne b kũuni wala sẽn toge." 
Malachi3:4 Woto, Zɩɩda la Zerizalɛɛm kũuna na ta Wẽnd yam wa pĩnda. Wala yʋʋm niyns sẽn loogã." 
Malachi3:5 Dũni fãa Soaala gomda woto: «M na n wa zĩnda y sʋka n kao-y bʋʋdo. M sẽn na n bool bʋʋda pipi, yaa sẽn tʋmd-b bag-tʋʋma, sẽn yoaad-ba, sẽn ka pidsd b pʋlengo, sẽn ka yaood b tʋʋm-tʋmdba, sẽn namsd b pʋg-kõap la kɩɩb-bi la sãamba, neb niyns fãa sẽn vɩ wa b toog ka be ne maama.»" 
Malachi3:6 Maam, Naaba-Wẽnd, n gomde, m pa teemd ye tɩ yãmb yaool n wilgd beoog sẽn vẽege tɩ y yaa a Zakoob yagen-wẽnse." 
Malachi3:7 Yãmb me maana wala y yaab rãmbã, y ka tũud sor ning m sẽn wilga ye, y ka reegd m noya ye. Lɛɛg-y n wa kẽ maam tɩ mam me kõn bas-y ye, maam n yet rẽnda, maam, dũni fãa Soaala. La m wʋmda y sẽn gomde: «D maanda a wãn n le kẽ Soaala?»" 
Malachi3:8 M leokd-y lame: «Y sẽn getã, segdame tɩ b tudg Wẽnde? La yãmba, yãmb yẽ tudgda maam. Y tudgd-m-la ne bõe? Yaa ne y kood lemse, la ne y kũuna." 
Malachi3:9 Ad-y kãab wẽng n na n dɩ yã tɩ yaa tẽnga gilli, tɩ yaa yãmb zãng fãa n zãmbd maam.»" 
Malachi3:10 Dũni fãa Soaala gomda woto: «Bɩ y tall n wa teeda bĩngr doogẽ y sẽn tog n kɩsa fãa, tɩ m zaka pid ne rɩɩbo. Maan-y boto n fɛɛs-ma la y na yãend tɩ m pak y yĩnga yĩngr sa-kooma la bark buud fãa na rʋʋg y zugu zembala." 
Malachi3:11 Y yĩnga m na tãs sʋya tɩ b ra sãam y kooda ye, tɩ b ra sãam y bugsuntunda womb ye, maam n kãabd-y rẽnna." 
Malachi3:12 Bu-zẽmba fãa na bool yãmb tɩ zu-noog rãmba, tɩ vɩɩm noog na n saka y tẽngẽ wã. Dẽ yaa maam, dũni fãa Soaala n gomde.»" 
Malachi3:13 Naaba-Wẽnd yeelame: «Y gomda goam põaas m poorẽ. La yamb sokdame: ‹D yeelame tɩ bõe n beeg yãmba?› 
Malachi3:14 Ad-y y sẽn yete: ‹Wẽnd tũudem yaa zaalem. Tõnd deega b noya, d saka no-loeer la sũ-sãang n datẽ tɩ dũni fãa Soaala tẽeg d yelle, la d ka paam fɩ." 
Malachi3:15 D neeme marsã tɩ sẽn zĩ-b ne sũ-noogo, yaa neb niyns toog sẽn ka be ne Wẽnde; sẽn ka bʋʋd-b beoog fare, yaa sẽn tʋmd-b wẽnga. Bãmb pursda raood ne Wẽnde, la bũmb ka maand-b bada.› »" 
Malachi3:16 Sẽn zoet-b Wẽndã me zĩnda ne taaba. Soaala-Wẽnd yoka b tʋbre, la b wʋmame. Bãmb taoore b gʋlsa tẽegr sebr pʋgẽ neb niyns sẽn zoet-b Wẽnnaama la sẽn teeg-b bãmba yʋy." 
Malachi3:17 Dũni fãa Soaala yaoolame marsã n yeele: «M sẽn na n wilg m pãnga raare, m na n gesa nin-bãmba wala m neba. Bãmb n na n yɩ m buudu. M na n yɩ nin-bʋgsg ne bãmba, wala ba sẽn yaa a soab ne a biig sẽn sakd-a." 
Malachi3:18 Wakat kãng y na bãng bũmb ning sẽn bak zemsg soab ne nin-wẽnga, n bakd sẽn pʋgd-b Wẽnde la sẽn bas-b Wẽnde.»" 
Malachi3:19 Maam n yete, maam dũni fãa Soaala, tɩ raar n wate la m sũura na n widga bug-kãsenga. Baraare gom-beeda rãmba la yel-wẽn-maandba na n dɩɩ bugum wa moodo. Bũmb kõn dɩ n kees ye, baa fɩ." 
Malachi3:20 Neb niyns fãa sẽn sulg-b meng mam taoorã, ad m sẽn kãabd-b: «M sẽn na n wa ne pãng ning n fãag m neba raarã na n puka wa wĩndg sẽn wat ne fãagre. Y na n paama y meng la y na n yɩga sũ-noogo wa nag-bi sẽn yit-b loɛɛgẽ." 
Malachi3:21 Daar ninga m sẽn na wilg m pãngã, y na n fẽda nin-wẽnsã wala sor zug begdo. Maam m yete, maam dũni fãa Soaala.»" 
Malachi3:22 Tẽeg-y yã a Moyiiz, m sõgna, sẽn zãms yãmb bũmb ningã. Reeg-y la y tũ m sẽn wilg noy-niyns Orɛb tãnga zugu m buud a Israyɛl yĩnga." 
Malachi3:23 Dũni fãa Soaala paasa woto: «Ade, m na n tʋma bãngda a Eli tɩ Wẽnd daarã sẽn ya ra-kãsenga, la a kẽesd rabeem nan ka ta ye." 
Malachi3:24 A na n wẽnega ba rãmba sũya n tees b kamba, la kamb sũya n tees b ba rãmba, woto kõn yɩ modgre tɩ m wa sãam tẽnga ye.»" 
Luke3:25 a Matatiyas biiga, a Amos biiga; a Nawum biiga, a Esli biiga, a Nagayi biiga,"
